Genesis1:1 Kotoma ageunet abu Edeke kosub akuj ka akwap.
Genesis1:2 Ido ajai akwap atai, komam etiakak; kojai amuton kokuju kaidules; kintkum emoyo loka Edeke kuju akipi."
Genesis1:3 Kobala Edeke ebe, “Kojau aica”; kosodi aica ajaun."
Genesis1:4 Koany Edeke aica ebe ejokuna; kotiak Edeke aica ka amuton.
Genesis1:5 Komaik Edeke aica Apaaran, ka amuton da komaik Akuar. Kojau atiboŋ kojau da atupuruc, ŋin ŋes apaaran nasodit."
Genesis1:6 Kobala Edeke ebe, “Kojau apak kidiŋ kakipi, kotiakite akipi ka akipi.”"
Genesis1:7 Kosub Edeke apak, kotiak akipi nuajaas kwap kapak, ka akipi nuajaas kuju kapak: kojau kwaŋin."
Genesis1:8 Komaik Edeke apak Akuj. Kojau atiboŋ kojau da atupuruc, ŋin ŋes apaaran nakiareit."
Genesis1:9 Kobala Edeke ebe, “Kotukonokinos akip nuejaas kwap kakuj aibois adiopet, kotakan neconit.” Kojau kwaŋin."
Genesis1:10 Komaik Edeke neconit Akwap: ka atukon nuka akipi da komaik Aŋololin: koany Edeke ebe ejokuka.
Genesis1:11 Kobala Edeke ebe, “Kobwaŋ akwap anya, koraata ikui icok, kora ekitoi loka araito araito koponeke, nuejaas icokokec, kotoma akwap.” Kojaas kwaŋin."
Genesis1:12 Kobwaŋ akwap anya, koraata ikui icok koponekec, ka ekitoi da loerai araito nuejaas icokokec, kotoma oponeke. Koany Edeke ebe ejokuka."
Genesis1:13 Kojau atiboŋ kojau da atupuruc, ŋin ŋes apaaran nakiwuniet."
Genesis1:14 Kobala Edeke ebe, “Kojaut luecaete kapak naka akuj aitiak apaaran ka akuar: koraut kesi aanyuneta, kanuka apakio, ido kanuka apaarasia, ka ikar:"
Genesis1:15 Kojaas kesi kanuka aica toma apak naka akuj, acaanakin akwap.” Kojau kwaŋin."
Genesis1:16 Kosub Edeke luecaete iarei luepolok; aica naepol adepar ayait apaaran, ka aica naepol ayait akuar; kosub aacer da."
Genesis1:17 Kibwaik Edeke kes apak naka akuj acaanakin akwap,"
Genesis1:18 ayait da apaaran ka akuar, ido aitiak aica ka amuton: koany Edeke ebe ejokuka."
Genesis1:19 Kojau atiboŋ kojau da atupuruc, ŋin ŋes apaaran nakiwoŋonet."
Genesis1:20 Kobala Edeke ebe, “Kilweka akip lueliatos luipu luejaas aijar, ido koporitos akweny kokuju kakwap toma apak naka akuj.”"
Genesis1:21 Kosub Edeke itiaŋ lueiliilete luka aŋololin, ka iboro kere lukajarak luelosete, lukilwekete akip, koponesiokec, ka ŋinibore kere yeneporitoi yeneja abebenoka koponeke; koany Edeke ebe ejokuka."
Genesis1:22 Kisirereŋ Edeke kes, kotema atiar, “Kouriaros, kipuaros, kilelebunos akipi nuejaas toma aŋololin, kipuaros da lueporitos kakwap.”"
Genesis1:23 Kojau atiboŋ kojau da atupuruc, ŋin ŋes apaaran nakikanyet."
Genesis1:24 Kobala Edeke ebe, “Kilwek akwap ŋinibore yenejai aijar kotoma oponeke, ibaren, ka yeneliat, ka etiaŋ loka akwap koponeke.” Kojau kwaŋin."
Genesis1:25 Kosub Edeke etiaŋ loka akwap koponeke, ka ibaren koponekec, ka ŋinibore yeneliat kakwap koponeke: koany Edeke ebe ejokuka."
Genesis1:26 Kobala Edeke ebe, “Kasubutu ituŋanan kotoma aputowok, asimawok: kainakis kes ayait lukecor, ka akweny nuka apak, ka ibaren, ka akwap kere, ka ŋinibore kere yeneliat kakwap.”"
Genesis1:27 Kosub Edeke ituŋanan kaputoke, kaputo naka Edeke ŋes asubunia; kosub kes yenikiliokit ka yeniberu."
Genesis1:28 Kisirereŋ Edeke kes: kotema Edeke kes atiar, “Kouriaros kipuaros, kilelebunos akwap, kiruma; koyaitos lukecor, ka akweny nuka apak, ka ŋinibore kere yenejari yeneliat kakwap.”"
Genesis1:29 Kobala Edeke ebe, “Koany, kainakis ikui kere lueraete icok luejaas akwap kere, ka ŋolikitoi loejaas araito nuka ekitoi loerai icok, araun inyamat kamakus:"
Genesis1:30 Ka ŋolitiaŋ kere loka akwap, ka akweny kere nuka apak, ka yeneliat kere kotoma akwap yenejai apuru naka aijar, ainakinit kes ikui kere luelibete araun inyamat.” Kojau kwaŋin."
Genesis1:31 Koany Edeke ninibore kere yenikesubi, ido koany, ejokuna noi. Koiau atiboŋ kojau da atupurue, ŋin ŋes apaaran nakikanyetekape."
Genesis2:1 Kodaun aisub akuj ka akwap, ka ajoresiokee kere."
Genesis2:2 Kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei kodaunite Edeke aisubuke nakesubi.
Genesis2:3 Kisireren Edeke apaaran nakikanyetekaarei, kitalau; naarai ŋipeŋin ŋes ebworaria kaisubuke kere nakesubi Edeke, nakiswamai."
Genesis2:4 Ŋol ŋes esube loka akuj, ido loka akwap naasubere. Kapaaran nakesubia EJAKAIT Edeke akwap ka akuj,"
Genesis2:5 ido korina eiauna luebwanete luka ais kakwap, koroko da ebwanuna ikui luka ais; naarai mam EJAKAIT Edeke kitetepit akiru kakwap, komamei ituŋanan yenekoriei akwap."
Genesis2:6 Konye kopurionori elisina kokwap, kitapapalenenei akwap kere."
Genesis2:7 Kosub EJAKAIT Edeke etuŋanan kapua naka akwap, kokutak eiyeŋane loka aijar okumesike; koraun etuŋanan etau lokajaran."
Genesis2:8 Kiraik EJAKAIT Edeke emanikor ari nakokide, toma Eden; kibwaik nen etuŋanan lokesubi ŋesi."
Genesis2:9 Kitabwan EJAKAIT Edeke kakwap ŋolikitoi loisiyalamikinit akonyen, loejok ainyam; ekitoi loka aijar da kokidin omanikor, ka ekitoi da loka ajenun nuejok ka nueroko."
Genesis2:10 Kolom ecor kotoma Eden, aitapapal emanikor; ido kanen kotiakas koraunos icorin iwonon,"
Genesis2:11 Losodit ekekiror Pison; ŋol ŋes loirimorit akwap kere naka Kabila, naejai esabu."
Genesis2:12 Esabu da loka akwap kaŋin ejokuna; ejai nen ebedelium ka amor nuemelomeloto.
Genesis2:13 Ecor lokiareit da ekekiror Gikon: ŋol ŋes loirimorit akwap kere naka Kus.
Genesis2:14 Ecor lokiwuniet da ekekiror Kidekel, ŋol ŋes loelosi kari nakokide naka Asuria; ka ecor lokiwononet ŋes Eupurat."
Genesis2:15 Koyana EJAKAIT Edeke etuŋanan, kibwaik ŋes toma omanikor loka Eden, akorienen ka aidar ŋes."
Genesis2:16 Kicorak EJAKAIT Edeke etuŋanan ebe, “Inyamenenei kwape ikotor araito nuka ŋolikitoi lokomanikor:"
Genesis2:17 dimarai mam inyami nuka ekitoi loka ajenun nuejok ka nueroko: naarai kapaaran nainyamia ŋun itwani cut.”
Genesis2:18 Kobala EJAKAIT Edeke ebe, “Mam ejok etuŋanan ajakut bon; asubakini eoŋ ŋes ikenarakinan yenibusakinit.”"
Genesis2:19 Kosodi kosubak EJAKAIT Edeke toma akwap nolitian loka ais, ka lueporitos kotoma apak; koyau kes neejai etuŋanan aanyun kwape emaanakinia ikecekiroriajido nolikiror kere lokemaikin etuŋanan ŋinibore yenikaiaran, koraun ŋol ekekiror."
Genesis2:20 Komaanak etuŋanan ibaren kere ikiroria, ka lueporitos kapak, ka itian kere luka ais. Konye komam etuŋanan edumakina ikenarakinan yenibusakinit."
Genesis2:21 Kitojoto EJAKAIT Edeke etuŋanan ajo nuipu, kojotoor; koditu amaran adiopet, kinyakak akiriŋ toma aiboisike."
Genesis2:22 Kosub EJAKAIT Edeke aberu kamaran kaŋin naadituni kotunanan, koyau ŋes neejai etuŋanan."
Genesis2:23 Kobala etuŋanan ebe, “Na ŋes akoit naka akoioka, Ido ŋes akiriŋ naka akiriŋika: enyarao ŋes Aberu, naarai aditunio kotunanan.”"
Genesis2:24 Ŋes inyeinia ekiliokit papake ka totoke, kiketakin neejai akeberu: koraut adiopekuan."
Genesis2:25 Emujalalas kesi kere, etuŋanan ka akeberu, komam ileicikinito."
Genesis3:1 Kepiiriana emun aitelekarit itian kere luka ais lukesubi EJAKAIT Edeke, Kotema ŋesi aberu atiar, “Eebo, abala teni Edeke ebe, ‘Mam inyamenenete araito nuka ekitoi ke re lokomanikor’?”"
Genesis3:2 Kotema aberu cmun atiar, “Kisiikinitai ainyam araito nuka ikito lukomanikor;"
Genesis3:3 dimarai araito nuka ekitoi loejai kidiŋ omanikor, ŋun abala Edeke ebe, ‘Mam inyamenenete, karaida atiror, kinyeis atwakare.’’’"
Genesis3:4 Kotema emun aberu atiar, “Mam cut itwakete."
Genesis3:5 Naarai ejeŋi Edeke ebe apaaran napinyamiata ŋun, ŋes ekwenyuniata akusikonye, iraunos yesi da bala Edeke, ajenenen nuejok ka nueroko.”"
Genesis3:6 Nakeanyunia aberu ekitoi ebe ejok ainyam, isiyalamikinit da akonye, ekitoi da erai loisiŋobelei ayaun acoa, koden araitoke, konyam; koinak okilenike da, konyam."
Genesis3:7 Kitekwenyunai iarei kere akecekonye, kojenut ebe kimuialalas, kodonyut akui nuka etini, kosubut arobai."
Genesis3:8 Kiiras eporoto loka EJAKAIT Edeke itorit omanikor ariripet naka apaaran, konopata etuŋanan ka akeberu kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Edeke kokidiij okito lukomanikor."
Genesis3:9 Kiworo EJAKAIT Edeke etuŋanan kotema ŋes ariar, “Ai bo ijai ijo?”"
Genesis3:10 Kotema ŋesi atiar, “Abu keira ekoniporoto komanikor, kakurianar, naarai amujalal: kanop.”"
Genesis3:11 Kotema atiar, “Iŋai bo kilimokini jo ebe imujalal? Inyama ca ijo araito nuka ekitoi loabu keeorak jo ebe mam inyami?”"
Genesis3:12 Kobala etuŋanan ebe, “Aberu nakiinakin ajaenena keoŋ, ŋes kainakini araito nuka ekitoi, kanyam.”"
Genesis3:13 Kotema EJAKAIT Edeke aberu atiar, “Anyoika nu nuiswama?” Kotema aberu atiar, “Emun kejodijodi, tape anyami.”"
Genesis3:14 Kotema EJAKAIT Edeke emun atiar. “Kanu iswamaa ŋin, kikenokinitoi jo aitelekarit ibaren kere, ido aitelekarit nolitian kere loka ais: iliaenenei kakonikoik, inyamenenei apua apaarasia kere nuka aijarakon,"
Genesis3:15 Ebwaikini asurup kidinikon ka aberu, ido kidiŋ aurikon ka aurike da; idecideeenenei akonikou ka jo da idecideeenenei aketitibat.”"
Genesis3:16 Kotema ŋesi aberu atiar, “Eyatakini noi ikonican ka akonipotuunun, Kotoma ocan ŋes idoununio idwe, akoniimuit koiai neejai okilenikon, ido ŋes kiyait jo.”"
Genesis3:17 Kotema ŋesi Adam atiar, “Naarai ibu ijo kiira eporoto loka aberukon, ainyam araito nuka ekitoi lokeeorakin jo ebe ‘Mam inyami’, ekeni alup kanukon; kotoma ailolitoikon ŋes idumunia luinyami apaarasia kere nuka aijarakon."
Genesis3:18 Kibwanakinete ikukwa ka isukukur: inyamenenei ikui luka ais.
Genesis3:19 Kotoma ainyinyir nuka akonyenekon ŋes idumunia inyamat, aitodol neibonoria alup, naarai nen ŋes kolo kilemunere; naarai irai ijo apua, ibonori da apua.”"
Genesis3:20 Komaik etuŋanan akeberu ekekiror Keba; naarai arai ŋesi toto naka luejarete kere.
Genesis3:21 Kiswamak EJAKAIT Edeke Adam ka akeberu inapen luka imukulen, kitanap kes."
Genesis3:22 Kobala EJAKAIT Edeke ebe, “Koany, etuluor etuŋanan bala ediopet kaoni aijen nuejok ka nueroko; aso natikwana kinye ŋesi arior akekan da adenun araito nuka ekitoi loka aijar, ka ainyam, ka aibut ikar kere”—"
Genesis3:23 Ŋes ejukaria EJAKAIT Edeke ŋes kina kemanikor loka Eden, akorienen alup nukelemunere ŋes."
Genesis3:24 Kwaŋin kirenea ŋesi etuŋanan: kosodi kari nakokide naka emanikor loka Eden kibwaik Ikerubin, ka ekileŋ loimilia loibelonokin iwaitin kere, aidar erot loka ekitoi loka aijar."
Genesis4:1 Kojenu Adam akeberu Keba; kopotuu, kouru Kain, kotema atiar, “Kainakin eoŋ ekes kama ejai EJAKAIT.”"
Genesis4:2 Kouruunai bobo onaceke Abel. Ido koraun Abel ekecokon amerekekin, konye Kain koraun ekakorion alup."
Genesis4:3 Kosodi kanen ketuboros apaarasia koyau Kain amio naka alup ainakin EJAKAIT asubanit.
Genesis4:4 Koyau Abel da lukiyaik ice lukosipanike, kasiepaikec da. Kocam EJAKAIT Abel ka akesubanit,"
Genesis4:5 Konye mam abu kocam Kain ka akesubanit. Konyunyurikin noi Kain, konyorididoto akekonyen."
Genesis4:6 Kotema EJAKAIT Kain atiar, “Inyo bo kitunyunyurik jo? Ido kanukinyo anyorididioto akonikonyen?"
Genesis4:7 Arai iswamaenenei nuejok, mam kereka kicamunio? Arai mam iswamai ejok iboienenei aronis kokirigi; ainobeleke da ejaununei mamakon, koyaite ijo da nin.”"
Genesis4:8 Kinerakinos Kain ka onaceke Abel. Kosodi kanen ejaas omanikor, kodakakin Kain onaceke Abel, koar ŋes."
Genesis4:9 Kotema EJAKAIT Kain atiar, “Ali bo onacekon Abel?” Kotema atiar, “Mam eoŋ aleni: arai do eoŋ ekedaran loka onaceka?”"
Genesis4:10 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Iswama anyoika? Kamonyia eporoto loka aokot nuka onacekon kakwap."
Genesis4:11 Natikwana kikenokin ijo kotoma alup, nuapotu koonata amatar aokot nuka onacekon kakanikon."
Genesis4:12 Naikorienenoo ijo alup, mam kiinanakinete akecegogoŋ; iraun ekasian epasoit da kakwap.”"
Genesis4:13 Kotema Kain EJAKAIT atiar, “Akaiticanet mam epedor atitiŋikinio."
Genesis4:14 Koany, kirene lolo eoŋ kotoma akwap, ido anopikini akonikonyen; araun eoŋ ekasian epasoit da kakwap; ido yenikadumuni eoŋ kaari.”"
Genesis4:15 Kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Kanuka ŋun enyaŋi eoŋ Kain irwan akanykaarei kaneejai yeneari ŋes.” Kibwaik EJAKAIT Kain aanyunet, ŋinituŋanan yeneanyuni ŋes kinye aiar."
Genesis4:16 Konyou Kain kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT. Kiboienenei kakwap naka Nod, kari nakokide naka Eden."
Genesis4:17 Kojenu Kain akeberu; kopotuu, kouru Enok: koduk ere, komaik ekiror loka okokuke Enok,"
Genesis4:18 Kouru Enok Irad: Irad kouru Mekuyael: Mekuyael kouru Metusael; Metusaelkouru Lamek.
Genesis4:19 Komany Lamek aŋor aarei, nasodit ekekiror Ada, nakiareit ekekiror Sila."
Genesis4:20 Kouru Ada Yabal: ŋol ŋes papakec kanul kalueboienenete koweman, koiaas kibaren."
Genesis4:21 Ekiror loka onaceke ŋes Yubal: ŋolŋes papakec kanul kalueramete adeudeun ka ŋul luekusete alamarun.
Genesis4:22 Sila da, abu kouru Tubal-kain, ekatatan loka ibore kere yenetubi yenikaisinit ka yenikasuat: kinacike ka Tubal-kain ŋes Naama."
Genesis4:23 Kotema Lamek akenor atiar, “Ada ka Sila kiirasi ekaporoto; Yes aŋor nuka Lamek, kopuputu akakirot. Naarai abu kaar etuŋanan kanuka aimusun eoŋ, Ekatumunan da kanuka aisen eoŋ:"
Genesis4:24 Arai inyanio Kain irwan akanykaarei, Inyanio do Lamek irwan akaisakanykaarei ka nukanykaarei.”"
Genesis4:25 Kojenu bobo Adam akeberu; kouru ikoku yenitelepat, komaik ekekiror Set; kotema atiar, “Naarai abu Edeke kainak eoŋ auruun ice aibois naka Abel; naarai abu Kain koar ŋes.”"
Genesis4:26 Ka Set da, kouru okokuke; komaik ekekiror Enos. Kapaarasia kanun ŋes ageuniata ituŋa aiwonet ekiror loka EJAKAIT."
Genesis5:1 Lo ŋes citabo loka aur naka Adam. Kapaaran kaŋin nakesubia Edeke etuŋanan, kosub ŋes kasima naka Edeke."
Genesis5:2 Kosub yenikiliokit ka yeniberu: kisireren kes, komaik ekecekiror Adam, kapaaran kaŋin kanaasubunere."
Genesis5:3 Kodau Adam ikar akwatat ka akaisauni, kouru okokuke kasimake, kotoma aputoke; komaik ekekiror Set."
Genesis5:4 Apaarasia nuka Adam kedau aur Set kes ikar akwat akanykauni: kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur.
Genesis5:5 Apaarasia kere nukaibut naka Adam kes ikar akwat akanykaoŋon ka akaisauni; kotwani.
Genesis5:6 Kodau Set ikar akwatat ka ikany, kouru Enos."
Genesis5:7 Kodau Set ikar akwat akanykauni ka ikanykaarei kedau aur Enos, kouri da idwe lusap ka lupesur."
Genesis5:8 Apaarasia kere nuka Set kes ikar akwat akanykaoŋon ka itomon ka luarei: kotwani.
Genesis5:9 Kodau Enos ikar akaisakanykaoŋon kouru Kenan.
Genesis5:10 Kodau Enos ikar akwat akanykauni ka itomon ka lukany kedau aur Kenan: kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur.
Genesis5:11 Apaarasia kere nuka Enos kes ikar akwat akanykaoŋon ka ikany: kotwani.
Genesis5:12 Kodau Kenan ikar akaisakanykaarei kouru Makalalel.
Genesis5:13 Kodau Kenan ikar akwat akanykauni ka akaisaoŋon kedau aur Makalalel, kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur."
Genesis5:14 Apaarasia kere nuka Kenan kes ikar akwat akanykaoŋon ka iromon: kotwani.
Genesis5:15 Kodau Makalalel ikar akaisakanykape ka lukany, kouru Yared."
Genesis5:16 Kodau Makalalel ikar akwat akanykauni ka akaisauni kedau aur Yared, kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur."
Genesis5:17 Apaarasia kere nuka Makalalel kes ikar akwat akanykauni ka akaisaoŋon ka lukany: kotwani.
Genesis5:18 Kodau Yared ikar akwatat ka akaisakanykape ka luarei: kouru Enok.
Genesis5:19 Kodau Yared ikar akwat akanykauni kedau aur Enok, kouri idwe lusap ka Iupesur."
Genesis5:20 Apaarasia kere nuka Yared kes ikar akwat akanykaoŋon ka akaisakanykape ka luarei: kotwani.
Genesis5:21 Kodau Enok ikar akaisakanykape ka Iukany, kouru Metusela."
Genesis5:22 Kolosenenei Enok nepepe ka Edeke, kedau aur Metusela, ikar akwat auni: kouri idwe lusap ka Iupesur,"
Genesis5:23 Apaarasia kere nuka Enok kes ikar akwat auni ka akaisakanykape ka lukany.
Genesis5:24 Kolosenenei Enok nepepe ka Edeke: komameun; naarai abu Edeke koyana ŋes.
Genesis5:25 Kodau Metusela ikar akwatat ka akaisakanykauni ka lukanykaarei, kouru Lamek."
Genesis5:26 Kodau Metusela ikar akwat akanykaarei ka akaisakanykauni ka luarei kedau aur Lamek, kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur."
Genesis5:27 Apaarasia kere nuka Metusela kes ikar akwat akanykaoŋon ka akaisakanykape ka Iukanykaonon: kotwani.
Genesis5:28 Kodau Lamek ikar akwatat ka akaisakanykauni ka luarei, kouru ikoku yenisapat."
Genesis5:29 Komaik ekekiror Noa, kobala ebe, “Lo ŋes lokitalakari oni kaswamuwok, ka aitaaritoi naka akaniniwok, kanuka alup nukolo ekenokin EJAKAIT.”"
Genesis5:30 Kodau Lamek ikar akwat akany ka akaisakanykaoŋon ka lukany kedau aur Noa, kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur."
Genesis5:31 Apaarasia kere nuka Lamek kes ikar akwat akanykaarei ka akaisakanykaarei ka lukanykaarei: kotwani.
Genesis5:32 Kodau Noa ikar akwat akany: kouri Sem, ka Kam, ka Yapet."
Genesis6:1 Kosodete nakegeuniata iruna eiyas kakwap, kouriata apesur,"
Genesis6:2 Koanyut odwe luka Edeke adwe nuka ituŋa ebe ejokuka; komanyata aŋor kotoma kanun kere nuaseununete kesi.
Genesis6:3 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Mam ekatau epegenenas kitunanan ikar ka ikar, naarai erai ŋesi da akuan: konye eraunos akepaarasia ikar akwatat ka akaisaarei.”"
Genesis6:4 Kapaarasia kanun kojaas Inepilin roma akwap: ido kokau kanun, nakelomanariata odwe luka Edeke mama ejaas adwe nuka ituŋa, kourianakis kes: nulkes ituŋa lukagogon lukolo sek, ituŋa luajenas,"
Genesis6:5 Koany EJAKAIT aronis naka ituŋanan epol kotoma akwap, ka aitetemonorikere naka aomisio nukotauke erai naerono due."
Genesis6:6 Kiitu EJAKAIT naarai abu kosub etuŋanan kotoma akwap, kokadak kotauke."
Genesis6:7 Kobala EJAKAIT ebe, “Amwatari eoŋ ituŋanan yenabu kasub kakwap; ageun kotunanan, ka etiaŋ, ka lueliatos, ka lueporitos kapak; naarai eitu eoŋ kanuabu kasubunia kes.”"
Genesis6:8 Konye kodum Noa asianut kakonye nuka EJAKAIT.
Genesis6:9 Na ŋes aur naka Noa. Arai Noa etuŋanan loedolit, lomam itoronitai katurike: kolosenenei Noa nepepe ka Edeke."
Genesis6:10 Kouri Noa isap iuni Sem, ka Kam, ka Yapet."
Genesis6:11 Komunaun akwap kakonyen nuka Edeke, kikerepik akwap."
Genesis6:12 Koany Edeke akwap, ido koany, kemunaun; naarai ŋinibore kere yenejai akuan abu komunau ekerot kotoma akwap."
Genesis6:13 Kotema Edeke Noa atiar, “Adolu awasia naka ŋinibore kere yeneiai aiiar kakonyeneka: naarai ekerepiki akwap kanukec; asa koany, amudiari eoŋ kes nepepe ka akwap da."
Genesis6:14 Kikeu ataker naka ekitoi loka goper; kitemok agolai toma ataker, kilada kemina toma kokina da."
Genesis6:15 Lo ŋes epone loitemokinio ŋes: aoiau naka ataker ikubitin akwat auni, alalauke ikubitin akaisakany, amukururuke ikubitin akaisauni."
Genesis6:16 Kopedok adirisa ataker, ekubit ediopet kuju; kibwaik ekekosiep loka ataker; kiswama ataker kicul itogoi, lokokwap, ka lokiareit, ka lokiwuniet."
Genesis6:17 Koany, ayauni eoŋ da akalele naka akipi toma akwap, amudiar akuan kere naejai eiyeŋane loka aijar toma, kwap kakuj; etwani nlnibore kere yenejai toma akwap."
Genesis6:18 Konye etogogoŋi eoŋ akaitutuket kajo; ilomari ijo ataker, ijo, ka odwekon, ka akoniberu, ka aŋor nuka odwekon, nepepe kajo."
Genesis6:19 Ido imeikini toma ataker epone loka ŋinibore kere yeneiai aijar naka akuan, iareiarei luka nolipone, imeikini toma ataker tetere ejarete nepepe kajo; ido koraas yenikiliokit ka yeniberu."
Genesis6:20 Lueporitos toma oponekec, ka ibaren toma oponekec, ka ninibore kere yeneliat kokwap toma oponeke, iareiarei luka ŋolipone epote neiiai, tetere eiarete,"
Genesis6:21 Koyana inyamat kere luenyamio, kotukonok neijai; tetere inyami ijo, ka kes da.”"
Genesis6:22 Kiswama Noa kwaŋin; kwape kicorakinia ŋes Edeke, kiswama kwaŋin."
Genesis7:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Noa atiar, “Koloma ijo ka ekalekon kere toma ataker, naarai adau aanyun jo idolit kakonyeneka katur kana."
Genesis7:2 Ka nolitian loelai ilemari ijo ikanykaarei ka ikanykaarei, ikiliokit ka ikeberu; ka itian lumam elaete iareiarei, ikiliokit ka ikeberu;"
Genesis7:3 ka lueporitos luka apak, ikanykaarei ka ikanykaarei, yenikiliokit ka yeniberu: tetere ejari aurikec kotoma akwap kere."
Genesis7:4 Naarai akaulo kapaarasia akanykaarei, etetepi eoŋ akiru kakwap apaarasia akaisaoŋon apaaran ka akuare; ido amwatari kotoma akwap ninibore kere yenejari yenabu kasub.”"
Genesis7:5 Kiswama Noa kere kwape kicorakinia ŋes EJAKAIT.
Genesis7:6 Kedaunit Noa ikar akwat akanykape nakejaunor akalele naka akipi toma akwap.
Genesis7:7 Koloma Noa, ka odweke, ka akeberu, ka aŋor nuka odweke nepepe kaŋes toma ataker, kanuka akipi nuka akalele."
Genesis7:8 Ka itian luelaete, ka itian lumam elaete, ka lueporitos, ka ninibore kere yeneliat kokwap."
Genesis7:9 Kolomasi iareiarei neejai Noa toma ataker, yenikiliokit ka yeniberu, kwape kicorakinia Edeke Noa."
Genesis7:10 Kosodi ketuboros apaarasia akanykaarei, kojaas akipi nuka akalele toma akwap."
Genesis7:11 Kokaru lokakwat akanykape loka aiiar naka Noa, toma olap lokiareit, kapaaran nakitomonet kakanykaarei naka elap, kapaaran kaŋin kocilunos akonyen nuka ataroi nukapolok, konaaros apedon nuka akuj."
Genesis7:12 Kotep akiru akwap apaarasia akaisaoŋon paaran ka kuare.
Genesis7:13 Kapaaran kaŋin kolomasi Noa, ka Sem, ka Kam ka Yapet, odwe luka Noa, ka aberu naka Noa, ka aŋor auni nuka odweke nepepe kakes, toma ataker;"
Genesis7:14 kes, ka ŋolitian koponeke, ka ibaren kere kotoma oponekec, ka niniborc kere yeneliat kokwap toma oponeke, ka ninibore yeneporitoi toma oponeke, ka ŋinikweny yenikejaas abebenoka."
Genesis7:15 Kolomasi neejai Noa toma ataker, ninikuan kere naajai eiyeŋane loka aijar iareiarei."
Genesis7:16 Lualomarete da, kolomasi yenikiliokit ka yeniberu yenika ninikuan kere, kwape kicorakinia ŋes Edeke: kogolok EJAKAIT ŋes toma,"
Genesis7:17 Kojai akalele toma akwap apaarasia akaisaoŋon, kiyatakinos akip, kileput ataker, kikalelo kokuju akwap."
Genesis7:18 Kipikosi akip, kiyatakinos noi kakwap, kijelelitoi ataker kokuju akipi."
Genesis7:19 Kiyatakinos akip noi airap akwap, ironan da luaojak kere luajaas kwap kakuj kere, koraparos."
Genesis7:20 Kiyatakinos akip ikubitin itomon ka lukany kuju; koraparos ironan.
Genesis7:21 Kotwana akuan kere nakelosi kotoma akwap, lueporitos, ka ibaren, ka itian, ka ŋinibore kere yeneliat kokwap, ka ŋinituŋanan;"
Genesis7:22 kotwakata kere lukejaas eiyeŋane loka etau loka aiiar toma okumesikee, kere lukejaas toma akwap nakeonit."
Genesis7:23 Komwatarai ŋinibore kere yenajari yenajai toma akwap, ituŋanan, ka ibaren, ka ibore yeneliat, ka lueporitos kokuju, komwatarai kakwap; kosalak Noa bon, ka kes lukejaas nepepe kaŋes toma ataker."
Genesis7:24 Kirumata akip akwap adaun apaarasia akwatat ka akaisakany.
Genesis8:1 Kiitu Edeke Noa, ka ibore kere yenikajaran, ka ibaren kere lukeiaas nepepe kaŋes toma ataker: kitukut Edeke ekwam kitor akwap, kinoŋaros akip."
Genesis8:2 Kogolokinoi akonyen nuka ataroi, ka apedon nuka akuj, kitikokinai da akiru nakokuju."
Genesis8:3 Kobononorete akip dueudue anyoun kokwap. Kedaunos apaarasia akwatat ka akaisakany kiŋoŋaros akip.
Genesis8:4 Kolap lokikanyetekaarei, kapaaran nakitomonet kakanykaarei naka elap, kidokokin ataker oroŋan luka Ararat."
Genesis8:5 Kinonaros akip aitodol olap lokitomonet: kotoma olap lokitomonet kapaaran nasodit naka elap, kotakanut aidiasia nuka ironan,"
Genesis8:6 Kosodi ketuboros apaarasia akaisaoŋon konaa Noa adirisa naka ataker nakikei ŋesi,"
Genesis8:7 Kijuka ekuruk, kirim aitodol nekeonikinioto akip kakwap."
Genesis8:8 Kijuka ajele aanyun arai eŋoŋaros akip kokwap;
Genesis8:9 konye mam ajele kedumuna neisibworaria akekeje, kobono neejai ŋesi toma ataker, naarai ajaas akip akwap kere; korio ŋesi akekan kitiŋ ŋes kitolom toma ataker."
Genesis8:10 Kidarek apaarasia ace akanykaarei; kijuka bobo ajele alomar kataker;
Genesis8:11 kobono ajele neejai ŋesi eboŋ; ido koany, etodit akiot naka eseitun nakedenuni: kosodi kojen Noa ebe eŋoŋaros akip kakwap."
Genesis8:12 Kidarek bobo apaarasia akanykaarei; kijuka ajele; mam bobo abu kobonu neejai.
Genesis8:13 Kosodi kokaru lokakwat akanykape ka lodiopet, toma olap Iosodit, kapaaran nasodit naka elap, koonikis akip kakwap. Kopuko Noa arapetait naka ataker kite, ido koany, eonit akwap."
Genesis8:14 Kotoma olap lokiareit, kapaaran nakakaisaarei kanukanykaarei naka elap, koono akwap."
Genesis8:15 Kotema Edeke Noa atiar,"
Genesis8:16 “Kolom kataker, ijo ka akoniberu, ka odwekon, ka aŋor nuka odwekon nepepe kajo."
Genesis8:17 Kitoloma nepepe kajo ŋinibore kere yenejari yenejai nepepe kajo, yenika ŋinikuan kere, ka lueporitos, ka ibaren, ka ŋinibore kere yeneliat kokwap; kouriata noi kesi kakwap, konyaaros, kipuaros kakwap.”"
Genesis8:18 Kolom Noa ka odweke, ka akeberu, ka aŋor da nuka odweke nepepe kaŋes."
Genesis8:19 Ŋolitian, ka ŋinibore yeneliat, ka ŋinibore yeneporitoi kere, yenelosi kere kakwap, kwape ejaatar atekerinikee, kolomut kataker,"
Genesis8:20 Kodukok Noa EJAKAIT etem, kolem kanolitian kere loelai, ka ninibore yeneporitoi yenelai, koinak asuban otem."
Genesis8:21 Kiŋu EJAKAIT asakat naeur saa; kiner EJAKAIT kotauke atiar, “Mam bobo ekenokini alup kanuka ituŋanan, naarai aitetemonori nakotau loka ituŋanan erono ameuni koiditeuke; ido mam bobo adanyi ŋinibore kere yenejari kwape abu keswamaa."
Genesis8:22 Eriŋa akwap ejai, mam edaununos apakio nuka aiye, ka aisak, aterot ka aibuse, akamu ka aiporo, apaaran ka akuare.”"
Genesis9:1 Kisireren Edeke Noa ka odweke, kotema kes atiar, “Kouriata, kipuaros, kilelebata akwap."
Genesis9:2 Ŋolitiaŋ kere loka akwap, ka ŋinibore kere yeneporitoi kapak kokuriana yes ka etasuro; ka lueliatos kere luka akwap ka lukeeor kere ainak akaninikus."
Genesis9:3 Ŋinibore kere yenelosi yenejari kere eraun inyamatakus; kwape ikui kainakis yes kere.
Genesis9:4 Konye akiriŋ naejai aijar tomake, kes akeokot, mam inyamenenete."
Genesis9:5 Mam kakurwokin aibura akusiwokot, aokot nuka aijarakus, eburai kes kakan naka ŋolitiaŋ; kakan da naka ituŋanan, karaida kakan naka onace loka ninitunanan, eburai eoŋ aijar naka ituŋanan,"
Genesis9:6 ŋinituŋanan yenebukori aokot nuka ituŋanan, akeokot da ebukorio, kanuka ituŋanan kaŋin: naarai abu Edeke kosub ituŋanan toma aputoke."
Genesis9:7 Yes da, kouriata, kipuaros; kilelebata akwap, kiyatanakinos noi kanen.”"
Genesis9:8 Kotema Edeke Noa ka odweke atiar,"
Genesis9:9 “Koany, eoŋ da, etogogoŋi akaitutuket kajo, nepepe ka akusiwur da nakitupanakini yes."
Genesis9:10 Nepepe ka isubat kere yeneiari yenejai nepepe kayes, lueporitos, ka ibaren, ka ŋolitiaŋ loka akwap nepepe kayes; kere luelomunete kataker, ŋolitiaŋ loka akwap."
Genesis9:11 Etogogoŋi eoŋ akaitutuket nepepe kayes, mam bobo amudiari akuan kere kakip nuka akalele; ido mam ejaun bobo akalele amudiar akwap.”"
Genesis9:12 Kotema Edeke atiar, “Na ŋes aanyunet naka aitutuket naetutuki eoŋ kayes, ka ŋinisubat kere yenejari yenejai nepepe kayes aitodol aturio numam edaunos."
Genesis9:13 Asipokini ekataluka odou, ido eraunun ŋesi aanyunet naka aitutuket kokidiŋikaŋ ka akwap."
Genesis9:14 Kosodi naayaununia eoŋ edou kokuju kakwap etakanununei etaluka kodou,"
Genesis9:15 Eitununei eoŋ da akaitutuket naabu ketutuk eoŋ nepepe kayes, ka ninisubat yenejari yenikakuan kere, ido mam bobo akipi eraunos akalele amudiar akuan naka ŋinibore kere,"
Genesis9:16 Ejaununei etaluka odou, anolekini eoŋ ŋes, kasodi akiitun aitutuket namam edaun naabu Edeke kitutuk kaninisubat kere yenejari yenikakuan yenejai kakwap.”"
Genesis9:17 Kotema Edeke Noa atiar, “Ŋin ŋes aanyunet naka aitutuket naabu eoŋ ketogogon kokidinikon ka ninikuan kere naejai kakwap.”"
Genesis9:18 Odwe luka Noa, lualomunete kataker kes Sem, ka Kam, ka Yapet: Kam da ŋes papa loka Kanaan."
Genesis9:19 Ŋul luuni kes odwe luka Noa: ido ipapaikec kanul kes luesiarakinos akwap kere.
Genesis9:20 Kogeu Noa araun ekakorion, kira emusabibu;"
Genesis9:21 Komat aion, komerikin, kojai titai kotoma owemake."
Genesis9:22 Koany Kam, papa loka Kanaan, ŋes imujalal, kolimok ikekinacan iarei luajaas kina,"
Genesis9:23 Kolemut Sem ka Yapet elou, kibwaikis okeperinikec kere, kobonobonoto ekaukau, kimukosi papakec kinye amuialal; ido kanueteoto kinaren, mam apotu koanyut papakec imujalal."
Genesis9:24 Kikua emeret loka Noa, kojenu nuabu okokuke lodidi kiswamak ŋes."
Genesis9:25 Kotema atiar, “Kikenokinoi Kanaan; Korau ebulesit loka ibulesin kama ejaas ikekinacan.”"
Genesis9:26 Ido kotema atiar, “Kituritete EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Sem; Korau Kanaan ekebulesit."
Genesis9:27 Kitalal Edeke Yapet, Kiboienenei kotoma oweman luka Sem; Korau Kanaan ekebulesit.”"
Genesis9:28 Kodau Noa ikar akwat auni ka akaisakany akaulo kakalele.
Genesis9:29 Apaarasia kere nuka Noa kes ikar akwat akanykaoŋon ka akaisakany: kotwani.
Genesis10:1 Na ŋes aur naka odwe luka Noa; Sem, ka Kam ka Yapet: luauriete kesi kedaun akalele."
Genesis10:2 Odwe luka Yapet; Gomer, ka Magog, ka Madai, ka Yaban, ka Tubal, ka Mesek, ka Tiras."
Genesis10:3 Odwe luka Gomer; Asukenas, ka Ripat, ka Togaruma."
Genesis10:4 Odwe luka Yaban; Elisa, ka Tarusis, Kitim, ka Dodanim."
Genesis10:5 Ŋul kes luaponi kokorakinai apujana nuka atekerin kotoma akwapukec, ŋinitunanan kwape ajaar anaiepeke, kwape ajaar ajenakec, kotoma atekerinikec."
Genesis10:6 Odwe luka Kam; Kus, ka Misuraim, ka Put, ka Kanaan."
Genesis10:7 Odwe luka Kus; Seba, ka Kabila, ka Sabuta, ka Raama, ka Sabuteka: odwe luka Raama, Seba, ka Dedan."
Genesis10:8 Kouri Kus Nimurod: kogeu araun lokagogon kotoma akwap.
Genesis10:9 Kerai ekamejan lokagogon kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: ŋes enerare ebe, “Kwape ka Nimurod ekamejan lokagogon kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT.”"
Genesis10:10 Ageunet naka ajakanutuke arai Babel, ka Erec, ka Akad, ka Kalune, toma akwap Sinar."
Genesis10:11 Konyou kakwap kaŋin kolot Asuria, koduk Niaebe, ka Rekobos-Ir, ka Kala."
Genesis10:12 Ka Resen loejai kidin ka Ninebe ka Kala (gopegolges ere lokapolon).
Genesis10:13 Misuraim kouri Ludim, ka Anamim, ka Lekabim, ka Naputukim,"
Genesis10:14 ka Paturusim, ka Kasulukim (nealomuniata Ipilisitian), ka Kaputorim,"
Genesis10:15 Kanaan kouri ekekiyai Sidon, ka Ket;"
Genesis10:16 Eyebusit, ka Emorait, ka Egirugasit;"
Genesis10:17 ka Ekibit, ka Erukait, ka Esinit;"
Genesis10:18 ka Erubadait, ka Esemarit, ka Ekamatit: akaulo kanun kisiarakinos ikalia luka Ekanaanit."
Genesis10:19 Eikor da loka Ekanaanit enyounit koSidon, kolosi Gerar, kodolite Gasa; bala ilosi Sodom ka Gomora ka Aduma ka Seboiim, kiton Lasa."
Genesis10:20 Ŋul kes odwe luka Kam, kwape ejaatar ikaliakec, kwape ejaatar anaiepakec, kotoma akwapinikec, kotoma ateketinikec."
Genesis10:21 Ido ka Sem, papaakec loka idwe kere luka Eber, onace loka Yapet lokapolon, ŋes da kouri idwe."
Genesis10:22 Odwe luka Sem, Elam, ka Asur, ka Arupakusad, ka Lud, ka Aram."
Genesis10:23 Odwe luka Aram, Us, ka Kul, ka Geter, ka Mas."
Genesis10:24 Arupakusad kouri Sela; Sela kouri Eber.
Genesis10:25 Kouri Eber idwe iarei lusap: ekiror loka ediopet Peleg; naarai toma apaarasiake ŋes akorokoroere akwap kere; ekiror loka onaceke ŋes Yokutan.
Genesis10:26 Yokutan kouri Alumodad, ka Selep, ka Kasarumabet, ka Yera;"
Genesis10:27 Ka Kadoram, ka Usal, ka Dikula;"
Genesis10:28 ka Obal, ka Abimael, ka Seba;"
Genesis10:29 ka Opir, ka Kabila, ka Yobab: nul kere kes odwe luka Yokutan."
Genesis10:30 Akwap da naeboioto anyounit koMesa bala ilosi Separ, eronat lokokide."
Genesis10:31 Ŋul kes odwe luka Sem, kwape ejaatar ikaliakec, kwape ejaatar anaiepakec, kotoma akwapinikec, kotoma atekerinikec."
Genesis10:32 Ŋul kes ikalia luka odwe luka Noa, kwape ajaatar aturiokec, kotoma atekerinikec; ido kotoma kanul kes akorokorounotor atekerin, kotoma akwap akaulo kakalele."
Genesis11:1 Akwap kere ajai aŋajep adiopet, ka einer ediopet."
Genesis11:2 Kosodete kobwota kesi kide, kodumut apuuton kakwap naka Sinar; kiboioto kanen."
Genesis11:3 Kotemanaros atiar, “Tkatuna, keswamata amatapalin, kecweata cut.” Koiaas kamatapalin aibois naka amor; alupot da aibois naka elupe."
Genesis11:4 Kinerasi atiar, “Ikatuŋa, kadukoto ere ka etogo loeoia noi, loedoli aidike toma akuj, kadumuniata ekiror; kenyeis aisiarakin akwap kere.”"
Genesis11:5 Kodoku EJAKAIT kwap aanyun ere ka etogo loeoia noi loadukete idwe luka ituŋa.
Genesis11:6 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Koany, eraas ŋulluka adiopeteker, ido eraas kesi kere luka aŋajep adiopet, ido napena ŋes egeunito kesi aswam; emamei do ibore yenekurwokini kes, yenekotosi aswam."
Genesis11:7 Aso, kadokasi kwap, kenyalinyalatakanen anaiepakec, kinye ninituŋanan ajenun einer loka yenice.”"
Genesis11:8 Kwaŋin kisiarak EJAKAIT kes cut anyoun kaŋina kikaaros akwap kere: kinyeis kesi aiduk ere.
Genesis11:9 Ŋes kemaikinere ekekiror Babel, naarai kanen ŋes enyalinyalia EJAKAIT aŋajep naka akwap kere; ido kaŋina kisiarak kes EJAKAIT akwap kere."
Genesis11:10 Na ŋes aur naka Sem. Adaunit Sem ikar akwatat, kouru Arupakusad ikar iarei akaulo kakalele."
Genesis11:11 Kodau Sem ikar akwat akany kedau aur Arupakusad, kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur."
Genesis11:12 Kodau Arupakusad ikar akaisauni ka lukany, kouru Sela;"
Genesis11:13 Kodau Arupakusad ikar akwat aoŋon ka iuni, kedau aur Sela, kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur,"
Genesis11:14 Kodau Sela ikar akaisauni, kouru Eber:"
Genesis11:15 Kodau Sela ikar akwat aoŋon ka iuni kedau aur Eber, kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur."
Genesis11:16 Kodau Eber ikar akaisauni ka luonon, kouru Peleg:"
Genesis11:17 Kodau Eber ikar akwat aoŋon ka akaisauni kedau aur Peleg, kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur."
Genesis11:18 Kodau Peleg ikar akaisauni, kouru Reu;"
Genesis11:19 Kodau Peleg ikar akwat aarei ka ikanykaoŋon kedau aur Reu, kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur."
Genesis11:20 Kodau Reu ikar akaisauni ka luarei, kouru Serug;"
Genesis11:21 Kodau Reu ikar akwat aarei ka ikanykaarei kedau aur Serug; kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur.
Genesis11:22 Kodau Serug ikar akaisauni, kouru Nakor;"
Genesis11:23 Kodau Serug ikar akwat aarei kedau aur Nakor, kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur."
Genesis11:24 Kodau Nakor ikar akaisaarei ka lukanykaoŋon, kouru Tera:"
Genesis11:25 Kodau Nakor ikar akwatat ka itomon ka lukanykaonon kedau aur Tera, kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur."
Genesis11:26 Kodau Tera ikar akaisakanykaarei, kouri Aburam, ka Nakor, ka Karan."
Genesis11:27 Na ŋes aur naka Tera. Tera kouri Aburam, ka Nakor, ka Karan; Karan kouru Lot."
Genesis11:28 Kotwanik Karan neejai papake Tera toma akwap naaurikinio ŋes, toma Ur akwap naka Ikaludean."
Genesis11:29 Komanyata Aburam ka Nakor aŋor, ekiror loka aberu naka Aburam ŋes Sarai; ka ekiror loka aberu naka Nakor, Miluka, akokuke ka Karan, papake ka Miluka, ido papa loka Isika."
Genesis11:30 Kerai Sarai arakan; komamei ŋes ikoku,"
Genesis11:31 Koyana Tera Aburam okokuke, ka Lot okoku loka Karan, opapaitike, ka Sarai aberu naka okokuke; konyout kesi kakwap naka Ur naka Ikaludean alosit toma akwap naka Kanaan; kodoloto Karan, kiboienenete kanen."
Genesis11:32 Apaarasia nuka Tera kes ikar akwat aarei ka ikany: kotwanik Tera Karan.
Genesis12:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Aburam atiar, “Konyou kakwapukon, koinacanakon, kotogo loka papakon, kolot akwap naketodikini jo;"
Genesis12:2 Ketuluori moolo areker napeti, kesirerenenenei, etopoloori ekonikiror; korau ijo arereŋ."
Genesis12:3 Esirereni kes lukisirerenete jo, ido nin yenikikenokini jo ekeni eoŋ da ŋes: kotomakon ŋes erereneorotor ikalia kere luka akwap.”"
Genesis12:4 Kwaŋin kolot Aburam, kwape kelimokinia ŋes EJAKAIT: kolot Lot nepepe kaŋes: kedaunit Aburam ikar akaisakanykaarei ka lukany nakenyounio koKaran."
Genesis12:5 Koyana Aburam akeberu Sarai, ka Lot okoku loka onaceke, ka ikeceboro kere luatukokinitos, ka ituŋa luapotu kodumut koKaran; konyout alosit akwap naka Kanaan; kodolot akwap naka Kanaan."
Genesis12:6 Kitor Aburam akwap kodol aibois naka Sekem, neejai elua loka More. Kojai Ekanaanit akwap kapaarasia kanun,"
Genesis12:7 Kitaanyikin EJAKAIT Aburam, kotema atiar, “Ainakini rwaru akoniwur akwap na.” Kodukok etem nen neejai EJAKAIT, lokitaanyikin ŋes."
Genesis12:8 Konyou kolot oroŋat kari nakokide naka Bet-el, kibubuk ekewema, kojai Bet-el to, Ai da kide: kodukok etem nen neejai EJAKAIT, kiwone ekiror loka EJAKAIT."
Genesis12:9 Konyou Aburam kiyatak akelosit kari naka Eŋalakimak.
Genesis12:10 Kojai ebeli kakwap: kolot Aburam Misiri aiboi nina; naarai kepol ebeli kotoma akwap.
Genesis12:11 Kosodi eapie ŋes alomari Misiri, kotema akeberu Sarai atiar, “Koany, ajeni jo irai aberu naatemel:"
Genesis12:12 Aso kiianyut jo Imisirian etemarete kesi atiar, ‘Na ŋes akeberu’: ido kaarete eoŋ, konye kinyekinete jo iiari,"
Genesis12:13 Keŋaiŋait jo, kotema ebe irai ijo kinacika: tetere adumun ajokis kanukon, kajara da kanukon.”"
Genesis12:14 Kosodi kedol Aburam Misiri, koanyut Imisirian aberu itemelel noi."
Genesis12:15 Koanyut ŋes ijaka luka Parao: kituro ŋes kaneejai Parao; koyanaarai aberu togo loka Parao.
Genesis12:16 Kikonak ŋesi Aburam ejok kanuke: kojaas ŋes amerekekin, ka imoŋin, ka isigirian, ka ibulesin, ka abulesin, ka asigirian, ka akaalai."
Genesis12:17 Kitican EJAKAIT Parao ka lukokaleke kaicaneta nukos kanuka Sarai aberu naka Aburam;
Genesis12:18 Konyarau Parao Aburam kotema atiar, “Anyoika nu nukiswamak eoŋ? Inyo bo mam kilimokinia eoŋ kwape eraar ŋesi akoniberu?"
Genesis12:19 Kanukinyo itemaria ebe, ‘Erai ŋesi inacika,’ tapi eoŋ ayaŋaari aituluor ŋes akaberu? Aso do akoniberu ŋin, koyana, kolot.”"
Genesis12:20 Kicorak Parao ituŋake: kinyamakis ŋes orot, ka akeberu, ka iboro kere lukejaas kaŋes."
Genesis13:1 Konyou Aburam koMisiri, ŋes nepepe kakeberu ka lukejaas kaŋes kere: Lot da nepepe kaŋes, koloto ari naka Eŋalakimak."
Genesis13:2 Abarit Aburam noi ibaren ka epuesa, ka esabu da."
Genesis13:3 Kolot idiai konyou kari naka Eŋalakimak kodol Bet-el toma aibois nakolo ajai ewemake sek, kidiŋ Bet-el ka Ai;"
Genesis13:4 Toma aibois naka etem lokolo esiauni ŋesi aiduk kiwone Aburam kaŋina ekiror loka EJAKAIT.
Genesis13:5 Lot da loaupas nepepe ks Aburam, ajaas isipanin luka amerekekin ka luka ibaren ka iweman da."
Genesis13:6 Kodidiŋik kes akwap, mam epedoro aiboi nepcpe: naarai epu iborokec mam apotu kopedosi aiboi nepepe."
Genesis13:7 Koiau eŋuŋet mama ejaas ikecokol luka Aburam ka ikecokok luka Lot. Ido eboiete Ekanaanit ka Eperisi kakwap kaŋin kapaarasia kanun.
Genesis13:8 Kotema Aburam Lot atiar, “Kenainait kinye eŋuŋet ajakut kidinika ka jo, ido mama ejaas ikecokokoka ka ikecokokokon; naarai kirai oni ikinacan"
Genesis13:9 Mam akwap kere ejai akonyenekon? Kenainait, kogitar ijo kama ajai arai kinere ijo akan nakokediany, eoŋ da alosi nakoteten; arai kinere ijo akar nakoteten, eoŋ da alosi nakokediany.”"
Genesis13:10 Kiteluo Lot akekonye, koanapuuton naka Yorodan kere, ajaas akip nuipu niniibois. Koroko be EJAKAIT kemudiara Sodom ka Gomora, kosubite bala emanikor loka EJAKAIT ido kwape akwap nako Misiri ilosi Soar."
Genesis13:11 Kosodi koner Lot apuuror naka Yorodan kere; kidiar Lot kide: kotiakas kesi bonik.
Genesis13:12 Kiboikir Aburam akwap naka Kanaan, ka Lot da kiboikin oreria luka apuuton kibubuk ewemake Sodom."
Genesis13:13 Konye keroko ituŋa luko Sodom koraa ikediakanarak noi kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT.
Genesis13:14 Kotema EJAKAIT Aburam, kedaut atiak kaLot atiar, “Kiteluo nati kwana akonikonye, kosesen ibwoi kaibois kanaijai, ari naka agolitomei k: eŋalakimak, kide ka to:"
Genesis13:15 Naarai akwap ke re naitei, kainakini jo, k: akoniwur aitodol ikar kere."
Genesis13:16 Ido etuluori aurikon kwape kapua nak: akwap; ido arai epedori ituŋanan aimar apua naka akwap, akoniwur da imarun."
Genesis13:17 Konyou, kirimo akwap aoiauke ka alalauke da; naarai kaina kini jo.”"
Genesis13:18 Kitobwot Aburam ewemake, kobu kiboikin oluan luk Mamure, luejaas toma Keburon, kodukok etem loka EJAKAIT nina."
Genesis14:1 Kosodi kapaarasia nuka Amurapel ekabaka loka Sinar, ka Ariok eka baka loka Elasar, ka Kedolaomer ekabaka loka Elam, ka Tidal ekabak loka Goim,"
Genesis14:2 Kojioto ka Bera ekabaka loka Sodom, ka Birusa ekabaka lok Gomora, ka Sinab ekabaka loka Aduma, ka Semeber ekabaka loka Seboiim ka ekabaka loka Bela (ŋes Soar)."
Genesis14:3 Kimorikikinos nul kere aditot nak Sidim (nin ŋes Aŋolol naka Abalaŋ).
Genesis14:4 Apotu kijaanakis Kedolaomer ika itomon ka luarei, kokaru lokitomonet kauni kipaliikis."
Genesis14:5 Kokaru lokito monet kaonon kobu Kedolaomer ka ikabakan lukejaas nepepe kaŋes, kitiiiot Irepain kotoma Asuteros-karunaim, ka Isusin kotoma Kam, ka Iyemii kotoma Sabe-kiriataim."
Genesis14:6 Ka Ikorin toma omorukec Seir, aitodol El-parar naapie kamodiŋ,"
Genesis14:7 Kobonosi, kodoloto En-misupat (ŋes Kades), kitijiot akwap kere naka Imalekain ka naka Imorain da lueboienenete Kasason tamar."
Genesis14:8 Koloma ekabaka loka Sodom, ka ekabaka loka Gomora, ka eka baka loka Aduma, ka ekabaka loka Seboiim, ka ekabaka loka Bela (ŋes Soar) kiderakinos ejie kakes kaditot naka Sidim;"
Genesis14:9 ejie ka Kedolaomer ekabak loka Elam, ka Tidal ekabaka loka Goim, ka Amurapel ekabaka loka Sinai ka Ariok ekabaka loka Elasar; ikabakan iwonon koiioto ka ikabakan ikanj"
Genesis14:10 Ido aditot naka Sidim eleleba apanya nuka erit; kokerata ikabakan luk Sodom ka Gomora, kibironokinos nen, ka luakuete kokereasi oroŋai"
Genesis14:11 Konatasi iboro kere lukotoma Sodom ka Gomora, ka inyamatakec kere kolototo."
Genesis14:12 Konatasi Lot, okoku loka onaceke ka Aburam, loeboienene koSodom, ka iboroke, kolototo."
Genesis14:13 Kobu ediopet loabu koku, kolimok Aburam Eburaniat: ŋol loeboiene nci kaneeiaas iluan luka Mamure Emorait onaceke ka Esukol, ido onac loka Aner; kes da etutukitos Aburam."
Genesis14:14 Kepupu Aburam ebe anata onaceke, kolot ka ituŋake Iuetuutooritai ejie, akwat auni ka itomon k lukanykauni, luaurikinio togoke, kotupasi aitodol Dan."
Genesis14:15 Kotiakas asurc kin kes kuare, ŋes ka ikekejaanakinak kitijioto, kotupasi aitodol Koba, loejai akan nakokediany nakoDamasek."
Genesis14:16 Kinyaku iboro kere, kinyaku onaceke da Lot ka iboroke, aŋor da, ka ituŋa."
Genesis14:17 Kolomu ekabaka loka Sodom, airiamun kaŋes, kedau aboŋun kaiar Kedolaomer ka ikabakan luajaas kaŋes, kotoma aditot naka Sabe (ŋes aditot naka ekabaka)."
Genesis14:18 Melukisedek da, ekabaka loka Salem koyanau inyamat ka ajon: ido kerai esasedoti loka Edeke Loejai kuju kakuj."
Genesis14:19 Kilipak ŋes arereŋ, kotema atiar, “Edeke Loejai kuju kakuj, Elopet akuj ka akwap kisireren Aburam."
Genesis14:20 Kituritete Edeke Loejai kuju kakuj, Lokikorak lukasurupokon akanikon!” Koinak Aburam ŋes idiopet kotomon yenika kere."
Genesis14:21 Ekabaka loka Sodom kotema Aburam atiar, “Koinakinai eoŋ ituŋa, koyana ijo iboro.”"
Genesis14:22 Kotema Aburam ekabaka loka Sodom atiar, “Ario akakan mama ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke Loejai kuju kakuj, elopet akuj ka akwap,"
Genesis14:23 ebe, Mam ayaŋaari auno karaida irukan yenikamuk, karaida ŋinibore kere yenijaatar, kinyek einer ebe, ‘Etabar Aburam’."
Genesis14:24 Dimarai ŋulluanyamata ikatumunak, ka akorakinet naka ituŋa lukilosi keoŋ, Aner, ka Esukol, ka Mamure, koyanaasi ŋul akorakinetakec.”"
Genesis15:1 Kokau kanun kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Aburam kotoma otapo, kinera ebe, “Sirikiyoŋ, Aburam: Eoŋ ekonibuku ka ekoniropit loepol noi.”"
Genesis15:2 Kobala Aburam ebe, “Wu EJAKAIT Edeke, kiinakini inyo naarai alosi komamei ikoku, konye loirumi ekatogo ŋes ca Damasek Elieser?”"
Genesis15:3 Kobala Aburam ebe, “Koany, mam kiinakinit eoŋ aur: ido koany, loaurikinio togoka ŋes ekerumanika,”"
Genesis15:4 Ido koany, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai ŋesi ebe, “Etuŋanan ŋol mam erauni ekerumanikon, konye loebuni kopikisikon ŋes eraun ekerumanikon.”"
Genesis15:5 Kitolom kina, kolimok ebe, “Kosesen natikwana akuj, kimar aacer, arai kipedo aimar.” Kotema atiar, “Aurikon da ikwaikini nen.”"
Genesis15:6 Kiyu ŋesi EJAKAIT; kimarakinai ŋes adolit.
Genesis15:7 Kotema atiar, “Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT lokalemuni jo koUr loka Ikaludean, ainakin akwap na airum.”"
Genesis15:8 Kobala ebe, “Wu EJAKAIT Edeke, inyo bo ketejenikini ebe erumi?”"
Genesis15:9 Kotema atiar, “Kolemikinai akiten naedaunit ikar iuni, ka akinei naedaunit ikar iuni, ka emerekek loedaunit ikar iuni, ka eluke, ka ajele naedit.”"
Genesis15:10 Koyaŋa ŋul kere, kotiaka kokidin, kibwaik atutubeta aareiarei kiteteonok; konye mam abu kotiak ikweny."
Genesis15:11 Kodooto atarukon toma awat nuka lukatwak, kirenea Aburam."
Genesis15:12 Kosodi elomari akoloŋ, kiluranasi Aburam ajo nuipu; ido koany kokurianar ŋesi kanuka amuton naepol."
Genesis15:13 Kotema EJAKAIT Aburam atiar, “Kojenu cut ebe erauni aurikon apejonon kakwap namere nakec, ido epote aijaanakin, eponio areit kes ikar akwat aoŋon;"
Genesis15:14 ateker ŋin da naepote kesi aijaanakin, atubokini akiro; kosodete anyoun kojaas kiboro luipu."
Genesis15:15 Konye ijo da ilosi neejaas lukapapaakon kainapakina; kidaio kidau aibut ejok.
Genesis15:16 Ido kotoma aturi nakiwononet eboŋunete bobo nee; naarai numam adolit nuka Emorait eroko edolo.”
Genesis15:17 Kosodi kedau akoloŋ alomar, komutonor akwap, koany eupa loepurie ka akalas naesarani kitoroto kidin neajaas iboro ŋul."
Genesis15:18 Kapaaran kaŋin kitutukis EJAKAIT kAburam kotema atiar, “Ainak akoniwur akwap na, anyoun kocor kaloko Misiri aitodol ocor loepol Eupurat;"
Genesis15:19 Ekenit, ka Ekenisit, ka Ekadumonit,"
Genesis15:20 ka Ekitit, ka Eperisit, ka Erepait,"
Genesis15:21 ka Emorait, ka Ekanaanit, ka Egirugasit, ka Eyebusit.”"
Genesis16:1 Sarai, aberu naka Aburam mam aurikinit ŋes idwe; kejai ŋes abulesit, Amisiriat, ekekiror Kagar."
Genesis16:2 Kotema Sarai Aburam atiar, “Koany, abu EJAKAIT kesimik eoŋ aur, kenainait, koloma ijo neejai akabulesit; elemuni kadum idwe kama ejai.” Kiira Aburam eporoto loka Sarai."
Genesis16:3 Kedaunit Aburam ikar itomon iboie kakwap naka Kanaan, abu Sarai aberu naka Aburam koyana Kagar, Amisiriat, akebulesit, koinak ŋes Aburam okilenike araun akeberu."
Genesis16:4 Koloma ŋesi neejai Kagar, kopotuu; keanyu ŋin ebe apotuu, komen do tataake kakonyeke."
Genesis16:5 Kotema Sarai Aburam atiar, “Akamenio kojai neijai ijo; abu kainak akabulesit atorobukon, ido nakeanyunia ŋesi ebe apotuu, kamen eoŋ kakonyeke. Kotub EJAKAIT akiro eoŋ ka jo.”"
Genesis16:6 Konye Aburam kotema Sarai atiar, “Koany, ejai akonibulesit akanikon; kiswamak ŋes nuedolito kakonyekon.” Kisiejanakini Sarai ŋes kagogon, kosi kakonyeneke."
Genesis16:7 Emalaika loka EJAKAIT kodumak ŋes okicoi loka akipi kamodiŋ, ekicoi loejai orot ilosi Sur."
Genesis16:8 Kotema atiar, “Kagar, abulesit naka Sarai, kibuni kai? Ido ilosi ai?” Kotema atiar, “Asii eoŋ kakonyen nuka tataaka Sarai.”"
Genesis16:9 Kotema emalaika loka EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Koboŋo neejai tataakon, kononokikinite ŋes.”"
Genesis16:10 Kotema emalaika loka EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Esupui noi akoniwur, komam imarunos kanuka aipues.”"
Genesis16:11 Kotema emalaika loka EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Koany, ipotuu ijo, idouni rwaru ikoku yenitelepat, imaikini ekekiror Isimael, naarai abu EJAKAIT kopup akoniiticanio."
Genesis16:12 Eraun ŋesi bala etuko kotuna, esurokini akekan ŋinituŋanan, ido akan naka ŋinituŋanan esurokini ŋes; iboienenei ŋesi kaneejaas ikekinacan kere.”"
Genesis16:13 Komaik ekiror loka EJAKAIT lokineras kaŋes ebe, “Irai ijo Edeke loitei”: ebe da, “Aseseni kereka eoŋ ŋol loketei kane da?”"
Genesis16:14 Ŋes kemaikinere ekicoi Beer-Iakai-roi; koany, ejai kidin ka Kades ka Bared."
Genesis16:15 Kourik Kagar Aburam ikoku yenitelepat; komaik Aburam ikekoku yenaurier Kagar ekekiror Isimael.
Genesis16:16 Kodaunite Aburam ikar akaisakany kauni ka lukanykape naaurikinia Kagar Aburam Isimael.
Genesis17:1 Nakeraar Aburam loka ikar akaisakanykaoŋon ka lukanykaonon, kitaanyikin Edeke Aburam, kobala ebe, “Bon Edeke Lokapedor kere, kolosenenei kakonyeneka, koluor ekadoliton."
Genesis17:2 Etutuki eoŋ akaitutuket kajo, kesupui da noi adepar.”"
Genesis17:3 Kibiror Aburam ebuburia: kinera Edeke kaŋes atiar,"
Genesis17:4 “Eoŋ da, koany, ejai aitutuketeka kajo, iraun ijo da papa loka atekerin nuipu."
Genesis17:5 Mam bobo kinyaritai ekonikiror Aburam, konye eraun do ekonikiror Aburaam; naarai ketuluo jo papa loka atekerin nuipu."
Genesis17:6 Kesupui da noi adepar, ketuluori jo atekerin, elomunete da ikabakan kotomakon."
Genesis17:7 Etogogoŋi da akaitutuket eoŋ ka jo ka akoniwur naetupanakini, anatar aturioke kere, araun aitutuket namam enaŋi, araun Edeke kaneijai ijo ka akoniwur da naetupanakini,"
Genesis17:8 Ido kainakin jo ka akoniwur naetupanakini akwap nakiloseneneo, akwap kere naka Kanaan, airum ikar kere; Eoŋ da araun Edekekec.”"
Genesis17:9 Kotema Edeke Aburam atiar, “Ŋo da, irici akaitutuket, ijo ka akoniwur naetupanakini anatar aturiokec kere."
Genesis17:10 Na ŋes akaitutuket, nairicenenete, kidiŋ eoŋ ka jo ka akoniwur naetupanakini; Ekepeneneo ŋolikiliokit kotomakus."
Genesis17:11 Ido kikepeneneo amuny naka ekiliokanekus; eraun da nin aanyunet naka aitutuket kidin eoŋ ka yes.
Genesis17:12 Ekepeneneo kotomakus yenedaunit apaarasia akanykauni; noliklliokit kotoma aturiokus, loewurikinio okal, ka ŋol da lokitwegelete imo kapesan, lomere loka aurikon."
Genesis17:13 Loeurio kokalekon, ka ŋol da loegweleneneo kapesanakon, ibusakinit akepio. Ejaununei da akaitutuket toma awatekus araun aitutuket namam edaun."
Genesis17:14 Ekiliokit da lomam ekepep amuny naka ekiliokaneke, abil ŋol aitutuketeka, egelario etuŋanan ŋol kotuŋake.”"
Genesis17:15 Kotema Edeke Aburaam atiar, “Akoniberu Sarai, mam bobo inyarit ekekiror Sarai, konye Sara ŋes do ekekiror."
Genesis17:16 Eoŋ da esirereni ŋes, ido kainakini jo ikoku kamake: eebo, esirereni ŋes: eraun da toto naka atekerin; elomunete ikabakan luka ituŋa kotomake.”"
Genesis17:17 Kopaari Aburaam aibirokin ebuburia, kokieni, kinera kotauke ebe, “Euruuni nopenol ikoku loadau ikar akwatat? Ido ka Sara da naadau ikar akaisakanykaoŋon, eurie?”"
Genesis17:18 Kotema Aburaam Edeke atiar, “Arai gwai Isimael eraun lokaiaran kakonyenekon!”"
Genesis17:19 Kotema Edeke atiar, “Mam, konye kiwurikin Sara aberukon ikoku; imaikini ijo da ekekiror Isaak; ka eoŋ da etogogoŋi akaitutuket kaŋes araun aitutuket namam edaun mama ejai aurike naetupanakini."
Genesis17:20 Kanuka Isimael keira jo; koany, esireren ŋes, ido esupui, ido eyatakin noi; euriei ijaka itomon ka luarei, ido etuluori ateker naepol."
Genesis17:21 Konye etogogoŋi akaitutuket kama ejai Isaak, lokiwurikini Sara kapak kanapekana kokaru kaloebunit.”"
Genesis17:22 Kinye einer kaŋes, konyou Edeke kama ejai Aburaam."
Genesis17:23 Koya Aburaam ikekoku Isimael, ka ŋul kere luaurikinio okaleke, ka ŋul kere luagwelio kikeboro, nolikiliokit kotoma otuŋa lukokal loka Aburaam, kokep kes kapaaran kaŋin amuny naka ekiliokanekec, kwape ketemaria ŋes Edeke."
Genesis17:24 Kodaunite Aburaam ikar akaisakanykaoŋon ka lukanykaonon, nakekepere amuny naka ekiliokaneke."
Genesis17:25 Adaunit okokuke da Isimael ikar itomon ka luuni, nakekepere amuny naka ekiliokaneke."
Genesis17:26 Kapaaran kaŋin kokepai Aburaam ka okokuke Isimael.
Genesis17:27 Ikiliok kere lukokaleke ka luaurikinio okal, ka ŋul lukitwegelenenete imo kiboro, kokepai nepepe kaŋes,"
Genesis18:1 Kitaanyikin EJAKAIT ŋes koluan luka Mamure, nakiboio kokek loka ewemake kidin paaran:"
Genesis18:2 Kiteluo akekonye kite, ido koany, ebwoete ituŋa iuni kakonyeneke. Nakeanyunia kes, koker kokek loka ewema airiamun kakes; kisudedikin kwap."
Genesis18:3 Kotema atiar, “Wu EkaJAKAIT, arai adumunit asianut kakonyenekon, kenaiŋait, sirikitubor ainac ekonibulesit."
Genesis18:4 Aso cabo koinun adisikipi, kilotasi akusikeje, kiyenut kotolim loka ekitoi."
Genesis18:5 Ayauni eoŋ idionyamat, kolakaros itauonokus: kosodete konyet kotuboros. Naarai idolut neejai ekusibulesit.” Kotemasi atiar, “Kiswama kwaŋin kwape ibalar.”"
Genesis18:6 Kisunya Aburaam alomar owema neejai Sara, kotema atiar, “Kisunyak kitemok aitemisio auni nuka akiria nuidicic, kigurunio atap.”"
Genesis18:7 Koker Aburaam osipan, koyau itaok yenejok yenirosok, koinak ekejaanakinan; kisunyak aipoore."
Genesis18:8 Koyana akinyet ka akile, ka itaok yenetemokinit, kibwaik akonyenekec; kobwo koapie kakes kotolim loka ekitoi, konyama."
Genesis18:9 Kotemasi atiar, “Ai bo ejai akoniberu Sara?” Kotema atiar, “Koany, ejai owema.”"
Genesis18:10 Kotema atiar, “Abeit aboŋuni eoŋ neijai kedol apak; ido koany, euruuni akoniberu Sara ikoku yenitelepat.” Kiira Sara kokek loka ewema lokejai kauken,"
Genesis18:11 Ido kemoiotjito noi Aburaam ka Sara, kokokosanito ikar luipu noi: mam bobo Sara ajai kwape ejaar eipone loka aŋor."
Genesis18:12 Kokieni Sara kotauke atiar, “Kadau amoion kwana, ekajakait da emoionit, eyalamikin kereka eoŋ?”"
Genesis18:13 Kotema EJAKAIT Aburaam atiar, “Inyo bo etekien Sara, ebe, ‘Auruuni kereka eoŋ ikoku amojoŋit?’"
Genesis18:14 Ejai ibore yenikaruni EJAKAIT? Aboŋuni eoŋ neijai kapaarasia kaŋun, kedolo apak, ido euruuni Sara esapat.”"
Genesis18:15 Kosodi Sara aipeg ebe, “Mam akienit”; naarai akuriana. Kotema ŋes atiar, “Mam; konye ikienit.”"
Genesis18:16 Konyout ituŋa kanen, kiteluosi Sodom; kinyamak Aburaam kes orot."
Genesis18:17 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Emunonikini kereka eoŋ Aburaam nin naeswamai?"
Genesis18:18 Naarai abeit eraun Aburaam ateker naepol nakagogon, isirerenio da atekerin kere nuka akwap kotomaken."
Genesis18:19 Naarai ajenu ŋes kanuka nu, tetere icorakini ikedwe ka lukokaleke luetupakinete, tetere ericito erot loka EJAKAIT, aswam abeit ka etube; tetere einuni EJAKAIT Aburaam ŋun nuabu kinerak ŋes.”"
Genesis18:20 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Naarai epol noi aimony naka Sodom ka Gomora, ido naarai eroko noi adiakanaretakec;"
Genesis18:21 Mere ber kejesar kaany arai eswamaata cut kwape ejaar aimony naabu kodol neajai; arai mere kwaŋin, aienuni.”"
Genesis18:22 Kotiakas ituŋa kanen, koloto Sodom; konye koroko Aburaam ebwoi kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Genesis18:23 Kikunyak Aburaam kotema atiar, “Imudiari kereka ijo ikadolitok nepepe kikaronok?"
Genesis18:24 Elemuni ejaas ikadolitok akaisakany toma ore: imudiari komam itimi aibois kanuka ikadolitok akaisakany luejaas toma?
Genesis18:25 Tiesil ijo aswam kwaŋin, aiar ikadolitok nepepe kikaronok; tiesilok ŋun; mam Ekatubon loka akwap kere iswamai nuka adolit?”"
Genesis18:26 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Arai kadum koSodom ikadolitok akaisakany kotoma ore, etimi aibois kere kanukec.”"
Genesis18:27 Koboŋok Aburaam kotema atiar, “Koany, atamak eoŋ einer ka EJAKAIT, karaida karai eoŋ apua ka ekurwon:"
Genesis18:28 Elemuni emamuunete ikany kotoma ikadolitok akaisakany; imudiari ere kere naarai amamuut ikany?” Kotema atiar, “Mam amudiari, arai kadum kanen akaisaoŋon ka lukany.”"
Genesis18:29 Kinera kaŋes bobo atiar, “Elemuni etakanunete akaisaoŋon.” Kotema atiar, “Mam eswamai kwaŋin kanuka nul akaisaoŋon.”"
Genesis18:30 Kotema atiar, “Kenainait, wu EJAKAIT, sirikinyunyurikin, mere kener bobo: elemuni kotakanut akaisauni kanen.” Kotema atiar, “Mam eswamai kwaŋin arai kadum akaisauni.”"
Genesis18:31 Kotema atiar, “Koany, atamak eoŋ einer ka EJAKAIT: elemuni kotakanut akaisaarei kanen.” Kotema atiar, “Mam amudiari kanuka ŋul akaisaarei.”"
Genesis18:32 Kotema atiar, “Kenainait, EJAKAIT, sirikinyunyurikin, mere kener bobo irwan na bon: elemuni kotakanut itomon.” Kotema atiar, “Mam amudiari kanuka nul itomon.”"
Genesis18:33 Kolot EJAKAIT, napekedaunia ŋesi einer ka Aburaam: kobono Aburaam aiboisike."
Genesis19:1 Kodoloto imalaikan luarei Sodom eboŋ; kiboie Lot da korute loka Sodom; koany Lot kes, kolot aisiriamar; kokukum kitulurite akekonyen,"
Genesis19:2 Kotema atiar, “Koany, ikaiaka, kenainaito, kopautu togo loka ebulesitikus, koperoto aitiwalar akwap, kilotata akusikejen, kodilokis anyoun tupuruc, koloto.” Kotemasi atiar, “Mam, konye kiperi isio orot aitiwalar akwap.”"
Genesis19:3 Kimaumau kes noi: kopaut oreke, kolomasi togoke; kipejo kes, kopeik imugatin lumam etubuunitoi, konyamata."
Genesis19:4 Konye eroko kepero, ituŋa lukore loko Sodom, idwe ka lukapolok, ituŋa kere luapote kaiboisio kere, kolukut etogo:"
Genesis19:5 Kiworoto Lot kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Alubo ituŋa lualomut orekon kakuare kana? Kitolom kes nekiia isio kaiena kes.”"
Genesis19:6 Koloma Lot kina neejaas kesi, kogolok ekek ekaukau."
Genesis19:7 Kotema atiar, “Keŋainaitos, ikakinacan, sirikiswamata aronis naetia nen."
Genesis19:8 Koany, kija eoŋ kadweka aarei numam ejenete ekiliokit, kenainaito, mere ketolom ŋun neijaas yesi, kiswamakis yesi kes kwape itojokitotor kakonyekus; konye ituŋa kwi mam iswamakinete akirot; naarai apotu kesi otolim loka eswika.”"
Genesis19:9 Kotemasi atiar, “Irwa.” Kotemasi atiar, “Ekesa lo loabwotuni, ŋes do ekoto araun ekatubon; asa do kiswamakini jo nueroko aitelckarit nul.” Koridakis noi etuŋanan, ŋes Lot, kikunyakis apakar ekirigi."
Genesis19:10 Konye ituŋa kwi koriosi akaninikec, kitolomut Lot togo neajaas kesi, kogolokis ekirigi."
Genesis19:11 Kitumudukata akonye nuka ituŋa kaluajaas okek, ludidik ka lukapolok kere; kopasa kes amoot ekek."
Genesis19:12 Kotemasi ituŋa kwi Lot atiar, “Ijaas ijo kice nee? arai amuranikon, ka idwekon lusap ka lupesur, ka ice da luijaatar toma ore; kitoloma kes kotoma aibois kana."
Genesis19:13 Naarai kimudiari aibois na, naarai eyatakin noi aimonyokec kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, ido EJAKAIT ŋes kijuku sio amudiar.”"
Genesis19:14 Koloma Lot kinerata kimurakake, luakotosi aimany adweke, kotema atiar, “Konyout, kolomasi kaibois kana, naarai emudiari EJAKAIT ere lo.” Kosubite ŋes bala emoc kama ejaas ikamurakake."
Genesis19:15 Kiwala akwap kisuburikis imalaikan Lot, kobalas atiar, “Konyou, koyaŋa akoniberu, ka adwekon kere nuejaas ne; kinyek amudiario kotoma aiticanet naka ere.”"
Genesis19:16 Konye kiyap; kitinata ituŋa akanike, ka akan naka aberuke, ka akan naka adweke aarei; kitimit EJAKAIT ŋes; kitolomut kibwaikis ŋes kina naka ere."
Genesis19:17 Kosodi kedaun aitolomun cut, kotema atiar, “Koker kinye atwanare; mam inoliari kaukon ido mam iyapi kotoma apuuton kere; kokeria oroŋat kinye amudiario.”"
Genesis19:18 Kotema Lot atiar, “Okwe ekaiakait, mere kwaŋin,"
Genesis19:19 Koany adum ekonibulesit asianut kakonyenekon, ido itopolo akoniitim nakitodik eoŋ, kitajar kenye atwanare; mam apedori akeriar oroŋat ŋol, kenyek aronis adolokin kasodi atwanare."
Genesis19:20 Koany, ere nol ŋes loeapie akeriar, ido ŋes ere loedit; okwe kakeria nen, (mam edit?) ido eŋaleun akaijar.”"
Genesis19:21 Kotema atiar, “Koany, kacamak kotoma akirot ŋin da, mam amudiari ere loibala ijo."
Genesis19:22 Kisunyite, kokeria nen; naarai mam apedori aisub akirot aitodol neidolio nen.” Ŋes enyaritere ere ŋol ekekiror Soar."
Genesis19:23 Keniunit akoloŋ nakedolio Lot Soar.
Genesis19:24 Kitetep EJAKAIT toma Sodom ka Gomora acukuman ka akim epote kama ejai EJAKAIT kotoma akui;
Genesis19:25 Komudia ireria ŋul, ka Apuuton kere, ka ŋul kere lueboienenete koreria, ka iboro kere luabwanete kakwap."
Genesis19:26 Konye konolia aberuke kau, etupit ŋes, koluor epir loka abalaŋ."
Genesis19:27 Kodil Aburaam tupuruc kolot aibois neabwoia ŋesi kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT:
Genesis19:28 Kosesen Sodom ka Gomora, ka akwap kere naka Apuuton, kireik, ido koany, kopuriei apuru naka akwap bala apuru naka eupa."
Genesis19:29 Kosodi kemudia Edeke ireria luka apuuton, kiitu Edeke Aburaam, kijuka Lot anyoun kotoma oreria luaponi komudiarai, kedau amudiar ireria lueboieneneo Lot."
Genesis19:30 Konyou Lot koSoar, kiboikin oroŋat nepepe kadweke aarei, naarai akuriana aiboikin Soar; kiboie kotoma abua, ŋes ka adweke kere."
Genesis19:31 Kotema nakiyai nadidi atiar, “Amojoŋ papawok, emamei da etuŋanan kotoma akwap loelomari mama kija oni kwape ejaar eipone loka akwap kere."
Genesis19:32 Aso ketamatata papawok aion, kaperoto kaŋes, kedara aur naka papawok.”"
Genesis19:33 Kitamatata papakec ajon akuare ŋin; koloma nakiyai kopero kapapake: mam abu kojen kwape aperio, karaida kwape anyounio."
Genesis19:34 Kosodi kapaaran kanaatupakini kotema nakiyai nadidi atiar, “Koany, kwape abu kaperio bian kapapawok, ketamatata bobo aion akuare na da; ko loma ijo da koperoto kaŋes, kedara aur naka papawok.”"
Genesis19:35 Kitamatata bobo papakec ajon akuare ŋin, konyou nadidi, kopero kaŋes; mam abu kojen kwape aperio, karaida kwape anyounio."
Genesis19:36 Kwaŋin abu Lot kourik adweke kere.
Genesis19:37 Kouru nakiyai ikoku yenitelepat, komaik ekekiror Moab, nol ŋes papakec loka Imoabin kiton lolo."
Genesis19:38 Kouru nadidi da ikoku yenitelepat komaik ekekiror Ben-ami; ŋol ŋes papa loka idwe luka Amon kiton lolo.
Genesis20:1 Konyou Aburaam kaŋina kolot akwap naka ari naka Eŋalakimak, kiboikin kidin ka Kades ka Sur; kiboikin toma Gerar."
Genesis20:2 Kinera Aburaam nuka Sara aberuke ebe, “ŋes kinacika.” Ido kiyakia Abimelek ekabaka loka Gerar, koyana Sara."
Genesis20:3 Kobu Edeke mama ejai Abimelek kotoma airuja naka akuare, kolimok ebe, “Koany, irai ijo bala ekatwan, kanuka aberu naibu koyana, naarai ejai ŋes okilenike.”"
Genesis20:4 Ido eroko Abimelek ikunyakina neejai ŋesi; kotema atiar, “EJAKAIT, ibuni aiar ateker karaida kedolit?"
Genesis20:5 Mam abu elopet kotema atiar, ‘Ŋes kinacika’? Aberu da alopet kotema atiar, ‘Ŋes onaceka.’ Eswamai eoŋ ŋin ketau loedolit, ka akanin nuemameete aronis.”"
Genesis20:6 Kolimok Edeke ŋes kairujasit ebe, “Eebo, ajeni ebe iswamai ŋun ketau loedojit, ŋes ketikokinia kinye amunaun kaneajai eoŋ: ŋes da kesimikia atiror ŋes."
Genesis20:7 Aso kinyaka aberu naka etuŋanan, naarai erai ŋesi enabi, ŋes da kilipakini, ijo da ijari; konye arai mam inyakarit, kojen ebe mam iswaki atwanare, ijo ka luijaatar kere.”"
Genesis20:8 Konyou Abimelek tupuruc sek, konyarau ikekejaanakinak kere, kolimok ŋun ke re akikec: kokuriakaros ituŋa noi."
Genesis20:9 Konyarau Abimelek Aburaam, kiŋit ebe, “Kiswamak anyoika? Adiaka anyoika kamakon, tape kiinuni eoŋ ka akajakanut da adiakaret naepol? Kiswamak numam ibusakinit aiswamakinio.”"
Genesis20:10 Kotema Abimelek Aburaam atiar, “Ibu koany anyoika, nukiinakinete aswam kwaŋin?”"
Genesis20:11 Kotema Aburaam atiar, “Naarai abu kaomite ebe, emamei cut aiyoŋ Edeke kaibois kana; ido da kapedorete aiar eoŋ kanuka akaberu."
Genesis20:12 Abeit erai kinacika, akoku naka papaka, konye mere akoku naka totoka; koraun do akaberu."
Genesis20:13 Kosodi ketolot Edeke anyoun kotogo loka papaka, kasodi alimokin ŋes ebe, ‘Na ŋes arerenukon nakitodianakini eoŋ: kotoma niniibois nakidolenenei kinerenena mama ajai eoŋ ebe erai onaceka.’”"
Genesis20:14 Koyana Abimelek amerekekin ka aituk ka ibulesin ka abulesin, koinak Aburaam, kinyakak ŋes akeberu Sara,"
Genesis20:15 Kotema Abimelek atiar, “Koany, akwapuka ejai akonyenekon; kiboikin neikoto ijo kere.”"
Genesis20:16 Kolimok Sara da atiar, “Koany, ainak onacekon iboro elukumit luka epuesa: koany, ŋes yenirapakina akonyenekon kama ejaas nul kere luejaas kajo; ido toma akiro kere kigeli.”"
Genesis20:17 Kilip Aburaam Edeke; kitanaleu Edeke Abimelek ka aberuke, ka abulesinike; kouriata idwe."
Genesis20:18 Naarai kegolokinit EJAKAIT akoikes kere nukokalloka Abimelek, kanuka Sara aberu naka Aburaam."
Genesis21:1 Koanyana EJAKAIT Sara kwape kinerar, ido kiswamak EJAKAIT Sara kwape alimokinia."
Genesis21:2 Kopotuu Sara, kourik Aburaam ikoku yenitelepat, kemoion, toma apak nin nakelimokinit ŋes Edeke."
Genesis21:3 Komaik Aburaam ikoku yenaurikini Sara ekekiror Isaak.
Genesis21:4 Kokep Aburaam okokuke Isaak kedau apaarasia akanykauni, kwape ecorakinitor ŋes Edeke."
Genesis21:5 Ido adaunit Aburaam ikar akwatat eurikinio ŋes ikokuke Isaak.
Genesis21:6 Kotema Sara atiar, “Ketekien Edeke, ŋinitunanan yeniirari kikienenei keoŋ.”"
Genesis21:7 Kotema atiar, “Iŋai nol lo tiketema Aburaam ebe, ‘Ebuni Sara aitanak ikedwe’? Naarai aurik ŋes ikoku yenitelepat kamoionuke.”"
Genesis21:8 Kopoloor ikoku, kojaka: kipo Aburaam epucit loepol kapaaran kanaajakaria Isaak."
Genesis21:9 Koany Sara ikoku yenika Kagar Amisiriat yenaurikini Aburaam, isekelo."
Genesis21:10 Ŋes ketemaria Sara Aburaam atiar, “Kirenea abulesit na ka ikekoku, naarai ikoku yenika abulesit kana mam epedori araun ekeruman nepepe kikakoku, ŋes Isaak.”"
Genesis21:11 Korau akirot nin naapagal noi kakonyen nuka Aburaam kanuka ikekoku.
Genesis21:12 Kotema Edeke Aburaam atiar, “Kinye araut naepagal kakonyenekon kanuka ikoku, ido kanuka abulesitikon; kere nukilimokini Sara, kopupununei eporotoke; naarai kotoma Isaak ŋes enyaraununere akoniwur;"
Genesis21:13 Ido kotoma okoku loka abulesit elomuni ateker, naarai ŋes aurikon.”"
Genesis21:14 Konyou Aburaam tupuruc sek, kolem aimuj ka eriagi loka emukule loka akipi, koinak Kagar, kibwaik okeperike, ka ikoku da, kotwar: kolot ipasitoi toma amodiŋ naka Beer-seba."
Genesis21:15 Kodaunos akip nukotoma omukule, kirupak ŋesi ikoku amoni;"
Genesis21:16 Kikunyak, kiboikin kwap kobwatara bala apak naegumario ekojo: naarai abu kobala ebe, “Sirikete ikoku etwani.” Kiboikin kobwatara, kodelo, komony."
Genesis21:17 Kiira Edeke eporoto loka etelepat, kiworo emalaika loka Edeke Kagar ebuni kokuju, kotema atiar, “Inyo bo itururwoo ijo? Sirikikurianar; naarai eira Edeke eporoto loka etelepat kaneejai."
Genesis21:18 Konyou, kitonyou etelepat, kitin kakonikan; naarai abuni aituluor ŋes ateker naepol.”"
Genesis21:19 Kitekweny Edeke akekonye, koany atan naka akipi; kolot kileleb akipi toma oriagi, kitamat etelepat."
Genesis21:20 Kojai Edeke nepepe ketelepat, kopoloor; kiboienenei kamodiŋ, koluor ekaguman imalia."
Genesis21:21 Kiboienenei kamodiŋ naka Paran; komanyak totoke ŋes aberu kotoma akwap nako Misiri.
Genesis21:22 Kosodi kapakio kanun apotu Abimelek ka Pikol ekapolon loka ajoreke kolimokis Aburaam ebe, “Ejai Edeke nepepe kajo kotoma kanuiswamai kere;"
Genesis21:23 Aso kiyapoikinoi kane kokiror loka Edeke ebe, Mam kimodakin eoŋ, karaida okokuka, karaida okoku loka okokuka; konye kwape eiaar asianut naabu keswamak, ijo da kiswamakinai eoŋ kwaŋin, ka akwap da nakiboieneneo.”"
Genesis21:24 Kotema Aburaam atiar, “Eyapoi.”"
Genesis21:25 Kitoron Aburaam Abimelek kanuka Atan naka akipi, naapotu ibulesin luka Abimelek kodemasi kagogon,"
Genesis21:26 Kotema Abimelek atiar, “Mam ajeni yenikiswamai kwaŋin; ido mam lem jo kisiiranari eoŋ, ido mam apupununei, dimarai akiirar ŋes lolo.”"
Genesis21:27 Koyana Aburaam amerekekin ka imoŋin koinak Abimelek; kitutukoto aitutuket kes iarei.
Genesis21:28 Kibwaik Aburaam amerekekin akanykaarei nukotoma osipan owaikec bonik.
Genesis21:29 Kotema Abimelek Aburaam atiar, “Amerekekin ŋun akanykaarei nuigitaa apoloukec inyo?”"
Genesis21:30 Kotema atiar, “Iyaŋaari amerekekin ŋun akanykaarei kakanika, tetere eraun aanyunet kama ajai aitejenun ebe eoŋ aboki atan ŋin.”"
Genesis21:31 Ŋes amaikinia aibois ŋin Beer-seba; naarai nen ŋes etutukioto kesi kere.
Genesis21:32 Kwaŋin kitutukoto aitutuket koBeer-seba: konyou Abimelek ka Pikol ekapolon loka ajoreke, kobonosi akwap naka Ipilisitian."
Genesis21:33 Kiraik Aburaam epeduru toma Beer-seba, kiwonei kanen ekiror loka EJAKAIT, Edeke lomam edaun."
Genesis21:34 Kodau Aburaam apaarasia nuipu kakwap naka Ipilisitian.
Genesis22:1 Kosodi kanen kokau kanun, kitem Edeke Aburaam, kotema atiar, “Aburaam.” Kotema atiar, “Eoŋ lo.”"
Genesis22:2 Kotema atiar, “Koya kwape kwana ikokukon, ikonikoku iteluna yenimina, ŋes Isaak, kolot akwap nako Moria; koinak kaŋina araun ainakinet naicweio kotoma ediopet koronan lokalimokini.”"
Genesis22:3 Konyou Aburaam tupuruc sek, kopetanak lupetan asigiriake, koyana iarei kotoma ikatumunakake, ka Isaak da ikekoku; kibet akito nuka ainakinet naicweio, konyou, kolot aibois naabala ŋes Edeke."
Genesis22:4 Kapaaran kanakiwuniet kiteluo Aburaam akekonye, koany aibois."
Genesis22:5 Kolimok Aburaam ikekatumunak ebe, “Kosala yesi ne nepepe kasigiria, kilosi eoŋ da ka itelepat laije; kamaata kabonutu neijaas.”"
Genesis22:6 Koyana Aburaam akito nuka ainakinet naicweio, kisibwok Isaak ikekoku; koyana akim ka ekileŋ kakaninike; koloto kesi luarei nepepe."
Genesis22:7 Kotema Isaak papake Aburaam atiar, “Ipapa.” Kotema atiar, “Eoŋ lo, ikakoku.” Kotema atiar, “Akim ka akito enu; konye anibo imerekek yenikainakinet naicwcio?”"
Genesis22:8 Kotema Aburaam atiar, “Kadumakini eoŋ Edeke imerekek yenikainakinet naicweio, ikakoku.” Koloto do kesi luarei nepepe."
Genesis22:9 Kodoloto aibois naalimokinit ŋes Edeke; kodukok Aburaam etem nen, kigan akito, koen ikekoku Isaak, kisiperik otem, kuju akito."
Genesis22:10 Korio Aburaam akekan, kolem ekileŋ aaria ikekoku."
Genesis22:11 Kiworo emalaika loka EJAKAIT ebwoi kokuju, kobala ebe, “Aburaam, Aburaam.” Kotema atiar, “Eoŋ lo.”"
Genesis22:12 Kotema atiar, “Sirikidokok akan otelepat, kwabo sirikisubak idiobore: naarai ajeni kwana kwape iyonitor Edeke, naarai mam kimikit ikokukon, ikonikoku iteluna.”"
Genesis22:13 Kitonyou Aburaam akekonyen, kosesen, ido koany, kojai emerekek kauken, ikamunit amoni amumwarake: kolot Aburaam koyana emerekek, koinak araun ainakinet naicweio aibois naka ikekoku."
Genesis22:14 Komaik Aburaam aibois nin Yawe-yire: kwape inerare aitodol lolo ebe, “Komoru loka EJAKAIT edumunere.”"
Genesis22:15 Kiworo emalaika loka EJAKAIT Aburaam irwan nakiareit kokuju,"
Genesis22:16 Kobala ebe, “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Esumun kanukan, naarai iswama kwaŋin, kwabo mam kimikit ikokukon, ikonikoku iteluna:"
Genesis22:17 Kotoma arereŋ kesirerenenenei jo, ka aiyat keyatanakinenei akoniwur kwape kaacer nukotoma akuj, ido kwape kasine naejai ariri naka aŋolol; irumi da aurikon erute loka lukasurupokec;"
Genesis22:18 Ido toma aurikon isirerenere atekerin kere nuka akwapisinei; naarai irima ekaporoto.”
Genesis22:19 Kosodi kobono Aburaam mama ajaas ikatumunakake, konyout kolot nepepe Beer-seba; kiboienenei Aburaam koBeer-seba."
Genesis22:20 Kosodi kokau kanun kolimokinai Aburaam ebe, “Koany, Milika da abu kourik onacekon Nakor idwe;"
Genesis22:21 Us ekiyaike, ka Bus onaceke; ka Kemuel papa loka Aram;"
Genesis22:22 Ka Kesed, ka Kaso, ka Pilidas, ka Yidulap;’ ka Betuel.”"
Genesis22:23 Betue! kouri Rebeka; ŋullukanykauni kes luaurikini Milika Nakor, onaceke ka Aburaam."
Genesis22:24 Abulesitike da ekekiror Reuma, ŋes da kouri Teba, ka Gakam, ka Takas, ka Maaka."
Genesis23:1 Kobut Sara ikar akwatat ka akaisaarei ka lukanykaarei; ŋul kes ikar luabu Sara kodau.
Genesis23:2 Kotwanik Sara Kiriat-aruba (ŋes Keburon) kakwap naka Kanaan; kobu Aburaam akuudian ka eibworo Sara.
Genesis23:3 Konyou Aburaam kaneejai nakatwanike, kotema idwe luka Ket atiar,"
Genesis23:4 “Arai eoŋ epejonon ido ekaloton kama ijaas; koinakinai aibois nakidaanakina, koraun nakan kotoma akwapukus kedaik nakatwanika, kenyek aanyunun bobo.”"
Genesis23:5 Koboijokis idwe luka Ket Aburaam kotemasi atiar,"
Genesis23:6 “Kopupokinai ejakaitikos; irai ijo ejakait lokapolon kama kijaa isio: kidaik nakatwanikon toma atesinakosi naiseuni ijo kere; emamei kasio yenikimiki aijaikin aketes, aidaikin nakatwanikon.”"
Genesis23:7 Konyou Aburaam, kokukokin ituŋa luka akwap kaŋin, kes idwe luka Ket."
Genesis23:8 Kinera kakes kobala ebe, “Arai ikotosi eoŋ aidaikin nakatwanika kenyek aanyunun bobo, kopupokinai, kiŋaiŋaikinai Epuron okoku loka Sokar,"
Genesis23:9 Kainak abua naka Makupela, naejai ŋes, naenesit kotoma omanikorike; ketwegel etiaike kere kokidiŋikus koraun akates cut.”"
Genesis23:10 Eboie Epuron kokidin kidwe luka Ket, Koboŋok Epuron Ekitit Aburaam, kopupete idwe luka Ket, kes kere luapotu kolomasi orute loka erc, kobala ebe,"
Genesis23:11 “Mam, ejakaitika, kiirarai, kainak emanikor, ka abua da naejai toma kainak; kakonyen nuka idwe luka ikatuŋa kainak jo; kidaik nakatwanikon.”"
Genesis23:12 Kokukokin Aburaam kakonyen nuka ituŋa luka akwap kaŋin,"
Genesis23:13 Kotema ŋesi Epuron kopupete ituŋa luka akwap atiar, “Konye arai ikoto, kenainait, kiirarai; atacakini etiai loka emanikor; kiyu kainak, edaikini eoŋ da nakatwanika nen.”"
Genesis23:14 Koboŋok Epuron Aburaam kolimok ebe,"
Genesis23:15 “Ekajakait, kiirarai; emanikor etiaike isekelin luka epuesa akwat aoŋon ŋes bo inyo kama ajai eoŋ ka jo? Aso kidaik nakatwanikon.”"
Genesis23:16 Kiira Aburaam Epuron; kitem Aburaam epuesa loalimokinit ŋes Epuron kopupete idwe luka Ket, isekelin luka epuesa akwat aoŋon, luka epuesa loetwasamaenenete ikagwelanarak kapakio kanun."
Genesis23:17 Kwaŋin aponi kitebeai Aburaam emanikor loka Epuron, loajai toma Makupela, loitei Mamure, emanikor ka abua naajai toma, ka ikito kere luajaas toma omanikor, luerimorito eikoruke kere,"
Genesis23:18 Araun luke kakonyen nuka idwe luka Ket, kakonyen nuka nul kere luapotu kolomut korute loka ereke."
Genesis23:19 Kokau kanun, kidaik Aburaam aberuke Sara toma abua nakotoma omanikor loka Makupela loitei Mamure (ŋes Keburon), toma akwap naka Kanaan."
Genesis23:20 Emanikor ka abua naajai toma kitebeai Aburaam kakonyen nuka idwe luka Ket araun luke cut, araun aibois nakidaanakina."
Genesis24:1 Amoionit Aburaam kokokosanite da noi: kisirerenenenei EJAKAIT Aburaam kotoma akiro kere.
Genesis24:2 Kolimok Aburaam ekebulesit, ekapolon loka etogoke, loayanaarit kere luajaas kaŋes ebe, “Keŋaiŋait, kibwaik akonikan kwap kamurwoka."
Genesis24:3 Eoŋ da kesiyapoikini jo kama ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka akuj ido Edeke loka akwapisinei, ebe mam imanyakini ikakoku aberu naelomuni kotoma apesur nuko Kanaan, nukaneeboio eoŋ."
Genesis24:4 Konye ilosi akwapuka, neejaas iinacanaka, komanyak okokuka Isaak aberu kaŋina.”"
Genesis24:5 Kotema ebulesit atiar, “Elemuni mam aberu iyuuni abunore keoŋ adolun akwap na; ebusakinit kereka eoŋ ainyakar okokukon akwap nakolo kibunio?”"
Genesis24:6 Kotema Aburaam atiar, “Mam inyakari okokuka nepepec da."
Genesis24:7 EJAKAIT, Edeke loka akuj lokalemuni kotogo loka papaka, kakwap da nakaurikinio, ido loabu kinera keoŋ, keyapoik da kobala ebe, ‘Ainakini akoniwur akwap na’; ijukuni nol ekemalaika aiŋarenikin jo, imanyakini okokuka aberu naka nina."
Genesis24:8 Arai mam aberu iyuuni abunore kajo, emameete nukibeikinete jo kotoma aiyaposit kana, konye sirikinyaka okokuka nina.”"
Genesis24:9 Kibwaik ebulesit akekan kwap kamurwo naka papake Aburaam, kiyapoik kanuka akirot kaŋin."
Genesis24:10 Koyana ebulesit ikaalai itomon, lukotoma okaalai luka papake, kolot; kojaas kiboro kere lukajokak luka papake kotoma akaninike; konyou, kolot Mesopotamia, ore loka Nakor."
Genesis24:11 Kitukukok ikaalai kiŋa naka ere neejai atan naka akipi, napejosi, apak naeponiata aŋor aiwok akipi."
Genesis24:12 Kotema atiar, “Wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ejakaitika Aburaam, kenainair, koinakinai arereŋ lolo, kitodik ejakaitika Aburaam asianut."
Genesis24:13 Koany, abwoi kariri naka atan naka akipi, ido epote apesur nuka ituŋa lukore aiwok akipi;"
Genesis24:14 Aso kojau kwana, apese naatemari eoŋ ebe, ‘Kooku amotikon, kenainait kamat’; kosodi ŋesi da ebe, ‘Komat, eruanakini da ikonikaalai’; koraun nin naiseikinit ekonibulesit Isaak; nen do ajenunia ebe itodik ekajakait asianut.”"
Genesis24:15 Kwaŋin, eroko inera, koany, kolom Rebeka nakeurie Betuel okoku loka Milika, aberu naka Nakor, onace loka Aburaam, kojai amotike okeperike."
Genesis24:16 Etemelel da apese noi, abekot namam ejeŋi ekiliokit; kijesar atan, kileleb amotike, kodok."
Genesis24:17 Koker ebulesit airiamun kaŋes kotema atiar, “Kenainait, ae adisikipi nuka amotikon, kamat.”"
Genesis24:18 Kotema atiar, “Komat, ekajakait.” Kisunya awoun amoti, kibwaik akanike kitamat ŋes,"
Genesis24:19 Kedau aitamat ŋes kotema atiar, “Aokokini ikonikaalai da, komata kimonikinos.”"
Genesis24:20 Kisunya abukokin akipi nuka amotike atuba, koker bobo atan aiwok, kowokok ikekaalai kere."
Genesis24:21 Kite ŋes etuŋanan, kopala ajenun arai abu EJAKAIT kisireren akelosit, arai bo mam."
Genesis24:22 Kosodete, kedaut ikaalai aimat, kolem etuŋanan egilut loka esabu, alaŋiruke atutubet naka esekel, aikomon da aarei nuka akaninike, alanirukec isekelin itomon luka esabu;"
Genesis24:23 Kotema atiar, “Iŋai papakon? Kenainait kolimokinai. Ejai apak ore loka papakon kapero isio?”"
Genesis24:24 Kotema atiar, “Arai eoŋ apese naka Betuel okoku loka Milika, lokeurikini ŋesi Nakor.”"
Genesis24:25 Kotema da atiar, “Kija kanya ka inyamat lukidaunete, ka apak da naperot.”"
Genesis24:26 Kitulur etuŋanan akekou, koma EJAKAIT."
Genesis24:27 Kotema atiar, “Kituritete EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ejakaitika Aburaam, lomam eswaki aitodikin ekajakait akeitim ka akebeit; ka eoŋ da, abu EJAKAIT keŋarenik korot kiton togo loka iinacan luka ejakaitika.”"
Genesis24:28 Koker apese, kolimok lukotogo loka totoke kwape ejaatar akiro ŋun,"
Genesis24:29 Ido ajai Rebeka onaceke, ekekiror Laban; koker neejai etuŋanan, aisiriama ŋes katan."
Genesis24:30 Kosodi nakeanyunia ŋesi egilut, ka aikomon kakanin nuka inacike, kiira da akiro nuka Rebeka inacike ebe, “Kalimoki etuŋanan kwaŋin”; kodol ŋesi neejai etuŋanan; ido koany, ebwoi kidunyasi kikaalai kaneajai atan."
Genesis24:31 Kotema atiar, “Kolom ijo lokisirerenit EJAKAIT; inyo bo ibwoia kokiŋa? Naarai etemonok eoŋ etogo, ka apak da naka ikaalai.”"
Genesis24:32 Koloma etuŋanan togo, kolac ikaalai; koinak anya ka inyamat kanuka ikaalai, ka akipi ailosia akekeien ka akejen nuka ituŋa kaluajaas nepepe kaŋes,"
Genesis24:33 Kibwaikinai aimuj akonyeneke ebe, “Kimuj.” Konye kotema atiar, “Mam eoŋ emuji, eriŋa kelimuno nukejukunitere.” Kotema atiar, “Kolim.”"
Genesis24:34 Kotema atiar, “Arai eoŋ ebulesit loka Aburaam."
Genesis24:35 Abu EJAKAIT kisirereŋ noi ejakaitika, ido araun lokapolon; abu koinak da ŋes isipanin luka amerekekin ka aituk, ka epuesa, ka esabu, ka ibulesin ka abulesin, ka ikaalai ka asigirian."
Genesis24:36 Abu Sara aberu naka ejakaitika kourik ŋes ikoku kemoion: abu koinak ŋol kere lukejaatar.
Genesis24:37 Kesiyapoik eoŋ ejakaitika ebe, Mam imanyakini okokuka apese naka apesur nuka Ikanaanin lueboie eoŋ kakwapukec,"
Genesis24:38 Konye ilosi togo loka papaka, neejai atekerika komanyak okokuka aberu."
Genesis24:39 Abu katema ejakaitika atiar, ‘Elemuni bo aberu kogir aupun keoŋ.’"
Genesis24:40 Kalimok eoŋ ebe, ‘EJAKAIT, Ioalosenenei eoŋ kakonyeneke, iyakiari ekemalaika nepepe kaio, isirercni akonilosit, imanyakini da okokuka aberu naelomuni koinacanaka kotogo loka papaka,"
Genesis24:41 Kwaŋin mam nukibeete jo kanuka akaiyaposit, arai kidol oinacanaka; ido arai mam kes kiinakinete aberu, emameete nukibeikinete jo kanuka aiyapositika.’"
Genesis24:42 “Abu lolo eoŋ atan, kasodi atemar, ‘Wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ejakaitika Aburaam, arai teni kisireren erotoka loalosi;"
Genesis24:43 Koany, abwoi eoŋ kariri naka atan naka akipi; asa kojaut kwana, ebe, apese naelomuni aiwok, naabala eoŋ ebe, “Koinakinai akipi kamotikon kamat, kenainait”;"
Genesis24:44 Kosodi ŋesi da ebe, “Komat ijo, ido awokokini eoŋ ikonikaalai da”: koraun nin aberu naeseikinit EJAKAIT okoku loka ejakaitika.’"
Genesis24:45 “Napeneranakin ŋun kotauka, koany, kolom Rebeka kamotike kokeperike; kiiesar atan, kowok; kasodi eoŋ ebe, ‘Kenainait, ae kamat.’"
Genesis24:46 Kisunya ŋesi awoun amotike kokeperike, kotema atiar, ‘Komat, eruanakini ikonikaalai da’; kasodi aimat, kiruanak ikaalai da."
Genesis24:47 Abu kenit ŋes ebe, ‘Irai ijo akoku naka iŋai P” Kotema atiar, ‘Akoku naka Betuel, okoku loka Nakor, loaurikini ŋes Milika’; kebwaik egilut okumesike, ka aikomon da akaninike."
Genesis24:48 Ketulur akouka kwap, kama EJAKAIT, ketur EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ejakaitika Aburaam; loabu keteten eoŋ korot ayaŋaar apese naka onaceke loka ejakaitika kanuka okokuke."
Genesis24:49 Natikwana da arai iyuunitos asubakin ejakaitika asianut ka abeit, kolimokinai; arai mam, kolimokinai; kebelokin teten, arai kediany.”"
Genesis24:50 Kosodete kobonokis Laban ka Betuel atiar, “Alomu akirot nin kama ejai EJAKAIT; mam kipedori alimokin jo nuejok karaida nueroko;"
Genesis24:51 Koany, ejai Rebeka akonyenekon, koyana ŋes, kolot, koraun ŋesi aberu naka okoku loka ejakaitikon kwape atemaria EJAKAIT.”"
Genesis24:52 Kosodi kiira ebulesit loka Aburaam akecekiro, kokukokin kwap mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Genesis24:53 Koyau ebulesit inapen luka epuesa, ka luka esabu, ka igoen, koinak Rebeka; koinak da onaceke ka totoke iboro luka akais nuipu."
Genesis24:54 Konyamata, komatata, ŋesi ka ituŋa luajaatar, kiwalakis; konyout tupuruc, kotema atiar, “Kotwarai eoŋ, kalot neejai ejakaitika.”"
Genesis24:55 Kotema onace loka apese ka totoke atiar, “Kosal ber apese kasio adaun apaarasia adis, arai atomon: kosodi konyet alosit.”"
Genesis24:56 Kotema atiar, “Sirikiisibo eoŋ, naarai abu EJAKAIT kisireren akalosit; kotwarai eoŋ kalot neejai ejakaitika.”"
Genesis24:57 Kotemasi atiar, “Kinyarauni apese, kenitata nuelomunete kaitukuke.”"
Genesis24:58 Konyaraut Rebeka, kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Ikoto alosit nepepe ketunanan kalo?” Kotema atiar, “Alosi.”"
Genesis24:59 Kotwarata Rebeka kinacikec, ka akasaanike, ka ebulesit loka Aburaam, ka iketuŋa."
Genesis24:60 Kilipakis Rebeka arereŋ, kotemasi atiar, “Inacikosi, korau ijo toto naka ilukumin luka ilukumin itomon, akoniwur da kirumia erute loka ŋul kaluelaete kes.”"
Genesis24:61 Konyou Rebeka, kapesuruke, kibwanenoto ikaalai, kotupasi etuŋanan; koyana ebulesit Rebeka, kolot."
Genesis24:62 Kobu Isaak korot loka Beer-lakai-roi: naarai kiboienenei kakwap naka ari naka Eŋalakimak.
Genesis24:63 Koloma Isaak omanikor eboŋ aomoom; kiteluo akekonye, kite, ido koany, eponitos ikaalai."
Genesis24:64 Kiteluo Rebeka akekonye: keanyu Isaak kodok kokaalai.
Genesis24:65 Kotema ŋesi ebulesit atiar, “Iŋai bo etuŋanan ŋol loitorunit omanikor airiamun kaoni?” Kotema ebulesit atiar, “Ŋes ejakaitika.” Kitin ekegoe lokimukos, kimuko akekonyen."
Genesis24:66 Kolimok ebulesit Isaak akiro kere nuabu kiswama.
Genesis24:67 Kitoloma Isaak Rebeka owema loka Sara totoke, koyana ŋes, korau akeberu; komina ŋes; kitalakarite Isaak nakedaunia totoke atwanare."
