Genesis25:1 Kosodi Aburaam aimany aceberu, ekekiror Ketura."
Genesis25:2 Kouri ŋin Simuran ka Yokusan, ka Medan, ka Midian, ka Isibak ka Sua."
Genesis25:3 Yokusan kouri Seba ka Dedan. Idwe luka Dedan kes Asurim ka Letusim ka Leumin.
Genesis25:4 Bwe luka Midian; Epa ka Eper, ka Kanok, ka Abida, ka Eludaa. Ŋul kere kes idwe luka Ketura."
Genesis25:5 Koinak Aburaam Isaak kere luajaatar.
Genesis25:6 Konye idwe luka abulesin, luajaatar Aburaam, koinak Aburaam kes ainakineta: kitonyou kes kama ejai Isaak okokuke, eroko ŋesi ejari, kolototo kidc akwap nakokide,"
Genesis25:7 Nu kes apaarasia nuka ikar luka aijar naka Aburaam nuabu kobut, ikar akwatat ka akaisakanykaarei ka lukany."
Genesis25:8 Kojal Aburaam aijar, kotwana kodaunite akokosan ejok, komoionite noi, kodoloto ikekar; koyanaarai mama ejaas iketuŋa."
Genesis25:9 Ikedwe Isaak ka Isimael kidaikis ŋes toma abua naka Makupela, toma omanikor loka Epuron okoku loka Sokar Ekitit, loitei Mamure;"
Genesis25:10 Emanikor loetwegelete idwe luka Ket Aburaam; kidaikinai nen Aburaam ka aberuke Sara.
Genesis25:11 Kosodi kedau Aburaam atwanare kisireren Edeke Isaak okokuke; kiboienenei Isaak koBeer-lakai-roi.
Genesis25:12 Na ŋes aur naka Isimael okoku loka Aburaam, loabu Kagar Amisiriat, abulesit naka Sara, kourik Aburaam:"
Genesis25:13 Lu kes ikiroria luka odwe luka Isimael, kwape ejaatar ikiroriakee, kwape ejaatar aturiokee: ekiyai loka Isimael ŋes Nebaiot; ka Kedar, ka Adubeel ka Mibusam."
Genesis25:14 Ka Misima, ka Duma, ka Masa;"
Genesis25:15 Kadad, ka Tema, jetur, ka Napis, ka Kedema;"
Genesis25:16 ŋul kes idwe lutelepai luka Isimael ido nul kes ikiroriakee kwape ejaatar ireriakec, ido kwape edukuroto iwemaikee, ijaka itomon ka luarei kwape ajaatar akeeetekerin."
Genesis25:17 Ikar da luka Isimael luabu kobut, ikar akwatat ka akaisauni ka lukanykaarei; kojal aijar, kotwana; koyanaarai mama ejaas iketuŋa,"
Genesis25:18 Kiboioto anyoun koKabila aitodol Sur naitei Misiri; bala ilosi Asuria; eboienenei kaneajaas ikeinaean kere.
Genesis25:19 Na ŋes aur naka Isaak okoku loka Aburaam; abu Aburaam kouru Isaak:
Genesis25:20 Ido abu Isaak kodaunite ikar akaisaoŋon komanya Rebeka, akoku naka Betuel, Esuriat loka Padan-aram, inaeike ka Laban Esuriat, araun akeberu."
Genesis25:21 Kinaiŋa Isaak EJAKAIT kanuka akeberu, naarai arai arakan; kiira EJAKAIT aiŋainaitoike, kopotuu akeberu Rebeka."
Genesis25:22 Kopegasi idwe kotoma akoikike; kotema atiar, “Arai ikote nen, kanukinyo apotio eoŋ?” Kolot ŋesi aiŋit EJAKAIT."
Genesis25:23 Kolimok EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Ejaas atekerin aarei toma akoikikon. Ido atekerin aarei epote atiak napeelomunete kaliligetekon; Ateker adiopet da itelekari ateker ace kagogon; Ido lokapolon ijaanakini lodidi.”"
Genesis25:24 Kedoloto apaarasia nuka aidounike, koany, ajaas imwatok akoikike."
Genesis25:25 Kolom yenisodit erai yeneren akuanake kere, koeekite bala anapito naka ajul; komaikis ekekiror Esau."
Genesis25:26 Kokau kolom onaeeke, itinit akekan atitibat naka Esau; komaikinai ekekiror Yakob; korai Isaak loka ikar akaisakanykape ewuriei akeberu kes."
Genesis25:27 Kopolooros itelepai; koraun Esau ekamejan loepiriana, etuŋanan loka ais; korau Yakob etuŋanan loiyapaara, kiboienenei kotoma owemai."
Genesis25:28 Komina do Isaak Esau naarai anyamenenei lumejanake; Rebeka da komina Yakob.
Genesis25:29 Kipo Yakob emanor; kolom Esau kais, ilworuna noi:"
Genesis25:30 Kotema Esau Yakob atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, kitanyamai emanor ŋol Ioeren, naarai elworuna eut.” Ŋes enyaritere ekekiror Edom."
Genesis25:31 Kotema Yakob atiar, “Kitwegelai lolo akonipolou.”"
Genesis25:32 Kotema Esau atiar, “Koany, eapie eoŋ atwanare, ido kenarakini eoŋ apolou biai?”"
Genesis25:33 Kotema Yakob atiar, “Kiyapoikinoi lolo.” Kiyapoik: kitwegel Yakob akepolou."
Genesis25:34 Koinak Yakob Esau atap ka emanor loka imare; konyam, komat, konyou, kolot; kwaijin amwania Esau akepolou."
Genesis26:1 Kojai ebeli ece akwap, konye mere ie losodit lokejai kapaarasia nuka Aburaam. Kolot Isaak mama ejai Abimelek ekabaka loka Ipilisitian toma Gerar."
Genesis26:2 Kitaanyikin EJAKAIT ŋes, kotema atiar, “Mam ilosi Misiri; kiboikin toma akwap nakalimokin:"
Genesis26:3 Kiboienenei kakwap kana, eboienenei eoŋ da kajo, ido kesirerenenenei, naarai kainakini jo ka aurikon akwapin nu kere; etogogoŋi da aiyaposit naabu keyapoik Aburaam papakon;"
Genesis26:4 Ido csupui akoniwur kwape kaacer nuka akuj, ainakini da akoniwur akwapin nu kere; toma akoniwur da ŋes esirerenio atekerin kere nuka akwapisinei."
Genesis26:5 Naarai arimarit Aburaam ekaporoto, aricenenei nualimonokin, aicorakinetaka, akiroka, ka ikakisila da.”"
Genesis26:6 Kiboienenei Isaak kotoma Gerar.
Genesis26:7 Kinitata ŋes ituŋa luka nen nuka akeberu; kotema atiar, “Ŋes kinacika”; naarai akuriana einer ebe, “Akaberu”; “elemuni ituŋa luka nen kaara eoŋ kanuka Rebeka; naarai etemelel.”"
Genesis26:8 Kosodi kedau apak naepol, kosesen Abimelek, ekabaka loka Ipilisitian kotoma adirisa, kite, ido koany Isaak ebolias kakeberu Rebeka."
Genesis26:9 Konyarau Abimelek Isaak kotema atiar, “Koany, abeit erai akoniberu; kanukinyo ibalar ebe, ‘Erai kinacika? ‘“Kotema Isaak atiar, “Naarai aomit ebe, ‘Elemuni katwana kanukeŋ.’’’"
Genesis26:10 Kotema Abimelek atiar, “Anyoika nu nukiswamak sio? Tikeperoto ediopet kotuŋa kaberukon, komam ejeŋi, ti ijo kitagwaik sio akirot.”"
Genesis26:11 Kicorak Abimelek ituŋa kere kinera atiar, “Ŋol loetirori etuŋanan lo arai akeberu eario do.”"
Genesis26:12 Koye Isaak toma akwap nin, koton da kokaru kanol irwan akwatat; kisireren EJAKAIT ŋes,"
Genesis26:13 Koraun etuŋanan loepol, kiyatanakin aitodol nearaunor ŋesi loepol noi."
Genesis26:14 Ajaas ŋes isipanin luka amerekekin ka luka aituk, ka ibulesin luipu; koliliata Ipilisitian."
Genesis26:15 Apotu Ipilisitian konwokanasi atanin kere nuapotu ibulesin luka papake kobokata, kapaarasia nuka Aburaam papake, kilelebata alup."
Genesis26:16 Kotema Abimelek Isaak atiar, “Konyou kanekija isio; naarai igogon ijo aitelekarit sio.”"
Genesis26:17 Konyou Isaak kibubuk ewemake toma aditot naka Gerar, kiboikin nen."
Genesis26:18 Kowad Isaak atanin nuabokitai kotoma apaarasia nuka Aburaam papake; naarai apotu Ipilisitian konwokanasi ketwana Aburaam; komaanak ikecekiroria kwape kemaanakinitor papake.
Genesis26:19 Kobokata ibulesin luka Isaak toma aditot nin, koanyut kanen atan naka akipi nuibulubulas."
Genesis26:20 Kopegata ikecokok luka Gerar ka ikecokok luka Isaak, kobalas ebe, “Akosikipi nu.” Komaik atan ekekiror Esek naarai apotu kitepegata ŋes,"
Genesis26:21 Kobokata atan ace; ŋin da kopegatatar. Komaik ekekiror Situna.
Genesis26:22 Konyou kanen, kobok atan ace; mam ŋin aponi kopegare, komaik ekirorike Rekobot, kobala ebe, “Naarai kwana kitalala oni EJAKAIT, kiwuriar kakwap.”"
Genesis26:23 Konyou kanen kolot Beer-seba,"
Genesis26:24 Kitaanyikin EJAKAIT kakuare kaŋin, kotema atiar, “Eoŋ Edeke leka Aburaam papakon; sirikikurianar, naarai ajai eoŋ nepepe kajo, kesirereni, eyatanakini da akoniwur kanuka Aburaam ekabulesit.”"
Genesis26:25 Kodukok nen etem, kiwone ekiror loka EJAKAIT, kibubuk nen ekewema; nepenen da ŋes abokikinete ibulesin luka Isaak atan."
Genesis26:26 Kosodi konyou Abimelek koGerar alosit neejai, ka Akusat opaperoke, ka Pikol ekapolon loka ajoreke."
Genesis26:27 Kotema Isaak atiar, “Kanukinyo iponitotor neaiai, naarai kilaitos? Ido ipotu kireneata kamakus?”"
Genesis26:28 Kotemasi atiar, “Kipou kaanyutu cut ebe ejai EJAKAIT kajo, kasodete atemar ebe, ‘Kojau ca do aiyaposit nekija oni kidinikosi kajo,’ ketutukoto kajo."
Genesis26:29 Kinyek ijo aitican sio, kwape mam sio kitiroritor jo, kwape da mam sio kikonakinitor jo amodiokirot nabarai ajokis bon, ido kipou katwarata jo kainapakina; irai do ijo lokisirerenit EJAKAIT.”"
Genesis26:30 Kipoik epucit, konyamata, komatata."
Genesis26:31 Kodilokis anyoun tupuruc sek, kiyaponokinos. Kotwar Isaak kes, koloto kainapakina."
Genesis26:32 Kosodi kapaaran kaŋin, kopotu ibulesin luka Isaak kolimokis nuka atan naabokitos kesi, kolimokis ebe, “Kiany akipi.”"
Genesis26:33 Komaik Siba: ŋes enyaritere ekiror loka ere Beer-seba aitodol lolo.
Genesis26:34 Adaunit Esau ikar akaisaoŋon emanyi Yudit akokuke naka Beeri Ekitit, ka Basemat akokuke naka Elon Ekitit:"
Genesis26:35 Kitakadikis itauon luka Isaak ka Rebeka.
Genesis27:1 Kosodi kanen, kemoion Isaak, kowariwarete da akekonye, komam epedori aanyun, konyarau Esau okokuke Iosodit, kotema atiar, “Ikakoku.” Kobala ebe, “Eoŋ lo.”"
Genesis27:2 Kotema atiar, “Koany, amoion eoŋ, mam ajeni apaaran naatwania."
Genesis27:3 Aso kwana kenainait, kitin lumeias, ekonieoe, ka akonikabwa, kolot ais, komejak imejauna;"
Genesis27:4 Kitemok akiriŋ naejijim, kwape akotor, koinu, kanyam; kasodi kelipak jo arereŋ eroko eoŋ ketwana.”"
Genesis27:5 Kiira Rebeka nueneras Isaak kaEsau ikekoku. Kolot Esau ais amejaun imejauna, ka ayaun da."
Genesis27:6 Kolimok Rebeka Yakob ikekoku ebe, “Koany, apup papakon elimokini onacekon Esau ebe,"
Genesis27:7 ‘Koinunai imeiauna kitemok akiriŋ naejijim, kanyam, kelipak jo arereŋ kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT eroko eoŋ ketwana.’"
Genesis27:8 Aso ikakoku, kiira ekaporoto kwape ejaatar ŋun nukeeorakini."
Genesis27:9 Kolot kwana osipan loka akinei, koinu ikaalei iarei luejok; etemokini eoŋ da kes araun akiriŋ naejijimikini papakon, kwape ekotor:"
Genesis27:10 Iinari ijo papakon, konyam, kosodi kilipak jo arereŋ eroko ketwana.”"
Genesis27:11 Kotema Yakob totoke Rebeka atiar, “Koany, erai onaeeka Esau etuŋanan loecekit, konye arurut eoŋ."
Genesis27:12 Elemuni papaka kararapana, araun eoŋ da ekeŋalan kamake; kasodi ailamakinio kwabo mere aisirerenio.’"
Genesis27:13 Kotema totoke atiar, “Kabeik eoŋ akoniilamakinio, ikakoku; na bon, kiira ekaporoto, ape koomikinai.”"
Genesis27:14 Kolot, koom, koinu totoke: kitemok totoke akiriŋ naeiiiim, kwape akotor papake."
Genesis27:15 Kolem Rebeka inapen luejok luka Esau ekiyaike, luajaas kaŋes togo, kitanap nul Yakob okokuke lodidi:"
Genesis27:16 Kitanapanak imukulen luka ikaalei akaninike, omurisiŋike da nearurut."
Genesis27:17 Koinak okokuke Yakob akiriŋ naejijim ka inyamat luetemokinit akaninike.
Genesis27:18 Kobu neejai papake, kotema atiar, “Ipapa.” Kobala ebe, “Eoŋ lo; iŋai bo ijo, ikakoku?”"
Genesis27:19 Kotema Yakob papake atiar, “Eoŋ Esau ekiyaikon; ido eswama kwape ibu kieorakinia; kenainait, konyou, kiboikin, konyam imejaunaka, kosodi kilipak eoŋ arereŋ.’"
Genesis27:20 Kotema Isaak okokuke atiar, “Ikonakini ai isunyari adumun kwaŋin, ikakoku?” Kobala ebe, “Naarai EJAKAIT Ekonideke ŋes ketusunyaari.”"
Genesis27:21 Kobala Isaak Yakob ebe, “Kenainait kikunyu, kararapana, ikakoku, arai kito ijo ikakoku Esau eut cut, arai mere.”"
Genesis27:22 Kikunyak Yakob neejai Isaak papake; korarapana, kiner ebe, “Eporoto erai eporoto loka Yakob, konye do akanin eraas akanin nuka Esau.”"
Genesis27:23 Mam abu komisiik, naarai acekitos akaninike, kwape kakanin nuka onaeeke Esau: kosodi ailipakin arereŋ."
Genesis27:24 Kotema atiar, “Ŋoŋ ikokuka Esau eut?” Kosodi ebe, “Eoŋ lopelo.”"
Genesis27:25 Kotema atiar, “Kisukunyikinai, kanyam imejauna yenika ikokuka, kasodi kelipak arereŋ.” Kisukunyik neejai, konyam: koinu ajon da, komat,"
Genesis27:26 Kosodi Isaak papake kotema ŋes atiar, “Ikakoku, kikunyu do, konu eoŋ.”"
Genesis27:27 Kikunyak konu: kinu elos loka anapitoke, kilipak arereŋ, kotema atiar, “Koany, elos loka ikokuka Esubit bala aures naka emanikor Ioisirerenit EJAKAIT:"
Genesis27:28 Ido koinanakini Edeke jo akopyo nuepote kokuju, Ka amio naka akwap, Akima ka ajon nuipu:"
Genesis27:29 Kijaanakinete jo ituŋa, Kokukonokinos jo atekerin: Koyaite ikoniinaean, Kokukonokinos jo odwe luka totokon: Kilamanakinete yenikilami jo, Ido kisirereŋenenete yenikilipakini jo arereŋ.”"
Genesis27:30 Kosodi kanen, nepedauni Isaak ailipakin Yakob arereŋ, korai Yakob da anyoun ŋipeŋin kaneejai papake Isaak, kobonuni do Esau onaeeke kotoma amej."
Genesis27:31 Kipo ŋesi da akiriŋ naeiijim koinu papake; kotema papake atiar, “Ipapa konyou ca bo, konyam imejauna yenika okokukon, kosodi kilipak arereŋ.”"
Genesis27:32 Isaak papake kotema ŋes atiar, “Iŋai bo ijo?” Kotema atiar, “Eoŋ ikonikoku yenikiyai, Esau.”"
Genesis27:33 Komaran Isaak noi noi, kotema atiar, “Aso iŋai bo nol lokemejauni imejauna kainu: anyam eoŋ kere eroko ijo kebuno, kasodi ailipakin arereŋ? Eebo, isirerenio ŋes da.”"
Genesis27:34 Kiira Esau akiro nuka papake, kikiliar aimony noi, kiutie, kobala papake ebe, “Okwe ipapa, kilipakinai eoŋ da arereŋ, eoŋ da, ba.”"
Genesis27:35 Kotema atiar, “Abu onacekon kobu iŋalai, ido kidemak arerenukon.”"
Genesis27:36 Kotema atiar, “Mam aponi komaikinai ejok ekekiror Yakob? Naarai alomaki nukan irwan nu kere aarei; abukadema apolouka; ido koany, natikwana da kadema akareren.” Kotema atiar, “Mam kideikinit eoŋ da adiorerene”"
Genesis27:37 Koboŋok Isaak kotema Esau atiar, “Koany, adakak ŋes ayait jo, ainak da iinacanake kere mama ejai aijaanakin; ido esimii ŋes akima ka aion, aso anyoika nukasubakini jo ikakoku?”"
Genesis27:38 Kotema Esau papake atiar, “Ejai jo arereŋ adiopet bon ipapa? Okwe ipapa, kilipakinai eoŋ da arereŋ, eoŋ da ba.” Kodelo Esau, komony."
Genesis27:39 Isaak papake Koboŋok ŋes ebe, “Koany, eraun etogokon loka amio naka akwap, ido loka akopyo nuepote kotoma akuj kokuju;"
Genesis27:40 Ido ijarenenei kanuka ekilenikon, Ŋaanakini da onacekon; Kosodi ejaun nailakakinor, Ilakilakaari ajookot komurisinikon.”"
Genesis27:41 Kosac Esau Yakob kanuka arereŋ naelipakin ŋes papake. Kotema Esau kotauke atiar, “Eapiete apaarasia nuka aimony papaka; kasodi aiar onaceka Yakob.”"
Genesis27:42 Kolimokinai Rebeka akiro nuka Esau okokuke lokapolon; kijuka, konyarau Yakob okokuke lodidi, kotema atiar, “Koany, onacekon Esau, toma akirokon, italakaara naarai inerunit aiar joo"
Genesis27:43 Aso kwana, okokuka, kiira ekaporoto; konyou, koker Karan mama ejai Laban onaceka;"
Genesis27:44 Kiboioror kaŋes apaarasia adis aitodol neinonaror adedeŋ naka onacekon;
Genesis27:45 Aitodol neinoŋaror anyunyura naka onacekon, kimurwokis da nuiswamak ŋes; ŋes ejukunia anyaraun jo kaŋina; kanukinyo tikademarere eoŋ yes kere kotoma apaaran adiopet?”"
Genesis27:46 Kotema Rebeka Isaak atiar, “Apas aijaraka kanuka apesur nuka Ket: arai kemany Yakob da aberu kotoma apesur nuka Ket, nuesubitos bala ŋun. Kotoma apesuru nuka akwap kana, iŋarakinete akaijar biai?”"
Genesis28:1 Konyarau Isaak Yakob, kilipak arereij, kicorak, kobala ebe, “Sirikimany aberu naka apesur nukoKanaan."
Genesis28:2 Konyou, kolot PadanAram, togo loka Betuel papa loka totokon, komanya kaŋina aberu kapesur nuka Laban onace loka totokon."
Genesis28:3 Edeke da Lokapedor kere kisireren jo, kitupu, kiyatanak, koraun erioner loka atekerin;"
Genesis28:4 Koinak jo arereŋ naka Aburaam, ijo nepepe kakoniwur, tetere irumi akwap nakolo kitorit nakeinakini Edeke Aburaam.”"
Genesis28:5 Kiyakia Isaak Yakob: kolot Padan-Aram, mama ejai Laban okoku loka Betuel Esuriat onaceke loka Rebeka toto naka Yakob ka Esau."
Genesis28:6 Koany Esau ebe elipaki Isaak Yakob arereŋ, kijuka da ŋes alosit PadanAram aimany kaŋina aberu; ido ilipakini arereŋ abu kicorak ebe, “Sirikimany aberu naka apesur nukoKanaan”;"
Genesis28:7 Korimak Yakob papake ka totoke, kolot Padan-Aram:"
Genesis28:8 Koany Esau ebe mam apesur nukoKanaan isiyalamikinito papake ka totoke;
Genesis28:9 Kolot Esau mama ejai Isimael, komany Makalat akoku naka Isimael okoku loka Aburaam, kinac naka Nebaiot araun akeberu, nepepe kanor nukejaas kaŋes,"
Genesis28:10 Konyou Yakob koBeer-seba, kobeia Karan."
Genesis28:11 Kodol aceibois korotoke, koper aitiwalar akwap, naarai alomarit akoloŋ; koyana amoru adiopet naka aibois kaŋin, kicolonik akekou, kojotoor kaibois kaŋin."
Genesis28:12 Kiruja airujasit, ido koany, adoket naesipokinitai kwap, kodolite aidike kuju; ido koany, imalaikan luka Edeke kodokanarete, kodokununete da kanen."
Genesis28:13 Ido koany, ebwoi EJAKAIT kokuiuke, kobala ebe, “Eoŋ EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Aburaam papaakon, ido Edeke loka Isaak: akwap naiperio, kainakini jo, nepepe kakoniwur;"
Genesis28:14 Akoniwur da eluori kwape kapua naka akwap, ido isiarakin ari nakoto ka nakokide, agolitomei, ka eŋalakimak; tomakon, toma aurikon da, ŋes edumuniata atekerin kere nuka akwapisinei arereŋ,"
Genesis28:15 Ido koany, ajai eoŋ kajo, kedarenenei kaneilosi kere, kenyakuni akwap na; naarai mam kenyeini aitodol neeswamaa nukalimok jo.”"
Genesis28:16 Kokweny Yakob kajo, kotema atiar, “Abeit ejai EJAKAIT aibois na; mam eoŋ da ajeni.”"
Genesis28:17 Koyoŋ, kotema atiar, “Esogim noi aibois na! Abeit ŋes etogo loka Edeke, ŋes erute loka akuj.”"
Genesis28:18 Konyou Yakob tupuruc sek, kolem amoru naecolonit kakouke, kosipok araun epir, kobukok akinyet kuiuken,"
Genesis28:19 Komaik aibois ŋin ekekiror Bet-el: konye sek arai ekiror loka ere Lus.
Genesis28:20 Kiyapoik Yakob aiyaposit, kobala ebe, “Arai ejaenena Edeke keoŋ, arai da kedarenenei kotoma orotoka loalosi, kainanakini da inyamat lunyaman, ka igoen lunapan,"
Genesis28:21 Tetere aboŋuni togo loka papaka kainapakina, ŋes do eraunor EJAKAIT Ekadeke,"
Genesis28:22 Amoru na da, naasipok araun epir, eraun etogo loka Edeke; ido kakere lukiinanakinenei mam aswaki ainanakin jo idiopet kotomon.”"
Genesis29:1 Kosodi kolot Yakob alositeke, kodol akwap naka ituŋa lukokide."
Genesis29:2 Kosesen, ido koany, ajai atan mana, ido koany, koperete kanen isipanin iuni luka amerekekin koapiete katan; naarai toma atan nin ŋes eruenenere isipanin: amoru da naajai aituk naka atan apol noi."
Genesis29:3 Kotukonokinos isipanin kere nina; kikokorioroi amoru alemar kaituk naka atan, kiruata amerekekin, kinyakakis amoru aituk naka atan toma aiboisike."
Genesis29:4 Kotema Yakob atiar, “Ikainacan, lukai bo yesi?” Kotemasi atiar, “Kirai isio Ikaranin.”"
Genesis29:5 Kotema kes atiar, “Ŋenete Laban okoku loka Nakor?” Kobonokis ebe, “Kijeni.”"
Genesis29:6 Kotema kes atiar, “Eŋalei?” Kobalas ebe, “Eijalei, ido koany, ebunit apeseke Rakel nepepe kamerekekin.”"
Genesis29:7 Kotema atiar, “Koany, eroko erai kidiŋ paaran, eroko da apak edolo naetukonokinere ibaren; kiruata amerekekin, kolot aitadak.”"
Genesis29:8 Kotemasi atiar, “Mam kipedori, aitodol neetukonokinotor isipanin kere, kikokoriosi amoru kaituk naka atan, kasodete airu amerekekin.”"
Genesis29:9 Eroko ŋesi inera kakes, kobu Rakel nepepe kamerekekin nuka papake; naarai ŋes ecokienenei."
Genesis29:10 Kosodi nakeanyunia Yakob Rakel akoku naka Laban onace loka totoke, ka amerekekin nuka Laban onace loka totoke, kikuny Yakob, kikokorio amoru kolema kaituk naka atan, kiruanak esipan loka Laban onace loka totoke,"
Genesis29:11 Konu Yakob Rakel, kodelo."
Genesis29:12 Kolimok Yakob Rakel kwape eraar ŋesi onace loka papake, ido kwape eraar okoku loka Rebeka; koker kolimok papake."
Genesis29:13 Kosodi kiira Laban akiro nuka Yakob okoku loka inacike, koker airiamun kaŋes; kotun, konu noi, kitoloma togoke. Kolimok Laban akiro ŋun kere."
Genesis29:14 Kotema Laban ŋes atiar, “Abeit irai ijo akoitika ido akuanaka.” Kiboikin nepepe kaŋes elap ediopet."
Genesis29:15 Kotema Laban Yakob atiar, “Naarai irai onaceka ŋes ibusakinitor ijo aijaanakin eoŋ tai? Kolimokinai, enyoin ekoniropit?”"
Genesis29:16 Ajaas Laban adwe aarei, ekiror loka nakapolon Lea, ekiror da loka nadidi Rakel."
Genesis29:17 Ido anonok akonye nuka Lea, konye arai Rakel naetemelel, akonyeneke da nuisiyalamikinete."
Genesis29:18 Kominakite Yakob Rakel, kotema atiar, “Kejaanakini ikar ikanykaarei tetere kiinakini Rakel akokukon nadidi.”"
Genesis29:19 Kotema Laban atiar, “Ejok ainakin jo, aitelekarit ainakin ecetuŋanan: kiboikin keoŋ.”"
Genesis29:20 Kijaanak Yakob ikar ikanykaarei tetere einakinio Rakel; kosubata apaarasia bala ikidioko, kanuaminar ŋes,"
Genesis29:21 Kotema Yakob Laban atiar, “Koinakinai akaberu, naarai adoloto akapaarasia, kalomak mama ejai.”"
Genesis29:22 Kotukonok Laban ituŋa kerc luka aibois kaŋin, kipo epucit."
Genesis29:23 Kosodi kedol atiboŋ, koyanau Lea akokuke, koinu ŋes; koloma mamake."
Genesis29:24 Koinak Laban Silupa akebulesit mama ejai akokuke Lea araun akebulesit.
Genesis29:25 Kosodi kiwala akwap, koany ŋesi erai Lea, kotema Laban atiar, “Anyoika bo nu nukiswamak? Mam abu kejaanak jo kanuka Rakel? Aso kanukinyo kinalakinia eoŋ?”"
Genesis29:26 Kotema Laban atiar, “Mam ikonio kwaŋin kotoma akwapukosi aikor nadidi ageikin nakapolon."
Genesis29:27 Kodau ber apaarasia akanykaarei nuka nin, kasodete konyet akorakin jo ace kanuka aijaanakin nakijaanakini eoŋ bobo, adaun ikar ice ikanykaarei.”"
Genesis29:28 Kiswama Yakob kwaŋin, kodau apaarasia akanykaarei, kokorak ŋes Rakel akokuke aimany."
Genesis29:29 Koinak Laban akokuke Rakel Bilika akebulesit araun akebulesit.
Genesis29:30 Koloma neejai Rakel da, komina Rakel aitelekarit Lea, kijaanak bobo ikar ice ikanykaarei."
Genesis29:31 Koany EJAKAIT ebe aponi kolaai Lea, kopuko akekoik: konye arai Rakel arakan."
Genesis29:32 Kopotuu Lea, kouru ikoku yenitelepat, komaik ekekiror Reuben; kotema atiar, “Naarai abu EJAKAIT koany ikacan; kwana kaminuni do okilenika.”"
Genesis29:33 Kopotuu bobo, kouru ikoku yenitelepat; kotema atiar, “Naarai abu EJAKAIT kiira kwape kalaitere, ŋes kainakinia bobo ikoku yen.” Komaik ekekiror Simeon."
Genesis29:34 Kopotuu bobo, kouru ikoku yenitelepat; kotema atiar, “Aso irwan na imorikikin do okilenika keoŋ, naarai kauriki idwe lutelepai iuni.” Ŋes kemaikinere ekekiror Lebi."
Genesis29:35 Kopotuu bobo, kouru ikoku yenitelepat; kotema atiar, “Irwan na eturi EJAKAIT.” Ŋes kemaikinere ekekiror Yuda; kinye kwaŋin aur."
Genesis30:1 Keanyu Rakel ebe mam eurikinit Yakob idwe, kirum Rakel ekokote kanuka inaeike; kolimok Yakob atiar, “Koinakinai idwe, arai mam kiinakin atwani.”"
Genesis30:2 Kinep anyunyura naka Yakob, kotema Rakel atiar, “Ajai eoŋ aibois naka Edeke, loimikit akonikoik aur?”"
Genesis30:3 Kotema atiar, “Koany abulesitika Bilika, koloma neejai; tetere idoikini akuninika, kadum eoŋ da idwe kamake.”"
Genesis30:4 Koinak Bilika abulesitike araun akeberu; koloma Yakob neejai.
Genesis30:5 Kopotuu Bilika, kourik Yakob ikoku yenitelepat."
Genesis30:6 Kotema Rakel atiar, “Katuboki Edeke akirot, eira eporotoka, kainaki da eoŋ ikoku yenitelepat.” Ŋes kemaikinere ekekiror Dan."
Genesis30:7 Kopotuu bobo Bilika abulesit naka Rakel, kourik Yakob ikoku yenitelepat yenikiareit."
Genesis30:8 Kotema Rakel atiar, “Kiwuta kinacika, auta nakagogon, ido epiko.” Komaik ekekiror Naputali."
Genesis30:9 Keanyu Lea ebe enyeki kwaŋin aur, koyanau abulesitike Silupa koinak Yakob araun akeberu."
Genesis30:10 Kourik Silupa abulesit naka Lea Yakob ikoku yenitelepat.
Genesis30:11 Kotema Lea atiar, “Kekemer!” Komaik ekekiror Gad."
Genesis30:12 Kourik Silupa abulesit naka Lea Yakob ikoku yenitelepat yenikiareit,"
Genesis30:13 Kotema Lea atiar, “Alakara! Naarai kanyaraenenete apesur nalakara.” Komaik ekekiror Aser."
Genesis30:14 Kolot Reuben kapaarasia nuasakere akima, koany aiduduma kotoma omanikor, koinu totoke Lea. Kosodi Rakel kotema Lea atiar, “Kenainait, koinakinai aiduduma nuka okokukon.”"
Genesis30:15 Kolimok ŋes ebe, “Erai akirot naedit jo ademar eoŋ okilenika, ikoto da ademar eoŋ aiduduma nuka ikakoku?” Kotema Rakel atiar, “Ŋes eperio kajo akuare na kanuka aiduduma nuka okokukon.”"
Genesis30:16 Kobu Yakob kotoma omanikor eboŋ, koloma Lea aisiriam, kobala ebe, “Kibusakinit alomun mama ajai; naarai abeit kagwelit jo kaiduduina nuka ikakoku.” Kopero kaŋes kakuare kaŋin."
Genesis30:17 Kiira Edeke Lea, kopotuu, kourik Yakob ikoku yenikikanyet yenitelepat."
Genesis30:18 Kotema Lea atiar, “Kainaki Edeke eropitika, naarai abu kainak okilenika abulesitika.” Komaik ekekiror Isakar."
Genesis30:19 Kopotuu bobo Lea, kourik Yakob ikoku yenitelepar yenikikanyetekape."
Genesis30:20 Kiner Lea ebe, “Kainakinit Edeke ainakinet naejok naka adukokinika; natikwana iboienenei do okilenika keoŋ, naarai aurik ŋes idwe lutelepai ikanykape.” Komaik ekekiror Sebulun."
Genesis30:21 Kokau kouru ikoku yenipese, komaik ekekiror Dina."
Genesis30:22 Kiitu Edeke Rakel, kiira ŋes Edeke kopuko akoikike."
Genesis30:23 Kopotuu, kouru ikoku yenitelepat: kobala ebe, “Kalema Edeke amorositika.”"
Genesis30:24 Komaik ekekiror Yosep, kobala ebe, “Keyatak Edeke ikoku ice yenitelepat.”"
Genesis30:25 Kosodi kedau Rakel aurun Yosep, kotema Yakob Laban atiar, “Kotwarai eoŋ, kalot aiboisika, bukosi."
Genesis30:26 Koinakinai akanor ka ikadwe, luabu kejaanakinia jo, kalot; naarai iieni aijaanakin naabu kejaanak jo.”"
Genesis30:27 Kotema Laban ŋes atiar, “Arai ca adumunit asianut kakonyenekon, kopaik ber; naarai aomoom eoŋ ebe abu EJAKAIT kesireren kanukon.”"
Genesis30:28 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Kolimokinai ekoniropit, kainak.”"
Genesis30:29 Kotema atiar, “Tieni kwape kejaanakinia jo, kwape ajaatar da ikonibaren keoŋ,"
Genesis30:30 Naarai ekidioko luajaas kajo eroko eoŋ kebuno, kwana eyatakinos epuaros; abu EJAKAIT kisireren jo kama ameanari eoŋ kere: asa wori bo adumunia eoŋ da lukokaleka?”"
Genesis30:31 Kotema atiar, “Kainak inyo?” Kotema Yakob atiar, “Sirikiinak imodiobore; konye arai kiisubak na, ecokienenei bobo ekonisipan ka aidar da."
Genesis30:32 Etori eoŋ lolo osipanikon kere, kalemanari kanen numerieik kere ka nukomolik, ka nukirionok kere kotoma amerekekin, ka nukomolik, ka numerieik kotoma akinei: ŋun eraunos ekaropit."
Genesis30:33 Kwaŋin itejenun akadolit kanukan kokau, kibu ijo kanuka eropitika loejai kakonyenekon; ŋin kere yenimere yenimeri ka yenikomol yenikotoma akinei, ka lukirionok lukotoma omerekekin, arai kidum kamaka imari ŋin araun ikokwara.”"
Genesis30:34 Kotema Laban atiar, “Koany, akoto kwape ejaar akonikirot.”"
Genesis30:35 Kapaaran kaŋin kogelana ikorwa lupusieik ka lukomolik, ka akinei kere numerieik ka nukomolik; ŋinidiopet kere yenikapel, ka lukirionok lukotoma omerekekin, koinak kes akanin nuka ikedwe;"
Genesis30:36 Kitooto kes aleŋitoit naka apaarasia auni kidinike ka Yakob: kicokienenei Yakob luedeunos kosipanin luka Laban.
Genesis30:37 Kolem Yakob asiepen ka atopocono ka aparisia; kolinilin akito, tetere etakanuni akwaŋis naejai toma akito."
Genesis30:38 Kosipok akito nuabu koliŋilig akonyen nuka isipanin toma alelesia nuka ataparin neamasenenete isipanin; kiwacunete kesi kepotu aimat.
Genesis30:39 Kiwacanakis isipanin akonyen nuka akito, kouriata isipanin nul ipusieik, imerieik, ka ikomolik."
Genesis30:40 Kotiak Yakob komerekekin ludidik, kitesesen isipanin mama ejaas ipusieik, ka lukiriokok kere lukotoma osipan loka Laban; kogela isipaninike awai, mam abu kimorikik osipan leka Laban."
Genesis30:41 Kosodi naewacununiata nukatumak kosipan, kibwaik Yakob akito akonyen nuka esipan kotoma alelesia, tetere iwacunete kaneajaas akito;"
Genesis30:42 Konye arai esenyit esipan, mam ebwaanakini: kwaŋin luasenyito araas luka Laban, luatumito da araas luka Yakob."
Genesis30:43 Konyanyaar etuŋanan noi noi, kojaas kisipanin luepolok, ka abulesin ka ibulesin, ka akaalai ka asigiria."
Genesis31:1 Kopup ŋesi akiro nuka odwe luka Laban, ebalas ebe, “Kidema Yakob iboro kere luaraas luka papawok: ido kaŋul luaraas luka papawok kes adumunia abar ŋin kere.”"
Genesis31:2 Koany Yakob akonyen nuka Laban, ido koany, itegelikina kamaken,"
Genesis31:3 Kotema EJAKAIT Yakob atiar, “Koboŋo akwap naka lukapapaakon, mama ejaas iinacanakon, ajaenena eoŋ kajo.”"
Genesis31:4 Kiyakia Yakob konyarau Rakel ka Lea kopotu orony neejai esipan.
Genesis31:5 Kotema atiar, “Aany akonyen nuka papakus itegelikina kamaka; konye Edeke loka papaka ejaenena keoŋ."
Genesis31:6 Ido ijenete cut ebe abu kejaanak papakus kakagogon kere.
Genesis31:7 Ido papakus abu kenala, kilocenenei ekaropit irwan atomon; konye mam Edeke abu kocamak aiswamakin eoŋ aronis."
Genesis31:8 Naetemaria kwana ebe, ‘Numerieik, kes eraunos ekoniropit’; kouri esipan kere numerieik: ido naetemaria ebe, ‘Nupusieik kes eraunos ekoniropit’; kouri esipan kere nupusieik."
Genesis31:9 Kwaŋin abu Edeke kodema papakus ikebaren, kainak eoŋ."
Genesis31:10 Kosodi kapaarasia kanun, kiwacu esipan, keteluo akakonye, kaany kotoma airuja, ido koany, ikorwa luakwarete esipan araas lupusieik, ka lumerieik, ka luenirooko."
Genesis31:11 Emalaika da loka Edeke kalimok kotoma airuja ebe, ‘Yakob’; katema atiar, “Eoŋ lo.’"
Genesis31:12 Kotema atiar, ‘Kiteluo kwana akonikonye, koany ikorwa kere luekwarete esipan lupusieik ka lumerieik ka Iuetjirooko; naarai aany kere nukiswamanakini Laban,"
Genesis31:13 Arai Eoŋ Edeke loka Bet-el, nekolo ibukokinia akinyet opir, nekiyapoikinio eoŋ aiyaposit; aso do konyou, kolot kakwap kana, kobono akwap nakolo kiwurikinio.’’’"
Genesis31:14 Kobonokis ŋes Rakel ka Lea kotemasi atiar, “Eroko bobo isio kiia kakorakinet arai airumet kotogo loka papakosi?"
Genesis31:15 Mam kimarakinit ŋesi sio olonwao? Naarai abu kogwela sio, anyamar da cut ikosiboro."
Genesis31:16 Naarai abara kere naademaa Edeke papakosi ŋes nawok, ka naka idwcwok: asa do nuadau Edeke alimokin jo, kiswama.”"
Genesis31:17 Konyou Yakob, kisibwanenik ikedwe ka akenor kuju akaalai;"
Genesis31:18 Koyana ibaren kere, ka iboro kere luatukonokinit, ibaren luabu kodumunite, luatukokinit koPadan-Aram, alosit mama ejai Isaak papake akwap naka Kanaan."
Genesis31:19 Alosit Laban aitub ajul nuka amerekekinike; kokokwa Rakel aputosia nuka idekesio nuka papake.
Genesis31:20 Kidadaar Yakob komam Laban Esuriat Ejeŋi, naarai mam abu kolimok elosi."
Genesis31:21 Kwaŋin koker kiboro kere luajaatar; konyou, kikwaijar kocor, kobea oroŋat loka Gilead."
Genesis31:22 Aponi kolimokinai Laban kapaaran kanakiwuniet ebe asi Yakob.
Genesis31:23 Kouparos kikeinacan, kibwapak ŋes apaarasia akanykaarei; kodumak oroŋat loka Gilead."
Genesis31:24 Kobu Edeke mama ejai Laban Esuriat kotoma airuia kuare, kotema atiar, “Kocoite, sirikiner kaYakob nuejok karaida nuereko.”"
Genesis31:25 Kodolok Laban Yakob. Ebubukinit Yakob ekewema oroŋat; Laban da ka ikeinacan kibubukis oroŋat loka Gilead.
Genesis31:26 Kotema Laban Yakob atiar, “Ibu kiswama nyo, aisi komam eoŋ ajeni, kosodi ayaŋaar cut adweka kwape nuunatan kekileŋ?"
Genesis31:27 Kanukinyo kisia, aidadaar kamaka; komam kilimokinit, tikatwarit kaboliasia ka ikososio ka isiman ka adeudeu?"
Genesis31:28 Kwabo mam ibu kisunup eoŋ ainu ikadwe lusap ka lupesur? Iswama do nuka abaŋaanut,"
Genesis31:29 Ejai eoŋ apedor aiswamakin jo erono: konye Edeke loka papakon ŋes kinera keoŋ kuare ebe, ‘Kocoite, sirikiner kaYakob nuejok karaida nueroko.’"
Genesis31:30 Natikwana da karaida kikoto alosit, naarai kimuit ijo ere loka papakon itia bo inyo kikokwaria ikadekesio?”"
Genesis31:31 Koboŋok Yakob kotema Laban atiar, “Naarai abu-kakurianar, ebe elemuni jo kodema eoŋ adwekon kagogon."
Genesis31:32 Ŋin yenidumuni ijo ejaas kikonidekesio, mam ejari; kotiaka ijo yenikon yenejai keoŋ kakonyen nuka iwokoinacan, koyana.” Naarai mam Yakob kejeni ebe kekokounit Rakel kes."
Genesis31:33 Koloma Laban owema loka Yakob, owema da loka Lea, owema da loka abulesin aarei, konye mam abu kodum kes. Kolom kowema loka Lea, koloma owema loka Rakel."
Genesis31:34 Kwabo kelemarit Rakel aputosia nuka idekesio, kibwaik kes oboro luka akaalai, kiboikin kes, kinanyinany Laban ewema kere, konye mam edumuna kesi."
Genesis31:35 Kotema papake atiar, “Sirikinyunyurikin ejakaitika kanu mam apedoro anyoun kakonyenekon, naarai ebami eoŋ.” Komo, konye mam edumuna aputosia nuka idekesio."
Genesis31:36 Konyunyurikin Yakob, konolopata kaLaban: Koboŋok Yakob kotema Laban atiar, “Anibo akaronis? Akadiakaret anyoin, kibwapitor arukitor eoŋ?"
Genesis31:37 Naarai inanyinany ikaboro kere, inyo bo idum ijo koboro lukotogokon kere? Kibwaik ne akonyen nuka ikainacan, ka ikoniinacan, kotubokis oni luarei."
Genesis31:38 Ikar nul akaisaarei kiia kajo; amerekekinikon, ka akineikon mam eiecununete ikalei, imaseniko da luka esipan mam eoŋ elilanari."
Genesis31:39 Yenapoopooenenei ctian mam kainununei jo, eoŋ katwanianari nin, ibu kitepesenenei eoŋ arai kekokwar paaran, arai kekokwar kuare."
Genesis31:40 Kaiai kwaŋin; paaran kaarite akure noi, ka aterot kuare; kikolerito akakonye."
Genesis31:41 Ikar nul akaisaarei ajai togokon; abu kejaanak ikar itomon ka luoŋon kanuka adwekon, ikar ikanykape da kanuka esipanikon; ibu kilocenenei ekaropit irwan atomon."
Genesis31:42 Kedim Edeke loka papaka, Edeke loka Aburaam, ka Aiyoŋ naka Isaak ajaut keoŋ, timam kikurwok aiiukar eoŋ kwana titai. Abu Edeke koany akaiticanitoi, ka aitaaritoi naka akaninika, kiretak jo bian kuare.”"
Genesis31:43 Koboŋok Laban kotema Yakob atiar, “Apcsur eraas akapesur, idwe eraas ikadwe, isipanin da ikasipanin, kere luiseseni eraas luka; eswamakini nyo lolo akapcsur nu, arai ikecedwe luapotu kouriata?"
Genesis31:44 Aso do, ketutukot aitutuket, eoŋ ka jo, korai akajenan neaiai eoŋ ka jo.”"
Genesis31:45 Koyana Yakob amoru, kosipok araut epir."
Genesis31:46 Kotema Yakob ikeinacan atiar, “Kotukokisi amoru.” Koyaata amoru, kotukokisi atukot; konyamata kidunyasi katukot."
Genesis31:47 Komaik Laban nin Yegar-sakaduta; konye komaik Yakob Galeed.
Genesis31:48 Kotema Laban atiar, “Atukot na ŋes akaienan neajai eoŋ ka jo lolo.” Ŋes kemaikinere ekekiror Galeed."
Genesis31:49 Ka Misupa, naarai kotema atiar, “EJAKAIT kidara eoŋ ka jo, namam kianyununor bobo."
Genesis31:50 Arai kinaru ijo akapesur, arai kimany ijo acenor kinye apesuruka, emamei ecetuŋanan kaoni; koany, Edeke ŋes ekaienan neajai eoŋ ka jo.”"
Genesis31:51 Kotema Laban Yakob atiar, “Koany atukot na, ido koany epir, luasipok eoŋ kidinika ka joo."
Genesis31:52 Korau atukot na akajenan, ido epir korau ekajenan, ebe mam atubi eoŋ atukot na abunore mama ijai, ijo da mam itubi atukot na ka epir lo abunore mama ajai, kanuka aronis."
Genesis31:53 Edeke loka Aburaam, ido Edeke loka Nakor, Edeke loka papakec, kotub kokidiniwok.” Kiyapo Yakob kolimite Aiyoŋ naka papake Isaak."
Genesis31:54 Koinak Yakob asubanit koronat, konyarau ikeinacan ainyam atap; konyamata atap, kiboioto akuare kiya koronat."
Genesis31:55 Kodilok Laban ainu ikedwe lutelepai ka lupesur, kilipak arereŋ; konyou Laban, kobono aiboisike."
Genesis32:1 Abu Yakob kolot, kiriamunos kimalaikan luka Edeke."
Genesis32:2 Keany Yakob kes kobala ebe, “Na ŋes ajore naka Edeke.” Komaik aibois nin Makanaim."
Genesis32:3 Kijuka Yakob ikiyakia aiŋarenikin ŋes mama ejai Esau onaceke akwap naka Seir, ŋes emanikor loka Edom."
Genesis32:4 Kicorak kes, kobala ebe, “Kolimokis ejakaitika Esau kwanata ebe; ‘Ebala kwanata ebulesitikon Yakob ebe, Abu keboienenei ka Laban, kajaenenei nina aitodol kwana:"
Genesis32:5 Ido ajai kimoŋin ka isigirian, ka isipanin, ka ibulesin, ka abulesin da: ido eyakunit alimokin ekajakait, kadum asianut kakonyenekon.’’’"
Genesis32:6 Kobonut ikiyakia mama ejai Yakob kotemasi atiar, “Kipou kadoloto mama ejai onacekon Esau, ido ebunit ŋesi airiamun kajo; ka ituŋa akwat aoŋon eupas kaŋes.”"
Genesis32:7 Kwaŋin kokurianar Yakob noi, kiyalonon; kotiak ituŋa luajaas kaŋes, ka isipanin, ka aituk, ka akaalai araun atukon aarei."
Genesis32:8 Kobala ebe, “Arai kedolok Esau atukot adiopet kitiji, ekui atukot naesali.”"
Genesis32:9 Kotema Yakob atiar, “Wu Edeke loka papaaka Aburaam, Edeke loka papaka Isaak, wu EJAKAIT, lokatemari ebe, ‘Kobono akwap nakobukus ido mama kiinacanakon, eoŋ da kasubanakini jo ejok’;"
Genesis32:10 Mam kebusakinit nepetai da aitimesia kere, ka nuka abeit da kere, nuibu kitodianak ekonibulesit; naarai abu katub Yorodan lo, kajai kebela bon; kwape kwana da aluor atukon aarei."
Genesis32:11 Kenainait, koyuunai kakan naka onaceka, kakan naka Esau; naarai akuriana ŋes, kinye abunore aitiji eoŋ, toto ka idwe da."
Genesis32:12 Ka jo da ibu kobala ebe, ‘Abeit kasubanakini jo ejok; ido etuluori akoniwur kwape kasine naka aŋolol namam imarun.’’’"
Genesis32:13 Koper nen akuare nin, kolem kotoma kanul luajaas kaŋes araun ainakinet mama ejai Esau onaceke;"
Genesis32:14 Akinei akwat aarei, ka ikorwa akaisaarei, amerekekin akwat aarei ka imerekekin akaisaarei;"
Genesis32:15 Akaalai nuicirio akaisauni ka idwekec, aituk akaisaoŋon, ka lumaseniko itomon, asigiria akaisaarei ka idwekec itomon."
Genesis32:16 Kititiŋ akanin nuka ibulesinike, nolisipan owaike bon; kotema ibulesinike atiar, “Kinarenikinai kotuboros, kojai apak kidin kesipan ka esipan.”"
Genesis32:17 Kicorak Ioenarenikinit kobala ebe, “Nairiamunotor ijo konaceka Esau, kiiŋit jo ebe, ‘Lokanai bo ijo? Ilosi bo ai? Lukanai da nul luejaas kakonyenekon?’"
Genesis32:18 Kolimok ŋes ebc, ‘Luka ebulesitikon Yakob; ŋes ainakinet naeinunitai ejakaitika Esau: ido koany, ejai ŋesi da kaukosi.’”"
Genesis32:19 Kicorak lokiareit, ka lokiwuniet da, ka nul kerc luameetos isipanin, kobala ebe, “Ilimokinete Esau kwaŋin kianyutu ŋes."
Genesis32:20 Ido kineras ebe, ‘Koany ebulesitikon Yakob ejai kaukosi.’” Naarai abala ebe, “Esinapikini ŋes kainakinet naegei, kasodi konyet kaany akekonycn; diat kacamuni kanuka ŋun.”"
Genesis32:21 Kwaŋin kotubor ainakinet kinarenike: ŋes da elopet koper akuare ŋin nepepe kipaupake.
Genesis32:22 Konyou akuare nin, koya akenor aarei, ka akebulesin aarei, ka ikedwe itomon ka lodiopet, kotubor kodoket loka Yabok."
Genesis32:23 Koya kes, kitutub ecor, kitutub kere luaiaatar."
Genesis32:24 Kosalak Yakob bon; koutata etuŋanan kaŋes aitodol neacilar kide.
Genesis32:25 Keany ebe mam epedori aibirokin, kotiro etul; kinunyakin etul loka Yakob eutas kaŋes."
Genesis32:26 Kotema atiar, “Koosikinai, naarai acila kide.” Kotema atiar, “Mam kaosikin, dimikiinak arereŋ.”"
Genesis32:27 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Ekonikiror iŋai?” Kobala ebe, “Eoŋ Yakob.”"
Genesis32:28 Kotema atiar, “Ekonikiror mam bobo enyaritai Yakob, dimarai Isirael: naarai ipegata nepepe ka Edeke ka ituŋa, ido iteleka.”"
Genesis32:29 Kinit Yakob ŋes kobala ebe, “Kenainait kolimokinai ekonikiror.” Kobala ebe, “Inyo inisitor ekakiror?” Kisireren ŋes kanen."
Genesis32:30 Komaik Yakob aibois nin ekekiror Penuel; kobala ebe, “Naarai aany Edeke kasesenas, akaijar da ajar.”"
Genesis32:31 Kolomak ŋes akoloŋ ketub Penuel, kicodokin amurwo."
Genesis32:32 Ŋes mam idwe luka Isirael enyamiata akiriŋ nakotul aitodol lolo, naarai abu kotiro etul loka Yakob, toma akiriŋ nakotul."
Genesis33:1 Kiteluo Yakob akekonye konolia, ido koany, ebunit Esau, ka ikiliok akwat aoŋon eupas kaŋes, Kokoranak idwe neejai Lea ka Rakel ka abulesin nuarei."
Genesis33:2 Kisinaren abulesin ka ikecedwe, kitutupik Lea ka ikedwe, kinyck Rakel ka Yosep kokau."
Genesis33:3 Kotubor ŋesi da elopet kiŋarenikec, Kokukokin kwap irwan akanykaarei, aitodol naekunyakinia die mama ejai onaceke."
Genesis33:4 Koker Esau airiamun kaŋes, kotun ŋes, kibirokin omurisiŋike konu: komonyata akiyo."
Genesis33:5 Kiteluo akekonye, koany aŋor ka idwe; kobala ebe, “Lukaŋai lu lueiaas kajo?” Koboŋok ebe, “Lu kes idwe luabu Edeke koinak ekonibulesit kanuka asianut.”"
Genesis33:6 Kosodete kikunyut abulesin, kes nepepe kikecedwe, kokukokinos."
Genesis33:7 Kikuny Lea da ka ikedwe, kokukokinos: kokau kikuny Yosep ka Rakel, kokukekinos."
Genesis33:8 Kobala ebe, “Ekodet ŋol kere lokiriamun keoŋ apolouke inyo?” Koboŋok ebe, “Adumunia asianut kakonyen nuka ejakaitika.”"
Genesis33:9 Kobala Esau ebe, “Onac, luejaas keoŋ kadaunito; luejaas kajo koraunos lukon.”"
Genesis33:10 Kobala Yakob ebe, “Mam, kenainait, arai kwana adumunit asianut kakonyenckon, kocam akainakinet naka akaninika; naarai aany akonyenekon, kwape eanyunia ctunanan akonyen nuka Edeke, ijo da kisiyalamik eoŋ."
Genesis33:11 Kenainait, kocam akainakinet nakiinun; naarai keswamak Edeke nukasianut, ido naarai Iukijaa keoŋ kadaunito.” Kisidik, kocam."
Genesis33:12 Kobala ebe, “Kageut erot, kaloto, eoŋ da kenarenikini jo.”"
Genesis33:13 Kotema atiar, “Ekajakait, ijeni ebe emameete idwe agogoŋ, ido kwape kamerekekin ka aituk nukiiaa keoŋ itanakete: ido arai kemeata noi apaarit adiopet, etwakete isipanin kere."
Genesis33:14 Kenainait, kiŋarenik ejakaitika ekebulesit, eoŋ da alosi motimot, kwape kalosit naka ibaren luejaas kakonyeneka, ido kwape ejaar alosit naka idwe, aitodol neadolunio eoŋ Seir mama ejai ejakaitika.”"
Genesis33:15 Kobala Esau ebe, “Aso do kenyekinia ice kotuna lukijaa keoŋ.” Kobala ebe, “Mam akiro; kadum asianut kakonyen nuka ejakaitika.”"
Genesis33:16 Kosodi Esau aboŋor kapaarit kaŋin kobea Seir.
Genesis33:17 Kolot Yakob Sukot, koduk eketogo, kobwaik ibarenike aujoi: ŋes keraunor ekiror loka aibois Sukot."
Genesis33:18 Kodol Yakob kainapakina ore loka Sekem, loejai akwap naka Kanaan, kenyou koPadan-Aram; kidukur kinaren naka ere."
Genesis33:19 Kogwel alup nuabu kibubuk ekewema, katutubeta akwatat nuka epuesa kakanin nuka idwe luka Kamor, papa loka Sekem."
Genesis33:20 Kodukok nina etem, komaik ekekiror El-eloke-Isirael."
Genesis34:1 Koloma Dina apese naaurikin Lea Yakob, aanyun apesur nuka akwap."
Genesis34:2 Koanyu Sekem ŋes, okoku loka Kamor Ekibit, ejakait loka akwap; kikam ŋes, koperoto kaŋes, kitisil."
Genesis34:3 Kiketakin eketau mama ejai Dina akoku naka Yakob, komina apese, kinera kapese kasianut."
Genesis34:4 Kinera Sekem kapapake Kamor atiar, “Komanyakinai apese nin.”"
Genesis34:5 Kiira Yakob ebe abu ŋesi komunau Dina akokuke; kojaas odweke kikebaren orony; kililin Yakob aitodol nakebonunioto.
Genesis34:6 Koloma Kamor, papake loka Sekem neejai Yakob ainerun kaŋes,"
Genesis34:7 Kiirasi odwe luka Yakob ŋun kobonut korony; kokadakis ikesa, konyunyurikinos noi, naarai abu ŋesi kiswama nuka abaŋaanut koIsirael apero kakoku naka Yakob; akirot nin namam ibusakinit aswam."
Genesis34:8 Kineru Kamor kakes ebe, “Etau loka okokuka Sekem ipuda akonipese: kenainait koinak ŋes komany."
Genesis34:9 Ido kamanyanakinos yes kasio; koinanakis sio da akusipesur, yes da komanyete nukosi."
Genesis34:10 Kiboienenete kasio; ejai akwap akonyenekus; kiboienenete, kogwelanarete kotoma, kodumut iborokus.”"
Genesis34:11 Abu Sekem kotema papa loka apese ka ikeinacan atiar, “Kadum asianut kakonyenekus, lukibilakinete, kes kainakinete,"
Genesis34:12 Etiai kere loka iboro luka emanyit lukitemarete kainakinete kwape ikototor: konye koinakinai apese kamany.”
Genesis34:13 Kobonokis odwe luka Yakob Sekem ka Kamor papake kainal, naarai abu komunau Dina kinacikec."
Genesis34:14 Kotemasi atiar, “Mam sio kipedori akirot na, akorakin kinacikosi nol lomam ekepep: naarai ŋes akirot naka ileic kamakosi."
Genesis34:15 Kopone kala bon, kicamu isio yes: koraut kwape kasio, ebe nolikiliokit kayesi akepeneneo;"
Genesis34:16 Kasodete akorakin yes akosipesur, ka sio da kamanycnenete nukus, ido keboienenete kayes, karautu ateker adiopet."
Genesis34:17 Konye arai mam icamunito akepio; kiyanaari akosipese, kaloto.”"
Genesis34:18 Kisiyalamikis akecekiro Kamor, ka Sekem okoku loka Kamor."
Genesis34:19 Mam abu ekatumunan kiyap aswam akirot, naarai aminarit apese naka Yakob. Kitopolooritete aitelekarit kere kotogo leka papake."
Genesis34:20 Kopotu Kamor ka Sekem okokuke orute loka ekecere, kinerut kituna luka erekec atiar."
Genesis34:21 “Inapakina ituŋa ŋul, aso kacamakisi kes aiboienen kakwap ka agwelanar; naarai koany, elalakinit kes akwap; kamanyenenete akecepesur, ka oni da kakoranakinete kes nuwok."
Genesis34:22 Kopone kalo bon ŋes iyuuniata ituŋa nul aiboienen kaoni, araun adiopeteker, arai ekepio nolikiliokit kaoni, kwape ekepere kes."
Genesis34:23 Mam ti ikecebaren, ka ikeceboro, ka ikecetian kere keraunos luwok? Konye kacamutu kes, tetere ibojenenete kaoni.”"
Genesis34:24 Apotu kere lukelomarete korute loka erekec kiirasi Kamor ka Sekem okokuke; kokepai ŋolikiliokit kere lokelomanari korute loka erekec.
Genesis34:25 Kosodi kapaaran kanakiwunict, eriebas kesi, idwe iarei lutelepai luka Yakob, Simeon ka Lebi, iinacan luka Dina, kitin nolitunanan ekekileŋ, kosurokis ere kaiyeiyea, koarata ikiliok kere."
Genesis34:26 Koarata Kamor ka Sekem kakwanis naka ekileŋ, kitolomut Dina kotogo loka Sekem, koloto."
Genesis34:27 Kopotu odwe luka Yakob mama ejaas luearar, konata ere, naarai apotu komunaut kinacikec."
Genesis34:28 Koyanaasi ikecesipanin ka ikecebaren ka asigiriakec, ka luajaas ore, ka luajaas omanikor;"
Genesis34:29 Konatasi abarakec kere, ka idwekec ludidik, ka aijorokec, kere luajaas togo."
Genesis34:30 Kotema Yakob Simeon ka Lebi atiar, “Kisiyalononoto eoŋ, aituwur eoŋ kotoma kaluiboienenete kakwap, kotoma oKanaanin, ka oPerisin: ido eoŋ, naarai ikidioko ikaruna, etukonokinos rwaru aitusurup eoŋ, ka aitoji eoŋ, kamudiario, eoŋ ka ekakal.”"
Genesis34:31 Kotemasi atiar, “Kejokuna kereka ŋes aikonakin kinacikos bala nadote?”"
Genesis35:1 Kotema Edeke Yakob atiar, “Konyou, kolot Bet-el, kiboikin ŋina: kodukok ŋina etem loka Edeke, loabu kitaanyikin jo naikeria kakonyen nuka onacekon Esau.”"
Genesis35:2 Kosodi kotema Yakob lukokaleke, ka nul kere lukeiaas kaŋes atiar, “Kolemasi idekesio lukacekwapin luijaatatar, kitalaunos, kiloco ikusinapen;"
Genesis35:3 Kanyoutu, kaloto Bet-el; adukokini eoŋ da ŋina etem loka Edeke, loabu kabonok kapaaran naka icanika, loajaenena keoŋ korot loetorenenei.”"
Genesis35:4 Koinakis Yakob idekesio lukacekwapin kere lukejaas akaninikec, ka itetio lukeiaas akikec; kibwa Yakob kes kokwap kelua lokeapie koSekem."
Genesis35:5 Kolototo: kojai akurian naepol oreria luerimoritos kes, mam apotu kibwapakis idwe luka Yakob."
Genesis35:6 Kwaŋin kodolo Yakob Lus, naejai akwap naka Kanaan (nin ŋes Bet-el), ŋes ka ituŋa kere lukejaatar."
Genesis35:7 Kodukok nen etem, komaik aibois El-bet-el: naarai nen etakanikinor Edeke, naakeria kakonyen nuka onaceke."
Genesis35:8 Kotwana Debora akasaan naka Rebeka, kidaikinai kwap naka Bet-el kwap kelua: komaikinai ekiror Alon-bakut."
Genesis35:9 Kitaanyikin bobo Edeke Yakob, nakebunio koPadan-Aram, kisireren ŋes,"
Genesis35:10 Kotema Edeke ŋes atiar, “Ekonikiror Yakob: mam bobo kinyaritai Yakob, konye do Isirael ŋes ekonikiror.” Komaik ekekiror Isiracl,"
Genesis35:11 Kotema Edeke ŋes atiar, “Eoŋ Edeke Lokapedor kere: kouriar kiyatakin; ateker ka atukot naka atekerin epote kamakon, elomunete da ikabakan kakuanakon."
Genesis35:12 Ido akwap naabu kainak Aburaam ka Isaak, kainakini jo, ka akoniwur naetupanakini ainakini akwap ŋin.”"
Genesis35:13 Konyou Edeke kama ejai kaibois kanaeneratatar kaŋes kolot.
Genesis35:14 Kosipok Yakob epir kaibois kanaeneratatar kaŋes, epir loka amoru: kobukok ainakinet namatat, kobukok da akinyet,"
Genesis35:15 ‘Komaik Yakob aibois naeneratatar Edeke kaŋes ekiror Bet-el.
Genesis35:16 Kobwota koBet-el; eroko ideuna apak edit adolore Epurat: korieb Rakel aidoun naa ti ono noi.
Genesis35:17 Kosodi erieba ŋesi kanuationor aidoun, kotema akesidon ŋes atiar, “Sirildkurianar; naarai idumuni nat icekoku yenitelepat.”"
Genesis35:18 Kosodi kanen, keapu akeijar adaun (naarai abu kotwana), komaik ikoku ekekiror Ben-oni; konye papake komaik ŋes Benyamin."
Genesis35:19 Kotwana Rakel, konukai korot loalosi Epurat (ŋes Bet-lekem),"
Genesis35:20 Kitemok Yakob epir kuju kaketes: ŋes Epir loka ates naka Rakel aitodollolo.
Genesis35:21 Kobwot Isirael, kibubuk ewemake juwai loka etogo loeoja noi loka Eder."
Genesis35:22 Kosodi nakiboio Isirael kakwap kaŋin, kolot Reuben kopero ka Bilika aberu naka papake; kiira Isirael ŋun, Emwaasi odwe luka Yakob itomon ka luarei:"
Genesis35:23 Odwe luka Lea; Reuben, ekiyai loka Yakob, ka Simeon, ka Lebi, ka Yuda, ka Isakar, ka Sebulun;"
Genesis35:24 Odwe luka Rakel; Yosep ka Benyamin.
Genesis35:25 Odwe luka Bilika, abulesit naka Rakel; Dan ka Naputali:"
Genesis35:26 Odwe luka Silupa, abulesit naka Lea: Gad ka Aser: nul kes odwe luka Yakob, lukeurio koPadan-Aram."
Genesis35:27 Kodol Yakob mama ejai Isaak papake Mamure, Kiriat-araba (ŋes Keburon), nekiboieneneoto Aburaam ka Isaak."
Genesis35:28 Kobut Isaak ikar akwatat ka akaisakanykauni.
Genesis35:29 Kojal Isaak aijar, kotwana, koyanaarai mama ejaas iketuŋa, komojon kodaunite ikar luipu: kidaata ŋes odweke Esau ka Yakob."
Genesis36:1 Na ŋes aur naka Esau (ŋes Edom).
Genesis36:2 Komany Esau akenor kotoma apesur nuka Kanaan; Ada akoku naka Elon Ekitit, ka Okolibama akoku naka Ana, akoku naka Sibeon Ekibit."
Genesis36:3 Ka Basemat akoku naka Isimael, kinac naka Nebaiot."
Genesis36:4 Ada da kourik Esau Elipas; ka Basemat kourik Reuel;
Genesis36:5 Okolibama kouri Yeus, ka Yalem, ka Kora: nul kes odwe luka Esau lukeurikinio ŋes kakwap naka Kanaan."
Genesis36:6 Koya Esau akenor, ka ikedwe lusap ka lupesur, ka ituŋa kere lukotogoke, ka ikebaren, ka iketiaŋ kere, ka ikeboro kere, luabu kotukokinite kakwap naka Kanaan; kolot acekwap anyoun kaneajai onaceke Yakob."
Genesis36:7 Naarai epu ikeceboro mam apotu kopedosi aiboi nepepe; akwap da nakiboiororotor abu kodidiijiar kanuka ikecebaren.
Genesis36:8 Kiboienenei Esau komoru Seir: Esau ŋes Edom.
Genesis36:9 Na ŋes aur naka Esau papakec loka Iyedomin komoru Seir.
Genesis36:10 Lu kes ikiroria luka odwe luka Esau; Elipas okoku loka Ada aberu naka Esau, ka Reuel okoku loka Basemat aberu naka Esau."
Genesis36:11 Odwe luka Elipas kes Teman, ka Omar, ka Sepo, ka Gatam, ka Kenas."
Genesis36:12 Timuna ŋes aberu naka Elipas okoku loka Esau; kourik Elipas Amalek; nul kes odwe luka Ada aberu naka Esau.
Genesis36:13 Lu kes odwe luka Reuel, Nakat, ka Sera, ka Sama, ka Misa: nul kes odwe luka Basemat aberu naka Esau."
Genesis36:14 Lu kes odwc luka Okolibama akoku naka Ana, akoku naka Sibeon, aberu naka Esau; kourik nin Esau Yeus, ka Yalam, ka Kora."
Genesis36:15 Lu kes ijaka luka odwe luka Esau: odwe luka Elipasekiyai loka Esau; ejakait Teman, ejakait Omar, ejakait Sepo, ejakait Kenas."
Genesis36:16 Ejakait Kora, ejakait Gatam, ejakait Amalek: ŋul kes ijaka lualomunete kama ka Elipas kakwap naka Edom: ŋul kes odwe luka Ada."
Genesis36:17 Lu kes odwe luka Reuel okoku loka Esau; ejakait Nakat, ejakait Sera, ejakait Sama, ejakait Misa; ŋul kes ijaka lualomunete kama ka Reuel kakwap naka Edom; nul kes odwe luka Basemat aberu naka Esau."
Genesis36:18 Lu kes odwe luka Okolibama aberu naka Esau; ejakait Yeus, ejakait Yalam, ejakait Kora: ŋol kes ijaka lualomunete kama ka Okolibama akoku naka Ana, aberu naka Esau."
Genesis36:19 Ŋul kes odwe luka Esau, nul da kes ijakakec: ŋol ŋes Edom."
Genesis36:20 Lu kes odwe luka Seir Ekorit, lueboienenete kakwap; Lotan ka Sobal ka Sibeon ka Ana,"
Genesis36:21 Ka Dison ka Eser ka Disan, nul kes ijaka lualomunete kama ka Ikorin, idwe luka Seir kakwap naka Edom."
Genesis36:22 Idwe luka Lotan kes Kori, ka Kemam; kinac naka Lotan ŋes Timuna."
Genesis36:23 Lu kes idwe luka Sobal; Aliban, ka Manakat ka Ebal, ka Sepo ka Onamo"
Genesis36:24 Lu kes idwe luka Sibeon; Aia ka Ana: ŋol ijes Ana loadumuni atanin nuibulubulete akipi nuemwaka komodin, icokie isigirian luka Sibeon papake."
Genesis36:25 Lu kes idwe luka Ana; Dison ka Okolibama akoku naka Ana.
Genesis36:26 Lu kes idwe luka Dison; Kemudan ka Esaban ka Itiran ka Ceran.
Genesis36:27 Lu kes idwe luka Eser; Bilukan ka Saaban ka Akan.
Genesis36:28 Lu kes idwe luka Disan; Us ka Aran,"
Genesis36:29 Lu kes iiaka luelomunete kama ka Ikorin; ejakait Lotan, ejakait Sobal, ejakait Sibeon, ejakait Ana,"
Genesis36:30 Ejakait Dison, ejakait Eser, ejakait Disan: nul kes ijaka lualomunete kama ka Ikorin, kwape ejaatar ikeceiake kakwap naka Seir."
Genesis36:31 Lu kes ikabakan luerumito akwap naka Edom, eroko ekabaka kere kiruma idwe luka Isirael."
Genesis36:32 Bela okoku loka Beor kirum Edom; ekiror loka ereke ŋes Dinakaba.
Genesis36:33 Kotwana Bela, kirum Yobab okoku loka Sera loka Bosura aiboisike."
Genesis36:34 Kotwana Yobab, kirum Kusam loka akwap naka Itemanin aiboisike."
Genesis36:35 Kotwana Kusam, kirum Kadad okoku loka Bedad aiboisike; lokitojie Midian komanikor loka Moab: ekiror loka ereke ŋes Abit."
Genesis36:36 Kotwana Kadad, kirum Samula loka Masereka aiboisike."
Genesis36:37 Kotwana Samula, kirum Saul loka Rekobot loedunyas ka Ecor aiboisike."
Genesis36:38 Kotwana Saul, kirum Baal-Kanan okoku loka Acabor aiboisike."
Genesis36:39 Kotwana Baal-Kanan okoku loka Acabor, kirum Kadar aiboisike: ekiror loka ereke ŋes Pau; ekiror loka aberuke ŋes Mcketabel, akoku naka Matured akoku naka Me-sakab."
Genesis36:40 Lu kes ikiroria luka ijaka lualomunete kama ka Esau; kwape ejaatar ajenakec, kwape cjaatar akeceiboisio, kwape kikiroriakec: ejakait Timuna, ejakait Aluba, ejakait Yetet;"
Genesis36:41 Ejakait Okolibama, ejakait Ela, ejakait Pinon;"
Genesis36:42 Ejakait Kenas, ejakait Teman, ejakait Mibisar;"
Genesis36:43 Ejakait Magudiel, ejakait Iram: nul kes ijaka luka Edom; kwape ejaatar akeceiboisio kakwap naka airumetekec. Ŋol ŋes Esau papakec loka Iyedomin,"
Genesis37:1 Kiboiei Yakob kakwap nakolo kiboionono papake, akwap naka Kanaan."
Genesis37:2 Na ŋes aur naka Yakob. Nakeraar Yosep loka ikar itomon ka lukanykaarei, ecokicncnei esipan nepepe kikeinacan; kojaenena etelepat nepepe kodwe luka Bilika, ka odwe luka Silupa, aŋor nuka papake; kideideonokini Yosep papakec akirokec nueroko."
Genesis37:3 Ido amina Isirael Yosep aitelekarit idweke kere, naarai ŋes loaurie kamoionuke; kodonyok ekooti loka acerieik nuipu."
Genesis37:4 Koanyut ikeinacan ebe amina papakec ŋes aitelekarit ikeinacan kere; apotu kolaata, komam bobo ineras kaŋes ejok, dimarai nupeken Uŋet bon."
Genesis37:5 Abu Yosep kiruja airujasit, kolimok ikeinacan: kiyatakis bobo aila ŋes,"
Genesis37:6 Kobala kes ebe, “Keŋaiŋaitos, kopupokisi airujasit na naabu keruja:"
Genesis37:7 Naarai, koany, bala kieni oni ikes komana, ido koany, konyou ekesitika, kosipokin; ido koany, kopotu ikesikus kirimosi, kokukonokinos ekakesit.”"
Genesis37:8 Kobalas ikeinacan ŋes ebe, “Ipedori kereka ijo airum sio? arai ipedori teni ijo ayait sio? “Kiyatakis bobo aila ŋes kanuka airujasiake ka akekiro da."
Genesis37:9 Kiruia bobo aceirujasit, kolimok ikeinacan kobala ebe, “Koany, eruja aceirujasit; ido koany, bala akoloŋ ka elap ka aacer atomon kanadiop kakukonokinos eoŋ.”"
Genesis37:10 Kolimok ŋesi papake ka ikeinacan; kitoron papake ŋes, kobala ebe, “Nanyoin bo airujasit na nairujat ijo? Eoŋ ka totokon ka ikoniinacan kiponi aisudedeonokin jo?”"
Genesis37:11 Kirum ikeinacan ekokote kanuken; konye koric papake akirot nin kotauke.
Genesis37:12 Koloto ikeinacan acok esipan loka papakec Sekem.
Genesis37:13 Kobala Isirael Yosep ebe, “Mere icokiete ikoniinacan esipan Sekem? Bia keyakia mama ejaas.” Kobala ŋesi ebe, “Eoŋ lo.”"
Genesis37:14 Kobala ŋesi ebe, “Aso kolot, koany ikoniinacan, arai ejaas ejok, ka esipan da arai ejai ejok; kinyak akiro.” Kwaŋin kiyakia ŋes anyoun kaditot naka Keburon, kodol Sekem."
Genesis37:15 Kodum etuŋanan ŋes, ido koany, etubitoi kokitwi; kinit etuŋanan ŋol ŋes ebe, “lmoot bo inyo?”"
Genesis37:16 Kotema atiar, “Amoot ikainacan; kolimokinai, kenainait, neicokiorito esipan.”"
Genesis37:17 Kolimok etuŋanan ŋes ebe, “Anyout kesi kane; naarai abu kapup ebalas ebe, ‘Kaloto Dotan.’’’ Kibwapa Yosep ikeinacan, kodumak kes Dotan."
Genesis37:18 Kiteluosi ŋes eroko elwana, ido eroko keekuna die kinerut aiar ŋes,"
Genesis37:19 Kotemanaros atiar, “Koany, abu ca etikerujat je."
Genesis37:20 Aso do kopotu kaarata, kacakakisi toma adiopet kapanya, kitemari oni da ebe, ‘Etiaŋ lokadedenan ŋes kenyami’; kasodete kaanyutu kwape ejauniata rwaru airuiasiake.’"
Genesis37:21 Kopup Reuben akirot nin kitajar kakanikec; kobala cbe, “Kenyekisi aiar.”"
Genesis37:22 Kotcma Reuben kes atiar, “Sirikibukosi aokot; kocakakisi aipany na naejai modin, konye sirikidokokis akan,” tetere itaiari ŋes kakanikec, ainyakakin papake."
Genesis37:23 Kosodi kanen, kedolu Yosep mama ejaas ikeinacan, kolacut ekootike loka acerieik nuipu loanapit;"
Genesis37:24 Koyaŋaasi ŋes, kocakakis aipany: aonit da aipany komameete akip."
Genesis37:25 Kiboikinos ainyam atap; kiteluosi akecekonye, kosesenata, ido koany, idiai erioŋet loka Isimaelin loabuni koGilead, ka akaalaikec nuebwokitos luesaetc ka emina ka akinyet, idiaete ayaŋaar Misiri."
Genesis37:26 Kotema Yuda ikeinacan ebe, “Ajokis anyoin nakidumuni oni aiar onacewok ka aimunonoor akeokot?"
Genesis37:27 Aso, ketwegelata Isimaelin, kwabo kenyekisi aidokokin awokokan mamakeŋ; naarai ŋes onacewok, ŋes awokokuan.” Kopuput ikeinacan ŋes,"
Genesis37:28 Kitorut nen Imidianin, ikagwelanarak; kibwosut ikeinacan Yosep alemun kaipany, kitwegelata Isimaelin atutubeta akaisaarei nuka epuesa. Koyanaasi Yosep Misiri."
Genesis37:29 Koboŋ Reuben aipany; ido ko any, komamei Yosep kaipany; kocil ikenapen."
Genesis37:30 Kobono mama ejaas ikeinacan kobala ebe, “Emamei ikoku; okwe, abei eoŋ ai?”"
Genesis37:31 Kolemut ekooti loka Yosep, koarata ekoroi lomasenik, kidomakis ekooti aokot;"
Genesis37:32 Koyanaasi ekooti loka acerieik nuipu, koinut papakec; kobalas ebe, “Kipou kadumutu lo: asa kojen arai ŋes eko oti loka ikokukon arai mere ŋes.”"
Genesis37:33 Kojen, kobala ebe, “Ŋes ekooti loka ikakoku; kenyam ŋes etiaŋ loerono: komamei abuonokin keponi Yosep kopoopoai.”"
Genesis37:34 Kocil Yakob ikenapen, kenap epuko kanabet, kokuudian ikekoku apaarasia nuipu."
Genesis37:35 Konyout ikedwe kere lusap ka lupesur aitalakar ŋes; konye kogir aitalakario; kobala ebe, “Alomari okatwak mama ejai ikakoku aroko amonyi.” Komony papake akiyo kanuken."
Genesis37:36 Kitwegelata ŋes Imidianin Potipar koMisiri, ŋes ejakait loka Parao, ekapolon loka iserikalen."
Genesis38:1 Kosodi kapaarasia kanun, konyou Yuda kama ejaas ikeinacan, koloma mama ejai Edulamit, ekekiror Kira."
Genesis38:2 Koany Yuda kanen apese naka Ekanaanit ekekiror Sua; koyana ŋes, koloma mama ejai,"
Genesis38:3 Kopotuu, kidou ikoku yenitelepat; komaik ekekiror Er."
Genesis38:4 Kopotuu bobo, kidou ikoku yenitelepat; komaik ekekiror Onan."
Genesis38:5 Kidou bobo da ikoku yenitelepat, komaik ekekiror Sela; ajai Cesib, nakidounio ŋes,"
Genesis38:6 Komanyak Yuda Er ekekiyai aberu, ekekiror Tamar."
Genesis38:7 Arono Er, ekiyai loka Yuda, kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT; koar EJAKAIT ŋes."
Genesis38:8 Kotema Yuda Onan atiar, “Koloma mama ejai aberu naka onacekon, kikonak ŋes kwape kibusakinitor onace loka lokatwan, kodumak onacekon aur.”"
Genesis38:9 Kojen Onan ebe mam aur emaikinio nake; kosodi nakelomaria mama ejai aberu naka onaceke, kobukonori kwap, kinyek ainakin onaceke aur."
Genesis38:10 Akirot ŋin nakiswamai arono kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: koar ŋes da.
Genesis38:11 Kosodi kotema Yuda Tamar aberu naka okokuke atiar, “Kosal irai apuserut kotogo loka papakon, aitodol neepolooror Sela okokuka”; naarai kotema atiar, “Kinye ŋes da atwanare, kwape kikeinacan.” Kolot Tamar kiboienenei kotogo loka papake."
Genesis38:12 Kotuboros apaarasia kotwana aberu naka Yuda akoku naka Sua; kosub Yuda asuban, kosodi kolot mama ejaas ikekatubok ajulo nuka amerekekin koTimuna, ŋes ka ekepapero Kira Edulamit."
Genesis38:13 Kolimokinai Tamar atiar, “Koany, papaakon elosi Timuna aitub ajulo nuka amerekekin.”"
Genesis38:14 Kolaca inapen luka eipuseruneke, kimuko ekereet, kimukor kegoe kiboikin orute loka Enaim, loejai orot loelosi Timuna; naarai abu koany ebe apoloor Sela, komam einakina airumakin kaŋes."
Genesis38:15 Keanyu Yuda ŋes, koomite ebe nadote; naarai kimukorit akekonyen."
Genesis38:16 Kopaa korot neejai, kotema atiar, “Ikatuan, kenainait, kiyu kaloma mama ijai.” Naarai mam ajeni ebe ŋes aberu naka okokuke, Kotema atiar, “Kiinakini con inyo, arai kilom mama ajai?”"
Genesis38:17 Kotema atiar, “Kejukakini ikalol yenika akinei kosipan.” Kotema atiar, “Kititini eoŋ inyo aitodol neijukunia?”"
Genesis38:18 Kotema atiar, “Aititiŋet anyoin kainakini?” Kotema atiar, “Egilutukon ka aunokon, ka ebela loejai akanikon.” Koinak ŋes, koloma mama ejai, kopotik ŋes,"
Genesis38:19 Konyou kolot, kolaca ekegoe lokimukos, konap inapen luka eipuserune."
Genesis38:20 Kijuka Yuda ikalol yenika akinei kakan naka epaperoke Edulamit, ainyakunia aititiŋet kakan naka aberu: konye mam abu kodum ŋes."
Genesis38:21 Kinit tuna luka aibois naka aberu atiar, “Anibo nadote nalem ejai Enaim ariri naka erot?” Kotemasi atiar, “Emamei lem nadote kane.”"
Genesis38:22 Kobono mama ejai Yuda, kotema atiar, “Mam abu kadum ŋes, ido ebalasi ituŋa luka aibois ebe, ‘Emamei lem nadote kane.’’’"
Genesis38:23 Kotema Yuda atiar, “Kenyeisi koyanaa, kinyein aisurum oni ileic; koany, ejuka ikalol yen, mam jo idumunit ŋes.”"
Genesis38:24 Kosodi ketuboros ilapio kwaka iuni, kolimokinai Yuda ebe, “Erai Tamar aberu naka okokukon naadote; ido koany, epotie akoik naka adoteu.” Kotema Yuda atiar, “Kitolomut ŋes, kicweai.”"
Genesis38:25 Nakitolomasi ŋes, kiyakik papaake atiar, “Ekiliokit elopet iboro lu, ŋes kapotikini.” Kotema atiar, “Kenainait, kojen lukanai lu, egilut, ka auno, ka ebela.”"
Genesis38:26 Kocam Yuda kes, kotema atiar, “Ketelekaa eoŋ karaut naedolit, naarai mam abu kainak ŋes Sela okokuka.” Mam bobo abu kojenu ŋes."
Genesis38:27 Kosodi, kedol apak naka aidoun, koany, kojaas imwatok kakoikike."
Genesis38:28 Kosodi keapu aidoun kitolom idiope akan; kitin akesidon koenik eusi lokareŋan akan, kinera atiar, “Yen ŋes esiau alomun.”"
Genesis38:29 Kosodi nakinyaka akan, koany, kolomu onaceke; kotema atiar, “Kanukinyo icilunori ijo kanukon?” ŋes kemaikinere ekekiror Peres."
Genesis38:30 Kokau kolom onaceke, loejai eusi lokarenan akanike; komaik ekekiror Sera."
Genesis39:1 Koyanaarai Yosep Misiri; kosodi Potipar, ejakait loka Parao, ekapolon loka iserikalen, Emisiriat, agwel ŋes kakanin nuka Isimaelin, lukeyaunete ŋes nen."
Genesis39:2 Kojai EJAKAIT ka Yosep, kokerianar, kiboie kotogo loka ekapolonike Emisiriat."
Genesis39:3 Koany ekapolonike kwape eiaar EJAKAIT kaŋes, ido kwape abu EJAKAIT kitekeriana ninibore kere yenikiswamai."
Genesis39:4 Kodum Yosep asianut kakonyeneke, kijaanak; kodakak ŋes araut ekaanyanaran kotogoke, kititin lukejaas kaŋes kere."
Genesis39:5 Kosodi ageun kapak naadakakinia araun ekaanyanaran kotogoke, ayait ninibore kere yenaiaatatar, kisireren EJAKAIT etogo loka Emisiriat kanuka Yosep; arereŋ da naka EJAKAIT kojai kaninibore yenajaatatar ŋesi, lukotogo ka lukomana da."
Genesis39:6 Kinyekik kere luajaatatar ŋesi kakan naka Yoscp, komam ejeŋi ibore yeneiai kaŋes nabarai inyamat lukenyamenenei. Ido arai Yosep lotemel, akekonyen da nuisiyalamikinete,"
Genesis39:7 Kosodi kokau kanun, kosesen aberu naka ekapolonike Yosep; kotema atiar, “Kapero.”"
Genesis39:8 Konye kogiri ŋesi, kolimok aberu naka ekapolonike ebe, “Koany, mam ekapolonika ejeŋi Iueja keoŋ kotogo, ido abu ketitin kere;"
Genesis39:9 Emamei loketelekarit eoŋ kapolou kotogo kalo; emamei da imodiobore yenimam kainakinit nabarai ijo bon, naarai irai ijo akeberu: aso ekoni apedori ai aswam aronis naetia nen, adiakar da kama ejai Edeke?”"
Genesis39:10 Kosodi kinerenena kaYosep ninipaaran, komam enupakini apero kaijcs karaida aiboi kaŋes."
Genesis39:11 Kosodi kapakio kanun koloma togo aswam akeswamisio; komameete ituŋa lukotogo kanen,"
Genesis39:12 Kitin akenapito, kobala ebc, “Kapero.” Kinyek Yosep akenapito kakanike koburucar koker kina."
Genesis39:13 Kosodi kanen keanyu ebe enyek Yosep akenapito kakanike aker da,"
Genesis39:14 Konyarau ituija luajaas togoke, kobala kes ebe, “Koany, kiinu Eburaniat aboliar oni; alom ŋesi mama ajai ebe tikiipere keoŋ, keluluk eoŋ keporoto loepol:"
Genesis39:15 Kosodi kiira ebe eluluk eoŋ keworoi, kinyekini do akenapito kama ajai con, kopaar akerit.”"
Genesis39:16 Kinadak anapitoke aitodol nakeboŋunio l ekapolonike ore.
Genesis39:17 Kolimonok kwape kejaatatar akiro nu cbe, “Ekonibulesit Eburaniat lukiinuni, abu kolom mama ajai aboliar eoŋ;"
Genesis39:18 Kosodi kanen keluluk eoŋ keworotoi, kinyek akenapito kama ajai, koker.”"
Genesis39:19 Kosodi kiira ckapolonike akiro nuka aberuke nukelimonokini ebe, “Ekonibulesit abu keswamak eoŋ kwaŋin”; kinep akenyunyura,"
Genesis39:20 Kosodi ekapolonike ayaŋaar Yosep, kibwaik aidaris,"
Genesis39:21 Konye kojai EJAKAIT ka Yosep kitodik nukasianut, koinak arereŋ kakonycn nuka ekedaran loka aidaris."
Genesis39:22 Kititin ekedaran loka aidaris ienan kere lukejaas aidaris akanin nuka Yosep; ŋes da etetemenenei kere nukiswamaenenete kanen,"
Genesis39:23 Mam ekedaran loka aidaris apodo imodiobore kere yenabu kititin ŋes; naarai ajai EJAKAIT kaŋes; kitekerianite EJAKAIT nukiswamaenenei ŋesi kere.
Genesis40:1 Kosodi kokau kanun, kodiakasi ekawokon loka ekabaka loka Misiri, ka ekepoonike da kama ejai ejakaitikec ekabaka loka Misiri."
Genesis40:2 Konyunyurik Parao ikekeswamak kere, ekapolon loka ikawokok, ka ekapolon loka ikepook da."
Genesis40:3 Koenik kes togo loka ekapolon loka iserikalen, toma aidaris, aibois naeenitere Yosep."
Genesis40:4 Abu ekapolon loka iserikalen kititin kes Yosep, kijaanak kes. Kodaut kanen apak."
Genesis40:5 Kirujata luarei, ŋinituŋanan akeiruiasit, kotoma akuare adiopet, ninitunanan kwape ejaar apolou naka airujasitike, ekawokon ka ekepoon loka ekabaka loka Misiri, luaenitai kotoma aidaris."
Genesis40:6 Koloma Yosep neaiaas kesi tupuruc, koanyu kes, ido koany, akadakinito."
Genesis40:7 Kinit ikeswamak luka Parao luaenitai nenipe kaŋes kotoma togo loka ejakaitike, ebe, “Inyo itakaniata ikadakinito lolo?”"
Genesis40:8 Kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Kiruja isio airujasit; konye emamei yenepedori aitejenun apolouke.” Kotema kes Yosep atiar, “Mam kereka aitejenun apolou erai naka Edeke? Kolimokinai cani, kenainaitos.”"
Genesis40:9 Kolimok ekawokon lokapolon Yosep akeirujasit, kotema ŋes atiar, “Toma airujasitika, koany, bala ajai emusabibu akonyeneka;"
Genesis40:10 Omusabibu da ajaas atenuna auni: kosubite bala elibi, kituro atur; aibunetake da koraata araito nuekokito."
Genesis40:11 Kojai da aikopo naka Parao akanika; kalem araito, kacuanak toma aikopo naka Parao, kainak aikopo akan naka Parao.”"
Genesis40:12 Kotema Yosep ŋes atiar, “Na ŋes akepolou: atenuna auni kes apaarasia auni:"
Genesis40:13 Akaulo kapaarasia auni itonyouni Parao akonikou, kosodi ainyakar toma aswamukon: ido ijaanakini aikopo akan naka Parao, kwape ajaar lem epone iriŋa irai ekawokonike."
Genesis40:14 Konye kiitununei eoŋ da naidumunia aiokis, kitodik eoŋ asianut, kenainait, kolimonori eoŋ kama ka Parao, kolem eoŋ kotogo kalo."
Genesis40:15 Naarai abeit kakokounio kakwap naka Iburanian; kane da mam eswamat adiokirot natikebwaikiniata eoŋ aidaris.”
Genesis40:16 Keanyu ekepoon lokapolon ebe ejok apolou naka akiro, kotema ŋesi Yosep atiar, “Eoŋ da ajai akairujasit, ido koany, bala ebwokit ibukito iuni luajaas imugatin luekwanak;"
Genesis40:17 Obukit da lokokuju ajaas iponesio kere luka inyamat luepee luka Parao; konyamakis akweny obukit kokuju akouka.”
Genesis40:18 Koboŋok Yosep atiar, “Na ŋes akepolou, ibukito iuni kes apaarasia auni;"
Genesis40:19 Akaulo kapaarasia auni itonyouni Parao akonikou anyoun kama ijai, kikaiakini jo okitoi; akweny da enyamete akonikirin alemunun kamakon.”"
Genesis40:20 Kosodi kapaaran kanakiwuniet, apaaran nakewuriere Parao, kipoik ikekejaanakinak kere inyamat luipu; kitonyou akou naka ekawokon lokapolon, akou da naka ekepoon lokapolon kokejaanakinakake."
Genesis40:21 Kinyaku bobo ekawokon lokapolon toma aiwokoke; kijaanak aikopo akan naka Parao;
Genesis40:22 Konye kikajak ekepoon lokapolon: kwape etejenunitor kes Yosep apolou.
Genesis40:23 Konye mam ekawokon lokapolon abu kiitu Yosep, konye abu kimurwok."
Genesis41:1 Kosodi akaulo kikar iarei, kiruja Parao: ido koany, bala ebwoi kariri naka ecor."
Genesis41:2 Ido koany, bala apotu kolomut kocor aituk akanykaarei nuejok nuetumito, kodakasi toma osege."
Genesis41:3 Ido koany, aituk ace akanykaarei kotupakis kwa, kolomut kocor, irikorodas kosenyito; kobwaata kariri naka ecor kama ejaas aituk nuce."
Genesis41:4 Aituk nuerikorodas nuasenyito konyama aituk akanykaarei nuajok nuatumito. Kokweny Parao.
Genesis41:5 Kojotoor kiruia irwan nakiareit, ido koany, bala kosuroto kakimait adiopet aluŋuren nuka akima akanykaarei, iturananas kojokuka."
Genesis41:6 Ido koany, aluŋuren akanykaarei nutinoi nuesirinyorit ekwam lokokide kotupakis kobwanut."
Genesis41:7 Aluŋuren nutinoi kilikos aluŋuren akanykaarei nuturan nukapolok. Kokweny Parao,’ ido koany, erai airujasit."
Genesis41:8 Kosodi kiwala akwap kiyalonon eketau; kiyakia anyaraun imurwok kere luka Misiri, ka lukacoa kere: kolimok Parao airujasitike; konye komamu yenabu kopedo aitejenikin Parao apolouke."
Genesis41:9 Kosodi ekawokon lokapolon alimokin Parao ebe, “Eitu lolo akaibucareta:"
Genesis41:10 Abu Parao konyunyurik ikebulesin, koen kotogo loka ekapolon loka iserikalen: eoŋ ka ekepoon lokapolon da;"
Genesis41:11 Kerujata airujasit kakuare adiopet, eoŋ ka ŋes; kipou kerujata ŋinitunanan kwape ajaar apolou naka airujasitike;"
Genesis41:12 Ido kojai nepepe kasio etelepat Eburaniat, ebulesit loka ekapolon loka iserikalen; kalimonokisi ŋes; kitejenik apolou naka airujasiakosi; kitejenik ninitunanan kwape kejaar akeirujasit."
Genesis41:13 Kosodi kanen, kwape kitejenikinia ŋesi sio, kikonakis kwape kwaŋin; kenyakak eoŋ aswamuka, ka ŋol da kikajak.”"
Genesis41:14 Kosodi Parao aijukar anyaraun Yosep, koyaut ŋes atipet kaidaris: kobaren, kiloeok akenapito, koloma mama ejai Parao."
Genesis41:15 Kobala Parao Yosep atiar, “Erujat eoŋ airujasit, konye emamei yenepedori aitejenun apolouke: ido eira kilimitoi ebe naipupunio ijo airujasit ipedori aitejenun apolouke.”"
Genesis41:16 Koboŋok Yosep Parao atiar, “Mere nukaŋ: Edeke ŋes einakini Parao abonokinio naka ainapakin.”"
Genesis41:17 Kotema Parao Yosep atiar, “Toma airujasitika, koany, bala abwoi eoŋ kariri naka ecor."
Genesis41:18 Ido koany, bala apotu kolomut koeor aituk akanykaarei, nuetumito nukaiokak; kodakasi toma osege."
Genesis41:19 Ido koany, aituk akanykaarei ace kotupakis kwa kolomut koeor, nudokor nuerikorodas noi, nukasenyak, numam aanyunit apeŋo nukitetemet akeeeronis kakwap nako Misiri kere."
Genesis41:20 Aituk nukasenyak nurikoda konyamata aituk akanykaarei nukatumak nuageete;
Genesis41:21 Aso kedaut ainyam, mam ipedori ajenun ebe kenyamito; naarai aroko edokororos kwape ajaatar sek. Kasodi akwenyun."
Genesis41:22 Kaanyu kotoma airujaka, ido koany, bala kosuroto kakimait adiopet aluŋuren akanykaarei nuturaij nukaiokak;"
Genesis41:23 Ido koany, bala aluŋuren akanykaarei nuawokito, nutinoi, nuesirinyorit ekwam lokokide, kotupakis kobwanut."
Genesis41:24 Apotu aluŋuren nutinoi kilikosi aluŋuren nuturaŋ akanykaarei, Kalimok imurwok; konye komamu yenepedori aitejenikin eoŋ apolouke.”"
Genesis41:25 Kotema Yosep Parao atiar, “Airujasit naka Parao erai adiopet: nuelosi Edeke aisub, kes nualimoki ŋesi Parao."
Genesis41:26 Aituk akanykaarei nukajokak kes ikar ikanykaarei, ka aluŋuren akanykaarei nuturan kes ikar ikanykaarei; airujasit erai adiopet."
Genesis41:27 Aituk da akanykaarei nukasenyak nurikoda nuatupakinete, kes ikar ikanykaarei, ido aluŋuren akanykaarei nuesirinyorit ekwam lokokide; eraunos ŋun ikar ikanykaarei luka ebeli."
Genesis41:28 Ŋin ŋes akirot naalimok eoŋ Parao; nuelosi Edeke aisub, etodiki ŋesi Parao."
Genesis41:29 Koany, epote ikar ikanykaarei luka amio naepol noi anatar akwap kere nako Misiri."
Genesis41:30 Kokau kanul ejaunete ikar ikanykaarei luka ebeli; kisimurwokinete amio kere naka akwap nako Misiri; emudiari da ebeli akwap.
Genesis41:31 Amio da mam ejenunio kakwap kanuka ebeli loetupakini; naarai ededeneari noi jokan.
Genesis41:32 Aponi kirucakinai Parao airujasit, naarai itogogonit Edeke akirot, itodolikini da Edeke ŋun atipet."
Genesis41:33 Aso do komou Parao etuŋanan loemisiana lokaeoa, kodakak ayait akwap nako Misiri."
Genesis41:34 Kiswama Parao kwaŋin, ido kibwaik ikaanyanarak kakwap, kinadak idiopet kokany yenika akwap nako Misiri kokar ikanykaarei luka amio."
Genesis41:35 Kotukonokinai inyamat kere luka ikar kalu kaluejok lueponito, kinadai akima akan naka Pamo oreria lukapolok, kidarai."
Genesis41:36 Inyamat nul da eraunete imono luka akwap kanuka ikar ikanykaarei luka ebeli, luejaunete akwap nako Misiri; kinye akwap atwanare ebeli.”"
Genesis41:37 Akirot nin ajokuna kakonye nuka Parao, kakonye da nuka ikekejaanakinako"
Genesis41:38 Kotema Parao ikekejaanakinak atiar, “Kipedori adumun etuŋanan loeputos kalo, etuŋanan loejai emoyo loka Edeke?”"
Genesis41:39 Kotema Parao Yosep atiar, “Naarai kitodik Edeke jo ŋun kere, emamei loemisiana lokaeoa da kwape kajo,"
Genesis41:40 Iyai ijo ekatogo, ido kwape ejaar akonikirot kirimaretc ikatuŋa kere; dimarai ajakanutuka bon ketelekaria jo kapolou.”"
Genesis41:41 Kotema Parao Yosep atiar, “Koany, kadakak jo ayait akwap kere nako Misiri.”"
Genesis41:42 Kolaca Parao ekegilut lokaanyunet kobokoritike, kitanapik obokorit loka Yosep, kitanap inapen luka abaputa naejok, kitanapik irikot yenika esabu omurisiŋike,"
Genesis41:43 Kitolot kagali kanakiareit naajai ŋesi. Kolimoroi kakonyeneke ebe, “Kokukokinos.” Kodakak ayait akwap kere nako Misiri."
Genesis41:44 Kobala Parao Yosep ebe, “Eoŋ Parao, emamei bobo ituŋanan yenitonyouni akekan karaida akekeju kakwap kere nako Misiri, dimarai kisiik ijo.”"
Genesis41:45 Komaik Parao Yosep ekekiror Sapenat-panea; koinak Asenat akoku naka Poti-pera esasedoti loka On aimany. Kolot Yosep kirimo akwap kere nako Misiri.
Genesis41:46 Kerai Yosep laka ikar akaisauni naabwoia kakonyen nuka Parao ekabaka loka Misiri. Konyou Yosep kama ejai Parao, kolot anatar akwap kere nako Misiri."
Genesis41:47 Kokar ikanykaarei luka amio, kobwan akwap inyamat luipu noi."
Genesis41:48 Kotukonokinenei inyamat kere luka ikar ikanykaarei luajaunete akwap nako Misiri, kiijadanakinenei inyamat oreria; inyamat luka amanan nuerimorito nolirc, cnadanakinenei ore ŋol."
Genesis41:49 Kinada Yosep akima nuipu noi kwape kasine naka aŋolol, aitodol neenyeinia aimar; naarai mam emarunos."
Genesis41:50 Kouri Yosep idwe iarei, koroko ekaru loka ebeli kedoluno, luaurikin Asenat akoku naka Poti-pera esasedoti loka On."
Genesis41:51 Komaik Yosep ekiyai ekekiror Manase ebe, “Naarai kesumurwoki Edeke akaitaaritoi, ka ekal loka papaka kere.”"
Genesis41:52 Lokiareit da komaik ekekiror Epuraim ebe, “Naarai ketupu Edeke eoŋ kakwap naka aiticanioka.”"
Genesis41:53 Kodaunos do ikar ikanykaarei luka amio luajaas akwap nako Misiri.
Genesis41:54 Kogeunos ikar ikanykaarei luka ebeli, kwape kebalar Yosep: kojaun ebeli akwapin kere, konye kojaas inyamat akwap kere nako Misiri."
Genesis41:55 Naariebia eteŋei akwap kere nako Misiri, komonyatar ituŋa Parao kanuka inyamat. Kotema Parao Imisirian kere atiar, “Kolosenenete neejai Yosep; nukitemanari ŋesi yes, kiswamanakinete kwaŋin.”"
Genesis41:56 Konata ebeli akwapin kere; konaa Yosep imono kere kitwegelenenei Imisirian; kodcdenear ebeli kakwap nako Misiri.
Genesis41:57 Lukakwapin kere koponenakinete Yosep koMisiri agwel akima; naarai kodedenear ebeli kakwapin kere.
Genesis42:1 Kosodi kejenu Yakob ebe ejaas akima Misiri, kotema Yakob odweke atiar, “Kanukinyo inolianakinotor?”"
Genesis42:2 Kotema atiar, “Koany, apup ebe ejaas akima Misiri: aso kiiesaros kogwelut kaŋina; kajarata, kenyeis atwakare.”"
Genesis42:3 Kiiesaros iinacan lutomon luka Yosep agwel akima Misiri.
Genesis42:4 Konye mam Yakob abu kiyakia Benyamin onace loka Yosep, nepepe kikeinacan; naarai abala ebe, “Elemuni kodoik aronis.”"
Genesis42:5 Kopotu odwe luka Isirael egwelet nepepe kanul kaluaponenenete: naarai ajai ebeli akwap naka Kanaan.
Genesis42:6 Kerai Yosep ekayaiton loka akwap; nol ŋes loetwegelenenei ituŋa kere luka akwap; kopotu iinacan luka Yosep, kisudedoto kakonyencke."
Genesis42:7 Koany Yosep ikeinacan kojen kes, konye kituluor bala lokaceteker kamakec, kisiejanak, kobala kes ebe, “Kipote kai?” Kotemasi ŋes ebe, “Akwap naka Kanaan agwel inyamat.”"
Genesis42:8 Kojen Yosep ikeinacan, konye mam kes apotu kojenutu ŋes,"
Genesis42:9 Kiitu Yosep airuiasia nuerujai kanukec, kotema kes atiar, “Iraas ikarotak: iponito aanyun akwap kwape ilarononor.”"
Genesis42:10 Kobalas ebe, “Mam, papa, konye eponitos ikonibulesin egwelet inyamat."
Genesis42:11 Isio ke re kirai idwe luka ediopetunanan; kirai da lukabeit, ikonibulesin mam eraas ikarctak nepetai da.”"
Genesis42:12 Kobala kes ebe, “Mam, konye iponitos aanyun akwap kwape ilarononor.”"
Genesis42:13 Kobalas ebe, “Mam. Isio ikonibulesin kirai iinacan lutomon kaarei, idwe luka ediopetunanan kakwap naka Kanaan; ido koany, ikosiŋoorit ejai nepepe kapapakosi kiton lolo, idiopet da emamei.”"
Genesis42:14 Kobala Yosep kes ebe, “Ŋes nipenin nakabalar eoŋ yes ebe ‘Iraas ikarotak’;"
Genesis42:15 Mere ber kigimoroi akusikirot. Madi Parao, mam inyounete kane dimikito kebu ikusinoorit da nepene."
Genesis42:16 Kiyakiasi aupakus ediopet, koom onaeekus, ka yes da kienio, tetere igimorio akusikiro, arai ejai abeit mamakus; arai mere kwaŋin, madi Parao, abeit iraas ikarotak.”"
Genesis42:17 Kibwaik kes kere nepepe aidaris apaarasia auni.
Genesis42:18 Kobala Yosep kes kapaaran kanakiwuniet ebe, “Kiswamata kwanata, tetere ijarete: naarai ayoŋit eoŋ Edeke."
Genesis42:19 Arai teni iraas lukabeit, koenai cani ediopet koinacanakus kaidarisikus; konye kolototo luce, koyanaasi akima nuka eteŋei lokokalekus;"
Genesis42:20 ido koinuniata inooritikus; kosodete akirokus aitogogoŋio, yes da mam itwakete.” Kiswamata kwaŋin,"
Genesis42:21 Kotemanaros bonik ebe, “Abeit kidiakarit kanuka onaeewok, naarai kipou kaanyutu eketau kwape eticanitor, kwape kinainaitor, oni da kipou kagiro apupun; ŋes kidoikinioto ican lu.”"
Genesis42:22 Koboŋok Reuben kes ebe, “Mam eoŋ abu kalimok yes ebe, ‘Sirikidiakata nuka ikoku’; kosodete yes aigir apupun? ŋes kitepesenitotor oni akeokot.”"
Genesis42:23 Mam apotu kojenut ebe ejeŋi Yosep akecekiro; naarai ajai ekejulan kidinike kakes.
Genesis42:24 Kibonok kes epur, komony akiyo; kobono bobo mama ejaas, kiner kakes, kocupo Simeon kokidinikec, koen kakonyekec."
Genesis42:25 Kosodi Yosep aicorakin ailelebanar iborokec akima, ainyakakin da ŋolituŋanan akepesan opukoke, ainanakin da inyamat luka erot: kiswamanakinai kwaŋin."
Genesis42:26 Kisibwoka asigiriakec akima, kolototo."
Genesis42:27 Naalaearia aupakec ediopet epukoke aitanyam akesigiria kaibois naaperete, koturiaikin akepesan; ido koany, kejaas aituk naka epukoke."
Genesis42:28 Kotema ikeinacan atiar, “Kenyakakin akapesan; ido koany, ejaas opukoka.” Kodusaununos itauonokec, kibelonokinos komaranete, kobalas ebe, “Inyo bo lolo yenikisubak oni Edeke?”"
Genesis42:29 Kopotu neejai papakec Yakob akwap naka Kanaan, kolimonokis kere nuapotu kodoikis kes; ebe,"
Genesis42:30 “Etuŋanan, ekapolon loka akwap, abu kisiejanak sio, koomite ebe kirai isio ikarotak akwap."
Genesis42:31 Katemasi atiar,, Kirai lukabcit; mam kirai ikarotak;"
Genesis42:32 Kirai iinaean lutomon ka luarei, odwe luka papakosi; idiopet emamei, ikosiŋoorit da ejai kapapakosi kiton lolo kakwap naka Kanaan.’"
Genesis42:33 Etuŋanan, ekapolon loka akwap, kotema sio atiar, ‘Kwanata ŋes ajenunia ebe iraas lukabeit; kinyeinere ediopet koinaeanakus, koyanaasi akima kanuka eteŋei lokokaliakus, koloto."
Genesis42:34 Koinut ikusinoorit; kasodi kaien ebe mam eut iraas ikarotak, konye iraas lukabcit; kalaeakinete do onaeekus, yes da igwelenenete do kakwap kana.’’’"
Genesis42:35 Kosodi ebukete iboro lukotoma opukoikee, koany, eriagi loka apesan loka nolitunanan kojai opukoke: keanyutu kesi ka papakee iriaginikee luka apesan, kokuriakaros."
Genesis42:36 Kobala papakec Yakob kes ebe, “Kidemasi eoŋ ikadwe: Yosep emamei, Simeon da emamei, ido bobo kikotos ademar Benyamin da; ŋun kere kalanirikinitos.”"
Genesis42:37 Kotema Reuben papake ebe, “lari ijo odweka luarei, arai mam enyakunit mamakon; koinakinai akanika, enyakuni eoŋ ŋes bobo mamakon.”"
Genesis42:38 Kobala ebe, “Mam ikakoku elosi nepepe kayes; naarai abu onaceke kotwana, ŋes da asalaki bon; kedoiki aronis korot kaloitorete, itolomarete akakorwo toma okatwak kanuka aiturur.”"
Genesis43:1 Kodedenear ebeli kakwap.
Genesis43:2 Kosodi kanen, kedaut ainyam akima kere nuaomete koMisiri, kotema kes papakec atiar, “Koloto bobo, kogwelut idisinyamat.”"
Genesis43:3 Kobala Yuda ŋes ebe, “Abu etuŋanan kiyapoik sio cut, kobala ebe, ‘Mam ianyunete akakonyen dimikito ejai onacekus kayes.’"
Genesis43:4 Arai ijukari onacekos kasio, kilosi agwelakin jo inyamat;"
Genesis43:5 Konye arai mam iiukari, mam kilosi: naarai abu etuŋanan kobala sio ebe, ‘Mam ianyunete akakonyen, dimikito ejai onacekus kayes.’’’"
Genesis43:6 Kobala Isirael ebe, “Kanukinyo kiswamakiniata eoŋ erono kwaŋin, alimokin etuŋanan ebe ejai onacekus ece?”"
Genesis43:7 Kobalas ebe, “Abu etuŋanan je kinitinit sio kwape kiiaar, ido kwape eiaar cwokokek, kobala ebe, ‘Eroko papakus ejari? Ejai yes onaeekus ece?’ Kalimokis ŋes kwape ejaatar akiro ŋun; tikipedo biai ajenun ebe etemari atiar, ‘Koyaut onaeekus da’?”"
Genesis43:8 Kotema Yuda Isirael papake atiar, “Kijuka esapat keoŋ, kinyouni isio da kaloto: tetere kiiari, kenyeisi atwakare, isio ka jo, ka idwckosi ludidik."
Genesis43:9 Araun eoŋ ekabwoiaranike: kitepeseni eoŋ kanuken; arai mam enyakunit mamakon, kebwaik kakonyenekon, kabeik eoŋ akirot apaarasia kere:"
Genesis43:10 Naarai kedim isio aitumor, abeit tikiibonu sek irwan nakiareit.”"
Genesis43:11 Kobala kes papakee Isirael ebe, “Arai do ikote nen, kiswamata kwanata; koyaata koborokus adisiraito nuka akwap nuitelekarito aiokis, koinakis etuŋanan ainakinet, ediomina, ka ediosik, ka luesaete, ka akinyet, ka emaido ka akunur:"
