Genesis43:12 Koyaata da apesan aitemisio aarei kotoma akaninikus; koyaata bobo kakaninikus apesan nuenyakunio kaituke nuka ipukoikus; diat kinyakunio kanuka abuikin:
Genesis43:13 Koyaata onaeekus da, konyout, kobonosi mama ejai etuŋanan,"
Genesis43:14 Edeke Lokapedor koinak aitimio kakonyen nuka etuŋanan, kolaeak onaeekus je ka Benyamin. Eoŋ da arai katwania idweka, atwaniari.”"
Genesis43:15 Koyaata ituŋa ainakinet ŋin, koyaata apesan aitemisio aarei kakaninikee, ka Benyamin; konyout koloto Misiri, kobwaata kakonyen nuka Yosep."
Genesis43:16 Keanyu Yosep Benyamin ejai kakes, kotema ekeŋadan loka etogoke atiar, “Kitoloma ituŋa togo, kopuik, kitemonok; naarai kimori ituŋa ŋul keoŋ luka paaran.”"
Genesis43:17 Kiswama etuŋanan kwape kicorakinia Yosep; kitoloma etuŋanan ituŋa togo loka Yosep.
Genesis43:18 Koyona ituŋa, naarai etolomar kes togo loka Yosep; kobalas ebe, “Kanuka apesan nukinyakanakinio opukoiwok ŋes kitolomunere nee; akodokod, kosodi akakakin oni, anatar araun ibulesinike, ka awokosigirian da.”"
Genesis43:19 Kikunyakis neejai ekeŋadan loka etogo loka Yosep, kinerata kaŋes kokek loka etogo."
Genesis43:20 Kobalas ebe, “Okwe ejakait, abeit kipou kapotu nasodit agwel inyamat:"
Genesis43:21 Kosodi kanen, kiidol aibois naperot, kalaeasi ikosipukoi, ido koany, apesan nuka nolitunanan kojaas aituk naka epukoke, akosipesan da koriana ekeeetiai; kinyakunit bobo kakaninikosi."
Genesis43:22 Ido kiyau aeepesan kakaninikosi agwelia inyamat: mam sio kijeni yenikibwaikini apesanakosi opukoikosi.”
Genesis43:23 Kobala kes ebe, “Ainapakin koiai mama iiaas, sirikiyoŋa, Edekekus ido Edeke loka papakus, ŋes kiinakini abara kotoma opukoikus: aponi kainakin akusipesan.” Kitolomik kes Simeon."
Genesis43:24 Kitoloma etuŋanan ituŋa togo loka Yosep, koinak kes akipi, kilotata akeeekeje: koinak akeeesigirian da inyamat."
Genesis43:25 Kitemonokis ainakinet tetere kebu Yosep paaran; naarai apuput ebe enyamete atap kanen.
Genesis43:26 Aso keboŋu Yosep ore, koinasi ŋes kotogo ainakinet naajai akaninikec, kisudedikinos ŋes,"
Genesis43:27 Kiŋit kes kwape ejaatar, kobala ebe, “Enale papakus, emoion loibalasi? Eroko ejari?”"
Genesis43:28 Kobalas ebe, “Eŋalei ebulesitikon papakosi, eroko eiari.” Kituluroto akecekwes, kokukumoto."
Genesis43:29 Kiteluo Yosep akekonye, koany onaeeke Benyamin, okoku loka totoke, kobala ebe, “Lo ŋes enooritikus loibalasi yesi?” Kobala ebe, “Edeke kosianik jo, ikakoku.”"
Genesis43:30 Kiburak Yosep; naarai arieba noi eketau onaeeke; komo neemonyia; koloma agolake komony kanen.
Genesis43:31 Kilot akonyen, kolom; kotik etau kobala ebe, “Kodutata inyamat.”"
Genesis43:32 Kodutakinai ŋes bon, kes da bonik, ka Imisirian da luanyamenenete kaŋes, bonik: naarai mam Imisirian apedorete ainyam nepepe kIburanian; naarai arai nin naketal kama ejaas Imisirian."
Genesis43:33 Kiboikinos kakonyeneke, ekiyai kwape ejaar akepolou, ka eŋoorit da kwape ejaar eiditeuke: koumokis ituŋa noi."
Genesis43:34 Koodonok kes inyamat luajaas akonyeneke; konye aodokinet naka Benyamin kitelekarite nukee irwan akany. Komatata, kiyalamikinos kaŋes."
Genesis44:1 Kicorak ekeŋadan loka etogoke ebe, “Kilelebana ipukoi luka ituŋa inyamat kwape epedoriata kes aibwok, ido kibwaik apesan nuka ŋolituŋanan aituk naka epukoke."
Genesis44:2 Ido kibwaik aikopoka, aikopo naka epuesa aituk naka epuko loka eŋoorit, akepesan da nuka akima.” Kiswama kwape ajaar akirot naenera Yosep."
Genesis44:3 Nakiwala akwap kotwarai ituŋa, kes ka asigirianakec."
Genesis44:4 Kedautu kes anyoun kore, eriŋa ejaas die, kotema Yosep ekeŋadanike atiar, “Konyou, kotupa ituŋa; kidolok ijo kes, kolimok kes ebe, ‘Kanukinyo itacakiniata aronis itia ajokis?"
Genesis44:5 Mere na ŋes naemasenena ejakaitika, ŋipeŋin da naedwarenenea? Ipotu kiswamata aronis aswam kwaŋin.’’’"
Genesis44:6 Kodolok, kolimonok kes akiro ŋun."
Genesis44:7 Kotemasi kesi atiar, “Inyo ainaki ejakaitika ener akiro nuikote kwaka ŋun? Madi akuj arai esubito ibulesinikon akirot naetia nen!"
Genesis44:8 Koany, apesan nukipou isio kaanyutu kaituke nuka ipukoikosi, kipou kenyakutu mama ijai anyoun kakwap naka Kanaan: okwe tikikwaik ai kikokoi epuesa arai esabu kotoma togo loka ejakaitikon?"
Genesis44:9 Ŋinitunanan kotoma obulesinikon yenctakanuni ejai kaŋes, kotwana, isio da kiraun ibulesin luka ejakaitika.”"
Genesis44:10 Kinera ebe, “Aso do koraunos kwape ejaatar akusikiro: loetakanuni ejai kaŋes, koraun do ebulesitika; yes da emamuun akirot.”"
Genesis44:11 Kosodete kisunyasi kesi awounun nolituŋanan epukoke kwap, kolac ŋolituŋanan ekepuko."
Genesis44:12 Konie, ageun kama ejai ekiyai, kirikak kaneejai eŋoorit: kotakanu do aikopo kopuko loka Benyamin."
Genesis44:13 Kosodete kesi acilicil inapenekec, kibwaanakis iboro nolitunanan asigiriake, kosodete aboŋor ore."
Genesis44:14 Kodol Yuda nepepe kikeinacan togo loka Yosep; kodumutu ŋes eroko ejai: kibirokinos kwap akonyeneke.
Genesis44:15 Kotema Yosep kes atiar, “Akirot anyoin na nakiswamakis? Mam ijenete ebe etuŋanan kwape keoŋ epedori cut aidwar?”"
Genesis44:16 Kinera Yuda atiar, “Kitemari bo isio ai ekajakait? Kinera biai? Arai kikwaikini ai kitojokaar? Arou Edeke numam edolito kobulesinikon; koany kirai ibulesin luka ejakaitika, isio ka ŋol da loatakanu ejai aikopo akanike.”"
Genesis44:17 Kinera ŋesi ebe, “Madi akuj mam eoŋ eswamai kwaŋin: etuŋanan loatakanu ejai aikopo akanike, ŋes eraun ebulesitika: konye yes, konyout koloto mama ejai papakus kainapakin.”"
Genesis44:18 Kosodi Yuda aikunyakin mama ejai, kiner ebe, “Wu ejakaitika, kenainait, mere kiner ekonibulesit akirot aki nuka ejakaitika, ido kinyek akoninyunyura anomor ekonibulesit; naarai isubit ijo cut bala Parao."
Genesis44:19 Abu ejakaitika kinit ikebulesin ebe, “Ejai yes papakus, arai onacekus?”"
Genesis44:20 Kasodete isio da alimokin ejakaitika ebe, ‘Ejai sio papakosi, emoionit, ka ikoku da yenaurie ŋesi kemoion, edit ikoku; onaceke da atwana, ŋes esalit bon kodwe luka totoke, emina da papake ŋes.’"
Genesis44:21 Ŋo da kotema ikonibulesin atiar, ‘Koinunai, kaany.’"
Genesis44:22 Katemasi isio ejakaitika atiar, ‘Mam epedori etelepat ainyein papake: naarai arai kinyei papake, etwani papake.’"
Genesis44:23 Kotema ijo ikonibulesin atiar, ‘Mam bobo ianyunete akakonyen dimikito kiupunos kenooritikus.’"
Genesis44:24 Kasodete kiidol neejai ebulesitikon papaka, kalimonokis ŋes akiro nuka ejakaitika."
Genesis44:25 Kosodi papakosi atemar ebe, “Kobonosi bobo, kogwelakis sio idisinyamat.’"
Genesis44:26 Kenerata isio da ebe, ‘Mam kipedori alosit. Arai kiupar kenooritikosi, kilosi: naarai mam kianyuni akonyen nuka etuŋanan dimarai kiupara kenooritikosi.’"
Genesis44:27 Ekonibulesit papaka kotema sio atiar, ‘Ŋenete ebe abu akaberu kaurik eoŋ idwe iarei lutelepai:"
Genesis44:28 Konyou idiopet kaneajai, kenera ebe, “Abeit aponi kopoopoai”; eoŋ da ageuni kaŋin mam bobo aanyunit:"
Genesis44:29 Ido arai kiidemasi nin da, kosodi kodoik aronis, itolomarete ca akakorwo toma okatwak kanuka aiturur.’"
Genesis44:30 Aso do arai kalot mama ejai ebulesitikon papaka, komamei etelepat kasio: naarai akeijar imorikikina kaiiar naka etelepat:"
Genesis44:31 Kosodi arai keanyu etelepat emamei, etwani: ikonibulesin da itolomarete akorwo nuka ebulesitikon papakosi toma okatwak kanuka aiturur."
Genesis44:32 Naarai ekonibulesit ŋes abwouni etelepat kama ejai papaka, kobala ebe, ‘Arai mam ayauni mama ijai, kabei eoŋ akirot kama ejai papaka apaarasia kere.’"
Genesis44:33 Okwe, kenainait, kosal do ekonibulesit ne aibois naka etelepat araun ebulesit loka ejakaitika; kouparos etelepat kiinacanake."
Genesis44:34 Naarai ekwaikini ai alosi mama ejai papaka, komamei etelepat keoŋ? Kenyek aanyun aronis naedolokini papaka.”"
Genesis45:1 Kosodi kekurwoki Yosep aitik etauke kakonyen nuka ŋul kere luabwoete aaput kaŋes; kiworo kotema atiar, “Kitolomasi ŋinituŋanan konyout kaneaiai.” Komamuun ituŋanan yenabwoi kaneajai ŋesi, naalimoror Yosep koinacanake."
Genesis45:2 Kodelo noi; kiirasi Imisirian, kiira da etogo loka Parao,"
Genesis45:3 Kotema Yosep ikeinacan atiar, “Eoŋ Yosep; eriŋa papaka ejari?” Mam iinacanake apotu kobonokis ŋes: naarai eyalononoete kakonyeneke."
Genesis45:4 Kotema Yosep ikeinacan atiar, “Kikunyutu neaiai, kenainaito.” Kikunyakis. Kotema atiar, “Eoŋ Yosep onacekus, Ioipotu kogwelasi tape kayaunio Misiri."
Genesis45:5 Natikwana sirikiikadakis, karaida anyunyurikin kotauonokus, kanukigwelariata tape kayaunio ne: naarai abu Edeke ketiliŋ eoŋ aitaiar yes."
Genesis45:6 Adau ebeli kotoma akwap ikar iarei: ido eriŋa esalito ikar ikany lumam ekoriere karaida asakia.
Genesis45:7 Ido Edeke ŋes ketilini aitajarikin yes ipapai kotoma akwap, aitajar da yes koraut erioŋet loepol loedeun."
Genesis45:8 Aso mere yes kiyaunete eoŋ ne, nabarai Edeke; ketuluo da papa neejai Parao, ido ejakait loka etogoke kere, ekayaiton akwap kere nako Misiri."
Genesis45:9 Kisunyito, kobonosi neejai papaka, kotemasi ŋes atiar, ‘Okokukon Yosep atema kwanata ebe, “Abu Edeke ketuluo ejakait loka Misiri kere: kobwot neaiai, sirikiyap."
Genesis45:10 Ido iboienenei kakwap nako Gosen, kidunyakin keen, ijo ka ikonidwe, ka idwe luka idwekon, ka akonimerekekin, ka akoniituk, ka luiiaatar kere."
Genesis45:11 Ketanenenei da kanen: naarai eriŋa esalito ikar ikany luka ebeli: kinye aiyarorotoi, ijo ka ekalekon ka luiiaatar.”"
Genesis45:12 Ido koany, esesenete akusikonye, akonye da nuka onaceka Benyamin, aitukuka ŋipeŋin inera kayes."
Genesis45:13 Ilimokinete papaka aibusesuka kere kotoma Misiri kwape ejaar, ka nuianyut kere: kiwonyakisi kitwobotut papaka ne.”"
Genesis45:14 Kosodi kibirokin omurisin loka onaceke Benyamin, komony akiyo: Benyamin da komony komurisinlke."
Genesis45:15 Konuana ikeinacan kere, komony kamakec: kokau kanun kiyalata ikeinacan kaŋes."
Genesis45:16 Kopupunos akiro ŋun kotogo loka Parao, ebe, “Apotu iinacan luka Yosep.” Kisiyalamikis ŋun Parao, ka ikekejaanakinak da,"
Genesis45:17 Kotema Parao Yosep atiar, “Kolimok iinacanakon ebe, ‘Kikwaikis neta: kisibwoka itianikus iboro, koloto kakwap nako Kanaan;"
Genesis45:18 Kooma papakus ka ikaliakus, kopotu mamakaŋ: eoŋ da kainakinete luejok luka akwap nako Misiri, ido inyamenenete lukaiokak luka akwap.’"
Genesis45:19 Natikwana kecorakinit jo, kikwaikis neta: koyanaasi agalin kakwap nako Misiri kanuka idwekus ludidik, ka aŋorokus da, koyaut papakus, kopotu."
Genesis45:20 Sirikipodokinos da iborokus luinyeinete: naarai ajokis naka akwap nako Misiri nakus.”
Genesis45:21 Kiswamata odwe luka Isirael kwaŋin: abu Yosep koinak kes agalin, kwape kicorakinia Parao, koinak da inyamat luka erot."
Genesis45:22 Abu koinak nolitunanan kere inapen luibusak, konye abu koinak Benyamin atutubeta nuka epuesa akwat auni ka inapen ikany luibusak."
Genesis45:23 Kijukak papake kwanata; isigirian itomon luebwokitos lukajokak luko Misiri, ka asigirian nuunor atomon nuebwokitos akima ka inyamat ido luunyaman luenyami papake korot,"
Genesis45:24 Kotwara do ikeinacan, koloto: kotema kes atiar, “Kocoito kinyeis aijolopikin korot.”"
Genesis45:25 Konyout kakwap nako Misiri, kopotu akwap nako Kanaan mama ejai Yakob papakec."
Genesis45:26 Kotemasi atiar, “Eriŋa Yosep ejari, ido ŋes ekayaiton akwap kere nako Misiri.” Kodusaun etauke, naarai mam abu kiyu."
Genesis45:27 Kolimokis ŋes akiro kere nuka Yosep, nuabu kolimok kes: nakeanyunia agalin nuabu Yosep kijuka aomia ŋes, kikwar etau loka Yakob papakec."
Genesis45:28 Kotema Isirael atiar, “Edolit do: eriŋa okokuka Yosep ejari: alosi aanyun ŋes eriŋa eoŋ ketwana.”"
Genesis46:1 Kolot Isirael, koyana kere luajaas kaŋes, kobu Beer-seba, koinak asuban mama ejai Edeke loka papake Isaak."
Genesis46:2 Kiner Edeke ka Isirael kotapo loka akuare ebe, “Yakob, Yakob.” Kotema atiar, “Eoŋ lo.”"
Genesis46:3 Kobala ebe, “Eoŋ Edeke, Edeke loka papakon: sirikikurianar alosit Misiri, naarai ketuluori jo kaŋina ateker naepol."
Genesis46:4 Alosi nepepe kajo Misiri; abeit da kenyakuni jo bobo; Yosep da ŋes itemokini akonikonye naitwania ijo.”
Genesis46:5 Konyou Yakob anyoun koBeer-seba: apotu odwe luka Isirael kodakasi Yakob papakec, ka ikecedwe ludidik ka akecenor da, kagalin nuejukari Parao adakunia ŋes."
Genesis46:6 Koyaata ikecebaren, ka ikeceboro luadumunete kakwap nako Kanaan, kopotu Misiri, Yakob ka aurike kere."
Genesis46:7 Odweke, ka odwe luka odweke nepepe kaŋes, adweke, ka adwe nuka odweke, ka aurike kere koyau kes Misiri."
Genesis46:8 Lu kes ikiroria luka idwe luka Isirael, luapotu kolomasi Misiri, Yakob ka odweke; Reuben, ekiyai loka Yakob."
Genesis46:9 Odwe luka Reuben; Kanok, ka Palu, ka Kesuron, ka Karami."
Genesis46:10 Odwe luka Simeon; Yemuel, ka Yamin, ka Okad, ka Yakin, ka Sokar, ka Saul okoku loka aberu Akanaanit."
Genesis46:11 Odwe luka Lebi; Gereson, ka Kokat, ka Merari."
Genesis46:12 Odwe luka Yuda; Er, ka Onan, ka Sela, ka Peres, ka Sera; konye kotwaka Er ka Onan kakwap naka Kanaan. Odwe luka Peres, Kesuron ka Kamul,"
Genesis46:13 Odwe luka Isakar; Tola, ka Puba, ka Iob, ka Simuron."
Genesis46:14 Odwe luka Sebulun; Sered, ka Elon, ka Yakalecl."
Genesis46:15 Ŋul kes odwe luka Lea, lukeurikini Yakob koPadan-Aram, nepepe kakokuke Dina: ituŋa kere luka ikedwe lusap ka lupesur emwaasi akaisauni ka luuni."
Genesis46:16 Odwe luka Gad; Sipion, ka Kagi, ka Suni, ka Esebon, ka Eri, ka Arodi, ka Areli."
Genesis46:17 Odwe luka Aser; Imina, ka Isiba, ka Isibi, ka Beria, ka Sera kinacikec; odwe luka Beria, Keber, ka Malakiel."
Genesis46:18 Ŋul kes odwe luka Silupa, naabu Laban koinak akokuke Lea, lukeurikini Yakob, ituŋa itomon ka lukanykape,"
Genesis46:19 Odwe luka Rakel aberu naka Yakob; Yosep ka Benyamin.
Genesis46:20 Ido kakwap nako Misiri kouri Yosep Manase ka Epuraim, luaurikini ŋes Asenas akoku naka Potipera esasedoti loka On."
Genesis46:21 Odwe luka Benyamin; Bela ka Beker, ka Asabel, ka Gera, ka Naaman, ka Eki, ka Ros, ka Mupim, ka Kupim, ka Arad."
Genesis46:22 Ŋul kes odwe luka Rakel, lukeurikini Yakob; ituŋa kere emwaasi itomon ka luonon."
Genesis46:23 Odwe luka Dan; Kusim.
Genesis46:24 Odwe luka Naputali; Yakaseel, ka Guni, ka Yeser, ka Silem."
Genesis46:25 Ŋul kes odwe luka Bilika, naabu Laban koinak Rakel akokuke, nul lukeurikini Yakob; ituŋa kere emwaasi ikanykaarei."
Genesis46:26 Ituŋa kere luapote nepcpe ka Yakob Misiri, lualomunete kakuanake, komam imarakinitai aŋor nuka odwe luka Yakob, ituŋa kere emwaasi akaisakanykape ka lukanykape."
Genesis46:27 Odwe luka Yosep, lukeurikinio ŋes koMisiri, emwaasi ituŋa iarei: ituŋa kere lukokek loka Yakob, lukelomarete Misiri, cmwaasi akaisakanykaarei."
Genesis46:28 Kiyakia Yuda aiŋarenikin ŋes mama ejai Yosep, ailip aitodikinio erot loebei toma Gosen; kodoloto akwap nako Gosen."
Genesis46:29 Kitcmonok Yosep agalike, kolot airiamakin ka Isirael papake, toma Gosen; kitodikin mama ejai, kibirokin omurisiŋike, komony akiyo komurisinike apak naepol."
Genesis46:30 Kotema Isirael Yosep atiar, “Mere do katwana, naarai aany akonikonye iroko iiari.”"
Genesis46:31 Kotema Yosep ikeinacan ka ekalloka papake atiar, “Alosi alimokin Parao ebe, ‘Apotu mama ajai ikainacan ka ekalloka papaka luajaas akwap nako Kanaan,"
Genesis46:32 Ido eraas kesi ikecokok, naarai icokienenete ibaren; ayaut da isipaninikec luka amerekekin ka aituk, ka iboro kere luejaatar.’"
Genesis46:33 Kosodi arai kiinyara Parao, kiin it ebe, ‘Anyoin bo akusiswam?’"
Genesis46:34 Iboŋokinete ebe, ‘Icokienenete ikonibulesin ibaren ageun koiditeukosi aitodol lolo, isio ka lukapapaakosi da’: tetere iboikinos roma akwap nako Gosen; naarai nolikecokon erai loketal mama ejaas lmisirian.”"
Genesis47:1 Kosodi koloma Yosep kolimok Parao ebe, “Adolu papaka ka ikainacan ka isipaninikec luka amerekekin ka aituk, ka iboro kere luejaatar, epote kakwap nako Kanaan; ido koany, ejaas akwap nako Gosen.”"
Genesis47:2 Koseu koinacanake ituŋa ikany, koinu Parao."
Genesis47:3 Kobala Parao iinacanake ebe, “Anyoin bo akusiswam?” Kotemasi Parao atiar, “Eraas ibulesinikon ikecokok, isio ka lukapapaakosi da.”"
Genesis47:4 Kotemasi Parao atiar, “Kiponit aiboi akwap na; naarai emameete inya kanuka ikosisipanin; naarai ededeŋ noi ebeli kakwap nako Kanaan: natikwana, kinaitjait, kisiik ikonibulesin aiboikin akwap nako Gosen.”"
Genesis47:5 Kobala Parao Yosep ebe, “Apotu papakon ka ikoniinacan mama ijai:"
Genesis47:6 Akwap nako Misiri ejai akonyenekon; kisiboik papakon ka iinacanakon neitelekarit ajokis kotoma akwap; aso kiboikinos akwap nako Gosen: ido arai ijeni kakesi luekukuraka kitarau kes lukapolok luka ibareneka.”
Genesis47:7 Kitoloma Yosep papake Yakob, kibwaik akonyen nuka Parao; kilipak Yakob Parao asuliany."
Genesis47:8 Kotema Parao Yakob atiar, “Imwaasi ai apaarasia nuka ikar luka aijarakon?”"
Genesis47:9 Kobala Yakob Parao ebe, “Apaarasia nuka ikar luka alositeka eraas ikar akwatat ka akaisauni: apaarasia nuka ikar luka aijaraka eraas luikidioko ido lueroko, ido mam edolokinete apaarasia nuka ikar luka aiiar naka lukapapaaka kapaarasia nuka alositekec.”"
Genesis47:10 Kilipak Yakob Parao asuliany, koloma kakonyen nuka Parao."
Genesis47:11 Kisiboik Yosep papake ka ikeinacan, koinak aibois kakwap nako Misiri, neetelekarit ajokis kotoma akwap, akwap naka Ramases, kwape kicorakinia Parao."
Genesis47:12 Kitanenenei Yosep papake ka ikeinacan ka ekal kere loka papake, kinyamat, kwape ajaatar ikecedwe."
Genesis47:13 Komamuut inyamat kakwap kere; naarai adedeŋ noi ebeli, kikarakis luka akwap nako Misiri ka luka akwap nako Kanaan, kanuka ebeli."
Genesis47:14 Kotukonok Yosep apesan kere nuajaas kakwap nako Misiri, kakwap nako Kanaan, naetwegelenenea akima. Koyau Yosep apesan togo loka Parao."
Genesis47:15 Kedaut apesan kere nuka akwap nako Misiri ka nuka akwap nako Kanaan atukonokinio, kopotu Imisirian kere mama ejai Yosep, kobalas ebe, “Koinakinai sio inyamat: kanukinyo kitwakikinia akonyenekon? Naarai kiwolikis sio apesan.”"
Genesis47:16 Kobala Yosep ebe, “Koinakinai ibarenekus; eoŋ da kainanakini itia ibarenekus, arai kiwolikinitos apesan.”"
Genesis47:17 Koinutu Yosep ibarenekec: koinak Yosep kes inyamat aisieca ibalasin, ka isipanin luka amerekekin, ka aituk, ka asigirian: kitanyam kes inyamat ekaru ŋol isiecanarete ibarenekec kere."
Genesis47:18 Kedaun ekaru ŋol, kopotu bobo neejai kokaru kalokiareit, kobalas ŋes ebe, “Mam kimunonikini ejakaitikosi kwape adaunotor apesanakosi kere; isipanin da luka ibaren araunos luka ejakaitikosi; mam yenesalit kakonyen nuka eiakaitikosi, dimarai awatekosi ka akwapukosi:"
Genesis47:19 Kanukinyo kitwakikinia akonyenekon, isio ka akwapukosi da? kogwelai sio ka akwapukosi kinyamat, kiraun do isio ka akosikwap ibulesin luka Parao; koinakinai sio ikinyom, kajarata kenyeis atwakare, kinyek akwap asilior.”"
Genesis47:20 Kogwelak kwaŋin Yosep Parao akwap kere nako Misiri; naarai apotu Imisirian kogwelanasi ninitunanan ekemanikor, naarai abu ebeli kodedeijik kes: koraun akwap naka Parao."
Genesis47:21 Kitubulesenei da ituŋa kwape ajaatar oreriakec ageun koikor loka Misiri neesanit aitodol awasiake ace.
Genesis47:22 Konye mam abu kogwel akwap naka isasedotin; naarai ajaas isasedotin ewai loainanakini Parao, konyamenenete ewaikec loainanakini Parao kes: ŋes mam agwelariata akecekwap,"
Genesis47:23 Kosodi kotema Yosep ituŋa atiar, “Koany, agwelak lolo Parao yes ka akusikwap: koany, ikinyomokus lu, koyeata."
Genesis47:24 Kosodete naisakeneniata, iinanakinete Parao idiopet kokany, eraunos iwaitin iwonon lukus, araun luyean, araun da ikusinyamat, ido luka ikaliakus, inyamat da luka idwekus ludidik.”"
Genesis47:25 Kobalas ebe, “Ibu ijo kitajar sio kotoma atwanare: kadumutu asianut kakonyen nuka eiakaitikosi, ido kiraun ibulesin luka Parao.”"
Genesis47:26 Kisilak Yosep ekisil nol akwap nako Misiri aitodol lolo, ainanakin Parao idiopet kokany; nabarai akwap naka isasedotin bon ŋes mam abu koluor naka Parao."
Genesis47:27 Kiboienenei Isirael kakwap nako Misiri, kakwap nako Gosen; kodumut iborokec kotoma, kouriaros, kipuaros noi noi."
Genesis47:28 Kiboikin Yakob kakwap nako Misiri ikar itomon ka lukanykaarei: kwaŋin apaarasia nuka Yakob, ikar luka aiiarake, imwaasi ikar akwatat ka akaisaoŋon ka Iukanykaarei."
Genesis47:29 Koapu apak naka atwanare naka Isirael: konyarau okokuke Yosep, kotema atiar, “‘Arai adumunit asianut kakonyenekon, kenainait, kibwaik akanikon kwap kamurwoka, kikonak kasianut ka abeit; kenainait, sirikiidaik Misiri:"
Genesis47:30 Konye kajotoor nepepe kalukapapaaka, kidakari eoŋ koMisiri, kidaik aibois nakidaanakinakec.” Kotema atiar, “Eswamai kwape kitemaria.”"
Genesis47:31 Kotema atiar, “Kiyapoikinoi.” Kiyapoik ŋes, Kitulur Isirael akekou koitadake."
Genesis48:1 Kosodi kokau kanun, kolimokinai Yosep ebe, “Koany, edek papakon.” Koyana ŋesi odweke luarei, Manase ka Epuraim."
Genesis48:2 Kolimokinai Yakob ebe, “Koany, ebunit okokukon Yosep mama ijai.” Kiriun Isirael, koboikin oitada."
Genesis48:3 Kobala Yakob Yosep ebe, “Edeke Lokapedor kere abu ketaanyikin koLus kakwap nako Kanaan, kesireren."
Genesis48:4 Kabala ŋesi eoŋ ebe, ‘Koany, kesuuri, kesupui, ketuluori da atukot naka atekerin: ido ainakini aurikon naetupakini akwap na araun airumet naka ikar ka ikar.’"
Genesis48:5 Kwana da odwekon luarei, luiwurie ijo koMisiri koroko eoŋ kebuno neiiai koMisiri eraas lukan; eraunos Epuraim ka Manase idweka kwape ka Reuben ka Simeon."
Genesis48:6 Aurikon da naiwurienenei kokau kanul, eraun nakon, emaanakinio ikiroria luka iinacanakec kotoma airumukec."
Genesis48:7 Ka eoŋ da, naanyounio koPadan, nukican kotwana Rakel kakwap nako Kanaan korot, koroko apak es alit epol adolore Epurat, kedaik ŋina orot loebei Epurat (ŋes Bet-lekem).”"
Genesis48:8 Koany Isirael odwe luka Yosep, kobala cbe, “Lukanai bo lu?”"
Genesis48:9 Kotema Yosep papake atiar, “Kes odweka lukainakini Edeke kane.” Kobala ebe, “Kisukuny kes, kenainait, eoŋ da elipakini kes arereŋ.”"
Genesis48:10 Ido kowariwarete akonye nuka Isirael kanuka amoion, komam epedori asescn. Kisukunyik, kotun, konu."
Genesis48:11 Kobala Isirael Yosep cbe, “Mam abu kaomite ebe aanyuni akonikonyen; ido koany, ketaany da Edeke aurikon.”"
Genesis48:12 Kitonyou Yosep kes kokidin kakuninike; kitulur akekonycn kwap.
Genesis48:13 Koyanau Yosep kes luarei, Epuraim kakanike nakoteten mama ejai akan nakokediany naka Isirael, ka Manese da kakanike nakokediany, mama ejai akan nakoteten naka Isirael, kisukunyik mama ejai."
Genesis48:14 Korio Isirael akekan nakoteten, kidokok akou naka Epuraim, ŋes lodidi, ka akekan nakokediany akou naka Manase, kepelet ailokonyikin akekanin; naarai kerai Manase ekiyai."
Genesis48:15 Kilipak Yosep arereŋ, kobala ebe, “Edeke loalosenenete lukapapaaka Aburaam ka Isaak kakonyeneke, Edeke loketanyamenenei apaarasiaka kere aitodol lolo,"
Genesis48:16 Emalaika lokalakuni karonis kere, koinak itelepai arereŋ; ekakiror da kolimitere kes, ka ikiroria luka lukapapaaka Aburaam ka Isaak; ido koluoros etuŋat loepol kokidin akwap.”"
Genesis48:17 Keanyu Yosep papake ibwaikini akekan nakoteten akou naka Epuraim kokadak: kodak akan naka papake alemun kakou naka Epuraim aidokokin akou naka Manase.
Genesis48:18 Kotema Yosep papake atiar, “Mam, papa; naarai ŋol ŋes ekiyai, kidokok akanikon nakoteten akouke.”"
Genesis48:19 Kogiri papake kobala ebe, “Ajeni, oko kuka, ajeni: ŋes da eluori ateker, eluori ŋesi da lokapolon; konye onaceke lodidi ŋes itelekari kapolou, eraun da aurike atekerin nuipu.”"
Genesis48:20 Kilipak arereŋ kapaaran kaŋin, kobala ebe, “Kamakon ŋes ilipenena Isirael arereŋ; ebe, ‘Edeke kituluo kwape Epuraim ka Manase.’’’ Kibwaik Epuraim ageikin Manase."
Genesis48:21 Kotema Isirael Yosep atiar, “Koany, atwani; konye eiaenena Edeke kayes, kinyakari bobo akwap naka lukapapaakus."
Genesis48:22 Ido kainak ewai ediopet aitelekar iinacanakon, naalemuni kakan naka Emorait kekakilen ka akakabwa.”"
Genesis49:1 Konyarau Yakob odweke, kotema kes atiar: “Kotukonokinos nepepe kalimokis nukidoikinete yes kapaarasia nuepote."
Genesis49:2 Kotukonokinos bonik, kiirasi, yes odwe luka Yakob: Kopupokisi Isirael papakus."
Genesis49:3 Reuben, irai ijo ekiyaika, akagogoŋ, ka ageunet naka akagogoŋ; Loitelekarit kapolou, ido loitelekarit kagogon."
Genesis49:4 Ilelei bala akipi, kikurwokini aitelekar; Naarai ibu kodoka oitada loka papakon: Kosodi komunau; abu kolot aperitika."
Genesis49:5 Simeon ka Lebi kes iinacan; Lujiis luka adedeŋ kes ikecekileŋa.
Genesis49:6 Wu ekatau, sirikiloma mama ejai ainerunikec; Akaibuses, mam imorikikin mama ejai atukokinikec; Naarai kanuka anyunyurakec apotu koarata etuŋanan, Kanuka elepakec da apotu kojepata emoŋ."
Genesis49:7 Kikenokinai akecenyunyura, naarai kepol; Ka aisiopokec, naarai kerai naka ameŋeranut: Atiakari kes kotoma Yakob, Ido esiarakini kes koIsirael."
Genesis49:8 Yuda, kiturenenete jo ikoniinacan: Akonikan ejaun omurisina luka lukasurupokon: Ekukonokinos odwe luka papakon kakonyenekon,"
Genesis49:9 Yuda ŋes okoku loka eŋatuny: Okokuka, idoka anyoun kama kalumeian; Abu kokukum, kidipidipakin bala eŋatuny, Ido bala aŋatuny: iŋai itonyouni ŋes?"
Genesis49:10 Mam ebela loka ajakanut enyouni koYuda, Karaida ebela loka ekayaiton kokidin kakeieneke, Aitodol neebunio Silo. Ido erimarete ŋes ituŋa."
Genesis49:11 Eenikini ikoku yenika ebalasitike omusabibu, Ikoku yenika asigiriake omusabibu loejok; Abu kilosia ebino ikegoen, Ka aokot da nuka emusabibu abu kilosia anapitoke:"
Genesis49:12 Ereneunete akonyeneke kanuka ebino, Ekwanunete ikekela da kanuka akile."
Genesis49:13 Sebulun iboienenei kodoket loka aŋolol: Korai edoket kanuka imerin; Eikoruke da ŋes Sidon.
Genesis49:14 Isakar ŋes asigma nakagogon; Naidipidipitoi kokidin kauioi nuka amerekekin;
Genesis49:15 Koany ŋesi aibois naka aibworar ebe ejok, Ka akwap da ebe erai naisiyalamikinit; Kokukum aidak kokeperike, Korau ebulesit lokeswaman nukailolitoi."
Genesis49:16 Dan etubonokini iketuŋa, Kwape ediopet loka atekerin nuka Isirael."
Genesis49:17 Dan eraun emun korot, Asigirikoloŋ kotoma osokot, Naekonyi atitiban nuka ebalasit, Kolatun loibwanenit kau."
Genesis49:18 Edarit akoniitajar, wu EJAKAIT."
Genesis49:19 Gad, icikakinete ikaŋatak lueŋasete; Konye ŋes da icikakini akecetitibat."
Genesis49:20 Aser, eburior akeimuj kotomake, Einakini idiasio luibusakinito ekabaka."
Genesis49:21 Naputali ŋes amori naelapadai; Einakini akiro nukajijimak.
Genesis49:22 Yosep ŋes atenu naerai, Atenu naerai eapie kaleles; Ilanyito atenunake arwatat."
Genesis49:23 Eticanata ikagumak ŋes noi, Egumete ŋes, imanito ŋes:"
Genesis49:24 Konye kicat akekabwa kagogoŋ, Kitogogoŋai akekanin, Kakanin nuka Ekagogoŋon loka Yakob. (Kanen ŋes Ekecokon, amoru naka Isirael,)"
Genesis49:25 Kanuka Edeke loka papakon, lokiŋarakini, Ido kanuka Lokapedor kere, lokisirereŋi, Arereŋesio nuepote kakuj nakokuju, Arereŋesio da nuepote kaidules naka akwap, Arereŋesio da nukokisin, ka nuka akoik."
Genesis49:26 Arereŋesio da nuka papakon Etelekasi cut arereŋesio nuka lukapapaaka Anatar eikoru lokosaŋe loka iukon lumam edaunos: Ebeete akou naka Yosep, Ido osiaduk loka akou naka ŋol kaloetiakunitai koinacanake."
Genesis49:27 Benyamin ŋes epeet loegwaragwarai; Tupuruc enyamenenei lumejauna, Eboŋ da ekorenenei luŋatuna.”"
Genesis49:28 Ŋun kere kes atekerin atomon ka nuarei nuka Isirael: ŋun da kes nuabu papakec kolimonok kes ilipakini arereŋ; abu kilipak ŋolituŋanan kwape ajaar akerereŋ.
Genesis49:29 Kicorak kes kotema atiar, “Kayaŋaario neejaas ikatuŋa: kidaikis eoŋ neidaikinitai lukapapaaka toma abua naejai omanikor loka Epuron Ekitit,"
Genesis49:30 Toma abua naejai omanikor loka Makupela, loitei Mamure kakwap nako Kanaan, naabu Aburaam kogwel ka emanikor da kaneejai Epuron Ekitit araun airumet nakidaanakina:"
Genesis49:31 Ŋes neaponi kidaikinai Aburaam ka Sara akebcru; ŋina da edaikinio Isaak ka Rebeka akeberu; ŋipoŋina da abu kedaik Lea:
Genesis49:32 Emanikor ka abua naejai toma, loagwelio kaneejaas idwe luka Ket.”"
Genesis49:33 Kedau Yakob aicor odweke, kosukok akekejen koitada, kojal aijar, koyaŋaarai mama ejaas iketuŋa."
Genesis50:1 Kibirokin Yosep akonyen nuka papake komony, konu."
Genesis50:2 Kicorak Yosep ikebulesin luaraas imurwok aitoono papake: kitoonoto imurwok Isirael.
Genesis50:3 Kodautu apaarasia akaisaoŋon itoonete; naarai kwape kwaŋin apaarasia nuka aitoon etia nepenen: kibworoto Imisirian ŋes adaun apaarasia akais akanykaarei.
Genesis50:4 Kosodi kedaunos apaarasia nuka aibworo ŋes, kotema Yosep ituŋa luka etogo loka Parao atiar, “Arai adumunit asianut kakonyenekus, keŋaiŋaitos, kinerata kaki nuka Parao atiar,"
Genesis50:5 Abu papaka kesiyap eoŋ ebe, ‘Koany, atwani: toma ates naabu eoŋ elopet kabok toma akwap nako Kanaan ŋes kidaikini.’ Aso, keŋaiŋait, kalot keda papaka ido aboŋuni.”"
Genesis50:6 Kobala Parao ebe, “Kolot kida papakon kwape kisiyapoo kolo.”"
Genesis50:7 Kolot Yosep aida papake: koloto ikejaanakinak da kerc luka Parao nepepe kaŋes, imakio lukotogoke, ka imakio da luka akwap nako Misiri,"
Genesis50:8 Ekal da kere loka Yosep, iinacanake da, ka ekal da loka papake: nabarai ikecedwe ludidik, ka isipaninikec luka amerekekin ka luka aituk, ŋul bonik apotu kesi kinyeis kotoma akwap nako Gosen."
Genesis50:9 Kolot ŋesi nepepe kagalin ka luebwanenito ibalasin: koraun erioŋet loepol noi.
Genesis50:10 Kodoloto opejal loka Atad, loejai okekwa loka Yorodan, kokuudianata kaŋina akuudian naepol noi: kodau apaarasia akanykaarei ibworo papake."
Genesis50:11 Nakiirasi ŋul lueboienenete kotoma akwap, kes Ikanaanin, aibworo kopejal loka Atad, kobalas ebe, “Epol ca ma aibworo na kama ejaas Imisirian.” Ŋes emaikinere ekekiror Abel-Misiraim, naejai okekwa loka Yorodan."
Genesis50:12 Kosubakis ŋes odweke kwape kolo ecorakinia kes:
Genesis50:13 Naarai apotu odweke kodakasi ŋes toma akwap nako Kanaan, kidaikis toma abua nakotoma emanikor loka Makupela, loitei Mamure, naagweli Aburaam nepepe kemanikor da, araun airumet nakidaanakina, kama ejai Epuron Ekitit."
Genesis50:14 Koboŋo Yosep Misiri, ŋes ka ikeinacan, kere da lualosito kaŋes aida papake; kedau ŋesi aida papake."
Genesis50:15 Keanyutu iinacan luka Yosep ebe atwana papakec, kobalas ebe, “Elemuni kilai Yosep oni, ka aitokokol da oni cut kanuka aronisio kere nukolo kiswamanakini oni ŋes.”"
Genesis50:16 Kiyakikis Yosep, kobalas ebe, “Abu papakon kicorak eroko ketwana ebe,"
Genesis50:17 ‘Ilimokinete do Yosep ebe, Keŋaiŋait, kitim adiakaret naka ikoniinacan, ka aronisikec da, naarai apotu kesi kiswamakis jo nueroko.’ Natikwana da, kiŋaiŋait isio jo, kitim adiakaret naka ibulesin luka Edeke loka papakon.” Komony Yosep naeneratatar kaŋes."
Genesis50:18 Apotu ikeinacan koloto kokukonokinos kakonyeneke; kobalas ebe, “Koany, kirai isio ikonibulesin.”"
Genesis50:19 Kotema Yosep kes atiar, “Sirikikuriakata: ajai do eoŋ toma aibois naka Edeke?"
Genesis50:20 Ipeleikinito yesi aiswamakin eoŋ aronis; konye Edeke epeleikinit aiswamakinia eoŋ ajokis, ka aitodol, kwape ejaar lolo, aitajar ituŋa luipu kinyeis atwakare."
Genesis50:21 Aso natikwana sirikikuriakaros; ketanenenei yes ka ikusidwe da ludidik.” Kitalaka kes, kolimonok nuka asianut."
Genesis50:22 Kiboikin Yosep Misiri, ŋes ka ekal da loka papake; kobut Yosep ikar akwatat ka itomon."
Genesis50:23 Koany Yosep idwe luka Epuraim ka ipapai da; ido aurio idwe luka Makir okoku loka Manase kakuŋin nuka Yosep.
Genesis50:24 Kolimok Yosep ikeinacan ebe, “Atwani: konye mam ekurwokini Edeke aanyanar yes, alemar yes kakwap kana, kinyakari da akwap naeyapoikinit ŋesi Aburaam, ka Isaak, ka Yakob.”"
Genesis50:25 Kisiyapo Yosep idwe luka Isirael kobala ebe, “Mam ekurwokini Edeke aanyanar yes, iyaŋaarete da akakojo alemar kakwap kana.”"
Genesis50:26 Kotwana do Yosep, kodaunite ikar akwatat ka itomon: kitoonoi, kosodete aibwaikin toma asaduku nakidais koMisiri."
Exodus1:1 Lu kes ikiroria luka odwe luka Isiraelluadolete Misiri; kolot ŋinituŋanan ka ekaleke nepepe ka Yakob.
Exodus1:2 Reubcn, ka Simeon, ka Lebi, ka Yuda;"
Exodus1:3 Isakar, ka Sebulun, ka Benyamin;"
Exodus1:4 Dan ka Naputali, ka Gad ka Aser."
Exodus1:5 Ituŋa kere lualomunete kakuan naka Yakob emwaasi ituŋa akaisakanykaarei; konye kojai Yosep Misiri sek.
Exodus1:6 Kotwana Yosep, ka ikeinacan kere, ka atur ŋin kere."
Exodus1:7 Kouriaros idwe luka Isirael, kiyatakinos noi, kipuaros, koraunos lukagogoŋok noi; kilelebunos akwap."
Exodus1:8 Kosodi kirum ekabaka ece Misiri, lomam ajeni Yosep."
Exodus1:9 Kotema iketuŋa atiar, “Koany, ipuituŋa luka idwe luka Isirael luegogoŋ aitelekarit oni;"
Exodus1:10 Aso katubokisi acoa; kinyeis aipuar, tetere arai kebu ejie, kinyeis aimorikikin kalukasurupowok aitiji oni, kosodete anyoun kakwap.”"
Exodus1:11 Kanuka ŋun kibwaikinai iketwasamak aitican kes kabwokonikec. Kodukokis Parao ireria luka aiŋadisia, Pitom ka Raamuscs."
Exodus1:12 Konye kwape eyatakiniata aitican, kiyatas kesi da kwape kwaŋin aipuar kaisiarakin. Kokadakis kes kanuka idwe luka Isirael."
Exodus1:13 Kitwasamata Imisirian idwe luka Isirael kagogoŋ;
Exodus1:14 Koroikis aijarakec kotoma obulesene loetiono, aitaaritoi naka elupe ka amatapalin, ka ebulesene kere loka amanat, ebulesene kere loetwasamata kagogoŋ."
Exodus1:15 Kotema ckabaka loka Misiri akesidok Nuburanian, ekiror loka adiopet Sipira, ekiror loka nakiareit Pua:"
Exodus1:16 Kotema atiar, “Naisidoenenoto aŋor Nuburanian, kianyutu idounete; arai erai ikoku yenitelepat, iarete; konye arai erai yenipese, ejari.”"
Exodus1:17 Konye koyoŋa akesidok Edcke, mam apotu kiswamata kwape kicorakinitor kes ekabaka loka Misiri, konye apotu kesi kinyaanakis idwe lutelepai ejarete."
Exodus1:18 Konyarau ekabaka loka Misiri akesidok, kobala kes atiar, “Kanukinyo iswamaata akirot ŋin, ainyein idwe lutelepai ejarete?”"
Exodus1:19 Kobalas akesidok Parao atiar, “Naarai aŋor Nuburanian mam esubito bala aŋor Numisirian; naarai eŋaleete, idounete eroko akesidok kepona mamakec.”"
Exodus1:20 Kosubak Edeke akesidok ejok; kiyatakinos ituŋa aipuar, koraut lukagogoŋok noi."
Exodus1:21 Kosodi naarai ayoŋito akesidok Edeke, abu koinak kes ikalia."
Exodus1:22 Kicorak Parao ituŋake kere kobala atiar, “Ŋolitelepat loeurunio ieakakinete ocor, konyc napese, inyeinete ejari.”"
Exodus2:1 Kosodi kolot etuŋanan lokokek loka Lebi komany akoku naka Lebi.
Exodus2:2 Kopotuu aberu, kouru ikoku yenitelepat: konye keanyu ebe ejokuna, kibwa ber ŋes ilapio iuni."
Exodus2:3 Kosodi keanyu ebc mam epedori aibwait bobo, koyaŋa eijaŋ loka aladoi, kinyonyo erit ka emina, kibwaik ikoku toma, kibwaik okido ariri naka ecor."
Exodus2:4 Kobwoi kinacike kaneelwana, ajenun nuedoikinete ŋes."
Exodus2:5 Kolot akoku naka Parao ailoŋ ocor; koloto apesuruke ariri naka ecor; koany eijaŋ kokido, kijukak akebulesit alemun."
Exodus2:6 Kopuko, koany ikoku; ido ko any, komony ikoku. Kitim, kobala ebe, “Yen ŋes idiopet kodwe luka Iburanian.”"
Exodus2:7 Kosodi kinacike kotema akoku naka Parao ebe, “Alosi ca kanyarak jo aketanakan kaŋor nuka Iburanian kitanakik ikoku?”"
Exodus2:8 Kotema akoku naka Parao atiar, “Kolot.” Kolot apese konyarau toto naka ikoku alopet."
Exodus2:9 Kotema akoku naka Parao atiar, “Koyaŋa ikoku yen kitanakik, eoŋ da kainakini jo eropitikon.” Koyaŋa aberu ikoku, kitanak."
Exodus2:10 Kopoloor ikoku, koinu akoku naka Parao, koluor ikekoku. Komaik ekekiror Musa, koba la ebe, “Naarai alemuni kakipi.”"
Exodus2:11 Kosodi kapaarasia kaŋun, kedau Musa apoloor, kolot mama ejaas ikeinaean, koany abwokonikec: koany Emisiriat eseni Eburaniat, ediopet koinaeanake."
Exodus2:12 Koŋoleŋol epuwai ka epuwai, koany ebe emamei icliotuŋanan, kosen Emisiriat, konukak asiŋe."
Exodus2:13 Kosodi kolot kapaaran nakiareit, ido koany, ajios ituŋa iarei luka Iburanian: kotema ŋesi je loasubit erono ebe, “Kanukinyo isenio yenicekon?”"
Exodus2:14 Kobala ebe, “Iŋai bo kitarauni jo ekosikapolon ekatubonikosi da? Ikoto kereka aiar eoŋ da kwape iaria Emisiriat?” Koyoŋ Musa, kobala ebe, “Abelt ajenun akirot ŋin.”"
Exodus2:15 Kosodi kiira Parao akiro ŋun, kokoto aiar Musa. Konye koker Musa kakonyen nuka Parao, kiboikin akwap naka Midian: kiboikin eiduny katan."
Exodus2:16 Ajaas esasedoti loka Midian adweke akanykaarei; kopotu aiwok akipi, kilelebata atuba, kiruata amerekekin nuka papakec."
Exodus2:17 Kopotu ikeeokok kireŋeasi: konye konyou Musa kiŋarak, kiru esipanikec."
Exodus2:18 Kepotu mama ejai papakec Reuel, kobala ebe, “Ipotu ca yesi lolo atipet?”"
Exodus2:19 Kobalas ebe, “Emisiriat ŋes kiyuuni sio kakanin nuka ikecokok, bobo da abu kowokok sio akipi, kiru esipan.”"
Exodus2:20 Kotema adweke ebe, “Ejai bai? Kanukinyo kinyeiniata etuŋanan uŋol? Konyarautu konyam inyamat.”"
Exodus2:21 Kiyu Musa aiboi ketuŋanan kaŋol: kokorak Musa akokuke Sipora.
Exodus2:22 Kouru ikoku yenitelepat, komaik ekekiror Geresom: naarai kobala ebe, “Arai epejonon kakwap naka imo.”"
Exodus2:23 Kosodi kapaarasia kaŋun nuipu, kotwana ekabaka loka Misiri: kidinyas idwe luka Isirael kanuka ebulesenekec, komonyata, kodol aimonyokec neejai Edeke kanuka ebulesenekec."
Exodus2:24 Kopup Edeke eidinyakec, kiitu Edeke aitutuketeke naetutukit kAburaam, ka Isaak, ka Yakob."
Exodus2:25 Koany Edeke idwe luka Isirael, kojen Edeke nukec."
Exodus3:1 Ecokie Musa esipan loka ekamuranike Yetero, esasedoti loka Midian: komea esipan kau kamodiŋ, kodol moru loka Edeke, Koreb."
Exodus3:2 Kitaanyikin emalaika loka EJAKAIT Uŋes, kotoma aŋajep naka akim kokidiŋ kekiot: kosesen, ido koany, anoki akim kokiot, komam ekiot idopori."
Exodus3:3 Kobala Musa ebe, “Kamana ber, kaany akirot na naepol, namam ekiot idoporia.”"
Exodus3:4 Keanyu EJAKAIT ŋes emanuni aanyun, konyarau Edeke Uŋes kokidiŋ okiot kiner ebe, “Musa, Musa.” Kii ebe, “Eoŋ lo.”"
Exodus3:5 Kobala ebe, “Sirikikuny ne: kolaca akonimuk kakejenekon, naarai aibois naibwoia erai akwap nakalaunan.”"
Exodus3:6 Kiner bobo ebe, “Eoŋ Edeke loka papakon, Edeke loka Aburaam, Edeke loka Isaak, Edeke loka Yakob da.” Kibwa Musa akekonyen; naarai abu koyoŋ asesen Edeke."
Exodus3:7 Kiner EJAKAIT ebe, “Aany eut aiticanio naka ikatuŋa luejaas Misiri, eira akeceimony kanuka ŋul kaluitwasamacte kes; naarai ajeni ikececan:"
Exodus3:8 Adokunit ayuun kes kakan naka Imisirian, aitonyoun kes kakwap kaŋin aitolomar akwap naejok, naelal, akwap naeleleete akile ka esik; aibois naka Ekanaanit, ka Ekitit, ka Emorait, ka Eperisit, ka Ekibit, ka Eyebusit."
Exodus3:9 Aso koany, kadoloki aimony naka idwe luka Isirael: bobo da aany aroikinit naeroikinitotor Imisirian kes."
Exodus3:10 Bia do, keyakia neejai Parao, kitolom ikatuŋa idwe luka Isirael koMisiri.”"
Exodus3:11 Kobala Musa Edeke ebe, “Iŋai bo eoŋ, loalosi neejai Parao? aitolomun idwe luka Isirael koMisiri?’’"
Exodus3:12 Kotema atiar, “Abeit ajaenena Eoŋ kajo; ido na ŋes aanyunce nakitejenuni jo ebe Eoŋ keyakiarit: naidaunia aitolomun ituŋa ŋul koMisiri, ijaanakinete Edeke komoru kalo.”"
Exodus3:13 Kotema Musa Edeke ebe, “Koany, naadolokinio eoŋoŋ idwe luka Isirael, kalimokin kes ebe, ‘Edeke loka lukapapaakus ŋes keyakunit mama ijaas yesi’; kes da keŋisete eoŋ ebe, ‘Ekekiror iŋai?’ alimokini kes biai?”"
Exodus3:14 Kobala Edeke Musa ebe, “AJAI KWAPE AJAAR.” Kobala ebe, “Ilimokini idwe luka Isirael ebe, ‘AJAI ŋes keyakunit mama ijaas.’’’"
Exodus3:15 Kobala Edeke Musa ebe, “Ilimokini idwe luka Isirael ebe, ‘EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakus, Edeke loka Aburaam, Edeke loka Isaak, Edeke loka Yakob da, ŋes keyakunit mamakus’: ŋol ŋes ekakiror ikar kere, ŋin da ŋes aiituneteka anatar aturio kere."
Exodus3:16 Kolot, kotukonok imakio luka Isirael nepepe, kolimok kes ebe, ‘EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakus, Edeke loka Aburaam, loka Isaak, loka Yakob da, ŋes abu ketaanyikinkobalaebe,” Abeit kaanyana yes, aany nukiswamanakinio koMisiri:"
Exodus3:17 ŋes abalar atiar, Ketolomuni yes kaiticanio naka Misiri alomar akwap naka Ekanaanit, ka Ekitit, ka Emorait, ka Eperisit, ka Ekibit, ka Eyebusit, akwap naeleleete akile ka esik.’”"
Exodus3:18 Iirarete ekoniporoto: ibuni ijo ka imakio luka Isirael, mama ejai ekabaka loka Misiri ilimokinete ebe, ‘Abu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Iburanian keriamunos kasio; asa keŋaiŋait, kisiikinai kaloto alosit naka apaarasia auni toma amodiŋ; ainakin asuban neejai EJAKAIT Ekosideke.’"
Exodus3:19 Ajeni kojokan ebe, mam ekabaka loka Misiri kisiikini yes alosit, eebo, karaida kakan nakagogoŋ."
Exodus3:20 Ariori eoŋ da akakan, kasodi aidany Misiri kere kaumokinetaka kere nueswamai kokidiŋikec: kokau kaŋun kisiikini yes alosit."
Exodus3:21 Ido ainilini ituŋa ŋul aminunio kakonyen nuka Imisirian: asa nainyounioto, mam inyounete atitai:"
Exodus3:22 Konye ilipi ŋiniberu akeidunyet, ka ŋin da naiboie kotogoke, iboro luka epuesa ka iboro luka esabu, ka igoen: isirete ikusidwe lusap ka lupesur; ido iŋasete Imisirian.”"
Exodus4:1 Koboŋok Musa atiar, “Konye, koany, mam keyuunete eoŋ karaida akiirar ekaporoto: naarai etemarete atiar, ‘Mam EJAKAIT kitaanyikina jo.’’’"
Exodus4:2 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Inyo bo ŋin ejai akanikon? “Kotema atiar, “Ebela.”"
Exodus4:3 Kotema atiar, “Kocakak kwap.” Kocakak kwap, koluor ebela emun; koker Musa kamake."
Exodus4:4 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Korio akonikan, kitiŋ ekekori”: (korio akekan, kitiŋ, koraun emun ebela kakanike:)"
Exodus4:5 “Tetere iyuunete ebe, abu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakec, Edeke loka Aburaam, Edeke loka Isaak, Edeke loka Yakob, kitaanyikin jo.”"
Exodus4:6 Kotema EJAKAIT bobo atiar, “Kipiik akonikan atorobukon.” Kipiik akekan atorobuke: konye elemari, koany, ebokoror akekan atapon."
Exodus4:7 Kobala ebe, “Kinyakak akonikan atorobukon.” (Kinyakak akekan atorobuke; konye elemari katorobuke, koputokinos kakuanake kere.)"
Exodus4:8 “Kosodi kanen, arai mam kes kiyuunete jo karaida akiirar eporoto loka aanyunet nasodit, iyuunete ke si eporoto loka aanyunet nakiareit."
Exodus4:9 Kosodi arai mam iyuunete aanyuneta ŋun nuarei, karaida akiirar eporotokon, iwokuni akipi nukocor kobukok neconit: akipi nuiwokuni kocor eluoros aokot kaneeonit.”"
Exodus4:10 Kotema Musa EJAKAIT atiar, “Wu EJAKAIT, mere eoŋ ojijimikiro, karaida mam enerana, elaŋir da aŋajepeka.”"
Exodus4:11 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Iŋai kesubi aituk naka ituŋanan? arai iŋai itababaŋi ituŋanan, arai aisikimiŋ, arai aitwekenyun arai aitumudak? mere Eoŋ EJAKAIT?"
Exodus4:12 Aso do kolot, ajaenena eoŋ kakoniituk, kesisianakini nuinera.”"
Exodus4:13 Kotema atiar, “Wu EJAKAIT, keŋaiŋait, kijuka ŋol loikoto aijukar.”"
Exodus4:14 Kinep anyunyura naka Edeke aluikin Musa, kiner atiar, “Emamei Aaron onacekon Elebit? Ajeni ebe epedori ener ejok. Ido koany, ebunit airiamun kajo; kiiany jo iyalamikin kotauke."
Exodus4:15 Ineri ijo kaŋes, ipiikini da akiro aitukuke: eoŋ da ajaenena kakoniituk, ka akeituk, kesisianakinete nuiswamaete."
Exodus4:16 Eraun ŋesi ekeneranikon kama ejaas ituŋa; kosodi eraun ŋesi akoniituk, iraun ijo da kamake kwape Edeke."
Exodus4:17 Itiŋi ijo ebela lo kakanikon, aiswamaa aanyuneta.”"
Exodus4:18 Kolot Musa koboŋo mama ejai Yetero ekamuranike, kotema atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, kisiikinai kalot, kaboŋo mama ejaas ikainacan luejaas Misiri, kaany arai eriŋa ejarete.” Kotema Yetero Musa atiar, “Kolot kainapakin.”"
Exodus4:19 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa koMidian atiar, “Kolot, koboŋo Misiri: naarai atwaka ituŋa kere luakotosi aiar jo.”"
Exodus4:20 Koya Musa akeberu ka odweke, kisibwanen kes asigiria, koboŋo akwap nako Misiri: koya Musa ebela loka Edeke kakanike."
Exodus4:21 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Naiboŋoria Misiri, ibusakinit kiswama kakonyen nuka Parao nukaumokin kere nuepiik akanikon; konye etogogoŋi eketau, mam isiikini ituŋa alosit."
Exodus4:22 Ilimokini Parao atiar, ‘lnera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Isirael ŋes okokuka, ekiyaika."
Exodus4:23 Katema eoŋ jo atiar, “Kisiik okokuka alosit kejaanak eoŋ.” Igir ijo aisiikin ŋes alosit; koany, aari okokukon, ekiyaikon.’”"
Exodus4:24 Kosodi eroko ejaas orot neaperete, kiriamunos EJAKAIT kaŋes kokoto aiar."
Exodus4:25 Kosodi Sipora alemun amoru naekwana kotubunio amuny naka ekiliokane loka okokuke, kocakak akejen nuka Musa; kotema atiar, “Abeit irai ijo eteran loka aokot kamakaŋ.”"
Exodus4:26 Kinyek do ŋes. Kosodi nm atemar ebe, “Irai eteran loka aokot,” kanuka akepio."
Exodus4:27 Kotema Edeke Aaron atiar, “Kolot modin kiriamunos ka Musa.” Kolot, kiriamunos kaŋes moru loka Edeke, konu."
Exodus4:28 Kolimok Musa Aaron akiro kere nuka EJAKAIT nuejukaritor, ka aanyuneta kere nuecorakinit."
Exodus4:29 Koloto Musa ka Aaron kotukonokisi imakio kere luka idwe luka Isirael;
Exodus4:30 Kiner Aaron akiro ke re nualimokinit Edeke Musa, kiswama aanyuneta kakonyen nuka ituŋa."
Exodus4:31 Kiyuut ituŋa: kiirasi ebe aanyana EJAKAIT idwe luka Isirael, aanyu da aiticaniokec, kituluro akwesikec, komaata."
Exodus5:1 Kosodi kokau kopotu Musa ka Aaron, kotemasi Parao atiar, “Inera EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lsirael kwanata ebe, ‘Kisiik ikatuŋa alosit, tetere kepoikinete eoŋ epucit kamodiŋ.’’’"
Exodus5:2 Kiner Parao ebe, “Iŋai bo EJAKAIT? Tape eoŋ apupuni ekeporoto, kasodi aisiikin Isirael alosit? Mam eoŋ ajeni EJAKAIT, ido bobo mam esiikini lsirael alosit.”"
Exodus5:3 Kotemasi ebe, “Abu Edeke loka lburanian kiriamun kasio: kinainait, kisiik sio kaloto alosit naka apaarasia auni toma amodiŋ, kainakisi asuban mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekosideke; kinyek aidany sio katular, arai kekilen.”"
Exodus5:4 Kotema ekabaka loka Misiri kes atiar, “Ŋo Musa, ka Aaron kanukinyo isinyeiniata ituŋa aswamisiokec? koloto neejai abwokonikus.”"
Exodus5:5 Kiner Parao ebe, “Koany, epuata kwana ituŋa lukotoma akwap, yes da isiyenut kes kotoma abwokonikec.”"
Exodus5:6 Kapaaran kaŋin abu Parao kicorak iketwasamak ituŋa ka ijakakec da ebe,"
Exodus5:7 “Mam bobo iinanakinete ituŋa anya nusubet amatapalin kwape lem sek; koloto kesi kotukonokis anya kanukec.
Exodus5:8 Etiai da loka amatapalin, lopelem iswamaenenete kesi, ŋopenol ŋes itubokinete; sirikitidisiasi nepetai da: naarai elonwaaka; ŋes einakinit kes aimony ebe, ‘Kisiikinai kaloto kainakisi asuban mama ejai Ekosideke.’"
Exodus5:9 Kijaikisi do ituŋa aswam naetiono noi, kitaaritotor; kinyeis aipup akiro nuka aiŋal.”"
Exodus5:10 Kolomasi iketwasamak ituŋa ka ijakakec da, kolimokis ituŋa ebe, “Inera Parao kwanata ebe, ‘Mam kainakini yes anya."
Exodus5:11 Kolototo yesi ikulepek kotukonokis anya kaneidumakinete kere: naarai mam itidisiario akusiswam.’’’
Exodus5:12 Kanuka ŋun kisiarakinos ituŋa toma akwap kere nako Misiri atukonokin akasirim aitaraun anya.
Exodus5:13 Kisinyikokis luketwasamakakec ebe, “Kitodoloto aswamisiokus, ipelueik luka ninipaaran, kwape lem iswamaenenaata ejaas anya.”"
Exodus5:14 Koleata iketwasamak luka Parao ijaka luka idwe luka Isiraelluaseunito kesi, kobalas ebe, “Kanukinyo mam yes itodolitotor akusiswam bian ka lolo da, kotoma aisub amatapalin kwape lem sek?”"
Exodus5:15 Kosodi kopotu ijaka luka idwe luka Isirael, emonyete mama ejai Parao’ ebe, “Kanukinyo ikonakinia ikonibulesin kwaŋin?"
Exodus5:16 Mam einanakinio ikonibulesin anya, konye kibalai sio ebe, ‘Kosubata amatapalin’: ido koany, eleio ikonibulesin; kwabo erai aibucaret naka ikonituŋa obe.”"
Exodus5:17 Konye kotema ebe, “Iloŋwaaka, iloŋwaaka yesi: ŋes ineratar yesi ebe, ‘Kisiikinai kaloto ainakin asuban mama ejai EJAKAIT.’"
Exodus5:18 Koloto do aswam; naarai mam kiinakinio anya, konye isubete etiai loka amatapalin lopelem.”"
Exodus5:19 Koanyut iiaka luka idwe luka Isirael ebe ejaas kesi ocan naalimunenere ebe, “Mam inonooretc amatapalinikus, karaida ipelueikikus luka ninipaaran.’"
Exodus5:20 Kiriamunos kesi ka Musa ka Aaron, luabwoete korot, eboŋunete kesi kama ejai Parao."
Exodus5:21 Kolimokis kes ebe, “Kitei EJAKAIT yes, kotub da; naarai kisilaata yesi sio kakonyen nuka Parao, kakonyen da nuka ibulesinike, aibwaikin ekileŋ akaninikec aaria sio.”"
Exodus5:22 Koboŋo Musa mama ejai EJAKAIT, kotema atiar, “EJAKAIT, kanukinyo ikonakinia ituŋa lu erono? Kanukinyo da kiyakuunia eoŋ?"
Exodus5:23 Naarai ageun naabunio eoŋ neejai Parao eincr kokirorikon, ekonaki ŋesi ituŋa lu erono; kwabo mam ibu koyuu ikonituŋa nepetai da.”"
Exodus6:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Kwana ianyuni nueswamakini Parao: naarai kakan nakagogon isiikini kes alosit, kakan nakagogon da irenei kes kakwapuke.”"
Exodus6:2 Kotema Edeke Musa atiar,” Eoŋ YAWE:"
Exodus6:3 Abu ketaanyikin Aburaam, ka Isaak, ka Yakob, kwape Edeke Lokapedor kere, konye toma okirorika YAWE mam apotu kajenut eoŋ."
Exodus6:4 Etogogon da akaitutuket kakes, ainakin kes akwap naka Kanaan, akwap naka alositekec, naalosenenoto."
Exodus6:5 Ido eira eidiny loka idwe luka Isirael, luitubulesenito Imisirian; eitu akaitutuket."
Exodus6:6 Ŋes ilimokinia idwe luka Isirael ebe, ‘Eoŋ Yawe, ketolomunete kabwokon naka Imisirian kalemarete kobulesenekec, kalakunete kakan naerioro, ka itubesia luepolok:"
Exodus6:7 Ido kaseuni yes araun atcker mama ajai, eoŋ da araun Edeke kamakus: ijenunete yesi da ebe Eoŋ Yawe Ekusideke, loketolomuni yes kotoma abwokon naka Imisirian."
Exodus6:8 Ido ketolomarete toma akwap naabu kario akakan ainakin Aburaam, ka Isaak, ka Yakob; kainakinete yes airum: Eoŋ Yawe.’’’"
Exodus6:9 Kolimok Musa idwe luka Isirael kwaŋin; konye mam apotu kiirasi Musa kanuka ican luka itauon, ido kanuka cbulesene loededeŋ."
Exodus6:10 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Exodus6:11 “Koloma, kolimok Parao ekabaka loka Misiri kisiik idwe luka Isirael anyoun kakwapuke.”"
Exodus6:12 Kiner Musa kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kotema atiar, “Koany, mam idwe luka Isirael keirarito eoŋ; ikoni Parao keirari eoŋ ai, eoŋ lomam kakepitai aituk?”"
Exodus6:13 Kiner EJAKAIT ka Musa ka Aaron, kolimok akiro nuyaŋaara mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael, ido mama ejai Parao ekabaka loka Misiri, aitolomar idwe luka Isirael kakwap nako Misiri."
Exodus6:14 Lu kes lukapolok luka ikalia luka lukapapaakec: idwe luka Reuben ekiyai loka Isirael; Kanok, ka Palu, ka Kesuron, ka Karumi: nul kes ikekia luka Reuben."
Exodus6:15 Idwe luka Simeon: Yemuel, ka Yamin, ka Okad, ka Yakin, ka Sokar, ka Saul okoku loka aberu Akanaanit: ŋul kes ikekia luka Simeon."
Exodus6:16 Lu kes ikiroria luka idwe luka Lebi kwape eiaar aurikec; Gereson, ka Kokat, ka Merari; ikar da luka aijar naka Lebi emwaasi akwatat ka akaisauni ka lukanykaarei."
Exodus6:17 Idwe luka Gereson; Libuni ka Simei, kwape ejaatar ikekiakec."
Exodus6:18 Idwe luka Kokat; Amuram, ka Isikar, ka Keburon, ka Usiel; ikar da luka aijar naka Kokat emwaasi akwatat ka akaisauni ka luuni."
Exodus6:19 Idwe luka Merari; Mali, ka Musi: nul kes ikekia luka Ilebin kwape ejaar aurikec."
Exodus6:20 Komany Amuram Yokebed kinac naka papake; kourik ŋes Aaron ka Musa; ikar luka aijar naka Amuram emwaasi ikar akwatat ka akaisauni ka lukanykaarei.
Exodus6:21 Idwe luka Isikar; Kora ka Nepeg, ka Sikiri."
Exodus6:22 Idwe luka Usiel; Misael, ka Elasapan, ka Sitiri."
Exodus6:23 Komany Aaron Eliseba, akoku naka Aminadab, inac naka Nason; kowurik ŋes Nadab ka Abiku, ka Eleasar ka Itamar."
Exodus6:24 Idwe luka Kora; Asir ka Elukana, ka Abiasap; nul kes ikekia luka Ikorakin."
Exodus6:25 Komany Eleasar okoku loka Aaron adiopet kadwe nuka Putiel; kowurik ŋes Pinekas. Ŋul kes lukapolok luka ikalia luka lukapapaa luka Ilebin kwape ejaatar ikekiakec.
Exodus6:26 Ŋupenul kes Aaron ka Musa, lualimokinit EJAKAIT ebe, “Kitolomasi idwe luka Isirael kakwap nako Misiri kwape eiaar ajorekec.”"
Exodus6:27 Ŋul kes lualimokinete Parao eka baka loka Misiri, aitolomar idwe luka Isirael koMisiri: nul kes Musa ka Aaron,"
Exodus6:28 Kosodi kapaaran naeneratar EJAKAIT ka Musa kakwap nako Misiri,"
Exodus6:29 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Eoŋ EJAKAIT: kolimok Parao ekabaka loka Misiri kere nukalimokini jo.”"
Exodus6:30 Kotema Musa kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT atiar, “Koany, arai eoŋ loka aituk namam ekepitai, keirari Parao eoŋ biai?”"
Exodus7:1 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ebe, “Koany, ketuluo jo edeke mama ejai Parao; ido Aaron onacekon eraun ekoninabi."
Exodus7:2 Ineri ijo kere nukecorakini: elimokini onacekon Aaron Parao, tetere isiikini idwe luka Isirael anyoun kakwapuke."
Exodus7:3 Etogogoŋi eoŋ da etau loka Parao, eyatakini aanyunetaka ka nukaumokinika kakwap nako Misiri."
Exodus7:4 Konye mam Parao kiirari jo, ebwaikini eoŋ akakan Misiri, aitolomar akajoresio, ikatuŋa idwe luka Isirael, kakwap nako Misiri, aitolomar idwe luka Isirael kamakec."
Exodus7:5 Ejenunete Imisirian ebe Eoŋ EJAKAIT, naarioria akakan Misiri, aitolomar idwe luka Isirael kamakec.”"
Exodus7:6 Kiswamata Musa ka Aaron kwaŋin; kwape kicorakinia kes EJAKAIT, kiswamata kwaŋin,"
Exodus7:7 Korai Musa loka ikar akaisakanykauni, korai Aaron loka ikar akaisakanykauni ka luuni, inerasi kaParao."
Exodus7:8 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron ebe,"
Exodus7:9 “Kiilimok Parao yes ebe, ‘Kitodikinai nakaumokin’: ŋes konyet ilimokinia Aaron ebe, “Koyana ebelakon, kocakak akonyen nuka Parao, tetere eraun emun.’’’"
Exodus7:10 Kolomasi Musa ka Aaron mama ejai Parao, kiswamata kwaŋin kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT: kocakak Aaron ekebela akonyen nuka Parao, akonyen da nuka ikekejaanakinak, koluor emun."
Exodus7:11 Kosodi Parao da anyaraun lukacoa ka ikacudak; kes imurwok luka Misiri, kiswamata kesi da kwaŋin kakececoa nakaiyeiyea."
Exodus7:12 Naarai kocakak ninitunanan ekebela koluonoros imunwo: konye kilikono ebela loka Aaron ibelaikec.
Exodus7:13 Kogogonior etau loka Parao, komam iirari kes; kwape abalar EJAKAIT."
Exodus7:14 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ebe, “Eninik etau loka Parao, egirit aisiikin ituŋa alosit."
Exodus7:15 Kolot ijo mama ejai Parao tupuruc; ko any, elomuni alosit ocor; ibwoi ijo da kariri naka ecor airiamakin kaŋes; kitinite kakanikon ebela loaluoro emun."
Exodus7:16 Ilimokini ŋes ebe, ‘EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Iburanian, ŋes keyakunit mama ijai, ebe, “Kisiik ikatuŋa alosit, tetere kejaanakinete eoŋ kamodiŋ: ido koany, aitodol lolo mam ipupunit.”"
Exodus7:17 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Na ŋes ijenunia ebe Eoŋ EJAKAIT: koany, enomi kebelaka loetinit kakanika akipi nuejaas ocor, eluoros aokot."
Exodus7:18 Etwakete lukecor luejaas ocor, ebosuuni ecor; egirete Imisirian aimat akipiŋun.”"
Exodus7:19 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ebe, “Kolimok Aaron ebe, “Koyana ebelakon, korio akonikan akipi nuka Misiri, ocorinikec, ka alelesiakec, ka ataparinikec, ka abwalinikec kere nuka akipi, koluoros aokot; ejaunos aokot akwap kere nako Misiri, toma oborokec luka akito ka amotiikec nuka amor.’’’"
Exodus7:20 Kiswamata Musa ka Aaron kwaŋin kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT; kikeu ebela, kinom akipi nuka ecor, kakonyen nuka Parao, kakonyen da nuka ikekejaanakinak; akipi kere nuajaas ocor koluoros aokot."
Exodus7:21 Kotwakata lukecor; kobosuut akip, komam lmisirian apedorete aimat akipi nuka ecor; kojaut aokot akwap kere nako Misiri."
Exodus7:22 Kiswamata kwaŋin imurwok luka Misiri kotoma acoakec nakaiyeiyea; kogogoŋior etau loka Parao komam iirari kes; kwape abalar EJAKAIT.
Exodus7:23 Kibelokin Parao koloma togoke, komam ibwaikinit ŋun etau,"
Exodus7:24 Kobokata Imisirian kere ariri naka ecor kanuka akipi numatan naarai mam apedorete aimat akipi nuka ecor.
Exodus7:25 Kotuboros apaarasia akanykaarei, kedau EJAKAIT ainom ecor."
Exodus8:1 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ebc, “Koloma mama ejai Parao, kolimok ebe, ‘Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Kisiik ikatuŋa alosit, teterc kejaanakinete eoŋ."
Exodus8:2 Arai kigir ijo aisiikin kes alosit, koany, enomi iikorunokon kere kaidodokai:"
Exodus8:3 Ilweki ecor aidodokai, edokunete elomarete togokon, agolakon naiperi, aperitikon, otogoi da luka ikejaanakinakakon, otunakon, okialakon, amotiikon nukinyonis:"
Exodus8:4 Edokunete aidodokai mamakon, ido otunakon, kiton ikejaanakinakakon kere.”’”"
Exodus8:5 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Kolimok Aaron ebe, ‘Korio akonikan ka ekonibela ocorin, ka alelesia, ka ataparin da, kitodok aidodokai akwap nako Misiri.’’’"
Exodus8:6 Korio Aaron akekan akipi nuko Misiri; kodokut aidodokai korapata akwap nako Misiri.
Exodus8:7 Kiswamata imurwok da kwaŋin kotoma acoakec nakaiyeiyea, kitodokut aidodokai akwap nako Misiri."
Exodus8:8 Kosodi Parao anyaraun Musa ka Aaron, kiner ebe, “Kilipa EJAKAIT kolema aidodokai kamakaŋ ka ikatuŋa; esiikini ituŋa alosit, koinakis asuban mama ejai EJAKAIT.”"
Exodus8:9 Kobala Musa Parao ebe, “Ituror ijo eoŋ: wori bo kelipakinia jo ka ikonikejaanakinak kosodete aidodokai amudiario kamakon kotogoikon da, kosalakis ocor bon?”"
Exodus8:10 Kobala ebe, “Moi.” Kobala Musa ŋes ebe, “Kojau kwape eiaar akonikirot, tetere ijenuni ebe emamei yeneputosi ka EJAKAIT Edekekosi,"
Exodus8:11 Enyounete aidodokai kamakon ka otogoikon, ka mama kaikonikejaanakinak ka ikonituŋa; esalakinete oeor bon.”"
Exodus8:12 Konyout Musa ka Aaron kama ka Parao: komony Musa mama ejai EJAKAIT kanuka aidodokai nuainunit Parao.
Exodus8:13 Kosub EJAKAIT kwape ajaar akirot naka Musa; kotwakikis aidodokai otogoi, alaroi, ka amanat."
Exodus8:14 Kotukonoroi atukon: kouru akwap.
Exodus8:15 Konye keanyu Parao ebe ejai apak nakibworaret, kitogogon eketau, komam iirari kes; kwape abalar EJAKAIT."
Exodus8:16 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ebe, “Kolimok Aaron ebe, ‘Korio ekonibela kinom apua naka akwap, koluor ilac kakwap kere nako Misiri.’’’"
Exodus8:17 Kiswamata kwaŋin; korio Aaron akekan kekebela, kinom apua naka akwap, kojaut ilac otuŋa kotian da; apua kere naka akwap koluor ijae kakwap kere nako Misiri."
Exodus8:18 Kiswamata imurwok da kwaŋin kacoakec nakaiyeiyea tetere eyaunete ilac, konye mam apotu kopedosi; kojaut ilae otunanan kotian da."
Exodus8:19 Kosodi kolimokis imurwok Parao ebe, “Lo ŋes ebokorit loka Edeke.” Kitogogon Parao eketau, komam iirari kes; kwape abalar EJAKAIT."
Exodus8:20 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Konyou tupuruc sek kobwo kakonyen nuka Parao; koany, elomuni alosit akipi; kolimok ŋes ebe, ‘Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Kisiik ikatuŋa alosit, tetere kejaanakinete eoŋ."
Exodus8:21 Konye arai mam isiikini ikatuŋa alosit, koany, ejukuni icuc luipu noi mamakon, ka neejaas ikonikejaanakinak, ka neejaas ikonituŋa, toma otogoikon da: ilelebunos ieuc luipu noi otogoi luka Imisirian, akwap da naejaas."
Exodus8:22 Atiakuni da kapaaran kaŋin akwap nako Gosen, naiboioto ikatuŋa, kinyeis icuc luipu noi ajaut nina; tetere ijenuni ebe Eoŋ EJAKAIT loajai kidin kakwap,"
Exodus8:23 Ebwaikini atiaket kidin otunaka ka ituŋakon: ejaun aanyunet na moi.”
Exodus8:24 Kiswama EJAKAIT kwaŋin; kopotu atukon nuka icue luipu noi toma togo loka Parao, otogoi luka ikekejaanakinak da; kobosu akwap kere nako Misiri kanuka icuc luepu noi."
Exodus8:25 Kosodi Parao anyaraun Musa ka Aaron, kobala ebe, “Koloto yesi, koinakis Ekusideke asuban kotoma akwap.”"
Exodus8:26 Kotema Musa atiar, “Mam ibusakinit aswam kwaŋin; naarai kijaikini luitaleete Imisirian mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekosideke: koany, kiinakini kereka luitaleete Imisirian kakonyenekec, komam kibiribirete sio kamor?"
Exodus8:27 Kilosi alosit naka apaarasia auni modiŋ, ainakin asuban mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekosideke, kwape kicorakinia ŋesi sio.”"
Exodus8:28 Kotema Parao ebe, “Kesiikini yes alosit, ainakin EJAKAIT Ekusideke asuban kamodiŋ; konye mam ilosete neelwana: kilipakinai eoŋ.”"
Exodus8:29 Kotema Musa atiar, “Koany, alomari kaneijai, elipi EJAKAIT konyout ieuc moi kaneejai Parao, ka ikejaanakinakake, ka iketuŋa: konye kinyek Parao aiŋal bobo aiŋer aisiikin ituŋa alosit ainakin EJAKAIT asuban.”"
Exodus8:30 Konyou Musa kaneaiai Parao, kilip EJAKAIT."
Exodus8:31 Kiswama EJAKAIT kwape ajaar akirot naka Musa; kolema atukon nuka icue kaneejai Parao, ka ikekejaanakinak, ka iketuŋa da; mam abu kosal ediopet da."
Exodus8:32 Kitogogoŋ Parao eketau irwan nin da, mam abu kisiik ituŋa alosit."
Exodus9:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Koloma mama ejai Parao, kolimok ŋes ebe, ‘lnera EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Iburanian, kwanata ebe, “Kisiik ikatuŋa alosit, tetere kejaanakinete eoŋ,"

Exodus9:4 Etiakari EJAKAIT ibaren luka Isirael kobaren luka Misiri: emamei yenetwani koboro kere lueraas luka idwe luka lsirael.”
Exodus9:5 Koseu EJAKAIT apak kobala ebe, “Iswamai moi EJAKAIT akirot ŋin kakwap.”"
Exodus9:6 Kiswama EJAKAIT akirot ŋin tupuruc, kotwaka ibaren kere luko Misiri: konye emamei yenabu kotwana kobaren luka idwe luka lsirael."
Exodus9:7 Abu Parao kijuka, ido koany, komamei idioda yenatwanit kobaren luka lsiraelin. Konye koninikiar etau loka Parao, mam abu kisiik ituŋa alosit."

Exodus9:10 Komukut ekurwon koupa, kobwaata kakonyen nuka Parao; kiwela Musa ekurwon kuju; koraun adek naka abusion nuebulonoros araun ajimii kotuna ka itian da."
Exodus9:11 Kokurwokis imurwok aibwo kakonyen nuka Musa kanuka abusion: naarai adekas imurwok da abusi on, ka lmisirian kere."

Exodus9:14 Naarai irwan na ejukuni akatular kere otaukon, neeiaas ikonikejaanakinak kotunakon da; tetere ijenuni ebe emamei yenikiputor eoŋ kakwap kere,"
Exodus9:15 Naarai tiariorit akakan, aidany jo ka ikonituŋa katular, ti jo kimudiar kakwap:"

Exodus9:17 Aitodol kwana da ituro kereka ijo kotuŋaka ebe, mam isiikini kes alosit?"
Exodus9:18 Koany, moi kapak kana, etetcpi akako naededen noi, namam apeŋo ejauna Misiri ageun kapaaran naasubunere aitodol lolo."
Exodus9:19 Aso do kijuka, kisunya aitolomun ibarenekon ka lukon kere luijaas orony; naarai ninitunanan ka ŋolitiaŋ loedumakinio orony, mam eyaunitai ore, elei kes akako, etwakete.”"
Exodus9:20 Ŋin yen abu koyon akirot naka EJAKAIT kokejaanakinak luka Parao abu kitoloma ikekejaanakinak ka ibareneke otogoi.
Exodus9:21 Konye yenimam abu kopodokin akirot naka EJAKAIT abu kinyeik ikekejaanakinak ka ibareneke korony.
Exodus9:22 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Korio akonikan akuj, tetere etepi akako akwap kere nako Misiri, ituŋa ka itian, ka ninikiot yenika emanikor, kakwap kere nako Misiri.”"
Exodus9:23 Kosodi Musa arior ekebela akuj: kijuk EJAKAIT eires ka akako, kijesun akim akwap; kitetep EJAKAIT akako akwap nako Misiri."
Exodus9:24 Kojaun akako, kinyalakina akim kakako, kopol noi, namam apeŋo ejauna akwap nako Misiri kere ageun naaraunor ateker."
Exodus9:25 Konata akaka akwap nako Misiri elei ŋinibore kere yenajai orony, ituŋa ka itiaŋ da; kole akaka nclikiot lokorony, kobilibil ŋolikiroi lokorony."
Exodus9:26 Dimarai akwap nako Gosen bon, naajaas idwe luka Isirael, ŋes amamei akako."
Exodus9:27 Abu Parao kiyakia anyaraun Musa ka Aaron, kotema kes atiar, “Adiaka con irwan na: edolit EJAKAIT, konye eoŋ ka ikatuŋa kiroko."
Exodus9:28 Kilipa EJAKAIT: naarai apoloor eires ka akako, kesiikini eoŋ da yes alosit, mam bobo isalete.”"
Exodus9:29 Kotcma Musa ŋes atiar, “Kadau eoŋ alomar kore, ariori akakanin atipet mama ejai EJAKAIT: enaŋi eires, emameun bobo akako, tetere ijenuni ebe EJAKAIT ŋes elopet akwap."
Exodus9:30 Konye ijo ka ikonikejaanakinak, ajeni ebe mam iyonete EJAKAIT Edeke.”"
Exodus9:31 Koleai abira ka esairi: naarai asuri esairi epolimaete da abira.
Exodus9:32 Konye mam akima ka ekusemet aponi koleai: naarai mam alomunito.

Exodus10:2 Tetere ilimokini aki nuka okokukon, ka ikoku yenika ikokukon, akiro nueswamak eoŋ Misiri, ka aanyunetaka nueswama kamakec; tetere ijenunete ebe Eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
Exodus10:3 Kolomasi Musa ka Aaron mama ejai Parao, kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Inera EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Iburanian, kwanata ebe, ‘Itodoli ijo ai iŋerit anonokiar kakonyeneka? kisiik ikatuŋa alosit, tetere kejaanakinete eoŋ,"
Exodus10:4 Konye arai kiŋer aisiikin ikatuŋa alosit, koany, ayauni moi emaase oikorunokon:"
Exodus10:5 Erapiari akwap kere, komam yenepedori aanyun alup: enyamari luedeuna kotoma kaŋul kaluamudiario, lukideikinit jo akako, enyamari da ŋolikitoikon kere loepoloi korony."
Exodus10:6 Ilelebunos itogoikon, ka itogoi luka ikonikejaanakinak, ka itogoi luka lmisirian kere; namam lukapapakon karaida lukapapaakon aanyunito, ageun kapaaran naajaatar akwap aitodollolo.’’’ Kibelokin koloma kaneajai Parao."
Exodus10:7 Kotemasi ikejaanakinak luka Parao ŋes atiar, “ltodoli etuŋanan lo ai erai eic kamawok? kisiik ituŋa alosit, tetere ijaanakinete EJAKAIT Ekecedeke; eroko kereka ijo ejenuna ebe amudiar Misiri?”"
Exodus10:8 Koyaunai bobo Musa ka Aaron mama ejai Parao. Kotema kes atiar, “Koloto, kijaanakis EJAKAIT Ekusideke: konye lukanai luelosete?”"
Exodus10:9 Kotema Musa atiar, “Kilosi kaludidikikosi ka imakiokosi, ka idwekosi lusap ka lupesur, ka isipaninikosi luka amerekekin ka luka aituk kilosi isio; naarai kibusakinit aipoikin EJAKAIT epucit.”"
Exodus10:10 Kotema kes atiar, “Kojaun EJAKAIT kayes, kwape kesiikinia yes alosit, ka idwekus: kocoito; naarai ejai aronis akonyenekus."
Exodus10:11 Mere kwaŋin: koloto do yesi luiraasi ikiliok, kijaanakis EJAKAIT: naarai ŋun kes nuimielasi.” Kirenearai kes kakonyen nuka Parao."
Exodus10:12 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Korio akonikan akwap nako Misiri kanuka emaase, tetere ebuni akwap nako Misiri, anyamar nolikiot loka akwap, kes kere luabu akaka kideu.”"
Exodus10:13 Korio Musa ekebela akwap nako Misiri, kitukut EJAKAIT ekwam lokokide toma akwap apaaran ŋin kere, ka akuare kere; kiwala akwap koyau ekwam lokokide emaase."
Exodus10:14 Konata emaase akwap kere nako Misiri elosi, kodoo oikoruno kere luko Misiri; apolo noi emaase; mam apeŋo ejauna emaase loetia nen, karaida akauloke mam ejaun loetia nen."
Exodus10:15 Naarai abu korapia akwap kere, komusimusior akwap; kikoco nolikiot loka akwap ka araito kere naka ikito naedeunit akaka: komam itasali idiokiot kere, yenika ekitoi, arai yenika ikui lukorony, anatar akwap kere nako Misiri,"
Exodus10:16 Konyara Parao Musa ka Aaron atipet; kotema atiar, “Adiaka kama ejai EJAKAIT Ekusideke, kamakus da."
Exodus10:17 Aso do kenainait, kisionioi akadiaket irwan na bon, kilipata EJAKAIT Ekusideke, tetere elemari atwanare na bon kamakaŋ.”"
Exodus10:18 Koloma kaneaiai Parao, kilip EJAKAIT."
Exodus10:19 Kitukut EJAKAIT ekwam loegogon noi lokoto, loabu kokuta emaase, kirenek Aŋolol Nakareŋan: mam abu kosal karaida ediopet koikorun kere luko Misiri."
Exodus10:20 Konye kitogogon EJAKAIT etau loka Parao, mam abu kisiik idwe luka lsirael alosit."
Exodus10:21 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Korio akonikan akuj, tetere ejaun amuton akwap nako Misiri, amuton naepedorio ararap.”"
Exodus10:22 Korio Musa akekan akuj; kojaun amuton naejesi cucucuc akwap kere nako Misiri apaarasia auni;
Exodus10:23 Mam apotu koanyununos, karaida ituŋanan anyoun kaiboisike adaun apaarasia auni: konye ajai aica aiboisio kere nueboiononoto idwe luka lsirael."
Exodus10:24 Konyarau Parao Musa, kotema atiar, “Koloto yesi, kijaanakis EJAKAIT: konye kitasalata ikusisipanin luka amerekekin ka luka aituk: koloto ka ikusidwe da.”"
Exodus10:25 Kotema Musa atiar, “lbusakinit ijo ainakin isio asuban ka ainakineta nuicweio, teterc kiinakini EJAKAIT Ekosideke asuban."
Exodus10:26 Kiupari kaikosibaren da; mam kitasali ediomagegeret; naarai kiyaijaari kes aijaanakinia EJAKAIT Ekosideke; ido mam kijeni luibusakinitor aijaanakinia EJAKAIT aitodol nakidolio nina.”
Exodus10:27 Konye kitogogoij EJAKAIT etau loka Parao, mam abu kisiik kes alosit."
Exodus10:28 Kotema Parao ŋes atiar, “lrwa kaneaiai, kocoite, sirikiany bobo akonyeneka; naarai apaaran naianyunia akakonyen itwani.”"
Exodus10:29 Kotema Musa atiar, “Iner ijo ejok; mam bobo aanyuni akonikonyen.”"
Exodus11:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Ejukakini Parao ka Misiri adiopetular bobo; akauloke kisiikini yes alosit; nakisiikinia yes alosit, kireneari eut yes kere."
Exodus11:2 Aso do kinere kaki nuka ituŋa ebe, ‘Kilip nolitunanan eidunyeteke, ka ŋiniberu da aidunyeteke iboro luka epuesa, ka iboro luka esabu.’’’"
Exodus11:3 Koinak EJAKAIT ituŋa aminunio kakonyen nuka Imisirian. Bobo da kitopolooroi Musa kakwap nako Misiri, kakonyen nuka ikejaanakinak luka Parao, kakonyen da nuka ituŋa."
Exodus11:4 Kotema Musa atiar, “lnera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Alomari kidin naka Misiri kidinebai:"
Exodus11:5 Etwakete ikiyaik kere luko Misiri, ageun ka ekiyai loka Parao loiboie kaiakanutuke, kiton ekiyai loka abulesit naejai kau kairieis; ka ikiyaik kere luka ibaren."
Exodus11:6 Ejaun aimony naepol anatar akwap kere nako Misiri, namam apeŋo ejauna naeriakatatar, mam da ejaun bobo naeriakakinotor."
Exodus11:7 Konye mam ekiŋok ipeni akeŋajep aluikin idwe luka Isirael, aluikin ituŋanan arai itiaŋ: tetere ijenunete kwape etiakitor EJAKAIT Imisirian ka lsirael."
Exodus11:8 Ido epote ikejaanakinakakon lu kere mamaka, ekukumete kaneajai, kobalas ebe, ‘Konyou ijo, ka ituŋa kere lukitupito jo’: akaulo kanun alomari.” Koloma kaneajai Parao kanyunyura naepol."
Exodus11:9 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Mam Parao kiirari jo; tetere etupui nukaumokinika kakwap nako Misiri.”"
Exodus11:10 Kiswamata Musa ka Aaron nukaumokini nun kere kakonyen nuka Parao: kitogogon EJAKAIT etau loka Parao, mam abu kisiik idwe luka Isirael alosit anyoun kakwapuke."
Exodus12:1 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron kakwap nako Misiri ebe,"
Exodus12:2 “Eraun elap lo logeet kolapio mama ijaas: eraun elap losodit laka ekaru mama ijaas.
Exodus12:3 Kolimokis ekodet kere loka Isirael ebe, Kapaaran nakitomonet naka elap lo elemunete kesi ŋininujanan imerekek, kwape ejaatar itogoi luka lukapapakee, imerekek kanolitogo."
Exodus12:4 Arai ikidioko lukotogo komam edaunete imerekek, komorata ka ekeidunyet loidunyatar eketogo; koyaata kwape eiaar etiai loka ituŋa; kwape enyamia ninitunanan, kimarakinio omcrekek."
Exodus12:5 Sirienwalit imerekekikus, ikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet: ilemunete kotoma amerekekin arai toma akinei,"
Exodus12:6 Inadaete ŋes aitodol apaaran nakitomonet kaonon naka elap kaŋol. Atukot kere naka ekodct loka Isirael eari napebon,"
Exodus12:7 Eyaŋaarete da aokot, kipikakis ategerio aarei nuka ekek ka acunet da, kotogoi luenyamiata."
Exodus12:8 Ido enyamete akiriŋ akuare nin, kopeet kakim, ka emugati lomam itubuunitoi; enyamete da kedia kaloedwar."
Exodus12:9 Sirikinyamata eionit, karaida ipoitoi, nabarai apcot kakim; akekou ka akekeje ka iboro da luka akoik."
Exodus12:10 Sirikideut idiobore aitodol tupuruc; konye yenideun aitodol tupuruc kicweata kakim.
Exodus12:11 Inyamete da kwanata; koenito akusiŋabes, koiaas amuk akeiekus, ebela akanikus: kisunyito inyamete: erai ŋin aleleŋ naka EJAKAIT."
Exodus12:12 Naarai akuare nin etori eoŋ akwap nako Misiri, adanyi da ikiyaik kere kakwap nako Misiri, ituŋanan ka itian da; ido etodoli ikatubesia kodekesio kere luko Misiri: Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Exodus12:13 Koraas aokot aanyunet mama iiaas kotogoi luijaas; kaany eoŋ da aokot aleleni yes, kwabo mam ejaun atular amudiar yes, naadanyia akwap nako Misiri."
Exodus12:14 “Koraenena apaaran ŋin aisiitunet mamakus, kidarenenete ŋes korai epucit loka EJAKAIT: kotoma aturiokus kere, kidarenenete epucit kokisil lomam edaun."
Exodus12:15 Inyamcnenete imugatin lumam itubuunitoi apaarasia akanykaarei; ageun kapaaran nasodit ilemarete yenikitubuunet kotogoikus: naarai ninitunanan yenenyami imugatin luitubuunitoi ageun kapaaran nasodit aitodol apaaran nakikanyetekaarei, egelario ituŋanan nin kolsirael."
Exodus12:16 Kapaaran nasodit ejaun atukonokin nakalaunan; mam iswamao adioswam kere kapaarasia kanun, dimarai luenyami ŋinituŋanan, nul bon iswamaete."
Exodus12:17 Idarenenete epucit loka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi; naarai kapaaran kaŋin ŋes etolomunia ajorekus kakwap nako Misiri: ŋes idareneniata apaaran nin anatar aturiokus, araun ekisil loka ikar kere."
Exodus12:18 Kolap losodit kapaaran nakitomonet kaonon naka clap eboŋ, inyamete imugatin lumam itubuunitoi, aitodol apaaran naka akaisaarei kanadiop naka elap eboŋ."
Exodus12:19 Apaarasia akanykaarei mam etakanuni yenikitubuunet kotogoikus; naarai ŋinitunanan yenenyami yenikitubuunitoi, egelario ituŋanan nin kokodet loka Isirael, arai erai emoit, karaida iwuriat."
Exodus12:20 Sirikinyama yenikitubuunitoi; konyamete imugatin lumam itubuunitoi kotoma aiboisiokus kere,”"
Exodus12:21 Kosodi Musa anyaraun imakio kere luka Isirael, kotema kes atiar, “Koloto kooma idwe luka amerekekin kwape ejaatar ikekiakus, koarata luka aleleŋio."
Exodus12:22 Kolemutu da itenun luka esop, kidomakis toma aokot nuejaas abeseni; kobwatanakis aokot nuejaas abeseni acuneta ka ategerio aarei nuka ekek: sirikelomu idiotuŋanan ke re kokek loka etogoke aitodol tupuruc."
Exodus12:23 Naarai etubori EJAKAIT aidany Imisirian; aso naeanyunia aokot kacuneta ka ategerio aarei nuka ekek, cleleni EJAKAIT ekek, komam ecamakini ekamudiaran alomar otogoikus aidany yes,"
Exodus12:24 Ido idarenenete akirot nin araun ekisil mamakon kodwekon da, ikar kere."
Exodus12:25 Kosodete kidoloto akwap nakiinakini EJAKAIT, kwape kolo kisumunio, idarenenete aiiaanakin nin."
Exodus12:26 Kosodi nakinisiata idwekus ebe, ‘Aijaanakinikus na, apolouke inyo?’"
Exodus12:27 Itemanarete ebe, ‘Ŋes asubanit naka aleleŋ naka EJAKAIT, loalelenikini idwe luka Isirael koMisiri, naadanyia Imisirian koyuu ikaliawok.’’’ Kituluroto ituŋa akecekwes, komaata."
Exodus12:28 Koloto idwe luka Isirael kiswamata kwaŋin; kwape ecorakinia EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron, kiswamata kwaŋin."
Exodus12:29 Kosodi kidiijebai, kodany EJAKAIT ikiyaik kere luka akwap nako Misiri, ageun ka ekiyai loka Parao, loeboie koicoloŋoke loka ajakanut, kiton ikiyai loka loaenitai kaidaris; ka ikiyaik kere luka ibaren."
Exodus12:30 Konyou Parao kuare, ŋes ka ikekeiaanakinak kere ka Imisirian kere; kojau aimony naepol akwap nako Misiri; naarai amamci etogo lomam atwanitor ituŋanan,"
Exodus12:31 Konyarau ŋesi Musa ka Aaron kuare, kobala ebe, “Konyoutu, koloto kotuŋaka, yes ka idwe luka Isirael; koloto kijaanakis EJAKAIT, kwape ibalatar."
Exodus12:32 Koyaata isipaninikus luka amerekekin ka luka aituk, kwape ibalatar, koloto; kilipakis eoŋ da arercn.”"
Exodus12:33 Kisuburikisi Imisirian ituŋa, aitonyoun kes kakwap atipet; naarai kobalas ebe, “Wuu kitwaka!”"
Exodus12:34 Koyaata ituŋa atapiokec koroko kitubuuno, koenanakina amoti nukinyonis ogoenekec kokeperinikec."
Exodus12:35 Kiswamata idwe luka Isirael kwape ajaar akirot naka Musa; kilipata kesi Imisirian iboro luka epuesa, ka iboro luka esabu, ka igoen."
Exodus12:36 Koinak EJAKAIT ituŋa aminunio kakonyen nuka Imisirian, koinanakinai luelipito. Konatata Imisirian."
Exodus12:37 Koloto idwe luka Isirael anyoun koRameses adolore Sukot, ikiliok kwaka ilukumin akwat akanykape lualosete kakeie, komam imarakinitai idwe."
Exodus12:38 Ido koupar erioŋet luka imo kakes; ka isipanin luka amerekekin ka luka aituk, ibaren luipu noi."
Exodus12:39 Kopeoto imugatin lumam itubuunitoi luka atap naayaunete kakwap nako Misiri, naarai mam etubuunitoi; naarai aponi kireijeunai koMisiri kisuouriknitete, kwabo mam epoito idisinyamat kere,"
Exodus12:40 Apotu idwe luka lsirael kiboioto koMisiri adaun ikar akwat aoŋon ka akaisauni.
Exodus12:41 Kosodi ketuboros ikar akwat aoŋon ka akaisauni, konyou aiore kere naka EJAKAIT kapaaran kaya koMisiri."
Exodus12:42 Ŋes akuare naibusakinit aidario noi kama ejai EJAKAIT kanuka aitolomun kes kakwap nako Misiri: nin ŋes akuare ya naka EJAKAIT naibusakinit idwe luka Isirael aricenen noi anatar aturiokec kere,"
Exodus12:43 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron atiar, “Lo ŋes ekisil loka aleleŋ: mam imoit kere enyamenenei:"
Exodus12:44 Konye nolibulesit loegwelitai kapesan, kedau akepio, ŋes konyet enyamia."
Exodus12:45 Mam emoit ka ekeiaanakinan loiwotei enyamenenete.
Exodus12:46 Togo ediopet enyamenenere; sirikiyaŋaasi akirinike kina ketogo; karaida aibil akoitike.
Exodus12:47 Erici ekodet kere loka Isirael,"
Exodus12:48 ido arai iboienenei emoit kajo, kokoto aidar aleleŋ kama ejai EJAKAIT, kokepenenete ikiliokoke kere, ŋes konyet ikunyakinia aidar; eraun bala iwuriat akwap: konye lomam ekepep kere mam enyamencnei,"
Exodus12:49 Eraun ekisil ediopet mama ejai iwuriat ka emoit loiboic kayes.”
Exodus12:50 Kiswamata kwaŋin idwe luka Isirael kere; kwape ecorakinia EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron, kiswamata kwaŋin."
Exodus12:51 Kosodi kapaaran kaya kitolom EJAKAIT idwe luka Isirael kakwap nako Misiri kajorekec.
Exodus13:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Exodus13:2 “Kitalaikinai eoŋ ikiyaik kere luepukorete aliligeta kodwe luka lsirael, yenika ituŋanan ka yenika itiaŋ: erai yenikaŋ.”"
Exodus13:3 Kotema Musa ituŋa atiar, “Kiitununete apaaran na, nailomuniata koMisiri, kotogo loka ebulesene; naarai abu EJAKAIT kitolom yes kagogoŋ naka akan kaibois kaŋin: sirikinyama imugatin luitubuunitoi."
Exodus13:4 Kapaaran kana inyounete kolap loka Abib.
Exodus13:5 Kosodi nakitodolio EJAKAIT jo akwap naka Ekanaanit, ka Ekitit, ka Emorait, ka Ekibit, ka Eyebusit, naeyapoikinit lukapapaakus ainakin jo, akwap naeleleete akile ka esik, idarenenei aijaanakin na kolap kalo."
Exodus13:6 Konyamenenei imugatin lumam itubuunitoi apaarasia akanykaarei, apaaran nakikanyetekaarci da ŋes apaaran naka epucit loka EJAKAIT."
Exodus13:7 Konyamenenei imugatin lumam itubuunitoi adaun apaarasia nukanykaarei; komam etakanete kamakon imugatin luitubuunitoi, karaida yenikitubuunet atakan kamakon, koikorunokon kere,"
Exodus13:8 Ilimonokini okokukon kapaaran kaŋin, ebe, ‘Erai kanuka ŋun nuabu EJAKAIT keswamak naanyounio koMisiri.’"
Exodus13:9 Eluor aanyunet kakanikon, aisiitunet da kokidiŋ kakonyekon, tetere ejaun ekisil loka EJAKAIT aitukukon: naarai abu EJAKAIT kitolom jo koMisiri kakan nakagogon,"
Exodus13:10 ŋes ibusakinitor aricenen ekisil ŋol kapakike nolikaru.
Exodus13:11 Kosodi nakitodolio EJAKAIT jo akwap naka Ekanaanit, kwape kolo eyapoikinia jo ka lukapapaakon, kiinakini da,"
Exodus13:12 Igitakini EJAKAIT nin yenepukori aliliget, ka yenikiyai yeniiaatar yenelomuni kotian; eraunos lukiliok luka EJAKAIT."
Exodus13:13 Ido imerekek ilakununia ŋinikiyal yenika asigiria; arai mam ipuda alakun, ibili do emurisinike: ilakununei ikiyaik kere luka ituŋa kodwekon."
Exodus13:14 Kosodi nakinisia okokukon jo kapaarasia nuepote ebe, ‘Inyo bo yen?’ ilimokini ŋes ebe, ‘Abu EJAKAIT kitolom oni koMisiri, kotogo loka ebulesene kagogoŋ naka akan,"
Exodus13:15 Kosodi naaneritor Parao aisiikin sio anyoun, abu EJAKAIT koar ikiyaik kere luka akwap nako Misiri, ikiyaik luka ituŋa, ka ikiyaik luka itian: kanuka nun ŋes ainakinia eoŋ EJAKAIT kere yenepukori aliliget, lueraas ikiliok; konye alakuni ikiyaik kere luka odweka.’"
Exodus13:16 Eraun aanyunet kakanikon, ka nakoreet kokidin kakonyekon: naarai abu EJAKAIT kitolom oni koMisiri kagogon naka akan.”"
Exodus13:17 Kosodi kedau Parao aisiikin ituŋa alosit, mam Edeke abu kitotor kes orot loka akwap naka Ipilisitian, karaida keapie; naarai abala Edeke ebe, “Diat ekuriakaros ituŋa arai keanyut ejie, kosodete aboŋor Misiri.”"
Exodus13:18 Konye abu Edeke kitotor ituŋa erot loka amodiŋ ariri naka Aŋolol Nakareŋan: konyout idwe luka lsirael kakwap nako Misiri ekapito lujiis.
Exodus13:19 Koyanaaria Musa akojo nuka Yosep: naarai abu Yosep kisiyapoikinite cut idwe luka Isirael ebe, “Abeit kianyanari Edeke yes; iyanaariata akakoio anyoun kane.”"
Exodus13:20 Kosodete konyout koSukot, kidukuroto Etam, ariri naka amodiŋ,"
Exodus13:21 Kinarenik EJAKAIT kes kepir loka edou paaran ainarenikinit korot: ido kepir loka akim kuare, acaikinit kes; tetere elosete paaran ka kuare."
Exodus13:22 Epir loka edou paaran, ka epir loka akim kuare, kojaenena kakonyen nuka ituŋa."
Exodus14:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Exodus14:2 “Kolimok idwe luka lsirael kobonosi kau, kidukuroto kiijaren ka Pi-kakirot, kidiij ka Migidol ka aŋolol, kinaren ka Baal-sepon; idukurcte ariri naka aŋolol,"
Exodus14:3 Etemari Parao nuka idwe luka Isirael ebe, “Etotoliki kes akwap, agoloo amodiŋ.’"
Exodus14:4 Etogogoŋi eoŋ etau loka Parao, etupuni kes; adumuni eoŋ aibuses kaneejai Parao ka ajoreke kere; ejenunete da lmisirian ebe arai Eoŋ EJAKAIT.” Kiswamata kwaniŋ."
Exodus14:5 Aponi kolimokinai ekabaka loka Misiri ebe, “Akerata ituŋa.” Kibelokin etau loka Parao ka loka ikekeiaanakinak mama ejaas ituŋa; kobalas ebe, cc Inyo bo yen yenikisub, aisiikin Isirael anyoun kaijaanakin oni?”"
Exodus14:6 Kitemok agalike, kouparos ka iketuŋa:"
Exodus14:7 Koyana agalin akwat akanykape nuseuna, ka agalin kere nuko Misiri, ka iiaka ayait kes kere."
Exodus14:8 Kitogogon EJAKAIT etau loka Parao ekabaka loka Misiri, kibwapak idwe luka lsirael: naarai alomarcte idwe luka Isirael kakan naarioro."
Exodus14:9 Kibwapakis lmisirian kes, ibalasin kere ka agalin nuka Parao, ka ikebwanenokoke ka akejore, kodolokis kes idukurete ariri naka aŋolol, owai loka Pi-kakirot, kinaren ka Baal-sepon."
Exodus14:10 Keapia Parao, kiteluos idwe luka Isirael akonye, ido koany, kokubokinos Imisirian kes; kokuriakaros noi: komonyata idwe luka lsirael mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Exodus14:11 Kobalas Musa ebe, “Kanu emameatar atesin koMisiri, ŋes kiyaunia sio atwakikin modin? Kanukinyo kiswamakinia sio kwana, aitolomun sio koMisiri?"
Exodus14:12 Mere na ŋes akirot nakibala isio jo koMisiri ebe, ‘Kinyeinai sio kejaanakis Imisirian?’ Naarai ejok aijaanakin Imisirian itia atwakikin modin.”"
Exodus14:13 Kobala Musa ituŋa ebe, “Sirikikuriakaros, kobwaata kopalarito, koanyutu aitaiar naka EJAKAIT, nakiswamakini yes lolo: naarai Imisirian luianyunete lolo, mam bobo ianyunete kes ikar kere."
Exodus14:14 Kijiikini EJAKAIT yes, kililinete yesi da.”"
Exodus14:15 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ebe, “Kanukinyo imonyia mama ajai? Kolimok idwe luka Isirael kolototo kiŋaren."
Exodus14:16 Kitonyou ijo ebelakon, korio akanikon aijolol, kotiak ŋes; itorete idwe luka Isirael kidin kaŋolol neconit."
Exodus14:17 Ka eoŋ da, koany, etogogoŋi itauon luka Imisirian, edoete atupite kes; adumuni eoŋ aibuses kaneejai Parao, ka ajoreke kere, kagalinike, kokebwanenokoke da."
