Exodus14:18 Ejenunete lmisirian ebe arai Eoŋ EJAKAIT, naadumunia aibuses kaneejai Parao, kagalinike, kokebwanenokoke da.”"
Exodus14:19 Konyou emalaika loka Edeke loeŋarenikinit ajore naka Isirael kobono kaukec; konyou epir loka edou koinarenekec, kobwo kokaukec:"
Exodus14:20 Kobu kosipokin kidin ajore naka lmisirian ka ajore naka Isirael; kojai edou ka amuton, konye kocaik kuarc: mam kwi apotu kodolokis nul akuare kere."
Exodus14:21 Korio Musa akekan aŋolol; kitukut EJAKAIT ekwam lokokide loegogon aitobonor aŋolol akuare kiya, kitarau aŋolol akwap naconit, kotiakas akip."
Exodus14:22 Kolomasi idwe luka Isirael kidin aŋolol neconit: kosubito akip kamakec bala arwatat kakan nakorcten, kakan da nakokediany."
Exodus14:23 Kotupasi Imisirian, kolomasi akaulokec kidiij aŋolol, ibalasin kere luka Parao, ka agalinike, ka ikebwanenokoke."
Exodus14:24 Kosodi kanen kotoma akwenyunet naka tupuruc, kosesen EJAKAIT ajore naka Imisirian kotoma opir loka akim ka cdou, kisiyalonon ajore naka Imisirian."
Exodus14:25 Kisipok akokoron nuka agalinikec, kireŋeata kolanirikinito; tape ebalas Imisirian ebe, “Kakerata kakonyen nuka Isirael; naarai itijie EJAKAIT Imisirian kanukec.”"
Exodus14:26 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Korio akanikon aŋolol, tetere eboŋokinete akip oMisirian, agalinikec, ka ikebwanenokokec.”"
Exodus14:27 Korio Musa akekan aŋolol, Koboŋok aŋolol kagogonuke napiwalari; kokerata Imisirian; kilakilakak EJAKAIT Imisirian kidin aŋolol."
Exodus14:28 Kobonut akip, korapasi agalin ka ikebwanenok, ajore kere naka Parao naabu koloma aŋolol kokaukec; mam abu kosalak ediopet kakesi,"
Exodus14:29 Konye kitcro idwe luka Isirael nceonit kokidin aŋolol; kosubito akip kamakec bala arwatat kakan nakoteten ka nakokediany da.
Exodus14:30 Kwaŋin kitajar EJAKAIT Isirael kapaaran kaŋin kakan naka Imisirian; koany Isirael Imisirian ctwakito kariri kaŋolol,"
Exodus14:31 Koany Isirael aswam naepol naeswamakini EJAKAIT Imisirian, koyonata ituŋa EJAKAIT: kiyuut EJAKAIT ka Musa ekejaanakinanike."
Exodus15:1 Kosodete Musa ka idwe luka Isirael ayeikin EJAKAIT ckosio lo, kobalas ebe, “Ayeikini EJAKAIT, naarai epiko cut: Abu kocakak ebalasi ka ekebwanenonike toma aŋolol."
Exodus15:2 EJAKAIT ŋes akagogoŋ ka ekosioka, Aluor ŋesi aitajarioka: Lo ŋes Ekadeke, eturenenei ŋes; Edeke loka papaka, etopolonori ŋes."
Exodus15:3 Erai EJAKAIT ekajion: EJAKAIT ŋes ekekiror,"
Exodus15:4 Acakaki agalin ka aiore naka Parao toma aŋolol; Alumosi lukapolokoke luseuna Aŋolol Nakaren an.
Exodus15:5 Arapa kes aidules: Ejesaros neidul kwape amoru.
Exodus15:6 Wu EJAKAIT, ibus akonikan naketeten kotoma agogoŋ, Wu EJAKAIT, idecideci akonikan nakoteten lokasurup."
Exodus15:7 Ibirori kes lukinyoikinete asurokin jo Kotoma apolou naka aibusesukon: Iyakuuni anyunyurakon, kicwe kes kwape agugu."
Exodus15:8 Ido ekwam loka okumesikon itadakuni akipi, Kobwaata akalel atukon; Korurwak aidules otau loka aŋolol,"
Exodus15:9 Abala lokasurup ebe, ‘Atupakini, adolokini, akori lunatan; Isimonikinio akainobel kamakec; Autuni ekakileŋ, emudiari akakan kes.’"
Exodus15:10 Ibu kitukut ekwamukon, korapa aŋolol kes: Kolumosi kwape asasit toma akipi nukagogonok."
Exodus15:11 Wu EJAKAIT, iŋai eputosi bala jo kotoma odekesinei? Iŋai eputosi bala jo, loibus kotoma alaunit, Lokiyonitai kotoma aiturio, loiswamai nukaumokin?"
Exodus15:12 Ibu korio akonikan nakoteten, Kiliko kes akwap,"
Exodus15:13 Kotoma akoniitim ibu kinarenik ituŋa luilakuni: Ibu kiteten kes kagogoŋukon kiton aiboisikon nakalaunan.
Exodus15:14 Apuput atekerin, emaranete: Abu ariebo kikam iuibciete koPilisitia."
Exodus15:15 Koumokis do lukapolok luka Edom; Kikam amaran imaseniko luka Moab; Elicaros luibojete ‘kere koKanaan.
Exodus15:16 Ebirokini kes ailiili ka etasuro; Kanuka apolou naka akonikan epalarito kwape amoru; Aitodol neilamarotor ikonituŋa, wu EJAKAIT, Aitodol neiiamarotor ikonituŋa luibu kodum,"
Exodus15:17 Itolomari, iraikini kes oroŋat loka airumetekon, Aibois naitemonok ijo aiboi kotoma, wu EJAKAIT, Aibois nakalaunan, naetogogonoete akaninikon, wu EJAKAIT."
Exodus15:18 Irumi EJAKAIT ikar kere.”
Exodus15:19 Naarai apotu ibalasin luka Parao nepepe kagalinikec ka ikebwanenok kolomasi aŋolol, kinyakak EJAKAIT akipi nuka aŋolol mamakec; konye koloto idwe luka Isirael kaneeonit kidin aŋolol."
Exodus15:20 Koyana Miriam anabi, kinaci naka Aaron, isiman kakanike; kolomasi aŋor kere kotupasi ŋes kojaas kisiman kikosiete,"
Exodus15:21 Koboŋok Miriam kes atiar, “Koyeikisi EJAKAIT, naarai epiko kapolou; Abu kocakak ebalasi ka lokebwanenonike aŋolol.”"
Exodus15:22 Kinarenik Musa Isirael anyoun kAŋolol Nakareŋan, kolomasi kodoloto amodiŋ naka Sur; koloto apaarasia auni komodin, komam edumunete akipi."
Exodus15:23 Kedoloto Mara, mam apotu kopedosi aimat akipi nuka Mara, naarai adwarak: ŋes amaikinere ekiror ŋol Mara."
Exodus15:24 Kirurumakis ituŋa Musa, kobalas atiar, “Inyo bo do kimasi?”"
Exodus15:25 Komony ŋesi mama ejai EJAKAIT: kitodik EJAKAIT ŋes ekitoi, kocakak akipi, koluoros akip nukajijimak, Nen ŋes esilakinia kes ekisil ka aicorakinet, kitem kes kanen."
Exodus15:26 Kobala ebe, “Arai kidunyak ijo arimar eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kiswama naedolit kakonyeke, kitoik akit aicorakinetake, koric ikekisila kere, mam kebwaikini jo adekesia kere, nuebwaik Imisirian; naarai arai Eoŋ EJAKAIT Ioketanaleuni jo.”"
Exodus15:27 Kodoloto Elim, neajaas ikico itomon kaarei luka akipi, ka idukudukun akaisakanykaarei; kidukuroto nen neajaas akip."
Exodus16:1 Konyout koElim elosete, kodol ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael amodiŋ naka Sin, naejai kidin Elim ka Sinai, kapaaran nakitomonet kakany naka elap lokiareit kedaut anyoun kakwap nako Misiri."
Exodus16:2 Kirurumak ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael Musa ka Aaron komodin.
Exodus16:3 Kobalas idwe luka Isirael kes ebe, “Ti gwai kiitwakiki akwap nako Misiri kanuka akan naka EJAKAIT, nakiboio kama ejaas amoti nuka akiriŋ, nakinyamia atap kemonikinos; naarai kibuaut isio amodiŋ na, aiar ekodet lo kere keteŋai.”"
Exodus16:4 Kosodi kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Koany, etctepikini yes atap naebuni kokuju; elomarete da ituŋa ninipaaran atukonokin adutakinet naka apaaran, kasodi ketem kes arai elosenenete kokisilaka, arai mam."
Exodus16:5 Kosodi kanen, kedolu apaaran nakikanyctckapc, itemonokinete ke si lueyaunete, koraut do irwan atipet adepar lulem etukonokinete ninipaaran.”"
Exodus16:6 Apotu Musa ka Aaron kotemasi idwe luka Isirael kere atiar, “Nat eboŋ, ŋes ijenuniata ebe abu EJAKAIT kitolom yes kakwap nako Misiri."
Exodus16:7 Ido tupuruc ŋes ianyuniata yesi aibuses naka EJAKAIT; naarai eira airurumakus mama ejai EJAKAIT: lukanai bo isio, luirurumakinito?”"
Exodus16:8 Kotema Musa atiar, “Ejaun na, nakiinak EJAKAIT yes akiriŋ ainyam eboŋ, tupuruc da aimonikin atap; naarai eira EJAKAIT airurumakus nairurumakis ŋes: ido lukaŋai bo isio? Mam kirurumakinito sio, dimarai EJAKAIT.”"
Exodus16:9 Kobala Musa Aaron ebe, “Kolimok ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael atiar, ‘Kikunyutu akonyen nuka EJAKAIT: naarai eira ŋesi akusiirurum.’”"
Exodus16:10 Kosodi kanen, napineras Aaron ka ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael, koscsenata modin, ido koany, kotakan kodou aibuses naka EJAKAIT."
Exodus16:11 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Exodus16:12 “Eira eoŋ airurum naka idwe luka Isirael: kolimok kes ebe, “Eboŋ inyamete akiriŋ, tupuruc da imonikinos atap; ijenunete do ebe arai Eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke.’’’"
Exodus16:13 Kosodi kanen napeboŋ, kodooto alurueik, korapaasi iswamin: ido tupuruc kiriamarito akopyo iswamin."
Exodus16:14 Keokoto akopyo, koany, kuju kamodiŋ koiau ibore yenedit kilunurur, kodit kwape kakako kokwap."
Exodus16:15 Keanyut idwe luka Isirael, kotemanaros atiar, “Inyo bo ŋin?” naarai mam kejenete kwape kejaar. Kobala Musa kes ebe, “Ŋin ŋes atap nakiinakinit EJAKAIT yes ainyam."
Exodus16:16 Ŋin ŋes akirot naicorakinit EJAKAIT ebe, ‘Kotukonok ninituŋanan kayesi kwape enyamia; ninitunanan omer ediopet, kwape ejaar etiai loka ituŋakus, iyaete, ninitunanan einari lukowemake.’”"
Exodus16:17 Kiswamata idwe luka Isirael kwaŋin, kotukonokis ice epol, ice edit."
Exodus16:18 Kosodete kitemoto kotoma omer, yeniketukonokin loepol mam cdeuni, yeniketukonokin loedit, mam epuda bobo; atukonokinete ninitunanan kwape anyamia."
Exodus16:19 Kotema Musa kes atiar, “Kinyek ituŋanan aiteperor.”"
Exodus16:20 Mam apotu kopuput Musa; konye ice kakesi kiteperosi, kouri ikur, kobosiar; konyunyurik Musa kes."
Exodus16:21 Kotukonokis ninitupuruc, ŋinitunanan kwape enyamia: ido kemwaniar akoloŋ, kocalar."
Exodus16:22 Kosodi kedol apaaran nakikanyetekape kotukonokis inyamat irwan aarei, ninitunanan ikomerin iarei; koporu lukapolok kere luka ekodet alimokin Musa."
Exodus16:23 Kotema kes atiar, “Ŋin ŋes naabu EJAKAIT kobala ebe, ‘Erai moi aibworar naicorakinitai, nakasabato nakalaunan kaneejai EJAKAIT: kopeoto luikotos aipe, kipooto da luikotos aipoore; luideunos kere kiteperosi kinadakis aitodol moi.’”"
Exodus16:24 Kiteperosi kwape kicorakinia kes Musa: mam ebosa, komameunos da ikur kotomakec."
Exodus16:25 Kotema Musa atiar, “Konyama lu lolo; naarai lolo ŋes apaaran naka asabato kaneejai EJAKAIT: mam lolo idumunete komagoro."
Exodus16:26 Kotukonokinete kotoma apaarasia akanykape; konye apaaran nakikanyctckaarei ŋes apaaran naka asabato: kapaaran kaŋin mam ejaunun.”
Exodus16:27 Kosodete kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei apotu ice kakesi koloto atukonokin, komam edumunete."
Exodus16:28 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Itodolete yesi ai aigir apupun akaicorakineta ka ikakisila da?"
Exodus16:29 Koanyutu, naarai kiinak EJAKAIT yes aiyeŋunet, ŋes kiinakinia yes kapaaran nakikanyetekape inyamat luka apaarasia aarei; kiboikin ninituŋanan kayesi aiboisike, kinyek ituŋanan anyounun kaiboisike kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei.”"
Exodus16:30 Kiyenununete ituŋa kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei.
Exodus16:31 Ekek loka Isirael komaik ekirorike Emanu: kosubite bala ecokit loka ejad, loekwaŋ; ajijimuke da kosubite bala imugatin luka esik."
Exodus16:32 Kobala Musa ebe, “Ŋin ŋes akirot naabu EJAKAIT kicorak, ebe, ‘Kinadakisi omer Ioilcleba kanuka aturiokus kere; tetere eanyunete kesi inyamat luabu eoŋ ketanyam yes kamodiŋ, naketolomunia kakwap nako Misiri.’’’"
Exodus16:33 Kotema Musa Aaron atiar, “Kolem atido, kipiik tomake omer loileleba emanu, kibwaik kakonycn nuka EJAKAIT, kinadakis aturiokus.”"
Exodus16:34 Kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT Musa, kwaŋin kibwaik Aaron akonyen nuka Aiteienunet, araun nakinada."
Exodus16:35 Konyamata idwe luka Isirael emanu ikar akaisaoŋon, kiton neadolioto akwap naeboioto ituŋa; konyamata emanu kiton neadolioto oikoruno luka akwap nako Kanaan."
Exodus16:36 Ido omer ŋes idiopet kotomon yenika epa.
Exodus17:1 Kolot ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael anyoun kamodiŋ naka Sin, kobwosenenete, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT, kidukuroto Repidim: konye komamuut akip nuemasete ituŋa."
Exodus17:2 Ŋes etoŋolopiata ituŋa Musa, kobalas ebc, “Koinakinai sio akipi kamata.” Kotema Musa kes atiar, “Kanukinyo kitonolopiata eoŋ? Kanukinyo ikoduniata EJAKAIT?”"
Exodus17:3 Kojak ituŋa akure naka akipi kanen; kirurumakisi ituŋa Musa, kotemasi atiar, “Kanukinyo kitolemunia sio koMisiri, aiar sio ka ikosidwe ka ikosibaren kakure?”"
Exodus17:4 Komony Musa neejai EJAKAIT kotema atiar, “Ekonakini ai ituŋa lu? ekapakina kesi aibiribir eoŋ kamor.”"
Exodus17:5 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Kitor akonyen nuka ituŋa, koyaŋa nepepe kajo ice komakio luka Isirael; kitin ebelakon kakanikon, loinomia kole ijo ecor, kolot."
Exodus17:6 Koany, abwoi eoŋ kakonyenekon komoru Koreb; inomi ijo atiiba, elomunete akip, komata ituŋa.” Kiswama Musa kwaŋin kakonyen nuka imakio luka Isirael."
Exodus17:7 Komaik ŋesi aibois ekekiror Masa, ka Meriba, kanuka aŋolopa naka idwe luka Isirael, kosubata bala ekodunete EJAKAIT, kineras atiar, “Ejai kereka EJAKAIT mamawok arai bo mam?”"
Exodus17:8 Kobu do Amalek, kojioto ka Isirael koRepidim."
Exodus17:9 Kotema Musa Yosua atiar, “Koseikinai ituŋa, kolot, kitiji Amalek: abwoi eoŋ moi koukot, ketinitc ebela loka Edeke.”"
Exodus17:10 Kiswama Yosua kwape kicorakinia Musa, kitiji Amalek: kodokasi Musa ka Aaron ka Kur oukot."
Exodus17:11 Kosodi kanen, kerio Musa akanike, kipiko Isirael: konye kinyakaki akanike kwap, kipiko Amalek."
Exodus17:12 Konye kitega akanin nuka Musa; koyanaasi amoru kibwaikis kwapuke, kiboikin; kigagata Aaron ka Kur akaninike, ediopet epuai, ediopet da epuai; kicatata akekanin aitodol nealomaria akoloŋ."
Exodus17:13 Abu Yosua kitononok Amalek ka iketuŋa kakwanis naka ekileŋ.
Exodus17:14 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Kiwadik nin oitabo araun aisiitunet, kitatamik aki nuka Yosua; naarai amwatari cut aiitunio naka Amalek kokwap kakuj.”"
Exodus17:15 Koduk Musa etem, komaik ekekiror Yawe-nisi:"
Exodus17:16 Kotema atiar, “Eyapo EJAKAIT: Ejienenei EJAKAIT kAmalek anatar aturio kere.”"
Exodus18:1 Kopup do Yetero, esasedoti loka Midian, ekamuran loka Musa, nukiswamakini Edeke Musa, ka Isirael iketuŋa, ebe, abu EJAKAIT kitonyou Isirael koMisiri."
Exodus18:2 Abu Yetero, ekamuran loka Musa, koya Sipora aberu naka Musa, naabu kinyakarite,"
Exodus18:3 Ka ikedwe iarei; ekiror loka ediopet ŋes Geresom; naarai abala ebe, “Arai epeionon kakwap namere nakan.”"
Exodus18:4 Ekiror loka ece ŋes Elieser; naarai abala ebe, “Edeke loka papaka ŋes arai ekenarakinanika, abu kayu eoŋ kokilen loka Parao.”"
Exodus18:5 Kobu Yetero, ekamuran loka Musa, ka odweke ka akeberu neejai Musa amodiŋ naedukurito, moru loka Edeke;"
Exodus18:6 Kotema ŋesi Musa atiar, “Abunit eoŋ Yetero ekamuranikon mamakon, ka akoniberu, ka odweke iarei kaŋes.”"
Exodus18:7 Koloma Musa airiamun kekamuranike, kisudede, konu; kiŋitanaros ebe, “Anyoika?” Kolomasi owema,"
Exodus18:8 Kolimcnok Musa ekamuranike akiro nueswamakini EJAKAIT Parao ka Imisirian kanuka Isirael, aitaaritoi kere naadoikini kes korot, ido kwape keyuunia EJAKAIT kes."
Exodus18:9 Kiyalamikin Yetero kanuka nukaiokak kere nukesubakini EJAKAIT Isirael, naarai abu koyuu kes kakan naka Imisirian."
Exodus18:10 Kotema Yetero atiar, “Kituritete EJAKAIT, lokiyuuni yes kakan naka Imisirian, kakan naka Parao da; loabu koyuu ituŋa kakan naka Imisirian."
Exodus18:11 Ajen do kwana ebe epol EJAKAIT aitelekar idekesinei kere: eebo, kotoma akirot naiturotor kamakec.”"
Exodus18:12 Abu Yetero ekamuran loka Musa koinak ainakinet naicweio ka asuban mama ejai Edeke: kobu Aaron ka imakio kere luka Isirael, konyamata atap nepepe kekamuran loka Musa, kakonyen nuka Bdeke."
Exodus18:13 Kosodi kiwala akwap, kiboikin Musa atubokin ituŋa: kobwaata ituŋa kirimoritos Musa ageun tupuruc aitodol eboŋ,"
Exodus18:14 Keanyu ekamuran loka Musa kere nueswamanakini ŋesi itutja, kotema atiar, “Inyo bo yeniswamanakini ijo ituŋa? Kanukinyo iboio ijo bon, kobwoete da ituŋa kirimoritos jo ageun tupuruc aitodol eboŋ?”"
Exodus18:15 Koboŋok Musa ekamuranike ebe, “Naarai eponenenete ituŋa neaiai aiŋit Edeke,"
Exodus18:16 Keiaut kakirot, epote kamakaŋ; atubokini eoŋ akirot ituŋanan ka yeniceke, etejenikini kes aicorakineta nuka Edeke, ka ikekisila.”"
Exodus18:17 Kobala ekamuran loka Musa ebe, “Akirot naiswamai mam ejok."
Exodus18:18 Kilolonyi cut, ijo ka ituŋa lu luejaas kajo: naarai kilanirikinit ijo akirot; mam jo bon ipedori aswam."
Exodus18:19 Aso do kiira ekaporoto, ketetemik akiro, kojai Edeke kajo: kojai ijo kanuka ituŋa mama ejai Edeke, koyana akiro mama ejai Edeke."
Exodus18:20 Isisianakini ijo kes aicorakineta ka ikisila; itodikini kes erot loibusakinit kes aloseneneo, ka aswam naibusakinit kes aswam."
Exodus18:21 Ido kirereu kotuna kere ikiliok Iuibusakinito, lueyonito Edeke, ituŋa luka abeit, luelaito ameda namam edolit; kodakanak kes, koraut ikapolok luka ilukumin, ka ikapolok luka akwat, ka ikapolok luka akaisakany, ka ikapolok luka itomon."
Exodus18:22 Kotubokis kesi ituŋa apakio kere; kosodete kesi ainunun jo ŋinikirot naepol, konye ninikirot naedit etubenenete bonik: kwaŋin kibenenikini ijo, ibwokenenete kesi alaŋir nepepe kajo."
Exodus18:23 Arai kiswama ijo akirot nin, kiicorak Edeke jo kwaŋin, ipedori do ijo atitiŋikin, elosenenete ituŋa lu kere aiboisiokec inapakina.”"
Exodus18:24 Kiira Musa eporoto loka ekamuranike, kiswama kere kwape abalar nesl."
Exodus18:25 Koseu Musa ikiliok luibusakinito koIsiracl kere, kituluo kes lukapolok kotuna, ikapolok luka ilukumin, ka ikapolok luka akwat, ka ikapolok luka akaisakany, ka ikapolok luka itomon."
Exodus18:26 Ketubonokinete ituŋa apakio kere: koinanarete Musa akiro nuetioko, konye ŋinikirot naedit kotubenenete bonik,"
Exodus18:27 Kotwara Musa ekamuranike; kolot bukec.
Exodus19:1 Kolap kalokiwuniet kedaut idwe luka Isirael anyoun kakwap nako Misiri, kodoloto kapaaran kaŋin amodiŋ naka Sinai."
Exodus19:2 Kenyout koRepidim, kedoloto da amodiŋ naka Sinai, kibubukis iweman modiŋ; kidukuru Isirael kinaren kemoru."
Exodus19:3 Kodoka Musa mama ejai Edeke, konyara EJAKAIT ŋes moru, kobala ebe, “Itemari kwanata ekek loka Yakob, kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe;"
Exodus19:4 ‘Ipotu koanyutu nuabu keswamak Imisirian, ido kwape kadakuniata yes kabebenoka nuka emorukaalet, ido kwape kayauniata mama ajai."
Exodus19:5 Aso do, arai irimarcte cut ekaporoto, koricito aitutuketeka, iluoros do iboreka yeniminat noi kotuna kere: naarai akwap kere nakan."
Exodus19:6 Iraunos yesi kamakaŋ ajakanut naka isasedotin, ateker da nakalaunan.’ Ŋun kes akiro nuilimokini idwe luka Isirael.”"
Exodus19:7 Kobu Musa konyarau imakio luka ituŋa, kibwaik akiro nun kere nukicorakini EJAKAIT ŋes akonyenekec,"
Exodus19:8 Koracaut ituŋa kere ebe, “Kere nuebala EJAKAIT kiswamai.” Koya babo Musa akiro nuka ituŋa mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Exodus19:9 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ebe, “Koany, abuni mamakon kodou loepol, tetere epupunete ituŋa kiinerakin eoŋ kajo, kiyuunete da jo apaarasia kere.” Kolimok Musa EJAKAIT akiro nuka ituŋa,"
Exodus19:10 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ebe, “Kolot mama ejaas ituŋa, kitalau kes lolo ka moi, kilotata igoenekec,"
Exodus19:11 Tetere itemonokino kapaaran kanakiwuniet: naarai kapaaran kanakiwunier edokuni EJAKAIT moru Sinai kakonyen nuka ituŋa kere.
Exodus19:12 Ibwaikini ituŋa eikor kowaitin kere, kobala ebe, ‘Kocoito, kinyeis adokar moru karaida atiror eikoruke: abeit nin yenetirori emoru cario,"
Exodus19:13 Mam adiokan etirori ŋes, konye abeit ibiribirio kamor arai icumio; arai itian arai ituŋanan, mam eiari’: nairododikinio arupepe aruo, ikunyakinete kesi moru.”"
Exodus19:14 Kodoku Musa komoru kobu mama ejaas ituŋa, kitalau ituŋa; kilotata igoenckec,"
Exodus19:15 Kobala ituŋa ebe, “Kitemonokinos kapaaran kanakiwuniet: mam ikunyakinete aberu.”"
Exodus19:16 Kosodi kiwala akwap kapaaran kanakiwunict, koiai airetunun ka eimilia, ka edou loepol komoru, ka eporoto loka arupcpe loepol noi, Komaranata ituŋa kere luajaas oidukurun."
Exodus19:17 Kitolom Musa ituŋa koidukurun airiamun ka Edcke, kobwaata kokwap kemoru."
Exodus19:18 Kopuriei emoru Sinai kere, naarai adokuni EJAKAIT nen kakim: kopuriei apuruke kwape apuru naka eupa, komaran noi emoru kere."
Exodus19:19 Kiyataki eporoto loka arupepe airu noi, kiner Musa, Koboŋok Edeke ŋes keporoto."
Exodus19:20 Kodok EJAKAIT moru Sinai, aidi naka emoru; konyara EJAKAIT Musa adokar aidi naka emoru; kodoka Musa."
Exodus19:21 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ebe, “Kijesar, kicorak ituŋa, kinyeis ailamar mama ejai EJAKAIT aiteere, kosodete luipu kakesi aolior."
Exodus19:22 Kitalaunos isasedotin da luikunyakinete EJAKAIT, kinyek EJAKAIT ailamar neejaas kesi.”"
Exodus19:23 Kobala Musa EJAKAIT ebe, “Mam epedorete ituŋa adokun moru Sinai: naarai ibu kicorak sio ebe, ‘Kibwaik eikor airimor emoru, kitalau da.’’’"
Exodus19:24 Kobala EJAKAIT ebe, “Kolot, kiiesar; idokuni, ijo ka Aaron da: konye kinyeis isasedotin ka ituŋa ailamun adokuni mama ejai EJAKAIT, kinyek ŋesi ailamar mamakec.”"
Exodus19:25 Kosodi Musa aijesar mama ejaas ituŋa, kolimok kes."
Exodus20:1 Kiner Edeke akiro nu kere, kobala ebe,"
Exodus20:2 “Arai Eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekonideke, loketolomuni jo kakwap nako Misiri, kotogo loka ebulesene."
Exodus20:3 Sirijaenena kicedekesio nabarai eoŋ.
Exodus20:4 Sirikisub adioput naegerer, karaida asima naka ibore kere yenejai kuju toma akui, karaida yenejai kwap toma alup, karaida yenejai toma akipi nuejaas kwap kalup,"
Exodus20:5 Sirikikukonokin kes, karaida aijaanakin kes: naarai Eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekonideke arai Edeke lokekolo, edopet kodwe numam adolit nuka lukapapaakec, kiton atur nakiwuniet ka nakiwononet naka nul kalukalaito eoŋ;"
Exodus20:6 Ido etimi ilukumin luka ituŋa lukaminas eoŋ koricito akaicorakineta.
Exodus20:7 Sirilimit atai ekiror loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke; naarai mam EJAKAIT isikai aitetelekaar akirot, nin yenelimit atai ekekiror."
Exodus20:8 Kiitunite aitalaunit apaaran nakasabato.
Exodus20:9 Kitaaritoi kapaarasia akanykape, kiswama akoniswamisio kere."
Exodus20:10 Konye do apaaran nakikanyetekaarei ŋes asabato naka EJAKAIT Ekonideke: apaaran nin sirikiswama adioswam kere, ijo, ka okokukon, ka akokukon, ka ekonikejaanakinan, ka akonikejaanakinan, ka ikonibaren, ka imoitikon da yenejai orekon;"
Exodus20:11 Naarai kapaarasia akanykape ŋes asubia EJAKAIT akuj ka akwap, ka aŋolol, ka luejaas tomakec kere, kiyenu kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei: tape isirereni EJAKAIT apaaran nakasabato, kitalau da."
Exodus20:12 Koyonitenenei papakon ka totokon: tetere akonipaarasia iyatakinos kotoma akwap nakiinakini EJAKAIT Ekonideke.
Exodus20:13 Siriarenenei.
Exodus20:14 Siridote.
Exodus20:15 Sirikokoenenei.
Exodus20:16 Sirisabanakincnei ikoniidunyet,"
Exodus20:17 Siriŋobelenenei etogo loka iidunyetekon, siriŋobelenenei aberu naka eidunyetekon, karaida ekekeiaanakinan, karaida akekeiaanakinan, karaida ekemon, karaida ekesigiria, karaida ibore kere yenerai yenika ekoniidunyet.”"
Exodus20:18 Koanyut ituŋa kerc eires, ka eimilia, ka eporoto loka arupepe, ka eronat da epuriei: keanyut ituŋa, komaranata, kobwaata kama elwana."
Exodus20:19 Kotemasi Musa atiar, “Kiner ijo kasio, ŋes kipupunio: konye kinyek Edeke eincr kasio, kenyeis atwakare.”"
Exodus20:20 Kotema Musa ituŋa atiar, “Sirikikuriakaros: naarai abu Edeke aigimor yes, tetere iyoncte ŋes, kinyeis adiakanar.”"
Exodus20:21 Kobwaata iruna kama elwana, kikunyak Musa neejai amuton nairiono cucucuc neaiai Edeke."
Exodus20:22 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Ilimokini idwe luka Isirael ebe, ‘Ipotu yesi ikulepek koanyut eoŋ enera kayes kotoma akuj."
Exodus20:23 Sirisubenenete idekesio ice kaiai eoŋ: idekesio luka epuesa, karaida idekesio luka esabu, sirisubenenete kes."
Exodus20:24 Kosubakinai eoŋ etem loka alupot, koinakis asuban kanen, ainakinerakon nuicweio, ainakinetakon da nuka ainapakin, akonimerekekin, ka ikonimonin da: ŋiniibois naiitununere ekakiror abuni mamakon, kesirereni eoŋ joo"
Exodus20:25 Ido arai kiiswamak etem loka amoru, sirikiduk kamoru nuikee: naarai arai kidak ecuumakon aikeo, itisiliani ŋes,"
Exodus20:26 Siridokanari otemuka kadoketa, kinyek amuialalakon atakanun.’"
Exodus21:1 “Lu kes itubesia luibwaikini ijo mamakee.
Exodus21:2 Arai kigwel ijo ebulesit loBuraniat, kijaanakini ŋesi jo ikar ikanykape: kokaru kalokikanyetckaarei ejalakinio alosit atai."
Exodus21:3 Arai kolo ebunit bon, eboŋori bon: arai emanyit, euparos kakeberu."
Exodus21:4 Arai kemanyaki ejakaitike ŋes aberu kourik da ŋes idwe lusap arai lupesur; eraunos aberu ka ikedwe luka ejakaitike, eboŋori ŋesi bon."
Exodus21:5 Konye arai ketema ebulesit ebe, ‘Amina ejakaitika, akaberu ka ikadwe da; mam akoto aosikinio’:"
Exodus21:6 Eyauni do ejakaitike ŋes neejai Edeke, eyauni ŋes okek, arai acunetait; epedi ejakaitike ŋes akit kemutu; ijaanakini ŋes apaarasia kere."
Exodus21:7 Arai kegwela ituŋanan akokuke araun abulesit, mam eosikinio kwape ibulesin."
Exodus21:8 Arai mam ŋes isiyalamikinit ejakaitike, loemanyit ŋes, ecamakini ŋes alakunio: emamei ŋes apedor aitwegel ŋes imo, naarai amodo ŋes,"
Exodus21:9 Arai kemanyaki ŋesi nin okokuke, iswamanakinenci kwape adweke."
Exodus21:10 Arai kemany ace; mam inonari inyamatake ka inapeneke, ka akekiro da nuka adukono."
Exodus21:11 Ido arai mam iswamanakinenei nun nuuni, elosi ŋin taai, etwaniari je Iuagwelitor."
Exodus21:12 Yeninomi ituŋanan aiar, abeit eario ŋes da."
Exodus21:13 Ido arai mam etuŋanan eperunenei, konye ijaikini Edeke je akanike; ecorakini eoŋ jo aibois naekeriari."
Exodus21:14 Arai kepeleiki ituŋanan aiar eidunyeteke kebotet; ilemari kotemuka, tetere etwani."
Exodus21:15 Yeninomi papake, arai totoke, abeit eario."
Exodus21:16 Yenekokwari ituŋanan, kogwela, arai ketakanu kakanike, abeit eario."
Exodus21:17 Yenilamakini papake arai totoke, abeit eario."
Exodus21:18 Arai kejioto ituŋa, kibir idiopet yenice kamoru, arai aidip kakan, komam etwani, konye kiteperikinai oitada:"
Exodus21:19 Arai kenyou, kolem ekebela alosio, emameun yenenomi ŋes akirot: konye etaci kanuka akeiboi, etaci da kanuka aitanaleunioke."
Exodus21:20 Ido arai kinom etuŋanan ebulesitike, arai abulesitike kebela, korasa atwanare; itieanio ŋesi da."
Exodus21:21 Konye arai kiriar adaun apaarasia kwape aarei, mam iticanio: naarai erai iboreke."
Exodus21:22 Ido arai eiios ituŋa, kosodete aimusun aberu naepotie, kolom akoik kina, komam acekanas: abeit egelio, kwape etubio ekile loka aberu; egeli kwape icorakiniata ikatubok."
Exodus21:23 Konye arai kejaun akaŋas, iinakini aiiar ma aijar,"
Exodus21:24 Akoŋu itia akoŋu, ekelai itia ekelai, akan itia akan, akeiu itia akeju,"
Exodus21:25 Aicweio itia aicweio, amusuŋut itia amusuŋut, aromait itia aromait."
Exodus21:26 Arai kinom etuŋanan akoŋu naka ebulesitike, arai naka abulesitike, kitumudak; ejalakini ŋes alosit kanuka akonuke."
Exodus21:27 Arai keloko etuŋanan ekelai loka ebulesitike, arai loka abulesitike; ejalakini ŋes alosit kanuka ekelaike."
Exodus21:28 Arai kerem emoŋ ekiliokit arai aberu aiar, abeit ibiribirio emoŋ ŋol kamor, mam enyamio akirinike: konye emameun elopet emoŋ akirot."
Exodus21:29 Konye arai ededeŋ emoŋ lem sek, kitejenunai papake, komam ekoto ajen ŋes, kosodi emoŋ aiar ekiliokit arai aberu; ibiribirio emoŋ ŋol kamor, elopet da eario."
Exodus21:30 Arai ketubokin lugelis, einakini iboro kere luatubokinio alakunia aijarake."
Exodus21:31 Arai kerem ikoku yenisapat, arai yenipcse, etubokinio kwape ejaar etube ŋol."
Exodus21:32 Arai kerem emoŋ ebulesit arai abulesit; einakinio ejakaitike isekelin akaisauni luka epuesa, emoŋ da ibiribirio kamor."
Exodus21:33 Arai kepuko etuijanan aipany, arai kebok aipany komam enuki, kibirokin emoŋ arai esigiria,"
Exodus21:34 Itegelio elopet aipany; einakini elopet-ibarasit apesan, etiaŋ da loatwana eraun loke."
Exodus21:35 Arai kerem emoŋ loka etuŋanan emoŋ loka yenice, ajar; egwelario emoŋ loejari, etiakete etiaike; etiakete da ibarasit yenikatwan,"
Exodus21:36 Arai kejenun ebe abu emoŋ konaikinite sek aremerem luce, komam elopet ekoto ajen ŋes; ibusakinit ŋes alemun cut emoŋ itia emoŋ, ibarasit yenikatwan eraun yenike."
Exodus22:1 Arai kekokou ctunanan emoŋ, arai emerekek, kosodi aiar, arai agwelar; itegelio imoŋin ikany itia emoŋ, imerekekin iwonon itia emerekek,"
Exodus22:2 Arai kedumun ekokolan epakapakai etogo, kosodete aibun ŋes kotwana, mam ejaun akirot kanuka akeokot."
Exodus22:3 Arai kiwalaki akwap, ejaun akirot kanuka akeokot: ibusakinit ŋes aigel; arai emamei ŋes ibore, egwelario ŋes kanuka akokoke."
Exodus22:4 Arai kedumun ibore yenikekokouni ŋesi eiari kakanike, emoŋ arai esigiria arai emerekek; egeli irwan aarei."
Exodus22:5 Arai kitadak etuŋanan emanikor arai amana naka emusabibu, kojalak ikebaasit ainyam emanikor loka ecetuŋanan; egeli kanuitelekarito ajokis komanikorike, ka nuitelekarito ajokis kamanake naka emusabibu."
Exodus22:6 Arai kenoku akim, kiniepakin okukwa, kosodete atukon nuka akima, arai akima nuebwanete, arai emanikor, aidopor; abeit egeli yenikinokokin akim."
Exodus22:7 Arai kisinadiki etuŋanan ekeidunyet apesan arai iboro, kokokwarai kotogoke; ketakanu ekokolan, etaci irwan aarei."
Exodus22:8 Arai mam ekokolan etakanuni, ikunyakini elopet etogo neejai Edeke, aanyun arai diat mam abu kibwaik akekan oboro luka eidunyeteke."
Exodus22:9 Kanuka tjinikirot naka adiakar, arai kanuka emoŋ, arai kanuka asigiria, arai kanuka amerekek, arai kanuka inapen, arai kanuka nin yeneoliorit, yenelimor ituŋanan ebe, ‘Ŋes yen,’ eyaŋaunio akiro nuka nul Iuarei mama ejai Edeke; ŋin yenetubokini Edeke akirot etacakini ikeidunyet irwan aarei."
Exodus22:10 Arai kijokoki ituŋanan ikeidunyet asigiria, arai emoŋ, arai amerekek arai etiaŋ kere: kosodi atwanare, arai aimusuŋio, arai aireneario komam idiotuŋanan eanyunit:"
Exodus22:11 Aiyaposit naka Edeke ejai kidinikec, arai mam ibwaikinit akekan oboro luka ikeidunyet; iyuuni ilopet, kwabo mam ii etaci."
Exodus22:12 Konye arai kekokwari kaneejai ŋesi, etacakini ilopet-ibore."
Exodus22:13 Arai ekwaeakwacatai, eyauni koluor aanyunet, mam etacakini yenekwacakwacatai."
Exodus22:14 Arai kilipa ituŋanan iidunyeteke ibore, kicanicanun, arai kotwana, komamei ilopet, abeit etacakini."
Exodus22:15 Arai ejai ilopet mam etacakini; arai erai yeneropitai, elomari oropitike."
Exodus22:16 Arai kecodocod etuŋanan abekot naeroko isinera, koperoto kaŋes, abeit elemuni iboro luka amurake, koraun do aberuke."
Exodus22:17 Arai kegiri papake eut akorakin ŋes, etaci etiai kwape ejaar aimany abekon."
Exodus22:18 Sirinyeinenei akacudan eiari.
Exodus22:19 Ŋinitunanan yeneperenenei ketiaŋ abeit eario.
Exodus22:20 Yeneinanakini asuban mama ejai edeke ece, nabarai mama ejai EJAKAIT bon, emudiario cut."
Exodus22:21 Sirikiswamak emoit erono, karaida areit ŋes: naarai iraas kolo yesi da imo kakwap nako Misiri."
Exodus22:22 Siritieanete apuserun ka ikokiok.
Exodus22:23 Arai iticanenete kes kemonyata neaiai, abeit apupuni akeceimony;"
Exodus22:24 Eresiar anyunyuraka noi, kaarete kekilen; akusiŋor da eraunos apuserun, ka ikusidwe da eraunos ikokiok."
Exodus22:25 Arai kiyu idiopet kotunaka kapesan, kicana ŋesi, sirikisub bala itepesenit ŋes; ido mam itubokini ameda."
Exodus22:26 Arai kiititini ijo egoe loka eidunyetekon, kinyakanakinenei ŋes eroko akoloŋ elomara."
Exodus22:27 Naarai nol ŋes eimuketeke bon, ŋes anapito naka akuanake; imukor kinyo? kosodi naemonyia mamaka apupununei ŋes; naarai asiana eoŋ."
Exodus22:28 Sirirasenenei Edeke, ido sirilamanakinene ekapolon loka ituŋakon,"
Exodus22:29 Sirikiyap ainakin amio naka araitokon, ka akonijon da. Kiinakini eoŋ ekiyai kodwekon."
Exodus22:30 Kikonenenei nen kimoijinikon ka amerekekinikon da; kojaenena katotoke apaarasia akanykaarei; kiinakini eoŋ kapaaran nakikanyetekauni.
Exodus22:31 Iraunos do ituŋa lukalaunak kama ajai: kanuka nun mam inyamete akiriŋ naepoopoot etiaij loka ais; icakanakinete inokwo.
Exodus23:1 Siricamununei akirot kere naka aisab: siripikanakin akonikan nepcpe ka ikaronok, araun ekajenan lomam edolit."
Exodus23:2 Siritupanari ekodet aswam aronis; kwabo sirikitejen akirot kopaarite mama ejai ekodet aibelokin etube:
Exodus23:3 Kwabo sirikimin yenikican naitubokinia akekiro.
Exodus23:4 Arai kidum emoŋ loka lokasurupokon arai akesigiria eoliorit, kibusakinit ainari ŋes."
Exodus23:5 Arai kianyu asigiria naka lokilait ijo icikakinit abwokonike, komam ipuda aiŋarakin ŋes, kibusakinit ijo aiŋarakin ŋes cut."
Exodus23:6 Sirikibelok akirot naka yenikicanikon naitubokinia.
Exodus23:7 Kinacenenei akirot naka aisab; siriari yenimam aronis ka ikadoliton: naarai mam eoŋ etoioki ikaronon.
Exodus23:8 Sirikijau ainakinet: naarai itumudaki ainakinet akonye nuka kaluesesenete, ibelokini da akiro nuka ikadolitok."
Exodus23:9 Sirireit imoit: naarai iienete yesi cut etau loka imoit, naarai iraas kolo yesi da imo kakwap nako Misiri."
Exodus23:10 Iyeenenei ikinyomokon kokar ikanykape, itukonokini amiokec:"
Exodus23:11 Konye kisiyenuni alup kokaru lokikanyetekaarei, kiukasi; kosodete lukican luka ikonituŋa ainyam: luedepanaros konyam etiaŋ loka ais. Kikonencnei nen kamanakon naka emusabibu, ka naka eseituni."
Exodus23:12 Kiswamaenenei akoniswamisio kapaarasia akanykape, kiyenununei kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei: tetere iyenuni emoijokon ka akonisigiria, ikwaruni da okoku loka abulesitikon, ka imoit."
Exodus23:13 Kocoito akiro kere nukalimok yes: kwabo sirilimito ekiror loka idekesio ice, karaida apupunio kaitukukon."
Exodus23:14 Kidarenenei epucit mamakaŋ irwan auni ŋolikaru.
Exodus23:15 Kidarenenei epucit loka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi: inyamenenei imugatin lumam itubuunitoi apaarasia akanykaarei, kwape kecorakinia jo, kapak nacseunitai kolap loka Abib (naarai kanol ŋes kinyounio koMisiri); kwabo mam ctakanuni idiopet kakonyeneka komamei ibore."
Exodus23:16 Ido epucit loka aide araito nusodit nuka aitaaritoikon, nuibu koyeik mana: ido epueit loka aisak, kosane loka ekaru, naisakenenaa aitaaritoikon komana,"
Exodus23:17 Etakanunete ikiliokokon kere kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Edeke irwan auni ŋolikaru.
Exodus23:18 Siriinakincnei aokot nuka asubanitika kimugatin luitubuunitoi; mam iteperonori da asiepai naka epucitika.
Exodus23:19 Iyaununei nusodit nuegeunete alupokon aira togo loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke. Siripoenenei ikalol kakile nuka totoke.
Exodus23:20 Koany, ejukuni emalaika kiŋarenekon, aidar jo korot, ka ayaŋaar da jo aibois naetemokinit."
Exodus23:21 Kocoito ŋes, kiirasi eporotoke; sirikitunyunyurikis: naarai mam itimi aibucarikus; naarai ejai ckakiror tomakeŋ."
Exodus23:22 Konye arai kipup eut eporotoke, kiswamaenenei kere nuenera; araun do lokasurup loka lukasurupokon, etokokoli lukitokokolete jo."
Exodus23:23 Naarai iŋarenikini ckamalaika jo, kitolomari jo neejai Emorait, ka Ekitit, ka Eperisit, ka Ekanaanit, ka Ekibit, ka Eyebusit: amudiari eoŋ kes."
Exodus23:24 Sirikikukonokin idekesiokee, karaida aijaanakin, ido siriswamaenenei kwape ejaatar aswamisiokec: konye icakari kes cut, ibilibilei ipirinokec eut."
Exodus23:25 Ŋaanakinete yesi EJAKAIT Ekusideke, ŋes da isirereni inyamatakon ka akonikipi da; alemari eoŋ adekesia kokidiŋikon."
Exodus23:26 Emameun yenikijecuna, arai yenirakan, kotoma akwapukon: etodoli etiai leka apaarasiakon,"
Exodus23:27 Ejukuni asogimuka akonyenekon, eticani ituŋa kerc luidolokini ijo, etobonori lukasurupokon kere kau."
Exodus23:28 Eiukuni ekaturuturut kakonyenekon, loirencari Ekibit, ka Ekanaanit, ka Ekitit, kakonyenckon."
Exodus23:29 Mam ereŋeari kes kakonyenekon kokaru ediopet; tetere mam akwap iswapi, tetere mam itian da luka ais ipuaros kamakon."
Exodus23:30 Ereneanari kes motimot kakonyenekon, aitodol neiyatakinor ijo, kirum akwap."
Exodus23:31 Ebwaikini eikorukon anyoun kAŋolol Nakarenan kiton aŋolol naka Ipilisitian, anyoun da kamodiŋ kiton ocor: naarai eiaikini luibojete kakwap akanikon; ireneari ijo kes kakonyenekono"
Exodus23:32 Siritutukenenete kakes, karaida kikecedekesio."
Exodus23:33 Siriboienenete kesi kakwapukon, kinyeis aitidiakar jo kaneajai: naarai arai kijaanak idekesiokec, abeit eraun akuluma kamakon.”"
Exodus24:1 Kobala ŋesi Musa ebe, “Kodoka mama ejai EJAKAIT, ijo ka Aaron, ka Nadab, ka Abiku, ka akaisakanykaarei komakio luka Isirael; komaata da kama elwana."
Exodus24:2 Ikunyakini Musa bon mama ejai EJAKAIT; konye kes mam ikunyakinete; karaida ituŋa adokar nepepe kaŋes.”
Exodus24:3 Kobu Musa kolimok ituŋa akiro kere nuka EJAKAIT, ka itubesia kere; kobonokis ituŋa kere keporoto ediopet, kobalas ebe, “Akiro kere nuener EJAKAIT kiswamai isio.”"
Exodus24:4 Kiwadik Musa akiro kere nuka EJAKAIT: konyou tupuruc sek, kodukok etem kwap kemoru, ka ipirin itomon ka luarei, kwape ejaatar atekerin atomon ka nuarei nuka Isirael."
Exodus24:5 Kijuka ikatumunak luka idwe luka Isirael, luapotu koinakis ainakineta nuicweio, koinakis ainakineta nuka ainapakin nuka imoŋin mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Exodus24:6 Koyana Musa atutubet naka aokot, kobukok atiboi; atutubet ace da naka aokot kobwatanak otem."
Exodus24:7 Kolem eitabo loka aitutuket, kosiomak ituŋa: kobalas kesi ebe, “Nuener EJAKAIT kere, kiswamai isio, kirimari da.”"
Exodus24:8 Kolem Musa aokot kobwatanak otuŋa, kobala ebe, “Koanyutu aokot nuka aitutuket, naetutuk EJAKAIT kayes kotoma akiro nu kere.”"
Exodus24:9 Kosodete Musa ka Aaron, ka Nadab, ka Abiku adokar, ka akaisakanykaarei komakio luka Isirael:"
Exodus24:10 Koanyut kesi Edeke loka Isirael; kwap kakejeke kosubite bala aswam naka amor nuepesitai nuka asapiro, nueputos aipioror naka akuj alopet."
Exodus24:11 Kwabo mam ibwaikina akekan mama kalukapolok luka idwe luka Isirael; koanyut Edeke, konyama komata."
Exodus24:12 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Kodoku moru mama ajai, kiboi kaŋina: kainakini jo amor nuewadikat, ka ikisila ka aicorakineta, tetere isisianakini kes.”"
Exodus24:13 Konyou Musa ka Yosua ekekejaanakinan: kodoka Musa moru loka Edeke.
Exodus24:14 Kotema ŋesi imakio atiar, “Kidareunai sio kane, aitodol nekibonunio mama ijaas; ido koany, Aaron ka Kur ejaas nepepe kayes; ninitunanan yeneiai akirot, kolot mama ejaas.”"
Exodus24:15 Kodoka Musa moru, korapia edou emoru."
Exodus24:16 Kojai aibuses naka Edeke moru Sinai, korapia edou emoru apaarasia akanykape: kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei konyara ŋesi Musa kokidin odou."
Exodus24:17 Aputo naka aibuses naka EJAKAIT kosubite kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael bala akim naesarani noi kokuju moru.
Exodus24:18 Koloma Musa kidin odou, kodoka moru: kodau Musa komoru apaarasia akaisaoŋon paaran ka kuare."
Exodus25:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Exodus25:2 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, kainut eoŋ ainakinet: ijaunete ainakineteka ŋinituŋanan yenitokotori eketau ainakin,"
Exodus25:3 Na ŋes ainakinet naijaunete; esabu, epuesa, aisinit;"
Exodus25:4 Ka egoe lobululu, ka lomuge, ka Lokareŋan, ka ebaputa loejok, ka ajulo nuka akinei;"
Exodus25:5 Ka imukulen luka imerekekin Iuitereŋitai, ka imukulen luka etakas, ka akito nuka sita;"
Exodus25:6 Akinyet naka atala, ka lueuru maa luka akinyet nakinyonyoanakina, ka luka lukisupurununo;"
Exodus25:7 Amor nuemelomeloto, ka amor nuipiripiranara, aibwaikin opod, ka yenikatorob da."
Exodus25:8 Keswamakis eoŋ aiba is nakalaunan; tetere eboie kokidinikec,"
Exodus25:9 Nuketodianakini jo kere, epone loka ewema, ka epone loka iboroke kere, iswamaete yesi kwaŋin."
Exodus25:10 Ido iswamaete kesi asaduku naka akito nuka sita: aojauke ikubitin iarei ka atutubet, alalauke ekubit ediopet ka atutubet, amukururuke ekubit ediopet ka atutubet,"
Exodus25:11 Ido iladaari ŋes kesabu loelai, iladaari kujuke kotomake da, isubakini ŋes atorosit naka esabu airimor."
Exodus25:12 Itataikini ŋes igilun iwonon luka esabu, kibwaik kes toma akeieke aoŋon; eiaunete igilun iarei kosiepike ediopet, iarei da osiepike ece."
Exodus25:13 Iswamauni adaketa nuka akito nuka sita, iladaari kes kesabu."
Exodus25:14 Itolomikini adaketa toma ogilun lukosiepion luka asaduku, adakia ŋes,"
Exodus25:15 Esalanakinete adaketa ogilun luka asaduku: mam elemanario.
Exodus25:16 Ibwaikini aiteienuner nakainakini jo toma asaduku.
Exodus25:17 Iswamauni da eicoloŋ-lokaitim loka esabu loclai: aojauke ikubitin iarei ka atutubet, alalauke da ekubit ediopet ka atutubet."
Exodus25:18 Iswamauni da ikerubin iarei luka esabu; iswamauni kes kaswam naerukuk, kosaijeta iarci luka eicoloŋ-lokaitim."
Exodus25:19 Iswamakini da ekerubi ediopet osaŋe ediopet, ka ekerubi ece osaŋe ece: iswamakini kwaŋin eicoloŋ-lokaitim ka ikerubin osanetake iarei kobore idiopet."
Exodus25:20 Igarararete ikerubin abebenokakec kuiu, korapito eicoloŋ-lokaitim kakecebebenoka, kiteos da ireetakec; kosesenete ireeta luka ikerubin eicoloŋ-lokaitim."
Exodus25:21 Ido ibwaikini eicolon-Iokaitim kuju asaduku; ibwaikini aiteienunet nakainakini jo toma asaduku.
Exodus25:22 Nen kiriamunun kaio, enerakin kajo koicolon-lokaitim, kokidiŋ kikerubin iarei lueiaas kuju asaduku naka aiteienunet, akiro kere nukainakini kotoma aicorakineta mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael."
Exodus25:23 Iswamauni emesa da loka akito nuka sita: aojauke ikubitin iarei, alalauke ekubit ediopet, amukururuke da ekubit ediopet ka atutubct."
Exodus25:24 Iladaari ŋes kesabu loelai, isubakini atorosit naka esabu airimor."
Exodus25:25 Iswamakini ŋes atokitoit alalau naka akan airimor, iswamakini atorosit naka esabu airimor atokitoit."
Exodus25:26 Iswamakini ŋes igilun iwonon luka esabu, ibwaikini igilun agoria aoŋon nuejaas akejeke aoŋon,"
Exodus25:27 Idunyakinos igilun katokitoit, araut aiboisio nuka adaketa adakia emesa."
Exodus25:28 Iswamauni adaketa nuka akito nuka sita, iladaari kes kesabu, adakia emesa."
Exodus25:29 Iswamauni atubaake, ka akaaleike, ka amotiike, ka atanyake, abukununio; iswamauni kes kesabu loelai."
Exodus25:30 Ibwaanakini tiritir imugatin luka aitodikin omesa kakonycneka.
Exodus25:31 Iswamauni epir loka atala kesabu loelai: kaswam naerukuk, ŋes iswamaunia epir loka atala, abwoeteke, ka akodeteke; akolinoke, ka akwesike, ka aturoke, koraas nuka ibore idiopet."
Exodus25:32 Elomunete da icogen ikanykape kowaitinike; icogen iuni kowai ediopet loka epir loka atala, icogen da iuni kowai loce loka epir laka atala."
Exodus25:33 Akolin auni nuiswamatai aputorit atur kocoget ediopet, akouke ka aturot; ka akolin auni nuiswamatai aputorit atur kocoget ece, akouke ka aturot: kwaŋin kotoma ocogen ikanykape luelomunito kopir laka atala."
Exodus25:34 Ejaunete akolin aoŋon kotoma opir laka atala nuiswamatai aputorit atur, ka akwesikec ka aturokec."
Exodus25:35 Ejaun da akou kwap kicogen iarei luka ibore idiopet, ka akou kwap kicogen iarei luka ibore idiopet, ka akou kwap kicogen iarei luka ibore idiopet, kwapc ejaatar icogen ikanykape luelomunito kopir loka atala,"
Exodus25:36 Akwesikec ka icogenekec koraas luka ibore idiopet: korai kere aswam naerukuk naka esabu loelai.
Exodus25:37 Iswamauni atalaike akanykaarei: isipokinete da atalaike tetere ccaikinetc,"
Exodus25:38 Eraunos aitudeŋetake ka asaninike nuka ekurwon, nuka esabu loelai."
Exodus25:39 Iswamauni iboro lu kere kalaniru naka atalata naka csabu loelai.
Exodus25:40 Koany ebe iswamauni ijo kes kwape ejaar akeceput, nakitodikinitai jo komoru."
Exodus26:1 Bobo da iswamauni ewema kaigalisio atomon; nuka ebaputa loecipitai kiusio lueriim ka lobululu, ka lomuge, ka lokarenan, nepepe kikerubin aswam naka ekeswaman loepiriana ŋes iswamaunia kes."
Exodus26:2 Aojau naka ninigalisit korai ikubitin akaisaarei ka lukanykauni, alalau naka niniigalisit ikubitin iwonon: aigalisio kere koraas nuka aitemis adiopet."
Exodus26:3 Iropikini aigalisio akany; iropikini da aigalisio ace akany.
Exodus26:4 Iswamakini da akodeta nubululu oreret loka aigalisit nakawasia kotoma kanueropikinitai: iswamakini da kwaŋin oreret loka aigalisit nakawasia kotoma kanuce nueropikinitai.
Exodus26:5 Iswamakini akodeta akaisakany toma aigalisit adiopet, iswamakini da akodeta akaisakany oreret loka aigalisit nakiareit naeropikinitai; kiteosi da akedeta ijun."
Exodus26:6 Iswamauni aruceta akaisakany nuka esabu, imorikikini aigalisio nun karuceta kanun: koraun ediopewema."
Exodus26:7 Iswamauni aigalisio nuka aiulo nuka akinei araun ewema kokuiu owema: iswamauni aigalisio atomon ka nadiopet.
Exodus26:8 Aojau naka niniigalisit korai ikubitin akaisauni, alalau da naka niniigalisit korai ikubitin iwonon: aigalisio nun atomon ka nadiopet koraas kere nuka aitemis adiopet."
Exodus26:9 Iropikini aigalisio akany kowaikec bonik, ka aigalisio akanykape kowaikec, ikudokini aigalisit nakikanyetekape koinaren kewema."
Exodus26:10 Iswamauni akodcta akaisakany koreret loka aigalisit nakawasia kanun kanueropikinitai, ka akodeta akaisakany koreret loka aigalisit nakawasia kanuce kanueropikinitai."
Exodus26:11 Iswamauni aruceta akaisakany nuka aisinit, ibwaikini aruceta nun toma akodeta, imorikikini ewema nepepe, tetere eraun ediopet."
Exodus26:12 Ka atutubet nin naesalakini naekudokina naka aigalisio nuka ewema, atutubet nin naka aigalisit naesalakini ijeko kokau kewema."
Exodus26:13 Ekubit ediopet owai ediopet, ka ekubit cdiopet owai loce, loesali kaojau naka aigalisio nuka ewema ijeko kosiepion luka ewema, owai lo kowai je da, arapit."
Exodus26:14 Iswamauni eimukoret loka ewema kimukulen luka imerekekin Iuiterenitai, kokuiuke da eimukoret loka imukulen luka etakas."
Exodus26:15 Iswamauni abaoi nuka ewema nuka akito nuka sita, nuesipos."
Exodus26:16 Aoiau naka ninibao ikubitin itomon, alalau da naka ninibao ekubit ediopet ka atutubet."
Exodus26:17 Ejaun ninibao karucetake aarei, nuerucokinito adiopet mama ejai nace: iswamauni kwaŋin abaoi kere nuka ewema."
Exodus26:18 Iswamauni abaoi nuka ewema, abaoi akaisaarei kowai loka eŋalakimak kari naka eŋalakimak."
Exodus26:19 Iswamauni aigaŋeta akaisaoŋon nuka epuesa kwap kabaoi nun akaisaarei; aigaŋeta aarei kwap kabao adiopet neelomarete arucetake aarei ka aigaŋeta aarei kwap kabao ace neelomarete arucetake aarei,"
Exodus26:20 Kowai lokiareit loka ewema kari naka agolitomei, abaoi akaisaarei;"
Exodus26:21 Aigaŋetakec nuka epuesa akaisaoŋon; aigaŋeta aarei kwap kabao adiopet, ka aigaŋeta aarei kwap kabao nace."
Exodus26:22 Iswamauni da abaoi akanykape kowai lokokau loka ewema ari nakoto,"
Exodus26:23 Iswamauni da abaoi aarei nuka agoria nuejaas to kewema.
Exodus26:24 Koraas aareiarei kokwap, kwaŋin irotakina abaoi nepcpe anyoun kokwap aitodol kuiu ogilut ediopet: ejaunete kwaŋin kere aarei; eraas nuka agoria nun aarei."
Exodus26:25 Ejaunete abaoi akanykauni, ka aigaŋetakec nuka epuesa, aigaŋeta atomon ka nukanykape; aigaŋeta aarei kwap kabao adiopet, ka aigaŋeta aarei kwap kabao nace."
Exodus26:26 Iswamauni ariino nuka akito nuka sita; ariino akany nuka abaoi nukowai ediopet loka ewema.
Exodus26:27 Ka ariino akany nuka abaoi nukowai lokiareit loka ewema, ka ariino akany nuka abaoi nukoto kewema, ari nakoto."
Exodus26:28 Ka ariit nakokidin naejai kidin kabaoi iriikini anyoun kepuai kiton epuai.
Exodus26:29 Iladaari abaoi nun ke sa bu, iswamauni da igilunukec lukitolomanakina ariino kesabu: iladaari ariino kesabu."
Exodus26:30 Isipokini ewema kaputoke naaponi kitcdikin jo komoru.
Exodus26:31 Ido iswamauni aigalisit kegoe kalobululu, ka lomuge, ka lokareijan, ka ebaputa loecipitai kiusio lueriim: icipakinio ikerubin ogoe aswam naka ekeswaman kaloepiriana:"
Exodus26:32 Ikajakini opirin iwonon luka akito nuka sita luiladaaritai kesabu, eraunos igolunakec luka esabu, kotoma aigaŋeta aoŋon nuka epuesa."
Exodus26:33 Ikajakini aigalisit kwap kogolun, itolomikin asaduku naka aiteienunet toma aigalisit: etiaki aigalisit kamakus aibois nakalaunan ka aibois nakalaunan noi."
Exodus26:34 Ibwaikini eicolon-Iokaitim toma asaduku naka aiteicnunet aibois nakalaunan noi.
Exodus26:35 Ibwaikini emesa kina kaigalisit, ka epir loka atala kiteos kemesa kowai loka ewema ari naka eŋalakimak: ibwaikini cmesa ari naka agolitomei."
Exodus26:36 Ido iswamauni aigalisit naka ekek loka Ewema, lobululu, lomuge, ka lokarenan ka ebaputa Ioecipitai kiusio lueriim, aswam naka ekasonyan."
Exodus26:37 Ido iswamakini aigalisit ipirin ikany luka akito nuka sita, iladaari kes kesabu; eraunos igolunakec luka esabu: itataikini kes aigaŋeta akany nuka aisinit."
Exodus27:1 Iswamauni etem loka akito nuka sita, aoiauke ikubitin ikany, alalau ikubitin ikany: korai etem loka agoria aoŋon nueriakanara: akemukurur da korai ikubitin iuni."
Exodus27:2 Iswamauni da akemumwara kuju kagoriake aoŋon: koraas akemumwara nuka ibore idiopet kaŋes: iladaari ŋes kaisinit.
Exodus27:3 Iswamauni da atubake nuigaete ekurwon, ka initiake ka atanyake, ka igolunake luka akiriŋ, ka ekekiala: iswamauni ikeboro nul kere kaisinin."
Exodus27:4 Iswamakini da etem eboi loka aisinit; ibwaikini ipetai iwonon luka aisinin toma agoria aoŋon nuka eboi.
Exodus27:5 Ibwaikini eboi nol kwap kapama nairimorit etem kokwap, tetere edoli eboi kiduj osiepion luka etem."
Exodus27:6 Ikeuni akito kanuka etem, nuka akito nuka sita, iladaari kes kaisinit."
Exodus27:7 Irupakinio akito nun toma opetai, ejaunos akito ŋun osiepion iarei luka etem adakia."
Exodus27:8 Kiswama etem kabaoi koorori kotoma: kwape kitodikinitere komoru, kwaŋin ŋes iswamauniata."
Exodus27:9 Iswamauni alaro naka ewema: kowai loka eŋalakimak ari naka eŋalakimak ejaunos igoen luigalitoi luka ebaputa loecipitai kiusio lueriim, aojauke kowai ediopet korai ikubitin akwatat."
Exodus27:10 Koraas ikepirin akaisaarei, aigaŋetakec da akaisaarei nuka aisinin; igolun luka ipirin ka aikaietakec koraas nuka epuesa."
Exodus27:11 Kwape kwaŋin owai loka agolitomei ejaunos igoen luigalitoi, aojaukec ikubitin akwatat ka ipirinokec akaisaarei, ka aigaŋetakec akaisaarei, nuka aisinin; igolun luka ipirin ka aikajetakec koraas nuka epuesa."
Exodus27:12 Kanuka alalau naka alaro kowai lokoto ejaunos igoen luigalitoi aojaukec ikubitin akaisakany: ikecepirin itomon, ka aigaŋetakec atomon."
Exodus27:13 Alalau da naka alaro kowai lokokide kari nakokide eraun ikubitin akaisakany.
Exodus27:14 Igoen luigalitoi lukowai ediopet loka erute eraunos ikubitin itomon ka lukany: ipirinokec iuni, aigaŋetakec auni."
Exodus27:15 Ido kowai ece ejaunos igoen luigalitoi luka ikubitin itomon ka lukany; ipirinokec iuni, aigaŋetakec da auni."
Exodus27:16 Ido kanuka erute loka alaro ejaun aigalisit naka ikubitin akaisaarei, lobululu, lomuge, ka Lokareŋan, ka ebaputa loecipitai kiusio lueriim, aswam naka ekasonyan: ipirinokec iwon on, aigaŋetakec da aoŋon."
Exodus27:17 Ipirin kere luka alaro luirimorito ejaunos aikajeta nuka epuesa: igolunakec luka epuesa, ka aigaŋetakec nuka aisinin."
Exodus27:18 Aojau naka alaro eraun ikubitin akwatat, alalauke da kere ikubitin akaisakany, amukurur ikubitin ikany, nuka ebaputa loecipitai kiusio lueriim, ka aigaŋetakec nuka aisinin."
Exodus27:19 Iboro kere lukowema ka aijaanakinike kere, ka iloinoke kere, ka iloin kere luka alaro, eraunos luka aisinin."
Exodus27:20 Ido icorakini idwe luka Isirael, koinutu akinyet naejok naka eseitun naerukuk kanuka aica, aitonokia atala tiritir."
Exodus27:21 Kotoma owema loka airiamunun kina kaigalisit naejai iŋaren kaitejenunet, itemonokinete Aaron ka odweke ageun eboŋ aitodol tupuruc kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: eraun ekisil apaarasia kere anatar aturiokec kodwe luka Isirael."
Exodus28:1 Kisukuny ijo Aaron onacekon, ka odweke nepepe kaŋes, kodwe luka Isirael, kejaanak eoŋ kosasedotene, Aaron, ka Nadab ka Abiku, ka Eleasar ka Itamar, odwe luka Aaron,"
Exodus28:2 Ido iswamakini onacekon Aaron inapen lukalaunak, kanuka aibuses ka ajokis da."
Exodus28:3 Ilimokini kere luejaas itauon luka apirianut, lueteleleb eoŋ kemoyo loka acoa, kiswamata inapen luka Aaron aitalaunia ŋes, kejaanak eoŋ kosasedotene."
Exodus28:4 Lu kes inapen luiswamaunete kesi; yenikatorob, ka epod, ka ekaso, ka ekooti loocerer, ka egoe lokieniena akou, ka aenetait naka aŋabet: iswamakinete Aaron onacekon ka odweke inapen lukalaunak, kejaanak eoŋ kosasedotene."
Exodus28:5 Eyaŋaarete esa bu, ka lobululu, ka lomuge, ka Lokareŋan, ka ebaputa loejok,"
Exodus28:6 Iswamaunete kesi epod loka esabu, ka lobululu, ka lomuge, ka Lokareŋan, ka ebaputa loecipitai kiusio lueriim, aswam naka ekeswaman kalocpiriana."
Exodus28:7 Ejaunos lukokeperin iarei luimorikikinitai kosanetakec iarei; tctere imorikikina.
Exodus28:8 Aenet da naicipitai kapirianut, naejai tomake aenia, koputos akeswam kaswam naka egoeke; loka esabu, ka lobululu, lomugc, lokarenan, ka ebaputa loecipitai kiusio lueriim."
Exodus28:9 Ido iyaŋaari amor aarei nuemelomeloto, kigiranak nen ikiroria luka idwe luka Isirael."
Exodus28:10 Ikiroriakec ikanykape amoru adiopet, ka ikiroria ikanykape luesalitos amoru nakiareit, kwape eiaar auriokec."
Exodus28:11 Aswam naka ekegiran amor, kwape igiria emacar, ŋes igiria ijo amor ŋun aarei kwape ejaatar ikiroria luka idwe luka Isirael: ilukuni kes kapesan nuka esabu."
Exodus28:12 Ibwaikini da amor nun aarei okeperin luka epod, araun amor nuka aisiitunet kanuka idwe luka Isirael: edakari Aaron ikiroriakec akonyen nuka EJAKAIT kokeperinike iarei araun aisntunet,"
Exodus28:13 Iswamauni da apesan nuka esabu:
Exodus28:14 Ka irikoi iarei luka esabu kaloelai; iswamauni kwape kaunoi, kaswam kanaeojitoi: ienikini da irikoi lueoiitoi toma apesan."
Exodus28:15 Ido iswamauni yenikatorob yeniketube, aswam naka ekeswaman kaloepiriana: iswamauni kwape kaswam naka epod; yenika esabu, ka yenibululu, ka yenimuge, ka yenikarenan, ka ebaputa loecipitai kiusio lueriim, iswamauni ŋes kwaŋin."
Exodus28:16 Eraun yenika agoria aoŋon nueriakanara, ekudokinitai bala eriagi, aojauke eraun atutubet naka ekubit, alalauke da atutubet naka ekubit,"
Exodus28:17 Ido ipiripiranakini amor nekiminaikina, ikokoron iwonon luka amor: ekokoro loka asadia, * ka atopasit, * ka karubunikol * ŋes eraun ckokoro losodit;"
Exodus28:18 Ekokoro lokiareit loka emeralid, * ka asapiro, * ka diamod*;"
Exodus28:19 Ekokoro lokiwuniet loka eyasit, * ka aget,* ka ametusit*;"
Exodus28:20 Ka ekokoro lokiwoŋonet loka aberul, * ka naemelomelot, * ka ayaseper; elukunio esabu loiminaikinere."
Exodus28:21 Eraunos amor kwape ejaatar ikiroria luka idwe luka Isiracl, atomon ka nuarei, kwape ejaatar ikiroriakec; kwape igiria emacar, niniruŋanan kwape ejaar ekekiror, eraunos kanuka atekerin atomon ka nuarei."
Exodus28:22 Ido ibwaikini toma yenikatorob irikoi kwape kaunoi, luka aswam naeoiitoi naka esabu kaloelai."
Exodus28:23 Ibwaikini da igilun iarei luka esabu toma yenikatorob, ibwaikini igilun Ŋul iarei osaŋeta iarei luka yenikatorob."
Exodus28:24 Ibwaikini irikoi iarei luka esabu lueojitoi toma ogilun iarei lukosaneta luka yenikatorob.
Exodus28:25 Ibwaikini isaneta ice luka irikoi nul luarei lueojitoi toma apesan kwa aarei, kosodi aibwaikin okeperin luka epod, kowaike lokoinaren."
Exodus28:26 Iswamauni da igilun iarei luka esabu, ibwaikini toma osaŋeta iarei luka yenikatorob, toma atokitoitike, naejai owai Iokotoma loka epod."
Exodus28:27 Iswamauni igilun iarei luka esa bu, kosodi aibwaikin toma atutubeta aarei nuka ikeperin luka epod kwapuke, kowai lokoiŋaren, eiduny kaimorikikinetake, kuju aenet naka epod naicipitai kapirianut."
Exodus28:28 Eenikinete igilun luka yenikatorob ka igilun luka epod keusi lobululu, tetere iboie kokuju aenet naka epod naicipitai kapirianut, tetere mam yenikatorob ilaiakin kepod."
Exodus28:29 Ido enapenenei Aaron ikiroria luka idwe luka Isirael kotoma yenikatorob yeniketube kotauke, naelomanaria aibois nakalaunan, araun aisiitunet natir kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Exodus28:30 Ibwaikini Urim ka Tumim toma yenikatorob ycniketube; ejaununos otau loka Aaron, naelomanaria akonyen nuka EJAKAIT: enapenenei Aaron etube loka idwe luka Isirael kotauke tiritir kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Exodus28:31 Iswamauni ekaso loka epod korai kere lobululu.
Exodus28:32 Ejaun apedot kotomake neitori akou: ejaun atokitoit p-aka aswam naicipitai airimor apedotoke, kwape kapedot naka ekooti loka acuma, kinyek acilio."
Exodus28:33 Toma atweleike iswamakin akamamagan nuka lobululu, ka lomuge, ka Lokareŋan, airimor atwelei kere; ka icirin luka esabu kidinikec airimor:"
Exodus28:34 Ecirit loka esabu ka akamamaga, ka ecirit loka esabu ka akamamaga, airimor atwelei nuka ekaso."
Exodus28:35 Ido enapenenei Aaron aiiaanakinia: iiranario da aruokec naelomanaria aibois nakalaunan akonycn nuka EJAKAIT, naelomununia da, kinyek atwanare."
Exodus28:36 Iswamauni amekemeket nakesabu kaloelai, kigirak ŋes, kwape igiria emacar ebe, IKALAUNAN YENIKA EJAKAIT."
Exodus28:37 Ieni keusi lobululu, ido ejaun ogoe lokieniena akou; ejaenena kiŋaren kegoe lokieniena akou."
Exodus28:38 Ido ejaenena oreet loka Aaron, ibwokenenei Aaron numam adolit nuka iboro lukalaunak, luitalaunete idwe luka Isirael kotoma ainakinetakec kere nukalaunak; ejaenena oreet loka Aaron apaarasia kere, tetere ecamunio kes kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Exodus28:39 Icipuni ekooti locerer loka ebaputa kaloejok, iswamauni da kebaputa kaloejok egoe lokieniena akou, iswamauni aenetait naka aŋabet, aswam naka ekasonyan."
Exodus28:40 Ido iswamakini idwe luka Aaron ikootin, iswamakini kes aeneta nuka aŋabes, akopiran da iswamakini kes, kanuka aibuses ka ajokis."
Exodus28:41 Itanapi kes Aaron onacekon, ka odweke; inyonyoikini kes akinyet, itiakuni kes, italauni kes, tetere keiaanakinete eoŋ kosasedotene."
Exodus28:42 Iswamakini kes ipalei luka ebaputa arapakinia awatekec nuejaas titai; egeunete kanabes kiton amurwos:
Exodus28:43 Enapenenei Aaron, ka odweke, naelomanariata toma owema loka airiamunun, arai naikunyakiniata otem aijaanakin kotoma aibois nakalaunan; tetere mam ibwokete numam adolit, kosodete atwakare: eraun ekisil kamake ka aurike naetupanakini ikar kere."
Exodus29:1 Na ŋes akirot naiswamakini kes aitalaunia kes, aijaanakin eoŋ kosasedotene: ilemuni emoŋ lotobait ka imerekekin iarei lumam eŋwalito,"
Exodus29:2 Ka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi, ka aluŋuren numam itubuunitoi nuinyalakinitai akinyet, ka imugatin luibenibena lumam itubuunitoi luinyonyoikinitai akinyet: ipouni kes kakiria nuidicic,"
Exodus29:3 Ibwaikini kes odita ediopet, iyauni kes kodita, ka emoŋ lotobait ka imerekekin iarei."
Exodus29:4 Iyauni Aaron ka odweke okek loka ewema loka airiamunun, iloŋi kes kakip."
Exodus29:5 Ilemuni igoen, itanapi Aaron ekooti, ka ekaso loka epod, ka epod, ka yenikatorob, ieni ŋes kaener naka epod naicipitai kapirianut:"
Exodus29:6 Ienienakini egoe akouke, idokokini aboko nakalaunan ogoe ŋol."
Exodus29:7 Kosodi ijo alemun akinyet nakinyonyoanakina, kobukok akouke kinyonyoanak ŋes,"
Exodus29:8 Iyauni odweke da, kosodi aitanap kes ikootin."
Exodus29:9 Ieni kes kaeneta, Aaron ka odweke, ienieni igoen akwesikec: eraunos do isasedotin kokisil lomam edaun: itiakuni ijo Aaron ka odweke."
Exodus29:10 Iyauni da emoŋ lotobait kinaren kewema loka airiamunun: idokokinete Aaron ka odweke akaninikec omon lotobait.
Exodus29:11 Iari ijo emoŋ lotobait kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kokek loka ewema loka airiamunun."
Exodus29:12 Ilemuni aokot nuka emoŋ lotobait ijukonokini da amumwara nuka etem kebokoritikon; ibukokini da aokot kere kwap ketem,"
Exodus29:13 Iwaruni da asiepai kere naerapit lukotoma, ka asiepai naka emany, ka iŋalur iarei, ka asiepaikec, icwei kes kotem."
Exodus29:14 Konye akiriŋ naka emoŋ lotobait, ka emukuleke, ka ikijitike icwei ijo kokina kiidukurun; erai ainakinet naka adiakar."
Exodus29:15 Iyanaari da emerekek ediopet; idokokinete Aaron ka odweke akaninikec akou naka emerekek.
Exodus29:16 Iari do ijo emerekek, iyanaari aokotoke, ibwatanakini otem."
Exodus29:17 Itubutubei emerekek, ilosi lukotomake, ka akeieke, kosodi aibwaikin inerioke ka akouke nepepe."
Exodus29:18 Icwei emerekek kere kotem: erai ainakinet naicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT: erai asakat naeuru saa, ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Exodus29:19 Iyanaari da emerekek ece; idokokinete Aaron ka odweke akaninikec akou naka emerekek.
Exodus29:20 Kosodi ijo aiar emerekek, iyaŋaari aokot, ijukono kini okobet loka akit nakoteten naka Aaron, okoben da luka aki nukoteten nuka odweke, obokorokec lukapolok luka akaninikec nukoteten, obokorokec lukapolok da luka akeienekec nukoteten, ibwatanakini da aokot otem."
Exodus29:21 Ilemuni aokot nuejaas otem ka akinyet nakinyonyoanakina ibwatakini Aaron onapeneke da, odweke da, ka onapenekec da nepepe kaŋes: italaunio ŋes, ka inapeneke, ka odweke, ka inapen luka odweke da."
Exodus29:22 Ilemuni da asiepai nuka emerekek ka asonyok ka asiepai naerapit lukotoma ka asiepai naka emany ka iŋalur iarei ka asiepaikec, ka amurwo nakoteten; naarai erai emerekek loka atiakunio:"
Exodus29:23 Ka emugati ediopet, ka aluŋuret adiopet naka imugatin luinyalakinitai akinyet, ka emugati ediopet loebenibena kodita loka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi loejai akonyen nuka EJAKAIT:"
Exodus29:24 Ibwaikini kere akanin nuka Aaron ka akanin nuka odweke; ijaŋari kes araun ainakinet naijanio kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT.
Exodus29:25 Ŋaari kes kakaninikec, icwei kes kotem kainakinet naicweio, araun asakat naeuru saa kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: ŋes ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Exodus29:26 Iyanaari atorob naka emerekek loka atiakunio naka Aaron, iianari araun ainakinet naijanio kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: eraun nakon,"
Exodus29:27 Italauni da atorob naka ainakinet naijaŋio, ka amurwo naka ainakinet naedakakina, naijanio, naedakakinitai, nuka emerekek loka atiakunio, kes nuka Aaron ka nuka odweke."
Exodus29:28 Eraunos nuitebeitai Aaron ka odweke ikar kere kodwe luka Isirael: naarai erai ainakinet naedakakinitai: eraun ainakinet naedakakinitai kodwe luka Isirael naka asuban nuka ainakinetakec nuka ainapakin, ŋes ainakinet naedakakinitai mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Exodus29:29 Eraunos inapen lukalaunak luka Aaron luenapete odweke luetupanakinete ŋes, ainyonyoanakinio kotomakec, atiakunio da kotomakec."
Exodus29:30 Enapenenei okokuke loeraun esasedoti aiboisike apaarasia akanykaarei naelomaria owema loka airiamunun aijaanakin toma aibois nakalaunan.
Exodus29:31 Iyanaari emerekek loka atiakunio, ipoi akirinike kaibois nakalaunan."
Exodus29:32 Enyamete Aaron ka odweke akiriŋ naka emerekek, ka imugatin lueiaas odita kokek Ioka ewema loka airiamunun."
Exodus29:33 Enyamete kesi iboro nul lualucere, atiakunia ka aitalaunia kes: konye mam emoit enyami nul naarai eraas lukalaunak."
Exodus29:34 Arai kideun akiriŋ naka atiakunio, arai imugatin aitodol tupuruc, icwei do ijo luideuna kakim: mam enyamio, naarai eraas lukalaunak."
Exodus29:35 Iswamakini ijo kwaŋin Aaron ka odweke, kwape ejaatar nukecorak jo kere: itiakuni kes apaarasia akanykaarei."
Exodus29:36 Ŋinipaaran iinakini emoŋ lotobait loka ainakinet naka adiakaret alucio: itesegaari etem nailucio ŋes; inyonyoanakini ŋes aitalaun,"
Exodus29:37 Iluci etem apaarasia akanykaarei, italauni ŋes: eraun etcm lokalaunan noi; yenetirori etem kere eraun yenikalaunan."
Exodus29:38 Lu kes luiinakini ijo otem; imerekekin iarei luka ekaru ediopet, ŋinipaaran komam aisal."
Exodus29:39 Iinakini idiopemerekek tupuruc; iinakini yenikiareit eboŋ:
Exodus29:40 Nepepe kidiopemerekek, idiopet kotomon yenika epa * Ioka akiria nuidicic nuinyalakinitai kidiopet koonon yenika ekin t laka akinyet naerukuk: ka idiopet koonon yenika ekin loka ebino araun ainakinet namatat."
Exodus29:41 Iinakini imerekek yenikiareit eboŋ, iswamakini ŋes kwape ejaar ainakinet naka akiria naka tupuruc, ido kwape ejaar ainakineteke namatat, araun asakat naeuru saa, ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Exodus29:42 Eraun ainakinet naicweio naduc anatar aturiokus okek loka ewema loka airiamunun kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: nekiriamuni kayes, ener kaio kanen,"
Exodus29:43 Ncn da ŋes kiriamun kidwe luka Isirael; italauni aibusesuka Ewema.
Exodus29:44 Etalauni eoŋ ewema loka airiamunun, ka etem: etalauni da Aaron ka odweke, aijaanakin eoŋ kosasedotene."
Exodus29:45 Eboienenei eoŋ kodwe luka Isirael, araun Ekecedeke."
Exodus29:46 Ejenunete da ebe, ani Eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, loetolomuni kes kakwap nako Misiri, tetere eboie kamakec: Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekecedeke."
Exodus30:1 Iswamauni etem lokisupuruunet lukisupurununo: iswamauni ŋes kakito nuka sita.
Exodus30:2 Aojauke eraun ekubit, alalauke da ekubit; eraun loka agoria aoŋon nueriakanara: amukururuke ikubitin iarei: amumwarake eraunos nuka ibore idiopet kaŋes,"
Exodus30:3 Iladaari ŋes kesabu loelai, kujuke, ka isiepionoke, ka amumwarake; iswamakini ŋes atorosit naka esabu airimor."
Exodus30:4 Iswamakini ŋes igilun iarei luka esabu kwap katorositike, amaranake aarei, iswamakini kes osiepionoke iarei; eraunos aiboisio nuka adaketa adakia ŋes."
Exodus30:5 Iswamauni adaketa nuka akito nuka sita iladaari kes kesabu.
Exodus30:6 Ibwaikini ŋes kinaren kaigalisit naejai eiduny kasaduku naka aitejenunet, kinaren keicolon-lokaitim loejai kuju kaitejenunet, nekiriamun kajo."
Exodus30:7 Isupuruuni Aaron kanen lukisupurununo luka lueuru maa: ninitupuruc, naitemonokinio ŋesi atalai isupuruuni kes."
Exodus30:8 Nainokokinia Aaron atalai eboŋ, isupuruuni kes, lukisupurununo lumam edaunos kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT anatar aturiokus."
Exodus30:9 Mam isupuruunete lukisupurununo luegelakina kanen, karaida ainakinet naicweio, karaida ainakinet naka akiria; mam ibukokinete ainakinet namatat nen."
Exodus30:10 Eluci Aaron amumwara nuka etem irwan atipet ŋolikaru: kaokot nuka ainakinet naka adiakaret eluci ŋes atipet nolikaru anatar aturiokus: erai lokalaunan noi kama ejai EJAKAIT.”
Exodus30:11 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Exodus30:12 “Naimaria ijo etiai loka idwe luka Isirael, kwape ejaatar nul luimarar kakesi, einakini ninitunanan EJAKAIT lulakunete aijarake, naimaria ijo kes; tetere mam ejaun atular mamakec naimaria ijo kes."
Exodus30:13 Yen ŋes yeneinakini ninitunanan yenetubori mama ejaas luimarar, atutubet naka esekel kwape ejaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan, (esekel ŋes igeran akaisaarei:)"
Exodus30:14 Ŋininnjanan yenetubori mama ejaas luimarar ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito einakini ainakinet naka EJAKAIT.
Exodus30:15 Mam ikabarak einakinete luedeparito, lukican da mam einakinete luikidioko, adepar atutubet naka esekel, naeinakiniata ainakinet naka EJAKAIT, alucio akusiijar."
Exodus30:16 Ŋauni apesan nuka alucio kama ejaas idwe luka Isirael, itwasamai kes aijaanakinia kowema loka airiamunun; tetere eraun aisiitunet kanuka idwe luka Isirael kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, alucio akusiiiar.”"
Exodus30:17 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Exodus30:18 “Iswamauni akalaya naka aisinit, aigaŋeteke naka aisinit, ailonia: ibwaikini ŋes kidin kewema loka airiamunun ka etem, ibukokini akipi toma."
Exodus30:19 Ilosete Aaron ka odweke akecekanin ka akecekeje kanen;
Exodus30:20 Naelomanariata owema loka airiamunun, ilosete kakip, tetere mam etwakete; arai naekunyuniata otem aijaanakin, aicwe ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT:"
Exodus30:21 Ilosete akecekanin ka akecekeie tetere mam etwakete: eraun ekisil kamakec ikar kere, kamake ka aurike anatar aturiokec.”"
Exodus30:22 Kotema bobo EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Exodus30:23 “Kolem lueuru maa jokan, emina loecalara isekelin akwat akany, akinomon naewiny atutubet naka ŋol, ŋes akwat aarei ka akaisakany, akalamus da naewiny akwat aarei ka akaisakany,"
Exodus30:24 Luka ekasia da akwat akany kwape ejaar csekel loka aibois nakalaunan, ka ekin loka akinyet naka eseitun:"
Exodus30:25 Itarauni ŋes akinyet nakinyonyoanakina nakalaunan, aures nainyalitai kwape ejaar apirianut naka ekenyalan lueuru maa: eraun akinyet nakinyonyoanakina nakalaunan."
Exodus30:26 Inyonyoanakini ewema loka airiamunun, ka asaduku naka aitejenunet,"
Exodus30:27 Ka emesa ka iboroke kere, ka epir loka atala: ka ikeboro kere, ka etem loka lukisupurununo,"
Exodus30:28 Ka etem loka ainakinet naicweio ka iboroke kere, ka akalaya ka aigaŋeteke."
Exodus30:29 Italauni ijo kes, koraut lukalaunak noi: yenetirori kes eraun yenikalaunan."
Exodus30:30 Inyonyoanakini Aaron ka odweke akinyet, italauni da kes, tetere keiaanakinete eoŋ kosasedotene."
Exodus30:31 Ilimokini idwc luka Isirael ebe,, Eraun na akinyet nakinyonycanakina nakalaunan kamaka anatar aturiokus."
Exodus30:32 Mam ebukokinio akuan naka ituŋanan, karaida yes aiswamaun naeputotor, kwape eiaar eiponeke: erai nakalaunan, eraun da nakalaunan kamakus."
Exodus30:33 Ŋinituŋanan yeniswamauni naeputotor, arai ninitunanan yeninyonyoikini ŋes emoit, egelario kotuŋake.’’’"
Exodus30:34 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Koya lueuru maa, esitakite, ka onika ka egalubanum; lueuru maa ka lukisupurununo luelaete: koriakas alanirukec kere;"
Exodus30:35 Iswamaunia ijo kes lukisupurununo, aures nainyalitai kwape ejaar apirianut naka ekenyalan lueuru maa, kitijiiimitete kabalan, naelai nakalaunan:"
Exodus30:36 Iruki ice kakesi aidecar, ibwaikini da kinaren kaitejenunet kowema loka airiamunun, nekiriamuni kajo: eraunos lukalaunak noi kamakon."
Exodus30:37 Lukisupurununo luiswamauni ijo kwape ejaar eponekec, mam iswamaunete kanukus: eraunos lukalaunak kamakus kanuka EJAKAIT."
Exodus30:38 Ŋinitunanan yeniswamauni lueputotor, ainuunun, egelario kotuŋake.”"
Exodus31:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Exodus31:2 “Koany, anyarau Besalel, okoku loka Uri, okoku loka Kur, loka ateker naka Yuda:"
Exodus31:3 Elelebik ŋes emoyo loka Edeke, kotoma acoa, ka aijen, ka apirianut, ka iponesio kere luka aswam,"
Exodus31:4 Aswam aswamisio nuka apirianut, atata esabu, ka epuesa, ka aisinit,"
Exodus31:5 Aigir amor nuiminaikinere, ka aiger akito, aswam da iponesio kere luka aswam."
Exodus31:6 Koany, aseu eoŋ ŋes ka Okoliab, okoku loka Akisamak, loka ateker naka Dan: ido ebwaik eoŋ acoa toma otauon luka ŋul kaluecoak kotauon, tetere iswamaunete Iukecorak jo kere:"
Exodus31:7 Ewema loka airiamunun, ka asaduku naka aitejenunet, ka eicoloŋ-lokaitim loejai kujuke, ka iboro kere luka Ewema;"
Exodus31:8 Ka emesa ka iboroke, ka epir loesegara loka atala ka iboroke kere, ka etem loka lukisupurununo;"
Exodus31:9 Ka etem loka ainakinet naicweio ka iboroke kere, ka akalaya ka aigaŋeteke;"
Exodus31:10 Ka inapen luedonyitai, ka inapen lukalaunak luka Aaron esasedoti, inapen da nuka odweke, luka aijaanakinia kosasedotene;"
Exodus31:11 Ka akinyet nakinyonyoanakina, ka lukisupurununo lueuru maa kanuka aibois nakalaunan: iswamaete kesi kwaŋin kwape ejaatar nukecorak jo kere.”"
Exodus31:12 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Exodus31:13 “Kolimok ijo idwe luka Isirael ebe, ‘Abeit idarenenete asabatonoka; naarai erai aanyunet kamakaŋ ka yes anatar aturiokus; tetere ijenunete ebe Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT loketalauni yes"
Exodus31:14 Idarenenete do asabato, naarai erai nakalaunan kamakus: ŋinituŋanan yenitisili ŋes abeit eario: naarai ninituŋanan yeniswamai adioswam kere kapaaran kaŋin, egelario irunanan nin kotuŋake."
Exodus31:15 Iswamao aswam apaarasia akanykape: konye apaaran nakikanyetekaarei erai nakasabato naka aibworar, nakalaunan naka EJAKAIT: ijinitunanan yeniswamai adioswam kapaaran nakasabato, abeit eario."
Exodus31:16 Kanuka ŋun idarete idwe luka Isirael asabato aricit asabato anatar aturiokec, araun aitutuket namam enaŋi."
Exodus31:17 Erai aanyunet kamakaŋ ka idwe luka Isirael ikar kere: naarai abu EJAKAIT kosub akuj ka akwap kotoma apaarasia akanykape, kibwora kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei, kikwar.’’’"
Exodus31:18 Kedau ŋesi einer kaMusa komoru Sinai kijaik ŋes amor aarei nuka aitejenunet, amor nuewadikatai kebokorit loka Edeke."
Exodus32:1 Keanyut ituŋa ebe eyap Musa adokun komoru, kotukonokinos mama ejai Aaron, kobalas ŋes ebe, “Konyou, kiswamakinai sio idekesio, lukiŋarenikinete; naarai Musa nol, ekesa lokitolomuni sio kakwap nako Misiri, mam kijeni nuadoikis ŋes.”"
Exodus32:2 Kobala Aaron kes ebe, “Koijedununutu itetio luka esa bu, luejaas aki nuka aŋorokus, ka luejaas aki nuka idwekus lutelepai ka lupesur da, koinut eoŋ.”"
Exodus32:3 Koijedununut ituŋa kere itctio luka esabu luajaas akikec, koinut Aaron."
Exodus32:4 Kijau kakaninikec, kiluŋuluŋ kacuma kanaigiri, kosub itaok yenicaluna; kobalas ebe, “Lu kes idekesiokon, ijo Isirael, lukitolomunete kakwap nako Misiri.”"
Exodus32:5 Keanyu Aaron nun, kodukok etem akonyeneke; kolimo Aaron ebe, “Ejaun moi epucit mama ejai EJAKAIT.”"
Exodus32:6 Konyout tupuruc sek, koinanakis ainakineta nuicweio, koyaut ainakineta nuka ainapakin; kiboikinos ituŋa ainyam ka aimat, konyout abolia."
Exodus32:7 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,” Kolot kijesar; naarai amunaaros ituŋakon luitolomuni kakwap nako Misiri:"
Exodus32:8 Apaasi atipet anyoun korot loabu kecorak kes: asubut itaok venicaluna, amaata nin, ainakis da asubanit, kobalas ebe, ‘Lu kes idekestokon, ijo Isirael, lukitolomunete kakwap nako Misiri.’”"
Exodus32:9 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Aany eoŋ ituŋa lu, ido koany, kes ituŋa lueninik imurisiŋa;"
Exodus32:10 Aso do kinyeinai, tetere inepuni noi anyunyuraka aluikin kes, tetere amudiari kes: ketuluori jo ateker naepol.”"
Exodus32:11 Kinaina Musa EJAKAIT Ekedeke, kobala ebe, “EJAKAIT, kanukinyo inepunia noi anyunyurakon aluikin ituŋakon, lukitolomuni kakwap nako Misiri kagogon naepol kakan da naka apedor?"
Exodus32:12 Kanukinyo ti elimunioto Imisirian ebe, ‘Abu kitolom kes kanuka aronis, aarakin kes oroŋan, amudiar kes kakwap’? Kinyek anyunyurakon naededen, kiitu ikonituŋa kinyeik aronis ŋin."
Exodus32:13 Kiitu Aburaam, ka Isaak ka Isirael, ikonikeiaanakinak, luibu kiyapok bon kobala ebe, ‘Eyatakini eoŋ aurikus kwape kaacer nukokuju, akwap ŋin kere naener nuke, ainakini aurikus, irumete kesi ikar kere.’”"
Exodus32:14 Kiitu EJAKAIT kinyek aiswamakin ituŋake aronis naabala.
Exodus32:15 Kibelokin Musa kijesar komoru, kojaas kamor aarei nuka aiteienunet akaninike; amor nuewadikatai owaitinikec kere; ewadikatai epuai ka epuai da."
Exodus32:16 Araas amor aswam naka Edeke, aiwadika da arai aiwadika naka Edeke, naegirakinitai amor."
Exodus32:17 Kepupu Yosua ecelet loka ituŋa eutaritos, kobala ŋesi Musa ebe, “Ejai ecelet leka ejie toma oidukurun.”"
Exodus32:18 Kobala Musa ebe, “Mere ŋol eporoto loka ŋul kaluecelas kanuka aipikor, karaida eporoto loka nul kaluemonyete kanuka aireneario: konye apupi ecelet loka ŋul kalueyoete.”"
Exodus32:19 Kosodi nape eapiari oidukurun, koany itaok ka ekosio: kinep noi anyunyura naka Musa, kocaka amor kakaninike, kobwanak kes kwap kemoru,"
Exodus32:20 Koyana itaok yenasubunito, kicweik kakim, kidecidec, kipurupuranak akipi, kiramat idwe luka Isirael."
Exodus32:21 Kobala Musa Aaron ebe, “Apotu ituŋa kikwaikis jo ai, tape iyauni adiakaret naepol mamakec?”"
Exodus32:22 Kobala Aaron ebe, “Kinyek anyunyura naka ejakaitika ainepun noi: ijeni ijo ituŋa, etupitos cut aronis."
Exodus32:23 Naarai apotu katemasi eoŋ ebe, ‘Kosubakinai idekesio, lukinarenonokinete oni, naarai Musa ŋol, ekesa lokitolomuni oni kakwap nako Misiri, mam kijeni nuadoikis.’"
Exodus32:24 Katema kes ebe, ‘Yenejai esabu kere, konedununutu”; kwaŋin apotu kainut: kebwaik akim, kolom do itaok yen.”"
Exodus32:25 Kosodi keanyu Musa ebe epaliikis ituŋa; naarai abu Aaron kisipaliik kes araun luekienatatar lukasurupokec:
Exodus32:26 Kosodi Musa aibwo korute loka iidukurun, kobala ebe, “Ŋinituŋanan yenejai owai loka EJAKAIT kobu mama ajai.” Kotukonokinos odwe kere luka Lebi mama ejai."
Exodus32:27 Kobala ŋesi kes ebe, “Ebala EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael kwanata ebe, ‘Kibwaik ninitunanan ekekileŋ amurwoke, koboŋobonoto kokekia kere anatar iidukurun kere, koar ninitunanan onaceke, ninirunanan aupake, ninituŋanan ekeidunyet.’’’"
Exodus32:28 Kiswamata odwe luka Lebi kwape ajaar akirot naka Musa: kotwaka kapaaran kaŋin kotuna, ituŋa kwape ilukumin iuni."
Exodus32:29 Kobala Musa ebe, “Kotiakunos lolo mama ejai EJAKAIT, ninituŋanan ka ikekoku, ka onaceke; tetere ŋes kisirereni yes lolo.”"
Exodus32:30 Kosodi kedolo tupuruc kobala Musa ituŋa atiar, “Idiakasi aronis naepol: kwape kwana adokari eoŋ mama ejai EJAKAIT: diat aluci akusironis.”"
Exodus32:31 Koboŋo Musa mama ejai EJAKAIT, kobala ebe, “Wu okwe, adiakas iruŋa nul aronis naepol, asubut ikulepek idekesio iuka esabu."
Exodus32:32 Konye kwana, arai kisioni ijo aronisikec; konye arai mam, kenainait, komwatarai eoŋ koitabokon loibu kiwadik.”"
Exodus32:33 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ebe, “Ŋin kere yenadiakaa kamakaŋ, ŋin ŋes amwatari koitaboka,"
Exodus32:34 Aso kolot, kinarenik ituŋa aibois naalimokinit jo; koany, kiŋarenikinenei ekamalaika jo; konye kapaaran naaanyanaria, aanyuni aronisikec.”"
Exodus32:35 Kodany EJAKAIT ituŋa, naarai apotu kosubata itaok yenabu Aaron kosub."
Exodus33:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Konyoutu koloto kane, ijo ka ituŋa lukitolomuni kakwap nako Misiri, kolomasi yesi akwap nakolo esiyapokinit eoŋ Aburaam, ka Isaak, ka Yakob ebe,, Ainakini akoniwur.’"
Exodus33:2 Ido eyakuni emalaika koinarenikon; ereŋeari da Ekanaanit, ka Emorait, ka Ekitit, ka Eperisit, ka Ekibit, ka Eyebusit da:"
Exodus33:3 Kakwap naeleleete akile ka esik: naarai mam eoŋ kiupakin kayes; naarai iraas yesi ituŋa lueninik imurisiŋa: kenyek amudiar yes korot.”
Exodus33:4 Kepuput ituŋa akiro ŋun nueroko, kitururwoto; komamuun ituŋanan yenisirit akekuan."
Exodus33:5 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, ‘Iraas yesi lueninik imurisiŋa: arai kiupakin eoŋ kayes karaida apak naedit noi, kamudiari eoŋ yes: asa do kolaca luisirito, kasodi konyet ajenun nukeswamakini yes.’’’"
Exodus33:6 Kolacasi idwe luka Isirael luesirito kesi ageun komoru Koreb kaiyatakin.
Exodus33:7 Ayananari Musa ewema asiponokin kina kiidukurun; kolwanikina koidukurun; komaik Ewema loka airiamunun. Kosodi ŋinituŋanan yenekoto EJAKAIT alosenen owema laka airiamunun, loajai kina kiidukurun."
Exodus33:8 Kosodi naelomanaria Musa owema, anyoununete ituŋa kere, kobwo ŋinitunanan kokek loka ewemake, asesen Musa aitodol neelomaria owema."
Exodus33:9 Kosodi kanen, naalomanaria Musa toma owema, kijesunun epir loka edou, kobwo kokek loka ewema: kinerakinos EJAKAIT ka Musa."
Exodus33:10 Koanyut ituŋa kere epir loka edou ebwoi kokek loka Ewema: konyout ituŋa kere komaata, nlnirunanan kokek loka ewemake."
Exodus33:11 Kinerenenas EJAKAIT kaMusa kiteos, kwape ineratar etuŋanan kopaperoke. Kobononori bobo ŋesi oidukurun: konye ekekejaanakinan Yosua, okoku loka Nun, ekatumunan, mam anyoununei koWema."
Exodus33:12 Kotema Musa EJAKAIT atiar, “Koany, ibala ijo eoŋ ebe, ‘Koyana ituŋa lu’: ido mam kitejcnikinit eoŋ lokiyakiari keoŋ, Konye ibu ijo kiner ebe,, Kajeni jo kekonikiror, ibu da kodum asianut kakonyeneka.’"
Exodus33:13 Kanuka nun, kenainait, arai adumunit asianut kakonyenekon, kitodikinai ikonirotin, tetere kajenuni jo, kasodi adumun asianut kakonyenekon: ido koomoom ebe erai ateker na ikonituŋa.”"
Exodus33:14 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Ajaenena eoŋ kajo, eoŋ da kesiyenuni jo.”"
Exodus33:15 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Arai mam ijaenena keoŋ, sirikiiyana sio nina."
Exodus33:16 Naarai ikwaikinio ai ejenunio ebe abu eoŋ kadum asianut kakonyenekon, eoŋ ka ikonituŋa da? Mere ti ŋes ejenunere naarai iupa ijo kasio, kasodete atiakunio, eoŋ ka ikonituŋa, kotoma otuŋa kere luejaas akwap?”"
Exodus33:17 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Eswamai ŋin da nainer ijo; naarai ibu kodum asianut kakonyeneka, eoŋ da kajeni jo kekonikiror.”"
Exodus33:18 Kobala ebe, “Kenaiŋait, kitodik eoŋ akoniibuses.”"
Exodus33:19 Kotema atiar, “Etotori akajokis kere akonyenekon, alimori da ekiror loka EJAKAIT kakonyenekon; ido ekonakini asianut nin yenakoto aikonakin asianut, etimi da yenakoto aitim.”"
Exodus33:20 Kobala ebe, “Mam ipedori aanyun akakonyen: naarai mam ituŋanan kaanyuni eoŋ kosodi aijar.”"
Exodus33:21 Kobala EJAKAIT ebe, “Koany, ejai aibois naeapie keoŋ, ibwoi ijo katiiba:"
Exodus33:22 Kosodi naitorio aibusesuka, kepiikini jo toma acilat naka atiiba, arapakini jo kakakan aitodol neatuboror eoŋ:"
Exodus33:23 Alemari akakan, ianyuni ijo epuraka; konye akakonyen mam eanyunos.’"
Exodus34:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Kikeu amor aarei nueputos kwape kanusodit: ewadikakini eoŋ amor akiro nuajaas toma amor nusodit, nuibu kobwan,"
Exodus34:2 Kitemokin moi kodoku tupuruc moru Sinai, kitodun mama ajai kaidi naka emoru."
Exodus34:3 Ido sirikedoku ituŋanan nepepe kajo, siriketakanu da idiotuŋanan komoru kere; karaida isipanin luka amerekekin ka aituk kinyeis adak kiŋaren kemoru kanol.”"
Exodus34:4 Kikeu ŋesi amor aarei nuaputos kwape kanusodit; konyou Musa tupuruc sek, kodoka moru Sinai, kwape ecorakinitor EJAKAIT, koyana kakanike amor aarei."
Exodus34:5 Kijesun EJAKAIT kodou, kobwo kanen nepepe kaŋes, kolimo ekiror loka EJAKAIT."
Exodus34:6 Kitor EJAKAIT kakonyeneke, kolimo ebe, “EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT, Edeke loileleba aitim loesiana, loiyapi anyunyurikin, loepol aitim ka abeit:"
Exodus34:7 Loiŋadat aitim mama ejaas ilukumin, loisioniei numam adolit ka aibucareta ka aronis; lomam itojokit luegwaunito akiro; loidopei numam adolit nuka lukapapa kodwekec, kodwe da luka idwekec, kiton atur nakiwuniet ka nakiwononet.”"
Exodus34:8 Kisunya Musa, kitulur akou kwap, koma."
Exodus34:9 Kobala ebe, “Arai kwana adumunit asianut kakonyenekon, wu EJAKAIT, kenainait, kolosenenei EJAKAIT kokidinikosi; naarai eraas ituŋa lueninik imurisiŋa; kitimoi sio numam adolitekosi ka aronisikosi, koyanaarai araun airumetekon.”"
Exodus34:10 Kotema atiar, “Koany, etutuki: kakonyen nuka ituŋakon kere eswamai nukaumokin, numam lem iswamatai kakwap kere, karaida kateker adio: eanyunete ituŋa kere luijai ijo mamakec aswam naka EJAKAIT, naarai esogim akirot nakeswamakini."
Exodus34:11 Koric ijo nukecorak lolo: koany, ereŋeari koinarenikon Emorait, ka Ekanaanit, ka Ekitit, ka Eperisit, ka Ekibit, ka Eyebusit da."
Exodus34:12 Kocoite, kinyek aitutuk kaluiboiete kakwap nailosete, kinyek araun atacit kamakus:"
Exodus34:13 Konye ibilete itemwanakec, imunyumunyete da ipirinokec, iiepeiepete Aseraikec:"
Exodus34:14 Naarai mam imaete ecedeke kere: naarai EJAKAIT, loerai ekekiror Ekolo, erai Edeke lokekolo:"
Exodus34:15 Kinyek aitutuk kaluiboiete kakwap, kolosete eporo mama ejaas idekesiokec, koinakinete idekesiokec asuban, kinyek idiopet anyarar jo, inyami da asubanitike;"
Exodus34:16 Kinyek amanyakin odwekon adwekec, adwekec alosit eporo mama ejaas idekesiokec, einakinete odwekon alosit adoteu mama ejaas idekesiokec."
Exodus34:17 Sirikiswamau idekesio lucaluna.
Exodus34:18 Kidarenenei epucit loka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi. Inyamenenei imugatin lumam itubuunitoi apaarasia akanykaarei, kwape kecorakinia jo, kapak naeseunitai kolap Abib; naarai olap Abib ŋes ilomunia kakwap nako Misiri."
