Leviticus13:33 ŋes konyet ibarenio, konye mam ibareni etapitap; egolokini esasedoti ŋin yenedeka etapitap apaarasia ace akanykaarei."
Leviticus13:34 Kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei irerei esasedoti etapitap; ido koany, arai mam etapitap isiarakina amuny, aputoke da mam elomarit toma amuny; kosodi esasedoti alimokin ŋes ebe elai: ilosi inapeneke, eraun yenelai."
Leviticus13:35 Konye arai kisiarakin etapitap amunyoke kodaunite aitesegaarioke;
Leviticus13:36 Kosodi esasedoti airere ŋes: ido koany, arai kisiarakin etapitap amuny, mam esasedoti emoi ijuludos; erai yenimam elai."
Leviticus13:37 Konye arai eanyuni ebe asal etapitap, kelomut ijul lukiriokok kotoma; aŋaleu etapitap, elai ŋesi: elimokini esasedoti ŋes ebe elai."
Leviticus13:38 Arai ejaas aisorito toma amuny naka akuan naka ekiliokit arai aberu, aisorito nukakwaŋak:"
Leviticus13:39 Kosodi esasedoti airere; ido koany, arai ekwaŋakwaŋato aisorito nukotoma amuny naka akuanake; erai egwenyigweny, elomunit kamuny; elai ŋesi."
Leviticus13:40 Arai kidimas ituŋanan itima luka akouke, erai lokepata; konye elai ŋesi."
Leviticus13:41 Arai kidimas ituŋanan itima koinaren naka akouke, erai Iokepata koreet; konye elai ŋesi,"
Leviticus13:42 Konye arai ejai adek naekwaŋakwaŋat naereŋereŋet kakou nakepata, arai koreet kalokepata; erai ŋin atapon, naelomunit kakouke nakepata, arai koreet kalokepata."
Leviticus13:43 Kosodi esasedoti airere ŋes: ido koany, arai ekwaŋakwaŋat ereŋereŋet abuunet naka adek kakouke nakepata, arai koreeteke kalokepata, kwape ejaar aput naka atapon amuny;"
Leviticus13:44 Erai ituŋanan yenikatapon, erai yenimam elai: abeit elimokini esasedoti ŋes ebe mam elai; ejai adekake akouke."
Leviticus13:45 Ituŋanan yenedek atapon, ecilicila ikenapen, elakara itimake da, erapari eponoi lokokuju, iworoi ebe, ‘Mam alai, mam alai.’"
Leviticus13:46 Apaarasia kere nuerokor edeka eraun yenimam elai; mam ŋes elai: iboienenei bon; iboienenei kokiŋa kiidukurun.
Leviticus13:47 Anapito naejai adek naka atapon, arai anapito naka ajul, arai anapito naka ebaputa;"
Leviticus13:48 Arai ewojitoi arai icipitai; naka ebaputa, arai naka ajul; arai komukule, arai toma ŋinibore yeniswamatai kemukule;"
Leviticus13:49 Arai erai adek napiria arai naereŋereŋet kanapito, arai komukule, arai neewojitoi, arai neicipitai, arai toma ŋinibore yeniswamatai kemukule; erai adek naka atapon, ibusakinit aitodikin esasedoti."
Leviticus13:50 Irerei esasedoti adek, egolokini yenejai adek apaarasia akanykaarei:"
Leviticus13:51 Irerei ŋesi adek apaaran nakikanyetekaarei: arai kisiarakin adek anapito, arai neewojitoi, arai neicipitai, arai komukule, aswam kere naetwasamaere emukule, erai adek naka atapon naiŋemiŋemi; mam elai."
Leviticus13:52 Icweikini ŋesi anapito, arai ewojitoi, arai icipitai, ajul, arai ebaputa, arai ibore kere yenika emukule, naejai adek: naarai erai atapon naiŋemiŋemi; icweikinio kakim."
Leviticus13:53 Arai kirere esasedoti, ido koany, mam adek isiarakina anapito, karaida neewojitoi, karaida neicipitai, karaida toma ibore kere yenika emukule;"
Leviticus13:54 Kosodi esasedoti aicorakin ebe ilosete ibore yenejai adek, egolokini bobo apaarasia ace akanykaarei:"
Leviticus13:55 Irerei esasedoti, kodaunite adek ailosio: ido koany, arai mam adek ilocokino kaputoke, komam adek isiarakina, mam ŋes elai: icweikini kakim: eŋemiŋemi, arai epata toma arai kiŋa,"
Leviticus13:56 Arai kirere esasedoti, ido koany, enyasuoro adek kodaunite ailosio, kosodi acilar kanapito, arai komukule, arai neewojitoi, arai neicipitai:"
Leviticus13:57 Arai eriŋa etakani kanapito, arai neewojitoi, arai neicipitai, arai kobore kere yenika emukule, elomunit: icweikini ibore ŋin yenejai adek kakim."
Leviticus13:58 Anapito da, arai naewojitoi, arai naicipitai, arai ibore kere yenika emukule, yenilosi, arai anyou adek kamake, ŋes konyet ilosere nakiareit, koraun yenelai.”"
Leviticus13:59 Ŋol ŋes ekisil loka adek naka atapon kanapito naka ajul arai naka ebaputa, arai naewojitoi arai naicipitai, arai ibore kere yenika emukule, alimokin ebe elai, arai alimokin ebe mam elai."
Leviticus14:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus14:2 “Lo ŋes ekisil loka yenikatapon kapaaran naka aitesegaarioke: eyaŋaunio mama ejai esasedoti:
Leviticus14:3 Elomari esasedoti kiŋa kiidukurun; irerei esasedoti, ido koany, arai aŋaleu adek naka atapon kotuŋanan;"
Leviticus14:4 Kosodi esasedoti aicorakin alemikin ŋin yenekot aitesegaario akweny aarei nuelaete nuejarete, ka akito nuka eres, ka yenikareŋan, ka esop."
Leviticus14:5 Icorakini esasedoti aiar adiopet kakweny kotoma amot naka elupe kuju neeleleata akip:
Leviticus14:6 Akweny naejari da, eyaŋaari ŋes, ka akito nuka eres, ka yenikareŋan, ka esop, idomakini kes ka akweny naejari toma aokot nuka akweny naarakinitai kuju neeleleata akip:"
Leviticus14:7 Ebwatanakini ŋesi ŋin yenekot aitesegaario katapon irwan akanykaarei, elimokini ebe elai ŋesi, eosikini akweny naejari kais."
Leviticus14:8 Ŋin yenekot aitesegaario ilosi ikenapen, ebareni itimake kere, iloŋi kakip, eraun yenelai: kokau kaŋun elomari oidukurun, konye iboie kokiŋa kewemake apaarasia akanykaarei."
Leviticus14:9 Ejaun kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei ebe ebareni itimake kere kakouke, ka epenekike, ka abukioke, ebareni itimake kere: ilosi inapeneke, iloŋi akekuan kakip, eraun yenelai."
Leviticus14:10 Kapaaran nakikanyetekauni elemuni imerekekin iarei ludidik lukiliok lumam eŋwalitos, ka imerekek idiopet yeniberu yenika ekaru ediopet yenimam eŋwalit, ka iuni kotomon luka epa loka akiria nuidicic araun ainakinet naka akiria, nuinyalakinitai akinyet, ka atido naka akinyet."
Leviticus14:11 Esasedoti loitesegi ibwaikini ituŋanan yenekot aitesegaario, ka iboro ŋul kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kokek loka ewema loka airiamunun:"
Leviticus14:12 Elemuni esasedoti idiopet komerekekin ludidik lukiliok, kijaik ŋes araun ainakinet naka aronis, ka atido naka akinyet, ijaŋi kes araun ainakinet naijaŋio kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Leviticus14:13 Earakini imerekek yenididi yenikiliokit aibois nearanakina ainakinet naka adiakaret ka ainakinet naicweio, aibois nakalaunan: naarai kwape eraar ainakinet naka adiakaret naka esasedoti, erai kwape kwaŋin ainakinet naka aronis: erai nakalaunan noi."
Leviticus14:14 Elemuni esasedoti aokot nuka ainakinet naka aronis, ejukokini okobet loka akit nakoteten naka ŋin yenekot aitesegaario, kobokorit da lokapolon loka akekan nakoteten, kobokorit da lokapolon loka akejuke nakoteten."
Leviticus14:15 Elemuni esasedoti atido naka akinyet ebukokini otau kakanike elopet nakokediany:
Leviticus14:16 Idomakini esasedoti ebokoritike lokoteten akinyet naejai akanike nakokediany, ebwatanari akinyet kebokoritike irwan akanykaarei kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Leviticus14:17 Ejukokini esasedoti akinyet naedeun kakanike okobet loka akit nakoteten naka ŋin yenekot aitesegaario, kobokorit da lokapolon loka akekan nakoteten, kobokorit da lokapolon loka akejuke nakoteten, toma aokot nuka ainakinet naka aronis:"
Leviticus14:18 Inyonyoikini akinyet naedeun kakan naka esasedoti akou naka ŋin yenekot aitesegaario; ituluci esasedoti ŋes kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT.
Leviticus14:19 Ijaikini esasedoti ainakinet naka adiakaret, ituluci ŋin yenekot aitesegaario kanuka numam alauniteke; kokau eari ainakinet naicweio."
Leviticus14:20 Ijaikini esasedoti ainakinet naicweio ka ainakinet naka akiria kotem: ituluci esasedoti ŋes, eraun yenelai."
Leviticus14:21 Arai icana ŋesi, mam epedori adumun ŋun kere, eyaŋaari do imerekek idiopet yenikiliokit araun ainakinet naka aronis ajiaŋio, aitulucio ŋes, ka idiopet kotomon yenika epa loka akiria nuidicic nuinyalakinitai akinyet araun ainakinet naka akiria, ka atido naka akinyet;"
Leviticus14:22 Ajeleik aarei arai ilukei iarei ludidik, kwape epedoria adumun; eraun idiopet ainakinet naka adiakaret, ka yenice da ainakinet naicweio."
Leviticus14:23 Kapaaran nakikanyetekauni eyauni kes kanuka aitesegaarioke mama ejai esasedoti, okek loka ewema loka airiamunun, kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Leviticus14:24 Eyaŋaari esasedoti imerekek yenika ainakinet naka aronis, ka atido naka akinyet, ijaŋi esasedoti kes araun ainakinet naijaŋio kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Leviticus14:25 Eari imerekek yenika ainakinet naka aronis, elemuni esasedoti aokot nuka ainakinet naka aronis, ejukokini okobet loka akit nakoteten naka ŋin yenekot aitesegaario, kobokorit da lokapolon loka akanike nakoteten, kobokorit da lokapolon loka akejuke nakoteten."
Leviticus14:26 Ebukokini esasedoti akinyet otau kakanike elopet nakokediany:
Leviticus14:27 Ebwatanari esasedoti kebokoritike lokoteten akinyet naejai akanike nakokediany irwan akanykaarei kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT:
Leviticus14:28 Ejukokini esasedoti akinyet naejai akanike okobet loka akit nakoteten naka ŋin yenekot aitesegaario, kobokorit da lokapolon loka akanike nakoteten, kobokorit da lokapolon loka akejuke nakoteten, toma aibois naka aokot nuka ainakinet naka aronis."
Leviticus14:29 Inyonyoikini akinyet naedeun kakan naka esasedoti akou naka ŋin yenekot aitesegaario, aitulucio ŋes kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Leviticus14:30 Ijaikini idiopet kajeleik, arai kilukei ludidik kwape epedoria adumun;"
Leviticus14:31 Kwape epedoria adumun, idiopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret, ka yenice araun ainakinet naicweio, nepepe kainakinet naka akiria: ituluci esasedoti ŋin yenekot aitesegaario kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Leviticus14:32 Ŋol ŋes ekisil loka ŋin yenedek atapon, yenimam epedori adumun luka aitesegaarioke.”"
Leviticus14:33 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron atiar,"
Leviticus14:34 “Naidolioto yesi akwap naka Kanaan, naainakini yes araun airumet, ebwaikini adek naka atapon kotogo loka akwap naka airumetekus;"
Leviticus14:35 Ebuni elopet etogo elimokini esasedoti ebe, ‘Esubit bala ejai adek naka atapon togoka.’"
Leviticus14:36 Icorakini esasedoti alemar iboro kere kotogo, eriŋa ŋes elomara aanyun adek, tetere luejaas toma kere mam eraunos lumam elaete: kokau elomari esasedoti aanyun etogo."
Leviticus14:37 Irerei ŋesi adek, ido koany, arai ejai adek arwatatin nuka etogo, acileta nupiria, arai nuereŋereŋeto, elomarit aputoke toma arwatat;"
Leviticus14:38 ŋes konyet elomunia esasedoti kotogo kiton okek loka etogo, kogoli etogo apaarasia akanykaarei."
Leviticus14:39 Eboŋuni esasedoti apaaran nakikanyetekaarei, irerei; ido koany, arai kisiarakin adek arwatatin nuka etogo;"
Leviticus14:40 Kosodi esasedoti aicorakin alemar amor nuejaas adek, acakar da aibois namam elai kiŋa naka ere."
Leviticus14:41 Itikisikisi ŋesi etogo toma airimor, ebukonorete nuadaut aikisikis kiŋa naka ere aibois namam elai:"
Leviticus14:42 Elemarete amor ace ibwaikinete aibois naka amor kwa; eyauni asiŋe ace, iladai etogo."
Leviticus14:43 Arai keboŋ bobo adek, atakanun kotogo, kedau ŋesi alemar amor, kedau aikisikis etogo, kedau ailad;"
Leviticus14:44 Kosodi esasedoti alomar airere, ido koany, arai isiarakina adek togo, erai atapon naerogirog etogo: mam elai."
Leviticus14:45 Ekesi etogo, amoruke, ka akitoke, ka asiŋe kere naka etogo; edakari kes kiŋa naka ere aibois namam elai,"
Leviticus14:46 Bobo da ŋin yenelomari togo kapak kere naegololor eraun yenimam elai kiton eboŋ,"
Leviticus14:47 ŋin yeneperi togo ŋol ilosi ikenapen; ŋin yenenyami kotogo kaŋol ilosi ikenapen.
Leviticus14:48 Arai elomari esasedoti, irerei, ido koany, mam adek isiarakina togo, kedau ailad etogo; kosodi esasedoti alimokin ebe elai etogo, naarai aŋaleu adek."
Leviticus14:49 Eyaŋaari akweny aarei aitesegia etogo, ka akito nuka eres, ka yenikareŋan ka esop."
Leviticus14:50 Earakini adiopekweny amot naka elupe kuju neeleleata akip;
Leviticus14:51 Eyaŋaari akito nuka eres, ka esop, ka yenikarenan, ka akweny naejari, idomakini kes aokot nuka akweny naarakinitai, toma akipi nueleleete da, ebwatanakini togo irwan akanykaarei:"
Leviticus14:52 Ido itesegaari etogo kaokot nuka akweny, ka akipi nueleleete, kakweny naejari, kakito nuka eres, ka esop ka yenikaren an,"
Leviticus14:53 Konye eyaŋaari akweny naejari kiŋa naka ere koosikini koporo ais; ituluci etogo kwaŋin: eraun loelai.”
Leviticus14:54 Ŋol ŋes ekisil loka epone kere loka adek naka atapon, ka etapitap;"
Leviticus14:55 Ka loka atapon naka anapito, ka loka etogo;"
Leviticus14:56 Ka loka abuunet, ka asalabit, ka aisorit:"
Leviticus14:57 Aisisianakin arai mam elai, arai da elai; ŋol ŋes ekisil loka atapon."
Leviticus15:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron atiar,"
Leviticus15:2 “Kolimokis idwe luka Isirael ebe, Arai eleleete etuŋanan abulon arai aokot, kanu elelea mam ŋes elai."
Leviticus15:3 Eraun namam ailake ka aleleke kwanata: arai etakani aleleke, arai da aleleke mam etakani erai namam ailake."
Leviticus15:4 Ŋiniperis naeperio ŋol loelelei eraun namam elai: ŋinibore kere yeniboikini ŋesi eraun yenimam elai.
Leviticus15:5 Ŋin yenetirori aperisike ilosi inapeneke, iloŋi kakip, eraun yenimam elai kiton eboŋ,"
Leviticus15:6 ŋin da yeniboikini ibore kere yenikiboio loelelei ilosi ikenapen, iloŋi kakip, eraun yenimam elai kiton eboŋ."
Leviticus15:7 Ŋin da yenetirori akuan naka ŋol kaloelelei ilosi ikenapen, iloŋi kakip, eraun yenimam elai kiton eboŋ."
Leviticus15:8 Arai kimuiki ŋol loelelei aimul ituŋanan yenelai; kosodi loimuikinitai ailot ikenapen, iloŋi kakip, eraun yenimam elai kiton eboŋ,"
Leviticus15:9 ŋinibore kere yenibwaneni ŋol loelelei eraun yenimam elai.
Leviticus15:10 Ŋin yenetirori ibore yenajai kwapuke eraun yenimam elai kiton eboŋ: ŋin yenedakuni iboro ŋul ilosi inapeneke, iloŋi kakip, eraun yenimam elai kiton eboŋ,"
Leviticus15:11 Arai ketiro ŋol loelelei icetuŋanan kere, komam ber iloluarit akekanin kakip, ilosi yeniketiroritai inapeneke, iloŋi kakip, eraun yenimam elai kiton eboŋ,"
Leviticus15:12 Amot da naka elupe naetirori ŋol loelelei, ebwanio; iloluario ŋinibore yenika akito kakip."
Leviticus15:13 Arai kenaleu alele naka ŋol kaloelelei, imarakinio apaarasia akanykaarei kanuka aitesegaarioke, ilosi ikenapen; Iloŋi akekuan kakip nueleleete, eraun loelai."
Leviticus15:14 Apaaran nakikanyetekauni eyaŋaari ŋesi ajeleik aarei arai ilukei iarei ludidik, ebuni kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT okek loka ewema loka airiamunun, koinak kes esasedoti."
Leviticus15:15 Ŋaikini esasedoti kes, idiopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret, yenice araun ainakinet naicweio; ituluci esasedoti ŋes kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT kanuka aleleke."
Leviticus15:16 Arai kelomutu ikinyom luka aur kotuŋanan, iloŋi akekuan kere kakip eraun lomam elai kiton eboŋ."
Leviticus15:17 Ilosio inapen kere kakip, ka amuny kere naadoikis ikinyom luka aur, eraunos lumam elaete kiton eboŋ."
Leviticus15:18 Aberu da naeperete ketuŋanan loajaas ikinyom luka aur, iloŋete kes kere kakip eraunos lumam elaete kiton eboŋ,"
Leviticus15:19 Arai elelei aberu, eleleete aokot, epaikini ŋesi etiakuna apaarasia akanykaarei; ŋin yenetirori ŋes eraun yenimam elai kiton eboŋ,"
Leviticus15:20 ŋinibore kere yeneperio ŋesi katiakunioke eraun yenimam elai: ŋinibore kere da yeniboikini ŋesi eraun yenimam elai.
Leviticus15:21 Ŋin yenetirori aperisike ilosi ikenapen, iloŋi kakip, eraun yenimam elai kiton eboŋ."
Leviticus15:22 Ŋin yenetirori ibore kere yeniboikini ŋin, ilosi ikenapen, iloŋi kakip, eraun yenimam elai kiton eboŋ,"
Leviticus15:23 Arai ejaas aperis, arai toma ŋinibore yeniboikini ŋin naketiro, eraun yenimam elai kiton eboŋ,"
Leviticus15:24 Arai keperoto etuŋanan kaŋin, kolomakin ŋes aleleke, eraun lomam elai apaarasia akanykaarei; ŋiniperis naeperio ŋesi eraun namam elai."
Leviticus15:25 Arai eleleete aberu aokot apaarasia nuipu korai mere apak naka aibamake, arai eleleete adepar apaarasiake nuka aibam; apaarasia kere nuelelea numam ailake eraun ŋin kwape kapaarasia nuka aibamake: mam ŋes elai."
Leviticus15:26 Ŋiniperis naeperio ŋesi apaarasia kere nuelelea eraun kwape aperis naka aibamake; ŋinibore kere yeniboikini ŋesi eraun yenimam elai, kwape namam aila naka aibamake."
Leviticus15:27 Ŋin yenetirori iboro nul eraun yenimam elai, ilosi kenapen, iloŋi kakip, eraun yenimam elai kiton eboŋ."
Leviticus15:28 Konye arai keŋaleu aleleke, kosodi aimarakinio apaarasia akanykaarei, kokau kaŋun eraun naelai."
Leviticus15:29 Kapaaran nakikanyetekauni eyaŋaari ajeleik aarei arai ilukei iarei ludidik, eyaŋaari mama ejai esasedoti, okek loka ewema loka airiamunun."
Leviticus15:30 Ijaikini esasedoti idiopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret, ka yenice araun ainakinet naicweio: ituluci esasedoti ŋes kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT kanuka aleleke namam alaia."
Leviticus15:31 Itiakunete kwaŋin idwe luka Isirael ka numam ailakec; kinyeis atwakare kanumam ailakec, nakemunauniata ewemaka lokalaunan loejai kamakec.”"
Leviticus15:32 Ŋol ŋes ekisil loka ŋol kaloelelei, ka ŋol loalomut ikinyom luka aur tetere mam elai;"
Leviticus15:33 Ka ŋin naedek aibam, ka ŋin yenelelei, ekiliokit arai aberu, ka ŋol loeperete kaŋin namam elai."
Leviticus16:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa, kedaut odwe luarei luka Aaron atwakare, nakikunyakiniata kesi akonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kotwakata;"
Leviticus16:2 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Kolimok Aaron onacekon ebe, mam elomanari apakio kere aibois nakalaunan nakotoma aigalisit, kakonyen nuka eicoloŋ-lokaitim loejai asaduku; kinyek atwanare: naarai etakanikin eoŋ kodou koicoloŋlokaitim."
Leviticus16:3 Eyaŋauni Aaron iboro lu, alomunia aibois nakalaunan: emoŋ lotobait araun ainakinet naka adiakaret, ka emerekek araun ainakinet naicweio."
Leviticus16:4 Enapenenei ekooti lokalaunan loka ebaputa, enapenenei epale loka ebaputa kakuanake, koenite aenet naka ebaputa, enapenenei da egoe lokieniena akou: eraas inapen lukalaunak; iloŋi akekuan kakip, konapi kes."
Leviticus16:5 Eyaŋaari ikorwa iarei kokodet loka idwe luka Isirael araun ainakinet naka adiakaret, ka emerekek araun ainakinet naicweio."
Leviticus16:6 Ijaikini Aaron emoŋ lotobait loka ainakinet naka adiakaret, loerai kanuke, elucokin elopet ka eketogo."
Leviticus16:7 Eyaŋaari ikorwa luarei, ibwaikini kes akonyen nuka EJAKAIT okek loka ewema loka airiamunun."
Leviticus16:8 Ilamilami Aaron eroet kokorwa luarei; eroet ediopet loka EJAKAIT, ka eroet ece loka Asasel."
Leviticus16:9 Itodiari Aaron ekoroi loabeiki eroet loka EJAKAIT, kijaik ŋes araun ainakinet naka adiakaret."
Leviticus16:10 Konye ekoroi loabeiki eroet loka Asasel ibwaikini ejari akonyen nuka EJAKAIT, aitulucio ŋes, aireŋearia ŋes kanuka Asasel, modiŋ."
Leviticus16:11 Itodiari Aaron emoŋ lotobait loka ainakinet naka adiakaret, loerai kanuke, elucokini bon, ka ekaleke, eari emoŋ lotobait loka ainakinet naka adiakaret loerai kanuke."
Leviticus16:12 Eyaŋaari aisupurunet ileleba atotole nuka akim kotem kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, ileleba akaninike lukisupurununo luipicipicitai, koyaŋau toma aigalisit."
Leviticus16:13 Ibwaikini lukisupurununo akim kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, tetere erapiari apuru naka lukisupurununo eicoloŋ-lokaitim loejai aitejenunet, kinyek atwanare."
Leviticus16:14 Eyaŋaari aokot nuka emoŋ lotobait, ebwatanakini oicoloŋ-lokaitim kebokoritike ari nakokide; ebwatanari aokot kiŋaren keicoloŋ-lokaitim kebokoritike irwan akanykaarei."
Leviticus16:15 Kosodi eari ekoroi loka ainakinet naka adiakaret, loerai kanuka ituŋa, eyaŋaari aokotoke toma aigalisit, iswamakini aokotoke kwape eswamakinia aokot nuka emoŋ lotobait, ebwatanakini oicoloŋ-lokaitim, kiŋaren da ke icoloŋ-lokaitim."
Leviticus16:16 Eluci ŋesi aibois nakalaunan, kanuka numam aila nuka idwe luka Isirael, kanuka aibucaretakec, kes adiakanaretakec kere: ikonakini kwaŋin ewema loka airiamunun, loiboie kakes kokidiŋ kanumam ailakec."
Leviticus16:17 Mam ejaun ediotuŋanan owema loka airiamunun naelomaria ŋesi ailuc aibois nakalaunan, aitodol naelomunia, kodaunite alucokin bon, ka ekaleke, ka atukot kere naka Isirael."
Leviticus16:18 Elomari neejai etem loejai akonyen nuka EJAKAIT, eluci ŋes; eyaŋaari aokot nuka emoŋ lotobait, ka aokot nuka ekoroi, ejukonokini amumwara nuka etem owaitin kere."
Leviticus16:19 Ebwatanakini ŋesi aokot kebokoritike irwan akanykaarei, kitesega, kitalau ŋes kanumam aila nuka idwe luka Isirael."
Leviticus16:20 Kedau ŋesi ailuc aibois nakalaunan, ka ewema loka airiamunun, ka etem, itodiari do ekoroi loejari:"
Leviticus16:21 Idokokini Aaron akaninike kere akou naka ekoroi loejari, kolimo kokujuke numam adolit kere nuka idwe luka Isirael, ka aibucaretakec kere, kes adiakanaretakec kere; ibwaikini kes akou naka ekoroi, ireŋeari ŋes modiŋ kakan naka etuŋanan loitemokino."
Leviticus16:22 Ibwoki ekoroi numam adolitekec kere akwap naemamei ituŋanan: eosikini ŋesi ekoroi kamodiŋ.
Leviticus16:23 Elomari Aaron owema loka airiamunun, elacari inapen luka ebaputa, luanapit naelomaria aibois nakalaunan, inyeini kes kanen:"
Leviticus16:24 Iloŋi akekuan kakip kaibois nakalaunan, enapi ikenapen, elomuni, einakini ainakineteke naicweio, ka ainakinet naicweio naka ituŋa, elucokini elopet, ka ituŋa."
Leviticus16:25 Icweikini asiepai naka ainakinet naka adiakaret kotem.
Leviticus16:26 Ŋol da loeosikini ekoroi loka Asasel ilosi ikenapen, iloŋi akekuan kakip; kokau elomuni oidukurun."
Leviticus16:27 Edakario emoŋ lotobait loka ainakinet naka adiakaret, ka ekoroi loka ainakinet naka adiakaret, luayaŋaunio aokotokec alucio aibois nakalaunan, kokiŋa kiidukurun; icweikinete ikecemukulen, ka akiriŋikec, ka ikijitikec kakim."
Leviticus16:28 Ŋol loicweikini kes, ilosi ikenapen, iloŋi akekuan kakip, kokau elomuni oidukurun."
Leviticus16:29 Eraun ekisil kamakus ikar kere: kolap lokikanyetekaarei, kapaaran nakitomonet naka elap, kitakadikis ikusitauon, mam iswamaete adioswam kere, iuriat, ka imoit da yeniboienenei kayes."
Leviticus16:30 Naarai kapaaran kaŋin kitulucio yes, aiteseg yes; iraunos luilaete kadiakanaretakus kere kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Leviticus16:31 Ŋes nakasabato naka aibworar nakayamakina mama ijaas, kitakadikis ikusitauon; erai ekisil ikar kere."
Leviticus16:32 Esasedoti da, loinyonyoikinitai, loetiakunitai araun esasedoti aibois naka papake, eluci ŋesi, enapenenei inapen luka ebaputa, kes inapen lukalaunak."
Leviticus16:33 Eluci ŋesi aibois nakalaunan, eluci da ewema loka airiamunun ka etem; ituluci ŋesi isasedotin ka ituŋa kere luka atukot."
Leviticus16:34 Eraun ŋol ekisil lomam enaŋi mama ijaas, alucio idwe luka Isirael kanuka adiakanaretakec kere atipet ŋolikaru.” Kiswama kwape ecorakinia EJAKAIT Musa."
Leviticus17:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus17:2 “Kolimok Aaron, ka odweke, ka idwe kere luka Isirael, ebe, Na ŋes akirot naecoraki EJAKAIT ebe,"
Leviticus17:3 Ituŋanan kere yenika ekek loka Isirael, yenearakini emoŋ, arai imerekek, arai akinei koidukurun, arai yenearakini kiŋa kiidukurun,"
Leviticus17:4 Yenimam eyaŋaunit ŋes okek loka ewema loka airiamunun, ainakin ŋes araun ainakinet mama ejai EJAKAIT koiŋaren kewema lokalaunan loka EJAKAIT: imarakinio aokot akouke; kebukoki aokot; egelario ituŋanan ŋin kotuŋake."
Leviticus17:5 Tetere eyaŋanarete idwe luka Isirael asubanakec, nueinakinete kais, tetere eyananarete kes mama ejai esasedoti, einanakinete kes araun asuban nuka ainakineta nuka ainapakin mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Leviticus17:6 Ebwatanakini esasedoti aokot otem loka EJAKAIT, kokek loka ewema loka airiamunun, icweikini asiepai araun asakat naeuru saa mama ejai EJAKAIT,"
Leviticus17:7 Mam bobo einanakinete asubanakec mama ejaas ikorwa, luiporooto kesi. Eraun ŋol ekisil mama ejaas ikar kere, anatar aturiokec."
Leviticus17:8 Ilimokini kes ebe, Ituŋanan kere yenika ekek loka Isirael, arai yenika imo luiboienenete kakes, yeneinakini ainakinet naicweio arai asubanit,"
Leviticus17:9 Yenimam eyaunit okek loka ewema loka airiamunun, ainakin araun asubanit mama ejai EJAKAIT: egelario ituŋanan ŋin kotuŋake."
Leviticus17:10 Ituŋanan kere yenika ekek loka Isirael, arai yenika imo luiboienenete kayes, yenenyami aokot kere; aluikini eoŋ ituŋanan ŋin yenenyami aokot, agelari ŋes kotuŋake."
Leviticus17:11 Naarai aijar naka akuan ejai toma aokot; ainak yes kotem alucio aijarakus: naarai aokot kes elucete kanuka aijar.
Leviticus17:12 Ŋes katemaria idwe luka Isirael ebe, Siri idio kayesi kenyam aokot, karaida imoit yeniboienenei kayes ainyam aokot."
Leviticus17:13 Ituŋanan kere yenika ekek loka Isirael, arai yenika imo luiboienenete kakes, yenemejai itiaŋ arai akweny naepedorio ainyam; ebukori ŋesi aokotoke, enuki kalup."
Leviticus17:14 Naarai aijar naka akuan kere, aokotoke eraas ipe kaijarake: Ŋes katemaria idwe luka Isirael ebe, Sirinyamenenete aokot nuka akiriŋ kere: naarai aijar naka akuan kere ŋes aokotoke: egelario ŋin yenenyami kes."
Leviticus17:15 Ŋinituŋanan kere yenenyami yenetwani bon, arai yenepoopooete itiaŋ, karaida kerai iuriat, arai imoit, ilosi ikenapen, iloŋi kakip, eraun yenimam elai kiton eboŋ: kosodi araun yenelai."
Leviticus17:16 Konye arai mam ilosi kes, karaida ailoŋ, ibwoki numam adoliteke.”"
Leviticus18:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus18:2 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Leviticus18:3 Siriswamaenenete aswamisio nuka akwap nako Misiri nekolo iboioto: siriswamaenenete da aswamisio nuka akwap naka Kanaan neketolomari yes: karaida alosenen kokisilakec.
Leviticus18:4 Kiswamaenenete yesi itubesiaka, koricenenete ikisilaka, alosenen kotoma: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Leviticus18:5 Koricenenete do ikakisila, ka itubesiaka: arai kiswama ituŋanan ŋul, ejari tomakec: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus18:6 Siri idio kayesi kikunyaki yenepajanasi kaŋes, apukor amujalalake: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus18:7 Sirikipuko amujalal naka papakon, ŋes amujalal naka totokon: erai ŋesi totokon; sirikipuko amujalalake."
Leviticus18:8 Sirikipuko amujalal naka aberu naka papakon: erai amujalal naka papakon.
Leviticus18:9 Sirikipuko amujalal naka inacikon, akoku naka papakon, arai akoku naka totokon, arai keurikinio ore, arai keurikinio neniec."
Leviticus18:10 Sirikipuko amujalal naka akoku naka okokukon, arai naka akoku naka akokukon: naarai amujalalakec ŋes nakon."
Leviticus18:11 Amujalal naka akoku naka aberu naka papakon, naaurie papakon, erai ŋin inacikon, sirikipuko amujalalake."
Leviticus18:12 Sirikipuko amujalal naka inac naka papakon: inacanas ŋesi kapapakon.
Leviticus18:13 Sirikipuko amujalal naka inac naka totokon: naarai inacanas ŋesi katotokon.
Leviticus18:14 Sirikipuko amujalal naka onace loka papakon, sirikikunyak aberuke: erai ŋesi totokon."
Leviticus18:15 Sirikipuko amujalal naka aberu naka okokukon: erai ŋesi akokukon; sirikipuko amujalalake.
Leviticus18:16 Sirikipuko amujalal naka aberu naka onacekon: erai amujalal naka onacekon.
Leviticus18:17 Sirikipuko amujalal naka aberu ka naka akokuke; sirikiyaŋa akoku naka okokuke, karaida akoku naka akokuke, apukor amujalalake; ipajanasi kesi: erai aronis."
Leviticus18:18 Sirikiyaŋa aberu ka inacike, araun akainike, apukor amujalalake, nepepe kainacike eriŋa ejari."
Leviticus18:19 Sirikikunyak aberu apukor amujalalake kapak namam elaia kanuka aibam.
Leviticus18:20 Sirikiyelokinos kaberu naka eidunyetekon, amunaun kaŋes."
Leviticus18:21 Sirikiinak aurikon aitotor akim mama ejai Molek, karaida aitisil ekiror loka Ekonideke: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus18:22 Sirikiperoto kikiliok, kwape kaŋor: erai naketal."
Leviticus18:23 Sirikiperoto kitiaŋ kere amunaun kaŋes: karaida aberu aibwo kakonyen nuka etiaŋ, apero kaŋes: erai ainyalakin."
Leviticus18:24 Sirikimunaunos bonik kadiokirot kaŋun kere: naarai amunaunos atekerin nuereŋeari eoŋ kakonyenekus kaŋun kere:
Leviticus18:25 Amunaun akwap: tape edopet ŋes numam adoliteke, elekari akwap da luiboienenete kotoma."
Leviticus18:26 Kanuka ŋun koriecnenete yesi ikakisila ka itubesiaka, siriswamaenenete adio kanuketal kaŋun; karaida iuriat, karaida imoit yeniboienenei kayes:"
Leviticus18:27 (Naarai eswamata ituŋa luka akwap, lukigeikinete yes nuketal ŋun kere, amunaun akwap;)"
Leviticus18:28 Kinyek akwap alekar yes da, naimunauniata yesi ŋes, kwape alekaria ateker nakigeikini yes."
Leviticus18:29 Naarai ŋin yeniswamai adio kanuketal kaŋun, egelario ituŋa luiswamaete ŋun kotuŋakec."
Leviticus18:30 Kanuka ŋun koricito akirotoka, kinyeis aiswamaun idio kiponesio kaŋul kaluketal, lueswamaenenoo ageikin yes, kinyeis amunaun bonik: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke.”"
Leviticus19:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus19:2 “Kolimok ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael ebe, Koraas lukalaunak: naarai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke arai lokalaunan."
Leviticus19:3 Koyoŋitenenei ŋinituŋanan kayesi totoke, ka papake, koricenenete asabatonoka: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke,"
Leviticus19:4 Sirikibelokinos neejaas aputosia, karaida aiswamaun bonik idekesio lucealara: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Leviticus19:5 Naiinakiniata asubanit naka ainakinet naka ainapakin mama ejai EJAKAIT, koinakis tetere kicamunio."
Leviticus19:6 Enyamio apaaran ŋin naiinakinete ŋes, ka moi da: arai kideun ibore kiton apaaran nakiwuniet, icweio kakim."
Leviticus19:7 Arai do enyamio kapaaran kanakiwuniet, erai naketal: mam ecamunio,"
Leviticus19:8 Konye ibwoki ŋinituŋanan yenenyami ŋes numam adoliteke, naarai etisil ibore yenikalaunan yenika EJAKAIT: egelario ituŋanan ŋin kotuŋake."
Leviticus19:9 Naisakiata nuka akwapukus, sirikisak cut agoria nuka emanikorikon, karaida aituk nuedepanara nuka aisakakon."
Leviticus19:10 Siridepidepanari aideŋ emusabibukon, karaida atukonokin araito nuedoununete nuka emanikorikon loka emusabibu; inyeinia kes yenikican ka imoit: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Leviticus19:11 Sirikokoenenete; karaida aiŋalaŋal, karaida asabanakin."
Leviticus19:12 Siriyapoenenete aiŋal kolimito ekakiror, kosodi aitisil ekiror loka Edekekon: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus19:13 Siriŋara eidunyetekon, karaida ademar lukeŋ; sirikitepero eropit loka ekejaanakinan loiwotei akuare kere kiton tupuruc."
Leviticus19:14 Sirikiken ikimin, karaida aibwaikin yeniguikini imuduk, konye koyoŋite Ekonideke: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus19:15 Siritubenenete numam etenito: sirikinupak ituŋanan yenikican, karaida aiyoŋ ituŋanan yenikagogoŋon, konye itubonokini eidunyetekon kotenan."
Leviticus19:16 Siririmio ebeele otuŋakon: karaida abwoanakin aluikin aokot nuka eidunyetekon: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.
Leviticus19:17 Sirikila onacekon kotaukon: abeit kitoroni ijo eidunyetekon, sirikibwok aronis kanuke."
Leviticus19:18 Sirikinyaŋ akirot, karaida adiŋakinit idwe luka ikonituŋa, konye komina eidunyetekon kwape iminari bon: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus19:19 Koricenenete ikakisila. Sirikisunup ibarenekon akwar kaluegelegela; sirikiye omanikorikon ikinyom luka iponesio iarei: karaida ainap anapito naka iponesio iarei luka egoe luinyalinyalitai.
Leviticus19:20 Ŋolituŋanan loeyelo kaberu, naerai abulesit, naisinerit okilenike, namam cut elakunitai, karaida alacakinio; iticanio kes; mam eario, naarai mam ŋin alacakinitai."
Leviticus19:21 Eyauni ŋesi ainakineteke naka aronis mama ejai EJAKAIT, okek loka ewema loka airiamunun, ŋes emerekek araun ainakinet naka aronis."
Leviticus19:22 Ituluci esasedoti ŋes kemerekek loka ainakinet naka aronis kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT kanuka adiakareteke naadiakaa ŋesi; isionio akediakaret naadiakaa ŋesi.
Leviticus19:23 Kilomasi yesi akwap, kiraata da ikito luka iponesio kere lunyaman, imarakinete araitokec araun numam akepepukec: esubete bala numam ekepep kamakus adaun ikar iuni; mam enyamenenoo."
Leviticus19:24 Konye kokaru lokiwoŋonet eraunos araitokec kere nukalaunak, aiturio EJAKAIT."
Leviticus19:25 Kokaru lokikanyet inyamete yesi araitokec, tetere idumunete eiyasikec: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Leviticus19:26 Sirinyamenenete ibore kaokotoke: karaida aitwasam icudeta karaida aiŋic aanyuneta.
Leviticus19:27 Sirikikeba akwesikus, karaida amunaar iwaitin luka ipenekakus."
Leviticus19:28 Sirikigerata awatekus kanuka lukatwak, karaida aibwaikin aanyuneta: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus19:29 Sirikitisil akokukon aitaraun ŋes naadote; kinyek akwap aluor adoteu, ilelebun akwap aronis."
Leviticus19:30 Koricenenete asabatonoka, koyoŋito aiboisika nakalaunan: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus19:31 Sirikibelokinos mama ejaas luejaas ajokia, karaida mama ejaas ikacudak; sirikimoata kes kinyeis amunaun: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Leviticus19:32 Inyouni kakonyen nuka yenabwanut akorwo, kiyapaara kakonyen nuka ekimat, koyoŋ Ekonideke: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus19:33 Arai iboie imoit kajo kakwapukus, sirikiswamakis ŋes erono."
Leviticus19:34 Eraun imoit yeniboie kayes kwape iuriat kamakus, komina ŋes kwape iminari bon; naarai iraas kolo imo kakwap nako Misiri: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Leviticus19:35 Siritubenenete numam etenito, aitem aojau, ainiŋ ka aitem etiai loilosikin."
Leviticus19:36 Aitemisio nukabeit, imisanin lukabeit, epa lokabeit, ekin lokabeit, ŋun kere itwasamaete: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke, loketolom yes kakwap nako Misiri."
Leviticus19:37 Kidarenenete ikakisila kere ka itubesiaka kere, kiswamaenenete kes: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT,”"
Leviticus20:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus20:2 “Bobo da, kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, ŋinituŋanan kere kodwe luka Isirael, arai komo luiboiete koIsirael, yeneinakini Molek aurike; abeit eario ŋin: ibiribirete ituŋa luka akwap ŋes kamor,"
Leviticus20:3 Aluikini eoŋ da ituŋanan ŋin, agelari eoŋ ŋes kotuŋake; naarai abu koinak Molek aurike, amunaun aiboisika nakalaunan, eti sil da ekakiror lokalaunan."
Leviticus20:4 Arai kibwaata ituŋa luka akwap akecekonye kotuŋanan kaŋol, naeinakinia Molek aurike, komam earete ŋes:"
Leviticus20:5 Kasodi eoŋ aluikin etuŋanan ŋol, ka ekekike, ka ŋul kere luiporoete kotupito ŋes aipororio Molek, agelari kes kotuŋakec."
Leviticus20:6 Ituŋanan da yenibelokin mama ejaas ŋul luejaas ajokin, mama ejaas ikacudak da, aipororio kes, aluikin eoŋ ituŋanan ŋin, agelari ŋes kotuŋake."
Leviticus20:7 Aso do, kitalaunos bonik, koraunos lukalaunak: naarai arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Leviticus20:8 Koricito ikisilaka, kiswamaenenete kes: Eoŋ EJAKAIT loetalauni yes."
Leviticus20:9 Naarai ŋinituŋanan yenilamakini papake arai totoke abeit eario: ilamakinit papake arai totoke; ebeikinete ŋes akeceokot,"
Leviticus20:10 Arai edotei etuŋanan kaberu naka eidunyeteke, lodote ka naadote da abeit eario kes kere."
Leviticus20:11 Etuŋanan da loeperete kaberu naka papake, apuko amujalal naka papake: abeit eario kes kere; ebeikinete kes akeceokot,"
Leviticus20:12 Arai keperio etuŋanan aberu naka okokuke, abeit eario kes kere: eswamata nuka ainyalinyal; ebeikinete kes akeeeokot."
Leviticus20:13 Arai keperio etuŋanan ekiliokit kwape kaberu, eswamata kere nuketal: abeit eario kes kere; ebeikinete kes akeceokot."
Leviticus20:14 Arai keyaŋa etuŋanan aberu ka totoke da, erai aronis: icweikinio, ŋes ka kes kere; tetere emameun aronis kamakus."
Leviticus20:15 Arai keperio etuŋanan etiaŋ, abeit eario: iarete etiaŋ da."
Leviticus20:16 Arai kikunyaki aberu etiaŋ kere, apero kaŋes, iari ijo aberu ka etiaŋ da: abeit eario kes; ebeikinete kes akeceokot."
Leviticus20:17 Arai keyaŋa etuŋanan inacike, akoku naka papake, arai akoku naka totoke, koany amujalalake, ka ŋin da eanyuni amujalal naka ŋol; erai akirot naka ileic; egelario kes kakonyen nuka idwe luka ituŋakec; apuko ŋesi amujalal naka inacike; ibwoki numam adoliteke."
Leviticus20:18 Arai keperio etuŋanan aberu naibami, epukori amujalalake; apuko aleleke, ŋin da apuko alele naka aokotoke: egelario kes kere kotuŋakec,"
Leviticus20:19 Sirikipuko amujalal naka inaci naka totokon, karaida inaci naka papakon; naarai apuko amujalal naka naipajanas kaŋes; ibwokete numam adolitekec."
Leviticus20:20 Arai keperio etuŋanan aberu naka mamaike, apuko amujalal naka mamaike: ibwokete adiakaretekec; etwakete komameete idwe."
Leviticus20:21 Arai keyaŋa etuŋanan aberu naka onaceke, erai numam aila: apuko amujalal naka onaceke; emamuunete kes idwe."
Leviticus20:22 Aso do koricenenete ikakisila kere, ka itubesiaka kere, kiswamaenenete kes: kinyek akwap, naketolomari yes aiboienen, alekar yes,"
Leviticus20:23 Sirilosenenete koponesio luka ateker naereŋeari kakonyenekus: naarai eswamata ŋun kere, tape alai kes,"
Leviticus20:24 Konye abu katema yes ebe, Irumete yesi akecekwap, eoŋ da kainakini yes airum, akwap naeleleete akile ka esik: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke, loatiakuni yes kotuŋa,"
Leviticus20:25 Aso do kotiaka yesi etiaŋ loelai, ka lomam elai, akweny namam elai ka naelai: sirikimunaasi ikusitauon kanuka etiaŋ, arai kanuka akweny, arai kanuka ibore yeneliat kakwap, luatiakunit eoŋ kamakus araut lumam elaete."
Leviticus20:26 Koraunos lukalaunak kama ajai: naarai Eoŋ EJAKAIT arai lokalaunan, abu katiak yes kotuna araun lukaŋ,"
Leviticus20:27 Etuŋanan da arai aberu yenejai ajokit, arai yenerai ikacudan, abeit eario; ibiribirete kes kamor: ebeikinete kes akeceokot.”"
Leviticus21:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Kolimok isasedotin, odwe luka Aaron, ebe, Siri ituŋanan kayesi kemunaun bon kanuka lukatwak kotuŋake;"
Leviticus21:2 Dimarai lukokekike luipajanas kaŋes, totoke, ka papake, ka okokuke, ka akokuke, ka onaceke;"
Leviticus21:3 ka inacike naerai abekot, nainacanas kaŋes namam ekiliokit, epedori amunaun bon kanukeŋ."
Leviticus21:4 Mam emunaun bon, korai ekapolon kotuŋake, aitisil bon."
Leviticus21:5 Mam ebarenete epata kakwesikec, karaida abaren iwaitin luka ipenekakec, karaida aiger awatekec."
Leviticus21:6 Eraunos kesi lukalaunak kama ejai Edekekec, mam itisilete ekiror loka Edekekee: naarai einanakinete ainakineta nuka EJAKAIT, nueinakinere kakim, atap naka Edekekec: kanuka ŋun eraunos lukalaunak."
Leviticus21:7 Mam kes eyaŋaarete aberu naerai adote, arai naitisilitoi: mam eyaŋaarete da aberu nakireŋea okilenike; naarai erai lokalaunan kama ejai Ekedeke."
Leviticus21:8 Kanuka ŋun italauni ŋes: naarai einakini atap naka Edekekon: eraun lokalaunan mama ijai: naarai eoŋ EJAKAIT loketalauni yes, arai lokalaunan,"
Leviticus21:9 Akoku da naka esasedoti, arai kitisil bon araun naadote, etisili papake; icweio ŋin kakim."
Leviticus21:10 Ŋol da loerai esasedoti lopeti koinacanake, loebukokinitai akinyet nakinyonyoanakina akouke, loetiakunitai ainap inapen, mam ŋol elakari itima luka akouke, karaida aicil inapeneke:"
Leviticus21:11 Karaida alomar neejai akuan nakatwan, karaida amunaun bon kanuka papake, karaida totoke;"
Leviticus21:12 Karaida alomun kaibois nakalaunan, karaida aitisil aibois nakalaunan naka Edekeke; naarai enapit aboko naka akinyet nakinyonyoanakina naka Edekeke: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus21:13 Emanyi ŋesi aberu nabekot.
Leviticus21:14 Apuserut, ka naireŋetai, ka aberu naitisilitoi, ka naadote, ŋun mam emanyi: konye emanyi abekot kotuŋake."
Leviticus21:15 Mam ŋes itisili aurike kotuŋake; naarai arai eoŋ EJAKAIT loetalauni ŋes.”
Leviticus21:16 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus21:17 “Kolimok Aaron ebe, Ŋolituŋanan loka aurikon anatar aturiokec loeŋwalit, siri ŋol kikunyaki ainakin atap naka Edekeke."
Leviticus21:18 Naarai ŋolituŋanan loeŋwalit, mam ŋol ikunyakini: emuduki, arai loicodo, arai ŋol loŋiriony kekume, arai loejai ibore yeniyatakina,"
Leviticus21:19 Arai etuŋanan loebilil akeju, arai loebilil akan,"
Leviticus21:20 Arai arubaŋat, arai loarakaki, arai loeŋwalit akoŋu, arai lokijip, arai lokasalabit, arai loebulul itou;"
Leviticus21:21 Mam etuŋanan loeŋwalit loka aur naka Aaron esasedoti, ikunyakini ainakin ainakineta nuka EJAKAIT nueinakinere kakim: eŋwalit ŋesi, mam ikunyakini ainakin atap naka Ekedeke."
Leviticus21:22 Enyami atap naka Ekedeke, nakalaunan noi, ka nakalaunan da kere."
Leviticus21:23 Konye mam elomari neejai aigalisit, karaida aikunyakin otem, naarai eŋwalit; kinyek aitisil aiboisioka nukalaunak: naarai arai eoŋ EJAKAIT loetalauni kes.”"
Leviticus21:24 Abu Musa kolimok Aaron ŋun, ka odweke, ka idwe kere luka Isirael."
Leviticus22:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus22:2 “Kolimok Aaron ka odweke ebe. Kotiakunos koboro lukalaunak luka idwe luka Isirael, luetalaunete kamakaŋ, kinyeis aitisil ekakiror lokalaunan: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus22:3 Kolimok kes ebe, Ŋolituŋanan loka aurikon kere anatar aturiokus, loikunyakini oboro lukalaunak, luitalaunete idwe luka Isirael mama ejai EJAKAIT, lomam elai, egelario etuŋanan ŋol kakonyeneka: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus22:4 Ŋolituŋanan kere loka aur naka Aaron lokatapon, arai loelelei; mam ŋes enyami iboro lukalaunak, aitodol naelaunia. Ŋol da loetirori ibore yenimam elai kanuka lukatwak, arai etuŋanan loeleleete ikinyomoke luka aur;"
Leviticus22:5 Arai ŋol loetirori ibore yeneliat, yenituluori ŋes lomam elai, arai ituŋanan yenepedori aituluor ŋes lomam elai, namam aila naka epone kere;"
Leviticus22:6 Etuŋanan loetirori idio kaŋul eraun lomam elai kiton eboŋ, mam enyami iboro lukalaunak, dimarai kilon akekuan kakip."
Leviticus22:7 Naelomaria akoloŋ, eraun loelai; kokau enyami iboro lukalaunak, naarai erai atapake."
Leviticus22:8 Ŋin yenetwani bon, arai yenepoopoete itian, mam enyami ŋul amunaun bon: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus22:9 Aso do koricito kesi akakirot, kinyeis aibwok aronis, kotwaka kaŋin, arai emunaunete ŋin: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT loetalauni kes."
Leviticus22:10 Siri emoit kenyam ibore yenikalaunan: mam epejonon loka esasedoti, arai ekewoteon, enyami ibore yenikalaunan."
Leviticus22:11 Konye arai kegwel esasedoti etuŋanan, loegweli kapesanake, ŋol enyami; ka ŋul da luaurikinio togoke, enyamete atapake."
Leviticus22:12 Arai kedukoki akoku naka esasedoti emoit, mam ŋin enyami ainakinet naijaŋio koboro lukalaunak."
Leviticus22:13 Konye arai akoku naka esasedoti erai apuserut, arai naireŋe tai, komamei ikoku, arai keboŋu togo loka papake, kwape keiditeuke, enyami ŋin atap naka papake: konye mam emoit enyami."
Leviticus22:14 Arai kenyam etuŋanan ibore yenikalaunan komam ejei, iyatakini idiopet kokany mama ejai, kosodi ainakin esasedoti ibore yenikalaunan."
Leviticus22:15 Mam kes itisilete iboro lukalaunak luka idwe luka Isirael, lueinakinete EJAKAIT;"
Leviticus22:16 Aisibwok numam adolit nueyaunete aronis, naenyamiata iborokec lukalaunak: naarai arai eoŋ EJAKAIT loetalauni kes.”"
Leviticus22:17 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus22:18 “Kolimok Aaron, ka odweke, ka idwe kere luka Isirael ebe, ŋinituŋanan kere yenika ekek loka Isirael, arai yenika imo koIsirael, yeneinakini ainakineteke, arai naka aiyaposiokec, arai naka ainakinetakec nuka akot, nueinakinete EJAKAIT araun ainakinet naicweio;"
Leviticus22:19 Iinakinete yenikiliokit yenimam eŋwalit, yenika imoŋin, yenika imerekekin, arai yenika akinei, tetere kicamunio yes."
Leviticus22:20 Konye ŋin kere yeneŋwalit, mam iinakinete ŋin: naarai mam ecamunio kanukus."
Leviticus22:21 Ŋinituŋanan kere yeneinakini asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin mama ejai EJAKAIT aitodolio aiyaposit, arai araun ainakinet naka akot, yenikosipan loka aituk arai loka amerekekin, ibus araun yenedoliorit cut acamunio: siri ŋes eŋwalit."
Leviticus22:22 Yenemudukana, arai yenebilil, arai yenicodo, arai yenejai ajim, arai egwenyigweny, arai yenika asalab, siriinakinete ŋul mama ejai EJAKAIT, karaida ainakin kes kotem aicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Leviticus22:23 Ipedori ainakin emoŋ lotobait arai imerekek yenejai ibore yeniyatakina, arai yenimam edolit atutubetake, araun ainakinet naka akot; konye mam ecamunio aitodolio aiyaposit."
Leviticus22:24 Ŋin yeneiikinito, arai yeniriecakinitai arai yenebulul, arai yenetuboro itouke, siriinakinete ŋin mama ejai EJAKAIT: siriswamaenenete kwaŋin kakwapukus."
Leviticus22:25 Siriinakinete atap naka Ekusideke kotoma kaŋul kere karaida kakan naka emoit; naarai abosusukec ejai kotomakec, eŋwalito: mam ecamunio kanukus.”"
Leviticus22:26 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus22:27 “Keurii imoŋ, arai imerekek, arai ikalol, esalakini enaki totoke adaun apaarasia akanykaarei; ageun kapaaran nakikanyetekauni ka adepar ecamunio araun ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Leviticus22:28 Arai erai aiteŋ arai amerekek sirikiarata ŋes ka ikekoku kere kadiopetepaaran.
Leviticus22:29 Naiinanakiniata asubanit naka aimal mama ejai EJAKAIT, iinakinete ŋes tetere kicamunio."
Leviticus22:30 Enyamio kapaaran kaŋin; sirikiteperoosi kiton tupuruc: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.
Leviticus22:31 Kanuka ŋun koricito aicorakinetaka, kiswamaenenete: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus22:32 Sirikitisiloto ekakiror; konye ketalaunio eoŋ kodwe luka Isirael: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT loketalauni yes,"
Leviticus22:33 Loketolomuni yes kakwap nako Misiri, araun Ekusideke: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
Leviticus23:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus23:2 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, Ipucin lueseunitai luka EJAKAIT, luilimorete araun atukokineta nukalaunak, lupe lu kes ipucinoka lueseunitai."
Leviticus23:3 Iswamaete aswam apaarasia akanykape: konye apaaran nakikanyetekaarei ŋes nakasabato naka aibworar, atukokinet nakalaunan; siriswamaete adioswam kere; erai nakasabato mama ejai EJAKAIT kaiboisiokus kere."
Leviticus23:4 Lu kes ipucino lueseunitai luka EJAKAIT, atukokineta nukalaunak, luilimonorete kapakiokec."
Leviticus23:5 Olap losodit, kapaaran nakitomonet kaoŋon naka elap eboŋ, ŋes aleleŋ naka EJAKAIT."
Leviticus23:6 Kapaaran nakitomonet kakany naka elap kaŋol ŋes epucit loka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi mama ejai EJAKAIT: inyamenenete imugatin lumam itubuunitoi apaarasia akanykaarei.
Leviticus23:7 Kapaaran nasodit itukonokinos atukokinet nakalaunan: siriswamaete aswam, naelaŋir."
Leviticus23:8 Konye iinanakinete ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT apaarasia akanykaarei: kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei ŋes atukokinet nakalaunan; siriswamaete aswam naelaŋir.”
Leviticus23:9 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus23:10 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, Kidoloto yesi akwap nakainakini yes, isakete nuke da, ŋes konyet iyaŋauniata eisuta loka nugeet nuka aisakakus neejai esasedoti:"
Leviticus23:11 Ijaŋi ŋesi eisuta kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, tetere ecamunio kanukus: kapaaran naetupakini nakasabato ŋes ijaŋia esasedoti eisuta."
Leviticus23:12 Kapaaran naijaŋiata yesi eisuta, iinakinete imerekek yenikiliokit yenimam eŋwalit yenika ekaru ediopet araun ainakinet naicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Leviticus23:13 Ainakineteke naka akiria eraun iarei kotomon luka epa loka akiria nuidicic nuinyalakinitai akinyet, ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT araun asakat naeuru saa: ainakineteke da namatat eraun naka ebino, idiopet kooŋon yenika ekin."
Leviticus23:14 Mam inyamete emugati, karaida imomwa luikawooritai, karaida aluŋuren nukitetiak aitodol apaaran ŋipeŋin, aitodol naiyaŋauniata ainakinet naka Edekekus: erai ekisil lomam edaun anatar aturiokus kaiboisiokus kere."
Leviticus23:15 Imarete yesi agear kapaaran naetupakini nakasabato, agear kapaaran naiyaŋauniata eisuta loka ainakinet najiaŋio; itodolete asabaton akanykaarei cut:"
Leviticus23:16 Imarete apaarasia akaisakany aitodol apaaran naetupakini nakasabato nakikanyetekaarei; iinakinete do ainakinet naka akiria nuka agwei mama ejai EJAKAIT.
Leviticus23:17 Itolomunete kaiboisiokus imugatin iarei lujiaŋio luka iarei kotomon luka epa: eraunos luka akiria nuidicic, ipeete kes kaluitubuunete, araun nugeet mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Leviticus23:18 Iinakinete imerekekin ikanykaarei ludidik lumam eŋwalito luka ekaru ediopet nepepe kimugatin, ka emoŋ lotobait, ka imerekekin iarei: eraunos ainakinet naicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT, nepepe kainakinetekec naka akiria, ka ainakinetakec numatan, ainakinet naeinakinere kakim, naka asakat naeuru saa mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Leviticus23:19 Iinakinete da ekoroi ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret, ka imerekekin iarei lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet araun asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin."
Leviticus23:20 Ijaŋi esasedoti kes nepepe kemugati loka nugeet araun ainakinet naijaŋio mama ejai EJAKAIT, nepepe kimerekekin luarei ludidik; eraunos lukalaunak mama ejai EJAKAIT luka esasedoti."
Leviticus23:21 Ilimorete kapaaran ŋipeŋin; ejaun atukokinet nakalaunan mamakus: siriswamaete aswam naelaŋir: erai ekisilomam edaun kaiboisiokus kere anatar aturiokus.
Leviticus23:22 Naisakiata yesi nuka akwapukus, sirikisakata cut agoria nuka emanikorikon, karaida aituk nuedepanara nuka aisakakon: inyeinia lukican, ka imoit: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke.”"
Leviticus23:23 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus23:24 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, Olap lokikanyetekaarei, kapaaran nasodit naka elap ejaun aibworar nakayamakina kamakus, aisiitunet naka aikut arupepen, atukokinet nakalaunan,"
Leviticus23:25 Siriswamaete aswam naelaŋir: iinakinete ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT.”
Leviticus23:26 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus23:27 “Konye kapaaran nakitomonet naka elap lo lokikanyetekaarei ŋes apaaran naka ailuc: eraun atukokinet nakalaunan mamakus, kitakadikis ikusitauon, iinakinete ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Leviticus23:28 Siriswamaenenete adioswam kapaaran kaŋin: naarai erai apaaran naka ailuc, aitulucio yes kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Leviticus23:29 Naarai ŋolitau kere lomam itakadikina kapaaran kaŋin, egelario kotuŋake."
Leviticus23:30 Ŋinituŋanan da yeniswamai adioswam kapaaran kaŋin, agelari eoŋ ituŋanan ŋin kotuŋake,"
Leviticus23:31 Siriswamaenenete adioswam: erai ekisil lomam edaun anatar aturiokus kaiboisiokus kere.
Leviticus23:32 Eraun mamakus nakasabato naka aibworar nakayamakina, kitakadikis ikusitauon: kapaaran nakikanyetekaoŋon naka elap eboŋ, agear eboŋ kiton eboŋ, idarete nakasabatokus.”"
Leviticus23:33 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus23:34 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, Kapaaran nakitomonet kakany naka elap kala lokikanyetekaarei, ŋes epucit loka iswamin adaun apaarasia akanykaarei mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Leviticus23:35 Kapaaran nasodit ejaun atukokinet nakalaunan: siriswamaete aswam naelaŋir.
Leviticus23:36 Iinakinete ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT apaarasia akanykaarei: kapaaran nakikanyetekauni ejaun atukokinet nakalaunan mamakus; iinakinete ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT: erai atukokinet nakayamakin; siriswamaete aswam naelaŋir,"
Leviticus23:37 Ŋul kes ipucin lueseunitai luka EJAKAIT, luilimorete yesi araut atukokineta nukalaunak, ainakin ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT, ainakinet naicweio, ka ainakinet naka akiria, ka asubanit, ka ainakineta numatan, ŋiniinakinet kapaaranike."
Leviticus23:38 Kogelara nukasabaton nuka EJAKAIT, kogelara da ainakinetakus, kogelara aiyaposiokus, kogelara da ainakinetakus nuka akot, nuiinanakinete EJAKAIT."
Leviticus23:39 Konye kapaaran nakitomonet kakany naka elap lokikanyetekaarei, kidaut atukonokin araito nuka akwap, idarete yesi epucit loka EJAKAIT apaarasia akanykaarei: kapaaran nasodit ejaun aibworar nakayamakina, kapaaran nakikanyetekauni da ejaun aibworar nakayamakina."
Leviticus23:40 Kapaaran nasodit iyaŋaarete araito nuka ikito luejok, atenuna nuka idukudukun, ka atenuna nuka ikito lueburok, ka ikito lukaguurut; iyalamasi yesi kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekusideke apaarasia akanykaarei."
Leviticus23:41 Kidarete ŋes araun epucit mama ejai EJAKAIT apaarasia akanykaarei ŋ: erai ekisil lomam edaun katuriokus: kidarete ŋes kolap lokikanyetekaarei.
Leviticus23:42 Kibojete koswamin apaarasia akanykaarei; kere luurikina koIsirael kibojete koswamin:
Leviticus23:43 Tetere ejenunete aturiokus ebe abu kesiboik idwe luka Isirael oswamin, naketolomunia eoŋ kes kakwap nako Misiri: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke.”"
Leviticus23:44 Abu Musa kolimok idwe luka Isirael ipucino lueseunitai luka EJAKAIT.
Leviticus24:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus24:2 “Kicorak idwe luka Isirael koinut ijo akinyet naka iseitunin naerukuk naijililitai kanuka atala, ainokia atala tiritir."
Leviticus24:3 Kiŋa kaigalisit naka aitejenunet, kowema loka airiamunun, itemonokini Aaron tiritir kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, agear eboŋ kiton tupuruc: eraun ekisilomam edaun anatar aturiokus,"
Leviticus24:4 Itemonokini ŋesi tiritir atalai nukopir loelai loka atala kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT,"
Leviticus24:5 Ilemuni ijo akiria nuidicic, ipei imugatin itomon ka luarei: itemi iarei kotomon luka epa komugati ediopet."
Leviticus24:6 Inapanakini kes okokoron iarei, kaŋolikokoro ikanykape, omesa loelai kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT,"
Leviticus24:7 Ibwaikini lukesai luelaete kanolikokoro, tetere eraun akiitunet naka imugatin, ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT,"
Leviticus24:8 Inapanakini imugatin ŋinipaaran nakasabato kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT tiritir: erai aitutuket namam edaun kanuka idwe luka Isirael.
Leviticus24:9 Eraunos luka Aaron ka odweke; enyamanakinete aibois nakalaunan: naarai eraas lukalaunak noi mamake luka ainakineta nuka EJAKAIT nueinakinere kakim kokisil lomam enaŋi.”
Leviticus24:10 Koloma okoku loka aberu naka Isirael loarai papake Emisiriat anyoun kodwe luka Isirael: kopegasi okoku loka aberu naka Isirael ketuŋanan loka Isirael koidukurun;
Leviticus24:11 Komoromor okoku loka aberu naka Isirael Ekiror, kiken: koyaŋaarai mama ejai Musa. Ekiror loka totoke Selomit, akoku naka Dibiri, loka ateker naka Dan,"
Leviticus24:12 Kibwaikis ŋes aidaris, tetere elimorio kes kaituk naka EJAKAIT."
Leviticus24:13 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus24:14 “Kitolomasi lokekenon kiŋa kiidukurun; kidokokis kere luapuput ŋes akaninikec akouke, kibiribir ŋes ekodet kere."
Leviticus24:15 Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, ŋinituŋanan yenikeni Edekeke ibwoki adiakareteke."
Leviticus24:16 Ŋin yenemoromoroi ekiror loka EJAKAIT, abeit eario; abe it ibiribirei ekodet kere; imoit ka iuriat, arai emoromoroi ekiror loka EJAKAIT, eario."
Leviticus24:17 Ŋin yeneseni ituŋanan kotwani, abeit eario;"
Leviticus24:18 ŋin yeneseni itiaŋ kotwani, egeli: aijar itia aijar."
Leviticus24:19 Arai itwaŋali ituŋanan ikeidunyet; kwape ekonakinia, ikonakinio ŋes da kwaŋin;"
Leviticus24:20 Abulucaret itia abulucaret, akoŋu itia akoŋu, ekelai itia ekelai: kwape itwaŋalia ituŋanan, ikonakinio ŋes da kwaŋin,"
Leviticus24:21 ŋin yeneari etiaŋ egeli: ŋin yeneari irunanan eario.
Leviticus24:22 Ijaas kekisil ediopet, kanuka imoit ka iuriat; naarai arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke.”"
Leviticus24:23 Kolimok Musa idwe luka Isirael, kitolomasi ŋol lokekenon kiŋa kiidukurun, kibiribiroto ŋes kamor. Kiswamata idwe luka Isirael kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT Musa."
Leviticus25:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa komoru Sinai atiar,"
Leviticus25:2 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, Kidoloto yesi akwap nakainakini yes, ŋes konyet idaria akwap asabato mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Leviticus25:3 Iyei emanikorikon ikar ikanykape, idimi amanakon naka emusabibu ikar ikanykape, itukonokini araitoke."
Leviticus25:4 Konye okaru lokikanyetekaarei ejaun asabato naka aibworar nakayamakina naka akwap, asabato mama ejai EJAKAIT: mam iyei emanikorikon, karaida aidim amanakon naka emusabibu."
Leviticus25:5 Mam isaki nuebwaŋunete bon, mam itukonokini araito nuka emusabibukon lomam ecapap: eraun ekaru loka aibworar nakayamakina naka akwap."
Leviticus25:6 Eraun asabato naka akwap inyamat kamakus; kamakon, ka ekejaanakinanikon, ka akejaanakinanikon, ka ebulesitikon loiwotei, ka imoitikon yeniboie kamakon;"
Leviticus25:7 Kama ibarenekon, ka itiaŋ luejiaas akwapukon, amioke kere eraun inyamat."
Leviticus25:8 Imari ijo asabaton akanykaarei nuka ikar, kes ikar ikanykaarei irwan ikanykaarei; eraunos kamakon apaarasia nuka asabaton akanykaarei nuka ikar, kes ikar akaisaoŋon ka lukanykaoŋon."
Leviticus25:9 Kosodi akutakin arupepe naeruo noi kapaaran nakitomonet naka elap lokikanyetekaarei; ikutakini arupepe kapaaran naka ailuc airimor akwapukus kere.
Leviticus25:10 Italaunete ekaru lokakaisakany, ilimorete da aosikinio airimor akwap mama ejaas luibojete kotoma kere: eraun eyubili kamakus; inyakakinete ŋinituŋanan alupoke, inyakarete da ŋinituŋanan okekike."
Leviticus25:11 Eraun ekaru ŋol lokakaisakany eyubili kamakus: mam iyeete, karaida aisak nuebwaŋunete bon, karaida atukonokin araito nuka emusabibuke lomam ecapap."
Leviticus25:12 Naarai erai eyubili; eraun lokalaunan kamakus: inyamete amioke nakotoma omanikor.
Leviticus25:13 Kokaru kaŋol loka eyubili inyakakinete ŋinituŋanan alupoke.
Leviticus25:14 Arai itwegeli ibore iidunyetekon, arai agwel kakan naka iidunyetekon, sirikiswamanakinos aronis."
Leviticus25:15 Kwape ejaar etiai loka ikar luetupakinete eyubili igwcli kaidunyetekon, kwape ejaar etiai loka ikar luka aisak kitwegeli ŋesi jo."
Leviticus25:16 Kwape ejaar aipues naka ikar iyatakini ijo apesanake, kwape ejaar aikidiokus naka ikar iŋoŋoori ijo apesanake, kitwegeli ŋesi jo kwape ejaar etiai loka ikar luka aisak,"
Leviticus25:17 Sirikiswamanakinos aronis; konye koyoŋ Ekonideke, naarai arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Leviticus25:18 Kanuka ŋun kitodoloto ikakisila, koricito itubesiaka kiswamata; kiboiete kakwap inapakina,"
Leviticus25:19 Erai akwap araitoke, kimonikinos, kiboikinos inapakina."
Leviticus25:20 Arai itemarete ebe, “Kinyami inyo kokaru lokikanyetekaarei? Koany, mam kiyei, karaida atukonokin amiokosi:”"
Leviticus25:21 Kasodi aicorakin arereŋuka mamakus kokaru lokikanyetekape, erai araito nuka ikar ŋul luuni."
Leviticus25:22 Iyeete okaru lokikanyetekauni, inyamete araito, nuŋorok nueŋadakinitai; inyamete nuŋorok nueŋadakinitai aitodol okaru lokikanyetekaoŋon, aitodol naelomunia araitoke,"
Leviticus25:23 Mam egwelario alup ayaŋaar ikar kere; naarai erai akwap nakaŋ: naarai iraas yesi ipejok ido luiboiororos kamakaŋ.
Leviticus25:24 Kakwap kere naka airumetekus isunupete akwap alakunio.
Leviticus25:25 Arai icana onacekon, kogwela alupoke ace, kosodi ekalakunanike abunore, elakuni ŋun nuagwelarit onaceke."
Leviticus25:26 Arai emamei ituŋanan yenelakuni, kebar ŋesi kodum Iuedaunete alakun:"
Leviticus25:27 ŋes konyet imaria ikar luagwelaritor, kinyakak ameda mama ejai ituŋanan loagwelit; eboŋori ŋesi alupoke,"
Leviticus25:28 Konye arai mam epedori ainyakun kanuke, kosodi nuagwelarit apaikin akan naka ŋol kaloagwelit aitodol okaru laka eyubili: kosodi koyubili eosikinio, eboŋori. Ŋesi da alupoke."
Leviticus25:29 Arai kegwela etuŋanan etogo kore loirigaunitai karwatat, epedori alakun ŋes eriŋa etuboro ekaru ediopet ageun kagwelarike: ekaru ediopet ejai apedor alakun."
Leviticus25:30 Arai mam elakunitai eriŋa etuboro ekaru ediopet, kosodi etogo loejai ore loirigaunitai karwatat itogogonitai ŋol loagweli ikar kere anatar aturioke: mam eosikinio koyubili."
Leviticus25:31 Konye itogoi lukoreria lumam irigaunitai karwatat imarakinitai kimanikoria lukorony: epedorio alakun, eosikinio koyubili."
Leviticus25:32 Konye ireria luka Ilebin, itogoi lukoreria luka alupokec, epedorete Ilebin alakun apak kere."
Leviticus25:33 Arai elakuni ediopet koLebin, kosodi etogo loagwelaritai, ka ere loka alupoke eosikinio koyubili: naarai itogoi lukoreria luka Ilebin eraas alupokec kodwe luka Isirael."
Leviticus25:34 Konye emanikor loka ironyia lukoreriakec mam epedorio agwelar; naarai erai alupokec ikar kere.
Leviticus25:35 Arai icana onacekon, kokurwok akanike kamakon; ibus ijo aigaŋ ŋes; iboie kamakon kwape emoit ka ekeboiororon."
Leviticus25:36 Sirikiyaŋa ameda kaneejai ŋesi karaida luiyatakina; konye koyon Ekonideke; tetere iboie onacekon kamakon.
Leviticus25:37 Sirikiinak ŋes apesanakon adumun ameda, karaida ainakin ŋes inyamatakon adumun luiyatakina,"
Leviticus25:38 Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke, loketolomuni yes kakwap nako Misiri, ainakin yes akwap nako Kanaan, araun Ekusideke."
Leviticus25:39 Arai icana onacekon kamakon, kogwelari bon mamakon; siritubuleseni ŋes aijaanakin jo:"
Leviticus25:40 Eraun kamakon kwape ebulesit loiwotei, kwape ekeboiororon; ijaanakini jo aitodol okaru loka eyubili;"
Leviticus25:41 ŋes konyet eosikinor ŋesi kamakon ka ikedwe kaŋes, eboŋori okekike, eboŋori da alup nuka lukapapake."
Leviticus25:42 Naarai eraas ikakejaanakinak luabu ketolom kakwap nako Misiri: mam egwelario kwape ibulesin.
Leviticus25:43 Mam iyait ŋes kagogoŋ; konye koyoŋitenenei Ekonideke,"
Leviticus25:44 Ido ibulesinikon ka abulesinikon luijaunete kajo; igwelete ibulesin ka abulesin katekerin nukirimoritos yes.
Leviticus25:45 Bobo da igwelete kodwe luka imo luiboiororete kamakus, kokekiakec luejaas kamakus, luaurikis kesi akwapukus: eraunos airumetekus."
Leviticus25:46 Itaraunete yesi kes airumet naka idwekus lukitupanakinete, aitiŋ araun airumet; iyaŋaarete ibulesinikus kamakec ikar kere: konye siriyaito iinacanakus idwe luka Isirael idiopet ayait yenice kagogoŋ."
Leviticus25:47 Arai kebar emoit arai ekeboiororon kamakon, onacekon da icana eapie kaŋes, kogwelari bon mama ejai emoit ekeboiororon kamakon, arai mama ejai ateker naka ekek loka emoit:"
Leviticus25:48 Kedau agwelario epedorio alakun; epedori ediopet koinacanake alakun ŋes:
Leviticus25:49 Epedori onace loka ikauriakake, arai okoku loka onace loka ikauriakake alakun ŋes, arai ŋolituŋanan loipajanas kaŋes epedori alakun ŋes; arai kebar elopet epedori alakun bon,"
Leviticus25:50 Imarakini ŋol loagwelit ŋes ageun kokaru loagwelaritor mama ejai kiton okaru loka eyubili: ejaun etiai loka agwelarike kwape eaar etiai loka ikar; kwape ejaar etiai loka ikar luka ebulesit loiwotei ejaun kaŋes.
Leviticus25:51 Arai eroko esalito ikar luipu, kwape ejaatar kesi inyakakini etiai loka alakunike kapesan nuagwelunere."
Leviticus25:52 Arai esalito ikar luikidioko kiton okaru loka eyubili, kosodi aimarakin ŋes; kwape ejaatar ikaruke inyakakini etiai loka alakunike."
Leviticus25:53 Kwape ebulesit loiwotei ŋolikaru ejaun kaŋes; mam eyait ŋes kagogon kakonyenekon.
Leviticus25:54 Arai mam elakunio kaŋul, eosikinio ŋes kokaru loka eyubili, ka ikedwe kaŋes."
Leviticus25:55 Naarai eraas idwe luka Isirael ikejaanakinak kamaka: eraas ikakeiaanakinak luabu ketolom kakwap nako Misiri arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke.
Leviticus26:1 Sirikiswamaut aputosia, karaida asipokin aput naegerer, arai epir, karaida asipokin amoru naegerer akwapukus, akukonokin ŋes; naarai arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke,"
Leviticus26:2 Koricito asabatonoka, koyoŋito aiboisika nakalaunan: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Leviticus26:3 Arai ilosenenete kokisilaka, koricito akaicorakineta kiswamata kes:"
Leviticus26:4 Kasodi ainakin yes akiru kapakioke, erai akwap amioke, eraete ikito luka emanikor araitokec."
Leviticus26:5 Edoli aicomokus toma aisakakus, edoli aisakakus roma apak naka aiye: inyamete atapakus kimonikinos, iboikinos akwapukus inapakina."
Leviticus26:6 Ainakini eoŋ ainapakin kakwap, iperete, emamei yenitukuriani yes: etanaŋi eoŋ itiaŋ lueroko kakwap, komam ekileŋ itori akwapukus."
Leviticus26:7 Irukitotor lukasurupokus, eŋianakinete ekileŋ kakonyenekus."
Leviticus26:8 Erukitotor ikany kayesi akwatat, erukitotor akwatat kayesi ilukumin itomon: eŋianakinete lukasurupokus ekileŋ kakonyenekus."
Leviticus26:9 Etei eoŋ yes, etuuriari yes, etupui yes; etogogoŋi akaitutuket kayes,"
Leviticus26:10 Inyamete luŋorok lueŋadakinitai sek, itolomunete Iuŋorok kanuka lukitetiak."
Leviticus26:11 Ebwaikini ewemaka lokalaunan kamakus: mam ekatau kisaci yes,"
Leviticus26:12 Aupenena eoŋ kayes, araun Ekusideke, yes da ikatuŋa."
Leviticus26:13 Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke, loabu ketolom yes kakwap nako Misiri, kinyeis araut ibulesinikec; abu kabil akito nuka ajookotokus, ketolot yes kitenara."
Leviticus26:14 Konye arai iŋerete apupun eoŋ, iŋerete da aswam aicorakineta nu kere; Arai igirete ikakisila, arai da esacito ikusitauon ikatubesia, tetere iŋerete aswam aicorakinetaka kere, konye ibilete aitutuketeka;"
Leviticus26:15 Eoŋ da keswamakini yes nu; ejukakini yes akurian, eluera ka ekamidi, luedopodopoete"
Leviticus26:16 akusikonye, lueinakinete ikusitauon aipirisiar: iyeete ikinyomokus atai, naarai enyamete lukasurupokus,"
Leviticus26:17 Aluikin eoŋ yes, kidanyio kakonyen nuka lukasurupokus: lukilaito kiyaete yes; ikerete komam yenikirukitor yes."
Leviticus26:18 Arai eriŋa iŋerito apupun eoŋ kanuka ŋun, kasodi aiyatakin alecor yes irwan akanykaarei kanuka adiakaretakus,"
Leviticus26:19 Abili eoŋ apedorikus naiturototor; etuluori akujukus kwape asuat, akwapukus da kwape aisinit:"
Leviticus26:20 Edacari akusigogoŋ atai: naarai mam akwapukus erai amioke, karaida ikito luka akwap mam eraete araitokec."
Leviticus26:21 Arai ilosenenete yesi iŋuŋas keoŋ, iŋerete apupun eoŋ; eyatakini eoŋ ainun yes aiticaneta irwan akanykaarei kwape ejaatar adiakaretakus."
Leviticus26:22 Ejukakini yes etiaŋ loka ais, loidadaanari ikusidwe, emudiari ibarenekus, itidisiari etiaikus; esilokoros irotinikus,"
Leviticus26:23 Arai iŋerete aboŋun kanuka ŋun kere, konye ilosenenete iŋuŋas keoŋ;"
Leviticus26:24 Eoŋ da alosi aŋuŋa kayes; adanyi eoŋ yes, eoŋ elopet, irwan akanykaarei kanuka adiakaretakus."
Leviticus26:25 Kainuni yes ekileŋ, loinyaŋi aitutuket; itukonokinos oreriakus: kejukakini yes atular; kijaikinio yes akan naka lokasurup."
Leviticus26:26 Arai kabil ebelakus loka emugati, epeete aiŋor atomon imugatinikus kokiala ediopet, ijaikinete kesi imugatinikus kaitemis: inyamete komam imonikinos."
Leviticus26:27 Arai iŋerete apupun eoŋ kanuka ŋun kere, konye ilosenenete iŋuŋas keoŋ;"
Leviticus26:28 Eoŋ da alosi aŋuŋa kayes kesiopite; alecori yes irwan akanykaarei kanuka adiakaretakus.
Leviticus26:29 Inyamete akiriŋ naka odwekus, inyamete da akiriŋ naka adwekus."
Leviticus26:30 Amudiari aiboisiokus nuiceleleete, ajepejepei ipirinokus luka akoloŋ, acakakini atesinakus atesina nuka aputosiakus; esaci ekatau yes."
Leviticus26:31 Etuluori ireriakus luiswapito, etisiliori aiboisiokus nukalaunak, aŋeri aiŋuun asakat naka luejijimikus."
Leviticus26:32 Etisiliori akwap; eumokinete lukasurupokus luiboiete kotoma.
Leviticus26:33 Kesiarakini yes da atekerin, autuni ekileŋ atupakin yes: esilior akwapukus, iswapete ireriakus."
Leviticus26:34 Kosodi akwap alelakin asabatonoke, apak kere naiswapitor, ka yesi da ijaunos kakwap naka lukasurupokus; ibworari do akwap, elelakini asabatonoke,"
Leviticus26:35 Ibworari apak kere naiswapitor; aibworar namam abu kodumunite kasabatonokus, iroko ijaas yesi kotoma,"
Leviticus26:36 ŋul da luedeunos kayesi, ainakini itauonokec aiilor kakwap naka lukasurupokec: erukitori kes airurum naka akiot naekusi ekwam; ekerete kesi, kwape ekeria etuŋanan ekileŋ; ibiroros komam yenerukitor."
Leviticus26:37 Icakacakas bonik, kwape ekeriata ekileŋ, komam yenerukitor: emamuunete yes agogoŋ abwoikin lukasurupokus."
Leviticus26:38 Ioliorete kotoma atekerin, kinyami yes akwap naka lukasurupokus."
Leviticus26:39 Luedeunos kayesi idokororaros kanumam adolitekec kakwapin nuka lukasurupokus; idokororaros da bala lukapapaakec kanumam adolitekec,"
Leviticus26:40 Elimorete numam adolitekec; ka numam adolit nuka lukapapaakec, ka aibucaretakec nuapotu kibucasi kamakaŋ, bobo da naarai alototo aŋuŋa keoŋ,"
Leviticus26:41 Eoŋ da alot aŋuŋa kakes, abu ketoloma kes akwap naka lukasurupoke: arai kitasonokinos ikecetauon lumam ekepep, iyuunete aiticanet naka numam adolitekec."
Leviticus26:42 Kasodi eoŋ akiitun akaitutuket ka Yakob; ka akaitutuket ka Isaak, eituni da akaitutuket ka Aburaam; eituni da akwap,"
Leviticus26:43 Ejalete kesi akwap, elelakini asabatonoke, kapak naeswapitor komameete kesi; iyuunete aiticanet naka numam adolitekec; naarai ajalakis ikatubesia, asacata ikecetauon ikakisila,"
Leviticus26:44 Konye kaŋun kere, naejaatar kesi akwap naka lukasurupokec, mam eoŋ ajalakini kes, karaida mam asaci kes, amudiar kes cut, aibil akaitutuket kakes: naarai arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekecedeke:"
Leviticus26:45 Konye eituni eoŋ aitutuket naka lukapapaakec kanukec, luabu ketolom kakwap nako Misiri kakonyen nuka atekerin, tetere araun eoŋ Ekecedeke: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
Leviticus26:46 Ŋun kes aicorakineta ka itubesia, ka ikisila, luabu EJAKAIT kisilak tomake ka idwe luka Isirael komoru Sinai kamaka Musa."
Leviticus27:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Leviticus27:2 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, Naiyapoo ituŋanan aiyaposit mama ejai EJAKAIT naebeit ituŋa, itiriani ijo etiaike."
Leviticus27:3 Itiriani etiai loka ekiliokit agear kaloka ikar akaisaarei aitodol loka ikar akaisakanykape, itiriani etiaike isekelin akaisakany luka epuesa, kwape ejaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan,"
Leviticus27:4 Arai erai naberu, itiriani etiaike isekelin akaisauni."
Leviticus27:5 Arai erai yenika ikar ikany aitodol ikar akaisaarei, itiriani do etiai loka yenikiliokit isekelin akaisaarei, ka loka yeniberu isekelin itomon."
Leviticus27:6 Arai erai yenika elap ediopet aitodol ikar ikany, itiriani etiai loka yenisapat isekelin ikany luka epuesa, ka loka yenipese itiriani etiaike isekelin iuni luka epuesa."
Leviticus27:7 Arai erai yenika ikar akaisakanykape ka adepar; arai erai lokiliokit, itiriani etiaike isekelin itomon ka lukany, ka naberu isekelin itomon."
Leviticus27:8 Konye arai icana ŋesi adepar etiaikon, itobwoi ŋes kakonyen nuka esasedoti, itiriani esasedoti etiaike; kwape ejaar apedor naka ŋol kaloeyapoi itiriani esasedoti etiaike."
Leviticus27:9 Arai erai etiaŋ, loeinakinete ituŋa araun ainakinet mama ejai EJAKAIT, eraunos kere lukalaunak lueinakini ituŋanan mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Leviticus27:10 Mam iloci ŋes, karaida aisiec, yenejok itia yenerono, arai yenerono itia yenejok: arai do isieci ŋesi itiaŋ itia itiaŋ, eraunos ŋin ka yenisiecitere kere lukalaunak."
Leviticus27:11 Arai erai etiaŋ lomam elai kere, lomam einakinete araun ainakinet mama ejai EJAKAIT, eyauni do etiaŋ akonyen nuka esasedoti:"
Leviticus27:12 Itiriani esasedoti etiaike, arai ejok arai erono: kwape itiriania ijo esasedoti etiaike, kojau kwaŋin,"
Leviticus27:13 Konye arai ekoto cut alakun ŋes, iyatakini ŋesi idiopet kokany mama ejai etiaikon."
Leviticus27:14 Arai kitalau etuŋanan etogoke araun lokalaunan mama ejai EJAKAIT itiriani do esasedoti etiaike, arai ejok arai erono: kwape itiriania esasedoti etiaike, kojau kwaŋin,"
Leviticus27:15 Arai ekoto ŋol loetalaunit alakun etogoke, iyatakini do idiopet kokany mama ejaas apesan nuka etiaikon, eraun lokeŋ"
Leviticus27:16 Arai kitalau etuŋanan atutubet naka emanikor loka alupoke, itiriani ijo etiaike kwape ejaar aiyeke; aiye ekomer loka esairi isekelin akaisakany luka epuesa."
Leviticus27:17 Arai kitalau ŋesi emanikorike agear kokaru loka eyubili, esalakin kwape ejaar etiaikon."
Leviticus27:18 Konye arai kitalau emanikorike akaulo naka eyubili, imarakini esasedoti ŋes apesan kwape ejaatar ikar luesalito aitodol okaru loka eyubili, iŋoŋoori da etiaikon."
Leviticus27:19 Arai ekoto ŋol loetalaunit emanikor: alakun ŋes cut, iyatakini do idiopet kokany mama ejaas apesan nuka etiaikon kosodi itogogoŋio mamakeŋ,"
Leviticus27:20 Arai mam ekoto alakun emanikor, arai itwegelit emanikor ecetuŋanan, mam bobo elakunio:"
Leviticus27:21 Konye naeosikinere koyubili eraun emanikor lokalaunan mama ejai EJAKAIT, kwape emanikor loegitunitai; eraunos alup nuka esasedoti,"
Leviticus27:22 Arai kitalau ŋesi emanikor loagwelit mama ejai EJAKAIT, emanikor lomam erai loka alupoke;"
Leviticus27:23 Imarakini esasedoti ŋes ajokis naka etiaikon kiton okaru loka eyubili: einakini etiaikon kapaaran kaŋin, kwape ibore yenikalaunan mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Leviticus27:24 Kokaru laka eyubili eboŋori emanikor mama ejai je loagwelari, ŋes elopet loebeitos alup."
Leviticus27:25 Itiriani itiaisineikon kere kwape ejaar esekel laka aibois nakalaunan: esekel ŋes igeran akaisaarei.
Leviticus27:26 Dimarai ikiyai kotoma otiaŋ yenerai ikiyai mama ejai EJAKAIT, mam ituŋanan italauni ŋes; arai emoŋ arai emerekek, erai laka EJAKAIT."
Leviticus27:27 Arai erai yenika etiaŋ lomam elai, elakuni ŋes kwape ejaar etiaikon, iyatakini da idiopet kokany mamakeŋ: arai mam elakunio, egwelario kwape ejaar etiaikon."
Leviticus27:28 Konye mam egwelario karaida alakunio ibore yenegitaritai, yenegitari ituŋanan mama ejai EJAKAIT kotoma kaluejaas kaŋes kere, arai yenika ituŋanan arai itiaŋ, arai yenika emanikor laka alupoke: ŋinibore kere yenegitaritai erai yenikalaunan noi mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Leviticus27:29 Mam elakunio yenegitaritai, yenegitaritai kotuŋa; abeit eario ŋes."
Leviticus27:30 Idiopet kotomon kere yenika akwap, arai yenika ikinyom luka akwap, arai yenika araito nuka ikito erai yeni ka EJAKAIT: erai yenikalaunan mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Leviticus27:31 Arai ekoto etuŋanan alakun ice kodiopet kotomonoke, iyatakini idiopet kokany mamakeŋ,"
Leviticus27:32 Idiopet kotomon kere yenika isipanin luka aituk ka luka amerekekin, ŋin yenitori kwap kebela, yenikitomonet eraun yenikalaunan mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Leviticus27:33 Mam irerei arai ejok arai erono, karaida aisiec: arai kisiec, eraunos ŋin ka yenisiecitere kere lukalaunak: mam “elakunio,”"
Leviticus27:34 Ŋun kes aicorakineta, nuabu EJAKAIT kicorak Musa kanuka idwe luka Isirael komoru Sinai."
Numbers1:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa kamodiŋ naka Sinai, kotoma owema loka airiamunun, kapaaran nasodit naka elap lokiareit, kokaru lokiareit akaulo kanyounikec kakwap nako Misiri, ebe,"
Numbers1:2 “Kimarata yesi ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael, kwape ejaatar ikekiakec, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakec, kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiroriakec, ŋolikiliokit, kwape ejaatar akecekwes;"
Numbers1:3 Ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kere luepedorete alosit ojie koIsirael, imarete ijo ka Aaron kes kwape ejaatar irioŋetakec,"
Numbers1:4 Ejauni etuŋanan loka ŋiniteker nepepe kayes; ŋolidiopet loepolokinit ekal loka lukapapaake,"
Numbers1:5 Lu kes ikiroria luka ituŋa luebwoenenete nepepe kayes: loka Reuben: Elisur okoku loka Sedeur.
Numbers1:6 Loka Simeon; Selumiel okoku loka Surisadai,"
Numbers1:7 Loka Yuda; Nason okoku loka Aminadab,"
Numbers1:8 Loka Isakar; Netanel okoku loka Suar,"
Numbers1:9 Loka Sebulun; Eliab okoku loka Kelon.
Numbers1:10 Loka idwe luka Yosep: loka Epuraim; Elisama okoku loka Amikud; loka Manase; Gamaliel okoku loka Peda-sur.
Numbers1:11 Loka Benyamin; Abidan okoku loka Gideoni.
Numbers1:12 Loka Dan; Akleser okoku loka Amisadai,"
Numbers1:13 Loka Aser; Pagiel okoku loka Ocuran.
Numbers1:14 Loka Gad; Eliasap okoku loka Deuel.
Numbers1:15 Loka Naputali; Akira okoku loka Enan.”
Numbers1:16 Ŋul kes luaponi konyaraunai kotoma okodet, ikapolok luka atekerin nuka lukapapaakee; kes luapolokinito ikekia luka Isirael."
Numbers1:17 Koyanaasi Musa ka Aaron ituŋa nul luebilitai ikeeekiroria:.
Numbers1:18 Kotukonokis ekodet kere nepepe kapaaran nasodit naka elap lokiareit, koJimosi lukapapaakec, kwape ejaatar ikekiakee, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiroriakee, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kwape ejaatar akwesikee."
Numbers1:19 Kwape abu EJAKAIT kieorakinitor Musa, kimar kes kwaŋin kamodiŋ naka Sinai,"
Numbers1:20 Idwe luka Reuben, ekiyai loka Isirael, aturiokee, kwape ejaatar ikekiakee, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiroriakee, kwape ejaatar akwesikee, ŋolikiliokit ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kere luepedorete alosit ojie;"
Numbers1:21 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, luka ateker naka Reuben, emwaasi ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka lukanykape ka akwat akany (46,500)."
Numbers1:22 Idwe luka Simeon, aturiokee, kwape ejaatar ikekiakee, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, nul luaponi kimarai kakesi, kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiroriakee, kwape ejaatar akwesikec, nolikiliokit ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kere luepedorete alosit ojie;"
Numbers1:23 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, luka ateker naka Simeon, emwaasi ilukumin akaisakany ka lukanykaonon ka akwat auni (59,300),"
Numbers1:24 Idwe luka Gad, aturiokee, kwape ejaatar ikekiakee, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiroriakee, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kere luepedorete alosit ojie:"
Numbers1:25 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, luka ateker naka Gad, emwaasi ilukumin akaisaoijon ka lukany ka akwat akanykape ka akaisakany (45,650)."
Numbers1:26 Idwe luka Yuda, aturiokee, kwape ejaatar ikekiakee, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiroriakee, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kere luepedorete alosit oiie;"
Numbers1:27 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, luka ateker naka Yuda, emwaasi ilukumin akaisakanykaarei ka luonon ka akwat akanykape (74,600)."
Numbers1:28 Idwe luka Isakar, aturiokee, kwape ejaatar ikekiakee, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakec, kwape eiaar etiai loka ikiroriakee, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kere luepedorete alosit ojie;"
Numbers1:29 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, luka ateker naka Isakar, emwaasi ilukumin akaisakany ka luoŋon ka akwat aoŋon (54,400)."
Numbers1:30 Idwe luka Sebulun, aturiokee, kwape ejaatar ikekiakee, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiroriakec, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kere luepedorete alosit ojie;"
Numbers1:31 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, luka ateker naka Sebulun, emwaasi ilukumin akaisakany ka lukanykaarei ka akwat aoŋon (57,400)."
Numbers1:32 Idwe luka Yosep, kes lu, luka idwe luka Epuraim, aturiokee, kwape ejaatar ikekiakec, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, kwape eiaar etiai loka ikiroriakee, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kere luepedorete alosit ojie;"
Numbers1:33 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, luka ateker naka Epuraim, emwaasi ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka akwat akany (40,500)."
Numbers1:34 Idwe luka Manase, aturiokee, kwape ejaatar ikekiakee, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiroriakee, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kere luepedorete alosit ojie:"
Numbers1:35 Ŋulluaponi kimarai kakesi, luka ateker naka Manase, emwaasi ilukumin akaisauni ka luarei ka akwat aarei (32,200)."
Numbers1:36 Idwe luka Benyamin, aturiokee, kwape ejaatar ikekiakee, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiroriakee, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kere luepedorete alosit ojie:"
Numbers1:37 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, luka ateker naka Benyamin, emwaasi ilukumin akaisauni ka lukany ka akwat aoŋon (35,400),"
Numbers1:38 Idwe luka Dan, aturiokec, kwape ejaatar ikekiakec, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakec, kwape eiaar etiai loka ikiroriakee, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kere luepedorete alosit ojie;"
Numbers1:39 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, luka ateker naka Dan, emwaasi ilukumin akaisakanykape ka luarei ka akwat akanykaarei (62,700)."
Numbers1:40 Idwe luka Aser, aturiokee, kwape ejaatar ikekiakee, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiroriakee, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kere luepedorete alosit ojie;"
Numbers1:41 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, luka ateker naka Aser, emwaasi ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka lodiopet ka akwat akany (41,500)."
Numbers1:42 Idwe luka Naputali, aturiokee, kwape ejaatar ikekiakee, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiroriakee, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kere luepedorete alosit oiic:"
Numbers1:43 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, luka ateker naka Naputali, emwaasi ilukumin akaisakany ka luuni ka akwat aoŋon (53,400)."
Numbers1:44 Ŋul kes luaponi kimarai, luemarete Musa ka Aaron, ka ikapolok luka Isirael, emwaasi ituŋa itomon ka luarei: ninitunanan kakesi ajai kanuka ekal loka lukapapaake."
Numbers1:45 Aso kere luaponi kimarai kodwe luka Isirael kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kere luepedorete alosit ojie koIsirael:"
Numbers1:46 Kes kere luaponi kimarai emwaasi ilukumin akwat akanykape kaluuni ka akwat akany ka akaisakany (603,550)."
Numbers1:47 Konye Ilebin kwape eiaar ateker naka lukapapaakee mam aponi kimarakinai tomakec,"
Numbers1:48 Naarai abu Edeke kolimok Musa ebe,"
Numbers1:49 Ateker bon naka Lebi ŋes mam jo imari, karaida aimorikikin etiaikec toma otiai loka idwe luka Isirael:"
Numbers1:50 Konye kodakak ijo Ilebin aidar ewema lokalaunan loka aitejenunet, ka iboro kere lukotoma, ka iboro kere lueiaatar; edakete kesi ewema lokalaunan, ka iboroke kere; ijaanakinete ŋes, ido idukurete kesi airimor ewema lokalaunan."
Numbers1:51 Naitobwosere ewema lokalaunan, Ilebin kes eusete iloin ka anunuk da; ido naibubukinere ewema, Ilebin kes ibubukinete: ido eario eloŋwait kere loikunyuni die kewema."
Numbers1:52 Ibubuete idwe luka Isirael iwemanakee, ninitunanan owai loitebeitai aketeker, ninitunanan owai loka emederake, kwape ejaatar irionetakec."
Numbers1:53 Konye idukurete Ilebin airimor ewema lokalaunan loka aitejenunet, kinyek anyunyura abunokin ekodet loka idwe luka Isirael: ido idarete Ilebin ewema lokalaunan loka aiteienunet.”"
Numbers1:54 Kiswamata idwe luka Isirael kwaŋin; kere kwape kieorakinia EJAKAIT Musa, kiswamata kwaŋin."
Numbers2:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron atiar,"
Numbers2:2 “Idukurete idwe luka Isirael ninituŋanan kwape ejaar emederake, ka aanyuneta nuka ikalia luka lukapapaakee: idukurete kolukunito kobwatara kowema loka airiamunun."
Numbers2:3 Ŋul luka emedera loka iidukurun luka Yuda, kes idukurete ari nakokide kama eniunia akoloŋ, kwape ejaatar irionetakec: ido ekapolon loka idwe luka Yuda ŋes Nason okoku loka Aminadab."
Numbers2:4 Ido erioneteke, ka ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, emwaasi ilukumin akaisakanykaarei ka luonon ka akwat akanykape."
Numbers2:5 Ido nul luidukurete eiduny kaŋes kes luka ateker naka Isakar: ekapolon da loka idwe luka Isakar ŋes Netanel okoku loka Suar:
Numbers2:6 Erioneteke, ka nul luaponi kimarai kakesi, emwaasi ilukumin akaisakany ka luonon ka akwat aoŋon:"
