Numbers2:7 Ateker naka Sebulun: ekapolon loka idwe luka Sebulun ŋes Eliab okoku loka Kelon:
Numbers2:8 Erioneteke, ka nul luaponi kimarai kakesi, emwaasi ilukumin akaisakany ka lukanykaarei ka akwat aoŋon."
Numbers2:9 Kere luaponi kimarai luka iidukurun luka Yuda emwaasi ilukumin akwatat ka akaisakanykauni ka lukanykape ka akwat aoijon, kwape ejaatar irionetakec. Kes egeete alosit."
Numbers2:10 Ejaun emedera loka iidukurun luka Reuben ari naka eŋalakimak kwape ejaatar irionetakec: ekapolon loka idwe luka Reuben ŋes Elisur okoku loka Sedeur.
Numbers2:11 Erioneteke, ka ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, emwaasi ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka lukanykape ka akwat akany."
Numbers2:12 Ŋul luidukurete eiduny kaŋes kes luka ateker naka Simeon: ekapolon loka idwe luka Simeon ŋes Selumiel okoku loka Surisadai:
Numbers2:13 Erioŋcteke, ka ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, emwaasi ilukumin akaisakany ka Iukanykaoŋon ka akwat auni:"
Numbers2:14 Ka ateker naka Gad: ekapolon loka idwe luka Gad ŋes Eliasap okoku loka Reuel:
Numbers2:15 Erioneteke, ka ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, emwaasi ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka lukany ka akwat akanykape ka akaisakany."
Numbers2:16 Kere luaponi kimarai luka iidukurun luka Reuben emwaasi ilukumin akwatat ka akaisakany ka lodiopet, ka akwat aoŋon ka akaisakany, kwape ejaatar irionetakec, Kes iareikinete kalosit."
Numbers2:17 Kosodi itobwosio ewema loka airiamunun, kojaas da iidukurun luka Ilebin kidin kiidukurun ice: kwape idukurioto, kwape kwaŋin da ebwosiata, ninitunanan kaiboisike, kwape ejaatar imederanakee."
Numbers2:18 Ejaun emedera loka iidukurun luka Epuraim ari nakoto kwape ejaatar irioŋetakec; ekapolon loka idwe luka Epuraim ŋes Elisama okoku loka Amikud.
Numbers2:19 Erioneteke, ka ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, emwaasi ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka akwat akany."
Numbers2:20 Idunyakin ateker naka Manase neejai ŋesi: ekapolon loka idwe luka Manase ŋes Gamaliel okoku loka Pedasur:
Numbers2:21 Erioneteke, ka ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, emwaasi ilukumin akaisauni ka luarei ka akwat aarei:"
Numbers2:22 Ka ateker naka Benyamin: ekapolon loka idwe luka Benyamin ŋes Abidan okoku loka Gideoni:
Numbers2:23 Erioneteke, ka nul luaponi kimarai kakesi, emwaasi ilukumin akaisauni ka Iukany ka akwat aoŋon,"
Numbers2:24 Kere luaponi kimarai luka iidukurun luka Epuraim emwaasi ilukumin akwatat ka lukanykauni ka akwatat, kwape ejaatar irionetakec. Kes iunikinete kalosit."
Numbers2:25 Ejaun emedera Ioka iidukurun luka Dan ari naka agolitomei kwape ejaatar irionetakec: ekapolon loka idwe luka Dan ŋes Akicser okoku loka Amisadai.
Numbers2:26 Erioneteke, ka ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, emwaasi ilukumin akaisakanykape ka luarei ka akwat akanykaarci."
Numbers2:27 Ido nul luidukurete eiduny kaŋes kes luka ateker naka Aser: ekapolon loka idwe luka Aser ŋes Pagiel okoku loka Oeuran.
Numbers2:28 Erioneteke, ka nul luaponi kimarai kakesi, emwaasi ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka lodiopet ka akwat akany:"
Numbers2:29 Ka ateker naka Naputali: ekapolon loka idwe luka Naputali ŋes Akira okoku loka Enan:
Numbers2:30 Erioneteke, ka nul luaponi kimarai kakesi, emwaasi ilukumin akaisakany ka luuni ka akwat aoŋon,"
Numbers2:31 Kere luaponi kimarai luka iidukurun luka Dan emwaasi ilukumin akwatat ka akaisakany ka lukanykaarei ka akwat akanykape. Kes iwasiete kalosir kwape ejaatar imederanakee.”
Numbers2:32 Ŋul kes luaponi kimarai kodwe luka Isirael kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee: kere luaponi kimarai luka iidukurun kwape ejaatar irionetakee, emwaasi ilukumin akwat akanykape ka luuni ka akwat akany ka akaisakany."
Numbers2:33 Konye mam Ilebin aponi kimarakinai toma odwe luka Isirael: kwape kieorakinia EJAKAIT Musa.
Numbers2:34 Kiswamata idwe luka Isirael kwaŋin; kere kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT Musa, kidukuroto kwaŋin kwape ajaatar imederanakee, kwape kwaŋin da kebwosiata, ninitunanan kwape ajaar ekekike, kwape ajaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee."
Numbers3:1 Na ŋes aur naka Aaron ka Musa kapaaran naeneratar EJAKAIT kaMusa komoru Sinai.
Numbers3:2 Lu kes ikiroria luka odwe luka Aaron: Nadab ekiyaike, ka Abiku, Eleasar, ka Itamar."
Numbers3:3 Lu kes ikiroria luka odwe luka Aaron, isasedotin luaponi kinyonyoikinai akinyet, luatiakuni ŋesi aijaanakin toma aswam naka esasedoti."
Numbers3:4 Kotwakikis Nadab ka Abiku akonyen nuka EJAKAIT, naainakiniata akim naitegelikina kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kamodiŋ naka Sinai, komameete kes idwe: kiiaanakis Eleasar ka Itamar kaswam naka esasedoti kakonyen nuka Aaron papakec,"
Numbers3:5 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers3:6 “Kisukuny ateker naka Lebi, kibwaik kes akonyen nuka Aaron esasedoti, tetere ijaanakinete ŋes."
Numbers3:7 Ido idarete akiroke, ka akiro da nuka ekodet kere loejai iŋaren kewema loka airiamunun, aijaanakin toma owema lokalaunan."
Numbers3:8 Idarete da iboro kere luka ewema loka airiamunun, ka akiro da nuka idwe luka Isirael, aijaanakin roma owema lokalaunan."
Numbers3:9 Iinakini Ilebin mama ejai Aaron ka odweke: ainakin kes cut mamakeŋ kanuka idwe luka Isirael.
Numbers3:10 Itebeikini Aaron ka odweke, aidarenen esasedotenekec: eario eloŋwait kere loikunyuni die kewema.”"
Numbers3:11 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers3:12 “Ka eoŋ da, koany, alemu Ilebin kodwe luka Isirael aibois naka ikiyaik luepukorete aliligeta kotoma odwe luka Isirael; eraunos da Ilebin lukan:"
Numbers3:13 Naarai ikiyaik kere eraas lukan; kapaaran naadanyia ikiyaik kere kotoma akwap nako Misiri abu ketalau ikiyaik kere koIsirael kanukan, ituŋanan ka itiaŋ da: eraunos lukan; arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
Numbers3:14 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa kamodiŋ naka Sinai atiar,"
Numbers3:15 “Kimar idwe luka Lebi kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakec, kwape ejaatar ikekiakec: imari ŋolikiliokit ageun kayenika elap ediopet ka yenedeparit.”"
Numbers3:16 Kimar Musa kes kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, kwape kicorakinitere."
Numbers3:17 Lu kes odwe luka Lebi kwape ejaatar ikiroriakec; Gereson, ka Kokat, ka Merari."
Numbers3:18 Lu kes ikiroria luka odwe luka Gereson kwape ejaatar ikekiakec: Libuni ka Simei.
Numbers3:19 Odwe luka Kokat kwape ejaatar ikekiakec; Amuram, ka Isar, ka Keburon ka Usiel."
Numbers3:20 Odwe luka Merari kwape ejaatar ikekiakec; Mali ka Musi. Ŋul kes ikekia luka Ilebin kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakec.
Numbers3:21 Kotoma Gereson ŋes alomunia ekek loka Ilibunin, ka ekek loka Isimein: nul kes ikekia luka Igeresonin."
Numbers3:22 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, kwape eiaar etiai loka ikiliok kere, ageun kayenika elap ediopet ka yenedeparit, ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi emwaasi ilukumin ikanykaarei ka akwat akany."
Numbers3:23 Luka ekek loka Igeresonin idukurete agule kewema lokalaunan kari nakoto,"
Numbers3:24 Ekapolon loka ekal loka lukapapaa luka Igeresonin ŋes Eliasap okoku loka Lael.
Numbers3:25 Ido kotoma owema loka airiamunun idarenenete odwe luka Gereson ewema lokalaunan, ka Bwema, ka eimukoreteke, ka aigalisit naka ekek loka ewema loka airiamunun,"
Numbers3:26 Ka luikajaj alaro, ka aigalisit naka ekek loka alaro, naidunyas kewema lokalaunan, naidunyas ketem kolukunite, ka aunoike, kwape eiaar aijaanakinikec kere."
Numbers3:27 Kotoma Kokat ŋes alomunia ekek loka Imuramain, ka ekek loka Isarin, ka ekek laka Ikeburonin, ka ekek loka Iusielin: ŋul kes ikekia luka Ikokatin,"
Numbers3:28 Kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiliok kere, ageun kayenika elap ediopet ka yenedeparit, emwaasi ilukumin ikanykauni ka akwat akanykape, idarenenete aibois nakalaunan."
Numbers3:29 Luka ikekia luka odwe luka Kokat idukurete osiep loka ewema kari naka eŋalakimak,"
Numbers3:30 Ekapolon loka ekal loka lukapapaa luka ikekia luka Ikokatin ŋes Elisapan okoku loka Usiel.
Numbers3:31 Idarenenete kes asaduku, ka emesa, ka epir loka atala, ka itemwan, ka iboro lukotoma aibois nakalaunan luetwasamaete kesi aiiaanakinia, ka aigalisit, ka aiiaanakinikec kere."
Numbers3:32 Eleasar da okoku loka Aaron esasedoti ŋes eraun ekapolon laka ikapolok luka Ilebin, ido eanyanari ŋul luidarete aibois nakalaunan."
Numbers3:33 Kotoma Merari ŋes alomunia ekek loka Imalin, ka ekek loka Imusin: nul kes ikekia luka Merari."
Numbers3:34 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiliok kere, ageun kayenika elap ediopet ka yenedeparit, emwaasi ilukumin ikanykape ka akwat aarei."
Numbers3:35 Ekapolon loka ekal loka lukapapaa luka ikekia luka Imerarin ŋes Suriel okoku loka Abikail; idukurete kesi osiep loka ewema kari naka agolitomei.
Numbers3:36 Ido luaseikinitai odwe luka Merari aidarenen kes abaoi nuka ewema lokalaunan, ka akitoke nukirionokina, ka ipirinoke, ka aigaŋetakec, ka iboro kere lueupatar, ka aijaanakinikec kere:"
Numbers3:37 Ka ipirino luelukunito alaro, ka aigaŋetakec, ka iloinokec, ka aunoikec."
Numbers3:38 Ŋul da luidukurete iŋaren kewema lokalaunan kari nakokide, orute loka ewema loka airiamunun kama eniunia akoloŋ, kes Musa ka Aaron ka odweke, idarenenete aibois nakalaunan, ka akiro da nuka idwe luka Isirael: ido eario eloŋwait loikunyuni die kewema."
Numbers3:39 Kere luaponi kimarai luka Ilebin, luemarete Musa ka Aaron kaieorakinet naka EJAKAIT, kwape ajaatar ikekiakee, ikiliok kere ageun kayenika elap ediopet ka yenedeparit, emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luarei,"
Numbers3:40 Kolimok EJAKAIT Musa ebe, “Kimar ikiyaik kere lukiliok luka idwe luka Isirael ageun kayenika elap ediopet ka yenedeparit, kimar etiai loka ikiroriakee."
Numbers3:41 Kolemikinai eoŋ Ilebin (arai eoŋ EJAKAIT) aibois naka ikiyaik kere kodwe luka Isirael; ka ibaren luka Ilebin aibois naka ikiyaik kere luka ibaren luka idwe luka Isirael.”
Numbers3:42 Kimar Musa ikiyaik kere kodwe luka Isirael, kwape kieorakinia EJAKAIT."
Numbers3:43 Ikiyaik kere lukiliok kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiroriakee, ageun kayenika elap ediopet ka yenedeparit, nul luaponi kimarai kakesi, emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luarei ka akwat aarei ka akaisakanykaarei ka luuni."
Numbers3:44 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers3:45 “Kolem Ilebin aibois naka ikiyaik kere kodwe luka Isirael, ka ibaren luka Ilebin aibois naka ibarenekee: eraunos Ilebin lukan: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT,"
Numbers3:46 Ido kanuka alakunio naka ikiyaik akwat aarei ka akaisakanykaarei ka luuni luka idwe luka Isirael luedeparitotor kesi etiai loka Ilebin,"
Numbers3:47 Ŋauni isekelin ikany kaneejai ŋinituŋanan; ijauni kes kwape ejaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan (esekel ŋes igeran akaisaarei):
Numbers3:48 Iinakini Aaron ka odweke apesan nuelakunere luedeparitotor kes.”
Numbers3:49 Kiiau Musa apesan nulakunet kaneeiaas nul luadeparitotor kesi lualakunete Ilebin:
Numbers3:50 Kijau ŋesi apesan kaneejaas ikiyaik luka idwe luka Isirael; isekelin elukumit ka akwat auni ka akaisakanykape ka lukany, kwape ejaar esekelloka aibois nakalaunan:"
Numbers3:51 Kiiaik Musa Aaron ka odweke apesan nulakunet, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, kwape kieorakinia EJAKAIT Musa."
Numbers4:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron atiar,"
Numbers4:2 “Kimarasi odwe luka Kokat kotoma odwe luka Lebi, kwape ejaatar ikekiakec, kwape cjaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee."
Numbers4:3 Ageun kaluka ikar akaisauni ka luedeparito aitodol luka ikar akaisakany, kere luekapakina aiiaanakin, aswam kotoma owema loka airiamunun,"
Numbers4:4 Na ŋes aswam naka odwe luka Kokat kotoma owema loka airiamunun, koboro lukalaunak eut;"
Numbers4:5 Naitobwosere idukurun, elomari Aaron ka odweke toma, elaeunete aigalisit naetiakit, erapakiniata ŋes asaduku naka aitejenunet."
Numbers4:6 Erapakinete da emukule loka etakas kujuke, ido eburiarete kere kegoe lobululu, irupakinete adaketake,"
Numbers4:7 Epesikinete egoe lobululu omesa loka imugatin luka aitodikin, idokokinete nen atuba ka akaalei ka atanya, ka aikopon nubukununet: ejaunete nen da imugatin ludue:"
Numbers4:8 Ido erapiarete kere kegoe lokarenan, eburiarete bobo kemukule loka etakas, irupakinete da adaketake."
Numbers4:9 Elemunete egoe lobululu, aimukoria epir loka atala naka aica, ka atalaike, ka aridetake, ka aitudeŋetake, ka itidoike luka akinyet luetwasamaete kesi aiiaanakinia:"
Numbers4:10 Eburiarete ŋes ka itidoike kere kemukule loka etakas, idokokinete adaketeke."
Numbers4:11 Epesikinete egoe lobululu otem loka esabu, iburiarete bobo kemukule loka etakas, irupakinete da adaketake:"
Numbers4:12 Ibwaikinete iboro kere luetwasamaete aiiaanakinia, luejaanakiniata kotoma aibois nakalaunan, toma ogoe lobululu, eburiarete da kere kemukule loka etakas, idokokinete da adaketeke,"
Numbers4:13 Emudarete ekurwon kotoma otem, epesikinete egoe lomuge:"
Numbers4:14 Idokokinete nen iboroke kere, lueiaanakiniata ŋes, ieuman luka akim, ka igoluna luka akiriŋ, ka amudeta, ka atanyia, iboro kere luka etem; epesikinete da eimukoret loka emukule loka etakas, irupakinete da adaketake."
Numbers4:15 Kedaut Aaron ka odweke arapakin aibois nakalauian ka iboro kere lukotoma aibois nakalaunan, naedolio aitobwot iidukurun; akaulo kanun, epote odwe luka Kokat aidak ŋes: konye mam kes etirorete iboro lukalaunak kinyeis atwakare. Iboro ŋul kes luedakete odwe luka Kokat luka ewema loka airiamunun."
Numbers4:16 Ido luidari Eleasar okoku loka Aaron esasedoti kes lu, akinyet naka atala, ka lukisupurununo, ka ainakinet nadue naka akiria, ka akinyet nakinyonyoanakina, idari da ewema lokalaunan ka lueja toma kere, aibois nakalaunan ka iboroke da.”"
Numbers4:17 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron atiar,"
Numbers4:18 “Sirikitiakasi ateker naka ikekia luka Ikokatin kotoma oLebin:
Numbers4:19 Konye kiswamak kes kwana, tetere eiarere kinyeis atwakare, kikunyakis neejaas iboro lukalaunak noi: elomari Aaron ka odweke toma, kosodete aitodianakin kes ninitunanan akeswam ka ibore yenedaki:"
Numbers4:20 Konye mam elomarete toma aanyun iboro lukalaunak, nepeeep da, kinyeis atwakare.”"
Numbers4:21 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers4:22 “Kimar odwe luka Gereson da, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, kwape ejaatar ikekiakee;"
Numbers4:23 Imari kes ageun kaluka ikar akaisauni ka luedeparito aitodol luka ikar akaisakany; kere luekapakina aijaanakin, aswam. Kotoma owema loka airiamunun,"
Numbers4:24 Na ŋes aswam naka ikekia luka Igeresonin, naiiaanakiniata naedakiata da iboro:"
Numbers4:25 Edakete kesi aigalisio nuka ewema lokalaunan, ka ewema loka airiamunun, eimukoreteke, ka eimukoret loka emukule loka etakas loejai kujuke, ka aigalisit naka ekek loka ewema loka airiamunun;"
Numbers4:26 Ka luikaiai alaro, ka aigalisit naka ekek loka erute loka alaro, naidunyas kewema lokalaunan, naidunyas da ketem kolukunite, ka aunoikee, ka iboro kere da lueupatar kaiiaanakinikec, kere nuibusakinit aiswamakin kes, nupenun ijaanakinete."
Numbers4:27 Kwape icorakinia Aaron ka odweke kwaŋin ijaanakiniata odwe luka Igeresonin, kotoma kaluedakete kere, kotoma kaluiiaanakinete da; itodikinete kes luedakete kere."
Numbers4:28 Ŋin ŋes aswam naka ikekia luka odwe luka Igeresonin kotoma owema loka airiamunun: idarete kesi koanyanari Itamar okoku loka Aaron esasedoti.
Numbers4:29 Ka odwe luka Merari da, imari ijo kes kwape ejaatar ikekiakee, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee;"
Numbers4:30 Imari kes ageun kaluka ikar akaisauni ka luedeparito aitodol luka ikar akaisakany, ninitunanan yenekapakina aijaanakin, aswam kotoma owema loka airiamunun,"
Numbers4:31 Lu kes iboro luidarete kesi, kwape eiaar aswamukee kotoma owema loka airiamunun; abaoi nuka ewema lokalaunan, ka akitoke nukirionokina, ka ipirinoke ka aigaŋetakec;"
Numbers4:32 Ka ipirino luka alaro naelukunit, ka aigaŋetakec, ka ikeceloin, ka aunoikee, ka iborokec kere lueupatar, ka luijaanakiniata; ibilete ikiroria luka iboro kere luidarete kesi ka luedakete,"
Numbers4:33 Ŋin ŋes aswam naka ikekia luka odwe luka Merari, kwape eiaar aijaanakinikec kere kotoma owema loka airiamunun, koanyanari Itamar okoku loka Aaron esasedoti.”"
Numbers4:34 Kimarata Musa ka Aaron ka ikapolok luka ekodet odwe luka Ikokatin kwape ajaatar ikekiakec, kwape ajaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakec,"
Numbers4:35 Ageun kaluka ikar akaisauni ka luedeparito aitodol luka ikar akaisakany, ninitunanan yenekapakina aijaanakin, aswam kotoma owema loka airiamunun."
Numbers4:36 Ŋul da luaponi kimarai kakesi kwape ajaatar ikekiakec emwaasi ilukumin iarei ka akwat akanykaarei ka akaisakany.
Numbers4:37 Ŋul kes luaponi kimarai luka ikekia luka Ikokatin, kere luapotu kiiaanakis kotoma owema loka airiamunun, luemarete Musa ka Aaron kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT kama ka Musa."
Numbers4:38 Ka nul da luaponi kimarai luka odwe luka Gereson, kwape ajaatar ikekiakee, kwape ajaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakec,"
Numbers4:39 Ageun kaluka ikar akaisauni ka luedeparito aitodol luka ikar akaisakany, ninitunanan yenekapakina aijaanakin, aswam kotoma owema loka airiamunun."
Numbers4:40 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, kwape ajaatar ikekiakec, kwape ajaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakec, emwaasi ilukumin iarei ka akwat akanykape ka akaisauni."
Numbers4:41 Ŋul kes luaponi kimarai luka ikekia luka odwe luka Gereson, kere luapotu kijaanakis kotoma owema loka airiamunun, luemarete Musa ka Aaron kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT."
Numbers4:42 Ka ŋul da luaponi kimarai luka ikekia luka odwe luka Merari, kwape ajaatar ikekiakee, kwape ajaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakec."
Numbers4:43 Ageun kaluka ikar akaisauni ka luedeparito aitodol luka ikar akaisakany, ninitunanan yenekapakina aijaanakin, aswam kotoma owema loka airiamunun."
Numbers4:44 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi kwape ajaatar ikekiakec, emwaasi ilukumin iuni ka akwat aarei."
Numbers4:45 Ŋul kes luaponi kimarai luka ikekia luka odwe luka Merari, luemarete Musa ka Aaron kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT, kama ka Musa."
Numbers4:46 Ŋul kere luaponi kimarai luka Ilebin, luemarete Musa ka Aaron ka ikapolok luka Isirael kwape ajaatar ikekiakec, kwape ajaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakec."
Numbers4:47 Ageun kaluka ikar akaisauni ka luedeparito aitodol luka ikar akaisakany, ŋinituŋanan yenekapakina aswam naka aijaanakin, ka aswam naka aidak iboro kotoma owema loka airiamunun,"
Numbers4:48 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, emwaasi ilukumin ikanykauni ka akwat akany ka akaisakanykauni."
Numbers4:49 Kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT aponi kimarai kes kama ka Musa, ŋinituŋanan kwape ajaar aijaanakinike, ido kwape ajaar aidakake: kwaŋin aponi kimarai, kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT Musa."
Numbers5:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers5:2 “Kicorak idwe luka Isirael, ebe Kireneasi kiŋa kiidukurun ŋin yenikatapon, ka ŋin yeneleleete abulon arai aokot, ka ŋin da yenimam elai kanuka aidunyakin kayenikatwan:"
Numbers5:3 Irenearete yenikiliokit ka yeniberu da kina kiidukurun; kinyeis amunaun iidukurunukec, lueboienenei eoŋ kotoma.”"
Numbers5:4 Kiswamata idwe luka Isirael kwaŋin, kireneasi kes kiŋa kiidukurun: kiswamata idwe luka Isirael kwaŋin kwape atemaria EJAKAIT Musa."
Numbers5:5 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers5:6 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, Naediakaria etuŋanan arai aberu adiakaret kere naediakarete ituŋa, aibucar kaneejai EJAKAIT, kitelekarite ituŋanan ŋin akirot;"
Numbers5:7 ŋes konyet elimoriata akecediakaret naadiakasi: ido egeli akediakaret kere, ka aiyatakin da ogelitike idiopet kokany, kosodi ainakin ŋol loediakarit ŋesi kamaken."
Numbers5:8 Konye arai emamei lokatekerike loegelio kanuka adiakaret, egelit loegelio kanuka adiakaret itebeo EJAKAIT, ido eraun loka esasedoti; dimarai emerekek loka alucio, loelueere aronisike."
Numbers5:9 Ido ŋiniinakinet naikeunitai naka iboro kere lukalaunak luka idwe luka Isirael; nueinanakinete esasedoti, eraunos nuken,"
Numbers5:10 Iboro lukalaunak luka ŋinituŋanan eraunos luken: ninibore yerieinakini ŋinituŋanan esasedoti, eraun yeniken.”"
Numbers5:11 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers5:12 “Kolimok idwe luke Isirael ebe, Arai kepaa aberu naka etuŋanan, kosodi adiakar kamaken,"
Numbers5:13 Apero kerunanan, komam okilenike ejeŋi, komam ŋes da enicunitai, komunaun ŋesi, komam yeneanyunit ŋes adiakari, karaida aikamakin adiakareteke;"
Numbers5:14 Kosodi emoyo loka ekokote abunokin okilenike, aitokokol ŋes, komunaun aberu: arai diat kobunok ŋes emoyo loka ekokote, aitokokol ŋes, komam aberu emunauna:"
Numbers5:15 Ŋes konyet eyanaaria etuŋanan akeberu neejai esasedoti, eyanaaria da ainakinet kanuka aberuke, idiopet kotomon yenika epa loka akiria nuka esairi; mam ebukokini akinyet, karaida ainyalakin lukesai toma; naarai erai ainakinet naka akiria naka ekokote, ainakinet naka akiria naka aisiitunet, aisiitunio numam adolit."
Numbers5:16 Isukunyuni esasedoti aberu, ido itobwoi kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Numbers5:17 Kosodi esasedoti aitin akipi nukalaunak kotoma atany; ibwaikini da toma akipi nun apua adis nuelemuni esasedoti kokwap kewema lokalaunan:
Numbers5:18 Itobwoi da esasedoti aberu kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, elacari da itim luka akou naka aberu, ido ibwaikini ainakinet naka akiria naka aisiitunet toma akanin nuka aberu, naerai ainakinet naka akiria naka ekokote: ejaunos toma akanin nuka esasedoti akipi nuka adwaris nueyaunete ekenit,"
Numbers5:19 Isiyapoi esasedoti ŋes, etemari da aberu atiar, ‘Arai mam ediotuŋanan kiteperit jo, ido arai mam jo ipaarit toma amamus aila, korai aberu naka ekiliokit, mam nukibeikinete jo kanuka akipi nu nuka adwaris nueyaunete ekenit,"
Numbers5:20 Konye arai ipaarit, korai aberu naka ekiliokit, arai imunauna da, apero kecetunanan lomam erai okilenikon’:"
Numbers5:21 Ŋes konyet isiyapoo esasedoti aberu aiyaposit naka ekenit, etemari esasedoti aberu atiar, ‘Kitarau jo EJAKAIT ekenit ka aiyapoet kotuijakon, naitoonio EJAKAIT akonimurwo ka aitubuun akonikoik;"
Numbers5:22 Ido akipi nu nueyaunete ekenit elomarete toma akoikikon itubuunete, iroonete da akonimurwo’: eboŋokini aberu da ebe, ‘Kikote nepenen, kikote nepenen.’"
Numbers5:23 Iwadikai esasedoti ikenito lu oitabo, ido emwatakini kes toma akipi nuka adwaris:"
Numbers5:24 Itamasi aberu akipi nuka adwaris nueyaunete ekenit: ido elomarete akip nueyaunete ekenit tomake kosodete adwaruun,"
Numbers5:25 Ŋauni esasedoti ainakinet naka akiria naka ekokote kakan naka aberu, iianari ainakinet naka akiria akonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kosodi ayaun otem:"
Numbers5:26 Emukuni esasedoti akan ileleba naka ainakinet naka akiria, araun aiituneteke, icweikini da kotem; ido akauloke itamasi aberu akipi."
Numbers5:27 Kedau aitamat ŋes akipi, kosodi ejaun kwana, arai emunauna, kodiakarite kama kokilenike, elomarete akip nueyaunete ekenit tomake kosodete adwaruun, ebuuni akoikike, eoni da akemurwo: ido eraun aberu ekenit kotuŋ ake."
Numbers5:28 Konye arai esegara aberu, komam emunauna; ŋes kito emameunotor nuebeikinete, ido epedori apotuun."
Numbers5:29 Ŋol ŋes ekisil loka ekokote, arai kepaa aberu, kosodi amunaun, korai aberu naka ekiliokit;"
Numbers5:30 Arai da kebunoki etuŋanan emoyo loka ekokote, aitokokol akeberu; ŋes konyet itobwoia aberu kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, ido iswamakini esasedoti aberu kwape ejaar ekisil ŋol kere,"
Numbers5:31 Mam etuŋanan itebeikino numam adolit, ibwoki aberu ŋin numam adoliteke.”"
Numbers6:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers6:2 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, Arai kiyapo ekiliokit arai aberu aiyaposit naitegelikina, aiyaposit naka Enasirit, eipolia mama ejai EJAKAIT:"
Numbers6:3 Ipoliauni da kotoma ebino ka nuitemerete; sirikemat ebino loedwar, karaida nuitemerete nueta ria, ido sirikemat akipi kere nuka emusabibu, karaida ainyam araito nuka emusabibu nuekokito arai nuitoonitai."
Numbers6:4 Apaarasia kere nuka eipoliake sirikenyam ibore kere yenelomuni kotoma omusabibu, anyoun koeokat aitodol akabubuk."
Numbers6:5 Apaarasia kere nuka aiyapositike naka eipolia, mam ebarenit ieaki akouke: kiton naitodolio apaarasia nuka eipoliake mama ejai EJAKAIT, eraun lokalaunan, ipisi ŋesi itim luka akouke."
Numbers6:6 Apaarasia kere nuipoliaunor mama ejai EJAKAIT mam ikunyakini neejai yenikatwan.
Numbers6:7 Sirikeraun lomam elai kanuka papake, karaida kanuka totoke, arai kanuka onaeeke, arai kanuka inaeike, naetwakiata: naarai eipoliake mama ejai Edeke ejai akouke."
Numbers6:8 Apaarasia kere nuka eipoliake erai lokalaunan mama ejai EJAKAIT.
Numbers6:9 Ido arai ketular innjanan kodieke, kosodi amunaun akou naka eipoliake; ŋes do ebarenoria akekou kapaaran naka aitalaunike, ebarenori kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei."
Numbers6:10 Ido kapaaran nakikanyetekauni eyauni ajeleik aarei, arai ilukei iarei ludidik, neejai esasedoti, okek loka ewema loka airiamunun:"
Numbers6:11 Einakini esasedoti adiopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret, ka naee da kanuka ainakinet naicweio, alucio ŋes, naarai adiaka kanuka yenikatwan, ido italauni akekou kapaaran kaŋin,"
Numbers6:12 Ipolia mama ejai EJAKAIT apaarasia nuka eipoliake, ido eyauni imerekek yenikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret; konye epalunio apaarasiake nuageit, naarai abu eipoliake komunaun."
Numbers6:13 Lo ŋes ekisil loka Enasirit, kedaunos apaarasia nuka eipoliake: eyaunio ŋes okek loka ewema loka airiamunun:"
Numbers6:14 Ido einakini EJAKAIT ainakinet imerekek yenikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet yenimam eŋwalit kanuka ainakinet naicweio, ka imerekek yeniberu yenika ekaru ediopet yenimam eŋwalit kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret, ka emerekek lomam eŋwalit kanuka ainakineta nuka ainapakin,"
Numbers6:15 Ka edita loka emugati lomam etubuunitoi, ka aluŋuren nuka akiria nuidicic nuinyalakinitai akinyet, ka imugatin luibenibena lumam itubuunitoi luinyonyoikinitai akinyet, ka ainakinetekec naka akiria, ka ainakinetakec numatan."
Numbers6:16 Kosodi esasedoti aijaikin kes kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, ido einakini ainakineteke naka adiakaret ka ainakineteke naicweio:"
Numbers6:17 Einakini da emerekek kanuka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin mama ejai EJAKAIT, nepepe kedita loka emugati lomam etubuunitoi: einakini esasedoti ainakinet naka ituŋanan kaŋin naka akiria, ka ainakineteke namatat."
Numbers6:18 Ebarenori Enasirit akou naka eipoliake kokek loka ewema loka airiamunun, eyaŋaari da itim luka akou naka eipoliake, kosodi aibwaikin akim naka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin."
Numbers6:19 Elemuni esasedoti akuat naka emerekek naipoo, ka aluŋuret namam etubuunitoi kotoma odita, ka emugati ediopet loibenibena, ijaikini akanin nuka Enasirit, kedau abaren akou naka eipoliake:"
Numbers6:20 Iianari esasedoti kes araun ainakinet naiianio kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: eraas lu lukalaunak kama ejai esasedoti, nepepe katorob naijanio ka amurwo naedakakinitai: akaulo kanun epedori Enasirit aimat ebino."
Numbers6:21 Ŋol ŋes ekisil loka Enasirit loiyapoi, ka ainakineteke neejai EJAKAIT kanuka eipoliake, ka ice da luepedori ŋesi ainakin: kwape ejaar aiyapositike naiyapoi, kwape kwaŋin ibusakinitor ŋes aswam kwape ajaar ekisil loka eipoliake.”"
Numbers6:22 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers6:23 “Kolimok Aaron ka odweke ebe, Ilipakinete idwe luka Isirael arereŋ kwanata; ilimokinete kes ebe,"
Numbers6:24 Kisireren jo EJAKAIT, kidar jo:"
Numbers6:25 Kitacaik jo EJ AKAIT akekonyen, kiswamak asianut:"
Numbers6:26 Kitonyoik jo EJAKAIT aica naka akonyeneke, kisinapik."
Numbers6:27 Ibwaikinete kwaŋin ekakiror odwe luka Isirael; EOŊ da esirereni kes.”
Numbers7:1 Kosodi kapaaran naenetakinia Musa aibub ewema lokalaunan, ka ainyonyoanakin ŋes, ka aitalaun ŋes, ka ikeboro kere, ka etem ka ikeboro kere, ka ainyonyoanakin kes akinyet ka aitalaun kes da;"
Numbers7:2 Koinakis ikapolok luka Isirael, luapolokinito ikalia luka lukapapaakec; nul kes ikapolok luka atekerin, nul kes luayaito nul Iuaponi kimarai:"
Numbers7:3 Koyaut ainakinetakec mama ejai EJAKAIT, agalin akanykape nuemukoritai, ka imoŋin itomon ka luarei; nulukapolok iarei adiopegali, nolidiopet emoŋ: kijaikis kes koiŋaren kewema lokalaunan."
Numbers7:4 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers7:5 “Kijau kes, tetere itwasamao kes aijaanakinia ewema loka airiamunun; iinakini kes Ilebin, ŋinitunanan kwape ejaar aijaanakinike.”"
Numbers7:6 Koyana Musa agalin ka imoŋin, koinak kes Ilebin."
Numbers7:7 Koinak odwe luka Gereson agalin aarei ka imoŋin iwonon, kwape ajaar aijaanakinikec."
Numbers7:8 Koinak odwe luka Merari agalin aoŋon ka imoŋin ikanykauni, kwape ajaar aijaanakinikee, kakan naka Itamar okoku loka Aaron esasedoti."
Numbers7:9 Konye mam abu koinak odwe luka Kokat idiobore: naarai aiiaanakin naka aibois nakalaunan nakee; adakenenete kokeperinikec.
Numbers7:10 Koinakis ikapolok kanuka atiakunio naka etem kapaaran naenyonyoanakinere akinyet, ikapolok kes apotu koinakis ainakinetekec kakonyen nuka etem."
Numbers7:11 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Einanakinete ainakinetakec, nolikapolon kapaaranike, kanuka atiakunio naka etem.”"
Numbers7:12 Ŋol loabu koinak ainakinet kapaaran nasodit ŋes Nason okoku loka Aminadab, loka ateker naka Yuda:"
Numbers7:13 Ainakineteke ŋes atuba naka epuesa, alaŋiruke isekelin akwatat ka akaisauni, ka atany naka epuesa naka isekelin akaisakanykaarei, kwape ajaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan: kes aarei kere kileleba akiria nuidieie nuinyalakinitai akinyet kanuka ainakinet naka akiria;"
Numbers7:14 Akaale da naka esabu naka isekelin itomon, ileleba lukisupurununo:"
Numbers7:15 Ka emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet, ka imerekek yenikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet, kanuka ainakinet naicweio;"
Numbers7:16 Ekoroi da ediopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret;
Numbers7:17 Ido kanuka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, imoŋin iarei, ka imerekekin ikany, ka ikorwa ikany, ka imerekekin ikany lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet: nin ŋes ainakinet naka Nason okoku loka Aminadab."
Numbers7:18 Kapaaran nakiareit abu Netanel okoku loka Suar, ekapolon loka Isakar koinak:"
Numbers7:19 Abu koinak kanuka ainakineteke atuba naka epuesa, alaŋiruke isekelin akwatat ka akaisauni, ka atany naka epuesa naka isekelin akaisakanykaarei, kwape ajaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan; kes aarei kere kileleba akiria nuidieie nuinyalakinitai akinyet, kanuka ainakinet naka akiria;"
Numbers7:20 Akaale da naka esabu naka isekelin itomon, ileleba lukisupurununo;"
Numbers7:21 Ka emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet, ka imerekek yenikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet, kanuka ainakinet naicweio;"
Numbers7:22 Ekoroi da ediopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret;
Numbers7:23 Ido kanuka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, imoŋin iarei, ka imerekekin ikany, ka ikorwa ikany, ka imerekekin ikany lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet: nin ŋes ainakinet naka Netanel okoku loka Suar."
Numbers7:24 Kapaaran nakiwuniet Eliab okoku Ioka Kelon, ekapolon loka idwe luka Sebulun:"
Numbers7:25 Ainakineteke ŋes atuba naka epuesa, alaŋiruke isekelin akwatat ka akaisauni, ka atany naka epuesa naka isekelin akaisakanykaarei, kwape ajaar esekel Ioka aibois nakalaunan; kes aarei kere kileleba akiria nuidieie nuinyalakinitai akinyet, kanuka ainakinet naka akiria;"
Numbers7:26 Akaale da naka esabu naka isekelin itomon, ileleba lukisupurununo;"
Numbers7:27 Ka emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet, ka imerekek yenikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet, kanuka ainakinet naicweio;"
Numbers7:28 Ekoroi da ediopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret;
Numbers7:29 Ido kanuka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, imoŋin iarei, ka imerekekin ikany, ka ikorwa ikany, ka imerekekin ikany lukiliok luka ekaru cdiopet: nin ŋes ainakinet naka Eliab okoku loka Kelon,"
Numbers7:30 Kapaaran nakiwononet Elisur okoku loka Sedeur, ekapolon loka idwe luka Reuben:"
Numbers7:31 Ainakineteke ŋes atuba naka epuesa, alaŋiruke isekelin akwatat ka akaisauni, ka atany naka epuesa naka isekelin akaisakanykaarei, kwape ajaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan; kes aarei kere kileleba akiria nuidicie nuinyalakinitai akinyet, kanuka ainakinet naka akiria;"
Numbers7:32 Akaale da naka esabu naka isekelin itomon, ileleba lukisupurununo;"
Numbers7:33 Ka emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet, ka imerekek yenikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet, kanuka ainakinet naicweio;"
Numbers7:34 Ekoroi da ediopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret;
Numbers7:35 Ido kanuka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, imoŋin iarei, ka imerekekin ikany, ka ikorwa ikany, ka imerekekin ikany lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet: nin ŋes ainakinet naka Elisur okoku loka Sedeur."
Numbers7:36 Kapaaran nakikanyet Selumiel okoku loka Surisadai, ekapolon loka idwe luka Simeon:"
Numbers7:37 Ainakineteke ŋes atuba naka epuesa, alaŋiruke isekelin akwatat ka akaisauni, ka atany naka epuesa naka isekelin akaisakanykaarei, kwape ajaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan; kes aarei kere kileleba akiria nuidieie nuinyalakinitai akinyet, kanuka ainakinet naka akiria:"
Numbers7:38 Akaale da naka esabu naka isekelin itomon, ileleba lukisupurununo;"
Numbers7:39 Ka emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet, ka imerekek yenikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet, kanuka ainakinet naicweio;"
Numbers7:40 Ekoroi da ediopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret;
Numbers7:41 Ido kanuka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, imoŋin iarei, ka imerekekin ikany, ka ikorwa ikany, ka imerekekin ikany lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet: nin ŋes ainakinet naka Selumiel okoku loka Surisadai,"
Numbers7:42 Kapaaran nakikanyetekape Eliasap okoku loka Deuel, ekapolon loka idwe luka Gad;"
Numbers7:43 Ainakineteke ŋes atuba naka epuesa, alaŋiruke isekelin akwatat ka akaisauni, ka atany naka epuesa naka isekelin akaisakanykaarei, kwape ajaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan; kes aarei kere kileleba akiria nuidicie nuinyalakinitai akinyet, kanuka ainakinet naka akiria;"
Numbers7:44 Akaale da naka esabu naka isekelin itomon, ileleba lukisupurununo;"
Numbers7:45 Ka emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet, ka imerekek yenikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet, kanuka ainakinet naicweio;"
Numbers7:46 Ekoroi da ediopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret;
Numbers7:47 Ido kanuka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, imoŋin iarei, ka imerekekin ikany, ka ikorwa ikany, ka imerekekin ikany lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet: ŋin ŋes ainakinet naka Eliasap okoku loka Deuel."
Numbers7:48 Kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei Elisama okoku loka Amikud, ekapolon loka idwe luka Epuraim."
Numbers7:49 Ainakineteke ŋes atuba naka epuesa, alaŋiruke isekelin akwatat ka akaisauni, ka atany naka epuesa naka isekelin akaisakanykaarei, kwape ajaar esekelloka aibois nakalaunan; kes aarei kere kileleba akiria nuidicic nuinyalakinitai akinyet, kanuka ainakinet naka akiria;"
Numbers7:50 Akaale da naka esabu naka isekelin itomon, ileleba lukisupurununo:"
Numbers7:51 Ka emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet, ka imerekek yenikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet, kanuka ainakinet naicweio;"
Numbers7:52 Ekoroi da ediopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret;
Numbers7:53 Ido kanuka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, imoŋin iarei, ka imerekekin ikany, ka ikorwa ikany, ka imerekekin ikany lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet: ŋin ŋes ainakinet naka Elisama okoku loka Amikud."
Numbers7:54 Kapaaran nakikanyetekauni Gamaliel okoku loka Pedasur, ekapolon loka idwe luka Manase:"
Numbers7:55 Ainakineteke ŋes atuba naka epuesa, alaŋiruke isekelin akwatat ka akaisauni, ka atany naka epuesa naka isekelin akaisakanykaarei, kwape ajaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan; kes aarei kere kileleba akiria nuidicic nuinyalakinitai akinyet, kanuka ainakinet naka akiria;"
Numbers7:56 Akaale da naka esabu naka isekelin itomon, ileleba lukisupurununo:"
Numbers7:57 Ka emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet, ka imerekek yenikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet, kanuka ainakinet naicweio;"
Numbers7:58 Ekoroi da ediopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret;
Numbers7:59 Ido kanuka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, imoŋin iarei, ka imerekekin ikany, ka ikorwa ikany, ka imerekekin ikany lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet: ŋin ŋes ainakinet naka Gamaliel okoku loka Pedasur."
Numbers7:60 Kapaaran nakikanyetekaonon Abidan okoku loka Gideoni, ekapolon loka idwe luka Benyamin:"
Numbers7:61 Ainakineteke ŋes atuba naka epuesa, alaŋiruke isekelin akwatat ka akaisauni, ka atany naka epuesa naka isekelin akaisakanykaarei, kwape ajaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan; kes aarei kere kileleba akiria nuidicie nuinyalakinitai akinyet kanuka ainakinet naka akiria;"
Numbers7:62 Akaale da naka esabu naka isekelin itomon, ileleba lukisupurununo;"
Numbers7:63 Ka emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet, ka imerekek yenikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet, kanuka ainakinet naicweio;"
Numbers7:64 Ekoroi da ediopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret;
Numbers7:65 Ido kanuka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, imoŋin iarei, ka imerekekin ikany, ka ikorwa ikany, ka imerekekin ikany lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet: Ŋin ŋes ainakinet naka Abidan okoku loka Gideoni."
Numbers7:66 Kapaaran nakitomonet Akiesar okoku loka Amisadai, ekapolon loka idwe luka Dan:"
Numbers7:67 Ainakineteke ŋes atuba naka epuesa, alaŋiruke isekelin akwatat ka akaisauni, ka atany naka epuesa naka isekelin akaisakanykaarei, kwape ajaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan; kes aarei kere kileleba akiria nuidicic nuinyalakinitai akinyet, kanuka ainakinet naka akiria;"
Numbers7:68 Akaale da naka esabu naka isekelin itomon, ileleba lukisupurununo;"
Numbers7:69 Ka emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet, ka imerekek yenikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet, kanuka ainakinet naicweio;"
Numbers7:70 Ekoroi da ediopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret:
Numbers7:71 Ido kanuka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, imoŋin iarei, ka imerekekin ikany, ka ikorwa ikany, ka imerekekin ikany lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet: ŋin ŋes ainakinet naka Akiesar okoku loka Amisadai."
Numbers7:72 Kapaaran nakitomonet kanadiopet Pagiel okoku loka Ocuran, ekapolon loka idwe luka Aser:"
Numbers7:73 Ainakineteke ŋes atuba naka epuesa, alaŋiruke isekelin akwatat ka akaisauni, ka atany naka epuesa naka isekelin akaisakanykaarei, kwape ajaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan; kes aarei kere kileleba akiria nuidicic nuinyalakinitai akinyet, kanuka ainakinet naka akiria:"
Numbers7:74 Akaale da naka esabu naka isekelin itomon, ileleba lukisupurununo;"
Numbers7:75 Ka emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet, ka imerekek yenikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet, kanuka ainakinet naicweio;"
Numbers7:76 Ekoroi da ediopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret;
Numbers7:77 Ido kanuka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, imoŋin iarei, ka imerekekin ikany, ka ikorwa ikany, ka imerekekin ikany lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet: ŋin ŋes ainakinet naka Pagiel okoku loka Ocuran,"
Numbers7:78 Kapaaran nakitomonet kaarei Akira okoku loka Enan, ekapolon loka idwe luka Naputali:"
Numbers7:79 Ainakineteke ŋes atuba naka epuesa, alaŋiruke isekelin akwatat ka akaisauni, ka atany naka epuesa naka isekelin akaisakanykaarei, kwape ajaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan; kes aarei kere kileleba akiria nuidicic nuinyalakinitai akinyet, kanuka ainakinet naka akiria;"
Numbers7:80 Akaale da naka esa bu naka isekelin itomon, ileleba lukisupurununo;"
Numbers7:81 Ka emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet, ka imerekek yenikiliokit yenika ekaru ediopet, kanuka ainakinet naicweio;"
Numbers7:82 Ekoroi da ediopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret;
Numbers7:83 Ido kanuka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, imoŋin iarei, ka imerekekin ikany, ka ikorwa ikany, ka imerekekin ikany lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet: ŋin ŋes ainakinet naka Akira okoku loka Enan."
Numbers7:84 Ŋin ŋes atiakunio naka etem, kapaaran naenyonyoanakinere akinyet, kakanin nuka ikapolok luka Isirael: atubai atomon ka nuarei nuka epuesa, ka atanya atomon ka nuarei nuka epuesa, ka akaalei atomon ka nuarei nuka esabu:"
Numbers7:85 Alaniru naka ŋinituba naka epuesa isekelin akwatat ka akaisauni, ka ninitany naka epuesa isekelin akaisakanykaarei: epuesa kere loka iboro Ŋul isekelin ilukumin iarei ka akwat aoŋon, kwape ajaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan;"
Numbers7:86 Akaalei atomon ka nuarei nuka esabu nuileleba lukisupurununo, ninidiopet alaŋiruke isekelin itomon, kwape ajaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan: esabu kere loka akaalei isekelin akwatat ka akaisaarei:"
Numbers7:87 Imoŋin kere luka ainakinet naicweio itoba itomon ka luarei, ka imerekekin itomon ka luarei, ka imcrekekin lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet itomon ka luarei, ka ainakinetekec naka akiria: ka ikorwa araun ainakinet naka adiakaret itomon ka luarei:"
Numbers7:88 Ka imoŋin kere luka asubanit naka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, itoba akaisaarei ka luonon, ka imerekekin akaisakanykape, ka ikorwa akaisakanykape, ka imerekekin lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet akaisakanykape. Ŋin ŋes atiakunio naka etem, kedau ainyonyoanakinio,"
Numbers7:89 Ido nakelomanaria Musa owema loka airiamunun einer kaŋes, ŋes apupununio Eporoto ineras kaŋes kokuju keicolon-lokaitim loajai kuju asaduku naka aitejenuner, kokidin kikerubin iarei: kiner kaŋes."
Numbers8:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers8:2 “Kolimok Aaron ebe, Naisipokinia ijo atalai, atalai akanykaarei kes ecaete koinaren kepir loka atala.”"
Numbers8:3 Kiswama Aaron kwaŋin; kosipok atalai nen tetere ecaete koinaren kepir loka atala, kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT Musa,"
Numbers8:4 Eswamatai epir loka atala kwanata, esabu loerukuk; kwapuke kiton aturoke da korau aswam naerukuk: kwape ajaar aput naabu EJAKAIT kitodikinite Musa, kwaŋin kiswamau ŋesi epir loka atala."
Numbers8:5 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers8:6 “Kolem Ilebin kodwe luka Isirael, kitalau kes,"
Numbers8:7 Ikonakini ijo neta aitalaun kes: ibwatakini kes akipi nuitesegaarete, kobarenoto da kes akuan kere, ido kilotata ikeeenapen, kitalaunos bonik."
Numbers8:8 Kosodete ayaŋaar emoŋ lotobait, ka ainakineteke naka akiria, akiria nuidieie nuinyalakinitai akinyet, iyanaari ijo emoŋ lotobait ece araun ainakinet naka adiakaret."
Numbers8:9 Isukunyikini ijo Ilebin kinaren kewema loka airiamunun: itukonokini da ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael.
Numbers8:10 Isukunyikini Ilebin akonyen nuka EJAKAIT: idokonokinete idwe luka Isirael akecekanin oLebin:
Numbers8:11 Ŋanari Aaron Ilebin kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT araut ainakinet naiianio, kanuka idwe luka Isirael, tetere eraunete luiswamaete aiiaanakin EJAKAIT."
Numbers8:12 Idokonokinete Ilebin akecekanin akwes nuka imoŋin lutoba: iinakini ijo ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret, ediopet da araun ainakinet naicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT, alucio Ilebin."
Numbers8:13 Itobwoi Ilebin kakonyen nuka Aaron, kakonyen da nuka odweke, iinakini kes araut ainakinet naiianio mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Numbers8:14 Igituni kwaŋin Ilebin kodwe luka Isirael: eraunos do Ilebin lukan
Numbers8:15 Ido akaulo kanun elomarete Ilebin toma aswam naka aijaanakin naka ewema loka airiamunun: italauni ijo kes, iinakini kes araut ainakinet naiianio."
Numbers8:16 Naarai einakina ke si cut mamakaij kodwe luka Isirael; ayanau kes mamakan aibois naka nul kere luepukorete aliligeta, kes ikiyaik kere luka idwe luka Isirael."
Numbers8:17 Naarai ikiyaik kere luka idwe luka Isirael eraas lukan, etuŋanan ka etiaŋ da: kapaaran naadanyia ikiyaik kere luka akwap nako Misiri abu ketalau kes kanukan,"
Numbers8:18 Ayaŋa Ilebin aibois naka ikiyaik kere kotoma odwe luka Isirael.
Numbers8:19 Ido ainak Ilebin araut ainakinet mama ejai Aaron ka odweke kodwe luka Isirael, aiiaanakin owema loka airiamunun kanuka idwe luka Isirael, alucio idwe luka Isirael: tetere mam atular ebunokini idwe luka Isirael, arai kikunyakis idwe luka Isirael die kaibois nakalaunan.”"
Numbers8:20 Apotu Musa ka Aaron ka ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael kiswamakis Ilebin kwaŋin: kwape ajaatar kere nueeorakinit EJAKAIT Musa kanuka Ilebin, apotu idwe luka Isirael kiswamakis kes kwaŋin,"
Numbers8:21 Kitesegaros Ilebin karonisikee, kilota da ikeeenapen; koinak Aaron kes araut ainakinet naijaŋio kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: ido kolue Aaron kes aitalaun kes."
Numbers8:22 Akaulo kanun kolomasi Ilebin toma aswam naka aiiaanakin naka ewema loka airiamunun kakonyen nuka Aaron, kakonyen da nuka odweke: kwape ecorakinitor EJAKAIT Musa nuka Ilebin, kiswamakis kes kwaŋin."
Numbers8:23 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers8:24 “Nu kes akiro nuka Ilebin: ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka lukany ka luedeparito, kes elomarete akapakin aijaanakin kaswam naka ewema loka airiamunun:"
Numbers8:25 Ido kedolo ikar lukapoloukee akaisakany itasaŋete akapakina aswam, mam bobo ijaanakinete:"
Numbers8:26 Konye inarakinetc iinaeanakee kotoma owema loka airiamunun, aidar nuititinitai, konye mam ijaanakinete. Iswamakini ijo Ilebin kwaŋin kanuka nuititinitai.”"
Numbers9:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa kamodiŋ naka Sinai, kolap losodit kokaru lokiareit akaulo kanyounikec kakwap nako Misiri atiar,"
Numbers9:2 “Bobo da ibus idwe luka Isirael aidar aleleŋio kapakike naeseunitai.
Numbers9:3 Kapaaran nakitomonet kaonon naka elap kalo, idarete ŋes atiboŋ naka apakike naeseunitai: kwape ejaatar ikekisila kere, ido kwape ejaatar aicorakinetake kere, idarete ŋes.”"
Numbers9:4 Kolimok Musa idwe luka Isirael aidar alclenio.
Numbers9:5 Kidarete aleleŋio kotoma olap losodit, kapaaran nakitomonet kaonon naka elap, eboŋ, kamodiŋ naka Sinai: kwape ajaatar kere nueeorakinit EJAKAIT Musa, kiswamata idwe luka Isirael kwaŋin."
Numbers9:6 Ajaas ituŋa ice lumam alaete kanuka akuan naka etuŋanan lokatwan, kanuka nun mam apedorito aidar aleleŋio kapaaran kaŋin: kopotu mama ejai Musa ka Aaron kapaaran kaŋin,"
Numbers9:7 Kotemasi iruŋa ŋul ŋes atiar, “Mam sic kilai kanuka akuan naka erunanan lokatwan: kanukinyo kirebokinitere sio, komam kicamakinitai ainakin ainakinet naka EJAKAIT kotoma apakike naeseunitai nepepe kidwe luka Isirael?”"
Numbers9:8 Kotema kes Musa atiar, “Kidareutu; kapup ber nukeeorakini EJAKAIT kanukus.”"
Numbers9:9 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers9:10 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, Arai mam ituŋanan kayesi arai yenika aturiokus elai kanuka akuan nakatwan, ido arai ejai irunanan toma alosit naelwana, ibus ŋes aidar aleleŋio kama ka EJAKAIT;"
Numbers9:11 Idarete ŋes eboŋ kapaaran nakitomonet kaonon kotoma olap lokiareit; enyamete kimugatin lumam itubuunitoi ka edia loedwar.
Numbers9:12 Sirikideut idiobore aitodol tupuruc, karaida aibil adiokoit: idarete kesi aleleŋio kwape eiaar ekisil kere."
Numbers9:13 Konye ituŋanan yenelai, komam ejai toma alosit, kosodi aiŋer aidar aleleŋio, egelario ituŋanan ŋin kotuŋake; naarai mam abu koinak ainakinet naka EJAKAIT kotoma apakike naeseunitai, ibwoki ituŋanan ŋin adiakareteke."
Numbers9:14 Ido arai kebu emoit aiboienen nepepe kayes, kosodi aidar aleleŋio kama ka EJAKAIT; kwape eiaar ekisil loka aleleŋio, ido kwape ejaar aicorakineteke, iswamai kwaŋin: iiaunos kekisil ediopet, yes kere, imoit ka iuriat.”"
Numbers9:15 Kapaaran naebubukinere ewema lokalaunan korapia edou ewema lokalaunan, ŋes ewema loka aiteienunet: ido eboŋ kotakan kokuju kewema bala akim, aitodol tupuruc."
Numbers9:16 Kojaenena kwaŋin due: korapianari ŋes edou paaran, kotakanunenei akim kuare."
Numbers9:17 Naelemanarere edou kokuju owema, akauloke konyounete idwe luka Isirael alosit: ido toma aibois naasiponokin edou, ŋina ŋes edukurenenete idwe luka Isirael."
Numbers9:18 Alosenenete idwe luka Isirael kaieorakinet naka EJAKAIT, ido edukurenenete da kaieorakinet naka EJAKAIT: eboienenete koidukurunukee adaun apak kere naaiaar edou kuju owema lokalaunan."
Numbers9:19 Ido naasalanakinia edou kuju owema lokalaunan apaarasia nuipu, edarenenete idwe luka Isirael akirot naka EJAKAIT, komam elosete."
Numbers9:20 Acepakio ajaenena edou kuju owema lokalaunan apaarasia adis; kosodi kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT eboienenete koidukurunukee, ido alosenenete kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT,"
Numbers9:21 Acepakio ajaenena edou kuju owema eboŋ aitodol tupuruc; naalemanarere edou tupuruc, alosenenete kesi: arai kerai paaran arai kuare, naalemanarere edou, alosenenete kesi,"
Numbers9:22 Arai apaarasia aarei arai elap, arai ekaru, esalakinia edou kuiu owema, iboie kanen, eboienenete idwe luka Isirael koidukurunukee komam elosete: konye naalemarere kolosete,"
Numbers9:23 Edukurenenete kaicorakinet naka EJAKAIT, ido alosenenete da kaieorakinet naka EJAKAIT: edarenenete akirot naka EJAKAIT, kaicorakinet naka EJAKAIT kama ka Musa."
Numbers10:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers10:2 “Kiswamau arupepen aarei nuka epuesa; kiswamau ka loerukuk: itwasamai kes kanuka anyaraununena ekodet, ido kanuka alosit anyoun kaneidukurete."
Numbers10:3 Ido naekutanakinere kes, etukokin ekodet kere mama ijai kokek loka ewema loka airiamunun."
Numbers10:4 Konye arai kekutakin adiopet, etukokinos ikapolok luepolokinito ilukumin luka Isirael mama ijai."
Numbers10:5 Ido naikutakiniata naka elulu, enyounete iruna lukoidukurun luka ari nakokide alosit."
Numbers10:6 Naikutakiniata da naka elulu nakiareit, enyounete iruna lukoidukurun luka ari naka eŋalakimak alosit: ekutanakinete aikwenyar kanuka alositokee."
Numbers10:7 Konye naekotokinere arukokin ekodet nepepe, ikutanakinete, konye mam ikutakinete naka elulu."
Numbers10:8 Odwe luka Aaron, isasedotin, kes ekutanakinete arupepen; ido eraunos ŋun ekisil kamakus ikar kere anatar aturiokus kere."
Numbers10:9 Ido nailosioto aitiji lokasurup lokimwanit yes kakwapukus, ŋes ikutakiniata naka elulu karupepen; kiitunio yes kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, kitaiario da yes kakonyen nuka lukasurupokus."
Numbers10:10 Kapaaran da naka aiyalamakus, kopucinokus lueseunitai, kotoma ailamunun da naka ilapiokus, ikutaaakinete arupepen kainakinetakus nuieweio, kasuban da nuka ainakineta nuka ainapakin; eraunos da kamakus aisiitunet kakonyen nuka Edekekus: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke.”"
Numbers10:11 Kosodi kokaru lokiareit, kolap lokiareit, kapaaran naka akaisaarei, aponi kolemarai edou kokuiu owema lokalaunan laka aiteienunet."
Numbers10:12 Kobwota idwe luka Isirael kwape ajaatar alositokec anyoun kamodiŋ naka Sinai; kosipokin edou amodiŋ naka Paran,"
Numbers10:13 Kogeut alositekee kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT kama ka Musa.
Numbers10:14 Kisiaununei emedera loka iidukurun luka idwe luka Yuda aitobwosio kwape ajaatar irionetakec: ido loapolokinit erioneteke ŋes Nason okoku loka Aminadab.
Numbers10:15 Ido loapolokinit erioŋet laka ateker naka idwe luka Isakar ŋes Netanel okoku loka Suar.
Numbers10:16 Loapolokinit erioŋet loka ateker naka idwe luka Sebulun ŋes Eliab okoku loka Kelon.
Numbers10:17 Koutoi iloin konunukai da ewema lokalaunan; kobwota odwe luka Gereson ka odwe luka Merari luadakenenete ewema lokalaunan.
Numbers10:18 Kitobwotai emedera loka iidukurun luka Reuben kwape ajaatar irionetakec: loapolokinit da erioneteke ŋes Elisur okoku loka Sedeur.
Numbers10:19 Loapolokinit erioŋet loka ateker naka idwe luka Simeon ŋes Selumiel okoku laka Surisadai.
Numbers10:20 Loapolokinit erioŋet loka ateker naka idwe luka Gad ŋes. Eliasap okoku loka Deuel.
Numbers10:21 Kobwota Ikokatin, kibwokito da iboro luka aibois nakalaunan: ebubuonokinete kwi ewema lokalaunan eriŋa kes kedolo,"
Numbers10:22 Kitobwotai emedera loka iidukurun luka idwe luka Epuraim kwape ajaatar irionetakec: loapolokinit da erioneteke ŋes Elisama okoku loka Amikud,"
Numbers10:23 Loapolokinit erioŋet loka ateker naka idwe luka Manase ŋes Gamaliel okoku loka Pedasur.
Numbers10:24 Loapolokinit erioŋet loka ateker naka idwe luka Benyamin ŋes Abidan okoku loka Gideoni.
Numbers10:25 Kitobwotai emedera loka iidukurun luka idwe luka Dan loewasie koidukurun kere, kwape ajaatar irionetakec: loapolokinit da erioneteke ŋes Akieser okoku loka Amisadai."
Numbers10:26 Loapolokinit erioŋet loka ateker naka idwe luka Aser ŋes Pagiel okoku loka Oeuran.
Numbers10:27 Loapolokinit erioŋet loka ateker naka idwe luka Naputali ŋes Akira okoku loka Enan.
Numbers10:28 Ekonenenei nen alosit naka idwe luka Isirael kwape ajaatar irionetakec; kobwota.
Numbers10:29 Kolimok Musa omuranike Kobab, okoku loka Reuel Emidianit ebe, “Kibei isio aibois naabu Edeke kobala ebe, ‘Kainakini yes’: kaupakinos, ka sio da kiswamakini jo ejok: naarai ener EJAKAIT nuejok nuka Isirael.”"
Numbers10:30 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Mam alosi; konye aboŋori bukosi, mama ejai atekereka.”"
Numbers10:31 Kotema atiar, “Sirikiinyei sio, kenainait; naarai iieni kwape kilosio aidukur toma amodiŋ, kwaŋin iraun ijo akosikonye."
Numbers10:32 Ejaun kwanata, arai kiupakin oni, eebo ejaun kwanata ebe, niniiokis kere nakiswamakini sic EJAKAIT, nipenin kiswamakini isio da jo.”"
Numbers10:33 Kobwota anyoun komoru loka EJAKAIT alosit naka apaarasia auni; kiŋarenikinite kes asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT kalosite naka apaarasia auni, amoikin kes aibois nakiyenunet,"
Numbers10:34 Korapiarite kes edou loka EJAKAIT paaran naabwosiata koidukurun.
Numbers10:35 Kosodi naetobwosenenere asaduku kotemanari Musa atiar, “Konyou, wu EJAKAIT, kisiarisiar lukasurupokon; kokerata da lukilaito jo kakonyenekon.”"
Numbers10:36 Naeyenununa da kotemanari atiar, “Koboŋu, wu EJAKAIT, neejaas ilukumin itomon luka ilukumin luka Isirael.”"
Numbers11:1 Kirurumata ituŋa, kineras nukaronok kaki nuka EJAKAIT: kepupu EJAKAIT, kinep anyunyurake; konok akim naka EJAKAIT kamakee, konyama da atutubeta nukokina nuka iidukurun."
Numbers11:2 Komonyata ituŋa mama ejai Musa; kilip Musa EJAKAIT, kodunei do akim."
Numbers11:3 Komaikinai ekiror loka aibois ŋin Tabera: naarai abu akim naka EJAKAIT konok kamakee.
Numbers11:4 Kikibelik ikatumunak luenyalakina tomakee: komonyata bobo idwe luka Isirael ebe, “Iŋai kitanyami sio akiriŋ?"
Numbers11:5 Kiitu agaria nukinyamenenei atai kotoma Misiri; akolil, ka amonyon, ka edia, ka itugulun, ka lukinyalet."
Numbers11:6 Konye kwana iriono ekositau; emamei idiobore da: emamei idiobore yenikitei dimarai emanu lo.”
Numbers11:7 Kosubite emanu bala eeokat loka ejad ka aketakanu da koputosi bala atakanu naka ebedola.
Numbers11:8 Kiledokinos ituŋa atukonokin ŋes, kiriata kakanasia, korukoto kokisun, kipooto kamoti, kilunulunata imugatin: kosubite bala enyamete kesi edia loinyalakinitai akinyet."
Numbers11:9 Nakejaununotor akopyo oidukurun kuare, koiaunun emanu da."
Numbers11:10 Kopup Musa ituŋa emonyete kokaliakee kere, ŋinituŋanan kokek loka ewemake: kinep noi anyunyura naka EJAKAIT; kokadak Musa."
Numbers11:11 Kotema Musa EJAKAIT atiar, “Kanukinyo iswamakinia ijo ekonibulesit erono? Kanukinyo da mam eoŋ adumunitor asianut kakonyenekon, tape ijo kisibwoki eoŋ alaŋir naka ituŋa kalu kere?"
Numbers11:12 Eoŋ kapotuun kereka ituŋa lu kere? ido eoŋ kedouni kes? Tape ijo kitemar eoŋ ebe, ‘Kodakaa kes katorobukon kwape edakia ekasaan ikoku yenenaki, aitodol akwap naibu kisiyapoik lukapapaakee.’"
Numbers11:13 Ai bo alemunia eoŋ akirhj naainakini ituŋa lu kere? naarai emonyete mamaka ebe, ‘Koinakinai sic akiriŋ, kanyama.’"
Numbers11:14 Mam eoŋ apedori bon aibwok ituŋa lu kere, naarai kalanirikinito noi."
Numbers11:15 Arai kiswamanakini ijo eoŋ kwaŋin, kenainair koar katipet, arai adumunit asianut kakonyenekon; kenyek aanyun iean luetia nen.”"
Numbers11:16 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Kotukokinai ituŋa akaisakanykaarei komakio luka Isirae!, luijeni ijo ebe eraas imakio luka ituŋa, luepolokinito kes; koyau kes owema loka airiamunun, tetere ebwoete kaŋina nepepe kaio."
Numbers11:17 Eiesuni eoŋ da einer kaio kanen; alemari ece komoyo loijaatar ijo, kasodi aibwaikin mamakee; ibwokete nepepe kajo alaŋir naka ituŋa, tetere mam jo bon ibwoki."
Numbers11:18 Kolimok ituŋa ebe, ‘Kitalaunos eroko moi edoluno, inyamete da akiriŋ; naarai imonyata kaki nuka EJAKAIT ebe, “Iŋai kitanyami sio akiriŋ? naarai aiok kole isio aiboi koMisiri”: kanuka nun kiinaki EJAKAIT akiriŋ, inyamete."
Numbers11:19 Mere adiopepaaran bon inyamiata, karaida apaarasia aarei karaida apaarasia akany, karaida apaarasia akaisaarei;"
Numbers11:20 Konye elap kere, aitodol naelomunia kokumesikus, nekititirikinio cut: naarai ineroto EJAKAIT loejai mamakus, komonyete kakonyeneke ebe, “Kanukinyo kinyounio koMisiri?”’”"
Numbers11:21 Kotema Musa atiar, “Ituŋa luaiai eoŋ mamakee imwaasi ikiliok ilukumin akwat akanykape; ido itema ijo atiar, ‘Ainakini kes akiriŋ, konyama adaun elap kere?’"
Numbers11:22 Earakinio isipanin luka amerekekin ka luka aituk aisimonikinia kes? arai bo etukonokinio agaria kere nuka aŋolol aisimonikinia kes?”
Numbers11:23 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Euriana kereka akan naka EJAKAIT? ianyuni do arai itodolikinio akakiro mama ijai arai bo mam.”"
Numbers11:24 Koloma Musa, kolimok ituŋa akiro nuka EJAKAIT: kotukok imakio luka ituŋa akaisakanykaarei, kisibwo kes aisirimor Ewema."
Numbers11:25 Kiiesun EJAKAIT kotoma odou, kiner kaŋes, kolema da ece komoyo loaiaatar ŋesi, kibwaik omakio akaisakanykaarei: kosodi kiboikin emoyo mamakec, kodwarata, kitananata nepenen."
Numbers11:26 Konye asalito ituŋa iarei oidukurun, ekiror loka ediopet ŋes Eludad, ece da ŋes Medad: kiboikin emoyo mamakee; ido araas kesi luka nul kaluewadikatai, konye mam apotu koloto owema: kodwarata koidukurun."
Numbers11:27 Koker ekatumunan, kolimok Musa ebe, “Edwarete Eludad ka Medad koidukurun.”"
Numbers11:28 Koboŋok Yosua okoku loka Nun, ekeiaanakinan loka Musa ameun koiditeuke ebe, “Ejakaitika Musa, kitikok kes.”"
Numbers11:29 Kotema Musa ŋes atiar, “Kikokotik ijo kanukaŋ? Tiejok ituŋa kere luka EJAKAIT koraunos inabin, tikibwaiki da EJAKAIT emoyoke mamakee!”"
Numbers11:30 Koboŋosi Musa ka imakio luka Isirael oidukurun.
Numbers11:31 Kokut ekwam loebuni kama ejai EJAKAIT, koyanau alurueik kaŋolol, kitodo kes oidukurun, kwaka alosit naka adiopepaaran epuai, ka alosit naka adiopepaaran epuai da, airimor iidukurun, ikubitin iarei kuiu kakwap."
Numbers11:32 Konyout ituŋa apaaran ŋin kere, ka akuare da kere, ka apaaran kere naatupakini, kotukonokis alurueik: nin yenatukokinit nuikidioko atukokinit ikomerin itomon: koloikis airimor iidukurun."
Numbers11:33 Aroko akiriŋ ejai okelakee, aroko da enyakao, kinep anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin ituŋa, kodany EJAKAIT ituŋa katular naepol noi,"
Numbers11:34 Komaikinai aibois ŋin ekiror Kiburot-kataaba: naarai nen aponi kidaikinai ituŋa luikibelikinito.
Numbers11:35 Kolototo ituŋa anyoun koKiburot-kataaba kodoloto Kaserot; kiboikinos Kaserot.
Numbers12:1 Koluikis Miriam ka Aaron Musa koinerekec kanuka aberu naKusit naamanyit ŋesi: naarai abu komany aberu naKusit.
Numbers12:2 Kotemasi atiar, “Enerata kereka EJAKAIT ka Musa bon? Mam ŋes kinerit kasio da?” Kopup EJAKAIT nun."
Numbers12:3 Kiyapeperana Musa noi adepar ituŋa kere luajaas akwapin.
Numbers12:4 Atipet kotema EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron ka Miriam da, atiar, “Kopotu yes iuni owema loka airiamunun.” Kolomasi kesi iuni."
Numbers12:5 Kiiesun EJAKAIT kotoma opir loka edou, kobwo kokek loka Ewema, konyara Aaron ka Miriam: kikunyakis kesi."
Numbers12:6 Kotema atiar, “Kiirasi kwana akakiro: arai ejai enabi kotomakus, eoŋ EJAKAIT etejenun mamake kotoma otapo eneri kaŋes kotoma airuj,"
Numbers12:7 Mam ekakeiaanakinan Musa ikoni nen; erai lomunot kotoma togoka kere:
Numbers12:8 Kinera kaŋes kaituke, kaitebeikin, mere kakiro nuimunonoro; ido eanyuni ŋesi asima naka EJAKAIT: asa kanukinyo mam ipotu kokuriakarotor aluikin ekakejaanakinan Musa koinerekus?”"
Numbers12:9 Kinep anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin ŋes; konyou,"
Numbers12:10 Konyou da edou kokuju owema; ido koany, ebokoror akuan naka Miriam atapon: kite Aaron Miriam, ido koany, korai nakatapon,"
Numbers12:11 Kotema Aaron Musa atiar, “Wu okwe ekaiakait, kenainait, sirikisibwok sio aronis, naarai kiswama nukabanaanut, kidiaka da."
Numbers12:12 Kenainait, kinyeik ŋesi aisub bala yenikatwan, yenemunauna atutubet naka akuanake elomuni kakoik naka totoke.”"
Numbers12:13 Kiworo Musa mama ejai EJAKAIT atiar, “Kitaŋaleu ŋes, wu Edeke, kenainait.”"
Numbers12:14 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Arai kimuikinit papake ŋes aimul oreeteke, ti kereka mam ŋes kiruma ileje apaarasia akanykaarei? Ibus kogolokinai ŋes kina kiidukurun apaarasia akanykaarei, akaulo kanun inyakunio ŋes toma bobo.”"
Numbers12:15 Kogoloroi Miriam kina kiidukurun apaarasia akanykaarei: mam ituŋa da apotu koloto aitodol naenyakunere bobo Miriam toma.
Numbers12:16 Ido akaulo kanun, konyout ituŋa koKaserot, kidukuroto amodiŋ naka Paran."
Numbers13:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers13:2 “Kijuka ituŋa, korota akwap naka Kanaan, naainakini idwe luka Isirael: ijukari etuŋanan loka ninireker naka lukapapaakee, nclidiopet loepol kamakec.”"
Numbers13:3 Kijuka Musa kes anyoun kamodiŋ naka Paran kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT: kes kere ituŋa luapolokinito idwe luka Isirael.
Numbers13:4 Ikecekiroria da lu: loka ateker naka Reuben ŋes Samua okoku loka Sacur,"
Numbers13:5 Loka ateker naka Simeon, Sapat okoku loka Kori."
Numbers13:6 Loka ateker naka Yuda, Kaleb okoku loka Yepune."
Numbers13:7 Loka ateker naka Isakar, Igal okoku loka Yosep."
Numbers13:8 Loka ateker naka Epuraim, Kosea okoku loka Nun."
Numbers13:9 Loka ateker naka Benyamin, Paluti okoku loka Rapu."
Numbers13:10 Loka ateker naka Sebulun, Gadiel okoku loka Sodi."
Numbers13:11 Loka ateker naka Yosep, ŋes leka ateker naka Manase, Gadi okoku loka Susi."
Numbers13:12 Loka ateker naka Dan, Amiel okoku loka Gemali,"
Numbers13:13 Loka ateker naka Aser, Setur okoku loka Mikael."
Numbers13:14 Loka ateker naka Naputali, Nabi okoku loka Bopasi,"
Numbers13:15 Loka ateker naka Gad, Geuel okoku loka Maki."
Numbers13:16 Ŋul kes ikiroria luka ituŋa luejukari Musa airot akwap. Komaik Musa Kosea okoku loka Nun Yosua.
Numbers13:17 Kijuka Musa kes airot akwap naka Kanaan, kotema kes atiar, “Kodokasi korot loka ari naka Eŋalakimak, kodokasi oroŋan:"
Numbers13:18 Koanyut akwap, kwape eputor; ka ituŋa luibojete kotoma, arai eraas luegogon arai enonok, arai ikidioko arai ipu;"
Numbers13:19 Ido kwape eiaar akwap naiboioto kesi kotoma, arai ejok arai erono; kwape ejaatar da ireria luiboioto kesi kotoma, arai ludukurun, arai luebwaunitai kabwas;"
Numbers13:20 Kwape ejaar akwap, arai naapusuk arai naakurae, arai ejaas amagoron, arai emameete, Kotitinikis yesi, koyauniata da adioraito nuka akwap.” Kerai na apak naka imusabibun luageenenete atiokore."
Numbers13:21 Kosodete kodokasi korota akwap anyoun kamodiŋ naka Sin aitodol Rekob kiton alomaret Kamat.
Numbers13:22 Kodokasi kari naka Eŋalakimak, kodoloto Keburon; ajaas nen Akiman, Sesai ka Talimai, idwe luka Anak. (Adukitai Keburon ikar ikanykaarei eroko Soan kotoma Misiri.)"
Numbers13:23 Kodolut aditot naka Esukot, kojeput kanen atenut naajai aibuŋet adiopet naka emusabibu, kidielata iarei kakitoi; koyautu da araito nuka ekamamaga, ka nuka etini."
Numbers13:24 Komaikinai aibois ŋin aditot naka Esukol, kanuka aibuŋet naajeparete idwe luka Isirael kanen."
Numbers13:25 Kobonosi kairot akwap kedaunos apaarasia akaisaoŋon,"
Numbers13:26 Kolototo kopotu neejai Musa ka Aaron, ka ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael, kamodiŋ naka Paran, koKades; koinut kes ka ekodet kere akirot, kitodikis da kes araito nuka akwap."
Numbers13:27 Kolimokis ŋes ebe, “Kidol akwap naibu ijo kijuka sio, abeit erai naeleleete akile ka esik; ido nu kes araitoke."
Numbers13:28 Konye ituŋa luibojete kakwap eraas luegogon, ireriakec da ebwaitai, epolok noi: bobo da kipou kaanyutu kaŋina idwe luka Anak."
Numbers13:29 Iboie Amalek kakwap naka ari naka Eŋalakimak; iboie da Ekitit ka Eyebusit ka Emorait koronan: iboie da Ekanaanit kariri naka aŋolol, ka ariri naka Yorodan da.”"
Numbers13:30 Kisililin Kaleb ituŋa kakonyen nuka Musa, kotema atiar, “Kadokasi katipet, keruma ŋes; naarai kipedori eut aipikor.”"
Numbers13:31 Konye ituŋa luaupara kaŋes kotemasi atiar, “Mam kipedori asurokin ituŋa; naarai egogoŋ kesi adepar oni,”"
Numbers13:32 Koinut idwe luka Isirael akiro nueroko nuka akwap naapotu korota, ebe, “Akwap nakitoro kirosi, erai akwap naenyamanari luibojete kotoma; ituŋa da lukipou kaanyutu kotoma eraas ituŋa luikososoete,"
Numbers13:33 Kipou kaanyutu kaŋina da Inepilin, odwe luka Anak, luelomunete koInepilin: kirai kakonyenekosi bala ibeerei, ido kirai kwaŋin kakonyenekec da.”"
Numbers14:1 Kodelo ekodet kere; komonya ituŋa akuare nin,"
Numbers14:2 Kirurumata idwe luka Isirael kere aluikin Musa ka Aaron da: kobala ekodet kere kes ebe, “Tiejok arai katwakikinito akwap nako Misiri! Tiejok da arai katwakikinito amodiŋ na!"
Numbers14:3 Kanukinyo kiyaunia EJAKAIT sio akwap na, adanyio kekileŋ? Anorokosi ka ikosidwe ludidik da araun lumejan: mam tiejok sio aboŋor Misiri?”"
Numbers14:4 Kotemanaros bonik atiar, “Kaseutu ekenarenon, kabonosi Misiri.”"
Numbers14:5 Kosodi Musa ka Aaron aibirokin kwap ebuburia, kakonyen nuka ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael."
Numbers14:6 Apotu Yosua okoku loka Nun ka Kaleb okoku loka Yepune luaraas iarei kanul kaluarosito akwap, koeilieilata ikeeenapen:"
Numbers14:7 Kolimokis ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael ebe, “Akwap, nakitor kirosi, erai akwap naitelekarit kajokis,"
Numbers14:8 Arai kisiyalamikinit oni EJAKAIT, kiyai ŋesi oni akwap nin, kainakini oni da; akwap naeleleete akile ka esik."
Numbers14:9 Konye sirikipaliikis EJAKAIT, karaida aiyoŋ ituŋa luka akwap; naarai eraas atapawok; alemar etorubekec kamakee, ejai EJAKAIT nepepe kaoni: sirikiyoŋa kes.”"
Numbers14:10 Konye akoto ekodet kere aibiribir kes kamor. Kosodi aibuses naka EJAKAIT aitakanikin idwe kere luka Isirael kowema loka airiamunun.
Numbers14:11 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Itodolete ai iruna lu kamwanitos eoŋ? Itodolete da ai mam keyuunitos, kanuka aanyuneta kere nueswamak kes?"
Numbers14:12 Adanyi kes katular, ademari kes airumet, etuluori jo ateker naepol naegogon adepar kes.”"
Numbers14:13 Kotema Musa EJAKAIT atiar, “Aso epupunete Imisirian nun: naarai ijo iyauni ituŋa lu kotoma apedorikon kamakee;"
Numbers14:14 Elimokinete da luibojete kakwap kaŋin: apuput ebe ijai ijo EJAKAIT kidin kituna kalu: naarai kianyununo jo EJAKAIT kakonyen, ebwoi da ekonidou kamakee, iŋarenikinit kes, kepir loka edou paaran, ka epir loka akim kuare."
Numbers14:15 Aso arai kiara ijo ituŋa lu adaun cut, etemarete atekerin nuapuputu eemutukon atiar."
Numbers14:16 ‘Kanu naarai mam EJAKAIT abu kopedo ayaun ituŋa nul toma akwap naabu kiyapoik kes, ŋes aarakinia kes amodiŋ.’"
Numbers14:17 Aso kenaiŋait, kopoloor apedor naka EJAKAIT kwape ejaatar nuibu ijo kiner ebe,"
Numbers14:18 ‘Iyapi EJAKAIT anyunyurikin, ileleba aitim, isioniei numam adolit ka aibucareta, lomam imarakini luegwaunito akirot araun ikadolitok; idopei kodwe numam adolit nuka lukapapakee, aitodol atur nakiwuniet ka nakiwononet.’"
Numbers14:19 Kenainait, kisioni numam adolit nuka ituŋa kalu kwape eiaar akoniitim naepol, kwape ibu kisionio ituŋa lu, anyoun koMisiri aitodol kwana.”"
Numbers14:20 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Esioni kwape ejaar akonikirot:"
Numbers14:21 Konye abeit, kwape ajaria, ido kwape ilelebunor akwap kere aibuses naka EJAKAIT;"
Numbers14:22 Naarai ituŋa nul kere luaanyutu akaibuses, ka aanyunetaka da, nuabu keswama koMisiri, kamodiŋ da, konye kakodokodata eoŋ irwan nu atomon, komam epupete ekaporoto;"
Numbers14:23 Abeit mam eanyunete cut akwap naabu keyapoik lukapapaakee, karaida yenabu kamwan eoŋ kere mam eanyuni."
Numbers14:24 Konye Kaleb ekakejaanakinan, naarai ajaas kemoyo ece, ido karima eoŋ cut, ayai eoŋ ŋes akwap naabu ŋesi kolosite; aurike da irumi ŋes."
Numbers14:25 Iboiete Emalekait ka Ekanaanit kaditot: kibelokinos moi, koloto amodiŋ korot loebei Aŋolol Nakarenan.’"
Numbers14:26 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron atiar,"
Numbers14:27 “Etodoli ai atitinikinit ekodet lo lokaronon, lokerurumakinit eoŋ? Apup airuruma naka idwe luka Isirael, nakerurumakinitotor eoŋ."
Numbers14:28 Kolimok kes ebe, Inera EJAKAIT atiar, Kwape ajaria, abeit kwape kilimokiniata akika, kwape kwaŋin da keswamakiniata:"
Numbers14:29 Edoenenete atesinakus amodiŋ na; kere da luaponi kimarai kayesi, kwape ajaar etiaikus kere, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, lukerurumakis eoŋ."
Numbers14:30 Abeit mam ilomarete akwap, naabu eoŋ kario akakan ebe kesiboikini yes toma, dimarai Kaleb okoku loka Yepune ka Yosua okoku loka Nun."
Numbers14:31 Konye idwekus ludidik luibalasi yesi ebe eraunos lumeian, kes etolomari eoŋ, ido kes ejenunete akwap nainero yesi."
Numbers14:32 Konye yes, edoenenete akusitesin amodiŋ na."
Numbers14:33 Idwekus da eraunos ikerimok kotoma amodiŋ ikar akaisaoŋon, ibwokete eporokus, aitodol naedaikinotor atesinakus amodiŋ,"
Numbers14:34 Kwape ejaar etiai loka apaarasia nuirosiata yes akwap, kes apaarasia akaisaoŋon, kanuka ninipaaran ekaru, ibwokiata numam adolitekus, kes ikar akaisaon on, ijenunete da apalunika,"
Numbers14:35 Ener eoŋ EJAKAIT, abeit eswamakini eoŋ ŋun ekodet lo kere lokaronon, loetukokina nepepe asurokin eoŋ: amodiŋ na ŋes edaikinos, ido nen etwakikinete.”"
Numbers14:36 Ka ituŋa da, luejukarit Musa airot akwap, luabonunete, kosodete aisirurumakin ŋes ekodet kere, kanuka ainun akiro nueroko aitoronia akwap,"
Numbers14:37 Ituŋa nupenul luayaunete akiro nueroko aitoronia akwap, kotwaka atular kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Numbers14:38 Konye Yosua okoku loka Nun, ka Kaleb okoku loka Yepune, kes apotu kojarata koruna lualosito airot akwap."
Numbers14:39 Kolimok Musa idwe kere luka Isirael akiro ŋun: kibworoto ituŋa noi.
Numbers14:40 Kodilokis anyoun tupuruc, kodokasi kuiu oroŋat, kobalas ebe, “Koany, isio lu, kidokari do aibois nakisumunit EJAKAIT: naarai kidiaka.”"
Numbers14:41 Kotema Musa atiar, “Kanukinyo ipaariata kaieorakinet naka EJAKAIT, naarai emamuun asuliany?"
Numbers14:42 Sirikidokasi, naarai mam EJAKAIT ejai kidiŋikus; kinyeis adanyio kakonyen nuka lukasurupokus,"
Numbers14:43 Naarai ejaas nina kiŋarenikus Emalekait ka Ekanaanit, kidanyio kekilen: naarai ibonut katupit EJAKAIT, kanuka ŋun mam EJAKAIT ejaun kayes.”"
Numbers14:44 Konye konasikinos adokar kuiu oroŋat: kwabo mam asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT, ka Musa, apotu konyout koidukurun."
Numbers14:45 Kosodete Emalekait ka Ekanaanit lueboienenete koroŋat kanol aijesun, kodanya kes, kibirut kes, aitodol Koruma."
Numbers15:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers15:2 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, Naidolioto akwap naiboikinos, nakainakini yes,"
Numbers15:3 Kosodete ainakin EJAKAIT ainakinet kakim, ainakinet naicweio, arai asubanit, aitodolio aiyaposit, arai ainakinet naka akote, arai kopucinokus luicorakinitai, aisuŋuuno EJAKAIT asakat naeur saa, kaituk arai kamerekekin:"
Numbers15:4 Loeinakini akeinakinet einakini EJAKAIT ainakinet naka akiria naka idiopet kotomon yenika epa loka akiria nuidicie nuinyalakinitai ka idiopet koonon yenika ekin loka akinyet:
Numbers15:5 Ka ebino kanuka ainakinet namatat, idiopet koonon yenika ekin, itemonokinete nepepe kainakinet naicweio arai kanuka asubanit kanuka ŋinimerekek yenididi."
Numbers15:6 Arai kanuka emerekek, itemonokini kanuka ainakinet naka akiria iarei kotomon luka epa loka akiria nuidicic nuinyalakinitai idiopet kouni yenika ekin loka akinyet:"
Numbers15:7 Kanuka ainakinet namatat da iinakini idiopet kouni yenika ekin loka ebino, loka asakat naeur saa mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Numbers15:8 Naitemokinio emoŋ lotobait kanuka ainakinet naicweio, arai kanuka asubanit, aitodolio aiyaposit, arai kanuka ainakineta nuka ainapakin mama ejai EJAKAIT:"
Numbers15:9 Ŋes einakinia ainakinet naka akiria nepepe kemon lotobait naka iuni kotomon luka epa loka akiria nuidicie nuinyalakinitai katutubet naka ekin loka akinyet.
Numbers15:10 Iinakini kanuka ainakinet namatat atutubet naka ekin loka ebino, kanuka ainakinet naeinakinere kakim, naka asakat naeur saa mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Numbers15:11 Iswamaenenoo kwaŋin kanuka nolimon lotobait, ido kanuka nolimerekek, kanuka ninimcrekek yenikiliokit, arai kanuka ŋinikalol da."
Numbers15:12 Kwape ejaar etiai loitemokinete, iswamakinete kwaŋin ŋinidiopet, kwape ejaar etiaiakee."
Numbers15:13 Iurian kere iswamaete akiro nun kopone kanol, naeinakiniata ainakinet naeinakinere kakim, naka asakat naeur saa mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Numbers15:14 Arai kiboikin imoit nepepe kayes, arai ice kere yenejaun kidinikus katuriokus kere, kosodi ainakin ainakinet naeinakinere kakim, naka asakat naeur saa mama ejai EJAKAIT; kwape iswamaata yesi, iswamai ŋesi da kwaŋin,"
Numbers15:15 Kanuka atukot, ejaun ekisil ediopet kanukus, ido kanuka imoit yeniboienenei nepepe kayes, ekisil lomam edaun katuriokus kere: kwape iiaatar yesi, ejaun kwaŋin imoit kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT,"
Numbers15:16 Ejaun ekisil ediopet ka aicorakinet adiopet kanukus, ido kanuka imoit yeniboienenei kayes.”"
Numbers15:17 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers15:18 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, Naidolioto akwap naketolomari yes,"
Numbers15:19 Ejaun kwana, ebe, nainyamiata atap naka akwap, iinakinete ainakinet nadakakina mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Numbers15:20 Iinanakinete aluŋuret naka agweikus nainumanariata yesi kanuka ainakinet nadakakina: kwape idakuniata ainakinet nadakakina naka epejal, idakunete nin da kwaŋin,"
Numbers15:21 linanakinete EJAKAIT aluŋuret naka agweikus nainumanariata araun ainakinet nadakakina katuriokus kere.
Numbers15:22 Ido naipaariata, komam iricito aicorakineta nun kere, nualimoki EJAKAIT Musa."
Numbers15:23 Ŋun kere nukicorak yes EJAKAIT kama ka Musa, ameun kapaaran naesiaunia EJAKAIT aicorakin, anatar aturiokus kere;"
Numbers15:24 Ejaun kwana, arai kibueasi, komam ekodet ejeŋi, einakini ekodet kere emoŋ lotobait kanuka ainakinet naicweio, naka asakat naeur saa mama ejai EJAKAIT, nepepe kainakineteke naka akiria, ka ainakineteke namatat, kwape ejaar ekisil, ka ekoroi ediopet kanuka ainakinet naka adiakaret."
Numbers15:25 Eluei esasedoti ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael, isionio da kes; naarai arai aibucaret, ayaut da ainakinetekee, ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT, ka ainakinetekee naka adiakaret kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kanuka aibucaretekec:"
Numbers15:26 Isionio ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael, ka imoit da yeniboienenei kamakee; naarai arai aibucaret naka ituŋa kere komam ejenete."
Numbers15:27 Ido arai kediaka idiopetunanan komam ejeŋi, einakini akinei naka ekaru ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret."
Numbers15:28 Eluei esasedoti aijar naibuearit, naediakaria komam ejeŋi, kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, alueio ŋes; ido isionio ŋes."
Numbers15:29 Ŋaunos kekisil ediopet kanuka nin yeniswamai ibore komam ejeŋi, nin yeneurikinitai odwe luka Isirael, ido ka imoit yeniboienenei kamakee."
Numbers15:30 Konye aijar naepeleikin aswam ibore, arai iuriat arai imoit, einyanakini nin EJAKAIT; egelario ituŋanan nin kotuŋake."
Numbers15:31 Naarai amwaŋ akirot naka EJAKAIT, abil da aicorakineteke; egelario ituŋanan ŋin cut, ejaunos numam adoliteke mamake.”"
Numbers15:32 Naajaatar idwe luka Isirael amodiŋ apotu kodumut etuŋanan erarai akito kapaaran nakasabato,"
Numbers15:33 Koyaut luadumunete ŋes erarai akito mama ejai Musa ka Aaron ido mama ejai ekodet kere.
Numbers15:34 Koenai, naarai mam ber alimoritai nuiswamakinio ŋes."
Numbers15:35 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Abeit eario etuŋanan: ibiribiri ekodet kere ŋes kamor kokina kiidukurun.”"
Numbers15:36 Koyau ekodet kere ŋes kina kiidukurun, kibiribiroto ŋes kamor, kotwana; kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT Musa."
Numbers15:37 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers15:38 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael, kicorak kes aiswamakin isilo atokito nuka inapenekee, anatar aturiokee kere, kitolomikis eusi lobululu osilo luka niuitokiroit:"
Numbers15:39 Eraun kamakus esilot, tetere iteete ŋes, kiitununoto aicorakineta kere nuka EJAKAIT, kiswamata kes; komam ilosete koipud loka etaukus ka akonyenekus loetapitor yes aelor:"
Numbers15:40 Tetere iitunete iswamaete da akaieorakineta kere, koraunos lukalaunak kama ejai Edekekus."
Numbers15:41 Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke, loketolomuni yes kakwap nako Misiri, araun Edekekus: arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke.”"
Numbers16:1 Kosodete Kora, okoku loka Isekar, okoku loka Kokat, okoku loka Lebi, nepepe ka Datan ka Abiram, odwe luka Eliab, ka On, okoku loka Pelet, odwe luka Reuben, ayaŋaar ituŋa:"
Numbers16:2 Konyout kakonyen nuka Musa, nepepe kice kodwe luka Isirael, ikapolok akwat aarei ka akaisakany luka ekodet, luanyaraunitai aurianet, ituŋa luajenas;"
Numbers16:3 Kotukonokinos aluikin Musa ka Aaron, kolimokis kes ebe, “Idakakina yes nuipu, kwabo elaunit ekodet kere, ninidiopet kakesi, ejai EJAKAIT kakes: kanukinyo do idakakinotor yesi ikulepek aitelekar atukot naka EJAKAIT?”"
Numbers16:4 Kepupu Musa, kibiror ebuburia:"
Numbers16:5 Kolimok Kora ka ipaupake kere ebe, “Moi tupuruc itoduni EJAKAIT lueraas luke, ka yenikalaunan, isudunyikini mamake: nol Ioeseuni ŋesi isudunyikini mamake."
Numbers16:6 Kiswamata kwanata; koyanaasi yesi aisupuruneta, Kora ka ipaupake kere;"
Numbers16:7 Kibwaikis akim toma, kibwaikis da lukisupurununo toma kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT moi: ejaun kwana ebe etuŋanan loeseuni EJAKAIT, elauni ŋol; idakakina yes nuipu, yes odwe luka Lebi.”"
Numbers16:8 Kotema Musa Kora atiar, “Kopupokisi do yes odwe luka Lebi:"
Numbers16:9 Erai kereka akirot naedit kamakus, Edeke loka Isirael agitun yes kokodet loka Isirael, aisukunyikin yes mama ejai; aijaanakin toma owema lokalaunan loka EJAKAIT, ka abwoenen kakonyen nuka ekodet aijaanakin kes;"
Numbers16:10 Kisukuny ŋesi jo, ka iinacanakon kere odwe luka Lebi nepepe kajo? Imootos yesi da esasedotene?"
Numbers16:11 Kanuka ŋun ijo ka ipaupakon kere itukonokinos nepepe aluikin EJAKAIT: ka Aaron da, iŋai bo ŋesi loirurumakinitos yesi?”"
Numbers16:12 Kijuka Musa anyaraun Datan ka Abiram, odwe luka Eliab: kotemasi atiar, “Mam sio kibuni:"
Numbers16:13 Erai kereka akirot naedit ijo aitonyoun sio kakwap naeleleete akile ka esik, aarakin sio amodiŋ, kwabo ituluoro bon ekapolon lokiyait sio?"
Numbers16:14 Bobo da mam jo kitolomarit sio akwap naeleleete akile ka esik, karaida ainakin airum imanikoria ka amanat nuka imusabibun: mere imod ijo ituŋa lu? mam sio kibuni.”"
Numbers16:15 Konyunyurikin Musa noi, kolimok EJAKAIT ebe, “Sirikieam ainakinetekec: mam eoŋ ayanaarit adiopesigiria kamakee, karaida aisirieb idiopet kakesi.”"
Numbers16:16 Kotema Musa Kora atiar, “Kojaun ijo moi ka ekodetekon kere, akonyen nuka EJAKAIT, ijo ka kes, ka Aaron:"
Numbers16:17 Koyana ninituŋanan kayesi akeisupurunet kibwaik lukisupurununo toma, koyanaasi mama ejai EJAKAIT ninitunanan akeisupurunet, aisupuruneta akwat aarei ka akaisakany; ijo da, ka Aaron, ninirunanan akeisupurunet.”"
Numbers16:18 Koyanaasi ninirunanan akeisupurunet, kibwaikis akimian toma, kibwaikis da lukisupurununo, kobwaata kokek loka ewema loka airiamunun nepepe ka Musa ka Aaron."
Numbers16:19 Kotukok Kora ekodet kere kiteos kakes kokek loka ewema laka airiamunun: kitakanikin aibuses naka EJAKAIT ekodet kere.
Numbers16:20 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron atiar,"
Numbers16:21 “Kogitaros yesi ka ekodet kalo, kamudia kes katipet.”"
Numbers16:22 Kibiroros ebuburia, kotemasi atiar, “Wu Edeke, Edeke loka imoyon luka lukaiarak kere, inyunyurikini ijo ekodet kere kediaka ediopetunanan?”"
Numbers16:23 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers16:24 “Kolimok ekodet ebe, Konyoutu kowema loka Kora, ka Datan ka Abiram.”"
Numbers16:25 Konyou Musa kolot mama ejai Datan ka Abiram; kotupito da ŋes imakio luka Isirael.
Numbers16:26 Kiner kekodet atiar, “Konyoutu, kenaiŋaito, koweman luka ituŋa lu lukaronok, ido sirikitina idioborekec, kinyeis amudiario kotoma adiakaretakec kere.”"
Numbers16:27 Konyout kowema loka Kora, ka Datan ka Abiram, kanoliwai: kolomut Datan ka Abiram, kobwaata kokekia luka iwemanakec, ka akecenor ka odwekec, ka ikeeedwe ludidik."
Numbers16:28 Kotema Musa atiar, “Iienunete kanu ebe EJAKAIT keiukunit eoŋ aswam aswamisio nu kere; naarai mam eswamat kes kanukaŋ,"
Numbers16:29 Arai ketwaka ituŋa lu atwanare naka ituŋa kere, ido arai kedoikis kes nuedoonokinete ituŋa kere; ŋes atemar ebe mere EJAKAIT kejukunit eoŋ."
Numbers16:30 Konye arai kiswamau EJAKAIT ibore yenikitetet, koon akwap akeituk, kosodi ailikor kes, ka luejaatar kere, kolomasi aipany ejarete; ŋes do ijenuniata ebe amwana ituŋa lu EJAKAIT.”"
Numbers16:31 Kosodi kanen, enetakini ŋesi einer akiro nun kere, kocila akwap naabwoiata kesi:"
Numbers16:32 Koona akwap aitukuke, kiliko kes, ka ikaliakec ka ituŋa kere luaraas luka Kora, ka ikeceboro kere."
Numbers16:33 Kwaŋin kes, ka luaiaatatar kere kolomasi aipany ejarete: kobunak akwap kes, kooliosi katukot."
Numbers16:34 Kokera luka Isirael kere luerimorito kes kepuput aimonyokec: naarai abakas ebe, “Kinyek akwap ailikor oni da.”"
Numbers16:35 Kobu akim kama ejai EJAKAIT, konyama ituŋa nul akwat aarei ka akaisakany luainakinete lukisupurununo."
Numbers16:36 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers16:37 “Kolimok Eleasar okoku loka Aaron esasedoti kolema aisupuruneta kaneecweere, kiweliwel akim; naarai eraas nukalaunak;"
Numbers16:38 Aisupuruneta ŋun nuka ikadiakanarak nuegelito aiiarakec, itatai kes aipadalikin arapia etem; naarai apotu koinakis kes mama ejai EJAKAIT, kanuka nun eraas nukalaunak: ido eraunos aanyunet mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael.”"
Numbers16:39 Koyana Eleasar esasedoti aisupuruneta nuka aisinit, nuainakinito luecweio; kotatata kes aitaraun arapetait naka etem:"
Numbers16:40 Araun aisiitunet mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael, ebe sirielonwait lomam erai loka aur naka Aaron, kikunyu aicwe lukisupurununo kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT; kinyek aiput Kora ka ipaupake: kwape kelimokinia ŋes EJAKAIT kama ka Musa,"
Numbers16:41 Konye kapaaran naatupakini kirurumak ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael Musa ka Aaron, ebe, “Iarata yesi ituŋa luka EJAKAIT.”"
Numbers16:42 Kosodi ketukokin atukot aluikin Musa ka Aaron, kiteoto owema loka airiamunun: ido koany, korapia edou, kotakanu da aibuses naka EJAKAIT."
