Numbers16:43 Kopotu Musa ka Aaron kinaren kewema loka airiamunun.
Numbers16:44 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers16:45 “Konyou kokodet kalo, kamudia kes katipet.” Kibiroros ebuburia."
Numbers16:46 Kotema Musa Aaron atiar, “Koyaŋa aisupurunetekon, kibwaik akim nakotem toma, kibwaik da lukisupurununo, koyana katipet neejai ekodet, kolueo kes: naarai alomu anyunyura kama ejai EJAKAIT; ageu da atular.”"
Numbers16:47 Koyaŋa Aaron kwape alimokinia Musa, koker kidin kekodet; ido koany, ageuna atular kotuna: kibwaik lukisupurununo, koluc iruna,"
Numbers16:48 Kobwo ŋesi kokidin kalukatwak ka lukajarak; kitananai atular.
Numbers16:49 Ido luapotu kotwaka kanuka atular emwaasi ilukumin itomon ka luonon ka akwat akanykaarei, komam imarakinitai luatwakete kanuka akiro nuka Kora."
Numbers16:50 Kobono Aaron mama ejai Musa okek loka ewema loka airiamunun: kitananai atular.
Numbers17:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers17:2 “Kinera kidwe luka Isirael, kolema kamakec ibelai, ediopet kanuka ŋiniteker naka lukapapaakec, loka ikapolokokec kere kwape ejaatar atekerin nuka lukapapaakec, ibelai itomon ka luarei; kiwadik ekiror loka nolitunanan obelake."
Numbers17:3 Iwadikai da ekiror loka Aaron obela loka Lebi: naarai ejaun ebela ediopet kanuka nolikapclon loka ateker naka lukapapaakec.
Numbers17:4 Iperikini kes toma owema loka airiamunun kinaren kasaduku naka aiteienunet, nekiriamunun kajo."
Numbers17:5 Kosodi ejaun kwanata ebe, etuŋanan loaseuni eoŋ, elibi ebelake: etanaŋi da airuruma naka idwe luka Isirael, nakirurumakinitotor jo.”"
Numbers17:6 Kiner Musa kidwe luka Isirael, koinakis ikapolokokec kere ŋes ibelai, ediopet kanuka nollkapolon, kwape ejaatar atekerin nuka lukapapaakec, ibelai itomon ka luarei: ajai ebela loka Aaron da obelaikec."
Numbers17:7 Kiperik Musa ibelai kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT kowema loka aitejenunet.
Numbers17:8 Kosodi kapaaran naatupakini, koloma Musa toma owema loka aitejenunet; ido koany, eburukunyit ebela loka Aaron kanuka ateker naka Lebi, alibunit da, kiturote atur, koraite da araito nukakokok."
Numbers17:9 Koyau Musa ibelai kere kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT mama ejaas idwe kere luka Isirael: kosesenata, koyana da ŋolituŋanan ekebela."
Numbers17:10 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Kinyaka ebela loka Aaron kinaren kaitejenunet, ainadio araun aanyunet mama ejaas idwe lukepali: tetere itanani airurumakinitekec eoŋ, kinyeis atwakare.”"
Numbers17:11 Kiswama Musa kwaŋin: kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT ŋes, kiswama kwaŋin."
Numbers17:12 Kotemasi idwe luka Isirael Musa atiar, “Koany, kiolio, kitwaka, kitwaka isio kere,"
Numbers17:13 Ituŋanan kere yenikunyakini, yenikunyakini owema lokalaunan loka EJAKAIT etwani: kioliori ca isio kere?”"
Numbers18:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Aaron atiar, “Ibwoki ijo ka odwekon, ka ekal loka lukapapaakon nepepe kajo numam adolit nuka aibois nakalaunan: ido ijo ka odwekon ibwokete numam adolit nuka esasedotenekus."
Numbers18:2 Ikoniinacan da, ateker naka Lebi, ateker naka papakon, kisukuny nepepe kajo, tetere imorikikinio mamakon, kijaanakis jo: konye ijo ka odwekon nepepe kajo iiaunos akonyen nuka ewema loka aitejenunet."
Numbers18:3 Idarete kesi akirokon, idarete da Ewema kere: konye mam ikunyakinete die kiboro luka aibois nakalaunan karaida otem, kinyeis atwakare, kes, karaida yes."
Numbers18:4 Imorikikinio kes mamakon, idarete ewema loka airiamunun, kanuka aijaanakin kere naka Ewema:, mam eloŋwait ikunyuni diekus."
Numbers18:5 Idarete yesi aibois nakalaunan, ka etem da: tetere mam bobo akanyunyura ebunokini idwe luka Isirael."
Numbers18:6 Eoŋ da, koany, alema iinacanakon Ilebin kodwe luka Isirael: eraas ainakinet mamakon, lueinakinitai EJAKAIT, aijaanakin ewema loka airiamunun,"
Numbers18:7 Idarete ijo ka odwekon esasedotenekus koboro kere luka etem, ka lueiaas toma aigalisit; ijaanakinete da: kainakinit yes aiiaanakin naka esasedotene bala ainakinet: ido eloŋwait loikunyuni die eario.”"
Numbers18:8 Kotema EJAKAIT Aaron atiar, “Eoŋ da, koany, kainak jo nuinadakinio nuka ainakineta nukainanakinio eoŋ, kes iboro lukalaunak luka idwe luka Isirael, kainak jo araun ewaikon, ka odwekon da, airumetekus nakitebeikinitai ikar kere."
Numbers18:9 Ŋin eraun nakon koboro lukalaunak noi, numam ieweikinitai: niniinakinetekec, ŋes ŋiniinakinetekee naka akiria, ka niniinakinetekee naka adiakaret, ka ŋiniinakinetekee naka aronis, nakainakinete eoŋ, eraun nakalaunan noi kanukon ido kanuka odwekon da."
Numbers18:10 Inyamanakini aibois nakalaunan noi: enyami nolikiliokit; eraunos lukalaunak kamakono
Numbers18:11 Lukon lu: luedakakinitai luka ainakinetakee, ainakineta da nuijaŋio nuka idwe luka Isirael: kainak jo, ka ikonidwe lusap ka lupesur nepepe kajo, airumetekus nakitebeikinitai ikar kere: ŋin yenelai kokalekon enyami kes,"
Numbers18:12 Akinyet kere naitelekarit aiokis, ka ebino loitelekarit ajokis, akima da, nuegeete kakesi kokaru nueinakinete EJAKAIT, kainak joo"
Numbers18:13 Araito nuegeete atiokore nuka kere luejaas toma akwap, nueyaununete mama ejai EJAKAIT, eraunos nukon; ŋin yenelai kokalekon enyami kes."
Numbers18:14 Ŋinibore yenegitunitai kotoma Isirael eraun yenikon.
Numbers18:15 Ŋinibore yenepukori aliliget, yenika akuan kere yeneinakinete EJAKAIT, yenika etuŋanan ka etiaŋ da, eraun yenikon: konye sirikinyek alakun ekiyai loka etuŋanan, sirikinyek da alakun ekiyai loka itian lumam elaete."
Numbers18:16 Ka nul da luibusakinit alakun kakesi, ilakuni ageun kaluka elap ediopet, kwape eiaunor aimarakon, isekelin ikany, kwape ajaar esekel loka aibois nakalaunan (esekel ŋes igeran akaisaarei)."
Numbers18:17 Konye mam ilakuni ekiyai loka emoŋ, arai ekiyai loka amerekek, arai ekiyai loka akinei; eraas lukalaunak: ibwatakini akeeeokot otem, ieweikini da asiepaikee kanuka ainakinet naeinakinere kakim, asakat naeuru saa mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Numbers18:18 Akiriŋikec eraun nakon, kwape ka atorob naiianio ka amurwo nakoteten, eraun nakon."
Numbers18:19 Ainakineta nuedakakinitai kere nuka iboro lukalaunak, nueinakinete idwe luka Isirael EJAKAIT, kainak jo ka ikonidwe lusap ka lupesur, nepepe kajo, airumet nakitebeikinitai ikar kere: erai aitutuket naka abalaŋ naka ikar kere kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT mama ijai ijo ka akoniwur nepepe kajo.”"
Numbers18:20 Kotema EJAKAIT Aaron atiar, “Emamuun jo airumet kotoma akwapukee, karaida adumun akorakinet kamakee: Eoŋ ŋes akorakinetekon ka airumetekon da kodwe luka Isirael."
Numbers18:21 Ido koany, ainak idwe luka Lebi idiopet kotomon koIsirael araun airumet, atacia aijaanakinikee naijaanakinete, ŋes aijaanakin naka ewema loka airiamunun."
Numbers18:22 Ido ameari kwana mam idwe luka Isirael ikunyunete die kewema loka airiamunun, kinyeis aibwok adiakaret, kosodete atwakare."
Numbers18:23 Konye ijaanakinete Ilebin ewema loka airiamunun, ibwokete numam adolitekec: eraun ekisil katuriokus kere ikar kere, ido emamuun kes airumet kodwe luka Isirael."
Numbers18:24 Naarai ainak Ilebin idiopet kotomon yenika lueinanakinete idwe luka Isirael kanuka ainakinet naedakakinitai mama ejai EJAKAIT araun airumet: kanuka ŋun alimok kes ebe, Emamuun kes airumet kodwe luka Isirael.”"
Numbers18:25 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers18:26 “Bobo da ilimokini Ilebin ebe, ‘Naijauniata idwe luka Isirael idiopet kotomon yenikainak yes kamakec araun airumetekus, iinakiniata yesi da ainakinet naedakakinitai mama ejai EJAKAIT, idiopet kotomon yenika idiopet kotomon."
Numbers18:27 Imarakinio mamakus ainakinetekus naedakakinitai kosubite bala kerai alos nakopejal, arai nuegeete nuka acuet naka ebino."
Numbers18:28 Iinakinete yesi da kwaŋin ainakinet naedakakinitai mama ejai EJAKAIT, idiopet kotomon yenika luiiaunete kodwe luka Isirael; iiaikiniata da Aaron esasedoti ainakinet naedakakinitai naka EJAKAIT."
Numbers18:29 Kainakinetakus kere iinanakinete ŋiniinakinet naedakakinitai naka EJAKAIT, kaluitelekarit aiokis kotomakec ŋes atutubet naitalaunitai kotomakec.’"
Numbers18:30 Ŋes itemaria kes atiar, ‘Naidakuniata naitelekarit ajokis, ŋes imarakinere oLebin kosubite bala nuiyatakina nuka epejal, ka nuiyatakina nuka acuet naka ebino."
Numbers18:31 Inyamenenete ŋes kaniniibois, yes ka ikusikalia da; naarai erai eropitikus atacia aijaanakinikus kowema loka amamunun."
Numbers18:32 Ido mam ibwokete aronis kanuke, kidaut adakakin naitelekarit ajokis kotomake: sirikitisiloto iboro lukalaunak luka idwe luka Isirael, kinyeis atwakare.’”"
Numbers19:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron atiar,"
Numbers19:2 “Na ŋes aicorakinet naka ekisil naeeoraki EJAKAIT ebe, Kinera kidwe luka Isirael, koinut jo ataok nakarenan naemamei akemer, komam eŋwalit, namam eut edakit aiookot:"
Numbers19:3 Iinakinete ŋes Eleasar esasedoti, itolomari ŋes kina kiidukurun, koarai kakonyeneke:"
Numbers19:4 Idomakini Eleasar esasedoti ekebokorit toma aokotoke, ebwatanakini aokotoke kiŋaren kewema loka airiamunun irwan akanykaarei:"
Numbers19:5 Ieweikinio ataok kakonyeneke; emukuleke, akirinike, aokotoke, ka ikijitike da, ieweikinio:"
Numbers19:6 Elemuni esasedoti akitoi naka eres, ka esop, ka eusi loeren, kosodi acakakin akim naicweere ataok,"
Numbers19:7 Kosodi do esasedoti ailot ikenapen, ka ailoŋ akekuan kakip, akaulo kanun eboŋuni oidukurun, ido esali esasedoti erai lomam elai aitodol eboŋ."
Numbers19:8 Ido ŋol loecwei ataok ilosi ikenapen kakip, ka ailoŋ da akekuan kakip, esali erai lomam elai aitodol eboŋ,"
Numbers19:9 Etukonokini etuŋanan loelai ekurwon loka ataok, kosodi abukokin aibois naelai kokina kiidukurun, idario ŋes kanuka atukot naka idwe luka Isirael araun akipi nuitesegaarete: erai ainakinet naka adiakaret."
Numbers19:10 Ilosi ŋol loetukonokini ekurwon loka ataok inapeneke, esali da erai lomam elai aitodol eboŋ: eraun ekisil mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael ka imoit yeniboienenei kamakee ikar kere,"
Numbers19:11 Yenetirori akuan naka yenikatwan kere eraun yenimam elai adaun apaarasia akanykaarei:
Numbers19:12 Italaun nipeŋin kanen kapaaran nakiwuniet, ido kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei eraun yenelai: konye arai mam italauna kapaaran nakiwuniet, ŋes atemar mam eraun yenelai kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei."
Numbers19:13 Ŋmitunanan yenetirori akuan nakatwan naka ituŋanan yenetwanit, komam italauni akekuan, etisilian nm ewema lokalaunan loka EJAKAIT; ido egelario ituŋanan ŋin koIsirael: naarai mam ŋes aponi kobwatakinai akipi nuitesegaarete, eraun yenimam elai; esalakini amamus ailake mamake."
Numbers19:14 Lo ŋes ekisil arai ketwana ituŋanan kotoma owema; nlnidiopet yenelomari owema ŋol, ka ŋinidiopet yenejai toma owema eraun yenimam elai apaarasia akanykaarei."
Numbers19:15 Ŋinimot da namam erapap, naemamei arapetait kaitukuke, erai namam elai."
Numbers19:16 Ido ninituŋanan yenejai ais yenetirori ituŋanan yenearitai kekilen, arai akuan nakatwan, arai akoit naka ituŋanan arai ates, eraun yenimam elai apaarasia akanykaarei,"
Numbers19:17 Ŋul lumam elaete elemunete ekurwon loicweere ainakinet naka adiakaret, ka akipi nueleleete ibwaikinio kere toma amot:"
Numbers19:18 Elemuni ituŋanan yenelai esop, idomakini toma akipi ŋun, kosodi abwatakin owema, ka amoti kere, ka iruna luajaas nen: ebwatakini da nin yenatirorit akoit, arai yenearitai, arai yenikatwan, arai ates:"
Numbers19:19 Ebwatakini yenelai yenimam elai kapaaran nakiwuniet, kapaaran da nakikanyetekaarei: kapaaran da nakikanyetekaarei italauni ŋes; ilosi ikenapen, iloŋi ilopet kakip, eraun yenelai eboŋ."
Numbers19:20 Konye ituŋanan yenimam elai, komam italauni akekuan, egelario ituŋanan ŋin kokidin kekodet, naarai etisilian nin aibois nakalaunan naka EJAKAIT: naarai mam ŋes ebwatakinitai akipi nuitesegaarete; erai yenimam elai,"
Numbers19:21 Eraun ekisil lomam edaun kamakec. Ŋin yenikabwatan akipi nuitesegaarete ilosi ikenapen; nin yenetirori akipi nuitesegaarete eraun yenimam elai aitodol eboŋ.
Numbers19:22 Ŋinibore yenetirori yenimam elai eraun nin da yenimam elai; ŋinituŋanan yenetirori nin eraun yenimam elai aitodol eboŋ.”
Numbers20:1 Kodoloto idwe luka Isirael, ekodet kere, amodiŋ naka Sin kolap losodit: kiboikinos ituŋa Kades; kotwanik Miriam nen, kidaikinai da nen."
Numbers20:2 Komamikis ekodet akip: kotukonokinos nepepe aluikin Musa ka Aaron,"
Numbers20:3 Kitoŋolopata ituŋa Musa, kobalas ebe, “Tiejok arai katwakito naatwakiata iinaeanakosi kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT!"
Numbers20:4 Kanukinyo iyauniata atukot naka EJAKAIT amodiŋ na, atwanikin ne, isio ka ibarenekosi da?"
Numbers20:5 Kanukinyo kitolomuniata sio koMisiri, ayaun sio aibois na nakaronon? emameete aibois na ikinyom, karaida itinin, karaida imusabibun, karaida akamamagan; emameete da adisikip numatan.”"
Numbers20:6 Konyoutu Musa ka Aaron kakonyen nuka ekodet kolototo okek loka ewema loka airiamunun, kibiroros ebuburia: kitaanyikin kes aibuses naka EJAKAIT,"
Numbers20:7 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers20:8 “Kolem ebela, kotukok ekodet, ijo ka Aaron onacekon, kinerata yesi katiiba kakonyenekee, ebe koinak akekipi; iinuni do kes akipi nuelomunete katiiba: kwaŋin iinakini ekodet ka ibarenekee aimat.”"
Numbers20:9 Kolem Musa ebela kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape kicorakinia."
Numbers20:10 Kotukokis Musa ka Aaron ekodet kakonyen nuka atiiba, kotema kes atiar, “Aso kopuputu, yes lukepali; kitolomuni isio akipi kati iba kana kanukus?”"
Numbers20:11 Kikeu Musa akekan, kinom atiiba kekebela irwan aarei; kolomut akipi nuipu, komat ekodet ka ikecebaren,"
Numbers20:12 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron ebe, “Naarai mam ipotu kiyuut eoŋ, aitalaun eoŋ kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael, kanuka ŋun mam yes itolomarete ekodet lo toma akwap naainak kes.”"
Numbers20:13 Ŋun kes akipi nuka Meriba; naarai apotu idwe luka Isirael kitonolopata EJAKAIT, kitodik akelaunit kotomakec."
Numbers20:14 Kijuka Musa ikiyakia anyoun koKades alosit mama ejai ekabaka loka Edom atiar, “Ebala kwanata onaeekon Isirael ebe, Ŋeni aitaaritoi kere naapotu kajaunotor:"
Numbers20:15 Kwape ejesarotor lukapapaakosi toma Misiri, keboioto kotoma Misiri ikar luipu; kiticanata da Imisirian sio ka lukapapaakosi;"
Numbers20:16 Ido nakimonyia mama ejai EJAKAIT, abu kopup ekosiporoto, kijuk emalaika, kitolom sio koMisiri: ido ko any, kijai toma Kades, ere loejai osanc loka eikorukon:"
Numbers20:17 Kenaiijait, koeamak ketoroto toma akwapukon: mam sio kitori toma omanikoria karaida omanikoria luka emusabibu, ido mam kimasi akipi nuka atanin: kideri erot loka eka baka, mam kipaari akan nakoteten karaida akan nakokediany, aitodol nekituboror koikorukon.”"
Numbers20:18 Kotema Edom ŋes atiar, “Mam itori tomaka, kenye asurokin jo kekilen.”"
Numbers20:19 Kotemasi idwe luka Isirael atiar, “Kideri isio erot lokapolon: arai kiimat isio akonikipi, eoŋ ka ibareneka, kataeakini jo etiaiakee: koeamakinai eoŋ ketor kakejeneka, komam eswamai ieebore kere.”"
Numbers20:20 Kotema atiar, “Mam itori.” Kolom Edom ka ituŋa luipu asurokin ŋes kakan nakagogoŋ,"
Numbers20:21 Kimik kwaŋin Edom Isirael aitor oikoruke: kanuka ŋun kibelokin Isirael anyoun kaneajai ŋesi.
Numbers20:22 Kolototo anyoun koKades: kodoloto idwe luka Isirael, ekodet kere, moru Kor."
Numbers20:23 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron komoru Kor, kariri naka eikor loka akwap naka Edom atiar,"
Numbers20:24 “Eyanaario Aaron mama ejaas iketuŋa: naarai mam elomari toma akwap naainak idwe luka Isirael, naarai ipotu kipaliikis akakirot kakipi nuka Meriba."
Numbers20:25 Aso koyana Aaron ka Eleasar okokuke, kitodoka kes moru Kor:"
Numbers20:26 Kolae inapen luka Aaron, kitanap kes Eleasar okokuke: eyanaario Aaron mama ejaas iketuŋa, etwanikini nina.”"
Numbers20:27 Kiswama Musa kwape kicorakinia ŋes EJAKAIT: kodokasi moru Kor kakonyen nuka ekodet kere,"
Numbers20:28 Kolaca Musa inapen luka Aaron, kitanap Eleasar okokuke; kotwanik Aaron nen kuju moru: kodokut Musa ka Eleasar komoru."
Numbers20:29 Keanyu ekodet kere ebe atwana Aaron, kibworoto lukokek loka Isirael Aaron apaarasia akaisauni."
Numbers21:1 Kiira Ekanaanit, ekabaka loka Arad, loeboienenei kari naka eŋalakimak, ebe ebunit Isirael korot loka Atarim; kitiji Isirael, konata ice kakesi."
Numbers21:2 Kiyapo Isirael aiyaposit mama ejai EJAKAIT, kobala ebe, “Arai kiijaik ituŋa lu akanika, amudiari cut ireriakec.”"
Numbers21:3 Kopup EJAKAIT eporoto loka Isirael, kijaik Ikanaanin; komudiasi kes cut ka ireriakee: komaikinai aibois Koruma."
Numbers21:4 Konyout komoru Kor koloto korot loka Aŋolol Nakarenan aiririar akwap naka Edom: kosorianata itauon luka ituŋa kanuka erot.
Numbers21:5 Kinerata ituŋa erono mama ejai Edeke ka Musa, ebe, “Kanuk inyo kitonyounio sio koMisiri atwanikin amodiŋ? naarai emameete inyamat, emameete da akip: apas akosiiiar ainyam luebenen.”"
Numbers21:6 Kijukak EJAKAIT imunwo luka akim otuŋa, kotodotodoto ituŋa: kotwaka ituŋa luipu luka Isirael."
Numbers21:7 Kopotu ituŋa mama ejai Musa, kobalas ebe, “Kidiaka isio, naarai kipou kenera erono mama ejai EJAKAIT ka jo da; kilip EJAKAIT, kolema imunwo kamakosi.” Kilipak Musa ituŋa."
Numbers21:8 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Kosub emun loka akim, kibwaik kuju okitoi: kosodi kanen nin yenetodio, naeanyunia, eiari.”"
Numbers21:9 Kosub Musa emun loka aisinit, kibwaik kuju okitoi: kosodi kanen, arai etodit emun ituŋanan kere, naesesenia emun loka aisinit, koiari,"
Numbers21:10 Kolototo idwe luka Isirael, kidukuroto Obot."
Numbers21:11 Kolototo anyoun koObot, kidukuroto Iyeabarim, amodiŋ naitei Moab, kari nakokide,"
Numbers21:12 Kolototo anyoun kanen, kidukuroto aditot naka Sered."
Numbers21:13 Kolototo anyoun kanen, kidukuroto juwai naka Arunon, naejai amodiŋ, naelomunit koikor loka Imorain: naarai Arunon ŋes eikor Ioka Moab, kidin Moab ka Imorain."
Numbers21:14 Ŋes ebakare kotoma oitabo loka Ŋiisio luka EJAKAIT ebe, “Bakeb kotoma Supa, Ka aditon nuka Arunon,"
Numbers21:15 Aijulul naka aditon Naijululuor aibois naka Ar, Egoŋakina da oikor loka Moab.”"
Numbers21:16 Konyout kanen, kolototo Beer: nin ŋes atan naabala EJAKAIT Musa ebe, “Kotukok ituija, kainak kes akipi.”"
Numbers21:17 Kosodi koyeik Isirael ekosio lo: Kibulubul, wu atan; koyeikis yesi ŋes:"
Numbers21:18 Atan naabokete ikapolok, Naawadete ikasianak luka ituŋa, Kebela loka ajakanut, ka amorokinikec.” Konyout kamodiŋ kolototo Matana:"
Numbers21:19 Konyout koMatana kodoloto Nakaliel: konyout koNakaliel kodoloto Bamot:
Numbers21:20 Konyout koBamot kodoloto aditot naejai omanikor loka Moab, kiton kuju naka Pisiga, naitei amodiŋ."
Numbers21:21 Kijuka Isirael ikiyakia mama ejai Sikon ekabaka loka Imorain, kobala ebe,"
Numbers21:22 “Koeamakinai ketor akwapukon: mam kipaari omanikoria karaida omanikoria luka emusabibu; mam kimasi akipi nuka atanin: kideri erot loka ekabaka, aitodol nekituboror koikorukon.”"
Numbers21:23 Mam Sikon abu kisiik Isirael aitor toma oikorunoke: konye kotukok Sikon ituŋake kere, koloma asurokin Isirael toma amodiŋ, kodol Yakas; kitiji Isirael."
Numbers21:24 Kodany Isirael ŋes kakwanis naka ekileŋ, kirum akekwap anyoun koArunon aitodol Yabok, aitodol odwe luka Amon: naarai agogoŋ eikor loka idwe luka Amon."
Numbers21:25 Kirum Isirael ireria ŋul kere: kiboikin Isirael oreria kere luka Imorain, toma Kesibon, ka ireriake kere."
Numbers21:26 Naarai arai Kesibon ere loka Sikon ekabaka loka Imorain, loabu kitiji ekabaka loka Moab losek, kodema kotoma akanike akekwap kere, kiton Arunon."
Numbers21:27 Ŋes ineratatar luineras kawaragasia ebe, “Koporu yes Kesibon, Kodukoi ere loka Sikon, kiticatai da;"
Numbers21:28 Naarai alom akim koKesibon, Aŋajepa nuka akim kotoma ore loka Sikon: Anyam Ar loka Moab, Ŋaka luka aiboisio nuieelelete nuka Arunon,"
Numbers21:29 Wu okwe, ijo Moab! Iolio, wu ituŋa luka Cemos: akoraki odweke araut lukakerak, ka adweke da araut nunatan, Mama ejai Sikon ekabaka loka Imorain,"
Numbers21:30 Kigum kes; Aolio Kesibon aitodol Dibon, Kitisil kiton Nopa, Naedoli Medeba.”"
Numbers21:31 Kwaŋin kiboikin Isirael toma akwap naka Imorain.
Numbers21:32 Kiyakia Musa airot Yaser, kosodete airum ireriakee, kireneasi Imorain luajaas nen."
Numbers21:33 Kibelokinos kodokasi korot loka Basan: kolom Og ekabaka loka Basan asurokin kes, ŋes ka iketuŋa kere, ejie kakes kolsderei."
Numbers21:34 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Sirikiyoŋ ŋes: naarai akorak ŋes toma akanikon, ka iketuŋa kere, ka akekwap da; iswamakini ŋes kwape ibu kiswamakinia Sikon ekabaka loka Imorain, lueboienenete koKesibon.”"
Numbers21:35 Kwaŋin kodanyata ŋes, ka odweke, ka iketuŋa kere, mam apotu kitasalata karaida idiopet: kirumata akekwap."
Numbers22:1 Koloto idwe luka Isirael, kidukuroto apuutona nuka Moab okekwa loka Yorodan ko Yeriko."
Numbers22:2 Koany Balak okoku loka Sipor kere nukiswamakin Isirael Imorain.
Numbers22:3 Kokurianar Moab noi ituŋa, naarai epu: koiurunun Moab kanuka idwe luka Isirael."
Numbers22:4 Kobala Moab imakio luka Midian ebe, “Natikwana elosi etuŋat lo ameor eut kere lukirimoritos, kwape ikoeoria emoŋ eduan lokorony.” Balak da okoku loka Sipor ŋes arai ekabaka loka Moab kapaarasia kanun."
Numbers22:5 Kijuka ikiyakia mama ejai Balaam okoku loka Beor, Pesor, loiririkina Ecor, kakwap naka idwe luka iketuŋa, anyaraun ŋes ebe, “Koany, ejaas ituŋa lueponito koMisiri: koany, egarito akwap, kes da katereikina eoŋ:"
Numbers22:6 Aso, kenainait, kobia, kikenokinai ituŋa lu; naarai egogoŋ kesi adepar eoŋ, elemuni kepiko: kasodete aidany, kereŋea kakwap: naarai ajeni ebe yenilipakini ijo arereŋ isirerenio, ido yenikeni ijo ikenio.”"
Numbers22:7 Kolototo imakio luka Moab ka imakio luka Midian ekapitos ainakineta nuka aidwar; kopotu mama ejai Balaam, kolimokis ŋes akiro nuka Balak."
Numbers22:8 Kotema kes atiar, “Koperoto ne akuare na, kenyakakini eoŋ da yes kwape kalimokinia EJAKAIT.” Kiboikinos lukapolok luka Moab ore loka Balaam."
Numbers22:9 Kobu Edeke neejai Balaam, kotema atiar, “Lukaŋai ituŋa lu luijaas kajo?”"
Numbers22:10 Kotema Balaam Edeke atiar, “Balak, okoku loka Sipor, ekabaka laka Moab, ŋes keyakikinit, ebe,"
Numbers22:11 ‘Koany, ituŋa luapote koMisiri egarito akwap: kobia cabo kikenokinai; elemuni apedori ejie kakes, kerenea.’”"
Numbers22:12 Kotema Edeke Balaam atiar, “Sirikiloto kakes; sirikiken ituŋa: naarai isirerenitai.’"
Numbers22:13 Konyou Balaam tupuruc, kolimok lukapolok luka Balak ebe, “Koloto ma yesi bukus: naarai aŋer EJAKAIT acamakin eoŋ alosit kayes.”"
Numbers22:14 Konyout lukapolok luka Moab, koloto mama ejai Balak, kotemasi atiar, “Aŋer Balaam aupun kasio.”"
Numbers22:15 Kiyatak Balak bobo aijukar lukapolok, luitelekarito kwi aipues, ka luitelekarito da kapolou."
Numbers22:16 Kopotu mama ejai Balaam, kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Inera kwanata Balak okoku loka Sipor, ebe, ‘Kinye adiokirot aitikokin jo abunore neajai eoŋ, kenainait."
Numbers22:17 Naarai ketopoloori eoŋ jo koraun lokaibuses noi, kere da nukilimokini eoŋ eswamai: aso bia, kenainair, kikenokinai ituŋa lu.’’’"
Numbers22:18 Koboŋok Balaam kotema ikejaanakinak luka Balak atiar, “Karaida kainaki Balak eketogo ileleba epuesa ka esabu, mam apedori adepar akirot naka EJAKAIT Ekadeke, aiŋoŋar arai aiyatakin."
Numbers22:19 Aso ber, kenainaitos, koperoto yes da ne akuare na, tetere ajenuni nuiyatakini EJAKAIT alimokin eoŋ.”"
Numbers22:20 Kobu Edeke neejai Balaam kuare, kotema ŋes atiar, “Arai eponitos ituŋa ŋul anyarit jo, konyou, koloto kakes, konye akirot ban nakalimokini jo, nipenin iswamai.”"
Numbers22:21 Konyou Balaam tupuruc, kopesik aibwanenis asigiriake, koloto nepepe kalukapolok luka Moab."
Numbers22:22 Kinep anyunyura naka Edeke kanu alosio: kobwo emalaika loka EJAKAIT korot asurokin ŋes. Ido kibwanenite asigiriake, koupasi kikekeiaanakinak iarei."
Numbers22:23 Koany asigiria emalaika loka EJAKAIT ebwoi korot, ka ekekileŋ da eutuno kakanike; kinac asigiria kopaa ais: kocar Balaam asigiria ainyakun orot."
Numbers22:24 Kosodi kobwo emalaika loka EJAKAIT korot loedidin loejai kidin kimanikoria luka emusabibu, koiai abwas epuai ka epuai."
Numbers22:25 Koany asigiria emalaika loka EJAKAIT, koridakin arwatat, kogirisor akeju naka Balaam karwatat: koear ŋes bobo,"
Numbers22:26 Kikunya emalaika loka EJAKAIT nediokasilon, kobwo korot loedidin, neamamei apak naibelokinor teten karaida kediany."
Numbers22:27 Koany asigiria emalaika loka EJAKAIT, koper kwap ka Balaam; kinep anyunyura naka Balaam, kocar asigiria kekebela."
Numbers22:28 Kitoona EJAKAIT aituk naka asigiria, kotema Balaam atiar, “Kekonak bo eoŋ jo ai, tape kicaracarai eoŋ aatenak nun auni?”"
Numbers22:29 Kobala Balaam asigiria ebe, “Naarai kitakadik: arai kiija eoŋ kekilen akanika, ti kwana kaar jo.”"
Numbers22:30 Kotema asigiria Balaam atiar, “Mere eoŋ akonisigiria, naibwanen ijo kaiiarakon kere aitodol lolo? Etapit tope eoŋ aikonanakin jo kwaŋin?” Kobala ebe, “Mam.”"
Numbers22:31 Kosodi kitwekeny EJAKAIT akonye nuka Balaam, koany emalaika loka EJAKAIT ebwoi korot, ka ekekileŋ eutuno kakanike: kitulur akekou, kibiror ebuburia,"
Numbers22:32 Kobala emalaika loka EJAKAIT ebe, “Kanukinyo icaracaraa akonisigiria aatenak ŋun auni? Koany, alom asurokin jo, naarai epagal akonilosit kakonyeneka:"
Numbers22:33 Kaanyu asigiria eoŋ, abu kibelokin kakonyeneka aatenak ŋun auni: arai kemam ibelokino kamaka, abeit kwana tikaar jo, tiketajar ŋes.”"
Numbers22:34 Kobala Balaam emalaika loka EJAKAIT ebe, “Adiaka eoŋ: naarai mam ajeni ebe ibwoi ijo korot asurokin eoŋ: asa kwana, arai kitakadikinit jo, aboŋori do,”"
Numbers22:35 Kotema emalaika loka EJAKAIT Balaam atiar, “Kolot kituna: konye akirot bon nakalimokini jo, nipenin inera.” Kosodi koloto Balaam kalukapolok luka Balak."
Numbers22:36 Kepupu Balak ebe abu Balaam, koloma airiamun kaŋes ore loka Moab, loejai oikor loka Arunon, loejai osaŋe loka eikor."
Numbers22:37 Kobala Balak Balaam ebe, “Mam abu keyakikinite kaimaimait anyaraun jo? Kanukinyo mam ibu kobunio mamaka? Mam kereka apedori eoŋ aitopoloor jo koraun lokaibuses?”"
Numbers22:38 Kobala Balaam Balak ebe, “Koany, abu neijai: ejai kwana eoŋ apedor kere einer adiokirot? Akirot naibwaikini Edeke aitukuka, nipenin alimuni.”"
Numbers22:39 Kolototo Balaam ka Balak, kodolo Kiriatkusot,"
Numbers22:40 Koinak Balak asuban nuka imoŋin ka imerekekin, kijukak da Balaam, ka ikapolok luajaas kaŋes."
Numbers22:41 Kosodi kanen kiwala akwap, koyana Balak Balaam, kitodoka ŋes aiboisio nuiceleleete nuka Baal, kosesen kanen neasaŋitos ituŋa kere."
Numbers23:1 Kotema Balaam Balak atiar, “Kodukokinai ne itemwan ikanykaarei, kitemonokinai da ne imoŋin ikanykaarei, ka imerekekin ikany kaarei.”"
Numbers23:2 Kiswama Balak da kwape abalar Balaam; koinakis Balak ka Balaam kanolitem emoŋ ka emerekek,"
Numbers23:3 Kotema Balaam Balak atiar, “Kobwo ijo eiduny kainakinetekon naicweio, eoŋ da alosi; elemuni ebuni EJAKAIT airiamun keoŋ; nuketodikin eoŋ kere, kalimokini jo.” Kodoka ŋesi kuiu neelapat."
Numbers23:4 Kiriamunos Edeke ka Balaam: kotema ŋesi atiar, “Etcmonok itemwan ikanykaarei, ainak kanolitcm emoŋ ka emerekek.”"
Numbers23:5 Kibwaik EJAKAIT akirot toma aituk naka Balaam, kotema atiar, “Kobono neejai Balak, kiner kwaŋin.”"
Numbers23:6 Koboŋo neejai, ido koany, abwoi eiduny kainakincteke naicweio, ŋes ka ikapolok kere luka Moab."
Numbers23:7 Kiner akewaraga ebe, “Kayau eoŋ Balak anyoun koAram, Ekabaka loka Moab anyoun koronan lukokidc: Bia, kikenokinai Yakob, Bia, koluik Isirael."
Numbers23:8 Ekeni eoŋ biai lomam Edeke ikenit? Ido aluikini eoŋ biai lomam Edeke eluikinit?
Numbers23:9 Naarai aanyuni ŋes kaidi naka atiiban, Ido eteluori ŋes koukon: Koany, kes ituŋa luibojete bonik, Mam imarakinio toma atekerin."
Numbers23:10 Iŋai epedori aimar apua naka Yakob, Atai aimar atutubet nakiwononet naka Isirael? Mere katwana kwape ekadoliton, Awasiaka do koputokinos kanake!”"
Numbers23:11 Kotema Balak Balaam atiar, “Anyoika nu nukiswamak? Abu kayau jo aiken lukasurupoka, ido koany, ilipak eut kes arereŋ.”"
Numbers23:12 Koboŋok ebe, “Mam tikebusakinit acoit einer nun nuibwaikini EJAKAIT aitukuka?”"
Numbers23:13 Kotema Balak ŋes atiar, “Kenainait, kauparos aibois ace, naipedoria aanyun kes; ianyuni esanekec bon, komam ianyuni kes kere; kikenok eoŋ kes kaŋina.”"
Numbers23:14 Koyana ŋes omanikor loka Sopim, aidi naka Pisiga, koduk itemwan ikanykaarei, koinak kanolitem emoŋ ka emerekek."
Numbers23:15 Kotema ŋesi Balak atiar, “Kobwo kane eiduny kainakinetekon naicweio, keriamunos ber eoŋ ka EJAKAIT kalaije.”"
Numbers23:16 Kiriamunos EJAKAIT ka Balaam, kibwaik akirot toma aitukuke, kotema atiar, “Kobono neejai Balak, kiner kwaŋin.”"
Numbers23:17 Kobu mama ejai, ido koany, abwoi eiduny kainakineteke naicweio, ka ikapolok luka Moab nepepe kaŋes, Kotema Balak ŋes atiar, “Atema bo EJAKAIT ai?”"
Numbers23:18 Kiner akewaraga ebe, “Konyou, Balak, kiira, Kopupunoi, ijo okoku loka Sipor:"
Numbers23:19 Mam Edeke erai etuŋanan, loiŋalai; Mam da erai okoku loka etuŋanan loitoronikin: Alimu ŋesi, komam kereka iswamai? Arai ener ŋesi, komam kereka itodoli?"
Numbers23:20 Koany, kecorakin ailipakin arereŋ; Esireren, mam eoŋ apedori aijulakin."
Numbers23:21 Mam ŋes eanyunit numam adolit kotoma Yakob, Karaida aanyunit apaarit kotoma Isirael: Ejai EJAKAIT Ekedeke kaŋes, Ka ekare loka ekabaka ejai mamakec."
Numbers23:22 Kitolom kes Edeke koMisiri; Ejaas kagogon kwape naka ekosobwan.
Numbers23:23 Abeit emamei ecudet kaneejai Yakob, Karaida adwaranut kaneejai Isirael: Kwana inereneneo nuka Yakob ka nuka Isirael da, ebe, ‘Eswama ca ma Edeke!’"
Numbers23:24 Koany, enyounete ituŋa bala aŋatuny, Edakun bon bala eŋatuny: Mam eperi aitodol neenyamia imejaunake, Ka aimat aokot nuka luearitai.”"
Numbers23:25 Kotema Balak Balaam atiar, “Sirikiken kes nepetai da, karaida ailipakini kes adioreren.”"
Numbers23:26 Konye Koboŋok Balaam Balak ebe, “Mam abu kalimok jo ebe, ‘Kere nuinera EJAKAIT, nupeŋun kebusakinit aswam?’ ”"
Numbers23:27 Kotema Balak Balaam atiar, “Aso bia, kayana jo aibois ace; elemuni kitojok Edeke jo aikenokin eoŋ kes kaŋina.”"
Numbers23:28 Koyana Balak Balaam aidi naka Peor, neitei amodiŋ,"
Numbers23:29 Kotema Balaam Balak atiar, “Kodukokinai itemwan ikanykaarei, kitemonok kane imoŋin ikanykaatei ka imerekekin ikanykaarei.”"
Numbers23:30 Kiswama Balak kwape abalar Balaam, koinak kaŋolitem emoŋ ka emerekek."
Numbers24:1 Keanyu Balaam ebe etoiokit EJAKAIT aisireren Isirael, mam abu kolot, kwape sek, airiamun kaieudeta, konye kiteteo akekonyen amodiŋ."
Numbers24:2 Kiteluo Balaam akekonyen, koany Isirael iboiete kwape ajaatar atekerinikee; kobunok ŋes emoyo loka EJAKAIT."
Numbers24:3 Kiner akewaraga ebe, “Inera Balaam okoku loka Beor, lnera da etuŋanan loetumudakitai akekonye,"
Numbers24:4 Inera loepupi akiro nuka Edeke, Loeanyuni etapo Ioka Lokapedor kere, Ibirun, kokwenyete akekonye, ebe,"
Numbers24:5 Ejokuka ca ma iwemanakon, wu Yakob, Iwemanakon lukalaunak, wu Isirael!"
Numbers24:6 Elalak bala aditono, Kwape kamanan nuka ariri naka ecor, Kwape iluan luera EJAKAIT, Kwape iresia kariri naka akipi."
Numbers24:7 Eleleete akip kamotike, Ejaununos ikinyomoke toma akipi nuipu, Eojaar ekekabaka adepar Agag, Itopoloorio da akejakanut."
Numbers24:8 Kitolom ŋes Edeke koMisiri; Ejaas kagogon kwape naka ekosobwan: Enyami atekerin nuka lukasurupoke, Emunyumunyei akeeekojo. Icumi kes kimaliake."
Numbers24:9 Abu kodipidipakin, koper bala eŋatuny, Bala aŋatuny; iŋai itonyouni ŋes? Isirereŋio yenikilipakini jo arereŋ, Ilamakinio yenikilamakini jo.”"
Numbers24:10 Kinep anyunyura naka Balak aluikin Balaam, kibapak akekanin: kolimok Balak Balaam atiar, “Abu kanyarau jo aikenokin lukasurupoka, ido koany, ilipak kes arereŋ cut irwan nu auni,"
Numbers24:11 Aso do, koker aiboisikon: enerunit aitopoloor jo koraun lokaibuses; konye koany, kitikok EJAKAIT jo adumun aibuses.”"
Numbers24:12 Kotema Balaam Balak atiar, “Mam eoŋ abu kalimok ikonikiyakia da luibu kijukak ebe,"
Numbers24:13 ‘Karaida kainaki Balak eketogo ileleba epuesa ka esabu, mam apedori adepar akirot naka EJAKAIT, aswam nuejok arai nueroko nuaomit eoŋ eloper; nupeinera EJAKAIT, nupeŋun eneri eoŋ da’?"
Numbers24:14 Koany, alosi kwana mama ejaas ituŋaka: bia, kalimok jo nuepote ituŋa ŋu! aiswamakin ikonituŋa kapaarasia nukakonyen.”"
Numbers24:15 Kiner akewaraga ebe, “Inera Balaam okoku loka Beor ebe, Inera da etuŋanan loetumudakitai akekonye:"
Numbers24:16 Inera loepupi akiro nuka Edeke, Loejeni da aijen naka Loejai kuju kakuj; Loeanyuni etapo loka Lokapedor kere, Ibirun, kokwenyete akekonye, ebe:"
Numbers24:17 Etei ŋes, konye mere kwana: Aseseni ŋes, konye mere kodie: Elomuni aacerit kotoma Yakob, Ikeuni ebela loka ajakanut koIsirael, Iposi agorieik nuka Moab apedor, Ebili da odwe kere luka eŋuŋet."
Numbers24:18 Eraun Edom nake, Ka Seir da eraun nake, luaraas lukasurupoke; Kiswamai Isirael nukagogon,"
Numbers24:19 Kotoma Yakob ŋes elomunia ekayaiton, Emudiari da luideuna kore.”"
Numbers24:20 Kite Amalek, kiner akewaraga ebe, “Kerai Amalek nasodit naka atekerin; Konye esaneke lokakonyen emudiario.”"
Numbers24:21 Kite da Ekenit, kiner akewaraga ebe, “Erai aibois naiboionono ijo naegogon, Ecinakina akaikon atiiba."
Numbers24:22 Kwabo icweio Kain Aitodol nakinataria Asur jo.”
Numbers24:23 Kiner akewaraga ebe, “Wu okwe, iŋai eiari naiswamaa Edeke ŋun?"
Numbers24:24 Konye epote imeerin kariri naka Kitim, Epote aitican Asur, ka aitican da Eber, Ŋes da emudiario.”"
Numbers24:25 Konyou Balaam, koloto kobono aiboisike: kolot Balak da."
Numbers25:1 Kiboikin Isirael Sitim, kogeut ituŋa aelo kapesur nuka Moab:"
Numbers25:2 Naarai apotu kiworosi ituŋa asuban nuka idekesiokec, konyamata innja, kokukonokinos idekesiokec,"
Numbers25:3 Kimorikikin Isirael ka Baal-peor: kinep anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin Isirael.
Numbers25:4 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ebe, “Koyana iiaka kere luka ituŋa, komiedak kes EJAKAIT kakoloŋ, tetere ibelokin anyunyura naededen naka EJAKAIT anyoun koIsirael.”"
Numbers25:5 Kotema Musa ikatubok luka Isirael atiar, “Koarata yesi ŋinituŋanan iketuŋa luemorikikinos ka Baal-peor.”"
Numbers25:6 Ido koany, kobu ediopet kodwe luka Isirael koyau mama ajaas iinacanake aberu naMidianit kakonyen nuka Musa, ido kakonyen nuka ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael, emonyete kesi kokek loka ewema loka airiamunun."
Numbers25:7 Nakeanyunia Pinekas, okoku loka Eleasar, okoku loka Aaron esasedoti, konyou kokidin kekodet, kitin akwara kakanike:"
Numbers25:8 Kotupak etuŋanan ŋol loka Isirael owema, kicum kes iarei kere aipelor, etuŋanan loka Isirael, ka aberu da akoikike. Kwaŋin kitananai atular kodwe luka Isirael."
Numbers25:9 Ŋul da luapotu korwaka kanuka atular emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luonon,"
Numbers25:10 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers25:11 “Ebeloki Pinekas, okoku loka Eleasar, okoku loka Aaron esasedoti, akanyunyura anyoun kodwe luka Isirael, naarai ekokotiki kes kekakokote, kenye amudiar idwe luka Isirael kokokoteka."
Numbers25:12 Kanuka ŋun kolimok ebe, ‘Koany, ainakini ŋes aitutuketeka naka ainapakin:"
Numbers25:13 Ejaun mamake, ido mama ejai aurike naetupakini ŋes, aitutuket naka esasedotene lomam enaŋi; naarai abu kikokotik kanuka Ekedeke, koluc da idwe luka Isirael.’”"
Numbers25:14 Ekiror da loka etuŋanan loka Isiraelloaario, loaario kaberu naMidianit, ŋes Simiri, okoku loka Salu, ekapolon loka ekal loka lukapapaakec luka Isimeonin."
Numbers25:15 Ekiror da loka aberu naMidianit naario, ŋes Kosibi, akoku naka Sur; arai ŋesi ekapolon loka ituŋa luka ekal loka lukapapaakec kotoma Midian."
Numbers25:16 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers25:17 “Kitiji Imidianin kodany kes:
Numbers25:18 Naarai kitiiiete yes kiboteikec, lukijodooriata yes kotoma akiro nuka Peor, ka akiro nuka Kosibi akoku naka ekapolon loka Midian, kinacikec, naaario kapaaran naka atular kakiro nuka Peor.”"
Numbers26:1 Kosodi akaulo katular kotema EJAKAIT Musa ka Eleasar okoku loka Aaron esasedoti, atiar,"
Numbers26:2 “Kimar etiai loka ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, kere luepedorete alosit ojie koIsirael.”"
Numbers26:3 Kinerata Musa ka Eleasar esasedoti kakes kapuuton naka Moab kariri naka Yorodan ko Yeriko, ebe,"
Numbers26:4 “Kimarata etiai loka ituŋa, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito”; kwape kieorakinia EJAKAIT Musa ka idwe luka Isirael luanyounete kakwap nako Misiri."
Numbers26:5 Reuben, ekiyai loka Isirael: odwe luka Reuben: Kanok, ekek loka Ikanokin: Palu, ekek loka Ipaluin:"
Numbers26:6 Kesuron, ekek loka Ikesuronin: Karami, ekek loka Ikaramin,"
Numbers26:7 Ŋul kes ikekia luka Ireubenin: ŋul Iuaponi kimarai kakesi emwaasi ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka luuni, ka akwat akanykaarei ka akaisauni."
Numbers26:8 Odwe luka Palu; Eliab.
Numbers26:9 Odwe luka Eliab; Nemuel, ka Datan, ka Abiram. Ŋupenul kes Datan ka Abiram, luanyaraunio kokodety luetepegete Musa ka Aaron nepepe ka Kora, naetepegeata EJAKAIT:"
Numbers26:10 Koona akwap akeituk, kiliko kes nepepe ka Kora, naketwania erioŋet ŋol; kapak naanyamia akim ituŋa akwat aarei ka akaisakany, koraut aanyunet."
Numbers26:11 Konye mam odwe luka Kora anotu kotwaka.
Numbers26:12 Odwe luka Simeon kwape ajaatar ikekiakee: Nemuel, ekek loka Incmuelin; Yamin, ekek loka Iyaminin; Yakin, ekek loka Iyakinin:"
Numbers26:13 Sera, ekek loka Iserakin: Saul, ekek loka Isaulin."
Numbers26:14 Ŋul kes ikekia luka Isimeonin, ilukumin akaisaarei ka luarei, ka akwat aarei."
Numbers26:15 Odwe luka Gad kwape ajaatar ikekiakec: Sepon, ekek loka Iseponin: Kagi, ekek loka Ikagin; Suni, ekek loka Isunin:"
Numbers26:16 Osuni, ekek loka Ikosunin: Eri, ekek loka Ierin:"
Numbers26:17 Arod, ekek loka Irodain: Areli, ekek loka Irelain:"
Numbers26:18 Ŋul kes ikekia luka odwe luka Gad kwape ajaatar ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi, ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka akwat akany."
Numbers26:19 Odwe luka Yuda, Er ka Onan: kotwakikis Er ka Onan akwap naka Kanaan,"
Numbers26:20 Odwe luka Yuda kwape ajaatar ikekiakee; Sela, ekek loka Iselanin: Peres, ekek loka Iperesin: Sera, ekek loka Iserakin."
Numbers26:21 Odwe luka Peres, Kesuron, ekek loka Ikesuronin: Kamul, ekek loka Ikamulin."
Numbers26:22 Ŋul kes ikekia luka Yuda kwape ajaatar nul luaponi kimarai kakesi, ilukumin akaisakanykaarei ka lukanykape ka akwat akany."
Numbers26:23 Odwe luka Isakar kwape ajaatar ikekiakee: Tola, ekek loka Itolain: Puba, ekek loka Ipubain:"
Numbers26:24 Yasub, ekek loka Iyasubin: Simuron, ekek loka Isimuronin."
Numbers26:25 Ŋul kes ikekia luka Isakar kwape ajaatar luaponi kimarai kakesi, ilukumin akaisakanykape ka luonon ka akwat auni."
Numbers26:26 Odwe luka Sebulun kwape ajaatar ikekiakec: Sered, ekek loka Iseredin; Elon, ekek loka Ielonin: Yaleel, ekek loka Iyaleelin."
Numbers26:27 Ŋul kes ikekia luka Isebulunin kwape ajaatar nul luaponi kimarai kakesi, ilukumin akaisakanykape ka akwat akany."
Numbers26:28 Odwe luka Yosep kwape ajaatar ikekiakec: Manase ka Epuraim,"
Numbers26:29 Odwe luka Manase: Makir, ekek loka Imakirin: kouru Makir Gilead: Gilead, ekek loka Igileadin."
Numbers26:30 Lu kes odwe luka Gilead: Ieser, ekek loka Ieserin; Kelek, ekek loka Ikelekin:"
Numbers26:31 Ka Asuriel, ekek loka Isurielain: ka Sekem, ekek loka Isekemin:"
Numbers26:32 Ka Semida, ekek loka Isemidain; ka Keper, ekek loka Ikeperin,"
Numbers26:33 Ka Selopekad okoku loka Keper amameete idwe lusap, dimarai apesur: ikiroria luka apesur nuka Sclopekad kes Mala, ka Noa, ka Kogila, ka Milika, ka Tirusa."
Numbers26:34 Ŋul kes ikekia luka Manase: ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi emwaasi ilukumin akaisakany ka luarei ka akwat akanykaarei.
Numbers26:35 Lu kes odwe luka Epuraim kwape ajaatar ikekiakec: Sutela, ekek loka Isutelakin: Beker, ekek loka Ibekerin: Takan, ekek loka Itakanin,"
Numbers26:36 Lu kes odwe luka Sutela: Eran, ekek loka Ieranin."
Numbers26:37 Ŋul kes ikekia luka odwe luka Epuraim kwape ajaatar nul luaponi kimarai kakesi, ilukumin akaisauni ka luarei ka akwat akany, Ŋul kes odwe luka Yosep kwape ajaatar ikekiakec."
Numbers26:38 Odwe luka Benyamin kwape ajaatar ikekiakee: Bela, ekek loka Ibelain; Asubel, ekek loka Isubelain: Akiram, ekek loka Ikiramain:"
Numbers26:39 Sepupam, ekek loka Isupamin: Kupam, ekek loka Ikupamin,"
Numbers26:40 Odwe luka Bela kes Arid ka Naaman, Arid ekek loka Iridain; Naaman, ekek loka Inaamanin,"
Numbers26:41 Ŋul kes odwe luka Benyamin kwape ajaatar ikekiakee: nul luaponi kimaraikakesi emwaasi ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka lukany ka akwat akanykape.
Numbers26:42 Lu kes odwe luka Dan kwape ajaatar ikekiakee: Sukam, ekek loka Isukamin. Ŋul kes ikekia luka Dan kwape ajaatar ikekiakec."
Numbers26:43 Ikekia kere luka Isukamin, kwape ajaatar nul luaponi kimarai kakesi emwaasi ilukumin akaisakanykape ka luoŋon ka akwat aoŋon."
Numbers26:44 Odwe luka Aser kwape ajaatar ikekiakec: Imuna, ekek loka Imunamin: Isibi, ekek loka Isibin: Beria, ekek loka Iberian."
Numbers26:45 Odwe luka Beria: Keber, ekek loka Ikeberin: Malakiel, ekek loka Imalakielin,"
Numbers26:46 Ekiror da loka akoku naka Aser ŋes Sera.
Numbers26:47 Ŋul kes ikekia luka odwe luka Aser kwape ajaatar luaponi kimarai kakesi, ilukumin akaisakany ka luuni ka akwat aoŋon."
Numbers26:48 Odwe luka Naputali kwape ajaatar ikekiakee: Yakuseel, ekek loka Iyakuseelin: Guni, ekek loka Igunin:"
Numbers26:49 Yeser, ekek loka Iyeserin: Silem, ekek loka Isilemin."
Numbers26:50 Ŋul kes ikekia luka Naputali kwape ajaatar ikekiakee: nul luaponi kimarai kakesi emwaasi ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka lukany ka akwat aoŋon,"
Numbers26:51 Ŋul kes luaponi kimarai kodwe luka Isirael, ilukumin akwat akanykape ka lodiopet ka akwat akanykaarei ka akaisauni (601,730)."
Numbers26:52 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers26:53 “Mama ejaas ŋul ŋes ekorakinio akwap araun airumet kwape ejaar etiai loka ikiroria.
Numbers26:54 Mama ejaas luipu iinakini airumet naepol, mama ejaas luikidioko iinakini airumet naedir: mama ejai ŋinidiopet kwape ejaatar nul luaponi kimarai kaluke einakinio airumeteke."
Numbers26:55 Konye ekorokoro akwap kailamilam eroet: irumete kwape ejaatar ikiroria luka atekerin nuka Iukapapaakec,"
Numbers26:56 Kwape ejaunor eroet ŋes ekorakinere airumetekec mama ejaas luipu ka luikidioko.”
Numbers26:57 Lu kes luaponi kimarai luka Ilebin kwape ajaatar ikekiakee: Gereson, ekek loka Igeresonin: Kokat, ekek loka Ikokatin: Merari, ekek loka Imerarin."
Numbers26:58 Lu kes ikekia luka Ilebin: ekek loka Ilibunin, ekek loka Ikeburonin, ekek loka Imalin, ekek loka Imusin, ekek loka Ikorakin. Kouru Kokat Amuram."
Numbers26:59 Ekiror da loka aberu naka Amuram ŋes Yokebed, akoku naka Lebi, naaurie Lebi kotoma Misiri: kourik ŋesi Amuram Aaron ka Musa ka Miriam kinacikec."
Numbers26:60 Kouri Aaron Nadab ka Abiku, ka Eleasar ka Itamar."
Numbers26:61 Kotwaka Nadab ka Abiku, naainakiniata akim naitegelikina kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Numbers26:62 Ŋul luaponi kimarai kakesi emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luuni, ŋolikiliokit ageun kayenika elap ediopet ka luedeparito: naarai mam emarakinitai toma odwe luka Isirael, naarai mam ainakinitai kes airumet kodwe luka Isirael."
Numbers26:63 Ŋul kes luemarete Musa ka Eleasar esasedoti; luemarete idwe luka Isirael kapuutona nuka Moab kariri naka Yorodan koYeriko.
Numbers26:64 Konye kotoma kanul amamei idiotuŋanan kakwi luemarete Musa ka Aaron esasedoti; luemarete idwe luka Isirael kotoma amodiŋ naka Sinai.
Numbers26:65 Naarai abu EJAKAIT kolimu nukee cbe, “Abeit etwakikinete toma amodiŋ.” Mam ediotuŋanan kakesi abu kideun, dimarai Kaleb okoku loka Yepune, ka Yosua okoku loka Nun."
Numbers27:1 Kosodi kikunyut adwe nuka Selopekad, okoku loka Keper, okoku loka Gilead, okoku loka Makir, okoku loka Manase, nuka ikekia luka Manase, okoku loka Yosep: lu kes ikiroria luka adweke; Mala, ka Noa, ka Kogila, ka Milika, ka Tirusa,"
Numbers27:2 Kobwaata kakonyen nuka Musa, kakonyen nuka Eleasar esasedoti, kakonyen da nuka ikapolok ka ekodet kere, kokek loka ewema loka airiamunun, kobalas ebe,"
Numbers27:3 “Abu papakosi kotwanik amodiŋ, konye mam ŋes arai opaupakee kanul luapotu kotukokinos nepepe aluikin EJAKAIT korioŋet loka Kora: konye atwani ŋesi da kotoma adiakareteke; komameete idwe lusap."
Numbers27:4 Kanukinyo elemarere ekiror loka papakosi kokekike, naarai amameete ŋes idwe lusap? Koinakinai sio airumet koinaean luka papakosi.”"
Numbers27:5 Koyau Musa akeeekirot mama ejai EJAKAIT.
Numbers27:6 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers27:7 “Ineras adwe nuka Selopekad nuedolito: abeit iinakini kes airumet koinaean luka papakee; ido itebei airumet naka papakee mamakee.
Numbers27:8 Ilimokini idwe luka Isirael ebe, ‘Arai ketwana etuŋanan, komamei ikoku yenisapat, itebei do airumeteke mama ejai akokuke."
Numbers27:9 Arai emamei ŋes akokuke; iinakini airumeteke mama ejaas iinaeanake.
Numbers27:10 Arai emameete ŋes iinacanake, iinakini do airumeteke mama ejaas iinaean luka papake."
Numbers27:11 Arai emameete papake iinaean, iinakini akeirumet mama ejai opajanake loka ekekike, ŋesi da irumi: eraun kama ejaas idwe luka Isirael ekisil loka etube, kwape kieorakinia EJAKAIT Musa.’”"
Numbers27:12 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ebe, “Kodoka moru lo loka Abarim, koany akwap naainak eoŋ idwe luka Isirael."
Numbers27:13 Kianyu ŋes, kiyanaario mama ejaas ikonituŋa kwape ayaŋaarere onacekon Aaron:"
Numbers27:14 Naarai ibu kipaliik akakirot kotoma amodiŋ naka Sin, kopeget loka ekodet, aitalaun eoŋ kakonyenekee kakipi.” (Ŋun kes akip nuka Mcriba loka Kades kamodiŋ naka Sin.)"
Numbers27:15 Kotema Musa EJAKAIT atiar,"
Numbers27:16 “Kodakak EJAKAIT, Edeke loka imoyon luka awat kere, etuŋanan ayait ekodet,"
Numbers27:17 Loepedori alomar ka alomun da kakonyenekee, loepedori aiŋarenikin kes alomar ka alomun da; tetere mam ekodet loka EJAKAIT esubi bala amerekekin nuemameete ekecokon.”"
Numbers27:18 Kobala EJAKAIT Musa ebe, “Koyaŋa Yosua okoku loka Nun, etuŋanan loejai emoyo, kidokok ŋes akonikan;"
Numbers27:19 Kitobwo kakonyen nuka Eleasar esasedoti, kakonyen nuka ekodet kere; kodakak da ŋes apolou kakonyenekee."
Numbers27:20 Iinakini ŋes akonipolou, tetere erimari ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael."
Numbers27:21 Ebwoi kakonyen nuka Eleasar esasedoti, loinitununei kanuke kotube loka Urim kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: kakirotoke elomariata, kakirotoke da elomuniata, ŋes ka idwe kere luka Isirael nepepe kaŋes, ekodet kere.”"
Numbers27:22 Kiswama Musa kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT ŋes; koyana Yosua, kitobwo ŋes kakonyen nuka Eleasar esasedoti, kakonyen da nuka ekodet kere:"
Numbers27:23 Kidokok ŋes akaninike, kodakak apolou, kwape kineria EJAKAIT kama ka Musa."
Numbers28:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers28:2 “Kicorak idwe luka Isirael, kolimok kes ebe, ‘Ainakinetaka, ikanyamat luka ainakinetaka nueinakinere kakim, luka asakat naeuru saa mamaka, iricete ainakin eoŋ kapakikee naebeit.’"
Numbers28:3 Ilimokini kes ebe, Na ŋes ainakinet naeinakinere kakim, naiinakinete EJAKAIT; imerekekin lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet lumam eŋwalito, iarei ŋinipaaran, araut ainakinet naicweio nadue."
Numbers28:4 Iinakinete imerekek idiopet tupuruc, kosodi idiopet iinakinete eboŋ:"
Numbers28:5 Ka idiopet kotomon yenika epa loka akiria nuidicie araun ainakinet naka akiria, nuinyalakinitai idiopet koonon yenika ekin loka akinyet naerukuk."
Numbers28:6 Erai ainakinet naicweio nadue, naeeorakinio komoru Sinai araun asakat naeuru saa, ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Numbers28:7 Ainakinet da namatat ŋes idiopet koonon yenika ekin kanuka imerekek idiopet; ibukokini neejai EJAKAIT kotoma aibois nakalaunan ainakinet namatat naka nuitemerete.
Numbers28:8 Ka imerekek ice iinakini eboŋ; kwape kainakinet naka akiria naka tupuruc, kwape kainakineteke namatat, iinakini ŋes, ainakinet naeinakinere kakim, naka asakat naeuru saa mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Numbers28:9 Kapaaran nakasabato imerekekin lukiliok iarei luka ekaru ediopet lumam eŋwalito, ka iarei kotomon luka epa loka akiria nuidicie araun ainakinet naka akiria, nuinyalakinitai akinyet, ka ainakineteke namatat;"
Numbers28:10 Ŋin ŋes ainakinet naicweio naka ŋinipaaran nakasabato, kogelara ainakinet naicweio nadue, ka ainakineteke namatat."
Numbers28:11 Kotoma ageuneta nuka ilapiokus iinakinete ainakinet naicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT: imoŋin lutoba iarei, ka emerekek, ka imerekekin ikanykaarei lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet lumam eŋwalito;"
Numbers28:12 Ka iuni kotomon luka epa loka akiria nuidieie araun ainakinet naka akiria, nuinyalakinitai akinyet, kanuka nolimon lotobait; ka iarei kotomon luka akiria nuidicie araun ainakinet naka akiria, nuinyalakinitai akinyet, kanuka emerekek ŋol;"
Numbers28:13 Ka idiopet kotomon yenika akiria nuidieie nuinyalakinitai akinyet araun ainakinet naka akiria naka ŋinimerekek; araun ainakinet naicweio naka asakat naeuru saa, ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Numbers28:14 Ainakinetakee da numatan eraun atutubet naka ekin loka ebino kanuka emoŋ Iotobait, ka idiopet kouni yenika ekin kanuka emerekek, ka idiopet koonon yenika ekin kanuka imerekek; ŋin ŋes ainakinet naicweio naka nolilap adaun ilapio kere luka ekaru."
Numbers28:15 Ka ekoroi ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret mama ejai EJAKAIT; einakinio kogelara ainakinet naicweio naduc, ka ainakineteke namatat,"
Numbers28:16 Toma olap losodit, kapaaran nakitomonet kaonon naka elap, ŋes Aleleŋ naka EJAKAIT."
Numbers28:17 Apaaran nakitomonet kakany naka elap kanol ejaun epueit; enyamio emugati lomam itubuunitoi apaarasia akanykaarei.
Numbers28:18 Toma apaaran nasodit ejaun atukokinet nakalaunan; siriswamaete aswam naelanir,"
Numbers28:19 Konye iinakinete ainakinet naeinakinere kakim, ainakinet naicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT: imoŋin lutoba iarei, ka emerekek, ka imerekekin ikanykaarei lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet: eraunos kamakus lumam eŋwalito:"
Numbers28:20 Ka ainakinetekee naka akiria, akiria nuidicie nuinyalakinitai akinyet: iinakinete iuni kotomon kanuka emoŋ lotobait ka iarei kotomon kanuka emerekek;"
Numbers28:21 linakini da idiopet kotomon kanuka ŋinimerekek kotoma omerekekin ikanykaarei;
Numbers28:22 Ka ekoroi ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret, alucio yes."
Numbers28:23 Iinakinete nun kogelara ainakinet naicweio naka tupuruc, naerai ainakinet naicweio naduc."
Numbers28:24 Iinakinete kopone kanol ŋinipaaran, adaun apaarasia akanykaarei, inyamat luka ainakinet naeinakinere kakim, naka asakat naeuru saa mama ejai EJAKAIT: einakinio kogelara ainakinet naicweio naduc, ka ainakineteke namatat."
Numbers28:25 Kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei ejaun yes atukokinet nakalaunan; siriswamaete aswam naelanir.
Numbers28:26 Kapaaran naka araito nuegeete, naiinakiniata ainakinet naka akiria nuka agwe mama ejai EJAKAIT kopueitikus loka asabaton, ejaun yes atukokinet nakalaunan; siriswamaete aswam naelanir."
Numbers28:27 Konye iinakinete ainakinet naicweio araun asakat naeuru saa mama ejai EJAKAIT; imoŋin lutoba iarei, ka emerekek, ka imerekekin ikanykaarei lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet;"
Numbers28:28 Ka ainakinetekec naka akiria, akiria nuidieic nuinyalakinitai akinyet, iuni kotomon kanuka ŋolimoŋ lotobait, ka iarei kotomon kanuka emerekek ediopet,"
Numbers28:29 Ka idiopet kotomon kanuka ninimerekek kotoma omerekekin ikanykaarei;
Numbers28:30 Ka ekoroi ediopet, alueio yes."
Numbers28:31 Iinakinete kes kogelara ainakinet naicweio naduc, ka ainakineteke naka akiria (eraunos kamakus lumam eŋwalito), ka ainakinetakec numatan."
Numbers29:1 Kolap lokikanyetekaarei, kapaaran nasodit naka elap, ejaun yes atukokinet nakalaunan; siriswamaete aswam naelanir; erai apaaran naka aikut arupepen kamakus."
Numbers29:2 Iinakinete ainakinet naicweio araun asakat naeuru saa mama ejai EJAKAIT; emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet, ka imerekekin ikanykaarei lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet lumam eŋwalito:"
Numbers29:3 Ka ainakinetekec naka akiria, akiria nuidicic nuinyalakinitai akinyet, iuni kotomon kanuka emoŋ lotobait, ka iarei kotomon kanuka emerekek,"
Numbers29:4 Ka idiopet kotomon kanuka ninimerekek kotoma omerekekin ikanykaarei:
Numbers29:5 Ka ekoroi ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret, alucio yes:"
Numbers29:6 Kogelara ainakinet naicweio naka elap loilamuni, ka ainakineteke naka akiria, ka ainakinet naicweio naduc ka ainakineteke naka akiria, ka ainakinetakec numatan, kwape ejaar ekecekisil, araut asakat naeuru saa, ainakinet naeinakinere kakim mama ejai EJAKAIT,"
Numbers29:7 Kapaaran nakitomonet naka elap kanol lokikanyetekaarei ejaun yes atukokinet nakalaunan; iticanete akusiijar; mam iswamaete adioswam kere:
Numbers29:8 Konye iinakinete ainakinet naicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT araun asakat naeuru saa; emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet; ka imerekekin ikanykaarei lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet; eraunos mama ijaas lumam eŋwalito:"
Numbers29:9 Ka ainakinetekec naka akiria, akiria nuidicic nuinyalakinitai akinyet, iuni kotomon kanuka emoŋ lotobait, ka iarei kotomon kanuka emerekek ediopet,"
Numbers29:10 Ka idiopet kotomon kanuka ninimerekek kotoma omerekekin ikanykaarei:
Numbers29:11 Ka ekoroi ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret; kogelara ainakinet naka adiakaret naka alucio, ka ainakinet naicweio nadue, ka ainakineteke naka akiria, ka ainakinetakec numatan."
Numbers29:12 Kapaaran nakitomonet kakany naka elap lokikanyetekaarei ejaun yes atukokinet nakalaunan; siriswamaete aswam naelanir, iricete epucit mama ejai EJAKAIT apaarasia akanykaarei:"
Numbers29:13 Iinakinete ainakinet naicweio, ainakinet naeinakinere kakim, naka asakat naeuru saa mama ejai EJAKAIT; imoŋin lutoba itomon ka luuni, ka imerekekin iarei, ka imerekekin itomon ka luonon lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet; eraunos lumam eŋwalito:"
Numbers29:14 ka ainakinetekee naka akiria, akiria nuidicic nuinyalakinitai akinyet, iuni kotomon kanuka ŋolimoŋ lotobait, kotoma omonin lutoba lutomon ka luuni, ka iarei kotomon kanuka nolimerekek kotoma omerekekin iarei."
Numbers29:15 Ka idiopet kotomon kanuka ninimerekek kotoma omerekekin lutomon ka luonon:
Numbers29:16 Ka ekoroi ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret; kogelara ainakinet naicweio nadue, ka ainakineteke naka akiria, ka ainakineteke namatat,"
Numbers29:17 Kapaaran nakiareit da iinakinete imoŋin lutoba itomon ka luarei, ka imerekekin iarei, ka imerekekin itomon ka luonon lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet lumam eŋwalito:"
Numbers29:18 Ka ainakinetekec naka akiria ka ainakinctakec numatan kanuka imoŋin lutoba, kanuka imerekekin, kanuka imerekekin ludidik da, kwape ejaar etiaikee, kwape ejaar aicorakinet:"
Numbers29:19 Ka ekoroi ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret; kogelara ainakinet naicweio naduc, ka ainakineteke naka akiria, ka ainakinetakee numatan,"
Numbers29:20 Kapaaran nakiwuniet da, imoŋin lutoba itomon ka lodiopet, ka imerekekin iarei, ka imerekekin itomon ka luonon lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet lumam eŋwalito;"
Numbers29:21 Ka ainakinetckec naka akiria ka ainakinetakec numatan kanuka imoŋin lutoba, kanuka imerekekin, kanuka imerekekin ludidik da, kwape ejaar etiaikec, kwape eiaar aicorakinet:"
Numbers29:22 Ka ekoroi ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret; kogelara ainakinet naicweio naduc, ka ainakineteke naka akiria, ka ainakineteke namatat,"
Numbers29:23 Kapaaran nakiwononet da, imoŋin lutoba itomon, ka imerekekin iarei, ka imerekekin itomon ka luonon lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet lumam eŋwalito:"
Numbers29:24 Ainakinetekee naka akiria ka ainakinetakec numatan kanuka imoŋin lutoba, kanuka imerekekin, kanuka imerekekin ludidik da, kwape ejaar etiaikee, kwape eiaar aicorakinet:"
Numbers29:25 Ka ekoroi ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret; kogelara ainakinet naicweio naduc, ainakineteke naka akiria, ka ainakineteke namatat,"
Numbers29:26 Kapaaran nakikanyet da, imoŋin lutoba ikanykaoŋon, ka imerekekin iarei, ka imerekekin itomon ka luoyon lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet lumam eŋwalito:"
Numbers29:27 Ka ainakinetekec naka akiria ka ainakinetakec numatan kanuka imoŋin lutoba, kanuka imerekekin, kanuka imerekekin ludidik da, kwape ejaar etiaikec, kwape eiaar aicorakinet;"
Numbers29:28 Ka ekoroi ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret; kogelara ainakinet naicweio naduc, ka ainakineteke naka akiria, ka ainakineteke namatat."
Numbers29:29 Kapaaran nakikanyetekape, imoŋin lutoba ikanykauni, ka imerekekin iarei, ka imerekekin itomon ka luonon lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet lumam eŋwalito:"
Numbers29:30 Ka ainakinetekee naka akiria ka ainakinetakee numatan kanuka imoŋin lutoba, kanuka imerekekin, kanuka imerekekin ludidik da, kwape ejaar etiaikec, kwape ejaar aicorakinet;"
Numbers29:31 Ka ekoroi ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret; kogelara ainakinet naicweio nadue, ainakineteke naka akiria, ka ainakineteke namatat,"
Numbers29:32 Kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei, imoŋin lutoba ikanykaarei, imerekekin iarei, ka imerekekin itomon ka luonon lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet lumam eŋwalito;"
Numbers29:33 Ka ainakinetekee naka akiria ka ainakinetakee numatan kanuka imoŋin lutoba, kanuka imerekekin, kanuka imerekekin ludidik da, kwape ejaar etiaikee, kwape ejaar aicorakinet:"
Numbers29:34 Ka ekoroi ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret, kogelara ainakinet naicweio naduc, ainakineteke naka akiria, ka ainakineteke namatat."
Numbers29:35 Kapaaran nakikanyetekauni ejaun yes atukokinet nakayamakina: siriswamaete aswam naelanir.
Numbers29:36 Konye iinakinete ainakinet naicweio, ainakinet naeinakinere kakim naka asakat naeuru saa mama ejai EJAKAIT: emoŋ lotobait ediopet, ka emerekek ediopet, ka imerekekin ikanykaarei lukiliok luka ekaru ediopet lumam eŋwalito:"
Numbers29:37 Ainakinetekee naka akiria ka ainakinetakee numatan kanuka emoŋ lotobait, kanuka emerekek, kanuka imerekekin ludidik da, ejaunos kwape ejaar etiaikee, kwape ejaar aicorakinet:"
Numbers29:38 Ka ekoroi ediopet araun ainakinet naka adiakaret; kogelara ainakinet naicweio nadue, ka ainakineteke naka akiria ka ainakineteke namatat."
Numbers29:39 Iinakinete nun mama ejai EJAKAIT kopucinokus lueseunitai, kogelara aiyaposiokus, ka ainakinetakus nuka akote, araun ainakinetakus nuieweio, ka ainakinetakus nuka akiria, ka ainakinetakus numatan, ka ainakinetakus nuka ainapakin.”"
Numbers29:40 Kolimok Musa idwe luka Isirael kwape ajaatar kere nuabu EJAKAIT kicorak Musa.
Numbers30:1 Kolimok Musa ikapolok luka atekerin nuka idwe luka Isirael ebe, “Na ŋes akirot naeeoraki EJAKAIT."
Numbers30:2 Naiyapoo ituŋanan aiyaposit mama ejai EJAKAIT, arai naisumunio aisumunet ajen eketau kaenet, sirikinyei aitodol akekirot; iswamai kwape ejaatar akiro kere nuelomunete kaitukuke."
Numbers30:3 Naiyapoo aberu aiyaposit mama ejai EJAKAIT, koenikini da bon kaenet, koroko ejai okale loka papake, koiditeuke;"
Numbers30:4 Kepupu papake aiyapositike, ka aeneteke naeenitor eketau, kosodi papake aililiŋikin ŋes: iburai do akeiyaposio kere aitodolio: ka ŋinienet naeenitor ŋesi eketau iburai aitodolio."
Numbers30:5 Konye arai keneroki ŋes papake kapaaran naepupunio; epalunio aiyaposioke kere, ka aeneta kere nueenitor ŋesi eketau: isionie da EJAKAIT ŋes, naarai abu papake koneroki ŋes,"
Numbers30:6 Konye arai emanyit ŋes ekiliokit, kojaas aiyaposioke mamake, arai aisud einer kaitukuke, nueenitor ŋesi eketau;"
Numbers30:7 Kepupu okilenike, kosodi aililiŋikin ŋes kapaaran naepupunio: iburai do akeiyaposio aitodolio, ka aenetake nueenitor ŋesi eketau iburai aitodolio."
Numbers30:8 Konye arai keneroki ŋes okilenike kapaaran naepupunio; itapaluni aiyapositike naejai mamake, ka aisud einer kaitukuke, nueenitor ŋesi eketau: isionie EJAKAIT ŋes,"
Numbers30:9 Konye aiyaposit naka apuserut, ka nin da naireŋearit okilenike, iburai do ŋes aitodol ninikirot naeenitor ŋesi eketau."
Numbers30:10 Arai eyapoi ŋesi kotoma togo loka okilenike, arai ajen eketau kaenet naka aiyaposit,"
Numbers30:11 Kepupu okilenike kosodi aililiŋikin ŋes, komam enerokini ŋes; iburai do aiyaposioke kere aitodolio, ka ninienct nakeenia ŋesi eketau iburai aitodolio."
Numbers30:12 Konye arai itapalunit kes okilenike kapaaran nakepupunio; epalunio do kere nuka aiyaposioke arai nuka aenet naka etauke nualomunete kaitukuke; etapalau kes okilenike: isionie da EJAKAIT ŋes,"
Numbers30:13 Epedori okilenike aitogogoŋ arai aitapalaun niniyaposit ka ninisumunet naeenit aiticania etau.
Numbers30:14 Konye arai kililiniki okilenike ŋes ŋinipaaran, itogogoni do akeiyaposio kere, arai aenetake kere nuejaas mamake: etogogon kes naarai abu kililinik ŋes kapaaran naapupunio kes."
Numbers30:15 Konye arai kitapalau kes akaulo kapupun kes, ibwoki do ŋesi numam adolit nuka aberu.”"
Numbers30:16 Ŋul kes ikisila, lueeorakini EJAKAIT Musa, mama ejai etuŋanan ka akeberu, mama ejai papa ka akokuke naejai koiditeuke, okal loka papake."
Numbers31:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers31:2 “Kinyaŋ idwe luka Isirael kama ejaas Imidianin: akaulo kanun ŋes kiyanaarere jo mama ejaas ikonituŋa.”
Numbers31:3 Kolimok Musa ituŋa ebe, “Kokapanakisi icetuŋa kotomakus kanuka ejie, tetere elosete asurokin Midian, aitodol einyanane laka EJAKAIT mama ejai Midian."
Numbers31:4 Ŋukarete yesi ojie luka ŋiniteker elukumit, katekerin kere nuka Isirae!.”"
Numbers31:5 Kwaŋin kolemunai kolukumin luka Isirael, luka ŋiniteker elukumit, kes ilukumin itomon ka luarei luakapakina kanuka ejie."
Numbers31:6 Kijuka Musa kes, luka niniteker elukumit, oiie, kes ka Pinekas okoku loka Eleasar esasedoti, oiie, ajaas iboro luka aibois nakalaunan ka arupepen nuka elala akanike."
Numbers31:7 Kitijioto Midian, kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT Musa; koarata da nolikiliokit."
Numbers31:8 Koarata ikabakan luka Midian nepepe kalueekee: Ebi, ka Rekem, ka Sur, ka Kur, ka Reba, ikabakan ikany luka Midian: koarata da Balaam okoku laka Beor kekilen."
Numbers31:9 Kijoreosi idwe luka Isirael aŋor nuka Midian ka ikeeedwe ludidik; konatasi da ibarenekee kere, ka isipaninikee kere, ka iborokee kere."
Numbers31:10 Kicweata kakim ireriakec kere kotoma aiboisio nueboiononoto, ka iidukurunukee kere."
Numbers31:11 Koyanaasi iŋatan kere, ka ideman kere, ituŋa ka itiaŋ da."
Numbers31:12 Koyaut luejoreunitai, ka ideman, ka iŋatan, mama ejai Musa, ka Eleasar esasedoti, ka ekodet laka idwe luka Isirael, mama ejaas iidukurun apuutona nuka Moab nuejaas ariri naka Yorodan ko Yeriko."
Numbers31:13 Koloto Musa ka Eleasar ka ikapolok kere luka ekodet, airiamun kakes kina kiidukurun."
Numbers31:14 Konyunyurik Musa ikeŋarenok luka ajore, ikapolok luka ilukumin ka ikapolok luka akwat, luapote kojie."
Numbers31:15 Kotema Musa kes atiar, “Ttaiarata kereka yesi aŋor kere?"
Numbers31:16 Koany, apotu mm koinakis idwe luka Isirael adiakar kama ka EJAKAIT, kanuka ainerun naka Balaam, kakiro nuka Peor, kanuka nun da kojaun atular okodet loka EJAKAIT."
Numbers31:17 Aso do koara niniklliokit kodwe ludidik, koara da niniberu naejeni ekiliokit kanuka apero kaŋes,"
Numbers31:18 Konye idwe lupesur, lumam ejenete ekiliokit kanuka apero kaŋes, kitajarata kanukus."
Numbers31:19 Kidukuroto yesi kina kiidukurun apaarasia akanykaarei: ŋin yenaarit ituŋanan, ŋin da yenetirorit yenearitai, kitalaunos kapaaran nakiwuniet kapaaran da nakikanyetekaarei, yes ka ijoreunokus."
Numbers31:20 Italaunete da nininapiro, ka nin kere yeniswamatai kemukule, ka yeniswamatai kajulo nuka akinei, ka iboro kere luiswamatai kakiro.”"
Numbers31:21 Kolimok Eleasar esasedoti ikaiiok lualosito ojie ebe, “Ŋol ŋes ekisil loka aicorakinet naeeoraki EJAKAIT Musa:"
Numbers31:22 Konye esabu, ka epuesa, ka aikomo, ka asua, ka adebe, ka asasin."
Numbers31:23 Ŋinibore yenimam akim enyami, itotorioto akim, eraun yenelai; konye italaunio kakip nuitesegaarete: kere da yenepedori akim ainyam idomakinete akipi."
Numbers31:24 Ilosete akusinapen kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei, iraunos da luilaete, akaulo kanun ilomarete oidukurun.”"
Numbers31:25 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers31:26 “Kimar iŋatan luanatunio, ituŋa ka itian da, ijo ka Eleasar esasedoti, ka ikapolok luka ikalia luka lukapapa luka ekodet:"
Numbers31:27 Kokorak da iŋatan toma atutubeta aareij mama ejaas ikaiiok luepiiriaka kojie lualosito oiie, ka ekodet kere:"
Numbers31:28 Kitelem ikajiok lualosito ojie esolo kanuka EJAKAIT: idiopet kakwat akany, yenika ituŋa, ka aituk, ka asigiria, ka isipanin:"
Numbers31:29 Kolem ŋes kotoma atutubetakec, koinak Eleasar esasedoti, araun ainakinet naedakakinitai naka EJAKAIT."
Numbers31:30 Kotoma atutubet da naka idwe luka Isirael ilemuni ijo idiopet kotoma ninikaisakany, naka ituŋa, ka aituk, ka asigiria, ka isipanin, kes luka ibaren kere, koinak Ilebin, luidarete ewema lokalaunan loka EJAKAIT.”"
Numbers31:31 Kiswamata Musa ka Eleasar esasedoti kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT Musa.
Numbers31:32 Iŋatan da, luedeunos konatan luayaŋaarete ikaiiok, emwaasi amerekekin alukumin akwat akanykape ka alukumin akaisakanykaarei ka alukumin akany,"
Numbers31:33 Aituk alukumin akaisakanykaarei ka alukumin aarei,"
Numbers31:34 Asigiria alukumin akaisakanykape ka alukumit adiopet,"
Numbers31:35 Ka ituŋa kere ilukumin akaisauni ka ilukumin iarei, luka apesur numam ajenete ekiliokit kanuka apero kaŋes,"
Numbers31:36 Atutubet nakerai akorakiner naka ŋul kalualosito ojie, arai etiaike amerekekin alukumin akwat auni ka akaisauni ka nukanykaarei ka akwat akany:"
Numbers31:37 Esolo du loka EJAKAIT loka amerekekin kerai akwat akanykape ka akaisakanykaarei ka nukany.
Numbers31:38 Aituk da emwaasi alukumin akaisauni ka alukumin akanykape; kotoma kanun korai esolo loka EJAKAIT akaisakanykaarei ka nuarei.
Numbers31:39 Emwaasi asigiria alukumin akaisauni ka akwat akany; kotoma kanun koral esolo loka EJAKAIT akaisakanykape ka nadiopet.
Numbers31:40 Emwaasi ituŋa da ilukumin itomon ka lukanykape; kotoma kanul da korai esolo Ioka EJAKAIT ituŋa akaisauni ka luarei.
Numbers31:41 Koinak Musa Eleasar esasedoti esolo loarai ainakinet naedakakinitai naka EJAKAIT, kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT Musa,"
Numbers31:42 Atutubet naka idwe luka Isirael naatiakuni Musa kotuna luajiito,"
Numbers31:43 (Atutubet da naka ekodet emwaasi amerekekin alukumin akwat auni ka akaisauni ka nukanykaarei ka akwat akany,"
Numbers31:44 Ka aituk alukumin akaisauni ka alukumin akanykape,"
Numbers31:45 Asigiria alukumin akaisauni ka akwat akany,"
Numbers31:46 Ituŋa ilukumin itomon ka lukanykape);
Numbers31:47 Kotoma atutubet naka idwe luka Isirael, kolem Musa idiopet kotoma ninikaisakany, ituŋa ka itian da, koinak kes Ilebin luedarete ewema lokalaunan loka EJAKAIT: kwape kieorakinia EJAKAIT Musa."
Numbers31:48 Kikunyut ikeŋarenok luapolokinito ilukumin luka ajore, ikapolok luka ilukumin ka ikapolok luka akwat neejai Musa:"
Numbers31:49 Kolimokis Musa ebe, “Einara ikonikejaanakinak ikajiok lukidari isio, ido emamei yeneoliorit kasio."
Numbers31:50 Kiyau da ainakinet naka EJAKAIT, luadumu ninituŋanan, iboro luka esabu, ka asua, ka aikomon, ka igilun, ka itetio, ka abwakai, alucio ikositauon kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT.”"
Numbers31:51 Kijaut Musa ka Eleasar esasedoti esabukec, ka lukisiro kere."
Numbers31:52 Esabu kere loka ainakinet naedakakinitai naainakinete EJAKAIT ikapolok luka ilukumin ka ikapolok luka akwat arai isekelin itomon ka Iukanykape ka akwat akanykaarei ka akaisakany,"
Numbers31:53 (Naarai ayanaarito ikajiok ideman, ninirunanan ocoeke.)"
Numbers31:54 Kijaut Musa ka Eleasar esasedoti esabu loka ikapolok luka ilukumin ka luka akwat, koyanaut toma owema loka airiamunun, araun aisiitunet mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Numbers32:1 Ajaas idwe luka Reuben ka idwe luka Gad ibaren luipu noi: keanyut akwap naka Yaser, ka akwap naka Gilead, ebe arai aibois naebus kanuka ibaren;"
Numbers32:2 Kopotu idwe luka Gad ka idwe luka Reuben kinerata kaMusa ka Eleasar esasedoti ka ikapolok luka ekodet atiar,"
Numbers32:3 “Atarot, ka Dibon, ka Yaser, ka Nimura, ka Kesibon, ka Eleale, ka Sebam, ka Nebo, ka Beon,"
Numbers32:4 Akwap naetiji EJAKAIT kakonyen nuka ekodet loka Isirael, erai akwap naibusakinit ibaren, ejaas da ikonikejaanakinak ibaren.”"
Numbers32:5 Kotemasi atiar, “Arai kidumunit asianut kakonyenekon, koinakinai ikonikejaanakinak akwap na araun airumet; sirikiitodok sio Yorodan.”"
Numbers32:6 Kotema Musa idwe luka Gad ka idwe luka Reuben atiar, “Do iinaeanakus elosete oiie, kihoiete yesi kane?"
Numbers32:7 Kanukinyo itakalanyata itauon luka idwe luka Isirael kotoma alosit akwap naainaki kes EJAKAIT?
Numbers32:8 Apotu lukapapakus kiswamata kwaŋin, naejukaria kes koKades-barunea airot akwap."
Numbers32:9 Naarai kedokasi aditot naka Esukol, koanyut da akwap, kitakalanyata itauon Iuka idwe luka Isirael kinyeis alomar akwap naainakinit kes EJAKAIT."
Numbers32:10 Kinep anyunyura naka EJAKAIT kapaaran kaŋin, kiyapo ebe,"
Numbers32:11 ‘Abeit emamei kotoma otuŋa lualomunete koMisiri, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka luedeparito, loeanyuni akwap naabu keyapoik Aburaam, ka Isaak, ka Yakob; naarai mam katuparito eoŋ kekeeetau kere:"
Numbers32:12 Dimarai Kaleb okoku loka Yepune Ekenisit, ka Yosua okoku loka Nun: naarai atupasi EJAKAIT kekeeetau kere.’"
Numbers32:13 Kinep anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin Isirael, kisirim kes kamodiŋ ikar akaisaoŋon, aitodol neadaikinor nen aturi kere naabu kiswama aronis kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Numbers32:14 Ido koany, inyout yesi airum aibois naka lukapapakus, ailwek naka ikadiakanarak, aiyatakin bobo anyunyura naededen naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Isirael."
Numbers32:15 Naarai arai kipaasi yesi kotoma atupite ŋes, itasalikini bobo ŋesi kes amodiŋ; ido imudiarete yesi ituŋa lu kere.”"
Numbers32:16 Kikunyut mama ejai ŋesi, kotemasi atiar, “Kibwaikini akosiituk auioi nee, kidukokini ikosidwe ludidik ireria:"
Numbers32:17 Konye isio ikulepek kikapakini eut aiŋarenikin idwe luka Isirael, aitodol nekiyanaaria kes aiboisikec; ido iboikinos ikosidwe ludidik oreria luebwaunitai kanuka luibojete kakwap."
Numbers32:18 Mam kibonori oreriakosi, aitodol nairumiata idwe luka Isirael ninituŋanan airumeteke,"
Numbers32:19 Naarai mam sio kirumi kakes okekwa iuwai loka Yorodan; naarai akosiirumet ejai okekwa lo loka Yorodan ari nakokide.”
Numbers32:20 Kotema Musa kes atiar, “Arai kiswamata yesi akirot nin; arai kikapakinos yesi alosit oiie kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT,"
Numbers32:21 Kosodi nolitunanan loekapakina kayesi aidok Yorodan kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, aitodol nairenearia lukasurupoke kakonyeneke,"
Numbers32:22 Kipikoroi akwap kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: kosodete konyet aboŋun, komam nuigwaunito kama ejai EJAKAIT, kama ejai Isirael da; eraun akwap na airumetekus kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Numbers32:23 Konye arai mam iswamaete kwaŋin, koany idiakasi kama ejai EJAKAIT: abeit itodun akusidiakaret."
Numbers32:24 Kodukokis ikusidwe ludidik ireria, kobwaikis akusimerekekin aujoi; kiswamata da ŋun nualomutu kaitukekus.”"
Numbers32:25 Kinerata idwe luka Gad ka idwe luka Reuben kaMusa atiar, “Iswamaete ikonikeiaanakinak kwape icorakinia ekajakait."
Numbers32:26 Ikosidwe ludidik, ka akosiŋor, ka ikosisipanin ka ikosibaren, ejaunos toma oreria luka Gilead:"
Numbers32:27 Konye edokete ikonikejaanakinak, nolitunanan loekapakina ejie, kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, ejie, kwape ebalar ekaiakait.”"
Numbers32:28 Koinak Musa Eleasar esasedoti, ka Yosua okoku loka Nun, ka ikapolok luka ikalia luka lukapapaakee luka atekerin nuka idwe luka Isirael aidar akirokee."
Numbers32:29 Kolimok Musa kes ebe, “Arai kedokasi idwe luka Gad ka idwe luka Reuben Yorodan nepepe kayes, nolitunanan loekapakina ejie kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kosodi akwap aipikorio kakonyenekus; iinakinete do kes akwap naka Gilead araun airumet:"
Numbers32:30 Konye arai mam edokete nepepe kayes kokapakina, irumete nepepe kayes kotoma akwap naka Kanaan.”"
Numbers32:31 Kobonokis idwe luka Gad ka idwe luka Reuben ebe, “Kwape alimokinia EJAKAIT ikonikeiaanakinak, kiswamai isio kwaŋin,"
Numbers32:32 Kidoki kakapakina kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT alomar akwap naka Kanaan, kosalak airumetekosi okekwa loka Yorodan.”"
Numbers32:33 Koinak Musa kes, idwe luka Gad ka idwe luka Reuben, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase okoku loka Yosep, ajakanut naka Sikon ekabaka loka Imorain, ka ajakanut naka Og ekabaka loka Basan, akwap kwape ajaatar ireriake ka iikorunokee, kes ireria luka akwap lualukunito."
Numbers32:34 Kodukoto idwe luka Gad Dibon, ka Atarot, ka Aroer;"
Numbers32:35 Ka Aturot-sopan, ka Yaser, ka Yogubeka;"
Numbers32:36 Ka Bet-nimura, ka Bet-karan: ireria luabwaitai, ka auioi nuabwaitai nuka amerekekin."
Numbers32:37 Kodukoto idwe luka Reuben Kesibon, ka Eleale, ka Kiriataim;"
Numbers32:38 Ka Nebo, ka Baal-meon, (kilocoi ikeeekiroria,) ka Sibima: komaikis ireria luadukete icekiroria."
Numbers32:39 Koloto idwe luka Makir okoku loka Manase Gilead, kiruma ŋes, kodemasi ŋes Imorain luajaas toma."
Numbers32:40 Koinak Musa Makir okoku loka Manase Gilead; kiboienenei da kanen.
Numbers32:41 Kolot Yair okoku loka Manase kirum ireriakee, komaik kes Kabot-Yair,"
Numbers32:42 Kolot Noba kirum Kenat, ka ireriake ludidik, komaik ŋes Noba ekekiror obe."
Numbers33:1 Nu kes alosito nuka idwe luka Isirael, nakenyounioto kakwap nako Misiri toma ajoresiokee kama ka Musa ka Aaron."
Numbers33:2 Kiwadik Musa anyounonetakee kwape ajaar alositekee kaieorakinet naka EJAKAIT: nu kes alositokee kwape ajaatar anyounonetakec.
Numbers33:3 Konyout koRameses kolap losodit, kapaaran nakitomonet kakany naka elap losodit; kapaaran naatupakini Aleleŋio kolomasi idwe luka Isirael kakan naarioro kakonyen nuka Imisirian kere."
Numbers33:4 Napeidaete Imisirian lukiyaikikee kere, luabu EJAKAIT kodany kotomakec: kotubok EJAKAIT ikeeedekesio da."
Numbers33:5 Kolototo idwe luka Isirael anyoun koRameses kidukuroto Sukot.
Numbers33:6 Kolototo anyoun koSukot kidukuroto Etam, naejai ariri naka amodiŋ."
Numbers33:7 Kolototo anyoun koEtam, kibelooros kiton Pi-kakirot naitei Baal-sepon: kidukuroto akonyen nuka Migidol."
Numbers33:8 Kolototo anyoun kakonyen nuka Kakirot kitoro kidin aŋolol kiton amodiŋ: koloto alosit naka apaarasia auni kamodiŋ naka Etam, kidukuroto Mara."
Numbers33:9 Kolototo anyoun koMara kodolut Elim: ajaas toma Elim atanin atomon kaarei ka idukudukun akaisakanykaarei; kidukuroto nen.
Numbers33:10 Kolototo anyoun koElim, kidukuroto ariri naka Aŋolol Nakarenan."
Numbers33:11 Kolototo anyoun kAŋolol Nakarenan, kidukuroto amodiŋ naka Sin."
Numbers33:12 Kolototo anyoun kamodiŋ naka Sin, kidukuroto Dopuka,"
Numbers33:13 Kolototo anyoun koDopuka, kidukuroto Alus."
Numbers33:14 Kolototo anyoun kAlus, kidukuroto Repidim, neamamikiniata ituŋa akip numatan."
Numbers33:15 Kolototo anyoun koRepidim, kidukuroto amodiŋ naka Sinai."
Numbers33:16 Kolototo anyoun kamodiŋ naka Sinai, kidukuroto Kiburotkataaba,"
Numbers33:17 Kolototo anyoun koKiburot-kataaba, kidukuroto Kaserot,"
Numbers33:18 Kolototo anyoun koKaserot, kidukuroto Ritima."
Numbers33:19 Kolototo anyoun koRitima, kidukuroto Rimon-peres,"
Numbers33:20 Kolototo anyoun koRimon-pcres, kidukuroto Libuna."
Numbers33:21 Kolototo anyoun koLibuna, kidukuroto Risa."
Numbers33:22 Kolototo anyoun koRisa, kidukuroto Kekelata,"
Numbers33:23 Kolototo anyoun koKekelata, kidukuroto moru Seper."
Numbers33:24 Kolototo anyoun komoru Seper, kidukuroto Karada,"
Numbers33:25 Kolototo anyoun koKarada, kidukuroto Makelot."
Numbers33:26 Kolototo anyoun koMakelot, kidukuroto Takat."
Numbers33:27 Kolototo anyoun koTakat, kidukuroto Tera."
Numbers33:28 Kolototo anyoun koTera, kidukuroto Mitika."
Numbers33:29 Kolototo anyoun koMitika, kidukuroto Kasimona."
Numbers33:30 Kolototo anyoun koKasimona, kidukuroto Moserot,"
Numbers33:31 Kolototo anyoun koMoserot, kidukuroto Bene-yaakan,"
Numbers33:32 Kolototo anyoun koBene-yaakan, kidukuroto Kor-kagidigad."
Numbers33:33 Kolototo anyoun koKor-kagidigad, kidukuroto Yotibata."
Numbers33:34 Kolototo anyoun koYotibata, kidukuroto Aburona."
Numbers33:35 Kolototo anyoun koAburona, kidukuroto Esion-geber,"
Numbers33:36 Kolototo anyoun koEsiongeber, kidukuroto amodiŋ naka Sin (nipenin ŋes Kades),"
Numbers33:37 Kolototo anyoun koKades, kidukuroto moru Kor, ariri naka akwap naka Edom,"
Numbers33:38 Kodoka Aaron esasedoti moru Kor kaieorakinet naka EJAKAIT, kotwanik nen, kokaru lokakaisaoŋon kedaut idwe luka Isirael anyoun kakwap nako Misiri, kolap lokikanyet, kapaaran kanasodit naka elap,"
Numbers33:39 Kerai Aaron loka ikar akwatat ka akaisaarei ka luuni etwanikini moru Kor.
Numbers33:40 Kopup do Ekanaanit, ekabaka loka Arad, loeboienenei kari naka Eŋalakimak naka akwap nako Kanaan abunore naka idwe luka Isirael."
Numbers33:41 Kolototo anyoun komoru Kor, kidukuroto Salimona."
Numbers33:42 Kolototo anyoun koSalimona, kidukuroto Punon."
Numbers33:43 Kolototo anyoun koPunon, kidukuroto Obot."
Numbers33:44 Kolototo anyoun koObot, kidukuroto Iyeabarim, koikor loka Moab."
Numbers33:45 Kolototo anyoun koIyim, kidukuroto Dibon-gad."
Numbers33:46 Kolototo anyoun koDibon-gad, kidukuroto Alumon-dibilataim."
Numbers33:47 Kolototo anyoun koAlumon-dibilataim, kidukuroto oroŋan luka Abarim, eiteo ka Nebo."
Numbers33:48 Kolototo anyoun koroŋan luka Abarim, kidukuroto apuutona nuka Moab ariri naka Yorodan koYeriko."
Numbers33:49 Kidukuroto ariri naka Yorodan anyoun koBet-yesimot aitodol Abel-sitim kapuutona nuka Moab.
Numbers33:50 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa kapuutona nuka Moab kariri naka Yorodan koYeriko atiar,"
Numbers33:51 “Kiner kidwe luka Isirael, kolimok kes ebe, Kidokata yesi Yorodan kodolo akwap naka Kanaan."
Numbers33:52 Irenearete luiboienenete kakwap kere kakonyenekus, imudiarete akecemor kere nuigirir, ka akeceputosia nuiswamatai kasua, imudiarete da akeeeiboisio nuiceleleete."
Numbers33:53 Irumete yesi akwap, ibojenenete da kanen, naarai kainak yes airum akwap."
Numbers33:54 Irumete yesi akwap kailamilam eroet kwape ejaatar ikekiakus; iinakinete luipu airumet naepol, ka luikidioko iinakinete airumet naedit, naebeikinia ituŋanan eroet, eraun ŋin naken; irumete ŋes kwape ejaatar atekerin nuka lukapapaakus."
Numbers33:55 Konye arai mam irenearete kakonyenekus luiboienenete kakwap, esalete do nul luitasalete yesi esubito bala ibore yenedopodopoi akusikonye, bala da ikukwa kosiepionokus, kitunyunyurikinete yes kakwap naiboienenete yesi kotoma."
Numbers33:56 Ejaun do ebe, kwape tikaomitor eoŋ aiswamakin kes, keswamakini yes da kwape kwaŋin.”"
Numbers34:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers34:2 “Kicorak idwe luka Isirael, ebe, Kidoloto akwap naka Kanaan, (nin ŋes akwap nakibei yes araun airumet, akwap nako Kanaan kwape ejaatar iikorunoke.)"
Numbers34:3 Ewaikus loka ari naka eŋalakimak enyouni kamodiŋ naka Sin kiririkina Edom, eikorukus da loka ari naka eŋalakimak enyouni kosane loka Aŋolol naka Abalaŋ kobei kide:"
Numbers34:4 Ekudoori ekusikor ari naka eŋalakimak naka acinat naka Akurabim, kobei Sin: kodoli ari naka eŋalakimak naka Kades-barunea; kolosi Kasaradar, kobei Asumon:"
Numbers34:5 Ekudoori bobo eikor koAsumon kiton oeor yenika Misiri, kodoli aŋolol,"
Numbers34:6 Eikorukus da loka ari nakoto ŋes Aŋolol Nakapolon karirike: eraun ŋol eikorukus loka ari nakoto.
Numbers34:7 Lo ŋes eikorukus loka ari naka agolitomei: igirunete anyoun kAŋolol Nakapolon kiton Moru Kor:
Numbers34:8 Anyoun koMoru Kor igirunete kiton ncelomaria Kamat; kodoli eikor Sedad;
Numbers34:9 Kolosi eikor kiton Sipiron, kodoli Kasar-enan: nol ŋes eikorukus loka ari naka agolitomei."
Numbers34:10 Igirunete eikorukus loka ari nakokide anyoun koKasar-enan kiton Sepam:
Numbers34:11 Ŋesar eikor anyoun koSepam kiton Ribula, kari nakokide naka Ain; iiesar eikor edoli ariri naka aŋolol naka Cineret kobei kide:"
Numbers34:12 Ŋesar eikor kiton Yorodan, kodoli Aŋolol naka Abalaŋ: eraun ŋin akusikwap kwape ejaatar ikeikoruno luelukunito.”"
Numbers34:13 Kicorak Musa idwe luka Isirael ebe, “Ŋin ŋes akwap nairumete kailamilam eroet, naeeoraki EJAKAIT ainakin atekerin akanykaoŋon, ka atutubet naka ateker:"
Numbers34:14 Naarai adumu ateker naka idwe luka Reuben kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakee, ka ateker naka idwe luka Gad kwape ejaatar ikalia luka lukapapaakec, adumu da atutubet naka ateker naka Manase airumetekee:"
Numbers34:15 Adumut atekerin aarei ka atutubet naka ateker airumetekee juwai naka Yorodan koYeriko kari nakokide, neelomunia akoloŋ.”"
Numbers34:16 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers34:17 “Lu kes ikiroria luka iruna luekorokoroetc akwap kanukus araun airumet: Eleasar esasedoti, ka Yosua okoku loka Nun,"
Numbers34:18 Ilemunete yesi ekapolon ediopet loka ninitcker akorokor akwap araun airumet.
Numbers34:19 Lu kes ikiroria luka ituŋa: loka ateker naka Yuda, Kaleb okoku loka Ycpune."
Numbers34:20 Loka ateker naka idwe luka Simeon, Semuel okoku loka Amikud,"
Numbers34:21 Loka ateker naka Benyamin, Elidad okoku loka Cisilon."
Numbers34:22 Loka idwe luka Dan ekapolon, Buki okoku loka Yoguli."
Numbers34:23 Loka idwe luka Yosep; loka ateker naka idwe luka Manase ekapolon, Kaniel okoku loka Epod:"
Numbers34:24 Loka ateker naka idwe luka Epuraim ekapolon, Kemuel okoku loka Sipitan."
Numbers34:25 Loka ateker naka idwe luka Sebulun ekapolon, Elisapan okoku loka Paranac,"
Numbers34:26 Loka ateker naka idwe luka Isakar ekapolon, Palutiel okoku loka Asan."
Numbers34:27 Loka ateker naka idwe luka Aser ekapolon, Akikud okoku loka Selomi."
Numbers34:28 Loka ateker naka idwe luka Naputali ekapolon, Pedakel okoku loka Amikud."
Numbers34:29 Ŋul kes lueeorakini EJAKAIT akorokor airumet kanuka idwe luka Isirael kakwap naka Kanaan.”
Numbers35:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa kapuutona nuka Moab kariri naka Yorodan koYeriko atiar,"
