Numbers35:2 “Kicorak idwe luka Isirael koinakis Ilebin ireria luiboiononoto kotoma kairumetekee; iinakinete do Ilebin ironyia luelukunito ireria ŋul.
Numbers35:3 Ibojenenete kesi koreria; ejaunos ironyiakee kanuka ibarenekec ka iborokee ka itianikec kere.
Numbers35:4 Ironyia luka ireria luiinakinete yesi Ilebin, enyounete karwatat naka ere kiton kina ikubitin elukumit alukun ere kere."
Numbers35:5 Itemete kina naka ere ikubitin ilukumin iarei kari nakokide, ikubitin ilukumin iarei kari naka eŋalakimak, ikubitin ilukumin iarei kari nakoto, ka ikubitin da ilukumin iarei kari naka agolitomei, kojai ere kidin, ŋul kes ironyiakec luka ireria."
Numbers35:6 Ireria luiinakinete Ilebin koraas ireria ikanykape lukuianara, luiinakinete ekaaran ituŋanan akeriar: iyatakinete ireria akaisaoŋon ka luarei neeiaas ŋul."
Numbers35:7 Ireria kere luiinakinete Ilebin imwaasi ireria akaisaoŋon ka lukanykauni: iinakinete kes ka ironyiakec.
Numbers35:8 Ireria luiinakinete kairumet naka idwe luka Isirael, kaneejaas luipu ilemarete luipu; kaneejaas luikidioko da ilemarete luikidioko: ninitunanan kwape ejaar airumeteke nairumi einakini Ilebin ireriake.”"
Numbers35:9 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar,"
Numbers35:10 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, Kidokata Yorodan adolore akwap naka Kanaan,"
Numbers35:11 Iseunete ireriakus lueraunos ireria lukuianara; tetere ekaaran loeari ituŋanan komam epelet ekereari ŋina.
Numbers35:12 Eraunos ireria luikuianarete yesi kaneejai ekenyaŋaran; tetere mam ekaaran etwani, aitodol naebwoia kakonyen nuka ekodet kanuka atubokinio."
Numbers35:13 Ireria luiinakinete eraunos kamakus ireria ikanykape lukuianara.
Numbers35:14 Iinakinete ireria iuni kajuwai naka Yorodan, iinakinete da ireria iuni kakwap naka Kanaan; eraunos ireria lukuianara."
Numbers35:15 Eraunos ireria nul ikanykape luekuianarete idwe luka Isirael, imoit da, ka ikeboiororon kotomakec: tetere ninituŋanan yeneari ituŋanan komam epelet ekereari ŋina."
Numbers35:16 Konye arai esenit ŋes kibore kayenika asuat, tape do etwani, erai ŋesi ekaaran; abeit eario ekaaran da."
Numbers35:17 Arai da kitin amoru naepedori aiar ituŋanan asenio ŋes, kotwana, erai ŋesi ekaaran: abeit eario ekaaran da."
Numbers35:18 Arai da esenit ŋes kakitoi naepedori aiar ituŋanan kotwana, erai ŋesi ekaaran: abe it eario ekaaran da."
Numbers35:19 Ekenyaŋaran aokot elopet eari ekaaran: nairiamakinotor kaŋes, eari."
Numbers35:20 Arai eremorit ŋes kanuka alait, arai ibirit ŋes, koŋopikinite, tape etwani;"
Numbers35:21 Arai esenit ŋes kakan kanuka asurup, tape etwani; abeit eario ŋol lokeseni ŋes; erai ekaaran: eari ŋes ekenyaŋaran aokot nairiamakinotor kaŋes."
Numbers35:22 Konye arai eremorit ŋes komamei asurup, arai ibirit ŋes kidiobore komam enopikinit,"
Numbers35:23 Arai kadiomoru naepedori aiar ituŋanan, komam eanyunit ŋes, kibirio ŋes tape etwani, komam erai lokasurupike, karaida loemootor ŋes aronis:"
Numbers35:24 Etubokini ekodet ekasenon ka ekenyaŋaran aokot kwape ejaatar itubesia lu:
Numbers35:25 Eyuuni ekodet ekaaran kakan naka ekenyaŋaran aokot, inyakari da ekodet ŋes oreke loakuiarit loakerearit: iboienenei kenan aitodol naetwania esasedoti lopeti, loinyonyoikinitai akinyet nakalaunan."
Numbers35:26 Konye arai kilam ekaaran eikor loka ereke loakuiarit loakerearit;
Numbers35:27 Kosodi ekenyaŋaran aokot adumakin ŋes kina keikor loka ereke loakuiarit, kosodi ekenyaŋaran aokot ajar ekaaran; emamuun ŋes akirot kanuka aokot;"
Numbers35:28 Naarai tiebusakinit je asalakinit oreke loakuiarit aitodol naetwania esasedoti lopeti; konye akaulo katwanare naka esasedoti lopeti, eboŋori ekaaran akwapuke naka airumeteke."
Numbers35:29 Eraunos akiro nun ekisil loka etube kamakus anatar aturiokus kotoma aiboisiokus kere.
Numbers35:30 Ŋin yeneari ituŋanan eario ikaaran kakirot naka ikajenak: konye mam ituŋanan eario kanuka akirot naka ekajenan ediopet bon.
Numbers35:31 Sirikijaut egelit kanuka aiiar naka ekaaran loebeit atwanare: konye abeit eario.
Numbers35:32 Sirikijaut egelit kanuka ŋol loekerit oreke loekuiarit, abonunio aiboie akwap, aitodol naetwania esasedoti."
Numbers35:33 Kwaŋin do mam imunaunete akwap naiboiononoto: naarai emunaarete aokot akwap: mam akwap epedori alueio kanuka aokot nuebukorio kotoma, dimarai kaokot nuka ŋol kaloabukori kes,"
Numbers35:34 Sirikimuna da akwap naiboiononoto, naeboienenei eoŋ kokidin; naarai Eoŋ EJAKAIT eboienenei kokidin kidwe luka Isirael.”"
Numbers36:1 Kikunyut ikapolok luka ikalia luka lukapapa luka ekek loka idwe luka Gilead, okoku loka Makir, okoku loka Manase, luka ikalia luka odwe luka Yosep, kinerata kakonyen nuka Musa ka ikapolok, kes ikapolok luka ikalia luka lukapapa luka idwe luka Isirael:"
Numbers36:2 Kobalas ebe, “Abu EJAKAIT kicorak ekajakait ainakin idwe luka Isirael akwap araun airumet kailamilam eroet: kicorak da EJAKAIT ekajakait ainakin airumet naka onacekosi Selopekad adweke."
Numbers36:3 Arai kemanyata odwe luka atekerin ace nuka idwe luka Isirael kes, elemario do airumetekee kairumet naka Iukapapakosi, imorikikinio airumet naka ateker naemanyario kes: kwaŋin elemario do koroet loka airumetekosi."
Numbers36:4 Kedol ekaru loka eyubili loka idwe luka Isirael, ŋes do imorikikinere airumetekee kairumet naka ateker naemanyario kes: kwaŋin elemario do airumetekec kairumet naka ateker naka lukapapakosi.”"
Numbers36:5 Kicorak Musa idwe luka Isirael kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, ebe, “Inera ateker naka odwe luka Yosep nuedolito,"
Numbers36:6 Na ŋes akirot naieorakinit EJAKAIT kanuka adwe nuka Selopekad, ebe, ‘Kodukokinos kesi luitoiokito kesi; konye edukokinos lukokek loka ateker naka papakee.’"
Numbers36:7 Kwaŋin mam airumet naka idwe luka Isirael eyanaario kateker adiopet ainakinio aceteker: naarai idonete idwe luka Isirael ŋinituŋanan airumet naka ateker naka lukapapake.
Numbers36:8 Ido ninipese naejai airumet kotoma ateker kere naka idwe luka Isirael, edukokini lokokek loka ateker naka papake, tetere irumete idwe luka Isirael ŋinitunanan airumet naka lukapapake."
Numbers36:9 Kwaŋin mam airumet eyanaario kateker adiopet ainakinio aceteker; naarai idonete atekerin nuka idwe luka Isirael ŋinidiopet airumeteke.”
Numbers36:10 Kwape kieorakinia EJAKAIT Musa, kiswamata adwe nuka Selopekad kwaŋin:"
Numbers36:11 Naarai apotu Mala, ka Tirusa, ka Kogila, ka Milika, ka Noa, adwe nuka Selopekad, kodukonokinos odwe luka iinaean luka papakec."
Numbers36:12 Apotu kodukonokinos okekia luka odwe luka Manase okoku loka Yosep, kosalak airumetekec ateker naka ekek loka papakec."
Numbers36:13 Ŋun kes aicorakineta ka itubesia luecorakini EJAKAIT idwe luka Isirael kama ka Musa, kapuutona nuka Moab kariri naka Yorodan koYeriko."
Deuteronomy1:1 Nu kes akiro nualimokini Musa Isirael kere okekwa loka Yorodan kamodiŋ, kotoma Araba naiteos kaSup, kidiŋ Paran, ka Topel, ka Laban, ka Kaserot, ka Di-sakab."
Deuteronomy1:2 Erai alosit naka apaarasia atomon kanadiopet anyoun koKoreb ibei moru Seir kiton Kades-barunea.
Deuteronomy1:3 Kosodi kokaru loka akaisaoŋon, kolap lokitomonet ka lodiopet, kapaaran nasodit naka elap, abu Musa kolimok idwe luka Isirael kwape ajaatar kere nuabala EJAKAIT ŋes aicorakin kes;"
Deuteronomy1:4 Kedau aidany Sikon ekabaka loka Imorain, lueboiete koKesibon, ka Og ekabaka loka Basan loeboie koAsitarot, ka Ederei:"
Deuteronomy1:5 Kokekwa loka Yorodan kakwap naka Moab, abu Musa kogeu alimor ikisila lu ebe,"
Deuteronomy1:6 “Abu EJAKAIT Ewokodeke kotema oni koKoreb atiar, ‘Iboioto yesi noi koroŋat kalo:"
Deuteronomy1:7 Kibelokinos, kobwota, koloto akwap nakiukon naka Imorain, ka aiboisio kere nuidunyatar, Araba, akwap nakiukon, ka apuutona, ka Eŋalakimak, ariri naka aŋolol, akwap naka Ikanaanin, ka Lebanon, kiton ocor lokapolon, ecor Eupurat."
Deuteronomy1:8 Koany, ebwaik akwap akonyenekus: kolomasi, kirumata akwap naabu EJAKAIT kiyapoik lukapapaakus, Aburaam, ka Isaak, ka Yakob, ainakin kes ka aurikec naetupanakini.’"
Deuteronomy1:9 “Abu katema yes kapak kaya ebe, ‘Mam eoŋ bon apedori adakite yes:"
Deuteronomy1:10 Abu EJAKAIT Ekusideke kitupuu yes, ido koany, isubito yesi lolo bala aacer nuka akuj kanuka aipues."
Deuteronomy1:11 Kitupuu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakus etiaikus lo irwan alukumit, kisirereŋ yes, kwape kisumunio yes!"
Deuteronomy1:12 Ekwaikini eoŋ ai apedori bon adakit aitapasitoikus, ka alaŋirukus, ka epegetekus?"
Deuteronomy1:13 Koseutu ituŋa luecoak, luka aijen, ka luejenas, kwape ejaatar atekerinikus, adakakini eoŋ apolokinit yes.’"
Deuteronomy1:14 Ipotu koboŋokis eoŋ ebe, ‘Ejokuna sio aswam akirot nainer ijo.’"
Deuteronomy1:15 Kwaŋin abu kadakak lukapolok luka atekerinikus, ituŋa luecoak luejenas, araun lukipolokinito yes, ikapolok luka ilukumin, ikapolok luka akwat, ikapolok luka akaisakany, ka ikapolok luka itomon, ka ijaka, kwape ejaatar atekerinikus."
Deuteronomy1:16 Abu kecorak ikatubokokus kapak kaya ebe, ‘Kopupoto akiro nuka iinacanakus, kotubokis kadolit etuŋanan ka onaeeke, ka imoit yenejai kaŋes."
Deuteronomy1:17 Mam itiakito ituŋa kotube; ipupete ludidik ka luepolok kopone ediopet; mam ikuriakaros akonyen nuka ituŋanan; naarai erai etube loka Edeke: akirot nakitionikini yes iyaunete mamaka, apupuni eoŋ ŋes.’"
Deuteronomy1:18 Abu kecorak yes kapak kaya akiro kere nukibusakinito aswam.
Deuteronomy1:19 “Kipou kaloto anyoun koKoreb, ketoroto amodiŋ ŋin kere naepol naesogim naipotu koanyut, korot loebei akwap nakiukon naka Imorain, kwape kecorakinitor EJAKAIT Edekewok; kadoloto Kades-barunea."
Deuteronomy1:20 Abu katema yes atiar, ‘Idolut akwap nakiukon naka Imorain, nakiinakinit EJAKAIT Edekewok."
Deuteronomy1:21 Koany, ebwaiki EJAKAIT Edekekon akwap akonyenekon: kolot kirum, kwape kilimokinia EJAKAIT Edeke loka lukapapaakon; sirikikurianar, karaida ajuruŋuŋ.’"
Deuteronomy1:22 Ipotu kikunyut neajai, ŋinituŋanan kayesi, kotemasi atiar, ‘Ketiliŋaasi ituŋa, korotakis oni akwap, tetere kiinunete oni akirot naka erot lokibusakinit aitor, ka ireria lukidolokini.’"
Deuteronomy1:23 Abu ketojok akirot ŋin: kaseu ituŋa itomon ka luarei, ediopetuŋanan kaŋiniteker:"
Deuteronomy1:24 Apotu kibelokinos koloto oroŋat, kodoloto aditot naka Esukol, korotata."
Deuteronomy1:25 Kolemut araito nuka akwap kakaninikec, koinut oni, koinut da akirot ebe, ‘Ejok akwap nakiinakinit EJAKAIT Ewokodeke.’"
Deuteronomy1:26 “Konye ipotu koŋeroto alosit, kipaliikis aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT Ekusideke:"
Deuteronomy1:27 Ipotu kirurumata kowemanakus ebe, ‘Kanu naarai kilait EJAKAIT oni, ŋes kitolomunia kakwap nako Misiri, aijaikin oni akan naka Imorain, amudiar oni,"
Deuteronomy1:28 Ai bo kilosi oni? acalasi iwokoinacan iwokotauon, ebe, “Epolok ituŋa, eojak da adepar oni; epolok ireria, ebwaitai da kiton akuj; bobo da kianyu odwe luka Anakim kaŋina.”"
Deuteronomy1:29 Kasodi eoŋ atemar yes ebe, ‘Sirikiyaloŋoŋoto, karaida akurianar kes."
Deuteronomy1:30 EJAKAIT Ekusideke lokiŋarenikinit yes, ŋes kjiiikini yes kwape ejaatar kere nuabu kiswama kanukus koMisiri kakonyenekus;"
Deuteronomy1:31 Kamodiŋ da, neianyuniata kwape kidakio EJAKAIT Ekusideke yes, kwape edakia etuŋanan ikokuke, korotin kere luilosete, aitodol naidolunioto aibois na.’"
Deuteronomy1:32 Konye kakirot kaŋin, mam ipotu kiyuut EJAKAIT Ekusideke,"
Deuteronomy1:33 Loabu kiŋarenikinite yes korot, amoikin yes aibois naibubukincte ikusiweman, kotoma akim kuare, aitodikin yes erot loitorete, kotoma odou da paaran."
Deuteronomy1:34 “Kopup EJAKAIT akusikiro, konyunyurikin, kiyapo ebe,"
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Abeit mam idiopet kotuŋa kalu luka aturi kana nakaronon eanyuni akwap naejok naeyapoik ainakin lukapapaakus,"
Deuteronomy1:36 Dimarai Kaleb, okoku loka Yepune, ŋes eanyuni; ainakini ŋes ka ikedwe akwap naecak ŋesi: naarai atupa cut EJAKAIT.’"
Deuteronomy1:37 Abu da EJAKAIT kanyunyurik eoŋ kanukus ebe, ‘Mam jo da ilomari ŋina:"
Deuteronomy1:38 Yosua, okoku loka Nun, loebwoi kakonyenekon, ŋes elomari ŋina: kitogogoŋ ijo ŋes; naarai ŋes isurumi Isirael akwap."
Deuteronomy1:39 Bobo da ludidikikus, luibalasi yesi ebe eraunos imejan, ka idwekus, lumam lolo ejenete ajokis karaida aronis, kes elomarete, ainakini kes akwap, irumete."
Deuteronomy1:40 Konye yes, kibelokinos, koloto modiŋ korot loebei Aŋolol Nakareŋan.’"
Deuteronomy1:41 “Kosodete yesi aboŋokin eoŋ ebe, ‘Kidiaka isio kama ejai EJAKAIT, kilosi ejie, kwape ejaatar kere nukicorak EJAKAIT Ewokodeke oni.’ Ipotu koenata ŋinituŋanan lujiisike, koomitos araut akirot naebenen adokar oroŋ at."
Deuteronomy1:42 Katema EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, ‘Kolimok kes ebe, Sirikidokasi, karaida ejie; naarai mam eoŋ ajai kayes; kinyeis lukasurupokus aidany yes.’"
Deuteronomy1:43 Abu kalimok yes kwaŋin, koŋeroto apupun; konye ipotu kipaliikis aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT, koŋasikinos adokar oroŋat."
Deuteronomy1:44 Kopotu Imorain lueboiete koroŋat kaŋol asurokin yes, korukioto yes, kwape erukio ao, kodanyata yes koSeir kiton Koruma."
Deuteronomy1:45 Ipotu koboŋut aimony akonyen nuka EJAKAIT; konye mam EJAKAIT abu kopup ekusiporoto, karaida aitoikin yes akit."
Deuteronomy1:46 Kwaŋin ipotu kiboioto koKades apaarasia nuipu, kwape ejaatar apaarasia nuipotu kiboioto kaŋina."
Deuteronomy2:1 “Kasodete aibelokin kaloto modiŋ korot loebei Aŋolol Nakareŋan, kwape kabalar EJAKAIT eoŋ: kerimosi emoru Seir apaarasia nuipu."
Deuteronomy2:2 Katema EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar,"
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Irimosi eroŋat lo apaarasia nuipu: kibelokinos ari naka agolitomei.
Deuteronomy2:4 Kicorak ijo ituŋa ebe, Itorete oikor loka ikusiinacan idwe luka Esau, luiboiete koSeir; kikuriakaros kesi yes: aso ca kocoito noi:"
Deuteronomy2:5 Sirikiŋolopata kakes; naarai mam kainakini yes akecekwap, mam karaida nepeicakakini etau loka akeju bon, naarai ainak Esau moru Seir airum."
Deuteronomy2:6 Igwelete inyamat lunyaman kapesan kamakec; igwelete da akipi numatan kapesan kamakec.
Deuteronomy2:7 Naarai kisirereŋit EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo kaswam kere naka akanikon; abu ŋesi kojenu alositekon kamodiŋ kana nakos: ajaenena EJAKAIT Ekonideke kajo ikar lu akaisaoŋon; amamei ibore yenibu kipuda.’
Deuteronomy2:8 Kwaŋin katuboros kaneejaas iinacanawok idwe luka Esau, luiboiete koSeir, anyoun korot loka Araba, anyoun koElat, ka Esion-geber. “Kebelokinos ketoro orot loka amodiŋ naka Moab."
Deuteronomy2:9 Katema EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, ‘Sirikitunyunyurik Moab, karaida aitoŋolop kes kojie: naarai mam kainakini yes airum akekwap; naarai ainak idwe luka Lot airum Ar.’"
Deuteronomy2:10 (Apotu Iemim kiboioto kanen sek, ituŋa luapolok, kipu, koojak bala Inakaim:"
Deuteronomy2:11 Amaikinitai ŋul Irepaim, kwape Inakaim; konye enyarito Imoabin kes Iemim."
Deuteronomy2:12 Eboioto Ikorin da koSeir sek, konye kirumata idwe luka Esau aiboisikec; komudiasi kes kakonyenekec, kiboikinos aiboisikec; kwape eswamakinia Isirael akwap naka airumeteke, naainakini EJAKAIT kes.)"
Deuteronomy2:13 ‘Aso konyoutu do, kodokata aguurut Sered.’ Kipou kadokata aguurut Sered."
Deuteronomy2:14 Apaarasia nukinyounio oni koKades-barunea, aitodol nakidokia aguurut Sered, emwaasi ikar akaisauni ka lukanykauni; aitodol naadaunor atur kere naka ituŋa lukajiok koidukurun, kwape eyapoikinitor EJAKAIT kes."
Deuteronomy2:15 Bobo da aluikinit akan naka EJAKAIT kes, amudiar kes koidukurun, aitodol naadaunotor."
Deuteronomy2:16 “Kosodi kanen ketwaka ituŋa kere lukajiok, kodaunos da kotuŋa,"
Deuteronomy2:17 Katema EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar,"
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Itori ijo lolo Ar, oikor loka Moab:"
Deuteronomy2:19 Naikunyakinia neejaas idwe luka Amon, sirikitunyunyurik kes, karaida aitoŋolop: naarai mam kainakini jo airum akwap naka idwe luka Amon: naarai ainak idwe luka Lot airum ŋes.’"
Deuteronomy2:20 (Ŋin da emaikinitai akwap naka Irepaim: eboioto Irepaim kanen sek; konye enyarito Imorain kes Isamsumim;
Deuteronomy2:21 Ituŋa luapolok, kipu, koojak bala Inakaim; konye abu EJAKAIT komudia kes kakonyenekec: kirumata kesi, kiboikinos aiboisikec:"
Deuteronomy2:22 Kwape abu ŋesi kiswamakinia idwe luka Esau, luiboiete koSeir, naamudiaria Ikorin kakonyenekec; kirumata kesi, kiboikinos aiboisikec kiton lolo:"
Deuteronomy2:23 Iabim da lueboiete koreria kiton Gasa, apotu Ikaputorim lualomunete koKaputor komudiasi kes, kiboikinos aiboisikec.)"
Deuteronomy2:24 ‘Konyoutu, koloto, kitoroto aditot naka Arunon; koany, ainak Sikon Emorait, ekabaka loka Kesibon ka akwapuke akanikon: kogeutu airum ŋes, koŋolopata kitijioto ŋes."
Deuteronomy2:25 Ageun lolo ebwaikini etasurokon ka ailiilikon otuŋa luejaas kwap kakuj kere, luepupunete akirokon, kosodete amaran ka ariebakin kanukon.’"
Deuteronomy2:26 “Abu kejuka ikiyakia anyoun kamodiŋ naka Kedemot mama ejai Sikon ekabaka loka Kesibon kakiro nuka ainapakin, ebe,"
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Kisiikinai ketor akwapukon: aderi erot lokapolon, mam apaari akan nakoteten karaida nakokediany."
Deuteronomy2:28 Kitwegeli ijo eoŋ inyamat lunyaman kapesan; ka akipi da numatan kapesan: kisiikinai ketor aitor kakeje;
Deuteronomy2:29 Kwape apotu idwe luka Esau luiboiete koSeir ka Imoabin luiboiete koAr keswamakiniata; aitodol naadokia Yorodan alomar akwap nakiinakinit EJAKAIT Ekosideke sio.’
Deuteronomy2:30 Konye mam Sikon ekabaka loka Kesibon abu kisiik oni aitor akwapuke: naarai abu EJAKAIT Ekonideke kitogogoŋ ekemoyo, kitininik eketau, tetere ijaikini ŋes akanikon, kwape ejaar lolo."
Deuteronomy2:31 Katema EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, ‘Koany, ageu aijaikin jo Sikon ka akekwap: kogeu airum, tetere irumi akekwap.’"
Deuteronomy2:32 Kosodi Sikon alomun asurokin oni, ŋes ka iketuŋa kere, ejie koYakas."
Deuteronomy2:33 Kijaik EJAKAIT Ewokodeke ŋes mamawok; kadanyata ŋes ka odweke, ka ituŋake kere."
Deuteronomy2:34 Kerumata ireriake kere kapak kaŋin, kamudiasi cut ŋolire loeboioto ituŋa kotoma, ka aŋor ka ludidik; mam kipou kedeutu idio kakesi:"
Deuteronomy2:35 Dimarai kipou kanatutu ibaren, ka lunatan lukinatuni koreria lukipou kerumata."
Deuteronomy2:36 Anyoun koAroer, loejai ariri naka aditot naka Arunon, kore da loejai aditot, kiton Gilead, amamei ere lokiwojakinit oni: abu EJAKAIT Ewokodeke kijaik kere mamawok:"
Deuteronomy2:37 Dimarai akwap naka idwe luka Amon ŋes mam yes ikunyakinete; ariri kere naka ecor Yabok, ka ireria luka akwap nakiukon, ka neabu EJAKAIT Ewokodeke kitikok oni."
Deuteronomy3:1 “Kasodete aibelokin kabeata Basan: kolom Og ekabaka loka Basan asurokin oni, ŋes ka iketuŋa kere, ejie koEderei."
Deuteronomy3:2 Katema EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, ‘Sirikikurianar ŋes; naarai ejaik ŋes ka ituŋake kere, ka akwapuke akanikon; iswamakini ŋes kwape ibu kiswamakinia Sikon ekabaka loka Imorain, lueboiete koKesibon.’"
Deuteronomy3:3 Kwaŋin kijaik EJAKAIT Ewokodeke Og da, ekabaka loka Basan ka ituŋake kere akaniwok: kadanyata ŋes aitodol naamameunor yenedeikina ŋes."
Deuteronomy3:4 Kipou kerumata ireriake kere kapak kaŋin; amamei erekec lomam oni kipou kerumata; ireria akaisakanykape, akwap kere naka Arugob, ajakanut naka Og koBasan."
Deuteronomy3:5 Ireria ŋul kere araas luabwaitai karwatatin ka irutei ka agolito nuaojak; kogelara ireria lumam abwaitai karwatatin luepu noi.
Deuteronomy3:6 Kipou kamudiasi kes cut, kwape kiswamakinia Sikon ekabaka loka Kesibon, kamudiasi cut ŋolire loeboioto ituŋa kotoma, ka aŋor ka ludidik."
Deuteronomy3:7 Konye kipou kaŋatutu ibaren kere ka luŋatan lukiŋatuni koreria.
Deuteronomy3:8 Kerumata akwap kapak kaŋin kakan naka ikabakan iarei luka Imorain luajaas okekwa loka Yorodan, anyoun kaditot naka Arunon kiton moru Kerumon;"
Deuteronomy3:9 (Kerumon loenyarito Isidonin Sirion, enyarito da Imorain ŋes Senir:)"
Deuteronomy3:10 Ireria kere luka apuuton, ka Gilead kere, ka Basan kere, kiton Saleka ka Ederei ireria luka ajakanut naka Og koBasan."
Deuteronomy3:11 (Naarai Og ekabaka loka Basan, ŋes bon asalit kotoma kaluedeuna luka Irepaim; koany, eitadake kerai eitada loka asuat; mere ejai Raba neejaas idwe luka Amon? Aojauke kerai ikubitin Ikanykaoŋon ka alalauke ikubitin iwoŋon, kwape ejaar ekubit loka etuŋanan.)"
Deuteronomy3:12 “Kipou kerumata akwap ŋin kapak kaya: anyoun koAroer, naejai ariri naka aditot naka Arunon, ka atutubet naka akwap nakiukon naka Gilead, ka ireriake, abu eoŋ kainak Ireubenin ka Igadin:"
Deuteronomy3:13 Ka Gilead naedeuna ka Basan kere, ajakanut naka Og abu eoŋ kainak atutubet naka ateker naka Manase; akwap kere naka Arugob, ŋes Basan kere. (Emaikinitai ŋipeŋin akwap naka Irepaim."
Deuteronomy3:14 Abu Yair okoku loka Manase koyaŋa akwap kere naka Arugob, kiton oikor loka Igesurin ka Imaacatin; abu komaik kes, ŋes Basan, ekekiror elopet, Kabot-yair, kiton lolo.)"
Deuteronomy3:15 Abu kainak Makir Gilead.
Deuteronomy3:16 Abu kainak Ireubenin ka Igadin anyoun koGilead kiton aditot naka Arunon, akidiŋot naka aditot ka eikoruke; kiton ocor Yabok, loerai eikor loka idwe luka Amon;"
Deuteronomy3:17 Araba da, ka Yorodan ka eikoruke, anyoun koCineret kiton aŋolol naka Araba, Aŋolol naka Abalaŋ, naejai kwap neijululuoro Pisiga kari nakokide."
Deuteronomy3:18 “Abu kecorak yes kapak kaŋin ebe, ‘Kiinak EJAKAIT Ekusideke yes airum akwap na: ituboros ikapakina ejie kakonyen nuka ikusiinacan idwe luka Isirael, ituŋa kere luetitiŋ."
Deuteronomy3:19 Konye esalete akusiŋor, ka ludidikikus, ka ibarenekus oreriakus lukainak yes, (ajeni ebe ipu yes ibaren);"
Deuteronomy3:20 Aitodol naisiyeŋunia EJAKAIT ikusiinacan, kwape yes, aitodol nairumiata akwap naeinakinit EJAKAIT Ekusideke kes kokekwa loka Yorodan: ŋes konyet iboŋunioto yesi ŋinituŋanan alupoke nukainak yes.’"
Deuteronomy3:21 Abu kecorak Yosua kapak kaŋin ebe, ‘Aanyut akonikonye kere nueswamaki EJAKAIT Ekonideke ikabakan ŋul luarei: iswamakini kwaŋin EJAKAIT ajakanuto kere nuitori ijo mamakec,"
Deuteronomy3:22 Mam ikuriakaros kes: naarai EJAKAIT Ekusideke, ŋes kijiikinit yes.’"
Deuteronomy3:23 “Abu keŋaiŋa EJAKAIT kapak kaŋin ebe,"
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Wu EJAKAIT Edeke, igeu aitodikin ekonibulesit akonipolou ka akonikan nakagogoŋ: naarai iŋai edeke loejai toma akuj arai toma akwap, loepedori aswam kwape ejaatar akoniswamisio, ido kwape ejaatar akoniswamisio nukapedor?"
Deuteronomy3:25 Keŋaiŋait, kisiikinai katubor aanyun akwap naejok naejai okekwa loka Yorodan, eronat ŋol loejok, ka Lebanon.’"
Deuteronomy3:26 Konye abu EJAKAIT kanyunyurik eoŋ kanukus, mam abu kapup eoŋ: katema EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, “Kililiŋ; sirikiner bobo keoŋ akirot ŋin,"
Deuteronomy3:27 Kodoka ijo aidi naka Pisiga, kiteluo akonikonye to, ka agolitomei, ka eŋalakimak, ka kide, koany kakonyekon: naarai mam idokari Yorodan lo."
Deuteronomy3:28 Konye kodakak Yosua, kitogogoŋ ŋes, kiticat: naarai iŋarenikini ŋesi ituŋa lu, isurumi kes akwap naianyuni ijo.’"
Deuteronomy3:29 Kwaŋin keboikinos aditot naiteos kaBet-peor.
Deuteronomy4:1 “Aso natikwana, ijo Isirael, kopup ikisila ka itubesia, lukesisianakini aiswamaenen; tetere ibusete, ilomarete irumete da akwap nakiinakini EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakus."
Deuteronomy4:2 Siriyatanakinete akirot nakecorakini yes, karaida aiŋoŋar, tetere iricete aicorakineta nuka EJAKAIT Ekusideke nukecorakini yes."
Deuteronomy4:3 Aanyut akusikonye nukesubi EJAKAIT kanuka Baal-peor: naarai ituŋa kere luatuparito Baal-peor, abu EJAKAIT Ekusideke komudia kokidiŋikus."
Deuteronomy4:4 Konye yes luipotu kiketakinos kama kEJAKAIT Ekusideke ejari ŋinidiopet kayesi lolo.
Deuteronomy4:5 Koany, kesisianak yes ikisila ka itubesia, kwape kecorakinia EJAKAIT Ekadeke, kiswamaenenete kwaŋin kotoma akwap nailomarete airum."
Deuteronomy4:6 Aso kocoito aiswamaenen; naarai ŋin ŋes acoakus ka aijenekus kakonyen nuka atekerin nuepupunete ikisila ŋul kere, etemarete ebe, ‘Abeit ateker na nakos eraas ituŋa lukacoa ka lukaijen.’"
Deuteronomy4:7 Naarai ateker nakos naanyoin, ejai edeke diekec, kwape ejaar EJAKAIT Edekewok nakiwoneeneneo ŋes?"
Deuteronomy4:8 Ido ateker nakos naanyoin, ejaas ikisila ka itubesia luebeito kwape ejaatar ikisila ŋul kere, luebwaik eoŋ akonyenekus lolo?"
Deuteronomy4:9 “Konye kocoite, kidari noi ekonitau, kinyeis akiro aimurwokin nuaanyut akonikonye, kinyeis da anyoun kotaukon apaarasia kere nuka akoniijar; konye kitejenanakinenei ikonidwe ka idwe luka ikonidwe."
Deuteronomy4:10 Apaaran nakolo ibwoia kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke koKoreb, nakatemaria eoŋ EJAKAIT atiar, ‘Kotukonokinai ituŋa, eoŋ da esiirari kes akakiro, kisisiaut ayoŋitenen eoŋ apaarasia kere nuebusioto kakwap, kisisianakinete kesi da ikecedwe.’"
Deuteronomy4:11 Ipŋulotu yesi da kikunyakis kobwaata kokwap kemoru; kosaran emoru kiton otau loka akuj; ka amuton, ka idouon, ka amuton naijesi cucucuc."
Deuteronomy4:12 Kiner EJAKAIT kayes kokidiŋ akim; ipotu kopuput eporoto loka akiro, konye mam eanyuna idiobore; dimarai eporoto bon."
Deuteronomy4:13 Abu kolimok yes akeitutuket, naabu kicorak yes aiswamaenen, kes aicorakineta atomon; ewadikat toma amor aarei."
Deuteronomy4:14 Kecorak EJAKAIT kapak kaya aisisianakin yes ikisila ka itubesia, tetere iswamaenenete kakwap naidokarete airum."
Deuteronomy4:15 “Aso kocounitos noi; naarai mam ipotu koanyut idiobore kapaaran naenerar EJAKAIT kayes koKoreb kokidiŋ akim:
Deuteronomy4:16 kinyeis amunaun bonik, aikeun aput naepusit idiobore kere, aput naka yenikiliokit arai yeniberu."
Deuteronomy4:17 Aput naka etiaŋ loejai akwap, aput naka akweny kere naejaas abebenoka naeporitoi kapak,"
Deuteronomy4:18 Aput naka ibore kere yeneliat kokwap, aput naka ibore yenika ecor yenejai toma akipi kwap kalup."
Deuteronomy4:19 Ido kinye aiteluor akonikonye akuj, kiany da akoloŋ, ka elap ka aacer, ŋes ajore kere nakokuju, kijodijodoorete jo aima kes, ka aijaanakin, luabu EJAKAIT Ekonideke kokorak ituŋa kere luejaas kwap kakuj kere."
Deuteronomy4:20 Konye abu EJAKAIT kolem yes kasua nuesaranete, koyaŋau koMisiri, araun kamakeŋ ituŋa luka airumet, kwape ejaar lolo."
Deuteronomy4:21 Bobo da abu EJAKAIT kanyunyurik eoŋ kanukus, keyapoik eoŋ kenyek aidok Yorodan, karaida alomar akwap ŋin nakajokan nakiinakini EJAKAIT Ekonideke araun airumet:"
Deuteronomy4:22 Konye kebusakinit eoŋ atwanikin akwap na, mam kebusakinit aidok Yorodan: konye idokarete yesi, kirumata akwap ŋin nakajokan."
Deuteronomy4:23 Kocounitos, kinyeis aimurwokin aitutuket naka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, naitutuki kayes, aikeun aput naepusit idiobore kere naabu EJAKAIT Ekonideke kisimik."
Deuteronomy4:24 Naarai erai EJAKAIT Ekonideke akim naidopori, Edeke loka ekolo."
Deuteronomy4:25 “Naiwurienena idwe, ka idwe luka idwe, kodaunito do yesi apak naepol kakwap, kosodete amunaun bonik, aikeun aput naepusit idiobore kere, ka aswam nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, aitunyunyurikin ŋes:"
Deuteronomy4:26 Anyaraunit akuj ka akwap araun akajenakakus lolo, ebe, itwakete cut atipet kakwap nailosete airum okekwa loka Yorodan; mam akusipaarasia ipuaros, konye imudiaros cut."
Deuteronomy4:27 Kisiarisiarari EJAKAIT yes otuŋa, ideuni etiaikus edit katekerin, nukireŋeikini EJAKAIT yes."
Deuteronomy4:28 Ijaanakinete kaŋina idekesio, luesubete ituŋa kakecekanin, akito ka amor, lumam esesenete, karaida aipup, karaida ainyam, karaida aiŋuun."
Deuteronomy4:29 Konye arai kimo ijo EJAKAIT Ekonideke kaŋina, idumuni ijo ŋes, arai kimo ijo ŋes kekonitau kere ka akoniijar kere."
Deuteronomy4:30 Naijaikinor ocan, nakidolokinioto da akiro ŋun kere kapaarasia nukokau iboŋuni mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke, ipupuni do ekeporoto:"
Deuteronomy4:31 Naarai EJAKAIT Ekonideke erai Edeke loketimon, mam kijalakini, karaida amudiar jo, karaida aimurwokin aitutuket naka lukapapaakon naabu kiyapoik kes."
Deuteronomy4:32 “Naarai kiŋit nuka apaarasia nuatuboros, nukigeikinete jo, ageun kapaaran naasubakinia Edeke ituŋanan akwap, ka anyoun kosaŋe ediopet loka akuj kiton osaŋe loce, arai ejauna akirot naeputos kakirot na nakos, arai epupunitoi naeputotor?"
Deuteronomy4:33 Epupunito kereka apeŋo ituŋa eporoto loka Edeke inera kokidiŋ kakim kwape ipupunioto yesi, kosodete aijar?"
Deuteronomy4:34 Arai abu Edeke kotamak alemun ateker kokidiŋ naka aceteker, kaigimoreta, ka aanyuneta, ka nukaumokin, ka ejie, ka akan nakagogoŋ. ka akan naerioro, ka nusogim nukos, kwape ajaatar kere nuabu EJAKAIT Ekusideke kiswama kanukus koMisiri kakonyenekus?"
Deuteronomy4:35 Aponi kitodikin jo tetere ijenuni ebe EJAKAIT ŋes Edeke; emamei ece dimarai ŋes.
Deuteronomy4:36 Abu kisiira jo ekeporoto kakuj, tetere kisisianakini jo: abu da kitaany jo akekim naepol kakwap; kopup akekiro kokidiŋ kakim."
Deuteronomy4:37 Kanu naarai abu komina lukapapaakon, abu koseu akeceur naetupakini, kitolom jo koMisiri kakepedor naepol, kojaenena kajo:"
Deuteronomy4:38 Aireŋear atekerin nuepolok nuegogoŋ da adepar jo kakonyenekon, aitolomar jo, ainakin jo akecekwap airum, kwape ejaar lolo,"
Deuteronomy4:39 Aso do kojen lolo, kibwaik otaukon, ebe, EJAKAIT erai Edeke kokuju toma akuj, kwap da kakwap: emamei ece."
Deuteronomy4:40 Irici ijo ikekisila ka aicorakinetake, nukecorakini jo lolo, tetere ijaun ijo ejok, ka ikonidwe lukitupakinete jo, tetere ipuaros akonipaarasia kakwap nakiinakini EJAKAIT Ekonideke ikar kere.”"
Deuteronomy4:41 Kosodi Musa atiakar ireria iuni kokekwa loka Yorodan kama eŋiunia akoloŋ;
Deuteronomy4:42 Tetere ikaaran ekereari ŋina, yeneari iidunyeteke komam epeleikinit, komam elait ŋes lem sek; tetere ekereari ore ediopet kaŋul kosodi aijar:"
Deuteronomy4:43 Kes lu, Beser kotoma amodiŋ, kapuuton, kanuka Ireubenin; ka Ramot kotoma Gilead kanuka Igadin; ka Golan kotoma Basan, kanuka Imanasin."
Deuteronomy4:44 Lu kes ikisila luabu Musa kibwaik akonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael:
Deuteronomy4:45 Nu kes aitejenuneta, ka ikisila, ka itubesia luabu Musa kolimok idwe luka Isirael naalomuniata koMisiri;"
Deuteronomy4:46 Okekwa loka Yorodan kaditot naitei Betpeor, kakwap naka Sikon ekabaka loka Imorain, loeboie koKesibon, luadanyi Musa ka idwe luka Isirael naalomuniata koMisiri:"
Deuteronomy4:47 Kirumata akekwap, ka akwap naka Og, ekabaka loka Basan, ikabakan luarei luka Imorain, luajaas okekwa loka Yorodan kama eŋiunia akoloŋ;"
Deuteronomy4:48 Anyoun koAroer, naejai ariri naka aditot naka Arunon, kiton moru Sion (ŋopeŋol ŋes Kerumon)."
Deuteronomy4:49 Ka Araba kere okekwa loka Yorodan ari nakokide, kiton aŋolol naka Araba, kwap neijululuoro Pisiga."
Deuteronomy5:1 Konyarau Musa Isirael kere, kotema kes atiar, “Jjo ba Isirael, kiira ikisila ka itubesia lualimokini akiikus lolo, tetere isisiaete kes, kosodete airic aiswamaenen."
Deuteronomy5:2 Abu EJAKAIT Ewokodeke kitutukik oni koKoreb.
Deuteronomy5:3 Mam EJAKAIT abu kitutukik lukapapaawok aitutuket ŋin, konye oni, oni lukija ne kere lukijari lolo."
Deuteronomy5:4 Abu EJAKAIT kiner kayes kiteos komoru kokidiŋ kakim,"
Deuteronomy5:5 (Abwoi eoŋ kokidiŋ EJAKAIT ka yes kapak kaŋin, aitodikin yes akirot naka EJAKAIT: naarai ikuriaka yesi akim, mam ipotu kodokasi moru,) ebe,"
Deuteronomy5:6 “‘Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekonideke, loketolomuni jo kakwap nako Misiri, kotogo loka ebulesene."
Deuteronomy5:7 “‘Sirijaenena kicedekesio nabarai EOŊ.
Deuteronomy5:8 “Sirikisub adioput naegerer, karaida asima naka ibore kere yenejai kuju toma akuj, karaida yenejai kwap toma alup, karaida yenejai toma akipi nuejaas kwap kalup:"
Deuteronomy5:9 Sirikikukonokin kes, karaida aijaanakin kes: naarai EOŊ EJAKAIT Ekonideke arai Edeke lokekolo, edopet kodwe numam adolit nuka lukapapaakec, kiton atur nakiwuniet ka nakiwononet naka ŋul kalukalaito eoŋ;"
Deuteronomy5:10 Ido etimi ilukumin luka ituŋa lukaminas eoŋ koricito akaicorakineta.
Deuteronomy5:11 “Sirilimit atai ekiror loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke; naarai mam EJAKAIT isikai aitetelekar akirot, ŋin yenelimit atai ekekiror."
Deuteronomy5:12 “‘Koricite apaaran nakasabato, aitalaun ŋes, kwape kicorakinia jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy5:13 Kitaaritoi apaarasia akanykape, kiswama akoniswamisio kere;"
Deuteronomy5:14 Konye do apaaran nakikanyetekaarei ŋes asabato naka EJAKAIT Ekonideke: apaaran ŋin sirikiswama adioswam kere, ijo, ka okokukon, ka akokukon, ka ekonikejaanakinan, ka akonikejaanakinan, ka ekonimoŋ, ka akonisigiria, ka ikonibaren kere, ka imoit yenejai orekon; tetere ekonikejaanakinan ka akonikejaanakinan iyeŋete kwape kajo."
Deuteronomy5:15 Kiitu ijo ebe irai kolo ijo ebulesit kakwap nako Misiri, kitolom EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo kakan nakagogoŋ, ka akan naerioro: kanuka ŋun kicorakinit EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo airic apaaran nakasabato."
Deuteronomy5:16 “Koyonitenenei papakon ka totokon, kwape kicorakinia jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke: tetere akonipaarasia iyatakinos, tetere da ijaun ejok kakwap nakiinakini EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy5:17 “Siriarenenei.
Deuteronomy5:18 “‘Karaida adotenen.
Deuteronomy5:19 “‘Karaida akokoenen.
Deuteronomy5:20 ““Karaida asabanakin ikoniidunyet,"
Deuteronomy5:21 “Karaida aiŋobelenen aberu naka eidunyetekon; karaida eimiel etogo loka eidunyetekon, alupoke, arai ekekejaanakinan, arai akekejaanakinan, ekemonŋ arai akesigiria, arai ibore kere yenerai yenika eidunyetekon.’"
Deuteronomy5:22 “Abu EJAKAIT kolimok ekodetekus kere akiro ŋun keporoto loepol komoru kokidiŋ kakim, kodou, ka amuton naajesi cucucuc: mam abu kiyatak ace da. Abu kiwadik kes amor aarei, kainak eoŋ;"
Deuteronomy5:23 Kosodi naipupunioto yesi eporoto kokidiŋ kamuton, konoki akim komoru, ipotu kikunyut neajai eoŋ, ikapolok kere luka atekerinikus, ka imakiokus;"
Deuteronomy5:24 Kotemasi yesi atiar, “Koany, kitodik EJAKAIT Ewokodeke oni akeibuses ka akepolou, kipupu da ekeporoto kokidiŋ kakim: kijenu lolo ebe ineras Edeke kituŋanan, ido ejari."
Deuteronomy5:25 Kanukinyo do kitwakia isio? Naarai kinyamaari sio akim na naepol: kitwaki arai kiipupu bobo eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke.
Deuteronomy5:26 Naarai iŋai yenejai akuan, yenikepupunit eporoto loka Edeke lokajaran inera kokidiŋ kakim, kwape kipupunio oni, kosodi aijar?"
Deuteronomy5:27 Kikunyak ijo, kopup kere nuetemari EJAKAIT Ewokodeke: kosodi ijo alimokin sio kere nukilimonokini EJAKAIT Ewokodeke; kipupuni isio, kiswamai da.’"
Deuteronomy5:28 “Abu EJAKAIT kopup eporoto loka akirokus, nakilimokiniata eoŋ; katema EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, ‘Apup eporoto loka akiro nuka ituŋa kalu, nukilimokis jo: alimut ejok ŋun kere nuenerata."
Deuteronomy5:29 Bala ti kojaenena etau loikoni nen kotomakec, kayoŋito eoŋ, koricito akaicorakineta tiritir, tetere ejaunos ejok ka ikecedwe ikar kere!"
Deuteronomy5:30 Kolot kolimok kes ebe, “Koboŋosi yesi owemanakus.”"
Deuteronomy5:31 Konye ijo, kobwo kane, kalimokini jo aicorakineta kere, ka ikisila, ka itubesia, luisisianakini ijo kes, tetere iswamaenenete kes kakwap naainakini kes airum.’"
Deuteronomy5:32 Kanuka ŋun iricete aswam kwape kicorakinia yes EJAKAIT Ekusideke: mam ipaarete akan nakoteten karaida nakokediany.
Deuteronomy5:33 Ilosenenete koroictin kere lukorak yes EJAKAIT Ekusideke, tetere ijarete, ijaunos ejok, iyatakinos da akusipaarasia kakwap nairumete."
Deuteronomy6:1 “Aso na ŋes aicorakinet, ka ikisila, ka itubesia, lukicorakinit EJAKAIT Ekusideke aisisianakin yes, tetere iswamaenenete kakwap naidokarete airum:"
Deuteronomy6:2 Tetere iyoŋit EJAKAIT Ekonideke, iricenenei ikekisila kere ka akeicorakineta, nukecorakini jo, ka ikonikoku ka epapaitikon, apaarasia kere nuka aijarakon; tetere ibusi apaarasia nuipu."
Deuteronomy6:3 Aso kiira, ijo Isirael, koricite aiswamaenen kwaŋin; ijaun ejok, ido kipuaros noi, kwape kolo kisumunio EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakon, kakwap naeleleete akile ka esik."
Deuteronomy6:4 “Kiira, ijo Isirael: EJAKAIT Ewokodeke erai EJAKAIT ediopet:"
Deuteronomy6:5 Kominenena EJAKAIT Ekonideke kekonitau kere, ka akoniijar kere, ka akonigogoŋ kere."
Deuteronomy6:6 Akiro nu da, nukecorakini lolo, kojaananas otaukon:"
Deuteronomy6:7 Ido kodunyakinite aisisianakin kes ikonidwe, kinerenena da kes iboienenei kotogokon, ilosenenei korot, iperenenei, inyoununei da."
Deuteronomy6:8 Koenanakini da akanikon araut aanyunet, kotorokinite da kidiŋ oreet."
Deuteronomy6:9 Kiwadikaenenei da ategerio nukotogokon, koruteikon de."
Deuteronomy6:10 “Kosodi nakitolomaria EJAKAIT Ekonideke akwap nakolo eyapoikini lukapapaakon, Aburaam, ka Isaak, ka Yakob, ainakin; ireria lupekos, ka luejok, lumam idukit,"
Deuteronomy6:11 Ka itogoi luileleba iboro Iukajokak kere, lumam jo ilelebit, ka amototin nuebokok, numam jo ibokit, imanikoria luka emusabibu ka iseitunin, lumam irait, konyam kimonikin;"
Deuteronomy6:12 Ŋes konyet icoitor sirikiimurwok EJAKAIT, lokitonyouni kakwap nako Misiri, kotogo loka ebulesene."
Deuteronomy6:13 Koyoŋitenenei EJAKAIT Ekonideke; kijaanakinenei ŋes, ido kiyapoenenei kokirorike."
Deuteronomy6:14 Siritupanarete icedekesio, kodekesio luka atekerin nukilukunitos yes;"
Deuteronomy6:15 Naarai EJAKAIT Ekonideke loejai kidinikoŋ erai Edeke lokekolo; kinyek anyunyura naka EJAKAIT Ekonideke adakakin jo, komudia kakwap."
Deuteronomy6:16 “Sirikodununete EJAKAIT Ekusideke, kwape kikoduniata ŋes koMasa."
Deuteronomy6:17 Kodunyakinito airic aicorakineta nuka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, ka aitejenunetake, ka ikekisila, lukicorakini joo"
Deuteronomy6:18 Kiswamaenenei da naedolit ka naejok kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: tetere ijaun ejok, ilomari da airum akwap nakajokan nakiyapoikini EJAKAIT lukapapaakon."
Deuteronomy6:19 Aireŋear lukasurupokon kere kakonyenekon, kwape kinerar EJAKAIT."
Deuteronomy6:20 “Kiiŋit okokukon kapaarasia kanuepote ebe, ‘Inyo bo apolou naka aitejenuneta, ka ikisila, ka itubesia lukicorakini EJAKAIT Ewokodeke?’"
Deuteronomy6:21 Kosodi itemari okokukon atiar, ‘Kirai ibulesin luka Parao koMisiri; kitonyou EJAKAIT koMisiri kakan nakagogoŋ:"
Deuteronomy6:22 Ido kitodu EJAKAIT aanyuneta ka nukaumokin, nukos ka nuetioko, koMisiri, ka Parao da, ka eketogo kere, kakonyekosi:"
Deuteronomy6:23 Kitonyou kaŋina, tetere kitolomari ainakin akwap nakiyapoikini lukapapaawok."
Deuteronomy6:24 Ido kicorak EJAKAIT aiswamaenen ikisila ŋul kere, ayoŋenen EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, kanuka ajokisiwok apaarasia kere, tetere kidarenenei kijarete, kwape lolo."
Deuteronomy6:25 Eraun da adolit kamawok, arai kikokit aswam aicorakinet na kere kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, kwape kicorakinia.’"
Deuteronomy7:1 “Nakitolomaria jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke akwap nailosi airum, ireŋeari atekerin nuipu kakonyenekon, Ekitit, ka Egirugasit, ka Emorait, ka Ekanaanit, ka Eperisit, ka Ekibit, ka Eyebusit, atekerin akanykaarei nuepolok, nuegogoŋ adepar jo;"
Deuteronomy7:2 Ido nakijaikinia EJAKAIT kes mamakon, idanyi ijo kes; imudiari kes cut; mam itutuki kakes, karaida aitim kes:"
Deuteronomy7:3 Mam imanyasi kakes; mam ikorakini okokuke akonipese, karaida amanyakin okokukon akokuke."
Deuteronomy7:4 Naarai ibelokini ŋesi okokukon kinye atupit eoŋ, tetere ijaanakinete icedekesio; kwaŋin inepuni anyunyura naka EJAKAIT kamakus, kimudiari da atipet."
Deuteronomy7:5 Konye iswamakinete kes kwanata; itiyanakinete itemwanakec, imunyumunyete ipirinokec, ijepejepete Aserimikec, icweete da akeceputosia nuegerer."
Deuteronomy7:6 “Naarai iraas ituŋa lukalaunak kaneejai EJAKAIT Ekusideke: kiseu EJAKAIT Ekusideke araun ituŋake obe kotuŋa kere luejaas toma akwap.
Deuteronomy7:7 Mere naarai ipu yesi adepar icetuŋa ŋes kiminar EJAKAIT yes, koseu da; kwabo ikidioko yesi adepar ituŋa kere:"
Deuteronomy7:8 Konye naarai kimina EJAKAIT yes, ido naarai itodolit aiyaposit naeyapoikini lukapapaakus, ŋes do kitolomunia EJAKAIT yes kakan nakagogoŋ, kilakunia yes kotogo loka ebulesene, alemun kakan naka Parao ekabaka loko Misiri."
Deuteronomy7:9 Aso do kojenutu ebe EJAKAIT Ekusideke, ŋes Edeke; Edeke lomunot, loericit aitutuket ka aitim kaneejaas lueminas ŋes, ka luericito aicorakinetake kiton aturio alukumit;"
Deuteronomy7:10 Eropi ŋupeŋul luelaito ŋes, amudiar kes: mam iyapi airop ŋipeŋin yenelait ŋes."
Deuteronomy7:11 Kanuka ŋun irici aicorakinet, ka ikisila, ka itubesia lukecorak jo lolo aiswamaenen."
Deuteronomy7:12 “Kosodi kanen naarai ipupete itubesia lu, iricete aiswamaenen, itodoli EJAKAIT Ekusideke aitutuket ka aitim naabu kiyapoik lukapapaakus:"
Deuteronomy7:13 Ido kiminenena jo, kisirereŋenenei jo, kitupui jo: isirereŋi da aur naka akonikuan, ka araito naka alupokon, ka akimakon, ka ebinokon, ka akinyetekon, eiyas loka aitukukon ka amerekekinikon, kakwap naabu kiyapoik lukapapaakon ainakin joo"
Deuteronomy7:14 Kisirereŋio jo adepar ituŋa kere: emameun yenikiliokit arai yeniberu yenirakan kotomakus, karaida kobarenekus."
Deuteronomy7:15 Elemari EJAKAIT adekesia kere kamakon; mam ibwaikini mamakon adio da kadekesia nueroko nuka Misiri, nuijeni ijo da, konye ibwaikini kes mama ejaas ŋul kere lukilaito jo."
Deuteronomy7:16 Imudiari ituŋa kere lukijaikini EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo; mam akonikoŋu itimi kes: karaida aijaanakin ikecedekesio; naarai eraun ŋin atacit kamakon.
Deuteronomy7:17 “Arai kitema kotaukon ebe, ‘Ipu atekerin ŋun adepar eoŋ; ademari eoŋ kes biai akecekwapin?’"
Deuteronomy7:18 Mam ikurianar kes: iituni jokan nuabu EJAKAIT Ekonideke kiswamak Parao, ka Misiri kere;"
Deuteronomy7:19 Aigimoreta nukos nuapotu akonikonye koanyut, ka aanyuneta, ka nukaumokin, ka akan nakagogoŋ, ka akan naerioro, nakitolomunia EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo; iswamakini kwaŋin EJAKAIT Ekonideke ituŋa kere luikuriana ijo."
Deuteronomy7:20 Bobo da ijukari EJAKAIT Ekonideke ekaturuturut neejaas kesi, aitodol neetwakiata luideunos kakesi ka lueŋopete."
Deuteronomy7:21 Mam ikurianar kes: naarai ejaenena EJAKAIT Ekonideke kajo, Edeke lokos loketasuro da."
Deuteronomy7:22 Ireŋeari EJAKAIT Ekonideke atekerin ŋun motimot: mam imudiari kes katipet, kinyeis itiaŋ luka ais aiyatakin kamakon."
Deuteronomy7:23 Konye kijaikini EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo kes, iticani kes kaiticaneta nukos, aitodol neemudiarere."
Deuteronomy7:24 Ŋaikini ikabakanakec akanikon, itooliori Ijo ekeeekiror kokwap kakuj: emamei ituŋanan yenikibwoikini jo, aitodol naimudiaria kes."
Deuteronomy7:25 Icwei aputosia nuegerer nuka idekesiokec: mam iŋobelei epuesa ka esabu loejaatar kesi; karaida ayaŋaun ŋes mamakon, kinyek aipok kanen: naarai erai naketal kaneejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke:"
Deuteronomy7:26 Mam iyauni yeniketal togokon kinyek araun yenikenitoi kwape kaŋesi: italeori ŋes cut, ilai da ŋes cut; naarai erai ibore yenikenitoi."
Deuteronomy8:1 “Iricete aicorakinet kere nakecorak yes lolo aiswamaenen, tetere ijarete, kipuaros, kolomasi airum akwap naabu EJAKAIT kiyapoik lukapapaakus."
Deuteronomy8:2 lituni erot kere loabu EJAKAIT kiŋarenikinio jo ikar lu akaisaoŋon kotoma amodiŋ, tetere inonokiari ijo, aigimor jo ajenun nuejaas otaukon, arai irici aicorakinetake arai mam."
Deuteronomy8:3 Abu kitononok jo, kitakany jo eteŋei, kitanyam jo emanu, lomam ibu kojeni, karaida lukapapaakon mam ajenete; tetere kitejenuni jo ebe mam ituŋanan ejari kanuka atap bon, konye ejari ituŋanan kanuka ŋinikirot naelomuni kaituk naka EJAKAITa."
Deuteronomy8:4 Mam akoninapito abu komojon, karaida akonikeju abuun, kokar kalu akaisaoŋon."
Deuteronomy8:5 Iwomoomoi ijo kotaukon ebe, kwape elecoria ituŋanan okokuke, kilecori EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo kwaŋin."
Deuteronomy8:6 Irici ijo aicorakineta nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, alosenen korotinike, ka ayoŋit ŋes."
Deuteronomy8:7 Naarai kiyaŋaarit EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo akwap naejok, akwap naka aguurun nuka akipi, naka akonye nuka atanin ka aidules, nuibulubulununos kaditon ka iukon;"
Deuteronomy8:8 Akwap naka akima ka esairi, ka imusabibun, ka itinin ka ikamamagan; akwap naka iseitunin luka akinyet, ka esik;"
Deuteronomy8:9 Akwap nainyamiata atap naidila, emameun ibore yenipudakinos kaŋina; akwap naeraas akemor asuat, naibokuniata aisinit koukonoke."
Deuteronomy8:10 Inyami kimonikin, ituri EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kanuka akwap naejok nakiinak jo."
Deuteronomy8:11 “Kocoite sirikiimurwok EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kotoma amamus aricrt aicorakinetake, ka itubesiake, ka ikisilake, lukeeorak jo lolo:"
Deuteronomy8:12 Arai kidau ainyam kimonikin da, kidau adukun itogoi luejok kiboikin nen:"
Deuteronomy8:13 Naeuriarotor isipaninikon luka aituk ka luka imerekekin, naiyatakinor epuesakon ka esabukon, naiyatakinotor da ŋul kere luijaatar ijo;"
Deuteronomy8:14 Kinyek ekonitau adakun, kimurwok EJAKAIT Ekonideke lokitolomuni jo kakwap nako Misiri, kotogo loka ebulesene;"
Deuteronomy8:15 Lokiŋarenikinit jo kamodiŋ nakos naesogim, naajaas imunwo luka akim ka ikiritona, ka akwap naeonit naamameete akip; loetolomuni akipi kanukus katiiba naegogoŋ;"
Deuteronomy8:16 Lokitanyami jo kamodiŋ emanu lomam lukapapaakon ajenete; tetere inonokiari ijo, tetere da kigimori jo, aiswamakin jo nuejok kapaarasia nuepote;"
Deuteronomy8:17 Itemari kotaukon ebe, ‘Apedorika ka agogoŋ naka akakan kes kadumakis eoŋ abara na.’"
Deuteronomy8:18 Konye kiitu ijo EJAKAIT Ekonideke, naarai ŋes lokikorakini jo agogoŋ naidumunia abar; tetere iticasi akeitutuket naeyapoikini lukapapaakon, kwape ejaar lolo."
Deuteronomy8:19 Kosodi arai kiimurwok ijo EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kitupa da icedekesio, aijaanakin kes, ka aima kes, ketejen yes lolo ebe abeit imudiaros."
Deuteronomy8:20 Kwape katekerin nuemudianari EJAKAIT kakonyenekus, imudiaros yesi da kwape kwaŋin; naarai iŋeroto apupun eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Deuteronomy9:1 “Kopup, ijo Isirael: idokari ijo Yorodan lolo, alomar airum atekerin nuepolok nuegogoŋ da adepar jo, ireria luepolok luebwaitai kiton akuj,"
Deuteronomy9:2 Ituŋa luepolok lueojak da, odwe luka Anakim, luijeni ijo, luipupu ijo ebakai ebe, ‘Iŋai epedori abwoikin odwe luka Anak?’"
Deuteronomy9:3 Kojen do lolo ebe, EJAKAIT Ekonideke ŋes lokiŋarenikinit jo bala akim naenyami; emudiari ŋesi kes, itukukumi kes kakonyenekon: ireŋeari ijo kes kwaŋin, imudiari kes atipet, kwape kilimokinia EJAKAIT jo."
Deuteronomy9:4 “Sirikiner ijo kotaukon, kedau EJAKAIT aireŋear kes kakonyenekon ebe, ‘Kanuka adoliteka, ŋes kayaunia EJAKAIT eoŋ airum akwap na’: kwabo ereŋea EJAKAIT atekerin nu kakonyenekon kanuka aronisikec."
Deuteronomy9:5 Mere kanuka adolitekon, karaida kanuka aitenara naka etaukon, ilomaria ijo airum akecekwap: konye kanuka aronis naka atekerin kaŋun ŋes ireŋeara EJAKAIT Ekonideke kes kakonyenekon, tetere iticasi akirot naabu EJAKAIT kiyapoik lukapapaakon, Aburaam, ka Isaak, ka Yakob."
Deuteronomy9:6 “Kojen do ebe mam EJAKAIT Ekonideke kiinakinit jo airum akwap na naejok kanuka adolitekon; naarai iraas yesi ituŋa lueninik imurisiŋa,"
Deuteronomy9:7 Kiitu, sirikiimurwok, kwape ibu kitunyunyurikinia EJAKAIT Ekonideke kamodiŋ: ageun kapaaran nailomunia kakwap nako Misiri aitodol naidolunioto aibois na, ipaliikinito EJAKAIT."
Deuteronomy9:8 KoKoreb da, ipotu kitunyunyurikis EJAKAIT, abu EJAKAIT konyunyurik yes, tikimudiarit da."
Deuteronomy9:9 Naadokaritor eoŋ moru aijaun amor, kes amor nuka aitutuket naetutukikinit EJAKAIT yes, kasodi aiboi komoru apaarasia akaisaoŋon ka akuaresia akaisaoŋon; mam abu kanyam atap, karaida aimat akipi."
Deuteronomy9:10 Kejaik EJAKAIT eoŋ amor ŋun aarei nuewadikatai kebokorit loka Edeke; ewadikatai kes kwape ejaatar akiro kere nuabu EJAKAIT kolimok yes komoru kokidiŋ kakim kapaaran naka atukokin.
Deuteronomy9:11 Kosodi kedaunos apaarasia akaisaoŋon ka akuaresia akaisaoŋon, kainak EJAKAIT eoŋ amor ŋun aarei, kes amor nuka aitutuket."
Deuteronomy9:12 Katema EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, ‘Konyou, kijesar atipet; naarai amunaunos ikonituŋa luitolomuni koMisiri; apaasi atipet korot loabu kecorak kes; asubut aput naacaluna.’"
Deuteronomy9:13 “Katema bobo EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, ‘Aany ituŋa lu, ido koany, eraas ituŋa lueninik imurisiŋa:"
Deuteronomy9:14 Aso do kinyeinai, kamudia kes, kamwata ekecekiror kokwap kakuj: ketuluori jo ateker naegogoŋ naepol da adepar kes.’"
Deuteronomy9:15 Kasodi kebelokin kejesun komoru, konoki emoru akim: kojaas da amor ŋun aarei nuka aitutuket akaninika aarei."
Deuteronomy9:16 Abu kasesen, ido koany, ipotu kodiakasi kama ejai EJAKAIT Ekusideke; ipotu kiswamaut itaok yenicaluna: ipotu kopaasi atipet korot lokicorakinit EJAKAIT yes."
Deuteronomy9:17 Abu ketiŋ amor ŋun aarei, kacaka kes kakaninika, kabwaŋ kes kakonyenekus."
Deuteronomy9:18 Abu kebiror kwap kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape kapak kaya, apaarasia akaisaoŋon ka akuaresia akaisaoŋon; mam abu kanyam atap karaida aimat akipi; kanuka adiakaretakus kere nuipotu kodiakasi, kanuka aswam nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT aitunyunyurikinia ŋes."
Deuteronomy9:19 Naarai akuriana anyunyura ka akadakin naapol, nakinyunyurikinitor EJAKAIT amudiar yes, Konye abu EJAKAIT kapupok eoŋ kapak kaŋin da."
Deuteronomy9:20 Abu EJAKAIT konyunyurik noi Aaron tiemudiarit ŋes: abu eoŋ kelipak Aaron da apak ŋipeŋin.
Deuteronomy9:21 Abu kalem adiakaretekus, itaok yenipotu kosubut, kecwe ŋes kakim, kepudapud ŋes, kedupudupo, aitodol neasubia bala apua: kewelak apuake aguurut naijesuna komoru."
Deuteronomy9:22 “KoTabera, ka Masa, ka Kiburot-kataaba da ipotu kitunyunyurikis EJAKAIT."
Deuteronomy9:23 Ido nakijukaria EJAKAIT yes koKades-barunea ebe, ‘Koloto, kirumata akwap nakainak yes’; ipotu kipaliikis aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, koŋeroto aiyuun ŋes karaida apupun ekeporoto."
Deuteronomy9:24 Ipalionokis EJAKAIT ageun kapaaran nakajenunia yes.
Deuteronomy9:25 “Kebiror do kwap kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT apaarasia akaisaoŋon ka akuaresia akaisaoŋon nuabu kebiror; naarai abu EJAKAIT kobala ebe ekoto amudiar yes.
Deuteronomy9:26 Abu kelip EJAKAIT ebe, ‘Wu EJAKAIT Edeke, sirikimudia ikonituŋa ka airumetekon, nailaku kapoloukon, naitolom koMisiri kakan nakagogoŋ,"
Deuteronomy9:27 Kiitu ikonibulesin, Aburaam, ka Isaak, ka Yakob; sirikite aninik naka ituŋa kalu, karaida aronisikec, karaida adiakaretekec:"
Deuteronomy9:28 Kinyek akwap nakitolomunia ijo sio atemar ebe, “Naarai mam EJAKAIT abu kopedo aitolomar kes akwap naabu kisumun kes, ido naarai alait kes, ŋes etolomaria kes aarakin amodiŋ.”"
Deuteronomy9:29 Kwabo eraas ikonituŋa, airumetekon da, naitolomuni ijo kapedorikon naepol ka akanikon naerioro.’"
Deuteronomy10:1 “Katema EJAKAIT kapak kaŋin ebe, ‘Kikeu amor aarei nueputos kanusodit, kodok moru neajai eoŋ, kikeu da asaduku naka akito."
Deuteronomy10:2 Ewadikakini amor ŋun akiro nuajaas amor nusodit nuibu kobwaŋ, ibwaikini ijo kes asaduku."
Deuteronomy10:3 Abu keswamau asaduku naka akito nuka ekasia kakeu da amor aarei nueputos kanusodit, kadoka moru, ketiŋite amor ŋun aarei kakanika."
Deuteronomy10:4 Abu kiwadika amor kwape ajaatar aiwadikaeta nusodit, aicorakineta atomon, nuabu EJAKAIT kolimok yes komoru kokidiŋ kakim kapaaran naka atukokin: kainak EJAKAIT eoŋ kes."
Deuteronomy10:5 Abu kebelokin, kejesun komoru, kebwaik da amor toma asaduku naabu kekeu; ejaas nepenen, kwape abu EJAKAIT kecorakinia eoŋ."
Deuteronomy10:6 (Konyout idwe luka Isirael koBeerot Beneyaakan koloto Mosera: kotwana Aaron kanen, kidaikinai da nen; kijaanak Eleasar okokuke kotoma osasedotene aiboisike."
Deuteronomy10:7 Konyout kanen kolototo Gudugoda; konyout koGudugoda kiton Yotobata, akwap naka aguurun nuka akipi."
Deuteronomy10:8 Kogita EJAKAIT ateker naka Lebi kapak kaŋin, adakenen asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT, abwoenen kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT aijaanakin ŋes, aisirereŋ kokirorike, kiton lolo."
Deuteronomy10:9 Kanuka ŋun emamei Lebi akorakinet karaida airumet koinacanake; EJAKAIT ŋes airumeteke, kwape abalar EJAKAIT Ekonideke ŋes.)"
Deuteronomy10:10 “Abu kasalak moru kwape kapak kaya nasodit, apaarasia akaisaoŋon ka akuaresia akaisaoŋon; kapupok EJAKAIT eoŋ kapak kaŋin da; mam EJAKAIT abu komudia jo."
Deuteronomy10:11 Katema EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, ‘Konyou, kiŋarenik ituŋa alosit; elomarete airum akwap naabu keyapoik lukapapaakec ainakin kes.’"
Deuteronomy10:12 “Aso do, Isirael, inyo bo kiburai jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke, nabarai ayoŋit EJAKAIT Ekonideke, alosenen korotinike kere, ka amina ŋes, ka aijaanakin EJAKAIT Ekonideke kekonitau kere ka akoniijar kere,"
Deuteronomy10:13 Airic aicorakineta nuka EJAKAIT, ka ikisilake, lukecorak yes lolo, tetere idumuni ajokis?"
Deuteronomy10:14 Koany, akuj, ka akuj naka akuj, akwap, ka luejaas toma kere eraas luka EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy10:15 Konye itojokit EJAKAIT amina lukapapaakon, abu koseu akeeeur naatupakini, ŋes yesi, kotoma otuŋa kere, kwape ejaar lolo."
Deuteronomy10:16 Kokepata do amunyin nuka itauonokus, siri bobo kitininikata imurisinakus."
Deuteronomy10:17 Naarai EJAKAIT Ekusideke, erai Edeke loka idekesio, EJAKAIT da loka ijaka, Edeke lokos, lokapedor, loketasuro, lomam etiakit ituŋa, karaida acamun agwelio."
Deuteronomy10:18 Etubokini ikokiok ka apuserun, emina imoit, ainakin ŋes inyamat ka anapito,"
Deuteronomy10:19 Kominasi do yesi da imoit, naarai iraas kolo yesi da imo kakwap nako Misiri."
Deuteronomy10:20 Koyoŋitenenei EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kijaanakinenei ŋes, kimorikikinos kaŋes, kiyapoenenei kokirorike."
Deuteronomy10:21 Erai ŋesi aituritikon, ŋesi da Edekekon, lokiswamak jo akiro ŋun nuepolok nuketasuro, nuaanyutu akonikonye."
Deuteronomy10:22 Apotu lukapapaakon koloto Misiri ituŋa akaisakanykaarei; konye kwana kitupuu EJAKAIT jo kwape aacer nuka akuj kanuka aipues.
Deuteronomy11:1 “Kanuka ŋun kominenena EJAKAIT Ekonideke, koricite akekirot, ka ikisilake, ka itubesiake, ka aicorakinetake apaarasia kere."
Deuteronomy11:2 Kojenutu do yesi lolo: naarai mam enera kidwekus lumam ejenunito, lumam eanyunito da alecor naka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, akepolou, akanike nakagogoŋ, ka akekan naerioro,"
Deuteronomy11:3 Aanyunetake, ka aswamisioke, nuabu kiswamak Parao ekabaka loko Misiri, ka akwapuke kere, koMisiri;"
Deuteronomy11:4 Nuabu kiswamak ajore naka Misiri, ibalasinikec ka agalinikec: kwape abu korapiaria kes kakip nuka Aŋolol Nakareŋan nakidapitotor yes, kwape amudiaria EJAKAIT kes, kiton lolo;"
Deuteronomy11:5 Nuabu kiswamak yes kamodiŋ, kiton naidolunioto aibois na;"
Deuteronomy11:6 Nuabu kiswamak Datan ka Abiram, odwe luka Eliab, okoku loka Reuben; kwape abu akwap kooŋaria akeituk, kiliko kes, ka ikaliakec, ka iwemanakec, ka ŋinibore kere yenejari yenatuparit kes, koIsirael kere:"
Deuteronomy11:7 Konye aanyut akusikonye aswam kere naepol naeswama EJAKAIT.
Deuteronomy11:8 “Kanuka ŋun koricito aicorakinet kere nakecorak yes lolo, tetere igogoŋioros, kolomasi airum akwap, naidokarete airum;"
Deuteronomy11:9 Tetere iyatakinos akusipaarasia kakwap naabu EJAKAIT kiyapoik lukapapaakus ainakin kes ka akeceur, akwap naeleleete akile ka esik."
Deuteronomy11:10 Naarai akwap nailosi ijo airum, mam eputos kakwap nako Misiri, nailomuniata yesi, naibu koyeik ikinyomokon, naibu kobukonok akipi kakejekon, kwape amana naka idiasio;"
Deuteronomy11:11 Konye akwap naidokarete yesi airum, erai akwap naka iukon ka aditon, emasi da akipi nuka akiru naka akuj:"
Deuteronomy11:12 Akwap naidari EJAKAIT Ekonideke; esesenete ŋes akonye nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, amear kageunet naka ekaru kiton osaŋe loka ekaru."
Deuteronomy11:13 “Kosodi kanen arai kipupoto yesi kojokan aicorakinetaka nukecorak yes lolo, aminenena EJAKAIT Ekusideke, aijaanakin ŋes kekusitau kere ka aijarakus kere,"
Deuteronomy11:14 Ainakini do akwapukus akiru kotoma apakike, akiru naka aiporo, ka akiru naka akamu, tetere ituki akimakon, ka ebinokon, ka akinyetekon."
Deuteronomy11:15 Ainakini da imanikoriakon inya kanuka ibarenekon, ido inyami kimonikin."
Deuteronomy11:16 Kocoito, kinyeis ikusitauon amodio, kosodete apaar, aijaanakin icedekesio aima kes;"
Deuteronomy11:17 Kosodi anyunyura naka EJAKAIT ainepun aluikin yes, agolokin akuj tetere emameun akiru, tetere mam akusikwap ebwaŋuni akeraito; kosodete yesi atwakare atipet kakwap naejok nakiinakini EJAKAIT yes."
Deuteronomy11:18 “Kanuka ŋun ibwaikinete akiroka nu otauonokus ka aijarakus; koenanakisi kes akaninikus araun aanyunet, kotorokinito da kokidiŋ oreetakus."
Deuteronomy11:19 Kisisianakis kes ikusidwe, kinerenena da kes, iboienenei kotogokon, ilosenenei korot, iperenenei, inyoununei da."
Deuteronomy11:20 Kiwadikaenenei da ategerio nukotogokon, koruteikon da:"
Deuteronomy11:21 Tetere akusipaarasia ka apaarasia nuka idwekus iyatakinos kakwap naabu EJAKAIT kiyapoik lukapapaakus ainakin, kwape apaarasia nuka akuj kokuju kakwap,"
Deuteronomy11:22 Naarai arai kidunyakis yesi aricit aicorakinet na kere nakecorak yes aiswamaenen; aminenena EJAKAIT Ekusideke, alosenen korotinike kere, aimorikikin kaŋes;"
Deuteronomy11:23 Ŋes do ireŋearia EJAKAIT atekerin ŋun kere kakonyenekus, irumete do yesi atekerin nuepolok nuegogoŋ da adepar yes."
Deuteronomy11:24 Ŋiniibois naicakete akusikeje eraun nakus: anyoun kamodiŋ, ka Lebanon, anyoun kocor, ecor Eupurat, kiton aŋolol nakoto, ŋes eraun eikorukus."
Deuteronomy11:25 Emameun etuŋanan loepedori abwoikin yes: ibwaikini EJAKAIT Ekusideke etasurokus ka ailiilikus akwap kere naicakete yesi, kwape kilimokinia."
Deuteronomy11:26 “Koany, ebwaikini mamakus lolo arereŋ ka ekenit;"
Deuteronomy11:27 Arereŋ, arai kipupoto aicorakineta nuka EJAKAIT Ekusideke nukecorak yes lolo:"
Deuteronomy11:28 Ekenit da, arai kiŋeroto apupun aicorakineta nuka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, kosodete apaar korot lokecorak yes lolo, atupar icedekesio, lumam yes ijenunito."
Deuteronomy11:29 “Kosodi nakitolomaria jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke akwap nailosi airum, ibwaikini arereŋ moru Gerisim, ka ekenit da moru Eba!’"
Deuteronomy11:30 Mere ejaas kesi okekwa loka Yorodan, kiŋaren kerot kama elomari akoloŋ, kakwap naka Ikanaanin luiboiete koAraba, naitei Giligal, eiduny kiluan luka More?"
Deuteronomy11:31 Naarai idokete yesi Yorodan alomar airum akwap nakiinakinit EJAKAIT Ekusideke, irumete ŋes, iboikinos da nen."
Deuteronomy11:32 Kidarenenete aitodol ikisila kere ka itubesia luebwaik akonyenekus lolo.
Deuteronomy12:1 “Lu kes ikisila ka itubesia luidarenenete aitodol kakwap nakiinak EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakus airum, apaarasia kere nuijariata yesi kakwap."
Deuteronomy12:2 Komudiasi aiboisio kere nuejaanakiniata atekerin nuirumete yesi ikecedekesio, koroŋan lueojak, koukon, kokwap da naka ŋolikitoi kaloepesit:"
Deuteronomy12:3 Kotiyanakis itemwanakec, komunyumunyata ipirinokec, kicweata Aserimikec: kojepejepata aputosia nuegerer nuka idekesiokec; komudiasi ekecekiror kaibois kaŋin."
Deuteronomy12:4 Konye sirikiswamakis kwaŋin EJAKAIT Ekusideke.
Deuteronomy12:5 Konye aibois naeseuni EJAKAIT Ekusideke aibwaikin ekekiror katekerinikus kere, komoenenete aiboisike, koponenenete nen:"
Deuteronomy12:6 Koyaŋaununete nen ainakinetakus nuicweio, ka asubanakus, ka lukitomonetakus, ka ainakinet naedakio naka akusikan, ka aiyaposiokus, ka ainakinetakus nuka akote, ka ikiyaik luka isipaninikus luka aituk ka luka amerekekin:"
Deuteronomy12:7 Konyamenenete kanen kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, kolakanaros kotoma kaŋinibore kayeniswamaete, yesi ka ikaliakus, nakisirereŋio EJAKAIT yes."
Deuteronomy12:8 Siriswamaete iboro kere lukiswamai oni kane lolo, ŋinituŋanan luedolito kakonyeneke:"
Deuteronomy12:9 Naarai eroko yes kedolo aiyeŋun ka airumet nakiinakinit yes EJAKAIT Ekusideke.
Deuteronomy12:10 Konye kidokata Yorodan, kiboikinos da akwap nakisurumi yes EJAKAIT Ekusideke, kisiyeŋun yes kaneejaas lukasurupokus kere lukilukunito, kosodete iboikinos da inapakina;"
Deuteronomy12:11 Kosodi kanen iyaŋaunete kere lukecorak yes aibois naeseuni EJAKAIT Ekusideke aisiboikin ekekiror; ainakinetakus nuicweio, ka asubanakus, lukitomonetakus, ka ainakinet naedakio naka akanikon, ka aiyaposiokus kere nuseuna nuiyapoikinete EJAKAIT:"
Deuteronomy12:12 Kolakanaros kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, yes ka ikusidwe lusap ka lupesur, ka ikusikejaanakinak, ka akusikejaanakinak ka Elebit loejai orekon, naarai emamei ŋes akorakinet karaida airumet kamakus."
Deuteronomy12:13 Kocoite ebe mam iinakini ainakinetekon naicweio kaŋiniibois naianyuni:
Deuteronomy12:14 Konye kaibois naeseuni EJAKAIT kotoma adiopet katekerinikus, iinakini kanen ainakinetakon nuicweio, nen da iswamaenena kere nukecorakini jo."
Deuteronomy12:15 “Konye ipedori aiar ka ainyam akiriŋ koruteikon kere, kwape ejaunor eipud kere loka etaukon, kwape kisirereŋio EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo: epedorete lumam elaete ka luelaete da ainyam ŋin, kwape amori, ka amiam."
Deuteronomy12:16 Konye sirinyamenenete aokot; kobukonorete kwap bala akipi.
Deuteronomy12:17 Sirikinyamak oruteikon yenikitomonet yenika akimakon, ka ebinokon, ka akinyetekon, karaida ikiyaik luka isipaninikon luka aituk ka luka amerekekin, karaida aiyapositikon kere naiyapoi, karaida ainakinetakon nuka akote, karaida ainakinet naedakio naka akanikon;"
Deuteronomy12:18 Konye konyamak kes akonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke kaibois naeseuni EJAKAIT Ekonideke, ijo ka okokukon, ka akokukon, ka ekejaanakinanikon, ka akejaanakinanikon, ka Elebit loejai orekon: kolakanar kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke kotoma kanuiswamai kere."
Deuteronomy12:19 Kocoite kinyek aijal Elebit apaarasia kere nuiboionono ijo kakwap.
Deuteronomy12:20 “Naitalalaaria EJAKAIT Ekonideke eikorukon, kwape kisumunio jo, kosodi ijo atemar atiar, ‘Anyami akiriŋ “naarai imiela ekonitau ainyam akiriŋ; ipedori ainyam akiriŋ kwape ejaar eimiel loka ekonitau."
Deuteronomy12:21 Arai elwana kaneijai ijo aibois naeseuni EJAKAIT Ekonideke aibwaikin ekekiror, iari do yenika esipanikon loka aituk arai loka amerekekin, lokiinak EJAKAIT jo, kwape kecorakinia jo, inyamakini oruteikon, kwape ejaar eimiel loka ekonitau."
Deuteronomy12:22 Kwape enyamere amori ka amiam, inyami ijo da ŋun kwaŋin: lumam elaete ka luelaete da enyamete ŋun kopone ediopet."
Deuteronomy12:23 Konye kitogogoŋ na ebe mam inyamete aokot: naarai aokot ŋes aijar; sirikinyam aijar nepepe kakiriŋ.
Deuteronomy12:24 Sirinyamenenei kes; kobukonori kwap bala akipi.
Deuteronomy12:25 Sirinyamenenei kes; tetere ijaun ejok, ka idwekon lukitupanakinete, naiswamaa ijo nuedolito kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Deuteronomy12:26 Konye koyaŋanari iborokon lukalaunak luijaatar, ka aiyaposiokon, kolot aibois naeseuni EJAKAIT."
Deuteronomy12:27 Iinakini ainakinetakon nuicweio, akiriŋ ka aokot kotem loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke: ebukokinio aokot nuka asubanakon otem loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, inyami ijo akiriŋ."
Deuteronomy12:28 Kidarenene kopupununei akiro nu kere nukecorak jo, tetere ijaun ejok ka ikonidwe lukitupanakinete jo ikar kere, naiswamaa nuejok nuedolito da kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke,"
Deuteronomy12:29 “Naemudiaria EJAKAIT Ekonideke atekerin kakonyenekon, nuilosi ijo airum, kosodi ijo airum kes, iboikin da akwapukec;"
Deuteronomy12:30 Kocoite jo kinyek alokio atupari kes kemudiar kes kakonyenekon; kinyek aiŋitun idekesiokee ebe, ‘Jjaanakinete atekerin nu ikecedekesio biai? Keswama eoŋ da kwape kwaŋin.’"
Deuteronomy12:31 Sirikiswamak kwaŋin EJAKAIT Ekonideke: naarai eswamakis ikecedekesio nuketal kere kaneejai EJAKAIT, nuelait ŋesi; naarai icweanakinete ikecedwe lusap ka lupesur mama ejaas idekesiokec."
Deuteronomy12:32 “Ŋinikirot kere nakecorakini yes, ŋipeŋin iricete aiswamaenen: sirikiyatakis ace, karaida aiŋoŋoor ace."
Deuteronomy13:1 “Arai ketakanu enabi kamakon arai ekerujan airujasia koinak jo aanyunet arai aumokinet,"
Deuteronomy13:2 Kosodi aanyunet arai aumokinet adolore, nakilimokinia do jo ebe, ‘Katupasi icedekesio lumam jo ijenunit, kejaanakis kes’;"
Deuteronomy13:3 Sirikipupok akiro nuka enabi kaŋol, arai nuka ekerujan kaŋol lokairujasia: naarai kigimori EJAKAIT Ekusideke yes, ajenun arai iminas EJAKAIT Ekusideke kekusitau kere ka akusiijar kere."
Deuteronomy13:4 Kotupenenete EJAKAIT Ekusideke, koyoŋito ŋes, koricito aicorakinetake, korimarito ekeporoto, kijaanakis ŋes, kimorikikinos da kaŋes."
Deuteronomy13:5 Eario enabi ŋol arai ekerujan ŋol lokairujasia; naarai ener nukepali mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekusideke lokitolomuni yes kakwap nako Misiri, lokilakuni yes kotogo loka ebulesene, aitapaar yes korot lokicorakinit EJAKAIT Ekusideke aitorit. Ilemari kwaŋin aronis kamakon."
Deuteronomy13:6 “Arai kiijodijod onacekon, okoku loka totokon, arai okokukon, arai akokukon, arai aberu naka atorobukon, arai opaperokon loesubit bala aijarakon alopet, kaiyeiyea, ebe, ‘Kaloto kejaanakisi icedekesio,’ lumam ijenunit, ijo, karaida lukapapaakon;"
Deuteronomy13:7 Idekesio luka ituŋa lukirimorito jo, luidunyas kajo, arai luelwaka kaneijai ijo, ameun kosaŋe ediopet loka akwap kiton osaŋe loce loka akwap;"
Deuteronomy13:8 Sirikicam akekiro, karaida apupun ŋes; karaida akonikoŋu aitim ŋes, karaida aideun, karaida aibwa ŋes:"
Deuteronomy13:9 Konye iari ŋes cut; akonikan ŋes egei aiar ŋes, kosodete konyet akanin nuka ituŋa kere."
Deuteronomy13:10 Ibiribirei ŋes kamor, kotwana; naarai akoto ŋesi aitapaar jo anyoun kama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke lokitolomuni jo kakwap nako Misiri, kotogo da loka ebulesene."
Deuteronomy13:11 Epupuni Isirael kere, eyoŋi da, mam bobo iswamai aronis naikoni nen kamakon."
Deuteronomy13:12 “Arai kipupu ijo korekon ediopet lokiinakinit jo EJAKAIT aiboienen kotoma, ebakai ebe,"
Deuteronomy13:13 ‘Alomasi lukelepa ice kamakon, etapaasi luiboienenete korekec ebe, “Kaloto kejaanakisi icedekesio,”, lumam yes ijenunito;"
Deuteronomy13:14 Iŋituni do ijo, imoi, iŋici kojokan; ido koany, arai erai abeit, kitogogoŋitete akiro, ebe eswamaun naketal ŋin kamakon;"
Deuteronomy13:15 Idanyi luiboienenete kore kaŋol kakwanis naka ekileŋ, imudiari kes cut, ka luejaas toma kere, ka ibareneke, kakwanis naka ekileŋ."
Deuteronomy13:16 Kotukokini luŋatanake kere kidiŋ orotoke, icwei ere kakim, ka luŋatanake kere, mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke: eraun aapoŋor ikar kere; mam bobo edukio."
Deuteronomy13:17 Sirikiŋadak idiobore yenikenitoi akanikon: tetere ibelokin EJAKAIT ainyein adedeŋ naka akenyunyura, kitim jo, kisioni jo, kitupuu jo, kwape abu kiyapoikinitor lukapapaakon;"
Deuteronomy13:18 Naipupio ijo eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, aricite aicorakinetake kere nukecorakini jo lolo, aiswamaenen nuedolito kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy14:1 “Iraas yesi idwe luka EJAKAIT Ekusideke: sirikigera akusiwat, karaida abaren ereet kanuka lukatwak."
Deuteronomy14:2 Naarai iraas yesi ituŋa lukalaunak kaneejai EJAKAIT Ekusideke, kiseu EJAKAIT yes araut ituŋake obe, kotuŋa kere luejaas akwap."
Deuteronomy14:3 “Sirinyamenenei ibore kere yeniketal.
Deuteronomy14:4 Lu kes itiaŋ luinyamete: emoŋ, ka amerekek, ka akinei,"
Deuteronomy14:5 Amiam, ka amori, ka emalet, ka akinei naka ais, ka eloba, ka ekal, ka ecilil."
Deuteronomy14:6 Ka ŋinitiaŋ kere yenetiakak emagegeret, ka yenimwaasi atutubeta aarei nuka emagegeret, yeninyogonokini anyak ikenyamat, kotiaŋ, inyamete ŋin."
Deuteronomy14:7 Konye mam inyamete lu kotiaŋ luinyogonokinete anyak ikecenyamat, arai kaŋul luimwaasi atutubeta aarei nuka emagegeret: akaala, ka ipoo, ka enyuru, naarai inyogonokinete anyak ikecenyamat, konye mam imagegerekec etiakak, eraas lumam elaete kamakus."
Deuteronomy14:8 Ka epege, naarai etiakak emagegereteke konye mam inyogonokini anyak ikenyamat, erai lomam elai kamakus: sirikinyama akecekiriŋ, sirikitirosi da akecewat nukatwak."
Deuteronomy14:9 “Inyamete lu koboro kere luejaas akipi: inyamete ŋin yenejaas isigigirio ka aabel:
Deuteronomy14:10 Sirikinyama nin yenemameete isigigirio ka aabel; erai yenimam elai kamakus.
Deuteronomy14:11 “Inyamete akweny kere nuelaete.
Deuteronomy14:12 Konye lu kes lumam inyamete: emorukaalet, ka ekokom, ka ogaria;"
Deuteronomy14:13 Ekulukulu, ka egole, ka etoori koponeke;"
Deuteronomy14:14 Ka ŋolikuruk koponeke;
Deuteronomy14:15 Ka ekuulu, ka etoori loka akuare, ka eroagol, ka ecur koponeke,"
Deuteronomy14:16 Ekoloroe, ka etukuri loepol, ka etukuri loesubit bala ejaas amumwara;"
Deuteronomy14:17 Erere, ka atarukot, ka etotoet;"
Deuteronomy14:18 Etolut, ka egoro koponeke, ka aonor, ka emenia,"
Deuteronomy14:19 Iboro kere lueliatos luejaas abebenoka eraas lumam elaete kamakus: mam enyamenenoo.
Deuteronomy14:20 Ipedorete ainyam akweny kere nuelaete.
Deuteronomy14:21 “Sirinyamenenete ibore yenetwani bon kanuke: ipedori ainakin emoit loejai orekon, konyam; arai ipedori aitwegel lokacekwap: naarai iraas yesi ituŋa lukalaunak mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekusideke. “Siripoenenei ikalol kakile nuka totoke."
Deuteronomy14:22 “Kodunyite alemanar idiopet kotomon yenika amiokon kere, naelomuni komanikor ŋolikaru."
Deuteronomy14:23 Inyamakini akonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, kaibois naeseuni ŋesi aisiboikin ekekiror, idiopet kotomon yenika akimakon, ka ebinokon, ka akinyetekon, ka ikiyaik luka isipaninikon luka aituk ka amerekekin; tetere isisiauni ayoŋit EJAKAIT Ekonideke apaarasia kere."
Deuteronomy14:24 Arai elwana alosit kaneijai ijo, tape mam ipedori aibwok, naarai elwana aibois kamakon, naeseuni EJAKAIT Ekonideke aisiboikin ekekiror, nakisirereŋio EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo:"
Deuteronomy14:25 Ŋes konyet igwelaria ŋes apesan, kosodi ajen apesan, kitiŋ kakonikan, alosit aibois naeseuni EJAKAIT Ekonideke:"
Deuteronomy14:26 Igweli kapesan kaŋun yenipuda ekonitau, imoŋin, arai amerekekin, arai ebino, arai nuitemerete, arai yenekot ekonitau: inyamakini nen akonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke iyalamikin, ijo ka ekonikal:"
Deuteronomy14:27 Mam ijali Elebit loejai orekon; naarai emamei ŋes akorakinet karaida airumet kajo.
Deuteronomy14:28 “Kosaŋe loka ŋulukar iuni, iyaŋaununei lukitomonet kere luka amiokon kokaru kaŋol, iŋadakini kes orekon:"
Deuteronomy14:29 Elebit da, naarai emamei akorakinet karaida airumet kajo, ka emoit, ka ikoki, ka apuserut, luejaas orekon, epote ainyam kimonikinos; tetere kisirereŋi jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke kaswamisiokon kere nuiswamai."
Deuteronomy15:1 “Kosaŋe loka ŋulukar ikanykaarei ejaun aosikin.
Deuteronomy15:2 Lo ŋes epone loka aosikin: eosikini ŋinikeburan ibore yenikeyuunia ŋesi ekeidunyet; mam cut iburai ŋin kaneejai eidunyeteke ka onaceke; naarai alimor aosikin naka EJAKAIT.
Deuteronomy15:3 Ipedori aibura yenikacekwap: konye ŋiniborekon yenejai neejai onacekon, iwosikini."
Deuteronomy15:4 Konye emameun lokican kamakus; (naarai kisirereŋi cut EJAKAIT kakwap nakiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke airum;)
Deuteronomy15:5 Arai kipup ijo kojokan eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, aidar aitodol aicorakinet na kere nakecorakini jo lolo."
Deuteronomy15:6 Naarai kisirereŋi jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kwape abu kisumunio jo: iyuununei atekerin nuipu, konye ijo mam iyuun kamakec; iyai atekerin nuipu, konye mam kes kiyaete jo,"
Deuteronomy15:7 “Arai ejai yenikican kajo, ediopet koinacanakon, koreriakon kere kakwapukon nakiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke, sirikitininik ekonitau, karaida abunakin akonikan kaneejai onacekon lokican:"
Deuteronomy15:8 Konye abeit ijaikini ŋes yenejai akanikon, abeit iinakini ŋes luitodolete eipudake koboro luilipit ŋesi."
Deuteronomy15:9 Kocoite sirikejaun aomisioit naerono otaukon, ebe, ‘Aapu ekaru lokikanyetekaarei, ekaru loka aosikin’; kosodi aite onacekon loicana kakoŋu naerono, komam iinakini idiobore; kosodi ŋesi amonyia jo kaneejai EJAKAIT, koraun adiakaret kamakon,"
Deuteronomy15:10 Abeit koinanakinene ŋes, sirekadanakini ekonitau naiinakinia ŋes: naarai kanuka ŋun kisirereŋi jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke kaswamisiokon kere nuiswamaenenei."
Deuteronomy15:11 Naarai mam lukican edaunos kakwap: kanuka ŋun kecorakini jo ebe, Abeit ijaikini yenejai akanikon, onacekon, ka yenikon yenilwaritoi, ka yenikicanikon, kakwapukon."
Deuteronomy15:12 “Arai kiitwegel ijo onacekon, Eburaniat arai Aburaniat, kosodi aijaanakin jo ikar ikanykape; iwosikini ŋes anyoun kamakon kokaru lokikanyetekaarei."
Deuteronomy15:13 Naiwosikinia ŋes anyoun kamakon, sirikiwosik ŋes alosit komam ibore;"
Deuteronomy15:14 Ikorakini ŋes luipu luka esipanikon, ka luka epejalikon, ka luka acuesikon naka ebino: iinakini ŋes kwape kisirereŋitor EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo."
Deuteronomy15:15 Kiitununei ebe irai kolo ebulesit kakwap nako Misiri, kosodi EJAKAIT Ekonideke alakun jo: kanuka ŋun kecorakini jo akirot ŋin lolo."
Deuteronomy15:16 Kosodi arai kiitema ŋesi jo atiar, ‘Mam anyouni kaneijai ijo’; naarai emina ŋesi ijo ka ekonikal, naarai ejai ejok kajo;"
Deuteronomy15:17 Ŋes konyet iyaŋaaria emutu apedokinio akekit okirigi, eraun do ekonibulesit ikar kere. Iswamakini da akonibulesit kwaŋin."
Deuteronomy15:18 Mam kitionikini ijo naiwosikinia ŋes anyoun kamakon; naarai abu kijaanak jo ikar ikanykape itia neeti kiropia ekewoteon irwan aarei: kisirereŋi jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke kanuiswamai kere.
Deuteronomy15:19 “Italauni ikiyaik kere lukiliok lueuriete isipaninikon luka aituk ka amerekekin mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke; siritwasamaenenei ikiyaikikon lumoŋin adioswam, karaida aitub ajul nuka ikiyaik luka esipanikon loka amerekekin."
Deuteronomy15:20 Inyamanakini ŋes akonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke ŋolikaru kaibois naeseuni EJAKAIT, ijo ka ekonikal,"
Deuteronomy15:21 Arai eŋwalit ŋesi adioŋwal kere, arai icoda, arai emudukana, aŋwal kere naerono, sirikiinak araun asubanit mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy15:22 Inyamakini ŋes orekon: enyamete lumam elaete ka luelaete da, kwape amori ka amiam."
Deuteronomy15:23 Konye sirinyamenenei aokotoke; ibukonori kwap bala akipi.
Deuteronomy16:1 “Kidarenenei elap loka Abib, koricenenei da aleleŋ naka EJAKAIT Ekonideke: naarai kolap loka Abib ŋes kitolomunia jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke kakwap nako Misiri kuare."
Deuteronomy16:2 Iinakini lukosipanin luka aituk ka amerekekin araun asubanit naka aleleŋ naka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kaibois naeseuni EJAKAIT aisiboikin ekekiror."
Deuteronomy16:3 Sirinyamenenei imugatin luitubuunitoi kasubanit kaŋin; inyamenenei imugatin lumam itubuunitoi apaarasia akanykaarei, kes imugatin luka aiticanitoi; naarai ilomuni ijo kakwap nako Misiri komarani: tetere iituni apaaran nailomunia ijo kakwap nako Misiri apaarasia kere nuka akonikijar."
Deuteronomy16:4 Mam edumakinio yenikitubuunet oikorunokon kere apaarasia akanykaarei; karaida aiteperoor akiriŋ kere naiinakini araut asubanit apaaran nasodit eboŋ, akuare kere kiton tupuruc."
Deuteronomy16:5 Sirikijaik asubanit naka aleleŋ koreriakon kere, lukiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke:"
Deuteronomy16:6 Konye kaibois naeseuni EJAKAIT Ekonideke aisiboikin ekekiror, nen ijaikinia asubanit naka aleleŋ eboŋ, naelomaria akoloŋ, kapak nailomunia koMisiri."
Deuteronomy16:7 Ipei inyami da kaibois naeseuni EJAKAIT Ekonideke: ibelokin tupuruc aboŋor owemanakon.
Deuteronomy16:8 Inyamenenei imugatin lumam itubuunitoi apaarasia akanykape: kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei ejaun atukokinet nakayamakina mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke; siriswamaenenei adioswam.
Deuteronomy16:9 “Imaruni asabaton akanykaarei: ameun kapak naigeunia aisak akima ŋes igeunia aimar asabaton akanykaarei.
Deuteronomy16:10 Idarenenei epucit loka asabaton mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kwape ejaar aitemis naka ainakinet naka akot naka akonikan, nakiinakini, kwape kisirereŋitor EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo:"
Deuteronomy16:11 Ilakanari kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, ijo ka okokukon ka akokukon, ka ekejaanakinanikon, ka akejaanakinanikon, ka ikoki ka apuserut, luejaas mamakon, kaibois naeseuni EJAKAIT Ekonideke aisiboikin ekekiror."
Deuteronomy16:12 Iitununenei ebe irai kolo ebulesit koMisiri: koricenenei aitodol ikisila ŋul.
Deuteronomy16:13 “Kidarenenei epucit loka iswamin apaarasia akanykaarei, kidau aiŋadanakin lukopejalikon ka lukacuesikon naka ebino:"
Deuteronomy16:14 Ilakanari kopucitikon, ijo ka okokukon, ka akokukon, ka ekejaanakinanikon, ka akejaanakinanikon, ka Elebit, ka imoit, ka ikoki ka apuserut, luejaas orekon."
Deuteronomy16:15 Idarenenei epucit mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke apaarasia akanykaarei kaibois naeseuni EJAKAIT: naarai kisirereŋi jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke kamiokon kere, kaswamisiokon kere, ilakanari cut."
Deuteronomy16:16 “Etakanunete ikiliokokon kere kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke irwan auni ŋolikaru kaibois naeseuni ŋesi; kopucit loka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi, kopucit da loka asabaton, kopucit da loka iswamin: mam itakanunete kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT komam ibore:"
Deuteronomy16:17 Einakini ŋinituŋanan kwape epedoria, kwape kisirereŋitor EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo."
Deuteronomy16:18 “Koseu ikatubok ka ijaka koreriakon kere lukiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kwape ejaatar atekerinikon: etubokinete kesi ituŋa ketube loedolit."
Deuteronomy16:19 Sirikibelok etube; sirikitiak ituŋa; karaida ayaare ainakinet; naarai itumudaki ainakinet akonye nuka lukacoa, aitapaar akiro nuka ikadoliton."
Deuteronomy16:20 Itupenenei naedolit cut, tetere ijari, irumi akwap nakiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy16:21 “Sirikiraik Asera naka ediopone kere loka ekitoi eiduny ketem loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, loiswamauni ijo."
Deuteronomy16:22 Karaida asipokin epir; loelait EJAKAIT Ekonideke.
Deuteronomy17:1 “Sirikiinak EJAKAIT Ekonideke asubanit naka emoŋ arai amerekek naejai aŋwal, arai yenerono: naarai erai ŋin naketal mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy17:2 “Arai kedumakin mamakon, oreriakon lukiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke, etuŋanan arai aberu, yeniswamai nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, adiakar aitutuketeke."
Deuteronomy17:3 Kosodi alosit aijaanakin icedekesio, aima kes, arai akoloŋ, arai elap, arai idiopet yenika ajore naka akuj, yenimam kecorakinit;"
Deuteronomy17:4 Kosodete alimokin jo, kopup ijo nuke, kosodi ijo aiŋitun kojokan, ido koany, arai erai abeit, kitogogoŋitete akirot, ebe eswamaun naketal ŋin koIsirael;"
Deuteronomy17:5 Ŋes do iyaŋaunia etuŋanan ŋol arai aberu ŋin, yeniswamat aronis ŋin, kiton orutekon, etuŋanan arai aberu; ibiribirete kes kamor, kotwaka."
Deuteronomy17:6 Kakirot naka ikajenak iarei arai iuni, ŋes earere ŋin yeneario; mam eario kakirot naka ekajenan ediopet."
Deuteronomy17:7 Ikajenak kes kigeikinete aiar ŋes, kosodete konyet ituŋa kere. Ilemari do kwaŋin aronis kamakon."
Deuteronomy17:8 “Arai ketakanu akirot nakitionikinit ijo aitub, kidiŋ aokot ka aokot, kidiŋ akirot ka akirot, kidiŋ aromait ka aromait, koraas akiro nuka epeget koruteikon: ŋes konyet inyounio alosit aibois naeseuni EJAKAIT Ekonideke;"
Deuteronomy17:9 Idolokini isasedotin Ilebin, ka ekatubon loejaun kapaarasia kaŋun: iŋituni; kilimokinete jo akirot naka etube:"
Deuteronomy17:10 Iswamai ijo cut kwape ejaar akirot nakilimokinete kesi jo, kaibois kaŋin naeseuni EJAKAIT; irici ijo aiswamaenen kwape ejaatar kere nukisisianakinete kesi jo:"
Deuteronomy17:11 Iswamaenenei cut kwape ejaar ekisil lokisisianakinete kesi jo, kwape ejaar etube lokilimokinete: sirikipaa teten arai kediany, ainyein akirot nakilimokinete kesi jo."
Deuteronomy17:12 Etuŋanan loeninik, komam epupuni esasedoti loebwoi aijaanakin kanen kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, arai ekatubon, eario etuŋanan ŋol: ilemari aronis koIsirael."
Deuteronomy17:13 Epupunete ituŋa kere, eyoŋete, komam bobo eninikaros."
Deuteronomy17:14 “Kidol akwap nakiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kirum, kiboikin da toma; kosodi atemar atiar, ‘Adakakini ekabaka ayait eoŋ, kwape katekerin kere nukalukunito’;"
Deuteronomy17:15 Idakakini ŋol loeseuni EJAKAIT Ekonideke araun ekabakakus: ediopet koinacanakon ŋes idakakini araun ekabakakus: sirikidakak lokacekwap lomam erai onacekon ayait jo.
Deuteronomy17:16 Konye siri ŋes kitupuu ikebalasin, karaida aitoboŋor ituŋa Misiri, tetere itupui ibalasin: naarai abu EJAKAIT kotema yes ebe, ‘Amear lolo mam bobo iboŋorete ŋina.’"
Deuteronomy17:17 Siri ŋes kitupuu da akeŋor, kinyek eketau apaar; karaida aitupuu noi ekepuesa ka ekesabu."
Deuteronomy17:18 “Kosodi naiboikinor ŋesi oicoloŋ loka ajakanutuke, etakakini oitabo ekisil ŋol loejai akonyen nuka isasedotin Ilebin:"
Deuteronomy17:19 Ejaenena kaŋes, esiomenenei ŋesi apaarasia kere nuka aijarake: tetere isisiauni ayoŋit EJAKAIT Ekedeke, aidar akiro kere nuka ekisil kaŋol ka ikisila ŋul, aiswamaenen:"
Deuteronomy17:20 Kinyek eketau aomiara adepar iinacanake, tetere mam epaari teten arai kediany ainyein aicorakinet: tetere iyatakinos akepaarasia kajakanutuke, ŋes ka ikedwe, koIsirael."
Deuteronomy18:1 “Mam isasedotin Ilebin, kes ateker kere naka Lebi, ejaunos kakorakinet karaida airumet koIsirael: enyamenenete ainakineta nueinakinere kakim nuka EJAKAIT, ka airumeteke."
Deuteronomy18:2 Mam kes ejaunos kairumet kama ejaas iinacanakec; EJAKAIT ŋes airumetekec kwape alimokinia ŋesi kes.
Deuteronomy18:3 Lu kes luitebeitai isasedotin kaneejaas ituŋa, kaneejaas ŋul lueinakinete asubanit, arai emoŋ arai amerekek, einanakinete esasedoti akuat, ka iitinyo iarei ka aboi."
Deuteronomy18:4 Iinakini ŋes nuegeete nuka akimakon, ka ebinokon, ka akinyetekon, ka nusodit nuka ajul nuka amerekekinikon."
Deuteronomy18:5 Naarai aseu EJAKAIT Ekonideke ŋes katekerinikon kere abwoenen aijaanakin kokiror loka EJAKAIT, ŋes ka odweke ikar kere."
Deuteronomy18:6 “Arai kenyou Elebit koreriakon koIsirael kere, loiboionono, kobu keimiel kere loka etauke aibois naeseuni EJAKAIT;"
Deuteronomy18:7 Jjaanakini ŋesi kokiror loka EJAKAIT Ekedeke, kwape iswamaata iinacanake kere Ilebin, luebwoenenete kanen kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Deuteronomy18:8 Edumunete akorakineta nueriakanara ainyam, kogelara ŋun nuelomunete kotiai loegwelarere akelup,"
Deuteronomy18:9 “Kidau adolore akwap nakiinakini EJAKAIT Ekonideke, sirikisisiau aswam kwape ejaatar italesio luka atekerin kwa."
Deuteronomy18:10 Siriketakanu kaneijai ijo ituŋanan kere yenitotori okokuke arai akokuke akim, karaida yeniswamai nuka airo, karaida yeneŋici aanyuneta, karaida yenikalemeleman, karaida ikacudan,"
Deuteronomy18:11 Karaida ikaroan, karaida yenikeŋitan aiokin, karaida ikepiedan, karaida yenikenitan lukatwak."
Deuteronomy18:12 Naarai ŋinituŋanan yeniswamai ŋun erai yeniketal mama ejai EJAKAIT; ido kanuka italesio kaŋul, ŋes ireŋearia EJAKAIT Ekonideke kes kakonyenekon."
Deuteronomy18:13 Korai ijo loidolit kaneejai Ekonideke.
