Deuteronomy18:14 Naarai atekerin nu nuirumi ijo, epupete ŋul lueŋicete aanyuneta ka ikaroak; konye ijo, mam kicamakinit Ekonideke aiswamaenen kwaŋin."
Deuteronomy18:15 “Kitonyoikini rwaru EJAKAIT Ekonideke enabi kokidiŋikon, koinacanakon, loeputos keoŋ; ŋol ŋes iirarete rwaru;"
Deuteronomy18:16 Kwape ejaatar kere nuibu kilip EJAKAIT Ekonideke koKoreb, kapaaran naka atukonokin, kobala ebe, ‘Kenyek akiirar bobo eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekadeke, ido kenyek aanyun bobo akim na naepol, kenyek atwanare.’"
Deuteronomy18:17 Katema EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, ‘Enerata ejok ŋun nualimut."
Deuteronomy18:18 Etonyoikini kes rwaru enabi koinacanakec loeputos kajo: ido ebwaikini akakiro aitukuke, ido kilimokini yes kere nuecorakini."
Deuteronomy18:19 Kosodi kanen, ŋinituŋanan yenimam iirari akakiro nuinera ŋesi kokirorika, etepeseni kanuka ŋun."
Deuteronomy18:20 Konye enabi loiilokini einer akiro kokirorika numam ecorakinit ŋes einer, arai ŋol loinera kokiror loka idekesio ice, eario enabi ŋol.’"
Deuteronomy18:21 Arai kitema ijo kotaukon ebe, ‘Kijenuni oni biai akirot namam EJAKAIT elimunit?’"
Deuteronomy18:22 Nainerar enabi kokiror loka EJAKAIT, arai mam akirot etakanunit, karaida adolore, ŋin ŋes akirot namam EJAKAIT elimunit: eilokini enabi einer, sirikikurianar ŋes."
Deuteronomy19:1 “Naemudiaria EJAKAIT Ekonideke atekerin, ikulepek akwap nakiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kirum aiboisikec, kiboikin oreriakec ka otogoikec;"
Deuteronomy19:2 itiakuni ireria iuni kokidiŋ kakwapukon nakiinakinit EJAKAIT Ekonideke airum.
Deuteronomy19:3 Itemokini erot, itiaki iikoruno luka akwapukon nakisurumi jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke kotoma atutubeta auni tetere ikaaran ekereari ŋina."
Deuteronomy19:4 “Na ŋes akirot naka ikaaran, yenekereari ŋina kojar: ŋin yenimam epeleikinit aiar eidunyeteke, komam lem sek elait ŋes;"
Deuteronomy19:5 Kwape etuŋanan loelosi amagoro keidunyeteke aibet akito, kosodi aikeun aep ajepia ekitoi, koutor aep kakujup, kocam eidunyeteke, kotwana; ekereari ŋol ore ediopet kaŋul kojar;"
Deuteronomy19:6 Kinyek ekenyaŋan aokot aidap ekaaran, eroko eketau enyunyura noi, kosodi adolokin ŋes, naarai elwana erot, ainom ŋes aiar; kwabo mam ebusakinit ŋesi atwanare, naarai mam abu kolaite ŋes lem sek,"
Deuteronomy19:7 Kanuka ŋun, ŋes kecorakinitor ebe, Itiakuni ireria iuni."
Deuteronomy19:8 Arai kitalal EJAKAIT Ekonideke eikorukon, kwape eyapoikinia lukapapaakon, ainakin jo akwap kere naabu kiyapoik ainakin lukapapaakon;"
Deuteronomy19:9 Arai kiric aicorakinet na kere aiswamaenen, nakecorakini jo lolo, aminenena EJAKAIT Ekonideke, alosenen duc korotinike; ŋes konyet iyatakinia ireria ice iuni, kogelara ŋul iuni:"
Deuteronomy19:10 Tetere aokot numam akirot mam ebukorio kakwapukon, nakiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke araun airumet, kosodete aokot abeikin jo."
Deuteronomy19:11 “Konye arai elait etuŋanan eidunyeteke, kosodi aperun ŋes, konyoik ŋes, kosodi ainom ŋes aiar; kokerea ore ediopet kaŋul:"
Deuteronomy19:12 Jjukarete imakio luka ereke aomare ŋes, ijaikinete ŋes akan naka ekenyaŋan aokot, tetere eario."
Deuteronomy19:13 Mam akonikoŋu itimi ŋes, konye ilemari aokot numam akirot koIsirael, tetere ijaun ejok,"
Deuteronomy19:14 “Sirikijul eikor loka eidunyetekon, loatubete lukolo sek, kotoma airumetekon nairumi, kakwap nakiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke airum."
Deuteronomy19:15 “Mam ekajenan ediopet enyoikini ituŋanan kanuka numam adolit, karaida kanuka adiakaret, kadiakaret kere naediakari: kakiro nuka ikajenak iarei arai kakiro nuka ikajenak iuni ŋes itogogoŋere akirot."
Deuteronomy19:16 Arai kenyoiki ituŋanan ekaienan lomam edolit aitejenun adiakareteke;
Deuteronomy19:17 Ŋes do ebwoiata ituŋa ŋul iarei luepegas kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kakonyen da nuka isasedotin ka ikatubok luejaunos kapaarasia kaŋun;"
Deuteronomy19:18 Eŋicete ikatubok kojokan; ido koany, arai erai ekajenan ekajenan loeŋalai, kitejenunite da nuka aiŋal kaneejai onaceke;"
Deuteronomy19:19 Ŋes konyet ikwaikiniata ŋes kwape aomitor ŋesi aikwaikin onaceke: ilemari kwaŋin aronis kamakon.
Deuteronomy19:20 Ido epupunete ŋul luesalecte, eyoŋete da, mam bobo iswamaete aronis ŋin kamakon."
Deuteronomy19:21 Mam akonikoŋu itimi; egeli aijar aijar, akoŋu itia akoŋu, ekelai da itia ekelai, akan itia akan, akeju da itia akeju."
Deuteronomy20:1 “Nailomaria aitiji lukasurupokon, kiany abalasin, ka agalin, ka ituŋa lukitelekarito jo, sirikikurianar kes: naarai ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke kajo, lokitolomuni jo kakwap nako Misiri."
Deuteronomy20:2 Kosodi naikunyakiniata oije, ikunyakini esasedoti kosodi alimokin ituŋa ebe,"
Deuteronomy20:3 ‘Kiira, ijo Isirael, ikunyakis lolo aitiji lukasurupokus: kinyeis ikusitauon aiilor; sirikiyaloŋoŋoto, karaida amaran, karaida akurianar kes;"
Deuteronomy20:4 Naarai EJAKAIT Ekusideke, ŋes loelosi kayes, ŋes kijiikini yes lukasurupokus, aitajar yes.’"
Deuteronomy20:5 Elimokinete ijaka da ituŋa ebe, ‘Iŋai etuŋanan loedukit eketogo lokitetet, lomam einakinit akesubanit? Kolot koboŋo togoke, kinyek atwanikin ojie, kosodi ecetuŋanan ainakin asubanit."
Deuteronomy20:6 Iŋai da etuŋanan loirait akemana naka emusabibu, lomam enyamit araitoke? Kolot kobono togoke, kinyek atwanikin oiie, kosodi ecetuŋanan ainyam araitoke."
Deuteronomy20:7 Iŋai da etuŋanan loisinerit apese, lomam emanyit ŋes? Kolot koboŋo togoke, kinyek atwanikin ojie, kosodi ecetuŋanan aimany ŋes.’"
Deuteronomy20:8 Iyatakinete ijaka alimokin ituŋa ebe, “Iŋai etuŋanan loekuriana, loekuruporo eketau? Kolot koboŋo togoke. Kinyeis itauon luka iinacanake da acalar bala etauke.’"
Deuteronomy20:9 Kosodi naitanaŋiata ijaka akirokec mama ejaas ituŋa, edakakinete ikapolok luka ajoresio apolokinit ituŋa."
Deuteronomy20:10 “Naikunyakinia ijo aitiji ere, ilimokini ŋes nukainapakin."
Deuteronomy20:11 Kosodi, arai kiiboŋok jo nukainapakin, koŋaik da jo, kosodete ituŋa kere luejaas toma araun ikeswamak ipelueik, ijaanakinete da jo."
Deuteronomy20:12 Arai kener ainapakin kajo, konye kitiji jo, irigauni do ŋes:"
Deuteronomy20:13 Nakijaikinia EJAKAIT Ekonideke ŋes akanikon, idanyi ŋolikiliokit kakwanis naka ekileŋ:"
Deuteronomy20:14 Konye aŋor, ka ludidik, ka ibaren, ka luejaas ore kere, luŋatan kere, ijoreori kanukon; inyami luŋatuna kaneejaas lukasurupokon, lukiinak EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo."
Deuteronomy20:15 Iswamakini kwaŋin ireria kere luelwaka kaneijai ijo, lumam eraas ireria luka atekerin nu."
Deuteronomy20:16 Konye lukoreria luka ituŋa kalu lukiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke araun airumet, mam itajari idiobore yeniyeŋa;"
Deuteronomy20:17 Konye imudiari kes cut; Ekitit, ka Emorait, ka Ekanaanit, ka Eperisit, ka Ekibit, ka Eyebusit; kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo:"
Deuteronomy20:18 Tetere mam kisisianakinete yes aiswamaenen nuka italesiakec kere, nueswamakis idekesiokec; kinyeis adiakar kwaŋin kama ejai EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Deuteronomy20:19 “Nairigauniata ere apaarasia nuipu aitiji ŋes airum, sirikimudia ikitoke kanuka aijep kaep; naarai ipedori ainyam kes, sirikijep kes; naarai erai kereka ekitoi loka emanikor etuŋanan tape ijo irigauni ŋes?"
Deuteronomy20:20 Dimarai ikito bon luijeni ijo ebe mam enyamio, imudiari kes, ijepi da; idukuni lujiis aitijio ere lokitijie jo, aitodol naibiroror."
Deuteronomy21:1 “Arai kedumun idiopet earitai eperi kais kakwap nakiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke airum, komam ejenio yenikeseni ŋes:"
Deuteronomy21:2 Epote do imakiokon ka ikatubokokon, kosodete aitem kiton oreria luelukunito ŋin yenearitai:"
Deuteronomy21:3 Kosodi ere loeapie kituŋanan yenearitai, elemunete imakio luka ere kaŋol ataok nakosipan, namam itwasamatai, namam iriit ajokot;"
Deuteronomy21:4 Eyaŋaarete imakio luka ere kaŋol ataok aditot naeleleete akip, namam ekoritai, karaida ayeit, ebilete emurisin loka ataok kaditot:"
Deuteronomy21:5 Ikunyunete isasedotin odwe luka Lebi; naarai aseu EJAKAIT Ekonideke kes aijaanakin ŋes, ka aisirereŋ kokiror loka EJAKAIT; ido kwape ejaar akecekirot ŋes ejaunor ŋolipeget ka ŋiniromait:"
Deuteronomy21:6 Ilotakinete imakio kere luka ere kaŋol loeapie kituŋanan yenearitai, akecekanin, neejai ataok naabilio emurisiŋike kaditot:"
Deuteronomy21:7 Eboŋokinete ebe, ‘Mere akosikanin abukorete aokot nu, karaida akosikonyen mam eanyunito."
Deuteronomy21:8 Wu EJAKAIT, kisioni ikonituŋa Isirael, luilaku, sirikicamak aokot numam akirot asalakin mama ejaas ikonituŋa Isirael.’ Isionio kes nuka aokot."
Deuteronomy21:9 Ilemari kwaŋin aokot numam akirot kamakon, naiswamaa ijo nuedolito kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT,"
Deuteronomy21:10 “Nailomaria aitiji lukasurupokon, ido kijaik EJAKAIT kes akaninikon, kijoreu da ijo kes,"
Deuteronomy21:11 Kosodi aanyun kaneejaas lukijoreuno aberu naitemelel, kimielakin ŋes, kokoto aimany ŋes;"
Deuteronomy21:12 Ŋes do iyaŋaaria ŋes togokon; ebareni ŋesi akekou, ekepi da akebelekeka;"
Deuteronomy21:13 Elacari anapito naka aŋatunioke, esalakini togokon, emonyi papake ka totoke elap ediopet: akaulo kaŋun ilomari mamake araun okilenike, eraun ŋesi da akoniberu."
Deuteronomy21:14 Kosodi, arai mam jo itojokit ŋes, ijalakini do ŋes alosit neekot; konye sirikigwela ŋes cut apesan, sirikikonak ŋes bala abulesit, naarai ibu kitisil ŋes."
Deuteronomy21:15 “Arai ejaas etuŋanan aŋor aarei, komina adiopet, kolaite da adiopet, kourikinito da ŋes idwe, kesi aarei, naminat, ka naelaitai; ido arai erai ekiyai losapat loka ŋin naelaitai;"
Deuteronomy21:16 Kosodi kapaaran naisurumia ŋesi odweke iboro luejaatar ŋesi, mam ŋes ituluori okoku loka naminat ekiyai ageikin okoku loka naelaitai, loerai ekiyai obe:"
Deuteronomy21:17 Konye ecamuni ŋesi ekiyai, okoku loka naelaitai, ekorakini ŋes iboro luejaatar irwan aarei: naarai ŋol ŋes ageunet naka akegogoŋ; ewai loka ekiyai erai ekeŋ,"
Deuteronomy21:18 “Arai ejai etuŋanan okokuke loeninik loipaliono da, lomam erimari eporoto loka papake, karaida eporoto loka totoke, lomam iirari kes karaida kelecosi ŋes:"
Deuteronomy21:19 Ikamunete do ŋes papake ka totoke, eyaŋaunete mama ejaas imakio luka ereke, kiton orute loka aiboisike;"
Deuteronomy21:20 Etemarete kesi imakio luka ereke ebe, ‘Eninik okokukosi lo, ipaliono da, eŋerit arimar eporotokosi; erai otaupe, emerana da.’"
Deuteronomy21:21 Ibiribirete ŋes ituŋa kere luka ereke kamor, kotwana: ilemari kwaŋin aronis kamakon; epupuni Isirael kere, kosodi aiyoŋ."
Deuteronomy21:22 “Arai ediakarit ituŋanan adiakaret naibusakinitor atwanare, koarai, kosodi aikajakin ŋes okitoi;"
Deuteronomy21:23 Sirikesalaki akekuan okitoi akuare kere, konye idaete ŋes apaaran ŋipenin; naarai ikenit Edeke ŋin yenikajakinitai; kinyek amunaun akonikwap nakiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke airum."
Deuteronomy22:1 “Sirikijalak emoŋ loka onacekon arai amerekekike naianyunia eoliori: abeit inyakari kes neejai onacekon.
Deuteronomy22:2 Arai mam onacekon eapie kaneijai ijo, ido arai mam jo ijeni ŋes, iyaŋaari do ŋes orekon, ejaun kajo aitodol naemoia onaeekon ŋes, inyakakini ŋes."
Deuteronomy22:3 Ikwaikini kwaŋin akesigiria; ikwaikini da kwaŋin akenapito; ikwaikini da kwaŋin ŋinibore yeneoliorit yenika onacekon, yeneoliorit kamake, ka yenidumuni ijo; sirikijalak."
Deuteronomy22:4 Sirikite asigiria naka onacekon arai ekemoŋ ibirokina orot, kosodi ajalakin: iŋarakini ŋes cut aitobwo kes bobo."
Deuteronomy22:5 “Sirinapenenei aberu yenerai yenika ekiliokit, karaida ekiliokit ainap inapen luka aberu: naarai ŋin yeniswamai ŋun erai yeniketal kama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy22:6 “Arai kejaun akai naka akweny orotokon, okitoi arai alup, ka idweke arai abeeike, kirukumite totokec idwe arai abeei, mam iyaŋaari totokec ka idwe:"
Deuteronomy22:7 Jjalakini totokec alosit, konye ipedori ayaŋaar idwe; tetere ijaun ejok, iyatakini da akonipaarasia."
Deuteronomy22:8 “Naidukio etogo lokitetet, idukokini arwatat nadidi airimor eswikon, kinyek aitebe aokot togokon, arai kibirun ituŋanan kaŋina."
Deuteronomy22:9 “Sirikiye ikinyom luka iponesio iarei amanakon naka emusabibu: kinyek atwaniar araito kere, ikinyom luibu koye, ka amio naka amana naka emusabibu."
Deuteronomy22:10 Sirikitokor emoŋ nepepe kasigiria.
Deuteronomy22:11 Sirikinap anapito nainyalinyala, ajul ka ebaputa nuesonyitai nepepe."
Deuteronomy22:12 “Iswamakini isilo atokito aoŋon nuka anapitokon, naimukori ijo,"
Deuteronomy22:13 “Arai kemany etuŋanan aberu, koloma mamake, kosodi aila ŋes."
Deuteronomy22:14 Apwakanakin ŋes, amunaun ekekiror, ebe, ‘Abu kamany aberu na kosodi naekunyakinia mamake, mam abu kadum aanyuneta nuka abekonut’:"
Deuteronomy22:15 Kosodi papa kapese, ka totoke, ayaŋaun aanyuneta nuka abekonut naka apese, mama ejaas imakio luka ere orute:"
Deuteronomy22:16 Etemari papa kapese imakio atiar, ‘Abu kakorak etuŋanan lo akokuka aimany, konye elait ŋes;"
Deuteronomy22:17 Ido koany, apwakanaki ŋes ebe, “Mam abu kadum aanyuneta nuka abekonut kaneejai akokukon”; kwabo nu kes aanyuneta nuka abekonut naka akokuka.’ Kosodete apesikin anapito akonyen nuka imakio luka ere."
Deuteronomy22:18 Eyaŋaarete imakio luka ere etuŋanan ŋol elecorete da ŋes;
Deuteronomy22:19 Itegelete ŋes isekelin akwatat luka epuesa, einakinete kes papa kapese, naarai abu komunau ekiror loka abekot naka Isirael: eraun akeberu; mam ireŋeari ŋes apaarasiake kere."
Deuteronomy22:20 Konye arai erai akirot abeit, ebe mam edumunitai aanyuneta nuka abekonut kaneejai apese:"
Deuteronomy22:21 Eyaŋaunete do apese okek loka etogo loka papake, ibiribirete ituŋa luka ereke ŋes kamor, kotwana: naarai eswamaa nukabaŋaanut koIsirael araun naadote kotogo loka papake: ilemari kwaŋin aronis kamakon."
Deuteronomy22:22 “Arai kegolor etuŋanan ka aberu naka ekiliokit, etwakete kes kere iarei, etuŋanan loaperete kaberu, ka aberu da: ilemari kwaŋin aronis koIsirael."
Deuteronomy22:23 “Arai ejai apese naerai abekot naisinerit ekiliokit, kosodi etuŋanan adumakin ŋes ore, koperoto kaŋes;"
Deuteronomy22:24 Iyaŋaunete do kes kere iarei orute loka ere kaŋol, ibiribirete kes kamor, kotwaka; apese, naarai mam abu kiluluk kwabo ajai ore; ka etuŋanan, naarai abu kitisil aberu naka eidunyeteke: ilemari kwaŋin aronis kamakon."
Deuteronomy22:25 “Konye arai kedumaki etuŋanan apese naisineritai ais, kosodi aitiŋaikin ŋes, koperoto kaŋes; etuŋanan do bon loaperete kaŋes, ŋes etwani:"
Deuteronomy22:26 Konye mam iswamakini apese idiobore; emamei kaneejai apese adiakaret naibusakinitor atwanare; naarai kwape enyounio etuŋanan asurokin eiidunyeteke, kosodi aiar, kwape kwaŋin ejaar akirot ŋin da:"
Deuteronomy22:27 Naarai adumakin ŋes ais; abu apese naisineritai kiluluk, konye komameun yeneyuuni ŋes."
Deuteronomy22:28 “Arai kedumu etuŋanan apese naerai abekot, namam isineritai, kosodi aikamun ŋes, koperoto kaŋes, kosodete adumun kes;"
Deuteronomy22:29 Elemikini etuŋanan loaperete kaŋes papa kapese isekelin akaisakany luka epuesa, eraun do akeberu, naarai abu kitisil ŋes; mam ireŋeari ŋes apaarasiake kere."
Deuteronomy22:30 “Mam etuŋanan elomari neejai aberu naka papake, mam do epukori anapito nakaŋabet naka papake."
Deuteronomy23:1 “Etuŋanan loimusuŋitai itouke, arai loetuboritai ekiliokaneke, mam elomari atukot naka EJAKAIT."
Deuteronomy23:2 “Ikoku yeneurunete ipajan mam elomari atukot naka EJAKAIT; kiton atur nakitomonet mam lukeŋ elomarete atukot naka EJAKAIT.
Deuteronomy23:3 “Mam Emorait ka Emoabit elomarete atukot naka EJAKAIT; kiton atur nakitomonet mam lueraas lukec elomarete atukot naka EJAKAIT ikar kere:
Deuteronomy23:4 Naarai mam apotu kijaikis yes inyamat ka akipi korot, nailomuniata koMisiri; ido naarai apotu koropata Balaam okoku loka Beor anyoun koPetor loka Mesopotamia, aiken jo."
Deuteronomy23:5 Konye mam EJAKAIT Ekonideke abu kopup Balaam; konye abu EJAKAIT Ekonideke kijulak ekenit araun arereŋ kamakon, naarai abu EJAKAIT Ekonideke komina jo."
Deuteronomy23:6 Sirikimo ainapakinikec karaida akerianutukec apaarasiakon kere ikar kere.
Deuteronomy23:7 “Sirikila Edomait; naarai erai onacekon: sirikila Emisiriat; naarai ibu korai emoit kakwapuke.
Deuteronomy23:8 Elomarete idwekec luka atur kanakiwuniet atukot naka EJAKAIT.
Deuteronomy23:9 “Nailomaria koidukurun aitiji lukasurupokon, igitari ijo koboro kere lueroko,"
Deuteronomy23:10 “Arai kejaun etuŋanan mamakus lomam elai kanuka airujasit naka akuare, elomari ŋol ŋina kiidukurun, mam elomuni oidukurun:"
Deuteronomy23:11 Konye ejaun, kewar akwap, iloŋi ŋesi kakip: kosodi keloma akoloŋ, elomuni oidukurun."
Deuteronomy23:12 “Jjaenena da kaibois kiŋa kiidukurun nailomanari aikiŋan:
Deuteronomy23:13 Jjaenena kabasaŋ oborokon lujiis; kosodi naijorio ijo kokitui, iboki ber kabasaŋakon, kosodi aibelokin anukakin ŋun nuelomunete kotomakon:"
Deuteronomy23:14 Naarai eupasi EJAKAIT Ekonideke kiidukurunukon, ayuun jo, aijaikin jo lukasurupokon; kanuka ŋun ŋes eraunotor iidukurunukon lukalaunak: tetere mam ŋes eanyuni numam elaete kotomakon, kosodi anyoun kamakon."
Deuteronomy23:15 “Sirikinyaka neejai papake ebulesit loesiit kaneejai papake abunore mamakon:
Deuteronomy23:16 Iboienenei kajo, kamakon, kaibois naeseuni kotoma ediopet koreriakon, loekot ŋesi noi: sirikiroik ŋes."
Deuteronomy23:17 “Sirikejaun naadote kotoma adwe nuka Isirael, karaida luitepete ikiliok kotoma odwe luka Isirael."
Deuteronomy23:18 Sirikiyaŋau eropit loka naadote, karaida eropit loka ekiŋok, togo loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke kanuka adioyaposit kere: naarai ŋul kere eraas luketal mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy23:19 “Sirikiyuu onacekon kanuka adumunia ameda; ameda naka apesan, ameda naka inyamat, ameda naka ŋinibore yeniyuunia kanuka ameda:"
Deuteronomy23:20 Ipedori ayuun emoit kanuka ameda: konye sirikiyuu onacekon kanuka adumunia ameda: tetere kisirereŋi jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke kakirokon kere nuiswamai, kotoma akwap nailosi airum."
Deuteronomy23:21 “Naiyapoikinio ijo EJAKAIT Ekonideke aiyaposit, sirikitilor aitodol: naarai abeit iburai EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo ŋin; eraun da adiakaret mamakon."
Deuteronomy23:22 Konye arai kiŋer aiyapo, mam eraun aronis kamakon."
Deuteronomy23:23 Idari aiswamaenen ŋin naelomuni kaitukukon; kwape ejaatar nuiyapok EJAKAIT Ekonideke, ainakinet nakakote, naisumunit kaitukukon,"
Deuteronomy23:24 “Nailomaria amana naka emusabibu naka eidunyetekon, ipedori ainyam araitoke kwape ikotor; konye sirikibwaik adioda oborekon."
Deuteronomy23:25 Nailomaria akima nuka eidunyetekon, ipedori aigitunun akima kakanikon; konye sirikisak kecilikiki akima nuka eidunyetekon."
Deuteronomy24:1 “Naeyaŋaaria etuŋanan aberu aimany, kosodi arai mam edumunit aminunio kakonyeneke, naarai edumunit ŋesi akirot naka ileic kamake, iwadikakini ŋes ebalua loka aireŋear, kititiŋ ŋes, kosodi aireŋear ŋes kotogoke."
Deuteronomy24:2 Kenyou ŋin kotogoke, epedori alosit adukokin etuŋanan ece."
Deuteronomy24:3 Arai kela ŋes okilenike lokiareit, kosodi aiwadikakin ŋes ebalua loka aireŋear, kititiŋ ŋes, kosodi aireŋear kotogoke; arai da ketwana okilenike lokiareit loamanyit ŋes;"
Deuteronomy24:4 Okilenike losodit loereŋeari ŋes, mam emanyi ŋes bobo, naarai amunaun; naarai erai akirot ŋin naketal kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: sirikitidiaka akwap nakiinakinit EJAKAIT Ekonideke airum."
Deuteronomy24:5 “Naemanyia etuŋanan ateran, mam elomari kajore, karaida ainakinio adioswam kere; esalakini ore ekaru ediopet, aitalakar aberuke naamany."
Deuteronomy24:6 “Mam ituŋanan eyai akaŋas arai atapen araun aititiŋet: naarai eyait aijar naka ituŋanan araun aititiŋet.
Deuteronomy24:7 “Arai kikamun etuŋanan ekokoi idiokoinacanake luka idwe luka Isirael, kikonak ŋes bala ebulesit, arai agwelar ŋes; eario do ekokolan ŋol: ilemari kwaŋin aronis kamakon."
Deuteronomy24:8 “Kocoito adeka naka atapon, koric kojokan aswam kere nukisisianakinete yes isasedotin Ilebin: kwape ecorakinia eoŋ kes, iricete yesi aswam kwaŋin."
Deuteronomy24:9 Kiitutu nuabu EJAKAIT Ekusideke kiswamak Miriam korot ipote yesi koMisiri.
Deuteronomy24:10 “Naiyuunia eidunyetekon idiobore, sirikiloma togoke aomare aititineteke."
Deuteronomy24:11 Ibwoi kokina eyaŋauni etuŋanan loiyuunit ijo kiborekon aititiŋet kina neijai ijo,"
Deuteronomy24:12 Arai erai ŋesi lokican, mam iperio aititineteke:"
Deuteronomy24:13 Inyakakini ŋes aititiŋet keloma akoloŋ, tetere eperi anapitoke, kilipakin jo arereŋ: eraun adolit kamakon kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy24:14 “Sirikiroik ekejaanakinan loeropio loicana loilwaritoi, arai erai loka iinacanakon, arai loka imo luejaas akwapukon oreriakon:"
Deuteronomy24:15 Kapaaranike iinakini ŋes eropitike, eriŋa akoloŋ kelomara; naarai icana ŋesi, ipuda eketau: kinyek amonyia jo kama ejai EJAKAIT, koraun adiakaret kamakon."
Deuteronomy24:16 “Mam lukapapa eario kanuka adiakaret naka idwe, karaida idwe aario kanuka adiakaret naka lukapapa: eario ŋinituŋanan kanuka adiakareteke."
Deuteronomy24:17 “Sirikibelok etube loka imoit, karaida loka ikoki, karaida ayaŋaar inapen luka apuserut aitaraun aititiŋet:"
Deuteronomy24:18 Konye kiituni ebe irai kolo ebulesit koMisiri, kolaku EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo kaŋina: kanuka ŋun kecorakinit jo aiswamaenen akirot ŋin,"
Deuteronomy24:19 “Naisakia emanikorikon, kimurwok eisuta komanikor, sirikiboŋo aomare: eraun loka imoit, ka ikoki, ka apuserut: tetere kisirereŋi jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke kaswamisio kere nuka akaninikon."
Deuteronomy24:20 Naideŋio araito nuka ekitoikon loka eseitun, sirikinyogok bobo aide atenunake: eraunos ŋun nuka imoit, ka ikoki, ka apuserut,"
Deuteronomy24:21 Naitukonokinia imusabibun luka emanikorikon loka emusabibu, sirikinyogok bobo: eraunos ŋul luka imoit, ka ikoki, ka apuserut."
Deuteronomy24:22 Iituni ebe irai kolo ebulesit kakwap nako Misiri: kanuka ŋun ŋes kecorakinia jo aiswamaenen ŋun.
Deuteronomy25:1 “Arai kejaun epeget otuŋa, kosodete aponare atubokinio, kotubokis ikatubok kes; itojokete kesi ikadoliton, itetelekarete ikaronon:"
Deuteronomy25:2 Kosodi kanen, arai ibusakinit ikaronon aleio, iteperikini ekatubon ŋes, aleio kakonyeneke, kwape ajaar aronisike, kimarete."
Deuteronomy25:3 Epedori atubokin ŋes aleio ibelai akaisaoŋon, sirikedepa ŋul: arai kitedepa aile ŋes ibelai luipu adepar ŋul, esilior onacekon kakonyenekon,"
Deuteronomy25:4 Sirikien aituk naka emoŋ arai ipudapudai aicom akima.
Deuteronomy25:5 Arai iboiete iinacan nepepe, kotwana ediopet, komamei ikoku yenisapat, mam aberu naka lokatwan edukokini eloŋwait: elomari onace loka okilenike mamake, irumi ŋes, aiswamakin ŋes nuibusakinito onace loka okilenike."
Deuteronomy25:6 Kosodi irumi ikiyai yenewuruuni ŋesi ekiror loka onaceke loatwana, kinyek ekekiror amwatar koIsirael."
Deuteronomy25:7 Arai mam etuŋanan ekoto airum aberu naka onaceke, elosi aberu naka onaceke orute mama ejaas imakio, etemari ebe, ‘Eŋerit onace loka okilenika aitoboŋikin onaceke ekiror koIsirael, mam keswamakinit eoŋ nuibusakinit onace loka okilenika.’"
Deuteronomy25:8 Enyaraunete do imakio luka ereke ŋes, inerakinos kaŋes: arai kebwo, kotema atiar, ‘Mam akoto airum ŋes.’"
Deuteronomy25:9 Ebuni aberu naka onaceke mamake kakonyen nuka imakio, elaeuni amukat kaje kakejuke, imuikini da aimul oreeteke; eboŋokini ŋesi ebe, ‘Iswamakinio kwaŋin etuŋanan lomam edukokinit onaceke etogo.’"
Deuteronomy25:10 Emaikinio ekekiror koIsirael, Etogo loka ŋol kaloelacaritai akemukat."
Deuteronomy25:11 “Arai eutas ituŋa iarei, kosodi aberu naka ediopet aikunyakin ayuun okilenike kakan naka ŋol loesenesenei ŋes, arior akekan, aitiŋ ŋes itouke:"
Deuteronomy25:12 Itubori akekan, mam akonikoŋu itimi ŋes."
Deuteronomy25:13 “Siriejaas ocoekon imisanin luegelegela, loepol, ka loedit."
Deuteronomy25:14 Siriejaas togo aitemisio nuegelegela, naepol, ka naedit."
Deuteronomy25:15 Jjaunos jo kemisani loedolit lokabeit; ijaunos jo kaitemis naedolit nakabeit: tetere ipuaros akonipaarasia kakwap nakiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke.
Deuteronomy25:16 Naarai ŋul kere luiswamaete akiro ŋun, kes luiswamaete numam edolito, eraas luketal mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy25:17 “Kiitu nuabu Amalek kiswamak jo korot ilomuni koMisiri;
Deuteronomy25:18 Kwape abu kiriamakinotor kajo korot, kodany lukon lukokau, kere luakalanyaka luajaas kaukon, iiloro ijo, kopasite da; mam ŋes abu koyoŋ Edeke."
Deuteronomy25:19 Kanuka ŋun, kiinak EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo aiyeŋun kama ejaas lukasurupokon lukilukunito, kakwap nakiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke araun airumet nairumi ijo, imwatari aiitunet naka Amalek kokwap kakuj; sirikiimurwok."
Deuteronomy26:1 “Kosodi rwaru, nailomaria akwap nakiinakini EJAKAIT Ekonideke araun airumet, irumi, iboikin nen:"
Deuteronomy26:2 Ilemuni nugeet nuka araito kere nuka alup, nuidwenyi kakwapukon nukiinakini EJAKAIT Ekonideke; kipikak odita kolot aibois naeseuni EJAKAIT Ekonideke aisiboikin ekekiror."
Deuteronomy26:3 Ido ilosi mama ejai esasedoti loejai kapaarasia kaŋun, kolimok ebe, ‘Alimo eoŋ lolo EJAKAIT Ekonideke ebe alom akwap nakolo eyapoik EJAKAIT lukapapaawok ainakin oni.’"
Deuteronomy26:4 Elemuni da esasedoti edita kakanikon, kipikak kiŋaren ketem loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy26:5 “Iboŋokini ijo da kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke kinera atiar,, Esiriat loaapikinit aolior ŋes arai papaka, abu kijesar Misiri, kiboiororoi kaŋina, koraas luekidioko; koluor kaŋina ateker naepol, nakagogoŋon, naelal."
Deuteronomy26:6 Kiswamakis Imisirian sio erono, kiticanata, kipikakis obulesene loalaŋir;"
Deuteronomy26:7 Keworoto EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakosi, kiira EJAKAIT ekosiporoto, koany akositicanio, ka aitaaritoikos, ka areuniokos."
Deuteronomy26:8 Kitonyou EJAKAIT sio koMisiri kakan nakagogoŋ ka akan naerioro, ka etasuro loepol, ka aanyuneta, ka nukaumokin:"
Deuteronomy26:9 Kitolom aibois na, koinak akwap na, akwap naeleleete akile ka esik."
Deuteronomy26:10 Kwana da, koany, ayaunit nugeet nuka araito nuka alup, nukiinak ijo eoŋ, wu EJAKAIT.’ Ido ipikakini kwap kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, koma EJAKAIT Ekonideke:"
Deuteronomy26:11 Isiyalamikini nukajokak kere nukiinak EJAKAIT Ekonideke, ka ekonikek, ijo ka Elebit, ka imoit yenejai orekon."
Deuteronomy26:12 “Naidaununia alemunun yenikitomonet yenika akerianutukon kere kokaru lokiuniet, ŋes ekaru loelemenenere yenikitomonet, kosodi iinakini Elebit, ka imoit, ka ikoki, ka apuserut, konyamakis oruteikon, kimonikinos;"
Deuteronomy26:13 Kinerenena da kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke atiar, ‘Alem iboro lukitalaunio kotogoka, ido ainak Elebit, ka imoit, ka ikoki, ka apuserut kwape ejaar akoniicorakinet kere nakicorakinit; mam adiakarit adiopet kakoniicorakineta, kwabo mam kemurwokinito:"
Deuteronomy26:14 Mam anyamit kes aroko ajai akuudianaka, kwabo mam eŋadakinit komam alai, kwabo mam ainakinit kanuka lukatwak. Abu keira eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekadeke, eswama kere kwape kolo kecorakinia."
Deuteronomy26:15 Kosesen ijai aiboisikon nakalaunan, kotoma akuj, kisirereŋ ikonituŋa Isirael, ka alup nukiinak, kwape kolo kiyapoikinio lukapapaakosi, akwap naeleleete akile ka esik.’"
Deuteronomy26:16 “Kicorakini lolo jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke aiswamaenen ikisila ŋul ka itubesia; aso koricenenei aswam kekonitau kere ka akoniijar kere.
Deuteronomy26:17 Ilimo lolo EJAKAIT araun Ekonideke, ido ilosenenei korotinike; iricenenei ikekisila ka akeicorakineta ka iketubesia, iiranari ekeporoto:"
Deuteronomy26:18 Ido kilimo lolo EJAKAIT jo araut ituŋa luseuna luke obe, kwape kiisumunio, ido koricenenei akeicorakineta kere;"
Deuteronomy26:19 Ido kitopoloo jo aitelekarit atekerin kere nukolo kesubi, kotoma aiturit, kotoma okiror, ido kotoma aibuses; tetere iraunos ituŋa lukalaunak kama ejai EJAKAIT Ekusideke, kwape kinerar.”"
Deuteronomy27:1 Kicorakis Musa ka imakio luka Isirael ituŋa ebe, “Koricito aicorakineta kere nukecorak yes lolo."
Deuteronomy27:2 Kosodi kapaaran naidokiata Yorodan alosit akwap nakiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke, isipokini ijo amor nuepolok, iladakini kes asiŋe;"
Deuteronomy27:3 iwadikakini kes akiro kere nuka ekisil kalo, kidoka juwai; tetere ilomari akwap nakiinakinit jo EJAKAIT Ekonideke, akwap naeleleete akile ka esik, kwape kisumunio EJAKAIT Edeke loka lukapapaakon jo."
Deuteronomy27:4 Kosodi naidokiata Yorodan, isipokinete amor ŋun, nukecorakini yes lolo, moru Ebal, iladakinete kes asiŋe."
Deuteronomy27:5 Idukokini EJAKAIT Ekonideke etem nen, etem loka amor: sirikike kes kasuat,"
Deuteronomy27:6 Iduki etem loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke kamor numam ikeitai: iinakini EJAKAIT Ekonideke ainakineta nuicweio kanen:
Deuteronomy27:7 Iinakini da asuban nuka ainapakin, inyamakini nen; ilakari ijo kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy27:8 Iwadikakini akiro kere nuka ikisila kalu amor ŋun kideleleete teniten.”
Deuteronomy27:9 Apotu Musa ka isasedotin Ilebin kotemasi Isirael kere atiar, “Kililiŋ, kopup, ijo Isirael; iraunos lolo yesi ituŋa luka EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Deuteronomy27:10 Ŋes do irimaria eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, aiswamaenen aicorakinetake ka ikisilake lukecorakini jo lolo,”"
Deuteronomy27:11 Kicorak Musa ituŋa kapaaran ŋipeŋin, ebe,"
Deuteronomy27:12 “Lu kes ebwoete komoru Gerisim, ailipakin ituŋa arereŋ, kidokata Yorodan; Simeon ka Lebi, ka Yuda, ka Isakar, ka Yosep ka Benyamin:"
Deuteronomy27:13 Lu kes ebwoete komoru Ebal kanuka ekenit; Reuben, ka Gad ka Aser, ka Sebulun, ka Dan ka Naputali."
Deuteronomy27:14 Eboŋokinete Ilebin ituŋa kere luka Isirael keporoto kaloepol, ebe,"
Deuteronomy27:15 “Kikenoi etuŋanan loiswamauni aput naegerer arai nacaluna, naketal mama ejai EJAKAIT, aswam naka akanin nuka etuŋanan kaloepiiriana, asipokin kaiyeiyea.’ Eboŋokinete ituŋa kere ebe, ‘Amen.’"
Deuteronomy27:16 “Kikenoi yenemwaŋit papake arai totoke.’ Eboŋokinete ituŋa kere ebe, ‘Amen.’"
Deuteronomy27:17 “Kikenoi ŋol loisukunyikini eikor loka eidunycteke.’ Eboŋokinete ituŋa kere ebe, “Amen.’"
Deuteronomy27:18 “Kikenoi ŋin yenitapaari emuduk korot.’ Eboŋokinete ituŋa kere ebe, ‘Amen.’"
Deuteronomy27:19 “Kikenoi ŋol loibelokini etube kaneejai imoit, ikoki, ka apuserut.’ Eoonokinete ituŋa kere ebe, ‘Amen.’"
Deuteronomy27:20 “Kikenoi ŋol loeperete kaberu naka papake; naarai apuko anapito nakaŋabet naka papake.’ Eboŋokinete ituŋa kere ebe, ‘Amen.’"
Deuteronomy27:21 “‘Kikenoi ŋol loeperete kitiaŋ kere.’ Eboŋokinete ituŋa kere ebe, ‘Amen.’"
Deuteronomy27:22 “Kikenoi ŋol loeperete kinacike, akoku naka papake, arai akoku naka totoke.’ Eboŋokinete ituŋa kere ebe, ‘Amen.’"
Deuteronomy27:23 “Kikenoi ŋol loeperete kaamuranike.’ Eboŋokinete ituŋa kere ebe, ‘Amen.’"
Deuteronomy27:24 “‘Kikenoi ŋooinomi eidunyeteke kaiyeiyea.’ Eboŋokinete ituŋa kere ebe, ‘Amen.’"
Deuteronomy27:25 “‘Kikenoi ŋol loeropio kanuka aiar ituŋanan yenimam akirot.’ Eboŋokinete ituŋa kere ebe, ‘Amen.’"
Deuteronomy27:26 “‘Kikenoi ŋin yenimam itogogoŋi aitodol ikisila ŋul aiswamaenen.’ Eboŋokinete ituŋa kere ebe, ‘Amen.’"
Deuteronomy28:1 “Kosodi kanen arai kipup ijo kojokan eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke airic aiswamaenen aicorakinetake kere nukecorak jo lolo, kitopoloori EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo adepar atekerin kere nuka akwap:"
Deuteronomy28:2 Epote da arereŋesio nu kere mamakon, kidolokinete jo, arai kipup ijo eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy28:3 Kisirereŋio jo kore, kisirereŋio da komanikor."
Deuteronomy28:4 Isirereŋio aur naka akonikuan, ka araito nuka alupokon, ka aur naka ibarenikon, eiyas loka aitukukon ka ludidik luka esipanikon."
Deuteronomy28:5 Isirereŋio editakon ka amotikon nakigures.
Deuteronomy28:6 Isirereŋio nailomununia, kisirereŋio da nailomanaria."
Deuteronomy28:7 “Edanyi EJAKAIT lukasurupokon lukinyoikinete jo kakonyenekon: elomunete asurokin jo korot ediopet, ekerete kakonyenekon korotin ikanykaarei,"
Deuteronomy28:8 Icorakini EJAKAIT arereŋ odulaakon, ka aswamisiokon kere nuiswamaenenei; kisirereŋi ŋesi jo kakwap nakiinakinit EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
Deuteronomy28:9 Kiticasi EJAKAIT yes araun ituŋake lukalaunak kwape kiyapoikinio yes; arai iricito yesi aicorakineta nuka EJAKAIT Ekusideke alosenen korotinike.
Deuteronomy28:10 Eanyunete ituŋa kere luka akwap ebe kimaikinitai ekiror loka EJAKAIT; kiyoŋete jo.
Deuteronomy28:11 Itupui EJAKAIT ajokisiokon, kaur naka akuanakon, aur da naka ibarenikon, araito da nuka alupokon, kakwap naabu EJAKAIT kiyapoik lukapapaakon ainakin jo."
Deuteronomy28:12 Kiŋaikini EJAKAIT jo aiŋadisike naejok ainakin akwapukon akiru kapakike, aisirereŋ aswam kere naka akonikan: iyuununei atekerin nuipu, konye mam jo iyuun kamakec."
Deuteronomy28:13 Kiinakini EJAKAIT ijo araun ekaliŋan konye mere ekerikakinan; ijaun ijo kuju bon, mam ijaun kwap; arai kipup ijo aicorakineta nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, nukecorak ijo lolo airic aiswamaenen;"
Deuteronomy28:14 Komam ipaari ainyein adio kakiro nukecorak yes lolo, apaar teten arai kediany, atupar icedekesio aijaanakin kes."
Deuteronomy28:15 “Konye kereka, arai mam jo ipupuni eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke airic aiswamaenen aicorakinetake kere ka ikisilake nukecorak jo lolo; kibunokinete jo ikenito lu kere, kidolokinete da."
Deuteronomy28:16 Kikenio jo kore, kikenio jo komanikor."
Deuteronomy28:17 Ikenio editakon ka amotikon nakigures.
Deuteronomy28:18 Ikenio aur naka akuanakon, ka araito nuka alupokon, eiyas loka aitukukon, ka ludidik luka esipanikon."
Deuteronomy28:19 Kikenio jo nailomununia, kikenio da nailomanaria."
Deuteronomy28:20 “Kijukakini EJAKAIT jo iken, aiticaneta, ka airetakin kotoma aswamisiokon kere, aitodol nakimudiarere jo, aitodol da naiolioro ijo atipet; kanuka aronis naka aswamisiokon, nukijalia ijo eoŋ."
Deuteronomy28:21 Kitulanari EJAKAIT jo aitodol nakimudiaria jo kakwap nailomari airum.
Deuteronomy28:22 Kidanyi EJAKAIT jo keluera, ka ekamidi, ka abuun, ka amwanis naepol, ka ekileŋ, ka ekure, ka airouroun; kibwapete jo aitodol naiolioro."
Deuteronomy28:23 Akujukon da naejai kuju akoukon eraun aisinit, ka alup nuejaas kwapukon eraunos asuat."
Deuteronomy28:24 ltuluori EJAKAIT akiru naka akwapukon apua ka asiŋei: kibunokinete jo kokuju, aitodol nakimudiarere jo."
Deuteronomy28:25 “Kidanyi EJAKAIT jo kakonyen nuka lukasurupokon: ilomari korot ediopet asurokin kes, ikeri korotin ikanykaarei kakonyenekec: iraun etasuro kama ejaas ajakanuto kere nuka akwap."
Deuteronomy28:26 Eraun atesikon akiriŋ naka akweny kere, ka itiaŋ luka akwap, emamuun yenetwarari kes."
Deuteronomy28:27 Kitedeki EJAKAIT jo abusio nuka Misiri, ka ajimii, ka ijip, ka aipii, numam ipedori aŋaleun."
Deuteronomy28:28 Kitedeki EJAKAIT jo ikerep, ka amudukanut, ka arieŋun naka etau:"
Deuteronomy28:29 Ituriaitoi paaran, kwape eturiaitor emuduk kamuton, komam ikerianar koponesiokon: kiroikinio kiŋasio jo duc, emamuun yenikitajari jo,"
Deuteronomy28:30 Isineri ijo apese, konye eperete ecetuŋanan kaŋes: iduki ijo etogo, konye mam iboikini toma: irai emanikor loka emusabibu, konye mam inyami araitoke."
Deuteronomy28:31 Eario emoŋokon kakonyenekon, konye mam jo inyami ŋes: kidemario asigiriakon kakonyenekon kadeden, konye mam kinyakakinio: einakinio lukasurupokon amerekekinikon, emamuun yenikitajari jo,"
Deuteronomy28:32 Ekorakinio icetuŋa ikonidwe lusap ka lupesur kosesenete akonikonye, konye itegete kanuka aimuit kes apaaran kere: ido kimamikinete jo nuipedori aswam."
Deuteronomy28:33 Enyami ateker namam jo ijeni araito nuka alupokon, ka aitaaritoikon; konye kiroikinio jo kicikakinitete duc:"
Deuteronomy28:34 Kikerepikini ijo kanuka nueanyunete akonikonye.
Deuteronomy28:35 Ibwaikini EJAKAIT abusio nueroko noi: akuŋinikon, ka akejenekon, numam ipedori aŋaleun, ageun kotau loka akejukon kiton osiaduk loka akoukon."
Deuteronomy28:36 “Kiyaŋaari EJAKAIT jo, ka ekabakakon loidakakini ayait jo, mama ejai ateker namam jo ijeni, ijo ka lukapapaakon, ijaanakini kaŋina idekesio ice akito ka amor."
Deuteronomy28:37 Iraun aumokinet, ka awarag, ka ikienis kotuŋa kere lukireŋeikini EJAKAIT jo."
Deuteronomy28:38 Iyei ikinyom luipu omanikor, konye isakun idis; naarai enyami emaase kes."
Deuteronomy28:39 Irai amanat nuka emusabibu icapi kes konye mam imasi ebino, karaida aideŋ araito; naarai enyami ekurut kes"
Deuteronomy28:40 Ejaunos iseitunin oikorunokon kere, konye mam inyonyoikin akinyetekec naarai edounenete araito nuka eseitunikon."
Deuteronomy28:41 Iwurie idwe lusap ka lupesur konye mam eraunos lukon; naarai eŋatario.
Deuteronomy28:42 Enyamiari emaase ikitokon kere ka araito nuka alupokon.
Deuteronomy28:43 Iyatanakini emoit loejai mamakon adokari kuju adepar jo; iyatanakini ijo aidoor kwap.
Deuteronomy28:44 Kiyuununei ŋes jo, konye mam jo iyuuni ŋes: eraun ŋesi ekaliŋan, ka jo da ekerikakinan"
Deuteronomy28:45 Kibunokinete jo ikenito ŋul kere, kibwapete jo, kidolokinete jo, aitodol nakimudiarere jo; naarai mam ibu kopup eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke airic aicorakinetake ka ikisilake luabu kicorak jo:"
Deuteronomy28:46 Eraunos kaneijai ijo aanyunet ka aumokinet, kaneejai aurikon da ikar kere."
Deuteronomy28:47 “Naarai mam ijaanakinit EJAKAIT Ekonideke kailel, kaiyalama naka etau, kanuka aidiles naka iboro kere:"
Deuteronomy28:48 Kanuka ŋun ijaanakini ijo lukasurupokon luijukuni EJAKAIT asurokin jo, koriebi eteŋei, kojakite akur kimujalal, kipuda iboro kere: idokokini ajookot naka asuat omurisinikon aitodol nakimudiaria joo"
Deuteronomy28:49 Eyaŋauni EJAKAIT ateker kama elwana asurokin jo, anyoun kosaŋe loka akwap, kwape eporitor emorukaalet, ateker namam jo ijenuni akeŋajep."
Deuteronomy28:50 Ateker naededeŋ akekonyen, namam epod imakio karaida aitim ludidik:"
Deuteronomy28:51 Enyami aur naka ibarenikon, ka araito nuka alupokon, aitodol nakimudiarere: mam ŋes kinyeinia jo akima, arai ebino arai akinyet, arai eiyas loka aitukukon, karaida ludidik luka esipanikon aitodol nakimudiaria jo."
Deuteronomy28:52 Kirigauni jo koruteikon kere, aitodol naetiyaikinotor arwatatinikon nueojak nuebwaitai, nuibu komuno, anatar akwapukon kere: kirigauni jo koruteikon kere nakiinak EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo."
Deuteronomy28:53 Inyami ijo aur naka akonikuan, akiriŋ naka idwekon lusap ka lupesur lukiinak EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo; kirigaunitete, kicikakinitete, kanekicikakinete lukasurupokon jo."
Deuteronomy28:54 Etuŋanan loenonok kotomakus, loijamamai eraun loitei onaceke kakoŋu naerono, ka aberu naka atorobuke, ka Iuideun: kodweke luideikina ŋes:"
Deuteronomy28:55 Komam einakini idio kakesi akiriŋ naka idweke luenyami ŋesi, naarai emamei yenideikina ŋes; kirigaunitete, kicikakinitete kanekicikakinete lukasurupokon jo koruteikon kere."
Deuteronomy28:56 Aberu naenonok naijamamai kotomakus, namam tiketamaki aicakakin akekeju alup kanuka aijamamake ka anonokuke, itei ŋesi okilenike loka atorobuke, ka okokuke ka akokuke kakoŋu naerono;"
Deuteronomy28:57 Ka aŋasiepeke naelomuni kakejeke, ka ikedwe lueuruuni; naarai enyami kes kaiyeiyea kanuka eipud iboro kere: kirigaunitete, kicikakinitete, kanekicikakinete lukasurupokon jo koruteikon"
Deuteronomy28:58 “Arai mam irici aitodol akiro kere nuka ikisila lu luiwadikatai oitabo lo tetere iyoŋi ekiror lo lokaibuses loeyoŋitai, EJAKAIT Ekonideke;"
Deuteronomy28:59 Kijukakini EJAKAIT jo aiticaneta nukaumokin, ka aiticaneta nuka akoniwur, aiticaneta nukos, nuedaunete apak naepol, ka adekesia nueroko noi, nuedaunete apak naepol."
Deuteronomy28:60 Kiinuni bobo jo adekesia kere nuko Misiri, nuibu koyoŋ; kidoŋete jo."
Deuteronomy28:61 Ŋinideka da, ka ŋiniiticanet, namam iwadikatai oitabo loka ikisila kalu, kiinuni EJAKAIT jo kes, aitodol nakimudiarere jo."
Deuteronomy28:62 Isalete yesi ikidioko, kwabo iraas kolo yesi kwape aacer nuka akuj kanuka aipues; naarai mam ipotu kopupoto eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Deuteronomy28:63 Kosodi kanen, kwape esiyalamikinitor EJAKAIT aiswamakin yes nukajokak, ka aitupuu yes; isiyalamikini kwaŋin EJAKAIT aitoolior yes, ka amudiar yes; kilemario do yes kakwap nailomarete airum."
Deuteronomy28:64 Kisiarakini EJAKAIT jo otuŋa kere, ageun kosaŋe ediopet loka akwap kiton osaŋe ece loka akwap; ijaanakini idekesio ice kaŋina, lumam lem ijenunit, ijo karaida lukapapaakon, kes akito ka amor."
Deuteronomy28:65 Mam jo idumuni aijamam kotoma atekerin ŋun, emameikini da akonikeju aibworar: konye ijaikini EJAKAIT jo kaŋina etau loemarani, ka akonye nuitegete, ka etau loitururwei:"
Deuteronomy28:66 Ibuonokini noi kanuka aijarakon; ikurianari kuare ka paaran, mam imuno akoniijar:"
Deuteronomy28:67 Itemari tupuruc ebe, ‘Tiejok arai kerai eboŋ!’ Eboŋ da itemari ebe, ‘Tiejok arai kerai tupuruc!’ kanuka akurian naka etaukon naikurianaror, ido kanuka nueanyunete akonikonye."
Deuteronomy28:68 Kinyakari EJAKAIT jo Misiri kameerin, korot loabu kalimok jo ebe, ‘Mam bobo ianyuni ŋes’; igwelanaros kaŋina mama ejaas lukasurupokus araun ibulesin ka abulesin, konye emameun ituŋanan yenikigweli yes.”"
Deuteronomy29:1 Ŋun kes akiro nuka aitutuket naceorakini EJAKAIT Musa aitutuk ka idwe luka Isirael, kakwap naka Moab, kogelara aitutuket naetutukete ŋesi kakes koKoreb."
Deuteronomy29:2 Konyarau Musa Isirael kere kotema kes atiar, “Ianyut kere nueswamak EJAKAIT Parao, ka ikekejaanakinak kere, ka akwapuke kere, kakonyenekus kakwap nako Misiri;"
Deuteronomy29:3 Aigimoreta nuepolok nuapotu akonikonye koanyut, aanyuneta da, ka nukaumokin ŋun nukos:"
Deuteronomy29:4 Konye mam EJAKAIT kiinakinit yes etau loejenuni, ka akonye nuesesenete, ka aki nuepupete, kiton lolo."
Deuteronomy29:5 Keŋarenik yes ikar akaisaoŋon kamodiŋ: mam ikusinapen emojonito, akusimuka da mam emojoŋito."
Deuteronomy29:6 Mam inyamito atap, karaida aimat ebino arai nuitemerete: tetere ijenunete ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Deuteronomy29:7 Ido naidolunioto aibois na, apotu Sikon ekabaka loka Kesibon, ka Og ekabaka loka Basan, kolomut asurokin oni, kipou oni kadanyata kes:"
Deuteronomy29:8 Kipou kayaŋaasi akecekwap, kainakis araun airumet naka Ireubenin, ka Igadin, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Imanasin."
Deuteronomy29:9 Kanuka ŋun kidarata akiro nuka aitutuket kana, kiswamaenenete, tetere ikeriakaros kaswamisiokus kere."
Deuteronomy29:10 “Ibwoete yesi kere lolo kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekusideke; ikapolokokus, atekerinikus, imakiokus, ka ijakakus, ituŋa kere luka Isirael,"
Deuteronomy29:11 Ludidikikus, ka aŋorokus, ka imokus luejaas oidukurunukus, ageun ka ekebetan akitokus, kiton ekeriton akipikus:"
Deuteronomy29:12 Tetere ilomarete aitutuket naka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, aiyapositike da, naitutukinit EJAKAIT Ekusideke kayes lolo:"
Deuteronomy29:13 Tetere kiticasi yes lolo araun iketuŋa obe, koraun ŋesi Edekekus, kwape abu kolimokinia yes, kwape da eyapoikinio lukapapaakus, Aburaam, Isaak, ka Yakob."
Deuteronomy29:14 Mere yes bonik kitutukio eoŋ aitutuket na ka aiyaposit na:
Deuteronomy29:15 Konye ka ŋin yenebwoi kane lolo kaoni kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, ka ŋin da yenemamei lolo kane kaoni."
Deuteronomy29:16 “Naarai ijenete kwape kipou keboikinotor akwap nako Misiri; kwape da kitorio atekerin nuipotu kitoroto;
Deuteronomy29:17 Ipotu koanyut nuka italesiakec, ka aputosiakec, akito ka amor, epuesa ka esabu, nuajaas mamakec."
Deuteronomy29:18 Kinyek ajaun mamakus etuŋanan, arai aberu, arai ekek, arai atekeu, naepaari eketar lolo ainyein EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, alosit aijaanakin idekesio luka atekerin kaŋun; kinyek ajaun mamakus aliasit naerai epiu ka adwaris."
Deuteronomy29:19 Kosod: kanen kepupu akiro nuka aiyaposit kana, kikemerik kotauke ebe, ‘Enapakin, karaida katupit aninik naka ekatau,’ amudiar luepalal ka lueokito."
Deuteronomy29:20 Mam EJAKAIT isionie ŋes, konye epuruuni anyunyura naka EJAKAIT ka ekoloke aluikin ituŋanan ŋin, ebunokini ŋes ikenito kere luiwadikatai oitabo lo, emwatari da EJAKAIT ekekiror kokwap kakuj."
Deuteronomy29:21 Egitari EJAKAIT ŋes neejai aronis katekerin kere nuka Isirael, kwape ejaatar ikenito kere luka aitutuket naiwadikatai oitabo lo loka ikisila."
Deuteronomy29:22 Etemari atur da naebuni, idwekus lukitupanakinete yes, ka imoit yenebuni kakwap naelwana, naeanyuniata aiticaneta nuka akwap kaŋin, ka adekesia nuetedek EJAKAIT ŋes;"
Deuteronomy29:23 Ido akwap ŋin kere erai acukumasia, ka abalaŋ, ido naenoki, namam eyeio, karaida aira, karaida idionya apol kotoma, kwape amudiario naka Sodom ka Gomora, ka Aduma ka Seboim, nuamudiari EJAKAIT kanyunyurake, ka aisiopoke:"
Deuteronomy29:24 Etemarete atekerin kere ebe, ‘Kanukinyo eswamakinia EJAKAIT akwap na kwaŋin? Anyoin bo apolou naka amwanis naka anyunyura kana naepol?’"
Deuteronomy29:25 Eboŋokinete do ituŋa ebe, ‘Naarai apotu kojalata aitutuket naka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakec, naetutukete ŋesi kakes naetolomunia kes kakwap nako Misiri;"
Deuteronomy29:26 Kosodete alosit aijaanakin idekesio ice, komaata kes, idekesio lumam kes ajenete, lumam ŋes ainakinit kes."
Deuteronomy29:27 Ŋes do enepunia anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin akwap na, ainun ŋes ikenito kere luiwadikatai oitabo lo:"
Deuteronomy29:28 Abu EJAKAIT koruto kes kakwapukec kanyunyura, ka aisiop, ka akadakin naepol, kocaka kes akwap ace, kwape lolo.’"
Deuteronomy29:29 “Akiro nuka aiyeiyea eraas nuka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, konye akiro nuepukoro eraas nuwok ka nuka iwokodwe ikar kere, tetere kiswamai akiro kere nuka ikisila kalu."
Deuteronomy30:1 “Kosodi kanen, nakibunokiniata jo akiro ŋun kere, arereŋ ka ekenit, nuebwaik akonyenekon, kosodi ijo akiitun katekerin kere, nukireŋeikini EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo."
Deuteronomy30:2 Kosodi aboŋun mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke; arimar ekeporoto kwape ejaatar kere nukecorak ijo lolo, ijo ka idwekon, ketaukon kere, ka aijarakon kere;"
Deuteronomy30:3 Ŋes do ibelokinio EJAKAIT Ekonideke aŋatariokon, kitimi jo, eboŋuni atukonokin jo kotuŋa kere, luabu EJAKAIT Ekonideke kisiarak jo mamakec."
Deuteronomy30:4 Arai kejaunos lukon luireŋearitai atutubeta nukokiŋa nuka akuj, kitukuni EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo kaŋina, kiwomuni ŋesi jo kaŋina:"
Deuteronomy30:5 Kiyaŋauni EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo akwap naerumito lukapapaakon, irumi ijo da ŋes; kiswamakin jo nuejok, kitupui jo adepar lukapapaakon."
Deuteronomy30:6 Ekepi EJAKAIT Ekonideke ekonitau, ka etau loka aurikon, tetere iminenena EJAKAIT Ekonideke ketaukon kere, ka aijarakon kere, tetere ijari."
Deuteronomy30:7 Ibwaikini EJAKAIT Ekonideke ikenito lu kere mama ejaas lukasurupokon, ka ŋul da lukilaito, lukimanito jo."
Deuteronomy30:8 Iboŋuni, irimari eporoto loka EJAKAIT, aiswamaenen aicorakinetake kere nukecorak jo lolo."
Deuteronomy30:9 Kiinakini EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo akerianut kaswamisio kere nuka akanikon, ka aur naka akuanakon, ka aur naka ibarenikon, ka araito naka alupokon, kanuka ajokis: naarai isiyalamikini bobo EJAKAIT jo kanuka ajokis, kwape esiyalamikinia lukapapaakon."
Deuteronomy30:10 Arai kirima ijo eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke airic aicorakinetake ka ikisilake luiwadikatai oitabo lo loka ikisila; arai kibelokin neejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke ketaukon kere, ka aijarakon kere."
Deuteronomy30:11 “Naarai aicorakinet na nakecorak jo lolo mam kitionikini jo noi, mam da elwana."
Deuteronomy30:12 Mam ejai akuj, tikitema ebe, ‘Iŋai edokari kuju ainun sio, kosodi aisiirar sio, tetere kiswamai?’"
Deuteronomy30:13 Mam da ejai okekwa loka aŋolol tikitema ebe, ‘Iŋai ikwaŋar kaŋolol, ainun sio, kosodi aisiirar sio, tetere kiswamai?’"
Deuteronomy30:14 Konye eapie akirot noi kamakon, kaitukukon, kotaukon da, tetere iswamai."
Deuteronomy30:15 “Koany, ebwaik lolo akonyenekon aijar ka ajokis, atwanare ka aronis;"
Deuteronomy30:16 Naarai kecorak jo lolo aminenena EJAKAIT Ekonideke, alosenen koponesioke, airic aicorakinetake, ka ikisilake ka itubesiake, tetere ijari, kouriar, tetere da kisirereŋi EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo kakwap nailomari airum."
Deuteronomy30:17 Konye arai kepaa ekonitau, komam ipupuni, konye kijodijodoor aima idekesio ice, aijaanakin da kes;"
Deuteronomy30:18 Kalimokinit yes lolo ebe abeit itwakete; mam akusipaarasia iyatakinos kakwap naidokarete airum kokekwa loka Yorodan.
Deuteronomy30:19 Anyaraunit akuj ka akwap araut akajenakakus lolo, ebe ebwaik akonyenekon aijar ka atwanare, arereŋ ka ekenit: aso do koseu aijar, tetere ijari, ijo ka aurikon:"
Deuteronomy30:20 Kominenena EJAKAIT Ekonideke, korima ekeporoto, kimorikikinos kaŋes: naarai ŋes aijarakon, ka eiyas loka apaarasiakon: tetere iboikin akwap naabu EJAKAIT kiyapoik lukapapaakon, Aburaam, ka Isaak, ka Yakob, ainakin kes.”"
Deuteronomy31:1 Kolot Musa kolimok Isirael kere akiro ŋun.
Deuteronomy31:2 Kotema kes atiar, “Arai eoŋ loka ikar akwatat ka akaisaarei lolo: mam bobo apedori alomar karaida alomun: katema da EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, ‘Sirikidoka Yorodan lo.’"
Deuteronomy31:3 Kiŋarenikini EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo adokar; emudiari ŋesi atekerin nu kakonyenekon, irumi ijo kes: Yosua da, kiŋarenikini ŋesi yes adokar, kwape atemaria EJAKAIT."
Deuteronomy31:4 Iswamakini EJAKAIT kes kwape abu kiswamakinia Sikon ka Og, ikabakan luka Imorain, ka akwapukec; luabu ŋesi komudia."
Deuteronomy31:5 Kijaikini EJAKAIT yes kes, iswamakinete kes kwape ejaatar aicorakineta kere nukecorak yes."
Deuteronomy31:6 Kicat, kotitiŋior, sirikikurianar, karaida aiyaloŋoŋ kanukec: naarai EJAKAIT Ekonideke, ŋes elosi kajo, mam kitukurwori jo, karaida aijal.”"
Deuteronomy31:7 Abu Musa konyarau Yosua, kotema ŋes kakonyen nuka Isirael kere atiar, “Kicat, kotitiŋior: naarai ilomari ijo kituna lu akwap naiyapoikinit EJAKAIT ainakin lukapapaakec; isurumi ijo kes akwap."
Deuteronomy31:8 EJAKAIT da, ŋes lokiŋarenikinit jo; ejaenena kajo, mam kitukurwori jo, karaida aijal: sirikikurianar karaida aiyaloŋoŋ.”"
Deuteronomy31:9 Kiwadik Musa ikisila ŋul, kijaik isasedotin odwe luka Lebi, luadakenenete asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT, kijaik da imakio luka Isirael."
Deuteronomy31:10 Kicorak Musa kes ebe, “Kosaŋe loka ŋulukar ikanykaarei, kapak naeseikinitai naka ekaru loka aosikin kopucit loka iswamin."
Deuteronomy31:11 Naitodiaror Isirael kere kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke kaibois naeseuni ŋesi, isiomakini ijo Isirael kere ikisila lu akikec."
Deuteronomy31:12 Kotukonok ituŋa, ikiliok ka aŋor ka ludidik, ka imoit yenejai orekon, tetere epupunete, isisiaunete da, ayoŋit EJAKAIT Ekusideke, airic aiswamaenen akiro kere nuka ikisila kalu;"
Deuteronomy31:13 Tetere ikecedwe da lumam ejenunito epupunete, isisiaunete da ayoŋit EJAKAIT Ekusideke, apaarasia kere nuijariata kakwap naidokarete Yorodan airum.”"
Deuteronomy31:14 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Koany, adolut apaarasiakon nukibusakinitor atwanare: konyarau Yosua, kobwaata kowema loka airiamunun, tetere ecorakini ŋes.” Koloto Musa ka Yosua, kobwaata kowema loka airiamunun."
Deuteronomy31:15 Kotakan EJAKAIT kotoma Owema kopir loka edou: kobwo epir loka edou kokek loka Ewema.
Deuteronomy31:16 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa atiar, “Koany, ijotoori ijo ka lukapapaakon; enyounete ituŋa lu, alosit eporo neejaas idekesio lumo luka akwap naelosete kesi ajaun mamakec, kajalete eoŋ, ebilete da aitutuketeka naetutuk kakes."
Deuteronomy31:17 Kosodi akanyunyura ainepun asurokin kes kapaaran kaŋin, ajali eoŋ kes, ebwai da ekareet kamakec, emudiario kes, ebunokinete kes nueroko nuipu ka ican da luipu; etemarete do kapaaran kaŋin ebe, ‘Mere kibunokis oni aronisio nu kanu naarai emamei Edekewok kamawok?’"
Deuteronomy31:18 Abeit ebwai ekareet kapaaran kaŋin kanuka aronisio kere nuiswamaete, naarai atupasi idekesio ice."
Deuteronomy31:19 Aso do kiwadikata ekosio lo, kisisianak ijo idwe luka Isirael: kibwaik aitukekec, tetere eraun ekosio lo ekajenanika kama ejaas idwe luka Isirael."
Deuteronomy31:20 Naarai naetolomaria eoŋ kes akwap naabu keyapoik lukapapaakec, naeleleete akile ka esik: kosodete ainyam kimonikinos, kotumata; kosodete kesi atupar idekesio ice aijaanakin kes, kamwaŋata eoŋ, kobilata da akaitutuket."
Deuteronomy31:21 Kosodi kanen, naebunokiniata kes aronisio nuipu ka ican luipu, itejenuni ekosio lo kes kwape ekajenan; naarai mam imurwokini aituke nuka aurikec: naarai ajeni aitetemonorikec nakotau naejai kwape kwana, eroko eoŋ kitolomara kes akwap naeyapoikinit.”"
Deuteronomy31:22 Kwaŋin kiwadik Musa ekosio lo apaaran ŋipeŋin, kisisianak idwe luka Isirael."
Deuteronomy31:23 Kicorak ŋesi Yosua okoku loka Nun ebe, “Kicat, kotitiŋior: naarai itolomari ijo idwe luka Isirael akwap naabu keyapoik kes: ajaenena eoŋ kajo.”"
Deuteronomy31:24 Kosodi kanen keŋetaki Musa aiwadik akiro nuka ikisila kalu oitabo, aitodol neadaunotor."
Deuteronomy31:25 Kicorak Musa Ilebin, luadakenenete asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT ebe,"
Deuteronomy31:26 “Koyaŋaasi eitabo lo loka ikisila, kibwaikis osiep loka asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, tetere ejaun nen araun ekajenanikus."
Deuteronomy31:27 Naarai ajeni epalikon ka aninik naka emurisiŋikon: koany, aroko eoŋ ajari kayes lolo ipalionokis EJAKAIT; ido konyet katwana eoŋ iyatanakinete biai?"
Deuteronomy31:28 Kotukokisi imakio kere luka atekerinikus, ka ijakakus, tetere alimokini akiro nu akikec, kanyarau da akuj ka akwap araun akajenakakec."
Deuteronomy31:29 Naarai ajeni ebe katwana eoŋ imunaunos yesi cut, ipaarete ainyein erot lokecorak yes; kidoikini yes aronis kapaarasia nuepote; naarai iswamaete nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT aitunyunyurikin ŋes kaswamisio nuka akaninikus.”"
Deuteronomy31:30 Kolimok Musa ekodet kere loka Isirael akiro kere nuka ekosio kalo aitodol naaŋetakinotor.
Deuteronomy32:1 “Kitoik akit, ijo akuj, kener; Akwap da kopup akiro nuka aitukuka:"
Deuteronomy32:2 Edouni aisisianakinika kwape kakiru, Ijililiun einerika kwape kakopyo; Kwape kakiru naedit naetepakini amelo, Kwape kelimilim loilimilimi okui."
Deuteronomy32:3 Naarai alimori eoŋ ekiror loka EJAKAIT: Kitopoloosi yesi Ewokodeke!
Deuteronomy32:4 “Atiiba, edolit aswamuke; Naarai eraas irotinike kere etube. Edeke lomunot loemameete numam adolit, Erai ŋesi lokabeit ido loedolit."
Deuteronomy32:5 Amunaunos kamake, mam eraas idweke, Aŋwalata; Erai atur naepaarit namagul da."
Deuteronomy32:6 Ikwaikinete kereka yesi EJAKAIT kwaŋin, Yes ituŋa lubaŋiok ka lumam acoa? Mere ŋesi papakon lokidumunit jo? Kisub jo kiticat da."
Deuteronomy32:7 Kiitu apaarasia nukolo ŋo kasonya, Koomoom nuka ikar luka aturio nuipu: Kiŋit papakon, kitodikini ŋesi jo; Imakiokon da, kilimokinete jo."
Deuteronomy32:8 Naeinakinia Loejai kuju kakuj atekerin airumetekec, Naatiakia idwe luka ituŋa, Abu kibwaik iikorun luka ituŋa Kwape ejaar etiai loka idwe luka Isirael."
Deuteronomy32:9 Naarai akorakinet naka EJAKAIT ŋes iketuŋa; Yakob ŋes eroet loka airumeteke.
Deuteronomy32:10 “Abu kodumak ŋes akwap nakamodiŋ, Amodiŋ naelapat naegatatar itiaŋ; Abu kirimo ŋes, koric ŋes, Kidar ŋes bala ecopot loka akoŋuke:"
Deuteronomy32:11 Bala emorukaalet loitetemonokini lukokaike, Loeporitoi kaneejaas idweke, Abu korio akebebenoka, koyaŋa kes, Kodaka kes kabebenokake:"
Deuteronomy32:12 EJAKAIT bon ŋes eŋarenikinit ŋes, Amamei edeke lomoit kaŋes."
Deuteronomy32:13 Kitodoka ŋes kaiboisio nuiceleleete nuka akwap, Konyam da amio naka emanikor; Koinak ŋes aijuju esik loalomuni katiiba, Ka akinyet naalomuni kamoru naegogoŋ;"
Deuteronomy32:14 Akinyet naka aituk, ka akile nuka amerekekin, Ka asiepai nuka imerekekin ludidik, Ka imerekekin luka Basan, ka ikorwa, Ka akima nuturaŋ; Ibu komat ebino loka aokot nuka emusabibu."
Deuteronomy32:15 “Konye kotum Yesurun, kopetonor: Ibu kotum, koburior, kinutakin: Kosodi konyet aijal Edeke lokesubi ŋes, Komen Atiiba naka aitajarioke."
Deuteronomy32:16 Apotu kisurumata ŋes ekokote kanuka idekesio lumo, Kitunyunyurikisi da ŋes kitalesia."
Deuteronomy32:17 Apotu koinakis ajokin asuban, numam eraas Edeke, Koinakis asuban idekesio lumam lem ejenete, Lukitetiak luapote kokau, Lumam lem lukapapaakus eyoŋito."
Deuteronomy32:18 Mam iwomit nuka Atiiba nakiwuruuni jo, Kimurwok jo Edeke lokiwuruuni jo."
Deuteronomy32:19 “Koany EJAKAIT, kola kes, Kanuka aitunyunyurikin naka ikedwe lusap ka lupesur."
Deuteronomy32:20 Kotema atiar, ‘Ebwai ekareet kamakec, Aanyuni ejautene loka esaŋekec: Naarai eraas atur naepaarit, Idwe lumam eraas lumunon."
Deuteronomy32:21 Kesurumata ekokote kanuka yenimam erai Edeke; Ketunyunyurikis kanuka aamameakakec: Esurumi kes ekokote kanuka ŋul lumam eraas ateker; Etunyunyurikini kes kateker naebaŋaana,"
Deuteronomy32:22 Naarai enepu akim kotoma anyunyuraka, Enoki kiton aipany nakokwap cut, Enyami akwap ka amioke, Icwei da apeteta nuka iroŋan."
Deuteronomy32:23 “Eculakini kes aronisio; Adaikini ikakojoi mamakec:
Deuteronomy32:24 Idokoraros kanuka eteŋei, Enomorio kes keimilia kaloesarani, Ka amudiario naedwar ria: Ejukakini kes ikel luka itiaŋ, Aisorit naka lueliatos luka apua,"
Deuteronomy32:25 Eari ekileŋ kokiŋa, Ejaun etasuro agolai; Emudiari ekatumunan ka abekot, Yenenaki ka ituŋanan yenebwaŋunito akorwo."
Deuteronomy32:26 Abu katema atiar, “Tikesiarisiara kes neelwana, Tiketanan aiitununokec kotuŋa”:"
Deuteronomy32:27 Kedim eoŋ aiyoŋ aitunyunyurikin naka lokasurup, Kinyeis lukasurupokec asabanakin, Kinyeis kesi atemar atiar, “Itopolooritai awokokan, Mere EJAKAIT eswamai nu kere.’”"
Deuteronomy32:28 “Naarai eraas ateker naemamei ainerun, Emamei da aijen kotomakec."
Deuteronomy32:29 Arai keraas lukacoa, tikejenut ŋun, Tieomito nuka esaŋekec loebuni!"
Deuteronomy32:30 Ikwaikini ai etuŋanan erukitor elukumit, Ka iarei da aiteker ilukumin itomon, Dimikito egwelarit Atiibakec kes, Dimi ijaikinit EJAKAIT kes?"
Deuteronomy32:31 Naarai atiibakec mam eputos ka Atiibawok, Eraas lukasurupowok da ikatubok luka ŋun."
Deuteronomy32:32 Naarai emusabibukec erai emusabibu loka Sodom, Loka imanikoria luka Gomora: Ikecemusabibun eraas imusabibun luka epiu, Edwarak aibuŋetakec:"
Deuteronomy32:33 Ekecebino ŋes aisorit naka imunwo lurwopopoete, Ka aisorit naededeŋ naka imusagan."
Deuteronomy32:34 Mam kereka ŋun eŋadakinitai mamakaŋ, Kipucuc kotoma aiŋadisiaka?"
Deuteronomy32:35 Enyaijit ŋes lokan, ka etacit, Kapak naejurusiarotor akecekejen: Naarai aapu apaaran naka amudiariokec, Ido iwonyunete nuebunokinete kes."
Deuteronomy32:36 Naarai etubokini EJAKAIT iketuŋa, Iituni ikebulesin; Keanyu ebe alemar akecegogoŋ, Emamei da yenideuna yeneenitai arai yeneosikinitai."
Deuteronomy32:37 Etemari atiar, ‘Ai bo ejaas idekesiokec, Atiiba naamunosi kesi;"
Deuteronomy32:38 Luanyamete asiepai nuka asubanakec, Luamasete ebino loka ainakinetekec namatat? Konyoutu kesi, kiŋarakis yes, Koraunos kesi amecisikus."
Deuteronomy32:39 “Aso do koany ebe, Eoŋ, Eoŋ obe, arai ŋopeŋol, Emamei edeke keoŋ: Aari, ido etajari; Emusuŋi, ido etaŋaleuni: Emamei idio da yenepedori ademari kakanika."
Deuteronomy32:40 Naarai ekiari akakan akuj, Ebe, Kwape ajaria ikar kere,"
Deuteronomy32:41 Arai kepen ekileŋika loemwekimweki, Kosodi akakan aikod etube; Enyaŋi mama ejaas lukasurupoka, Ataci ŋul lukalaito eoŋ."
Deuteronomy32:42 Etemerikini ikojoika aokot, Enyami ekakileŋ akiriŋ; Kaokot nuka luearitai ka iŋatan, Ageun kakwes nuka itima lueojak luka lukasurupo.’"
Deuteronomy32:43 “Kolelata yesi atekerin, ka iketuŋa: Naarai inyaŋi aokot nuka ikekejaanakinak, Inyaŋi mama ejaas lukasurupoke, Itegeli kanuka akwapuke, kanuka iketuŋa da.”"
Deuteronomy32:44 Kobu Musa kiner akiro kere nuka ekosio kaŋol kaki nuka ituŋa, ŋes ka Kosea okoku loka Nun."
Deuteronomy32:45 Kitanaŋ Musa einer akiro ŋun kere mama ejai Isirael kere:
Deuteronomy32:46 Kotema kes atiar, “Kibwaikisi itauonokus akiro kere nuketejen yes lolo; nuicorakinete yesi ikusidwe, airic aiswamaenen akiro kere nuka ikisila kalu."
Deuteronomy32:47 Naarai mam eraas akamameak kamakus; naarai erai aijarakus, kanuka ŋun iyatakinete yesi akusipaarasia kakwap naidokarete airum okekwa loka Yorodan.”"
Deuteronomy32:48 Kotema EJAKAIT Musa kapaaran kaŋin ebe,"
Deuteronomy32:49 “Kodoka ijo oroŋat lo Abarim, moru Nebo loejai akwap naka Moab, naitei Yeriko; koseseni akwap naka Kanaan, naainakinit idwe luka Isirael araun airumet:"
Deuteronomy32:50 Kotwanik moru loidokari ijo, koyanaar mama ejaas ikonituŋa; kwape atwanikinia onaeekon Aaron moru Kor, koyaŋaarai mama ejaas iketuŋa:"
Deuteronomy32:51 Naarai ipotu kibuceasi kama ajai kokidiŋ kidwe luka Isirael kakipi nuka Meriba naka Kades, kamodiŋ naka Sin; naarai mam ipotu kitalaut eoŋ kokidiŋ kidwe luka Isirael."
Deuteronomy32:52 Naarai ianyuni akwap kakonyenekon; konye mam ilomari akwap naainakinit idwe luka Isirael.”
Deuteronomy33:1 Na ŋes arereŋ naabu Musa etuŋanan loka Edeke kilipak Isirael eriŋa ŋes ketwana,"
Deuteronomy33:2 Kotema atiar, “Abu EJAKAIT kobu koSinai, Kocaik kes koSeir; Koca komoru Paran, Kolom kolukumin itomon luka ikalaunak: Kakekan nakoteten ajai ekisil loka akim mamakec."
Deuteronomy33:3 Eebo, emin ituŋa; Ejaas ikalaunakake kere akonikan: Apotu kiboikinos akejekon; Jjaikinio ŋinituŋanan akonikiro."
Deuteronomy33:4 Abu Musa kicorak oni ekisil, Airumet naka ekodet loka Yakob."
Deuteronomy33:5 Arai ŋesi ekabaka koYesurun, Naatukonokinere ikapolok luka ituŋa, Atekerin kere nuka Isirael."
Deuteronomy33:6 “Kojar Reuben, komam etwani; Konye kikidiokoto iketuŋa.”"
Deuteronomy33:7 Na ŋes arereŋ naka Yuda: kotema atiar, “EJAKAIT, kopup eporoto loka Yuda, Kitoloma ŋes neejaas iketuŋa: Abu koji kakekanin kanukeŋ; Iŋarakini ijo ŋes aitiji lukasurupoke.”"
Deuteronomy33:8 Naka Lebi da kotema atiar, “Tumimikon ka Urimikon ejaas ka etuŋananikon loka Edeke, Loibu kigimo koMasa, Loibu kitepeg kakipi nuka Meriba;"
Deuteronomy33:9 Loabala nuka papake ka nuka totoke ebe, ‘Mam aanyunit ŋes”: Mam ŋes abu kolimo ikeinacan, Karaida ajenun ikedwe: Naarai aricito akonikirot, Kidarete aitutuketekon."
Deuteronomy33:10 Isisianakinete Yakob itubesiakon, Ka Isirael da ekisilikon: Ibwaikinete lukisupurununo akonyenekon, Ka ainakinet kere naicweio kotemukon."
Deuteronomy33:11 EJAKAIT, kisirereŋ iboroke, Kocam aswam naka akaninike: Kicum aipelor aŋabes nuka ŋul kaluenyoikinete ŋes, Nuka ŋul da luelaito ŋes, Tetere mam bobo enyounete.”"
Deuteronomy33:12 Naka Benyamin kotema atiar, “Iboikin yeniminat yenika EJAKAIT kainapakin eiduny kaŋes; Imukorit ŋes apaaran kere, Iboienenei da kokidiŋ kikeperinike.”"
Deuteronomy33:13 Naka Yosep kotema atiar, “Kisirereŋ EJAKAIT akekwap; Koboro luketiai loepol luka akui, kakopyo, Kaidules naidipidipakina kwap,"
Deuteronomy33:14 Koboro luketiai loepol luka araito nuka akoloŋ, Koboro luketiai loepol luka apol naka ilapio,"
Deuteronomy33:15 Koboro luepolok luka iroŋan lukolo sek, Koboro luketiai loepol luka iukon lumam enaŋete,"
Deuteronomy33:16 Koboro luketiai loepol luka alup ka ailelebakec, Kacamunio naka ŋol kaloiboie kokitwi; Kobu arereŋ akou naka Yosep, Kosiaduk loka ŋol kaloatiakario koinacanake,"
Deuteronomy33:17 Ekiyai loka emonoke, erai apolou nakeŋ; Amumwarake eraas amumwara nuka ekosobwan: Kes eremoria ŋesi ituŋa, kes kere, kiton osaŋe loka akwap: Eraas kesi ilukumin itomon luka Epuraim, Eraas da ilukumin luka Manase.”"
Deuteronomy33:18 Naka Sebulun kotema atiar, “Sebulun, kolakar kotoma alomarikon; Isakar da kotoma owemaikon."
Deuteronomy33:19 Enyararete ituŋa oroŋat; Einakinete kaŋina asuban nuka adolit: Naarai ijujuete luidilas kaŋolol, Ka luketiai loepol luibwaitai kasiŋe.”"
Deuteronomy33:20 Naka Gad kotema atiar, “Isirereŋitoi ŋol loitalalai Gad: Iboie bala aŋatuny, Epoopoi kakan, eebo esiaduk loka akou."
Deuteronomy33:21 Abu kokorakin atutubet nasodit kanukeŋ, Naarai eŋadakinitai ewai loka lokesilan Kobu nepepe kalukapolok luka ituŋa, Kitodol abeit naka EJAKAIT, Ka itubesia koIsirael.”"
Deuteronomy33:22 Naka Dan kotema atiar, “Erai Dan ikoku yenika eŋatuny, Yenesomun koBasan.”"
Deuteronomy33:23 Naka Naputali kotema atiar, “Wu Naputali, loimono asianut, Loileleba arereŋ naka EJAKAIT: Irumi ijo ari nakoto ka eŋalakimak.”"
Deuteronomy33:24 Naka Aser kotema atiar, “Isirereŋitoi Aser kidwe; Kocamunai koinacanake, Kidomak ŋesi akekeju akinyet."
Deuteronomy33:25 Eraunos agolitokon asuat ka aisinit; Kwape kapaarasiakon, kwape kwaŋin ejaunor agogoŋukon.”"
Deuteronomy33:26 “Emamei yeneputos ka Edeke, wu Yesurun, Loibwaneni akuj aiŋarakin jo, Kajokisike kakuj."
Deuteronomy33:27 Edeke lomam enaŋi ŋes amecisikon, Kigagat kakanin numam enaŋete: Ereŋea lukasurupo kakonyenekon, Kobala ebe, ‘Komudia.’"
Deuteronomy33:28 Iboie Isirael kainapakin, Atan naka Yakob ejai bon, Kakwap naka akima ka ebino; Eebo etepi akekuj akopyo."
Deuteronomy33:29 Kisirereŋitoi jo, wu Isirael: Iŋai loeputos kajo, ituŋa luitajarit EJAKAIT, Ebuku loka aiŋarakiniokon, Ŋol ŋes ekileŋ loka ajokisikon! Kinonokikinete jo lukasurupokon; Icakacakai ijo aiboisiokec nuiceleleete.”"
Deuteronomy34:1 Kodoka Musa kapuutona nuka Moab moru Nebo, aidi naka Pisiga, loitei Yeriko, Kitodik EJAKAIT ŋes akwap kere naka Gilead, kiton Dan;"
Deuteronomy34:2 Ka Naputali kere, ka akwap naka Epuraim ka Manase, ka akwap kere naka Yuda, kiton aŋolol nakoiŋaren;"
Deuteronomy34:3 Ka Eŋalakimak, ka Apuuton naka aditot naka Yeriko ere loka idukudukun kiton Soar."
Deuteronomy34:4 Kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “ŋin ŋes akwap naabu keyapoik Aburaam, ka Isaak, ka Yakob, ebe, Ainakini aurikon: kesireik jo kakonyekon, konye mam idokari ŋina.”"
Deuteronomy34:5 Kwaŋin kotwanik Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT akwap naka Moab, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT."
Deuteronomy34:6 Kidaik ŋes aditot akwap naka Moab naitei Bet-peor: konye emamei ituŋanan yenejeni atesike kiton lolo.
Deuteronomy34:7 Arai Musa loka ikar akwatat ka akaisaarei naatwania: mam akekoŋu awariwari, karaida akegogoŋ aiŋoŋooro."
Deuteronomy34:8 Kibworoto idwe luka Isirael Musa kapuutona nuka Moab apaarasia akaisauni: kwaŋin kitanaŋai apaarasia nuka aibworo Musa.
Deuteronomy34:9 Eleleba Yosua okoku loka Nun emoyo loka acoa, naarai edokokinit Musa ŋes akekanin: kopupenenete idwe luka Isirael ŋes, kiswamata kwape ecorakinitor EJAKAIT Musa,"
Deuteronomy34:10 Mam bobo ejauna enabi koIsirael loeputos ka Musa, loanyununos ka EJAKAIT:"
Deuteronomy34:11 Kotoma aanyuneta kere ka nukaumokin, nuejukari EJAKAIT ŋes aiswamakin Parao, ka ikekejaanakinak kere, ka akwapuke kere, kakwap nako Misiri;"
Deuteronomy34:12 Kotoma akan nakagogoŋ, ka etasuro kere loepol, loabu Musa kiswama kakonyen nuka Isirael kere."
Joshua1:1 Kosodi kanen kedau Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT atwanare, kotema EJAKAIT Yosua okoku loka Nun, ekejaanakinan loka Musa atiar,"
Joshua1:2 “Atwana Musa ekejaanakinanika; aso kwana konyou, kodok ecor lo Yorodan, ijo ka ituŋa lu kere, kolomasi akwap naainakinit eoŋ kes, idwe luka Isirael."
Joshua1:3 Ŋiniibois neicakete akusikeje, kainak yes, kwape kolo alimokinia Musa,"
Joshua1:4 Ameuni kamodiŋ, ka Lebanon lo, aitodol ocor lokapolon, ecor Eupurat, akwap kere naka Ikitin, kiton aŋolol nati ape neelomanari akoloŋ, ŋes eraun ekusiikor;"
Joshua1:5 Emameun ituŋanan kere yenepedori abwoikin jo apaarasia kere nuka akoniijar: kwape ajaar kolo ka Musa, ajaikin kwape kwaŋin kajo da: mam ketukurwori jo, karaida aijal."
Joshua1:6 Kicat, kotitiŋior, naarai isurumi ijo ituŋa lu akwap nakolo eyapoikin ainakin lukapapaakec."
Joshua1:7 Konye kicat ber kotitiŋior noi, aricit aswam kwape ejaatar ikisila lu, lukicorakini ekakejaanakinan Musa: siripaanari kakan nakoteten karaida kediany, tetere irereŋior kama ilosenenei kere."
Joshua1:8 Eitabo lo loka ikisila sirenyoununei kaitukukon, konye koomoomoenenei ŋes paaran ka akuare da, tetere iricit aswam kere kwape ejaatar nuiwadikatai toma: naarai kwaŋin ŋes erereŋior ekonirot, ikerianaror da;"
Joshua1:9 Mere eoŋ kecorak jo? Kicat, kotitiŋior; sirikikurianar karaida aiyaloŋoŋ: naarai ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke kajo kama ilosenenei kere.”"
Joshua1:10 Kosodi kicorak Yosua ijaka luka ituŋa atiar,"
Joshua1:11 “Kitoro kidiŋ oidukurun, kieorakis ituŋa atiar, ‘Kitemonokisi inyamat, naarai eriŋa apaarasia auni etuboro idokete ecor lo Yorodan, alomar airum akwap, nakiinakini EJAKAIT Ekusideke airum.’ ”"
Joshua1:12 Abu Yosua kolimok Ireubenin ka Igadin, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase ebe,"
Joshua1:13 “Kiitutu akirot nakicorakini yes Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT, ebe, ‘EJAKAIT Ekusideke kiinakini yes aiyeŋun, kiinakini da akwap na.’"
Joshua1:14 Akusiŋor, ka ikusidwe, ka ikusibaren, iboikinos akwap nakiinakini Musa kokekwa loka Yorodan; konye yes idokarete kakonyen nuka iinacanakus ikapitos lujiis, ituŋa kere lukirigin, luetitiŋ, iŋarakinete kes:"
Joshua1:15 Aitodol naedaunia EJAKAIT aisiyeŋun ikusiinacan, kwape yes, ido kedaut kesi da airum akwap naeinakini EJAKAIT Ekusideke, kosodete iboŋorete kirumata akwap naka airumetekus, nakiinakini Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT kokekwa loka Yorodan mape elomununia akoloŋ.”"
Joshua1:16 Koboŋokis Yosua ebe, “Kere nukieorak ijo sio kiswamai, ido kere nekijukanari kilosenenei."
Joshua1:17 Kwape kiipupenenoo Musa kakiro kere, kipupenenei jo da kwape kwaŋin: konye kojai EJAKAIT Ekonideke kajo, kwape kejaar ka Musa."
Joshua1:18 Ŋinituŋanan kere yenipaliikini akoniicorakinet, ido yenimam epupenenei akonikiro kere nuicorakini ŋes, eareneneo: konye kicat, kotitiŋior.”"
Joshua2:1 Kijuka Yosua okoku loka Nun ituŋa iarei anyoun koSitim airot akwap kaiyeiyea, kobala ebe, “Koloto korota akwap, ka Yeriko.” Apotu koloto kodoloto togo loka naadote ekekiror Rakab, koperoto nen."
Joshua2:2 Kolimokinai ekabaka loka Yeriko ebe, “Koany, elomunito ituŋa ne luka idwe luka Isirael akuare na airot akwap,”"
Joshua2:3 Kijukak ekabaka loka Yeriko Rakab atiar, “Kitolom ituŋa lueponito neijai ijo, lualomasi togokon: naarai eponito airot akwap kere.”"
Joshua2:4 Koyaŋa aberu ituŋa ŋul luarei, kibwa kes; kotema atiar, “Eebo, aponito ituŋa neajai eoŋ, konye mam ajeni neaponiata:"
Joshua2:5 Kosodi kapak naagolere erute, kemutonor akwap, apotu ituŋa kolomasi: mam ajeni neapotu koloto: aso kibwapakisi kes atipet; naarai idolokinete kes.”"
Joshua2:6 Konye abu ŋesi koyaŋa kes oswi, kibwa kes kakopit nuka abirai nualoikinit ŋesi oswi."
Joshua2:7 Kibwapata ituŋa kes korot loebei Yorodan, kiton odoket: napelomarete luebwapito kes kiŋa kogolokinoi erute."
Joshua2:8 Eroko kes kepero, abu aberu kolot oswi neajaas kesi;"
Joshua2:9 Kotema ŋesi ituŋa atiar, “Ajeni ebe kiinak EJAKAIT yes akwap, kibunok da isio etasurokus, luiboiete kakwap kere eburunito kakonyenekus."
Joshua2:10 Naarai kipupu kwape etoonio EJAKAIT akipi nuka Aŋolol Nakareŋan kakonyenekus, nailomuniata koMisiri; ka nuipotu yesi kiswamakis ikabakan iarei luka Imorain, luajaas okekwa loka Yorodan, kes Sikon ka Og, luipotu yesi komudiasi cut."
Joshua2:11 Napekipupunio isio ŋun, apotu ikositauon koburut, kipirisiar etau loka ŋinituŋanan kanukus: naarai EJAKAIT Ekusideke, ŋes Edeke kokuju toma akuj, kokwap da toma akwap."
Joshua2:12 Aso do, keŋaiŋait, kiyapoikinoi eoŋ, kolimitos EJAKAIT, naarai kekonak yes nukasianut, yes da kikonakis ekaloka papaka nukasianut, koinakis eoŋ aanyunet nakabeit:"
Joshua2:13 Ebe itajarete papaka; ka totoka, ka iinacanaka, ka ainacanaka, kere da luejaatar kesi, iyuunete aijarakosi kotoma atwanare.”"
Joshua2:14 Kotemasi iruŋa ŋes atiar, “Akosiijar itia nakus, arai mam ilimorete akosikiro nu; ejaun do ebe, nakiinakinia EJAKAIT sio akwap, kikonakini jo nukasianut ka nukabeit.”"
Joshua2:15 Kosodi do ŋesi aijoluluun kes kauno kadirisa; naarai ajai etogoke arwatat naka ere, kiboienenei ŋesi karwatat."
Joshua2:16 Kotema kes atiar, “Kodokasi oroŋat, kinyeis lukibwapito adumun yes; koŋopata kanen apaarasia auni aitodol naeboŋunioto lukibwapito: akaulo kaŋun ilosete konyet.”"
Joshua2:17 Kotemasi ituŋa ŋes atiar, “Emamuunete nukibeikinete sio kanuka aiyapositikon na nakisiyapo ijo sio."
Joshua2:18 Koany, nakilomunia isio akwap, ienikini auno na nakareŋan adirisa nakijolulunio ijo sio: itukokini papakon ka totokon ka iinacanakon, ka lukokaloka papakon kere togo mama ijai."
Joshua2:19 Ejaun do ebe, nin yenelomuni kotogokon alosit orot, ejaunos aokotoke akouke, emamuunete nukibeikinete sio: ŋin yenejai kajo togo, ejaunos aokotoke akoukosi, arai kesuroki ŋes adiokan."
Joshua2:20 Konye arai kilimo ijo akosikiro nu, emamuunete do nukibeikinete sio kanuka aiyapositikon nakisiyapo sio.”"
Joshua2:21 Kotema ŋesi atiar, “Kikote nepenen, kwape ejaatar akusikiro.” Kotwar kes, konyout: koenik auno nakareŋan adirisa."
Joshua2:22 Koloto, kodoloto oroŋat, kiboikinos nen apaarasia auni, aitodol naaboŋunioto lukibwapito: komoata lukibwapito kes orot kere, konye mam apotu kodumut kes,"
Joshua2:23 Kosodete ituŋa luarei aboŋor, kodokut koroŋat, kikwaŋaros, kodoloto neajai Yosua okoku loka Nun; kolimokis ŋes kere nuapotu kodoikis kes."
Joshua2:24 Kotemasi Yosua atiar, “Abeit kijaik EJAKAIT akwap kere akaniniwok; bobo da eburunito luiboienenete kakwap kakonyenewok.”"
Joshua3:1 Konyou Yosua tupuruc sek, konyout koSitim, kodoloto Yorodan, ŋes ka idwe kere luka Isirael; koperoto nen eroko kedoka."
Joshua3:2 Kosodi kanen ketuboros apaarasia auni, kitoro ijaka kidiŋ kiidukurun;"
Joshua3:3 Kicorakis ituŋa ebe, “Naianyuniata asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, ka isasedotin Ilebin edakitos ŋes, inyounete do kaiboisiokus, kotupasi ŋes."
Joshua3:4 Konye ejaun apak kidiŋikus ka ŋes, aitemis naka ikubitin ilukumin iarei: sirikikunyakis ŋes, tetere ijenunete erot lokibusakinit aitor; naarai mam ber lem yes itorito orot lo.”"
Joshua3:5 Kotema Yosua ituŋa atiar, “Kitalaunos, naarai iswamai moi EJAKAIT nukaumokin kamakus.”"
Joshua3:6 Kotema Yosua isasedotin atiar, “Kodakata asaduku naka aitutuket, kiŋarenikis ituŋa adokar.” Apotu kodakata asaduku naka aitutuket, kiŋarenikis ituŋa alosit."
Joshua3:7 Kotema EJAKAIT Yosua atiar, “Ageuni eoŋ lolo aitopoloor jo kakonyen nuka Isirael kere, tetere ejenunete ebe kwape ajaar kolo ka Musa, ajaikin kwape kwaŋin kajo da."
Joshua3:8 Icorakini ijo isasedotin luedakito asaduku naka aitutuket ebe, ‘Naidolioto ariri kakipi nuka Yorodan, ibwoete kopalarito koYorodan.’ ”"
Joshua3:9 Kotema Yosua idwe kere luka Isirael atiar, “Kopotu ne, kopuput akiro nuka EJAKAIT Ekusideke.”"
Joshua3:10 Kotema Yosua atiar, “Ijenunete kanu ebe ejai Edeke lokajaran mamakus, ebe da mam ekurwori cut aireŋear Ekanaanit, ka Ekitit, ka Ekibit, ka Eperisit, ka Egirugasit, ka Emorait, ka Eyebusit kakonyenekus."
Joshua3:11 Koany, kiŋarenikinit yes asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT loka akwap kere adokar Yorodan."
Joshua3:12 Aso do koseutu ituŋa itomon ka luarei luka atekerin nuka Isirael, etuŋanan kanuka ŋiniteker."
Joshua3:13 Kosodi kanen, naicakiata akeje nuka isasedotin luedakito asaduku naka EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka akwap kere, akipi nuka Yorodan, itikorio akipi nuka Yorodan, ka neeleleununiata; esipokinos atukit adiopet.”"
Joshua3:14 Kosodi kanen, naanyounioto ituŋa kowemanakec aidok Yorodan, apotu isasedotin luadakito asaduku naka aitutuket kiŋarenikinito ituŋa:"
Joshua3:15 Kedoloto luadakito asaduku Yorodan, kicakata akeje nuka isasedotin luadakito asaduku akipi, (naarai ilelebunun Yorodan kiton aririke kere, apak kere naka aisak,)"
Joshua3:16 Kosipokinos akipi nualeleunete, koraunos atukit adiopet, kaneelwana noi, koAdam, ere loidunyas ka Saretan: akipi da nueleleete aŋolol naka Araba, ŋes Aŋolol naka Abalaŋ, kitikoroi; kotuboros ituŋa kiton Yeriko."
Joshua3:17 Kobwaata isasedotin luadakito asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT kaneonit, kokidiŋ Yorodan, kotubor Isirael kere kaneonit, aitodol neatuboror cut ateker kere koYorodan."
Joshua4:1 Kosodi kanen ketubor cut ateker kere koYorodan, kotema EJAKAIT Yosua atiar,"
Joshua4:2 “Koseu ituŋa itomon ka luarei kotuŋa, etuŋanan kaŋiniteker."
Joshua4:3 Kicorak kes ebe, ‘Kolemutu amor atomon ka nuarei kokidiŋ Yorodan, kaibois naabwoiata akeje nuka isasedotin, koyaŋaasi kes, kibwaikis aibois naiperete akuare na.’ ”"
Joshua4:4 Kosodi Yosua anyaraun ituŋa lutomon ka luarei, luaseunit kodwe luka Isirael, etuŋanan kaŋiniteker:"
Joshua4:5 Kotema Yosua kes atiar, “Kotuboros kiŋaren kasaduku naka EJAKAIT Ekusideke kidiŋ Yorodan, kodakak ŋinituŋanan kayesi amoru okeperike, kwape ejaar etiai loka atekerin nuka idwe luka Isirael:"
Joshua4:6 Koraun do aanyunet mamakus, tetere naiŋisiata ikusidwe, kapaarasia nuepote ebe, ‘Anyoin apolou naka amorukus nu?’"
Joshua4:7 Itemarete do kes atiar, ‘Naarai aponi kitikoroi akipi nuka Yorodan koiŋaren kasaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT; naetorio Yorodan, aponi kitikoroi akipi nuka Yorodan:’ ido eraunos amor nu aisiitunet mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael ikar kere.”"
Joshua4:8 Kiswamata idwe luka Isirael kwape kicorakinia Yosua, kodakut amor atomon ka nuarei kokidiŋ Yorodan, kwape kelimokinia EJAKAIT Yosua, kwape ejaar etiai loka atekerin nuka idwe luka Isirael: kodakas kes aibois naaperete, kibwaikis kes nen."
Joshua4:9 Kosipok Yosua amor atomon ka nuarei kidiŋ Yorodan, aibois naabwoiata akeje nuka isasedotin luadakito asaduku naka aitutuket: ejaas da nen, kiton lolo,"
Joshua4:10 Naarai apotu isasedotin luadakito asaduku kobwaata kokidiŋ Yorodan, aitodol neadaunor ŋinikirot naecorakinit EJAKAIT Yosua alimokin ituŋa, kwape ajaatar kere nuecorakinit Musa Yosua. Kiwonyasi ituŋa kotuboros."
Joshua4:11 Kosodi kanen ketuboros cut ituŋa kere, kotubor asaduku naka EJAKAIT, ka isasedotin, kiŋaren kituŋa,"
Joshua4:12 Kotuboros da idwe luka Reuben, ka idwe luka Gad, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase, kokapitos lujiis, kiŋaren kidwe luka Isirael, kwape alimokinitor Musa kes."
Joshua4:13 Kotuboros kwaka ilukumin akaisaoŋon kokapakina ejie kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kiton apuutona nuka Yeriko,"
Joshua4:14 Kitopoloo EJAKAIT Yosua kapaaran kaŋin kakonyen nuka Isirael kere; koyoŋata ŋes apaarasia kere nuka aijarake, kwape ayoŋitotor Musa."
Joshua4:15 Kotema EJAKAIT Yosua atiar,"
Joshua4:16 “Kicorak isasedotin luedakito asaduku naka aitejenunet kodokut koYorodan.”
Joshua4:17 Kicorak do Yosua isasedotin ebe, “Kodokutu yesi koYorodan.”"
Joshua4:18 Kosodi kanen nakedokuniata isasedotin luadakito asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT kokidiŋ Yorodan, kicakata da akeje nuka isasedotin akwap naeonit, koboŋokis akip nuka Yorodan aiboisikec, kilelebun kiton aririke kwape lem sek."
Joshua4:19 Kodokut ituŋa koYorodan kapaaran nakitomonet naka elap losodit, kidukuroto Giligal, oikor lokokide loka Yeriko."
Joshua4:20 Kisipok Yosua amor ŋun atomon ka nuarei Giligal, nualemunete kesi koYorodan."
Joshua4:21 Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, “Naiŋisiata ikusidwe lukapapakec kapaarasia nuepote ebe, ‘Anyoin apolou naka amor kanu?’"
Joshua4:22 Itejenunete do ikusidwe ebe, ‘Adokuni Isirael Yorodan lo kitorite neeonit.’"
Joshua4:23 Naarai abu EJAKAIT Ekusideke kitoon akipi nuka Yorodan kakonyenekus, aitodol naitubunotor, kwape eswamakinia EJAKAIT Ekusideke Aŋolol Nakareŋan naabu ŋesi kitoon kakonyenewok, aitodol nakitubunor:"
Joshua4:24 Tetere ejenunete ituŋa kere luka akwap akan naka EJAKAIT, ebe erai nakapedor; tetere eyoŋete EJAKAIT Ekusideke ikar kere.”"
Joshua5:1 Kosodi kanen kepuput ikabakan kere luka Imorain, luajaas okekwa loka Yorodan ari nakoto, ka ikabakan kere luka Ikanaanin luajaas ariri naka aŋolol, kwape etoonio EJAKAIT akipi nuka Yorodan kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael aitodol nakiitubunor, koburut itauonokec, kipirisiar etau loka ŋinituŋanan, kanuka idwe luka Isirael."
Joshua5:2 Kotema EJAKAIT Yosua kapak kaŋin atiar, “Kiswamau ikileŋa luka amor, kirucak bobo aikep idwe luka Isirael.”"
Joshua5:3 Kiswamau Yosua ikileŋa luka amor, kokep idwe luka Isirael, koukot loka amunyin."
Joshua5:4 Akepi Yosua ituŋa kanuka akirot kana: ituŋa kere lualomunete koMisiri, luaraas ikiliok, kes ituŋa kere lukajiok, apotu kotwakikis amodiŋ orot, kedaut alomun koMisiri."
Joshua5:5 Naarai ituŋa kere lualomunete araas luakepitai: konye ituŋa kere luaurio kamodiŋ korot epote kesi koMisiri, mam akepitai,"
Joshua5:6 Naarai apotu idwe luka Isirael kolototo kamodiŋ ikar akaisaoŋon, aitodol naamudiarere ateker kere, kes ituŋa lukajiok lualomunete koMisiri, naarai mam apotu kopuput eporoto loka EJAKAIT: luabu EJAKAIT kiyapoik ebe mam ecamakini kes aanyun akwap naabu kiyapoik lukapapaakec ebe kiinakin oni akwap naeleleete akile ka esik."
Joshua5:7 Idwekec, luetopolouni ŋesi aiboisikec, ŋul akepi Yosua: naarai mam akepitai, naarai mam apotu kokepa kes korot."
Joshua5:8 Kosodi kanen kedau aikep ateker kere, kiboioto kaiboisiokec koidukurun, aitodol naaŋaleunioto."
Joshua5:9 Kotema EJAKAIT Yosua atiar, “Ekokorio lolo eoŋ amorosit naka Misiri kamakus.” Ŋes do amaikinere aibois ŋin Giligal, kiton lolo."
Joshua5:10 Kidukuroto idwe luka Isirael Giligal; kidarata aleleŋio kapaaran nakitomonet kaoŋon naka elap, eboŋ, kapuutona nuka Yeriko."
Joshua5:11 Konyamata akima nuka akwap tupuruc kedaun aleleŋio, imugatin lumam itubuunitoi ka imumwa luikawooritai, kapaaran kaŋipe kaŋin,"
Joshua5:12 Kitanaŋai emanu kapaaran naatupakini ŋin naanyamiata kesi akima nuka akwap; mam bobo idwe luka Isirael apotu koanyut emanu; konye anyamete araito nuka alup nuka Kanaan okaru ŋol.
Joshua5:13 Kosodi kanen ejai Yosua ariri naka Yeriko, abu kiteluo akekonye kite, ido koany, abwoi etuŋanan kitei ŋes kitetenite ekekileŋ: kolot Yosua mamake, kotema ŋes atiar, “Irai ijo lokosi, arai loka lukasurupokosi?”"
Joshua5:14 Kotema atiar, “Mam; konye abunit eoŋ kwape ekapolon loka ajore naka EJAKAIT.” Kibiror Yosua ebuburia, koma, kotema ŋes atiar, “Anyoika nuebala ejakaitika ekekejaanakinan?”"
Joshua5:15 Kotema ekapolon loka ajore naka EJAKAIT Yosua atiar, “Kolaca akonimuk kakejenekon; naarai aibois naibwoia ijo erai nakalaunan.” Kiswama Yosua kwaŋin."
Joshua6:1 Kogoloro noi Yeriko kanuka idwe luka Isirael: amamei yenelomari karaida yenelomuni.
Joshua6:2 Kotema EJAKAIT Yosua atiar, “Koany, ainak Yeriko akanikon, ka ekabakake, ka ituŋa lukirigin luetitiŋ."
