Joshua6:3 Irimorete yesi ere, ituŋa kere lukajiok, irimorete ere irwan atipet. Iswamai ijo kwaŋin apaarasia akanykape."
Joshua6:4 Itiŋete isasedotin ikanykaarei arupepen akanykaarei nuka amumwara nuka imerekekin koiŋaren kasaduku: ido kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei irimorete ere irwan akanykaarei, kokusete isasedotin arupepen."
Joshua6:5 Ejaun do ebe, naekutakiniata noi amumwarat naka emerekek, naipupunioto yesi aruo naka arupepe, ibwoŋakinete ituŋa kere eibwoŋ loepol: etiyakin arwatat naka ere, edokarete ituŋa ŋinituŋanan ederori kiŋarenike.”"
Joshua6:6 Abu Yosua okoku loka Nun konyarau isasedotin, kotema kes atiar, “Kodakata asaduku naka aitutuket, kitiŋata isasedotin ikanykaarei arupepen akanykaarei nuka amumwara nuka imerekekin koiŋaren kasaduku naka EJAKAIT.”"
Joshua6:7 Kotemasi kesi ituŋa atiar, “Kotuboros, kirimosi ere, koloto ituŋa luekapakina kiŋaren kasaduku naka EJAKAIT.”"
Joshua6:8 Kojaun kwaŋin ebe, naalimokinia Yosua ituŋa, koloto isasedotin ikanykaarei luetinito arupepen akanykaarei nuka amumwara nuka imerekekin kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kokutata arupepen: kotupak kes asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT."
Joshua6:9 Koloto ituŋa luakapakina kiŋaren kisasedotin luakusete arupepen, kotupata lukokau asaduku, kokusete isasedotin arupepen elosete."
Joshua6:10 Kicorak Yosua ituŋa ebe, “Mam ibwoŋakinete karaida ikusiporotoi apupunio, karaida alimun adiokirot kaitukekus, aitodol apaaran nakecorakinia yes aibwoŋakin; ŋes konyet ibwoŋakiniata.”"
Joshua6:11 Kwaŋin kisirimo asaduku naka EJAKAIT ere, airimor ŋes irwan atipet: koboŋosi oidukurun, koperoto oidukurun."
Joshua6:12 Kodilok Yosua anyoun tupuruc, kodakata isasedotin asaduku naka EJAKAIT."
Joshua6:13 Kolosenenete isasedotin ikanykaarei luetiŋito arupepen akanykaarei nuka amumwara nuka imerekekin koiŋaren kasaduku naka EJAKAIT, kokusete arupepen: kiŋarenikinitos ituŋa luakapakina lujiis kes; kotupata lukokau asaduku naka EJAKAIT, kokusete isasedotin arupepen elosete."
Joshua6:14 Kapaaran nakiareit da kirimosi ere irwan atipet, koboŋosi oidukurun: kiswamata kwaŋin apaarasia akanykape."
Joshua6:15 Kosodi kanen kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei, kodilokis anyoun ecila kide, kirimosi ere kwape ejaar epone ŋol irwan akanykaarei: konye kapaaran kaŋin apotu kirimosi ere irwan akanykaarei,"
Joshua6:16 Kosodi kanen irwan nakikanyetekaarei nakekutakiniata isasedotin arupepen, kotema Yosua ituŋa atiar, “Kibwoŋata; naarai kiinak EJAKAIT yes ere."
Joshua6:17 Itateleori EJAKAIT ere, ŋes ka luejaas toma kere; dimarai Rakab naadote ŋes ejari, ŋes ka ŋul kere luejaas kaŋes togo, naarai abu ŋesi kibwa ikiyakia lukiijukarit."
Joshua6:18 Ka yes da, kocoito noi kosaca ibore yenitateleoritai kinyeis naidauniata aitaleor, ayaŋaar ibore yenitateleoritai; kosodete kwaŋin ayaun aiken oidukurun luka Isirael ka aitican kes."
Joshua6:19 Konye epuesa kere, ka esabu, ka amoti nuka aisinit ka asuat eraas nukalaunak kama ejai EJAKAIT: eyaŋaunio aiŋadis naka EJAKAIT,”"
Joshua6:20 Kosodete ituŋa eibwoŋ, kokutata isasedotin arupepen: kosodi kanen kepuput ituŋa aruo naka arupepe, kibwoŋata ituŋa eibwoŋ loepol, kotiyakin arwatat, kodokasi ituŋa ore, ŋinituŋanan kodero kiŋarenike, kirumata ere,"
Joshua6:21 Komudiasi cut kere luajaas toma ore, ikiliok ka aŋor, ludidik ka lumojoŋ, imoŋin ka amerekekin, ka asigirian, kakwanis naka ekileŋ."
Joshua6:22 Kotema Yosua ituŋa luarei luarosete akwap ebe, “Koloto togo loka naadote, kitolomut aberu, ka luejaatar kere, kwape kiyapoikinioto ŋes.”"
Joshua6:23 Kolomasi ikatumunak lukarotak, kitolomut Rakab ka papake, ka totoke, ka iinacanake, ka Iuajaatar kere; kitolomut da lukokekike kere; kibwaikis kes kiŋa kiidukurun luka Isirael."
Joshua6:24 Kicweikis ere, ka luejaas toma kere: dimarai epuesa ka esabu, ka amoti nuka aisinit ka asuat, apotu kesi kibwaikis ŋul aiŋadis naka etogo loka EJAKAIT."
Joshua6:25 Konye Rakab naadote, ka ekal loka papake, ka luajaatar kere abu Yosua kitajar; kiboikin mama ejai Isirael, kiton lolo; naarai abu ŋesi kibwa ikiyakia luejukarit Yosua airot Yeriko."
Joshua6:26 Kicorak Yosua kes kaiyaposit kapak kaŋin ebe, “Kikenoi kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT etuŋanan loenyouni aiduk ere lo Yeriko, Etwani ekiyaike naepesikinia ŋesi apetetake, Etwani da eŋooritike naesipokinia ŋesi ikekiake.”"
Joshua6:27 Kojaenena EJAKAIT ka Yosua; kojenun da ŋesi kakwap kere.
Joshua7:1 Konye kibucasi idwe luka Isirael koboro kaluetateleoritai: naarai abu Akan, okoku loka Karumi, okoku loka Sabidi, okoku loka Sera, loka ateker naka Yuda, koyaŋa ibore yenetateleoritai: kinep anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin idwe luka Isirael."
Joshua7:2 Kijuka Yosua ituŋa anyoun koYeriko alosit Ai, loidunyas ka Bet-aben, kari nakokide naka Bet-el, kotema kes atiar, “Koloto korota akwap.” Koloto ituŋa korota Ai."
Joshua7:3 Koboŋut mama ejai Yosua, kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Kinyeis ituŋa kere alosit; konye koloto ilukumin iarei arai iuni aidany Ai; sirikitaar ituŋa kere alosit ŋina; naarai ikidioko lukaŋina.”"
Joshua7:4 Kwaŋin koloto ituŋa kwape ilukumin iuni ŋina, kokerata kakonyen nuka ituŋa luka Ai."
Joshua7:5 Kodanyata ituŋa luka Ai ituŋa kwape akaisauni ka lukanykape kakesi: apotu korukioto kes anyoun korute kiton Sebarim, kodanyata kes kajesa: koburut itauon luka ituŋa, kipirisiaros piris."
Joshua7:6 Kocilicil Yosua ikenapen, kibiror ebuburia koiŋaren kasaduku naka EJAKAIT kiton eboŋ, ŋes ka imakio luka Isirael; komudanakis apua akwesikec."
Joshua7:7 Kotema Yosua atiar, “Wu okwe, EJAKAIT Edeke, kanukinyo itodokunia ijo ituŋa lu Yorodan, aijaikin akan naka Imorain, amudiar sio? Tiejok arai kasalito isio aiboi okekwa loka Yorodan!"
Joshua7:8 Wu EJAKAIT, atemari eoŋ ai, kedau Isirael aibelokin lukasurupokec ipuranakec!"
Joshua7:9 Naarai epupunete Ikanaanin ka luiboiete kakwap kere, kosodete alukun sio, amudiar ekosikiror kakwap: ikwaikini ijo ai ekonikiror lokapolon?”"
Joshua7:10 Kotema EJAKAIT Yosua atiar, “Konyou; kanukinyo ibiroror ijo ebuburia?"
Joshua7:11 Adiaka Isirael; eebo, ebucasi aitutuketeka naecorakinit kes: eebo, ayaŋaasi ibore yenetateleoritai; akokwata, ejoseikis, ebwaikis da ŋin oborokec."
Joshua7:12 Kanuka ŋun mam idwe luka Isirael epedorete aibwo kakonyen nuka lukasurupokec, iboŋokinete lukasurupokec ipuranakec, naarai araut luikenitai: mam bobo ajaenena kayes, dimikito kimudiasi ibore yenitateleoritai kotomakus."
Joshua7:13 Konyou, kitalau ituŋa, kolimok kes ebe, “Kitalaunos eroko moi kedoluno: naarai inera EJAKAIT Edeke loka Isirael kwanata ebe, “Ejai ibore yenitateleoritai tomakon, ijo Isirael; mam jo ipedori abwoikin lukasurupokon, aitodol nailemaria ibore yenitateleoritai kotomakon.”"
Joshua7:14 Kanuka ŋun kisukunyunio moi yes kwape ejaatar atekerinikus: kosodi do ateker naeseuni EJAKAIT ikunyuni kwape ejaatar ikekiake; ekek da loeseuni EJAKAIT ikunyuni kwape ejaatar ikaliake; ekal da loeseuni EJAKAIT ikunyuni idiopet idiopet.
Joshua7:15 Ejaun do ebe, ŋol loeseunio loejai ibore yenitateleoritai icweio kakim, ŋes ka luejaatar kere: naarai ebuca aitutuket naka EJAKAIT, naarai eswama nukabaŋaanut koIsirael.’ ”"
Joshua7:16 Kodilok Yosua anyoun tupuruc, kisukuny Isirael kwape ejaatar atekerinikec; koseunai ateker naka Yuda:"
Joshua7:17 Kisukuny ikekia luka Yuda; koseu ekek loka Iserakitin; kisukuny ekek loka Iserakitin idiopet idiopet; koseunai Sabidi:
Joshua7:18 Kisukuny ekaleke idiopet idiopet: koseunai Akan, okoku loka Karumi, okoku loka Sabidi, okoku loka Sera, loka ateker naka Yuda."
Joshua7:19 Kotema Yosua Akan atiar, “Okokuka, keŋaiŋait, kitopoloo EJAKAIT Edeke loka lsirael, kolimok ŋes aronisikon; kolimokinai eoŋ nuiswamat ijo; sirikiimunonik eoŋ”"
Joshua7:20 Koboŋok Akan Yosua atiar, “Abeit adiaka eoŋ kaneejai EJAKAIT Edeke loka Isirael, eswama nu ka nu:"
Joshua7:21 Naanyunia koŋatan elou loejok loka Babulon, ka isekelin akwat aarei luka epuesa, ka ibore yenika esabu yenika alaŋir naka isekelin akaisakany, abu keŋobel kes, kayaŋau kes; ido koany, ebwait kokwap kokidiŋ kewemaka, ka epuesa da ejai kwapuke.”"
Joshua7:22 Kijuka Yosua ikiyakia kokerata owema; ido koany, ebwaitai kowema, epuesa da ajai kwapuke."
Joshua7:23 Kolemut kes kokidiŋ kewema, koyaut kes neajai Yosua, neajaas idwe kere luka Isirael; kibwaikis kes kwap akonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Joshua7:24 Koyaŋa Yosua ka idwe kere luka Isirael, Akan okoku loka Sera, ka epuesa, ka elou, ka ibore yenika esabu, ka ikedwe lusap ka lupesur, ka imoŋinike ka asigirianake, ka amerekekinike, ka ewemake, ka luejaatar kere: koyaŋaasi kes aditot naka Akor."
Joshua7:25 Kotema Yosua atiar, “Kanukinyo kiticania sio? kiticani EJAKAIT jo da lolo.” Apotu luka Isirael kere kibiribiroto ŋes kamor; kicweata kes kakim kibiribiroto da kamor."
Joshua7:26 Kotukokisi kujuke atukit naepol naka amor, kiton lolo; kibelokin EJAKAIT ainyein adedeŋ naka anyunyurake. Ŋes amaikinere aibois ŋin ekiror, Aditot naka Akor, kiton lolo."
Joshua8:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Yosua atiar, “Sirikikurianar karaida aiyaloŋoŋ: koyana ituŋa kere lukajiok nepepe kajo, konyou, kolot Ai: koany, ainak ekabaka loka Ai ka ituŋake, ka ereke ka akwapuke akanikon:"
Joshua8:2 Iswamakini Ai ka ekabakake kwape iswamakinia Yeriko ka ekabakake: konye iyanaarete lunatanake, ka ibareneke kanukus: kibwaik icetuŋa agule naka ere aperun kes.”"
Joshua8:3 Konyou Yosua, ka ituŋa kere lukajiok alosit Ai: koseu Yosua ituŋa ilukumin akaisauni, ituŋa lukirigin luetitin, kijuka kes kuare."
Joshua8:4 Kicorak kes ebe, “Koany, ilosete yesi aperun ere, kagule naka ere: sirikilwakiata kore, konye kitemokino kere:"
Joshua8:5 Ekunyakini eoŋ ere ka iruna kere Iuejaas keoŋ: kosodi kanen, naelomuniata kesi asurokin, kwape koloje, kikeri isio kakonyenekec;"
Joshua8:6 Kitupete kesi sio, aitodol nekinalaaria isio kes kina naka ere; naarai etemarete ebe, ‘Ekerete kakonyenewok, kwape koloje’; kwaŋin kikeri kakonyenekec:"
Joshua8:7 Inyounete yesi kaneiperunioto irumete ere: naarai kiiaikini EJAKAIT Ekusideke ŋes akanikus,"
Joshua8:8 Kosodi do, kidaut airum ere, kicweikis ere kakim; kwape eiaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, iswamaete kwaŋin: koany, keeorak yes.”"
Joshua8:9 Kijuka Yosua kes: koloto aperun, kiboioto kokidin Bet-el ka Ai, ari nakoto naka Ai: konye kopero Yosua akuare ŋin kituna,"
Joshua8:10 Kodilok Yosua anyoun tupuruc, kotukok ituŋa, kolot Ai, ŋes ka imakio luka Isirael kakonyen nuka ituŋa."
Joshua8:11 Kolototo ituŋa kere, kes iruna lukajiok luajaas kaŋes, kikunyakis, kodoloto kinaren naka ere, kidukuroto ari naka agolitomei naka Ai: kojai da aditot kidinike ka Ai."
Joshua8:12 Koyana ituŋa kwape ilukumin ikany, kibwaik kes kidin Bet-el ka Ai aperun kari nakoto naka ere."
Joshua8:13 Kitemonokisi kwaŋin ituŋa, ajore kere naaiai ari naka agolitomei ka lueperunete luajaas ari nakoto naka ere: kolot Yosua akuare nin kidin aditot."
Joshua8:14 Kosodi kanen keanyu eka baka loka Ai, kisunyakis, konyout tupuruc, kolomasi ituŋa luka ere aitiji Isirael, ŋes ka ituŋake kere, kapak naaseunitai, koinaren naka Araba; konye mam ŋes ajeni ebe aperunitoi ŋes kagule naka ere."
Joshua8:15 Kijoseikis Yosua ka Isirael kere bala ipikoritai kes, kokerata orot loebei modin."
Joshua8:16 Konyaraunai ituŋa kere luajaas ore arukio kes: korukioto Yosua, kinalaarai do kes kore."
Joshua8:17 Komameun etuŋanan loasalit Ai arai Bet-el, lomam abu kotupak Isirael: kinyeis ere eŋaara, korukioto Isirael."
Joshua8:18 Kotema EJAKAIT Yosua atiar, “Kikeu akwarakon naejai akanikon kodod Ai; naarai ainakini ŋes akanikon.” Kikeu Yosua akwara naajai akanike adodia ere."
Joshua8:19 Konyout luaperunito atipet kaiboisikec, kokerata napikeuni ŋesi akekan, kolomasi ore, kirumata ŋes; kisunyakisi aicweikin ere."
Joshua8:20 Kenoliasi ituŋa luka Ai kaukec, apotu koanyut, ido koany, apurie apuru naka ere kiton akui, komam kes epedorete akerit lailo ka laije; kobonut ituŋa luakerete amodiŋ asurokin ikarukitok."
Joshua8:21 Keanyu Yosua ka Isirael kere ebe erumata luaperunito ere, ebe da epurie apuru naka ere kuju, kobonut bobo, koarata ituŋa luka Ai."
Joshua8:22 Kopotu luce kore asurokin kes; koluk do Isirael kes, ice owai lo ice da owai je: kodanyata kes, komam ideunete idio kakesi karaida aitukuu."
Joshua8:23 Kikamut ekabaka loka Ai ejari, koyanautŋes neaiai Yosua."
Joshua8:24 Kosodi kanen kedau Isirael aiar kere lueboienenete koAi koitela, kamodiŋ da naarukorito kes, abu akwanis naka ekileŋ koar kes kere, aitodol neamudiarere, kobono Isirael kere Ai, kodany kakwanis naka ekileŋ."
Joshua8:25 Kere luapotu kotwaka apaaran nin, ikiliok ka aŋor, emwaasi ilukumin itomon ka luarei, kes ituŋa kere luka Ai."
Joshua8:26 Naarai mam Yosua abu kinyakak akekan naekeunia akekwara, aitodol naamudiaria eut kere lueboienenete koAi."
Joshua8:27 Konye ibaren ka lunatuna kore kanol apotu luka Isirael koyanaasi araun inatanakec, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT naeeorakinit Yosua."
Joshua8:28 Kwaŋin kiewe Yosua Ai, kitaraun ŋes aapoŋor ikar kere, kosilior kiton lolo."
Joshua8:29 Ido kikajak ŋesi ekabaka loka Ai okitoi kiton eboŋ; keloma akoloŋ kicorak Yosua, kosodete kolemut akuanake kokitoi, kocakakis orute loka ere, kotukokis nen atukit naepol naka amor, kiton lolo."
Joshua8:30 Kosodi Yosua adukokin EJAKAIT Edeke loka Isirael etem, moru Ebal."
Joshua8:31 Kwape kieorakinitor Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT idwe luka Isirael, kwape iwadikatere oitabo loka Musa loka ikisila, etem loka amor numam ikee, numam ikeit etuŋanan kadiosuat: koinakis kanen ainakineta nuieweio mama ejai EJAKAIT, koinakis da asuban nuka ainapakin."
Joshua8:32 Kiwadikak amor aikopunet naka ikisila luka Musa, naabu kiwadik, kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael."
Joshua8:33 Kobwo Isirael kere, ka imakiokee, ka ijakakee, ka ikatubokokee, kowai lo loka asaduku, kowai ie da, kakonyen nuka isasedotin Ilebin, luadakito asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT, imoit ka iuriat da; atutubetekee kinaren kemoru Gerisim, atutubetekee da kinaren kemoru Ebal; kwape ecorakinitor Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT, ebe isiaunete ber ailipakin idwe luka Isirael arereŋ."
Joshua8:34 Akaulo kanun abu kosiom akiro kere nuka ikisila, arereŋ ka aiken, kwape ejaatar kere nuiwadikatai oitabo loka ikisila."
Joshua8:35 Amamei adiokirot kotoma akiro kere nueeorakinit Musa, namam Yosua abu kosiom kakonyen nuka ekodet kere loka Isirael, ka aŋor, ka ludidik, ka imo luajaas nepepe kakes."
Joshua9:1 Kosodi kanen kepuput ikabakan kere luajaas okekwa loka Yorodan, akwap naka iukon, akwap naka apuutona, ka ariri kere naka aŋolol nakapolon kinaren naka Lebanon, Ekitit, ka Emorait, ka Ekanaanit, ka Eperisit, ka Ekibit, ka Eyebusit;"
Joshua9:2 Kotukonokinos aitiii Yosua ka Isirael ketau ediopet.
Joshua9:3 Konye kepuputu lueboienenete koGibeon nuabu Yosua kiswamak Yeriko ka Ai,"
Joshua9:4 Kiswamata kesi da kapirianut, koloto kijoseikis bala araas ikiyakia, koyaŋaasi ipukoi lumoion kasigirianakee, ka imukulen luka ebino, lumoion ka lueeilieila luedonyodonyo;"
Joshua9:5 Ka amuk numoion nuepedepedo kakejekee, konapitos inapen lumojon; inyamat kere da luajaatar aokito kirourounito."
Joshua9:6 Koloto neajai Yosua Giligal oidukurun, kotemasi ŋes ka ituŋa luka Isirael atiar, “Kiponi isio kakwap naelwana: asa kitutukoto do yesi kasio.”"
Joshua9:7 Kotemasi ituŋa luka Isirael Ikibin atiar, “Musiki eapie bukus kasio; kikwaikini isio ai kitutuki kayes?”"
Joshua9:8 Kotemasi Yosua atiar, “Kirai isio ikonikejaanakinak.” Kotema Yosua kes atiar, “Lukanai yesi? Ido lali bo kiponiata?”"
Joshua9:9 Kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Apote ikonikejaanakinak kakwap naelwana noi kanuka ekiror loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke: naarai kipupu eemutuke, kanun kere nuabu ŋesi kiswama koMisiri,"
Joshua9:10 Kere da nuabu ŋesi kiswamak ikabakan iarei luka Imorain, luajaas okekwa loka Yorodan, Sikon ekabaka loka Kesibon, ka Og ekabaka loka Basan loajai Asitarot."
Joshua9:11 Apotu imakiokosi kere ka luibojete kere kakwapukosi kotemasi sio atiar,, Koyaŋaasi inyamat luka erot, koloto airiamun kakes, kolimokis kes ebe, “Kirai isio ikonikejaanakinak: asa kitutukoto kasio.’ ”"
Joshua9:12 Kiyanauni isio inyamatakosi lu komwaka kotogoikosi kapaaran nakilomunia aponare mamakus; konye kwana, koany, aokoto, erourooto da:"
Joshua9:13 Ka imukulen lu luka ebino luapotu kelelebata, etetiak; ido koany, eeilieila: amoionata ikosinapen lu ka akosimuk kanuka alosit naelwana noi.”"
Joshua9:14 Kijaut ituŋa inyamatakec, komam initunito akirot kama ejai EJAKAIT,"
Joshua9:15 Kisumun Yosua kes ainapakin, kitutuk kakes, aitaiar kes: kiyapoikis ikapolok luka ekodet kes."
Joshua9:16 Kosodi kanen ketuboros apaarasia auni kedaut kesi aitutuk kakes, apotu kesi kopuput ebe eraas nul iidunyetakee, ebe da eapie bukee kakes."
Joshua9:17 Kolototo idwe luka Isirael, kodoloto oreriakee apaaran nakiwuniet. Ireriakec kes lu, Gibeon, ka Cepira, ka Beerot, ka Kiriat-yearim,"
Joshua9:18 Mam apotu idwe luka Isirael kodanyata kes, naarai apotu ikapolok luka ekodet kiyapoikis kes kolimito EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael. Kirurumak ekodet kere ikapolok."
Joshua9:19 Konye kotemasi ikapolok kere ekodet kere ebe, “Kipou keyapoikis kes kalimito EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael: kanuka ŋun mam kipedori atiror kes."
Joshua9:20 Kiswamakini kes nu, ketajarata kes; kinyek anyunyura abunokin oni, kanuka aiyaposit nakipou keyapoikis kes.”"
Joshua9:21 Kotemasi ikapolok kes atiar, “Ketaiarata kes:” kwaŋin koraunos ikebetak akito ka ikeritok akipi nuka ekodet kere; kwape alimokinitotor ikapolok kes."
Joshua9:22 Konyarau Yosua kes kotema kes atiar, “Kanukinyo kimodiata sio ebe, ‘Kilwaka noi kamakus;’ kwabo kiapiete kasio?"
Joshua9:23 Aso kanuka nin kikeni yes, mam iswakete araun ibulesin, ikebetak akito ka ikeritok akipi nuka etogo loka Ekadeke.”"
Joshua9:24 Kobonokis Yosua ebe, “Naarai aponi kolimokinai eut ikonikejaanakinak kwape ecorakinitor EJAKAIT Ekonideke ekekejaanakinan Musa ainakin yes akwap kere, ka amudiar kere luibojete kakwap kakonyenekus; kanuka nun kipou kakuriakata noi kanuka aijarakosi kanukus, ŋes kiswamaa akirot nin."
Joshua9:25 Aso koany, kijaa akanikon: kiswamakinai sio nuitojokit ijo nuedolit jo aiswamakin sio.”"
Joshua9:26 Kiswamak ŋesi kes kwaŋin, kolaku kes kakan naka idwe luka Isirael, mam apotu koara kes."
Joshua9:27 Kitarau Yosua kes kapaaran kaŋin ikebetak akito ka ikeritok akipi nuka ekodet, ka nuka etem loka EJAKAIT, kiton lolo, kaibois naeseuni ŋesi."
Joshua10:1 Kosodi kanen kepupu Adoni-sedek ekabaka loka Yerusalem ebe erum Yosua Ai, ebe da amudia eut ŋes; kwape eswamakinitor Yeriko ka ekabakake, abu kiswamak kwaŋin Ai ka ekabakake; ebe da apotu lueboiete koGibeon kopueoto ka Isirael, ejaas da mamakee;"
Joshua10:2 Apotu kokuriakata noi, naarai kerai Gibeon ere loapol, kwape ediopet koreria luajaas ikabakan, ido naarai apol adepar Ai, ituŋake da kere araas lukirigin."
Joshua10:3 Kanuka nun kijuka Adoni-sedek ekabaka loka Yerusalem, mama ejai Kokam ekabaka loka Keburon, ka Piram ekabaka loka Yaramut, ka Yapia ekabaka loka Lakis, ka Debir ekabaka loka Egilon, kobala ebe,"
Joshua10:4 “Kopotu neaiai, kenarakis, kadanyata Gibeon: naarai apueoto ka Yosua ka idwe luka Isirael.”"
Joshua10:5 Kanuka nun kotukokinos ikabakan ikany luka Imorain, ekabaka loka Yerusalem, ka ekabaka loka Keburon, ka ekabaka loka Yaramut, ka ekabaka loka Lakis, ka eka baka loka Egilon, koloto kesi ka aioresiokec kere, kidukuroto asurokin Gibeon, kitijioto ŋes."
Joshua10:6 Kijukakis ituŋa luka Gibeon Yosua koidukurun Giligal, ebe, “Sirikijalakin akonikan ainyein ikonikejaanakinak; kiwonyuni mamakosi, kitajar sio, kinarak da; naarai atukonokinos ikabakan kere luka Imorain luibojete kakwap nakiukon aitiii sio.”"
Joshua10:7 Konyou Yosua koGiligal, ŋes ka iketuŋa lukaiiok, ka ituŋa kere lukirigin luetitin,"
Joshua10:8 Kotema EJAKAIT Yosua atiar, “Sirikikurianar kes: naarai ejaik kes akanikon; mam ediotuŋanan kakesi kibwoikini jo.”"
Joshua10:9 Kitiut kesi edolokini kes Yosua; naarai alosi anyoun koGiligal akuare kiya.
Joshua10:10 Kisiara EJAKAIT kes kakonyen nuka Isirael, kodany kes kaario naepol koGibeon, korukio kes korot loedokarere Betkoron, kodany kes kiton Aseka, kiton Makeda da."
Joshua10:11 Kosodi kanen ckerete kesi kakonyen nuka Isirael iiesaros kesi koBet-koron, kitetep EJAKAIT amor nuepolok nuapote kokuiu mamakee kiton Aseka, kotwakata; epu luaari akak adepar kwi luaarete idwe luka Isirael kekilen,"
Joshua10:12 Kosodi Yosua atemar EJAKAIT kapaaran naejaikinia EJAKAIT ŋes Imorain kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael; kotema kakonyen nuka Isirael atiar, “Akoloŋ, kobwou ijo koGibeon; Ijo da, Elap, kaditot naka Aiyalon.”"
Joshua10:13 Kobwou akoloŋ, kosalak elap, Aitodol naenyania ateker kama ejaas lukasurupokee. Mere iwadikatai nin oitabo loka Yasar? Kosalak akoloŋ kidin akuj, komam iwonyari alomar bala apaaran kere,"
Joshua10:14 Ido amamei apaaran naaputos kaŋin apeŋo karaida ameun kaŋin, naapupunio EJAKAIT eporoto loka etuŋanan: naarai EJAKAIT ajiikinit Isirael."
Joshua10:15 Kobono Yosua, ka Isirael kere kaŋes, Giligal oidukurun."
Joshua10:16 Kokerata ikabakan nul ikany, konopata kotoma abua koMakeda."
Joshua10:17 Kolimokinai Yosua ebe, “Adumun ikabakan lukany, enopito kabua koMakeda.”"
Joshua10:18 Kotema Yosua atiar, “Kikokorikisi amor nuepolok aituk naka abua, kibwaikis ituŋa aidar kes:"
Joshua10:19 Konye yes sirikipaikis; kodapata lukasurupokus, kodanyata lukee lukokau; sirikicamakis kes alomar oreriakee: naarai eiaiki EJAKAIT Ekusideke kes akanikus.”"
Joshua10:20 Kosodi kanen, kedau Yosua ka idwe luka Isirael aiar kes kaiar naepol, aitodol neamudiarere, nealomariata da luedeuna kakesi oreria luabwaitai,"
Joshua10:21 Kobonosi ituŋa kere Makeda oidukurun neajai Yosua kainapakina: mam idio yenabu kipen akenaiep amoromoroo idwe luka Isirael.
Joshua10:22 Kosodi Yosua atemar ebe, “Kopukosi aituk naka abua, kitolomut ikabakan nul ikany koyaut mama ajai.”"
Joshua10:23 Kiswamata kesi kwaŋin, kitolomut ikabakan nul ikany kabua mama ejai ŋesi, ekabaka loka Yerusalem, ka ekabaka loka Keburon, ka ekabaka loka Yaramut, ka ekabaka loka Lakis, ka ekabaka loka Egilon."
Joshua10:24 Kosodi kanen, kitolomut kesi ikabakan nul neajai Yosua, konyarau Yosua ituŋa kere luka Isirael, kotema ijaka luka ituŋa lukajiok lualosito kaŋes atiar, “Kikunyutu, kidokokis akusikeje omurisina luka ikabakan kalu.” Kikunyut, kidokokis akeeekeje omurisinakec."
Joshua10:25 Kotema Yosua kes atiar, “Sirikikuriakata, karaida aiyaloŋoŋ; kicata, kotitinioros: naarai iswamakini EJAKAIT kwaŋin lukasurupokus kere Iuitijiete yesi,”"
Joshua10:26 Akaulo kanun kodany Yosua kes, koara kes, komiedanak kes okito ikany: kiiekos kokito kiton eboŋ."
Joshua10:27 Kosodi kanen, kapak naalomaria akoloŋ kicorak Yosua, konedununai kes kokito, kocakanakinai abua naanopitotor, kibwaikinai amor nuepolok aituk naka abua, kiton lolo."
Joshua10:28 Kirum Yosua Makeda kapaaran kaŋin, kodany lukore kanol ka ekabakakec kakwanis naka ekileŋ; komudia kes eut ka ituŋa kere luajaas toma, komam ideuni idio da: kiswamak ekabaka loka Makeda kwape eswamakinia ekabaka loka Yeriko,"
Joshua10:29 Konyou Yosua koMakeda, ka Isirael kere nepepe kaŋes, kitor Libuna, kitiji lukoLibuna:"
Joshua10:30 Kiiaik EJAKAIT kes da, ka ekabakakee akan naka Isirael; kodany kes kakwanis naka ekileŋ, ka ituŋa kere Iuajaas toma; komam ideuni idio da kotomaken, kiswamak ekabakake kwape eswamakinia ekabaka loka Yeriko,"
Joshua10:31 Konyou Yosua koLibuna, ka Isirael kere nepepe kaŋes, kitor Lakis, kidukur asurokin kes, kitiji:"
Joshua10:32 Kijaik EJAKAIT Lakis akan naka Isirael, kirum ŋes apaaran nakiareit, kodany kes kakwanis naka ekileŋ, ka ituŋa kere luajaas tomake, kwape ajaatar kere nueswamakinit Libuna."
Joshua10:33 Kobu Koram ekabaka loka Geser aiŋarakin Lakis; kodany Yosua ŋes ka iketuŋa, aitodol neamamuunor yenedeikina ŋes."
Joshua10:34 Konyou Yosua koLakis, ka Isirael kere nepepe kaŋes, kitor Egilon; kidukuroto asurokin kes, kitijioto kes;"
Joshua10:35 Kirumata ere kapaaran kaŋin, kodanyata kes kakwanis naka ekileŋ, komudia cut kapaaran kaŋin ituŋa kere luajaas toma, kwape ajaatar kere nueswamakinit Lakis."
Joshua10:36 Konyou Yosua koEgilon, ka Isirael kere nepepe kaŋes, kitor Keburon, kitijioto kes:"
Joshua10:37 Kirumata ere, kodanyata kes kakwanis naka ekileŋ, ka: ekabakakee, ka ireriakee kere, ka ituŋa kere luajaas toma; komam ideuni idio, kwape ajaatar kere nueswamakinit Egilon; konye abu komudia eut ere, ka ituŋa kere luajaas toma."
Joshua10:38 Koboŋo Yosua, ka Isirael kere nepepe kaŋes Debir; kitiji kes:"
Joshua10:39 Kirum ere ka ekabakake, ka ireriake kere; kodanyata kes kakwanis naka ekileŋ, komudiasi eut ituŋa kere luajaas toma; komam ideuni idio da: kwape eswamakinia Keburon, abu kiswamak kwaŋin Debir, ka ekabakake; kwape eswamakinia Libuna ka ekabakake."
Joshua10:40 Kwaŋin kodany Yosua luka akwap kere, luka akwap nakiukon, ka Eŋalakimak, ka apuutona, ka neijululue, ka ikabakanakec kere; komam ideuni idio da: konye komudia cut kere lueyenas, kwape ecorakinitor EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael."
Joshua10:41 Kodany Yosua kes anyoun koKades-barunea kiton Gasa, ka akwap kere naka Gosen, kiton Gibeon."
Joshua10:42 Kimoria Yosua airum ikabakan nul kere ka akeeekwap, naarai ajiikinit EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, Isirael."
Joshua10:43 Koboŋ Yosua, ka Isirael kere nepepe kaŋes, oidukurun Giligal."
Joshua11:1 Kosodi kanen, kepupu Yabin ekabaka loka Kasor nun, kijukak Yobab ekabaka loka Madon, ka ekabaka loka Simuron, ka ekabaka loka Akisap,"
Joshua11:2 Ka ikabakan luajaas ari naka agolitomei, akwap nakiukon, ka Araba ari naka eŋalakimak naka Kinerot, ka apuutona, ka amukuran nuka Dor kari nakoto,"
Joshua11:3 Mama ejai Ekanaanit loejai ari nakokide ka nakoto, ka Emorait, ka Ekitit, ka Eperisit, ka Eyebusit kakwap nakiukon, ka Ekibit kwap ka Kerumon kakwap naka Misipa."
Joshua11:4 Kolomasi kesi ka ajoresiokee kere nepepe kakes, ituŋa luipu, aipuesukee kwape kasine naejai ariri naka aŋolol, koiaas kibalasin ka agalin nuipu noi."
Joshua11:5 Kiriamunos ikabakan nul kere; kopotu kidukuroto nepepe ariri naka akipi nuka Merom, aitiji Isirael."
Joshua11:6 Kotema EJAKAIT Yosua atiar, “Sirikikurianar kes: naarai moi kosawa kala eiaikini kes aario kakonyen nuka Isirael: itanwali ibalasinikee, iewei agalinikec.”"
Joshua11:7 Kitiut kesi ebuni Yosua ka ituŋa kere lukaiiok nepepe kaŋes, asurokin kes kariri naka akipi nuka Merom, kitiji Isirael kes."
Joshua11:8 Kijaik EJAKAIT kes akan naka Isirael, kodanyata kes, kodapata kes kiton Sidon lokapolon, kiton Miserepot-maim, kiton aditot naka Misipe kari nakokide; kodanyata kes, aitodol neamamuunor idio da yenedeikinitai kes."
Joshua11:9 Kiswamak Yosua kes kwape kieorakinia EJAKAIT ŋes: abu kitanwal ibalasinikec, kiewe da agalinikec,"
Joshua11:10 Kobono Yosua kapak kaŋin, kirum Kasor, koar ekabakake kekileŋ: naarai Kasor lem apolokinit ajakanuto nun kere."
Joshua11:11 Kodanyata ituŋa kere luajaas toma kakwanis naka ekileŋ, komudiasi kes cut: amamei yeneyena yenedeunitai: kiewe Kasor kakim."
Joshua11:12 Abu Yosua kirum ireria kere luka ikabakan kanul, ka ikabakanakec kere, kodany kes kakwanis naka ekileŋ, komudia kes cut; kwape ecorakinitor Musa ekeiaanakinan loka EJAKAIT."
Joshua11:13 Konye ireria luadukokinitai otutiokec, mam Isirael abu kicwe edio kakesi, dimarai Kasor bon; ŋes abu Yosua kicwe."
Joshua11:14 Apotu idwe luka lsirael koyanaasi lunatuna koreria kanul, ka ibaren; konye apotu kesi koarata ninituŋanan kakwanis naka ekileŋ, aitodol neamudiariata kes, komam ideunete yeneyena kere."
Joshua11:15 Kwape ecorakinitor EJAKAIT Musa ekeiaanakinanike, abu Musa da kicorak Yosua kwaŋin: kiswama Yosua kwaŋin; mam abu kinyek adiokirot kakiro kere nueeorakinit EJAKAIT Musa."
Joshua11:16 Kirum do Yosua akwap nin kere, akwap nakiukon, ka Eŋalakimak kere, ka akwap kere naka Gosen, ka apuutona, ka Araba, ka akwap nakiukon naka Isirael, ka apuutona nuka akwap kaŋin;"
Joshua11:17 Ageun komoru Kalak, loedolit Seir, kiton Baal-gad kaditot naka Lebanon kwap kemoru Kerumon: koyana ikabakanakec kere, kodany kes eut."
Joshua11:18 Kodau Yosua apak naepol itijiei ikabakan nul kere.
Joshua11:19 Amamei ere loabu kitutuk nukainapakin kidwe luka Isirael, dimarai Ikibin luibojete koGibeon: koyanaasi kere kojie."
Joshua11:20 Naarai etogogoŋit EJAKAIT ikecetauon, aitiii Isirael, tetere emudiari kes cut, kinyeis adumun asianut, konye tetere emudiari kes, kwape ecorakinitor EJAKAIT Musa."
Joshua11:21 Kobu Yosua kapak kaŋin, komudia Anakim kakwap nakiukon, koKeburon, koDebir, koAnab, kakwap kere nakiukon naka Yuda, kakwap kere da nakiukon naka Isirael; abu Yosua komudia kes eut ka ireriakec,"
Joshua11:22 Amamei edio luka Anakim loedeunitai kakwap naka idwe luka Isirael; konye edeuna ice koGasa, koGat da ka Asudod."
Joshua11:23 Kwaŋin kirum Yosua akwap kere, kwape ajaatar kere nuabu EJAKAIT kolimok Musa; abu Yosua koinak Isirael akwap araun airumet kwape atiakanakinitere kes katekerinikec, Kiyenu akwap ejie."
Joshua12:1 Lu kes ikabakan luka akwap, luapotu idwe luka lsirael kodanyata, kirumata akeeekwap kokekwa loka Yorodan kama eniunia akoloŋ, ageun kaditot naka Arunon kiton moru Kerumon, ka Araba kere kari nakokidc:"
Joshua12:2 Sikon ekabaka loka lmorain, loeboie koKesibon, koyaite ageun koAroer, loejai osiep loka aditot naka Arunon, ka ere loejai kidiŋ aditot, ka atutubet naka Gilead, kiton ocor Yabok, eikor loka idwe luka Amon;"
Joshua12:3 Ka Araba kiton aŋolol naka Kinerot, kari nakokide, ido kiton aŋolol naka Araba, ŋes aŋolol naka Abalaŋ, kari nakokide, orot loebei Bet-yesimot; ari da naka eŋalakimak, kwap neiiululuoro Pisiga:"
Joshua12:4 Eikor da loka Og ekabaka loka Basan, loka luedeuna luka Irepaim, loeboie koAsitarot ka Ederei,"
Joshua12:5 Loayait moru Kerumon, ka Saleea, ka Basan kere, kiton oikor loka Igesurin ka Imaakatin, ka atutubet naka Gilead, eikor loka Sikon ekabaka loka Kesibon,"
Joshua12:6 Apotu Musa ekejaanakinan Ioka EJAKAIT ka idwe luka Isirael kodanyata kes: koinak da Musa ekeiaanakinan loka EJAKAIT akwap nin araun airumet naka Ireubcnin, ka Igadin, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase."
Joshua12:7 Lu kes ikabakan luka akwap luapotu Yosua ka idwe luka Isirael kodanyata kokekwa loka Yorodan kari nakoto, ageun koBaal-gad kaditot naka Lebanon kiton moru Kalak, loedolit Seir; koinak Yosua akwap ŋin araun airumet naka atekerin nuka Isirael kwape atiakanakinitere kes;"
Joshua12:8 Akwap nakiukon, ka apuutona, ka Araba, ka neijululuoro, kamodiŋ, kari naka Eŋalakimak; Ekitit, ka Emorait, ka Ekanaanit, ka Eperisit, ka Ekibit, ka Eyebusit:"
Joshua12:9 Ekabaka loka Yeriko, ediopet; ekabaka loka Ai, loidunyas ka Bet-el, ediopet;"
Joshua12:10 Ekabaka loka Yerusalem, ediopet; ekabaka loka Keburon, ediopet;"
Joshua12:11 Ekabaka loka Yaramut, ediopet; ekabaka loka Lakis, ediopet;"
Joshua12:12 Ekabaka loka Egilon, ediopet; ekabaka loka Geser, ediopet;"
Joshua12:13 Ekabaka loka Debir, ediopet; ekabaka loka Geder, ediopet;"
Joshua12:14 Ekabaka loka Koruma, ediopet; ekabaka loka Arad, ediopet;"
Joshua12:15 Ekabaka loka Libuna, ediopet; ekabaka loka Adulem, ediopet;"
Joshua12:16 Ekabaka loka Makeda, ediopet; ekabaka loka Bet-el, ediopet;"
Joshua12:17 Ekabaka loka Tapua, ediopct; ekabaka loka Keper, ediopet;"
Joshua12:18 Ekabaka loka Apek, ediopet; ekabaka loka Lasaron, ediopet;"
Joshua12:19 Ekabaka loka Madon, ediopet; ekabaka loka Kasor, ediopet;"
Joshua12:20 Ekabaka loka Simuron-meron, ediopet; ekabaka loka Akisap, ediopet;"
Joshua12:21 Ekabaka loka Taanak, ediopet; ekabaka loka Megido, ediopet;"
Joshua12:22 Ekabaka loka Kedes, ediopet; ekabaka loka Yokuneam koKaramel, ediopet;"
Joshua12:23 Ekabaka loka Dor kamukurat naka Dor, ediopet; ekabaka loka Goiim koGiligal, cdiopet;"
Joshua12:24 ekabaka loka Tirusa, ediopet; ikabakan kere akaisauni ka lediopet."
Joshua13:1 Amoionit Yosua kokokosanite noi; kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Imojoŋit ijo ikokosanit da noi, konye ideuna akwap naepol nakiruma."
Joshua13:2 Na ŋes akwap naeroko ideuna: akwap kere naka Ipilisitian ka Igesurin kere;
Joshua13:3 Ageun koSikor, loejai kinaren naka Misiri, kiton oikor loka Ekuron kari naka agolitomei, loemarakinitai oKanaanin: ijaka ikany luka Ipilisitian; Igasin, ka Isudodain, ka Isikelonain, ka Igitin, ka Iyekuronin; luka Abim da,"
Joshua13:4 Kari naka eŋalakimak: akwap kere naka Ikanaanin, ka Meara loerai loka Isidonin, kiton Apek, kiton oikor loka Imorain:"
Joshua13:5 Akwap da naka Igebalin, ka Lebanon kere, kama eniunia akoloŋ, ageun koBaal-gad kwap kemoru Kerumon kiton neelomarere Kamat:"
Joshua13:6 Luibojete kere kakwap nakiukon ageun koLebanon kiton Misirepot-maim, kes Isidonin kere; ereŋeari eoŋ ŋul kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael: konye kokorak ijo idwe luka Isirael akwap nin araun airumet, kwape keeorakinia joo"
Joshua13:7 Aso kokorak akwap na araun airumet naka atekerin akanykaoŋon, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase.”"
Joshua13:8 Apotu Ireubenin ka Igadin kodumut airumetekee nepepe kaŋes, naabu Musa koinak kes kokekwa loka Yorodan kari nakokide, kwape ainakinia Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT kes;"
Joshua13:9 Ageun koAroer, loejai osiep loka aditot naka Arunon, ka ere loejai kidin aditot, ka apuuton kere naka Medeba kiton Dibon;"
Joshua13:10 ka ireria kere luka Sikon ekabaka loka Imorain, loayait Kesibon, kiton oikor loka idwe luka Amon;"
Joshua13:11 ka Gilead, ka eikor loka Igesurin ka Imaakatin, ka moru Kerumon kere, ka Basan kere kiton Saleea;"
Joshua13:12 Ajakanut kere naka Og koBasan, loayait Asitarot ka Ederei (nopenol Ioedeuna loka luedeuna luka Irepaim); naarai abu Musa kodany ŋul, kireŋea da,"
Joshua13:13 Konye mam idwe luka Isirael apotu kireneasi Igesurin, karaida Imaakatin: konye apotu Gesur ka Maakat kiboikinos kidin kIsirael, kiton lolo,"
Joshua13:14 Ateker naka Lebi bon ŋes mam ŋes abu koinak airumet; ainakineta nueinakinere kakim nuka EJAKAIT Edeke loka Isirael, kes airumeteke, kwape abu kolimokinia Ŋes."
Joshua13:15 Koinak Musa ateker naka idwe luka Reuben kwape ejaatar ikekiakec,"
Joshua13:16 Ageunit eikorukec koAroer, loejai osiep loka aditot naka Arunon, ka ere loejai kidin aditot, ka apuuton kere naka Medeba;"
Joshua13:17 Kesibon, ka ireriake kere lueiaas apuuton; Dibon, ka Bamot-baal, ka Bet-baal-meon;"
Joshua13:18 Ka Yakas, ka Kedemot, ka Mepaat;"
Joshua13:19 ka Kiriataim ka Sibima, ka Seret-sakar komoru loka aditot;"
Joshua13:20 ka Bet-peor, ka neijululuoro Pisiga, ka Bet-yesimot;"
Joshua13:21 ka ireria kere luka apuuton, ka ajakanut kere naka Sikon, ekabaka loka Imorain, loayait Kesibon, loabu Musa kodany nepepe kiiaka luka Midian, Ebi, ka Rekem, ka Sur, ka Kur, ka Reba, ikapolok luka Sikon, lueboiete kakwap."
Joshua13:22 Apotu idwe luka Isirael koarata Balaam da okoku loka Beor, ekadwaran, kotoma kanul luaponi koarai."
Joshua13:23 Arai Yorodan eikor loka idwe luka Reuben, ka eikoruke. Ŋin ŋes airumet naka idwe luka Reuben kwape ejaatar ikekiakee, ireriakec lukapolok ka ludidik da."
Joshua13:24 Koinak Musa ateker naka Gad, kes idwe lukaGad, kwape ejaatar ikekiakee."
Joshua13:25 Arai Yaser eikorukee, ka ireria kere luka Gilead, ka atutubet naka akwap naka idwe luka Amon, kiton Aroerloitei Raba;"
Joshua13:26 Ageun koKesibon kiton Ramat-misipe, ka Betonim; ageun da koMakanaim kiton oikor loka Debir;"
Joshua13:27 Kaditot da, Bet-karam, ka Bet-nimura, ka Sukot, ka Sapon, ka ajakanut kere naedeuna naka Sikon ekabaka loka Kesibon, Yorodan ka eikoruke, kiton osaŋe loka aŋolol naka Kinerot, okekwa loka Yorodan kokide."
Joshua13:28 Ŋin ŋes airumet naka idwe luka Gad kwape ejaatar ikekiakec, ireriakec lukapolok ka ludidik."
Joshua13:29 Koinak Musa atutubet naka ateker naka Manase airumet: arai naka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase kwape ejaatar ikekiakec.
Joshua13:30 Ageunit eikorukee koMakanaim, Basan kere, ajakanut kere naka Og ekabaka loka Basan, ka ireria kere luka Yair, luejaas Basan, ireria akaisakanykape:"
Joshua13:31 ka atutubet naka Gilead, ka Asitarot, ka Edcrei, ireria luka ajakanut naka Og koBasan, araas luka idwe luka Makir okoku loka Manese, kes atutubet naka idwe luka Makir kwape ejaatar ikekiakec,"
Joshua13:32 Ŋun kes airumeta nuakorokoroi Musa kapuutona nuka Moab kokekwa loka Yorodan koYeriko, kokide."
Joshua13:33 Konye mam Musa abu koinak ateker naka Lebi airumet: EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, ŋes airumetekec, kwape abu kolimokinia kes."
Joshua14:1 Nu kes airumeta nuerumete idwe luka Isirael kakwap naka Kanaan, nuakorokoroete Eleasar esasedoti, ka Yosua okoku loka Nun, ka ikapolok luka ikalia luka lukapapaakee luka atekerin nuka idwe luka Isirael,"
Joshua14:2 Kwape ajaar ailamilam eroet kanuka airumetakee, kwape ecorakinitor EJAKAIT kama ka Musa, kanuka atekerin akanykaouon, ka atutubet naka ateker."
Joshua14:3 Naarai abu Musa koinak atekerin aarei ka atutubet naka ateker airumet kokekwa loka Yorodan: konye mam abu koinak Ilebin airumet kotomakec.
Joshua14:4 Naarai araas idwe luka Yosep atekerin aarei, Manase ka Epuraim: mam apotu koinakis Ilebin akorakinet kakwap dimarai ireria luiboioto, ka ironyiakec kanuka ibarenekec ka iborokec."
Joshua14:5 Kwape ecorakinitor EJAKAIT Musa, kiswamata idwe luka Isirael kwaŋin, kokorokorata akwap,"
Joshua14:6 Kosodete idwe luka Yuda aikunyakin mama ajai Yosua Giligal: kotema Kaleb okoku loka Yepune Ekenisit ŋes atiar, “Ŋeni ijo akirot naabu EJAKAIT kolimok Musa etuŋanan loka Edeke nakalimitor eoŋ ka jo koKades-barunea."
Joshua14:7 Kolo arai eoŋ loka ikar akaisaoŋon nakejukaria Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT eoŋ anyoun koKades-barunea airot akwap; kasodi ainun ŋes akirot kwape ajaar otauka.
Joshua14:8 Konye apotu ikainaean lukiupara keoŋ kipirisiasi itauon luka ituŋa; kouye abu eoŋ katup eut EJAKAIT Ekadeke.
Joshua14:9 Kiyapoik Musa kapaaran kaŋin ebe, ‘Abeit akwap naecak akonikeju eraun airumetekon ka naka idwekon ikar kere, naarai itup eut EJAKAIT Ekadeke.’"
Joshua14:10 Ido koany, ketubut EJAKAIT eoŋ, kwape abu kolimunio, ikar lu akaisaoŋon ka lukany, ameun kapak naalimokinia EJAKAIT Musa akirot nin, kirim Isirael kamodiŋ: aso koany, arai lolo eoŋ loka ikar akaisakanykauni ka lukany."
Joshua14:11 Konye aroko lolo agogoŋ kwape ajaar akagogoŋ kapak kaya, ejai akagogoŋ kwape kwaŋin kwana, kanuka ejie, alomar ka alomun da."
Joshua14:12 Aso do koinakinai eoŋ eronat lo, loenerar EJAKAIT kapaaran kaya; naarai ibu kopup kapaaran kaya ebe ajaas luka Anakim nina, ka ireria lukapolok luabwaitai; arai ejaun EJAKAIT keoŋ, ereŋeari kes, kwape abu EJAKAIT kolimunio.”"
Joshua14:13 Kilipak Yosua ŋes arereŋ; koinak Kaleb okoku loka Yepune Keburon araun airumet.
Joshua14:14 Koraun do Keburon airumet naka Kaleb okoku loka Yepune Ekenisit, kiton lolo; naarai abu kotup eut EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael,"
Joshua14:15 Arai sek ekiror loka Keburon Kiriat-araba; Araba ŋol arai lokapolon kama ejaas luka Anakim. Kiyenu akwap ejie.
Joshua15:1 Kobe eroet loka ateker naka idwe luka Yuda kwape ejaatar ikekiakee ageun koikor loka Edom, kiton amodiŋ naka Sin, kari naka eŋalakimak, atutubet nakosane naka eŋalakimak."
Joshua15:2 Ageunit eikorukee loka ari naka eŋalakimak katutubet nakosane loka Aŋolol naka Abalaŋ, ageun kagor naitei eŋalakimak:"
Joshua15:3 Kitor ari naka eŋalakimak naedokarere Akurabim, kobei Sin, kitor ari naka eŋalakimak naka Kades-barunea, kiriria Kesiron, kitor Adar, kokudo koKaraka:"
Joshua15:4 Kobe Asimon, kitor aguurut nako Misiri; kosan eikor aŋolol: eraun ŋol eikorukus loka ari naka eŋalakimak."
Joshua15:5 Aŋolol naka Abalaŋ ŋes arai eikor lokokide, kiton osaŋe loka Yorodan, Ageunit eikor loka ari naka agolitomei kariri naka aŋolol kosane loka Yorodan;"
Joshua15:6 Kitor eikor Bet-kogila, kiriria agolitomei naka Bet-araba; kitor eikor amoru naka Bokan okoku loka Reuben:"
Joshua15:7 Kitor eikor Debir ageun kaditot naka Akor, ape agolitomei, kitei Giligal, loitei needokarere Adumim, loejai ari naka eŋalakimak naka ecor: kobe eikor akipi nuka En-semes, kosaŋak En-rogel;"
Joshua15:8 Kitor eikor aditot naka okoku loka Kinom kiton ari naka eŋalakimak naka Eyebusit (nopenol ŋes Yerusalem): kitor eikor kuju keronat loejai kinaren kaditot naka Kinom kari nakoto, loejai atutubet nakosane naka aditot naka Repaim kari naka agolitomei:"
Joshua15:9 Kigirunai eikor ageun kokuju keronat kiton atan naka akipi nuka Neputoa, kobe oreria luka emoru Epuron; kigirunai eikor kiton Baala (ŋopeŋol ŋes Kiriat-yearim):"
Joshua15:10 Kokudo eikor koBaala ari nakoto kiton emoru Seir, kobe ari naka agolitomei naka emoru Yearim (nopenol ŋes Kesalon), kitor Bet-semes, kiriria Timuna:"
Joshua15:11 Kobe eikorari naka agolitomei kowai loka Ekuron: kigirunai eikor kiton Sikeron, kobe emoru Baala, kosan Yabuneel; kosan eikor aŋolol."
Joshua15:12 Aŋolol nakapolon ŋes arai eikor loka ari nakoto, ka eikoruke. Ŋol ŋes eikor loalukunit idwe luka Yuda kwape ajaatar ikekiakee."
Joshua15:13 Abu koinak Kaleb okoku loka Yepune akorakinet kodwe luka Yuda, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT naeeorakinit ŋesi Yosua; akorakineteke ŋes Kiriat-araba, arai Araba ŋol papa loka Anak (nopenol ŋes Keburon)."
Joshua15:14 Kirenea Kaleb odwe iuni luka Anak, Sesai, ka Akiman, ka Talimai, idwe luka Anak."
Joshua15:15 Koloma asurokin lueboiete koDebir: arai sek ekiror loka Debir Kiriat-seper.
Joshua15:16 Kotema Kaleb atiar, “Ŋol loedanyi luka Kiriat-seper, kosodi airum ere, akorakini eoŋ ŋol akokuka Akisa aimany.”"
Joshua15:17 Kosodi Otiniel, okoku loka Kenas onace loka Kaleb, kirum ŋes; abu kokorak ŋes akokuke Akisa aimany."
Joshua15:18 Kosodi kanen, kebu mamake abu ŋin kokoto nol ailipun papake emanikor: kodok kasigiriake; kotema Kaleb ŋes atiar, “Inyo bo ikoto ijo?”"
Joshua15:19 Kotema atiar, “Koinakinai eoŋ arereŋ; naarai kiinakinit eoŋ akwap naka ari naka Eijalakimak, koinakinai eoŋ da atanin nuka akipi.” Abu koinak ŋes atanin nukokuju ka nukajesa da."
Joshua15:20 Ŋin ŋes airumet naka ateker naka idwe luka Yuda kwape ejaatar ikekiakee.
Joshua15:21 Ireria lukosane luka ateker naka idwe luka Yuda kariri naka eikor loka Edom kari naka Eŋalakimak kes lu: Kabuseel, ka Eder ka Yagur;"
Joshua15:22 ka Kina, ka Dimona, ka Adada;"
Joshua15:23 ka Kedes, ka Kasor, ka Itinan;"
Joshua15:24 Sip, ka Telem, ka Bealot;"
Joshua15:25 ka Kasor-kadata, ka Keriot-kesiron (nopenol ŋes Kasor);"
Joshua15:26 Amam, ka Sema, ka Molada;"
Joshua15:27 ka Kasar-gada, ka Kesimon, ka Bet-pelet;"
Joshua15:28 ka Kasar-sual, ka Beer-seba, ka Bisiotia;"
Joshua15:29 ka Baala, ka Iim, ka Esem;"
Joshua15:30 ka Elitolad, ka Kesil, ka Korima;"
Joshua15:31 ka Sikilag, ka Madumena, ka Sanisana;"
Joshua15:32 ka Lebaot, ka Silikim, ka Ain, ka Rimon: ireria kere imwaasi akaisaarei ka lukanykaonon ka ireriakec ludidik."
Joshua15:33 Kapuuton, Esitaol, ka Sora, ka Asina;"
Joshua15:34 ka Sanoa, ka En-ganim, ka Tapua, ka Enam;"
Joshua15:35 ka Yaramut, ka Adulam, ka Soko, ka Aseka;"
Joshua15:36 ka Saaraim, ka Aditaim, ka Gedera, ka Gederotaim; ireria itomon ka luoŋon ka ireriakee ludidik."
Joshua15:37 Senan, ka Kadasa, ka Migidal-gad;"
Joshua15:38 ka Dilan, ka Misipe, ka Yokiteel;"
Joshua15:39 Lakis, ka Bosikat, ka Egilon;"
Joshua15:40 ka Kabon, ka Lakimam, ka Kitilis;"
Joshua15:41 ka Gederot, ka Bet-dagon, ka Naama, ka Makeda; ireria itomon ka lukanykape ka ireriakee ludidik."
Joshua15:42 Libuna, ka Eter, ka Asan;"
Joshua15:43 ka Iputa, ka Asina, ka Nesib;"
Joshua15:44 ka Keila, ka Akisib, ka Maresa; ireria ikanykaoŋon ka ireriakee ludidik."
Joshua15:45 Ekuron, ka ireriake ka ireriake ludidik."
Joshua15:46 Ageun ka Ekuron kiton aŋolol, kere luedunyas ka Asudod, ka ireriakee ludidik."
Joshua15:47 Asudod, ireriake ka ireriake ludidik; Gasa, ireriake ka ireriake ludidik; kiton aguurut nako Misiri, ka aŋolol nakapolon, ka eikoruke."
Joshua15:48 Kakwap nakiukon, Samir, ka Yatir, ka Soko;"
Joshua15:49 ka Dana, ka Kiriat-sana (nopenol ŋes Dabir);"
Joshua15:50 ka Anab, ka Esitemo, ka Anim;"
Joshua15:51 ka Gosen, ka Kolon, ka Gilo, ireria itomon ka lodiopet ka ireriakee ludidik."
Joshua15:52 Arab ka Duma, ka Esan;"
Joshua15:53 ka Yanim ka Bet-tapua ka Apcka;
Joshua15:54 ka Kumita, ka Kiriat-araba, (nopenol ŋes Keburon), ka Sior; ireria ikanykaoŋon ka ireriakee ludidik."
Joshua15:55 Maon, ka Karamel, ka Sip, ka Yuta;"
Joshua15:56 ka Yesereel, ka Yokodeam, ka Sanoa;"
Joshua15:57 Kain, ka Gibea, ka Timuna; ireria itomon ka ireriakec ludidik."
Joshua15:58 Kalukul, ka Bet-sur, ka Gedor;"
Joshua15:59 ka Maarat, ka Bet-anot, ka Elitekon; ireria ikanykape ka ireriakec ludidik."
Joshua15:60 Kiriat-baal (nopenol ŋes Kiriat-yearim), ka Raba; ireria iarei ka ireriakec ludidik."
Joshua15:61 Kotoma amodiŋ, Bet-araba, Midin, ka Sekaka;"
Joshua15:62 ka Nibisan, ka Ere loka Abalaŋ, ka En-gedi; ireria ikanykape ka ireriakee ludidik."
Joshua15:63 Konye Iyebusin, lueboienenete koYerusalem, mam idwe luka Yuda apotu kopedosi aireŋear kes: konye apotu Iyebusin kiboioto kidwe luka Yuda koYerusalem, kiton lolo."
Joshua16:1 Kobe eroet loka idwe luka Yosep ageun koYorodan koYeriko, kakipi nuka Yeriko kari nakokide, ŋes amodiŋ, anyoun koYeriko kitor akwap nakiukon kiton Bet-el:"
Joshua16:2 Kitor Bet-el kiton Lus, kobe oikor loka Irikain kiton Atarot;"
Joshua16:3 Kijesar ari nakoto oikor loka Iyapeletin, kiton oikor loka Bet-koron loiiesara, kiton Geser; kosan aŋolol,"
Joshua16:4 Kirumata idwe luka Yosep, Manase ka Epuraim, airumetekec."
Joshua16:5 Eikor loka idwe luka Epuraim kwape ejaatar ikekiakee ŋes lo: eikor loka airumetekee kari nakokide korai Atarot-adar, kiton Bet-koron luimukurur;"
Joshua16:6 Kobe eikor ari nakoto koMikimetat kari naka agolitomei; kokudo eikor ari nakokide kiton Taanat-silo, kiriria ŋes kari nakokide naka Yanoa;"
Joshua16:7 Kijesar anyoun koYanoa kiton Atarot, kiton Naara da, kodol Yeriko, kosan Yorodan,"
Joshua16:8 Ageun koTapua kitor eikor ari nakoto kiton oeilet loka Kana; kosan aŋolol. Ŋin ŋes airumet naka ateker naka idwe luka Epuraim, kwape ejaatar ikekiakee."
Joshua16:9 Nepepe kireria luatiakunitai kanuka idwe luka Epuraim kokidin kairumet naka idwe luka Manase, ireria lukapolok kere ka ireriakee ludidik."
Joshua16:10 Mam kes apotu kireneasi Ikanaanin lueboiete koGeser; konye kiboienenete Ikanaanin kama ejai Epuraim kiton lolo, koraut ibulesin lukeswamak nukailolitoi."
Joshua17:1 Lo ŋes eroet loabeit ateker naka Manase; naarai ŋes arai ekiyai loka Yosep. Naarai arai Makir ekiyai loka Manase, papa loka Gilead, etuŋanan lokajiot, ŋes akorakinere Gilead ka Basan,"
Joshua17:2 Abeit eroet idwe kere luka Manase luedeuna kwape ajaatar ikekiakec; idwe luka Abieser, ka idwe luka Kelek, ka idwe luka Asuriel, ka idwe luka Sekem, ka idwc luka Keper, ka idwe luka Semida: nul kes idwe lukiliok luka Manase okoku loka Yosep kwape ajaatar ikekiakec."
Joshua17:3 Konye Selopekad, okoku loka Keper, okoku loka Gilead, okoku loka Makir, okoku loka Manasc, amameete idwe lusap, dimarai apesur: lu kes ikiroria luka adweke, Mala, ka Noa, ka Kogila, ka Milika, ka Tirusa."
Joshua17:4 Apotu kesi kikunyut akonyen nuka Eleasar esasedoti, akonyen nuka Yosua okoku loka Nun, akonyen da nuka ikapolok, kotemasi atiar, “Abu EJAKAIT kicorak Musa akorakin sio airumet kama cjaas iinacanakosi:” kanuka ŋun abu kokorak kes airumet kama ejaas iinaean luka papakee kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT."
Joshua17:5 Kobeata Manase aturubeta atomon, kogelara akwap naka Gilead ka Basan, naejai okekwa loka Yorodan;"
Joshua17:6 Naarai adumunito adwe nuka Manase airumet kama ejaas odweke: akwap da naka Gilead arai naka odwe luka Manase kere luedeuna.
Joshua17:7 Ageunit eikor loka Manase koAser kiton Mikimetat, loitei Sekem; kitor eikor akan nakoteten, kiton neajaas lueboiete koEn-tapua."
Joshua17:8 Korai akwap naka Tapua naka Manase: konye Tapua loejai oikor laka Manase korai loka idwe luka Epuraim,"
Joshua17:9 Kiiesar eikor kiton aguurut naka Kana, ari naka eŋalakimak naka aguurut: araas ireria lu luka Epuraim koreria luka Manase: ajai eikor loka Manase ari naka agolitomei naka aguurut, kosan aŋolol:"
Joshua17:10 Kari naka eŋalakimak korau naka Epuraim, kari da naka agolitomei korai naka Manase, aŋolol ŋes arai eikorukee; kodolokis Aser kari naka agolitomei, ka Isakar kari nakokide."
Joshua17:11 Adumunit Manase kotoma Isakar ka Aser Bet-sean ka ireriake, Ibileam ka ireriake, ka Iueboiete koDor ka ireriake, ka lueboiete koEn-dor ka ireriake, ka lueboiete koTaanak ka ireriake, ka lueboiete koMegido ka ireriake, kes amukuran auni,"
Joshua17:12 Konye mam idwe luka Manase apotu kopedosi aireŋear lueboiete koreria kanul; konye kiketakinos Ikanaanin aiboi kakwap kaŋin,"
Joshua17:13 Kosodi kanen, kegogonioto idwe luka Isirael, apotu kitaraut Ikanaanin ikeswamak lukailolitoi, komam irenearere kes cut."
Joshua17:14 Kotemasi idwe luka Yosep Yosua atiar, “Kanukinyo kitebea ijo eoŋ eroet ediopet, ka atutubet adiopet araun airumeteka, kwabo kirai isio ituŋa luipu, naarai kisireren EJAKAIT sio kiton lolo?”"
Joshua17:15 Kotema Yosua kes atiar, “Arai iraasi yesi ituŋa luipu, koloto yesi amagoro, kojeput yesi kanen akwap naka Iperisin, ka Irepaim; naarai kididinikinit yes akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim.”"
Joshua17:16 Kotemasi idwe luka Yosep atiar, “Kikadit isio akwap nakiukon: Ikanaanin da kere luibojete kakwap naka aditot ejaas agalin nuka asua, ijul luejaas Bet-sean ka ireriake, ka nul da luejaas aditot naka Yesereel.”"
Joshua17:17 Kotema Yosua ekal loka Yosep, ŋes Epuraim ka Manase atiar, “Iraasi yesi ituŋa luipu, epol da agogoŋ: mam kitebeo edioperoet bon:"
Joshua17:18 Konye do eraun akwap nakiukon nakus; karaida kerai amagoro, iiepunete yesi ŋes, eraunos da awaitinike nukus: naarai irenearete yesi Ikanaanin, karaida kejaas kes agalin nuka asua, karaida kegogon kesi.”"
Joshua18:1 Kotukonokin ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael Silo, kosipokis nen ewema loka airiamunun: kononokik kes akwap."
Joshua18:2 Asalito atekerin akanykaarei kodwe luka Isirael numam ber akorokoroto airumetekee.
Joshua18:3 Kotema Yosua idwe luka Isirael atiar, “Itodolete yesi ai ikalanyaka alomar airum akwap nakiinak yes EJAKAIT Edeke loka lukapapaakus?"
Joshua18:4 Koseutu yesi ituŋa iuni kaniniteker: keiuka kes, enyounete, itorete akwap kere, iwadikaete kesi kwape eputor kwape ejaar airumetekec; eboŋunete neaiai."
Joshua18:5 Ekorokoroete akwap atutubcta akanykaarei; iboikini Yuda oikoruke kari naka eŋalakimak, ekal da loka Yosep iboikini oikorukee kari naka agolitomei."
Joshua18:6 Iwadikaete kwape eputor akwap kotoma atutubeta akanykaarei, koyaut nuiwadikaete mama ajai eoŋ: kelamilamakini eoŋ yes croet kane kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke."
Joshua18:7 Naarai amamei Ilebin akorakinet kamakus; naarai esasedotene loka EJAKAIT ŋes airumetekec: adumut Gad ka Reuben ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase airumetekec kokekwa loka Yorodan kari nakokide, naainakini kes Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT,”"
Joshua18:8 Konyout ituŋa koloto: kicorak Yosua ŋullualosete aiwadik akwap ebe, “Koloto kitoro akwap kere, kiwadikata kwape eputor, kobonut neajai, kelamilamakini eoŋ yes eroet kane koSilo kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT.”"
Joshua18:9 Koloto ituŋa, kitoro akwap kere, kiwadikata oitabo kwape eputor koreria, kotoma akorakineta akanykaarei, kopotu neejai Yosua oidukurun Silo,"
Joshua18:10 Kilamilamak Yosua kes croet koSilo kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: kokorokor Yosua akwap kanen mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael kwape atiakanakinitere kes,"
Joshua18:11 Kobe eroet ateker naka idwe luka Benyamin kwape ajaatar ikekiakec: koiai eikor loka eroetekee kidin idwe luka Yuda ka idwe luka Yosep.
Joshua18:12 Kari naka agolitomei ageunit eikorukec koYorodan; kobe eikor osiep loka Yeriko kari naka agolitomei, kitor akwap nakiukon kari nakoto; kosan amodiŋ naka Bet-aben."
Joshua18:13 Kitor eikor nen kiton Lus, airirikina Lus (nopenol ŋes Bet-el), kari naka eŋalakimak; kijesar eikor kiton Atarot-adar, ariri naka eronat loejai ari naka eŋalakimak naka Bet-koron loiiesara."
Joshua18:14 Kigirunai eikor kokudo kari nakoto ari naka eŋalakimak ageun koronat loejai kinaren ka Bet-koron kari naka eŋalakimak; kosan Kiriat-baal (nopenol ŋes Kiriatyearim), ere loka idwe luka Yuda: ŋol ŋes ewai lokoto."
Joshua18:15 Ewai da loka ari naka eŋalakimak ageunit katutubet naesanit Kiriat-yearim, kitor eikor ari nakoto, kiton atan naka akipi nuka Neputoa:"
Joshua18:16 Kijesar eikor atutubet naesanit eronat loejai kinaren kaditot naka okoku loka Kinom, loejai aditot naka Repaim kari naka agolitomei; kijesar kiton aditot naka Kinom, kiton osicp loka ari naka eŋalakimak loka Eyebusit, kobe En-rogel;"
Joshua18:17 Kigirunai kari naka agolitomei, kitor En-semcs, kobe Gelilot, loitei needokarere Adumim; kijesar kiton amoru naka Eokan okoku loka Reuben;"
Joshua18:18 Kiriria osiep loka Araba kari naka agolitomei kiiesar kiton Araba:
Joshua18:19 Kiriria eikor osiep loka Bet-kogila kari naka agolitomei agor naka Aŋolol naka Abalaŋ, osaŋe loka Yorodan kari naka eŋalakimak: nol ŋes eikor loka ari naka eŋalakimak,"
Joshua18:20 Korai Yorodan eikoruke kowai lokokide. Ŋin ŋes airumet naka idwe luka Benyamin, kwape ejaatar iikorunokec luelukunito, kwape ejaatar ikekiakec."
Joshua18:21 Ireria luka ateker naka idwe luka Benyamin, kwape ejaatar ikekiakec kes Yeriko, ka Bet-kogila, ka Emek-kesis;"
Joshua18:22 ka Bet-araba, ka Semaraim, ka Bet-el;"
Joshua18:23 ka Abim, ka Para, ka Opura;"
Joshua18:24 ka Keparamoni, ka Opuni ka Geba; ireria itomon ka luarei ka ireriakec ludidik:"
Joshua18:25 Gibeon, ka Rama, ka Beerot;"
Joshua18:26 ka Misipe, ka Kepira, ka Mosa;"
Joshua18:27 ka Rekem, ka Iripeel, ka Tarala;"
Joshua18:28 ka Sela, ka Elep, ka Eyebusit (nopenol ŋes Yerusalem), ka Gibeat, ka Kiriat; ireria itomon ka luonon ka ireriakec ludidik, ŋin ŋes airumet naka idwe luka Benyamin kwape ejaatar ikekiakee."
Joshua19:1 Kobeik eroet lokiareit Simeon, ŋes ateker naka idwe luka Simeon, kwape ajaatar ikekiakec: ajai airumetekec kidin kairumet naka idwe luka Yuda,"
Joshua19:2 Apotu kesi kirumata Beer-seba, arai Seba, ka Molada;"
Joshua19:3 ka Kasar-sual, ka Bala, ka Esem;"
Joshua19:4 ka Elitolad, ka Betul, ka Koruma;"
Joshua19:5 ka Sikilag, ka Ber-marakabot, ka Kasar-susa;"
Joshua19:6 ka Bet-lebaot, ka Saruken; ireria itomon ka luuni ka ireriakec ludidik;"
Joshua19:7 Ain, ka Rimon, ka Eter, ka Asan; ireria iwonon ka ireriakec ludidik:"
Joshua19:8 ka ireria ludidik kere lualukunito ireria nul kiton Baalat-beer, Rama loka ari naka Eŋalakimak. Ŋin ŋes airumet naka ateker naka idwe luka Simeon kwape ajaatar ikekiakec."
Joshua19:9 Ajai airumet naka idwe luka Simeon toma owai loka idwe luka Yuda: naarai alalakinit noi idwe luka Yuda akorakinetekec: kanuka nun ŋes akorakinere idwe luka Simeon airumet kokidin airumetekec.
Joshua19:10 Kobeik eroet lokiwuniet idwe luka Sebulun kwape ajaatar ikekiakec: ajai eikor loka airumetekee kiton Sarid:
Joshua19:11 Kitor eikorukec ari nakoto, kiton Marala, kodol Dabeset; kodol da aguurut naejai kinaren ka Yokoneam;"
Joshua19:12 Kokudo koSarid ari nakokide mama eniunia akoloŋ kiton oikor loka Kisilot-tabor; kobe Daberat, kitor Yapia;"
Joshua19:13 Kobe kanen kiton Gat-keper, kiton Et-kasin; kitor Rimon loedolit Nea;"
Joshua19:14 Kokudo eikor airimor ŋes kari naka eŋalakimak kiton Kanaton: kosan aditot naka Ipita-el;
Joshua19:15 ka Katat, ka Nakalal, ka Simuron, ka Idala, ka Bet-lekem: ireria itomon ka luarei ka ireriakec ludidik."
Joshua19:16 Ŋin ŋes airumet naka idwe luka Sebulun kwape ajaatar ikekiakec, ireria nul lukapolok ka ireriakec ludidik."
Joshua19:17 Kobeik eroet lokiwononet Isakar, kes idwe luka Isakar kwape ajaatar ikekiakec."
Joshua19:18 Ajai eikorukec kiton Yesereel, ka Kesulot, ka Sunem;"
Joshua19:19 ka Kaparaim, ka Sion, ka Anakarat;"
Joshua19:20 ka Rabit, ka Kision, ka Ebes;"
Joshua19:21 ka Remet, ka En-ganim, ka En-kada, ka Bet-pases;"
Joshua19:22 Kodol eikor Tabor, ka Sakasuma, ka Bet-semes; kosan eikorukec Yorodan: ireria itomon ka lukanykape ka ireriakec ludidik."
Joshua19:23 Ŋin ŋes airumet naka ateker naka idwe luka Isakar kwape ajaatar ikekiakec, ireria lukapolok ka ireriakec ludidik,"
Joshua19:24 Kobeik eroet lokikanyet ateker naka idwe luka Aser, kwape ajaatar ikekiakec."
Joshua19:25 Eikorukec ŋes Kelakat, ka Kali, ka Beten, ka Akisap;"
Joshua19:26 ka Alamelek, ka Amad, ka Misal; kodol Karamel kari nakoto, kiton Sikor-libunat da;"
Joshua19:27 Kokudo neeniunia akoloŋ kiton Bet-dagon, kodol Sebulun, ka aditot naka Ipita-el kari naka agolitomei kiton Bet-emek, ka Neiel; kitor Kabul kakan nakokediany,"
Joshua19:28 ka Eburon, ka Rekob, ka Kamon, ka Kana, kiton Sidon lokapolon;"
Joshua19:29 Kokudo eikor kiton Rama, ka ere loebwaitai loka Turo; kokudo eikor kiton Kosa; kosan aŋolol kakwap naka Akisib:"
Joshua19:30 Uma da, ka Apek, ka Rekob: ireria akaisaarei ka luarei ka ireriakec ludidik."
Joshua19:31 Ŋin ŋes airumet naka ateker naka idwe luka Aser kwape ajaatar ikekiakec, ireria nul lukapolok ka ireriakec ludidik."
Joshua19:32 Kobeik eroet lokikanyetekape idwe luka Naputali, kes idwe luka Naputali kwape ajaatar ikekiakec."
Joshua19:33 Ageunit eikorukec koKelep, ageun kolua loajai Saananim, ka Adami-nekeb, ka Yabuneel, kiton Lakum: kosan Yorodan:"
Joshua19:34 Kokudo eikor ari nakoto kiton Asinot-tabor, kobe kanen kiton Kukok; kodolok Sebulun kari naka eŋalakimak, kodolok Aser kari nakoto, ka Yuda da koYorodan kaneeŋiunia akoloŋ,"
Joshua19:35 Ireria luabwaitai kes Sidim, ka Ser, ka Kamat, ka Rakat ka Kineret;"
Joshua19:36 ka Adama, ka Rama, ka Kasor;"
Joshua19:37 ka Kedes, ka Ederei, ka En-kasor;"
Joshua19:38 ka Iron, ka Migidal-el, ka Korem, ka Bet-anat, ka Bet-semes; ireria itomon ka lukanykaonon ka ireriakec ludidik."
Joshua19:39 Ŋin ŋes airumet naka ateker naka idwe luka Naputali kwape ajaatar ikekiakee, ireria lukapolok ka ireriakec ludidik,"
Joshua19:40 Kobeik eroet lokikanyetekaarei ateker naka idwe luka Dan kwape ajaatar ikekiakec.
Joshua19:41 Eikor loka airumetekec ŋes Sora, ka Esitaol, ka Ir-semes;"
Joshua19:42 ka Saalabin, ka Aiyalon, ka Itila;"
Joshua19:43 ka Elon, ka Timuna, ka Ekuron;"
Joshua19:44 ka Eliteke, ka Gibeton, ka Baalat;"
Joshua19:45 ka Yekud, ka Bene-berak, ka Gatrimon;"
Joshua19:46 ka Me-yarikon, ka Rakon, kiteos eikor kaYopa."
Joshua19:47 Kisukunyikis idwe luka Dan eikorukee: naarai apotu idwe luka Dan kolomasi aitiji Lesem, koyanaasi ŋes, kodanyata luken kakwanis naka ekileŋ, kirumata, kiboikinos toma, komaikis Lesem Dan, ekiror loka papakec."
Joshua19:48 Ŋin ŋes airumet naka ateker naka idwe luka Dan kwape ajaatar ikekiakee, ireria ŋullukapolok ka ireriakec ludidik."
Joshua19:49 Kitananata kwaŋin akorokor airumeta nuka akwap kwape ajaatar iikorunoke; koinakis idwe luka Isirael Yosua okoku loka Nun airumet kamakee:
Joshua19:50 Apotu koinakis ŋes ere loelipit, ŋes Timunat-sera kotoma akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT: abu koduk ere, kiboikin roma."
Joshua19:51 Ŋun kes airumeta nuapotu Eleasar esasedoti, ka Yosua okoku loka Nun, ka ikapolok luka ikalia luka lukapapaa luka atekerin nuka idwe luka Isirael kokorokorata kes airum kailamilam eroet koSilo kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT kokek loka ewema loka airiamunun. Kitananata kwaŋin akorokor akwap."
Joshua20:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Yosua atiar,"
Joshua20:2 “Kolimok idwe luka Isirael ebe, Koseutu yesi ireria lukuianara, luabu kalimok yes kama ka Musa:"
Joshua20:3 Tetere ikaaran yeneari ituŋanan komam epeleikinit, komam ejeŋi da, ekereari nina: eraunos kamakus luikuianarete kaneejai ekenyaŋaran aokot."
Joshua20:4 Ekereari ore ediopet koreria kanul, ebwoi korute loka ere, kosodi alimokin imakio luka ere kanol akekiro; itolomarete kesi ŋes ore mamakee, einakinete ŋes aibois, tetere iboikin mamakec."
Joshua20:5 Arai kedap ekenyaŋaran aokot ŋes, mam kes iiaikinete ekaaran mamake: naarai aar ekeidunyet komam ejeŋi, komam lem da elait ŋes."
Joshua20:6 Iboikin ore ŋol aitodol naebwoia atubokinio kakonyen nuka ekodet, aitodol da naetwania esasedoti lopeti lokejai kapaarasia kanun: ŋes konyet ebonunio ekaaran, ebunio da oreke, togoke, ore Ioakerca.”"
Joshua20:7 Kotiakut Kades koGalilaya kakwap nakiukon naka Naputali, ka Sekem kakwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, ka Kiriat-araba (nopenol ŋes Keburon) kakwap nakiukon naka Yuda."
Joshua20:8 Kokekwa loka Yorodan da koYeriko kari nakokide, apotu koseut Beser kamodiŋ kapuuton naka ateker naka Reuben, ka Ramot koGilead naka ateker naka Gad, ka Golan koBa san naka ateker naka Manase,"
Joshua20:9 Ŋul kes ireria luaseikinitai idwe kere luka Isirael ka imoit yeneboie kamakec, tetere ninitunanan yeneari ituŋanan komam epeleikinit ekereari nina, komam ekenyaŋaran aokot eari ŋes, aitodol naebwoia kakonyen nuka ekodet."
Joshua21:1 Kosodete ikapolok luka ikalia luka lukapapaa luka Ilebin aikunyakin mama ejai Eleasar esasedoti, ka Yosua okoku loka Nun, ka ikapolok luka ikalia luka lukapapaa luka atekerin nuka idwe luka Isirael;"
Joshua21:2 Kotemasi kes koSilo kakwap naka Kanaan atiar, “Abu EJAKAIT kicorak kama ka Musa ainakin sio ireria lukiboionono, ka ironyiakee kanuka ibarenekosi.”"
Joshua21:3 Apotu idwe luka Isirael koinakisi Ilebin ireria lu ka ironyiakee kotoma airumetekec, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT."
Joshua21:4 Kobeik eroet ikekia luka Ikokatin: kobeik eroet idwe luka Aaron esasedoti, luaraas Ilebin, kotoma ateker naka Yuda, ka ateker naka Isimeonin, ka ateker naka Benyamin, ireria itomon ka luuni,"
Joshua21:5 Kobeik eroet idwe luka luedeuna luka Kokat kotoma okekia luka ateker naka Epuraim, ka ateker naka Dan, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase, ireria itomon."
Joshua21:6 Kobeik eroet idwe luka Gereson kotoma okekia luka ateker naka Isakar, ka ateker naka Aser, ka ateker naka Naputali, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase koBasan, ireria itomon ka luuni."
Joshua21:7 Kodumut idwe luka Merari kwape ajaatar ikekiakec kotoma ateker naka Reuben, ka ateker naka Gad, ka ateker naka Sebulun, ireria itomon ka luarei."
Joshua21:8 Koinakis idwe luka Isirael Ilebin ireria nul ka ironyiakee kailamilam eroet, kwape ecorakinitor EJAKAIT kama ka Musa."
Joshua21:9 Koinakis kotoma ateker naka idwe luka Yuda, ka ateker naka idwe luka Simeon, ireria lu luebilitai kane ikecekiroria,"
Joshua21:10 Koraas luka idwe luka Aaron, luka ikekia luka Ikokatin, luaraas luka idwe luka Lebi: naarai abu eroet losodit kobeik kes."
Joshua21:11 Apotu koinakis kes Kiriat-araba, Araba ŋol ŋes papa loka Anak, (nopenol ŋes Keburon) kakwap nakiukon naka Yuda, ka ironyiake lualukunito."
Joshua21:12 Konye imanikoria luka ere ka ireriake ludidik, apotu kesi koinakis Kaleb okoku loka Yepune airum."
Joshua21:13 Apotu koinakis idwe luka Aaron esasedoti Keburon ka ironyiake, ere loekuianari ikaaran, ka Libuna ka ironyiake;"
Joshua21:14 ka Yatir ka ironyiake, ka Esitemoa ka ironyiake;"
Joshua21:15 ka Kolon ka ironyiake, ka Debir ka ironyiake;"
Joshua21:16 ka Ain ka ironyiake, ka Yuta ka ironyiake, ka Bet-semes ka ironyiake, ireria ikanykaoŋon kotoma atekerin nun nuarei."
Joshua21:17 Kotoma ateker naka Benyamin, Gibeon ka ironyiake, Geba ka ironyiake;"
Joshua21:18 Anatot ka ironyiake, ka Alumon ka ironyiake; ireria iwoŋon,"
Joshua21:19 Ireria kere luka idwe luka Aaron, isasedotin, emwaasi itomon ka luuni ka ironyiakec,"
Joshua21:20 Apotu ikekia luka idwe luka Kokat, Ilebin, kes idwe kere luedeuna luka Kokat, kodumut ireria luka eroetekec kotoma ateker naka Epuraim."
Joshua21:21 Apotu koinakis kes Sekem ka ironyiake kakwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, ere loekuianari ikaaran, ka Geser ka ironyiake;"
Joshua21:22 ka Kibisaim ka ironyiake; ka Bet-koron ka ironyiake; ireria iwonon,"
Joshua21:23 Kotoma ateker naka Dan, Eliteke ka ironyiake, Gibeton ka ironyiake;"
Joshua21:24 Aiyalon ka ironyiake, Gatrimon ka ironyiake; ireria iwonon,"
Joshua21:25 Kotoma atutubet naka ateker naka Manase, Taanak ka ironyiake, ka Gat-rimon ka ironyiake; ireria iarei."
Joshua21:26 Ireria kere luka ikekia luka idwe kere luedeuna luka Kokat emwaasi itomon ka ironyiakec.
Joshua21:27 Apotu koinakis idwe luka Gereson, loka ikekia luka Ilebin, kotoma atutubet naka ateker naka Manase, Golan koBasan ka ironyiake, ere loekuianari ikaaran, ka Be-esetera ka ironyiake; ireria iarei."
Joshua21:28 Kotoma ateker naka Isakar, Kision ka ironyiake, Daberat ka ironyiake,"
Joshua21:29 Yaramut ka ironyiake; En-ganim ka ironyiake; ireria iwonon.
Joshua21:30 Kotoma ateker naka Aser, Misal ka ironyiake, Abudon ka ironyiake;"
Joshua21:31 Kelekat ka ironyiake; ka Rekob ka ironyiake; ireria iwoŋon.
Joshua21:32 Kotoma ateker naka Naputali, Kedes koGalilaya ka ironyiake, ere loekuianari ikaaran, ka Kamot-dor ka ironyiake, ka Karutan ka ironyiake; ireria iuni."
Joshua21:33 Ireria kere luka Igeresonin kwape ajaatar ikekiakee emwaasi ireria itomon ka luuni ka ironyiakec.
Joshua21:34 Apotu koinakis ikekia luka idwe luka Merari, luedeuna luka Ilebin, kotoma ateker naka Sebulun, Yokoneam ka ironyiake, ka Karuta ka ironyiake,"
Joshua21:35 Dimuna ka ironyiake, Nakalal ka ironyiake; ireria iwonon,"
Joshua21:36 Kotoma ateker naka Reuben, Beser ka ironyiake, ka Yakas ka ironyiake;"
Joshua21:37 Kedemot ka ironyiake, ka Mepaat ka ironyiake, ireria iwonon,"
Joshua21:38 Kotoma ateker naka Gad, Ramot koGilead ka ironyiake, ere loekuianari ikaaran, ka Makanaim ka ironyiake;"
Joshua21:39 Kesibon ka ironyiake, Yaser ka ironyiake, ircria kere iwcnon."
Joshua21:40 Ŋul kere araas ireria luka idwe luka Merari kwape ajaatar ikekiakec, kes luedeuna luka ikekia luka Ilebin; kobeikis kes ireria itomon ka luarei."
Joshua21:41 Ireria kere luka Ilebin kotoma airumeta nuka idwe luka Isirael emwaasi ireria akaisaoŋon ka lukanykauni ka ironyiakee.
Joshua21:42 Alukunito ireria ŋul ironyiakec: ekote nen ireria nul kere.
Joshua21:43 Kwaŋin koinak EJAKAIT Isirael akwap kere naeyapoikinit ainakin lukapapaakec: apotu kiruma ŋes, kiboioto kotoma."
Joshua21:44 Kisiyen EJAKAIT kes kowaitin kere, kwape ajaatar kere nueyapoikinit lukapapaakec: mam edio kalukasurupokee kere loabu kobwoik kes; abu EJAKAIT kijaik lukasurupokec kere akanikec."
Joshua21:45 Emamei akirot namam abu kodol kakiro nuejok nuabu EJAKAIT kolimokinite ekek loka Isirael; apotu kere kodoloto.
Joshua22:1 Kosodi Yosua anyaraun Ireubenin ka Igadin ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase,"
Joshua22:2 Kotema kes atiar, “Ipotu kidarata kere nuabu Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT kicorak yes, ipupoto da ekaporoto kotoma kere nuabu kecorak yes:"
Joshua22:3 Mam ijalakinito ikusiinacan kapaarasia kanu nuipu, kiton lolo, konye ipotu kidarata akirot naka aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Joshua22:4 Kwana esiyenu EJAKAIT Ekusideke ikusiinaean, kwape alimokinitor kes: asa do, kobonosi, koloto owemanakus, akwap nairumito yesi, naabu Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT koinak yes kokekwa loka Yorodan."
Joshua22:5 Konye koeoito kojokan aiswamaenen aicorakinet ka ekisil, loabu Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT kicorak yes, aminenen EJAKAIT Ekusideke, alosenen korotinike kere, aidar aicorakinetake kere, ka aimorikikin kaŋes, ka aiiaanakin ŋes kikusitauon kere ka akusiijar kere.”"
Joshua22:6 Kwaŋin abu Yosua kilipak kes arereŋ, kotwar kes: koloto owemanakec."
Joshua22:7 Abu Musa koinakinite atutubet naka ateker naka Manase airumet koBasan: konye abu Yosua koinak nacetutubet kama ejaas iinaeanakee kokekwa loka Yorodan kari nakoto.
Joshua22:8 Kotema kes atiar, “Koboŋosi kabar naepol owemanakus, ka ibaren luipu noi, ka epuesa, ka esabu, ka aisinit, ka asua, ka igoen luipu noi: komorata kikusiinaean lunatuna kaneejaas lukasurupokus.”"
Joshua22:9 Kobonosi idwe luka Reuben, ka idwe luka Gad, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase, konyout koSilo loejai akwap naka Kanaan neejaas idwe luka lsirael, alosit akwap naka Gilead, akwap naka airumetekec, naerumito kesi, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT kama ka Musa."
Joshua22:10 Kedoloto kesi akwap naidunyas ka Yorodan, naejai akwap naka Kanaan, apotu idwe luka Reuben ka idwe luka Gad ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase kodukoto etem ariri naka Yorodan, etem loepol noi loetakani."
Joshua22:11 Kopuput idwe luka Isirael ebakai ebe, “Koany, apotu idwe luka Reuben, ka idwe luka Gad, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase kodukoto etem loiteos kakwap naka Kanaan, kotoma akwap naidunyas Yorodan, kowai loerai loka idwe luka Isirael.”"
Joshua22:12 Kepuput idwe luka Isirael nun, kotukokin ekodet kere loka idwe luka Isirael Silo, alosit aitiji kes."
Joshua22:13 Kijukasi idwe luka Isirael Pinekas okoku loka Eleasar esasedoti mam ejaas idwe luka Reuben ka idwe luka Gad ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase, akwap naka Gilead;"
Joshua22:14 Kijukasi nepepe kaŋes ikapolok itomon, ekapolon ediopet loka ekal loka lukapapaa loka niniteker naka Isirael; ara ŋinituŋanan kakesi ekapolon loka ikalia luka lukapapaakee kolukumin luka Isirael."
Joshua22:15 Kodoloto mama ejaas idwe luka Reuben, ka idwe luka Gad, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase, akwap naka Gilead, kotemasi kes atiar,"
Joshua22:16 “Inera kwanata ekodet kere loka EJAKAIT ebe, ‘Naanyoin aibucaret na naibucasi yesi kaneejai Edeke loka Isirael, aibelokin lolo ainyein atupit EJAKAIT, naarai idukut etem, aipaliikin lolo EJAKAIT?’"
Joshua22:17 Kikidiokikinito kereka oni numam adolit nuka Peor, nuerina oni kitalauna kiton lolo, karaida kejauna atular okodet loka EJAKAIT,"
Joshua22:18 Yes aibelokin lolo ainyein atupit EJAKAIT? Kosodi do kanu naarai ipaliikis yesi EJAKAIT lolo, enyunyurikini do ŋesi moi ekodet kere loka Isirael,"
Joshua22:19 Aso do, arai mam akwap naka airumetekus elai, kodokasi yesi akwap naka airumet naka EJAKAIT, neiboio ewema lokalaunan loka EJAKAIT, kirumata nepepe kasio; konye sirikipaliikis EJAKAIT, karaida aipaliikin sio, adukun etem loegelara ketem loka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke."
Joshua22:20 Mere abu Akan okoku loka Sera kibuca koboro luetateleoritai, kobunok anyunyura ekodet kere loka Isirael? Mam etuŋanan ŋol abu kotwana bon kotoma numam adoliteke.”"
Joshua22:21 Kosodete idwe luka Reuben, ka idwe luka Gad, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase aboŋokin, kotemasi kesi ikapolok luka ilukumin luka lsirael atiar,"
Joshua22:22 “EJAKAIT, Edeke loka idekesio, EJAKAIT, Edeke loka idekesio, ŋes ejeŋi, Isirael da ejenuni; arai kanuka epali, arai kanuka aibucaret mama ejai EJAKAIT, (siri jo kiitajar sio lolo.)"
Joshua22:23 Kidukunio isio etem aibelokin ainyein atupit EJAKAIT; arai ainakin kanen ainakinet naicweio, arai ainakinet naka akiria, arai ainakin asuban nuka ainakineta nuka ainapakin kanen, kitepesen EJAKAIT elopet;"
Joshua22:24 Arai mam sio kiswamat nun kaiyaparit, kaomitos ebe, Kapaarasia nuepote epedorete ikusidwe atemar ikosidwe atiar, ‘Inyo bo ejai yes ka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael?"
Joshua22:25 Naarai etuluo EJAKAIT Yorodan eikorukosi kayes, yes idwe luka Reuben ka idwe luka Gad; emamei yes akorakinet kaneejai EJAKAIT: kwaŋin isimikete ikusidwe ikosidwe ayoŋit EJAKAIT."
Joshua22:26 Ŋes kitemaria ebe, ‘Ketemokinos oni aiduk etem, mere kanuka ainakinia ainakinet naicweio, karaida asubanit:"
Joshua22:27 Konye eraun ekajenan mamakosi kayes, mama ejaas aturiowok nukitupanakinete, tetere kijaanakini kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT kainakinetawok nuieweio ka asubanawok, ka ainakinetawok nuka ainapakin; tetere mam ikusidwe etemarete ikosidwe kapaarasia nuepote atiar, “Emamei yes akorakinet kama ejai EJAKAIT.”"
Joshua22:28 Ŋes kitemaria ebe, ejaun do ebe naetemariata sio arai aturiokosi kwaŋin kapaarasia nuepote, kitemari do isio ebe, ‘Koany aput naka etem loka EJAKAIT, loadukunete lukapapaakosi, mere kanuka ainakinia ainakinet naicweio, karaida asubanit; konye erai ekajenan mamakosi kayes.’"
Joshua22:29 Madi akuj, arai kiipaliiki isio EJAKAIT, aibelokin lolo ainyein atupit EJAKAIT, aiduk etem ainakinia ainakinet naicweio, ka ainakinet naka akiria, arai asubanit, kogelara kaneejai etem loka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke loejai owemake lokalaunan.”"
Joshua22:30 Kepupu Pinekas esasedoti, ka ikapolok luka ekodet, kes ikapolok luka ilukumin luka Isirael luajaas kaŋes, akiro nuapotu idwe luka Reuben, ka idwe luka Gad, ka idwe luka Manase kinerata, apotu kesi kitojokata noi,"
Joshua22:31 Kotema Pinekas okoku loka Eleasar esasedoti idwe luka Reuben, ka idwe luka Gad, ka idwe luka Manase atiar, “Kijeni lolo ebe ejai EJAKAIT kidiniwok, naarai mam yes ibuearito aibucaret ŋin kaneejai EJAKAIT: iyuut do yesi idwe luka Isirael kakan naka EJAKAIT.”"
Joshua22:32 Koboŋo Pinekas okoku loka Eleasar esasedoti, ka ikapolok, kaneejaas idwe luka Reuben, ka idwe luka Gad, anyoun kakwap naka Gilead, alosit akwap naka Kanaan, mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael, kinyakakis kes akiro."
Joshua22:33 Kitojokata idwe luka Isirael akirot; kituroto idwe luka Isirael Edeke, mam bobo apotu kinerata nuka alosit aitiji kes, amudiar akwap naeboiononoto idwe luka Reuben ka idwe luka Gad,"
Joshua22:34 Komaikisi idwe luka Reuben ka idwe luka Gad etem Ed, naarai abakas ebe, erai ekajenan kamawok ebe EJAKAIT ŋes Edeke."
Joshua23:1 Kosodi ketuboros apaarasia nuipu, kisiyenu EJAKAIT Isirael kama kalukasurupokee kere lualukunito, komojonite Yosua kokokosanite da noi;"
Joshua23:2 Abu Yosua konyarau Isirael kere, imakiokee ka ikapolokokec, ikatubokokec, ka ijakakec, kotema kes atiar, “Amoion eoŋ akokosanit da noi:"
Joshua23:3 Ianyut yesi kere nuabu EJAKAIT Ekusideke kiswamak atekerin nu kere kanukus; naarai EJAKAIT Ekusideke ŋes nol Iokiiiik yes.
Joshua23:4 Koany, kainak yes atekerin nu nuideuna, araun airumet naka atekerinikus, ageun koYorodan, katekerin kere nuamudia eoŋ, kiton aŋolol nakapolon kari naelomaria akoloŋ,"
Joshua23:5 Eremori EJAKAIT Ekusideke kes kakonyenekus, ireneari kes kakonyenekus; irumete yesi akecekwap, kwape kilimokinitor EJAKAIT yes,"
Joshua23:6 Aso kotitinioto noi aidar aiswamaenen kere nuiwadikatai oitabo loka ikisila luka Musa, kinyeis apaar teten arai kediany;"
Joshua23:7 Tetere mam imorikikinos katekerin nu, nuideuna kamakus; karaida alimit ekiror loka idekesiokec, karaida aiyap kolimito kes, karaida aiiaanakin kes, karaida akukonokin kes:"
Joshua23:8 Konye kimorikikinos ka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, kwape kiswamaata kiton lolo."
Joshua23:9 Naarai ereŋea EJAKAIT atekerin nukapolok nukagogon da kakonyenekus: konye yes, emamei etuŋanan lokibwoikinit yes kiton lolo."
Joshua23:10 Ediopetunanan kayesi erukoria elukumit: naarai EJAKAIT Ekusideke, ŋes nol lokijiik yes, kwape kilimokinitor."
Joshua23:11 Kocoito do noi yesi, kominenenas EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Joshua23:12 Naarai arai kibonosi yesi, aimorikikin kaluideuna luka atekerin kanu, kes luideuna kamakus, kosodete amanyanakin kakes, kolomasi da mamakee, kes da mamakus:"
Joshua23:13 Kojenutu eut ebe mam bobo EJAKAIT ireneari atekerin nu kakonyenekus; konye eraunos atacit ka eic kamakus, ka edoi kosiepionokus, ka ikukwa kakonyekus, aitodol nakimudiarere yes kakwap kana naejok nakiinak yes EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Joshua23:14 “Ido koany, alosi lolo eoŋ neelosenenete lukakwap kere: ijenete yesi kotauonokus kere, ka aijarakus kere ebe emamei akirot namam edolit kakiro kere nuejok nuabu EJAKAIT Ekusideke kolimitor yes; adoloto kere, emamei akirot adiopet namam edolit,"
Joshua23:15 Kosodi kanen, kwape kidolokinioto yes nukaiokak kere nuabu EJAKAIT Ekusideke kolimokinite yes, kiiukakini EJAKAIT yes kwaŋin nukaronok kere aitodol nakimudiaria yes kakwap kana naejok nakiinak EJAKAIT Ekusideke,"
Joshua23:16 Naibueariata aitutuket naka EJAKAIT Ekusideke naabu kicorak yes, kosodete alosit aijaanakin icedekesio ka akukonokin ke; inepuni do anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin yes, kimudiario yes atipet kakwap naejok nakiinak ŋesi yes.”"
Joshua24:1 Kotukok Yosua atekerin kere nuka Isirael Sekem, konyarau imakio luka Isirael, ka ikapolokokec ka ikatubokokee, ka ijakakee; kitodiaros akonyen nuka Edeke,"
Joshua24:2 Kotema Yosua ituŋa kere atiar, “Inera EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael kwanata ebe, ‘Eboiete kolo lukapapaakus kokekwa loka Ecor, ŋes Tera, papa loka Aburaam, papa da loka Nakor: apotu kijaanakis icedekesio."
Joshua24:3 Kasodi aitonyoun papaakus Aburaam kokekwa loka Ecor, kenarcnik ŋes anatar akwap kere naka Kanaan, ketupuu aurike, kainak da ŋes Isaak."
Joshua24:4 Kainak Isaak Yakob ka Esau: kainak Esau emoru Seir airum; abu Yakob ka idweke kolototo Misiri.
Joshua24:5 Abu kejuka Musa ka Aaron, ketican Misiri, kwape ajaatar nuabu keswama kaŋina: akaulo kanun abu ketolom yes,"
Joshua24:6 Abu ketolom lukapapaakus koMisiri: ipotu kodoloto aŋolol: kibwaput Imisirian lukapapaakus kagalin ka ikebwanenok kiton Aŋolol Nakarenan,"
Joshua24:7 Kosodete kiworoto EJAKAIT, abu kibwaik amuton kidinikus ka Imisirian, kitobonik aŋolol mamakee, korapia kes; apotu akusikonye koanyut nuabu eoŋ keswama koMisiri: kiboioto da yesi kamodiŋ apaarasia nuipu."
Joshua24:8 Kasodi aitolomun yes akwap naka Imorain, lueboiete kokekwa loka Yorodan; kitijioto yes: abu kejaik kes akanikus, kirumata da yesi akecekwap; abu kamudia kes kakonyenekus."
Joshua24:9 Kosodi Balak, okoku loka Sipor, ekabaka loka Moab, anyoun asurokin Isirael; kijuka anyaraun Balaam okoku loka Beor aiken yes:"
Joshua24:10 Konye mam abu kapupok Balaam; tape kisireretji yes: kwaŋin kayu yes kakanike.
Joshua24:11 Ipotu kodokata Yorodan, kodoloto Yeriko: apotu ituŋa luka Yeriko kitiiioto yes, Emorait, ka Eperisit, ka Ekanaanit, ka Ekitit, ka Egirugasit, ka Ekibit, ka Eyebusit; abu kejaik kes akaninikus."
Joshua24:12 Abu keiuka ekaturuturut kinarenekus, loabu kirenea kes kakonyenekus, kes ikabakan iarei luka Imorain; mere kekilenikus karaida akabwakus."
Joshua24:13 Abu kainak yes akwap namam ipotu kitaaritos, ka ireria lumam yes kidukito, iboiete da kotoma; inyamete imusabibun ka iseitunin lumam yes kiraito.’"
Joshua24:14 “Aso do koyonata EJAKAIT, kijaanakis ŋes kamunonut ka abeit: kolemasi idekesio luejaanakinete lukapapaakus kokekwa loka Ecor, koMisiri da; kijaanakisi yesi EJAKAIT,"
Joshua24:15 Konye arai kironikinit yes aijaanakin EJAKAIT, koseutu yesi lolo loijaanakinete; arai bo idekesio luejaanakinete lukapapaakus luajaas okekwa loka Ecor, arai idekesio luka Imorain, luibojete yesi kakwapukee: konye eoŋ ka ekakal, kijaanakini EJAKAIT.”"
Joshua24:16 Kobonokis ituŋa ebe, “Madi akuj isio aijal EJAKAIT, aijaanakin idekesio ice;"
Joshua24:17 Naarai EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, ŋol ŋes lokitolomuni oni ka lukapapaawok kakwap nako Misiri, kotogo da loka ebulesene, loeswamai aanyuneta nun nukos kakonyenekosi, loabu kidar oni korot kere lokitorit, kotuna da kere lukipou ketoroto mamakee:"
Joshua24:18 Abu EJAKAIT kireŋea ituŋa kere kakonyenewok, kes Imorain lueboiete kakwap: kanuka ŋun kijaanakini isio da EJAKAIT; naarai erai ŋesi Ewokodeke.”"
Joshua24:19 Kotema Yosua ituŋa atiar, “Mam yes ipedorete aijaanakin EJAKAIT; naarai erai Edeke lokalaunan; erai ŋesi Edeke lokekolo; mam isionie aibucaretakus karaida adiakaretakus."
Joshua24:20 Arai kijalata yesi EJAKAIT, kosodete aijaanakin idekesio lumo, ibelokini do ŋesi aiswamakin yes nukaronok, kimudiari da yes, kedau ŋesi aiswamakin yes nukajokak.”"
Joshua24:21 Kotemasi ituŋa Yosua atiar, “Mam; konye kijaanakini isio EJAKAIT.”"
Joshua24:22 Kotema Yosua ituŋa atiar, “Iraas yesi ikajenak kamakus ebe iseut yesi EJAKAIT aijaanakin ŋes.” Kotemasi atiar, “Kirai ikajenak.”"
Joshua24:23 Kotema atiar, “Aso do kolemasi idekesio lumo luejaas mamakus, kogoŋakis ikusitauon mama ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael.”"
Joshua24:24 Kotemasi ituŋa Yosua atiar, “Kijaanakini EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, kirimari da ekeporoto.”"
Joshua24:25 Kwaŋin kitutukoto Yosua kituna kapaaran kaŋin, kisilak kes ekisil ka aicorakinet ko Sekem."
Joshua24:26 Abu Yosua kiwadik akiro nun kere oitabo loka ekisil loka Edeke; kolem amoru naati, kosipok nen kwap kelua loedunyas kaibois nakalaunan naka EJAKAIT,"
Joshua24:27 Kotema Yosua ituŋa kere atiar, “Koany, eraun amoru na akajenan kamawok; naarai apupu akiro kere nukilimok EJAKAIT oni: eraun akajenan kamakus, kinyeis aiŋer Ekusideke.”"
Joshua24:28 Kwaŋin kotwar Yosua ituŋa, kolot ninitunanan airumeteke."
Joshua24:29 Kosodi kokau kanun, kotwana Yosua okoku loka Nun, ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT, korai loka ikar akwatat ka itomon."
Joshua24:30 Kidaikisi ŋes oikor loka airumeteke Timunat-sera, loejai akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, kari naka agolitomei naka eronat loka Gaas."
Joshua24:31 Kijaanak Isirael EJAKAIT apaarasia kere nuka Yosua, ka apaarasia kere nuka imakio luabusito adepar Yosua, luajenete aswam kere naka EJAKAIT, naabu kiswamak Isirael."
Joshua24:32 Akojo da nuka Yosep nuayanaunete idwe luka lsirael koMisiri, apotu kesi kidaikis Sekem, alup nuabu Yakob kogwel kaneejaas odwe luka Kamor papa loka Sekem atutubeta akwatat nuka apesan: koraunos airumet naka idwe luka Yosep."
Joshua24:33 Kotwana Eleasar okoku loka Aaron; kidaikisi ŋes oukot loka okokuke Pinekas, loainakinitai ŋes kakwap nakiukon naka Epuraim."
Judges1:1 Kosodi kanen ketwana Yosua, kiŋitata idwe luka Isirael EJAKAIT ebe, “Iŋai bo kiŋarenikini sio alosit asurokin Ikanaanin, aitiji kes?”"
Judges1:2 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Yuda ŋes elosi: koany, ejaik akwap akanike.”"
Judges1:3 Kotema Yuda onaeeke Simeon atiar, “Bia kauparos oroet lokabeit eoŋ, tetere kitijie Ikanaanin; kwape kwaŋin da kiupar eoŋ kajo oroet lokibeit ijo,” Kouparos Simeon kaŋes."
Judges1:4 Kolot Yuda; kijaik EJAKAIT Ikanaanin ka Iperisin akanikee: kodanyata ituŋa ilukumin itomon kaŋul koBesek.
