Judges1:5 Apotu kodumakis Adoni-besek Besek: kitijioto ŋes, kodanyata Ikanaanin ka Iperisin."
Judges1:6 Konye koker Adoni-besek; kodapata ŋes, kikamut ŋes, kotubosi ibokoro lukapolok luka akaninike ka luka akejeke da."
Judges1:7 Kotema Adonibesek atiar, “Apotu ikabakan akaisakanykaarei luatuboritai ibokoro lukapolok luka akaninikee ka luka akejekee kirarata ikeeenyamat kokwap kemesaka: kwape abu eoŋ keswamaa, keswamaki Edeke eoŋ kwaŋin.” Koyaŋaarai ŋes Yerusalem, kotwanik ŋina."
Judges1:8 Kitijioto idwe luka Yuda Yerusalem, kirumata ŋes, kodanyata lukanen kakwanis naka ekileŋ, kicweata ere."
Judges1:9 Kokau kaŋun, koloto idwe luka Yuda aitiji Ikanaanin lueboiete kakwap nakiukon, kari da naka Eŋalakimak, kapuuton da."
Judges1:10 Kolot Yuda asurokin Ikanaanin lueboiete koKeburon: (kerai ekiror loka Keburon sek Kiriat-araba:) kodanyata Sesai, ka Akiman, ka Talumai."
Judges1:11 Konyoutu kanen koloto asurokin lueboiete koDebir. (Kerai ekiror loka Debir sek Kiriat-seper.)
Judges1:12 Kotema Kaleb atiar, “Ŋol loedanyi luka Kiriat-seper, kosodi airum ere, akorakini eoŋ ŋol akokuka Akisa aimany,”"
Judges1:13 Kirum Otiniel ŋes, loarai okoku loka Kenas, onaee lodidi loka Kaleb: kokorak ŋes Akisa akokuke aimany."
Judges1:14 Kosodi kanen, kebu mamake abu ŋin kokoto ŋol ailipun papake emanikor: kodok kasigiriake, kotema Kaleb ŋes atiar, “Inyo bo ikoto ijo?”"
Judges1:15 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Koinakinai eoŋ arereŋ; naarai kiinakinit eoŋ akwap naka ari naka Eŋalakimak, koinakinai eoŋ da atanin nuka akipi.” Koinak Kaleb ŋes atanin nukokuju ka nukajesa da."
Judges1:16 Koloto idwe luka Ekenit, ekamuran loka Musa, anyoun kore loka idukudukun kidwe luka Yuda amodiŋ naka Yuda, naejai eŋalakimak naka Arad; kolototo kiboioto kituŋa."
Judges1:17 Koloto Yuda ka onaeeke Simeon, kodanyata Ikanaanin lueboiete koSepat, komudiasi cut. Komaikinai ere Koruma."
Judges1:18 Kirum Yuda Gasa da ka eikoruke, ka Asukelon ka eikoruke, ka Ekuron ka eikoruke."
Judges1:19 Kojai EJAKAIT kaYuda; kireŋea lueboienenete kakwap nakiukon; naarai mam ŋes abu kopedo aireŋear lueboienenete kaditot, naarai ajaas ŋul agalin nuka asua."
Judges1:20 Koinakis Kaleb Keburon kwape abalar Musa: kireŋea kanen odwe luuni luka Anak.
Judges1:21 Mam idwe luka Benyamin apotu kireŋcasi Iyebusin lueboiete koYerusalem; konye kiboioto Iyebusin kidwe luka Benyamin koYerusalem, kiton lolo."
Judges1:22 Kolot ekalloka Yosep da asurokin Bet-el: kojai EJAKAIT kakes.
Judges1:23 Kijuka ekalloka Yosep ituŋa airot Bet-el. (Kerai ekiror loka akwap sek Lus.)
Judges1:24 Koanyut ikarotak etuŋanan elomuni kore, kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Kiŋaiŋait, kitodikinai isio neelomarere ore, kiswamakini isio jo nukasianut.”"
Judges1:25 Abu Idtodik kes neelomarere ore, kodanyata lukorc kakwanis naka ekileŋ; konye apotu koosikis etuŋanan ŋol ka ekekike kere alosit."
Judges1:26 Kolot etuŋanan ŋol akwap naka Ikitin, koduk ere, komaik ekekiror Lus: loerai ekekiror kiton lolo."
Judges1:27 Mam Manase abu kirenea lueboiete koBet-sean ka ireriake, karaida luka Taanak ka ireriake, karaida lueboiete koDor ka ireriake, karaida lueboiete koIbuleam ka ireriake, karaida lueboiete koMegido ka ireriake: konye apotu Ikanaanin kiboioto kakwap kaŋin,"
Judges1:28 Kosodi kanen, kegogoŋor Isirael, apotu kitaraut Ikanaanin ikeswamak nakailolitoi, mam apotu kireŋeasi kes eut,"
Judges1:29 Mam Epuraim abu kirenea Ikanaanin lueboiete koGesir; konye kiboioto Ikanaanin koGeser kamakec.
Judges1:30 Mam Sebulun abu kirenea lueboiete koKitiron, karaida lueboiete koNakalol; konye apotu Ikanaanin kiboioto kamakec, koraut ikeswamak nukailolitoi."
Judges1:31 Mam Aser abu kirenea lueboiete koAko, karaida lueboiete koSidon, karaida luka Akulab, karaida luka Akisib, karaida luka Keluba, karaida luka Apik, karaida luka Rekob:"
Judges1:32 Konye apotu Iserain kiboioto kama ejaas Ikanaanin ikulepek akwap: naarai mam apotu kireneasi kes.
Judges1:33 Mam Naputali abu kirenea lueboiete koBet-semes, karaida lueboiete koBet-anat; konye kiboi kama ejaas Ikanaanin, ikulepek akwap: konye apotu lueboiete koBet-semes ka luka Bet-anak koraut ikeswamakakec nukailolitoi."
Judges1:34 Apotu Imorain koremosi idwe luka Dan akwap nakiukon: naarai mam apotu koeamakis kes abunore aditot:
Judges1:35 Konye kiboikinos Imorain moru Keres, ka Aiyalon ka Saalubim: konye kolanir akan naka ekal loka Yosep, kwaŋin koraunos ikeswamak nukailolitoi."
Judges1:36 Ageunit eikor loka Imorain kaneedokarere Akurabim, anyoun komoru, kiton kuju."
Judges2:1 Kobu emalaika loka EJAKAIT koGiligal kiton Bokim. Kotema atiar, “Abu ketolom yes koMisiri, kayaŋau da yes akwap na naabu keyapoik lukapapaakus; katema atiar, ‘Mam cut abili akaitutuket kayes:"
Judges2:2 Mam yes itutukete kaluiboiete kakwap kana; itiyanakinete itemwanakec”: konye mam yes irimarito ekaporoto: kanukinyo iswamaata ŋun?
Judges2:3 Ŋes do atemaria eoŋ da ebe, Mam ereŋeari kes kakonyenekus; eraunos bala ikukwa kosiepionokus, eraunos da idekesiokec ataeit kamakus.”"
Judges2:4 Kosodi kanen, naenerar emalaika loka EJAKAIT akiro nun mama ejaas idwe kere luka Isirael, kodelosi ituŋa, komonya."
Judges2:5 Komaikis aibois ŋin Bokim: koinakis kanen EJAKAIT asuban.
Judges2:6 Naatwaria Yosua ituŋa, apotu idwe luka lsirael koloto, ŋinitunanan airumeteke airum akwap."
Judges2:7 Apotu ituŋa kiiaanakis EJAKAIT apaarasia kere nuka Yosua, ka apaarasia kere nuka imakio luabusito adepar Yosua, luaanyunito aswam kere nakos naka EJAKAIT, naeswamakinit Isirael."
Judges2:8 Kotwana Yosua okoku loka Nun, ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT, korai loka ikar akwatat ka itomon."
Judges2:9 Kidaikis ŋes oikor loka airumeteke Timuna-keres, kakwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, kari naka agolitomei naka eronat loka Gaas."
Judges2:10 Koyanaarai atur ŋin kere mama ejaas lukapapaakee: kotupak kes atur ace namam ajeni EJAKAIT, karaida aswam naeswamakinit ŋesi Isirael."
Judges2:11 Kiswamata idwe luka Isirael nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kijaanakis Ibaalim:"
Judges2:12 Kojalata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakee, loetolomuni kes kakwap nako Misiri, kosodete atupar icedekesio, luka idekesio luka ituŋa lualukunito kes, kokukonokinos kes: kitunyunyurikisi EJAKAIT."
Judges2:13 Koialata EJAKAIT, kijaanakis Baal ka Asitarot."
Judges2:14 Kinep anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin Isirael, kiiaik kes akan naka ikaŋatak luanasete kes, kogwela kes akan naka lukasurupokec lualukunito, komam bobo epedorete abwoikin lukasurupokec."
Judges2:15 Kama alosete kere, aluikinit akan naka EJAKAIT aikonakin kes erono, kwape abalar EJAKAIT, kwape da eyapoikinitor EJAKAIT kes: kiyalonoŋoto noi."
Judges2:16 Koseu EJAKAIT ikatubok, luetajarete kes kakan naka nul kaluanasito kes."
Judges2:17 Konye mam apotu kopuput ikatubekokec, naarai apotu koloto eporo mama ejaas ieedekesio, kokukonokinos kes: kopaasi katipet korot loalosenenoto lukapapaakee, luarimarito aicorakineta nuka EJAKAIT: konye mam kes apotu kiswamata kwaŋin."
Judges2:18 Kosodi keseiki EJAKAIT kes ikatubok, koiai do EJAKAIT kekatubon, kitajar kes kakan naka Iukasurupokec apaarasia kere nuka ekatubon: naarai abu EJAKAIT kiitu eidinyikee kanuka nul kaluaroikinito kes lueticanete kes,"
Judges2:19 Konye naetwania ekatubon, kobononorete, kiswamaenenete nueroko noi adepar lukapapaakee kotoma atupit ieedekesio aijaanakin kes, ka akukonokin kes; mam apotu kopalut aswam nun karaida eponekee loka aninik."
Judges2:20 Kinep anyunyura naka EJAKAIT’ aluikin Isirael; kotema atiar, “Naarai ebuea ateker na akaitutuket naabu keeorak lukapapaakee, mam erimarito ekaporoto;"
Judges2:21 Amear kwana mam eoŋ ereŋeari kakonyenekee adio kotoma atekerin nuenyeini Yosua naatwania:
Judges2:22 tetere egimoria kes Isirael, arai erieete alosenen korot loka EJAKAIT, kwape arieitotor lukapapaakec, arai bo mam.”"
Judges2:23 Kwaŋin kinyek EJAKAIT atekerin nun, komam ireŋeari kes katipet; karaida aijaikin kes akan naka Yosua."
Judges3:1 Nu kes atekerin nuabu EJAKAIT kinyek aigimoria kes Isirael, lumam ajenunito ijiisio kere luka Kanaan;"
Judges3:2 Tetere aturio nuka idwe luka Isirael ejenunete, aisisianakin kes ejie, nun numam lem aienunito kes sek;"
Judges3:3 Kes lu, ijaka ikany luka Ipilisitian, Ikanaanin kere, ka Isidonin, ka Ikibin lueboiete komoru Lebanon, ageun komoru Baal-kerumon kiton neelomarere Kamat,"
Judges3:4 Araas kesi aigimoria Isirael, ajenun arai erimarete aicorakineta nuka EJAKAIT, nuecorakinit lukapapaakec kama ka Musa."
Judges3:5 Kiboioto idwe luka Isirael kama ejaas Ikanaanin; Ekitit, ka Emorait, ka Eperisit, ka Ekibit, ka Eyebusit:"
Judges3:6 Komanyata adwekec, kokorakis odwekee adwekec, kijaanakis da idekesiokec."
Judges3:7 Kiswamata idwe luka Isirael nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kimurwokisi kes EJAKAIT Edekekee, kijaanakis Ibaalim ka Asiterot."
Judges3:8 Kanuka nun kinep anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin Isirael, kogwela kes akan naka Kusanrisataim ekabaka loka Mesopotamia:"
Judges3:9 Kemonyata idwe luka Isirael mama ejai EJAKAIT, abu EJAKAIT kitonyoik idwe luka Isirael eketajaran, loetajari kes, ŋes Otiniel okoku loka Kenas, onae lodidi leka Kaleb."
Judges3:10 Kobunok emoyo loka EJAKAIT ŋes, kotubok Isirael; koloma ejie, kijaik EJAKAIT Kusanrisataim eka baka loka Mesopotamia akanike: kipiko ŋesi Kusan-risataim."
Judges3:11 Kiyenu akwap ikar akaisaoŋon. Kotwana Otiniel okoku loka Kenas.
Judges3:12 Kiswamata bobo idwe luka Isirael nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: kitogogoŋ EJAKAIT Egulon ekabaka loka Moab asurokin Isirael, naarai apotu kiswamata nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Judges3:13 Kotukok mamake idwe luka Amon ka Amalek; kolot kodany Isirael, kirumata ere loka idukudukun."
Judges3:14 Kiiaanakis idwe luka Isirael Egulon eka baka loka Moab ikar itomon ka lukanykauni,"
Judges3:15 Konye kemonyata idwe luka Isirael mama ejai EJAKAIT, abu EJAKAIT kitonyoik kes eketajaran, Ekud okoku loka Gera, Ebenyamit, etuŋanan lokediany: kiiukariata ŋes idwe luka Isirael kainakinet mama ejai Egulon ekabaka loka Moab,"
Judges3:16 Abu Ekud kotatau ekileŋ loekwaka iwaitin iarei, loka aojau naka ekubit; koenik toma anapitoke, otulike lokoteten."
Judges3:17 Kijaik ŋesi Egulon ekabaka loka Moab ainakinet: ido atumit Egulon noi.
Judges3:18 Kedau ainakin ainakinet, abu kotwara ituŋa luadakito ainakinet."
Judges3:19 Konye abu ŋesi kobonu kama ejaas amor nuikee nuedunyas ka Giligal, kotema atiar, “Kainunit akirot nakaiyeiyea, wu ekabaka.” Kotema atiar, “Kililinata.” Kolomasi nul kere luabwoete kaneaiai ŋesi."
Judges3:20 Kobu Ekud neajai ŋesi; eboie ŋesi bon kagolake nakokuju. Kotema Ekud atiar, “Kainunit jo akirot naka Edeke.” Konyou ŋesi koicoloŋoke."
Judges3:21 Korio Ekud akekan nakokediany kout ekileŋ kotulike lokoteten, kieum akekoik:"
Judges3:22 Koloma akulep da atupakin ekileŋ; korapia asiepai ekileŋ, naarai mam abu kout ekileŋ kakoikike; kipelun kopur."
Judges3:23 Kosodi Ekud alomar adapao, kogolok ikekia luka agola, kigoik kes."
Judges3:24 Kedau ŋesi alomar, kopotu ikebulesin; koanyut, ido koany, egoikino ikekia luka agola; kotemasi atiar, “Abeit imukorit akekeje kagolake naelilim.”"
Judges3:25 Kidarata aitodol naerumiata ileic; ido koany, mam abu konaa ikekia luka agola; kosodete do kesi alemun elacet, koŋaasi kes; ido koany, atwanit ejakaitikee kibirokina kwap."
Judges3:26 Koku Ekud eroko kesi idarete, kotubor kamor nuikee, kokuia Seira."
Judges3:27 Kosodi kanen kedolu ŋesi, abu kokutak arupepe kakwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, kijesaros idwe luka Isiracl kaŋes kakwap nakiukon, kiŋarenikinite ŋesi kes."
Judges3:28 Kotema kes atiar, “Kotupunai; naarai eiaiki EJAKAIT lukasurupokus Imoabin akanikus.” Kotupasi ŋes, kirumata idoketa luka Yorodan luebeete Moab, mam apotu koeamakis idiotuijanan atubor."
Judges3:29 Kodanyata kesi luka Imoabin kapak kaŋin ituŋa kwape ilukumin itomon, ŋolitunanan lokaburon, ka nolttunanan loetitiŋ; mam ediotuŋanan abu koku."
Judges3:30 Kitononok akan naka Isirael Moab kapaaran kaŋin, Kiyen akwap ikar akaisakanykauni."
Judges3:31 Akauloke koiau Samugar okoku loka Anat, loadanyi ituŋa akwat akanykape luka Ipilisitian kemaear lokimonin: abu ŋesi da kitajar Isirael."
Judges4:1 Kiyatakis bobo idwe luka Isirael aswam nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kedau Ekud atwanare."
Judges4:2 Kogwela kes EJAKAIT akan naka Yabin ekabaka loka Kanaan, lokeyait koKasor; ekapolon loka ajoreke ŋes Sisera, lokiboie koKaroset loka Imo."
Judges4:3 Komonyata idwe luka Isirael mama ejai EJAKAIT; naarai keiaas kagalin akwat akanykaoŋon nuka asua; konara noi idwe luka Isirael ikar akaisaarei.
Judges4:4 Kapaarasia kanun Debora, anabi, aberu naka Lapidot, ŋes atubonokini Isirael."
Judges4:5 Kiboienenei da kokwap kedukut loka Debora kidin Rama ka Bet-el kakwap nakiukon naka Epuraim: kolosenenete idwe luka Isirael mamakeŋ atubonokinio.
Judges4:6 Kijuka konyarau Barak okoku loka Abinoam anyoun koKedes-Naputali, kobala ebe, “Mere kicorakinit EJAKAIT Edeke loka Isirael atiar, ‘Kobea moru Tabor, koyana da ituŋa ilukumin itomon lukodwe luka Naputali, kodwe da luka Sebulun?"
Judges4:7 Eoŋ da eriuni mama ijai kocor Kison Sisera lokapolon loka ajore naka Yabin, nepepe kakegalin ka ekekodet; eoŋ da ejaikini ŋes akanikon.’”"
Judges4:8 Kobala Barak ŋes ebe, “Arai kiupar ijo keoŋ, alosi; konye arai mam jo kiupar keoŋ, mam alosi.”"
Judges4:9 Kobala ŋesi ebe, “Abeit kiupar kajo, konye alosit naikoto alosit mam eraun naka akoniibuses, naarai egwelari EJAKAIT Sisera akan naka aberu.” Konyou Debora, kouparos kaBarak oKedes,"
Judges4:10 Konyarau Barak Sebulun ka Naputali kotukokinos oKedes; kodokasi ikiliok ilukumin itomon neejai: kodoka Debora da kaŋes.
Judges4:11 Ketiakara Keber Ekenit kama ejaas Ikenitin, kes idwe luka Kobab, ekamuran loka Musa, kibubukinite ekewema olua loka Saananim die kaKedes."
Judges4:12 Kolimokinai Sisera kwape kedokaria Barak okoku loka Abinoam moru Tabor.
Judges4:13 Kotukonok Sisera akegalin kere, agalin nuka asua akwat akanykaoŋon, ka ituŋa kere Iukejaatar, anyoun koKaroset loka Imo kiton oeor Kison."
Judges4:14 Kobala Debora Barak ebe, “Konyou; naarai na ŋes apaaran naekorakinia EJAKAIT Sisera akanikon: mere EJAKAIT kinarenikinit jo?” Kosodi kijesun Barak komoru Tabor, kotupakis ituŋa ilukumin itomon,"
Judges4:15 Kitubur EJAKAIT Sisera ka akegalin kere ka aioreke da kere kakwanis naka ekileŋ kakonyen nuka Barak; kodoku Sisera kagalike koker kakeje.
Judges4:16 Konye kotupak Barak agalin ka ajore kiton Karoset loka Imo; koŋianak aiore kere naka Sisera akwanis naka ekileŋ; komamei etuŋanan loabu kideun,"
Judges4:17 Konye koker Sisera kakeje kodol owema loka Yael aberu naka Keber Ekenit: naarai kinapakina Yabin ekabaka loka Kasor kekek loka Keber Ekenit.
Judges4:18 Koloma Yael airiamun kaSisera, kobala ŋes ebe, “Kopau, ejakait, kopau koloma togoka; sirikiyoŋ.” Kopaa mamake koloma toma owema, kimuko ŋes kakapet."
Judges4:19 Kobala ŋes ebe, “Kenainait ae adisikipi kamat; naarai kaiakit akur.” Kopuko eseme loka akile, kitamat ŋes, kosodi kimuko,"
Judges4:20 Kolimok ŋesi ya ebe, “Kobwo kokek loka ewema, kosodi arai kebu ituŋanan kere kiinit jo atiar, ‘Ejai ediotuŋanan ne?’ kotema ebe, ‘Emamei.’’’"
Judges4:21 Kosodi kolem Yael aberu naka Keber eloit loka ewema, kolem da anyul kakekan kolot ecedi, kibubuk eloit orceteke, kipelor kiton alup: naarai kejotoi aio nuipu; kiilor kotwana."
Judges4:22 Ido koany, kibwapite Barak Sisera, kolom Yael aisiriamaar ŋes, kolimok ebe, “Bia, ketodik etuŋanan loimoot ijo.” Kobu mama ejai; ido koany, koperi Sisera etwanit, kidiria da eloit koreeteke."
Judges4:23 Kwaŋin kidono Edeke Yabin ekabaka loka Kanaan kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael kapaaran kaŋin.
Judges4:24 Kiyatanakin akan naka idwe luka Isirael aipikor Yabin ekabaka loka Kanaan, aitodol nakemudiariata Yabin ekabaka loka Kanaan."
Judges5:1 Kosodete Debora ka Barak okoku loka Abinoam ayoore kapaaran kaŋin ebe,"
Judges5:2 “Naarai apotu ikeŋarenok kinarenikis Isirael, Naarai apotu ituŋa kolunakinos ketau kaloejok, Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT!"
Judges5:3 “Kopuputu, yes ikabakan; kitoikisi aki, yes ikapolok; Ayeikini eoŋ EJAKAIT: Ayei aiturit EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael."
Judges5:4 “EJAKAIT, nailosio koSeir, Nailomunia komanikor loka Edom, Abu akwap komaran, kodou akuj da, Eebo, apotu idouon kitodoutu akipi,"
Judges5:5 Apotu ironan koleleata kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, Ijo da Sinai kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael."
Judges5:6 “Kapaarasia nuka Samugar okoku loka Anat, Kapaarasia nuka Yael, amameete ituŋa korotin lukapolok, Etorito ikalotok orotin luekudukudo."
Judges5:7 Apotu ikayaitok konanata koIsirael, apotu konan ata, Aitodol naanyounio eoŋ Debora, Naanyounio eoŋ toto kotoma Isirael."
Judges5:8 Apotu koseut idekesio lukitetet; Kosodi ejie ajaun orutei: Atakanu kereka ebuku arai akwara Kaneajaas ilukumin akaisaoŋon luka Isirael?
Judges5:9 Eomit ekatau nuka ikayaitok luka Isirael, Luapotu kiiaikinos ketau loejok kotuna: Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT."
Judges5:10 “Kinerata ŋun, yes luibwanenito asigirian nul-akwanak, Yes luibojete komukekan luejok noi, Ka yes da luilosete korot."
Judges5:11 Itatamete aswamisio nuedolito nuka EJAKAIT, Aswamisio nuedolito nuka ayaiteke kotoma Isirael, Kolwana eeelet loka ikagumak, kaiboisio nuewokere akipi. Kosodete ituŋa luka EJAKAIT alosit orutei."
Judges5:12 “Kokweny, kokweny, Debora; Kokweny, kokweny, koye ekosio! Konyou, Barak, kijoreo lukijoreunokon, Ŋo okoku loka Abinoam."
Judges5:13 Kosodete luedeuna luka ikapolok ka ituŋa aiiesun; Abu EJAKAIT kijesun kanukan asurokin ikagogoŋok,"
Judges5:14 Kopotu kotoma Epuraim ŋul luejai aliasitikee toma Amalek; Kitupito jo, Benyamin; kotunakon; Kopotu ikayaitok kotoma Makir, Ka nul da luetinito ebela loka ejakait kotoma Sebulun."
Judges5:15 Kojaas ikapolok luka Isakar kaDebora; Kwape ajaar Isakar, ajai Barak kwaŋin; Komotaros aditot kakejeke, Kalelesia nuka Reuben Abu kojaun ainerun naepol naka itauon."
Judges5:16 Kanukinyo ibu kiboikinor anukia nuka amerekekin, Aipup alamarun nuekutakinio isipanin? Kalelesia nuka Reuben Abu kojaun ainerun naepol naka itauon."
Judges5:17 Abu Gilead kiboikin okekwa loka Yorodan: Dan da, kanukinyo asalakinia ŋesi ameerin? Kiboikin Aser kopala kariri naka aŋolol, Kiboikin ociletake."
Judges5:18 Arai Sebulun etuŋat loabu kijaik aijarakee kiton atwanare, Naputali da, kaiboisio nuiceleleete nuka ais."
Judges5:19 “Kopotu ikabakan kojioto; Kosodete ikabakan luka Kanaan ejie, koTaanak kariri naka akipi nuka Megido: Mam apotu kodumut ameda naka apesan."
Judges5:20 Apotu lukokuju kojioto, Apotu aacer kitijioto Sisera kotoma alositokee."
Judges5:21 Abu ecor Kison kolelea kes cut, Ecor ŋol lokolosek, ecor Kison. Wu ekatau, kolot kagogoŋ!"
Judges5:22 “Kosodete imageger luka ibalasin adamac Kanuka atakar, atakar naka ikagogonokokec."
Judges5:23 Abala emalaika loka EJAKAIT ebe, Kikenoto yesi Meros, Kikenoto yesi noi luibojete kotomake; Naarai mam apotu koponito aiŋarakin EJAKAIT, Aiŋarakin EJAKAIT aitiji ikagogoŋok."
Judges5:24 “Tsirerenio Yael adepar aŋor, Aberu naka Keber Ekenit, Isirerenio ŋes adepar aŋor kotoma oweman."
Judges5:25 Abu kilip ŋes akipi, koinak akile; Abu koinu ŋes akinyet katuba naejok,"
Judges5:26 Abu kitin eloit kakekan, Kitin da anyul naka ekeswaman kakanike nakoteten; Kibubuk Sisera kanyulike, kibubuk akonke, Eebo, abu kicum aipelor ereeteke."
Judges5:27 Abu kokukum kakejeke, kibiror, koper: Abu kokukum kakejeke, kibiror: Neakukumio, nepenen ebirokin kotwana."
Judges5:28 “Abu ŋin kireik kadirisa, komony, Komony toto naka Sisera kadirisa ebe, ‘Kanukinyo eyapia akegali abunore? Kanukinyo erumorotor akokoron nuka agalike?’"
Judges5:29 Apotu akenor nukacoa kobonokis ŋes, Eebo, abu ŋesi alopet Koboŋok ebe,"
Judges5:30 Mam kes edumunito lunatan, mam kes ekorokoroto lunatan? Ŋinitunanan apese, arai bo apesur aarei; Sisera lunatan luka igoen luiculatai, Lunatan luka igoen luiculatai luesonyitai, Luka igoen luiculatai luesonyitai iwaitin kere, komurisina luka lunatan?’"
Judges5:31 “Wu EJAKAIT kooliosi do lukasurupokon kere kwaŋin! Konye kosubito nul lueminasi ŋes bala akoloŋ naelomaria kotoma agogoŋuke.” Kiyen akwap ikar akaisaoŋon.
Judges6:1 Kiswamata idwe luka Isirael nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: kijaik EJAKAIT kes akan naka Midian ikar ikanykaarei.
Judges6:2 Kipiko akan naka Midian Isirael: ido kanuka Midian kiswamaut idwe luka Isirael anopisia nuejaas oroŋan, ka abuai, ka abwasia nuegogon,"
Judges6:3 Kosodi do kedau Isirael aiye ikinyom, kopotu Imidianin, ka Imalekain, ka idwe lukokide; kopotu asurokin kes."
Judges6:4 Kidukuroto asurokin kes, komudiasi amio naka akwap, kiton Gasa, mam apotu kideut inyamat kolsirael, karaida amerekek, karaida emoŋ, karaida asigiria."
Judges6:5 Naarai aponito kibarenikec, ka iwemanakee, kopotu bala emaase kanuka aipues; komam kes ka ikaalaikec imarunos: kolomut akwap amudiar ŋes."
Judges6:6 Kitisil Midian Isirael; komonyata idwe luka Isirael mama ejai EJAKAIT.
Judges6:7 Kosodi kanen, kemonyata idwe luka Isirael mama ejai EJAKAIT kanuka Imidianin,"
Judges6:8 Kijukak EJAKAIT idwe luka Isirael ena bi: kotema ŋol kes atiar, “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, Abu kayau yes koMisiri, ketolom da kotogo loka ebulesene;"
Judges6:9 Kayu yes kakan naka Imisirian, kakan da naka nul kere lukiroikinito yes, kerenea kes kakonyenekus, kainak yes akecekwap;"
Judges6:10 Katema yes atiar, ‘Eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke; sirikiyoŋata idekesio luka Imorain, luibojete yesi kakwapukec’: konye mam yes irimarito ekaporoto.”"
Judges6:11 Kobu emalaika loka EJAKAIT kiboikin kwap olua loajai Opura, loarai loka Yoas Ebieserait: ecomi okokuke Gideon alos kaeues naka ebino, tetere ibwai itia Imidianin."
Judges6:12 Kitakanikin emalaika loka EJAKAIT ŋes, kotema ŋes atiar, “Ejai EJAKAIT kajo, ijo etuŋanan lokirigi loititin.”"
Judges6:13 Kotema Gideon ŋes atiar, “Wu ekajakait, arai ejai EJAKAIT kasio, kanukinyo do kidoikinioto sio nu kere? Ai bo ejaas akeswamisio kere nukaumokin nuapotu lukapapaakosi kolimonokis sio ebe, ‘Mere kereka EJAKAIT kiyanauni sio koMisiri?’ Konye kwana kicaka EJAKAIT sio, kiiaik sio akan naka Midian.”"
Judges6:14 Kite EJAKAIT ŋes, kotema atiar, “Kolot kagogonukon na, kitaiar Isirael kakan naka Midian: mere eoŋ keiuka jo?”"
Judges6:15 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Wu EJAKAIT, ekonakini ai etaiari Isirael? Koany, erai ekakek loicana noi kotoma Manase, eoŋ da adite noi kokalloka papaka.”"
Judges6:16 Kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Abeit ajaun kajo, iari Imidianin bala ediopetunanan.”"
Judges6:17 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Arai adumunit asianut kakonyenekon, kitodikinai aanyunet naitogogoni ebe ijo ŋopeŋol kinera keoŋ,"
Judges6:18 Kenainait, sirikinyou kane, aitodol naabonunio, ayaŋaun ainakineteka, aibwaikin akonyenekon.” Kotema atiar, “Edareuni aitodol naibonunio ijo.”"
Judges6:19 Koloma Gideon, kitemok ikalol, ka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi luka epa loka akiria; kibwaik akiriŋ odita, kibwaik da acece amot, koinu kes kokwap kelua, koinak ŋes."
Judges6:20 Kotema emalaika loka EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Kolem akiriŋ ka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi, kidokok kes amoru na, kobukok acece.” Kiswama ŋesi kwaŋin."
Judges6:21 Kosodi emalaika loka EJAKAIT aikeun ebelake loetinit, kotiroria akiriŋ ka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi; kolom akim kamoru, konyam akim akiriŋ ka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi; konyou emalaika loka EJAKAIT kakonyeneke,"
Judges6:22 Koany Gideon ebe ŋes emalaika loka EJAKAIT; kotema Gideon atiar, “Wu okwe, EJAKAIT Edeke! Naarai aany emalaika loka EJAKAIT keteosi.”"
Judges6:23 Kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Kinapakin; sirikuriana; mam jo itwani.”"
Judges6:24 Kosodi Gideon adukokin EJAKAIT etem nen, komaik ŋes Yawe-salom: kiton lolo eroko ejai Opura loka Ibieserain."
Judges6:25 Kosodi kanen akuare nin, kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Koyana emoŋ loka papakon, ka emoŋ lokiareit loka ikar ikanykaarei, kotiyaik etem loka Baal loejai papakon, Kojep Asera loidunyas kaŋes."
Judges6:26 Ido kodukok EJAKAIT Ekonideke etem kuiu kabwas kana, kopone kaloejok, koyana emoŋ lokiareit, koinak ainakinet naicweio kakito nuka Asera loiiepi.”"
Judges6:27 Kosodi Gideon ayaŋaar ituŋa itomon kotoma ikejaanakinakake, kiswama kwape abalar EJAKAIT ŋes: kosodi naarai akuriana ŋesi ekal loka papake ka ituŋa lukore, mam abu kopedo aswam nun paaran, kiswama kuare."
Judges6:28 Kenyoutu ituŋa lukore tupuruc sek, koany, atiyaikina etem loka Baal, Asera da loedunyas kaŋes aiepitai, ka emoŋ lokiareit aponi koinakinai otem loadukitoi."
Judges6:29 Kotemanaros ebe, “Iŋai bo iswamat akirot na?” Kosodete kenicata, kinitanasi da, kotemasi atiar, “Gideon okoku loka Yoas ŋes iswamat nin.”"
Judges6:30 Kosodete ituŋa lukore atemar Yoas atiar, “Kitolom okokukon, kotwana: naarai atiyaiki etem loka Baal, naarai aiep da Asera loedunyas kaŋes.”"
Judges6:31 Kotema Yoas kere luabwoikinito ŋes atiar, “Irabakinete yesi Baal? Arai bo itaiarete yesi ŋes? Ŋolloirabakini ŋes, eario eroko atupurue: arai erai edeke, kirabakin bon, naarai atiyaiki ituŋanan eketem.”"
Judges6:32 Komaik do ŋes kapaaran kaŋin Yerubaal, ebe, Kirabata Baal kaŋes, naarai atiyaiki etemuke."
Judges6:33 Kosodete Imidianin kere ka Imalekain ka idwe lukokide atukonokin; kotuboros, kidukuroto aditot naka Yesereel."
Judges6:34 Konye kodoik emoyo loka EJAKAIT Gideon; kokut arupepe; kotukokin Abieser aitup ŋes.
Judges6:35 Kijuka ikiyakia anatar Manase kere; kotukokinos kesi da aitup ŋes: kijuka ikiyakia mama ejai Aser, ka Sebulun, ka Naputali da; kopotu nul airiamun kakes,"
Judges6:36 Kotema Gideon Edeke atiar, “Arai itajari ijo Isirael kakanika, kwape ibu kotemaria."
Judges6:37 Koany, ebwaikini emukule loka aiul opeial; arai keiaunos akopyo omukule bon, kookito alup kere, ajenuni do eoŋ ebe itajari ijo Isirael kakanika, kwape ibu kotemaria.”"
Judges6:38 Koiaun kwaŋin: naarai abu ŋesi kodilok anyoun tupuruc, konunuk emukule, koeu akopyo komukule, kilelebunos akip atany."
Judges6:39 Kotema Gideon Edeke atiar, “Kinyek anvunyurakon ainepun aluikin eoŋ, mere kener irwan na atipet bon: kenainait, kegimo irwan na bon kemukule; koonite do emukule bon, konye koiaunos akopyo alup kere.”"
Judges6:40 Kiswama Edeke kwaŋin akuare nin: naarai aonit emukule bon, konye kojaas akopyo alup kere."
Judges7:1 Kosodi Yerubaal, ŋes Gideon, ka ituŋa kere luajaas kaŋes adilokin anyoun, kidukuroto ariri naka atan naka Karod: koiaas iidukurun luka Midian arikee naka agolitomei, ariri naka eukot loka More, aditot,"
Judges7:2 Kotema EJAKAIT Gideon atiar, “Ipu noi ituŋa luijaatar ijo, eoŋ ainakin Imidianin akanikee, kinyek Isirael aiturokinor eoŋ ebe, ‘Akakan alopet ŋes ketaiar.’"
Judges7:3 Aso do kolot, kolimo kaki nuka ituŋa ebe, ‘Ŋol loekuriana loemarani, kobono konyou da komoru Gilead.’’’ Kobonosi kotuna ituŋa ilukumin akaisaarei ka luarei; kosalata ilukumin itomon."
Judges7:4 Kotema EJAKAIT Gideon atiar, “Eroko ituŋa ipu noi; koyana kes akipi, egimori eoŋ kes kaŋina kanukon: ejaun do ebe, loatemari eoŋ ebe, ‘Ŋol euparos kajo,’ Ŋopeŋol iuparotor; loatemari eoŋ ebe, ‘Mam ŋol euparos kajo,’ mam ŋol iuparotor.”"
Judges7:5 Kwaŋin koyanau ituŋa akipi: kotema EJAKAIT Gideon atiar, “Ŋolituŋanan loemasi akipi kanaiepeke, kwape emasia ekiŋok, igitari ŋol; ka ŋol da loekukokin aimat.”"
Judges7:6 Etiai loka ŋul kaluamasete bala ekiŋok, luebwaikinete akanin aitukekee emwaasi akwat auni: konye ituŋa luce kere apotu kokukokinos aimat akipi."
Judges7:7 Kotoma EJAKAIT Gideon atiar, “Ketajari jo kituna akwat auni luamasete bala ekiŋok, eiaikini Imidianin akanikon: koloto do ŋinituŋanan aiboisike.”"
Judges7:8 Kitiijata do ituŋa inyamat kakaninikec, ka arupepenekee: kijuka ituŋa kere luka Isirael ninitunanan owemake, konye abu kitasal nul akwat auni: kojaas iidukurun luka Midian kwapuken aditot."
Judges7:9 Kosodi kanen, kakuare kaŋin kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Konyou, kijesar oidukurun; naarai ejaik kes akanikon."
Judges7:10 Konye arai ikuriana ijo aijesar, kijesaros ijo ka Pura ekejaanakinanikon oidukurun:"
Judges7:11 Ipupuni do nuineras kesi; akaulo kanun egogoŋioros akonikanin aijesar oidukurun.” Kosodi ŋesi ka Pura ekejaanakinanike aijesar kiton otuŋa luakapakina ejie luajaas osaŋe loka iidukurun.
Judges7:12 Koperete Imidianin ka Imalekain ka idwe kere lukokide kaditot bala emaase kanuka aipues; komam ikaalaikec imarunos, kwape asine naejai ariri naka aŋolol kanuka aipues,"
Judges7:13 Kebu Gideon, koany, ajai etuŋanan loalimonokini oupake airujasit, kobala ebe, “Koany, eruia airujasit, ido koany, bala abu aluŋuret naka emugati loka asairi kikokorun oidukurun luka Midian, kodol owema, kocam ŋes kibiror, kobuburia ŋes, koper ewema.”"
Judges7:14 Koboŋok oupake ŋes ebe, “Mere nin ieebore dimarai ekileŋ loka Gideon okoku loka Yoas, etuŋanan loka Isirael: ejaiki EJAKAIT Midian ka ajore kere akanike.”"
Judges7:15 Kosodi kepupu Gideon inerai airujasit ka apolouke, abu koma Edeke; kobono oidukurun luka Isirael, kotema atiar, “Konyoutu; naarai ejaiki EJAKAIT aiore naka Midian akaninikus.”"
Judges7:16 Kotiak ituŋa akwat auni korioijeta iuni, kititin kes kere arupepen ka amoti nuamameete iboro kotoma, kibwaik akalasia nuenokete toma amoti."
Judges7:17 Kotema kes atiar, “Kosesenai eoŋ, kiswamata kwape kwaŋin; ido koany, naadolio aiboisio nukosane loka iidukurun, kosodi kwape eswamaa eoŋ, iswamaete yesi da kwape kwaŋin."
Judges7:18 Naakutakinia arupepe, eoŋ ka ituŋa kere luejaas keoŋ, ikutakinete yesi da arupepen kanoliwai kere loka iidukurun, kobalas ebe, ‘Luka EJAKAIT ka luka Gideon da.’’’"
Judges7:19 Kwaŋin kodolut Gideon ka ituŋa akwatat luajaas kaŋes aibois nakosane loka iidukurun kageunet naka akwenyunet nakokidin, atipet napekedaut aijulakin ikedarak: kokutata arupepen, kobwanabwanata amoti nuetinito kakaninikec."
Judges7:20 Kokutata irioneta iuni arupepen, kobwanabwanata amoti, kitinata akalasia nuenokete kakaninikee nukokediany, ka arupepen kakaninikec nukoteten akusia: kiworoto ebe, “Ekileŋ loka EJAKAIT ka loka Gideen da.”"
Judges7:21 Kobwaata kesi ninitunanan kaiboisike alukun iidukurun: koker ajore kere; kocelata, kitekerata kes."
Judges7:22 Kokutata arupepen akwat auni, abu EJAKAIT koinak ekileŋ loka ninitunanan aitiji oupake, ka ajore kere: koker ajore kiton Bet-sita loebei Serera, kiton oikor loka Abel-mekola, loidunyas kaTabat."
Judges7:23 Kotukonokinos ituŋa luka Isirael kotoma Naputali, kotoma Aser, kotoma Manase kere da, kodapata Midian,"
Judges7:24 Kijuka Gideon ikiyakia akwap kere nakiukon naka Epuraim, kobala ebe, “Kopotu asurokin Midian, kogeikis kes airum akipi, kiton Bet-bara, ka Yorodan da.” Kotukokinos ituŋa kere luka Epuraim, kirumata akipi kiton Bet-bara, ka Yorodan."
Judges7:25 Koyanaasi ikapolok iarei luka Midian, Oreb ka Seeb; koarakis Oreb moru Oreb, koarakis Seeb acues nakebino naka Seeb, kodapata Midian: koyaut akwes nuka Oreb ka Seeb mama ejai Gideon okekwa loka Yorodan."
Judges8:1 Kotemasi ituŋa luka Epuraim ŋes atiar, “Kanukinyo kikonakinia ijo sio kwana, mam ibu konyarau sio nailosio aitiji Midian?” Kitonolo pata ŋes noi."
Judges8:2 Kotema kes atiar, “Eswama anyoika adepar yes? Mere ejokuka luideunos luka imusabibun luka Epuraim adepar luedenete luka Abieser?"
Judges8:3 Ejaiki Edeke ikapolok luka Midian, Oreb ka Seeb, akanikus: anyoika nuabu eoŋ kapedo aswam adepar yes?” Kosodi konyet anyunyurakec aiŋoŋar, kedau ŋesi einer nun."
Judges8:4 Kobu Gideon Yorodan, kodoka ŋesi ka ituŋa akwat auni luajaas kaŋes, kopasito, konye kodapito."
Judges8:5 Kotema ŋesi ituŋa luka Sukot atiar, “Kenainait, koinakisi ituŋa lukatupito eoŋ imugatin; naarai epasito, ido adapit eoŋ Seba ka Salumuna, ikabakan luka Midian.”"
Judges8:6 Kotemasi ikapolok luka Sukot atiar, “Ejaas kereka akanin nuka Seba ka Salumuna kwana akanikon, tape sio kiinakini ajorekon imugatin?”"
Judges8:7 Kotema Gideon atiar, “Kanuka ŋun kedau EJAKAIT aijaikin Seba ka Salumuna akanika, apoopoi eoŋ akusiwat kikukwa luka amodiŋ ka ikodokodo.”"
Judges8:8 Konyou kanen kolot Penuel, kiner kakes kopone kanol; kobonokis ŋes ituŋa luka Penuel kwape abonokinioto ituŋa luka, Sukot,"
Judges8:9 Kotema ŋesi ituŋa luka Penuel atiar, “Naaboŋunio kainapakin, atiyaikin etogo lo loeoja noi.”"
Judges8:10 Ajaas Seba ka Salumuna Karikor, ka ajoresiokec kakes, ituŋa ilukumin itomon ka lukany, nul kere luedeuna luka ajore kere naka idwe lukokide: naarai apotu ituŋa ilukumin akwatat ka akaisaarei luautunito ikileŋa kotwakata."
Judges8:11 Kolot Gideon korot loka nul kalueboiete koweman kari nakokide naka Noba ka Yogibeka, kodany ajore; naarai etumoro ajore."
Judges8:12 Kokerata Seba ka Salumuna; kodapa kes; kikam ikabakan iarei luka Midian, Seba ka Salumuna, kitubur aiore kere."
Judges8:13 Koboŋ Gideon okoku loka Yoas kojie anyoun kaneedokarere Keres.
Judges8:14 Kikam ŋesi ekatumunan lokituna luka Sukot, kinit ŋes: kitejen ŋes ikapolok luka Sukot ka imakioke, ituŋa akaisakanykaarei ka lukanykaarei."
Judges8:15 Kobu neajaas ituŋa luka Sukot, kotema atiar, “Koanyutu Seba ka Salumuna, lukisekelooto yesi eoŋ ebe, Ejaas kereka akanin nuka Seba ka Salumuna akanikon, tape sio kiinakini ikonituŋa luepasito emugati?”"
Judges8:16 Koyana imakio lukore, ka ikukwa luka amodiŋ ka ikodokodo, kopoopoia ituŋa luka Sukot,"
Judges8:17 Kotiyaik etogo loeoia noi loka Penuel, koar rtuna lukore."
Judges8:18 Kosodi ŋesi atemar Seba ka Salumuna atiar, “Aputos biai ituŋa luiarete yesi koTabor?” Kobonokis ebe, “Kwape iputor ijo, kesi da kwaŋin; ŋinituŋanan kakesi aputos kidwe luka ekabaka.”"
Judges8:19 Kotema atiar, “Araas kesi ikainaean, odwe luka totoka; kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, arai kitajarito yesi kes, ti mam eoŋ kaar yes.”"
Judges8:20 Kotema ŋesi Yeter ekiyaike atiar, “Konyou, koar kes.” Konye mam abu ekatumunan kout ekekileŋ: naarai akuriana, naarai ariŋa erai ekatumunan."
Judges8:21 Kosodete Seba ka Salumuna atemar ebe, “Konyou ijo, koar sio: naarai kwape ejaar etuŋanan, akegogoŋ da ejai kwaŋin.” Konyou Gideon, koar Seba ka Salumuna, koyana apelia nuajaas omurisina luka ikaalaikee."
Judges8:22 Kosodete ituŋa luka Isirael atemar Gideon atiar, “Koyaai ijo sio, ijo ka okokukon, ka okoku loka okokukon da: naarai kitajar ijo sio kakan naka Midian.”"
Judges8:23 Kotema Gideon kes atiar, “Mam akoto ayait yes, karaida okokuka ayait yes: EJAKAIT ŋes kiyai yes.”"
Judges8:24 Kotema Gideon kes atiar, “Ejai naakoto ailip yes, koinakinai ninitunanan itetioke lunatuna.” (Naarai ajaas kes itetio, naarai araas Isimaelin.)"
Judges8:25 Kobonokis ebe, “Kiinakini kes ketau kaloejok.” Kopesikis egoe, koeakanakis nen ninituŋanan itetioke lunatuna."
Judges8:26 Alaniru naka itetio luka esabu luabu kilip arai isekelin elukumit ka akwat akanykaarei luka esabu; kogelara apelia, ka luidelos, ka inapen lumugeik luanapito ikabakan luka Midian, kogelara da irikoi Iuajaas omurisina luka ikaalaikec,"
Judges8:27 Kiswamau Gideon kes epod, kibwaik oreke, Opura: kolot Isirael kere ŋina eporo mamakeŋ: koraun do atacit mama ejai Gideon ka ekaleke."
Judges8:28 Kwaŋin kitononokata idwe luka Isirael Midian kakonyenekee, mama bobo apotu kikeut akecekwes. Kiyen akwap kapaarasia nuka Gideon."
Judges8:29 Kolot Yerubaal okoku loka Yoas kiboikin togoke.
Judges8:30 Ajaas Gideon odwe luaurie ŋesi akaisakanykaarei: naarai epu ŋes aijor.
Judges8:31 Abu akebusiat naajai Sekem kourik ŋes esapat, komaik ekekiror Abimelek."
Judges8:32 Kotwana Gideon okoku loka Yoas kedau aibut ejok, kidaikinai ates naka Yoas papake, toma Opura loka Ibieserain."
Judges8:33 Kosodi atipet ketwana Gideon, kibelokinos idwe luka Isirael bobo, koloto eporo mama ejaas Ibaalim, kitaraut Baal-berit edekekec,"
Judges8:34 Mam idwe luka Isirael apotu kiitut EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, loayuun kes kakanin nuka lukasurupokec kere kanoliwai:"
Judges8:35 Karaida aikonakin kasianut ekalloka Yerubaal, ŋes Gideon, kwape ejaatar nukajokak kere nuabu ŋesi kikonak Isirael."
Judges9:1 Kolot Abimelek okoku loka Yerubaal Sekem mama ejaas iinacan luka totoke, kiner kakes, ka ekek kere loka ekal loka papa loka totoke, atiar,"
Judges9:2 “Keŋaiŋaito, kinerata kaki kere nuka ituŋa luka Sekem ebe, ‘Arai kiiokikinito yes odwe kere luka Yerubaal luimwaasi ituŋa akaisakanykaarei, ayaite yes, arai bo ediopet ayaite yes?’ Kiitutu da ebe arai eoŋ akoitikus ka akirinikus.”"
Judges9:3 Kinerata iinaean luka totoke nuken aki kere nuka ituŋa luka Sekem akiro ŋun kere: kokotos ikecetauon atupar Abimelek; naarai abalas cbe, “Erai onacewok.”"
Judges9:4 Koinakis ŋul ŋes atutubeta akaisakanykaarei nuka epuesa nualemunete kotogo loka Baal-berit, nuabu Abimelek koropia ituŋa luutai luebenen, luatupito ŋes,"
Judges9:5 Kolot Opura ore loka papake, koarak ikeinacan odwe luka Yerubaal, luemwaasi ituŋa akaisakanykaarei, amoru adiopet: konye kideun Yotam eŋoorit loka Yerubaal; naarai abu konop."
Judges9:6 Kotukokinos ituŋa kere luka Sekem, ka ekal kere loka Milo, koloto kitaraut Abimelek ekabaka, kaneedunyas kelua loka epir loajai Sekem,"
Judges9:7 Kelimokin Yotam nun, abu kodoka aibwo aidi naka moru Gcrisim, kodelo, kiworo, ko te ma kes atiar, “Kopupunoi, yes ituŋa luka Sekem, tetere Edeke kipupuni yes."
Judges9:8 Kolosek apotu ikito koloto ainyonyoikin eka baka akinyet ayaite kes; kotemasi eseitun atiar, ‘Koyaai ijo sio.’"
Judges9:9 Konye kotema eseitun kes atiar, ‘Enyeini kereka eoŋ akinyeteka naitopolonorere Edeke ka ituŋanan, kasodi alosit aijaŋijaŋa kokito?’"
Judges9:10 Kotemasi ikito etini atiar,, Bia ijo koyaai sio.’"
Judges9:11 Konye kotema etini kes atiar, ‘Enyeini kereka eoŋ akaiiiim, ka araitoka nukajokak, kasodi alosit aijaŋijaŋa kokito?’"
Judges9:12 Kotemasi ikito emusabibu atiar, ‘Bia ijo, koyaai sio.’"
Judges9:13 Kotema emusabibu kes atiar, ‘Enyeini kereka ebinoka, loitalakarit Edeke ka ituŋanan, kasodi alosit aijaŋijaŋa kokito?’"
Judges9:14 Kosodete ikito kere atemar etirir atiar, ‘Bia ijo, koyaai sio.’"
Judges9:15 Kotema etirir ikito atiar, ‘Arai kinyonyoikinete yesi eoŋ akinyet kotoma abeit araun ekabakakus, kopotu do komunokinos etolimika: arai bo mam, kolom do akim kotirir, konyama iresia luka Lebanon.’"
Judges9:16 “Aso do, arai iswamato yesi kabeit ka nuetenito, aitaraun Abimelek eka baka, arai da iswamakinito yesi Yerubaal ka ekaleke nuejok, ido kiswamakinito ŋes kwape ibusakinitor nueswamat:"
Judges9:17 (Naarai abu papaka koiiik yes komam epod aijarake, koyu da yes kakan naka Midian:"
Judges9:18 Inyoutu do yesi lolo asurokin ekalloka papaka, iarakis odweke, ituŋa akaisakanykaarei, amoru adiopet, itarautu da Abimelek okoku loka abusiatake ekabaka loeyait ituŋa luka Sekem, naarai erai onacekus;)"
Judges9:19 Arai iswamakinito yesi Yerubaal ka ekaleke lolo nukabeit ka nuetenito, kolelata do yesi kotoma Abimelek, ŋesi da kolele kotomakus:"
Judges9:20 Konye arai mam, kolom do akim kotoma Abimelek, konyama ituŋa luka Sekem, ka ekalloka Milo; kolom da akim kotoma otuŋa luka Sekem, kotoma okal loka Milo, konyama Abimelek.”"
Judges9:21 Kosi Yotam, koker, kolot Beer, kiboi kaŋina, kanuka akurian Abimelek onaceke."
Judges9:22 Kopolok Abimelek Isirael ikar iuni.
Judges9:23 Kijuk Edeke emoyo loerono kidin Abimelek ka ituŋa luka Sekem; kiswamakis ituŋa luka Sekem Abimelek nuka aiŋal:
Judges9:24 Tetere edolete nukadeden nuaponi kiswamakinai odwe akaisakanykaarei luka Yerubaal, tetere da itebeo aokotokee Abimelek onacekee, loaari kes, itebeo da ituŋa luka Sekem, luetogogonete akaninike aiar iinaeanake."
Judges9:25 Kibwaikis ituŋa luka Sekem ikaperunok ŋes aidia nuka ironan, konatata kere luetorete orot ŋol: kolimokinai Abimelek,"
Judges9:26 Kobu Gaal okoku loka Ebed ka iinaeanake, koloto Sekem: komunokinos ŋes ituŋa luka Sekem."
Judges9:27 Kolomasi omanikor, kodenoto imusabibunukee, kieakaeakata imusabibun, kipooto epueit, kolomasi togo loka edekekee, konyamata komatata, kikenoto Abimelek."
Judges9:28 Kotema Gaal okoku loka Ebed atiar, “Iŋai bo Abimelek, iŋai da Sekem, tape sio kiiaanakini ŋes? Mere ŋes okoku loka Yerubaal? ka Sebul ekiyakiake? ijaanakinete yesi ituŋa luka Kamor papa loka Sekem: konye sio kanukinyo tikiiaanakinia ŋes?"
Judges9:29 Karai kejaas ituŋa lu akanika! Tikalema Abimelek.” Kotema ŋesi Abimelek atiar, “Kiyatak akonijore, kolom.”"
Judges9:30 Kepupu Sebul ekayaiton ere akiro nuka Gaal okoku loka Ebed, abu akenyunyura kinep."
Judges9:31 Abu kijukak Abimelek ikiyakia kaiyeiyea ebe, “Koany, apotu Gaal okoku loka Ebed ka ikeinacan Sekem; ido koany, etinaikis ere asurokin joo"
Judges9:32 Aso do, konyou kuare, ijo ka ituŋa luejaas kajo, koperut kamanat:"
Judges9:33 Kosodi tupuruc, atipet naeniunia akoloŋ, kodilok ijo anyoun asurokin ere: ido koany, kelomut ŋesi kituna luejaas kaŋes asurokin jo, iswamakini do ijo kes kwape itojokia.”"
Judges9:34 Konyou Abimelek kuare, ka ituŋa kere luajaas kaŋes, koperut Sekem korioneta iwonon."
Judges9:35 Koloma Gaal okoku loka Ebed, kobwo korute kaneelomarere ore: konyou Abimelek ka ituŋa kere luajaas kaŋes kaneaperunitotor."
Judges9:36 Nakeanyunia Gaal ituŋa, kotema ŋesi Sebul atiar, “Koany, ijesuna ituŋa kaidia nuka ironan.” Kotema Sebul ŋes atiar, “Tseseni ijo etolim loka iroŋan kosubite bala ituŋa.”"
Judges9:37 Kinera Gaal bobo ebe, “Koany, ijesuna ituŋa kokidin kakwap, itorunit erioŋet ediopet orot loka elua loka Meonenim.”"
Judges9:38 Kosodi Sebul atemar ŋes atiar, “Ai bo kwana ejai aitukukon, naibalar ebe, “Tnai bo Abimelek, tape sio kijaanakini ŋes?’ Mere ŋul ituŋa luimwanit ijo? Kenainait, koloma cabo do kitiji kes.”"
Judges9:39 Koloma Gaal kakonyen nuka ituŋa luka Sekem, kitiji Abimelek."
Judges9:40 Kodap Abimelek ŋes, koker kakonyeneke, kibiroros luipu luemusunitai, kiton neelomarere orute."
Judges9:41 Kiboikin Abimelek Aruma: kirenea Sebul Gaal ka iinaeanake, kinyeis aiboi koSckem."
Judges9:42 Kosodi kanen, kapaaran naatupakini kolomas ituŋa amanat; kolimokis kesi Abimelek."
Judges9:43 Koyana ituŋa, kotiak kes kotoma orioneta iuni, koperut kamanat; kosesen, ido koany, kolomut ituŋa kore; konyou asurokin kes, kodany kes."
Judges9:44 Kokubokinos Abimelek ka irioneta luajaas kaŋes, kobwaata korute kaneelomarere ore: kokerata irioneta iarei neajaas nul kere luajaas amanat, kodanyata kes."
Judges9:45 Kitiji Abimelek ere apaaran ŋin kere; kirum ere, koar ituŋa luajaas toma; kotiyatiya ere, koyeik abalaij."
Judges9:46 Kepuputu ituŋa kere lukore loeoja loka Sekem ŋun, apotu kolomasi abur nakotogo loka El-berit."
Judges9:47 Kolimokinai Abimelek ebe etukokina ituŋa kere lukotogo loeoja loka Sekem.
Judges9:48 Kodoka Abimelek moru Salumon, ŋes ka ituŋa kere luajaas kaŋes; kitin aep kakanike, kojep atenu kokito, kitin ŋes, kibwaik okeperike: kotema ituŋa luajaas kaŋes atiar, “Nuianyutu eoŋ eswamai, kisunyito yesi da, kiswamata kwape kwaŋin.”"
Judges9:49 Kosodete ituŋa kere aiepun ŋinituŋanan aketenut, kotupasi Abimelek, koganata kes abur, kinokokis akim aicweia abur; kotwakata do ituŋa kere lukotogo loeoja loka Sekem, kwape elukumit, ikiliok ka aŋor."
Judges9:50 Kosodi Abimelek alosit Tebes, kidukur asurokin Tebes, kirum ŋes,"
Judges9:51 Konye ajai etogo loeoia loagogon toma ore, apotu ikiliok ka aŋor kere kokereasi nina, ka nul kere lukore, kogoloros kotoma, kodokasi oswi loka etogo loeoia."
Judges9:52 Kobu Abimelek togo loeoja, kitiii ŋes, kikunyak okek loka etogo loeoia aicwe ŋes."
Judges9:53 Abu aberu adiopet kocakak atapen akou naka Abimelek, kobwan abelekek naka akouke."
Judges9:54 Kosodi ŋesi anyaraun katipet ekatumunan loadakit lujiisike, kotema ŋes atiar, “Kout ekilenikon koar eoŋ, kinyeis ituŋa atemar ebe, ‘Aberu aari ŋes.’’’ Kieum ekatumunanike ŋes aipelor, kotwana."
Judges9:55 Keanyut ituŋa luka Isirael ebe atwana Abimelek, koloto ninituŋanan aiboisike."
Judges9:56 Kwaŋin abu Edeke kinyan aronis naka Abimelek, naabu kiswamak papake, kanuka aiar iinaeanake akaisakanykaarei."
Judges9:57 Aronis kere naka ituŋa luka Sekem abu Edeke kinyan kakwesikee: abu kobunok kes ekenit loka Yotam okoku loka Yerubaal.
Judges10:1 Akaulo ka Abimelek abu Tola okoku loka Pua, okoku loka Dodo, erunanan loka Isakar, konyou aitajar Isirael; abu kiboie koSamir kakwap nakiukon naka Epuraim."
Judges10:2 Abu kotubok Isirael ikar akaisaarei kaluuni, kotwana, kidaikinai Samir."
Judges10:3 Akauloke konyou Yair, Egileadit; abu kotubok Isirael ikar akaisaarei ka luarei."
Judges10:4 Ajaas ŋes odweke akaisauni luebwanenenete isigirian akaisauni, ajaas kes ireria akaisauni, luemaikinitai Kabot-yair kiton lolo, luejaas akwap naka Gilead."
Judges10:5 Kotwana Yair, kidaikinai Kamon."
Judges10:6 Kiswamata idwe luka Isirael bobo nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kijaanakis Ibaalim, ka Asitarot, ka idekesio luka Suria, ka idekesio luka Sidon, ka idekesio luka Moab, ka idekesio luka idwe luka Amon, ka idekesio luka Ipilisitian; apotu kojalata EJAKAIT, komam ijaanakinete ŋes,"
Judges10:7 Kinep anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin Isirael, kogwela kes akan naka Ipilisitian, akan da naka idwe luka Amon."
Judges10:8 Apotu kisiyalononoto koroikis da idwe luka Isirael kokaru kanol: apotu koroikis idwe kere luka Isirael luajaas okekwa loka Yorodan akwap naka Imorain naejai Gilead, ikar itomon ka lukanykauni."
Judges10:9 Kodokasi idwe luka Amon Yorodan alosit aitiji Yuda ka Benyamin, ka ekal loka Epuraim; kwaŋin kiyalonon noi Isirael."
Judges10:10 Komonyata idwe luka Isirael mama ejai EJAKAIT ebe, “Kidiaka kamakon, naarai kijal Ekosideke, kijaanaki Ibaalim.”"
Judges10:11 Kotema EJAKAIT idwe luka Isirael atiar, “Mam kereka eoŋ abu ketajar yes kaneejaas Imisirian, ka Imorain, ka idwe luka Amon, ka Ipilisitian?"
Judges10:12 Apotu Isidonin da, ka Imalekain, ka Imaonin koroikis yes; ipotu komonyata kaneajai, abu eoŋ ketaiar yes kakanikee."
Judges10:13 Konye kijalata eoŋ, iiaanakis ieedekesio: kanuka nun mam bobo ketaiar yes."
Judges10:14 Koloto komonyata mama ejaas idekesio luiseutu; kitaiarata do kesi yes kapak naka icanikus.”
Judges10:15 Kotemasi idwe luka Isirael EJAKAIT atiar, “Kidiaka; kiswamakinai ijo sio nuitoiokit ijo; konye kinainait, koyuunai sio lolo.”"
Judges10:16 Kolemasi idekesio lumo kamakee, kijaanakis EJAKAIT: kokadak eketau kanuka ican luka Isirael."
Judges10:17 Kosodete idwe luka Amon atukokin, kidukuroto Gilead. Kotukokinos idwe luka Isirael da, kidukuroto Misipa."
Judges10:18 Kotemanaros ituŋa, kes ikapolok luka Gilead ebe, “Iŋai etuŋanan loegei aitiji idwe luka Amon? Eraun ŋol ekapolon loka luibojete koGilead kere.”"
Judges11:1 Kerai Yeputa Egileadit etuŋanan lokirigi, lokatitin da, arai ŋesi okoku loka naadote: Gilead ŋes aurie Yeputa."
Judges11:2 Kourik aberu naka Gilead ŋes idwe lusap; kosodi kepolooros odwe luka aberuke, apotu kireneasi Yeputa, kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Mam jo idumuni airumet kokal loka papawok; naarai irai ijo okoku loka aceberu.”"
Judges11:3 Kosodi Yeputa akerit kaneaiaas iinaeanake, kiboikin akwap naka Tob: kotukokinos ituŋa luutai neejai Yeputa, kolomasi nepepe kaŋes."
Judges11:4 Kosodi kanen ketuboros apaarasia, kitiiioto idwe luka Amon Isirael."
Judges11:5 Kosodi kitiiioto idwe luka Amon Isirael, apotu imakio luka Gilead koloto aomare Yeputa kakwap naka Tob."
Judges11:6 Kotemasi Yeputa atiar, “Bia, koraun ekosiiakait, tetere kitijie idwe luka Amon.”"
Judges11:7 Kotema Yeputa imakio luka Gilead atiar, “Mere ipotu yesi kolaata eoŋ, kireŋeasi da kokal loka papaka? Kanukinyo do iponiata neajar eoŋ naijaatar oean?”"
Judges11:8 Kotemasi ŋes imakio luka Gilead atiar, “Kanuka ŋun ŋes kibonunio mamakon, tetere ilosi kasio aitiji idwe luka Amon, iraun ijo lokapolonikosi loiyait luibojete koGilead kere.”"
Judges11:9 Kotema Yeputa imakio luka Gilead atiar, “Arai kiinyakasi yesi eoŋ ore aitiii idwe luka Amon, kosodi EJAKAIT aijaikin kes eoŋ, araun kereka eoŋ lokapolonikus?”"
Judges11:10 Kotemasi imakio luka Gilead Yeputa atiar, “EJAKAIT, ŋes ekajenaniwok; abeit kiswamai kwape ejaar akonikirot.”"
Judges11:11 Kosodi Yeputa alosit kimakio luka Gilead, kodakakis ituŋa ŋes araun ekapolon, ejakait da loeyait kes: kiner Yeputa akiroke kere kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT koMisipa."
Judges11:12 Kijuka Yeputa ikiyakia mama ejai ekabaka loka idwe luka Amon ebe, “Inyo bo kimariai ijo keoŋ, tape ijo ibuni mamakan aitiji akakwap?”"
Judges11:13 Koboŋok eka baka loka idwe luka Amon ikiyakia luka Yeputa ebe, “Naarai abu lsirael koyana akakwap, anyoun koArunon kiton Yabok, kiton Yorodan da, naalomunio koMisiri: asa kinyakakinai akwapin nun kainapakin.”"
Judges11:14 Kijuka Yeputa ikiyakia bobo mama ejai ekabaka loka idwe luka Amon:
Judges11:15 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Inera Yeputa kwanata ebe: Mam Isirael abu koyana akwap naka Moab karaida akwap naka idwe luka Amon:"
Judges11:16 Konye naaponiata kesi koMisiri, abu Isirael kitor amodiŋ kiton Aŋolol Nakarenan, kodol Kades;"
Judges11:17 Kosodi Isirael aijukakin ekabaka loka Edom ikiyakia ebe, “Kenainait, koeamakinai ketor akwapukon’: konye mam ekabaka loka Edom abu kopup, Kwape kwaŋin kijuka mama ejai ekabaka loka Moab: konye mam abu kocam: kiboikin Isirael Kades."
Judges11:18 Kosodi aitor amodiŋ, kiriria akwap naka Edom, ka akwap naka Moab, kobu kariri nakokide naka akwap naka Moab, kidukuroto juwai naka Arunon; konye mam apotu kolomasi oikor loka Moab, naarai Arunon ŋes arai eikor loka Moab."
Judges11:19 Kijuka Isirael ikiyakia mama ejai Sikon ekabaka loka Imorain, ekabaka loka Kesibon; kotema Isirael ŋes atiar, “Kiŋainait, koeamak sio ketoroto akwapukon adolore akwapukosi.”"
Judges11:20 Konye mam abu Sikon komunokin Isirael aitor oikoruke: konye abu Sikon kotukok iketuŋa kere, kidukuru Yakas, kitiji Isirael."
Judges11:21 Abu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael kijaik Sikon ka iketuŋa kere akan naka Isirael, kodanyata kes: kwaŋin kirum Isirael akwap kere naka Imorain lueboienenete kakwap kaŋin,"
Judges11:22 Kirumata eikor kere loka Imorain, anyoun koArunon kiton Yabok, anyoun kamodiŋ da kiton Yorodan."
Judges11:23 Aso abu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael kodema Imorain airumetekec kakonyen nuka iketuŋa Isirael, ikoto do ijo airum kes?"
Judges11:24 Mam kereka jo irumi nukiinakini Kemos ekonideke jo airum? Aso ŋul luadema EJAKAIT Ekosideke airumetakee kakonyenekosi, nul kes kirumi isio."
Judges11:25 Itelekarit kereka ijo Balak okoku loka Sipor, ekabaka loka Moab? Abu ŋesi kitepeg lsirael, arai bo abu ŋesi kitiji kes?"
Judges11:26 Naeboio Isirael koKesibon ka ireriake, koAroer da ka ireriake, koreria da kere luejaas osiep loka Arunon, ikar akwat auni; kanukinyo mam yes ipotu kinyakariata kes kapak kaŋin?"
Judges11:27 Kanuka nun mam eoŋ adiakit kamakon, konye iswamakinit ijo eoŋ erono aitiji eoŋ: EJAKAIT, Ekatubon, ŋes etubokini lolo idwe luka Isirael ka idwe luka Amon.”"
Judges11:28 Konye mam ekabaka loka idwe luka Amon abu kopup akiro nuejukakinit Yeputa ŋes,"
Judges11:29 Kosodi emoyo loka EJAKAIT adoikin Yeputa, kitor Gilead ka Manase, kitor da Misipe loka Gilead, konyou koMisipe loka Gilead kotubor neajaas idwe luka Amon."
Judges11:30 Kiyapoik Yeputa EJAKAIT aiyaposit ebe, “Arai kiiaik ijo eut idwe luka Amon akanika,"
Judges11:31 Ejaun do ebe, ŋin yenelomuni kokekia luka ekatogo aisiriam eoŋ, naabonunio kainapakin kaneejaas idwe luka Amon, eraun nin yenika EJAKAIT, ainakini ŋes araun ainakinet naicweio.”"
Judges11:32 Kwaŋin kotubor Yeputa mama ejaas idwe luka Amon aitiji kes; kijaik EJAKAIT kes akanike.
Judges11:33 Kodany kes anyoun koAroer kiton naidolio Minit, ireria akaisaarei, kiton Abel-keramim, kaario naepol noi, Kwaŋin kitononokai idwe luka Amon kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael."
Judges11:34 Kobu Yeputa Misipa oreke, ido koany, kolom akokuke aismam ŋes kisiman ka ekosio: arai ŋesi atelunake; amamei ŋes ikoku yenisapat arai yenipese, dimarai nin bon."
Judges11:35 Kosodi kanen keanyu ŋesi ŋes, abu kocil ikenapen, kotema atiar, “Otukwi, akokuka! Kitisil ijo eoŋ noi, irai ijo adiopet kotoma kanul Iukesiyalononoete eoŋ: naarai aooŋ akaituk mama ejai EJAKAIT, mam apedori aiiulakin.”"
Judges11:36 Kotema ŋin ŋes atiar, “Papa, iwoon akoniituk mama ejai EJAKAIT; kiswamakinai eoŋ kwape ejaatar ŋun nualomunete kaitukukon; naarai kisinyana EJAKAIT jo kaneejaas lukasurupokon, kes idwe luka Amon.”"
Judges11:37 Kotema ŋin papake atiar, “Kiswamakinai na: kinyeinai ber ilapio iarei, tetere alosi aijesar oroŋan, aimony abekonutuka, eoŋ ka apaupaka.”"
Judges11:38 Kotema atiar, “Ape bo.” Kotwara ŋes adaun ilapio iarei: kolot, ŋes ka apaupake, komony abekonutuke koronan."
Judges11:39 Koso di kanen kedaunos ilapio iarei, koboŋ ŋin neejai papake, lokiswamak ŋes kwape ajaar aiyapositike naeyapoikinit; mam nin abu kojeni ekiliokit. Koraun epone kotoma Isirael,"
Judges11:40 adwe nuka Isirael alosenen ŋolikaru akiitunun akoku naka Yeputa Egileadit apaarasia aoŋon ŋolikaru.
Judges12:1 Kotukokinos ituŋa luka Epuraim nepepe, kitoroto ari naka agolitomei; kotemasi Yeputa atiar, “Kanukinyo ituboror ijo aitiji idwe luka Amon, komam kinyarari sio alosit kajo? Kicweikini isio jo kotogokon.”"
Judges12:2 Kotema Yeputa kes atiar, “Kipou eoŋ ka ikatuŋa kapegata noi kidwe luka Amon; kaanyarau yes, mam ipotu kitaiarata eoŋ kakanikec."
Judges12:3 Kaany eoŋ ebe mam ipotu kitajarata eoŋ, abu kebwaik aijaraka akanika, kasodi atubor asurokin idwe luka Amon, kejaik EJAKAIT kes akanika: kanukinyo do iponitotor mama ajai lolo aitiii eoŋ?”"
Judges12:4 Kosodi Yeputa atukokin ituŋa luka Gilead kere, kitiji Epuraim: kodanyata ituŋa luka Gilead ituŋa luka Epuraim, naarai abalas ebe, “Iraas yesi luisiito koEpuraim, yes Igileadin, kokidin Epuraim, kokidin da kaManase,”"
Judges12:5 Kikamut Igileadin idoketa luka Yorodan Iuebeete Epuraim: kojaun do ebe, naatemaria ŋinidiopet kotoma kaluasiito luka Epuraim ebe, “Koeamakinai katubor,” atemarete ituŋa luka Gilead ŋes atiar, “Irai ijo Epuraimit?” Arai ketema ebe, “Mam”:"
Judges12:6 Atemarete kesi ŋes atiar, “Aso kolim cani ebe, Shibolet”; kolimuni ŋesi ebe, “Sibolet”; naarai mam apedorit alimun kojokan; kosodete do aikamun ŋes, aarakin odoketa luka Yorodan; kotwakata kapak kaŋin luka Epuraim ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka ilukumin iarei."
Judges12:7 Kotubok Yeputa Isirael ikar ikanykape. Kotwana Yeputa Egileadit, kidaikinai ore ediopet koreria luka Gilead."
Judges12:8 Kotubok Ibisan loka Bet-lekem Isirael atupakin ŋes.
Judges12:9 Ajaas ŋes odwe akaisauni, abu kokora adweke akaisauni, kosodi amanyakin odweke apesur akaisauni. Abu ŋesi kotubok Isirael ikar ikanykaarei."
Judges12:10 Kotwana Ibisan, kidaikinai Bet-lekem,"
Judges12:11 Kotubok Elon Esebulunit Isirael atupakin ŋes; abu ŋesi kotubok Isirael ikar itomon.
Judges12:12 Kotwana Elon Esebulunit, kidaikinai Aiyalon akwap naka Sebulun."
Judges12:13 Kotubok Abudon okoku loka Kilel Epiratonit Isirael atupakin ŋes,"
Judges12:14 Ajaas ŋes odweke akaisaoŋon ka odwe akaisauni luka odweke, luebwanenenete isigirian akaisakanykaarei: a bu ŋesi kotubok Isirael ikar ikanykauni."
Judges12:15 Kotwana Abudon okoku loka Kile! Epiratonit, kidaikinai Piraton akwap naka Epuraim, akwap nakiukon naka Imalekain."
Judges13:1 Kiswamata bobo idwe luka Isirael nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: kiiaik EJAKAIT kes akan naka Ipilisitian ikar akaisaoŋon,"
Judges13:2 Ajai etuŋanan loka Sora loka ekek loka Idanin, ekekiror Manoa; arai akeberu arakan, mam aurie."
Judges13:3 Kitakanikin emalaika loka EJAKAIT aberu, kotema ŋes atiar, “Aso koany, irai ijo arakan, mam iwurie; konye ipotuuni, iwuruuni ikoku yenisapat."
Judges13:4 Aso cado kocoite, kenainait, sirikimat ebino karaida nuitemerete, sirikinyam da idiobore yenimam elai:"
Judges13:5 Naarai koany, ipotuuni ijo, iwuruuni ikoku yenisapat; mam eiutet icaki akouke: naarai eraun ikoku Enasirit loka Edeke ageun kakoik: egeuni da ŋesi ai tajar Isirael kakan naka Ipilisitian.”"
Judges13:6 Kosodi aberu abunore alimokin okilenike ebe, “Abu etuŋanan loka Edeke kobu neaiai, akekonven koputos bala akonyen nuka emalaika loka Edeke, loeyoŋitai; mam abu kenitu ŋes neabunio, karaida ŋes alimokin eoŋ ekekiror."
Judges13:7 Konye abu katema eoŋ atiar, ‘Koany, ipotuuni, iwuruuni ikoku yenisapat; sirikimat ebino karaida nuitemerete, sirikinyam da idiobore yenimam elai: naarai eraun ikoku Enasarit loka Edeke ageun kakoik kiton apaaran naka atwanareke.’’’"
Judges13:8 Kosodi Manoa ailip EJAKAIT ebe, “Wu EJAKAIT, kenainait, koboŋ bobo etuŋanan loka Edeke loibu kiiuk mamakosi, kisisianak isio nukiswamakini ikoku yeneuruunio.”"
Judges13:9 Kopup Edeke eporoto loka Manoa; koboŋ emalaika loka Edeke mama ejai aberu iboie komanikor: konye mam okilenike Manoa ajaas kaŋes.
Judges13:10 Kiwonya aberu koker, kolimok okilenike, kotema ŋes atiar, “Koany, ketakanikin eoŋ etuŋanan loabunit neajai eoŋ apaaran ya,”"
Judges13:11 Konyou Manoa, kotup akeberu, kodol neejai etuŋanan, kotema ŋes atiar, “Ŋo ŋes etuŋanan loineras kaberu?” Koboŋok ebe, “Eoŋ lopelo.”"
Judges13:12 Kotema Manoa atiar, “Aso kedolot akonikiro, kekonakisi ai ikoku, ido anyoin aswamuke?”"
Judges13:13 Kotema emalaika loka EJAKAIT Manoa atiar, “Koeoite aberu ŋun kere nuabu kalimok ŋes,"
Judges13:14 Siri ŋes kenyam ibore yenelomuni komusabibu, karaida aimat ebino, arai nuitemerete, karaida ainyam idiobore yenimam elai; koric ŋesi kere nuecorakinit ŋes.”"
Judges13:15 Kotema Manoa emalaika loka EJAKAIT ebe, “Keŋaiŋait kosalak ber ijo tetere sio kipuikini jo ikalol.”"
Judges13:16 Kotema emalaika loka EJAKAIT Manoa atiar, “Karaida kasala, mam anyami atapakon: arai ikoto apuikin ainakinet naicweio, ibusakinit ijo ainakin ŋes EJAKAIT.” Naarai mam Manoa ajeni ebe erai ŋesi emalaika loka EJAKAIT."
Judges13:17 Kotema Manoa emalaika loka EJAKAIT atiar, “Iŋai bo ekonikiror, tetere kitopoloori jo kedolot akonikiro?”"
Judges13:18 Kotema emalaika loka EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Kanukinyo inisitor ijo ekakiror, naarai erai lokaumokin?”"
Judges13:19 Koyana Manoa ikalol ka ainakineteke naka akiria, koinak EJAKAIT komoru: kiswama emalaika nukaumokin, kosesenata Manoa ka akeberu."
Judges13:20 Naarai kedoka akim kiton akuj anyoun kotem, abu emalaika loka EJAKAIT kodokaria kakim naka etem: kosesenata Manoa ka akeberu; kibiroros kwap ebuburia."
Judges13:21 Konye mam bobo emalaika loka EJAKAIT abu kitakanikin Manoa karaida akeberu. Kojen do Manoa ebe kerai ŋesi emalaika loka EJAKAIT,"
Judges13:22 Kotema Manoa akeberu atiar, “Abeit kitwaki, naarai kianyu Edeke.’"
Judges13:23 Konye kotema akeberu ŋes atiar, “Arai kitojokit EJAKAIT aiar oni, timam keeamu ainakinet naicweio ka ainakinet naka akiria kakaniwok, timam da kiitodik oni akiro nu kere, timam kiilimok oni kapak kana akiro nuikote nen.”"
Judges13:24 Kouru aberu ikoku yenisapat, komaik ekekiror Samuson: kopoloor ikoku, kisireren EJAKAIT ŋes."
Judges13:25 Kogeu emoyo loka EJAKAIT aijukit ŋes koMakanedan, kidin Sora ka Esitaol."
Judges14:1 Kolot Samuson Timuna, koany apese koTimuna naka adwe nuka Ipilisitian."
Judges14:2 Koboŋ, kolimok papake ka totoke atiar, “Aany apese koTimuna naka adwe nuka Ipilisitian: aso do komanyakinai ŋes."
Judges14:3 Kosodete papake ka totoke atemar ŋes atiar, “Emamei do apese kadwe nuka iinaeanakon, arai kotunaka kere, tape jo ilosi aimany aberu naka Ipilisitian lumam ekepep?” Kotema Samuson papake atiar, “Komanyakinai ŋes; naarai kesiyalamikinit eoŋ noi.”"
Judges14:4 Konye mam papake ka totoke ajenete ebe kerai akirot naka EJAKAIT: naarai amoot ŋesi akirot naasurokinet Ipilisitian. Kapak kaŋin ayaito Ipilisitian Isirael.
Judges14:5 Kosodi Samuson alosit. Ka papake ka totoke Timuna, kodol amanat nuka emusabibu nuka Timuna: ido koany, abu eŋatuny losorokany kogat asurokin ŋes."
Judges14:6 Kodoik ŋes emoyo loka EJAKAIT kagogon, kopooia ŋes kwape tikepooiara ikalol, komamei ibore kakanike: konye mam abu kolimok papake karaida totoke nuabu kiswama,"
Judges14:7 Kolot, kinerata kapese; abu ŋesi kisiyalamik noi Samuson."
Judges14:8 Ketubor apak, abu kobono ayaŋaar ŋes, kopaa aanyun akuan nakatwan naka eŋatuny: ido koany, ajai enene loka ao akuan naka eŋatuny, ka esik."
Judges14:9 Kitin ŋes kakaninike, kiyatak alosit, konyami kolosi, kodolok papake ka totoke, koinak kes, konyamata: konye mam abu kolimok kes ebe alemuni ŋesi esik kakuan naka eŋatuny."
Judges14:10 Kolot papake neejai apese: kipo Samuson epucit kanen; naarai atapit ikatumunak aswam kwaŋin.
Judges14:11 Kosodi kanen, keanyut ŋes, apotu koyaut ipaup akaisauni ajaut kaŋes."
Judges14:12 Kotema Samuson kes atiar, “Akoto eoŋ alimokin yes asogol: arai kipedosi yesi aitejenun ŋes kotoma apaarasia akanykaarei nuka epucit, ka aitebeikin ŋes, kainakini do yes igoen akaisauni luka ebaputa, ka inapen akaisauni luibusiak:"
Judges14:13 Konye arai mcm ipedorete aiteienun ŋes, kiinakinete do yesi eoŋ igoen akaisauni luka ebaputa, ka inapen akaisauni luibusiak.” Kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Kolim cani asogol, kapuputu.”"
Judges14:14 Kotema kes atiar, “Alom akiriŋ kaneejai yenikanyaman, Alom da awiiny kaneejai yenikagogonon.” Mam apotu kopedosi aiteienun asogol kotoma apaarasia auni."
Judges14:15 Kosodi kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei, kotemasi aberu naka Samuson atiar, “Kijodijod okilenikon, tetere kitebeikini sio asogol, kenyeis aicwe jo ka ekal loka papakon kakim: kinyaraunito sio aitaraun lukican? Mere kwaŋin?”"
Judges14:16 Komony aberu naka Samuson kakonyeneke, kotema atiar, “Kilait ijo eoŋ, mam kimina eoŋ: ilimok idwe luka ikatuŋa asogol, komam kilimokinit eoŋ.” Kotema ŋes atiar, “Koany, mam alimokinit papaka karaida totoka, ido konyet jo ŋes kalimokini?”"
Judges14:17 Komony kakonyeneke apaarasia akanykaarei nuajaar epueit: kosodi kanen kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei, abu kolimok ŋes, naarai abu kimaima ŋes noi: kolimok nin idwe luka iketuŋa asogol."
Judges14:18 Kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei eroko akoloŋ kelomara, apotu ituŋa lukore kolimokis ŋes ebe, “Inyo bo ewiny adepar esik? Inyo bo egogoŋ adepar enatunyr” Kotema kes atiar, “Kedim yes aitokor ataokoka, Timam kitejenut akasogol.”"
Judges14:19 Kodoik ŋes emoyo loka EJAKAIT kagogon, kolot Asukelon, kodany ituŋa akaisauni kakesi, koyana lunatuna kamakec, koinak luetejenunete asogol inapen luibusiak. Kinep anyunyurake, kolot togo loka papake."
Judges14:20 Konye aponi aberu naka Samuson kokorakinai aupake, loanaikinit araut opaperoke."
Judges15:1 Kosodi kanen ketubor apak, kapak naka aidweny akima, abu Samuson kipejok akeberu kikalol; kotema atiar, “Alomari agola mama ejai akaberu.” Konye mam papake abu kisiik ŋes alomar."
Judges15:2 Kotema papa loka nin atiar, “Abeit abu kaomite ebe ila ijo ŋes eut; kanuka nun abu kakorak ŋes aupakon: mam kinaeike nadidi ejok adepar ŋes? Kenainait, koyana nin aiboisike.”"
Judges15:3 Kotema Samuson kes atiar, “Emameun eoŋ akirot irwan na kaneeiaas Ipilisitian, naameŋerekinia kes.”"
Judges15:4 Kolot Samuson kikam ikuei akwat auni, kolem akalasia, kiteteik ikorio, koenik akalas kidin kanulukorio iarei."
Judges15:5 Kosodi kedau ŋesi aisinepikin akalasia, abu koosik kes alosit akima nuka Ipilisitian, kiewe ikes, ka akima nuabwoete, ka iseitunin da."
Judges15:6 Kosodete Ipilisitian atemar ebe, “Iŋai eswama nu?” Kotemasi atiar, “Samuson, ekamuran loka Etimunit, naarai abu koyana akeberu, kosodi akorakin aupake.” Kopotu Ipilisitian, kieweata ŋes ka papake kakim."
Judges15:7 Kotema Samuson atiar, “Arai iswamaete yesi nuikote nen, abeit enyanar eoŋ kamakus, kasodi konyet apalar.”"
Judges15:8 Kodany kes noi, jokan, aiar naepol: kolot kiboikin acilet naka emoru loka Etam,"
Judges15:9 Kosodete Ipilisitian alosit, kidukuroto Yuda, kisiarakinos toma Leki,"
Judges15:10 Kotemasi ituŋa luka Yuda atiar, “Kanukinyo iponiata yesi asurokin sio?” Kotemasi atiar, “Kiponit ajen Samuson, aiswamakin ŋes kwape abu ŋesi kiswamakinia sio.”"
Judges15:11 Kosodete ituŋa ilukumin iuni luka Yuda alosit acilet naka emoru Etam, kotemasi Samuson atiar, “Mam jo ijeni ebe Ipilisitian kes kiyaito oni? Inyo bo do yen yenikiswamak ijo sio? “Kotema kes atiar, “Kwape keswamakiniata eoŋ, eswamak eoŋ da kes kwaŋin.”"
Judges15:12 Kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Kiponit ajen jo, tetere kijaikini jo kakan naka Ipilisitian.” Kotema Samuson atiar, “Kiyapoikinoi eoŋ ebe, mam yes ikulepek kiarete eoŋ.”"
Judges15:13 Kolimokis ŋes atiar, “Mam; konye kieni ber isio jo kagogon, kiiaikini jo akanikee: konye abeit mam sio kiari jo.” Koenata ŋes kaunoi aarei nukitetiak, koyaut ŋes komoru."
Judges15:14 Kedol ŋesi Leki, kibwonakis Ipilisitian iriamunos kaŋes: kodoik ŋes emoyo loka EJAKAIT kagogon, kosubata aunoi nuajaas akaninike bala abira nuieweio kakim, kodooto aenetake kakaninike,"
Judges15:15 Kodum abokony nakitetet naka asigiria, korio akekan, kitin, kodanyia ituŋa elukumit."
Judges15:16 Kotema Samuson atiar, “Kabokony naka asigiria, atukon katukon, Adany ituŋa elukumit kabokony naka asigiria.”"
Judges15:17 Kosodi kanen kedau ŋesi einer, kocaka abokony kakanike: komaikinai aibois nin Ramat-leki."
Judges15:18 Koiak akure noi, kiworo EJAKAIT ebe, “Iinak akan naka ekonibulesit aitaiar na naepol; atwani kereka eoŋ akure, kebirokin akan naka lumam ekepep?”"
Judges15:19 Konye kocil Edeke aipany naejai Leki, kolomut akip kanen; kedau aimat, Koboŋok bobo ekemoyo, kikwar: ŋes do amaikinere ekirorike En-kakore, naejai Leki, kiton lolo."
Judges15:20 Abu ŋesi kotubok Isirael kapaarasia nuka Ipilisitian ikar akaisaarei.
Judges16:1 Kolot Samuson Gasa, koany kaŋ ina naadote, koloma mamakeŋ."
Judges16:2 Kolimokinai Igasan ebe, “Abu Samuson ne.” Kolukutu ŋes, koperut ŋes akuare kere korute lokore, kililinata akuare kere, kobalas ebe, “Kiwala akwap, kiari ŋes.”"
Judges16:3 Koper Samuson kiton kidinebai, konyou kidiŋebai, kitin ikirigin luka erute lokore, ka ategerio aarei, kouto kes, ka atiket da, korioŋak kes okeperinike, kodaka kes aidi naka eronat loitei Keburon."
Judges16:4 Kosodi kanen akaulo kanun, abu ŋesi kominak aberu kaditot naka Sorek, ekekiror Delila."
Judges16:5 Kopotu ijaka luka Ipilisitian neejai nin, kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Kiiodiiod ŋes, kojen neelomunitor akegogoŋ naepol, ka epone lokipedoria aipikor ŋes, tetere kipedori ajen ŋes aitiean ŋes: kiinakini isio jo ninidiopet kasio atutubeta akwat atomon kanadiopet luka epuesa.”"
Judges16:6 Kotema Delila Samuson atiar, “Kenainait, kolimokinai neelomunitor akonigogoŋ naepol, ka epone lokienere jo aitican.”"
Judges16:7 Kotema Samuson ŋes atiar, “Arai kaenata kesi eoŋ kigegoi ikanykaarei luepalal lumam itoonitoi, ŋes kito akalanyanaror eoŋ, kiputokin kalucetuna.”"
Judges16:8 Kosodete ijaka luka Ipilisitian ainun ŋin igegoi ikanykaarei luepalal lumam itoonitoi, koenia nin ŋes,"
Judges16:9 Ajaas nin ikaperunok ago la nakotoma. Kotema nin ŋes atiar, “Samuson, kibunokis jo Ipilisitian.” Koned igegoi kwape enedar eusi loka amujajut ketiro akim. Kwaŋin mam akegogoŋ ajenio."
Judges16:10 Kotema Delila Samuson atiar, “Koany, kimod ijo eoŋ, kilimokinit da nuka aisab: asa keŋainait, kolimokinai epone lokienere jo.”"
Judges16:11 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Arai kaenata kesieon kaunoi nukitetiak numam itwasamatai adioswam, ŋes kito akalanyanaror eoŋ, kiputokin kalucetuna.”"
Judges16:12 Kolem Delila aunoi nukitetiak, koenia ŋes, kotema atiar, “Samuson, kibunokis jo Ipilisitian.” Kibojete ikaperunok kagola nakotoma. Koŋeda kes kakaninike bala eusi."
Judges16:13 Kotema Delila Samuson atiar, “Okwe, kimod ijo eoŋ kiton kwana, kilimokinit da nuka aisab: kolimokinai epone lokienere jo.” Kotema ŋes atiar, “Arai kicipak ijo ikatim luieipitai irwan akanykaarei oboro luicipi.”"
Judges16:14 Abu nin kiketak nul keloit, kotema ŋes atiar, “Samuson, kibunokis jo Ipilisitian.” Kokweny kotoma ajo, kout eloit ka aieipet da."
Judges16:15 Kotema nin ŋes atiar, “Itemari ijo biai ebe, ‘Kamina jo,’ komam lekonitau ejaas keoŋ? Kimod eoŋ irwan nu auni, mam da kilimokinit eoŋ neelomunitor akonigogoŋ naepol.”"
Judges16:16 Kosodi kanen kieebok ŋin abokobok ŋes kaimaima ninlpaaran kakiroke, abu eketau kokadak kiton atwanare."
Judges16:17 Abu kolimok ŋes nukotauke kere, kotema ŋes atiar, “Mam ejutet icakit akouka; naarai arai eoŋ Enasirit loka Edeke ageun kakoik naka totoka: arai kebareni akakou ŋes kito enyounio akagogoŋ kamakaŋ, akalanyanar, kiputokin da kalucetuŋa.”"
Judges16:18 Kejenu Delila ebe alimoki ŋes nukotauke kere, abu kijuka anyaraun iiaka luka Ipilisitian ebe, “Kopotu do irwan na bon, naarai kalimok eoŋ nukotauke kere.” Kosodete ijaka luka Ipilisitian aponare mamake koyaunito apesan kakanikec."
Judges16:19 Abu kitoioto ŋes kakejeke; kosodi nin anyaraun etuŋanan kobareno iketim lueeipitai irwan akanykaarei; kogeu aitican ŋes, konyou akegogoŋ kamake,"
Judges16:20 Kotema atiar, “Samuson, kibunokis jo Ipilisitian.” Kokweny kotoma ajo, kobala ebe, “Alomari kwape lem sek, kasodi ailakilakaar.” Konye mam ajeni ebe abu EJAKAIT konyou kamaken."
Judges16:21 Kikamut Ipilisitian ŋes, kogorut akekonye; koyanaasi ŋes Gasa, koenata kirikoi luka aisinit; abu kirienenei kaidaris."
Judges16:22 Konye apotu iketim kogeut apol bobo kedaun abaren ŋes,"
Judges16:23 Kosodete kotukonokinos iiaka luka Ipilisitian ainakin Dagon ekecedeke asubanit naepol, kalakara da: naarai abalas ebe, “Kijaik edekewok oni Samuson lokasurupiwok akaniniwok.”"
Judges16:24 Keanyut ituŋa ŋes, apotu kituroto edekekee: naarai abalas ebe, “Kiiaik edekewok oni lokasurupiwok akaniniwok, loemudiarit awokokwap, loaar luipu kaoni.”"
Judges16:25 Kosodi kanen, kiyalamikinos ikecetauon, apotu kotemasi ebe, “Konyarautu Samuson, koboliak oni,” Konyaraut Samuson kaidaris; koboliak kes: kibwaikis ŋes kidin opirin,"
Judges16:26 Kotema Samuson esapat loarikit ŋes kakan ebe, “Kocamakinai kararapa ipirin luiganito etogo, tetere agonakini kes.”"
Judges16:27 Eleleba etogo ikiliok ka aŋor; iiaka kere luka Ipilisitian ajaas nen; ajaas ikiliok ka aŋor kwape ilukumin iuni kuiu togo, lueteete Samuson eboliakini kes."
Judges16:28 Kiworo Samuson EJAKAIT, kobala ebe, “Wu EJAKAIT Edeke, kenainait kiitunoi, kenaiŋait kitogogonoi, irwan na bon, wu Edeke, tetere enyanari atipet akakonye aarei kaneejaas Ipilisitian.”"
Judges16:29 Kitin Samuson ipirin iarei lukokidin lueganito etogo, kogonakin kes, ediopet kakekan nakoteten, ediopet da kakekan nakokediany."
Judges16:30 Kotema Samuson atiar, “Mere katwana nepepe k Ipilisitian.” Kokukum kakegogon kere; kotiyaikin etogo ijaka, ka ituŋa kere luajaas toma. Kwaŋin lukatwak luaari ŋesi kapak naka atwanareke epu adepar luaari ŋesi eiari,"
Judges16:31 Kosodete ikeinaean ka ekal kere loka papake aponare, kolemutu ŋes, koyanaut, kidaikis ŋes kidin kaSora ka Esitaol aibois nakidaanakina naka Manoa papake, Abu ŋesi kotubok Isirael ikar akaisaarei."
Judges17:1 Ajai etuŋanan loka akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, ekekiror Mika."
Judges17:2 Abu ŋesi kotema totoke atiar, “Atutubeta akwat atomon ka nadiopet nuka epuesa nuaponi koyanaarai kaneiiai ijo, nuibu ijo kilam, ibu da kiner kapupi, koany, ejai epuesa neaiai eoŋ; eoŋ abu kayaŋa ŋes.” Kotema totoke atiar, “Kisireren EJAKAIT okokuka.”"
Judges17:3 Kinyakak ŋesi totoke atutubeta akwat atomon ka nadiopet nuka epuesa, kotema totoke ŋes atiar, “Abeit atiakakin EJAKAIT epuesa kakanika kanuka okokuka, aiswamaunia aput naegerer ka aput naealuna: kanuka nun enyakakini ijo.”"
Judges17:4 Kosodi kinyakaki ŋesi totoke apesan, abu totoke kolem atutubeta akwat aarei nuka cpuesa, kijaik ekatatan, loeswamaunia nun aput naegerer ka aput nacaluna: koiaun togo loka Mika."
Judges17:5 Keiai etuŋanan ŋol Mika etogo loka idekesio, kiswamau epod, ka iterapim, kotiak ediopet kodweke, koraun do ŋol esasedotike."
Judges17:6 Amamei ekabaka koIsirael kapaarasia kanun: eswamaenenei ŋinituŋanan nuadolito kakonyeneke bon.
Judges17:7 Ajai ekatumunan loka Bct-lekem-yuda, loka ateker naka Yuda, Ioarai Elebit, eboienenei kanen."
Judges17:8 Konyou etuŋanan kore, koBet-lekem-yuda, aiboiororoi kaneedumunia aibois: kodol akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, togo loka Mika, kalositeke."
Judges17:9 Kotema Mika ŋes atiar, “Ai bo kibunio? “Kotema ŋes atiar, “Arai eoŋ Elebit loka Bct-lekem-yuda, alosi aiboiororoi neadumunia aibois.”"
Judges17:10 Kotcma Mika ŋes atiar, “Keboioto keoŋ, koraun papaka, esasedotika da, kainanakini jo atutubeta atomon nuka epuesa ŋolikaru, ka inapen lukitetiak, ka inyamatakon.” Kolomari do Elebit,"
Judges17:11 Kitojok Elebit aiboi ketuŋanan; kosubitc ekatumunan nol bala ediopet kodweke.
Judges17:12 Kotiak Mika Elebit, koraun ekatumunan ŋol esasedotike, kojaun togo loka Mika,"
Judges17:13 Kosodi Mika atemar ebe, “Kwana ajeni eoŋ ebe kekonakini EJAKAIT eoŋ ejok, naarai Elebit ŋes esasedotika.”"
Judges18:1 Kapaarasia kanun amamei ekabaka koIsirael: kapaarasia kanun da amoot ateker naka Idanin airumet nakiboienenet: naarai kiton apaaran nin mam airumetekec etebcikinitai kes katekerin nuka Isirael.
Judges18:2 Kiiukas idwe luka Dan kokekikec ituŋa ikany kotiaikee kere, ituŋa lukirigin, anyoun koSora ka Esitaol, airot akwap, ka aiŋic da; kotemasi kes atiar, “Koloto, konicata akwap.” Kodolot akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, togo loka Mika, koperoto nen."
Judges18:3 Kidunyakinos kesi togo loka Mika, apotu kojenata eporoto loka ekatumunan Elebit: kopaasi nen, kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Iŋai bo kiyauni jo ne? Inyo bo iswamai ijo kane? Inyo bo da ejai jo nce?”"
Judges18:4 Kotema kes atiar, “Kekonaki Mika eoŋ kwaŋin, karop eoŋ, araun da eoŋ ekesascdoti.”"
Judges18:5 Kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Kiŋaiŋait kinit Edeke tetere kiienuni arai ereren akosilosit nakilosi.”"
Judges18:6 Kotema esasedoti kes atiar, “Koloto kainapakina. Ejai crotokus loilosete akonyen nuka EJAKAIT,”"
Judges18:7 Kosodete ituŋa ŋul ikany anyoun, kodolut Lais, koanyut ituŋa luajaas nen, kwape eboioto kinapakina, kwape ejaar epone loka Isidonin, kiyamakina kinapakina da; naarai amamei kakwap yenayait kes, yenepedori aitisil kes kadiokirot, alwaka kesi koSidonin, amameete kes akiro kere kidiotunanan."
Judges18:8 Koboŋosi neejaas iinaeanakee Sora ka Esitaol: kotcmasi iinacanakec kes atiar, “Anyoika bo?”"
Judges18:9 Kotcmasi atiar, “Konyoutu, kaloto asurokin kes, naarai kianyu akwap, ido koany, ejok noi: kanukinyo ipalaritotor? Sirikikalanyakata alosit alomar airum akwap."
Judges18:10 Nailosioto, idolokinete ituŋa luinapakina, elal da akwap: naarai kijaik Edcke ŋes akanikus; aibois naemamei eipud loka ninibore kere yenejai akwap.”"
Judges18:11 Konyout kanen lukokek loka Idanin, koSora ka Esitaol, ituŋa akwat akanykape luakapito luiiis."
Judges18:12 Kolototo, kidukuroto Kiriat-yearim, koYuda: ŋes amaikiniata aibois ŋin Makane-dan, kiton lolo: koany, ejai kau naka Kiriat-yearim."
Judges18:13 Kitoroto nen kiton akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, kopotu togo loka Mika,"
Judges18:14 Kosodete ituŋa ikany lualosito airot akwap naka Lais, aboŋokin ikeeeinaean ebe, “Ŋenete yesi cbe ejai otogoi lu epod, ka iterapim, ka aput naegerer, ka aput nacaluuna? Aso do koomoomata nuiswamaete.”"
Judges18:15 Kopaasi nen, kodoloto togo loka ekatumunan Elebit, ŋes etogo loka Mika, kinitata ŋes ejauteneke,"
Judges18:16 Kobwaata ituŋa akwat akanykape luakapito lujiis, luaraas luka idwe luka Dan, korute loka ere,"
Judges18:17 Koloto ituŋa ikany lualosito airot akwap, kolomasi nen, kolemut aput naegerer, ka epod, ka iterapim, ka aput naealuna: kobwo esasedoti korute ka ituŋa akwat akanykape luakapito lujiis."
Judges18:18 Kosodi kelomasi kwi togo loka Mika, kelemut aput naegerer, ka epod, ka iterapim, ka aput naealuna, kotema esasedoti kes atiar, “Inyo bo iswamaete yesi?”"
Judges18:19 Kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Kililiŋ, korapak lakonikan aitukukon, kaupakinos, koraun papakosi ka esasedotikosi: ejok kereka jo araut esasedoti togo loka cdiopctunanan, arai bo araut esasedoti loka ateker ka ekek loka Isirael?”"
Judges18:20 Kolakar etau loka esasedoti, kolem epod, ka iterapim, ka aput naegerer, kouparos kiruna."
Judges18:21 Kwaŋin kibelokinos koloto, kisinarenoto ludidik ka ibaren ka iboro."
Judges18:22 Kelwanikinos kesi kotogo loka Mika, kotukokinos ituŋa luajaas otogoi luedunyas ketogo loka Mika, kodolokis idwe luka Dan."
Judges18:23 Kiworoto kesi idwe luka Dan. Koŋoliasi kau, kotemasi Mika atiar, “Inyo bo kisiriebi jo, tape ibunit kerioŋet loetia nen?”"
Judges18:24 Kotema atiar, “Ilemarito yesi ikadekesio lueswamauni eoŋ, ka esasedoti, iyekasi da, inyo do bobo ejai eoŋ? Ikote kiŋisito eoŋ ai ebe, ‘Inyo bo kisiriebi jo?’”"
Judges18:25 Kotemasi idwe luka “Dan ŋes atiar, “Sirikepupun ekoniporoto kamakosi, kinyeis ituŋa luenyunyuraka abunokin jo, kosodi ijo atwaniar aijarakon, ka ajair naka lukokalekon.”"
Judges18:26 Kolototo idwe luka Dan: keanyu Mika ebe agogoŋ kesi adepar ŋes, abu kibelokin, kobono togoke."
Judges18:27 Koyanaasi ŋul lueswamauni Mika, ka esasedoti loarai loke, kodolut Lais, otuŋa luiyamakina luinapakina da, kodanyata kes kakwanis naka ekileŋ; kicweata ere kakim,"
Judges18:28 Komamei ekayuunan, naarai alwana kaneajai Sidon, amameete da kes akiro kidiotunanan; ajai ere aditot naka Bet-rekob. Kodukoto bobo ere ŋol, kiboikinos nen."
Judges18:29 Komaikis ekiror loka ere Dan, kwape ajaar ekiror loka Dan papaakee, loaurikinio Isirael: konye kerai sek ekiror loka ere Lais."
Judges18:30 Kosipokis idwe luka Dan kanukee aput naegerer; ido Yonatan okoku loka Geresom, okoku loka Musa, ŋes ka odweke, kes araas isasedotin luka ateker naka Idanin aitodol apaaran naanatarere akwap."
Judges18:31 Kwaŋin kosipokis kesi aput naegerer naka Mika naeswamauni ŋesi, apak kere naajaar etogo loka Edeke Silo."
Judges19:1 Kosodi kanen, kapaarasia kanun naamamear ekabaka koIsirael, ajai Elebit loiboie kosane loka akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, loabu koyana abusiat koBet-lekem-yuda."
Judges19:2 Kolot akebusiat eporo bala naadote, konyou kamake, kolot togo loka papake Bet-Iekem-yuda, kiboi kanen ilapio iwonon,"
Judges19:3 Konyou okilenike, kibwapa ŋes, aimaima ŋes, ainyakun ŋes, kojai ebulesitike kaŋes, ka asigiria aarei: koyana nin ŋes togo loka papake: keanyu papa loka apese ŋes, abu kolakar airiamun kaŋes."
Judges19:4 Kosodi ekamuranike, papa loka apese aitapaikin ŋes; kiboioto kaŋes apaarasia auni: konyamata, komatata, koperoto nen."
Judges19:5 Kosodi kanen kapaaran nakiwononet, kodilokis anyoun tupuruc, konyou alosit: kotema papa loka apese ekamuranike atiar, “Kitalaka ekonitau kidionyamat, kosodi konyet alosit.”"
Judges19:6 Kiboikinos, konyamata, komatata, kes kere iarei: kotema papa loka apese etuŋanan atiar, “Kenainait, kocam kitiwala akuare kere, kiyalamikin ekonitau.”"
Judges19:7 Konyou etuŋanan alosit; konye kimaima ekamuranike, kopere bobo nen."
Judges19:8 Kodilok anyoun alosit tupuruc kapaaran nakikanyet; kotema papa loka apese atiar, “Kitalaka ekonitau kenainait, kidareu aitodol ajotet”; konyamata kesi kere iarei."
Judges19:9 Kosodi kenyou etuŋanan alosit, ŋes ka akebusiat ka ekebulesit, kotema ekamuranike, papa loka apese ŋes atiar, “Koany, etibon kwana akwap, kenainait kitiwala akuare kere: koany, eapie apaaran adaun, kopero ne, kolakar ekonitau; kodilok moi alosit, tetere ilosi ore.”"
Judges19:10 Konye koner etuŋanan aitiwalar akuare nin konye abu konyou kolot, kodol Yebus (nopenol ŋes Yerusalem): ajaas ŋes asigiria aarei nuapesikinitai aibwanenisio; ajai da abusiatake kaŋes."
Judges19:11 Naaapikiniata kesi Yebus, kitibonite akwap eut; kotema ebulesit ekejakait atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, bia kapaasi ore lo loka Iyebusin, kaperoto nen.”"
Judges19:12 Kotema ekejakait ŋes atiar, “Mam oni kipaari ore loka emoit, lomam erai loka idwe luka Isirael; konye kitubor kiton Gibea.”"
Judges19:13 Kotema ŋesi ekebulesit atiar, “Bia, kekunyakisi adiopet kaiboisio kanu; kiperi da Gibea, arai Rama.”"
Judges19:14 Kwaŋin kotuboros koloto; kowarik kes akwap eiduny keGibea, loerai loka Benyamin,"
Judges19:15 Kopaasi ŋina, alosit apero Gibea: abu koloma, kiboikin orot loka ere: naarai amamei ituŋanan yenabu koyana kes togoke apero."
Judges19:16 Ido koany, abu emojoŋ kobu kaswamuke komanikor eboŋ; erai etuŋanan ŋol loka akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, eboie da koGibea: konye ituŋa luka aibois araas Ibenyamin."
Judges19:17 Kiteluo akekonye koany ekaloton korot loka ere; kotema emoion atiar, “Ai bo ilosi ijo? Lali da kibunio?”"
Judges19:18 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Kilosi anyoun kolset-lekem-yuda kiton osaŋe loka akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim; bukosi nina, abu kalosite Bet-lekem-yuda: ido alosi kwana togo loka EJAKAIT; konye emamei etuŋanan loketolomari eoŋ togoke."
Judges19:19 Kwabo ejaas anya ka inyamat luka asigiriakosi; ejaas da imugatin ka ebino kanukan, ka akejaanakinanikon, ka ekatumunan loejaas ka ikejaanakinakakon: emamei eipud idiobore.”"
Judges19:20 Kotema emoion atiar, “Kinapakin ijo; konye kabe eoŋ eipudakon kere; konye sirikiper orot.”"
Judges19:21 Kwaŋin koyana ŋes togoke, koinak asigiria anya: kilotata kesi akeicnekee, konyamata, komatata da."
Judges19:22 Kelakaros ikecetauon, koany, kolukut ituŋa lukore etogo, kes odwe luka Belial, konanananata ekirigi; kotemasi kesi emojoŋ elopet etogo atiar, “Kitolom etuŋanan loaloma togokon, kaienata ŋes.”"
Judges19:23 Koloma etuŋanan, elopet etogo, mamakee, kotema kes atiar, “Mam, ikainacan, kenainaito, sirikiswamata aronis naetia nen; naarai alomu etuŋanan ŋol togoka, sirikiswamata nun nuka abaŋaanut."
Judges19:24 Koany, akokuka na apese, ka abusiatake; etolomuni eoŋ kes kwana, kitisiloto yesi kes, kiswamakis kes nuitojokito yesi; konye sirikiswamakis etuŋanan ŋ nun nukola abaŋaanut.”"
Judges19:25 Konye koneroto ituŋa apupun ŋes: kwaŋin kitiŋ etuŋanan akebusiat, koina kes; koienutu ŋes, komunautu ŋes akuare kia kiton tupuruc: keeila kide, koosikis ŋes."
