Judges19:26 Kosodi aberu abunore keeila kide, kibirokin okek loka etogo loka etuŋanan loajai ejakaitike, aitodol naaeaunia akwap,"
Judges19:27 Konyou ejakaitike tupuruc, konaa ikekia luka etogo, koloma alosit: ido koany, ebirokina aberu akebusiat okek loka etogo, kojaas akaninike okek,"
Judges19:28 Kotema ŋesi ŋin atiar, “Konyou, kaloto”; konye mam yenabu Koboŋok: kosodi ŋesi adakakin ŋin asigiria; konyou etuŋanan, kolot aiboisike."
Judges19:29 Kedol togoke, abu kolem ekileŋ, kitiŋ akebusiat, kotubutub inerioke atutubeta atomon ka nuarei, kijuka nin oikorun kere luka Isirael."
Judges19:30 Kojaun kwanata ebe, apotu kere luapotu koanyutu ŋun kotemasi ebe, “Mam apeŋo eswamatai ibore yenetia nen, karaida aanyun, ageun kapaaran naanyounioto idwe luka Isirael kakwap nako Misiri kiton lolo: koomoomata nuke, kinerut, kolimosi.”"
Judges20:1 Kosodete idwe kere luka Isirael alomar, kotukokin ekodet bala ediopetunanan, ageun koDan kiton Beer-seba, kakwap da naka Gilead, mama ejai EJAKAIT Misipa."
Judges20:2 Kitodiaros ijaka luka ituŋa kere, kes atekerin kere nuka Isirael, katukot naka ituŋa luka Edeke, ituŋa ilukumin akwat aoŋon luelosete kakeje luautunito ikileŋa."
Judges20:3 (Apotu idwe luka Benyamin kopuput ebe alototo idwe luka Isirael Misipa.) Kotemasi idwe luka Isirael atiar, “Kolimokinai sio, ekonakini ai aronis na iswamaun?”"
Judges20:4 Koboŋok Elebit, okilenike loka aberu naaaritai ebe, “Abu kadol Gibea loerai loka Benyamin, eoŋ ka akabusiat kapero nen."
Judges20:5 Kosodete ituŋa luka Gibea anyoun asurokin eoŋ, kalukakis eoŋ togo kuare; aomitos aiar eoŋ, apotu komunaut akabusiat, kotwana."
Judges20:6 Abu kayana akabusiat, katubutub ŋes, kejuka akwap kere naka airumet naka Isirael: naarai eswamata nukasilianut nukabanaanut da kotoma Isirael."
Judges20:7 Koanyutu, yes idwe luka Isirael, yes kere, kolimutu akusikirot, kinerut.”"
Judges20:8 Konyout ituŋa kere bala ediopetunanan, kotemasi ebe, “Mam idiopet kaoni elosi owemake, karaida idiopet kaoni aboŋor togoke,"
Judges20:9 Konye kiswamakini oni Gibea kwanata; kilosi asurokin ŋes kailamilam keroet.
Judges20:10 Kiseuni ituŋa itomon ka ninikwatat katekerin kere nuka Isirael, ka akwatat kotoma elukumit, ka elukumit kotoma olukumin itomon, aomikin ituŋa inyamat, tetere iswamaete, naedolioto Gibea loka Benyamin, kwape ejaar abaŋaanut kere naeswamata koIsirael.”"
Judges20:11 Kwaŋin kotukokinos ituŋa kere luka Isirael asurokin ere kimorikikina nepepe bala ediopetunanan,"
Judges20:12 Kiiukasi atekerin nuka Isirael ituŋa anatar ateker kere naka Benyamin ebe, “Anyoin aronis na naaponi kiswamai kamakus?"
Judges20:13 Aso do koyautu ituŋa odwe luka Belial, lueiaas Gibea, tetere kiari kes, kalemas aronis koIsirael.” Konye apotu Ibenyamin koneroto apupun eporoto loka Iinacanakec idwe luka Isirael."
Judges20:14 Kotukokinos idwe luka Benyamin anyoun koreria kopotu Gibea, alomar aitiji idwe luka Isirael."
Judges20:15 Aponi kimarai idwe luka Benyamin kapaaran kaŋin koreria, ituŋa ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukanykape luautunito ikileŋa, kogelara lueboiete koGibea, luemwaasi akwat akanykaarei, ituŋa luaseunitai."
Judges20:16 Ajaas otuŋa nul kere ituŋa luaseunitai akwat akanykaarei inodialik; nolidiopet apedor aporoeikin etimat da alicait, komam ediaki,"
Judges20:17 Aponi kimarai ituŋa luka Isirael kogelara Benyamin, ituŋa ilukumin akwat aoŋon Iuautunito ikileŋa; nul kere araas ikaiiok,"
Judges20:18 Konyout idwe luka Isirael koloto Betel, kinitata Edeke kotemasi ebe, “Iŋai kiŋarenikini sio alosit aitiii idwe luka Benyamin?” Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Yuda ŋes iŋareni.”"
Judges20:19 Konyout idwe luka Isirael tupuruc, kidukuroto asurokin Gibea."
Judges20:20 Kolomasi ituŋa luka Isirael aitiji Benyamin; kiderakinos ituŋa luka Isirael aitiji kes koGibea,"
Judges20:21 Kolomut idwe luka Benyamin koGibea, kibirokis kwap kapaaran kaŋin luka Isiraelin ituŋa ilukumin akaisaarei ka luarei."
Judges20:22 Kosodete ituŋa, kes ituŋa luka Isirael, atitinior, kiderakinos ejie kaibois naederakina kesi kapaaran nasodit."
Judges20:23 Koloto idwe luka Isirael komonyata kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT kiton eboŋ; kinitata EJAKAIT ebe, “Ekunyakini bobo eoŋ lolo aitiii idwe luka Benyamin onaceka?” Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Kolot kosurok ŋes.”"
Judges20:24 Kikunyakis idwe luka Isirael asurokin idwe luka Benyamin kapaaran nakiareit,"
Judges20:25 Kolom Benyamin asurokin kes koGibea kapaaran nakiareit, kibirokis bobo kwap luka idwe luka Isirael ituŋa ilukumin itomon ka lukanykauni; nul kere autunito ikileŋa."
Judges20:26 Kosodete idwe kere luka Isirael, ka ituŋa kere alosit, kodoloto Bet-el, komonyata, kiboioto kanen kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kikanyata eteŋei apaaran ŋin kiton eboŋ; koinakis ainakineta nuicwcio, ka ainakineta nuka ainapakin mama ejai EJAKAIT,"
Judges20:27 Kiŋitata idwe luka Isirael EJAKAIT, (naarai ajai asaduku naka aitutuket naka Edeke nen kapaarasia kanun,"
Judges20:28 Pinekas, okoku loka Eleasar, okoku loka Aaron, ŋes abwoi kakonyeneke kapaarasia kanun) ebe, “Alomari kereka eoŋ bobo aitiii idwe luka Benyamin onaceka, arai bo apalari?” Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Koloto; naarai ciaikini ŋes moi akanikon.”"
Judges20:29 Kibwaik Isirael ikaperunok alukun Gibea.
Judges20:30 Koloto idwe luka Isirael asurokin idwe luka Benyamin apaaran nakiwuniet, kiderakinos asurokin Gibea, kwape kapakio ace."
Judges20:31 Kolomas idwe luka Benyamin asurokin ituŋa, kinalaarai kes kore; kogeut aiar ka aidany kotuna kwape kapakio ace, korotin lukapolok, ediopet loelosi Bet-el, loce da loelosi Gibea, koitela, ituŋa luka Isirael kwape akaisauni."
Judges20:32 Kotemasi idwe luka Benyamin atiar, “Kidanya kes kakonyenewok, kwape lem.” Konye kotemasi idwe luka Isirael ebe, “Kakerata oni, kenalaasi kes kore kiton orotin lukapolok.”"
Judges20:33 Konyout ituŋa kere luka Isirael kaiboisikec, kiderakinos koBaal-tamar: konemcsikinos ikaperunok kaiooisikec, ŋes Maare-geba."
Judges20:34 Kopotu ituŋa ilukumin itomon luaseunitai kotoma Isirael kere asurokin Gibea, kosisior ejie noi; konye mam kwi ajenete ebe eapikinit kes aronis."
Judges20:35 Kodany EJAKAIT Benyamin kakonyen nuka Isirael: komudiasi idwe luka Isirael kapaaran kaŋin luka Benyamin ituŋa ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany, ka akwatat: ŋul kere autunito ikileŋa."
Judges20:36 Kwaŋin kojenut idwe luka Benyamin ebe adanyi kes; naarai apotu iruna luka Isirael kojalakis Benyamin aibois, naarai amunos kesi ikaperunok luebwaikinito kesi asurokin Gibea."
Judges20:37 Kisunyasi ikaperunok, kokerata Gibea; kikunyakis ikaperunok, kodanyata lukore kere kakwanis naka ekileŋ."
Judges20:38 Apotu ituŋa luka Isirael ka ikaperunok kinerunito aanyunet na ebe, itupuruunete kesi apuru naepol kore."
Judges20:39 Kibeleunos ituŋa luka Isirael kojie, kogeu Benyamin aiar ka aidany ituŋa luka Isirael kwape ituŋa akaisauni: naarai abalas ebc, “Abeit kidanyi kes kakonyenewok kwape kojie losodit.”"
Judges20:40 Konye kegeu apuru apuruun kore kosubite bala epir loka apuru, koŋoliasi Ibenyamin kau, ido koany, apurie ere kere kiton akuj."
Judges20:41 Kibeleunos ituŋa luka Isirael, koumokis ituŋa luka Benyamin: naarai ajenete ebe ebunokinit kes aronis."
Judges20:42 Kanuka ŋun apotu kibelooros kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael aibe orot loka amodiŋ; konye kodudun kes ejie; kosodete lualomunete koreria amudiar kes kanen.
Judges20:43 Apotu kolukakis Ibenyamin, kodapata kes, kicakaeakata kes kaiboisikee nakibworaret, kiton aibois naiteos koGibea kokide."
Judges20:44 Kotwakata luka Benyamin ituŋa ilukumin itomon ka lukanykauni; nul kere araas ituŋa lukirigin.
Judges20:45 Kibelooros kokeriasi amodiŋ moru loka Rimon: kideput korotin ituŋa ilukumin ikany kakesi; kodudunata kes kiton Gidom, kodanyata ituŋa ilukumin iarei kakesi."
Judges20:46 Kwaŋin kere luapotu kotwaka kapaaran kaŋin luka Benyamin emwaasi ituŋa ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany luautunito ikileŋa; nul kere araas ituŋa lukirigin.
Judges20:47 Konye apotu ituŋa akwat akanykape kibelooros kokeriasi amodiŋ, moru Rimon, kiboioto komoru Rimon ilapio iwonon,"
Judges20:48 Kibeleunos bobo idwe luka Isirael mama ejaas idwe luka Benyamin kodanyata kes kakwanis naka ekileŋ, ere kere, ka ibaren, kere da luapotu kesi kodumut: bobo da apotu kicweata ireria kere luapotu kesi kodumut."
Judges21:1 Apotu ituŋa luka Isirael kiyapoikinito koMisipa ebe, “Mam idio kaoni ekorakini Benyamin akokuke aimany.”"
Judges21:2 Kopotu ituŋa Bet-el, kiboioto kanen kiton eboŋ kakonyen nuka Edeke, kodelosi, komonyata noi,"
Judges21:3 Kotemasi atiar, “Wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, kanukinyo eswamaunor na kotoma Isirael, ebe lolo ateker adiopet atwaniar koIsirael?”"
Judges21:4 Kosodi kanen tupuruc, kodilokis ituŋa anyoun, kodukokis etem nen, koinakis ainakineta nuieweio ka ainakineta nuka ainapakin."
Judges21:5 Kotemasi idwe luka Isirael atiar, “Iŋai bo kotoma atekerin kere nuka Isiraellomam abunit atukokin mama ejai EJAKAIT? Naarai apotu kiyapoikinito aiyaposit naepol kanuka nol lomam abunit atukokin mama ejai EJAKAIT Misipa ebe, ‘Abeit eario ŋol.’”"
Judges21:6 Kiitut idwe luka Isirael kanuka Benyamin onaeekee, kotemasi atiar, “Ejai ateker adiopet naagelar kotoma Isiraellolo."
Judges21:7 Kikonakini oni ai kidumakini nul luesalito aŋor, naarai kiyapo kalimito EJAKAIT ebe mam kikorakini kes adwewok aimany?”"
Judges21:8 Kotemasi atiar, “Iŋai bo adiopet kotoma atekerin nuka Isirael namam abunit mama ejai EJAKAIT Misipa?” Ido koany, amamei edio loka Yabesgilead loabunit atukokin."
Judges21:9 Naarai naemarere ituŋa, koany, amamei ediopet loka luiboienenete koYabes-gilead kanen."
Judges21:10 Kijuka ekodet ituŋa ilukumin itomon ka luarei lukirigin noi, kicorak kes ebe, “Koloto kodanyata luibojete koYabes-gilead kakwanis naka ekileŋ, kanor ka ludidik da,"
Judges21:11 Iswamaete kwanata; imudiarete eut ŋclikiliokit, ka ŋiniberu naeperito kekiliokit.”"
Judges21:12 Kodumut kaneejaas luiboienenete koYabes-gilead abekon akwat aoŋon, numam ajeneteekiliokit kanuka apero kaŋes: koyanautu kes oidukurun Silo, loejai akwap naka Kanaan,"
Judges21:13 Kijuka ekodet kere kinera kaidwe luka Benyamin luajaas moru Rimon, kolimosi ainapakin kamakec,"
Judges21:14 Kobono Benyamin kapak kaŋin; kokorakis kes apesur nuetaiarcte kesi kanor nuka Yabes-gilead: konye apotu kokadata kes.
Judges21:15 Kiitut ituŋa kanuka Benyamin, naarai abu EJAKAIT kibwaik arorwa atekerin nuka Isirael."
Judges21:16 Kosodete imakio luka ekodet atemar ebe, “Kikonakini oni ai kidumakini nul Iuesalito aŋor, naarai amudiar aŋor kotoma Benyamin?”"
Judges21:17 Kotemasi atiar, “Ibusakinit koiaun airumet naka nul kaluakuata luka Benyamin, kinyek ateker amwatario koIsirael."
Judges21:18 Konye mam oni kipedori akorakin kes adwewok aimany: naarai eyapoikinito idwe luka Isirael ebe, ‘Kikenoi ŋol loekorakini Benyamin apese aimany.’’’"
Judges21:19 Kotemasi atiar, “Koany, ejai epueit loka EJAKAIT ŋolikaru Silo, loejai agolitomei naka Bet-el, ari nakokide naka erot loepol loenyouni koBet-el kiton Sekem, eŋalakimak da naka Lebona.”"
Judges21:20 Kieorakis kesi idwe luka Benyamin ebe, “Koloto, koperut komanikoria luka emusabibu:"
Judges21:21 Koanyut, ido koany, arai kelomut adwe nuka Silo ekosio okosio, ilomunete do yesi da komanikoria luka emusabibu, ikamunete yesi ŋinituŋanan akeberu kotoma adwe nuka Silo, kosodete alosit akwap naka Benyamin."
Judges21:22 Kosodi naeponiata lukapapakee arai iinaeanakee aosan mamakosi, kitemari isio kes ebe, ‘Kokorakinai sio kes kasianut: naarai mam kipou kademakisi kes ŋinituŋanan akeberu kojie; kwabo mam yes ipotu kokorakis kes; ti do yes kigwaut akirot.’’’"
Judges21:23 Kiswamata idwe luka Benyamin kwaŋin, koyanaasi aŋor, kwape ajaar etiaikee, loka nun kanuekosiete, nuapotu kesi koyanaasi: kolototo kobonosi airumetekec, kodukoto irereia, kiboioto kotoma."
Judges21:24 Konyout idwe luka Isirael kanen kapak kaŋin, ŋinituŋanan atekerike okekike da, kolototo kanen ŋinituŋanan airumeteke."
Judges21:25 Kapaarasia kanun amamei ekabaka koIsirael: eswamai ŋinituŋanan nuadolito kakonyeneke bon.
Ruth1:1 Kosodi kanen kapaarasia nuatubioto ikatubok, abu ebeli kojau akwap. Abu etuŋanan loka Bet-lekem-yuda kolot aiboiororoi akwap naka Moab, ŋes ka akeberu, ka odweke iarei,"
Ruth1:2 Ekiror loka etuŋanan kaŋol kerai Elimelek, ekiror da loka aberuke Naomi, ikiroria luka odwcke iarei Malon ka Kilion, Ipuratin luka Bet-Iekem-yuda, Apotu kodoloto akwap naka Moab, kiboiororos kaŋina."
Ruth1:3 Kotwana Elimelek ekile loka Naomi; kosal ŋesi ka odweke iarei.
Ruth1:4 Apotu komanyata aŋor nuka Moab; ekiror loka adiopet Orupa, ekiror da loka nakiareit Rusi: apotu kesi kodaut ikar kwape itomon kaŋina."
Ruth1:5 Kotwakata Malon ka Kilion iarei kere; kotwania aberu odweke iarei ka ekileke da.
Ruth1:6 Kosodi konyet ŋesi anyoun ka aterakake, aboŋor anyoun kakwap naka Moab; naarai abu kiira kakwap naka Moab ebe abu EJAKAIT koanyanar iketuŋa ainakin kes inyamat,"
Ruth1:7 Konyou kaibois kanaeboienenoo, ka aterakake aarei nepepe kaŋes; koderoto erot aboŋor akwap naka Yuda,"
Ruth1:8 Kosodi Naomi atemar aterakake aarei ebe, “Ape, koboŋosi ŋinidiopet kayesi ore loka totoke; kiswamak EJAKAIT yes nukasianut, kwape ipotu yesi da kiswamakiniata lukatwak, ka eoŋ da."
Ruth1:9 Koinak EJAKAIT yes adumun aiyeŋun, ŋinidiopet kayesi kore loka ekileke.” Kosodi ŋesi ainu kes; kodelosi, komonyata akiyo."
Ruth1:10 Kotemasi kesi ŋes atiar, “Okwe ito, konye kiboŋori isio nepepe kajo mama ejaas ituŋakon.”"
Ruth1:11 Kosodi Naomi atemar kes ebe, “Kibelokinos bobo adweka: kanukinyo ipudatar yesi aupar keoŋ? Eroko kereka idwe ejaas aliligeteka lueraunos ikiliokokus?"
Ruth1:12 Kibelokinos bobo, adweka, koloto; naarai amoion eoŋ noi, mam adumuni ekiliokit ece. Arai kener eoŋ ebe, Amuno, karaida kajaun kekiliokit akuare na, kauru da idwe lusap;"
Ruth1:13 Tikidarata kereka yesi kes apoloor? ŋes inyeiniata yesi adumun ikiliok? Okwe, adweka; naarai arieba eoŋ kanukus, naarai abu akan naka EJAKAIT kolom aluikin eoŋ.”"
Ruth1:14 Kodelosi bobo, komonyata akiyo: konu Orupa tataake, konye kimorikikinos Rusi kaŋes."
Ruth1:15 Kobala ebe, “Koany, abono akainikon mama ejaas ituŋake, ido mama ejai edekeke: kobono ijo da kotupa akainikon.”"
Ruth1:16 Kotema Rusi atiar, “Sirikiinaina eoŋ aiial jo, aboŋor komam kiupar kajo: naarai mama ibeenenei ijo, ŋes abeenenei eoŋ da; kaneiperenenei ijo, ŋes aperenenei eoŋ da; eraunos ikonituŋa ikatuŋa, Ekonideke da Ekadeke."
Ruth1:17 Neitwanikini ijo, ŋes atwanikini eoŋ, ŋes kedaikinio da; keswamak EJAKAIT eoŋ kwaŋin ka adepar da, arai ca kitiaki akirot kere jo keoŋ dimarai atwanare.”"
Ruth1:18 Kosodi keanyu ŋesi ebe adau aitogogoŋ alosit kaŋes, kinyck do einer kaŋes."
Ruth1:19 Kosodete kesi aarei adipar aitodol naadolioto Bet-lekem. Kosodi kanen kedaut adolore Bet-lekem, abu ere kere koriaria kanukee, kirioros aŋor ebe, “Naomi nape na?”"
Ruth1:20 Kobala kes ebe, “Sirikinyarito eoŋ Naomi, konye konyarai Mara: naarai abu Lokapedor kere keswamak eoŋ nukadwarak noi."
Ruth1:21 Abu kolo kanyou kane eleleba, ketobonu EJAKAIT ore emamei ibore: inyo ca kinyaritotor Naomi? Kwabo erai EJAKAIT ekajenen kamaka, abu Lokapedor kere ketican eoŋ.”"
Ruth1:22 Kwaŋin koboŋ Naomi, ka Rusi Amoabut, ateranike nepepe kaŋes, naaboŋunio anyoun kakwap naka Moab: kodoloto Bet-lekem napeegeunio aisak."
Ruth2:1 Ajai da Naomi onaee loka ekileke, etuŋanan loecasit, ekabaran loka ekek loka Elimelek; ekekiror Boas,"
Ruth2:2 Kotema Rusi Amoabut Naomi atiar, “Mere kalot kwana mana airar alunuran nuka akima, ka aitup da ŋin yenikadumakini asianut kakonycneke.” Kotema ŋes atiar, “Ape cabo, akokuka.”"
Ruth2:3 Abu kolot, kobu airar toma amana naesakiata ikasakak; ido kodum alukat naka amana naka Boas, loarai loka ekek leka Elimelek,"
Ruth2:4 Ido koany, kobu Boas koBet-lekem, kotema ikasakak atiar, “EJAKAIT kojai kayes.” Koboŋokis ŋes ebe, “Kisirereŋ jo EJAKAIT.”"
Ruth2:5 Kosodi Boas atemar ekebulesit loetasaki ikasakak atiar, “Nakanai apese na?”"
Ruth2:6 Abu ebulesit loetasaki ikasakak Koboŋok ŋes ebe, “Na ŋes apese Amoabut naaboŋunete kaNaomi anyoun kakwap naka Moab:"
Ruth2:7 Abu kiner cbe,, Kenaiŋaito, kerarunun ka atukonokin da kaneasakiata ikasakak koisutan da’; kosodi do abunore, eswama apeanan katupuruc kiton kwana, mam ebonorit ore.”"
Ruth2:8 Kosodi Boas atemar Rusi ebe, “Mere ipupi ijo, akokuka? Sirilosenenei airar mana ace, karaida anyoun kane, konye kojaenena die kapesuruka."
Ruth2:9 Kojaenenas akonyekon mana naesakenenoo, kotupanar ijo da kes: mam kereka eeorakinit itelepai ebe Sirikitironorete jo? Ido da nakijakia akure, kolosenenei neejai amot komasi ŋun nuewokunete itelepai.”"
Ruth2:10 Kosodi kibiror ebuburia, kisuded, kobala ŋesi ebe, “Inyo bo adumunia asianut kakonyenekon, ijo ajenun eoŋ, kwabo arai eoŋ arroit?”"
Ruth2:11 Koboŋok Boas kobala ŋes ebe, “Aponi kalimonokin cut kere nuibu kiswamak tataakon ageun kaneatwania ekilekon: ido kwape ibu ijo kopalia papakon ka totokon ka akwap da nakolo kiwurikinio, kobu otuŋa lumam apeŋo iieni,"
Ruth2:12 Kotacak EJAKAIT jo akoniswam, ido EJAKAIT Edeke loka Isirael, loibu aimee kwap kabebenokake korop jo noi.”"
Ruth2:13 Kotema atiar, “Mere kadum asianut kakonyenekon ejakaitika; naarai kitalaka, naarai inera kakonibulesit nuka asianut, karaida mam arai adiopet kotoma abulesinikon.”"
Ruth2:14 Kosodi nakedol apak nakainyam, abu Eoas kobala ŋes ebe, “Bia ainyam atap, kieunyak aodunetekon odia loedwar.” Kiboikin ŋesi awai naka ikasakak; apotu koinakis ŋes imomwa luikawooritai, konyamkimonikin kokurwok."
Ruth2:15 Kosodi kenyou airar, kicorak Boas iketelepai, kotema atiar, “Kirarunun ŋesi koisutan da konye siriretanakinete ŋes,"
Ruth2:16 Komudanakinete ŋes da koisutan, kinyeis, kirar ŋes alopet, konye mam ilimunete.”"
Ruth2:17 Kosodi ŋesi airar kamana aitiwar akwap; kicom nuabu kotukonokinite kodum bala epa loka esairi.
Ruth2:18 Kibwoko, koloma ore; abu tataake koany nuatukonokinit ŋesi; koyau koinak lunan edeuni neai nakedau aimonikin."
Ruth2:19 Kosodi tataake kobala ebe, “Ai bo lolo kirararit? Ido ai bo kiswamaarit? Koinakinai asuliany ŋol loabu kojen jo.” Kitejenik ŋesi tataake ŋol loeswamaete kaŋes, kinera ebe, “Ekiliokit lokiswamaa lolo ekekiror Boas.”"
Ruth2:20 Kobala Naomi ateranike ebe, “Kisirereŋ EJAKAIT ŋes, lomam enaŋi akesianut mama kalukajarak ka lukatwak da.” Naomi kobala ŋes ebe, “Ekiliokit ŋolŋes lokokekiwok eut, ediopet ka lukalakunakawok.”"
Ruth2:21 Kiner Rusi Amoabut ebe, “Ee ba, abu ŋesi katema eoŋ ebe, ‘Kojaenena die kitelepaika aitodol naedauniata aisak nuka kere,’”"
Ruth2:22 Kosodi Naomi atemar Rusi ateranike ebe, “Ejok, akokuka, koupananasi nepepe kabulesinike, kwabo kinyein adumun jo kamana ace kere.”"
Ruth2:23 Kosodi ŋesi aapienena kabulesin nuka Boas airarenen aitodol naedaunere aisak esairi ka aisak akima; kiboienenei katataake.
Ruth3:1 Abu Naomi tataake kotema ŋes ebe, “Akokuka, mam kamoikini neibworaria, tetere iiauni ejok?"
Ruth3:2 Emamei kereka Boas lokokekiwok lolem iboienenei ijo kabulesinike? Koany, epiesi esairi akuare na kopejal."
Ruth3:3 Aso kiloŋ kotuanar kakinyet, konap anapitokon, kijesar opejal; konye sirikitejenun mama ejai etuŋanan ŋol aitodol naedaunia ŋesi ainyam ka aimat."
Ruth3:4 Kosodi naeperio, kojen aibois naeperi ŋesi, koloma ijo da kopuko akeieke koper; kilimokini ŋesi jo nuiswamai.”"
Ruth3:5 Kotema ŋesi ebe, “Nuiner ijo kere eswamai.”"
Ruth3:6 Kosodi ŋesi aiiesar opejal, kiswama kere kwape ajaatar nuecorakinit ŋes tataake."
Ruth3:7 Kosodi kedau Boas ainyam ka aimat, kolakar etauke, kolot apero ariri naka atukot naka akima: kobu ŋesi eeedi, kopuko akejeneke, koper."
Ruth3:8 Kosodi kidinebai korien etuŋanan, kibelokin; ido koany, aperi aberu kakeieneke."
Ruth3:9 Kotema ebe, “Iŋai bo ijo?” Koboŋok ŋesi ebe, “Eoŋ Rusi akonibulesit; asa kimukoo abulesitikon kanapitokon; naarai irai ekalakunanika.”"
Ruth3:10 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Kisireren EJAKAIT jo akokuka; itodu asianut naedeparit kosane aitelekar nasodit, naarai mam itupanar itelepai, arai lukican arai ikabarak."
Ruth3:11 Kwape kwana da, akokuka, sirikiyoŋ; keswamakini jo kere nuinera; naarai ejeŋi ere kere loka ikatuŋa kwape iraar aberu naiiok."
Ruth3:12 Erai teni abeit ebe arai eoŋ lokokekikon; konye ejai ece loeapie koinaeane aitelekarit eoŋ.
Ruth3:13 Aso kosalak ne akuare na, kosodi kedol atupurue arai kiiswamak ŋesi jo aswam naka ekalakunan, ejok; kiswamak do ŋesi jo aswam naka ekalakunan; konye do arai mam ecamuni aiswamakin jo aswam naka ekalakunan, ŋes do keswamakinia eoŋ jo aswam naka ekalakunan, kwape ejaria EJAKAIT. Koper aitodol tupuruc.”"
Ruth3:14 Koper akejeneke aitodol tupuruc; konyou eroko yeniee kejena yeniee. Naarai abu kotema ebe, “Sirikejenun ebe abunit aberu na opeial.”"
Ruth3:15 Kotema atiar, “Koyau elou loimukor ijo, kitin”: Kosodi ŋesi aitin; kitemokinai aitemisio akanykape nuka esairi kisibwok ŋes; kolot ore,"
Ruth3:16 Kosodi kedol neejai tataake kotema atiar, “Iŋai bo ijo, akokuka?” Kolimok ŋes kere nuabu etuŋanan kiswamak ŋes."
Ruth3:17 Kotema ŋesi ebe, “ŋes kainakini aitemisio nu akanykape nuka esairi; naarai abu kalimok ebe, ‘Mam ilosi neejai tataakon komamei ibore,’”"
Ruth3:18 Kosodi atemar ebe, “Kiboikin kopala akokuka, aitodol neijenunia neebearete akiro: naarai mam etuŋanan ŋol iyenuni aitodol naedaunia akirot na lolo.”"
Ruth4:1 Kosodi Boas alosit orute, kiboikin nina; ido koany, kotubor ekalakunan ŋol loabu Boas kolimite; kotema ŋesi ŋol ebe, “Ŋo ba loce! Kopau ber kiboikin ne.” Kopaa kiboikin,"
Ruth4:2 Abu koya ikiliok itomon komakio lukore kotema kes ebe, “Kiboikinos ne.” Kiboikinos kesi da."
Ruth4:3 Kotema ŋesi ekalakunan ebe, “Naomi naabu kobonu anyoun akwap naka Moab egwelari alup nuaraas kolo nuka onacewok Elimelek:"
Ruth4:4 Ido aomit eoŋ aitejenikin jo, kabala ebe, Kogwel kakonyen nuka nul kaluiboiete kane, akonyen da nuka imakio luka ituŋaka, Arai ikoto ailak, kolaku; konye arai mam ikoto alakun, asa bo kolimokinai, kajen: naarai emamei yenelakuni nabarai jo; eoŋ da ŋes katupit jo.” Kotema atiar, “Alakuni bo,”"
Ruth4:5 Kosodi Boas atemar atiar, “Naigwelia amana kakan naka Naomi kibusakinit agwel Rusi da Amoabut, aberu naka lokatwan, aitoboŋikin airumeteke ekiror loka lokatwan.”"
Ruth4:6 Kotema ekalakunan ŋol ebe, “Mam apedor alakun kanukaij, kenyek amunaun airumeteka: koyana ijo ailakaka nin; naarai mam eoŋ apedori alakun.”"
Ruth4:7 Lo da ŋes kerai epone loka alakun ka aisiee da kolo kasonya koIsirael, aitogogoŋ akiro kere; alaeununei etuŋanan amukatake kosodi ainakin Iocetunanan; koraenena kwaŋin aitodunet koIsirael."
Ruth4:8 Kosodi ekalakunan ŋol atemar Boas ebe, “Kogwel do ijo.” Kolac amukatake."
Ruth4:9 Kotema Boas imakio ka ituŋa kere da ebe, “Iraas ikajenak lolo, agwel eoŋ lukolo araas luka Elimelek kere, ka luaraas luka Kilion ka luka Malon da, kakan naka Naomi."
Ruth4:10 Rusi da Amoabut apuserut naka Malon agwel eoŋ araun aberuka, aitoboŋikin airumeteke ekiror loka lokatwan, kinyek ekiror loka lokatwan aolior koinacanake, korute da loka aiboisitike: iraas yesi lolo ikajenak.”"
Ruth4:11 Kosodete ituŋa kere luajaas orute, ka imakio da atemar ebe, “Kirai isio ikaienak, Kituput EJAKAIT aberu naabu togokon kwape Rakel ka Lea nuapotu kesi aarei kodukoto ekek loka Isirael: kiswama ijo da nuibusak kotoma Epurat, kojenun kotoma Bet-lekem,"
Ruth4:12 Ekonikal da koraun bala ekal loka Peres loaurikini Tamar Yuda, kanuka aur nakiinakini EJAKAIT kotoma aberu na nakatumunan.”"
Ruth4:13 Kosodi Boas ayaŋaar Rusi, koraun akeberu; koloma mamake, ido koinak EJAKAIT ŋes apotuun, kouru esapat."
Ruth4:14 Kobalas aŋor Naomi ebe, “Kituritete EJAKAIT, lomam kinyeinit jo lolo emamei ekalakunan, kojenun du ekirorike kolsirael."
Ruth4:15 Eraun ŋesi da kamakon eketeteunan aiiar, ido eketanan kamojoŋukon; naarai ateranikon, nakimina ijo, naitelekarit idwe ikanykaarei lusap kajokis kamakon, ŋes auru ŋes.”"
Ruth4:16 Kosodi Naomi ayaŋaar ikoku, kotunak atorobuke, koraun akasaanike."
Ruth4:17 Apotu aŋor aidunyetake konerokis ekiror kineras ebe, “Aurikin Naomi ikoku yenisapat.” Komaikis ekekiror Obed: ŋol ŋes papa loka Yese, papa loka Daudi,"
Ruth4:18 Na da ŋes aur naka Peres: Peres kouru Kesuron,"
Ruth4:19 Kesuron kouru Ram, Ram kouru Aminadab:"
Ruth4:20 Aminadab kouru Nason, Nason kouru Salumon;"
Ruth4:21 Salumon kouru Boas, Boas da kouru Obed;"
Ruth4:22 Obed kouru Yese, Yese da kouru Daudi."
1Samuel1:1 Kosodi kojai etuŋanan loka Ramataim-sopim loka akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, ekekiror Elukana okoku loka Yerokam, okoku loka Eliku, okoku loka Toku, okoku loka Sup, Epuraimut."
1Samuel1:2 Kojaas ŋes aŋor aarei; adiopet ekekiror Kana, naee da ekekiror Penina: ajaas Penina idwe, konyc amameete Kana idwe,"
1Samuel1:3 Kosodi konyounenei etuŋanan ŋol koreke ŋolikaru, kolosenenei aima ka ainakin asuban mama ejai EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kotoma Silo, Kojaas ŋina odwe iarei luka Eli, Kopuni ka Pinekas, isasedotin luka EJAKAIT."
1Samuel1:4 Kosodi kedol apaaran nakeinakinia Elukana asuban, koinanak akeberu Penina, ka ikedwe kere lusap ka lupesur, akorakineta;"
1Samuel1:5 Konye koinak Kana akorakineta aarei: naarai kemina ŋesi Kana, konye kegolit EJAKAIT akeliliget."
1Samuel1:6 Konye kitunyunyurik noi akainike ŋes, kisiyalonono da, naarai kegolit EJAKAIT akeliliget."
1Samuel1:7 Kiswamaenenei kwaŋin nolikaru, nakeloseneneo togo loka EJAKAIT, kitunyunyuranakini ya kwaŋin: tape emonyi akiyo, kogir ainyam."
1Samuel1:8 Kobala okilenike Elukana ŋes ebe, “Kana, inyo bo imonyi ijo? Inyo bo kitukurwo ainyam? Inyo da itururwoo ekonitau? Mam kereka eoŋ etelekarit idwe itomon kaiokis kamakon?”"
1Samuel1:9 Kosodi konyou Kana kedaut ainyam koSilo, kedaut da aimat. Kiboie Eli esasedoti koicoloŋoke kokek loka eyekalu loka EJAKAIT."
1Samuel1:10 Koriebi ŋin eketau, kilip EJAKAIT, komony noi akiyo."
1Samuel1:11 Kiyapoik aiyaposit, kobala ebe, “Wu EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, abeit arai kisesen iean luka akonibulesit, kiitunite eoŋ komam kimurwokini akonibulesit, konye kiinak akonibulesit ikoku yenisapat, asa ainakini EJAKAIT ŋes apaarasia kere nuka aijarake, kwabo mam eiutet icaki akonke.”"
1Samuel1:12 Kosodi kanen, nakiyatakinia ailip kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kosesen Eli akeituk,"
1Samuel1:13 Naarai eneranakin Kana kotauke; akeituk bon kesubanakin, konye komam epupo eporoto; tape eomit Eli ebe emer."
1Samuel1:14 Kobala Eli ŋes ebe, “Itodoli wori ameranakin? Kosac ebino ŋol.”"
1Samuel1:15 Koboŋok Kana kobala ebe, “Mam, ejakait, arai eoŋ aberu naitururwei etau; mam amasit ebino karaida nuitemercte, konye abolorit ekatau akonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
1Samuel1:16 Sirikiinyara akonibulesit akoku naka Belial; naarai roma airurumaka naelitokina ido toma anyunyurikinika ŋes enerar kiton kwana.”
1Samuel1:17 Koboŋok Eli ebe, “Kolot kainapakina; ido koinak Edeke loka Isirael ŋun nuilip ŋes.”"
1Samuel1:18 Kinera atiar, “Kodum akonibulesit arereŋ kakonyenekon.” Kosodi kolot aberu, konyam, komam bobo imujurur."
1Samuel1:19 Kosodete konyout tupuruc sek, komaata EJAKAIT, kobonosi, kodolo togokee Rama; kojen Elukana aberuke Kana; kiitu EJAKAIT ŋes."
1Samuel1:20 Kosodi kanen, kedolo apaarasia, kopotuu Kana, kidou ikoku; komaik ekekiror Samuel, naarai elipuni kama ejai EJAKAIT."
1Samuel1:21 Kosodi kolot ekes Elukana, ka ekekike kere, ainakin asuban mama ejai EJAKAIT nuka nolikaru, ka aiyapositike,"
1Samuel1:22 Konye mam Kana abu kolot; naarai kobala ŋesi okilenike ebe, “Mam eoŋ alosi aitodol naejakaria ikoku, kasodi konyet ayaŋaar aitodiar akonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kiboienenei kaŋina apaarasia kere.”"
1Samuel1:23 Kobala Elukana okilenike ebe, “Kiswama nuitojokit ijo; kopaik aitodol naejakaria ikoku; konye kitogogon EJAKAIT akekiro.” Kosodi kosalak aberu nen kitanak ikoku, aitodol nekitajakaaria."
1Samuel1:24 Kosodi kedau aitajakaar, koyana kouparos kaŋes, kojaas kimonin iuni, ka epa ediopet loka akiria, ka etuo loka ebino, koyaŋa togo loka EJAKAIT Silo; koroko ikoku edit,"
1Samuel1:25 Koarata emoŋ, koinut Eli ikoku."
1Samuel1:26 Kobala ebe, “Wu ekajakait, kwape ejaria ekonitau, ekajakait, eoŋ aberu naabu kabwoi kama ijai, elipi EJAKAIT."
1Samuel1:27 Yen ŋes ikoku yenabu kelip; ido abu EJAKAIT kainak nuelipit ŋes,"
1Samuel1:28 Ŋes ainakinia mama ejai EJAKAIT; eroko eiari einakinitai EJAKAIT.” Komaata EJAKAIT kaŋina.
1Samuel2:1 Kilip Kana, kobala ebe: “Elakara ekatau kotoma EJAKAIT, Itopolooritai akamumwarat kotoma EJAKAIT: Italalara akaituk kaneejaas lukasurupoka; Naarai eyalama kotoma aitajarakon."
1Samuel2:2 “Emamei loelaunit kwape EJAKAIT; Naarai emamei ice dimarai ijo: Ido emamei atiiba naeputos ka Edekewok.
1Samuel2:3 Sirineras bobo nukaiwonoonut; Karaida nukailepanut alomun kaitukekus; Naarai erai EJAKAIT Edeke loka aijen, Ido ŋes loitemi aswamisio."
1Samuel2:4 Abilas akabwai nuka ituŋa lukirigin, Ŋul da lueguikinito itanapio agogoŋ,"
1Samuel2:5 Ŋul luemokos kolo ewoteoto inyamat; Ka ŋul da luariebi kolo eteŋei ebworasi: Eebo, auru arakan ikanykaarei; Ka nin da naejaas idwe luipu esilikinit."
1Samuel2:6 Eari EJAKAIT, itajaruni da: Itolomari toma okatwak, itolomuni da."
1Samuel2:7 Ipapeli EJAKAIT, ido itabari: Iiesari, ikeuni da."
1Samuel2:8 Itonyouni lukican alemun kotoma apua, Itonyouni luilwaritos alemun kotoma otut, Aisiboikin kes nepepe kikapolok, Airum da eicoloŋ loka aibuses: Naarai ipirin luka akwap eraas luka EJAKAIT, Ido esipokinit akwap kujukec."
1Samuel2:9 “Idari akeie nuka lukalaunakake, Konye isililini ikaronok kotoma amuton; Naarai emamei etuŋanan loipikori kanuka agogoŋ,"
1Samuel2:10 Ŋul luitepegete EJAKAIT ebilibilio; Iretuni kotoma akuj aluikin kes; Irabakini EJAKAIT kiton owaitin luka akwap, Einakini ekabakake agogoŋ, Itopoloori amumwarat naka lokinyonyoikitonike akinyet.”"
1Samuel2:11 Kolot Elukana togoke loajai Rama. Ido kijaanak ikoku EJAKAIT kakonyen nuka Eli esasedoti.
1Samuel2:12 Keraas odwe luka EH odwe luka Belial; mam ajenete EJAKAIT.
1Samuel2:13 Ekoni kwanata epone loka isasedotin mama ejaas ituŋa ebe, naeinakinia ituŋanan asubanit, abuni ebulesit loka esasedoti itinit kakanike egolu loajaas ikel iuni, napekulai akiriŋ;"
1Samuel2:14 Kosodi akiinor toma asepulia, arai abinika, arai amot, arai atido; kere naeeumuni egolu nm ayaŋaari esasedoti. Kiswamanakinai kwaŋin Isiraelin kere luapote nen Silo."
1Samuel2:15 Eebo, eriŋa icweikina asiepai, kobuni ebulesit loka esasedoti, kobala ituŋanan yeneinakini asubanit ebe, “Koinakinai akiriŋ, kapeik esasedoti; naarai mam ekoto akiriŋ naipoo kamakon, konye naejon.”"
1Samuel2:16 Arai kelimoki ŋes ituŋanan ebe, “Abeit icweikinio asiepai kwape kwana, ŋes konyet iyaŋaaria naipuda akoniijar kere”: eboŋokini ŋesi da ebe, “Mam, konye kiinakini ijo eoŋ kwape kwana: arai kiner, ayaŋaari kagogon.”"
1Samuel2:17 Kopoloor aronis naka ikatumunak kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: naarai kitapianata ituŋa ainakinet naka EJAKAIT,"
1Samuel2:18 Konye kijaanak Samuel kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: korai ikoku, konapenenei epod loka ebaputa."
1Samuel2:19 Ido kodonyonokini totoke ŋes anapito naedit, koinununei ŋes nolikaru, nakeupanarotor kokilenike ainakin asubanit naka nolikaru."
1Samuel2:20 Kilipak EH Elukana ka akeberu arereŋ, kobala ebe, “EJAKAIT koinak ijo ka aberu na aur kanuka ayuunet naayuunia EJAKAIT.” Kobonosi orekec."
1Samuel2:21 Koanyana EJAKAIT Kana, kopotuu, kidou isap iuni ka apesur aarei. Kopolok ikoku Samuel akonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
1Samuel2:22 Kemoion noi Eli; kopup kere nueswamanakinete odweke Isirael kere, ido kwape aperioto kanor nuejaanakinete kokek loka ewema loka airiamunun."
1Samuel2:23 Kotema kes atiar, “Kanukinyo iswamaata akiro ŋun? Naarai keteienikis eoŋ ituŋa lu kere akusiswamisio nueroko."
1Samuel2:24 Okwe, odweka; naarai nueira mam eraas nuejok: itapaasi ituŋa luka EJAKAIT."
1Samuel2:25 Arai kediaka ituŋanan mama ejai yenieeke, etubokini ŋes Edeke: konye arai kediaka ituŋanan mama ejai EJAKAIT, iŋai epurokini ŋes?” Konye mam apotu kiirasi eporoto loka papakee, naarai akoto EJAKAIT aiar kes."
1Samuel2:26 Kiyatak ikoku Samuel apoloor, kodum asianut kama ejai EJAKAIT, kama ejaas ituŋa da."
1Samuel2:27 Kosodi kobu etuŋanan loka Edeke mama ejai Eli, kobala ŋes ebe, “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT atiar, Mere abu kapukokin bon okek loka papaakon, naajaatar Misiri obulesene kotogo loka Parao?"
1Samuel2:28 Mam abu kaseu ŋes katekerin kere nuka Isirael, araun ekasasedoti, adokanar otemuka aisupuruunun lukisupurununo, anapenen da epod kakonyeneka? Mam abu kainak ekek loka papakon ainakineta kere nuka idwe luka Isirael nueinakinere kakim?"
1Samuel2:29 Kanukinyo ipetonoriata asubanaka ka ainakinetaka, nuabu kecorak kaiboisika; koyon odwekon aitelekarit eoŋ, kotumakis nuitelekarito ajokis nuka ainakineta kere nuka ikatuŋa Isirael?"
1Samuel2:30 Ŋes enerar EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael atiar, ‘Abeit abu kener ebe elosenenei ekekikon ka ekek loka papakon, kakonyeneka apaarasia kere’: konye kwana inera EJAKAIT atiar, ‘Madi eoŋ: naarai nul Iukayonito eoŋ, etopoloori, ka nul da lukamenito mam enyarao idiobore."
1Samuel2:31 Koany, eponito apaarasia, nuajeparia akonikan, ka akan naka ekek loka papakon, kinyek ajaun ekimat kotogokon."
1Samuel2:32 Ido ianyuni aitieanitoi naka aiboisika, toma abar kere naeinakini Edeke Isirael: kwabo emameunun ekimat kotogokon ikar kere."
1Samuel2:33 Ka etunananikon lomam amudiari alemar kotemuka, eraun loikokoori akiyo kakonyekon, ka aitakadikin ekonitau: ka aur da naka ekekikon etwakenenete napekurunanete."
1Samuel2:34 Eraun na da aanyunet kamakon, naedoikini odwekon luarei, Kopuni ka Pinekas; etwakete kere apaaran ‘adiopet."
1Samuel2:35 Eoŋ da etonyouni esasedoti lomunot, loiswamaenenei kwape ejaatar nun nuejaas otauka ka aomisioka: adukokini ŋes ekek loieasit: ido elosenenci kakonyen nuka lokinyonyoikitonoka akinyet ikar kere."
1Samuel2:36 Kosodi kanen, ebuni ŋin yenideuna kokekikon akukonokin ŋes ailip atutubet naka epuesa ka idionyamat, ebe, “Keŋaiŋait, kitaraunai ediopet kotoma aswam naka isasedotin, tetere apedori ainyam idionyamat.”’”"
1Samuel3:1 Kijaanakinenei ikoku Samuel EJAKAIT kakonyen nuka Eli. Ido kocicin akirot naka EJAKAIT kapaarasia kanun; amamei da ituŋanan yeneanyunit aitapoet.
1Samuel3:2 Kosodi kanen kapaarasia kanun, eperi Eli kaiboisike, (kowariwarete akekonye, komam epedori asesen.)"
1Samuel3:3 Korina cdunioro atala naka Edeke, koper Samuel kojotor, koyekalu loka EJAKAIT, neajai asaduku naka Edeke;"
1Samuel3:4 Kiworo EJAKAIT Samuel: kobala ebe, “Eoŋ lo.”"
1Samuel3:5 Koker neejai Eli, kotema atiar, “Eoŋ lo; naarai kiworot.” Kotema atiar, “Mam keworot; koper bobo.” Kolot koper."
1Samuel3:6 Kiworo ŋes bobo EJAKAIT nakiaret ebe, “Samuel.” Konyou Samuel kolot mama ejai Eli, kobala ebe, “Eoŋ lo, naarai kiworot.” Koboŋok ebe, “Mam keworot, ikakoku; koper bobo.”"
1Samuel3:7 Korina Samuel kejenuna EJAKAIT, ido korina epukokina ŋes akirot naka EJAKAIT."
1Samuel3:8 Kiworo bobo EJAKAIT Samuel nakiwuniet. Konyou kolot mama ejai Eli, kotema atiar, “Eoŋ lo, naarai kiworot.” Kojen Eli ebe EJAKAIT ŋes iworot ikoku."
1Samuel3:9 Kanuka nun kolimok Eli Samuel ebe, “Kolot, koper: kosodi arai kiiworo, kotema atiar, ‘Kiner, EJAKAIT; naarai epupi ekonibulesit.’’’ Kolot Samuel koper kaiboisike."
1Samuel3:10 Kobu EJAKAIT, kobwo, kiworo kwape aatenak ace ebe, “Samuel, Samuel.” Kosodi Samuel atemar ebe, “Kiner; naarai epupi ekonibulesit.”"
1Samuel3:11 Kotema EJAKAIT Samuel atiar, “Koany, abuni aswam akirot kolsirael, naisidelori aki kere nuka ninitunanan yeniirari."
1Samuel3:12 Kapaaran kaŋin etodolikini Eli kere nuabu kener nuka ekekike, ageun ka nasodit aitodol nakawasia,"
1Samuel3:13 Naarai abu kalimok ŋes ebe atubokini ekekike ikar kere, kanuka numam adolit nuabu kojen, naarai einyanakinete odweke Edeke, komam ŋes itikokini kes."
1Samuel3:14 Kanuka ŋun eyapoikinit ekek loka Eli ebe, numam adolit nuka ekek loka Eli mam elucio kasubanit karaida kainakinet ikar kere.”"
1Samuel3:15 Koper Samuel aitiwalar akwap, konaana ikekia luka etogo loka EJAKAIT. Kokurianar Samuel alimokin Eli etapo,"
1Samuel3:16 Kosodi kiworo Eli Samuel, kobala ebe, “Samuel, okokuka.” Kotema atiar, “Eoŋ lo,”"
1Samuel3:17 Kotema atiar, “Anyoin akirot nakilimok jo EJAKAIT? Kenaiŋait, sirikiimunonik eoŋ: kiswamak jo Edeke kwaŋin ka adepar da, arai kimunon adiokirot kakiro kere nukilimok ŋesi jo.”"
1Samuel3:18 Kolimok Samuel ŋes kere, mam abu kimunon adiokirot, Kotema atiar, “Ŋes EJAKAIT: kiswama ŋesi nuitoiokit.”"
1Samuel3:19 Kopoloor Samuel, koiai EJAKAIT kaŋes, komam ecamuni adio kakiroke apalun."
1Samuel3:20 Kojen Isirael kere anyoun koDan kiton Beer-seba ebe etogogoŋi Samuel araun enabi loka EJAKAIT.
1Samuel3:21 Kotakan EJAKAIT bobo koSilo: naarai abu EJAKAIT kopukokin Samuel koSilo kakirot naka EJAKAIT.
1Samuel4:1 Kobu akirot naka Samuel mama ejai Isirael kere. Kolot Isirael aitiji Ipilisitian, kidukuroto Eben-eser: kidukuroto Ipilisitian da Apek."
1Samuel4:2 Kiderakinos Ipilisitian asurokin Isirael: keiioto, apotu Ipilisitian kodanyata Isiraelin: koarata kojie ituŋa kwape ilukumin iwonon luka aiore."
1Samuel4:3 Kosodete kebonut ituŋa oidukurun kotemasi imakio luka Isirael atiar, c c Kanukinyo kidanyia EJAKAIT oni lolo kakonyen nuka Ipilisitian? Mere kaomata asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT koSilo, tetere ebuni mamawok, aitajar oni kakan naka lukasurupowok.”"
1Samuel4:4 Kijukasi ituŋa Silo, koyaut asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, loiboie kokidin kikerubin: odwe da luarei luka Eli, Kopuni ka Pinekas, ajaas nina kasaduku naka aitutuket naka Edeke."
1Samuel4:5 Kosodi kedolu asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT oidukurun, kibwon Isirael kere kelala loepol, kijau da akwap."
1Samuel4:6 Kepuputu Ipilisitian ecelet, kobalas ebe, “Anyoin apolou naka ecelet kanol loepol koidukurun luka Iburanian?” Kojenut do ebe adolu asaduku naka EJAKAIT oidukurun."
1Samuel4:7 Kokuriakata Ipilisitian, naarai abalas ebe, “Abu Edeke oidukurun.” Kobalas ebe, “Itukwi! naarai mam ber lem ibore yenikoni nen ejauna."
1Samuel4:8 Itukwi! Iŋai kiyuuni oni kakan naka idekesio lu lucgogon? Lu kes idekesio luadanyete Imisirian kiponesio kere luka atular kamodiŋ.
1Samuel4:9 Kogogonoto, kitodiasi ekiliokone, yes Ipilisitian, tetere mam iraunos ibulesin luka Iburanian, kwape lem eraatatar kesi lukus: kitodiasi ekiliokone, koiioto.”"
1Samuel4:10 Koiioto Ipilisitian, kodanyai Isiraelin, kokerata kesi ŋinituŋanan owemake: koiai earit loepol; naarai kotwakata luka Isirael ituŋa ilukumin akaisauni lualosete kakeie."
1Samuel4:11 Konatarai asaduku naka Edeke; koarai da odwe luarei luka Eli, Kopuni ka Pinekas."
1Samuel4:12 Koker etuŋanan loka Benyamin kaiore, kodolo Silo kapaaran kaŋin, kocilieila ikegoen, koiaas da alup akouke,"
1Samuel4:13 Kosodi kedolu, koany, eboie Eli koicoloŋoke kariri naka erot, kidari: naarai amarani eketau kanuka asaduku naka EJAKAIT, Kelomu etuŋanan ore, kolimo akirot, kodelo ere kere."
1Samuel4:14 Kepupu Eli eporoto loka adelor, kotema atiar, “Anyoin apolou naka ecelet kaŋols “Kiwonya etuŋanan kolimok Eli,"
1Samuel4:15 Kerai Eli loka ikar akaisakanykaoŋon ka lukanykauni, awariwarete akekonye, komam epcdori asesen."
1Samuel4:16 Kotema etuŋanan Eli atiar, “Eoŋ ŋol loabuni kaiore, akeruni eoŋ lolo kaiore.” Kotema atiar, “Ikote akiro ai, okokuka?”"
1Samuel4:17 Koboŋok loayaun akiro ebe, “Aker Isirael kakonyen nuka Ipilisitian, ajaun da earit loepol kotuna, odwekon da luarei, Kopuni ka Pinekas atwaka, anatar da asaduku naka Edeke.”"
1Samuel4:18 Kosodi kanen kelimu ŋesi nuka asaduku naka Edeke, kibiror Eli eidedia koicoloŋoke kariri naka erute, kobila emurisinike, kotwana; naarai amoionit ido alaŋir, Abu kirabakinite Isirael ikar akaisaoŋon."
1Samuel4:19 Apotie aberu naka okokuke Pinekas, koapie da aidoun: kepupu nin akiro ebe anatar asaduku naka Edeke, ido atwaka papaake ka okilenike, kokukum, kidou; naarai abu akeriebo kodolok ŋes,"
1Samuel4:20 Napeapie ŋesi atwanare kolimokis ŋes aŋor nuabwoete kanen ebe, “Sirikikurianar, naarai idou esapat.” Konye mam abu Koboŋok, karaida apodokin,"
1Samuel4:21 Komaik ikoku Ikabod, kobala ebe, “Anyou aibusesukon, Isirael”: naarai anatar asaduku naka Edeke, ido kanuka papaake ka okilenike."
1Samuel4:22 Kotema atiar, “Anyou aibuses koIsirael; naarai anatar asaduku naka Edeke.”"
1Samuel5:1 Apotu Ipilisitian konatarito asaduku naka Edeke, koyanaut anyoun koEbeneser kiton Asudod."
1Samuel5:2 Koyanaasi Ipilisitian asaduku naka Edeke, kibwaikis togo loka Dagon, kosipokis eiduny ka Dagon."
1Samuel5:3 Kosodete kenyout luka Asudod tupuruc sek, koany, ebirokina Dagon kwap kakonyen nuka asaduku naka EJAKAIT. Kolemut Dagon kinyakakis aiboisike."
1Samuel5:4 Kosodete kenyout tupuruc sek, koany, ebirokina Dagon kwap kakonyen nuka asaduku naka EJAKAIT: ajepara da akou naka Dagon ka akaninike kibelibelos kokek; akuan naka Dagon bon abu kosal."
1Samuel5:5 Kanuka nun isasedotin luka Dagon, karaida ninidiopet yenelomari togo loka Dagon mam ieakakinete akecekeje okek loka Dagon kotoma Asudod, aitodol lolo."
1Samuel5:6 Konye kolanirior akan naka EJAKAIT kama ejaas luka Asudod, komudia kes, kodany kes kabusion, Asudod ka iikorunoke,"
1Samuel5:7 Kosodete keanyut ituŋa luka Asudod ebe ikote nen, kotemasi atiar, “Mam asaduku naka Edeke loka Isirael iboikin mamawok: naarai ededeŋ akekan kamawok, kama kaDagon da ewokodeke.”"
1Samuel5:8 Kijukasi kotukokis ijaka kere luka Ipilisitian kotemasi atiar, “Kikwaikini ai asaduku naka Edeke loka Isirael? “Kobonokis atiar, “Kibwokoroi asaduku naka Edeke loka Isirael Gat.” Kibwokosi asaduku naka Edeke loka Isirael nina,"
1Samuel5:9 Kosodi do, kedaut kesi aibwokor asaduku koluik akan naka EJAKAIT ere aitiean kes: kodany ituŋa lukore, ludidik ka luepolok da, kolomut abusion kamakee."
1Samuel5:10 Kwaŋin kijukasi asaduku naka Edeke Ekuron. Kosodi kanen, kedolu asaduku naka Edeke Ekuron, kodelosi Ikuronin ebe, “Ayaut asaduku naka Edeke loka Isirael mamawok aiar oni ka iwokotuna.”"
1Samuel5:11 Kanuka ŋun kijukasi kotukokis ijaka kere luka Ipilisitian, kotemasi atiar, “Kijukasi asaduku naka Edeke loka Isirael, kolot bobo aiboisike alopet, tetere mam kiari oni ka iwokotuna”: naarai ajai aiticanet naerono ore kere; alaŋir noi akan naka Edeke kanen,"
1Samuel5:12 Ituŋa lumam apotu kotwaka aponi kiticanai kabusion: kodoka aimony nakore akuj.
1Samuel6:1 Kojai asaduku naka EJAKAIT akwap naka Ipilisitian adaun ilapio ikanykaarei,"
1Samuel6:2 Konyaraut Ipilisitian isasedotin ka ikaroak, kobalas ebe, “Kikwaikini ai asaduku naka EJAKAIT? Kitodikinai lukijukaria kaŋes aiboisike.”"
1Samuel6:3 Kotemasi atiar, “Arai ijukarete asaduku naka Edeke loka Isirael, sirikijukasi komamei ibore; konye kinyakasi ŋes kainakinet naka aibucaret: ŋes do inaleunioto, kitejenunio da yes numam ŋes elemaritor akekan kamakus.”"
1Samuel6:4 Kosodete kesi atemar ebe, “Inyoin eraun ainakinet naka aibucaret yenikinyakaria ŋes?” Kotemasi atiar, “Abusion akany nuka esabu, ka imirio ikany luka esabu, kwape eiaar etiai loka ijaka luka Ipilisitian: naarai adiopetular ajai mamakus kere ka ijakakus da."
1Samuel6:5 Ŋes do iswamauniata apurosia nuka abusionokus ka aputosia nuka imiriokus luemunaunete akwap; iinakinete Edeke loka Isirael aibuses: diat itebebeni akekan kamakus, ka ikusidekesio, ka akusikwap da."
1Samuel6:6 Kanukinyo itogogonioto ikusitauon kwape etogogonioto Imisirian ka Parao ikecetauon? Naeswamaa nukaumokin kamakec mam kereka kes apotu kisiikis Iruna alosit, kolototo da?"
1Samuel6:7 Aso do kolemut kitemokis agaji nakitetet, ka aituk aarei nuieirio, numam iirito aiokot, koenikis aituk agali, kinyakut itakakec ore:"
1Samuel6:8 Kolemut asaduku naka EJAKAIT, kibwaikis agali; kibwaikis da iboro luka esabu luinyakariata ŋes araun ainakinet naka aibucaret toma asaduku ace eiduny kaya: koremosi tetere elosi."
1Samuel6:9 Koanyut, arai kitor orot loka eikoruke elopct kiton Bet-semes, ŋes atemar ebe ŋes kiswamak oni aronis na naepol: konye arai mam, kijenuni do ebe mere akekan kidany oni; kerai arereŋ naerono naabu kodoik oni.”"
1Samuel6:10 Kiswamata ituŋa kwaŋin; kolemut aituk aarei nuicira, koenikis agali, kogolokis da itakakec ore:"
1Samuel6:11 Kibwaikis asaduku naka EJAKAIT agali, ka asaduku naajaas imirio luka esabu ka aputosia nuka abusionokec."
1Samuel6:12 Kodero aitukerot loitenara alosit Bet-semes; kodero orot lokapolon, komonyete elosete, mam apotu kopaasi teten arai kediany; kotupakis ijaka luka Ipilisitian kes aitodol oikor loka Bet-semes."
1Samuel6:13 Asakete luka Bet-semes akimakec kaditot; kiteluosi akecekonye, koanyut asaduku, kiyalamikinos da aanyun."
1Samuel6:14 Koloma agali omanikor loka Yosua Ebet-semit, kobwou kanen, kancajai amoru naapol: kibeta akito nuka agali, koinakis aituk araun ainakinet naicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT."
1Samuel6:15 Kolemut Ilebin asaduku naka EJAKAIT, ka asaduku naaiai kaŋes naajaas iboro luka esabu kibwaikis kes amoru nin naapol: kijaikis ituŋa luka Bet-semes ainakineta nuieweio, kosubata da asuban apaaran nipenin mama ejai EJAKAIT."
1Samuel6:16 Kosodete kedaut ijaka ikany luka Ipilisitian aanyun, kobonosi Ekuron kapaaran kaŋin."
1Samuel6:17 Nu kes abusion nuka esabu nuenyakarete Ipilisitian araun ainakinet naka aibucaret mama ejai EJAKAIT; naka Asudod adiopet, naka Gasa adiopet, naka Asukelon adiopet, naka Gat adiopet, ka naka Ekuron da adiopet;"
1Samuel6:18 Ka imirio luka esabu, kwape ajaar etiai loka ireria kere luka iiaka ikany luka Ipilisitian, ireria luebwaitai ka ireria lukoronyia. Amoru naapol, naasipokinete kesi asaduku naka EJAKAIT, amoru nin ejai kiton lolo omanikor loka Yosua Ebet-semit,"
1Samuel6:19 Kodany ituŋa luka Bet-semes, naarai apotu kireikis asaduku naka EJAKAIT, abu kodany ituŋa ilukumin akaisakany ka akaisakanykaarei: kibworoto ituŋa naarai abu EJAKAIT kodany ituŋa kearit loepol."
1Samuel6:20 Kobalas iruna luka Bet-semes ebe, “Iŋai bo epedori aibwo kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, Edeke lo lokalaunan? Ido ai ca kitebeari oni ŋes?”"
1Samuel6:21 Kiiukasi ikiyakia mama ejaas lueboienenete koKiriat-yearim kobalas ebe, “Enyakut bobo Ipilisitian asaduku naka EJAKAIT: kijesunos yesi koomut.”"
1Samuel7:1 Kopotu ituŋa luka Kiriat-yearim, koomut asaduku naka EJAKAIT, koyanaasi oukot togo loka Abinadab, kitalaut Eleasar okokuke aidar asaduku naka EJAKAIT."
1Samuel7:2 Kosodi kanen ageun kapaaran kaŋin kiboi asaduku koKiriat-yearim apaarasia nuipu: naarai kes ikar akaisaarei: komony ekek kere loka Isirael mama ejai EJAKAIT.
1Samuel7:3 Kotema Samuel ekek kere loka Isirael atiar, “Arai ibonunito mama ejai EJAKAIT kikusitauon kere, kolemasi idekesio lumo ka Asitarot kamakus, kitemokis ikusitauon mama ejai EJAKAIT, kijaanakis ŋes bon: ŋes da kiyuuni yes kakan naka Ipilisitian.”"
1Samuel7:4 Kosodete idwe luka Isirael alemar Ibaalin ka Asitarot, kijaanakis EJAKAIT bon."
1Samuel7:5 Kotema Samuel atiar, “Kotukokin Isirael kere Misipa, elipakini eoŋ yes kama ejai EJAKAIT.”"
1Samuel7:6 Kotukokinos Misipa, kookut akipi, kobukosi kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kolunata apaaran ŋin, kobalas kanen ebe, “Kidiaka kama ejai EJAKAIT.” Kirabak Samuel idwe luka Isirael koMisipa."
1Samuel7:7 Kepuput Ipilisitian ebe etukokina idwe luka Isirael Misipa, koloto iiaka luka Ipilisitian asurokin Isirael. Kepuput idwe luka Isirael, apotu kokuriakata Ipilisitian,"
1Samuel7:8 Kobalas idwe luka Isirael Samuel ebe, “Sirikitanan aimony mama ejai EJAKAIT Ewokodeke kanukosi, tetere kitaiari isio kakan naka Ipilisitian.”"
1Samuel7:9 Kolem Samuel imerekek yenenaki, koinak ŋes araun ainakinet naicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT: komony Samuel mama ejai EJAKAIT kanuka Isirael; Koboŋok EJAKAIT ŋes,"
1Samuel7:10 Napeinakini Samuel ainakinet naicweio, kikunyut Ipilisitian aitiii Isirael: konye kiretak EJAKAIT Ipilisitian kairetun naepol kapaaran kanin, kitiean kes; kodanyai kes kakonyen nuka Isirael."
1Samuel7:11 Kolomasi ituŋa luka Isirael koMisipa, kodapata Ipilisitian, kodanya kes, kiton naadolioto Bet-car."
1Samuel7:12 Kosodi Samuel alemun amoru, kosipok kidin Misipa ka Sen, komaik ekekiror Eben-eser, kobala ebe, “Kiŋarak EJAKAIT oni aitodol lolo,”"
1Samuel7:13 Kwaŋin kitononokai Ipilisitian, mam bobo apotu kolomut oikorun luka Isirael: koluik akan naka EJAKAIT Ipilisitian apaarasia kere nuka Samuel."
1Samuel7:14 Kinyakakinai Isirael ireria luanatarito Ipilisitian kamakec, anyoun koEkuron kiton Gat; koyu Isirael eikoruke kakan naka Epilisitian. Kinapakina Isirael ka Imorain."
1Samuel7:15 Kotubok Samuel Isirael apaarasia kere nuka aiiarake.
1Samuel7:16 Kirimonori kanolikaru Bet-el, ka Giligal, ka Misipa; kotubok Isirael kaiboisio kanun kere."
1Samuel7:17 Kobononori Rama, naarai nina ajai eketogo; kotubok Isirael kanen: kodukok nen etem loka EJAKAIT."
1Samuel8:1 Kosodi kanen kemoion Samuel, kodakak odweke atubokin Isirael."
1Samuel8:2 Ekiror loka ekiyaike ŋes Yoel; ka ekiror loka lokiareit Abiya: keraas ikatubok koBeer-seba.
1Samuel8:3 Mam odweke apotu kotupasi ikeponesio, konye apotu kopaasi adumun apesan, apotu kijaut ainakineta nuitumudakete akonye, kitirioto etube."
1Samuel8:4 Kosodete imakio kere luka Isirael atukokin, kopotu Rama neaiai Samuel."
1Samuel8:5 Kolimokis ŋes atiar, “Koany, imoion ijo, odwekon da mam etupito ikoniponesio: asa koseikinai sio ekabaka atubonokin sio kwape katekerin kere.”"
1Samuel8:6 Konye kitakadik akirot Samuel, naalimunioto ebe, “Koseikinai sio ekabaka atubonokin sio.” Kilip Samuel mama ejai EJAKAIT,"
1Samuel8:7 Kotema EJAKAIT Samuel atiar, “Kopupok eporoto loka ituŋa kakiro kere nukilimokinete: naarai mam kinerito jo, konye kaŋeroto eoŋ, kenyek araut ekabakakee."
1Samuel8:8 Kwape ejaatar aswamisio kere nueswamata ageun kapaaran naetolomunia kes koMisiri aitodol lolo, kwape kajaliata eoŋ, ejaanakiniata ieedekesio, kikonakis jo kwaŋin."
1Samuel8:9 Aso do kopupok ekeceporoto: konye iteienikini kes kaitebeikin, itodikini da epone loka ekabaka loeyai kes.”"
1Samuel8:10 Kolimok Samuel ituŋa luelipitos ŋes ekabaka akiro kere nuka EJAKAIT.
1Samuel8:11 Kotema atiar, “Ikoni neta ekabaka lokiyai yes: eyaŋaari odwekus, eseuni kes kanuka agalinike, araun ikebwanenok ibalasinike; ekerete da koinaren kagalinike:"
1Samuel8:12 Eseuni kes araun ikapolok luka ilukumin, ka ikapolok luka akaisakany; eseuni ice akor akelup, ka aisak ikenyamat, aiswamaun da iboroke lujiis, ka iboro luka agalinike."
1Samuel8:13 Eyaŋaari adwekus araun nuinyalete nueur maa, araun da akepook, araun akapeok imugatin."
1Samuel8:14 Eyaŋaari da imanikoriakus, ka amanatakus nuka emusabibu, ka amanatakus nuka iseitunin, nuitelekarit ajokis kakesi, einakini kes ikekejaanakinak."
1Samuel8:15 Eyaŋaari idiopet kotomon yenika ikinyomokus, yenika amanatakus da nuka emusabibu, einakini ijakake ka ikekeiaanakinak."
1Samuel8:16 Eyaŋaari ibulesinikus, ka abulesinikus, ka ikatumunakakus luejok noi, ka asigiriakus, aitwasam akeswam."
1Samuel8:17 Eyaŋaari idiopet kotomon yenika isipaninikus: yesi da iraunos ikebulesin.
1Samuel8:18 Imonyete yesi kapaaran kaŋin kanuka ekabakakus loiseunete yesi; mam EJAKAIT kibonokini yes kapaaran kaŋin.”
1Samuel8:19 Konye konero ituŋa apupokin eporoto loka Samuel; kotemasi atiar, “Mam; konye kikoto ekabaka lokiyai sio;"
1Samuel8:20 Tetere kiputokin katekerin kere; tetere da ekosikabaka kitubokini sio, kinarenenokini da, ejie ijiisiokosi.”"
1Samuel8:21 Kopup Samuel akiro kere nuka ituŋa, kitatam kes kaki nuka EJAKAIT."
1Samuel8:22 Kotema EJAKAIT Samuel atiar, “Kopupok ekeeeporoto, koseik kes ekabaka.” Kotema Samuel ituŋa luka Isirael atiar, “Aso kolototo, ninituŋanan oreke.”"
1Samuel9:1 Kojai etuŋanan loka Benyamin, ekekiror Kis, okoku loka Abiel, okoku loka Seror, okoku loka Bekorat, okoku loka Apia, okoku loka Ebenyamit, etuŋanan Ioagogon loabarit."
1Samuel9:2 Kejai ŋes okokuke, ekekiror Saul, ekatumunan loejok loetemelel: amamei kodwe luka Isirael yenadeparit ŋes katemelel: aoia ŋesi anyoun kokeperinike adepar iruna kere."
1Samuel9:3 Apotu kooliosi asigiria nuka Kis, papa loka Sau!. Kotema Kis Saul okokuke atiar, “Koyaŋa ediopet kobulesin konyou, kolot aimo asigiria.”"
1Samuel9:4 Kitor akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, kitor da akwap naka Salisa, konye mam apotu kodumut kes: kosodete aitor akwap naka Saalim, komameete kanen da: kitor akwap naka Ibenyamin, konye mam apotu kodumut kes."
1Samuel9:5 Kedolut akwap naka Sup, kotema Saul ebulesit loaupatar atiar, “Bia, kabonosi; elemuni enyeki papaka apod asigiria kosodi apod oni."
1Samuel9:6 Kobala ŋes ebe, “Aso koany, ejai toma ore lo etuŋanan loka Edeke, erai da etuŋanan Iocyonitai, edolenenete kere nuelimuni: asa kaloto nina; diat kilimokini nuka alositewok.”"
1Samuel9:7 Kosodi Saul atemar ekebulesit atiar, “Konye koany, arai kiilot, inyo kiinari oni etuŋanan? Naarai adaun emugati koriaginiwok, emamei ainakinet nakiinari etuŋanan loka Edeke: inyo bo ejai oni?”"
1Samuel9:8 Koboŋok ebulesit Saul bobo atiar, “Koany, ejai akanika idiopet kooŋon yenika esekel loka epuesa: ainakini nin etuŋanan loka Edeke, kodwarak oni ewokorot.”"
1Samuel9:9 (Lem sek kol sirael, naelosio ituŋanan aiŋitun Edeke, kobala kwanata ebe, “Bia, kaloto mama ejai ekadwaran”; naarai ŋol loenyaritai. Kwana Enabi anyaritai lem sek Ekadwaran.)"
1Samuel9:10 Kosodi Saul atemar ekebulesit atiar, “Iner ejok; bia, kaloto.” Kolototo ore neajai etuŋanan loka Edeke."
1Samuel9:11 Edokete kesi ore, apotu kodumut apesur elomunete aiwok akipi, kotemasi kes atiar, “Ejai ekadwaran nee?”"
1Samuel9:12 Koboŋokis kesi atiar, “Ejai; koany, ejai kiŋarenikus: aso kiwonyasi, naarai ebunit lolo ore; naarai einakinete ituŋa lolo asubanit kaibois naicelclei:"
1Samuel9:13 Napeidolioto yesi ore, irasakinete aanyun ŋes, eroko ŋes keloto aibois naieelelei ainyam: naarai mam ituŋa enyamete aitodol neebunio ŋesi, naarai ŋes ilipakini asubanit arereŋ; akauloke enyamete ijul luenyaritai. Aso do, kodokasi, naarai kapak kana ianyunete ŋes.”"
1Samuel9:14 Kodokasi ore; napelomarete kesi ore, koany, kiriamunos kesi ka Samuel elosi aibois naicelelei,"
1Samuel9:15 Abu EJAKAIT kopukokinite Samuel apaaran adiopet eroko Saul kebuno ebe,"
1Samuel9:16 “Moi, osawa lopclo kejukakini jo etuŋanan loka akwap naka Benyamin, inyonyoikini ŋes akinyet araun ekapolon loeyait ikatuŋa Isirael, itajari ŋesi ikatuŋa kakan naka Ipilisitian: naarai ete ikatuŋa, naarai adolu aimonyokec mama ajai.”"
1Samuel9:17 Keanyu Samuel Saul, kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Koany etuŋanan loabu kalimokinite jo nuke! Lopelo ŋes eyai ikatuŋa.”"
1Samuel9:18 Kikuny Saul orute mama ejai Samuel, kotema atiar, “Kenainait, kolimokinai neejai etogo laka ekadwaran.”"
1Samuel9:19 Koboŋok Samuel Saul ebe, “Eoŋ ŋes ekadwaran; kodoka kinaren aibois naicelelei, naarai imorete keoŋ ainyam lolo: moi tupuruc katwaria jo, kalimokini kere nuejaas otaukon."
1Samuel9:20 Konye sirikipodokin asigiriakon nuaoliorete apaarasia auni nuatuboros; naarai adumunos. Ido lukaŋai iboro kere luimielas luka Isirael? Mere lupekon, ka ekek kere loka papakon.”"
1Samuel9:21 Koboŋok Saul ebe, “Mere eoŋ Ebenyamit, loka ateker naedit noi katekerin nuka Isirael? Ekekika da loedit noi kokekia kere luka ateker naka Benyamin? Kanukinyo inerar keoŋ nuikote nen?”"
1Samuel9:22 Koyana Samuel Saul ka ebulesitike, koyaŋau kes agola naka ipejok, kisiboik kes aiboisio nukapolou neaiaas Iuanyaritai, luemwaasi ituŋa akaisauni."
1Samuel9:23 Kotema Samuel ekepoon atiar, “Koyau einer loabu kainak jo, loabu kalimok jo ebe, ‘Kidar ŋes.’’’"
1Samuel9:24 Koyana ekepoon amurwo ka akwalikwalike, kibwaik akonyen nuka Saul. Kotema Samuel atiar, “Koany, nin naaponi kinadakinail Kibwaik akonyenekon, konyam; naarai kinadakinitai jo aitodol apak naaseikinitai, naarai abu kabala ebe, Anyaraunit iruna.” Kwaŋin komorata Saul ka Samuel kapaaran kaŋin,"
1Samuel9:25 Kosodi kijesunos kesi kaibois naieelelei toma ore, kinerata ŋesi ka Saul kokuju togo."
1Samuel9:26 Kodilokis anyoun: kosodi kanen kiwala akwap, konyara Samuel Saul kuju togo, kobala ebe, “Konyou, katwar jo kolot.” Konyou Saul, kouparos kina, ŋes ka Samuel."
1Samuel9:27 Ŋesaros kesi alomar kore, kotema Samuel Saul atiar, “Kolimok ebulesit kotubor kinarencwok, (kotubori ŋesi,) konye kobwo ijo kanepekane, tetere kesiirari jo akiro naka Edeke.”"
1Samuel10:1 Kosodi Samuel alemun ekube loka akinyet, kobukok akouke, konu ŋes, kotema atiar, “Mere kinyonyoik EJAKAIT jo akinyet araun ekapolon loiyait airumeteke?"
1Samuel10:2 Nainyounio kaneaiai eoŋ lolo, idumuni ituŋa iarei eiduny kates naka Rakel, koikor loka Benyamin ka Selusa; kilimokinete jo ebe, ‘Asigiria nuibu kolot aimo adumunos: ido koany, enyek papakon apod nuka asigiria epod jo ebe, “Ekwaikini ai kanuka okokuka?”"
1Samuel10:3 Ŋes do ilosio ijo kanen, idoli olua loka Tabor, iriamunos kiruna iuni kaŋina luelosete mama ejai Edeke Bet-el, ibwokit ediopet ikalei iuni, ibwokit ece imugatin iuni, ka loce da ibwokit eriagi loka emukule loka ebino:"
1Samuel10:4 Kiyogaete jo, kiinakinete jo imugatin iarei; luijauni jo kakanikec."
1Samuel10:5 Akaulo kanun ibuni ijo oukot loka EJAKAIT, neejai aibois naka iserikalcn luka Ipilisitian; kosodi kanen naidolio jo ore, iriamunos kerionet loka inabin ijesunos kaibois naicelelei ejaas kesabuli, ka esimat, ka alamaru, ka adeudeu koiŋarenikec; ido kodwarete kesi:"
1Samuel10:6 Kidoikini jo emoyo loka EJAKAIT kagogon, idwari da nepepe kakes, iluor ijo ecetuŋanan,"
1Samuel10:7 Kikoni nen, nakidoikiniata jo aanyuneta nun, iswamai nuibusakinit aswam; naarai ejai Edeke kaio,"
1Samuel10:8 Kinarenikini eoŋ alosit Giligal; ido koany, abuni mama ijai ainakin ainakineta nuicweio, ka asuban nuka ainakineta nuka ainapakin; idareuni apaarasia akanykaarei, aitodol neabunio, aitodikin jo nuiswamai.”"
1Samuel10:9 Kikwaikis nen, naanyounio ŋesi kaneaiai Samuel, abu Edeke koinak ŋes ecetau: kodoloto aanyuneta nun kere kapaaran kaŋin,"
1Samuel10:10 Kosodi kedolut oukot, koany, kiriamunos erioŋet loka inabin kaŋes; kodoik ŋes emoyo loka Edeke kagogon, kodwar kakes."
1Samuel10:11 Kosodi kanen, keanyut lulem ajenete ŋes ebe koany, edwari nepepe kinabin, kotemanaros ituŋa ebc, “Inyo bo yen yenadoiki okoku loka Kis? Ejai Saul da onabin?”"
1Samuel10:12 Koboŋok ediopet loka aibois kaŋin ebe, “Iŋai bo papakec?” Koraun do awaragan ebe, “Ejai Saul da onabin?”"
1Samuel10:13 Kosodi kedau aidwar, kobu aibois naicelelei,"
1Samuel10:14 Kotema mamai loka Saul ŋes ka ekebulesit atiar, “Ai bo ipotu yesi koloto?” Kotema atiar, “Amoot asigiria: kosodi kiiany ebe mam apotu kodumunos, kapotu mama ejai Samuel.”"
1Samuel10:15 Kotema mamai loka Saul atiar, “Keŋaiŋait kolimokinai nuabu Samue! kolimok jo.”"
1Samuel10:16 Kotema Saul mamaike atiar, “Abu kolimok sio ebe adumunos asigiria.” Konyc akirot naka ajakanut naabu Samuel kinerite, mam abu kolimok ŋes."
1Samuel10:17 Konyarau Samuel ituŋa mama ejai EJAKAIT Misipa;
1Samuel10:18 Kotema idwe luka Isirael atiar, “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, ‘Abu ketolom Isirael koMisiri, kayu yes kakan naka Imisirian, kakan da naka ajakanuto kere nukimwanito yes’:"
1Samuel10:19 Konye ineroto lolo Edekekus, loabu kitajar yes katiokisiokus kere kocanikus da; ipotu kotemasi ŋes ebe, ‘Mam, konye koseikinai sio ekabaka.’ Aso do kitodiaros akonyen nuka EJAKAIT katekerinikus ka ilukuminikus.”"
1Samuel10:20 Kisukuny do Samuel atekerin kere nuka Isirael, koseunai ateker naka Benyamin."
1Samuel10:21 Kisukuny ateker naka Benyamin kokekiakec, koseunai ekek loka Imaturin: kisukuny ekek loka Maturi ediopet ediopet; koseunai Saul okoku loka Kis; konye kemoata ŋes mam apotu kodumut."
1Samuel10:22 Kanuka ŋun kinita bobo EJAKAIT ebe, “Ejai kereka etuŋanan loeroko kedoluno?” Koboŋok EJAKAIT ebe, “Koany, enopit koboro.”"
1Samuel10:23 Kokerata koomata ŋes kaŋina; kosodi kebwo ŋesi kotuna, aoja ŋesi adepar ituŋa kere ageun kokeperinike."
1Samuel10:24 Kotema Samuel iruna kere atiar, “Ianyut yesi ŋol loaseu EJAKAIT, ebe emamei loeputotor kotuna kere?” Kiworoto ituŋa kere ebe,” Kidari Edeke ekabaka.”"
1Samuel10:25 Kosodi Samuel alimokin ituŋa epone loka ajakanut, kiwadik oitabo, kibwaik akonyen nuka EJAKAIT, Kotwar Samuel ituŋa kere, ninitunanan togoke."
1Samuel10:26 Kolot Saul da togoke Gibea; kolototo ituŋa lukirigin luatirorit Edeke itauonokee kaŋes.
1Samuel10:27 Konye odwe luka Belial ice kotemasi atiar, “Ikwaikini ai etuŋanan lo kitajari oni?” Komenata ŋes, mam apotu koinut ainakinet. Konye kililin ŋesi."
1Samuel11:1 Kosodi Nakas Emonait abunore, kidukur Yabes-gilead: apotu ituŋa kere luka Yabes kobalas Nakas ebe, “Kitutuk kasio, keiaanakisi jo.”"
1Samuel11:2 Kotema Nakas Emonait kes atiar, “Kakirot kana ŋes etutukio kayes, ebe kogorunoi akusikonye nukoteten kere; kasodi eoŋ aitaraun ŋes amorosit koIsirael kere.”"
1Samuel11:3 Kotemasi imakio luka Yabes ŋes atiar, “Koinakinai ber isio apaarasia akanykaarei, tetere kijukari ekiyakia oikorun kere luka Isirael: kosodi konyet, arai kemameun yenikitajari sio, kibuni mama ijai.”"
1Samuel11:4 Kopotu ikiyakia Gibea loka Saul, kolimokis ituŋa akiro ŋun: kodelosi ituŋa kere, komonyata,"
1Samuel11:5 Ido koany, kobu Saul komanikor, etupit imoŋin; kotema Saul atiar, “Inyo bo isiriebi ituŋa tape emonyete?” Kolimokis ŋes akiro nuka ituŋa luka Yabes."
1Samuel11:6 Kodoik emoyo loka Edeke Saul kagogon nakepupunia akiro nun, kinep noi akenyunyura."
1Samuel11:7 Koyau imoŋin iarei, kotubutub kijuka oikorun kere luka Isirael kakan naka ikiyakia, ebe, “Ŋinituŋanan yenimam etupit Saul ka Samuel iswamakinio kwaŋin ikemonin.” Kodoik ituŋa akurian EJAKAIT, kopotu bala idiopetunanan."
1Samuel11:8 Kimara kes koBesek; emwaasi idwe luka Isirael ilukumin akwat auni, ka ituŋa luka Yuda ilukumin akaisauni."
1Samuel11:9 Kotemasi kesi ikiyakia luapote atiar, “Ilimokinete kwanata ituŋa luka Yabes-gilead ebe, ‘Moi, kapak naemwaniar akoloŋ, kiyuunio.’ “Kopotu ikiyakia kolimokis ituŋa luka Yabes; kiyalamikinos."
1Samuel11:10 Kanuka ŋun kotemasi ituŋa luka Yabes atiar, “Kibuni moi mama ijai, kiswamakini isio kere nuitojokit ijo.”"
1Samuel11:11 Kojaun kwaŋin tupuruc, kitemok Saul ituŋa orioneta iuni; kopotu kidin kiidukurun kakwenyunet naka tupuruc, kodanyata monain aitodol amwanis naka apaaran: kosodi kanen kisiarakinos luapotu kideunos, komam iarei kakesi esalete nepepe."
1Samuel11:12 Kotemasi ituŋa Samuel atiar, “Iŋai bo ŋol loabala ebe, ‘Kiyai kereka Saul sio?’ Koyau iruna ŋul, kaarata kes.”"
1Samuel11:13 Kotema Saul atiar, “Mam lolo eario idionmanan: naarai ayu lolo EJAKAIT Isirael.”"
1Samuel11:14 Kosodi Samuel atemar ituŋa atiar, “Kopotu kaloto Giligal, keteteutu ajakanut kaŋina.”"
1Samuel11:15 Koloto ituŋa kere Giligal; kodakakis Saul araun ekabaka kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT koGiligal; koinakis da kaŋina asuban nuka ainakineta nuka ainapakin kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: kiyalamikini noi Saul ka ituŋa kere luka Isirael kaŋina.
1Samuel12:1 Kotema Samuel Isirael kere atiar, “Koany, eira ekusiporoto kanuibalasi eoŋ kere, kaseik da ekabaka ayait yes."
1Samuel12:2 Kwana da, koany, elosi ekabaka kakonyenekus: eoŋ da amoion abwanut akorwo, ido koany, odweka ejaas kayes: abu kalosenenei kakonyenekus ameun keiditeuka kiton lolo,"
1Samuel12:3 Eoŋ lo: kolimoroi kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kakonyen da nuka lokinyonyoikitonoke akinyet: iŋai ca ademarit ekemon? Arai iŋai ademarit akesigiria? Arai iŋai arodit luke? Iŋai abu kareite? Arai iŋai abu kedaudau lukitumudakete akakonye? Eoŋ da kataeakini yes.’"
1Samuel12:4 Kobalas ebe, “Mam irodit lukosi, kwabo mam kireit, kwabo mam ilemarit imodiobore kakan naka idiotuŋanan kere.”"
1Samuel12:5 Kotema kes atiar, “EJAKAIT ŋes ekajenan kamakus, ka lokinyonyoikitonoke akinyet da ŋes ekajenan lolo, kwape mam yes idumunitotor ibore kakanika.” Kobalas ebe, “Ŋes ekajenan.”"
1Samuel12:6 Kotema Samuel ituŋa atiar, “Ŋes EJAKAIT loebwaikini Musa ka Aaron ido loetonyouni lukapapaakus kakwap nako Misiri."
1Samuel12:7 Aso kwana kobwaata, tetere kipuri kayes kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kanuka aswamisio kere nuedolito nuka EJAKAIT, nukiswamakini yes ka lukapapaakus."
1Samuel12:8 Nakedolio Yakob Misiri, komonyakis lukapapaakus EJAKAIT, kosodi kijuka EJAKAIT Musa ka Aaron, luetonyounete lukapapaakus koMisiri, kisiboikis aibois na."
1Samuel12:9 Konye kimurwokis kes EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, kogwela kes akan naka Sisera lokapolon loka ajore naka Kasor, ido kakan naka Ipilisitian, kakan da naka ekabaka loka Moab, koiioto kakes."
1Samuel12:10 Komonyakis EJAKAIT, kobalas ebe, ‘Kipou kadiakata, naarai kipou kenyeisi EJAKAIT, kejaanakis Ibaalin ka Asitarot: konye kwana koyuunai kakan naka lukasurupokosi, kasodete aijaanakin jo.’"
1Samuel12:11 Kijukak EJAKAIT Yerubaal, ka Bedan, ka Yeputa, ka Samuel, koyu yes kakan naka lukasurupokus kariino kere, kiboikinos inapakina."
1Samuel12:12 Naianyuniata kiisurok Nakas ekabaka loka idwe luka Amon, ipotu kotemasi eoŋ atiar, ‘Mam, konye ekabaka ŋes kirumi sio’: kwabo EJAKAIT Ekusideke kerai Ekusikabaka."
1Samuel12:13 Aso do kosesenata ekabaka loipotu koseut, loipotu kilipata: ido koany, kiinak EJAKAIT yes ekabaka."
1Samuel12:14 Arai iyonito EJAKAIT kijaanakinete, kopupenenete ekeporoto, kwabo mam ipaliikinete aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT, yes ka ekabaka da lokirumit kotupenenete EJAKAIT Ekusideke, aso:"
1Samuel12:15 Konye arai mam ipupenenete eporoto loka EJAKAIT, kipaliikis aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT, ŋes itusurupio akan naka EJAKAIT yes, kwape etusurupio kolo lukapapaakus."
1Samuel12:16 Aso do, kobwaata, koanyut akirot na nakos, naiswamai EJAKAIT kakonyenekus."
1Samuel12:17 Mere lolo asaket naka akima? Elipi EJAKAIT koyanau eires ka akiru; kojenut yesi koanyut kwape epoloor akusironis, naipotu kiswamata kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, ailip ekabaka.”"
1Samuel12:18 Kosodi Samuel ailip EJAKAIT: koyanau EJAKAIT eires ka akiru kapaaran kaŋin; koyonata noi ituŋa kere EJAKAIT ka Samuel da.
1Samuel12:19 Kotemasi ituŋa kere Samuel atiar, “Kilipak ikonibulesin kama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kenyeis atwakare; naarai kiyataki adiakanaretakosi kere karonis kana, ailipun ekabaka.”"
1Samuel12:20 Kolimok Samuel ituŋa ebe, “Sirikiyoŋa: abeit ipotu kiswamata aronis na kere: konye sirikipaasi ainyein atupenen EJAKAIT, konye kijaanakis EJAKAIT kikusitauon kere:"
1Samuel12:21 Sirikipaasi: naarai ti ŋes atupar aamameak, numam ajokis karaida ayuun, naarai eraas nuutaai."
1Samuel12:22 Naarai mam eialakin EJAKAIT iketuŋa kanuka ekekiror lokos: naarai kitoiok EJAKAIT aituluor yes ateker kanuken,"
1Samuel12:23 Ido kanukan, madi akuj eoŋ aidiak kama ka EJAKAIT ainyein ailipanakin yes: konye ketuutoori yes erot lokajokan loitenara."
1Samuel12:24 Konye koyonito EJAKAIT bon, kijaanakinete kotoma abeit kikusitauon kere: kiitununete akiro kwape eraatar nukos nukiswamanakini yes."
1Samuel12:25 Konye arai inna iyatanakinete aswam nueroko imudiaros yes kere ka ekusikabaka da.’
1Samuel13:1 Kerai, Saul loka ikar akaisauni naageunia airum; abu kirum Isirael ikar iarei."
1Samuel13:2 Koseu Saul ituŋa luka Isirael ilukumin iuni; kanul ajaananas ituŋa ilukumin iarei nepepe ka Saul Mikimas, moru loka Bet-el da, ajaananas da elukumit nepepe ka Yonatan Gibea loka Benyamin: kotwar luee kere ninirunanan owemake."
1Samuel13:3 Kodany Yonatan iserikalen luka Ipilisitian luajaas Geba, kopuput Ipilisitian nun, Kokutak Saul arupepe airiamar akwap kere kobala ebe, “Kopuput do Iburanian.”"
1Samuel13:4 Kopup Isirael kere ebakai ebe adany Saul iserikalen luka Ipilisitian, ebe da amena Ipilisitian Isirael. Kotukokinos ituŋa atupar Saul Giligal."
1Samuel13:5 Kotukokinos Ipilisitian aitiji Isirael, agalin alukumin akaisauni, ka ikebwanenok ibalasin ilukumin ikanykape, ka ituŋa bala asine naejai ariri naka aŋolol: kopotu kidukuroto Mikimas, ari nakokide naka Bet-aben."
1Samuel13:6 Keanyut ituŋa luka Isirael ebe aridakina kesi, (naarai eyalononoete ituŋa) apotu ituŋa koŋopata kabuai, kamonieik komorun, katesin ka apanya da."
1Samuel13:7 Ekwanara ice koBuranian koYorodan akwap naka Gad ka Gilead; konye Saul, aroko ŋesi ajai Giligal, kotupasi ŋes ituŋa kere komaranete."
1Samuel13:8 Kidarak apaarasia akanykaarei, kwape ajaar apak naaseunit Samuel: konye mam Samuel abu kobu Giligal; kisiararos ituŋa kaneajai ŋesi."
1Samuel13:9 Kotema Saul atiar, “Koinunai ainakinet nacweio, ka ainakineta nuka ainapakin.” Kosodi ŋesi ainakin ainakinet naicweio,"
1Samuel13:10 Kosodi kanen, napedauni ŋesi ainakin ainakinet naicweio, koany, kobu Samuel; kolot Saul airiamun kaŋes, tetere iyogai ŋes."
1Samuel13:11 Kotema Samuel atiar, “Inyo bo iswamaa ijo?” Kotema Saul atiar, “Naarai abu kaany iruna isiararos kamakaŋ, mam da jo ibu kobu kapaarasia kanuaseunitai, atukokina da Ipilisitian Mikimas;"
1Samuel13:12 Ŋes atemaria eoŋ ebe, ‘Epote do Ipilisitian mama ajai Giligal, mam elipit asianut naka EJAKAIT’: ŋes etinaikinor ainakin ainakinet naicweio.”"
1Samuel13:13 Kobala Samuel Saul ebe, “Iswama nukabanaanut; mam irieit aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT Ekonideke naabu kicorak jo, naarai ti EJAKAIT kiticat akonijakanut koIsirael ikar kere."
1Samuel13:14 Konye kwana mam akonijakanut ieasi: amou EJAKAIT etuŋanan loekot, aseu EJAKAIT ŋes araun ekapolon loeyait iketuŋa, naarai mam iricit nin naabu EJAKAIT kicorak jo.”"
1Samuel13:15 Konyou Samuel, kolot koGiligal kiton Gibea loka Benyamin. Kimar Saul ituŋa luajaas kaŋes, kwaka akwat akanykape."
1Samuel13:16 Kiboioto Saul ka Yonatan okokuke, ka ituŋa luajaas kakes koGeba loka Benyamin: konye kidukuroto Ipilisitian Mikimas."
1Samuel13:17 Kopotu ikaŋatak koidukurun luka Ipilisitian korioneta iuni: kitor erioŋet ediopet orot loebei Opura, kiton akwap naka Saul:"
1Samuel13:18 Kitor ecerionet orot loebei Bet-koron: kitor erioŋet ece da orot loka eikor loitei aditot naka Seboim kobei amodiŋ.
1Samuel13:19 Amamei do ediokatatan kakwap kere naka Isirael: naarai abalas Ipilisitian ebe, “Kinyeis Iburanian aiswamaun ikileŋakec ka akwaras:"
1Samuel13:20 Konye alosenenete Isiraelin kere mama ejaas Ipilisitian, ninituŋanan aipen ekemeleku, ka ekilenike, ka aepeke ka eŋitike;"
1Samuel13:21 Keniŋioros initia, ka ikileŋa, ka imelekes ka aepei; aitemokin da imacarin."
1Samuel13:22 Kwaŋin kapaaran naka ejie, komameun ekileŋ karaida akwara kakan naka idiotuŋanan kotuna luajaas ka Saul ka Yonatan: dimarai Saul ka Yonatan okokuke kes ajaas,"
1Samuel13:23 Koloto iserikalen luka Ipilisitian aridat naka Mikimas.
1Samuel14:1 Kosodi adiopepaaran abu Yonatan okoku loka Saul kotema ekatumunan loadakit lujiisike atiar, “Kobia kaloto mama ejaas iseri kalen luka Ipilisitian, lueiaas owai je.” Konye mam abu kolimok papake."
1Samuel14:2 Kiboikin Saul atutubet nakosane naka Gibea kwap kekamamaga, loejai Miguron: emwaasi ituŋa luajaas kaŋes kwape akwat akanykape."
1Samuel14:3 Abu Akiya okoku loka Akitub, onaee loka Ikabod, okoku loka Pinekas, okoku loka Eli, esasedoti loka EJAKAIT koSilo konapite epod. Mam apotu ituŋa kojenut ebe alot Yonatan."
1Samuel14:4 Kidin karidana, nuakoto Yonatan aitor alosit mama ejaas iserikalen luka Ipilisitian, ajai emoru osiep ediopet ka emoru osiep ece da: ekiror loka ediopet ŋes Boses, ka ekiror loka ece da ŋes Sene."
1Samuel14:5 Ajai ediopemoru ari naka agolitomei kinaren kaMikimas, loce da ari naka eŋalakimak iŋaren keGeba."
1Samuel14:6 Kotema Yonatan ekatumunan loadakit lujiisike atiar, “Kobia kaloto mama ejaas iserikalen luka lu lumam ekepitai: diatiswamai EJAKAIT kaoni: naarai emamei yenitikokini EJAKAIT aitajar kaluipu arai kaluikidioko.”"
1Samuel14:7 Kobala loadakit lujiisike atiar, “Kiswama kere nuejaas otaukon: koany, ajai eoŋ nepepe kajo, kwape ejaar ekonitau ŋes ejaar lokaŋ da.”"
1Samuel14:8 Kosodi Yonatan atemar atiar, “Koany, kilosi mama ejaas ituŋa, kasodete aitodiar kamakec."
1Samuel14:9 Arai kiitemasi kesi oni atiar, ‘Kidareutu aitodol nakibunio mamakus’; ŋes kisalakinia aiboisiwok, mam da kidokari mamakec."
1Samuel14:10 Konye arai ketemasi atiar, ‘Kodokutu mamakosi’; ŋes do kidokaria: naarai ijaikini EJAKAIT kes akaniwok: craun ŋin aanyunet kamawok.”"
1Samuel14:11 Kosodete kesi iarei aitodiar oserikalen luka Ipilisitian: kotemasi Ipilisitian atiar, “Koany, alomut Iburanian kapanya kanuanopitotor.”"
1Samuel14:12 Kobonokis iserikalen Yonatan ka loadakit lujiisike ebe, “Kodokutu mamakosi, kitodikini isio yes ibore.” Kotema Yonatan loadakit luiiisike atiar, “Kodok, kotupunai: naarai ejaiki EJAKAIT kes akan naka Isirael.”"
1Samuel14:13 Kodoka Yonatan kuiu eliat kakanin ka akeje, kotupite ŋes loadakit lujiisike: kibiroros kesi kakonyen nuka Yonatan; komeete loadakit lujiisike aiar kes,"
1Samuel14:14 Earit ŋol losodit loaarete Yonatan ka loadakit lujiisike emwaasi ituŋa akaisaarei, katutubet naedit noi kosubite bala epelu lokamana."
1Samuel14:15 Kojau amaran naepol oidukurun, omanikor, otuŋa da kere, iserikalen, ka ikaŋatak da apotu komaranata: komaran akwap, kwaŋin kojaun amaran naepol noi,"
1Samuel14:16 Kiteoto ikedarak luka Saul koGibea loka Benyamin; ido koany, kidior atukot, kisiarakinos niniibois."
1Samuel14:17 Kosodi Saul alimokin ituŋa luajaas kaŋes atiar, “Aso kimara, koanyut yenelosit kamawok.” Kosodete kimarata, ido koany, amameete kanen Yonatan ka luadakit lujiisike."
1Samuel14:18 Kotema Saul Akiya atiar, “Koyau asaduku naka Edeke ne.” Naarai ajai asaduku naka Edeke kidwe luka Isirael kapak kaŋin,"
1Samuel14:19 Kosodi kanen ineras Saul ka esasedoti, kiyatakin noi eeelet loajai oidukurun luka Ipilisitian; kotema Saul esasedoti atiar, “Kolema akonikan.”"
1Samuel14:20 Kotukokinos Saul ka ituŋa kere luajaas kaŋes, kopotu ojie: ido koany, abu ekileŋ loka ŋinituŋanan koluik yenieeke, kojaun aiyaloŋoŋ naepol noi."
1Samuel14:21 Iburanian luajaas lem ka Ipilisitian, lualosete kakes oidukurun kakwap naalukunit; apotu nul kibelooros mama ajaas Isiraelin luajaas ka Saul ka Yonatan,"
1Samuel14:22 Kwape kwaŋin da ituŋa kere luka Isirael luaŋopitos kakwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, kepuput ebe akera Ipilisitian, apotu kesi da kodapata kes noi kojie."
1Samuel14:23 Kitajar EJAKAIT Isirael kapaaran kaŋin: kotubor ejie Bet-aben,"
1Samuel14:24 Kiyalononoto ituŋa luka Isirael kapaaran kaŋin; konye kicorak Saul ituŋa ebe, “Kikenoi etuŋanan loenyami idionyamat kere eroko atiboŋ, kenyana eoŋ da lukasurupoka.” Mam do ediotuŋanan loabu kiir inyamat,"
1Samuel14:25 Kopotu ituŋa kere amagoro; kojai esik kwap.
1Samuel14:26 Kosodi kedolut ituŋa amagoro, koany, koitunun esik: konye mam ediotuŋanan loabu kibwaik akan aitukuke; naarai ayoŋito ituŋa aiyaposit."
1Samuel14:27 Konye mam Yonatan abu kopup naecorakinia papake ituŋa aiyaposit: ŋes edomakinia ebela loetiŋit ŋesi akape nuka esik, kosodi aibwaikin akekan aitukuke; kolakaros akekonyen."
1Samuel14:28 Kosodi ediopet kotuna aboŋokin ebe, “Abu papakon kicorak ituŋa aiyaposit ebe, ‘Kikenoi etuŋanan loenyami inyamat apaaran naka lolo.’’’ Kilworunos ituŋa,"
1Samuel14:29 Kotema Yonatan atiar, “Etican papaka akwap: keŋainait, koany, kwape alakarotor akonyeneka, naarai abu eoŋ keir edio kosik kalo."
1Samuel14:30 Mere tiejok noi arai kenyamito ituŋa lolo lunatuna luka lukasurupokec luapotu kodumut? Naarai emamei lolo earit loepol koPilisitian.”
1Samuel14:31 Kodanyata luka Ipilisitian kapaaran kaŋin anyoun koMikimas kiton Aiyalon: kilworunos ituŋa noi.
1Samuel14:32 Kokerata ituŋa oŋatan, kolemut amerekekin, ka imoŋin, ka itak, koarakis kes kwap: konyamata ituŋa kes kaokot da."
1Samuel14:33 Kosodete kesi alimokin Saul ebe, “Koany, adiakasi ituŋa kama ejai EJAKAIT, naarai enyamete kaokot da.” Kotema atiar, “Ibilata ebotet, kikokorikinoi amoru naepol neajai lolo.”"
1Samuel14:34 Kotema Saul atiar, “Kisiararos yesi otuŋa, kotemasi kes atiar, ‘Koyau ninitunanan ekemon, ka ŋinituŋanan akemerekek, koarakis ne, konyamata; kinyeis adiakar kama ejai EJAKAIT kanuka ainyam kaokot.”"
1Samuel14:35 Koyaut ituŋa kere akuare ŋin ninituŋanan ekemon, koarakis nen as Kodukok Saul EJAKAIT etem: ŋopeŋol ŋes arai etem losodit loadukokini ŋesi EJAKAIT."
1Samuel14:36 Kotema Saul atiar, “Kadumasi Ipilisitian kuare, kanatata kes kiton tupuruc, komam kideuni ediotuŋanan kakesi.” Kotemasi atiar, “Kiswama kere nuitojokit ijo.” Kosodi esasedoti atemar ebe, “Aso kekunyakisi neejai Edeke.”"
1Samuel14:37 Kinit Saul Edeke atiar, “Adumari eoŋ Ipilisitian? Ŋaikini kereka ijo kes akan naka Isirael?” Konye mam abu Koboŋok ŋes kapaaran kaŋin,"
1Samuel14:38 Kotema Saul atiar, “Kikunyutu ne, yes kere ijaka luka ituŋa: kojenut koanyut da neajai adiakaret lolo."
1Samuel14:39 Naarai kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, loitaiari Isirael, karaida kejaun toma okokuka Yonatan, abeit etwani.” Konye komameu kotuna erunanan loabu Koboŋok ŋes."
1Samuel14:40 Kosodi ŋesi atemar Isirael kere ebe, “Kojaunos yesi owai ediopet, eoŋ da ka okokuka Yonatan kijaun eeewai.” Kotemasi ituŋa Saul atiar, “Kiswama nuitojokit ijo.”"
1Samuel14:41 Kanuka ŋun kotema Saul EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael atiar, “Kitodu abeit.” Korounai Saul ka Yonatan: konye kokuata ituŋa."
1Samuel14:42 Kotema Saul atiar, “Kilamilamakinai eoŋ ka Yonatan okokuka.” Korounai Yonatan,"
1Samuel14:43 Kosodi Saul atemar Yonatan atiar, “Kolimokinai nuiswamat.” Kolimok Yonatan ŋes ebe, “Abeit abu eoŋ keir ediosik kobela kaloetinit eoŋ: ido koany, kebusakinit atwanare.”"
1Samuel14:44 Kosodi Saul atemar atiar, “Kiswama Edeke kwaŋin ka adepar da; naarai abeit itwani, Yonatan.”"
1Samuel14:45 Kotemasi ituŋa Saul atiar, “Etwani kereka Yonatan, loeswamau aitajario na naepol mama ejai Isirael? Madi akuj: kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, mam ediotimat loka akouke edoi alup, naarai eswamata ka Edeke kapaaran naka lolo.” K wanin kolakut ituŋa Yonatan, tape mam etwani."
1Samuel14:46 Koboŋ Saul katupit Ipilisitian, kolototo Ipilisitian aiboisiokec."
1Samuel14:47 Kosodi napekirumia Saul Isirael, abu kitiji lukasurupoke kosiepion kere, Moab, idwe luka Amon, ka Edom, ka ikabakan luka Soba, ka Ipilisitian da: ido luasuronokini ŋesi kere abu kipikonor."
1Samuel14:48 Abu kiswama nukatitin, kodany Imalekain, abu da koyu Isirael kakan naka ŋul kaluanasenenete kes."
1Samuel14:49 Odwe luka Saul kes Yonatan, ka Isibi ka Maliki-sua: ka ikiroria luka adweke aarei kes luta: ekiror loka akiyai Merab, ka ekiror loka nadidi Mikal:"
1Samuel14:50 Ekiror loka aberu naka Saul arai Akinoam akoku naka Akimaas: ka ekiror loka ekapolon loka erioneteke kerai Abiner okoku loka Ner, mamai loka Saul."
1Samuel14:51 Kis ŋes papake loka Saul; Ner papa loka Abiner kerai okoku loka Abiel.
1Samuel14:52 Apaarasia kere nuka Saul ajaas ijiisio luadeden noi kidinikec ka Ipilisitian: kosodi naanyununia Saul ediotuŋanan lokirigi arai ediotuŋanan lokatitin, ayanaanari ŋol mamake."
1Samuel15:1 Kotema Samuel Saul atiar, “Abu EJAKAIT kejuk eoŋ ainyonyoikin jo akinyet araun ekabaka loiyait ikeruna, Isirael: asa do, kopupok eporoto loka akiro nuka EJAKAIT,"
1Samuel15:2 Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe, ‘Eteu eoŋ Amalek kanuka nuabu ŋesi kiswamak Isirael, kwape abu kobwoikinia ŋes korot naabunio koMisiri."
1Samuel15:3 Aso do kolot kodany Amalek, komudia kere luejaatar kesi, komam ideunete kes, koarata kere, ikiliok ka aŋor da, imukerun ka luenakete, imoŋin ka amerekekin, akaalai ka asigiria da.”"
1Samuel15:4 Kosodi Saul atukokin ituŋa, kimar kes koTelaim, ituŋa ilukumin akwat aarei luelosete akeje, ka ituŋa luka Yuda ilukumin itomon."
1Samuel15:5 Kobu Saul ore loka Amalek, kosodete koperut kaditot."
1Samuel15:6 Kotema Saul Ikenin atiar, “Koloto, konyoutu, konyoutu komalekain, kenyek amudiar yes kakes: naarai ipotu kosiakata mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael, naaponiata koMisiri,” Kwaŋin konyout Ikenin komalekain,"
1Samuel15:7 Kodany Saul Imalekain, anyoun koKabiIa bala ilosi Sur, loejai kinaren nako Misiri,"
1Samuel15:8 Kikama Agag ekabaka loka Imalekain eiari, komudia eut ituŋa kere kakwanis naka ekileŋ."
1Samuel15:9 Konye Saul ka ituŋa kideut Agag, ka luetelekarito aiokis kamerekekin, komonin, ka luetumito, ka imerekekin ludidik, ka luajokak kere, komam emudiarete kes cut: konye ibore kere yenarono ka yenamam aiokis, ŋes apotu kesi komudiasi."
1Samuel15:10 Kosodi akirot naka EJAKAIT abunore mama ejai Samuel ebe,"
1Samuel15:11 “Eitu eoŋ kanu naarai abu kadakak Saul araun ekabaka: naarai abono kau enyeki atupit eoŋ, ido mam iswamat akaicorakineta.” Konyunyurikin Samuel; komony mama ejai EJAKAIT akuare kia."
1Samuel15:12 Kodilok Samuel anyoun airiamun ka Saul tupuruc; kolimokinai Samuel ebe, abu Saul kobu Karamel, ido koany, abu kosipok aiitunet, ido alot, atubor, abea Giligal."
1Samuel15:13 Kobu Samuel mama ejai Saul: kotema Saul ŋes atiar, “Kisirereŋ EJAKAIT jo: eswama eoŋ aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT.”"
1Samuel15:14 Kotema Samuel atiar, “Inyo bo do apolou naka aruo na naka amerekekin naapupi kakiika, ka eikun loapupi loka imoninr”"
1Samuel15:15 Kotema Saul atiar, “Ayaunio kes kama kImalekain: naarai apotu ituŋa kideut luetelekarito ajokis kamerekekin komonin da, ainakinia EJAKAIT Edekekon asuban; ido luee kere kimudia isio cut.”"
1Samuel15:16 Kosodi Samuel atemar Saul atiar, “Ŋo ber, kalimok jo nuabu EJAKAIT kalimok eoŋ akuare na.” Kotema ŋes atiar, “Aso kiner.”"
1Samuel15:17 Kotema Samuel atiar, “Karaida kirai ijo lokidite kakonyenekon mam aponi kodakakin apolokinit atekerin nuka Isirael? Kinyonyoik da EJAKAIT jo akinyet araun ekabaka loiyait Isirael;"
1Samuel15:18 Kosodi EJAKAIT aijukar jo alosit, kobala ebe, ‘Aso kolot komudia eut ikadiakanarak kes Imalekain, kitiji kes aitodol naimudiaria kere.’"
