1Samuel15:19 Kanukinyo do mam jo ibu korimaria eporoto loka EJAKAIT, konye ibu kokerik lunatan kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT?”"
1Samuel15:20 Kotema Saul Samuel atiar, “Ee bo, abu eoŋ karima eporoto loka EJAKAIT, alot da alosit naabu EJAKAIT kejukak eoŋ, kayau da Agag ekabaka loka Amalek; amudia eut Imalekain."
1Samuel15:21 Konye apotu ituŋa kolemut iŋatan, amerekekin ka imoŋin, luepolok koboro luagitaritai, ainakinia asuban mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke koGiligal.”"
1Samuel15:22 Kotema Samuel atiar, “Isiyalamikinit kereka EJAKAIT ainakineta nuicweio ka asuban kwape isiyalamikinitor arimarit eporoto loka EJAKAIT? Koany, arimar itelekarit asubanit, Ka aipup da edeparit asiepai nuka imerekekin."
1Samuel15:23 Naarai epali esubit bala adiakaret naka aidwar, Ka aninik bala aputosia nuegerer ka iterapim. Naarai iner ijo akirot naka EJAKAIT, Kiner ŋesi da jo araut ekabaka.”"
1Samuel15:24 Kotema Saul Samuel atiar, “Abu kadiaka; naarai ebuca aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT, ka akirokon: naarai abu kayon ituŋa, kasodi arimar ekeceporoto."
1Samuel15:25 Kanuka nun, kenainait, kitim akadiakaret, kibelokin bobo nepepe keoŋ, tetere amai EJAKAIT.”"
1Samuel15:26 Kotema Samuel Saul atiar, “Mam eoŋ kibonori kaio, naarai iŋer ijo akirot naka, EJAKAIT: EJAKAIT da kiŋer jo araut ekabaka loiyait Isirael.”"
1Samuel15:27 Kosodi napibelokin Samuel alosit, abu kitin ekekaso, kocila."
1Samuel15:28 Kotema Samuel ŋes atiar, “Acila EJAKAIT ajakanut naka Isirael kamakon lolo, ainaki da ŋes eidunyetekon, loejok adepar joo."
1Samuel15:29 Bobo da Agogoŋ naka Isirael mam iŋalai karaida aitoronikin: naarai mam ŋes erai etuŋanan tape itoronikin.”
1Samuel15:30 Kosodi ŋesi atemar atiar, “Abu kadiaka: konye kenainait, kitubusai kakonyen nuka imakio luka ikatuŋa, kakonyen nuka Isirael, kibelokin bobo nepepe keoŋ, tetere amai EJAKAIT Ekonideke.”"
1Samuel15:31 Kibelokin do Samuel aupar kaSaul: koma Saul EJAKAIT.
1Samuel15:32 Kosodi Samuel atemar ebe, “Koinunai Agag ekabaka loka Imalekain.” Kobu Agag mama ejai ŋesi esoga. Kobala Agag ebe, “Abeit atubor apipil naka atwanare.”"
1Samuel15:33 Kotema Samuel atiar, “Kwape abu ekonikilen kitasalia aŋor emameete idwe, kwaŋin esalia totokon da emamei ikoku kanor.” Kojepejep Samuel Agag kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT koGiliga!."
1Samuel15:34 Kosodi Samuel alosit Rama; kolot Saul togoke Gibea loka Saul.
1Samuel15:35 Mam bobo Samuel abu kobu aanyun Saul aitodol apaaran naatwania; konye komony Samuel kanuka Saul: kiitu EJAKAIT kanu naarai abu kodakak Saul araun ekabaka ayait Isirael.
1Samuel16:1 Kotema EJAKAIT Samuel atiar, “Itodol ai imonyi kanuka Saul, naarai aŋer eoŋ ŋes araut ekabaka loka Isirael? Kileleb akinyet amumwaratakon, kolot, kejukari jo mama ejai Yese Ebetelekemit: naarai adum ekabaka kodweke.”"
1Samuel16:2 Kotema Samuel atiar, “Ekwaikini ai alosi? Arai kiira Saul, kaari eoŋ.” Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Koyana ataok, kiner atiar, ‘Abunit ainakin EJAKAIT asuban.’"
1Samuel16:3 Konyarau Yese kobu asuban, ketodikini jo nuiswamai: inyonyoikini akinyet ŋol lokalimokini jo.”"
1Samuel16:4 Kiswama Samuel nuabu EJAKAIT kiner, kobu Bet-lekem, Kopotu imakio lukore emaranete airiamun kaŋes, kotemasi atiar, “Ibunit ijo kainapakin?”"
1Samuel16:5 Kotema atiar, “Kainapakin: abunit ainakin EJAKAIT asuban: kitalaunos, kauparos keoŋ asuban.” Kitalau Yese ka odweke, konyarau kes aponare asuban."
1Samuel16:6 Kosodi kanen kepotu, abu ŋesi kosesen Eliab; kotema atiar, “Abeit loinyonyoikini EJAKAIT akinyet ejai akonyeneke.”"
1Samuel16:7 Konye kobala EJAKAIT Samuel ebe, “Sirikisesen ereeteke, karaida aoiau naka akuanake; naarai aŋer ŋes: naarai mam EJAKAIT eseseni kwape esesenia ituŋanan; naarai itei ituŋanan atakan nakokuju, konye itei EJAKAIT etau.”"
1Samuel16:8 Kosodi Yese anyaraun Abinadab, kitotor akonyen nuka Samuel. Kotema atiar, “Mam EJAKAIT eseunit lo da.”"
1Samuel16:9 Kosodi Yese aitotor Sama. Kotema atiar, “Mam EJAKAIT eseunit lo da.”"
1Samuel16:10 Kitotor Yese odweke ikanykaarei akonyen nuka Samuel. Kobala Samuel Yese ebe, “Mam EJAKAIT eseunit lu,”"
1Samuel16:11 Kotema Samuel Yese atiar, “Ejaas ikonidwe ne kere?” Kotema atiar, “Esalit inoorit, ido koany, ieokie amerekekin.” Kobala Samuel Yese atiar, “Kijuka koomai ŋes: naarai mam kiboikin aitodol neebunio.”"
1Samuel16:12 Kijuka, kitolom ŋes, Koren ŋesi, kitemelel, ajok asesen da. Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Konyou, kinyonyoik ŋes akinyet, naarai ŋes lo.”"
1Samuel16:13 Kosodi Samuel alemun amumwarat naka akinyet, kinyonyoik ŋes akinyet kokidin oinacanake: kodoik emoyo loka EJAKAIT Daudi kagogon amear kapaaran kaŋin kaiyatanakin. Konyou Samuel, kolot Rama."
1Samuel16:14 Abu emoyo loka EJAKAIT konyou kaneejai Saul, kitican ŋes emoyo loerono loabuni kama ejai EJAKAIT."
1Samuel16:15 Kotemasi ibulesin luka Saul ŋes atiar, “Koany, kitican jo emoyo loerono loabuni kama ejai EJAKAIT."
1Samuel16:16 Aso kicorak ekapolonikosi ikonibulesin luejaas akonyenekon, amoun etuŋanan loerami adeudeu kapirianut, kosodi naiiaar ijo kemoyo loerono loabuni kama ejai Edeke, ŋes do eramia ŋesi kakekan, iŋaleuni.”"
1Samuel16:17 Kobala Saul ikebulesin atiar, “Kodumakinai etuŋanan loerami ejok, koinut.”"
1Samuel16:18 Kosodi ediopet kokatumunak aboŋokin ebe, “Koany, aanyunit okoku loka Yese Ebetelekemit, loerami kapirianut, etuŋanan lokirigi loetitin, etuŋanan loejio, loecobe koinerike, loitemelej, ido ejai EJAKAIT kaŋes.”"
1Samuel16:19 Kijuka Saul ikiyakia mama ejai Yese, kotema atiar, “Kijukakinai okokukon Daudi, loejaas kamerekekin.”"
1Samuel16:20 Kolem Yese asigiria kisibwok imugatin, ka eriagi loka emukule loka ebino, ka ikalol, kijuka kes ka Daudi okokuke mama ejai Saul."
1Samuel16:21 Kobu Daudi mama ejai Saul, kobwo kakonyeneke: kominakin ŋes noi; koraun loedakit luiiisike."
1Samuel16:22 Kijuka Saul mama ejai Yese kobala ebe, “Keŋaiŋait, kocamak Daudi abwoenen kakonyeneka; naarai adumu ŋesi asianut kakonyeneka.”"
1Samuel16:23 Kosodi kanen keiau Saul emoyo loerono loabuni kama ejai EJAKAIT, kolemuni Daudi adeudeu, koram kakekan: kicasi do Saul, konaleuni, konyou emoyo loerono kamake."
1Samuel17:1 Kotukonokis Ipilisitian ajorekee ejie, kotukokinos Soko, naka Yuda, kidukuroto kidin Soko ka Aseka, toma Epes-damim,"
1Samuel17:2 Kotukokinos Saul ka ituŋa luka Isirael, kidukuroto apuuton naka Ela, kiderakinos ejie ka Ipilisitian."
1Samuel17:3 Kobwaata Ipilisitian komoru epuai, kobwaata luka Isirael da komoru kepuai: koiai aditot kidinikec,"
1Samuel17:4 Kolom ekadedenan koswamin luka Ipilisitian, ekekiror Goliat, loka Gas, aoiauke ikubitin ikanykape ka atutubet naka ekubit,"
1Samuel17:5 Konapite aboko naka aisinit kakouke, konapite da ekooti loka aisinit; alaŋir naka ekooti isekelin ilukumin ikany luka aisinit."
1Samuel17:6 Konapite da kakeje aisinit, ka eliru loka aisinit kopur."
1Samuel17:7 Koputos amorok naka akwarake bala akitoi naesonyere; ka akwarake da alopet alaŋir kitemi isekelin akwat akanykape luka asuat: kinarenenokini ŋol lokitinenenei ekebuku.
1Samuel17:8 Kobwo kiworo mama ejai ajore naka Isirael, kobala ebe, “Kanukinyo ilomuniata aiderakin? Mere eoŋ Epilisitiat, yes da ibulesin luka Saul? Koseutu ekes kanukus, kikokoroun neajai,"
1Samuel17:9 Arai kepedo ejie keoŋ, kaar, asa kiluor isio ikusibulesin; konye keteleka eoŋ ŋes, kaar, asa iluoros yesi ibulesinikosi, kijaanakinete sio.”"
1Samuel17:10 Kiner Epilisitiat ebe, “Emua lolo ajore naka Isirael; ae ekes, kaiioto.”"
1Samuel17:11 Kiira Saul ka luka Isirael kere akiro ŋun nuka Epilisitiat, kiyalononoto, kokuriakaros noi."
1Samuel17:12 Kerai Daudi okoku loka Epurasit ŋol loka Bet-lekem-Yuda, lokerai ekekiror Yese; kejaas odweke ikanykauni: komoionite da etuŋanan ŋol kapaarasia nuka Saul, kokokosanite kotuna."
1Samuel17:13 Ketuparito odwe luka Yese lukapolok iuni Saul oiie: ikiroria da luka odweke luuni lukelositos oiie kes luta, ekiyai ŋes Eliab, loketupi da ŋes Abinadab, ka lokiwuniet ŋes Sama,"
1Samuel17:14 Daudi ŋes eŋoorit: ketuparito lukapolok iuni Saul.
1Samuel17:15 Ido kobononori Daudi kama ejai Saul acok amerekekin nuka papake Bet-lekem.
1Samuel17:16 Kikunyununei Epilisitiat tupuruc ka eboŋ, kitodianar apaarasia akaisaoŋon."
1Samuel17:17 Kolimok Yese okokuke Daudi che, “Koina bo ikoniinacan epa loka imomwa luikawooritai, ka imugatin lu itomon, kisunya ayaŋaar oidukurun mama ejaas ikoniinaean:"
1Samuel17:18 Koina ekapolon loka elukumitikee ikamonon itomon lueokito luka akile, koany kwape ejaatar ikoniinaean, kijau aititiŋetekec.”"
1Samuel17:19 Ido Saul, ka kes, ka ituŋa kere luka Isirael, kojaas aditor naka Ela, ejiosi ka Ipilisitian."
1Samuel17:20 Konyou Daudi tupuruc sek, kinyeinia ekejokon amerekekin, kitin iboro, kolot kwape kieorakinia Yese; kodol aibois naka agalin, napedakun ajore ejie, kokutas ikodeta ejie."
1Samuel17:21 Kiderakinos Isirael ka Ipilisitian, kotereikinos ajore ka ajore."
1Samuel17:22 Kinyek Daudi ikeboro kakan naka ekedaran iboro, kodinirir mama ejai aiore, kolot kiyoga ikeinaean."
1Samuel17:23 Napiyalaete kakes, koany, kodakun etikadedenan ie, Epilisitiat loka Gas, ekekiror Goliat, konyou kokokoron luka Ipilisitian, kinera kwape kejaatar akiro kwa: kiira Daudi."
1Samuel17:24 Kosodete ituŋa kere luka Isirael, keanyut ekesa ie, kokerata kokuriakaros noi."
1Samuel17:25 Kobalas ituŋa luka Isiracl ebe, “Ianyut etuŋanan ŋol loadoku? Abeit adorit Isirael ŋes adokunia: asa arai kear ituŋanan ŋes, itabari ekabaka kabar naepol, einakini da akokuke, ido ituluori ekek loka papake loka aijamam kotoma Isirael.”"
1Samuel17:26 Kosodi kinera Daudi kituna luedunyatar ebwoete atiar, “Ikonakinio ai ituŋanaa yeneari Epilisitiat lo, kolema amorosit kotoma Isirael? Naarai ŋes iŋai Epilisitiat lo lomam ekepitai, adorit ajore naka Edeke lokajaran?”"
1Samuel17:27 Kobonokis ituŋa kobalas ebe, “Ikonakinio nen ituŋanan yeneari ŋes.”"
1Samuel17:28 Kiira Eliab onaeeke lokapolon kwape enerar kituna; kinep anyunyura naka Eliab aluikin Daudi, kobala ebe, “Kanukinyo ibunio ijo da? Ido iŋai inyeinia amerekekin kwa adis kais? Ajeni akoniwononut, ka epali lokotaukon, naarai ibunit aanyun ejie.”"
1Samuel17:29 Kobala Daudi ebe, “Ekonak bo eoŋ ai kwana? Mam akirot?”"
1Samuel17:30 Kinyek ŋes kibelokin mama ejai ece, kinera akiro kwape kakwa; kobonokis bobo ŋes ituŋa kwape kebononokinioto nusodit."
1Samuel17:31 Kiirar akiro nukinera Daudi, kitejenunai Saul; konyaraarai ŋes."
1Samuel17:32 Kotema Daudi Saul atiar, “Kinyek etau loka irunanan aiurunun kanuken; elosi ekonibulesit ejie kEpilisitiat ŋol.”"
1Samuel17:33 Kotema Saul Daudi atiar, “Mam ipedori airiamakin kEpilisitiat ŋol ejie kaŋes; naarai irai ijo isapat, konye ŋol ekajiot ameun keitelepaneke.”"
1Samuel17:34 Kotema Daudi Saul atiar, “Ecokienenei ekonibulesit amerekekin nuka papake; nakebunenenoo eŋatuny, arai edubu, koyana imerekek yenikosipan."
1Samuel17:35 Kalomanari, katupari, kenomi kademuni kaitukuke; keebwokokin, ketini kopenekike, kenom, kaari."
1Samuel17:36 Abu ekonibulesit kinom eŋatuny ka edubu kere: ikonakini nen Epilisitiat ŋol lomam ekepep bala ediopet kakesi, naarai edorit aiore naka Edeke lokajaran.”"
1Samuel17:37 Kotema Daudi atiar, “EJAKAIT loabu ketajar kabelekeka nuka eŋatuny, ka abelekeka nuka edubu, ketajari da kakan naka Epilisitiat kanol.” Kotema Saul Daudi atiar, “Kolot, ejauni Edeke kajo.”"
1Samuel17:38 Kitanap Saul Daudi inapeneke, kidokok aboko naka aisinit akouke, kitanap ekooti loka aisinit."
1Samuel17:39 Koenik Daudi ekekileŋ anapitoke; kitetemo alosit; naarai mam anaikinit, Kotema Daudi Saul atiar, “Mam apedori alosit kalu; naarai mam lem anaikinit.” Kolaca Daudi kes."
1Samuel17:40 Kitin ekebela kakanike, koseu alica akany nuerurut kosamai, kibwaik oriagike lokicokis lokejaatar, toma ocoeke; kojai da akeporocet akanike; kikunyak Epilisitiat."
1Samuel17:41 Kobunok Epilisitiat koapik Daudi; kinarenikinit etuŋanan loetinenenei ekebuku.
1Samuel17:42 Kenolenol Epilisitiat, koany Daudi, komen; naarai kerai isapat, ikarenan, ido itemel."
1Samuel17:43 Kotema Epilisitiat Daudi atiar, “Arai kereka eoŋ ekiŋok, ibuni neajai kibelai?” Kilam Epilisitiat Daudi kama ejaas idekesioke,"
1Samuel17:44 Kotema Epilisitiat Daudi atiar, “Bia neajai, kakorak akonikuan akweny nuka apak, ka itiaij luka ais.”"
1Samuel17:45 Kotema Daudi Epilisitiat atiar, “Ibuni ijo neajai kekilen, ka eliru, ka akwara; konye eoŋ abunit mama ijai kokiror loka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka ajoresio nuka Isirael nuidorit."
1Samuel17:46 Kikorakini lolo EJAKAIT akanika; kenomi jo, ajepari da akonikou; ido akorakini lolo akweny nuka apak, ka itian luka amagoro, atesin nuka ajore naka Ipilisitian; kojenut akwapin kere ebe ejai Edeke toma Isirael:"
1Samuel17:47 Kojen teni atukot na kere ebe mam EJAKAIT itajari kekilen ka akwara; naarai ejie erai loka EJAKAIT, ŋes da kikorakini yes akanikosi.”"
1Samuel17:48 Kosodi kanen, kenyou Epilisitiat, kobu kikunyak airiamakin kaDaudi, kisunya Daudi, kodinirir neejai aiore airiamakin kEpilisitiat."
1Samuel17:49 Kirupa Daudi akan oriagike, kolem alicait, kiiliil, koporocik, kocam Epilisitiat oreeteke; koloma alicait oreeteke, kibiror ebuburia,"
1Samuel17:50 Kipiko Daudi kwaŋin Epilisitiat kaporoeet ka alicait, kocam Epilisitiat, koar; konye komamei ekileŋ kakan naka Daudi."
1Samuel17:51 Kosodi konemesiar Daudi, kieak Epilisitiat, kitin ekekileŋ, kout kakuraruke, koar, kojep akekou. Keanyut Ipilisitian ebe atwana ekadedenanikec, kokerata."
1Samuel17:52 Konyout ituŋa luka Isirael ka luka Yuda, ibwoŋas, korukoriata Ipilisitian aitodol neidolio Gat, korutei luka Ekuron. Kibironokinos Ipilisitian lukimusuŋitai orot loebei Saarim, kiton Gat, ka Ekuron."
1Samuel17:53 Kobonut idwe luka Isirael karukitor Ipilisitian, konatata iidukurunukee."
1Samuel17:54 Kolem Daudi akou naka Epilisitiat koyau Yerusalem; konye kinadak lujiisike owemake.
1Samuel17:55 Keanyu Saul Daudi elosi asurokin Epilisitiat, kotema Abiner ekapolon loka aiore atiar, “Abiner, okoku lokanai esapat ŋol?” Kobala Abiner ebe, “Kwape ejaria ekonitau, wu ekabaka, mam ajeni.”"
1Samuel17:56 Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Kinit iŋai bo papa loka esapat kaŋol.”"
1Samuel17:57 Napebonuni Daudi kaiar Epilisitiat, koyana Abiner ŋes, koyana mama ejai Saul kitinite akou naka Epilisitiat,"
1Samuel17:58 Kotema Saul ŋes atiar, “Iŋai bo papakon, ijo esapat?” Koboŋok Daudi atiar, “Arai eoŋ okoku loka ebulesitikon Yese Ebetelekemit.”"
1Samuel18:1 Kosodi kanen kenetaki einer kaSaul, kimorikikinos etau loka Yonatan ketau loka Daudi, kominakin Yonatan ŋes bala etauke elopet."
1Samuel18:2 Koyaŋa Saul ŋes apaaran nin, komam bobo isiikini ŋes alosit ore togo loka papake."
1Samuel18:3 Kosodete Yonatan ka Daudi aitutuk, naarai abu kominakin ŋes bala etauke elopet."
1Samuel18:4 Kolae Yonatan ekaso loanapit, koinak Daudi, ka ikenapen, ka ekekileŋ, ka akekabwa, ka arokobake."
1Samuel18:5 Kolosenenei Daudi neejukanari Saul ŋes kere, kikemerenenei: kodakak Saul ŋes ayait ituŋa lukajiok, kitojokata ituŋa kere, kitojokata ibulesin da luka Saul."
1Samuel18:6 Kosodi kanen epote kesi, kebonu Daudi kaiar Epilisitiat, kolomut aŋor koreria kere luka Isirael, eyeete kikosiete, aisiriam ekabaka Saul, ejaas kisiman, ka ekare, ka lueruos,"
1Samuel18:7 Koyeete aŋor komeanakinos kaboliakee, kobalas ebe, “Aar Saul ekelukumit Ka Daudi da ikelukumin itomon.”"
1Samuel18:8 Konyunyurikin Saul noi, kitakadik akirot nin; kinera ebe, “Ainakis Daudi ilukumin itomon, eoŋ da kainakis ilukumit bon; inyo bo do esalit dimarai ajakanut?”"
1Samuel18:9 Kosesen Saul Daudi kakonu naerono amear kapaaran kaŋin ka aiyatanakin.
1Samuel18:10 Kosodi kanen, tupuruc kobunok Saul kagogon emoyo lokaronon loabuni kama ejai Edeke, kodwar ŋesi kokidin togo: koram Daudi kakekan, kwape eswamaenena ninipaaran: ido kitinite Saul akwara kakanike."
1Samuel18:11 Koremo Saul akwara; naarai abala ebe, “Aremi Daudi aiminaikin arwatat.” Kigaikin Daudi irwan aarei kakonyeneke."
1Samuel18:12 Kokurianari Saul Daudi naarai ajai EJAKAIT kaŋes, anyou da kama ejai Saul."
1Samuel18:13 Kanuka nun kisukunya Saul ŋes kamake, kodakak ŋes apolokin elukumit; kolomanari kolomununei da kakonyen nuka ituŋa,"
1Samuel18:14 Kikemerenenei Daudi koponesioke kere; kojaenena EJAKAIT kaŋes.
1Samuel18:15 Kosodi keanyu Saul ebe ikemerenen noi, koyon ŋes,"
1Samuel18:16 Konye Isirael kere ka Yuda kominas Daudi; naarai alomanari kolomununei da kakonyenekec,"
1Samuel18:17 Kobala Saul Daudi ebe, “Koany, kakorakini jo akokuka nakapolon Merab aimany: konye kotitinior ijo koji ijiisio luka EJAKAIT.” Naarai abala Saul ebe, “Kinyek akakan atiror ŋes, konye kotiro akan naka Ipilisitian ŋes.”"
1Samuel18:18 Kotema Daudi Saul atiar, “Iŋai eoŋ, lukanai da ikainaean, ka ekek loka papaka koIsirael, tape araun ekamuran loka ekabaka?”"
1Samuel18:19 Konye kedol apak natikekorakinere Daudi Merab akoku naka Saul, aponi kokorakinai Adiriel Emekolatit aimany."
1Samuel18:20 Kominakin Mikal akoku naka Saul Daudi: kolimokinai Saul, kitojok ŋes akirot nin."
1Samuel18:21 Kobala Saul ebe, “Akorakini ŋes, tetere eraun eie kamaken, tetere da esurokini akan naka Ipilisitian ŋes.” Ŋes do atemaria Saul Daudi atiar, “Iraun lolo ekamuranika irwan nakiareit.”"
1Samuel18:22 Kicorak Saul ikebulesin kere ebe, “Kinerata kaDaudi kaiyeiyea, ebe, ‘Koany, kisiyalamikinit ekabaka jo, kiminas da ikekejaanakinak kere: asa do koraun ekamuran loka ekabaka.’’’"
1Samuel18:23 Kinerata ikejaanakinak luka Saul akiro nun kaki nuka Daudi, Kobala Daudi ebe, “Erai akirot naedit kamakus araun ekamuran loka ekabaka, naarai eeana eoŋ, mam arai loka aibuses naepol.”"
1Samuel18:24 Kolimokis ibulesin luka Saulnes ebe, “Ener Daudi nun.”"
1Samuel18:25 Kotema Saul atiar, “Itemarete Daudi kwanata ebe, Mam ekabaka ekoto akiitakinio idiobore, dimarai amunyin akwatat nuka ekiliokane loka Ipilisitian, ainyania lukasurupo luka ekabaka.” Koomite Saul Daudi aario kakan naka Ipilisman."
1Samuel18:26 Kosodi kelimokis ikekejaanakinak Daudi akiro nun, kitoiok noi Daudi araun ekamuran loka ekabaka, Eroko apaarasia ketuboro,"
1Samuel18:27 Konyou Daudi kolot, ŋes ka iketuŋa, koarata ituŋa akwat aarei luka Ipilisitian; koyau Daudi amunyinikee, koinakis ekabaka etiai kere, tetere eraun ekamuran loka ekabaka, Kokorak Saul ŋes Mikal akokuke aimany."
1Samuel18:28 Koany Saul, kojenu da ebe ejai EJAKAIT kaDaudi; kominakin Mikal akoku naka Saul ŋes."
1Samuel18:29 Kiyatak Saul ayoŋit Daudi; koraenena Saul lokasurup loka Daudi tiritir.
1Samuel18:30 Kosodete ikapolok luka Ipilisitian alomar aireb; kosodi kanen kwape alomanariata kesi aireb, kikemerenenei Daudi adepar ikejaanakinak luka Saul kere; kanuka nun koyoŋitete do noi ekekiror."
1Samuel19:1 Kiner Saul kaYonatan okokuke, ka ikekejaanakinak kere ebe tikearata kesi Daudi."
1Samuel19:2 Konye Yonatan okoku loka Saul amina noi Daudi. Kolimok Yonatan Daudi ebe, “Ekot Saul papaka aiar jo: asa do kenainait, koeoikin tupuruc, konop kaibois nakaiyeiyea:"
1Samuel19:3 Alomari eoŋ abwoi da kapapaka komanikor loijai, eneruni nukon kapapaka; arai kajen akirot, kalimokini jo.”"
1Samuel19:4 Kiner Yonatan nuejok nuka Daudi mama ejai Saul papake, kotema ŋes atiar, “Kinyek ekabaka adiakar kama ejai ekejaanakinanike Daudi; naarai mam ŋes ediakarit kamakon, akeswamisio da kamakon araas nukajokak noi:"
1Samuel19:5 Naarai abu kijaik akeiiar akanike, kocam Epilisitiat, kiswama EJAKAIT aipikor naepol kanuka Isirael kere; ibu ijo da koany, kiyalamikin: kanukinyo do idiakaria ijo kama ejaas aokot numam akirot, aiar Daudi komam akirot?”"
1Samuel19:6 Kopup Saul eporoto loka Yonatan: kiyapo Saul ebe, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, mam ŋes eario.”"
1Samuel19:7 Konyarau Yonatan Daudi, kitejen ŋes akiro nun kere. Koyanau Yonatan Daudi mama ejai Saul, kojaenena do akonyeneke kwape lem sek."
1Samuel19:8 Kojaun bobo ejie: koloma Daudi kitiji Ipilisitian, koara kes noi; kokerata kakonyeneke."
1Samuel19:9 Kobunok Saul emoyo loerono loabuni kama ejai EJAKAIT, iboie ŋesi kotogoke kakekwara kakanike; koram Daudi adeudeu kakekan."
1Samuel19:10 Kokoto Saul airem Daudi aiminaikin arwatat kakekwara: konye kigaikin ŋesi konyou kakonyen nuka Saul, korem do akwarake arwatat: koker Daudi koku akuare ŋin."
1Samuel19:11 Kijuka Saul ikiyakia togo loka Daudi aidar ŋes, tetere earete tupuruc: kotema Mikal aberu naka Daudi ŋes atiar, “Arai mam jo itajari akoniijar akuare na kiario moi jo.”"
1Samuel19:12 Kosodi Mikal aijululuun Daudi kadirisa: kolot, koker, koku."
1Samuel19:13 Kolem Mikal aput naka edeke, kiperik oitada, kibwaik egoe loka ajul nuka akinei akwesike, kimuko kigoen."
1Samuel19:14 Nakijukaria Saul ikiyakia aikamun Daudi, kobala ebe, “Edek.”"
1Samuel19:15 Kijuka Saul ikiyakia aanyun Daudi ebe, “Koinunai ŋes koitada, tetere aari ŋes.”"
1Samuel19:16 Nakelomut ikiyakia, koany, ajai aput naka edeke oitada, ka egoe loka ajul nuka akinei akwesike."
1Samuel19:17 Kotema Saul Mikal atiar, “Kanukinyo kimodia ijo eoŋ kwaŋin, aisiikin lokasurupika alosit, tape ekui?” Koboŋok Mikal Saul atiar, “Abu katema eoŋ atiar, ‘Koosikinai kalot; kanu kainyo tikaaria eoŋ ijo?’”"
1Samuel19:18 Koker Daudi, koku, kobu mama ejai Samuel Rama kolimok ŋes kere nuabu Saul kiswamak ŋes. Koloto ŋesi ka Samuel aiboi Naiot."
1Samuel19:19 Kolimokinai Saul ebe, “Koany, ejai Daudi Naiot toma Rama.”"
1Samuel19:20 Kijuka Saul ikiyakia aikamun Daudi: nakeanyut kesi erioŋet loka inabin edwarete, ebwoi Samuel korai ekapolonikec, kodoik emoyo loka Edeke ikiyakia luka Saul, kodwarata kesi da."
1Samuel19:21 Kelimokin Saul nun, abu kijuka ieekiyakia, kodwarata nul da, Kijuka Saul ikiyakia bobo irwan nakiwuniet, kodwarata kesi da,"
1Samuel19:22 Kosodi ŋesi da alosit Rama, kodol atan naepol naejai Seku: kinit ebe, “Ai bo ejaas Samuel ka Daudi?” Kotema ediopet atiar, “Koany, ajaas Naiot toma Rama.”"
1Samuel19:23 Kobei Naiot toma Rama: kodoik ŋes da emoyo loka Edeke, kiyatak alosit, kodwar, kiton neadolio Naiot toma Rama."
1Samuel19:24 Kolaea ŋesi da ikegoen, kodwar ŋesi da kakonyen nuka Samuel, koper apaaran ŋin kere ka akuare ŋin kere imujalal. Ŋes atemariata ebe, “Ejai Saul da onabin?”"
1Samuel20:1 Koker Daudi anyoun koNaiot toma Rama, kobu neejai Yonatan kotema ŋes atiar, “Eswama eoŋ anyoika? Anyoika numam adoli teka? anyoin akaronis mama ejai papakon, tape ŋes ekoto akaijar?”"
1Samuel20:2 Kotema ŊES atiar, “Madi akuj; mam itwani: koany, mam papaka iswamai idiobore yenepol arai yenedit, komam ketejenuni eoŋ: kanukinyo kemunonikina papaka eoŋ na? Mere kwaŋin.”"
1Samuel20:3 Kiyapo Daudi bobo atiar, “Ejeŋi papakon eut ebe adumunit asianut kakonyenekon; ebala ebe, ‘Kinyek Yonatan ajenun akiro nun, kinyek akadakin.’ Konye abeit, kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, kwape ejaria ekonitau da, ejai kidinika ka atwanareka ailamet adiopet bon.”"
1Samuel20:4 Kosodi Yonatan atemar Daudi ebe, “Anyoika ikoto ijo keswamak, tetcre keswamakin?”"
1Samuel20:5 Kotema Daudi Yonatan atiar, “Koany, ilamuni elap moi, mam tikakurwoki aiboikin ainyam kekabaka: konye kisiikinai kalot, tetere anopi komanikor aitodol apaaran nakiwuniet eboŋ."
1Samuel20:6 Arai keanyu papakon ebe amamei, itemari do atiar, ‘Abu Daudi keŋit eoŋ apedor alosit oreke Bet-lekem: naarai einakini ekekike kere asubanit naka ŋolikaru.’"
1Samuel20:7 Arai ketema ebe, ‘Ejok’; inapakin ekonikejaanakinan: konye arai kenyunyurikin, ijenuni ebe epeleikinit aswam aronis."
1Samuel20:8 Kanuka nun kikonak ekonikejaanakinan kasianut; naarai itutukoto kekonikejaanakinan aitutuket naka EJAKAIT: konye arai kejaunos numam adolit mamaka, koar ijo eoŋ elopet; naarai kanukinyo tikiyaunia eoŋ mama ejai papakon?”"
1Samuel20:9 Kotema Yonatan atiar, “Madi akuj; naarai arai kajen eoŋ ebe epeleikinit papaka aiswamakin jo aronis, mam eoŋ tikalimok jo?”"
1Samuel20:10 Kosodi Daudi atemar Yonatan atiar, “Iŋai bo kalimokin eoŋ arai kiibonok papakon jo kadedeŋ?”"
1Samuel20:11 Kotema Yonatan Daudi atiar, “Kobia kaloto okitui.” Kouparos kesi iarei okitui."
1Samuel20:12 Kotema Yonatan Daudi atiar, “EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael koraun ekaienan; naadaunia abokobok papaka kosawa kalo moi, arai apaaran nakiwuniet, koany, arai ejokuka kama ejai Daudi, mam kereka eoŋ ejukuni mamakon, ketejeni jo?"
1Samuel20:13 Kiswamak EJAKAIT Yonatan kwaŋin, ka adepar da, arai kitojok papaka aiswamakin jo aronis, komam eoŋ ketejenuni jo, katwar jo, tetere ilosi inapakina: kojai EJAKAIT kajo, kwape ajaar lem kapapaka,"
1Samuel20:14 Mam jo kitodianakini eoŋ asianut naka EJAKAIT aroko ajari bon, tetere mam atwani:"
1Samuel20:15 Konye mam ilemari akonisianut kokaleka ikar kere: eebo, mam ilemari naemudiaria EJAKAIT lukasurup kere luka Daudi kakwap.”"
1Samuel20:16 Kitutuk Yonatan kekek loka Daudi ebe, “Itepeseni EJAKAIT nin kakan naka lukasurup luka Daudi.”"
1Samuel20:17 Kisiyapo Yonatan Daudi bobo, kanuka amina naamina ŋes: naarai amina ŋes bala eketau elopet."
1Samuel20:18 Kosodi Yonatan atemar ŋes atiar, “Ilamuni elap moi: eanyunio ebe imamci ijo, naarai emameun ituŋanan koicolonokon,"
1Samuel20:19 Kidau apaarasia auni, iwonyari alosit, kodol aibois nainopitor kapaaran kaya, isalakini osiep loka amoru Esel,"
1Samuel20:20 Agumuni eoŋ ikojoi iuni owaike, bala agumi ibore."
1Samuel20:21 Ido koany, ejukuni etelepat, kabala ebe, ‘Kolot komou ikojoi.’ Arai katema eoŋ etelepat atiar, ‘Koany, ejaas ikojoi osiepikon lailo: kolem kes’; kobu, naarai ejai jo ainapakin, emamei aronis, kwape ejarra EJAKAIT."
1Samuel20:22 Konye arai atemari eoŋ etelepat atiar, ‘Koany, elamaros ikoioi kinarenikon,’ kolot ijo; naarai kijuka EJAKAIT joo"
1Samuel20:23 Konye akiro nukiner ijo keoŋ koany, ejai EJAKAIT kidinikon keoŋ ikar kere.”"
1Samuel20:24 Konop do Daudi kokitui: nakilamu elap, kiboikin ekabaka ainyam inyamat."
1Samuel20:25 Kiboikin ekabaka oicoloŋoke, kwape atapitor, ŋes eicoloŋ loidunyas karwatat; kiteos Yonatan kaŋes, kiboikin Abiner osiep loka Saul: konye amamei etuŋanan kaibois naka Daudi."
1Samuel20:26 Konye mam Saul abu kolim adiokirot kapaaran kaŋin: naarai aomit ebe, “Adoiki ŋes akirot, mam ŋes elai; abeit mam ŋes elai.”"
1Samuel20:27 Kosodi kanen kapaaran naatupakini, kedau elap ailamun, ŋes apaaran nakiareit, amamei etuŋanan kaibois naka Daudi: kotema Saul Yonatan okokuke atiar, “Kanukinyo mam okoku loka Yese ebunitor ainyam, bian karaida lolo?”"
1Samuel20:28 Koboŋok Yonatan Saul ebe, “Abu Daudi kenit eoŋ kaimaimait noi alosit Bet-lekem:"
1Samuel20:29 Kobala ebe, ‘Kisiikinai kalot, kenainait; naarai einakini ekekikosi asubanit kore; eeoraki da onaeeka eoŋ ajaun nina: asa do arai adumunit asianut kakonyenekon, kisiikinai kalot, kenainait, aanyun ikainaean.’ Kanuka mm ŋes emam ebunitor omesa loka ekabaka.”"
1Samuel20:30 Kosodi anyunyura naka Saul ainepun aluikin Yonatan, kotema ŋes atiar, “Ikoku ijo yenika aberu naimaranana nakepali, mam eoŋ ajeni ebe iseunit ijo okoku loka Yese aisurum jo elopet ileic, aisurum da amujalal naka totokon ileje?"
1Samuel20:31 Naarai mam jo icasi karaida akonijakanut eroko okoku loka Yese ejari kakwap. Aso do kijuka koomikinai, naarai abeit etwani.”"
1Samuel20:32 Koboŋok Yonatan Saul papake ebe, “Kanukinyo earere ŋes? Anyoika iswamat ŋesi?”"
1Samuel20:33 Koremo Saul akekwara aeamun ŋes; ŋes do ajenunia Yonatan ebe epeleikinit papake aiar Daudi.
1Samuel20:34 Konyou Yonatan komesa kanyunyura naededen, mam abu konyam kapaaran nakiareit naka elap: naarai akadakinit kanuka Daudi, naarai abu papake kisurum ŋes ileje."
1Samuel20:35 Kosodi kanen tupuruc kolot Yonatan okitui kapak naaseunito kaDaudi, ka etelepat loedit nepepe kaŋes."
1Samuel20:36 Kotema ŋesi etelepat atiar, “Koker cabo, komou ikojoi luagumari.” Ekeri etelepat, koguma ekojo ailam ŋes,"
1Samuel20:37 Kosodi kedol etelepat aibois naadoi ekoj loagumari Yonatan, kiworo Yonatan etelepat ebe, “Mam ekojo kilamit jo?”"
1Samuel20:38 Kiworo Yonatan etelepat ebe, “Koker, kiwonya, sirikiyap.” Kotukok etelepat loka Yonatan ikoioi, kobu mama ejai ejakaitike."
1Samuel20:39 Konye mam etelepat abu kojen idiobore: Yonatan ka Daudi bonik kes ajenete akirot.
1Samuel20:40 Koinak Yonatan eketelepat lujiisike, kotema ŋes atiar, “Kolot, koyana kes ore.”"
1Samuel20:41 Atipet kelot etelepat, konyou Daudi kaibois naka ari naka Eŋalakimak, kibiror ebuburia, kokukum irwan auni: konuanaros, komonyata, aitodol neadeparia Daudi."
1Samuel20:42 Kotema Yonatan Daudi atiar, “Kolot inapakina, naarai kiyapo oni kere kokiror loka EJAKAIT ebe, “Eiaenena EJAKAIT kidinikon keoŋ, kidin da aurika ka aurikon, ikar kere.’’’ Konyou, kolot: koloma Yonatan ore."
1Samuel21:1 Kosodi Daudi abunore Nob mama ejai Akimelek esasedoti: kobu Akimelek airiamun kaDaudi komarani, kotema ŋes atiar, “Kanu kinyo iiaar ijo bon, komamei etuŋanan kajo?”"
1Samuel21:2 Kotema Daudi Akimelek esasedoti atiar, “Keeorakinit ekabaka eoŋ aswam, katema eoŋ atiar, ‘Kinyek idiotuŋanan ajenun akirot naka aswam nakejukaritor, nakecorakinit da: eeorakinit eoŋ ikatumunak abore kamutan."
1Samuel21:3 Aso do inyo bo ejai akanikon? Koinakinai imugatin ikany akanika, arai ieebore kere yenejai kaio.”"
1Samuel21:4 Koboŋok esasedoti Daudi ebe, “Emamei emugati lodue kakanika, konye ajaas imugatin lukalaunak; arai mam ca ikatumunak eperito kanor,’"
1Samuel21:5 Koboŋok Daudi esasedoti atiar, “Abeit mam sio kiperit kanor apaarasia nu auni; naanyounio eoŋ alaete iboro luka ikatumunak, karaida kerai alosit nakadue; elaete do noi ikeeeboro lolo,”"
1Samuel21:6 Koinak do esasedoti ŋes imugatin lukalaunak; naarai amamei emugati dimarai imugatin luka aitodikin, lualemunio kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT ibwaikinio imugatin luemwaka kapaaran naelemarere ŋul."
1Samuel21:7 Ajai etuŋanan loka ikejaanakinak luka Saul nen kapaaran kaŋin, loetapaikinitai akonyen nuka EJAKAIT; ekekiror Doeg Edomait, ekapolon Ioka ikeeokok luka Saul."
1Samuel21:8 Kotema Daudi Akimelek atiar, “Emamei kane kakanikon akwara atai ekileŋ? Naarai mam ayaunit ekakileŋ karaida lujiisika, naarai abu aswam naka eka baka kesuburia.”"
1Samuel21:9 Kotema esasedoti atiar, “Ekileŋ loka Goliat Epilisitiat, loiari ijo kaditot naka Ela, koany, ejai ne ienienitai kegoe kokau kepod: arai ikoto ayaŋaar, koyana: naarai emamei ece kane dimarai ŋol.” Kotema Daudi atiar, “Emamei ece loeputotor ŋol; koinakinai.”"
1Samuel21:10 Konyou Daudi koker kapaaran kaŋin kanuka ayoŋit Saul, kolot mama ejai Akis eka baka loka Gat,"
1Samuel21:11 Kotemasi ikejaanakinak luka Akis ŋes atiar, “Mere lo Daudi ekabaka loka akwap? Mam kes apotu koyeonokinos kokosio ebe, “Aar Saul ilukuminike, Ka Daudi da ikelukumin itomon?”"
1Samuel21:12 Kibwaik Daudi akiro ŋun otauke, kokurianar noi Akis eka baka loka Gat."
1Samuel21:13 Kijulak ejauteneke kakonyenekee, kosub bala ebaŋ kakaninikee, koram ikirigin lukorute, kojalak akeimul eleleete kopenekike."
1Samuel21:14 Kosodi Akis atemar ikekejaanakinak atiar, “Okwe ikatuŋa, kianyut ebe ebanaana etuŋanan ŋol: kanukinyo kiinuniata?"
1Samuel21:15 Emameete eoŋ ibaŋiok, tape iyaunete etuŋanan lo asubit ebaŋ kakonyeneka? Elomuni kereka etuŋanan lo oreka?”"
1Samuel22:1 Ŋes do anyounio Daudi kanen, koku alosit abua naka Adulam: ido nakepuput iinaeanake, ka ekal kere loka papake, apotu koloto mamakeg."
1Samuel22:2 Kotukonokinos mamakeŋ ŋinituŋanan yenareitai, ka nimtunanan yenajai apesen, nmirunanan da yenakadakinit kotau; koraun ŋesi ekapolonikee: kojaas kaŋes ituŋa kwape akwat aoŋon."
1Samuel22:3 Kolot Daudi Misipa naka Moab: kotema ekabaka loka Moab atiar, “Keŋainait, kisiik papaka ka totoka kopotu ne aiboi kajo, aitodol naajenunia nukeswamakini Edeke.”"
1Samuel22:4 Koyau kes akonyen nuka ekabaka loka Moab: kiboioto kaŋes apak kere naajaar Daudi abua.
1Samuel22:5 Kotema enabi Gad Daudi atiar, “Sirikiboi kabua; konyou kolot akwap naka Yuda.” Kosodi Daudi anyoun kobu amagoro naka Keret."
1Samuel22:6 Kopup Saul ebe atakanu Daudi ka ituŋa luajaas kaŋes: iboie Saul koGibea kokwap kepeduru koRama, kitinite akekwara kakanike, kobwoete ikekejaanakinak kere airimor ŋes."
1Samuel22:7 Kotema Saul ikekejaanakinak luebwoete airimor ŋes ebe, “Aso ca kopuputu yesi Ibenyamin; kiinakini kereka yes okoku loka Yese ŋinituŋanan imanikoria ka amanat nuka emusabibu, kidakakini ŋesi yes kere araun ikapolok luka ilukumin ka ikapolok luka akwat;"
1Samuel22:8 Tape yes kere inerunete aluikin eoŋ, emamei idioda yeniketejenuni eoŋ naetutukioto okokuka ka okoku loka Yese, emamei idioda kayesi yenitururwei kanukan, karaida yeniketejenuni ebe eŋaraki okokuka ekakejaanakinan aluikin eoŋ, asurokin eoŋ, kwape lolo?”"
1Samuel22:9 Kosodi Doeg Edomait, loabwoi kikejaanakinak luka Saul atemar ebe, “Abu kaany okoku loka Yese ebunit Nob, mama ejai Akimelek okoku loka Akitub,"
1Samuel22:10 Kinit ŋesi EJAKAIT kanuka Daudi, koinak inyamat, koinak da ekileŋ loka Goliat Epilisitiat,”"
1Samuel22:11 Kosodi ekabaka aijukar anyaraun Akimelek esasedoti, okoku loka Akitub, ka ekal kere loka papake, isasedotin luajaas Nob: kopotu kere mama ejai ekabaka,"
1Samuel22:12 Kotema Saul atiar, “Aso ca kopup, ijo okoku loka Akitub.” Koboŋok ebe, “Ekajakait, eoŋ lo,”"
1Samuel22:13 Kotema Saul ŋes atiar, “Kanukinyo ineruniata aluikin eoŋ, ijo ka okoku loka Yese, naarai ibu koinak ŋes imugatin, ka ekileŋ, init da Edeke kanuken, tetere enyouni aluikin eoŋ, asurokin eoŋ, kwape lolo?”"
1Samuel22:14 Kosodi Akimelek aboŋokin eka baka ebe, “Iŋai kobulesinikon kere erai lomunot bala Daudi, loerai ekamuran loka ekabaka, ido erai lokapolon kotoma ainerunikon, erai da loka aibuses kotogokon?"
1Samuel22:15 Lolo kereka ageunia eoŋ aiŋit Edeke kanuken? Madi akuj: kinyeik eka baka aibwaikin adiokirot mama ejai ekebulesit, karaida mama ejai ekek kere loka papaka: naarai mam ekonibulesit ejeŋi adioda kakiro kanun kere, nuikidioko arai nuipu.”"
1Samuel22:16 Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Abeit itwani ijo, Akimelek, ijo ka ekek kere loka papakon.”"
1Samuel22:17 Kotema ckabaka iserikaleneke, luabwoete airimor ŋes atiar, “Kibelokinos, koarata isasedotin luka EJAKAIT; naarai ejaas akecekanin kaDaudi, naarai apotu kojenut ebe aker, komam ketejenunete eoŋ.” Konye koneroto ikejaanakinak luka ekabaka aikeun akan aiar isasedotin luka EJAKAIT,"
1Samuel22:18 Kotema ekabaka Doeg atiar, “Kibelokin ijo, koar isasedotin.” Kibelokin Doeg Edomait, koar isasedotin, koar kapaaran kaŋin ituŋa akaisakanykauni ka lukany luanapitos epod loka ebaputa."
1Samuel22:19 Kodany luka Nob da, ere loka isasedotin kakwanis naka ekileŋ, ikiliok ka aŋor da, idwe ka imukerun, imoŋin ka asigiria ka amerekekin, kakwanis naka ekileŋ."
1Samuel22:20 Koku ediopet kodwe luka Akimelek okoku loka Akitub, ekekiror Abiatar, koker atupar Daudi."
1Samuel22:21 Kolimok Abiatar Daudi kwape aaria Saul isasedotin luka EJAKAIT.
1Samuel22:22 Kotema Daudi Abiatar atiar, “Abu kajen kapaaran kaya naajaar Doeg Edomait nina ebe, abeit elimokini ŋesi Saul: eoŋ edupoo aijar naka ituŋa kere luka ekalloka papakon."
1Samuel22:23 Kiboikin ijo keoŋ, sirikikurianar; naarai loemoot aijaraka emoot aijarakon da: arai ijai keoŋ, iiara.”"
1Samuel23:1 Kolimokinai Daudi ebe, “Koany, ejios Ipilisitian kaKeila, enasetc lukopejalin.”"
1Samuel23:2 Kanuka nun kinit Daudi EJAKAIT ebe, “Alosi eoŋ aidany Ipilisitian lu?” Kotema EJAKAIT Daudi atiar, “Kolot, kodany Ipilisitian, kitajar Keila.”"
1Samuel23:3 Kotemasi ituŋa luka Daudi ŋes atiar, “Koany, kikuriakar isio kane koYuda: mere do kikuriakar isio noi adepar kiilot Keila aitiii ajoresio nuka Ipilisitian?”"
1Samuel23:4 Kosodi Daudi aiŋit bobo EJAKAIT, Koboŋok EJAKAIT ŋes ebe, “Konyou, kolot Keila; naarai eiaikini Ipilisitian akanikon.”"
1Samuel23:5 Kolot Daudi ka iketuŋa Keila, kitijioto Ipilisitian, konotut ibarenekee, koarata kes kearit kaloepol noi. Kitajar kwaŋin Daudi luiboienenete koKeila."
1Samuel23:6 Kosodi kanen, naakeria Abiatar okoku loka Akimelek Keila mama ejai Daudi, abu koyana epod kakanike,"
1Samuel23:7 Kolimokinai Saul ebe abu Daudi Keila. Kotema Saul atiar, “Kejaiki Edeke ŋes akanika; naarai agolor, kanu alomaria ore loeiaas ikirigin ka atiketa.”"
1Samuel23:8 Koram Saul ituŋa kere alosit oiie, alosit Keila, alukun Daudi ka iketuŋa."
1Samuel23:9 Kojen Daudi ebe edonitor Saul ŋes emod; kotema Abiatar esasedoti atiar, “Koyau epod ne.”"
1Samuel23:10 Kosodi Daudi atemar atiar, “Wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, apupu ekonibulesit ebe ekot Saul abunore Keila, amudiar ere kanukan."
1Samuel23:11 Kejaikinete ituŋa luka Keila eoŋ akanike? Ebuni kereka Saul kwape apupunio ekonibulesit? Wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, kenainait, kolimok ekonibulesit.” Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Ebuni.”"
1Samuel23:12 Kosodi Daudi atemar atiar, “Kejaikinete kereka ituŋa luka Keila eoŋ akan naka Saul?” Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Kijaikinete,”"
1Samuel23:13 Kosodete Daudi ka iketuŋa luemwaasi kwape akwat akanykape anyoun koKeila, kolototo kirimoto. Kolimokinai Saul ebe aku Daudi koKeila; mam abu kolot."
1Samuel23:14 Kiboikin Daudi amodiŋ abuai nuegogon, kosalak akwap nakiukon kamodiŋ naka Sip. Komoenenei Saul ŋes ninipaaran, konye mam Edeke abu kijaik ŋes akanike."
1Samuel23:15 Koany Daudi cbe alom Saul amoot aijarake: ajai Daudi amodiŋ naka Sip amonieik,"
1Samuel23:16 Konyou Yonatan okoku loka Saul, kolot amonieik mama ejai Daudi, kitogogon akekan kotoma Edeke,"
1Samuel23:17 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Sirikikurianar: naarai mam akan naka Saul papaka kidumuni ijo; ido iraun ijo ekabaka loeyait Isirael, katupakini eoŋ jo kapolou; ido ejeŋi Saul papaka ŋun.”"
1Samuel23:18 Kitutukoto kesi iarei kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: kiboikin Daudi amonieik, kolot Yonatan togoke,"
1Samuel23:19 Kosodete Isipin alosit Gibea mama ejai Saul ebe, “Mam kereka Daudi enopit kobukosi kabuai nuegogon kotoma amonieik, koukot loka Kakila, loejai ari naka eŋalakimak naka amodiŋ?"
1Samuel23:20 Aso do, kobia, wu ekabaka, kwape imielar ekonitau kere alosit: ka sio da, kijaikini ŋes akan naka ekabaka.”"
1Samuel23:21 Kotema Saul atiar, “Kisirereŋ EJAKAIT yes: naarai kitimoto eoŋ,"
1Samuel23:22 Kenainait, koloto, kitogogoŋoto, kojenut koanyut da aiboisike naejai akeiuke, ka yeneanyunit ŋes kaŋina: naarai kalimokinitai ebe epiriana ŋesi noi."
1Samuel23:23 Aso do koanyut, kojenut aiboisio nueperununo ka nueŋopenena, kopotu bobo aitogogoŋ mama ajai, kiupari do kayes: kosodi kanen arai ejai toma akwap, amouni ŋes kolukumin kere luka Yuda.”"
1Samuel23:24 Konyout, kinarenikinito Saul alosit Sip. Konye ajaas Daudi ka iketuŋa amodiŋ naka Maon, kotoma Araba kari naka eŋalakimak naka amodiŋ."
1Samuel23:25 Kolot Saul ka iketuŋa amoot ŋes, Kolimokinai Daudi: ŋes do abunio neejai atiiba, kiboikin amodiŋ naka Maon. Kepupu Saul ŋun, kotupa Daudi amodiŋ naka Maon,"
1Samuel23:26 Kolot Saul owai ediopet loka eronat, Daudi da ka iketuŋa owai ece: kisunya Daudi alosit naarai akuriana Saul; naarai apotu Saul ka iketuŋa kolukunito Daudi ka iketuŋa aikamun kes,"
1Samuel23:27 Konye kobu ekiyakia mama ejai Saul, kobala ebe, “Kisunyite abunore; naarai iioreete Ipilisitian akwap.”"
1Samuel23:28 Kwaŋin koboŋo Saul katupit Daudi, kolot aitiji Ipilisitian: kanuka nun apotu komaikis aibois nin Sela-Kamalekot."
1Samuel23:29 Konyou Daudi kanen, kiboikin abuai nuagogoŋ nuka En-gedi."
1Samuel24:1 Kosodi kanen kebonu Saul katupit Ipilisitian, aponi kolimokinai ŋes ebe, “Koany, ejai Daudi amodiŋ naka En-gedi.”"
1Samuel24:2 Kosodi Saul ayaŋaar ituŋa ilukumin iuni luaseunio koIsirael kere, kolot amoot Daudi ka iketuŋa omorun luka akinei nuka ais."
1Samuel24:3 Kobu mama ajaas anukia nuka amerekekin korot, neajai abua; koloma Saul aimukor akekeje, Eboiete Daudi ka iketuŋa kaiboisio nukotoma abua."
1Samuel24:4 Kotemasi ituŋa luka Daudi ŋes atiar, “Koany, apaaran na abu EJAKAIT kobala jo ebe, ‘Koany, kejaikini lokasurupikon akanikon, iswamakini da ijo ŋes nuitoioki ijo.’’’ Kosodi Daudi anyoun, kotub atokitoit naka ekaso loka Saul kaiyeiyea."
1Samuel24:5 Kosodi kokau, kokadak etau loka Daudi, naarai abu kotub atokitoit naka Sau!."
1Samuel24:6 Kotema iketuŋa atiar, “Madi akuj eoŋ aiswamakin ekajakait loinyonyoikinit EJAKAIT akinyet akirot nin, arior akakan asurokin ŋes, kajeni ebe erai loinyonyoikinit EJAKAIT akinyet.”"
1Samuel24:7 Kwaŋin kitikok Daudi iketuŋa kakiro kanun, mam abu kocamak kes asurokin Sau!. Konyou Saul koloma kabua, kolot."
1Samuel24:8 Konyou Daudi da kokau, koloma kabua, kiworo ŋesi Saul ebe, “Ekajakait, ekabaka.” Kosodi kenolea Saul kau, kokukum Daudi, kisuded."
1Samuel24:9 Kotema Daudi Saul atiar, “Kanukinyo ipupio ijo akiro nuka ituŋa ebe, ‘Koany, ekot Daudi aiswamakin jo aronis?’"
1Samuel24:10 Koany, aanyut akonikonye lolo kwape keiaikinitor EJAKAIT jo lolo akanika kotoma abua: kecorakis ice aiar jo: konye abu ketim jo: kabala ebe, ‘Mam ariori akakan asurokin ekaiakait; naarai erai loinyonyoikinit EJAKAIT akinyet.’"
1Samuel24:11 Bobo da, ipapa, koany, eebo, koany atokitoit naka ekasokon ejai akanika; naarai abu katub atokitoit naka ekasokon, komam kaari jo, kojen jo koany ebe emamei aronis karaida aibucaret kakanika, mam adiakarit kamakon, kwabo imoot ijo aikamun akaijar,"
1Samuel24:12 Kirabak EJAKAIT eoŋ ka jo, kenyan EJAKAIT eoŋ kamakon: konye mam akakan kisurokini joo"
1Samuel24:13 Kwape ebalar awaragan naka imakio lukolosek ebe, ‘Mama ejaas ikaronok ŋes elomunia aronis’: konye akakan mam kisurokini joo"
1Samuel24:14 Iŋai nat elomunit ekabaka loka Isirael asurokin? Iŋai bo idopiat ijo? Ekiŋok lokatwan, idepidepit."
1Samuel24:15 Kirabak EJAKAIT, kotubok da eoŋ ka jo, koany ŋesi, kapurok, kayuu da kakanikon.”"
1Samuel24:16 Kosodi kanen, napenetakini Daudi einer akiro ŋun mama ejai Saul, kotema Saul atiar, “Erai lo eporotokon, okokuka Daudi?” Kodelo Saul komony."
1Samuel24:17 Kotema ŋesi Daudi atiar, “Idolit ijo adepar eoŋ: naarai kikonak eoŋ nuejok, kwabo kekonakinit jo nueroko."
1Samuel24:18 Ilimo lolo kwape kikonakinia eoŋ nuejok: naarai nakejaikinia EJAKAIT akanikon, mam ibu koar eoŋ."
1Samuel24:19 Naarai arai kedumu etuŋanan lokasurupike, ejalakini kereka ŋes alosit eŋalei? Kanuka nun kotacak EJAKAIT jo nuejok kanuka nukiswamak eoŋ lolo."
1Samuel24:20 Ido koany, ajeni ebe iraun ijo ekabaka, iticasio ajakanut naka Isirael kakanikon."
1Samuel24:21 Aso ca kiyapoikinoi kolimite EJAKAIT, ebe mam jo imudiari akaur nakatupanakini, ebe da mam imudiari ekakiror kokek loka papaka.”"
1Samuel24:22 Kiyapoik Daudi Saul. Kolot Saul ore; konye kolototo Daudi ka iketuŋa abua.
1Samuel25:1 Kotwana Samuel; kotukokin Isirael kere, kibworoto ŋes, kidaikis ŋes Rama togoke. Konyou Daudi kolot amodiŋ naka Paran."
1Samuel25:2 Ajai etuŋanan Maon, loaiaas ikeboro Karamel; apol etuŋanan noi, ajaas ŋes amerekekin alukumin auni, ka akinei alukumit: atubi ajul nuka amerekekinike koKaramel."
1Samuel25:3 Arai ekiror loka etuŋanan Nabal, ka ekiror loka aberuke Abigail: aeo aberu, etemelel da: konye kerai etuŋanan otaupe loeswamai nukaronok; arai lokotogo loka Kaleb."
1Samuel25:4 Kopup Daudi kamodiŋ ebe atubi Nabal ajul nuka amerekekinike.
1Samuel25:5 Kijuka Daudi ikatumunak itomon kotema Daudi ikatumunak atiar, “Koloto Karamel, mama ejai Nabal, kiyogata ŋes kokirorika:"
1Samuel25:6 Itemarete ŋes loekeriana kwanata atiar, ‘Kinapakin ijo, kinapakin da ekonitogo, kinapakinos da kere luijaatar."
1Samuel25:7 Apup ebe ejaas jo ikatubok ajul: ikonikeeokok ajaunos kasio, mam apotu keswamakis kes aronis, amamei da ibore yenabu komameun apak kere naajaatar Karamel."
1Samuel25:8 Kinit ikatumunakakon, kilimokinete jo; asa do kodumut ikatumunak asianut kakonyenekon; naarai kipou kapaaran kanaejok: keŋainait, koinak yenejai akanikon ibulesinikon ka okokukon Daudi.’’’"
1Samuel25:9 Kosodi kepotu ikatumunak luka Daudi, kolimokis Nabal kwape ajaatar akiro nun kere kokiror loka Daudi, kililiŋata."
1Samuel25:10 Koboŋok Nabal ibulesin luka Daudi ebe, “Iŋai bo Daudi? Iŋai bo da okoku loka Yese? Ipu kwana ibulesin luesiete ŋinituŋanan kama ejai ekapolonike."
1Samuel25:11 Do kereka eoŋ alemun ikamugatin ka akakipi ka akakiriŋ naarakinit ikakatubok ajul ainakin ituŋa lumam ajeni nekeponiata?”
1Samuel25:12 Kibelokinos ikatumunak luka Daudi, kobonosi, kolimokis ŋes kwape ajaatar akiro ŋun kere."
1Samuel25:13 Kotema Daudi iketuŋa atiar, “Konapata yesi ŋinituŋanan ekekileŋ.” Konapa kesi ninitunanan ekekileŋ; konap Daudi da ekekileŋ: kotupasi ituŋa akwat aoŋon Daudi: kopaikis akwat aarei oboro."
1Samuel25:14 Konye abu ediopet kokatumunak kolimok Abigail aberu naka Nabal ebe, “Koany, abu Daudi kijuk ikiyakia kamodiŋ ayogan ejakaitikosi; kisiejanak kes."
1Samuel25:15 Konye kikonakis ituŋa nul sio ejok, mam apotu kiswamakis sio aronis, amamei da ibore yenabu komameun, apak kere nakiboio kakes, nakijaar ais."
1Samuel25:16 Araas kesi arwatat kamakosi kuare ka paaran da, apak kere nakijaar kakes kieokie amerekekin."
1Samuel25:17 Aso do kojen, koomoom nuiswamai; naarai epeleikinitai aiswamakin ejakaitikosi aronis ka eketogo kere: naarai kanu eraar ŋesi otaupe, mam ituŋanan epedori einer kaŋes.”"
1Samuel25:18 Kosodi Abigail aisunyakin, kolem imugatin akwat aarei, ka iriagin iarei luka imukulen luka ebino, ka amerekekin akany nuepoitoi, ka aitemisio akany nuka imumwa luikawooritai, ka aibuneta akwatat nueokito nuka imusabibun, ka alunureta akwat aarei nuka itinin, kisibwok asigiria."
1Samuel25:19 Kotema ikatumunakake atiar, “Kiŋarenikinoi; koany, katupuni yes.” Konye mam abu kolimok okilenike Nabal."
1Samuel25:20 Napeibwaneni ŋesi akesigiria, kijesar neiteriboria eronat, ido koany, kijesunos Daudi da ka iketuŋa kiriamunos kakes."
1Samuel25:21 Abu Daudi kobala ebe, “Abeit abu kedar atitai kere luaiaatar etikesa lo amodiŋ, komam yenabu komameun koboro kere luajaatar: katacaki ŋesi eoŋ aronis itia ajokis."
1Samuel25:22 Kiswamak kwaŋin Edeke lukasurup luka Daudi, adepar da, arai kenyek idiokoku yenisapat kotoma luejaatar kere moi eniuni akoloŋ.”"
1Samuel25:23 Kosodi keanyu Abigail Daudi, kisunyak adokun kasigiriake, kibiror ebuburia kakonyen nuka Daudi, kokukum."
1Samuel25:24 Kibirokin akejeke kotema atiar, “Kabeikis eoŋ, ekajakait, kabeikis eoŋ numam adolit: kenainait, kisiik akonibulesit kiner kakiikon, kopup ijo akiro nuka akonibulesit."
1Samuel25:25 Kenainait, kinyek ekajakait apodokin otaupe ŋol, ŋes Nabal: naarai kwape ejaar ekekiror, ikoni ŋesi da nepenen: Nabal ŋes ekekiror, ebanaana ŋesi: konye mam eoŋ akonibulesit abu kaany ikatumunak luka ejakaitika, luibu kijuk."
1Samuel25:26 Aso do ekajakait, kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, kwape eiaria da ekonitau, naarai abu EJAKAIT kitikok jo agwaun akirot naka aokot, ainyaŋ kakonikan, asa kiswamata lukasurupokon, ka luemoatar ejakaitika aronis bala Naba!’"
1Samuel25:27 Aso ca ainakinet na naayau abulesitikon ekajakait koinakinai ikatumunak luetupitos ekajakait.
1Samuel25:28 Kenaiŋait, kisioni aibucaret naka abulesitikon: naarai abeit iticasi EJAKAIT ekek loka ekajakait, naarai ejio ekaiakait ijiisio luka EJAKAIT; mam aronis edumakinio mamakon apaarasiakon kere."
1Samuel25:29 Karaida kenyou etuŋanan aidap jo, amoot aijarakon, konye eenikinitai aiiar naka ejakaitika arita naka ikajarak kibuakite EJAKAIT Ekonideke; eporocari aijar naka lukasurupokon, bala ejai toma aporocet."
1Samuel25:30 Kosodi kanen naiswamakinia EJAKAIT ejakaitika kwape ejaatar nukajokak kere nuener mamakon, nakiseunia da ijo araun ekepolon loka Isirael;"
1Samuel25:31 Mam na kitakadikini jo, mam eraun aitiguikinet nakotau loka ejakaitika, ebe ibuko aokot komam akirot, arai ebe enyana ekajakait kanuken: naikonakinia EJAKAIT ekajakait ejok, ŋes do iitunio akonibulesit.”"
1Samuel25:32 Kotema Daudi Abigail atiar, “Kituritete EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, lokijukuni jo lolo airiamun keoŋ:"
1Samuel25:33 Kituritete da akonicoa, kituritete jo da, naitikok eoŋ agwaun akirot naka aokot, ka ainyaŋ kanukan kakakan."
1Samuel25:34 Naarai abeit, kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, loketikoki eoŋ aiswamakin jo aronis, kedim ijo aiwonyun airiamun keoŋ, abeit timam kideikin Nabal idiokoku yenisapat tupuruc eniuni akoloŋ.”"
1Samuel25:35 Kwaŋin kiiau Daudi kakekan luainunit ŋes: kotema ŋes atiar, “Kolot togokon kainapakin; koany, apupok ekoniporoto, acam da akonikiro.”"
1Samuel25:36 Kobu Abigail neejai Nabal; ido koany, epoit epucit kotogoke, bala epueit loka ekabaka; kiyalama etau loka Nabal, naarai amera noi: kanuka ŋun mam abu kolimok ŋes adiokirot kere, aitodol neaniunia akoloŋ tupuruc."
1Samuel25:37 Kosodi kanen tupuruc, kikua emeret loka Nabal, kolimok aberuke ŋes akiro nun, kipirisiar etauke kotomake, koluor bala amoru."
1Samuel25:38 Kosodi kanen, ketuboros apaarasia kwape atomon, kinom EJAKAIT Nabal, kotwana."
1Samuel25:39 Nakepupunia Daudi ebe atwana Nabal, kobala ebe, “Kituritete EJAKAIT, loapuroki akirot naka amorositika kakan naka Nabal, loereboo ekebulesit karonis: enyakaki EJAKAIT nukaronok nuka Nabal akouke.” Kijuka Daudi ikesinerak Abigail, ayaŋaar ŋes mamake aimany."
1Samuel25:40 Kosodete kepotu ibulesin luka Daudi Karamel neejai Abigail, kobalas ŋes ebe, “Kijukunit Daudi sio neijai ijo, ayaŋaar jo mamake aimany.”"
1Samuel25:41 Konyou, kokukum, kobala ebe, “Koany, abulesitikon erai abulesit nailosenenei akeje nuka ibulesin luka ekajakait.”"
1Samuel25:42 Kisunyak Abigail, konyou, kibwanen asigina, kakepesur akany nuatupitos ŋes; kotupa ikiyakia luka Daudi, koraun akeberu."
1Samuel25:43 Komany Daudi Akinoam naka Yesereel; koraunos kere nuarei akenor,"
1Samuel25:44 Abu Saul kokorakinite Mikal akokuke, aberu naka Daudi, Paliti okoku loka Lais, loarai loka Galim."
1Samuel26:1 Kopotu Isipin Gibea neejai Saul, kobalas ebe, “Mam kereka Daudi enopit koukot Ioka Kakila, loitei amodinj”"
1Samuel26:2 Kosodi Saul anyoun, kolot amodiŋ naka Sip, koiaas kituna luseuna luka Isirael ilukumin iuni amoot Daudi amodiŋ naka Sip,"
1Samuel26:3 Kidukur Saul oukot loka Kakila loitei amodiŋ ariri naka erot, Konye eboic Daudi kamodiŋ, koany da ebe ibwapunit Saul ŋes amodiŋ."
1Samuel26:4 Kanuka nun kijuka Daudi ikarotak, kojen eut ebe abu Saul."
1Samuel26:5 Konyou Daudi, kobu aibois naedukurit Saul: koany Daudi aibois naaperio Saul, ka Abiner okoku loka Ner ekapolon loka ajoreke: aperi Saul kokidin kagalin, kidukurito ituŋa alukun ŋes,"
1Samuel26:6 Kosodi Daudi aboŋokin kotema Akimelek Ekitit, ka Abisai okoku loka Seruia, onaee loka Yoab, ebe, “Iŋai kiupar keoŋ oidukurun neejai Saul? “Kobala Abisai ebe, “Kiupar eoŋ kaio.”"
1Samuel26:7 Kwaŋin kopotu Daudi ka Abisai neejaas ituŋa kuare: ido koany, aperi Saul koiotoi kokidin kagalin, kodupakina akekwara kwap kakouke: koperete Abiner ka ituŋa alukunite ŋes,"
1Samuel26:8 Kosodi Abisai atemar Daudi atiar, “Kiiaik Edeke lokasurupikon akanikon lolo: aso keŋainait koeamakinai keeum ŋes kakwara aipelor kiton alup aieumet adiopet, mam erueakini aicum ŋes nakiareit.”"
1Samuel26:9 Kotema Daudi Abisal atiar, “Sirikiar ŋes: naarai iŋai eriori akekan aluikin loinyonyoikinit EJAKAIT akinyet, komam egwaun akirot?”"
1Samuel26:10 Kotema Daudi atiar, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, inomi EJAKAIT ŋes; diat edoluni apaaran naka atwanareke; elemuni kolot ojie, koarakinai nina,"
1Samuel26:11 Madi akuj eoŋ arior akakan aluikin loinyonyoikinit EJAKAIT akinyet: konye, kenainait, kolem akwara naejai akouke, ka etuo loka akipi, kaloto.”"
1Samuel26:12 Kwaŋin kolem Daudi akwara ka etuo loka akipi kakou naka Saul; koloto, mam ituŋanan yenabu koany karaida ajenun, karaida idio akwenyun: naarai ajotoete kere; naarai etoiotoorit EJAKAIT kes aio nuipu."
1Samuel26:13 Kosodi Daudi alosit oitela je, kobwo kaidi naka eronat kama elwana; kojai apak naelal noi kidinikec,"
1Samuel26:14 Kiworo Daudi ituŋa, ka Abiner okoku loka Ner ebe, “Abiner, mam jo ibonokinir “Kosodi Abiner aboŋokin ebe, “Iŋai ijo loiworot ekabaka?”"
1Samuel26:15 Kotema Daudi Abiner atiar, “Mere jo etuŋanan loititin? Iŋai da iputotor ijo koIsirael? Aso kanukinyo mam jo idaritor ekoniiakait ekabaka? Naarai abu ediopet koruna kobu aiar ekabaka ekonijakait."
1Samuel26:16 Mam ejok ibore nin yeniswama ijo, Kwape eiaria EJAKAIT, ibusakinit yes atwakare, naarai mam ipotu kidara ekusijakait, loinyonyoikinit EJAKAIT akinyet. Aso do koany, neejai akwara naka ekabaka ka etuo loka akipi loajai akouke.”"
1Samuel26:17 Kojen Saul eporoto loka Daudi, kotema atiar, “Erai ŋol ekoniporoto, okokuka Daudi?” Kotema Daudi atiar, “Eebo, ekaiakait, wu ekabaka, ŋes ekaporoto.”"
1Samuel26:18 Kotema atiar, “Kanukinyo idopiator ekajakait ekebulesit? Eswama anyoika? Ido aronis anyoin ejai akanika?"
1Samuel26:19 Aso, keŋainait, kopup ekajakait ekabaka akiro nuka ekebulesit, arai erai EJAKAIT kituluikinit jo eoŋ, kocam ŋesi ainakinet: konye arai eraas idwe luka ituŋa, kikenoi kes kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT; naarai kereneasi eoŋ lolo kenyek aidon airumet naka EJAKAIT kobalas ebe, “Kolot, kijaanak icedekesio.’"
1Samuel26:20 Aso do, kinyeis akaokot abukokinio akwap naemamei EJAKAIT: naarai alomu ekabaka loka Isirael amoot idepidepit, kwape emejaa ituŋanan atapen koronan.”"
1Samuel26:21 Kosodi Saul atemar atiar, “Adiaka eoŋ: koboŋ, okokuka Daudi: naarai mam bobo keswamakini jo aronis, naarai ibu koyon akaijar lolo: koany, eswama nukabanaanut, apaa da noi.”"
1Samuel26:22 Koboŋok Daudi ebe, “Koany akwara, wu ekabaka Aso do kobu ediopet kokatumunak koom."
1Samuel26:23 Ikonakini EJAKAIT ninituŋanan kwape ejaar akedolit ka amunonutuke: naarai abu EJAKAIT kijaik jo akanika lolo, konye mam abu kario akakan aluikin loinyonyoikinit EJAKAIT akinyet."
1Samuel26:24 Ido koany, kwape abu kayonia akoniijar lolo, koyonai do akaiiar da kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kayuu da eoŋ koean kere.”"
1Samuel26:25 Kosodi Saul atemar Daudi atiar, “Kisirereni ijo, okokuka Daudi: iswamai ijo nukagogon, ipikori da.” Kolot Daudi orotoke, kobono Saul da aiboisike,"
1Samuel27:1 Kobala Daudi kotauke ebe, “Atwanikini moikaee eoŋ akan naka Saul: emamei ibore yenejok kamaka dimarai eoŋ alosit akwap naka Ipilisitian; kapaluni do Saul eoŋ, mam bobo kamoi eoŋ oikorun kere luka Isirael: kwaŋin akui do eoŋ kakanike.”"
1Samuel27:2 Konyou Daudi, kotubor, ŋes ka ituŋa akwat akanykape luajaas kaŋes, mama ejai Akis okoku loka Maok, ekabaka loka Gat,"
1Samuel27:3 Kiboienenei Daudi koGat nepepe ka Akis, ŋes ka iketuŋa, nolitunanan kekekal, Daudi da kakenor aarei, Akinoam Ayesereelit, ka Abigail Akaramelit, aberu kolo naka Nabal."
1Samuel27:4 Kolimokinai Saul ebe aker Daudi Gat: mam bobo abu komo ŋes.
1Samuel27:5 Kotema Daudi Akis atiar, “Arai adumunit asianut kakonyenekon, kainakis kes eoŋ aibois kore ediopet korony, tetere eboikin nina: naarai kanukinyo iboioto ekonibulesit kajo kore loka ekabaka?”"
1Samuel27:6 Kosodi Akis ainakin ŋes Sikilag kapaaran kaŋin: ŋes do araunor Sikilag loka ikabakan luka Yuda aitodol lolo.
1Samuel27:7 Emwaasi apaarasia nuabu Daudi kiboio kakwap naka Ipilisitian ekaru ediopet ka ilapio iwonon,"
1Samuel27:8 Kolosenenete Daudi ka iketuŋa kosuronokis Igesurin, ka Igirisin, ka Imalekain: naarai atekerin nun eboienenete apeŋo kakwap kiton Sur, kiton akwap nako Misiri."
1Samuel27:9 Kodany Daudi ituŋa, mam abu kitajar etuŋanan arai aberu, konata amerekekin ka imoŋin, asigiria ka akaalai, ka igoen; kobono, kobu neejai Akis,"
1Samuel27:10 Kotema Akis atiar, “Ai bo lolo ipotu kosurokis?” Kotema Daudi atiar, “Eŋalakimak naka Yuda,” ka “Eŋalakimak naka Iyerameelin,” ka “Eŋalakimak naka Ikenin.”"
1Samuel27:11 Mam Daudi abu kitajar etuŋanan karaida aberu, ayaŋaun kes Gat, kobala ebe, “Kinyeis einer ebe, ‘Eswama Daudi kwanata.’’’ Ido eswamaenenei ŋesi kwaŋin apak kere naeboienonoo kakwap naka Ipilisitian."
1Samuel27:12 Kiyu Akis Daudi, kobala ebe, “Ainaki iketuŋa Isirael aila ŋes eut; kanuka ŋun eraun ekakejaanakinan ikar kere.”"
1Samuel28:1 Kosodi kanen kapaarasia kanun, kotukonokis Ipilisitian akeeejoresio kanuka ejie, aitiji Isirael. Kotema Akis Daudi atiar, “Kojen ijo eut ebe kilosi ijo keoŋ ajore, ijo ka ikonituŋa.”"
1Samuel28:2 Kotema Daudi Akis atiar, “Kanuka nun ijenuni nuiswamai ekonikejaanakinan.” Kotema Akis Daudi atiar, “Kanuka nun kadakakini araun ekedaran akouka apaarasia kere.”"
1Samuel28:3 Abu Samuel kotwanite, abu da Isirael kere kibworo ŋes, kidaikinai ŋes Rama, oreken, Abu Saul kirenearite luejaas aiokin, ka ikaeudak kakwap."
1Samuel28:4 Kotukonokinos Ipilisitian kopotu kidukuroto Sunem: kotukok Saul Isirael kere, kidukuroto Giliboa."
1Samuel28:5 Keanyu Saul aiore naka Ipilisitian abu kokurianar, komaran eketau noi."
1Samuel28:6 Kosodi nakinisia Saul EJAKAIT, mam EJAKAIT abu koboŋok ŋes, karaida kotoma airujasia, karaida koUrim, karaida konabin."
1Samuel28:7 Kosodi Saul atemar ikebulesin atiar, “Komoikinai aberu naejai ajokit, tetere alosi mamake aiŋitun.” Kotemasi ikekejaanakinak ŋes atiar, “Koany, ejai aberu En-dor naejai aiokit.”"
1Samuel28:8 Kitegelikin Saul, konap ieenapen, kolot, ŋes ka ituŋa iarei, kopotu neejai aberu kuare: kotema atiar, “Keŋainait, kodwarakinai kaiokit, kitodokik eoŋ kere yenikalimokini.”"
1Samuel28:9 Kotema aberu ŋes atiar, “Koany, ijeni nueswama Saul, kwape erenearia luejaas ajokin ka ikacudak kakwap: kanukinyo ilokia ijo akaijar, aiar eoŋ?”"
1Samuel28:10 Kiyapcik Saul ŋes kolimit EJAKAIT ebe, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, mam adiokiticanet kidoikin jo kanuka akirot kana,”"
1Samuel28:11 Kosodi aberu atemar atiar, “Iŋai bo etodokuni mamakon?” Kotema atiar,” Kitodokikinai Samuel.”"
1Samuel28:12 Keanyu aberu Samuel, kodelo keporoto loepol: kotema aberu Saul atiar, “Kanukinyo kimodia ijo eoŋ? Kwabo irai ijo Sau!.”"
1Samuel28:13 Kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Sirikikurianar: naarai inyo iseseni ijo?” Kotema aberu Saul atiar, “Aseseni edeke edokuni kokwap.”"
1Samuel28:14 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Ejesi ŋesi ai?” Kotema atiar, “Edokuni emoion; erapiara kekaso.” Kojen Saul ebe arai Samuel, kokukum, kisuded,"
1Samuel28:15 Kotema Samuel Saul atiar, “Kanukinyo kilonilonia aitodokun?” Koboŋok Saul ebe, “Ajai ocan luipu noi; naarai ketijiete Ipilisitian, anyou da Edeke kamakaŋ, mam bobo kabononokini, karaida konabin, karaida kotoma airuiasia: kanuka nun ŋes kanyaraunia jo, tetere kitejenuni nueswamai.”"
1Samuel28:16 Kotema Samuel atiar, “Aso kanukinyo kinisia eoŋ, naarai anyou EJAKAIT kamakon, erai da lokasurupikon?"
1Samuel28:17 Eswama EJAKAIT kanuke, kwape abu kineria kamakaŋ: acila EJAKAIT ajakanut kakanikon, ainaki eidunyetekon Daudi,"
1Samuel28:18 Naarai mam ibu korima eporoto loka EJAKAIT, mam ibu kitodol anyunyurake naededen kama ejai Amalek, kanuka nun ŋes kiswamakinia EJAKAIT jo akirot na lolo."
1Samuel28:19 Bobo da ijaikini EJAKAIT Isirael ka jo da akan naka Ipilisitian: moi iiaunos ijo ka odwekon nepepe keoŋ: ijaikini EJAKAIT ajore naka Isirael akan naka Ipilisitian.”
1Samuel28:20 Kosodi Saul alatakin kwap, kokurianar noi kanuka akiro nuka Samuel: komameun ŋes agogoŋ; naarai mam anyamit adiotap apaaran kere, ka akuare kere,"
1Samuel28:21 Kobu aberu neejai Saul, koany ebe eyalononoi noi, kotema ŋes atiar, “Koany, apupoki akonibulesit eporotokon, adaearit akaiiar, apupok akonikiro nuibu kolimok eoŋ."
1Samuel28:22 Aso, kenainait, kopupok ijo da eporoto loka abulesitikon, kainu jo adiotap; konyam, tetere igogonior, nailosio korotokon.”"
1Samuel28:23 Konye koner, kotema atiar, “Mam anyami.” Konye kitinaikis ŋes ikekejaanakinak ka aberu; kopupok ŋesi ekeceporoto, Konyou kokwap kiboikin oitada."
1Samuel28:24 Ajai aberu itaok yenatumit togo; kiwonya, koar ŋes; kolem akiria, kono kope imugatin lumam itubuunitoi:"
1Samuel28:25 Koinu ŋesi Saul ka ikekejaanakinak; konyamata. Kosodete anyoun, kolototo akuare ŋin."
1Samuel29:1 Kotukonokis Ipilisitian ajoresiokee kere Apek: kidukuroto Isiraelin ariri naka atan naejai Yesereel.
1Samuel29:2 Kotubonoros ijaka luka Ipilisitian kakwat ka ilukumin, kotuboros Daudi da ka iketuŋa kokau ka Akis."
1Samuel29:3 Kosodete ikapolok luka Ipilisitian atemar atiar, “Inyo bo iswamaete Iburanian lu kane?” Kotema Akis ikapolok luka Ipilisitian atiar, “Mere lo Daudi, ekejaanakinan loka Saul ekabaka loka Isirael, loejai nepepe keoŋ apaarasia kanu, arai ikar lu, mam adumunit adioibuearet kamake ageun neasiunia mamakan aitodol lolo?”"
1Samuel29:4 Konye konyunyurikinos ikapolok luka Ipilisitian, kotemasi ikapolok luka Ipilisitian ŋes atiar, “Kitobono etuŋanan lo, tetere eboŋori aiboisike naiseikinit ijo ŋes, sirikelot kaoni ojie, kinyek araun lokasurupiwok kojie: naarai ikonakini ai etuŋanan loepucete kejakaitike? Mere ti kakwes nuka ituŋa kalu?"
1Samuel29:5 Mere lo Daudi, loayeononoto ikosiete ebe, ‘Aar Saul ikelukumin, Aar Daudi da ikelukumin itomon?’”"
1Samuel29:6 Kosodi Akis anyaraun Daudi, kotema ŋes atiar, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, irai ijo loitenara, ido akonilomar ka akonilomun nepepe keoŋ kajore ejok kakonyeneka: naarai mam adumunit aronis kamakon ageun kapaaran naka abunorekon mamakan kiton lolo: konye mam ijaka kikotos jo."
1Samuel29:7 Aso do kobono, kolot kainapakin, tetere mam itakadikini ijaka luka Ipilisitian.”"
1Samuel29:8 Kotema Daudi Akis atiar, “Konye eswama anyoika? Ido inyo idum ijo kaneejai ekejaanakinanikon kapak nakijaar kajo kiton lolo, tape mam alosi aitiii lukasurup luka ejakaitika ekabaka?”"
1Samuel29:9 Koboŋok Akis kotema Daudi atiar, “Ajeni ebe ijok ijo kakonyeneka, kwape emalaika loka Edeke: konye alimut ijaka luka Ipilisitian ebe, ‘Mam elosi kaoni oiie.’"
1Samuel29:10 Aso do kodilok anyoun tupuruc ka ikejaanakinak luka ejakaitikon luiupuna kaio: atipet kinyout tupuruc, keniu akoloŋ kolototo.’"
1Samuel29:11 Kodilok Daudi anyoun, ŋes ka iketuŋa, alosit tupuruc, aboŋor akwap naka Ipilisitian. Koloto Ipilisitian Yesereel."
1Samuel30:1 Kosodi kanen, kepotu Daudi ka iketuŋa Sikilag kapaaran nakiwuniet, apotu Imalekain kosurokinito ari naka Eŋalakimak, ka Sikilag, konatasi luka Sikilag, kicweikisi ere kakim;"
1Samuel30:2 Kijoreosi aŋor ka luajaas toma kere Iudidik ka lukapolok da: mam apotu koarata idioda, konye koyanaasi kes, koloto."
1Samuel30:3 Kepotu Daudi ka iketuŋa ore, koany, ecweitai kakim; ejoreoritai aŋorokec, ka ikecedwe lusap ka lupesur."
1Samuel30:4 Kosodi Daudi ka ituŋa luajaas kaŋes adelor, komonyata, aitodol naekarakiniata aimony."
1Samuel30:5 Eioreoritai aŋor aarei nuka Daudi, Akinoam Ayesereelit, ka Abigail aberu kolo naka Nabal Akaramelit."
1Samuel30:6 Koiaikini Daudi oean luipu noi: naarai alimitos ituŋa aibiribir ŋes kamor, naarai akadakinito itauon luka ituŋa kere, ŋolituŋanan kanuka ikedwe lusap ka lupesur: konye kogogonior Daudi kotoma EJAKAIT Ekedeke."
1Samuel30:7 Kotema Daudi Abiatar esasedoti, okoku loka Akimelek, atiar, “Kenainait, koinunai epod.’ Koinu Abiatar Daudi epod."
1Samuel30:8 Kinit Daudi EJAKAIT ebe, “Arai kebwap eoŋ erioŋet lo, adolokini kereka eoŋ kes?” Koboŋok ebe, “Kibwap: naarai abeit idolokini ijo kes, mam kikurwokini ainyakun kere.”"
1Samuel30:9 Kolot Daudi, ŋes ka iketuŋa akwat akanykape luajaas kaŋes, kodoloto aleles Besor, neasalakinete nul Iuelanyakinio,"
1Samuel30:10 Konye kibwap Daudi, ŋes ka ituŋa akwat aoŋon: naarai apotu akwat aarei kosalakis, luelolonyito komam epedorete aitub aleles Besor,"
1Samuel30:11 Kodumut Emisiriat kokitui, koyaut ŋes neejai Daudi, koinakis ŋes inyamat, konyam; koinakis ŋes akipi aimat:"
1Samuel30:12 Koinakis ŋes atutubet naka aluŋuret naka itinin, ka aibuneta aarei nueokito nuka imusabibun. Kedau ŋesi ainyam, kikwar: naarai mam anyamit atap, karaida aimat akipi apaarasia auni ka akuaresia auni."
1Samuel30:13 Kotema Daudi ŋes atiar, “Lokanai ijo? Ido lali bo kibunio?” Kotema atiar, “Arai eoŋ esapat Emisiriat, ebulesit loka Emalekait; kajal ejakaitika eoŋ, naarai apenata apaarasia auni adeka,"
1Samuel30:14 Apotu kasurokisi ari naka eŋalakimak naka Iceretitin, ka ari naka Yuda, ka Eŋalakimak naka Kaleb; kecweata Sikilag kakim.”"
1Samuel30:15 Kotema Daudi ŋes atiar, “Kiyanaari ijo eoŋ orionet ŋol?” Kotema ŋes atiar, “Kiyapoikinoi kolimite Edeke, ebe mam jo kiari eoŋ karaida aijaikin eoŋ akanin nuka ekajakait, kayanaari jo orionet ŋol.”"
1Samuel30:16 Kedau ŋesi ayaŋaar ŋes, koany, esiarakina akwap kere, enyamete, emasete, ekosiete, kanuka lunatan kere luipu luapotu koyaut kakwap naka Ipilisitian ka akwap naka Yuda."
1Samuel30:17 Kodany Daudi kes ageun napimukokini akwap aitodol atiboŋ naka apaaran naatupakini: mam idiotuŋanan abu koku kakesi, dimarai ikatumunak akwat aoŋon luapotu kibwanenoto akaalai kokerata."
1Samuel30:18 Kinyak Daudi kere luanatarito Imalekain: koyuu Daudi akenor aarei.
1Samuel30:19 Komamei koborokec yenaoliorit, yenepol karaida yenedit; karaida ikeeedwe lusap ka lupesur, karaida lunatan, karaida iboro kere luanatarito: kinyak Daudi kere."
1Samuel30:20 Koyana Daudi isipanin kere luka amerekekin ka luka aituk, luameeto koinaren kibaren ice, kobala ebe, “Lu kes iŋatan luka Daudi.”"
1Samuel30:21 Kobu Daudi mama ejaas ituŋa kwi akwat aarei, luapotu kilolonyata tape mam epedorete atupar Daudi, luaponi kitasalikinai aleles Besor: koloto airiamun ka Daudi, airiamun da kituna luaupas kaŋes: kosodi kedoloki Daudi ituŋa, kiyoga kes,"
1Samuel30:22 Kosodete ituŋa kere lukaronok ka ituŋa luka Belial, kotoma kanul kalualosito ka Daudi aboŋokin ebe, “Kanu naarai mam apotu koloto kaoni, mam kiinakini kes idiobore kotoma lunatan lukinyaku, dimarai koyana ninitunanan akeberu ka ikedwe, koloto.”"
1Samuel30:23 Kosodi Daudi atemar atiar, “Ikainaean, mam iswamakinete kwaŋin iboro lukiinak EJAKAIT oni, lokidar oni, loabu kijaik erioŋet lokisurokinit oni akaniwok."
1Samuel30:24 Iŋai kipupokini yes kakirot kaŋin? Naarai kwape ejaar akorakinet naka ŋol kaloelosi oiie, kwape kwaŋin da eiaar akorakinet naka ŋol kaloidari iboro: ekorokoroete koriakas.”"
1Samuel30:25 Koiaun kwaŋin amear kapaaran kaŋin ka aiyatanakin, kisilak araun ekisil ka aicorakinet mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael, kiton lolo."
1Samuel30:26 Kedol Daudi Sikilag, kijukak imakio luka Yuda, ikepapero, ice kotoma lunatan, ebe, “Koany, ainakinetekus kotoma lunatan kaneejaas lukasurupo luka EJAKAIT.”"
1Samuel30:27 Ainakinet mama ejaas luka Bet-el, ka luajaas Ramot loka Eŋalakimak, ka Iuajaas Yatir;"
1Samuel30:28 Ka luajaas Aroer, ka luajaas Sipimot, ka luajaas Esitemoa;"
1Samuel30:29 Ka luajaas Raeal, ka luajaas oreria luka Iyerameelin, ka luajaas oreria luka Ikenin;"
1Samuel30:30 Ka luajaas Koruma, ka luajaas Kor-asan, ka luajaas Atak;"
1Samuel30:31 Ka luajaas Keburon, ka mama ejaas aiboisio kere nuatapit Daudi alosenen ka iketuŋa."
1Samuel31:1 Kitijioto Ipilisitian Isirael: kokerata ituŋa luka Isirael kakonyen nuka Ipilisitian, koarakinai moru Giliboa."
1Samuel31:2 Kodapata noi Ipilisitian Saul ka odweke; koarata Ipilisitian Yonatan, ka Abinadab ka Maliki-sua, odwe luka Saul."
1Samuel31:3 Kipikoroi Saul kojie, kodolokis ŋes ikagumak imalia; kobur noi kanuka ikagumak imalia."
1Samuel31:4 Kosodi Saul atemar loadakit lujiisike atiar, “Kout ekonikilen, kieumia eoŋ; kinyeis lumam ekepep lu abunore aicum eoŋ, aitisil eoŋ,” Konye koner loadakit lujiisike; naarai akuriana noi. Kanuka ŋun kolem Saul ekekileŋ, kicumakinor."
1Samuel31:5 Keanyu loadakit lujiisike ebe atwana Saul, kieumakin ŋesi da kekekilen, kotwana nepepe kaŋes."
1Samuel31:6 Kwaŋin kotwana Saul, ka odweke iuni, ka loadakit luiiisike, ka iketuŋa kere, kapaaran kaŋin kere nepepe."
1Samuel31:7 Keanyut ituŋa luka Isirael luajaas juwai naka aditot, ka ŋul luajaas juwai naka Yorodan ebe akerata ituŋa luka Isirael, atwana da Saul ka odweke, koialata ireria, kokerata; kopotu Ipilisitian kiboikinos toma."
1Samuel31:8 Kosodi kanen tupuruc kepotu Ipilisitian aiŋat lukearitai, kodumut Saul ka odweke iuni etwakikinito moru Giliboa."
1Samuel31:9 Koiepasi akekou, konatasi Iuiiisike, kijukasi akwap naka Ipilisitian naerimorit, ayaŋaar akiro togo loka aputosiakee nuegerer, kotuna da."
1Samuel31:10 Kibwaikis lujiisike togo loka Asitarot: koenikis akekuan arwatat naka Bet-san,"
1Samuel31:11 Kepuput lueboienenete koYabes-Gilead nuken nuapotu Ipilisitian kiswamakis Saul.
1Samuel31:12 Konyout ituŋa kere luatitiŋ, koloto akuare kere, kolemut akuan naka Saul ka awat nuka odweke karwatat naka Bet-san; kopotu Yabes, kicweata kes kanen."
1Samuel31:13 Koyanaasi akojokee, konukakis kwap kepeduru koYabes, kikanyata eteŋei apaarasia akanykaarei."
2Samuel1:1 Kosodi kanen kedau Saul atwanare, keboŋu Daudi kaiar Imalekain, kodaunite da Daudi apaarasia aarei koSikilag;"
2Samuel1:2 Kosodi kanen kapaaran nakiwuniet, koany, kobu etuŋanan koidukurun kama ejai Saul kocilicilite ikenapen, kojukite alupot da akouke; kosodi kedol mama ejai Daudi, kisuded, kiyoga."
2Samuel1:3 Kobala Daudi ŋes ebe, “Laali bo kibunio?” Kotema atiar, “Akui koidukurun luka Isirael.”"
2Samuel1:4 Kobala Daudi ŋes ebe, “Ekote bo ai? Keŋaiŋait kolimokinai.” Koboŋok ebe, “Akera ituŋa kojie, ido ebiroros ituŋa luipu atwaka; Saul ka okokuke Yonatan atwaka kesi da.”"
2Samuel1:5 Kobala Daudi etelepat lokelimokini ŋes ebe, “Kijenuni biai ebe atwana Saul ka okokuke Yonatan?”"
2Samuel1:6 Kotema etelepat lokelimokini ŋes atiar, “Napajaar eoŋ moru Giliboa, koany, kogoŋakin Saul akwarake; ido koany, agalin ka luibwanenito kituburuunitos."
2Samuel1:7 Kosodi keŋolia kau, kaany eoŋ, kanyara. Kaboŋok ebe, “Eoŋ lo.’"
2Samuel1:8 Katemaeoŋ atiar, ‘Iŋai bo ijo?’ Kaboŋok ŋes ebe, “Eoŋ Emalekait.’"
2Samuel1:9 Katema eoŋ atiar, ‘Keŋaiŋait, kobwo kosiepika, koar eoŋ, naarai kerumut iean; naarai akaijar eroko ejari kotomakaŋ.’"
2Samuel1:10 Kasodi aibwo kosiepike, kaar ŋes, naarai abu kajen cut ebe mam epedori araut ekajaran kedau aibirokin kwap; kayaŋa aboko naajai akouke, ka aisinit naajai akanike, ido ayaunit mama ejai ekajakait.”"
2Samuel1:11 Kosodi kitiŋ Daudi ikenapen kocil; kiswamata da kwape kwaŋin ituŋa kere lukejaas kaŋes.
2Samuel1:12 Kibworoto, komonyata akiyo, koluŋata aitiwar akwap, kanuka Saul, kanuka Yonatan da okokuke, kanuka ituŋa luka EJAKAIT, kanuka ekek da loka Isirael; naarai ebiroros kekileŋ,"
2Samuel1:13 Kobala Daudi etelepat lokelimokini ŋes ebe, “Lokai bo ijo?” Koboŋok ebe, “Arai eoŋ okoku loka emoit, Emalekait.”"
2Samuel1:14 Kobala Daudi ŋes ebe, “Kanukinyo mam kiyoŋia arior akonikan amudiar ŋol loinyonyoikinit EJAKAIT akinyet?”"
2Samuel1:15 Konyarau Daudi ediopet kotelepai, kolimok atiar, “Kikunyak, kosomakin.” Kicum ŋes kotwana."
2Samuel1:16 Kobala Daudi ŋes ebe, “Akoniwokot kobeata akoukon; naarai akoniituk ŋes akajenan kamakon inera atiar, ‘Aar ŋol loinyonyoikinit EJAKAIT akinyet.’’’"
2Samuel1:17 Kosodi kokuudian Daudi Saul ka Yonatan okokuke akuudian na:
2Samuel1:18 Kicorak aisisianakin idwe luka Yuda ekosio loka akabwa: koany, kiwadikatai oitabo loka Yasar. Kobala ebe:"
2Samuel1:19 “Aibusesukon, WU okwe Isirael, aari kaiboisiokon nuiceleleete! Wu okwe ebiroros itikirigin!"
2Samuel1:20 Sirikilimonokis koGat, Sirikisiarakis orotin luka Asukelon; Kinyeis adwe nuka Ipilisitian aiyalama, Kinyeis adwe nuka kalumam ekepitai ailel."
2Samuel1:21 Yes iroŋan luka Giliboa, Kinyeis akopyo karaida akiru ajaut kokujukus, Karaida imanikoria luka kaluiinakina; Naarai ŋina acakakinio kileic ebuku loka itikirigin, Ebuku loka Saul bala lomam enyonyoikinitai akinyet."
2Samuel1:22 Kaokot nuka ŋul kalukearia, Kasiepa da nuka itikirigin, Akabwa naka Yonatan mam aboŋunenei kau, Ka ekileŋ loka Saul da mam aboŋunenei atitai."
2Samuel1:23 Saul ka Yonatan araas lukajokak ido luitalakaarito kaijarakec; Mam aponi kotiakai katwanarekec; Atiroko aitelekarit imorukaalen, Agogoŋ aitelekarit iŋatunyo."
2Samuel1:24 Yes adwe nuka Isirael, kibworoto Saul, Lokitanapi yes lukareŋak lukaitojoka, Lokisiri ikusinapen kesabu."
2Samuel1:25 Wu okwe ebiroros itikirigin Kokidiŋ ojie! Aari Yonatan kaiboisiokon nuiceleleete.
2Samuel1:26 Eturur kanukon, onaceka Yonatan; Ibu kitalakaanari eoŋ noi noi; Akonomin mamakaŋ arai nakaumokin, Adepar amin naka aŋor."
2Samuel1:27 Wu okwe ebiroros itikirigin, Amudiaros da lujiis luka ajore!”"
2Samuel2:1 Kosodi kanen akaulo kaŋun, kiŋit Daudi EJAKAIT ebe, “Abwosi eoŋ mama ejai ediopet koreria luka Yuda?” Kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Kobwot.” Kotema Daudi atiar, “Abwosi bo ai?” Kotema atiar, “Keburon.”"
2Samuel2:2 Kwaŋin kobwot Daudi, ka akenor aarei da, Akinoam Ayesereelit, ka Abigail aberu kolo naka Nabal, Akaramelit."
2Samuel2:3 Kitwobot Daudi ituŋa luajaas kaŋes, ŋinituŋanan ka ekaleke: kiboikinos oreria luka Keburon."
2Samuel2:4 Kopotu ituŋa luka Yuda, kinyonyoikis Daudi akinyet araun ekabaka loka ekek loka Yuda kanen. Kolimokis Daudi ebe, “Ituŋa luka Yabes-gilead kes luanukete Saul.”"
2Samuel2:5 Kijuka Daudi ikiyakia mama ejaas ituŋa luka Yabes-gilead, kobala kes ebe, “Kisirereŋit yes EJAKAIT, naarai itodikis ejakaitikus, ŋes Saul, asianut na, inukata ŋes."
2Samuel2:6 Kitodik kwana EJAKAIT yes asianut ka abeit: eoŋ da aropi yes asianut ŋin, naarai iswamata akirot ŋin."
2Samuel2:7 Aso do kogogoŋoto akaninikus, kotitiŋioto: naarai atwana Saul ekusijakait, bobo da abu ekek loka Yuda kenyonyoik eoŋ akinyet araun ekabakakec.”"
2Samuel2:8 Abu Abiner okoku loka Ner ekapolon loka ajore naka Saul koyaŋa Isboset okoku loka Saul, kitodoka ŋes Makanaim;"
2Samuel2:9 Kituluo ŋes ekabaka loka Gilead, ka Iasurin, ka Yesereel, ka Epuraim, ka Benyamin, ka Isirael kere,"
2Samuel2:10 (Kerai Is-boset okoku loka Saul loka ikar akaisaoŋon naageunia airum Isirael, kirumak ikar iarei.) Konye kotup ekek loka Yuda Daudi."
2Samuel2:11 Apak naaraar Daudi ekabaka koKeburon irumit ekek loka Yuda emwaasi ikar ikanykaarei ka ilapio ikanykape.
2Samuel2:12 Koloma Abiner okoku loka Ner, ka ibulesin luka Is-boset okoku loka Saul, anyoun koMakanaim kolot Gibeon."
2Samuel2:13 Koloma Yoab okoku loka Seruia ka ikeiaanakinak luka Daudi, kiriamunos kakes eiduny katapar naka Gibeon; kiboikinos, lu epuai katapar, kwi da epuai katapar,"
2Samuel2:14 Kotema Abiner Yoab atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, konyout ikatumunak abolia kakonyenewok.” Kotema Yoab atiar, “Aso konyoutu.”"
2Samuel2:15 Konyout kodokasi imaritai; itomon ka luarei kanuka Benyamin, ka Is-boset okoku loka Saul, ka itomon ka luarei luka ikejaanakinak luka Daudi,"
2Samuel2:16 Kitiŋ ŋinituŋanan akou naka aupake, kicum kekileŋike osiep loka aupake; kibiroros nepepe: kanuka ŋun ŋes amaikinere aibois ŋin Kelakat-kasurim, naejai Gibeon."
2Samuel2:17 Kosisior ejie kapaaran kaŋin; kipikoroi Abiner ka ituŋa luka Isirael kakonyen nuka ikejaanakinak luka Daudi,"
2Samuel2:18 Ajaas kanen odwe iuni luka Seruia, Yoab ka Abisai, ka Asakel: ketirono Asakel akerit kwape kamori."
2Samuel2:19 Korukitor Asakel Abiner; mam abu kibelokin teten arai kediany kotoma alositeke naatupitor Abiner.
2Samuel2:20 Kosodi Abiner aŋoliar kauke, kotema atiar, “Ŋes ijo, Asakel?” Koboŋok ebe, “Eoŋ ca lo.”"
2Samuel2:21 Kotema Abiner ŋes atiar, “Kibelokin ijo teten arai kediany, kikam ediopet kokatumunak, kolem luijisike.” Konye koŋer Asakel aibelokin katupit ŋes,"
2Samuel2:22 Kotema bobo Abiner Asakel ebe, “Kibelokin kinyek atupit eoŋ: kanukinyo kebirokinia jo kwap? Ekonakini ai aseseni onacekon Yoab?”"
2Samuel2:23 Konye koŋer aibelokin: tape Abiner icumi ŋes akoik ekaukau kakwara, kipelun akwara kokauke; kibirokin nen, kotwanik aibois ŋin: kosodi kanen, luadolunete kere aibois naebirokin Asakel kotwanite, kobwout."
2Samuel2:24 Konye apotu Yoab ka Abisai korukioto Abiner: koloma akoloŋ nakedolioto kesi oukot loka Ama, loitei Gia korot loka amodiŋ naka Gibeon,"
2Samuel2:25 Kotukonokinos idwe luka Benyamin neajai Abiner, koraut erioŋet ediopet, kobwaata kokuju keukot."
2Samuel2:26 Kosodi Abiner aiworo Yoab ebe, “Edanyi kereka ekileŋ ikar kere? Mam jo ijeni ebe awasiake ŋes adwaris? Aso do kitodoli ai eriŋa ieorakinia iluŋa aboŋor katupakin iinacanakec?”"
2Samuel2:27 Kotema Yoab atiar, “Kwape ejaria Edeke, kemam jo einer, abeit tikeloto ituŋa tupuruc, komam ŋinituŋanan atupit onaceke.”"
2Samuel2:28 Kokut Yoab arupepe, kobwoutu ituŋa kere, komam bobo erukitotor Isirael, karaida aitiji kes bobo."
2Samuel2:29 Kotuboros Abiner ka ituŋake Araba, koloto akuare kia; kodokasi Yorodan, kotuboros Bituron kere, kodoloto Makanaim."
2Samuel2:30 Koboŋo Yoab katupit Abiner: kedau atukonokin ituŋa kere, komameut ituŋa itomon ka lukanykaoŋon ka Asakel kokejaanakinak luka Daudi."
2Samuel2:31 Konye apotu ikejaanakinak luka Daudi kodanyata luka Benyamin, ka ituŋa luka Abiner, tape etwakete ituŋa akwat auni ka akaisakanykape."
2Samuel2:32 Kodakasi Asakal, kidaikis ŋes ates naka papake, naajai Bet-lekem, Kolot Yoab ka ituŋake akuare kia, kocila kide kojaas kesi Keburon."
2Samuel3:1 Kojai ejie apak naepol kidiŋ kekek loka Saul ka ekek loka Daudi: kiyatanakin Daudi agogoŋor, konye kiyatanakin ekek loka Saul anonokiar."
2Samuel3:2 Aponi kourikinai Daudi odwe koKeburon: ekiyaike ŋes Aminon, loka Akinoam Ayesereelit:"
2Samuel3:3 Lokiareitike, Kileab, loka Abigail aberu kolo naka Nabal Akaramelit; lokiwuniet, Abisalom okoku loka Maaka akoku naka Talumai ekabaka loka Gesur;"
2Samuel3:4 Lokiwononet, Adoniya okoku loka Kagit; lokikanyet, Sepatia okoku loka Abital;"
2Samuel3:5 Lokikanyetekape, Itiream, loka Egula aberu naka Daudi. Aponi ŋul kourikinai Daudi koKeburon."
2Samuel3:6 Kosodi kanen, kapak naajaar ejie kidiŋ kekek loka Saul ka ekek loka Daudi, kogogoŋor Abiner kokek loka Saul."
2Samuel3:7 Ajai Saul abusiat, ekekiror Risipa, akoku naka Aia: kotema Is-boset Abiner atiar, “Kanukinyo ilomaria ijo mama ejai abusiat naka papaka?”"
2Samuel3:8 Konyunyurikin Abiner noi kakiro nuka Is-boset, kotema atiar, “Arai eoŋ akou naka ekiŋok loka Yuda? Etodik lolo eoŋ asianut ekek loka Saul papakon, iinacanake ka ipaperoke, mam kejaikinit jo akan naka Daudi, konye kilimit eoŋ lolo kakirot naka aberu."
2Samuel3:9 Kiswamak Edeke Abiner kwaŋin ka adepar da, arai, kwape eyapoikinia EJAKAIT Daudi, mam eoŋ eswamakini ŋes kwaŋin."
2Samuel3:10 Aijul ajakanut alemar kokek loka Saul, ka asipokin ajakanut naka Daudi airum Isirael, ka Yuda, anyoun koDan kiton Beer-seba.”"
2Samuel3:11 Mam abu kopedo aboŋokin Abiner adiopekirot, naarai akuriana ŋes."
2Samuel3:12 Kijuka Abiner ikiyakia kokirorike mama ejai Daudi, kotema ebe, “Nakaŋai akwap? “ebe da, “Kitutuk keoŋ, ido koany, kojaun akanika kajo, aibelokin Isirael kere mamakon.”"
2Samuel3:13 Kotema atiar, “Ejok; etutuki eoŋ kajo: konye akoto ibore idiopet kamakon, ŋes yenita, mam ianyuni akonyeneka, dimarai kisiau ber ayaun Mikal akoku naka Saul, naibunio aanyun eoŋ.”"
2Samuel3:14 Kijuka Daudi ikiyakia mama ejai Is-boset okoku loka Saul kotema ebe, “Koinakinai Mikal akaberu, naesinerit eoŋ kamunyin akwatat nuka ekiliokane loka Ipilisitian.”"
2Samuel3:15 Kiyakia Is-boset, kodemu ŋes kama kokilenike, ŋes Palutiel okoku loka Lais."
2Samuel3:16 Kouparos okilenike kaŋes, kolosi emonyi, kotupite ŋes kiton Bakurim, Kosodi Abiner atemar ŋes atiar, “Ape, koboŋo.” Kosodi ŋesi aboŋor,"
2Samuel3:17 Abu Abiner kinerunito kimakio luka Isirael ebe, “Imootos yesi kolo Daudi araun ekabakakus:"
2Samuel3:18 Aso do kiswamata: naarai abu EJAKAIT kiner nuka Daudi ebe, ‘Kakan naka ekakejaanakinan Daudi etajari ikatuŋa Isirael kakan naka Ipilisitian, kakan da naka lukasurupokec kere.’’’"
2Samuel3:19 Kiner da Abiner kaki nuka Benyamin: kolot da Abiner einer kaki nuka Daudi koKeburon kere nukitojokit Isirael, ka ekek kere loka Benyamin."
2Samuel3:20 Kobu Abiner mama ejai Daudi Keburon, koupas kituŋa akaisaarei, Kipoik Daudi Abiner ka ituŋa luajaas kaŋes epucit."
2Samuel3:21 Kotema Abiner Daudi atiar, “Anyouni kalot, atukonokini Isirael kere mama ejai ejakaitika ekabaka, kitutukoto kajo, kirum ijo kere luipuda ekonitau.” Kotwar Daudi Abiner; kolot inapakina."
2Samuel3:22 Ido koany, apotu ikejaanakinak luka Daudi ka Yoab koboŋut kaiŋat, koyaut luaŋatunitai luipu kakes: konye mam Abiner ajai kaDaudi Keburon; paarai atwarit ŋes, alot inapakina."
2Samuel3:23 Kedol Yoab ka ajore kere naajai kaŋes, kolimokis Yoab ebe, “Abu Abiner okoku loka Ner, mama ejai ekabaka, atwar ŋes, alot inapakina.”"
2Samuel3:24 Kosodi Yoab abunore mama ejai ekabaka, kotema atiar, “Iswama anyoika? Koany, abu Abiner mama ijai; kanukinyo itwaria ŋes ido alot cut?"
2Samuel3:25 ŋjeni ijo Abiner okoku loka Ner, abu ŋesi aiŋal jo, ajenun akonilomun ka akonilomar, ajenun da kere nuiswamai.”"
2Samuel3:26 Kelom Yoab kaneajai Daudi, kijuka ikiyakia atupakin Abiner, kinyakutu ŋes katan naka Sira: konye mam Daudi ajeni."
2Samuel3:27 Keboŋ Abiner Keburon, koyaŋa Yoab ŋes awai kidiŋ orute einer kaŋes kaiyeiyea, kicum ŋes akoik kanen, kotwana, kanuka aokot nuka onaeeke Asakel."
2Samuel3:28 Kokau kiira Daudi, kotema atiar, “Mam nukabeikinete eoŋ ka ajakanutuka kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT ikar kere kaokot nuka Abiner okoku loka Ner:"
2Samuel3:29 Kobeikis akou naka Yoab, ka ekek kere loka papake: kinyek akurwokin ajaun kokek loka Yoab, yenelelei, arai yenikatapon, arai yenegoŋakina obela, arai yeniketwani kekileŋ, arai yenekadit atap.”"
2Samuel3:30 Kwaŋin koara Yoab ka onaceke Abisai Abiner, naarai abu koar onacekec Asakel koGibeon kojie."
2Samuel3:31 Kotema Daudi Yoab ka ituŋa kere luajaas kaŋes atiar, “Koeila anapitokus, kocna epuko, kibworo Abiner.” Kotupa ekabaka Daudi asaduku naadakitere lokatwan,"
2Samuel3:32 Kidaikis Abiner Keburon: kodelo ekabaka, komony kates naka Abiner: komonyata ituŋa kere."
2Samuel3:33 Kokuudian ekabaka kanuka Abiner, kotema atiar, “Ibusakinit kereka Abiner atwanare kwape ketwania lobaŋ?"
2Samuel3:34 Mam akonikanin aenen, Karaida akejekon aenen kirikoi: Kwape ibirokinor etuŋanan kakonyen nuka idwe luka lumam adolit, Ibu ijo kibiror kwaŋin.” Komonyata ituŋa kere bobo kanukeŋ,"
