2Samuel3:35 Kopotu ituŋa kere kimaimata Daudi ainyam atap koriŋa apaaran edauna: konye kiyapo Daudi kotema atiar, “Keswamak Edeke eoŋ kwaŋin ka adepar da, arai keir atap arai icebore kere aitodol naelomaria akoloŋ.”"
2Samuel3:36 Kopuput ituŋa kere, kitojokata: kwape kitojokiata ituŋa kere nueswamaenenei ekabaka."
2Samuel3:37 Kojenut ituŋa kere ka Isirael kere kapaaran kaŋin ebe mam arai akirot naka ekabaka aiar Abiner okoku loka Ner.
2Samuel3:38 Kotema ekabaka ikejaanakinakake atiar, “Mam ijenete ebe ebiror ekapolon ido loajenikina koIsirael lolo?"
2Samuel3:39 Eoŋ da lolo anonok, karaida arai ekabaka loenyonyoikina akinyet; ketelekarito eoŋ ituŋa lu odwe luka Seruia kagogoŋ: korop EJAKAIT lokeswaman aronis kwape ejaar aronisike.”"
2Samuel4:1 Kepupu Is-boset okoku loka Saul ebe atwaniki Abiner Keburon, kokalanyakata akaninike, kiyaloŋoŋ oto luka Isirael kere."
2Samuel4:2 Ajaas Is-boset okoku loka Saul ituŋa iarei luapolokinito irioŋeta: ekiror loka ediopet Baana, ekiror loka ece Rekab, odwe luka Rimon Ebeerotit, loka idwe luka Benyamin: (naarai imarakinitai Beerot da araun loka Benyamin:"
2Samuel4:3 Kokerata Ibeerotin Gitaim, apotu kiboiororoto kanen kiton lolo.)"
2Samuel4:4 Kejai Yonatan okoku loka Saul okoku loaŋwalito akejeke kere. Kerai loka ikar ikany kedolut akiro nuka Saul ka Yonatan koYesereel, kodak akasaanike ŋes kokerearia: kosodi kanen, kisunyak ŋin akerit, kibiror ikoku, koraun eŋwalas, Ekekiror Mepiboset."
2Samuel4:5 Koloto odwe luka Rimon Ebeerotit, Rekab ka Baana, kodolut togo loka Is-boset kapak naamwaniar akoloŋ, kapak naeyenuŋia ŋesi paaran."
2Samuel4:6 Apiesi aberu naedari ekek loka etogo akima, kiluranar, kojotoi; koceda iinaean Rekab ka Baana kaiyeiyea kolomasi togo."
2Samuel4:7 Kelomasi togo koperi Is-boset koitadake kagolake naperot, kinomata ŋes, koarata, kojepasi akouke, koyaŋaasi akouke, kitoroto orot loka Araba akuare kere."
2Samuel4:8 Koyaut akou naka Is-boset mama ejai Daudi Keburon, kotemasi ekabaka atiar, “Koany akou naka Is-boset okoku loka Saul lokasurupikon, loakoto aijarakon; enyaŋaki EJAKAIT ekajakait ekabaka kanuka Saul ka aurike lolo.”"
2Samuel4:9 Koboŋok Daudi Rekab ka Baana onaceke, odwe luka Rimon Ebeerorit, ebe, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, loalakuni aijaraka koean kere,"
2Samuel4:10 Nakalimokinia kolo etuŋanan eoŋ ebe, ‘Koany, atwana Saul,’ koomite ebe kainunit akiro nukajokak, kekam ŋes, kaara ŋes koSikilag, ŋes eropitike loabu kainak ŋes kanuka akiroke."
2Samuel4:11 Nakeariata ituŋa lukarokok etuŋanan loedolit kotogoke koitadake, mam eyatakini noi aitepesen aokotoke kakanikus, alemari yes kakwap?”"
2Samuel4:12 Kicorak Daudi ikatumunakake, koarata kes, kotubonosi akaninikec, ka akejenekec, kikajakis kes eiduny katapar koKeburon. Konye koyaŋaasi akou naka Is-boset, kidaikis ates naka Abiner Keburon."
2Samuel5:1 Kosodete atekerin kere nuka Isirael aponare mama ejai Daudi Keburon, kotemasi atiar, “Koany, kirai isio akoitikon ka akirinikon."
2Samuel5:2 Kapakio nuatuboros nakeraar Saul ekabakawok, ibu ijo kitoloma kitolom da Isirael: abu EJAKAIT kotema jo atiar, ‘Itanyamenenei ijo ikatuŋa Isirael, iraun ijo ekapolon koIsirael.’”"
2Samuel5:3 Kwaŋin kopotu imakio kere luka Isirael mama ejai ekabaka Keburon; kitutuk ekabaka Daudi kakes koKeburon kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: kinyonyoikis Daudi akinyet araun ekabaka koIsirael.
2Samuel5:4 Kerai Daudi loka ikar akaisauni naageunia airum, kirumak ikar akaisaoŋon."
2Samuel5:5 Kirum Yuda koKeburon ikar ikanykaarei ka ilapio ikanykape: kirum Isirael kere ka Yuda koYerusalem ikar akaisauni ka luuni.
2Samuel5:6 Kolot ekabaka ka ituŋake Yerusalem aitiji Iyebusin, ikulepek akwap: luapotu kolimokis Daudi ebe, “Mam ilomuni ne dimarai kilema ijo imudukiok ka iŋwalasik.” Koomito ebe, “Mam Daudi epedori alomun ne,”"
2Samuel5:7 Konye kirum Daudi ere loabwaitai kagogoŋ loka Sion; ŋes ere loka Daudi.
2Samuel5:8 Kotema Daudi kapaaran kaŋin ebe, “Ŋolituŋanan loedanyi Iyebusin, kodoka neeleleete akip, kodany iŋwalasik ka imudukiok lualait etau loka Daudi.” Ŋes etemariata ebe, “Mam imudukiok ka iŋwalasik epedorete alomar togo.”"
2Samuel5:9 Kiboikin Daudi ore loebwaitai kagogoŋ, komaik ŋes ere loka Daudi. Koduk Daudi airimor anyoun koMilo kotoma da."
2Samuel5:10 Kiyatanakin Daudi apoloor; naarai ajai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ajoresio, kaŋes."
2Samuel5:11 Kijuka Kiram ekabaka loka Turo ikiyakia mama ejai Daudi, ka ikito luka eres, ka ikekeok, ka ikadukok kamor; kodukokis Daudi etogo,"
2Samuel5:12 Kojen Daudi ebe abu EJAKAIT kiticat ŋes araun ekabaka koIsirael, abu da kitopoloo ajakanutuke kanuka iketuŋa Isirael."
2Samuel5:13 Komany Daudi acebusian ka aŋor ace koYerusalem, kedau anyoun koKeburon: kourikinai Daudi icedwe lusap ka lupesur."
2Samuel5:14 Lu kes ikiroria luka ŋul kaluaponi kourikinai ŋes koYerusalem; Samua, ka Sobab, ka Natan, ka Solomon."
2Samuel5:15 Ka Ibar, ka Elisua, ka Nepeg, ka Yapia;"
2Samuel5:16 ka Elisama ka Eliada, ka Elipelet."
2Samuel5:17 Kepuput Ipilisitian ebe enyonyoikis Daudi akinyet araun ekabaka koIsirael, koloto Ipilisitian kere amoot Daudi; kopup Daudi, kijesar ore loabwaitai."
2Samuel5:18 Apotu Ipilisitian kisiarakinos kaditot naka Repaim,"
2Samuel5:19 Kiŋit Daudi EJAKAIT ebe, “Alosi kereka eoŋ aitiji Ipilisitian? Kijaikini ijo kes akanika?” Kotema EJAKAIT Daudi atiar, “Kolot, naarai abeit ejaikini Ipilisitian akanikon.”"
2Samuel5:20 Kobu Daudi Baal-perasim, kodany Daudi kes kanen; kotema atiar, “Acil EJAKAIT lukasurupoka kakonyeneka, kwape eciliata akip.” Ŋes amaikinere aibois ŋin Baal-perasim."
2Samuel5:21 Kinyeis aputosiakec kanen, koyaŋaasi Daudi ka ituŋake."
2Samuel5:22 Kopotu bobo Ipilisitian, kisiarakinos aditot naka Repaim."
2Samuel5:23 Nakiŋisia Daudi EJAKAIT, kotema atiar, “Mam ilosi: kirimo kaukec, kobunoki kes kaneejaas ikito luka baka."
2Samuel5:24 Ejaun kwanata ebe, Kipup ijo eporoto loka lueraeete alosit kokuju kikito luka baka, kosodi konyet anyoun: naarai kapak kaŋipe kaŋin ŋes alomaria EJAKAIT kakonyenekon aidany ajore naka Ipilisitian.”"
2Samuel5:25 Kiswama Daudi kwaŋin, kwape ecorakinia EJAKAIT; kodany Ipilisitian anyoun koGeba kiton neidolio Geser."
2Samuel6:1 Kotukonok bobo Daudi ituŋa kere luseuna luka Isirael, ilukumin akaisauni."
2Samuel6:2 Konyou Daudi, kolot nepepe kituŋa kere luajaas kaŋes, anyoun koBaale-Yuda, ayaun kanen asaduku naka Edeke, naenyaritai Ekiror, ŋes ekiror loka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio loiboikin okerubin."
2Samuel6:3 Kibwaikis asaduku naka Edeke agali nakitetet, kitolomut kotogo loka Abinadab loajai oukot: kireŋeata odwe luka Abinadab Usa ka Akio agali ŋin nakitetet."
2Samuel6:4 Kitolomut kotogo loka Abinadab loajai oukot kasaduku naka Edeke: kiŋarenik Akio asaduku.
2Samuel6:5 Koram Daudi ka ekek kere loka Isirael iponesio kere luka lueruos lueswamatai kakito, ka adeudeun, ka isabulin, ka isiman, ka ikacwi, ka aisinin nueruosi kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
2Samuel6:6 Nakedolioto kesi opejal loka Nakon, korio Usa akekan neejai asaduku naka Edeke, kikam ŋes; naarai apotu kiguikis imoŋin."
2Samuel6:7 Kinep anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin Usa; kinom Edeke ŋes kanuka aibucareteke; kotwanik nen eiduny kasaduku naka Edeke.
2Samuel6:8 Kokadak Daudi, naarai acil EJAKAIT Usa: komaik aibois ŋin Peres-Usa, kiton lolo."
2Samuel6:9 Kokurianar Daudi EJAKAIT kapaaran kaŋin; kotema atiar, “Ikonakini ai asaduku naka EJAKAIT ebuni mama ajai?”"
2Samuel6:10 Koŋer Daudi alemar asaduku naka EJAKAIT ayaun ore loka Daudi; konye kodaka Daudi ŋes awai togo loka Obed-edom Egitit.
2Samuel6:11 Kosalak asaduku naka EJAKAIT togo loka Obed-edom Egitit ilapio iuni: kisirereŋ EJAKAIT Obed-edom ka eketogo kere.
2Samuel6:12 Kolimokinai ekabaka Daudi ebe, “Esirereŋ EJAKAIT etogo loka Obededom, ka lukejaatar kaŋes kere, kanuka asaduku naka Edeke.” Kolot Daudi koyau asaduku naka Edeke kotogo loka Obed-edom kitoloma ore loka Daudi kaiyalama."
2Samuel6:13 Kojaun kwanata ebe, nakelosioto ŋul luadakete asaduku naka EJAKAIT ailameta akanykape, koinak emoŋ ka yenikasiepai."
2Samuel6:14 Kikosi Daudi kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT kagogoŋuke kere; konap Daudi epod loka ebaputa.
2Samuel6:15 Kwaŋin koyau Daudi ka ekek kere loka Isirael asaduku naka EJAKAIT, keibwoŋ, ka eporoto loka arupepe."
2Samuel6:16 Kojaun kwanata ebe, kelom asaduku naka EJAKAIT ore loka Daudi, koŋolia Mikal akoku naka Saul kadirisa, koany ekabaka Daudi esomanari ikosie kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT; komwan ŋes kotauke."
2Samuel6:17 Kitolomut asaduku naka EJAKAIT, kibwaikis aiboisike, kidiŋ owema loebubukinit Daudi kanukeŋ: koinak Daudi ainakineta nuicweio ka ainakineta nuka ainapakin kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
2Samuel6:18 Kedau Daudi ainakin ainakinet naicweio ka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, kilipak ituŋa arereŋ kokiror loka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio,"
2Samuel6:19 Kokorak ituŋa kere, ŋes ekodet kere loka Isirael, ikiliok ka aŋor da, ŋinituŋanan emugati ka aturosit naka akiriŋ, ka aluŋuret naka imusabibun luaokito. Kwaŋin koloto ituŋa kere ŋinituŋanan togoke."
2Samuel6:20 Kosodi Daudi aboŋor ailipakin lukokaleke arereŋ, Kolom Mikal akoku naka Saul airiamakin kaŋes, kotema atiar, “Ibus ca lolo ekabaka loka Isirael, loetodiar lolo kakonyen nuka akejaanakinak nuka ikejaanakinakake, kwape itodiaror ediopet kotuŋa luutai komam ileicikinit!”"
2Samuel6:21 Kotema Daudi Mikal atiar, “Ajai akonyen nuka EJAKAIT, lokaseuni eoŋ aitelekar papakon, ka ekekike kere, adakakin eoŋ araun ekapolon ayait ituŋa luka EJAKAIT, ayait Isirael, ŋes ekosioo eoŋ akonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
2Samuel6:22 Ido eyatakini bobo araun lomam kayoŋitai, loasilior kakonyeneka; konye kayoŋete eoŋ akejaanakinak ŋun nuilimit ijo.”"
2Samuel6:23 Amamei Mikal akoku naka Saul ikoku kiton apaaran naatwania.
2Samuel7:1 Kosodi kanen, kiboikin ekabaka togoke, nakisiyeŋunia EJAKAIT ŋes kama ejaas lukasurupoke lualukunito,"
2Samuel7:2 Kotema ekabaka enabi Natan ebe, “Koany, eboie eoŋ kotogo loka ikito luka eres, konye iboie asaduku naka Edeke kotoma aigalisio.”"
2Samuel7:3 Kotema Natan ekabaka atiar, “Kolot, kiswama kere nuejaas otaukon; naarai ejai EJAKAIT kajo.”"
2Samuel7:4 Kosodi kanen, kakuare kaŋin, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Natan ebe,"
2Samuel7:5 “Kolot kolimok Daudi ekakejaanakinan ebe, ‘Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Idukokini kereka ijo eoŋ etogo loeboieneno?"
2Samuel7:6 Naarai mam eoŋ eboikino togo ageun kapaaran naetolomunia idwe luka Isirael koMisiri, kiton lolo, konye alosenenei kowema, kowema lokalaunan da."
2Samuel7:7 Kaiboisio kere nualosenen kidwe luka Isirael, abu eoŋ kener akirot kateker adiopet naka Isirael, nuecorakini aitanyam ikatuŋa Isirael ebe, “Kanukinyo mam yes kidukokiniata eoŋ etogo loka eres?”"
2Samuel7:8 Aso do kolimok Daudi ekakejaanakinan kwanata ebe, ‘Inera EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kwanata ebe, Abu kalem jo korony, katupit amerekekin, tetere iraun ekapolon ayait ikatuŋa, ayait Isirael."
2Samuel7:9 Ajaenena kajo kama ilosenenei kere, amudia lukasurupokon kere kakonyenekon; etuluori jo ekiror lokapolon, kwape ekiror loka lukapolok kaluejaas kakwap."
2Samuel7:10 Aseikini ikatuŋa Isirael aibois, eraikini kes, tetere iboiete aiboisikec, komam bobo itwobosete; komam bobo idwe luka aronis iticanete kes, kwape lem sek."
2Samuel7:11 Kwape kapaaran naecorakinia eoŋ ikatubok ayait ikatuŋa Isirael; esiyeŋuni jo kama ejaas lukasurupokon kere, Bobo da kilimokini EJAKAIT jo ebe kisubakini EJAKAIT jo ekek."
2Samuel7:12 Kedoloto apaarasiakon, ijotori kalukapapaakon, adakakini aurikon naetupakini, naelomuni kakoikikon, eticasi da ajakanutuke."
2Samuel7:13 Ŋol ŋes edukokini ekakiror etogo, eticasi eoŋ eicoloŋ loka ajakanutuke ikar kere."
2Samuel7:14 Araun eoŋ papake, ŋes da eraun okokuka; arai kiswama ŋesi numam adolit, alecori ŋes kebela loka ituŋa, ka ainomonom naka idwe luka ituŋa."
2Samuel7:15 Konye mam akaitim enyouni kamake, kwape kalemaria kaneejai Saul, loabu kalema kakonyenekon."
2Samuel7:16 Itogogoŋio ekekikon ka ajakanutukon ikar kere kakonyenekon: iticasio eicoloŋokon loka ajakanut ikar kere.”
2Samuel7:17 Kwape ejaatar akiro ŋun kere, kwape ejaar aitapoet ŋin kere, kolimok Natan Daudi kwaŋin."
2Samuel7:18 Kosodi Daudi ekabaka alomar, kiboikin kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT; kotema atiar, “Eoŋ iŋai, wu EJAKAIT Edeke, ekakek da inyo, ijo aitodolun eoŋ kiton kwana?"
2Samuel7:19 Kerai ŋin da akirot naedit kakonyenekon, wu EJAKAIT Edeke; konye iner ijo da nuka ekek loka ekejaanakinanikon kokar luipu noi luepote; ŋin da kopone loka ituŋa, wu EJAKAIT Edeke!"
2Samuel7:20 Inyo bobo epedori Daudi alimokin jo? Naarai ijeni ekonikejaanakinan, wu EJAKAIT Edeke."
2Samuel7:21 Iswama ijo apolou na kere, kanuka akonikirot, kwape ejaar ekonitau, aitejenun ekejaanakinanikon."
2Samuel7:22 Ŋes ipoloor ijo, wu EJAKAIT Edeke: naarai emamei yeneputos kajo, emamei da Edeke ece dimarai ijo, kwape kejaatar kere nukipou keirasi kakosiki."
2Samuel7:23 Ani bo ateker adio kakwap naeputos kikonituŋa, kes Isirael, luabu Edeke kolot alakun kanuke araun iketuŋa, adumakin ŋes ekiror, ka aswam nukos kanukus, kakiro nusogim kanuka akonikwap, kakonyen nuka ituŋakon luibu kolaku koMisiri kanukon, katekerin kodekesiokec da?"
2Samuel7:24 Ibu kitieat kanukon ikonituŋa Isirael araun ituŋakon ikar kere; ka jo da EJAKAIT, ibu koraun Edekekec."
2Samuel7:25 Wu EJAKAIT Edeke akirot naibu kolim naka ekonikejaanakinan ka ekekike, kitogogoŋ ijo ŋes ikar kere, kiswama kwape kilimokinia."
2Samuel7:26 Kitopolooroi ekonikiror ikar kere ebe, ‘EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ŋes Edeke loka Isirael’: iticasio ekek loka ekonikejaanakinan Daudi kakonyenekon."
2Samuel7:27 Naarai ijo, ‘wu EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael, ipukokinit ekonikejaanakinan ebe, ‘Adukokini jo ekek’: kanuka ŋun etitiŋior ekonikejaanakinan kotauke ailip ailipasit na mama ijai."
2Samuel7:28 Wu EJAKAIT Edeke, irai ijo Edeke, akonikiro da eraas nukabeit, isumunik ekonikejaanakinan akirot ŋin naejok:"
2Samuel7:29 Aso do kitoiok ijo aisirereŋ ekek loka ekonikejaanakinan, kiyatanakinenei kakonyenekon: naarai ijo, wu EJAKAIT Edeke, inera ŋun: kisireren ekek loka ekejaanakinanikon karereŋukon ikar kere.”"
2Samuel8:1 Kosodi kanen akaulo kanuŋ, kodany Daudi Ipilisitian, kipiko kes: koyaŋa Daudi aitiŋet kore lokapolon kakan naka Ipilisitian."
2Samuel8:2 Kodany Moab, kitirian kaitemis, kiteperik kes kwap; kitirian ikokoron iarei aario, ido kitajar ekokoro ediopet, Koraut Imoabin ikejaanakinak luka Daudi, koyaut ainakineta."
2Samuel8:3 Kitoji da Daudi Kadadeser okoku loka Rekob, ekabaka loka Soba, nakelosio ainyakun ayaiteke kOcor."
2Samuel8:4 Kolema Daudi kamake ikebwanenok elukumit ka akwat akanykaarei, ka lualosete kakeje ilukumin akaisaarei: kitwaŋal Daudi ibalasin kere luka agalin, konye kiŋadak kakes akwatat."
2Samuel8:5 Kepotu Isurian luka Damasiko aisigalikin Kadadeser ekabaka loka Soba, kodany Daudi Isurian ilukumin akaisaarei ka luarei."
2Samuel8:6 Kosodi Daudi aibwaikin atukon nuka iserikalen Suria loka Damasiko: koraut Isurian ikejaanakinak luka Daudi, koyaut ainakineta. Koinak EJAKAIT Daudi aipikor kama kelosenenei kere."
2Samuel8:7 Koŋat Daudi ibukui luka esabu luajaas kikejaanakinak luka Kadadeser, koyau kes Yerusalem,"
2Samuel8:8 Koŋat Daudi aisinit naepol noi koBeta ka Berotai, ireria luka Kadadeser."
2Samuel8:9 Kepupu Toi ekabaka loka Kamat ebe adany Daudi ajore kere naka Kadadeser,"
2Samuel8:10 Kosodi Toi aijukar Yoram okokuke mama ejai ekabaka Daudi ayogan ŋes, ailipakin ŋes arereŋ, naarai etijiit Kadadeser, adany da; naarai abu Kadadeser kitijiite Toi. Koina Yoram iboro luka epuesa ka iboro luka esabu, ka iboro luka aisinit."
2Samuel8:11 Ŋul da abu Daudi kotiakak EJAKAIT, nepepe kepuesa ka esabu luatiakenenei luka atekerin kere nuepikori."
2Samuel8:12 Luka Suria, ka luka Moab, ka luka idwe luka Amon, ka luka Ipilisitian, ka luka Amalek, ka luŋatuna luka Kadadeser, okoku loka Rekob, ekabaka loka Soba."
2Samuel8:13 Kodum Daudi ekiror nakeboŋunia kaidany Isurian kAditot naka Abalaŋ, kes ituŋa ilukumin itomon ka lukanykauni."
2Samuel8:14 Kibwaik atukon nuka iserikalen Edom; kibwaik atukon nuka iserikalen anatar Edom kere, koraut Idomein ikejaanakinak luka Daudi. Koinak EJAKAIT Daudi aipikor kama kelosenenei kere."
2Samuel8:15 Kirum Daudi Isirael kere; kitodolenenei Daudi itubesia ka nuetenito kotuŋake kere.
2Samuel8:16 Kopolokinite Yoab okoku loka Seruia ajore; kerai Yekosapat okoku loka Akilud ekesiitonokinan:
2Samuel8:17 Sadok okoku loka Akitub, ka Akimelek okoku loka Abiatar kes keraas isasedotin; kerai Seraia ekalani;"
2Samuel8:18 Kopolokinite Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada Ikeretin ka Ipeletin; keraas odwe luka Daudi isasedotin.
2Samuel9:1 Kotema Daudi atiar, “Ejai idio yenideuna yenikokek loka Saul, ketodik ŋes asianut kanuka Yonatan?”"
2Samuel9:2 Kejai ekejaanakinan kotogo loka Saul ekekiror Siba, konyaraunai mama ejai Daudi; kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Irai ijo Siba?” Kotema atiar, “Ŋes ekonikejaanakinan.”"
2Samuel9:3 Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Eriŋa ejai idio yenideuna yenikokek loka Saul, ketodik ŋes asianut naka Edeke?” Kotema Siba ekabaka atiar, “Ejai okoku loka Yonatan, loeŋwalito akejeke.”"
2Samuel9:4 Kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Ai bo ejai ŋesi?” Kotema Siba ekabaka atiar, “Koany, ejai togo loka Makir okoku loka Amiel, koLo-debar.”"
2Samuel9:5 Kosodi ekabaka Daudi aijukar, koomai ŋes kotogo loka Makir okoku loka Amiel, koLo-debar."
2Samuel9:6 Kobu Mepiboset, okoku loka Yonatan, okoku loka Saul, mama ejai Daudi, kibirokin ebuburia, kisuded. Kotema Daudi atiar, “Mepiboset,” Koboŋok ebe, “Koany ekejaanakinanikon!”"
2Samuel9:7 Kotema Daudi ŋes atiar, “Sirikuriana: naarai abeit ketodik eoŋ jo asianut kanuka Yonatan papakon, kenyakakini jo alup kere nuka Saul papaakon; inyamenenei ijo atap komesaka tiritir.”"
2Samuel9:8 Kisuded, kotema atiar, “Inyo bo ekonikejaanakinan, ijo asesen ekiŋok lokatwan kwape keoŋ?”"
2Samuel9:9 Kosodi ekabaka anyaraun Siba ekejaanakinan loka Saul, kotema ŋes atiar, “Ainak okoku loka ejakaitikon kere lukolo araas luka Saul ka etogoke kere."
2Samuel9:10 Ikorionokini ŋes alup, ijo ka odwekon, ka ikejaanakinakakon; iinununei iraan, tetere edumuni okoku loka ejakaitikon atap naenyami: konye enyamenenei Mepiboset okoku loka ejakaitikon atap komesaka duc.” Ajaas Siba odwe itomon ka lukany, ka ikejaanakinak akaisaarei."
2Samuel9:11 Kosodi Siba atemar ekabaka atiar, “Kwape ejaatar kere nueeorakini ekajakait ekabaka ekejaanakinanike, iswamai ekejaanakinanikon kwaŋin.” Kobala ekabaka ebe, “Konye Mepiboset, enyamenenei ŋesi komesaka, kwape ediopet kodwe luka ekabaka.”"
2Samuel9:12 Kejai Mepiboset okoku losapat, ekekiror Mika. Kere lueboienenete kotogo loka Siba araas ikejaanakinak luka Mepiboset."
2Samuel9:13 Kwaŋin kiboienenei Mepiboset ko Yerusalem; naarai konyamenenei duc komesa loka ekabaka; eŋwalito akejeke kere.
2Samuel10:1 Kosodi kanen akaulo kanuŋ, kotwana ekabaka loka idwe luka Amon, kirum Kanun okokuke aiboisike."
2Samuel10:2 Kotema Daudi atiar, “Ketodikini Kanun okoku loka Nakas asianut, kwape ketodikinia papake eoŋ asianut.” Kwaŋin kijuka Daudi ikejaanakinakake aitalakar ŋes kanuka papake. Kopotu ikejaanakinak luka Daudi akwap naka idwe luka Amon."
2Samuel10:3 Konye apotu ikapolok luka idwe luka Amon kotemasi Kanun ejakaitikec atiar, “Iwomit ijo ebe eyoŋit Daudi papakon, aijukakini jo lukitalakarete? Mam kereka Daudi kijukakinit jo ikekejaanakinak airere ere, ka airot ŋes, ka amudiar?”"
2Samuel10:4 Koyaŋa do Kanun ikejaanakinak luka Daudi, kobaren atutubet naka ipenekakec, kotuboto ikecenapen kokidiŋ, kiton oosikec, kotwara kes."
2Samuel10:5 Kosodi kelimokin Daudi ŋun, kijuka airiamakin kakes; naarai eleicikinito noi ituŋa, Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Kopaikis Yeriko aitodol neecekuniata ipenekakus, kosodete konyet aboŋun,”"
2Samuel10:6 Nakeanyuniata idwe luka Amon ebe arokiata kesi kama kaDaudi, kijukasi idwe luka Amon kiboleikis kIsurian luka Bet-rekob, ka Isurian luka Soba, lualosete kakeje ilukumin akaisaarei, ka ekabaka loka Maaka kaituŋa elukumit, ka ituŋa luka Tob ilukumin itomon ka luarei."
2Samuel10:7 Kepupu Daudi, kijuka Yoab, ka ajore kere naka ituŋa lukirigin."
2Samuel10:8 Kolomut idwe luka Amon, kiderakinos ejie korute: kejaas Isurian luka Soba, ka luka Rekob, ka ituŋa luka Tob ka Maaka, bonik korony."
2Samuel10:9 Nakeanyunia Yoab ebe ejai ejie kiŋarcn kokau da, koseu ituŋa kere luaseunitai koIsirael, kiderak kes aitiji Isurian:"
2Samuel10:10 Kititiŋ Abisai onaceke ituŋa ice kere, kiderak kes aitiji idwe luka Amon."
2Samuel10:11 Kotema atiar, “Arai keetelekasi Isurian eoŋ, kosodi ijo aisigalikin eoŋ: konye arai kiitelekasi idwe luka Amon jo, kasodi eoŋ abunore aisigalikin jo"
2Samuel10:12 Kotitiŋior, ketodiasi ekiliokone kanuka ituŋawok, ka ireria luka Edekewok: kiswama EJAKAIT nuitojokit ŋesi.”"
2Samuel10:13 Kikunyak do Yoab ka ituŋa lukejaas kaŋes aitiji Isurian: kokerata kakonyeneke.
2Samuel10:14 Keanyut idwe luka Amon ebe akerata Isurian, kokerata kesi da kakonyen nuka Abisai, kolomasi ore. Kosodi Yoab aboŋun kama kidwe luka Amon kobu Yerusalem."
2Samuel10:15 Keanyut Isurian ebe epikor kes kakonyen nuka Isirael, kotukonokinos."
2Samuel10:16 Kijuka Kadadeser, kitolomut Isurian luajaas okekwa juwai kecor; kopotu Kelam, kinareŋikinite kes Sobak ekapolon loka ajore naka Kadadeser."
2Samuel10:17 Kolimokinai Daudi; kotukonok Isirael kere, kodok Yorodan kobu Kelam. Kiderakinos Isurian aitiji Daudi, kojioto kaŋes,"
2Samuel10:18 Kokerata Isurian kakonyen nuka Isirael; koara Daudi luka Isurian, ituŋa luka agalin akwat akanykaarei, ka ikebwanenok ilukumin akaisaoŋon, kinom Sobak ekapolon loka ajorekec, kotwanik nen."
2Samuel10:19 Keanyutu ikabakan kere luaraas ikejaanakinak luka Kadadeser ebe epikor kes kakonyen nuka Isirael kitutukoto ka Isirael nukainapakin, kijaanakis kes. Kwaŋin kokuriakaros Isurian aisigalikin bobo idwe luka Amon."
2Samuel11:1 Kosodi kanen, kedolu ekaru, kapak naalomariata ikabakan ejie, kijuka Daudi Yoab, ka ikekejaanakinak nepepe kaŋes, ka Isirael kere; komudiasi kesi idwe luka Amon, kirigaut Raba. Konye kosalak Daudi Yerusalem."
2Samuel11:2 Kosodi kanen eboŋ, konyou Daudi kaperitike, kosakasak koswi loapadalal loka etogo loka ekabaka: koswi koany aberu iloŋi; ajokuna noi aberu asesen."
2Samuel11:3 Kijuka Daudi kiŋit nuka aberu. Kolimokinai ebe, “Mere ŋin Bat-seba, akoku naka Eliam, aberu naka Uria Ekitit?”"
2Samuel11:4 Kijuka Daudi ikiyakia, koyaŋa ŋes; kolom ŋin mama ejai ŋesi, kopero kaŋes; (naarai aponi kitesegaarai ŋin kanumam alauniteke;) koboŋo togoke."
2Samuel11:5 Kopotuu aberu; kijuka alimokin Daudi, kotema atiar, “Kija eoŋ kakoik.”"
2Samuel11:6 Kijuka Daudi mama ejai Yoab ebe, “Kijukakinai eoŋ Uria Ekitit.” Kijuka Yoab Uria mama ejai Daudi."
2Samuel11:7 Kedolu Uria neejai ŋesi, kiŋit Daudi ŋes kwape ajaar Yoab, ka ituŋa, ido kwape ajaar ejie."
2Samuel11:8 Kotema Daudi Uria atiar, “Kolot togokon, kilota akonikeje.” Konyou Uria kotogo loka ekabaka, kotupitere ŋes akorakinet naka inyamat luainakini ekabaka ŋes."
2Samuel11:9 Konye koper Uria okek loka etogo loka ekabaka nepepe kikejaanakinak kere luka ejakaitike, mam abu kolot togoke,"
2Samuel11:10 Kelimokin Daudi ebe, “Mam Uria abu kolot togoke.” Kotema Daudi Uria atiar, “Mam jo iboŋunit kalosit? Inyo bo mam jo ilosio togokon?”"
2Samuel11:11 Kotema Uria Daudi atiar, “Iboie asaduku, ka Isirael, ka Yuda koswamin; idukurito ejakaitika Yoab, ka ikejaanakinak luka ejakaitika ais; alomari kereka eoŋ togoka ainyam, ka aimat, ka apero kaberuka? Kwape ijaria ijo, kwape ejaria ekonitau da, mam eswamai kwaŋin.”"
2Samuel11:12 Kotema Daudi Uria atiar, “Kosalak ne lolo da, katwari jo moi.” Kwaŋin kiboi Uria koYerusalem apaaran ŋin ka apaaran nace da."
2Samuel11:13 Kenyarau Daudi ŋes, konyam komat kakonyeneke; kitemer ŋes; koloma eboŋ aper aperitike nepepe kikejaanakinak luka ejakaitike, konye mam abu kolot togoke."
2Samuel11:14 Kosodi kanen tupuruc kiwadik Daudi ebalua mama ejai Yoab, kijuka kakan naka Uria,"
2Samuel11:15 Kiwadikate ŋes toma obalua ebe, “Kibwaikis Uria kiŋaren neededeŋiar ejie, kosodete yesi ajalakin ŋes, tetere inomio, kotwana.”"
2Samuel11:16 Kosodi kanen, kirere Yoab ere, kibwaik ŋesi Uria aibois naajeni ŋesi ebe ajaas ituŋa luatitiŋ,"
2Samuel11:17 Kolomut ituŋa lukore, kojioto kaYoab: kibiroros ituŋa ice luka ikejaanakinak luka Daudi; kotwana da Uria Ekitit."
2Samuel11:18 Kosodi Yoab aijukar alimokin Daudi akiro kere nuka ejie;
2Samuel11:19 Kicor ekiyakia ebe, “Kidau ijo alimokin ekabaka akiro kere nuka ejie,"
2Samuel11:20 Arai enyunyura ekabaka, etemari ŋesi jo atiar, ‘Kanukinyo ilosioto yesi eiduny ka ere aitiji? Mam ipotu kojenut ebe epedorete kesi aigum yes ejaas arwatat?"
2Samuel11:21 Iŋai bo enomi Abimelek okoku loka Yerubeset? Mam aberu abu kocakak ŋes atapen karwatat tetere etwanikini Tebes? Kanukinyo ilosioto yesi eiduny karwatat?’ Ŋes konyet itemaria ebe, ‘Atwana da Uria Ekitit ekejaanakinanikon.’”"
2Samuel11:22 Kolot do ekiyakia, kobu kolimok Daudi kere nuejukaritor Yoab ŋes."
2Samuel11:23 Kotema ekiyakia Daudi atiar, “Kitelekasi ituŋa sio, kolomakis sio kokiŋa ais, kajioto isio kakes kiton alomaret naka erute."
2Samuel11:24 Kogumata ikagumak ikonikejaanakinak ejaas arwatat; kotwakata ice kokejaanakinak luka ekabaka, kotwana da Uria Ekitit ekonikejaanakinan.”"
2Samuel11:25 Kosodi Daudi atemar ekiyakia atiar, “Ilimokini do Yoab kwanata ebe, ‘Kinyek akirot ŋin aitakadikin jo, naarai ejwenyari ekileŋ yen ka ii da: kitogogoŋ ekonijie asurokin ere, kotiyaik da’: kisidik ijo ŋes.”"
2Samuel11:26 Kepupu aberu naka Uria ebe atwana Uria okilenike, kokuudian okilenike."
2Samuel11:27 Kedaun asuban, kijuka Daudi koyaŋa ŋes togoke, koraun akeberu, kourik ŋes ikoku yenisapat. Konye kitakadik EJAKAIT akirot naeswamai Daudi."
2Samuel12:1 Kijuka EJAKAIT Natan mama ejai Daudi. Kobu ŋesi mama ejai, kotema ŋes atiar, “Ajaas ituŋa iarei toma ore ediopet; abarit ediopet, kicana loce."
2Samuel12:2 Ajaas ekabaran isipanin luipu noi luka aituk ka amerekekin:
2Samuel12:3 Konye amamei lokican ibore, dimarai amerekek adiopet nakalol, naagweli ŋesi, kitan da: kopoloor nepepe kaŋes ka ikedwe; komorete kaŋes ikenyamat luikidioko, komasete kaikopoke, koperi katorobuke, kosubite bala erai akokuke."
2Samuel12:4 Kobu ekaloton mama ejai ekabaran, mam abu koyaŋa yenikosipaninike luka aituk ka luka amerekekin apuikin ekaloton loabu kobu mamake, konye koyaŋa imerekek yenika lokican, kopuik etuŋanan loabu kobu mamakeŋ.”"
2Samuel12:5 Kinep noi anyunyura naka Daudi aluikin etuŋanan; kotema ŋesi Natan atiar, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, etuŋanan loeswamai ŋun ibusakinit atwanare,"
2Samuel12:6 Egeli imerekek irwan aoŋon, naarai abu kiswama akirot ŋin, ido naarai mam abu kitim.”"
2Samuel12:7 Kotema Natan Daudi atiar, “Ijo ŋes etuŋanan ŋol. Inera EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, kwanata ebe, ‘Abu eoŋ kenyonyoik jo akinyet araun ekabaka loka Isirael, abu kayu jo kakan naka Saul:"
2Samuel12:8 Abu kainak jo etogo loka ejakaitikon, aŋor da nuka ejakaitikon katorobukon, kainak jo ekek loka Isirael ka loka Yuda; arai kiikadito ŋul, tikeyatakinit jo ice bobo."
2Samuel12:9 Kanukinyo imwaŋia akirot naka EJAKAIT, aswam nueroko kakonyeneke? Inom ijo Uria Ekitit kekileŋ, iyaŋa aberuke araun akoniberu, iara ŋes kekileŋ loka idwe luka Amon."
2Samuel12:10 Aso do mam enyouni ekileŋ kokekikon; naarai imwaŋ ijo eoŋ, iyaŋa aberu naka Uria Ekitit araun akoniberu.’"
2Samuel12:11 Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Koany, etonyoikini jo aronis kotogokon, ayaŋaari aŋorokon kakonyenekon, ainakini kes mama ejai eidunyetekon, eperete ŋes kaŋorokon paaran kaitebeikin."
2Samuel12:12 Naarai iswama ijo kaiyeiyea: konye eswamai eoŋ akirot ŋin kakonyen nuka Isirael kere paaran kaitebeikin.’”
2Samuel12:13 Kotema Daudi Natan atiar, “Adiaka kama ejai EJAKAIT.” Kotema Natan Daudi atiar, “Alema da EJAKAIT adiakaretekon; mam jo itwani."
2Samuel12:14 Konye naarai iinak lukasurupo luka EJAKAIT amoromor kanuka aswamisioit ŋin, abeit etwani ikoku yenikiwurikinitai jo.”"
2Samuel12:15 Kolot Natan togoke, Kinom EJAKAIT ikoku yenaurikini aberu naka Uria Daudi, kodekakin noi."
2Samuel12:16 Kanuka ŋun kiŋaiŋa Daudi Edeke kanuka ikoku: kikany Daudi eteŋei, koloma, koper kalup, akuare kia."
2Samuel12:17 Konyout imakio lukotogoke, kobwaata kosiepike, aitonyoun ŋes kokwap: konye koŋer, mam da abu konyam atap kakes."
2Samuel12:18 Kosodi kanen, kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei kotwana ikoku. Kokuriakata ikejaanakinak luka Daudi alimokin ŋes ebe atwana ikoku; naŋrai kobalas ebe, “Koany, naarinar ikoku ejari, kinera oni kaŋes, mam abu kopup iporotoiwok: ikwaikini lolo ai ŋesi erieba, arai kilimokini ŋes ebe atwana ikoku?”"
2Samuel12:19 Konye keanyu Daudi ebe iyeiyeanakinos ikejaanakinakake, kojenik Daudi ebe atwana ikoku: kotema Daudi ikekejaanakinak atiar, “Atwana ikoku?” Kotemasi kesi atiar, “Atwana ŋesi.’"
2Samuel12:20 Kosodi Daudi anyoun kokwap, kiloŋ, kinyonyoik akinyet, kijul anapitoke; koloma togo loka EJAKAIT, koma: kosodi aboŋor togoke: kekotokin atap kibwaikis akonyeneke, konyam."
2Samuel12:21 Kosodete ikekejaanakinak atemar ŋes atiar, “Anyoika nu nuiswama? Naarinar ikoku ejari ikany ijo eteŋei komony kanuka ikoku; konye naatwania ikoku, inyou, inyam atap.”"
2Samuel12:22 Kotema atiar, “Naariŋar ikoku ejari, abu kekany eteŋei, kamony: naarai abala ebe, ‘Iŋai bo ejeni motoko esiana EJAKAIT mamaka, tetere eiari ikoku?’"
2Samuel12:23 Konye do atwana, kanukinyo ekanyia bobo eteŋei? Apedori ainyakun ŋes bobo? Alosi eoŋ rwaru mamake, konye mam ŋes eboŋuni mamakaŋ.”"
2Samuel12:24 Kipud Daudi Bat-seba akeberu, koloma mamake, koperoto kaŋes: kouru ikoku yenisapat, komaik ekekiror Solomon. Komina EJAKAIT ŋes;"
2Samuel12:25 Kijuka akirot konabi Natan, komaik ekekiror Yedidia, kanuka EJAKAIT."
2Samuel12:26 Kitiji Yoab Raba loka idwe luka Amon, koyaŋa ere loka ekabakane."
2Samuel12:27 Kijuka Yoab ikiyakia mama ejai Daudi kotema atiar, “Etiji Raba, eebo, ayaŋa eoŋ ere loka akipi."
2Samuel12:28 Aso do kotukok ituŋa ice luesalito, kidukur asurokin ere, koyaŋa ŋes: kenyek eoŋ ayaŋaar ere, komaikinai ekakiror.”"
2Samuel12:29 Kotukonok Daudi ituŋa kere, kolot Raba kitiji, kirum,"
2Samuel12:30 Kolem ŋesi aboko naka ekabakakec kakouke; alaŋiruke atalat naka esabu, kejaas amor nuka akais nuipu tomake: kitanapikinai akou naka Daudi. Kitolom luŋatuna luka ere luipu noi."
2Samuel12:31 Kitolom da ituŋa lukejaas nen, kibwaik kes kwap kimusemenin, kwap kasua nuboket, kwap kaepei nuka asua, kitotor kes neecweere amatapalin: kiswamak ireria kere luka idwe luka Amon kwaŋin, Koboŋo Daudi ka ituŋa kere Yerusalem."
2Samuel13:1 Kosodi kanen, kokau kaŋun, ajai Abisalom okoku loka Daudi inaeike naetemelel, ekekiror Tamar; komina Aminon okoku loka Daudi ŋes."
2Samuel13:2 Kokadak Aminon kwaŋin abu kodekakin kanuka inacike Tamar; naarai arai ŋesi abekot; kotionik Aminon aiswamakin ŋes akirot.
2Samuel13:3 Konye ajai Aminon epaperoke, ekekiror Yonadab, okoku loka Simea onaee loka Daudi: kopiriana Yonadab noi."
2Samuel13:4 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Wu okoku loka ekabaka, kanukinyo isenyitor ijo ŋinipaaran? Mam jo ilimokini eoŋ?” Kotema Aminon ŋes atiar, “Amina eoŋ Tamar, inaci naka onaceka Abisalom.”"
2Samuel13:5 Kotema Yonadab ŋes atiar,” Koper kaperitikon, kijoseik bala ideka: kebu papakon aanyun jo kotema ŋes atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, kisiik inacika Tamar abunore, kainak eoŋ atap kanyam, kitemok inyamat kakonyeneka, tetere aanyuni, kanyam kakanike.’’’"
2Samuel13:6 Koper do Aminon kijoseik bala edek: kebu ekabaka aanyun ŋes, kotema Aminon ekabaka atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, kisiik Tamar inacika abunore, aipoikin eoŋ imugatin iarei kakonyeneka, tetere anyami kakanike.”"
2Samuel13:7 Kosodi Daudi aijukar ore neejai Tamar ebe, “Kolot togo loka onacekon Aminon, kipoik ŋes inyamat.”"
2Samuel13:8 Kwaŋin kolot Tamar togo loka onaceke Aminon; koper ŋesi, Kotem aluŋuren kinyoŋ, kiswama imugatin kakonyeneke, kope imugatin."
2Samuel13:9 Kolem aiwowas kobukok kes akonyeneke; konye koŋer ŋesi ainyam. Kotema Aminon atiar, “Kolomasi ituŋa kere kiŋa.” Koloma ŋiniluŋanan kaneejai."
2Samuel13:10 Kotema Aminon Tamar atiar, “Koyau inyamat agola, tetere anyami kakanikon.” Koyaŋa Tamar imugatin luabu ŋesi kopeite, koyau kes agola neajai Aminon onaeeke."
2Samuel13:11 Naesukunyunia kes mama ejai ainyam, kikam ŋes, kotema atiar, “Bia kaperoto keoŋ, inacika.”"
2Samuel13:12 Koboŋok ŋesi ebe, “Mam, onaceka, sirikiitiŋaik eoŋ; naarai mam akirot ŋin ibus aswam koIsirael: sirikiswama nuka abaŋaanut ŋun."
2Samuel13:13 Eoŋ da, aibo ayaŋaari ileicika? Ijo da, iraun kwape ediopet kalubaŋiok koIsirael. Aso, keŋaiŋait, kilip ekabaka; naarai mam ŋes eŋeri aikor eoŋ mamakon.”"
2Samuel13:14 Konye koŋer ŋesi apupun ekeporoto: konye kanuagogoŋor, kitiŋaik ŋes, kiteper ŋes."
2Samuel13:15 Kosodi Aminon aila ŋes kaila kanaepol noi; naarai aila naalait ŋesi kodeparite amin naabu komina ŋes, Kotema Aminon ŋes atiar, “Konyou, kolot.”"
2Samuel13:16 Kotema nin ŋes ebe, “Mere kwaŋin, naarai aronis na naepol aireŋear eoŋ erono noi adeparit ŋin naibu kiswamak eoŋ.” Konye koner apupun ŋes."
2Samuel13:17 Kosodi aiworoun ekekejaanakinan loejaanakini ŋes, kotema atiar, “Kitoloma aberu na kaneaiai, koenik ekek kokauke.”"
2Samuel13:18 Anapit nin anapito naka ejese loegelegela: naarai atapitos adwe nuka ekabaka nuaraas abekon anapit inapen luka epone kaŋol. Kosodi ekekejaanakinan aitolomun ŋes kiŋa, koenik ekek kokauke."
2Samuel13:19 Kipurak Tamar ekurwon akouke, kocilieil akenapito naka ejese kaloegelegela naanapit ŋesi: kibwok akanike, kolot, kiluluei elosi."
2Samuel13:20 Kobala Abisalom onaeeke ŋes atiar, “Ajai Aminon onaeekon kajo? Konye do kililin inacika: ŋes onacekon; sirikibwaik akirot na otau.” Kosalak Tamar esilikinit kotogo loka onaceke Abisalom."
2Samuel13:21 Konye nakepupu ekabaka Daudi akiro ŋun kere, konyunyurikin noi."
2Samuel13:22 Mam Abisalom abu kiner nuejok karaida nueroko mama ejai Aminon: naarai alait Abisalom Aminon, naarai abu kitiŋaik inacike Tamar."
2Samuel13:23 Kosodi kanen ketuboros ikar iarei, ajaas Abisalom ikatubok ajul nuka amerekekin koBaal-kasor, loedunyas ka Epuraim: konyarau Abisalom odwe kere luka ekabaka."
2Samuel13:24 Kobu Abisalom mama ejai ekabaka, kotema atiar, “Koany, ejaas ekejaanakinanikon ikatubok ajul nuka amerekekin; keŋaiŋait, kouparos ekabaka kikejaanakinakake ka ekejaanakinanikon.”"
2Samuel13:25 Kotema ekabaka Abisalom atiar, “Mam, okokuka, mam kilosi kere, kenyeis alaŋirikin jo.” Kimaima noi: konye koŋer alosit, konye kilipak ŋes arereŋ."
2Samuel13:26 Kosodi Abisalom atemar atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, arai mam, kisiik onaceka Aminon alosit kasio.” Kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Kanukinyo elosio ŋesi kajo?”"
2Samuel13:27 Konye kimaima Abisalom noi, kisiik Aminon ka odwe kere luka ekabaka alosit kaŋes."
2Samuel13:28 Kicorak Abisalom ikekejaanakinak ebe, “Aso kocoito naelakaror etau loka Aminon kanuka ebino; ido nakalimokinia yes ebe,, Kinomata Aminon,’ koara ŋes, sirikikuriakaros.”"
2Samuel13:29 Kiswamakis ikejaanakinak luka Abisalom Aminon kwape kicorakinia Abisalom. Kosodete odwe kere luka ekabaka anyoun, kibwanen ŋolituŋanan enyubuke, kokerata."
2Samuel13:30 Kosodi kanen, napelosete, kobu eemut mama ejai Daudi ebe, “Aar Abisalom odwe kere luka ekabaka, mam ediopet kakesi ideuna.”"
2Samuel13:31 Kosodi ekabaka anyoun, kocilicil akenapito koper kokwap; kobwaata ikekejaanakinak kere kocilieilito inapenekee."
2Samuel13:32 Koboŋok Yonadab, okoku loka Simea onace loka Daudi ebe, “Kinyek ejakaitika aomit ebe aarata ikatumunak kere odwe luka ekabaka; naarai Aminon bon etwanit; naarai apeleikinit Abisalom ŋin ameun kapaaran kaya naetiŋaikinia ŋesi inacike Tamar."
2Samuel13:33 Aso do kinyek ejakaitika ekabaka aibwaikin akirot ŋin otauke, aomit ebe atwakata odwe kere luka ekabaka: naarai Aminon bon etwanit.”"
2Samuel13:34 Konye koker Abisalom. Abu ekatumunan loabeit aidar kiteluo akekonyen kosesen, ido koany, eponito ituŋa luipu korot lokosiep loka eukot kokauke."
2Samuel13:35 Kotema Yonadab ekabaka atiar, “Koany, eponito odwe luka ekabaka: kwape abalar ekejaanakinanikon, ikote nepenen.”"
2Samuel13:36 Kosodi kanen, kedau ŋesi einer, koany, eponito odwe luka ekabaka, kodelosi, komonyata: komony ekabaka da noi ka ikekejaanakinak kere."
2Samuel13:37 Konye koker Abisalom, kolot mama ejai Talumai okoku loka Amikur, ekabaka loka Gesur, Kitururwenenei Daudi kanuka okokuke ŋinipaaran."
2Samuel13:38 Koker Abisalom, kolot Gesur, kiboi kanen ikar iuni."
2Samuel13:39 Kimuite etau loka ekabaka Daudi alosit mama ejai Abisalom: naarai epudunio kanuka Aminon, naarai atwana."
2Samuel14:1 Kojen Yoab okoku loka Seruia ebe imuit etau loka ekabaka Abisalom.
2Samuel14:2 Kijuka Yoab Tekoa, koomai kaŋina aberu naaco, kotema ŋes atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, kijoseik bala irai naibworo, konap anapito naka aibworo, keŋaiŋait, sirikinyonyoik akinyet, konye koraun kwape aberu naedaunit apak naepol ibworo yenikatwan;"
2Samuel14:3 Koloma mama ejai ekabaka, kiner kaŋes kopone kalo.” Kolimok Yoab ŋes nuenera."
2Samuel14:4 Nakinerar aberu naka Tekoa kekabaka, kibirokin kwap ebuburia, kisuded, kotema atiar, “Kiŋarakinai, wu ekabaka.”"
2Samuel14:5 Kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Inyo bo itururwoo ijo?” Koboŋok ebe, “Abeit arai eoŋ apuserut, atwana okilenika."
2Samuel14:6 Ajaas akejaanakinanikon odwe iarei, kojioto kesi kais, komamei yenadieki kes, konye kinom ediopet loce, koar ŋes."
2Samuel14:7 Ido koany, anyoiki ekek kere aluikin akejaanakinanikon, kobalas ebe, ‘Kijaik ŋol loenomi onaceke, tetere kiari ŋes kanuka aijar naka onaceke loaari ŋesi,’ komudiasi ekeruman da: kwaŋin kitudeŋoto atotoleteka naedeuna, komam ideikinete okilenika ekiror karaida yenedeuna kakwap.”"
2Samuel14:8 Kotema ekabaka aberu atiar, “Kolot togokon, ecorakini eoŋ nukon.”"
2Samuel14:9 Kotema aberu naka Tekoa ekabaka atiar, “Ejakaitika, wu ekabaka, kabeikis eoŋ ka ekek loka papaka numam adolit: komameun ekabaka ka eicoloŋoke akirot.”"
2Samuel14:10 Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Ŋol lokilimokini jo akirot kere, koyau ŋes mama ajai, komam bobo ŋes kitirori jo.”"
2Samuel14:11 Kosodi ŋin atemar atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, kiitu ekabaka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kinye ekenyaŋan aokot amudiar bobo, kinyeis amudiar okokuka.” Kotema atiar, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, mam edouni kwap etimat ediopet loka okokukon.”"
2Samuel14:12 Kosodi aberu atemar atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, kisiik akejaanakinanikon einer akirot mama ejai ejakaitika ekabaka.” Kotema atiar, “Kolim.”"
2Samuel14:13 Kotema aberu atiar, “Kanukinyo inerunia akirot ŋin aluikin ituŋa luka Edeke? Naarai kanuka einer akirot ŋin esubit ekabaka bala loegwaunit akirot, naarai mam ekabaka itoboŋunit ore lokeŋ loereŋearitai."
2Samuel14:14 Naarai kibusakinit atwanare, kisubit bala akipi nuebukoros kwap numam epedorete bobo atukonokin; mam Edeke da elemari aijar, konye eomoomoi eipone, kinyek ekakeran araun loereŋearitai eut kamakeŋ."
2Samuel14:15 Aso do abu eoŋ einer akirot na mama ejai ekajakait ekabaka, naarai ketukurianata ituŋa eoŋ; abala akejaanakinanikon ebe, ‘Enera kwana kekabaka; motoko itodoli ekabaka nuelipit akejaanakinanike."
2Samuel14:16 Naarai epupuni ekabaka, ayuun akejaanakinanike kakan naka etuŋanan loekoto amudiar eoŋ ka okokuka anyoun kairumet naka Edeke.’"
2Samuel14:17 Kosodi akejaanakinanikon atemar atiar, ‘Keŋaiŋait, koraun akirot naka ejakaitika ekabaka naelakara’: naarai esubit ejakaitika ekabaka bala emalaika loka Edeke, apupun nuejok ka nueroko: kojai EJAKAIT Ekonideke kajo.”"
2Samuel14:18 Kosodi ekabaka aboŋokin aberu ebe, “Keŋainait sirikimunonik naakoto aiŋit jo.” Kotema aberu atiar, “Kiner ekajakait ekabaka.”"
2Samuel14:19 Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Ejai akan naka Yoab kajo kakiro nu kere?” Koboŋok aberu atiar, “Kwape ejaria ekonitau, ejakaitika ekabaka, emamei yenepedori aibelokin teten arai kediany kaŋun kere nuener ejakaitika ekabaka: naarai ekejaanakinanikon Yoab ŋes abu kecorak eoŋ, abu ŋesi kalimok akiro ŋun kere nuener akejaanakinanikon:"
2Samuel14:20 Abu Yoab ekejaanakinanikon kiswama akirot ŋin aijulakin akirot: eco ejakaitika, kwape ejaar acoa naka emalaika loka Edeke, aijen akiro kere nuejaas kakwap.”"
2Samuel14:21 Kotema ekabaka Yoab atiar, “Koany, eswama eoŋ ŋun: aso kolot, kinyak esapat Abisalom.”"
2Samuel14:22 Kibirokin Yoab kwap ebuburia, kisuded, kilipak ekabaka arereŋ: kotema Yoab atiar, “Ejeni lolo ekejaanakinanikon ebe adum eoŋ asianut kakonyenekon, ekajakait, wu ekabaka, naarai etodol ekabaka nuelipit ekejaanakinanike.”"
2Samuel14:23 Konyou Yoab kolot Gesur, koyau Abisalom Yerusalem,"
2Samuel14:24 Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Kopaa ŋesi togoke, konye kinyek aanyun akonyeneka.” Kopaa Abisalom togoke, komam eanyunit akonyen nuka ekabaka."
2Samuel14:25 Amamei koIsirael yeneturitoi kwape Abisalom kanuka atemeleleke: ageun kotau loka akejeke kiton osiaduk loka akouke amamei ŋes akemer.
2Samuel14:26 Nakebarenio ŋesi akouke, (abu kobarenenei kaŋetakinet naka ŋolikaru: naarai alaŋirikinito ŋes itimake, ŋes abarenenio:) kitem alaŋiru naka itima luka akouke isekelin akwat aarei kwape ejaar emisani loka ekabaka."
2Samuel14:27 Aponi kourikinai Abisalom idwe iuni lusap ka ikoku idiopet yenipese, ekekiror Tamar: arai ŋin aberu naetemelel."
2Samuel14:28 Kiboie Abisalom koYerusalem ikar iarei, mam abu koany akonyen nuka ekabak.,"
2Samuel14:29 Kosodi Abisalom anyaraun Yoab aijukar ŋes mama ejai ekabaka; konye koŋer abunore mama ejai: konyarau ŋes bobo nakiareit, konye koŋer Yoab abunore."
2Samuel14:30 Kanuka ŋun kotema ŋesi ikekejaanakinak atiar, “Koany, emanikor loka Yoab idunyas kalokaŋ, ejaas ŋes kesairi kaŋina: koloto kicweikis kakim.” Kosodete ikejaanakinak luka Abisalom aicweikin emanikor kakim."
2Samuel14:31 Kosodi Yoab anyoun, kobu mama ejai Abisalom togoke, kotema ŋes atiar, “Kanukinyo eeweikiniata ikonikejaanakinak emanikorika kakim?”"
2Samuel14:32 Koboŋok Abisalom ebe, “Koany, abu kanyarau jo ebe, ‘Kobia, keyakia jo mama ejai ekabaka aiŋit ŋes ebe, “Kanukinyo abunio eoŋ koGesur? Tiejok kamakaŋ karai kariŋa eoŋ ajai ŋina.” Aso do kisiikinai eoŋ kaany akonyen nuka ekabaka; arai ejaas numam adolit kotomakaŋ, kaar ŋesi eoŋ.’”"
2Samuel14:33 Kobu Yoab mama ejai ekabaka, kolimok ŋes: kedau anyaraun Abisalom, kobu ŋesi mama ejai ekabaka kokukum kokwap kakonyen nuka ekabaka: konu ekabaka Abisalom."
2Samuel15:1 Kosodi kanen kokau kaŋun, kitemonok Abisalom agali ka ibalasin, ka ituŋa akaisakany akerit kiŋarenike."
2Samuel15:2 Kodilonokini Abisalom anyoun, kobwoenenei kawai naka erute: kosodi do arai ejai etuŋanan nuewosai nutikibusakinit ayaŋaar mama ejai ekabaka atubokinio, iworouni Abisalom ŋes, kotema atiar, “Lokore kali bo ijo?” Kotema atiar, “Erai ekejaanakinanikon loka adiopet katekerin nuka Isirael.”"
2Samuel15:3 Kotema Abisalom ŋes atiar, “Koany, ejok akonikiro edolitos da; konye emamei etuŋanan loadakaki ekabaka akiirar jo.”"
2Samuel15:4 Bobo da kotema Abisalom atiar, “Arai karai eoŋ ekatubon kakwap, tetere ebuni ŋolituŋanan loewosai arai loejai akirot mamakaŋ, tiatubokini ŋes kotenan!”"
2Samuel15:5 Kosodi arai kikunyaki ituŋanan aisuded kakonyeneke, korio ŋesi akanike, kikam ŋes, konu."
2Samuel15:6 Kiswamak Abisalom kwaŋin luka Isirael kere luaponenenete mama ejai ekabaka atubokinio: kwaŋin kiŋala Abisalom itauon luka ituŋa luka Isirael.
2Samuel15:7 Kosodi ketuboros ikar akaisaoŋon, kotema Abisalom ekabaka atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, kisiikinai kalot aitae aiyapositika naeyapoikinit EJAKAIT, koKeburon."
2Samuel15:8 Naarai kiyapo ekejaanakinanikon aiyaposit naajaar Gesur koSuria ebe, ‘Arai keenyaka EJAKAIT eoŋ bobo Yerusalem, kasodi aijaanakin EJAKAIT.’’’"
2Samuel15:9 Kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Kolot inapakina.” Konyou ŋesi, kolot Keburon,"
2Samuel15:10 Konye kijuka Abisalom ikarotak anatar atekerin kere nuka Isirael ebe, “Naiirariata eporoto loka arupepe, itemarete ebe, ‘Abisalom ŋes ekabaka koKeburon.’’’"
2Samuel15:11 Koloto ituŋa akwat aarei nepepe ka Abisalom anyoun koYerusalem, luanyaritai, lualosete kitenara itauonokec; komam ejenete idiobore."
2Samuel15:12 Naainakinia Abisalom asuban, abu konyarau Akitopel Egilonit, ekapetan akiro nuka Daudi, anyoun koreke, ŋes Gilo. Kogogoŋ aitemokinet nakaiyeiyea; naarai kiyatanakinos ituŋa duc mama ejai Abisalom,"
2Samuel15:13 Kobu ekiyakia mama ejai Daudi, kobala ebe, “Atupasi itauon luka ituŋa luka Isirael Abisalom.”"
2Samuel15:14 Kotema Daudi ikejaanakinakake kere luajaas kaŋes koYerusalem atiar, “Konyoutu, kakera; arai mam kikeri emamei idiopet kaoni yenekui kaneejai Abisalom: kisunyito alosit, kinyek adolokin oni atipet, kayaun aronis, ka aidany lukore kakwanis naka ekileŋ.”"
2Samuel15:15 Kotemasi ikejaanakinak luka ekabaka atiar, “Koany, itemonokino ikonikejaanakinak aswam kere nueseuni ejakaitika ekabaka.”"
2Samuel15:16 Koloma ekabaka, kotupito lukokaleke kere. Kinyek ekabaka aŋor atomon nuaraas abusian aidar etogo."
2Samuel15:17 Koloma ekabaka, kotupito ituŋa kere; kobwout koBet-merak,"
2Samuel15:18 Kotubonoros ikekejaanakinak kere kamakeŋ; Ikeretin kere, Ipeletin kere, ka Igitin kere, ituŋa akwat akanykape luatupito ŋes anyoun koGat, apotu kesi kotubonoros kakonyen nuka ekabaka."
2Samuel15:19 Kosodi ekabaka atemar Itai Egitit atiar, “Inyo bo kiupar ijo kasio? Koboŋo, kiboioto kekabaka: naarai irai ijo emoit, ido loitwobositai; kobono aiboisikon,"
2Samuel15:20 Naarai napebian ibuni ijo, tikesirimi lolo jo kasio, naarai alosi neapedori? Koboŋo ijo, kinyaka da ikoniinacan; kojaenena aitim ka abeit kajo,”"
2Samuel15:21 Koboŋok Itai ekabaka atiar, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, kwape ejaria da ekajakait ekabaka, abeit kaibois neejai ekajakait ekabaka, arai kanuka atwanare arai kanuka aijar, nepenen da ejaenena ekonikejaanakinan.”"
2Samuel15:22 Kotema Daudi Itai atiar, “Kolot, kotubor.’ Kotubor Itai Bgitit, ka ituŋake kere, ka ludidik kere luajaas kaŋes,"
2Samuel15:23 Komonya lukakwap kere keporoto kaloepol, kotubonoros ituŋa kere: kotubor ekabaka da kaguurut Kiduron, kotuboros ituŋa kere, kobeata erot loka amodiŋ."
2Samuel15:24 Ido koany, kobu Abiatar, kobu Sadok da, ka Ilebin kere, edakito asaduku naka aitutuket naka Edeke; kosipokis asaduku naka Edeke kwap, aitodol neadaunotor ituŋa kere alomun kore,"
2Samuel15:25 Kotema ekabaka Sadok atiar, “Kinyaka asaduku naka Edeke ore: arai kadum asianut kakonye nuka EJAKAIT, kenyakuni ŋesi eoŋ bobo, ketodikini ŋesi eoŋ asaduku ka aiboisike da."
2Samuel15:26 Konye arai kiner ŋesi kwanata ebe, ‘Mam eoŋ kesiyalamikinit jo’; koany, eoŋ lo, keswamak ŋesi eoŋ kwape itojokitor.”"
2Samuel15:27 Kotema da ekabaka Sadok esasedoti atiar, “Mere jo ekadwaran? Koboŋo ore inapakina, ijo ka Abiatar, ka odwekus iarei kayes, Akimaas okokukon, ka Yonatan okoku loka Abiatar."
2Samuel15:28 Koany, edareuni kaneedokarere amodiŋ, aitodol naijukunia ijo aitejenun eoŋ akiro.”"
2Samuel15:29 Aso kodakasi bobo Sadok ka Abiatar asaduku naka Edeke kinyakasi Yerusalem: kiboioto kaŋina.
2Samuel15:30 Kodoka Daudi kaneedokanarere moru loka Iseitun, komonyi edoki; kimukite akouke, kolot komam enapit amuk; ituŋa kere da luajaas kaŋes kimukite ŋinituŋanan akouke, kodokasi, komonyete edokete."
2Samuel15:31 Kolimokinai Daudi ebe, “Ejai Akitopel toma iketemonokinok lukaiyeiyea ka Abisalom.” Kotema Daudi atiar, “Wu EJAKAIT, keŋaiŋait, kibelok ainerun naka Akitopel araun abaŋaanut.”"
2Samuel15:32 Kosodi kanen, kedol Daudi kuju moru neemaenenere Edeke, koany, kobu Kusai Earikit airiamakin kaŋes, kocili! ekootike, kojaas alup akouke."
2Samuel15:33 Kotema Daudi ŋes atiar, “Arai kiupa keoŋ, iraun ijo lokilaŋirikini eoŋ:"
2Samuel15:34 Konye arai kiboŋo ijo ore, ilimokini Abisalom ebe, ‘Araun eoŋ ekonikejaanakinan, wu ekabaka; kwape kolo karaar ekejaanakinan loka papakon, kwana da araun ekonikejaanakinan’: ŋes konyet itapalaunia ainerun naka Akitopel kanukaŋ."
2Samuel15:35 Mam kereka ijaas kaSadok ka Abiatar isasedotin kaŋina? Aso do, akiro kere nuipupuni kotogo loka ekabaka ilimokini Sadok ka Abiatar isasedotin."
2Samuel15:36 Koany, ejaas kes ŋina kodwekec iarei, Akimaas okoku loka Sadok, ka Yonatan okoku loka Abiatar; iyakuunete kes kakiro kere nuipupunete.”"
2Samuel15:37 Aso koloma Kusai opapero loka Daudi ore; koloma Abisalom da Yerusalem.
2Samuel16:1 Ketubor Daudi nediokasilon kokuju moru, koany, kiriamakinos Siba ekejaanakinan loka Mepiboset kaŋes, kopesikinitete asigiria aarei lupetan, kibwokite imugatin akwat aarei, ka aibuŋeta akwatat nuka imusabibun lueokito, ka akwatat nuka araito nuka aiporo, ka eriagi loka emukule loka ebino."
2Samuel16:2 Kotema ekabaka Siba atiar, “Inyoin bo apolou kaŋul? “Koboŋok Siba ebe, “Eraas asigiria nuibwanenete lukokal loka ekabaka; ka imugatin ka araito nuka aiporo luenyamete ikatumunak; ka ebino, loemasete luiiloro kamodiŋ.”"
2Samuel16:3 Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Ali bo okoku loka ejakaitikon?” Kotema Siba ekabaka atiar, “Koany, iboie ŋesi koYerusalem: naarai ebala ebe, ‘Kenyakakini lolo eoŋ ekek loka Isirael ajakanut naka papaka.’’’"
2Samuel16:4 Kosodi ekabaka atemar Siba atiar, “Koany, kere luejaas ka Mepiboset eraas lukon.” Kotema Siba atiar, “Wu okwe! Eyalama kadumununei asianut kakonyenekon, ekajakait, wu ekabaka.”"
2Samuel16:5 Kedol ekabaka Daudi Bakurim, koany, kolom kanen etuŋanan loka ekek loka etogo loka Saul, ekekiror Simei, okoku loka Gera: kolom ŋesi, kilami ŋes elomuni."
2Samuel16:6 Kibiribir ŋesi Daudi kamor, ka ikejaanakinak kere luka ekabaka Daudi; kojaas da ituŋa kere ka ikiliok lukagogoŋ kakanike nakoteten ka nakokediany."
2Samuel16:7 Kiner Simei kwana ilami ebe, “Irwa, irwa, ijo etuŋanan loka aokot, etuŋanan da loka Belial:"
2Samuel16:8 Enyaku EJAKAIT mamakon aokot kere nuka ekek loka Saul loirumi ijo aiboisike: ejaik EJAKAIT ajakanut akan naka Abisalom okokukon: ido koany, ilokok ijo kameŋeranutukon, naarai irai ijo etuŋanan loka aokot.”"
2Samuel16:9 Kosodi Abisai okoku loka Seruia atemar ekabaka atiar, “Kanukinyo ilamia ekiŋok lo lokatwan ekajakait ekabaka? Kisiikinai katubor, keŋaiŋair, kajepa akouke.”"
2Samuel16:10 Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Inyoin bo kimariai eoŋ kayes, yes odwe luka Seruia? Naarai elami, ido naarai abu EJAKAIT kolimok ŋes ebe, ‘Kilam Daudi’; Iŋai bo do etemari ebe, ‘Kanukinyo kiswamaa ijo kwaŋin?’”"
2Samuel16:11 Kotema Daudi Abisai ka ikekejaanakinak kere atiar, “Koany, emoi okokuka loalomuni kakuanaka akaijar: mam kereka epedori Ebenyamit lo adepar? Kinyeis ŋes, kisiikis ŋes eilam; naarai ecoraki EJAKAIT ŋes."
2Samuel16:12 Motoko kosesen EJAKAIT aronis nakeswamakinitai eoŋ, ido katacakini EJAKAIT eoŋ ajokis itia eilamane lo loka lolo.”"
2Samuel16:13 Kosodokis Daudi ka iketuŋa alosit: kitor Simei moru kitiirianikina kaŋes, kilami elosi, kibiribiriei ŋes kamor, kituanakini apua."
2Samuel16:14 Kopotu ekabaka ka ituŋa kere luajaas kaŋes epasito; kikwar kaŋina.
2Samuel16:15 Kobu Abisalom, ka ituŋa kere ikiliok luka Isirael Yerusalem, ka Akitopel da kaŋes."
2Samuel16:16 Kosodi kanen, kedol Kusai Earikit opapero loka Daudi mama ejai Abisalom, kotema Kusai Abisalom atiar, “Kidar Edeke ekabaka, kidar Edeke ekabaka.”"
2Samuel16:17 Kotema Abisalom Kusai atiar, “Erai na asianutukon mama ejai opaperokon? Kanukinyo mam jo iuparotor kopaperokon?”"
2Samuel16:18 Kotema Kusai Abisalom atiar, “Mam; konye loaseu EJAKAIT ka ituŋa lu, ka ikiliok kere luka Isirael, araun eoŋ lokeŋ, eboie eoŋ kaŋes,"
2Samuel16:19 Bobo da, tikejaanak eoŋ iŋai? Mam kereka tikejaanak kakonyen nuka okokuke? Kwape kejaanakinia kakonyen nuka papakon, kwaŋin ajaenena kakonyenekon.”"
2Samuel16:20 Kosodi Abisalom atemar Akitopel atiar, “Kolim cani nuiwomit ijo, kekwaikis ai?”"
2Samuel16:21 Kotema Akitopel Abisalom atiar, “Koloma mama ejaas abusian nuka papakon, nuetasali ŋesi aidar etogo; eirari Isirael kere ebe kila papakon jo: kosodete egogoŋioros akanin nuka ŋul kere luejaas kajo.”"
2Samuel16:22 Kosodete kopesikis Abisalom ewema kuju togo; koloma Abisalom mama ejaas abusian nuka papake kakonyen nuka Isirael kere.
2Samuel16:23 Kosubito aomisio nuka Akitopel nualimununei ŋesi kapaarasia kanun bala naenisia ituŋanan akirot mama ejai Edeke: ekonenenete nen aomisio kere nuka Akitopel mama ejai Daudi ka Abisalom da.
2Samuel17:1 Bobo da kotema Akitopel Abisalom atiar, “Kisiikinai kaseu ituŋa ilukumin itomon kaluarei, anyouni eoŋ arukitori Daudi akuare na:"
2Samuel17:2 Adolokini ŋes kepas, kitegito da akaninike, etukuriani ŋes: ekerete do ituŋa kere luejaas kaŋes; kenomi do ekabaka bon:"
2Samuel17:3 Enyakuni ituŋa kere mamakon: kwape eboŋunia aberu ore mama ejai okilenike. Imoot ijo aiiar naka ediopetuŋanan bon: inapakinos do ituŋa kere.”
2Samuel17:4 Kitojok noi Abisalom akirot ŋin, ka imakio kere luka Isirael."
2Samuel17:5 Kosodi Abisalom atemar atiar, “Konyarakinai cani Kusai Earikit, kapuputu nuenera ŋesi da.”"
2Samuel17:6 Kebu Kusai mama ejai Abisalom, kotema Abisalom ŋes atiar, “Ener Akitopel kwaŋin: kiswamai kereka kwape eneria ŋesi? Arai mere kwaŋin, kiner ijo.”"
2Samuel17:7 Kotema Kusai Abisalom atiar, “Akiro nuener Akitopel apak kana mam ejokuka.”"
2Samuel17:8 Bobo da kotema Kusai atiar, “ljeni ijo papakon ka ituŋake, ebe eraas lukagogoŋok, enyunyurasi kotauonokec, kwape adubu naedemaritai ludidikike kais: erai papakon ekaijot, mam eperete kituŋa."
2Samuel17:9 Koany, eŋopit ŋesi kwape kwana kaipany, arai kaibois ace: kosodi kanen, naegeuniata ice kakesi aibiror, ŋin yenepupi ŋun etemari ebe, ‘Ejai earit otuŋa luetupito Abisalom.’"
2Samuel17:10 Ŋol da loetitiŋ, loesubit etauke bala etau loka eŋatuny, ipirisiar piris; naarai ejeni Isirael kere ebe egogoŋ papakon, ka ŋul da luejaas kaŋes eraas ituŋa lukatitiŋiok."
2Samuel17:11 Konye eoŋ kabala jo ebe kotukokin Isirael kere mama ijai, anyoun koDan kiton Beerseba, kwape asiŋe naejai kariri naka aŋolol kaipues: kolot ijo da elopet ojie."
2Samuel17:12 Kwaŋin kidolokini oni ŋes kaibois neetakanunia, kidoikini ŋes kwape edoioto akopyo kwap: mam kinyeini kaŋes ka ituŋa kere luejaas kaŋes ‘karaida idiopet."
2Samuel17:13 Bobo da, arai keloma ore, ŋes konyet eyauniata Isirael kere aunoi ore ŋol, kiriari ŋes ocor, aitodol naemameunia alicait adiopet kaŋina.”"
2Samuel17:14 Kotema Abisalom ka ituŋa kere luka Isirael atiar, “Ainerun naka Kusai Earikit eteleka ainerun naka Akitopel.” Naarai etemoki EJAKAIT aitapalun ainerun naejok naka Akitopel, tetere eyauni EJAKAIT aronis mama ejai Abisalom,"
2Samuel17:15 Kosodi Kusai atemar Sadok ka Abiatar isasedotin atiar, “Kotema Akitopel kwana kwana mama ejai Abisalom ka imakio luka Isirael: kasodi eoŋ da atemar kwana kwana."
2Samuel17:16 Aso do kijuka atipet, kolimokis Daudi ebe, ‘Sirikiper kakuare kana kaneedokarere amodiŋ, konye kotuboros cut; kinyek ekabaka ailikorio, ka ituŋa kere luejaas kaŋes.’’’"
2Samuel17:17 Kiboioto Yonatan ka Akimaas En-rogel; kolosenenei akejaanakinan alimonokin kes; koloto kesi kolimokis ekabaka Daudi: naarai mam akotos ituŋa aanyun kes elomarete ore.
2Samuel17:18 Konye koany esapat kes, kolimok Abisalom: kiwonyasi kesi kere iarei, kopotu Bakurim togo loka etuŋanan lokejai atan alaroke; kijesaros toma."
2Samuel17:19 Kolem aberu arapetait kopesik da aituk naka atan, koloik akima nuicomom kujuke; mam akirot abu kojenun."
2Samuel17:20 Kopotu ikejaanakinak luka Abisalom mama ejai aberu togo; kotemasi atiar, “Alu bo Akimaas ka Yonatan?” Kotema aberu kes atiar, “Atuboros kaguurut naka akipi.” Kemoata kes, mam apotu kodumutu, koboŋosi Yerusalem."
2Samuel17:21 Kosodi kanen, kedaut alosit, kodokut kesi katan, koloto kolimokis ekabaka Daudi; kotemasi kesi Daudi atiar, “Konyoutu, kiwonyasi kotuboros kakipi: naarai eneru Akitopel kwana aluikin yes.”"
2Samuel17:22 Kosodi Daudi anyoun, ka ituŋa kere luajaas kaŋes, kotuboros koYorodan: kiwala akwap emamei ediopet kakesi loabu kokurwok atubor Yorodan."
2Samuel17:23 Keanyu Akitopel ebe mam ainerunike atupitai, kopetanak lupetan asigiriake, konyou, kolot obukec, oreke, kitemonok eketogo, komiedakin; kotwana, konukai kates naka papake."
2Samuel17:24 Kosodi Daudi abunore Makanaim. Kotubor Abisalom ko Yorodan, ŋes ka ituŋa kere luka Isirael."
2Samuel17:25 Kodakak Abisalom Amasa ayait ajore aibois naka Yoab. Kerai Amasa okoku loka etuŋanan, ekekiror Itira loka Isirael, loalomari mama ejai Abigal akoku naka Nakas, inac naka Seruia totoke ka Yoab."
2Samuel17:26 Kidukuroto Isirael ka Abisalom akwap naka Gilead,"
2Samuel17:27 Kosodi kanen, kebu Daudi Makanaim, apotu Sobi okoku loka Nakas loka Raba loka idwe luka Amon, ka Makir okoku loka Amiel loka Lo-debar, ka Barisilai Egileadit loka Rogelim,"
2Samuel17:28 Koyaut iitadan, ka abesenin, ka amoti nuka elupe, ka akima, ka esairi, ka akiria, ka imumwa luikaworitai, ka imare, ka epone ece loegelara loka alos, ka ekirididi loikaworitai,"
2Samuel17:29 Ka esik, ka akinyet, ka amerekekin, ka ikamonon luka akile lueokito luka aituk, tetere enyamete Daudi ka ituŋa luajaas kaŋes, naarai abalas ebe, “Eriebi eteŋei ituŋa, ilworuna ejakit akur kamodiŋ.”"
2Samuel18:1 Kimar Daudi ituŋa lukejaas kaŋes, kodakanak ijaka luka ilukumin ka ijaka luka akwat."
2Samuel18:2 Kijuka Daudi ituŋa korioŋeta iuni, ediopet akan naka Yoab, ediopet akan naka Abisai okoku loka Seruia, onace loka Yoab, ka ediopet da akan naka Itai Egitit. Kobala ekabaka ituŋa ebe, “Eoŋ da elopet kiupar kayes ojie.”"
2Samuel18:3 Konye kobalas ituŋa ebe, “Mam jo ilosi: naarai kiiker isio mam kipodoi: karaida ketwana atutubetekosi, mam kipodoi: konye jo iriakas kasio ilukumin itomon: aso tiejok jo asalakin ore ikapakina ayuun sio.”"
2Samuel18:4 Kotema ekabaka kes atiar, “Nuitojokata yesi, kes eswamai eoŋ da.” Kobwo ekabaka kawai kerute, kolomete ituŋa kere kakwat ka ilukumin."
2Samuel18:5 Kicorak ekabaka Yoab ka Abisai ka Itai kinera atiar, “Kiyamuyamut etelepat kanukaŋ, ŋes Abisalom.” Kiirasi ituŋa kere naeeorakinia ekabaka ijaka kere akiro nuka Abisalom."
2Samuel18:6 Kosodete kolomasi ituŋa ais ejie ka Isirael; kojau ejie amagoro naka Epuraim.
2Samuel18:7 Kipikoroi kaŋina ituŋa luka Isirael kakonyen nuka ikejaanakinak luka Daudi, kojau aario naepol kapaaran kaŋin naka ituŋa ilukumin akwat aarei."
2Samuel18:8 Naarai kaŋina abu ejie kisiarakin akwap kere: koar amagoro ituŋa luipu kapaaran kaŋin aitelekarit lukeari ekileŋ.
2Samuel18:9 Koturiaikin Abisalom ikejaanakinak luka Daudi. Kibwanenite Abisalom ekenyubu, kitor enyubu kwap katenun nuetumito nuka ekum loepol, kikamakin akou okum, kijeko kokidiŋ akuj ka akwap: korasite enyubu lokibwanenit kinareŋ,"
2Samuel18:10 Kojai etuŋanan lokeanyuni, kolimok Yoab kinera atiar, “Koany, abu kaany Abisalom ijekokino okum.”"
2Samuel18:11 Kotema Yoab etuŋanan lokelimokini atiar, “Koany, ibu ijo koany, kanukinyo kigirio aibirun ŋes kwap? Eoŋ da tikainak jo atutubeta atomon nuka epuesa ka arukan.”"
2Samuel18:12 Kobala etuŋanan Yoab ebe, “Karaida kaainakin atutubeta alukumit nuka epuesa akanika, timam karioo akakan mama ejai okoku loka ekabaka: naarai kipou keirasi kicorakini ekabaka jo ka Abisai ka ltai ebe, ‘Kocoito kereka kinye etuŋanan atiror etelepat Abisalom.’"
2Samuel18:13 Konye tikeswama nakaiŋal aiar akeijar (kwabo emamei akirot naibwaio kama ejai ekabaka), asa tikiŋadaar ijo da olopet.”"
2Samuel18:14 Kosodi kotema Yoab atiar,” Mam apedori aitumor kajo kwaŋin.” Kitiŋ ikojoi iuni kakekan, koremio Abisalom otau, eroko ejari kokidiŋ okum."
2Samuel18:15 Itelepai da itomon lukitiŋenenete lujiis luka Yoab kirigaut kicumucumata Abisalom, koara."
2Samuel18:16 Kokut Yoab arupepe, koboŋut ituŋa kama kerukitotor Isirael naarai kitikok Yoab ituŋa,"
2Samuel18:17 Koyaŋaasi Abisalom, kocakakis aipany nakepol kamagoro, kotukokis kujuke atukot naepol noi naka amor: kosodete kokera luka Isirael kere, ŋinituŋanan owemake."
2Samuel18:18 Ido eroko Abisalom ejari abu kolem epir lokejai aditot naka ekabaka kosipok: naarai enera atiar, “Emamei eoŋ ikoku yeniitununere ekakiror.” Komaik epir ekekiror: ido enyaritai aiitunet naka Abisalom kiton lolo."
2Samuel18:19 Kosodi Akimaas okoku loka Sadok, kobala ebe, “Mere kaker kwape kwana, kaina ekabaka akiro, kwape abu EJAKAIT kitokokolikinio ŋes lukasurupoke.”"
2Samuel18:20 Kobala Yoab ebe, “Mam iyaŋaari akiro lolo, konye iyaŋaari acepaaran; konye lolo mam iyaŋaari akiro, naarai atwana okoku loka ekabaka,”"
2Samuel18:21 Kosodi kobala Yoab Ekusit ebe, “Kolot kolimok ekabaka akiro nuiany ijo.” Kokukokin Ekusit Yoab, kopaari akerit."
2Samuel18:22 Kosodi Akimaas, okoku loka Sadok, kobala bobo Yoab ebe, “Mam akiro, kisiikinai kaker eoŋ da katupa Ekusit.” Kobala Yoab ebe, “Ikakoku, kanukinyo ikotor ijo akerit, naarai mam ibore yenidumuni kaŋina?”"
2Samuel18:23 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Mam akiro, akeri eoŋ.” Kobala ŋes ebe, “Koker bo.” Kosodi koker Akimaas, kitor Apuuton, kilany Ekusit."
2Samuel18:24 Kiboie Daudi kokidiŋ orutei iarei; kodoka eketeon kuju orute loka abwas, kiteluo koŋoleŋol, ido koany, ekeruni etuŋanan bon."
2Samuel18:25 Kiworok eketeon kolimok ekabaka. Kobala ekabaka ebe, “Arai erai ediopet, eyaunit akiro.” Kodiŋirir akerun; koeku die."
2Samuel18:26 Kosodi koany eketeon ecetuŋanan loekeruni: konyarau eketeon ekedaran erute, kobala ebe, “Koany, ecetuŋanan loekeruni bon.” Kobala ekabaka ebe, “Eyaunit ŋesi da akiro.”"
2Samuel18:27 Kotema eketeon atiar, “Aomit eoŋ akerit naka ŋol kaloiŋarenit esubit bala akerit naka Akimaas, okoku loka Sadok.” Kobala ekabaka ebe, “Erai etuŋanan lokajokan, eyaunit akiro nukajokak.”"
2Samuel18:28 Kiworok Akimaas ekabaka, kotema ŋes atiar, “Yoga.” Kisuded kakonyen nuka ekabaka, kinera atiar, “Kituritete EJAKAIT Ekonideke, loepiko ituŋa lukedakakinete akecekanin ekajakait ekabaka.”"
2Samuel18:29 Kobala ekabaka ebe, “Ejai etelepat Abisalom ejok?” Koboŋok Akimaas ebe, “Nakejukunia Yoab ekejaanakinan loka ekabaka, ŋes eoŋ ekonikejaanakinan, abu kaany autaar naepol konye mam abu kajen akiro.”"
2Samuel18:30 Kobala ekabaka ebe, “Komanu, kobwo kane.” Komanu, kobwo."
2Samuel18:31 Ido koany, kobu Ekusit; kobala Ekusit ebe, “Ainunit ekajakait ekabaka akiro: naarai kitokokolik lolo EJAKAIT ediŋet loka ŋul kere lukinyoikinete jo.”"
2Samuel18:32 Kobala ekabaka Ekusit ebe, “Ejai etelepat Abisalom ejok?” Koboŋok Ekusit ebe, “Lukasurup luka ekaiakait ekabaka ka ŋul kere lukinyoikinete jo aikonakin aronis, ekonakis kwape ejaar etelepat ŋol.”"
2Samuel18:33 Kosodi kiturur noi ekabaka, kodoka togo loejai orute, komony akiyo: napelosi kinera kwanata, ebe, “Wu ikakoku Abisalom, ikakoku, ikakoku Abisalom! Karai gwai eoŋ atwanit kojari ijo, wu Abisalom, ikakoku, ikakoku!”"
2Samuel19:1 Aponi kolimokinai Yoab ebe, “Koany emonyi ekabaka ekuudiani Abisalom.”"
2Samuel19:2 Koluor aipikor aibworo mama ejaas ituŋa kere kapaaran kaŋin: naarai kopuput ituŋa ebakai ebe, “ltururwei ekabaka okokuke.”"
2Samuel19:3 Kidaudaununos ituŋa ore kapaaran kaŋin, kwape idaudaunotor ituŋa luirumito ileic naekeriata koile."
2Samuel19:4 Kimuko ekabaka akonyeneke, komony ekabaka keporoto kaloepol ebe, “Wu ikakoku Abisalom, wu Abisalom, ikakoku, ikakoku!”"
2Samuel19:5 Kobu Yoab togo mama ejai ekabaka, kotema atiar, “Itadaka ijo lolo akwes nuka ikejaanakinakakon kere, luapotu kitajarata aijarakon lolo, ka aijar naka ikonidwe lusap ka lupesur, ka aijar naka aŋorokon, ka aijar da naka abusianakon:"
2Samuel19:6 Naarai imina ijo lukilaete jo, ilai da lukiminas jo. Naarai ilimo lolo ijo ebe mam ipodo cut ikapolok ka ikejaanakinak; naarai aany eoŋ lolo ebe, arai kejari Abisalom, ka sio da kere katwakito lolo, tiisiyalamikinit ijo noi."
2Samuel19:7 Aso do konyou, koloma, kitalaka ikejaanakinakakon: naarai eyapoi alimit EJAKAIT ebe arai mam jo ilomari, emamei etuŋanan loiboiete kajo akuare na: ŋin da erono kamakon adepar aronis kere nakidoikinit jo ageun keiditeukon kiton kwana.”"
2Samuel19:8 Kosodi ekabaka anyoun, kiboikin orute. Aponi kolimokinai ituŋa kere ebe, “Koany, iboikin ekabaka orute.” Kopotu ituŋa kere mama ejai ekabaka, Abu Isirael koker ŋinituŋanan owemake."
2Samuel19:9 Kopegas ituŋa kere anatar atekerin kere nuka Isirael atiar, “Kilaku ekabaka oni kakan naka lukasurupowok, kitajar oni kakan naka Ipilisitian; kwana da aker anyoun kakwap kaneejai Abisalom."
2Samuel19:10 Atwaniki Abisalom kojie, lokinyonyoikini akinyet ayait oni. Aso do kanukinyo mam yes ilimunioto akirot ainyakun ekabaka?”"
2Samuel19:11 Kijuka ekabaka Daudi mama ejai Sadok ka Abiatar isasedotin, ebe, “Kolimokis imakio luka Yuda ebe, ‘Kanukinyo iraunotor yesi lukawasia ainyakun ekabaka togoke? Naarai adol akirot naka Isirael kere mama ejai ckabaka, ainyakun ŋes togoke."
2Samuel19:12 Yes ikainacan, yes akoitika, ka akiriŋika; kanukinyo iraunotor yesi lukawasia ainyakun ekabaka?”"
2Samuel19:13 Kolimokis Amasa da ebe, ‘Mam kereka jo irai akoitika ka akiriŋika? Keswamak Edeke eoŋ kwaŋin ka adepar da, arai mam jo iraun ekapolon loka ajore kakonyeneka tiritir aibois naka Yoab.’’’"
2Samuel19:14 Kitukukum itauon luka ituŋa kere luka Yuda, kwape etau loka ediopetuŋanan; kijukasi do mama ejai ekabaka ebe, “Koboŋ, ijo ka ikejaanakinakakon kere.”"
2Samuel19:15 Koboŋ ekabaka kobu Yorodan. Kobu Yuda Giligal, alosit airiamakin kekabaka, aikwanun ekabaka koYorodan.Kobu Yuda Giligal, alosit airimakin kekabaka,aikwaŋun ekabaka ko Yorodan."
2Samuel19:16 Kisunya Simei okoku loka Gera, Ebenyamit lokerai loka Bakurim, kodok nepepe kiluŋa luka Yuda airiamakin kekabaka Daudi."
2Samuel19:17 Kejaas ituŋa elukumit luka Benyamin kaŋes, ka Siba ekejaanakinan loka etogo loka Saul, ka odweke itomon ka lukany ka ikekejaanakinak akaisaarei kaŋes; kitoroto Yorodan akonyen nuka ekabaka,"
2Samuel19:18 Kotubor ataker naerisi aikwaŋar ekal loka ekabaka, aswam da nuitojokit ŋesi, Kibirokin Simei okoku loka Gera akonyen nuka ekabaka naatubunor Yorodan."
2Samuel19:19 Kotema ŋesi ekabaka atiar, “Kinyek ejakaitika aimarakin eoŋ aronis, sirikiitu da epali lokiswamakin ekejaanakinanikon jo kapaaran naalomaria ejakaitika ekabaka koYerusalem, sirikibwaiki ekabaka ŋun otau,"
2Samuel19:20 Naarai ejeni ekejaanakinanikon ebe Adiak eoŋ: aso koany, abu eoŋ lolo karau losodit kotogo kere loka Yosep alosit airiamakin kejakaitika ekabaka.”"
2Samuel19:21 Konye Koboŋok Abisai okoku loka Seruia ebe, “Mam kereka eario Simei kanu elamia loenyonyoikinit EJAKAIT akinyet?”"
2Samuel19:22 Kotema Daudi atiar, “Inyoin bo kimariai eoŋ kayes, yes odwe luka Seruia, yes araun lukasurupoka lolo? Eario kereka idiotuŋanan lolo koIsirael? Mam kereka ajeni ebe arai eoŋ lolo ekabaka loka Isirael?”"
2Samuel19:23 Kotema ekabaka Simei atiar, “Mam jo itwani.” Kiyapoik ekabaka ŋes."
2Samuel19:24 Kobu Mepiboset okoku loka Saul airiamakin kekabaka; mam abu kimadite akejeke karaida abarenit epenekike, karaida ailosit igoeneke, ageun kapaaran naalosio ekabaka aitodol apaaran naaboŋunio ŋesi ore inapakina,"
2Samuel19:25 Kosodi kanen, naabunio ŋesi Yerusalem airiamakin kekabaka, kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Inyo bo kitikokini jo aupar keoŋ, Mepiboset?”"
2Samuel19:26 Koboŋok ŋesi ebe, “Ekajakait, wu ekabaka, keŋalaŋal eoŋ ekejaanakinanika; naarai abala ekejaanakinanikon ebe, ‘Kopetanak lupetan asigiria, kebwanen, kauparos kekabaka’; naarai eŋwalit ekejaanakinanikon,"
2Samuel19:27 Konye abu kosabanak ekejaanakinanikon kaneejai ejakaitika ekabaka; konye erai ejakaitika ekabaka kwape emalaika loka Edeke: aso kiswama nuitojokit ijo.
2Samuel19:28 Naarai keraas lukokek loka papaka kere kwape lukatwak kakonyen nuka ejakaitika ekabaka: konye ibu ijo kodakak ekejaanakinanikon toma kaŋul luanyamete komesakon. Aso apolou anyoin kijaa keoŋ aiyatakin aimony mama ejai ekabaka?”
2Samuel19:29 Kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Kanukinyo iyatakinitor einer akirokon? Abala eoŋ ebe, ‘Kotiakata ijo ka Siba alup.’”"
2Samuel19:30 Kotema Mepiboset ekabaka atiar, “Eebo, koyana ŋesi kere, naarai abu ekajakait ekabaka togoke inapakina.”"
2Samuel19:31 Kobu Barisilai Egileadit koRogelim; kotubor Yorodan kekabaka, aiŋarenikin ŋes koYorodan."
2Samuel19:32 Kemojoŋit Barisilai noi, kerai loka ikar akaisakanykauni: abu koinakinite ekabaka inyamat naajaar ŋesi Makanaim; naarai kerai ŋesi etuŋanan loapol noi."
2Samuel19:33 Kotema ekabaka Barisilai atiar, “Kadokasi keoŋ, ketani eoŋ jo, koYerusalem.”"
2Samuel19:34 Kotema Barisilai ekabaka atiar, “Imwaasi ai apaarasia nuka ikar luka aijaraka, tape eoŋ kilosi kekabaka Yerusalem?"
2Samuel19:35 Arai eoŋ lolo loka ikar akaisakanykauni: apedori kereka atiakun nuejok ka nueroko? Epedori bo ekejaanakinanikon akiir nuanyami ka nuamasi? Apedori bobo akiirar eporoto loka ikiliok lueyeete ka aŋor nueyeete? Aso kanukinyo eraunor ekonikejaanakinan alaŋir mama ejai ekajakait ekabaka?
2Samuel19:36 Edokari bo ekejaanakinanikon Yorodan kekabaka: kanukinyo karopia ekabaka eoŋ keropit loetia nen?
2Samuel19:37 Keŋaiŋait, kisiik ekonikejaanakinan aboŋor bobo, katwanik oreka, ates naka papaka ka totoka, Konye koany, ekejaanakinanikon Cimukam: kodoka ŋesi kejakaitika ekabaka; kiswamak ŋes nuitojokit ijo.”"
2Samuel19:38 Koboŋok ekabaka ebe, “Edokari Cimukam keoŋ, eswamakini ŋes nuitojokit ijo: ŋin da yenikoto ijo kaneajai eoŋ, keswamakini jo ŋin.”"
2Samuel19:39 Kodokasi ituŋa kere Yorodan, kodoka ekabaka da; konu ekabaka Barisilai, kilipak ŋes arereŋ; koboŋo ŋesi aiboisike."
2Samuel19:40 Kodoka ekabaka kiton Giligal, kodoka Cimukam kaŋes: apotu ituŋa kere luka Yuda ka atutubet naka ituŋa luka Isirael kitodokut ekabaka."
2Samuel19:41 Kosodi koany, kopotu ituŋa kere luka Isirael mama ejai ekabaka, kotemasi ekabaka atiar, “Kanukinyo kekokwarotor iinacanawok ituŋa luka Yuda, aitodokun ekabaka ka lukokaleke Yorodan, ka ituŋa kere luka Daudi kaŋes?”"
2Samuel19:42 Koboŋokis ituŋa kere luka Yuda ituŋa luka Isirael ebe, “Naarai erai ekabaka lokokekikosi: aso kanukinyo inyunyuratar yesi kakiro kaŋun? Kinyam kereka isio luka ekabaka kere? Kiinak kereka isio adioinakinet?”"
2Samuel19:43 Koboŋokis ituŋa luka Isirael ituŋa luka Yuda atiar, “Atutubeta atomon nuka ekabaka eraas nukosi, ido kijaa isio kanuipu adepar yes kama kaDaudi: kanukinyo kimwaŋitotor sio, mere ti isio kirai lusodit ainerun ainyakun ekabakawok?” Adedeŋ akiro nuka ituŋa luka Yuda aitelekarit akiro nuka ituŋa luka Isirael."
2Samuel20:1 Kojaun kanen etuŋanan loka Belial, ekekiror Seba, okoku loka Bikiri, Ebenyamit: kokut ŋesi arupepe, kotema atiar, “Emamei oni akorakinet kama kaDaudi, ido emamei oni airumet kotoma okoku loka Yese: koboŋo ŋinituŋanan owemake, wu Isirael.”"
2Samuel20:2 Konyout ituŋa luka Isirael kere katupit Daudi, kotupakis Seba okoku loka Bikiri: konye kiketakinos ituŋa luka Yuda ekabakakec, anyoun koYorodan kiton Yerusalem."
2Samuel20:3 Kobu Daudi togoke Yerusalem; koyaŋa ekabaka aŋor atomon abusianake, nuetasalit ŋesi aidar etogo, kibwaik kes togo loidarere, kokoranak kes inyamat, konye mam abu koloma mamakec. Kogolokinoi kes kiton apaaran naka atwanarekec, iboiete koipuserune."
2Samuel20:4 Kosodi ekabaka atemar Amasa atiar, “Konyarakinai ituŋa luka Yuda kotoma apaarasia auni, ijo da kojaun ne.”"
2Samuel20:5 Aso kolot Amasa anyaraun ituŋa luka Yuda: konye kitumor adepar apak naaseikinitai ŋes.
2Samuel20:6 Kotema Daudi Abisai atiar, “Kwana kiswamakini Seba okoku loka Bikiri oni aronis adepar naeswamakini Abisalom oni: koyaŋa ijo ikejaanakinak luka ejakaitikon korukitor ŋes, kinyek ŋesi adumun ireria luebwaitai, aiku kamawok.”"
2Samuel20:7 Kolomasi ituŋa luka Yoab ka Ikeretin ka Ipeletin ka ituŋa kere lukirigin atupit ŋes; kolomasi koYerusalem, arukoria Seba okoku loka Bikiri."
2Samuel20:8 Kedoloto kesi amoru naapol naajai Gibeon, kobu Amasa airiamakin kakes. Kiridak Yoab inapen luka ejie luanapit ŋesi, kejai arokoba naaenikinitai aŋabetekeŋ kekileŋ lokejai toma akuraruke; napelosi ŋesi kodoi.’"
2Samuel20:9 Kotema Yoab Amasa atiar, “Ejok, onaceka?” Kitiŋ Yoab Amasa kopenekike kakekan nakoteten ainu ŋes."
2Samuel20:10 Konye mam Amasa abu kopodo ekileŋ lokejai akan naka Yoab: kicumia ŋes akoik, kobukoros amoetekake kwap, mam abu kirucak; kotwana, Apotu Yoab ka Abisai onaceke korukioto Seba okoku loka Bikiri."
2Samuel20:11 Kobwo ediopet kokatumunak luka Yoab koapias kaŋes, kotema atiar, “Ŋol loekoto Yoab, ka ŋol da loerai loka Daudi, kotupa Yoab.”"
2Samuel20:12 Koper Amasa kimodumodun kaokotoke kokidiŋ orot. Keanyu etuŋanan ebe abwout ituŋa kere, kodaka Amasa alemar korot aibwaikin ais, kiswapak anapito, keanyu ŋesi ebe apotu kere luetorito nen kobwout."
2Samuel20:13 Kelemari ŋes korot, kiyatakis Ituŋa kere atupar Yoab, arukitor Seba okoku loka Bikiri."
2Samuel20:14 Kitor ŋesi atekerin kere nuka Isirae! kiton Abel, ka Bet-maaka, ka Iberin kere: kotukonokinos kesi da kibwapito ŋes."
2Samuel20:15 Kopotu kirigautu ŋes ka Abel loka Bet-maaka, kitutuoto etut eiduny ka ere koriakas karwatat: apotu ituŋa kere lukejaas kaYoab kitakitakete arwatat atiyaikin."
2Samuel20:16 Kosodi aberu nakacoa aiworo kore ebe, “Kopuputu, kopuputu; keŋaiŋait, kolimokis Yoab ebe, ‘Kikuny, kenerakinos kajo.’’’"
2Samuel20:17 Kikunyak ŋes; kotema aberu atiar, “jo ŋes Yoab?” Koboŋok ebe, “Eoŋ lo.” Kosodi ŋin atemar ŋes atiar, “Kopup akiro nuka akejaanakinanikon.” Koboŋok ŋesi ebe, “Apupi.”"
2Samuel20:18 Kinera ŋesi ebe, “Etapit apeŋo atemar ebe, ‘Abeit iŋisete kesi akiro ka Abel’: kwaŋin kitanaŋete kesi akiro,"
2Samuel20:19 Ajai eoŋ owai kaŋul luinapakina ka lumunon koIsirael: imoot ijo amudiar ere loerai toto koIsirael: kanukinyo ikotor ijo ailikor airumet naka EJAKAIT?”
2Samuel20:20 Koboŋok Yoab ebe, “Madi akuj, madi akuj, eoŋ ailikor arai amudiar."
2Samuel20:21 Mam akiro ikote nen: abu etuŋanan loka akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, ekekiror Seba okoku loka Bikiri, kikeu akekan asurokin ekabaka, ŋes Daudi: kijaik ŋes bon, eoŋ da anyouni kore.” Kotema aberu Yoab atiar, “Koany, eeakunio nat akekou mama ijai karwatat.”"
2Samuel20:22 Kosodi aberu alosit kacoake mama ejaas ituŋa kere. Kojepasi akou naka Seba okoku loka Bikiri, kocakakis Yoab. Kokut ŋesi arupepe, kisiarakinos anyoun kore, ŋinituŋanan owemake. Koboŋo Yoab Yerusalem mama ejai ekabaka."
2Samuel20:23 Koyaite Yoab ajore kere naka Isirael: koyaite Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada Ikeretin ka Ipeletin:
2Samuel20:24 Kitelem Adoram esolo; korai Yekosapat okoku loka Akilud ekesiitonokinan.
2Samuel20:25 Korai Sebua ekalani; koraas Sadok ka Abiatar isasedotin:
2Samuel20:26 Korai da lra Eyairit esasedoti kama ka Daudi.
2Samuel21:1 Kosodi kojau ebeli kapaarasia nuka Daudi, ikar iuni, kaŋolikaru; komo Daudi akonyen nuka EJAKAIT, Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Erai akirot naka Saul, ka ekekike loka aokot, naarai abu koar Igibeonin.”"
2Samuel21:2 Konyarau ekabaka Igibeonin einer kakes; (mam Igibeonin araas luka idwe luka Isirael, konye luka luedeuna luka Imorain; apotu idwe luka Isirael kiyapoikis kes: kokoto Saul aiar kes kekokoteke kanuka idwe luka Isirael ka Yuda)."
2Samuel21:3 Kotema Daudi Igibeonin atiar, “Keswamakinete yes inyo? Aluci da kinyo, tetere ilipakinete airumet naka EJAKAIT arereŋ?”"
2Samuel21:4 Kotemasi Igibeonin ŋes atiar, “Mam erai akirot naka epuesa arai esabu kidiŋikosi ka Saul, ka ekekike; mam da kibusakinit isio aiar ituŋanan koIsirael.” Kotema atiar, “Nuinerasi yesi, keswamakini ŋin.”"
2Samuel21:5 Kotemasi kesi ekabaka atiar, “Etuŋanan loabu kodau sio, loabu kiner asurokin sio, amudiar sio kinyek asalakin koikoruno kere luka Isirael."
2Samuel21:6 Kijaikinai sio ituŋa ikanykaarei lukodweke, kikajakini isio kes mama ejai EJAKAIT koGibea loka Saul eseuna loka EJAKAIT.” Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Kainakinete yes.”"
2Samuel21:7 Konye kideu ekabaka Mepiboset, okoku loka Yonatan, okoku loka Saul, kanuka aiyaposit naka EJAKAIT nakejai kidiŋikec, kidiŋ Daudi ka Yonatan okoku loka Saul,"
2Samuel21:8 Konye koyaŋa ekabaka odwe iarei luka Risipa akoku naka Aia, luaurikinit ŋesi Saul, Arumoni ka Mepiboset; ka odwe ikany luka Mikal akoku naka Saul, luaurikinit ŋesi Aduriel okoku loka Barisilai Emekolatit:"
2Samuel21:9 Kijaik kes akanin nuka Igibeonin, kikajakis kes moru kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kotwaka kesi lukanykaarei kere: koarai kapaarasia nuka aisak, kapaarasia nusodit, kageunet naka aisak esairi."
2Samuel21:10 Koyaŋa Risipa akoku naka Aia egoe loka epuko, kopesik atiiba, kageunet naka aisak aitodol neabukokinotor kes akip nuapote kotoma akuj; mam abu kocamak akweny nuka apak adolokin kes paaran, karaida itiaŋ luka ais kuare."
2Samuel21:11 Aponi kolimokinai Daudi nukiswamai Risipa akoku naka Aia, abusiat naka Saul."
2Samuel21:12 Kolot Daudi koyaŋa akojo nuka Saul ka akojo nuka Yonatan okokuke kaneejaas ituŋa luka Yabes-gilead, luapotu kokokoutu kes korot loka Bet-san, kaibois naekajakiniata Ipilisitian kes, kapaaran nakeariata Ipilisitian Saul koGiliboa,"
2Samuel21:13 Koyau ŋesi kaŋina akojo nuka Saul ka akojo nuka Yonatan okokuke; kotukonokisi da akojo nuka ŋul kaluekajakinitai.
2Samuel21:14 Konukata akojo nuka Saul ka Yonatan okokuke akwap naka Benyamin koSela, ates naka papake Kis: kiswamata kere nuecorakinit ekabaka, Akaulo kaŋun kiira Edeke aiŋaiŋaikinio naka akwap."
2Samuel21:15 Kojioto Ipilisitian bobo kaluka Isirael; kolot Daudi ka ikekejaanakinak kaŋes, kitiji Ipilisitian: kilworun Daudi,"
2Samuel21:16 Abu Isibi-benob, lokerai lokodwe luka ekekososon, alaŋir naka akwarake isekelin akwat auni nuka aisinit, anapit ŋesi ekileŋ lokitetet, koomite ebe eari Daudi."
2Samuel21:17 Konye kisigalik Abisai okoku loka Seruia ŋes, kinom Epilisitiat, koar ŋes. Kosodete ituŋa luka Daudi aiyapoikin ŋes atiar, “Mam bobo jo ilomari kasio ojie, kinyek aitudeŋ atala naka Isirael.”"
2Samuel21:18 Kosodi kanen, kokau kaŋun, kojau bobo ejie ka Ipilisitian koGob: kosodi Sibekai Ekusatit aiar Sap, lokerai lokodwe luka ekekososon,"
2Samuel21:19 Kosodi kojau bobo ejie ka Ipilisitian koGob; koar Elanan okoku loka Yaareoregim Ebet-lekemit Goliat Egitit, koputos amorok naka akwarake bala akitoi naesonyere."
2Samuel21:20 Kosodi kojau bobo ejie koGat, kejai kanen etuŋanan lokaojan, lokejaas ibokor ikanykape kaŋinikan, ka ibokor ikanykape kaŋinikeje, emwaasi ibokoroke akaisaarei ka Iuoŋon; ŋol da aurikinio ekekososon."
2Samuel21:21 Nakemwaŋitor ŋesi Isirael abu Yonatan okoku loka Simei onace loka Daudi koar ŋes,"
2Samuel21:22 Keurikinio ŋul iwoŋon ekekososon koGat; kibiroros kakan naka Daudi kakan da naka ikekejaanakinak.
2Samuel22:1 Kolimok Daudi EJAKAIT akiro nuka ekosio kalo kapaaran naayuunia EJAKAIT ŋes kakan naka lukasurupoke kere, kakan da naka Saul."
2Samuel22:2 Kotema atiar, “EJAKAIT ŋes atiibaka, ka akabwas, ekayuunanika, lokaŋ obe;"
2Samuel22:3 Edeke loka atiibaka, amunokina ŋes; Ebukuka, amumwarat naka akaitajario, Akaŋopis naicelelei, neakereanari; Eketajaranika, ijo kitajari eoŋ kotoma akale."
2Samuel22:4 Eworoi eoŋ EJAKAIT, loibusakinit aiturio; Ketajareneneo kwaŋin kama kalukasurupoka."
2Samuel22:5 “Karapiasi eoŋ akailan nuka atwanare, Ketukuriana eoŋ akalele nuka numam ayoŋit Edeke."
2Samuel22:6 Kerimorito aunoi nuka Okatwak: Kepoka iica luka atwanare.
2Samuel22:7 “Keworo EJAKAIT kotoma ocanika, Eebo, keworo mama ejai Edekeka: Abu kiira ekaporoto koyekaluke, Kodolok aimonyoka akiike."
2Samuel22:8 “Kosodi kijaŋijaŋa akwap, komarani, Kilokilokos da apeteta nuka akui, Kijaŋijanas, naarai anyunyura ŋesi."
2Samuel22:9 Kisusumau apuru kokumesike, Kidonyo akim nakelomuni kaitukuke: Kisinep atotol."
2Samuel22:10 Kitukukum akuj, kodok; Kojai amuton naejesi ŋaŋ kwap kakejeke."
2Samuel22:11 Kibwanen ekerubi, koporo: Eebo, aponi koanyunai kabebenoka nuka ekwam."
2Samuel22:12 Kituluo amuton iweman luiswaparito ŋes, Atukon nuka akipi, idouon luitolimakinito luka akui."
2Samuel22:13 Kanuka amwekimwek naka akonyeneke, Kineput atotol nuka akim."
2Samuel22:14 Kiretu da EJAKAIT kotoma akuj, Kolimo ŋol loejai kuju kakuj ekeporoto."
2Samuel22:15 Koguma ikekojoi, kisiarisiara; Aimiliaunet, kisiyaloŋoŋ kes."
2Samuel22:16 Kotakanutu da alelesia nuka aŋolol, Kideleleut apeteta nuka akwapin, Kanuka airetakin naka EJAKAIT, Kanuka akutun naka eiyeŋane loka ekumesike."
2Samuel22:17 “Abu kijuk kokuju, kayaŋa; Kegalala kakipi nuipu."
2Samuel22:18 Abu kayu kama kalokasurupoka lokagogoŋ, Kama kakesi da lukalaito; Naarai ketelekarito eoŋ kagogoŋ."
2Samuel22:19 Kabunokis kapaaran naka epolaka; Konye EJAKAIT ŋes ketogogoŋi.
2Samuel22:20 Ido abu ketoloma aibois naelal; Abu kayu eoŋ naarai kesiyalamikinit.
2Samuel22:21 “Karop EJAKAIT eoŋ kwape kejaar akadolit; Katacak kwape ejaar alaunite naka akaninika,"
2Samuel22:22 Naarai abu karic irotin luka EJAKAIT, Ido mam abu kejerukana kama ejai Ekadeke,"
2Samuel22:23 Naarai ajaas itubesiake kere kakonyeneka, Mam abu kanyou da kaneejaas ikisilake,"
2Samuel22:24 Abu karai loadolit kamake, Abu kedara kenyek aswam numam adolit."
2Samuel22:25 Ŋes katacakinia EJAKAIT kwape ejaar akadolit, Kwape ejaar alauniteka kakonyeneke."
2Samuel22:26 “Mama ejai yeniketimon itodianakini aitim: Mama ejai yenikadoliton da itodianakini adolit;
2Samuel22:27 Mama ejai yenesegara itodianakini aseg; Ido mama ejai yenetumaana itodianakini airebokinet.
2Samuel22:28 Naarai itajari ituŋa luemwaŋitai; Konye esesenete akonikonye lueomiara, tetere itisili kes."
2Samuel22:29 Naarai irai ijo atalaka, wu EJAKAIT: Itacauni EJAKAIT akamuton,"
2Samuel22:30 Naarai kanukon arukitor ajore; Ido kanuka aiŋarakinio naka Edekeka elami abwas.
2Samuel22:31 Konye Edeke, edolit ekerot; Egimor akirot naka EJAKAIT; Ŋol ŋes ebuku loka ŋul kere luemunos ŋes,"
2Samuel22:32 “Naarai iŋai bo Edeke dimarai EJAKAIT? Iŋai bo da atiiba dimarai Edekewok?
