2Samuel22:33 Edeke ŋes akabwas naegogoŋ: Iŋarenikini ŋesi ikadoliton,"
2Samuel22:34 Ituluori akekeje kwape nuka amiam: Ido kebwaikini eoŋ aiboisioka nukokuju.
2Samuel22:35 Isisianakini akakanin ejie; Tetere ikesete akakanin akabwa naka aikomon.
2Samuel22:36 Kiinak eoŋ da ebuku loka akoniitajar: Ketopoloo eoŋ aiyapeperakon.
2Samuel22:37 Kitalalik eoŋ neetorit, Mam ejurusiaros akatitiban."
2Samuel22:38 Ebwapit lukasurupoka, amudia kes; Mam abu kaboŋ aitodol neamudiarotor."
2Samuel22:39 Adau kes, ecumucum kes komam epedorete anyoun: Eebo, kibirokinos kwap akejeka."
2Samuel22:40 Naarai ibu kitanapik eoŋ agogoŋ najiis; Itukukum ŋul lukanyoikinete.
2Samuel22:41 Isiboŋik lukasurupoka ikecepuran neajai eoŋ, Tetere amudiari lukalaito."
2Samuel22:42 Apotu kosesenata, konye komameun yenitajari: Mama ejai EJAKAIT, konye mam abu Koboŋok."
2Samuel22:43 Kasodi kepudapud kes bala apua nuka akwap, Keeakacak kes bala erit loka irotin, kesiarak kes,"
2Samuel22:44 “Ibu da koyu eoŋ kotoma aŋolopa naka ikatuŋa; Kituluo ekeŋarenon loka atekerin: Kejaanakinete eoŋ ituŋa lumam lem ajeni.
2Samuel22:45 Kanonokikinete imo: Atipet kepuput nukaŋ karimarete.
2Samuel22:46 Eoliorete imo, Elomunete emaranete kaiboisiokec nuŋopis."
2Samuel22:47 “Ejari EJAKAIT: kituritete atiibaka; Kitopolooritete Edeke loka atiiba naka akaitajario,"
2Samuel22:48 Ŋes Edeke lokenyaŋakini, Ketapatanikini eoŋ ituŋa,"
2Samuel22:49 Kaiyanari eoŋ kama ejaas lukasurupoka; Eebo, kidaka eoŋ kuju kaŋul kalukanyoikinete: Kiyu eoŋ kama ejai ituŋanan yenikakaje."
2Samuel22:50 “Ŋes kemalaenena jo kotoma atekerin, wu EJAKAIT, Ayeenenei aiturit ekonikiror."
2Samuel22:51 Einakini ekabakake aitajar naepol; Itodianakini da nuka asianut-nakamin lokinyonyoikitonoke akinyet, Daudi ka akeur ikar kere.”"
2Samuel23:1 Nu kes akiro nukawasia nuka Daudi. Abu Daudi okoku loka Yese, Etuŋanan da loekeunitai kuju, Loenyonyoikinit Edeke loka Yakob akinyet, Ekayoot da loitojokitai koIsirael kobala ebe:"
2Samuel23:2 “Kiner emoyo loka EJAKAIT kotomakaŋ, Kojaun akirotoke aŋajepeka."
2Samuel23:3 Abala Edeke loka Isirael, Kiner Atiiba naka Isirael keoŋ ebe, Ŋol loeyait ituŋa kadolit, Loeyait kayoŋit naka Edeke,"
2Samuel23:4 Eraun ŋol kwape aica naka tupuruc kelom akoloŋ: Atupuruc naemameatar idouon; Kelom amel kokwap, Kecau kipioror kikwaa akiru."
2Samuel23:5 Abeit mam ekakek esubit kwaŋin mama ejai Edeke; Konye do kitutuk ŋesi keoŋ aitutuket namam edaun, Naitemokino kakiro kere, naiticasitai; Naarai erai aitajarioka kere, ka eimielika kere, Karaida mam itopoloi."
2Samuel23:6 Konye eraunos lumam eyoŋito Edeke kere kwape ikukwa lueremorio, Naarai mam epedorio aitiŋ kakan: Konye etuŋanan loetiŋi kes"
2Samuel23:7 Kibusakinit akapakin kasuat ka amorok naka akwara; Icweikinio kes cut kakim kaiboisikec.”
2Samuel23:8 Lu kes ikiroria luka ituŋa lukirigin lukejaas kaDaudi: Yoseb-basebet Etakemonit, ejakait loka ikapolok; kodaku ŋol akekwara asurokin akwat akanykauni luaari atipet."
2Samuel23:9 Kotupite Eleasar okoku loka Dodai okoku loka Ekokait, ediopet kotuŋa iuni lukirigin luka Daudi, nakemwaŋitotor kesi Ipilisitian lukejaas ŋina etukokina ejie, kolosito ituŋa luka Isirael:"
2Samuel23:10 Konyou ŋesi, kodany Ipilisitian aitodol neetegia akekan, kimakakin akekan okileŋ: kijaik EJAKAIT aipikor naepol kapaaran kaŋin; kobonut ituŋa kodumut ebe asal aijoreun bon."
2Samuel23:11 Kotupite Sama okoku loka Agee Ekararit. Kotukonokinos Ipilisitian korioŋet, nekejai emanikor loeleleba epone ece loka akima; kokerata ituŋa kaneajaas Ipilisitian."
2Samuel23:12 Konye kobwo ŋol kokidiŋ omanikor, kojiu ŋes, koar Ipilisitian: kijaik EJAKAIT aipikor naepol."
2Samuel23:13 Kikokororos iuni kotoma akaisauni lukapolok, kopotu mama ejai Daudi kapak naka aisak, neejai abua naka Adulam; kidukurite erioŋet loka Ipilisitian aditot naka Repaim,"
2Samuel23:14 Kejai Daudi toma abwas, kejai abwas naka iserikalei luka Ipilisitian Bet-lekem."
2Samuel23:15 Kimiela Daudi, kotema atiar, “Arai kainak idiotuŋanan eoŋ akipi aimat nuka atan naka Bet-lekem, naidunyas kerute!”"
2Samuel23:16 Kocila ituŋa luuni lukirigin ajore naka Ipilisitian, kowokut akipi katan naka Bet-lekem, naidunyas kerute, koyaŋas, koinutu Daudi: konye koŋer aimat, konye kiwela mama ejai EJAKAIT."
2Samuel23:17 Kotema atiar, “Madi akuj eoŋ aswam ŋin, wu EJAKAIT: amasi kereka aokot nuka ituŋa lualosito akaŋas naka aijarakec?” Kanuka ŋun koŋer aimat. Kiswamata ituŋa luuni lukirigin akiro ŋun."
2Samuel23:18 Kerai Ablsai onace loka Yoab, okoku loka Seruia, lokapolon loka luuni, Kodaku ŋesi akwarake asurokin akwat auni, koar kes, kodum ekiror kotoma luuni."
2Samuel23:19 Mam ŋes etopolooritai kouni? Kanuka ŋun kitaraunai ekapolonikee: konye mam abu kodolok luuni lusodit.
2Samuel23:20 Benaia da okoku loka Yekoiada, okoku loka etuŋanan loetitiŋ loka Kabuseel, loabu kiswama aswamisio nukagogoŋ, abu ŋesi koar odwe iarei luka Ariel loka Moab: kijesar da koar eŋatuny kokidiŋ aipany kapak naka akako:"
2Samuel23:21 Koar ŋesi Emisiriat, etuŋanan lotemel: kitinite Emisiriat akwara kakanike; konye kolot ŋol mama ejai ŋesi kebela, kodem akwara kakan naka Emisiriat, koar ŋes kakwarake elopet."
2Samuel23:22 Kiswama Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada akiro ŋun, kodum ekiror kotuna luuni lukirigin."
2Samuel23:23 Kitopolooritete ŋes adepar akaisauni, konye mam abu kodolok luuni lusodit. Kodakak Daudi ŋes ayait ikedarakake."
2Samuel23:24 Kerai Asakel onaec loka Yoab ediopet kotoma akaisauni; Elanan okoku loka Dodo loka Bet-Iekem;
2Samuel23:25 Sama Ekarodit, Elika Ekarodit;"
2Samuel23:26 Keles Epalitit, Ira okoku loka Ikkes Etekoit;"
2Samuel23:27 Abieser Enatotait, Mebunai Ekusatit;"
2Samuel23:28 Salumon Ekokait, Makarai Enetopatit;"
2Samuel23:29 Keleb okoku loka Baana Enetopatit, Itai okoku loka Ribai loka Gibea loka idwe luka Benyamin;"
2Samuel23:30 Benaia Epiratonit, Kidai loka aguurun nuka Gaas;"
2Samuel23:31 Abi-alibon Erabatait, Asumabet Ebarumit;"
2Samuel23:32 Eliaba Esaalibonit, odwe luka Yasen, Yonatan;"
2Samuel23:33 Sama Ekararit, Akiam okoku loka Sarar Erarait;"
2Samuel23:34 Elipelet okoku loka Akasibai, okoku loka Emaakatit, Eliam okoku loka Akitopel Egilonit;"
2Samuel23:35 Kesero Ekaramelit, Paarai Erabait;"
2Samuel23:36 Igal okoku loka Natan loka Soba, Bani Egadit;"
2Samuel23:37 Selek Emonait, Nakarai Ebeerotit, luadakito lujiis luka Yoab okoku loka Seruia;"
2Samuel23:38 Ira Etirit, Gareb Etitit;"
2Samuel23:39 Uria Ekitit: akaisauni ka lukanykaarei kere.
2Samuel24:1 Kinep bobo anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin Isirael, kisidik Daudi aluikin kes ebe, “Kolot, kimar Isirael ka Yuda.”"
2Samuel24:2 Kotema ekabaka Yoab ekapolon loka ajore lokejai kaŋes ebe, “Kirimirim anatar atekerin kere nuka Isirael ageun koDan kiton Beer-seba, kimarata ituŋa, kajenu eoŋ etiai loka ituŋa.”"
2Samuel24:3 Kotema Yoab ekabaka atiar, “Kiyatak EJAKAIT Ekonideke ituŋa kwape ejaar etiaikec irwan akwatat, koanyutu akonye nuka ekajakait ekabaka: konye kanukinyo kisiyalamikinitor ŋin ekajakait ekabaka?”"
2Samuel24:4 Kiteleka do akirot naka ekabaka ŋin naka Yoab ka naka ikapolok luka ajore. Koloma Yoab ka ikapolok luka ajore kaneajai ekabaka aimar ituŋa luka Isirael.
2Samuel24:5 Kikwaŋaros Yorodan, kidukuroto Aroer, kari nakoteten naka ere loejai kidiŋ aditot naka Gad, kiton Yaser:"
2Samuel24:6 Kosodete adolokin Gilead, kiton akwap naka Tatimodisi; kodolot Dan-yaan, kirimosi kiton Sidon,"
2Samuel24:7 Kodolot abwas naka Turo, kiton oreria kere luka Ikibin, ka luka Ikanaanin: kolomasi kiton ari naka eŋalakimak naka Yuda, koBeer-seba."
2Samuel24:8 Aso kedaut airimirim anatar akwap kere, kopotu kesi Yerusalem ketuboros ilapio ikanykaoŋon ka apaarasia akaisaarei."
2Samuel24:9 Abu Yoab koinak ekabaka etiai loka ituŋa luemari ŋesi: kojaas koIsirael ituŋa ilukumin akwat akanykauni luketitiŋ luautununere ikileŋa; emwaasi ituŋa luka Yuda ilukumin akwat akany,"
2Samuel24:10 Kodusaun Daudi etau kedau aimar ituŋa. Kotema Daudi EJAKAIT atiar, “Adiaka noi kanueswama: konye wu EJAKAIT, keŋaiŋait, kolema numam adolit nuka ekonikejaanakinan; naarai eswama eoŋ nukabaŋaanut naepol.”"
2Samuel24:11 Kenyou Daudi tupuruc, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai cnebi Gad, ekadwaran loka Daudi, ebe,"
2Samuel24:12 “Kolot kolimok Daudi ebe, ‘Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Kejaik jo akiro auni; koseu ijo adiopet kakesi, tetere keswamakini jo.’’’"
2Samuel24:13 Kobu do Gad mama ejai Daudi, kolimok ŋes, kotema ŋes atiar, “Epote kereka ikar ikanykaarei luka ebeli mamakon kakwapukon? Arai bo ikeri kereka ijo ilapio iuni kakonyen nuka lukasurupokon korukitotor kesi jo? Arai bo ejaun atular apaarasia auni kakwapukon? Aso kiner, koomoom nuaboŋokini eoŋ ŋol lokejukuni.”"
2Samuel24:14 Kotema Daudi Gad atiar, “Katiokikis noi; mere kebirokinos akan naka EJAKAIT; naarai epol akeitim: kenyek aibirokin akan naka ituŋanan.”"
2Samuel24:15 Kijuk EJAKAIT atular toma Isiracl ageun tupuruc kiton apak nakeseunitai: kotwakata ituŋa ilukumin akaisakanykaarci ageun koDan kiton Beer-seba.
2Samuel24:16 Nakerio emalaika akekan adodit Yerusalem amudiar ŋes, kiitu EJAKAIT aronis, kotema emalaika loamudiari ituŋa atiar, “Adol do; kinyaka akonikan.” Edunyas emalaika loka EJAKAIT kepejal loka Arauna Eyebusit."
2Samuel24:17 Keanyu Daudi emalaika loadanyi ituŋa kotema Daudi EJAKAIT atiar, “Koany, adiaka eoŋ, eswama nukepali: konye amerekekin nu, eswamata anyoika? Keŋaiŋait kaluik eoŋ akonikan, ka ekek loka papaka.”"
2Samuel24:18 Kobu Gad mama ejai Daudi kapaaran kaŋin, kotema ŋes atiar, “Kolot, kodukok EJAKAIT etem opejal loka Arauna Eyebusit.”"
2Samuel24:19 Kolot Daudi kwape ejaar akirot naka Gad, kwape ecorakinia EJAKAIT."
2Samuel24:20 Kiteluo Arauna, koany eka baka ka ikekejaanakinak eponito mama ejai ŋesi: kolom Arauna kokukum kakonyen nuka ekabaka kitulurite akekou."
2Samuel24:21 Kotema Arauna atiar, “Kanukinyo ebunitor ekajakait ekabaka mama ejai ekekejaanakinan?” Kotema Daudi atiar, “Agwelakin kajo epejal, adukokin EJAKAIT etem, tetere enaŋi atular kotuŋa.”"
2Samuel24:22 Kotema Arauna Daudi atiar, “Koyaŋa ekajakait ekabaka koinak nuitojokit ŋesi: koany, imoŋin luka ainakinet naicweio, ka iboro lukicomet, ka iboro luka imoŋin araun akitoke:"
2Samuel24:23 Wu ekabaka, einakini Arauna ŋun kere mama ejai ekabaka.” Kotema Arauna ekabaka atiar, “Kocam EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo.”"
2Samuel24:24 Kotema ekabaka Arauna atiar, “Mam; konye abeit kigwelakin kotiaike: mam ainakini EJAKAIT Ekadeke ainakineta nuicweio kiboro kaluiinakina taai.” Kwaŋin kogwel Daudi epejal ka imoŋin kisekelin akaisakany nuka epuesa."
2Samuel24:25 Kodukok Daudi EJAKAIT etem nepenen, koinak ainakineta nuicweio, ka ainakineta nuka ainapakin. Kwaŋin kiira EJAKAIT aiŋaiŋaikinio naka akwap, konaŋ atular koIsirael."
1Kings1:1 Amojoŋit ekabaka Daudi kokokosanite noi; kimukosi ŋes kigoen. Konye mam abu komwanu.
1Kings1:2 Kanuka ŋun kotemasi ikejaanakinakake ŋes atiar, “Komoikinai abekot nakatumunan ekajakait ekabaka: kobwoi ŋesi kakonyen nuka eka baka aiŋarakinit ŋes; koperenenei ŋin katorobukon, tetere ejakaitika ekabaka edumuni amwanis.”"
1Kings1:3 Kosodete komout apese naatemel anatar iikoruno kere luka Isirael, kodumut Abisag Asunamit, koyaut ŋes mama ejai ekabaka."
1Kings1:4 Kitemelel apese noi; kiŋarakinite ekabaka, kijaanaki ŋes; konye mam eka baka abu kojen ŋes."
1Kings1:5 Kosodi Adoniya okoku loka Kagit aitopoloor bon atiar, “Araun eoŋ ekabaka.” Kitemonok ŋesi agalin ka ikebwanenok, ka ituŋa akaisakany akerenen koiŋarenike."
1Kings1:6 Mam papake abu kitakadikinite ŋes kaijarake kere ebe, “Kanukinyo iswamaa ijo ŋun?” Kerai ŋesi da etuŋanan lootemel; aurio ŋes akaulo ka Abisalom."
1Kings1:7 Kinerut ŋesi kaYoab okoku loka Seruia, ka Abiatar esasedoti: kotupasi Adoniya kiŋarakis ŋes."
1Kings1:8 Konye Sadok esasedoti, ka Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada, ka Natan enabi, ka Simei, ka Rei, ka ituŋa lukirigin luka Daudi mam ajaas ka Adoniya."
1Kings1:9 Koarak Adoniya amerekekin ka imoŋin ka lukasiepai amoru naka Sokelet, naidunyas ka En-rogel; konyarau ŋesi iinacanake kere odwe luka ekabaka, ka ituŋa kere luka Yuda ikejaanakinak luka ekabaka:"
1Kings1:10 Konye mam abu konyarau Natan enabi, ka Benaia, ka ituŋa lukirigin, ka Solomon onaeeke."
1Kings1:11 Kosodi Natan atemar Bat-seba toto naka Solomon atiar, “Mam kereka jo ipupunit ebe erum Adoniya okoku loka Kagit, komam Daudi ekapoloniwok ejeŋi?"
1Kings1:12 Aso do kobia, keŋaiŋait, kener kajo tetere itajari akoniijar, ka aijar da naka okokukon Solomon."
1Kings1:13 Kolot, koloma ijo mama ejai eka baka Daudi, kotema ŋes atiar, ‘Ekajakait, wu ekabaka, mam jo iyapoikinic akejaanakinanikon ebe, “Abeit irumi Solomon okokukon atupakin eoŋ, iboikini ŋesi oicoloŋoka loka ajakanut”? Aso kanukinyo irumia Adoniya?’"
1Kings1:14 Koany, nape iriŋa ijo inerasi kekabaka, kalomuni eoŋ da atupakin jo, aitogogoŋ akirokon.”"
1Kings1:15 Koloma Bat-seba agola mama ejai ekabaka. Amojoŋit ekabaka noi; kijaanakini Abisag Asunamit ekabaka.
1Kings1:16 Kokukum Bat-seba, kisuded mama ejai ekabaka. Kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Inyo bo ikoto ijo?”"
1Kings1:17 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Ekajakait, ibu ijo kiyapoik akejaanakinanikon kolimite EJAKAIT Ekonideke ebe, ‘Abeit irumi Solomon okokukon atupakin eoŋ, iboikini ŋesi oicoloŋoka loka ajakanut.’"
1Kings1:18 Kwana, koany, irumit Adoniya: ijo da, ekaiakait ekabaka, mam iieni:"
1Kings1:19 Aar imoŋin ka lukasiepai ka amerekekin nuipu noi, anyara odwe kere luka ekabaka, ka Abiatar esasedoti, ka Yoab ekapolon loka aiore: konye mam abu konyara Solomon ekejaanakinanikono"
1Kings1:20 Ŋo da, ekajakait ekabaka, kisesenete akonye kere nuka Isirael jo, tetere ilimokini kes iŋai iboikini oicoloŋ loka ekajakait ekabaka atupakin ŋes,"
1Kings1:21 Arai mere kwaŋin, keiotoor ekajakait ekabaka kalukapapaake, kimarakinio eoŋ ka Solomon okokuka kwape ikadiakanarak.”"
1Kings1:22 Ido koany, naperina ŋesi ineras kekabaka, kolom Natan enabi."
1Kings1:23 Kolimokinai ekabaka ebe, “Koany, Natan enabi lo,” Kelom ŋesi mama ejai ekabaka, kokukum kakonyen nuka ekabaka kitulur akouke."
1Kings1:24 Kotema Natan atiar, “Ekajakait, wu ekabaka, kibala teni kolo ijo ebe, ‘Adoniya irumi atupakin eoŋ, ŋes iboikini oicoloŋoka loka ajakanut”?"
1Kings1:25 Naarai alot ŋesi lolo, aar imoŋin ka lukasiepai ka amerekekin nuipu noi, anyara odwe kere luka ekabaka, ka ikapolok luka aiore, ka Abiatar esasedoti: ido koany, enyamete, emasete kakonyeneke, kobalas atiar, ‘Kidari Edeke ekabaka Adoniya.’"
1Kings1:26 Konye eoŋ, ekejaanakinanikon, ka Sadok esasedoti, ka Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada, ka Solomon ekejaanakinanikon, mam abu konyara."
1Kings1:27 Kerai kereka nin akirot nakiswamai ejakaitika ekabaka, komam itodiarit mama ejaas ikejaanakinakakon ŋol loiboikini oicoloŋ loka ekajakait ekabaka atupakin ŋes?”"
1Kings1:28 Kosodi ekabaka Daudi aboŋokin ebe, “Konyarakinai Bat-seba.” Kobu nin mama ejai ekabaka, kobwo kakonyen nuka ekabaka."
1Kings1:29 Kiyapo ekabaka kobala ebe, “Kwape eiaria EJAKAIT, loalaku akaijar koean kere,"
1Kings1:30 Abeit, kwape eyapoikinio jo alimit EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael atiar, ‘Abeit irumi Solomon okokukon atupakin eoŋ, iboikini ŋesi oicoloŋoka loka ajakanut aiboisika’; abeit eswamai kwaŋin lolo.”"
1Kings1:31 Kosodi Bat-seba aitulur akouke kwap, kisuded mama ejai ekabaka, kotema atiar, “Kojar ekajakait ekabaka Daudi ikar kere.”"
1Kings1:32 Kotema ekabaka Daudi atiar, “Konyarakinai Sadok esasedoti, ka Natan enabi, ka Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada.” Kopotu kesi mama ejai ekabaka."
1Kings1:33 Kotema ekabaka kes atiar, “Koyaŋaasi ikeiaanakinak luka eiakaitikus kayes, kisibwanenoto Solomon okokuka ekanyubu, koyaŋaasi ŋes Gikon:"
1Kings1:34 Kinyonyoanakis Sadok esasedoti ka Natan enabi ŋes akinyet araun ekabaka loka Isirael: kokutakis yesi arupepe, kobalasi ebe, ‘Kidar Edeke ekabaka Solomon.’"
1Kings1:35 Kosodete yesi atupakin ŋes, ebuni neai kiboikin oicoloŋoka; naarai eraun ŋesi ekabaka aiboisika: aseu eoŋ ŋes araun lokapolon loka Isirael ka Yuda.”"
1Kings1:36 Koboŋok Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada ekabaka atiar, “Kikote nepenen: kiner kwape kwaŋin EJAKAIT Edeke loka ejakaitika ekabaka."
1Kings1:37 Kwape kejaenena EJAKAIT kejakaitika ekabaka, kojaenena kwaŋin ka Solomon da, kitopolo eicoloŋoke aitelekarit eicoloŋ loka ejakaitika ekabaka Daudi.”"
1Kings1:38 Aso kolot Sadok esasedoti, ka Natan enabi, ka Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada, ka Ikeretin ka Ipeletin, kisibwanenoto Solomon enyubu loka ekabaka Daudi, koyaut ŋes Gikon."
1Kings1:39 Kolem Sadok esasedoti amumwarat naka akinyet koWema, kinyonyoik Solomon. Kokutakis arupepe; kobalas ituŋa kere ebe, “Kidar Edeke ekabaka Solomon.”"
1Kings1:40 Kopotu ituŋa kere atupakin ŋes, kokusete ituŋa alamarun, kolakara kaiyalama naepol, koeila akwap kanuka eporotokec."
1Kings1:41 Kiira Adoniya ka ipejok kere luajaas kaŋes kedaut kesi ainyam. Kepupu Yoab eporoto loka arupepe, kotema atiar, “Inyo bo ibwaanarere kore?”"
1Kings1:42 Eroko inera ŋesi, koany, kobu Yonatan okoku loka Abiatar esasedoti; kotema Adoniya atiar, “Kolom; naarai irai ijo etuŋanan lokaibuses, iyaunit akiro nukajokak.”"
1Kings1:43 Koboŋok Yonatan Adoniya ebe, “Abeit etarau ejakaitiwok ekabaka Daudi Solomon ekabaka:"
1Kings1:44 Abu ekabaka kijuka Sadok esasedoti, ka Natan enabi, ka Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada, ka Ikeretin ka Ipeletin kaŋes, kisibwanenoto ŋes enyubu loka ekabaka."
1Kings1:45 Apotu Sadok esasedoti ka Natan enabi kinyonyoikis ŋes akinyet araun ekabaka koGikon: apotu kopotu kaŋina elakara, ŋes ebwaaritor ere noi. Ŋol ŋes eeelet loipotu yesi kiirasi."
1Kings1:46 Ido eboikin Solomon oicoloŋ loka ajakanut.
1Kings1:47 Bobo da kopotu ikejaanakinak luka ekabaka ailipakin ejakaitiwok ekabaka Daudi arereŋ ebe, ‘Kitojok Edekekon ekiror loka Solomon aitelekar ekirorikon, kitopolo eicoloŋoke aitelekarit eicolonokon”: kokukum eka baka koitada."
1Kings1:48 Ener ekabaka kwanata atiar, “Kiturltete EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, loainaki loiboie oicoloŋoka lolo, aanyut akakonye da.’”"
1Kings1:49 Kokuriakaros ipejok kere luka Adoniya, konyout, kolot ninituŋanan korotoke."
1Kings1:50 Kokurianar Adoniya kanuka Solomon; konyou, kolot, kikam amumwara nuka etem."
1Kings1:51 Kolimokinai Solomon atiar, “Koany, akurianar Adoniya ekabaka Solomon: naarai, koany, ekamu ŋesi amumwara nuka etem ebe, ‘Kisiau ber eka baka Solomon aiyapoikin eoŋ ebe mam eari ekejaanakinanike kekileŋ.’’’"
1Kings1:52 Kotema Solomon atiar, “Arai kitodiari bon araun etuŋanan lokaibuses, emameun etimatake loedoi kwapr konye arai ketakanu aronis kotomake, etwani bo ŋesi.’"
1Kings1:53 Aso kijuka ekabaka Solomon, koyaunai ŋes kotem, Kobu kisuded kama ejai ekabaka Solomon: kotema Solomon ŋes atiar, “Kolot togokon.”"
1Kings2:1 Keapuunito apaarasia nuka Daudi nuka atwanareke; kicorak Solomon okokuke ebe,"
1Kings2:2 “Alosi eoŋ neelosete lukakwap kere: asa kogogonor, kitodiar kwape ekiliokit;"
1Kings2:3 Korieenenei akirot naka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, alosenen korotinike, korieenenei ikekisila, ka aicorakinetake, ka itubesiake, ka aitejenunetake, kwape ejaatar nuiwadikatai kokisila luka Musa, tetere ikeriana kanun kere nuiswamai, ka neibelonokinor kere:"
1Kings2:4 Tetere itogogoni EJAKAIT akekirot naenera kamaka ebe, ‘Arai eeoito ikonidwe erotokee, alosenen kakonyeneka kabeit kitauonokec kere, kaijarakec kere, (abala ŋesi ebe) Mam kimamikini ijo etuŋanan loirumi ajakanut naka Isirael.’"
1Kings2:5 “Bobo da ijeni ijo da nuabu Yoab okoku loka Seruia keswamak eoŋ, nuabu ŋesi kiswamak ikapolok luarei luka ajoresio nuka Isirael, Abiner okoku loka Ner, ka Amasa okoku loka Yeter, luaari ŋesi, kobuko aokot nuka ejie kapak naka ainapakin, kojukok aokot nuka ejie arokobake naaenikinit kaŋabeteke, toma amukake da nuajaas akeieke."
1Kings2:6 Aso kiswama ijo kwape ejaar acoakon, sirikiyu akekou naabwaŋut akorwo alomar okatwak inapakina."
1Kings2:7 Konye kitodik odwe luka Barisilai Egileadit asianut, koraut ke si kanul kaluenyamete komesakon: naarai apotu kesi kekonakis eoŋ kwaŋin naakerea eoŋ Abisalom onaeekon."
1Kings2:8 Ido koany, ejai Simei okoku loka Gera, Ebenyamenit loka Bakurim mamakon, loabu kelam eoŋ eiamit loerono kapaaran naalosia Makanaim: konye abu ŋesi kobu airiamakin keoŋ Yorodan, keyapoik ŋes kalimite EJAKAIT ebe, ‘Mam kaari jo kekilen.’"
1Kings2:9 Aso do siriwomit ebe mam ŋes egwaunit akirot, naarai ico ijo; ijenuni da nuibusakinit aiswamakin ŋes, itolomari kaokot akekou naabwanut akorwo ates.”"
1Kings2:10 Kojotor Daudi kalukapapaake, kidaikinai ore loka Daudi."
1Kings2:11 Apaarasia da nuerumitor Daudi Isirael emwaasi ikar akaisaoŋon: kirum ŋesi ikar ikanykaarei koKeburon, kirum da ikar akaisauni ka luuni ko Yerusalem."
1Kings2:12 Kiboikin Solomon oicoloŋ loka Daudi papake; kicat noi akejakanut.
1Kings2:13 Kosodi Adoniya okoku loka Kagit abunore mama ejai Bat-seba toto naka Solomon. Kotema nin ŋes atiar, “Ibunit ijo kainapakin?” Kotema atiar, “Kainapakin.”"
1Kings2:14 Ido kotema atiar, “Ejaas nuakoto einer kajo.” Kotema nin atiar, “Kiner cani.”"
1Kings2:15 Kotema atiar, “Ŋeni ijo ebe kerai ajakanut nakan, kasesenete eoŋ luka Isirael kere tetere erumi: konye ebelokin ajakanut, araun naka onaeeka: naarai kerai nake kama ka EJAKAIT."
1Kings2:16 Kwana da kelipit jo adiopekirot, sirikiner.” Kotema ŋin ŋes atiar, “Kiner cani.”"
1Kings2:17 Kotema atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, kilip Solomon ekabaka, (naarai mam ŋes kincrokin jo) kakorak Abisag Asunamit kerum.”"
1Kings2:18 Kotema Bat-seba atiar, “Aso ejok; enerakini akonikiro mama ejai ekabaka.”"
1Kings2:19 Kanuka nun abu Bat-seba koloma mama ejai ekabaka Solomon ailipakin Adoniya. Konyou ekabaka airiamakin kaŋes, kokukum kamake, kiboikin oicoloŋoke loka ajakanut, kicorak aibwaikin eicoloŋ loka toto naka ekabaka; kiboikin ŋesi akanike nakoteten."
1Kings2:20 Kosodi ŋin atemar atiar, “Kelipit jo adiopekirot: sirikiner.” Kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Kilip, toto, naarai mam eoŋ kanerokini jo.”"
1Kings2:21 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Kokorakinai Abisag Asunamit onaeekon Adoniya airum.”"
1Kings2:22 Koboŋok ekabaka Solomon totoke ebe, “Kanukinyo ilipia ijo Abisag Asunamit akorakinio Adoniya? Kilipakini ŋes ajakanut da; naarai erai onaceka lokapolon; kilipak ŋes, ka Abiatar esasedoti, ka Yoab okoku loka Seruia da.”"
1Kings2:23 Kosodi ekabaka Solomon aiyapo elimit EJAKAIT ebe, ‘Keswamak Edeke eoŋ kwaŋin ka adepar da, arai mam Adoniya elimunit akirot nin itia akeijar.’"
1Kings2:24 Aso do, kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, loabu keticat eoŋ, kesiboik oicoloŋ loka Daudi papaka, loabu kadumak eoŋ ekal, kwape kisumunio, abeit eario Adoniya lolo.”"
1Kings2:25 Kijuka ekabaka Solomon kakan naka Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada; kinom ŋes, kotwana,"
1Kings2:26 Abu ekabaka kotema Abiatar esasedoti atiar, “Kolot Anatot, alupokon; naarai ibus ijo atwanare: konye mam eoŋ kaari jo kwana, naarai ibu kodak asaduku naka EJAKAIT Edeke kakonyen nuka Daudi papaka, ido naarai kitieanitoi jo kanun kere nukiticanete papaka.”"
1Kings2:27 K wanin kirenea Solomon Abiatar kinyek araun esasedoti mama ejai EJAKAIT; tetere itodolikini akirot naka EJAKAIT, naabu kiner nuka ekek loka EH koSilo."
1Kings2:28 Kopup Yoab nun; naarai abu Yoab kotup Adoniya, konye mam abu kotup Abisalom. Koker Yoab owema loka EJAKAIT, kikam amumwara nuka etem."
1Kings2:29 Aponi kolimokinai ekabaka Solomon ebe, “Aker Yoab owema loka EJAKAIT, ido koany, ejai ariri ketem.” Kosodi Solomon aijukar Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada ebe, “Kolot, koar ŋes.’"
1Kings2:30 Kobu Benaia owema loka EJAKAIT, kotema ŋes atiar, “Inera ekabaka kwanata ebe, ‘Kolom.’’’ Kotema atiar, “Mam; konye atwanikini ne.” Kinyak Benaia akirot mama ejai ekabaka ebe, “Ebala Yoab kwaŋin, ido kabonok eoŋ kwaŋin.”"
1Kings2:31 Kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Kiswama kwape ebalar, koar ŋes, konuk ŋes; tetere ilemari aokot nuabu Yoab kobuko komam akirot, kamakaŋ, ka ekek loka papaka."
1Kings2:32 Kitebeik EJAKAIT aokotoke akouke elopet, naarai abu kinom ituŋa iarei luedolito ka luejok adepar ŋes, koar kes kekilen, komam papaka Daudi ejeŋi, kes Abiner okoku loka Ner, ekapolon loka ajore naka Isirael, ka Amasa okoku loka Yeter, ekapolon loka ajore naka Yuda."
1Kings2:33 Kwaŋin kobeikis aokotokec akou naka Yoab, kakwes da nuka aurike ikar kere: konye mama ejai Daudi, ka aurike, ka ekekike, ka eicoloŋoke loka ajakanut, ejaun ainapakin naebuni kama ejai EJAKAIT ikar kere.”"
1Kings2:34 Kosodi Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada alosit, kinom ŋes, koar: konukakinai togoke modin,"
1Kings2:35 Kodakak ekabaka Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada ayait ajore aiboisike: kodakak ekabaka Sadok esasedoti aibois naka Abiatar.
1Kings2:36 Kijuka ekabaka konyarau Simei, kotema ŋes atiar, “Kodukok etogokon Yerusalem, kiboienen kanen, sirikilom alosit nenice."
1Kings2:37 Naarai apaaran nailomaria, adokar aguurut Kiduron, kojenu cut ebe abeit itwani; ebeikinete aokotokon akoukon.”"
1Kings2:38 Kotema Simei ekabaka atiar, “Iner ejok: kwape ebalar ejakaitika ekabaka, iswamai kwaŋin ekonikejaanakinan.” Kiboienenei Simei ko Yerusalem apaarasia nuipu."
1Kings2:39 Kosodi kanen, ketuboros ikar iuni, apotu ibulesin iarei luka Simei kosiata neejai Akis, okoku loka Maaka, ekabaka loka Gat. Kolimokinai Simei ebe, “Koany, ejaas ikonibulesin Gat.”"
1Kings2:40 Konyou Simei, kopetak lupetan asigiriake, kolot Gat mama ejai Akis, amoot ikebulesin: kolot Simei, koyau ikebulesin koGat."
1Kings2:41 Aponi kolimokinai Solomon ebe anyou Simei koYerusalem alot Gat, Aboŋu da."
1Kings2:42 Kijuka ekabaka konyarau Simei, kotema ŋes atiar, “Mam abu kesiyapo jo kolimite EJAKAIT, ketogogon da kamakon ebe, ‘Kojen cut ebe apaaran nin nailomaria, ilosi nenice, abeit itwani?’ Ibu ijo kolimok eoŋ ebe, ‘Akirot nainera ijo ejok.’"
1Kings2:43 Aso kanukinyo mam ibu kidar aiyaposit naka EJAKAIT, ka aicorakinet naabu keeorak jo?”"
1Kings2:44 Ido kotema ekabaka Simei atiar, “Ŋeni ijo aronis naipupi otaukon, nakiswamakinit ijo Daudi papaka: kanuka ŋun inyakakini EJAKAIT akonironis akoukon,"
1Kings2:45 Konye isirerenio ekabaka Solomon, iticasio da eicoloŋ loka Daudi kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT ikar kere.”"
1Kings2:46 Aso kicorak ekabaka Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada; koloma, kinom ŋes, kotwana."
1Kings3:1 Kiticatai ajakanut kakan naka Solomon. Korau Solomon ekamuran loka Parao ekabaka loko Misiri, koyana akoku naka Parao, koyau ŋes ore loka Daudi, aitodol nekedaunia aiduk eketogo, ka etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka arwatat naka Yerusalem airimor."
1Kings3:2 Konye apotu ituŋa koinakis asuban kaiboisio nuiceleleete, naarai mam ber adukokinitai ekiror loka EJAKAIT etogo kiton apaarasia nun."
1Kings3:3 Komina Solomon EJAKAIT, kolosenenei kokisila luka Daudi papake: konye abu koinak asuban, kisupuruuni da lukisupurununio kaiboisio nuiceleleete."
1Kings3:4 Kolot ekabaka Gibeon ainakin asuban kaŋina; naarai kerai ŋin aibois naieelelei nakapolon: abu Solomon koinak ainakineta nuieweio alukumit kotem kanol.
1Kings3:5 Kitaanyikin EJAKAIT Solomon koGibeon kotoma airujasit kuare: kotema Edeke atiar, cc Kilipai nakainakini jo.”"
1Kings3:6 Kotema Solomon atiar, “Ibu ijo kitodik ekejaanakinanikon Daudi papaka asianut naepol, kwape aloseneneo kakonyenekon kabeit, kadolit, ka etau loetenara kamakon; kinadakinit ijo ŋes asianut na naepol, koinak ŋes okoku aiboikin oicoloŋoke loka ajakanut, kwape eiaar lolo,"
1Kings3:7 Kwana da, wu EJAKAIT Ekadeke, idakak ijo ekeiaanakinanikon araun ekabaka aibois naka Daudi papaka: arai eoŋ ikoku yenididi; mam ajeni alomar karaida alomun."
1Kings3:8 Ejai da ekejaanakinanikon kidiŋ otunakon luibu koseu, ituŋa luipu lumam epedorio aimar karaida aibil kes kanuka aipues."
1Kings3:9 Aso koinak ekejaanakinanikon etau lokapirianut atubokin ikonituŋa, tetere atiaki eoŋ ajokis ka aronis; naarai iŋai epedori atubokin ikonituŋa lu luipu?”"
1Kings3:10 Kitoiok EJAKAIT akirot nin naelipit Solomon,"
1Kings3:11 Kotema Edeke ŋes atiar, “Naarai ilipit ijo akirot nin, komam ilipit aibut ikar luipu; karaida ailip abar, karaida ailip aijar naka lukasurupokon; konye ilipit apirianut aitiak itubesia;"
1Kings3:12 Koany, eswama kwape ejaar akonikirot; koany, kainak jo etau lokaeoa ka apirianut; emamei lem sek loeriakas kaio, mam da enyouni ece atupakin jo loeriakakinos kaio."
1Kings3:13 Kainak da numam jo ilipit, abar, ka ayonio, mam ejaunos kokabakan lueriakuunete kajo apaarasiakon kere,"
1Kings3:14 Ido arai ilosenenei korotinika, korieenenei ikakisila ka aicorakinetaka, kwape aloseneneo Daudi papakon, ŋes konyet eyatakinia apaarasiakon.”"
1Kings3:15 Kokweny Solomon, ido koany, kerai airujasit: kobu Yerusalem, kobwo koinaren kasaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT, koinak ainakincta nuicweio, koinak ainakineta nuka ainapakin, kipoik ikejaanakinakake kere epucit."
1Kings3:16 Kosodi do kopotu aŋor aarei, nukeraas nudotia, mama ejai ekabaka, kobwaata kakonyeneke,"
1Kings3:17 Kobala aberu adiopet ebe, “Wu ekaiakait, kiperi eoŋ ka aberu na ediopetogo; abu eoŋ kedou ikoku koiai ŋesi da togo."
1Kings3:18 Kosodi kanen, ketuboros apaarasia auni nakadau aidoun, kidoun aberu na da; kija isio nepepe; komamei icetuŋanan kasio kotogo, dimarai isio aarei bonik kotogo."
1Kings3:19 Kotwana ikoku yenika aberu kana kuare; naarai abu ŋesi kicikak,"
1Kings3:20 Konyou ŋesi kidinebai, koyana ikakoku kosiepika nakeiotoo akejaanakinanikon, kiperik atorobuke, kiperik ikokuke yenatwanit atorobuka."
1Kings3:21 Naanyounia eoŋ tupuruc aitanak ikakoku, koany, etwanit: konye kadau airere ŋes tupuruc, koany, mam arai ikakoku, yenauriei eoŋ.”"
1Kings3:22 Kotema aberu ace atiar, “Mam; konye yenikajaran ijes ikakoku, ka yenikatwan erai ikonikoku.” Kotema ya da ebe, “Mam; konye yenikatwan erai ikonikoku, ka yenikajaran ŋes ikakoku.” Kineras kwaŋin kakonyen nuka ekabaka,"
1Kings3:23 Kosodi ekabaka atemar atiar, “Ebala adiopet ebe, ‘Yen ŋes ikakoku yeneiari, ikonikoku da yenetwanit’: ka naee da ebala ebe, ‘Mam; konye ikonikoku yenetwanit, ka ikakoku yenejari.’’’"
1Kings3:24 Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Koomikinai ekileŋ.” Koinut ekabaka ekileŋ."
1Kings3:25 Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Kotiak ikoku yenejari irwan aarei, koinak adiopet atutubet ka naee da atutubet.”"
1Kings3:26 Kosodi aberu nakerai ikoku yenejari yenike einer kekabaka, naarai arieba noi eketau ikekoku, kotema atiar, “Wu ekajakait, koinak ŋes ikoku yeneiari, konye sirikiar ŋes.” Konye kobala naee ebe, “Mam eraun yenika, karaida yenikon; kotiak ŋes.”"
1Kings3:27 Kosodi ekabaka aboŋokin ebe, “Koinak nin ikoku yenejari, konye sirikiar ŋes: ŋin ŋes totoke.”"
1Kings3:28 Kopup Isirael kere nuka etube loatubi ekabaka; koyonito ekabaka; naarai apotu koanyut ebe ejai acoa naka Edeke kaŋes airab.
1Kings4:1 Kerai Solomon ekabaka loka Isirael kere.
1Kings4:2 Lu kes ikapolok luajaas kaŋes; Asaria okoku loka Sadok, esasedoti;"
1Kings4:3 Elikorep ka Akiya, odwe luka Sisa, ikalanin; Yekosapat okoku loka Akilud, ekesiitonokinan,"
1Kings4:4 Kopolokinite Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada ajore; keraas Sadok ka Abiatar isasedotin.
1Kings4:5 Kopolokinite Asaria okoku loka Natan ijaka; kerai Sabud okoku loka Natan esasedoti, epapero loka ekabaka."
1Kings4:6 Kopolokinite Akisar lukokal: kopolokinite Adoniram okoku loka Abuda esolo.
1Kings4:7 Kejaas Solomon ijaka itomon ka luarei luapolokinito Isirael kere, luadumanakinete ekabaka ka lukokaleke inyamar: ebusakinit nininnjanan ayaunun inyamat ediopelap nclikaru."
1Kings4:8 Lu kes ikiroriakee: Ben-kur, kakwap nakiukon naka Epuraim:"
1Kings4:9 Ben-deker, koMakas, ka Saalubim, ka Betsemes, ka Elon-bet-kanan:"
1Kings4:10 Ben-kesed, koArubot; ewaike Soko, ka akwap kere naka Keper:"
1Kings4:11 Ben-abinadab, kakwap kere naieelelei naka Dor; amanyit ŋesi Tapat akoku naka Solomon:"
1Kings4:12 Baana okoku loka Akilud, koTaanak ka Megido, ka Bet-sean kere naedunyas ka Saretan, kwap Yesureel, anyoun koBet-sean kiton Abel-mekola adepar juwai Yokumeam:"
1Kings4:13 Bengeber, koRamot-gilead; ewaike ireria luka Yair okoku loka Manase, luejaas koGilead; ewaike akwap naka Arugob, naejai Basan, ireria akaisakanykape lukapolok lukejaas arwatatin ka itiketa luka aisinit,"
1Kings4:14 Akinadab okoku loka Ido, koMakanaim."
1Kings4:15 Akimaas, koNaputali; amanyit ŋesi Basemat akoku naka Solomon."
1Kings4:16 Baana okoku loka Kusai, koAser ka Bealot."
1Kings4:17 Yekosapat okoku loka Parua, koIsakar."
1Kings4:18 Simei okoku loka Ela, koBenyamin."
1Kings4:19 Geber okoku loka Uri, kakwap naka Gilead, akwap naka Sikon ekabaka loka Imorain ka naka Og ekabaka loka Basan; kerai ŋesi ejakait ediopet bon kakwap."
1Kings4:20 Epu Yuda ka Isirael, kwape asine naejai ariri naka aŋolol kaipues, enyamete, emasete, elakanaros."
1Kings4:21 Kirum Solomon ajakanuto kere anyoun koCor kiton akwap naka Ipilisitian, kiton oikor da loko Misiri: koyaununete ainakineta, kijaanakis Solomon apaarasia kere nuka aijarake."
1Kings4:22 Inyamat luka Solomon luka adiopepaaran keraas aitemisio akaisauni nuka akiria nuidicie, ka aitemisio akaisakanykape nuka akiria;"
1Kings4:23 Imoŋin itomon luetumito, ka imoŋin akaisaarei lukoronyia, ka amerekekin akwatat, kogelara amiamia, amorio ka imalin ka akweny nuetumito."
1Kings4:24 Naarai abu kirum akwap kere kiton oCor Eupurat, anyoun koTipisa kiton Gasa, ikabakan da kere kiton oCor Eupurat: kejai ainapakin owaitin kere airimor ŋes,"
1Kings4:25 Kiboie Yuda ka Isirael inapakina, ninitunanan kwap kemusabibuke ka etinike, anyoun koDan kiton Beer-seba, apaarasia kere nuka Solomon,"
1Kings4:26 Kejaas Solomon agolai alukumin akaisaoŋon nuka ibalasin luka agalinike, ka ikebwanenok ilukumin itomon ka luarei,"
1Kings4:27 Apotu ijaka ŋul kodumanakinete eka baka Solomon inyamat, nepepe kanul kere da luapote omesa loka ekabaka Solomon, ŋinituŋanan olapake: mam ibore kere yenabu kokurwok,"
1Kings4:28 Koyaununete da esairi, ka anya nuka ibalasin ka ibalasin luetiroko noi aibois nakejaas ijaka, ŋinituŋanan kwape ketubokinitere."
1Kings4:29 Abu Edeke koinak Solomon acoa ka ajenun naepol noi noi, ka apoloor naka etau, kwape kasine naejai ariri naka aŋolol."
1Kings4:30 Kiteleka acoa naka Solomon acoa naka idwe kere lukoto, ka acoa kere da nako Misiri."
1Kings4:31 Naarai aeo ŋesi aitelekar ituŋa kere; aitelekar Etan Eserakit, ka Keman, ka Kalukol, ka Darada, odwe luka Makol: kisiarakin eemutuke atekerin kere nuerimorito."
1Kings4:32 Kiner ŋesi awaragasia alukumin auni: emwaasi ikososineike elukumit ka ikany.
1Kings4:33 Kiner ŋesi nuka ikito, anyoun kores loejai Lebanon kiton esop Ioebwanuni karwatat: kiner da nuka itian, ka akweny, ka iboro lueliatos, ka iboro lukeeor."
1Kings4:34 Kopotu lukatekerin kere akiirar acoa naka Solomon, lukokabakan kere kere luka akwap, luapupunito nuka acoake."
1Kings5:1 Kijuka Kiram ekabaka loka Turo ikekejaanakinak mama ejai Solomon; naarai kopup ebe aponi kinyonyoakinai ŋes akinyet araun ekabaka aibois naka papake: naarai aminenena Kiram Daudi.
1Kings5:2 Kijuka Solomon mama ejai Kiram, kobala ebe,"
1Kings5:3 “Ŋeni ijo kwape mam kepedoria papaka Daudi adukokin ekiror loka EJAKAIT Ekedeke etogo, kanuka ijiisio luerigaunito ŋes kanoliwai, aitodol neebwaikinia EJAKAIT kes kwap kakejeneke."
1Kings5:4 Konye kwana kesiyen EJAKAIT Ekadeke eoŋ kanoliwai; emamei lokasurup, karaida aronis."
1Kings5:5 Ido koany, eneru eoŋ adukokin ekiror loka EJAKAIT Ekadeke etogo, kwape abalar EJAKAIT Daudi papaka ebe, ‘Okokukon, loesiboikini oicolonokon aiboisikon, ŋes edukokini ekakiror etogo.’"
1Kings5:6 Aso do kicorak ijo kes aiepakin eoŋ ikito luka eres koLebanon; ejaununos ikakejaanakinak kikonikejaanakinak; kainakini eoŋ jo eropit loka ikonikejaanakinak kwape ejaatar nuinera ijo kere: naarai ijeni ebe emamei kotomakosi loepiriana aijep ikito kwape Isidonin.”
1Kings5:7 Kosodi kanen, kepupu Kiram akiro nuka Solomon, kiyalamikin noi, kobala ebe, “Kituritete EJAKAIT lolo, loabu koinak Daudi okoku Iokacoa airum ituŋa lu luipu.”"
1Kings5:8 Kijuka Kiram mama ejai Solomon ebe, “Apup ŋun nukijukakinit eoŋ: eswamaenenei nuikoto ijo kere nuka akito nuka eres, ka akito nuka eberos."
1Kings5:9 Eyaunete ikakejaanakinak kes koLebanon kiton aŋolol: etolosi kes eenen kikaleleos kaŋolol kiton aibois nakiseikini eoŋ, eeorakini kolacakinai nina, ijo da ijaun kes: ido itodoli ijo nuakoto kere arai kidumanak lukokaleka inyamat.”"
1Kings5:10 Kosodi Kiram koinak Solomon akito nuka eres ka akito nuka eberos kwape ejaar ekeipud kere.
1Kings5:11 Abu Solomon da koinak Kiram aitemisio alukumin akaisaarei nuka akima araun inyamat luka lukokaleke, ka aitemisio akaisaarei nuka akinyet naeeuunitai: koinanakini Solomon Kiram kwaŋin nolikaru."
1Kings5:12 Abu EJAKAIT koinak Solomon acoa, kwape esumunio; kinapakinos Kiram ka Solomon; kitutukoto kesi kere iarei."
1Kings5:13 Kitelem Solomon Isirael kere esolo; esolo ŋol emwaasi ituŋa ilukumin akaisauni.
1Kings5:14 Kijuka kes Lebanon, ŋolilap ilukumin itomon emeanakinos: kedaununete Lebanon elap ediopet, kosodi ore ilapio iarei: kopolokinite Adoniram esolo,"
1Kings5:15 Kejaas Solomon luebwokito abwokon ilukumin akaisakanykaarei, ka ilukumin akaisakanykauni hiajepete koronan:"
1Kings5:16 Kogelara iiaka luka Solomon luapolokinito aswam, ilukumin iuni ka akwat auni, luayaito ituŋa lueswamaete aswam."
1Kings5:17 Kicorak ekabaka, kobokata amor nuepolok, nuka akais nuipu, apetanakin apetetait naka etogo kamor nuikeitoi."
1Kings5:18 Apotu ikadukok luka Solomon ka ikadukok luka Kiram ka Igebalin kitetenata kes, kitemonokis akito ka amor adukio etogo."
1Kings6:1 Kosodi kanen kokaru loka akwat aoŋon ka akaisakanykauni, akaulo ka idwe luka Isirael anyoun kakwap nako Misiri, kokaru lokiwononet loka airumit naka Solomon Isirael, kolap Sib, loerai elap lokiareit, kogeu ŋesi aiduk etogo loka EJAKAIT."
1Kings6:2 Etogo loadukokini ekabaka Solomon EJAKAIT, kerai aojauke ikubitin akaisakanykape, alalauke akaisaarei, amukururuke ikubitin akaisauni."
1Kings6:3 Agola nalomaret koinaren keyekalu loka etogo, kerai aojauke ikubitin akaisaarei, kwape kejaar alalau naka etogo; alalauke koinaren ketogo ikubitin itomon."
1Kings6:4 Kiswamak etogo adirisan nuilokonyikinito.
1Kings6:5 Kieul agolai arwatat airimor, arwatatin nuka etogo airimor, nuka eyekalu ka nuka aibois nakalaunan noi: kiswama agolai airimor:"
1Kings6:6 Ŋinigola nakokwap alal ikubitin ikany, ka nakokidin alal ikubitin ikanykape, ka nakiwuniet alal ikubitin ikanykaarei: naarai kitidisiarite abures naka arwatat naka etogo airimor tetere mam abaoi elomarete arwatatin nuka etogo."
1Kings6:7 Naadukere etogo, aponi kodukoi kamor nuetemokinitoi kaneabokere kes: amamei anyul karaida aep karaida adiosuat akiirario kotogo, nakedukere ŋes."
1Kings6:8 Kejai ekek lolomaret agolai nukokidin owai lokoteten loka etogo: kodokanarete kadoketa nuerimonorete kiton agolai nukokidin, anyoun kanukokidin da kiton nakiwuniet."
1Kings6:9 Koduk ŋesi kwaŋin etogo, kodau; korapa etogo kakito nuaburok ka akito nuepadalalas nuka eres."
1Kings6:10 Koduk ŋesi agolai airimor etogo kere, ŋinigola amukururuke ikubitin ikany: kidokokis agolai kakito nuka eres."
1Kings6:11 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Solomon ebe,"
1Kings6:12 “Nuka etogo lo loiduki ijo, arai ilosenenei kokisilaka kitodoli itubesiaka, koricenenei aicorakinetaka kere alosenen kakes; ŋes konyet etieasia akakirot kamakon, naabu kalimok papakon Daudi."
1Kings6:13 Eboienenei kodwe luka Isirael, komam ajalenenei ikatuŋa Isirael.”"
1Kings6:14 Koduk Solomon kwanm etogo, kodau."
1Kings6:15 Koduk arwatatin nukotoma nuka etogo kabaoi nuka eres: anyoun kokwap ketogo aitodol arwatatin nukokuju, korapia kes toma kakito: korapia kwap ketogo kabaoi nuka eberos,"
1Kings6:16 Koduk ŋes ikubitin akaisaarei to ketogo kabaoi nuka eres anyoun kokwap aitodol arwatatin: kodukok kes toma, araun neinerenenere akirot, araun aibois nakalaunan noi."
1Kings6:17 Etogo da, ŋes eyekalu, koinaren neinerenenere akirot kerai aojauke ikubitin akaisaoijon."
1Kings6:18 Kejaas akito nuka eres toma togo, nuigiritai kaputosia nuka ituol ka atur nuelakara: kere keraas eres; mam amor ketakanete."
1Kings6:19 Kitemok aibois neinerenenere akirot kokidin togo toma, asipokin asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT."
1Kings6:20 Toma aibois nainerenenere akirot kejai apak aojauke ikubitin akaisaarei, alalauke ikubitin akaisaarei, amukururuke ikubitin akaisaarei; kiladaa kesabu kaloelai: korapia etem kakito nuka eres."
1Kings6:21 Kiladaa Solomon etogo kotoma kesabu kaloelai: kitotor irikoi luka esabu koiŋaren kaibois neinerenenere akirot; kiladaa kesabu,"
1Kings6:22 Kiladaa ŋesi etogo kere kesabu, aitodol neadaunor etogo kere: kiladaa etem da kere lokejai toma aibois neinerenenere akiro kesabu,"
1Kings6:23 Kiswamau ikerubin iarei luka akito nuka eseitun toma aibois neinerenenere akirot, ŋinidiopet ikubitin itomon amukurur."
1Kings6:24 Abebenok adiopet naka ekerubi ikubitin ikany, abebenok ace naka ekerubi ikubitin ikany: anyoun kosane loka abebenok adiopet kiton osaŋe loka abebenok ace keiaas ikubitin itomon."
1Kings6:25 Ekerubi ece da ikubitin itomon: ikerubin kere keraas luka aitemis adiopet ka aput adiopet.
1Kings6:26 Amukurur naka ekerubi ediopet ikubitin itomon, kwape kwaŋin da ekerubi ece."
1Kings6:27 Kosipok ikerubin togo lokotoma: kigararaete abebenoka nuka ikerubin tetere etirorit abebenok adiopet arwatat adiopet, etirorit da abebenok naka ekerubi ece arwatat epuai; kiriamakina abebenokakec kidin togo."
1Kings6:28 Kiladaa ikerubin kesabu.
1Kings6:29 Kigir arwatatin kere nuka etogo airimor kaputosia nuigiritai nuka ikerubin ka idukudukun, ka atur nuelakara, toma kokina da."
1Kings6:30 Kiladaa kwap ketogo kesabu, toma kokina da."
1Kings6:31 Neelomarere aibois neinerenenere akirot kiswamau ikirigin luka akito nuka eseitun: acunetait ka ategerio keraas idiopet kokany yenika arwatat,"
1Kings6:32 Kiswamau ikirigin iarei luka akito nuka eseitun; kigir kes kaputosia nuigiritai nuka ikerubin ka idukudukun ka atur nuelakara, kiladaa kes kesabu; kibwaik esabu okerubin odukudukun da."
1Kings6:33 Kiswamak da neelomanarere oyekalu ategerio nuka akito nuka eseitun, idiopet kooŋon yenika arwatat;"
1Kings6:34 Ka ikirigin iarei luka akito nuka eberos; asukonokinos atutubeta aarei nuka ekirigi ediopet, asukonokinos da atutubeta aarei nuka ekirigi ece."
1Kings6:35 Kigirak ikerubin ka idukudukun ka atur nuelakara: kiladaa kes kesabu neigiritai.
1Kings6:36 Koduk alaro nakotoma kikokoron iuni luka amor nuekee, ka ekokoro loka abaoi nuka eres."
1Kings6:37 Kosipokinai apetetait naka etogo loka EJAKAIT kokaru lokiwononet, kolap Sibo"
1Kings6:38 Kokaru lokitomonet ka lodiopet, kolap Bul, ŋes elap lokikanyetekauni, kodaun etogo katutubetake kere, kwape ajaar aputoke. Kwaŋin kodau ikar ikanykaarei eduki."
1Kings7:1 Kodau Solomon ikar itomon ka luuni eduki eketogo, kodau eketogo kere."
1Kings7:2 Naarai koduk etogo loka ikito luka Lebanon; aojauke ikubitin akwatat, alalauke ikubitin akaisakany, amukururuke ikubitin akaisauni, kotoma okokoron iwonon luka ipirin luka eres, ka abaoi nuka eres kopirin."
1Kings7:3 Koraparai kakito nuka eres kokuju agolai akaisaoŋon ka nukany, nuajaas kuju kipirin: ŋolikokoro atomon ka nukany."
1Kings7:4 Ajaas apedon okokoron iuni, ido kidokonokino apedon kokokoron iuni."
1Kings7:5 Aoiau ka alalau naka ikekia ariakanara, naka apedon da ariakanara: ido kidokonokino apedon kokokoron iuni."
1Kings7:6 Kiswamau agola neelomarere kipirin; aojauke ikubitin akaisakany, alalauke ikubitin akaisauni; neelomarere da koinareneke; ipirin ka adoketa koinareneke."
1Kings7:7 Kiswamau agola naka eicoloŋ neetubio, agola natubes: koraparitete keres anyoun kokwap kiton arwatatin da."
1Kings7:8 Etogoke loaperenenei, alaro ace kinaren kagola neelomarere, aponi kiswamai koputosi kaŋin, Kiswamau da etogo loka akoku naka Parao, (naamanyit Solomon) koputosi kagola kaŋin,"
1Kings7:9 Ŋul kere keraas nuka amor nuka akais nuipu, amor nuekee, kwape ajaar aitemis, kotuboi kisumenon, toma kokina da, anyoun kapetetait, kiton oswi, kwaŋin kina da kiton alaro nakapolon."
1Kings7:10 Kerai apetetait naka amor nuka akais nuipu, amor nuepolok, amor nuka ikubitin itomon, ka amor nuka ikubitin ikanykauni."
1Kings7:11 Keiaas amor nuka akais nuipu kuiu da, amor nuekee, kwape ajaar aitemis, ka akito nuka eres,"
1Kings7:12 Alaro da naerimorit kejaas ikokoron iuni luka amor nuekee, ka ekokoro loka abaoi nuka eres; koputos kalaro nakotoma naka etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka agola neelomarere togo."
1Kings7:13 Kijuka eka baka Solomon aomare Kiram koTuro.
1Kings7:14 Kerai ŋesi okoku loka aberu napuserut naka ateker naka Naputali, kerai papake etuŋanan loka Turo, ekeswaman aisinit; eleleba ŋes acoa ka aijen ka apirianut, aswam aswamisinei kere nuka aisinit. Kobu ŋesi mama ejai ekabaka Solomon, kiswama akeswam kere."
1Kings7:15 Naarai abu kotatau ipirin iarei luka aisinit, ŋolipir aojauke ikubitin itomon ka lukanykauni: kolukunite aitemis naka ikubitin itomon ka luarei nolidlopet."
1Kings7:16 Kiswamau akwes aarei nuka aisinit naeealara, asipokin kuju opirin: amukurur naka akou adiopet ikubitin ikany, aojao da naka akou ace ikubitin ikany,"
1Kings7:17 Ajaas iboyan luka aswam nailokonyitai, ka irikoi luka aswam naeoiitai luka akwes nukejaas kuiu opirin, eboi loka akou adiopet, ka eboi loka akou nace."
1Kings7:18 Kiswamau kwaŋin akamamagan: kokokoron iarei airimor eboi ediopet arapiar akou nakejai kuju opir; kiswamak akou ace da kwaŋin.
1Kings7:19 Araas akwes nuajaas kuju opirin luajaas agola neelomarere nuka aswam bala nakapeeel, ikubitin iwonon."
1Kings7:20 Ajaas akwes da kuju opirin, kidunyasi kakoik naedunyas kiboyan: emwaasi akamamagan akwat aarei, kokokoron airimor ninikou."
1Kings7:21 Kosipok ipirin agola neelomarere oyekalu: kosipok epir lokoteten, komaik ekekiror Yakin: kosipok epir lokokediany, komaik ekekiror Boas,"
1Kings7:22 Kejai aswam nakapeeel kuju opirin; kodau kwaŋin aswam naka ipirin.
1Kings7:23 Kiswamau aŋolol naecalara ikubitin itomon anyoun koreret kiton oreret, kolukuna, aojaoke ikubitin ikany; kolukunite aitemis naka ikubitin akaisauni."
1Kings7:24 Kojaas ituol luerimorito ŋes kwap kereret alukun, ikubitin itomon, kirimorite aŋolol: kojaas ituol okokoron iarei kocala kere nepepe kotataete."
1Kings7:25 Kidokokino omonin itomon ka luarei, kosesenete iuni ari naka agolitomei, kosesenete iuni ari nakoto, kosesenete iuni ari naka eŋalakimak, kosesenete iuni ari nakokide: kidokokino aŋolol kujukee, kojaas iwosikee toma."
1Kings7:26 Aburesuke alalau naka akan: erereteke kiswamai bala ereret loka atido, bala aturot naka apeeel: abu kigau akaalakanya alukumin aarei."
1Kings7:27 Kiswamau aicegeria atomon nuka aisinit; aojau naka aieeger adiopet ikubitin iwonon, alalauke ikubitin iwoŋon, amukururuke ikubitin iuni."
1Kings7:28 Ikote aicegeria neta: kojaas abaoi; kojaas abaoi kidiŋ kanuiriikino:
1Kings7:29 Kojaas iŋatunyo, ka Imoŋin, ka ikerubin abaoi nuajaas kidin kanuiriikino; koiai aiganetait kuiu kanuiriikino: kwap kinatunyo ka imoŋin kojaas lueojitai lueiekosi."
1Kings7:30 Kojai ŋiniiceger akokoron aoŋon nuka aisinit, ka nuisibelonokinete nuka aisinit: kojaas aigaŋeta nuka akalaya kagoriake aoŋon: koealara aigaŋeta, kojaas lueojitai kosiep loka ŋiniigaŋet."
1Kings7:31 Aitukuke toma aboko kerai ekubit adiopet kuju: kolukuna aitukuke kwape aswam naka aikit, ekubit ediopet ka atutubet: kojaas agirai aitukuke, abaoikec keraas nueriakas nuitenara komam elukuna."
1Kings7:32 Kojaas akokoron aoŋon kwap kabaoi: kojaas nuisibelonokinete akokoron aiceger: amukurur naka akokoro ekubit ka atutubet naka ekubit.
1Kings7:33 Aswam naka akokoron korai bala aswam naka akokoro naka agali: nuisibelonokinetakee, ka ipirinokec, ka airimetakec, akidinotokec da, kere kecalara,"
1Kings7:34 Kojaas aigaŋeta aoŋon agoria aoŋon nuka niniiceger: keraas aigaŋeta nuka aieeger alopet.
1Kings7:35 Ajai ajeunet kuju kaieeger amukururuke atutubet naka ekubit: akaninike ka abaoike kuju kaiceger koraas nuka adiopeswam.
1Kings7:36 Kigir ŋesi ikerubin, ka iŋatunyo, ka idukudukun, necpadalalas akaninike ka abaoike, kwape ajaar apakikee, ka lueojitai airimor."
1Kings7:37 Kiswamau aicegeria atomon nuikote nen: kojaas kes kere otatae ediopet, ka aitemis adiopet, ka aput adiopet,"
1Kings7:38 Kiswamau akalaya atomon nuka aisinit: kigauni akalaya adiopet atakwai akaisaoŋon: ninikalaya ikubitin iwonon: akalaya adiopet kotoma aieeger adiopet kiton aicegeria atomon.
1Kings7:39 Kosipok aicegeria, akany owai lokotcten loka etogo, ka akany owai lokokediany loka etogo: kosipok aŋolol owai lokokide loka etogo asesen eŋalakimak."
1Kings7:40 Kiswamau Kiram akalaya, ka initia, ka atanyia. Kwaŋin kodau Kiram aswam kere naeswamakini ekabaka Solomon kotogo loka EJAKAIT:"
1Kings7:41 Ipirin iarei, ka atiboi aarei nuka akwes nuajaas kuju opirin; ka iboyan iarei arapia atiboi nuka akwes nuajaas kuju opirin;"
1Kings7:42 Ka akamamagan akwat aoŋon nuka iboyan iarei; ikokoron iarei luka akamamagan kanoliboi, arapia atiboi aarei nuka akwes nuajaas kuiu opirin:"
1Kings7:43 Ka aicegeria atomon, ka akalaya atomon nuka aicegeria;"
1Kings7:44 Aŋolol adiopet, ka imoŋin itomon ka luarei kwap kaŋolol."
1Kings7:45 Ka amoti, ka initia, ka atanyia: iboro ŋul kere, lueswamakini Kiram ekabaka Solomon kotogo loka EJAKAIT, araas nuka aisinit naepwatat."
1Kings7:46 Kocala ekabaka kes kApuuton naka Yorodan, kolupe loejai kidin Sukot ka Saretan."
1Kings7:47 Kinyek Solomon ainiŋ iboro kere, naarai epu kes adepar: mam apedorit adumun alaniru naka aisinit."
1Kings7:48 Kiswamau Solomon iboro kere luajaas togo loka EJAKAIT: etcm loka esabu, ka emesa loajaas imugatin luka aitodikin, loka esabu;"
1Kings7:49 Ka ipirin lukatalai luka esabu loelai, ikany owai lokoteten, ka ikany owai lokokediany, koinaren neinerenenere akirot; atur da, ka atalai, ka arideta, nuka esabu;"
1Kings7:50 Ka akolin, ka aitudeŋeta, ka atanyia, ka akaalei, ka atubake nuigaete ekurwon, nuka esa bu loelai; ka ipatai luka ikirigin luka etogo lokotoma, aibois nakalaunan noi, ka ikirigin luka etogo, ŋes eyekalu, kere luka esabu."
1Kings7:51 Kodaun kwaŋin aswam kere naeswamai ekabaka Solomon kotogo loka EJAKAIT, Koyau Solomon iboro luabu Daudi papake kotiaku, epuesa, ka esabu, ka iboro, kibwaik kes aiŋadisia nuka etogo loka EJAKAIT."
1Kings8:1 Kosodi Solomon atukokin imakio luka Isirael, ka ikapolok kere luka atekerin, ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapa luka idwe luka Isirael mama ejai ekabaka Solomon Yerusalem, ayaun asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT anyoun kore loka Daudi, ŋes Sion."
1Kings8:2 Kotukonokinos ituŋa kere luka Isirael mama ejai ekabaka Solomon opucit, kolap Etanim, ŋes elap lokikanyetekaarei."
1Kings8:3 Kopotu imakio kere luka Isirael da, kodakut isasedotin asaduku."
1Kings8:4 Koyaut asaduku naka EJAKAIT, ka ewema loka airiamunun, ka iboro kere lukalaunak luajaas owema; kes iboro luapotu isasedotin ka Ilebin koyaut."
1Kings8:5 Kosodi ekabaka Solomon ka ekodet kere loka Isirael luatukonokinos mama ejai ŋesi, ajaas kaŋes kinaren kasaduku, koinakis amerekekin ka imoŋin araun asuban numam epedorio alimun karaida aimarun kanuka aipues."
1Kings8:6 Kitolomasi isasedotin asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT aiboisike, toma aibois neinerenenere akirot naka etogo, aibois nakalaunan noi, kwap kabebenoka nuka ikerubin."
1Kings8:7 Naarai kigararas ikerubin abebenokakec kuju aibois naka asaduku, korapias ikerubin asaduku ka adaketake."
1Kings8:8 Kewojak adaketa tetere etakani esanekec kaibois nakalaunan koiŋaren kaibois neinerenenere akirot; konye mam ketakanete kokina; ejaas nepenen, kiton lolo."
1Kings8:9 Amamei ibore kotoma asaduku dimarai amor aarei nuabu Musa kibwaik koKoreb, nakitutukio EJAKAIT aitutuket kaidwe luka Isirael, nakelomuniata kakwap nako Misiri."
1Kings8:10 Kosodi kanen, kedaut isasedotin alomun kaibois nakalaunan, kilelebun edou togo loka EJAKAIT."
1Kings8:11 Mam isasedotin apotu kopedosi aibwo aijaanakin kanuka edou: naarai kilelebun aibuses naka EJAKAIT etogo loka EJAKAIT.
1Kings8:12 Kosodi Solomon einer atiar, “Abala EJAKAIT ebe iboienenei ŋesi kamuton naejesi ŋaŋ."
1Kings8:13 Abeit kadukok jo etogo aiboikin, Aibois naiboieneno ijo ikar kere.”"
1Kings8:14 Kibelokin ekabaka, kilipak ekodet kere loka Isirael arereŋ: kobwo ekodet kere loka Isirael."
1Kings8:15 Kotema ŋesi atiar, “Kituritete EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, loabu kiner kakeituk mama ejai Daudi papaka, ido kitodol da kakekan ebe,"
1Kings8:16 ‘Ageun kapaaran naketolomunia ikatuŋa Isirael koMisiri, mam abu kaseu ere katekerin kere nuka Isirael aiduk etogo, tetere ejaun nen ekakiror; konye abu kaseu Daudi apolokin ikatuŋa Isirael.’"
1Kings8:17 Abu Daudi papaka koomite kotauke adukokin ekiror loka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, etogo,"
1Kings8:18 Konye abu EJAKAIT kotema Daudi papaka atiar, ‘Naarai iwomit ijo kotaukon adukokin ekakirot etogo, iswama ejok aomit kotaukon:"
1Kings8:19 Konye mam jo iduki etogo; konye okokukon, loelomuni kakuanakon, ŋes edukokini ekakiror etogo.’"
1Kings8:20 Etodol EJAKAIT akekirot naabu kiner; naarai anyou eoŋ aibois naka Daudi papaka, eboikini oicoloŋ loka Isirael, kwape esumunia EJAKAIT, adukok ekiror loka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, etogo,"
1Kings8:21 Nepenen da ebwaik aibois naka asaduku, naejai aitutuket naka EJAKAIT tomake, naetutuki ŋesi kalukapapaawok, nakitolomunia kes kakwap nako Misiri.”"
1Kings8:22 Kobwo Solomon koinaren ketem loka EJAKAIT kakonyen nuka ekodet kere loka Isirael, korio akekanin kuju:"
1Kings8:23 Kobala ebe, “Wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, emamei Edeke loiputosi kaio, kuju toma akuj, arai kokwap kakwap; loitodolenenei aitutuket ka aitim kikonikejaanakinak luelosenenete kakonyenekon kikeeetauon kere:"
1Kings8:24 Loitodolik ekonikejaanakinan Daudi papaka nun nuiou kisumun ŋes: eebo, ibu kiner kaitukukon, itodolo da kakanikon, kwape ejaatar lolo,"
1Kings8:25 Aso, wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, kitodolik ekejaanakinanikon Daudi papaka ŋun nuibu kisumun ŋes ebe, ‘Mam kimamikini ijo etuŋanan loiboikin oicoloŋ loka Isirael kakonyeneka kwape ilosenenoo ijo kakonyeneka.’"
1Kings8:26 Aso do, wu Edeke loka Isirael, kenainait, kitogogoŋoi akonikirot, nakilimokini ekonikejaanakinan Daudi papaka."
1Kings8:27 “Konye iboie kereka Edeke abeit kakwap? Koany, mam epedori akuj ka akuj naka akuj ailosikin jo; ido konyet etogo lo loadukit eoŋ ŋes bo inyo!"
1Kings8:28 Konye kocam ijo ailip naka ekonikejaanakinan, ka aiŋaiŋake, wu EJAKAIT Ekadeke, akiirar aimony ka ailip nailipi ekonikejaanakinan kakonyenekon lolo:"
1Kings8:29 Kokwenyenenete akonikonyen asesen etogo lo apaaran ka akuar, ŋes aibois nakolo ilimit ebe, ‘Ejaenena nen ekakiror’: akiirar ailip nailipi ekonikejaanakinan kaibois kana."
1Kings8:30 Kiiranari da aiŋaiŋa naka ekonikejaanakinan, naka ikonituŋa Isirael da nailipenenata kesi kaibois kana: eebo, kiiranari ijo ijai toma akuj aiboisikon: ido naipupunio, kisionie,"
1Kings8:31 “Arai kediak etuŋanan kama ejai eidunyeteke, kisiyapoikinoi aiyaposit, ebuni ŋesi aiyapo koiŋaren ketemukon togo lo;"
1Kings8:32 Kopupununei do ijo ijai toma akuj, kiswama, kotubok ikonikejaanakinak, kiteteleka ikaronon, aitoboŋikin ekepone akouke; kitojok da ikadoliton, ainakin ŋes kwape ejaar adoliteke."
1Kings8:33 “Naedanyere ikonituŋa Isirael kakonyen nuka lukasurup, naarai adiakasi kamakon; arai kibelokinos mamakon, kolimorete ekonikiror, ilipete, kinainaete jo kotogo kalo:"
1Kings8:34 Kopupununei do ijo ijai toma akuj, kisionie aronis naka ikonituŋa Isirael, kinyaku kes bobo akwap nakiinakinit lukapapakee."
1Kings8:35 “Naegolokinere akui, komamei akiru, naarai adiakasi kamakon; arai ilipete kiteete aibois na, kolimorete ekonikiror, kibelokinos anyoun karonisikee, nakiticania ijo kes;"
1Kings8:36 Kopupununei ijo ijai toma akui, kisionie aronis naka ikonikejaanakinak ka naka ikonituŋa Isirael, nakisisianakinia ijo kes erot loejok loibusakinit kes aloseneno; kitetep akiru akwapukon, naibu koinak ikonituŋa araun airumet."
1Kings8:37 “Arai keiaun ebeli kakwap, arai kejaun atular, arai kejaun ekure arai airouroun, emaase arai ekutelek; arai kirigaun lukasurupokee kakwap naka ireriakee; ŋinitular kere, ka ŋinidek kere naeiaunor;"
1Kings8:38 ŋiniilip ka ninikinaina nailipi ituŋanan kere, arai ikonituŋa Isirael kere, yenejeni ninituŋanan atular nakotauke, korio akekanin mama ejai etogo lo:"
1Kings8:39 Kopupununei do ijo ijai roma akuj aiboisikon, kisionie, kiswama, koropi ŋinituŋanan kwape ejaatar iponesioke, yenijeni ijo etauke; (naarai ijo, ijo bon ijeni itauon luka idwe luka ituŋa kere:)"
1Kings8:40 Tetere kiyonete jo apaarasia kere nuiboienenoto kesi kakwap nakiinakinit Iukapapaakosi,"
1Kings8:41 “Bobo da nuka imoit, yenimere yenika ikonituŋa Isirael, naenyounio ŋesi kakwap naelwana kanuka ekonikiror;"
1Kings8:42 (Naarai iirarete kesi nuka ekonikiror Iokapolon, nuka akanikon nakagogonon, nuka akanikon naerioro;) naebunio ŋesi ailip kitei etogo lo:"
1Kings8:43 Kopupununei ijo ijai toma akuj aiboisikon, kiswama kwape ejaatar kere nukiworoi imoit jo; tetere ejenunete atekerin kere nuka akwap ekonikiror, koyoŋito jo, kwape kiyoŋitotor ikonituŋa Isirael, tetere ejenunete ebe emaikinitai etogo lo loadukit eoŋ ekonikiror."
1Kings8:44 “Arai kelomasi ituŋakon aitiji Iukasurupokec, korot kere loijukari ijo kes, ilipete EJAKAIT kiteete ere lokiseuni ijo, kiteete da etogo loadukokinit eoŋ ekonikiror:"
1Kings8:45 Kopupununei do jo ijai toma akui akeeekilip, ka akeceiŋaiŋa, kisigalik akecekirot."
1Kings8:46 “Arai kediakasi kamakon, (naarai emamei ituŋanan yenimam ediakari) inyunyurikini ijo kes, ijaikini kes lukasurupokec, tetere ijoreorete kes akwap naka lukasurup, naelwana arai naeapie;"
1Kings8:47 Arai keomoomata kesi kakwap naeioreoritai, kibelokinos bobo, kinainaata ijo kakwap naka ŋul kalukijoreorete kes, kobalasi ebe, ‘Kidiaka isio, kiswama nukepali, kikwaik erono’;"
1Kings8:48 Arai kebonut mama ijai ijo kikecetauon kere, kaijarakee kere kakwap naka lukasurupokee, luejoreorete kes, kilipete jo kiteete akwapukec, nakiinakinit lukapapaakec, ere lokiseuni ijo, ka etogo loadukokinit ekonikiror:"
1Kings8:49 Kopupununei do ijo akeeeilip ka akeceiŋaiŋa ijai toma akuj aiboisikon, kisigalik akeeekirot;"
1Kings8:50 Kisionie ikonituŋa luapotu kodiakasi kamakon, ka aibucaretakec kere nuebuearete kamakon; koinak kes aitimio kakonyen nuka nul kaluejoreorete kes, tetere itimete kes:"
1Kings8:51 Naarai eraas ikonituŋa, ka airumetekon, naitolomuni kolo koMisiri, anyoun kokidin oupa loka asuat:"
1Kings8:52 Kokwenyenenete akonikonye aiŋaiŋa naka ekonikeiaanakinan, ka aiŋaiŋa naka ikonituŋa Isirael, kiiranari kes naemonyananata mamakon."
1Kings8:53 Naarai ibu kotiak kes katekerin kere nuka akwap, araun airumetekon, kwape ibalar kama ka Musa ekonikejaanakinan, naitolomunia lukapapaakosi koMisiri, wu EJAKAIT Edeke.”"
1Kings8:54 Kosodi, kedau Solomon ailip ailipasit nin kere ka aiŋaiŋa mama ejai EJAKAIT, konyou ŋesi koinaren ketem loka EJAKAIT, kane nan ekukokina eriorit akaninike akuj."
1Kings8:55 Kobwo ŋesi, kilipak ekodet kere loka Isirael arereŋ keporoto loepol ebe,"
1Kings8:56 “Kituritete EJAKAIT, loabu kisiyen iketuŋa Isirael, kwape ejaatar kere nuabu kisumun: mam adiokirot kere naeoliorit kaisumunetake nuejok, nuesumunit kakan naka Musa ekejaanakinanike."
1Kings8:57 Kojaenena EJAKAIT Ewokodeke kaoni, kwape aiaenenar kalukapapaawok: kinyek ŋesi anyoun kamawok, karaida ajalakin oni:"
1Kings8:58 Tetere isibelokini itauonowok mamake, alosenen korotinike kere, arieenen aicorakinetake, ka ikisilake ka itubesiake, lueeorakinit lukapapaawok."
1Kings8:59 Akakiro nu, nuenaina kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, koapikis kesi EJAKAIT Ewokodeke paaran ka kuare, kisigalik akirot naka ekejaanakinanike, ka akirot naka iketuŋa Isirael, kwape ekotor ŋinipaaran."
1Kings8:60 Tetere ejenunete atekerin kere nuka akwap ebe EJAKAIT, ŋes Edeke; emamei ece kere."
1Kings8:61 Kodolioritos do itauonokus mama ejai EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, alosenen kokisilake, arieenen aicorakinetake, kwape lolo.”"
1Kings8:62 Kosodi ekabaka ka Isirael kere nepepe kaŋes, koinakis asuban mama ejai EJAKAIT."
1Kings8:63 Koinak Solomon asubanit naka ainapakin nakeinakini EJAKAIT, imoŋin ilukumin akaisaarei ka luarei, ka amerekekin alukumin akwatat ka akaisaarei. Kwaŋin kotiaku ekabaka ka idwe luka Isirael etogo loka EJAKAIT,"
1Kings8:64 Kapaaran kaŋipekanin da kitalau ekabaka kidin alaro naajai kinaren ketogo loka EJAKAIT; naarai koinak kanen ainakinet naicweio, ka ainakinet naka akiria, ka asiepai nuka ainakineta nuka ainapakin: naarai adit etem loka aisinit loajai akonyen nuka EJAKAIT ailosikin ainakinet naicweio, ka ainakinet naka akiria, ka asiepai nuka ainakineta nuka ainapakin."
1Kings8:65 Kipo Solomon epueit kapak kaŋin, ka Isirael kere kaŋes, ekodet loepol, anyoun kaneelomarere Kamat kiton aguurut nako Misiri, kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, apaarasia akanykaarei, ka apaarasia akanykaarei, kes apaarasia atomon ka nuoŋon."
1Kings8:66 Kapaaran nakikanyetekauni kotwar ituŋa, kilipakis kesi ekabaka arereŋ, koloto owemanakee kolakara, kiyalamas kotauon kanuka ajokis kere naetodiki EJAKAIT Daudi ekejaanakinanike, ka Isirael iketuŋa."
1Kings9:1 Kosodi kanen, kedau Solomon aiduk etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka etogo loka ekabaka, ka eipud kere loka Solomon loisiyalamikinit ŋesi aswam,"
1Kings9:2 Kitaanyikin EJAKAIT Solomon nakiareit kwape kolo etakanikinor ŋes koGibeon.
1Kings9:3 Kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Eira eoŋ ailipikon ka aiŋaiŋakon, nailipit kakonyeneka: etalau eoŋ etogo lo, loiduk ijo, aibwaikin ekakiror ikar kere; ejaenenas akonyeka ka etauka nen apaarasia kere."
1Kings9:4 Ka jo da, arai ilosenenei kakonyeneka, kwape alosencno Daudi papakon, kadolit nakotau, kaitenara, aiswamaenen kwape ejaatar kere nukecorakinit jo, aricenen ikakisila, ka itubesiaka;"
1Kings9:5 Kasodi eoŋ aitieat eicoloŋ loka ajakanutukon koIsiracl ikar kere; kwape esumunio eoŋ Daudi papakon ebe, ‘Mam kimamikini ijo etuŋanan koicolon ioka Isirael.’"
1Kings9:6 Konye arai kipaasi anyoun katupit eoŋ, yes arai ikusidwe, komam irieenenete aicorakinetaka ka ikisilaka luebwaikinit kakonyenekus, konye ilosete ijaanakinete idekesio ice, imaete kes:"
1Kings9:7 Kasodi eoŋ amudiar Isirael kakwap naainakinit kes; acakari etogo lo, loetalaunit kanuka ekakiror kakonyeneka; eraun Isirael awarag ka ikienis katekerin kere:"
1Kings9:8 Karaida kimukurur etogo lo, konye eumokini ninitunanan yenitori, ijuari; ebalasi ebe, ‘Kanukinyo asubakinia EJAKAIT akwap na kwaŋin ka etogo lo?’"
1Kings9:9 Eboŋokinete ebe, ‘Naarai apotu kojala EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, lokolo etolomuni lukapapaakec kakwap nako Misiri, kitinata icedekesio, komaata kes, kijaanakis kes: kanuka ŋun abu EJAKAIT koyau aronis na kere mamakee.’”"
1Kings9:10 Kosodi kanen ketuboros ikar akaisaarei, luadukio Solomon itogoi nul iarei, etogo loka EJAKAIT ka etogo loka ekabaka,"
1Kings9:11 (Abu Kiram ekabaka loka Turo koinak Solomon ikito luka eres ka ikito luka eberos, ka esabu, kwape ajaar akoteke kere,) kosodi ekabaka Solomon da ainakin Kiram ireria akaisaarei kakwap naka Galilaya."
1Kings9:12 Kolom Kiram koTuro alosit aanyun ireria luainakini Solomon ŋes; mam apotu kisiyalamikis ŋes,"
1Kings9:13 Kotema ŋesi atiar, “Okwe onaeeka, inyoika ireria lu lukiinakinit eoŋ?” Komaik kes akwap naka Kabul, kiton lolo,"
1Kings9:14 Abu Kiram kijukak ekabaka atalatan akwatat ka akaisaarei nuka esabu.
1Kings9:15 Abu ekabaka Solomon kitelem esolo kanuka nu: adukio etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka eketogo elopet, ka Milo, ka arwatat naka Yerusalem, ka Kasor, ka Megido, ka Geser."
1Kings9:16 Abu Parao ekabaka loko Misiri kolot, kipiko Geser, kicwe kakim, koar Ikanaanin lueboiete kore, koinak araun akorakinet naka akokuke, aberu naka Solomon."
1Kings9:17 Koduk Solomon Geser, ka Bet-koron lokajesa."
1Kings9:18 Ka Baalat, ka Tamar toma amodiŋ, akwap naka Yuda,"
1Kings9:19 ka ireria kere lukinadet luajaas ka Solomon, ka ireria luka agalinike, ka ireria luka ikebwanenokoke, ka luepuda Solomon aiduk aisiyalamikin ŋes koYerusalem, koLebanon, kakwap kere naka airumiteke."
1Kings9:20 Ituŋa kere luedeunos luka Imorain, ka Ikitin, ka Iperusin, ka Ikibin, ka Iyebusin, lumam araas luka idwe luka Isirael;"
1Kings9:21 Ikeeedwe luedeunos atupakin kes kakwap, lumam apedorete idwe luka Isirael amudiar cut, kolemununei Solomon iitubusiana kamakee, kiton lolo."
1Kings9:22 Konye mam Solomon abu kitarau idwe luka Isirael ibulesin: konye araas kesi ikajiok, ka ikejaanakinakake, ka ikapolokoke, ka ijakake, ka ikayaitok luka agalinike ka luka ikebwanenokoke."
1Kings9:23 Ŋul kes ijaka lukapolok luayaito aswam naka Solomon, akwat akany ka akaisakany, luerumito ituŋa lueswamaete aswam."
1Kings9:24 Konye konyou akoku naka Parao kore loka Daudi alosit togoke loadukokinit Solomon ŋes: kosodi ŋesi aiduk Milo.
1Kings9:25 Abu Solomon koinak irwan auni nolikaru ainakineta nuieweio ka ainakineta nuka ainapakin kotem loadukokinit ŋesi EJAKAIT, kisupuru lukisupurununo kotem loajai akonyen nuka EJAKAIT. Kodau ŋesi kwaŋin etogo."
1Kings9:26 Kiswamau ekabaka Solomon erioŋet loka ameerin koEsion-geber, naedunyas ka Elot, kodoket loka Aŋolol Nakareijan, kakwap naka Edom."
1Kings9:27 Kijuka Kiram ikekejaanakinak toma ameerin nun, ikekwaŋak luajai aijcn nuka aŋolol, nepepe kikejaanakinak luka Solomon."
1Kings9:28 Kopotu Opir, koomata esabu kanen, atalatan akwat aoŋon ka akaisaarei, koinut ekabaka Solomon."
1Kings10:1 Kosodi kepupu Akabaka naka Seba eemut loka Solomon kanuka ekiror loka EJAKAIT, kobu aitem ŋes kainiseta kanuetioko,"
1Kings10:2 Kobu Yerusalem kojaas kituna luipu noi, ka akaalai nuebwokito luewuru maa, ka esabu Ioepol noi, ka amor nuka akais nuipu: kosodi kedolu ŋesi neejai Solomon, kolimok ŋes akiro kere nukejaas otauke."
1Kings10:3 Kitejenu Solomon akiro kere nukinisit ŋesi: amamei akirot naaponi kimunonikinai ekabaka namam kitejenunit ŋes.
1Kings10:4 Kosodi kedau Akabaka naka Seba aanyun acoa kere naka Solomon, ka etogo da lokeduki,"
1Kings10:5 Inyamat dalukomesake, ka eiboie loka ikebulesin, ka aijaanakin naka ikekeiaanakinak, ka ikecenapen, ka ikekaliak da, ka eititiriake lokedokanaria togo loka EJAKAIT; kimwokolikin eketau."
1Kings10:6 Kotema ŋesi ekabaka atiar, “Akirot naabu kapupunite kakwapuka kerai nakabeit naka aswamisiokon, ka akonicoa da,"
1Kings10:7 Kwabo mam abu keyu akiro ŋun, aitodol naabunio koanyut akakonye: ido koany, mam kalimokinitai atutubet: akonicoa ka akonikerianut itelekarito eemut loabu keira."
1Kings10:8 Elakara ikonituŋa, elakara da ikonikeiaanakinak lu, luebwoenenete kakonyenekon apaarasia kere, kopupcte akonieoa."
1Kings10:9 Kituritete EJAKAIT Ekonideke loeyalamikin kanukon adakakin; oicoloŋ loka Isirael: naarai abu EJAKAIT komina Isirael ikar kere. Ŋes kituluoria jo ekabaka, aiswamaenen nukabeit ka nuedolito.”"
1Kings10:10 Koinak ŋesi ckabaka esabu atalatan akwatat ka akaisaarci, ka luewuru maa luipu noi noi, ka amor da nuka akais nuipu: mam eyauna bobo luewuru maa luipu lueriakas kanul luainakini Akabaka naka Seba ekabaka Solomon."
1Kings10:11 Ido erioŋet loka ameerin nuka Kiram, lokeyauni esabu kOpir, koyau kOpir ikito lukajokak luipu noi noi ka amor nuka akais nuipu."
1Kings10:12 Kitarau ekabaka ikito lukajokak ipirin luka etogo loka EJAKAIT ka luka etogo loka ekabaka da, adeudeun da ka isabulin luka ikayook: mam eyauna bobo ikito lukajokak lueputos kanul, kwabo mam etakanuna, kiton lolo."
1Kings10:13 Kosodi Ekabaka Solomon ainakin Akabaka naka Seba iboro kere lukipuda ŋesi, ŋinibore kere yenikilipi, adepar ŋullukeinakini ekabaka Solomon kotoma asianut naka ekabaka. Kwaŋin kibelokin do, kobono ŋesi akwapuke, ka ikekejaanakinak."
1Kings10:14 Alaniru naka esabu loainunitai Solomon kokaru ediopet kerai atalatan akwat akanykape ka akaisakanykape ka nukanykape nuka esabu.
1Kings10:15 Adepar loainunete ikemutunok, ka agwelanar naka ikagwelanarak, ka loka ikabakan luka ituŋa luinyalakina, ka loka ikayaitok luka akwap."
1Kings10:16 Kiswamau ekabaka Solomon ibukwi lukapolok akwat aarei luka esabu loerukuk: nolibuku lokapolon abu koya isekelin akwat akanykape luka esabu.
1Kings10:17 Kiswamau ŋesi ibukwi akwat auni luka esabu loerukuk; ŋolibuku abu koya ilatirin iuni luka esabu: kibwaik ekabaka kes togo loka ikito luka Lebanon.
1Kings10:18 Bobo da kiswamau ekabaka eicoloŋ lokapolon loka ikel luka etom, kiladaa ŋes kesabu kaloejok noi."
1Kings10:19 Keiaas adoketa akanykape oicoloŋ, kolukuna kuiu keicolon kokauke: kejaas akanin epuai kepuai kaibois neiboiere, ka iŋatunyo iarei luabwoete kawaitin nuka akanin."
1Kings10:20 Kobwaata iŋatunyo itomon kaluarei epuai kepuai kadoketa akanykape: amamei lokeputos kanol kaiakanut kere.
1Kings10:21 Iboro kere lumaset luka ekabaka Solomon keraas luka esabu, ka iboro kere lukotogo loka ikito luka Lebanon keraas luka esabu kaloelai: amameete lukeraas luka epuesa; mam apodoi araut ibore kapaarasia nuka Solomon."
1Kings10:22 Naarai kejai ekabaka erioŋet loka Tarusis aŋolol ncpepe kerionet loka Kiram: abu erioŋet loka Tarusis kobunenenei atipet ŋulukar iuni, ayaun esa bu, ka epuesa, ka ikela luka etom, ka ieomion, ka akweny nukejaas ikorio lukiiesesinei kaluipu."
1Kings10:23 Kwaŋin kiteleka ekabaka Solomon ikabakan kere luka akwap kabar ka acoa.
1Kings10:24 Komoata lukakwap kere aanyun Solomon, akiirar acoake, nakibwaikinit Edeke otauke."
1Kings10:25 Koinununete ninirunanan ainakineteke, iboro luka epuesa, ka iboro luka esa bu, ka inapen, ka lujiis, ka luewuru maa, ka ibalasin, ka inyubun, esolo loka ŋolikaru."
1Kings10:26 Kotukonok Solomon agalin ka ikebwanenok: kejaas ŋes agalin alukumit ka akwat aoŋon, ka ikebwanenok ilukumin itomon ka luarei, lukibwaikinit oreria luka agalin, ka Yerusalem da nekejai ekabaka."
1Kings10:27 Kitarau ekabaka epuesa asubit bala amor koYerusalem, kitarau iresia asubit bala ikito luka esukumor luejaas apuutona, kanuka aipues."
1Kings10:28 Ayaunio ibalasin lukejaas kaSolomon koMisirij kodumut ikagwelanarak luka ekabaka kes kosipanin, nolisipan kotiaike."
1Kings10:29 Ayaun agali koMisiri kogwelarite kisekelin akwat akanykape luka epuesa, ebalasit da akwatat ka akaisakany: koinununut kes kwaŋin ikabakan kere luka Ikitin, ka ikabakan kere luka Suria kakanikec."
1Kings11:1 Komina ekabaka Solomon aŋor nuipu numo, nepepe kakoku naka Parao, aŋor nuka Imoabin, nuka Imonain, Idomein, Isidonin, ka Ikitin;"
1Kings11:2 Nuka atekerin nuabala EJAKAIT idwe luka Isirael ebe, “Mam ilosete mamakee, karaida kes abunore mama ijaas: naarai abeit ibelokinete kesi ikusitauon atupenen ikecedekesio.” Kiminaikin Solomon ŋun kamin."
1Kings11:3 Kejaas ŋes aŋor akwat akanykaarei, nukapolok, ka abusian akwat auni: kibelokis akenor etauken."
1Kings11:4 Naarai nakemoionia Solomon, kibelokis akenor etauke atupit idekesio ice: mam kedolit eketau mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekedeke, kwape ajaar etau loka Daudi papake."
1Kings11:5 Naarai kotupa Solomon Asitoret adeke naka Isidonin, ka Milikom etal loka Imonain."
1Kings11:6 Kiswama Solomon nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, mam abu kotuparite eut EJAKAIT kwape atuparitor Daudi papake."
1Kings11:7 Kosodi Solomon adukokin Kemos etal loka Moab, aibois naicelelei, komoru loitei Yerusalem, Molok da etalloka idwe luka Amon."
1Kings11:8 Kiswamak kwaŋin aŋoroke kere numo, nuesupurununete lukisupurununo koinakis da asuban mama ejaas idekesiokec."
1Kings11:9 Konyunyurik EJAKAIT Solomon, naarai ebelokit eketau anyoun kama ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, loabu kitaanyikin ŋes irwan aarei,"
1Kings11:10 Ido kicorak ŋes nuka akirot kana ebe kinyek atupar idekesio ice; konye mam ŋes kerica nueeorakini EJAKAIT.
1Kings11:11 Kanuka ŋun kotema EJAKAIT Solomon atiar, “Naarai iswama ŋun, komam iricit aitutuketaka ka ikisilaka, lukeeorakini jo, abeit acilari eoŋ ajakanut kamakon, ainakini ekejaanakinanikon."
1Kings11:12 Konye mam eswamai nun kapaarasiakon, kanuka Daudi papakon: dimarai acilari kama kokokukon."
1Kings11:13 Konye mam acilari ajakanut kere; dimarai ainakini okokukon ateker adiopet, kanuka Daudi ekejaanakinanika, ido kanuka Yerusalem lokaseuni.”"
1Kings11:14 Kitonyou EJAKAIT lokasurup aluikin Solomon, Kadad, Edomit: kerai ŋesi loka aur naka ekabaka koEdom."
1Kings11:15 Naarai nakeiaar Daudi Edom, kolot Yoab da ekapolon loka ajore aida lukatwak, ido abu koar nolikiliokit koEdom;"
1Kings11:16 (Naarai kosalak Yoab ka Isirael kere ŋina ilapio ikanykape, aitodol neamudiaria nolikiliokit koEdom;)"
1Kings11:17 Konye koker Kadad, ŋes ka Idomein ice luka ikejaanakinak luka papake, alosit Misiri; koroko Kadad erai ikoku yenididi."
1Kings11:18 Konyout koMidian, kodolot Paran: koyanaasi ituŋa nepepe kakes koParan, kodolot Misiri, mama ejai Parao ekabaka loko Misiri; loabu koinak ŋes etogo, kokorak inyamat, koinak ŋes alup."
1Kings11:19 Kominunai Kadad noi kakonyen nuka Parao, tape ekorakini ŋes inaei naka aberuke elopet aimany, inaei naka Tapenes akabaka."
1Kings11:20 Kourik inaci naka Tapenes ŋes Genubat okokuke, lokeiakari Tapenes kotogo loka Parao: koiai Genubat togo loka Parao nepepe kodwe luka Parao,"
1Kings11:21 Kepupu Kadad koMisiri ebe keiotoor Daudi kalukapapaake, atwana da Yoab ekapolon loka ajore, kobala Kadad Parao atiar, “Kisiikinai kalot, kaboŋo bukosi.”"
1Kings11:22 Kosodi Parao atemar ŋes atiar, “Konye kiwoliki ijo inyo kamakaŋ, tape ikoto alosit bukus?” Koboŋok ebe, “Mam ibore: konye kisiikinai kalot.”"
1Kings11:23 Kitonyou Edeke lokasurup ece aluikin ŋes, Reson okoku loka Eliada, loabu koker kama ejai ejakaitike Kadadeser ekabaka loka Soba:"
1Kings11:24 Kotukonok ŋesi ituŋa mamake, korau ekapolon loka erioŋet, nakearia Daudi luka Soba: koloto Damasiko, kiboienenete kaŋina, kirumata Damasiko."
1Kings11:25 Kerai ŋesi lokasurup loka Isirael apaarasia kere nuka Solomon, kogelara ameŋeranut naka Kadad: kola ŋesi Isirael, kirum Suria."
1Kings11:26 Yeroboam da okoku loka Nebat, Epuraimit loka Sereda, ekejaanakinan loka Solomon, ekiror loka totoke Serua, apuserut, ŋes da kitonyou akekan aluikin ekabaka."
1Kings11:27 Na ŋes akirot naainakinit ŋes aitonyoun akekan asurokin ekabaka: koduk Solomon Milo, konwok neketiyaara kore loka Daudi papake."
1Kings11:28 Kerai ekesa ie Yeroboam ekirigi loketitiŋ: koany Solomon ebe ekukurana ekatumunan, koinak ŋes ayait aitaaritoi kere naka ekek loka Yosep."
1Kings11:29 Kosodi kanen kapak kaŋin, nakelomaria Yeroboam koYerusalem, kodum Akiya enabi Esilonit ŋes korot; abu Aldya konap anapito nakitetet, koiaas kesi kere iarei bonik okitui."
1Kings11:30 Kitin Aldya anapito nakitetet naanapit, koeilicil atutubeta atomon ka nuarei."
1Kings11:31 Kotema ŋesi Yeroboam atiar, “Koyana ijo atutubeta atomon: naarai inera EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael kwanata ebe, ‘Koany, acilari eoŋ ajakanut kakan naka Solomon, kainakini jo atekerin atomon:"
1Kings11:32 (Konye esalakini ŋes ateker adiopet, kanuka Daudi ekejaanakinanika, ido kanuka Yerusalem, ere lokaseuni kotoma atekerin kere nuka Isirael:)"
1Kings11:33 Naarai apotu kajalakis eoŋ, komaata Asitoret adeke naka Isidonin, ka Kemos edeke loka Moab, ka Milikom edeke loka idwe luka Amon; mam apotu kolosenenete korotinika, aiswamaenen nuedolito kakonyeneka, aricenen ikakisila ka ikatubesia, kwape kolo eswamaa Daudi papake."
1Kings11:34 Konye mam ayaŋaari ajakanut kere kakanike: konye etaraun ŋes ekapolon apaarasia kere nuka aijarake, kanuka Daudi ekakejaanakinan, loabu kaseu, naarai aricenenei aicorakinetaka ka ikisilaka:"
1Kings11:35 Konye alemari ajakanut kakan naka okokuke, ainakini jo, atekerin atomon."
1Kings11:36 Ainakini okokuke ateker adiopet, tetere ejaenena Daudi ekejaanakinanika atala tiritir kakonyeneka koYerusalem, ere loabu kaseu aibwaikin nen ekakiror."
1Kings11:37 Ayaŋaar eoŋ jo, irumi ijo kwape ipudar akoniijar kere, iraun ekabaka koIsirael."
1Kings11:38 Kosodi, arai ipupuni kere nueeorakini jo, kolosenenei korotinika, kiswamaenenei da nuedolito kakonyeneka, korieenenei ikisilaka ka aicorakinetaka, kwape kolo kiswamaa Daudi ekejaanakinanika; ajaenena kajo, adukokini jo ekek loicasit, kwape adukokinia Daudi, ainakini jo Isirael."
1Kings11:39 Ido eticani aur naka Daudi kanuka nun, konye mere ikar kere.’’’"
1Kings11:40 Kanuka mm komoote Solomon aiar Yeroboam: konye konyou Yeroboam, koker Misiri, mama ejai Sisak eka baka loko Misiri, kojaenena Misiri aitodol neatwania Solomon."
1Kings11:41 Aswamisio ace nuka Solomon, kere da nuabu kiswama, ka acoake, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aswamisio nuka Solomon?"
1Kings11:42 Apak naabu Solomon kirumak Isirael kere koYerusalem keraas ikar akaisaoŋon,"
1Kings11:43 Koiotor Solomon kalukapapaake, kidaikinai ore loka Daudi papake: kirum Rekoboam okokuke aiboisike."
1Kings12:1 Kolot Rekoboam Sekem: naarai kinotara Isirael kere Sekem aitaraun ŋes ekabaka,"
1Kings12:2 Kosodi kanen, kepupu Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat ŋun, (naarai kerina ejai Misiri, neakeriarit anyoun kakonyen nuka ekabaka Solomon, kiboienenei Yeroboam koMisiri. Aponi kijukarai anyaraun ŋes.)"
1Kings12:3 Kobu Yeroboam ka ekodet kere loka Isirael, kinerata kaRekoboam ebe,"
1Kings12:4 “Abu papakon kitalanir ajookotokosi: aso do kitebeben aswam naetiono naka papakon, ka ajookotoke naelanir naebwaikinit mamakosi, isio da kijaanakini jo.’"
1Kings12:5 Kotema kes atiar, “Koloto kodaut apaarasia auni, kosodete aboŋun mamakan.” Koloto ituŋa."
1Kings12:6 Kinerut eka baka Rekoboam kimakio, lukebwoenenete kakonyen nuka Solomon papake eroko ejari, ebe, “Ibalas bo yesi ai eoŋ aboŋokin ituŋa ŋul?”"
1Kings12:7 Kobalas ŋes atiar, “Arai ikoto araun ekeiaanakinan mama ejaas ituŋa lu lolo, kokoto aijaanakin kes, Koboŋok kes, kolimok akiro nuejok, aso eraunos kesi ikonikejaanakinak ikar kere.”"
1Kings12:8 Konye kola ainerun naka imakio naapesikinito ŋes, kinerut kikatumunak luapolounete kaŋes, luabwoete kakonyeneke."
1Kings12:9 Kotema kes atiar, “Ibalas bo yesi ai, kabonokis ituija ŋul, luapotu kabalas eoŋ ebe, ‘Kitebeben ajookot nakibwaikini papakon mamakosi’?”"
1Kings12:10 Kotemasi ikatumunak luapolounete kaŋes ebe, “Kolimok ituŋa lu lukibalas jo ebe, ‘Abu papakon kitalanir ajookotokosi konye jo kitebeben ŋes kamakosi’; ilimokini kes kwanata ebe, ‘Ebur ekabokorit lodidi aitelekar aŋabet naka papaka,"
1Kings12:11 Aso do abu papaka kisibwok yes aiookot naelanir, eyatakini do eoŋ aiookotokus: abu papaka koswala yes kidasc, konye eoŋ kaswalari yes kikiritona.’’’"
1Kings12:12 Aso kobu Yeroboam ka ituŋa kere mama ejai Rekoboam apaaran nakiwuniet, kwape eeorakinia ekabaka ebe, “Kobonut bobo apaaran nakiwuniet.”"
1Kings12:13 Koboŋok ekabaka ituŋa kaisiejakin, kola ainerun naka imakio naapesikinito ŋes:"
1Kings12:14 Kinera kakes kwape ajaar ainerun naka ikatumunak ebe, “Abu papaka kitalanir ajookotokus, konye eoŋ eyatakini ajookotokus: abu papaka koswala yes kidase, konye eoŋ kaswalari yes kikiritona.”"
1Kings12:15 Aso mam abu ekabaka kopup ituŋa; naarai kerai akirot naabu EJAKAIT koyau, tetere itieasi akekirot naabu EJAKAIT kiner kama ka Akiya Esilonit mama ejai Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat."
1Kings12:16 Keanyu Isirael kere ebe mam abu ekabaka kopup kes, kobonokis ituŋa ekabaka ebe, “Anyoin akorakinetekosi kama ka Daudi? Ido emamei sio airumet kotoma okoku loka Yese: Ape ma owemanakus, wu Isirael: Daudi, koanyanar do ekonikek.” Koloto do luka Isirael owemanakee."
1Kings12:17 Konye kirum Rekoboam idwe luka Isirael luibojete koreria luka Yuda.
1Kings12:18 Kosodi ekabaka Rekoboam aijukar Adoram, loapolokinit esolo; abu Isirael kere kibiribir ŋes kamor, kotwana. Kiwonya ekabaka Rekoboam adokar agalike akerit Yerusalem."
1Kings12:19 Kwaŋin kipaliik do Isirael ekek loka Daudi, kiton lolo."
1Kings12:20 Kosodi kanen, kepupu Isirael kere ebe Aboŋu Yeroboam, kijukasi anyaraun ŋes abunore atukot, kitaraut ŋes ekabaka koIsirael kere: amamei yenatupit ekek loka Daudi, dimarai ateker naka Yuda bon."
1Kings12:21 Kedol Rekoboam Yerusalem, kotukonok ŋesi lukokek loka Yuda kere, ka ateker naka Benyamin, ituŋa lueseunitai ilukumin akwatat ka akaisakanykauni, lukeraas ikaiiok, aitiji ekek loka Isirael, ainyakun ajakanut bobo neejai Rekoboam okoku loka Solomon."
1Kings12:22 Konye kobu akirot naka Edeke mama ejai Semaia etuŋanan loka Edeke ebe,"
1Kings12:23 “Kolimok Rekoboam okoku loka Solomon, ekabaka loka Yuda, ka ekek kere loka Yuda ka Benyamin, ka ituŋa ice da ebe,"
1Kings12:24 ‘Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Mam ilosete, ido mam ijiikinos kiinacanakus idwe luka Isirael: kobono ŋolituŋanan togoke; naarai erai akirot na nakaŋ.’’’ Kosodete kopuput akirot naka EJAKAIT, kobonosi, koloto kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT."
1Kings12:25 Kosodi Yeroboam aiduk Sekem akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, kiboienenei kaŋina; konyou ŋesi kanen, koduk Penuel."
1Kings12:26 Kotema Yeroboam kotauke atiar, “Kwana eboŋori ajakanut okek loka Daudi:"
1Kings12:27 Arai kelosenenoto ituŋa lu ainanakin asuban togo loka EJAKAIT Yerusalem, ibelokinos bobo itauon luka ituŋa kalu mama ejai ejakaitikec, Rekoboam ekabaka loka Yuda; kaarete eoŋ, eboŋorete do mama ejai Rekoboam ekabaka loka Yuda.”"
1Kings12:28 Kosodi kineru ekabaka, kiswamau itak iarei luka esabu; kotema kes atiar, “Erai akirot naepol yes alosenen Yerusalem; koany idekesiokon, ijo Isirael, lukitolomunete jo kakwap nako Misiri.”"
1Kings12:29 Kosipok idiopet Betel, ka ice da kosipok Dan."
1Kings12:30 Koraun akirot nin adiakaret: naarai kolosenenoto ituŋa ice aima idiopet Betel, ice da mape Dan,"
