1Kings12:31 Kodukok itogoi aiboisio nuiceleleete, koseu icetuŋa kotuna kere kitarau isasedotin, lumam keraas idwe luka Lebi."
1Kings12:32 Kicorak Yeroboam epueit kolap lokikanyetekauni, kapaaran nakitomonet kakany naka elap, kwape kepucit loejai Yuda, kolot ŋesi otem; kiswama kwaŋin da koBetel, koinak asuban mama ejaas itak luabu kiswamau: kibwaik isasedotin luka aiboisio nuiceleleete nuabu kiswamau koBetel."
1Kings12:33 Kolot otem loabu kiswamau koBetel kapaaran nakitomonet kakany kolap lokikanyetekauni, ŋes elap loabu ŋesi koseu kotauke: kicorak epueit kanuka idwe luka Isirael, kolot otem aisupuruun lukisupurununo."
1Kings13:1 Ido koany, konyou etuŋanan loka Edeke ko Yuda kakirot naka EJAKAIT kobu Betel: abwoi Yeroboam eiduny ketem aisupuruun lukisupuru."
1Kings13:2 Kilamak etem kakirot naka EJAKAIT, kotema atiar, “Wu etem, etem, inera kwanata EJAKAIT ebe, ‘Koany, ewuruunio ikoku kokek loka Daudi, ekekiror Yosia; einakini ŋesi kamakon isasedotin luka aiboisio nuiceleleete luisupuruunete lukisupurununo kamakon araun asuban, icweikinete kesi akojo nuka ituŋa kamakon.’”"
1Kings13:3 Koinak aanyunet kapaaran kaŋin, ebe, “Na ŋes aanyunet naenera EJAKAIT: koany, eeila etem, ebukor ekurwon loejai tomake.”"
1Kings13:4 Kosodi kanen, kepupu ekabaka akirot naka etuŋanan loka Edeke, naelamia ŋesi etem koBetel, kikia Yeroboam akekan kotem, kotema ebe, “Kikam ŋes.” Koono akekan naekiarit adoditor ŋes, komam epedori asukokin."
1Kings13:5 Kocila etem da, kobukor ekurwon kotem, kwape ajaar aanyunet naabu etuŋanan loka Edeke koinak kakirot naka EJAKAIT,"
1Kings13:6 Koboŋok ekabaka kotema etuŋanan loka Edeke ebe, “Kinaina cabo asianut naka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kilipakinai eoŋ, konaleu akakan.” Kiŋaina etuŋanan loka Edeke EJAKAIT, kitanaleunai akekan, kojaun kwape lem sek."
1Kings13:7 Kotema ekabaka etuŋanan loka Edeke atiar, “Kaloto ore, kikwaru, kainakini jo ainakinet.”"
1Kings13:8 Kotema etuŋanan loka Edeke ekabaka atiar, “Arai kiinaki ijo eoŋ atutubet naka etogokon, mam eoŋ alosi kaio, idomam anyami atap karaida aimat akipi kaibois kana."
1Kings13:9 Naarai aponi kecorakinitete eoŋ kakirot naka EJAKAIT ebe, ‘Mam inyami atap, karaida aimat akipi, karaida aboŋor korot lokibunio.’’’"
1Kings13:10 Kosodi kobono kecerot, mam abu kobono korot kaloabunio Betel,"
1Kings13:11 Kiboienenei enabi lomoion koBetel; kobu ediopet kodweke kolimok ŋes aswamisio kere nueswama etuŋanan loka Edeke kapaaran kaŋin koBetel: akiro nuabu ŋesi kolimok ekabaka, ŋun da kolimokis papakee."
1Kings13:12 Kotema papakee kes ebe, “Etoro bo ŋesi orot ali?” Apotu odweke koanyut erot loetori etuŋanan loka Edeke, loabunit koYuda."
1Kings13:13 Kotema odweke atiar, “Kopesikinai lupetan asigiria.” Kosodete kesi apesikin lupetan asigiria: kibwanen ŋesi."
1Kings13:14 Kibwapak etuŋanan loka Edeke, kodum ŋes iboie kotolim kelua: kotema ŋes atiar, “Ŋo ŋes etuŋanan loka Edeke loabuni koYuda? “Kotema atiar, “Eoŋ lo,”"
1Kings13:15 Kosodi atemar ŋes atiar, “Kabonosi oreka, konyam atap.”"
1Kings13:16 Kotema atiar, “Mam apedori aboŋor kajo, karaida alomar kajo: mam da anyami atap karaida aimat akipi kajo kaibois kana:"
1Kings13:17 Naarai aponi kalimokinitete kakirot naka EJAKAIT ebe, ‘Sirikinyam atap, karaida aimat akipi kaŋina, sirikiboŋo da korot loibu kobunio.’’’"
1Kings13:18 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Eoŋ da enabi kwape kajo; abu emalaika kalimok eoŋ kakirot naka EJAKAIT ebe, ‘Kinyaku ŋes togokon, konyam atap, komat akipi.’’’ Konye abu kinalai."
1Kings13:19 Kwaŋin kobono kaŋes, konyam atap kotogoke, komat akipi."
1Kings13:20 Kosodi kanen enyamete, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai enabi loabu kinyaku ŋes:"
1Kings13:21 Kiworo mama ejai etuŋanan laka Edeke loabunit koYuda ebe, “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, ‘Naarai ipaliiki ijo akirot naka EJAKAIT, mam irieit aicorakinet naeeoraki EJAKAIT Ekonideke jo."
1Kings13:22 Konye ibonu, inyama atap, imat akipi kaibois nakilimokinio jo ebe, “Sirikinyam atap, sirikimat akipi”; mam akuanakon idaikinio ates naka lukapapaakon.’”"
1Kings13:23 Kosodi kanen kedau ŋesi ainyam atap, ka aimat, kopesik lupetan asigiria enabi loenyakuni ŋesi."
1Kings13:24 Napelosi, kiriamakinos kenaruny korot, koar eŋatuny ŋes, kocakak akekuan orot, kobwo asigiria die kaŋes; kobwo da eŋatuny die kakekuan,"
1Kings13:25 Ido koany, kitoroto ituŋa, koanyutu akuan korot, eŋatuny da ebwoi die kates; kopotu, koyaut akiro ore neeboieneno enabi ŋol lomoion."
1Kings13:26 Kepupu ŋun enabi loabu kinyaku ŋes korot, kotema atiar, “Ŋes ŋol etuŋanan loka Edeke, loabu kipaliik akirot naka EJAKAIT: kanuka nun eiaiki EJAKAIT ŋes mama ejai eŋatuny, loapoopoo ŋes, aara da, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, naabu kiner kaŋes.”"
1Kings13:27 Kolimok odweke ebe, “Kopesikinai lupetan asigiria.” Kopesikis."
1Kings13:28 Kolot, kodum aketes korot, ka asigiria ka eŋatuny ebwoete die kates: mam abu eŋatuny konyamite ates, karaida apoopo asigiria."
1Kings13:29 Kodaku enabi ates naka etuŋanan loka Edeke, kidokok asigiria, kinyaku ore, aibworo ka ainuk ŋes."
1Kings13:30 Kibwaik akuanake atesike elopet; kibworoto ŋes ebe, “Wu okwe onaceka!”"
1Kings13:31 Kosodi kanen, kedau ainuk ŋes kotema odweke ebe, “Katwana eoŋ, konukakis eoŋ ates neenukuk etuŋanan loka Edeke; kibwaikis akakojo eiduny kakekoio,"
1Kings13:32 Naarai abeit itodolikinio akirot naabu ŋesi kiworo kakirot naka EJAKAIT ilamakini etem koBet-el, ilamakini da itogoi kere luka aiboisio nuiceleleete nuejaas oreria luka Samaria.”"
1Kings13:33 Akaulo kanun mam abu Yeroboam kobonu korotoke loerono, konye kiyatak aseun kotuna kere lukitarauni isasedotin luka aiboisio nuiceleleete: ŋol kere loekoto, kotiakuni, tetere ejaas isasedotin luka aiboisio nuiceleleete."
1Kings13:34 Koraun akirot ŋin adiakaret kokek loka Yeroboam, agelar ŋes, ka amudiar ŋes kakwap."
1Kings14:1 Kapaarasia kanun kodekakin Abiya okoku loka Yeroboam,"
1Kings14:2 Kotema Yeroboam nakowaike ebe, “Konyou, kenainait, kitegelikin bon, tetere mam iienun ebe irai aberu naka Yeroboam: kolot Silo; koany, ejai Akiya enabi ŋina, loabu kinera nukan ebe araun eoŋ ekabaka loka ituŋa kalu."
1Kings14:3 Koyana da imugatin itomon, ka aluŋuren nuka imugatin, ka atany naka esik da, kolot mama ejai: kilimokini ŋesi jo nuedoikinete ikoku.”"
1Kings14:4 Kiswama aberu naka Yeroboam kwaŋin, konyou, kolot Silo, kobu togo loka Akiya, Mam Akiya epedoro aanyun; naarai awariwarete akekonye kanuka amoion."
1Kings14:5 Kotema EJAKAIT Akiya atiar, “Koany, ebuni aberu naka Yeroboam aiŋitun jo nuka okokuke; naarai edek; ilimokini ŋes kwanata kwanata”: naarai nakelomunia itegelikini bon araun aceberu,"
1Kings14:6 Kosodi kepupu Akiya akeieke napelomuni kokek, kotema atiar, “Kolom, ijo aberu naka Yeroboam; kanukinyo itegelikinor bon araun ace? Naarai kejukunitai mamakon kakiro kanuelanir."
1Kings14:7 Kolot, kolimok Yeroboam ebe, ‘Inera EJAKAIT Edeke loka Isirael kwanata ebe: “Naarai abu ketopoloo jo kotuna, ketarau jo ekapolon kotunaka Isirael,"
1Kings14:8 Abu kacila da ajakanut alemar kokek loka Daudi, kainak jo; konye mam jo iputosi bala ekejaanakinanika Daudi, loabu koricite aicorakinetaka, katupite keketau kere, aiswamaenen nuedolito bonik kakonyeka:"
1Kings14:9 Konye ibu kiswama aronis adepar kere lukigeikinete jo, ilot isub icedekesio, ka aputosia nuealuna, aitunyunyurikin eoŋ, kicaka eoŋ kaukon:"
1Kings14:10 Kanuka nun, koany, ayaun aronis kokek loka Yeroboam, amudiari kama ka Yeroboam ninikoku yenikiliokit, ŋin yenienitai ka nin yeneosikinitai koIsirael, apiari eut ekek loka Yeroboam, kwape epiaria ituŋanan aoret, aitodol needaunotor."
1Kings14:11 Ŋin yenika Yeroboam yenetwanikini ore enyamete inokwo; ŋin da yenetwanikini ais enyamete akweny nuka apak: naarai alimu EJAKAIT nin.”
1Kings14:12 Aso konyou ijo, kolot togokon; naelomariata akonikeje ore, etwani ikoku,"
1Kings14:13 Ibworosi lukoIsirael kere ŋes, enukete ŋes; naarai ŋes bon yenika Yeroboam yenidaikinio ates: naarai kotomake edumuna adiokirot naejok mama ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, kokek loka Yeroboam."
1Kings14:14 Bobo da edakakini EJAKAIT ekabaka koIsiraellocmudiari ekek loka Ycroboam kapaaran kaŋin: inyo bo da? Kwape kwana,"
1Kings14:15 Naarai edanyi EJAKAIT Isirael, kwape iianere aladot kakipi; erutuni da Isirael kakwap kana naejok naabu koinak lukapapaakec, isiarisiari kes juwai kEcor; naarai asubata Aserinikee, aitunyunyurikin EJAKAIT,"
1Kings14:16 Ejalakini ŋesi Isirael kanuka aronisio nuka Yeroboam, nuadiaka ŋesi, nuetidiaka Isirael da.”"
1Kings14:17 Konyou aberu naka Yeroboam, kolot, kobu Tirisa; napadolio okek loka etogo, kotwani ikoku."
1Kings14:18 Kida Isirael kere ŋes, kibworo ŋes; kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, naenera ŋesi kama ka Akiya enabi ekeiaanakinanike."
1Kings14:19 Aswamisio ace kere nuka Yeroboam, kwape aiior, ido kwape erumia, koany, iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael."
1Kings14:20 Apaarasia nuabu Yeroboam kirumak emwaasi ikar akaisaarei ka luarei: koiotoor kalukapapaake, kirum Nadab okokuke aiboisike,"
1Kings14:21 Kirum Rekoboam okoku loka Solomon Yuda. Kerai Rekoboam loka ikar akaisaoŋon ka lodiopet egeuni airum, kirumak ikar itomon ka lukanykaarei koYerusalem, ere loabu EJAKAIT koseu katekerin kere nuka Isirael, aibwaikin ekekiror nen. Ekiror loka totoke ŋes Naama naka Amon."
1Kings14:22 Kiswama Yuda nuaroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT; kisurumata ŋes ekokote kanuka aronisiokec nuapotu kiswamata, adepar nueswamaete lukapapaakee."
1Kings14:23 Naarai kes da kodukoto aiboisio nuiceleleete, ka ipirino, ka Aserin, kanoliukot loicelelei, ido kwap kanolikiroi loepesit."
1Kings14:24 Ajaas da iketepak ikiliok kakwap: apotu kiswamata kwape ajaatar italesio luka atekerin nuereneari EJAKAIT kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael.
1Kings14:25 Kosodi kanen, kokaru lokikanyet loka ekabaka Rekoboam, kobu Sisak ekabaka loko Misiri asurokin Yerusalem:"
1Kings14:26 Koyana iboro luka akais nuipu luka etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka iboro luka akais nuipu luka etogo loka ekabaka: koyana kere: koyaŋa da ibukui kere luka esabu lueswamat Solomon."
1Kings14:27 Kiswamau ekabaka Rekoboam ibukui luka aisinit aiboisikec, kijaik akanin nuka ikapolok luka ikedarak, luedarete ekek loka etogo loka ekabaka,"
1Kings14:28 Kosodi nakelomanaria ekabaka togo loka EJAKAIT, kodakanarete ikedarak kes, kinyakanarete agola naka ikedarak."
1Kings14:29 Aswamisio ace nuka Rekoboam, kere da nuabu kiswama, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Yuda?"
1Kings14:30 Ido kejaenena ejie kidin Rekoboam ka Yeroboam dueudue.
1Kings14:31 Koiotoor Rekoboam kalukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai kalukapapaake ore loka Daudi: ekiror loka totoke Naama naka Amon, Kirum Abiyam okokuke aiboisike."
1Kings15:1 Kokaru do lokitomonet krkanykauni loka ekabaka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat kogeu Abiyam airum Yuda.
1Kings15:2 Kirumak ikar iuni koYerusalem: ekiror loka totoke ŋes Maaka akoku naka Abisalom.
1Kings15:3 Kolosenenei karonisio kere nuka papake, nueswamai ageikini ŋes: mam eketau adolit kaneejai EJAKAIT Ekedeke, kwape ketau loka papaake Daudi."
1Kings15:4 Konye kanuka Daudi abu EJAKAIT Ekedeke koinak ŋes atala koYerusalem, adakakin okokuke atupakin ŋes, aiticat Yerusalem:"
1Kings15:5 Naarai abu Daudi kiswama nuedolito kakonye nuka EJAKAIT, mam abu kopaa kakirot kere naeeorakini ŋes, apaarasia kere nuka aijarake, dimarai akirot naka Uria Ekitit."
1Kings15:6 Keiaenena ejie kidiŋ Rekoboam ka Yeroboam apaarasia kere nuka aijarake.
1Kings15:7 Aswamisio ace kere nuka Abiyam, kere da nuabu kiswama, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Yuda? Kejaenena ejie kidin Abiyam ka Yeroboam."
1Kings15:8 Kojotoor Abiyam kalukapapaake; aponi kidaikinai ore loka Daudi: kirum Asa okokuke aiboisike.
1Kings15:9 Kokaru lokakaisaarei loka Yeroboam eka baka loka Isirael kogeu Asa airum Yuda.
1Kings15:10 Kirumak ikar akaisaoŋon ka lodiopet koYerusalem: ekiror loka totoke ŋes Maaka akoku naka Abisalom.
1Kings15:11 Kiswama Asa nuedolit kakonye nuka EJAKAIT, kwape eswamaa Daudi papaake."
1Kings15:12 Kirenea iketepak ikiliok kakwap, kolema aputosia kere nueswamato lukapapaake."
1Kings15:13 Kirenea da Maaka totoke karaut akabaka, naarai abu kiswamau aput naketal araun Asera; kojepa Asa aputoke, kiewe kaguurut Kiduron."
1Kings15:14 Konye mam aponi kolemarai aiboisio nuiceleleete: konye kedolit etau loka Asa kaneejai EJAKAIT apaarasiake kere.
1Kings15:15 Kitoloma iboro togo loka EJAKAIT luabu papake kotiakarite, ka iboro luabu ŋesi elopet kotiakarite, epuesa, ka esabu, ka iboro."
1Kings15:16 Keiaenena ejie kidin Asa ka Baasa ekabaka loka Isirael apaarasiakec kere.
1Kings15:17 Kolot Baasa ekabaka loka Isirael asurokin Yuda, koduk Rama, tetere mam eeamakini idiotuŋanan alomar arai alomun mama ejai Asa ekabaka loka Yuda."
1Kings15:18 Kosodi Asa ayaŋaar epuesa kere ka esabu luedeuna koboro luka akais nuipu luka etogo loka ekabaka, kijaik kes akanin nuka ikejaanakinakake; kijuka ekabaka Asa kes mama ejai Ben-kadad, okoku loka Tab-rimon, okoku loka Kesion, ekabaka loka Suria, loeboienenei koDamasiko, ebe,"
1Kings15:19 “Ejai aitutuket kidinika kajo, kidin papaka ka papakon: koany, ejukakinit jo ainakinet naka epuesa ka esabu; kolot, kobil aitutuketekon kaBaasa ekabaka loka Isirael, tetere enyouni ŋesi kaneajai eoŋ.”"
1Kings15:20 Kiira Ben-kadad ekabaka Asa, kijuka ikapolok luka aioresioke asurokin ireria luka Isirael, kodany luka Iyon, ka Dan, ka Abel-bet-maaka, ka Kinerot kere, ka akwap kere naka Naputali."
1Kings15:21 Kosodi kanen, kepupu Baasa ŋun, kinyeik aiduk Rama, kiboikin do Tirisa."
1Kings15:22 Kosodi ekabaka Asa kokut luka Yuda kere; komamei yenedeparitai: kibwokata amor nuka Rama, ka akitoke, nuabu Baasa kodukitor: kodukio ekabaka Asa Geba loka Benyamin, ka Misipa."
1Kings15:23 Aswamisio ace kere nuka Asa, ka akegogoŋ kere, ka kere nuabu kiswama, ka ireria luabu koduk, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Yuda? Konye kapaarasia nuka amoionuke kodekakin akejeke."
1Kings15:24 Kojotoor Asa kalukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai kalukapapaake ore loka Daudi papaake: kirum Yekosapat okokuke aiboisike."
1Kings15:25 Kogeu Nadab okoku loka Yeroboam airum Isirael kokaru lokiareit loka Asa ekabaka loka Yuda, kirumak Isirael ikar iarei."
1Kings15:26 Kiswama nucroko kakonyen nuka Edeke, kolosenenei korot loka papake, kakeronis naetidiakaria Isirael da."
1Kings15:27 Kineru Baasa okoku loka Akiya, lokokek loka Isakar, asurokin ŋes; kodany Baasa ŋes koGib-beton, lokerai loka Ipilisitian; naaraikirigaunitos Nadab ka Isirael kere Gib-bcton."
1Kings15:28 Kokaru lokiwuniet loka Asa ekabaka loka Yuda koar Baasa ŋes, kosodi airum aiboisike."
1Kings15:29 Kosodi kanen, keraun ekabaka, atipet kodany lukokek kere loka Yeroboam; mam abu kideik Yeroboamidio yenikajaran, aitodol neamudiaria ŋes; kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, naabu kiner kama kekeiaanakinanike Akiya Esilonit:"
1Kings15:30 Kanuka aronisio nuka Yeroboam nuabu kodiak, ido nuetidiakaria Isirael da: kanuka anyunyura naabu ŋesi kitunyunyurikinia EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael."
1Kings15:31 Aswamisio ace nuka Nadab, ka kere nuabu kiswama, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael?"
1Kings15:32 Kejaenena ejie kidin Asa ka Baasa ekabaka loka Isirael apaarasiakec kere.
1Kings15:33 Kokaru lokiwuniet loka Asa ekabaka loka Yuda kogeu Baasa okoku loka Akiya airum Isirael kere koTirisa, kirumak ikar akaisaarei ka luonon."
1Kings15:34 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kolosenenei korot loka Yeroboam, kakeronis naetidiakaria Isirael."
1Kings16:1 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT neejai Yeku okoku loka Kanani aluikin Baasa, ebe,"
1Kings16:2 “Naarai abu ketopoloo jo kotoma apua, kadakak jo araun ekapolon kotunaka Isirael; konye ilosenen korot loka Yeroboam, itidiak ikatuŋa Isirael, aitunyunyurikin eoŋ karonisiokee;"
1Kings16:3 Koany, apiari eut Baasa ka ekekek: etusubi ekonikek bala ekek loka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat."
1Kings16:4 Yenika Baasa yenetwanikini ore enyamete inokwo; nin da yenike yenetwanikini ais enyamete akweny nuka apak.”
1Kings16:5 Aswamisio ace nuka Baasa, ka nuabu kiswama, ka akegogoŋ, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael?"
1Kings16:6 Kojotoor Baasa kalukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai Tirisa; kirum Ela okokuke aiboisike."
1Kings16:7 Bobo da kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT kama kenabi Yeku okoku loka Kanani aluikin Baasa, ka ekekek, kanuka aronis kere naabu kiswama kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, aitunyunyurikin ŋes kaswam naka akaninike, araut kwape kekek loka Yeroboam, ido kanuka aidany ŋes."
1Kings16:8 Kokaru loka akaisaarei ka lukanykape loka Asa ekabaka loka Yuda, kogeu Ela okoku loka Baasa airum Isirael koTirisa, kirumak ikar iarei."
1Kings16:9 Kineru Simuri ekekejaanakinan, ekapolon loka atutubet naka agalinike asurokin ŋes: keiai ŋesi Tirisa, emata komera kotogo loka Arusa, loapolokinit ekale koTirisa."
1Kings16:10 Koloma Simuri kinom ŋes, koar, kokaru loka akaisaarei ka lukanykaarei loka Asa ekabaka loka Yuda, kirum aiboisike."
1Kings16:11 Kosodi kanen, kegeu ŋesi airum, atipet kiboikin oicoloŋoke loka ajakanut, kodany ekek loka Baasa kere: mam abu kideik ŋes idiokoku yenikiliokit, karaida yenikokekike, karaida yenikopaperoke."
1Kings16:12 Kwaŋin komudia Simuri ekek loka Baasa kere, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, naabu kiner kama ka Yeku enabi aluikin Baasa."
1Kings16:13 Kanuka aronisio kere nuka Baasa, ka aronisio nuka Ela okokuke, nuapotu kodiakasi, nuetidiakariata Isirael, aitunyunyurikin EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael kakamameakakec."
1Kings16:14 Aswamisio ace nuka Ela, ka kere nuabu kiswama, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael?"
1Kings16:15 Kokaru loka akaisaarei ka lukanykaarei loka Asa ekabaka loka Yuda, kirumak Simuri adaun apaarasia akanykaarei koTirisa. Kidukuroto ituŋa asurokin Gib-beton, loarai loka Ipilisitian,"
1Kings16:16 Kopuputu ituŋa luedukuritos ebakai ebe, eneru Simuri, aar ekabaka da: kanuka ŋun kitarau Isirael kere Omuri, ekapolon loka ajore, ekabaka loka Isirael kapaaran kaŋin koidukurun,"
1Kings16:17 Konyou Omuri koGibeton, ka Isirael kere kaŋes, kirigaut Tirisa."
1Kings16:18 Kosodi kanen, keanyu Simuri ebe anatar ere, koloma toma abwas naka etogo loka ekabaka, kicweik etogo loka ekabaka kakim, kotwanik nen."
1Kings16:19 Kanuka akeronisio nuadiaki ŋesi kotoma aswam nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, alosenen korot loka Yeroboam, kakeronis naadiaki ŋesi, aitidiakaria Isirael."
1Kings16:20 Aswamisio ace nuka Simuri, ka akebilakin ebotet, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael?"
1Kings16:21 Kosodete ituŋa luka Isirael atiak kotoma atutubeta aarei: kotupa atutubet naka ituŋa Tibuni okoku loka Ginat, aitaraun ŋes ekabaka; kotupa atutubet Omuri."
1Kings16:22 Konye apotu ituŋa luatuparete Omuri kipikosi ituŋa Iuatuparete Tibuni okoku loka Ginat: kotwana Tibuni, kirum do Omuri,"
1Kings16:23 Kokaru loka akaisauni ka lodiopet loka Asa ekabaka loka Yuda, kogeu Omuri airum Isirael, kirumak ikar itomon ka luarei: kirumak koTirisa ikar ikanykape."
1Kings16:24 Kogwel eukot Samaria kama ka Semer katalatan aarei nuka epuesa; koduk oukot, komaik ere loaduki ŋesi Samaria, kwape araar ekiror loka Semer elopet eukot."
1Kings16:25 Kiswama Omuri nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kiswama aronis adepar kere lukegeikinete ŋes."
1Kings16:26 Naarai kolosenenei korot loka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat, kakeronisio nuetidiakaria Isirael, aitunyunyurikin EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, kakamameakakec."
1Kings16:27 Aswamisio ace nuka Omuri nuabu kiswama, ka akegogoŋ naabu kitodu, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael?"
1Kings16:28 Koiotoor do Omuri kalukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai Samaria: kirum Akab okokuke aiboisike."
1Kings16:29 Kokaru loka akaisauni ka lukanykauni loka Asa ekabaka loka Yuda kogeu Akab okoku loka Omuri airum Isirael: kirumak Akab okoku loka Omuri Isirael koSamaria adaun ikar akaisaarei ka luarei.
1Kings16:30 Kiswama Akab okoku loka Omuri nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT adepar kere lukegeikinete ŋes.
1Kings16:31 Kosodi kanen, kosubite akirot bala nakebenenikinit ŋes ta pe elosenenei karonisio nuka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat, komany Yesebel akoku naka Etibaal ekabaka loka Isidonin, kolot kiiaanak Baal, komaenenei ŋes,"
1Kings16:32 Kosipok etem loka Baal togo loka Baal, lokedukit ŋesi Samaria."
1Kings16:33 Kiswama Akab Asera; kiyatak Akab aitunyunyurikin EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael adepar ikabakan kere luka Isiraellukegeikinete ŋes."
1Kings16:34 Kapaarasiake koduk Kiel Ebet-elit Yeriko: kopesik apetetait kotwania ekiyaike Abiram, kosipok ikekia kotwania enooritike Segub; kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, naabu kiner kama ka Yosua okoku loka Nun."
1Kings17:1 Kosodi Eliya Etisibit, lokerai loka lukiboiororos koGilead, kotema Akab atiar, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT Edeke loka Isirael, loabwoi eoŋ kakonyeneke, mam ejaununete akopyo, karaida akiru kotoma okaru kalu, dimikito kwape ejaar akakirot.”"
1Kings17:2 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mamake ebe,"
1Kings17:3 “Konyou kane, kibelokin kolot kide, konop kaguurut Keris naiteos ka Yorodan."
1Kings17:4 Kosodi kanen imasenenei akipi nuka aguurut; ido ecorak ikuruka aitanyamenen jo kaŋina.”
1Kings17:5 Kolot kiswama kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT: naarai abu kolot kiboikin ariri kaguurut Keris, naiteos ka Yorodan."
1Kings17:6 Kosodete ikuruka koinununete ŋes inyamat ka akiriŋ tupuruc, ka inyamat ka akiriŋ eboŋ; komasenenei da akipi nuka aguurut."
1Kings17:7 Kosodi kanen ketubor apak koonik aguurut, kanu amamear akiru kakwap."
1Kings17:8 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mamake ebe,"
1Kings17:9 “Konyou kolot Sarapet, loka Sidon, kiboie kaŋina; koany, eeorak apuserut naka nina aitanyamenen joo”"
1Kings17:10 Kosodi konyou, kolot Sarapet: ido nakedolio orute loka ere, koany, koiai apuserut erarai akito; konyarau ŋes, kobala ebe, “Kenainait koomikinai adisikipi kibore, kamat.”"
1Kings17:11 Konye napelosi aomare, konyarau ŋes, kobala ebe, “Kenainait, koinunai idionyamat kakanikon.”"
1Kings17:12 Kobala ŋesi ebe, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT Ekonideke, emameete eoŋ inyamat, dimarai ikiria adiopekan ejaas amot, ka idiokinyet katany; ido koany, edepuni akito aarei, kaloma kepou eoŋ ka ikakoku, kanyama, kedenyiata atwakare.”"
1Kings17:13 Kotema Eliya atiar, “Sirikiyoŋ; kolot kiswama kwape ibalar; konye kogeu ber aipoikin eoŋ idionyamat koinu, kokau kipou ijo alopet ka ikonikoku,"
1Kings17:14 Naarai ebala kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, ‘Mam inonar amot naka akiria, karaida akinyet nakatany mam edaun, aitodol apaaran naisitepia EJAKAIT akiru akwap.’’’"
1Kings17:15 Kosodi kolot kiswama kwape ebalar Eliya: ŋes alopet, ka ŋes, ka lukotogoke, konyamata apaarasia nuipu."
1Kings17:16 Mam abu kinonar amot naka akiria, karaida akinyet nakatany mam abu kodaun, kwape kejaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, nakinera kama ka Eliya,"
1Kings17:17 Kosodi kanen kokau kanun kodekakin okoku loka aberu, alopet etogo; kinyikok noi adekake, komam bobo iyena."
1Kings17:18 Kotema ŋesi Eliya atiar, “Kimariai eoŋ inyo kaio, ijo etuŋanan loka Edeke? Ibu mama ajai aisiitun akaronis, ka aiar okokuka!”"
1Kings17:19 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Ae okokukon.” Kodak katorobuke, kodokaria agola nakokuju naeboionono, kiperik aperisike elopet,"
1Kings17:20 Komonyak EJAKAIT, kobala ebe, “Wu EJAKAIT, Ekadeke, iyanau aronis mama ejai apuserut nakesiperi, kanuka aiar okokuke?”"
1Kings17:21 Korionor irwan auni kama ejai ikoku, komonyak EJAKAIT, kobala ebe, “Wu EJAKAIT, Ekadeke, kenainait, Koboŋok bobo aijar naka ikoku kayen tomakeŋ.”"
1Kings17:22 Kiira EJAKAIT eporoto loka Eliya; Koboŋok bobo aijar naka ikoku tomakeŋ, kikwar,"
1Kings17:23 Kodaku Eliya ikoku, kiiesunor kagola koyau togo, koinak totoke: kotema Eliya atiar. “Koany, ejari do okokukon.”"
1Kings17:24 Kotema aberu Eliya atiar, “Ajenu do kwana kwape iraar ijo etuŋanan loka Edeke, ido akirot naka EJAKAIT kaitukukon erai abeit.”"
1Kings18:1 Kosodi kanen ketuboros apaarasia nuipu, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Eliya, kokaru lokiwuniet, ebala ebe, “Kolot kitodikin mama ejai Akab; etetepikini eoŋ akiru akwap.”"
1Kings18:2 Kosodi Eliya alosit aitodiar mama ejai Akab. Kodeden noi ebeli ko Samaria.
1Kings18:3 Konyarau Akab Obadia loapolokinit ekal. (Keyoŋit Obadia EJAKAIT noi:
1Kings18:4 Naarai, nakemudiaria Yesebel inabin luka EJAKAIT, kituku Obadia inabin akwatat, kibwa kes akaisakany akaisakany kotoma abua, kitanyamenenei kes inyamat ka akipi.)"
1Kings18:5 Kotema Akab Obadia atiar, “Kimaniman akwap, neejaas atanin kere nuka akipi, ka neejaas aguuruto kere: elemuni kipedori adumun anya aitaiar ibalasin ka inyubun, kinyeis atwakiar itian kere.”"
1Kings18:6 Kotiakata akwap aimaniman: kolot Akab orotoke bon, kolot Obadia da orotoke bon ece."
1Kings18:7 Keiai Obadia orot, koany, kiriamas kEliya: kojenu ŋes, kibiror ebuburia, kotema atiar, “ŋes ijo, Eliya ekajakait?”"
1Kings18:8 Koboŋok ŋes ebe, “ŋes eoŋ: kolot, kolimok ekonijakait ebe, ‘Koany, ejai Eliya ne,’”"
1Kings18:9 Kotema atiar, “Anu bo adiakarit eoŋ, tape jo iiaikini ekonikejaanakinan akan naka Akab, aiar eoŋ?"
1Kings18:10 Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT Ekonideke, emamei ateker karaida ajakanut, namam ejakaitika ijukarit amoote jo: naketemariata atiar, ‘Emamei ŋesi kane,’ kisiyapoi lukaiakanut kaŋin ka lukateker kaŋin ebe mam kianyunito joo"
1Kings18:11 Kwana da ibala ijo ebe, ‘Kolot, kolimok ekonijakait ebe, “Koany, ejai Eliya ne.’”"
1Kings18:12 Ejaun do atipet naanyounio kamakon, kidakari emoyo loka EJAKAIT jo nemam eoŋ da ajeni; kosodi do naalimokinia Akab, komam ŋes epedori adumun jo, kaari eoŋ: konye eoŋ ekonikeiaanakinan ayoŋit EJAKAIT ameun keiditeuka."
1Kings18:13 Mam aponi kolimokinai ekajakait nuabu eoŋ keswama nakearia Yesebel inabin luka EJAKAIT, kwape abu kebwaia ituŋa akwatat luka inabin luka EJAKAIT akaisakany, akaisakany kotoma abua, ketanyamenenei kes inyamat ka akipi?"
1Kings18:14 Kwana da ibala ijo ebe, ‘Kolot, kolimok ekonijakait ebe, Koany, ejai Eliya ne’: kaari neai eoŋ.”"
1Kings18:15 Kotema Eliya atiar, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, loabwoi eoŋ kakonyeneke, abeit etodikin lolo eoŋ mamakeŋ.”"
1Kings18:16 Kosodi Obadia alosit airiamakin ka Akab, kolimok ŋes: kolot Akab airiamakin kEliya."
1Kings18:17 Kosodi kanen, keanyu Akab Eliya, kotema Akab ŋes atiar, “ŋes ijo, ijo eketieanan loka Isirael?”"
1Kings18:18 Koboŋok ŋesi ebe, “Mam eoŋ eticanit Isirael; dimarai ijo, ka ekek loka papakon, naarai ijalata aicorakineta nuka EJAKAIT, ido itupa Ibaalim."
1Kings18:19 Aso do kijuka, kotukok Isirael kere mama ajai, moru Karamel, ka inabin luka Baal akwat aoŋon ka akaisakany, ka inabin luka Asera akwat aoŋon, luenyamete komesa loka Yesebel.”"
1Kings18:20 Kosodi Akab kijuka mama ejaas idwe kere luka Isirael, kotukok inabin moru Karamel."
1Kings18:21 Kikunyak Eliya ituŋa kere, kotema atiar, “Itodolete ai yesi icodoete kaomisio aarei? Arai kerai EJAKAIT Edeke, kotupasi ŋes: konye arai Baal, kotupasi ŋes.” Mam ituŋa apotu kobonokisi ŋes akirot."
1Kings18:22 Kosodi Eliya atemar ituŋa atiar, “Eoŋ, eoŋ bon asal, enabi loka EJAKAIT: konye inabin luka Baal eraas ituŋa akwat aoŋon ka akaisakany."
1Kings18:23 Aso koinakis kesi oni imoŋin iarei; koseutu kesi ediopemon kanukec, kotubutuboto, kipetipetata akito, ido mam ibwaikinete akim kwap; etemokini eoŋ locemon, epesipesi akito, ido mam ebwaikini akim kwap."
1Kings18:24 Kiwoneoto yesi ekiror loka ekusideke, eoŋ da ewonei ekiror loka EJAKAIT: Edeke da loe bonokini kakim, korau ŋesi Edeke.” Kobonokis ituŋa kere ebe, “Iner ejok.”"
1Kings18:25 Kotema Eliya inabin luka Baal ebe, “Koseutu yesi emoŋ ediopet kanukus, kogeutu yesi aitemokin; naarai ipu yesi; kiwoneoto ekiror loka edekekus, konye mam ibwaikinete akim kwap.”"
1Kings18:26 Koyaasi do emoŋ loainakinitai kes, kitemokis ŋes, kiwoneoto ekiror loka Baal ageun tupuruc kiton paaran, ebe, “Wu Baal, kiirarai sio.” Konye amamei eporoto, karaida yenabonokini. Kosomanaros airimor etem loeswamatai."
1Kings18:27 Kosodi kanen kidin paaran, kokienar Eliya kes, kotema atiar, “Kiworoto noi; naarai ŋes edeke; arai eomoomoi ŋesi, apaa ŋesi, arai ejai orot, arai diat eiotoi, ibusakinit aitwekenyunio.”"
1Kings18:28 Kiworoto noi, kodunudunos bonik, kikilena ka akwaras kwape ajaar ekecepone, aitodol naaleleuniata aokot kamakec."
1Kings18:29 Kosodi ketubor kidin paaran, apotu komurwoto aitodol apak naka ainakin ainakinet naka abon; konye amamei eporoto karaida yenabonokini, karaida yenebwaikinit etau."
1Kings18:30 Kotema Eliya ituŋa kere atiar, “Kikunyutu mamaka.” Kikunyakisi ituŋa kere mamakeŋ. Kiteteu etem loka EJAKAIT loaeakakinitai kwap."
1Kings18:31 Kolem Eliya amor atomon ka nuarei kwape ajaar etiai loka atekerin nuka odwe luka Yakob, loabu akirot naka EJAKAIT kobu mamake ebe, ‘Isirael ŋes eraun ekonikiror.’"
1Kings18:32 Koduk etem kamor kanun kokiror loka EJAKAIT: kitoito aipany airimor etem, etiai loepedor aisilosikin aitemisio aarei nuka ikinyom."
1Kings18:33 Kinapanak akito, kotubutub emoŋ, kipetipet akito. Kotema atiar, “Kilelebata ipipai iwonon luka akipi, kobukokisi ainakinet naicweio, akito da.”"
1Kings18:34 Kotema atiar, “Kiareikisi”; kiareikis. Kotema atiar, “Kiuniikisi”; ido kiuniikis."
1Kings18:35 Koleleata akip airimor etem; kileleb aipany da akipi.
1Kings18:36 Kosodi kanen kapak naka ainakin ainakinet naka abon, kikuny enabi Eliya, kotema atiar, “Wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Aburaam, ka Isaak, ka Isirael, kojenunai lolo ebe irai ijo Edeke loka Isirael, ka eoŋ da ekonikejaanakinan, eswama eoŋ akiro nu kere kakirotokon."
1Kings18:37 Kopupunoi eoŋ, WU EJAKAIT, kopupunoi, kojenut ituŋa lu ebe ijo EJAKAIT irai Edeke, isibeloki da ikecetauon aboŋun bobe.”"
1Kings18:38 Kosodi akim naka EJAKAIT adoere, kidopo ainakinet naicweio, ka akito, ka amor, ka apua, kimiela akipi kere nuajaas toma aipany."
1Kings18:39 Keanyutu ituŋa kere, kibiroros ebuburia; kotemasi atiar, “EJAKAIT, ŋes Edeke; EJAKAIT, ŋes Edeke.”"
1Kings18:40 Kotema Eliya kes atiar, “Kikamutu inabin luka Baal; kinyek ediopet kakesi aiku.” Kikamutu kes: koyaŋa Eliya kes aguurut Kison, koarak kes nina,"
1Kings18:41 Kotema Eliya Akab atiar, “Konyou, konyam, komat; naarai ejai airurum naka akiru naepol.”"
1Kings18:42 Konyou Akab ainyam ka aimat. Kodoka Eliya kuju Karamel; kisuded, kibwaik akouke kidin akuninike."
1Kings18:43 Kotema ŋesi ekekejaanakinan atiar, “Kolot, kiteluo aŋolol.” Kolot, kiteluo, kotema atiar, “Emamei ibore.” Kotema atiar, “Kolot bobo irwan akanykaarei.”"
1Kings18:44 Kosodi kanen karwan nakikanyetekaarei, kotema atiar, “Koany, elomunit edou kaŋolol, edit bala akan naka ituŋanan.” Kotema atiar, “Kolot, kolimok Akab ebe, ‘Kitemok agalikon, kiiesar, kinyek akiru aitikokin jo.’”"
1Kings18:45 Kosodi kanen nediokasilon, kirionu akuj idouon ka ekwam, kotep akiru naepol noi. Kiboikin Akab agalike, kolot Yesereel."
1Kings18:46 Kojai akan naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Eliya; koen aŋabeteke, koker koinaren naka Akab kiton orute loka Yesereel."
1Kings19:1 Kolimok Akab Yesebel kere nueswama Eliya, ido kwape aaria inabin kekilen."
1Kings19:2 Kosodi Yesebel aijukar ekiyakia neejai Eliya ebe, “Keswama kis idekesio eoŋ kwaŋin, ka adepar da, arai mam moi esawa kwape kalo eoŋ etusubit akoniijar bala aijar naka ediopet kakesi.”"
1Kings19:3 Kepupu ŋun, konyou, kolot kanuka akeiiar, kobu Beer-seba, loerai loka Yuda, kitasal ekekejaanakinan kaŋ ina."
1Kings19:4 Konye ŋes elopet kolot alosit naka adiopepaaran amodiŋ, kobu, kiboikin otolim loka erotem: kilipakin bon atwanare; kobala ebe, “Edolit; wu EJAKAIT, kolema akaiiar; naarai mam eoŋ ajokuna adepar lukapapaaka.”"
1Kings19:5 Koper kojotoor kotolim loka erotem; ido koany, kotiro emalaika ŋes, kotema ŋes atiar, “Konyou, konyam.”"
1Kings19:6 Konolia, ido koany, kejai emugati loapeitoi katotol eiduny kakouke, ka atany naka akipi, Konyam komat, kopere bobo."
1Kings19:7 Kobu emalaika loka EJAKAIT irwan nakiareit, kotiro ŋes, kotcma atiar, “Konyou, konyam, naarai elwana noi akonilosit.”"
1Kings19:8 Konyou konyam komat, kolot kagogon naka inyamat kanul apaarasia akaisaoŋon ka akuaresia akaisaoŋon kiton Koreb, moru loka Edeke."
1Kings19:9 Kodol abua, kopere nen; ido koany, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT neejai ŋesi, kotema ŋes atiar, “Eliya, inyo bo iswamai ijo kane?”"
1Kings19:10 Kotema atiar, “Kerumit noi ekokote kanuka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ajoresio; naarai ajalata idwe luka Isirael aitutuketekon, atiyaikis itemwanakon, aarata inabinokon kekiletj: eoŋ, eoŋ bon asal; emoete da akaijar amudiar.”"
1Kings19:11 Kotema atiar, “Kolom, kobwo komoru loka EJAKAIT.” Ido koany, kotubor EJAKAIT, kodi ekwam loepol loegogon ironan, kobwanabwan atiiban kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: konye komamei EJAKAIT kokwam: akaulo kekwam amaran naka akwap; konye kotnamei EJAKAIT kamaran naka akwap."
1Kings19:12 Akaulo kamaran naka akwap akim; konye komamei EJAKAIT kakim: akaulo naka akim eporoto loedit loeyamakina.
1Kings19:13 Kosodi, kiira Eliya, kimuko akekou kegoeke, koloma, kobwo neelomarere abua, Ido koany, kobu eporoto mama ejai ŋesi ebe, “Eliya, inyo bo iswamai ijo kane?”"
1Kings19:14 Kotema atiar, “Kerumit noi ekokote kanuka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ajoresio; naarai ajalata idwe luka Isirael aitutuketekon, atiyaikis itemwanakon, aarata inabinokon kekilen; eoŋ, eoŋ bon asal; emoete da akaiiar amudiar.”"
1Kings19:15 Kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Kolot, koboŋo korotokon kiton amodiŋ naka Damasiko: kidol, kinyonyoik Kasael akinyet araun ekabaka loka Suria:"
1Kings19:16 Kinyonyoik da Yeku okoku loka Nimisi akinyet araun ekabaka loka Isirael: kinyoinyoik Elisa okoku loka Sapat loka Abel-mekola akinyet araun enabi aiboisikon,"
1Kings19:17 Kosodi kanen, ŋol loekui ekileŋ loka Kasael eari Yeku: ŋol da loekui ekileŋ loka Yeku eari Elisa."
1Kings19:18 Konye edeuni eoŋ ilukumin ikanykaarei koIsirael, akuŋin kere numam ekukonokina Baal, ka ŋiniituk kere namam enuit ŋes.”"
1Kings19:19 Aso abu ŋesi konyou kanen, kodum Elisa okoku loka Sapat, ekoriei, kejaas ajookon atomon ka nuarei kinarenike, keiai ŋesi ka nakitomonet kaarei: kitor Eliya neejai ŋesi, kocakak ŋes ekegoe."
1Kings19:20 Kinyek imoŋin, koker atupit Eliya, kotema atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, kisiikinai kanu papaka ka totoka, kasodi konyet eoŋ atupun jo.” Kotema ŋes atiar, “Koboŋo; naarai inyo bo keswamak eoŋ jo?”"
1Kings19:21 Kobono katupit ŋes, koyana imoŋin luka ajookot, koar kes, kipo akecekirin kakito nuka imoŋin, koinak ituŋa, konyamata, Kosodi ŋesi anyoun, kotupa Eliya, kijaanak ŋes."
1Kings20:1 Kotukonok Ben-kadad ekabaka loka Suria akejore kere: kejaas ikabakan akaisauni ka luarei kaŋes, ka ibalasin, ka agalin: kolot kirigau Samaria, kitiji."
1Kings20:2 Kijuka ikiyakia mama ejai Akab ekabaka loka Isirael, ore, kotema ŋes atiar, “Inera Ben-kadad kwanata, ebe,"
1Kings20:3 Epuesakon ka esabukon eraas lukan: akoninor da ka ikonidwe, lukajokak, eraas lukan.”"
1Kings20:4 Koboŋok ekabaka loka Isirael atiar, “Kwape ejaar akonikirot, ekaiakait, wu ekabaka; arai eoŋ lokon, ka lukijaar eoŋ kere.”"
1Kings20:5 Koboŋut ikiyakia bobo, kotemasi atiar,” Inera Ben-kadad kwanata ebe, Abeit abu kejukak jo ebe, Kijaikini ijo con ekonipuesa ka esabukon, ka akoninor, ka ikonidwe;"
1Kings20:6 Konye ejukuni eoŋ ikakeiaanakinak mama ijai ijo moi, kwape kapak kana, irereete ke si kotogokon, kotogoi da luka ikonikejaanakinak; kosodi ibore kere yenejokuna kakonyenekon, ikamunete kakeeekanin eyaŋaarete.”"
1Kings20:7 Kosodi ekabaka loka Isirael anyaraun imakio kere luka akwap, kotema atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, kojenutu, koanyutu da kwape kilokitor ekesa ŋol oni: naarai abu ŋesi kejukak eoŋ ebe kerumia akanor, ka ikadwe, ka ekapuesa, ka ekasabu; mam abu kanerok.”"
1Kings20:8 Kotemasi imakio kere ka ituŋa kere ŋes atiar, “Sirikiira, karaida acamun.”"
1Kings20:9 Kanuka nun kotema ŋesi ikiyakia luka Ben-kadad ebe, “Kolimokis ekajakait ekabaka ebe, Eswamai eoŋ nun kere nusodit nuijukunitor ijo ekonikejaanakinan: konye akirot na mam apedori.” Koloto ikiyakia, kinyakakis ŋes akirot."
1Kings20:10 Kijuka Ben-kadad mama ejai ŋesi, kotema atiar, “Keswamakis idekesio eoŋ kwaŋin ka adepar da, arai kilosikin apua naka Samaria aileleb akanin nuka ituŋa kere lukatupitos eoŋ.”"
1Kings20:11 Koboŋok ekabaka loka Isirael atiar, “Kolimok ŋes ebe, Kinyek loekapanakini lujiisike aiturokin bon kwape ŋol loelaeari kes.”"
1Kings20:12 Kosodi kanen, kepupu Ben-kadad akiro ŋun, naamatatar, ŋes ka ikabakan, koswamin, kotema ikekejaanakinak atiar, “Kiderakinos.” Kiderakinos aitiji ere."
1Kings20:13 Ido koany, kikunyak enabi Akab ekabaka loka Isirael kotema atiar, “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Iany ijo ekodet lo lokapolon kere? Koany, ejaikini ŋes akanikon lolo; ijenuni ebe Eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
1Kings20:14 Kotema Akab ebe, “Lukaŋai bo?” Kotema atiar, “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Ikatumunak luka ikapolok luka ibukui.” Kosodi ŋesi atemar ebe, “Iŋai bo egeuni ejie? “Koboŋok ebe, “Ŋo,”"
1Kings20:15 Kosodi kimar ikatumunak luka ikapolok luka ibukui, emwaasi akwat aarei ka akaisauni ka luarei: akaulo abu kimar ituŋa kere, kes idwe kere luka Isirael, emwaasi ilukumin ikanykaarei,"
1Kings20:16 Kolomasi kidin paaran. Konye komata Ben-kadad koswamin, komera, ŋes ka ikabakan, kes ikabakan akaisauni ka luarei lukinarakinito ŋes."
1Kings20:17 Kogeutu ikatumunak luka ikapolok luka ibukui alomar; kijuka Ben-kadad, kolimokinai ŋes ebe, “Alomut ituŋa ko Samaria.”"
1Kings20:18 Kotema atiar, “Arai elomunitos kainapakina, kikamutu kes ejarete; arai elomunitos ejie, kikamutu kes ejarete.”"
1Kings20:19 Kolomasi kesi kina naka ere, ikatumunak luka ikapolok luka ibukui, ka ajore naatupit kes."
1Kings20:20 Koar ŋinitunanan eketunanan; kokerata Isurian, korukitor Isirael kes: koku Ben-kadad eka baka loka Suria kebalasit ka ikebwanenok."
1Kings20:21 Koloma ekabaka loka Isirael, kodany ibalasin ka agalin, koar Isurian kearit loepol."
1Kings20:22 Kikunyak enabi ekabaka loka Isirael, kotema ŋes atiar, “Kolot, kicat, kojen, koany da nuiswamai: naarai kedolu ekaru ebuni ekabaka loka Suria asurokin jo.”"
1Kings20:23 Kotemasi ikejaanakinak luka ekabaka loka Suria ŋes atiar, “Erai Edekekee Edeke loka iukon; kanuka ŋun agogoŋ kesi aitelekar oni: konye kajioto kakes kapuuton, abeit eut kigogonoor oni da aitelekar kes."
1Kings20:24 Kiswama akirot na; kolema ikabakan, ninitunanan kaiboisike, kibwaikikayaitok aiboisiokec:"
1Kings20:25 Kimar ijo ajore, kwape kajore naibu kotwania, ebalasit aibois kebalasit, agali aibois kagali; kijio kakes kapuuton, abeit kigogonoor oni aitelekar kes.” Kiira nest ekeeeporoto, kiswama kwaŋin,"
1Kings20:26 Kosodi kanen kedoki ekaru, kimar Ben-kadad Isurian, kolot Apek, ejie kaIsirael."
1Kings20:27 Aponi kimarai idwe luka Isirael, koinakinai kes inyamat, koloto ejie kakes: kidukuroto idwe luka Isirael koinarenekec kwape isipanin iarei luedisiak luka ikalei; konye kilosikinos Isurian akwap."
1Kings20:28 Kikunyak etuŋanan loka Edeke kotema ekabaka loka Isirael atiar, “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Naarai abalasi Isurian ebe, Erai EJAKAIT Edeke loka iukon, konye mere Edeke loka aditon: kanuka ŋun ŋes ejaikinia ekodet lo kere loepol akanikon, ijenunete yesi ebe Eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
1Kings20:29 Kidukuroto kiteosi apaarasia akanykaarei. Kosodi kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei kiriama ejie: kapaaran adiopet koarata idwe luka Isirael Isurian ituŋa ilukumin akwatat lukelosete kakeje.
1Kings20:30 Konye kokera luedeunos Apek, toma ore; kibirokin arwatat ituŋa ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukanykaarei luedeuna. Koker Ben-kadad, koloma ore, agola nakotoma."
1Kings20:31 Kotemasi ikekejaanakinak ŋes atiar, “Koany do, kipupu ebe ikabakan luka ekek loka Isirael eraas ikabakan luketimok: kinainait, kanapa ipukoi kanabesiwok, aunoi da kakwesiwok, kalomasi mama ejai ekabaka loka Isirael: elemuni kitaiar ŋesi akoniijar.”"
1Kings20:32 Koenata do ipukoi aŋabesikec, aunoi da akwesikee, kopotu mama ejai ekabaka loka Isirael, kobalas ebe, “Ebala ekejaanakinanikon Ben-kadad ebe, Kenaiijait, kisiikinai kajar.” Kotema atiar, “Eriŋa ŋes ejari? Erai onaeeka.”"
1Kings20:33 Kosodete ituŋa aiŋic noi, kisunyas ajenun arai ikote nen akeomisio; kotemasi atiar, “Onaeekon Ben-kadad.” Kosodi ŋesi atemar atiar, “Koloto koyautu ŋes.” Kosodi Ben-kadad alomun neejai ŋesi; kitodokik ŋes agali."
1Kings20:34 Kotema Ben-kadad ŋes atiar, “Kenyakakini jo ireria luabu papaka kodemarite papakon; itemokini irotin koDamasiko kwape kolo kitemokinio papaka koSamaria.” Kobala Akab ebe, “Eoŋ da kaosikini jo kaitutuket kana.” Kitutuko kaŋes aitutuket, koosik."
1Kings20:35 Kotema ediopctunanan kodwe luka inabin aupake kakirot naka EJAKAIT atiar, “Kimusunai eoŋ, kenainait.” Koner etuŋanan aimusun ŋes."
1Kings20:36 Kosodi ŋol atemar ŋes atiar, “Naarai mam jo irimarit iporoto loka EJAKAIT, koany, atipet napinyounio ijo kamakaŋ, kiari eŋatuny jo.” Ido atipet napanyounio kamakeŋ, kodum eŋatuny ŋes, koar."
1Kings20:37 Kosodi ŋol adumun ecetuŋanan, kotema atiar, “Kimusunai eoŋ, kenainait.” Kimusun etuŋanan ŋes, kieum, kimusun."
1Kings20:38 Konyou do enabi, kidareu ekabaka korot, kitegelikin bon kiswap akonyeke kaenet naka akou."
1Kings20:39 Nakitorio ekabaka, kiworou ŋol ekabaka; kotema atiar, “Abu ekonikejaanakinan koloma kidin ojie; ido koany, abu etuŋanan kopau, koyau ecetuŋanan mamaka kotema atiar, ‘Kidar etuŋanan lo: arai keolio, ŋes konyet ejaunia akoniijar aibois kaijarake, arai bo itaei ijo atalata naka epuesa.’"
1Kings20:40 Naelolitor ekonikejaanakinan lailo ka laije da, kosii etuŋanan.” Kotema ekabaka loka Isirael ŋes atiar, “Kitubokinio jo kwaŋin; ijo elopet icam.”"
1Kings20:41 Kisunya ŋesi, kolaca aenet naka akou kakonyeke; kojen ekabaka loka Isirael ebe erai ŋesi ediopet konabin."
1Kings20:42 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, ‘Naarai ibu koosik kakanikon etuŋanan loabu eoŋ kagita amudiar, kanuka ŋun egeli aijarakon aijarake, ikonituŋa da itia ituŋake.’’’"
1Kings20:43 Kolot eka baka loka Isirael oreke ekadakinit, konyunyura, kobu Samaria."
1Kings21:1 Kosodi kanen kokau kanun, kejai Nabos Eyesereelit emanikor loka emusabibu lokejai Yesereel, keapia ketogo loti loka Akab ekabaka loka Samaria."
1Kings21:2 Kosodi Akab kobala Nabos ebe, “Ae emanikorikon loka emusabibu koraun lokaŋ araun emanikor loka edia, naarai eapie kekatogo; kainakini eoŋ jo emanikor ece loka emusabibu loitelekarit aiokis: arai bo itoiokit, kainakini apesan kwape eiaar eketiai.’"
1Kings21:3 Kobala Nabos Akab ebe, “Madi EJAKAIT, eoŋ ainakin jo airumet naka lukapapaaka.’"
1Kings21:4 Kobu Akab togoke ekadakinit ido konyunyura kanuka akirot nakelimokini Nabos Eyesereelit ŋes: naarai enera atiar, “Mam kainakini jo airumet naka lukapapaaka.’ Korior kaperisike, kimwana akekonyen, koner ainyam."
1Kings21:5 Konye kobu aberuke Yesebel mama ejai, kobala ŋes ebe, “Inyo bo etakadiki ekonitau kwaŋin, tape ineri ainyam?”"
1Kings21:6 Kobala ŋes ebe, “Naarai ener kaNabos Eyesereelit, kalimok ŋes ebe, ‘Ae ekonimanikor loka emusabibu kagwel kapesan; arai bo isiyalamikinit kesiee keeemanikor’: kabonok ebe, ‘Mam kainakini ekamanikor loka emusabibu.’’’"
1Kings21:7 Kobala ŋes aberuke Yesebel ebe, “Mere kereka jo iyait ajakanut naka Isirael? Konyou, konyam inyamat, kolakar ekonitau: kainakini eoŋ jo emanikor loka emusabibu loka Nabos Eyesereelit.’"
1Kings21:8 Kwaŋin kiwadik ŋes ibaluan kokiror loka Akab, kipueak kes akeipucet, kijuka ibaluan mama ejaas imakio ka ikapolok lukejaas oreke, lukiboiete kaNabos,"
1Kings21:9 Kiwadik obaluan kinera atiar, “Kolimos ailuŋ, kibwaikis Nabos akonyen nuka ituŋa:"
1Kings21:10 Kisibwaata ituŋa iarei, idwe luka Belial kakonyeneke, kitorona ŋes, kobalas ebe, ‘Ibu konerok Edeke ka ekabaka da.’ Koyanaasi konyet, kibiribiroto kamor, kotwana.’"
1Kings21:11 Kosodete ituŋa lukoreken, imakio ka ikapolok lukiboiete koreken, kiswamata kwape kieorakinia Yesebel, kwape kiwadikatere obaluan luejukakini ŋesi kes."
1Kings21:12 Kolimos ailuŋ, kibwaikis Nabos akonyen nuka ituŋa,"
1Kings21:13 Kopotu ituŋa iarei, idwe luka Belial, kiboikinos akonyeneke: kitorona odwe luka Belial Nabos kakonyen nuka ituŋa, atiar, “Abu Nabos konerok Edeke ka ekabaka da.’ Kitolomasi ŋes kina naka ere, kibiribiroto kamor, kotwana."
1Kings21:14 Kiyakiasi neejai Yesebel atiar, “Ebiribirii Nabos kamor, atwana.’"
1Kings21:15 Kosodi kanen, kiira Yesebel ebe ebiribirii Nabos kamor, atwana da, kolimok Yesebel Akab atiar, “Konyou, kirum emanikor loka emusabibu loka Nabos loagirit ainakin jo agwel kapesan: naarai mam Nabos eroko ejari, konye atwana.”"
1Kings21:16 Kosodi kanen, kiira Akeb ebe atwana Nabos, konyou Akab kijesar omanikor loka emusabibu loka Nabos Eyesereelit airum."
1Kings21:17 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Eliya Etisibit, atiar,"
1Kings21:18 “Konyou kiiesar airiamun ka Akab ekabaka loka Isirael, loiboie koSamaria: koany, ejai omanikor loka emusabibu loka Nabos Eyesereelit airum."
1Kings21:19 Ido kolimok ŋes atiar,’ Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Iar, irum da?’” Kolimok da atiar, ‘Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Aibois nakemeoto inokwo aokot nuka Nabos, emeete da kwaŋin inokwo akoniwokot, nupekon.”’”"
1Kings21:20 Kotema Akab Eliya atiar, “Kiany ijo eoŋ, ijo lokasurupika?” Koboŋok atiar, “Kaany; naarai igwelari bon aswam nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
1Kings21:21 Koany, ayauni nukaronok mama ijai, ido kapiar jo eut, adaun da kama ejai Akab ŋinikoku yenisapat, ka ŋin yeneenen, ka yenimam eenen koIsirael."
1Kings21:22 Ido etuluori ekonikek aputoor loka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat, ka aputoor ekek loka Baasa okoku loka Akiya, kanuka aitunyunyurikin nakitunyunyurikini, aitidiakanar Isirael."
1Kings21:23 Ido kiner EJAKAIT nuka Yesebel da atiar, ‘Enyamakinete inokwo Yesebel arwatat naka Yesereel.’"
1Kings21:24 Yenika Akab yenetwanikini ore enyamenenete inokwo; ido nin yenetwanikini ais enyamenenete akweny nuka apak.’
1Kings21:25 (Konye emamei yeneputos ka Akab lokegwelar elopet aswam nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT lokitapaari aberuke Yesebel.
1Kings21:26 Kiswamaenenei noi nuketal katuparit aputosia, kwape ejaatar kere nukiswamaenenete Imorain, lukireneari kolo EJAKAIT kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael.)"
1Kings21:27 Kosodi kanen, kiira Akab akiro nun, koeilicil ikenapen, konap ipukoi, koluŋ, koper kopukoi, kolot etwanit akuan,"
1Kings21:28 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Eliya Etisibit, kobala ebe,"
1Kings21:29 “Iany ijo Akab kwape etasonikinor kakonyeneka? Naarai etasonikin kakonyeneka, mam ayauni aronis ŋin kapaarasiake: konye kapaarasia nuka okokuke ŋes ayaunia aronis ŋin okekike.”"
1Kings22:1 Kotuboros ikar iuni komamei ejie kidin Suria ka Isirael.
1Kings22:2 Kosodi kanen kokaru lokiwuniet, kobu Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda mama ejai ekabaka loka Isirael."
1Kings22:3 Kotema ekabaka loka Isirael ikekejaanakinak atiar, “Ŋenete yesi ebe erai Ramot-gilead lowok, oni da kipalarit, mam kidemuni ŋes kakan naka ekabaka loka Suria?”"
1Kings22:4 Kotema ŋesi Yekosapat atiar, “Kiupar tope ijo keoŋ ejie Ramot-gilead?” Kotema Yekosapat ekabaka loka Isirael atiar, “Arai eoŋ kwape iraar ijo, ikatuŋa kwape ikonituŋa, ikabalasin kwape ikonibalasin.”"
1Kings22:5 Kotema Yekosapat ekabaka loka Isirael atiar, “Kenaiŋait, kinit kakirot naka EJAKAIT lolo.”"
1Kings22:6 Kosodi ekabaka loka Isirael atukonokin inabin, kwape ituŋa akwat aoŋon, kotema kes atiar, “Alosi kereka eoŋ aitiji Ramotgilead, arai bo kenye?” Kotemasi kesi atiar, “Kolot; naarai kijaik EJAKAIT ŋes akan naka ekabaka.”"
1Kings22:7 Konye kotema Yekosapat atiar, “Emamei bobo da enabi ece loka EJAKAIT, kenitata ŋes?”"
1Kings22:8 Kotema ekabaka loka Isirael Yekosapat atiar, “Eriŋa ejai etuŋanan ediopet lokipedori aiŋirunia EJAKAIT, Mikaia okoku loka Imila: konye asac eoŋ ŋes; naarai mam kadwaranakini eoŋ nukajokak, dimarai ca nupekaronok.” Kotema Yekosapat atiar, “Kinyek ekabaka einer kwaŋin.”"
1Kings22:9 Kosodi ekabaka loka Isirael anyaraun ekapolokiton, kotema atiar, “Kisunyite koom Mikaia okoku loka Imila.”"
1Kings22:10 Kiboikin ekabaka loka Isirael ka Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda, ninitunanan oicoloŋoke, konapitos inapenekee, kaibois naelal neelomarere orute loka Samaria; kodwarata inabin kere kakonyenekec."
1Kings22:11 Kotatau Sedekia okoku loka Kenaana amumwara nuka asua, kotema atiar, “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, ‘Iremio nu Isurian, aitodol naedaunotor kesi.’’’"
1Kings22:12 Kodwarata inabin kere kwaŋin ebe, “Kolot Ramotgilead, kisirerenio: naarai iiaikini EJAKAIT ŋes akan naka ekabaka.”"
1Kings22:13 Kosodi ekiyakia loabu kolot anyaraun Mikaia kotema ŋes atiar, “Koany, ejokuka akiro nuka inabin kaituk adiopet mama ejai ekabaka: kenainait, koputokinos akirotokon kwape kakirot naka ediopet kakesi, kiner nuejok.”"
1Kings22:14 Kotema Mikaia atiar, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, nukalimokini EJAKAIT eoŋ, nupenun eneri.”"
1Kings22:15 Kedolu ŋesi mama ejai ekabaka, kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Mikaia, kilosi kereka isio Ramot-gilead ejie, arai bo kenyeis? “Koboŋok ŋes ebe, “Koloto, kisirerenio; ijaikini EJAKAIT ŋes akan naka ekabaka.”"
1Kings22:16 Kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Irwan imwaasi ai kesiyapo jo ebe sirikiilimok eoŋ adiokirot, dimarai nukabeit kokiror loka EJAKAIT,”"
1Kings22:17 Kotema atiar, “Abu kaany Isirael kere isiarakina koronan, kwape amerekekin nuemameete ekeeokon: kotema EJAKAIT atiar, ‘Emameete nu ejakait; kobonosi kesi ninitunanan oreke inapakina.’’’"
1Kings22:18 Kotema ekabaka loka Isirael Yekosapat atiar, “Mam abu kalimok jo ebe mam kadwaranakini eoŋ nukajokak dimarai ca nupekaronok?”"
1Kings22:19 Kotema atiar, “Aso kiira akirot naka EJAKAIT: abu kaany EJAKAIT iboie koicoloŋoke, kobwoi da aiore kere naka akuj kakanike nakoteten ka nakokediany da."
1Kings22:20 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar,, Iŋai iŋalaari Akab, tetere elosi aibirokin Ramot-Gilead?’ Kotema ediopet kopone kalo, ece da kopone ece."
1Kings22:21 Kolom do emoyo, kobwo kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kotema atiar, “Enalaari eoŋ ŋes.’"
1Kings22:22 Kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar,, Kinyo?’ Kotema atiar, ‘Alomari, araun emoyo lokainal kaituke nuka inabinoke kere.’ Kotema ŋesi atiar, ‘Iŋalaari ijo ŋes, ido ipedori: kolonia, kiswama kwaŋin.’"
1Kings22:23 Aso do koany, ebwaik EJAKAIT emoyo lokenalan aituke nuka inabinokon lu kere; kinerak EJAKAIT jo aronis.”"
1Kings22:24 Kosodi Sedekia okoku loka Kenaana aikunyakin, kibap Mikaia eitinyo, kotema atiar, “Kikwaikini ai emoyo loka EJAKAIT enyouni kamakaŋ einer kajo?”"
1Kings22:25 Kotema Mikaia atiar, “Koany, ianyuni kapaaran kaŋin, nailomaria agola nakotoma aiŋop.”"
1Kings22:26 Kotema ekabaka loka Isirael atiar, “Kikamutu Mikaia, kinyakakis ŋes Amon ekayaiton loka ere, mama ejai Yoas da okoku loka ekabaka;"
1Kings22:27 Kolimokis ebe, ‘Inera ekabaka kwanata ebe, “Kibwaikisi ekesa lo aidaris, kitanyamete ŋes inyamat luka aitieanitoi, kakipi nuka aiticanitoi, aitodol neabunio eoŋ kainapakin.”’”"
1Kings22:28 Kotema Mikaia atiar, “Arai teni ibonu Ijo kainapakin, mam EJAKAIT inerit kamakaŋ.” Kotema atiar, “Kiirasi yesi ituŋa, yes kere.”"
1Kings22:29 Koloto do ekabaka loka Isirael ka Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda Ramotgilead.
1Kings22:30 Kotema ekabaka loka Isirael Yekosapat atiar, “Etegelikini eoŋ bon, alosi ojie; konye konap ijo inapenekon.” Kitegelikin ekabaka loka Isirael bon, kolot oiie."
1Kings22:31 Abu ekabaka loka Suria kieorakinite ikapolokitok luka agalinike akaisauni ka luuni ebe, “Sirikijioto kaludidik karaida kalukapolok, dimarai kito ekabaka loka Isirael bon.”"
1Kings22:32 Kosodi kanen, keanyut ikapolokitok agalin Yekosapat, kobalas ebe, “Abeit ŋes ekabaka loka Isirael.” Korioto aitiji ŋes; kodelo Yekosapat."
1Kings22:33 Kosodi kanen, keanyut ikapolokitok agalin ebe mere ŋes ekabaka loka Isirael kobonut karukitor ŋes,"
1Kings22:34 Kiket ediotuŋanan akabwake komam elosikinit, kogum ekabaka loka Isirael neiriamitotor inapeneke lukasua: kanuka ŋun kotema ekerenean agalike atiar, “Kibelok akanikon, kodaka eoŋ kaiore; naarai kemusuni noi.”"
1Kings22:35 Kosisior ejie kapaaran kaŋin: kiganitete ekabaka kagalike aitiii Isurian, kotwana do eboŋ; koleleete aokot kamusunut ogali."
1Kings22:36 Koiau eworo anatar aiore kere napelomari akoloŋ ebe, “Ŋinituŋanan oreke, ka ninitunanan obukec,’"
1Kings22:37 Kotwana do ekabaka, koyaunai Samaria; kidaikinai ekabaka Samaria."
1Kings22:38 Kilota agali katapar naka Samaria; komeoto inokwo aokotoke; (kilonenenete adotia kanen;) kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT naabu kolim.
1Kings22:39 Aswamisio ace nuka Akab, ka kere nuabu kiswama, ka etogo loabu koduk, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael?"
1Kings22:40 Koiotoor Akab kalukapapaake; kirum Akasia okokuke aiboisike.
1Kings22:41 Kogeu Yekosapat okoku loka Asa airum Yuda kokaru lokiwononet loka Akab ekabaka loka Isirael,"
1Kings22:42 Korai Yekosapat loka ikar akaisauni ka lukany egeuni ŋesi airum; kirumak ikar akaisaarei ka lukany koYerusalem. Ekiror loka totoke ŋes Asuba akoku naka Sili.
1Kings22:43 Kolosenenei ŋesi korot kere loka Asa papake; mam abu kopaa, kiswama nuejok kakonye nuka EJAKAIT: konye mam aponi kolemarai aiboisio nuiceleleete; korina da ituŋa ainanakinete asuban, kisupuruunete lueuru maa kaiboisio nuiceleleete."
1Kings22:44 Kopueo Yekosapat kekabaka loka Isirael.
1Kings22:45 Aswamisio ace nuka Yekosapat, ka akegogoŋ naetodiarit, kwape aiior da, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Yuda?"
1Kings22:46 Abu kirenea kakwap luedeunos luka luitepete ikiliok, luedeunos kapaarasia nuka Asa pa pake."
1Kings22:47 Amamei ekabaka koEdom: ekeganan kerai ekabaka.
1Kings22:48 Kiswamau Yekosapat ameerin nuka Tarusis alosit Opir adumun esabu: konye mam apotu koloto; naarai kobilas ameerin koEsion-geber.
1Kings22:49 Kosodi Akasia okoku loka Akab atemari Yekosapat atiar, “Kisiik ikakejaanakinak aupar kikonikejaanakinak kameerin.” Konye koner Yekosapat."
1Kings22:50 Kojotoor Yekosapat kalukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai nepepe kalukapapaake ore loka Daudi papaake: kirum Yekoram okokuke aiboisike."
1Kings22:51 Kogeu Akasia okoku loka Akab airum Isirael koSamaria kokaru lokitomonet kakanykaarei loka Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda, kirumak Isirael ikar iarei."
1Kings22:52 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kolosenenei korot loka papake, korot loka totoke, korot da loka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat, loetidiakaria Isirael."
1Kings22:53 Abu kijaanak Baal, komaenenei ŋes, kitunyunyurik EJAKAIT, Edeke laka Isirael, kwape ajaatar kere nuabu papake kiswama."
2Kings1:1 Kipaliik Moab Isirael kedau Akab atwanare.
2Kings1:2 Kibirun Akasia kadirisa kagolake nakokuju naajai Samaria, kodekakin: kiyakia ikiyakia, kotema kes atiar, “Koloto, kiŋitut kama ejai Baal-sebub edeke loka Ekuron arai bo aŋaleuni adeka na,”"
2Kings1:3 Konye kotema emalaika loka EJAKAIT Eliya Etisibit atiar, “Konyou, kolot kiriamakinos kikiyakia luka ekabaka loka Samaria, kotema kes atiar,"
2Kings1:4 Emamei kereka Edeke kotoma Isirael, tape ilosete aiŋitun kama ejai Baal-sebub edeke loka Ekuron?’ ‘Aso do inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, ‘Mam inyouni koitada loidokikinit, konye abeit itwani.’” Konyouni do Eliya,"
2Kings1:5 Koboŋosi ikiyakia mamake, kotema ŋesi kes atiar, “Kanukinyo iboŋunioto?”"
2Kings1:6 Kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Abu kobu etuŋanan airiamun kasio, kolimok sio ebe, ‘Koloto, koboŋosi mama ejai ekabaka lokiyakuuni yes, kotemasi ŋes atiar, Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Emamei kereka Edeke kotoma Isirael, tape iyakiari aiŋitun kama ejai Baal-sebub edeke loka Ekuron? Kanulca ŋun mam inyouni koitada loidokikinit, konye abeit itwani.’”"
2Kings1:7 Kotema kes atiar, “Ejesi bo ai etuŋanan loabuni airiamun kayes, kolimok akiro ŋun?”"
2Kings1:8 Koboŋokis ŋes ebe, “Erai etuŋanan loeeekit, enapit arukan naka emukule kaŋabeteke.” Kotema ŋesi atiar, “Ŋes Eliya Etisibit.”"
2Kings1:9 Kosodi ekabaka aiyakildn ŋes ekapolon loka akaisakany, ka iketuŋa da akaisakany. Kolot mama ejai: ido koany, kiboie ŋesi kokuju oukot. Kinera kaŋes ebe, “Ŋo etuŋanan loka Edeke, ebala ekabaka ebe, ‘Kikokoror.’’’"
2Kings1:10 Koboŋok Eliya ekapolon loka akaisakany ebe, “Arai arai eoŋ etuŋanan loka Edeke, kobu akim kokuju, kiewe jo ka akaisakanyikon.” Kobu akim kokuju, kiewe ŋes ka akaisakanyike."
2Kings1:11 Kiyakia bobo ekapolon ece loka akaisakany ka akaisakanyike. Koboŋok kotema ŋes atiar, “Ŋo etuŋanan loka Edeke, ebala ekabaka kwanata ebe,, Kikokoror atipet.’’’"
2Kings1:12 Koboŋok Eliya kotema kes atiar, “Arai arai eoŋ etuŋanan loka Edeke, kobu akim kokuju, kiewe jo ka akaisakanyikon.” Kobu akim naka Edeke kokuju, kiewe ŋes ka akaisakanyike,"
2Kings1:13 Kiyakia bobo ekapolon loka akaisakany lokiwuniet ka akaisakanyike. Kolot ekapolon lokiwuniet loka akaisakany, kobu, kokukonokin Eliya, kiŋaiŋa ŋes, kotema ŋes atiar, “Ŋo etuŋanan loka Edeke, keŋaiŋait, korau akaijar ka aijar naka akaisakany lu ikonikejaanakinak naka akais nuipu kakonyenekon."
2Kings1:14 Koany, abu akim kobu kokuju kiewe ikapolok iarei lusodit luka akaisakany ka akaisakanyikee: konye korai akaijar naka akais nuipu kakonyenekon.”"
2Kings1:15 Kotema emalaika loka EJAKAIT Eliya atiar, “Kikokoror kaŋes; sirikikurianar ŋes.” Konyou, kikokoror kaŋes mama ejai ekabaka."
2Kings1:16 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, naarai ibu kiyalda ikiyakia aiŋitun kama ejai Baal-sebub edeke loka Ekuron, emamei kereka Edeke kotoma Isirael aiŋitun akekirot? Kanuka ŋun mam inyouni koitadakon loidokikinit, konye abeit itwani.”"
2Kings1:17 Kotwana do kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT naenera Eliya. Kogeu Yekoram airum aiboisike kokaru lokiareit loka Yekoram okoku loka Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda; naarai amamei ŋes ikoku yenitelepat,"
2Kings1:18 Aswamisio ace nuka Akasia nuabu kiswama mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael?
2Kings2:1 Kosodi kanen, nakekotor EJAKAIT aitodokaar Eliya ketapipirio toma akuj, konyout Eliya ka Elisa koGiligal."
2Kings2:2 Kotema Eliya Elisa atiar, “Keŋaiŋait kopaik ne: naarai kejukit EJAKAIT eoŋ Besel.” Kobala Elisa ebe, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, ido kwape ejaria ekonitau da, mam kajali jo.” Koloto koton Besel."
2Kings2:3 Kolomunete do idwe luka inabin lukeiaas Besel neejai Elisa, kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Ŋeni ebe eyaŋaari EJAKAIT ekoniiakait kama ijai ijo lolo?” Kobala ŋesi ebe, “Eebo, ajeni, kililinata yesi,”"
2Kings2:4 Kosodi kotema Eliya ŋes atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, Elisa, kopaik ne; naarai kejukit EJAKAIT eoŋ Yeriko,” Kobala ŋesi ebe, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, ido kwape ejaria ekonitau da, mam kajali jo.” Kosodete kodolo Yeriko."
2Kings2:5 Kikunyakis idwe luka inabin lukejaas Yeriko neejai Elisa, kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Ŋeni ebe eyaŋaari EJAKAIT ekonijakait kama ijai ijo lolo?” Koboijok ŋesi ebe, “Eebo, ajeni; kililinata yesi.”"
2Kings2:6 Kosodi kotema Eliya ŋes atiar, “Kenainait, kopaik ne; naarai kejukit EJAKAIT eoŋ Yorodan.” Kobala ŋesi ebe, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, ido kwape ejaria ekonitau da, mam kajali jo.” Kosodokis kesi luarei."
2Kings2:7 Koloto ikiliok akaisakany lukotoma odwe luka inabin, kobwaata atereikina kes kama elwana; kobwaata kesi luarei koYorodan."
2Kings2:8 Kosodi kolem Eliya ekelou, konunuk, kopaari ainomia akipi, kotiakas cpuai ka epuai, kitoro da kesi luarei neconit."
2Kings2:9 Kosodi kanen, kedokasi, kotema Eliya Elisa atiar, “Kilipai nukeswamakini jo eroko eoŋ kelemara kamakon.” Kobala Elisa ebe, “Kelipit akorakineta aarei nuka aijarakon kojaikinos keoŋ.”"
2Kings2:10 Kobala ŋes ebe, “Ilipit ijo akirot naetiono: konye, arai kiiany kaalemar eoŋ, ikwaikinos nen; konye arai mam, mam ikwaikinos nen.”"
2Kings2:11 Kosodi kanen, eriŋa elosete, iyalaete, koany, kotakan agali naka akim ka ibalasin luka akim, kotiakata kes luarei; kodoka Eliya toma akuj ketapipirio."
2Kings2:12 Keanyu Elisa, kiworo atiar, “Ipapa, Ipapa, agalin nuka Isirael ka ikebwanenok da.” Mam eanyuna ŋes bobo. Kosodi kitin ikenapen kocil atutubeta aarei."
2Kings2:13 Kolem da elou loka Eliya loabu kodou, kobono, kobwo kariri naka Yorodan,"
2Kings2:14 Kolem elou loka Eliya loabu kodou, kinomia akipi, kotema atiar, “Ai bo ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Eliya?” Ido kedau ŋesi da ainomia akipi, kotiakas epuai ka epuai: kotubor Elisa."
2Kings2:15 Keanyut ŋes idwe luka inabin lukejaas Yeriko kotemasi atiar, “Adoiki emoyo loka Eliya neejai Elisa.” Kopotu aisiriamaar ŋes, kisudedoto kakonyeneke."
2Kings2:16 Kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Koany, ejaas ituŋa akaisakany lukagogonok, nepepe kikonibulesin; kinainait, koloto kesi amoot ejakaitikon: motoko edakarit emoyo loka EJAKAIT ŋes kocaka ŋes oroŋat, arai bo aditot.” Kotema atiar, “Mam iyakiarete kes.”"
2Kings2:17 Kimaimaata ŋes aitodol neeleicikinio, kotema atiar, “Kiyakiasi do,” Kanuka ŋun kiyakiarai ituŋa akaisakany; komoata adaun apaarasia auni, konye mam apotu kodumut,"
2Kings2:18 Kobonut mama ejai, eroko idarit koYeriko; kotema kes atiar, “Mam abu kalimok yes ebe, ‘Sirikiloto?’”"
2Kings2:19 Kotemasi ituŋa lukore Elisa atiar, “Koany, kinainait, ejok aibois naka ere kalo, kwape eanyunia ejakaitika: konye eroko akip, akwap da mam ebwani inyamat.”"
2Kings2:20 Kotema atiar, “Koinunai atany nakitetet, kibwaikis abalaŋ toma.” Koinut ŋes,"
2Kings2:21 Koloma kolot neejai akoŋu naka atan, kocakak abalaŋ, kotema atiar, “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Etaŋaleu eoŋ akipi nu; mam bobo elomuni atwanare karaida aimotoikin.”"
2Kings2:22 Kwaŋin konaleut akip kiton lolo, kwape ajaar akirot naka Elisa naenera."
2Kings2:23 Konyou kanen kodoka Bet-el: elosi korot edokari, kolomut idwe ludidik kore, koratata ŋes, kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Kodoka ijo, lokepata; kodoka ijo, lokepata.”"
2Kings2:24 Konolia kau koany kes, kiken kes kokiror loka EJAKAIT. Kolomut adubui aarei kamonieik, kopoopoata idwe akaisaoŋon ka luarei kakesi."
2Kings2:25 Konyou kanen kolot moru Karamel, konyou kanen kobono Samaria."
2Kings3:1 Kogeu Yekoram okoku loka Akab airum Isirael koSamaria kokaru lokitomonet kakanykauni loka Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda, kirumak ikar itomon ka luarei."
2Kings3:2 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT; konye komam aputokin nuka papake ka totoke: naarai abu kolema epir loka Baal loabu papake kiswama,"
2Kings3:3 Konye kiketakin karonisio nuka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat, nuetidiakaria Isirael; mam abu konyou kakesi."
2Kings3:4 Kerai Mesa ekabaka loka Moab ekeeokon loka amerekekin; kijaanakin eka baka loka Isirael ajulo nuka idwe luka imerekekin ilukumin akwatat, ka nuka imerekekin ilukumin akwatat."
2Kings3:5 Kosodi kanen ketwana Akab, kipaliik do ekabaka loka Moab ekabaka loka Isirael."
2Kings3:6 Koloma ekabaka Yekoram koSamaria kapakio kanun, kimar Isirael kere,"
2Kings3:7 Kolot kiyakia mama ejai Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda ebe, “Kepaliiki ekabaka loka Moab; kiupari ijo keoŋ aitiji Moab?” Kotema atiar, “Alosi: arai eoŋ kwape iraar ijo, ikatuŋa kwape ikonituŋa, ka ikabalasin da kwape ikonibalasin.”"
2Kings3:8 Kotema atiar, “Kitoro orot ali? “Koboŋok ebe, “Orot lokamodin naka Edom.”"
2Kings3:9 Kosodi kolot ekabaka loka Isirael, ka ekabaka loka Yuda, ka ekabaka loka Edom: kirimosi alosit naka apaarasia akanykaarei: komamikis ajore akip, karaida itian luketupito kes."
2Kings3:10 Kotema ekabaka loka Isirael atiar, “Wu okwe! Naarai anyarau Ejakait ikabakan lu luuni aijaikin kes akan naka Moab.”"
2Kings3:11 Konye kotema Yekosapat atiar, “Emamei kereka kane enabi loka EJAKAIT, ainitunia EJAKAIT?” Koboŋok ediopet loka ikejaanakinak luka ekabaka loka Isirael cbe, “Ejai Elisa okoku loka Sapat kane, loalianakini akipi akanin nuka Eliya.”"
2Kings3:12 Kotema Yekosapat atiar, “Ejai akirot naka EJAKAIT kaŋes.” Kolot ekabaka loka Isirael ka Yekosapat ka ekabaka loka Edom mama ejai,"
2Kings3:13 Kotema Elisa ekabaka loka Isirael atiar, “Kimariai eoŋ inyo kajo? Kolot ijo mama ejaas inabin luka papakon, ka inabin luka totokon.” Kotema ekabaka loka Isirael ŋes atiar, “Mam; naarai anyarau EJAKAIT ikabakan lu luuni aijaikin kes akan naka Moab.”"
2Kings3:14 Kotema Elisa atiar, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, loabwoi eoŋ kakonyeneke, abeit, arai kemam apodo Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda ajaut kane, timam kaanolia jo, timam ketei da."
2Kings3:15 Aso do koinunai ekaraman.” Kosodi kanen, kerama ekaraman, kodoik ŋes apedor naka EJAKAIT."
2Kings3:16 Kotema atiar, “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe,, Kilelebata alelesia aditot na.’"
2Kings3:17 Naarai inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, ‘Mam ianyunete ekwam karaida akiru, konye ilelebunos akip aditot; imasete yesi da, yes, ka ibarenekus, ka itianikus.’"
2Kings3:18 Konye erai na akirot naedit kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: ijaikini da ŋesi Imoabin akaninikus,"
2Kings3:19 Idanyete luka ŋolire loebwaitai, ka nolire Ioititatai, ijepete nolikitoi loejok, inukete atanin kere nuka akipi, imunaarete kamor ŋinimana naejok.”"
2Kings3:20 Kosodi kanen, tupuruc, kapak naka ainakin ainakinet, koany, kopotu akipi elomunito korot loka Edom, kilelebun akwap akipi."
2Kings3:21 Kepuputu Imoabin kere ebe apotu ikabakan aitiji kes, kotukonokinos, kere luepedorete ainap lujiis ka adepar, kobwaata koikor."
2Kings3:22 Konyoutu tupuruc sek, kocaik akoloŋ akipi, koanyutu Imoabin akipi kajuwaikee erenak bala aokot."
2Kings3:23 Kotemasi atiar, “Nu kes aokot; abeit amudiaros ikabakan, adanyakinos, ŋinitunanan aar aupake: aso do, Moab, kanata.”"
2Kings3:24 Kedoloto oidukurun luka Isirael, konyoutu Isiraelin kodanyata Imoabin, kokerata kakonyenekee: kiyatakinos alosit akwap edanyete Imoabin."
2Kings3:25 Kotiyatiyata ireria; kocakanakis nolinujanan akemoru ninimana naejok, kilelebun; konukata atanin kere nuka akipi, kojepata ikito kere lukajokak; aitodol needeuniata amor nuko Kir-kareset ban; konye kirimirimoto lukaporoceta, atiyatiya."
2Kings3:26 Keanyu ekabaka loka Moab ebe ipikorit ejie ŋes, koyaŋa ituŋa akwat akanykaarei lukedakito ikileŋa kaŋes, acilar mama ejai ekabaka loka Edom: konye mam apotu kopedosi."
2Kings3:27 Kosodi alemun okokuke ekiyai lotikirum aiboisike, koinak ŋes araun ainakinet naicweio karwatat, Kojaun anyunyura naepol mama ejai Isirael: konyout kamaken, kobonosi akwapukee."
2Kings4:1 Kiworo aceberu kanor nuka odwe luka inabin mama ejai Elisa, kotema atiar, “Atwana ekonikejaanakinan okilenika: ijeni ijo da ebe abu eke jaanakinanikon koyonite EJAKAIT: abu lokapesen ayaŋaar ikadwe iarei araun ibulesinike.”"
2Kings4:2 Kotema Elisa ŋes atiar, “Anyoika keswamakini jo? Kolimokinai; inyo bo ejai kajo togo?” Kotema atiar, “Emamei akonikejaanakinan ibore kotogo, dimarai amot naka akinyet.”"
2Kings4:3 Kosodi ŋesi atemar atiar, “Kolot, kilipu ikoniidunyeta kere lukirimorito amoti, amoti nuemameete iboro kotoma; sirikilipu nuikidioko."
2Kings4:4 Ilomari, igolor ijo ka ikonidwe, kobukonok akinyet amoti ŋun kere; kinadanari nuilelebunos awai.”"
2Kings4:5 Konyou ŋin kama ejai ŋesi, kogolor ŋes ka odweke iarei; koinununut ŋes amoti, kobukonokini."
2Kings4:6 Kosodi kanen, kilelebunos amoti, kotema nin okokuke atiar, “Koinunai aeemot.” Kotema ŋes atiar, “Emamei bobo amot.” Kosanak akinyet,"
2Kings4:7 Kosodi nin abunore alimokin etuŋanan loka Edeke. Koboŋok ŋesi atiar, “Kolot, kogwela akinyet, kotac apesenekon, ido luideunos kojariata ijo ka ikonidwe.”"
2Kings4:8 Kosodi apaaran adiopet, kitor Elisa Sunem, nekejai aberu nakapolon; kimaima ŋes ainyam atap. Kosodi kanen, naetorenenoo, kopaanari nen ainyam atap."
2Kings4:9 Kotema nin okilenike atiar, “Koany, amisiik eoŋ lo erai etuŋanan lokalaunan loka Edeke, loitorenenei ne tiritir."
2Kings4:10 Kenainait, kadukokis ŋes igola karwatat; kebwaikis nen kanuke eitada, ka emesa, ka eicoloŋ, ka epir loka atala: tetere naebunenenoo ŋesi mamawok, kopauni nen.”"
2Kings4:11 Kosodi apaaran adiopet, kobu ŋesi nen, kopau agola koper nen."
2Kings4:12 Kotema ŋesi Gekasi ekejaanakinanike atiar, “Konyarau Asunamit ŋin.” Kosodi kenyaraun, kobwo kakonyeneke."
2Kings4:13 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Kolimok nin ebe, Koany, kibuak ijo sic kaibuakin naetia netine; inyo bo do kiswamakinio jo? Ikoto aitodiario mama ejai ekabaka arai bo mama ejai ekapolon loka ajore?” Koboŋok nin ebe, “Eboie eoŋ korunaka.”"
2Kings4:14 Kotema atiar, “Aso inyo bo do kiswamakinio ŋes?” Koboŋok Gekasi ebe, “Abeit emamei ŋes ikoku yenitelepat, emojonit da okilenike.”"
2Kings4:15 Kotema atiar, “Konyarau ŋes.” Konyarau, kobwo ŋin kokek."
2Kings4:16 Kotema ŋesi atiar, “Kapak kana, kedol ekaru, ituni ikoku yenitelepat.” Kotema nin ŋes atiar, “Mam, ekajakait, ijo etuŋanan loka Edeke, sirikinal akonikejaanakinan.”"
2Kings4:17 Kopotuu aberu, kouri ikoku yenitelepat kapak kaŋin kedol ekaru, kwape alimokinia Elisa ŋes."
2Kings4:18 Kosodi kepoloor ikoku, adiopepaaran, kolot mama ejai papake mama ejaas ikadwenyak."
2Kings4:19 Kotema ŋesi papake atiar, “Akouka, akouka.” Kotema ekejaanakinanike atiar, “Kodaka ŋes mama ejai totoke.”"
2Kings4:20 Keyaŋaa, kitodol mama ejai totoke, kiboikin akuninike aitodol kidin paaran, kotwana."
2Kings4:21 Kodoka nin, kiperik oitada loka etuŋanan loka Edeke, kogolok ekek, koloma kina,"
2Kings4:22 Kiworo okilenike kotema atiar, “‘Keŋaiŋait, kijukakinai ediopet kokejaanakinak, ka adiopet kasigirian, kakeria mama ejai erunanan loka Edeke, kabonu.”"
2Kings4:23 Kotema atiar, “Kanukinyo ikotor alosit neejai ŋesi lolo? Mam erai ailamun naka elap karaida nakasabato.” Kotema ŋin atiar, “Ŋul ajokak.”"
2Kings4:24 Kosodi nin aipet lupetan asigiriake, kotema ekeiaanakinanike atiar, “Kireŋea, kiyatak alosit; sirikiyap aibwanen, dimarai kaalimok jo.”"
2Kings4:25 Kolot do, kodol mama ejai etuŋanan loka Edeke omoru Karamel. Kosodi kanen, keany etunansn loka Edeke ŋes elwana, kotema Gekasi ekeiaanakinanike ebe, “Koany, ejai Asunamit ŋina:"
2Kings4:26 Keŋainait, koker airiamakin kaŋes, kinit ŋes atiar, Ŋai ejok? Okilenikon da ejok? Ikoku da ejokr “Koboŋok ŋin atiar, “Ejokuka.”"
2Kings4:27 Kedolo ŋesi mama ejai etuŋanan loka Edeke koukot, kitiŋ akeieke. Kikunyak Gekasi aremor ŋes; konye kotema etuŋanan loka Edeke atiar, “Kinyek: naarai ekadakinit eketau; kemunonikinit EJAKAIT, mam kalimokinit eoŋ.”"
2Kings4:28 Kosodi nin atemar atiar, “Abu eoŋ kakoto ikoku yenitelepat kama ejai ekaiakait? Mam abu katema atiar, Sirikiinala?”"
2Kings4:29 Kosodi ŋesi atemar Gekasi atiar, “Koen aŋabetekon, kitiŋ ebelaka akanikon, kolot: arai kiriamunos kitunanan kere, sirikiyoga ŋes; arai kiiyoga ituŋanan, sirikiboŋok: kibwaik ekabela akonyen nuka ikoku.”"
2Kings4:30 Kobala toto naka ikoku ebe, “Kwape eiaria EJAKAIT, kwape eiaria ekonitau da, mam kajali jo.” Konyou ŋesi, kotupa nin."
2Kings4:31 Kotubor Gekasi kinarenikec, kibwaik ebela akonyen nuka ikoku; konye amamei eporoto karaida apupun, Kanuka ŋun kobono airiamakin kaŋes, kolimok ebe, “Mam ikoku ekwenyunit.”"
2Kings4:32 Keloma Elisa togo, koany, atwana ikoku, kiperikinirete oitadake,"
2Kings4:33 Koloma do kogoloros kes iarei, kilip EJAKAIT."
2Kings4:34 Kolot, koper ebuburia kakuan naka ikoku, kibwaik akeituk aituk naka ikoku, akonyeke da akonyeke, akaninike da akaninike: koriori kama ejai ikoku; komwanu akuan naka ikoku,"
2Kings4:35 Kosodi ŋesi aboŋor, koriaria kotoma togo; kodoka koriori kama ejai ikoku: kikaresio ikoku irwan akanykaarei, kokweny ikoku,"
2Kings4:36 Konyarau Gekasi, kotema atiar, “Konyarau Asunamit ŋin,” Konyarau ŋes, Keloma nin mamake, kotema atiar, “Kodaka ikonikoku.”"
2Kings4:37 Kosodi ŋin alomun, kisudede kakeieneke, kokukum kwap; kodak okokuke, koloma,"
2Kings4:38 Kobu Elisa bobo Giligal: koiai ebeli akwap; kibolkinos odwe luka inabin kakonyeneke: kotema ŋesi ekekejaanakinan atiar, “Kidoroki akeit, kipoik odwe luka inabin atap.”"
2Kings4:39 Koloma ediopet omanikor aide edia, kodum emusabibu loka ais, koden imonyono luka ais kotunite kogoe, kobu kogetanak kes toma akeit naka atap: naarai mam ajenete kes."
2Kings4:40 Kodutakinai rtuna ainyam. Kosodi kanert, enyamete, kiworoto ebe, “Wu okwe, etuŋanan loka Edeke, ejai atwanare toma akeit ŋin,” Mam apotu kopedosi ainyam."
2Kings4:41 Konye kotema ŋesi atiar, “Koyautu akiria.” Kocakak akeit; kotema atiar, “Kodutakisi ituŋa, konyama.” Kemamei bobo aronis kotoma akeit."
2Kings4:42 Kobu etuŋanan ebuni koBaal-salisa, koinu etuŋanan loka Edeke inyamat luegeete, imugatin akaisaarei luka asairi, ka aluŋuren nukitetiak nuka akima kopukoke, Kotema atiar, “Koinak ituŋa, konyama.”"
2Kings4:43 Kotema ekeiaanakinanike atiar, “Okwe! ebwaikini lu akonyen nuka ituŋa akwatat?” Konye kotema atiar, “Koirtak ituŋa konyama; naarai inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Enyamete, kideut.”"
2Kings4:44 Kibwaik akonyenekec, konyamata kideutu, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT."
2Kings5:1 Kosodi Naaman ekapolon loka ajore naka ekabaka loka Suria, kerai etuŋanan lokapolon mama ejai ejakaitike, ido lokeyonitai, naarai kanuka nol abu EJAKAIT koinak Suria aipikonor: kerai da ekirigi loketitin kotoma oiie, konye kerai lokatapon."
2Kings5:2 Apotu Isurian kolomarito korioneta, konatut ipese kakwap naka Isirael; ido kijaanakinenei ŋin aberu naka Naaman."
2Kings5:3 Kosodi kotema ŋesi totoke atiar, “Arai papaka ejaas kenabi loejai Samaria! Ti kitanaleu ŋes aketapon.”"
2Kings5:4 Kosodi koloma etuŋanan, kolimok ejakaitike atiar, “Ebala kwaŋin ipese yenikakwap naka Isirael.”"
2Kings5:5 Kosodi kobala ekabaka loka Suria ebe, “Ape bo kolot, ejukakini eoŋ ekabaka loka Isirael ebalua.” Kosodi kolot, koyana da atalatan atomon nuka epuesa, ka atutubeta nuka esabu alukumin akanykape, ka inapen itomon."
2Kings5:6 Kosodi koinu ekabaka loka Isirael ebalua, kobala ebe, “Aso kiidolok jo ebalua lo, koany, keiukakinit jo ekakeiaanakinan Naaman, tetere itanaleuni ŋes atapon.”"
2Kings5:7 Kosodi kanen, kesioma ekabaka loka Isirael ebalua, kocil ikenapen, kobala ebe, “Arai gwai eoŋ Edeke, aiar ka aitajar da, tape ekesa lo kejukakini eoŋ aitaŋaleun etuŋanan aketapon? Konye koomoomata, keŋaiŋaito, kojenut kwape emoia aitoŋolop eoŋ.”"
2Kings5:8 Kosodi, kiira Elisa etuŋanan loka Edeke ebe acil ekabaka loka Isirael ikenapen, kiyakik eka baka, kobala ebe, “Kanukinyo kicilia ikoninapen? Kobu bo ŋes neaiai eoŋ, ido ejenuni kwape ejaar enabi toma Isirael.”"
2Kings5:9 Kosodi kobu Naaman ka ikebalasin ka akegalin da, kobwo kokek loka etogo loka Elisa."
2Kings5:10 Kijukak Elisa ŋes ekiyakia, kobala ebe, “Kolot kilon koYorodan irwan akanykaarei, itemokin bobo akonikuan, ijo da iŋaleuni.”"
2Kings5:11 Konye konyunyurikin Naaman, kolot, kobala ebe, “Koany, aomit bo eoŋ ebe mam eswaki alomuni mama ajai, aibwo, ka aiworo ekiror loka EJAKAIT Ekedeke, ka ararapaanar akais nuka atapon ka aitaŋaleun eoŋ."
2Kings5:12 Abana ka Parupar, icorin luka Damasiko, mam itelekarito aiokis akipi kere nuka Isirael? Mam apedori ailoŋ kanul, kasodi analeunr “Kibelokin kolot elilit."
2Kings5:13 Kikunyakis ikekejaanakinak, kinerata kaŋes, kotemasi atiar, “Okwe ipapa, arai kiicorakinit enabi aswam akirot naepol, mam tikiswama? Aso mam itelekarit noi, nakilimokinia jo ebe, Kilon, konaleu?”"
2Kings5:14 Kosodi kiiesar, kolumono irwan akanykaarei koYorodan, kwape kejaar akirot naka etuŋanan loka Edeke, kitemokin bobo akekuan kwape akuan naka ikoku yenididi, konaleu."
2Kings5:15 Kosodi kobono mama ejai etuŋanan loka Edeke, ŋes nepepe kikeruna kere, kobu, kobwo kakonyeneke: kiner ebe, “Koany, natikwana ajenu ebe emamei Edeke kakwapin kere, dimarai koIsirael: asa ca kenainait, kijaa ainakinet naka ekonikejaanakinan.”"
2Kings5:16 Konye Koboŋok ŋesi ebe, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, loabwoi eoŋ kakonyeneke, mam kejaari idiobore,” Kimaima ŋes aijaar; konye kogir."
2Kings5:17 Kobala Naaman ebe, “Arai mam kijaari, aso kenaiŋait jo koinakinai ekonikejaanakinan aritai nuka alup nuibwokete inyubun iarei; naarai mam eriŋa bobo ekonikejaanakinan einanakini luinanakina luieweio karaida asuban mama ejaas ieedekesio, dimarai mama ejai EJAKAIT."
2Kings5:18 Kisioni EJAKAIT ekonikejaanakinan kakirot kana; naelomanaria ejakaitika toma abila naka Rimon aima, kegonakin akanika, kesuded eoŋ kabila naka Rimon, naesudedeonono kabila naka Rimon, kisionienenei EJAKAIT ekonikejaanakinan kakirot kaŋin.”"
2Kings5:19 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Kolot inapakina.” Konyou kama ejai lweka neelwanikina."
2Kings5:20 Konye Gekasi, ekejaanakinan loka Elisa etuŋanan loka Edeke, kobala ebe, “Koany, etim ekajakait Naaman ŋol Esuriat, komam ijaunit idiobore kakaninike kaluayaunit: kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, mere kaker katupak, kadum ibore kaneejai.”"
2Kings5:21 Kotupak Gekasi Naaman. Keanyu Naaman yenatupit ŋes, kodoku kogali aisiriama ŋes, kotema atiar, “Kojokuka baea?”"
2Kings5:22 Kobala ebe, “Ejokuka. Kejukunit ejakaitika ebe, Koany, adolut kwape kwana neajai itelepai iarei luka odwe luka inabin, luapote koukon luka Epuraim; kenainait, koinak kes atalata naka epuesa, ka inapen iarei.”"
2Kings5:23 Kotema Naaman ŋes atiar, “Kiyu, koyana atalatan aarei.” Kikanikan, koen atalatan aarei nuka epuesa koriagin iarei, ka inapen iarei, kisibwok ikekejaanakinak iarei; kibwokata kakonyeneke."
2Kings5:24 Kedol oukot, kijaa kakanikec, kinadak togo: kotwar ituŋa, koboŋosi,"
2Kings5:25 Konye koloma, kobwo kakonyen nuka eiakaitike. Kobala Elisa ebe, “Gekasi, ai bo kibunio?” Kobala ebe, “Mam neelosit ekonikejaanakinan.”"
2Kings5:26 Kobala ŋes ebe, “Mam ekatau elosit kaio, naebelokinor etuŋanan kagalike aisiriam jo? Ŋes apak aijaun epuesa, ka aijaun inapen, ka imanikoria luka iseitunin, ka luka imusabibun, ka amerekekin, ka imoŋin, ka ibulesin ka abulesin?"
2Kings5:27 Aso kikopakin jo atapon naka Naaman, ka akoniwur ikar ka ikar.” Koloma kaneejai ibokoriat akuan atapon."
2Kings6:1 Kotemasi odwe luka inabin Elisa atiar, “Koany, edidin aibois nekiboio isio kakonyenekon."
2Kings6:2 Kinainait, kaloto Yorodan, koiepu ŋolituŋanan atekat, kadukioto ŋina aibois nekiboio.” Koboŋok ŋesi ebe, “Koloto yesi.”"
2Kings6:3 Kotema ediopet atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, kiyu, kouparos kikonikejaanakinak.” Koboŋok ebe, “Kiupari.”"
2Kings6:4 Kosodi aupar kakes. Kedoloto Yorodan, koiepa akito,"
2Kings6:5 Konye napeiepi ediopet atekat, kidotun aep kodo akipi: komony kotema atiar, “‘Wu okwe, ekajakait! Naarai erai ailipuna.”"
2Kings6:6 Kotema etuŋanan loka Edeke atiar, “Ai bo adoo?” Kitodik ŋes aibois. Koiepu akitoi, kocakak nen, kisilepu asuat."
2Kings6:7 Kotema atiar, “Kolem,” Korio akekan, kolem."
2Kings6:8 Kosodi kojioto ekabaka loka Suria ka Isirael; kinerut kikekejaanakinak atiar, “Abore kamutan ŋes ejaikin ekaswam.”"
2Kings6:9 Kiyakik ctunanan loka Edeke ekabaka loka Isirael kinera atiar, “Koeoite kinyek aitor abore kamutan naarai itorete Isurian nina.”"
2Kings6:10 Kijuka ekabaka loka Isirael toma aibois nin naalimokini etuŋanan loka Edeke ikwenyari; koku kaŋina, mere irwan atipct karaida aarei."
2Kings6:11 Kosodi kiyalonon noi ekabaka loka Suria kotauke kanuka akirot kaŋin; konyarau ikekejaanakinak kotema kes atiar, “Mam kiteienunete eoŋ ediopet kaoni loejai kanuka ekabaka loka Isirael?”"
2Kings6:12 Kotema ediopet kokeiaanakinakake atiar, “Mam ekaiakait, wu ekabaka; konye Elisa enabi Ioejai kolsirael ŋes elimonokini ekabaka loka Isirael akiro nuinera ijo kagolakon.”"
2Kings6:13 Kotema atiar, “Koloto koanyutu neejai, keiuka koomai.” Kolimokinai ebc, “Koany, ejai Dotan.”"
2Kings6:14 Kosodi kijuka ibalasin ka agalin, ka ajore naepol: kopotu kuare kirigaut ere."
2Kings6:15 Kosodi ekeiaanakinan loka etuŋanan loka Edeke nakenyou tupuruc, koloma, koany, aiore ka ibalasin ka agalin irigaunito ere. Kotema ekekejaanakinan ŋes atiar, “Itukwi, ekajakait! Kekwaikis ai?”"
2Kings6:16 Koboijok ebe: “Sirikikurianar: naarai ipu nul lueja kaoni adepar lueiaas kakes.”
2Kings6:17 Kilip Elisa kobala ebe, “Wu EJAKAIT, kenainait, kitwekeny akekonye tetere eanyuni.” Kosodi kitwekeny EJAKAIT akonye nuka etelepat; koany; ido koany, ileleba eronat ibalasin ka agalin nuka akim irimorito Elisa."
2Kings6:18 Kikokororos kesi neejai ŋesi, kilip Elisa EJAKAIT, kotema atiar, “Kenainait kitumudak akonye nuka ituŋa kalu.” Kitumudak akonyekec kwape ajaar akirot naka Elisa."
2Kings6:19 Kotema Elisa kes atiar, “Mere lo ŋes erot, ido mere lo ŋes ere: kotupunai, ketodoli eoŋ yes mama ejai etuŋanan loimoete.” Koyana kes Samaria."
2Kings6:20 Kosodi kanen, kedoloto Samaria, kotema Elisa atiar, “EJAKAIT, kitwekeny akonye nuka ituŋa kalu, koanyut.” Kitwekeny EJAKAIT akonyekee, koanyutu; ido koany, kejaas toma Samaria."
2Kings6:21 Keanyu kes, kotema ekabaka loka Isirael Elisa atiar, “Ipapa, adanyi kes? Adanyi kes?”"
2Kings6:22 Koboŋok ebe, “Mam idanyi kes: ikoto kereka aidany nul luinatu kekonikilen ka akabwakon? Kibwaik atap ka akipi akonyenekee, konyama komata, kobonosi mama ejai eiakaitikec.”"
2Kings6:23 Kipoik kes inyamat luipu: kedautu ainyam ka aimat, kotwara kes, koloto mama ejai eiakaitikec, Mam bobo apotu irioneta luka Suria kopotu akwap naka Isirael."
2Kings6:24 Kosodi kanen, kokau kanun, kotukonok Ben-kadad ekabaka loka Suria aioreke kere, kodoka, kirigau Samaria."
2Kings6:25 Koiai ebeli loededeŋ toma Samaria: ido koany, kirigaut, aitodol neagwelariata akou naka asigiria atutubeta akaisakanykauni nuka epuesa, ka atutubet nakiwononet naka aoret naka ajele atutubeta akany nuka epuesa,"
2Kings6:26 Nakitoritor ekabaka loka Isirael arwatat, komonyak aberu ŋes, kotema atiar, “Kiŋarakinai, ejakaitika, wu ekabaka.”"
2Kings6:27 Kotema atiar, “Arai mam EJAKAIT kinarakini jo, alemuni eoŋ kai lukenarakinia jo? Opejal arai bo acuet ebino?”"
