2Kings6:28 Kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Anyoika bo?” Koboŋok ebe, “Abu aberu na katema eoŋ atiar, ‘Kopala ikokukon, kanyama ŋes lolo, kinyami yenika da moi.’"
2Kings6:29 Kipou kepooto ikokuka, kanyama: kasodi eoŋ atemar ŋes kapaaran nakiareit ebe, ‘Kopala ikokukon, kanyama.’ Konye ebwa ŋesi ikokuke.”"
2Kings6:30 Kosodi kanen, kepupu ekabaka akiro nuka aberu, kocil inapeneke; ido etorit ŋesi arwatat; kosesenete ituŋa, ido koany, kenapit epuko kakuanake."
2Kings6:31 Kosodi ŋesi atemar atiar, “Keswamak Edeke eoŋ kwaŋin, ka adepar da, arai esalakini akou naka Elisa okoku loka Sapat mama ejai ŋesi lolo.”"
2Kings6:32 Konye kiboie Elisa kotogoke, kibojete imakio da kaŋes; kiyakia ekabaka etuŋanan anyoun kamaken: konye eroko edolo ekiyakia mama ejai, kotema ŋesi imakio atiar, “Ianyutu yesi okoku lo loka ekaaran kwape eyakuunia aiepar akouka? Aso do, naebunio ekiyakia, kogolokisi ekek, kotikokis: mam kituikitui naka akeje nuka eiakaitike ejai kauke?”"
2Kings6:33 Eroko inera kakes, koany, kodol ekiyakia mama ejai: kotema atiar, “Koany, aronis na erai naka EJAKAIT; kanukinyo bo edaritor EJAKAIT?”"
2Kings7:1 Kotema Elisa atiar, “Kopupokisi akirot naka EJAKAIT: inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Moi kwape tinenikwana egwelario aitemis naka akiria nuidieie esekel, * ka aitemisio aarei nuka esairi esekel, korute loka Samaria.’"
2Kings7:2 Kosodi ekapolon loagonanakin ekabaka akanike aboŋokin etuŋanan loka Edeke ebe, “Koany, arai kiswama EJAKAIT apedon toma akuj, tikepedoo akirot nin ajaut?” Kotema atiar, “Koany, ianyuni kakonikonye konye mam inyami.”"
2Kings7:3 Kojaas ituŋa iwonon lukatapon neelomarere korute: kotemanaros atiar, “Kanukinyo kiboio oni kane aitodol nekitwakia?"
2Kings7:4 Arai kiitema atiar, Kalomasi ore, ejai ebeli ore, kitwakikini nen: arai kiiboikini nepene kitwaki. Aso do kaloto, kalunakinos ajore naka Isurian: arai kiitajarata oni, kijari; arai kiiarata, kitwaki do.”"
2Kings7:5 Konyout nape imuki alosit oidukurun luka Isurian: kedoloto ariri naka iidukurun luka lsurian, koany, kemamei ediotuŋanan."
2Kings7:6 Naarai abu EJAKAIT kisiira aiore naka Isurian aruo naka agalin, ka aruo naka ibalasin, aruo naka aiore naepol: kotemanaros atiar, “Koany, ebooleikis ekabaka loka Isirael ikabakan luka Ikitin ka ikabakan luka Imisirian aitiji oni,”"
2Kings7:7 Kanuka ŋun konyout kokerata nape imuki, kinyeikis iwemanakec, ka ibalasinikec, ka asigirianakec, kwape ajaatar Iidukurun, kokerata kanuka akeceijar."
2Kings7:8 Kedoloto lukatapon nul ariri naka iidukurun, kolomasi owema ediopet, konyama komata, kolemut epuesa ka esabu ka inapen, koloto kibwaata; kobonut, kolomasi owema ece, kolemut kanen da, koloto kibwaata."
2Kings7:9 Kosodete atemanar atiar, “Mam kiswamai nuejok: lolo ŋes apaaran naka akiro nuejok, oni da kililini: arai kiidara kiwala akwap, kidolokini oni aitieanio: asa do kopotu, kaloto kalimokis lukokal loka ekabaka.’"
2Kings7:10 Kopotu kiworoto ekagolon loka ere: kolimonokis kes ebe, “Kidolo isio oidukurun luka Isurian, ido koany, amamei etuŋanan, karaida eporoto loka ituŋanan, konye ibalasin eenen, ka asigirian eenen, ka iweman da kwape kwaŋin.”"
2Kings7:11 Konyarau ikagolok; kolimokis lukokal loka ekabaka lukotoma.
2Kings7:12 Konyou ekabaka kuare, kotema ikekeiaanakinak atiar, “Kekwenyari yes nukiswamakis Isurian oni. Ejenete kesi ebe kiriebi oni eteŋei; kanuka nun ŋes alomariata koidukurun aiŋop ais, kobalas ebe, ‘Kelomut kore, kanatasi ejarete, kilomari do ore.’’’"
2Kings7:13 Koboŋok ediopet kokeiaanakinakake kotema atiar, “Kenainait, koyanaasi icetuŋa ibalasin ikany luedeunos, luesalito ore, (koany, esubito kesi bala ekodet kere loka Isirael loedeun kaŋes; koany, esubito bala ekodet kere loka Isirael loamudiar r) keiukasi, kaanyutu.”"
2Kings7:14 Kosodete koyanaasi agalin aarei kibalasin; kijuka ekabaka atupar aiore naka Isurian, kobala ebe, “Koloto, koanyut.”"
2Kings7:15 Kibwapakis kes aitodol Yorodan: ido koany, eleleba erot inapen ka iboro, luacakanarete Isurian iwonyete, Kobonut ikiyakia, kolimokis ekabaka,"
2Kings7:16 Kolomut ituŋa, konata iidukurun luka Isurian. Kogwelanarai do aitemis naka akiria nuidicic esekel, ka aitemisio aarei nuka esairi esekel, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT,"
2Kings7:17 Kodakak ekabaka ekapolon loagona* esekel ŋes apesa nakin ekabaka akanike apolokin erute: kicakacakata ituŋa ŋes korute, kotwana kwape abalar etuŋanan loka Edeke, loenera kelot ekabaka mama ejai."
2Kings7:18 Kosodi kanen, kwape abalar etuŋanan loka Edeke ekabaka ebe, “Aitemisio aarei nuka esairi esekel, ka aitemis naka akiria nuidicie esekel, ejaun kwaŋin korute loka Samaria moi kwape tinenikwana.’"
2Kings7:19 Abu ekapolon ŋol Koboŋok etuŋanan loka Edeke kotema atiar, “Koany, arai kiswama EJAKAJT apedon toma akuj, tikepedoo akirot ŋin ajaut?” Kobala ebe, “Koany, ianyuni kakonikonye, konye mam inyami.”"
2Kings7:20 Kodolok ŋes kwaŋin; naarai kicakacakata ituŋa ŋes korute, kotwana."
2Kings8:1 Abu Elisa kolimokinite aberu naetaiarikini ŋesi okokuke ebe, “Konyou, kolot ijo ka lukokalekon, kiboikin neipedoria aiboiororor; naarai anyarau. EJAKAIT ebeli; edauni ebeli ikar ikanykaarei kakwap.”"
2Kings8:2 Konyou aberu kiswama kwape ajaar akirot naka etuŋanan loka Edeke: kolot kalukokaleke, kiboiororoi kakwap naka Ipilisitian ikar ikanykaarei,"
2Kings8:3 Kosodi kanen ketuboros ikar ikanykaarei kobonu aberu anyoun kakwap naka Ipilisitian: koloma amonyakin ekabaka kanuka eketogo ka alupoke,"
2Kings8:4 Enisit ekabaka Gekasi ekeiaanakinan loka etuŋanan loka Edeke, kobala ebe, “Keŋainait, kolimokinai akiro nuepolok nuabu Elisa kiswama.”"
2Kings8:5 Kosodi kanen, napelimenokini ŋesi ekabaka kwape etaiarunia ŋol loatwanit, koany, kodoluni aberu naetajarikini ŋesi okokuke, komonyak ekabaka kanuka eketogo ka akelup da. Kotema Gekasi atiar, “Ejakaitika, wu ekabaka, na ŋes aberu, lo da okokuke, loetajaruni Elisa.”"
2Kings8:6 Kinit ekabaka aberu, kolimok ŋes, Koseu ekabaka ekapolokiton ediopet kotema atiar, “Kinyakakis kere luaraas luke, ka araito kere naka alupoke ageun kapaaran naanyounio kakwap, kiton lolo.”"
2Kings8:7 Kobu Elisa Damasiko; adeka Ben-kadad ekabaka loka Suria; aponi kolimokinai ŋes ebe, “Abu etuŋanan laka, Edeke ne.”"
2Kings8:8 Kotema ekabaka Kasael atiar, “Koyana ainakinet kakanikon, kolot airiamun ketunanan loka Edeke, kinitunia ŋes EJAKAIT ebe, ‘Aŋaleuni adeka na?’ ”"
2Kings8:9 Kolot Kasael airiamun kaŋes, koyana ainakinet, naka ninioore yenejok yeniko Damasiko, naebwokito akaalai akaisaoŋon, kobu kobwo kakonyeneke, kotema atiar, “Okokukon Ben-kadad ekabaka loka Suria ŋes keyakuunit neijai ebala ebe, ‘Aŋaleuni adeka na?’”"
2Kings8:10 Kotema Elisa ŋes atiar, “Kolot, kolimok ŋes ebe, ‘Abeit iŋaleuni.’ Konye ketodikinite EJAKAIT eoŋ ebe abeit etwani.”"
2Kings8:11 Kosesen noi aitodol naeleicikinio: komony etuŋanan loka Edeke akiyo.
2Kings8:12 Kotema Kasael atiar, “Inyo bo emonyi ekaiakait?” Koboŋok ebe, “Naarai ajeni aronis naiswamakini ijo idwe luka Isirael: icwei abwasinikee kakim, iari itelepaikec kekilen, ilatanari ludidikikee, iŋerereanari akecenor nuepotiete.”"
2Kings8:13 Kotema Kasael atiar, “Konye ekonikejaanakinan ŋes inyo, loerai ekiŋok cur, aswam akirot ŋin naepol?” Koboŋok Elisa ebe, “Ketodik EJAKAIT eoŋ ebe iraun ijo ekabaka loka Suria.”"
2Kings8:14 Kosodi ŋesi anyoun kama ejai Elisa, kobu neejai ejakaitike; loketemari ŋes atiar, “Ebala bo Elisa ai?” Koboŋok ebe, “Kalimoki ebe abeit iŋaleuni.”"
2Kings8:15 Kosodi kanen kapaaran naatupakini, kolem eimukis, kidomak akipi, korapak akonyeneke, kotwana: kirum Kasael aiboisike."
2Kings8:16 Kokaru lokikanyet loka Yoram okoku loka Akab ekabaka loka Isirael, korai Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda, kogeu Yekoram okoku loka Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda airum."
2Kings8:17 Kerai loka ikar akaisauni ka luarei egeuni airum; kirumak ikar ikanykaunl ko Yerusalem.
2Kings8:18 Kolosenenei korot loka ikabakan luka Isirael, kwape eswamaenenaa ekek loka Akab; naarai amanyit akoku naka Akab: kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
2Kings8:19 Konye mam EJAKAIT akoto amudiar Yuda, kanuka Daudi ekekeiaanakinan, kwape kisumunio ŋes ainakin atala kanuka ikedwe ikar kere."
2Kings8:20 Kapaarasiake kipaliik Edom anyoun kakan naka Yuda kodakakis ekabakakee kanukec.
2Kings8:21 Kosodi Yoram adokar Sair, ka agalinike kere kaŋes: konyou kuare, kodany Idomein lualukunito ŋes, ka ikapolok luka agalin: kokera ituŋa owemanakee."
2Kings8:22 Kwaŋin kipaliik Edom anyoun kakan naka Yuda, kiton lolo. Kosodi Libuna da aipaliikin kapaarasia kanun."
2Kings8:23 Aswamisio ace nuka Yoram, ka nuabu kiswama kere mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Yuda?"
2Kings8:24 Kojotoor Yoram kalukapapaake, kidaikinai kalukapapaake ore loka Daudi: kirum Akasia okokuke aiboisike."
2Kings8:25 Kokaru lokitomonet kaarei loka Yoram okoku loka Akab ekabaka loka Isirael kogeu Akasia okoku loka Yekoram ekabaka loka Yuda airum.
2Kings8:26 Kerai loka ikar akaisaarei ka luarei egeuni airum; kirumak ekaru ediopet ko Yerusalem. Ekiror loka totoke ŋes Atalia akoku naka Omiri ekabaka loka Isirael.
2Kings8:27 Kolosenenei korot loka ekek loka Akab, kiswama nueroko kakonycn nuka EJAKAIT, kwape eswamaenenaa ekek loka Akab; naarai kerai ekamuran loka ekek loka Akab."
2Kings8:28 Kouparos Akasia ka Yoram okoku loka Akab aitiji Kasael ekabaka loka Suria koRamot-gilead: kimusunata Isurian Yoram.
2Kings8:29 Kobono ekabaka Yoram aŋaleun amusuŋun koYesereel nuemusunete Isurian koRama, nakeiiotor kaKasael ekabaka loka Suria. Kolot Akasia okoku loka Yekoram ekabaka loka Yuda aanyun Yoram okoku loka Akab koYesereel, naarai adeka."
2Kings9:1 Konyarau Elisa enabi ediopet kodwe luka inabin, kotema ŋes atiar, “Koen aŋabetekon, koyana ekube lo loka akinyet kakanikon, kolot Ramot-gilead."
2Kings9:2 Kidolo nina komou kaŋina Yeku okoku loka Yekosapat okoku loka Nimisi, koloma, kitonyou ŋes kama ejaas iinacanake, kitoloma agola nakotoma."
2Kings9:3 Kosodi alemun ekube loka akinyet, kobukok akonke, kotema atiar, ‘Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Kenyonyoik jo akinyet araun ekabaka loka Isirael.’ Kosodi konaa ekek, koker, sirikiyap.”"
2Kings9:4 Aso abu ekatumunan, ŋes ekatumunan enabi kolot Ramot-gilead."
2Kings9:5 Kedolo, koany, iboiete ikapolok luka aiore: kotema atiar, “Ejaas nukejukunitere mama ijai ijo, lokapolon.” Kotema Yeku atiar, “Mama ejai iŋai kasio kere?” Kotema atiar, “Mama ijai ijo, lokapolon.”"
2Kings9:6 Konyou ŋesi, koloma togo; kobukok akinyet akouke, kotema ŋes atiar, “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, Kenyonyoik jo akinyet araun ekabaka loka ituŋa luka EJAKAIT, kes Isirael."
2Kings9:7 Ido idanyi ekek loka Akab ekapolonikon, kenyan aokot nuka ikakejaanakinak inabin, ka aokot nuka ikejaanakinak kere luka EJAKAIT, nuabukoros kakan naka Yesebel."
2Kings9:8 Naarai eoliori ekek kere loka Akab: amudiari ninikoku yenitelepat yenika Akab, ka ŋol loeenitai ka lomam eenitai kotoma Isirael."
2Kings9:9 Ido etuluori ekek loka Akab kwape ekek loka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat, kwape da ekek loka Baasa okoku loka Akiya."
2Kings9:10 Enyamakinete iŋokwo Yesebel amana naka Yesereel, emameun yenidai ŋes.” Konaa ekek, koker."
2Kings9:11 Kosodi Yeku alomun mama ejaas ikejaanakinak luka eiakaitike: kotema cdiopet atiar, “Ejokuka baca? Anyoika keyaunit etuŋanan ŋol lokikerep mama ijai?” Kobala ŋesi ebe, “Ŋenete yesi etuŋanan, ka akekiro da.”"
2Kings9:12 Kobalas ebe, “Isabi; kolimokinai do.” Kotema atiar, “Ebala kwana kwana ebe, “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Kenyonyoik jo akinyet araun ekabaka loka Isirael.’’’"
2Kings9:13 Kisunyasi ŋolitunanan alemun ekegoe, kopesikis kwapuke kuju kadoketa, kokuta arupepe, kotemasi atiar, “Yeku ŋes ekabaka,”"
2Kings9:14 Kwaŋin kinerut Yeku okoku loka Yekosapat okoku loka Nimisi asurokin Yoram. (Kidari Yoram Ramot-gilead, ŋes ka Isirael kere, kanuka Kasael ekabaka loka Suria."
2Kings9:15 Konye kebonunit ekabaka Yoram Yesereel aŋaleun amusuŋun nuemusunito Isurian eiiosi kaKasael ekabaka loka Suria.) Kotema Yeku atiar, “Arai ikotosi kwaŋin kinyek ajaut loesii alomar ore, alosit alimokin koYesereel.”"
2Kings9:16 Kodoka Yeku agali, kolot Yesereel; naarai aperi Yoram kaŋina, Abu Akasia ekabaka loka Yuda kolosite aanyun Yoram."
2Kings9:17 Kobwoi ekedaran kotogo lokokuju koYesereel, koany erioŋet loka Yeku ebunit, kotema atiar, “Aany erioŋet.” Kotema Yoram atiar, “Koseu ekebwanenon ebalasit, kiyakia airiamakin kakes, kobala ebe, ‘Ejai kereka ainapakin?’ ”"
2Kings9:18 Kolot ediopet ibwanenit ebalasit airiamun kaŋes, kotema atiar, “Inera ekabaka kwanata ebe, ‘Ejai kereka ainapakin?’ ” Kotema Yeku atiar, “Inyo bo ipodo ijo kainapakin? Komana kauka.” Kolimok ekedaran ebe, “Adolo ekiyakia neejaas kesi, konye mam eboŋunit.”"
2Kings9:19 Kosodi ŋesi aiyakia lokiareit ibwanenit ebalasit, kodolo neejaas kotema atiar, “Inera ekabaka kwanata ebe, ‘Ejai kereka ainapakin?’ ” Koboŋok Yeku ebe, “Inyo bo ipodo ijo kainapakin? Komana kauka.”"
2Kings9:20 Kolimok ekedaran ebe, “Adolo ŋol da neeiaas, konye mam eboŋunit: eirene eputos bala eirene loka Yeku okoku loka Nimisi; naarai irenei ŋesi komositoi.”"
2Kings9:21 Kotema Yoram atiar, “Kitemokisi.” Kitemokisi agalike, Kolom Yoram ekabaka loka Isirael ka Akasia ekabaka loka Yuda, ninitunanan agalike, kolomut airiamun kaYeku, kodumakis ŋes mana naka Nabot Eyesereelit."
2Kings9:22 Kosodi kanen, keanyu Yoram Yeku, kotema atiar, “Ejai kereka ainapakin, Yeku?” Koboŋok ebe, “Ainapakin anyoin, adoteu naka totokon Yesebel ka icudetake luipu luetia nen?”"
2Kings9:23 Kibelok Yoram akegali koker, kotema ŋesi Akasia atiar, “Ŋo ba, Akasia, ejai ebotet.”"
2Kings9:24 Kiket Yeku akabwake kagogoŋuke kere, kogum Yoram kidin opura, koloma emal otauke, kibirokin toma agalike."
2Kings9:25 Kosodi Yeku atemar Bidikar ekapolonike atiar, “Kodaku, kocakak ŋes amana naka alup nuka Nabot Eyesereelit: naarai kiitu ebe nakibwanenenoo eoŋ ka jo katupito Akab papake, kibwaik EJAKAIT abwokon na mamake;"
2Kings9:26 Inera EJAKAIT ebe, ‘Abeit aany bian aokot nuka Nabot, ka aokot nuka odweke’; inera EJAKAIT ebe, ‘Atacakini jo kamana kana.’ Aso do kodakaa kocakak amana na, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT.”"
2Kings9:27 Konye keanyu Akasia ekabaka loka Yuda ŋun, kokeria orot lokotogo lokomanikor. Kotupa Yeku ŋes, kotema atiar, “Koarakis ŋes da agalike.” Koarakinai needokarere alosit Gur loidunyas ka Ibileam. Kokeria Megido, kotwanik ŋina."
2Kings9:28 Kodakakis ikekejaanakinak ŋes agali koyanaasi Yerusalem, kidaikinai atesike nepepe kalukapapaake ore loka Daudi."
2Kings9:29 Kokaru lokitomonet ka lodiopet loka Yoram okoku loka Akab kogeu Akasia airum Yuda.
2Kings9:30 Kedolo Yeku Yesereel, kopup Yesebel; kojuk akonyeke, kisiri akouke, kireik kadirisa."
2Kings9:31 Kosodi elomari Yeku korute, kotema atiar, “Ejai kereka ainapakin, ijo Simiri, ekaaran ekapolonikon?”"
2Kings9:32 Kitonyou akekonyen adirisa, kotema atiar, “Iŋai ejai owaika? Inair “Kireikis ŋes ibwacin iarei arai Juni."
2Kings9:33 Kotema atiar, “Koeakutu kwap.” Kwaŋin koeakunai kwap: kodetanakinos aokotoke arwatat, kobalasin da; kicakaeaka ŋes kakeje."
2Kings9:34 Kosodi keloma toma, konyam komat; kotema atiar, “Kidara aberu nin naekenokinitoi, kidaata: naarai erai akoku naka ekabaka.”"
2Kings9:35 Koloto aida ŋes: konye mam apotu kodumut kaŋesi dimarai abelekek kakou, ka akeie, ka atitiban nuka akanin."
2Kings9:36 Kanuka ŋun kobonuru kolimokis ŋes, Kotema atiar, “Na ŋes akirot naka EJAKAIT, naenera toma okejaanakinanike Eliya Etisibit ebe, ‘Enyamakinete inokwo akuan naka Yesebel mana naka Yesereel:"
2Kings9:37 Akuan da naka Yesebel eraun bala aoret kais kamana naka Yesereel; kinyeis einer ebe, Na ŋes Yesebel.’’’"
2Kings10:1 Kejaas Akab odweke akaisakanykaarei koSamaria. Kiwadika Yeku ibaluan, kijuka Samaria, mama ejaas ikayaitok luka Yesereel, kes imakio, mama ejaas ŋul da luasaete odwe luka Akab kobala ebe,"
2Kings10:2 “Aso napeedoluni ebalua lo mama iiaas, naarai ejaas odwe luka ekapolonikus kayes, ejaas da agalin ka ibalasin kayes, ka ere loebwaitai da, ka luiiis;"
2Kings10:3 Komoata loejok ka loibus kodwe luka ekapolonikus, kodakakis oicoloŋ loka papake, koiiut ekek loka ekapolonikus.’"
2Kings10:4 Konye kokuriakaros noi, kotemasi atiar, “Koany, mam apotu ikabakan nul luarei kobwaata kakonyeneke: kikonakini isio kibwoi ai?”"
2Kings10:5 Apotu ekapolokiton loka ekal, ka ekapolokiton loka ere, ka imakio da, ka nul luasaete idwe, kiyakikis Yeku ebe, “Kirai isio ikejaanakinakakon, kiswamai kere nukieorakini ijo sio; mam kitaraun ituŋanan kere ekabaka: kiswama ijo nuejok kakonyenekon.”"
2Kings10:6 Kosodi ŋesi airucakin aiwadik ebalua kiner atiar, “Arai ijaas kanukan, arai kiirasi eporotoka, koyaut akwes nuka ituŋa odwe luka ekapolonikus, kopotu neaiai Yesereel moi tinenikwana.” Kejaas odwe luka ekabaka, kes ituŋa akaisakanykaarei, kikapolok luka ere, luasaete kes."
2Kings10:7 Kosodi kanen kedol ebalua neeiaas, koyaata odwe luka ekabaka, koarata kes, ituŋa akaisakanykaarei, kibwaikis akwesikec obukito, kijukasi kes neejai ŋesi Yesereel."
2Kings10:8 Kobu ekiyakia, kolimok ŋes ebe, “Ayaun akwes nuka odwe luka ekabaka.” Kotema atiar, “Kotuk atukon aarei neelomarere korute aitodol moi.”"
2Kings10:9 Kosodi kanen tupuruc, koloma, kobwo, kotema ituŋa kere atiar, “Iraas yesi luidolito: koany, abu keneru asurokin ekapolonika, ka aiar da: konye iŋai aar lu kere?"
2Kings10:10 Kojenut do ebe mam edoi kwap adio kakiro nuka EJAKAIT nuenerit EJAKAIT nuka ekek loka Akab: naarai eswama EJAKAIT ŋin naenerit kama ka Eliya ekelaanakinanike,’"
2Kings10:11 Kwaŋin kodany Yeku luedeunos kere lukokek loka Akab koYesereel, ka iketuŋa kere lukapolok, ka ipaperoke luminan, ka isasedotinike, aitodol namam inyeinia ŋes idio yenapaikin."
2Kings10:12 Konyou kolot, kobu Samarla, Kosodi ejai orot togo loka ikecokok luka aiŋer ajul."
2Kings10:13 Kiriamakinos Yeku kiinacan luka Akasia ekabaka loka Yuda, kotema atiar, “Lukanai bo yesi?” Kobonokis ŋes ebe, “Kirai isio iinacan luka Akasia: kilosi ayogan idwe luka ekabaka ka idwe luka akabaka.”"
2Kings10:14 Kotema atiar, “Kikamutu eiarete.” Kikamutu kes eiarete, koarakinai aipany naka etogo loka aiŋer ajul, kes ituŋa akaisaoŋon ka luarei; mam abu kideun ediopet kakesi."
2Kings10:15 Kenyou ŋesi kanen, kiriamunos ka Yekonadab okoku loka Rekab ebunit airiamun kaŋes; kiyoga Yeku ŋes, kotema atiar, “Ejokuna ekonitau, kwape eiaar etauka kotaukon?” Koboŋok Yesonadab ebe, “Ejok.” Kotema atiar, “Arai kwaŋin, ae akonikan.” Koinak akekan; kitodoka ŋes agali mama ejai."
2Kings10:16 Kotema atiar, “Kauparos, koany ekakokote kanuka EJAKAIT.” Kisiboik agalike."
2Kings10:17 Kedolo ŋesi Samaria, kodany kere luedeuna luka Akab koSamatia, aitodol neamudiaria, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, nakelimokinit Eliya,"
2Kings10:18 Kotukonok Yeku ituŋa kere, kotema kes atiar, “Abu Akab kijaanak Baal edit; konye Yeku iiaanakini do ŋes noi."
2Kings10:19 Aso do konyarautu inabin kere luka Baal neaiai, ikamaakake kere, ka isasedotinike; sirikemamuun ediopet da: naarai ejai ainakin Baal asubanit naepol noi; ŋin yenemamuuni, mam eiari.” Konye kiswamai Yeku nun amodunia, tetere emudiari ikamaak Baal."
2Kings10:20 Kotema Yeku atiar, “Kitalautu atukonokin nakalaunan mama ejai Baal.’ Koramai otuŋa kere."
2Kings10:21 Kiyakia Yeku anatar Isirael kere: kikokounos ikamaak. Baal kere, mam abu kopaik ediotuŋanan lomam ebunit. Kopotu togo loka Baal; kilelebun etogo loka Baal pas."
2Kings10:22 Kotema ŋesi ŋol loapolokinit agola naenapere atiar, “Koyau inapen luka luemaete Baal kere.” Kitolomik kes inapen."
2Kings10:23 Kolot Yeku, ka Yekonadab okoku loka Rekab, togo loka Baal; kotema ŋesi ikamaak Baal atiar, “Komoutu, koanyut ebe emamei kane ediopet ka lukejaanakinak luka EJAKAIT, dimarai ikamaak Baal bon.”"
2Kings10:24 Kolomasi toma ainakin asuban ka ainaklneta nuicweio. Kibwaikinit Yeku ituŋa akaisakanykauni kina, kotema atiar, “Toma otuŋa luayauni eoŋ akaninikus arai keku ediopet, aijarake etaci aiiar naka ŋol.”"
2Kings10:25 Kosodi kanen, kedau ainakin ainakinet naicweio, kotema Yeku ikedarak ka ikapolok atiar, “Kolomasi, koara kes; sirikeku ediopet da.” Kodanyata kes kakwanis naka ekileŋ; kocakasi ikedarak ka ikapolok kes kina, koloto ore loka etogo loka Baal."
2Kings10:26 Kitolomut ipirin luajaas togo loka Baal, kicweata."
2Kings10:27 Kobilibilata epir loka Baal, kobilibilata etogo loka Baal, kitaraut aipany kiton lolo."
2Kings10:28 Kwaŋin komudia Yeku Baal koIsirael.
2Kings10:29 Konye mam Yeku abu konyou karonisio nuka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat nuetidiakaria Isirael, kes itak luka esabu luajaas Bet-el, ka Dan."
2Kings10:30 Kotema EJAKAIT Yeku atiar, “Naarai iswama ejok itodolit nuejok kakonyeneka, iswamak etogo loka Akab kwape ajaatar nukotauka kere, iboikinos do odwekon luka atur nakiwononet oicoloŋ loka Isirael.”"
2Kings10:31 Konye mam Yeku abu kopodokin alosenen okisila luka EJAKAIT Edeke laka Isirael keketau kere: mam abu konyou karonisio nuka Yeroboam nuetidiakaria Isirael.
2Kings10:32 Kapaarasia kanun kogeu EJAKAIT ainono Isirael: kodany Kasael kes koikoruno kere luka Isirael;
2Kings10:33 Anyoun koYorodan ari nakokide, akwap kere naka Gilead, Igadin, ka Ireubenin ka Imanasen, anyoun koAroer, loidunyas kajesa naka Arunon, ŋes Gilead ka Basan."
2Kings10:34 Aswamisio ace nuka Yeku, ka nuabu kiswama kere, ka agogoŋuke kere, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael?"
2Kings10:35 Kojotoor Yeku kalukapapaake: aponi kidaikinai Samaria. Kirum Yekoakas okokuke aiboisike.
2Kings10:36 Apak naabu Yeku kirumak Isirael koSamaria keraas ikar akaisaarei ka lukanykauni.
2Kings11:1 Keanyu Atalia toto naka Akasia ebe atwana okokuke, konyou komudia aur kere naka ekabaka,"
2Kings11:2 Konye Yekoseba, akoku naka ekabaka Yoram, kinacike ka Akasia, koyana Yoas okoku loka Akasia, kokokwa ŋes kodwe luka ekabaka luaario, ŋes ka akasaanike, kibwaik kes agola naenadio ikitadan; kimunonikis ŋes Atalia tetere mam eario."
2Kings11:3 Kojai kaŋes ibwaitai kotogo loka EJAKAIT ikar ikanykape; kirum Atalia akwap,"
2Kings11:4 Kokaru lokikanyetekaarei kijuka Yekoiada koomo ikapolok luka akwatat, luka Ikarin ka luka ikedarak, koyau kes mama ejai togo loka EJAKAIT: kitutuk kakes, kisiyapo kes kotogo loka EJAKAIT, kitodik kes okoku loka ekabaka."
2Kings11:5 Kicorak kes ebe, “Na ŋes akirot naiswamaete: atutubetekus nakiwuniet luelomunete kanakasabato eraunos luericete aidar etogo loka ekabaka;"
2Kings11:6 Atutubet nakiwuniet ejaunos okek Sur; ka atutubet nakiwuniet ejaunos okek kau ka ikedarak: kwaŋin ŋes iriciata aidar etogo, iraunos luitikokinete;"
2Kings11:7 Atukonokus nuarei, luelomarete kanakasabato, ericete aidar etogo loka EJAKAIT airimor ekabaka,"
2Kings11:8 Ilukunete ekabaka, kitiŋite ŋolituŋanan luiiisike kakanike; nin da yenelomari okokoron, koarai; kojaenanas kekabaka naelomununia, naelomanaria da.”"
2Kings11:9 Kiswamata ikapolok luka akwat kwape ajaatar kere nuecorakini Yekoiada esasedoti: koyana nolitunanan iketuŋa, ŋul luelomunete kanakasabato, ka luelomarete da kanakasabato, kopotu mama ejai Yekoiada esasedoti."
2Kings11:10 Kijaik esasedoti ikapolok luka akwat akwaras ka ibukui lukeraas sek luka ekabaka Daudi, luajaas togo loka EJAKAIT."
2Kings11:11 Kobwaata ikedarak, kitiŋite ŋolituŋanan lujiisike kakanike, ameun kowai lokoteten loka etogo kiton owai lokokediany loka etogo, eiduny ketem ka etogo, elukunito ekabaka."
2Kings11:12 Kosodi ŋesi aitolomun okoku loka ekabaka, kidokok aboko akouke, koinak aitejenunet; kitaraut ŋes ekabaka, kinyonyoikinai akinyet; kibapakis akanin kotemasi atiar, “Kidari Edeke ekabaka.”"
2Kings11:13 Kepupu Atalia ecelet laka ikedarak ka loka ituŋa, kobu mama ejaas ituŋa togo loka EJAKAIT:"
2Kings11:14 Kosesen, ido koany, ebwoi ekabaka neejai epir, kwape ejaar epone, ka ikapolok ka arupepen kidunyas kekabaka; kibwonasi ituŋa kere luka akwap, kokuta arupepen. Kosodi Atalia aicil ikenapen, kiworo ebe, “Ebotet, ebotet lokibilakinito.”"
2Kings11:15 Kosodi Yekoiada esasedoti aicorakin ikapolok luka akwat luapolokinito aiore, kotema kes atiar, “Kitolomasi ya kidin okokoron; ŋol da loetupari ŋes koarata kekilen”: naarai abala esasedoti ebe, “Kinyek aarakinio togo loka EJAKAIT,”"
2Kings11:16 Kocilakis ŋes erot; kolot orot neelomanariata ibalasin togo loka ekabaka: koarakinai ŋes nina,"
2Kings11:17 Kitutuk Yekoiada mama ejai EJAKAIT ka ekabaka ka Ituŋa, koraut ituŋa luka EJAKAIT; kidiŋ kekabaka ka ituŋa da."
2Kings11:18 Koloto ituŋa kere luka akwap togo loka Baal, kotiyatiyata; kobilibilata cut iketemwan ka akeputosia, koarakinai Matan esasedoti loka Baal kinaren kitemwan. Kodakak esasedoti ikapolokitok luka etogo loka EJAKAIT."
2Kings11:19 Koyaŋa ikapolok luka akwat, ka Ikarin, ka ikedarak, ka ituŋa kere luka akwap; kitolomut ekabaka kotogo loka EJAKAIT, kopotu korot lokorute loka ikedarak mama ejai etogo loka ekabaka, Kiboikin ŋesi oicoloŋ loka ikabakan."
2Kings11:20 Kibwonasi innja kere luka akwap, kinapakin ere: koarakinai Atalia kekilen neejai etogo loka ekabaka."
2Kings11:21 Korai Yekoas loka ikar ikanykaarei egeuni airum.
2Kings12:1 Kokaru lokikanyetekaarei loka Yeku kogeu Yekoas airum; kirumak ikar akaisaoŋon ko Yerusalem: ekiror loka totoke Sibia naka Beer-seba,"
2Kings12:2 Kiswama Yekoas nuejokuka kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT apaarasiake kere nuetuutooria Yekoiada esasedoti ŋes.
2Kings12:3 Konye mam aponi kolemarai aiboisio nuiceleleete: koroko ituŋa einanakinete asuban ka aisupuruun lueuru maa kaiboisio nuiceleleete.
2Kings12:4 Kotema Yekoas isasedotin atiar, “Apesan kere nuka iboro lukalaunak nueyaunio togo loka EJAKAIT, apesan nuetwasamaenenete kapakio kanun, apesan nuka iruna kwape itiriania etiai loka ŋinitunanan, ka apesan nuekot etau loka ituŋanan ayaun togo loka EJAKAIT,"
2Kings12:5 Kijaununut isasedotin, ninitunanan kiiauni yeneieni ŋesi: kipueiata acilan nuka etogo, needumunere acilat kere.”"
2Kings12:6 Konye kokaru loka akaisaarei ka luuni loka ekabaka Yekoas korina isasedotin ipuca acilan nuka etogo.
2Kings12:7 Kosodi ekabaka Yekoas anyaraun Yekoiada esasedoti, ka isasedotin ice, kotema kes atiar, “Inyo bo mam ipucanariata acilan nuka etogo? Aso do mam bobo ijaununete apesan kama kaluiienete, konye koinakis nun nuitukokinito kanuka acilan nuka etogo.”"
2Kings12:8 Kocamut isasedotin ebe mam bobo iiaunete apesan kotuna, karaida aipucanar acilan nuka etogo,"
2Kings12:9 Konye koyoŋa Yekoiada esasedoti asaduku, koped apedot toma arapetait, kibwaik eiduny ketem, kosiep lokoteten ilomari togo loka EJAKAIT: kosodete isasedotin luedarenenete ekek kibwaanakis apesan kere nuayaununio togo loka EJAKAIT."
2Kings12:10 Kosodete keanyut ebe ejaas apesan nuipu toma asaduku, kopotu ekewadikan loka ekabaka ka esasedoti lopeti, koenata kimarata da apesan nuadumuna kotogo loka EJAKAIT."
2Kings12:11 Kijaikis apesan nuetemio akanin nuka nul kalueswamaete aswam, luapolokinito etogo loka EJAKAIT: koropiata ikekeok ka ikadukok lueswamaete aswam naka etogo loka EJAKAIT;"
2Kings12:12 Ka lukadukok kamor, ka lukekeok amor, agwelia da akito ka amor nuikee aipueanaria acilan nuka etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka nuepudasi kere aiteteunia etogo."
2Kings12:13 Konye mam aponi kiswamakinere etogo loka EJAKAIT akolin nuka epuesa, ka aitudeŋeta, ka atanya, ka arupepen, iboro kere luka esabu, arai iboro kere luka epuesa, kapesan nuetolomunio togo loka EJAKAIT."
2Kings12:14 Naarai aponi koinakinai nun lueswamaete aswam, lueteteunete etogo loka EJAKAIT."
2Kings12:15 Bobo da mam apotu kimarata etiai mama ejaas ituŋa luainakinio apesan akoranakin ikeswamak: naarai keraas lumunon.
2Kings12:16 Mam aponi koyaunai apesan nuka ainakineta nuka aidiak, ka apesan nuka ainakineta nuka aronis togo loka EJAKAIT: keraas nun nuka isasedotin,"
2Kings12:17 Kosodi Kasael ekabaka loka Suria alosit, kitiji Gat, kirum; kireo Kasael akekonye alosit Yerusalem."
2Kings12:18 Kosodi Yekoas ekabaka loka Yuda kolem iboro kere luetalaunitai luapotu Yekosapat, ka Yekoram, ka Akasia, lukapapaake, ikabakan luka Yuda kotiakunito, ka iboroke luetalaunitai, ka esabu kere loadumuna koboro luka akais nuipu luka etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka luka etogo loka ekabaka, kijukak Kasael ekabaka loka Suria: konyou do ko Yerusalem."
2Kings12:19 Aswamisio ace nuka Yoas, ka nuabu kiswama kere, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Yuda?"
2Kings12:20 Konyout ike’: jaanakinakake, kinerut, koarakis Yoas togo loka Milo, orot loebei Sila."
2Kings12:21 Naarai kibunata ŋes Yosakar okoku loka Simeat, ka Yekosabad okoku loka Somer, ikekejaanakinak, kotwana; aponi kidaikinai kalukapapaake ore loka Daudi: kirum Amasia okokuke aiboisike."
2Kings13:1 Kokaru loka akaisaarei ka luuni loka Yoas okoku loka Akasia, ekabaka loka Yuda, kogeu Yekoakas okoku loka Yeku airum Isirael koSamaria, kirumak ikar itomon ka lukanykaarei."
2Kings13:2 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kotupa aronisio nuka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat, nuetidiakaria Isirael; mam abu konyou kanun."
2Kings13:3 Kinep anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin Isirael, kijaik kes akan naka Kasael ekabaka loka Suria, ka akan da naka Ben-kadad okoku loka Kasael apaarasia kere,"
2Kings13:4 Kinaina Yekoakas EJAKAIT, kopupok EJAKAIT ŋes; naarai abu koany aroikinio naka Isirael, kwape aroikinitor ekabaka loka Suria."
2Kings13:5 (Koinak EJAKAIT Isirael eketajaran, konyout kakanin nuka Isurian: kiboikinos idwe luka Isirael oreriakee, kwape lem sek."
2Kings13:6 Konye mam apotu konyoutu karonisio nuka etogo loka Yeroboam, nuetidiakaria Isirael, konye kolosenenete kanun: kosalakis Asera da ko Samaria.)"
2Kings13:7 Naarai mam abu kideik Yekoakas ituŋa dimarai ikebwanenok akaisakany, ka agalin atomon, ka luelosete kakeie ilukumin itomon; naarai abu ekabaka loka Suria komudia kes, kitarau kes apua naipudao."
2Kings13:8 Aswamisio ace nuka Yekoakas, ka nuabu kiswama kere, ka akegogoŋ, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael?"
2Kings13:9 Kojotoor Yekoakas kalukapapaake; kidaikinai Samaria: kirum Yoas okokuke aiboisike.
2Kings13:10 Kokaru loka akaisauni ka lukanykaarei loka Yoas ekabaka loka Yuda, kogeu Yekoas okoku loka Yekoakas airum Isirael koSamaria, kirumak ikar itomon kalukanykape."
2Kings13:11 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT; mam abu konyou karonisio kere nuka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat, nuetidiakaria Isirael: konye kolosenenei kanun,"
2Kings13:12 Aswamisio ace nuka Yoas, ka nuabu kiswama kere, ka akegogoŋ naetijio Amasia ekabaka loka Yuda, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael?"
2Kings13:13 Kojotoor Yoas kalukapapaake; kiboikin Yeroboam oicoloŋoke: aponi kidaikinai Yoas Samaria nepepe kikabakan luka Isirael.
2Kings13:14 Kodekakin Elisa adek nakatwanare: kobu Yoas ekabaka loka Isirael neejai, komonyak ŋes, kotema atiar, “Ipapa, ipapa, agalin nuka Isirael ka ikebwanenokoke!”"
2Kings13:15 Kotema Elisa ŋes atiar, “Kolem akabwa ka imalia.” Kosodi kolem akabwa ka imalia."
2Kings13:16 Kotema ŋesi ekabaka loka Isirael atiar, “Kibwaik akan akabwa”: kibwaik akanike. Kidokok Elisa akaninike akanin nuka ekabaka."
2Kings13:17 Kotema atiar, “Koŋaa adirisa nakokide”: konaa, Kosodi Elisa atemar ŋes atiar, “Koguma”: kosodi ŋesi agumar. Kotema atiar, “Emalloka EJAKAIT loka aipikor, ŋes emalloka aipikor Suria: naarai idanyi ijo Isurian koApek, aitodol neimudiaria kes.”"
2Kings13:18 Kotema atiar, “Kolem imalia”: kolem kes. Kotema ŋesi ekabaka loka Isirael atiar, “Kinom akwap”: kosodi kinom irwan auni, kinyek."
2Kings13:19 Konyunyurik etuŋanan loka Edeke ŋes, kotema atiar, “Tikinom irwan akany arai irwan akanykape; asa tikidany Suria aitodol neimudiaria ŋes: asa do kwana jo idanyi Suria irwan auni bon.”"
2Kings13:20 Kotwana Elisa, kidaai. Asuronokinete irioneta luka Moab akwap ageunet naka ekaru."
2Kings13:21 Kosodi kanen, idaio etuŋanan, koany, kiteluosi erioŋet; kocakakis etuŋanan ates naka Elisa: napetirori etuŋanan akoio nuka Elisa, kikwaru, kobwo."
2Kings13:22 Koroik Kasael ekabaka loka Suria Isirael apaarasia kere nuka Yekoakas.
2Kings13:23 Konye kosianiar EJAKAIT mama ejaas kesi, kitim kes, kopodo kes, kanuka aitutuketeke naetutukit kaAburaam, ka Isaak ka Yakob, mam akoto amudiar kes, komam ber akoto aireŋear kes kakonyeneke."
2Kings13:24 Kotwana Kasael ekabaka loka Suria; kirum Ben-kadad okokuke aiboisike.
2Kings13:25 Kolem oobo Yekoas okoku loka Yekoakas kakan naka Ben-kadad okoku loka Kasael ireria luayanaarit kakan naka Yekoakas papake ejio, Kodany Yoas ŋes irwan auni, kinyaku ireria luka Isirael."
2Kings14:1 Kokaru lokiareit loka Yoas okoku loka Yoakas ekabaka loka Isirael kogeu Amasia okoku loka Yoas ekabaka loka Yuda airum.
2Kings14:2 Kerai loka ikar akaisaarei ka lukany egeuni airum; kirumak ikar akaisaarei ka lukanykaonon koYerusalem: ekiror loka totoke kerai Yekoadin naka Yerusalem.
2Kings14:3 Kiswama nuejok kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, konye mam abu koriakas kaDaudi papaake: eswamaenenei kwape ajaatar nueswamai papake Yoas."
2Kings14:4 Konye mam aponi kolemarai aiboisio nuiceleleete: korina ituŋa einanakinete asuban, ka aisupuruun lueuru maa kaiboisio nuiceleleete."
2Kings14:5 Kosodi kanen, napiticasio ajakanut kakanike, abu koar ikejaanakinakake luaarete ekabaka papake:"
2Kings14:6 Konye mam abu koar idwe luka ikaarak: kwape ajaatar nun nuewadikatai oitabo loka ikisila luka Musa, kwape ecorakinitor EJAKAIT ebe, “Mam lukapapa eario kanuka idwe, karaida idwe mam eario kanuka lukapapakec; konye etwani ninitunanan kanuka aronisike.”"
2Kings14:7 Koarak luka Edom ilukumin itomon Aditot naka Abalaŋ, kirum Sela eiiosi, komaik ekiror Yokuteel, kiton lolo."
2Kings14:8 Kosodi Amasia aiiukar ikiyakia mama ejai Yekoas, okoku loka Yekoakas okoku loka Yeku, ekabaka loka Isirael, kobala ebe, “Bia kaanyunos kakonye.”"
2Kings14:9 Kijuka Yekoas ekabaka loka Isirael mama ejai Amasia ekabaka loka Yuda kobala ebe, “Abu ekenep loajai Lebanon kijukak eres loajai Lebanon ebe, ‘Kokorak akokukon okokuka komany’: kitoro etiaŋ loka ais loajai Lebanon, kicakaeak ekenep."
2Kings14:10 Abeit idany Edom, iturokina etaukon: kibwonak ŋun, kopaik ore: naarai kanukinyo ilomaria akiro numere nukon ka atwaniar, kibirori ijo ka Yuda da kajo?”"
2Kings14:11 Konye koner Amasia akiirar. Kolot do Yekoas ekabaka loka Isirael: koanyunos kakonye, ŋesi ka Amasia ekabaka loka Yuda koBet-semet, loarai loka Yuda."
2Kings14:12 Kireneai Yuda kakonyen nuka Isirael, koker ninitunanan owemake."
2Kings14:13 Kikam Yekoas ekabaka loka Isirael Amasia ekabaka loka Yuda, okoku loka Yekoas, okoku loka Akasia, koBet-semet, kobu Yerusalem, kotiyatiya arwatat naka Yerusalem anyoun korute loka Epuraim kiton orute loka agor, ikubitin akwat aoŋon."
2Kings14:14 Konata esabu ka epuesa kere, ka iboro kere luadumunio kotogo loka EJAKAIT, koboro luka akais nuipu lukotogo loka ekabaka, ka lukititina da, kobono Samaria."
2Kings14:15 Aswamisio ace nuka Yekoas nuabu kiswama, ka akegogoŋ, kwape aiior ka Amasia ekabaka loka Yuda, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael?"
2Kings14:16 Koiotoor Yekoas kalukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai Samaria nepepe kikabakan luka Isirael; kirum Yeroboam okokuke aiboisike."
2Kings14:17 Kobut Amasia okoku loka Yoas ekabaka loka Yuda ikar itomon ka lukany kedau Yekoas okoku loka Yekoakas ekabaka leka Isirael atwanare,"
2Kings14:18 Aswamisio ace nuka Amasia mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nukaikabakan luka Yuda?
2Kings14:19 Kinerut asurokin ŋes koYerusalem; koker Lakis; konye kiiukasi atupakin ŋes Lakis, koarakinai nina,"
2Kings14:20 Koyaunai ŋes kobalasin: aponi kidaikinai Yerusalem kalukapapaake ore loka Daudi.
2Kings14:21 Koyaata ituŋa kere luka Yuda Asaria, lokerai loka ikar itomon ka lukanykape, kitaraut ŋes ekabaka aibois naka papake Amasia."
2Kings14:22 Koduk ŋesi Elat, kinyakak Yuda, kedau ekabaka aiotoor kalukapapaake."
2Kings14:23 Kokaru lokitomonet kakany loka Amasia okoku loka Yoas ekabaka loka Yuda, kogeu Yeroboam okoku loka Yoas ekabaka loka Isirael airum koSamaria, kirumak ikar akaisaoŋon ka lodiopet."
2Kings14:24 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: mam abu konyou karonisio kere nuka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat, nuetidiakaria Isirael."
2Kings14:25 Abu kinyaka eikor loka Isirael ageun kaneelomarere Kamat kiton aŋolol naka Araba, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, naener kama ka ekejaanakinanike Yona okoku loka Amitai, enabi, loarai loka Gat-keper."
2Kings14:26 Naarai koany EJAKAIT aiticanio naka Isirael, erono noi: naarai amamei yeneenitai karaida yenimam eenirai, karaida ekenarakinan neejai Isirael."
2Kings14:27 Mam enerit EJAKAIT ebe emwatari ŋesi ekiror loka Isirael kokwap kakui: konye kitaiar kes kakan naka Yeroboam okoku loka Yoas.’
2Kings14:28 Aswamisio ace nuka Yeroboam, ka nuabu kiswama kere, ka akegogoŋ, kwape aiior, kwape enyakunia Isirael Damasiko ka Kamat, lukeraas luka Yuda, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael?"
2Kings14:29 Koiotoor Yeroboam kalukapapaake, kes ikabakan luka Isirael; kirum Sekaria okokuke aiboisike."
2Kings15:1 Kokar loka akaisaarei ka lukanykaarei loka Yeroboam ekabaka, loka Isirael, kogeu Asaria okoku loka Amasla ekabaka loka Yuda airum,"
2Kings15:2 Kerai loka ikar itomon ka lukanykape egeuni alrum; kirumak ikar akaisakany ka luarei koYerusalem, ekiror loka totoke kerai Yekolia naka Yerusalem."
2Kings15:3 Kiswama nuejok kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape ajaatar kere nueswamai papake Amasia."
2Kings15:4 Konye mam aponi kolemarai aiboisio nuiceleleete: korina itutja einanakinete asuban, ka aisupuruun lueuru maa kaiboisio nuiceleleete."
2Kings15:5 Kitedek EJAKAIT ekabaka, koraun lokatapon aitodol apaaran naatwania, kiboie kotogo loetiakuna, Kopolokinit Yotam okoku loka ekabaka ekal, aitub kotuna luka akwap."
2Kings15:6 Aswamisio ace nuka Asaria, ka nuabu kiswama kere, mam kereka iwadikatai oltabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Yuda?"
2Kings15:7 Koiotoor Asaria kalukapapaake; aponi kidaikinai kalukapapaake ore loka Daudi: kirum Yotam okokuke aiboisike.
2Kings15:8 Kokaru loka akaisauni ka Iukanykauni loka Asaria ekabaka loka Yuda kirumak Sekaria okoku loka Yeroboam Isirael koSamaria ilapio ikanykape.
2Kings15:9 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape eswamaata lukapapaake; mam abu konyou karonisio nuka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat, nuetidiakaria Isirael,"
2Kings15:10 Kinerut Salum okoku loka Yabes asurokin ŋes, kicumak akonyen nuka ituŋa, koar; kirum alboisike."
2Kings15:11 Aswamisio ace nuka Sekaria, koany, iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael."
2Kings15:12 Ŋin ŋes akirot naka EJAKAIT naalimokini Yeku ebe, “Iboikinos odwekon luka aturi nakiwononet oicoloŋ loka Isirael.” Ido kitodolikinoi kwaŋin."
2Kings15:13 Kogeu Salum okoku loka Yabes airum kokaru loka akaisauni ka lukanykaonon loka Usia ekabaka loka Yuda; kirumak apak naka elap ediopet koSamaria.
2Kings15:14 Konyou Menakem okoku loka Gadi koTirusa, kobu Samaria, kicumak Salum okoku loka Yabes koSamaria, koar ŋes, kirum aiboisike."
2Kings15:15 Aswamisio ace nuka Salum, ka ainerunike naabu kiner, koany, iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael."
2Kings15:16 Kosodi Menakem aidany Tirusa, ka luajaas toma kere, ka iikorunoke, anyoun koTirusa: naarai mam apotu konaikis ŋes, kanuka ŋun ŋes adanyia kes; konercreana aŋor kere nukotoma nuapotiete."
2Kings15:17 Kokaru loka akaisauni ka lukanykaonon loka Asaria ekabaka loka Yuda kogeu Menakem okoku loka Gadi airum Isirael, kirumak ikar itomon koSamaria."
2Kings15:18 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT; mam abu konyou karonisio nuka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat nuetidiakaria Isirael apaarasiake kere,"
2Kings15:19 Kobu Pul ekabaka loka Asuria asurokin akwap; koinaki Menakem Pul atalata alukumit nuka epuesa, koiai akekan kaŋes altogogonio ajakanut akanike."
2Kings15:20 Kitelem Menakem apesan kolsirael, kotuŋa kere lukagogon lukabarak, kitelem ŋolituŋanan isekelin akaisakany luka epuesa, ainakin ekabaka loka Asuria, Kobono ekabaka loka Asurla, mam abu kopaik akwap nin."
2Kings15:21 Aswamisio ace nuka Menakem, ka nuabu kiswama kere, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael?"
2Kings15:22 Koiotoor Menakem kalukapapaake; kirum Pekakia Ŋkokuke aiboisike.
2Kings15:23 Kokaru loka akaisakany loka Asaria ekabaka loka Yuda kogeu Pekakia airum Isirael koSamaria, kirumak ikar iarei."
2Kings15:24 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: mam abu konyou karonisio nuka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat, nuetidiakaria Isirael."
2Kings15:25 Kineru Peka, okoku loka Remalia, ekapolonike asurokin ŋes, kicumak Samaria, arwatat naegogon naka etogo loka ekabaka, nepepe ka Arugob ka Arie; ido keiaas ituŋa akaisakany luka Igileadin kaŋes: koar ŋes, kirum aiboisike."
2Kings15:26 Aswamisio ace nuka Pekakia, ka nuabu kiswama kere, koany, iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael."
2Kings15:27 Kokaru loka akaisakany ka luarei loka Asaria ekabaka loka Yuda kogeu Peka okoku loka Remalia airum Isirael koSamaria, kirumak ikar akaisaarei."
2Kings15:28 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: mam abu konyou karonisio nuka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat, nuetidiakaria Isirael,"
2Kings15:29 Kapaarasia nuka Peka ekabaka loka Isirael kobu Tigilat-pileser ekabaka loka Asuria, kirum Iyon, ka Abel-bet-maaka, ka Yanoa, ka Kedes, ka Kasor, ka Gilead, ka Galilaya, akwap kere naka Naputali; kiioreo kes Asuria."
2Kings15:30 Kineru Kosea okoku loka Ela asurokin Peka okoku loka Remalia, kicum ŋes, koar, kirum aiboisike, kokaru loka akaisaarei loka Yotam okoku loka Usia."
2Kings15:31 Aswamisio ace nuka Peka, ka nuabu kiswama kere, koany iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Isirael."
2Kings15:32 Kokaru lokiareit loka Peka okoku loka Remalia ekabaka loka Isirael kogeu Yotam okoku loka Usia ekabaka loka Yuda airum.
2Kings15:33 Kerai loka ikar akaisaarei ka lukany egeuni airum; kirumak ikar itomon ka lukanykape koYerusalem: ekiror loka totoke kerai Yerusa akoku naka Sadok.
2Kings15:34 Kiswama nuejok kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: kiswama kwape ajaatar kere nueswamai papake Usia.
2Kings15:35 Konye mam aponi kolemarai aiboisio nuiceleleete: korina iruna einanakinete asuban, ka aisupuruun lueuru maa kaiboisio nuiceleleete. Koduk ŋesi erute loikumemei, loka etogo loka EJAKAIT."
2Kings15:36 Aswamisio ace nuka Yotam, ka nuabu kiswama kere, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Yuda?"
2Kings15:37 Kapaarasia kanun kogeu EJAKAIT aiiukun Resin ekabaka loka Suria ka Peka okoku loka Remalia asurokin Yuda.
2Kings15:38 Koiotoor Yotam kalukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai kalukapapaake ore loka papaake Daudi: kirum Akas okokuke aiboisike."
2Kings16:1 Kokaru lokitomonet kakanykaarei loka Peka okoku loka Remalia kogeu Akas okoku loka Yotam ekabaka loka Yuda airum.
2Kings16:2 Kerai Akas loka ikar akaisaarei egeuni airum; kirumak ikar itomon ka lukanykape koYerusalem: mam abu kiswama nuejokuka kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekedeke, kwape papaake Daudi."
2Kings16:3 Konye kolosenenei orot loka ikabakan luka Isirael, eebo, kitotor okokuke akim, kwape ajaatar italesia luka ikapirin, luabu EJAKAIT kirene kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael."
2Kings16:4 Koinanak asuban kisupuruununei lueuru maa kaiboisio nuiceleleete, koukon, ido kokwap ka ŋolikitoi loepesit."
2Kings16:5 Kosodete Resin ekabaka loka Suria ka Peka okoku loka Remalia ekabaka loka Isirael kopotu Yerusalem aitiji: kirigaut Akas, konye mam apotu kopedosi aipikor ŋes."
2Kings16:6 Kapaarasia kanun ŋes enyakunia Resin ekabaka loka Suria Elat oSuria, kirenea Iyudayan anyoun koElat: kopotu Isurian Elat, kiboikinos nen, kiton lolo."
2Kings16:7 Kijuka Akas ikiyakia mama ejai Tigilatpileser ekabaka loka Asuria ebe, “Arai eoŋ ekonikeiaanakinan, ka okokukon: kobia kitajarai kakan naka ekabaka loka Suria, kakan da naka eka baka loka Isirael, lukanyoikis eoŋ.”"
2Kings16:8 Kolem Akas epuesa ka esabu loadumuna togo loka EJAKAIT, ka lukoboro luka akais nuipu lukotogo loka ekabaka, kiiukak ekabaka loka Asuria araun ainakinet."
2Kings16:9 Kiira eka baka loka Asuria ŋes: kolot ekabaka loka Asuria asurokin Damasiko, kirum, kiioreo ituŋake koyana Kir, koar Resin."
2Kings16:10 Kolot ekabaka Akas Damasiko airiamun ka Tigilat-pileser ekabaka loka Asuria, koany etem loajai Damasiko: kijukak ekabaka Akas Uriya esasedoti esube loka etem, ka aputoke, kwape ajaar eiswamaeke kere."
2Kings16:11 Koduk Uriya esasedoti etem: kwape ajaatar kere nuabu ekabaka Akas kijukak koDamasiko, kwaŋin kosub Uriya esasedoti tetere edumuni ekabaka Akas ŋes ebuni koDamasiko,"
2Kings16:12 Kebu ekabaka koDamasiko, koany ekabaka etem: kikunyak ekabaka otem, koinak asuban kanen."
2Kings16:13 Kiewe ainakineteke naicweio, ka ainakineteke naka akiria, kobuk ainakineteke namatat, kobwatanak aokot nuka ainakinetake nuka ainapakin, kotem."
2Kings16:14 Koyau etem loka aisinit loajai kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT alemun koinaren ketogo, kidin kotemuke ka etogo loka EJAKAIT, kibwaik ari naka agolitomei naka etemuke."
2Kings16:15 Abu ekabaka Akas kicorak Uriya esasedoti ebe, “Kieweenenei kotem loepol ainakinet naicweio naka tupuruc ka ainakinet naka akiria naka eboŋ, ka ainakinet naicweio naka eka baka, ka ainakineteke naka akiria, nepepe kainakinet naicweio naka ituŋa kere luka akwap, ka ainakinetekee naka akiria, ka ainakinetakee numatan; kobwatanakini ŋes aokot kere nuka ainakinet naicweio, ka aokot kere nuka asuban: konye eraun etem loka aisinit lokinitununetekaŋ.”"
2Kings16:16 Kiswama kwaŋin Uriya esasedoti kwape ajaatar kere nuecorakinit ekabaka Akas.
2Kings16:17 Kotub ekabaka Akas abaoi nuka aeegeria, kolema akalaya kamakee; kolema aŋolol komonin luka aisinit luajaas kwapuke, kibwaik amor nuepetet."
2Kings16:18 Erot loarapakinitai loka asabato loadukitoi toma togo, ka erute loka ekabaka lokokina, kibelokinoi kiton togo loka EJAKAIT, kanuka ekabaka loka Asuria."
2Kings16:19 Aswamisio ace nuka Akas nuabu kiswama, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Yuda?"
2Kings16:20 Koiotoor Akas kalukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai kalukapapaake ore loka Daudi: kirum Kesekia okokuke aiboisike."
2Kings17:1 Kokaru lokitomonet kaarei loka Akas ekabaka loka Yuda kogeu Kosea okoku loka Ela airum Isirael koSamaria, kirumak ikar ikanykaoŋon."
2Kings17:2 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, konye mere kwape ikabakan luka Isirael luageikinete ŋes."
2Kings17:3 Kobu Salumaneser ekabaka loka Asuria asurokin ŋes; koraun Kosea ekei aanakinanike, koinununei ainakineta,"
2Kings17:4 Kodum ekabaka loka Asuria ebotet kaneejai Kosea; naarai abu kijuka ikiyakia mama ejai So ekabaka loko Misiri, mam abu koinak ekabaka loka Asuria ainakinet, kwape eswamaa nolikaru: kanuka ŋun kogolok ekabaka loka Asuria ŋes, koen kaidaris."
2Kings17:5 Kosodi ekabaka loka Asuria kobu konata akwap kere, kolot Samaria, kirigau ŋes ikar iuni."
2Kings17:6 Kokaru lokikanyetekaonon loka Kosea, kirum ekabaka loka Asuria Samaria, kiioreo Isirael ayaŋaar Asuria, kibwaik kes Kala, ka Kabor, kariri kecor loka Gosan, koreria luka Imedin,"
2Kings17:7 Kojai kwaŋin, naarai apotu idwe luka Isirael kodiakasi kama ejai EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, loetolomuni kes koMisiri anyoun kakan naka Parao ekabaka loko Misiri, koyonito idekesio ice."
2Kings17:8 Kolosenenete kokisila luka atekerin, nuerenei EJAKAIT kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael, ka nul da lukibwaikinete ikabakan luka Isirael."
2Kings17:9 Kokokoanakinos idwe luka Isirael aswam numam ejok nukasurokin EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, kodukoto aiboisio nuiceleleete koreriakee kere, ageun kotogo loeoj loka ikedarak kiton ore lokebwaitai."
2Kings17:10 Kosipokis ipirin ka Aserim kanoliukot loeoia, ido kokwap kanolikitoi loepesit."
2Kings17:11 Kisupuruununete kaŋina lueuru maa kaiboisio kere nuiceleleete, kwape eswamaenenaata atekerin nuereneari EJAKAIT kakonyenekee: kiswamata nukaronok aitunyunyurikin EJAKAIT,"
2Kings17:12 Kijaanakis aputosia, nualimokinit EJAKAIT kes ebe, “Sirikiswamata akirot na.”"
2Kings17:13 Konye kitejenik EJAKAIT Isirael, ka Yuda, kama ka nolinabi, ka ŋolikadwaran, ebe, “Kibelokinos yesi anyoun korotinikus lueroko, koricata aicorakinetaka ka ikakisila, kwape ejaatar ikakisila kere lukeeorakinit lukapapaakus, lukejukakinit yes kama ka ikakejaanakinak inabin.”"
2Kings17:14 Konye konero akiirar, konye kitininikata imurisiijakec, kwape kimurisina luka lukapapaakec, lumam apotu kiyuut EJAKAIT Ekecedeke."
2Kings17:15 Konerenenete ikisilake, ka aitutuketeke naetutukit kalukapapaakee, ka aitejenuneta nueteienunit kes; kotupasi aamameak, koraunos lukaamameak, kotupenenete atekerin nuerimorito kes, nuabu EJAKAIT kieoro kes ebe sirikiswamata kwape kakesi."
2Kings17:16 Kojala aicorakineta kere nuka EJAKAIT Ekecedese, kosubut aputosia nuecalara, kes itak iarei, kosubut Asera da, komaenenete ajore kere nakokuiu, kijaanakis Baal,"
2Kings17:17 Kitotoroenenete ikeeedwe lusap ka lupesur akim, kiswamata nuka airo ka nuka ecudet, kogwelaros aswam nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, aitunyunyurikin ŋes."
2Kings17:18 Kanuka nun konyunyurik noi EJAKAIT Isirael, kolema kakonyeneke; mam abu kideun dimarai areker naka Yuda bon."
2Kings17:19 Yuda da mam abu koric aicorakineta nuka EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, konye kolosenenete kokisila luka Isirael Iukibwaikinete,"
2Kings17:20 Koŋer EJAKAIT aur kere naka Isirael, kitican kes, kijaik kes akanin nuka ikaŋatak, aitodol nakirenearia kes kakonyeneke."
2Kings17:21 Naarai koeila Isirael alemar kotogo loka Daudi; kodakakis Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat araun ekabaka: kiŋalaa Yeroboam Isirael anyoun katupit EJAKAIT, kitidiaka kes aidiak naepol."
2Kings17:22 Kolosenenete idwe luka Isirael karonisio kere nuka Yeroboam nueswamai; mam apotu konyoutu kakesi;
2Kings17:23 Aitodol naalemaria EJAKAIT Isirael kakonyeneke, kwape enerar kama ka Ikekejaanakinak kere inabin. Koyanaarai eut Isirael Asuria anyoun kakwapuke, kiton lolo."
2Kings17:24 Koyau ekabaka loka Asuria ituŋa anyoun koBabulon, ka Kuta, ka Aba, ka Kamat, ka Separabaim, kibwaik kes oreria luka Samaria aibois naka idwe luka Isirael: kiruma Samaria kiboikinos oreriake."
2Kings17:25 Kosodi, egeete aiboi kanen, mam ayoŋito EJAKAIT: kanuka nun kijukak EJAKAIT kes iŋatunyo, luaarete ice kakesi."
2Kings17:26 Ŋes kelimokiniata ekabaka loka Asuria ebe, “Atekerin nuiyanaari ijo cut, kibwaik oreria luka Samaria, mam ejenete epone loka Edeke loka akwap: ŋes keinakini ijukakini kes iŋatunyo, ido koany, earete kes, naarai mam ejenete epone loka Edeke loka akwap.”"
2Kings17:27 Kosodi ekabaka loka Asuria aicorakin atiar, “Koyanaas ediopet kosasedotin lukiyaunete kaŋina; koloto kiboioto kaŋina, kisisianak kes epone loka Edeke loka akwap.”"
2Kings17:28 Kosodi ediopet kosasedotin lualemario koSamaria kobu kiboikin Bet-el, kisisianak kwape ibusakinitor ayoŋit EJAKAIT."
2Kings17:29 Konye kosubununei ŋiniteker idekesiokec, kibwaanakinete otogoi luka aiboisio nuiceleleete nuadukito Isamarian, ŋiniteker oreriakec neiboioto."
2Kings17:30 Kosubut ituŋa luka Babulon Sukot-benot, kosubut ituŋa luka Kut Nerigal, kosubut ituŋa luka Kamat Asima."
2Kings17:31 Kosubut Ibain Nibas ka Taratak, kicweenenete Iseparabin ikeeedwe kakim neejaas Adaramelek ka Anamelek, idekesio luka Separabaim."
2Kings17:32 Koyonenenete EJAKAIT, ido kotiakutu kotomakec isasedotin luka aiboisio nuiceleleete, luainanakinete asuban kanukee kotogoi luka aiboisio nuiceleleete."
2Kings17:33 Koyoŋenenete EJAKAIT, kiiaanakis da ikecedekesio, kwape kejaar epone loka atekerin nuayanaario,"
2Kings17:34 lswamaete kiton lolo kwape ajaatar iponesio lukolosck. Mam eyoŋito EJAKAIT, mam iswamaete kwape keiaar apucunetakec, karaida itubesiakec, karaida ikisila arai aicorakinet naecorakinit EJAKAIT idwe luka Yakob, loamaikinit Isirael;"
2Kings17:35 Loetutuki EJAKAIT kaŋes, kicorak kes ebe, “Sirikiyoŋata icedekesio, karaida akukonokin kes, karaida aiiaanakin, karaida ainakin kes asuban:"
2Kings17:36 Konye EJAKAIT, lokitolomuni yes kakwap nako Misiri. Kagogon naepol, ka akan naarioro, ŋol ŋes loiyoŋenenete, ŋol ŋes loikukonokinos, ŋol da loiinanakinete asuban;"
2Kings17:37 Apucuneta ka itubesia, ka ikisila ka aicorakinet luabu ŋesi kiwadikak yes, iricenenete aswam ikar kere; sirikiyoŋa idekesio ice."
2Kings17:38 Aitutuket naetutuk eoŋ kayes, sirikimurwonokinete; karaida aiyoŋ icedekesio."
2Kings17:39 Konye koyonenenete EJAKAIT Ekusideke; kitaiarenenei ŋesi yes kakan naka lukasurupokus kere.”
2Kings17:40 Konye mam apotu kopupokis, konye kiswamata kwape ajaar eponekec lolem sek,"
2Kings17:41 Koyoŋa atekerin nun EJAKAIT, kijaanakis aputosiakee nuegerer ikecedwe da, ka idwe luka ikecedwe, kwape eswamaenenaata Iukapapaakec, iswamaenenete kwaŋin kiton lolo."
2Kings18:1 Kosodi kanen kokaru lokiwuniet loka Kosea okoku loka Ela ekabaka laka Isirael, kogcu Kesekia okoku loka Akas ekabaka loka Yuda airum."
2Kings18:2 Kerai loka ikar akaisaarei ka lukany egeuni airum; kirumak ikar akaisaarci ka lukanykaonon koYerusalem; ekiror loka totoke kerai Abi akoku naka Sekaria,"
2Kings18:3 Kiswama nuejok kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape ajaatar kere nueswamai papaake Daudi."
2Kings18:4 Kolema aiboisio nuiceleleete, kobil ipirin, koiepejep Asera: komunyumuny emun loka aisinit loasubi Musa: naarai aitodol apaarasia nun korina idwe luka Isirael isupuruunekinete ŋes lueuru maa: komaik ŋes Nekusutan."
2Kings18:5 Komuno EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael; akauloke emamei lueputori ŋes kokabakan kere luka Yuda, karaida luageikincte ŋes."
2Kings18:6 Naarai abu kimorikikin ka EJAKAIT, mam abu konyou katupit ijes, konye koricite aicorakinetake, nueeorakin EJAKAIT Musa,"
2Kings18:7 Koiai EJAKAIT kaŋes: nealomanari kere kokerianar: kipaliik ŋesi ekabaka laka Asuria, mam abu kijaanak."
2Kings18:8 Kodany Ipilisitian kiton Gasa ka iikorunoke; ageun kotogo kaloeoj loka ikedarak kiton ore lokebwaitai.
2Kings18:9 Kosodi kanen kokaru lokiwononet loka ekabaka Kesekia, ŋes ekaru lokikanyetekaarei loka Kosea okoku loka Ela ekabaka loka Isirael, kobu Salumaneser ekabaka loka Asuria asurokin Samaria, kirigau."
2Kings18:10 Kosodi ketuboros ikar iuni kiruma: ŋes ekaru lokikanyetekape loka Kesekia, ŋes ekaru lokikanyetekaonon loka Kosea ekabaka loka Isirael, kirumai Samaria,"
2Kings18:11 Kijoreo eka baka loka Asuria Isirael ayaŋaar Asuria, kibwaik kes Kala, ka Kabor, ariri kecor loka Gosan, oreria da luka Imedin:"
2Kings18:12 Naarai mam apotu korimakis eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, konye kodiakasi aitutuketeke, kere da nueeorakini Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT, konero akiirar, karaida aswam."
2Kings18:13 Kokaru lokitomonet kaoŋon loka ekabaka Kesekia, kobu Senakarib ekabaka loka Asuria asurokin ireria kere luka Yuda lukebwaitai, kirum."
2Kings18:14 Kijukak Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda ekabaka loka Asuria Lakis ebe, “Adiak eoŋ; kinyeinai kobono: lukitubokini ijo eoŋ acamuni.” Kotuboki ekabaka loka Asuria Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda atalatan akwat auni nuka epuesa ka atalatan akaisauni nuka esabu,"
2Kings18:15 Kosodi Kesekia ainakin ŋes cpuesa kere loadumuna kotogo loka EJAKAIT, koboro da luka akais nuipu lukotogo loka ekabaka."
2Kings18:16 Kapak kaŋin kikisunun Kesekia esabu kokirigin luka eyekalu loka EJAKAIT, kopirin da lueladaarit Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda, koinak ekabaka loka Asuria,"
2Kings18:17 Kijuka ekabaka loka Asuria Taratan ka Rab-saris ka Rabasake anyoun koLakis mama ejai eka baka Kesekia kaiore naepol Yerusalem, Kodokasi kopotu Yerusalem, Kedoloto, kopotu kobwaata kariri kaleles naka atapar nakokuju, korot loka emanikor loka ekelotan igoen,"
2Kings18:18 Kedaut anyaraun ekabaka, kolom neeiaas Eliakim okoku loka Kilikia, loapolokinit ekal, ka Sebuna ekewadikan, ka Yoa okoku loka Asap ekesiitonokinan."
2Kings18:19 Kotema Rabasake kes atiar, “Kolimokis do Kesekia ebe, ‘Inera ekabaka lokapolon, eka baka loka Asuria, kwanata ebe, Amuno naanyoin naimuno?’"
2Kings18:20 Inera ijo, konye eraas akiro nuka aituk bon ebe, Ejai acoa ka agogoŋ naka ejie, Iŋai do imunokina ijo, tape kipaliikin eoŋ?"
2Kings18:21 Koany ca, imunokina ijo ebela loka egada lo loiriecakina, ŋes Misiri; arai kegoŋakini ituŋanan mamake, elomari akani ke icumi: ikoni nepenen Parao ckabaka loko Misiri mama cjaas ŋul kere iuemunosi ŋes."
2Kings18:22 Konye arai kitemas ebe, “Kimuno isio EJAKAIT Ekosideke”: mere ŋes ŋol loalemari Kesekia aiboisioke nuiceleleetc ka itemwanake, kolimok Yuda ka Yerusalem ebe, “Imaenencte kotem kalo koYcrusalem”?"
2Kings18:23 Aso do, kenaiŋait, koiaakis ckaiakait ekabaka loka Asuria iboro lukititiŋa, kainakin eoŋ jo da ibalasin ilukumin iarei, arai ipedori ijo kowaikon aibwaikin luibwanenete,"
2Kings18:24 Aso ipedori biai aisibelokin akonyen nuka ekapolon ediopet kotoma kaludidik kokejaanakinak luka ejakaitika, komuno Misiri kanuka agalin ka ikebwanenok."
2Kings18:25 Abu kereka eoŋ asurokin aibois na amudiar komamei EJAKAIT? EJAKAIT, ŋes kabala ebe, ‘Kosurok akwap na, komudia.’’’"
2Kings18:26 Kosodi Eliakim okoku loka Kilikia, ka Sebuna, ka Yoa, atemar Rabasake atiar, “Kiŋaiŋait, kiner kikonikejaanakinak kanajep nako Suria; naarai kijeni; sirikiner kasio kaŋaiep naka Iyudayan, kaki nuka ituŋa lueiaas arwatat.”"
2Kings18:27 Konye kotema Rabasake kes atiar, “Keyakuunit ekaiakait mama ejai ejakaitikon, ka jo da, einer akiro nu? Mam kereka keyakuunit otuŋa luibojete karwatat, ainyam acinikec, ka aimat akulakee nepepe kayes?”"
2Kings18:28 Kosodi Rabasake aibwo, kiworo keporoto loepol kanajep naka Iyudayan, kotema atiar, “Kopupokisi yesi akirot naka ekabaka lokapolon, ekabaka loka Asuria."
2Kings18:29 Inera ekabaka kwanata ebe, ‘Kinyek Kesekia aiŋal yes; naarai mam epedori aitajar yes kakanike:"
2Kings18:30 Kinyek Kesekia ainakin yes amunokina EJAKAIT ebe, Abeit kitajari EJAKAIT oni, ere lo da mam ijaikinio akan naka ekabaka loka Asuria.’"
2Kings18:31 Sirikipupokis Kesekia: naarai inera eka baka loka Asuria kwanata ebe, ‘Kinerutu keoŋ nuka ainapakin, kopotu neajai; konyama yesi ninitunanan emusabibuke, ŋinituŋanan nuka etinike, komata da yesi ŋinituŋanan akipi nukoieoike;"
2Kings18:32 Aitodol neabunio kayanaa yes akwap naeputosi kanakus, akwap naka akima ka ebino, akwap naka atap ka imanikoria luka emusabibu, akwap naka akinyet naka eseitun, ka esik, tetere ijarete, komam itwakete: sirikipupokis Kesekia, nakiiodooria yes ebe, Kitajari EJAKAIT oni."
2Kings18:33 Ejai cani edio kodekesio luka atekerin loitaiarit akekwap kakan naka ekabaka loka Asuria?
2Kings18:34 Alu bo ejaas idekesio luka Kamat, ka luka Arupad? Alu bo ejaas idekesio luka Separabaim, luka Kena, ka luka Iba da? Apotu tope kitajarata Samaria kakanika?"
2Kings18:35 Lukanai kodekesio kere luka akwapin luapotu kitajarata akwapukee kakanika, tetere itaiari EJAKAIT Yerusalem kakanika?”"
2Kings18:36 Konye kililina ituŋa, mam apotu kobonokis ŋes akirot; naarai kejai aicorakinet naka ekabaka ebe, Sirikiboŋokis."
2Kings18:37 Kosodi Eliakim okoku loka Kilikia, loapolokinit ekal, ka Sebuna ekewadikan, ka Yoa okoku loka Asap ekesiitonokinan kopotu mama ejai Kesekia eeilicilito inapenekee, kolimokis akiro nuka Rabasake."
2Kings19:1 Kosodi kanen, kepupu ekabaka Kesekia, kocil inapeneke, konap epuko, koloma togo loka EJAKAIT."
2Kings19:2 Kijuka Eliakim, loapolokinit ekal, ka Sebuna ekewadikan, ka imakio luka isasedotin, konapitos ipukoi, mama ejai Isaia enabi okoku loka Amos."
2Kings19:3 Kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Inera Kesekia kwanata ebe, Apaaran na erai apaaran naka iean, naka aitoronio, ka naka amoromoroo: naarai adol idwe aurio, emamei da agogoŋ nakaidoun."
2Kings19:4 Motoko iirari EJAKAIT Ekonideke akiro kere nuka Rabasake, loejukuni ekabaka loka Asuria ejakaitike amoromor Edeke lokajaran, ka aitoron akiro nuapupu EJAKAIT Ekonideke: aso kitonyou ailipikon kanuka aatoŋot naedeun.”"
2Kings19:5 Kopotu do ikejaanakinak luka ekabaka Kesekia neejai Isaia,"
2Kings19:6 Kotema Isaia kes atiar, “Kolimokis ejakaitikus kwanata ebe, ‘Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Sirikiyoŋ akiro nuipup, nukamoromorooto eoŋ ikejaanakinak luka ekabaka loka Asuria."
2Kings19:7 Koany, ebwaikin emoyo tomake, epupuni ŋesi eemut, eboŋori bukee; ebirokini eoŋ da ŋes kekilen akwapuke.’’’"
2Kings19:8 Kobono do Rabasake, kodum ekabaka loka Asuria ejiosi ka Libuna: naarai abu kopupunite ebe abono ŋesi koLakis."
2Kings19:9 Kepupu inerai nuka Tiraka eka baka loko Etiopia ebe, “Koany, alomu aitiii jo”: kiyakik bobo ŋesi Kesekia ikiyakia ebe,"
2Kings19:10 “Itemarete Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda kwanata ebe, ‘Kinyek Edekekon loimuno aiŋal jo ebe, Mam Yerusalem ijaikinio akan naka ekabaka loka Asuria."
2Kings19:11 Koany, ipupunit ijo nueswamakis ikabakan luka Asuria akwapin kere, amudianarete kes eut: do konyet ijo kiyuunio?"
2Kings19:12 Apotu kereka idekesio luka atekerin koyuununete kes, nuamudianarete lukapapaaka, Gosan, ka Karan, ka Resep, ka idwe luka Eden luajaas Telasar?"
2Kings19:13 Ai bo ejai ekabaka loka Kamat, ka ekabaka loka Arupad, ka ekabaka loka ere loka Separabaim, loka Kena, ka Iba da?’”"
2Kings19:14 Kiiau Kesekia ebalua kakan naka ikiyakia, kosiom; kolot Kesekia togo loka EJAKAIT, kopesia kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
2Kings19:15 Kilip Kesekia kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kobala ebe, “Wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, loiboie kokerubin, ijo ŋes Edeke, ijo bon, loka ajakanuto kere nuka akwap; ijo kolo isubi akuj ka akwap."
2Kings19:16 Kitoik akonikit, wu EJAKAIT, kiira; kokweny, wu EJAKAIT, koany; kopup akiro nuka Senakerib, nueiuku ŋesi amoromoroo Edeke lokaiaran."
2Kings19:17 Abeit, wu EJAKAIT, apotu ikabakan luka Asuria komudiasi atekerin ka akeeekwapin,"
2Kings19:18 Apotu kocakasi idekesiokee akim: naarai mam keraas idekesio, konye aswam naka akanin nuka ituŋa, ikito ka amor; ŋes kemudiarere ŋes."
2Kings19:19 Aso do, wu EJAKAIT Ekosideke, kenainait, kitaiarai sio kakanike, tetere ejenunete ajakanuto kere nuka akwap ebe ijo ŋes EJAKAIT Edeke, ijo bon ba.”"
2Kings19:20 Kosodi Isaia okoku loka Amos aiiukakin Kesekia ebe, “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, Naarai ilip eoŋ asurokin Senakerib ekabaka loka Asuria, eira,"
2Kings19:21 Na ŋes akirot naener EJAKAIT mama ejai ŋesi ebe: “Kimwaŋit akoku nabekot naka Sion jo, ekienar jo kisekelei; emuŋumuŋ akoku naka Yerusalem akouke neijai,"
2Kings19:22 “Iŋai imoromor ijo kisekel? Iŋai loitopolooritor ijo ekoniporoto, ka aiteluor akonikonyen kuju? Isurok Lokalaunan loka Isirael."
2Kings19:23 Imoromor EJAKAIT kokiyakiakon, kinera atiar, ‘Kaipues naka agalinika Adokari oswion luka ironan, atutubeta nukotoma nuka Lebanon. Ajepi iresiake lueoiak, ka iberosinike luejokuka; Alomari da aiboisike naiwasie, amagoro naka emanikorike loideneriat."
2Kings19:24 Abok, amat akipi nukimo, etooni da kakakeju ieorin kere luko Misiri.’"
2Kings19:25 Mam ibu kopup kwape eswamaa kolo, Kasub agear apeŋo? Kwana da etodolit, Korai ijo loimudiari ireria lukebwaitai araun aapoŋor nukamejei,"
2Kings19:26 Kanuka nun lueboiete kotoma keraas luedit agogoŋ, koburut kitirirata; kosubito bala inya luka ais, kwape kikui, kwape kinya luejaas kuju togo, kwape kakima nueokito eriŋa epolooro."
2Kings19:27 “Konye ajeni akoniiboie, ka alomarikon, ka alomunikon, aikerepoonutukon kaneaiai,"
2Kings19:28 Kanuka aikerepoonutukon kaneajai, ido naarai adolu emokodekon akika, ŋes ebwaikinia ekagolu okumesikon, ka arukanaka da aitukukon, kenyakati jo orot loilomunia."
2Kings19:29 “Na ŋes eraun aanyunet neijai: okaru lo inyamete yenebwaŋuni bon, okaru lokiareit yenitoeuni kaii; okaru lokiwuniet koyeata, kodwenya, kiraata imanikoria luka emusabibu, konyama araitoke."
2Kings19:30 Edupi aatoŋot naideuni naabu koku kokek loka Yuda alias kwap, kota araito kokuiu,"
2Kings19:31 Naarai elomari aatoŋot koYerusalem, luekuete da komoru Sion: itodolikini ŋun adunyanut naka EJAKAIT,"
2Kings19:32 “Kanuka nun inera kwanata EJAKAIT nuka ekabaka loka Asuria ebe, Mam edoluni ore lo, karaida agumakin emal, karaida adolokin kebuku, karaida aitutu etut asurokinia ŋes."
2Kings19:33 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Orot lokelomunia, nopenol ebonoria, ido mam edoluni ore lo."
2Kings19:34 Naarai egaŋi eoŋ ere lo aitaiar, kanukan, ido kanuka ekakejaanakinan Daudi.”"
2Kings19:35 Kosodi kanen, akuare ŋin; koloma emalaika loka EJAKAIT oidukurun luka Iyasurian, kodany ilukumin akwatat ka akaisakanykauni ka lukany: kenyout ituŋa tupuruc sek, koany, koraas kere ikatwak."
2Kings19:36 Kosodi Senakerib ekabaka loka Asuria anyoun, kolot, kobono, kiboikin Ninebe."
2Kings19:37 Kosodi kanen, emai ŋesi kotogo loka Nisurok ekedeke, koarata Aduram-melek ka Sareser ŋes kekileŋ: kokereasi akwap naka Ararat. Kirum Esar-kadon okokuke aiboisike."
2Kings20:1 Kapaarasia kanun kodekakin Kesekia nepetai atwanare, Kobu Isaia enabi okoku loka Amos mama ejai, kotema ŋes atiar, “Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Kitemonok ekonitogo; naarai itwani, mam iiari.”"
2Kings20:2 Kosodi kibelok akekonyen arwatat, kilip EJAKAIT, kotema atiar,"
2Kings20:3 “Kiitu kwape kwana, wu EJAKAIT, kenaiŋait, kwape aloseneneo kakonyenekon kabeit ka etau loeteni, keswama nuejok kakonyenekon.” Komony noi Kesekia akiyo,"
2Kings20:4 Kosodi kanen, eroko Isaia elomuna alosit kidlŋ ore, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai ŋesi ebe,"
2Kings20:5 “Kobono, kolimok Kesekia ekapolon loka ikatuŋa ebe, ‘Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Daudi papaakon ebe, Eira ailipikon, aany akonikiyo: koany, ketanaleuni jo: apaaran nakiwuniet ŋes idokaria togo loka EJAKAIT."
2Kings20:6 Eyatakini da akonipaarasia ikar itomon ka lukany, ketajari jo ka ere kala kakan naka ekabaka loka Asuria; egaŋi eoŋ ere lo kanukan, ido kanuka Daudi ekakejaanakinan.’’’"
2Kings20:7 Kotema Isaia atiar, “Koodutu araito nuka etini.’ Koodutu kibwaikis abus, konaleu,"
2Kings20:8 Kotema Kesekia Isaia atiar, “Ani bo sanyunet naiteienuni ebe ketanaleuni EJAKAIT eoŋ, kasodi adokar togo loka EJAKAIT kapaaran nakiwuniet?”"
2Kings20:9 Kotema Isaia atiar, “Na ŋes eraun aanyunet mamakon naebuni kama ejai EJAKAIT, ebe iswamai EJAKAIT ŋin naener: elosi kereka etolim kinaren ailameta atomon, arai bo eboŋori kau ailameta atomon?”"
2Kings20:10 Koboŋok Kesekia ebe, “Erai akirot naepatana aiiesun ailameta atomon: mam, konye kobono etolim kau ailameta atomon.”"
2Kings20:11 Komonyak Isaia enabi EJAKAIT: kinyaka etolim kau ailameta atomon, nukeiositor akoloŋ kailameta nuka Akas."
2Kings20:12 Kapaarasia kanun kijukak Berodak-baladan okoku loka Baladan, ekabaka loko Babulon, Kesekia ibaluan ka ainakinet: naarai apupunit kwape adekar Kesekia."
2Kings20:13 Kopupok Kesekia kes, kitodik kes etogo kere loka iboroke luka akais nuipu, epuesa, ka esabu, ka lueuru maa, ka akinyet naka akais nuipu, ka etogo loka luiiisike, ka luadumuna koboroke luka akais nuipu: amamei ibore kotogoke karaida ayaetake kere, yenimam Kesekia etodikinit kes,"
2Kings20:14 Kosodi Isaia enabi abunore mama ejai eka baka Kesekia, korema ŋes atiar, “Anyoika nuabalasi ituŋa nul? Apote kai aponare mamakonj “Kotema Kesekia atiar, “Apote kakwap naelwana, Babulon.’"
2Kings20:15 Kotema atiar, “Inyo bo aanyut kotogokon?” Koboŋok Kesekia ebe, “Aanyut iboro kere luejass togoka: emamei ibore koboroka luka akais nuipu yenimam eoŋ etodikinit kes.”"
2Kings20:16 Kotema Isaia Kesekia atiar, “Kopupok akirotnaka EJAKAIT."
2Kings20:17 Koany, eponito apaarasia, eyanaario kere lueiaas togokon, ka ŋul kaluapotu lukapapaakon kinadata kiton lolo, Babulon: ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Emameun ibore yenepianun."
2Kings20:18 Eyaŋaarete da lukodwekon, lukiuriei ijo elop; eraunete ibwacin kotogo lokapolon loka ekabaka loko Babulon.”"
2Kings20:19 Kosodi Kesekia atemar Isaia ebe, “Ejok akirot naka EJAKAIT nainera ijo.” Bobo da kotema atiar, “Mere kwaŋin, arai ejaunos ainapakin ka abeit kapaarasiaka?”"
2Kings20:20 Aswamisio ace nuka Kesekia, ka akegogoŋ kere, kwape abokia atapar, ka aleles, kitolom akipi ore, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Yuda?"
2Kings20:21 Koiotoor Kesekia kalukapapaake: kirum Manase okokuke aiboisike.
2Kings21:1 Kerai Manase loka ikar itomon ka luarei egeuni airum; kirumak ikar akaisakany ka lukany ko Yerusalem: ekiror loka totoke kerai Kepisi-ba.
2Kings21:2 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape ajaatar italesia luka ikapirin, luerenei EJAKAIT kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael."
2Kings21:3 Naarai koduk bobo aiboisio nuiceleleete nuamudiarit papake Kesekia; kodukok Baal itemwan, kiswama Asera, kwape eswamaa Akab ekabaka loka Isirael, koma aiore kere naka akuj, kiiaanak kes."
2Kings21:4 Koduk itemwan togo loka EJAKAIT, loenera EJAKAIT ebe, “Yerusalem ŋes ebwaikini ekakitor.”"
2Kings21:5 Kodukok aiore kere naka akuj itemwan alaroi aarei nuka etogo loka EJAKAIT.
2Kings21:6 Kitotor okokuke akim, kiswama nukaidwar, ka nuka ecudet, kolosenenei mama ejaas lukaiokin ka imurwok: kiswama nueroko nuipu kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT aitunyunyurikin ŋes."
2Kings21:7 Kosipok aput naegerer naka Asera naasubit togo loalimokinit EJAKAIT Daudi ka Solomon okokuke atiar, “Togo lo, ka Yerusalem, loaseunit katekerin kere nuka Isirael, ebwaikini ekakiror ikar kere:"
2Kings21:8 Mam esirimi bobo akeie nuka Isirael anyoun kakwap naainakinit lukapapaakee; arai eeoito aiswamaenen kwape ejaatar kere nuecorakinit kes, kwape ejaatar da ikisila kere luecotakinit Musa ekakeiaanakinan kes.”"
2Kings21:9 Konye mam apotu kiirasi; kijodou Manase kes aswam nueroko aitelekar nueiodoununete atekerin nuamudiarl EJAKAIT kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael.
2Kings21:10 Kinera EJAKAIT okeiaanakinakake inabin ebe,"
2Kings21:11 “Naarai eswama Manase ekabaka loka Yuda italesia hi, eswama da nueroko aitelekarit kere nueswamaete Imorain luageikinete ŋes, etidiak da Yuda kaputosiake:"
2Kings21:12 Ŋes inerar kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, Koany, ayauni Yerusalem ka Yuda aronis naetia netinen, kosodi yenepupuni kere, kodelosi akeki."
2Kings21:13 Kosodi eieleleuni auno naka Samaria koYerusalem, ka ebiriii loka etogo loka Akab: amwatari Yerusalem kwape emwataria ituŋanan asanit, emwasi kobuburikini,"
2Kings21:14 Acakari aatoŋot naka airumeteka, keiaik kes akan naka Iukasurupokec; eraunos imeian ka iŋatuna mama ejaas lukasurupokec kere;"
2Kings21:15 Naarai eswamata nueroko kakonyeneka, ketunyunyurikis, ageun kapaaran naalomuniata lukapapaakee koMisiri, kiton lolo.”"
2Kings21:16 Bobo da abu Manase kobuko noi noi aokot nuamameete aronis, aitodol neelelebunor Yerusalem epuai kepuai; kogelara akeronis naetidiakia Yuda, eswamai nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
2Kings21:17 Aswamisio ace nuka Manase, ka nuabu kiswama kere, ka aidiakake naadiaki, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Yuda?"
2Kings21:18 Koiotoor Manase kalukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai omanikor loka etogoke, omanikor loka Usa: kirum Amon okokuke aiboisike."
2Kings21:19 Kerai Amon loka ikar akaisaarei ka luarei egeuni airum; kitumak ikar iarei koYerusalem: ekiror loka totoke kerai Mesulemet akoku naka Karus loka Yotaba,"
2Kings21:20 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape eswamaa Manase papake."
2Kings21:21 Kolosenenei korot kere loalosenenoo papake, kiiaanak aputosia nuejaanakinenei papake, komaa kes:"
2Kings21:22 Koial EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaake, mam alosenenei korot loka EJAKAIT."
2Kings21:23 Kinerut ikejaanakinak luka Amon asurokin ŋes, koarakis ekabaka togoken."
2Kings21:24 Konye apotu ituŋa luka akwap koarata ŋul kere luenerunete asurokin ekabaka Amon; kodakakis ituŋa luka akwap Yosia okokuke araun ekabaka aiboisike.
2Kings21:25 Aswamisio ace nuka Amon nuabu kiswama, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Yuda?"
2Kings21:26 Aponi kidaikinai atesike omanikor loka Usa: kirum Yosia okokuke aiboisike.
2Kings22:1 Kerai Yosia loka ikar ikanykauni egeuni airum; kirumak ikar akaisauni kalodiopet koYerusalem; ekiror loka totoke kerai Yedida akoku naka Adaia loka Bosukat.
2Kings22:2 Kiswama nuejok kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kolosenenei korot kere loka Daudi papaake, komam epaari akan nakoteten karaida nakokediany."
2Kings22:3 Kosodi kanen kokaru lokitomonet kakanykauni loka ekabaka Yosia, kijuka ekabaka Sapan okoku loka Asalia, okoku loka Mesulam, ekewadikan, togo loka EJAKAIT, kobala ebe,"
2Kings22:4 “Kodoka neejai Kilikia esasedoti lopeti, kimar apesan nueyaunitai togo loka EJAKAIT, nuejaununut ikagolok kotuna:"
2Kings22:5 Kijaikis akan naka ikeswamak luiteete etogo loka EJAKAIT: koinakis ikeswamak lueiaas togo loka EJAKAIT, aiteteunia etogo neetiyanara:"
2Kings22:6 Ikekeok akito, ka ikadukok, ka ikekeok amor: ido kanuka egwelet akito ka amor nuikee aiteteunia etogo.”"
2Kings22:7 Konye mam apodos aimar apesan nukijaikinitai akanikec; naarai eswamaenenete kamunonut.
2Kings22:8 Kotema Kilikia esasedoti lopeti Sapan ekewadikan atiar, “Adum eoŋ eitabo loka ikisila kotogo loka EJAKAIT.” Kosodi Kilikia aijaikin Sapan eitabo, kosiom."
2Kings22:9 Kobu Sapan ekewadikan neejai ekabaka, ldnyakak ekabaka akiro, kobala ebe, “Akorasi ikonikejaanakinak apesan nuadumuna kotogo, eiaikis akan naka ikeswamak luiteete etogo loka EJAKAIT,”"
2Kings22:10 Kosodi Sapan ekewadikan alimokin ekabaka ebe, “Kejaiki Kilikia esasedoti eitabo.” Kosiom Sapan kakonyen nuka ekabaka."
2Kings22:11 Kosodi kanen, kiira ekabaka akiro nuka eitabo loka ikisila, kocil ikenapen."
2Kings22:12 Kicorak ekabaka Kilikia esasedoti, ka Akikam, okoku loka Sapan, ka Akubor okoku loka Mikaia, ka Sapan ekewadikan, ka Asaia ekejaanakinan loka ekabaka, ebe,"
2Kings22:13 “Koloto yesi, kinita EJAKAIT kanukan, kanuka ituŋa da, ido kanuka Yuda kere, akiro nuka eitabo kala loadumun: naarai epol anyunyura naka EJAKAIT nakinepak oni, naarai mam lukapapaawok apotu kopuput akiro nuka eitabo kalo, aiswamaenen kwape ejaatar kere nukiwadikakinio oni.”"
2Kings22:14 Kosodi Kilikia esasedoti alosit, ka Akikam, ka Akubor, ka Sapan, ka Asaia, neejai Kulida anabi, aberu naka Salum okoku loka Tikuba, okoku loka Karukas, ekeŋadan inapen: (eboienenei ŋin koYerusalem katutubet nakiareit;) kinerut kaŋes,"
2Kings22:15 Kotema ŋesi kes atiar, “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: ‘Kolimokis etuŋanan lokijukunit yes neaiai ebe,"
2Kings22:16 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT ebe, Koany, ayauni aronis aibois na, ka neejaas luibojete kotoma, akiro kere nuka eitabo kaloasiomi eka baka loka Yuda:"
2Kings22:17 Naarai kajala, esupuruikis lukisupurununo odekesio ice, aitunyunyurikin eoŋ kaswam kere naka akaninikee; ŋes inepakinia akanyunyura aibois na, komam eduneori,"
2Kings22:18 Konye ekabaka loka Yuda, lokiiukuni ainitakin EJAKAIT, kolimokis ŋes kwanata ebe, Inera kwanata EJAKAIT Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Nuka akiro nukipupuni,"
2Kings22:19 Kanu anonokiaror ekonitau, kitasonikin kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, naipupunio nuenerak aibois na, ka luibojete kotoma ebe, eluoros ameiei ka aikenio, kocil ikoninapen, komony akiyo kakonyeneka; inera EJAKAIT ebe, Keira eoŋ da,"
2Kings22:20 Kanuka ŋun, koany, atukokini jo mama ejaas lukapapaakon, kitukokinio jo ailitikon inapakina, kwabo mam canyunete akonikonye aronis kere naayauni aibois na.’’’ Kinyakakinai ekabaka akiro."
2Kings23:1 Kijuka ekabaka, kotukonokinos imakio kere luka Yuda ka luka Yerusalem neejai."
2Kings23:2 Kodoka ekabaka togo loka EJAKAIT, ka iruna kere luka Yuda ka lukiboiete koYerusalem nepepe kaŋes, ka isasedotin, ka inabin, ka ituŋa kere, ludidik ka lukapolok: kosiomak akiikee akiro kere nuka eitabo loka aitutuket loadumun kotogo loka EJAKAIT."
2Kings23:3 Kobwo ekabaka kaneejai epir, kitutuk aitutuket kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, atupit EJAKAIT, airie aicorakinetake, ka aitejenunetake ka ikekisila, keketau kere, ka akeijar kere, aitogogoŋ akiro nuka aitutuket kana nuewadikatai oitabo lo: kitogogonoto ituŋa kere aitutuket."
2Kings23:4 Kicorak ekabaka Kilikia esasedoti lopeti, ka isasedotin luetupito, ka ikagolok aitolomun koyekalu loka EJAKAIT iboro kere lueswamao kanuka Baal, ka Asera, ka aiore kere naka akuj: kicwe kes kokina ka Yerusalem komanikoria luka Kidiron, koyana ekurwonikee Bet-el."
2Kings23:5 Kolema isasedotin luamaenenete aputosia, luatiakunete ikabakan luka Yuda aisupuruunun lukisupurununo kaiboisio nuiceleleete nukoreria luka Yuda, ka aiboisio nuerimorito Yerusalem; ŋul da luesupuruunokinete Baal, ka akoloŋ, ka elap, ka aacer, ka aiore kere naka akuj, lukisupurununo."
2Kings23:6 Kitolom Asera kotogo loka EJAKAIT, kiŋa ka Yerusalem, koyau aguurut Kidiron, kicwe ŋes kaguurut Kidiron, kicakaeak kidupudupo, kiwelanak atesina nuka ituŋa kere."
2Kings23:7 Kotiyatiya itogoi luka iketepak ikiliok, luajaas togo loka EJAKAIT, nekesonyenenata aŋor aigalisio nuka Asera."
2Kings23:8 Kitolom isasedotin kere koreria luka Yuda, komunaa aiboisio nuiceleleete neesupuriononoto isasedotin lukisupurununo, anyoun koGeba kiton Beer-seba; kobilibil aiboisio nuiceleleete nukorutei nuajaas neelomarere orute loka Yosua ekayaiton loka ere, nuajaas akan nakokediany orute loka ere,"
2Kings23:9 Konye mam apotu isasedotin luka aiboisio nuiceleleete kodokasi otem loka EJAKAIT Yerusalem, konye konyamenenete imugatin lumam itubuunitoi koinacanakec,"
2Kings23:10 Komunaa da Topet, loajai aditot naka idwe luka Kinom, kinyek ituŋanan aicwe okokuke karaida akokuke araun asubanit mama ejai Molek."
2Kings23:11 Kolema ibalasin luainakinito ikabakan luka Yuda akoloŋ, neelomarere togo loka EJAKAIT, eiduny kagola naka Natan-melek ebwacit, naapie kanen; kicwe agalin nuka akoloŋ kakim,"
2Kings23:12 Kobilibil eka baka itemwan luajaas kuju kagola nakokuiu naka Akas, luadukito ikabakan luka Yuda, ka itemwan luadukokinit Manase alaroi aarei nuka etogo loka EJAKAIT, komunyumuny kes kanen, kocakak aguurut Kidiron."
2Kings23:13 Komunaa ekabaka aiboisio nuiceleleete nuiteete Yerusalem, nuajaas akan nakoteten naka emoru loka amunaar, loadukokinit Solomon ekabaka loka Isirael Asitoret etal loka Isidonin, ka Kemos etalloka Moab, ka Milikom etalloka idwe luka Amon."
2Kings23:14 Kobilibil ipirin, koiepeiep Asera, kileleb aiboisiokec akojo nuka ituŋa."
2Kings23:15 Bobo da etem loajai Bet-el, ka aibois naieelelei naabu Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat, loetidiaki Isirael koduk, kobilibil etem ŋol ka aibois naieelelei; kicwe aibois naieelelei kicakaeak kidupudupo, kiewe da Asera."
2Kings23:16 Kosodi konolia Yosia kau, koany atesina nuajaas nen moru; kijuka, kolemunai akoio katesina, kiewe kes kotem, komunaa ŋes, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT naalimori etuŋanan loka Edeke, loalimori akiro nun,"
2Kings23:17 Kosodi ŋesi atemar atiar, “Anyoin aiitunet nin naany?” Kolimokis ŋes ituŋa lukore kanol ebe, “Ŋes ates naka etuŋanan loka Edeke, loabuni koYuda, kolimok akiro nu nuiswamak ijo etem loka Bet-el.”"
2Kings23:18 Kotema atiar, “Kinyeisi ŋes; kinyek etuŋanan kere akutun akekoio.” Kosodete kinyeinai akekojo nepepe kakoio nuka enabi loabuni koSamaria."
2Kings23:19 Kolema Yosia abilai kere nuka aiboisio nuiceleleete nuajaas oreria luka Samaria, nukedukete ikabakan luka Isirael aitunyunyurikin EJAKAIT, kiswamak kes kwape ajaatar aswamisio kere nueswamat koBet-el."
2Kings23:20 Koarak otemwan isasedotin kere luka aiboisio nuiceleleete luajaas nen, kiewe akojo nuka ituŋa kotemwan kanul; kobono Yerusalem."
2Kings23:21 Kicorak ekabaka ituŋa kere ebe, “Koriea Aleleŋio mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekusideke, kwape ewadikatere oitabo lo loka aitutuket.”"
2Kings23:22 Abeit mam aricito Aleleŋio naikoni nen ageun kapaarasia nuka ikatubok luatubonokinete Isirael, karaida apaarasia kere nuka ikabakan luka Isirael, karaida nuka ikabakan luka Yuda."
2Kings23:23 Konye kokaru lokitomonet kakanykauni loka ekabaka Yosia korica Aleleŋio nin mama ejai EJAKAIT koYerusalem.
2Kings23:24 Bobo da, kolema Yosia ŋul kere luajaas ajokin, ka imurwok, ka aputosia nuka idekesio, ka aputosia, ka italeaia kere, luatakanunete kakwap naka Yuda, ka Yerusalem, tetere itogogoni akiro nuka ekisil nuewadikatai oitabo loadumuni Kilikia esasedoti kotogo loka EJAKAIT."
2Kings23:25 Emamei ekabaka kaluageikinete ŋes luaputos kaŋes, loebelokina mama ejai EJAKAIT keketau kere, ka akeijar kere, ka akegogoŋ kere, kwape ejaatar ikisila kere luka Musa; akauloke da mam enyounit ediopet loeputos kaŋes."
2Kings23:26 Konye mam abu EJAKAIT kibelokin kadeden naka akenyunyura naepol, naabu kinep anyunyurikin Yuda, kanuka aitunyunyurikin kere naka Manase naetunyunyurikinitor."
2Kings23:27 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Alemari Yuda da kakonyeneka, kwape alemaria Isirael, acakari ere la loaseunit, ŋes Yerusalem, ka etogo loabu kener ebe, Iboieaenei ekakiror kanen.”"
2Kings23:28 Aswamisio ace nuka Yosia, ka nuabu kiswama kere, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Yuda?"
2Kings23:29 Kapaarasiake koloma Parao-neko ekabaka loko Misiri asurokin ekabaka loka Asuria ocor Eupurat; kolot Yosia asurokin ŋes; koarak Megido, kedau aanyun ŋes."
2Kings23:30 Kodakasi ikekejaanakinak aketes kagali anyoun koMegido, koyaut ŋes Yerusalem, kidaikis ailitike. Koyaata ituŋa luka akwap Yekoakas okoku loka Yosia, kinyonyoikis ŋes akinyet, kitaraut ŋes ekabaka aibois naka papake,"
2Kings23:31 Kerai Yekoakas loka ikar akaisaarei ka luuni egeuni airum; kirumak ilapio iuni ko Yerusalem; ekiror loka totoke kerai Kamutal akoku naka Yeremia loka Libuna.
