2Kings23:32 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape ajaatar kere nukiswamato lukapapaake."
2Kings23:33 Koen Parao-neko ŋes koRibula akwap naka Kamat, kinyek airum koYerusalem; kotubok akwap esolo loka atalatan akwatat nuka epuesa, ka atalata adiopet naka esa bu."
2Kings23:34 Kitarau Parao-neko Eliakim okoku loka Yosia ekabaka aibois naka Yosia papake, kiloeok ekekiror komaik Yekoiakimr konye koyana Yekoakas; kobu Misiri, kotwanik nina."
2Kings23:35 Koinak Yekoiakim Parao epuesa ka esabu; konye kotubok akwap iboro ainakin apesan kwape eeorakinia Parao: kitelem epuesa ka esabu kotuna luka akwap, kaninitunanan kwape ejaar esoloke, ainakin Parao-neko."
2Kings23:36 Kerai Yekoiakim loka ikar akaisaarei ka lukany egeuni airwn; kirumak ikar itomon ka lodiopet koYerusalem: ekiror loka totoke kerai Sebida akoku naka Pedaia loka Ruma.
2Kings23:37 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape ejaatar kere nukiswamato lukapapaake."
2Kings24:1 Kapaarasiake kobu Nebukadenesar ekabaka loko Babulon, korau Yekoiakim ekejaanakinanike ikar iuni: kosodi kibelokin kipaliik."
2Kings24:2 Kijukak EJAKAIT irioŋeta luka Ikaludean asurokin ŋes, ka irioneta luka Isurian, ka irioŋeta luka Imoabin, ka irioneta luka idwe luka Amon, kijuka kes amudiar Yuda, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, naenera kama kikekejaanakinak inabin."
2Kings24:3 Abeit kobunok ŋin Yuda kaieorakinet naka EJAKAIT, alemar kes kakon yeneke, kanuka aronisio nuka Manase, kwape ajaatar kere nueswamat ŋesi;"
2Kings24:4 Kanuka aokot da nuamameete aronis nuabukori ŋesi, naarai abu kileleb Yerusalem aokot nuamameete aronis: mam EJAKAIT akoto amm,"
2Kings24:5 Aswamisio kere nuka Yekoiakim, ka nuabu kiswama kere, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Yuda?"
2Kings24:6 Kojotoor Yekoiakim kalukapapaake: kirum Yekoiakin okokuke aiboisike.
2Kings24:7 Mam abu ekabaka loko Misiri kobu bobo anyoun kakwapuke: naarai abu ekabaka loko Babulon koyana kere luaraas luka ekabaka loko Misiri, ageun kaguurut nako Misiri kiton ocor Eupurat."
2Kings24:8 Kerai Yekoiakin loka ikar itomon ka lukanykauni egeuni airum: kirumak ilapio iuni koYerusalem: ekiror loka totoke kerai Nekusutan akoku naka El-natan loko Yerusalem.
2Kings24:9 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape ajaatar kere nukiswamat papake."
2Kings24:10 Kapaarasia kanun kopotu ikeiaanakinak luka Nebukadenesar ekabaka loko Babulon Yerusalem, kirigaunai ere,"
2Kings24:11 Kobu Nebukadenesar ekabaka loko Babulon ore, koroko ikekeiaanakinak irigaunito;"
2Kings24:12 Kolom Yekoiakin ekabaka loka Yuda neejai ekabaka loko Babulon, ŋes, ka totoke, ka ikekeiaanakinak, ka ikapolokoke, ka ikapolokitokoke: kikam ekabaka loko Babulon ŋes okaru lokikanyerekauni loka airumuke."
2Kings24:13 Koyana nina iboro kere luka akais nuipu luka etogo loka ekabaka, kojepejep iboro kere luka esabu lueswamat Solomon ekabaka laka Isirael koyekalu loka EJAKAIT, kwape abalar EJAKAIT,"
2Kings24:14 Koyaŋa lukoYerusalem kere, ka ikapolok kere, ka ituŋa lukirigin kere luetitin, ilukumin itomon lueioreorio, ka ikeswamak kere luepiriaka, ka ikatatak; mam luapotu kideunos dimarai lukican luka ituŋa luka akwap,"
2Kings24:15 Koyana Yekoiakin Babulon; ka toto naka ekabaka, ka aŋor nuka ekabaka, ka ikapolokitokoke, ka ijaka luka akwap, kiioreo Babulon alemar ko Yerusalem,"
2Kings24:16 Ituŋa kere lukirigin, ilukumin ikanykaarei, ka ikeswamak luepiriaka ka ikatatak elukumit, kes kere lukagogon luapedorito ejie, kijoreo ekabaka loko Babulon kes Babulon."
2Kings24:17 Kitarau eka baka loko Babulon Matania onaee loka papake ekabaka aiboisike, kilocok ekekiror komaik Sedekia."
2Kings24:18 Kerai Sedekia loka ikar akaisaarei ka lodiopet egeuni airum; kirumak ikar itomon ka lodiopet Yerusalem; ekiror loka totoke kerai Kamutal akoku naka Yeremia loka Libuna.
2Kings24:19 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape kejaatar kere nueswamat Yekoiakim."
2Kings24:20 Naarai abu kodol koYerusalem ka Yuda kanuka anyunyura naka EJAKAIT, aitodol naedaunia aireŋear kes kakonyeneke."
2Kings25:1 Kipaliik Sedekia ekabaka loko Babulon. Kosodi kanen kokaru lokikanyetekaonon loka airumuke, kolap lokitomonet, kapaaran nakitomonet naka elap kobu bobo Nebukadenesar ekabaka loko Babulon, ŋes ka akeiore kere, asurokin Yerusalem, kidukuroto airigaun ŋes; kitutuoto itutio luiiis."
2Kings25:2 Kwaŋin kirigaut ere aitodol okar lokitomonet ka lodiopet loka eka baka Sedekia,"
2Kings25:3 Kapaaran nakikanyetekaonon naka elap kalokiwononet, kodedenar eteijei kore, komamikis eut ituŋa luka akwap inyamat."
2Kings25:4 Kosodete kotiyasi arorwa kore, kokera ikajiok kere kuare korot loka erute loejai kidin arwatatin aarei, loidunyas kemanikor loka ekabaka: (konye erimorito Ikaludean, asurokin ere iwaitin kere:) kitor ekabaka orot loka Araba."
2Kings25:5 Konye korukio ajore naka Ikaludean ekabaka, kodolokis ŋes kapuutona nuka Yeriko: kisiarakin aioreke kere aiial ŋes."
2Kings25:6 Kosodete kikamas ekabaka, koyaŋaasi neejai ekabaka loko Babulon Ribula; kotubokinai akiro,"
2Kings25:7 Koarakinai odwe luka Sedekia akonyeneke, kogorununoi Sedekia akonye, koenai kirikoi, koyanaarai Babulon."
2Kings25:8 Kosodi kolap kalokikanyet, kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei naka elap, ŋes ckaru lokitomonet kakanykaonon loka Nebukadenesar ekabaka loko Babulon, abu Nebusaradan ekapolon loka ikedarak, ekeiaanakinan loka ekabaka loko Babulon kobu Yerusalem:"
2Kings25:9 Kicwe etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka etogo loka ekabaka; itogoi ke re lukotoma Yerusalem, nolitogo kere loepol, kicweikin kakim."
2Kings25:10 Abu ajore kere naka Ikaludean luajaas kalokapolon loka ikedarak, kotiyatiya arwatatin nuka Yerusalem airiamar."
2Kings25:11 Aatoŋot naka ituŋa lukideuna kore, ka nul da lualunakina, lualuŋakina mama ejai ekabaka loko Babulon, ka aatoŋot naka ikeswamak, kiiorco Nebusaradan ekapolon loka ikedarak,"
2Kings25:12 Konye kitasal ekapolon loka ikedarak lukican noi kakwap araut iketemonokiuok emusabibu ka ikakoriok du.
2Kings25:13 Kobilibilata Ikaludean ipirin luka aisinin lukejaas togo loka EJAKAIT, ka aicegeria, ka aŋolol naka aisinit nukejaas togo loka EJAKAIT, koyaŋaasi aisininikee Babulon."
2Kings25:14 Koyanaasi amoti, ka initia, ka aitudeŋeta, ka akaalei, ka iboro kere luka aisinit lukijaanakiniata:"
2Kings25:15 Ka atiboka nuigaete ekurwon, ka atanyia; nukeraas nuka esabu, esabu, ka nukeraas nuka epuesa, epuesa, kwaŋin ayaŋaaria ekapolon loka ikedarak."
2Kings25:16 Ipirino iarei, ka aŋolol adiopet, ka aicegeria, lueswamakinit Solomon etogo loka EJAKAIT; aisinin nuka iboro kalu kere mam kepedorete ainiŋio."
2Kings25:17 Aoiau naka epir ediopet kerai ikubitin itomon ka lukanykauni, kejai akou naka aisinit kokujuke; aoiau naka akou adiopet ikubitin iuni; kolukunito iboyan ka akamamagan akou, kere luka aisinit: ekoni epir lokiareit nepenen kaswam naka iboyan."
2Kings25:18 Kosodi ekapolon loka ikedarak kikama Seraia esasedoti lopeti, ka Sepania esasedoti lokiareit, ka ikagolok luuni;"
2Kings25:19 Kikama kore ekapolokiton lokeyait ikaiiok; ka ituŋa ikany kaŋul lukeanyununete akonyen nuka ekabaka, lukedumunio kore; ka ekewadikan, ekapolon loka aiore, loaramununei ituŋa luka akwap; ka ituŋa akaisakanykape luka ituŋa luka akwap lukedumunio kore."
2Kings25:20 Kikama Nebusaradan ekapolon loka ikedarak kes, koyau mama ejai ekabaka loka Babulon Ribula."
2Kings25:21 Kodany ekabaka loko Babulon kes, koarak Ribula akwap naka Kamat. Kwaŋin kijoreoroi Yuda anyoun kakwapuke."
2Kings25:22 Ituŋa da luasalete kakwap naka Yuda, luabu Nebukadenesar kinyek, koinak ŋul Gedalia okoku loka Akikam, okoku loka Sapan araun ekayaitonikec."
2Kings25:23 Kepuputu ikapolok kere luka irioneta, kes ka ituŋakec, ebe, kitarau ekabaka loko Babulon Gedalia ekayaiton, kopotu mama ejai Gedalia Misipa, Isimael okoku loka Netania, ka Yokanan okoku loka Karea, ka Seraia okoku loka Tanumet Enetopatit, ka Yaasania okoku loka Emaakatit, kes ka ikecetuŋa."
2Kings25:24 Kiyapoik Gedalia kes ka ikeceruna, kotema kes atiar, “Sirikiyoŋa kanuka ikejaanakinak luka Ikaludean: kiboikinos akwap, kijaanakis ekabaka loko Babulon, iiaunete do ejok.”"
2Kings25:25 Konye kolap lokikanyetekaarei, kobu Isimael okoku loka Netania, okoku loka Elisama, loka aur naka ekabaka, ka ituŋa itomon nepepe kaŋes, kieuma Gedalia, kotwana, ka Iyudayan ka Ikaludean luajaas kaŋes Misipa,"
2Kings25:26 Konyout ituŋa kere, ludidik ka lukapolok ka ikapolok luka irioneta, kopotu Misiri; naarai kokuriakata Ikaludean."
2Kings25:27 Kosodi kanen okaru loka akaisauni ka lukanykaarei loka aenio naka Yekoiakin ekabaka loka Yuda, olap lokitomonet kaarei, kapaaran nakakaisaarei ka nukanykaarei naka elap, kitopoloo Ebil-merodak ekabaka loko Babulon akou naka Yekoiakin ekabaka loka Yuda, alemun kaidaris kokaru loageunia airum."
2Kings25:28 Kinera kaŋes nukasianut, kitopolo eicoloŋoke aitelekarit iicoloŋo luka ikabakan lukejaas kaŋes Babulon."
2Kings25:29 Kilocok inapeneke luka aidaris, konyamenenei inyamat kakonyeneke apaarasia kere nuka aiiarake."
2Kings25:30 Akorakineteke, abu ekabaka koinanak ŋes akorakinet ninipaaran, apaarasia kere nuka aiiarake,"

1Chronicles1:20 Yokutan kouri Alumodad, ka Selep, ka Kasarumabet, ka Yera;"

1Chronicles1:28 Odwe luka Aburaam; Isaak, ka Isimael."
1Chronicles1:29 Na ŋes auriokec: ekiyai loka Isimael, Nebaiot; kosodi Kedar, ka Adubeel, ka Mibusam,"
1Chronicles1:30 Misima, ka Duma, ka Masa; ka Kadad, ka Tema,"
1Chronicles1:31 Yetur, ka Napis, ka Kedema. Ŋul kes odwe luka Isimael."
1Chronicles1:32 Odwe luka Ketura, abusiat naka Aburaam: kouri ŋesi Simuran, ka Yokusan, ka Medan, ka Midian, ka Isibak, ka Sua. Odwe luka Yokusan; Seba ka Dedan."
1Chronicles1:33 Odwe luka Midian; Epa, ka Eper, ka Kanok, ka Abida, ka Eludaa. Ŋul kere kes odwe luka Ketura,"
1Chronicles1:34 Aburaam kouri Isaak. Odwe luka Isaak; Esau, ka Isirael."
1Chronicles1:35 Odwe luka Esau; Elipas, ka Reuel, ka Yeus, ka Yalam, ka Kora."
1Chronicles1:36 Odwe luka Elipas; Teman, ka Omar, ka Sepi, ka Gatam, ka Kenas ka Timuna ka Amalek."
1Chronicles1:37 Odwe luka Reuel; Nakat, ka Sera, ka Sama, ka Misa,"
1Chronicles1:38 Odwe luka Seir; Lotan ka Sobal, ka Sibeon, ka Ana, ka Dison, ka Eser ka Disan."
1Chronicles1:39 Odwe luka Lotan; Kori ka Komam: korai Timuna inacike ka Lotan.
1Chronicles1:40 Odwe luka Sobal; Alian ka Manakat ka Ebal, ka Sepi ka Onam, Odwe luka Sibeon; Aia ka Ana."
1Chronicles1:41 Odwe luka Ana; Dison. Odwe luka Dison; Kamuran ka Esaban ka Itiran ka Ceran.
1Chronicles1:42 Odwe luka Eser; Bilukan ka Saban, ka Yaakan. Odwe luka Disan; Us ka Aran."
1Chronicles1:43 Lu kes ikabakan luerumito akwap naka Edom, eroko ekabaka kere kiruma idwe luka Isirael: Bela okoku loka Beor; ekiror loka ereke ŋes Dinakaba,"

1Chronicles1:46 Kotwana Kusam, kirum Kadad okoku loka Bedad aiboisike, lokitoiie Midian komanikor loka Moab: ekiror loka ereke ŋes Abit."
1Chronicles1:47 Kotwana Kadad, kirum Samula loka Masereka aiboisike."
1Chronicles1:48 Kotwana Samula, kirum Saul loka Rekobot loedunyas ka Ecor aiboisike."
1Chronicles1:49 Kotwana Saul, kirum Baal-kanan okoku loka Acabor aiboisike."

1Chronicles2:4 Abu Tamar aberu naka okokuke kourik ŋes Peres ka Sera. Odwe kere luka Yuda emwaasi ikany.

1Chronicles2:15 Osem lokikanyetekape, Daudi lokikanyetekaarei:"

1Chronicles2:20 Kur kouri Uri, Uri kouri Besalel."
1Chronicles2:21 Kokau abu Kesuron koloma mama ejai akoku naka Makir papake ka Gilead; naamanyit ŋesi korai loka ikar akaisakanykape; ŋin da kourik ŋes Segub,"
1Chronicles2:22 Kouri Segub Yair, loaiaas kireria akaisaarei ka luuni kakwap naka Gilead."
1Chronicles2:23 Kodemasi Gesur ka Aram ireria luka Yair kamakec, ka Kenat, ka ireriake ludidik, kes ireria akaisakanykape. Ŋul kere kes odwe luka Makir papake ka Gilead,"
1Chronicles2:24 Kedau Kesuron atwanikin Kaleb-epurata, kosodi kourik Abiya aberu naka Kesuron ŋes Asur papa loka Tekoa,"

1Chronicles2:26 Keiai Yerameel aceberu, ekekiror Atara; ŋin ŋes toto naka Onam,"

1Chronicles2:28 Odwe luka Onam Samai, ka Yada; odwe luka Samai: Nadab ka Abisur."
1Chronicles2:29 Ekiror loka aberu naka Abisur Abikail; kourik ŋes Aban ka Molid,"
1Chronicles2:30 Odwe luka Nadab; Seled, ka Apaim: konye kotwana Seled komameete idwe,"
1Chronicles2:31 Odwe luka Apaim; Isi. Odwe luka Isi; Sesan, Odwe luka Sesan; Alai."
1Chronicles2:32 Odwe luka Yada onaee loka Samai; Yeter, ka Yonatan; kotwana Yeter komameete idwe."
1Chronicles2:33 Odwe luka Yonatan; Pelet, ka Sasa, Ŋul kes odwe luka Yerameel."
1Chronicles2:34 Amameete Sesan idwe lusap konye lupesur, Ajai Sesan ebulesit, Emisiriat, ekekiror Yara."

1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa kouri Sisimai, Sisimai kouri Salum;"
1Chronicles2:41 Salum kouri Yekamia, Yekamia kouri Elisama."

1Chronicles2:43 Odwe luka Keburon; Kora, ka Tapua, ka Rekem, ka Sema."
1Chronicles2:44 Sema kouri Rakam, papa loka Yorukeam; Rekem kouri Samai."

1Chronicles2:46 Epa, abusiat naka Kaleb, kouri Karan, ka Mosa, ka Gases: Karan kouri Gases,"
1Chronicles2:47 Odwe luka Yadai; Regem, ka Yotam, ka Gesan, ka Pelet, ka Epa, ka Saap."
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka, abusiat naka Kaleb, kouri Seber ka Tirukana."
1Chronicles2:49 Kouri ŋin da Saap papa loka Madamana, Seba papa loka Makubena, ka papa loka Gibea; akoku naka Kaleb ŋes Akisa."

1Chronicles3:1 Lu kes odwe luka Daudi luaponi kourikinai ŋes koKeburon: Aminon ekiyaike loka Akinoam Ayesereelit; lokiareit, Daniel, loka Abigail Akaramelit;"

1Chronicles3:4 Aponi kourikinai ŋes ikanykape koKeburon; kirumak kaŋina ikar ikanykaarei ka ilapio ikanykape; kirumak ko Yerusalem ikar akaisauni ka luuni.

1Chronicles4:1 Odwe luka Yuda; Peres, Kesuron, ka Karumi, ka Kur, ka Soba!’"
1Chronicles4:2 Reaia okoku loka Sobal kouri Yakat; Yakat kouri Akumai ka Lakad. Ŋul kes ikekia luka Isoratin.
1Chronicles4:3 Lu kes luka papa laka Etam; Yesereel, ka Isima, ka Idibas: ekiror loka inacikee Kaseleleponi:"
1Chronicles4:4 ka Penuel papa loka Gedor, ka Eser papa loka Kusa. Ŋul kes odwe luka Kur, ekiyai loka Epurata, papa loka Bet-lekem."
1Chronicles4:5 Ajaas Asur papa loka Tekoa aŋor aarei, Kela ka Naara,"
1Chronicles4:6 Kourik Naara ŋes Akusam, ka Keper, ka Temeni, ka Kaaka-sitari, Ŋul kes odwe luka Naara."
1Chronicles4:7 Odwe luka Kela Seret, ka Isar, ka Etinan."
1Chronicles4:8 Kakos kouri Anub, ka Sobeba, ka ikekia luka Akarel okoku loka Karum."
1Chronicles4:9 Kitopolooritete Yabes aitelekarit iinaeanake: komaik totoke ekekiror Yabes ebe, “Naarai kedou ŋes kaiturur.”"
1Chronicles4:10 Kiwone Yabes Edeke loka Isirael ebe, “Wu okwe arai kisireren ijo eoŋ kabeit, kitalal eikoruka, koiaenena akanikon keoŋ, kidar eoŋ karonis, komam eyauni aiturur mamakan!” Kocam Edeke nuabu ŋesi kilip."
1Chronicles4:11 Kelub onaee loka Suka kouri Mekir, loarai papa loka Esiton."
1Chronicles4:12 Esiton kouri Bet-rapa, ka Pasea, ka Tekina papa loka Ir-nakas. Ŋul kes ituŋa luka Reka."
1Chronicles4:13 Odwe luka Kenas; Otiniel, ka Seraia: odwe luka Otiniel; Katat."
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai kouri Opura: Seraia kouri Yoab papa loka Ge-karasim; naarai keraas ikeswamak luepiriaka.
1Chronicles4:15 Odwe luka Kaleb okoku loka Yepune; lru, ka Ela, ka Naam: odwe luka Ela; Kenas."
1Chronicles4:16 Odwe luka Yekalelel; Sip, ka Sipa, ka Tiria, ka, Asarel."
1Chronicles4:17 Odwe luka Esera; Yeter, ka Mered, ka Eper, ka Yalon: kouri ŋin Miriam, ka Samai, ka Isiba papa loka Esitemoa."
1Chronicles4:18 Akeberu Ayudayat kouri Yered papa loka Gedor, ka Keber papa loka Soko, ka Yekutiel papa loka Sanoa. Ŋul kes odwe luka Bitia akoku naka Parao, naamanyit Mered."
1Chronicles4:19 Odwe luka aberu naka Kodia, kinaci naka Nakam, kes lukapapa luka Keila Egarumit, ka Esitemoa Emaakatit."
1Chronicles4:20 Odwe luka Simon; Aminon, ka Rina, ka Ben-kanan, ka Tilon. Odwe luka Isi; Soket, ka Ben-soket,"
1Chronicles4:21 Odwe luka Sela okoku loka Yuda; Er papa loka Leka, ka Laada papa loka Maresa, ka ikekia luka etogo loka nul kalukesonyete ebaputa loejok, luka etogo loka Asibea;"
1Chronicles4:22 ka Yokim, ka ituŋa luka Koseba, ka Yoas, ka Sarap, loapolokinit Moab, ka Yasubi-lekem. Ido akiro ŋun eraas nuno,"
1Chronicles4:23 ŋul kes ikajeak amoti, ka lueboiete koNetaim ka Gedera: kiboioto kaŋina nepepe kekabaka kanuka akeswam."
1Chronicles4:24 Odwe luka Simeon; Nemuel, ka Yamin, ka Yarib, ka Sera, ka Saul:"
1Chronicles4:25 Salum okokuke, Mibisam okokuke, Misima okokuke."
1Chronicles4:26 Odwe luka Misima; Kamuel okokuke, Sakur okokuke, Simei okokuke:"
1Chronicles4:27 Kejaas Simci idwe lusap itomon ka lukanykape, ka lupesur akanykape; konye amameete iinacanake idwe luipu, kwabo mam kiyatakina ekekikee, kwape idwe luka Yuda."
1Chronicles4:28 Kiboioto kesi Beer-seba, ka Molada, ka Kasar-sual;"
1Chronicles4:29 koBilika da, ka Esem, ka Tolad;"
1Chronicles4:30 koBetuel da, ka Koruma, ka Sikilag;"
1Chronicles4:31 koBet-marakabot, ka Kasar-susim, ka Bet-biri, ka Saaraim, ŋul kes ireriakec kiton airum naka Daudi."
1Chronicles4:32 Ireriakee ludidik kes Etam, ka Ain, ka Rimon, ka Token, ka Asan, ireria ikany:"
1Chronicles4:33 ka ireriakee ludidik kere luerimorito ireria ŋu! kiton Baal. Ŋun kes aiboisiokec, ejaas kes aurikee."
1Chronicles4:34 Mesobab, ka Yamulek, ka Yosa okoku loka Amasia;"
1Chronicles4:35 ka Yoel, ka Yeku okoku loka Yosibia, okoku loka Seraia, okoku loka Asiel;"
1Chronicles4:36 ka Elioenai, ka Yaakoba, ka Yesokaia, ka Asaia, ka Adiel, ka Yesimiel, ka Benaia;"
1Chronicles4:37 ka Sisa okoku loka Sipi, okoku loka Alon, okoku loka Yedaia, okoku loka Simiri, okoku loka Semaia;"
1Chronicles4:38 Ŋullualimor ikeeekiroria kes ikapolok luka ikekiakee: kiyatakinos noi itogoi luka lukapapaakec.
1Chronicles4:39 Koloto kiton nealomarere Gedor, kiton ari nakokide naka aditot, amoote inya luka isipaninikec."
1Chronicles4:40 Kodumut inya luelibito ejok, kolal akwap kiyamakina, kinapakina da; naarai lueboioto kaŋina apeŋo keraas luka Kam."
1Chronicles4:41 Ŋul da luewadikao ikiroria apote kapaarasia nuka Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda, komunaasi iwemanakec, ka Imeunim luadumunos kaŋina, komudiasi kes eut, kiton lolo, kiboikinos aiboisikec: naarai ajaas inya kaŋina luka isipaninikec."
1Chronicles4:42 Ice kakesi, kes odwe luka Simeon, ituŋa akwat akany, koloto moru Seir, ikapolokitokokee kes Pelatia, ka Nearia, ka Repaia, ka Usi el, odwe luka Isi."
1Chronicles4:43 Kodanyata lukideunos luka Imalekain luakuete, kiboikinos do nina, kiton lolo."
1Chronicles5:1 Odwe luka Reuben ekiyai loka Isirael (Naarai kerai ŋesi ekiyai: konye naarai abu komunaa aperit naka papake, aponi koinakinai odwe luka Yosep okoku loka Isirael apolouke; mam auri emarakinitai kwape kejaar apolou."
1Chronicles5:2 Naarai abu Yuda kiteleka iinacanake, kotomaken ŋes alomunia ekapolon; konye apolou kerai naka Yosep):"
1Chronicles5:3 Odwe luka Reuben ekiyai loka Isirael; Kanok, ka Palu, ka Kesuron, ka Karumi."
1Chronicles5:4 Odwe luka Yoel; Semaia okokuke, Gog okokuke, Simei okokuke;"
1Chronicles5:5 Mika okokuke, Reaia okokuke, Baal okokuke;"
1Chronicles5:6 Beera okokuke, loabu Tiligat-pilineser ekabaka loka Asuria kijoreo: kerai ŋesi ekapolon loka Ireubin."
1Chronicles5:7 Iinacanake kokekiakec, kwapc emarere aur naka aturiokec; ejakait, Yeiel, ka Sekaria,"
1Chronicles5:8 ka Bela okoku loka Asas, okoku loka Sema, okoku loka Yoel, loeboie koAroer, kiton Nebo ka Baal-meon:"
1Chronicles5:9 kari nakokide kiboie kiton neelomarere amodiŋ anyoun kocor Eupurat: naarai kiyatakinos ibarenekec kakwap naka Gilead.
1Chronicles5:10 Kapaarasia nuka Sau! kitijioto Ikagarin, luaario kakaninikec: kiboioto kowemanakec anatar akwap kere kari nakokide naka Gilead."
1Chronicles5:11 Kiboioto odwe luka Gad eiduny kakes, kakwap naka Basan kiton Saleka:"
1Chronicles5:12 Yoel ejakait, ka Sapam lokiareit, ka Yanai, ka Sapat koBasan:"
1Chronicles5:13 ka iinacanakec luka ikekia luka lukapapaakec; Mikael, ka Mesulam, ka Seba, ka Yorai, ka Yakan, ka Sia, ka Eber, ikanykaarei."
1Chronicles5:14 Ŋul kes odwe luka Abikail, okoku loka Kuri, okoku loka Yaroa, okoku loka Gilead, okoku loka Mikael, okoku loka Yesisai, okoku loka Yado, okoku loka Bus:"
1Chronicles5:15 Aki okoku loka Abudiel, okoku loka Guni, ejakait loka ikekia luka lukapapaakec,"
1Chronicles5:16 Kiboioto kesi koGilead koBasan, koreriake, koronyia kere luka Saron, kiton oikorunokec."
1Chronicles5:17 Ŋul kere kimarunos kwape ajaar auriokee, kapaarasia nuka Yotam ekabaka loka Yuda, kapaarasia da nuka Yeroboam ekabaka loka Isirael."
1Chronicles5:18 Odwe luka Reuben, ka Igadin, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase, ituŋa luetitin, iruna luepedorete aidak ebuku ka ekileŋ, ka aigum kakabwa, luepiriaka ejie, emwaasi ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka luonon, ka akwat akanykaarei ka akaisakanykape, luepedorete alosit oiie,"
1Chronicles5:19 Kitiiioto Ikagurin, ka Yetur, ka Napis, ka Nodab."
1Chronicles5:20 Aponi kiŋarakinai asurokin kes, kijaikinai Ikagurin akanikee, ka luajaas kakes kere: naarai apotu komonyata mama ejai Edeke kojie, kiyu ainainakec; naarai apotu komunokinos ŋes."
1Chronicles5:21 Konatasi ibarenekec; akaalaikec ilukumin akaisakany, amerekekin ilukumin akwat aarei ka ilukumin akaisakany, asigirian ilukumin iarei, ka ituŋa ilukumin akwatat,"
1Chronicles5:22 Naarai apotu kibiroros luaaritai luipu, naarai kerai ejie loka Edeke. Kiboikinos aiboisikec aitodol neeioreorere."
1Chronicles5:23 Kiboioto idwe luka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase kakwap: kiyatakinos kesi anyoun koBasan kiton Baal-kerumon ka Senir ka emoru Kerumon.
1Chronicles5:24 Lu kesi ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee; Eper, ka Isi, ka Eliel, ka Asuriel, ka Yeremia, ka Kodabia, ka Yadiel, ituŋa lukirigin luetitin, lukodwaratau, ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakec."
1Chronicles5:25 Apotu kodiakasi kama ejai Edeke loka lukapapaakee, koloto eporo odekesio luka ituŋa luka akwap, luabu Edeke komudia kakonyenekec."
1Chronicles5:26 Kisidik Edeke loka Isirael emoyo loka Pul ekabaka loka Asuria, ka emoyo loka Tiligat-pilineser ekabaka loka Asuria, kijoreo kes, Ireubin ka Igadin, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase, koyau kes Kala, ka Kabor, ka Kara, kiton ocor loka Gosan, kiton lolo."
1Chronicles6:1 Odwe luka Lebi; Gereson, ka Kokat, ka Merari."
1Chronicles6:2 Odwe luka Kokat; Amuram, ka Isar, ka Keburon, ka Usiel."
1Chronicles6:3 Odwe luka Amuram; Aaron, ka Musa, ka Miriam. Odwe luka Aaron; Nadab ka Abiku, ka Eleasar ka Itamar,"
1Chronicles6:4 Eleasar kouri Pinekas, Pinekas kouri Abisua;"
1Chronicles6:5 Abisua kouri Buki, Buki kouri Usi;"
1Chronicles6:6 Usi kouri Serakia, Serakia kouri Meraiot;"
1Chronicles6:7 Meraiot kouri Amaria, Amaria kouri Akitub;"
1Chronicles6:8 Akitub kouri Sadok, Sadok kouri Akimaas;"
1Chronicles6:9 Akimaas kouri Asaria, Asaria kouri Yokanan;"
1Chronicles6:10 Yokanan kouri Asaria (ŋes ŋol lokerai esasedoti kotogo loadukokinit Solomon Yerusalem):
1Chronicles6:11 Asaria kouri Amaria; Amaria kouri Akitub;
1Chronicles6:12 Akitub kouri Sadok, Sadok kouri Salum;"
1Chronicles6:13 Salum kouri Kilikia, Kilikia kouri Asaria;"
1Chronicles6:14 Asaria kouri Seraia, Seraia kouri Yekosadek;"
1Chronicles6:15 Aponi Yekosadak kiioreoroi, naayanaria EJAKAIT Yuda ka Yerusalem kakan naka Nebukadenesar."
1Chronicles6:16 Odwe luka Lebi; Geresom, ka Kokat, ka Merari."
1Chronicles6:17 Lu kes ikiroria luka odwe luka Geresom; Libuni ka Simei.
1Chronicles6:18 Odwe luka Kokat kes Amuram, ka Isar, ka Keburon ka Usiel."
1Chronicles6:19 Odwe luka Merari; Mali ka Musi, ŋul kes ikalia luka Ilebin kwape ejaatar ikekia luka lukapapaakec."
1Chronicles6:20 Luka Geresom; Libuni okokuke, Yakat okokuke, Sima okokuke;"
1Chronicles6:21 Yoa okokuke, Ido okokuke, Sera okokuke, Yeaterai okokuke."
1Chronicles6:22 Odwe luka Kokat; Aminadab okokuke, Kora okokuke, Asir okokuke;"
1Chronicles6:23 Elukana okokuke, ka Ebiasap okokuke, ka Asir okokuke;"
1Chronicles6:24 Takat okokuke, Uriel okokuke, Usia okokuke, ka Saul okokuke."
1Chronicles6:25 Odwe luka Elukana; Amasai, ka Akilnot."
1Chronicles6:26 Luka Elukana: odwe luka Elukana; Sopai okokuke, ka Nakat okokuke;"
1Chronicles6:27 Eliab okokuke, Yerokam okokuke, Elukana okokuke."
1Chronicles6:28 Odwe luka Samuel; Yoel ekiyaike, kii Abiya lokiareit."
1Chronicles6:29 Odwe luka Merari; Mali, Libuni okokuke, Simei okokuke, Usa okokuke;"
1Chronicles6:30 Simea okokuke, Kagia okokllke, Asaia okokuke."
1Chronicles6:31 Lu kes luabu Daudi kitopoloo aijaanakin naka ayoore togo loka EJAKAIT, kedau asaduku aibworar."
1Chronicles6:32 Kijaanakis kayoore koiijaren kewema lokalaunan loka ewema loka airiamunun, aitodol neadukokinia Solomon etogo loka EJAKAIT Yerusalem, kidarata aswamukec kwape ajaar abeanakinikec."
1Chronicles6:33 Lu kes luedarenenete, ka odwekec. Luka odwe luka Ikokatin: Keman ekayoon, okoku loka Yoel, okoku loka Samuel;"
1Chronicles6:34 Okoku loka Elukana, okoku loka Yerokam, okoku loka Eliel, okoku loka Toa;"
1Chronicles6:35 Okoku loka Sup, okoku loka Elukana, okoku loka Makat, okoku loka Amasai;"
1Chronicles6:36 Okoku loka Elukana, okoku loka Yoel, okoku loka Asaria, okoku loka Sepania;"
1Chronicles6:37 Okoku loka Takat, okoku loka Asir, okoku loka Ebiasap, okoku loka Kora;"
1Chronicles6:38 Okoku loka Isar, okoku loka Kokat, okoku loka Lebi, okoku loka Isirael."
1Chronicles6:39 Ka onaeeke Asap loabwoenenei kakanike nakoteten, ŋes Asap okoku loka Berekia, okoku loka Simea;"
1Chronicles6:40 Okoku loka Mikael, okoku loka Baaseia, okoku loka Malikiya;"
1Chronicles6:41 Okoku loka Etini, okoku loka Sera, okoku loka Adaia;"
1Chronicles6:42 Okoku loka Etan, okoku loka Sima, okoku loka Simei;"
1Chronicles6:43 Okoku loka Yakat, okoku loka Geresom, okoku loka Lebi."
1Chronicles6:44 Kakan nakokediany iinacanakec odwe luka Merari: Etan okoku loka Kisi, okoku loka Abidi, okoku loka Maluk;"
1Chronicles6:45 Okoku loka Kasabia, okoku loka Amasia, okoku loka Kilikia;"
1Chronicles6:46 Okoku loka Amisi, okoku loka Bani, okoku loka Semer;"
1Chronicles6:47 Okoku loka Mali, okoku loka Musi, okoku loka Merari, okoku loka Lebi."
1Chronicles6:48 Aponi koseunai Ilebin iinaeanakec kanuka aijaanakin kere naka ewema lokalaunan loka etogo loka Edeke.
1Chronicles6:49 Konye apotu Aaron ka odweke koinanakinete kotem loka ainakineta nuiewcio, kotem da loka lukisupurununo, aswam kere naka aibois nakalaunan noi, aitulue Isirael, kwape ajaatar kere nuabu Musa ekeiaanakinan loka Edeke kicorak."
1Chronicles6:50 Lu kes odwe luka Aaron; Eleasar okokuke, Pinekas okokuke, Abisua okokuke;"
1Chronicles6:51 Buki okokuke, Usi okokuke, Serakia okokuke;"
1Chronicles6:52 Meraiot okokuke, Amaria okokuke, Akitub okokuke;"
1Chronicles6:53 Sadok okokuke, Akimaas okokuke."
1Chronicles6:54 Nu kes aiboisiokec kwape ajaatar iidukurunokec koikorunokec: mama ejaas odwe luka Aaron, luka ikekia luka Ikokatin, naarai lokee eroet losodit."
1Chronicles6:55 Apotu koinakis kes Keburon kakwap naka Yuda, ka ironyia lualukunito ŋes;"
1Chronicles6:56 Konye apotu koinakis Kaleb okoku loka Yepune imanikoria luka ere, ka ireriake ludidik."
1Chronicles6:57 Apotu koinakis odwe luka Aaron iretia luekuianarete, Keburon; Libuna ka ironyiake, ka Yatir, ka Esitemoa ka ironyiake;"
1Chronicles6:58 Ka Kilen ka ironyiake, Debir ka ironyiake;"
1Chronicles6:59 Asan ka ironyiake, ka Bet-semes ka ironyiake:"
1Chronicles6:60 Kateker naka Benyamin; Geba ka ironyiake, ka Alemet ka ironyiake, ka Anatot ka ironyiake, Ireriakee kere anatar ikekiakec emwaasi ireria itomon ka luuni."
1Chronicles6:61 Aponi koinakinai luedeuna luka odwe luka Kokat koroet, kokek loka ateker, katutubet naka ateker, atutubet naka Manase, ireria itomon."
1Chronicles6:62 Mama ejaas odwe luka Geresom, kwape ajaatar ikekiakec, kateker naka Isakar, kateker naka Aser, kateker naka Naputali, kateker da naka Manase koBasan, ireria itomon ka luuni."
1Chronicles6:63 Aponi koinakinai odwe luka Merari koroet, kwape ajaatar ikekiakec, kateker naka Reuben, kateker naka Gad, kateker naka Sebulun, ireria itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles6:64 Apotu idwe luka Isirael koinakis Ilebin ireria ka ironyiakec,"
1Chronicles6:65 Apotu kesi koinakis koroet kateker naka idwe luka Yuda, kateker naka idwe luka Simeon, kateker naka idwe luka Benyamin, ireria ŋul luebilitai ikiroriakec."
1Chronicles6:66 Ice kokekia luka odwe luka Kokat ajaas ireria luka iikorunokec kateker naka Epuraim.
1Chronicles6:67 Koinakis kes ireria luekuianarete, Sekem kakwap nakiukon naka Epuraim ka ironyiake; Geser da ka ironyiake;"
1Chronicles6:68 ka Yokumeam ka ironyiake, ka Bet-koron ka ironyiake;"
1Chronicles6:69 ka Aiyalon ka ironyiake, ka Gat-rimon ka ironyiake:"
1Chronicles6:70 Katutubet naka ateker naka Manase; Aner ka ironyiake, ka Bileam ka ironyiake, kanuka luedeuna lukokek loka odwe luka Kokat."
1Chronicles6:71 Mama ejaas odwe luka Geresom, kokek loka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase, Golan koBasan ka ironyiake, ka Asitarot ka ironyiake:"
1Chronicles6:72 Kateker naka Isakar; Kedes ka ironyiake, Daberat ka ironyiake;"
1Chronicles6:73 Ramot ka ironyiake, ka Anem ka ironyiake;"
1Chronicles6:74 Kateker naka Aser; Masal ka ironyiake, ka Abudon ka ironyiake;"
1Chronicles6:75 ka Kukok ka ironyiake, ka Rekob ka ironyiake;"
1Chronicles6:76 Kateker naka Naputali; Kedes koGalilaya ka ironyiake, ka Kamon ka ironyiake, ka Kiriataim ka ironyiake."
1Chronicles6:77 Mama ejaas luedeuna luka Ilebin, odwe luka Merari, kateker naka Sebulun, Rimono ka ironyiake, Tabor ka ironyiake:"
1Chronicles6:78 Okekwa Yorodan koYeriko, ari nakokide naka Yorodan, kateker naka Reuben, Beser kamodiŋ ka ironyiake, ka Yasar ka ironyiake;"
1Chronicles6:79 ka Kedemot ka ironyiake, ka Mepaat ka ironyiake:"
1Chronicles6:80 Kateker naka Gad; Ramot koGilead ka ironyiake, ka Makanaim ka ironyiake,"
1Chronicles6:81 ka Kesibon ka ironyiake, ka Yeser ka ironyiake."
1Chronicles7:1 Odwe luka Isakar; Tola, ka Pua, ka Yasub, ka Simuron, iwonon."
1Chronicles7:2 Odwe luka Tola; Usi, ka Repaia, ka Yeriel, ka Yamai, ka Ibusam, ka Semuel, ikapolokitok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakec, kes luka Tola; ituŋa lukirigin Iuetitin katuriokec: etiaikec kapaarasia nuka Daudi emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luarei ka akwat akanykape."
1Chronicles7:3 Odwe luka Usi; Isirakia: odwe luka Isirakia; Mikael, ka Obadia, ka Yoel, ka Isia, ikany: kes kere ituŋa lukapolok."
1Chronicles7:4 Kojaas nepepe kakes, katuriokec, kwape ajaatar ikekia luka lukapapaakee, irioneta luka ajore ejie, ilukumin akaisauni ka ilukumin ikanykapc; naarai ajaas kes aŋor ka isap luipu."
1Chronicles7:5 Iinaeanakec kokekia kere luka Isakar, ituŋa lukirigin luetitin, kimarai kakere kauriokec, emwaasi ilukumin akaisakanykauni ka ilukumin ikanykaarei."
1Chronicles7:6 Odwe luka Benyamin: Bela, ka Beker, ka Yediael, iuni."
1Chronicles7:7 Odwe luka Bela; Esibon, ka Usi, ka Usiel, ka Yerimot, ka Iri, ikany; ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaa, ituŋa lukirigin Iuetitiŋ; aponi kimarai kauriokee ilukumin akaisaarei ka luarei ka akais auni ka luonon."
1Chronicles7:8 Odwe luka Beker; Semira, ka Yoas, ka Elieser, ka Elioenai, ka Omiri, ka Yerimot, ka Abiya, ka Anatot, ka Alemet, Ŋul kere kes odwe luka Beker."
1Chronicles7:9 Aponi kimarai kaurikec, kwape ajaatar aturiokec, ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakec, ituŋa lukirigin luetitin, ilukumin akaisaarei ka akwat aarei."
1Chronicles7:10 Odwe luka Yediael; Bilikan: odwe luka Bilikan; Yeus, ka Benyamin, ka Ekud, ka Kenaana, ka Setan, ka Tarusis, ka Akisakar."
1Chronicles7:11 Ŋul kere kes odwe luka Yediael, kwape ajaatar ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee, ituŋa lukirigin luetitiŋ, ilukumin itomon ka lukanykaarei ka akwat aarei, luapcdorete alosit kaiore oiie."
1Chronicles7:12 Supim da, ka Kupim, odwe luka Ir, Kusim, odwe luka Aker,"
1Chronicles7:13 Odwe luka Naputali; Yasiel, ka Guni, ka Yeser, ka Salum, odwe luka Bilika."
1Chronicles7:14 Odwe luka Manase; Asuriel loaurikinit akeberu ŋes: (abu abusiatake naAramit kouri Makir papa loka Gilead:
1Chronicles7:15 Komany Makir aberu nako Kupim ka Supim, ekiror loka inacike ŋes Maaka); ekiror loka lokiareit Selopekad: ajaas Selopekad adwe."
1Chronicles7:16 Kouri Maaka aberu naka Makir okoku, komaik ekekiror Peres; ekiror loka onaceke Seres; odweke Ulam ka Rakem,"
1Chronicles7:17 Odwe luka Ulam; Bedan, Ŋul kes odwe luka Gilead okoku loka Makir, okoku loka Manase."
1Chronicles7:18 Abu kinacike Kamolekat kouri Isikod, ka Abieser, ka Mala,"
1Chronicles7:19 Odwe luka Semida kes Akian, ka Sekem, ka Liki, ka Aniam."
1Chronicles7:20 Odwe luka Epuralm; Sutela, ka Bered okokuke, ka Takat okokuke, ka Eleada okokuke, ka Takat okokuke,"
1Chronicles7:21 ka Sabad okokuke, ka Sutela okokuke, ka Eser, ka Elead, luapotu ituŋa luka Gat luaurikinio kakwap koarata, naarai apo tu kojesaros ademar ibarenekec."
1Chronicles7:22 Kibworo Epuraim papakee apaarasia nuipu, kopotu ikeinacan aipudun ŋes,"
1Chronicles7:23 Koloma mama ejai akeberu, kopotuu ŋesi, kouri ikoku, komaik ekekiror Beria, naarai ajaas karonis togokec,"
1Chronicles7:24 Akokuke ŋes Seera, naabu koduk Bet-koron nakaiesa ka nakamukurat, ka Usen-seera,"
1Chronicles7:25 Okokuke ŋes Repa, ka Resep, ka Tela okokuke, ka Takan okokuke;"
1Chronicles7:26 Ladan okokuke, Amikud okokuke, Elisama okokuke;"
1Chronicles7:27 Nun okokuke, Yosua okokuke."
1Chronicles7:28 Ikeceboro ka aiboisiokec kes Betel ka ireriake, Naaran kari nakokide, Geser, ka ireriake koto; Sekem da ka ireriake, kiton Asa ka ireriake:"
1Chronicles7:29 Eiduny kiikoruno luka odwe luka Manase, Bet-sean ka ireriake, Taanak ka ireriake, Megido ka ireriake, Dor ka ireriake. Kiboikinos odwe luka Yosep okoku loka Isirael oreria ŋul."
1Chronicles7:30 Odwe luka Aser; Imina, ka Isiba, ka Isibi, ka Beria, ka Sera kinacikec,"
1Chronicles7:31 Odwe luka Beria; Keber, ka Malukie!, lokerai papa loka Birisait."
1Chronicles7:32 Keber kouri Yapelet, ka Somer, ka Kotam, ka Sua kinacikee."
1Chronicles7:33 Odwe luka Yapelet; Pasak, ka Bimikal, ka Asubat. Ŋul kes odwe luka Yapelet."
1Chronicles7:34 Odwe luka Semer; Aki, ka Roga, ka Yekuba, ka Aram,"
1Chronicles7:35 Odwe luka Kelem onaceke; Sopa, ka Imina, ka Seles, ka Ama!’"
1Chronicles7:36 Odwe luka Sopa; Sua, ka Karuneper, ka Sual, ka Beri, ka Imira;"
1Chronicles7:37 Beser, ka Kod, ka Sama, ka Silisa, ka Itiran, ka Beera."
1Chronicles7:38 Odwe luka Yeter; Yepune, ka Pisipa, ka Ara."
1Chronicles7:39 Odwe luka Ula; Ara, ka Kaniel, ka Risia."
1Chronicles7:40 Ŋul kere kes odwe luka Aser, ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee, ituŋa lukeseunitai lukirigin Iuetitin, ikapolok luka ikapolok. Kimarai etiaikee kaurikee aijaanakin oiie emwaasi ituŋa ilukumin akaisaarei ka ilukumin ikanykape."

1Chronicles8:14 ka Akio, ka Sasak, ka Yeremot;"

1Chronicles8:24 ka Kanania, ka Elam, ka Anatotiya;"
1Chronicles8:25 ka Ipideia, ka Penuel, odwe luka Sasak;"
1Chronicles8:26 ka Samuserai, ka Sekaria, ka Atalia;"
1Chronicles8:27 ka Yaaresia, ka Eliya, ka Sikiri, odwe luka Yerokam."
1Chronicles8:28 Ŋul kes ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakec anatar aturiokee, ikapolok; eboienencte nul ko Yerusalem."
1Chronicles8:29 Kiboie Yeiel papa loka Gibcon koGibeon, ekiror loka akeberu Maaka;"
1Chronicles8:30 Okokuke lokiyai Abudon, ka Sur, ka Kis, ka Baal, ka Nadab;"
1Chronicles8:31 ka Gedor, ka Akio, ka Seker,"
1Chronicles8:32 Mikilot kouri Simea. Ŋul da kiboicnenete kiinaeanakee koYerusalem, eiduny kiinacanakec,"
1Chronicles8:33 Ner kouri Kis; Kis kouri Saul; Saul kouri Yonatan, ka Malikisua, ka Abinadab, ka Es-baal,"
1Chronicles8:34 Okoku loka Yonatan ŋes Merib-baal; Merib-baal kouri Mika,"
1Chronicles8:35 Odwe luka Mika; Piton, ka Melek, ka Tarea, ka Akas."
1Chronicles8:36 Akas kouri Yekoada; Yekoada kouri Alemet, ka Asamabet, ka Simiri; Simiri kouri Mosa:"
1Chronicles8:37 Mosa kouri Binea; Rapa ŋes okokuke, Eleasa okokuke, Asel okokuke:"
1Chronicles8:38 Keiaas Asel odwe ikanykape, lu kes ikiroriakee; Asirikam, ka Bokeru, ka Isimael, ka Searia, ka Obadia, ka Kanan, Ŋul kere odwe luka Asel."
1Chronicles8:39 Odwe luka Esek onaeeke; Ulam ekiyaike, Yeus lokiareit, ka Elipelet lokiwuniet."
1Chronicles8:40 Keraas odwe luka Ulam ituŋa lukirigin luetitin, ikagumak imalia, kejaas odwe luipu, ka odwe luka odwe, akwatat ka akaisakany. Ŋul kere odwe luka Benyamin."
1Chronicles9:1 Kwaŋin aponi kimarai Isirael kere kwape ajaar auriokee; ido koany iwadikatai oitabo loka ikabakan luka Isirael; kijoreoroi Yuda Babulon kanuka adiakarikee.
1Chronicles9:2 Luageete aiboikin airumetakee, oreriakee kes lu, Isirael, isasedotin, Ilebin, ka Inetinim,"
1Chronicles9:3 Kibojete ko Yerusalem lukodwe luka Yuda, ka lukodwe luka Benyamin, ka lukodwe luka Epuraim ka Manase;"
1Chronicles9:4 Utai okoku loka Amikud, okoku loka Omiri, okoku loka Imiri, okoku loka Bani, Iokodwe luka Peres okoku loka Yuda,"
1Chronicles9:5 Luka Isilonin; Asaia ekiyaike, ka odweke."
1Chronicles9:6 Lukodwe luka Sera; Yeuel, ka iinaeanakee, akwat akanykape ka akaisakanykaoŋon,"
1Chronicles9:7 Lukodwe luka Benyamin; Salu okoku loka Mesulam, okoku loka Kodabia, okoku loka Kasenua;"
1Chronicles9:8 ka Ibuneia okoku loka Yerokam, ka Ela okoku loka Usi, okoku loka Mikiri, ka Mesulam okoku loka Sepatia, okoku loka Reuel, okoku loka Ibiniya;"
1Chronicles9:9 ka iinacanakec, kwape ajaatar aturiokee, akwat akanykaoŋon ka akaisakany ka lukanykape. Ituŋa ŋul kere kes ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee kwape ajaatar ikekia luka lukapapaakec."
1Chronicles9:10 Lukosasedotin; Yedaia, ka Yekoi-arib, ka Yakin;"
1Chronicles9:11 ka Asaria okoku loka Kilikia, okoku loka Mesulam, okoku loka Sadok, okoku loka Meraiot, okoku loka Akitub, ekapolokiton etogo loka Edeke;"
1Chronicles9:12 ka Adaia okoku loka Yerokam, okoku loka Pasur, okoku loka Malikiya, ka Maasai okoku loka Adiel, okoku loka Yasera, okoku loka Mesulam, okoku loka Mesilemit, okoku loka Imer;"
1Chronicles9:13 ka iinaeanakec, ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee, elukumit ka akwat akanykaarei ka akaisakanykapc; ituŋa lukapedor noi aswam aijaanakin naka etogo loka Edeke."
1Chronicles9:14 Luka Ilebin; Semaia okoku loka Kasub, okoku loka Asirikam, okoku loka Kasabia, lokodwe luka Merari;"
1Chronicles9:15 ka Bakabakar, Keres, ka Galal, ka Matania okoku loka Mika, okoku loka Sikiri, okoku loka Asap;"
1Chronicles9:16 ka Obadia okoku loka Semaia, okoku loka Galal, okoku loka Yedutun, ka Berekia okoku loka Asa, okoku loka Elukana, lueboienenete koreria ludidik luka Inetopatin."
1Chronicles9:17 Ka ikagolok; Salum, ka Akub, ka Talumon, ka Akiman, ka iinaeanakec: Salum ŋes ekapolon;"
1Chronicles9:18 lu lem kidarenenete erute loka ekabaka ari nakokide: keraas kesi ikagolok luka iidukurun luka idwe luka Lebi.
1Chronicles9:19 Koanyanar Salum okoku loka Kore, okoku loka Ebiasap, okoku loka Kora, ka iinacanake, lukokek loka papaake, Ikorakin, aswam naka aijaanakin, ikagolok luka ikekia luka Ewema lokalaunan: keraas lukapapaakee ikapolok luka iidukurun luka EJAKAIT, ikagolok luka ekek;"
1Chronicles9:20 Kerai Pinekas okoku loka Eleasar ekapolonikee kolo sek, kojai EJAKAIT kaŋes,"
1Chronicles9:21 Kerai Sekaria okoku loka Meselemia ekagolon loka ekek loka ewema loka airiamunun.
1Chronicles9:22 Ŋul kerc luaponi koseunai araun ikagolok luka ikekia, emwaasi akwat aarei ka itomon ka luarei. Aponi nul kimarai kauriokee koreriakee ludidik, luapotu Daudi ka Samuel ekadwaran kotiakut aswam aswamukec nakemunoi."
1Chronicles9:23 Kosodete kesi ka idwekec koanyanarete ikekia lukotogo loka EJAKAIT, ŋes etogo loka ewema lokalaunan, kameanakin."
1Chronicles9:24 Keiaananas ikagolok owaitin iwonon, kide, ka to, ka eŋalakimak, ka agolitomei."
1Chronicles9:25 Koponenenete iinaeanakec, koreriakec ludidik, kanunupaarasia akanykaarei apakio kapakio ajaut kakes:"
1Chronicles9:26 Naarai ikagolok luonon lukapolok, lukeraas Ilebin, ajaas kaswam naatiakakinitai, kopolokinito agolai ka aiŋadisia nuka iboro kaluketiai kotogo loka Edeke."
1Chronicles9:27 Kiboienenete airimor etogo loka Edeke, naarai aidar nakee, nakee da anaanar ŋinitupuruc."
1Chronicles9:28 Kidarenenete ice kakesi iboro luka aijaanakin; naarai emareneneo nakitolomanarere ka nakitolomununere.
1Chronicles9:29 Kotiakakinitcte ice kakesi aidar iboro lukotogo, ka iboro kere luka aibois nakalaunan, ka akiria nuidieie, ka ebino, ka akinyet, ka lukisupurununo, ka lueur maa."
1Chronicles9:30 Kitemokis ice kodwe luka isasedotin eiswamae loka lueur maa.
1Chronicles9:31 Aponi kotiakakinitete Matitia, ediopet koLebin, lokerai ekiyai loka Salum Ekorakit aidar iboro lupeon."
1Chronicles9:32 Kopolokinito ice koinacanakee, lukodwe luka Ikokatin akiro nuka cmugati loka aitodikin, aitemokin ŋes ninipaaran nakasabato,"
1Chronicles9:33 Ŋul kes ikayook, ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakec luka Ilebin, lueboienenete kagolai Iuemameete aceswam: naarai kiswamaenenere aswamukec apaaran ka akuar."
1Chronicles9:34 Ŋul kes ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakec luka Ilebin, anatar aturiokee, ikapolok: kiboienenete nul koYerusalem,"
1Chronicles9:35 Kiboie Yeicl, papa loka Gibeon, koGibeon, ekiror loka akeberu Maaka:"
1Chronicles9:36 Abudon okokuke lokiyai, ka Sur, ka Kis, ka Baal, ka Ner, ka Nadab;"
1Chronicles9:37 ka Gedor, ka Akio, ka Sekaria, ka Mikilot."
1Chronicles9:38 Mikilot kouri Simeam. Kibojete kesi da kiinaeanakee koYerusalem, eiduny kiinacanakec,"
1Chronicles9:39 Ner kouri Kis; Kis kouri Saul; Saul kouri Yonatan, ka Malikisua, ka Abinadab, ka Es-baal."
1Chronicles9:40 Okoku loka Yonatan ŋes Merib-baal; Merib-baal kouri Mika.
1Chronicles9:41 Odwe luka Mika; Piton, ka Mclek, ka Tarea, ka Akas."
1Chronicles9:42 Akas kouri Yara; Yara kouri Alemet, ka Asumabet, ka Simiri; Simiri kouri Mosa:"
1Chronicles9:43 Mosa kouri Binea; ka Repaia okokuke, Eleasa okokuke, Asel okokuke:"
1Chronicles9:44 Kejaas Ascl odwe ikanykape, ikecekiroria lu; Asirikam, ka Bokeru, ka Isimael, ka Scaria, ka Obadia, ka Kanan: nul kes odwe luka Asel."
1Chronicles10:1 Kitiiioto Ipilisitian Isiracl: kokerata ituŋa luka Isirael kakonyen nuka Ipilisitian, koarakinai moru Giliboa."
1Chronicles10:2 Kodapata noi Ipilisitian Saul ka odweke; koarata Ipilisitian Yonatan, ka Abinadab ka Maliki-sua, odwe luka Saul."
1Chronicles10:3 Kipikoroi Saul kojie, kodolokis ŋes ikagumak imalia; kobur noi kanuka ikagumak imalia."
1Chronicles10:4 Kosodi Saul atemar loadakit luiiisike atiar, “Kout ekonikilen, kieumia eoŋ; kinyeis lumam ekepep lu abunore aicum eoŋ, aitisil eoŋ,” Konye koncr loadakit luiiisike; naarai akuriana noi, Kanuka ŋun kolem Saul ekekileŋ, kicumakinor."
1Chronicles10:5 Keanyu loadakit lujiisike ebe atwana Saul, kicumakin ŋesi da kekekilcŋ, kotwana."
1Chronicles10:6 Kwaŋin kotwana Saul, ka odweke iuni; kotwakata lukotogoke kere nepepe."
1Chronicles10:7 Keanyutu ituŋa luka Isirael kere lukejaas aditot ebe ekerete kesi, atwana da Saul ka odweke, kojalata ircriakee, kokerata; kopotu Ipilisitian kiboikinos toma."
1Chronicles10:8 Kosodi kanen tupuruc, kepotu Ipilisitian aiŋat luaaritai, kodumut Saul ka odweke etwakikinito moru Giliboa."
1Chronicles10:9 Kolaeasi ikegoen, koyaŋaasi akouke, ka lujiisike, kijukasi akwap naka Ipilisitian naerimorit, ayaŋaar akiro mama ejaas aputosiakec, ka ituŋa da."
1Chronicles10:10 Kibwaikis luiiisike togo loka idekesiokee, koenikis akekou togo loka Dagon."
1Chronicles10:11 Kepupur luka Yabes-Gilead kere nuapotu Ipilisitian kiswamakis Saul kere,"
1Chronicles10:12 Konyout itutja kere luetitiŋ, kolemut akuan naka Saul ka awat nuka odweke, koyaut ke, Yabes, konukakis akoiokec kwap kepeduru koYabes, kikanyata eteŋei apaarasia akanykaarei."
1Chronicles10:13 Kwaŋin kotwana Saul kanuka adiakarike naabu kodiak ka ma ejai EKAKAIT, kanuka akirot naka EJAKAIT, namam abu koric; bobo da naarai abu ŋesi kiner kadio nakejai aiokit, aiŋitun,"
1Chronicles10:14 Kwabo mam abu kinit EJAKAIT: kanuka nun abu koar ŋes, kibelok ajakanut mama ejai Daudi okoku loka Yese."
1Chronicles11:1 Kosodi Isirael kere atukonokin mama ejai Daudi Keburon, kotemasi atiar, “Koany, kirai isio akoitikon ka akirinikon."
1Chronicles11:2 Kapakio nua tuboros nukeraar Saul ekabaka, ibu ijo kitoloma kitolom da Isirael: abu EJAKAIT Ekonideke kotema jo atiar, ‘Itanyamenenei ijo ikatuŋa Isirael, iraun ijo ekapolon loka ikatuŋa Isirael.’”"
1Chronicles11:3 Kwaŋin koporu imakio kere luka Isirael mama ejai ekabaka Keburon; kitutuk Daudi kakes koKeburon kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: kinyonyoikis Daudi akinyet araun ekabaka loka Isirael, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT kama ka Samuel."
1Chronicles11:4 Kolot Daudi ka Isirael kere Yerusalem (ŋol ŋes Yebus); ajaas kanen Iyebusin lukiboiete kakwap,"
1Chronicles11:5 Kotemasi lukiboiete koYebus Daudi atiar, “Mam ilomuni ne.” Konye abu Daudi kirum ere loegogon loka Sion; ŋol ŋes ere loka Daudi."
1Chronicles11:6 Kotema Daudi atiar, “Loegeuni aidany Iyebusin, eraun ŋol ekapolon ka ekayaiton.” Kogeuni do Yoab okoku loka Seruia alomar, kitaraunai ekapolon."
1Chronicles11:7 Kiboikin Daudi ere loegogon; kanuka ŋun aponi komaikinai ere loka Daudi.
1Chronicles11:8 Koduk ere airimor, anyoun koMilo ka airimor: kiteteu Yoab aiboisio ace nukore,"
1Chronicles11:9 Kopoloor Daudi noi noi; naarai ajaenena EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kaŋes,"
1Chronicles11:10 Lu kes ikapolok luka ituŋa lukirigin lukejaas kaDaudi, luapotu kitodiara bonik Iukagogon mamake kaiakanutuke, nepepe ka Isirael kere, aitaraun ŋes ekabaka, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Isirael."
1Chronicles11:11 Lo ŋes etiai loka ituŋa lukirigin lukejaas ka Daudi: Yasobeam, okoku loka Ekakumonit, ekapolon loka akaisauni; kodaku ŋol akekwara asurokin akwat auni koar kes katipet."
1Chronicles11:12 Kotupite ŋes Eleasar okoku loka Dodo, Ekokait, lokerai ediopet kotuna iuni lukirigin,"
1Chronicles11:13 Ajaas ŋes ka Daudi koPas-damin, etukokina Ipilisitian nina ejie komanikor loeleleba esairi; kokerata ituŋa kakonyen nuka Ipilisitian."
1Chronicles11:14 Kobwaata kesi kokidin omanikor, koiiut ŋes, koarata Ipilisitian; kitaiar EJAKAIT kes kaipikor naepol."
1Chronicles11:15 Kikokororos iuni kotoma akaisauni lukapolok atiiba mama ejai Daudi, kabua naka Adulam; kidukurite aiore naka Ipilisitian aditot naka Repaim."
1Chronicles11:16 Keiai Daudi toma abwas, keiai abwas naka iserikalei luka Ipilisitian Betlekem."
1Chronicles11:17 Kimiela Daudi, kotema atiar, “Arai kainak idiotuŋanan eoŋ akipi aimat nuka atan naka Bet-lekem naidunyas kerute!”"
1Chronicles11:18 Kocila luuni ajore naka Ipilisitian, kowokut akipi katan naka Bet-lekem, naidunyas kerute, koyanas, koinutu Daudi: konye koner Daudi aimat, konye kiwela mama ejai EJAKAIT."
1Chronicles11:19 Kotema atiar, “Madi akuj, eoŋ aswam nin: amasi kereka aokot nuka ituŋa kalu lualosito akaŋas naka aijarakec? Naarai apotu koyaut kakaŋas naka aiiarakec.” Kanuka nun koner aimat, Kiswamata ituŋa luuni lukirigin akiro nun,"
1Chronicles11:20 Abisai, onace loka Yoab, ŋes lokapolon loka luuni; naarai kodaku ŋesi akwarake asurokin akwat auni koar kes, kodum ekiror kotoma luuni."
1Chronicles11:21 Kitopolooritete ŋes adepar luarei kouni, kitaraunai ekapolonikec: konye mam abu kodolok luuni lusodit."
1Chronicles11:22 Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada, okoku loka etuŋanan loetitin leka Kabuseel, loabu kiswama aswamisio nukagogon, abu ŋesi koar odwe luarei luka Ariel loka Moab: kiiesar da, koar eŋatuny kokidin aipany kapak naka akako,"
1Chronicles11:23 Koar ŋesi Emisiriat da, etuŋanan lokos loeoja ikubitin ikany; kitiŋite Emisiriat akwara kakanike naaputos kakitoi naesonyere; kolot ŋol mama ejai ŋesi kebela, kodem akwara kakan naka Emisiriat, koar ŋes kakwarake elopet,"
1Chronicles11:24 Kiswama Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada akiro nun, kodum ekiror kotuna luuni lukirigin."
1Chronicles11:25 Koany, kitopolooritete ŋes adepar akaisauni, konye mam abu kodolok luuni lusodit: kodakak Daudi ŋes ayait ikedarakake."
1Chronicles11:26 Bobo da ituŋa lukirigin luka aioresio; Asakel onace loka Yoab, Elukanan okoku loka Dodo loka Bet-lekem;"
1Chronicles11:27 Samot Ekarorit, Keles Epelonit;"
1Chronicles11:28 Ira okoku loka Ikes Etekoit, Abieser Enatotait;"
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai Ekusatit, Ilai Ekokait;"
1Chronicles11:30 Makarai Enetopatit, Keled okoku loka Baana Enetopatit;"
1Chronicles11:31 Itai okoku loka Ribai loka Gibea loka idwe luka Benyamin, Benaia Epiratonit;"
1Chronicles11:32 Kurai loka aguuruto nuka Gaas, Abiel Erabatait;"
1Chronicles11:33 Asumabet Ebakarumit, Eliaba Esaalubonit;"
1Chronicles11:34 Odwe luka Kasem Egisonit, Yonatan okoku loka Sage Ekararit;"
1Chronicles11:35 Akiam okoku loka Sakar Ekararit, Elipal okoku loka Ur;"
1Chronicles11:36 Keper Emekeratit, Akiya Epelonit;"
1Chronicles11:37 Kesiro Ekaramelit, Naarai okoku loka Esibai;"
1Chronicles11:38 Yoel onaee loka Natan, Mibar okoku loka Kagiri;"
1Chronicles11:39 Selek Emonait, Nakarai Eberotit, loadakit lujiis luka Yoab okoku loka Seruia;"
1Chronicles11:40 Ira Itirit, Gareb Itirit;"
1Chronicles11:41 Uria Ekitit, Sabad okoku loka Alai;"
1Chronicles11:42 Adina okoku loka Sisa Ereubenit, ekapolon loka Ireubenin, ka akaisauni nepepe kaŋes;"
1Chronicles11:43 Kanan okoku loka Maaka, ka Yosapat Emitinit;"
1Chronicles11:44 Usia Esiteratait, Sama ka Yeiel odwe luka Kotam Eroerait;"
1Chronicles11:45 Yediael okoku loka Simiri, ka Yoka onaeeke, Etisit;"
1Chronicles11:46 Eliel Emakabit, ka Yeribai, ka Yosabia, odwe luka Elunaam, ka Itima Emoabit;"
1Chronicles11:47 Eliel, ka Obed, ka Yaasiel Emesobait."
1Chronicles12:1 Lu kes mil Iuapotu kopotu mama ejai Daudi Sikilag, kapak nakenopitor kanuka Saul okoku loka Kis: koraas kotuŋa lukirigin, ikenara kinakake kojie."
1Chronicles12:2 Kokapitos akabwai, apedorete aitwasam akan nakoteten ka nakokediany da aporoeanaria alica, ka agumanaria imalia da kakabwa; koraas luka iinaean luka Saul luka Benyamin,"
1Chronicles12:3 Lokapolon ŋes Akieser, kosodi Yoas, odwe luka Semaa Egibeatit; ka Yesiel, ka Pelet, odwe luka Asumabet; ka Bereka, ka Yeku Enatotait;"
1Chronicles12:4 ka Isimaia Egibeonit, etuŋanan lokirigi kotoma akaisauni, loapolokinit akaisauni; ka Yeremia, ka Yakasiel, ka Yokanan, ka Yosabad Egederatit;"
1Chronicles12:5 Elusai, ka Yerimot, ka Bealia, ka Semaria, ka Sepatia Ekarupit;"
1Chronicles12:6 Elukana, ka Isia, ka Asarel, ka Yoeser, ka Yasobeam, Ikorakin;"
1Chronicles12:7 ka Yoela, ka Sebadia, odwe luka Yerokam loka Gedor."
1Chronicles12:8 Luka Igadin apotu kogitakinos mama ejai Daudi aibois naebwaitai modiŋ, ituŋa lukirigin luetitin, ituŋa luetuutooritai ejie, luapedorete aitwasam ebuku ka akwara; akonyenekec koputokinos kakonyen nuka iŋatunyo, ketiroko kesi kwape kamorio koron an,"
1Chronicles12:9 Eser lokapolon, Obadia lokiareit, Eliab lokiwuniet;"
1Chronicles12:10 Misimana Iokiwononet, Yeremia kokianyet;"
1Chronicles12:11 Atai lokikanyetekape, Eliel lokikanyetckaarei;"
1Chronicles12:12 Yokanan lokikanyetekauni, Elisaba lokikanyetekaon on;"
1Chronicles12:13 Yeremia lokitomonet, Makubanai lokitomonet kalodiop."
1Chronicles12:14 Keraas nul lukodwe luka Gad ikapolok luka ajore; nol lokerai lodidi kakesi keriakas kakwatat, lokapolon da kelukumit."
1Chronicles12:15 Ŋul kes luapotu kodokas Yorodan kolap losodit, kedau ŋesi ailapanar aririke kere; kitekerata nul kere luka aditon, kiton kide, koto da."
1Chronicles12:16 Kopotu lukodwe luka Benyamin ka Yuda mama ejai aibois naebwaitai mama ejai Daudi.
1Chronicles12:17 Koloma Daudi airiamakin kakes, Koboŋok kotema atiar, “Arai ca iponito yesi inapakina mama ajai aitjarakin eoŋ, kimorikikin ekatau ka lukus; konye arai iponito abilakin eoŋ ebotet mama ejaas lukasurupoka, naarai emamei aronis kakaninika, kosesen Edeke loka lukapapaawok, kitoron.”"
1Chronicles12:18 Kosodi emoyo abunokin Amasai lokerai lokapolon loka akaisauni, kotema atiar, “Kirai isio lukon, Daudi, owaikon, ijo okoku loka Yese. Ainapakin, ainapakin kojai mama ŋal, ainapakin da mama ejaas ikeijarakinakakon! Naarai kiŋarakinit Edekekon.” Kosodi Daudi aisukunyuun kes, kitarau kes ikapolok luka erioŋet."
1Chronicles12:19 Luka Manase da apotu ice kolunakinos mama ejai Daudi naabunio nepepe ka Ipilisitian asurokin Saul kojie, konye mam apotu kinarakis kes: naarai kinerut ijaka luka Ipilisitian, kotwarata ŋes, koba lasi ebe, “Epedori alunakin mama ejai ekapolonike Saul kosodi ayaun akaŋas akwesiwok.”"
1Chronicles12:20 Naalosio ŋesi Sikilag, kolunakinos mamake luka Manase, Aduna, ka Yosabad, ka Yediael, ka Mikael, ka Yosabad, ka Eliku, ka Siletai, ikapolok luka ilukumin lukeraas luka Manase."
1Chronicles12:21 Kiŋarakis Daudi asurokin erioŋet loka ikaŋatak; naarai keraas kesi kere ituŋa lukirigin luetitin, koraas ikapolok luka ajore."
1Chronicles12:22 Naarai ŋinipaaran kopotu ituŋa mama ejai Daudi aiŋarakin ŋes, aitodol nakeraunor ajore naepol, kwape ajore naka Edeke."
1Chronicles12:23 Lu kes itiaisinei luka ikapolok luka ŋul kaluakapitos lujiis, luapotu kopotu mama ejai Daudi Keburon, aibelokin ajakanut naka Saul mamake, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT."
1Chronicles12:24 Idwe luka Yuda lukitinitos ibukui ka akwaras emwaasi ilukumin ikanykape ka akwat akanykauni, luakapitos luiiis."
1Chronicles12:25 Lukodwe luka Simeon, ituŋa lukirigin luetitin ejie, ilukumin ikanykaarei ka akwatat,"
1Chronicles12:26 Lukodwe luka Lebi ilukumin iwonon ka akwat akanykape.
1Chronicles12:27 Yekoiada ŋes ekenarenikinon loka ekek loka Aaron, kojaas kaŋes ilukumin iuni ka akwat akanykaarei;"
1Chronicles12:28 Sadok ekatumunan lokirigi loetitiŋ, ka lukotogo loka papake ikapolok akaisaarei ka luarei."
1Chronicles12:29 Lukodwe luka Benyamin, iinaean luka Saul, ilukumin iuni: naarai aitodol apakio nun keraas luitelekarito aipues lukiketakina atupar etogo loka Saul."
1Chronicles12:30 Lukodwe luka Epuraim ilukumin akaisaarei ka akwat akanykauni, ituŋa lukirigin luetitin, ituŋa lukodwaratau kokekia luka lukapapaakec."
1Chronicles12:31 Lukatutubet naka ateker naka Manase ilukumin itomon ka lukanykauni, luabilitai ikiroriakee, aponare aitaraun Daudi ekabaka."
1Chronicles12:32 Lukodwe luka Isakar, ituŋa luajenete apakio, ajenun nuibusakinit Isirael aswam: ikapolokokec emwaasi akwat aarei; kiswamata iinacanakec kere kwape ajaar aicorakinetekec."
1Chronicles12:33 Luka Sebulun, luapedorete alomar kaiore, luapedorete aiderakin ejie, lukejaas kiboro lukiponesio luipu lujiis, ilukumin akaisakany; luapedorete aiderakin ejie, luamameete itauon iarei,"
1Chronicles12:34 Luka Naputali ikapolok elukumit, nepepe kakes da lukejaas ibukui ka akwaras ilukumin akaisauni ka lukanykaarei."
1Chronicles12:35 Luka Idanin luapedorete aiderakin ejie, ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukanykauni ka akwat akanykape."
1Chronicles12:36 Luka Aser, luapedorete alomar kajore, luapedorete aiderakin ejie, ilukumin akaisaoŋon."
1Chronicles12:37 Okekwa juwai Yorodan, luka Ireubenin, ka Igadin, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase, lukejaas kiboro lukiponesio luipu lujiis ilukumin akwatat ka ilukumin akaisaarei."
1Chronicles12:38 Ŋul kere, ituŋa lukajiok, luapedorete aiderakin ejie, apotu kopotu Keburon ketau loetenara, aitaraun Daudi ekabaka loka Isirael kere: luka Isirael ice kere da kejaas ketau ediopet aitaraun Daudi ekabaka,"
1Chronicles12:39 Kejaas nina nepepe ka Daudi apaarasia auni, enyamete, emasete: naarai apotu iinacanakec kitemokis kanukec,"
1Chronicles12:40 Bobo da nul luedunyas kakes, kiton Isakar ka Sebulun ka Naputali, kibwokut inyamat kasigirian, kakaalai, konyubun, komonin, inyamat luka akiria, alunureta nuka itinin, aibuneta nueokito nuka imusabibun, ka ebino, ka akinyet, ka imoŋin, ka imerekekin, epu noi; naarai kejai aiyalama koIsirae!’"
1Chronicles13:1 Kinerut Daudi ka ikapolok luka ilukumin ka luka akwatat, kes ikenarenokkere."
1Chronicles13:2 Kotema Daudi atukot kere naka Isirael atiar, “Arai ito jokito yesi, arai da erai naka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, kejukasi anatar iinacanawok luideuna kakwap kere naka Isirael, lukejaas kisasedotin ka Ilebin oreriakee luejaas ironyia, kotukunos mamawok:"
1Chronicles13:3 Kenyakut bobo asaduku naka Edekewok mamawok: naarai mam kipou keŋitununiata ŋes kapaarasia nuka Sau!.”
1Chronicles13:4 Kobala atukot kere ebe tikiswama kwaŋin: naarai ebeeokino akirot kakonyen nuka ituŋa kere,"
1Chronicles13:5 Kotukok Daudi Isirael kere, anyoun koSikor aguurut naka Misiri kiton neelomarere Kamat, ayaun asaduku naka Edeke aitonyoun koKiriat-yearim,"
1Chronicles13:6 Kodoka Daudi, ka Isirael kere, Baala, ŋes Kiriat-yearim, lokerai loka Yuda, aitonyoun kaŋina asaduku naka Edeke, EJAKAIT loiboikini ikerubin, naenyaritai Ekekiror."
1Chronicles13:7 Kodakutu asaduku naka Edeke kagali nakitetet, alemun kotogo loka Abinadab; kireneata Usa ka Akio agali."
1Chronicles13:8 Kikosi Daudi ka Isirael kere kakonyen nuka Edeke kagogonukec kere: kikososinei, ka adeudeun, ka isabulin, ka isiman, ka ikaewi, ka arupepen da."
1Chronicles13:9 Nakedolioto kesi opejal loka Kidon, korio Usa akekan aitin asaduku; naarai apotu kiguikis imoŋin."
1Chronicles13:10 Kinep anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin Usa, kinom ŋes, naarai ariori akekan mama ejai asaduku: kotwana kanen kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
1Chronicles13:11 Kokadak Daudi, naarai acil EJAKAIT Usa; komaik aibois ŋin Peres-usa, kiton lolo."
1Chronicles13:12 Kokurianar Daudi EJAKAIT kapaaran ka ŋin ebe, “Ekonakini ai ayaun asaduku naka EJAKAIT ore mama ajai?”"
1Chronicles13:13 Kwaŋin mam Daudi abu koyau asaduku mamake ore loka Daudi, konye abu kitapaa adakar ŋes togo loka Obed-edom Egitit."
1Chronicles13:14 Kosalak asaduku kokale loka Obed-edom togoke ilapio iuni: kisireren EJAKAIT etogo loka Obed-edom ka luajaatar kere.
1Chronicles14:1 Kijuka Kiram ekabaka loka Turo ikiyakia mama ejai Daudi, ka ikito luka eres, ka ikadukok kamor, ka ikekeok, adukokin Daudi etogo."
1Chronicles14:2 Kojen Daudi ebe abu EJAKAIT kitieat ŋes araun ekabaka loka Isirael, naarai kitopoiooritete akejakanut, kanuka iketuŋa Isirael."
1Chronicles14:3 Komany Daudi acenor koYerusalem: kouri Daudi ieedwe lusap ka lupesur.
1Chronicles14:4 Lu kes ikiroria luka idwe luaurikinio ŋes koYerusalem; Samua, ka Sobab, ka Natan, ka Solomon;"
1Chronicles14:5 ka Ibar, ka Elisua, ka Elipelet;"
1Chronicles14:6 ka Noga, ka Nepeg, ka Yapia;"
1Chronicles14:7 ka Elisama, ka Beeliada, ka Elipelet."
1Chronicles14:8 Kepuput Ipilisitian ebe enyonyoikin Daudi akinyet araun ekabaka loka Isirael kere, koloto Ipilisitian kere amoot Daudi; kopup Daudi, kolot asurokin kes."
1Chronicles14:9 Apotu Ipilisitian kopotu konatata kaditot naka Repaim.
1Chronicles14:10 Kinit Daudi Edeke ebe, “Alosi kereka eoŋ aitiji Ipilisitian? Kiiaikini ijo kes akanika?” Kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Kolot; naarai ejaikini kes akanikon.”"
1Chronicles14:11 Kopotu Baal-perasim, kodany Daudi kes kaŋina; kotema Daudi atiar, “Acil EJAKAIT lukasurupoka kakanika, kwape eciliata akip.” Ŋes amaikinere aibois nin Baal-perasim,"
1Chronicles14:12 Kinyekis idekesiokee kanen; kicorak Daudi, aponi kicweikinai kakim."
1Chronicles14:13 Kopotu bobo Ipilisitian aiŋat kaditot,"
1Chronicles14:14 Kinit bobo Daudi Edeke; kotema Edeke ŋes atiar, “Mam ilosi atupakin kes: kiwarak kes, kobunok kaneeiaas ikito luka baka."
1Chronicles14:15 Ejaun kwanata ebe, Kipup ijo eporoto loka lueraeete alosit kokuju kikito luka baka, kosodi konyet alosit ejie: naarai kinarenikinit Edeke aidany ajore naka Ipilisitian.”"
1Chronicles14:16 Kiswama Daudi kwape ecorakinia EJAKAIT: kodanyata aiore naka Ipilisitian anyoun koGibeon kiton Geser.
1Chronicles14:17 Kisiarakin eemuto loka Daudi akwapin kere; koinak EJAKAIT atekerin kere akurianar ŋes.
1Chronicles15:1 Koduk Daudi itogoi ore loka Daudi; kitemok aibois kanuka asaduku naka Edeke, kibubuk ewema kanuke,"
1Chronicles15:2 Kosodi Daudi atemar atiar, “Mam luibusakinit adakar asaduku naka Edeke dimarai Ilebin: naarai kes abu EJAKAIT koseu adakanar asaduku naka Edeke, ka aijaanakin ŋes ikar kere.”"
1Chronicles15:3 Kotukok Daudi Isirael kere Yerusalem, aitodokun asaduku naka EJAKAIT toma aibois naabu ŋesi kitemokinite."
1Chronicles15:4 Kotukok Daudi odwe luka Aaron, ka Ilebin:"
1Chronicles15:5 Lukodwe luka Kokat; Uriellokapolon, ka ikeinaean akwatat ka akaisaarei:"
1Chronicles15:6 Lukodwe luka Merari; Asaia lokapolon, ka ikeinacan akwat aarei ka akaisaarei;"
1Chronicles15:7 Lukodwe luka Geresom: Yoel lokapolon, ka ikeinacan akwatat ka akaisauni:"
1Chronicles15:8 Lukodwe luka Elisapan; Semaia lokapolon, ka ikeinacan akwat aarei:"
1Chronicles15:9 Lukodwe luka Keburon; Eliel lokapolon, ka ikeinaean akaisakanykauni:"
1Chronicles15:10 Lukodwe luka Usiel; Aminadab lokapoion, ka ikeinaean akwatat ka itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles15:11 Konyarau Daudi Sadok ka Abiatar isasedotin, ka Ilebin, kes Uriel, ka Asaia, ka Yoel, ka Semaia, ka Eliel, ka Aminadab,"
1Chronicles15:12 Kotema kes atiar, “Iraas yesi ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaa luka Ilebin: kitalaunos bonik, yes ka iinaeanakus, tetere ipedorete aitodokun asaduku naka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, toma aibois naabu eoŋ ketemokinite ŋes."
1Chronicles15:13 Naarai mam ipotu kisiautu adakar ŋes, ŋes kecilia EJAKAIT Ewokodeke kamawok, naarai mam kipou kamootos ŋes kwape ajaar aicorakinet.”"
1Chronicles15:14 Kitalaunos do isasedotin ka Ilebin bonik aitodokun asaduku naka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael."
1Chronicles15:15 Kodakasi do idwe luka Ilebin asaduku naka Edeke kokeperinikec kadaketake, kwape kieorakinitor Musa kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT."
1Chronicles15:16 Kolimok Daudi ikapolok luka Ilebin aseun iinacanakec ikayook, koiaas kalueruos, isabulin, ka adeudeun, ka ikaewi, koramata, koborianata kaiyalama."
1Chronicles15:17 Koseut Ilebin Keman okoku loka Yoel; ka lokiinacanake, Asap okoku loka Berekaia; ka lokodwe luka Merari iinaeanakec, Etan okoku loka Kusaia;"
1Chronicles15:18 ka ikeceinacan luka atukot nakiareit, Sekaria, ka Ben, ka Yaasiel, ka Semiramot, ka Yekiel, ka Uni, ka Eliab, ka Benaia, ka Maaseia, ka Matitia, ka Elipeleku, ka Mikeneia, ka Obed-edom, ka Yeiel, ikagolok luka ekek,"
1Chronicles15:19 Aponi koseunai ikayook, Keman, ka Asap, ka Etan, kikaewi luka aisinin aituru;"
1Chronicles15:20 ka Sekaria, ka Asiel, ka Semiramot, ka Yekiel, ka Uni, ka Eliab, ka Maaseia, ka Benaia, kisabulin koporoto loka Alamot;"
1Chronicles15:21 ka Matitia, ka Elipeleku, ka Mikeneia, ka Obed-edom, ka Yeiel, ka Asasia, aiŋarenikin kadeudeun koporoto loka Iseminit."
1Chronicles15:22 Kopolokinit Kenania, ekapolon loka Ilebin ekosio: kituutoor ŋesi ekosio, naarai kepiriana."
1Chronicles15:23 Berekia ka Elukana kes ikagolok luka asaduku.
1Chronicles15:24 Apotu Sebania ka Yosapat, ka Netanel, ka Amasai, ka Sekaria, ka Benaia, ka Elieser, isasedotin, kokusete arupepen koinaren kasaduku naka Edeke; Obed-edom ka Yekia kes ikagolok luka asaduku,"
1Chronicles15:25 Abu Daudi kolot, ka imakio luka Isirael, ka ikapolok luka ilukumin, aitodokun asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT alemun kotogo loka Obededom kaiyalama:"
1Chronicles15:26 Kosodi kanen, kinarak Edeke Ilebin luadakete asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT, apotu koinakis imoŋin lutoba ikanykaarei ka imerekekin ikanykaarei araun asuban."
1Chronicles15:27 Kenapit Daudi ekaso loka ebaputa loejok, ka Ilebin kere luadakito asaduku, ka ikayook, ka Kenania ekapolon loka ekosio kikayook: konapit Daudi epod loka ebaputa."
1Chronicles15:28 Kwaŋin kitodoku Isirael kere asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT keibwon, ka eporoto loka apeen, ka arupepen, ka ikacwi, koramata da isabulin ka adeudeun."
1Chronicles15:29 Kosodi kanen, nakedolio asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT ore loka Daudi, konolia Mikal akoku naka Saul kadirisa, koany ekabaka Daudi esomanari ikosie; komwan ŋes kotauke."
1Chronicles16:1 Kitolomut asaduku naka Edeke, kibwaikis ŋes kidin owema loebubukinit Daudi kanuke: koinakis ainakineta nuieweio ka ainakineta nuka ainapakin kakonyen nuka Edeke,"
1Chronicles16:2 Kedau Daudi ainakin ainakinet naicweio ka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, kilipak ituŋa arereŋ kokiror loka EJAKAIT,"
1Chronicles16:3 Kokorak da ninitunanan yenika Isirael, ikiliok ka aŋor, ninidiopet emugati, aturosit naka akiriŋ, ka aluŋuret naka imusabibun lukeokito."
1Chronicles16:4 Koseu ice luka Ilebin aiiaanakin koinaren kasaduku naka EJAKAIT, ainakin asuban ka aimal ka aiturit EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael:"
1Chronicles16:5 Asap lokapolon, kotupite ŋes Sekaria, Yeiel, ka Semiramot, ka Yekiel, ka Matitia, ka Eliab, ka Benaia, ka Obed-edom, ka Yeiel, keiaas kisabulin ka adeudeun; ka Asap keiaas kikacwi, aituru kes;"
1Chronicles16:6 ka Benaia ka Yakasiel isasedotin kejaas karupepen tiritir, koinaren kasaduku naka aitutuket naka Edeke."
1Chronicles16:7 Kosodi kapaaran kaŋin kisiau Daudi aitemokin aimal EJAKAIT, kama ka Asap ka iinacanake."
1Chronicles16:8 Kimalata EJAKAIT, kiworoto ekekiror; Kitejenutu aswamisioke otuŋa,"
1Chronicles16:9 Koyeikisi ŋes, koyeikisi aiturit ŋes; Kitatamata aswamisioke kere nukaumokin."
1Chronicles16:10 Kitubusikina kokirorike lokalaunan: Kolakaros itauon luka ŋul kaluemoete EJAKAIT.
1Chronicles16:11 Komoata EJAKAIT ka akegogoŋ; Komoata akonyeneke ikar kere.
1Chronicles16:12 Kiitutu akeswamisio nukaumokin nueswama; Nukaumokinike, ka itubesia luka aitukuke."
1Chronicles16:13 Wu yes aur naka Isirael ekeiaanakinanike, Yes idwe luka Yakob, luseunake."
1Chronicles16:14 Ŋes EJAKAIT Ewokodeke: Iketubesia eia akwap kere.
1Chronicles16:15 Kiitutu aitutuketcke ikar kere, Akirot naabu kicorak aturlo alukumit;"
1Chronicles16:16 Aitutuket naetutuki ŋesi kAburaam, Ka aiyapositike mama ejai Isaak;"
1Chronicles16:17 Kitogogon da ŋipeŋin mama ejai Yakob araun ekisil, Mama ejai Isirael araun aitutuket namam edaun."
1Chronicles16:18 Ebe, “Kainakini jo akwap naka Kanaan, Ewai loka airumetekon.”"
1Chronicles16:19 Nakiraatar yesi ituŋa luikidioko; Eebo, luikidioko noi, kiboiororoto kotomake;"
1Chronicles16:20 Kirimete kateker kiton ateker, Anyoun kajakanut adiopet kiton otuŋa ice."
1Chronicles16:21 Mam abu koeamak idiotuŋanan aikonakin kes erono; Eebo, abu kitoron ikabakan kanukee;"
1Chronicles16:22 Kobala ebe, “Sirikitirosi lukinyonyoikitonoka akinyet, Sirikiswamakis ikanabin aronis.”"
1Chronicles16:23 Koyeikisi EJAKAIT, yes akwapin kere; Kitodiasi akeitaiar ninlpaaran."
1Chronicles16:24 Kolimosi aibusesuke katekerin, Aswamisioke nukaumokin kotuna kere."
1Chronicles16:25 Naarai epol EJAKAIT, loibusakinit noi aiturio: Loibusakinit ayonio adepar idekesio kere."
1Chronicles16:26 Naarai idekesio kere luka ituŋa eraas aputosia: Konye EJAKAIT ŋes asubi akui,"
1Chronicles16:27 Aibuses ka apolou ejaas akonyeneke: Agogoŋ ka aiyalama ejaas aiboisike,"
1Chronicles16:28 Koinakis EJAKAIT, yes atekerin nuka ituŋa, Koinakis EJAKAIT aibuses ka agogoŋ,"
1Chronicles16:29 Koinakis EJAKAIT aibuses naibusakinit ekekiror: Koyautu ainakinet, kopotu kakonyeneke. Komaata EJAKAIT konapito luelaete,"
1Chronicles16:30 Komaran kakonyeneke, akwap kere: Icasit akwap da, komam epedori aijaŋijaŋa."
1Chronicles16:31 Kiyalamikin akuj, kole! akwap; Kolimosi katekerin ebe, “Irumit EJAKAIT,”"
1Chronicles16:32 Kirurum aŋolol, ka ailelebake; Kolel ekitui, ka luejaas toma kere;"
1Chronicles16:33 Kosodete do ikito luka amagoro ayoore kanuka aiyalama Kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, Naarai ebunit atubokin akwap,"
1Chronicles16:34 Kimalata do EJAKAIT: naarai ejok ŋesi: Naarai eiaenena akeitim ikar kere.
1Chronicles16:35 Kobalasi ebe, “Kitajarai sio, Wu Edeke loka aitaiarakosi, Kotukonokinai sio koyuunai katekerin, Aimalaenen ekonikiror lokalaunan, Kebwonananas kotoma aiturit joo"
1Chronicles16:36 Kituritete EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, Ameun ikar luno kiton ikar kere!” Kobalas ituŋa kere ebe, “Amen,” kituroto EJAKAIT."
1Chronicles16:37 Abu kitasal Asap ka iinaeanake kanen, koinaren kasaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT, aiiaanakin tiritir koinaren kasaduku, kwape kibusakinitor aswam naka ŋinipaaran:"
1Chronicles16:38 ka Obed-edom ka iinaeanakee, akaisakanykape ka ikanykauni; Obed-edom da okoku loka Yedutun ka Kosa araun ikagolok;"
1Chronicles16:39 ka Sadok esasedoti, ka ikeinaean isasedotin, koinaren kewema lokalaunan loka EJAKAIT toma aibois naieelelei naajai Gibeon."
1Chronicles16:40 Ainanakin ainakineta nuieweio mama ejai EJAKAIT kotem loka ainakineta nuieweio tiritir tupuruc ka eboŋ, kwape ajaatar kere nuiwadikatai kokisila luka EJAKAIT, luabu ŋesi kicorak Isirael;"
1Chronicles16:41 Keman da ka Yedutun kakes, ka ice luaseunitai, luabilitai ikiroriakee, aimalaenen EJAKAIT, naarai ejaenena akeitim ikar kere;"
1Chronicles16:42 Keman da ka Yedutun ka kes keiaas karupepen ka ikacwi kanuka nul kaluituruete, ka iboro luka ikososinei luka Edeke: odwe luka Yedutun da ajaut okek."
1Chronicles16:43 Konyout ituŋa kere, kolot ninitunanan oreke: kobono Daudi ailipakin etogoke arereŋ."
1Chronicles17:1 Kosodi kanen, kiboikin Daudi togoke, kotema Daudi Natan enabi atiar, “Koany, eboie eoŋ kotogo loka eres, konye iboie asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT kotoma aigalisio.”"
1Chronicles17:2 Kotema Natan Daudi atiar, “Kiswama kere nuejaas otaukon; naarai ejai EJAKAIT kajo.”"
1Chronicles17:3 Kosodi kanen kakuare kaŋin, kobu akirot naka Edeke mama ejai Natan ebe,"
1Chronicles17:4 “Kolot kolimok Daudi ekakeiaanakinan ebe, ‘Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Mam jo idukokini eoŋ etogo loeboieneno:"
1Chronicles17:5 Naarai mam eoŋ eboikino togo ageun kapaaran naetolomunia Isirael kiton lolo: konye alosenenei anyoun kowema kiton owema, anyoun kowema lokalaunan kiton ece da."
1Chronicles17:6 Kaiboisio kere nualosenen kaIsirael kere, abu eoŋ kener akirot kedio kokatubok luka Isirael, lueeorakinit aitanyam ikatuŋa ebe, “Kanukinyo mam yes kidukokiniata eoŋ etogo loka eres?’”"
1Chronicles17:7 Aso do kolimok Daudi ekakejaanakinan kwanata ebe, ‘Inera EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kwanata ebe, Abu kalem jo korony, katupit amerekekin, tetere iraun ekapolon ayait ikatuŋa Isirael:"
1Chronicles17:8 Ajaenena eoŋ kaio kama ilosenenei kere, amudia lukasurupokon kere kakonyenekon; etuluor jo ekiror, kwape ekiror loka lukapolok luejaas kakwap."
1Chronicles17:9 Aseikini ikatuŋa Isirael aibois, eraikini kes, tetere iboiete aiboisikec, komam bobo itwobosete; komam bobo idwe luka aronis iticanete kes, kwape lem sek,"
1Chronicles17:10 Kwape kapaaran naeeorakinia eoŋ ikatubok ayait ikatuŋa Isirael; etonokokiari lukasurupokon kere. Bobo da alimokini jo ebe kidukokini EJAKAIT etogo.
1Chronicles17:11 Kosodi kanen, kedoloto apaarasiakon, ilosi ijo ajaut kalukapapaakon, adakakini eoŋ aurikon naetupakini naelomuni kodwekon; etieasi da ajakanutuke."
1Chronicles17:12 Ŋol ŋes kadukokini etogo, etieasi eoŋ ekeicoloŋ loka ajakanut ikar kere."
1Chronicles17:13 Araun eoŋ papake, ŋes da eraun okokuka: mam alemari akaitim kamake, kwape abu kalemaria kama kanol kalokinarenikinit jo:"
1Chronicles17:14 Konye etogogoŋi eoŋ ŋes kotoma togoka, kaiakanutuka da ikar kere; itieasio ekeicoloŋ loka ajakanut ikar kere.’’’"
1Chronicles17:15 Kwape ejaatar akiro ŋun kere, kwape ejaar aitapoet ŋin kere, kolimok Natan Daudi kwaŋin,"
1Chronicles17:16 Kosodi Daudi ekabaka alomar, kiboikin kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: kotema atiar, “Eoŋ iŋai, wu EJAKAIT Edeke; ekatogo da inyo, ijo aitodolun eoŋ kiton kwana?"
1Chronicles17:17 Kerai ŋin da akirot naedit kakonyenekon, wu Edeke; konye iner ijo nuka ekek loka ekeiaanakinanikon kokar luipu noi luepote, isesen eoŋ kwape araar etuŋanan loitopolooritai, wu EJAKAIT Edeke,"
1Chronicles17:18 Inyo bobo epedori Daudi alimokin jo nuka aibuses naisubakinitai ekonikejaanakinan? Naarai iieni ekonikeiaanakinan.
1Chronicles17:19 Wu EJAKAIT, iswama ijo apolou na kere, kanuka ekejaanakinanikon, kwape ejaar ekonitau da, aiteienun akiro nu kere nukapolok."
1Chronicles17:20 Wu EJAKAIT, emamei yeneputos kajo, emamei da Edeke ece dimarai ijo, kwape ajaatar kere nukipou keirasi kakosiki."
1Chronicles17:21 Ani bo ateker adio kakwap naeputos kikonituna Isirael, luabu Edeke kolot alakun kanuke araun ituŋa, adumakin ekiror kakiro nukos ka nusogim, irenei atekerin kakonyen nuka ikonituŋa luibu kolaku koMisiri?"
1Chronicles17:22 Naarai ikonituŋa Isiraei ibu kitarau ikonituŋa ikar kere; ijo da, EJAKAIT, ibu koraun Edekekec."
1Chronicles17:23 Aso do, wu EJAKAIT, kitogogonoi akirot naibu kiner naka ekonikeiaanakinan, ka ekekike ikar kere, kiswama kwape kineria."
1Chronicles17:24 Kicat ekonikiror, kitopolooroi ikar kere ebe, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ŋes Edeke loka Isirael, Edeke mama ejai Isirael: iticasio ekek loka ekonikejaanakinan Daudi kakonyenekon."
1Chronicles17:25 Naarai ijo, wu Ekadeke, ipukokinit ekonikejaanakinan ebe idukokini ijo ŋes ekek; kanuka mm etitinior ekonikejaanakinan kotauke ailip kakonyenekon."
1Chronicles17:26 Aso do wu EJAKAIT, irai ijo Edeke, isumunik ekonikeiaanakinan akirot nin naejok:"
1Chronicles17:27 Kitoiok ijo aisireren ekek loka ekonikejaanakinan, kiyatanakinenei kakonyenekon ikar kere: naarai ijo, wu EJAKAIT, ibu kisireren, ido isirerenitoi ikar kere.”"
1Chronicles18:1 Kosodi kanen akaulo kanun, kodany Daudi Ipilisitian, kipiko kes, kodemu Gat ka ireriake kakan naka Ipilisitian."
1Chronicles18:2 Kodany Moab; koraut Imoabin ikejaanakinak luka Daudi koyaut ainakineta.
1Chronicles18:3 Kitoii Daudi Kadareser ekabaka loka Soba kiton Kamat, nakelosio aitieat ayaiteke eiduny kecor Eupurat."
1Chronicles18:4 Kolema Daudi kamake agalin alukumit, ka ikebwanenok ilukumin ikanykaarei, ka lualosete kakeie ilukumin akaisaarei: kitwanal Daudi ibalasin kere luka agalin, konye kinadak kakes luka agalin akwatat."
1Chronicles18:5 Kepotu Isurian luka Damasiko aisigalikin Kadareser ekabaka loka Soba, kodany Daudi ituŋa ilukumin akaisaarei ka luarei luka Isurian."
1Chronicles18:6 Kosodi Daudi aibwaikin atukon nuka iserikalen Suria loka Damasiko; koraut Isurian ikejaanakinak luka Daudi, koyaut ainakineta. Koinak EJAKAIT Daudi aipikor kama kelosenenei kere."
1Chronicles18:7 Konatu Daudi ibukui luka esabu lukeiaas kikejaanakinak luka Kadareser, koyau kes Yerusalem."
1Chronicles18:8 Konatu Daudi aisinit naepol noi koTibat, ko Cun, ireria luka Kadereser, naabu Solomon kiswamaa aŋolol naka aisinit, ka ipirin, ka iboro luka aisinit."
1Chronicles18:9 Kepupu Tou ekabaka loka Kamat ebe adany Daudi aiore kere naka Kadareser ekabaka loka Soba,"
1Chronicles18:10 abu kijuka Kadoram okokuke mama ejai ekabaka Daudi, ayogan ŋes, ailipakin ŋes arereŋ, naarai etijiit Kadareser kodany ŋes; naarai abu Kadareser kitijiite Tou; kejaas kaŋes iponesio kere luka iboro luka esabu ka epuesa ka aisinit."
1Chronicles18:11 Ŋul da abu Daudi kotiakak EJAKAIT, nepepe kepuesa ka esabu loabu konaru katekerin kere; kama ka Edom, ka Moab, kodwe luka Amon, koPilisitian, ka Amalek da."
1Chronicles18:12 Bobo da abu Abisai okoku loka Seruia kodany ilukumin itomon ka lukanykauni luka Idomein kAditot naka Abalaŋ,"
1Chronicles18:13 Kibwaik atukon nuka iserikalen Edom; koraut Idomein kere ikejaanakinak luka Daudi. Koinak EJAKAIT Daudi aipikor kama kelosenenei kere.
1Chronicles18:14 Kirum Daudi Isirael kere; kitodolenenei itubesia ka nuetenito kotuŋake kere.
1Chronicles18:15 Kopolokinite Yoab okoku loka Seruia ajore; kerai Yekosapat okoku loka Akilud ekesiitonokinan.
1Chronicles18:16 Sadok okoku loka Akitub, ka Abimelek okoku loka Abiatar keraas isasedotin; kerai Sabusa ekalani;"
1Chronicles18:17 Kopolokinite Benaia okoku loka Yekoiada Ikeretin ka Ipeletin; keraas odwe luka Daudi ikapolok eiduny kekabaka.
1Chronicles19:1 Kosodi kanen, akaulo kanun, kotwana Nakas ekabaka loka idwe luka Amon, kirum okokuke aiboisike,"
1Chronicles19:2 Kotema Daudi atiar, “Ketodi kini Kanun okoku loka Nakas asianut, naarai abu papake ketodik eoŋ asianut.” Kijuka Daudi ikiyakia aitalakar ŋes kanuka papake. Kopotu ikejaanakinak luka Daudi akwap naka idwe luka Amon mama ejai Kanun, aitalakar ŋes."
1Chronicles19:3 Konye apotu ikapolok luka idwe luka Amon kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Iwomit ijo ebe eyonit Daudi papakon, aijukakin jo lukitalakarete? Mam kereka eponito ikejaanakinakake airere, ka amudiar, ka airot akwap?”"
1Chronicles19:4 Koyana do Kanun ikeiaanakinak luka Daudi, kobaren kes, kotuboto ikeeenapen kokidin, kiton oosikee, kotwara kes,"
1Chronicles19:5 Kosodete ice alosit, kolimokis Daudi kwape kikonakinere ituŋa, Kijuka airiamakin kakes; naarai eleicikinito noi ituŋa. Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Kopaikis Yeriko aitodol neecekuniata ipenekakus, kosodete konyet aboŋun.”"
1Chronicles19:6 Nakeanyuniata idwe luka Amon ebe arokiata kesi kamaka Daudi, kijuka Kanun ka idwe luka Amon atalatan alukumit nuka epuesa aiboleikin agalin ka ikebwanenok koMesopotamia, koAram-maaka, ido koSoba."
1Chronicles19:7 Kwaijin kiboleikis agalin alukumin akaisauni ka nuarei, ka ekabaka loka Maaka ka ikejaanakinakake; luapotu kidukuroto koinaren ka Medeba. Kotukonokinos idwe luka Amon anyoun koreriakec, kopotu ejie."
1Chronicles19:8 Kepupu Daudi nun, kijuka Yoab, ka aiore kere naka ituŋa lukirigin."
1Chronicles19:9 Kolomut idwe luka Amon, kiderakinos ejie korute loka ere: ikabakan luapotu kopotu kejaas bonik orony."
1Chronicles19:10 Nakeanyunia Yoab ebe ejai ejie kinaren kokau da, koseu ituŋa kere luaseunitai koIsirael, kiderak kes aitiii Isurian."
1Chronicles19:11 Kititin Abisai onaeeke ituŋa ice kere, kiderakinos kesi aitiji idwe luka Amon."
1Chronicles19:12 Kotema atiar, “Arai keetelekasi Isurian eoŋ, kosodi ijo aisigalikin eoŋ: konye arai kiitelekasi idwe luka Amon jo, kasodi eoŋ aisigalikin jo."
1Chronicles19:13 Kotitinior, ketodiasi ekiliokone kanuka ituŋawok, ka ireria luka Edekewok: kiswama EJAKAIT nuitojokit ŋesi.”"
1Chronicles19:14 Kikunyak do Yoab ka ituŋa lukejaas kaŋes aitiji Isurian; kokerata kakonyeneke.
1Chronicles19:15 Keanyut idwe luka Amon ebe akerata Isurian, kokerata kesi da kakonyen nuka Abisai onaceke, kolomasi ore, Kosodi Yoab abunore Yerusalem."
1Chronicles19:16 Keanyut Isurian ebe epikor kes kakonyen nuka Isirael, kijukasi ikiyakia, kitolomut Isurian lukejaas okekwa juwai kEcor, kinarenik kes Sopak ekapolon loka aiore naka Kadareser."
1Chronicles19:17 Kolimokinai Daudi; kotukonok Isirael kere, kodok Yorodan, kobunok kes, kiderakin ejie aitiji kes. Kosodi kedau Daudi aiderakin ejie aitiii Isurian, kojioto."
1Chronicles19:18 Kokerata Isurian kakonyen nuka Isirael; koar Daudi luka Isurian, ituŋa luka agalin alukumin akanykaarei, ka lualosete kakeje ilukumin akaisaoŋon, koar da Sopak ekapolon loka aiore,"
1Chronicles19:19 Keanyut ikejaanakinak luka Kadareser ebe epikor kes kakonyen nuka Isirael, kitutukoto kaDaudi nukainapakin, kijaanakis ŋes: koneroto Isurian aisigalikin bobo idwe luka Amon."
1Chronicles20:1 Kosodi kanen, kedolu ekaru, kapak naalomariata ikabakan ejie, kinarenik Yoab agogoŋ naka aiore, kicanican akwap naka idwe luka Amon, kopotu kirigaut Raba, Konye kosalak Daudi Yerusalem, Kodany Yoab Raba, komudia."
1Chronicles20:2 Kolem Daudi aboko naka ekabakakee kakouke, kinin alaŋiruke atalata naka esabu, keiaas amor nuka akais nuipu tomake; kidokokinoi akou naka Daudi, kitolom Iunatuna lukore luipu noi."
1Chronicles20:3 Kitolom da ituŋa lukejaas nen, kotub kes kimusumenin, ka asua nuboket, ka aepei. Kiswamak Daudi ireria kere luka idwe luka Amon kwaŋin, Kobono Daudi ka ituŋa kere Yerusalem."
1Chronicles20:4 Kosodi kanen kokau kanun, koiau bobo ejie ka Ipilisitian koGeser: kosodi Sibekai Ekusatit aiar Sipai, loka odwe luka ekekososon: aponi kipikoroi."
1Chronicles20:5 Kosodi kojau bobo ejie ka Ipilisitian: koar Elanan okoku leka Yair Lami onace loka Goliat Egitit, koputos amorok naka akwarake bala akitoi naesonyere."
1Chronicles20:6 Kosodi koiau bobo ejie koGat, kejai kanen etuŋanan lokaojan, lokeiaas ibokor akaisaarei ka luonon, ikanykape luka ninikan, ka ikanykape luka ŋinikeiu; ŋes da aurikinio ekekososon."
1Chronicles20:7 Naamwanitor ŋesi Isirael, abu Yonatan okoku loka Simea onaee loka Daudi koar ŋes,"
1Chronicles20:8 Aurikinio nul ekekososon koGat; kibiroros kakan naka Daudi, kakan da naka ikekeiaanakinak."
1Chronicles21:1 Konyoik Satan aluikin Isirael, kisidik Daudi aimar Isirael."
1Chronicles21:2 Kotema Daudi Yoab ka ikapolok luka ituŋa ebe, “Koloto, kimarata Isirael anyoun koBeer-seba kiton Dan; kinyakutu akiro, kaien eoŋ etiaikee.”"
1Chronicles21:3 Kotema Yoab atiar, “Kiyatak EJAKAIT iketuŋa kwape ejaar etiaikee irwan akwatar: konye, ekajakait ekabaka, mere kes kere ikeiaanakinak luka ekabaka? Kanukinyo ekotor ekaiakait akirot na? Kanukinyo kitagwaunia ŋesi Isirael?”"
1Chronicles21:4 Konye kiteleka akirot naka ekabaka Yoab. Tape Yoab enyouni, kitor anatar Isirael kere, kobu Yerusalem."
1Chronicles21:5 Kobil Yoab etiai loka ituŋa Iuemari ŋesi mama ejai Daudi. Ŋul kere luka Isirael emwaasi ilukumin elukumit ka ilukumin akwatat luautununete ikileŋa: emwaasi ituŋa luka Yuda ilukumin akwat aoŋon ka ilukumin akaisakanykaarei luautununete ikileŋa.
1Chronicles21:6 Konye mam abu kimar Lebi ka Benyamin kotomakec: naarai apagalikinit akirot naka ekabaka Yoab.
1Chronicles21:7 Kokadak Edeke akirot nin: tape edanyi Isirael.
1Chronicles21:8 Kotema Daudi Edeke atiar, “Adiaka eoŋ noi, naarai eswama eoŋ akirot nin: konye kwana, keŋaiŋait, kolema numam adolit nuka ekonikeiaanakinan; naarai es wama eoŋ nukabaŋaanut naepol.”"
1Chronicles21:9 Kotema EJAKAIT Gad, ŋes ekadwaran loka Daudi atiar,"
