1Chronicles21:10 “Kolot kolimok Daudi ebe, ‘Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Kejaik jo akiro auni; koseu ijo adiopet kakesi, tetere keswamakini jo.’’’"
1Chronicles21:11 Kobu do Gad mama ejai Daudi, kotema ŋes atiar, “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Koseu naikoto;"
1Chronicles21:12 Arai bo ikar iuni luka ebeli; arai ilapio iuni amudiario kakonyen nuka lukasurupokon, kodolok jo ekileŋ loka lukasurupokon; arai bo apaarasia auni ekileŋ loka EJAKAIT, atular kakwap, emudiari emalaika loka EJAKAIT anatar ariino kerc nuka Isirael. Aso do koomoom nuaboŋokini eoŋ ŋol lokejukuni.”"
1Chronicles21:13 Kotema Daudi Gad atiar, “Katiokikis noi: mere kebirokin akan naka EJAKAIT: naarai, epol noi akeitim: kenyek aibirokin akan naka ituŋanan.”"
1Chronicles21:14 Kijuk EJAKAIT atular toma Isirael: kotwakata ituŋa ilukumin akaisakanykaarei luka Isirael.
1Chronicles21:15 Kijuka Edeke emalaika Yerusalem amudiar ŋes: konye napebala ŋesi emudiari, kosesen EJAKAIT, kiitu ŋesi aronis, kotema emalaika loamudiari ebe, “Adolo do: kinyaka akonikan.” Abwoi emalaika loka EJAKAIT eiduny kepeial loka Orunan Eyebusit."
1Chronicles21:16 Kiteluo Daudi akonyeneke, koanyu emalaika loka EJAKAIT ebwoi kidin kakuj ka akwap, kitiŋite ekileŋ loautuno kakanike, koriorite adoditor Yerusalem, Kosodi Daudi ka imakio aibiror ebuburia, konapitos ipukoi."
1Chronicles21:17 Kotema Daudi Edeke atiar, “Mere eoŋ loabu kecorak aimar ituŋa? Ŋes eoŋ loabu kadiaka eswama nukaronok; konye amerekekin nu, eswamata anyoika? Kenainait, wu EJAKAIT Ekadeke, kaluik eoŋ akonikan, ka ekek loka papaka; konye kinyek aluikin ikonituŋa, atular kes.”"
1Chronicles21:18 Kosodi emalaika loka EJAKAIT aicorakin Gad alimokin Daudi ebe, kolot Daudi, adukokin EJAKAIT etem opejal loka Orunan Eyebusit."
1Chronicles21:19 Kolot Daudi kakirot naka Gad, naalimokinit ŋesi kokiror loka EJAKAIT,"
1Chronicles21:20 Kibelokin Orunan, koany emalaika; konopata odweke iwonon lukeiaas kaŋes, Eeomi Orunan akima,"
1Chronicles21:21 Kebuni Daudi mama ejai Orunan, kosesen Orunan koany Daudi, kolom kopeial, kokukum mama ejai Daudi kitulurite akekou."
1Chronicles21:22 Kosodi Daudi atemar Orunan atiar, “Koinakinai eoŋ aibois naka epejal kalo, kadukok EJAKAIT etem: koinakinai eoŋ kataeakini jo etiaike kere: tetere enaŋi atular kotuna.’"
1Chronicles21:23 Kotema Orunan Daudi atiar, “Koyaŋa ŋes, kiswama ekajakait ekabaka nuitojokit kakonyeke: koany, ainakini jo imoŋin araun ainakineta nuieweio, ka iboro lukieomet kanuka akito, ka alos araun ainakinet naka akiria; ainakini kere.”"
1Chronicles21:24 Kotema ekabaka Daudi Orunan atiar, “Mam; konye abeit kigwelakin kotiaike kere: naarai mam ayaŋaari nukon ainakin EJAKAIT, karaida ainakin ainakinet naicweio kiboro kaluiinakina taai.”"
1Chronicles21:25 Koinak Daudi Orunan isekelin akwat akanykape luka esabu lueninio itia aibois.
1Chronicles21:26 Kodukok Daudi EJAKAIT etem nepenen, koinak ainakineta nuieweio ka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, kiwone EJAKAIT; Koboŋok ŋes kakim naebuni kokuju kotem loka ainakineta nuieweio."
1Chronicles21:27 Kicorak EJAKAIT emalaika; kinyakak bobo ekileŋ akuraruke.
1Chronicles21:28 Kapak kaŋin, keanyu Daudi ebe abu EJAKAIT Koboŋok ŋes kopeial leka Orunan Eyebusit, kosodi konyet ainakin asuban kanen."
1Chronicles21:29 Naarai kapak kaŋin kejai ewema lokalaunan loka EJAKAIT, loabu Musa kosub kamodiŋ, ka etem loka ainakineta nuieweio aibois naicelelei koGibeon."
1Chronicles21:30 Konye koner Daudi alosit nen aiŋitun EJAKAIT: naarai akuriana ekileŋ loka emalaika loka EJAKAIT.
1Chronicles22:1 Kosodi Daudi atemar atiar, “Lo ŋes etogo loka EJAKAIT Edeke, lo ŋes etem loka ainakineta nuieweio loka Isirael.”"
1Chronicles22:2 Kicorak Daudi atukonokin imo lukeiaas akwap naka Isirael; kibwaik ikadukok aike amor aiduk etogo loka Edeke,"
1Chronicles22:3 Kitemok Daudi asua nuipu noi nuka isumalin luka ikirigin luka irutei, ka luimorikikinete; ka aisinin nuipu noi numam ininos;"
1Chronicles22:4 ka iresia lumam imarunos; naarai apotu Isidonin ka luka Turo koyaut iresia luipu noi mama ejai Daudi.
1Chronicles22:5 Kotema Daudi atiar, “Edit Solomon okokuka, enonok, kibusakinit etogo loekotoi adukokin EJAKAIT korai loitopolooritai, loka eemut, ka loka aibuses anatar akwapin kere: kanuka ŋun etemokini eoŋ iboroke.” Kitemok Daudi luipu noi eroko ketwana,"
1Chronicles22:6 Kosodi anyaraun Solomon okokuke, kicorak ŋes adukokin EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, etogo."
1Chronicles22:7 Kotema Daudi Solomon okokuke atiar, “Kejai otaukan adukokin ekiror loka EJAKAIT Ekadeke etogo,"
1Chronicles22:8 Konye kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mamakan ebe, ‘Ibuko ijo aokot nuipu, ijii noi: mam jo idukokini ekakiror etogo, naarai ibuko ijo aokot nuipu kakwap kakonyeneka:"
1Chronicles22:9 Koany, kiwurikinio jo esapat, loeraun etuŋanan loka ainapakin: esinapikini eoŋ ŋes kama kalukasurupoke kere luirimorito: naarai emaikinio ekekiror Solomon, ainakini eoŋ Isirael ainapakin ka aiyamakin kapaarasiake."
1Chronicles22:10 Edukokini ŋesi ekakiror etogo; eraun ŋesi okokuka, eoŋ da araun papake; eticasi eicoloŋ loka ajakanutuke koIsirael ikar kere.’"
1Chronicles22:11 Aso, ikakoku, koiai EJAKAIT kajo; kokerianar, koduk etogo loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kwape alimokinia ŋesi nukon."
1Chronicles22:12 Konye ca koinak EJAKAIT jo acoa ka ajenun, kicorak jo nuka Isirael; tetere iricit ekisil loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke."
1Chronicles22:13 Kwaŋin ikerianar, arai ikokit aitodol ikisila ka itubesia lueeorakinit EJAKAIT Musa nuka Isirael: kicat, kotitinior; sirikikurianar, kwabo sirikiyaloŋoŋ."
1Chronicles22:14 Kwana, koany, kaitaaritoika abu ketemok etogo loka EJAKAIT atalatan alukumin akwatat nuka esabu, ka atalatan alukumin alukumit nuka epuesa; aisinin ka asua numam ininos; naarai ipu noi: abu ketemok da akito ka amor; iyatakini ijo da."
1Chronicles22:15 Bobo da ejaas ikeswamak kaio luipu noi, ikaiepak ka ikeswamak amor ka akito, ka ituŋa kere luepiriaka kopone kere loka aswam;"
1Chronicles22:16 luka esabu, ka epuesa, ka aisinin, ka asua, mam imarunos; konyou, kiswama, koiai EJAKAIT kaio.”"
1Chronicles22:17 Kicorak da Daudi ikapolok kere luka Isirael aiŋarakin Solomon okokuke, ebe,"
1Chronicles22:18 “Mam kereka EJAKAIT Ekusideke ejai kayes? mam ŋes kisinapik yes kaŋoliwai? Naarai abu kiiaik lueboiete kakwap akanika; kenonokiar akwap kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kakonyen nuka iketuŋa da,"
1Chronicles22:19 Kwana kibwaikis itauonokus ka aijarakus amoot EJAKAIT Ekusideke; konyoutu do, kodukoto yesi aibois nakalaunan naka EJAKAIT Edeke, aitolomar asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT, ka iboro lukalaunak luka Edeke, togo loekotoi adukokin ekiror loka EJAKAIT,”"
1Chronicles23:1 Amoion Daudi kodolot ikekar; kitarau Solomon okekuce ekabaka loka Isirael.
1Chronicles23:2 Kotukonok ikapolok kere luka Isirael, ka isasedotin ka Ilebin."
1Chronicles23:3 Aponi kimarai Ilebin ageun kaluka ikar akaisauni ka adepar; etiaikec kakwesikec, ŋinituŋanan, emwaasi ilukumin akaisauni ka lukanykauni."
1Chronicles23:4 Ka nul, koanyanarcte ilukumin akaisaarei ka luonon aswam naka etogo loka EJAKAIT: ilukumin ikanykape kes ikapolokitok ka ikatubok:"
1Chronicles23:5 Ilukumin iwonon keraas ikagolok; kituritos da ilukumin iwonon EJAKAIT kiboro luabala Daudi ebe, “Abu eoŋ keswama kes aituritor.”"
1Chronicles23:6 Kotiaka Daudi kes toma abeanakin kwape ajaatar odwe luka Lebi; Gereson, ka Kokat, ka Merari."
1Chronicles23:7 Luka Igeresonin; Ladan ka Simei.
1Chronicles23:8 Odwe luka Ladan; Yekiel lokapolon, ka Setam, ka Yoel, iuni."
1Chronicles23:9 Odwe luka Simei; Selomot, ka Kasiel, ka’ Karan, iuni. Ŋul kes ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaa luka Ladan."
1Chronicles23:10 Odwe luka Simei; Yakat, ka Sina, ka Yeus, ka Beria. Ŋul iwonon kes odwe luka Simei."
1Chronicles23:11 Yakat ŋes lokapolon, Sisa lokiareit; konye amameete Yeus ka Beria odwe luipu; kanuka ŋun kimarakinitete araun ekek ediopet loka lukapapaakec."
1Chronicles23:12 Odwe luka Kokat; Amuram, ka Isar, ka Keburon, ka Usiel, iwonon."
1Chronicles23:13 Odwe luka Amuram; Aaron ka Musa: aponi Aaron kotiakai tetere etalauni iboro lukalaunak noi, ŋes ka odweke, ikar kere, aisupuruunun lukisupurununo kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, aijaanakin ŋes, ka ailipenen arereŋ kokirorike ikar kere."
1Chronicles23:14 Konye Musa, etuŋanan loka Edeke, aponi odweke komaikinai ateker naka Lebi."
1Chronicles23:15 Odwe luka Musa; Geresom ka Elieser.
1Chronicles23:16 Odwe luka Gercsom; Sebuellokapolon.
1Chronicles23:17 Odwe luka Elieser kes Rekabia lokapolon. Amameete Elieser icedwe lusap; konye epu noi odwe luka Rekabia,"
1Chronicles23:18 Odwe luka Isar; Selomit lokapolon.
1Chronicles23:19 Odwe luka Keburon; Yeria lokapolon, Amaria lokiareit, Yakasiel lokiwuniet, ka Yekameam lckiwononet."
1Chronicles23:20 Odwe luka Usiel; Mika lokapolon, ka Isia lokiareit."
1Chronicles23:21 Odwe luka Merari; Mali ka Musi. Odwe luka Mali; Eleasar ka Kis.
1Chronicles23:22 Kotwana Eleasar, komameete idwe lusap, konye lupesur bon: komanyata ikeeeinaean odwe luka Kis kes."
1Chronicles23:23 Odwe luka Musi; Mali, ka Eder, ka Yeremot, iuni."
1Chronicles23:24 Ŋul kes odwe luka Lebi kwape ajaatar ikekia luka lukapapaakec, kes ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaa luka ŋul kaluaponi kimarakinitete, kotiai loka ikiroria, kakwesikec, lueswamaete aswam naka aiiaanakin naka etogo loka EJAKAIT, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka adepar da."
1Chronicles23:25 Naarai abala Daudi ebe, “Abu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael kisinapik iketuŋa; iboienenei ŋesi koYerusalem ikar kere."
1Chronicles23:26 Mam bobo ipudas Ilebin adakar ewema lokalaunan ka iboroke kere luka aijaanakiniken.”
1Chronicles23:27 Naarai kakiro nukawasia nuka Daudi aponi kimarai idwe luka Lebi, ageun kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka adepar."
1Chronicles23:28 Naarai aswamukec ŋes aijaanakin odwe luka Aaron toma aijaanakin naka etogo loka EJAKAIT, alaroi, ka agolai, ka aiteseg iboro lukalaunak kere, ŋes aswam naka aijaanakin naka etogo loka Edeke."
1Chronicles23:29 Naka imugatin luka aitodikin, ka akiria nuidicic nuka ainakinet naka akiria, arai nuka imugatin luebenen lumam itubuunitoi, arai lupeon, arai luipoo, kaiponesio kere luka aitem ka luka etiai;"
1Chronicles23:30 Abwoenen aimal ka aiturit EJAKAIT, ninitupuruc, ka abon da;"
1Chronicles23:31 Ainakin ainakineta nuieweio kere mama ejai EJAKAIT, kanuka asabaton, napilamununei elap, kopucin lueseunitai, kotiai kwape kejaar aicorakinetekec, tiritir kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT:"
1Chronicles23:32 Tetere iricete aidar ewema loka airiamunun, ka aidar aibois nakalaunan, ka aidar iinacanakee odwe luka Aaron, aijaanakin kotogo loka EJAKAIT."
1Chronicles24:1 Abeanakin naka odwe luka Aaron ŋes na. Odwe luka Aaron; Nadab ka Abiku, ka Eleasar ka Itamar,"
1Chronicles24:2 Konye apotu Nadab ka Abiku kotwakata eriŋa papakec, komameete kes idwe; kanuka nun kiswamata Eleasar ka Itamar esasedotene,"
1Chronicles24:3 Abu Daudi nepepe ka Sadok lokodwe luka Eleasar, ka Akimelek lokodwe luka Itamar kotiak kes kwape ajaar aitemonokin naka aijaanakinikec."
1Chronicles24:4 Aponi kodumunai lukapolok luipu lukodwe luka Eleasar adepar odwe luka Itamar; aponi kotiakai kwanata: emwaasi lukodwe luka Eleasar itomon ka lukanykape, lukapolok luka ikekia luka Iukapapaakec; ka lukodwe luka Itamar kwape ajaatar ikekia luka lukapapaakec emwaasi ikanykauni."
1Chronicles24:5 Aponi kotiakai koroet kopone ediopet kere; naarai kejaas ikapolok luka kibois nakalaunan, ka ikapolok luka Edeke, lukodwe luka Eleasar, ka lukodwe luka Itamar da."
1Chronicles24:6 Abu Semaia okoku loka Netanel ekewadikan, lokerai loka Ilebin, kiwadik kes kakonyen nuka ekabaka, ka ikapolok, ka Sadok esasedoti, ka Abimelek okoku loka Abiatar, ka Ikapolok luka ikekia luka Iukapapaakec luka isasedotin ka Ilebin; aponi kolemunai ekek ediopet loka lukapapaakec luka isasedotin ka Ilebin; aponi kolemunai ekek ediopet loka lukapapaakec kanuka Eleasar, ka ediopet kanuka Itamar."
1Chronicles24:7 Kobeik eroet losodit Yekoiarib, lokiareit Yedaia;"
1Chronicles24:8 Lokiwuniet Karim, lokiwononet Seorim;"
1Chronicles24:9 Lokikanyet Malikiya, lokikanyetekape Miyamin;"
1Chronicles24:10 Lokikanyetekaarei Kakos, lokikanyetekauni Abiya;"
1Chronicles24:11 Lokikanyetekaonon Yesua, lokitomonet Sekania;"
1Chronicles24:12 Lokitomonet ka lodiopet Eliasib, lokitomonet kaarei Yakim;"
1Chronicles24:13 Lokitomonet kauni Kupa, lokitomonet kaonon Yesebeab;"
1Chronicles24:14 Lokitomonet kakany Biliga, lokitomonet kakanykape Imer;"
1Chronicles24:15 Lokitomonet kakanykaarei Kesir, lokitomonet kakanykauni Kapises;"
1Chronicles24:16 Lokitomonet kakanykaonon Petakia, lokakaisaarei Yekesikel;"
1Chronicles24:17 Lokakaisaarei ka lodiopet Yakin, lokakaisaarei ka luarei Gamul;"
1Chronicles24:18 Lokakaisaarei ka luuni Delaia, lokakaisaarei ka luonon Maasia."
1Chronicles24:19 Ŋin ŋes abeanakinikec kaiiaanakinikec, alomar togo loka EJAKAIT kwape ajaar aicorakinet naainakinitai kes kama ka Aaron papaakee, kwape ecorakinitor kes EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael."
1Chronicles24:20 Luka luedeunos lukodwe luka Lebi: lukodwe luka Amuram, Subael; lukodwe luka Subael, Yedeia,"
1Chronicles24:21 Luka Rekabia: lokodwe luka Rekabia, Isia lokapolon."
1Chronicles24:22 Luka Isarin, Selomot; lokodwe luka Selomot, Yakat."
1Chronicles24:23 Odwe luka Keburon; Yeria lokapolon, Amaria lokiareit, Yakasiel lokiwuniet, Yekameam lokiwononet,"
1Chronicles24:24 Odwe luka Usiel, Mika; lokodwe luka Mika, Samir."
1Chronicles24:25 Onaee loka Mika, Isia: lokodwe luka Isia, Sekaria."
1Chronicles24:26 Odwe luka Merari; Mali ka Musi; odwe luka Yaasia; Beno,"
1Chronicles24:27 Odwe luka Merari; luka Yaasia, Beno, ka Sokam, ka Sakur, ka Ibiri."
1Chronicles24:28 Loka Mali; Eleasar, loamameete idwe lusap,"
1Chronicles24:29 Luka Kis; odwe luka Kis, Yerameel,"
1Chronicles24:30 Odwe luka Musi; Mali, ka Eder, ka Yerimot. Ŋul kes odwe luka Ilebin kwape ajaatar ikekia luka lukapapaakec."
1Chronicles24:31 Ŋul da apotu kilamilamata kwape kiinacanakee odwe luka Aaron kakonyen nuka Daudi ekabaka, ka Sadok, ka Akimelek, ka ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaa luka isasedotin ka Ilebin; ikekia luka lukapapaa luka lokapolon kwape ka nul luka onaceke lodidi."
1Chronicles25:1 Bobo da abu Daudi ka ikapolok luka aiore kotiak ice lukodwe luka Asap, ka luka Keman, ka luka Yedutun, aijaanakin, luedwarete kadeudeun, ka isabulin, ka ikacwi: lo ŋes etiaikec kanul kalueswamaete aswam kwape ajaar aijaanakinikec:"
1Chronicles25:2 Lukodwe luka Asap; Sakur, ka Yosep, ka Netania, ka Asarela, odwe luka Asap; kakan naka Asap luadwarenenete kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka ekabaka,"
1Chronicles25:3 Luka Yedutun: odwe luka Yedutun; Gedalia, ka Seri, ka Yesaia, ka Kasabia, ka Matitia, ikanykape; kakan naka papakec Yedutun kadeudeu, luadwarenenete kaimal kaiturit EJAKAIT."
1Chronicles25:4 Luka Keman: odwe luka Keman; Bukia, ka Matania, ka Usiel, ka Sebuel, ka Yerimot, ka Kanania, ka Kanani, ka Eliata, ka Gidaliti, ka Romamiti-eser, ka Yosebekasa, ka Maloti, ka Kotir, ka Makasiot:"
1Chronicles25:5 Ŋul kere odwe luka Keman ekadwaran loka ekabaka kakiro nuka Edeke, aikeun amumwarat. Abu Edeke koinak Keman idwe lusap itomon ka luonon ka lupesur iuni."
1Chronicles25:6 Ŋul kere kejaas kakan naka papakee ayoore kotogo loka EJAKAIT, kikacwi, ka isabulin, ka adeudeun, aijaanakin kotogo loka Edeke; Asap, ka Yedutun, ka Keman lukeiaas kaicorakinet naka ekabaka,"
1Chronicles25:7 Etiaikee, nepepe kiinacanakec luetuutooritai ayeonokin EJAKAIT, kes kere lukepiriaka, emwaasi akwat aarei ka akaisakanykauni ka ikanykauni."
1Chronicles25:8 Apotu kilamilamata ajenun abeanakinikec, kere koriakanara, ludidik ka lukapolok, ekesisianakinan ka ekesisian."
1Chronicles25:9 Kobeik eroet losodit Yosep loka Asap; lokiareit Gedalia; ŋes ka iinaeanake ka odweke emwaasi itomon kaluarei.
1Chronicles25:10 Lokiwuniet Sakur, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei:"
1Chronicles25:11 Lokiwononet Isiri, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:12 Lokikanyet Netania, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei,"
1Chronicles25:13 Lokikanyetekape Bukia, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:14 Lokikanyetekaarei Yesarela, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:15 Lokikanyetekauni Yesaia, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:16 Lokikanyetekaonon Matania, odweke ka iinacanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:17 Lokitomonet Simei, odweke ka iinacanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:18 Lokitomonet ka lodiopet Asarel, odweke ka iinacanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:19 Lokitomonet kaarei Kasabia, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:20 Lokitomonet kauni Subael, odweke ka iinacanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:21 Lokitomonet kaonon Matitia, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:22 Lokitomonet kakany Yeremot, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:23 Lokitomonet kakanykape Kanaia, odweke ka iinacanake, itomon ka luarei,"
1Chronicles25:24 Lokitomonet kakanykaarei Yosebekasa, odweke ka iinacanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:25 Lokitomonet kakanykauni Kanani, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:26 Lokitomonet kakanykaonon Maloti, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:27 Lokakaisaarei Eliata, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:28 Lokakaisaarei ka lodiopet Kotir, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:29 Lokakaisaarei ka luarei Gidaliti, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:30 Lokakaisaarei ka luuni Makasiot, odweke ka iinacanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles25:31 Lokakaisaarei ka luonon Romamitieser, odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka luarei."
1Chronicles26:1 Abeanakin naka ikagolok: luka Ikorakin; Meselemia okoku loka Kore, lokodwe luka Asap."
1Chronicles26:2 Ajaas Meselemia idwe lusap; Sekaria ekiyai, Yediaellokiareit, Sebadia lokiwuniet, Yatiniel, lokiwoŋonet;"
1Chronicles26:3 Elam lokikanyet, Yekokanan lokikanyetekape, Eliekoenai lokikanyetekaarei."
1Chronicles26:4 Ajaas Obed-edom idwe lusap; Semaia ekiyai, Yekosaba lokiareit, Yoa lokiwuniet, Sakar lokiwononet, ka Netanellokikanyet;"
1Chronicles26:5 Amiellokikanyetekape, Isakar lokikanyetekaarei, Peuletai lokikanyetekauni: naarai kisireren Edeke ŋes,"
1Chronicles26:6 Aponi kourikinai Semaia da okokuke idwe lusap, Iukeyaito ekek loka papakee: naarai keraas ituŋa lukirigin luetitin."
1Chronicles26:7 Odwe luka Semaia; Otini, ka Repael, ka Obed, ka Elisabad, lukeraas iinaeanake ituŋa luetitin, Eliku, ka Semakia."
1Chronicles26:8 Ŋul kere odwe luka Obed-edom; kes ka odwekee ka iinaeanakee, ituŋa lukapedor ka agogoŋ aijaanakin; akaisakanykape ka luarei luka Obed-edom."
1Chronicles26:9 Ajaas Meselemia idwe lusap ka iinaean, ituŋa luetitin, itomon ka lukanykauni."
1Chronicles26:10 Kosa da, lokodwe luka Merari, ajaas ŋes idwe lusap; Simiri lokapolon (naarai abu papake kitarau ŋes lokapolon kwabo mam kerai ekiyai);"
1Chronicles26:11 Kilikia lokiareit, Tebalia lokiwuniet, Sekaria lokiwononet: odwe ka iinaean kere luka Kosa emwaasi itomon ka luuni."
1Chronicles26:12 Kotoma kanul kobeanakinos ikagolok, ituŋa lukapolok, lukejaas nukisinadio, kwape kiinaeanakee, aiiaanakin kotogo loka EJAKAIT,"
1Chronicles26:13 Apotu kilamilamata, ludidik kwape kalukapolok, kwapc ajaatar ikekia luka lukapapaakee, kanuka nolirute."
1Chronicles26:14 Kobeik Selemia eroet lokokide. Kosodete ailamilamikin Sekaria okokuke, ekapetan akiro lokeeobe; kobeik ekeroet ari naka agolitomei,"
1Chronicles26:15 Kobeik Obed-edom ari naka eŋalakimak: ka odweke etogo loka ainad.
1Chronicles26:16 Kobeik Supim ka Kosa ari nakoto, erute loka Saleket, nekejai eititiria loedokari, kiteonoro ikedarak kaluee."
1Chronicles26:17 Keiaas Ilebin ikanykape ari nakokide, iwonon ninipaaran ari naka agolitomei, iwonon ninipaaran ari naka eŋalakimak, ka iareiarei kanuka etogo loka ainad,"
1Chronicles26:18 Kanuka Parabar ari nakoto, iwonon neejai eititiria, ka iarei oParabar."
1Chronicles26:19 Ŋun kes abeanakineta nuka ikagolok; lukodwe luka Ikorakin, ka lukodwe luka Merari."
1Chronicles26:20 Luka Ilebin, kopolokinite Akiya aiŋadisia nuka etogo loka Edeke, ka aiŋadisia nuka iboro luketiakunitai,"
1Chronicles26:21 Odwe luka Ladan; odwe luka Igeresonin lukeraas luka Ladan, ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee lukeraas luka Ladan Egeresonit; Yekieli."
1Chronicles26:22 Odwe luka Yekieli; Setam, ka Yoel onaeeke, kopolokinito aiŋadisia nuka etogo loka EJAKAIT,"
1Chronicles26:23 Luka Imuramain, luka Isarin, ka luka Ikeburonin, ka luka Iusielin;"
1Chronicles26:24 Kerai Sebuel okoku loka Geresom, okoku loka Musa ekayaiton aiŋadisia."
1Chronicles26:25 Ka iinacanake; loka Elieser kobu Rekabia okokuke ka Yesaia okokuke, ka Yoram okokuke, ka Sikiri okokuke, ka Selemot okokuke,"
1Chronicles26:26 Kopolokinite Selemot ŋol ka ikeinaean aiŋadisia kere nuka iboro luatiakunitai, luapotu Daudi, ka ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee, ikapolok luka ilukumin, ka lukakwatat, ka ikapolok luka aiore kotiakasi."
1Chronicles26:27 Luka lunatuna luadumunete koiiisio apotu kotiakasi aiteteun etogo loka EJAKAIT,"
1Chronicles26:28 Kere da luabu Samuel ekadwaran, ka Saul okoku loka Kis, ka Abiner okoku loka Ner, ka Yoab okoku loka Seruia, kotiak; ŋinibore kere yeniketiakunitai, kerai nin yenikakan naka Selemot ka iinaeanake."
1Chronicles26:29 Luka Isarin, apotu Kenania ka odweke kiswamata aswam nakokina koIsirael, araut ikapolokitok ka ikatubok."
1Chronicles26:30 Luka Ikeburonin, Kasabia ka iinaeanake, ituŋa Iuetitiŋ, elukumit ka akwat akanykaarei, kopolokinito Isirael okekwa juwai Yorodan ari nakoto; kanuka aswam kere naka EJAKAIT, ido aijaanakin ekabaka."
1Chronicles26:31 Luka Ikeburonin kerai Yeriya lokapolon, loka Ikeburonin, kwape ajaar aurikee kwape ajaatar ikekia luka lukapapaakec. Kokaru loka akaisaoŋon loka airum naka Daudi aponi komoai, ido kodumunai kakesi ituŋa lukirigin luetitin koYaser loka Gilead."
1Chronicles26:32 Iinaeanake, ituŋa luetitin, emwaasi ilukumin iarei ka akwat akanykaarei, ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee, luabu Daudi kitarau ikapolokitok luka Ireubenin, ka Igadin, ka atutubet naka ateker naka Imanasein, kaŋinikirot mama ejai Edeke, kakiro da nuka ekabaka."
1Chronicles27:1 Idwe luka Isirael kwape keiaar etiaikec, kes ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee, ka ikapolok luka ilukumin ka luka akwatat, ka ikapolokokec luapotu kijaanakis ekabaka, kakiro kere nuka abeanakineta nuelomunete ka nuelomarete ŋclilap anatar ilapio kere luka ekaru, kaninibeikinet emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luonon."
1Chronicles27:2 Kopolokinite Yasobeam okoku loka Sabudiel abeikinet nasodit naka elap losodit; emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luoŋon kotoma abeikineteke.
1Chronicles27:3 Kerai ŋesi loka idwe luka Peres, ekapolon loka ikapolok kere luka ajore kolap losodit."
1Chronicles27:4 Kopolokinite Dodai Ekokait abeikinet naka elap lokiareit, ka abeikineteke; ka Mikilot ekayaiton: emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luonon kotoma abeikineteke."
1Chronicles27:5 Kerai Benaia, okoku loka Yekoiada esasedoti ekapolon lokiwuniet loka ajore naka elap lokiwuniet, lokapolon: emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka Iuonon kotoma abeikineteke."
1Chronicles27:6 Ŋes Benaia ŋol, lokerai etuŋanan lokirigi loka akaisauni, loapolokinit akaisauni: kerai Amisabad okokuke kotoma abeikineteke."
1Chronicles27:7 Kerai Asakel onaee loka Yoab ekapolon lokiwononet loka elap lokiwononet, ka Sebedia okokuke atupakin ŋes: emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luonon kotoma abeikineteke."
1Chronicles27:8 Kerai Samut Isarit ekapolon lokikanyet loka elap lokikanyet: emwaasi ilukunilii akaisaarei ka luonon kotoma abeikineteke,"
1Chronicles27:9 Kerai Ira okoku loka Ikes Etekoit ekapolon lokikanyetekape loka elap lokikanyetekape: emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luonon kotoma abeikineteke.
1Chronicles27:10 Kerai Keles Epelonit loka idwe luka Epuraim ekapolon lokikanyetekaarei loka elap lokikanyetekaarei: emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luonon kotoma abeikineteke.
1Chronicles27:11 Kerai Sibekai Ekusatit loka Iserakin ekapolon lokikanyetekauni loka elap lokikanyetekauni: emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luonon kotoma abeikineteke.
1Chronicles27:12 Kerai Abieser Enatotait, loka Ibenyaminin ekapolon lokikanyetekaonon Ioka elap Iokikanyetekaonon; emwaasi Ilukumin akaisaarei ka luonon ketoma abeikineteke."
1Chronicles27:13 Kerai Makarai Enetopatit, loka Iserakin ekapolon lokitomonet loka elap lokitomonet: emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luonon kotoma abeikineteke,"
1Chronicles27:14 Kerai Benaia Epiratonit loka idwe luka Epuraim ekapolon lokitomonet ka lodiopet loka elap lokitomonet ka lodiopet: emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luonon kotoma abeikineteke.
1Chronicles27:15 Kerai Kelidai Enetopatit, loka Otiniel, ekapolon lokitomonet kaarei loka elap lokitomonet kaarei: emwaasi ilukumin akaisaarei ka luonon kotoma abeikineteke."
1Chronicles27:16 Bobo da luapolokinito atekerin nuka Isirael: kerai Elieser okoku loka Sikiri ekayaiton loka Ireubenin: Sepatia okoku loka Maaka ŋes loka Isimeonin:
1Chronicles27:17 Loka Lebi, Kasabia okoku loka Kemuel: loka Aaron, Sadok."
1Chronicles27:18 Loka Yuda, Eliku, ediopet koinaean luka Daudi: loka Isakar, Omiri okoku loka Mikael:"
1Chronicles27:19 Loka Sebulun, Isimaia okoku loka Obadia: loka Naputali, Yeremot okoku loka Asuriel:"
1Chronicles27:20 Loka idwe luka Epuraim, Kosea okoku loka Asasia: loka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase, Yoel okoku loka Pedaia:"
1Chronicles27:21 Loka atutubet naka ateker naka Manase koGilead, Ido okoku loka Sekaria: loka Benyamin, Yaasiel okoku loka Abiner:"
1Chronicles27:22 Loka Dan, Asarel okoku loka Yerokam. Ŋul kes keraas ikapolok luka atekerin nuka Isirael."
1Chronicles27:23 Konye mam Daudi abu kimar etiai kanul luka ikar akaisaarei ka lueroko edolo ŋu!: naarai abu EJAKAIT kotema ebe iyatakini Isirael kwape aacer nuka akui,"
1Chronicles27:24 Kogeu Yoab okoku loka Seruia aimar, konye mam abu konetak; ŋes abunokinia Isirael anyunyura; etiai da mam aponi kiwadikai toma oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ekabaka Daudi."
1Chronicles27:25 Kopolokinite Asumabet okoku loka Adiel aiŋadisia nuka ekabaka: kopolokinite Yonatan okoku loka Usia aiŋadisia nukejaas komanikoria, koreria lukapolok ka ludidik, ka ireria luebwaitai."
1Chronicles27:26 Kopolokinite Esiri okoku loka Kelub nul lueswamaete komanikoria akor.
1Chronicles27:27 Kopolokinite Simei Eramatit imanikoria luka imusabibun: kopolokinite Sabi di Esipimit araito nuka imanikoria luka imusabibun aili ebino.
1Chronicles27:28 Kopolokinite Baalkanan Egederit iseitunin ka isukumorio lukejaas apuuton: kopolokinite Yoas aili akinyet.
1Chronicles27:29 Kopolokinite Sitirai Esaronit isipanin luadakas Saron: kopolokinite Sapat okoku loka Adulai isipanin lukejaas aditon.
1Chronicles27:30 Kopolokinite Obil Isimaelit akaalai: kopolokinite Yedeia Emeronotit asigman,"
1Chronicles27:31 Kopolokinite Yasis Ekagirit amerekekin. Ŋul kere kes ikayaitok luka iboro luka ekabaka Daudi.
1Chronicles27:32 Kerai Yonatan onaee loka Daudi ekapetan akiro, etuŋanan loepol aijen, ekewadikan: kejai Yekiel okoku loka Kakumoni ka odwe luka ekabaka,"
1Chronicles27:33 Kerai Akitopel ekapetan akiro loka ekabaka: kerai Kusai Earakit epapero loka ekabaka.
1Chronicles27:34 Abu Yekoiada okoku loka Benaia kotupakinite Akitopel, kosodi Abiatar: kerai Yoab ekapolon loka ajore naka ekabaka."
1Chronicles28:1 Kotukonok Daudi ikapolok kere luka Isirael Yerusalem, ikapolok luka atekerin, ka ikapolok luka irioneta lukebeanakinos aijaanakin eka baka, ka ikapolok luka ilukumin, ka ikapolok luka akwatat, ka ikayaitok luka iboro kere ka ibaren luka ekabaka ka odweke, nepepe kikapolokitok, ka ituŋa lukirigin, kes ituŋa kere lukirigin luetitin,"
1Chronicles28:2 Kosodi Daudi ekabaka aibwo kakejeke, kotema atiar, “Kopupokinai, ikainaean, ka ikatuŋa; keiai otaukan adukokin asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT, ka eicoloŋ loka akeje nuka Edekewok etogo loka aiyeŋun; ido abu ketemokinite aiduk."
1Chronicles28:3 Konye abu Edeke katema eoŋ atiar, ‘Mam jo idukokini ekakiror etogo, naarai irai ijo etuŋanan lokijiisio, ibu kobuko aokot.’"
1Chronicles28:4 Konye abu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, kaseu eoŋ kokek kere loka papaka araun ekabaka loka Isirael ikar kere: naarai abu koseu Yuda araun ekapolon; kokek loka Yuda da, ekek loka papaka; kodwe luka papaka kalelak eoŋ aitaraun ekabaka loka Isirael kere:"
1Chronicles28:5 Kodweka da kere (naarai kainak EJAKAIT eoŋ idwe lusap luipu), abu koseu Solomon aiboikin oicoloŋ loka ajakanut naka EJAKAIT airum Isirael."
1Chronicles28:6 Kalimok eoŋ ebe, ‘Solomon okokukon, ŋes eduki ekatogo ka akalaroi: naarai aseu eoŋ ŋes araun okokuka, eoŋ da araun papake."
1Chronicles28:7 Etieasi akejakanut ikar kere, arai kinyikoki aiswamaenen aicorakinetaka ka itubesiaka, kwape lolo.’"
1Chronicles28:8 Aso do, kakonyen nuka Isirael kere, ekodet loka EJAKAIT, kopupi Edekewok, korieenenete komoenenete aicorakineta kere nuka EJAKAIT Ekusideke: tetere irumete akwap na naejok, kinyeiniata araun airumet naka ikusidwe lukitupanakinete yes ikar kere,"
1Chronicles28:9 “Ŋo da, Solomon okokuka, kojenu Edeke loka papakon, kiiaanakinenei ŋes ketau loedolit ka aomisio nuekotosi: naarai enici EJAKAIT itauon kere, ejeŋi aitetemonor kere nuka aomisio: arai imoenenei ŋes, kitakananakini jo: konye arai iialenenei ŋes, kirenei jo ikar kere."
1Chronicles28:10 Aso koeoite; naarai kiseu EJAKAIT jo adukokin aibois nakalaunan etogo: aso kicat, kiswama.”"
1Chronicles28:11 Kosodi Daudi ainakin Solomon okokuke aput naka alomaret naka eyekalu, ka naka itogoike, ka aiŋadisiake, ka agolaike nukokuju, ka agolaike nukotoma, ka aibois naka eicoloŋ-lokaitim:"
1Chronicles28:12 Ka aput naka nukejaas omoyoke kere, nuka alaroi nuka etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka agolai kere nuelukunito, naka aiŋadisia nuka etogo loka Edeke, ka naka aiŋadisia nuka iboro luatiakunitai."
1Chronicles28:13 Babo da nuka abeanakineta nuka isasedotin ka Ilebin, ka aswam kere naka aijaanakin kotogo loka EJAKAIT, ka iboro kere luka aijaanakin kotogo loka EJAKAIT."
1Chronicles28:14 Esabu loitemitoi loka iboro luka esabu, iboro kere luka nolipone loka aijaanakin; epuesa loitemitoi loka iboro kere luka epuesa, iboro kere luka ŋolipone loka aijaanakin."
1Chronicles28:15 Itemem da esabu loka ipirin luka atalai, loka atalaike, nuka esabu, loetemem loka nolipir loka atala ka atalaike: ido loka ipirin luka atalai luka epuesa, epuesa loetemem loka nolipir loka atala, ka atalaike, kwape kejaar aijaanakin naka nolipir loka atala."
1Chronicles28:16 Etemem da esabu loka imesan luka imugatin luka aitodikin, kaŋolimesa; epuesa da loka imesan luka epuesa."
1Chronicles28:17 Ka igolun luka akiriŋ, ka atanya, ka akolin, nuka esabu loelai: etemem da esabu loka atuba, kaninituba; etemem da epuesa loka atuba, ka ninituba."
1Chronicles28:18 Etemem do esabu loililiauna loka etem loka lukisupurununo: esabu da loka aput naka agali, kes ikerubim, luigararaete abebenokakec, arapaar asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT."
1Chronicles28:19 Kobala Daudi ebe, “Ŋun kere ketejenunete eoŋ kaiwadikaeta kakan naka EJAKAIT, kes aswamisio kere nuka aput kana.”"
1Chronicles28:20 Kotema Daudi Solomon okokuke atiar, “Kicat, kotitinior, kiswama nun; sirikikurianar, karaida aiyaloŋoŋ: naarai EJAKAIT Edeke, ŋes Ekadeke ejaenena kajo; mam ŋes isokori kamakon, mam kijali jo, aitodol needaunor aswam kere naka aijaanakin naka etogo loka EJAKAIT."
1Chronicles28:21 Ido koany, ejaas abeanakineta nuka isasedotin ka Ilebin, nuka aijaanakin kere nakaetogo loka Edeke: ejaun kajo nolitunanan loekoto loepiriana, kanolipone loka aijaanakin kotoma aswam naka ŋolipone: erimakinete da eut ikapolok ka ituŋa kere aicorakinetekon.’"
1Chronicles29:1 Kotema Daudi ekabaka ekodet kere atiar, “Solomon okokuka, loaseu Edeke bon, eriŋa edit enonok, epol aswam da: naarai mam etogo lokapolon erai loka ituŋanan, konye loka EJAKAIT Edeke."
1Chronicles29:2 Etemokinit eoŋ kakagogon kere iboro luka etogo loka Ekadeke, esabu loka lukesabu, epuesa loka lukepuesa, aisinin nuka lukaisinin, asua nuka lukasua, akito da nuka lukakito; amor nuemelomeloto, ka nuipiripiranara, amor nuiminaikinere, ka nuka ijesesinei luegelegela, ka amor nuka akais nuipu nuka nolipone kere, ka amor nuesegara nuipu noi."
1Chronicles29:3 Bobo da, naarai kaminakinit etogo loka Ekadeke, naarai ejaas eoŋ lukakais luipu lueraas Iukan luka esabu ka epuesa, ainakini kes togo loka Ekadeke adepar kere luetemokinit luka etogo lokalaunan:"
1Chronicles29:4 Kes atalatan alukumin auni nuka esabu, loka esabu loka Opir, ka atalatan alukumin akanykaarei nuka epuesa loililiauna, ailadaaria arwatatin nuka itogoi."
1Chronicles29:5 Esabu loka iboro luka esabu, ka epuesa loka luka epuesa, loka ŋolipone kere loka aswam naiswamao kakanin nuka ipirioitin. Iŋai bo do einakini ketau loekot atiakun elopet lolo mama ejai EJAKAIT?”"
1Chronicles29:6 Kosodete ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee, ka ikapolok luka atekerin nuka Isirael, ka ikapolok luka ilukumin ka luka akwat, ka ikayaitok aswam naka ekabaka, ainakin kitauon luekotosi:"
1Chronicles29:7 Koinakis kanuka aiiaanakin kotogo loka Edeke luka esabu atalatan alukumin akany, ka idarikin ilukumin itomon, epuesa atalatan alukumin atomon, aisinin atalatan alukumin atomon ka nukanykauni, ka asua atalatan alukumin akwatat."
1Chronicles29:8 Ŋul lukeiaas amor nuka akais nuipu koinakis kes oboro luka akais nuipu luka etogo loka EJAKAIT, kakan naka Yekiel Egeresonit."
1Chronicles29:9 Kosodete ituŋa aiyalama, naarai apotu koinakis kitauon luekotosi, naarai kitauon luedolito apotu koinakis kitauon luekotosi mama ejai EJAKAIT: kiyalama da Daudi ekabaka kaiyalama naepol."
1Chronicles29:10 Kanuka nun kituru Daudi EJAKAIT kakonyen nuka ekodet kere: kotema Daudi atiar, “Kituritete jo, wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael papaakosi, ikar lumam edaunos."
1Chronicles29:11 Wu EJAKAIT, apolou, ka apedor, ka aibuses, ka aipikor, ka aiyoŋ eraas nukon: naarai luejaas akuj ka akwap kere eraas lukon; wu EJAKAIT, ajakanut erai nakon, kitopoloorio aitelekar kere."
1Chronicles29:12 Ebuni abar ka aibuses kamakon, ido irumit kere; ejai apedor ka agogoŋ akanikon; aitopoloor ka ainakin kere agogoŋ ejai akanikon."
1Chronicles29:13 Aso do, wu Ekosideke, kimalai, keturito ekonikiror lokakibuses."
1Chronicles29:14 “Konye eoŋ iŋai, ikatuŋa da kes inyo, isio apedor ainakin kwaŋin kitauon luekotosi? Naarai epote iboro kere kamakon, kiinakinit isio jo lukon."
1Chronicles29:15 Naarai kirai isio ipejok ka ikalotok kakonyenekon, kwape kejaatar lukapapaakosi kere: esubito apaarasiakosi kotoma akwap bala etolim, cmamei da amuno."
1Chronicles29:16 Wu EJAKAIT Ekosideke, iboro lu kere lukitemonoki isio adukokinia jo etogo loka ekonikiror lokalaunan epote kakanikon, ido kere eraas lukon,"
1Chronicles29:17 Ekadeke, ajeni da eoŋ ebe igimori ijo etau, isiyalamikinit nuetenito. Eoŋ da kajai ketau loitenara ainak eoŋ kakote iboro lu kere: kwana da aany kaiyalama ikonituŋa luejaas ne, kiinakis jo kakote,"
1Chronicles29:18 Wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Aburaam, ka loka Isaak, ka loka Isirael, lukapapaakosi, kitogogon na ikar kere kaitetemonor nuka aomisio nuka itauon luka ikonituŋa, kiteten ikecetauon neijai."
1Chronicles29:19 Koinak Solomon okokuka etau loedolit, airie aicorakinetakon, ka aiteienunetakon, ka ikisilakon, aswam aldro ŋun kere, aiduk etogo lokapolon loetemonok eoŋ iboroke.”"
1Chronicles29:20 Kotema Daudi ekodet kere atiar, “Kwana kituro EJAKAIT Ekusideke.” Kituru ekodet kere EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakee, kituluroto akwesikec, komaata EJAKAIT, ka ekabaka da."
1Chronicles29:21 Koinakis asuban mama ejai EJAKAIT, koinakis ainakineta nuicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT, kapaaran naatupakini apaaran ŋin, kes imoŋin lutoba elukumit, imerekekin elukumit, imerekekin ludidik elukumit, ka ainakinetakee numatan, ka asuban nuipu kanuka Isirael kere;"
1Chronicles29:22 Konyama, komata, kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT kapaaran kaŋin kaiyalama naepol. Kirucakis aitaraun Solomon okoku loka Daudi ekabaka, kinyonyoikis ŋes akinyet mama ejai EJAKAIT araun lokapolon, ka Sadok araun esasedoti."
1Chronicles29:23 Kosodi Solomon aiboikin oicoloŋ loka EJAKAIT korai ekabaka aibois naka Daudi papake, kokerianar; korimak ŋes Isirael kere."
1Chronicles29:24 Apotu ikapolok kere, ka ituŋa lukirigin, ka odwe kere da luka ekabaka Daudi kononokikis Solomon ekabaka."
1Chronicles29:25 Kitopoloo noi noi EJAKAIT Solomon kakonyen nuka Isirael kere, koinak aibuses nakajakanut namam etakanunit okabakan kere luageikinete toma Isirael."
1Chronicles29:26 Kirumit Daudi okoku loka Yese Isirael kere.
1Chronicles29:27 Apak naabu ŋesi kirumak Isirael keraas ikar akaisaoŋon; kirumak ikar ikanykaarei koKeburon, kirumak da ikar akaisauni ka luuni koYerusalem."
1Chronicles29:28 Kotwana cmoionit noi, kileleba apaarasi, ka abar, ka aibuses: kirum Solomon okokuke aiboisike,"
1Chronicles29:29 Aswamisio nuka Daudi ekabaka, nuageikinete ka nukawasia, koany, iwadikatai kakiro nuka Samuel ekadwaran, kakiro nuka Natan enabi, kakiro da nuka Gad ekadwaran;"
1Chronicles29:30 Kairumuke da kere, ka agogoŋuke, ka akiro nuapotu kodoonokis ŋes, ka Isirael, ka ajakanuto kere nuka akwapin."
2Chronicles1:1 Kiticatai Solomon okoku loka Daudi kajakanutuke, kojaenena EJAKAIT Ekedeke kaŋes, kitopoloo noi."
2Chronicles1:2 Kiner Solomon ka Isirael kere, ikapolok luka ilukumin ka luka akwat, ikatubok, ka ŋolikapolon koIsirael kere, ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakec,"
2Chronicles1:3 Kolot do Solomon, ka ekodet kere kaŋes, mama ejai aibois naieelelei nakejai Gibeon; naarai nen kejai ewema loka airiamunun loka Edeke, loabu Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT kiswama kamodiŋ,"
2Chronicles1:4 Konye abu Daudi koyau asaduku naka Edeke anyoun koKiriat-yearim ayaŋaar aibois naabu Daudi kitemok ŋes: naarai abu ŋesi kibubuk ewema kanuke Yerusalem,"
2Chronicles1:5 Bobo da kejai nen koiŋaren kewema lokalaunan loka EJAKAIT etem loka aisinit loabu Besalel okoku loka Uri, okoku loka Kur kiswamau: kolosenenete Solomon ka ekodet kere mamake."
2Chronicles1:6 Kodoka Solomon ŋina mama ejai etem loka aisinit kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, lokejai owema loka airiamunun, koinak ainakineta alukumit nuicweio kanen."
2Chronicles1:7 Kakuare kaŋin kitaanyikin Edeke Solomon, kotema ŋes atiar, “Kilipai nakainakini jo.”"
2Chronicles1:8 Kotema Solomon Edeke atiar, “Ibu ijo kitodik Daudi papaka asianut naepol, kitarau eoŋ ekabaka aiboisike,"
2Chronicles1:9 Kwana, wu EJAKAIT Edeke, kicat aisumunetckon mama ejai Daudi papaka: naarai kidakak eoŋ araun ekabaka loka ituŋa luesubito bala apua naka alup kaipues."
2Chronicles1:10 Aso koinakinai do acoa ka aijen, tetere alomanari alomununei da kakonyen nuka ituŋa kalu: naarai iŋai epedori atubokin ikonituŋa lu luipu?”"
2Chronicles1:11 Kotema Edeke Solomon atiar, “Naarai kejaas nu otaukon, kwabo mam ilipit abar, akerianut, karaida aibuses, karaida aijar naka ŋul kalukilaito jo, kwabo mam ilipit aibut apaarasia nuipu; konye ilipit acoa ka aijen kanukon, tetere itubokini ikatuŋa, luketarau jo ekabakakec:"
2Chronicles1:12 kiinakin jo acoa ka aijen; kainakini da abar ka akerianut, ka aibuses, numam lem ejaas koikabakan lukigeikinete jo, kwabo mam ejaunos lukitupakinete jo aputokin kajo,”"
2Chronicles1:13 Koboŋo Solomon kalositeke kama ejai aibois naieelelei nakejai Gibeon, anyoun kowema loka airiamunun, kobu Yerusalem; kirum Isirael."
2Chronicles1:14 Kotukonok Solomon agalin ka ikebwanenok: kejaas ŋes agalin alukumit ka akwat aoŋon, ka ikebwanenok ilukumin itomon ka luaarei, lukibwaikinit oreria luka agalin, ka Yerusalem da nekejai ekabaka."
2Chronicles1:15 Kitarau ekabaka epuesa ka esabu araut bala amor ko Yerusalem, kitarau iresia da bala isukumorin luejaas apuutona, kanuka aipues."
2Chronicles1:16 Keyaunio ibalasin lukejaas ka Solomon koMisiri; kodumut ikagwelanarak luka ekabaka kes kosipanin, ŋolisipan kotiaike."
2Chronicles1:17 Koomata, koyaut koMisiri agali kisekelin akwat akanykape luka epuesa, ka ebalasit kakwatat ka akaisakany: koinunut kes kwaŋin ikabakan kere luka Ikitin, ka ikabakan luka Suria kakaninikee."
2Chronicles2:1 Kidenyak do Solomon adukokin ekiror loka EJAKAIT etogo, ka etogo loka ajakanutuke."
2Chronicles2:2 Kotiaku Solomon ituŋa ilukumin akaisakanykaarei aibwok abwokon, ka ituŋa ilukumin akaisakanykauni luajepete koroŋan, ka ilukumin iuni ka akwat akanykape luayaito kes."
2Chronicles2:3 Kijuka Solomon mama ejai Kuram ekabaka loka Turo ebe, “Kwape kikonakinia ijo Daudi papaka, kijukak nes iresia adukokin etogo aiboio kotoma, kikonak eoŋ da kwaŋin."
2Chronicles2:4 Koany, adukokini eoŋ ekiror laka EJAKAIT Ekadeke etogo, atiakun kanuke, aicweenen kakonyeneke lukisupurununo lueuru maa, kanuka emugati lokaitodikin lotir, kanuka ainakineta nuicweio tupuruc ka eboŋ, kasabaton, ka napilamununei elap, kopucin da lueseunitai luka EJAKAIT Edekekosi. Erai ŋin aicorakinet naka ikar kere koIsirael."
2Chronicles2:5 Epol etogo loaduki eoŋ: naarai epol Ekosideke adepar idekesio kere,"
2Chronicles2:6 Konye iŋai epedori adukokin ŋes etogo, naarai mam akuj, ka akuj naka akuj epedori ailosikin ŋes? Aso iŋai bo eoŋ, adukokin ŋes etogo, dimarai aisupuruun lueuru maa kakonyeneke?"
2Chronicles2:7 Aso do kijukakinai eoŋ etuŋanan loepiriana aswam kesabu, kepuesa, kaisinin, kasua, ka lomuge, ka Iokareŋan, ka lobululu, loepiriana aigir iponesio kere luigirio, ajaun kituŋa luepiriaka luejaas keoŋ ko Yuda ka Yerusalem, luabu Daudi papaka kodumunite."
2Chronicles2:8 Kijukakinai da ikito luka eres, ka ikito luka eberos, ka ikito lukajokak koLebanon: naarai ajeni ebe epiriaka ikonikejaanakinak aijep ikito koLebanon; ido koany, ejaununos ikakejaanakinak kaikonikejaanakinak,"
2Chronicles2:9 aitemonokin akito nuipu noi: naarai etogo loakoto aiduk eraun loepol lokaumokin.
2Chronicles2:10 Ido koany, ainakini ikonikejaanakinak, luejepete ikito, aitemisio alukumin akaisaarei nuka alos nuecomom, ka aitemisio alukumin akaisaarei nuka esairi, ka akaalakanya alukumin akaisaarei nuka ebino, ka akaalakanya alukumin akaisaarei nuka akinyet.”"
2Chronicles2:11 Kosodi Kuram ekabaka loka Turo aboŋokin kaiwadika nuejukakinit Solomon ebe, “Naarai emina EJAKAIT iketuŋa, ŋes kitaraunia jo ekabakakec.”"
2Chronicles2:12 Ido kobala Kuram ebe, “Kituritete EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, lokesubi akuj ka akwap, loabu koinak Daudi ekabaka okoku lokacoa, loejaas kacobeu ka ajenun, loekot adukokin EJAKAIT etogo, ka etogo loka ajakanutuke."
2Chronicles2:13 “Aso do kejukak etuŋanan loepiriana, loejaas kajenun loka Kuram papaka,"
2Chronicles2:14 Okoku loka aberu naka adwe nuka Dan, kerai papake etuŋanan loka Turo, epiriana aswam kesabu, ka epuesa, ka aisinin, ka asua, ka amor, kakito, ka lomuge, ka lobululu, ka ebaputa loejok, ka Lokareŋan: bobo da aigir epone kere loigirio: ka apwakun aputo kere: kojaun ŋesi aibois kaikonituŋa luepiriaka, ka ituŋa luepiriaka luka ejakaitika Daudi papakon."
2Chronicles2:15 Aso do, luabu ekajakait kiner, akima ka esairi, ka akinyet ka ebino, kijukak ikekejaanakinak:"
2Chronicles2:16 kijepi isio ikito koLebanon, kotiai loipuda: kiyaŋaun mamakon kikaleleos kaŋolol kiton Yopa; ido da iyanaari Yerusalem,”"
2Chronicles2:17 Kimar Solomon imo kere lukejaas akwap naka Isirael, kwape ajaar aimar naabu Daudi papake kimar kes; aponi kodumunai ilukumin akwatat ka akaisakany ka luuni ka akwat akanykape,"
2Chronicles2:18 Kibwaik ilukumin akaisakanykaarei kakes aibwok abwokon, ka ilukumin akaisakanykauni luajepete koroŋan, ka ilukumin iuni ka akwat akanykape luayaito ituŋa lueswamaete aswam."
2Chronicles3:1 Kosodi kogeu Solomon aiduk etogo loka EJAKAIT Yerusalem moru Moria, nekitaanyikinor EJAKAIT Daudi papake, aibois naaseikinit Daudi, opejal loka Orunan Eyebusit."
2Chronicles3:2 Kogeu aiduk kapaaran nakiareit naka elap lokiareit kokaru lokiwoŋonet loka airumuke.
2Chronicles3:3 Nu kes apeteta nuapesikinit Solomon aiduk etogo loka Edeke. Aojau kokubitin kwape ajaar aitemis nasodit nes ikubitin akaisakanykape, ka alalau da ikubitin akaisaarei."
2Chronicles3:4 Agola nalomaret nakejai koinaren ketogo, aoiauke, kwape ajaar alalau naka etogo, ikubitin akaisaarei, amukurur akwatat ka akaisaarei: kiladaa toma kesabu loelai."
2Chronicles3:5 Kiswap etogo lokapolon kakito nuka eberos, nukiladaari kesabu loejok, kiswama tomake ikito luka idukudukun ka irikoi."
2Chronicles3:6 Kitubusia etogo kamor nuka akais nuipu: esabu kerai esabu loka Parubaim.
2Chronicles3:7 Kiladaa da etogo, ka abaoi, ka neelomarere, ka arwatatinike, ka ikiriginike kesabu; kigirak ikerubin arwatatin."
2Chronicles3:8 Abu kiswamau etogo lokalaunan noi; aojauke kwape kejaar alalau naka etogo, ikubitin akaisaarei, alalauke ikubitin akaisaarei: kiladaa nes kesabu loejok, kotiai loka atalatan akwat akanykape."
2Chronicles3:9 Alaŋir naka isumalin isekelin akaisakany luka esabu. Kiladaa agolai nukokuju kesabu.
2Chronicles3:10 Kotoma togo lokalaunan noi kiswamau ikerubin iarei luka akito; kiladaasi kesabu,"
2Chronicles3:11 Aojak abebenoka nuka ikerubin ikubitin akaisaarei: abebenok adiopet ikubitin ikany, kodolite arwatat naka etogo; abebenok ace da ikubitin ikany, kodolite abebenok naka ekerubi ece."
2Chronicles3:12 Abebenok naka ekerubi ece ikubitin ikany, kodolite arwatat naka etogo: abebenok ace da ikubitin ikany, kiriamakina kabebenok naka ekerubi ece."
2Chronicles3:13 Kigararaete abebenoka nuka ikerubin kanul ikubitin akaisaarei: kobwaata kesi kakejenekec, kiteete akonyenekec etogo,"
2Chronicles3:14 Kiswamau aigalisit kalobululu, ka lomuge, ka lokareŋan, ka ebaputa loejok, kosonyak ikerubin kotomake,"
2Chronicles3:15 Kiswamau da koiŋaren ketogo ipirin iarei lueojak ikubitin akaisauni ka lukany, ka akwes nukejaas kujukec kere aojau ikubitin ikany."
2Chronicles3:16 Kiswamau irikoi neinerenenere akirot, kibwaik kes kuju kipirin; kiswamau akamamagan akwatat kibwaik kes korikoi."
2Chronicles3:17 Kosipok ipirin koiŋaren keyekalu, ediopet kakan nakoteten, ece kakan nakokediany; komaik ekiror loka ŋol kakan nakoteten Yakin, ekiror loka ŋol kakan nakokediany Boas."
2Chronicles4:1 Bobo da abu, kiswamau etem loka aisinit, aojauke, ikuitin akaisaarei, alalauke ikubitin akaisaarei, ka amukururuke ikubitin itomon,"
2Chronicles4:2 Abu kiswamau da aŋolol naecalara ikubitin itomon anyoun koreret kiton oreret, kolukuna, amukururuke ikubitin ikany; kolukunite aitemis naka ikubitin akaisauni."
2Chronicles4:3 Kwapuke kejaas luesubito bala imoŋin, luerimorete ŋes, kokubitin itomon, airimor aŋolol. Kejaas imoŋin okokoron iarei, kocala kere nepepe kotatai."
2Chronicles4:4 Kidokokinai omoŋin itomon ka luarei, kosesenete iuni ari naka agolitomei, kosesenete iuni ari nakoto, kosesenete iuni ari naka eŋalakimak, kosesenete iuni ari nakokide: kidokokinai aŋolol kujukec, kojaas iwosikec kere toma."
2Chronicles4:5 Aburesuke alalau naka akan; kiswamai erereteke bala ereret loka atido, bala aturot naka apecel: abu kigau akaalakanya alukumin auni."
2Chronicles4:6 Abu kiswamau da akalayan atomon, kibwaik akany kakan nakoteten, ka akany da nakokediany, ailosenena; apotu kilosenenata iboro lukeraas luka ainakinet naicweio kotomakec: konye kerai aŋolol neelonenenata isasedotin."
2Chronicles4:7 Abu kiswamau ipirin itomon lukatalai luka esabu kwape ajaar aicorakinetekec; kosipok kes oyekalu ikany kakan nakoteten, ikany da kokediany."
2Chronicles4:8 Kiswamau da imesan itomon, kibwaik kes oyekalu, ikany kakan nakoteten, ikany da kokediany. Kiswamau da atanyia akwatat nuka esabu."
2Chronicles4:9 Bobo da abu kiswamau alaro naka isasedotin, ka alaro nakapolon, ka ikirigin luka alaro, kiladaa ikiriginikec kaisinit,"
2Chronicles4:10 Kosipok aŋolol kowai lokoteten loka etogo, kokide ari naka eŋalakimak."
2Chronicles4:11 Kiswamau Kuram amoti, ka initia, ka atanyia. Kodau do Kuram aswam naabu kiswamak Solomon ekabaka kotogo laka Edeke."
2Chronicles4:12 Ipirin iarei, ka atiboi, ka akwes aarei nukeiaas kuju opirin; ka iboyan iarei arapia atiboi aarei nukejaas kuju opirin;"
2Chronicles4:13 ka akamamagan akwat aoŋon nuka iboyan iarei; ikokoron iarei luka akamamagan kaŋoliboi, arapia atiboi aarei nukejaas kuju opirin."
2Chronicles4:14 Abu kiswamau da aicegeria, kiswamau akalayan nuka aicegeria;"
2Chronicles4:15 aŋolol adiopet, ka imoŋin itomon ka luarei kwapuke,"
2Chronicles4:16 amoti da, ka initia, ka igolun luka akiriŋ, ka iboroke kere, kiswamak Kuram papake Solomon ekabaka, luka etogo loka EJAKAIT luka aisinit naepwatat."
2Chronicles4:17 Kotata ekabaka kes kApuuton naka Yorodan, kolupe loejai kidiŋ Sukot ka Sereda."
2Chronicles4:18 Kwaŋin kiswama Solomon iboro ŋul kere luipu noi: naarai mam kepedorit adumun alaŋir naka aisinin.
2Chronicles4:19 Kiswama Solomon iboro kere luajaas togo loka Edeke, etem da loka esabu, ka imesan luka imugatin lukaitodikin;"
2Chronicles4:20 ka ipirin lukatalai ka atalaikec, tetere enokete kwape ajaar aicorakinet koiŋaren kaneinerenenere akirot, luka esabu loelai."
2Chronicles4:21 ka aturo, ka atalai, ka arideta, nuka esabu, eebo, esabu loejok cut;"
2Chronicles4:22 ka aitudeŋeta, ka atanyia, ka akaalei, ka atuba nuigaete ekurwon, nuka esabu loelai: neelomarere togo, ikiriginike lukotoma luka aibois nakalaunan noi, ka ikirigin luka etogo, kes luka eyekalu, keraas luka esabu."
2Chronicles5:1 Kwaŋin kodaun aswam naeswamakini Solomon etogo loka EJAKAIT. Kitoloma Solomon iboro luabu Daudi papake kotiaku; epuesa ka esa bu, ka iboro kere, kibwaik kes aiŋadisia nuka etogo loka Edeke."
2Chronicles5:2 Kosodi Solomon atukokin imakio luka Isirael, ka ikapolok kere luka atekerin, ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaa luka idwe luka Isirael, Yerusalem, ayaun asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT, anyoun kore loka Daudi, ŋes Sion."
2Chronicles5:3 Kotukonokinos ituŋa kere luka Isirael mama ejai ekabaka kopucit, lokejai kolap lokikanyetekaarei."
2Chronicles5:4 Kopotu imakio kere luka Isirael, kodakut Ilebin asaduku."
2Chronicles5:5 Koyaut asaduku, ka ewema loka airiamunun, ka iboro kere lukalaunak lukejaas owema; kes iboro luapotu isasedotin Ilebin koyaut."
2Chronicles5:6 Kejai ekabaka Solomon ka ekodet kere loka Isirael, luatukonokinos mama ejai ŋesi, koiŋaren kasaduku, einanakinete imerekekin ka imoŋin, lumam epedorio alimun karaida aimarun kanuka aipues."
2Chronicles5:7 Kitolomasi isasedotin asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT aiboisike, neinerenenere akirot, aibois nakalaunan noi, kwap kabebenoka nuka ikerubin."
2Chronicles5:8 Naarai kigararas ikerubin abebenokakec kuju aibois naka asaduku, korapias ikerubin asaduku ka adaketake,"
2Chronicles5:9 Kewojak adaketa tetere etakani esanekec kasaduku koiŋaren kaneinerenenere akirot; konye mam ketakanete kokiŋa: ejai nepenen, kiton lolo."
2Chronicles5:10 Amamei ibore kotoma asaduku dimarai amor aarei nuabu Musa kibwaik koKoreb, nakitutukio EJAKAIT aitutuket kaidwe luka Isirael, nakelomuniata koMisiri."
2Chronicles5:11 Kosodi kanen, kedaut isasedotin alomun kaibois nakalaunan, (naarai apotu isasedotin kere lukejaas nen kitalaunos, komam ericito abeanakinikec;"
2Chronicles5:12 bobo da kobwaata Ilebin lukeraas ikayook kowai lokokide loka etem, kes kere, Asap, ka Keman, ka Yedutun, ka odwekec ka iinacanakec, konapito ebaputa loejok, kojaas kaisinin nueruosi ka isabulin ka adeudeun; ido isasedotin akwatat ka akaisaarei nepepe kakes kokusete arupepen:)"
2Chronicles5:13 Kosodi do kanen, keraut ikakutak arupepen ka ikayook bala ediopet, aisiirario eporoto ediopet aiturit ka aimal EJAKAIT; kitonyoutu kesi iporotoikec nepepe karupepen ka aisinin nueruosi ka lueruosi kere, kituritos EJAKAIT ebe, “Naarai ejok ŋesi: naarai ejaenena akeitim ikar kere”: kosodi do kilelebun edou togo, nes etogo loka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles5:14 Mam isasedotin apotu kopedosi aibwo aijaanakin kanuka edou: naarai kilelebun aibuses naka EJAKAIT togo loka Edeke.
2Chronicles6:1 Kosodi Solomon einer atiar, “Abala EJAKAIT ebe iboienenei ŋesi kamuton naejesi ŋaŋ."
2Chronicles6:2 Konye abu eoŋ kadukok jo etogo loiboionono, ka aibois naiboieneno ijo ikar kere.”"
2Chronicles6:3 Kibelokin ekabaka, kilipak ekodet kere loka Isirael arereŋ: kobwo da ekodet kere loka Isirael."
2Chronicles6:4 Kotema ŋesi atiar, “Kituritete EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, loabu kiner kakeituk mama ejai Daudi papaka, ido kitodol da kakekanin ebe,"
2Chronicles6:5 ageun kapaaran naketolomunia ikatuŋa kakwap nako Misiri, mam abu kaseu ere katekerin kere nuka Isirael aiduk etogo, tetere ejaun nen ekakiror: kwabo mam abu kaseu etuŋanan araun lokapolon loka ikatuŋa Isirael."
2Chronicles6:6 Konye abu kaseu Yerusalem, tetere ejaun nen ekakiror; abu kaseu Daudi da apolokin ikatuŋa Isirael."
2Chronicles6:7 Abu Daudi papaka koomite kotauke adukokin ekiror loka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, etogo."
2Chronicles6:8 Konye abu EJAKAIT kotema Daudi papaka atiar, ‘Naarai iwomit ijo kotaukon adukokin ekakiror etogo, iswama ejok aomit kotaukon:"
2Chronicles6:9 konye mam jo iduki etogo; konye okokukon, loelomuni kakuanakon, nes edukokini ekakiror etogo.’"
2Chronicles6:10 Etodol EJAKAIT akekirot naabu kiner; naarai anyou eoŋ aibois naka Daudi papaka, eboikini oicoloŋ loka Isirael, kwape esumunia EJAKAIT, adukok ekiror loka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, etogo,"
2Chronicles6:11 Nepenen da ebwaik asaduku, naejai aitutuket naka EJAKAIT kotomake, naetutuki ŋesi kidwe luka Isirael.”"
2Chronicles6:12 Kobwo ŋesi koiŋaren ketem loka EJAKAIT kakonyen nuka ekodet kere loka Isirael, korio akekanin kuju:"
2Chronicles6:13 (Naarai abu Solomon kiswamau abwois naka aisinit, naeoj ikubitin ikany, alalauke ikubitin ikany, amukururuke ikubitin iuni, kosipok kidiŋ alaro; kobwo kokujuke, kokukokin kakuŋinike kakonyen nuka ekodet kere loka Isirael, korio akekanin kuju:)"
2Chronicles6:14 Kotema ŋesi atiar, “Wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, emamei Edeke loiputosi kajo, toma akuj arai kakwap; loitodolenenei aitutuket ka aitim kikonikejaanakinak, luelosenenete kakonyenekon kikecetauon kere:"
2Chronicles6:15 loitodolik ekonikejaanakinan Daudi papaka ŋun nuibu kisumun: eebo, ibu kiner kaitukukon, itodolo da kakanikon, kwape ejaatar lolo."
2Chronicles6:16 Aso do, wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, kitodolik ekonikejaanakinan Daudi papaka, nuibu kisumun, ebe, ‘Mam kimamikini ijo etuŋanan loiboikin oicoloŋ loka Isirael kakonyeneka; arai kito ecoito ikonidwe ekecerot, alosenen okisilaka kwape ilosenenoo ijo kakonyeneka.’"
2Chronicles6:17 Aso do, wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, kitogogoŋoi akonikirot, nakilimokini ekonikejaanakinan Daudi."
2Chronicles6:18 “Konye iboie kereka Edeke abeit kituŋa kakwap? Koany, mam epedori akuj, ka akuj naka akuj ailosikin jo; ido konyet etogo lo loadukit eoŋ ŋes bo inyo!"
2Chronicles6:19 Konye kocam ijo ailip naka ekonikejaanakinan, ka aiŋaiŋake, wu EJAKAIT Ekadeke, akiirar aimony ka ailip nailipi ekonikeiaanakinan kakonyenekon:"
2Chronicles6:20 kokwenyenenete akonikonyen asesen etogo lo apaaran ka akuare, ŋes aibois nakolo ilimit ebe ibwaikini nen ekonikiror; akiirar ailip nailipi ekonikejaanakinan kaibois kana."
2Chronicles6:21 Kiiraranari da aiŋaiŋa naka ekonikejaanakinan, ka naka ikonituŋa Isirael, nailipenenata kesi kaibois kana: eebo, kiiranari ijo kaiboisikon, ŋes akuj; ido naipupununio, kisionie,"
2Chronicles6:22 “Arai kediak etuŋanan kama ejai eidunyeteke, kisiyapoikinoi ŋes aiyaposit, ebuni ŋesi aiyapo koiŋaren ketemukon togo lo:"
2Chronicles6:23 kopupununei do ijo ijai toma akuj, kiswama, kotubok ikonikejaanakinak, kitokokol ikaronon, aitoboŋikin ekepone akouke; kitojok da ikadoliton, ainakin ŋes kwape ejaar adoliteke,"
2Chronicles6:24 “Naedanyere ikonituŋa Isirael kakonyen nuka lukasurup, naarai adiakasi kamakon; arai kibelokinos bobo, kolimorete ekonikiror, ilipete kiŋaiŋaete kakonyenekon kotogo kalo:"
2Chronicles6:25 kopupununei do ijo ijai toma akuj, kisionie aronis naka ikonituŋa Isirael, kinyaku kes bobo akwap nakiinakinit kes ka lukapapaakec."
2Chronicles6:26 “Naegolokinere akuj, komamei akiru, naarai adiakasi kamakon; arai ilipete kiteete aibois na, kolimorete ekonikiror, kibelokinos anyoun karonisikec nakiticania ijo kes:"
2Chronicles6:27 kopupununei do ijo ijai toma akuj, kisionie aronis naka ikonikejaanakinak, ka naka ikonituŋa Isirael, nakisisianakinia ijo kes erot loejok loibusakinit kes aloseneno: kitetep akiru akwapukon, naibu koinak ikonituŋa araun airumet."
2Chronicles6:28 “Arai kejaun ebeli kakwap, arai kejaun atular, arai kejaun ekure arai airouroun, emaase, arai ekutelek; arai kirigaunito lukasurupokec kakwap naka ireriakec; ŋinitular kere arai ŋinidek naejaunor;"
2Chronicles6:29 ŋiniilip ka ŋiniiŋaiŋa kere nailipi ituŋanan kere, arai ikonituŋa Isirael kere, yenejeni ŋinituŋanan atularike ka aburunike, korio akekanin mama ejai etogo lo:"
2Chronicles6:30 kopupununei do ijo ijai toma akuj aiboisikon, kisionie, koropi ŋinituŋanan kwape ejaatar iponesioke kere, yenijeni ijo etauke; (naarai ijo, ijo bon, ijeni itauon luka idwe luka ituŋa:)"
2Chronicles6:31 tetere kiyoŋete jo, alosenen korotinikon apaarasia kere nuiboienenoto kesi kakwap nakiinakinit lukapapaakosi."
2Chronicles6:32 “Bobo da nuka imoit, yenimere yenika ikonituŋa Isirael, naebunio ŋesi kakwap naelwana kanuka ekonikiror loepol, ka akonikan nakagogon, ka akonikan naerioro: naeponiata kesi ilipete kiteete etogo lo:"
2Chronicles6:33 kopupununei do ijo ijai toma akuj, ŋes aiboisikon, kiswama kwape ejaatar kere nukiworoi imoit jo; tetere ejenunete ituŋasinei kere luka akwap ekonikiror, koyoŋito jo, kwape kiyoŋitotor ikonituŋa Isirael, tetere ejenunete da ebe emaikinitai etogo lo loadukit eoŋ ekonikiror."
2Chronicles6:34 “Arai kelomasi ituŋakon aitiji lukasurupokec, korot kere loijukari ijo kes, kilipete mama ijai kiteete ere lo lokiseuni ijo, ka etogo loadukokinit eoŋ ekonikiror;"
2Chronicles6:35 kopupununei do ijo ijai toma akui akeceilip ka akeceiŋaiŋa, kisigalik akecekirot."
2Chronicles6:36 “Arai kediakasi kamakon, (naarai emamei ituŋanan yenimam ediakari,) inyunyurikini ijo kes, ijaikini kes lukasurupokec, tetere ijoreorete kes akwap naelwana arai naeapie;"
2Chronicles6:37 arai do keomoomata kesi kakwap naejoreoritai, kibelokinos bobo, kiŋaiŋaata ijo kakwap naejoreoritai ebe, ‘Kidiaka isio, kiswama nukepali, kikwaik erono’;"
2Chronicles6:38 arai keboŋut mama ijai ijo kikecetauon kere, kaijarakec kere, kakwap naka aijoreoriokec, kama kijoreoritai, kilipete kiteete akwapukec, nakiinakinit lukapapaakec, ka ere lokiseuni ijo, ka etogo loadukokinit eoŋ ekonikiror:"
2Chronicles6:39 kopupununei do ijo ijai toma akuj, ŋes aiboisikon, akeceilip ka akeceiŋaiŋa, kisigalik akecekirot; kisionie ikonituŋa luapotu kodiakasi kamakon."
2Chronicles6:40 Wu Ekadeke, keŋaiŋait, kokwenyenenete akonikonye, kitoik da akoniki ailip nailipitai kaibois kana."
2Chronicles6:41 “Aso do, wu EJAKAIT Edeke, konyou, koloma aiboisikon naka aiyeŋun, ijo, ka asaduku naka akonigogoŋ. Wu EJAKAIT Edeke, konapitos isasedotinikon aitajario, kiyalamikis lukalaunakakon ajokis."
2Chronicles6:42 Wu EJAKAIT Edeke, sirikibelok akonyen nuka lokinyonyoikinitonokon akinyet! kiitu aitim naka Daudi ekonikejaanakinan.”"
2Chronicles7:1 Kedau Solomon ailip, kobu akim kakuj, kicwe ainakinet naicweio ka asuban; kilelebun aibuses naka EJAKAIT togo,"
2Chronicles7:2 Mam apedorete isasedotin alomar togo loka EJAKAIT, naarai kilelebun aibuses naka EJAKAIT togo loka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles7:3 Kosesenata idwe kere luka Isirael, naabunio akim, kojaun aibuses naka EJAKAIT togo; kokukumoto, kituluroto akecekonyen kwap neitutuitoi, komaata, kimalata EJAKAIT ebe, “Naarai ejok; naarai ejaenena akeitim ikar kere.”"
2Chronicles7:4 Kosodi ekabaka ka ituŋa kere ainakin asuban kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT.
2Chronicles7:5 Abu ekabaka Solomon koinak asuban imoŋin ilukumin akaisaarei ka luarei, ka imerekekin ilukumin akwatat ka ilukumin akaisaarei, Kwaŋin kotiaku ekabaka ka ituŋa kere etogo loka Edeke."
2Chronicles7:6 Kobwaata isasedotin, kwape ejaar aswamukec; Ilebin da, ejaas kiboro lueruos luka EJAKAIT, luabu Daudi ekabaka kiswamau aimalaa EJAKAIT, naarai ejaenena akeitim ikar kere, nakituritor Daudi kotoma aijaanakinikec; kokuta isasedotin arupepen koiŋarenikec; kobwaata do luka Isirael kere,"
2Chronicles7:7 Bobo da kitalau Solomon kidiŋ alaro nakejai kiŋaren ketogo loka EJAKAIT; naarai koinak kanen ainakineta nuicweio, ka asiepai nuka ainakineta nuka ainapakin: naarai mam epedori etem loka aisinit loabu Solomon kiswamau ailosikin ainakinet naicweio, ka ainakinet naka akiria, ka asiepai."
2Chronicles7:8 Kwaŋin kipo Solomon epucit kapak katŋin adaun apaarasia akanykaarei, ka Isirael kere nepepe kaŋes, ekodet loepol noi, anyoun ka neelomarere Kamat kiton aguurut nako Misiri."
2Chronicles7:9 Kapaaran nakikanyetekauni kojaun atukonokin nakayamakin: naarai koricito atiakunio naka etem apaarasia akanykaarei, ka epucit apaarasia akanykaarei."
2Chronicles7:10 Kapaaran naka akaisaarei ka nuuni naka elap lokikanyetekaarei kotwara ŋesi ituŋa alosit owemanakec, elelete, kiyalamas kotauon ajokis kere naabu EJAKAIT kitodik Daudi, ka Solomon, ka Isirael iketuŋa,"
2Chronicles7:11 Kwaŋin kodau Solomon etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka etogo loka ekabaka: kokeriana Solomon aiswamaun kere nualomakinete otauke aiswamakin togo loka EJAKAIT, ka togoke da,"
2Chronicles7:12 Kitaanyikin EJAKAIT Solomon kuare, kotema ŋes atiar, “Eira eoŋ ailipikon, aseu aibois na araun ekatogo loka asuban."
2Chronicles7:13 Arai kagol eoŋ akuj komam ejaun akiru, arai ecorakini emaase ainyam akwap, arai kejuka atular otuŋaka;"
2Chronicles7:14 arai kitasonikinos ikatuŋa luemaikinitai ekakiror, kilipete, komoete akakonyen, kibelokinos anyoun koponesiokec lukaronok; kasodi do eoŋ apupokin kes kajai toma akuj, esionie kes aronisikec, etaŋaleuni da akwapukec."
2Chronicles7:15 Ekwenyunete do akakonyen, etoikini akaki ailip nailipeneneo kaibois kana."
2Chronicles7:16 Naarai aseu eoŋ etogo lo, etalau da, tetere ejaunun nen ekakiror ikar kere: ejaununos nen akakonye ka etauka tiritir."
2Chronicles7:17 Ka jo da arai ilosenenei kakonyeneka kwape alosenenoo Daudi papakon, iswamaenenei kwape ejaatar kere nukecorak jo, iricenenei ikakisila ka itubesiaka;"
2Chronicles7:18 kasodi eoŋ aiticat eicoloŋ loka ajakanutukon, kwape ketutukio kaDaudi papakon ebe, ‘Mam kimamikini ijo etuŋanan araun ekayaiton loka Isirael.’"
2Chronicles7:19 “Konye arai kipaasi yesi, kojalata ikakisila ka aicorakinetaka nuebwaikinit kakonyenekus, kolototo aijaanakin idekesio ice, komaata kes:"
2Chronicles7:20 kasodi eoŋ arutuni kes kaliasiokec kakwapuka naabu kainak kes; acakari etogo lo, laetalauni kanuka ekakiror, kakonyeneka, etarauni ŋes awarag ka amorosit kotuŋa kere."
2Chronicles7:21 Etogo lo da, lotii etia nen, eumokini ŋinituŋanan yenitori, kobala ebe, “Kanukinyo eswamakinia EJAKAIT akwap na kwaŋin, ka etogo lo da?’"
2Chronicles7:22 Eboŋokinete do ebe, ‘Naarai apatu kojalata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakec, lokitolomuni kes kakwap nako Misiri, korokut icedekesio, komaata kes kijaanakis kes: kanuka ŋun ŋes ainunia kes aronis na kere.’’’"
2Chronicles8:1 Kosodi kanen, ketuboros ikar akaisaarei luadukio Solomon etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka etogoke da elopet,"
2Chronicles8:2 ireria luabu Kuram koinak Solomon, koduk Solomon kes, kisiboik idwe luka Isirael ŋina."
2Chronicles8:3 Kolot Solomon Kamat-soba, kipiko ŋes,"
2Chronicles8:4 Kodukok Tadumor amodiŋ, ka ireria kere lukaiŋad luadukokini Kamat,"
2Chronicles8:5 Koduk da Bet-koron Ioimukurur, ka Bet-koron loijesara, ireria luabwaitai, lukejaas arwatatin, ka ikirigin, ka atiketa;"
2Chronicles8:6 ka Baalat, ka ireria kere lukaiŋad lukejaas ka Solomon, ka ireria kere luka agalinike, ka ireria luka ikebwanenokoke, ka kere luakoto Solomon aiduk aisiyalamikinor kotoma Yerusalem, ka Lebanon, ka akwap kere naka airumuke,"
2Chronicles8:7 Ituŋa kere da luedeunos luka Ikitin, ka Imorain, ka Iperisin, ka Ikibin, ka Iyebusin, lumam keraas luka Isirael;"
2Chronicles8:8 luka idwekec luedeunos kakes kakwap, lumam idwe luka Isirael emudiara, kolemununei Solomon ikitubusiana kamakee, kiton lolo."
2Chronicles8:9 Konye mam abu Solomon kitubulesene idwe luka Isirael kanuka akeswam; konye keraas kesi ikajiok, ka ikapolok luka ikapolokoke, ka ikapolokitok luka agalinike ka ikebwanenokoke."
2Chronicles8:10 Lu kes ikapolok lukapolok luka ekabaka Solomon, kes akwat aarei ka akaisakany, luayaitos ituŋa."
2Chronicles8:11 Kitonyou Solomon akoku naka Parao kore loka Daudi mama ejai etogo loabu ŋesi kodukok ŋes: naarai abala ebe, “Mam akaberu iboikini togo loka Daudi ekabaka loka Isirael, naarai eraas aiboisio nukalaunak, nuadolokinit asaduku naka EJAKAIT.”"
2Chronicles8:12 Kosodi Solomon ainakin ainakineta nuicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT kotem loka EJAKAIT, loaduki kiŋaren kaneelomarere,"
2Chronicles8:13 kwape kibusakinitor nuka ŋinipaaran, koinanakini kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka Musa, ka nukasabaton, ka napilamununei elap, kopucin lueseunitai, irwan auni ŋolikaru, kopucit loka emugati lomam itubuunitoi, kopucit loka asabaton, kopucit da loka iswamin."
2Chronicles8:14 Kitemok, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka Daudi papake, abeanakin naka isasedotin kaijaanakinikec, ka Ilebin kaswamukec, aiturit, ka aijaanakin isasedotin kwape epudar aswam naka ŋinipaaran: ikagolok da kabeanakinikec korutei kere: naarai abu Daudi etuŋanan loka Edeke kicorak kwaŋin."
2Chronicles8:15 Mam apotu konyout kaicorakinet naka ekabaka mama ejaas isasedotin ka Ilebin kadiokirot kere, ka nuka iboro luka akais nuipu da."
2Chronicles8:16 Kitemokinoi aswam kere naka Solomon kiton apaaran naka apetetait naka etogo loka EJAKAIT, kiton da neadaunia. Kwaŋin kitodoloi etogo loka EJAKAIT,"
2Chronicles8:17 Kosodi Solomon alosit Esion-geber, ka Elot, kariri naka aŋolol kakwap naka Edom."
2Chronicles8:18 Kijukak Kuram ŋes kakanin nuka ibulesinike ameerin ka ibulesin luajenete aŋolol; kouparos kaibulesin luka Solomon alosit Opir, koomata kaŋina atalatan akwat aoŋon ka akaisakany nuka esabu, koyaut mama ejai ekabaka Solomon."
2Chronicles9:1 Kosodi kepupu akabaka naka Seba eemut loka Solomon, kobu Yerusalem aitem Solomon kaiŋiseta nuetioko, kojaas kituŋa luipu noi, ka akaalai nuebwokito lueur maa, ka esabu loepol noi, ka amor nuka akais nuipu: kosodi kodolu ŋesi neejai Solomon, kolimok ŋes akiro kere nukejaas otauke."
2Chronicles9:2 Kitejenu Solomon akiro kere nukiŋisit ŋesi: amamei akirot naaponi kimunonikinai Solomon namam kitejenunit ŋes,"
2Chronicles9:3 Kedau akabaka naka Seba aanyun acoa naka Solomon, ka etogo lokeduki,"
2Chronicles9:4 inyamat da lukomesake, ka eiboie loka ikebulesin, ka aijaanakin naka ikekejaanakinak, ka ikecenapen; ka ikekaliak da, ka ikecenapen; ka eititiriake lokedokanaria togo loka EJAKAIT; kimwokolikin eketau."
2Chronicles9:5 Kotema ŋesi ekabaka atiar, “Akirot naabu kapupunite kakwapuka kerai nakabeit naka aswamisiokon, ka akonicoa da."
2Chronicles9:6 Kwabo mam abu keyu akirokec, aitodol naabunio, koanyut akakonye: ido koany, mam kalimokinitai atutubet naka apolou naka acoakon: itelekar eemut loabu keira."
2Chronicles9:7 Elakara ikonituŋa, elakara da ikonikejaanakinak lu, luebwoenenete tiritir kakonyenekon, kopupete akonicoa."
2Chronicles9:8 Kituritete EJAKAIT Ekonideke, loeyalamikin kanukon, adakakin jo oicoloŋjoke, araun ekabaka loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke: naarai abu Ekonideke komina Isirael, aiticat kes ikar kere, ŋes kituluoria jo ekabakakec, aiswamaenen nukabeit ka nuedolito.”"
2Chronicles9:9 Koinak ŋesi eka baka atalatan akwatat ka akaisaarei nuka esabu, ka lueur maa luipu noi, ka amor nuka akais nuipu: mam eanyuna bobo lueur maa lueriakas kanul luainakini akabaka naka Seba ekabaka Solomon."
2Chronicles9:10 Ibulesin da luka Kuram, ka ibulesin luka Solomon lukeyaununete esabu koOpir, koyaut da ikito lukajokak ka amor nuka akais nuipu."
2Chronicles9:11 Abu ekabaka kiswamau itutio luka etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka luka etogo loka ekabaka, ka adeudeun ka isabulin luka ikayook: mam apeŋo eanyuna lueputos kaŋul kakwap nako Yuda,"
2Chronicles9:12 Kosodi ekabaka Solomon ainakin akabaka naka Seba iboro kere lukipuda ŋesi, ŋinibore kere yenikilipi, adepar luabu ŋesi koinu ekabaka. Kwaŋin kibelokin do, koboŋo ŋes! akwapuke, ka ikekejaanakinak,"
2Chronicles9:13 Alaŋiru naka esabu loainunitai Solomon kokaru ediopet kerai atalatan akwat akanykape ka akaisakanykape ka nukanykape nuka esabu;
2Chronicles9:14 adepar luainunete ikemutunok ka ikagwelanarak; apotu ikabakan kere luka Arabia ka ikayaitok luka akwap koinut Solomon esabu ka epuesa,"
2Chronicles9:15 Kiswamau ekabaka Solomon ibukui lukapolok akwat aarei luka esabu loerukuk: ŋolibuku lokapolon abu koya isekelin akwat akanykape luka esabu loerukuk.
2Chronicles9:16 Kiswamau ŋesi ibukui akwat auni luka esabu loerukuk; ŋolibuku abu koya isekelin akwat auni luka esabu: kibwaik ekabaka kes togo loka ikito luka Lebanon.
2Chronicles9:17 Bobo da kiswamau ekabaka eicoloŋ lokapolon loka ikel luka etom, kiladaa ŋes kesabu loelai."
2Chronicles9:18 Kejaas adoketa akanykape oicoloŋ, kojai da iicoloŋ yenika akeje yenika esabu, yenirotakinio keicoloŋ, keŋaas akanin epuai kepuai kaibois neiboiere, ka iŋatunyo iarei luabwoete kawaitin nuka akanin."
2Chronicles9:19 Kobwaata iŋatunyo itomon ka luarei epuai kepuai kadoketa akanykape; amamei loaputos kaŋol kajakanut kere.
2Chronicles9:20 Iboro kere lumaset luka ekabaka Solomon keraas luka esabu, ka iboro kere lukotogo loka ikito luka Lebanon keraas luka esabu loelai: mam epuesa apodoi araut ibore kapaarasia nuka Solomon."
2Chronicles9:21 Naarai kejaas ekabaka ameerin nualosenenete Tarusis nepepe kibulesin luka Kuram: apotu ameerin nuka Tarusis kopotu atipet ŋulukar iuni, koyaut esabu, ka epuesa, ka ikel luka etom, ka icomion, ka akweny nuajaas ikorio lukijesesinei luipu."
2Chronicles9:22 Kwaŋin kiteleka ekabaka Solomon ikabakan kere luka akwap kabar ka acoa.
2Chronicles9:23 Komoata ikabakan kere luka akwapin aanyun Solomon, akiirar acoake, nakibwaikinit Edeke otauke."
2Chronicles9:24 Koinununete kesi ŋinituŋanan ainakineteke, iboro luka epuesa, ka iboro luka esabu, ka inapen, ka lujiis, ka lueur maa, ka ibalasin ka inyubun, esolo loka ŋolikaru."
2Chronicles9:25 Kejaas Solomon aiboisio alukumin aoŋon nuka ibalasin ka agalin, ka ikebwanenok ilukumin itomon ka luarei, lukibwaikinit oreria luka agalin, ka Yerusalem da nekejai ekabaka."
2Chronicles9:26 Kirum ŋesi ikabakan kere anyoun koCor kiton akwap naka Ipilisitian, kiton oikor loko Misiri."
2Chronicles9:27 Kitarau ekabaka epuesa araut bala amor koYerusalem, kitarau iresia da bala ikito luka isukumorin luejaas apuutona, kanuka aipues."
2Chronicles9:28 Koinununai Solomon ibalasin koMisiri ka akwapin kere.
2Chronicles9:29 Aswamisio ace nuka Solomon, nusodit ka nukawasia mam kereka iwadikatai kakiro nuka Natan enabi, ka adwaranut naka Akiya Esilonit, ka aitapoeta nuka Ido ekadwaran nuka Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat?"
2Chronicles9:30 Kirumak Solomon Isirael kere ko Yerusalem ikar akaisaoŋon,"
2Chronicles9:31 Kojotoor Solomon kalukapapaake, kidaikinai ore loka Daudi papake: kirum Rekoboam okokuke aiboisike."
2Chronicles10:1 Kolot Rekoboam Sekem: naarai kinotara Isirael kere Sekem aitaraun nes ekabaka.
2Chronicles10:2 Kosodi kanen, kepupu Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat ŋun, (naarai kejai Misiri, neakeriarit anyoun kakonyen nuka ekabaka Solomon,) koboŋu do Yeroboam koMisiri."
2Chronicles10:3 Kijukasi konyarautu ŋes; kobu Yeroboam ka Isirael kere, kinerata ka Rekoboam atiar,"
2Chronicles10:4 “Abu papakon kitalaŋir ajookotokosi: aso do kitebeben aswam naetiono naka papakon, ka ajookotoke naelaŋir naebwaikinit mamakosi, isio da kiŋaanakini jo.”"
2Chronicles10:5 Kotema kes atiar, “Koboŋutu neajai eoŋ ketuboros apaarasia auni.” Koloto ituŋa,"
2Chronicles10:6 Kinerut ekabaka Rekoboam kimakio, luabwoenenete kakonyen nuka Solomon papake eroko ejari ebe, “Ibalasi bo yesi ai eoŋ aboŋokin ituŋa ŋul?”"
2Chronicles10:7 Kobalas ŋes ebe, “Arai kisianiar ijo kaneejaas ituŋa ŋul, kisiyalamik kes, kolimok akiro nuejok, aso eraunos kesi ikonikejaanakinak ikar kere.”"
2Chronicles10:8 Konye kola ainerun naka imakio naapesikinito ŋes, kineru kikatumunak luapolounete kaŋes, luabwoete kakonyeneke,"
2Chronicles10:9 Kotema kes atiar, “Ibalasi bo yesi ai, kaboŋokis ituŋa ŋul, luapotu kabalas eoŋ ebe, ‘Kitebeben ajookot nakibwaikini papakon mamakosi?’”"
2Chronicles10:10 Kotemasi ikatumunak luapolounete kaŋes atiar, “Kolimok ituŋa ŋul lukibalas jo ebe, ‘Abu papakon kitalaŋir ajookotokosi, konye jo kitebeben ŋes kamakosi’; ilimokini kes kwanata ebe, ‘Ebur ekabokorit lodidi aitelekar aŋabet naka papake."
2Chronicles10:11 Aso do abu papaka kisibwok yes ajookot naelaŋir, eyatakini do eoŋ ajookotokus: abu papaka koswala yes kidas, konye eoŋ kaswalari yes kikiritona.”"
2Chronicles10:12 Aso kobu Yeroboam ka ituŋa kere mama ejai Rekoboam apaaran nakiwuniet, kwape ecorakinia ekabaka ebe, “Koboŋut bobo apaaran nakiwuniet.”"
2Chronicles10:13 Koboŋok ekabaka ituŋa kaisiejakin: kola ekabaka Rekoboam ainerun naka imakio,"
2Chronicles10:14 kinera kakes kwape ajaar ainerun naka ikatumunak ebe, “Abu papaka kitalaŋir ajookotokus, konye eoŋ eyatakini ŋes; abu papaka koswala yes kidas konye eoŋ kaswalari yes kikiritona.”"
2Chronicles10:15 Aso mam abu ekabaka kopup ituŋa; naarai kerai akirot naabu Edeke koyau, tetere iticasi EJAKAIT akekirot, naabu kiner kama ka Akiya Esilonit mama ejai Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat,"
2Chronicles10:16 Keanyu Isirael kere ebe mam abu ekabaka kopup kes, koboŋokis ituŋa eka baka ebe, “Anyoin akorakinetekosi kama ka Daudi? Ido emamei sio airumet kotoma okoku loka Yese: Ape ma ŋinituŋanan owemanakus, wu Isirael: Daudi, koanyanar do ekonikek.” Koloto do luka Isirael kere owemanakec,"
2Chronicles10:17 Konye kirum Rekoboam idwe luka Isirael luiboiete koreria luka Yuda,"
2Chronicles10:18 Kosodi ekabaka Rekoboam aijukar Kadoram, loapolokinit esolo: apotu idwe luka Isirael kibiribiroto ŋes kamor, kotwana, Kiwonya ekabaka Rekoboam adokar agalike, akerit Yerusalem,"
2Chronicles10:19 Kwaŋin kipaliik do Isirael ekek loka Daudi, kiton lolo."
2Chronicles11:1 Kedol Rekoboam Yerusalem, kotukonok ŋesi lukokek loka Yuda ka Benyamin, ituŋa lueseunitai ilukumin akwatat ka ilukumin akais akanykauni, lukeraas ikajiok, aitiji Isirael, ainyakun ajakanut bobo neejai Rekoboam,"
2Chronicles11:2 Konye kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Semaia etuŋanan loka Edeke ebe,"
2Chronicles11:3 “Kolimok Rekoboam okoku loka Solomon, ekabaka loka Yuda, ka Isirael kere luejaas koYuda ka Benyamin, ebe,"
2Chronicles11:4 ‘Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Mam ilosete, ido mam ijiikinos kikusiinacan; koboŋo ŋolituŋanan togoke; naarai erai akirot na nakaŋ.’’’ Kosodete kopuput akiro nuka EJAKAIT, koboŋosi kasurokin Yeroboam."
2Chronicles11:5 Kiboikin Rekoboam Yerusalem, koduk ireria luka aigalikin koYuda."
2Chronicles11:6 Koduk do Ber-lekem, ka Etam, ka Tekoa,"
2Chronicles11:7 ka Bet-sur, ka Soko, ka Adulam,"
2Chronicles11:8 ka Gat, ka Maresa, ka Sip,"
2Chronicles11:9 ka Adoraim, ka Lakis, ka Aseka,"
2Chronicles11:10 ka Sora, ka Aiyalon, ka Keburon, luejaas ko Yuda ka Benyamin, ireria luebwaitai."
2Chronicles11:11 Kitogogoŋ ireria lukagogon, kibwaik ikapolok toma, ka imono, ka akinyet ka ebino."
2Chronicles11:12 Kibwaik ibukui ka akwaras toma ŋolire kere, kitogogoŋ kes noi noi. Koraas Yuda ka Benyamin luke."
2Chronicles11:13 Kolosenenete isasedotin ka Ilebin mamake lukejaas koIsirael kere anyoun koikorukec kere.
2Chronicles11:14 Naarai kojalakis Ilebin ironyiakec ka airumetekec, kopotu Yuda ka Yerusalem: naarai apotu Yeroboam ka odweke kireŋeasi kes, kinyeis aijaanakin kwape isasedotin kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles11:15 Koseu ŋesi isasedotin luka aiboisio nuiceleleete, ka luka ikorwa, ka luka itak luabu ŋesi kiswamau."
2Chronicles11:16 Ido kotoma atekerin kere nuka Isirael, luebwaikinito itauonokec amoot EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, apotu kotupasi Ilebin, kopotu Yerusalem ainakin asuban mama ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakec."
2Chronicles11:17 Kwaŋin kitogogoŋito ajakanut naka Yuda, kitogogoŋito Rekoboam okoku loka Solomon, ikar iuni: naarai kolosito korot loka Daudi ka Solomon ikar iuni,"
2Chronicles11:18 Komany Rekoboam aberu, Makalat akoku naka Yerimot okoku loka Daudi, ka naka Abikail akoku naka Eliab okoku loka Yese:"
2Chronicles11:19 kourik ŋes odwe; Yeus, ka Semaria, ka Sakam."
2Chronicles11:20 Kokau kaŋin komany Maaka akoku naka Abisalom; kourik ŋes Abiya, ka Atai, ka Sisa, ka Selomit."
2Chronicles11:21 Komina Rekoboam Maaka akoku naka Abisalom adepar akeŋor kere ka akebusian: (naarai komany aŋor atomon ka nukanykauni, ka abusian akaisakanykape, kouri idwe lusap akaisaarei ka lukanykauni ka lupesur akaisakanykape.)"
2Chronicles11:22 Koseu Rekoboam Abiya okoku loka Maaka araun lokapolon, ŋes lokapolon koinacanake: naarai akoto aitaraun nes ekabaka."
2Chronicles11:23 Kiswama kacoa, kisiarak odweke kere aŋatar akwapin kere nuka Yuda ka Benyamin, toma ŋolire loebwaitai: koinak kes inyamat luipu. Komoik kes aŋor nuipu."
2Chronicles12:1 Kosodi kanen, nakiticasere ajakanut naka Rekoboam, kogogoŋor, kojal ikisila luka EJAKAIT, ka Isirael kere nepepe kaŋes,"
2Chronicles12:2 Kosodi kanen, kokaru lokikanyet loka ekabaka Rekoboam, kobu Sisak ekabaka loko Misiri asurokin Yerusalem, naarai apaasi kama ejai EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles12:3 Kejaas kagalin akwat atomon ka nuarei, ka ikebwanenok ilukumin akaisakanykape: ituŋa da luaupunos kaŋes anyoun koMisiri mam epedorio aimar; Ilubim, ka Isukiim, ka Itiopian."
2Chronicles12:4 Kirum ireria luebwaitai luka Yuda, kobu Yerusalem."
2Chronicles12:5 Kobu do Semaia enabi mama ejai Rekoboam, ka ikapolok luka Yuda, luatukonokina Yerusalem kanuka Sisak, kotema kes atiar, “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Ipotu kojalata eoŋ, kanuka ŋun kenyeik yes da akan naka Sisak.”"
2Chronicles12:6 Kosodete ikapolok luka Isirael ka ekabaka aitasonikin; kotemasi atiar, “Edolit EJAKAIT.”"
2Chronicles12:7 Keanyu EJAKAIT ebe etasonikinos, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Semaia atiar, “Etasonikinos kesi; mam amudiari kes; konye ainakini kes adioitajario, mam akanyunyura ebukokinio Yerusalem kakan naka Sisak."
2Chronicles12:8 Konye do eraunos kesi ikekejaanakinak; tetere ejenunete aijaanakinika, ka aiiaanakin naka ajakanuto nuka akwapin.”"
2Chronicles12:9 Kobu do Sisak ekabaka loko Misiri asurokin Yerusalem, koyaŋa iboro luka akais nuipu luka etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka iboro luka akais nuipu luka etogo loka ekabaka; koyaŋa kere: koyaŋa da ibukui luka esabu lueswamat Solomon."
2Chronicles12:10 Kiswamau ekabaka Rekoboam ibukui luka aisinin aiboisikec, kijaik akanin nuka ikapolok luka ikedarak, luedarete ekek loka etogo loka ekabaka."
2Chronicles12:11 Kosodi naalomanaria ekabaka togo loka EJAKAIT, kopotu ikedarak kodakanarete kes, kinyakanarete agola naka ikedarak,"
2Chronicles12:12 Nakitasonikinor, kibelokin anyunyura naka EJAKAIT kamake, kinyek amudiar ŋes cut: bobo da kotakanut nuejok kotoma Yuda."
2Chronicles12:13 Kitogogoŋikin do ekabaka Rekoboam ko Yerusalem, kirum: naarai kerai Rekoboam loka ikar akaisaoŋon ka lodiopet egeuni airum, kirumak ikar itomon ka lukanykaarei koYerusalem, ere loabu EJAKAIT koseu katekerin kere nuka Isirael, aibwaikin nen ekekiror: ekiror loka totoke kerai Naama Amonit."
2Chronicles12:14 Kiswama nueroko, naarai mam ebwaikinit eketau amoot EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles12:15 Aswamisio nuka Rekoboam, nusodit ka nukawasia mam kereka iwadikatai kakiro nuka Semaia enabi, ka Ido ekadwaran, kwape ejaar aurio? Kejaenenas ijiisio kidin Rekoboam ka Yeroboam,"
2Chronicles12:16 Kojotoor Rekoboam kalukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai ore loka Daudi: kirum Abiya okokuke aiboisike."
2Chronicles13:1 Kokaru lokitomonet kakanykauni loka ekabaka Yeroboam kogeu Abiya airum Yuda.
2Chronicles13:2 Kirumak ikar iuni koYerusalem: ekiror loka totoke kerai Mikaia akoku naka Uriel loka Gibea. Kejai ejie kidiŋ Abiya ka Yeroboam,"
2Chronicles13:3 Kolot Abiya kajore naka ikajiok luetitiŋ, kes ituŋa ilukumin akwat aoŋon lueseunitai asurokin: kiderakin Yeroboam ejie kaŋes kituŋa ilukumin akwat akanykauni lueseunitai, lukeraas ikirigin luetitiŋ."
2Chronicles13:4 Kobwo Abiya komoru Semaraim loejai kakwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, kotema atiar, “Kopupokinai jo Yeroboam ka Isirael kere;"
2Chronicles13:5 mam kereka ibusakinit yes ajenun ebe abu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael koinak Daudi ajakanut naka Isirael ikar kere, ŋes, ka odweke kaitutuket naka abalaŋ?"
2Chronicles13:6 Konye konyou Yeroboam okoku loka Nebat, ekejaanakinan loka Solomon okoku loka Daudi, kipaliik ekejakait."
2Chronicles13:7 Kotukonokinos ituŋa luutai mama ejai, odwe luka Belial, lukitogogoŋete asurokin Rekoboam okoku loka Solomon, korai Rekoboam esapat, loka etau loenonok, komam kepedori aitikokin kes."
2Chronicles13:8 “Kwana do iwomitos yesi asurokin ajakanut naka EJAKAIT kakan naka odwe luka Daudi; iraas yesi ekodet loepol, ejaas kayes itak luka esabu luabu Yeroboam kiswamak yes araun idekesio."
