2Chronicles13:9 Mam baca yes ipotu kireŋeasi isasedotin luka EJAKAIT, odwe luka Aaron, ka Ilebin, kodumut isasedotin kopone loka ituŋa lukacekwapin? Tape loebuni atiakun bon kemoŋ lotobait ka imerekekin ikanykaarei, epedori araun esasedoti loka ŋul lumam eraas idekesio."
2Chronicles13:10 Konye do isio, EJAKAIT ŋes Edekekosi, mam sio kipou kajalata ŋes; kija isio ka isasedotin luijaanakinete EJAKAIT, odwe luka Aaron, ka Ilebin toma aswamukec:"
2Chronicles13:11 icweikinete kesi ŋinitupuruc ka ŋinitibon ainakineta nuieweio, ka lukisupurununo lueuru maa: inapanakinete kesi imugatin luka aitodikin omesa loesegaara; ka epir loka atalai loka esabu ka atalaike ainok ŋinitiboŋ: naarai kiric isio akiro nuka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke; konye ipotu yesi kojalata ŋes."
2Chronicles13:12 Ido koany, ejai Edeke kasio kiŋarenikinit, ka isasedotinike karupepen nuka elulu akusia elulu asurokin yes. Yes idwe luka Isirael, sirikisurokis EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakus; naarai mam ikeriakaros.”"
2Chronicles13:13 Konye kitolot Yeroboam ikaperunok kokaukec: kojaas kes kiŋaren ka Yuda, ka ikaperunok kaukec,"
2Chronicles13:14 Kenoliasi luka Yuda kau, koany, keiai ejie kinaren, kokaukec da: kiworoto mama ejai EJAKAIT, kokuta isasedotin arupepen."
2Chronicles13:15 Kosodete ituŋa luka Yuda eibwoŋ: napibwoŋas ituŋa luka Yuda, kosodi kanen, kodany Edeke Yeroboam ka Isirael kere kakonyen nuka Abiya ka Yuda."
2Chronicles13:16 Kokerata idwe luka Isirael kakonyen nuka Yuda: kijaik Edeke kes akanikec.
2Chronicles13:17 Koar Abiya ka ituŋake kes kearit loepol: kibiroros luaaritai luka Isirael ituŋa ilukumin akwat akany lueseunitai.
2Chronicles13:18 Kwaŋin kitonokokai idwe luka Isirael kapaarasia kaŋun, kipikosi idwe luka Yuda naarai kegoŋakina EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakec."
2Chronicles13:19 Korukitor Abiya Yeroboam, kirum ireria kamake, Bet-el ka ireriake, ka Yesana ka ireriake, ka Epuron ka ireriake."
2Chronicles13:20 Mam bobo abu Yeroboam kogogoŋor kapaarasia nuka Abiya: kinom EJAKAIT ŋes, kotwana."
2Chronicles13:21 Konye kogogoŋor Abiya, komany aŋor atomon ka nuoŋon, kouri idwe lusap akaisaarei ka luarei, ka lupesur itomon ka lukanykape."
2Chronicles13:22 Aswamisio ace nuka Abiya, ka iponesioke, ka akiroke, iwadikatai oitabo loka enabi Ido."
2Chronicles14:1 Kojotoor do Abiya kalukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai ore loka Daudi, kirum Asa okokuke aiboisike: kapaarasiake kiyamakin akwap ikar itomon."
2Chronicles14:2 Kiswama Asa nuejok ka nuedolito kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekedeke:
2Chronicles14:3 naarai kolema ŋesi itemwan lumo, ka aiboisio nuiceleleete, kobilibil ipirin, kojepejep Aserim:"
2Chronicles14:4 kicorak Yuda amoot EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakec, ka aricenen ikisila ka aicorakineta,"
2Chronicles14:5 Kolema da koreria kere luka Yuda aiboisio nuiceleleete ka aputosia nuka akoloŋ: kiyamakina ajakanut kakonyeneke.
2Chronicles14:6 Koduk ireria luebwaitai koYuda: naarai eyamakina akwap, amamei ejie kokar kaŋul; naarai abu EJAKAIT kisiyeŋu ŋes,"
2Chronicles14:7 Naarai kotema ŋesi Yuda atiar, “Kadukoto ireria lu, kerigaut karwatatin, ka itogoi lueojak, ikirigin ka atiketa; eriŋa akwap ejai kakonyenewok, naarai kimoot oni EJAKAIT Ewokodeke; kimoot ŋes, abu ŋesi da kisiyenu oni kaŋoliwai.” Kosodete kodukoto, kokeriakaros."
2Chronicles14:8 Kejaas Asa kajore nakedakit ibukui ka akwaras, ilukumin akwat auni koYuda; koBenyamin da, lukedakitos ibukui ka aiket akabwai, ilukumin akwat aarei ka ilukumin akaisakanykauni: ŋul kere keraas ituŋa lukirigin luetitiŋ."
2Chronicles14:9 Kolom Sera Etiopiat asurokin kes ejaas kajore naka ilukumin elukumit, ka agalin akwat auni; kobu ŋesi Maresa."
2Chronicles14:10 Koloma do Asa airiamakin, kiderakinos ejie kaditot naka Sepata koMaresa."
2Chronicles14:11 Komonyak Asa EJAKAIT Ekedeke, kotema atiar, “EJAKAIT, emamei lokiŋarakini kilema ijo, kidin ka lokagogon ka loemamei agogoŋ; kiŋarakinai sio, wu EJAKAIT Ekosideke; naarai kigonakina jo, kokirorikon ŋes kilomunia asurokin ekodet lo loepol. Wu EJAKAIT, irai ijo Ekosideke; kinyek etuŋanan aipikor jo.”"
2Chronicles14:12 Kodany do EJAKAIT Itiopian kakonyen nuka Asa, kakonyen nuka Yuda da; kokerata Itiopian."
2Chronicles14:13 Korukitor Asa ka ituŋa lukejaas kaŋes kiton Gerar: kibiroros luipu noi luka Itiopian komam epedorete ajtaiara bonik; naarai amudiaros kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kakonyen nuka ajoreke da; koyaŋaasi luŋatuna luipu noi."
2Chronicles14:14 Kodanyata lukoreria kere luirimorito Gerar; naarai kobunoki kes etasuro loka EJAKAIT: koŋata ireria kere; naarai kejaas luŋatuna luipu tomakec.
2Chronicles14:15 Kipota da iweman luka ibaren, koŋatut amerekekin nuipu noi ka akaalai, koboŋosi Yerusalem."
2Chronicles15:1 Kodoik emoyo loka Edeke Asaria okoku loka Oded:
2Chronicles15:2 koloma ŋesi airiamakin ka Asa, kotema ŋes atiar, “Kopupokinai, Asa, ka Yuda kere ka Benyamin: ejai EJAKAIT kayes, naijaatar yesi kaŋes; arai imootos ŋes, idumunete; konye arai ijalete ŋes, ŋes da kijali."
2Chronicles15:3 Apak naepol amamei Isirael Edeke lokabeit, amamei da esasedoti loisisianakini, amameete da ikisila:"
2Chronicles15:4 konye nakejaatar ocan kibelokinos mama ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, komoata ŋes, kodumutu nes."
2Chronicles15:5 Kapaarasia kwa amamei ainapakin ŋin yenelomari, karaida ŋin yenelomuni, konye kiyaloŋoŋoete noi luiboiete kere kakwapin."
2Chronicles15:6 Kobilibilunos, ateker kateker, ka ere ka ere: naarai kisiyaloŋoŋ Edeke kes katiokisio kere,"
2Chronicles15:7 Konye kicata yesi, sirikijalijalakinos akusikanin: naarai eropio akusiswam.”"
2Chronicles15:8 Kepupu Asa akiro ŋun, ka aidwar naka Oded enabi, kotitiŋior, kolema italesia kakwap kere nako Yuda ka Benyamin, koreria da luerumit kakwap nakiukon naka Epuraim; kiteteu etem loka EJAKAIT, lokejai iŋaren kaneelomarere togo loka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles15:9 Kotukonok Yuda kere ka Benyamin, ka ŋul lukiboiororos kakes koEpuraim ka Manase, koSimeon da; naarai kobwota luipu kakesi mama ejai ŋesi koIsiraei, keanyutu kesi ebe ejai EJAKAIT Ekedeke kaŋes."
2Chronicles15:10 Kotukonokinos do koYerusalem kolap lokiwuniet, kokaru lokitomonet kakany loka airum naka Asa."
2Chronicles15:11 Koinakis EJAKAIT asuban kapaaran kaijin, nuka lunatuŋa luayaut, imoŋin akwat akanykaarei ka amerekekin alukumin akanykaarei."
2Chronicles15:12 Kolomasi toma aitutuket amoot EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakec, kikecetauon kere ka akeceijar kere;"
2Chronicles15:13 ebe da yeneŋeri amoot EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isiraei, eario, arai yenedit arai yenepol, arai ekiliokit arai aberu."
2Chronicles15:14 Kiyapoikis EJAKAIT keporoto loepol, keibwoŋ, karupepen, ka apeen."
2Chronicles15:15 Kisiyalamik Yuda kere aiyaposit: naarai apotu kiyapoto kitauonokec kere, komoata ŋes keimielakec kere; apotu kodumut ŋes: kisiyeŋu EJAKAIT kes kowaitin kere,"
2Chronicles15:16 Kireŋjea da Maaka, toto naka Asa ekabaka, karaut akabaka, naarai abu kiswamau aput naketal araun Asera; kojepa Asa aputoke, kitarau apua, kicwe kaguurut Kiduron."
2Chronicles15:17 Konye mam aponi kolemarai aiboisio nuiceleleete koIsirael: konye kedolit etau loka Asa apaarasiake kere,"
2Chronicles15:18 Kitoloma iboro togo loka Edeke luabu papake kotiakarite, ka iboro luabu ŋesi elopet kotiakarite, epuesa ka esabu ka iboro."
2Chronicles15:19 Amamei bobo ejie aitodol okaru loka akaisauni ka lukany loka airum naka Asa.
2Chronicles16:1 Kokaru loka akaisauni ka lukanykape loka airum naka Asa, kolot Baasa ekabaka loka Isirael asurokin Yuda, koduk Rama, tetere mam ecamakini idiotuŋanan alomar arai alomun mama ejai Asa ekabaka loka Yuda."
2Chronicles16:2 Kosodi Asa alemun epuesa ka esabu koboro luka akais nuipu luka etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka luka etogo loka ekabaka, kijukak Ben-kadad ekabaka loka Suria, loeboienenei koDamasiko, ebe,"
2Chronicles16:3 “Ejai aitutuket kidiŋika kajo, kwape ajaar kidiŋ papaka ka papakon: koany, ejukakinit jo epuesa ka esabu; kolot, kobil aitutuketekon ka Baasa ekabaka loka Isirael, tetere enyouni ŋesi kaneajai eoŋ,”"
2Chronicles16:4 Kiira Ben-kadad ekabaka Asa, kijuka ikapolok luka ajoresioke asurokin ireria luka Isirael; kodanyata luko Iyon, ka Dan, ka Abelmaim, ka ireria kere luka aiŋad luka Naputali."
2Chronicles16:5 Kosodi kanen, kepupu Baasa nuŋ, kinyeik aiduk Rama, kitanaŋ akeswam."
2Chronicles16:6 Kosodi Asa ekabaka ayaŋaar Yuda kere; koyaŋaasi amor nuka Rama, ka akitoke, nuabu Baasa kodukitor; kodukio Geba ka Misipa."
2Chronicles16:7 Kapaarasia kaŋun kobu Kanani ekadwaran mama ejai Asa ekabaka loka Yuda, kotema ŋes atiar, “Naarai igoŋakina ijo ekabaka loka Suria, komam igoŋakina EJAKAIT Ekonideke, kanuka ŋun akuu ajore naka ekabaka loka Suria kakanikon."
2Chronicles16:8 Mam kereka Itiopian ka Ilubim ajore nakos, kejaas kagalin ka ikebwanenok luipu noi noi? Konye naarai ibu kogoŋakina EJAKAIT, abu ŋesi kijaik kes akanikon."
2Chronicles16:9 Naarai eŋoleŋoleete akonye nuka EJAKAIT anatar akwap kere, aitodikin akegogoŋ kanuka ŋul luetenito itauonokec kakonyeneke. Iswama nukabaŋaanut kanuŋ; naarai agear kwana ijaun kaijiisio.”"
2Chronicles16:10 Kosodi Asa anyunyurikin ekadwaran, kibwaik nes aidaris; naarai kisiopak ŋes kanuka akirot kaŋin. Koroik Asa ice kotuna kapak kanin."
2Chronicles16:11 Ido koany, aswamisio nuka Asa, nusodit ka nukawasia, koany, iwadikatai oitabo loka ikabakan luka Yuda ka Isirael."
2Chronicles16:12 Kokaru loka akaisauni ka lukanykaoŋon loka airumuke kodekakin Asa akejeke; kepol noi adekake: konye toma adekake mam abu komoote EJAKAIT, konye mama ejaas imurwok."
2Chronicles16:13 Kojotoor Asa kalukapapaake, kotwana kokaru loka akaisaoŋon ka lodiopet loka airumuke."
2Chronicles16:14 Aponi kidaikinai adiopet katesinake elopet, nuabokit kanuke ore loka Daudi, kiteperikinoi oitada loeleleba auresio nuejok ka Iueur maa luegelegela luetemokinitoi kapirianut naka emurwon: kisupuronokinete luipu noi."
2Chronicles17:1 Kirum Yekosapat okokuke aiboisike, kogogoŋior asurokin Isirael."
2Chronicles17:2 Kibwaik irioŋeta koreria kere luebwaitai koYuda, kibwaik iserikalen kakwap naka Yuda, oreria da luka Epuraim luabu Asa papake kirum."
2Chronicles17:3 Kojai EJAKAIT kaYekosapat, naarai alosenenei korotin lusodit luka Daudi papaake, mam abu komoote nee jaas Ibaalim;"
2Chronicles17:4 konye komoote Edeke loka papake, kolosenenei kaicorakinetake, mam atupit nukiswamaenenei Isirael."
2Chronicles17:5 Kanuka ŋun kiticat EJAKAIT ajakanut kakanike; koinu Yuda kere ainakineta mama ejai Yekosapat; kojau ŋesi kabar ka aibuses naepol.
2Chronicles17:6 Kitonyounoi eketau orotin luka EJAKAIT: bobo da kolema aiboisio nuiceleleete ka Aserim koYuda,"
2Chronicles17:7 Kokaru lokiwuniet da loka airumuke kijuka ikapolokoke, Ben-kail, ka Obadia, ka Sekaria, ka Netanel, ka Mikaia, aisisianakin oreria luka Yuda;"
2Chronicles17:8 nepepe kakes da Ilebin, Semaia, ka Netania, ka Sebadia, ka Asakel, ka Semiramot, ka Yekonatan, ka Adoniya, ka Tobiya, ka Tob-adoniya, Ilebin; nepepe kakes da Elisama ka Yekoram, isasedotin,"
2Chronicles17:9 Kisisianakinete koYuda, kejaas keitabo loka ikisila luka EJAKAIT; kitoroto anatar ireria kere luka Yuda, kisisianakinete ituŋa."
2Chronicles17:10 Kobunok etasuro loka EJAKAIT ajakanuto kere nuka akwapin nuerimoritos Yuda, komam bobo esurokinete Yekosapat."
2Chronicles17:11 Koyaut ice ka Ipilisitian ainakineta mama ejai Yekosapat, ka esolo loka epuesa; koinut Iarabun da ŋes isipanin, imerekekin ilukumin ikanykaarei ka akwat akanykaarei, ka ikorwa ilukumin ikanykaarei ka akwat akanykaarei."
2Chronicles17:12 Kiyatanakin apolou naka Yekosapat apoloor noi; koduk itogoi luegogoŋ ka ireria lukaiŋad koYuda.
2Chronicles17:13 Kejaas ŋes aswamisio nuipu koreria luka Yuda; ka ikajiok, ituŋa lukirigin luetitiŋ, koYerusalem."
2Chronicles17:14 Lo ŋes etiaikec kwape ajaatar ikekia luka lukapapaakec; luka Yuda, ikapolok luka ilukumin; Adana lokapolon, ka ituŋa lukirigin Iuetitiŋ ilukumin akwat auni nepepe kaŋes:"
2Chronicles17:15 kotupite ŋes Yekokanan ekapolon; ka ilukumin akwat aarei ka ilukumin akaisakanykauni nepepe kaŋes.
2Chronicles17:16 Kotupite ŋes Amasia okoku loka Sikiri, loabu kijaikin ketau loejok mama ejai EJAKAIT; ka ituŋa lukirigin luetitiŋ ilukumin akwat aarei nepepe kaŋes."
2Chronicles17:17 Luka Benyamin; Eliada etuŋanan lokirigi Ioetitin, ka ilukumin akwat aarei nepepe kaŋes lukekapito akabwai ka ibukui:"
2Chronicles17:18 kotupite ŋes Yekosabad, ka ilukumin akwatat ka ilukumin akaisakanykauni nepepe kaŋes luetemokino ejie."
2Chronicles17:19 Ŋul kes luejaanakinete ekabaka kogelara ŋul luebwaikinit ekabaka oreria luebwaitai anatar Yuda kere.
2Chronicles18:1 Kejaas do Yekosapat kabar ka aibuses naepol; kimurakikinos ka Akab.
2Chronicles18:2 Ketuboros ikar kolot ŋesi neejai Akab Samaria. Koarak Akab ŋes ka ituŋa lukejaas kaŋes amerekekin ka imoŋin luipu, kilip ŋes aupar alosit Ramot-gilead."
2Chronicles18:3 Kotema Akab ekabaka Ioka Isirael Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda atiar, “Kiupar tope ijo keoŋ alosit Ramot-gilead?” Koboŋok ŋes ebe, “Arai eoŋ kwape iraar ijo, ikatuŋa kwape ituŋakon; kiupari kajo ojie.”"
2Chronicles18:4 Kotema Yekosapat ekabaka loka Isirael atiar, “Keŋaiŋait, kiŋit kakirot naka EJAKAIT lolo.”"
2Chronicles18:5 Kosodi ekabaka loka Isirael atukonokin inabin, ituŋa akwat aoŋon, kotema kes atiar, “Kilosi kereka aitiji Ramot-gilead, arai bo kenye?” Kotemasi kesi atiar, “Kolot, naarai kijaik Edeke ŋes akan naka ekabaka.”"
2Chronicles18:6 Konye kotema Yekosapat atiar, “Emamei bobo da enabi ece loka EJAKAIT, keŋitata ŋes?”"
2Chronicles18:7 Kotema ekabaka loka Isirael Yekosapat atiar, “Eriŋa ejai etuŋanan ediopet lokipedori aiŋitunia EJAKAIT: konye asac eoŋ ŋes; naarai mam kadwaranakini eoŋ nukajokak, dimarai ca nupekaronok duc: ŋes ŋol Mikaia okoku loka Imila.” Kotema Yekosapat atiar, “Kinyek ekabaka einer kwaŋin.”"
2Chronicles18:8 Kosodi ekabaka loka Isirael anyaraun ekapolokiton, kotema ŋes atiar, “Kisunyite koom Mikaia okoku loka Imila.”"
2Chronicles18:9 Kiboikin ekabaka loka Isirael ka Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda ŋinituŋanan oicoloŋoke, konapitos inapenekec, kiboikinos kaibois naelal neelomarere orute loka Samaria; kodwarata inabin kere kakonyenekee."
2Chronicles18:10 Kotatau Sedekia okoku loka Kenaana amumwara nuka asua, kotema atiar, “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Iremio nu Isurian, aitodol neadaunotor kesi.”"
2Chronicles18:11 Kodwarata inabin kere kwaŋin ebe, “Kolot Ramot-gilead, kisirerenio: naarai ijaikini EJAKAIT ŋes akan naka ekabaka.”"
2Chronicles18:12 Kosodi ekiyakia loabu kolot anyaraun Mikaia kotema ŋes atiar, “Koany, ejokuka akiro nuka inabin kaituk adiopet mama ejai ekabaka: keŋaiŋait koputokinos do akonikirot kwape kadiopet ka nukec, kiner nuejok.”"
2Chronicles18:13 Kotema Mikaia atiar, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, nuelimuni Ekadeke, ŋupeŋun eneri.”"
2Chronicles18:14 Kedolu ŋesi mama ejai ekabaka, kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Mikaia, kilosi kereka isio Ramot-gilead ejie, arai bo kenyek?” Kotema atiar, “Koloto yesi, kisirereŋio; kijaikinio kes akanikus.”"
2Chronicles18:15 Kotema ekabaka nes atiar, “Irwan imwaasi ai kesiyapo jo ebe Sirikiilimok eoŋ adiokirot dimarai nukabeit kokiror loka EJAKAIT?”"
2Chronicles18:16 Kotema atiar, “Abu kaany Isirael kere isiarakina koroŋan, kwape amerekekin nuemameete ekecokon: kotema EJAKAIT atiar, ‘Emameete nu ejakait; koboŋosi kesi ŋinituŋanan oreke inapakina.’’’"
2Chronicles18:17 Kotema ekabaka loka Isirael Yekosapat atiar, “Mam abu kalimok jo ebe mam kadwaranakini eoŋ nukajokak, dimarai ca nupekaronok?”"
2Chronicles18:18 Kotema atiar, “Kanuka ŋun kiirasi yesi akirot naka EJAKAIT: abu kaany EJAKAIT iboie koicoloŋoke, kobwoi da ajore kere naka akuj kakanike nakoteten ka nakokediany,"
2Chronicles18:19 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Iŋai iŋalaari Akab ekabaka loka Isirael, tetere elosi aibirokin Ramot-gilead?’ Kotema ediopet kopone lo, ece da kopone ece,"
2Chronicles18:20 Kolom do emoyo, kobwo kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kotema atiar, “Eŋalaari eoŋ ŋes.’ Kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, ‘Kinyo?’"
2Chronicles18:21 Kotema atiar, ‘Alomari, araun emoyo loka aiŋal kaituke nuka inabinoke kere.’ Kotema atiar, ‘Iŋalaari ijo ŋes, ido ipedori: koloma, kiswama kwaŋin.’"
2Chronicles18:22 Aso do koany, ebwaik EJAKAIT emoyo loka aiŋal aituke nuka inabinokon lu; kinerak EJAKAIT jo aronis.”"
2Chronicles18:23 Kosodi Sedekia okoku loka Kenaana aikunyakin, kibap Mikaia eitinyo, kotema atiar, “Kikwaikini ai emoyo loka EJAKAIT enyouni kamakaŋ einer kajo?”"
2Chronicles18:24 Kotema Mikaia atiar, “Koany, ianyuni kapaaran kaŋin, nailomaria agola nakotoma aiŋop.”"
2Chronicles18:25 Kotema ekabaka loka Isirael atiar, “Kikamutu Mikaia, kinyakakis ŋes Amon ekayaiton loka ere, mama ejai Yoas da okoku loka ekabaka;"
2Chronicles18:26 kolimokis ebe, ‘Inera ekabaka kwanata ebe, Kibwaikisi ekesa lo aidaris, kitanyamete ŋes inyamat luka aiticanitoi ka akipi nuka aiticanitoi, aitodol neaboŋunio eoŋ kainapakin.’’’"
2Chronicles18:27 Kotema Mikaia atiar, “Arai teni kiboŋu ijo kainapakin, mam EJAKAIT inerit kamaka.” Kotema atiar, “Kiirasi yesi ituŋa, yes kere.”"
2Chronicles18:28 Koloto do ekabaka loka Isirael ka Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda Ramotgilead,"
2Chronicles18:29 Kotema ekabaka loka Isirael Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda atiar, “Etegelikini eoŋ bon, alosi ojie; konye konap ijo inapenekon.” Kitegelikin ekabaka loka Isirael bon; koloto ojie."
2Chronicles18:30 Abu ekabaka loka Suria kicorakinite ikapolokitok luka agalinike ebe, “Sirikijioto ka ludidik karaida kalukapolok, dimarai kito ekabaka loka Isirael bon.”"
2Chronicles18:31 Kosodi kanen, keanyut ikapolokitok luka agalin Yekosapat, kobalas ebe, “Ŋes ekabaka loka Isirael.” Kanuka ŋun korioto aitiji ŋes; konye kodelo Yekosapat, kiŋarak EJAKAIT ŋes; kibelok Edeke kes anyoun kamake,"
2Chronicles18:32 Kosodi kanen, keanyut ikapolokitok luka agalin ebe mere ŋes ekabaka loka Isirael, koboŋut karukitor ŋes."
2Chronicles18:33 Kiket ediotuŋanan akabwake komam elosikinit, kogum ekabaka loka Isirael neiriamitotor iŋapeneke lukasua: kanuka ŋun kotema ekerenean agalike atiar, “Kibelok akanikon, kodaka eoŋ kajore; naarai kemusuni noi.”"
2Chronicles18:34 Kosisior ejie kapaaran kaŋin; konye kigaŋakin ekabaka loka Isirael agalike asurokin Isurian aitodol eboŋ: kapak naalomaria akoloŋ kotwana.
2Chronicles19:1 Koboŋo Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda togoke Yerusalem inapakina.
2Chronicles19:2 Koloma Yeku okoku loka Kanani ekadwaran airiamakin kaŋes, kotema ŋesi ekabaka Yekosapat atiar, “Ti kereka ejok jo aiŋarakin ikaronok, amina da ŋjul luelaito EJAKAIT? Kanuka akirot kaŋin kibunok jo anyunyura kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT,"
2Chronicles19:3 Konye edumuna nuejok kotomakon, naarai ilema Aserot kakwap, ibwaikinit ekonitau amoot Edeke.”"
2Chronicles19:4 Kiboie Yekosapat koYerusalem: koloma bobo mama ejaas ituŋa anyoun koBeer-seba kiton akwap nakiukon naka Epuraim, kinyaku kes mama ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakec."
2Chronicles19:5 Kodakanak ikatubok kakwap anatar ireria kere luebwaitai luka Yuda, kaŋolire kere."
2Chronicles19:6 Kotema ikatubok atiar, “Koomitos nuiswamaete: naarai mam itubete kanuka ituŋanan, konye kanuka EJAKAIT: ejai ŋesi kayes kotube."
2Chronicles19:7 Aso do koyoŋito yesi EJAKAIT; kocoito kiswamata: naarai emameete numam adolit kaneejai EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, karaida atiakit ituŋa, karaida aijaun ainakineta.”"
2Chronicles19:8 Ido Yerusalem kibwaik Yekosapat ice koLebin ka isasedotin, ka ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaa luka Isirael, kanuka etube loka EJAKAIT, ka ipegeta. Koboŋosi Yerusalem,"
2Chronicles19:9 Kicoro kes ebe, “Kikwaikisi neta iyonete EJAKAIT, amunonut, ka etau Ioedolit,"
2Chronicles19:10 Naeyauniata ikusiinacan luiboiete koreriakec epeget kere mama ijaas, kokidiŋ kaokot ka aokot, kokidin kekisil ka aicorakinet, ikisila ka itubesia, kikwenyasi kes, kinyeis agwaun akiro mama ejai EJAKAIT, kosodi anyunyura abunokin yes ka ikusiinacan: kiswamata ŋun, mam do igwaunete."
2Chronicles19:11 Ido koany, kipolokinit yes Amaria esasedoti lopeti kakiro kere nuka EJAKAIT; ka Sebedia okoku loka Isimael, ekayaiton ekek loka Yuda kakiro kere nuka ekabaka: Ilebin da eraunos ikapolokitokokus, Kiswamata katitiŋ, kojai EJAKAIT ka yenejok.”"
2Chronicles20:1 Kosodi kanen, akaulo kaŋun, kopotu idwe luka Moab, ka idwe luka Amon, ka ice koMorain kakes asurokin Yekosapat."
2Chronicles20:2 Kosodi kopotu ice lualimokinete Yekosapat ebe, “Ebunit ekodet loepol asurokin jo anyoun kokekwa koSuria; ido koany, ejaas Kasason-tamar (nes ŋol Engedi).”"
2Chronicles20:3 Kokuriana Yekosapat, kodunyak amoot EJAKAIT; kolimo ailuŋ anatar Yuda kere."
2Chronicles20:4 Kotukonokin Yuda kere, amoot aiŋarakinio kaneejai EJAKAIT: kopotu koreria kere luka Yuda amoot EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles20:5 Kobwo Yekosapat katukot naka Yuda ka Yerusalem, togo loka EJAKAIT kiŋaren kalaro nakitetet;"
2Chronicles20:6 kotema atiar, “Wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakosi, mere ijo Edeke toma akuj? Mere ijo ekayaiton ajakanuto kere nuka atekerin? Kakonikan ejai agogoŋ ka apedor, ŋes emamear loepedori aitikokin jo."
2Chronicles20:7 Mam kereka jo, wu Ekosideke, ireŋearit lueboiete kakwap kana kakonyen nuka ikonituŋa Isirael, koinak aur naka Aburaam opaperokon ikar kere?"
2Chronicles20:8 Apotu kiboikinos kanen, kodukokis jo kanen aibois nakalaunan kanuka ekonikiror, kobalas ebe,"
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Arai kiidoik sio aronis, ekileŋ, etube, arai atular, arai ebeli, kibwoi koiŋaren ketogo kalo, kakonyenekon, (naarai ejai ekonikiror togo lo,) kimonyia isio jo kocanikosi, iirari itajari da.’"
2Chronicles20:10 Aso do koany, idwe luka Amon ka Moab ka lukomoru Seir, lumam jo icamunit Isirael alomar akwapukec nakeponiata kesi kakwap nako Misiri, konye apotu kesi kinaca, mam apotu komudiasi kes;"
2Chronicles20:11 koany, kwape kitaciata kesi sio aponare aireŋear sio kairumetekon, naibu ijo koinak sio airum."
2Chronicles20:12 Wu Ekosideke, mam kereka jo itubokini kes? Naarai emamei sio agogoŋ asurokin ekodet lo loepol loabu asurokin sio; mam kijeni da nukiswamai; konye esesenete akosikonye jo.”"
2Chronicles20:13 Kobwo Yuda kere kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, nepepe kaludidikikec, ka aŋorokec, ka idwekec."
2Chronicles20:14 Kosodi kodoik emoyo loka EJAKAIT Yakasiel okoku loka Sekaria, okoku loka Benaia, okoku loka Yeiel, okoku loka Matania, Elebit, lokodwe luka Asap, kokidiŋ katukot."
2Chronicles20:15 Kotema ŋesi atiar, “Kiirasi yesi, Yuda kere, ka yes luiboiete koYerusalem, ka jo Yekosapat ekabaka: inera EJAKAIT kwanata mama ijaas ebe, ‘Sirikikuriakaros, karaida aiyaloŋoŋ kanuka ekodet kala loepol; naarai ejie mam erai lokus, konye loka Edcke."
2Chronicles20:16 Koloto yesi moi asurokin kes: koany, epote kadokaret naka Sis; idumakinete kes osaŋe loka aditot, koiŋaren kamodiŋ naka Yeruel."
2Chronicles20:17 Mam yes ipudasi ejie kojie lo; kiderakinos, kobwaata kopalarito, koanyut aitajar naka EJAKAIT naejai kayes, wu Yuda ka Yerusalem’: sirikikuriakaros karaida aiyaloŋoŋ; koloto moi asurokin kes; naarai ejai EJAKAIT kayes.”"
2Chronicles20:18 Kokukum Yekosapat kitulur akekou kwap: kibiror Yuda kere ka luiboiete koYerusalem kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, komaata EJAKAIT,"
2Chronicles20:19 Kobwaata Ilebin, lukodwe luka Ikokatin, ka lukodwe luka Ikorakin, kituritos EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, keporoto loepol noi."
2Chronicles20:20 Konyoutu tupuruc sek, kolomasi amodiŋ naka Tekoa; napelomarete kobwo Yekosapat kotema atiar, “Kiirarai, jo Yuda, ka yes luiboiete koYerusalem; kiyuutu EJAKAIT Ekusideke, kwaŋin kiticasio; kiyuutu inabinoke, kwaŋin kisirereŋio.”"
2Chronicles20:21 Kedau iŋesi ainerun kaituŋa, koseu lueyeikinete EJAKAIT, luituritos ajokis naka alaunit, nakelosioto kiŋarenikinito ajore, kobalasi ebe, “Kimalata EJAKAIT; Naarai ejaenena akeitim ikar kere.”"
2Chronicles20:22 Kegeutu kesi ayoore ka aiturit, kibwaik EJAKAIT ikaperunok asurokin idwe luka Amon, ka Moab ka moru Seir, luaponito asurokin Yuda; kodanyai,"
2Chronicles20:23 Naarai konyoikis idwe luka Amon ka Moab aluikin luiboiete moru Seir, aiar ka amudiar kes cut: kedautu kesi aiar luibojete koSeir, kigaŋanakinos ŋulutuŋa aiar yenice,"
2Chronicles20:24 Kedol Yuda aiteis naka amodiŋ, kosesenete ekodet; ido koany, keraas lukatwak luebirokina kwap, kemameete da luakuito."
2Chronicles20:25 Kebu Yekosapat ka iketuŋa aiŋat kes, kodumut ibaren luipu noi, ka iboro, ka inapen, ka iboro luka akais nuipu, luapotu kolacut kanukec, adepar luapedorete ayaŋaar: kodaut apaarasia auni eŋasete, naarai epu noi."
2Chronicles20:26 Kapaaran nakiwoŋonet kotukonokinos aditot naka Beraka; naarai kanen kituritos EJAKAIT: Ŋes kemaikiniata ekiror loka aibois ŋin Aditot naka Beraka, kiton lolo."
2Chronicles20:27 Kosodete aboŋor, ŋolituŋanan loka Yuda ka Yerusalem, kiŋarenikinite Yekosapat kes, aboŋor Yerusalem kaiyalama; naarai abu EJAKAIT kisiyalamik kes kama kalukasurupokec."
2Chronicles20:28 Kopotu Yerusalem ejaas kisabulin ka adeudeun ka arupepen mama ejai etogo loka EJAKAIT.
2Chronicles20:29 Kojau etasuro loka Edeke atekerin kere nuka akwapin, kepuput kesi ebe asurok EJAKAIT lukasurupo luka Isirael."
2Chronicles20:30 Kiyamakin do ayaetait naka Yekosapat; naarai kisiyen Ekedeke ŋes kowaitin kere.
2Chronicles20:31 Kirum Yekosapat Yuda: kerai loka ikar akaisauni ka lukany egeuni airum; kirumak ikar akaisaarei ka lukany koYerusalem; ekiror loka totoke kerai Asuba akoku naka Siliki.
2Chronicles20:32 Kolosenenei korot loka Asa papake, mam abu kopaa, kiswamaenenei nuejok kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles20:33 Konye mam aponi kolemarai aiboisio nuiceleleete; kwabo eriŋa ber ituŋa ibwaikina itauonokec mama ejai Edeke loka lukapapaakec.
2Chronicles20:34 Aswamisio ace kere nuka Yekosapat, nusodit ka nukawasia, koany, iwadikatai kakiro nuka Yeku okoku loka Kenani, nuikopakinitai oitabo loka ikabakan luka Isirael."
2Chronicles20:35 Akaulo kanuŋ kimorikikinos Yekosapat ekabaka loka Yuda ka Akasia ekabaka loka Isirael; abu ŋol kiswama nueroko noi.
2Chronicles20:36 Kimorikikinos kaŋes aiswamaun ameerin nuelosenenete Tarusis; apotu kiswamaut ameerin koEsion-geber.
2Chronicles20:37 Kosodi Elieser okoku loka Dodabaku loka Maresa adwarakin Yekosapat ebe, “Naarai ibu kimorikikinos ka Akasia, emudiari EJAKAIT akoniswamisio.” Aponi kobilibilai ameerin, tape mam apedorete alosit Tarusis."
2Chronicles21:1 Kojotoor Yekosapat ka lukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai kalukapapaake ore loka Daudi: kirum Yekoram okokuke aiboisike."
2Chronicles21:2 Ajaas ŋes iinacan odwe luka Yekosapat, Asaria, ka Yekiel, ka Sekaria, ka Asaria, ka Mikael, ka Sepatia: ŋul kere odwe luka Yekosapat ekabaka loka Isirael."
2Chronicles21:3 Koinak kes papakec ainakineta nuepolok, epuesa ka esabu, ka iboro luka akais nuipu, ka ireria luebwaitai koYuda: konye koinak Yekoram ajakanut naarai ŋes ekiyaike,"
2Chronicles21:4 Nakedakakinor Yekoram ayait ajakanut naka papake, kogogoŋoor, koar iinacanake kere kekileŋ, ka ice kokapolok luka Isirael da."
2Chronicles21:5 Kerai Yekoram loka ikar akaisauni ka luarei egeuni airum; kirumak ikar ikanykauni ko Yerusalem,"
2Chronicles21:6 Kolosenenei korot loka ikabakan luka Isirael, kwape kalukokek loka Akab: naarai amanyit akoku naka Akab: kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT,"
2Chronicles21:7 Konye mam EJAKAIT akoto amudiar ekek loka Daudi, kanuka aitutuket naetutukit ka Daudi, kwape kisumunio da ainakin ŋes ka odweke atala ikar kere."
2Chronicles21:8 Kapaarasiake kipaliik Edom anyoun kakan naka Yuda, kodakakis ekabakakec kanukec."
2Chronicles21:9 Kosodi Yekoram atubor nepepe kikapolokoke, ka agalinike, kere kaŋes: konyou kuare, kodany Idomein lualukunito ŋes, ka ikapolok luka agalin."
2Chronicles21:10 Kwaŋin kipaliik Edom anyoun kakan naka Yuda, kiton lolo: kosodi Libuna da aipaliikin kapaarasia kaŋun kakanike: naarai abu kojal. EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaake."
2Chronicles21:11 Bobo da kiswamau aiboisio nuiceleleete koroŋan luka Yuda, kitopor luiboiete koYerusalem, kitapaa Yuda."
2Chronicles21:12 Kosodi kobu aiwadikaet mama ejai ŋesi nakebuni kama ka Eliya enabi ebe, “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Daudi papaakon ebe, Naarai mam jo ilosenenei korotin luka Yekosapat papakon, karaida korotin luka Asa ekabaka loka Yuda;"
2Chronicles21:13 konye ilosenenei korot loka ikabakan luka Isirael, kitopor Yuda ka luiboiete koYerusalem, kwape lukokek loka Akab; ido iar iinacanakon lukokek loka papakon, luejok aitelekarit jo:"
2Chronicles21:14 koany, edanyi EJAKAIT ikonituŋa, ka idwekon, ka aŋorokon, ka luijaatar kere katular naepol."
2Chronicles21:15 Idekakini ijo adeka naka akoik, aitodol naedoenenotor Lukakoikikon ŋinipaaran kanuka adek.”"
2Chronicles21:16 Kisidik EJAKAIT emoyo loka Ipilisitian ka Iarabun luidunyas ka Itiopian asurokin Yekoram.
2Chronicles21:17 Kopotu kesi asurokin Yuda, kobelaros kolomasi, koyanaasi iboro kere luadumunio kotogo loka ekabaka, ka odweke da, ka aŋoroke; mam aponi kideikinai ŋes ikoku, dimarai Yekoakas, eŋoorit kodweke."
2Chronicles21:18 Akaulo kaŋun kere kinom EJAKAIT ŋes akoikike kadek namam epedor aŋaleun.
2Chronicles21:19 Kosodi kanen ketuboros apaarasia, kedaut ikar iarei, kodooto lukakoikike kanuka adekake, kotwana kadeka naerono noi. Mam iketuŋa apotu kisupuruutu kanuke, kwape kisupuronokiniata lukapapaake."
2Chronicles21:20 Kerai ŋesi loka ikar akaisauni ka luarei egeuni airum, kirumak ikar ikanykauni koYerusalem: kolot komam yenimuit; aponi kidaikinai ore loka Daudi, konye mere toma atesina nuka ikabakan."
2Chronicles22:1 Kosodete luiboiete koYerusalem kitaraut Akasia enooritie ekabaka aiboisike: naarai abu erioŋet loka ituŋa luauparos ka Iarabun oidukurun koar lukapolok kere. Kirum do Akasia okoku loka Yekoram ekabaka loka Yuda.
2Chronicles22:2 Kerai Akasia loka ikar akaisaoŋon ka luarei egeuni airum; kirumak ekaru ediopet ko Yerusalem: ekiror loka totoke kerai Aralia akoku naka Omiri.
2Chronicles22:3 Kolosenenei Akasia da korotin luka ekek loka Akab: naarai totoke ŋes akenerunanike aswam nukaronis.
2Chronicles22:4 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape lukokek loka Akab: naarai araas kesi ikenerunakake akaulo katwanare naka papake, amudiar ŋes,"
2Chronicles22:5 Kotupa da ainerunikec, kouparos ka Yekoram okoku loka Akab ekabaka loka Isirael aitiji Kasael ekabaka loka Suria koRamot-gilead: kimusuŋata Isurian Yoram."
2Chronicles22:6 Kobono Yesereel aŋaleun amusuŋun nuemusuŋitai ŋes koRama, naajiotor ka Kasael ekabaka loka Suria. Kolot Asaria okoku loka Yekoram ekabaka loka Yuda aanyun Yekoram okoku loka Akab koYesereel, naarai adeka."
2Chronicles22:7 Abuni amudiario naka Akasia ka ma ejai Edeke naarai abu ŋesi kolot mama ejai Yoram: naarai kedolo, kolomasi nepepe ka Yekoram asurokin Yeku okoku loka Nimisi, loabu EJAKAIT koseu amudiar ekek loka Akab."
2Chronicles22:8 Kosodi kanen, naetodolikinio Yeku etube kokek loka Akab, kodum ikapolok luka Yuda, ka odwe luka iinacan luka Akasia ijaanakinete Akasia, koar kes."
2Chronicles22:9 Komo ŋesi Akasia, kikamut ŋes, (eŋopit do koSamaria,) koyaŋaut mama ejai Yeku, koarata ŋes; kidaata ŋes naarai abalas ebe, “Ŋes okoku loka Yekosapat, loamoot EJAKAIT keketau kere.” Amamei ekek loka Akasia apedor ayait ajakanut."
2Chronicles22:10 Keanyu Atalia toto naka Akasia ebe atwana okokuke, konyou, komudia aur kere naka ekabaka loka ekek loka Yuda."
2Chronicles22:11 Konye koyaŋa Yekosabeat, akoku naka ekabaka, Yoas okoku loka Akasia, kokokwa ŋes kodwe luka ekabaka luaario, kibwaik ŋes ka akasaanike agola naeŋadio iitadan. Kwaŋin abu Yekosabeatx akoku naka ekabaka Yekoram, aberu naka Yekoiada esasedoti, (naarai kerai ŋesi inaci naka Akasia,) kimunonikis ŋes Atalia, kinyek aiar."
2Chronicles22:12 Kojai kakes ibwaitai kotogo loka Edeke ikar ikanykape: kirum Atalia akwap.
2Chronicles23:1 Kokaru lokikanyetekaarei kogogoŋoor Yekoiada, koyaŋa ikapolok luka akwat, Asaria okoku loka Yekoram, ka Isimael okoku loka Yekokanan, ka Asaria okoku loka Obed, ka Maaseia okoku loka Adaia, ka Elisapat okoku loka Sikiri, kitutukoto kakes."
2Chronicles23:2 Kitoroto koYuda, kotukonokis Ilebin koreria kere luka Yuda, ka lukapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaa luka Isirael, kopotu Yerusalem."
2Chronicles23:3 Kitutukoto ekodet kere ka ekabaka togo loka Edeke. Kotema kes atiar, “Koany, irumi okoku loka ekabaka, kwape abalar EJAKAIT kodwe luka Daudi."
2Chronicles23:4 Na ŋes akirot naiswamaete: atutubetekus nakiwuniet, luelomunete kanakasabato, naka isasedotin ka Ilebin, iraunos ikagolok luka ikekia;"
2Chronicles23:5 Atutubet nakiwuniet ejaunun togo loka ekabaka; ka atutubet nakiwuniet orute loka apetetait: ejaunos da ituŋa kere alaroi nukotogo loka EJAKAIT.
2Chronicles23:6 Konye sirikisiikis ituŋanan alomun togo loka EJAKAIT dimarai isasedotin, ka lukoLebin luijaanakinete; ŋul kes elomunete, naarai eraas lukalaunak: konye ericete ituŋa kere aidar naka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles23:7 Elukunete Ilebin ekabaka, kitiŋite ŋolituŋanan lujiisike kakanike; yenelomuni togo kere, koarai: kojaenenas yesi kekabaka naelomununia ka naelomanaria da.”"
2Chronicles23:8 Kiswamata do Ilebin ka Yuda kere kwape ajaatar kere nuecorakini Yekoiada esasedoti; koyaŋa ŋolituŋanan iketuŋa, ŋul luelomunete kanakasabato, ka luelomarete da kanakasabato; naarai mam Yekoiada abu kotwara luabeito alosit."
2Chronicles23:9 Kijaik Yekoiada esasedoti ikapolok luka akwat akwaras ka iupalia ka ibukui lukeraas sek luka ekabaka Daudi, luajaas togo loka Edeke,"
2Chronicles23:10 Kisibwo ituŋa kere, kitiŋite ŋolituŋanan loiiisike kakanike, ameun kowai lokoteten loka etogo kiton owai lokokediany loka etogo, eiduny ketem ka etogo, elukunito ekabaka,"
2Chronicles23:11 Kosodete kesi aitolomun okoku loka ekabaka, kidokokis aboko akouke, koinakis ajteienunet, kitaraut ŋes ekabaka: kinyonyoata do ŋes Yekoiada ka odweke akinyet; kotemasi atiar, “Kidari Edeke ekabaka.”"
2Chronicles23:12 Kepupu Atalia ecelet loka ituŋa ekerete ituritos ekabaka, kobu mama ejaas ituŋa togo loka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles23:13 Kosesen, ido koany, ebwoi ekabaka eiduny kepirike neelomarere, ka ikapolok ka arupepen eiduny ka ekabaka; kibwoŋasi ituŋa kere luka akwap, kokuta arupepen; koramata da ikayook iboro lueruosi, kiŋarenikinito ayoore naka aiturit. Kosodi Atalia aicil ikenapen, kobala ebe, “Ebotet, ebotet lokibilakinito.”"
2Chronicles23:14 Koyau Yekoiada esasedoti ikapolok luka akwat luapolokinito ajore, kotema kes atiar, “Kitolomasi ya kidiŋ okokoron; ŋol da loetupari ŋes, koarata kekileŋ.” Naarai abala esasedoti ebe, “Sirikiarata nes kotogo loka EJAKAIT.”"
2Chronicles23:15 Kocilakis ŋes erot; kolot neelomarere orute loka ibalasin aibe togo loka ekabaka: koarakinai ŋina.
2Chronicles23:16 Kitutuk Yekoiada, nes elopet, ka ituŋa kere, ka ekabaka, ebe koraut ituŋa luka EJAKAIT,"
2Chronicles23:17 Koloto ituŋa kere togo loka Baal, kotiyatiyata, kobilibilata iketemwan ka akeputosia, koarakinai Matan esasedoti loka Baal kiŋaren kitemwan."
2Chronicles23:18 Kitetemik Yekoiada aswam naka etogo loka EJAKAIT kakan naka isasedotin Ilebin, luabu Daudi kokorak togo loka EJAKAIT, ainakin ainakineta nuicweio nuka EJAKAIT, kwape ewadikatere okisila luka Musa, keibwoŋ ka ayoore, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka Daudi,"
2Chronicles23:19 Kibwaik ikagolok orutei luka etogo loka EJAKAIT, kinyek yenimam elai alomar toma."
2Chronicles23:20 Koyaŋa ikapolok luka akwat, ka ijaka, ka ikayaitok luka ituŋa, ka ituŋa kere luka akwap, kitolomut ekabaka kotogo loka EJAKAIT: kolomasi orute lokokuju koloto togo loka ekabaka, kibwaikis ekabaka oicoloŋ loka ajakanut,"
2Chronicles23:21 Kibwoŋasi do ituŋa kere luka akwap, kiyamakin ere: koarata Atalia kekileŋ."
2Chronicles24:1 Kerai Yoas loka ikar ikanykaarei egeuni airum; kirumak ikar akaisaoŋon ko Yerusalem: ekiror loka totoke kerai Sibia naka Beer-seba,"
2Chronicles24:2 Kiswama Yoas nuejokuka kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT apaarasia kere nuka Yekoiada esasedoti.
2Chronicles24:3 Komanyak Yekoiada ŋes aŋor aarei; kouri idwe lusap ka lupesur.
2Chronicles24:4 Kosodi kanen akaulo kaŋun, kokoto Yoas aiteteun etogo loka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles24:5 Kotukonok ŋesi isasedotin ka Ilebin, kotema kes atiar, “Kolomasi oreria luka Yuda, kotukonokis apesan kama ka Isirael kere aiteteunia etogo loka Ekusideke ŋolikaru, koanyutu ebe isuburikinete yesi akirot.” Konye mam Ilebin apotu kisuburikis,"
2Chronicles24:6 Konyarau ekabaka Yekoiada ekapolon, kotema ŋes atiar, “Kanukinyo mam ca jo itepesenia Ilebin ayaŋaun koYuda ka Yerusalem esolo loka Musa ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT, ka loka ekodet loka Isirael kanuka ewema loka aitejenunet?”"
2Chronicles24:7 Naarai apotu odwe luka Atalia, aberu ya nakaronon, kobelaros togo loka Edeke; iboro da lutiakuna kere luka etogo loka EJAKAIT ainakis Ibaalim."
2Chronicles24:8 Kicorak do ekabaka, kiswamata asaduku, kibwaikis kiŋa orute loka etogo loka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles24:9 Kolimoroi anatar Yuda ka Yerusalem, ainun EJAKAIT esolo loabu Musa ekejaanakinan loka Edeke kicorak Isirael kamodiŋ."
2Chronicles24:10 Kiyalamas ikapolok kere, ka ituŋa kere, koyautu kocakakis asaduku, aitodol neadaunotor."
2Chronicles24:11 Kosodi keyaun asaduku mama ejaas ikapolok luka ekabaka kakan naka Ilebin, keanyutu ebe ejaas apesan nuipu, kobu ekewadikan loka ekabaka ka ekaroan loka esasedoti lopeti, kobuko asaduku, koyaŋaasi, kinyakakis aiboisike. Kiswamata kwaŋin ninipaaran kotukonokis apesan nuipu noi,"
2Chronicles24:12 Koinak ekabaka ka Yekoiada luiswamaete aswam naka aijaanakin togo loka EJAKAIT; kisiwoteoto ikadukok ka ikekeok aiteteun etogo loka EJAKAIT, ikatatak da asua ka aisinin aiteteunia etogo loka EJAKAIT,"
2Chronicles24:13 Kiswamata ikeswamak, kitodoloto aswam ejok, kosipokis etogo loka Edeke kaibusesuke, kitogogoŋoto ŋes,"
2Chronicles24:14 Kedautu kesi, koyaut apesan nuedeunos mama ejai ekabaka ka Yekoiada. Kiswamauniata iboro lukotogo loka EJAKAIT, iboro aijaanakinia, ka ainakinia, ka akaalei, ka iboro luka esabu ka luka epuesa, Koinanakis ainakineta nuicweio togo loka EJAKAIT tiritir apaarasia kere nuka Yekoiada,"
2Chronicles24:15 Konye komojoŋo Yekoiada, kipu apaarasiake noi, kotwana; korai loka ikar akwatat ka akaisauni naketwania."
2Chronicles24:16 Aponi kidaikinai ore loka Daudi neejaas ikabakan, naarai abu kiswama nuejok koIsirael, mama ejai Edeke da ka ekekek."
2Chronicles24:17 Akaulo katwanare naka Yekoiada kopotu ikapolok luka Yuda, kisudedoto mama ejai ekabaka, Kosodi ekabaka akiirar kes."
2Chronicles24:18 Kojalata etogo loka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakec, kijaanakis Aserim ka aputosia: kobunok anyunyura Yuda ka Yerusalem kanuka adiakaretekec kana."
2Chronicles24:19 Konye kijukanakini ŋesi kes inabin ainyakun bobo mama ejai EJAKAIT; kitejenikis kes; konye koŋeroto akiirar kes,"
2Chronicles24:20 Kodoik emoyo laka Edeke Sekaria okoku loka Yekoiada esasedoti: kobwo kokuju kituŋa, kotema kes atiar, “Inera Edeke kwanata ebe, Kanukinyo itapaariata yesi aicorakineta nuka EJAKAIT, kinyeis akeriakar? Naarai ijalata EJAKAIT, ŋes da kijali yes.”"
2Chronicles24:21 Kinerutu aluikin ŋes, kibiribiroto ŋes kamor kaicorakinet naka ekabaka alaro naka etogo loka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles24:22 Kwaŋin mam abu Yoas ekabaka kiitu asianut nakiswamakinit Yekoiada papa loka Sekaria, konye koar okokuke, Etwani kotema atiar, “Kosesen EJAKAIT, kitepesen.”"
2Chronicles24:23 Kosodi kanen, awasia naka ekaru, kobu ajore naka Isurian asurokin ŋes: kopotu Yuda ka Yerusalem, komudiasi ikapolok kere luka ituŋa kotuŋa, kijukasi luŋatunakec kere mama ejai ekabaka loka Damasiko,"
2Chronicles24:24 Naarai abu ajore naka Isurian kerioŋet loedit loka ituŋa; kijaik EJAKAIT ajore naepol noi akanikee, naarai apotu kojalata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakec. Kwaŋin kitodolik Yoas etube."
2Chronicles24:25 Kenyoutu kesi kamakeŋ, (naarai kinyeis ŋes edeka noi,) kinerutu ikekejaanakinak asurokin ŋes kanuka aokot nuka odwe luka Yekoiada esasedoti, koarakis ŋes oitadake, kotwana: aponi kidaikinai ore loka Daudi, konye mam aponi kidaikinai atesina nuka ikabakan."
2Chronicles24:26 Lu kes luenerunete asurokin ŋes; Sabad okoku loka Simeat Amonit, ka Yekosabad okoku loka Simirit Amoabit."
2Chronicles24:27 Nuka odweke, ka apolou naka aritai nukisibwokio, ka airueakin aiduk etogo loka Edeke, koany, iwadikatai kakiro nuka eitabo loka ikabakan. Kirum Amasia okokuke aiboisike."
2Chronicles25:1 Kerai Amasia laka ikar akaisaarei ka lukany egeuni airum; kirumak ikar akaisaarei ka Iukanykaoŋon koYerusalem: ekiror loka totoke kerai Yekoadan naka Yerusalem.
2Chronicles25:2 Kiswama nuejok kakonyen nuka Ejakait, konye mere keketau kere."
2Chronicles25:3 Kosodi kanen, nakiticasere akejakanut kamake, koar ikekejaanakinak luapotu koarata papake."
2Chronicles25:4 Konye mam abu koar ikecedwe, konye kiswama kwape ejaatar nuiwadikatai oitabo loka ikisila luka Musa, kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT ebe, Mam lukapapa etwakikinete idwekec, karaida idwe atwakikin lukapapakec; konye etwanikini ŋinituŋanan akeronis."
2Chronicles25:5 Bobo da kotukok Amasia Yuda, kitemonok kes kwape ajaatar ikekia luka lukapapakec, ikapolok luka ilukumin ka ikapolok luka akwat, Yuda kere ka Benyamin: kimara kes ageuni kaluka ikar akaisaarei ka adepar, kodum kes imwaasi ituŋa ilukumin akwat auni lueseunitai, luepedorete alosit ojie, luejenete aitwasam akwara ka ebuku,"
2Chronicles25:6 Kiboleoto ŋesi kituŋa ilukumin akwatat lukirigin luetitin koIsirael atalatan akwatat nuka epuesa,"
2Chronicles25:7 Konye kobu etuŋanan loka Edeke mama ejai, kotema atiar, “Wu ekabaka, kinyek ajore naka Isirael aupar kajo; naarai mam EJAKAIT ejai kaIsirael, kes idwe kere luka Epuraim."
2Chronicles25:8 Konye arai ilosi; kiswama katitiŋ, kogogoŋor kojie; kibirori Edeke jo kakonyen nuka lukasurupo; naarai ejai Edeke apedor aiŋarakin, ka aibiror.”"
2Chronicles25:9 Kotema Amasia etuŋanan loka Edeke atiar, “Konye kikwaikini do ai nuka atalatan akwatat nuainak ajore naka Isirael? “Koboŋok etuŋanan loka Edeke ebe, “Epedori Edeke ainakin jo nuitelekarito ŋun.”"
2Chronicles25:10 Kosodi Amasia agitar kes, ajore naabuni mamake koEpuraim, aboŋor ore: ŋes kinepunia anyunyurakec noi aluikin Yuda, kobonosi ore kanyunyura naepol."
2Chronicles25:11 Kotitiŋior Amasia, kiŋarenik iketuŋa, kolot Aditot naka Abalaŋ, kodany ilukumin itomon kodwe luka Seir."
2Chronicles25:12 Kijoreutu idwe luka Yuda ice ilukumin itomon ejarete, koyaut kes kuju moru, kocakasi kes kokuiu moru, kobilibiliunos,"
2Chronicles25:13 Konye ituŋa luka erioŋet loabu Amasia kinyaka, kinyeis aupar kaŋes ojie, kibirokinos ireria luka Yuda, anyoun koSamaria kiton Bet-koron, kodany ilukumin iuni kakesi, koyaŋaasi luŋatuna luipu."
2Chronicles25:14 Kosodi kanen, kedau Amasia aboŋun kaiar Idomein, koyau idekesio luka idwe luka Seir, kosipok kes araun idekesioke, kokukonokin kes, kisupuruikin kes lueur maa."
2Chronicles25:15 Ŋes kinepunia anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin Amasia, kijukak ŋes enabi, loatemari ŋes atiar, “Kanukinyo imoiaa ijo idekesio luka ituŋa, lumam apotu kitajarata ikecetuŋa kakanikon?”"
2Chronicles25:16 Kosodi kanen, kineras kaŋes, kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Kidakakinit kereka isio jo araun lokaurianet naka ekabaka? Kinyek; kanukinyo tikiinomere? “Kosodi enabi ainyein, kotema atiar, “Ajeni ebe elosikinit Edeke amudiar jo, naarai iswama ŋun, komam iirari akainerun.”"
2Chronicles25:17 Kosodi Amasia ekabaka loka Yuda ainerun, kijuka da mama ejai Yoas okoku loka Yekoakas okoku loka Yeku, ekabaka loka Isirael ebe, “Bia, kaanyunos kakonye.”"
2Chronicles25:18 Kijuka Yoas ekabaka loka Isirael mama ejai Amasia ekabaka loka Yuda, kobala ebe, “Abu ekenep loajai Lebanon kijukak eres loajai Lebanon, ebe, Kokorak akokukon okokuka komany: kitoro etiaŋ loka ais loajai Lebanon, kicakacak ekenep."
2Chronicles25:19 Ibala ijo ebe, ‘Koany, adany Edom’; iturokina etaukon ailabilab: kopaik ore; kanukinyo ilomaria ijo akiro numere nukon ka atwaniar, kibirori ijo, ka Yuda da kajo?”"
2Chronicles25:20 Konye koŋer Amasia akiirar; naarai kerai akirot naka Edeke, tetere ijaikini kes akan naka lukasurupokec, naarai amoata idekesio luka Edom."
2Chronicles25:21 Kolot do Yoas ekabaka loka Isirael; koanyunos kakonye, ŋesi ka Amasia ekabaka loka Yuda koBet-Semes, loarai loka Yuda."
2Chronicles25:22 Kireŋeai Yuda kakonyen nuka Isirael; koker, ninitunanan owemake."
2Chronicles25:23 Kikam Yoas ekabaka loka Isirael Amasia ekabaka loka Yuda, okoku loka Yoas, okoku loka Yekoakas, kolset-semes, koyau ŋes Yerusalem, kotiyatiya arwatat naka Yerusalem anyoun korute loka Epuraim kiton orute loka agor, ikubitin akwat aoŋon."
2Chronicles25:24 Koŋata esabu ka epuesa kere, ka iboro kere luadumunio koObededom togo loka Edeke, ka iboro luka akais nuipu Iukotogo loka ekabaka, ka lukititiŋa da, koboŋo Samaria."
2Chronicles25:25 Kobut Amasia okoku loka Yoas ekabaka loka Yuda ikar itomon ka lukany akaulo katwanare naka Yoas okoku loka Yekoakas ekabaka loka Isirael.
2Chronicles25:26 Aswamisio ace nuka Amasia, nusodit ka nukawasia, koany, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka ikabakan luka Yuda ka Isirael?"
2Chronicles25:27 Agear kapaarasia nuebelokinor Amasia anyoun katupit EJAKAIT, kinerut asurokin ŋes koYerusalem; koker Lakis; konye kijukasi atupakin ŋes Lakis, koarakinai ŋina,"
2Chronicles25:28 Koyaunai ŋes kobalasin, kidaikis nepepe kalukapapaake ore loka Yuda."
2Chronicles26:1 Koyaata ituŋa kere luka Yuda Usia, lokerai loka ikar itomon ka lukanykape, kitaraut ŋes ekabaka aibois naka papake Amasia."
2Chronicles26:2 Koduk ŋesi Elot, kinyakak Yuda, kedau ekabaka ajotoor kalukapapaake."
2Chronicles26:3 Kerai Usia loka ikar itomon ka lukanykape egeuni airum: kirumak ikar akaisakany ka luarei ko Yerusalem: ekiror loka totoke kerai Yekilia naka Yerusalem.
2Chronicles26:4 Kiswama nuejok kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape kejaatar kere nueswamai papake Amasia."
2Chronicles26:5 Kibwaik etau amoot Edeke kapaarasia nuka Sekaria, lokituutoori aiyoŋ Edeke: kapaarasia nuamootor EJAKAIT kitekerian Edeke ŋes."
2Chronicles26:6 Koloma ŋesi, kitiji Ipilisitian, kotiyatiya arwatat naka Gat, ka arwatat naka Yabane, ka arwatat naka Asudod; koduk ireria kakwap naka Asudod, kaneejaas Ipilisitian da."
2Chronicles26:7 Kiŋarak Edeke ŋes asurokin Ipilisitian, ka Iarabun lukiboiete koGur-baal, ka Imeunim."
2Chronicles26:8 Koinakis Imonain ainakineta mama ejai Usia; kisiarakina ekekiror kiton neelomarere Misiri; naarai kogogoŋoor noi.
2Chronicles26:9 Ido koduk Usia itogoi lueojak Yerusalem, korute loka agor, korute da loka aditot, ka neekudokinia arwatat da, kitogogoŋ kes,"
2Chronicles26:10 Koduk itogoi lueojak kamodiŋ, kobok ataparin nuipu, naarai ajaas ŋes kibaren nuipu ajesa kapuutona da; ajaas ikakoriok ka ikacapak emusabibu koroŋan komanikoria lupusuk da; naarai komina ŋesi noi akoru."
2Chronicles26:11 Ido ajai Usia ajore naka ikajiok lualomanarete ojie korioŋeta, kwape ajaar etiai loka aimarakec loemari Yeiel ekewadikan ka Maaseia ekapolokiton, kakan naka Kanania, ediopet kokapolok luka ekabaka."
2Chronicles26:12 Etiai kere loka ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakec, ituŋa lukirigin luetitiŋ emwaasi ilukumin iarei ka akwat akanykape."
2Chronicles26:13 Kakanikec ajai ajore naetuutooro ilukumin akwat auni ka lukanykaarei ka akwat akany, luajiononos kagogoŋ naepol, aiŋarakin ekabaka asurokin lukasurup."
2Chronicles26:14 Kitemok Usia ibukui, ka akwaras, ka ikopiran, ka ikootin lukasua, ka akabwai, ka alica nuporoca kanukec, ŋes ajore kere."
2Chronicles26:15 Kiswamau koYerusalem acuman, nuapwakunete ituŋa luepiriaka, ajaut kotogoi Iueojak karwatatin nuitogogoŋio, agumia imalia ka amor nuepolok. Kisiarakin ekekiror kama ejwana; naarai kiŋarakinitai noi noi, aitodol nakegogonoror,"
2Chronicles26:16 Konye nakegogoŋoror kodakun eketau, tape eswamai nueroko, kibuca kama ejai EJAKAIT Ekedeke; naarai koloma oyekalu loka EJAKAIT aisupuruun lukisupurununo kotem lokisupuruunet."
2Chronicles26:17 Koloma Asaria esasedoti atupakin ŋes, ka isasedotin luka EJAKAIT akaisakanykauni nepepe kaŋes, luaraas ituŋa luetitiŋ:"
2Chronicles26:18 kirebokinete Usia ekabaka, kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Mam eraas nukon, Usia, aisupuruun lukisupurununo mama ejai EJAKAIT, konye eraas nuka isasedotin odwe luka Aaron, luatiakunio aisupuruun lukisupurununo: koloma kaibois nakalaunan: naarai ibuca; kwabo mam ibusiar kama ejai EJAKAIT Edeke.”"
2Chronicles26:19 Kosodi Usia anyunyurikin; kitiŋite aisupurunet akanike aisupuruun lukisupurununo; napenyunyurikini isasedotin, kolomuni atapon koreeteke kakonyen nuka isasedotin kotogo loka EJAKAIT, eiduny ketem lokisupuruunet."
2Chronicles26:20 Koŋolia ŋes Asaria esasedoti lopeti, ka isasedotin kere, ido koany, ejai atapon oreeteke, kisunyas aremor ŋes kiŋa; eebo, kisunya ŋesi da elopet alomar, naarai enomit EJAKAIT ŋes."
2Chronicles26:21 Korai Usia ekabaka lokatapon kiton apaaran naka atwanareke, kiboienenei kotogo loegelara, naarai kerai lokatapon; naarai agelario kotogo loka EJAKAIT; koyaite do Yotam okokuke etogo loka ekabaka, etubonokini ituŋa luka akwap."
2Chronicles26:22 Aswamisio ace nuka Usia, nusodit ka nukawasia, abu Isaia enabi, okoku loka Amos, kiwadika."
2Chronicles26:23 Kojotoor do Usia kalukapapaake; aponi kidaikinai kalukapapaake omanikor lokidaanakina lokerai loka ikabakan; naarai abalasi ebe, “Erai lokatapon.” Kirum Yotam okokuke aiboisike."
2Chronicles27:1 Kerai Yotam loka ikar akaisaarei ka lukany egeuni airum; kirumak ikar itomon ka lukanykape koYerusalem: ekiror loka totoke kerai Yerusa akoku naka Sadok.
2Chronicles27:2 Kiswama nuejok kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape ajaatar kere nueswamai Usia papake: konye mam ŋes alomanari oyekalu loka EJAKAIT. Kiyatakinito ituŋa aiswamaenen nueroko."
2Chronicles27:3 Koduk ŋesi erute lokokuiu loka etogo loka EJAKAIT, koduk da luipu karwatat naka Opel."
2Chronicles27:4 Ido koduk ireria kakwap nakiukon naka Yuda, kotoma amonyieik da koduk itogoi luegogoŋ ka itogoi lueojak."
2Chronicles27:5 Kitiji da ekabaka loka idwe luka Amon, kipiko kes. Kokaru kaŋol koinakis idwe luka Amon ŋes atalatan akwatat nuka epuesa, ka aitemisio alukumin atomon nuka akima, ka alukumin atomon nuka esairi. Kotacakis idwe luka Amon ŋes etiai ŋol kokaru lokiareit, ido kokaru lokiwuniet da."
2Chronicles27:6 Kogogoŋoor do Yotam, naarai kitemonok ikeponesio kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekedeke."
2Chronicles27:7 Aswamisio ace nuka Yoram, ka ijiisioke kere, ka ikeponesio, koany, iwadikatai oitabo loka ikabakan luka Isirael ka Yuda."
2Chronicles27:8 Kerai ŋesi loka ikar akaisaarei ka lukany egeuni airum, kirumak ikar itomon ka lukanykape ko Yerusalem."
2Chronicles27:9 Kojotoor Yoram ka lukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai ore loka Daudi: kirum Akas okokuke aiboisike."
2Chronicles28:1 Kerai Akas loka ikar akaisaarei egeuni airum; kirumak ikar itomon ka lukanykape koYerusalem: mam abu kiswama nuejokuka kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape Daudi papaake:"
2Chronicles28:2 konye kolosenenei korotin luka ikabakan luka Isirael, kiswamau da aputosia nuecalara kanuka Ibaalim."
2Chronicles28:3 Ido kisupuruun lukisupurununo aditot naka okoku loka Kinom, kicwe lkedwe kakim, kwape ajaatar italesia luka ikapirin, luabu EJAKAIT kireŋe kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael."
2Chronicles28:4 Koinak asuban kisupuruun da lukisupurununo kaiboisio nuiceleleete, koukon da, ido kokwap ka ŋolikiro! loepesit."
2Chronicles28:5 Kanuka nun kijaik EJAKAIT Ekedeke ŋes akan naka ekabaka loka Suria; kodanyata nes, koyaŋaasi ekodet loepol loka luejoreoro, koyaŋaasi kes Damasiko. Kijaikinai da akan naka ekabaka loka Isirael, loabu kodany ŋes kearit loepol."
2Chronicles28:6 Naarai koar Peka okoku loka Remalia koYuda ilukumin akwatat ka ilukumin akaisaarei kapaaran adiopet, kes kere ituŋa luetitiŋ; naarai apotu kojalata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakec."
2Chronicles28:7 Abu Sikiri, etuŋanan lokirigi loka Epuraim, koar Maaseia okoku loka ekabaka, ka Asirikam ekayaiton etogo, ka Elukana loiareikinit eka baka."
2Chronicles28:8 Kijoreosi idwe luka Isirael koinacanakec ilukumin akwat aarei, aŋor, ka idwe lusap ka lupesur, koyaŋaasi da lunatuŋa luipu, koyanaut luŋatuna Samaria."
2Chronicles28:9 Konye kojai ŋina enabi loka EJAKAIT, ekekiror Oded; kolom ŋesi airiamakin kajore naebunit Samaria, kotema kes atiar, “Koany, naarai anyunyurik EJAKAIT Edeke loka lukapapaakus Yuda, ejaik kes akanikus, iarata kes kanyunyura naedolit akuj."
2Chronicles28:10 Kwana da ipeleikinito aitonokok idwe luka Yuda ka Yerusalem araut ibulesin ka abulesinikus: mam kereka kotomakus da nuigwaunito kama ejai EJAKAIT Ekusideke?
2Chronicles28:11 Aso do kopupunoi, kinyakasi luijoreunito, luijoreutu yesi koinacanakus: naarai ejai anyunyura naededeŋ naka EJAKAIT mamakus.”"
2Chronicles28:12 Kosodete ice kokapolok lukodwe luka Epuraim, Asaria okoku loka Yokanan, ka Berekia okoku loka Mesilemet, ka Yekisikia okoku loka Salum, ka Amasa okoku loka Kadalai, konyoikis ŋul luapote kojie."
2Chronicles28:13 Kotemasi kes atiar, “Mam yes itolomunete ne luiioreunito: naarai ipeleikis nukitwagaunete oni kama ejai EJAKAIT, aiyatakin aronisiowok ka agwauniwok: naarai epol agwauniwok, ejai da anyunyura naededeŋ aluikin Isirael.”"
2Chronicles28:14 Kinyekis do ituŋa luakapakina lujiis luejoreunito ka luŋatuna kakonyen nuka ikapolok ka ekodet kere,"
2Chronicles28:15 Konyoutu ituŋa luelimoritai ikecekiroria, koyaŋaasi lueioreunito, kitwasamata lunatuna aitanapia luimujalalas, koinakis kes inapen ka amuk, kitanyamata kitamata kes, kinyonyoikis kes, kisibwanenoto lukalanyakakec kere asigirian, kinyamakis kes Yeriko, ere loka idukudukun mama ejaas iinacanakec: kosodete konyet aboŋor Samaria."
2Chronicles28:16 Kapaarasia kanuŋ kijuka ekabaka Akas mama ejaas ikabakan luka Asuria aiŋarakin ŋes.
2Chronicles28:17 Naarai apotu bobo Idomein kopotu aidany Yuda, koyaŋaasi Iukijoreoro."
2Chronicles28:18 Koŋataritos da Ipilisitian ireria luka apuutona, ka Eŋalakimak naka Yuda, kirumata Bet-semes, ka Aiyalon, ka Gederot, ka Soko ka ireriake, ka Timuna ka ireriake, Gimiso da ka ireriake: kiboikinos nen."
2Chronicles28:19 Naarai kitisil EJAKAIT Yuda kanuka Akas ekabaka loka Isirael; naarai kikonak komam aitikokin koYuda, kogwau noi akiro kama ejai EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles28:20 Kobu Tiligat-pilineser ekabaka loka Asuria mama ejai, kitican ŋes, konye mam abu kitogogoŋ."
2Chronicles28:21 Naarai kolema Akas atutubet kotogo loka EJAKAIT, kotogo da loka ekabaka ka loka ikapolok, koinak ekabaka loka Asuria; konye mam ŋun kiŋarakinito ŋes."
2Chronicles28:22 Kapaarasia nuka ieanike kiyatak adiakar kama ejai EJAKAIT, ŋes ŋol ekabaka Akas."
2Chronicles28:23 Naarai abu koinak asuban mama ejaas idekesio luka Damasiko, luadanyete ŋes; kobala ebe, “Naarai idekesio luka ikabakan luka Suria kiŋarakinete kes, nes ainakinia eoŋ asuban mama ejaas, tetere keŋarakinete eoŋ, “Konye koraunos amudiarike, ka naka Isirael kere."
2Chronicles28:24 Kotukonok Akas iboro kere luka etogo loka Edeke, kojepejep iboro lukotogo loka Edeke, kogolok ikekia lukotogo loka EJAKAIT; kiswamau itemwan agoria kere nukoYerusalem."
2Chronicles28:25 Kiswamak aiboisio nuiceleleete oreria kere luka Yuda, aisupuruunia lukisupurununo mama ejaas idekesio ice, kitunyunyurik EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaake."
2Chronicles28:26 Aswamisioke ace, ka iponesioke kere, nusodit ka nukawasia, koany, iwadikatai oitabo loka ikabakan luka Yuda ka Isirael."
2Chronicles28:27 Kojotoor Akas ka lukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai ore, ŋes Yerusalem; naarai mam aponi koyaŋaarai atesina nuka ikabakan luka Isirael: kirum Kesekia okokuke aiboisike."
2Chronicles29:1 Kogeu Kesekia airum korai loka ikar akaisaarei ka lukany: kirumak ikar akaisaarei ka lukanykaoŋon koYerusalem: ekiror loka totoke kerai Abiya akoku naka Sekaria.
2Chronicles29:2 Kiswama nuejok kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape ajaatar kere nueswamai Daudi papaake."
2Chronicles29:3 Okaru losodit loka airumuke, olap losodit, koŋaa ŋesi ikekia luka etogo loka EJAKAIT, kiteteu kes."
2Chronicles29:4 Kitolom isasedotin ka Ilebin, kotukok kes aibois naelal ari nakokide,"
2Chronicles29:5 kotema kes atiar, “Kopupunoi eoŋ, yes Ilebin; kitalaunos, kitalautu da etogo loka EJAKAIT Edeke loka lukapapaakus, kodakasi amodokok kiŋa kaibois nakalaunan."
2Chronicles29:6 Naarai apaasi lukapapaawok, eswamata nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, ajalata ŋes, ebelokis da akecekonyen kaibois naka EJAKAIT, eboŋokis ipuranakec,"
2Chronicles29:7 Agolokis da kekia kaneelomarere, etudeŋiosi atalai, mam apotu kisupuruut lukisupurununo karaida ainakin ainakineta nuicweio kaibois nakalaunan mama ejai Edeke loka Isirael."
2Chronicles29:8 Kanuka ŋun abunok anyunyura naka EJAKAIT Yuda ka Yerusalem, ejaiki kes araun etasuro, araun aumokinet, ka aijuar, kwape ianyuniata yesi kakonyenekus."
2Chronicles29:9 Naarai koany, apotu lukapapaawok kibiroros kekileŋ, ijoreoritai idwewok lusap ka lupesur, ka anorowok kanuka ŋun."
2Chronicles29:10 Ejai teni otauka aitutuk ka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, tetere ibelokini akenyunyura naededeŋ anyoun kamawok."
2Chronicles29:11 Ikadwe, sirikipalasi kwana: naarai kiseu EJAKAIT yes abwoenen kakonyeneke, aijaanakin ŋes, koraut ikekejaanakinak, kisupuruut lukisupurununo.”"
2Chronicles29:12 Kosodete Ilebin anyoun, Makat okoku loka Amasai, ka Yoel okoku loka Asaria, kodwe luka Ikokatin: kodwe luka Merari, Kis okoku loka Abidi, ka Asaria okoku loka Sima, ka Eden okoku loka Yoa:"
2Chronicles29:13 Kodwe luka Elisapan, Simiri ka Yeuel: kodwe luka Asap, Sekaria ka Matania:"
2Chronicles29:14 kodwe luka Keman, Yekuel ka Simei: kodwe luka Yedutun, Semaia ka Usiel."
2Chronicles29:15 Kotukonokis iinacanakec, kitalaunos, kolomasi, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka ekabaka kakiro nuka EJAKAIT, aiteseg etogo loka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles29:16 Kolomasi isasedotin atutubet nakotoma nakotogo loka EJAKAIT, aiteseg ŋes, kitolomut amodokok kere nakedumunete koyekalu loka EJAKAIT alaro naka etogo loka EJAKAIT. Koyanaasi Ilebin kodakasi kiŋa kiton aguurut Kidiron."
2Chronicles29:17 Kogeut kapaaran nasodit naka elap losodit aitalaun, ido kapaaran nakikanyetekauni naka elap kodolot neelomarere naka EJAKAIT; kitalaut etogo loka EJAKAIT kodaut apaarasia akanykauni: kapaaran nakitomonet kakanykape naka elap losodit, kodaut do."
2Chronicles29:18 Kosodete alomar mama ejai Kesekia ekabaka togoke, kotemasi atiar, “Kidau aitesegaar etogo kere loka EJAKAIT, ka etem loka ainakineta nuicweio, ka iboroke kere, ka emesa loka imugatin luka aitodikin, ka iboroke kere."
2Chronicles29:19 Ido iboro kere luabu ekabaka Akas kocaka kairumuke naadiakaria ŋesi, kipou ketemokis kes ka aitalaun; ido koany ejaas kiŋaren ketem loka EJAKAIT.”"
2Chronicles29:20 Kosodi Kesekia ekabaka anyoun tupuruc, kotukok ikapolok luka ere, kolot togo loka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles29:21 Koyaut imoŋin lutoba ikanykaarei, ka imerekekin ikanykaarei, ka imerekekin ludidik ikanykaarei, ka ikorwa ikanykaarei araun ainakinet naka aronis kanuka ajakanut, ido kanuka aibois nakalaunan ka Yuda da. Kicorak ŋesi isasedotin odwe luka Aaron ainakin kes otem loka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles29:22 Koarata imoŋin lutoba, kijaut isasedotin aokot, kobwatanakis kotem: koarata da imerekekin ludidik, kobwatanakis aokot kotem,"
2Chronicles29:23 Kisukunyikis ikorwa araun ainakinet naka aronis kakonyen nuka ekabaka ka ekodet; kidokokis kes akaninikec;
2Chronicles29:24 koarata isasedotin kes, kiswamaut ainakinet naka aronis kaokotokec kotem: aitulucio Isirael kere; naarai kicorak ekabaka ainakin ainakinet naicweio ka ainakinet naka aronis kanuka Isirael kere."
2Chronicles29:25 Kibwaik Ilebin togo loka EJAKAIT ejaas kaisinin nueruosi ka isabulin, ka adeudeun, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka Daudi, ka Gad ekadwaran loka ekabaka, ka Natan enabi: naarai kerai aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT konabinoke."
2Chronicles29:26 Kobwaata Ilebin ejaas kiboro lueruosi luka Daudi, ka isasedotin da karupepen,"
2Chronicles29:27 Kicorak Kesekia ainakin ainakinet naicweio kotem. Napegeun ainakin naicweio, kogeuni da ekosio loka EJAKAIT, ka arupepen, nepepe kiboro lueruosi luka Daudi ekabaka loka Isirael."
2Chronicles29:28 Komaata lukokodet kere, koyooto ikayook, kokutata ikakutak arupepen; kikote nen aitodol neadaunor ainakinet naicweio."
2Chronicles29:29 Kedautu ainakin, kokukum ekabaka ka ŋul kere luajaas kaŋes, komaata,"
2Chronicles29:30 Ido apotu Kesekia ekabaka ka ikapolok kicorakis Ilebin ayoore aiturit EJAKAIT kakiro nuka Daudi, ka nuka Asap ekadwaran, Koyooto aiturit kaiyalama, kituluroto akwesikec, komaata."
2Chronicles29:31 Kosodi Kesekia aboŋokin ebe, “Kwana italaunos do bonik kama ejai EJAKAIT, kikunyutu koyautu asuban ka ainakineta nuka aimal togo loka EJAKAIT,” Koyau ekodet asuban ka ainakineta nuka aimal; ŋul da luakotosi ikecetauon koyaut ainakineta nuicweio."
2Chronicles29:32 Etiai loka ainakineta nuicwcio, nuayauni ekodet, emwaasi imoŋin lutoba akaisakanykaarei, imerekekin akwatat, ka imerekekin ludidik akwat aarei: ŋul kere keraas ainakineta nuicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT,"
2Chronicles29:33 Iboro luketiakunitai emwaasi imoŋin akwat akanykape ka amerekekin alukumin auni.
2Chronicles29:34 Konye ekidioko isasedotin, mam apedorete aijen ainakineta nuicweio kere: kanuka ŋun kiŋarakis iinacanakec Ilebin kes aitodol neadaunor aswam, aitodol da neetalaunotor isasedotin bonik: naarai etenara Ilebin itauon aitalauna bonik aitelekarit isasedotin."
2Chronicles29:35 Epu noi da ainakineta nuieweio, ka asiepai nuka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, ka ainakineta numatan nuka ŋiniinakinet naicweio Kitemokinoi kwaŋin aijaanakin naka etogo loka EJAKAJT."
2Chronicles29:36 Kiyalamikin Kesekia, ka ituŋa kere, kanuka ŋun nuetemokinit Edeke ituŋa: naarai kiswamaun akirot atipet."
2Chronicles30:1 Kijuka Kesekia mama ejai Isirael kere ka Yuda, kiwadik ibaluan da mama ejai Epuraim ka Manase, tetere epote togo loka EJAKAIT Yerusalem, aidar Aleleŋio mama ejai EJAKAIT Edeke loka Isirael."
2Chronicles30:2 Naarai kinerut ekabaka ka ikapolokoke, ka ekodet kere koYerusalem, aidar Aleleŋio kolap lokiareit."
2Chronicles30:3 Naarai mam apedorete aidar kapak kaŋin, naarai mam isasedotin apotu kitalauna bonik kotiai loedauni, karaida ituŋa atukokin Yerusalem,"
2Chronicles30:4 Kitojokai akirot kakonyen nuka ekabaka ka ekodet kere.
2Chronicles30:5 Kibwaikis ekisil alimor anatar Isirael kere, anyoun koBeer-seba kiton Dan, aponare aidar Aleleŋio mama ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, Yerusalem: naarai luipu mam apotu kidarata ŋes kwape kiwadikatere."
2Chronicles30:6 Koloto ikakerak kibaluan anyoun kokabaka ka ikapolokoke anatar Isirael kere ka Yuda, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka ekabaka ebe, “Yes idwe luka Isirael, kibelokinos bobo mama ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Aburaam, ka Isaak ka Isirael, tetere eboŋuni mama ejai aatoŋot naaku kayesi kakan naka ikabakan luka Asuria,"
2Chronicles30:7 Sirikiputokinos kalukapapaakus, ka ikusiinacan, luapaas kama ka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakec, tetere einakini kes aitisilario, kwape ianyuniata,"
2Chronicles30:8 Siriraas lueninik imurisiŋa, kwape lukapapaakus; konye koluŋakinos mama ejai EJAKAIT, kolomasi aiboisike nakalaunan, naetalaunit ikar kere, kijaanakis EJAKAIT Ekusideke, tetere ibelokin akenyunyura naededeŋ kamakus."
2Chronicles30:9 Naarai arai ibelokinos bobo mama ejai EJAKAIT, itimio ikusiinacan ka ikusidwe kakonyen nuka ŋul kaluejoreorete kes, eboŋunete bobo akwap na: naarai esiana EJAKAIT Ekusideke, lokaitim da, mam ibelokini akekonyen kamakus arai iboŋunete mamake.”"
2Chronicles30:10 Kitoroto ikakerak ireria kere anatar akwap naka Epuraim ka Manase, kiton Sebulun: konye kokienatar kes, kisekeloto kes."
2Chronicles30:11 Konye kitasonikinos ice luko Aser ka Manase ka Sebulun, kopotu Yerusalem."
2Chronicles30:12 Kojai da akan naka Edeke koYuda ainakin kes etau ediopet, aswam aicorakinet naka ekabaka ka ikapolok kakirot naka EJAKAIT,"
2Chronicles30:13 Kotukonokina ituŋa luipu koYerusalem aidar epucit loka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi kolap lokiareit, ekodet loapol noi."
2Chronicles30:14 Konyout kolemasi itemwan luajaas Yerusalem, kolemasi da itemwan lukisupuruunet, kocakakis aguurut Kidiron."
2Chronicles30:15 Kosodete aiar lukaleleŋio kapaaran nakitomonet kaoŋon kolap lokiareit: kirumata isasedotin ka Ilebin ileic, kitalaunos bonik, koyaut ainakineta nuicweio togo loka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles30:16 Kobwaata kaiboisiokec kwape kibusakinitotor, kwape ajaar ekisil loka Musa etuŋanan loka Edeke: kobwatanakis isasedotin aokot, nuejaikinete kes Ilebin."
2Chronicles30:17 Naarai ajaas luipu kokodet lumam etalauna bonik: kanuka ŋun koraun do aswam naka Ilebin aaranakin ŋinituŋanan yenimam elai aleleŋio, aitalaun kes mama ejai EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles30:18 Naarai epu ituŋa, ido luepu kakesi luka Epuraim ka Manase, Isakar ka Sebulun, mam apotu kitalauna bonik, konye konyamata lukaleleŋio kopone lomam ewadikatere. Naarai abu Kesekia kilipak kes ebe, “Kisioni EJAKAIT lokajokan ŋinituŋanan"
2Chronicles30:19 yenibwaikini eketau amoot Edeke, EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaake, karaida mam italaunitai kwape ejaar aitesegario naka aibois nakalaunan.”"
2Chronicles30:20 Kiira EJAKAIT Kesekia, kitanaleu ituŋa,"
2Chronicles30:21 Kidarata idwe luka Isirael luajaas Yerusalem epucit loka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi adaun apaarasia akanykaarei kaiyalama naepol: kituritos Ilebin ka isasedotin EJAKAIT ŋinipaaran, koyeikis EJAKAIT kiboro lueruosi noi."
2Chronicles30:22 Kiner Kesekia nukaitalakaar Ilebin kere luepiriaka noi aijaanakin EJAKAIT, Konyamakis do epucit kere adaun apaarasia akanykaarei, koinanakinete asuban nuka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, kolimonorete EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakec."
2Chronicles30:23 Kineru ekodet kere aidar acepaarasia akanykaarei: kidarata apaarasia ace akanykaarei kaiyalama,"
2Chronicles30:24 Naarai abu Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda koinak ekodet imoŋin lutoba elukumit ka amerekekin alukumin akanykaarei araut ainakineta; apotu da ikapolok koinakis ekodet imoŋin lutoba elukumit ka amerekekin alukumin atomon: kitalaunos isasedotin luipu noi bonik.
2Chronicles30:25 Kiyalama ekodet kere loka Yuda, ka isasedotin ka Ilebin, ka ekodet kere loabuni koIsirael, ka imo luapote kakwap naka Isirael, ka lueboiete koYuda."
2Chronicles30:26 Kojai do aiyalama naepol Yerusalem: naarai ageun kapaarasia nuka Solomon okoku loka Daudi ekabaka loka Isirael amamei naaputotor koYerusalem,"
2Chronicles30:27 Kosodete isasedotin Ilebin anyoun, kilipakis ituŋa arereŋ, Kiirarai ekeceporoto, kodol ailipikec aiboisike nakalaunan, ŋes akuj."
2Chronicles31:1 Kedaunos ŋun kere, koloto luka Isirael kere luajaas nen oreria luka Yuda, kobilibilata ipirin, kojepejepata Aserim, kobilibilata aiboisio nuiceleleete ka itemwan ko Yuda kere ka Benyamin, koEpuraim da ka Manase, aitodol neamudiariata kes kere. Kosodete idwe kere luka Isirael aboŋun, ŋinituŋanan airumeteke oreriakec."
2Chronicles31:2 Kitetemik Kesekia abeanakin naka isasedotin ka Ilebin kwape ajaatar abeanakinetakec, ŋolituŋanan kwape ejaar aijaanakinike, isasedotin ka Ilebin kere, luka ainakineta nuicweio ka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, aijaanakin, ka aimal, ka aiturit korutei luka eidukuru loka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles31:3 Kitetemik da ewai loka iboro Iuejaatar ekabaka araun ainakineta nuicweio, kes nu, nuka ainakineta nuicweio nuka tupuruc ka eboŋ, ainakineta nuicweio da nuka asabaton, ka napilamununei elap, ka nuka ipucin lueseunitai, kwape iwadikatere okisila luka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles31:4 Kicorak da ituŋa lueboiete koYerusalem ainanakin ewai loka isasedotin ka Hebin, tetere einanakinete bonik kokisila luka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles31:5 Atipet nakitisiarikinor aicorakinet, koinanakis idwe luka Isirael kaipues lugeet luka akima, ka ebino, ka akinyet, ka esik, ka luka amio kere nakomanikor: koyaununut yenikitomonet yenika iboro kere kaipues."
2Chronicles31:6 Idwe luka Isirael ka Yuda, lukiboiete koreria luka Yuda, koyaut da yenikitomonet yenika imoŋin ka amerekekin, ka yenikitomonet yenika iboro luetiakunitai mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, kibwaikis atukon."
2Chronicles31:7 Kolap lokiwuniet kogeut aituk atukon, kodaut kes kolap lokikanyetekaarei."
2Chronicles31:8 Kebu Kesekia ka ikapolok koanyut atukon, kiturito EJAKAIT ka iketuŋa Isirael."
2Chronicles31:9 Kosodi Kesekia aiŋitunun isasedotin ka Ilebin nuka atukon,"
2Chronicles31:10 Koboŋok Asaria esasedoti Iopeti lokokek loka Sadok, kotema ŋes atiar, “Ageun ituŋa ayaun ainakineta togo loka EJAKAIT, kinyami isio lukidaunete, kideuni da luipu: naarai kisirereŋ EJAKAIT iketuŋa; luedeunos kes atukot na naepol.”"
2Chronicles31:11 Kicorak do Kesekia kes aitemokin agolai togo loka EJAKAIT; kitemokis,"
2Chronicles31:12 Koyaut ainakineta ka lukitomon ka iboro luetiakunitai da kamunonut: korai Konania Elebit ekayaitonikec, kiareik Simei onaceke."
2Chronicles31:13 Ido Yekiel, ka Asasia, ka Nakat, ka Asakel, ka Yerimot, ka Yosabad, ka Eliel, ka Isimakia, ka Makat, ka Benaia, koraas ikaanyanarak kakan naka Konania ka Simei onaceke, kanuka aicorakinet naka Kesekia ekabaka, ka Asaria ekayaiton etogo loka Edeke."
2Chronicles31:14 Ido abu Kore okoku loka Imina Elebit, ekagolon erute lokokide, kopolokinite ainakineta nuka akot nuka Edeke, akoranakin ainakineta nuka EJAKAIT, ka iboro lukalaunak noi."
2Chronicles31:15 Kwapuke ajai Eden ka Minaimin, ka Yesua, ka Semaia, ka Amaria, ka Sekania, koreria luka isasedotin, kaswamukec, ainakin ikeceinacan kabeanakin, lukapolok ka ludidik da:"
2Chronicles31:16 kogelara ŋul luemaritai kaurikec naka lukiliok, ageun ka luka ikar iuni ka adepar, ŋolituŋanan loelomari togo loka EJAKAIT, kwape ibusakinitor aswam naka ŋinipaaran, aijaanakin kaswamukec kwape ajaatar abeanakinetakec,"
2Chronicles31:17 Kaijul luemaritai kaurikee naka isasedotin kwape ajaatar ikekia luka lukapapaakec, ka Ilebin ageun ka luka ikar akaisaarei ka adepar, kaswamukec kwape ajaatar abeanakinetakec;"
2Chronicles31:18 ka ŋul luemaritai kaurikec naka ludidikikec, ka aŋorokec, ka ikecedwe lusap ka lupesur, anatar ekodet kere: naarai kaswamukec kitalaunos bonik kalaunit."
2Chronicles31:19 Ido lukodwe luka Aaron isasedotin, luajaas omanikoria luka ironyia luka ireriakec, kaŋolire kere, ajaas ituŋa luabilitai ikiroriakee, ainakin akorakineta mama ejaas lukiliok kere kosasedotin, ka ŋul kere luemaritai kaurikec koLebin."
2Chronicles31:20 Kiswama Kesekia kwaŋin anatar Yuda kere; kiswama nuejok ka nuedolito ka numunon kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekedeke.
2Chronicles31:21 Kaŋiniswam kere naegeuni kaijaanakin naka etogo loka Edeke, kokisila, kaicorakineta da, amoot Ekedeke, kiswama keketau kere, kisirerenŋitoi."
2Chronicles32:1 Akaulo kaŋun, ka amunonut ŋin, kobu Senakerib ekabaka loka Asuria, koloma Yuda, kidukur asurokin ireria luebwaitai, koomit airum kes."
2Chronicles32:2 Keanyu Kesekia ebe abu Senakerib, idenyakinit da asurokin Yerusalem,"
2Chronicles32:3 kinerut kaikapolokoke ka iketuŋa lukirigin ainwok akipi nuka icoai luajaas kiŋa naka ere; kiŋarakis ŋes.
2Chronicles32:4 Kotukokinos do ituŋa luipu, konwokata icoai kere, ka aguurut naelelei kokidiŋ kakwap, kobalas ebe, “Kanuto kinyo tikeponiata ikabakan luka Asuria, adumun akipi nuipu?”"
2Chronicles32:5 Kotitiŋior, koduk arwatat kere naatiyatiyatai, kitonyou kiton otogoi lueojak, ka arwatat ace kokiŋa, kitogogoŋ Milo ore loka Daudi, kiswamau lujtis ka ibukui luipu."
2Chronicles32:6 Kibwaik ikapolok luka ejie apolokin ituŋa, kotukok kes neajai ŋesi kaibois naelal korute loka ere, kiner kakes nukaitalakaar, ebe,"
2Chronicles32:7 “Kicata, kotitiŋioto, sirikikuriakaros karaida aiyaloŋoŋ kanuka ekabaka loka Asuria, karaida ekodet kere loepol loejai kaŋes: naarai epol loejai kaoni aitelekarit loejai kaŋes."
2Chronicles32:8 Ejai akan naka akuan kaŋes: konye ejai EJAKAIT Ewokodeke kaoni aiŋarakin, ka ejie kojiisiowok.” Kogoŋakina ituŋa akiro nuka Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda."
2Chronicles32:9 Akaulo kaŋun kiyakia Senakerib ekabaka loka Asuria ikekejaanakinak Yerusalem, (ajai ŋesi kiŋaren ka Lakis, ka akepedor kere kaŋes,) mama ejai Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda, ka lukoYuda kere luajaas Yerusalem ebe,"
2Chronicles32:10 “Inera kwanata Senakerib ekabaka loka Asuria ebe, ‘Iŋai bo loimunosi, tape idarete airigaunio koYerusalem?"
2Chronicles32:11 Mam kereka Kesekia kiŋalarit yes, ainakin yes atwakare kebeli ka akure ebe, “Itajari EJAKAIT Ewokodeke oni kakan naka ekabaka loka Asuria”?"
2Chronicles32:12 Mam kereka Kesekia ŋol alemarit aiboisioke nuiceleleete, ka itemwanake, kicorak da Yuda ka Yerusalem ebe, “Imaete kotem ediopet, kaŋes da isupuruunete lukisupurununo”?"
2Chronicles32:13 Mam yes ijenete nukeswamakin eoŋ ka lukapapaaka ituŋa kere luka akwapin? Kepedorito tope idekesio luka atekerin nuka akwapin ayuun akecekwap kakanika?
2Chronicles32:14 Iŋai bo kodekesio kere luka atekerin ŋun nuamudiarete lukapapaaka cut, luapedorit ayuun iketuŋa kakanika, tape epedori Ekusideke ayuun yes kakanika?"
2Chronicles32:15 Aso do kinye Kesekia aiŋal yes, karaida aisidik yes kakirot kana, kwabo sirikiyuutu ŋes: naarai amamei edeke ediopet loka ateker karaida ajakanut loapedorit ayuun iketuŋa kakanika, kakan da naka lukapapaaka: ikoni epedori ai Ekusideke nepepec da ayuun yes kakanika?”"
2Chronicles32:16 Kiyatakis ikekejaanakinak einer erono mama ejai EJAKAIT Edeke, ka Kesekia da ekekejaanakinan,"
2Chronicles32:17 Kiwadika da ibaluan, aimwaŋ EJAKAIT, Edeke laka Isirael, kiner erono mamake ebe, “Kwape idekesio luka atekerin nuka akwapin, lumam apotu koyuutu ikecetuŋa kakanika, kwape kwaŋin da mam Edeke loka Kesekia eyuuni iketuŋa kakanika.”"
2Chronicles32:18 Kiworoto keporoto loepol kaŋajep naka Iyudayan mama ejaas ituŋa luka Yerusalem luajaas arwatat, aitukurian kes, ka aisiyaloŋoŋ da; tetere irumete ere."
2Chronicles32:19 Kineras nuka Edeke loka Yerusalem, kwape nuka idekesio luka ituŋa luka akwapin, luaraas aswam naka akanin nuka ituŋa,"
2Chronicles32:20 Apotu Kesekia ekabaka, ka Isaia enabi okoku loka Amos, kilipa kanuka ŋun, komonyata mama ejai akuj."
2Chronicles32:21 Kijuka EJAKAIT emalaika, komudia ituŋa kere lukirigin luetitiŋ, ka ikeŋarenok, ka ikapolok, koidukurun luka ekabaka loka Asuria, Koboŋo akwapuke kodakara akou. Keloma ŋesi abila naka edekeke, apotu ŋul lualomunete kopikisike koarakis ŋes nen kekileŋ."
2Chronicles32:22 Kwaŋin kitajar EJAKAIT Kesekia ka luibojete koYerusalem kakan naka Senakerib ekabaka loka Asuria, kakan da naka ice kere, kinareŋik kes kaŋoliwai."
2Chronicles32:23 Apotu luipu koinut EJAKAIT ainakineta koYerusalem, ka iboro luka akais nuipu mama ejai Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda: kitopolooroi do kakonyen nuka atekerin kere agear kanen."
2Chronicles32:24 Kapaarasia kaŋun kodekakin Kesekia nepetai atwanare: kilip EJAKAIT; kinera kaŋes, koinak ŋes aanyunet."
2Chronicles32:25 Konye mam abu Kesekia kikonak kwape ajaar ajokis naeswamakinio ŋes; naarai kodakun eketau; kanuka ŋun kobunok ŋes anyunyura, ka Yuda ka Yerusalem da."
2Chronicles32:26 Konye kitasonikin Kesekia kanuka aiwoŋonut nakotauke, ŋes ka luiboiete koYerusalem, ŋes mam anyunyura naka EJAKAIT ebunokinia kes kapaarasia nuka Kesekia."
2Chronicles32:27 Ajai Kesekia abar naepol ka aibuses: koduk aiŋadisia nuka epuesa, ka nuka esabu, ka nuka amor nuka akais nuipu, ka nuka lueur maa, ka nuka ibukui, ka nuka iponesio kere luka iboro luejok;"
2Chronicles32:28 itogoi lukaiŋad da luka eiyas loka akima ka ebino ka akinyet; aujoi da nuka iponesio kere luka itiaŋ, ka anukia nuka amerekekin."
2Chronicles32:29 Bobo da kodum ireria, ka isipanin luipu noi luka aituk ka luka amerekekin: naarai abu Edeke koinak ŋes iboro luipu noi."
2Chronicles32:30 Abu Kesekia ŋopeŋol kigalik atan naimukurur naka akipi nuka Gikon, kitelelea kes eitena ari nakoto naka ere loka Daudi, Kokerianar Kesekia kaswamisioke kere."
2Chronicles32:31 Konye kakirot naka ikiyakia luka ikapolok luka Babulon, lukijukunete aiŋitun nakaumokin naeswamatai kakwap, kojal Edeke ŋes aigimor, tetere ejenuni nuajaas otauke kere."
2Chronicles32:32 Aswamisio ace nuka Kesekia, ka akeswamisio nukajokak, koany, iwadikatai aitapoet naka Isaia enabi okoku loka Amos, oitabo loka ikabakan luka Yuda ka Isirael."
2Chronicles32:33 Kojotoor Kesekia kalukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai adoket naka atesina nuka odwe luka Daudi: kitubusikis ŋes Yuda kere ka luiboiete ko Yerusalem katwanareke, Kirum Manase okokuke aiboisike."
2Chronicles33:1 Kerai Manase loka ikar itomon ka luarei egeuni airum; kirumak ŋesi ikar akaisakany ka lukany ko Yerusalem.
2Chronicles33:2 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape ajaatar italesia luka ikapirin, luerenearit EJAKAIT kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael."
2Chronicles33:3 Naarai koduk bobo aiboisio nuiceleleete nuatiyatiyat Kesekia papake; kosipok itemwan luka Ibaalim, kiswamau Aserot, koma ajore kere naka akuj, kijaanak kes."
2Chronicles33:4 Koduk itemwan togo loka EJAKAIT, loabu EJAKAIT kiner ebe, “Ejaenena ekakiror Yerusalem ikar kere.”"
2Chronicles33:5 Koduk itemwan luka ajore kere naka akuj alaroi aarei nukotogo loka EJAKAIT.
2Chronicles33:6 Kitotor ikedwe akim kaditot naka okoku loka Kinom: konye aanyuneta, kitwasam nukalemelem, kiswama nukaicud, kouparos kaŋul kaluajaas ajokina, ka ikepiedak: kiswama nukaronok nuipu kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT aitunyunyurikin ŋes."
2Chronicles33:7 Kibwaik aput naegerer naka ibore yenemai ŋesi, naabu kiswamau, togo loka Edeke, loabu Edeke kolimok Daudi ka Solomon okokuke ebe, “Ebwaikini ekakiror togo lo ikar kere, Yerusalem da, loaseunit katekerin kere nuka Isirael."
2Chronicles33:8 Mam bobo da alemari akeju naka Isirael kakwap naaseikinit lukapapaakus; arai teni iricete aiswamaenen nuecoraki kes kere, ikisila kere ka apucuneta ka aicorakineta kakan naka Musa.”"
2Chronicles33:9 Kitapaa Manase Yuda ka luiboiete koYerusalem, kiswamata nueroko aitelekar atekerin, nuabu EJAKAIT komudia kakonyen nuka idwe luka Isirael."
2Chronicles33:10 Kinera EJAKAIT kaManase, ka ituŋake: konye mam apodosi."
2Chronicles33:11 Kanuka ŋun koyau EJAKAIT ekapolon loka ajore naka ekabaka loka Asuria, loabu koyana Manase kirikoi, koen ŋes kasua, koyaŋa Babulon."
2Chronicles33:12 Nakejaar ŋesi ocan, kiŋaiŋa EJAKAIT Ekedeke, kitasonikin noi kakonyen nuka Edeke loka lukapapaake."
2Chronicles33:13 Kilip ŋes; kopup akeilip, kiira aiŋaiŋake, kinyaku Yerusalem ajakanutuke, Kosodi konyet kojen Manase ebe EJAKAIT ŋes Edeke."
2Chronicles33:14 Akaulo kaŋun koduk arwatat nakokiŋa ore loka Daudi, ari nakoto naka Gikon, aditot, kiton neelomarere orute loka iboro lukocor; kirigaun Opel, kitonyou kooja noi; kibwaik ikapolok luetitiŋ oreria kere luebwaitai luka Yuda."
2Chronicles33:15 Kolema idekesio lumo, ka ibore yenamai ŋesi kotogo loks EJAKAIT, ka itemwan kere luadukokinit moru loka etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka Yerusalem da, kocaka kiŋa naka ere."
2Chronicles33:16 Kiteteu etem loka EJAKAIT, koinak asuban nuka ainakineta nuka ainapakin ka nuka aimal kotomake, kicorak Yuda aijaanakin EJAKAIT, Edeke lokaIsirael."
2Chronicles33:17 Konye koroko ituŋa einanakinete asuban kaiboisio nuiceleleete, konye mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekecedeke bon."
2Chronicles33:18 Aswamisio ace nuka Manase, ka akeilip mama ejai Edekeke, ka akiro nuka ikadwarak nualimonokinete ŋes kokiror loka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, koany, iwadikatai kaswamisio nuka ikabakan luka Isirael."
2Chronicles33:19 Akeilip da, ido kwape kiiraria Edeke ŋes, aronisike kere, ka adiakarike, ka aiboisio nuadukokinit ŋesi aiboisio nuiceleleete, kosipok Aserim, ka aputosia nuegerer, eriŋa kitasonikino; koany, iwadikatai kakiro nuka Kosai."
2Chronicles33:20 Kojotoor do Manase kalukapapaake, aponi kidaikinai togoke kelopet: kirum Amon okokuke aiboisike."
2Chronicles33:21 Kerai Amon loka ikar akaisaarei ka luarei egeuni airum: kirumak ikar iarei koYerusalem,"
2Chronicles33:22 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape eswamaa Manase papake: koinak Amon asuban mama ejaas aputosia kere nuegerer nuabu Manase papake kiswamau, kijaanak kes."
2Chronicles33:23 Mam abu kitasonikin kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape kitasonikinor papake; konye kiyatanak Amon ŋol agwaun akiro."
2Chronicles33:24 Kinerut ikekejaanakinak asurokin ŋes, koarakis ŋes togokeŋ,"
2Chronicles33:25 Konye apotu ituŋa luka akwap koarata ŋul kere luenerunete asurokin ekabaka Amon; kodakakis ituŋa luka akwap Yosia okokuke araun ekabaka aiboisike,"
2Chronicles34:1 Kerai Yosia loka ikar ikanykauni egeuni airum; kirumak ikar akaisauni ka Iodiopet koYerusalem.
2Chronicles34:2 Kiswama nuejok kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kolosenenei korotin luka Daudi papaake, komam epaari akan nakoteten karaida nakokediany."
2Chronicles34:3 Naarai kokaru lokikanyetekauni loka airumuke, eriŋa erai esapat, kogeu amoot Edeke loka Daudi papaake: kokaru lokitomonet kaarei kogeu aiteseg Yuda ka Yerusalem alemar aiboisio nuiceleleete, ka Aserim, ka aputosia nuegerer, ka aputosia nuecalara;"
2Chronicles34:4 kobilibilai itemwan luka Ibaalim kakonyeneke; kojepeiep aputosia nuka akoloŋ nuiceleleete kokujukec; komunyumuny Aserim, ka aputosia nuegerer, ka aputosia nuecalara, kitarau apua, kipurupuranak atesina nuka ŋul kaluapotu koinakis asuban mamakec,"
2Chronicles34:5 Kicwei akojo nuka isasedotin kotemwanakec, kiteseg Yuda ka Yerusalem,"
2Chronicles34:6 Kiswama kwaŋin koreria luka Manase ka Epuraim ka Simeon, kiton Naputali, ka aapoŋorukec airimor."
