2Chronicles34:7 Kobilibil itemwan, kidecidec Aserim ka aputosia nuegerer araun apua, kojepejep aputosia nuka akoloŋ anatar akwap kere naka Isirael, koboŋo Yerusalem."
2Chronicles34:8 Kokaru lokitomonet kakanykauni loka airumuke, kedau aiteseg akwap, ka etogo, kijuka Sapan okoku loka Asalia, ka Maaseia ekayaiton ere, ka Yoa okoku loka Yoakas ekesiitonokinan, aiteteun etogo loka EJAKAIT Ekedeke."
2Chronicles34:9 Kopotu mama ejai Kilikia esasedoti lopeti, kijaikis apesan nuayaunitai togo loka Edeke, nuatukokinito Ilebin, ikagolok ekek, kakan naka Manase ka Epuraim, ka aatoŋot kere naka Isirael, ka Yuda kere ka Benyamin, ka luiboiete koYerusalem."
2Chronicles34:10 Kijaikis akan naka ikeswamak luiteete etogo loka EJAKAIT; koinakis ikeswamak lueswamaete togo loka EJAKAIT aiteteunia ka apucunio etogo,"
2Chronicles34:11 Koinakis ikekeok, ka ikadukok, agwelia amor nuikee, ka akito nuimorikikinete, aiswamaa abaoi nuka itogoi luapotu ikabakan luka Yuda komudiasi."
2Chronicles34:12 Kiswamata ituŋa kamunonut; ikaanyanarakakec Yakat ka Obadia, Ilebin, lukodwe luka Merari; Sekaria ka Mesulam, lukodwe luka Ikokatin aiteten: ice luka Ilebin da, kere luepedorete airam ejok iboro lueruosi,"
2Chronicles34:13 Kepolokinito kesi luebwokete abwokon, kitetenata kere lueswamaete ŋolipone loka aijaanakin: ajaas koLebin da ikewadikak, ka ikapolokitok, ka ikagolok."
2Chronicles34:14 Nakitolomuniata apesan nuayaunitai togo loka EJAKAIT, kodum Kilika esasedoti eitabo loka ikisila luka EJAKAIT luainakinio kama ka Musa."
2Chronicles34:15 Koboŋok Kilikia kotema Sapan ekewadikan atiar, “Adum eoŋ eitabo loka ikisila kotogo loka EJAKAIT.” Kosodi Kilikia aijaikin Sapan eitabo."
2Chronicles34:16 Kodaka Sapan eitabo mama ejai ekabaka, ido kinyakak ekabaka akiro, ebe, “Iswamaete ikonikejaanakinak kere nukititiŋitai."
2Chronicles34:17 Akorasi apesan nuadumuna kotogo loka EJAKAIT, ejaikis akan naka ikaanyanarak, akan da naka ikeswamak.”"
2Chronicles34:18 Kosodi Sapan ekewadikan alimokin ekabaka ebe, “Kejaiki Kilikia esasedoti eitabo.” Kosiom Sapan kakonyen nuka ekabaka."
2Chronicles34:19 Kosodi kanen, kiira ekabaka akiro nuka ikisila, kocil ikenapen."
2Chronicles34:20 Kicorak ekabaka Kilikia, ka Akikam okoku loka Sapan, ka Abudon okoku loka Mika, ka Sapan ekewadikan, ka Asaia ekejaanakinan loka ekabaka ebe,"
2Chronicles34:21 “Koloto yesi, kiŋita EJAKAIT kanukan, kanuka ŋul da luideuna koIsirael ka Yuda, akiro nuka eitabo loadumun: naarai epol anyunyura naka EJAKAIT nakibukokina oni, naarai mam lukapapaawok apotu koricito akirot naka EJAKAIT, aiswamaenen kwape ajaatar kere nuiwadikatai oitabo lo.”"
2Chronicles34:22 Kolot Kilikia, ka ŋul da luecorakini ekabaka, mama ejai Kulida anabi, aberu naka Salum okoku loka Tokat, okoku loka Kasara, ekeŋadan inapen; (eboienenei nin koYerusalem katutubet nakiareit;) kinerut kaŋes ŋun."
2Chronicles34:23 Kotema ŋesi kes atiar, “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, ebe;, Kolimokis etuŋanan lokijukunit yes neajai ebe,"
2Chronicles34:24 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT ebe, Koany, ayauni aronis aibois na, ka neejaas luiboiete kotoma, aikenito kere nuiwadikatai oitabo loasiomi kakonyen nuka ekabaka loka Yuda:"
2Chronicles34:25 naarai kajala, esupuruikis lukisupurununo odekesio ice, aitunyunyurikin eoŋ kaswamisio kere nuka akaninikec; ŋes ebukokinor akanyunyura aibois na, komam eduŋeori."
2Chronicles34:26 Konye ekabaka loka Yuda, lokijukuni aiŋitakin EJAKAIT, kolimokis ŋes kwanata ebe, Inera kwanata EJAKAIT Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Nuka akiro nukipupuni,"
2Chronicles34:27 kanu anonokiaror ekonitau, kitasonikin kakonyen nuka Edeke, naipupunio akekiro aluikin aibois na, aluikin da luiboiete kotoma, kitasonikin kakonyeneka, kocil ikoninapen, komony akiyo kakonyeneka; inera EJAKAIT ebe, Keira eoŋ da,"
2Chronicles34:28 koany, atukokini jo mama ejaas lukapapaakon, kitukokinio jo ailitikon inapakina, kwabo mam eanyunete akonikonye aronis kere naayauni aibois na, ka luiboiete kotoma.’” Kinyakakinai ekabaka akiro."
2Chronicles34:29 Kosodi ekabaka aijukar kotukok imakio kere luka Yuda ka Yerusalem.
2Chronicles34:30 Kodoka ekabaka togo loka EJAKAIT, ka ituŋa kere luka Yuda, ka lukiboiete koYerusalem, ka isasedotin, ka Ilebin, ka ituŋa kere, lukapolok ka ludidik kere: kosiomak akiikec akiro kere nuka eitabo loka aitutuket loadumun kotogo loka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles34:31 Kobwo ekabaka kaiboisike, kitutuk aitutuket kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, atupit EJAKAIT, airie aicorakinetake, ka aitejenunetake, ka ikisilake, keketau kere, kakeijar da kere, aitodol akiro kere nuka aitutuket nuewadikatai oitabo lo."
2Chronicles34:32 Kitogogoŋ da ituŋa kere Iuadumuna koYerusalem ka Benyamin, aitodol. Kiswamata lukiboiete koYerusalem kwape ajaar aitutuket naka Edeke, Edeke loka lukapapaakec."
2Chronicles34:33 Kolema Yosia italesia kere kakwapin kere nuaraas nuka idwe luka Isirael, kisidik luadumuna kere koIsirael aijaanakin, ŋes aijaanakin EJAKAIT Ekecedeke. Apaarasiake kere mam apotu konyoutu katupit EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakec."
2Chronicles35:1 Koric Yosia Aleleŋio mama ejai EJAKAIT koYerusalem: koarata lukaleleŋio kapaaran nakitomonet kaoŋon naka elap losodit.
2Chronicles35:2 Kibwaik isasedotin aswamukec, kisinyikok kes aijaanakin kotogo loka EJAKAIT."
2Chronicles35:3 Kotema ŋesi Ilebin luisisianakinete Isirael kere, luaraas lukalaunak mama ejai EJAKAIT atiar, “Kibwaikis asaduku nakalaunan togo loabu Solomon okoku loka Daudi ekabaka loka Isirael koduk; mam bobo ejaun abwokon okeperinikus: kijaanakisi do EJAKAIT Ekusideke, ka iketuŋa Isirael."
2Chronicles35:4 Kitemonokisi kwape ejaatar ikekia luka lukapapaakus, kabeanakinikus, kwape ajaatar aiwadikaeta nuka Daudi ekabaka loka Isirael, ido kwape ajaatar aiwadikaeta nuka Solomon okokuke."
2Chronicles35:5 Kobwaata kaibois nakalaunan kwape ajaatar atiaketa nuka ikekia luka lukapapaakus luka ikusiinacan idwe luka ituŋa, kojaun kaŋolidiopet atiaket naka ekek loka lukapapaa luka Ilebin."
2Chronicles35:6 Koarata lukaleleŋio, kitalaunos bonik, kitemokis nuka ikusiinaean, aswam kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT kama ka Musa.”"
2Chronicles35:7 Kosodi Yosia ainakin idwe luka ituŋa, ŋul kere luajaas kanen, kosipan, imerekekin ludidik kaikalei, kes kere araun ainakineta nuka aleleŋio, emwaasi ilukumin akaisauni, ka imoŋin Iutoba ilukumin iuni: ŋul keraas koboro luka ekabaka."
2Chronicles35:8 Koinakis ikapolokoke araun ainakinet naka akote mama ejaas ituŋa, ka isasedotin, ka Ilebin. Apotu Kilikia ka Sekaria ka Yekiel, ikayaitok luka etogo loka Edeke koinakis isasedotin ibaren ludidik ilukumin iarei ka akwat akanykape, ka imoŋin akwat auni araun ainakineta nuka aleleŋio."
2Chronicles35:9 Konania da, ka Semaia ka Netanel, ijnacanake, ka Kasabia ka Yeiel ka Yosabad, iiaka luka Ilebin, koinakis Ilebin ibaren ludidik ilukumin ikany, ka imoŋin akwat akany."
2Chronicles35:10 Kwaŋin kitemokin aijaanakin, kobwaata isasedotin kaiboisikec, ka Ilebin kabeanakinikec, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka ekabaka,"
2Chronicles35:11 Koarata lukaleleŋio, kobwatanakis isasedotin aokot nuejaunete kakanikec, kojenata Ilebin kes."
2Chronicles35:12 Kolemasi ainakineta nuicweio, tetere einakinete kwape ajaatar atiaketa nuka ikekia luka lukapapaa luka idwe luka ituŋa, ainakin EJAKAIT, kwape iwadikatere oitabo loka Musa. Kiswamata kwaŋin komoniŋ da."
2Chronicles35:13 Kopeoto Iukaleleŋio kakim kwape ajaar aicorakinet: kipooto ainakineta nukalaunak kotoma amotii, ka akeito, kasepulian da, kodakasi katipet mama ejaas idwe kere luka ituŋa."
2Chronicles35:14 Kokau kitemokis nukee, ka nuka isasedotin da; naarai kirododorito isasedotin odwe luka Aaron ainakin ainakineta nuicweio ka asiepai kiton kuare: kanuka ŋun kitemokis Ilebin nukec, ka nuka isasedotin odwe luka Aaron."
2Chronicles35:15 Kejaas ikayook, odwe luka Asap aiboisikec, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka Daudi, ka Asap, ka Keman, ka Yedutun ekadwaran loka ekabaka; ajaas ikagolok kaŋolirute: komam ipudas anyoun kaswamukec, naarai kitemokis ikeceinacan Ilebin nukec."
2Chronicles35:16 Kwaŋin kitemokin aijaanakin kere naka EJAKAIT kapaaran kaŋin, airic aleleŋio, ainakin da ainakineta nuicweio kotem loka EJAKAIT, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka ekabaka Yosia."
2Chronicles35:17 Koricata idwe luka Isirael luajaas nen aleleŋio kapak kaŋin, ka epucit loka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi apaarasia akanykaarei,"
2Chronicles35:18 Amamei da aleleŋio naikoni nen naaricitai koIsirael ageun kapaarasia nuka Samuel enabi; kwabo mam ediokabaka laka Isirael abu koric aleleŋio kwape kericia Yosia, ka isasedotin ka Ilebin, ka Yuda kere ka Isirael luajaas nen, ka lukiboiete koYerusalem."
2Chronicles35:19 Kokaru lokitomonet kakanykauni loka airum naka Yosia ŋes kericere aleleŋio ŋin,"
2Chronicles35:20 Akaulo kaŋun kere, kedau Yosia aitemokin eyekalu, kolot Neko ekabaka loko Misiri asurokin Karakemis eiduny ka Eupurat; koloma Yosia asurokin ŋes."
2Chronicles35:21 Konye kijuka ŋesi ikiyakia mama ejai ebe, “Kimariai inyo eoŋ ka jo, ijo ekabaka loka Yuda? Mam eoŋ kasurokini jo lolo, dimarai asurokin ekek lokijior eoŋ; kecorak Edeke aisunyakin: kinyek ijo aiilokin Edeke, loejai keoŋ, kinyek amudiar jo.”"
2Chronicles35:22 Konye koŋer Yosia aibelokin akekonyen, konye kitegelikin bon, kosodi ejie kaŋes, mam abu kiira akiro nuka Neko, nuapote kaituk naka Edeke, kobu ejie aditot naka Megido."
2Chronicles35:23 Kogumata ikagumak imalia ekabaka Yosia; kobala ekabaka ikekejaanakinak ebe, “Koyaŋaarai eoŋ: naarai kemusuŋi noi.”"
2Chronicles35:24 Kitodokut ikekejaanakinak ŋes kagali, kibwaikis ŋes agali nakiareit naajai kaŋes, koyaut ŋes Yerusalem; kotwana, aponi kidaikinai atesina nuka lukapapaake. Kibworoto Yuda kere ka Yerusalem Yosia."
2Chronicles35:25 Kokuudian Yeremia Yosia: kinerata ikayook kere ka akayook nuka Yosia kakuudianakec, kiton lolo: kitaraut aicorakinet koIsirael: ido koany, iwadikatai toma akuudian."
2Chronicles35:26 Aswamisio ace nuka Yosia, ka akeswamisio nuejok, kwape ejaatar nuiwadikatai okisila luka EJAKAIT,"
2Chronicles35:27 akeswamisio da, nusodit ka nukawasia, koany, iwadikatai oitabo loka ikabakan luka Isirael ka Yuda."
2Chronicles36:1 Kosodete ituŋa luka akwap ayaŋaar Yekoakas okoku laka Yosia, kitaraut ŋes ekabaka koYerusalem aibois naka papake."
2Chronicles36:2 Kerai Yoakas laka ikar akaisaarei ka luuni egeuni airum: kirumak ilapio iuni koYerusalem.
2Chronicles36:3 Kireŋea ekabaka loko Misiri ŋes karaut ekabaka koYerusalem, kotubok akwap esolo laka atalatan akwatat nuka epuesa, ka atalata naka esabu."
2Chronicles36:4 Kitarau ekabaka loko Misiri Eliakim onaceke ekabaka loka Yuda ka Yerusalem, kilocok ekekiror komaik Yekoiakim. Koyana Neko Yoakas onaceke, kodakarai Misiri."
2Chronicles36:5 Kerai Yekoiakim loka ikar akaisaarei ka lukany egeuni airum; kirumak ikar itomon ka lodiopet koYerusalem: kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekedeke.
2Chronicles36:6 Kobu Nebukadanesar ekabaka loko Babulon asurokin ŋes, koen ŋes kasua, adakar ŋes Babulon."
2Chronicles36:7 Kodaka Nebukadanesar da lukoboro luka etogo laka EJAKAIT Babulon, kibwaik kes oyekaluke koBabulon."
2Chronicles36:8 Aswamisio ace nuka Yekoiakim, ka italesio luabu kiswama luadumunio kamakeŋ, koany, iwadikatai oitabo loka ikabakan luka Isirael ka Yuda; kirum Yekoiakin okokuke aiboisike."
2Chronicles36:9 Kerai Yekoiakin laka ikar ikanykauni egeuni airum; kirumak ilapio iuni ka apaarasia atomon koYerusalem: kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT.
2Chronicles36:10 Kedol ekaru, kijuka ekabaka Nebukadanesar koyau ŋes Babulon, nepepe kiboro luejok luka etogo laka EJAKAIT, kitarau Sedekia onaceke ekabaka loka Yuda ka Yerusalem,"
2Chronicles36:11 Kerai Sedekia laka ikar akaisaarei ka lodiopet egeuni airum; kirumak ikar itomon ka lodiopet ko Yerusalem.
2Chronicles36:12 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT Ekedeke; mam abu kitasonikin kakonyen nuka Yeremia enabi, lokinera nuapote kaituk naka EJAKAIT,"
2Chronicles36:13 Kipaliik ŋesi ekabaka Nebukadanesar, lokisiyapoikinit ŋes alimit Edeke: konye kitininik emurisiŋike, kitogogoŋ eketau kinyek aibelokin mama ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael."
2Chronicles36:14 Ido kibucasi noi ijaka kere luka isasedotin, ka ituŋa, atupakin italesio kere luka ikapirin; komunaut etogo leka Edeke loabu kitalaunite ko Yerusalem."
2Chronicles36:15 Kijukanak kes EJAKAIT, Edeke laka lukapapaakec kokiyakiake, anyoun tupuruc ijukanari; naarai etimit ŋesi iketuŋa, ka aiboisike."
2Chronicles36:16 Konye kisekeloto ikiyakia luka Edeke, komwaŋito akekiro, kokienatar inabinoke, aitodol neadakunor anyunyura naka EJAKAIT asurokin iketuŋa, aitodol neamameunor aŋaleun."
2Chronicles36:17 Kanuka ŋun koyau mamakec ekabaka loka Ikaludean, loaari ikatumunakakec kekileŋ kotogo laka aiboisikec nakalaunan, mam apotu kitimoto esapat karaida apese, ekimat ka emojoŋ loitabi; koinak kes kere akanike."
2Chronicles36:18 Iboro da kere luka etogo laka Edeke, lukapolok ka ludidik, ka iboro luka akais nuipu luka etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka iboro luka akais nuipu luka ekabaka, ka luka ikapolokoke; ŋul kere koyau Babulon,"
2Chronicles36:19 Kicweata etogo laka Edeke, kotiyatiyata arwatat naka Yerusalem, kicweata itogoi lukapolok kere kakim, komudias iborokec kere lukajokak."
2Chronicles36:20 Ŋul da luakuete ekileŋ koyaŋa Babulon; koraut ikebulesin ka luka odweke kiton airum naka ajakanut naka Perusia.
2Chronicles36:21 Aitodol akirot naka EJAKAIT kaituk naka Yeremia, aitodol nealakaror akwap kasabatonoke; naarai kapak naeswapitor, koricite asabatoke, aitodol ikar akaisakanykaarei."
2Chronicles36:22 Kokaru losodit laka Kuro ekabaka loko Perusia, tetere itodolikinio akirot naka EJAKAIT kaituk naka Yeremia, kisidik EJAKAIT etau laka Kuro ekabaka loko Perusia, kolimo anatar ajakanutuke kere, kiwadika da ebe,"
2Chronicles36:23 “Inera kwanata Kuro ekabaka loko Perusia ebe, ‘Kainaki eoŋ EJAKAIT, Edeke laka akuj, ajakanuto kere nuka akwapin; kecoraki da adukokin ŋes etogo Yerusalem, loejai toma Yuda. Ŋin yenejai kayes kotuŋake kere, kojai EJAKAIT Ekedeke kaŋes, kolot.’”"
Ezra1:1 Kokaru losodit loka Kuro ekabaka loko Perusia, tetere itodolikinio akirot naka EJAKAIT kaituk naka Yeremia, kisidik EJAKAIT etau loka Kuro ekabaka loko Perusia, kolimo anatar ajakanutuke kere, kiwadika da ebe:"
Ezra1:2 “Inera kwanata Kuro ekabaka loko Perusia ebe, ‘Kainaki eoŋ EJAKAIT, Edeke loka akuj, ajakanuto kere nuka akwapin; keeoraki da adukokin ŋes etogo Yerusalem, loejai toma Yuda."
Ezra1:3 Ŋin yenejai kayes kotuŋake kere, kojai Ekedeke kaŋes, kolot Yerusalem, loejai toma Yuda, koduk etogo loka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, ŋes Edeke, loejai Yerusalem."
Ezra1:4 Yenesalit da kere, kaŋiniibois naiboiororor, kiŋarakis ituŋa luka aiboisike kepuesa, ka esabu, ka iboro, ka ibaren, komam imarakinito ainakineta nuka akot nuka etogo loka Edeke loejai Yerusalem.’’’"
Ezra1:5 Kosodete konyout lukapolok luka ikekia luka Yuda ka Benyamin, ka isasedotin, ka Ilebin, kere luabu Edeke kisidik ikecetauon alosit aiduk etogo loka EJAKAIT loejai Yerusalem."
Ezra1:6 Ŋul da kere lualukunitos kitogogoŋoto akecekanin kanuka iboro luka epuesa, ka esabu, ka iboro, ka ibaren, ka iboro luka etiai loepol, komam imarakinito kere luainaldnito kanuka akot."
Ezra1:7 Kitolom Kuro da iboro luka etogo loka EJAKAIT, luabu Nebukadanesar kolem koYerusalem, kibwaik abila naka idekesioke;"
Ezra1:8 ŋupeŋul etolomuni Kuro ekabaka loko Perusia kakan naka Mituredat ekeŋadan, kimarak Sesebasar, ekapolon laka Yuda."
Ezra1:9 Lo ŋes etiaikec: atuba akaisauni nuka esabu, atuba alukumit nuka epuesa, ikileŋa akaisaarei ka lukanykaoŋon:"
Ezra1:10 atiboi akaisauni nuka esabu, atiboi nuka epuesa nuka epone lokiareit akwat aoŋon ka itomon, ka iboro ice elukumit."
Ezra1:11 Iboro kere luka esabu ka luka epuesa emwaasi ilukumin ikany ka akwat aoŋon, Abu Sesebasar koyaŋau ŋul kere, nakeyaŋauniata luejoreoritai anyoun koBabulon kiton Yerusalem."
Ezra2:1 Lu kes idwe luka ebuku, luapotu konyoutu kaijoreorio naka ŋul kaluaponi koŋatarai, luabu Nebukadanesar ekabaka loko Babulon koyaŋa Babulon, luaboŋorete Yerusalem ka Yuda, ŋinituŋanan ore lokobukec;"
Ezra2:2 luapotu kouparos ka Serubabel, Yesua, Nekemia, Seraia, Reelaia, Morudeini, Bilisan, Misipar, Bigibai, Rekum, ka Baana. Etiai lo ka ikiliok luka ituŋa luka Isirael:"
Ezra2:3 idwe luka Paros, ilukumin arei ka akwatat ka akaisakanykaarei ka luarei."
Ezra2:4 Idwe luka Sepatia, akwat auni ka akaisakanykaarei ka luarei,"
Ezra2:5 Idwe luka Ara akwat akanykaarei ka akaisakanykaarei ka lukany,"
Ezra2:6 Idwe luka Pakat-moab, luka idwe luka Yesua ka Yoab, ilukumin iarei ka akwat akanykauni ka itomon ka luarei."
Ezra2:7 Idwe luka Elam, elukumit ka akwat aarei ka akaisakany ka luoŋon."
Ezra2:8 Idwe luka Satu, akwat akanykaoŋon ka akaisaoŋon ka lukany,"
Ezra2:9 Idwe luka Sakai, akwat akanykaarei ka akaisakanykape,"
Ezra2:10 Idwe luka Bani, akwat akanykape ka akaisaoŋon ka luarei."
Ezra2:11 Idwe luka Bebai, akwat akanykape ka akaisaarei ka luuni."
Ezra2:12 Idwe luka Asagad, elukumit ka akwat aarei ka akaisaarei ka luarei,"
Ezra2:13 Idwe luka Adonikam, akwat akanykape ka akaisakanykape ka lukanykape."
Ezra2:14 Idwe luka Bigibai, ilukumin iarei ka akaisakany ka lukanykape."
Ezra2:15 Idwe luka Adin, akwat aoŋon ka akaisakany ka luoŋon."
Ezra2:16 Idwe luka Ater, luka Kesekia, akaisakanykaoŋon ka lukanykauni,"
Ezra2:17 Idwe luka Besai, akwat auni ka akaisaarei ka luuni."
Ezra2:18 Idwe luka Yora, akwatat ka itomon ka luarei."
Ezra2:19 Idwe luka Kasum, akwat aarei ka akaisaarei ka luuni."
Ezra2:20 Idwe luka Gibar, akaisakanykaoŋon ka lukany."
Ezra2:21 Idwe luka Bet-lekem, akwatat ka akaisaarei ka luuni."
Ezra2:22 Ituŋa luka Netopa, akaisakany ka lukanykape."
Ezra2:23 Ituŋa luka Anatot, akwatat ka akaisaarei ka lukanykauni."
Ezra2:24 Idwe luka Asamabet, akaisaoŋon ka luarei,"
Ezra2:25 Idwe luka Kiriat-arim, ka Kepira ka Beerot, akwat akanykaarei ka akaisaoŋon ka luuni."
Ezra2:26 Idwe luka Rama ka Geba, akwat akanykape ka akaisaarei ka ediopet."
Ezra2:27 Ituŋa luka Mikimas, akwatat ka akaisaarei ka luarei."
Ezra2:28 Ituŋa luka Bet-el ka Ai, akwat aarei ka akaisaarei ka luuni."
Ezra2:29 Idwe luka Nebo, akaisakany ka luarei."
Ezra2:30 Idwe luka Magabis, akwatat ka akaisakany ka lukanykape."
Ezra2:31 Idwe luka Elam ece, elukumit ka akwat aarei ka akaisakany ka luonon."
Ezra2:32 Idwe luka Karim, akwat auni ka akaisaarei."
Ezra2:33 Idwe luka Lod, ka Kadid, ka Ono, akwat akanykaarei ka akaisaarei ka lukany."
Ezra2:34 Idwe luka Yeriko, akwat auni ka akaisaoŋon ka lukany."
Ezra2:35 Idwe luka Senaa, ilukumin iuni ka akwat akanykape ka akaisauni."
Ezra2:36 Isasedotin: idwe luka Yedaia, lukotogo loka Yesua, akwat akanykaoŋon ka akaisakanykaarei ka luuni."
Ezra2:37 Idwe luka Imer, elukumit ka akaisakany ka luarei."
Ezra2:38 Idwe luka Pasur, elukumit ka akwat aarei ka akaisaoŋon ka lukanykaarei."
Ezra2:39 Idwe luka Karim, elukumit ka itomon ka lukanykaarei."
Ezra2:40 Ilebin: idwe luka Yesua ka Kadamiel, lukodwe luka Kodabia, akaisakanykaarei ka luonon."
Ezra2:41 Ikayook: idwe luka Asap, akwatat ka akaisaarei ka lukanykauni."
Ezra2:42 Idwe luka ikagolok: idwe luka Salum, idwe luka Ater, idwe luka Talumon, idwe luka Akub, idwe luka Katita, idwe luka Sobai, kes kere akwatat ka akaisauni ka lukanykaonon."
Ezra2:43 Inetinim: idwe luka Sika, idwe luka Kasupa, idwe luka Tabaot:"
Ezra2:44 idwe luka Keros, idwe luka Siaka, idwe luka Padon;"
Ezra2:45 idwe luka Lebana, idwe luka Kagaba, idwe luka Akub;"
Ezra2:46 idwe luka Kagab, idwe luka Samalai, idwe luka Kanan;"
Ezra2:47 idwe luka Gidel, idwe luka Gakar, idwe luka Reaia;"
Ezra2:48 idwe luka Resin, idwe luka Nekoda, idwe luka Gasam;"
Ezra2:49 idwe luka Usa, idwe luka Pasea, idwe luka Besai;"
Ezra2:50 idwe luka Asana, idwe luka Meunim, idwe luka Nepisim;"
Ezra2:51 idwe luka Bakabuk, idwe luka Kakupa, idwe luka Karur;"
Ezra2:52 idwe luka Basulut, idwe luka Mekida, idwe luka Karasa;"
Ezra2:53 idwe luka Barakos, idwe luka Sisera, idwe luka Tema;"
Ezra2:54 idwe luka Nesia, idwe da luka Katipa."
Ezra2:55 Idwe luka ikejaanakinak luka Solomon: idwe luka Sotai, idwe luka Kasoperet, idwe luka Peruda;"
Ezra2:56 idwe luka Yaala, idwe luka Darakon, idwe luka Gidel;"
Ezra2:57 idwe luka Sepatia, idwe luka Kati!, idwe luka Pokeretkasebaim, idwe luka Ami."
Ezra2:58 Inetinim kere, ka idwe luka ikejaanakinak luka Solomon emwaasi akwat auni ka akaisakanykaoŋon ka luarei."
Ezra2:59 Lu kes luapotu konyout koTel-mela, Tel-karasa, Kerub, Adan, ka Imer: konye mam apedorete aitodun ikekia luka lukapapaakee, ka auriokee, arai araas luka Isirael."
Ezra2:60 Idwe luka Delaia, idwe luka Tobia, idwe luka Nekoda, akwat akanykape ka akaisakany ka luarei."
Ezra2:61 Ka idwe luka isasedotin: idwe luka Kabaia, idwe luka Kakos, idwe luka Barasilai, loamanyit aberu kadwe nuka Barasilai Egileadit, loaponi komaikinai ekirorikee."
Ezra2:62 Komoata nul ikiroriakee mama kanul kaluaponi kimarakinitete kwape ajaar akeeeurio, konye mam apotu kotakanut: kanuka ŋun eomitos ebe emunauna kesi, kirenearai kes kosasedotene."
Ezra2:63 Kolimok Etirusata kes ebe mam enyamete iboro lukalaunak noi, aitodol naejaunia esasedoti loeiaas Urim ka Tumin."
Ezra2:64 Ekodet kere nepepe emwaasi ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka luarei, ka akwat auni ka akaisakanykape,"
Ezra2:65 komam imarakina ikeiaanakinakakec ka akejaanakinakakee, luemwaasi ilukumin ikanykaarei ka akwat auni ka akaisauni ka lukanykaarei: ajaas da ikiliok lukayook ka aŋor nukayook akwat aarei."
Ezra2:66 Emwaasi ibalasinikee akwat akanykaarei ka’ akaisauni ka lukanykape; inyubunukee akwat aarei ka akaisaoŋon ka lukany;
Ezra2:67 akaalaikee, akwat aoŋon ka akaisauni ka nukany; asigiria alukumin akanykape ka akwat akanykaarei ka akaisaarei."
Ezra2:68 Apotu ice luka ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapakee koinakis ketau loekot adukio etogo loka Edeke kaiboisike, nakedolioto togo loka EJAKAIT loejai Yerusalem."
Ezra2:69 Koinakis kwape apedoriata toma aiŋadis naka aswam idarikin ilukumin akaisakanykape ka lodiopet luka esabu, ka ilatirin ilukumin ikany luka epuesa, ka inapen akwatat luka isasedotin."
Ezra2:70 Kwaŋin kiboienenete isasedotin, ka Ilebin, ka ice kotuna, ka ikayook, ka ikagolok ka Inetinim koreriakee, ka Isirael kere koreriakee."
Ezra3:1 Nakedolio elap lokikanyetekaarei, kojaas idwe luka Isirael oreria lukapolok, kotukonokinos ituŋa ketau ediopet Yerusalem."
Ezra3:2 Kosodi kobwo Yesua okoku laka Yosadak, ka ikeinaean isasedotin, ka Serubabel okoku laka Sealutiel, ka ikeinaean, kodukoto etem laka Edeke loka Isirael, ainanakinia kanen ainakineta nuicweio, kwape kiwadikatere kokisila luka Musa etuŋanan loka Edeke."
Ezra3:3 Kosipokis etem aiboisike; naarai akuriaka kesi ituŋa luka akwapin kanun: koinanakis kanen ainakineta nuieweio neejai EJAKAIT, ainakineta nuieweio tupuruc ka eboŋ,"
Ezra3:4 Koricata epueit loka iswamin, kwape kiwadikatere, koinakis ainakineta nuicweio nuka ŋinipaaran kwape eiaar etiaikec, kwape eiaar aicorakinet, kwape ibusakinitor ninipaaran;"
Ezra3:5 kokau ainakinet naicweio natir, ka ainakineta nuka nailamununia elap, ka nuka ipueino kere luka EJAKAIT lueeorakinitai luatiakunitai, ka nuka nmitunanan yenabu koinak atai ainakinet naka akot neejai EJAKAIT."
Ezra3:6 Apaaran nasodit naka elap lokikanyetekaarei ŋes ageuniata ainakin ainakineta nuieweio neejai EJAKAIT: konye korina kesipokina apeteta nuka eyekalu loka EJAKAIT,"
Ezra3:7 Koinakis da ikadukok ka ikekeok apesan; ka lunyaman ka lumatan ka akinyet neejaas luko Sidon, ka luko Turo, alemun iresia koLebanon ayaun kiton aŋolol kiton Yopa, kwape kejaar aeamakinet naka Kuro eka baka loko Perusia."
Ezra3:8 Kosodi kokaru lokiareit laka aponarekee togo laka Edeke Yerusalem, olap lokiareit, kogeu Serubabel okoku loka Sealutiel, ka Yesua okoku laka Yosadak, ka ice koinacanakec isasedotin ka Ilebin, ka ŋul kere luabonunete Yerusalem kaijoreorio; kodakakis Ilebin luadaunitos ikar akaisaarei kadepar, aroanar aswam naka etogo laka EJAKAIT."
Ezra3:9 Kosodi kobwo Yesua nepepe kodweke ka ikeinaean, Kadumiel da ka odweke, odwe luka Yuda kere nepepe, aroanar ikeswamak luka etogo laka Edeke: odwe luka Kenadad ka odwekec ka ikeceinacan Ilebin."
Ezra3:10 Nakibwaikiniata ikadukok apeteta nuka eyekalu laka EJAKAIT, kisibwaata isasedotin enapitos ikecenapen ekapitos arupepen, ka Ilebin odwe luka Asap ekapitos aisinin, airuritor EJAKAIT, kwape kitemonokinitor Daudi ekabaka loka Isirael."
Ezra3:11 Komeanakinos ayoore aiturit ka aimal EJAKAIT ebe, “Naarai ejok ŋesi, naarai ejaenena akeitim ikar kere mama ejai Isirael.” Kikareoto ituŋa kere keporoto loepol, nakituritotor EJAKAIT, naarai ebwaikin apetetait naka etogo loka EJAKAIT."
Ezra3:12 Konye luipu lukosasedotin ka Ilebin, ka ikapolok luka ikekia, imakio Iuapotu koanyut etogo losodit, napibwaikinio apetetait naka etogo kalo kakonyenekee, komonyata keporoto loepol; luipu da kikareoto kanuka aiyalama:"
Ezra3:13 komam ituŋa apedorete atiakun eporoto laka ekare kanuka aiyalama ka eporoto loka aimony naka ituŋa; naarai kikareoto ituŋa keporoto loepol, kiirarai ekare kama elwana."
Ezra4:1 Kepuputu da lukasurupo luka Yuda ka Benyamin ebe adukoto idwe Iuejoreoritai eyekalu loka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael;"
Ezra4:2 kikunyakis kesi neejai Serubabel, ka ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapakee, kobalas ebe, “Mere kadukoto nepepe kayes: naarai kimoot isio Ekusideke, kwape kayesi; kiinakini isio ŋes asuban ageun kapaarasia nuka Esar-kadon ekabaka loka Asuria lokitodokuni sio nee.”"
Ezra4:3 Konye Serubabel, ka Yesua ka ice kere luka ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapa luka Isirael, kotemasi kes atiar, “Mam kipuda yes aimorikikin kasio kotoma aiduk etogo loka Ekosideke; konye sic kiduki bonik etogo loka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, kwape abu Kuro ekabaka loko Perusia kicorakinia.”"
Ezra4:4 Kosodete ituŋa luka akwap kitakalanyanata akanin nuka ituŋa luka Yuda, kisiyalononoto kes kotoma aiduk,"
Ezra4:5 koropata ikapetak akiro aluikin kes, aitikokin akeeeinerun, apaarasia kere nuka Kuro ekabaka loko Perusia, aitodol naerumia Dario ekabaka loko Perusia."
Ezra4:6 Kairum naka Akasuero, ageunet naka airumuke, kiwadikata aosan lukiboiete ko Yuda ka Yerusalem."
Ezra4:7 Kapaarasia nuka Aratasasata apotu Bisilam, ka Mituredat, ka Tabeel, ka lukaupake ice kere, kiwadikata mama ejai Aratasasata ekabaka loko Perusia; ewadikatai ebalua keiwadikae loka Suria, kanaiep naka Isurian."
Ezra4:8 Kiwadikata Rekum lokebuku, ka Simisai ekewadikan ebalua mama ejai Aratasasata ekabaka asurokin Yerusalem kopone kalo:"
Ezra4:9 Kosodete kiwadikata Rekum lokebuku, ka Simisai ekewadikan, ka iukaupakec ice kere; Idinaitin, Iparasatakain, Itarapelin, Ipasian, Irakebain, Ibabulonin, Isusanikin, Idekain, Ilamein,"
Ezra4:10 ka atekerin ace kere nukitwobotuni Osunapar lokapolon lokaibuses, kibwaik ore loka Samaria, ka akwap ace da okekwa juwai, ka ace da,"
Ezra4:11 Ikopuna nu kobalua lokijukakinete kesi: “Aratasasata ekabaka: Ikonikejaanakinak, ituŋa luka okekwa juwai, ka ace da."
Ezra4:12 Kojen ekabaka ebe adolut Iyudayan luanyounete kamakon mamakosi Yerusalem; edukete ere lokepali lokaronon da, adaut arwatatin, eteteut da apeteta."
Ezra4:13 Aso kojen ekabaka ebe, arai keduki ere lo, kodaunai da arwatatin, mam kes elemete esolo loka ituŋa, ka esolo loka iboro, ka esolo loka ikalotok da, kosodi kokau etwakiarete ikabakan."
Ezra4:14 Aso do naarai kinyami abalaŋ naka etogo loka ekabaka, mam ibus sio aanyun aitisilio naka ekabaka, kanuka nun kijukakinit aiteienikin ekabaka;"
Ezra4:15 konicai oitabo loka aisiitonokin loka lukapapakon: kwaŋin idumuni koitabo loka aisiitonokin ijenuni kwape eraar ere lo ere lokepali, loitisili ikabakan ka ibukui, ebe da apotu kipaliikis apeŋo kotomake: kanuka nun da amudiarere ere lo."
Ezra4:16 Kitejenunit ekabaka ebe, arai keduki ere lo, kodaunai da arwatatin, kanuka nun mam ijaun ijo kewai okekwa juwai.”"
Ezra4:17 Kosodi ekabaka aiiukar aboŋokin mama ejai Rekum lokebuku, ka Simisai ekewadikan, ka lukaupakee ice kere lukiboiete ko Samaria, kakwap ace nakokekwa juwai ebe, “Kinapakinos, ka ace da."
Ezra4:18 Aponi kasomakin eoŋ kaitebeikin ebalua lokijukakinete yesi sio.
Ezra4:19 Kebwaik ekisil, komoata, apotu kodumutu ebe ere ŋol ageun apeŋo ebilanakini ikabakan ebotet aipaliikin ka amwanit da inerununoo kotomake."
Ezra4:20 Ido ajaenenas ikabakan lukagogon luapolokinete Yerusalem, luayaitos akwap kere okekwa iuwai; ataeanakinio kes esolo loka ituŋa, esolo loka iboro, ka esolo loka ikalotok da."
Ezra4:21 Aso do kibwaikisi ekisil, kitananata ituŋa lu aswam, kinyek ere ŋol adukio, aitodol naebwaikinia eoŋ ekisil."
Ezra4:22 Koeoito kinyeis aijalakin kanun: kanukinyo tikepolooror aronis aitwataniar ikabakan?”
Ezra4:23 Kosodi kesomi aikopunet naka ebalua loka eka baka Aratasasata kakonyen nuka Rekum, ka Simisai ekewadikan ka lukaupakec, kisunyas atipet alosit Yerusalem mama ejaas Iyudayan, kitananata aswamukee kagogon ka apedor."
Ezra4:24 Kosodi aswam nakotogo loka Edeke loejai Yerusalem aitananio; aponi kitananai aitodol okaru lokiareit loka airum naka Dario ekabaka loko Perusia.
Ezra5:1 Kosodete inabin, Kagai enabi, ka Sekaria okoku loka Ido, kodwarakis Iyudayan luajaas koYuda ka Yerusalem: kokiror loka Edeke loka Isirael ŋes adwarakiniata kes."
Ezra5:2 Kosodi Serubabel okoku loka Sealutiel ka Yesua okoku loka Yosadak anyoun, kogeutu aiduk etogo loka Edeke loejai Yerusalem; kojaas da nepepe kakes inabin luka Edeke kiŋarakinito,"
Ezra5:3 Kapaarasia kaŋun kobu Tatenai ekayaiton loka ekekwa juwai, ka Setarbosenai ka lukaupakec mama ejaas, kotemasi kes atiar, “Iŋai bo kiinakini yes ekisil aiduk etogo lo, ka adaun da arwatat na?”"
Ezra5:4 Kasodete aboŋokin kes kwanata ebe, “Lukaŋai bo ikiroria luka ituŋa luedukete etogo lo?”"
Ezra5:5 Konye itei akoŋu naka Edekekec imakio luka lyudayan, komam itanaŋio aswamukec, aitodol neitodolikinere akiro neejai Dario, kosodi adumun aboŋokinet kobalua kanuka akiro kaŋun."
Ezra5:6 Aikopunet naka ebalua loejukakinete Tatenai ekayaiton loka ekekwa juwai, ka Setar-bosenai, ka lukaupake Iparasakain luajaas okekwa juwai, mama ejai Dario ekabaka:"
Ezra5:7 kijukasi ebalua loewadikatai kwanata ebe:” Mama ejai ekabaka Dario ainapakin kere.
Ezra5:8 Kojenu ekabaka ebe kipou kapotu obuku loka Yuda, togo loka Edeke lokapolon loedukitai kamor nuepolok, ido ibwaikinitai akito toma arwatatin, aswam na da elosi iyatanakin kakukuranut ka arereŋ kotoma akaninikec."
Ezra5:9 Kasodete aiŋit imakio ŋul katemasi kes atiar, ‘Iŋai bo kiinakini yes ekisil aiduk etogo lo, ka adaun da arwatat na?’"
Ezra5:10 Keŋitata da ikiroriakec, aitejenun jo, tetere kiwadikai ikiroria luka ituŋa lueyaitos kes."
Ezra5:11 Kosodete kesi aboŋokin ebe, ‘Kirai isio ikejaanakinak luka Edeke loka akuj ka akwap, kiduki da etogo lokedukitoi apeŋo ikar kwi luipu, loabu ekabaka lokapolon loka Isirael kodaunite aiduk."
Ezra5:12 Konye kokau kitunyunyurikis lukapapaakosi Edeke loka akuj, kijaik kes akan naka Nebukadanesar ekabaka loko Babulon Ekaludayat, loabu komudia etogo lo, koŋata da ituŋa Babulon."
Ezra5:13 Konye kokaru losodit loka Kuro ekabaka loko Babulon, abu ekabaka Kuro kibwaik ekisil aiduk etogo lo loka Edeke."
Ezra5:14 Iboro da luka esabu ka luka epuesa luka etogo loka Edeke, luabu Nebukadanesar koŋat koyekalu loajai Yerusalem koyaŋa oyekalu loka Babulon, kolem ekabaka Kuro ŋul koyekalu loka Babulon, aponi koinakinai etuŋanan ekekiror Sesebasar, loetaraunit ekayaiton."
Ezra5:15 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Koyaŋa iboro lu, kolot kibwaik toma oyekalu loejai Yerusalem, kodukoi etogo loka Edeke kaiboisike.”"
Ezra5:16 Kosodi Sesebasar abunore, kibwaik apeteta nuka etogo loka Edeke loejai Yerusalem: netikolo ageunere kapaarasia kaŋun kiton kwana eriŋa ca edukio, konye mam edauna.’"
Ezra5:17 Aso do arai itojokit ekabaka, komoai toma aiŋadis naka ekabaka naejai Babulon arai ikote nen, ebe kibwaik Kuro eka baka ekisil aiduk etogo lo loka Edeke Yerusalem, kijuka ekabaka nuitojokit ŋesi kakiro kaŋun,”"
Ezra6:1 Kosodi Dario ekabaka aibwaikin ekisil, komoai togo loka iitabon, neeŋadanakinio iboro luka akais nuipu koBabulon."
Ezra6:2 Kodumunai anunuket koAkameta, kotogo lokapolon loejai obuku loka Media, aponi kiwadikatete tomake kwanata araut aisiitunet."
Ezra6:3 “Kokaru losodit loka Kuro ekabaka, kibwaik Kuro ekabaka ekisil; Kanuka etogo loka Edeke koYerusalem, kodukoi etogo aibois naainanakinere asuban, kopesikinai apeteta kagogoŋ; amukururuke ikubitin akaisakanykape, alalauke ikubitin akaisakanykape;"
Ezra6:4 ikokoron iuni luka amor nukapolok, ka ekokoro loka akito nukitetiak: kotaeakinai etiaikec kotogo loka ekabaka:"
Ezra6:5 kinyakarai da iboro luka esabu ka luka epuesa luka etogo loka Edeke lualemari Nebukadanesar koyekalu loejai Yerusalem luayauni Babulon, koyaŋaarai bobo oyekalu loejai Yerusalem, ŋinibore aiboisike, ibwaikini kes togo loka Edeke,”"
Ezra6:6 “Aso do, Tatenai lokebuku loka okekwa juwai, ka Setar-bosenai, ka lukaupakus Iparasakain luejaas okekwa juwai, kogitaros yesi:"
Ezra6:7 kinyeis aswam naka etogo kala loka Edeke; koduk ekayaiton loka Iyudayan ka imakio luka Iyudayan etogo lo loka Edeke aiboisike.
Ezra6:8 Bobo da ebwaikin ekisil nuiswamakinete imakio lu luka Iyudayan aiduk etogo lo loka Edeke: koinakinai koboro luka ekabaka, ŋes esolo lokokekwa juwai, kotacakinai ituŋa lu kainyikokin, kinyeis aitikokinio."
Ezra6:9 Iboro da luiburao, imoŋin lutoba, ka imerekekin, ka imerekekin ludidik, araun ainakineta nuieweio mama ejai Edeke loka akuj, akima, ka abalaŋ, ka ebino ka akinyet, kwape ejaananar akirot naka isasedotin lueiaas Yerusalem, koinanakinete ŋinipaaran komam aisal."
Ezra6:10 Tetere einanakinete asuban nuka asakat naeuru saa mama ejai Edeke loka akui, kilipanakinete aijar naka ekabaka ka naka odweke da."
Ezra6:11 Ebwaik da ekisil ebe, loijulanakini akirot na, koketunai akitoi kotogoke, kodakarai ŋes koenikinai neni korau eketogo ameje."
Ezra6:12 Edeke da loabu kibwaik ekekiror ŋina isibirori ikabakan kere ka atekerin, luerionorete akecekanin aijulakin akirot, amudiar etogo lo loka Edeke loejai Yerusalem. Eoŋ Dario ebwaik ekisil; kiswamai kainyikokin kere.”"
Ezra6:13 Kosodi Tatenai, lokebuku lokokekwa juwai, ka Setar-bosenai, ka lukaupakec, naarai ejuku ekabaka Dario, kiswamata kwaŋin kainyikokin kere,"
Ezra6:14 Kodukoto imakio luka Iyudayan kokeriakata da, kanuka aidwar naka Kagai enabi ka Sekaria okoku loka Ido. Kodukoto kodautu, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka Edeke loka Isirael, kwape ajaar ekisil loka Kuro, ka Dario, ka Aratasasata ekabaka loko Perusia."
Ezra6:15 Kodaun etogo lo kapaaran nakiwuniet naka elap Adar, kokaru lokikanyetekape loka airum naka Dario ekabaka."
Ezra6:16 Kosodete idwe luka Isirael, ka isasedotin, ka Ilebin, ka luedeuna luka idwe luka aijoreorio, koricata atiakunio naka etogo lo loka Edeke kaiyalama."
Ezra6:17 Koinakis kanuka atiakunio naka etogo lo loka Edeke, imoŋin lutoba akwatat, imerekekin akwat aarei, imerekekin ludidik akwat aoŋon; ido ikorwa itomon ka luarei araut ainakinet naka adiakaret naka Isirael kere, kwape ajaar etiai loka atekerin nuka Isirael."
Ezra6:18 Kibwaikis isasedotin katukonokee, ka Ilebin kabeanakinikee, aijaanakin Edeke, loejai Yerusalem; kwape ewadikatere oitabo loka Musa,"
Ezra6:19 Korieata idwe luka aijoreorio aleleŋ kapaaran nakitomonet kaonon naka elap losodit.
Ezra6:20 Naarai etesegara isasedotin ka Ilebin; araas kere luasegara: koarata Iukalelen kanuka idwe kere luka aijoreorio, ka iinaeanakec isasedotin, kanukee da bonik."
Ezra6:21 Konyama idwe luka Isirael, luapotu kobonutu kaijoreorio, ka nul da kere luapotu kogitara anyoun kotoma asilianut naka ikapirin luka akwap, amoot EJAKAIT Edeke loka Isirael."
Ezra6:22 Korieata epueit loka imugatin lumam itubuunitoi apaarasia akanykaarei kaiyalama: naarai abu EJAKAIT kisiyalamik kes, abu kijulakinite etau loka ekabaka loka Asuria neeiaas, aitogogoŋ akecekanin kaswam naka etogo loka Edeke, Edeke loka Isirael."
Ezra7:1 Akaulo kanun, kairum naka Aratasasata ekabaka loko Perusia, Esera okoku loka Seraia, okoku loka Asaria, okoku loka Kilikia,"
Ezra7:2 okoku loka Salum, okoku loka Sadok, okoku loka Akitub,"
Ezra7:3 okoku loka Amaria, okoku loka Asaria, okoku loka Meraiot,"
Ezra7:4 okoku loka Serakia, okoku loka Usi, okoku loka Buki,"
Ezra7:5 koku loka Abisua, okoku loka Pinekas, okoku loka Eleasar, okoku loka Aaron esasedoti lopeti:"
Ezra7:6 abu Esera ŋol konyou abunore koBabulon; kerai ŋesi ekewadikan loakapakina kokisila luka Musa luabu EJAKAIT Edeke loka Isirael koinak: koinak ekabaka ŋes kere nuabu kilip, kanuka akan naka EJAKAIT Ekedeke naajai kaŋes."
Ezra7:7 Koloto ice kodwe luka Isirael, ka luka isasedotin, ka Ilebin, ka ikayook, ka ikagolok, ka Inetinim, kopotu Yerusalem, kokaru lokikanyetekaarei loka Aratasasata ekabaka,"
Ezra7:8 Kobu neai Yerusalem kolap lokikanyet kokaru lokikanyetekaarei loka ekabaka.
Ezra7:9 Naarai kapaaran nasodit naka elap losodit ŋes ageunia ŋesi anyoun koBabulon, kapaaran da nasodit naka elap lokikanyet ŋes adolio Yerusalem, kanuka akan nakaiokan naka Ekedeke naaiai kaŋes,"
Ezra7:10 Naarai abu Esera kibwaikinite eketau amoot ikisila luka EJAKAIT, ka aiswamaenen da, ka aisisianakin toma Isirael ikisila ka itubesia."
Ezra7:11 Na ŋes aikopunet naka ebalua loabu ekabaka Aratasasata koinak Esera esasedoti, ekewadikan, ŋes ekewadikan loka akiro nuka aicorakineta nuka EJAKAIT, ka loka ikisilake mama ejai Isirael."
Ezra7:12 “Aratasasata, ekabaka loka ikabakan, mama ejai Esera esasedoti, ekewadikan loka ikisila luka Edeke laka akuj, loedolit, ka ace da."
Ezra7:13 Ebwaikini ekisil, mama ejaas ŋul kere lukotuna luka Isirael, ka ikecesasedotin, ka Ilebin, lukotoma ayaetaitika, luekotos alosit Yerusalem kanukec, kouparos kaio,"
Ezra7:14 Naarai kijukarit jo ekabaka ka ikekenerunak ikanykaarei, aiŋitun akiro nuka Yuda ka Yerusalem, kwape ejaatar ikisila luka Edekekon lueiaas akanikon;"
Ezra7:15 koyana da epuesa ka esa bu, luainakis ekabaka ka ikekenerunak kanukec mama ejai Edeke loka Isirael, loiboienenei koYerusalem."
Ezra7:16 Epuesa da ka esabu kere loidumuni kobuku kere loko Babulon, nepepe ka ainakineta nuka akot nuka ituŋa ka nuka isasedotin, nuainakinete kanukee kanuka etogo loka Edekekec loejai Yerusalem;"
Ezra7:17 ŋes ibusakinitor ainyikokin noi agwel kiboro kalu imoŋin lutoba, imerekekin, imerekekin ludidik, ka ainakinetakec nuka akiria, ka ainakinetakee numatan, ijaikini kotem loka etogo loka Edekekus loejai Yerusalem."
Ezra7:18 Ŋinibore kere yenitojoki jo ka ikoniinaean aitwasamaa epuesa ka esabu loedeuna, kiswamata kwape ekotor Ekusideke,"
Ezra7:19 Iboro da lukiinakinio kanuka aijaanakin nakotogo loka Ekusideke, koinak kakonyen nuka Edeke laka Yerusalem."
Ezra7:20 Ido luipudai kere aiyatakin luibusakinito ainakin kanuka etogo laka Ekonideke, koinak kotogo lokainad loka ekabaka."
Ezra7:21 “Eoŋ da, eoŋ Aratasasata ekabaka, ebwaik ekisil mama ejaas ikeŋadak kere luejaas okekwa juwai, nukilipi yes Esera esasedoti, ekewadikan laka ikisila luka Edeke loka akuj, kiswamaenenete kainyikokinit kere."
Ezra7:22 Kiton atalatan akwatat nuka epuesa, ka aitemisio akwatat nuka akima, ka akaalakanya akwatat nuka ebino, ka akaalakanya akwatat nuka akinyet, ka abalaŋ namam ebilunitai etiaike."
Ezra7:23 Ŋin naecorakinit Edeke loka akui, kiswamaenenete cut kanuka etogo loka Edeke laka akuj; naarai kanukinyo ti kebunokinia anyunyura ayaetait naka ekabaka ka odweke?"
Ezra7:24 Ido kitejenuni yes nuka isasedotin ka Ilebin, ikayook, ikagolok, Inetinim, arai ikejaanakinak luka etogo kala loka Edeke, timam ibusakinit atubokin kes esolo laka ituŋa, esolo laka iboro, karaida esolo laka ikalotok."
Ezra7:25 “Ŋo da Esera, kwape eiaar acoa naka Ekonideke naejai akanikon, koseu iiaka ka ikatubok, luetubonokinete ituŋa kere luejaas okekwa juwai, lueienete kere ikisila luka Ekonideke, ka ŋol da lomam ejeŋi kisisianakinete ŋes."
Ezra7:26 Ido ŋol lomam iyuuni aswam ikisila luka Edekekon, ka ikisila luka ekabaka, korubokin ŋes kainyikokin kere, arai naka aario, arai naka aireneario, arai naka ademario luke, arai naka aenio.”"
Ezra7:27 Kituritete EJAKAIT, Edeke laka lukapapaawok loebwaiki akirot naetia nen otau laka ekabaka aitubus etogo loka EJAKAIT loejai Yerusalem;"
Ezra7:28 loetalala aitim mamaka kakonyen nuka ekabaka, ka ikekenerunak, kakonyen da nuka ikapolok kere lukagogon luka ekabaka. Kagogonoor kanuka akan naka EJAKAIT Ekadeke naajai keoŋ, katukok kotoma Isirael ikapolok aupar kaeon."
Ezra8:1 Lu kes ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakec, na da ŋes aur naka nul kaluauparos kaeon anyoun koBabulon, kairum naka Aratasasata ekabaka."
Ezra8:2 Kodwe luka Pinekas, Geresom: kodwe luka Itamar, Daniel: kodwe luka Daudi, Katus,"
Ezra8:3 Kodwe luka Sekania; kodwe luka Paros, Sekaria: nepepe kaŋes aponi kimarakinitete kaur naka ikiliok akwatat ka akaisakany."
Ezra8:4 Kodwe luka Pakat-moab, Eliekoenai okoku loka Serakia; nepepc kaŋes da ikiliok akwat aarei."
Ezra8:5 Kodwe luka Sekania, okoku Ioka Yakasiel; nepepe kaŋes da ikiliok akwat auni."
Ezra8:6 Kodwe luka Adin, Ebed okoku loka Yonatan; nepepe kaŋes da ikiliok akaisakany."
Ezra8:7 Kodwe luka Elam, Yesaia okoku loka Atalia; nepepe kaŋes da ikiliok akaisakanykaarei."
Ezra8:8 Kodwe luka Sepatia, Sebadia okoku loka Mikael; nepepe kaŋes da ikiliok akaisakanykauni."
Ezra8:9 Kodwe luka Yoab, Obadia okoku loka Yekiel; nepepe kaŋes da ikiliok akwat aarei ka itomon ka lukanykauni."
Ezra8:10 Kodwe luka Selomit, okoku loka Yosipia; nepepe kaŋes da ikiliok akwatat ka akaisakanykape."
Ezra8:11 Kodwe luka Bebai, Sekaria okoku loka Bebai; nepepe kaŋes da ikiliok akaisaarei ka lukanykauni."
Ezra8:12 Kodwe luka Asagad, Yokanan okoku loka Kakatan; nepepe kaŋes da ikiliok akwatat ka itomon."
Ezra8:13 Kodwe luka Adonikam, lukawasia; lu kes ikeeekiroria, Elipelet, Yeuel, ka Semaia, nepepe kakes da ikiliok akaisakanykape."
Ezra8:14 Kodwe luka Bigibai, Utai ka Sabud; nepepe kakes da ikiliok akaisakanykaarei."
Ezra8:15 Katukonok kes toma ocor loelelei Akaba; kipou kedukuro adaun apaarasia auni: kanic ituŋa, ka isasedotin, komam edumuna ediopet kodwe luka Lebi."
Ezra8:16 Kasodi anyaraun Elieser, ka Ariel, ka Semaia, ka Elunatan, ka Yarib, ka Elunatan, ka Natan, ka Sekaria, ka Mesulam, ituŋa Jukapolok; ka Yoiarib, ka Elunatan, luaraas ikesisianakinak."
Ezra8:17 Kejuka kes neejai Ido ekapolon loka aibois Kasipia; kalimok nuelimokinete Ido, ka ikeinaean Inetinim, kaibois Kasipia, tetere kiinunete sio ikejaanakinak luka etogo loka Edekewok."
Ezra8:18 Kanuka akan nakajokan naka Edekewok naaiai kaoni, koinutu etuŋanan lokaeoa, lokodwe luka Mali, okoku loka Lebi, okoku loka Isirael; ka Serebia, ka odweke ka iinaeanake, itomon ka lukanykauni;"
Ezra8:19 ka Kasabia, ido nepepe kaŋes Yesaia lokodwe luka Merari, iinaeanake ka odwekec, akaisaarei;"
Ezra8:20 luka Inetinim, luapotu Daudi ka ikapolok koinakis aiiaanakin Ilebin, Inetinim akwat aarei ka akaisaarei: kolimoroi kere ikecekiroria."
Ezra8:21 Kasodi alimor ailuŋ kaŋina, kocor Akaba, tetere kitasonikin kakonyen nuka Edekewok, aimo kaneejai ŋesi erot loitenara, lowok, ka loka idwewok ludidik, ka loka iborowok kere."
Ezra8:22 Naarai keleicik ailip ekabaka erioŋet loka iserikalei ka ikebwanenok aiganakin korot kama ejaas lukasurup: naarai kipou kenerata kekabaka ebe, “Akan naka Edekekosi ejai kanul kere kaluemoete ŋes, kanuka ajokis; konye apedorike ka anyunyurake eluikini nul kere luinyeinete ŋes.”"
Ezra8:23 Kipou do kaluŋata, kenainaata Edekewok akirot nin: kiira ŋesi ainainakosi."
Ezra8:24 Kasodi atiakun itomon ka luarei kokapolok luka isasedotin, Serebia, ka Kasabia, ka itomon koinaeanakee kakes,"
Ezra8:25 ketemok kes epuesa, ka esabu, ka iboro, ŋes ainakinet kanuka etogo loka Edekewok naainak ekabaka ka ikekenerunak, ka ikapolokoke, ka Isirael kere luajaas nen:"
Ezra8:26 Ketemok cut akanikee atalatan nuka epuesa akwat akanykape ka akaisakany, ka iboro luka epuesa atalatan akwatat; esabu da atalatan akwatat:"
Ezra8:27 ka atiboi nuka esabu akaisaarei nuka idarikin elukumit; ka iboro iarei luka aisinit naejok naiputut, luka akais nuipu bala esabu."
Ezra8:28 Kabala kes atiar, “Iraas yesi lukalaunak mama ejai EJAKAIT, iboro da eraas lukalaunak; epuesa ka esabu kes ainakinet naka akot mama ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakus."
Ezra8:29 Kokwenyete, kidarete; aitodol naitemioto kes kakonyen nuka ijaka luka isasedotin ka Ilebin, ka ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaa luka Isirael, koYerusalem, kotoma agolai nuka etogo loka EJAKAIT,”"
Ezra8:30 Kesodete isasedotin ka Ilebin aijaun aitemis naka epuesa ka esabu, ka iboro, ayaŋaar Yerusalem togo loka Edekewok."
Ezra8:31 Kasodete kanyout koeor Akaba kapaaran nakitomonet kaarei naka elap losodit alosit Yerusalem: kojai akan naka Edekewok kaoni koyu kakan naka lukasurup ka ikaperunok korot,"
Ezra8:32 Kapotu Yerusalem, kadautu da apaarasia auni kanen."
Ezra8:33 Kapaaran nakiwononet aponi kitemoi epuesa ka esabu ka iboro kotogo loka Edekewok kakan naka Meremot okoku loka Uria esasedoti; nepepe kaŋes ajai Eleasar okoku loka Pinekas; nepepe kakes ajai Yosabad okoku loka Yesua, ka Noadia okoku loka Binui, Ilebin;"
Ezra8:34 kere kwape ejaar ekecetiai ka akecelanir da: kiwadikai alaniru kere kapakio kanun.
Ezra8:35 Koinakis idwe luka aijoreorio lukabonunok kaireneario ainakincta nuicweio mama ejai Edeke loka Isirael, imoŋin lutoba itomon ka luarei kanuka Isirael kere, imerekekin akaisakanykaoŋon ka lukanykape, imerekekin ludidik akaisakanykaarei ka lukanykaarei, ka ikorwa itomon ka luarei araut ainakinet naka adiakaret: koraunos nul kere ainakinet naicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Ezra8:36 Koinakis lukibukui luka ekabaka, ka ikayaitok lukokekwa juwai aicorakineta nuka ekabaka: kisigalikis ituŋa ka etogo loka Edeke."
Ezra9:1 Kosodi kedaut aswam akiro nun kere, kekunyakis ikapolok eoŋ, kobalasi atiar, “Mam etiakara ituŋa luka Isirael, ka isasedotin ka Ilebin kotuna luka akwapin, iswamaete kwape ejaatar italesiakee, luka Ikanaanin, ka Ikitin, ka Iperisin, ka Iyebusin, ka Imonain, ka Imoabin, ka Imisirian, ka Imorain da."
Ezra9:2 Naarai emanyete apesurukec, komanyanakinete odwekee da; kwaijin kinyalinyalun aur nakalaunan katekerin nuka akwapin: cebo, akan naka ikapolok ka ikayaitok ŋes ageiki adiakanar ŋin.”"
Ezra9:3 Naapupunio akirot nin, kacil anapitoka ka elouka, kenyul itima luka akouka ka lukopenekika, kasala eboie kaumokinit."
Ezra9:4 Kotukonokinos neaiai kere luamaranete kakiro nuka Edeke loka Isirael, kanuka aidiak naka nul kaluejoreoritai; kasala eboie kaumokinit aitodol ainakinet naka eboŋ."
Ezra9:5 Kosodi keinakini ainakinet naka eboŋ, kanyou kaisilarika, kociliciluna anapitoka ka elouka; kakukokini kakuninika, kariono akakanin mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekadeke;"
Ezra9:6 kener atiar, “Wu Ekadeke, keruma eoŋ ileic, kekamu aitirir aitonyoun akonyeneka mama ijai, wu Ekadeke: naarai eyatakinos numam adolitekosi adepar akwesikosi, apoloor agwaunitekosi adolo toma akuj."
Ezra9:7 Ageun kapaarasia nuka lukapapaakosi kidiakanari akiro nukos kiton lolo; kanuka numam adolitekosi, ŋes kiinakinere sio, ka ikosikabakan, ka isasedotinikosi akanin nuka ikabakan luka akwapin, neejai ekileŋ, ka aijoreorio, ka anasio, ka aisurumio da ileic, kwape lolo."
Ezra9:8 Kwana da, kapak naeuriana, etodun asianut naebuni kama ejai EJAKAIT Ekosideke, aideikin aatoŋot naaku, kainakini da sio aseitoit kaiboisike nakalaunan, kitacaik Edeke akosikonye, kainakini da adioisikwarunio kobulesenekosi."
Ezra9:9 Naarai kirai ibulesin; konye mam Edeke kinyeinit sio kobulesenekosi, konye kiyataki aitimio kakonyen nuka ikabakan luka Perusia, ainakin sio aikwarun, ka aiduk etogo loka Edekekosi, aiteteun da aaponoruke, ainakin da sio arwatat koYuda ka Yerusalem."
Ezra9:10 “Aso do, wu Edekekosi, kineri anu akaulo kanun? Naarai kipou kenyeis akoniicorakineta,"
Ezra9:11 nuibu kicorak kama kikonikejaanakinak inabin, ebe, ‘Akwap nailomarete airum, ŋes akwap namam elai kanuka amamus aila naka ituŋa luka akwapin, kanuka italesiakec, luesilelebata asilianutukec epuai kepuai da."
Ezra9:12 Aso do sirikikorakis akusipesur otelepaikec, karaida amanyanakin ikusitelepai akecepesur, siriikotononos ainapakinikee karaida asulianyikec ikar kere: tetere igogonooros, inyamete ajokis naka akwap, inyeiniata ikusidwe araun airumet ikar kere.’"
Ezra9:13 Ido kedautu nun adolokin sio kanuka aswamisiokosi nueroko, kanuka agwaun akiro nuepolok, naarai ijo Ekosideke ibu kitican sio kwabo mere kwape ibusakinitor numam adolitekosi, koinak sio aatoŋot kwape na."
Ezra9:14 Kibili kereka bobo isio aicorakinetakon, karaunos ikamurak luka atekerin nuiswamaete italesia nul? Ti mam kinyunyuranakini aitodol nekimudiaria, komamei aatoŋot, karaida luekuete?"
Ezra9:15 Wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, irai ijo loidolit; naarai kisalaki isio kirai aatoŋot naaku, kwape eiaar lolo: koany, kija kakonyenekon kagwaunetekosi; naarai emamei loepedori aibwo kakonyenekon kanuka nun.”"
Ezra10:1 Napilipi Esera, elimori, emonyi akiyo, isudedei koinaren ketogo loka Edeke, kotukokinos neaiai ŋesi koIsirael ekodet loepol noi loka ikiliok ka aijor ka idwe: naarai apotu ituŋa komonyata noi akiyo."
Ezra10:2 Koboŋok Sekania okoku loka Yekiel, ediopet kodwe luka Elam, kotema Esera atiar, “Kibuea kama ejai Edekewok, aimany aŋor numo nuka atekerin nuka akwap: konye kwape kwana ejai amunonut neejai Isirael kanuka nun,"
Ezra10:3 Aso do ketutukoto aitutuket ka Edekewok aireŋear aŋor kere, ka lueurito kesi, kwape ejaar ainerun naka ejakaitika, ka ŋul luemaranete toma aicorakinet naka Edekewok, ido kiswamaunai kwape eiaar ekisil."
Ezra10:4 Konyou; naarai akirot nin nakon, isio da kija kajo; kicata, kiswama.”"
Ezra10:5 Kosodi Esera anyoun, kisiyapo iiaka luka isasedotin, ka lebin, ka Isirael kere, ebe kiswamaenenete kwape ejaar akirot ŋin. Kiyapoto do."
Ezra10:6 Kosodi Esera anyoun koinaren ketogo loka Edeke, koloma agola naka Yekokanan okoku loka Eliasib: kedolo, mam abu konyam atap, karaida aimat akipi: naarai abu kokadak kanuka aibucar naka nul kaluka aijoreorio."
Ezra10:7 Aponi kolimoroi anatar Yuda ka Yerusalem, mama ejaas idwe kere luka aijoreorio, kotukonokinos Yerusalem;"
Ezra10:8 Ido yenimam ebuni toma apak naka apaarasia auni, kwape ejaar ainerun naka ikapolok ka imakio, kotwania ikeboro kere, ka ŋes elopet kogelarai kokodet loka aijoreorio."
Ezra10:9 Kosodete ituŋa kere luka Yuda ka Benyamin kotukonokinos Yerusalem kotoma apaarasia auni; kerai elap lokikanyetekaonon, kapaaran naka akaisaarei naka elap: kiboikinos ituŋa kere aibois naelal koinaren ketogo loka Edeke, komaranete kanuka akirot kaŋin, kanuka akiru da naapol noi."
Ezra10:10 Kobwo Esera esasedoti kolimok kes ebe, “Ipotu kibucasi komanya aŋor numo, kosodete aiyatakin adiakar koIsirael."
Ezra10:11 Aso do kolimosi mama ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lukapapaakus, kiswamata nuitojokit ŋesi: kogitaros katekerin nuka akwap, ka aŋor numo da.”"
Ezra10:12 Kosodi ekodet kere aboŋokin keporoto loepol ebe, “Kwape inerar ijo akirokosi, kwape kwaŋin kibusakinitor aswam."
Ezra10:13 Konye ipu ituŋa, ido ŋes apak naka akiru naepol, mam kipedori aibwo kokina, ido na mere ŋes aswam naka apaaran adiopet arai aarei: naarai kibuea noi kakirot kana."
Ezra10:14 Aso koseunai ikapolokokosi kokodet kere, ka nul kere luejaas toma oreriakosi luemanyito aŋor numo kopotu kapakio nueseunitai, ido nepepe kanul, imakio luka nolirc, ka ikatubokoke, aitodol neibelokinor anyunyura naededen naka Edekewok anyoun kamawok, aitodol naedaunor akirot nin.”"
Ezra10:15 Konye kobwaata Yonatan okoku loka Asakel ka Yaseia okoku loka Tikuba aiŋer akirot na: kiganakis kes Mesulam ka Sabetai Elebit,"
Ezra10:16 Kiswamata idwe luka aijoreorio kwaŋin. Kotiakunai Esera esasedoti, ka ice kokapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakec, kwape ajaatar ikekia luka lukapapaakec, kes kere ebilitai ikecekiroria; kiboikinos kapaaran nasodit naka elap lokitomonet aiŋic akirot ŋin."
Ezra10:17 Kodautu akiro nuka ikiliok kere luamanyito aŋor numo koroko apaaran nasodit naka elap losodit etuboro.
Ezra10:18 Kotakanut kodwe luka isasedotin luamanyito aŋor numo: kodwe luka Yesua, okoku loka Yosadak, ka iinacanake, Maaseia, ka Elieser, ka Yarib, ka Gedalia."
Ezra10:19 Apotu koriosi akecekanin kwape ireneariata do akecenor; ido naarai agwaunito akiro, koinakis emerekek lokosipan kanuka agwaunikec."
Ezra10:20 Kodwe luka Imer; Kanani ka Sebadia.
Ezra10:21 Kodwe luka Karim; Maaseia, ka Eliya, ka Semaia, ka Yekiel, ka Usia."
Ezra10:22 Kodwe luka Pasur; Elioenai, Maaseia, Isimael, Netanel, Yosabad, ka Elasa."
Ezra10:23 KoLebin; Yosabad, ka Simei, ka Kelaia (ŋes ŋol Kelita), Petakia, Yuda ka Elieser."
Ezra10:24 Kokayook: Eliasib: kokagolok; Salum, ka Telem, ka Uri."
Ezra10:25 KoIsirael: kodwe luka Paros; Ramia, ka Isia, ka Malakiya, ka Miyamin, ka Eleasar, ka Malakiya, ka Benaia,"
Ezra10:26 Kodwe luka Elam; Matania, ka Sekaria, ka Yekiel, ka Abidi, ka Yeremot, ka Eliya."
Ezra10:27 Kodwe luka Satu; Elioenai, Eliasib, Matania, ka Yeremot, ka Sabad, ka Asisa."
Ezra10:28 Kodwe luka Bebai; Yekokanan, Kanania, Sabai, Atalai,"
Ezra10:29 Kodwe luka Bani; Mesulam, ka Maluk, ka Adaia, ka Yasub, ka Seal, ka Yercmot,"
Ezra10:30 Kodwe luka Pakat-moab; Adana ka Kelal, ka Benaia, ka Maaseia, ka Matania, ka Besalel, ka Binui, ka Manase."
Ezra10:31 Kodwe luka Karim; Elieser, ka Isiya, ka Malakiya, ka. Semaia, ka Simeon;"
Ezra10:32 Benyamin, ka Maluk, ka Semaria."
Ezra10:33 Kodwe luka Kasum; Matenai, ka Matata, ka Sabad, ka Elipelet, ka Yeremai, ka Manase, ka Simei."
Ezra10:34 Kodwe luka Bani; Maadai, ka Amuram, ka Uel;"
Ezra10:35 Benaia, ka Bedeia, ka Keluki;"
Ezra10:36 Bania, ka Meremot, ka Eliasib;"
Ezra10:37 Matania, ka Matenai, ka Yaasu;"
Ezra10:38 ka Bani, ka Binui, ka Simei,"
Ezra10:39 ka Selemia, ka Natan, ka Adaia;"
Ezra10:40 Makanadebai, ka Sasai, ka Sarai;"
Ezra10:41 Asarel, ka Selemia, ka Scmaria;"
Ezra10:42 Salum, ka Amaria, ka Yosep."
Ezra10:43 Kodwc luka Nebo; Yeiel, ka Matitia, ka Sabad, ka Sebina, ka Ido, ka Yoel, ka Benaia."
Ezra10:44 Ŋul kere amanyito aŋor numo; ajaas ke kakesi aŋor nuauritotor idwe.
Nehemiah1:1 Akiro nuka Nekemia okoku loka Kakalia, Kosodi kanen kolap Kisileb kokaru loka akaisaarei, nanjur eoŋ toma Susan togo lokapolou,"
Nehemiah1:2 kobu Kanani, ediopet koinaeanaka koYuda, ŋes ka icetuŋa; keŋitata nuka Iyudayan kaluakuete, luapotu kosalakinitos toma aijoreorio, ka akiro da nuka Yerusalem,"
Nehemiah1:3 Kabalasi eoŋ ebe, “Aatoŋot naasalakinit kotoma aijoreorio ŋina obuku aanyut ican luipu ka amotomoroo: ido abilibilun arwatat naka Yerusalem, iruteike da ecwei kakim.”"
Nehemiah1:4 Kosodi kanen, keira akiro ŋun, keboikin kamony akiyo, kebwor da apaarasia ace; kaluŋ kelip kakonyen nuka Edeke loka akuj,"
Nehemiah1:5 kenera da atiar, “Keŋaiŋait jo, wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka akuj, Edeke lokapolon lokaŋosibib, loericit aitutuket ka aitim mama kaŋul kalueminas ka arieit da akeicorakineta:"
Nehemiah1:6 kiira kakonikit, akonikonye da kokwenyut, kiira ailip naka ekonikejaanakinan, naelipit kakonyenekon kapak kana, apaaran ka akuare da, kanuka ikonikejaanakinak idwe luka Isirael, alimori aronisio nuka idwe luka Isirael, nukidiakana kamakon: eebo, kidiaka eoŋ ka ckek loka papaka."
Nehemiah1:7 Kipou keswamata nukasilianut kamakon, kwabo mam kipou karicata aicorakineta, karaida ikisila, karaida itubesia, luibu kicorak ekonikejaanakinan Musa."
Nehemiah1:8 Keŋaiŋait, kiitu akirot naibu kicorak ekonikejaanakinan Musa kobala ebe, ‘Arai kibueasi yesi, kesiarisiarete eut toma atekerin."
Nehemiah1:9 Konye arai kiboŋut mamaka, koricenenetc da akaieorakineta, ka aiswemaenen kes, karaida aponi kireŋearai lukus kiton awasia cut naka akuj, konye atukonokini kes kaŋina, kasodi ayaun toma aibois naabu kaseu aisiroikin nen ekakiror.’"
Nehemiah1:10 Aso lu kes ikonikejaanakinak, ka ituŋakon, luibu kolaku kakonipedor naepol, kakanikon nakagogoŋ."
Nehemiah1:11 Wu EJAKAIT, keŋaiŋait, kiira cabo akonikit ailip naka ekonikejaanakinan, ka ailip da naka ikonikejaanakinak luiyalamas aiyoŋ ekonikiror: keŋaiŋait, kisirereŋ lolo ekonikejaanakinan, koinak aitimio kakonyen nuka etuŋanan kalo,” Arai eoŋ ekaliyan loka ekabaka."
Nehemiah2:1 Kosodi kanen, kolap Nisan, kokaru loka akaisaarei loka Aratasasata ekabaka, naajaar ebino kakonyeneke, abu kayaŋa ebino, kainak ekabaka. Mam lem kakadanakini kakonyeneke."
Nehemiah2:2 Kabala ekabaka eoŋ atiar, “Inyo bo lolo ekadakinitotor akonikonycn, naarai mam jo ideka? Mam na erai acekirot dimarai akadakinite nakotau.” Kasodi akurianar noi."
Nehemiah2:3 Kasodi katema ekabaka ebe, “Kobusenenei ekabaka ikar kere: ti inyo kisimiki akakonyen akadakinite, emejeiki ere, aibois naka atesin nuka lukapapaaka, iruteike da ecwei kakim?”"
Nehemiah2:4 Kosodi ekabaka atemar eoŋ atiar, “Ilipit inyo?” Kelip do Edeke loka akui."
Nehemiah2:5 Katema eoŋ ekabaka atiar, “Arai kitojok ekabaka, arai edumunit ekonikeiaanakinan asianut kakonyenekon, kijukarai Yuda, ore loka atesina nuka lukapapaaka, kaduk.”"
Nehemiah2:6 Katema ekabaka eoŋ atiar (eboie akabaka da kidunyas kaŋes),” Erai bo akonilosit naka apaarasia imwaasi ai? Ido ibonuni wori?” Kitoiok ekabaka aijukar eoŋ: ketodik apak."
Nehemiah2:7 Bobo da katema ekabaka atiar, “Arai itojokit ekabaka kainakin ibaluan mama ejaas lukibukui lukokekwa juwai, tetere kacamakinio atubor adolore toma Yuda."
Nehemiah2:8 Ka ebalua da mama ejai Asap ekedaran laka amagoro naka ekabaka, tetere kainakini akito aiswamaunia abaoi nuka irutei luka etogo lokagogon loidunyasi etogo, ido nuka arwatat naka ere, nuka etogo da loalomari.” Kiyu ekabaka, kanuka akan nakaiokan naka Ekadeke naajai kaeoŋ."
Nehemiah2:9 Kasodi abunore mama ejaas lukibukui lukokekwa juwai, kainak kes ibaluan luka ekabaka. Abu ekabaka keyakiarite eoŋ nepepe ka ikapolok luka ajore ka ikebwanenok."
Nehemiah2:10 Kepuput Sanabalat Ekoronit, ka Tobia ekejaanakinan, Emonait, kokadakis kesi noi, naarai ebunit etuŋanan atamakin aisigalikin idwe luka Isirael."
Nehemiah2:11 Kasodi abunore Yerusalem, kadau kanen apaarasia auni."
Nehemiah2:12 Kanyou kuare, eoŋ nepepe kituna luikidioko; ido mam abu kalimok etuŋanan nuabu Ekadeke kibwaik otauka aiswamakin Yerusalem: kwabo amamei ecetian kere dimarai etiaŋ loebwanenit."
Nehemiah2:13 Kaloma kuare korute loka Aditot, mama ejai Atan naka Apiu, orute da loka Aoret, kasodi aiŋic arwatatin nuka Yerusalem nuebilibilunos, ka iruteike lueewei kakim."
Nehemiah2:14 Kasodi aiyatakin neejai erute loka Ecor kiton Atapar naka Ekabaka: konye komameun erot lotikitor etianaka loebwanenit.
Nehemiah2:15 Kasodi kadoka kuare kaguurut, aiŋic arwatat; kebelokin, kaloma korute loka Aditot, kabon kwaŋin."
Nehemiah2:16 Mam ikapolok apotu koienutu kwape abu kalosio, karaida nuabu keswama; kwabo mam ber alimokinit Iyudayan, karaida isasedotin, karaida isotia, karaida ikayaitok, karaida ice kere lueswamaete."
Nehemiah2:17 Kasodi atemar kes atiar, “Ianyutu kwape kiiaar erono, kwape emejeikinio Yerusalem, iruteike da ieweitere kakim: kopotu kadukoto arwatat naka Yerusalem, kalemasi amorosit na.”"
Nehemiah2:18 Kalimok kes kwape ejaar akan nakaiokan naka Ekadeke keoŋ; ka akiro da nuka ekabaka nuabu kalimok eoŋ. Kobalas ebe, “Kanyoutu, kaduko.” Kosodete kitogogonoto akecekanin kanuka aswam ŋin naejok."
Nehemiah2:19 Konye kepuput Sanabalat Ekoronit, ka Tobia ekejaanakinan, Emonait, ka Gesem Earabut, kokienatatar sio noi, komwanata da, kobalas ebe, “Inyo bo na naiswamaete yesi? Ikotosi aipaliikin ekabaka?”"
Nehemiah2:20 Kasodi kabonok kes katema atiar, “Kisirereni sio Edeke loka akuj; ŋes kiinakini sio ikekejaanakinak kinyouni aiduk: konye emamei yes ainakinet, karaida apedor, karaida aisiitunet, kotoma Yerusalem.”"
Nehemiah3:1 Kosodi Eliasib esasedoti lopeti anyoun nepepe kikeinacan isasedotin, kodukoto erute loka Amerekekin; kitalautu da, kosipokis ikiriginike; kiton togo loeoia loka Kamea kitalautu, kiton togo loeoja loka Kananel."
Nehemiah3:2 Kotupakinete ŋes ituŋa luka Yeriko aiduk. Kotupakin kes Sakur okoku loka Imiri aiduk,"
Nehemiah3:3 Kodukoto odwe luka Kasenaa erute loka Lukecor; kopesikis abaoike, kosipokis ikiriginike, ka igolisike, ka atiketake."
Nehemiah3:4 Kotupakin kes Meremot, okoku loka Uria, okoku loka Kakos, Kotupakin kes Mesulam okoku loka Berekia, okoku loka Mesesabel aiteteun. Kotupakin kes Sadok okoku loka Baana aiteteun."
Nehemiah3:5 Kotupakinete kes Itekoin aiteteun: konye mam isotiakec ibwaikinito imurisiŋakec aswam naka ejakaitikec.
Nehemiah3:6 Kiteteut Yoiada okoku loka Pasea ka Mesulam okoku loka Besodeia erute lomoion, kopesikis abaoike, kosipokis ikiriginike, ka igolisike, ka atiketake."
Nehemiah3:7 Kotupakinete kes Melatia Egibeonit, ka Yadon Emeronotit, ituŋa luka Gibeon, ka luka Misipa, aiteteun, naarai keraas lukeyait lokebuku lokokekwa juwai."
Nehemiah3:8 Kotupakin ŋes Usial okoku loka Karakaia ikatatak luka esabu, aiteteun. Kotupakin ŋes Kanania ediopet kokenyalak aures, aiteteun, kitogogonoto Yerusalem kiton arwatat naelal."
Nehemiah3:9 Kotupakin kes Rapaia okoku loka Kur, ekayaiton loka atutubet naka ebuku loka Yerusalem aiteteun."
Nehemiah3:10 Kotupakin kes Yedaia okoku loka Karumap aiteteun neesesenas ketogoke. Kotupakin ŋes Katus okoku loka Kasabaneia aiteteun.
Nehemiah3:11 Malakiya okoku loka Karim, ka Kasub okoku loka Pakat-moab, kiteteut ecewai, ka etogo loeoia loka iupa."
Nehemiah3:12 Kotupakin ŋes Salum okoku loka Kalokes, ekayaiton loka atutubet naka ebuku loka Yerusalem aiteteun, ŋes ka akepesur."
Nehemiah3:13 Kiteteut Kanun ka luibojete ko Sanoa erute loka Aditot; kodukoto kesi ŋes, kosipokis ikiriginike, ka igolisike, ka atiketake, ka ikubitin elukumit luka arwatat kiton orute loka Aoret."
Nehemiah3:14 Kiteteu Malakiya okoku loka Rekab, ekayaiton loka ebuku loka Betkakerem erute loka Aoret; koduk ŋes, kosipok ikiriginike, igolisike, ka atiketake da."
Nehemiah3:15 Kiteteu Salun okoku loka Kolukose, ekayaiton loka ebuku loka Misipa erute loka Atan; koduk ŋes, korap, kosipok ikiriginike, igolisike, ka atiketake, ka arwatat naka Atapar naka Sela naedunyas kemanikor loka ekabaka, aitodol adoketa nuiiesaros anyoun kore loka Daudi."
Nehemiah3:16 Kotupakin ŋes Nekemia okoku loka Asabuk, ekayaiton loka atutubet naka ebuku loka Betsur, aiteteun kiton aibois naesesenas katesina nuka Daudi, kiton atapar naabokitai, kiton da togo loka ituŋa lukirigin."
Nehemiah3:17 Kotupakis ŋes Ilebin, Rekum okoku loka Bani aiteteun. Kotupakin ŋes Kasabia, ekayaiton atutubet naka ebuku loka Keila, aiteteun kanuka ebukuke."
Nehemiah3:18 Kotupakis ŋes ikeeeinaean, Babai okoku loka Kenadad, ekayaiton loka atutubet naka ebuku loka Keila aiteteun."
Nehemiah3:19 Kotupakin Eser okoku loka Yesua, ekayaiton loka Misipa, aiteteun ewai ece, loasesenas kaneedokarere toma aiŋadis naka luiiis neekudio arwatat."
Nehemiah3:20 Kotupakin ŋes Baruk okoku loka Sabai aiteteun ewai ece kakukuranut, anyoun kaneekudio arwatat kiton okek loka etogo loka Eliasib esasedoti lopeti."
Nehemiah3:21 Kotupakin ŋes Meremot okoku loka Uria, okoku loka Kakos aiteteun ewai ece, anyoun kokek loka etogo loka Eliasib aitodol onane loka etogo loka Eliasib."
Nehemiah3:22 Kotupakis ŋes isasedotin, ituŋa luka Apuuton, aiteteun."
Nehemiah3:23 Kotupakinete kes Benyamin ka Kasub aiteteun neasesenas kekeeetogo. Kotupakin Asaria okoku loka Maaseia okoku loka Anania aiteteun osiep loka etogoke.
Nehemiah3:24 Kotupakin Binui okoku loka Kenadad aiteteun ewai ece, anyoun kotogo loka Asaria aitodol neakudokinia arwatat, ka aitodol agor da."
Nehemiah3:25 Kiteteu Palal okoku loka Usai neakudio arwatat, ka etogo loeoia loiririkina togo lokokuju loka ekabaka, loedunyas kalaro naka ikedarak. Kotupakin Pedaia okoku loka Paros aiteteun."
Nehemiah3:26 (Kiboienenete Inetinim koOpel aitodol aibois naesesenas kerute loka Akipi kokide, ka etogo locoja loelitoro kina.)"
Nehemiah3:27 Kotupakis Itekoin aiteteun ewai ece, loesesenas ketogo loeoja loepol loelitoro kina, aitodol arwatat naka Opel,"
Nehemiah3:28 Kiteteut isasedotin kuju kerute loka Ibalasin, nolitunanan neasesenas keketogo."
Nehemiah3:29 Kotupakin Sadok okoku loka Imer aiteteun neasesenas keketogo. Kotupakin Semaia okoku loka Sekania ekagolon erute lokokide aiteteun.
Nehemiah3:30 Kotupakinete Kanania okoku loka Selemia, ka Kanun okoku lokikanyetekape loka Salap, aiteteun ewai ece. Kotupakin Mesulam okoku loka Berekia aiteteun neasesenas kakegola."
Nehemiah3:31 Kotupakin Malikiya ediopet kokatatak luka esabu aiteteun aitodol togo loka Inetinim, ka loka ikagwelanarak, loasesenas kerute loka Kamipikad, aitodol neadokareren agor."
Nehemiah3:32 Ido kiteteut ikatatak luka esabu ka ikagwelanarak kidiŋ kaneadokarere agor ka erute loka Amerekekin.
Nehemiah4:1 Konye kepupu Sanabalat kwape kidukio isio arwatat, konyunyurikin, kisiop noi, kisekel Iyudayan."
Nehemiah4:2 Kiner kakonyen nuka iinaeanake ka ajore naka Samaria, kobala ebe, “Iswamaete inyo Iyudayan lu lukalanyak? Ekotosi kereka abwaun bobo? Ekotosi ainakin asuban? Ekotosi adaun kapaaran adiopet? Ekotosi aisikwarun amor katukon nuka aapoŋor, naarai ieweitai?”"
Nehemiah4:3 Kosodi Tobia Emonait loedunyas kaŋes kotema atiar, “Kanin da yenedukito kesi, arai kicaka ekue, ebilibilei arwatatakec nakamor.”"
Nehemiah4:4 Kiira ijo, wu Edekekosi; naarai kimeni: kinyakak amorositikee akwesikee, kokorak anatario kakwap nakaijoreorio:"
Nehemiah4:5 sirikirapak numam adolitekec, aronisikec da kinyek amwatario kakonyenekon: naarai kitunyunyurikis jo kakonyen nuka ikadukok."
Nehemiah4:6 Kasodete kadukoto arwatat; arwatat kere kimorikikin nepepe aitodol atutubet naka amukururuke: naarai apotu ituŋa kibwaikis itauon aswam,"
Nehemiah4:7 Konye kepuput Sanabalat, ka Tobia, ka Iarabun, ka Imonain, ka Isudodain, ebe iyatanakin aswam naka aiteteun arwatatin nuka Yerusalem, ageun da ainwok arorwaitin, konyunyurikinos noi;"
Nehemiah4:8 kinerutu kere nepepe aponare aitiji Yerusalem, aisiyaloŋoŋ lukotoma."
Nehemiah4:9 Konye kipou kelipata mama ejai Edekekosi, aibwaikin da ikekwenyanarak paaran ka kuare da kanukee."
Nehemiah4:10 Kotema Yuda atiar, “Eŋoŋar agogoŋ naka ikebwokak abwokon, ipu aapoŋor; tape mam kipedori aiduk arwatat.”"
Nehemiah4:11 Kotemasi lukasurupokosi atiar, “Mam ejenunete, karaida aanyun, aitodol nekilomaria kidiŋikec, kasodete aiar, ketanatjata aswamukee.”"
Nehemiah4:12 Kosodi kanen, kepotu Iyudayan luaraas iidunyetakee, kolimokis kesi sio aatenak atomon kaiboisio kere ebe, “Ibusakinit kobonut mamakosi.”"
Nehemiah4:13 Ŋes kebwaikinia ituŋa toma atutubeta nuijesakina kapak naajai kau karwatat, kaiboisio nuelapat, kebwaik do ituŋa kwape ajaatar ikekiakee, koiaas da kikilenakec, ka akwarasikec, ka akabwaikec da."
Nehemiah4:14 Kasodi kasesen, kanyou, katema isotia, ka ikayaitok, ka ituŋa ice atiar, “Sirikiyoŋa kes: kiitunitos EJAKAIT, loepollokaŋosibib, kojiosi kanuka iinacanakus, ka idwekus, lusap ka lupesur, ka aŋorokus ka itogoikus da.”"
Nehemiah4:15 Kosodi kanen, kepuputu lukasurupokosi ebe ajenun kamakosi, ido etapalau Edeke akeeeinerun, kasodete isio kere aboŋor mama ejai arwatat, ninitunanan toma aswamuke."
Nehemiah4:16 Kosodi kanen, agear kapak kaŋin, eswamaenenete atutubet naka ikakeiaanakinak aswam, kitinito atutubet kakesi akwaras, ka ibukui, ka akabwai, ka ikootin luka asua; koiaananas ikayaitok kau kekek kere loka Yuda."
Nehemiah4:17 Ŋul luadukenenete arwatat, ka nul luebwokenenete abwokon kigugunatos, kiswamai ŋinituŋanan aswam kadiopekan, kitinite naee da yeniiiisike,"
Nehemiah4:18 Ikadukok da, koenikinite ŋinituŋanan ekileŋike anabcteke, kodukenenei kwaŋin. Ŋol da loakusenenei arupepe kiiaenena keoŋ,"
Nehemiah4:19 Kalimoki isotia, ka ikayaitok, ka ituŋa ice ebe, “Epol aswam, elal da, kiderakina oni karwatat, elwanikina ijinitunanan ka yeniee:"
Nehemiah4:20 kotoma niniibois naiirariata eporoto loka arupepe, kokerununete ayuun sio; kijiikini Edeke oni.”"
Nehemiah4:21 Kasodete keswamaenenete aswam: kitinenenete atutubetekec akwaras ageun eeilakide kiton neetakanuniata aacer.
Nehemiah4:22 Ido toma apak kaŋin kalimok ituŋa ebe, “Koperenenei ninitunanan ka ekekejaanakinan toma Yerusalem, koraananas ikedarakakosi kuare, ido kitaaritos paaran.”"
Nehemiah4:23 Kanuka nun mam kilaeununei inapcnekosi, karaida eoŋ karaida ikainaean, karaida ikakeiaanakinak, karaida ituŋa lukedarak lukatupito eoŋ, kolosenenei ŋinitunanan atan itiŋ it yenijiisike."
Nehemiah5:1 Kosodi koiaun eeelet loepol noi loka ituŋa ka aŋorokec aluikin ikeceinacan Iyudayan.
Nehemiah5:2 Naarai ajaas luabalananas ebe, “Kipu isio, ka idwe kosi lusap ka lupesur: kadumutu akima, kanyama kajara da.”"
Nehemiah5:3 Koiaas ice da luabalananas ebe, “Kititinaari isio imanikoriakosi, ka amanat nuka emusabibu, ka itogoikosi: kadumutu akima kanuka eteŋei.”"
Nehemiah5:4 Kojaas da luabalananas ebe, “Kipou kayuunos kapesan nuka esolo loka ekabaka komanikoriakosi ka amanat nuka emusabibu."
Nehemiah5:5 Konye do awatekosi cputosi bala awat nuka iinacanakosi, ka idwekosi kwape idwekec: ido koany, kitubuleseni idwekosi lusap ka lupesur araut ibulesin, ido ace kadwekosi adaut aitubulesenio: ido emamei sio nukiswamai aitikokinia; naarai ejaas icetuŋa kimanikoriakosi ka amanatakosi nuka emusabibu.”"
Nehemiah5:6 Kanyunyurikini noi kapup aimonyokec ka akiro nun.
Nehemiah5:7 Kasodi keneru bon, kapega kaisotia ka ikayaitok, kabala kes ebe, “Itubonokinete ameda, ŋinltunanan konaeeke.” Katukonok atukonokin naepol."
Nehemiah5:8 Katema kes atiar, “Kipou isio kalakutu kwape kipedoria ikosiinaean Iyudayan, luagwelaritai mama ejaas ikapirin; yes da ikotosi agwelar iinaeanakus, ti kereka kigwele isio kes?” Kosodete kesi aililiŋ, mam apotu kobonokis akirot."
Nehemiah5:9 Katema da atiar, “Akirot naiswamaete yesi mam ejok; mam kereka ti ibusakinit yes alosenen kaiyoŋ Edekewok, kanuka amorosit naka ikapirin lukasurupowok?"
Nehemiah5:10 Eoŋ da, ikainaean ka ikakejaanakinak kiyuuni kes kapesan ka akima kimedaikis. Kenainait, kenyeis ameda."
Nehemiah5:11 Kenaiŋait, kinyakakisi lolo kes imanikoriakee, amanatakee nuka emusabibu, amanatakee nuka iseitunin, ka itogoikec, ido idiopet kakwatat yenika apesan, ka yenika akima, ka ebino ka akinyet, luitelemenenete yesi.”"
Nehemiah5:12 Kosodete kesi atemar atiar, “Kinyakakini isio, komam kitepeseni kes; kiswamai kwaŋin, kwape ibalar.” Kasodi anyaraun isasedotin, kesiyapo kes, ebe iswamaete kwape esumunioto."
Nehemiah5:13 Abu da kelakilak ekagoe kener atiar, “Kilakilakakini Edeke kwaŋin ninitunanan kotogoke, kotoma aswamisioke, yenimam itodolikini aisumunet na; kilakilakakinio kwaŋin, adaun.” Kobala ekodet kere ebe, “Amen.” Kituroto EJAKAIT. Kiswamata do ituŋa kwape esumunioto."
Nehemiah5:14 Ido ageun kapak kaŋin nrkebwaikinere araun ekayaitonikee kakwap naka Yuda, ageun kokaru loka akaisaarei kiton okaru loka akaisauni ka luarei loka Aratasasata eka baka, kes ikar itomon ka luarei, eoŋ ka iinaeanaka mam kinyamenenei inyamat luka ekayaiton."
Nehemiah5:15 Konye ikayaitok lukolo lukageikinete kitelemununete ituŋa lukenyamete, emugati ka ebino, kogelara isekelin akaisaoŋon luka epuesa; eebo, ka ikeeekejaanakinak da ayaitos kwaŋin ituŋa: konye eoŋ, mere ŋes naeswamaenenei, kanuka aiyoŋ Edeke,"
Nehemiah5:16 Eebo, abu kadunyak aswam naka arwatat kana, komam kigweli adisilup: kotukonokinos ikakejaanakinak kere kaswam."
Nehemiah5:17 Ido kojaananas komesaka luka Iyudayan ka ikayaitok ituŋa akwatat ka akaisakany, kogelara nul luapote mama kijaa isio kokapirin lukirimorito sio."
Nehemiah5:18 Luepoenenoo luka apaaran adiopet, emoŋ ediopet ka amerekekin akanykape nuseuna; ido kepoonokinio eoŋ da akokoroi, irwan atipet da mmupaarasia atomon ebino loka nolipone: ido karaida kejaas kwaŋin mam abu ketelem atap naka ekayaiton, naarai kelanirikinit ebulesene ituŋa lu."
Nehemiah5:19 Wu Ekadeke, kiitu neajai kanuka aiokis, kere nueswamak eoŋ ituŋa lu."
Nehemiah6:1 Kosodi kanen, nakelimokiniata Sanabalat ka Tobia, ka Gesem Earabut, ka lukasurupokosi ice, ebe abu eoŋ kaduk arwatat, komamei arorwa nakesalakinit tomake (karaida kerina eoŋ esipokina ikirigin lukorutei kapaarasia kanun);"
Nehemiah6:2 Keyakikis Sanabalat ka Gesem eoŋ kobalas ebe, “Kobia, keriamunos ediopet koreria luka apuuton naka Ono.” Konye keomito aiswamakin eoŋ aronis."
Nehemiah6:3 Kasodi aijukar ikiyakia mama ejaas kesi ebe, “Eswamai eoŋ aswam naepol, mam apedori alosit: inyo bo ti kitanania aswam, eoŋ ajalakin ŋes abunore mama ijaas?”"
Nehemiah6:4 Keyakikis bobo kwaŋin irwan aoŋon; kabonok kwape kwaŋin,"
Nehemiah6:5 Kosodi Sanabalat aiiukun ekekejaanakinan kwape kwaŋin irwan nakikanyet kitinite ebalua loepukoro kakanike;
Nehemiah6:6 ewadikatai kotomake cbe, “Elimorokinitai toma atekerin, abu da Gasimu kolim ebe, kwape iwomitotor ijo ka Iyudayan aipaliikin; ŋes kiinakini iduki arwatat: ikoto araun ekabakakee, kwape ejaatar akiro ŋun."
Nehemiah6:7 Ibwaiki da inabin luelimonokinete nukon ko Yerusalem, kineras atiar, ‘Ejai ekabaka toma Yuda’: kwana da itejenunio ekabaka kwape ejaatar akiro ŋun. Aso do, kobia, kenerut.”"
Nehemiah6:8 Kasodi aiyakikin ŋes ebe, “Mam iswamaunitai akiro ŋun kwape inerar ijo, konye isabi ijo elopet kotaukon.”"
Nehemiah6:9 Naarai akotosi kesi kere aitukurian sio ebe, “Kokalanyakata akaninikee, kinyek aswam aiswamaunio.” Konye kwana, wu Edeke, kitogogon ijo akakanin."
Nehemiah6:10 Abu kalot togo loka Semaia okoku loka Delaia okoku loka Meketabel, loagolokinitoi; kotema nesl atiar, “Keriamakinos oni togo loka Edeke, toma oyekalu; ido kagolokis ikekia luka eyekalu: naarai epote aiar jo; eebo, epote aiar jo kuare.”"
Nehemiah6:11 Katema atiar, “Etuŋanan loetia ne bala eoŋ tikeker? Iŋai da loetia ne bala eoŋ yeni ti keloma oyekalu aitajar akeijar? Mam alomari.”"
Nehemiah6:12 Kamisiik, ido koany, mam abu Edeke kijukunite ŋes: konye abu ŋesi kolimite adwaretait na nakaluikin: naarai aropitos Tobia ka Sanabalat ŋes."
Nehemiah6:13 Keropio kakirot kana tetere akurianari eoŋ kasodi aswam ŋun, kadiaka, kosodete kesi adumun akirot naerono kasodete amoromoroo."
Nehemiah6:14 Wu Ekadeke, kiitu Tobia ka Sanabalat kwape ajaatar aswamisiokec nu, ka anabi Noadia da, ka inabin ice, luti ketukurianata."
Nehemiah6:15 Kodaun arwatat kapaaran naka akaisaarei ka nukany kolap Elul, kotoma apaarasia akaisakany ka nuarei."
Nehemiah6:16 Kosodi kanen, kepuputu lukasurupokosi ŋun, kokuriakaros ikapirin kere lukirimorito sio, kodisiakaros kesi kakonyenekee: naarai koanyutu ebe aswam na eswamaa Edekekosi."
Nehemiah6:17 Ido kapaarasia kanun apotu isotia luka Yuda kiyakiasi ibaluan luipu mama ejai Tobia, luka’ Tobia da kopotu mama ajaas kesi."
Nehemiah6:18 Naarai ajaas koYuda luipu luapotu kiyapoikinito naarai kerai ŋesi ekamuran loka Sekania okoku loka Ara; abu okokuke Yekokanan komanyite akoku naka Mesulam okoku loka Berekia.
Nehemiah6:19 Ido kinerenenas aswamisioke nuejok kakonyeneka, kolimonokinete ŋes akiroka. Kiyakuununei Tobia ibaluan aisiyonia eoŋ."
Nehemiah7:1 Kosodi kanen, kedaun arwatat adukio, kadau da asipokin ikirigin, koseunai da ikagolok ka ikayook ka Ilebin,"
Nehemiah7:2 abu ketitin onaeeka Kanani, ka Kanania ekayaiton loka etogo lokagogon ayait Yerusalem: naarai kerai lomunot, koyonite Edeke aitelekarit luepu."
Nehemiah7:3 Kasodi atemar kes atiar, “Sirieŋaanario irutei luka Yerusalem eroko akoloŋ emwanuuna; naebwoenenata kesi idarete, kogolonokinete ikekia, kotikete katiketa: kibwaanakinete ikedarak kanul luibojete ko Yerusalem, ninitunanan kabeanakinike, ka nininujanan asesena keketogo.”"
Nehemiah7:4 Alal ere, kopol da; konye ekidioko ituŋa luajaas toma, komam itogoi da edukuk."
Nehemiah7:5 Kipiiki Ekadeke otauka atukonokin isotia, ka ikayaitok, ka ituŋa kimarai kaurikec. Kasodi adumun eitabo loka aur naka ŋul kaluageunete anyoun, kadum akiro nu iwadikatai ebe:"
Nehemiah7:6 Lu kes idwe luka ebuku, luanyounete kaijoreorio kanul kalueioreoritai, luabu Nebukadanesar ekabaka loko Babulon kijoreoo, luabonunete Yerusalem ka Yuda, ninitunanan orekee;"
Nehemiah7:7 luapote nepepe ka Serubabel, ka Yesua, ka Nekemia, ka Asaria, ka Raamia, ka Nakamani, ka Morudekai, ka Bilisan, ka Misiperet, ka Bigibai, ka Nekum, ka Baana. Etiai loka ikiliok luka ituŋa luka Isirael:"
Nehemiah7:8 idwe luka Paros, ilukumin iarei ka akwatat ka akaisakanykaarei ka luarei."
Nehemiah7:9 Idwe luka Sepatia akwat auni ka akaisakanykaarei ka luarei.
Nehemiah7:10 Idwe luka Ara, akwat akanykape ka akaisakany ka luarei."
Nehemiah7:11 Idwe luka Pakat-moab, lukodwe luka Yesua ka Yoab, ilukumin iarei ka akwat akanykauni ka itomon ka lukanykauni."
Nehemiah7:12 Idwe luka Elam, elukumit ka akwat aarei ka akaisakany ka luonon."
Nehemiah7:13 Idwe luka Satu, akwat akanykauni ka akaisaoŋon ka lukany."
Nehemiah7:14 Idwe luka Sakai, akwat akanykaarei ka akaisakanykape."
Nehemiah7:15 Idwe luka Binui, akwat akanykape ka akaisaoŋon ka lukanykauni."
Nehemiah7:16 Idwe luka Bebai, akwat akanykape ka akaisaarei ka lukanykauni."
Nehemiah7:17 Idwe luka Asagad, ilukumin iarei ka akwat auni ka akaisaarei ka luarei."
Nehemiah7:18 Idwe luka Adonikam, akwat akanykape ka akaisakanykape ka lukanykaarei."
Nehemiah7:19 Idwe luka Bigibai, ilukumin iarei ka akaisakanykape ka lukanykaarei."
Nehemiah7:20 Idwe luka Adin, akwat akanykape ka akaisakany ka lukany."
Nehemiah7:21 Idwe luka Ater, luka Kesekia, akaisakanykaoŋon ka lukanykauni."
Nehemiah7:22 Idwe luka Kasum, akwat auni ka akaisaarei ka lukanykauni."
Nehemiah7:23 Idwe luka Besai, akwat auni ka akaisaarei ka luonon."
Nehemiah7:24 Idwe luka Karip, akwatat ka itomon ka luarei."
Nehemiah7:25 Idwe luka Gibeon, akaisakanykaoŋon ka lukany."
Nehemiah7:26 Ituŋa luka Betlekem ka Netopa, akwatat ka akaisakanykauni ka lukanykauni."
Nehemiah7:27 Ituŋa luka Anatot, akwatat ka akaisaarei ka lukanykauni."
Nehemiah7:28 Ituŋa luka Betasamabet, akaisaoŋon ka luarei."
Nehemiah7:29 Ituŋa luka Kireat-yearim, Kepira, ka Beerot, akwat akanykaarei ka akaisaoŋon ka luuni."
Nehemiah7:30 Ituŋa luka Rama ka Geba, akwat akanykape ka akaisaarei ka lodiopet."
Nehemiah7:31 Iruna luka Mikimas, akwatat ka akaisaarei ka luarei."
Nehemiah7:32 Ituŋa luka Bet-el ka Ai, akwatat ka akaisaarei ka Iuuni."
Nehemiah7:33 Ituŋa luka Nebo ece, akaisakany ka luarei,"
Nehemiah7:34 Ituŋa luka Elam ece, elukumit ka akwat aarei ka akaisakany ka luonon,"
Nehemiah7:35 Idwe luka Karim, akwat auni ka akaisaarei."
Nehemiah7:36 Idwe luka Yeriko, akwat auni ka akaisaoŋon ka lukany,"
Nehemiah7:37 Idwe luka Lod, ka Kadid ka Ono, akwat akanykaarei ka akaisaarei ka lodiopet."
Nehemiah7:38 Idwe luka Senaa, ilukumin iuni ka akwat akanykaoŋon ka akaisauni."
Nehemiah7:39 Isasedotin: idwe luka Yedaia, lukokek loka Yesua, akwat akanykaoŋon ka akaisakanykaarei ka luuni."
Nehemiah7:40 Idwe luka Imer, elukumit ka akaisakany ka luarei."
Nehemiah7:41 Idwe luka Pasur, elukumit ka akwat aarei ka akaisaoŋon ka lukanykaarei."
Nehemiah7:42 Idwe luka Karim, elukumit ka itomon ka lukanykaarei."
Nehemiah7:43 Ilebin: idwe luka Yesua, luka Kadumiel, lukodwe luka Kodeba, akaisakanykaarei ka luonon."
Nehemiah7:44 Ikayook: idwe luka Asap, akwatat ka akaisaoŋon ka lukanykauni."
Nehemiah7:45 Ikagolok: idwe luka Salum, idwe luka Ater, idwe luka Talumon, idwe luka Akub, idwe luka Katita, idwe luka Sobai, akwatat ka akaisauni ka lukanykauni."
Nehemiah7:46 Inetinim: idwe luka Sika, idwe luka Kasupa, idwe luka Tabaot;"
Nehemiah7:47 Idwe luka Keros, idwe luka Sia, idwe luka Padon;"
Nehemiah7:48 idwe luka Lebana, idweluka Kagaba, idwe luka Salamia;"
Nehemiah7:49 idwe luka Kanan, idwe luka Gidel, idwe luka Gakar;"
Nehemiah7:50 idwe luka Reaia, idwe luka Resin, idwe luka Nekoda;"
Nehemiah7:51 idwe luka Gasam, idwe luka Usa, idwe luka Pasea;"
Nehemiah7:52 idwe luka Besai, idwe luka Meunim, idwe luka Nepusesim;"
Nehemiah7:53 idwe luka Bakabuk, idwe luka Kakupa, idwe luka Karukur;"
Nehemiah7:54 idwe luka Basilit, idwe luka Mekida, idwe luka Karasa;"
Nehemiah7:55 idwe luka Barakos, idwe luka Sisera, idwe luka Tema;"
Nehemiah7:56 idwe luka Nesia, idwe luka Katipa."
Nehemiah7:57 Idwe luka ikejaanakinak luka Solomon: idwe luka Sotai, idwe luka Soperet, idwe luka Perida;"
Nehemiah7:58 idwe luka Yaala, idwe luka Darakon, idwe luka Gidel;"
Nehemiah7:59 idwe luka Sepatia, idwe luka Katil, idwe luka Pokeretkasebain, idwe luka Amon."
Nehemiah7:60 Inetinim kere, ka idwe luka ikejaanakinak luka Solomon, emwaasi akwat auni ka akaisakanykaoŋon ka luarei."
Nehemiah7:61 Lu kes luanyounete koTel-mela, koTel-karasa, koKerub, koAdon, ka Imer da: konye mam apotu kopedosi aitodun ikekia luka lukapapaakee, karaida auriokee, arai keraas luka Isirael:"
Nehemiah7:62 idwe luka Delaia, idwe luka Tobia, idwe luka Nekoda, akwat akanykape ka akaisaoŋon ka luarei."
Nehemiah7:63 Luka isasedotin: idwe luka Kobaia, idwe luka Kakos, idwe luka Barasilai loamanyit aberu kotoma adwe nuka Barasilai Egileadit, komaikinai ekirorikee."
Nehemiah7:64 Komoata nul neewadikatai kes kotoma kanul kaluemaritai kaurikee, konye mam abu kotakanu: kanuka ŋun koomitos ebe amunaunos, kirenearai kosasedotene."
Nehemiah7:65 Kotema Etirusata ebe kinyeis ainyam iboro lukalaunak noi, aitodol neebwoia esasedoti loejai Urim ka Tumim."
