Nehemiah7:66 Ekodet kere ncpepe emwaasi ilukumin akaisaoŋon ka luarei, ka akwat auni ka akaisakanykape,"
Nehemiah7:67 komam imarakin ikejaanakinakakee ka akejaanakinakakee, luemwaasi ilukumin ikanykaarei ka akwat auni ka akaisauni ka lukanykaarei: ajaas da ka ikayook ka akayook akwat aarei ka akaisaoŋon ka lukany."
Nehemiah7:68 Emwaasi ibalasinikee akwat akanykaarei ka akaisauni ka lukanykape; inyubunukee, akwat aarei ka akaisaoŋon ka lukany."
Nehemiah7:69 Akaalaikee, akwat aoŋon ka akaisauni ka nukany; asigirianakee, alukumin akanykapc ka akwat akanykaarei ka akaisaarei."
Nehemiah7:70 Apotu ice kokapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee koinakinos aswam. Abu Etirusata koinak idarikin luka esabu elukumit, atiboi akaisakany, ka inapen luka isasedotin akwat akany ka akaisauni toma aiŋadis."
Nehemiah7:71 Apotu ice kokapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee koinakis idarikin ilukumin akaisaarei luka esabu, ka ilatirin ilukumin iarei ka akwat aarei luka epuesa toma aiŋadis naka aswam."
Nehemiah7:72 Luainakinete ice da kotuna kes idarikin ilukumin akaisaarei luka esabu, ka ilatirin ilukumin iarei luka epuesa, ka inapen luka isasedotin akaisakanykape ka lukanykaarei."
Nehemiah7:73 Kwaŋin kiboioto isasedotin, ka Ilebin, ka ikagolok, ka ikayook, ka ice kotuna, ka Inetinim, ka Isirael kere koreriakee. Kedolo elap lokikanyetekaarei ajaas idwe luka Isirael oreriakee."
Nehemiah8:1 Kotukonokinos ituŋa kere kwapc ediopetunanan aibois naelal, naesesenas kerute loka Akipi; kobalasi Esera ekewadikan ayaun eitabo loka ikisila luka Musa, luabu EJAKAIT kicorak Isirael."
Nehemiah8:2 Koyau Esera esasedoti ikisila akonyen nuka atukot, ikiliok ka aŋor da, ka kere luapedorete apupun kajenun, kapaaran nasodit naka elap lokikanyetekaarei."
Nehemiah8:3 Kosiom nu koinaren kaibois naelal naesesenas kerute loka Akipi ageun tupuruc sek kiton kidin paaran, kojaas kiliok ka aŋor da, ka nul luapedorete ajenun; kitoikis ituŋa kere apupokin eitabo loka ikisila."
Nehemiah8:4 Kobwo Esera ekewadikan kotut loka akito, loekeitoi kanuka nun; kobwaata Matitia, ka Sema ka Anaia, ka Uria, ka Kilikia, ka Maaseia eiduny kaŋes kakekan nakoteten; kakekan da nakokediany Pedaia, ka Misael, ka Malakiya, ka Kasum, ka Kasabadana, ka Sekaria, ka Mesulam."
Nehemiah8:5 Kopuko Esera eitabo kakonycn nuka ituŋa kere; (naarai ajai kuju kituna kere;) kepuko, kobwaata ituŋa kere."
Nehemiah8:6 Kimala Esera EJAKAIT, Edeke lokapolon. Kobonokis ituŋa kere ebe, “Amen, Amen”; kikianarete akaninikec: kosodete kituluroto akwesikee, komaata EJAKAIT, kitulurito akecekonyen kwap,"
Nehemiah8:7 Ido Yesua, ka Bani, ka Serebia, ka Yamin, ka Akub, ka Sabetai, ka Kodia, ka Maaseia, ka Kelita, ka Asaria, ka Yosabad, ka Kanan, ka Pelaia, ka Ilebin, kiteienut ituŋa ikisila; kobwaata ituŋa kaiboisiokee."
Nehemiah8:8 Kosiomata citabo, toma okisila luka Edeke, nuepuposi; koyautu apolou, koienunos nuasomio,"
Nehemiah8:9 Kosodi Nekemia lokerai Etirusata, ka Esera esasedoti ekewadikan, ka Ilebin luesisianakincte ituŋa atemar ituŋa kere atiar, “Na ŋes apaaran nakalaunan mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekusideke; sirikibworoto, karaida aimony akiyo.” Naarai amonyete ituŋa kere akiyo naapupunioto akiro nuka ikisila."
Nehemiah8:10 Kosodi atemar kes atiar, “Koloto, konyamata asiepai, komata luewiny, kijukakis akorakineta nin yenimam itemokinitoi ibore: naarai apaaran na nakalaunan mama ejai EJAKAITiwok: kwabo sirikikadakis; naarai aiyalama naka EJAKAIT ŋes agogonokus.”"
Nehemiah8:11 Kisililinata Ilebin ituŋa kere ebe, “Kililinata, naarai erai apaaran nakalaunan; kwabo sirikikadakis.”"
Nehemiah8:12 Kolototo ituŋa kere ainyam ka aimat, ka aijukar akorakineta, kaitalakar naepol noi, naarai aienutu akiro nualimonokinio kes."
Nehemiah8:13 Kapaaran nakiareit da kotukonokinos ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaa luka ituŋa kere, ka isasedotin, ka Ilebin, neejai Esera ekewadikan, aitoikin aki necjaas akiro nuka ikisila."
Nehemiah8:14 Koanyut nukiwadikatai okisila, kwape abu EJAKAIT kicorakinia kama ka Musa ebe koperenenete idwe luka Isirael oswamin kopucit loka elap lokikanyetekaarei."
Nehemiah8:15 Koramenenete kolimonokinete koreriakec kere, ka Yerusalem ebe, “Koloto moru, koomata atenuna nuka eseitun, ka atenuna da nuka eseitun loka ais, ka atenuna nuka ikadasia, ka atenuna nuka idukudukun, ka atenuna nuka ikito luetumito, aiswamaa iswamin, kwape kiwadikatere.”"
Nehemiah8:16 Kosodete ituŋa alomar, koyanaut kes, kiswamata da iswamin, ninitunanan oswi loka etogoke, ka alaroikee, ka alaroi nuka etogo loka Edeke, kaibois da naelal naka erute loka Akipi, kaibois da naelal naka erute loka Epuraim."
Nehemiah8:17 Kiswamata ekodet loka ŋul kere Iuabonunete kaiioreorio iswamin, kiboikinos oswamin: naarai agear kapaarasia nuka Yesua okoku loka Nun aitodol apaaran ŋin mam idwe luka Isirael eswamaenenete kwaŋin, Kojai ailel naepol noi."
Nehemiah8:18 Ido ŋinipaaran, agear kapaaran nasodit aitodol apaaran nakawasia, asiomenenei ŋesi kotoma oitabo loka ikisila luka Edeke, Koricata epucit apaarasia akanykaarei; apaaran nakikanyetekauni kojai atukonokinet nakayamakina, kwape ajaar aicorakinet."
Nehemiah9:1 Kapaaran naka akaisaarei ka nuoŋon naka elap kalo ajaas idwe luka Isirael etukonokina kanuka ailuŋ, konapitos ipukoi, kojukitos da alup."
Nehemiah9:2 Kotiakar aur naka Isirael komo kere, kobwaata kolimonosi aronisiokee ka numam adolit nuka lukapapaakee."
Nehemiah9:3 Kobwaata kaiboisiokee, kosiomata kotoma oitabo loka ikisila luka EJAKAIT Ekecedeke kodaut atutubet nakiwononet naka apaaran; atutubet ace nakiwononet kolimosi, komaata EJAKAIT Ekecedeke,"
Nehemiah9:4 Kosodete kobwaata Yesua, ka Bani, ka Kadumiel, ka Sebania, ka Buni, ka Serebia, ka Bani, ka Kenani, kadoketa nuka Ilebin, komonyakis EJAKAIT Ekecedeke keporoto loepol."
Nehemiah9:5 Kosodete Ilebin, Yesua, ka Kadumiel, ka Bani, ka Kasabaneia, ka Serebia, ka Kodia, ka Sebania, ka Petakia, kotemasi atiar, “Kobwaata, kimalata EJAKAIT Ekusideke, ameun ikar luno kiton ikar kere: kituritete ekonikiror loka aibuses, loitopolooritai aitelekarite aimal ka aiturit kere,"
Nehemiah9:6 “Ŋo EJAKAIT, ijo bon ba, ibu kosub akuj, akui naka akuj, ka aiorekec kere, akwap ka iboro kere lueiaas toma, aŋololin da ka luejaas tomakee kere, ijo idari kes kere; kimai jo ajore kere naka akui,"
Nehemiah9:7 Irai ijo EJAKAIT Edeke, loabu koseu Aburam ka alemun ŋes kour loka Ikaludean, kosodi amaikin ŋes ekiror Aburaam;"
Nehemiah9:8 ibu kodum eketau erai lomunot kakonyenekon, kosodi kitutuk kaŋes aitutuket ainakin akwap naka Ekanaanit, ka Ekitit, ka Emorait, ka Eperisit, ka Eyebusit, ka Egirugasit, ainakin aurike, ido ibu ijo kitodolik akonikiro; naarai irai ijo loidolit."
Nehemiah9:9 “Ido ibu koany aiticanitoi naka lukapapaakosi koMisiri, kosodi apupun aimonyokec kariri naka Aŋolol Nakarenan;"
Nehemiah9:10 kitodu da aanyuneta ka nukaumokin kama ejai Parao, ka ikekeiaanakinak kere, ka ituŋa kere luka akwapuke; naarai ibu kojen eiturikee kamakee; kodumunia ekiror, kwape ejaar lolo."
Nehemiah9:11 Ido ibu kotiak anolcl kakonyenekee, kitoroto kidin kaŋolol kakwap naconit; nul da luebwapitos kes ibu kocakak ataro, kwape ecakarere amoru toma akipi nuegogon."
Nehemiah9:12 Ido bobo ibu kinarenikinite kes kopir loka edou paaran; kopir da loka akim kuare; acaikinite kes korot lotikitoroto.
Nehemiah9:13 Ido ibu kodoku komoru Sinai, kinere kakes ijai toma akuj, kosodi ainakin kes itubesia luetenito, ka ikisila lukabeit, apueuneta ka aicorakineta nuejok."
Nehemiah9:14 Kiteienu kes asabatokon nakalaunan, kicorak kes aicorakineta, ka apucuneta, ka ekisil, kama ka Musa ekonikeiaanakinan,"
Nehemiah9:15 Koinak da inyamat luapote kokuiu kanuka eteneikec, kitolomik kes akipi kotoma atiida kanuka akurekec, kicorak kolomasi airum akwap naibu korio akonikan ainakin kes."
Nehemiah9:16 “Konye kes ka lukapapaakos kiswamata keitur, kitininikata imurisiŋakee, komam epupunete aicorakinetakon,"
Nehemiah9:17 koneroto arimar, mam da apotu kiitutu nnkaumokinikon nuibu kosub kotomakec; konye kitininikata imurisiŋakec, kibwaikis ekayaiton kipaliikis aboŋor obulesenekec, konye irai ijo Edeke loitemonokino aision, lokasianut, loileleba aitim, loiyapi anyunyurtkin, loepol aitim, mam ibu kojal kes."
Nehemiah9:18 Eebo, kedautu kesi asubun itaok yeniealara, kobalas ebe, ‘Yen ŋes Edekekon lokitolomuni koMisiri,’ ido kiswamatos nukitunyunyurikinete noi;"
Nehemiah9:19 konye ijo kanuka aitimikon nakiponesio luipu mam ibu kojalak kes kamodiŋ: mam epir loka edou anyoununei kamakee paaran, ainarenikinite kes korot; karaida epir loka akim kuare, acaikinite kes, aitodikinitor erot lotikitoroto."
Nehemiah9:20 Ido ibu koinak ekonimoyo lokajokan aituutoonor kes, mam ibu kimik emanukon aitukekee, ibu koinak kes akipi kanuka akurekee."
Nehemiah9:21 Eebo, ibu kitanenenei kes ikar akaisaoŋon kamodiŋ, komamei ibore yenepudasi; mam ikeeenapen amoionenenete, mam akecekeien abuununete."
Nehemiah9:22 Ido ibu koinak kes ajakanuto ka atekerin, nuibu kokorak kwape ejaatar akorakinetakee: kosodete airum akwap naka Sikon, akwap naka eka baka loka Kesibon, ka akwap naka Og ekabaka loka Basan."
Nehemiah9:23 Ido ibu kitupuu ikeeedwe kwape aacer nukokuju, kitolomik da kes akwap, naibu kolimok lukapapaakec ebe elomarete airum."
Nehemiah9:24 Aso kolomasi idwe kirumata akwap, ibu kipiko lueboiete kakwap, Ikanaanin, kakonyenekee, kijaik akaninikec, ka ikabakanakec, ka atekerin nuka akwap, kiswamakis kes kwape kekotototor."
Nehemiah9:25 Kirumata ireria luabwaitai, ka akwap napusuk, kirumata itogoi luileleba iboro kere lukaiokak, amototin nuabokok, imanikoria luka emusabibu ka luka iseitunin, ka ikito luipu noi luka araito; asa konyamata, kimonikinos, kotumata, kisiyalamanakinete aiokisikon naepol."
Nehemiah9:26 “Konye komam erimarito, kipalionokinete jo, koeakasi ikonikisila kaukee, koarata inabinokon luetejenanakinete neejaas kesi aibelokin kes bobo neijai ijo, kiswamaenenete nukitunyunyurikinete noi,"
Nehemiah9:27 Ŋes ibu kijaikinia kes akan naka lukasurupokee, luesiyalononoete kes: aso kapak naka ieanikee naamonyenenata neiiai, kopupununei ijai toma akuj; kwape ejaar akoniitim nakiponesio luipu koinak kes iketajarak luetajarenenete kes kakan naka lukasurupokee."
Nehemiah9:28 Konye nakedaununiata aiyeŋun, kiswamata bobo aronis kakonyenekon; - ŋes ibu kinyeinia kes akan naka lukasurupokee ayaite koyata kes: konye nakebonununioto, komonyakis jo, kopupununei ijai toma akui; koyuununei kes irwanipu kwape eiaar akoniitim."
Nehemiah9:29 Kitejenikin mama ejaas kesi, kosodi kinyaku bobo okisilakon: konye kiswamatos keitur, komam epupunete aicorakinetakon, konye kodiakanarete itubesiakon, (lutikiswama ituŋanan, tetere ejari kotomakec,) kolemununete kokeperinikee, kitininikata imurisiŋakec, koneroto apupun."
Nehemiah9:30 Konye kotitinonokini kes ikar luipu, kiteienikin mama ejaas kesi komoyokon kotoma onabinokon: konye koneroto aitoikin akit: ŋes ibu kokorakinia kes akan naka ituŋa luka akwapin."
Nehemiah9:31 Konye kanuka aitimikon naka iponesio luipu mam ibu kodau kes cut, karaida aijal kes; naarai irai ijo Edeke lokasianut ido loketimon."
Nehemiah9:32 “Aso do wu Edekekosi, Edeke lokapolon, lokapedor, Iokanosibib, loirieit aitutuket ka aitim, aitaaritoi kere nakidolokinit sio, ka ikosikabakan, ka ikosikapolok, ka isasedotinikosi, ka inabinokosi, ka ikonituŋa kere, agear apak naka ikabakan luka Asuria kiton lolo kinyek asubite bala edit kakonyenekon."
Nehemiah9:33 Konye irai ijo lokadoliton kakere nukidolokinete sio; naarai ibu kiswamaenenei nukabeit, konye sio kipou keswamaenenete nueroko:"
Nehemiah9:34 karaida ikabakanakosi, ka ikapolokokosi, ka isasedotinikosi, karaida lukapapaakosi mam apotu korieenenete ikonikisila, kwabo mam eiranarete aicorakinetakon, ka aireienunetakon, nuitelenanakini ijo kes."
Nehemiah9:35 Naarai mam apotu kiiaanakis jo kotoma ajakanutukec, ido kotoma ajokisikon naepol naibu koinak, ido kakwap naepol napusuk naibu koinak kakonyenekee mam apotu kibelokinos anyoun kaswamisiokee nueroko."
Nehemiah9:36 Koany, kirai lolo ibulesin, akwap da naibu koinak lukapapaakosi anyamenen araitokeŋ ka aiokisiken, koany, kirai isio ibulesin kotomake,"
Nehemiah9:37 Ido einakini ameda naepol ikabakan luibu ijo kibwaik ayait sio kanuka adiakanaretakosi: ido ejaas kes kapedor kawatekosi, ka ibarenekosi, kwape itoiokitotor kesi, kianyu isio ican luipu.”"
Nehemiah9:38 Karaida keiaas ŋun kwaŋin konye kitutukinit aitutuket nakabeit, kiwadika da; ipueakinete da ikosikapolok, ka Ilebinikosi, ka isasedotinikosi aanyunetakee."
Nehemiah10:1 Ido nul luapotu kipucakis aanyunet kes lu: Nekemia Etirusata, okoku loka Kakalia, ka Sedekia,"
Nehemiah10:2 Seraia, ka Asaria, ka Yeremia;"
Nehemiah10:3 Pasur, ka Amaria, ka Malikiya;"
Nehemiah10:4 Katus, ka Sebania, ka Maluk;"
Nehemiah10:5 Karim, ka Meremot, ka Obadia;"
Nehemiah10:6 Daniel, ka Gineton, ka Baruk;"
Nehemiah10:7 Mesulam, ka Abiya, ka Miyamin;"
Nehemiah10:8 Maasia, ka Biligai, ka Semaia: nul kes araas isasedotin."
Nehemiah10:9 Ikiroria da luka Ilebin kes lu: Yesua okoku loka Asania, ka Binui lokodwe luka Kenadad, ka Kadumiel;"
Nehemiah10:10 ka ikeceinacan, Sebania, ka Kodia, ka Kelita, ka Pelaia, ka Kanan;"
Nehemiah10:11 Mika, ka Rekob, ka Kasabia;"
Nehemiah10:12 Sakur, ka Serebia, ka Sebania;"
Nehemiah10:13 Kodia, ka Bani, ka Beninu."
Nehemiah10:14 Ŋaka luka ituŋa: Paros, Pakat-moab, Elam, Satu, Bani;"
Nehemiah10:15 Buni, Asagad, Bebai;"
Nehemiah10:16 Adoniya, Bigibai, Adin;"
Nehemiah10:17 Ater, Kesekia, Asur;"
Nehemiah10:18 Kodia, Kasum, Besai;"
Nehemiah10:19 Karip, Anatot, Nobai;"
Nehemiah10:20 Magapias, Mesulam, Kesir;"
Nehemiah10:21 Mesesabel, Sadok, Yadua;"
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatia, Kanan, Anaia;"
Nehemiah10:23 Kosea, Kanania, Kasub;"
Nehemiah10:24 Kalokes, Pila, Sobek;"
Nehemiah10:25 Rekum, Kasabana, Maaseia;"
Nehemiah10:26 Akia, Kanan, Anaŋ;"
Nehemiah10:27 Maluk, Karim, ka Baana."
Nehemiah10:28 Ka icetuŋa kere, isasedotin, Ilebin, ikagolok, ikayook, Inetinim, ka nul da kere luapotu kogitara kotoma atekerin nuka akwapin mama ejaas ikisila luka Edeke, ka aŋorokec, ka idwekec lusap ka lupesur, ŋinidiopet yenajai aijen ka ajenun;"
Nehemiah10:29 Kimorikikinos kesi kaiinaeanakee, isotiakee, koeamut ekenit, ka aiyaposit, alosenen kokisila luka Edeke, lukeinakinio kama ka Musa ekejaanakinan loka Edeke, aidarenen ka aiswamaenen aicorakineta kere nuka EJAKAIT, EJAKAITikosi, ka itubesiake, ka ikisilake."
Nehemiah10:30 Ido kenyeis aikor apesuruwok atekerin nuka akwap, karaida amanyanakin itelepaiwok apesurukee."
Nehemiah10:31 Ido arai keyaununutu atekerin nuka akwap iboro arai lunyaman kere agwelanar kapaaran nakasabato, mam kigwelanakini kakes kapaaran nakasabato, karaida apaaran nakalaunan: ido kisiukaari alup kokaru lokikanyetekaarei, kijali da aiburaenen apesen kere,"
Nehemiah10:32 Ido kibwaanakini ikisila, atubonokinor ŋolikaru idiopet kouni yenika esekel kanuka aiiaanakin naka etogo loka Edekewok;"
Nehemiah10:33 Kanuka imugatin lukaitodikin, ka ainakinet naka akiria natir, ka ainakinet naicweio natir, nuka asabaton, ka napilamununia elap, ka ipuein lueseunitai, ka nuka iboro lukalaunak, ka ainakineta nuka adiakaret aitulucio Isirael, ido kaswam kere naka etogo loka Edekewok."
Nehemiah10:34 Kipou kelamilamata eroet, isasedotin, ka Ilebin, ka ituŋa, kanuka ainakinet naka akito, ayaunun toma togo loka Edekewok, kwape ejaatar ikekia luka lukapapaawok, kapakio nueseunitai kaŋolikaru, aieweenena kotem loka EJAKAIT Edekewok, kwape kiwadikatere kokisila:"
Nehemiah10:35 ayaunun da araito nugeet nuka alupowok, ka araito nugeet nuka araito kere nuka iponesio kere luka ikito, ŋclikaru, togo loka EJAKAIT."
Nehemiah10:36 Ido ikiyaik luka odwewok, ka luka ibarenewok, kwape kiwadikatere kokisila: ka ikiyaik luka isipanin luka aituk ka amerekekin, ayaunun toma togo loka Edekewok, mama ejaas isasedotin luiiaanakinete togo loka Edekewok."
Nehemiah10:37 Ayaunun da nugeet nuka ainumaretawok, ka ainakinetawok nukikianara, ka araito nuka iponesio kere luka ikito, ebino ka akinyet, mama ejaas isasedotin, kotoma agolai nukotogo loka Edekewok; ka idiopet kotomoneta luka alupowok mama ejaas Ilebin; naarai ŋul, kes Ilebin, luetukonokinete idiopet kotomoneta koreriawok kere luekoriere."
Nehemiah10:38 Ido eiaenena esasedoti okoku loka Aaron ka Ilebin, naetukonokiniata Ilebin idiopet kotomoneta: eyaununete Ilebin idiopet kotomoneta toma idiopet kotomoneta togo loka Edekewok, agolai, togo loka imono."
Nehemiah10:39 Eyaununete idwe luka Isirael ka idwe luka Lebi ainakineta nukikianara nuka akima, ka ebino, ka akinyet, agolai nuejaas iboro luka aibois nakalaunan, ka isasedotin luijaanakinete, ka ikagolok, ka ikayook da; mam do kiialakini etogo loka Edekewok."
Nehemiah11:1 Kiboienenete ikapolok luka itun a ko Yerusalem: kilamilamata eroet icetuŋa da, alemun idiopet kotomon aiboikin Yerusalem ere loka launan, ka kwi da ikanykaoŋon aiboikin oreria ice."
Nehemiah11:2 Kosodetc ituŋa ailipakin arereŋ ikiliok kere luenasikina aiboikin Yerusalem.
Nehemiah11:3 Lu kes eraas ijaka luka ebuku lueboienenete koYerusalem: konye koreria luka Yuda koiaenena nlnituŋanan alupoke kotoma oreriakec, Isirael, isasedotin, Ilebin, Inetinim, ka idwe luka ikeiaanakinak luka Solomon."
Nehemiah11:4 Kojaenenas koYerusalem ice kodwe luka Yuda, ka lukodwe luka Benyamin. Kodwe luka Yuda; Ataia okoku loka Usia, okoku loka Sekaria, okoku loka Amaria, okoku loka Sepatia, okoku loka Makalalel lokodwe luka Peres;"
Nehemiah11:5 ka Maaseia okoku loka Baruk, okoku loka Kol-kose, okoku loka Kasaia, okoku loka Adaia, okoku loka Yoiarib, okoku loka Sekaria, okoku loka Esilonit."
Nehemiah11:6 Odwe luka Peres kere luaiaenenas koYerusalem emwaasi ituŋa luetitin akwat aoŋon ka akaisakanykape ka lukanykauni.
Nehemiah11:7 Lu kes odwe luka Benyamin; Salu okoku loka Mesulam, okoku loka Yoed, okoku loka Pedaia, okoku loka Kolaia, okoku loka Maaseia, okoku loka Itiel, okoku loka Yesaia."
Nehemiah11:8 Kotupite ŋes Gabai, Salai, akwat akanykaoŋon ka akaisaarei ka lukanykauni."
Nehemiah11:9 Kerai Yoel okoku loka Sikiri ekaanyanaranikec: kiareikin Yuda okoku loka Kasenua ayait ere.
Nehemiah11:10 Lukosasedotin: Yedaia okoku loka Yoiarib, Yakin,"
Nehemiah11:11 Seraia okoku loka Kilikia, okoku loka Mesulam, okoku loka Sadok, okoku loka Meraiot, okoku loka Akitub, ekayaiton loka etogo loka Edeke,"
Nehemiah11:12 Ikeeeinacan lueswamaenenete aswam naka etogo, akwat akanykauni ka akaisaarei ka luarei: ka Adaia okoku loka Yerokam, okoku loka Pelalia, okoku loka Amisi, okoku loka Sekaria, okoku loka Pasur, okoku loka Malikiya,"
Nehemiah11:13 ka ikeinacan, ijaka luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee, akwat aarei ka akaisaoŋon ka luarei: ka Amasisai okoku loka Asarel, okoku loka Akasai, okoku loka Mesilemot, okoku loka Imer,"
Nehemiah11:14 ka ikeceinacan, iruna lukirigin luetitin, akwatat ka akaisaarei ka lukanykauni: Sabidiel okoku loka Kagedolim ŋes ckaanyanaranikee."
Nehemiah11:15 Lukolebin: Semaia okoku loka Kasub, okoku loka Asirikam, okoku loka Kasabia, okoku loka Buni;"
Nehemiah11:16 ka Sabetai ka Yosabad lukojaka luka Ilebin, luaanyanarete aswamisio nukokina nukotogo loka Edeke."
Nehemiah11:17 Ka Matania okoku loka Mika okoku loka Sabidi, okoku loka Asap, lokerai lokapolon aiŋarenikin aimal naelipenenata, ka Bakabukia, lokiareit koinacanake; ka Abuda okoku loka Samua, okoku loka Galal, okoku loka Yedutun."
Nehemiah11:18 Ilebin kere luajaas ore lokalaunan emwaasi akwat aarei ka akaisakanykauni ka luonon.
Nehemiah11:19 Bobo da ikagolok, Akub, ka Talumon, ka ikeeeinacan, luedarete irutei, emwaasi akwatat ka akaisakanykaarei ka luarei,"
Nehemiah11:20 Luasalakinete luka Isirael, luka isasedotin, Ilebin, ajaenenas koreria kere luka Yuda, ŋinitunanan kairumeteke."
Nehemiah11:21 Konye kiboikinos Inetinim koOpel: kopolokinito Sika ka Gisipa Inetinim.
Nehemiah11:22 Ido ekaanyanaran loka Ilebin ko Yerusalem ŋes Usi okoku loka Bani, okoku loka Kasabia, okoku loka Matania, okoku loka Mika, lokodwe luka Asap, ikayook, loayait aswam naka etogo loka Edeke,"
Nehemiah11:23 Naarai abu ekabaka kieorakinite nukec, ka aicorakinet naicasit kanuka ikayook, kwape ejaar eipud loka ninipaaran."
Nehemiah11:24 Koiai Petakia okoku loka Mcsesabel, lokodwe luka Sera okoku loka Yuda, kakan naka ekabaka kanuka akiro kere nuka ituŋa."
Nehemiah11:25 Lukoreria, ka imanikoriakec, kiboienenete ice kodwe luka Yuda koKiriat-araba, koreriake da, koDibon ka ireriake, koYekabeseel ka ireriake da."
Nehemiah11:26 KoYesua da, ka Molada, ka Bet-pelet;"
Nehemiah11:27 koKasar-sual da, ka Beer-seba ka ireriake;"
Nehemiah11:28 koSikilag, ka Mekona ka ireriake;"
Nehemiah11:29 koEnrimon, ka Sora, ka Yaramut;"
Nehemiah11:30 Sanoa, ka Adulam, ka ireriakecj-Lakis ka imanikoriake, Aseka da ka ireriake. Kidukuroto anyoun koBeer-seba kiton aditot naka Kinom."
Nehemiah11:31 Kiboienenete da idwe luka Benyamin anyoun koGeba ape, koMikimas ka Aiya, koBet-el ka ireriake;"
Nehemiah11:32 koAnatot, ka Nob, ka Anania;"
Nehemiah11:33 ka Kasor, ka Rama, ka Gitaim;"
Nehemiah11:34 Kadid, Seboim, Nebalat;"
Nehemiah11:35 Lod, ka Ono, aditot naka ikeswamak luepiriaka."
Nehemiah11:36 LukoLebin, kimorikikinos irioneta ice koYuda ka Benyamin."
Nehemiah12:1 Lu kes isasedotin ka Ilebin luapotu kouparos ka Serubabel okoku loka Sealutiel, ka Yesua, Seraia, Yeremia, Esera;"
Nehemiah12:2 Amaria, Maluk, Katus;"
Nehemiah12:3 Sekania, Rekum, Meremot;"
Nehemiah12:4 Ido, Ginetoi, Abiya;"
Nehemiah12:5 Miyamin, Maadia, Biliga;"
Nehemiah12:6 Semaia, ka Yoiarib, Yedaia;"
Nehemiah12:7 Salu, Amok, Kilikia, Yedaia. Ŋul kes ijaka luka isasedotin ka luka ikeeeinacan kapaarasia nuka Yesua."
Nehemiah12:8 Ido Ilebin: Yesua, Binui, Kadumiel, Serebia, Yuda, ka Matania loapolokinit aimal, ŋes ka ikeinaean."
Nehemiah12:9 Bakabukia da ka Uno, iinacanakec, komeanakinos kakes korioneta."
Nehemiah12:10 Yesua kouri Yoiakim, Yoiakim kouri Eliasib, Eliasib kouri Yoiada,"
Nehemiah12:11 Yoiada kouri Yonatan, Yonatan kouri Yadua."
Nehemiah12:12 Kapaarasia nuka Yoiakim ajaas isasedotin, ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee: loka Seraia, Meraia; loka Yeremia, Kanania;"
Nehemiah12:13 loka Esera, Mesulam; loka Amaria, Yekokanan;"
Nehemiah12:14 loka Maluki, Yonatan; loka Sebania, Yosep;"
Nehemiah12:15 loka Karim, Aduna; loka Meraiot, Kelikai;"
Nehemiah12:16 loka Ido, Sekaria; loka Gineton, Mesulam;"
Nehemiah12:17 loka Abiya, Sikiri; loka Miniamin, loka Moadia, Pilitai;"
Nehemiah12:18 loka Biliga, Samua; loka Semaia, Yekonatan;"
Nehemiah12:19 loka Yoiarib, Matenai; loka Yedaia, Usi;"
Nehemiah12:20 loka Salai, Kalai; loka Amok, Eber;"
Nehemiah12:21 loka Kilikia, Kasabia; loka Yedaia, Netanel."
Nehemiah12:22 Ilebin kapaarasia nuka Eliasib, ka Yoiada, ka Yokanan, ka Yadua, aponi kiwadikai ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakee, ka isasedotin da, kairum naka Dario Eperusiat."
Nehemiah12:23 Aponi kiwadikai odwe luka Lebi, ikapolok luka ikekia luka lukapapaakec oitabo loka aisiitonokin, aitodol apaarasia nuka Yokanan okoku loka Eliasib."
Nehemiah12:24 Ŋaka luka Ilebin: Kasabia, Serebia, ka Yesua okoku loka Kadumiel, ka iinaeanakec kosesenas, aiturit ka aimal kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka Daudi etuŋanan loka Edeke, erioŋet koseseni erioŋet."
Nehemiah12:25 Matania, ka Bakabukia, Obadia, Mesulam, Talumon, Akub, kes ikagolok luedarete aiŋadisia nukorutei."
Nehemiah12:26 Ŋul kes lukejaas kapaarasia nuka Yoiakim okoku loka Yesua, okoku loka Yosadak, kapaarasia da nuka Nekemia ekayaiton ka nuka Esera esasedoti ekewadikan."
Nehemiah12:27 Komoata kesi Ilebin kotoma aiboisiokec kere, ayaun kes Yerusalem atiakunio naka arwatat, aidar atiakunio kaiyalama, kimalaete, koyeete, kojaas kaisinin, ka isabulin, ka adeudeun."
Nehemiah12:28 Kotukonokinos odwe luka ikayook, anyoun kotoma apuuton nairimorit Yerusalem, koreria da luka Inetopatin;"
Nehemiah12:29 kotoma Bet-giligal, komanikoria lukoGeba ka Asumabet: naarai adukitos ikayook ireria airimor Yerusalem."
Nehemiah12:30 Kitesegaaros isasedotin ka Ilebin, kitesegaasi ituŋa da, ka irutei ka arwatar."
Nehemiah12:31 Kasodi ketodoka lukapolok luka Yuda arwatat, kepiiki atukon aarei nucpolok nuimalaete ka nuelosete kokokoron; itorit atukot adiopet akan nakotcten karwatat abear orute loka aoret."
Nehemiah12:32 Kotupite kes Kosaia, ka atutubet naka ikapolok luka Yuda."
Nehemiah12:33 Ka Asaria, ka Esera, ka Mesulam,"
Nehemiah12:34 Yuda, ka Benyamin, ka Semaia, ka Yeremia,"
Nehemiah12:35 ka ice kodwe luka isasedotin ejaas karupepen: Sekaria okoku loka Yonatan, okoku loka Semaia, okoku loka Matania, okoku loka Mikaia, okoku loka Sakur, okoku loka Asap;"
Nehemiah12:36 ka ikeinacan, Scmaia, ka Asarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Nctanel, ka Yuda, ka Kanani, kojaas kiboro lueruos luka Daucli etuŋanan leka Edeke; kiŋarenikinite kes Esera ekewadikan:"
Nehemiah12:37 kitoroto orute loka eeoa, itcnarito, kodokasi kadoketa nuka ere loka Daucli, neikiaror arwatat, kuju ketogo loka Daucli, kiton orute loka akipi ari nakokide."
Nehemiah12:38 Kolot atukot ace kanul kaluimalaete airiamakin kakes, katupit eoŋ da kes, ka atutubet naka ituŋa, karwatat, kokuju togo loeoja loka iupaa kiton arwatat naelal;"
Nehemiah12:39 kuju kerute loka Epuraim, ka neejai erute Iomoion, ka neejai erute loka lukeeor, ka etogo loeoja loka Kananel, ka etogo da loeoja loka Kamea, kiton orute loka amerekekin: kobwaata kopalarito korute loka ikedarak."
Nehemiah12:40 Kobwaata atukon aarei kanul kaluimalaete kotogo loka Edeke, eoŋ da, ka atutubet naka ikayaitok kaeon:"
Nehemiah12:41 ka isasedotin, Eliakim, Maaseia, Miniamin, Mikaia, Elioenai, Sekaria, ka Kanania da, ejaas karupepen;"
Nehemiah12:42 ka Maaseia, ka Semaia, ka Eleasar, ka Usi, ka Yekokanan, ka Malikiya, ka Elam, ka Eser. Kosodete ikayook ayoore keporoto loepol, Yeserakia ŋes ekenarenonikec."
Nehemiah12:43 Koinakis asuban nuepolok kapaaran kaŋin, kiyalamas; naarai abu Edeke kisiyalamikinite kes kaiyalama naepol: kiyalamasi da aŋor ka idwe; kopupunoi da aiyalama naka Yerusalem kaneelwana."
Nehemiah12:44 Kapaaran kaŋin aponi koseunai ituŋa apolokin agolai nuka iboro luka akais nuipu, luka ainakineta nuikeitai, luka araito nugeet, ka luka lukitomoneta, atukonokin kwape ejaatar imanikoria lukoreria, akorakineta nuieorakinitai isasedotin ka Ilebin kokisila: naarai abu Yuda kiyalamikin kanuka isasedotin ka Ilebin luejaanakinete."
Nehemiah12:45 Koricito aijaanakin naka Edekekee, ka aijaanakin naka aitesegaario, eswamaenenete kwape kwaŋin ikayook ka ikagolok, kwape ajaar aicorakinet naka Daudi ka naka okokuke Solomon da."
Nehemiah12:46 Naarai kapaarasia nusek nuka Daudi ka Asap ajaenena ekenarenon loka ikayook, ka ikososinei luka aiturit ka aimal Edeke,"
Nehemiah12:47 Ido kapaarasia nuka Serubabel, kapaarasia da nuka Nekemia, koinak Isirael kere akorakineta nuka ikayook ka ikagolok kwape ejaar eipud loka ŋinipaaran: kogitasi nuka Ilebin; ka Ilebin da kogitasi nuka odwe luka Aaron."
Nehemiah13:1 Kapaaran kaŋin kosioma toma oitabo loka Musa kopupete ituŋa kere; kodumut iwadikatai nen ebe mam elomanari Emonait ka Emoabit toma atukot naka Edeke ikar kere.
Nehemiah13:2 Naarai mam apotu kisiriamata idwe luka Isirael ejaas kinyamat ka akipi, konye koropata Baalam aluikin kes, aiken kes: konye kituluo Edeke ekenit araun arereŋ."
Nehemiah13:3 Kosodi kanen, kedaut apupun ikisila, kosodete atiakar kotoma Isirael erioŋet kere loka imo."
Nehemiah13:4 Eroko ŋun keiaikina, abu Eliasib esasedoti loaseunitai apolokin agolai nuka etogo loka Edekewok, naarar ekamuran loka Tobia,"
Nehemiah13:5 kitemokinite Tobia agola naepol, nelem ibwaanakinete ainakineta nuka akiria, ka lueur maa, ka iboro, ka lukitomoneta luka akima ka ebino ka akinyet, nuainanakinio Elebin, ka kiyaook, ka ikagolok kaieorakinet; ka ainakineta nuikearitai nuka isasedotin."
Nehemiah13:6 Konye kapakio kanun kere kamamei eoŋ koYerusalem: naarai kokaru loka akaisauni ka luarei loka Aratasasata ekabaka loka Babulon, abu kalot mama ejai ekabaka, kosodi ketuboros apaarasia kenitu ekabaka:"
Nehemiah13:7 kabu Yerusalem, kajenu aronis naabu Eliasib kiswama kanuka Tobia, aitemokin ŋes agola kalaroi nuka etogo loka Edeke."
Nehemiah13:8 Ketakadik eoŋ noi: ŋes ainakin acakar kina iboro kere luka Tobia.
Nehemiah13:9 Kasodi aicorakin, kitesegaasi agolai: kayau do bobo iboro luka etogo loka Edeke, ka ainakineta nuka akiria ka lueur maa."
Nehemiah13:10 Kaienu ebe mam aponi koinakinitete Ilebin akorakinetakee; ŋes akeritotor Ilebin ka ikayook lueswamaete aswam, ninitunanan omanikorike."
Nehemiah13:11 Kasodi ketoron ikayaitok, kabala ebe, “Kanukinyo inyeinere etogo loka Edeke?” Katukonoki kes, kebwaik aiboisiokec."
Nehemiah13:12 Kosodete luka Yuda kere ayaun icliopet kotomon yenika akima ka ebino ka akinyet aiŋadisia.
Nehemiah13:13 Kadakak ikedarak aiŋadisia, Selemia esasedoti, ka Sadok ekewadikan, lokoLebin da Pedaia: kotupak kes Kanan okoku loka Sakur, okoku loka Matania: naarai aomitai araut lumunon, aswamukec ŋes akoranakin iinacanakec."
Nehemiah13:14 Wu Ekadeke, kiitununei eoŋ kanuka nin, ido sirikimwata aswamisioka nuejok nueswamanakini etogo loka Ekadeke, ka aiiaanakinike."
Nehemiah13:15 Kapaarasia kanun abu kaany kotoma Yuda ituŋa luepudapudaete acueta kapaaran nakasabato, kitolomete da ikes, kibwaanakinete iboro asigiriakec: ebino da, imusabibun, ka itinin, ka abwokon nuka iponesio kere, lukitolomete Yerusalem kapaaran nakasabato: karaun ekaienan kamakec kapaaran naagwelanariata inyamat."
Nehemiah13:16 Ajaas da ituŋa luka Turo kanen, luetolomete lukecor, ka iboro luka iponesio kere, kitwegelanarete idwe luka Yuda, ko Yerusalem da kapaaran nakasabato."
Nehemiah13:17 Kasodi ketoron isotia luka Yuda, katema kes atiar, “Aronis anyoin na naiswamaete, amunamun apaaran nakasabato?"
Nehemiah13:18 Mere kwape kwaŋin eswamaete lukapapaakus, Edekewok da mam eyauna aronis na kere mamawok, ka ere lo da? Konye yes iyatakinete ayaun anyunyura toma Isirael kanuka amunamun apaaran nakasabato.”"
Nehemiah13:19 Kosodi kanen, napikamusi aige nakasabato korutei luka Yerusalem, kecorak aigol ikekia, kecorak da sirikenaar aitodol naedaunor nakasabato: kebwaiki ice kokejaanakinakaka aidar irutei, kinyeis aitolomun abwokon kere kapaaran nakasabato."
Nehemiah13:20 Kosodete ikagwelanarak ka ikagwelak luka iboro luka iponesio kere koperoto kina ka Yerusalem irwan atipet arai aarei.
Nehemiah13:21 Karaun ekajenan mamakec, kabala kes ebe, “Kanukinyo iperioto yesi airimor arwatat? Arai kiswamata bobo kwaŋin, kaeni yes.” Kosodi ageun kapaaran kaŋin mam bobo apotu kopotu kanakasabato,"
Nehemiah13:22 Kasodi aicorakin Ilebin aitalaun bonik, aponare aidar irutei, aitalaun apaaran nakasabato. Wu Ekadeke, kiitununei eoŋ kanuka ŋin, kitim kwape ejaar akoniitim naepol noi."
Nehemiah13:23 Kapaarasia kanun da abu kaany lyudayan luamanyitos aŋor nuka Asudod, ka nuka Amon, ka nuka Moab:"
Nehemiah13:24 kinerasi idwekec da aŋajep nainyalinyala naka Asudod, kwabo mam apedorete einer aŋajep naka Iyudayan, konye kwape ajaar aŋajep naka ninlteker."
Nehemiah13:25 Kasodi ketoron kes, kelamaki da kes, kanaŋanana da ice kakesi, kainyul da ikecetima, kesiyapoik kes kolimito Edeke ebe, “Mam ikoranakinete adwekus odwekec, karaida amanyanakin adwekec odwekus, karaida yes ikulepek."
Nehemiah13:26 Mam kereka abu Solomon eka baka loka Isirael kodiak kotoma kanun? Konye toma atekerin nuipu mam etakanuna ekabaka loariakatar ŋesi, abu Ekedeke komina ŋes, abu Edeke kitarau ŋes ekabaka loka Isirael kere: konye apotu aŋor numo kitapaasi ŋes,"
Nehemiah13:27 Aso do kopupunoi yes da iswamaete aronis na naepol kere, aibucar mama ejai Edekewok aimany aŋor numo?”"
Nehemiah13:28 Kerai ediopet kodwe luka Yoiada, okoku loka Eliasib esasedoti lopeti ekamuran loka Sanabalat Ekoronit: kanuka nun abu kerenea ŋes kamakaŋ,"
Nehemiah13:29 Wu Ekadeke, kiitununei kes, naarai komunamunata esasedotene, ka aitutuket naka esasedotene, ka naka Ilebin."
Nehemiah13:30 Kwaŋin abu ketesegaaria kes mama ejaas imo kere, kaseik aijaanakin naka isasedotin ka naka Ilebin, ŋinituŋanan toma aswamuke:"
Nehemiah13:31 ka ainakinet naka akito, kapaarasia nueseunitai, ka nuka araito nugeet. Wu Ekadeke, kiitununei eoŋ kanuka ajokis."
Esther1:1 Kosodi kanen kapaarasia nuka Akasuero, (ŋes Akasuero ŋol loerumit ibukui akwatat ka akaisaarei ka lukanykaarei, anyoun koIndia kiton Etiopia:)"
Esther1:2 kapaarasia kaŋun, nakiboikinor ekabaka Akasuero oicoloŋ loka ajakanutuke, loajai Susa togo lokapolou,"
Esther1:3 kokaru lokiwuniet loka airumuke, abu kipoik epueit ikapolokoke kere ka ikekejaanakinak; kojaun apedor naka Perusia ka Media, kes ijaka ka ikapolok luka ibukui akonyeneke:"
Esther1:4 abu kitodia abar naka akejakanut nakaibuses, ka aiturio naka apolouke naitelekarit, apaarasia nuipu, kes apaarasia akwatat ka akaisakanykauni,"
Esther1:5 Kosodi ketuboros apaarasia ŋun, abu ekabaka kipoik epucit ituŋa kere luajaas nen Susa togo lokapolou, lukapolok ka ludidik da, apaarasia akanykaarei, kotoma alaro naka emanikor loka etogo lokapolou loka ekabaka:"
Esther1:6 ajaas aigalisio nuka egoe loekwaŋ, lopiria, lobululu koenitete kaunoi nuka ebaputa loejok, ka lomuge, kigiluna luka epuesa ka ipirin luka amor nukijesesinei: keraas itutio luka esabu ka epuesa, kamor nukijesesinei nuepesitai nukareŋak, nukakwaŋak, nudos, ka nukirionok da."
Esther1:7 Koinakis kes aimat koboro luka esa bu, (kogelegela iboro kaputokee,) kepol da noi ebino loka ekabaka, kwape ajaar aikor naka ekabaka,"
Esther1:8 Aimat da kojai kwape ejaar ekisil; komamei yenepedor aitiŋaikinit: naarai abu ekabaka kicorakinite ikekapolokitok kere lukotogoke kwaŋin, kiswama ŋinituŋanan kwape ekotor."
Esther1:9 Abu Basiti da akabaka, kipoik aŋor epueit kotogo loka ekabakane loarai loka ekabaka Akasuero,"
Esther1:10 Kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei, naalakaror etau loka ekabaka kanu ebino, kicorak ŋesi Mekumam, Bisita, Karabona, Bigita, ka Abagata, Setar, ka Karakas, ibwaein ikanykaarei luejaanakinete kakonyen nuka Akasuero ekabaka,"
Esther1:11 ayaun Basiti akabaka kakonyen nuka ekabaka konapite aboko naka ajakanut aitodikin ituŋa ka ikapolok ajokisike: naarai kerai naatemel.
Esther1:12 Konyc koŋer akabaka Basiti abunore kaicorakinet naka ekabaka kobwaein: ŋes anyunyurikinor noi ekabaka, koresiar da akenyunyura kotomake."
Esther1:13 Kosodi do ekabaka atemar lukacoa, luejenete apakio, (naarai kerai ŋol epone loka ekabaka mama ejaas kere luejenete ikisila ka etube:"
Esther1:14 kidunyasi Karasena, ka Setar, ka Adamata, ka Tarusis, ka Meres, ka Marasena, ka Memukan, kaŋes, ikapolok ikanykaarei luka Perusia ka Media, luaanyununete akonyen nuka ekabaka, luaraas lusodit kotoma ajakanut:)"
Esther1:15 kotema atiar, “Kekwaikis ai akabaka Basiti kwape ajaar ekisil, naarai mam erimarit ŋin naabu ekabaka Akasuero kicorak kobwaein?”"
Esther1:16 Koboŋok Memukan kakonyen nuka ekabaka ka ikapolok ebe, “Mam akabaka Basiti ediakarit mama ejai ekabaka bon, konye mama ejaas ikapolok kere, ka ituŋa da kere luejaas obulmi kere luka ekabaka Akasuero,"
Esther1:17 Naarai epupunete do aŋor kere aswamisioit na naka akabaka, emwaŋenenete ikeeekiliok kakonyenekee naelimitere ebe, ‘Abu ekabaka Akasuero kicorak Basiti akabaka ayaunio kakonyeneke, konye mam ebuno.’"
Esther1:18 Apaaran na da akapolok nuka Perusia ka Media nueiras nuka aswamisioit naka akabaka elimokinete kwaŋin ikapolok kere luka ekabaka, Aso ejaun do emwaŋit loepol ka anyunyura da."
Esther1:19 Arai kitojok ekabaka, kieorakinai do aicorakinet naka ekabaka, kiwadikai da kokisila luka Iperusian ka Imedian, kinyek ailocio, ebe, ‘Sirikebu bobo Basiti kakonyen nuka ekabaka Akasuero’; koinak ekabaka apolouke naka akabaka ace naitelekarit ŋes ajokis."
Esther1:20 Kosodi naelimorere ekisil loka ekabaka loelosi ŋesi aisilakin anatar ajakanutuke kere, (naarai epol,) kosodete do aŋor kere ayoŋite ikiliokokec, lukapolok ka ludidik da.”"
Esther1:21 Kitalaka akirot nin ekabaka ka ikapolok; kiswama ekabaka kwape ajaar akirot naka Mcmukan:
Esther1:22 Naarai kijuka ibaluan obukui kere luka ekabaka, toma ŋolibuku kwape ejaar eiwadikaeke mama ejai ŋiniteker kwape ejaar aŋajepekec, koyaite nolitunanan ekaleke elopet, ido kolimoroi da kwape ejaar aŋajep naka iketuŋa."
Esther2:1 Akaulo kanun, nakiyamakinor anyunyura naka ekabaka Akasuero, kiitu Basiti, ka nueswama ŋesi, ka naaponi kisilakinai mamakeŋ."
Esther2:2 Kosodete ikejaanakinak luka ekabaka luijaanakinete ŋes atemari ŋes atiar, “Mere komoikinai ekabaka abekon nukatumunak nuitemelelas:"
Esther2:3 koseu ekabaka ijaka kobukui kere luka ajakanutuke, kotukonokis abekon kere nukatumunak nuitcmelelas Susa togo lokapolou, togo loka aŋor, toma akan naka Kegai ebwacit loka ekabaka, ekedaran aŋor; kijaikinai iborokee luka aitesegaario:"
Esther2:4 apese da naitojokit ekabaka koraun akabaka aibois naka Basiti.” Kitalaka akirot nin ekabaka; kiswama kwaŋin.
Esther2:5 Kojai Eyudayat toma Susa togo lokapolou, ekekiror Morudekai, okoku loka Yair, okoku loka Simei, okoku loka Kis, Ebenyamenit:"
Esther2:6 lokeyanaario ko Yerusalem nepepe ka lueioreunitai ka Yekonia ekabaka loka Yuda, loabu Nebukadanesar ekabaka loko Babulon koyana."
Esther2:7 Kitanu ŋesi Kadasa, ŋes Esita, akoku naka papake lodidi: naarai amamei nin papa karaida toto, etemelel apese ajok asesen noi; ketwana papake ka totoke, koyana Morudekai ŋes araun akokuke,"
Esther2:8 Kosodi kanen, kepupun aicorakinet naka ekabaka, ka ekekisil, kotukokinitete apesur nuipu Susa togo lokapolou, akan naka Kegai, koyanaarai Esita togo loka ekabaka, kotoma akan naka Kegai, ekedaran loka aŋor."
Esther2:9 Kisiyalamik ŋes apese, kodum asianut kamaken; kisunya ŋesi ainakin ŋin iboroke luka aitesegaario, ka akorakinetake, ka apesur akanykaarei nuibusakinit ainakinio kotogo loka ekabaka: abu kiloeo ŋes ka apesuruke kitolomik kes aibois naitelekarit ajokis kotogo loka aŋor,"
Esther2:10 Mam abu Esita kitejenu atekerike ka ikeinacan: naarai abu Morudekai kieorite ŋes ebe sirikitejenu.
Esther2:11 Kitorenenei Morudekai nolikolonit kinaren kalaro naka etogo loka aŋor, ajenun kwape ejaar Esita, ka nuedoikinete ŋes."
Esther2:12 Kedol abeikin naka ninipese alomar mama ejai ekabaka Akasuero, kedaun ŋes aiswamakinio kwape ejaar ekisil loka aŋor, ilapio itomon ka luarei, (naarai kedoloto kwaŋin apaarasia nuka aitesegaariokec, kes ilapio ikanykape akinyet naka luesaete, ka ilapio ikanykapc aures namaa, ka iboro luka aiteseg aŋor,)"
Esther2:13 ŋes do ebunio apese mama ejai ekabaka, koinakinai ŋes nuekoto kere alosit kaŋes enyouni kotogo loka aŋor alomar togo loka ekabaka."
Esther2:14 Elosi ŋesi eboŋ, kobonun tupuruc toma togo lokiareit loka aŋor, akan naka Saasagas, ebwacit loka ckabaka, loidari abusian: mam bobo nin alomanar mama ejai ekabaka, dimikito isiyalamikinit ekabaka, enyaraunitai ekirorike."
Esther2:15 Kosodi nakedolio abeikin naka Esita, akoku naka Abikail papa lodidi loka Morudekai, loabu koya ŋes araun akokuke, alomar mama ejai ekabaka, mam abu kipuda ibore dimarai luaseiki ŋes Kegai ebwacit loka ekabaka, ekedaran loka aŋor. Kominunai Esita kakonyen nuka ŋul kere luasesenete ŋes."
Esther2:16 Aponi Esita koyanaarai mama ejai ekabaka Akasuero toma togoke loka akabakane olap lokitomonet, ŋes elap Tebet, okaru lokikanyetekaarei loka airumuke."
Esther2:17 Komina ekabaka Esita aitclekarit aŋor kere, kodum ŋes asianut ka aminunio kakonyeneke aitelekarit abekon kere; kibwaik ŋesi aboko naka akabakanc akouke kitarau ŋes akabaka aibois naka Basiti."
Esther2:18 Kosodi ekabaka aipoikin ikapolokoke ka ikejaanakinakake epucit loepol, ŋes epucit loka Esita; koinak ibukui aitimio, kokor ainakineta, kwape ajaar aikor naka ekabaka."
Esther2:19 Naatukokinotor abekon irwan nakiareit, abu Morudekai kiboikin orute loka ekabaka."
Esther2:20 Mam ber Esita etejenunit ikeinacan ka aketeker; kwape ecorakinia Morudekai; naarai kiswama Esita aicorakinet naka Morudekai, kwape eswamaenena eroko ŋesi esai ŋes."
Esther2:21 Apaarasia kanun iboie Morudekai korute loka ekabaka, konyunyurikinos ibwacin iarei luka ekabaka, Bigitan ka Teres, kanul luidarete ekek, komoata aikamun ekabaka Akasuero."
Esther2:22 Kojenu Morudekai, kiteienu ŋesi Esita akabaka; kolimok Esita ekabaka nun kokiror loka Morudekai."
Esther2:23 Kedautu aiŋic akiro ŋun, apotu kotakanut ebe ikote nen, aponi kes kere iarei kikajakinai okitoi: aponi kiwadikai da oitabo loka aisiitonokin kakonyen nuka ekabaka."
Esther3:1 Akaulo kanun kodakak eka baka Akasuero Kaman okoku loka Kamedata Egagait, kitopolo ŋes, kitodok ekeicoloŋ kuiu aitelekar ikapolok kere luajaas kaŋes,"
Esther3:2 Kokukumoto ikejaanakinak kere luajaas orute loka ekabaka, kisudedoto Kaman: naarai abu ekabaka kicorakinite kwaŋin kanuke. Konye mam abu Morudekai kokukumik ŋes karaida aisudedikin ŋes."
Esther3:3 Kosodete ikejaanakinak luka ekabaka luajaas orute loka ekabaka atemar Morudekai atiar, “Kanukinyo idiakaria aicorakinet naka ekabaka?”"
Esther3:4 Kosodi kanen, naenerananatar kaŋes ninipaaran, komam ŋes epupuni kes, kolimokis Kaman, aanyun arai ca eketakinos akiro nuka Momdekai: naarai abu kolimokinite kes ebe erai ŋesi Eyudayat."
Esther3:5 Keanyu Kaman ebe mam Morudekai ekukumit karaida mam abu kisudedikin ŋes, konyunyurikin Kaman noi."
Esther3:6 Konye komwan aikamun Morudekai bon; naarai aponi kitejenikinitete ŋes ateker naka Morudekai: kanuka nun komoote Kaman amudiar Iyudayan kere luajaas anatar ajakanut kere naka Akasuero, ŋes ateker naka Morudekai."
Esther3:7 Kolap losodit, ŋes elap Nisan, kokaru lokitomonet kaarei loka ekabaka Akasuero, kilamilamata Pur, kes iroeta, kakonyen nuka Kaman ŋinipaaran, ka ŋolilap, kiton olap lokitomonet kaarei, ŋes elap Adar."
Esther3:8 Kotema Kaman ekabaka Akasuero atiar, “Ejaas ituŋa luisiarakina aikaara toma atekerin kobukui kere luka ajakanutukon; kogelara ikisilakec kanul luka ateker ace; mam kes ericete ikisila luka ekabaka: kanuka ŋun mam ajokis ekabaka aeamakinit kes."
Esther3:9 Arai kitojok ekabaka, kiwadikai komudiarai: atacakini eoŋ atalatan alukumin atomon nuka epuesa akanin nuka ŋul kaluidarete akiro nuka ekabaka, ayaun toma aiŋadisia nuka ekabaka.”"
Esther3:10 Kolaea ekabaka ekegilut kakanike, koinak Kaman okoku loka Kamedata Egagait, lokasurup loka Iyudayan."
Esther3:11 Kotema ekabaka Kaman atiar, “Kiinakinitai jo epuesa, ka ituŋa da, aiswamakin kes kwape itoiokitor.”"
Esther3:12 Kosodete konyaraunai ikewadikak luka ekabaka kolap losodit, kapaaran nakitomonet kauni, aponi kiwadikai kere kwape ajaatar nuecorakini Kaman lukibukui luka ekabaka, ka ikayaitok luka ŋolibuku, ka ikapolok luka atekerin kere; mama ejai ŋolibuku kwape ejaar eiwadikaeke, ka ŋiniteker kwape ejaar anaiepeke; ewadikatai kokiror loka ekabaka Akasuero, kipucakinai da aanyunet kegilut loka ekabaka."
Esther3:13 Kijukarai ibaluan kikakerak obukui kere luka ekabaka, amudiar, aiar, ka aidany Iyudayan kere, ludidik ka imoionai, idwe ludidik ka aŋor, kapaaran adiopet, ŋes apaaran nakitomonet kauni naka elap lokitomonet kaarei, ŋes elap Adar, ayaŋaar da lunatunakec araun imejan."
Esther3:14 Aponi kokorai aikopunet naka aiwadikaet mama ejaas ibukui kere, tetere elimorio ekisil atekerin kere, tetere ekapanakinos apaaran nin."
Esther3:15 Kiwonyas ikakerak kanuka aicorakinet naka ekabaka, kolimoroi da ekisil koSusa togo lokapolou: kiboikinos ekabaka ka Kaman aimat; konye kobuonokinos lukore loka Susa."
Esther4:1 Keienu Morudekai nueswamao kere, kocil Morudekai ikenapen, konap epuko kekurwon, koloma kidin ore, kodelo eporoto loepol lokican."
Esther4:2 Kobu kinaren orute loka ekabaka: naarai emamei yenepedori alomar orute loka ekabaka konapite epuko.
Esther4:3 Kanolibuku da neadolenenei aicorakinet naka ekabaka ka ekekisil, koiai aibworo naepol oYudayan, ka ailuŋ, ka aimony akiyo, ka elulu: koperoto luipu opukoi ka ekurwon."
Esther4:4 Kopotu apesur nuka Esita ka ibwacinake kolimokis ŋes; kokadak akabaka noi noi: kijuka anapito aitanap Morudekai ka alaear da epuko: konye mam abu kiyu.
Esther4:5 Kosodi Esita anyaraun Katak, ediopet kobwacin luka ekabaka, luabu ŋesi koseu aijaanakin ŋes, kicorak ŋes alosit mama ejai Morudekai, ajenun akirot nin ido kanukinyo kejaar."
Esther4:6 Koloma do Katak mama ejai Morudekai neejai aibois naelal naka ere, naesesenas kerute loka ekabaka."
Esther4:7 Kolimok Morudekai ŋes nuadoikis ŋes kere, ka etiai obe loabu Kaman kisumun ekabaka ataeakin aiŋadisia nuka ekabaka kanuka Iyudayan, amudiar kes."
Esther4:8 Koinak da aikopunet naka aiwadikaet naka ekisil loalimoritai koSusa amudiar kes, aitodikin Esita, ka alimokin ŋes da; ka aicorakin ŋes alomar mama ejai ekabaka, aiŋaiŋa ŋes, ka ailipakin atekerike kakonyeneke."
Esther4:9 Kobu Katak kolimok Esita akiro nuka Morudekai.
Esther4:10 Kosodi Esita einer ka Katak, koinak ŋes akiro nuiinara Morudekai ebe,"
Esther4:11 “Ejenete ikejaanakinak kere luka eka baka, ka ituŋa da luka ibukui luka ekabaka, ebe, ŋinituŋanan kere, arai ekiliokit arai aberu, yenelomari alaro nakotoma mama ejai ekabaka, yenimam enyaritai, ejai ekisil ediopet neejai ŋesi, ebe, eario, dimikito yen yenidodit eka baka kesas loka esabu, ŋes ejari: konye mam eoŋ kanyararitai mama ejai ekabaka apaarasia nu akaisauni.”"
Esther4:12 Kolimokinai Morudekai akiro ŋun nuka Esita.
Esther4:13 Kosodi Morudekai aicorakin kes ainyakakin Esita akiro ebe, “Siriwomit kotaukon ebe ikui ijo kotogo loka eka baka aitelekarit Iyudayan kere."
Esther4:14 Naarai arai kililini ijo cut kapak kana, enyouni do aiŋarakin ka aitajar naka Iyudayan kamaee, konye imudiario jo ka ekek loka papakon: ido iŋai bo nat ejeŋi ebe elemuni ibu ijo toma ajakanut kanuka apakio nuikote kwape nu?”"
Esther4:15 Kosodi Esita aicorakin kes ainyakakin Morudekai akiro ebe,"
Esther4:16 “Kolot kotukok Iyudayan kere luejaas Susa, kolunata kanukan, sirikinyama karaida aimat apaarasia auni paaran ka kuare da: aluni eoŋ da ka akapesur kwape kwaŋin; ŋes konyet alomaria mama ejai ekabaka, namam erai kwape ejaar ekisil: arai da kamudiar, kamudiar.”"
Esther4:17 Kolot do Morudekai, kiswama kwape ejaatar kere nueeorakinit Esita ŋes."
Esther5:1 Kosodi kanen, kapaaran nakiwuniet, konap Esita akenapito nuka ekabakane, kobwo kalaro nakotoma naka etogo loka ekabaka, asesen etogo loka ekabaka: kiboikin ekabaka oicoloŋoke loka ekabakane togo loka ekabakane asesen neelomarere togo."
Esther5:2 Kosodi keanyu ekabaka Esita akabaka ebwoi kalaro, kodum asianut kakonyeneke; korio ekabaka esas loka esabu loetinit kakanike adodia Esita. Kikuny do Esita, kotiro akou naka esas."
Esther5:3 Kosodi ekabaka atemar ŋes atiar, “Inyo bo ikoto ijo, akabaka Esita? Inyo bo ilipit ijo? Kiinakinio jo kiton atutubet naka ajakanutuka.”"
Esther5:4 Kotema Esita atiar, “Arai kito kitojokit ekabaka, kobu ekabaka ka Kaman lolo opueit loepoikinit ŋes,”"
Esther5:5 Kosodi ekabaka atemar atiar, “Kisuburikis Kaman, keswamata nuebala Esita.” Kobu do ekabaka ka Kaman opucit loepoit Esita."
Esther5:6 Kotema ekabaka Esita kopucit loka ebino atiar, “Inyo bo ilipit ijo? Kiinakinio joo iŋaiŋait ca inyo? Itodolikinio kiton atutubet naka ajakanut.”"
Esther5:7 Kosodi Esita aboŋokin ebe, “Akaiŋaiŋa ka ailipika ŋes nata:"
Esther5:8 arai kadum asianut kakonyen nuka ekabaka, arai da kitojok ekabaka ainakin eoŋ naelipit, ka aitodolikin naenainait eoŋ, kopotu ekabaka ka Kaman opueit loepoikini kes, moi da, ŋes eswamaa kwape etemaria ekabaka.”"
Esther5:9 Kosodi Kaman alomar iyalama kaparit kaŋin, kolakara da kotauke: konye keanyu Kaman Morudekai korute loka ekabaka, komam ebwoi karaida anyoun kanuken, konyunyurik noi Morudekai."
Esther5:10 Konye do kotitinik Kaman, kolot ore; kijuka aomare ikepapero ka Seres akeberu,"
Esther5:11 Kitatamik Kaman kes ailiil naka abarake, ka aipues da naka idweke, ka akiro kere da nuadakaki ŋes ekabaka, kwape kitopoloo ŋes aitelekarit ikapolok ka ikeiaanakinak luka ekabaka."
Esther5:12 Ido kotema Kaman atiar, “Eebo, mam abu Esita akabaka kisunup ituŋanan alomar nepepe kekabaka opueit loepoit ŋesi nabarai eoŋ; moi da kanyararit eoŋ nepepe kekabaka."
Esther5:13 Konye nun kere kamamikinit aiokis, eroko eoŋ aanyuni Morudekai Eyudayat iboie korute leka ekabaka.”"
Esther5:14 Kosodi Seres akeberu ka ikepapero kere atemar ŋes atiar, “Kosipokinai akito aojauke ikubitin akaisakany, kinerut moi ka ekabaka aikajakin Morudekai nen; ŋes konyet ilomaria ka ekabaka ilakara opucit.” Kisiyalamik nin Kaman; kicorak asipokin"
Esther6:1 Kakuare kaŋin abu kikoler ekabaka; kicorak ayaun eitabo loka aisiitonokin, kosiomai kakonyen nuka ekabaka."
Esther6:2 Aponi kodumunai iwadi katai ebe alimo Morudekai nuka Bigitana ka Teres, iarei kobwacin luka ekabaka, kanul kaluedarenenete ekek, luapotu kotamito aikamun ekabaka Akasuero."
Esther6:3 Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Aibuses anyoin ka apolou aponi kiswamaldnai Morudekai kanuka ŋun?” Kosodete ikejaanakinak luka ekabaka luijaanakinete ŋes atemar ebe, “Mam ibore aponi kiswamakinai ŋes,”"
Esther6:4 Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Iŋai bo ejai alaro?” Alomunit do Kaman alaro nakokina naka etogo loka ekabaka, ainerun ka ekabaka aikajakin Morudekai akito nuabu kosipokinite ŋes."
Esther6:5 Kotemasi ikejaanakinak luka ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Koany, ebwoi Kaman kalaro.” Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Kolom bo.”"
Esther6:6 Kolom do Kaman. Kotema ekabaka ŋes atiar, “Ikwaikinio bo ai etuŋanan loisiyalamikinit ekabaka ainakin aibuses?” Kobala do Kaman kotauke ebe, “Iŋai bo ti loisiyalamikinit ekabaka ainakin aibuses adepar ca eoŋ?”"
Esther6:7 Kotema Kaman ekabaka atiar, “Etuŋanan loisiyalamikinit ekabaka ainakin aibuses,"
Esther6:8 koomai anapito nuka ekabakane, nulem enapenenei ekabaka, ka ebalasit loibwanenenei ekabaka, konapakinai da aboko naka ekabakane;"
Esther6:9 kijaikinai anapito ka ebalasit akan naka ediopet kokapolok luka ekabaka loitelekarit aibuses, kitanapai ŋun etuŋanan loisiyalamikinit ekabaka ainakin aibuses, kisibwanen ŋes ebalasit aitor orot loka ere, kolimo kakonyeneke ebe, ‘Ikwaikinio nen etuŋanan loisiyalamikinit ekabaka ainakin aibuses.’’’"
Esther6:10 Kosodi ekabaka atemar Kaman atiar, “Kiwonya kolem anapito ka ebalasit, kwape ibalar, kiswamak Morudekai Eyudayat, loiboie korute loka ekabaka, kwape ibalar: kinye akurwokin adiokirot kanun kere nuibala.”"
Esther6:11 Kosodi Kaman ayaŋaar anapito ka ebalasit, kitanapik Morudekai, kisibwanen aitor orot loka ere, kolimo kakonyeneke ebe, “Ikwaikinio nen etuŋanan loisiyalamikinit eka baka ainakin aibuses.”"
Esther6:12 Koboŋo Morudekai orute loka ekabaka. Konye kiwonya Kaman alosit oreke, ekadakinit kimukorite da akekou."
Esther6:13 Kitatamik Kaman Seres akeberu ka ikepapero kere nuadoikinito ŋes kere, Kosodete iketuŋa lukacoa ka Seres akeberu atemar ŋes atiar, “Morudekai loigeu ijo aibiror kakonyeneke, arai erai loka aur naka lyudayan, mam ipikori ijo ŋes, konye abeit ibirori kakonyeneke.”"
Esther6:14 Eriŋa kesi inerasi kaŋes, kopotu ibwaein luka ekabaka, kisunyasi ayaare Kaman opucit loepoit Esita."
Esther7:1 Kopotu do ekabaka ka Kaman opucit ka Esita akabaka.
Esther7:2 Kotema bobo ekabaka Esita kapaaran nakiareit kopueit loka ebino atiar, “Inyo bo ilipit ijo, akabaka Esita? Kiinakinio. Inyo ca da iŋaiŋait ijo? Itodolikinio kiton atutubet naka ajakanutuka.”"
Esther7:3 Kosodi Esita akabaka aboŋokin ebe, “Arai kadum asianut kakonyenekon, wu ekabaka, arai da kitojokit ekabaka, koinakinai aijaraka kanuka ailipika, ka ikatuŋa da kanuka aiŋaiŋaka:"
Esther7:4 naarai kagwelaritai, eoŋ ka ikatuŋa, amudiario, adanyio, ka aolior da. Konye arai gwai kigwelaritai araut ibulesin ka abulesin, ti keliliŋ, karaida mam tikepedo lokasurup aigel lutiketwania ekabaka.”"
Esther7:5 Kosodi ekabaka Akasuero atemar aka baka Esita atiar, “Iŋai bo ŋol, ido ai ca do ejai ŋesi, eŋaŋat atitimkin kotauke aikwaikin nen?”"
Esther7:6 Kotema Esita atiar, “Lokasurup ka lokadinakinit, ŋesi bo lo Kaman lokaronon.” Kosodi Kaman akurianar kakonyen nuka ekabaka ka akabaka."
Esther7:7 Konyou do eka baka kopucit loka ebino kanyunyurake, koloma omanikor loka etogo lokapolou: kobwo Kaman ailip aijarake kaneejai Esha akabaka; naarai abu koany aronis naenerak ekabaka ŋes."
Esther7:8 Kosodi koboŋ ekabaka komanikor loka etogo lokapolou kolom aibois naka epueit loka ebino; kibirokina Kaman otut loeboio Esha. Kosodi ekabaka atemar atiar, “Itinaikin ca akabaka kakonyeneka otogo?” Napalomun akirot aituk naka ekabaka, aponi korapai akonyen nuka Kaman."
Esther7:9 Kosodi Karabona ediopet kobwaein luajaas kakonyen nuka ekabaka atemar atiar, “Ido koany, akito nueojak ikubitin akaisakany, nueswamakinit Kaman Morudekai loabu kiner nuejok kanuka ekabaka, ebwoete kotogo loka Kaman.” Kotema ekabaka atiar, “Kikajakis ŋes nen.”"
Esther7:10 Kikajakinai do Kaman akito nuetemokinit Morudekai. Kosodi do anyunyura naka ekabaka aiyamakin.
Esther8:1 Kapaaran kaŋin abu ekabaka Akasuero koinak Esita akabaka etogo loka Kaman lokasurup loka Iyudayan. Kobu Morudekai kakonyen nuka eka baka, naarai abu Esita akabaka kolimok kwape ejaar kamake."
Esther8:2 Kolaeu eka baka egilutuke loalemun kama ka Kaman, koinak Morudekai. Kibwaik Esita Morudekai ayait etogo loka Kaman,"
Esther8:3 Kinera bobo Esita kakonyen nuka ekabaka, kibirokin akejeneke, kinaina ŋes emonyi akiyo alemar aronis naka Kaman Egagait, aibil da eboteteke mama ejaas Iyudayan."
Esther8:4 Kosodi ekabaka arior esas loka esabu mama ejai Esita, Konyou do Esita, kobwo kakonyen nuka ekabaka."
Esther8:5 Kotema atiar, “Arai kitojok ekabaka, arai da kadum asianut kakonyeneke, arai kesub akirot bala edolit kakonyen nuka ekabaka, eoŋ da esiyalamik akonyeneke, kiwadikai ailoc ibaluan luenerunitor Kaman okoku loka Kamedata Egagait, luewadika amudiar Iyudayari luejaas obukui kere luka ekabaka:"
Esther8:6 naarai ekoni apedor ai atitiŋikin asesen aronis naebunokini ituŋaka? Ekoni apedor ai da atitiŋikin asesen amudiar naka lukatekerika?”
Esther8:7 Kosodi ekabaka Akasuero atemar Esita akabaka ka Morudekai Eyudayat atiar, “Koany, ainak Esita etogo loka Kaman, aponi kikajakinai ŋes akito, naarai abu kibwaik akanike oYudayan."
Esther8:8 Kiwadikakis yesi lyudayan, kwa pe itojokitotor yesi, kokiror loka ekabaka, kipueakis da aanyunet kegilut loka ekabaka: naarai aiwadikaet naiwadikatai okiror loka ekabaka, ido naipucakinitai aanyunet kegilut loka ekabaka, emamei ituŋanan yenepedori ailocokin,"
Esther8:9 Kosodi kapak kaŋin aponi konyaraunai ikewadikak luka eka baka kolap lokiwuniet, ŋes elap Siban, kapaaranike naka akaisaarei ka nuuni; aponi kiwadikai kere nuabu Morudekai kicorak Iyudayan, ka ibukui, ka ikayaitok, ka ikapolok luka ibukui luejaas anyoun kolndia kiton Etiopia, ibukui akwatat ka akaisaarei ka lukanykaarei, mama ejai ŋolibuku kwape ajaar eiwadikaeke, ka niniteker kwape ajaar anaiepeke, ka Iyudayan kwa pe ajaar eiwadikaekee, ido kwape ajaar auaiepekec."
Esther8:10 Kiwadik kokiror loka ekabaka Akasuero, kipucak aanyunet kegilut loka ekabaka, kijuka ibaluan koyanaasi ikakerak luebwanenito ibalasin, luebwanenito ibalasin luetiroko luetwasamatai aijaanakinia ekabaka, luaurio kosipanloka ekabaka."
Esther8:11 Koeamak ekabaka Iyudayan luajaas kaŋolire atukonokin, abwoikin aijarakee, amudiar, aiar, ka aidany, apedor kere naka ituŋa ka ebuku kaluekotosi asurokin kes, ka ikeeedwe ludidik ka aŋorokec, ayaŋaar da lunatunakec araun imeian,"
Esther8:12 kapaaran adiopet kobukui kere luka ekabaka Akasucro, ŋes nakitomonet kauni naka elap lokitomonet kaarei, ŋes elap Adar,"
Esther8:13 Aponi kokorai aikopunet naka aiwadikaet mama ejaas atekerin kere, tetere elimoro ekisil kanolibuku, kokapakina da Iyudayan kebu apaaran ŋin ainyaŋ lukasurupokec."
Esther8:14 Kolomasi do ikakerak ibwanenito ibalasin luetiroko luetwasamatai aijaanakinia ekabaka, kobubuakinai kisuburikinai kaicorakinet naka ekabaka; kolimoroi da ekisil koSusa togo lokapolou."
Esther8:15 Koloma Morudekai kakonyen nuka ekabaka enapit anapito nuka ekabakane nuka lobululu ka lokakwanan, ka aboko naepol naka esabu, ka egoe loka ebaputa loejok ka lomuge; kibwon ere loka Susa kiyalama da."
Esther8:16 Ajaas Iyudayan kaica ka aiyalama, ka ailel ka aibuses,"
Esther8:17 Kanolibuku da, ka ŋolire, kama edolokini aicorakinet naka ekabaka ka ekekisil, ajaas Iyudayan kaiyalama ka ailel, epucit ka apaaran naejok da. Koluoros luipu luka atekerin nuka akwap Iyudayan; naarai kodoikinite kes akurian Iyudayan."
Esther9:1 Kosodi kolap lokitomonet kaarei, ŋes elap Adar, kapaaranike nakitomonet kauni, naabu koapunitor aicorakinet naka ekabaka ka ekekisil aitodolikinio, kapaaran naamunotor lukasurup luka Iyudayan ayait kes; kwabo abu kilocokin abuburiar kes, koyaitos Iyudayan ŋul lukelaito kes."
Esther9:2 Kotukonokinos Iyudayan oreriakec anatar ibukui kere luka ekabaka Akasuero, aikam nul luemootos aitican kes: amamei da ituŋanan yenepedor airebokin kes: naarai kodoikinite atekerin kere akurian kes."
Esther9:3 Apotu ikapolok kere lukibukui, ka lukibukui, ka ikayaitok, ka ŋul da lukiswamaenenete aswam naka ekabaka kinarakis Iyudayan; naarai kodoikinite kes akurian Morudekai."
Esther9:4 Naarai kerai Morudekai ekapolon kotogo loka ekabaka, kisiarakina eemutuke anatar ibukui kere: naarai kiyatanakin etuŋanan ŋol Morudekai apoloor noi."
Esther9:5 Kodanyata Iyudayan lukasurupokee kere iposete kes kekilen, ka aiar, ka amudiar, kiswamakis nul lukelaito kes kwape akototor."
Esther9:6 KoSusa togo lokapolou apotu Iyudayan koarata komudiasi ituŋa akwat akany,"
Esther9:7 Ka Parasanadata, ka Dalapon, ka Asapata,"
Esther9:8 ka Porata, ka Adalia, ka Aridata,"
Esther9:9 ka Paramasata, ka Arisai, ka Aridai, ka Baisata."
Esther9:10 Koarata da odwe lutomon luka Kaman okoku loka Kamedata, lokasurup loka Iyudayan; konye mam kes apotu kibwaikis akecekan onasit,"
Esther9:11 Kapaaran kaŋin aponi koyaunai etiai loka nul luaarakinio Susa togo lokapolou mama ejai eka baka.
Esther9:12 Kotema ekabaka Esita akabaka atiar, “Aarata Iyudayan amudiasi da ituŋa akwat akany koSusa togo lokapolou, ka odwe lutomon luka Kaman da; asa do eswamata anyoika kobukui ice uka ekabakal Inyo bo ca ilipit ijo? Kiinakinio. Arai inyo bo bobo Iinainait? Kiswamai.”"
Esther9:13 Kosodi Esita atemar atiar, “Arai kitoiok ekabaka, kocamakinai Iyudayan luejaas Susa aswam moi da kwape ejaar ekisil loka lolo, kikaiakinai da odwe lutomon luka Kaman akito.”"
Esther9:14 Kicorak ekabaka kikwaikinai nepenen: kolimoroi ekisil koSusa togo lokapolou; kikajakinai da odwe lutomon luka Kaman.
Esther9:15 Kotukonokinos Iyudayan luajaas Susa apaaran nakitomonet kaonon da naka elap Adar, koarata ituŋa akwat auni koSusa; konye mam kes apotu kibwaikis akecekan onasit,"
Esther9:16 Kotukonokinos Iyudayan ice luajaas obukui, kobwoikis aijarakee, koiaut kaibworar kama kalukasurupokec, koarata ilukumin akaisakanykaarei ka lukany kanul kalukelaito kes; konye mam kes apotu kibwaikis akanikec onasit,"
Esther9:17 Aponi nun kiswamai kapaaran nakitomonet kauni naka elap Adar; kapaaranike nakitomonet kaonon kibworasi kesi, kituluosi apaaran naka ipucino ka aiyalama."
Esther9:18 Konye apotu Iyudayan luajaas Susa kotukonokinos kapaaran nakitomonet kauni ka apaaran nakitomonet kaonon da; kapaaran nakitomonet kakany kibworasi, kituluosi apaaran naka ipucino ka aiyalama."
Esther9:19 Ŋes ituluoriata Iyudayan luka ireria ludidik luibojete koreria luemameete arwatatin apaaran nakitomonet kaonon naka elap Adar apaaran naka aiyalama ka ipucino, apaaran da naejok, naijaanakinotor da akoreta."
Esther9:20 Kiwadika Morudekai ŋun, kijuka ibaluan mama ejaas Iyudayan kere luajaas obukui kere luka ekabaka Akasuero, lueapiete ka luelwaka da,"
Esther9:21 kicorak kes aidar apaaran nakitomonet kaonon naka elap Adar, apaaranike nakitomonet kakany da, nolikaru."
Esther9:22 Kes apaarasia nuadumuniata Iyudayan aibworar kama kalukasurupokee, elap da loebelokinotor ieanikee araun aiyalama, nakaibworo araun apaaran naejok; kituluosi kes apaarasia nuka ipucino ka aiyalama, ka nuka aijaanakinor akoreta, ainakinia da lukican ainakineta."
Esther9:23 Kisumunoto Iyudayan aiswamaenen kwape egeariata, ido kwape ewadikakinia kes Morudekai;"
Esther9:24 naarai abu Kaman okoku loka Kamedata, Egagait, lokasurup loka Iyudayan kere, kopeleik amudiar Iyudayan, abu kilamilam Pur kes iroeta, apiar kes, ka amudiar da;"
Esther9:25 konye kedol akirot akonyen nuka ekabaka, kicorak kobaluan eboteteke lokaronon loabilakinit ŋesi Iyudayan kobe akouke elopet; ŋes da ka odweke kikajakinai akito."
Esther9:26 Ŋes kemaikinere apaarasia ŋun Purim, kwape ejaar ekiror Pur. Kosodi kanuka akiro kere nuka ebalua kanol, ka nuadautu kesi aanyun kakirot kaŋin, ka nuadoikis kes da,"
Esther9:27 ŋes kieorakiniata Iyudayan, kisumunot da kanukec, kanuka aurikec da, ka nul kere luimoranakinos kakes, ebe, idarenenete apaarasia nun nuarei kwape ajaar aiwadikaeteke, ido kwape ajaar apak naeseunitai nolikaru."
Esther9:28 Kiitununio apaarasia ŋun kidareneneo da anatar aturio kere, ikekia kere, kanolibuku ka ŋolire; kinyeis apaarasia ŋun nuka Purim aitwatanario koYudayan, karaida aiitunetekec aolior kaurikec."
Esther9:29 Kosodi Esita akabaka, akoku naka Abikail, ka Morudekai Eyudayat, aiwadik kapolou kere aitogogoŋ ebalua ŋol lokiareit loka Purim,"
Esther9:30 Kijuka ibaluan mama ejaas Iyudayan kere, mama ejaas ibukui akwatat ka akaisaarei ka lukanykaarei luka ajakanut naka Akasuero, kakiro nuka ainapakin ka abeit,"
Esther9:31 aitogogoŋ apaarasia ŋun nuka Purim kapakiokee nueseunitai, kwape kicorakinia Morudekai Eyudayat ka Esita akabaka, ido kwape kicorakiniata kesi kanukec ka aurikec da, kakiro nuka ailunukec ka aimony."
Esther9:32 Kitogogon aicorakinet naka Esita akiro nun nuka Purim. Kiwadikai da oitabo.
Esther10:1 Kosodi kitelem ekabaka Akasuero esolo kakwap, ka apujan da nuka aŋolol."
Esther10:2 Aswamisio kere nuka akepedor ka akegogoŋ, ka akiro kere nuka apolou naka Morudekai naetopolooria ekabaka ŋes, mam kereka iwadikatai oitabo loka aisiitonokin nuka ikabakan luka Media ka Perusia?"
Esther10:3 Naarai kiareikin Morudekai Eyudayat ekabaka Akasuero, kopol ko Yudayan, kocamunai kaipues naka iinaeanake; komoote ajokis naka iketuŋa, kinera nukainapakin mama ejai aurike kere."
Job1:1 Kojai etuŋanan kakwap naka Us, ekekiror Yob; kerai etuŋanan ŋol lomam itoronitai, loeteni, loayoŋit Edeke, kosacite da aronis."
Job1:2 Kourite idwe lusap ikanykaarei, ka lupesur iuni."
Job1:3 Ido iboroke araas amerekekin alukumin akanykaarei, ka akaalai alukumin auni, ka ajookon akwat akany nuka imoŋin iareiarei, ka asigirian nuŋor akwat akany, ka ikejaanakinak luipu noi; kanuka ŋun kerai etuŋanan loapol aitelekar idwe kere lukokide."
Job1:4 Koloto odweke kipooto epueit ŋolidiopet kotogoke kapaaranike; kijukanarete anyaraunun ainaeanakee auni ainyam ka aimat nepepe kakes,"
Job1:5 Kosodi ketuboros apaarasia nuka epucitikee, kijuka Yob kitalau kes, kodilonokin anyounun tupuruc, koinanak ainakineta nuieweio kwape ketiaikee kere: naarai kobala Yob ebe, “Musiki adiakasi odweka, aiŋer Edeke toma otauonokec.” Kwape kwaŋin abu Yob kirueurue aiswamaenen."
Job1:6 Kosodi kapaaran adiopet kopotu odwe luka Edeke aitodiar kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kobu Satan da nepepe kakes."
Job1:7 Kobala EJAKAIT ebe, “Satan, kibuni kai?” Koboŋok Satan kobala ebe, “Abuni kabonobono keilat kakwap kariariat lailo ka laiie.”"
Job1:8 Kobala EJAKAIT Satan ebe, “Iwomit ijo nuka ekakejaanakinan Yob? Naarai emamei loeputos kaŋes kakwap, etuŋanan lomam itoronitai, loeteni, loeyonit Edeke, esaeit da aronis.”"
Job1:9 Kosodi Satan aboŋokin ebe, “Eyonit kereka Yob Edeke atai?"
Job1:10 Mam ibwaikinit abwas aisirimor nes, ka etogoke, ka iboro kere luejaatar, kowaitin kere? Isirerenit aswam naka akaninike, iyatakina ikeboro kakwap."
Job1:11 Konye korio cani akanikon, kotiro kere lueiaatar, ido kinerokini ŋesi jo kakonyenekon.”"
Job1:12 Kobala EJAKAIT Satan atiar,” Koany, kere luejaatar ejaas toma akanikon, konye mam iriori akanikon mama ejai ŋesi elopet.” Konyou do Satan kama ejai EJAKAIT."
Job1:13 Kapaaran adiopet kenyamete ikedwe lusap ka lupesur, komasete da ebino kotogo loka onaeekee lokapolon,"
Job1:14 kobu ekiyakia neejai Yob, kotema atiar, “Ajaas imoŋin ekoriete, kodakasi asigirian osiepikee:"
Job1:15 aŋatasi Isabean ayanaasi kes; eebo, aarata ikatumunak kakwanis naka ekileŋ; eoŋ bon aku alimokin jo.”"
Job1:16 Eroko inera ŋesi, kobu eee kotema atiar, “Ebirun akim naka Edeke edokuni kokuiu, anyama amerekekin, ka ikatumunak, amudia kes; eoŋ bon aku alimokin jo.”"
Job1:17 Eroko inera ŋesi, kobu eee kotema atiar, “Etemokis Ikaludean irioneta iuni, aŋatasi akaalai, ayanaasi kes, eebo, aarata ikatumunak kakwanis naka ekileŋ; eoŋ bon aku alimokin ijo.”"
Job1:18 Eroko inera ŋesi, kobu eee da kotema atiar, “Anyamete ikonidwe lusap ka lupesur amasete da ebino kotogo loka onaeekee lokapolon:"
Job1:19 ido koany, kobu ekwam loepol kamodiŋ, kinom agoria aoŋon nuka etogo, korapak ikatumunak, atwaka da; eoŋ bon aku alimokin jo.”"
Job1:20 Kosodi Yob anyoun kocil elouke, kobaren akekou, kibirokin kwap, koma;"
Job1:21 Kobala ebe, “Abu kalom kakoik naka totoka emujalal, aboŋori da emujalal: EJAKAIT nes abu kainak, ido EJAKAIT nes alemaa; kituritete ekiror loka EJAKAIT,”"
Job1:22 Kotoma kanun kere mam abu Yob kodiaka mam da abu komoro Edeke abaŋaanut.
Job2:1 Kojai bobo apaaran kopotu odwe luka Edeke aitodiar kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kobu Satan da nepepe kakes aitodiar kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Job2:2 Kobala EJAKAIT Satan ebe, “Kibuni kai?” Koboŋok Satan EJAKAIT ebe, “Abuni kaboŋobono keilat kakwap, kariariat lailo ka laije.”"
Job2:3 Kobala EJAKAIT Satan ebe, “Iwomit ijo nuka ekakejaanakinan Yob? Naarai emamei loeputos kaŋes kakwap, etuŋanan lomam itoronitai, loeteni, loeyoŋit Edeke, esaeit da aronis: ido eroko itogogoŋit abeiteke, karaida kiimaimait eoŋ ebe keliko nes komam akirot.”"
Job2:4 Koboŋok Satan EJAKAIT, kotema atiar, “Amuny itia amuny, eebo, einakini etuŋanan kere lueiaatar itia aijarake,"
Job2:5 Konye korio cani akonikan, kotiro akekoio ka akekuan, ido kinerokini ŋesi jo kakonyenekon.”"
Job2:6 Kobala EJAKAIT Satan ebe, “Koany, ejai akanikon; konye koeoite akeijar.”"
Job2:7 Konyou do Satan kama ejai EJAKAIT, kitedek Yob abusion nuetioko anyoun kotau loka akeiuke kiton osiadukuke."
Job2:8 Kolem atibolok akoio; kipwokakin okurwon.
Job2:9 Kotema aberuke nes atiar, “Iroko kereka itogogoŋit abeitekon? Koner Edeke, kotwana.”"
Job2:10 Konye kobala nes ebe, “Inera ijo kwape ineratatar aŋor nubaniok, Wu okwe! Kidumununei kereka nuejok kakan naka Edeke, komam kidumuni nueroko?” Kotoma kanun kere mam abu Yob kodiaka kanaiepeke."
Job2:11 Kosodete kepuputu ipapero luuni luka Yob aronis na kere naadoikini ŋes, kopotu, konyounite niniruŋanan kaiboisike; Elipas Etemanit, ka Bilidad Esukit, ka Sopar Enaamatit: kitutukis adolokin amonyakin ka aitalakar ŋes."
Job2:12 Kiteluosi kama elwana, mam apotu kojenut ŋes, kodelosi, komonyata; kocil ŋolituŋanan ekelou, kituanasi apua kuiu kakwesikec,"
Job2:13 Kiboioto kaŋes kokwap kodautu apaarasia akanykaarei ka akuaresia akanykaarei, komam loelimokini ŋes adiokirot: naarai apotu kireikis ieanike ipu noi."
Job3:1 Kokau kanun, kooŋo Yob akeituk, kiken akepaaran."
Job3:2 Koboŋok Yob kotema atiar:
Job3:3 “Koolio do apaaran nakolo kauriere eoŋ, ka akuare da nakinera atiar, ‘Epotio ikoku yenisapat.’"
Job3:4 Koraun apaaran nin amuton! Kinyek Edeke aite ŋes ejai toma akuj, Aica da kinyek ailiyaikin ŋes,"
Job3:5 Konyarata amuton ka etoribe loka atwanare nakec, Kiboikin edou tomake; kitukurianata luisirionete kere apaaran."
Job3:6 Koŋat amuton naejesi cueueue akuare nin! Kinyek aiyalama nepepe kapaarasia nuka ekaru; kinyek alomar otiai loka ilapio.
Job3:7 Koany, korau akuare nin arakan; kinyek eporoto lokaiyalama adolokin."
Job3:8 Kikenoto ŋul luikenete apaaran, luetemokino agwaun Lebiatan."
Job3:9 Komutokoros aacer nuka aikamus: komo aica, konye komam edumuni; komam eseseni abukio nuka atupurue;"
Job3:10 Naarai mam abu kogol ikekia luka akoik naka totoka, karaida aibwa iean kakonyeneka,"
Job3:11 “Kanukinyo mam abu katwania ameun kakoik? Kanukinyo da mam abu kajalia aijar naalomunia kakoik?
Job3:12 Kanukinyo da keyuuniata akuŋin? Kanukinyo da keyuuniata ikisin, tape anaki?"
Job3:13 Naarai kwana tikapere kelilin; tikajotoor; kasodi aibworar;
Job3:14 nepepe ka ikabakan ka ikenerunak luka akwap, lukedukete ojeburun kanukee;"
Job3:15 arai nepepe kikapolok luajaas ke sa bu, luelelebito itogoikee epuesa,"
Job3:16 Arai kwape ikoku yenikijeeuna yenikibwaitai timam kajaun; kwape imukerun lumam apotu koanyutu aica.
Job3:17 Kaŋina aionoosi ikaronok aitican; kaŋina da nes ibworariata luilolonyito.
Job3:18 Kaŋina ijakakaete ienan; mam epupete eporoto loka eketwasaman.
Job3:19 Ejaas ŋina ludidik ka lukapolok; eosikin ebulesit kaneejai ejakaitike.
Job3:20 “Kanukinyo einakinia yenikiean aanyun aica, ka yenerieba kotau aanyun aijar?"
Job3:21 Luimielas atwanare, konyc komam edolokin; luebokete adumun ŋes aitelekarit abar naibwaitai;"
Job3:22 luibwonas cut noi, luiyalamasi, naepedoriata adumun ates."
Job3:23 Kanukinyo kiinakinia aica etuŋanan loibwaitai ekerot, loabu Edeke kirigak eriga?"
Job3:24 Naarai ebuni eidinyika eriŋa enyama, ebukunun agataka kwape akipi."
Job3:25 Naarai kabunoki eoŋ ibore yeneyalononi, kadolok eoŋ ibore yenakurianar."
Job3:26 Mam eboie ejok, karaida aiyamakina, karaida aiyeŋun; konye kadolokis ican.”"
Job4:1 Kosodi Elipas Etemanit aboŋokin, kotema atiar:"
Job4:2 “Arai etamakini etuŋanan einer kajo, inyunyurikini? Konye iŋai itikokin kinyek einer?"
Job4:3 Koany, ituutoo luipu, ibu kitogogoŋ akanin nuekalanyaka,"
Job4:4 Apotu akonikiro kigaŋata nin yenikibiror, ibu kitogogoŋ akuŋin nuelejekekas."
Job4:5 Konye kwana adolut mamakon, iilor; kitirosi, iyalonon."
Job4:6 Akoniiyoŋ Edeke mere ŋes kigagauni? Atenit naka ikonirotin da mere ŋes akonimunonut?
Job4:7 “Keŋaiŋait, kiitu, iŋai abu kooliorite, komamei akirot? Arai luetenito kotauon ai bo emudiaritere?"
Job4:8 Kwape abu kaanyunia, ŋul luekoriete numam adolit, lueyeete ameŋeranut, esakete ŋupeŋun,"
Job4:9 Eoliorete kanuka eiyeŋane loka Edeke, epiaros da kanuka akutun naka akenyunyura."
Job4:10 Agat naka eŋatuny, ka eporoto loka eŋatuny lokadeden an, ka ikel luka iŋatunyo ludidik, ebilasi,"
Job4:11 Etwani eŋatuny lomoion keolikis imejan, kisiarakinos idwe luka aŋatuny."
Job4:12 “Aponi kaeedakin akirot, kopupok akakit aiyeiyeaken,"
Job4:13 Kotoma aomisio nuelomunete kaitapoeta nuka akuare, nailuranariata ituŋa ajo nuipu,"
Job4:14 kabunok akurian ka amaran, naelokilokete akakojo kere,"
Job4:15 Kosodi kitor emoyo kakonyeneka; kobalasi itima luka akouka sau sau.
Job4:16 Kobwoi kopalarite, konye mam abu kapedo amisiikin kwape eputor; kojai etoil kakonyeneka: kidasite tiiti, kosodi apupun eporoto loebala ebe,"
Job4:17 ‘Epedori kereka etuŋanan loetwani araut loedolit kakonyen nuka Edeke? Epedori kereka etuŋanan araut loesega kakonyen nuka Ekasubanike?
Job4:18 Koany, mam emunokina ikekejaanakinak; Itepeseni da ikemalaikan kanuka apaarikec:"
Job4:19 Itelekarit eama aitepesenit ŋul lueperete otogoi luka alup, apetetaitikec ejai toma apua, luideeideeio kwape ikaporipor!"
Job4:20 Emudiaros kotoma apak naejai kidin atupuruc ka eboŋ, eoliorete ikar kere komam yenibwaikinit etau."
Job4:21 Mam kereka eutunio auno nakotoma owemakec? Etwakete, komam adiocoa kere.’"
Job5:1 “Kiworo cani; ejai yenikibonokini jo? Iŋai ka lukalaunak loibelokin jo?
Job5:2 Naarai eari anyunyura etuŋanan loban, ekokote da eari lomam acoa,"
Job5:3 Abu kaany lobaŋ eremori alias; konye kelamak katipet aiboisike.
Job5:4 Kolwanik idweke ainapakin, koridakinai korute komamei yeneyuuni kes."
Job5:5 Enyami yenikeriebi eteŋei nuedwenyete, elemununei da kokukwa, ilikonori da yenikakure iborokec,"
Job5:6 Naarai mam elomunete numam adolit kotoma apua, karaida iean abwaŋun kai up;"
Job5:7 konye etuŋanan eurikinitai iean, kwape edetarotor atwenyitweny kuiu,"
Job5:8 “Konye eoŋ, ti akoto amoot Edeke, ido ti akoto aititin Edeke akakiro:"
Job5:9 loiswamai nuepolok numam emounos; nukaumokin numam imarunos:
Job5:10 loisitepi akiru akwap, loiiukari akipi omanikoria:"
Job5:11 kosodi adakakin ŋul luejaas kwap; edakuni ŋul luibworos toma ainapakin.
Job5:12 Itapalauni ainerun naka luepiriaka, tetere mam epedorete akecekanin aswam nuepeleunete."
Job5:13 Isipoki lukacoa kapirianutukee: isurukanyari aitanan ainerun naka lukelepa.
Job5:14 Iriamete kamuton paaran, erarapitos kidiŋ paaran bala kuare."
Job5:15 Konye itaiari kokilen loka aitukekec, itaiari yenipuda kakan naka Iokagogoŋon,"
Job5:16 Kwaŋin ejai lokican kamunonut, ebutarete numam adolit."
Job5:17 “Koany, elakar ituŋanan yenitoroni Edeke; aso sirikimen aleeor naka Lokapedor kere."
Job5:18 Naarai isiriebi, ido imadi; imusuŋi, ido akaninike kes itanaleunete."
Job5:19 Kiyuununei ŋesi jo katiokisio akanykape; eebo, kakanykaarei mam kitirori jo aronis."
Job5:20 Kilakununei kobeli komam itwani; kojie da kapedor naka ekileŋ,"
Job5:21 Kibwaio jo kama ejai edaset loka aŋajep; mam da ikurianari amudiario naebunio.
Job5:22 Ikienar amudiario ka ebeli; mam da ikurianari itian luka akwap.
Job5:23 Naarai itutukete aitutuket kamor nukomanikor; inapakinos itiaŋ luka ais kajo.
Job5:24 Ijenuni kwape inapakinor ekoniwema; ido imanimani ekonisipan komam itwaniari ibore.
Job5:25 Ijenuni da ebe akoniwur elalaari, itataikon da kwape anya nuka akwap."
Job5:26 Idolokini ailitikon kobusite ikar luipu, kwape elomunia eisuta loka akima kokaruke."
Job5:27 Koany nun, kipou kanicutu, ikote nen: kepup, kojen ijo kosodi kojaun ejok.”"
Job6:1 Kosodi koboŋok Yob kotema atiar:
Job6:2 “Arai kininitete anyunyuraka, arai kibwaikinitete nepepe kepolaka toma aitemis!"
Job6:3 Naarai kwape kwana ti do kitelckasi alaŋir naka asine naka aijololin: kanuka nun ŋes esunyitor akakiro,"
Job6:4 Naarai ejaas imalia luka Lokapedor kere kotomaka, emasi ekamoyo aisoritike; iderakina etasuro loka Edeke asurokin eoŋ."
Job6:5 Emonyi kereka asigiria naka ais arai eia ŋes anya? Arai emoŋ aruo koiaas inyamatake?
Job6:6 Ipedori kereka ainyam Iuepiaka komamci abalaŋ? Arai bo ejai ibore ycnebala jel osirapurapu loka abeet?
Job6:7 Enerir ekatau atiror kes; esubitos bala Iunyaman Iuketal kaneajai.
Job6:8 “Karai kapedoo adumun nuelipit; tikainak Edeke eoŋ nuenobelei!
Job6:9 Tikisiyalamik Edeke aidecidec eoŋ; tikeial akekan, kagela eut!"
Job6:10 Ŋes konyet adumunia aitalakario; eebo, tikeeur kanuka ariebo namam rtimi; naarai mam anerenenei akiro nuka Lokalaunan."
Job6:11 Agogoŋuka nes bo inyo, kedareu? Awasiaka da nes bo inyo, katitiŋik?"
Job6:12 Erai tope agogoŋuka agogoŋ naka amor? Arai akakuan naka aisinit?
Job6:13 Konye abeit emamei yenikeŋarakini kotomaka, Erenear da aswam nakapirianut kama ajai,"
Job6:14 “Ibusakinit ekepapero aitodiar asianut mama ejai ŋol loekoto aiilor; ŋol da loinyeini ayoŋit Lokapedor kere.
Job6:15 Inalanalas ikainacan bala aguurut, bala ecilet loka aguurun nueoliorete;"
Job6:16 nuirioko eucueuc kanuka akipi nuikamunito, nes neenopia akaka:"
Job6:17 kapakio nuka amwanis, ilicaros; naejaenenara aibuse, eonikinete kaiboisiokec,"
Job6:18 Epaarete ikalotok luelosete aririkee; elosete toma amodiŋ, eoliorete."
Job6:19 Apotu ikalotok luka Tema kiteoto, kidareut atukon nuka Seba kes."
Job6:20 Kirumata ileic naarai apotu komunokinos; keporu ŋina kitirirata.
Job6:21 Aso yes da ikote nen kaneajai; ianyunete yenikitukuriani, ikuriakaros."
Job6:22 Abu kereka kalimokinite yes ebe, ‘Koinakinai’? Arai ebe, ‘Koinakis koborokus araut ainakinet kanukan’?"
Job6:23 Arai ebe, ‘Koyuunai kakan naka lokasurup’? Arai ebe, ‘Kolakunai kakan naka ikareitok’?"
Job6:24 “Kisisianakinai, eoŋ da elilini: Kiteienunai neapaaritor."
Job6:25 Akiro nukaitenara eraas ca nukagogoŋ! Konye epegetekus itoroni inyo?
Job6:26 Iwomitos aitoron akiro? Naarai einer loka ŋol kaloejurununit esubit bala ekwam.
Job6:27 Eebo, tikilamilamata eroet kanuka ikoki, Tikimutunoto kaneejai opaperokus,"
Job6:28 Aso do kiyuutu kosesenata eoŋ; naarai abeit mam eŋalai kakonyenekus.
Job6:29 Kibelokinos, kenainait, kinyeis numam ebeito ajakut; eebo, kibelokinos bobo, edolit akakirot."
Job6:30 Ejaas numam ebeito kotoma anaiepeka? Mam epedori akainyigol amisiikin nukameneranut?
Job7:1 “Mere ejai ituŋanan ejie toma akwap? Akepaarasia da mam eputos bala apaarasia nuka ŋol kaloeropio?
Job7:2 Kwape ebulesit loiŋobelei noi etolim, kwape kaŋol loeropio komuno eropitike;"
Job7:3 Kwape kwaŋin eoŋ da ketebeitai ilapio lueraas ikamameak, Aponi kakorakin akuaresia nuka aitapasitoi."
Job7:4 Naaperenenoo eoŋ kener atiar, ‘Anyoun wori’? Konye eoia akuare; kebelonokini aisiwalar akwap."
Job7:5 Enapit akuanaka ikur ka aapoŋor nuka apua; erubanakini amunyoka kosodi kidedeununei bobo.
Job7:6 Isunyito akapaarasia aitelekarit ibore yenitolomanari ekasonyan egoe, edaunos komamei adiomuno,"
Job7:7 “Wu okwe kiitunite ebe akaijar erai ekwam; mam akakonye esesenete bobo aiokis.
Job7:8 Mam bobo akoŋu naka ŋol kalokaseseni eoŋ kaanyuni bobo: esesenete akonikonye eoŋ, konye kamamei."
Job7:9 Kwape edaunor edou kilicar, kwape kwaŋin nin yenijesari Okatwak mam bobo edokuni,"
Job7:10 Mam bobo eboŋuni togoke, akeibois da mam bobo ejenuni ŋes,"
Job7:11 “Ŋes mam apedoria aisililiŋ akaituk; eneri kotoma aburun nakomoyoka; erurumai kotoma adwaris nakotauka,"
Job7:12 Arai kereka eoŋ aŋolol, arai etiaŋ loeiliili lokaŋolol, tape ibwaikini ikedarak asesen eoŋ?"
Job7:13 Arai kener ebe, ‘Ketalakarit eoŋ ekaitada, etoioniari ekajam arieboka’;"
Job7:14 nes konyet kisiyalononoo eoŋ kairuiasia, kitukuriani kaitapoeta:"
Job7:15 Tape ekatau eseuni amiedio, ka atwanare aitelekarit akakojo nu."
Job7:16 Kapianiki akaijar; mam epuda aibut ikar kere: kinyeinai eoŋ; naarai akapaarasia eraas aamameak.
Job7:17 Inyo bo ituŋanan tape jo itopoloori ŋes, tape jo ibwaikinit nes etaukon,"
Job7:18 tape ianyanari nes ninirupuruc, aitem ŋes ninipak?"
Job7:19 Itodoli bo ai mam jo inyeini asesen eoŋ, karaida ajalakin aitodol neelikoria eoŋ aimulaka?"
Job7:20 Arai kadiakit, keswamak jo inyo, ijo loiseseni ituŋa? Kanukinyo kibwaikinia araut adeseikinetekon, tape kalanirikini eoŋ bon?"
Job7:21 Kanukinyo mam isionio aibueareteka, alemar da numam adoliteka? naarai kwana aperi kotoma apua; ikukurikini amoot eoŋ, konye kamamei.”"
Job8:1 Kosodi koboŋok Bilidad Esukit kotema atiar:
Job8:2 “Itodoli ai einer nun? Itodolete da ai akiro nuka aitukukon asubit bala ekwam Iokagogoŋ?
Job8:3 Ibelokini kereka Edeke etube? Arai bo ibelokini Lokapedor kere abeit?
Job8:4 Arai apotu idwekon kodiakasi kama ejai, nes da kokoraki kes akan naka aibucaretekec:"
Job8:5 arai ikoto ijo akukurikin amoot Edeke ka aiŋaiŋa da Lokapedor kere;
Job8:6 arai kosegara ijo ido kitenara da; abeit tikekwenyu kanukon, tikitekeriana aibois naka adolitekon."
Job8:7 Karaida kedit ageunetekon, tikiyatakini noi esanekon."
Job8:8 “Naarai, kenainait, kinitu aturio nuatuboros, kibwaik etau ŋun nuapotu lukapapaakee konicut;"
Job8:9 naarai kirai oni luka bian, mam nukijeni, naarai apaarasia nukidauni kakwap eraas kwape etoribe."
Job8:10 Mam kereka kes kisisianakinete jo, ka alimonokin jo da, kinerasi akiro nuelomunete kotoma otauonokee?"
Job8:11 “Epedori kereka aladot apoloor komamei erit? Epedori da esege abwaŋun komameete akipi?
Job8:12 Eriŋa itosokok, komam etubub, erinyori do ageikin ikui ice kere."
Job8:13 Ikote nen irotin luka nul kere luimurwokinete Edeke; eolionori amun naka ituŋanan yenimam eyonit Edeke.
Job8:14 Ebila amunonutuke, Yeniyuunit ŋes esubit bala elago loka asimokok."
Job8:15 Egoŋakina ŋesi etogoke, konye mam ebwoenenei: Iketanakini, konye mam egogoŋoor."
Job8:16 Itosokok kaneejai akoloŋ, akekui da eliaiete airiamar emanikorike."
Job8:17 Ienienete aliasike atukot nakamor, eseseni aibois naka amor."
Job8:18 Arai emudiario kotoma aiboisike, kosodi eneri ŋesi ebe, ‘Mam kaanyununei jo.’"
Job8:19 Koany, ŋin ŋes alakara naka erotoke, ebwaŋunete ice kotoma alup,"
Job8:20 “Koany, mam Edeke ireneari ituŋanan yenedolit, kwabo mam igaŋenenei nul luiswamaete nueroko."
Job8:21 Kiton neisilelebia akoniituk akiena, anajepekon da eibwoŋ,"
Job8:22 Ileicikinete nul lukilaito jo; mam ejaununei bobo ewema loka ikaronok.”
Job9:1 Kosodi koboŋok Yob kotema atiar:
Job9:2 “Abeit aleni ebe ikote nen: Konye ikonakini ai ituŋanan eraun yenikadoliton kaneejai Edeke?
Job9:3 Arai ipuda ŋesi apega kaŋes, mam epedori aboŋokin akirot adiopet kotoma alukumit."
Job9:4 Eco ŋesi kotau, ido epol kotoma agogoŋ: Iŋai ŋin yenininikiar kaneejai ŋesi, kosodi aisirerenio?"
Job9:5 Loeukori ironan, komam ejenete, naebuburiaria kes kanyunyurake."
Job9:6 Loiianari akwap kotoma aiboisike, komaranete ipirinoke."
Job9:7 Loicorakini akoloŋ kinyek alomun; ido ipueakini aacer.
Job9:8 Loepesikini bon akuj, ido ieakaeakai akailan nuka aŋolol."
Job9:9 Loesubi Adubu, * ka Orion, * ka Pleiades, ka agolai nuka eŋalakimak,"
Job9:10 Loiswamai nukos numam enicunos; eebo, nukaumokin numam imarunos."
Job9:11 Koany, etubori kodieka, komam aanyuni nes; iyatakini da akelosit, konye mam ajenuni."
Job9:12 Koany, ikamuni lumejan, iŋai bo epedori aitikokin ŋes? Iŋai bo da etemari ebe, ‘Inyo bo iswamai ijo?’"
Job9:13 “Mam Edeke inyakuni akenyunyura; Ekukumete ikenarakinak luka Rakab kokwapuke.
