Job9:14 Ekoni eoŋ ai apedori aboŋokin ŋes, aseun akakiro ainerun kaŋes?"
Job9:15 Karaida kadolit, mam tikabonok ŋes; tikenaina lokasurupika."
Job9:16 Tikeworo, ŋes da kabonokini; mam tieyuunit ebe apupu ŋesi ekaporoto."
Job9:17 Naarai kabili ŋesi eoŋ kekwam, iyatanakini amusununuka komam akirot."
Job9:18 Mam kesiikini aiyenanar apuru, konye kesilelebi adwaris."
Job9:19 Arai kinera nuka agogoŋ naka lokagogoŋon, koany, ejai! arai nuka etube, iŋai bo ketetemikini apak?"
Job9:20 Karaida kadolit, akaituk ketetelekari akiro: karaida ketenara, ketejenuni kwape araar lomagul."
Job9:21 Etenara eoŋ; mam asesena bon; ameni aijaraka.
Job9:22 Kere eraas adiopet; ŋes katemaria ebe, Emudiari luitenara ka lukaronok."
Job9:23 Arai kenesa akaŋas atular, isekeli ŋesi epola loka yenimam akiro."
Job9:24 Einakinitai akwap akan naka ikaronon: erapaari akonye nuka ikatubokoke; arai mere ŋes, ŋes ca iŋai?"
Job9:25 “Etiroko akapaarasia aitelekarit ekakeran: ekerete, mam eanyunete aiokis."
Job9:26 Etubonoros kwape atakerin nuka aladoi: kwape euruporia emorukaalet imejaunake.
Job9:27 Arai abala ebe, ‘Kemurwoki airurumakan, ejulakini eoŋ akakonyen nuakadakinito, kalakari’:"
Job9:28 Ayoŋit aitururuka kere ajeni ebe mam kiinyarit eoŋ lomam akiro.
Job9:29 Ketelekarete akiro; kanukinyo ca etaaritor atai?
Job9:30 Arai kelon kakipi nuelaete noi noi, ketesega noi akakanin;"
Job9:31 Konye kibirokini ijo eoŋ aipany, kalaete eoŋ ikanapen,"
Job9:32 Naarai mere ŋes etuŋanan, kwape eoŋ, eoŋ aboŋokin nes, tetere kiriamakin kotube."
Job9:33 Emamei ekadiekan kokidinikosi, loibwaikini akekanin kamakosi kere."
Job9:34 Kolema ŋesi ekebela kamaka, kinyek etasuroke aitukurian eoŋ:"
Job9:35 ŋes konyet ti enerar, komam akurianar; naarai mam ikote nen kamakaŋ."
Job10:1 “Apianik ekatau akaijar; Erurumai koleleete akakiro; eneri kadwaris naka ekatau.
Job10:2 Kabala eoŋ Edeke ebe, Sirikititeleka eoŋ akiro; kitodikinai nukiinakinit ijo apega keoŋ,"
Job10:3 Isiyalamikinit kereka ijo areit, tetere imwani aswam naka akaninikon, Acaikin da ainerun naka ikaronok?"
Job10:4 Ŋaas kereka ijo akonye nuka akuan, arai bo ianyuni ijo da kwape eanyuniata ituŋa?"
Job10:5 Eputosi tope apaarasiakon kapaarasia nuka ituŋa, arai bo ikarukon kwape apaarasia nuka ituŋa?"
Job10:6 Tape inici numam adoliteka, imoi da akaronis,"
Job10:7 Karaida kijeni ebe mam eoŋ arono; emamei da loepedori ayuun kakanikon,"
Job10:8 Akaninikon kes kelunulununete kasubunete da nepepe ammor; konye kimudia eoŋ,"
Job10:9 Kenainait; kiitu kwape kisubunia kelupe; ido ikoto ainyakar bobo toma apua?
Job10:10 Mam kereka jo kibukunit eoŋ kwape kakile” kisicarakamit eoŋ kwape edika?
Job10:11 Kitanapit eoŋ amuny ka akiriŋ, ibu kisimorikik eoŋ kakoio ka aputio."
Job10:12 Ibu koinak eoŋ aijar ka asianut, aibuakinitekon ŋes iricitor ekamoyo."
Job10:13 Konye ibu kimunono akiro nu otaukon; ajeni ebe ajaas ŋun kajo;
Job10:14 arai kadiaka, irerei ijo, mam kilacari eoŋ kanumam adoliteka."
Job10:15 Arai arono eoŋ, itukwi eoŋ; arai adolit, mam teni ekeuni akakou; Emuara eoŋ noi, etei akaiticanio,"
Job10:16 Arai ketopoloo akakou, kiriga kwape kenatuny; kosodi bobo itoduna iumokina kaneajai."
Job10:17 Kiteteu ikonikaienak kaneaiai, iyatakini akadakinitekon kaneajai; kiiny eoŋ ajoresio ka ejie."
Job10:18 “Aso ca kanukinyo kitolomunia eoŋ kakoik? Tikajal ajiar, komam akoŋu aanyun eoŋ."
Job10:19 Tikajau bala mam abu kajai; tikadakun anyoun kotoma akoik aitarasario toma ailit.
Job10:20 Mam apaarasiaka ikidioko? Aso kopala do, kinyeinai, kalakari mot,"
Job10:21 eroko keloto nina nemam abonunio bobo, ŋes akwap naka amuton ka etoribe loka atwanare;"
Job10:22 akwap naka amuton naeiesi ŋaŋ, naemutono eueueuc; akwap naka etoribe loka atwanare, naijulujula, naesubit aicake bala amuton.”"
Job11:1 Kosodi koboŋok Sopar Enaamatit kotema atiar:
Job11:2 “Mam kereka ibusakinit aboŋokin akiro nuipu? itoiokio da etuŋanan loinerana?
Job11:3 Aiturokinikon tikepedo aisililiŋ ituŋa? Naisekelor ijo, mam ituŋanan kisurumi ileic?"
Job11:4 Naarai itema ebe, ‘Akaisisianakin itenara, alai eoŋ da kakonyenekon."
Job11:5 Konye wu arai tikiner Edeke, koon akeituk aluikin jo,"
Job11:6 arai tikipukokinit nukaiyeiyea nuka acoa, kwape eraatar nuka ipitenyo luipu toma aswam nakapirianut. Aso kojen ebe mam Edeke kitepeseni ijo kwape ibusakinitor numam adolitekon."
Job11:7 “Ipedori kereka aanyun Edeke kanuka amoot? Ipedori kereka adolokin osaŋeta luka Lokapedor kere?
Job11:8 Icelelei kwape akui; inyo ipedori ijo aswam? Idul adepar Okatwak; inyo ipedori ijo aijen?
Job11:9 Aitemisike edeparit akwap kaojau, ido elal adepar akar."
Job11:10 Arai etubor, eeni ituŋa, enyarauni da kes atubokinio, iŋai gwai itikokini?"
Job11:11 Naarai ejeŋi ituŋa luutai; ido eanyuni numam adolit, karaida mam eomit."
Job11:12 Konye emamei etuŋanan lootai ajenun, eebo, eurio ituŋanan kwape ikoku yenika atuko,"
Job11:13 “Naitemonokinio ijo ejok ekonitau iriori akaninikon mama ejai ŋesi;
Job11:14 arai ejaas numam adolit akanikon, kibwaik neelwana, sirikisiik nukaronok aiboienen kowemanakon;"
Job11:15 Ŋes konyet ipedoria aikeun akonikonyen komamei aitakinet; eebo, icasi, komam ikurianari."
Job11:16 Naarai kimurwokinete icanikon; iituni kes bala akipi nuatuboros.
Job11:17 Ipiororoi akoniijar aitelekarit kidin paaran; karaida ejai amuton, eraun bala atupuruc,"
Job11:18 Inapakini ijo da, naarai ejai amunonut; eebo, inolenolei kosodi aiyen kinapakina."
Job11:19 Ido iriori, komam yenikitukuriani; eebo, ipu lukikanikanete joo"
Job11:20 Konye ekurwokinete akonye nuka ikaronok, emameikini kes neekeriara, eraun amunokee aijal aijar.”"
Job12:1 Kosodi koboŋok Yob kotema atiar:
Job12:2 “Komamei abuonokin iraas yesi ituŋa obe, etwani acoa da kayes."
Job12:3 Konye eoŋ da ejai ajenun kwape yes; mam yes kideparito eoŋ; eebo, iŋai bo mam ejeŋi nuikote nen?"
Job12:4 Asubit eoŋ bala loekienare kama ejai eidunyeteke, loabu keworo Edeke, kaboŋok; etuŋanan loedolit, loitenara ŋes ekienare."
Job12:5 Toma aomisioit naka ŋol kaloijakakai ejai amwanit aronis; ekapakina ŋul luejurusiaros kakeeekeje.
Job12:6 Ekerianaros iweman luka ikaŋatak, inapakinos ŋul luitunyunyurikinete Edeke; lueyaunete ekecedeke toma akanikec."
Job12:7 Konye do kinit itiaŋ, kisisianakinete jo; ka akweny nuka apak da, kilimonokinete."
Job12:8 Arai kinerakinos kalup, kisisianakinete jo; iboro lukeeor da, kitetemonokinete."
Job12:9 Iŋai bo mam ejeŋi kotoma kanul kere, ebe akan naka EJAKAIT ŋes abu kiswama ŋun?"
Job12:10 Aiiar naka ŋinibore yenikajaran ejai akanike, ka eiyeŋane da loka Ituŋasinei kere."
Job12:11 Mam kereka akit igimori akiro, kwape iiriata aanyigol ikeeenyamat?"
Job12:12 Ejai acoa ka ituŋa lumoion, ajenun da ebuni kotoma aibut."
Job12:13 “Ejai acoa ka apedor kaŋes; nes ejai ainerun ka ajenun.
Job12:14 Koany, ekesi, komam bobo epedorio aiduk; egolokini irunanan, komam epedorio ajaar."
Job12:15 Koany, itikokini akipi, koonikis; bobo da ijukari kes, korapaasi akwap,"
Job12:16 Ejai agogoŋ ka aswam nakapirianut kaŋes; yeninalao ka yeninalai kesi luke.
Job12:17 Erikori ikenerunak enataritai, ituluori ikatubok ibaŋiok,"
Job12:18 Elaeari irikoi luka ikabakan, ido eeni akecenabes kausi."
Job12:19 Erikori isasedotin enataritai, elatakini da lukagogoŋok kwap."
Job12:20 Itubutari lumunon, elemari ajenun naka imakio."
Job12:21 Ebukokini ikapolok emenit, ido elaeuni arokoba naka lukagogoŋok,"
Job12:22 Epukori nukaidules elemuni kamuton, itaeauni etoribe loka atwanare."
Job12:23 Itupuci atekerin ido emudiari kes; itanyanyaari atekerin kosodi aitolomar.
Job12:24 Elemari itauono luka ijaka luka ituŋa luka akwap, ido itotori kes amodiŋ neemamei erot."
Job12:25 Erarapitos kotoma amuton komam aica, einakini kes aigetanar kwape ekameran."
Job13:1 “Koany, aanyu akakoŋu gun kere, Abu akakit kopup kojenu da."
Job13:2 Nuijenete yesi, eoŋ da ajeni: mam yes kideparito eoŋ."
Job13:3 Konye akoto einer kaLokapedor kere, ido emiela ainerun ka Edeke."
Job13:4 Konye yes iraas ikajukok aiŋal, yes kere imurwokluutaai."
Job13:5 Okwe tikililinikis cut! Tierai akusicoa.
Job13:6 Aso kopuputu akakirot, kiirasi eirab loka akaituk,"
Job13:7 Inerakinete kereka Edeke numam adolit, Inerakinete kereka nukaiŋal?"
Job13:8 Itubusikinete yesi ŋes? Ipegasi yesi kanuka Edeke?
Job13:9 Ejok tope ŋes airere yes? Arai bo kwape yeninalanalai ituŋanan, iŋalaŋalaete ŋes da?"
Job13:10 Abeit kitoroni yes, arai itubusikinete ituŋa kaiyeiyea."
Job13:11 Mam akepolou kitukuriani yes? Etasuroke da mam kidoikini?
Job13:12 daesiakus eraas awaragasia nuka ekurwon, ikegalikinokokus kes ikegalikinok luka elupe."
Job13:13 Kililinata, kinyeinai kener, keja nuepote kopotu."
Job13:14 Kanukinyo ayaŋaaria akakuan okelaka, ka aibwaikin akaijar akanika?"
Job13:15 Karaida kaar ŋesi eoŋ, konye edareuni ŋes; konye etogogoŋi eoŋ ikarotin kakonyeneke."
Job13:16 Ido ŋin ŋes akaitaiario; ŋol lomam eyonit Edeke mam edolenenei akonyeneke.
Job13:17 Kopupokis noi akakiro, ka ŋun da nualimori koiaut toma akiikus."
Job13:18 Aso koany, esuduny akakiro; ajeni ebe arai loadolit."
Job13:19 Iŋai bo ŋin yenikipegakinor eoŋ? Kasocli kelilin kajal akaijar.
Job13:20 Na bon sirikiiswamak akiro aarei kasodi mam anopi kakonyenekon.
Job13:21 Kolema akanikon kolwaniar kamaka; kinyek etasurokon aitukurian eoŋ,"
Job13:22 Aso kiworo ijo, eoŋ da eii; arai bo kinyeinai kener, ido koboŋok."
Job13:23 Imwaasi ai numam adoliteka ka aronisioka? Kitejenunai cani aibuearetaka ka akaronis.
Job13:24 Kanukinyo ibwaia akonyenekon, konyara da lokasurupikon?"
Job13:25 Itapasi kereka ijo akiot naekutaria ekwam? Irukitor ijo ariaŋ naconit?
Job13:26 Isilakini ijo adwaris aluikin eoŋ, ido isurumi numam adolit nuka eiditeuka;"
Job13:27 Ieni ijo akakeien koloit, irerei ikasokono kere; igiri eikor aisirimor akakeje."
Job13:28 Karaida kasubit bala ibore yenabos aipirisiar, bala egoe loenyami ekajekelut."
Job14:1 Ituŋanan yeneurie aberu ikidioko akepaarasia, ileleba ican."
Job14:2 Elomuni kwape aturot, erinyori; iirori kwape etoribe, mam ebusi."
Job14:3 Egiparete kereka akonyenekon yenikoni nen koyau atubokinio mamakon?
Job14:4 Iŋai bo epedori aitolomun ibore yenelai kotoma yenimam elai? Mam idio da.
Job14:5 Naarai inerunit apaarasiake, etiai loka ilapioke ejai kajo, ibu kibwaik eikor lomam epedori ailam;"
Job14:6 koŋolia neniee, kiyeŋ, aitodol naedaunia apaaranike kwape yeneropio."
Job14:7 “Naarai ejai amun ebe ekitoi keiepar, itocuni bobo, mam edaunos alibunetake."
Job14:8 Karaida kemoionata akejeke kotoma alup, aketorom da etwanikini alup;"
Job14:9 konye kanuka ainuun akipi elibuni, iganete atenuna kwape iraat yenilidio."
Job14:10 Konye etwani ituŋanan, elosi inona; eebo, ejali irunanan akeijar, ejai bo ai?"
Job14:11 Kwape eonikinioto akip kaŋolol, ebosuni ecor eonikini;"
Job14:12 Kwape kwaŋin eperi ituŋanan komam enyouni: aitodol naedaunor akuj, mam ekwenyunete, karaida aitekwenyunio kajokec."
Job14:13 Wu okwe arai kiitonop eoŋ toma Okatwak, tikimunon kaiyeiyeakon, kiton naetuboror anyunyurakon, tikibwaik apak naeseunitai, kiitu eoŋ!"
Job14:14 Arai ketwana ituŋanan ejari kereka bobo? Tikedareu adaun apaarasia kere nuka ejieka, aitodol needolunio akaosikinio."
Job14:15 Tikiinyarau, eoŋ da eii: tiimiela aswam naka akaninikon."
Job14:16 Konye kwana imari akailameta; mere iseseni akaronis?
Job14:17 Eenen akadiakar toma oeoe loipucitai, iburit numam adoliteka."
Job14:18 “Abeit iŋoŋar eronat kodaun, ati iba da elemunio kaiboisike;"
Job14:19 iturususete akip amor; ailapanarikec itelelearete apua naka akwap: imudiari da amuno naka ituŋanan.
Job14:20 Ipikori ijo nes ikar kere, etubor; ijulakini ijo akonyeneke, kijuka."
Job14:21 Edolete odweke aibuses, komam ŋes ejeŋi; itisilio kes, komam ŋes ejeŋi kwape ejaatar,"
Job14:22 Epupuni ariebo naka akuanake, kokuudiani da akeijar.”"
Job15:1 Kosodi koboŋok Elipas Etemanit kotema atiar,:"
Job15:2 “Ti kereka kebonoki lokaeoa kaijen naatai, kisileleb akoikike kekwam lokokide?"
Job15:3 Tikepegata kakiro nuemameete ajokis, arai bo aibakibak numam epedoros?"
Job15:4 Eebo, itapalauni aiyoŋ, ido itikokini aima Edeke."
Job15:5 Naarai numam adolitekon kes isisianakinete aitukukon, iseuni ijo aŋajep naka araparap."
Job15:6 Akoniituk ŋes kitubok aitelekar jo, konye mere eoŋ; eebo, akoniituk ŋes akajenanikon."
Job15:7 “Ijo tope ibu kogeik ituŋa kere auruunio? Arai bo kourii jo eroko imor?
Job15:8 Ipupunit kereka kolo ijo ainerun nakaiyeiyea naka Edeke? Iwomikina ijo bon araun lokaeoa?
Job15:9 Anu bo nuijeni ijo numam sio kijeni? Anu bo da nuimisiikinit ijo komam sio?
Job15:10 Ejaas kamakosi da luabwanutu akoruo ka luemoioŋito noi, luitelekarito papakon kamoion,"
Job15:11 Aitalakar naka Edeke mam kidaunit jo, ka akirot naiswamai kaio kaiyapepera?"
Job15:12 Kanukinyo kiyanaaria ekonitau? Kanukinyo da erenatatar akonikonye?
Job15:13 Tape ibelokini ekonitau aluikin Edeke, acamakin akiro nuikote nen alomun kaitukukon,"
Job15:14 Inyo bo ituŋanan tape elaunit? Ka yeneuriei aberu tape edolit?
Job15:15 Koany, mam Edeke emuno lukalaunakake; eebo, mam akuj elai kakonyeneke."
Job15:16 Ikwaikini bo do ai ŋin yenimodok yenebos, ituŋanan yenemasi numam adolit kwape kakipi!"
Job15:17 “Ketodikini jo, kopup eoŋ: Kanun nuabu kaany alimokini:"
Job15:18 (nuapotu lukacoa kolimosi ameun kalukapapaakec, komam aimunon."
Job15:19 Aponi koinakinai kes akwap, kwabo komamei imoit yenikitori kamakec)."
Job15:20 Ikilianar ikaronon kariebo apaarasiake kere, kes etiai loka ikar kaluisinadikinitai ikareiton."
Job15:21 Edolokinete iporotoi luketasuro akike: kekerianar ebunokini ekaŋatan ŋes.
Job15:22 Mam iyuuni ebe eboŋuni kotoma amuton, ido idareunit ekileŋ ŋes."
Job15:23 Irii lunyaman, kobala ebe, ‘Ai bo ejaas?’ Ejeŋi ŋesi ebe ekapakina apaaran naka amuton aapu kaŋes."
Job15:24 Aburun ka ariebo itukurianete ŋes; ipikorete, kwape ekabaka loitemonokino ejie,"
Job15:25 Naarai ario akekan neejai Edeke, edorit Lokapedor kere."
Job15:26 Emotakini kitininikite emurisin, kojaas imugogol luepolok oupaliake."
Job15:27 Naarai arapaki atumes akonyeneke, ijaŋililos aŋaliŋalin kosiepionoke;"
Job15:28 iboienenei koreria luiswapito, kotogoi luemamei ituŋanan kotoma, luelosete araun aapoŋor."
Job15:29 Mam ebarenenei, karaida ikeboro aibut kaneejai, karaida akeeeraito mam ilururuete."
Job15:30 Mam enyoununei kamuton; itooni akim aketenuna, ido eoliori cut kanuka eiyeŋane loka aitukuke."
Job15:31 Kinyek amunokin aamameak, amodomoda bon; naarai aamameak kes eraunos ekeropit,"
Job15:32 Etacakinio eriŋa apakike kedolo, mam aketenut eraun naetiitii."
Job15:33 Eraraari araitoke numam ekokito kwape emusabibu, ido itodoori aturoke kwape keseituni."
Job15:34 Naarai atukot naka ŋul kalumam eyoŋito Edeke eraunun arakan, enyamenenei akim iweman luka ainakineta nuitumudakete akonye."
Job15:35 Epotuunete aronis, kosodete aur numam adolit, itemonokinete itauonokee aiŋal.”"
Job16:1 Kosodi koboŋok Yob kotema atiar:
Job16:2 “Apupunun nuipu nuikote nen: iraas yesi kere iketalakarak luitapasete.
Job16:3 Enaŋete kereka akiro nukamameak? Arai bo inyo kitunyunyurikini tape iboŋokini?
Job16:4 Eoŋ da tikapedo einer kwape ineratatar yesi; arai kejaas ikusitauon toma aibois naka ekatau, tikapedo airue akiro aitoronia yes, Aimunumunakinia yes akakou."
Job16:5 Tiketogogoŋ yes kakanaiep, aitalakar da naka akaituk tiketojono ariebokus."
Job16:6 “Karaida enera, mam akariebo ejoni; ido karaida katitiŋik inyo iŋogari kamakaŋ?"
Job16:7 Konye kwana ketapas; itisilio akatukot kere.
Job16:8 Ido kieuik ijo eoŋ noi, ŋes ekajenan kamakaŋ: akadokoror kanyoikini, ketejenikini kakonyeneka."
Job16:9 Kagwaragwar kakenyunyura, kareit; kanianaki ikelake: kedetanakini lokasurupika akekonye."
Job16:10 Kitoonanakis aitukekec; kebapanasi amatanen kaimuar: katukonokinotor alosikinit eoŋ,"
Job16:11 Kakorakini Edeke mama ejaas lumam eyoŋito ŋes, kaeakakini akanin nuka ikaronok."
Job16:12 Abu kajai toma aijamam kabilibil ŋesi eoŋ, eebo abu ketin kalari, kepicipie: ido kasipok araun egumatake."
Job16:13 Kerimosi ikagumakake iwaitin kere, ecili ŋesi ikaneretenya, komam itimi; ebukokini epiuka kwap."
Job16:14 Kapedepede apedon nuipu, kakerik kwape ekagogoŋon."
Job16:15 Adonyoki eoŋ epuko amunyoka, ebwaik amumwarataka apua."
Job16:16 Amunaunos akonyeneka kanuka aimony, ejai etoribe loka atwanare abukioka;"
Job16:17 karaida kemamei akaje kakaninika, ililiauna akailip."
Job16:18 “Wu jo akwap, sirikirap akaokot, akaimony da kinyek aisiyeŋunio,"
Job16:19 Aso kwana da, koany, ejai ekajenanika toma akuj, ido ekabwaaranika ejai toma akuj."
Job16:20 Kamwanito ikapapero; konye emonyete akakonye akiyo mama ejai Edeke,"
Job16:21 tetere iticasi ewai loka ituŋanaa mama ejai Edeke, ka loka okoku loka ituŋanan mama ejai iidunyeteke."
Job16:22 Naarai ketuboros ikar luikidioko alosi eoŋ erot lomam abonunio.
Job17:1 Adaun ekatau, akapaarasia da erikakinos; kedarit ailit,"
Job17:2 Abeit ejaas ikesekelok mamaka, ibusakinit akakoŋu aite aitunyunyurikinikee."
Job17:3 “Koinakinai do aititiŋet, korau ijo elopet ekabwoiaranika. Iŋai bo yeniketiŋ akakan?"
Job17:4 Naarai imunonik ekecetau kinyeis ajenun: ŋes mam itopolooria kes,"
Job17:5 Ŋol loirupeenenei ipaperoke aituluor imeian, etwakete akonye nuka idweke."
Job17:6 “Ketuluo eoŋ ikienis kotoma otuŋa, arau ibore yenikimuaritono kakere."
Job17:7 Awariwarata akakonye kanuka aburunit, araut akatutubeta kere kwape etoribe,"
Job17:8 Eumokinete iruna luitenara ŋun, ŋin da yenemamei akirot ecerededei aluikin lumam eyoŋito Edeke."
Job17:9 Konye ederenenei ikadoliton ekerot, Ŋin da yeneiaas akanin nuelaete iyatanakini agogoŋor."
Job17:10 Konye kobonutu yesi kere, kopotu do: mam adumunit yenikacoa kotomakus."
Job17:11 Atuboros akapaarasia, abila ainerunika, aomisio da nukotoma otauka."
Job17:12 Ejulakis akuare araun apaaran, ebe, ‘Idunyas aica kamuton.’"
Job17:13 Arai kamunokini Okatwak araut etogoka; arai apesikinit aperitika toma amuton;
Job17:14 arai kalimok aipany ebe, ‘Ŋo papaka,’ ka ekurut da ebe, ‘Ŋo totoka,’ ido ‘kinaeika’;"
Job17:15 Ai bo ejai akamun? Iŋai ca eanyuni akamun?
Job17:16 Edokari kereka mama ejaas atiketa nuka Okatwak? Kiupari nepepe kejesaros toma apua?”
Job18:1 Kosodi koboŋok Bilidad Esukit kotema atiar,"
Job18:2 cc Itodoli ai alokit akiro? Koomoom ber, kokau kinera isio."
Job18:3 Kanukinyo kinayaraa sio itiaŋ, Karaunos lumam elaete kakonyenekon?"
Job18:4 Ŋo loigwaragwara bon kanuka akoninyunyura, epedori akwap ainyeinio kanukon? Arai bo atiida alemario kaiboisike?"
Job18:5 “Ee bo, ituduniorio aica naka ikaronon, mam asara naka akimike eeauni."
Job18:6 Eraun aica amuton kowemake, ituduniorio atalake naejai kujuke."
Job18:7 Eridakina agogoŋ naka ailametake, elatanari ainerunike ŋes."
Job18:8 Naarai akekeje kes ebirokinete ŋes oboi, ido elosenenei neejaas aloketa."
Job18:9 Ikamuni atacit aketatinyo, ipoki eie ŋes."
Job18:10 Imurumuraritai aipany kalup, ka ataeit korot."
Job18:11 Itukuriani ŋes etasuro kowaitin kere; ido korukitor adudunit atatinyonoke.
Job18:12 Itamamauni eteŋei akegogoŋ, iguanakini ŋesi kobunokin epola."
Job18:13 Enyamenenei atutubeta nuka akuanake, eebo, enyamenenei ekiyai loka atwanare atutubetake."
Job18:14 Erutununo kowemake loemuno ŋesi; ido eyaununo mama ejai ekabaka loka etasuro.
Job18:15 Iboienenei kowemake yenimam erai yenike obe: ebukokinio acukuman toma aiboisike.
Job18:16 Eonionokinete cut akeliasio kwap kokuju da itelio aketenuna.
Job18:17 Eoliori aiituneteke kakwap, emameun ekekiror korot."
Job18:18 Ireneario toma amuton anyoun kaica, ido emejao anyoun kotoma akwap."
Job18:19 Mam ejaunos kikoku, karaida epapait kotuŋake, karaida yenideikini ŋes kaneeboienenoo."
Job18:20 Eumonokinete luetupanakinete akepaaran, kwape kitukurianitere ŋul lukegeikinete."
Job18:21 Abeit ikote nen itogoi luka lumam edolito, ido ŋin ŋes aibois naka ŋol kalomam ejeŋi Edeke.”"
Job19:1 Kosodi koboŋok Yob kotema atiar:
Job19:2 “Itodolete ai aisiyaloŋoŋ aijaraka, ka abilibil eoŋ kakiro?"
Job19:3 Kimoromoroto eoŋ irwan nu atomon: mam kileicikinito alaŋirikinit eoŋ.
Job19:4 Arai abeit apaarit eoŋ apaarika ejai keoŋ elopet.
Job19:5 Arai abeit kitopolooros aluikin eoŋ, kosodete apega keoŋ kanuka amorositika,"
Job19:6 kojenutu na ebe nes Edeke loketagwauni, kabwau keboike."
Job19:7 Koany, elalai ebe, ‘Akaje,’ konye mam kapupunio: amony aiŋarakinio, konye komamei etube."
Job19:8 Anwok ŋesi ekarot komam apedori aitor, ido ebwaik amuton korotinika."
Job19:9 Kalaca da akaibuses, ido alema aboko kakouka."
Job19:10 Kabilibil eoŋ iwaitin kere, aeka eoŋ da: aruto akamun kwape kekitoi."
Job19:11 Enepu da akenyunyura neajai, kemarak eoŋ araut lokasurupike."
Job19:12 Epote irionetake nepepe, itutuete ekecerot mamaka, idukurete airigaun ewemaka."
Job19:13 “Etwalan ikainaean kama ajai, ka ŋul da luajeni araunos bala lumam ajeni,"
Job19:14 Esokosi Iukatekerika, kapalut da ikapapero."
Job19:15 Ŋul da Iukiboienenete kotogoka, ka akejaanakinakaka, kanyaritos do eoŋ elonwau: arau emoit kakonyenekec,"
Job19:16 Anyarauni ekakejaanakinan, mam kabonokini eoŋ, karaida kenaina kakaituk."
Job19:17 Mam akaberu ejeŋi eiyenaneka, kasaeitos idwe luka toroka."
Job19:18 Kamwanata idwe ludidik; arai anyouni, kalimonokinete nukaronok."
Job19:19 Kalaitos ipadicaka kere: nul da Iuamina kaluikis.
Job19:20 Akonororata akakojo, akuit kamuny naka ikelaka."
Job19:21 Kitimoi, kitimoi, wu yes ipadieaka; naarai katiro akan naka Edeke."
Job19:22 Kanukinyo kireitotor kwape ka Edeke, kanukiyo mam yes kiupitor akakuan?"
Job19:23 “Okwe arai kiwadikatete akakiro! Okwe arai kigirigirai oitabo!
Job19:24 Arai kigirigirai atiida kakwara nakasuat ka asasit ikar kere!
Job19:25 Konye ajeni ebe ejari Ekalakunanika, ido kawasia ebwoi kakwap:"
Job19:26 kedau amunyoka amudiario kwaŋin, konye kotoma akuanaka aanyuni Edeke."
Job19:27 Eoŋ ŋes aanyuni ŋes elopet, akakonye da kes esesenete, kwabo mere nuka ece. Epirisiar aijaraka kotomaka."
Job19:28 Arai ibalas yesi ebe, ‘Kireu ea ma ŋes! Naarai adumun aliasit naka akirot kotomaken”;"
Job19:29 Koyonata ekileŋ: naarai anyunyura eyaŋauni aitieanio kekilen, kosodete kojenutu ebe ejai etube.”"
Job20:1 Kosodi koboŋok Sopar Enaamatit kotema atiar,"
Job20:2 “Ŋes kabonokinioto akaomisio, kanuka aisunyit naejai kotomaka."
Job20:3 Apupu aitoronio nakesurumit ileic, ido kabonok eoŋ emoyo loka ajenunika."
Job20:4 Mam ibu kojen nu sek ageun naebwaikinere irunanan akwap,"
Job20:5 ebe, euriana apak naipikoriata ikaronok, ailel da naka lumam eyoŋito Edeke erai naka apak adio?"
Job20:6 Karaida kimukurur akepolou kiton akuj, akekou da adolokin odouon;"
Job20:7 Konye eoliori ikar kere kwape kakecin; ebalasi nul Iuaanyunito nes ebe, ‘Ejai bo ai?’"
Job20:8 Elicari ŋesi kwape airujasit, komam etakani: eebo, ireneanario cut kwape aitapoet naka akuar."
Job20:9 Akoŋu nakeanyunit ŋes mam eanyuni bobo; mam babo etakanuni aiboisike,"
Job20:10 Emoete ikedwe asianut naka lukican, inyakanakinete akekanin abarake."
Job20:11 Ileleba akekojo akurunanake, konye eperenenei kaŋes kotoma apua."
Job20:12 “Karaida keiiiim aronis kaitukuke, karaida kibwa kwap kanajepeke,"
Job20:13 karaida inadakini, komam ekoto aijal, konye itasalikini aitukuke;"
Job20:14 kwabo iumakinete inyamatake kakoikike, eraunos aisorit naka asigirikoloŋa kotomake."
Job20:15 Abu kiliko abar, ido elekuni babo: ebukuni Edeke kotoma akoikike."
Job20:16 Imuiumuii aisorit naka asigirikoloŋa; eari aŋajep naka emusaga ŋes.
Job20:17 Mam ŋes eseseni icorin, icileta lueleleete kesik ka akinyet."
Job20:18 Inyakakini nuka akeitaaritoi, komam ilikonori; mam iyalamikini kanuka ameda naka aimutunuke."
Job20:19 Naarai abu koreite ka aijal lukican; abu konatu etogo kagogoŋ, lomam adukit."
Job20:20 “Naarai mam abu kojenu aiyamakina kotomake, mam itukui imodiobore kanul kalukisiyalamikinete ŋes."
Job20:21 Mam abu kitasal imodiobore, konyama pit; kanuka ŋun mam akerianutuke ebusi."
Job20:22 Karaida kebarara iboroke konye erai yeneridakina; ebunokini ŋes agogoŋ kere naka lueburunito.
Job20:23 Napedwara ageun aigigin, ebukonokini Edeke ŋes adedeŋ naka akenyunyura, isitepanakini kwape lunyamanake."
Job20:24 Ekerenenei ŋesi yenijiis yenika asuat, ipelonori emal loka aisinit ŋes."
Job20:25 Eutuni alemun kakuanake; eebo, elomuni amilisisike naemwekimweki kopiuke; ejaas nuketasuro kamake."
Job20:26 Aponi kinadakinai amuton kere abarake; icweikini ŋes akim namam isinepito ituŋa; idopori ŋul luesalakinete owemake.
Job20:27 Epukori akuj numam adoliteke, enyoikini da akwap ŋes."
Job20:28 Enyouni ameda nakotogoke, elelearete ikeboro kapaaran naka anyunyurake."
Job20:29 Ŋin ŋes akorakinet naka ituŋanan yenikaronori kama ejai Edeke, airumet da naeseikinit Edeke ŋes.”"
Job21:1 Kosodi koboŋok Yob kotema atiar:
Job21:2 “Kiirasi koiokan akakiro; koraut ŋun nukitalakarete.
Job21:3 Kisiikinai, kener eoŋ da; kadau einer, kiyatakis aisekel,"
Job21:4 Erurumaikinit kereka eoŋ ituŋa? Inyo bo kesimikit eoŋ amamus katitiŋikin?
Job21:5 Kosesenai eoŋ, koumokis, kibwaikis akaninikus aitukekus."
Job21:6 Naeitunio, eyaloŋoni, kekamuni etasuro akuanaka."
Job21:7 Kanukinyo ebusioto ikaronok, emoionete, eebo, kogogoŋioto kapedor?"
Job21:8 Icasit aurikee kakonyenekee, ipapaikee da kakonyenekee."
Job21:9 Inapakina ireriakee komam akurian, ebela da loka Edeke emamei kakes."
Job21:10 Eurianakini emonokec lomasenik, komam ekurwokini; eurie akeceiten, komam ijeci."
Job21:11 Ŋukarete ludidikikee kwape esipan, ikosiete da ikeeedwe."
Job21:12 Eyeete kalueruos ka adeudeun, kolelakinito da eporoto loka alamaru."
Job21:13 Edaunete apaarasiakec kokeriaka, etwakete katipet,"
Job21:14 Konye apotu kotemasi Edeke ebe, ‘Irwa; naarai mam sic kipuda ajenun ikonirotin."
Job21:15 Lokapedor kere ŋes iŋai, tape kijaanakini ŋes? Tikiimedau inyo, arai kilipenenei ŋes?’"
Job21:16 Koany, emamei akerianutukee kakaninikee: Elwana ainerun naka ikaronok kamaka."
Job21:17 “Irwan imwaasi ai itudenio atala naka ikaronok? Ebunokinia kes epola? Ekorakinia da Edeke ican kotoma anyunyurake?
Job21:18 Tetere esubito kesi bala ariaŋ naekutari ekwam, ka agugu nuekutari etapipirio?"
Job21:19 Ibalas yesi ebe, ‘Iŋadakinit Edeke ikedwe numam adoliteke.’ Ŋes elopet etacakini, tetere ejenuni."
Job21:20 Koanyutu akekonye akemudiar, ido komat ŋesi anyunyura naka Lokapedor kere,"
Job21:21 Naarai ikonakini ai isiyalamikini eketogo akauleke, ketubi kokidin etiai loka ikelapio?"
Job21:22 Ejai kereka yenisisianakini Edeke aijen? Naarai etubi ŋesi akiro nuka nul kaluitopolooritai.
Job21:23 Ejai yenetwani kojai agogoŋuke kere, Iyamakina eut kainapakina;"
Job21:24 Ileleba akile okisinake, iinatos asume nuka akojoke."
Job21:25 Etwani ice ikilikila kotauke, mam iirenenei ajokis."
Job21:26 Eperete kere kotoma apua, eraparete ikur,"
Job21:27 “Koany, ajeni aomisiokus, ka ibotei da lueroko, luikotosi abilakin eoŋ."
Job21:28 Naarai ibalas ebe, ‘Ai bo ejai etogo loka lokapolon?’ Ebe da, ‘Ai bo ejai ewema lokiboioto lukaronok?’"
Job21:29 Mam ipotu kinisitos luelosete korot? Ido mam iienete aanyunetakee?
Job21:30 Ebe inyeinio ituŋanan yenikaronon kapaaran naka epola? Itolomunio da kina kapaaran naka anyunyura?
Job21:31 Iŋai bo elimonokini ekerot kakonyenek’? Ido iŋai bo etacanakini nuabu kiswama?
Job21:32 Konye edakario toma ailit, idarenenete ates,"
Job21:33 Ejijimanakinete ŋes aapoŋor nuka aditot, etupanakinete ŋes ituŋa kere, kwape inarenikinitotor lumam imarunos,"
Job21:34 Ikwaikinete yesi ai aitalakaaria eoŋ kaamameak, naarai toma abonokinikus asala aisab bon?”"
Job22:1 Kosodi koboŋok Elipas Etemanit kotema atiar,"
Job22:2 “Epedori etuŋanan ajaut kajokis mama ejai Edeke? Abeit lokacoa itoioka bon.
Job22:3 Isiyalamikinit kereka Lokapedor kere jo araun loidolit? Arai ca edumuni ŋesi ameda jo aitodolit ikonirotin?
Job22:4 Kitoronit ca ŋesi jo kanuka ayoŋit ŋes, Tape kitubokini?"
Job22:5 Mam epol akonironis? Kwabo mam esanete numam adolitekon.
Job22:6 Naarai idema ijo onacekon aititineta titai, kosodi ailac Iuemuialalas ikecenapen."
Job22:7 Komam itamasenenei ikapasiton akipi, ibu kimik yeniketeŋei inyamat,"
Job22:8 Konye abu lokagogoŋ koyoŋa akwap, loeminai da abu kiboikin toma,"
Job22:9 Ibu kipapel apuserun, kobilai da akanin nuka ikokiok."
Job22:10 Ŋes kiinakini atacin kirimorete, kisiyalonoŋi akurian nakisirienuni."
Job22:11 Arai amuton komam ipedori aanyun, kiraparete akipi nukepwak."
Job22:12 Mam kereka Edeke ejai neimukurur toma akuj? ido koany aacer nukokuju kwape isididiatar!
Job22:13 Ka jo da inera ebe, ‘Inyo bo ejeŋi Edeke? Epedori kereka ŋesi aitub akiro ejai toma amuton nairiono cueucuc?"
Job22:14 Eraparito ŋes idouon luitolimakinito, tetere mam eanyuni; elosenenei ŋesi kairim naka akuj.’"
Job22:15 Ikoto aitup erot lomoion lokicakacakaete ituŋa lukaronok?
Job22:16 Luaponi kourupooroi koroko apakiokec kedolo, aleleas akip ageunetakec."
Job22:17 Luapotu kobalas Edeke ebe, ‘Irwa’; Ebe da, ‘Epedori Lokapedor kere aiswamakin sio inyo?’"
Job22:18 Kwabo abu ŋesi kilelebik ikecetogoi iboro luejok: konye ainerun naka lukaronok elwana kaneajai eoŋ.
Job22:19 Eanyunete luedolito ŋun, kiyalamikinos; ekienatatar luemamei akirot kes."
Job22:20 Kobalas ebe, ‘Abeit emudiario ŋul lukinyoikinete sio, anyama akim ŋul luedeuna.’"
Job22:21 “Koeamanaros ka Edeke, kinapakin: kwaŋin idumununia aiokis."
Job22:22 Kenainait, kijau aituutoorio kaitukuke, kinadak da akiroke otaukon."
Job22:23 Arai ibonori mama ejai Lokapedor kere, kiteteunio; arat kisukunya numam adolit kolwaka kowemaikon."
Job22:24 Arai kibwaik abarakon toma apua, ka esabu loka Opir toma alica nuka aguuruto;"
Job22:25 Kosodi eraun Lokapedor kere abarakon, ka epuesa loka akais nuipu mamakon."
Job22:26 Naarai kwaŋin isiyalamanakinia Lokapedor kere, Itonyouni da akonyenekon mama ejai Edeke."
Job22:27 Kilipenenei ŋes, iiranari ŋesi jo; itacanakini akoniiyaposio."
Job22:28 Arai ineruni akirot, itogogoŋio mamakon; ecaanakini aica ikonirotin."
Job22:29 Nakibiroriata jo, itemanari ebe, ‘Ejai aitonyounio.’ Itajari ŋesi yenitasono."
Job22:30 Eyuuni da nin yenimam aitoronio; eebo, kiyuununio kanuka alaunit naka akaninikon.”"
Job23:1 Kosodi koboŋok Yob kotema atiar:
Job23:2 “Lolo da elitoro akairurum; elaŋir akekan aitelekarit eidinyika.
Job23:3 Okwe arai kaieni neapedoria aanyun ŋes, arai kapedori adolore neiboio!"
Job23:4 Tikesuduny akakiro kakonyeneke, ketorip akiro kaitukuka."
Job23:5 Tikajen akiro nukabonokini, kajenuni da nukabala eoŋ."
Job23:6 Tikereka ketepeg kotoma apolou naka apedorike? Mam; ti ŋes da kapupoki eoŋ.
Job23:7 Tikepedo etuŋanan loetenara kotau apurokin bon kaŋina kamake; kwaŋin ti kalakunere apaarasia kere kama ejai ekatubonika.
Job23:8 “Koany, alosi kinaren, konye emamei ŋesi; kabono kau da, konye mam apedori aanyun ŋes."
Job23:9 Amoi ŋes kediany da, konye mam apedori aanyun ŋes; kebelokini teten, konye mam apedori aite ŋes."
Job23:10 Konye ejeŋi ŋesi erot loaderit; Kaadau ŋesi aigimor eoŋ, alomuni kwape esabu."
Job23:11 Ieasete akakeje kokukutuke; abu kader ekerot, komam apaari."
Job23:12 Mam abu kajal aicorakinet naka aitukuke; abu kenadak akiro nuka anaiepeke otauka.
Job23:13 Konye erai ŋesi lokepone ediopet, iŋai bo epedori aibelokin ŋes? Nuipuda ŋesi, ŋun iswamai da."
Job23:14 Naarai itodoli ŋesi ŋun nukaseikinitai sek: ejaas kaŋes nuipu nuikote nen.
Job23:15 Ŋes eyalononoo naejaar ŋesi; naaomoomaa, akurianar ŋes."
Job23:16 Naarai isiiliori Edeke ekatau, kesiyalonon eoŋ Lokapedor kere:"
Job23:17 naarai mam abu kabur kanuka amuton, karaida kanuka amuton naeiesi ŋaŋ naerapiari akakonyen."
Job24:1 “Kanukinyo mam Lokapedor kere iŋadakinia apakio? Kanukinyo da mam ŋul luejenete ŋes eanyuniata akepaarasia?
Job24:2 Ejaas luiloeete iikorun luka alupokee; enaŋete isipanin kadeden, kosodete aitadak."
Job24:3 Emearete asigiria naka ikoki, eyaŋaarete emoŋ loka apuserut araun aititiŋet,"
Job24:4 Isinaeete luilwaritos erot; eŋopete lukican luka akwap nepepe,"
Job24:5 Koany, kwape atukoi kamodiŋ, elomarete aswamukec, edunyakinito amoot luenyamete; einakini ais kes inyamat luka idwekec."
Job24:6 Etubete inya lukokitui; irarete da imono luka emusabibu loka lokaronon.
Job24:7 Eperete akuare kia kimujalalas, komameete inapen, karaida lukimukos kanuka aaterot,"
Job24:8 Ebaunete kanuka elimilim loka ironan, etunete atiiba kemamiki neemecete,"
Job24:9 Ejaas luiwuruporete ikoki kokisin, ka alemar aititiŋet naka lukican."
Job24:10 Kolosete imujalalas emameete inapen, koriebi kes eteŋei ibwokito isutan,"
Job24:11 Icuete akinyet kotoma arwatatin nuka ituŋa kaŋul, icakaeakaete aeuetakec nuka ebino, kojakite akur."
Job24:12 Irianaros ituŋa ej aas ore loipu ituŋa, emonyete itauon luka luimusunitai, konye mam Edeke epodo ailipikec."
Job24:13 “Ejaas ŋul toma otiai loka ŋul kaluepaliikis aica, mam ejenete ikerotin, komam etuparete ikesokono."
Job24:14 Enyouni ekaaran ecila kide, eari lukican ka luilwaritos, kewar akwap esubi bala ekokolan."
Job24:15 Idarit akoŋu naka lodote amuton, kobala ebe, ‘Emamei yenikaanyuni.’ Itegelikini akekonyen."
Job24:16 Kotoma amuton ŋes ebokiata itogoi, egoloros paaran; mam ejenete aica."
Job24:17 Naarai atupuruc esubit kamakec kere kwape etoribe loka atwanare, naarai enaikinito nuketasuro nuka etoribe loka atwanare."
Job24:18 “Ibalasi yesi ebe, ‘Ŋelelearos katipet kokuju akipi, ikenitoi akorakinetekec kakwap: mam epaari orot loebei omanikoria luka emusabibu."
Job24:19 Akamu ka amwanis itoonikinete akipi nuepote koronan, atwanare da nul lukadiakanarak."
Job24:20 Imurwokini ŋes aliliget; enyamete ŋes ikur kojijimikis; mam iitunio bobo: ebilio do amamus adolit kwape kekitoi.’
Job24:21 “Enyami ŋesi arakan namam euriei: mam iswamakini apuserut ejok,"
Job24:22 Konye Edeke kapedorike itubusi ikadedeŋak, enyounete, namam emunototor ajaut kaijar."
Job24:23 Einakini kes araut luinapakina, egonakinos nen; esesenete akonyeke da irotinikec."
Job24:24 Itopoloorio kes; konye ketubor apak naedit, eoliorete; eebo, itidisiario, elemario korot kwape ice kere, esakario da kwape aluŋuren nuka akima."
Job24:25 Arai mam ikote nen kwana, iŋai bo kelepilepi kwape enalaa, aitodikin da ebe nuenera eoŋ eraas aamameak?”"
Job25:1 Kosodi koboŋok Bilidad Esukit kotema atiar:
Job25:2 “Airum ka etasuro ejaas ka Edeke; eyauni ŋesi ainapakin kaiboisioke nukokuju.
Job25:3 Ipedori kereka aimar ajoresioke? Iŋai bo da yenimam ecaikini aicake?
Job25:4 Epedori Irunanan biai araun ikadoliton kama ejai Edeke? Epedori da biai nin yeneuriei aberu araun yenikalaunan?
Job25:5 Koany, emamei da elap ailiya, mam aacer da esegara kakonyeneke:"
Job25:6 aitelekarit konyet ituŋanan, yenerai ekurut! Okoku loka etuŋanan da, loerai eritanit!”"
Job26:1 Kosodi koboŋok Yob kotema atiar,"
Job26:2 “Iŋaraki ca ma ijo ŋol loemamei apedor! Ilaku ca ma ijo akan namam agogoŋ!
Job26:3 Itetemik ca ma ijo ŋol loemamei acoa, kosodi alimor nuipu noi nuka ajenun ejok!"
Job26:4 Ilimoki nit iŋai akonikiro? Ido lokanai etau loalomu kamakon?
Job26:5 Emaranete lukatwak kwap kakipi ka luibojete kotomakec.
Job26:6 Imujalal Okatwak kakonyen nuka Edeke, emamei Amudiario eimukos."
Job26:7 Epesenenei ŋesi ari naka agolitomei toma apak atai, ka aikaiakin akwap komamei ibore,"
Job26:8 Eeni akipi kodouonoke luitolimakinito, komam ecila edou kokwapukec."
Job26:9 Erapari ereet loka eicoloŋoke, kopesiki ekedou."
Job26:10 Abu kigirak eikor koinaren kakipi, aitodol neenanit aica ka amuton,"
Job26:11 Emaranete ipirin luka akuj, kosodete aumokin kanuka aitoronoke."
Job26:12 Itukulai aŋolol kanuka akepedor, icumucumei Rakab kanuka aienunike."
Job26:13 Itesegaari akuj kanuka ekemoyo; abu akekan kicum emun loipilitoi.
Job26:14 Koany, nu kes aririeik nuka irotinike: edit ca aiyeiyeake nakipupi! Konye airetun naka akepedor, iŋai bo epedori ajenun?”"
Job27:1 Kosodi kiyatak Yob akewarag, kotema atiar:"
Job27:2 “Kwape ejaria Edeke, loabu kadema eoŋ akapolou, ka Lokapedor kere, loabu kipiiki adwaris toma otauka;"
Job27:3 (naarai akaijar eroko itekoro kamakaŋ, ka eiyeŋane da loka Edeke ejai toma okumesika;)"
Job27:4 Abeit mam akaituk inera numam edolito, karaida akaŋajep alimonor nukainal."
Job27:5 Madi akui eoŋ aitoiok yes, mam alemari akabeit kamakaŋ aitodol neatwania."
Job27:6 Etogogoŋi akadolit, komam aosikini, mam ekatau ketoroni akapaarasia kere."
Job27:7 “Koraun lokasurupika kwape ekaronon, ka ŋol da lokanyoikini koraun kwape lomam edolit."
Job27:8 Naarai amuno naka ŋol kalomam ejeŋi Edeke ŋes inye, arai kemudia Edeke ŋes, ido bo kelema Edeke akeijar?"
Job27:9 Epupununei kereka Edeke akeimony, arai kedolonokis ŋes ican?"
Job27:10 Epedori kereka ŋesi aisiyalamikin mama ejai Lokapedor kere, kosodi amonyenen mama ejai Edeke apaarasia kere?"
Job27:11 Kesisianakini yes nuka akan naka Edeke, mam emunonikini nuejaas ka Lokapedor kere,"
Job27:12 Koany, ipotu yesi kere koanyutu kanukus, asa inyo bo kituluori cut iamameak?"
Job27:13 “Lo ŋes ewai loka lokaronon kama ejai Edeke, airumet naka ikamenitok, naeinakinio kes kama ejai Lokapedor kere."
Job27:14 Arai kiyatanakinos ikedwe, iyatanakinos okileŋ: mam akelwak imonianakinos inyamat."
Job27:15 Luesalakinete kaŋes idaenenoo atular, mam akepuserun ekuudianete ŋes."
Job27:16 Karaida ketukokinit epuesa kwape apua, kitemonokinite inapen kwape elupe;"
Job27:17 epedori aitemokin, konye loedolit ŋes enapi, ido loemamei akirot ŋes ekori epuesa."
Job27:18 Eduki eketogo kwape asimokok, kwape eswam loiswamai ekedaran."
Job27:19 Eperi korai ekabaran, konye mam etukokinio; ekwenyuni, ido komamei."
Job27:20 Edolokinete ŋes nuketasuro kwape kakipi; esiia ŋes etapipirio kuare.
Job27:21 Eyaŋaari ekwam lokokide, koeka; eurupoori nes kaiboisike."
Job27:22 Naarai ibiri Edeke nes komam itimi, tikeker anyoun kakanike."
Job27:23 Ibapakinete ituŋa ŋes akanin, isuario konyou kaiboisike."
Job28:1 “Abeit ejai aipany naebokere epuesa, ka aibois da naka esabu loijililiete kesi."
Job28:2 Elemunio asua kotoma alup, ido ecalunio aisinit kotoma amor."
Job28:3 Itasanete ituŋa amuton, ido aitodol oikor lokawasia emoete amor, toma amuton naeiesi cucucuc, naka etoribe loka atwanare."
Job28:4 Ebokete apanya kolwaka koreria luka ituŋa; imurwokinete ituŋa luitorete kokuiukec, ijululunio kolwaka kituna, iiekosi ewai kewai."
Job28:5 Elomunete inyamat kalup, konye kotoma kwap ibelokinio alup kwape kakim."
Job28:6 Amorukec nes aibois naka asapiro, ejai da apua naka esa bu."
Job28:7 “Emamei akweny nakamejan naejeni erot ŋol, kwabo akonye da nuka etoori mam eanyunete,"
Job28:8 Itiaŋ luiturosi mam apotu kicakata, karaida eŋatuny lokadedenan mam itorit nen."
Job28:9 Eriori akanike atiida naegogoŋ, ebuburiari ironan alemun kageunetekec,"
Job28:10 Itcitoikini alelesia atibiba; esesenete akonyeke ŋinibore yeniketiai loepol.
Job28:11 Itikokini icileta kinyeis alel, ka ibore da yenibwaitai itolomuni toma aica."
Job28:12 “Konye do ai bo etakanunia acoa? Ai ea da ejai aibois naka ajenun?
Job28:13 Mam ituŋa ejenete etiaike, mam da etakani kakwap naka ikajarak."
Job28:14 Ebala ataro ebe, ‘Emamei kamakaŋ.’ Ebala aŋolol da ebe, ‘Emamei kamakaŋ.’"
Job28:15 Mam edumunio kanuka esabu, karaida epuesa mam itemio itia eketiai."
Job28:16 Mam epedorio aitirian kesabu loka Opir, karaida amor nuemelemeloto nuka akais nuipu, karaida asapiro."
Job28:17 Mam epedorete esabu ka agilas ariakakin kaŋes, mam epedorete iboro luka esabu loelai aisieeun ŋes."
Job28:18 Mam inerai nuka akoral ka akurusitalo: eebo, etiai loka acoa itelekarit ilulun."
Job28:19 Mam atopasit naka Etiopa eriakakinos, mam itirianio da kesabu loelai."
Job28:20 “Aso ebuni kai acoa? Ai bo da ejai aibois naka ajenun?
Job28:21 Naarai ibwaitai kakonyen nuka ikajarak kere, imunonikinitai akweny nuka apak."
Job28:22 Ebalas Amudiar ka Atwanare da ebe, ‘Kipou kapuputu iemutoke kakiikosi.’"
Job28:23 “Ejeŋi Edeke erotoke, ejeŋi ŋesi aiboisike da."
Job28:24 Naarai eseseni aitodol osaŋeta luka akwap, itei da kwap kakuj kere."
Job28:25 Iswamaikini ekwam aininet, eebo, itemi akipi kaitemis."
Job28:26 Nakibwaikinia akiru ekisil, ka erot loka aimiliaunun nuka eires;"
Job28:27 Kosodi konyet aanyun, ka alimor da, Abu kitieat, eebo, ka aiŋic cut."
Job28:28 Kotema ŋesi ituŋa ebe, ‘Koany, ayoŋit EJAKAIT, nin ŋes acoa, anyoun karonis da ŋes ajenun.’’’"
Job29:1 Kiyatak Yob akewarag, kotema atiar,"
Job29:2 “Okwe arai kajai kwape kajaar toma olapio luatuboros, kwape kajaar toma apaarasia nukedarenenea Edeke;"
Job29:3 Nakecaanakinia aketala akouka, aicake ŋes ketotorenenei amuton;"
Job29:4 kwape kajaar kapaarasia nuka akurunanaka, naajaananar aiyeiyea naka Edeke roma owemaka;"
Job29:5 Naarokor Lokapedor kere kija kooŋ, Korina ikadwe da kerimorito."
Job29:6 Nakilosenenere akailameta kakile, atiiba da nakabukonokinia eoŋ icorin luka akinyet!"
Job29:7 Nakalomununia kalosenenei orute loka ere, naketemonokinio ekaicolon asisiarin,"
Job29:8 Kaanyunete itelepai konopete, konyoununete imakio aibwo;"
Job29:9 kinyaanakinete ikapolok einer, kipikanakinete akecekanin aitukekec;"
Job29:10 kisililinai iporotoi luka isotia, kiminaikinos anaiepakec aŋiiritokec."
Job29:11 Naarai nakapupununio akit kasodi aimal eoŋ, akoŋu da nakaanyununia koraunun akajenanika:"
Job29:12 naarai ayuununei yenikican yenemonyi, ikoki da, yenimam yeniŋarakini."
Job29:13 Kadoik arereŋ naka ŋin kayenaapiarit aolior, ketoyo akalakara etau loka apuserut."
Job29:14 Abu kanap adolit, karapaa; kosubite ekatube bala anapito ka ibore yenitorokino akou."
Job29:15 Karaunun akonye mama ejai yenimuduk, ido karaunun akejen mama ejai yenicodo."
Job29:16 Karaunun papakec kaluilwaritos, kaŋicenenei akiro nuka ŋol kalomam ajeni."
Job29:17 Abilenenei abokony naka lomam edolit, keriuni imejauna alemun kokelake."
Job29:18 Kasodi atemar ebe, ‘Atwanikini akaika, ido eyatanakini akapaarasia kwape kasine,"
Job29:19 Alianas akalias akipi, ejaenenas akopyo toma atenunaka aitiwalar akwap."
Job29:20 Itet akaibuses kaneajai, itet da akakabwa kakanika.’"
Job29:21 Kapuponokinete ituŋa kedareunete, kililiŋanakinete ainerunika."
Job29:22 Akaulo kakiroka mam bobo kes apotu kinerata, edoikini kes ekainer."
Job29:23 Kedarenenete kwape idarere akiru, Eoonanarete akeceituke kwape eoonanariata kanuka akiru naka aiporo."
Job29:24 Abu kamuionor naaiurununitotor kesi; mam apotu kituluroto alakara naka akonyeneka.
Job29:25 Abu kaseanakini ekecerot, keboonokini eoŋ kwape lokapolon, keboienenei kwape ekabaka kajore, kwape loitalakari luibworosi."
Job30:1 “Konye kwana kakienatatar eoŋ luetelekarit kapolou, abu kamen lukapapakec komam ejaikini aupakin kainokwo lukosipanika."
Job30:2 Eebo, agogoŋ naka akecekanin tikaadumakis inyo? Ituŋa luadaun akurunanakec."
Job30:3 Agonororata kanuka aibabanitoi ka ebeli, iboiboete aapoŋor nueokito, kaneemutono ka neesil."
Job30:4 Edeete atilo kotoma amonieik, aliasia nuka erotem kes inyamatakec."
Job30:5 Ireŋeario kokidiŋ otuŋa, ilulukinete kes kwape ilulukinere ekokolan."
Job30:6 Ibusakinit kes aiboi toma akabaan nukotoma aditon, toma apanya nuka akwap ka iburin luka imor."
Job30:7 Emonyete kotoma amonieik, etukonokinos kwap kikukwa."
Job30:8 Eraas idwe luka ibaŋiok, eebo, idwe luka ituŋa luemameete ikiroria; Eleio kirenearete kakwap."
Job30:9 “Kwana da araun eoŋ ekosiokec, eebo, araun emocis kamakec."
Job30:10 Kalaata, abwata kaneajai, mam inyeinete aimuanakin aimul akonyeneka."
Job30:11 Naarai alaea Edeke akeuno, karoiki, ido aeakasi kesi aenet kakonyeneka."
Job30:12 Enyounete lukelepa kakanika nakoteten, eremorete akakejen, ido itutuete irotinikee luka amudiar neajai."
Job30:13 Emunaunete ekarot, esiotikinete ekapola, ituŋa luemameete ekenarakinan."
Job30:14 Kwape ebelununotor kotoma arorwa naelal, kokidiŋ kaaponor ikokorununos neaiai.’"
Job30:15 Ibelokinos nuketasuro mamaka, irusito aibusesuka kwape kekwam, elicari akakerianut da kwape kedou."
Job30:16 “Kwana da ebukokinitai ekatau kotomakan, kekamutu da apaarasia nuka aitieanitoi."
Job30:17 Kanorocete akakojo da kuare kotomaka, ariebo da nakeboiboi eoŋ mam iyeŋuni."
Job30:18 Amunaunos ikanapen kanuka agogoŋ naepol naka adekaka, keenieni cut kwape karoot naka ekootika."
Job30:19 Kacakaki toma orit, araun kwape kapua ka ekurwon."
Job30:20 Amonyi neijai, mam kiboŋokinit, abwoi, kiseseni."
Job30:21 Ibelokin araun lokadedenan kama ajai, kanuka agogoŋ naka akonikanin kireu."
Job30:22 Kitonyou kaneejai ekwam, kisibwanen, kisiiliil kokwamin."
Job30:23 Naarai ajeni kitodoli toma atwanare, togo loiŋadakinitai lukajarak kere."
Job30:24 “Abeit mam kereka Ituŋanan eriori akekan kotoma aapoŋor, karaida ejaun toma opolake mam emonyi aiŋarakinio?"
Job30:25 Mam kereka abu kamony akiyo mama ejai ŋin yenajai ocan? Mam kereka ekatau akadakin yenilwaritoi?
Job30:26 Nakaomitor nuejok, kopote ca nueroko: nakedaritor aica, kodolun ca amuton."
Job30:27 Ekulaete aomisioka, komam iyenunete, kadolokis apaarasia nuka aiticanitoi."
Job30:28 Alosi ebworo komamei akoloŋ, abwoi kotoma aurianet, eluluei keŋarakis."
Job30:29 Arai eoŋ onace loka ikuei, epadie da loka ikuului."
Job30:30 Erioniar amunyoka, eregar, akakoio da amwakuut noi."
Job30:31 Ŋes keraunor akadeudeu nakakuudian, akalamaru da koraun eporoto loka ŋul kaluemoayete akiyo."
Job31:1 “Abu ketutuk aitutuket kakonyeka; Aso ti kapedo biai asesen apese?
Job31:2 Naarai akorakinet anyoin naka Edeke naebuni kokuju, airumet nanyoin da naka Lokapedor kere naebuni kokuju?"
Job31:3 Mam kereka erai epola mama ejai yenimam edolit, ka abili da mama ejaas luiswamaete numam adolit?"
Job31:4 Mam kereka nes eseseni ikarotin, imari da akailameta kere?"
Job31:5 “Arai kiupanara kaamameak, arai da ewonyarito akakeje aiŋal,"
Job31:6 (Mere ketemi kaitemis naerian, tetere ejenuni Edeke abeiteka!)"
Job31:7 arai epaarit akakeju korot, ka ekatau da arai abu kotupa akakonye, ido arai iminaikina aitakinet kere akaninika;"
Job31:8 aso mere kaye, konyam ice, eebo, korutoi inyamat lukomanikorika."
Job31:9 “Arai ecodara ekatau mama ejai aberu, arai da aperunit eoŋ kokek loka eidunyeteka:"
Job31:10 asa kirieik akaberu ice, ido kirukumete ŋes."
Job31:11 Naarai tierai nin naketal, eebo, tierai aronis naibusakinit ikatubok aitican;"
Job31:12 naarai erai akim naidopori kiton Amudiario, ido naekoto arutor eiyasika kere."
Job31:13 “Arai abu kamen akirot naka ekakejaanakinan arai naka akakejaanakinan, naketepeseniata,"
Job31:14 asa ekwaikini ai arai kenyou Edeke? Nakabunokinia, aboŋokini biai?"
Job31:15 Lokasubi eoŋ kotoma akoik mere ŋes kesubi nes da? Mere ediopet Iokiluŋuhnjuuni oni kakoik?
Job31:16 “Arai abu kemik lukican yenimielas, arai abu kesiriono akonye nuka apuserut;"
Job31:17 arai abu kanyam bon akatap, komam ekoki enyamit;"
Job31:18 (Konye mere, ageun keiditeuka kipoloi keoŋ kwape kaneejai papa, abu karai ekenarenikinonike ageun kakoik naka totoka.)"
Job31:19 Arai abu kaany yenetwani kanuka amamus inapen, arai yenilwaritoi komamei yenikimukis;"
Job31:20 arai aŋabeteke mam kemalat, ido arai mam emwanunit kajulo nuka amerekekika;"
Job31:21 arai abu kario akakan mama ejai ikoki, naarai abu kaany aiganio korute:"
Job31:22 kosodi kigwegweun ekeperika kolagagamit, kobila da akoit naka akanika."
Job31:23 Naarai abu kakuriana epola loebuni kama ejai Edeke, ido kanuka akepolou mam nuabu kapedo aswam,"
Job31:24 “Arai abu kamunokin esabu, arai da abu katema esabu loejok ebe, ‘Ŋo amunonutuka.’"
Job31:25 Arai abu kesiyalamik akabar naapol noi, naarai akeriana akakan;"
Job31:26 arai abu kasesen akoloŋ naeeai, arai elap loelosi iliyai;"
Job31:27 kosodi ekatau aiiodoorio kaiyeiyea, akaituk da konu akanika:"
Job31:28 Ŋin da tierai aronis naibusakinit ikatubok aitiean, naarai tikenala Edeke loejai toma akuj."
Job31:29 “Arai abu kesiyalamik amudiar naka ŋol kalokalai, arai abu kekeu nakedoloki ŋes aronis;"
Job31:30 (Eebo, mam abu kaeam akaituk adiakar, toma ailip akeijar elama.)"
Job31:31 Ituŋa lukowemaka arai mam apotu kotemasi atiar, “Iŋai epedori adumun ituŋanan yenimam imonikin ikenyamat?"
Job31:32 Mam ipejonon aperenenei orot; konye abu kanaanakini ikaloton ikakekia;
Job31:33 Arai abu karap aidiakaka kwape Adam, kanuka aibwa numam adoliteka kotoma atorobuka;"
Job31:34 naarai abu kayon atukot naepol, kakurianar amwanio naka ikekia, tape elilini komam alomari kiŋa—"
Job31:35 Wu okwe arai kejai yenikapupi! (Koany, na nes aanyuneteka, kabonok eoŋ Lokapedor kere!) Arai kiija keoŋ ŋin naewadikat lokasurupika aiwosa eoŋ!"
Job31:36 Abeit tikarion kokeperika, tikaenik kwape kaboke."
Job31:37 Tikabilaki ŋes aimwaus naka akailameta, tikekunyaki neejai ŋesi kwape lokapolon."
Job31:38 “Arai apotu alupoka kiworoto aitepesen eoŋ, ibwololoete da aloboikee nepepe;"
Job31:39 arai abu kanyam akeeeraito komam aitae, arai bo abu kedosilana ikulepek,"
Job31:40 kobwanut ikukwa aibois naka akima, ka igitun aibois naka esairi.” Asana ne akiro nuka Yob."
Job32:1 Kosodete ituŋa nul iuni kinyeis aboŋokin Yob, naarai kerai loedolit kakonyeneke elopet."
Job32:2 Kosodi anyunyura naka Eliku okoku loka Barakel Ebusit, loka ateker naka Ram ainepun: kinepu akenyunyura mama ejai Yob, naarai kitojokikina elopet kwabo mere Edeke."
Job32:3 Ido kinepu akenyunyura neejaas ikepapero luuni, naarai mam apotu kodumut nabonokino, konye kotubokis aitelekar Yob."
Job32:4 Abu ca Eliku kidarite einet ka Yob, naarai kepolok luee aitelekarit ŋes."
Job32:5 Kosodi Eliku keanyu emamei aboŋokinet kaituke nuka ituŋa nul luuni, kinepu akenyunyura,"
Job32:6 Kosodi Eliku okoku loka Barakel Ebusit koboŋok ebe, “Arai eoŋ lodidi, yes da imojonito noi; ŋes kainakini aitikokina, komam atamakin aitodikin yes nuaomit."
Job32:7 Atema atiar, ‘Mere kinerata apaarasia, mere aipues naka ikar kisisianakis acoa.’"
Job32:8 Konye ejai emoyo otuŋa, eiyeŋane da loka Lokapedor kere einakini ajenun,"
Job32:9 Ikapolok mere kes lukacoa, karaida imakio mere kes luejenete etube."
Job32:10 Ŋes enerar atiar, ‘Kopupunoi; ido etodun eoŋ da nuaomit.’"
Job32:11 “Koany, abu kedarit akirokus, kapupokinite einerikus, naimoiata yesi nuinerasi."
Job32:12 Eeba, ketoikinit akit neijaas, ido koany, emamei loitelekarit Yob, karaida loebonokini akekiro, kotomakus."
Job32:13 Kocoitos kinyeis einer ebe, ‘Kidumu acoa; epedori Edeke aipikor ŋes, konye mere etuŋanan.’"
Job32:14 Naarai mam abu kitemoki ekeiner mama ajai eoŋ, kwabo mam aboŋokini ŋes koinerikus."
Job32:15 “Eumokinitos, mam bobo eboŋokinete: emamei akirot nainerasi."
Job32:16 Ido edari kereka eoŋ da, naarai mam inerasi, naarai ebwoete atai, komam ebonokinere?"
Job32:17 Aboŋokini eoŋ da nuka, etodiari eoŋ da nuaomit."
Job32:18 Naarai ileleba eoŋ akiro, naarai ketinaikinit emoyo loejai tomakaŋ,"
Job32:19 Koany, eputosi akoikika ebino loemamei neelomunia, kwape iriagin lukitetiak luka imukulen, eapie acila."
Job32:20 Kebusakinit einer tetere ebworari, aooŋi akaituk aboŋokini."
Job32:21 Kenainait, kenyek atiakatiak ituŋa; karaida aiiodiiod idiotuŋanan kere."
Job32:22 Naarai mam ajeni aijodijod; tikalema Lokasubanika eoŋ katipet.
Job33:1 “Konye jo Yob, keŋainait kopup ekainer, kiira da akakiro kere."
Job33:2 Koany, aooŋ akaituk, ener aŋajepeka kaitukuka."
Job33:3 Elimorete akiroka aitenara naka etauka; ineri akaituk nuejeni kabeit.
Job33:4 Naarai emoyo loka Edeke ŋes kasubi, eiyeŋane da loka Lokapedor kere ŋes kainakini aijar."
Job33:5 Arai ipedori, kobonokinoi, kinap akonikiro kakonyeneka, kobwo kokidiŋ."
Job33:6 Koany, ajai eoŋ neejai Edeke kwape ijaar ijo da, eoŋ da abu kelunulunuun kalup."
Job33:7 Koany, mam etasuroka kitukuriani jo, kwabo mam akaridanakin kilanironokini,"
Job33:8 “Abeit iner ijo kapupi eoŋ, eira da eporoto loka akonikiro ebe,"
Job33:9 ‘Arai loasegara, komamei aibucar; arai lomam aronis, ido emameete numam edolit kotomakan."
Job33:10 Koany, emoi ŋesi nukabenyanut kamakaŋ: kanyarit lokasurupike;"
Job33:11 eeni akakejen oloit, erosi ŋesi ikarotin kere.’"
Job33:12 “Koany, kabonokini jo, mam jo idolit kakirot kaŋin, naarai itelekarit Edeke ituŋanan kapolou."
Job33:13 Kanukinyo itepegia ŋes? Naarai mam ŋes imari etiai loka akiroke kere.
Job33:14 Naarai inera Edeke irwan atipet, Eebo, irwan aarei, karaida mam ituŋa ibwaikinitos itauon."
Job33:15 Toma airujasit, kaitapoet naka akuare, arai kikamutu aio nuipu ituŋa, kojotoete kaperisio,"
Job33:16 Ŋes konyet eŋaaria aki nuka ituŋa, kosodi aibwaikin aanyunet toma aisisianakiniokec,"
Job33:17 tetere elemuni ituŋanan kotoma ainerunike, kosodi aibwa aiwoŋonut kotunanan;"
Job33:18 itikokini etauke kinyek adoere aipany, ka akeijar da kinyek atwanare kekilen,"
Job33:19 “Eleeonorio da kariebo kaperisike, kauta namam enaŋi kakojoke:"
Job33:20 tetere akeijar esaci atap, ka eketau da inyamat lueminakinitos."
Job33:21 Edauni akekirin komam bobo etakanuni; ideleleunete akekojo numam lem etakanete,"
Job33:22 Eebo, ikunyakini etauke aipany, ka aijarake da neeiaas luemudiarete."
Job33:23 Arai ejai emalaika kaŋes, ekejulan, ediopet kotoma olukumit, aitodikin ituŋa nuibusakinito;"
Job33:24 esiana mama ejai, etemari atiar, ‘Koyu ŋes kalomar toma aipany, adum nalakunet;"
Job33:25 iteteuni akuanake aitelekarit naka ikoku; eboŋokini toma apaarasia nuka atumunike.’
Job33:26 Ilipi Edeke, ido einakini asianut, tetere eseseni akekonyen kaiyalama, ido inyakakini ituŋanan adoliteke."
Job33:27 Eyei kakonyen nuka ituŋa kobala ebe, ‘Adiaka eoŋ, kebelok nuedolito, komam nukenarakinete."
Job33:28 Alaku ekatau kinye alomar toma aipany, akaijar da esesenenei aica.’"
Job33:29 Koany, iswamai Edeke akiro ŋun kere, irwan aarei, eebo, irwan auni, neejai ituŋanan,"
Job33:30 ainyakun eketau kotoma aipany, tetere ecaikini aka naka lukajarak."
Job33:31 Kojenu ijo Yob, kopupunoi: kililin, kener eoŋ."
Job33:32 Arai ejaas nuinera, kobonokinoi, kiner, naarai akoto aitojok joo"
Job33:33 Arai mam, kopupunoi, kililin, eoŋ da kesisianakini jo acoa.”"
Job34:1 Kosodi bobo koboŋok Eliku ebe,"
Job34:2 “Kopuputu akakiro, yes ituŋa lukacoa; kitoikis aki neajai, yes luejai aijen."
Job34:3 Naarai itemi akit akiro, kwape iiriata aanyigol inyamat."
Job34:4 Kaseutu oni nuedolito, kajenutu oni bonik nuejok."
Job34:5 Naarai ener Yob atiar, ‘Arai eoŋ loadolit, ido kadema Edeke akabeit;"
Job34:6 karaida karai lokabeit kanyaritai ekeŋalan, mam akamusunut itanaleun, karaida amamei eoŋ adiakar.’"
Job34:7 Iŋai bo etuŋanan loeputosi ka Yob, loemasi amwanit kwape kakipi?"
Job34:8 loeupenenas kalukeswamak numam adolit, loelosenenei kituna lukaronok."
Job34:9 Naarai ener atiar, ‘Mam ajokis irunanan aisiyalamikin Edeke.’"
Job34:10 “Aso kopupunoi, yes ituŋa luejai aijen: madi Edeke, aswam nueroko; madi Lokapedor kere, aswam numam edolito."
Job34:11 Naarai etacanakini ituŋanan akeswam, itudumikini ŋinituŋanan kwape ejaatar ikerotin."
Job34:12 Eebo, abeit, mam Edeke iswamai aronis, karaida Lokapedor kere aibelokin etube."
Job34:13 Iŋai cabo adakakinit ŋes ayait akwap? Iŋai bo da kititiŋit ŋes akwapisinei kere?
Job34:14 Tikinyakaa eketau, tiketukonoki ekemoyo ka eiyenanake,"
Job34:15 tikeolios kere luejaas awat, eboŋorete bobo ituŋa toma alup."
Job34:16 “Aso arai ijai kaijen, kopup nu: kiira eporoto loka akakiro."
Job34:17 Eyait kereka yenelait adolit? Ikoto atubokin aitelekar loedolit ka loegogoŋ?
Job34:18 Ibus kereka alimokin ekabaka ebe, ‘Isiliana ijo’? Arai bo isotia ebe, ‘Iroko yesi’?"
Job34:19 Ido bo lomam etiakatiakai ikapolok, karaida asesen lukabarak aitelekarit lukican, Naarai eraas kere aswam naka akekanin?"
Job34:20 Etularos kidinebai; ijaŋijaŋio ituŋa kotuboros, elemario lukagogoŋ komamei akan."
Job34:21 “Naarai esesenete akekonye irotin luka ituŋanan, ido eanyuni alositoke kere."
Job34:22 Emamei amuton, karaida etoribe loka atwanare, neepedoriata lukeswamak numam adolit aiŋop."
Job34:23 Naarai mam ipuda ŋesi aiyatakin aomoom nuka ituŋanan, tetere edoli akonyen nuka Edeke atubokinio."
Job34:24 Ebilibili lukagogoŋ komam aiŋit, ido edakakini ice aiboisiokec."
Job34:25 Kanuka ŋun naarai ejeŋi akeceswamisio, ebuburiari kes kuare, tetere emudiaros."
Job34:26 Inomi kes kwape lukaronok, kosesenete ice."
Job34:27 Naarai kopaasi kinyeis atupar nes, koneroto apodokin edio korotinike."
Job34:28 Kanuka ŋun koinakis aimony naka lukican adolokin ŋes, kopup ŋesi aimony naka lureitono."
Job34:29 Arai einakini ŋesi ainapakin, iŋai bo epedori atubokin ŋes aitelekar? Ido arai kibwa akekonyen, iŋai bo epedori aanyun ŋes? Arai ateker, arai ituŋanan, kere eputos:"
Job34:30 kinye etuŋanan lomam ejeŋi Edeke ayait, kinyeis da ajaut luelokete ituŋa,"
Job34:31 “Naarai ejai kereka yeŋalimokinit Edeke atiar, ‘Kalecor, mam bobo adiaki;"
Job34:32 kisisianakinai numam aanyunit, arai eswamat numamadolit, mam bobo eswamai’?"
Job34:33 Kitepeseni kereka ŋesi jo kwape ikotor, naarai iŋerit ŋun? Naarai ibusakinit ijo aseun, konye mere eoŋ; Aso kiner nuijeni."
Job34:34 Ituŋa luejai aijen kalimokinete, Eebo, ŋinituŋanan yenikacoa yenikapupi eoŋ ebala ebe,"
Job34:35 ‘Inera Yob komamei aijen, akekiro da emameete acoa.’"
Job34:36 Arai tope kigimoritete Yob aitodol awasia, naarai eboŋokini kwape ituŋa lukaronok."
Job34:37 Naarai iyatanakini aijerukanut toma aronisike, ibapibapi akekanin kokidinikosi, ido iyatanakini akekiro aitepegia Edeke.”"
Job35:1 Koboŋok bobo Eliku, kobala ebe,"
Job35:2 “Iwomit ijo ebe edolit akirot ŋin? Arai bo ibala ebe, ‘Adoliteka itelekarit naka Edeke,’"
Job35:3 tape ibala ebe, ‘Ajokis anyoin mamakon?’ Bobo ebe, ‘Adumuni ajokis anyoin adepar natikadum arai kadiakarite?’"
Job35:4 ‘Kaboŋokini eoŋ jo, ka lukaupakon da."
Job35:5 Koŋolia akuj, kite; ido koany akuj, nakitelekarit jo kamukurur."
Job35:6 Arai idiakarit, iswamakin anyoika? Aibueanarikon arai iyatanakin, iswamakin anyoika?"
Job35:7 Arai idolit, iinakini inyo? Arai ijaari ŋesi inyo kakanikon?"
Job35:8 Epedori akonironis aisirieb ituŋanan kwape kajo? Adolitekon da epedori aiŋarakin okoku loka etuŋanan.
Job35:9 Emonyete kanuka amwanio naepol noi, iluluete tetere edumunete aiŋarakinio kanuka akan naka ikagogoŋok."
Job35:10 Konye emamei yeninera ebe, ‘Ai bo ejai Edeke Lokasubanika, loeinakini ikososinei kuare,"
Job35:11 lokisisianakini aitelekar itian luka akwap, ido lokiinakini acoa aitelekar akweny nuka apak?’"
Job35:12 Emonyete kaŋina, konye emamei yenebonokini, kanuka aiwoŋonut naka ituŋa lukaronok."
Job35:13 Abeit mam Edeke epupuni aamameak, karaida Lokapedor kere asesen kes."
Job35:14 Aso epupuni biai arai kitema ebe mam ianyunit ŋes? Ejai akirot kakonyeneke, ka jo da idareununei!"
Job35:15 Konye kwape kwana, naarai mam kitieani kakenyunyura, ido mam ibwaikinit noi etau neejai apaar,"
Job35:16 Ŋes keinakini Yob aoonar akeituk einer aamameak; iyatanakini akiro komamei aijen.”
Job36:1 Kosodi Eliku aiyatakin einer ebe:
Job36:2 “Kobwou ber, keteienu; naarai eriŋa ejaas nuakoto einer kanuka Edeke."
Job36:3 Aomi aijeneka kama elwana, ainakini Ekasubanika adolit,"
Job36:4 Naarai abeit akiroka mam eraas nuka aiŋal: etuŋanan loedolit kotoma aijen ejai kajo.
Job36:5 “Koany, Edeke nes Lokapedor, ido mam emenit ituŋanan kere; erai lokapedor kagogoŋ naka ajenun."
Job36:6 Mam idari aijar naka lukaronok, konye einakini luiticanio nukec."
Job36:7 Mam elemari akekonyen kaneejaas ikadolitok, konye ibwaikini kes nepepe ka ikabakan koicoloŋo luka ajakanut ikar kere, kitopolooritete."
Job36:8 Ido arai keeni kirikoi, kikamun da kaunoi nuka aiticanio,"
Job36:9 ŋes konyet itodikinia aswamisiokec ka aibucarikec, ebe iswamatos nukeitur."
Job36:10 Ido epukori akiikec apupun aisisianakinio, icorakini kobonutu anyoun kotoma numam adolit."
Job36:11 Arai kepuput kijaanakis ŋes, edaunete apaarasiakee kotoma akerianut, ikarukec da kotoma kanuisiyalamikinito."
Job36:12 Konye arai mam epupete, emudianario kekilen, etwakete komamei aijen."
Job36:13 “Konye ŋul lumam ejenete Edeke kotauon ibwaete anyunyura, mam iluluete tetere inarakinio arai keeni kes."
Job36:14 Etwakete korina edisiak, emudianari akeceijar kaneejaas lumam elaete."
Job36:15 Eyuuni yenitieanio kanuka aiticanioke, epukori akiikec arai emwanitai,"
Job36:16 Eebo, tikiiiodou kotoma ocan, kitolomik aibois naelal, komamei aridanakinio, ka ŋin yenibwaikinio omesakon tiileleba atarion,"
Job36:17 “Konye ileleba ijo etube loka ikaronok, kikamunete etube ka abeit."
Job36:18 Kocoite kinyek anyunyura aijodoor jo toma asekel, kinyek etiai loepol loka alakunio aitapaar joo"
Job36:19 Kidauni kereka jo akonibara, kinyek aanyun iean? arai bo apedor kere naka akonigogoŋ?"
Job36:20 Sirinobelei akuare, neemudianarotor atekerin kaiboisikec."
Job36:21 Koeoite kinyek aite numam adolit, naarai iseu nun aitelekarit aitieanio."
Job36:22 Koany, itopolooritai Edeke kotoma apedorike, iŋai bo ekesisianakinan loeputos kaŋes?"
Job36:23 Iŋai bo kolo kicorakini ŋes ekerot? Arai bo iŋai epedori einer ebe, ‘Iswama numam adolit’?"
Job36:24 “Kiitu aitopoloorit aswamisioke, nukeyoononoto ituŋa,"
Job36:25 Iteenenete ituŋa kere, iteluonorete ituŋa kama elwana."
Job36:26 Koany, epol Edeke, ido mam oni kijeni ŋes; mam emoun etiai loka ikaruke."
Job36:27 Naarai iriari kuju aitanakineta nuka akipi, nuetepete akiru naebuni kolisinake:"
Job36:28 naebukuni akuj, kiceki naepol otuŋa."
Job36:29 Eebo, ejai kereka yenepedori ajenun idouon naepesikinotor, airetun da nakowemake?"
Job36:30 Koany, epesikini akeica airimor ŋes, ido erapakini ataro naka aŋolol."
Job36:31 Naarai kanuka nun etubi akiro nuka atekerin; ekori inyamat luipu noi.
Job36:32 Erapakini akekanin toma oimilia, icorakini ainom yenitikinom."
Job36:33 Itatamete iporotoikee akekiro, ido elimonokinete ibaren ikwamin lueponito."
Job37:1 “Ido itamarani ŋin ekatau, Edouni etau kaiboisike."
Job37:2 Kopuputu airuruma naka ekeporoto, ka agiro naelomuni kaitukuke."
Job37:3 Ŋukuni kwap kakuj kere, eimiliake da osaŋeta luka akwapin."
Job37:4 Kokauke egirokini eporoto; iretuni keporoto loka apolouke: ido mam itikokini eimiliake naepupunere ekeporoto.
Job37:5 Iretuni Edeke kekeporoto kaumokin, iswamai nuepolok, numam kipedori amisiikin."
Job37:6 Naarai ebala ŋesi akaka ebe, ‘Kodoo akwap’; bobo da elimilim loka akiru kes ilimilimia luka akiruke naepol."
Job37:7 Ipiikini aanyunet akan naka ŋinituŋanan, tetere ejenete ituŋa kere luasubi gesi."
Job37:8 Kosodete itiaŋ koloto toma anopisiakec, iboikinos toma abuaikec."
Job37:9 Toma agola naka eŋalakimak ŋes neebunio ekwam: aaterot da ebuni kagolitomei.
Job37:10 Eiyeŋane loka Edeke ŋes eyauni akipi nueruruwakito, eridakina apesiara naka akipi."
Job37:11 Eebo, ilelebi edou loitolimakinit akipi, epesiari edou loka eimiliake."
Job37:12 Ido ijulujulio kanuka akirotoke, tetere iswamaete kere nuicorakini, kakwapin kere neiboioto ituŋa."
Job37:13 Arai kanuka aikwenyar, arai kanuka akwapuke, arai kanuka aitim, ŋes eyaunia."
Job37:14 “Kiira na, wu Yob; kopala, koomoom aswamisio nukaumokin nuka Edeke."
Job37:15 Ŋeni kereka ijo epone loicorakinia Edeke kes? ka aitacaikini aica naka edouke?
Job37:16 Ŋeni kereka ijo aitirian naka idouon? Aswamisio nukaumokin nuka ŋol kaloedolit kaijen?
Job37:17 Ikonakinete ca ai ikoninapen emwakuunete, naililinia akwap kanuka ekwam loka eŋalakimak?"
Job37:18 Ipedori tope ijo apesikin akuj nepepe kaŋes, naegogoŋ kwape aroet naecaluna?"
Job37:19 Kisisianakinai sio nukinera kaŋes, naarai mam kipedori aisuduny akirokosi kanuka amuton."
Job37:20 Elimokinio kereka nes arai akoto einer? Arai tiekoto etuŋanan ailikorio?
Job37:21 “Mam ituŋa epedorete asesen aica naemwekimweki kokuiu kiton kwana: ketubor ekwam ipiororoi akuj.
Job37:22 Enyouni amwekimwek naesubit bala esabu kagolitomei, enapit Edeke apolou naenosib,"
Job37:23 Lokapedor kere, mam kipedori aŋicun ŋes; Lokapolon ŋes kotoma apedor: elope etube ka adolit naepol mam ŋes ereuni."
Job37:24 Kanuka ŋun eyoŋito ituŋa ŋes; mam ŋes eseseni ŋul lueomitos bonik araut lukacoa.”
Job38:1 Kosodi koboŋok EJAKAIT Yob kotapipirio, kotema atiar:"
Job38:2 “Iŋai ŋin yenitumutoni ainerun kakiro nuemamei aijen?
Job38:3 Aso do koen aŋabet kwape kekiliokit, naarai kenisi jo, ijo da kitejenuni eoŋ."
Job38:4 “Ai bo kijai ijo naapesikinia kolo apeteta nuka akwap? Kitejen, arai ijai kaijen."
Job38:5 Iŋai bo kolo kineruni aitemisioke, arai cani ijeni? Iŋai bo keriori aunoke?"
Job38:6 Mama kinyo itieasitere apetetake? Iŋai bo teni ebwaikini amoru nuka agor,"
Job38:7 naayeoto nepepe aacer nuka atupurue, idwe da luka Edeke kere kikareoto kanuka aiyalama?"
Job38:8 “Iŋai bo do egolokini aŋolol kikirigin? Naalelea bala yenelomuni kakoik;
Job38:9 naeswamakinia idouon araut akenapito, amuton naejesi ŋaŋ eimukosike,"
Job38:10 ido kesilak ŋes eikoruke, kebwaik atiketa ka ikirigin,"
Job38:11 kabala ebe, ‘Idoluni kiton ne, konye mam idepari; nepe ne da itikokinio adakunun naka akonikailan.’"
Job38:12 “Ibu ijo kicorak atupuruc ageun kapaarasiakon? ka aitejenikin Acilakide akeibois?
Job38:13 Tetere ikamuni isaneta luka akwap, ailakilakar ikaronok."
Job38:14 Ilocokinio kwape elupe lokipueakinitai, etakanete kwape inapen:"
Job38:15 isimikio ikaronok akeeeiea, ido ebila akan naitopolooro."
Job38:16 “Ibu tope ijo kolomarite akonyen nuka aŋolol? Arai bo ibu kolosenenei kaidules naka ataro?
Job38:17 Kinaikinitai kereka jo ikirigin luka atwanare? Arai bo ibu koany ikirigin luka etoribe loka atwanare?
Job38:18 Ibu tope ijo kojen alalau naka akwap? Kitejen cani, arai ijeni kere."
Job38:19 “Ai bo ejai erot loebei neiboio aica? Ai bo da ejai aibois naka amuton?
Job38:20 Tetere iyaŋaari ŋes oikoruke, tetere da imisiikini isokono luebeete oreken,"
Job38:21 Iieni ba, naarai aponi kourii apaki ya, ido epo! etiai loka apaarasiakon!"
Job38:22 “Ilomarit kereka ijo aiŋadisia nuka akipi nuerurwakito? Arai bo ianyunit aiŋadisia nuka akako?
Job38:23 Nueŋadakinit apakio nuka ican, ido apakio nuka aremo ka ejie?"
Job38:24 Erot enyoin ketiakere aica, arai bo ekwam lokokide aisiarakinio akwap?"
Job38:25 “Iŋai bo acili aleles naka akalele, arai bo erot loka eimilia ka eires?"
Job38:26 Aitetepikin akiru akwap naemamei ituŋanan; amodiŋ da, naemamei irunanan;"
Job38:27 aisimonikinia alup nuelarion nuesilok, aisibwanunia da amel?"
Job38:28 “Ejai kereka akiru papake? Iŋai bo da aurie aiiseta nuka akopyo?
Job38:29 Akoik naka iŋai alomunia akako? Ido akipi nuidoudouto kanuka aaterot, iŋai bo keurie?"
Job38:30 Erurwakito akip kwape amoru, ikamakina ataro."
Job38:31 “Ipedori kereka ijo ajen erikot loka Pleiades*? Arai bo alacun aeneta nuka Orion*?
Job38:32 Ipedori kereka ijo aitolomun Imasarot* kapakikec? Arai bo ipedori ijo aiŋarenikin Adubu kikedwe?
Job38:33 Ŋeni kereka ijo aicorakineta nuka akuj? Ipedori ijo aiticat ayaiteke kakwap?
Job38:34 “Ipedori kereka ijo aikeseun ekoniporoto kiton odouon, tetere kiraparete akip nukepwak?"
Job38:35 Ipedori kereka ijo aiyaki aimiliaunun, kolosete, kolimokis jo ebe, ‘Kija bo isio’?"
Job38:36 Iŋai bo ebwaikini acoa odouon? Arai bo iŋai ainakini ekipie aijen?
Job38:37 Iŋai bo epedori aimar idouon kanuka acoa? Arai bo iŋai epedori aitulur imukulen luka akipi nuka akuj,"
Job38:38 naiminaikinotor apua agogoŋor, ido iketakinos aapoŋor?"
Job38:39 “Imejaikini kereka ijo aŋatuny imejasit? Arai bo isimonikini eipud loka idwe luka eŋatuny,"
Job38:40 Naidipidipioto kesi kabuaikec, naenasiata kaŋopisia aperun?"
Job38:41 “Iŋai bo edumakini ekuruk ikenyamat, naemonyiata idweke mama ejai Edeke, irimete kanuemamikinitotor inyamat?"
Job39:1 “Ŋeni kereka ijo apak naeuriata akinei nuka ais nukomoru? Iseseni ijo naiwacuniata amiameik?
Job39:2 Ipedori kereka ijo aimar ilapio luedaunete kesi? Arai bo ijeni ijo apak naeuriata?
Job39:3 Ekukumete, euriete ikecedwe, ecakarete aitururukec."
Job39:4 Etumete idwekec, epolokinete ais; enyounete, komam eboŋunete bobo."
Job39:5 “Iŋai bo kisilapadai etuko? Arai bo iŋai kelacakini aeneta nuka etuko?
Job39:6 Abu keswamak eketogo amodiŋ, akwap naka abalaŋ da akeibois."
Job39:7 Emwaŋit ŋesi ecelet lokore, kwabo mam iirari eporoto loka ekameeton."
Job39:8 Alalau naka ironan ŋes eronyike, Emoot ŋinibore kere yenelibuni."
Job39:9 “Ecamuni tope ekosobwan aijaanakin jo? Arai bo aiboienen kaujokon?
Job39:10 Ipedori kereka ajen ekosobwan kaenetake kotoma aloboi? Arai bo ekoriei aditon kokaukon?
Job39:11 Imunonena kereka ijo ŋes, naarai epol akegogoŋ? Arai bo inyeanakinia ŋes aitaaritoikon?"
Job39:12 Imunonena kereka ijo ŋes, ainyakun ikinyomokon ore, Atukonokin da alos kopejalikon?"
Job39:13 “Abebenoka nuka ekuulu iyalamasi; Konye bo abebenokake ka akuuluike esiaka?
Job39:14 Naarai inyeini abeeike kalup, kosodi aitwamanaun kapua,"
Job39:15 Kosodi aimurwokin ebe epedori akeju abulubul, arai etiaŋ loka ais epedori aicakacak."
Job39:16 Ededenikini idweke bala lumere luke; karaida kitaaritoi atai, mam ekurianar;"
Job39:17 naarai abu Edeke kolema nes acoa, kwabo mam koinak ajenun."
Job39:18 Naedakununor akerit, emwani ebalasit ka ekebwanenonike."
Job39:19 “Ibu ca ijo koinak ebalasit akegogoŋ? Ibu kitanap ŋes esigigirike loejaŋijaŋi?
Job39:20 Ibu ca ijo koinak ŋes adesitoi kwape kemaase? Aruoke nakanosibib erai naketasuro.
Job39:21 Ekuri toma aditot, isiyalamikinit akegogoŋ: elomari airiamun kituna luekapito lujiis,"
Job39:22 Ekienar akurian, mam eburuni; kwabo mam eboŋori kau kaneejai ekileŋ."
Job39:23 Eruosi imalia wokowok kaneejai ŋesi, akwara naemwekimweki ka ebuku."
Job39:24 Ilikori alup kadeden ka anyunyura; mam ecamuni abwoun kepupu arupepe.
Job39:25 Ŋinipak naeruor arupepe, ebala ebe, ‘Eee!’ Iŋuuni ejie kama elwana, airetun naka ikayaitok ka ecelet."
Job39:26 “Acoakon ŋes kereka epororia ekokom kuju noi, eterari abebenokake aibwot ari naka eŋalakimak?"
Job39:27 Edokari kereka emorukaalet kaicorakinetekon, koduk akaike kuju?"
Job39:28 Iboie kamor, eketogo da ejai nepenen, adoketa nuka emoru, kaibois naegogoŋ,"
Job39:29 Kanen irerei imejan: egiparete akekonye kaneelwana.
Job39:30 Ŋujuete ikedwe aokot: ido neejaas luearitai, nepenen da ejai ŋesi.”"
Job40:1 Kosodi bobo koboŋok EJAKAIT Yob kobala ebe,"
Job40:2 “Itepegi kereka loiulana Lokapedor kere? Loitonolopi Edeke, koboŋok ŋesi,”"
Job40:3 Kosodi Yob aboŋokin EJAKAIT, kobala ebe,"
Job40:4 “Koany, mam eoŋ arai ibore; kabonokini anu? Abun akaituk."
Job40:5 Ener irwan atipet, mam aboŋokini; eebo, irwan aarei, konye mam bobo eyatakini.”"
Job40:6 Kosodi koboŋok EJAKAIT Yob kotapipirio, kobala ebe,"
Job40:7 “Koen do aŋabetekon kwape kekiliokit: kenisi, ijo da koboŋok,"
Job40:8 Iloeokini kereka ijo etubeka loatubit? Itetelekari kereka ijo eoŋ akirot, tetere iraun loedolit?"
Job40:9 Arai ca ijaas kakan naka Edeke? Ido ipedori tope airetun keporoto Ioeputos kaloken?
Job40:10 “Konap cani ijo ajokis ka ayoŋit; kisiri aibuses ka apolou,"
Job40:11 Kobuko nuilapanaros nuka anyunyurakon; kosesen ŋinituŋanan yeniturokina, kitisil."
Job40:12 Kosesen ŋinituŋanan yeniturokina, kijesa; kicakaeak ikaronok kaneebwoiata."
Job40:13 Kitonop kes nepepe kotoma alup; koen akonyenekec kaibois naibwaitai.
Job40:14 Kasodi eoŋ da alimori jo ebe, epedori akanikon nakoteten aitajar joo"
Job40:15 “Koany do emiria loasubuni nepepe kajo; enyami inya kwape kemon.
Job40:16 Koany do, ejai akepedor toma aŋabetekeŋ, ido akegogoŋ toma akiriŋ naka akoikike."
Job40:17 Ekosi ekorike kwape eres, imorikikina aputio nuka amurwosike."
Job40:18 Eputosi akekojo kwape ipiin luka aisinir; akejeke da kwape atiketa nuka asua.
Job40:19 “Epol korotin luka Edeke: Ŋes elopet lokesubi epedori aisukunyikin ekekileŋ.
Job40:20 Abeit itolomunete ironan ikenyamat, neeboliananatar itian kere luka ais."
Job40:21 Eperi ŋesi kwap kikito luketolim, kanopis naka esege ka erit."
Job40:22 Ikito luketolim imukorete ŋes kitolimokec. Kirimorito ikito lukaguurut.
Job40:23 Koany, arai ilapanari ecor, mam emarani: icasi, karaida kiboru Yorodan kiton aitukuke."
Job40:24 Epedori bo ituŋanan aikamun ŋes naenoliaria, arai kieum ekumeke kedobo?"
Job41:1 “Ipedori kereka ijo amun akinyan kegolu? arai bo aridakin anaiepeke kauno?
Job41:2 Ipedori tope aridakin auno okumeke? Arai bo aicum abokonyoke kemutu?
Job41:3 Kimaimai kereka ŋesi jo nuipu? Arai bo kilimokini ŋesi jo nuepataka?
Job41:4 Itutukete kereka ŋesi kajo aitutuket, tetere iyanaari nes araut ebulesit apaarasia kere?"
Job41:5 Iboliasi kereka ijo kaŋes kwape iboliatar kikweny? Arai bo aenikin ŋes akonipesur?
Job41:6 Egwelarete kereka ikodeta luka ikalokak ŋes? Ekoranakinete tope ikagwelanarak?
Job41:7 Ipedori kereka aileleb emukuleke kasua nuejaas igoluna? Arai bo akouke kimaearin?
Job41:8 Kidokok ŋes akonikan; kiitu ejie ŋol, kinye aiyatakin aswam kwaŋin."
Job41:9 Koany, amunoke atai: nakeanyunia ituŋanan ŋes mam kereka ibirori?"
Job41:10 Emamei ekadedenan loetitinikini atwarun ŋes: aso ai bo ejai yenepedori aibwo kakonyeneka?
Job41:11 Iŋai bo gwai keesiauni aijaikin ibore, katacak eoŋ ŋes? Kere lueiaas kwap kakuj eraas lukan."
Job41:12 “Mam eoŋ enyeini alimor aketutubeta, karaida agogoŋuke naepol, karaida asubuneteke naejok."
Job41:13 Iŋai bo epedori alaear inapeneke lukokuju? Iŋai bo da edoliori toma arukanasiake aarei?
Job41:14 Iŋai bo da epedori aŋaar ikirigin luka akonyeneke? Irimorit etasuro ikekel.
Job41:15 Aabeleke nuegogoŋ ŋes eiturike, nuimorikikina kwape aanyunet naipueue."
Job41:16 Idunyanara noi, mam epedori ekwam aitor kokidinikec."
Job41:17 Inieakina; iminaikina, komam epedorete atiak."
Job41:18 Eikaresoneke isimwekimweki aica, akonyeneke da eputosi abukio nuka atupuruc."
Job41:19 Elomununete akalasia nuenokete kaitukuke, eporonunete atwenyitweny nuka akim."
Job41:20 Elomuni apuru kokumesike, kwape kamot naekulai ka aladoi nuieweio."
Job41:21 Isinepuni eiyeŋaneke atotol, ido elomununei akim kaitukuke."
Job41:22 Iboie agogoŋ komurisinike, ikosie etasuro kakonyeneke."
Job41:23 Inicakina aolokony nuka akirinike: imakakina; mam epedorete alemario.
Job41:24 Egogoŋ eketau kwape amoru, eebo, egogoŋ kwape kakukuse."
Job41:25 Naenyounio ekuriakaros ikagogoŋok: ikerepikinete kanuka aburun.
Job41:26 Arai kieumi kekilen, mam epedori ibore, karaida akwara, karaida emaear, karaida emal loeit."
Job41:27 Itaraunit asua bala ariaŋ, aisinit da bala akito nuebosito."
Job41:28 Mam epedori ekojo aiteker ŋes: alica da nueporoeio eraunos ariaŋ kamaken,"
Job41:29 Itaraunio ibotei bala ariaŋ: ekienar agumar naka eliru.
Job41:30 Atutubetake nukokwap eputosi katiboloka nuekwaka: aootoke korit esubit bala agali nakicomis.
Job41:31 Itukulauni ataro kwape kamot: ituputori aŋolol akinyet.
Job41:32 Itacauni ekerot kokauke; tiaomitai ataro araut akako.
Job41:33 Emamei yeneputosi kaŋes kakwap, yenesubitai komam akurian."
Job41:34 Eseseni ninibore yenejai kuju: ŋes ekabaka loka idwe kere luka eitur.”
Job42:1 Kosodi koboŋok Yob EJAKAIT ebe,"
Job42:2 “Ajeni ebe ipedori ijo kere, ido emamei akirot nainerunit naepedori aitikokinio."
Job42:3 Iŋai bo lo loimunoni ainerun komamei aijen? Ŋes alimunio mm numam aienunit, akiro nukaumokin nukadeparito, numam ajeni."
Job42:4 Keŋaiŋait, kiira, kener eoŋ da: keŋit, koboŋok."
Job42:5 Abu kapupunite ijo kapupun naka akit; konye kwana kaany kakakonu,"
Job42:6 Ŋes kaupiata, ketoronikin kotoma apua ka ekurwon.”"
Job42:7 Kosodi nakedaunia EJAKAIT atemar Yob akiro ŋun, kotema EJAKAIT Elipas Etemanit atiar, “Enepu akanyunyura aluikin jo, ka ipaperokon luarei: naarai mam ineritos akirot naibeeokino mamakan, kwape enerar ekabulesit Yob."
Job42:8 Aso do, kolemutu imoŋin ikanykaarei ka imerekekin ikanykaarei, koloto neejai ekabulesit Yob, koinakis ainakineta nuieweio; kilipakini yes ekabulesit Yob; naarai ŋol ŋes acamunit, kenyek aiswamakin yes kwape ejaar akusibanaanut; naarai mam ineritos akirot naibeeokino mamakaŋ, kwape enerar ekabulesit Yob.”"
Job42:9 Kosodi Elipas Etemanit, ka Bilidad Esukit, ka Sopar Enaamatit koloto, kiswamata kwape kicorakinia EJAKAIT: kosodi EJAKAIT aeamun Yob."
Job42:10 Kibelok EJAKAIT anatario naka Yob, naelipakinia ipaperoke: koinak EJAKAIT Yob irwan aarei adepar nul luaiaatar nasodit."
Job42:11 Kosodete kopotu ikeinaean kere mama ejai, ka akeinaean kere, ka nul kere lukejenete nes sek lukenyamenenete atap kaŋes kotogoke: komonyata, kitalakasi ŋes kotoma aronis kere nakebu EJAKAIT koinu ŋes: ido koinak ŋinituŋanan ŋes atutubet naka epuesa, ka ŋinituŋanan egilut loka esabu."
Job42:12 Kwaŋin kisireren EJAKAIT awasia naka Yob adepar ageuneteke: kojaunos kamererekekin alukumin atomon kaonon, ka akaalai alukumin akanykape, ka ajookon alukumit nuka imoŋin iareiarei ka asigirian alukumit."
Job42:13 Ido kojaas kidwe lutelepai ikanykaarei ka lupesur iuni.
Job42:14 Nasodit komaik ekekiror Yemima; ekiror da loka nakiareit Kesia; ekiror da loka nakiwuniet, Keren-kapuk."
Job42:15 Kotoma akwap kere amameete apesur nuajokuka aitelekar adwe nuka Yob: koinak papakec airumet kama kiinacanakec.
Job42:16 Kokau kanun kobut Yob ikar akwatat ka akaisaoŋon, koany odweke, ka odwe luka odweke, kiton aturio aoŋon."
Job42:17 Kotwana do Yob, emojonit cut, edaunit apaarasia nuipu."
Psalms1:1 Isirereŋitoi ituŋanan yenimam elosenenei kotoma ainerun naka ikaronok, Karaida abwoenen korot loka ikadiakanarak; Karaida aiboienen koicoloŋ loka ikamenak."
Psalms1:2 Konye akelakanar ejai toma okisil loka EJAKAIT; Okisilike da eomoomaa paaran ka kuare da.
Psalms1:3 Eputoori da ekitoi loiraikinitai ariri naka aleles naka akipi; Loeraenenei akeraito kedol apak, Akekiot da mam erinyori; Ikemeri kanuiswamaenenei kere."
Psalms1:4 Mam ikote nen kama kalukaronok; Konye esubito bala agugu nuituari ekwam.
Psalms1:5 Ŋes mam epedoriata ikaronok aibwo kotoma atubokinio; Karaida ikadiakanarak katukot naka ikadolitok.
Psalms1:6 Naarai ejeni EJAKAIT erot loka ikadolitok: Konye etwaniari rwaru erot loka ikaronok.
Psalms2:1 Kanukinyo enyunyuratatar atekerin, Kanukinyo da itetemonoriata ituŋa aamameak kotauonokec?"
Psalms2:2 Etemonokinos ikabakan luka akwapin, Enerut ikayaitok da nepepe, Asurokin EJAKAIT ka Kristoke atiar,"
Psalms2:3 Kaiŋedeŋedata ikecerikoi, Kacakasi da aunoikec.”"
Psalms2:4 Ekienie ŋol loiboie kotoma akuj; Isekelei kes EJAKAIT.
Psalms2:5 Kosodi isiejanakini kes; Iticani kes kakeisiop naepol,"
Psalms2:6 Ebe, “Konye ebwaik Ekakabaka Koukotoka lokalaunan loka Sion.”"
Psalms2:7 Alimokini nuka ekisil: Abu EJAKAIT katema eoŋ atiar, “uoŋ Okokuka; Lolo kauru jo"
Psalms2:8 Kilipai, kainakini atekerin aluor akoniirumet, Isaiŋeta da luka akwap aluor lukon."
Psalms2:9 Ibili kes kebela loka asuat; Ibwaŋabwaŋai kes cut bala amot naka ekajean.”
Psalms2:10 Aso do kocoutu, yes ikabakan: Kituutooros, yes ikatubok luka akwapin."
Psalms2:11 Kijaanakis BJAKAIT kayoŋit; Kiyalamikinos kamaran.
Psalms2:12 Konuata Okoku, kinyek anyunyurikin, kosodete yesi aolior! korot, Naarai isunyari akenyunyura ainepun. Isirereŋitoi kere luemunos ŋes."
Psalms3:1 EJAKAIT, eyatakinos cama noi lukasurupoka! Ipu lukanyoikis."
Psalms3:2 Ipu luetemarete etauka atiar, Mam Edeke itajari ŋes."
Psalms3:3 Konye ijoŋ, wu EJAKAIT, irai ebukuka; Akaibuses, eketonyounon da loka akouka."
Psalms3:4 Eworoi kekaporoto mama ejai EJAKAIT; Kaboŋokini ŋesi eoŋ koukotoke lokalaunan.
Psalms3:5 Abu eoŋ kaper kajotoor; Kakweny; naarai EJAKAIT keganit.
Psalms3:6 Mam akurianar ilukumin itomon luka ituŋa, Luederakinos airigaun asurokin eoŋ."
Psalms3:7 Konyou, wu EJAKAIT; kitajarai, wu Ekadeke: Naarai inaŋanaŋ ijo lukasurupoka kere amateŋen; Ibilana ijo ikela luka ikaronok."
Psalms3:8 Erai aitajar naka EJAKAIT: Kojai akonisuliany mama ejaas ikonituŋa.
Psalms4:1 Koboŋokinoi nakeworoo, wu Edeke loka adoliteka; Ibu kocilak eoŋ apak naajar ocan: Kitimoi, kiira akailip."
Psalms4:2 Okwe, yes isap luka ituŋa, itodolete ai aijulanakin akaibuses toma oleic? Itodolete ai amin aamameak ka aibwapit aiŋalanut?"
Psalms4:3 Konye kojenutu ebe abu EJAKAIT elopet kotiaka yeneyoŋit ŋes: Epupuni EJAKAIT naeworoo eoŋ ŋes.
Psalms4:4 Kobwoete koyonito, sirikidiakasi: Koomoomata kotauonokus kaperitokus, kopalarito."
Psalms4:5 Koinakisi asuban nuka adolit, Komunosi da EJAKAIT."
Psalms4:6 Ejaas luipu luineras atiar, “Iŋai bo kitodikini oni ajokis? EJAKAIT, kitonyoikinoi sio aica naka akonyenekon.”"
Psalms4:7 Ibu kibwaik aiyalama otauka, Adepar naiyatakinotor akimakec ka ebinokec."
Psalms4:8 Kaper kajotoor enapakina: Naarai ijo bon, EJAKAIT, kisiboikini eoŋ kainapakina."
Psalms5:1 Kitoik akit akakiro, wu EJAKAIT, Kibwaik etau toma aomoomoka."
Psalms5:2 Kopupok eporoto loka akaiwonet, Ekakabaka ka Ekadeke da; Naarai kelipit jo."
Psalms5:3 Wu EJAKAIT, ipupununei ekaporoto tupuruc; Etemonokini akailip tupuruc mama ijai, kedarite."
Psalms5:4 Naarai mam irai Edeke loisiyalamikinit nukaronok; Mam aronis iboie kamakon.
Psalms5:5 Mam luiwoŋoko ebwoete kakonyenekon; Ilait kere luiswamaete numam edolito.
Psalms5:6 Imudiari luineras nukaiŋal: Elait EJAKAIT ikaaran ka ikamodan.
Psalms5:7 Konye kanukaŋ, toma ailiil naka akonisianut-nakamin alomari togokon: Kotoma ayoŋit jo ŋes amaia kaseseni eyekalukon lokalaunan."
Psalms5:8 Kiŋarenikinoi, wu EJAKAIT, kotoma adolitekon, kanuka lukasurupoka; Kisideleleu erotokon kakonyeneka."
Psalms5:9 Naarai emamei amunonut kaitukekec; Atutubetakec nukotoma eraas nukaronok cut: Elogorotokec ŋes ailit naeŋaara; Ijodijodete kaŋajepakec.
Psalms5:10 Komudia kes, wu Edeke; Kibiroros kanuka akeceinerun kikulepek: Koremo toma aipues naka apaarikec; Naarai kipaliikis jo."
Psalms5:11 Konye kolakaros kere luemunos jo, Kibwoŋata kanuka aiyalama apaarasia kere, naarai iiikinit ijo kes: Ido kiyalamasi lueminas ekonikiror kotomakon,"
