Psalms5:12 Naarai isirereni ijo ikadoliton; Wu EJAKAIT, irigauni ŋes kasianut kwape kebuku."
Psalms6:1 Wu EJAKAIT, sirikiitoron eoŋ kanyunyurakon, Karaida alecor kotoma akadakinikon naepol."
Psalms6:2 Kitimoi eoŋ, wu EJAKAIT, naarai arinyo eoŋ cut: Wu EJAKAIT, kitanaleunoi; naarai eyaloŋoŋoto akakojo."
Psalms6:3 Eyaloŋoŋo da noi akaijar: Konye jo, wu EJAKAIT, itodoli bo ai?"
Psalms6:4 Koboŋ, WU EJAKAIT, koyu akaijar: Kitaiarai kanuka akonisianut-nakamin,"
Psalms6:5 Naarai emamei akiitun jo kotoma atwanare: Iŋai bo kimalai jo kotoma Okatwak?
Psalms6:6 Ketapas ekaidiny: ŋinikuare etapapalenenei ekajam; Eleleete akiyoka oitadaka.
Psalms6:7 Aoniki akakoŋu kanuka aimony; Awariwar kanuka lukasurupoka kere.
Psalms6:8 Irwa do kamakaŋ, yes kere luiswamaete numam edolito; Naarai eira EJAKAIT eporoto loka aimonyoka."
Psalms6:9 Eira EJAKAIT akaiŋaiŋa; Ecamuni EJAKAIT akailip.
Psalms6:10 Irumete ileic lukasurupoka kere, Iyaloŋoŋoete da noi: Eboŋorete, isunyarete ileice airum."
Psalms7:1 Wu EJAKAIT, Ekadeke, kamuno jo: Kitajarai kama ejaas ŋul lukarukitotor, koyuunai."
Psalms7:2 Kinyek apoopo akaijar kwape keŋatuny, Anyilinyil ŋes, komamei yenikayuuni."
Psalms7:3 Wu EJAKAIT, Ekadeke, arai eswamat na; Arai ejaas numam edolito akaninika;"
Psalms7:4 Arai ekwaikinit erono ŋin yenikinapapai keoŋ, (Eebo, ayu ŋin yeniketokokolit eoŋ atitai:)"
Psalms7:5 Korukio lokasurup akaijar, kodolok; Eebo, kipudapud akaijar kokwap, Kiperik akaibuses toma apua."
Psalms7:6 Konyou, wu EJAKAIT, kotoma anyunyurakon, Kodakun asurokin adedeŋ naka lukasurupoka: Kokweny kanukaŋ; icorak ijo etube."
Psalms7:7 Kirimo ijo atukot naka ituŋa: Kodok kes koboŋoria toma akuj,"
Psalms7:8 Uaikini EJAKAIT etube otuŋa: Kotubokinai wu EJAKAIT, kwape ejaar akadolit, Ka abeit da naejai tomakaŋ,"
Psalms7:9 Konaŋ ca do aronis naka ikaronok, konye kiticat ijo ikadolitok: Naarai itemi Edeke lokadoliton itauon ka iŋeretenya."
Psalms7:10 Ekabuku ejai ka Edeke, Loitajari luejaas itauon luitenara."
Psalms7:11 Edeke ŋes ekatubon lokadoliton; Eebo, ŋes Edeke loisiopit ŋinipaaran."
Psalms7:12 Arai mam ituŋanan ibelokin, ipeni Edeke ekekileŋ; Eketaki akekabwa, alok da."
Psalms7:13 Etemonoki da ŋesi iboro lukaarak; Itasarani ikemalia.
Psalms7:14 Koany, erieba ikaronon aidoun numam edolito; Eebo, apotuu ameŋeranut, edou da aiŋalanut."
Psalms7:15 Abu kigir aipany, kobok da, Ebirokin elopet toma acukulet naaboki."
Psalms7:16 Eboŋokini akemeneranut akouke kelopet, Eboŋokini da akededeŋ osiadukuke."
Psalms7:17 Emalai EJAKAIT kwape ejaar akedolit: Ayei aiturit ekiror loka EJAKAIT Loejai kuju kakuj.
Psalms8:1 Wu EJAKAIT, EkosiJAKAIT, Ejok ca ma noi ekonikiror kakwapisinei kere! Lokibwaikini aibusesukon kuju kakuj."
Psalms8:2 Ibu kiticat agogoŋ kaituke nuka imukerun ka idwe luenakete, Kanuka lukasurupokon, Tetere itapalaari yenikasurup ka ikenyaŋan,"
Psalms8:3 Naasesenia eoŋ akonikuj, aswam naka ikonibokoro, Elap ka aacer nukibwaikini ijo;"
Psalms8:4 Inyo bo ituŋanan, tape jo ipodo ŋes? Okoku loka ituŋanan da, tape jo ianyanari ŋes?"
Psalms8:5 Naarai ibu kosub ŋes nepetai arianakin ka Edeke, Itanapit ŋes aboko naka aibuses ka ayoŋio."
Psalms8:6 Isurumit ŋes aswamisio nuka akaninikon; Ibwaikinit iboro kere kwap kakejeneke:
Psalms8:7 Amerekekin kere ka imoŋin, Eebo, ka itiaŋ da luka ais;"
Psalms8:8 Akweny nuka apak, iboro da luka ecor, Kere luitoritos orotin luka aŋololin."
Psalms8:9 Wu EJAKAIT, EkosiJAKAIT, Ejok ca ma noi ekonikiror kakwapisinei kere!"
Psalms9:1 Emalaenenei EJAKAIT kekatau kere; Etodianari aswamisiokon kere nukaumokin.
Psalms9:2 Eyalamanakin, alakanar kotomakon; Ayeenenei aiturit ekonikiror, wu Jo Loijai kuju kakuj."
Psalms9:3 Naeboŋoriata lukasurupoka kau, Iguikinos, emudiaros kakonyenekon."
Psalms9:4 Naarai ibu ijo kitodolo akabeit ka akiroka; Ibu kiboikin oicoloŋ aitub kadolit.
Psalms9:5 Ibu kitoron atekerin, komudia ikaronok, Komwata ikiroriakec ikar kere."
Psalms9:6 Adaunos lukasurupo, asilikis ikar kere; Ireria da lukiweliweli, Amudiar aiitunetekec mudic."
Psalms9:7 Konye iboienenei EJAKAIT erai ekabaka ikar kere: Etemonoki eicoloŋoke atubokinia.
Psalms9:8 Etubokini akwapisinei kere kadolit, Einakini ituŋa etube kotoma abeit."
Psalms9:9 Eraun EJAKAIT aŋopis naka luereitai, Eebo, aŋopis kapakio nuka ationis:"
Psalms9:10 ŋul da luejenete ekonikiror kimunonenos; Naarai ijo, EJAKAIT, mam ijalakinit ŋul lukimoete."
Psalms9:11 Koyeoto aiturit EJAKAIT, loiboie koSion; Kolimonokis ituŋa akeswamisinei."
Psalms9:12 Naarai ŋol loiburai aokot iituni kes: Mam imurwokini aimony naka lukibakor.
Psalms9:13 Kitimoi, wu EJAKAIT; Koany aiticanitoika naketaanyut lukalaito, Ijo lokitonyouni eoŋ korutei luka atwanare;"
Psalms9:14 Tetere etodiari aituriokon kere: Korutei luka akoku naka Sion, Ebwoŋenena kotoma aitajarakon,"
Psalms9:15 Ebirokinos atekerin toma aipany nakebokete: Epok akecekeju kikulepek kotoma atacit nakelokete.
Psalms9:16 Etejenun EJAKAIT elopet, adau etube: Epok yenikaronon kotoma aswam naka akaninike kilopet."
Psalms9:17 Eboŋorete ikaronok Okatwak, Kes atekerin kere nuemurwokis Edeke."
Psalms9:18 Naarai mam luilwaritos imurwokinio apaarasia kere, Karaida amun naka luitasonos mam eoliori ikar kere."
Psalms9:19 Konyou, wu EJAKAIT, kinyek ituŋanan aipikor: Kotubokinai atekerin kakonyenekon."
Psalms9:20 Kitukurian kes, wu EJAKAIT: Kojenut atekerin ebe eraas ituŋa atai!"
Psalms10:1 Kanukinyo ibwasitor, wu EJAKAIT? Kanukinyo iŋopenenaa kapakio nuka ationis?"
Psalms10:2 Idopeo yenikican kotoma aiwoŋonut naka ikaronok; Kikamunai kes kobotei lukebilete.
Psalms10:3 Naarai ituro ikaronon kanuka aiŋobel nakotauke, Yenikebit da eŋerit, eebo, elait ŋesi EJAKAIT,"
Psalms10:4 Ebala ikaronon kotoma aiwoŋonutuke ebe, “Mam itepeseni.” Ebalas akeomisio kere ebe, “Emamei Edeke.”"
Psalms10:5 Eninik ikerotin apaarasia kere; Itubesiakon iyedara kuju noi kakonyeneke: Ido imuanari lukasurupoke kere,"
Psalms10:6 Ebala kotauke ebe, “Mam eriaŋiriaŋa; Mam aanyuni ican aitodol aturio kere.”"
Psalms10:7 Ileleba aitukuke elamit ka aimod ka areit; Kwap kaŋajepeke ejai ameŋeranut ka numam adolit.
Psalms10:8 Iboikin aiboisio nuperunet koronyia: Eari yenemamei aronis kaiboisio nuka aiyeiyea. Imwarakinit yenikalany akekonyen.
Psalms10:9 Eŋopi kaperunet kwape keŋatuny kotoma abuake: Idasi aikamun yenikican; Ikamuni yenikican, ibwosuni koboike."
Psalms10:10 Ekukumi, elolot, Ibirorete ikekagogoŋok lukalanyak."
Psalms10:11 Ebala kotauke ebe, “Emurwoki Edeke: Ebwa akekonyen; mam eanyununei.”"
Psalms10:12 Konyou, wu EJAKAIT; Wu Edeke, kodak akonikan: Sirikiimurwok yenikibakor."
Psalms10:13 Kanukinyo emenitor ikaronon Edeke, Atemar kotauke ebe, “Mam itepeseni”?"
Psalms10:14 Ibu koany; naarai iseseni ameŋeranut ka aidupor, aibwaikin akanikon: Eluŋakina ikalany mama ijail: Ibu koraun ekeŋarakinan loka ikokiok."
Psalms10:15 Kobil akan naka ikaronon: Ituŋanan yenikaronis da, komo ijo akeronis aitodol neemamuunor."
Psalms10:16 EJAKAIT ŋes Ekabaka loka ikar kere: Amudiaros atekerin kotoma akwapuke.
Psalms10:17 EJAKAIT, ibu kiira eipud loka luitasonos: Itemonokini itauonokec, isiirari akonikit:"
Psalms10:18 Airabakin ikokiok ka luemwaŋitai, Kinyek ituŋanan yenelomuni kalup ajaut kanuitukurianete."
Psalms11:1 EJAKAIT ŋes loamuno eoŋ; Ikote ibalasi ai ekatau atiar, “Koker oroŋatakus kwape kakweny”?"
Psalms11:2 Naarai koany, ikesete lukaronok akabwa, Itemonokinete ekojokec, Agumia kamuton luitenara itauon."
Psalms11:3 Arai emudiario apeteta, Ikwaikini ai ikadoliton?"
Psalms11:4 Ejai EJAKAIT oyekaluke lokalaunan, EJAKAIT, ejai ekeicoloŋ toma akuj; Esesenete akekonye idwe luka ituŋa, itemete akebukio kes."
Psalms11:5 Itemi EJAKAIT ikadoliton; Konye elait eketau ikaronon ka ŋin yenekot nukagogoŋ.
Psalms11:6 Isitepi atacin mama ejaas lukaronok; Akim, ka acukuman ka ikwamin luepeonorete eraananas akoretait naka akolikec,"
Psalms11:7 Naarai edolit EJAKAIT; ekot adolit; Eanyunete luitenara itauon akekonyen.
Psalms12:1 EJAKAIT, kiŋarak; naarai asaŋ yeneyoŋit Edeke; Naarai eŋoŋaros luiyuunito kodwe luka ituŋa,"
Psalms12:2 Inerasi aamameak ŋinituŋanan kiidunyeteke; Ŋodoete inerasi kitauon iarei.
Psalms12:3 Etubori EJAKAIT aituke kere nuijodoete, Aŋajep da nainera akiro nuepolok;"
Psalms12:4 Luenerata atiar, “Kipikori kaŋajepewok; Aitukewok kes nuwok; iŋai bo kiyait oni?”"
Psalms12:5 Kanuka aŋatario naka lukibakor, kanuka eidiny da loka luiyarorotos, Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Natikwana anyouni, Esinapikini ŋin yenimuarete.”"
Psalms12:6 Akiro nuka EJAKAIT eraas akiro nuesegara: Kwape itemere epuesa koupa kotoma akwap, Itesegaario aatenak akanykaarei."
Psalms12:7 Idarenenei kes, wu EJAKAIT, Iiyari kes katur kana apaarasia kere."
Psalms12:8 Ikaikinos ikaronok alosit iŋoliwai, Naitopoloorere asilianut kodwe luka ituŋa."
Psalms13:1 Itodoli ai, wu EJAKAIT, aimurwonokin eoŋ ikar kere? Itodoli ai aisiŋopikinit eoŋ akonikonyen?"
Psalms13:2 Etodoli ai ainerunun kotauka, Kaitururwenen kotauka aitiwar akwap? Itodoli ai lokasurupika aitopoloonorio kamakaŋ?"
Psalms13:3 Koomoom Koboŋok, wu EJAKAIT, Ekadeke: Kitacau akakonyen kenyek ajotoor ajo nuka atwanare;"
Psalms13:4 Kinyek lokasurupika atemar atiar, “Epiko ŋes”; Kinyeis lukekoloka eibwoŋ naeriaŋiriaŋar eoŋ."
Psalms13:5 Konye amuno akoniitim: Ibwoŋa ekatau kotoma aitajarakon.
Psalms13:6 Ayoonokinenei EJAKAIT, Naarai kekonaki nukajokak."
Psalms14:1 Atema yenibaŋ kotauke atiar, “Emamei Edeke.” Abosa kesi, eswamata nukasilianut; Emamei yeniswamai nuejok."
Psalms14:2 Abu EJAKAIT kosesen kokuju idwe luka ituŋa kokwap, Aanyun arai cani ejaas luejenete, Luemoete da Edeke."
Psalms14:3 Apaasi kere; emodumodunos; Emamei yeniswamai nuejok, emamei imodio da."
Psalms14:4 Emamei kereka luiswamaete numam adolit kere aijen? Luenyamete ikatuŋa kwape enyamiata atap, Komam iwoneto EJAKAIT."
Psalms14:5 Akuriaka noi kaŋina; Naarai ejai Edeke katur naka luedolito,"
Psalms14:6 Itisilete ainerun naka lukican, Naarai EJAKAIT ŋes neekerianarake."
Psalms14:7 Okwe, arai kolom aitajar naka Isirael koSion! Nainyakunia EJAKAIT iketuŋa luaŋataritai, Ti Yakob kibwoŋ, kiyalamikin Isirael."
Psalms15:1 EJAKAIT, iŋai bo iboienenei kowemakon? Iŋai bo iboienenei koukotokon lokalaunan?"
Psalms15:2 ŋin yenelosenenei itenara, kiswamai nuedolito, Kinera da nuka abeit kotauke."
Psalms15:3 Yenimam akeŋajep esabanakinenei, Karaida aikwaikin erono ikepapero, Komam eeamunit ikeidunyet asiomio."
Psalms15:4 Yenemenito akekonye ikaronon, Konye itubusikinit kes lueyonito EJAKAIT. Naiyapoo, mam ibelokin, karaida ketwania."
Psalms15:5 Ŋin yenimam eyuuni kanuka aimedaun, Kwabo mam eropio kanuka aitetelekar akiro yenimam akirot. Ŋin yeniswamai ŋun, mam iriaŋiriaŋenena."
Psalms16:1 Kidarai, wu Edeke; naarai kamuno jo"
Psalms16:2 Atema eoŋ EJAKAIT atiar, “ljoŋo EJAKAITika: Emamei eoŋ ajokis dimarai mamakon.”"
Psalms16:3 Lukalaunak luejaas kakwap, Eraas kesi luejok noi, tomakec ŋes ejai akaiyalama kere."
Psalms16:4 Itupuo ican luka ŋul kaluisiecarete EJAKAIT itia edeke ece, Mam ainakini asubanakec numatan nuka aokot, Kwabo mam alimuni ikecekiroria kakaituk."
Psalms16:5 EJAKAIT ŋes akorakinet naka akairumet ka naka akakoli da; Idari ijo ŋun nukabeikinete.
Psalms16:6 Kebirokinos eoŋ aunoi kaiboisio nuketalakarak; Eeca, ejai bo eoŋ airumet naejok."
Psalms16:7 Emalai EJAKAIT, loabu kenerak eoŋ; Eeca, kesisianakinete iŋeretenyaka kosawan luka akuare,"
Psalms16:8 Etilinenenei EJAKAIT tiritir; Naarai ejai iŋesi akanika nakoteten, mam eriaŋiriaŋenena."
Psalms16:9 Ŋes iyalamar ekatau, ibwoŋar da akaibuses: ŋes iboieneneo akakuan inapakina,"
Psalms16:10 Naarai mam inyeini ekatau kOkatwak; Kwabo mam icamakini ikalaunanikon aibos.
Psalms16:11 Kitodianakini eoŋ erot loka aijar: Neijai ijo ŋes aiyalama naitekoro; Akanikon nakoteten ŋes ejaas nuitalakarito ikar kere.
Psalms17:1 Kiira naedolit, wu EJAKAIT, kopupok akaiwor; Kitoik akit akailip, namam ebuni kaituk nakamodan."
Psalms17:2 Kolom akatubokinio kamakon; Kosesenata akonyekon nuedolito.
Psalms17:3 Igimo ijo ekatau; kilatok eoŋ kuare; Kirere eoŋ kwabo mam eanyuna akirot; Akaŋau eoŋ ebe mam akaituk epaari.
Psalms17:4 Kwape ejaatar aswamisio nuka ituŋa, kanuka akirot naka aitukukon, Abu kenac irotin luka ikadedeŋak."
Psalms17:5 Ecat akalosit korotinikon, Mam ejurusiara akakeje."
Psalms17:6 Kewonei jo, naarai kiboŋokini eoŋ, wu Edeke; Kitoikinai akonikit, kopup nuenera."
Psalms17:7 Kitodia akonisianut-nakamin nakaumokin, Wu jo loitaiari lukimunosi jo, Kama ejaas luenyoikinete, kakonikan nakoteten,"
Psalms17:8 Kidarai kwape ecopot loka akoŋu, Kibwaai kotoribe loka abebenokakon,"
Psalms17:9 Kama ejaas ikaronok lukaŋasete, Lukasurupoka lukakotosi aiar, lukerigaunito."
Psalms17:10 Arapia kes asiepaikec; Inerasi nuka eitur kaitukekec.
Psalms17:11 Kirigaut sio kalositekosi: Etogogoŋoto akecekonye aibirokin sio kwap,"
Psalms17:12 Esubit bala eŋatuny loibitiikinit kanuka imejaunake, Ido bala ikoku yenika eŋatuny yenedapadapat kaiboisio nuperunet."
Psalms17:13 Konyou, wu EJAKAIT, Kotereikin, kibirok ŋes kwap; Koyu ekatau kekonikileŋ kama ejai ikaronon."
Psalms17:14 Kama ejaas ituŋa, kanuka akonikan, wu EJAKAIT, Kama ejaas ituŋa luka akwapin, luejaas akorakinetekec kotoma aijar kana, Luitilelebi abarakon akoikikec: Epuikis kes idwe, Inyeiniata ikecedwe ikeceboro luideunos."
Psalms17:15 Konye bo eoŋ, aanyuni akonikonyen kotoma adolit: Naakwenyunia kadaunit asimakon."
Psalms18:1 Kamina jo, wu EJAKAIT, akagogoŋ,"
Psalms18:2 EJAKAIT ŋes atiibaka, abwasika, ka ekayuunanika; Edekeka, atiibaka nakagogoŋ, amunonena ŋes; Ekabuku, amumwarat naka aitajarioka, abwasika naicelelei,"
Psalms18:3 Ewonenenei EJAKAIT, loibusakinit aiturio; Ketajareneneo kwaŋin kama kalukasurupoka,"
Psalms18:4 Kaena aunoi nuka atwanare, Ketukuriana ŋol akalele nuka numam ayoŋit Edeke."
Psalms18:5 Kerimorito aunoi nuka Okatwak: Kepoka iica luka atwanare.
Psalms18:6 Keworo EJAKAIT kotoma ocanika, Kamony mama ejai Ekadeke: Abu kiira ekaporoto koyekaluke, Kodolok aimonyoka akiike."
Psalms18:7 Kosodi kijaŋiiana akwap, komarani, Kilokilokos da apeteta nuka iroŋan, Kijaŋijaŋasi, naarai anyunyura ŋesi."
Psalms18:8 Kisusumau apuru kokumesike, Kidonyo akim nakelomuni kaitukuke; Kisinep atotol."
Psalms18:9 Kitukukum akuj, kodok; Kojai amuton naejesi ŋaŋ kwap kakejeke."
Psalms18:10 Kibwanen ekerubi, koporo: Eebo, koporo kiiror kabebenoka nuka ekwam,"
Psalms18:11 Kituluo amuton akeŋopis, ekewema loiswaparit ŋes; Amuton naka akipi, idouon luitolimakinito luka akuj."
Psalms18:12 Kikutasi ikedouon luitolimakinito kanuka amwekimwek naka akonyeneke, Akako ka atotol nuka akim."
Psalms18:13 Kiretu da EJAKAIT kotoma akuj, Kolimo Loejai kuju kakuj ekeporoto: Akako ka atotol nuka akim."
Psalms18:14 Koguma ikekojoi, kisiarisiar; Eebo, koguma aimiliaununeta nuipu, kisiyaloŋoŋ kes."
Psalms18:15 Kotakanutu do alelesia nuka akipi, Kideleleut apeteta nuka akwapin, Kanuka airetakinikon, wu EJAKAIT, Kanuka akutun naka eiyeŋane loka ikumesikon."
Psalms18:16 Abu kijuk kokuju, kayaŋa; Kegalala kakipi nuipu."
Psalms18:17 Abu kayu kama kalokasurupika lokagogon, Kama kakesi da lukalaito, Naarai ketelekarito eoŋ kagogoŋ."
Psalms18:18 Kabunokis kapaaran naka epolaka: Konye EJAKAIT ŋes ketogogoŋi.
Psalms18:19 Ido abu ketoloma aibois naelal; Abu kayu eoŋ naarai kesiyalamikinit.
Psalms18:20 Karop EJAKAIT eoŋ kwape ejaar akadolit; Kataeak kwape ejaar alaunite naka akaninika.
Psalms18:21 Naarai abu karic irotin luka EJAKAIT, Ido mam abu kejerukana kama ejai Ekadeke,"
Psalms18:22 Naarai ajaas itubesiake kere kakonyeneka, Ido mam abu kajal akeicorakineta."
Psalms18:23 Abu karai loadolit kamake, Abu kedara kenyek aswam numam adolit."
Psalms18:24 “Ŋes katacakinia EJAKAIT kwape ejaar akadolit, Kwape ejaar alaunite naka akaninika kakonyeneke."
Psalms18:25 Mama ejai yeniketimon itodianakini aitim; Mama ejai yenikadoliton itodianakini adolit;
Psalms18:26 Mama ejai yenesegara itodianakini aseg; Ido mama ejai yenetumaana itodianakini airebokinet.
Psalms18:27 Naarai itajari ituŋa luemwaŋitai; Konye itisili akonye nuka lueomiara
Psalms18:28 Naarai itonokuni ijo akatala; Itacauni EJAKAIT Ekadeke akamuton.
Psalms18:29 Naarai kanukon arukitor ajore; Ido kanuka aiŋarakinio naka Edekeka elami abwas.
Psalms18:30 Konye Edeke, edolit ekerot; Egimor akirot naka EJAKAIT; iŋol ŋes ebuku loka ŋul kere luemunos ŋes,"
Psalms18:31 Naarai iŋai bo Edeke dimarai EJAKAIT? Iŋai bo da atiiba dimarai Edekewok?
Psalms18:32 Edeke loketanapikinit agogoŋ, Loitodolit da ekarot."
Psalms18:33 Ituluori akakejen kwape nuka amiam: Ido kebwaikini eoŋ aiboisioka nukokuju.
Psalms18:34 Isisianakini akakanin ejie; Tetere ikesete akakanin akabwa naka aikomon.
Psalms18:35 Ido kiinak eoŋ ebuku loka akoniitajar: Kegagauni akonikan nakoteten, Ketopoloo eoŋ aiyapeperakon."
Psalms18:36 Kitalalik eoŋ neetorit, Mam ejurusiaros akatitiban."
Psalms18:37 Ebwapi lukasurupoka, kadolok: Bobo da mam aboŋuni aitodol neemudiarotor."
Psalms18:38 Ecumucumei cut komam epedorete anyoun: Ibirokinos kwap akejeka.
Psalms18:39 Naarai ibu kitanapik eoŋ agogoŋ najus: Itukukum ŋul lukanyoikinete.
Psalms18:40 Isiboŋik lukasurupoka ikecepuran neajai eoŋ, Tetere amudiari lukalaito."
Psalms18:41 Apotu kiworoto, konye komameun yenitaiari: Kiworoto EJAKAIT, konye mam abu Koboŋok."
Psalms18:42 Kasodi kepudapud kes bala apua naekutari ekwam: Kacaka kes bala erit loka irotin.
Psalms18:43 Ibu koyu eoŋ kotoma aŋolopa naka ituŋa: Kituluo ekeŋarenon loka atekerin: Kejaanakinete eoŋ ituŋa lumam lem ajeni.
Psalms18:44 Atipet kepuput nukaŋ karimarete; Kanonokikinete imo.
Psalms18:45 Eoliorete imo, Elomunete emaranete kaiboisiokec nuŋopis."
Psalms18:46 Ejari EJAKAIT; kituritete atiibaka; Kitopolooritete Edeke loka akaitajario.
Psalms18:47 Ŋes Edeke lokenyaŋakini, Ketapatanikini eoŋ ituŋa."
Psalms18:48 Kaiyaŋari eoŋ kama ejaas lukasurupoka: Eebo, kidaka eoŋ kuju kaŋul kalukanyoikinete: Kiyu eoŋ kama ejai ituŋanan yenikelepa."
Psalms18:49 Ŋes kemalaenena jo kotoma atekerin, wu EJAKAIT. Ayeenenei aiturit ekonikiror."
Psalms18:50 Einakini ekabakake aitajar naepol: Itodianakini da nukasianut-nakamin ekinyonyoikitonoke akinyet, Daudi ka akeur ikar kere."
Psalms19:1 Elimorit akuj aibuses naka Edeke; Itejenunit da apak aswam naka akaninike.
Psalms19:2 Apaaran ineras kapaaran, Akuare ka akuare itodianakinos aijen,"
Psalms19:3 Emameete akiro karaida aŋajep; Mam iirario ekeceporoto.
Psalms19:4 Anataa eikorukec akwap kere, Akecekiro da kiton osaŋe loka akwap. Tomakec ebwaiki akoloŋ ewema,"
Psalms19:5 Naesubit bala eteran loelomuni kotogoke, Kolakara kwape ediŋiriria ekagogoŋon eboloboloi."
Psalms19:6 Akelomun egeuni kosaŋe loka akuj, Akeirimor da kiton osaŋeke; Kwabo emamei ibore yenibwaio kamwanisike,"
Psalms19:7 Edolit ekisil loka EJAKAIT, inyakuni etau; Icasit aitejenunet naka EJAKAIT, itocouni ibaŋ."
Psalms19:8 Etenete aituutoonoreta nuka EJ AKAIT, isiyalamikinete etau: Esegara aicorakinet naka EJAKAIT, itacauni akonye."
Psalms19:9 Ayoŋit naka EJAKAIT erai nakalaunan, ejaenena ikar kere; Itubesia luka EJAKAIT eraas lukabeit, Luedolito cut."
Psalms19:10 Ibusakinit eimiel aitelekarit esabu, Eebo, esabu loepol loililiauna: Ejijim aitelekarit esik ka akap naka ao."
Psalms19:11 Ikwenyarete teni ŋun ekonibulesit: Toma aricit ŋun ŋes ejai eropit loepol.
Psalms19:12 Iŋai bo yenepedori ajenun akepaar? Kolemarai eoŋ aibucanareta nuibwaa.
Psalms19:13 Kitikok da ekonibulesit kotoma aisosolonut; Kinyek ayait eoŋ; kasodi kebecokin, K enyek adiakar akirot naepol."
Psalms19:14 Kocam akiro nuka aitukuka ka aomoom nakotauka kakonyenekon, Wu EJAKAIT, atiibaka, ekalakunanika da."
Psalms20:1 Koboŋok EJAKAIT jo kapaaran naka aiyaloŋoŋ! Ekiror da loka Edeke loka Yakob kitadakari jo kuju
Psalms20:2 Kijukanakini ŋesi jo aiŋarakinio naebuni kaibois nakalaunan, Koinanakini agogoŋ naebuni koSion."
Psalms20:3 Kiitununei ŋesi ainanakinetakon kere, Kocamununei akonisuban nuicweio."
Psalms20:4 Koinanakini ŋesi jo nuimiela ekonitau, Kitodolenenei nuineruni kere."
Psalms20:5 Kipikonori isio kotoma aitajarakon; Kikianari imederanawok kokiror loka Edekewok. EJAKAIT kitodolonokini nuilipi ijo kere.
Psalms20:6 Natikwana ajeni ebe itajari EJAKAIT ekinyonyoikitonoke akinyet; Eboŋokini kojai akujuke nakalaunan Kagogoŋ naitaŋaleuni naka akekan nakoteten.

Psalms20:8 Akukumoto, ebiroros: Konye oni kinyou, kibwoi."

Psalms21:1 Isiyalamanakini ekabaka akonigogoŋ, wu EJAKAIT; Elakanari ca noi kanuka akoniitajar!"
Psalms21:2 Uaik ŋes nuimiela eketau, Kwabo mam imikit nuilipit akeituk."
Psalms21:3 Naarai iŋarenikini ŋes karereŋesio nuka ajokis: Itanapikini akouke aboko naka esabu loililiauna.
Psalms21:4 Abu kilip ijo aijar, ibu koinak; Apaarasia nuipu, nuka ikar kere."
Psalms21:5 Epol akeibuses kotoma aitajarakon: Itanap ayoŋio ka apolou.
Psalms21:6 Naarai itarau ŋes loka arereŋesio ikar kere: Isiyalamikini ŋes kalakara kakonyenekon.
Psalms21:7 Naarai emuno ekabaka EJAKAIT, Ido kanuka asianut-nakamin naka Loejai kuju kakul mam iriaŋiriaŋa."
Psalms21:8 Edolokini akonikan lukasurupokon kere: Edolokini akonikan nakoteten ŋul lukilaito.
Psalms21:9 Itusubi kes bala eupa loesarani kapak naka anyunyurakon. Ilikori EJAKAIT kes kotoma aliliteke, Ido enyamari kes akim."
Psalms21:10 Imudiari akeceraito kakwap, Akeceur da kodwe luka ituŋa."
Psalms21:11 Naarai apotu kokaŋata aiswamakin jo aronis: Kobila da ebotet lomam epedorete aitodol.
Psalms21:12 Naarai inyakari kes kau, Itemonokini da aunoikon nuka akabwa kakonyenekec."
Psalms21:13 Kitopolooritete jo, wu EJAKAIT, kotoma agogoŋukon! Kayeenenete isio da aiturit apedorikon."
Psalms22:1 Wu Ekadeke, Ekadeke, kanukinyo kijalakinia? Kanukinyo ilwaniaror aiŋarakin eoŋ, kakiro nuka aumenoka?"
Psalms22:2 Wu Ekadeke, eworoi paaran, konye mam iboŋokini; Kuare da mam eliliŋi."
Psalms22:3 Konye irai ijo lokalaunan, Ijo loiboie kotoma aiturit naka Isirael."
Psalms22:4 Kimunonenos jo lukapapaakos: Kimunonenos, ibu koyuununei kes."
Psalms22:5 Kiworoenenete jo, koyuununete: Kimunonenos jo komam irumenenete ileic."
Psalms22:6 Konye eoŋ arai iritanit, kwabo mam arai ituŋanan;’ Imoromorot ka imenitono da yenika ituŋa."
Psalms22:7 Kakienatatar lukaanyunete kere, kesekelete: Isuanaros, imuŋumuŋete akwes, kineras ebe,"
Psalms22:8 “Koluŋakin neejai EJAKAIT; tetere eyuuni ŋes; Tetere eyuuni ŋes, naarai elelakinit ŋes!”"
Psalms22:9 Konye ijo ŋol lokisidouni eoŋ kakoik naka totoka: Lokisumunoori da aroko anaki.
Psalms22:10 Aponi ketitiŋi jo ameuni kaurunioka: ljoŋ Ekadeke ameuni kakoik naka totoka.
Psalms22:11 Sirikilwaniar kaneajai; naarai eapie aronis; Naarai emamei yenikeŋarakini.
Psalms22:12 Kerimorito imaseniko luipu; Kerigaunito imaseniko lukagogoŋ luka Basan.
Psalms22:13 Kaooŋanakinete aitukekec, Kwape eŋatuny loikuna loegat."
Psalms22:14 Kabukor kwape kakipi, Elionyonokinos akakojo da kere: Esubit ekatau bala edipor; Acalar kokidiŋ amoetenaka."
Psalms22:15 Aono akagogoŋ bala atibolok; Emakakin akaŋajep abokonyaka, Kiyau da toma apua naka atwanare."
Psalms22:16 Naarai kerimorito inokwo: Karidakinit atukot naka lukeswamak aroŋis; Kecumata akakanin ka akakejen,"
Psalms22:17 Apedori aimarun akakojo kere; Kasesenete kedetakinito akonye:
Psalms22:18 Akorokorata akanapito, Kilamilamata eroet kanuka ekasoka."
Psalms22:19 Konye sirikilwaniar, wu EJAKAIT! Uo ekakeŋarakinan, kiwonyuni aiŋarakin eoŋ."
Psalms22:20 Koyu ekatau kokileŋ; Iminataka kapedor naka ekiŋok.
Psalms22:21 Kitajarai kotoma aituk naka eŋatuny; Eebo, ibu Koboŋok da kamumwar nuka ekosobwan."
Psalms22:22 Alimonokinenei ekonikiror mama ejaas iinacanaka: Keturenenei jo kokidiŋ katukot,"
Psalms22:23 Kiturito ŋes, yes Iuiyoŋito EJAKAIT! Kitopoloonorete ŋes, yes kere aur naka Yakob; Koyoŋenenete ŋes, yes kere aur naka Isirael."
Psalms22:24 Naarai mam abu komen kwabo mam abu kola Ican luka ŋol kaloiticanio; Kwabo mam abu kibwa akekonyen kamakeŋ; Konye naeworoo, abu kiira,"
Psalms22:25 Mamakon ŋes elomunia aituriteka kotoma okodet loepol: Etodoli akaiyaposio kakonyen nuka ŋul kalueyoŋito ŋes.
Psalms22:26 Enyamete luitasonos kimonikinos: Iturete EJAKAIT ŋul luemootos ŋes. Kojarenenete ikusitauon ikar kere.
Psalms22:27 Iitunete rwaru awaitin kere nuka akwap, kibelokinos neejai EJAKAIT: Emai ajena kere naka atekerin kakonyenekon."
Psalms22:28 Naarai ajakanut erai naka EJAKAIT: ŋes da irumit atekerin,"
Psalms22:29 Ituŋa luiusak kere enyamete emaete da: ŋul da Iueboŋorete toma apua ekukumete kakonyeneke, Ŋopeŋol lomam epedori aitajar eketau."
Psalms22:30 Uaanakini aur ŋes: Elimokinio nuka EJAKAIT aitodol atur naejauni.
Psalms22:31 Epote elimonokinete adoliteke Mama ejaas ituŋa lumoolo eurio, ebe eswama ŋin."

Psalms25:12 Iŋai bo ituŋanan yeneyoŋit EJAKAIT? ŋipeŋin isisianakinenei korot loeseikini.

Psalms25:16 Kibelokin neajai, kitim; Naarai kasiliki bon, eticanitoi."

Psalms25:19 Koomoom nuka lukasurupoka, naarai ipu; Kalaito da kalait naedwar."
Psalms25:20 Okwe kidarenenei ekatau, koyuununei eoŋ! Kenyeis ileic airum, naarai kamuno jo."

Psalms27:1 EJAKAIT ŋes akaica ka akaitajar: da; Akurianar iŋai? EJAKAIT ŋes agogoŋ naka akaijar; Akerit iŋai?

Psalms27:10 Naarai kajalakis papaka ka totoka, Konye ketanuni EJAKAIT."

Psalms30:1 Ketopoloorenenei jo, wu EJAKAIT, naarai kikia eoŋ, Mam isiyalamikinit lukasurupoka aipikor eoŋ."
Psalms30:2 Wu EJAKAIT, Ekadeke, Abu keworo, kitaŋaleu,"
Psalms30:3 Wu EJAKAIT, ibu kitonyou ekatau kOkatwak: Ibu kidar akaijar kenye aijesar toma Aipany."
Psalms30:4 Koyeenenete aiturit EJAKAIT, yes lukalaunakake, Kimalaenenete ekekiror lokalaunan."
Psalms30:5 Naarai etubor akenyunyura atipet; Toma aminake ejai aijar: Diat kimonyi akuare kia, konye kilakar tupuruc."
Psalms30:6 Eoŋ da naakerianar kabala ebe, “Mam eriaŋiriaŋenena.”"
Psalms30:7 Ijo EJAKAIT, kotoma aminakon, Ibu kiticat ekaroŋat kogogoŋ; Ibu kibwa akonikonyen; keyaloŋoŋ,"
Psalms30:8 Keworoi jo, wu EJAKAIT: Ido keŋaiŋa EJAKAIT ebe,"
Psalms30:9 “Ajokis anyoin ejai toma aokotoka, kejesar Aipany? Kiturenenei kereka apua jo? Elimonokini kereka abeitekon?"
Psalms30:10 Kiira, wu EJAKAIT, kitimoi: EJAKAIT, koraun ijo ekakeŋarakinan.”"
Psalms30:11 Ibelok akaibworo araun ekosio; Ilaca igoen luka aibworoka, kitanap aiyalama:"
Psalms30:12 Tetere kiyoonokini akaibuses aiturit jo, komam ililiŋi, Wu EJAKAIT Ekadeke, kemalaenenei jo apaarasia kere,"
Psalms31:1 Wu EJAKAIT, kamuno jo; Kenyek aisurumeneneo ileic: Kolakunai kadolitekon,"
Psalms31:2 Kitoikinai akonikit; Kisunyite alakun eoŋ. Koraun atiibaka nakagogoŋ, Etogo loegalikinio aitajar eoŋ."
Psalms31:3 Naarai ijo atiibaka ka akabwas da; Kanuka ŋun korikoroi kiŋarenikinoi kanuka ekonikiror.
Psalms31:4 Kolemunai kotoma oboi lokalokitere kaiyeiyea; Naarai irai ijo akabwas.
Psalms31:5 Eŋadakini ekamoyo akanikon: Ibu kolaku eoŋ, wu EJAKAIT, ijo Edeke loka abeit."
Psalms31:6 Alait ŋul lueomitos aamameak nuka aiŋal; Konye amuno eoŋ EJAKAIT.
Psalms31:7 Alakanar eyalamanakin kanuka akoniitim: Naarai ibu koany akaiticanio; Ibu kojen ekatau kotoma ocan:
Psalms31:8 Kwabo mam ibu kogoloo eoŋ akan naka lokasurup: Ibu kibwaik akakeje aibois naelal.
Psalms31:9 Kitimoi, wu EJAKAIT, naarai kakadaki: Aoniki akakoŋu kanuka aimony, Eebo, ekatau ka akakuan da."
Psalms31:10 Naarai iiŋoŋanar akaijar kaiturur, ka ikaruka da keidiny: Etegaki akagogoŋ kanuka numam adoliteka, Akakojo da aoko."
Psalms31:11 Kanuka lukekoloka kere araun eoŋ amorosit, Eebo, mama ejaas ikaidunyeta cut, Ido akurian mama ejaas ipaupaka: Lukaanyunete korot kakerete."
Psalms31:12 Kemurwokin bala ikatwan yenimam eomitai: Asub bala atido naabwaŋa,"
Psalms31:13 Naarai abu keira areanakin naka luipu, Etasuro loepol iwaitin kere! Naeneruniata aluikin eoŋ, Kotuboto acoa amudiar akaijar."
Psalms31:14 Konye kamuno jo, wu EJAKAIT: Katema atiar, “Uo Ekadeke.”"
Psalms31:15 Ejaas akapaarasia akanikon: Koyuunai kakan naka lukasurupoka, Kaneejaas ŋul da lukemanito."
Psalms31:16 Kitacaik ekonibulesit akonikonyen: Kitajarai kakonisianut-nakamin.
Psalms31:17 Kenyeis ileic airum, wu EJAKAIT; Naarai keworo jo: Kisurumenenei ikaronok ileic, Kisililiŋ kes kOkatwak."
Psalms31:18 Kisibuta aituke nukeŋalak: Nuinerasi nuka epali mama ejaas ikadolitok, Kelepa ka emwaŋit."
Psalms31:19 Eiliili cama akonijokis Naiŋadakinit ŋul lukiyoŋito, Naiswamakinia ŋul lukimunos, Kakonyen nuka odwe luka ituŋa!"
Psalms31:20 Ibwai kes kotoma aŋopis naka ajautukon Kobotei luka ituŋa: Idarenenei kes kaiyeiyea kowema Kama ejai aŋolopa naka anajepa.
Psalms31:21 Kituritete EJAKAIT! Naarai ketodiki akesianut-nakamin nakaumokin Kotoma ore loegogoŋ.
Psalms31:22 Esuburiarit eoŋ einer ebe, “Kamudiar kakonyenekon”: Kwabo ibu kopup eporoto loka akaiŋaiŋa Nakeworoo jo."
Psalms31:23 Kominasi EJAKAIT, yes kere ikekalaunak: Itanaleuni EJAKAIT lumunon, Eropi noi ekeswaman nukelepa."
Psalms31:24 Kogogoŋoto, kotitiŋioto, Yes kere luidareunito EJAKAIT."
Psalms32:1 Isirerenitoi ŋin yenisionio adiakarike, Yenerapitai da akeronis."
Psalms32:2 Isirerenitoi ituŋanan yenimam imarakini EJAKAIT numam adolit, Yenimam emodit komoyoke."
Psalms32:3 Nakeliliŋia, komojoŋata akakojo Kanuka aumenoka aitiwar akwap."
Psalms32:4 Naarai kalaŋirikinit akonikan paaran ka kuare: Koonikis akakip bala aonit naka akamu.
Psalms32:5 Abu kalimok jo akaronis, Komam ebwait numam adoliteka: Kabala ebe, “Alimori adiakaretaka mama ejai EJAKAIT.” Ibu kisioni numam adolit nuka akaronis."
Psalms32:6 Kanuka ŋun kilipenenei jo ŋinituŋanan yeneyoŋit Edeke kapak naitakanunia: Abeit naeleleata akip nuipu mam edolokinete ŋes.
Psalms32:7 ljoŋ anopisika; kiiyari ijo eoŋ kocan; Kirigauni eoŋ kikososinei luka alakunio.
Psalms32:8 Ketuutonori jo, kesisianakini da korot loiloseneneo: Kekwenyari jo kakakoŋu,"
Psalms32:9 Sirisubito bala ibalasin, arai bala inyubun, luemamei ajenun: Luibusakinit ajen kasua ka amunyin aitikokinia kes, Kinyeis aikunyakin mama ijai,"
Psalms32:10 Ejaunos ikaronok ican luipu; Konye yenemuno EJAKAIT irigauni ŋin aitim.
Psalms32:11 Kiyalamikinos kotoma EJAKAIT, kolelata yesi ikadolitok: Kibwoŋata kanuka aiyalama, yes kere luitenara itauon,"
Psalms33:1 Kolelata toma EJAKAIT, yes ikadolitok: Aiturit ibusakinit yenitenara kotau."
Psalms33:2 Kimalata EJAKAIT kadeudeu: Koyeikis aiturit ŋes kisabulin luka aputio atomon.
Psalms33:3 Koyeikisi ŋes ekosio lokitetet: Koramakis ejok keporoto loepol.
Psalms33:4 Naarai etenit akirot naka EJAKAIT; Akeswam da kere iswamai kamunonut.
Psalms33:5 Emin adolit ka etube: Ileleba akwap asianut-nakamin naka EJAKAIT.
Psalms33:6 Asubunio akuj kakirot naka EJAKAIT; Ajoreke da kere keiyeŋane loka aitukuke.
Psalms33:7 Etukonokini akipi nuka aŋololin nepepe bala atukit: Iŋadi ataroi toma odula.
Psalms33:8 Koyoŋ akwap kere EJAKAIT: Komaranata luiboiete kere kotoma akwap.
Psalms33:9 Naarai abu kolim, kiswamai; Abu kicorak, kicat da."
Psalms33:10 Itapalauni EJAKAIT ainerun naka atekerin: Itwataniari aomisio nuka ituŋa.
Psalms33:11 Icasit ainerun naka EJAKAIT ikar kere, Aomisio da nukotauke mama ejaas aturio kere."
Psalms33:12 Isirerenitoi ateker naerai EJAKAIT Edekekec; Ituŋa luaseu araun airumeteke.
Psalms33:13 Eseseni EJAKAIT kokuju; Itei da idwe kere luka ituŋa;
Psalms33:14 Kotoma aibois naiboio Eseseni kere luiboiete kakwap;
Psalms33:15 ŋopeŋol loitemonokini itauonokec kere, ŋes da loeomoomoi aswamisiokec kere."
Psalms33:16 Emamei ekabaka loitajaritai kanuka ajore naepol; Mam lokagogoŋ eyuunio kanuka agogoŋuke naepol.
Psalms33:17 Erai ebalasit ibore yenitai kanuka aitajar: Mam da eyuuni imodio kere kanuka akegogoŋ naepol.
Psalms33:18 Koany, itei akoŋu naka EJAKAIT ŋul lueyonito ŋes, Ka ŋul da luemunos aitimike;"
Psalms33:19 Ayuun itauonokec kotoma atwanare, Aitajar da kes kotoma obeli."
Psalms33:20 Idarito itauonowok EJAKAIT: Erai ewokokeŋarakinan ka ewokobuku da.
Psalms33:21 Isiyalamikinito iwokotauon ŋol, Naarai kimunokin ekekiror lokalaunan."
Psalms33:22 Kodolok sio akoniitim, wu EJAKAIT, Kwape kimunokinor jo."
Psalms34:1 Emalaeneriei EJAKAIT apakio kere: Aituriteke ejaununei toma aitukuka.
Psalms34:2 Eolobobot ekatau kotoma EJAKAIT: Iirarete luitasonos iyalamikinos da.
Psalms34:3 Kitopoloosi EJAKAIT yesi ka eoŋ da, Keturoto ekekiror nepepe!"
Psalms34:4 Abu kamo EJAKAIT, kaboŋok, Kayu eoŋ kotoma akurianuka kere."
Psalms34:5 Apotu kosesenata ŋes, kitacaunai: Mam bobo akonyenekec ileicikinete."
Psalms34:6 Abu lokican lo kiworo, kiira EJAKAIT ŋes, Kitajar ŋes kocanike kere."
Psalms34:7 Idukuri emalaika loka EJAKAIT alukun ŋul lueyonito ŋes, Eyuuni da kes."
Psalms34:8 Kiir ber, koany ebe ejok EJAKAIT! Isirereŋitoi ituŋanan yenemuno ŋes!"
Psalms34:9 Koyonito EJAKAIT, yes ikalaunakake: Naarai emamei ibore yenipudas ŋul lueyonito ŋes."
Psalms34:10 Ilwaritos iŋatunyo ludidik, eriebete eteŋei: Konye ŋul luemoete EJAKAIT mam eolikinete ibore kere yenejok."
Psalms34:11 Kopotu, yes idwe, kopupunoi: Kesisianakinete yes aiyoŋ EJAKAIT."
Psalms34:12 Iŋai bo ituŋanan yenimiela aijar, Yenemina da apaarasia nuipu, tetere edumuni ajokis?"
Psalms34:13 Kisinac aŋajepekon nukaronok, Ka aitukukon da aimod."
Psalms34:14 Konyou kotoma aronis, kiswama ajokis; Komo ainapakin, kotupa da."
Psalms34:15 Esesenete akonye nuka EJAKAIT ikadolitok, Itoikinit da akiike apupun aimonyokec."
Psalms34:16 Egirito akonyen nuka EJAKAIT ŋul luiswamaete aronis, Amwatar aiitunetekec kotoma akwap."
Psalms34:17 Apotu ikadolitok kiworoto, kopup EJAKAIT, Koyu kes kocanikec kere."
Psalms34:18 Eapie EJAKAIT kaneejaas ŋul kere luebilil itauon, Itajari ŋul luejaas emoyo loitoronikina."
Psalms34:19 Ipu aicaneta nuka ikadoliton: Konye eyuuni EJAKAIT ŋes kotoma kaŋun kere.
Psalms34:20 Idari akojoke kere: Mam da amodio naebila.
Psalms34:21 Eari aronis ikaronok: Etubokinio ŋul luelaito ikadolitok.
Psalms34:22 Elakuni EJAKAIT itauon luka ikekejaanakinak: Mam etubokinio idio kaluemunosi ŋes.
Psalms35:1 Wu EJAKAIT, kopegata kaŋul luepegasi keoŋ: Kitiji ŋul luketijiete eoŋ."
Psalms35:2 Kokap ebuku ka eupal, Kobwo kiŋarak eoŋ."
Psalms35:3 Kout akwara da kigalik erot loka ŋul kalukarukitotor: Kolimok ekatau ebe, “Eoŋ akoniitajar.”"
Psalms35:4 Kisurum ileic kitisil da ŋul luemoete akaijar: Kitoboŋo kau kisiyaloŋoŋ ŋul luinerunete aiswamakin eoŋ aronis.
Psalms35:5 Kosubata kesi bala agugu nuekutari ekwam, Kireŋe kes emalaika loka EJAKAIT."
Psalms35:6 Koraun ekecerot amuton ka arurut, Korukitor kes emalaika loka EJAKAIT,"
Psalms35:7 Naarai apotu kolokikis eic toma aipany alokia eoŋ komameete akiro, Abokikis ekatau aipany komameete akiro."
Psalms35:8 Kobunok ŋes amudiario komam ecoit, Kipok ŋes elopet eicike loalokit: Kibirokin komudiar."
Psalms35:9 Kosodi elakar ekatau kotoma EJAKAIT: Elelakini akeitajar.
Psalms35:10 Etemarete akakojo kere ebe, “EJAKAIT, iiŋai bo iputotor ijo, Loiyuuni lokican kama kaŋol kaloitelekarit ŋes kagogoŋ, Eebo, lokican ka loilwaritoi kama kaŋol kaloenetart?”"
Psalms35:11 Anyout ikajenak lumam edolito; Keŋita akiro numam ajeni.
Psalms35:12 Eropete eoŋ karonis itia ajokis, Aitisilikin ekatau."
Psalms35:13 Konye eoŋ, kedekakinos kesi, Anapi inapen luka aibworo: Ketaari ekatau ailuŋ; Eboŋokini akailip toma atorobuka alopet."
Psalms35:14 Abu kekonak kwape tikeraar ekapapero arai onaceka: Kakukum aibworo kwape yenekuudiani totoke.
Psalms35:15 Konye do kecodokin eoŋ kiyalamikinos, kotukonokinos; Katukonokinotor lueŋolopaka, komam ajeni; Kanyilinyilata komam ejoŋoete:"
Psalms35:16 Kwape lukesekelok lueinyanakinete kopucino, Kakonyanakiniata ikel."
Psalms35:17 EJAKAIT, itodoli ai itei? Kitajar ekatau kotoma amudiarikec, Iminataka kama ejaas iŋatunyo."
Psalms35:18 Kemalai jo kokodet loepol: Keturenenei jo kotuŋa luipu.
Psalms35:19 Kinyeis ŋul lueraas lukasurupoka aiyalamikin kaiŋal: Karaida ŋul lukalaito komameete akiro aedia akonye.
Psalms35:20 Naarai mam inerasi ainapakin: Konye inerunete akiro nuka aiŋal Aluikinio ŋul luiyapaara kakwap.
Psalms35:21 Eebo, kaoonikinitos noi aitukekec; Kobalas ebe, “Us, ijo ba! Abu akosikoŋu kogipa!”"
Psalms35:22 Ibu ijo kogipu, wu EJAKAIT: sirikililiŋ: Wu EJAKAIT, sirikilwaniar kamakaŋ,"
Psalms35:23 Kokweny, konyou kotubok eoŋ akiro, Akakiro, Edekeka ka EJAKAITika."
Psalms35:24 Kotubokinai wu EJAKAIT Ekadeke, kwape ejaar akonidolit; Kinyeis aiyalamar eoŋ."
Psalms35:25 Kinyeis atemar kotauonokec ebe, “ljo ba, kwaŋin kito!” Kinyeis atemar ebe, “Kiliko oni ŋes elue.”"
Psalms35:26 Kisurum ileje kisiyaloŋoŋ kere Luisiyalamikinito eoŋ adumun aronis! Kitanap ileje ka asiles lukadakanarotor!
Psalms35:27 Kibwoŋata kanuka aiyalama, kolakaros, Luitojokitos akakirot nakadolit: Eebo, kinerenenas duc ebe, “Kitopolooritete EJAKAIT, Loeminakinit akerianut naka ekebulesit.”"
Psalms35:28 Kosodi inerenena akaŋajep adolitekon, Aituritekon da aitiwar akwap."
Psalms36:1 Inera adiakar naka ikaronon kotauke ebe, Emamei akurian Edeke kakonyeneke."
Psalms36:2 Naarai iturokina bon kakonyeneke ebe, Numam adoliteke mam ejernunio, mam elaio da."
Psalms36:3 Eraas akiro nuka aitukuke numam adolit ka aiŋal: Enyeki nukacoa ka aswam da nuejok,"
Psalms36:4 Ineruni numam adolit koitadake, Ibwaikina elopet bon orot lomam ejok; Mam esacit aronis."
Psalms36:5 Wu EJAKAIT, ejai akonisianut-nakamin toma akul; Edolit amunonutukon toma akuj."
Psalms36:6 Esubit adolitekon bala itoŋan luka Edeke; Itubesiakon eraas ataro naepol: Wu EJAKAIT, idari ijo irunanan ka itiaŋ da."
Psalms36:7 Elok ca ma akonisianut-nakamin, wu Edeke! Eŋopete idwe luka ituŋa kotolim loka abebenokakon."
Psalms36:8 Imonikinos kojokan atarion nakotogokon; Itamasi kes ecor loka aiyalamakon.
Psalms36:9 Naarai neijai ijo ŋes ejai atan naka aijar: Toma aicakon ŋes kianyunia isio aica.
Psalms36:10 Kiyatak ijo akonisianut-nakamin mama ejaas ŋul lukijenete jo; Ka adolitekon da mama ejaas luitenara itauon.
Psalms36:11 Kinyek akeju naka luituros aluikin eoŋ, Kinyeis da akanin nuka lukaronok aireŋear eoŋ."
Psalms36:12 Ebirokinos nen ikeswamak numam adolit: Alatanakin kwap, mam epedorete anyoun."
Psalms37:1 Siriyaloŋoŋoenenei kanuka lukeswamak aronis, Sirikokotekit da ŋul luiswamaete numam adolit."
Psalms37:2 Naarai etubio kwape anya, Erinyorete bala amel."
Psalms37:3 Komunonena EJAKAIT, kiswamaenenei nuejok; Kiboienenei kakwap, kotupenenei amunonut."
Psalms37:4 Kolakanar kama ejai EJAKAIT; Kiinakini ŋesi da jo nuimiela ekonitau.
Psalms37:5 Kititiŋik EJAKAIT ekonirot; Komunonena ŋes, itodolenenei ŋesi da."
Psalms37:6 Itoduuni akonidolit bala aica, Akoniitub da kwape kidiŋ paaran."
Psalms37:7 Kililiŋ kaneejai EJAKAIT, kidareununei katitiŋikinit; Siriyaloŋoŋoenenei kanuka ŋin yenekeriana korotoke, Kanuka ituŋanan yenitodoli ibotei luka aronis."
Psalms37:8 Kinyek anyunyura, kojal adedeŋ; Siriyaloŋoŋoenenei, naarai iriuni ŋin aronis."
Psalms37:9 Naarai egelario luiswamaete nueroko: Konye ŋul luidarito EJAKAIT, kes irumete akwap."
Psalms37:10 Naarai kapak naedit, emameun ikaronon: Eebo, irerei cut akeibois, ido emameun."
Psalms37:11 Konye luitasonos irumete akwap; Iyalamanakinos kainapakin naeiliili.
Psalms37:12 Ineruni ikaronon aluikin ikadoliton, Ekonyanakinor ŋes ikel."
Psalms37:13 Konye ekienar EJAKAIT ikaronon; Naarai eanyuni ebe eapie akepaaran.
Psalms37:14 Autut ikaronok ikileŋa, eketata akabwaikec; Aibirokin yenikican ka yenilwaritoi, Aiar ŋul luitenara korot:"
Psalms37:15 Icumete ikecekileŋa itauonokec kikulepek, Ebilas akabwaikec."
Psalms37:16 Idis Iuejaatar ikadoliton Itelekaritos aipues naka iboro luka ikaronok luipu.
Psalms37:17 Naarai ebilas akanin nuka ikaronok: Konye igaŋit EJAKAIT ikadolitok.
Psalms37:18 Ejeŋi EJAKAIT apaarasianuka luitenara: Ejaenena akeceirumet ikar kere.
Psalms37:19 Mam irumenenete ileic kapakio nuka aronis: Imonianakinos da kapaarasia nuka eteŋei.
Psalms37:20 Konye eoliorete ikaronok, Iliearos lukasurupo luka EJAKAIT kwape ajokis naka elet; Icweikinio; epuriorete bala apuru."
Psalms37:21 ljauni ikaronon, komam inyakakini bobo: Konye ekori yenedolit kasianut, einakini da,"
Psalms37:22 Naarai luisirerenitoi irumete akwap; Ka ŋul luikenit ŋesi egelario,"
Psalms37:23 Iticasi EJAKAIT alosit naka ituŋanan; Isiyalamikinit da ekerot.
Psalms37:24 Karaida kibiror, mam elatar noi; Naarai igaŋit EJAKAIT kakekan."
Psalms37:25 Adite kolo eoŋ, konye kwana amoloŋ; Konye eriŋa eanyuna yenedolit ejalakinitai,"
Psalms37:26 Karaida akeur ilipitoi inyamat, Ekori kasianut aitiwar akwap, eyuuni; Isirereŋitoi da akeur."
Psalms37:27 Konyou kotoma aronis, kiswama nuejok; Kobut ikar kere."
Psalms37:28 Naarai emin EJAKAIT etube, Ido mam ejalakini lukalaunakake; Idario kes ikar kere: Konye egelario aur naka yenikaronon."
Psalms37:29 Irumete ikadolitok akwap, Ebusete kotoma ikar kere."
Psalms37:30 Inera aituk naka ikadoliton nuka acoa, Elimonokini da akeŋajep etube,"
Psalms37:31 Ikisila luka Edekeke ejaas otauke: Mam ejurusianar kotoma alositeke kere.
Psalms37:32 Eseseni ikaronon ikadoliton, Kokoto aiar."
Psalms37:33 Mam EJAKAIT inyeini kakanike, Karaida aitetelekar ŋes naetubokinere akiro."
Psalms37:34 Kidareununei EJAKAIT, kotupenenei ekerot, Ŋes da kitopoloori jo airum akwap: Ianyuni egelario lukaronok,"
Psalms37:35 Abu kaany ikaronon ejai apedor naepol, Kigananai kwape kekitoi loelomunit kalupoke."
Psalms37:36 Konye kitor, ido koany, emamei: Eebo, abu kamo, konye mam etakanuna."
Psalms37:37 Koŋicenenei yenedolit, kiteenenei yenetenit: Naarai esaŋe loka ituŋanan kaŋin ŋes ainapakin."
Psalms37:38 Konye ikadiakanarak emudiario nepepe: Egelario cut esaŋe loka yenikaronon.
Psalms37:39 Konye aitajario naka ikadolitok ebuni kama ejai EJAKAIT: Ŋol ŋes anopisikec kotoma apakio nuka icaŋo
Psalms37:40 Ido iŋarakini EJAKAIT, itanaleuni kes: Itaŋaleuni kama ejaas ikaronok, itajari kes, Naarai akeriasi neejai ŋesi."
Psalms38:1 Wu EJAKAIT, sirikiiretak kakoninyunyura: Karaida alecor eoŋ kotoma akadakinikon naepol."
Psalms38:2 Naarai kediriakinos cut ikonikojoi, Karidakinit eoŋ akonikan noi."
Psalms38:3 Emamei aŋaleu kakuanaka kanuka aisiopitekon; Kwabo emamei aiyeŋun kotoma akojoka kanuka akaronis.
Psalms38:4 Naarai elaparos numam adoliteka kakouka: Kalaŋirikis noi kwape abwokon naepol.
Psalms38:5 Auruut akamusunun ido abosuut, Kanuka akabaŋaanut,"
Psalms38:6 Kesiriebi kacuikinitai noi; Alosi amonyi aitiwar akwap.
Psalms38:7 Naarai ilelebikina akaŋabet amwanis; Ido emamei aŋaleu kakuanaka.
Psalms38:8 Eilor aiionokineta nuipu: Eluluk kanuka aiyaloŋoŋ nakotauka.
Psalms38:9 EJAKAIT, nuemiela kere ejaas akonyenekon; Mam ibwaa ekaidiny kamakon."
Psalms38:10 Ebala ekatau pukupuk, eŋoŋar akagogoŋ; Asesen naka akakonye, kaoliki ŋin da."
Psalms38:11 Abwataros lukaminasi ka ikapapero kama ejaas aromaka; Abwataros da lukajenaka.
Psalms38:12 Ŋul da Iuirigaete aijaraka, kalokete; Ka ŋul da luitojokito eoŋ aanyun iean Ineras nuka ameŋeranut, Ido itetemonorete nuka aiŋal kotauonokec aitiwar akwap."
Psalms38:13 Konye eoŋ, asubit bala ekimin, mam epupi; Asubit bala ebaŋ lomam eooŋari akeituk."
Psalms38:14 Eebo, asubit bala etuŋanan lomam epupi, Emamei aitukuke aitoron,"
Psalms38:15 Naarai kamuno jo, wu EJAKAIT: Kiboŋokini wu EJAKAIT Ekadeke."
Psalms38:16 Naarai abu katema atiar, “Kinyeis kesi aiyalamar eoŋ: Keiurusiar akakeju kadakanarotor.”"
Psalms38:17 Naarai eapie eoŋ aicodokin, Akaiturur ejai akonyeneka tiritir."
Psalms38:18 Naarai alimori numam adoliteka, Kakadakinite kanuka akaronis."
Psalms38:19 Konye eŋaleete Iukasurupoka egogoŋ da: Eyatakinos ŋul lukalaito kotoma aiŋal,"
Psalms38:20 Ka ŋul da Iuinyaŋete aronis itia ajokis Kes lukasurupoka, naarai atupit eoŋ akirot naejok,"
Psalms38:21 Sirikiijalak, wu EJAKAIT. Wu Ekadeke, sirikilwaniar kaneajai."
Psalms38:22 Kiwonyuni aiŋarakin eoŋ, Wu EJAKAIT loka akaitajario."
Psalms39:1 Abu katema atiar, “Edarenenei ikaponesio, Kenyek aibucar kaŋajepeka: Aeni akaituk kamuny, Naejaar lokaronon akonyeneka.”"
Psalms39:2 Abu kebanubanun keliliŋi, Kabuta komam enera karaida nukajokak; Kiyatakin akaiturur."
Psalms39:3 Komwanu ekatau kotomaka; Naaomoomaa kinep akim: Kasodi kener kaŋajepeka ebe:
Psalms39:4 “Wu EJAKAIT, kitejenunai esaŋeka, Ido kwape ejaar aitemisioit naka apaarasiaka; Kitejenunai kwape araar Ioaloŋwana,"
Psalms39:5 Koany, ibu kituluo akapaarasia kwape alalau naka akan; Akaibut da erai ibore yenitai kakonyenekon: Abeit ŋinituŋanan naicasitor erai eiyeŋane lootai."
Psalms39:6 Abeit elosi ŋinituŋanan bala etoribe, Abeit iyaloŋoŋoete atai: Etuki abar, komam ejeni yeneyaari."
Psalms39:7 Aso do, wu EJAKAIT, edareunit inyo? Ejai akamun mamakon."
Psalms39:8 Koyuunai kapaaretaka kere: Sirikiituluo amorosit naka ibaŋiok.
Psalms39:9 Abu kebaŋubaŋun, mam abu kaooŋa akaituk; Naarai ibu kosub."
Psalms39:10 Kolema ebelakon kamaka: Karumo ainomio naka akonikan.
Psalms39:11 Naitetenia ituŋanan kairetakin kanuka numam adolit, Irumori akejokis kwape ekaporiporit: Abeit ŋinituŋanan erai eiyeŋane lootai."
Psalms39:12 Kopup akailip, wu EJAKAIT, kitoik akit akaiwonet; Sirikililiŋik akakiyo: Naarai arai eloŋwait kamakon, Ekeboiororon, kwape ajaatar lukapapaaka."
Psalms39:13 Okwe kideunai eoŋ, tetere ecasicasi, Eriŋa kenyouno, kamameun kane.”"
Psalms40:1 Abu kedareununei EJAKAIT katitiŋikinit; Ketoik ŋesi eoŋ akit kopup akaimony.
Psalms40:2 Ido kalem kaipany naka amudiario, Kotoma orit loiminai; Kibwaik akakeje atiiba, Kiticat akalosit."
Psalms40:3 Epikaki ekosio lokitetet aitukuka, ŋes aiturit Edekewok: Eanyunete luipu, koyonata, Komunokinos EJAKAIT."
Psalms40:4 Isirereŋitoi ituŋanan yenemuno EJAKAIT, Yenimam ibwaikinit aibuses luiwoŋoko, Karaida luepaarete aiŋal."
Psalms40:5 Wu EJAKAIT Ekadeke, ipu aswamisio nukaumokin nuibu kiswama, Ka aomisiokon nuejaas mamakosi; Mam epedorete aitemokin kamakon; Arai akoto alimor ka einer kes, Ipu mam imarunos,"
Psalms40:6 Mam isiyalamikinit asubanit ka ainakinet; Ipuko akaki; Mam ibu kokoto ainakinet naicweio, Karaida ainakinet naka adiakaret."
Psalms40:7 Kasodi kener ebe, “Koany, abu eoŋ; Ewadikatai nukaŋ oitabo lonunuko:"
Psalms40:8 Wu Ekadeke, esiyalamikinit eoŋ aswam nuikoto ijo, Eebo, ejaas ikonikisila otauka.”"
Psalms40:9 Alimonok adolit kotoma atukot naepol; Koany, mam etubutanari akaituk, Wu EJAKAIT, ijeni ijo,"
Psalms40:10 Mam ebwait akonidolit kotauka; Alimonok amunonutukon ka akoniitajar: Mam emunonit akonisianut-nakamin ka abeitekon kama ejai atukot naepol.
Psalms40:11 Wu EJAKAIT, sirikiimik eoŋ akoniitim naiyapaara; Kedarete tiritir akonisianut-nakamin ka akonibeit."
Psalms40:12 Naarai kerimorito nukaronok numam imarunos, Kadolokis numam adoliteka, ŋes mam apedoria asesen kuju; Epuata aitelekarit itim luka akouka, Eteg ekatau."
Psalms40:13 Wu EJAKAIT, kitojok ayuun eoŋ. Wu EJAKAIT, kiwonyuni aiŋarakin eoŋ,"
Psalms40:14 Kirumata ileic kimuarai kere Luemoete amudiar akaijar: Kinyakarai kau komwaŋai ŋul luisiyalamikinito eoŋ adumun aronis.
Psalms40:15 Kosilikis, kanuka ileicikec Lukesuanarete ebe, “Uus, Uus!”"
Psalms40:16 Kiyalamikinos kolakaros da kotomakon kere lukimoete: Kinerenenas tiritir lueminas akoniitajar ebe, “Kitopolooroi EJAKAIT!”"
Psalms40:17 Konye arai eoŋ lokican loelwaritoi da; Keitunit EJAKAIT eoŋ; ljo ekakenarakinan ido ekakayuunan; Sirikiyap, wu Ekadeke."
Psalms41:1 Isirerenitoi ŋin yeniitunit yenikican: Eyuuni EJAKAIT ŋes kapaaran naka aronis,"
Psalms41:2 Idarenenei EJAKAIT ŋes tetere ebusi, Ido isirereŋitoi kakwap; Sirikiinak ŋes mama ejaas lukasurupoke aiswamakin nuipudas."
Psalms41:3 Igaŋi EJAKAIT ŋes ilworuna koitada: Itemonokini ijo cut akeperit kedekakin.
Psalms41:4 Katema atiar, “Wu EJAKAIT, kitimoi: Kitaŋaleu ekatau; naarai adiaka kamakon.”"
Psalms41:5 Ineras lukasurupoka nueroko mamaka ebe, “Wori bo etwania, koolio ekekiror?”"
Psalms41:6 Naebunio ediopet aanyun eoŋ, inera aamameak; Etuki eketau numam edolito: Itatami da ŋun ilato."
Psalms41:7 Iyeiyeas lukalaito kere nepepe: Inerunete aiswamakin eoŋ aronis.
Psalms41:8 Ebalas ebe, “Adoiki adek nakaronon: Kwape do eperio mam bobo enyouni.”"
Psalms41:9 Eebo, epadicaka loabu kamuno, loanyamenenei akatap, Ketonyoiki aketitibat,"
Psalms41:10 Konye jo, wu EJAKAIT, kitimoi, kitonyounoi, Tetere enyaŋari."
Psalms41:11 Ŋes ajenunia ebe kisiyalamikinit eoŋ, Naarai mam Iokasurupika kepikorit."
Psalms41:12 Kigaŋit ijo eoŋ kotoma adoliteka, Kibwaikinit da akonyenekon apaarasia kere."
Psalms41:13 Kituritete EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, Ageun apeŋo aitodol ikar kere, Amen ka Amen."
Psalms42:1 Kwape iyeŋanakinor amiam kanuka akipi nuka aleles, Kwape kwaŋin iyeŋanakinor ekatau kanukon, wu Edeke."
Psalms42:2 Ejakit ekatau akur kanuka Edeke, kanuka Edeke lokajaran: Adoli wori ketaanyun kakonyen nuka Edeke?"
Psalms42:3 Araunos akakiyo ikanyamat paaran ka kuare, Nakeŋisiananata aitiwar akwap ebe,’ “Ai bo ejai Ekonideke?”"
Psalms42:4 Eituni akiro ŋun, abukokin ekatau toma, Nakiupar kekodet keŋarenikinite kes togo loka Edeke, Kiporotoi luka ailel ka aiturit, Etuŋ at loidari apaaran nakalaunan,"
Psalms42:5 Kanukinyo ilurio, wu etauka? Kanukinyo iyaloŋoŋnoo kotomaka? Komuno Edeke: naarai eturenenei ŋes, Kanuka aŋaleu naka akonyeneke."
Psalms42:6 Wu Ekadeke, alur ekatau kotomaka: ŋes keitunio kakwap naka Yorodan, Komoru da Kerumon, koukot loka Misar."
Psalms42:7 Ataro iworoi ataro kairurum naka akipikon nuibulubulas: Karapia eoŋ akalelekon ka akailanakon kere.
Psalms42:8 Konye icorakini EJAKAIT akesianut-nakamin paaran, Kuare da kijaun eoŋ kekekosio, ŋes ailip Edeke loka akaijar."
Psalms42:9 Eŋisi eoŋ Edeke atiibaka ebe, “Inyo bo kimurwokinia eoŋ? Inyo bo alosio ebworo Kanuka aroikinit naka lokasurup?”"
Psalms42:10 Kamoromoroete lukasurupoka bala ekileŋ loicumit akakojo; Nakeŋisiananata ebe, “Ai bo ejai Ekonideke?”"
Psalms42:11 Kanukinyo ilurio, wu etauka? Kanukinyo iyaloŋoŋoo kotomaka? Komuno Edeke, naarai eturenenei ŋes, Loerai aŋaleu naka akonyeneka, ka Ekadeke da."
Psalms43:1 Kotubokinai, wu Edeke, kopurokinai Kama ejai ateker namam eyonit Edeke: Kitajarai kama ejai ituŋanan yenikeŋalan Ka yenimam edolit,"
Psalms43:2 Naarai irai ijo Edeke loka akagogoŋ; Inyo bo kicakaria? Inyo bo alosio ebworo Kanuka aroikinit naka Iokasurup?
Psalms43:3 Okwe kijuk akoniica ka akonibeit; Keŋarenikis: Kayautu eoŋ morukon Iokalaunan, Owemaikon lukalaunak."
Psalms43:4 Kasodi alosit otem loka Edeke, Mama ejai Edeke aileleka namam itemio; Keturenenei kadeudeu, wu Edeke, Ekadeke."
Psalms43:5 Kanukinyo ilurio, wu etauka? Kanukinyo iyaloŋoŋoo kotomaka? Komuno Edeke: naarai eturenenei ŋes, Loerai aŋaleu naka akonyeneka, ka Ekadeke da."
Psalms44:1 Kipou keirasi kakosiki, wu Edeke, Apotu lukapapaakosi kolimonokis sio, Aswamisinei nukiswamaenenei kapaarasiakec, Kapaarasia nukolosek."
Psalms44:2 Ibu kireŋea atekerin kakonikan, kiraik kes: Ibu kitican ituŋa, kisiarisiar kes."
Psalms44:3 Naarai mam erumete akwap kanuka ekilenikec, Karaida akecekan mere ŋes etajari kes: Dimarai akonikan nakoteten, ka aica naka akonyenekon, Naarai ibu komina kes."
Psalms44:4 Irai ijo Ekakabaka, wu Edeke: Kicorak aitajar kanuka Yakob."
Psalms44:5 Kiremori lukasurupokosi kanukon: Kicakacakai ŋul lukinyoikinete sio kanuka ekonikiror.
Psalms44:6 Naarai mam amuno akakabwa, Ekakileŋ da mere ŋes ketajari eoŋ."
Psalms44:7 Konye ibu ijo kitajar sio kama kalukasurupokosi, Ibu kisurum ŋul lukilaito sio ileic."
Psalms44:8 Toma Edeke kitureneneo aitiwar akwap; Kimalaenenei ekonikiror ikar kere.
Psalms44:9 Konye natikwana kicaka ijo sio, kitisil; Kwabo mam iupanaros kajoresiokosi."
Psalms44:10 Kinyaki sio kau kaneejaas lukasurupokosi; Enaŋete ŋul lukilaito sio kanukec,"
Psalms44:11 Ibu kituluo sio bala imerekekin lueseunitai ainyam; Ibu kisiarak sio toma atekerin.
Psalms44:12 Igwelari ikonituŋa atai, Komam idumunit ameda kotiaikec."
Psalms44:13 Kituluo sio amorosit kama ejaas iidunyetakosi, Lukisekelio ka lukisuanara kama ejaas ŋul lukirimorito."
Psalms44:14 Kituluo iwaraga kotoma atekerin, Ikimuŋumuŋes akwes kotuŋa."
Psalms44:15 Ejai aitisilioka akonyeneka aitiwar akwap, Adakar akakou,"
Psalms44:16 Kanuka eporoto loka yenimoromoroi ka yeneinyanakini; Kanuka lokasurup ka lokenyaŋan da,"
Psalms44:17 Kidolokis ŋun kere; konye mam sio kimurwokinit jo, Kwabo mam sio kiŋalat kotoma aitutuketekon."
Psalms44:18 Mam ikositauon eboŋorito kau, Karaida akosikejen mam epaarito korotokon;"
Psalms44:19 Karaida ibu kipicipic sio noi kaibois naka ikuwei, Ibu kiteribo sio ketoribe loka atwanare."
Psalms44:20 Arai kimurwokinit isio ekiror loka Edekekosi, Arai kiiriorit akosikanin mama ejai edeke logela;"
Psalms44:21 Mam kereka Edeke eŋicuni ŋun? Naarai ejeni aiyeiyea nakotau.
Psalms44:22 Eebo, kanukon kiario aitiwar akwap; Kimario bala imerekekin lutubutubo."
Psalms44:23 Kokweny! Kanukinyo ijotoo, wu EJAKAIT? Konyou! Sirikiicaka ikar kere."
Psalms44:24 Kanukinyo ibwaia akonikonyen, Kimurwok aiticanitoikosi ka aroikiniokosi?"
Psalms44:25 Naarai aluroosi ikositauon toma apua; Eminaikinos akosikoikes alup.
Psalms44:26 Konyou kiŋarakinai, Kolakunai sio kanuka akonisianut-nakamin."
Psalms45:1 Ilapanar akirot naejok kotauka; Enera akiro nuapeleu nuka ekabaka: Aŋajepeka ŋes ekalamu loka ekewadikan loekapakina.
Psalms45:2 Itemelel ijo aitelekarit idwe luka ituŋa; Ebukokinitai asianut aitukukon: ŋes kisirereŋio Edeke jo ikar kere.
Psalms45:3 Koenik ekonikileŋ otul, ijo ekagogoŋon, Koen akoniibuses ka apoloukon."
Psalms45:4 Kibwanen kapoloukon kipiko, Kanuka abeit ka aitasono ka adolit: Akonikan da nakoteten kisisianakini jo akiro nusogim."
Psalms45:5 Eitak ikonikojoi: Ibironoros ituŋa kakonyenekon; Ejaas ikonikojoi otauon luka lukasurupo luka ekabaka.
Psalms45:6 Ejaenena ekoniicoloŋ loka ajakanut ikar kere, wu Edeke: Ebela lokadolit ŋes ebela laka ajakanutukon."
Psalms45:7 Imina adolit, ilait aronis: Tape Edeke, Ekonideke, kinyonyoikini jo Akinyet naka aiyalama aitelekarit lucekon."
Psalms45:8 Eurok ikoninapen kere sa luesaete, icicikwa, ka ekasia; Kisiyalamikinito jo iraman luka aputio Kotoma otogoi luka ekabaka luka ikel luka etom."
Psalms45:9 Ejaas adwe nuka ikabakan toma aŋorokon nukaibuses: Ebwoi akabaka kakanikon nakoteten enapit esabu loka Opir.
Psalms45:10 Kiira, ijo apese, koomoom, kitoik akitikon: Kimurwokis ituŋakon, ka ekal laka papakon."
Psalms45:11 Ŋes do imielakinor ekabaka akonitemelel: Naarai ŋes ekonijakait; komaenenei ŋes.
Psalms45:12 Ebuni da apese naka Turo kainakinet; Iŋaiŋaete lukabarak kotuŋa akonimin.
Psalms45:13 Erai akoku naka ekabaka naibus kotoma ore loka ekabaka: Esonyitai inapeneke kesabu.
Psalms45:14 Eyaŋaunio mama ejai ekabaka enapit lueculuculo: Eyaŋaunio neijai ijo Abekon nukaupake nuetupitos.
Psalms45:15 Eyaŋaunio kaiyalama ka ailel: Elomarete togo loka ekabaka.
Psalms45:16 Aibois naka lukapapakon ejaunos ikonidwe, Luituluori ijaka kakwap kere."
Psalms45:17 Esiitununei aturio kere ekonikiror; ŋes kimalaeneneata jo ituŋa ikar kere.
Psalms46:1 Edeke ŋes neekerianarawok, ka agogoŋuwok, Ekeŋarakinan lokirurukit noi kotoma ocan."
Psalms46:2 Ŋes mam kikuriakaror, karaida kijulakin akwap, Karaida keukonoros iroŋan kidiŋ aŋololin:"
Psalms46:3 Karaida kirurumata akip kiluŋuluŋanaros, Karaida kemaranata iroŋan kanuka adakununukec,"
Psalms46:4 Ejai nen ecor, italakarete iciletake ere loka Edeke, Aibois nakalaunan naka iweman luka ŋol loejai kuju kakuj."
Psalms46:5 Ejai Edeke kidinike; mam eukun: Iŋarakini Edeke ŋes tupuruc sek,"
Psalms46:6 Erurumata atekerin, aukonoros ajakanuto; Kelimo ekeporoto, kocalar akwap."
Psalms46:7 Ejai EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kaoni; Edeke loka Yakob ŋes neekerianarawok.
Psalms46:8 Kopotu, koanyut aswamisio nuka EJAKAIT, Nukaumokin nueswamaki akwap."
Psalms46:9 Itasaŋi ijiisio kiton osaŋe loka akwap; Ebili akabwa, etubutubei akwaras; Icwei agalin kakim."
Psalms46:10 Kopalasi, kojenut ebe Eoŋ Edeke: Ketopoloonorio katekerin, Ketopoloonorio kakwap."
Psalms46:11 Ejai EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kaoni; Edeke loka Yakob ŋes neekerianarawok.
Psalms47:1 Kibapata akanin, yes ituŋa kere! Kibwoŋata mama ejai Edeke keporoto loka aipikor."
Psalms47:2 Naarai eyoŋitai EJAKAIT loejai kuju kakuj; ŋes Ekabaka lopeti kakwap kere.
Psalms47:3 Kitapatanikini oni ituŋa, Atekerin da akejewok."
Psalms47:4 Kiseikini oni airumetewok, Ajokis naka Yakob loamina ŋesi."
Psalms47:5 Adoka Edeke kecelet loka ailel, Adoka EJAKAIT keporoto loka arupepe,"
Psalms47:6 Koyooto aiturit Edeke, koyooto aiturit ŋes! Koyooto aiturit Ekabakawok, koyooto aiturit ŋes!"
Psalms47:7 Naarai Edeke ŋes Ekabaka loka akwap kere: Koyooto aiturit ŋes kaijen.
Psalms47:8 Irumit Edeke atekerin; Iboie Edeke koicoloŋoke Iokalaunan,"
Psalms47:9 Atukonokinos ijaka luka ituŋa Neejaas ituŋa luka Edeke laka Aburaam: Naarai ibukui luka akwap eraas luka Edeke; Itopolooritai ŋes noi.
Psalms48:1 Epol EJAKAIT, ibusakinit aiturio noi, Kotoma ore loka Edekewok, koroŋatake lokalaunan."
Psalms48:2 Ejokuna aiceleleke, ailel naka akwap kere, ŋes emoru Sion, kari naka agolitomei, Ere loka Ekabaka lokapolon."
Psalms48:3 Etejenun Edeke kotogoike lukapolok Ebe Erai neekerianara.
Psalms48:4 Naarai koany, apotu ikabakan kotukonokinos, Kotuboros nepepe."
Psalms48:5 Apotu koanyut, kosodete aumokin; Kiyaloŋoŋoto, kiwonyasi,"
Psalms48:6 Komaranata kanen; Koriebasi bala aberu naerieb aidoun.
Psalms48:7 Ekwam lokokide ŋes ibilibilia ameerin nuka Tarusis,"
Psalms48:8 Kwape kipupunio, kianyu kwape kwaŋin Kore loka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Kore loka Edekewok: lticasi Edeke ŋes ikar kere."
Psalms48:9 Wu Edeke, kiwoomoom isio akonisianut-nakamin, Kokidiŋ oyekalukon."
Psalms48:10 Wu Edeke, kwape ejaar ekonikiror, Ejai kwape kwaŋin akoniiturit aitodol osaŋe loka akwap: Ileleba akonikan nakoteten adolit."
Psalms48:11 Kolakar emoru Sion, Kolelata adwe nuka Yuda, Kanuka itubesiakon."
Psalms48:12 Aso kirimosi Sion, kimanimanata, Kimarata itogoike lukaojak."
Psalms48:13 Kirereoto arwatatinike, Koomoomata nuka itogoike lukapolok; Tetere itatamanakinete atur naetupakini."
Psalms48:14 Naarai Edeke ŋol erai Edekewok ikar lumam enaŋete: Erai ekeŋarenikinoniwok aitodol atwanare.
Psalms49:1 Kiirasi nu, yes atekerin kere; Kitoikisi aki, yes kere luiboienenete kakwap:"
Psalms49:2 Imukopin ka lukapolok, Lukabarak ka lukibakor kere nepepe."
Psalms49:3 Inerenena akaituk nuka acoa; Eomoomoenenei ekatau nuka aijen.
Psalms49:4 Etoikini akakit apupun awarag: Ekujuni kadeudeu akakirot naemunonit.
Psalms49:5 Inyo bo akurianar kotoma apaarasia nuka aronis, Nakerigaunitor amamus adolit atitibanaka?"
Psalms49:6 Luemunos abarakec, Koomiara kanuka aipues naka abarakec."
Psalms49:7 Emamei kaŋul yenepedori alakun onaceke nepetai da, Karaida ainakin Edeke lugelis ŋes:"
Psalms49:8 (Naarai eiliilete akais nuka alakun akeceilar, Ibusakinit ainyeinio ikar kere.)"
Psalms49:9 Tetere ebusi ikar kere, Komam ebosi."
Psalms49:10 Naarai eanyuni ebe etwakete lukacoa, Yenibaŋ ka yenesubit etiaŋ eoliorete kere nepepe, Inyeiniata da ice akecebar,"
Psalms49:11 Eomitos kotauonokec Ebe Ejaenenas ikecetogoi apaarasia kere Aiboisiokec da enatarete aturio kere: Emaanakinete akecekwapin ikiroriakec kikulepek.
Psalms49:12 Konye mam ebusenenei etuŋanan kayoŋio: Esubit bala itiaŋ lueoliorete.
Psalms49:13 Ekecerot ŋol ŋes akecebaŋaanut: Konye ituŋa luetupakinete kes itojokete akecekiro.
Psalms49:14 Elomarete Okatwak bala amerekekin; Eraun atwanare ekecokonikec: Eyaenenete luetenito kes kiwala akwap; Eraun aputokec nailikorio kokatwak, Tetere emameikini aibois."
Psalms49:15 Konye elakuni Edeke akaijar kotoma agogoŋ naka Okatwak: Naarai ŋes kesukunyikini.
Psalms49:16 Siriyoŋenenei etuŋanan kebar, Kiyatakin aibuses naka eketogo:"
Psalms49:17 Naarai naetwania mam eyaŋaari imodiobore; Mam akeibuses etupari ŋes.
Psalms49:18 Karaida abu konyarite akeijar nakarereŋ naariŋar ejari, Ido kiturito ituŋa jo naiswamanakinor nukajokak,"
Psalms49:19 Elosi ŋesi neejai atur naka lukapapaake; Mam eanyunete bobo aica.
Psalms49:20 Ituŋanan yenejai aibuses komamei aijen, Esubit bala itiaŋ lueoliorete."
Psalms50:1 Edeke, ŋes Edeke, EJAKAIT, ener, Anyara akwap anyoun kaneelomunia akoloŋ Aitodol neelomaria bobo."
Psalms50:2 Anyoun koSion, ajokis naedolit, Eliyau Edeke."
Psalms50:3 Ebunit Ewokodeke, mam Ililiŋi: Enyami akim koiŋareneke, Irimorito ŋes ikwamin lueiliilete."
Psalms50:4 Iworoi akuj kokuju, Akwap da, tetere etubokini iketuŋa;"
Psalms50:5 Kotukonokisi lukalaunakaka nealai; ŋul luetutukete keoŋ aitutuket kasubanit.
Psalms50:6 Elimonokini akuj akedolit; Naarai Edeke elopet ŋes ekatubon.
Psalms50:7 “Kiirasi, okwe ikatwa, kener eoŋ: Ijo Isirael, ketejenuni jo: Arai eoŋ Edeke, Ekonideke."
Psalms50:8 Mam ketoroni kanuka asubanakon; Ejaas ainakinetakon nuicweio akonyeneka tiritir.
Psalms50:9 Mam alemuni emoŋ lotobait kotogokon, Karaida ikorwa lumaseniko kosipaninikon."
Psalms50:10 Naarai iŋolitiaŋ loka amagoro erai lokaŋ, Ka ibaren luejaas koukono ilukumin."
Psalms50:11 Ajeni akweny kere nukoroŋan: Ka itiaŋ da luka ais eraas lukaŋ.
Psalms50:12 Arai kaariebi eteŋei, timam kalimok jo: Naarai erai akwap nakaŋ, ka ailelebake."
Psalms50:13 Anyamenenei kereka eoŋ akirig naka imoŋin lumaseniko? Arai amasenenei kereka eoŋ aokot nuka ikorwa?
Psalms50:14 Koinanakinenei Edeke asubanit naka aimal: Kitodolenenei akoniiyaposio mama ejai ŋol loejai kuju kakuj:
Psalms50:15 Ido kiworoununei eoŋ kapaarasia nuka ican; Kayuuni jo, kitopoloori ijo da eoŋ.”"
Psalms50:16 Konye ebala Edeke yenikaronon ebe, “Ipodo inyo alimonokin akaicorakineta, Aitwasam da akaitutuket kaitukukon?"
Psalms50:17 Naarai isacit aituutoorio, Icakanari da akakiro kaukon."
Psalms50:18 Naianyunia ekokolan, ibu koupakinos kaŋes, Ido kimorikikinos kidotea."
Psalms50:19 Itacamikinit akoniituk einer aronis, Inera da akoniŋaiep nuka aiŋal.’"
Psalms50:20 Iboie komoromoroi onacekon; Ido isabanakini okoku loka totokon.
Psalms50:21 Ibu kiswamaenenei ŋun, keliliŋi eoŋ; Koomite ebe opaputokon cut eoŋ: Konye ketoroni jo, eterereikini kes akonyenekon."
Psalms50:22 Aso do kiitutu nu, yes lukimurwokis Edeke, Kenye apoopo yes, komameun yenikiyuuni;"
Psalms50:23 Yeneinakini asubanit naka aimal, ketopoloori eoŋ: ŋin da yenitemokini ekerot Etodikini eoŋ ŋes aitajar naka Bdeke.”"
Psalms51:1 Kitimoi, wu Edeke, kwape ejaar akonisianut-nakamin: Komwata apaanaretaka kwape ejaar aipues naka aitimesiakon,"
Psalms51:2 Kiloŋarai eoŋ cut numam adoliteka, Kitesegarai da akadiakar."
Psalms51:3 Naarai ajeni eoŋ apaanaretaka: Akadiakar da ejai duc akonyeneka,"
Psalms51:4 Adiaka eoŋ kaneijai jo bon, Eswama nukaronok kakonyenekon: Tetere kitojokio jo nainerar, Kosegara naitubio."
Psalms51:5 Koany, toma numam adolit ŋes kauriere: Toma adiakar da ŋes kapotuunio totoka,"
Psalms51:6 Koany, imiela ijo abeit kotoma atutubeta nukotoma: Kitejenuni ijo eoŋ acoa kotoma atutubet naibwaa."
Psalms51:7 Kidetarai kesop, alauni eoŋ da: Kiloŋai, kakwaŋu aitelekarit akile."
Psalms51:8 Kisiirarai alakara ka aiyalama; Tetere iyalamikinos akojo nuibu kobil.
Psalms51:9 Kibwa akonyenekon kinyeis aanyun adiakanaretaka, Komwata numam adoliteka kere."
Psalms51:10 Kosubakinai etau loelai, wu Edeke; Kibwaikinai emoyo lokitetet loetenit tomakaŋ."
Psalms51:11 Sirikiicaka kakonyenekon; Sirikilema ekonimoyo lokalaunan kamakaŋ,"
Psalms51:12 Kinyakakinai alakara naka aitalarakon: Kigaŋai eoŋ kemoyo loka asianut.
Psalms51:13 “Kasodi aisisianakin ikapaanarak ikoniponesio; Ibeleunos do ikadiakanarak mamakon.
Psalms51:14 Wu Edeke, koyuunai kotoma akirot naagwaunit naka aokot, Ijo Edeke loka aitajaraka; Ikalalai akaŋajep ayoore akonidolit."
Psalms51:15 Wu EJAKAIT, kitooŋa akaituk; Itodiari akaituk akoniiturio."
Psalms51:16 Naarai mam isiyalamikinit asubanit; tikainak: Mam da itojokit ainakinet naicweio.
Psalms51:17 Asubanit naka Edeke ŋes emoyo loebilil: Wu Edeke, mam imeni etau loebilil loisilarit."
Psalms51:18 Kiswamak Sion ejok kakotekon naejok; Koduk ijo arwatatin nuka Yerusalem.
Psalms51:19 Kosodi ijo aisiyalamikin asuban nuka adolit, Ainakinet naicweio ka ainakinet napeot; Kosodete kesi ainakin imoŋin lutobai kotemukon."
Psalms52:1 Kanukinyo iwolobobotor kotoma ameŋeranut, ijo ekagogoŋon? Ejaenena aitim naka Edeke tiritir."
Psalms52:2 Itetemonori akoniŋalep nukaronok; Iswamai nuka aiŋal kwape kebarenit loekwana.
Psalms52:3 Imina aronis adepar ajokis; Ka aiŋal da adepar einer nuka adolit.
Psalms52:4 Imina akiro kere nuisiriebete, Okwe ijo aŋajep nakeŋalan,"
Psalms52:5 Kimudiari Edeke jo ikar kere, Kidakuni jo, kiwurupuuni jo kowemakon, Kirutuni anyoun kakwap naka lukajarak."
Psalms52:6 Eanyunete da ikadolitok, eyoŋete, Ekienatatar kinerasi ebe,"
Psalms52:7 “Koany, etikesa lo ŋes lomam abu kitarau Edeke akegogoŋ: Konye komunokin akebar naepol, Kiketakin kotoma aronisike.”"
Psalms52:8 Konye asubit eoŋ bala eseituni Loelibilibi kotogo loka Edeke: Amuno aitim naka Edeke ikar lumam enaŋete,"
Psalms52:9 Kemalaenenei jo apaarasia kere, naarai ibu kosub: Edareununei ekonikiror, naarai ejokuna, Kakonyen nuka lukalaunakakon,"
Psalms53:1 Atema ibaŋ kotauke ebe, “Emamei Edeke.” Abosata, eswamata aronis naketal; Emamei yeniswamai nuejok."
Psalms53:2 Abu Edeke kosesen kotoma akuj idwe luka ituŋa, Aanyun arai kejaas ice kakesi luajenete, Luamoete Edeke."
Psalms53:3 Aboŋo ŋinituŋanan kakesi kau: asiliakata kere; Emamei yeniswamai nuejok, emamei idio da,"
Psalms53:4 Emamei kereka lukeswamak numam edolito aijen? Luenyamete ikatuŋa kwape enyamiata atap, Ido mam iwoneete Edeke."
Psalms53:5 Apotu kokuriakata noi kanen, kaneamamei akurian: Naarai esiarisiar Edeke akojo nuka ŋin kayenidukurit asurokin jo; Isurum kes ileic, naarai aŋer Edeke kes."
Psalms53:6 Arai kebunit aitajario naka Isirael koSion! Nainyakunia Edeke iketuŋa lueŋataritai, Elakar do Yakob, iyalamikin Isirael."
Psalms54:1 Kitajarai, wu Edeke, kanuka ekonikiror, Kotubokinai kagogoŋukon."
Psalms54:2 Wu Edeke, kiira akailip; Kitoik akit akiro nuka aitukuka."
Psalms54:3 Naarai kanyoikis imo, Emoete ikadedeŋak akaijar: Mam ibwaikinito Edeke akonyenekec,"
Psalms54:4 Koany, Edeke ŋes ekakeŋarakinan: Ejai EJAKAIT nepepe kaŋul kaluigaŋito akaijar."
Psalms54:5 Itoboŋikini aronis neejaas lukasurupoka: Komudia ijo kes kotoma abeitekon.
Psalms54:6 Kainakini jo ainakinet nakakote: Wu EJAKAIT, emalaenenei ekonikiror, naarai ejokuna."
Psalms54:7 Naarai kayuu kotoma ocan kere; Asesen da akakoŋu nuakotor lukasurupoka.
Psalms55:1 Wu Edeke, kitoik akit akailip, Kwabo sirikiŋopik akaiŋaiŋa."
Psalms55:2 Koŋolearai, koboŋokinoi: Elolitoi eoŋ kaŋurianaka, edinyil da;"
Psalms55:3 Kanuka eporoto loka lokasurup, Kanuka aroikinit naka ikaronok; Naarai kacakanakis numam edolito, Ido kerigaete kanyunyura."
Psalms55:4 Kariebi etau noi kotomaka: Kadoiki da etasuro loka atwanare.
Psalms55:5 Kadoloki arieŋun ka amaran, Kaunia akurian."
Psalms55:6 Kasodi eoŋ ebe, “Arai kiija kabebenoka nuka ajelei Tikaporoo, kalot keyen,"
Psalms55:7 Koany, tikapaa neelwana, Tikaper modiŋ."
Psalms55:8 Tikadiŋirir nemecat Ikwamin ka akiru naepol.”
Psalms55:9 Komudia, wu EJAKAIT, kotiakatiak akecenalepa: Naarai aany adedeŋ ka eŋuŋet kore."
Psalms55:10 Edapadapata karwatatin paaran ka kuare aswam ŋun: Ido nepenen ejaas numam adolit ka ameŋeranut,"
Psalms55:11 Nepenen da ejaas nukaronok: Mam aroikinit ka emodit enyounete korotinike.
Psalms55:12 Naarai mere lokasurup kamoromoroi; Tikapedo atitiŋikin: Mere iŋopeŋol lokalait loitopolooro bon aluikin eoŋ: Tikaŋopik.
Psalms55:13 Konye ijo, etuŋanan oparianaka, Opaperoka, opadieaka loanaikinit noi."
Psalms55:14 Kipou kenerununete nepepe kaiyalama, Kipou kalosenenete kotogo loka Edeke kikodeta."
Psalms55:15 Koŋesa kes atwanare, Kodokasi Okatwak ejarete: Naarai ejai aronis otogoikec, kokidiijikec."
Psalms55:16 Ewonenenei eoŋ elopet Edeke; Ido ketajarenenei EJAKAIT.
Psalms55:17 Eboŋ ka atupuruc, kokidiŋ paaran da, Aŋuriani, edinya da: Iiranari ŋesi da ekaporoto,"
Psalms55:18 Abu kolaku akaijar kotoma ainapakin Kojie lokasurokinitere: Naarai epu luketijiete eoŋ.
Psalms55:19 Iirari Edeke, eboŋokini kes, Ŋes ŋol loebusi ameun apeŋo, Ŋul lumam ijulakinos, Lumam eyoŋete Edeke."
Psalms55:20 Ario akekanin mama ejaas ŋul luenapapaete kaŋes: Abu kobil akeitutuket.
Psalms55:21 Ajijim akeituk bala akinyet, Konye kojio eketau: Kononok akekiro aitelekarit akinyet, Konye koraas ikileŋa lueutunitoi."
Psalms55:22 Kowoik EJAKAIT alaŋirukon, Ŋes da kigaŋununei jo: Mam ecamakinit ikadolitok aijananario,"
Psalms55:23 Konye jo, wu Edeke, itodokari kes toma aipany naka amudiario: Ikaarak ka ikeŋalak mam ebusete adaun atutubet naka apaarasiakec; Konye eoŋ kamunoneno jo"
Psalms56:1 Kitimoi, wu Edeke; naarai kakotosi ituŋa ailikor eoŋ: Itiwarete akwap ejios aroikinit eoŋ."
Psalms56:2 Ekotosi lukasurupoka ailik eoŋ aitiwar akwap: Naarai ipu luketijiete kaiwoŋonut.
Psalms56:3 Apaaran naakurianar eoŋ, Kamunoneno jo."
Psalms56:4 Mama ejai Edeke ŋes etureneneo akekirot: Amunokina Edeke, mam akurianar; Keswamakini ituŋanan eoŋ inyo?"
Psalms56:5 Iloconokinete akakiro aitiwar akwap; Kaluikinitos akeceomisio kere aiswamakin eoŋ aronis.
Psalms56:6 Etukonokinos, eŋopete, Irereete ikakukut, Kwape edariata ekatau."
Psalms56:7 Ekuete kereka kanuka numam adolit? Wu Edeke, kibiro ituŋa kanyunyura!"
Psalms56:8 Imari ijo akairimeta: Kibwaik akakiyo acupakon: Emameete kereka koitabokon?
Psalms56:9 Kosodete lukasurupoka aboŋor kau Kapaaran naeworoo: Ajeni na ebe, ejai Edeke keoŋ."
Psalms56:10 Mama ejai Edeke ŋes etureneneo akekirot: Mama ejai EJAKAIT ŋes etureneneo akekirot.
Psalms56:11 Amunokina Edeke, mam akurianar; Keswamakini ituŋanan eoŋ inyo?"
Psalms56:12 Akoniiyaposio ejaas keoŋ, wu Edeke: Kejaikini jo ainakineta nuka aimal."
Psalms56:13 Naarai ibu koyu akaijar kinyek atwanare: Mam kereka ibu koyu akakeje kinyeis aiguikin? Tetere alosenenei kakonyen nuka Edeke Kotoma aica naka lukalarak,"
Psalms57:1 Kitimoi, wu Edeke, kitimoi; Naarai emecit ekatau mamakon: Eebo, toma otoribe loka abebenokakon ŋes amecenenei, Aitodol needaunotor aronisio nu."
Psalms57:2 Eworoi Edeke loejai kuju kakuj; Edeke lokeswamaki kere.
Psalms57:3 Ŋukuni kokuju, ketajar, Karat iŋol lokakoto ailikor eoŋ; ljukuni Edeke akeitim ka akebeit."
Psalms57:4 Ejai akaijar kidiŋ oŋatunyo; Aperi kidiŋ kaŋul kaluenokete, Kes idwe luka ituŋa, ikecekel kes akwaras ka imalia, Akeceŋalepa da kes ikileŋa luekwaka."
Psalms57:5 Kitopoloor ijo, wu Edeke, kokuju kakuj! Kojau akoniibuses da kuju kakwap kere."
Psalms57:6 Etemonokis eboi akejeneka; Alur akaijar: Abokikis aipany orotoka; Ebirokinos kes ikulepek kidiŋike.
Psalms57:7 Ecat etauka, wu Edeke, ecat etauka: Ayei, eebo ayei aiturit."
Psalms57:8 Kokweny, ijo akaibuses! Kokwenyutu, esabuli ka adeudeu! Eoŋ elopet adilokini akwenyun."
Psalms57:9 Wu EJAKAIT, kemalai jo kotuŋa: Ayei aiturit jo katekerin."
Psalms57:10 Naarai epol akoniitim kiton akuj, Ka akonibeit da kiton odouon."
Psalms57:11 Kitopoloor ijo, wu Edeke, kokuju kakuj! Kojau akoniibuses da kuju kakwap kere!"
Psalms58:1 Ineras kereka yesi nuka adolit eililiŋa? Itubenenete kereka akiro nuka abeit, yes odwe luka ituŋa?"
Psalms58:2 Konye iswamaete yesi nueroko kotauonokus; Itemete epali loka akaninikus kotoma akwap.
Psalms58:3 Egelaros ikaronok ameun kakoik: Epaarete kesi ageun kaurunio, iŋalaete."
Psalms58:4 Eputos aisoritikec kaisorit naka emun: Esubitos bala emusaga lokimin loisikakini akekit:
Psalms58:5 Lomam iirari eporoto loka ikesupak, Karaida kisupata kacoa,"
Psalms58:6 Wu Edeke, kolokono ikel kotoma aitukekec; Wu EJAKAIT, kolokono cut itirikada luka iŋatunyo ludidik."
Psalms58:7 Kiliearos bala akipi nueleleete atipet: Naedeseikinia kikololke, koraut bala Iuetubutubo."
Psalms58:8 Koraut bala totokacelet nailiear komameun: Ido bala yenikijecuna yenika aberu yenimam eanyunit akoloŋ.
Psalms58:9 Eriŋa amotiikus italalamuna kokukwa, Eyaŋaari kes ketapipirio, luepalal ka luenokete kere."
Psalms58:10 Iyalamikin ikadoliton keanyu einyaŋane ŋol: Ilosi akekele kaokot nuka lukaronok.
Psalms58:11 Aso etemarete ituŋa ebe, “Abeit ejai ainakinet kanuka ikadolitok: Abeit ejai Edeke loetubi akiro nuka akwap.”"
Psalms59:1 Wu Ekadeke, koyuunai kama kalukasurupoka: Kikiarai kama kaŋul kalukanyoikinete."
Psalms59:2 Koyuunai kama kaŋul kaluiswamaete numam adolit, Kitajarai kama ejaas ikaarak."
Psalms59:3 Naarai koany, eperunito akaijar; Etukonokinos ikagogoŋok asurokin eoŋ: Mere kanuka apaarika, kwabo mere kanuka akadiakar, wu EJAKAIT."
Psalms59:4 Ekerete itemonokinos komam eoŋ ebucarit. Kokweny kiŋarak eoŋ, koany."
Psalms59:5 ljo, wu EJAKAIT Edeke loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael, Konyou aitican atekerin kere: Sirikitim ikapaanarak lueroko kere. Sela,"
Psalms59:6 Eboŋunete eboŋ, emonyete bala iŋokwo, Irimorete ere."
Psalms59:7 Koany, ijerasi kesi; Ekwaka aitukekec bala ekileŋ: Naarai ineras ebe, “Iŋai bo iirari?”"
Psalms59:8 Konye jo, wu EJAKAIT, ikienar kes; Isekelei atekerin kere."
Psalms59:9 Wu jo agogoŋuka, kedareununei jo: Naarai Edeke ŋes akaŋopis naicelelei."
Psalms59:10 Kenarenikini eoŋ Edeke loka akaitimio: Ketaanyununei Edeke nuemiela kama kalukasurupoka.
Psalms59:11 Sirikiar kes, kinyeis ikatuŋa aimurwokin: Kisiarisiar kagogoŋukon, kisurum ileic, Wu EJAKAIT, ekosibuku."
Psalms59:12 Kanuka aronis naka aitukekec, Ka akiro da nuka aŋalepakec, Kikamunai kanuka eiturikec, Ido kanuka nuineras nuka eilam ka aiŋal."
Psalms59:13 Komudia kanyunyura, Komudia kes, kinyeis bobo ajakut: Kojenut ebe irumit Edeke kotoma Yakob, Aitodol osaŋeta luka akwap."
Psalms59:14 Koboŋut eboŋ, emonyete bala iŋokwo, Irimorete ere."
Psalms59:15 Irimete amoot inyamat, Iwalakinete arai mam imonikinos,"
Psalms59:16 Konye eoŋ ayeenenei nuka agogoŋukon; Eebo, ayeenenei teni nuka akoniitim tupuruc: Naarai irai akaŋopis naicelelei, Amecis da kotoma apaaran naka icanika,"
Psalms59:17 Wu jo akagogoŋ, ayoonokini aiturit jo: Naarai Edeke ŋes akaŋopis naicelelei, Edeke loka akaitimio."
Psalms60:1 Wu Edeke, kicaka sio, kibilibil: Ibu konyunyurikin; okwe kinyakunai bobo."
Psalms60:2 Ibu kisimaran akwap; ibu kocil ŋes: Kiteteu neetiyanakina; naarai ijaŋijaŋa.
Psalms60:3 Ibu kitodik ikonituŋa nuetioko; Kitamat da sio ebino luka aigesitoi,"
Psalms60:4 Iinak ŋul lukiyoŋito jo emedera, Tetere itodiario ŋes kanuka abeit."
Psalms60:5 Tetere eyuunio iminanakon, Kitalar kakonikan nakoteten, koboŋokinoi."
Psalms60:6 Ener Edeke kotoma alauniteke ebe: “Ebwoŋakini; Atiaki Sekem, akori aditot naka Sukot."
Psalms60:7 Gilead akaŋ; Manase da akaŋ; Epuraim ŋes aigaet naka akouka; Yuda ŋes ekabela loka ajakanut.
Psalms60:8 Moab da ŋes akailoŋis; Edom ŋes acakakini akamukat: Ijo Pilisitia, kibwoŋ kanukaŋ.”"
Psalms60:9 Iŋai bo ketolomari ore Ioegogoŋ’ Iŋai bo keŋarenikini kiton Edom?
Psalms60:10 Wu Edeke, mam kereka kicaka ijo sio? Kwabo mam iupasi kalorekosi, wu Edeke."
Psalms60:11 Kiŋarakinai kama ejai lokasurup: Naarai aiŋarakin naka ituŋa emamei ajokis.
Psalms60:12 Kiswamai oni nuka atitiŋ kaiŋarakin naka Edeke: Naarai ŋol ŋes ipudapudai lukasurupowok.
Psalms61:1 Wu Edeke, kiira aimonyoka; Kopupok akailip."
Psalms61:2 Keworoi jo kosaŋe loka akwap, nakiilor ekatau: Kiŋarenikinoi aitodokar atiiba nakadeparit eoŋ kaojau."
Psalms61:3 Naarai irai ijo amecisika, Aŋopis naegogoŋ kama ejai lokasurup."
Psalms61:4 Eboienenei kowemakon lokalaunan ikar kere: Ameci kotoribe loka abebenokakon.
Psalms61:5 Naarai ijo, wu Edeke, iira aiyaposioka: Kiinak eoŋ airumet naka ŋul kalueyoŋete ekonikiror."
Psalms61:6 Iyatakini apaarasia nuka aijar naka ekabaka: Eraunos ikaruke bala aturio nuipu.
Psalms61:7 Iboienenei kakonyen nuka Edeke apaarasia kere: Okwe, kitemonok asianut-nakamin ka abeit, Tetere idarete ŋes."
Psalms61:8 Kwaŋin ayei aiturit ekonikiror apaarasia kere, Tetere etodolenenei ŋinipaaran aiyaposioka."
Psalms62:1 Idarit ekatau Edeke bon: Mamake ŋes ebunio akaitajario.
Psalms62:2 Ŋes bon akatiiba ka aitajarioka: Erai ŋes! aŋopisika naicelelei; mam eoŋ elaŋakini noi.
Psalms62:3 Itodolete ai asuronokin ituŋanan, Yes kere aiar ŋes, Bala arwatat naerii, bala abwas naijaŋijaŋa?"
Psalms62:4 Inerunete aitidisiar ŋes kaibusesuke; Isiyalamikinito kesi aiŋal. Ilipakinete arereŋ kaitukekec, Konye kikenos kotauonokec."
Psalms62:5 Ekatau, kidareununei Edeke bon; Naarai elomunit amunoka kamakeŋ."
Psalms62:6 Ŋes bon atiibaka, akaitajario da: Erai ŋesi aŋopisika naicelelei; Mam eoŋ elaŋakini."
Psalms62:7 Ejai akaitajario ka aibusesuka mama ejai Edeke: Atiiba naka agogoŋuka, ka amecisika, ejai neejai Edeke."
Psalms62:8 Komunosi ŋes apaarasia kere, yes ituŋa; Kobukokisi ikusitauon akonyeneke: Edeke ŋes amecisiwok."
Psalms62:9 Abeit ituŋa lumam aibuses eraas eiyeŋane, Ituŋa da luka aibuses eraas aiŋal: Ikiaros kuju kotoma aitemis; Ebenen kesi kere adepar eiyeŋane."
Psalms62:10 Sirimunos emwanit, Sirisosoloko kotoma aiŋat: Arai kiyatakin abar, sirikibwaikis ikusitauon tomake,"
Psalms62:11 Ener Edeke irwan atipet, Apup eoŋ da nu irwan aarei; Ebe Edeke ŋes elopet apedor:"
Psalms62:12 ljo, wu EJAKAIT, elopet aitim: Naarai itaeanakini ninitunanan kwape ejaar akeswam."
Psalms63:1 Wu Edeke, irai ijo Ekadeke; kadilokini aimo: Ejakit ekatau akure kanukon, imwit akakuan jo, Kotoma akwap naeonit nakailolony, naemameete akip."
Psalms63:2 Ŋes kasesenenia jo kotoma aibois nakalaunan, Aanyun akonipedor ka akoniibuses."
Psalms63:3 Naarai ejijim akonisianut-nakamin aitelekarit aijar; Kiturenenei jo aitukuka.
Psalms63:4 Kwaŋin kemalaenenei jo aroko ajari: Arionori akakanin okirorikon.
Psalms63:5 Isimonanakinio ekatau kwape imonikinor ituŋanan asumet ka atarion; Kiturenenei jo akaituk kaŋajep naiyalama.
Psalms63:6 Nakeitunio kaperitika, Naaomitor nukon kapakio nuakwenyunia kuare."
Psalms63:7 Naarai jo irai ekakeŋarakinan, Eyalamikin kotoribe loka abebenokakon."
Psalms63:8 Edunyit ekatau aibwapit jo: Kegaŋit akonikan nakoteten.
Psalms63:9 Konye ŋul luemoete amudiar akaijar Elosete kwap alup.
Psalms63:10 Einakinio mama ejai agogoŋ naka ekileŋ: Eraunos akorakinet naka ikuwei.
Psalms63:11 Konye elakara ekabaka kotoma Edeke: Iyalama ŋin yenelimit ŋes; Naarai itubutario aituke nuka ŋul kaluineras nuka aiŋal,"
Psalms64:1 Wu Edeke, kiiranari eporotoka, kotoma akadanakinika: Kidarenenei aijaraka kenyek akurianar yenikasurup."
Psalms64:2 Kisiŋopai eoŋ kama ejai ainerun nakaiyeiyea naka ikeswamak nukaronok; Kama ejai ecelet loka ikeswamak numam edolito.
Psalms64:3 Luepenata aŋajepekec kwape ekileŋ, Luetebeikis imaliakec, kes akiro nuedwarak:"
Psalms64:4 Tetere egumete ŋol loedoliorit toma aiboisio nukaiyeiyea: Eŋesarete aigum ŋes, komam ekuriaka."
Psalms64:5 Isidikete itauonokec kotoma ainerun aronis: Inerununete ailok iica kaiyeiyea; Kobalas ebe, “Iŋai eanyuni kes?”"
Psalms64:6 Emoete numam edolito; Kobalas ebe, “Kidau akukunyikin aimo noi.” Idul aomisioit nakotoma naka ŋinituŋanan ka etau da."
Psalms64:7 Konye egumi kes Edeke; Eŋesario aimusuŋ kemal.
Psalms64:8 Iguanakinos kwaŋin, idupori kes aŋajepekec: Kere lueanyunete kes imunumunete akwesikec."
Psalms64:9 Ekuriakaros ituŋa kere; Elimorete da aswam naka Edeke, Eomoomoete akeswamisio kacoa."
Psalms64:10 Iyalamikinos ikadolitok kotoma EJAKAIT, Emunokinos da ŋes; Iturete luitenara kotauon."
Psalms65:1 Wu Edeke kidarit jo aiturit koSion: Ido mamakon itodolenenere aiyaposit.
Psalms65:2 Wu jo loiirari ailip, Mamakon epote kere luejaas awat."
Psalms65:3 Ketelekasi eoŋ numam adolit: Iluci ijo aibucanaretakosi.
Psalms65:4 Isirereŋitoi ŋin yeniseuni ijo, ka aisukunyikin da, Tetere iboienenei kalaroikon: Kisimonikinio sio alokis naka ekonitog, Aibois nakalaunan naka eyekalukon."
Psalms65:5 Kotoma akiro nusogim kiboŋokini ijo sio kadolit, Wu Edeke loka aitajariokosi; Ijo loirai amun naka isaŋeta kere luka akwap, Ka naka ŋul da kaluelwaka luejaas aŋolol:"
Psalms65:6 ŋol loiticasi imor kakegogoŋ; Konapite apedor:
Psalms65:7 Loisinapikini airuruma naka aŋololin, airuruma naka akailanakec, Ka ecelet loka atekerin."
Psalms65:8 Ŋul da luiboiete kawasia naka akwap akuriakaros kanuka aanyunetakon: Iinakinit ijo elomune loka tupuruc ka loka atiboŋ alakera.
Psalms65:9 Ianyanari akwap, icocoi da, Itabari noi; Ecor loka Edeke ileleba akip: Itudumikini kes akima, Kidau aitemonokin akwap kwaŋin."
Psalms65:10 Icocoi noi alelesiake; Idipakini itutioke: Itonokoki kelimilim; Isirereŋi akebwaŋun.
Psalms65:11 Itorokini aboko naka ajokisikon okaru; Edoenenete ikonirotin atarion,"
Psalms65:12 Idonanakinos oronyia luka amodiŋ: Enapete iukon aiyalama.
Psalms65:13 Enapito ironyia isipanin; Akima da erapito aditon; Ikareete kanuka aiyalama, eyeete da,"
Psalms66:1 Kikare akwap kere kaiyalama mama ejai Edeke:
Psalms66:2 Koye nuka aibuses naka ekekiror: Kitubusik akeiturit.
Psalms66:3 Kolimok Edeke ebe, “Iŋosibibos ca ma akoniswamisio! Kanuka ailiil naka akonipedor kinonokikinete lukasurupokon."
Psalms66:4 Kimai jo akwap kere, Kiyeikinete; Eyeikinete ekonikiror."
Psalms66:5 Kopotu, koanyut aswamisio nuka Edeke; Inosibib ŋesi kotoma nuiswamakini idwe luka ituŋa,"
Psalms66:6 Abu kituluo aŋolol aonit; Apotu kitoroto ocor kakeje; Kanen kipou kalakaros kotomaken.
Psalms66:7 Irumit kakegogon ikar kere; Esesenete akekonyen atekerin: Kinyeis lukepali aitopoloor bonik.
Psalms66:8 Aso do yes ituŋa, kiturenenete Edekewok, Kisiirasi eporoto loka akeiturio:"
Psalms66:9 Ibwaikinit itauonowok toma aiiar, Mam isunupit akeiewok airiaŋiriaŋa,"
Psalms66:10 Naarai jo, wu Edeke, ibu kigimo sio: Ibu kililiau sio, kwape ililiaunere epuesa."
Psalms66:11 Ibu kitolomik sio oboi; Ibu koinak sio aigugunatoi naelanir kanabesikosi.
