Psalms66:12 Isibwaneni ituŋa kosodete aidok kakwesikosi; Kipou ketoro akim ka akipi da; Konye ibu kitolomik sio aibois naidilas iboro.
Psalms66:13 Alomuni togokon kasuban nuicweio, Katacakini jo aiyaposioka,"
Psalms66:14 Nuabu akaituk kiner, Ka nuabu akaŋajep kolim, nakaburunia."
Psalms66:15 Kainakini jo asuban nuicweio nuka kaluetarioko, Ka lukisupurununo luka imerekekin lumaseniko: Ainakini imoŋin lutoba ka akinei."
Psalms66:16 Kopotu, kiirasi, yes kere luiyonito Edeke, Kalimonokis nuabu ŋesi kiswamak ekatau,"
Psalms66:17 Abu keworo kakaituk, Kitopolooroi ŋes kakanaiep."
Psalms66:18 Arai aomit numam adolit kotauka, Mam EJAKAIT epupuni."
Psalms66:19 Konye abeit apupu Edeke; Eira eporoto loka akailip.
Psalms66:20 Kituritete Edeke, Lomam abu kirenea akailip, Kwabo mam kemikit akeitim,"
Psalms67:1 Kitimenenei Edeke oni, kitusulianyenenei da: Kitacaik oni akekonyen;"
Psalms67:2 Tetere ejenun ekonirot kakwap, Analeukon da naitajari kotoma atekerin kere."
Psalms67:3 Kiturito jo ituŋa, wu Edeke; Kiturito jo Ituŋa kere."
Psalms67:4 Kolakaros atekerin koyooto kaiyalama: Naarai itubokini ituŋa kadolit, Irumi atekerin kotoma akwap."
Psalms67:5 Kiturito jo ituŋa, wu Edeke: Kiturito jo ituŋa kere."
Psalms67:6 Ara akwap akemio: Edeke da, Edeke lopewok, kitusulianyi oni."
Psalms67:7 Kitusulianyi Edeke oni: Isaneta da kere luka akwap eyoŋete ŋes.
Psalms68:1 Konyou Edeke, kisiarakinos lukasurupoke; Ŋul da luelaito ŋes kokerata kamaken."
Psalms68:2 Kwape irenearere apuru, kirenea ijo da kes kwaŋin: Kwape ecalaror edipor kakim, Kooliosi ikaronok kwaŋin kakonyen nuka Edeke."
Psalms68:3 Konye kiyalamasi ikadolitok; Kibwoŋasi kakonyen nuka Edeke: Eebo, kolakaros kaiyalama,"
Psalms68:4 Koyeikisi Edeke, koyooto aiturit ekekiror: Kiswamaut erot loka ŋol kaloibwanenit kitorite amodiŋ; YAWE ŋes ekekiror; kibwonasi do kakonyeneke."
Psalms68:5 Edeke kotoma aiboisike nakalaunan, Ŋes papa loka ikokiok, ekeraban da loka apuserun."
Psalms68:6 Einakini Edeke obonipe ekal: Elaeuni lueenitai kaenis aitekeriana kes: Konye luipaliok iboiete kakwap naconit.
Psalms68:7 Wu Edeke, nakinarenikinitor ituŋakon, Naitoritor ijo amodiŋ:"
Psalms68:8 Abu akwap komaran, Kodaeun akuj kakonyen nuka Edeke: Komaran emoru je Sinai kakonyen nuka Edeke, Edeke loka Isirael."
Psalms68:9 Ŋo, wu Edeke, ibu kitetep akiru naepol, Kitogogon airumetekon naalolonyitor."
Psalms68:10 Abu ekodetekon kiboikin nen: Ŋo, wu Edeke, ibu kitemonok ajokisikon lukican."
Psalms68:11 Elimuni EJAKAIT akirot: Agor nuisiarakinete eemut eraas ajore naepol.
Psalms68:12 Ekerete ikabakan luka ajoresio, ekerete: ŋin da naesali ore ekori lunatuna."
Psalms68:13 Iperete kereka yesi osipanin luka amerekekin, Kwape kabebenoka nuka ajele nuerapara kepuesa, Ka akekopir nuejaas esabu loodos?"
Psalms68:14 Nakitisiarikinia Lokapedor kere ikabakan kanen, Kosubite bala akako naetepakini Salumon,"
Psalms68:15 Eronat Basan ŋes eronat loka Edeke; Eronat Basan ŋes eronat loeoja.
Psalms68:16 Yes ironan lukaojak, kanukinyo iteoto kekokote Erogat loakoto Edeke aiboikin? Eebo, iboienenei EJAKAIT kanen ikar kere."
Psalms68:17 Agalin nuka EJAKAIT kes alukumin akaisaarei, Kes alukumin nuka alukumin: Ejai EJAKAIT tomakee, kwape toma Sinai, aibois nakalaunan."
Psalms68:18 Idoka kuiu, iioreu ijoreunokon, Ŋau ijo ainakineta kotuna, Eebo, kama kaluipaliok da, tetere iboienenei EJAKAIT Edeke nepepe kakes."
Psalms68:19 Kituritete EJAKAIT: Loibwokenenei ŋinipaaran alagiruwok, ŋes Edeke loerai aitajariowok,"
Psalms68:20 Erai Edeke kamakosi Edeke lokayuununan; EJAKAIT YAWE ŋes elopet aitajar kotoma atwanare,"
Psalms68:21 Konye icumi Edeke akou naka lukasurupoke, Aipelor esiaduk loitatelooritai loka ginituŋanan yenedunyakinit agwaunun akiro."
Psalms68:22 Abala EJAKAIT ebe, “Enyakuni kes anyoun koBasan, Enyakuni kes anyoun katar naka aŋolol:"
Psalms68:23 Tetere idomakini akonikeju aokot, Tetere edumunete aŋaiepa nuka inokwokon akorakinetakec kama ejaas lukasurupokon.”"
Psalms68:24 Aanyut kesi alositokon, wu Edeke, Alosito nuka Ekadeke. Ekakabaka, ilomanari aibois nakalaunan."
Psalms68:25 Kiŋarenoto ikayook, kotupakis luetiŋito iboro lueruos, Kokidiŋ apesur nuiyekete isiman."
Psalms68:26 “Kituroto Edeke kotoma atukono, Ŋes EJAKAIT, yes luka atan naka Isirael.”"
Psalms68:27 Ejai Benyamin lodidi ekayaitonikee, Ikapolok luka Yuda ka aurianetekee, Ikapolok luka Sebulun, ka ikapolok luka Naputali."
Psalms68:28 Ecoraki Edekekon akonigogoŋ: Kitogogoŋ, wu Elieke, nuibu ijo kiswamak sio."
Psalms68:29 Kanuka eyekalukon loejai Yerusalem Ŋes kiinuniata ikabakan jo ainakineta.
Psalms68:30 Kitoron etiaŋ lokotoma osege, Ekodet loka imerukwai ka itak luka ituŋa, Ipudapudai kakeje atutubeta nuka epuesa; Esiarisiar ituŋa luelelakinitos ejie,"
Psalms68:31 Elomunete ikapolok koMisiri; Isunyakini Etiopia arior akekanin mama ejai Edeke.
Psalms68:32 Koyeikisi Edeke, yes ajakanuto nuka akwapin; Koyooto aiturit EJAKAIT;"
Psalms68:33 Mama kaŋol kaloibwanenit akuj naka akuj, nakejai ageun apeŋo; Koany, inera keporotoke, eporoto lokagogoŋ."
Psalms68:34 Koinakisi Edeke agogoŋ, Irumit akejokis Isirael, Akegogoŋ da ejai toma akuj."
Psalms68:35 Wu Edeke, iŋosibib ijo kotoma aiboisiokon nukalaunak: Edeke loka Isirael, ŋes ekori agogoŋ ka apedor mama ejaas ituŋake, Kituritete Edeke!"
Psalms69:1 Wu Edeke, kitajarai: Naarai alomasi akip kiton otauka,"
Psalms69:2 Kepok erit loidul, nemam ipedoria abwoia: Adolok atar, nekelikoria akalele."
Psalms69:3 Kapas akaimony; aono ekaporoto: Eriokuut akakonye naedaritor Ekadeke.
Psalms69:4 Ipu ŋul lukalaito atai edeparito itim luka akouka: Ŋul luekotos aicutar eoŋ, Lukasurupoka kanuka aiŋal, eraas ikagogoŋok: Kasodi kenyakak lumam aŋatarit,"
Psalms69:5 Wu Edeke, ijeni akabaŋaanut; Mam akadiakanareta imunonitai kamakon,"
Psalms69:6 Kinyeis ŋul lukidareunito jo aileicikin kanukaŋ, Wu EJAKAIT Edeke loka ajoresio: Kinyeis ŋul lukimoete jo aitisilio kanukaŋ, Wu Edeke loka Isirael."
Psalms69:7 Naarai apotu kamoromoroto eoŋ kanukon; Kodakar akakou.
Psalms69:8 Araun emoit koinaeanaka, Eloŋwait kodwe luka tntoka."
Psalms69:9 Naarai kaari ekokote loka ekonitogo; Kebirokinos amorosito nuka ŋul kalukimoromoroete jo.
Psalms69:10 Naamonyia, ido kaleeo ekatau ketenei, ŋun kes kamoromoroere."
Psalms69:11 Naanapia epuko, Karau egaraea kama ejaas."
Psalms69:12 Kinerasi ŋul lueboiete korutei nukan; Arai eoŋ ekosio loka ikamerak.
Psalms69:13 Konye kanukan, akailip ejai neijai ijo, wu EJAKAIT, kapak nakacamunio: Wu Edeke, kotoma aitimikon naepol, Kobonokinoi kotoma abeit naka akoniitajar."
Psalms69:14 Koyuunai kotoma orit, kenyek alumor: Kayuun kama ejaas lukalaito, kataro da."
Psalms69:15 Kinyek akalele arapar eoŋ, Karaida ataro ailikor eoŋ; Kinyek aipany abunakin eoŋ."
Psalms69:16 Kobonokinoi, wu EJAKAIT; naarai ejok akonisianut-nakamin: Kwape ejaar aipues naka aitimesiakon, konolearai."
Psalms69:17 Sirikitonopik ekonibulesit akonikonyen; Naarai kaburunit; kisunya aboŋokin eoŋ,"
Psalms69:18 Kodudun ekatau, koyuu: Kolakunai kama kalukasurupoka."
Psalms69:19 Ŋeni ijo akamorosit, ikaleie, akaitisilio da: Ejaas lukasurupoka kere akonyenekon."
Psalms69:20 Ecum amorosit ekatau; kagor noi: Amo luketimete, konye emamei idio da; Ka luketalakarete, konye mam abu kadum,"
Psalms69:21 Apotu kainakis da epiu araun inyamataka; Nakajakitor akur ketamata yenikadwaran.
Psalms69:22 Korau ekecemesa eic kakonyenekec; Ido naijamamaata korau akuluma.
Psalms69:23 Komudukakata akecekonye, kinyeis aanyun; Kisitelitel aŋabesikec tiritir,"
Psalms69:24 Kobukok kes akoninyunyura, Kodolok kes adedeŋ naka akonikadakin."
Psalms69:25 Kosilior etogokec; Kinyek da ituŋanan kere ajaut owemanakec,"
Psalms69:26 Nacrai ereito ŋol loinomo ijo; Emocatar ican kanul kaluimusunit ijo.
Psalms69:27 Kiyatanak numam adolit mama ejaas numam adolitekec: Kinyeis alomar adolitekon.
Psalms69:28 Komwatarai kes koitabo loka aijar, Kinyeis aiwadikao nepepe kikadolitok."
Psalms69:29 Konye ecana eoŋ ido etururue: Kekeu akoniitajara kuju, wu Edeke."
Psalms69:30 Eturi eoŋ ekiror loka Edeke kekosio, Etopoloori ŋes kaimal."
Psalms69:31 Isiyalamikinete ŋul EJAKAIT aitelekarit cmon, Arai emoŋ lotobait loeja amumwar ka imageger."
Psalms69:32 Aanyutu luitasonos nun, ido eyalamikinos: Yes luimoenenete Edeke, kojarata ikusitauon,"
Psalms69:33 Naarai epupununei EJAKAIT luilwaritos, Mam emwaŋit ienanake."
Psalms69:34 Akuj ka akwap kituroto ŋes, Aŋololin ka iboro kere luirimete kotoma."
Psalms69:35 Naarai eyuuni EJAKAIT Sion, Eduki da ireria luka Yuda; Kes da ibojenenete kanen, kirumito da."
Psalms69:36 Aur da naka ikekejaanakinak irumi ŋes, Kes da lueminas ekekiror ibojenenete kotoma,"
Psalms70:1 Wu Edeke, korurukun ayuun eoŋ; Wu EJAKAIT korurukun aiŋarakin eoŋ."
Psalms70:2 Kileieikis, kodakaros akeeekwes: Luemoete ekatau! Kitobonoroi kau kosodete kitisiloi Luisiyalamikinito arieboka."
Psalms70:3 Kitobonoroi kes kau kanuka ikeeeleie Lukakienatatar ebe, “Ha, ha, ha!”"
Psalms70:4 Kolakaros kere lukimoete jo, kiyalamikinos kotomakon; Ŋul da lueminas akoniitajar kobalananas due ebe, “Kitopolooroi Edeke.”"
Psalms70:5 Konye ecana eoŋ elwaritoi, Wu Edeke, korurukai: Ŋo ekenarakinanika ekakayuunan da; Wu EJAKAIT, sirikiyap."
Psalms71:1 Wu EJAKAIT, ebwaik akamuno tomakon: Sirikerumata bobo ileje."
Psalms71:2 Koyuunai, kitajarai kadolitekon: Kitoik akonikit mamaka, kitajarai,"
Psalms71:3 Koraun ijo kamaka atiiba naeboionono, Naalosenenei dueudue: Icorak ijo aitajar eoŋ; Naarai ijo ŋes akatiiba ido akabwas da."
Psalms71:4 Koyuunai, wu Ekadeke, kakan naka ikaronon, Kakan da naka yenemamei adolit ka yenemeŋerana."
Psalms71:5 Naarai ijo akamuno, wu EJAKAIT Edeke: Ŋo amunoka ageun koiditeuka."
Psalms71:6 Ageun naajaar akoik naka totoka jo kigagat eoŋ: Ŋo ŋol lokitolomuni eoŋ kakoik naka totoka: Keturenenei jo tiritir.
Psalms71:7 Arai eoŋ aumokinet kaneeja luipu; Konye irai ijo akaŋopis nakagogon.
Psalms71:8 Ilelebun akaituk aituriokon, Ka aibusesukon apaaran kere,"
Psalms71:9 Sirikiirenea kapak nakamoionuka; Sirikiiial nakinonoor akagogoŋ.
Psalms71:10 Naarai lukasurupoka ineras nukan; Ka ŋul da lueperunete ekatau inerununete nepepe,"
Psalms71:11 Kobalas ebe, “Ajal Edeke ŋes: Korukioto kikamut ŋes; Naarai emamei yeneyuuni.”"
Psalms71:12 Wu Edeke, sirilwanikina kamakaŋ; Wu Ekadeke, korurukun aiŋarakin eoŋ."
Psalms71:13 Kileicikis kodaunos da lueraas lukasurup luka ekarau; Korapiasi kes amorosito ka aitisilio Luemoete aisirieb eoŋ.
Psalms71:14 Konye eoŋ amunonena tiritir; Eyatakini noi aiturit joo
Psalms71:15 Elimori akaituk adolitekon, Ka aitajarakon apaaran kere; Naarai mam ajeni etiaikec."
Psalms71:16 Abuni kaswamisio nuka apedor naka EJAKAIT Edeke: Alimonori nuka adolitekon nupekon bon.
Psalms71:17 Wu Edeke, kisisianak ijo eoŋ ameun keiditeuka; Aitodol kwana da alimo akoniswamisio nukaumokin."
Psalms71:18 Eebo, karaida kamoion koja da akorwo, Wu Edeke, sirikiijal; Aitodol nealimoro akonigogoŋ Mama ejai aturi naetupakini, Akonipedor da mama ejai yenebuni kere."
Psalms71:19 Akonidolite da, wu Edeke, ikiara noi. Ŋo loiswama nuepolok, Wu Edeke, iŋai bo iriakatar jo?"
Psalms71:20 Ŋo, lokitodik sio ican luipu luetioko; Kitajari sio bobo, Kitodokuni sio kaidules naka akwap."
Psalms71:21 Kiyatak jo akapolou, Ido kibelokin bobo kitalaka eoŋ."
Psalms71:22 Keturi da jo kibore kayenikutat, Abeitekon da, wu Ekadeke: Ayeikinenei aiturit jo kadeudeu, Wu jo Lokalaunan loka Isirael."
Psalms71:23 Iyalamikin noi akaituk naayeikinio aiturit jo; Ka ekatau da loibu kolaku.
Psalms71:24 Inerenenei da akaŋajep adolitekon Apaaran kere: Naarai eleicikis, adakaros da akecekwes, Luemoete aisirieb eoŋ."
Psalms72:1 Wu Edeke, koinak ekabaka itubesiakon, Okoku loka eka baka da akonidolit."
Psalms72:2 Irabanakini ŋesi ikoniruna kadolit, Ka lukicanikon ketube."
Psalms72:3 Einunete ironan ituŋa ainapakin, Ka iukono da adolit."
Psalms72:4 Irabanakini ŋesi lukican kotuna, Eyuuni idwe luka luilwaritos, Emunyumunyei da ikamwanan."
Psalms72:5 Eyoŋete jo eriŋa akoloŋ ejai, Eriŋa da elap ecai, anatar aturio kere."
Psalms72:6 Ŋesuni kwape etepakinia akiru anya nuetubub: Kwape irwairwaikinia elimilim akwap.
Psalms72:7 Ekeriakaros ikadolitok kapaarasiake; Ainapakin da naepol aitodol naemamuunor elap.
Psalms72:8 Emeari akejakanut kaŋolol kiton aŋolol, Koeor kiton osaŋeta luka akwap."
Psalms72:9 Luibojete kamodiŋ ekukonokinos ŋes; Lukasurupoke da idielete apua.
Psalms72:10 Eyaunete ikabakan luka Tarusis ka luka apujana ainakineta; Ikabakan da luka Syeba ka Seba einakinete akorakineta.
Psalms72:11 Eebo, isudedikinos ikabakan kere kakonyeneke: Ŋaanakinete ŋes atekerin kere."
Psalms72:12 Naarai eyuuni yenilwaritoi kemony; Ka yenikican yenemamei ekenarakinan.
Psalms72:13 Itimi yenikican ka yenilwaritoi, Itajari da aijar naka luilwaritos,"
Psalms72:14 Elakuni aijarakee kotoma amwanio ka adedeŋ: Aokotokec da eraunos nuka etiai loepol kakonyeneke.
Psalms72:15 Ejarete; einakinio ŋes esabu loka Syeba: Ilipanakinete ŋes ituŋa tmtir; Imalaete ŋes apaaran kere.
Psalms72:16 Idiliunete akima kakwap kaidiasia nuka ironan; Araitoke da kijaŋijaŋa kwape ka Lebanon: Epolooros lukore bala anya nuka akwap.
Psalms72:17 Ebusi ekekiror ikar kere: Ikopa ekekiror kwape ebusio akoloŋ: Isirerenio ituŋa kotomaken; Atekerin kere nuka akwap enyaraete ŋes lokareren,"
Psalms72:18 Kituritete EJAKAIT Edeke, Edeke loka Isirael, Loesubi bon nukaumokin."
Psalms72:19 Kituritete ekekiror lokaibuses ikar kere; Akwap kere kilelebun akeibuses. Amen, Amen."
Psalms72:20 Asanata ne ailipasia nuka Daudi okoku loka Yese.
Psalms73:1 Abeit ejok Edeke mama ejai Isirael, Ido mama ejaas luesegas kotauon."
Psalms73:2 Konye eoŋ, nepetai akakeje apaar; Nepetai da eoŋ aiurusiar kotoma alositeka."
Psalms73:3 Naarai etokokolit eoŋ luituroko, Naanyunia akerianut naka ikaronok."
Psalms73:4 Naarai emamei ariebo katwanarekee: Konye icasit akecegogoŋ.
Psalms73:5 Mam kes iticanitos bala icetuŋa; Karaida aisiriebio kwape kalucetuna.
Psalms73:6 Kanuka ŋun esubit eitur bala erikot loenapakinitai omurisiŋakee; Imukorit akaie kes bala anapito.
Psalms73:7 Itulereras akeeekonye kanuka atumes: Ipu noi luejaatar adepar luipudas ikecetauon.
Psalms73:8 Isekelos, ido kotoma aronis ŋes ineratar nuka areit: Ineras kitopoloro bonik."
Psalms73:9 Eluikinit akeeeituk akuj; Ido itorit akecenaiep kakwap.
Psalms73:10 Ŋes abonunioto iketuŋa nee: Tape ikokoorete akipi nuileleba aikopo.
Psalms73:11 Kobalas ebe, “Ikwaikini Edeke ejenum ai? Ejai da adiocoa neejai Loejai kuju kakui?”"
Psalms73:12 Koany, ŋul kes ikaronok; Kanuijamamata due, iyatanakin abarakec."
Psalms73:13 Abeit etesega eoŋ ekatau taai; Elot akakanin kotoma amamut aronis.
Psalms73:14 Naarai ketieani apaaran kere, Ŋinitupurue da kalecorio."
Psalms73:15 Arai katemarite ebe, “Mere kener kwaŋin,” Koany, ti kabilakebotet aturi naka idwekon."
Psalms73:16 Naaomoomaa epone lojenunet ŋin, Abu kesirieb eoŋ noi;"
Psalms73:17 Aitodol nealomaria eoŋ aibois nakalaunan naka Edeke, Kaomoom esanekec lokokau."
Psalms73:18 Abeit ibwaik ijo kes aiboisio nuerurut, Icakak kes toma amudiario."
Psalms73:19 Aluoros kesi asiles atipet! Amudia kes eut etasuro.
Psalms73:20 Kwape airujasit kekwenyu irunanan; Kwaŋin, wu EJAKAIT, naikwenyunia ijo, imwani ijo akeceput,"
Psalms73:21 Naarai abu kokadak ekatau, Aponi keeumi oŋeretenyaka:"
Psalms73:22 Abu kasubite bala etiaŋ, loemamei aijen; Karai eoŋ etiaŋ kakonyenekon."
Psalms73:23 Konye ajaenena kaio due: Itiŋi ijo akakan nakoteten.
Psalms73:24 Kinarenikini ijo eoŋ kainerunetekon, Kokau kanun kisukunyikini eoŋ kaibuses."
Psalms73:25 Iŋai bo ikan yenejai toma akui, nabarai ijo? Emamei idiotuŋanan kakwap yenepuda eoŋ dimarai ijo."
Psalms73:26 Arumoros akakiriŋ ka ekatau: Konye Edeke ŋes atiiba naka ekatau, ŋes ekawai ikar kere,"
Psalms73:27 Naarai, koany, nul luelwaka kamakon eoliorete cut: Imudia ijo ŋul kere lukinyeis jo kolosete eporo,"
Psalms73:28 Konye ejok eoŋ aapu kama ejai Edeke: Etarau EJAKAIT Edeke akaŋopis, Tetere alimonokini nukaswamisiokon kere."
Psalms74:1 Wu Edeke, kanukinyo kicakaria ijo sic ikar kere? Kanukinyo epurionokinia anyunyurakon amerekekin nukoronyikon?"
Psalms74:2 Kiitu ekodetekon, lokolo ibu ijo kogwel, Loibu ijo kolaku araun ateker nakairumetekon; Ka emoru Sion lokiboieneno ijo,"
Psalms74:3 Kodakak akonikeje amejei numam edaunos, Nukaronok kere nueswamaki lokasurup aibois nakalaunan,"
Psalms74:4 Ikunasi lukasurupokon kokidin katukotokon; Ebwaikis imederanakee araun aanyuneta.
Psalms74:5 Kosubito bala ituŋa luapotu kikeut aepeikec Ajepia amoni naka ikito,"
Psalms74:6 Aswamisio nuigirir kere Ajepa kesi kaepei ka anyulia,"
Psalms74:7 Eeweikis akoniibois nakalaunan; Etisilioto aibois naiboieneno ekonikiror atiyakis kwap.
Psalms74:8 Apotu kotemasi kotauonokee ebe, “Katiyatiyata kes cut”: Eeweanakis da atukosia kere nuka Edeke kotoma akwap."
Psalms74:9 Mam kianyuni aanyunetawok: Emamei bobo enabi edio da; Kwabo emamei kamawok idio yenejeni ebe itodoli ai.
Psalms74:10 Wu Edeke, itodoli lokasurup ai emoromoroi? Einyanakini kereka da lokasurup ekonikiror ikar kere?"
Psalms74:11 Kanukinyo inyakaria ijo akonikan, akonikan nakoteten? Kolem ŋes katorobukon komudia kes,"
Psalms74:12 Konye Edeke ŋes Ekabakaka apeŋo, Loiswamai aitajar kokidin kakwap."
Psalms74:13 Ibu kotiak aŋolol kanuka akonigogoŋ: Idecideci akwes nuka apiuan kakipi.
Psalms74:14 Idecideci akwes nuka Lebiatan, Iinak ŋes araun inyamat luka ituŋa luiboienenete kamodiŋ,"
Psalms74:15 Ibu kocil atan ka akalele da: Kitoonik icorin luepolok noi.
Psalms74:16 Apaaran erai nakon, akuare da nakon: Ibu kitemok aica ka akoloŋ da."
Psalms74:17 Ibu kibwaik iikoruno kere luka akwap: Ibu kiswama akamu ka aiporo da.
Psalms74:18 Kiitu na, wu EJAKAIT, ebe amoromor lokasurup, Ituŋa da lubaniok ainyanakis ekonikiror."
Psalms74:19 Sirikiinak aijar naka ajelekon mama ejai etiaŋ loka ais: Sirikiimurwok aijar naka lukieanakon ikar kere.
Psalms74:20 Koricite aitutuket: Naarai aiboisio nuemutoko nuka akwap ileleba itogoi luka akaje.
Psalms74:21 Okwe kinyeis luereitai aboŋun ileicikinito: Kituroto lukican ka luilwaritos ekonikiror.
Psalms74:22 Konyou, wu Edeke: kopurokin bon, Kiitu kwape kimoromoroo jo ituŋanan yeniban apaaran kere."
Psalms74:23 Sirikiimurwok eporoto loka lukasurupokon: Edokununei tiritir eeelet loka ŋul kalukisurokinito joo
Psalms75:1 Wu Edeke, kimalaenenei isio jo, Kimalaenenei, naarai eapie ekonikiror: Elimonorete iruna nuka aswamisiokon nukaumokin."
Psalms75:2 Naadolokinia eoŋ apak naeseunitai, Atubi kabeit."
Psalms75:3 Karaida kemudicar akwap, ka luibojete kotomaken kere: Asipokinit eoŋ ipirinoke."
Psalms75:4 Abu kalimok luituroko ebe, “Sirikiswamata nuka abaŋaanut”: Kalimok da ikaronok ebe, “Sirikikeut amumwar:"
Psalms75:5 Sirikikeut akusimumwar kuju noi; Sirikinera kimurisina lueninik.”
Psalms75:6 Naarai mere ari nakokide, arai ari nakoto, Mere da ari naka eŋalakimak ebunio aikeunun."
Psalms75:7 Konye Edeke ŋes ekatubon: Ŋesari ice kwap, ido ikeari ice kuiu."
Psalms75:8 Naarai toma akan naka EJAKAIT ejai aikopo, ebino da eren; Ipu luinyalinyalitere, ebukununei ŋesi kotoma; Abeit emasete ikaronok kere lukotoma akwap, Ikokoorete asidak nakotoma."
Psalms75:9 Konye alimori ikar kere, Ayeenenei aiturit Edeke loka Yakob."
Psalms75:10 Atubonori amumwar kere nuka ikaronok; Konye amumwar nuka ikadolitok ikeunio kuju.
Psalms76:1 Ejen Edeke kotoma Yuda: Epol ekekiror kotoma Isirael.
Psalms76:2 Ejai ekewema lokalaunan toma Salem, Toma Sion da iboieneno."
Psalms76:3 Ŋina abilia ŋesi ikojoi luka akabwa; Ebuku, ka ekileŋ, ka ejie."
Psalms76:4 Irai ijo lokaibuses, Loitelekarit ironan lumam edaunos."
Psalms76:5 Anatar lueninik itauon, ajototo akecejo; Emamei da loieasit kotuna Iukagogonok."
Psalms76:6 Wu Edeke loka Yakob, itoroni ijo, Kosodete aio nuka atwanare aikamar agali ka ebalasi."
Psalms76:7 Ŋo, ijo loisogim, ibus koyoni: Iŋai bo da epedori abwa kakonyenekon nainyurtyurikinor ijo?"
Psalms76:8 Abu ekonitube kopupun anyoun kokuju; Kokurianar akwap, kopalaa,"
Psalms76:9 Naanyounio Edeke aitub, Aitajar luitasonos kere lukotoma akwap."
Psalms76:10 Abeit kiruri jo anyunyura naka irunanan: Inapi da anyunyura naesalakinit,"
Psalms76:11 Kiyapo, kitodolik neejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke: Luelukunito ŋes kere koyaut ainakineta Mama ejai ŋol loibus ayonio."
Psalms76:12 Emudiari ŋesi imoyon luka ikapolok: Erai losogim kama ejaas ikabakan luka akwap.
Psalms77:1 Amonyi kekaporoto mama ejai Edeke; Ebwololoi kekaporoto mama ejai Edeke, Ŋesi da kapupuni."
Psalms77:2 Toma apaaran naka icanika abu kamo EJAKAIT: Korioro akakan kuare komam itegi; Kogir ekatau aitalakario.
Psalms77:3 Eitunit Edeke, keyalononi: Kanuriani, emwokolikin ekamoyo."
Psalms77:4 Isikoler akakonye: Mam apedori ener da naarai eticanitoi noi.
Psalms77:5 Aomoom apaarasia nukolo kasonya: Ikar da lukolono sek.
Psalms77:6 Eitunit ekakosio loka akuare: Aomoom kotauka bon; Ekamoyo da ekukunyikina amoote.
Psalms77:7 Ecakari kereka Edeke ikar kere? Mam bobo ŋes itoduni aminake?
Psalms77:8 Asaŋa cut akeitim ikar kere? Atwania akeisumunet ikar ka ikar?
Psalms77:9 Emurwoki Edeke araut lokasianut? Etasana da ŋesi akeitimesia kotoma anyunyura?
Psalms77:10 Katema ebe, “Na ŋes akailworuna; Konye eituni ikar luka akan nakoteten naka Loejai kuju kakuj.”"
Psalms77:11 Alimonori aswamisio nuka EJAKAIT; Naarai eituni nukaumokinikon nukolono.
Psalms77:12 Aomoomoenenei da aswamisiokon kere, Ido enyogonokini aomoom nuisubenenei."
Psalms77:13 Wu Edeke, ekonirot ejai toma aibois nakalaunan. Iŋai bo edeke loepol kwape Edeke?"
Psalms77:14 Irai ijo Edeke loiswamai nukaumokin: Itejenu ijo akonigogoŋ kotuna,"
Psalms77:15 Ilaku ijo ikonituŋa kakonikan, Odwe luka Yakob ka Yosep."
Psalms77:16 Apotu akip koanyut jo, wu Edeke; Apotu akip koanyut jo, koyonata, Komaranata da ataroi."
Psalms77:17 Apotu idouon kobukut akipi, Kijuk akuj eires: Kisiarakinos da imaliakon."
Psalms77:18 Eporoto loka airetunikon abu kojai toma otapipirio Eimilia da kitacau akwap: Komaran akwap kijaŋijaŋa.
Psalms77:19 Kojai erotokon toma aŋolol, Ka isokonokon da toma akipi nuipu, Konye mam ajenio ikonikukut."
Psalms77:20 Ibu kinarenikinite ikonituŋa kwape kesipan loka amerekekin, Kakan naka Musa ka Aaron,"
Psalms78:1 Wu ikatuŋa, kopupokisi ekakisil: Kitoikisi akusiki akiro nuka aitukuka."
Psalms78:2 Awonaari akaituk kotoma awarag; Eneri akiro nuimunonoro nukolono.
Psalms78:3 Nukipupu ka nukijenu, Nukilimonokis oni lukapapaawok,"
Psalms78:4 Mam kimunoni kes kama ejaas idwekec, Alimonokin aturi naebunit aiturio naka EJAKAIT, Ka akegogoŋ ka akeswamisio da nukaumokin nueswama."
Psalms78:5 Abu kiticat aitejenunet kotoma Yakob, Kibwaik ekisil toma Isirael, Loabu kicorak lukapapaawok, ebe, Ibusakinit aitejenun kes idwekec."
Psalms78:6 Tetere aturi naebunit ejenuni kes, Ka idwe da lueponio aur; Luepote anyoun alimokin kes ikecedwe."
Psalms78:7 Tetere ibwaikinete amunokee toma Edeke, Komam imurwokinete aswamisio nuka Edeke, Konye koricito akeicorakineta."
Psalms78:8 Ido kinyeis aiput lukapapaakec, Aturi naaninik naepaliono; Aturi namam abu kitemok eketau, Namam ekemoyo eketakina mama ejai Edeke."
Psalms78:9 Akapakina idwe luka Epuraim kaluiiis, kitiŋito akabwai, Kobonosi kau kotoma apaaran naka, ejie."
Psalms78:10 Mam aricito aitutuket naka Edeke, Konero alosenen kokisilake;"
Psalms78:11 Kimurwokis akeswamisio, Ka nukaumokin nuabu kitodik kes,"
Psalms78:12 Abu kiswama nukaumokin kakonyen nuka lukapapaakec, Kotoma akwap nako Misiri, omanikor da loka Soan,"
Psalms78:13 Abu kotiak aŋolol, kitotor kes toma; Kitobwo akipi kwape kabwas."
Psalms78:14 Paaran kiŋarenikinite kes kedou, Akuare da kere kaica naka akim."
Psalms78:15 Abu kocil atiiba kotoma amodiŋ, Kitamat kes akipi nuepu bala nuelomunete kataro,"
Psalms78:16 Kitolom icileta kotoma atiiba, Kitelelea da akipi kwape kicorin."
Psalms78:17 Konye kodiakanarete kesi kwape kwaŋin kamaken, Aipaliikin Loejai kuju kakuj kotoma amodiŋ,"
Psalms78:18 Apotu kokodut Edeke kotauonokec Kanuka eibelikec kiisito inyamat.
Psalms78:19 Eebo, apotu koluikinito Edeke koinerekec; Kobalas ebe, “Epedori kereka Edeke aitemokin emesa kotoma amodiŋ?"
Psalms78:20 Koany, abu ŋesi kinom atiiba, kibulubulunos akip, Koleleata icileta; Epedori kereka ŋesi ainakin atap da? Itudumikini kereka ŋesi iketuŋa akiriŋ?”"
Psalms78:21 Kanuka ŋun kepupu EJAKAIT, konyunyurikin: Kinepak akim Yakob, Konyoik da anyunyura Isirael."
Psalms78:22 Naarai mam eyuunito Edeke, Komam da emunos akeitajar."
Psalms78:23 Konye abu kicorak akuj, Konaa da ikekia luka akuj;"
Psalms78:24 Kitetepik kes emanu ainyam, Koinak da kes akima nukokuju."
Psalms78:25 Apotu ituŋa konyamata atap naka lukapedor: Kijukak kes inyamat luaupete eut.
Psalms78:26 Kitukut ekwam loka ari nakokide kotoma akui: Abu kinarenik ekwam loka ari naka eŋalakimak kotoma apedorike.
Psalms78:27 Kitetepik kes akiriŋ kwape kapua, Ka alurueik da kwape kasinei naka aŋololin."
Psalms78:28 Kitodoik kidin oidukurunukee, Alukun akeeeiboisio."
Psalms78:29 Kwaŋin apotu konyamata, kimonikinos cut; Koinak luekibelikinito kes."
Psalms78:30 Mam ekeeeibel abu kinoŋoor, Korina akecekirin ejai aitukekee,"
Psalms78:31 Konyoiki kes anyunyura naka Edeke, Koar luetelekaritos atumit kakesi, Kodany ikatumunak luka Isirael."
Psalms78:32 Keja ŋun kere da, kodiakanarete ca kwape kwaŋin, Komam iyuunito aswamisioke nukaumokin."
Psalms78:33 Kanuka nun, abu ŋesi konetak akeeepaarasia kotoma nukamameak, Ka ikeeekaru da kotoma akurian naepol."
Psalms78:34 Naaaria kes, ŋes konyet ewoneoto ŋes: Kobonut kodunyakis amoote Edeke."
Psalms78:35 Kiitut da ebe Edeke ŋes atiibakee, Edeke Loejai kuiu kakuj ŋes ekalakunanikee."
Psalms78:36 Konye komodakito aiturite ŋes kakeeeituk, Kinalanalata da ŋes kakecenaiepa."
Psalms78:37 Naarai mam ekeeetau atenit kamaken, Ido mam keraas imunon kotoma aitutuketeke."
Psalms78:38 Konye ŋes, kanuepoloor aitim, abu kisioni numam adolitekec, Mam abu komudia kes: Eeca, irwan ipu abu ŋesi kisinae akededen, Ido mam abu kidikok akenyunyura kere."
Psalms78:39 Kiitu ŋesi ebe keraas kesi awat; Ekwam loetubor, komam eboŋuni bobo."
Psalms78:40 Ipu ca ma aatenak nuapotu kipaliikinioto ŋes kotoma ais: Kitakadikiniata ŋes kotoma amodiŋ!
Psalms78:41 Kibelokinos da bobo kokodut Edeke, Kitunyunyurikis Lokalaunan loka Isirael."
Psalms78:42 Mam apotu kiitut akekan, Karaida apaaran naalakunia kes kama kalukekolo."
Psalms78:43 Kwape kibwaikinia akeanyuneta toma Misiri, Ka nukaumokinike da omanikor loka Soan;"
Psalms78:44 Kitarau ikeeeeorin aokot, Ka ikeeecileta da tetere mam epedorete aimat."
Psalms78:45 Kijukak kes atukon nuka icuc, luapotu konyamata kes: Ka aidodoka da nuapotu komudiasi kes."
Psalms78:46 Kitanyam ekutelek akecemio, Ka lukorionokec da kitanyam emaase."
Psalms78:47 Komudia ikeeemusabibun kakako, Ka isukumorinikee da komudia kakako naepol noi."
Psalms78:48 Ikeeebaren da kotula kakako, Ka ikeeesipanin luka amerekekin kotula kamwanis naka eipyei."
Psalms78:49 Kocakak mamakec adedeŋ naka aitakadikinioke, Anyunyura, ka aisiop, ka ican da, Ekodet loka imalaikan Iukaronok,"
Psalms78:50 Abu kocilak akenyunyura esokot, Mam abu kideu aijarakec kaneejai atwanare, Konye kotulana."
Psalms78:51 Kodany ikiyaik kere kotoma Misiri, Ageunet naka agogonukec koweman luka Kam."
Psalms78:52 Konye komea iketuŋa kwape kamerekekin, Kinareaik kes kotoma amodiŋ kwape kesipan loka amerekekin"
Psalms78:53 Komea kes kainapakina, ŋes mam akuriakatar: Konye abu aŋolol korapia lukasurupokec."
Psalms78:54 Koyau kes akwapuke nakalaunan, Kiton oron at lo, loagwelit akanike nakoteten."
Psalms78:55 Kirenea atekerin nuaia kinarenekec, Kokoranak kes airumetekec, Kisiboik da idwe luka Isirael owemanakec."
Psalms78:56 Konye kokodut bobo kipaliikis Edeke Loejai kuju kakuj, Mam da aricito aitejenunetake."
Psalms78:57 Kibelooros kau kiswamata nukamodomod kwape kalukapapaakec: Kopaasi awai bala akabwa nakenalan,"
Psalms78:58 Naarai apotu kitunyunyurikis ŋes kaiboisiokee nuiceleleete, Kitokokoloto da ŋes kaputosiakec nuikee."
Psalms78:59 Kepupu Edeke nun, konyunyurikin, Kosae cut Isirael."
Psalms78:60 Kwaŋin abu kojal ewema lokalaunan loka Silo, Ewema loeboieneno ŋesi kokidin otuŋa,"
Psalms78:61 Koinak akegogoŋ toma anatario, Akeibuses da toma akan naka lukasurup."
Psalms78:62 Koinak iketuŋa da neejai ekileŋ; Konyunyurikinite airumeteke.
Psalms78:63 Konyam akim ikatumunakakec; Apesurukec da amamei ekosio loenyamanarere adukokin.
Psalms78:64 Kodany ekileŋ isasedotinikee; Apuserunukec da mam akuudianete.
Psalms78:65 Kosodi EJAKAIT akwenyun bala yenekwenyuni kajo, Kwape etuŋanan lokagogonon loecela kanuemerar aion."
Psalms78:66 Koreto lukasurupoke kau: Kisurum kes ileic lumam edaunos.
Psalms78:67 Bobo da abu kogir ewema loka Yosep, Mam abu koseu ateker naka Epuraim."
Psalms78:68 Konye koseu ateker naka Yuda, Emoru Sion loamina."
Psalms78:69 Koduk aiboisike nakalaunan kwape kimor, Kwape kakwap naeticat ŋesi ikar kere."
Psalms78:70 Koseu Daudi da ebulesitike, Kolem ŋes kanuk naka amerekekin."
Psalms78:71 Kolem ŋes kaeok amerekekin nuetanakete, Aitanyam Yakob iketuŋa, ka Isirael airumeteke."
Psalms78:72 Kwaŋin kitanyam kes kwape kejaar aliogot naka etauke; Kinarenik da kes kapirianut naka akaninike.
Psalms79:1 Wu Edeke, apotu ikapirin toma airumetekon; Amunaut eyekalukon; Atiyanakis Yerusalem aitaraun aapoŋor."
Psalms79:2 Etanyamata akweny nuka akuj akiriŋ naka awat nuka ibulesinikon lukatwak, Ainakis itian luka akwap akiriŋ naka lukalaunakakon."
Psalms79:3 Abukonosi da akeceokot kwape kakipi airimor Yerusalem, Komamei da yenidai kes."
Psalms79:4 Kiraun isio amorosit kama ejaas iidunyetakosi, Aisekelio ka akienar kama ejaas lukirimorito sio."
Psalms79:5 Wu EJAKAIT, itodoli ai inyunyura ikar kere? Enokenenei kereka ekonikolo bala akim?"
Psalms79:6 Kobukok akoninyunyura mama ejaas ikapirin lumam kijenete jo, Kobukok da mama ejaas ajakanuto numam iwoneete ekonikiror."
Psalms79:7 Naarai anyamasi Yakob, Etisilioto da akeibois."
Psalms79:8 Sirikiitu kamakosi numam adolit nuka lukapapaakosi, Konye koruruk sio akoniitim: Naarai kisilior isio noi."
Psalms79:9 Kinarakinai sio, wu Edeke loka aitaiariokosi, Kanuka aibuses naka ekonikiror: Kolaku sio, koluc akosironisio, Kanuka ekonikiror."
Psalms79:10 Kanukinyo atemariata do ikapirin ebe, “Ai bo ejai Ekecedeke?” Ibus ainyaŋ aokot nuka ibulesinikon nuabukoros, Kojenun kotoma okapirin keteete isio da."
Psalms79:11 Kobu aumeno naka ienan akonyenekon; Kwape ejaar apolou naka apedorikon kitajar ijo ŋul lueraas idwe luka atwanare,"
Psalms79:12 Kinyakak toma atorobu naka iidunyetakosi irwan akanykaarei, Amorositokec, nukimoromoroto jo, wu EJAKAIT."
Psalms79:13 Kasodete isio ikonituŋa, amerekekin nukoroiyikon, Aimalaenen jo ikar kere: Kitodikini aturio kere akoniiturio."
Psalms80:1 Wu ekecokon loka Isirael, kopupok, Ijo loinarenikinit Yosep bala esipan loka amerekekin; Ŋo loiboie kama kikerubin, kocaik."
Psalms80:2 Kisidik akonigogoŋ kakonyen nuka Epuraim ka Benyamin ka Manase, Kobu aitajar sio,"
Psalms80:3 Kinyakarai sio bobo, wu Edeke; Kitacau akonikonyen, sio da kitajario,"
Psalms80:4 Wu EJAKAIT Edeke loka ajoresio, Itodoli ai inyunyurikinit ailip naka ikonituŋa?"
Psalms80:5 Itanyam ijo kes atap naka akiyo, Itamat kes akiyo nuipu noi."
Psalms80:6 Kitarau sio eŋuŋet kama ejaas iidunyetakosi: Lukasurupokosi ekienanakinos bonik.
Psalms80:7 Kinyakarai sio bobo, wu Edeke loka ajoresio; Kitaeau akonikonyen, sio da kitajario."
Psalms80:8 Ibu kitolom emusabibu anyoun kakwap nako Misiri: Ibu kirenea atekerin, kiraik ŋes,"
Psalms80:9 Ibu kirienya akwap kakonyeneke, Koremo akeieke kwap noi, kiriam akwap kere."
Psalms80:10 Abu etolimike korapia ironan, Aketenuna koputos kiresia luka Edeke."
Psalms80:11 Kigananata aketenun kiton aŋolol, Akelibuneta da kodolo Oeor."
Psalms80:12 Kanukinyo ibilia ijo akebwas, Tape luitorete orot kere edenete?"
Psalms80:13 Iboiboi eputir akitoike, Itian da lukadedenak lukais enyamete ŋes."
Psalms80:14 Wu Edeke loka ajoresio, kinainait jo, kibelokin bobo: Konolia kwap ijai kuju, kosesen, Koanyana emusabibu lo,"
Psalms80:15 Atorom naabu akonikan nakoteten kiraik, Ka atenu naibu ijo kitogogon kanukon,"
Psalms80:16 Ieweio kakim, ajepar eut: Etwakete kisinir luka akonyenekon."
Psalms80:17 Koiaun akanikon neejai etuŋanan loka akanikon nakoteten, Ncejai okoku loka etuŋanan loibu ijo kitogogon kanukon."
Psalms80:18 Kwaŋin mam sio kibonori kama ijai ijo: Kitajarunai sio, sio da kiwonei ekonikiror."
Psalms80:19 Kinyakarai sio bo bo, wu EJAKAIT Edeke loka aioresio; Kitaeau akonikonyen, sio da kitajario."
Psalms81:1 Koboorianata ayoere mama ejai Edeke agogonuwok: Kikareoto kaiyalama mama ejai Edeke loka Yakob.
Psalms81:2 Koyooto esabuli kituruoto da isiman, Ka adeudeu naeiiiim ka yenikutat."
Psalms81:3 Kokutakis arupepe kilamu elap: Kepoloor da eut elap, kapaaran naka epueitiwok loiyamakina."
Psalms81:4 Naarai erai ekisil kotoma Isirael, Aicorakinet naka Edeke loka Yakob,"
Psalms81:5 Abu koseu ŋes kotoma Yosep araun aitejenunet, Naalosio aluikin akwap nako Misiri: Nama apupunio aŋajep namam ajeni."
Psalms81:6 “Abu kalema alaniru kokeperike: Ka akekanin da kojalas kodita,"
Psalms81:7 Ibu konyara kotoma oean, abu kayu; Kabonok jo kotoma aibois nakaiyeiyea naka airetun; Abu ketem jo kakipi nuka Meriba."
Psalms81:8 Kopuputu, wu ikatuŋa, eoŋ da ketejenuni yes: Wu Isirael, tikipupok eoŋ!"
Psalms81:9 Sirikejaun edeke ece loegelara tomakon; Karaida jo aima ecedeke loegelara.
Psalms81:10 Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekonideke, Loabu kitolom jo kakwap nako Misiri: Koona noi akoniituk, kelelebik."
Psalms81:11 Konye ikatuŋa mam apotu kopupokis ekaporoto; Ido Isirael mam kakoto eoŋ.
Psalms81:12 Kwaŋin abu kajalak kes atupar aninik naka itauonokec, Tetere elosenenete kotoma ainerununikec nuka ikulepek."
Psalms81:13 Konye karai ikatuŋa kapupokis eoŋ: Kosodi Isirael alosenen korotinika!
Psalms81:14 Tieon ketonokok lukasurupokec atipet, Kasodi aibelokin akakan asurokin luitokokolito kes."
Psalms81:15 Luelaito EJAKAIT tiiyapaara kamaken: Konye timam akecepak kedaun.
Psalms81:16 Tiketanyam yes akima nuejok noi adepar: Tikesimonik kesik lokomoru.”
Psalms82:1 Ebwoi Edeke katukot naka Edeke; Imbi kokidin kidekesio.
Psalms82:2 “Itodolete yesi ai irabete komam itupito abeit, Ido itubusikinito ikaronok? Sela,"
Psalms82:3 Kirabakisi lukican ka ikokiok: Kirabakisi da kabeit luereitai ka lukibakor.
Psalms82:4 Kolakutu lukican ka luilwaritos: Koyuutu kes kakan naka ikaronok.”
Psalms82:5 Mam ejenete, mam eomoomoete; Irimete kesi taai kotoma amuton, Apeteta kere nuka akwap eianaros."
Psalms82:6 Katema atiar, “Iraas yesi idekesio, Yes kere iraas odwe luka Loejai kuiu kakuj."
Psalms82:7 Karaida kwaŋin itwakete yesi kwape kituna, Ibiroros da kwape kediopet kotoma ikapolok.”"
Psalms82:8 Konyou, wu Edeke, kotubok akwap: Naarai irumit ijo atekerin kere."
Psalms83:1 Wu Edeke, sirikililiŋ: Wu Edeke, sirikitau ti, sirikipala,"
Psalms83:2 Naarai, koany, ecelasi lukasurupokon: Ŋul da lukilaito jo ekeut akwes."
Psalms83:3 Inerunete kapirianut abilakin ikoniruna ebotet, Initanaros nepepe aluikin lukibwaitonokon."
Psalms83:4 Atemasi atiar, “Kopotu, kamudiasi kes kinyeis araun ateker: Tetere mam bobo ekiror loka Isirael iitununoo.”"
Psalms83:5 Naarai eŋitanaros nepepe, acamut da kediopetau; Etutukoto aluikin joo"
Psalms83:6 Iweman luka Edom ka Isimaelin; Moab ka Ikagarein;
Psalms83:7 Gebal, ka Amon, ka Amalek; Pilisitia ka luibojete kotoma Turo."
Psalms83:8 Asuria da imorikikina nepepe kakes, Enarakis kesi idwe luka Lot."
Psalms83:9 Kiswamak ijo kes kwape kaMidian; Kwape ka Sisera, kwape ka Yabin kocor loka Kison:"
Psalms83:10 Luatwakikinete En-dor; Koraunos da aworet naka akwap.
Psalms83:11 Kiswamak ikapolokokec kwape ka Oreb ka Seeb: Eebo, ikapolokokec kere kwape ka Seba ka Salumuna."
Psalms83:12 Luatemasi ebe, “Ketarautu oni Ironyia luka Edeke luwok.”"
Psalms83:13 Wu Ekadeke, kituluo kes kwape apua naka etapipirio; Kwape da kagugu nuekutari ekwam."
Psalms83:14 Kwape kakim naicwei amagoro, Kwape kaipelonoreta nuka akim nuinokokinete ironan;"
Psalms83:15 Kibwap kes kwaŋin kekonikwam loededeŋ, Kitukurian kes kekonitapipirio loepol!"
Psalms83:16 Kisileleb ileic akonyenekec; Tetere emoete ekonikiror, wu EJAKAIT."
Psalms83:17 Kisurumai kes ileic, kisiyalonoŋoi ikar kere; Kitisiloi kitoolioroi da."
Psalms83:18 Tetere ejenunete ebe ijo bon, Loerai ekonikiror YAWE, Irai Loijai kuju kakuj koyaite akwap kere."
Psalms84:1 Eiokuka ca ma ikoniweman lukalaunak, Wu EJAKAIT loka ajoresio!"
Psalms84:2 Imiela ekamoyo, eebo, iilonori da Kanuka alaroi nuka EJAKAIT; Ekatau ka akakuan da eyeete kaiyalama Mama ejai Edeke Lokaiaran,"
Psalms84:3 Eebo, adumu anyiporit etogoke, Iporoidoliat da adum akai naeurianakini ikedwe, Kes itemwanakon, wu EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Ekakabaka Ekadeke da."
Psalms84:4 Isirerenitoi ŋul luibojete kotogokon: Iyatanakinete due aiturit jo.
Psalms84:5 Isirerenitoi nin yeneiai agogoŋuke tomakon: Yenejaas otauke irotin luepolok luebeete Sion,"
Psalms84:6 Itorito toma aditot naka Aimony Ituluorete ŋes aibois naka akonye nuva atanin; Eebo, akiru naeliŋun erapiari ŋes karereŋio."
Psalms84:7 Elosete anyoun kagogoŋ kiton agogoŋ, Ŋinidiopet kakesi etakanuni kakonyen nuka Edeke kotoma Sion,"
Psalms84:8 Wu EJAKAIT Edeke loka aioresio, kopup akailip: Kopupokinai, wu Edeke loka Yakob."
Psalms84:9 Koany, wu Edeke loirai ebukukosi, Konolek ereet loka lokinyonyoikitonokon akinyet."
Psalms84:10 Naarai apaaran adiopet kotoma alaroikon Itelekarit apaarasia kamace alukumit, Ibus eoŋ araun ekedaran ekek kotogo loka Edekeka, Itia aiboi koweman luka aronis."
Psalms84:11 Naarai EJAKAIT Edeke ŋes akoloŋ ka ebuku: Einakini EJAKAIT asianut ka aibuses; Emamei ibore yenejok yenimiki ŋesi Ŋul luelosenenete kadolit.
Psalms84:12 Wu EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Isirerenitoi irunanan yenikimuno jo!"
Psalms85:1 EJAKAIT, kiminakinit akonikwap; Inyaku arereŋ naka Yakob."
Psalms85:2 Isioni numam adolit nuka ikonituŋa, Irapaa aronisikec kere."
Psalms85:3 Ilema akoninyunyura kere: Ibelokin anyoun kadeden naka akoniisiop.
Psalms85:4 Kibelokinoi sio, wu Edeke loka akosiitajario, Kitanan akoniisiopanakin sio."
Psalms85:5 Inyunyurikini kereka ijo sio ikar kere? Isinatari kereka akoninyunyura aturio kere?
Psalms85:6 Mam kereka bobo kitaiari sio: Tetere ikonituŋa iyalamikinos kanukon?
Psalms85:7 Wu EJAKAIT, kitodikinai sio akoniitim, Koinakinai sio akoniitaiar,"
Psalms85:8 Eirari eoŋ nuinera Edeke EJAKAIT: Naarai elimonokini ituŋake ka lukalaunakake ainapakin: Konye sirikemanasi bobo neejai abaŋaanut.
Psalms85:9 Abeit eapie aitajarake kanul kalueyonito ŋes; Tetere iboienenei aibuses kakwapuwok.
Psalms85:10 Eriamunos aitim ka abeit; Anuanaros adolit ka ainapakin.
Psalms85:11 Elibi abeit kotoma alup; Ete adolit kwap kojai toma akuj.
Psalms85:12 Eebo, einakini EJAKAIT ajokis; Emienenei awokokwap."
Psalms85:13 Iŋarenikini adolit ŋes; Itemokini erot loitorete akekeie,"
Psalms86:1 Kitoik akonikit, wu EJAKAIT, koboŋokinoi; Naarai eeana eoŋ ido elwaritoi."
Psalms86:2 Kidar akaijar; naarai ayoŋit eoŋ Edeke: Wu jo Ekadeke, - kitaiar ekonibulesit lokimuno jo."
Psalms86:3 Kitimoi, wu EJAKAIT; Naarai amonyi mamakon aitiwar akwap."
Psalms86:4 Kisiyalamik aijar naka ekonibulesit; Naarai ekeunit ekatau mama ijai, wu EJAKAIT."
Psalms86:5 Naarai ijok ijo, EJAKAIT, itemokino aisioni, Epol aitimikon mama katjul kere lukiwoneetc joo"
Psalms86:6 Wu EJAKAIT, kitoik akit akailip; Kopupok eporoto loka akaiŋaiŋa."
Psalms86:7 Kapaaran naka ieanika ewonei jo; Naarai kibonokini eoŋ.
Psalms86:8 Wu EJAKAIT, emamei loiputotor jo kodekesio; Emameetc da nueputotor akoniswamisio."
Psalms86:9 Wu EJAKAIT, epote atekerin kere nuibu kosub aima jo; Itopoloorete da ekonikiror."
Psalms86:10 Naarai ipol ijo, iswamai da nukaumokin; Ŋo bon Edeke."
Psalms86:11 Wu EJAKAIT, kisisianakinai ekonirot, Alosenenei kotoma abeitekon: Kimorikik ekatau ayoŋ it ekonikiror bon."
Psalms86:12 Wu EJAKAIT Ekadeke, keturi jo kekatau kerc; Etopoloori ekonikiror ikar kere."
Psalms86:13 Naarai epol akoniitim mama ajai: Ibu koyu akaiiar kaipany naejai kwap noi.
Psalms86:14 Wu Edeke, kanyoikis luiwonooko, Emoi da atukot naka lukakaje akaiiar, Komam kibwaikinito jo akonyenekee."
Psalms86:15 Konye jo, wu EJAKAIT, irai Edeke loileleba aision, isiana da, Iyapi anyunyurikin, epol akoniitim ka abeit."
Psalms86:16 Okwe, kibelokin mama ajai, kitimoi; Koinak ekonibulesit akonigogoŋ, Kitajar ikoku yenika akonibulesit."
Psalms86:17 Kitodikinai aanyunet naka ajokis; Tetere lukalaito eanyunete, kirumata ileic, Naarai ijo, EJAKAIT, ibu kinarak eoŋ, kitalaka da."
Psalms87:1 Akepetetait ejai oroŋan lukalaunak.
Psalms87:2 Emin EJAKAIT irutei luka Sion, Adepar aiboisio kere nuka Yakob."
Psalms87:3 Inerai nukaibusesukon, Wu ere loka Edeke."
Psalms87:4 Alimori nuka Rakab ka Babulon, Kotoma kakesi nukajenete eoŋ; Koany Pilisitia, ka Turo, nepepe ka Etiopia; Ebalasi ebe, “Aurikinio ŋin nina.”"
Psalms87:5 Eebo, elimunio nuka Sion da ebe, “Aurikinio ŋin ka ii tomake”; Loejai kuju kakuj ŋes elopet iticasi."
Psalms87:6 Naiwadikaa EJAKAIT ituŋa, imarakini ebe, “Aurikinio ŋin ŋina.”"
Psalms87:7 Kes lueyeete ka kes da luikosiete etemarete ebe, “Akatanin kere eja tomakon.”"
Psalms88:1 Wu EJAKAIT, Edeke loka akaitajario, Amonyi paaran ka kuare da kakonyenekon:"
Psalms88:2 Koeamak akailip kolom neijai ijo; Kitoik akonikit mama ejai aimonyoka.
Psalms88:3 Naarai ileleba emoyoka ican, Akaijar da aapia Okatwak."
Psalms88:4 Kemarakinitai eoŋ nepepe kanul kaluijesaros toma Aipany; Arai eoŋ kwape kitunanan yenemamei aiijarakinio.
Psalms88:5 Kacakakin neeja ikatwak, Kwape luaaritai lueperete kates, Lumam ijo iitunit bobo cut; Agelaros kakanikon,"
Psalms88:6 Kiperik ijo eoŋ toma Aipany nakokwap noi, Toma aiboisio nuemutoko, toma ataro,"
Psalms88:7 Kalanirikinit noi akoninyunyura, Kinaru ijo eoŋ kakonikailan kere."
Psalms88:8 Isieka ijo ikapapero kamakaŋ, Kitarau da eoŋ ibore yeneketal kamakee; Kagoloritai, mam apedori alomun kina."
Psalms88:9 Aororor akakoŋu kanuka aitieanioka; Wu EJAKAIT, ewonenenei mamakon ninipaaran, Egagat akakanin mamakon."
Psalms88:10 Itodikini kereka ijo lukatwak nukaumokin? Enyounete kereka itoilon aiturit jo? sela
Psalms88:11 Elimor kereka akonisianut-nakamin kotoma ates? Arai bo akonimunonut kotoma Amudiario?
Psalms88:12 Ejenunos kereka nukaumokinikon kotoma amuton? Adolitekon da kotoma akwap naka aimurwonut?
Psalms88:13 Konye wu EJAKAIT, mamakon amony eoŋ, Ido tupuruc elipenenaa kakonyenekon."
Psalms88:14 EJAKAIT, kanukinyo icakaria ijo ekamoyo? Kanukinyo da ibwaia ijo akonikonyen kamakaŋ?"
Psalms88:15 Ketieanio kaapianari atwanare ameun koiditeuka: Nakesiriebiata nuketasurokon eyaloŋoni.
Psalms88:16 Karapa eoŋ anyunyurakon naededen: Kagelasi eoŋ nuketasurokon.
Psalms88:17 Apotu ke si kerimosi eoŋ bala akipi apaaran kere; Apotu da kalukut eoŋ,"
Psalms88:18 Isieka ijo kama kayeniminat ka ipapero; Ipaupaka da amuton.
Psalms89:1 Ayei nuka aitim naka EJAKAIT ikar kere: Itejenuni da akaituk amunonutukon mama ejaas aturio kere,"
Psalms89:2 Naarai atema atiar, “Edukio aitim ikar kere: Itieasi ijo akonimunonut kotoma akuj cut."
Psalms89:3 Etutuk kaloseunaka, Eyapoik Daudi ekabulesit;"
Psalms89:4 Eticasi aurikon ikar kere, Aduki eicolonokon loka ajakanut mama ejaas aturio kere.”"
Psalms89:5 Wu EJAKAIT, ituri akui nukaumokinikon, Akonimunonut da katukot naka lukalaunak,"
Psalms89:6 Naarai iŋai bo EJAKAIT kitirianere jo kotoma akuj? Iŋai da kodwe luka idekesio iputotor ijo?
Psalms89:7 Edeke loinosibib noi kainerunet naka lukalaunak, Loibus ayoŋit adepar ŋul kere luirimorito ŋes,"
Psalms89:8 Wu EJAKAIT Edeke loka ajoresio, Iŋai bo lokapedor kwape kajo, wu Edeke? Akonimunonut da kirimorit jo,"
Psalms89:9 Iyait ijo ewono loka aŋolol; Naedakunotor akailan nukotoma, isililinl ijo kes,"
Psalms89:10 Ibilibil ijo Rakab kwape yenearitai; Isiarisiar lukasurupokon kakan nakagogonukon.
Psalms89:11 Erai akuj nakon, ka akwap da erai nakon; Akwap ka ailelebake, ijo kisubuni kes."
Psalms89:12 Ŋo ŋes isubi ari naka agolitome ka ari naka eŋalakimak: Iyalamas Tabor ka Kerumon kokirorikon.
Psalms89:13 Ejai jo akaa naka apedor: Erai akanikon nakagogon, ikiara akanikon nakoteten,"
Psalms89:14 Adolit ka etube kes apeteta nuka eicolonokon, Aitim ka abeit kes kinarenikinito jo,"
Psalms89:15 Isirerenitoi ituŋa lueienete aruo naka arupepe: Wu EJAKAIT, elosenenete kotoma aka naka akonyenekon."
Psalms89:16 Isiyalamikinito ekonikiror apaaran kere: Itopoloorio da kes kadolitekon,"
Psalms89:17 Naarai ijo aibuses naka agogonukec: Kotoma asianutukon ŋes itopoloorere amumwaratakosi.
Psalms89:18 Naarai ebukuwok ŋes loka EJAKAIT; Ekabakawok da ŋes loka Lokalaunan loka Isirael
Psalms89:19 Ibu kolo kiner kalukalaunakaken kaitapoet, Kotema atiar, “Ebwaik aiŋarakinio neejai ŋol loegogon; Etopoloo da ediopet loeseunitai kotuna,"
Psalms89:20 Aseu Daudi ekabulesit; Enyonyoik ŋes akakinyet nakalaunan:
Psalms89:21 Iticasenenei akakan; Akakan da itogogoni ŋes.
Psalms89:22 Mam lokasurup eŋasi ŋes; Karaida okoku loka aronis aitican ŋes.
Psalms89:23 Esibirori eoŋ lukasurupoke kakonycneke; Adanyi da luelaito ŋes.
Psalms89:24 Konye akamunonut ka akaitim eiaununos nepepe kaŋes; Kokirorika itopoloorere akemumwarat
Psalms89:25 Ebwaikini akekan aŋolol, Akekan da nakoteten ebwaikini oeorin."
Psalms89:26 Emonyenenei mamaka ebe, ‘Irai ijo papaka, Ekadeke, atiiba da naka aitajarioka.’"
Psalms89:27 Etarauni da ŋes ekakiyai, Ido loitelekarit ikabakan kere luka akwap,"
Psalms89:28 Edarenenei akaitim kanukeŋ ikar kere, Akaitutuket da icasi cut kamaken"
Psalms89:29 Mam etanaŋi akeur ikar kere, Ka ekeicoloŋ loka ajakanut kwape kepaarasia nuka akuj."
Psalms89:30 Arai keiala ikedwe ckakisil, Komam etupito itubesiaka;"
Psalms89:31 Arai kebila ikakisila, Komam ericete akaicorakineta;"
Psalms89:32 Ŋes do etieania eoŋ aibucaretakec kebela, Numam adolitekec da kamaeareta."
Psalms89:33 Konye mam erikari eut aitimika kamaken, Karaida aiŋoŋar akamunonut."
Psalms89:34 Mam abili akaitutuket, Karaida aiiulakin akirot naadau alomun kaitukuka."
Psalms89:35 Eyapo adiopekirot kalauniteka; Mam eŋalai Daudi;
Psalms89:36 Eiaenena aurike ikar kere, Ekeicoloŋ da loka ajakanut kwape kakoloŋ kama ajai."
Psalms89:37 Iticasio ikar kere kwape kelap, Ido kwape kekajenan lomunot kotoma akuj.”"
Psalms89:38 Konye ieakar ijo isac da, Inyunyurik lokinyonyoikitonokon akinyet,"
Psalms89:39 Ila aitutuket naka ebulesitikon: Itisil da akeboko acakakin kwap.
Psalms89:40 Ibelebel ijo iregiake kere; Itiyatiya da ikereria.
Psalms89:41 Luitorete orot kere enaŋete ŋes: Araun ŋesi amorosit koidunyetake.
Psalms89:42 Itopoloo ijo akan nakoteten naka lukekoloke; Isiyalamik da lukasurupoke kere.
Psalms89:43 Eebo, itiŋiŋ ijo akwanis naka ekilenike; Mam ibu kitobwo ŋes kojie,"
Psalms89:44 Itanaŋ apiripirike, Icakak eicoloŋoke loka ajakanut kwap."
Psalms89:45 Ituurian apaarasia nuka atumunike; Iburia da ŋes kileic.
Psalms89:46 Wu EJAKAIT, itodoli ai inopit ikar kere? Itodoli ai akoninyunyura enoki bala akim?"
Psalms89:47 Okwe kutu kwape eurianar apakika; Aamameak anyoika kisubia kolo idwe kere luka ituŋa!
Psalms89:48 Iŋai bo ituŋanan yencian yenimam eanyuni atwanare, Yeneyuuni akeijar kapedor naka Okatwak? Sela."
Psalms89:49 EJAKAIT, ai bo abeata aitimesiakon nulem? N uibu kiyapok Daudi kamunonutukon."
Psalms89:50 EJAKAIT, kiitu amorosit naka ibulcsinikon; Kwape adakitor katorobuka amorosit naka ituŋa kere lukagogoŋok;"
Psalms89:51 Nakemoromoroto lukasurupokon, wu EJAKAIT, Nakemoromoroto ikukut luka lokinyonyoikitonokon akinyet."
Psalms89:52 Kituritete ETAKAIT ikar kere. Amen, Amen."
Psalms90:1 EJAKAIT, irai ijo akosiibois nakiboienenoo, Anatar aturio kere."
Psalms90:2 Eriŋa iroŋan kesubuna, Eriŋa jo kesubuna alup ka akwap, Ameun ikar Iuno kiton ikar kere, ijo ŋes Edeke."
Psalms90:3 Inyakari irunanan toma apua; Kobala ebe, “Koboŋosi, yes idwe “luka ituŋa!”"
Psalms90:4 Naarai kakonycnekon ikar elukumit Esubito bala nakabian naatubor, Ido bala akwenyunet naka akuare."
Psalms90:5 Iyaŋaari kes kwape kakalele; esubito bala ajo: Tupuruc esubito bala inya luebwanunete,"
Psalms90:6 Elibunete tupuruc epoloete da, Etubio eboŋ, erinyorete."
Psalms90:7 Naarai kimudia sio akoninyunyura, Kisiyalononoi sio akoniisiop."
Psalms90:8 Ibwaik numam adolitekosi akonyenekon, Adiakanaretakosi nukaiyeiyea da aica naka akonyenekon."
Psalms90:9 Naarai atuboros akosipaarasia kere kotoma anyunyurakon: Kitanani ikosikar bala aomisioit.
Psalms90:10 Apaarasia nuka ikarukosi kes ikar akaisakanykaarei, Arai kija kagogon imwaunete ikar akaisakanykauni; Konye ekeceitur erai aitaaritoi ka aiturur bon; Naarai eoliori atipet, kimameun da."
Psalms90:11 Iŋai bo ejeŋi apedor naka akoninyunyura, Ka akoniisiop kwape kibusakinitor ayoŋ it jo?"
Psalms90:12 Kisisianakinai do Sio aimar akosipaarasia, Tetere kidumuni etau loka acoa."
Psalms90:13 Koboŋ, wu EJAKAIT! Itodoli bo ai? Kiitu ikonibulesin."
Psalms90:14 Kisimonikinai sio tupuruc kakoniitim; Kasodete ailel ka aiyalamikin akosipaarasia kere.
Psalms90:15 Kisiyalamikinai sio kwape ejaatar apaarasia nuibu kiticania, Ka ikar da lukianyunitor aronis."
Psalms90:16 Kotakanik ikonibulesin akoniswam, Ka akoniibuses da odwekec."
Psalms90:17 Kojaikin ajokis naka EJAKAIT Ekosideke mamakosi: Kiticat ijo aswam naka akaninikosi kamakosi, Eebo, kitieat aswam naka akosikanin."

Psalms91:3 Naarai kiyuuni jo kairukutu naka ekalokan akweny, Ka atular da naerono."
Psalms91:4 Kirapiari jo kakopirike, Imeci ijo kwap kabebenokake: Akebeit erai ebuku ka aupal."

Psalms91:11 Naarai einakini ikemalaikan aidar jo, Korieito jo korotinikon kere."
Psalms91:12 Kidakete jo kakaninikec, Kinyek amoru aiguikin akonikeju."
Psalms91:13 Icaki ijo eŋatuny ka emusaga: Ipudapudai iŋatuny ka emun.

Psalms92:2 Aitodunia asianutukon-nakamin tupuruc, Amunonutukon da ŋinikuare."
Psalms92:3 Kobore yeniramat yenikaputio atomon, ka isabulin, Ka aruo naiyapaara naka adeudeu."
Psalms92:4 Naarai ijo, EJAKAIT, kisiyalamik eoŋ kaswamukon: Ebwonenena da kaswamisio nuka akanikon."

Psalms92:9 Naarai, koany, lukasurupokon, wu EJAKAIT, Naarai, koany, etwakete lukasurupokon; Isiarakinio da lukeswamak numam adolit kere."
Psalms92:10 Konye itopoloo ijo akamumwarat kwape kamumwarat naka ekosobwan: Kenyonyoikin akinyet nakitetet.

Psalms94:1 Wu EJAKAIT, ijo Edeke lokenyanan, Ŋo Edeke Iokenyanan, kocaik!"

Psalms94:7 Kobalas ebe, “Mam EJAKAIT eanyuni, Mam Edeke loka Yakob eomoomoi.”"

Psalms102:1 Wu EJAKAIT, kiira akailip, Akaimony da kodolu mama ijai,"

Psalms102:5 Kanuka eporoto loka eidinyaka Eminaikinos akakoio amunyoka.

Psalms102:11 Esubito apaarasiaka bala etoribe loeoliori; Arinyo eoŋ bala inya.
Psalms102:12 Konye jo wu EJAKAIT, iboienenei ikar kere; Aiitunetekon da mama ejaas aturio kere."
Psalms102:13 Inyouni, itimi da Sion: Naarai adolu apak aitim ŋes, Ecbo, adolu apale naaseikinitai,"
Psalms102:14 Naarai isiyalamikinito ikonibulesin amoruke, Ido etimoto akepua."

Psalms102:16 Naarai aduk EJAKAIT Sion, Atakanu kotoma aibusesuke."
Psalms102:17 Asesen ailip naka lukibakor, Komam emenit ailipikec."
Psalms102:18 Iwadikakinio nun aturi naebunit: Ituŋa da luesubunio iturete EJAKAIT.
Psalms102:19 Naarai ete ŋesi kwap koiai kaiboisike nakalaunan naicelelei; Abu EJAKAIT kosesen akwap kojai kuju:

Psalms102:22 Naetukonokinotor ituŋa, Ka ajakanuto da, aijaanakin EJAKAIT."
Psalms102:23 Abu kitjoŋa akagogoŋ korot, Kituurian da akapaarasia."

Psalms102:25 Ageun apeŋo ibu ijo kopet apetetait naka akwap; Aku; da erai aswam naka akaninikon,"

Psalms102:28 Ibojenenete idwe luka ibulesinikon Aurikee da iticasio kakonycnekon.
Psalms103:1 Kiturite EJAKAIT, ijo etauka; Ka iboro da kere luejaas tomakaŋ Kituroto ekekiror Iokalaunan."
Psalms103:2 Kiturite EJAKAIT, ijo etauka: Sirikiimurwokis akejokisio kere."
Psalms103:3 Loisionie numam adolitekon kere; Loitanaleuni adekesiakon kere.
Psalms103:4 Loelakuni akoniijar kotoma amudiario; Loitanapit jo aboko naka asianut-nakamin ka aitimesia nukaiokak,"
Psalms103:5 Loisimonikini jo luejok; Kosodi akonitumun aiteteun bala emorukaalet.
Psalms103:6 Iswamai EJAKAIT nuedolito, Ka itubesia luka ituŋa kere luemwanitai."
Psalms103:7 Abu ŋesi kitejen Musa ikerotin, Ka akeswamisio da mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael."
Psalms103:8 Ileleba EJAKAIT aisioni, esiana da, Iyapi anyunyurikin, epol da akeitim."
Psalms103:9 Mam itoroni apaarasia kere; Karaida anyunyuranakin ikar kere.
Psalms103:10 Mam kiswamakinit oni kwape ejaatar awokoronisio, Karaida airop oni kwape ejaatar numam adolitewok."
Psalms103:11 Naarai kwape eiaar akuj kuju noi akwap, Epol kwaŋin akeitim mama ejaas lueyonito ŋes."
Psalms103:12 Kwape elwaniar kide anyoun koto, Esieka kwaŋin aibucanaretawok."
Psalms103:13 Kwape itimio papa ikedwe, Kwape kwaŋin itimi EJAKAIT lueyonito ŋes."
Psalms103:14 Naarai ejeŋi asubunetewok; Iitunit ebe kirai oni apua.
Psalms103:15 Etuŋanan, esubito akepaarasia bala inya; Bala aturot naka ekitui, epoloi kwaŋin,"
Psalms103:16 Naarai ekutakini ŋes ekwam, emameun; Akeibois da mam bobo ejenuni ŋes."
Psalms103:17 Konye aitim naka EJAKAIT ejai ameun apaarasia nuno kiton apaarasia kere Mama ejaas nul lueyonito ŋes, Akedolit da mama ejaas idwe luka idwe;"
Psalms103:18 Mama ejaas luerieito aitutuketeke, Ka luiitunito aicorakinetake aitodol kes."
Psalms103:19 Eticat EJAKAIT ekeicoloŋ kotoma akuj; Ido irumit akejakanut kere,"
Psalms103:20 Kituroto EJAKAIT, yes ikemalaikan; Yes lukapedor kotoma agogoŋ, luitodolete akekirot, Kopupete eporoto loka akekirot,"
Psalms103:21 Kituroto EJAKAIT, yes akejoresio kere; Yes ikejaanakinakake, luiswamaete nuekoto ŋesi,"
Psalms103:22 Kituroto EJAKAIT, yes akeswamisinei kere, Kaiboisio kere nuka airumiteke. Kiturite EJAKAIT, ijo etauka."
Psalms104:1 Wu EJAKAIT Ekadeke, ipolo ijo noi! Inapit aibuses ka apolou,"
Psalms104:2 Loimukori bon kaica bala anapito; Loapesikinit akuj bala aigalisit:
Psalms104:3 Loiriikini akito nuka agolaike kakipi; Loituluori idouon agalike; Loelosenenei kabebenoka nuka ekwam,"
Psalms104:4 Loituluori ikwamin ikekiyakia; Ikekejaanakinak akim naesarani.
Psalms104:5 Loapesi apeteta nuka akwap, Tetere mam ijaŋijaŋa ikar kere."
Psalms104:6 Irapaa ŋes kataro kwape kegoe; Kibwaut akip kokuju kiroŋan.
Psalms104:7 Apotu kokerata kaitoronokon; Kiwonyasi kanuka eporoto loka airetunikon.
Psalms104:8 Kodokas oron an, kiiesaros aditon, Kiton aiboisio nuibu kosubakinite kes."
Psalms104:9 Ibu kibwaik eikor lomam kes etubete; Tetere mam bobo eboŋorete arapiar akwap.
Psalms104:10 Ŋukari akipi nuka atanin aditon; Eleleete koronan:
Psalms104:11 1 tamasete ŋolitiaŋ loka ais; Eŋaleunete itukoi akecekure.
Psalms104:12 Ibojenenete akweny nuka akuj karirikec, Eruosi katenun."
Psalms104:13 Itapapali ironan klikip nuka agolaike; Emonikin akwap araito nuka aswamisiokon.
Psalms104:14 Isibwanikini ibaren inya, Iiaikini ituŋa da ikui; Tetere elemunete inyamat kalup r"
Psalms104:15 Ka ebino loisiyalamikinit etau loka etuŋanan, Ka akinyet naisimilimilio akekonyen, Ka atap da naeinakini etau loka ituŋanan agogoŋ,"
Psalms104:16 Imonikinos ikito luka EJAKAIT; Iresia luka Lebanon, luabu kiraik;"
Psalms104:17 Mama edukonokinete akweny akecekais: Etolut da iberosin kes eketogo.
Psalms104:18 Ironan lueojak eraas luka akinei nuka ais; Imor kes ameceta nuka ipooi.
Psalms104:19 Abu kibwaik elap abilia apakio; Ejeŋi akoloŋ akelomar,"
Psalms104:20 Isubi ijo amuton, koraun akuare; Naecedunotor itian kere luka amagoro."
Psalms104:21 Egatasi iŋatunyo ludidik adumun lumejauna, Emoete da ikecenyamat kama ejai Edeke."
Psalms104:22 Elomuni akoloŋ, eboŋorete, Eperete kabuaikec."
Psalms104:23 Elosete ituŋa aswamukec, Aitaaritoikee aitodol eboŋ."
Psalms104:24 Wu EJAKAIT, ipu ca ma ipitenyo luka aswatnisiokon! Isubit kes kere kacoa: Ileleba akwap abarakon."
Psalms104:25 Ejai aŋolol ya, epol ido elal, Ejaas toma iboro lueliatos lumam emarunos, Itian ludidik ka lukapolok da."
Psalms104:26 Elosete ameerin kanen; Ejai nen Lebiatan, loibu kosubak abolia kanen."
Psalms104:27 Ŋul kere kidarito jo, Tetere iinakini kes ikecenyamat kedol apak,"
Psalms104:28 Etukonokinete luiinakini kes; Ilakari akonikan, imonikinos kesi lukaiokak."
Psalms104:29 Ibwai akonikonyen, iyalononoete; Idemari eiyenanekec, etwakete, Eboŋorete da apuakec."
Psalms104:30 Ŋukuni ekonimoyo, esubunio kes; Ido iteteuni ijo alup."
Psalms104:31 Koiaenena aibuses naka EJAKAIT ikar kete; Kolelak EJAKAIT aswamisioke:
Psalms104:32 Loenolekini akwap, kosodi akwap amaran; Etirori iroŋan, epurunete,"
Psalms104:33 Ayeonokini eoŋ EJAKAIT apaarasia kere nuka aijaraka: Ayeonokini aiturit Ekadeke aroko ajari.
Psalms104:34 Koiokik ŋes akaomoom; Alelakini EJAKAIT.
Psalms104:35 Komudiarai ikadiakanarak kakwap, Komameunos da ikaronok. Kiturite EJAKAIT, ijo etauka. Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT,"
Psalms105:1 Kimalata EJAKAI:” kiworoto ekekiror; Kiteienut aswamisioke otuŋa.
Psalms105:2 Koyeikisi ŋes, koyeikisi aiturit ŋes, Kitatamata aswamisioke kere nukaumokin."
Psalms105:3 Kitubusikina kokirorike lokalaunan, Kolakaros itauon luka ŋul kaluemoete EJAKAIT."
Psalms105:4 Komoata EJAKAIT ka akegogoŋ; Komoata akonyeneke ikar kere,"
Psalms105:5 Kiitutu akeswamisio nukaumokin nueswama; Nukaumokinike ka Itubesia luka aitukuke;
Psalms105:6 Wu yes aur naka Aburaam ebulesitike, Yes idwe luka Yakob, luseunake."
Psalms105:7 Ŋes EJAKAIT Ewokodeke: Ejaas iketubesia akwap kere.
Psalms105:8 Eitu ŋesi aitutuketeke ikar kere, Akirot naabu kicorak aturio alukumit."
Psalms105:9 Aitutuket naetutuki ŋesi kAburaam, Ka aiyapositike mama ejai Isaak."
Psalms105:10 Abu kitogogon da ŋipeŋin mama ejai Yakob araun ekisil, Mama ejai Isirael araun aitutuket namam edaun."
Psalms105:11 Kotema atiar, “Kainakini jo akwap naka Kanaan; Koraun ewai loka airumetekon.”"
Psalms105:12 Nakeraatar kesi ituŋa luekidioko, Eebo, luekidioko noi, kiboiororoto kotomake,"
Psalms105:13 Kirimete kateker kiton ateker, Anyoun kajakanut adiopet kiton otuŋa ice."
Psalms105:14 Mam abu kocamak idiotuŋanan aikonakin kes erono, Eebo, abu kitoron ikabakan kanukec;"
Psalms105:15 Kobala ebe, “Sitikitirosi lukinyonyoikitonoka akinyet, Sirikiswamakis ikanabin aronls.”"
Psalms105:16 Konyarak akwap ebeli, Abu kobil ebela kere loka atap,"
Psalms105:17 Abu kijuka etuŋanan aiŋarenikin kes; Aponi Yosep kogwelarai araun ebulesit:
Psalms105:18 Aponi kisiriebai akekeje kirikoi, Kiperikinoi orikoi luka asua."
Psalms105:19 Aitodol apak naetodolere akekirot; Kigimo akirot naka EJAKAIT ŋes.
Psalms105:20 Kijuka eka baka kolacak ŋes, Ekayaiton loka ituŋa, koosik ŋes."
Psalms105:21 Kitarau ŋes ekapolon loka etogoke, Ekayaiton da iboroke kere."
Psalms105:22 Ajen ikapolokoke kwape etoiokitor ŋesi, Aisisianakin imakioke apirianut."
Psalms105:23 Kobu Isirael da Misiri; Kiboikin Yakob akwap naka Kam.
Psalms105:24 Kitupuu iketuŋa noi, Kitogogon da kes adepar lukasurupokec."
Psalms105:25 Kibelok itauonokee alaite iketuŋa, Amodanakin ikebulesin."
Psalms105:26 Abu kijuka Musa ekebulesit, Aaron da loabu koseu,"
Psalms105:27 Kitodikis kes aanyunetake, Ka nukaumokin kakwap naka Kam."
Psalms105:28 Kijukak amuton, kitumuton; Mam apotu kipaliikis akekiro."
Psalms105:29 Kituluo akeeekipi aokot, Koar da ikeceboro lukeeor."
Psalms105:30 Kileleba akeeekwap aidodoka, Kagolai nuka ikabakanakec."
Psalms105:31 Abu kiner, kopotu do icuc luipu noi, Ka ilae koikorunokee kere."
Psalms105:32 Kitetepik kes akaka itia akiru, Ka eimilia loededeŋ akwapukee."
Psalms105:33 Kipot imusabibunukec ka itininikec; Kobilibil ikito luka oikorunokec,"
Psalms105:34 Abu kiner, kobu do emaase, Ka enyede, lomam imarun,"
Psalms105:35 Konyam ŋinikiot kakwapukee, Konyam da araito nuka akeeekwap."
Psalms105:36 Abu kodany da ikiyaik kere kakwapukee, Ageunet naka akecegogoŋ,"
Psalms105:37 Abu kitolom kes koiaas kepuesa ka esabu: Komamei idiopet yenineniakauna katekerinike,"
Psalms105:38 Eyalama Misiri naanyounioto kesi; Naarai apotu kesi kokuriakata kes,"
Psalms105:39 Kotera edou araun eimukos; Ka akim aica kuare,"
Psalms105:40 Kilipata, koinu kes alurueik, Kisimonik kes atap naka akuj."
Psalms105:41 Kona atiiba, kibulubulunos akip; Koleleata kaiboisio nueokito bala ecor."
Psalms105:42 Naarai abu kiitu akekirot nakalaunan, Ka Aburaam da ekebulesit."
Psalms105:43 Kitolom iketuŋa kaiyalama, Luseunake kayoore."
Psalms105:44 Koinak kes akwapin nuka atekerin; Kodemut lukorion luka ituŋa aitaraun lukee:
Psalms105:45 Tetere ericete ikekisila, Idarete da aicorakinetake."
Psalms106:1 Kituroto yesi EJAKAITI Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT! Kimalata ma EJAKAIT; naarai ejok ŋesi: Naarai eiaenena akeitim ikar kere.
Psalms106:2 Iŋai bo gwai epedori alimor aswamisinei nukos nuka EJAKAIT, Arai aitodiar akeiturit kere?"
Psalms106:3 Isirerenitoi ŋul luerieete etube, Ŋin da yeniswamai nuedolito kapakio kere."
Psalms106:4 Wu EJAKAIT, kiitunoi kasianut naitodianakini ikonituŋa; Koanyanarai kaitajarakon:"
Psalms106:5 Kasodi kaany akerianut naka luseunakon, Kalel kaiyalama naka atekerekon, Ketur nepepe kairumetekon."
Psalms106:6 Kipou kadiakasi kalukapapaakosi, Kiswama numam adolit, kisub nukaronok."
Psalms106:7 Mam lukapapaakosi apotu kojenut nukaumokinikon koMisiri; Mam aporu kiitut aipues naka aitimesiakon; Konye apotu kipaliikis kaŋolol, ŋes Aŋolol Nakareŋan,"
Psalms106:8 Konye abu ŋesi kitajar kes kanuka ekekiror, Aitejenunia akepedor nakos."
Psalms106:9 Abu kiretak da Aŋolol Nakarenan, koono: Kitotor kes ataro kosubite bala itorito amodiŋ,"
Psalms106:10 Kitajar kes kakan naka ŋol kaloalait kes, Kolaku da kes kakan naka lokasurup."
Psalms106:11 Korapias akip lukasurupokec; Amamei ediopet da loabu kideun.
Psalms106:12 Kosodete kiyuut kesi akekiro: Koyooto aiturite ŋes.
Psalms106:13 Kisunyasi kesi akekiro aimurwokin; Mam apotu kidareut ainerunike:
Psalms106:14 Konye kikibelikis noi kamodiŋ, Kokodut Edeke kamodiŋ,"
Psalms106:15 Koinak kes nuelipito; Konye kiteseny ikecetauon.
Psalms106:16 Apotu kikokotekis Musa koidukurun, Ka Aaron da ekalaunan loka EJAKAIT."
Psalms106:17 Konaar akwap kiliko Datan, Koburia atukot naka Abiram."
Psalms106:18 Kinep akim katukotokec; Kiewe akim ikaronok.
Psalms106:19 Kiswamaut itaok koKoreb, Komaata aput naealuna."
Psalms106:20 Kwaŋin kisiecasi aibusesukec Kaput naka emoŋ loenyami inya.
Psalms106:21 Kimurwokis Edeke eketajaranikee, Loabu kiswama nukapolok koMisiri:"
Psalms106:22 Aswamisio nukaumokin kakwap naka Kam, Ka nusogim kariri naka Aŋolol Nakarcnan,"
Psalms106:23 Kanuka ŋun kobala ebe tikemudia kes, Kedim Musa loseunake aibwo kakonyeneke aidiek, Aibelokin akenyunyura, kinyek amudiar kes."
Psalms106:24 Eebo, komwanata akwap naejok, Mam apotu kiyuut akekirot;"
Psalms106:25 Konye kirurumata kowemanakec, Mam da apupete eporoto loka EJAKAIT."
Psalms106:26 Kanuka ŋun korio akekan mama ejaas, Aisibiroria kes kamodiŋ,"
Psalms106:27 Isiarisiari aurikec atekerin, Ikaikin kes toma akwapin."
Psalms106:28 Kimorianakinos ka Baal-peor, Konyama asuban nuka lukatwak."
Psalms106:29 Kwaŋin kitunyunyurikis ŋes kakeceswamisio; Kodoik atular mamakec.
Psalms106:30 Kosodi Pinekas aibwo, kitodol etube: Kitananai atular."
Psalms106:31 Kimarakinai ŋes adolit ŋin, Anatar aturio kere ikar kere."
Psalms106:32 Kitunyunyurikis ŋes bobo kakipi nuka Meriba, Kodum Musa arereŋ naerono kanukec:"
Psalms106:33 Naarai apotu kipaliikis ekemoyo, Kisud einer."
Psalms106:34 Mam kes apotu komudias ituŋa Kwape ecorakinitor EJAKAIT;
Psalms106:35 Konye kinyalinyalunos katekerin, Kisisiaut da akeceswamisio:"
Psalms106:36 Kijaanakis aputosiakec: Nuapotu koraunos iica kamakec,"
Psalms106:37 Eebo, apotu koinakis ikecedwe lusap ka lupesur araun asuban mama ejaas aiokin,"
Psalms106:38 Kobukosi aokot numam aronis, Kes aokot nuka ikeeedwe lusap ka lupesur, Luainakinete kesi araun asuban mama ejaas aputosia nuka Kanaan; Komunaun akwap kaokot."
Psalms106:39 Kwaŋin komunaunos kanueswamaete, Koelos da kaswamisiokec."
Psalms106:40 Kanuka nun kinep anyunyura naka EJAKAIT aluikin iketuŋa, Kola da airumeteke."
Psalms106:41 Koinak kes akanin nuka atekerin; Lualaito kes kirumata kes.
Psalms106:42 Koroikis kes lukasurupokec, Kitonokokai kamakee."
Psalms106:43 Abu koyu kes irwan nuipu; Konye kipaliikis kainerunikec, Kitisiloto numam adolitekec."
Psalms106:44 Konye abu kosesen icanikec, Naapupunio aimonyokee:"
Psalms106:45 Kiitu aitutuketeke kamakec, Kiitu da kwape ejaar aipues naka aitimesiake."
Psalms106:46 Koinak kes artmno Kama ejaas ŋul kere luanatarito kes.
Psalms106:47 Kitajarai sio, wu EJAKAIT Ekosideke, Kotukonokinai sio katekerin, Aimalaenen ekonikiror lokalaunan, Kebwonananas kotoma aiturit joo"
Psalms106:48 Kituritete EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, Ameun ikar luŋo kiton ikar kere. Kotemasi ituŋa kere ebe, “Amen.” Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT!"
Psalms107:1 Kimalata ma EJAKAIT; naarai ejok ŋesi: Naarai ejaenena akeitim ikar kere.
Psalms107:2 Koremasi lulakuna luka EJAKAIT kwaŋin, Lualaku nesl kakan naka lokasurup;"
Psalms107:3 Kotuk kes kakwapin, Anyoun kokide koto da, Anyoun kagolitomei ka eŋalakimak da."
Psalms107:4 Kitoroto amodiŋ ipasitos; Mam apotu kodumut ere loiboikinos.
Psalms107:5 Kiilor etaukec kotomakec Kanuka eteŋei ka akure.
Psalms107:6 Kosodete kesi aimony mama ejai EJAKAIT kotoma ocanikec, Koyu kes kationisikec."
Psalms107:7 Kinarenik kes korot loitenara, Tetere elosete ore loiboikinos."
Psalms107:8 Okwe ti ca iruna kituroto EJAKAIT kanuka ajokisike, Kanuka aswamisioke da nukaumokin mama ejaas idwe luka ituŋa!"
Psalms107:9 Naarai isimonikini etau loimiela, Etau da loeriebi eteŋei ilelebi nukaiokak."
Psalms107:10 Ŋul lueboiete kamuton kotoribe da loka atwanare, Koenitete kaiticanit ka asuat;"
Psalms107:11 Naarai apotu kipaliikis akiro nuka Edeke, Komenata ainerunet naka Loejai kuju kakuj:"
Psalms107:12 Kanuka ŋun abu ŋesi kitisil ekecetau kaitaaritoi; Kibiroros, komamei yeninarakinit."
Psalms107:13 Kosodete kesi aimony mama ejai EJAKAIT kotoma oeanikee, Kitajar kes kationisikec."
Psalms107:14 Kitolom kes kamuton kotoribe da loka atwanare, Kobilibil aenetakec."
Psalms107:15 Okwe ti ca ituŋa kituroto EJAKAIT kanuka aiokisike, Kanuka aswamisloke da nukaumokin mama ejaas idwe luka ituŋa!"
Psalms107:16 Naarai abil ikirigin luka aisinit, Atub da atiketa nuka asua."
Psalms107:17 Iticanio ibaŋiok kanuka epalikec, Kanuka numam adolitekec da."
Psalms107:18 Egirit ekecetau inyamat luka ŋolipone kere; Ikunyakinete da orutei luka atwanare.
Psalms107:19 Kosodete kesi aimony mama ejai EJAKAIT kotoma ocanikee, Kitajar kes kationisikec."
Psalms107:20 Ŋukari akekirot, itanaleuni kes, Eyuuni da kamudiariokec."
Psalms107:21 Okwe ti ca iruna kituroto EJAKAIT kanuka ajokisike, Kanuka akeswamisio da nukaumokin mama ejaas idwe luka ituŋa!"
Psalms107:22 Koinakisi asuban nuka aimal, Kolimosi da akeswamisio kayoore,"
Psalms107:23 Ŋul luelosete aŋolol kotoma ameerin, Luiswamaete kotoma akar naepol;"
Psalms107:24 Eanyunete ŋul aswamisio nuka EJAKAIT, Ka nukaumokinike kataro."
Psalms107:25 Naarai icorakini, itukusi da ekwam lokos, Loedakuni akailan."
Psalms107:26 Edokarete kiton akui, kobonorete bobo ataro: Eburunete ikecetauon kanuka iean."
Psalms107:27 Iriananaros lailo ka laiie, kigetigetas bala ekameran, Kipirisiaros ikecetauon piris."
Psalms107:28 Kosodete kesi aimony mama ejai EJAKAIT kotoma oeanikee, Kitolom kes kationisikee."
Psalms107:29 Kisinapikini ekwam, Tetere akailan epalarete."
Psalms107:30 Kosodete kesi aiyalamikin naarai apalasi; Kwaŋin eyaŋaari kes odoket loakotosi kesi adokaria.
Psalms107:31 Okwe ti ca ituŋa kituroto EJAKAIT kanuka ajokisike, Kanuka akeswamisio da nukaumokin mama ejaas idwe luka ituŋa!"
Psalms107:32 Kitopoloosi kesi da ŋes katukot naka ituŋa, Kituroto da ŋes kaibois naka imakio,"
Psalms107:33 Ituluori ieorin amodiŋ, Ka atanin da akwap naconit;"
Psalms107:34 Akwap nakamio ituluori amodiŋ naka abalaŋ, Kanuka aronis naka nul kaluiboiete kotoma."
Psalms107:35 Ituluori amodiŋ abwal naka akipi, Ka akwap naconit da atanin."
Psalms107:36 Isiboikini nina lueriebi eteŋei, Tetere itemokinete ere loiboikinos;"
Psalms107:37 Eyeete amanat, iraete da imusabibun, Edumunete amio naepol."
Psalms107:38 Isirercni kes da, tetere euriaros noi; Mam eeamakini ikeeebaren aiŋoŋar."
Psalms107:39 Kosodi bobo nainonarere kes, naitukukumere Kanuka aroikinio, ka ican, ka aiturur,"
Psalms107:40 Ebukokini ikapolok emenit, Isirimi da kes kamodiŋ naemamei erot."
Psalms107:41 Kwabo itonyouni luilwaritos alemun kaiticaniokee, Einakini ikalia luesubito bala esipan."
Psalms107:42 Eanyunete luitenara kotauon, kiyalamikinos; Numam adolit kere ebutarete."
Psalms107:43 Ŋin yeneeo kibwaik ŋun otau, Koomoomata aitimesia nuka EJAKAIT."
Psalms108:1 Wu Edeke, ecat ekatau; Ayei, eebo, ayei aiturit, kaibusesuka."
Psalms108:2 Kokwenyutu, esabuli ka adeudeu! Adilokini eoŋ elopet akwenyun,"
Psalms108:3 Wu EJAKAIT, kemalaenenei jo kotuna: Ayei aiturit jo katekerin."
Psalms108:4 Naarai epol akoniitim kokuju kakuj, Akonibeit da edolit akuj."
Psalms108:5 Wu Edeke, kitopolooritete jo kokuju kakuj: Akoniibuses da kokuju kakwap kere."
Psalms108:6 Tetere eyuunio iminatakon, Kitajar kakanikon nakoteten, kobonokinoi."
Psalms108:7 Ener Edeke kalauniteke ebe: “Ebwoŋakini: Atiaki Sekem, akori aditot naka Sukot."
Psalms108:8 Gilead akan; Manase da akaŋ; Epuraim ŋes aigaet naka akouka; Yuda ŋes ekabela loka ajakanut.
Psalms108:9 Moab da ŋes akailoŋis; Edom ŋes acakakini akamukat: Ekareikini koPilisitia,”"
Psalms108:10 Iŋai bo ketolomari ore loebwaitai? Iŋai bo kenarenikini kiton Edom?
Psalms108:11 Wu Edeke, mere kijala ijo sio? Ido mam iupasi kakosijore, wu Edeke."
Psalms108:12 Kinarakinai kama ejai lokasurup: Naarai aiŋarakin naka iruna emamei ajokis.
Psalms108:13 Kiswamai nuka atitiŋ kainarakin naka Edeke: Naarai ŋol ŋes ipudapudai lukasurupowok.
Psalms109:1 Sirikililiŋ, wu Edeke loerurenenei;"
Psalms109:2 Naarai kaoonikis ikaronok ka ikeŋalak akeceituke: Enerata keoŋ kanaiep naenalai,"
Psalms109:3 Kalukut kakiro nuka alait, Ketijioto da komamei akirot."
Psalms109:4 Itia aminaka ŋes araunotor lukasurupoka: Konye elipenenei eoŋ,"
Psalms109:5 Karopata eoŋ aronis itia ajokis, Ka alait da itia akamin."
Psalms109:6 Kodakak ijo ekaronon ayait ŋes: Kitobwo da lokasurup kakanike nakoteten.
Psalms109:7 Naetubokinere ŋes, kolom itelekarito akiro; Kitaraunai da akeilip adiakaret,"
Psalms109:8 Kikidiokoto akepaarasia; Koyana ice akeibois.
Psalms109:9 Koraunos ikedwe luemameete papakec, Akeberu da apuserut."
Psalms109:10 Koraunos ikedwe ipasoi, inyamuren da; Komoata inyamat kaneelwana anyoun koreriakee luatiyanakinos."
Psalms109:11 Koyana lokapeseneke kere luejaatar ŋesi: Konatasi imo ikorionoke.
Psalms109:12 Komamuun yeniswamakini ŋes nukasianut; Komamuun da yenitimi idweke luemamei papakee.
Psalms109:13 Kitananai aurike; Komwatarai da ekeeekiror katuri nactupak ini,"
Psalms109:14 Kiitu EJAKAIT numam adolit nuka lukapapaake; Sirikemwatar aronis naka totoke,"
Psalms109:15 Kojaenenas kesi kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT dueudue, Tetere itanani aiitunetekec kakwap,"
Psalms109:16 Naarai mam abu kiitu aitodun aitim, Konye irigai yenikican ka yenilwaritoi, Ka yenebilil etau, aiar kes,"
Psalms109:17 Eebo, amina ŋesi ekenit, kobunok ŋes; Mam abu kisiyalamik ailipakin arereŋ, kolwanari do kamaken,"
Psalms109:18 Konap ekenit bala anapitoke, Koloma da tomake bala akipi, Ido bala akinyet toma akoioke."
Psalms109:19 Koraun kamake bala anapito naerapitor akekuan, Ka amuny da naeenitor ŋes due."
Psalms109:20 Ŋol ŋes eropit loka lukasurupoka kama ejai EJAKAIT, Loka ŋul da luineras nueroko aluikin ekatau."
Psalms109:21 Konye wu Edeke EJAKAIT, kiswamakinai, kanuka ekirorikon, Naarai ejok aitimikon, koyuunai,"
Psalms109:22 Naarai eeana ido elwaritoi, Ekatau da imusunitai kotomakan,"
Psalms109:23 Alosi bala etoribe loeoliori; Kelakilakar eoŋ bala emaase.
Psalms109:24 Anonokata akakuŋin kanuka aikany eteŋei; Adokoror akakuan.
Psalms109:25 Araun eoŋ amorosit kamakee: Nakaanyuniata eoŋ imunumunete akecekwes.
Psalms109:26 Wu EJAKAIT Ekadeke, kinarakinai; Okwe, kitajarai kwape ejaar akoniitim:"
Psalms109:27 Tetere ejenunete ebe ŋin ŋes aswam naka akanikon; Ebe ijo, EJAKAIT, ŋes iswama."
Psalms109:28 Kikenoto kesi, konye kisireren ijo: Naenyounioto, irumete ileic, konye eleli ekonibulesit."
Psalms109:29 Kitanapai lukasurupoka aitisilio, Kimukoros da ikeeeleic bala elou."
Psalms109:30 Emalaenenei noi EJAKAIT kaitukuka; Eebo, eturenenei ŋes kokodet."
Psalms109:31 Naarai ebwoenenei ŋesi kakan nakoteten naka yenilwaritoi, Aitaiar ŋes kama ejaas luetubokinete eketau,"
Psalms110:1 Abu EJAKAIT kotema ekaiakait ehe, “Kiboikin akanika nakoteten, Aitodol naebwaikinia lukasurupokon kwap kakeienekon.”"
Psalms110:2 Iiukari EJAKAIT ebela loka akonigogoŋ anyoun ko Sion: Kirumite ijo kokidin kalukasurupokon.
Psalms110:3 Ŋaikinos ikonituŋa kakote kapaaran naka apedorikon: Kajokisio nuka alaunit, kakoik naka atupuruc, Ejaas jo akopyo nuka ikatumunakakon."
Psalms110:4 Eyapoiki EJAKAIT, ido mam ijulakini, ebe “Irai ijo esasedoti ikar kere Kwape ejaar epone loka Melukisadek.”"
Psalms110:5 EJAKAIT, kakanikon nakoteten Icumi ikabakan aipelor kapaaran naka anyunyurake."
Psalms110:6 Etubokini ŋesi atekerin, Isilelebikini aiboisio awate nukatwak; Icumi aipelor ikapolok kakwapin nuipu,"
Psalms110:7 Emasi akipi nuka aguurut nakorot: Kanuka ŋun ikeuni akou.
Psalms111:1 Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT. Emalaenenei EJAKAIT kekatau kere, Kotoma aurianet naka luitenara kotauon, kotoma okodet da."
Psalms111:2 Epolok aswarmsio nuka EJAKAIT, Emoete ŋul kere luisiyalamikinito kes:"
Psalms111:3 Akeswam erai aibuses, ka apolou; Ejaenena akedolit ikar kere."
Psalms111:4 Eswama nukaumokinike aiitunio: Esiana EJAKAIT, ileleba aitim."
Psalms111:5 Ainak ŋul lueyonito ŋes inyamat: Iitununei aitutuketeke ikar kere.
Psalms111:6 Etodiki iketuŋa apedor naka akeswamisio, Kotoma ainakin kes airwnet naka atekerin."
Psalms111:7 Aswamisio nuka akaninike kes abeit ka etube; Aicorakinetake kere icasito.
Psalms111:8 Icasito ikar kere, Iswamao kotoma abeit ka atenit,"
Psalms111:9 Ejukaki iketuŋa alakunio; Ecoraki akeitutuket ikar kere: Lokalaunan ekekiror, loeyonon da!"
Psalms111:10 Ayoŋit EJAKAIT ŋes ageunet naka acoa; Ŋul luiswamaete kwaŋin ejaas kaijen naejok: Ejaenena aituriteke ikar kere.
Psalms112:1 Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT. Isirereŋitoi ituŋanan yeneyoŋit EJAKAIT, Yenisiyalamikinit noi akeicorakineta."

Psalms112:4 Ecaikini Iuitenara kotauon aica kamuton, Esiana ŋesi, ido ileleba aitim ka adolit."

Psalms112:8 Ecat eketau, mam ekurianar, Aitodol naeanyunia nuipuda ŋesi edoikinete lukasurupoke."

Psalms113:1 Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT! Kituroto, yes ibulesin luka EJAKAIT, Kituroto ekiror loka EJAKAIT,"

Psalms115:1 Mere mamakosi, wu EJAKAIT, mere mamakosi, Konye koinak ekonikiror aibuses, Kanuka aitimikon ido kanuka abeitekon,"
Psalms115:2 Kanukinyo etemariata atekerin ebe, “Ai bo kwana ejai Edekekec?”"
Psalms115:3 Konye Edekewok ejai toma akuj: Eswama nuepuda elopet.
Psalms115:4 Eraas aputosiakec epuesa ka esabu, Aswam naka akanin nuka ituŋa."
Psalms115:5 Ejaas aituke, konye mam ineras; Ejaas da akonye, konye mam esesenete."
Psalms115:6 Ejaas aki, konye mam epupete; Ejaas da ikumes, konye mam iŋuunete."
Psalms115:7 Ejaas akanin, konye mam itiŋere: Ejaas da akeie, konye mam elosete, Mam ineras kiporotoikee."
Psalms115:8 Ŋul luesubete kes eputokinos kakes; Eebo, ninidioper yenemuno kes,"

Psalms115:10 Okwe ekal loka Aaron, komunonena EJAKAIT, Erai ŋesi ckenarakinanikec ido ekecebuku,"
Psalms115:11 Yes luiyonito EJAKAIT, komunonenasi EJAKAIT: Erai ŋesi ekenarakinanikec ido ekecebuku,"
Psalms115:12 Naarai abu EJAKAIT kiitu oni; kisirereni ŋesi oni: Isirereni ekal loka Isirael, Isirereŋi ekal loka Aaron."
Psalms115:13 Isirereni ŋul lueyonito EJAKAIT, Kere lukapolok ka ludidik da."
Psalms115:14 Kiyatanak EJAKAIT yes noi noi, Yes ka ikusidwe."

Psalms116:5 Esiana EJAKAIT, ido edolit; Eebo, itimono Ewokodeke."
Psalms116:6 Idari EJAKAIT iiimat: Aponi ketisili konye ketaiar ŋesi eoŋ.

Psalms118:1 Okwe kimalata EJAKAIT, naarai ejok ŋesi: Naarai eiaenena akeitim ikar kere,"
Psalms118:2 Kotema do Isirael ebe, “Ejacnena akeitim ikar kere.”"
Psalms118:3 Kotema do ekal loka Aaron ebe, “Ejaenena akeitim ikar kere.”"
Psalms118:4 Kotemasi kesi da lueyonito EJAKAIT ebe, “Ejaenena akeitim ikar kere.”"
Psalms118:5 Abu kewone EJAKAIT kationisika: Kaboŋok EJAKAIT, kebwaik da aibois naelal."
Psalms118:6 Ejai EJAKAIT owaika, mam akurianar: Inyo bo epcdori ituŋanan aiswamakin eoŋ?"
Psalms118:7 Ejai EJAKAIT owaika kama kanul kalukenarakinete eoŋ: Kanuka ŋun aanyuni eoŋ nuepuda kama kanul kalukalaito eoŋ.

Psalms118:9 Eiok amun EJAKAIT, Itia amunokina ikapolok."
Psalms118:10 Kalukut eoŋ atekerin, Kokiror loka EJAKAIT amudiari kes."
Psalms118:11 Kalukut eoŋ, eebo, kalukut: Kokiror loka EJAKAIT amudiari kes."
Psalms118:12 Kalukut eoŋ bala ao; Aduniosi kesi bala akim nakokukwa: Kokiror loka EJAKAIT amudiari kes.

Psalms118:17 Mam atwani konye ajari, Kasodi alimor aswamisio nuka EJAKAIT."
Psalms118:18 Kaleco noi EJAKAIT eoŋ, Konye mam abu kainak atwanare."
Psalms118:19 Koŋaikinai eoŋ ikirigin luka adolit: Alomari tomakec, emalai EJAKAIT."
Psalms118:20 Ŋol ŋes erute loka EJAKAIT; Elomarete ikadolitok tomake.
Psalms118:21 Kemalaenenei jo, naarai kibonok eoŋ, Ido iraun akaitajar,"
Psalms118:22 Amoru naanerete ikadukok Araun nakapolon naka agor.
Psalms118:23 Ŋin ŋes aswam naka EJAKAIT; Eumokina noi kakonyenewok.
Psalms118:24 Na ŋes apaaran naasubi EJAKAIT; Kileli keyalamasi da kotomake.
Psalms118:25 Wu EJAKAIT, kitajarai kinainair: Wu EJAKAIT, kiŋaiŋait, kijuk akerianut."
Psalms118:26 Isirerenitoi ŋol loebuni kokiror loka EJAKAIT: Kilipaki isio yes arereŋ kotogo loka EJAKAIT.
