Psalms118:29 Okwe kimalata EJAKAIT; naarai ejok ŋesi; Naarai ejaenena akeitim ikar kere.
Psalms119:1 Isirerenitoi ŋul luedolito cut korot, Luelosete kokisil loka EJAKAIT."
Psalms119:2 Isirereniroi ŋul luericito aiteienunetake, Luemoete ŋes kekecetau kere."
Psalms119:3 Eebo, mam ŋul iswamaete numam adolit, Elosenenete korotinike."
Psalms119:4 Ibu kicorak sio aituutooretakon, Tetere kidunyakini airic kes."
Psalms119:5 Okwe karai kicasito ikarotin: Tiaricenenei ikonikisila!
Psalms119:6 Ŋes do mam kerumiata ileic Naacamunia akoniicorakineta kere.
Psalms119:7 Kemalaenenei jo ketau loitenara, Naesisiaunia itubesiakon luedolito."
Psalms119:8 Aricenenei ikonikisila: Okwe sirikiijal cut!
Psalms119:9 Ikonakini ai ekatumunan italauni ekerot? Kocoite kwape eiaar akonikirot.
Psalms119:10 Kamo eoŋ jo kekatau kere: Okwe, kenyek apaar kaicorakinetakon."
Psalms119:11 Enadak eoŋ akonikirot otauka, Kenye adiakar kamakon."
Psalms119:12 Kituritete jo, wu EJAKAIT: Kisisianakinai eoŋ ikonikisila,"
Psalms119:13 Alimonok eoŋ kakanaiep Itubesia kere luka aitukukon.
Psalms119:14 Alelakinit eoŋ erot loka aiteienunetakon, Kwape alelakinitor abar kere."
Psalms119:15 Aomoomoenenei aituutooretakon, Ido acamunit ikonirotin."
Psalms119:16 Esiyalamikinit ikonikisila: Mam kemurwokini akonikirot,"
Psalms119:17 Kikonak ekonibulesit nukajokak, tetere ajari; Kasodi karic akonikirot."
Psalms119:18 Kitikweny akakonye, Kaany nukaumokin kokisilakon."
Psalms119:19 Arai eoŋ ekeboiororon kakwap: Sirikibwa akoniicorakineta kamakaŋ,"
Psalms119:20 Emwokolikin ekatau kanuka eimiel noi Itubesiakon apakio kere.
Psalms119:21 Ibu kitoron luiturokina: Kikenoi luepaarete kaieorakinetakon.
Psalms119:22 Kolema amoromoro ka amwanio kamakaŋ, Naarai aric eoŋ aitejenunetakon."
Psalms119:23 Apotu ikapolok da kiboikinos kinerasi aluikin eoŋ: Konye abu ekonibulesit koomoomoi ikisilakon.
Psalms119:24 Esiyalamikinit eoŋ aitejenunetakon, Eraas da iinerunetaka."
Psalms119:25 Eminaikin ekatau apua: Kitaiarunai kwape ejaar akonikirot.
Psalms119:26 Alimo ikarotin, ijo da ibu Koboŋok: Kisisianakinai ikisilakon."
Psalms119:27 Kiteienunai erot loka aituutooretakon: Kasodi konyet aomoom aswamisiokon nukaumokin.
Psalms119:28 Epirisiar ekatau kanuka alaŋir: Kitogogoŋoi kwape ejaar akonikirot.
Psalms119:29 Kolema erot loka aiŋal kamakaŋ, Ido koinakinai ikonikisila kasianut."
Psalms119:30 Aseu eoŋ erot loka amunonut: Ebwaik itubesiakon akonyeneka.
Psalms119:31 Eminaikin eoŋ aiteienunetakon: Wu EJAKAIT, sirikiisurum ileic."
Psalms119:32 Akerianari orot loka aicorakinetakon, Naitalalaaria ekatau."
Psalms119:33 Wu EJAKAIT, kisisianakinai erot loka ikisilakon: Kasodi aricit aitodol awasia."
Psalms119:34 Ae acoa, kasodi aidar ekonikisil: Eebo, arici eoŋ kekatau kere."
Psalms119:35 Kitotoroi eoŋ osokot loka aicorakinetakon; Naarai esiyalamikinit eoŋ kes.
Psalms119:36 Kogoŋak ekatau aitejenunetakon, Konye mere airananut."
Psalms119:37 Kibelok akakonye kaite aamameak, Kitaiarai da korotinikon."
Psalms119:38 Kitogogonik ekonibulesit akonikirot, Naerai naka ayoŋite jo,"
Psalms119:39 Kibelok akamorosit naketukuriani; Naarai ejokuka itubesiakon.
Psalms119:40 Koany, emiela eoŋ airuutooretakon, Kitajarai kotoma adolitekon."
Psalms119:41 Wu EJAKAIT, kadolokis eoŋ aitimesiakon, Aitaiarakon kwape ejaar akonikirot."
Psalms119:42 Kwaŋin adumuni eoŋ aboŋokinet naabonokini yenikamoromoroi; Naarai amuno eoŋ akonikirot.
Psalms119:43 Sirikilema akirot naka abeit kaitukuka: Naarai amunokin itubesiakon.
Psalms119:44 Kasodi adunyakin airic ikonikisila, Ikar ka ikar."
Psalms119:45 Kalakakin kalositeka; Naarai amoot aituutooretakon.
Psalms119:46 Eneri da nuka aiteienunetakon kakonyen nuka ikabakan, Mam kerumete ileic."
Psalms119:47 Esiyalamikini eoŋ aicorakinetakon, Nuamina."
Psalms119:48 Ariori akakan mama ejaas aicorakinetakon, nuamina; Aomoomoi da nuka ikisilakon."
Psalms119:49 Kiitu akirot kama ejai ekonibulesit, Naarai ibu kisumun eoŋ."
Psalms119:50 Na ŋes alakaraka kotoma aiticanioka., Naarai akonikirot ketaiar eoŋ,"
Psalms119:51 Kesekeloto eoŋ noi luisosoloko: Konye mam apaarit kokisilakon.
Psalms119:52 Eitu itubesiakon lukolo jo, wu EJAKAIT Alakara da."
Psalms119:53 Kerum eoŋ anyunyura naepol, Kanuka ikaronok lueialete ikonikisila."
Psalms119:54 Araunos ikisilakon ikakososinei Kotojo loka ejobiraneka.
Psalms119:55 Wu EJAKAIT, eitu ekonikiror kuare, Arie ikonikisila."
Psalms119:56 Ejai eoŋ ŋin Naarai aricit aituutooretakon.
Psalms119:57 EJAKAIT ŋes akorakineteka: Abu kalimo ebe arici akonikiro.
Psalms119:58 Abu kenaiŋa asianutukon kekatau kere: Kitimoi kwape eiaar akonikirot.
Psalms119:59 Abu kaomoom irotinika, Kebeleu da akakeje mama ejaas aitejenunetakon."
Psalms119:60 Abu kesunyak, mam abu ketumor, Airie aicorakinetakon."
Psalms119:61 Kekodikodata aunoi nuka ikaronok; Konye mam kemurwokinito ikonikisila.
Psalms119:62 Anyouni kidinebai aimal jo Kanuka itubesiakon luedolito.
Psalms119:63 Arai eoŋ epaup loka ŋul kere Iukiyonito jo, Ka ŋul da luericito aituutooretakon."
Psalms119:64 Wu EJAKAIT, ileleba akwap akoniitim: Kisisianakinai ikonikisila."
Psalms119:65 Ibu kikonak ekonibulesit ejok, Wu EJAKAIT, kwape eiaar akonikirot."
Psalms119:66 Kisisianakinai etube loejok ka aijen; Naarai eyuu akoniieorakineta.
Psalms119:67 Eroko eoŋ kiticana abu kapaa; Konye kwana arieit akonikirot,"
Psalms119:68 Iiok ijo, ido iswamai nuejok; Kisisianakinai ikonikisila."
Psalms119:69 Kenyonyoikis eoŋ luiturokina aiŋal: Arici aituutooretakon kekatau kere,"
Psalms119:70 Etariono ekeeetau bala asiepai; Konye eoŋ esiyalamikinit ikonikisila.
Psalms119:71 Ejok keticani; Tetere esisiauni ikonikisila.
Psalms119:72 Ekisil loka aitukukon ejok kamakaŋ, Adepar ilukumin luka esabu ka epuesa da."
Psalms119:73 Akonikanin kasubete eoŋ keticata da; Ae acoa tetere esisiauni aicorakinetakon.
Psalms119:74 Kaanyunete eoŋ ŋul lukiyonito jo kosodete aiyalamikin; Naarai amunokin akonikirot.
Psalms119:75 Wu EJAKAIT, ajeni ebe edolito itubesiakon, Ebe da kitiean ijo eoŋ kotoma amunonut."
Psalms119:76 Kenainait, ketalaka asianutukon-nakamln, Kwape eiaar akonikirot mama ejai ekonibulesit."
Psalms119:77 Kadolokis eoŋ akoniitimesia nukajokak, tetere ajari: Naarai kesiyalamikinito ikonikisila."
Psalms119:78 Kisurumai luiturokina ileic; naarai kebirosi kasabanakin: Konye eoŋ aomoomoi nuka aituutooretakon,"
Psalms119:79 Kibeleunos ŋul lukiyoniro jo mama ajai, Ejenunete da aiteienunetakon."
Psalms119:80 Korau ekatau loedolit kokisilakon: Tetere mam kerumete ileje.
Psalms119:81 Imwokolikin ekatau kanuka aitajarakon: Konye amunokin akonikirot,"
Psalms119:82 Ewariwarete akakonye kanuka akonikirot, Nape atemaria ebe, “Wori bo kitalakaaria?”"
Psalms119:83 Naarai asub bala eriagi loka emukule kotoma apuru: Konye mam kemurwokinito ikonikisila.
Psalms119:84 Imwaasi ai apaarasia nuka ekonibulesit? Wori bo itodolio ijo etube mama ejaas ŋul lukemanito eoŋ?
Psalms119:85 Kabokanakis luiturokina apanya, Lumam etupito ikonikisila."
Psalms119:86 Aicorakinetakon kere eraas numunon: Kemanito kasabanakin; kiŋarakinai eoŋ.
Psalms119:87 Nepetai kes amudiar eoŋ kakwap; Konye mam abu kajal aituutooretakon,"
Psalms119:88 Kitajarai kwape ejaar asianutukon-nakamin; Kwaŋin ariei aitejenunet naka aitukukon
Psalms119:89 Wu EJAKAIT, icasit akonikirot Kotoma akuj ikar kere."
Psalms119:90 Enatarit amunonutukon aturio kere: Iticat ijo akwap, ido iboie."
Psalms119:91 Iboiete lolo kwape ejaatar aicorakinetakon; Naarai iboro kere eraas ikonibulesin.
Psalms119:92 Kedim eoŋ aisiyalamikinit ikonikisila, Ti do eoŋ kaolio kotoma aiticanioka."
Psalms119:93 Mam eut kemurwokinete aituutooretakon; Naarai kes kitajaria ijo eoŋ,"
Psalms119:94 Arai eoŋ ekon, kitajarai; Naarai amoot eoŋ aituutooretakon."
Psalms119:95 Kedareut ikaronok amudiar eoŋ; Konye eoŋ aomoomoi nuka aitejenunetakon.
Psalms119:96 Aany esaŋe loka adolit kere; Konye elal noi akoniicorakinet.
Psalms119:97 Amina ca ma eoŋ ikonikisila! Aomoomoi eoŋ nukec apaaran kere.
Psalms119:98 Ketocout eoŋ aicorakinetakon adepar lukasurupoka, Naarai ejaenenas keoŋ tiritir."
Psalms119:99 Epol eoŋ aijen adepar ikakesisianakinak kere; Naarai aomoomoenenei nuka aitejenunetakon.
Psalms119:100 Ajeni eoŋ nuipu adepar imakio, Naarai aricit eoŋ aituutooretakon."
Psalms119:101 Etikok akakeje aibe ŋolirot kere loerono, Tetere arici akonikirot."
Psalms119:102 Mam apaarit kotubesiakon; Naarai kisisianak ijo eoŋ.
Psalms119:103 Ewinyak ca ma akirokon kaŋajepeka! Eebo, ewinyak adepar esik kaitukuka!"
Psalms119:104 Aituutooretakon kes adumanakini eoŋ aijen: Kanuka ŋun alait ŋolirot loka aiŋal.
Psalms119:105 Akonikirot ŋes atala naka akejeka, Aica da nakosokotoka."
Psalms119:106 Eyapo, ido etogogoŋ ŋun ebe, Arici itubesiakon luedolito."
Psalms119:107 Keticani noi: Wu EJAKAIT, kitajarai kwape ejaar akonikirot."
Psalms119:108 Keŋaiŋait jo, kocam ainakineta nukakote nuka aitukuka, Wu EJAKAIT, kisisianakinai da ikonitubesia."
Psalms119:109 Ejai ekatau ducuduc akanika; Konye mam kemurwokinito ikonikisila.
Psalms119:110 Kalokata ikaronok keic; Konye mam abu kapaa kaituutooretakon.
Psalms119:111 Etarau eoŋ aitejenunetakon bala airumet ikar kere; Naarai elelakinit ekatau kes.
Psalms119:112 Agoŋak ekatau aitodol ikonikisila, Ikar kere, aitodol awasia."
Psalms119:113 Alait eoŋ ŋul luka itauon iarei; Konye amina ikonikisila.
Psalms119:114 ŋjo ŋes akaŋopis ekabuku da: Amunokin eoŋ akonikirot.
Psalms119:115 Konyout kamaka yesi luiswamaete aronis; Tetere arici eoŋ aicorakineta nuka Ekadeke,"
Psalms119:116 Kigaŋai, kwape ejaar akonikirot, tetere ajari; Kenyeis ileic airum kotoma amunoka."
Psalms119:117 Kigaŋai, keyamakin, Kasodi acamun ikonikisila ducuduc,"
Psalms119:118 Iner ijo ŋul kere luepaarete kokisilakon; Naarai aiŋalakec erai aamameak.
Psalms119:119 Icaka ijo ikaronok kere luka akwap bala asusujo: Kanuka ŋun amina eoŋ aitejenunetakon,"
Psalms119:120 Emarani akakuan kanuka ayoŋit jo; Ido ayoŋit itubesiakon.
Psalms119:121 Etodol eoŋ etube ka abeit: Sirikiijalak kama ejaas lukaroikinito eoŋ,"
Psalms119:122 Kobwaa ekonibulesit, kanuka ajokis: Kinyeis luiturokina aroikin eoŋ."
Psalms119:123 Ewariwarete akakonye kanuka aitajarakon, Ido kanuka akirotokon naedolit."
Psalms119:124 Kikonak ekonibulesit kwape ejaar akoniitim, Kisisianakinai da ikonikisila."
Psalms119:125 Arai eoŋ ekonibulesit, ae acoa; Tetere ajenuni aitejenunetakon,"
Psalms119:126 Adol apak EJAKAIT aswam, Naarai etapalaut kesi ikonikisila."
Psalms119:127 Kanuka ŋun amiria aicorakinetakon, Adepar esabu, eebo, adepar esabu loejok."
Psalms119:128 Ŋes aderio aituutooretakon kere nuka akiro kere nuejok; Alait da ŋolirot loka aiŋal,"
Psalms119:129 Eumokina aitejenunetakon: Ŋes ericia ekatau kes.
Psalms119:130 Naeŋaarotor akonikiro itacaikinete; Itejenikinete ijimat,"
Psalms119:131 Abu kaoon akaituk noi, abu keyeŋanakin; Naarai emiela aicorakinetakon."
Psalms119:132 Kibelokin mama ajai, kitimoi, Kwape itapitor aikonanakin ŋul lueminas ekonikiror."
Psalms119:133 Kiteten ekalose kakirotokon, Kinyeis numam adolit kere ayait eoŋ,"
Psalms119:134 Kolakunai karoikinio naka ituŋanan: Kwaŋin ŋes aricia aituutooretakon.
Psalms119:135 Kitacaik ekonibulesit akonikonyen; Kisisianakinai da ikonikisila.
Psalms119:136 Eleleete icorin luka akipi kakonyeka, Naarai mam ituŋa ericito ikonikisila."
Psalms119:137 Wu EJAKAIT, idolit ijo, Ikonitubesia da itenara."
Psalms119:138 Ibu kicorak aitejenunetakon kadolit, Ka amunonut naepol."
Psalms119:139 Kerum eoŋ ekokote Naarai emurwokis Iukasurupoka akonikiro.
Psalms119:140 Ililiauna akonikirot noi; Kanuka ŋun ŋes eminaritor ekonibulesit.
Psalms119:141 Adite eoŋ kamenitai da: Konye mam kemurwokinito aituutooretakon.
Psalms119:142 Adolitekon ŋes adolit namam enaŋi, Ikonikisila da kes abeit."
Psalms119:143 Kadoikis eoŋ ican ka ariebo; Konye kesiyalamikinito aicorakinetakon.
Psalms119:144 Edolite aitejenunetakon ikar kere; Ae acoa, tetere ajari."
Psalms119:145 Abu kewone kekatau kere; koboŋokinoi, wu EJAKAIT: Arieenenei ikonikisila."
Psalms119:146 Abu kewone jo; kitajarai, Tetere arici aitejenunetakon,"
Psalms119:147 Abu kanyou eroko etop kelomuna, kamony: Kamunokina akonikirot."
Psalms119:148 Abu kakweny eroko akwenyuneta nuka akuare, Tetere aomoomoi akonikirot."
Psalms119:149 Kiira eporotoka kwape ejaar akonisianut-nakamin: Wu EJAKAIT, kitajarai kwape ejaatar itubesiakon."
Psalms119:150 Ikunyunete die luibwapito aronis; Elwaka kesi kokisilakon.
Psalms119:151 Wu EJAKAIT, ijai ijo die, Akoniicorakineta da kere eraas abeit."
Psalms119:152 Abu kajen apeŋo kaitejenunetakon ebe, Iticasit kes ikar kere."
Psalms119:153 Koomoom aiticanitoika, ido koyu eoŋ; Naarai mam kemurwokinito ikonikisila."
Psalms119:154 Kopurokinai akakirot, kolakunai: Kitajarai kwape ejaar akonikirot."
Psalms119:155 Elwana aitajario kama ejaas ikaronok, Naarai mam kes emoete ikonikisila,"
Psalms119:156 Wu EJAKAIT, epolok noi aitimesiakon nuejok: Kitajarai kwape ejaatar itubesiakon."
Psalms119:157 Ipu lukemanito ka lukasurupoka da; Konye mam eoŋ apaarit kaitejenunetakon.
Psalms119:158 Abu kaany luemodomodoete, keturur; Naarai mam ericito akonikirot."
Psalms119:159 Koomoom kwape aminar eoŋ aituutooretakon: Kitajarai, wu EJAKAIT, kwape ejaar asianutukon-nakamin."
Psalms119:160 Etiai loka akirokon ŋes abeit; Itubesiakon luedolito kere ejaenenas ikar kere.
Psalms119:161 Kemanata eoŋ ikapolok komam akirot, Konye ebwoi ekatau koyoŋite akonikiro."
Psalms119:162 Alelakinit eoŋ akonikirot, Kwape ituŋanan yenedumuni iŋatan luipu,"
Psalms119:163 Alait eoŋ asacit da aiŋalanut; Konye amina ikonikisila.
Psalms119:164 Keturenenei jo irwan akanykaarei apaaran; Kanuka itubesiakon luedolito.
Psalms119:165 Lueminas ikonikisila ejaas ainapakin naepol; Emamei da adiokirot naisiguikini kes.
Psalms119:166 Wu EJAKAIT, amunokin aitajarakon, Eswama da aicorakinetakon."
Psalms119:167 Abu ekatau koric aitejenunetakon; Ido amina kes noi.
Psalms119:168 Abu karic aituutooretakon ka aitejenunetakon; Naarai ejaas ikarotin kere akonyenekon.
Psalms119:169 Wu EJAKAIT, kikuny aimonyoka neijai: Ae acoa kwape ejaar akonikirot."
Psalms119:170 Kodol aiŋaiŋaka akonyenekon: Koyuunai kwape ejaar akonikirot.
Psalms119:171 Kolim akaituk aiturit; Naarai kisisianakini ijo eoŋ ikonikisila.
Psalms119:172 Koye akaŋajep akonikirot; Naarai edolito aicorakinetakon kere.
Psalms119:173 Kitemokino akonikan aiŋarakin eoŋ; Naarai aseu aituutooretakon.
Psalms119:174 Wu EJAKAIT, emiela aitajarakon; Esiyalamikinit ikonikisila."
Psalms119:175 Kojar ekatau, kosodi aiturit jo; Keŋarakis da eoŋ itubesiakon."
Psalms119:176 Apaa eoŋ bala amerekek naeoliorit; komou ekonibulesit; Naarai mam kemurwokinito aicorakinetakon.
Psalms120:1 Abu kamony mama ejai EJAKAIT kocanika, Kaboŋok eoŋ,"
Psalms120:2 Wu EJAKAIT, koyu ekatau Kama kaituke nuiŋalaete, Ka aŋajep da naemodomodoi.’"
Psalms120:3 Inyo bo kiinakinio jo, Ido anyoika bobo ace nukikonakinio jo, ijo aŋajep naimodomodoi?"
Psalms120:4 Imalia lueitak luka ikagogoŋok, Ka akuk nuka erotem."
Psalms120:5 Wu okwe, naarai eboiororor koMesek, Eboienenei koweman luka Kedar!"
Psalms120:6 Eboi ekatau apak naepol Kayenelait ainapakin.
Psalms120:7 Enapakina eoŋ: Konye naeneria, ekotosi kesi ejie."
Psalms121:1 Eteluori akakonye mama ejaas iroŋan: Ai bo ebunio akaiŋarakinio?
Psalms121:2 Ebuni akaiŋarakinio kama ejai EJAKAIT, Lokesubi akuj ka akwap."
Psalms121:3 Mam ŋes ecamakini akonikeju aigetanar: Ŋol lokidari jo mam iluranar.
Psalms121:4 Koany, ŋol loidari Isirael Mam iluranar karaida ajotoor."
Psalms121:5 EJAKAIT ŋes ekedaranikon: EJAKAIT ŋes etolimikon kakanikon nakoteten.
Psalms121:6 Mam akoloŋ kinomori jo paaran, Karaida elap kuare,"
Psalms121:7 Kidarenenei EJAKAIT jo karonis kere; Idari ŋesi ekonitau.
Psalms121:8 Idarenenei EJAKAIT akonilosit ka akoniboŋun da, Amear lolo aitodol ikar kere."
Psalms122:1 Abu keyalamikin nakalimokiniata ebe, “Kaloto togo loka EJAKAIT.”"
Psalms122:2 Ebwoete akosikeje Koruteikon, wu Yerusalem."
Psalms122:3 ljo Yerusalem, idukuk Bala ere loidunyudunyitai:"
Psalms122:4 Loedokiata atekerin, Kes atekerin nuka EJAKAIT, Araut aitejenunet mama ejai Isirael, Aimal ekiror loka EJAKAIT."
Psalms122:5 Naarai esipokinitai nen Iicoloŋo luka aitub, Iicoloŋo luka etogo loka Daudi."
Psalms122:6 Kilipakis Yerusalem ainapakin: Ekeriakaros lukiminasi jo.
Psalms122:7 Kojau ainapakin kotoma arwatatinikon, Akerianut da otogoikon lukapolok."
Psalms122:8 Kanuka ikainacan ka ikapaup, Alimuni do ebe, “Kojaun ainapakin tomakon.”"
Psalms122:9 Kanuka etogo loka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke Kamoikini jo ajokis.
Psalms123:1 Keteluori jo kakakonye, Wu jo loiboie kotoma akuj."
Psalms123:2 Koany, kwape eseseniata akonye nuka ibulesin akan naka ekecejakait, Ido kwape eseseniata akonye nuka abulesit ajakaitike; Kwape kwaŋin eseseniata akosikonye EJAKAIT Ekosideke, Aitodol nakitimio ŋesi sio."
Psalms123:3 Kitimoi sio, wu EJAKAIT, kitimoi sio: Naarai kiup isio cut amenio."
Psalms123:4 Aupa ikositauon Aisekelio naka ŋul kaluijakakaete, Ka amenio naka luiturosi."
Psalms124:1 Kiner do Isirael ebe, Kedim EJAKAIT ajakut owaiwok,"
Psalms124:2 Kedim EJAKAIT ajakut owaiwok, Nakinyoikinioto ituŋa asurokin oni:"
Psalms124:3 Ti do kes kilikorito oni kajarete, Naenepunia akecenyunyura asurokin oni:"
Psalms124:4 Ti do akipi kilelearito oni, Aleles da tierapiarit iwokotauon."
Psalms124:5 Ti do akipi nuedakununos Erapiarito iwokotauon.
Psalms124:6 Kituritete EJAKAIT, Lomam abu koinak oni okelakec bala lumejauna."
Psalms124:7 Aku ewokotau bala akweny naekui kairukutu naka ikalokak: Elakulakun airukutu, kiku do oni."
Psalms124:8 Aiŋarakiniowok ejai okiror loka EJAKAIT, Lokesubi akuj ka akwap."
Psalms125:1 Ŋul luemunos EJAKAIT esubito bala emoru Sion, Lomam epedorio aijaŋar, konye ebwoi ikar kere,"
Psalms125:2 Kwape irimoritotor iroŋan Yerusalem, Irimorit kwaŋin EJAKAIT ikeruna, Amear lolo aitodol ikar kere."
Psalms125:3 Naarai ebela loka aronis mam esalakini airumet naka ikadolitok; Tetere mam ikadolitok eriorete akecekanin mama ejaasn adolit.
Psalms125:4 Wu EJAKAIT, kikonak ejok ŋul luejok, Ka ŋul da luitenara kotauonokec."
Psalms125:5 Konye ŋul luepaarete orotinikec lumagul, Itolomari EJAKAIT kes nepepe kikeswamak numam adolit. Kinapakin Isirael."
Psalms126:1 Naebelokinio bobo EJAKAIT anatario naka Sion, Kipou kasubata bala ŋul luirujaete."
Psalms126:2 Kilelebuni do akiena aitukewok, Ayoore da aŋajepawok: Kotemasi do atekerin ebe, “Eswamaki EJAKAIT kes nuepolok.”"
Psalms126:3 Kiswamak oni EJAKAIT nuepolok; Ŋes kiyalamar.
Psalms126:4 Wu EJAKAIT, kibelok bobo akosiŋatario, Kwape kalelesia nuka ari naka Eŋalakimak."
Psalms126:5 Ŋul lueyeete komonyete akiyo, Esakete kailel."
Psalms126:6 Karaida elosi korotoke komonyi akiyo, Kitiŋite ikinyom luyean; Eboŋuni kailel, eyaŋauni da iisutanake."
Psalms127:1 Dimikito keduk EJAKAIT etogo, Itaaritos atai luedukete: Dimikito kidar EJAKAIT ere, Ekwenyi lokedaran atai,"
Psalms127:2 Idilokinete yesi akwenyun atai, ka aitumor aiyeŋun, Ainyam da atap naka aitapasitoi: Naarai einakini kwaŋin iminanake ajo."
Psalms127:3 Koany, idwe kes airumet naka EJAKAIT: Aur da naka akoik ŋes ainakineteke."
Psalms127:4 Kwape kimalia kakan naka ekagogoŋon, Esubito kwaŋin idwe luka atumun."
Psalms127:5 Iyalama etuŋanan loilelebit kes ocoeke: Emameete ileic, Naineratar kalukasurupokec orute."
Psalms128:1 Isirereŋitoi ŋinituŋanan yeneyoŋit EJAKAIT, Yenelosenenei korotinike."
Psalms128:2 Naarai inyami aitaaritoi naka akaninikon: Iyalamikini ijo, ijaun ejok."
Psalms128:3 Epusi akoniberu bala emusabibu loerai noi, Kaiboisio nukotoma nuka togokon: Elukunete idwekon emesakon bala aitoceta nuka iseitunin,"
Psalms128:4 Koany, isirereŋio kwaŋin Ituŋanan yeneyoŋit EJAKAIT."
Psalms128:5 Kisirereŋi EJAKAIT jo koSion: Ianyununei da ajokis naka Yerusalem Apaarasia kere nuka aijarakon.
Psalms128:6 Eebo, ianyuni idwe luka idwekon. Kinapakin Isirael."
Psalms129:1 Kotema do Isirael ebe: “Keticanata eoŋ irwan ipu ameun keiditeuka,"
Psalms129:2 Keticanata eoŋ irwan ipu ameun keiditeuka: Konye mam kepikorito.
Psalms129:3 Apotu ikakoriok kokorioto opuraka; Etoojasi aloboikec.”
Psalms129:4 Edolit EJAKAIT: Aŋed ŋesi aunoi nuka ikaronok.
Psalms129:5 Kisurumai kes ileic kitoboŋooroi, Ŋul kere luelaito Sion."
Psalms129:6 Kosubata kesi bala anya koswion luka itogoi, Nueokete eroko kepolooro:"
Psalms129:7 Numam ilelebia ekasakan akekan, Karaida loeeni iisutan atorobuke."
Psalms129:8 Luitorete nen da mam etemarete ebe, “Arereŋ naka EJAKAIT kojai kayes; Kilipakini yes arereŋ kokiror loka EJAKAIT.”"
Psalms130:1 Wu EJAKAIT, abu kamony mama ijai kataro naidul."
Psalms130:2 EJAKAJT, kiira ekaporoto: Kitoik akoniki Eporoto loka aiŋaiŋaka."
Psalms130:3 EJAKAIT, arai imarcnenei numam adolit, Wu EJAKAIT, iŋai bo yenebwoi?"
Psalms130:4 Konye ejai aisioni mama ijai, Tetere kiyoŋio,"
Psalms130:5 Edareunit eoŋ EJAKAIT, idareunit ekatau, Amunokina da akekirot."
Psalms130:6 Ipuda ekatau EJAKAIT, Aitelekarit eipud loipudatar ikedarak atupuruc, Eebo, aitelekarit eipud loka ikedarak atupuruc."
Psalms130:7 Wu Isirael, komunokin EJAKAIT; Naarai mama ejai EJAKAIT ejai aitim, Mamakeŋ ŋes ejai alakun naepol."
Psalms130:8 Elakuni da ŋesi Isirael Kotoma numam adoliteke kere.

Psalms140:4 Wu EJAKAIT, kidarai kakanin nuka ikaronok: Kidarai da kama ejaas ituŋa lukadedeŋak: Lualosikis aitapaar akakeje."
Psalms140:5 Ebwaata luituros eic lokalokitotor, ka aunoi; Aterakis eboi ariri kerot; Etemokis da atacin alokia eoŋ."

Psalms144:1 Kituritete EJAKAIT atiibaka, Loisisianakini akakanin ejie, Ikabokoro da anaŋ."
Psalms144:2 Edeke ŋes akasianut-nakamin, ka abwasika, Ekapir loeoja, ekayuunanika; Ekabuku, ka ŋol loamuno eoŋ; Loketononokikini ikatuŋa."
Psalms144:3 EJAKAIT, inyo bo ituŋanan, tape jo ijeni ŋes? Arai bo okoku loka ituŋanan, tape jo iwomit nuke?"
Psalms144:4 Esubit ituŋanan bala aamameak: Akepaarasia da bala etoribe loetubor.
Psalms144:5 Wu EJAKAIT, kitulur akonikui, kijesun da: Kotiro iroŋan, epuruunete."
Psalms144:6 Kocaku eimilia, kisiarisiara kes; Kijuku ikonimalia, kisiyaloŋoŋ kes."
Psalms144:7 Korio akonikan kokuju; Kolakunai, koyuunai kakipi nukepuak, Kakan naka imo:"
Psalms144:8 Luineras akeceituk aamameak, Akecekan da nakoteten erai akan nakoteten naka aiŋalanut,"
Psalms144:9 Wu Edeke, kayeikini jo ekosio lokitetet: Ayei aiturit jo kadeudeu naka aputio atomon."
Psalms144:10 Ŋes ŋol Ioitajar! ikabakan: Loeyuuni Daudi ekebulesit kokilen kaloekwana,"
Psalms144:11 Kolakunai, koyuunai da kakan naka imo, Luineras akeceituk aamameak, Akecekan da nakoteten erai akan nakoteten naka aiŋalanut."
Psalms144:12 Naesubiata odwewok bala iraan luepolok koiditeukec; Adwewok da bala amoru nuka agor nuigirio kwape nukore lokapolon;
Psalms144:13 Nailelebunotor idulaawok, kojaas inyamat toma luegelegela; Naeuriata awokomerekekin ilukumin ka ilukumin itomon koronyiawok;"
Psalms144:14 Naibwokiata iwokomoŋin luipu; Naemameunor acilun, arai acilar, Komamei da elulu korotiniwok;"
Psalms144:15 Iyalamas ituŋa luikote nen: Eebo, iyalamas ituŋa, luerai EJAKAIT Ekecedeke."
Psalms145:1 Ketopoloori jo Ekadeke, wu Ekabaka; Eturenenei ekonikiror ikar kere."
Psalms145:2 Keturenenei jo ŋinipaaran; Eturenenei ekonikiror ikar kere.
Psalms145:3 Epol EJAKAIT, loibusakinit aiturio; Mam akepolou emounio."
Psalms145:4 Aturi adiopet ituri aswamisiokon mama ejai aturi ace, Elimori da akoniswamisio nukapedor."
Psalms145:5 Nuka aibuses naepol naka apoloukon, Ka akoniswamisio nukaumokin, kes aomoomoi."
Psalms145:6 Itatamete ituŋa apedor naka aswamisiokon nuketasuro; Alimori eoŋ da apoloukon.
Psalms145:7 Iŋerete aiitunet naka ajokisikon naepol, Eyeete da nuka adolitekon."
Psalms145:8 Esiana EJAKAIT, ileleba aision; Iyapi anyunyurikin, ido loka aitim naepol."
Psalms145:9 Ejok EJAKAIT kama kakere; Aitimesiake nuejok ejaas mama kaswamisioke kere.
Psalms145:10 Kimalaete jo akoniswamisio kere, wu EJAKAIT; Kiturete jo lukalaunakakon."
Psalms145:11 Iŋerete nuka aibuses naka ajakanutukon, Itatamete da akonipedor;"
Psalms145:12 Aitejenun odwe luka ituŋa aswamisioke nukapedor, Aibuses da naka apolou naka akejakanut."
Psalms145:13 Akonijakanut erai ajakanut namam enaŋi, Ejaenena da ayaitekon anatar aturio kere."
Psalms145:14 Igaŋi EJAKAIT luibiroros kere, Itonyouni da ŋul kere luekukumito."
Psalms145:15 Kidarito jo akonye nuka kere, Iinakini kes ikecenyamat kedol apak."
Psalms145:16 Ipukori akonikan, Isimonikini da eimiel loka ŋinibore kere yenikajaran,"
Psalms145:17 Edolit EJAKAIT korotinike kere, Esiana da kaswamisioke kere,"
Psalms145:18 Eapie EJAKAIT kama ejaas luiwoneete ŋes kere, Kama kaŋul kere luiwoneete ŋes kabeit,"
Psalms145:19 Itodoli eimiel loka ŋul kalueyoŋito ŋes; Epupuni da aimonyokec, itajari kes."
Psalms145:20 Idari EJAKAIT ŋul kere lueminasi ŋes; Konye emudiari ikaronok kere.
Psalms145:21 Ineri akaituk aiturit EJAKAIT; Kitur ŋinikuan kere ekekiror lokalaunan ikar ka ikar.
Psalms146:1 Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT! Kiturite EJAKAIT, wu ekatau,"
Psalms146:2 Eturi EJAKAIT aroko abusi: Ayei aiturit EJAKAIT aroko ajari.
Psalms146:3 Sirikimunokin ikapolok, Karaida okoku loka ituŋanan, loemamei aiŋarakin."
Psalms146:4 Elosi eiyeŋaneke, eboŋori alupoke; Eoliorete aomisioke apaaran ŋipeŋin."
Psalms146:5 Iyalama ŋin yenerai Edeke loka Yakob ekenarakinanike, Yenemuno EJAKAIT Ekedeke:"
Psalms146:6 Lokesubi akuj ka akwap, Aŋolol, ka luejaas tomakec kere; Loidari abeit ikar kere:"
Psalms146:7 Loitodoli etube kanuka luemwaŋitai; Loitanyami lueriebi eteŋei inyamat. Elacakini EJAKAIT lueenitai;
Psalms146:8 Itwekenyuni EJAKAIT akonye nuka imudukiok; Itonyouni EJAKAIT luekukumito; Emina EJAKAIT luedolito;
Psalms146:9 Idari EJAKAIT imo; Igaŋi ikokiok ka apuserun; Konye ebuburiari erot loka ikaronok.
Psalms146:10 Irumi EJAKAIT ikar kere, Edekekon, wu Sion, anatar aturio kere, Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT!"
Psalms147:1 Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT! Naarai ejok ayoore aiturit Edekewok; Naarai ejok, ibus aiturit."
Psalms147:2 Eduki EJAKAIT Yerusalem; Etukonokini luaponi kireŋeai koIsirael.
Psalms147:3 Itaŋaleuni ŋesi luejaas itauon luebilil, Eeni da amusuŋunukec,"
Psalms147:4 Imari ŋesi etiai loka aacer; Emaanakini kes kere ikecekiroria.
Psalms147:5 Epol EwokoJAKAIT, egogoŋ kapedor Aijeneke mam imarun,"
Psalms147:6 Igaŋit EJAKAIT luitasonos, Ecakakini ikaronok kwap."
Psalms147:7 Koyeikisi EJAKAIT kaimal; Koyeikisi aiturit Edekewok kadeudeu:
Psalms147:8 Loerapakini akuj kidouon, Itemokini akwap akiru, Isibwanuni inya koroŋan."
Psalms147:9 Einakini itiaŋ ikecenyamat, Ikuruka da ludidik luemonyete."
Psalms147:10 Mam isiyalamikinit agogoŋ naka ebalasit; Kwabo mam itojokit akeje nuka ituŋanan,"
Psalms147:11 Itojokit EJAKAIT ŋul lueyoŋito ŋes, Ŋul luemunos akeitim."
Psalms147:12 Ijo Yerusalem, kiturite EJAKAIT, ljo Sion, kiturite Edekekon,"
Psalms147:13 Naarai etogogoŋ atiketa nuka iruteikon; Esirereŋ idwekon kotomakon,"
Psalms147:14 Eyauni ainapakin oikorunokon; Kisimonikini jo apokoi nuka akima.
Psalms147:15 ljukuni aicorakineteke toma akwap; Etirono akekirot.
Psalms147:16 Ekori ŋesi akako kwape kajulo nuka amerekek; Ebwasi akopyo nuidoudouto kanuka aaterot kwape kekurwon.
Psalms147:17 Ecakanari akekipi nuerurwakito kwape kararasia; Iŋai bo epedor abwoikin aaterotoke?
Psalms147:18 gjukuni akirotoke, ecalari kes, Itukusi ikwaminike, elelearete akip."
Psalms147:19 Itodikinit Yakob akekirot, Ka Isirael da ikisilake ka itubesiake."
Psalms147:20 Mam iswamakinit adioceteker kwaŋin; Mam ejenunito itubesiake, Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT!"
Psalms148:1 Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT! Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT kokuju: Kituroto ŋes kaneicelelei.
Psalms148:2 Kituroto ŋes, yes ikemalaikan kere: Kituroto ŋes, yes akejore kere."
Psalms148:3 Kituroto ŋes, ijo akoloŋ ka elap: Kituroto ŋes, yes aacer kere nuicaete."
Psalms148:4 Kituroto ŋes, yes akuj naka akuj, Ka yes da akipi nuejaas kuju kakuj."
Psalms148:5 Kituroto ŋul ekiror loka EJAKAIT: Naarai abu kicorak, kosubunai."
Psalms148:6 Eticat da kes ikar kere: Esilaki ekisil lomam edaun.
Psalms148:7 Kituroto EJAKAIT kakwap, Yes akinyaŋa, yes da ataroi kere:"
Psalms148:8 Akim ka akako, akiru ka ilisinai; Ekwam loeiliili, itodolete akekirot."
Psalms148:9 Iroŋan ka iukon kere; Ikito lueraete noi ka iresia kere:
Psalms148:10 Itiaŋ ka ibaren kere; Iboro lueliatos ka akweny nueporitos.
Psalms148:11 Ikabakan luka akwap ka ituŋa kere; Ikapolok ka ikatubok kere luka akwap:
Psalms148:12 Isap ka apesur; Imakio ka idwe da.
Psalms148:13 Kituroto ŋul ekiror loka EJAKAIT; Naarai ekekiror bon itopolooritai: Akeibuses edeparit akwap ka akuj da.
Psalms148:14 Ekeu ŋesi amumwarat naka iketuŋa, Aiturit naka lukalaunakake kere; Kes idwe luka Isirael, ituŋa luidunyas kaŋes. Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT."
Psalms149:1 Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT! Koyeikisi EJAKAIT ekosio lokiteter, Aiturioke da katukot naka lukalaunak."
Psalms149:2 Kiyalamikin Isirael kanuka ŋol lokolo kesubi ŋes: Kolakaros idwe luka Sion kanuka ekabakakec.
Psalms149:3 Kituroto kesi ekekiror kikosiete: Koyeikis aiturit ŋes, kisiman ka adeudeu."
Psalms149:4 Naarai iyalamikinit EJAKAIT iketuŋa: Itubusi luitasonos kaitajar.
Psalms149:5 Kitopoloosi lukalaunak ŋes kaibuses: Koyeenenete kaiyalama kaperitokec.
Psalms149:6 Kojaun aiturit naikiara naka Edeke oporotoikec, Ka ekileŋ da loekwaka iwaitin iarei akaninikec;"
Psalms149:7 Aitodol enyaŋit katekerin, Ka aiticaneta kotuŋa;"
Psalms149:8 Aien ikabakanakec kirikoi, Ka ikapolokokec kaeneta nuka asua."
Psalms149:9 Aitodolikin kes etube loiwadikatai. Ejai lukalaunakake kere aibuses ŋin. Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT!
Psalms150:1 Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT! Kituroto Edeke kotoma aiboisike nakalaunan: Kituroto ŋes kotoma apak naka agogoŋuke,"
Psalms150:2 Kituroto ŋes kanuka aswamisioke nukagogoŋ: Kituroro ŋes kwape ejaar apolouke kaibuses.
Psalms150:3 Kituroto ŋes keporoto loka arupepe: Kituroto ŋes kisabulin ka adeudeu.
Psalms150:4 Kituroto ŋes kisiman ka ekosio: Kituroto ŋes kiraman luka aputio ka alamaru.
Psalms150:5 Kituroto ŋes kaisinin nueruosi noi: Kituroto ŋes kaisinin nueruosi bala iciirin.
Psalms150:6 Ŋinibore kere yenejai eiyeŋane kiturit EJAKAIT. Kituroto yesi EJAKAIT!
Proverbs1:1 Awaragasia nuka Solomon okoku loka Daudi, ekabaka loka Isirael."
Proverbs1:2 Ajenun acoa ka aituutoorio: Amisiikin akiro nuka ajenun:
Proverbs1:3 Adumun aituutoorio kotoma aswam nukacoa, Kotoma adolit, ka etube, ka nuetenito"
Proverbs1:4 Ainakin ijimat acobeu, Ka ekatumunan da aijen ka apirianut:"
Proverbs1:5 Tetere epupuni lokacoa, iyatakini aisisiaun; Etuŋanan da loejenuni edolokini ainerun naeŋalei:"
Proverbs1:6 Ajenun awarag, ka agarac; Akiro nuka lukacoa ka aibukaanaretakec."
Proverbs1:7 Ayoŋit EJAKAIT ŋes ageunet naka aijen: Konye luebaŋaaka emenete acoa ka aituutoorio.
Proverbs1:8 Okokuka, kiira ijo aituutoor naka papakon, Sirikiŋer da aicor naka totokon:"
Proverbs1:9 Naarai eraun aboko nakasianut kakoukon, Ka erikot komurisiŋikon."
Proverbs1:10 Okokuka, arai kijodijodete ikadiakanarak, Sirikicam."
Proverbs1:11 Arai ebalas ebe, “Biya, kauparos, Kaperutu aiar, Kaŋopikis tai lumam akirot kaiboisio nukaiyeiyea;"
Proverbs1:12 Kelikosi kes ejarete kwape Okatwak, Koŋaieete, kwape kaŋui kaluijesaros Aipany;"
Proverbs1:13 Kidumuni iboro kere lukakais nuipu, Kilelebi itogoiwok iuŋatan;"
Proverbs1:14 Kitebeikini eroetekon mamakosi; Kimori enasoro ediopet.”
Proverbs1:15 Okokuka, sirilosenenei kakes; Kitiku akejukon korotokec:"
Proverbs1:16 Naarai ekerete akeeekeje mama ejai aronis, Ewonyasi da abukor aokot."
Proverbs1:17 Naarai epesikinio eboi taai Kakonyen nuka ŋinikweny kere:
Proverbs1:18 Eperunete ŋul akeceokot, Eŋopikinete akeceijar kaiboisio nukaiyeiyea."
Proverbs1:19 Ŋul kes iponesio luka ŋolituŋanan loikibelikini ameda; Elemari aijar naka ikulepek.
Proverbs1:20 Ikalalat acoa korot; Ikeseuni ekeporoto kaiboisio nuelaiak;
Proverbs1:21 Iworoi kaibois nakapolon naetukonokinoi; Kaneelomarere korutei, ore, ineria akekiro ebe:"
Proverbs1:22 “Yes lumam acoa, itodolete ai iminas amamut kacoa? Ka lukesuarak aisiyalamikinite aisuar, Ka ibaŋiok aila aijen?"
Proverbs1:23 Kibelokinos kanuka aitoronoka: Koany, abukokini emoyoka mama ijaas, Ketejenunete akakiro."
Proverbs1:24 Naarai eworo, ineroto: Ario akakan, kwabo emamei yenapodokinit."
Proverbs1:25 Konye itapalaut ainerunika kere, Kwabo mam ikotosi aitoronoka nepetai da:"
Proverbs1:26 Aso eoŋ da akiena kapaaran naka apolakus: Esekelo kedolu akurianukus:
Proverbs1:27 Kedolu akurianukus kwape ekwam, Nakidoikinio epola kwape etapipirio, Nakibunokiniata aiyaloŋoŋ ka aoyanar."
Proverbs1:28 Kosodete konyet aiwor eoŋ, konye mam aboŋokini; Kamoete noi, konye mam kadumunete:"
Proverbs1:29 Naarai apotu kolaata aijen, Komam eseunete ayoŋit EJAKAIT."
Proverbs1:30 Mam akotosi cut akainerun; Apotu komenata aitoronoka kere:
Proverbs1:31 ŋes enyamiata araito nuka ekecerot loka ikulepek, Kimonikinos ainerunikec naka ikulepek."
Proverbs1:32 Naarai ajurusiar kau naka lumam acoa eari kes, Ido akerianut naka ibaŋiok emudiari kes,"
Proverbs1:33 Konye ŋin yenikeirari eoŋ iboienenei icasit, Iyamakina komam ekuriana aronis.”"
Proverbs2:1 Okokuka, arai kicam akiroka Kinadak da aicorakinetaka mamakon;"
Proverbs2:2 Tetere itoikini akonikit mama ejai acoa, Ibwaikini da ekonitau ajenun;"
Proverbs2:3 Eebo, arai kimonyak amisiikin; Ikeseun da ekoniporoto adumun ajenun;"
Proverbs2:4 Arai kimoi ŋes kwape epuesa, Kirii ŋes kwape abar naibwaitai;"
Proverbs2:5 Ŋes konyet ijenunia ayoŋit EJAKAIT, Idumuni da aijen Edeke,"
Proverbs2:6 Naarai einakini EJAKAIT acoa; Elomuni aijen ka ajenun kaitukuke.
Proverbs2:7 Iŋadakini ŋul luitenara kotauon acoa naenalei, Erai ŋesi ebuku loka ŋul kaluelosenenete kabeit;"
Proverbs2:8 Tetere igalikini isokono luka etube, Idari erot loka lukalaunakake."
Proverbs2:9 Ŋes konyet ijenunia adolit ka etube, Ka nuetenito, eebo, ŋolirot loejok."
Proverbs2:10 Naarai elomari acoa otaukon, Aijen da isiyalamikini ekonitau;"
Proverbs2:11 Acobeu ŋes kidari jo, Ajenun da kirici joo"
Proverbs2:12 Kiyuunete jo korot loka aronis, Kotuna luinerenenas nukelepa;"
Proverbs2:13 Luejalete isokono luka atenit Alosit korotin luka amuton.
Proverbs2:14 Luelelakinito aswam nueroko, Luisiyalamikinito elepa loka aronis;"
Proverbs2:15 Luimagululos korotinikec, Luipaanarete kosokonokec."
Proverbs2:16 Kiyuunete jo kaberu naadote, ŋes nakerimon naiiodiiodi kakiroke;"
Proverbs2:17 Naeiali epaperoke loka atumunike, Imurwokini da aitutuket naka Ekedeke:"
Proverbs2:18 Naarai ijesari etogoke kiton atwanare, Irotinike da kiton okatwak."
Proverbs2:19 Mam ŋul luelosete mama ejai eboŋunete bobo, Karaida adolore orotin luka aijar."
Proverbs2:20 Tetere ilosenenei ijo korot loka ituŋa kaluejok, Koric da isokono luka luedolito."
Proverbs2:21 Naarai ibojenenete luitenara kotauon kakwap, Idonete luedolito tomake."
Proverbs2:22 Konye egelario lukaronok kakwap, Erutorio luebilete ibotei."
Proverbs3:1 Okokuka, sirikimurwonokini ekakisil: Konye koricenenei akaicorakineta kotaukon:"
Proverbs3:2 Naarai kiyatakinio kwaŋin aibut apaarasia, Ka ikar luipu, ka ainapakin da,"
Proverbs3:3 Kinyek aitim ka abeit aijal jo; Koenanakini omurisinikon; Kiwadikaenenei kes apukenit naka etaukon:
Proverbs3:4 ŋes idumunia aminunio ka ajenun naejok, Kakonyen nuka Edeke ka ituŋa da."
Proverbs3:5 Komunonena EJAKAIT kekonitau kere, Kwabo sirigonakina toma aienunikon,"
Proverbs3:6 Kolimonori ŋes korotinikon kere; ŋes da iteteni akonilosit.
Proverbs3:7 Siriraenena loka acoa kakonyenekon elopet; Koyonirenenei EJAKAIT, konyou karonis."
Proverbs3:8 Eraun ŋin aŋaleu naka akonikuan, Asumeta da nuka akojokon."
Proverbs3:9 Kitubusik EJAKAIT koborokon, Ka lugeet kere luka akerianutukon."
Proverbs3:10 Ilelebunos kwaŋin idulaakon amio, Ilapanar da ebino kaalakanyakon."
Proverbs3:11 Okokuka, sirimwanenenei aicor naka EJAKAIT; Kwabo kinyek akeriemeriem aitapas jo."
Proverbs3:12 Naarai eriemeriemei EJAKAIT yenemin; Kwape eriemeriemaa papa ikekoku yenelelakinit.
Proverbs3:13 Elakara ituŋanan yenedumuni acoa, Ka ŋin da yenedumuni ajenun,"
Proverbs3:14 Naarai emutunuke itelekarit emutunu loka epuesa, Akemeda da itelekarit esabu loejok."
Proverbs3:15 Erai acoa naka akais nuipu aitelekarit amoru nukarenak nuka akais: Kwabo emamei ibore yenipedori aiŋobel aitiriania ŋes.
Proverbs3:16 Ejai aibut akanike nakoteten; Toma akanike nakokediany da ejai abar ka aibuses.
Proverbs3:17 Irotinike eraas irotin lukaiokis, Isokonoke da kere eraas ainapakin."
Proverbs3:18 Ŋes ekitoi loka aijar mama ejaas ŋul luikamunete nes: Elakara da ninitunanan yenericit nes.
Proverbs3:19 Toma acoa kesipokinia EJAKAIT akwap; Toma ajenun da kiticasia akuj.
Proverbs3:20 Toma aiienike acilatar ataroi, Itodoununei aku; akopyo,"
Proverbs3:21 Okokuka, koricit acoa naenalei ka acobeu, Sirienyounete kakonyenekon;"
Proverbs3:22 Tetere eraunos aijar kotaukon, Asianut da komurisiŋikon."
Proverbs3:23 Ŋes konyet ilosenenoo kainapakina, Komam iguikini akonikeiu."
Proverbs3:24 Naiperenenoo, mam ikurianari; Eebo, iperi, ido kijijimikinete akonijo."
Proverbs3:25 Sirikikurianar etasuro Iokisirieŋuni, Karaida amudiario naka ikaronok, naebunio:"
Proverbs3:26 Naarai eraun EJAKAIT amunokon, ldari ŋesi akonikeju kinyek aipok."
Proverbs3:27 Sirikimik ajokis ŋul lutikebeito, Nakepedoria akonikan aiswamaun."
Proverbs3:28 Sirikitema eidunyetekon ebe, “Kolot, kobonu bobo, Kainakini moi”; kwabo ejai ibore diekon."
Proverbs3:29 Sirikineru aronis aluikin eidunyetekon, Naarai iboie kamakon kainapakina."
Proverbs3:30 Siripegasi kerunanan komam akirot, Arai mam kikwaikinit jo erono."
Proverbs3:31 Sirikikokotik etuŋanan loka akaje, Sirikiseu irotinike."
Proverbs3:32 Naarai loepaarit erai loketal mama ejai EJAKAIT: Konye ipaperikini ŋesi kaluitenara kotauon.
Proverbs3:33 Ikeni EJAKAIT etogo loka Iokaronon; Konye isirereni neiboienenoo lokadoliton.
Proverbs3:34 Isekeli ŋesi luisekelete, Konye einakini luitasonos asianut."
Proverbs3:35 Irumete lukacoa aibuses, Konye irumete ibaŋiok ileic."
Proverbs4:1 Ikadwe, kopuputu aituutoor naka papa, Kibwaikis itauon ajenun:"
Proverbs4:2 Naarai kainakini yes aituutoor naejok; Sirikiialakis aisisianakinika.
Proverbs4:3 Naarai arai eoŋ okoku mama ejai papaka, Yenanonok, yeniminat kwape iteluna mama ejai totoka,"
Proverbs4:4 Abu ŋol kesisianak eoŋ, katema atiar, “Kikam akakiro kotaukon; Koric aicorakinetaka, kojar:"
Proverbs4:5 Kodum acoa, kodum ajenun; Sirikiimurwok, sirikipaa da kakiro nuka aitukuka:"
Proverbs4:6 Sirikijal acoa, kosodi ŋesi aidar jo; Komina ŋes, kosodi ŋesi aricit joo"
Proverbs4:7 Ageunet naka acoa ŋes nata: kodum acoa: Eebo, kanuidumunit kere, kodum ajenun."
Proverbs4:8 Kitopoloo ŋes, ŋesi da kitcpoloori jo: Kitubusi ŋesi jo, naitunia ijo ŋes."
Proverbs4:9 Etorokini ŋesi akoukon aboko nakasianut: Kijaikini ŋesi jo aboko nakaibuses.”
Proverbs4:10 Ŋo okokuka, kiira, kocam da akiroka: Kosodi aibut ikar luipu."
Proverbs4:11 Kesisianakinit jo erot loka acoa; Kenarenikinit jo kosokono luka atenit.
Proverbs4:12 Nailosenenoo, mam eridanakinio akejekon; Arai ikeri, mam kiguikini."
Proverbs4:13 Kikam cut aituutoorio; sirikiwosik: Koric ŋes; naarai erai ŋesi aijarakon.
Proverbs4:14 Sirikiloma osokot loka ikaronok, Kwabo sirikilot orot loka ituŋa lukaronok."
Proverbs4:15 Kinac ŋes, sirikitor nen; Kibelokin kotubor."
Proverbs4:16 Naarai mam ejotoete dimikito kiswamata ameneranur; Ikolerikito akonye, dimikito kitiguikis ice."
Proverbs4:17 Naarai enyamete atap naka aronis, Emasete ajon nuka akaie,"
Proverbs4:18 Konye esubit esokot loka ikadolitok bala aica nakaiwalar, Naeyatanakin aeaun aitodol apaaran naedoliorit."
Proverbs4:19 Esubit erot loka ikaronok bala amuton: Mam ejenete nuitiguikinete kes.
Proverbs4:20 Okokuka, kibwaik akakiro otau; Kitoik akonikit nuenera."
Proverbs4:21 Sirienyounete kakonyenekon; Koric kes kokidin otaukon.
Proverbs4:22 Naarai eraas aijar mama kanul kaluedumunete kes, Aŋaleu da nakawatekec,"
Proverbs4:23 Kodunyakinite noi aidar ekonitau; Naarai kotomake ŋes elomuniata nuka aijar.
Proverbs4:24 Kolema kamakon aituk namagul, Kibwaik kama elwana aŋajep naepaanari."
Proverbs4:25 Kogipas akonyekon, Kinarenikinitos abukiokon asesen tenan."
Proverbs4:26 Kitetena esokot loka akeiekon, Kicasito ikonirotin kere,"
Proverbs4:27 Sirikipaa akan nakoteten, karaida nakokediany: Kolemu akonikeju karonis."
Proverbs5:1 Okokuka, kibwaik akaeoa otaukon; Kitoik akonikit ajenunika;"
Proverbs5:2 Tetere idari acobeu, Koric da akoniituk aijen."
Proverbs5:3 Naarai elelei esik kaituk naka aberu naadote, Ejijim akenaiep adepar akinyet:"
Proverbs5:4 Konye edwar awasiake ria ria, Ekwana kwape kekilen loekwaka iwaitin iarei."
Proverbs5:5 Ŋesaros akeieke mama ejai atwanare; Ederi akelosit Okatwak;
Proverbs5:6 Tape mam edumuni esokot loitenara loka aiiar, Irianirianas ikerotin, mam da ejeŋi ŋun."
Proverbs5:7 Aso do, ikadwe, kopupunoi, Sirikinyout kakiro nuka aitukuka."
Proverbs5:8 Kitwalan ekonirot kamaken, Sirikikunyak okek loka etogoke:"
Proverbs5:9 Kinyek ainakin ice aibusesukon, Ikonikar mama ejaas luededen:"
Proverbs5:10 Kinyeis imo aimonikin akonigogoŋ; Aitaaritoikon da ajaut togo loka lukacekwap;
Proverbs5:11 Idinya ijo kosanekon, Naedaunor akonikirin ka akonikuan."
Proverbs5:12 Ibala rwaru ijo ebe, “Ala eama aituutoorio, Amwaŋ da ekatau aitoronio;"
Proverbs5:13 Mam abu karimarite eporoto loka ikesisianakinakaka, Karaida aitoikin akakit ŋun luketuutoorete!"
Proverbs5:14 Kaapik eut aronis kere, Kidiŋ kekodet ka atukot.”"
Proverbs5:15 Komasenenei akipi nukamotikon, Akipi nueleleete katanikon."
Proverbs5:16 Tikereka ejok akonyen nuka eeoakon kikaikina, Icorin da luka akipi korotin?"
Proverbs5:17 Koraut nukon bon, Ido mere nuka imo kaio,"
Proverbs5:18 Kis irerenoi akoŋu naka ecoakon, Kolakara kaberu naka atumunikon."
Proverbs5:19 Kwape amori naminat ka amiam naelok, Kominakinitos jo ikisinake apakio kere; Kolelakinite aminake."
Proverbs5:20 Naarai okokuka, kanukinyo ilelakinitor aberu naadote, Kitunia atorob naka nakerimon?"
Proverbs5:21 Naarai ejaas irotin luka etuŋanan kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, Iteteni ŋesi ikesokono kere."
Proverbs5:22 Numam adolit nuka ikaronon kes ipokete ŋes, Eenio kaunoi nuka akeronis."
Proverbs5:23 Etwani kanu emamear aituutoorio; Eoliori kanu epolor abanaanuruke,"
Proverbs6:1 Okokuka, arai kiraun ijo ekabwoaran eidunyetekon, Arai kititiŋ akonikan eloŋwait,"
Proverbs6:2 Arai kipok kakiro nuka akoniituk, Kikamunio kakiro nuka akoniituk,"
Proverbs6:3 Kiswama kwanata okokuka, koyuun bon; Naarai idoo ilo akan naka eidunyetekon; Kiwonya, kolot, kikanikan eidunyetekon."
Proverbs6:4 Sirikicamak akonikonyen ajo, Karaida abukiokon ailuranar."
Proverbs6:5 Koyuun bon kwape amori kakan naka ekamelan, Ka akweny da kakan naka ekalokan."
Proverbs6:6 Kolot mama ejai esunwoit, ijo loilonwana; Koomoom ikeponesio, koeou:"
Proverbs6:7 Emamei ŋes ejakait, Ekaanyanaran, karaida ekayaiton,"
Proverbs6:8 Idiasi ikenyamen luka akamu, Etukonokini ikenyamat kaidweny."
Proverbs6:9 Itodoli ai iperi, ijo loilonwana? Wori bo inyounio kajokon?"
Proverbs6:10 Aio nuikidioko, ailuranar naedit, Ailokony akanin nepetai arior aiotoor,"
Proverbs6:11 Kwaŋin kibunokini jo ailwaritoi kwape ekerurwon, Ka eipudikon da kwape etuŋanan loekapit ebuku."
Proverbs6:12 Etuŋanan Jotai, etuŋanan lomam edolit; Elosenenei ŋesi inera numagul;"
Proverbs6:13 Eedi kakonyeke, isuti kakejeke, Idodikini kibokoroke;"
Proverbs6:14 Ejai elepa otauke, Epwakununei aronis tiritir: Eyeenenei ŋesi ikinyom luka aŋolopa,"
Proverbs6:15 Kanuka ŋun ebunokini nes aronis katipet; Ebilio katipet, komamei aŋaleun."
Proverbs6:16 Ejaas akiro akanykape nuelait EJAKAIT; Eebo, akanykaarei nueraas nuketal kamaken:"
Proverbs6:17 Akonye nuepogas, aŋajep nakenalan, Akanin da nuebukorete aokot numam akirot;"
Proverbs6:18 Etau loepwakuni aomisio nukaronok, Akeje nuisunyito akerit mama ejai ameŋeranut;"
Proverbs6:19 Ekajenan lokainal loesabi, Ka ŋol da loeyei ikinyom luka aŋolopa koinaean."
Proverbs6:20 Okokuka, korie aicorakinet naka papakon, Sirikiner da aicor naka totokon:"
Proverbs6:21 Kiminanakinenei kes otaukon, Koenanakini kes omurisinikon."
Proverbs6:22 Nailosenenoo, kinarenikinenete jo, Naiperenenoo, kidarenenete jo; Naikwenyununaa, iyalaenenete kaio,"
Proverbs6:23 Naarai aicorakinet ŋes atala; ekisil da ŋes aica; Aitoroneta nuka aituutoorio nes erot loka aijar:
Proverbs6:24 Aricit jo kama kaberu nakaronon, Kaijodijod naka aŋajep naka nakerimon."
Proverbs6:25 Sirikinobel aiokisike kotaukon; Karaida aeamun abukioke aipok jo.
Proverbs6:26 Naarai irii naadote adiotap, Konye nakeporon emeiai aijar nakakais nuipu."
Proverbs6:27 Epedori kereka etuŋanan aibwaikin akim otorobuke, Komam enyami ikenapen?"
Proverbs6:28 Arai bo itori etuŋanan atotole nuesaranete, Komam enomorete akekeje?"
Proverbs6:29 Ikoni nen ŋol loelomari mama ejai aberu naka eidunyeteke, ŋol kere loetirori ŋin mam eswaki aiticanio."
Proverbs6:30 Mam kereka ituŋa emwanete ekokolan arai ekokoi Aisimonikin aijarake kerieb eteŋei?
Proverbs6:31 Konye arai kedumun, etacakini irwan akanykaarei; Einakini iboro kere lukotogoke."
Proverbs6:32 Ŋol loedotei emamei aijen; Loekoto amudiar aijarake iswamai ŋun.
Proverbs6:33 Ebeikinete nes amusuŋun ka aitisilio: Mam akemorosit emwatario,"
Proverbs6:34 Naarai ekokote itunyunyurikini ekiliokit; Mam itimi kapaaran naka ainyaŋ,"
Proverbs6:35 Mam ecamuni lugelis; Mam italakario, karaida kiinak ŋes ainakineta nuipu."
Proverbs7:1 Okokuka, korie akiroka, Kinadak da aicorakinetaka mamakon."
Proverbs7:2 Koric aicorakinetaka, kojar; Ekakisil da kwape keeopot loka akonukon."
Proverbs7:3 Koenanakini kes obokorokon; Kiwadikaenenei kes apukenit naka etaukon.
Proverbs7:4 Kolimok acoa ebe, “Irai ijo kinacika”; Komaik da ajenun apaikon:"
Proverbs7:5 Tetere kidarete kama ejai aberu naadote, Kama ejai nakerimon nakijodijodi kakiroke,"
Proverbs7:6 Naarai kadirisa nakotogoka, Kereik kapedotoka;"
Proverbs7:7 Kaany kotoma luiimat, Kamisiik kotoma okatumunak, Ekatumunan loemamei aijen,"
Proverbs7:8 Itorit orot eapie kagorike, Kolot orot loebei togoke;"
Proverbs7:9 Napitiboni, apak naka atiboŋ, Napiriono akuare, kamuton."
Proverbs7:10 Ido koany, kisiriama aberu ŋes, Kanapito nuka kanaadote, epiriana kotau."
Proverbs7:11 Ilebilebitoi ŋesi, irimi; Mam akekeie idonete oreke:"
Proverbs7:12 Ejai do orotin, ejai do asisiarin, Eperuni da kaŋinigor."
Proverbs7:13 Ikamuni do je, konu, Etemari aeomilikonyen ŋes atiar:"
Proverbs7:14 “Ejaas asuban nuka ainapakin oreka; Lolo ŋes etodolio aiyaposioka.
Proverbs7:15 Ŋes alomunia aisiriam jo, Adunyakinit amoot akonikonyen, kadum joo"
Proverbs7:16 Apesit erutika kaimuketa, Kigoen lueererin lukiusiok lukoMisiri."
Proverbs7:17 Abwatanakinit akaperit Kemina, ka icicikwa, ka akinomon."
Proverbs7:18 Kaloto, kemonikinos amin kiton atupurue; Kalakanaros kamin."
Proverbs7:19 Naarai emamei okilenika kore, Elosit neelwana:"
Proverbs7:20 Ayaŋa eriagi loka apesan nepepe kaŋes, Eboŋuni ore naikesakinia elap.”"
Proverbs7:21 Kakiroke nuipu nuejok kimaima ŋes, Kaijodijod naka anaiepeke kitinaiki ŋes alosit."
Proverbs7:22 Korupak ŋes katipet, K wape elosio emoŋ aario, Arai aeneta aleeor ebaŋ:"
Proverbs7:23 Aitodol naicumia emal emanyike; Kwape iwonyaria akweny aracit, Komam ejeŋi ebe eyaaaari aijarake."
Proverbs7:24 Aso do, ikadwe, kopupunoi, Kibwaikis akiro nuka aitukuka otauon."
Proverbs7:25 Sirikitoik ekonitau orotinike, Sirikipaa osokonoke."
Proverbs7:26 Naarai alataki luipu kwap imusunitai, Eebo, lueari ŋesi kere kes aiore naepol."
Proverbs7:27 Eketogo nes erot Joebei Okatwak, Ŋesari agolai nuka atwanare,"
Proverbs8:1 Mam kereka ikalalat acoa, Ido mam iworoi ajenun ekeporoto?"
Proverbs8:2 Ebwoi kasisiarin, Kaneimukurur kariri naka erot."
Proverbs8:3 Ikalalat kariri naka irutei, Kane elomarere ore lokapolon, Kokekia kane elomarere toma, atiar:"
Proverbs8:4 “Ikatuŋa, keworoto yes; Ekaporoto da ejai mama ejaas idwe luka ituŋa."
Proverbs8:5 Yes luiimat, kojenut apirianut; Ka yes da lubaniok, koiautu ketau loka ajenun."
Proverbs8:6 Kiirasi; naarai eneri akiro nukajokak noi; Aooŋ da naka akaituk elomunete akiro nuedolito.
Proverbs8:7 Naarai inera akaituk abeit; Erai aronis naketal kanaiepeka.
Proverbs8:8 Akiro kere nuka aitukuka eraas adolit; Emamei ibore yenimagul karaida yenepaarit kotoma.
Proverbs8:9 Ideleleete kere kama ejai nin yeneieni, Ido itenara kama kanul kaluedumunete aijen."
Proverbs8:10 Kodumutu akaisisianakin, kwabo mere epuesa; Ido aijen aitelekarit esabu loseuna."
Proverbs8:11 Naarai acoa ejok aitelekarit amor nukarenak nuka akais; Iboro da kere luimielai mam epedorio aitiirian kaŋes,"
Proverbs8:12 Eoŋ Acoa etuluo apirianut ekatogo, Amoot da aijen ka ainerun."
Proverbs8:13 Ayoŋit EJAKAIT ŋes aisac aronis; Aiwoŋonut, ka eitur, ka erot lokaronis, Ka aituk naepaarit, kes nuasacit."
Proverbs8:14 Ainerun erai nakan, ka aijen naicasit; Arai eoŋ ajenun; ajai kagogon."
Proverbs8:15 Kanukan irumete ikabakan, Icorakinete da ikayaitok abeit,"
Proverbs8:16 Kanukan eyaitos ikapolok, Isotia ka ikatubok kere luka akwap."
Proverbs8:17 Amina ŋul lukaminas eoŋ; Ka ŋul da lukadunyakinito amoot kaanyunete,"
Proverbs8:18 Abar ka aibuses ejaas keoŋ; Eebo, abar namam edaun ka adolit."
Proverbs8:19 Akaraito ejok aitelekarit esabu, eebo, esabu lokaiokan; Ekaiyas da aitelekarit epuesa loseuna."
Proverbs8:20 Etorit orot loka adolit, Kidin osokono luka etube,"
Proverbs8:21 Tetere esurumi lukaminas iboro nul, Tetere esilelebanari da akeceinadisia,"
Proverbs8:22 Abu EJAKAIT kasub eoŋ ageunet naka aisubuke, Nasodit naka akeswamisio nupeno."
Proverbs8:23 Aponi keticasi kole kasonya, kageunet, Eriŋa akwap keiauna."
Proverbs8:24 Aponi kasubi naamamear ataro, Naamameatar atanin nuedilas akip."
Proverbs8:25 Eriŋa kiticata iron an, Aponi eoŋ kasubi ageikin iukon."
Proverbs8:26 Eroko ŋes kesuba akwap, karaida ais, Karaida nugeet nuka apua naka akwap."
Proverbs8:27 Nakitemokinio ŋesi akuj, ajai eoŋ: Nakelukunia eikor loka ataro:"
Proverbs8:28 Nakiticasia idouon kokuiu: Nakitogogonio akonye nuka ataro:
Proverbs8:29 Nakeinakinia aŋolol eikoruke, Tetere mam akipi etubete aicorakineteke: Nakigiria apeteta nuka akwap:"
Proverbs8:30 Ajai do eoŋ kaŋes, kwape akeswaman naejok, Arai eoŋ aiyalamake ŋinipaaran, Kalakanar kakonyeneke tiritir:"
Proverbs8:31 Kalakanar kakwapuke naepedorio aiboikin: Ajai akaiyalama neeiaas idwe luka ituŋa,"
Proverbs8:32 Aso do, ikadwe, kopupunoi: Naarai isirerenitoi ŋul luericito ikaponesio."
Proverbs8:33 Kopuputu aituutoorio, koraut lukacoa, Sirikiŋeroto."
Proverbs8:34 Isirerenitoi etuŋanan lokapupuni, Irereenenei ninipaaran oruteika, Idareununei kacuneta nuka ikiriginika."
Proverbs8:35 Naarai ŋol lokadumuni eoŋ, edumuni aijar, Ejaun kasianut naka EJAKAIT."
Proverbs8:36 Konye ŋol loediaki kamakaŋ iticani akeijar: Ŋul da kere lukalaito eminas atwanare.”
Proverbs9:1 Aduk acoa eketogo, Asipok ikepirin ikanykaarei:"
Proverbs9:2 Aar iketian; enyalinyala ebinoke; Etemok da ekemesa.
Proverbs9:3 Abu kiyakia akepesur aiwor Kaiboisio nuiceleleete nukore,"
Proverbs9:4 Ebe: “ŋol lojimat, komanu lailo.” Etemari da ŋesi ŋol lomam acoa atiar,"
Proverbs9:5 “Kopotu, konyamata akatap, Komata ebino loenyalinyalit."
Proverbs9:6 Kinyeis aiimat, kojarata; Ido kolosenenete korot loka ajenun.”"
Proverbs9:7 Ŋol loeriemiriemei ekesekelon erasio, ŋol da loitoroni ekaronon emoromoroo."
Proverbs9:8 Sirikitoron ekesekelon, kinyek aila jo; Kitoron lokacoa, kiminuni ŋesi joo"
Proverbs9:9 Kituutoo lokacoa, iyatakini acoun: Kisisianak ekadoliton, iyatakini da aisisiaun."
Proverbs9:10 Ayoŋit EJAKAIT ŋes ageunet naka acoa: Aijen Lokalaunan ŋes ajenun,"
Proverbs9:11 Naarai kanukan ipuatar akonipaarasia, Iyatanakinotor da ikar luka aijarakon."
Proverbs9:12 Arai ijai kacoa, ijai kacoa kanukon: Arai da isekeli, eraas ŋun nukon."
Proverbs9:13 Ilebilebitoi aberu naebanaana; Ajimat, mam ejeŋi adis da."
Proverbs9:14 Iboie ŋesi okek loka etogoke, Oicoloŋ kaiboisio nuiceleleete nukore,"
Proverbs9:15 Anyaraun ŋul luitorete, Luelosete orotinikec,"
Proverbs9:16 Ebe, “ŋol loiimat, komanu lailo.” Etemari da neai ŋol lomam acoa atiar,"
Proverbs9:17 “Elilim akipi nukokoan, Ejijim da atap naenyamio kaiyeiyea.”"
Proverbs9:18 Konyc mam ŋol ejeŋi ebe ejaas nen lukatwak; Ipejokoke da ejaas kwap noi toma Okatwak.
Proverbs10:1 Awaragasia nuka Solomon. Okoku loeeobe einakini papake alakara: Konye okoku loebanaana itakadikini totoke.
Proverbs10:2 Iboro lukakais nuipu luedumunio kanuka aronis mam imedaete, Konye adolit nes kiyuuni katwanare,"
Proverbs10:3 Mam EJAKAIT eeamakini aijar naka ekadoliton eriebi eteŋei: Konye ireneari aiŋobel naka ekaronon.
Proverbs10:4 Akan naelonwana eyauni ican, Konye akan naekukurana itabari."
Proverbs10:5 Loetukonokini kakamu ŋes okoku loeeobe: Konye ŋol loeiotoi kaidweny ŋes okoku loiswamai nukileic.
Proverbs10:6 Ejaas arereŋesio kakou naka ekadoliton: Konye erapit akaje aituk naka ekaronon.
Proverbs10:7 Isirereni akiitun ekadoliton; Konye ebosi ekiror loka ekaronon.
Proverbs10:8 Iyuunete lukacoa kotauon aicorakineta: Konye ibirori loinerenenei nukabanaanut.
Proverbs10:9 Ŋol loelosenenei itenara elosenenei kainapakina: Konye ejenunio lomagul ikerotin.
Proverbs10:10 Loeedi kakonuke eyauni iean, Konye ibirori loinerenenei nukabanaanut."
Proverbs10:11 Aituk naka ekadoliton ŋes atan nakaijar: Konye erapit akaie aituk naka ekaronon.
Proverbs10:12 Elait isidiki inuneta: Konye crapi amina aibucanareta kere.
Proverbs10:13 Edumunio acoa kaituk naka ŋol kaloemisiana, Konyc ejai ebela kanuka ŋol kaloemamei ajenun."
Proverbs10:14 Inadakinete lukacoa aijen: Konye aituk naka loebanaana isukunyuni amudiario.
Proverbs10:15 Abara naka ekabaran ŋes ereke loegogon: Amudiar naka lukican nes icanikee.
Proverbs10:16 Aitaaritoi naka ekadoliton itebei ŋes aiiar, Eiyas loka ekaronon itebei nes aronis."
Proverbs10:17 Ŋol loibwaikini etau aituutoorio ejai orot loebei aijar: Konye epaari nol loijalijala aitoronio.
Proverbs10:18 Ŋol loimunoni elait erai loka aituk nakenalan: Ebanaana da ŋol loesabanakinenei.
Proverbs10:19 Kaipues naka akiro mam eswaki aibucar: Konye ŋol loetiki akenaiep iswamai kacoa.
Proverbs10:20 Eputos aŋajep naka ekadoliton ka epuesa loseuna: Etau loka ekaronon erai lootai.
Proverbs10:21 Itanyami aituk naka ekadoliton luipu: Konye etwakete lubaŋiok naarai eolikinete acoa.
Proverbs10:22 Arereŋ naka EJAKAIT itabari, Mam da inyalakini ican kaŋes."
Proverbs10:23 Aswam aronis esubit bala abolia mama ejai ebaŋ: Aswam da nukaeoa itojokit ctunanan lokaienun,"
Proverbs10:24 Nuekurianari ekaronon kes nuedoikinete ŋes: Ido einakinio ekadoliton nuimiela.
Proverbs10:25 Ketubor etapipirio, emamei bobo ekaronon: Konye icasit ekadoliton ikar kere."
Proverbs10:26 Kwape ebino loedwar ria kokel, ka apuru toma akonye, Ikoni nen loilonwana kama ejaas ŋul luiyakito nes."
Proverbs10:27 Ayoŋit EJAKAIT iyatakini apaarasia: Konye ituurianitai ikar luka ekaronon.
Proverbs10:28 Amun naka ekadoliton itodoli aiyalama: Konye eoliori amun naka ekaronon.
Proverbs10:29 Erai EJAKAIT abwas naegogon mama ejaas luitenara kotauon: Konye erai amudiar mama ejaas ikeswamak numam adolit,"
Proverbs10:30 Mam eut ikadolitok elemanario: Konye mam ikaronok ibojenenete kakwap.
Proverbs10:31 Itolomuni aituk naka ekadoliton acoa: Konye emudiario aŋajep naepaarit.
Proverbs10:32 Ejeŋi aituk naka ekadoliton nuecamunio: Konye aituk naka ekaronon ejeŋi nuepaarito.
Proverbs11:1 Aitemis nakainal nes naketal mama ejai EJAKAIT: Konye isiyalamikinit ŋes emisani loedolit.
Proverbs11:2 Naebunio aiwoŋonut ŋes eponiata ileic: Konye ejai acoa kaluitasonos.
Proverbs11:3 Abeit naka luitenara kotauon nes iijarenikini kes: Konye amagul naka luebilete ebotet ŋes emudiari kes.
Proverbs11:4 Mam abar isikeriani kapaaran naka anyunyura: Konye eyuuni adolit katwanare.
Proverbs11:5 Iteteni adolit naka loliogot otau ekerot: Konye ibirori ekaronon kanuka akeronis.
Proverbs11:6 Adolit naka luitenara kotauon ŋes eyuuni kes: Konye ipoki ameneranutukec nul luebilete ebotet,"
Proverbs11:7 Naetwania ekaronon, eoliori akemun: Eoliori da amun naka numam adolit."
Proverbs11:8 Eyuunio ekadoliton kotoma ocan, Kobuni do ekaronon aiboisike."
Proverbs11:9 Emudiari etuŋanan lomam eyonit Edeke ekeidunyet kaitukuke: Konye eyuunio ekadoliton kanuka aijen,"
Proverbs11:10 Nakeanyuniata ikadolitok aiokis, elakara ere: Nakeolioroto ikaronok ejai eibwoŋ."
Proverbs11:11 Itopoloorio ere kanuka aisirerenio naka luitenara kotauon: Konye etiyaikinete aituke nuka ikaronok.
Proverbs11:12 Ŋol loemwaŋi ekeidunyet emamei acoa, Konye ililiŋi etuŋanan Iokaienun."
Proverbs11:13 Otibeele loideidei epukori nukaiyeiyea: Konye ŋol lokemoyo lomunot imunoni akirot.
Proverbs11:14 Neemamei aitetenio ibiroros ituŋa: Konye kaipues naka ikenerunak ejai ainapakin.
Proverbs11:15 Ŋol loerauni ekabwoaran loka emoit eanyuni iean: Konye inapakina ŋol loelait abwoanar.
Proverbs11:16 Aberu nakasianut edumuni aibuses: Ikiliok lukakaje edumunete abar.
Proverbs11:17 Etuŋanan loitimi iswamakini aijarake ejok: Konye ŋol loededeŋ iticani akuanake.
Proverbs11:18 Edumuni ekaronon eropit lokainal: Konye ŋol loeyei adolit edumuni eropit lokabeit.
Proverbs11:19 Ŋol loiketakina kadolit edumuni aijar: ŋol da loetupari aronis earakini bon.
Proverbs11:20 Ŋul lueiaas itauon lumagul eraas luketale mama ejai EJAKAIT: Konye ŋul luedoliorito korotokec isiyalamikinete ŋes.
Proverbs11:21 Abeit etuŋanan lokaronon mam eswaki aiticanio, Konye eyuunio aur naka ekadoliton."
Proverbs11:22 Kwape etet loka esabu kokume loka epege, Ikoni nen aberu naitemelel naemamei acobeu."
Proverbs11:23 Ejok luimiela ekadoliton: Konye amuno naka ikaronok ŋes anyunyura.
Proverbs11:24 Ejai loisiarisiari, ido iyatanakini adumun; Ejai da loimiki aitelekarit luibusakinito, konye etwaniari."
Proverbs11:25 Iturumio ojokotau: Ŋol da loieoeoi akipi icocoikinio.
Proverbs11:26 Ikenete ituŋa ŋol loimiki kes akima: Konye ejai arereŋ akou naka ŋol kaloegwelari.
Proverbs11:27 Ŋol loinyikokin amoot adolit, emoot asianut: Konye ŋol loemoot ameŋeranut, edolokini nes,"
Proverbs11:28 Ibiror ŋol loemunokina akebar: Konye ekerianar loedolit kwape kakuii nuelibete.
Proverbs11:29 Ŋol loiticani ekaleke irumi ekwam: Eraun ebaŋ ebulesit loka lokacoa kotau.
Proverbs11:30 Araito naka ekadoliton nes ekitoi loka aijar; Ka ŋol da loejai acoa edumuni aijar naka ituŋa.
Proverbs11:31 Koany, einakinio ekadoliton eropit kakwap: Itelekarito cama ekaronon ka ekadiakanaran!"
Proverbs12:1 ŋol loekoto alimokinio, ekoto ajenun: Konye ŋol loelait aitoronio esubit bala etiaŋ,"
Proverbs12:2 Etuŋanan loejok edumuni asianut kama ejai EJAKAIT, Konye etubokini ŋesi aitelekar etuŋanan lokibotei lueroko."
Proverbs12:3 Mam etuŋanan icasit kanuka aronis: Konye esali aliasit naka ekadoliton komam ijaŋijaŋio.
Proverbs12:4 Aberu naejok nes aboko naka okilenike: Konye ŋin naitisili esubit bala abosus kotoma akojoke.
Proverbs12:5 Edolito aomisio nuka ikadolitok: Konye iŋalana ainerun naka ikaronok.
Proverbs12:6 Eperunete akiro nuka ikaronok aokot: Konye eyuuni aituk naka luitenara,"
Proverbs12:7 Elatario ikaronok koolios: Konye ebwoi etogo loka ekadoliton.
Proverbs12:8 Iturio etuŋanan kwape eiaar acoake: Konye emenio ŋol loejai etau lomagul.
Proverbs12:9 Lomam enyaritai araut ibore, kojai ebulesit, Itelekarit ŋol loiturokina, komameete inyamat."
Proverbs12:10 Eomit ekadoliton aijar naka Iketian: Konye eroko aitimesia nuka ikaronok.
Proverbs12:11 Loekoriei alupoke ejaunos kinyamat luipu: Konye ŋol loerupari aamameak emamei aijen.
Proverbs12:12 Iŋobelei ekaronon eboi loka lukelepa: Konye aliasit naka ekadoliton erai araito.
Proverbs12:13 Aibucar naka aituk nes eic mama ejai lokelepa: Konye ekui ekadoliton koean.
Proverbs12:14 Imonikini etuŋanan araito nuejok nuka aitukuke: Inyakakinio etuŋanan aswamisio nuka akaninike.
Proverbs12:15 Itojokit Ioban ekerot kakonyeneke: Konye lokaeoa epupokini ainerun.
Proverbs12:16 Ejenunio atipet anyunyura naka lobaŋ: Konye ibwai etuŋanan lokacobeu ileje.
Proverbs12:17 Ŋol loelimokini nukabeit isideleleuni adolit, Konye ekaienan lokainal isideleleuni aiŋalanut."
Proverbs12:18 Ejai loisudi akiro kwape aicum kekilen; Konye eŋaleuni aŋajep naka lukacoa.
Proverbs12:19 Iketakina aituk naka abeit apaarasia kere: Konye aŋajep nakainal erai naka aied akoŋu.
Proverbs12:20 Ejai aiŋalanut otauon luka nul kaluepwakunete aronis: Konye iyalamasi ŋul luinerunete ainapakin.
Proverbs12:21 Mam ican edoikinete ekadoliton: Konye imonikinos ikaronok aronis.
Proverbs12:22 Aituke nukainal eraas nuketale mama ejai EJAKAIT; Konye isiyalamikinete ŋes nul luiswamaete nukabeit,"
Proverbs12:23 Ibwai etuŋanan loecobe aijen: Konye ilabilabete itauon luka ibaŋiok abaŋaanut.
Proverbs12:24 Eyai akan naka luekukuraka: Konye eraunos luekalanyaka ikeswamak nukailolitoi.
Proverbs12:25 Aiyaloŋoŋ kotau loka etuŋanan itukukumi: Konye isiyalamikinete ŋes akiro nuejok.
Proverbs12:26 Eraun ekadoliton ekenarenikinon eidunyeteke: Konye erot loka ikaronok itapaari kes.
Proverbs12:27 Etuŋanan lokalanyana mam epei luamejau: Konye iboro luka akais nuipu luka ituŋa eraunos luka kaluekukuraka,"
Proverbs12:28 Ejai aijar toma orot loka adolit; Emamei atwanare korot kaŋol.
Proverbs13:1 Epupi ikoku yenikacoa aicorio naka papake: Konye yenemwanana mam epupuni aitoronio,"
Proverbs13:2 Enyami etuŋanan nuejok kanuka araito nuka aitukuke: Konye etau loka kaluebilete ebotet enyamenenei epali.
Proverbs13:3 Yenidari akenaiep itogogoni aiiarake: Konye Ioitoonari noi akeituk edumuni amudiario.
Proverbs13:4 Inobelei etau loka kaloelonwana, komam edumuni ibore: Konye imonikin etau loka kaloekukurana."
Proverbs13:5 Elait etuŋanan loedolit aiŋal: Konye etuŋanan lokaronon esiliana, ido irumete ileic,"
Proverbs13:6 Igalikini adolit Ioetenit korot: Konye isibirori aronis ekadiakanaran.
Proverbs13:7 Ejai loitabarikin, kwabo komamei ibore: Ejai loicanakin, kwabo koiaas kabar naepol."

Proverbs13:9 Iyalama aica naka luedolito: Konye itudenio atala naka ikaronok.
Proverbs13:10 Eyauni aiwoŋonut epeget bon: Konye ejaun acoa kanul kaluinerunete ejok,"
Proverbs13:11 Inonario abar naedumunio kanuka aamameak: Konye iyatakinio loetukonokini kakukuranut.

Proverbs13:14 Erai ekisil loka lokacoa atan naka aijar, Anyoun koica luka atwanare."

Proverbs13:18 Eiaunete iean ka ileje ŋol loeŋeri aicorio: Konye itubusikinio loibwaikinit etau toma aitoronio.
Proverbs13:19 Eiiiimikini etau aiŋobel naetodolikin: Konye anyoun karonis erai naketal kama ejaas ibaŋiok,"

Proverbs14:1 Eduki ninibcru nakaeoa etogoke: Konye etiyatiyai naban kakaninike.

Proverbs14:6 Emoi ekesekelon acoa komam edumuni: Konye epatana aijen kama ejai nol loejai ajenun.

Proverbs14:12 Ejai erot loeomit etuŋanan bon ebe ejok, Konye osaŋeke kes irotin luka atwanare."
Proverbs14:13 Karaida kekieni, konye itururwei etau; Esaŋe da loka aiyalama nes aiurunun."
Proverbs14:14 Loebonori kau kotauke imonikini ikerotin: Etuŋanan da loejok imonikini nuke elopet.
Proverbs14:15 Iyuunit iiimat ŋinikirot: Konye ericit loeeobe alositeke.
Proverbs14:16 Iyapaara lokaeoa, ido enyouni karonis, Konye iranaana loban, ido iilokin."
Proverbs14:17 Iswamai etuŋanan loisunyit anyunyuranakin nukabaijaanut: Elaio da ŋol lokibotei lueroko.
Proverbs14:18 Irumito luiimat abaŋaanut: Konye idokokinio lueeobe aboko naka aijen.
Proverbs14:19 Ekukumito lukaronok kakonyen nuka lukajokak; Ka lukelepa da korutei luka ikadolitok.
Proverbs14:20 Lokican elai ŋes ekeidunyet da: Konye ekabaran ejaas ipapero luipu.
Proverbs14:21 Ediakarit loemenit ekeidunyet: Konye elakara loitimi lukican.
Proverbs14:22 Mam kereka ŋul luepwakunete aronis epaarete? Konye eiaununos aitim ka abeit kanul kaluepwakunete ajokis.
Proverbs14:23 Ejai ameda toma aitaaritoi kere: Konye ailabilabanut eyauni aibabanitoi.
Proverbs14:24 Abarakec ŋes aboko naka lukacoa, Konye abaŋaanut naka ibaŋiok ŋes abaŋaanut bon."
Proverbs14:25 Itajari ekaienan lokabeit aijar naka luee: Konye loesabana itapaari.
Proverbs14:26 Loeyonit EJAKAIT ejai amun naegogon: Ikedwe da edumunete neekereanara.
Proverbs14:27 Ayoŋit EJAKAIT ŋes atan naka aijar, Anyoun koica luka atwanare."
Proverbs14:28 Aibuses naka ekabaka ŋes aipues naka ituŋa; Konye naemameatar Iruna emudiario Iokapolon.

Proverbs15:4 Aŋajep naiperioro ŋes ekitoi loka aijar: Konye akiro numagul ebilete emoyo.
Proverbs15:5 Emeni lobaŋ aicor naka papake: Konye loibwaikini etau aitoronio edumuni acobeu.

Proverbs15:21 Abaŋaanut ŋes aiyalama neejai ŋol loemamei acoa: Konye iteteni etuŋanan loejai aijen alositeke.
Proverbs15:22 Neemamei ainerun etwakiarete nuelosikinitoi: Konye icatunete kaipues naka ikenerunak.

Proverbs15:24 Edokari erot loka lokacoa kuiu neejai aijar, Tetere enyouni kokwap kaneejai Okatwak."

Proverbs16:4 Esubakinit EJAKAIT ŋinibore aswamuke: Eebo, lukaronok da esubakinit apaaran naka aronis."
Proverbs16:5 Ŋolituŋanan loiturokina kotauke erai loketale kaneejai EJAKAIT: Abeit, mam eswaki aiticanio."
Proverbs16:6 Aitim ka abeit kes elueete numam adolit: Ido ayoŋit EJAKAIT isinaei ituŋa aronis.
Proverbs16:7 Arai isiyalamikinete irotin luka etuŋanan. EJAKAIT, Isinapikini lukasurupoke da."

Proverbs16:13 Isiyalamikinete ikabakan aituke nuedolito: Eminasi kesi ŋol loinera nuitenara.

Proverbs16:21 Lukacoa kotauon enyaritai lueeobe: Aiiiim da naka aituk iyatakini aimaima.
Proverbs16:22 Ajenun ŋes atan naka aijar mama ejai ŋol loeiaatar: Konye abaŋaanut ŋes aiticanet naka ibaŋiok.
Proverbs16:23 Isisianakini etau loka lokaeoa aitukuke, Iyatakini da aimaima anaiepeke."
Proverbs16:24 Akiro nuisiyalamikinete esubito bala akap nuka ao, Eiijimikinito aiiar, ido eraas aŋaleu naka akoio."

Proverbs16:26 Aiŋobel naka ekeswaman iswamakini nes aswam; Naarai isinyikokini akeituk.

Proverbs16:28 Eyei etuŋanan lomagul epeget: Ido etiaki ekedeideon ipapero.

Proverbs17:1 Ejok aiban neejai aiyapaara, Itia ainyam epucit kotogo loeleleba aŋolopa."
Proverbs17:2 Ebulesit lokacoa eyai ikoku yeniswamai nukileie, Ido irumi airumet koinaean."
Proverbs17:3 Amot nes ililiaunere epuesa, eupa da esabu; Konye EJAKAIT itemi itauon,"
Proverbs17:4 Ibwaikini loiswamai aronis eketau neejaas aituke nueroko: Iirari da lokenalan aŋajep naka ameŋeranut.
Proverbs17:5 Loemoear lukican emoromoroi Lokasubanike: Ŋol da loisiyalamikinit ican mam eswaki aiticanio,"
Proverbs17:6 Idwe luka idwe kes aboko naka imakio; Aibuses da naka idwe ŋes lukapapakee.
Proverbs17:7 Mam ibusakinit loban einer nuepolok: Ido bo do aituk nakainal ibusakinit biai lokapolon?
Proverbs17:8 Esubit ainakinet bala amoru nakarereŋ kakonye nuka nol kaloejaatar nin: Ekerianari neibelokinor kere.
Proverbs17:9 Ŋol loerapakini aibucaret emoi amina: Konye loieeeemono etiaki ipapero.
Proverbs17:10 Elomari noi aitoronio toma otunanan lokaijen, Aitelekarit ibelai akwatat kaneejai loban."
Proverbs17:11 Etuŋanan lokaronon cmoi epali bon; ŋes kijukarere ekiyakia loededeŋ mamakeŋ,"
Proverbs17:12 Eiok etuŋanan airiamakin kadubu naedemaritai ikedwe, Itia airiamakin ebaŋ kabanaanutuke,"
Proverbs17:13 Loetaeakini aronis itia aiokis, Mam enyouni aronis kokaleke."
Proverbs17:14 Ageunet naka eeelet esubit bala etuŋanan loepeduni akipi: Aso do kinyek epeget, eriŋa ejauna aŋolopa."
Proverbs17:15 Ŋol loitojoki lokaronon, ka nol da loititelekari ekadoliton, Eraas kesi kere luketal kaneejai EJAKAIT,"
Proverbs17:16 Kanukinyo ejaatar loban apesan akanike agwelia acoa, Kwabo emamei ŋes aijen?"
Proverbs17:17 Emina epapero apaarasia kere, Ido onaee euritai kanuka apakio nuka icano"
Proverbs17:18 Etuŋanan loemamei aijen ititini akan, Eraun ekabwoaran kakonyen nuka eidunyeteke."
Proverbs17:19 Loemina eeelet emina aibucar: da loitoojari ekekike emoi amudiario.
Proverbs17:20 Ŋol loemagul etau mam edumuni ajokis: Ŋol da loemagul aŋajep ibirokin aronis.
Proverbs17:21 Loeurie ebaŋ eanyuni ican: Papa da loka ebaŋ mam iyalama.
Proverbs17:22 Etau loelakara nes ekia loejok: Konye emoyo loebilil itooni akoio,"
Proverbs17:23 Iiauni ekaronon ainakinet katorob, Aibelokinio irotin luka etube."
Proverbs17:24 Ejai acoa akonyen nuka nol kaloeiai aijen: Konye akonye nuka ebaŋ ejaas osaŋeta luka akwap,"
Proverbs17:25 Okoku loban itakadikini papake, Ido erai adwaris mama ejai nakeurie nes."
Proverbs17:26 Ido mam ejok aitican ekadoliton, Karaida aile isotia kanuka aitenarakec,"
Proverbs17:27 Loitikokini akekiro ejaas kaiien: Erunanan Ioeiai emoyo loelilim emisiana.
Proverbs17:28 Loban da arai ililhji enyaritar lokaeoa: Arai ebutarit eomitai loecobe.
Proverbs18:1 Ŋol loetiakar bon emoi ekeimiel elopet, Epega kacoa kere naenalei,"
Proverbs18:2 Mam ebaŋ isiyalamikinit aijen, Konye ekoto apukonor nukotauke."
Proverbs18:3 Arai kebu lokaronon, ebuni da amwanio, Ido aitisilio da ebuni kamoromoroo."
Proverbs18:4 Akiro nuka aituk naka etuŋanan esubito bala akipi nuidulok; Atan nakaeoa erai aguurut naelelei.
Proverbs18:5 Mam ejok acamun akonyen nuka lukaronok, Karaida aireŋe Iokadoliton kotube."
Proverbs18:6 Aŋajep naka ebaŋ eyauni epeget, Iriuni da akeituk aleio."
Proverbs18:7 Aituk naka ebaŋ ŋes amudiarioke, Anaiepeke da ŋes eic loka aiiarake,"
Proverbs18:8 Akiro nuka ekerupean esubito bala edia loejijim, Elomarete toma atutubeta nukotoma nuka akoik."
Proverbs18:9 Ŋol da loijaliiala kotoma aswamuke, ŋes onace kanol kaloemudiari."
Proverbs18:10 Ekiror loka EJAKAIT nes ere Loegogoŋ: Ekeri ekadoliton nen kosodi aiyar.
Proverbs18:11 Abara naka ekabaran ŋes ekere loegogon, Kwape karwatat naeoja kotoma aomisioke."
Proverbs18:12 Eriŋa emudiara, iturokina etau loka etuŋanan, Aitasonikin da inarenikinlt aibuses."
Proverbs18:13 Loebonokini korina epupuno, ŋes abaŋaanut ka ileje kamaken,"
Proverbs18:14 Emoyo loka etuŋanan etitinikini adekake; Konye iŋai bo epedori atitiŋikin emoyo loebilil?
Proverbs18:15 Etau loka Ioecobe edumuni aijen; Akit da naka lokaeoa emoi aijen,"
Proverbs18:16 Ainakinet naka etuŋanan enyaikini nes aibois, Ido itodoli akonyen nuka lukapolok."
Proverbs18:17 Loisiauni aosan esubit bala ŋes edolit; Konye ebuni ekeidunyet, kosodi aiŋic."
Proverbs18:18 Itanani eroet ipegeta, Edieki da ikagogoŋok,"
Proverbs18:19 Arai kenyunyrikin onac etiono ainyakun aitelekarit ere Ioegogoij: Ipegeta luikote nen eputokinos katiketa nuka ere.
Proverbs18:20 Akoik naka etuŋanan ilelebun araito nuka aitukuke; Imonikini da keiyas naka anaiepeke.
Proverbs18:21 Atwanare ka aijar ejaas toma apedor naka aŋaiep: Ka nul da luipudasi nes enyamete araitoke.
Proverbs18:22 Loedumuni aberu edumuni aiokis, Edumuni da asianut naka EJAKAIT."
Proverbs18:23 Imaimaitoi lokican: Konye isieianakini lokabaran.
Proverbs18:24 Loisipaperi luipu iriuni amudiario: Konye ejai epapero loimorikikina noi aitelekarit onac.
Proverbs19:1 Ejok lokican loelosenenei kabeiteke Itia lokaituk namagul ido kobanaana,"
Proverbs19:2 Arai mam aijar ejaas kaijen, mam ejok; ŋol da loiwonyi kakekeje ediaki."
Proverbs19:3 Eburiari abaŋaanut naka etuŋanan ekerot; Kosodi enyunyurikini eketau EJAKAIT.
Proverbs19:4 Abara iyatakini ipapero luipu: Konye lokican etiakas kepaperoke.
Proverbs19:5 Ekaienan lokenalan mam eswaki aiticanio; ŋol da loesabanakini mam ekui.
Proverbs19:6 Ipu luimaimaete asianut naka ekapolon: Ido nolitunanan erai epapero loka ŋol kaloeinakini ainakineta.
Proverbs19:7 Elaete lokican ikeinaean kere: Itelekarito ca ma ikepapero alwakiar kama eiail Ibwapit kes kakiro, konye koekarito."
Proverbs19:8 Loedumuni acoa emina aijarake: Loerici aijen edumuni ajokis.
Proverbs19:9 Ekaienan lokenalan mam eswaki aiticanio; ŋol da loesabanakini emudiario.
Proverbs19:10 Aiiamam mam ibusakinit loban; Aso ikoni ibusakinit ai ebulesit ayait lukapolok?
Proverbs19:11 Acobeu einakini etuŋanan aiyap anyunyura; Ido aibusesuke ŋes aisioni aibucaret.
Proverbs19:12 Anyunyura naka ekabaka esubit bala agat naka eŋatuny; Konye akesianut bala akopyo kanya.
Proverbs19:13 Erai okoku lobaŋ ican kaneejai papake: Aŋolopa da naka aberu nes aiit naduc.
Proverbs19:14 Etogo ka abara kes airumeta nuepote kaneeiaas lukapapa: Konye aberu naecobe ebuni kaneejai EJAKAIT.
Proverbs19:15 Akalanyanut eyaŋauni aio nuipu; Aiiar da naiialiialana eriebi eteŋei.
Proverbs19:16 Loidari aicorakinet idari akeiiar: Konye lomam ibwaikinit eketau toma orotinike etwani,"
Proverbs19:17 Loitimi lokican eyuuni EJAKAIT, Ido etacakini ŋesi bobo aswamuke naejok."
Proverbs19:18 Koleeo ikonikoku naarai ejai amun; Kwabo sirikinobel amudiarioke.
Proverbs19:19 Etuŋanan lokanyunyura naepol egeli: Naarai arai kiyu ŋes ibusakinit airucakin ayuun.
Proverbs19:20 Kopupununei ainerun, kiyuununei aisisianakinio, Tetere iraun lokacoa kapaarasiakon nukawasia."
Proverbs19:21 Ipu nuelosikinit etau loka etuŋanan, Konye ainerun naka EJAKAIT icasit."
Proverbs19:22 Nuimiela etuŋanan nes asianutuke: Lokican da itelekarit ekeŋalan.
Proverbs19:23 Ayoŋit EJAKAIT eyauni aijar; Ŋol da loeiaatar nin iboie imono; Mam aronis ebunokini ŋes.
Proverbs19:24 Idoni akan naka loelonwana aruba, Komam bobo ekot ainyakun toma aitukuke."
Proverbs19:25 Kinom loemwanana, isisiauni iiimat acobeu: Kitoron loejai aijen, ejenuni da aijen,"
Proverbs19:26 Loenasi papake, kirenea da totoke, ŋes ikoku yenisurumi ileic, iriuni da amorosit."
Proverbs19:27 Okokuka, kinyek akiirar aisisianakinio Ipaari do anyoun kakiro nuka aijen,"
Proverbs19:28 Isekeli ekajenan lotai etube: Ilikori aituk naka ekaronon numam adolit.
Proverbs19:29 Itemokinitoi itubesia kanuka Iukamwanak, Ka ibelai da kanuka ipuran luka ibaŋiok."
Proverbs20:1 Erai, ebino ekamwanan, nuitemerete da ebenyaka: Loirianitoi kanuka ŋun emamei acoa."
Proverbs20:2 Etasuro loka ekabaka esubit bala agat naka enaruny: Loitunyunyurikini ŋess emunaari aijarake.
Proverbs20:3 Itubusikini etuŋanan atiakar kopeget: Konye ekoto ŋolibaŋ aŋolopa.
Proverbs20:4 Eneri loelonwana akoru kapak naka ailob; Emootoi kedolu aisak, mam edumuni ibore."
Proverbs20:5 Ainerun nakotoma otau loka etuŋanan esubit bala atan naidul; Konye epedori etuŋanan lokaijen aiwok.
Proverbs20:6 Ilabilabete ituŋa luipu ŋolituŋanan akesianut: Konye iŋai bo epedori adumun etuŋanan lomunot?
Proverbs20:7 Etuŋanan loedolit loelosenenei kabeiteke, Isirerenitoi ikedwe luetupanakinete ŋes."
Proverbs20:8 Ekabaka loiboie koicoloŋoke loka aitub Epietari aronis kere kakonyeneke,"
Proverbs20:9 Iŋai epedori atemar atiar, “Etalau ekatau, Arai loasegara kotoma aronisika”?"
Proverbs20:10 Imisanin luegelegela ka, aitemisio nuegelegela, Eraas kere luketale kaneejai EJAKAIT."
Proverbs20:11 Ikoku yenididi da ejenunio kanuka aswamisioke, Arai esegara aswamuke, arai ejok."
Proverbs20:12 Akit naiirari, akoŋu da naeseseni, EJAKAIT ŋes esubit kere."
Proverbs20:13 Sirimina aio kinyek adolore ailwaritoi; Kokwenyut akonikonyen, kosodi kimonikin inyamat."
Proverbs20:14 Ebala ekagwelan ebe, “Erono, erono.” Konye keeka, ŋes do ituror,"
Proverbs20:15 Ejai esabu ka amor nukarenak nuipu noi: Konye aituk naka aijen ŋes ibore yenika akais nuipu.
Proverbs20:16 Kolema anapito naka ŋol kaloebwoari elonwau, Korau ŋesi aititiŋet loebwoari nakerimon."
Proverbs20:17 Ejijimikini etuŋanan atap naka aiŋal; Konye kokau ilelebunos inaroi aitukuke.
Proverbs20:18 Ŋin nailosikini itogogonitai kainerun: Koii ejie kainarenikinio nakaeoa.
Proverbs20:19 Loirimirimi kideideonokini epukori nukaiyeiyea: Aso siriupasi kanol kaloeoonanari akeituk.
Proverbs20:20 Loilami papake arai totoke, Itudenio atalake kamuton naejesi eucucuc."
Proverbs20:21 Airumet nairasakini adumun kageunet, Mam isirerenitoi kawasiake,"
Proverbs20:22 Sirikitema atiar, “Enyaŋi aronis”: Kidareu EJAKAIT, ŋes da kitaiari joo"
Proverbs20:23 Aitemisio nuegelegela eraas nuketale kaneejai EJAKAIT; Emisani da Iokenalan mam ejok.
Proverbs20:24 Alosito nuka etuŋanan eraas nuka EJAKAIT. Ikwaikini ai epedori etuŋanan ajenun erotoke?
Proverbs20:25 Erai eic kaneejai erunanan aisunyit atemar atiar, “Erai lokalaunan,” Kosodi kedau aiyapo iŋisi."
Proverbs20:26 Epiesi ekabaka lokaeoa ikaronok, Ido eyauni agali nakicomis kuiukec,"
Proverbs20:27 Emoyo loka etuŋanan nes atala naka Edeke, Enici atutubeta kere nukotoma akoik."
Proverbs20:28 Itajarete aitim ka abeit ekabaka: Ido aitim nes iganuni ekeicoloŋ loka ajakanut,"
Proverbs20:29 Aibuses naka ikatumunak nes agogonukec: Atemelel da naka imakio nes akoruo nuka akwesikee.
Proverbs20:30 Apipil naka imaearin itesegari aronis: Ibelai da italaunete atutubeta nukotoma.
Proverbs21:1 Ejai etau loka ekabaka akan naka EJAKAIT kwape aleles naka akipi: Ibelokini ŋes kwape ekotor.
Proverbs21:2 Ŋolirot loka etuŋanan edolit kakonyeneke: Konye itemi EJAKAIT itauon.
Proverbs21:3 Aswam nukabeit ka etube, Iyuunit EJAKAIT aitelekarit asuban."
Proverbs21:4 Akonye nueomiara ka etau lokaiwononut, Atala naka ikaronok, ŋes aronis."
Proverbs21:5 Aomisio nuka luekukuraka eyaŋaunete aipues: Konye nolirunanan loisunyit, isunyari toma aibabanitoi."
Proverbs21:6 Adumun abar kanaiep nakenalan, Esubit bala eiyeŋane loekutario, eic da lokatwanare."
Proverbs21:7 Akaje naka ikaronok epiyari kes; Naarai eŋerito aswam nuketube.
Proverbs21:8 Emagul noi erot loka ŋol kaloigugunatoi karonis: Konye ejokuka aswamisio nuka Ŋol kaloesegara.
Proverbs21:9 Eiok aiboi kagor naka etogo kokuiu, Itia aiboi kaberu naeŋolopana kotogo loelal."
Proverbs21:10 Iŋobeli etau loka ekaronon aronis: Mam ekeidunyet edumuni asianut kakonyeke.
Proverbs21:11 Arai iticanio ekamwanan, itoeouni ijimat, Arai isisianakinio lokaeoa edumuni aijen,"
Proverbs21:12 Eomoomoi ekadoliton etogo loka ekaronon; Kwape elatarere lukaronok kooliosi.
Proverbs21:13 Loisikakini akeki aimony naka lokican, Ŋes da kemony, konye mam epupunio."
Proverbs21:14 Ainakinet nakaiyeiyea isinapikini anyunyura, Ainakinet da nakotorob isinapikini anyunyura naepol."
Proverbs21:15 Aitodol etube isiyalamikini ikadolitok, Konye emudiari luiswamaete numam adolit."
Proverbs21:16 Etuŋanan loepaari anyoun koroto loka aijen Ibworari kokodet loka lukatwak.
Proverbs21:17 Loimiela aiyalama eraenena lokican, Loimiela aion ka akinyet mam ebari."
Proverbs21:18 Eraun ekaronon alakunet naka ekadoliton: Luebilete ibotei da ebeete aibois naka Iuitenara.
Proverbs21:19 Ejok aiboienen kakwap nakamodin, Itia aiboi kaberu naenolopana naedelana."
Proverbs21:20 Ejai abar naka akais nuipu ka akinyet togo loka ekadoliton; Konye ilikori loban.
Proverbs21:21 Ŋol loibwapit adolit ka aitim Edumuni aiiar ka adolit, ka aibuses da,"
Proverbs21:22 Edokari lokaeoa ore loka luegogon, Etiyaikini agogoŋ nakemunosi."
Proverbs21:23 Ŋol loidari aitukuke ka anaiepeke, Idari akeijar kinyek adumun icano"
Proverbs21:24 Ekamwanan ŋes ekiror loka etuŋanan loiwonoono, loeomiara, Iswamai ŋesi kaisosolonut nakaiwonoonut."
Proverbs21:25 Eari aiŋobel Ioelonwana: Naarai eŋerito akekanin aswam.
Proverbs21:26 Eranana ekaronon aitiwar akwap: Konye ekadoliton einakini komam imiki.
Proverbs21:27 Asubanit naka ekaronon erai naketale: Arai eyaunit ketau lokaronon itelekarit ca araut naketale!
Proverbs21:28 Eoliori ekaienan lokenalan: Konye ejaenena akirot naka etuŋanan kaloepupuni.
Proverbs21:29 Etuŋanan lokaronon itogogonit akekonyen: Konye loitenara iteteni ikerotin.
Proverbs21:30 Emamei acoa karaida aijen, Karaida ainerun arianakin ka EJAKAIT."
Proverbs21:31 Ekapakinitai ebalasit kapaaran naka ejie: Konye ebuni aipikor kaneejai EJAKAIT.
Proverbs22:1 Tiejok aseun ekiror loejok itia abar naepol, Ido asianut nakamin itia epuesa ka esa bu."
Proverbs22:2 Iriamanakinos lukabarak ka lukican: EJAKAIT ŋes ekasubanikec kere.
Proverbs22:3 Eanyuni etuŋanan loecobe aronis, kosodi aiŋop: Konye itorete lujimat nen, iticanio."
Proverbs22:4 Eropit lokaitasono ka ayoŋ it EJAKAIT, ŋes abar, ka aibuses, ka aijar da."
Proverbs22:5 Ejaas ikukwa ka iica korot loka lomagul: Ŋol loidara bon clwaniar kamakee.
Proverbs22:6 Kitanaik ikoku erot loibusakinit alosenenoo, Karaida kemoion mam enyouni kanen,"
Proverbs22:7 Eyait lokabaran lokican, Loeyuuna da erai ebulesit loka loeyuuni."
Proverbs22:8 Loeyei numam adolit esaki ilou: Edaun da ebela loka anyunyurake.
Proverbs22:9 Isirerenitoi loeja kakonye nuesiaka; Naarai einakini lukican inyamatake.
Proverbs22:10 Kireŋea ekamwan an, emamuun da epeget; Eebo, enaŋi aŋolopa ka amoromor."
Proverbs22:11 Loekot etau loescgara, Kanuka asianut naka aitukuke ŋes eraunor ekabaka epaperoke,"
Proverbs22:12 Esesenete akonye nuka EJAKAIT ŋol loejai anen, Konye itapalauni akiro nuka etuŋanan loebili ibotei."
Proverbs22:13 Ebala loelonwana ebe, “Ejai eŋatuny kina: Kaari korot.”"
Proverbs22:14 Aituk naka aberu kanaadote nes aipany naidul: Kenyunyuriki EJAKAIT etuŋanan ibirokini nen.
Proverbs22:15 Eenitai abaŋaanut kotoma otau loka ikoku: Konye ibelai lukaleeor irenearete neelwana kamaken.
Proverbs22:16 Ŋol loeroikini lokican adumunia amedake, Ŋol da loeinakini lokabaran iboro, edolokini ŋol aibabanitoi."
Proverbs22:17 Kitoik akonikit, kiira akiro nuka lukacoa, Kibwaik da ekonitau mama ejai akaijen."
Proverbs22:18 Naarai ejok arai irici kes kotomakon, Arai icasito kaitukukon."
Proverbs22:19 Kojai amunonutukon neejai EJAKAIT, ŋes ketejenunia lolo jo da."
Proverbs22:20 Mam kereka kewadikakinit jo akiro nuejokuka no;’ Nuka ainerun ka nuka aijen da?
