Proverbs22:21 Aitejenikini jo cut akiro nukabeit, Tetere iboŋokini akiro nukabeit ŋul lukijukarito."
Proverbs22:22 Sirinasi lokican, naarai icana, Karaida aroikin luiticanio korute."
Proverbs22:23 Naarai epurokini EJAKAIT kes, Ido enatari aijarakec kaŋul kaluenasete."
Proverbs22:24 Sirikisipaper etuŋanan loenyunyurana; Siriupasi ketunanan loisiopana:
Proverbs22:25 Kinyek aisisiaun ikerotin, Ipoki aijarakon koie."
Proverbs22:26 Sirijaananas kanul kaluititinete akanin, Kanul kaluebwoanarete lukapesenin:"
Proverbs22:27 Arai imameete jo lutacakinet, Kanukinyo ma eyanaaria ŋesi aperitikon kamakon?"
Proverbs22:28 Sirikijul aanyunet naka eikor losek, Nakesipokinete lukapapaakon."
Proverbs22:29 Iany etuŋanan ekukurikinit aitaaritoike? Ebwoi ŋesi kakonyen nuka ikabakan; Mam ebwoi kakonyen nuka ipasoi.
Proverbs23:1 Arai kiboikin aimor nepepe kalokapolon, Koomoom noi loejai kakonyenekon;"
Proverbs23:2 Kibwaik ekileŋ ologorotokon Arai irai ijo etuŋanan lokerana.
Proverbs23:3 Sirikinobel lukajijimakake; Naarai kes inyamat lukaimod.
Proverbs23:4 Siritaaritoi adumun abar; Kopalu acoakon ŋin.
Proverbs23:5 Igipakinit cabo akonikonyen ibore yenemamei? Naarai abeit esubuni abar abebenoka, Kwape emorukaalet loeporori kuiu noi."
Proverbs23:6 Sirinyamenenei inyamat luka ŋol kaloibitiono, Karaida aiŋobel lukaiiiimakake:"
Proverbs23:7 Naarai kwape eomitor ŋesi kotomake, ikoni nen: Kiitema ŋesi jo ebe, “Konyam, komat”; Konye etauke mam ejaas nepepe kajo."
Proverbs23:8 Ilekari aoduneta nuinyama, Kosodi atwaniar akirokon nuejok."
Proverbs23:9 Sirinera kopupi ebaŋ; Naarai emeni ŋesi acoa naka akonikiro,"
Proverbs23:10 Sirikiiul aanyunet naka eikor losek, Karaida alomar omanikoria luka luemameete lukapapakec:"
Proverbs23:11 Naarai egogoŋ Ekalakunanikee; Epurokini ŋesi kes aluikin jo.
Proverbs23:12 Kibwaik ekonitau toma aisisianakinio, Akiikon da akiro nuka aijen."
Proverbs23:13 Sirikitikok ikoku apueunio; Arai kileco nes kebela mam etwani.
Proverbs23:14 Koleco ŋes kebela, Koyu aijarake kokatwak."
Proverbs23:15 Okokuka, arai keeou etaukon, Iyalamikini ekatau, loka ba:"
Proverbs23:16 Eebo, elelete ikaneretenya, Arai inera akoniituk nukajokak."
Proverbs23:17 Kinyek ekonitau aikokoteikin ikadiakanarak: Konye koiaenena kayoŋ it EJAKAIT aitiwar akwap.
Proverbs23:18 Naarai abeit ejai eropit; Mam etwaniari amunonutukon.
Proverbs23:19 Kiira ijo, okokuka, kocou, Kiteteni ekonitau korot."
Proverbs23:20 Siriiaananas kanul kaluemeranakinos; Kaŋul da luisinyooko ainyam akiriŋ:
Proverbs23:21 Naarai edolokini ailwaritoi ekameran ka loisinyoono: Ailuranar da itanapi etuŋanan inyilinyilia.
Proverbs23:22 Kiiranari papakon lokiwuriei, Ido sirimwanenenei totokon kemoioŋ."
Proverbs23:23 Kogwel abeit, sirigwelanari; Eebo, kogwel acoa, ka aituutoorio, ka ajenun da."
Proverbs23:24 Iyalamikini noi papa loka ekadoliton: Ŋol da loeuriei ikoku yenikacoa isiyalamikini ŋes.
Proverbs23:25 Kiyalamikinos papakon ka totokon, Kolele ŋin nakiwuriei joo"
Proverbs23:26 Okokuka, ae ekonitau, Kisiyalamikis akonikonye ikarotin."
Proverbs23:27 Naarai erai naadote asoogot naidul: Erai da aberu nakerimon aipany naedidin,"
Proverbs23:28 Eebo, eperuni bala ekerurwon, Iyatakini luebilete ibotei kotuna."
Proverbs23:29 Iŋai bo eburunit? Iŋai bo eanyunit ican? Iŋai bo ejai aŋolopa? Iŋai bo enuuriani? Iŋai bo ejaas amusuŋun nuutai? Iŋai bo da iterenit akonye?
Proverbs23:30 Kes nul luinoosikinos toma aion: Kes nul luelosete airi ajon nuinyalinyala.
Proverbs23:31 Siriseseni ajon nueupapanata, Kitodias aputokec kotoma adere, Naijililiarotor."
Proverbs23:32 Kokau kitodete bala emun, Kiswalarete bala emusaga."
Proverbs23:33 Eanyunete akonikonye nuilocokino, Ineranakin ekonitau da epali."
Proverbs23:34 Eebo, isubi bala ŋin yeneperi kataro, Arai yeneperi kokuju opir loka ataker."
Proverbs23:35 Inera ijo kwana ebe, “Kebuŋai, komam arieba: Kenomonomoi, komam ajeni: Akwenyuni wori? Kerii bobo kes.”"
Proverbs24:1 Sirikikokotik ituŋa lukaronok, Karaida aiŋobel ajaun kakes."
Proverbs24:2 Naarai inerunete ikecetauon emwaŋit, Inerasi akeceituke da nukameneranut,"
Proverbs24:3 Edukio etogo kacoa; Itieasio da kajenun.
Proverbs24:4 Aijen da isilelebi agolaike, Kabara kere naka akais nuipu ka naisiyalamikinit."
Proverbs24:5 Egogoŋ etuŋanan lokacoa; Eebo, iyatanakini etuŋanan lokaijen apedor."
Proverbs24:6 Naarai ijii ekonijie kaiŋarenikinio nakaeoa: Kaipues da naka ikenerunak ejai ainapakin.
Proverbs24:7 Ikiara acoa mam ebaŋ edolokini: Mam ewooni akeituk korute.
Proverbs24:8 Loepeleikini aswam aronis Emaikinete ituŋa emenerana.
Proverbs24:9 Awomisioit nakabaŋaanut ŋes aronis: Ekamwanan da ŋes loketal neeiaas ituŋa,"
Proverbs24:10 Arai kiilor kapaaran naka ican, Edit akonigogoŋ."
Proverbs24:11 Koyuununei nul lueyanaario atwanare, Kitikok da ŋul luirianaros aario."
Proverbs24:12 Arai kitemari ebe, “Koany, mani kiienunit ŋin,” Ŋol loitemi itauon mam kereka eomoomoi? Ŋol loerici aiiar, mam ejeŋi? Mam da etacakini nolitunanan kwape ejaar akeswam?"
Proverbs24:13 Okokuka, konyamenenei esik loka ao, naarai ejok; Akekape da, nueiiiimikinete akonianyigol."
Proverbs24:14 Kojenu da kwaŋin acoa kotoma otaukon: Arai kidum ŋes, ejaun eropit, Mam etwaniari da amunokon."
Proverbs24:15 Ijo etuŋanan lokaronon, sirikiperu etogo loka ekadoliton; Sirikinat akeibois naiyenununa."
Proverbs24:16 Naarai ibironori etuŋanan lokadoliton aatenak akanykaarei, enyoununei da: Konye elatarete ican lukaronok."
Proverbs24:17 Sirikibwonak Iokasurupikon naibiroror, Kinyek ekonitau aiyalamikin naelatakinere ŋes kwap:"
Proverbs24:18 Kinyek EJAKAIT aanyun, kosodi akadakin, Kibelok akenyunyura anyoun kamaken."
Proverbs24:19 Sirikiyaloŋoŋ kanuka luiswamaete aronis; Sirikikokotik lukaronok:
Proverbs24:20 Naarai mam ekaronon edumuni eropit; Itudenio atala naka ekaronon.
Proverbs24:21 Okokuka, koyoŋenenei EJAKAIT ka ekabaka: Ido siriupananas kanul kaluekotosi ailoconokin:"
Proverbs24:22 Naarai itiunete epolakee; Iŋai bo da ejeŋi amudiariokec?
Proverbs24:23 Nu da nuka lukacoa. Mam ejok atiakit ituŋa kotube.
Proverbs24:24 Ŋol loetemari lokaronon atiar, “Idolit ijo”; Ikenete nes ituŋa, elaete ŋes atekerin."
Proverbs24:25 Konye iyalamas ŋul luitoronete nes, Edolokini da kes arereŋ naejok,"
Proverbs24:26 Aituk naebonokini ejok ŋes enui.
Proverbs24:27 Kitemonok akoniswam kokina, Kitemok ekonimanikor; Kosodi konyet aiduk ekonitogo,"
Proverbs24:28 Sirikiraun ekajenan aluikin eidunyetekon komam akirot; Ido sirikiŋala kaitukukon.
Proverbs24:29 Sirikitema ebe, “Eswamakini ŋes kwape keswamakinia eoŋ; Atacakini ŋes kwape ajaar akeswam.”"
Proverbs24:30 Abu keriria emanikor loka loelonwana, Emanikor da loka emusabibu loka nol kaloemamei aijen;"
Proverbs24:31 Ido koany, ebwanunito ikukwa kere, Iswapito ikodokodo, Etiyaara arwatatake nakamor."
Proverbs24:32 Kasodi aanyun, kaomoom noi jokan: Kaany, ketuutoor."
Proverbs24:33 “Ajo nuikidioko, ailuranar naedit, Ailokony akanin nepetai arior ajotoor”:"
Proverbs24:34 Kwaŋin kibunokini jo ailwaritoi kwape ekerurwon; Ka eipudikon da kwape etuŋanan loekapit ebuku.
Proverbs25:1 Eraas nupe nu da awaragasia nuka Solomon, ituŋa luka Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda."
Proverbs25:2 Aibuses naka Edeke nes aimunon akiro: Konye aibuses naka ikabakan ŋes aiŋic akiro.
Proverbs25:3 Akui kwape elwaniar kokuju, akwap da kwape idulor kokwap, Kwaŋin ŋes emam eŋicunere itauon luka ikabakan,"
Proverbs25:4 Kolema elele kopuesa, Kosodi ejaunete ekatatan kaloitemokinio ati bo."
Proverbs25:5 Kolema ikaronok kakonyen nuka ekabaka, Kosodi iketakin eicoloŋoke loka ajakanut kadolit."
Proverbs25:6 Siriwomiara kakonyen nuka ekabaka, Karaida aibwo kaibois naka lukapolok:"
Proverbs25:7 Naarai ejok alimokinio ebe, “Kikuny ne”; Itia aitisilio kakonyen nuka ekapolon. Nuaanyutu akonikonye,"
Proverbs25:8 Sirikisunya alosit aitepeg; Kinyeis aolikin nuiswamai kokau, Nakisurumia ekoniidunyet jo ileic."
Proverbs25:9 Kopur akonikirot kekoniidunyet elopet, Kwabo sirikitejen nukaiyeiyea nuka ecetuŋanan:"
Proverbs25:10 Kinye loepupuni aimoro jo, Komam enaŋete iemutokon lueroko."
Proverbs25:11 Akirot naibeeokino inerai Esubit bala araito nuka esabu kotoma obukito luka epuesa.
Proverbs25:12 Kwape etet loka esabu ka yenisirir yenika esabu loejok, Ikoni nen loitoroni akit naerimari."
Proverbs25:13 Kwape alilim naka akaka kapak naka aisak, Ikoni nen ekiyakia lomunot kaneeiaas luiiukarete, Naarai iteteuni itauon luka ikapolokitokoke."
Proverbs25:14 Kwape idouon ka ekwam kemamuun akiru, Ikoni nen ŋol loilabilabi kanuka ainakinetake numam cinakinit."
Proverbs25:15 Toma atitiŋikin noi ŋes iiodiiodio lokapolon, Aŋajep da naenonok ebili akoit."
Proverbs25:16 Arai idum esik loka ao, konyam lokidaunit; Kinyek ainyam noi kosodi ailek."
Proverbs25:17 Kocicin akonikeju kotogo loka eidunyetekon, Kinyek ŋesi apianikin jo, kosodi aila."
Proverbs25:18 Etuŋanan loesabanakini ekeidunyet Erai anyul, ka ekileŋ, ka ekojo loeiit."
Proverbs25:19 Amunokin etuŋanan lomere lomunot kapak naka iean, Esubit bala ekelai loipirit arai akeju naenabuikino,"
Proverbs25:20 Kwape etuŋanan loelaeari inapeneke kapak naka aaterot. Ido kwape ebino loedwar toma osoda, Ikoni nen loeyeikini ikososio loekadakinit etau."
Proverbs25:21 Arai kerieb lokasurupikon eteŋei, kijaiki inyamat; Arai kejak akure koinak ŋes akipi komat:"
Proverbs25:22 Naarai inokokini akim naka atotole akouke, Ido kiinakini EJAKAIT eropitikon."
Proverbs25:23 Eyaŋauni ekwam loka agolitomei akiru: Aŋajep da nakedeideon eyaŋauni kwaŋin akonyen nukanyunyura.
Proverbs25:24 Eiok aiboi kagor nakokuju togo, Itia aiboi kaberu naeŋolopana kotogo loelal."
Proverbs25:25 Kwape akipi nukalilimok nuearete akure, Ejaas kwaŋin akiro nuejok nuepote kakwap naelwana."
Proverbs25:26 Kwape atan naipuruiauna, ka akoŋu naka akipi naemunauna, Ikoni nen etuŋanan loedolit loeremorete lukaronok."
Proverbs25:27 Mam ejok ainyam esik lokao loepol: Kwaŋin arai emoete ituŋa aibusesukec, mam erai aibuses."
Proverbs25:28 Etuŋanan lomam eyait ekemoyo. Esubit bala ere loetiyatiyauna loemamei arwatat.
Proverbs26:1 Kwape akaka kapak naka akamu, ka akiru da kotoma aisak, Kwaŋin mam aibuses ibusakinit ebaŋ,"
Proverbs26:2 Kwape inyiporit kairimike, kwape iporoidoliat kaporitoike, Kwaŋin mam ekenit lotaai ecamuni."
Proverbs26:3 Edaset kanuka ebalasit, amuny kanuka asigiria, Ka ebela da kanuka epura loka ebaŋ,"
Proverbs26:4 Mam iboŋokini ebaŋ kwape ejaar akebanaanut, Kinyek ijo da aputoor nes."
Proverbs26:5 Koboŋok ebaŋ kwape ejaar akebanaanut, Kinyek araun lokaeoa kotoma aomoomoke."
Proverbs26:6 Ŋol loiyakiari akirot kakan naka ebaŋ, Ejepi akekeie, emasi akaje."
Proverbs26:7 Kwape akeje nuka loieodo, nuileiekekas; Ikoni nen awaragan kaituke nuka ibaŋiok."
Proverbs26:8 Kwape loeenikini alieait toma aporocet, Ikoni nen ŋol loeinakini ebaŋ aibuses."
Proverbs26:9 Kwape ekukwai loieumi akan naka ekameran, Ikoni nen awaragan kaituke nuka ibaŋiok,"
Proverbs26:10 Kwape imusunia ekaguman ŋinituŋanan kere, Ikoni nen loisiwotei ebaŋ ka loisiwotei luitorete kere."
Proverbs26:11 K wape ekiŋok Ioebonori toma alekanake, Ikoni nen ebaŋ loinyogonokini akebanaanut."
Proverbs26:12 Iany kereka ijo etuŋanan loeomikina ebe erai lokacoa? Ipedori amunokin ebaŋ aitelekarit ŋes.
Proverbs26:13 Ebala loelonwana ebe, “Ejai eŋatuny kiŋal Ejai eŋatuny orot.”"
Proverbs26:14 Kwape ibelonokinor ekirigi kotoma aenetake, Ibelonokini kwaŋin loelonwana kaperitike."
Proverbs26:15 Idomakini loelogwana akanike atuba, Isilolonyi ainyakun bobo aitukuke,"
Proverbs26:16 Eomikina loelonwana araut lokaeoa, Aitelekarit iruna ikanykaarei luepedorete aboŋokin kacobeu."
Proverbs26:17 Loitorit kosodi aiilokin opeget lomere loke, Esubit bala etuŋanan loitiŋi ekiŋok kaki."
Proverbs26:18 Kwape lokikerep loecakari akalasia, Imalia ka atwanare;"
Proverbs26:19 Ikoni nen etuŋanan loinalai ekeidunyet, Kobala ebe, “Mere emocet bon?”"
Proverbs26:20 Edunei akim arai emameete akito: Epalunio epeget arai emamei ekerupean,"
Proverbs26:21 Kwape akuk toma atotol nuesaranete, ka akito toma akim; Ikoni nen etuŋanan Ioenolopana isinepuni epeget."
Proverbs26:22 Akiro nuka ekerupean esubito bala edia loejijim, Elomarete toma atutubeta nukotoma nuka akoik."
Proverbs26:23 Aituk naimaimai, etau da lokaronon, Esubito bala amoti naka’ elupe nailadatai kelele loka epuesa,"
Proverbs26:24 Loelait emodi kaitukuke, Konye inadaklnit aiŋal tomake."
Proverbs26:25 Nainerar nukasianut sirikiyuu; Naarai kotoma otauke ejaas nuketal akanykaarei.
Proverbs26:26 Karaida erapari elaitike kapirianut, Konye itodunio atonisike kakonyen nuka ekodet"
Proverbs26:27 ŋol loeboki aipany ibirokini nen: ŋol da loikokoriori amoru, eboŋuni mamake."
Proverbs26:28 Aŋajep nakegalan elai ŋul luereit; Aituk da naemai iswamai amudiario.
Proverbs27:1 Sirikilabilab nuka moi: Naarai mam iieni nunyoika nueyagauni apaaran.
Proverbs27:2 Kitur ecetuŋanan jo, mere akoniituk alopet; Ice, mere anaiepekon alopet."
Proverbs27:3 Elagiri amoru, eposik da asiŋe; Konye anyunyura naka ebaŋ itelekarit kere alaŋir."
Proverbs27:4 Ededeŋ aisiop, elelei da anyunyura; Konye iŋai ca epedori aibwo kaneejai ekokote?"
Proverbs27:5 Eiok aitoronio naekaŋaikinio Itia amin naibwaitai.
Proverbs27:6 Numunon amusuŋun nuka epapero: Konye anueta nuka lukasurup ipu noi.
Proverbs27:7 Etuŋanan loimonikini cut inyaikin akapet nakao: Konye etuŋanan loeriebi eteŋei ejijimikinit ŋinibore kere yenedwar,"
Proverbs27:8 Kwape ikweny yenirimi anyoun kakaike, Ikoni nen etuŋanan loirimi anyoun kaiboisike."
Proverbs27:9 Isiyalmikini akinyet ka lueuru maa etau: Isiyalamikinit kwaŋin aiiiim naka epapero Ioka etuŋanan kainerun nakotauke.
Proverbs27:10 Sirikijal epaperokon, ka epapero loka papakon; Sirikilot togo loka onacekon kapak naka iloukon: Ejok eidunyet loeapie itia onacekon loelwana."
Proverbs27:11 Okokuka, kocou, kisiyalamik ekatau, Kasodi aboŋokini ŋol lokamori."
Proverbs27:12 Eanyuni etuŋanan loecobe aronis, kosodi aiŋop: Konye itorete Iuiimat nen, iticanio,"
Proverbs27:13 Kolema anapito naka ŋol kaloebwoari elonwau; Korau ŋesi aititiŋet loebwoari nakerimon.
Proverbs27:14 Loilipakini ekepapero arereŋ keporoto loepol, edilokini anyoun tupuruc sek, Imario bala ekenit neejai,"
Proverbs27:15 Aiit nadue kapaaran naetepia akiru naepol, Eputokinos kaberu naenolopana."
Proverbs27:16 Loekoto aitikokin ŋes, itikokini ekwam, Arai aibun akinyet kakekan nakoteten,"
Proverbs27:17 Asuat ipeni asuat; Etuŋanan da ipeni kwaŋin akonyen nuka epaperoke.
Proverbs27:18 Ŋol loekorienenei etini enyamenenei araitoke, ŋol da loijaanakini ejakaitike edakakinio aibuses."
Proverbs27:19 Kwape esesenatar akonyen kakonyen kotoma akipi, Kwape kwaŋin esesenatar etau loka etuŋanan ketunanan."
Proverbs27:20 Mam Okatwak ka Amudiario imonianakinos; Akonye da nuka etuŋanan mam imonianakinos.
Proverbs27:21 Amot ŋes ililiaunere epuesa, eupa da esabu, Itemio etuŋanan da kotoma aiturioke."
Proverbs27:22 Karaida kicur ebaŋ kokisu karukit nepepe kalos, Mam akebanaanut enyouni kamaken,"
Proverbs27:23 Kokukuranar ijo aijen isipaninikon luka amerekekin kwape ejaatar, Konicenenei noi isipaninikon luka aituk,"
Proverbs27:24 Naarai abar mam erai nakapaarasia kere; Ido ejaenena kereka aboko aitodol aturio kere?
Proverbs27:25 Enerario anya, etakanuni do amel, Etukokinio da ikui luka ironan."
Proverbs27:26 Kitudumikinete idwe luka amerekekin iunapanakon, Akinei da kes akais nuka imanikoria:"
Proverbs27:27 Ejaunos akile nuka akinei nukidaunete aitanyam jo, ka aitanyam da lukokalekon; Ka nuitania apesurukon."
Proverbs28:1 Ekerete lukaronok komamei etuŋanan loetupakini: Konye ikadolitok etitinikinete kwape kenatuny,"
Proverbs28:2 Kanuka aidiak naka akwap ipuakaros ikapolokoke: Konye kanuka ituŋa luejai acobeu ka aijen iyatakini apolouke ajaenena,"
Proverbs28:3 Loilwaritoi loeroikini lukican Esubit bala akiru naekusi naegiriari inyamat kere,"
Proverbs28:4 Luejalete ikisila ituritos lukaronok: Konye nul luerieete ikisila itonolopete kes.
Proverbs28:5 Ituŋa lukaronok mam ejenunete etube: Konye ŋul luemoete EJAKAIT ejenunete akiro kere,"
Proverbs28:6 Ejok lokican loelosenenei kabeiteke Itia ekabaran loemagul korotinike.
Proverbs28:7 Ŋol loerici ikisila erai ikoku yenikacoa: Konye ŋol loipaperikinos kituna luiranaka isurumi papake ileic.
Proverbs28:8 Loiyatakini iboroke kanuka luimedauna ka luiyatakina Etukonokini ŋesi ŋol loitimi lukican.
Proverbs28:9 Loibelokini akitike kinyek apupun ikisila, Ailipike da erai naketal."
Proverbs28:10 Loitapaari luitenara orot loerono, Ibirokini ŋesi elopet toma aipanyike, Konye iuedoliorito irumete ajokis."
Proverbs28:11 Eomikina loepalal akanin araut lokaeoa; Konye lokican loejai aijen emisiikini ŋes,"
Proverbs28:12 Naipikoriata ikadolitok, ejai aibuses naepol: Konye naenyounioto lukaronok, eŋopete ituŋa."
Proverbs28:13 Loibwai aibucaretake mam ekerianari: Konye ŋol loelimori kosodi aisac edumuni aitimio,"
Proverbs28:14 ŋol loeyoŋit elakara apaarasia kere: Konye ŋol loitinikiki eketau ibirokini aronis.
Proverbs28:15 Kwape eŋatuny loegat, ka adubu nairimi; Ikoni nen ekapolon lokaronon loeyait ituŋa lukican."
Proverbs28:16 Ido ekapolon loemamei aijen ejai noi kaimwan; Konye ŋol loelait airananut ebusi apaarasia nuipu.
Proverbs28:17 Etuŋanan loigugunatoi kaokot nuka etuŋanan eee kere, Ekereari toma aipany; emamei ediotuŋanan loitikuni."
Proverbs28:18 Eyuunio ŋol loelosenenei itenara: Konye ibirori atipet lokirotin lumagul.
Proverbs28:19 Loekoriei alupoke edumuni inyamat luipu: Konye ŋol loerupari aamameak edumuni ailwaritoi naepol.
Proverbs28:20 Ipuakaros arereŋesio kaneejai etuŋanan lomunot: Konye loisunyakini aibar mam eswaki aiticanio.
Proverbs28:21 Mam ejok atiakit kotuna: Karaida etuŋanan aibucar kanuka idisinyamat.
Proverbs28:22 Loibitiono isunyakini aibar, Kwabo mam ejeŋi needolokinio ŋes ailwaritoi."
Proverbs28:23 Loitoroni etuŋanan eminunio kokau, Aitelekarit ŋol loemai kanaiep."
Proverbs28:24 Loenasi papake arai totoke, kobala ebe, “Mam ŋin erono”; Ŋope ŋol ŋes epadie loka ekamudiaran,"
Proverbs28:25 Loketau loiranana isidiki aŋolopa: Konye loemunokina EJAKAIT itutumio ŋes,"
Proverbs28:26 Loemunokina etauke bon ebanaana: Konye loelosenenei kacoa eyuunio.
Proverbs28:27 Loekori mama ejaas lukican mam etwaniari ibore: Konye loitumudak akekonye edumuni ikenito luipu.
Proverbs28:28 Naenyounioto ikaronok, eŋopete Ituŋa: Konye naeolioroto, iyatakinos ikadolitok."
Proverbs29:1 Etuŋanan loitinikiki ekemurisin arai itoronio aatenak nuipu, Itiuni abilio komam eŋaleuni."
Proverbs29:2 Naiyatanakinotor ikadolitok iyalamasi ituŋa, Konye arai eyait etuŋanan lokaronon idinyasi ituŋa."
Proverbs29:3 Ŋol loekoto acoa isiyalamikinit papake, ŋol loiboiete kanudotia icanicani ikeboro."
Proverbs29:4 Iticasi ekabaka akwap kanuka etube: Konye loitelemi ainakineta emunauni akwap,"
Proverbs29:5 Etuŋanan loemai ekeidunyet Elokikin eboi akejeke.
Proverbs29:6 Aibucar naka etuŋanan loerono ejai eic Konye eyei ekadoliton elakara da.
Proverbs29:7 Ejeŋi ekadoliton akiro nuka lukican: Konye emamei lokaronon aijen ajenun nun.
Proverbs29:8 Ituŋa lukamwanak ipurujaete ere: Konye lukacoa isibelokinete anyunyura,"
Proverbs29:9 Arai epegasi lokaeoa keban, Enyunyurikini ekieniei, emamei da aiyeŋun,"
Proverbs29:10 Elaete ikaarak ŋol loedoliorit: Emoete da aijar naka loitenara.
Proverbs29:11 Ebukuni ebaŋ akenyunyura kere: Konye etiki lokaeoa isiyamikini.
Proverbs29:12 Arai epupi ekayaiton nukaiŋalanut, Eraunos ikekejaanakinak kere lueroko."
Proverbs29:13 Iriamanakinos lokican ka lokamwanan Itacauni EJAKAIT akecekonye kere.
Proverbs29:14 Ekabaka loetubokini lukican kamunonut, Iticasio ekeicoloŋ loka ajakanut apaarasia kere."
Proverbs29:15 Ebela ka aitoronio eyaŋaunete acoa: Konye ikoku yenijalijalakinoi isurumi totoke ileic,"
Proverbs29:16 Arai kiyatakinos lukaronok, iyatanakinos aibucareta da: Konye esesenete ikadolitok aibirorikec."
Proverbs29:17 Kituuto ikonikoku, kiinakin aiyeŋun, Eebo, isiyalamikin aijarakon."
Proverbs29:18 Neemamear aitapoet, ecakarete ituŋa aitikokinio: Konye isirereŋitoi loericit ikisila."
Proverbs29:19 Mam ebulesit ituutoor kakiro bon: Naarai karaida kejeni, mam ibwaikinit etau,"
Proverbs29:20 Iany kereka ijo etuŋanan loisunyit akekiro? Epedorio amunokin ebaŋ aitelekarit ŋes.
Proverbs29:21 Ŋol loitani ekebulesit kaisijemikinit ameuni keiditeuke, Kokau edumuni araut okokuke."
Proverbs29:22 Etuŋanan lokanyunyura isidiki aŋolopa, Ipuakaros da aibucanareta nuka etuŋanan loisiopana."
Proverbs29:23 Itisili etuŋanan aomiarake: Konye loejaas ketau loitasono edumuni aibuses.
Proverbs29:24 Ŋol loimorikikinos kekokolan elai aijarake elopet, Epupuni aiyapoikinio komamunos oobo nuinera."
Proverbs29:25 Aiyoŋ ituŋa eyaŋauni eic, Konye loemunokina EJAKAIT ejaas kainapakin."
Proverbs29:26 Emoete luipu asianut naka ekayaiton: Konye atubokinio naka erunanan ebuni kama ejai EJAKAIT.
Proverbs29:27 Etuŋanan lomam edolit erai loketale neejaas lukadolitok: ŋol da loitenara korot erai loketale neejaas lukaronok.
Proverbs30:1 Akiro nuka Agur okoku loka Yake; abwokon. Elimokini etuŋanan Itiel, Itiel ka Ukal ebe,"
Proverbs30:2 Abeit arai kwape etiaŋ aitelekarir ituŋa kere, Ido amamei kaijen naka etuŋanan."
Proverbs30:3 Mam esisiat acoa, Amamei da aijen naka Lokalaunan."
Proverbs30:4 Iŋai bo abu kodoka toma akuj kodoku da? Iŋai bo abu kotukonok ikwamin kakanike? Iŋai bo abu koen akipi konapeneke? Iŋai bo abu kiticat isaŋeta kere luka akwap? Iŋai ekekiror, iŋai da ekiror loka okokuke, arai ijeni?"
Proverbs30:5 Igimorio ŋinikirot naka Edeke: Erai ŋesi ebuku neejaas ŋul luemunokina ŋes.
Proverbs30:6 Siriyatanakini akekiro, Kinyek ŋesi aitoron jo, kosodi jo araun lokeŋalan."
Proverbs30:7 Elipit jo akiro aarei: Sirikiimik eoŋ eriŋa etwana:
Proverbs30:8 Kolema nukamameak ka nukainal kisukunya kaneejai: Sirikiinak iean karaida abar; Kitanyamai inyamat lukebusakinito:
Proverbs30:9 Kenyek aimonikin, kaner jo, kabala ebe, “Iŋai bo EJAKAIT?” Arai bo kenyek araut Iokican, kasodi akoko, Keiner erono ekiror loka Ekadeke."
Proverbs30:10 Sirikisabanak ebulesit kaneejai ejakaitike, Kinyek aiken jo, jo da igwauni akirot,"
Proverbs30:11 Ejaas ituŋa luikenete lukapapakec, Lumam ilipanakinete nukatotokec arereŋ,"
Proverbs30:12 Ejaas ituŋa lueomitos bonik araut luesegara, Kwabo mam ilonara amodokokokee."
Proverbs30:13 Ejaas iruna, eomiara ca ma akeeekonyen! Ibekereras da akeeebukio!"
Proverbs30:14 Ejaas ituŋa luesubito ikelakec bala ikileŋa, Itirikadakee da bala ikileŋa, Luenyamete lukican adaun kakwap, Ka luilwaritos da kotuna."
Proverbs30:15 Ejaas ediket apesur aarei, Nuikeseunete ebe, “Ae, ae.” Ejaas da iboro iuni lumam imonikinos apaarasia kere, Eebo, iwonon lumam eut ebalas ebe, “Kinye kwaŋin.”"
Proverbs30:16 Okatwak; ka akoik narakan; Ka akwap namam imonikin akipi, Ka akim da namam eut ebala ebe, “Kinye kwaŋin.”"
Proverbs30:17 Akoŋu naisekeli papake, Naemeni arimar totoke; Egorunete ikuruka luka aditot, Enyamete da idwe luka atarukon."
Proverbs30:18 Ejaas akiro auni nukaumokin nukekarunitos eoŋ, Eebo, aoŋon numam ajeni:"
Proverbs30:19 Erot loka emorukaalet kotoma apak; Erot loka emun kotoma atiiba; Erot loka ataker kotoma aŋolol: Erot da loka etuŋanan kapese.
Proverbs30:20 Ikoni nen erot loka aberu naadote; Enyami, kosodi aimwat akeituk, Ebala ebe, “Mam aronis naeswamat.”"
Proverbs30:21 Emarani akwap kanuka akiro auni, Eebo, aoŋon, numam epedori atitiŋikin,"
Proverbs30:22 Ebulesit keraun ekabaka, Ebaŋ kimonikin inyamat;"
Proverbs30:23 Aberu naelaitai kedukokin; Ka abulesit da nairumi aibois naka tataake.
Proverbs30:24 Ejaas iboro iwonon luedisiak kakwap, Konye ejaas kacoa naepol noi."
Proverbs30:25 Imukunyo kes ituŋa luemamei agogoŋ, Konye idiasete ikecenyamat kiporo;"
Proverbs30:26 Ipooi kes ituŋa luekalanyaka, Konye edukete ikaisikec omor;"
Proverbs30:27 Emaase emamei ekabaka, Konye inosit kirioneta,"
Proverbs30:28 Aililian, itlnio kakanin, Konye iboie kotogoi luka ikabakan,"
Proverbs30:29 Ejaas iboro iuni luesaara itorete, Eebo, iwonon luesaara elosete:"
Proverbs30:30 Eŋatuny, loitelekarit itiaŋ kere kagogon, Kwabo mam ibelokini cut kama kakere,"
Proverbs30:31 Ekiŋok loeriim egur; ekoroi da; Ka ekabaka lomam enyoonokinio.
Proverbs30:32 Arai iswamat nukabanaanut kodakanar bon, Arai iwomoomot nueroko, Kibwaanakin akan aitukukon,"
Proverbs30:33 Naarai aibuk akile ŋes elomunia akinyet, Aicikakin ekume ŋes elomuniata aokot: Aicikakin da anyunyura ŋes elomunia aŋolopa."
Proverbs31:1 Akiro nuka ekabaka Lemuel: abwokon naesisianakini totoke,"
Proverbs31:2 Anyoika tope, okokuka? Anyoika okoku loka akoikika? Anyoika da, ijo okoku loka aiyaposioka?"
Proverbs31:3 Sirikiinak aŋor akonigogoŋ, Karaida ikonirotin neeiaas nun nuemudianarete ikabakan,"
Proverbs31:4 Mere nuka ikabakan, ijo Lemuel, mere nuka ikabakan aimat ebino; Karaida ikapolok einer atiar, “Ai bo eia nuitemerete?”"
Proverbs31:5 Kinyeis aimat, kosodete ikisila aimurwokin, Kosodete aibelokin etube loka etuŋanan kere loiticanio,"
Proverbs31:6 Koinanakinete nuitemerete ŋol loeapikinit aolior, Ebino da lueriebasi kotauon:"
Proverbs31:7 Komata, kimurwokis icanikec, Kinyeis akiitun bobo aburunikec."
Proverbs31:8 Koon akoniituk kanuka ebaŋ, Kirabak nul kere luasilikis,"
Proverbs31:9 Kooŋ akoniituk, kotub kotenan, Kotubonokinenei lukican ka luilwaritos."
Proverbs31:10 Aberu naejok, iŋai epedori adumun? Naarai itelekarit noi etiaike amor nukarenak nuka akais."
Proverbs31:11 Emunokina etau loka okilenike ŋes, Kwabo mam etwaniari ameda."
Proverbs31:12 Iswamanakini nes nuejok, kwabo mere nueroko Apaarasia kere nuka aijarake."
Proverbs31:13 Emoi ŋesi ajulo ka abirai, Iswamai kakukuranut kakaninike."
Proverbs31:14 Eputosi kameerin nukagwelanar, Eyaŋaununei ikenyamat kama elwana."
Proverbs31:15 Edilokini anyoun eriŋa akwap iwalara, Einakini lukokaleke lunyaman, Ekorakini apesuruke akeeeswamisio."
Proverbs31:16 Irerei emanikor, kosodi agwel: Araito nuka akaninike ŋes iraia emanikor loka emusabibu."
Proverbs31:17 Eeni ŋesi anabetake kagogon, Itogogoŋi akaninike."
Proverbs31:18 Eanyuni ebe luegwelanari einunete ameda: Mam edunei aketala kuare.
Proverbs31:19 Ibwaikini akekanin akitoi napopiret, Itinito akekanin akitoi nawoiis eusi."
Proverbs31:20 Igagaunit lukican kakekanin, Eebo, eriori akekanin neejaas luilwaritos."
Proverbs31:21 Mam ekurianar ŋesi aaterot kanuka lukokaleke, Naarai enapito lukokaleke kere inapen lukarenak."
Proverbs31:22 Iswamanakini aimuketa; Enapenenei ebaputa loejok ka lumugeik.
Proverbs31:23 Ejenunio okilenike korutei, Iboienenei kanen kama ejaas lukapolok luka akwap."
Proverbs31:24 Esonyununei inapen luka ebaputa kogwelanari, Ŋaikini da ikagwelanarak ausio nukanabes."
Proverbs31:25 Inapeneke kes aibuses ka aiyoŋ; Ekieniei apaarasia nuepote,"
Proverbs31:26 Eooŋi akeituk kacoa; Aisisianakin nakasianut eiaenena anaiepeke.
Proverbs31:27 Ericit noi iponesio lukokaleke, Ido mam enyami inyamat lukalonwanut"
Proverbs31:28 Enyounete ikedwe enyaraete nakarereŋ: Okilenike da, ituri ŋes atiar;"
Proverbs31:29 “Eswamata aŋor nuipu nuejok, Konye ca ijo nes itelekarit kere.”"
Proverbs31:30 Eisupane iŋalai, atemelel da erai alon: Konye aberu naeyonit EJAKAIT itureneneo."
Proverbs31:31 Koinak ŋes araito nuka akaninike; Iturenenete da aswamisioke ŋes korutei.
Ecclesiastes1:1 Akiro nuka Ekalimonokinan, okoku loka Daudi, ekabaka kotoma Yerusalem."
Ecclesiastes1:2 Inera Ekalimonokinan ebe, Aamameak nuka aamameak; aamameak nuka aamameak, kere eraas aamameak."
Ecclesiastes1:3 Anyoin ameda naedumuni etuŋanan kaitaaritoike kere naetaaritor kokwap kakoloŋ?
Ecclesiastes1:4 Elosi atur, ebuni da atur ace; Konye iboienenei akwap ikar kere,"
Ecclesiastes1:5 Elomuni akoloŋ, elomari da akoloŋ, Iwonyari alosit aiboisike neelomunia."
Ecclesiastes1:6 Elosi ekwam ari naka eŋalakimak, Kosodi aibelokin agolitomei; Ibelonokini ducudue kalositoke, Eboŋori bobo toma airimorike."
Ecclesiastes1:7 Eleleete icorin kere toma aŋolol, Konye mam aŋolol ilelebun; Aibois naelosenenete icorin, Nepenen da elosenenete bobo."
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ileleba iboro kere aipas; Mam epedori etuŋanan alimun: Mam akoŋu imonikin asesen, Akit da mam eupi akiirar."
Ecclesiastes1:9 Nukejaas apeŋo kes nueiaunos rwaru; Nukiswamao apeŋo kes nuiswamao rwaru; Emamei ibore yenikitetet kokwap kakoloŋ.
Ecclesiastes1:10 Ejai tope ibore yenebalas ituŋa ebe, “Koany, itet yen”? Keiau kolo ŋo kokaru lukigeikinete oni."
Ecclesiastes1:11 Emamei aiitunet naka ikar lukolo ŋo: Mam ejaun da aiitunet naka ikar luekotosi aponare, Kotoma kanul kaluetupanakinete."
Ecclesiastes1:12 Eoŋ Ekalimonokinan abu karai ekabaka loka Isirael kotoma Yerusalem.
Ecclesiastes1:13 Abu kebwaik ekatau amoot ka aŋicun kacoa kere nuiswamas kokwap kakuj; ŋes aitaaritoi naepol naabu Edeke kijaik odwe luka ituŋa aitaaritor.
Ecclesiastes1:14 Abu kaany aswamisio kere nuiswamas kokwap kakoloŋ; ido koany, kere eraas aamameak ka ainyam ekwam."
Ecclesiastes1:15 Yenimagul mam epedori aitetenio: Yenemamei da mam epedorio aimar.
Ecclesiastes1:16 Abu keneru kotauka, katema atiar, “Koany, adum acoa naepol adepar kere lukageikinete eoŋ ko Yerusalem: eebo, adumu ekatau acoa naepol noi ka aijen.”"
Ecclesiastes1:17 Abu kebwaik ekatau aijen acoa, aijen da ikerep, ka abaŋaanut: abu kaienu ebe eraas ŋun da ainyam ekwam."
Ecclesiastes1:18 Naarai toma acoa naepol ŋes ejai akadakin naepol: Ŋol da loiyatakini aijen iyatakini ican.
Ecclesiastes2:1 Abu katema kotauka atiar, “Aso cani, etemi kalakara; aso kiyalamikin.” Ido koany, nin da kerai aamamean."
Ecclesiastes2:2 Abu katema nuka akiena atiar, “Ikerep”: ka nuka alakara da atiar, “Ajokis anyoin?”"
Ecclesiastes2:3 Abu kamoote kotauka kwape etalakaria akakuan kebino, korina ekatau keteteni eoŋ kacoa, ka epone da loekamunia abaŋaanut, kasodi ajenun nuibusakinito odwe luka ituŋa aswam kokwap kakuj apaarasia kere nuka aijarakec."
Ecclesiastes2:4 Abu keswama aswamisio nuepolok; abu kaduk itogoi; keraa da imanikoria luka emusabibu;
Ecclesiastes2:5 abu keswama amanat ka ironyia, ido keraa ikito roma lukiponesio kere luka araito."
Ecclesiastes2:6 Abu keswama ataparin nuka akipi, aicococnenaa amagoro nakipepes ikito:"
Ecclesiastes2:7 abu kagwel ibulesin ka abulesin, kaurikis da ibulesin kotogoka; ido kajaas kabar naepol naka isipanin luka aituk ka luka imerekekin, aitelekarit nul kere lukageikinete ko Yerusalem:"
Ecclesiastes2:8 ido abu katukok epuesa ka esabu ka abar naka ŋinikwap naka ikabakan ka naka lukibukui; kadum ikayook ka akayook, ka abusian nuipu noi nuisiyalamikinete odwe luka ituŋa."
Ecclesiastes2:9 Aso karaun loapol, kadepa noi nul kere lukageikinete ko Yerusalem: koiaun akacoa keoŋ."
Ecclesiastes2:10 Nuemielas akakonye kere mam abu kemik kes: mam abu ketikok ekatau aiyalama kere, naarai abu ekatau kiyalama kanuka akaitaaritoi kere; ŋin ŋes kerai akakorakinet kotoma aitaaritoika kere."
Ecclesiastes2:11 Kasodi asesen aswamisio kere nueswamaete akakanin, ka aitaaritoi naetaaritor eoŋ aswam: ido koany, kere araas aamameak ka ainyam ekwam, amamei da ameda kokwap kakoloŋ."
Ecclesiastes2:12 Kasodi aibelokin aomoom nuka acoa, ka ikerep ka abaŋaanut: naarai ikwaikini ai etuŋanan loetupakini ekabaka? Dimarai ŋun nueswamatai sek."
Ecclesiastes2:13 Kasodi aanyun ebe acoa itelekarit abaŋaanut kajokis, kwape itelekaritor aica amuton."
Ecclesiastes2:14 Ejaas lokacoa akonye roma akouke, konye elosenenei ebaŋ kotoma amuton: kwabo amisiikini ebe edolokini adiopekirot kes kere."
Ecclesiastes2:15 Kasodi atemar kotauka ebe, “Kwape edoikinio ebaŋ, ŋes kadoikinio eoŋ da; asa ca aiokis anyoin ajaut kacoa naepol?” Kasodi atemar kotauka ebe, “Ŋun da aamameak.”"
Ecclesiastes2:16 Naarai emamei aiitunet naka lokaeoa apaarasia kere, kwape ka ebaŋ da; naarai kapaarasia nuepote koinaren kodaunitos sek aimurwokinio. Etwani cama lokacoa kwape ebanl"
Ecclesiastes2:17 Kwaŋin abukala aijar; naarai aswam naiswama kokwap kakoloŋ ketakadikinit: naarai kere eraas aamameak ka ainyam ekwam.
Ecclesiastes2:18 Abu kala aitaaritoika kere naetaaritor kokwap kakoloŋ; naarai kebusakinit ainyeinia etuŋanan lokatupakini.
Ecclesiastes2:19 Iŋai ma ejeŋi arai eraun lokaeoa arai ebaŋ? Konye irumi ŋesi aitaaritoika kere naetaaritor, naeswamat kacoa kokwap kakoloŋ. Ŋun da aamameak."
Ecclesiastes2:20 Kanuka nun kebelok aisiiurunun etauka kanuka aitaaritoi kere naetaaritor kokwap kakoloŋ.
Ecclesiastes2:21 Naarai ejaun etuŋanan loetaaritoi kacoa ka aijen ka apirianut da; konye inyekinia etuŋanan lomam etaaritoi araut akekorakinet. Ŋun da eraas aamameak ka aronis naepol.
Ecclesiastes2:22 Naarai anyoika nuedumuni etuŋanan kaitaaritoike kere, naetaaritor kokwap kakoloŋ?"
Ecclesiastes2:23 Naarai akepaarasia kere eraas ican, aitaaritoike da ŋes akadakin: eebo, kuare da mam eketau iyenuni. Ŋun da aamameak."
Ecclesiastes2:24 Emamei ibore yenitelekarit ajokis korunanan alemar ainyam ka aimat, ka alelakinit aitaaritoike. Abu kaany ŋun da, ebe epote kakan naka Edeke."
Ecclesiastes2:25 Naarai iŋai bo epedori ainyam, iŋai da epedori aiyalama adepar eoŋ?"
Ecclesiastes2:26 Naarai einakini Edeke etuŋanan loisiyalamikinit ŋes acoa, ka aijen, ka aiyalama da: konye einakini ekadiakanaran aitaaritoi, atukonokin ka aidiat, tetere einakini ŋol loisiyalamikinit Edeke. Ŋun da eraas aamameak ka ainyam ekwam."
Ecclesiastes3:1 Ejai ŋinibore ekaruke, ninikirot da naejai kwap kakuj ejai apakike."
Ecclesiastes3:2 Apak naka aurio, apak da naka atwanare; Apak naka aira, apak da naka airut ŋul lukiraio;"
Ecclesiastes3:3 Apak naka aiar, apak da naka aitaŋaleun; Apak naka aiket, apak da naka aiduk:"
Ecclesiastes3:4 Apak naka aimony akiyo, apak da naka akiena; Apak naka aibworo, apak da naka ekosio;"
Ecclesiastes3:5 Apak naka acakanar amor, apak da naka atukonokin amor; Apak naka aitun, apak da naka ainyein aitun;"
Ecclesiastes3:6 Apak naka amoot, apak da naka aitoolior; Apak naka aidar, apak da naka acakar;"
Ecclesiastes3:7 Apak naka aicil, apak da naka aidony; Apak naka aililiŋ, apak da naka einer;"
Ecclesiastes3:8 Apak naka aminanar, apak da naka alaikin; Apak naka aitiii, apak da naka ainapakin."
Ecclesiastes3:9 Anyoin ameda naedumuni etuŋanan loiswamai kanun kere nuetaaritor?
Ecclesiastes3:10 Abu kaany aitaaritoi kere naabu Edeke kijaik odwe luka ituŋa aitaaritor.
Ecclesiastes3:11 Abu ŋesi kosub ŋinibore aibecokino kapakike: ido kibwaik akwapisinei otauonokee, konye kopone lomam epedoriata ituŋa aiŋic aswam naeswamai Edeke anyoun kageunet aitodol awasia."
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ajeni ebe emamei ibore yenitelekarit ajokis kama ejaas ituŋa, alemar ailel ka aswam aiokis apaarasia kere nueiariata,"
Ecclesiastes3:13 Ido nolitunanan ainyam ka aimat ka adumun ajokis kaitaaritoike kere, ŋes ainakinet naka Edeke."
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ajeni eoŋ ebe ŋinibore kere yeniswamai Edeke ejaenena ikar kere: emamei ibore kere yenepedori aiyatakinio, karaida ainonoorio: ido es wama Edeke nun, tetere eyoŋete ituŋa ŋes,"
Ecclesiastes3:15 Nuejaas kwana keiaas apeŋo; ŋun da nuekotosi ajakut apotu kojaas sek: emoot Edeke bobo nukolo ketuboros.
Ecclesiastes3:16 Bobo da kaany kokwap kakoloŋ, aibois naka etube kojau aronis nen; aibois da naka adolit, kojau aronis nen."
Ecclesiastes3:17 Abu katema kotauka ebe, Etubokini Edeke ikadolitok ka ikaronok; naarai itemokinit apak naka ninikirot ka ŋiniswam,"
Ecclesiastes3:18 Abu katema kotauka ebe, Akiro nuka odwe luka ituŋa igimori Edeke kes tetere eanyunete ebe esubito bala Itian."
Ecclesiastes3:19 Naarai nuedoikinete odwe luka ituŋa edoikinete otian da; edoikini kes adiopekirot: kwape etwania ediopet etwani ece kwaŋin; eebo, kere ejaas keiyenane ediopet; mam ituŋanan itelekarit itian; naarai kere eraas aamameak,"
Ecclesiastes3:20 Elosete kere aibois adiopet; elomunete kere kapua, eboŋorete bobo kere apua."
Ecclesiastes3:21 Iŋai bo ejeŋi emoyo loka ituŋanan arai elosi kuju, emoyo da loka itian arai elosi kwap toma alup?"
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ŋes kaanyunia ebe emamei ibore yenitelekarit ajokis kilema ituŋanan alelakinit aswamuke; naarai ŋin ŋes akekorakinet: naarai iŋai epedori ainyakun ŋes aanyun nuetupanakinete ŋes?
Ecclesiastes4:1 Kasodi bobo kaany aimwaŋ kere naiswama kokwap kakoloŋ: ido koany, akiyo nuka nul kalukemwanitai, kwabo emameete luitalakarete kes; koiai da apedor neejaas luemwanito kes, konye komameete luitalakarete kes."
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ŋes keturio lukatwak luadaut atwakare aitelekarit lueiarete lueroko eiarete,"
Ecclesiastes4:3 Eebo, kaomoom aitelekarit kere nin yeneroko ejauna, yenimam ber eanyunit aswamisio nukaronok nuiswamas kokwap kakoloŋ."
Ecclesiastes4:4 Kasodi aanyun aitaaritoi kere ka niniswam kere nakapirianut, kanuka ŋun ŋes ikokotikinio etuŋanan ekeidunyet. Ŋun da eraas aamameak ka ainyam ekwam."
Ecclesiastes4:5 Ilokonyikini ebaŋ akekanin, kosodi ainyam akekuan elopet."
Ecclesiastes4:6 Amukunet adiopet naka akan kaiyamakina itelekarit amukuneta aarei kaitaaritoi ka ainyam ekwam.
Ecclesiastes4:7 Kasodi bobo kaany aamameak kokwap kakoloŋ.
Ecclesiastes4:8 Kojai obonipe, komamei lokiareit; eebo, emamei ŋes ikoku karaida onaee; konye aitaaritoike kere mam enaŋi, akekonye da mam imonikinos abar, Aso ebala ebe, “Etaarikini iŋai, emiki da ekatau ajokis kanuka ŋai?” Ŋun da aamameak, eebo, aitaaritoi naepol."
Ecclesiastes4:9 Itelekarito iarei ediopet; naarai ejaas keropit loejok kanuka aitaaritoikec,"
Ecclesiastes4:10 Naarai arai kibiroros, itonyouni ediopet aupake; konye itukwi nin yeneiai bon naibiroror, yenemamei aupake loitonyouni,"
Ecclesiastes4:11 Bobo da, arai eperete iarei nepepe, ibusubusakinete: konye obonipe epedori biai aibusubusakin?"
Ecclesiastes4:12 Arai da itelekari etuŋanan obonipe, ipikorete ŋes iarei; auno da naicipitai kauni mam eneda atipet,"
Ecclesiastes4:13 Ekatumunan lokican lokacoa itelekarit ekabaka loemoionit kobanaana, lomam ecamuni bobo alimokinio."
Ecclesiastes4:14 Naarai toma aenis ŋes kelomunia araun ekabaka; eebo, keurio kerai lokican kajakanutuke."
Ecclesiastes4:15 Abu kaany lukaiarak kere luilatos kokwap kakoloŋ, koiaas nepepe kekatumunan, lokiareit, loabwoi kaiboisike."
Ecclesiastes4:16 Emamei neesanakinete ituŋa kere, nul kere luirumit ŋesi: konye nul luetupanakinete mam isiyalamikinete ŋes. Abeit nun da eraas aamameak ka ainyam ekwam."
Ecclesiastes5:1 Kocoite akonikeie nailomanaria togo loka Edeke: naarai ejok aikunyakin akiirar itia ainanakin asuban nuka ibaŋiok: naarai mam ejenete ebe iswamaete aronis.
Ecclesiastes5:2 Sirikilebileb kaitukukon, karaida ekonitau aisunyit einer akirot kere kakonyen nuka Edeke; naarai ejai Edeke toma akuj, ijo da toma akwap; asa kikidiokoto akonikiro."
Ecclesiastes5:3 Naarai ebuni airujasit kaipues naka aswamisio; eporoto loka ebaŋ da ebuni kaipues naka akiro.
Ecclesiastes5:4 Naiyapoo ijo aiyaposit mama ejai Edeke sirikitilor aitodol; naarai mam isiyalamikini ibaŋiok: kitodolonokini nun nuiyapoi.
Ecclesiastes5:5 Ejok timam kiyapo itia aiyapo kosodi akurwokin aitodolikin.
Ecclesiastes5:6 Sirikijalak aitukukon aidupor akonikuan; sirikiner kakonyen nuka emalaika ebe kerai aibucaret: kanukinyo tienyunyurikinia Edeke ekoniporoto, amudiar da aswamisio nuka akaninikon?"
Ecclesiastes5:7 Naarai toma aipues naka airuiasia ka aamameak ejaas da akiro nuipu: konye jo koyonenenei Edeke.
Ecclesiastes5:8 Karaida ianyuni lukican emwanitai, ido etube ka abeit da edemario kagogon kotoma obuku, sirikiwumok akirotnin: naarai loitelekarit apolou eseseni lokapolou, ejaas da lukapolou aitelekarit kes."
Ecclesiastes5:9 Bobo da amio naka akwap erai naka kere: ekabaka da ijaanakinio komanikor.
Ecclesiastes5:10 Ŋol Ioikila epuesa mam imonikin epuesa; ŋol da loikila luipu mam imonikini eiyas: ŋun da eraas aamameak.
Ecclesiastes5:11 Arai kiyatakinos iboro, ŋul da luenyamete kes iyatakinos: ameda anyoin edumuni elopet dimarai asesen kes kakekonyen?"
Ecclesiastes5:12 Ejijim ajo nuka lokeswaman, arai enyami luikidioko arai luipu; konye aimonut naka ekabaran mam isiikini ŋes ajo."
Ecclesiastes5:13 Ejai aronis naepol naabu kaany kokwap kakoloŋ ŋes nata, abar nainadakinit elopet eyaŋauni aronis:"
Ecclesiastes5:14 etwaniari abar ŋin kanuka arereŋ naerono; arai da keuri ikoku, komamei ibore kakanike,"
Ecclesiastes5:15 Kwape kelomunia kakoik naka totoke, eboŋori emujalal kwape kelomunia, kwabo mam eyaŋaari ibore kanuka aitaaritoike yenepedori ayaŋaar kakanike."
Ecclesiastes5:16 Na da ŋes aronis naepol, kwape kelomunia elosi eut kwape kwaŋin: edumuni ameda anyoin etaaritor kanuka ekwam?"
Ecclesiastes5:17 Enyamenenei kamuton apaarasiake kere, ido eburuni noi, edekanakin enyunyuranakini da."
Ecclesiastes5:18 Koany, nuabu kaany ebe ejok ibusak da kes nu, etuŋanan ainyam ka aimat, ka aisiyalamikin aitaaritoike kere, naetaaritor kokwap kakoloŋ, apaarasia kere nuka aijarake nakijaikin Edeke: naarai nin ŋes akekorakinet."
Ecclesiastes5:19 Ido ninitunanan kere yenijaikinit Edeke abar ka iboro, ido ijaikinit apedor ainyam ka alemunun da akekorakinet, ka aisiyalamikin aitaaritoike; nin ŋes ainakinet naka Edeke."
Ecclesiastes5:20 Naarai mam iituni noi apaarasia nuka aiiarake; naarai eboŋokini Edeke toma alakara naka etauke
Ecclesiastes6:1 Ejai aronis naabu kaanyu kokwap kakoloŋ, ido naelanirikinit ituŋa:"
Ecclesiastes6:2 Etuŋanan loijaikinit Edeke abar, ka iboro, ka aibuses, tetere mam etwa niari kere nuimiela eketau, konye komam Edeke einakinit apedor ainyam kes, konye emoit enyami; nun eraas aamameak, ido ŋes adek naerono,"
Ecclesiastes6:3 Arai keuri etuŋanan idwe akwatat, kobut da ikar luipu, kipuakaros apaarasia nuka ikekaru, konye komam eketau imonikin aiokis, ido komam enukio; abala eoŋ ebe, Ikoku yenikijecuna da itelekarit ŋes."
Ecclesiastes6:4 Naarai ebuni nin kaamameak, elosi da kamuton, erapario da ekekiror kamuton;"
Ecclesiastes6:5 Bobo da mam eanyunit akoloŋ, kwabo mam ejeŋi; ibworari nin adepar ŋol."
Ecclesiastes6:6 Eebo, karaida kebut ŋesi ikar elukumit irwan aarei, komam isiyalamikinit aiokis: mam kereka eboŋokinete kere aibois adiopet?"
Ecclesiastes6:7 Aitaaritoi kere naka etuŋanan erai kanuka aitukuke, konye mam ainobeleke imonikin."
Ecclesiastes6:8 Naarai itelekari biai lokacoa ebaŋ? Inyo bo da ejai lokican loejeni alosit kakonyen nuka lukajarak?
Ecclesiastes6:9 Asesen kakonye ŋes itelekarit airimirim naka aiŋobel: nun da eraas aamameak ka ainyam ekwam.
Ecclesiastes6:10 Ŋin yenikeiau, emaikinitai ekekiror sek, ejenio ebe erai etuŋanan: kwabo mam epedori aitepeg nol loitelekarit ŋes kagogon,"
Ecclesiastes6:11 Naarai ejaas akiro nuipu nuiyatakinete aamameak, iŋarakinete etuŋanan biai?"
Ecclesiastes6:12 Naarai iŋai ejeŋi luibusakinito etuŋanan kaijarake, apaarasia kere nukaijarake naatai nuebusio kwape etoribe? Naarai iŋai epedori alimokin etuŋanan nuejaunos atupanakin ŋes kokwap kakoloŋ?"
Ecclesiastes7:1 Ekiror loejok itelekarit akinyet naka akais nuipu; Apaaran da nakatwanare itelekarit apaaran nakaurio.
Ecclesiastes7:2 Ejok alosit togo loka aibworo Itia alosit togo loka epucit: Naarai nen ŋes esaŋe loka ituŋa kere; Ibwaikini lokajaran ŋun otauke.
Ecclesiastes7:3 Aiturur itelekarit akiena: Naarai akadakinit naka akonye ŋes ejokuunia etau.
Ecclesiastes7:4 Etau loka lukacoa ejai togo loka aibworo: Konye etau loka ibaŋiok ejai togo loka ikososio.
Ecclesiastes7:5 Ejok akiirar aitoronio naka lokaeoa Itia akiirar ekosio loka ibaŋiok.
Ecclesiastes7:6 Kwape edeedeatar ikukwa kokwap kamot, Ikoni nen akiena naka ibaŋiok: Ŋun da aamameak."
Ecclesiastes7:7 Abeit amwanit itaraun lokacoa ebaŋ; Ainakinet da emunauni aijen.
Ecclesiastes7:8 Esaŋe loka akirot itelekarit ageuneteke kajokis: Loejai emoyo Ioinirikinit itelekarit loejai emoyo loeomiara.
Ecclesiastes7:9 Sirikisunyak anyunyurikin komoyokon: Naarai iboie anyunyura katorob naka ibaŋiok.
Ecclesiastes7:10 Sirikiner ebe, “Akirot anyoin itelekaritotor apaarasia nukolosek nuka kwana?” Naarai mam inisi ŋun kacoa."
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ejok acoa nepepe kairumet: Eebo, ejok aitelekarit neeiaas nul lueanyunete akoloŋ."
Ecclesiastes7:12 Naarai igalikinit acoa kwape igalikinitor epuesa da: Konye ajokis naka aijen ŋes na ebe idari acoa aijar naka ŋul kalueiaas kaŋes,"
Ecclesiastes7:13 Koomoom aswam naka Edeke: Naarai iŋai epedori aiteten nun nuasubunit ŋesi imagululos?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Kolakara kapaaran naka aikemer, koomoom da kapaaran naka ican: asubunit Edeke adiopet kwape kanaee, tetere mam etuŋanan enicuni nuetupanakinete ŋes."
Ecclesiastes7:15 Abu kaany nu kere kapaarasia nuka aijaraka naatai: ejai etuŋanan lokadoliton loeoliori kadoliteke, ejai da etuŋanan lokaronon loiyatakini aibut toma aronisike."
Ecclesiastes7:16 Sirikilitokin kadolitekon: karaida alitokin kacoa: kanukinyo tikimudiaror bon?
Ecclesiastes7:17 Sirikilitokin karonis, karaida araut ebaŋ: kanukinyo tikitwania eriŋa edoluno apakikon?"
Ecclesiastes7:18 Ejok korie ŋun; eebo kakwa da mam ijalakini kakanikon: naarai loeyonit Edeke ebeluni kakes kere.
Ecclesiastes7:19 Erai acoa agogoŋ neejai lokaeoa aitelekarit ikayaitok itomon luejaas toma ore,"
Ecclesiastes7:20 Abeit emamei etuŋanan ekadoliton kakwap loiswamai nuejok, komam ediakari."
Ecclesiastes7:21 Sirikibwaik etau akiro kere nuinerai; kinye akiirar ebulesitikon kikeni:
Ecclesiastes7:22 naarai irwan ipu ejeŋi ekonitau da ebe ikeni ijo da luee kwape kwaŋin.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ŋun kere abu ketem kacoa; kener atiar, “Araun lokacoan; konye kalwanik."
Ecclesiastes7:24 Nuejaas da, elwaka, ido idulok noi; iŋai bo epedori aŋicun?"
Ecclesiastes7:25 Abu kebelokin, ketininik ekatau ajenun, ka aŋicun, ka amoot acoa ka apolou naka akiro, ajenun da ebe aronis ŋes abaŋasnut, ka abaŋaanut da kes ikerep."
Ecclesiastes7:26 Abu kadum da akirot naitelekarit atwanare kadwaris, ŋes aberu naerai etauke iica ka iboyan, akekanin da bala irikoi: ekui ŋolloisiyalamikinit Edeke kamaken; konye ikamuni ŋesi ekadiakanaran."
Ecclesiastes7:27 Koany, ebala Ekalimonokinan ebe, Abu kadum na, kwape etiiriania akirot kakirot adumunia apolou:"
Ecclesiastes7:28 naerina emoot ekatau, konye mam adumunit: abu kadum ediopetunanan kotoma olukumit; konye mam abu kadum aberu kotoma kanul kere."
Ecclesiastes7:29 Koany, abu kadum na bon ebe, kosub Edeke ituŋa itenara; konye apotu kesi komoata lupwakununa luipu."
Ecclesiastes8:1 Iŋai loesubit bala lokaeoa? Ido itjai ejeŋi aitejenun akiro? Acoa naka etuŋanan itacauni akekonyen, Itegelikini da agogoŋ naka akekonyen."
Ecclesiastes8:2 Kainakinit akirot ebe, Koricenenei aicorakinet naka ekabaka, ido kiswama ŋun kwaŋin kanuka aiyaposit naka Edeke,"
Ecclesiastes8:3 Sirisunyanari anyoun kaneejai; siridonit akirot naerono: naarai iswamai ŋesi nuekoto kere.
Ecclesiastes8:4 Naarai akirot naka ekabaka ejai apedor: iŋai da epedori atemar ŋes atiar, “Iswamai inyo?”"
Ecclesiastes8:5 Ŋin yenerieenenei aicorakinet mam ejenuni akirot naerono; emisiikini etau loka etuŋanan lokaeoa apak ka etube:
Ecclesiastes8:6 Naarai ŋinikirot ejai apakike ka etube; naarai elanirikinito noi etuŋanan icano
Ecclesiastes8:7 Naarai mam ejeŋi nueiaunos; naarai iŋai bo epedori alimokin ŋes kwape eiaunotor?
Ecclesiastes8:8 Emamei etuŋanan loejai apedor komoyo aitikokin emoyo; kwabo emamei ŋes apedor kapaaran naka atwanare; emamei atwario kojie, aronis da mam eyuuni ŋol loanaiki."
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ŋun kere abu kaany, abu kebwaik ekatau toma niniswam naiswamao kokwap kakoloŋ; naeyaitor etuŋanan ediopet loce aiswamakin ŋes aronis,"
Ecclesiastes8:10 Kasodi bobo kaany lukaronok enukio, kolomanarete kolomununete da aibois nakalaunan, aponi kituroi kotoma ore kama kiswamaata akiro ŋun: ŋun da eraas aamameak."
Ecclesiastes8:11 Naarai etube Ioetubokinio aswamisioit naerono mam itodolikinio katipet, ŋes etininikiata odwe luka ituŋa itauonokee aiswamaenen aronis."
Ecclesiastes8:12 Karaida iswamaenenei ekadiakanaran aronis aatenak akwatat, kosodi kobut noi, konye ajeni abeit ejaunos ejok nul lueyonito Edeke, lueyonito kakonyeneke."
Ecclesiastes8:13 Konye mam lokaronon ejaun ejok, kwabo mam ebusi apaarasia nuipu nuesubito bala etoribe; naarai mam eyonit kakonyen nuka Edeke."
Ecclesiastes8:14 Ejaas aamameak nuiswamas kakwap; ejaas ikadolitok luedoikinete kwape eiaar aswam naka ikaronok; bobo da, ejaas ikaronok luedoikinete kwape ejaar aswam naka ikadolitok: kabala ebe, nun da eraas aamameak,"
Ecclesiastes8:15 Kasodi aiturit ikososio, naarai emamei etuŋanan ibore yenitelekarit aiokis kokwap kakoloŋ, dimarai ainyam, ka aimat, ka alakanar: naarai ŋun ejaunos kaŋes kotoma aitaaritoike apaarasia kere nuka aijarake, nuabu Edeke kijaik ŋes kokwap kakoloŋ,"
Ecclesiastes8:16 Naebwaikinia ekatau aijen acoa, aanyun da aswamisio nuiswamao kakwap: (naarai ejai lomam iiri ajo kakonyeke paaran ka kuare da:)"
Ecclesiastes8:17 kasodi kaany aswam kere naka Edeke, mam epedori etuŋanan aŋicun aswam naiswamao kokwap kakoloŋ: naarai etuŋanan arai itaaritoi biai amoot, konye mam enicuni; eebo, karaida eomit lokaeoa ajenun, konye mam epedori aŋicun."
Ecclesiastes9:1 Naarai abu kebwaik nun kere toma otauka, airot ŋun kere; kwape ejaatar ikadolitok, ka lukacoa, ka aswamisiokec toma akan naka Edeke; arai amin arai alaio, mam etuŋanan ejeŋi; ejaas kere kakonyenekee."
Ecclesiastes9:2 Eriakas akiro kere nuedoikinete kere: ejai adiopekirot neejaas ikadolitok ka ikaronok; neejaas luejok ka lueroko, ka luelaete ka lumam elaete da; neejai nol Ioeinakini asubanit, ka lomam einakini asubanit; kwape ejaar loejok, ikoni nen ekadiakanaran da; ka ŋol loiyapoi, bala loeyonit aiyaposit."
Ecclesiastes9:3 Erai nin aronis naejai toma nuiswamao kere kokwap kakoloŋ, ebe, edoikini adiopekirot kere: eebo, bobo da, ileleba aronis toma otauon luka odwe luka ituŋa, ikerep da ejaas otauonokee eriŋa eiarete, ido kokau kanun elosete okatwak."
Ecclesiastes9:4 Naarai ejai amun ŋol loimorikikina kalukajarak kere: naarai ejok ekiŋok loeiari itia eŋatuny loetwanit.
Ecclesiastes9:5 Naarai ejenete lukajarak ebe etwakete: konye mam ikatwak ejenete ibore, mam bobo edumunete eropit; naarai imurwokinio aiitunetekee."
Ecclesiastes9:6 Aolio kwana aminakee ka elaitikee ka ekokotekec da; mam bobo ejaas kakorakinet apaarasia kere kakiro kere nueswamao kokwap kakoloŋ.
Ecclesiastes9:7 Ape do, konyamenenei ikoninyamat kaiyalama, komasenenei ebinokon ketau loelakara; naarai adau Edeke acamun aswamisiokon."
Ecclesiastes9:8 Kokwanuut inapenekon apaarasia kere; siriemamuunun akinyet kakoukon.
Ecclesiastes9:9 Kiboienenei kaiyalama kaberu naimina apaarasia kere nuka aijarakon naatai, nakiinakinit ŋesi jo kokwap kakoloŋ, apaarasiakon kere nuutai: naarai ŋin ŋes akorakinetekon kaiiar, kakoniitaaritoi naitaaritor kokwap kakoloŋ."
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ŋin kere yenedumuni akonikan aswam, kiswamaenenei kakonigogon; naarai emamei aswam, karaida ainerun, karaida aijen, karaida acoa, kokatwak, kama ilosi."
Ecclesiastes9:11 Abu kabon, kaany kokwap kakoloŋ ebe, abolobol mam erai naka luetiroko, karaida ejie loka ikagogoŋok, karaida inyamat luka lukacoa, karaida abar naka ituŋa lukaijen, karaida asianut naka ituŋa luepiriaka; konye edoikini kes kere apak ka arereŋ."
Ecclesiastes9:12 Naarai mam etuŋanan ejeŋi akepak; kwape lukecor luikamunio koboi loerono, kwape da akweny nuipokete karuja, kwape kwaŋin da ipokiata ituŋa kapak nakaronis, naenesaria kes atipet,"
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ido abu kaany acoa kokwap kakoloŋ naikoni ne, esubit bala epol kamakaŋ:"
Ecclesiastes9:14 Kojai ere loedit, ikidioko da ituŋa luajaas toma; kobu ekabaka lokapolon aitiii, kirigau, koduk itutio luepolok:"
Ecclesiastes9:15 koiai do etuŋanan lokican lokacoa ore ŋol, abu ŋol koyu ere kanuka acoake; konye komamei yeneitunit etuŋanan ŋol lokican."
Ecclesiastes9:16 Kasodi kabala ebe, Eiok acoa itia agogoŋ: konye emenitai acoa naka etuŋanan lokican, komam akiroke epupunio,"
Ecclesiastes9:17 Akiro nuinerasi lukacoa kaiyamakina epupunio aitelekarit ecelet loka ŋol kaloeyait ibaŋiok.
Ecclesiastes9:18 Ejok acoa itia lujiis: konye ekadiakanaran ediopet emudiari nuejok nuipu.
Ecclesiastes10:1 Icuc luetwakito itobosete tulutul akinyet naka ekenyalan aures naejok: Kwape kwaŋin elaŋir abaŋaanut naedit aitelekarit acoa ka aibuses,"
Ecclesiastes10:2 Etau loka etuŋanan lokacoa ejai kakanike nakoteten; Konye etau loka ebaŋ ejai kakanike nakokediany.
Ecclesiastes10:3 Eebo, arai elosi ebaŋ korot, kodaun aijeneke, Elimokini ŋinituŋanan ebe erai ebaŋ,"
Ecclesiastes10:4 Arai kinyoikini jo emoyo loka ekayaiton asurokin, sirinyoununei kaiboisikon; Naarai anonokikin isiyamikini aronisio nuepolok."
Ecclesiastes10:5 Ejai aronis naabu kaany kokwap kakoloŋ, kosubit bala adiakar naebuni kama ejai ekayaiton."
Ecclesiastes10:6 Isiboikinio abaŋaanut aiboisio nuepolok, iboiete da ikabarak aiboisio nukokwap."
Ecclesiastes10:7 Abu kaany ibulesin ibwanenito ibalasin, ka ikapolok elosete kakeie bala ibulesin kakwap."
Ecclesiastes10:8 Loeboki aipany ibirokini neni ŋol da loebeli abwas, ekonyi emun ŋes."
Ecclesiastes10:9 Ŋol loeuki amor ilunyulunyete ŋes; Ŋol da loibesi akito edumuni akaŋas,"
Ecclesiastes10:10 Arai keŋinior asuat, komam ituŋanan ipeni, Aso ibusakinit aiyatakin agogoŋ: Konye iŋarakini acoa aiteten."
Ecclesiastes10:11 Arai ekonyi emun korina elemelema, Emamei ajokis ekalemeleman."
Ecclesiastes10:12 Esiaka akiro nuka aituk naka lokacoa; Konye ilikori aituk naka ebaŋ elopet.
Ecclesiastes10:13 Ageunet naka akiro nuka aitukuke ŋes abaŋaanut: Esaŋe da loka akiroke kes ikerep Iukameneranut,"
Ecclesiastes10:14 Iyatanakini ebaŋ akiro, Konye mam ituŋanan ejeŋi nuejaunos; Iŋai bo epedori alimokin nuejaunos atupanakin ŋes?”"
Ecclesiastes10:15 Aitaaritoi naka ibaŋiok egogori ŋolidiopet kakesi, Naarai mam ejeŋi neitori elosi ore."
Ecclesiastes10:16 Itukwi, ijo akwap, naeraar ekabakakon ikoku, Enyamete da ikapolokokon tupuruc!"
Ecclesiastes10:17 llakara, ijo akwap, naeraar ekabakakon okoku loka lukapolok, Enyamete da ikapolokokon kapak naedolit, Adumunia agogoŋ, kwabo mere ameranakin!"
Ecclesiastes10:18 Edoi eswi kanuka aijalijalanut; Ido eisi etogo kanuka apalisonut naka akanin.
Ecclesiastes10:19 Ipounio inyamat kanuka akiena, Ebino da italakari aijar; Apesan da eboŋokinete ŋinikirot,"
Ecclesiastes10:20 Sirikenenenei ekabaka, karaida toma aomisiokon; Sirikenenenei ekabaran kagolakon naiperenenei: Naarai eyaŋaari ikweny yenika apak eporotokon, Ŋin da yenejaas abebenoka itatami akirot."
Ecclesiastes11:1 Kocakanakini ikoninyamat akipi: Naarai ianyuni kes ketuboros apaarasia nuipu.
Ecclesiastes11:2 Koinak akorakinet mama ejaas ikanykaarei, eebo, kiton ikanykauni; Naarai mam iieni aronis anyoin ejaun toma akwap."
Ecclesiastes11:3 Arai kibwala idouon akiru, Kotepete toma akwap: Arai kibiror ekitoi da ari naka eŋalakimak, arai agolitomei, Aibois ŋipeŋin naebirokin, nepenen eperio."
Ecclesiastes11:4 Loeseseni ikwamin mam eyei; Loeseseni idouon da mam edwenyi.
Ecclesiastes11:5 Kwape mam ijenia erot loka ekwam kwape ejaar, karaida akoio kwape epolooto kotoma aliliget naka akapotion; kwape kwaŋin mam ijenia aswam naka Edeke loiswamai kere."
Ecclesiastes11:6 Koyeenenei ikonikinyom tupuruc, eboŋ da sirikitikok akonikan; naarai mam iieni kakesi luikemerete, arai lu arai nul, elemuni eriakakinos kere araun luejok."
Ecclesiastes11:7 Abeit ejok aica, ido erai naka aiyalama akonye asesen akoloŋ."
Ecclesiastes11:8 Eebo, kebut ituŋanan ikar luipu, kisiyalamikina kakes kere; konye kiitunite kereka apaarasia nuka amuton, naarai eraunos nuipu. Kere nuepote eraas aamameak."
Ecclesiastes11:9 Kisiyalamikinite akonitumun, ijo esapat; kitalakaanar ekonitau kapaarasia nuka akonitumun, kolosenenei korotin luipuda ekonitau, kasesen da naks akonikonye: konye kojen ebe kitubokini rwaru Edeke kanuka nun kere."
Ecclesiastes11:10 Aso kolema aiturur kere kotaukon, kolema da aronis kakuanakon: naarai atumun ka akurunan eraas aamameak."
Ecclesiastes12:1 Kiitunite da Ekonikasuban kapaarasia nuka atumunikon, eroko kepona apaarasia nukaronok, eroko da ikar ikunyuna nainerar atiar, “Mam esiyalamikinit kes”:"
Ecclesiastes12:2 Eroko itudeneoro akoloŋ, ka aica, ka elap ka aacer, karaida kebono idouon kedau akiru aitep:"
Ecclesiastes12:3 kapaaran naemaranuniata ikedarak etogo, irapanakinos ikagogon ok, inyeinete akeriak da naarai ikidioko kes, naitumutonorere ikereonokinok kadirisan."
Ecclesiastes12:4 Naegolokinere ikekia korot; naiyapaaror eporoto loka airiare, naenyounio ice kanuka aruo naka akweny, naisiyapaarere apesur kere nukekosiok:"
Ecclesiastes12:5 Eebo, ekuriakaros nin yenetopolooritai, ka luitukurianete korot; ituroi ekuŋur, elaŋirior ebeerei da, edaun da emulalu: naarai elosi ituŋanan oreke loka ikar kere, koriariatos ikebworok korotin:"
Ecclesiastes12:6 eroko kelacara auno naka epuesa, arai atido naka csabu abwan, arai amot abwan katan, eroko kebila akokoro da katapar;"
Ecclesiastes12:7 kobonorete apua toma alup kwape keiaatar, kobonori da emoyo mama ejai Edeke lokekorakini."
Ecclesiastes12:8 Inera Ekalimonokinan ebe, Aamameak nuka aamameak, kere eraas aamameak,"
Ecclesiastes12:9 Bobo da, naarai kerai Ekalimonokinan lokacoa, kiyatak aisisianakin ituŋa aijen; eebo, koomoomoenenei, komo, kisuduny da awaragasia nuipu,"
Ecclesiastes12:10 Abu Ekalimonokinan komo adumun akiro nuitoiokitai, ka ŋun da nukiwadikatai kaitenara, kes akiro nukabeit."
Ecclesiastes12:11 Esubito akiro nuka lukacoa bala iketetin, ido akiro nuka ikapolok luka atukosia bala aseito nuibubutoi koiokan noi, nueinakinio kama ejai ekecokon ediopet."
Ecclesiastes12:12 Bobo da, okokuka, kocam aicorio: emamei esaŋe aiswamaenen iitabon luipu; aisisia da nuipu itapasi akuan."
Ecclesiastes12:13 Na ŋes esaŋe loka akirot; eirar kere: koyonitenenei Edeke, koricenenei akeicorakineta; naarai ŋun kes nuibusakinito ituŋanan."
Ecclesiastes12:14 Naarai eyauni Edeke ŋiniswam toma atubokinio, nepepe ka ŋinikirot nakibwaitai, arai naejok arai naerono."
SongOfSongs1:1 Ekosio loitelekarit ikososinei, ŋes loka Solomon."
SongOfSongs1:2 Mere eama kanu ŋesi eoŋ kanueta nuka aitukuke! Naarai aminakon itelekarit ebino kajokis.
SongOfSongs1:3 Eurok sa akinyetakon nukiledis; Esubit ekonikiror bala akinyet naebukoritai; Ŋes kiminatatar apesur,"
SongOfSongs1:4 Kiriunai; kikeri isio da kitupit jo: Kayaŋ au ekabaka toma agolaike. Kiyalamikini kalakaros kotomakon, Kitatamenenei aminakon aitelekarit ebino: Kiminasi jo kadolit."
SongOfSongs1:5 Enono eoŋ, konye etemelel, Yes apesur nuka Yerusalem, Kwape iweman luka Kedar, Kwape aigalisio nuka Solomon."
SongOfSongs1:6 Sirikisesenete eoŋ, naarai awasar, Naarai kapeit akoloŋ. Kesiopakis odwe luka totoka, Ketaraut akedaran imanikoria luka emusabibu; Konye mam abu kedar emanikorika loka emusabibu."
SongOfSongs1:7 Wu jo loemina ekatau, kolimokinai, Neitadakenenei esipanikon, Naisiuriakenenea kidiŋ paaran: Naarai kanukinyo tikaraunor naerimi Kaneejaas isipanin luka ipaupakon?"
SongOfSongs1:8 Arai mam ijeni, ijo naitelekarit aŋor kere katemelel, Koloma kibwap akejen nuka esipanikon loka amerekekin, Kitadak ikaleikon neejaas iweman luka ikeeokok,"
SongOfSongs1:9 Wu jo naminataka, ketiriani jo Kabalasit naka agalin nuka Parao."
SongOfSongs1:10 Ibusak iitinyokon kaicipeta nuka itim, Ekonimurisiŋ da kaunoi nuka iboro luka akais nuipu."
SongOfSongs1:11 Kiswamakini jo aicipeta nuka esabu Nueropanakinio kepuesa.
SongOfSongs1:12 Nakiboio ekabaka kariri naka emesake, Kouru sa akakinyet nakesai,"
SongOfSongs1:13 Lominataka esubit bala eriagi loka emina, Loenapakinitai kidiŋ kikisinaka."
SongOfSongs1:14 Lominataka esubit bala aibuŋet naka aturo nuka koper, Komanikoria luka emusabibu luka En-gedi."
SongOfSongs1:15 Koany, itemelel, ijo naminataka; koany, itemelel: Ŋaas kakonye nuka ajele."
SongOfSongs1:16 Koany, itemelel, lominataka, eebo, kesiyalamikinit: Imeloikinit etutiwok."
SongOfSongs1:17 Akito nuka etogowok kes iresia, Nuiriikino da iberosin."
SongOfSongs2:1 Arai eoŋ aturot naka Saron, Apecel naka aditon."
SongOfSongs2:2 Kwape apecel kotoma okukwa, Ikoni nen naminataka kotoma apesur."
SongOfSongs2:3 Kwape kelamai kokito lukomanikor, Ikoni nen lominataka kotoma otelepai. Abu keboikini kotolimike kaiyalama naepol, Koiiiimikis araitoke aanyigolika,"
SongOfSongs2:4 Kayanau togo lokepucit, Emederake kokuiukan ŋes amin."
SongOfSongs2:5 Kigaŋ ai kimusabibun lueokito, kitalakarai kalam: Naarai ketedek amin."
SongOfSongs2:6 Koiai akekan nakokediany akouka, Katunite kakekan nakoteten."
SongOfSongs2:7 Kesiyapoi yes, wu apesur nuka Yerusalem, Kalimit amorio, ka amiameik nuka ais, Kinyeis aisidik arai aitwekenyun amin, Aitodol neakotokinor."
SongOfSongs2:8 Eporoto loka lominataka! Koany, ebunit, Etaci koronan, icuro koukon."
SongOfSongs2:9 Esubit lominataka bala amori arai amiam nadidi: Koany, ebwoi kokau karwatatakosi, Eseseni kotoma adirisan, Ireonokini kapedon."
SongOfSongs2:10 Kiner lominataka, katema atiar, “Konyou, naminataka, atemeleka, kaloto."
SongOfSongs2:11 Naarai koany, atubor aiporo, Adaun akiru, alot;"
SongOfSongs2:12 Atakanut aturo kakwap; Adolut apaarasia nueyeioto akweny, Epupunio eporoto loka adudumer kakwapuwok;"
SongOfSongs2:13 Itokoni etini araitoke, Ituroete imusabibun, Euruuni asakatakec. Konyou, naminataka, atemeleka, kaloto,"
SongOfSongs2:14 Wu ajeleka, naejai toma acilana nuka atiiba, Toma aŋopis naka aibois naimukurur, Kaany ma akonyenekon, kapup eporotokon; Naarai ejok ekoniporoto, akonikonyen da nuitemelelas."
SongOfSongs2:15 Kikamakinai ikuei, ikuei ludidik luemunaunete imanikoria luka emusabibu: Naarai ituroete imanikoriawok.”"
SongOfSongs2:16 Lominataka ŋes lokaŋ, eoŋ da nakeŋ: Itadakenenei esipanike neeiaas apecelun."
SongOfSongs2:17 Aitodol naeriripio apaaran, ilicaros itolimo, Kibelokin, lominataka, koput kwape amori arai amiam nadidi Koronan luka Beter."
SongOfSongs3:1 Kuare, kaperitika, abu kamoote ŋ ol loemina ekatau: Amoot ŋes, konye mam abu kadum."
SongOfSongs3:2 Kener atiar, “Mere kanyou do, kerimirim toma ore, Toma orotin, kaiboisio da nuelalak, Amoi ŋ ol loemina ekatau.” Abu kamoote ŋes, konye mam abu kadum."
SongOfSongs3:3 Apotu ikedarak luirimirimete roma ore kadumut: Kasodi atemar atiar, “Ianyunito gwai ŋ ol loemina ekatau?”"
SongOfSongs3:4 Nediokasilon katubor, Kadum ŋ ol loemina ekatau: Kekam ŋes, komam aosikini ŋes, Aitodol neayanaunia togo loka totoka, Agola naka ŋin nakauriei."
SongOfSongs3:5 Kesiyapoi yes, wu apesur nuka Yerusalem, Kalimit amorio, ka amiameik nuka ais, Kinyeis aisidik, arai aitwekenyun amin, Aitodol neakotokinor."
SongOfSongs3:6 Inyo bo ŋin yenebuni kamodiŋ esubit bala ipirino luka apuru, Yenituwuritoi sa kemina ka lukisupurununo, Ka ikee kere luka ekagwelanaran?"
SongOfSongs3:7 Koany, ŋes eitada loka Solomon; Kolukunito lukirigin akaisakanykape, Lukokirigin luka Isirael."
SongOfSongs3:8 Kere kitinito ikileŋa, koraas lukacoa aitiji: ŋolituŋ anaŋ koenit ekekileŋ otul, Kanuka etasuro kuare."
SongOfSongs3:9 Kiswamau ekabaka Solomon agali Naka akito nuka Lebanon.
SongOfSongs3:10 Kiswamau ipirinoke kepuesa, Kwapuke da esabu, eicoloŋoke lomuge, Kiladatete kidinike kamin Naka apesur nuka Yerusalem."
SongOfSongs3:11 Kolomasi, yes apesur nuka Sion, koanyut ekabaka Solomon, Enapit aboko naedokokini totoke kapaaran naka adukokinike, Kapaaran da nakelelia eketau"
SongOfSongs4:1 Koany, itemelel, naminataka; koany, itemelel; Ŋaas kakonye nuka ajele kotoma aimukisikon: Esubito itimakon bala esipan loka akinei Nueperete neejululue moru Gilead."
SongOfSongs4:2 Esubito ikelakon bala esipan loka amerekekin nuetubio ajul Nuepote kailosio; ŋinidiopet kakesi imuunit imwatok. Komamei kakesi naetwaniarit,"
SongOfSongs4:3 Esubit aitukukon bala eusi Lokareŋan, Itemelel da akoniituk: Esubit ereetekon bala atutubet naka ekamamaga Kotoma aimukisikon."
SongOfSongs4:4 Esubit ekonimurisiŋ bala etogo loeoja loka Daudi Lokedukitoi ainadanakin luiiis, Loekajakinitai iupalia elukumit, Ibukui kere luka lukirigin."
SongOfSongs4:5 Esubito ikisinakon luarei bala ikalei iarei lumwatok luka amori, Luedakas neeiaas apecelun."
SongOfSongs4:6 Aitodol naeriripio apaaran, ilicaros itolimo, Alosi oroŋat loka emina, Oukot da loka lukisupurununo."
SongOfSongs4:7 Itemelel cut, naminataka; Emamei akemer kotomakon,"
SongOfSongs4:8 Bia kauparos anyoun koLebanon, ateranika, Kauparos anyoun koLebanon: Kosesen kaidi naka Amana, Kaidi naka Senir ka Kerumon, Kabuai nuka iŋatunyo, Koronan luka irisai."
SongOfSongs4:9 Inomo ekatau, inaeika, ateranika; Inomo ekatau kanoliar naka akonyekon. Kerikot ediopet lokomurisinikon."
SongOfSongs4:10 Eiok ca ma aminakon, inaeika, ateranika! Itelekarit ca ma aminakon ebino! Aures da naka akinyetakon itelekarito ca luesaete Lukiponesio kere lukaures naejok."
SongOfSongs4:11 Aitukukon, wu ateranika, eisi kwape kakape nuka ao: Esik ka akile ejaas kwap kanajepekon; Aures da naka inapenekon esubit bala aures naka Lebanon,"
SongOfSongs4:12 Inacika, ateranika, ŋes emanikor loebwaitai; Akoŋu naka akipi nairwasitai, atan naipueue."
SongOfSongs4:13 Alibetakon kes emanikor loka akamamagan, loejai araito nuka akais nuipu; Koper, ka iraan lukesai."
SongOfSongs4:14 Lukesai ka saparon, Akalamus ka akinomon, ka ikito kere lukisupurununo; Emina ka icicikwa, ka lueuru ma kere luitelekarito aiokis."
SongOfSongs4:15 Irai ijo atan naka imanikoria, Eeoa loka akipi nukajarak, Ido aguuruto nueleleete anyoun koLebanon."
SongOfSongs4:16 Kokweny, ijo ekwam loka agolitomei, Kobia da, Ijo loka eŋalakimak; Kokutak omanikorika, kokut auresike. Kolom lominataka omanikorike, Konyam akeraito nuka akais nuipu."
SongOfSongs5:1 Alomuni eoŋ omanikorika, inacika, ateranika: Adeni eminaka ka lueuru ma; Anyami akapeka nuka ao kesikeka; Amasi ebinoka kakileka, Konyama yesi, ipaperoka; Komata, eebo, komata noi, luminanaka."
SongOfSongs5:2 Abu kajotor, konye abu ekatau kokwenyi: Ŋes eporoto loka lominataka loikuŋikuŋi, kobala ebe, “Koŋ aarai, inaeika, ateranika, ajeleka, aliogotoka; Naarai epalal akakou akopyo, Itimaka da kaiseta nuka akuare.”"
SongOfSongs5:3 Alae inapeneka; anapi bobo biai? Elot akakeie; epwoki bobo biai?
SongOfSongs5:4 Kibwaik lominataka akekan kapedot naka ekek, Kikilakin ekatau."
SongOfSongs5:5 Kasodi anyoun anaikin lominataka; Koitata akakanin emina, Ikabokor kemina loepalal, Kakodeta nuka ekirigi."
SongOfSongs5:6 Kanaiki lominataka; Konye kebu lominataka kibelokin, keeka. Abu ekatau kodusaun naenerar ŋesi: Abu kamoote ŋes, konye mam abu kadum; Keworo ŋes, konye mam abu kabonok,"
SongOfSongs5:7 Apotu ikedarak luirimirimete toma ore kadumut, Kenomonomata, kemusunata da; Apotu ikedarak luka arwatatin kademasi elouka,"
SongOfSongs5:8 Kesiyapoi yes, wu apesur nuka Yerusalem, arai kidumut lominataka, Kolimokis ŋes ebe ketedek amin."
SongOfSongs5:9 Itelekari lominatakon biai lominat ece, Wu jo naitelekarit aŋor kere katemelel? Itelekari lominatakon biai lominat ece, Tape isiyapoikini sio kwaŋin?"
SongOfSongs5:10 Ekwaŋ lominataka, eren da, Lokapolon kotoma ilukumin itomon."
SongOfSongs5:11 Esubit akekou bala esabu loejok noi, Epopiras itimake, irioko kwape kelibi,"
SongOfSongs5:12 Esubit akekonye bala ajele kariri kaguuruto nuka akipi; Nuilositai kakile, ibwaikinitai kotenan."
SongOfSongs5:13 Esubito iitinyoke bala amanat nuka lueum ma, bala itutio luka ikui lueum ma: Esubit akeituk apecelun, nueisete emina."
SongOfSongs5:14 Esubito akekanin bala igilun luka esabu luibwaikinitai aberulo: Esubit akekuan bala ikel luka etom lueminaikina asapiro.
SongOfSongs5:15 Esubito akejeke bala ipirino luka amor nukijesesio luegelegela, Luesipokinio aigaŋ eta nuka esabu loejok: Esubit asimake bala Lebanon, ejok noi kwape iresia."
SongOfSongs5:16 Ejijim noi akeituk: eebo, ejok ŋesi noi cut. Ŋol ŋes lominataka, ŋol ŋes oupaka; Wu yes apesur nuka Yerusalem."
SongOfSongs6:1 Ai bo alot lominatakon, Wu jo naitelekarit aŋor kere katemelel? Ai bo ebelokin lominatakon, Tape kimoi ŋes nepepe kajo?"
SongOfSongs6:2 Alot lominataka omanikorike, amanat nuka lueum ma, Ainyam komanikoria, ka aide da apecelun."
SongOfSongs6:3 Arai eoŋ naka lominataka, lominataka da erai lokaŋ: Itadaki esipanike kotoma apecelun."
SongOfSongs6:4 Ŋok ijo noi, wu jo naminatala, kwape Tirusa, Itemelel kwape Yerusalem, Naketasuro bala ajore naejaas imederan."
SongOfSongs6:5 Sirikisesen eoŋ, Naarai ketoolikis akonikonye. Esubito itimakon bala esipan loka akinei Nueperete neejululue Gilead."
SongOfSongs6:6 Esubito ikelakon bala esipan loka amerekekin, Nuepote kailosio; Ŋinidiopet kakesi imuunit imwatok, Komamei kakesi naetwaniarit,"
SongOfSongs6:7 Esubit ereetekon bala atutubet naka akamamaga Kotoma aimukisikon.
SongOfSongs6:8 Ejaas akabakan akaisakanykape, ka abusian akaisakanykauni, Ka apesur nurmm imarunos."
SongOfSongs6:9 Ajeleka, aliogotoka, erai adiopet bon: Erai adiopet naka totoke; Naseuna naka nakeuriei. Koanyut ŋes apesur, konyarata ŋes nakarereŋ; Eebo, akabakan ka abusian da kituritos ŋes"
SongOfSongs6:10 “Iŋai bo ŋin naiŋoliari, kwape atupuruc, Itemelel kwape kelap, Iliyai kwape kakoloŋ, Naketasuro bala ajore naejaas imederan?”"
SongOfSongs6:11 Abu kejesar omanikor loka emaido, Aanyun iraan luelibete kaditot, Aanyun arai iburukunyit emusabibu, Arai ituroete akamamagan."
SongOfSongs6:12 Eriŋa eoŋ ejenuna, abu ekatau kebwaik Neejaas agalin nuka ikapolokitokoka."
SongOfSongs6:13 Koboŋ, koboŋ, wu jo Asulamit; Koboŋ, koboŋ, tetere kiseseni joo Kanukinyo ikototor asesen Asulamit, Kwape iseseniata ekosio loka Makanaim?"
SongOfSongs7:1 Eiokuka ca ma akonikeie kotoma amuk, Ijo akoku naka lokapolon! Amurwosikon nupakir esubito bala iboro luka akais nuipu, Aswam naka akanin nuka ekeswaman loepiriana."
SongOfSongs7:2 Aipulekon esubit bala aikopo naeieuna, Namam etwaniarit ebino loinyalakinitai: Akoikikon esubit bala atukit naka akima, Naelukunito apecelun."
SongOfSongs7:3 Esubito ikisinakon bala ikalei iarei Lumwatok luka amori.
SongOfSongs7:4 Esubit emurisinikon bala etogo loeoia loka ikel luka etom; Esubito akonvekon bala ataparin nuka Kesibon nuejaas orute loka Bat-rabim; Esubito ikumesikon bala etogo loeoia loka Lebanon Loesesenas ka Damasiko.
SongOfSongs7:5 Esubit akoukon kotomakon bala Karamel, Esubito da itima luka akoukon bala lumugeik; Ikamuni ekabaka kaicipetakec."
SongOfSongs7:6 Itemelel ca ma ijo, isiyalamikinit da, Ŋo naminat, nakalakar!"
SongOfSongs7:7 Esubit aojaukon na bala edukudukut, Ikisinakon bala aibuneta nuka emusabibu."
SongOfSongs7:8 Kener ebe, Adokar odukudukut ŋ ol, Ketin atenunake:"
SongOfSongs7:9 Kosubito ikisinakon bala aibuneta nuka emusabibu, Aures naka eiyeijanekon bala alam. Kosubite aitukukon bala ebino loitelekarit kaiokis, Loitololoor lominataka, Loidiririei kaituke nuka ŋul kaluejotoete."
SongOfSongs7:10 Arai eoŋ naka lominataka, Aiŋ obeleke da ejai neajar,"
SongOfSongs7:11 Kobia, lominataka, kaloto amanat; Kapero oreria."
SongOfSongs7:12 Kadiloto omanikoria luka emusabibu: Kaanyut arai iburukunyit emusabibu, eterara da aketur, Arai ituroto akamamagan: Kainak kaŋina aminaka."
SongOfSongs7:13 Eurok ma aiduduma, Okekiawok da ejaas araito nuka akais nuipu nuka iponesio kere, Nukitetiak ka numoion da, Nukenadakinit jo, lominataka."
SongOfSongs8:1 Arai korai ijo onaceka, Lokenaki ikisina luka totoka! Nakaanyunia kokiŋ a, tikanu; Eebo, komameun lokameni."
SongOfSongs8:2 Tikenarenikini jo aitolomar togo loka totoka, Nakesisianakini; Tiketamat jo ebino loinyalakinitai lueuru ma, Kakipi nuka akamamaganaka,"
SongOfSongs8:3 Kojai akekan nakokediany akouka, Katunite akekan nakoteten."
SongOfSongs8:4 Kesiyapoi yes, wu apesur nuka Yerusalem, Kinyeis aisidik arai aitwekenyun amin, Aitodol neakotokinor."
SongOfSongs8:5 Iŋai bo na naebuni kamodiŋ, Egoŋakina kalominatake? Ketwekeny jo kokwap kelamai: Kanekeriebar totokon kiuriei, Kanekeriebar ŋin nakiuriei joo"
SongOfSongs8:6 Kibwaikinai eoŋ otaukon kwape amacaret, Kwape amaearet kakanikon: Naarai egogoŋ amin kwape atwanare; Eninik ekokote kwape okatwak: Aimiliaununetake esubito bala aimiliaununeta nuka akim, Aipelonoreta eut nuka EJAKAIT."
SongOfSongs8:7 Mam epedorete akipi nuipu airuden amin, Karaida akalele ai tulumor ŋes: Arai iyuuni etuŋanan ainakin iboro kere lukokaleke itia amin, Tiemwanitai cut."
SongOfSongs8:8 Kiia sio kainacikosi nadidi, Emameete ŋes ikisin: Kikwaikini ai inacikosi Kapaaran naisinerere?"
SongOfSongs8:9 Arai erai ŋesi arwatat, Kidukokini ŋes etogo loka epuesa: Arai erai ekirigi, Kigolokini ŋes katiketa nuka iresia."
SongOfSongs8:10 Arai eoŋ arwatat, ikisinaka da esubito bala itogoike: Kasodi ajaut kakonyeneke bala yenikainapakin,"
SongOfSongs8:11 Ejai Solomon emanikor laka emusabibu ko Baal-kamon; Kititinik ikakoriok emanikor ŋol Ioka emusabibu; Koyaununut ŋinituŋ anaŋ atutubeta alukumit nuka epuesa itia araitoke,"
SongOfSongs8:12 Emanikorika laka emusabibu loerai lokaŋ, ejai kakonyeneka: Ŋo, wu Solomon, ijaun kalukumit, Ka ŋul da luidarete araitoke akwat aarei."
SongOfSongs8:13 Ijo naiboie komanikoria, Iirarete aupasiakon ekoniporota, Kisiirarai eoŋ da."
SongOfSongs8:14 Kiwony, lominataka, Koputokin kamori arai amiam nadidi, Koronan lueuru ma."
Isaiah1:1 Aitapoet naka Isaia okoku loka Amos, nakeanyununei kanuka Yuda ka Yerusalem, kapaarasia nuka Usia, ka Yotam, ka Akas, ka Kesekia, ikabakan luka Yuda."
Isaiah1:2 Kiira, ijo akuj, kitoik akit, ijo akwap, Naarai ener EJAKAIT ebe: “Abu ketanak ka asa da idwe, Konye kaŋerokis,"
Isaiah1:3 Ejeni emoŋ papake, Ejeni da asigiria auj naka ejakaitike; Konye mam Isirael ejeni, Mam ikatuŋa eomitos.”"
Isaiah1:4 Wu okwe ateker nakaronon, ltuŋa luelaŋirikinito numam edolito, Aur naka luiswamaete aronis, Idwe luemunaarito! Enyeis EJAKAIT, Amena Ekalaunan loka Isirael, Agitaros, aboŋosi kau."
Isaiah1:5 Inyo bo ikototor ainomio bobo, Iyatakinotor da aipaliikin? Edek akou kere, iiloro etau kere."
Isaiah1:6 Anyoun kotau loka akeju aitodol akou, Emamei aŋaleu; Nabarai amusuŋun, ka aionokineta, Ka idola luebosak: Mam ebuleneneo, kwabo mam eenenenoo, Kwabo mam inyonyoanakinio akinyet,"
Isaiah1:7 Eswap akusikwap; ecwei ikusireria kakim; Akwapukus da enyamete imo kakonyenekus, Ido eswap, naarai epikosi ŋes imo."
Isaiah1:8 Ido asal akoku naka Sion Kwape keidukuru loejai amana naka emusabibu, Kwape kaiteis naejai amana, naka akolil, Kwape ka ere loirigaunito lukasurup."
Isaiah1:9 Kedim EJAKAIT loka ajoresio Aitasalikin oni aatoŋot naedit noi, Tikirai kwape ka Sodom, Tikiiput kwape ka Gomora."
Isaiah1:10 Kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT, Yes ijaka lukoSodom; Kitoikis akit ikisila luka Edekewok, Yes ituŋa lukoGomora."
Isaiah1:11 Inera EJAKAIT ebe: “Anyoin ajokis naka asubanakus nuipu kamakaŋ? Kaidoto ainakineta nuicweio nuka imerekekin lumaseniko, Ka asiepai naka ibaren luipisio; Kwabo mam alelakinit aokot nuka itoba, Karaida nuka idwe luka amerekekin, karaida nuka ikorwa."
Isaiah1:12 “Naitakanuniata kakonyeneka, Iŋai bo kiburai aipudapud akalaroi?"
Isaiah1:13 Siriyauŋunete bobo asuban nuka aamameak; Etalei eoŋ lukisupurununo. Elap lokelamunan ka asabato, anyara da atukosia, Mam acamunit, eraas numam edolito, Eebo, atukonokin da nakalaunan."
Isaiah1:14 Elait ekatau ilapiokus lukelamunak ka ipucinokus luicorakinitai; Eraas aitapasitoi kaneajai; Kapas atitiŋonokin kes.
Isaiah1:15 Ido nailoianariata akusikanin Ebwaenenei akakonye kama ijaas; Eebo, nailipenenata nuipu, mam eiranari: Imodimoda akusikanin aokot,"
Isaiah1:16 Kilota, kitalaunos; Kolemasi aronis naka aswamisiokus kakonyeneka; Kinyeis aswam aronis."
Isaiah1:17 Kisisiautu aswam ejok, komoenenete etube; Koyuuŋunete yenereitai, Kirabanakinete ikokiok, Kopuronokinete apuserut.”"
Isaiah1:18 Inera EJAKAIT ebe: “Kopotu ca do, kenerutu: Karaida kereŋak adiakanaretakus be, Ekwaŋuunete kwape kakile; Karaida kireremata kwape kaokot, Iliacaunete kwape ka epaaba."
Isaiah1:19 Arai iraas luinupaka ka luirimaka, Inyamenenete ajokis naka akwap."
Isaiah1:20 Konye do kiŋeroto kipaliikis, Kidanyio kekileŋ: Naarai ener aituk naka EJAKAIT,”"
Isaiah1:21 Aluor ca ma ere lomunot lodote! Ŋol loeleleba kolo etube! Kiboie kolo adolit kotomake, Konye kwana ikaarak."
Isaiah1:22 Aluor epuesakon elele, Inyalakinitai ebinokon kakipi."
Isaiah1:23 Epaliikis ikapolokokon, Eraas ipadic luka ikokolak. Emina ŋolituŋanan ainakineta nuitumudakete akonye, Irii da ainakineta. Mam Isigalikinete ikokiok, Mam da etube loka apuserut edolokini kes."
Isaiah1:24 Kanuka ŋun inera EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Lokagogoŋon loka Isirael ebe: “Bu, eyeŋuni do kama ejaas luketokokolito, Ido enyaŋi kama ejaas lukasurupoka."
Isaiah1:25 Ido ebelokini akakan mamakon, Aliliauni elelekon cut, Alemari da luinyalakina tomakon kere."
Isaiah1:26 Enyakakini ikatubokokon kwape sek, Ikenerunakakon da kwape kageunet, Kokau kinyarao Ere loka adolit, Ere lomunot.”"
Isaiah1:27 Elakuni etube Sion, Adolit da ŋul lukotomake luibelokinos."
Isaiah1:28 Konye emudiaros ikcbueanarak ka ikadiakanarak nepepe, Isidoporio cut ŋul luejalete EJAKAIT."
Isaiah1:29 Naarai kirumete yes ileic kanuka iluan lukiŋobeleete, Edakaros akwesikus kanuka imanikoria Iukiseunete,"
Isaiah1:30 Naarai iraunos kwape elua loeoni akekiot, Ido kwape emanikor loemameete akip."
Isaiah1:31 Eraun lokagogoŋ kwape esilot loka amujajut, Akeswam da kwape aatwenyitwenyit; Icweikinio kes kere, Komamei yenitudeŋi."
Isaiah2:1 Akirot naabu Isaia okoku loka Amos koany kanuka Yuda ka Yerusalem.
Isaiah2:2 Kosodi kanen kapaarasia nukoiŋaren, Iticasio eroŋat loka etogo loka EJAKAIT kaidi naka iroŋan, Itopoloorio aitelekarit iukon; Eleleete atekerin kere mamake."
Isaiah2:3 Elosete ituŋa luipu ebalasi ebe, “Kopotu, kadokasi mama ejai eroŋat loka EJAKAIT, Neejai etogo loka Edeke loka Yakob; Ido kisisianakini ŋesi oni irotinike, Kilosenenei da kosokonoke.” Naarai kotoma Sion ŋes elomuniata ikisila, Akirot da naka EJAKAIT koYerusalem."
Isaiah2:4 Etubokini ŋesi kotoma atekerin, Ido itoroni ituŋa luipu: Etataete kesi ikileŋakec aituluor imelekes, Ka akwarasikec da aituluor icilikikin lukidimet: Mam ateker ikiari ekileŋ asurokinia aceteker, Kwabo mam bobo isisiaunete ejie."
Isaiah2:5 Wu jo ekek loka Yakob, Kopotu, kalosenenete kaica naka EJAKAIT."
Isaiah2:6 Naarai ibu kinyek ituŋakon ekek loka Yakob, Naarai ileleba iponesio luepote kari nakokide, Ido ikadwarak kwape Ipilisitian, Itiŋanara akanin kidwe luka imo."
Isaiah2:7 Ileleba akwapukec epuesa ka esabu, Kwabo mam akecebar enaŋi; Ileleba akwapukec ibalasin, Kwabo mam agalinikec enaŋete,"
Isaiah2:8 Ileleba da akeeekwap aputosia; Emaete aswam naka akaninikec, Nakesubete ikecebokoro."
Isaiah2:9 Itukukumio epasoit, Itisilio lokapolon: Aso sirikisioni kes."
Isaiah2:10 Koloma atiiba, koŋop kapua, Kakonyen nuka etasuro loka EJAKAIT, Ka aibuses naka apolouke."
Isaiah2:11 Itisilio akonyen nueomiara nuka ituŋanan, Itukukumio da aiwoŋonut naka ituŋa, Itopoloorio EJAKAIT bon kapaaran kaŋin,"
Isaiah2:12 Naarai ejaun apaaran naka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio Mama ejaas kere luiwoŋooko ka lueomiara, Ka ŋin kere yenedakara; Ido itisilio."
Isaiah2:13 Mama ejaas iresia kere luka Lebanon, Lueojak luedakara, Ka neejaas iluan kere luka Basan:"
Isaiah2:14 Mama ejaas iroŋan kere lueojak, Neejaas iukon da kere luedakara:"
Isaiah2:15 Mama ejai nclitogo loeoja, Ka neejai ŋinirwatat naebwaitai;"
Isaiah2:16 Mama ejaas ameerin kere nuka Tarusis, Ka neejaas aputosia kere nuseuna,"
Isaiah2:17 Ido itukukumio adakara naka ituŋanan, Itisilio da aomiara naka ituŋa: Itopoloorio EJAKAIT bon kapaaran kaŋin,"
Isaiah2:18 Eoliorete aputosia cut.
Isaiah2:19 Elomarete ituŋa abuai nuka imorun, Toma apanya da nuka akwap, Anyoun kakonyen nuka etasuro loka EJAKAIT, Ka aibuses da naka apolouke, Naenyounio ŋesi aitamaran akwap kakegogoŋ."
Isaiah2:20 Kapaaran kaŋin ecakakini eut etuŋanan inyukunyukia ka imeniai Aputosiake nuka epuesa, ka aputosiake nuka esabu, Nukiswamaunit aima:"
Isaiah2:21 Tetere elosi abuai nuka imorun, Ka acileta nuka atiiba nueiriirete, Anyoun kakonyen nuka etasuro loka EJAKAIT, Ka aibuses da naka apolouke, Naenyounio aitamaran akwap kakegogoŋ."
Isaiah2:22 Kinyeis ituŋanan, yenejai eiyeŋane okumesike: Naarai ejautene enyoin ejaatar ŋesi?"
Isaiah3:1 Naarai koany, elemari EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Agoŋis ka aigaŋis koYerusalem, koYuda da, Agoŋis kere naka inyamat, Ka Agoŋis kere naka akipi;"
Isaiah3:2 Etuŋanan lokirigi, ka ekajiot; Ekatubon, ka enabi, Ekadwaran ka ekimat;"
Isaiah3:3 Ekapolokiton loka akaisakany, ka esoti, Ekenerunan ka ekejodijodon loepiriana, Ka emurwon loetionit."
Isaiah3:4 Ainakini idwe araut ikapolokokec, Eyaete imukerun kes,"
Isaiah3:5 Eroikinio iluŋa, ŋinituŋanan kayeniceke, Ŋinituŋanan kiidunyeteke: Epoga ikoku kama kekimat, Epasoit da kama kesot."
Isaiah3:6 Naikamunia ituŋanan onaceke Kotogo loka papake, kobala ebe, “Ejai jo anapito, korau ekayaitonikosi, Koraunos amejei nu nuiyait.”"
Isaiah3:7 Kapaaran kaŋin ikeseuni ekeporoto, kobala ebe, “Mam araun loketaŋaleunon; Naarai emameete inyamat kotogoka, karaida inapen: Mam kituluorete eoŋ ekayaiton loka ituŋa.”"
Isaiah3:8 Naarai amudiar Yerusalem, ebiror Yuda da: Naarai aŋajepakec kaswamisiokee aluikis EJAKAIT, Aitunyunyurikin akonye nuka aibusesuke."
Isaiah3:9 Ejautene loka ireetakec itejenunit kes ebe itelekarito; Elimorete aronisikec kwape Sodom, mam ibwaete. Itukwi akeeeijar, Naarai eswamakinos bonik aronis."
