Isaiah3:10 Kolimokisi ikadolitok ebe ejaunos ejok: Naarai enyamete araito nuka aswamisiokec.
Isaiah3:11 Itukwi ikaronon! ejaun erono; Naarai nueswamata akaninike, nupemam iswamakinio ŋes."
Isaiah3:12 Ikatuŋa, idwe ludidik eroikinete kes, Ido aŋor kes eyaitos. Wu ikatuŋa, lukiŋarenikinete yes kitapaarete, Emudiarete ekusirot loiloseneneoto."
Isaiah3:13 Ebwoi EJAKAIT apurokin, Ebwoi da atubokin ituŋa,"
Isaiah3:14 Etubokini EJAKAIT etube loka imakio luka iketuŋa, ka ikapolokoke ebe: “Yes ca luinyamata cut emanikor loka emusabibu, Iŋatuna luka lukican ejaas otogoikus.”"
Isaiah3:15 Ebala EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, “Iswamaete inyo aidecidec ikatuŋa, Airie akonye nuka lukican?”"
Isaiah3:16 Bobo da abala EJAKAIT ebe: “Naarai eomiara apesur nuka Sion, Ido elosete kimurisiŋa luikiara, Ka aerit akonye, Elosete epogasi, nuituruete akecekeje.”"
Isaiah3:17 Kanuka ŋun ŋes kitedekia EJAKAIT kasalab Isiaduko luka akwes nuka apesur nuka Sion, Kosodi EJAKAIT apukor ileicikec."
Isaiah3:18 Kapaaran kaŋin elemari EJAKAIT ajokis naka aoŋakec, ka itibine, ka apelia nuka epuesa;"
Isaiah3:19 luisirio ka amwolai, ka iitabalan;"
Isaiah3:20 igoen luka akwes, agirai nukokuurunya, ka aeneta, ka asadukun nuka aures namaa, ka imakakin;"
Isaiah3:21 igilun, ka igiluna lukokumes;"
Isaiah3:22 inapen luka ipucino, ka iloun, ka aimukisio, ka iriagin;"
Isaiah3:23 aroeta, ka ebaputa loejok, ka igoen lukieniena akwes, ka aiswapeta da."
Isaiah3:24 Kosodi kanen, ejaun abosus itia lukesai lueuru maa; Auno itia arokoba; epata loka akou itia itima luelacitai; anapito naka epuko itia anapito naibus: amacareta itia atemelel."
Isaiah3:25 Eari ekileŋ ikonituŋa, Etwakete ikiriginikon da kojie."
Isaiah3:26 Ekuudianete iruteike, ibworosi; Itisilio ŋes, iboikini kwap."
Isaiah4:1 Ido kapaaran kaŋin ikamunete aŋor akanykaarei ekiliokit ediopet, koba lasi ebe, “Kinyamenenei isio inyamatakosi, kinapenenei da inapene kosi: konye kisiikinai konyarai sio ekonikiror; kolema ijo amorositikosi.”"
Isaiah4:2 Kapaaran kaŋin eraun atenut naka EJAKAIT naejok ido nakaibuses, eraunos da araito nuka akwap nukeitur nuejijimikinete ŋul luekuito luka Isirael."
Isaiah4:3 Kosodi kanen, ŋol loideuna koSion, ka ŋol loesalakinit Yerusalem enyarao lokalaunan, ŋes ŋinituŋanan yeniwadikatai araut yenikajaran koYerusalem:"
Isaiah4:4 naedaunia EJAKAIT ailotar amodokok kere naka apesur nuka Sion, aitesegar da aokot nuka Yerusalem kokidiŋike, kanuka emoyo loka etube, ido kanuka emoyo loka aicwe."
Isaiah4:5 Ido esubakini EJAKAIT ŋolitogo kere loka emoru Sion ka atukonokinetake, edou ka apuru paaran, ka aica naka akim naesarani kuare: naarai eterakini eiswapet aibuses kere."
Isaiah4:6 Ejaun da ewema araun etolim lokapaaran kanuka aibuse, amecis ka aŋopis kanuka akako ka akiru."
Isaiah5:1 Mere kayeik ekapai ekosio loka epaika, Loka akemana naka emusabibu, Kejai ekapai amana naka emusabibu Komoru lopusuk noi."
Isaiah5:2 Abu kibokibok, koukono amor, Kiraik emusabibu lokajokan noi teni, Kodukok aiteis kidiŋ, Ido kobokik acues; Komuno ebe erai emusabibu, Konye abu kora emusabibu lokais."
Isaiah5:3 Aso ca do yes luibojete ko Yerusalem, Ka yes da ikiliok luka Yuda, Kenainaito, kotubokinai eoŋ ka akamana naka emusabibu."
Isaiah5:4 Tikeswamak inyo bobo akamana naka emusabibu Numam eswamat? Naamunor ebe kora emusabibu, Kanukinyo keraia emusabibu lokais?"
Isaiah5:5 Aso ca do; ketejenut nueswamakini akamana naka emusabibu; Alemari ekeriga, ido emeorio cut; Elakari cut akebwas, ido ipudapudao cut,"
Isaiah5:6 Ajalakini da eduan; Mam idimio karaida acapeneneo; Konye ebwaŋunete ikodokodo ka ikukwa; Eeorakini da idouon kinyeis atepanakin akiru.
Isaiah5:7 Naarai amana naka emusabibu naka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio Ŋes ekek loka Isirael, Ikiliok da luka Yuda kes akeraetait naisiyalamikinit: Abu komoote etube konye koany areio; Komoote adolit, konye koany aimony!"
Isaiah5:8 Itukwi ŋul luimorikikinete etogo ka etogo, Luitanyanyaete amana ka amana, Aitodol naemamuunor apak, Yes da kisilikinete aiboi bonik kotoma akwap!"
Isaiah5:9 Kotoma akiika inera EJAKAIT loka ajoresio atiar, “Abeit itogoi luipu eraunos rwaru amejei, Kiton lukapolok ka lukajokak da, Komamei yeniboie kotoma."
Isaiah5:10 Naarai amanat atomon nuka emusabibu elomuni akaalakany adiopet, Ido ebukit loileleba ikinyom elomuni edita ediopet bon.”"
Isaiah5:11 Itukwi ŋul luedilonokinete akwenyun tupuruc, Airi nuitemerete; Luimododoete aitodol ebai, Kisibwaŋarete ajons!"
Isaiah5:12 Ido adeudeu ka aunene, isiman ka alamaru, Ka ajon da ejaas toma obagaikec; Konye mam eomitos aswam naka EJAKAIT, Kwabo mam ipikakinito etau aswam naka akaninike."
Isaiah5:13 Tape eŋatario ikatuŋa, kanu aolikinio kes aijen: Koriebi eteŋei isotiakec, Ajak da akur ikecekodeta,"
Isaiah5:14 Tape italalai Okatwak ajnobeleke, Aooŋa da akeituk namam itemio; Ido aibusesukec, ka aipuesukec, ka eceletekec, Ka ŋin da yeniyalama kotomakec, Ejorimakinos toma."
Isaiah5:15 Itukumio epasoit, itisilio da loekeriana, Isurumio ileijc akonye nuka kaluiwoŋooko,"
Isaiah5:16 Konye itopolooritai EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kanuka ctube, Ido italaunitai Edeke Ekalaunan kanuka adolit."
Isaiah5:17 Kosodete edakenenas idwe luka amerekekin bala lem cjaas oronyikec, Ido enyamete rwaru ikejobirak aiboisio nukemutokoros nuka ikatumak."
Isaiah5:18 Itukwi ŋul luiriitos numam edolito kaunoi nuka aiŋal, Luiriitos aronis kwape kerikot:"
Isaiah5:19 Luineras atiar, “Kisunyite, Kododor akeswam kaanyutu: Ainerun da naka Ekalaunan loka Isirael kikuny, Kodolu, kajenutu!”"
Isaiah5:20 Itukwi ŋul luenyarito aronis ajokis, ka ajokis aronis; Luipikakinete amuton aibois naka aica, Ka aica da aibois naka amuton; Adwaris aibois naka ajijim, Ka aiiiim da aibois naka adwaris!"
Isaiah5:21 Itukwi ŋul luepiriaka kakonyekec ikulepek, Ido lueeobe kotoma asesenekec ikulepek!"
Isaiah5:22 Itukwi ŋul Iuejaas agogoŋ ajmat aionio, Ido lukajenak ainyal nuitemerete."
Isaiah5:23 Luitojokete luegwaunete akiro kanuka aropio, Luedemarete ekadoliton akedolit!"
Isaiah5:24 Aso kwape icweia akim ariaŋi, Ido kwape idupokinotor anya nueokito akim, Kwaŋin eraun rwaru esusutukee bala abosis, Ka aturotokee da ituaar kwape kapua: Naarai kenerenenete ikisila luka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Ido komenata akirot naka Ekalaunan loka Isirael."
Isaiah5:25 Ŋes inepunia anyunyura naka EJAKAIT mama ejaas iketuŋa, Ario akekan asurokin kes, epot kes, Komaranata da imor, Koraas atesinakee bala asusuj korotin. Karaida kiswamata ŋun kere, mam ca ejoniarit akenyunyura, Konye eriŋa akekan erioro."
Isaiah5:26 Ikeikini naanyunet mama ejaas atekerin kama elwana, Iinyuni kes kosaŋe loka akwap: Ido koany, erasunete aiwonyun atipet!"
Isaiah5:27 Emameun yenepasi karaida aiguikin kotomakec; Emameun yeniluranar karaida ajotoor; Kwabo mam elacunos aeneta nukaŋabesikec, Karaida mam eŋedas arukanasia nuka amukakec:"
Isaiah5:28 Eitak ikoioikec, iketet da akabwaikee; Ituputoorio imageger luka ibalasinikec bala iikepia, Ido akokoronokec bala etapipirio."
Isaiah5:29 Eraun eikunikec bala loka eŋatuny, Ikunas rwaru kwape iŋatunyo ludidik; Eebo egatunete, esomakinos lumejanakee, Koyaŋaarete iyamito, kwabo emameun yeneyuuni."
Isaiah5:30 Kapaaran kaya irurumaete kwape airurum naka aŋolol; Arai kite ituŋanan neeonit, Koany amuton ka aburun, Itumutonio aica kodouonoke."
Isaiah6:1 Toma okaru ŋol loatwania ekabaka Usia abu kaany EJAKAIT iboie koicoloŋ, loikeara, loiceleleoritai, ereret da loka akenapito kileleba eyekalu."
Isaiah6:2 Kobwoete Iserapin kokujukeŋ; nolidiopet kojaas abebenoka akanykape; abu korapak aarei akonyeneke, korapak aarei akejeneke, aarei da kopororia."
Isaiah6:3 Kosodi kiworo ediopet mama ejai loce, kotema atiar, “Lokalaunan, Lokalaunan, Lokalaunan, EJAKAIT ‘loka ajoresio: Akwap kere ileleba akeibuses.”"
Isaiah6:4 Ido komaranata ategerio nuka ekek kanuka eporoto laka ŋol kalokiworoi, etogo da kilelebun apuru."
Isaiah6:5 Kasodi atemar atiar, “Wu okwe! Abei ai? Naarai atwana, naarai arai eoŋ etuŋanan loka aituk namam elai: eboie da kokidiŋ otuŋa luka aituke numam elaete: naarai aanyut akakonye Ekabaka, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio.”"
Isaiah6:6 Kosodi kopor ediopet koserapin mama ajai, kojaas katotolet naesarani kakanike, nakelemuni karidet kotem."
Isaiah6:7 Kotiroria akaituk, kobala ebe, “Koany, atiro na akoniituk: kilemar numam adolitekon, ka akonironis da aluci.”"
Isaiah6:8 Keira eporoto loka EJAKAIT kobala ebe, “Ejukari bo iŋai? Iŋai da loecamuni alosikin sio?” Kasodi atemar atiar, “Eoŋ lo: kijukarai.”"
Isaiah6:9 Kotema atiar, “Kolot, kolimok iluŋa lu ebe: “Kiiranarete, konye mam ijenunete; Koanyununete da, konye mam Imisiikinete.”"
Isaiah6:10 Kitisiepaik itauon luka iluŋa kalu, Kisimina akiikec, kitumudak akonyekec; Kinyeis aanyun kakonyekec, Ka akiirar da kakeceki, Kojenut kotauonokec, kibelokinos, koŋaleut.”"
Isaiah6:11 Kasodi eoŋ atemar atiar, “Wu EJAKAIT, itodolete bo ai?” Koboŋok ebe, “Aitodol neiswapiata ireria, komamei yeniboie kotoma, Itogoi da komamei ituŋanan, kiswap akwap cut,"
Isaiah6:12 Kisibwosite EJAKAIT ituŋa neelwana, Kipuaros amejei kokidiŋ kakwap,"
Isaiah6:13 Karaida kesal yenikitomonet kotomaken, Idoporio bobo cut: Kwape epeduru, arai elua loesali atoromike, naejepere.” Kwaŋin ikinyom lukalaunak kes atoromake."
Isaiah7:1 Kosodi kanen kapaarasia nuka Akas okoku loka Yotam, okoku loka Usia, ekabaka loka Yuda, apotu Resin ekabaka loka Suria, ka Peka okoku loka Remalia, ekabaka loka Isirael koloto Yerusalem aitiji; konye kokurwokis."
Isaiah7:2 Aponi kolimokinai ekek loka Daudi ebe, “Emorikikinos Suria ka Epuraim.” Komaran eketau, ka itauon luka iketuŋa da, kwape kikito luka amagoro luitamarani ekwam."
Isaiah7:3 Kosodi kotema EJAKAIT Isaia atiar, “Koloma kiriamunos ka Akas, ijo ka okokukon Sear-yasub, kosaŋe loka aleles naka atapar nakokuju, korot loka emanikor loka ekelotan;"
Isaiah7:4 kolimok ŋes atiar, ‘Kocoite, kiyamakina; sirikikurianar, kinyek ekonitau ailworun, kanuka ikuk lu luka akalasia nuepurunete, kanuka anyunyura naededeŋ naka Resin ka Suria, ido okoku loka Remalia."
Isaiah7:5 Naarai eneru Suria aronis mama ijai, Epuraim da, ka okoku loka Remalia, kobalas ebe,"
Isaiah7:6 “Kaloto kalomakis Yuda, kesiyaloŋoŋoto ŋes, kapedoto apedot kanuwok, kadakakis ekabaka kokidiŋike, ŋes okoku loka Tabeel”:"
Isaiah7:7 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT Edeke ebe: Mam icasi, karaida aitodolokinio."
Isaiah7:8 Naarai akou naka Suria ŋes Damasiko, Akou da naka Damasiko ŋes Resin. (Eriŋa etuboro ikar akaisakanykape ka lukany ebilibilun Epuraim, mam bobo eraun ateker.)"
Isaiah7:9 Akou naka Epuraim ŋes Samaria, Akou da naka Samaria ŋes okoku loka Remalia. Arai kiŋero yesi aiyuun, Abeit mam kiticasio.’”"
Isaiah7:10 Kolimok EJAKAIT bobo Akas ebe,"
Isaiah7:11 “Kilipu EJAKAIT Ekonideke aanyunet; kilipu kotoma aidules arai kokuju kakuj.”
Isaiah7:12 Konye kotema Akas atiar, “Mam elipi, karaida akodwi EJAKAIT.”"
Isaiah7:13 Kotema atiar, “Aso kiirasi yesi, wu jo ekek loka Daudi; erai akirot naedit kaneijaas aitapas ituŋa, tape itapasete Ekadeke da?"
Isaiah7:14 Kanuka ŋun ŋes kiinakinia EJAKAIT elopet aanyunet; koany, epotuuni abekot, idouni ikoku yenisapat, emaikini ekekiror Imanuel."
Isaiah7:15 Enyami akinyet ka esik, naejenunia aiŋer aronis, aseun da ajokis."
Isaiah7:16 Naarai eriŋa ikoku ejenuna aiŋer aronis, aseun da ajokis, ejalakinio akwap nailaia ijo ikabakanakec iarei,"
Isaiah7:17 Eyauni EJAKAIT mamakon, ka ikonituŋa, ka ekek loka papakon apaarasia numam lem edoluno, ameun kapaarasia nukenyounio Epuraim koYuda; ŋes ekabaka loka Asuria.”"
Isaiah7:18 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, iinyuni EJAKAIT ecucut loejai atutubet nakawasia naka icorin luko Misiri, ka ao da naejai akwap naka Asuria."
Isaiah7:19 Epote do, ibworarete kesi kere kaditon nuiswapito, koburino luka atiiba, kokukwa kere, koronyia kere da."
Isaiah7:20 Kapaaran kaŋin, ebareni EJAKAIT kebarenit loeropioro loejai juwai naka Ecor, ŋes ekabaka loka Asuria, akou ka ajul nuka akeje: epiari da epenek,"
Isaiah7:21 Kosodi kanen, kapaaran kaŋin, ipisi ituŋanan ataok, ka amerekekin aarei;"
Isaiah7:22 kosodi kanen, enyami akinyet kanuka aipues naka akile nueinakinete: naarai enyamenenei ŋinituŋanan yenideuna kakwap akinyet ka esik."
Isaiah7:23 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, ŋiniibois nakejaas kolo imusabibun elukumit luedumunete atutubeta nuka epuesa alukumit, eraun naka ikodokodo ka ikukwa."
Isaiah7:24 Epote ituŋa nen ejaas kakabwai kaimalia; naarai eraun akwap kere ikodokodo ka ikukwa.
Isaiah7:25 Mam idoliori oukon kere lukolo kibokibokio kemeleku naarai ikurianari ikodokodo ka ikukwa, konye eraunos lukibuaikina ibaren, ka luipudapudaete isipanin."
Isaiah8:1 Kosodi katema EJAKAIT atiar, “Kolem amoru naepol, kigirigir kakwara naka ituŋanan ebe, ‘Naka Maker-salal-kas-bas.’”"
Isaiah8:2 Kadum ikajenak lumunon Aitejenunia, Uria esasedoti, ka Sekaria okoku loka Yeberekia,"
Isaiah8:3 Kasodi kalot neejai anabi; kopotuu ŋesi, kidou ikoku yenisapat, Kosodi katema EJAKAIT atiar, “Komaik ekekiror Maker-salal-kas-bas."
Isaiah8:4 Naarai eriŋa ikoku ejenuna aiworo ebe, ‘Papaka’, ka ‘Totoka’, eŋatario abar naka Damasiko, ka luŋaruna luka Samaria kakonyen nuka ekabaka loka Asuria.”"
Isaiah8:5 Kosodi kiyatak EJAKAIT boobo einer keoŋ katema atiar,"
Isaiah8:6 “Naarai aŋeroto ituŋa lu akipi nuka Siloa nueleleete mot, kisiyalamikis da Resin ka okoku loka Remalia;"
Isaiah8:7 aso do koany, eyauni EJAKAIT akipi nuka Ecor, nuegogoŋ nuipu, ŋes ekabaka loka Asuria ka akeibuses kere: ilapanari ŋesi alelesiake kere, ilelebuni oitolimanake kere."
Isaiah8:8 Ido iyatanakini alel kiton Yuda; ilapanari etubor; edolokini da kiton omurisiŋ; ilelebi aigarar naka abebenokake alalau naka akwapukon, ijo Imanuel.”"
Isaiah8:9 Kocelata, yes atekerin, kibilibilio; Kitoikis aki, yes kere luka akwapin nuelwaka; Koenata aŋabes, kibilibilio; Koenata aŋabes, kibilibilio."
Isaiah8:10 Kinerutu akiro kere nepepe, itapalaunio; Kinerata akirot, mam itogogoŋio: Naarai ejai Edeke kasio,"
Isaiah8:11 Naarai ener EJAKAIT keoŋ kwaŋin kakan nakagogoŋ, kesisianak kenye alosenen korot loka ituŋa kalu, kobala ebe,"
Isaiah8:12 “Sirikinerata yesi ebe, Ainerun naka ebotet, kere nuenerasi ituŋa lu ebe, Ainerun naka ebotet; sirikikuriakaros akeceitukurian, karaida aituburuunio."
Isaiah8:13 EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, ŋes italaunete yesi; korau ŋesi akusikurian, korau ŋesi akusiburun."
Isaiah8:14 Eraun ŋesi aibois nakalaunan; konye eraun amoru naitiguikinet ka atiiba naka aibirokin mama ejaas ikekia kere luka Isirael, atacit ka eic neejaas luibolete koYerusalem."
Isaiah8:15 Ido itiguikinos luipu, ibiroros, ebilibilio, ipokete eyaŋaario.”"
Isaiah8:16 Koen aitejenunet, kipuc da ikisila mama ejaas ikesisiakaka."
Isaiah8:17 Ido edareuni eoŋ EJAKAIT, loibwai akekonyen kama ejai ekek loka Yakob, ido amoi eoŋ ŋes."
Isaiah8:18 Koany, eoŋ ka idwe lukainakinit EJAKAIT kirai aanyuneta, ka nukaumokin koIsirael nuepote kama ejai EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, loiboie komoru Sion."
Isaiah8:19 Arai kitemarete ebe, “Komoata neeŋaas luejaas ajokin ka ikacudak, luididias ka luirurumaete”: mam tiemoata ituŋa Ekecedeke? Ti kereka kemoata kesi lukatwak kanuka lukajarak?"
Isaiah8:20 Kaboŋutu neejaas ikisila ka aitejenunet! Arai mam inerasi akirot ŋin kwape ejaar, abeit mam iwalakini kes."
Isaiah8:21 Ido itorete kakwap kokuriaka noi koriebi eteŋei: kosodi kanen, naariebia eteŋei, ekadakinete, ikenete kolimito ekecekabaka ka Edekekec, koŋanyito akecekonyen kuiu:"
Isaiah8:22 esesenete akwap, ido koany, aburun ka amuton, ka anyoridid naka ariebo; ireŋiario kamuton naejesi ŋaŋ."
Isaiah9:1 Konye mam ejaun amuton neejai ŋin naerieba. Kapak nakolo abu kitemen akwap naka Sebulun ka akwap naka. Naputali, konye kapak nakawasia abu kitarau nakaibuses, neejai erot loka aŋolol, okekwa Yorodan, Galilaya naka atekerin."
Isaiah9:2 Ituŋa lukelosenenete kotoma amuton Aanyut aica naepol: Kesi da lukiboienenete kakwap naka etoribe loka atwanare, Acaiki aica."
Isaiah9:3 Italal ateker, iyatak aiyalamakec: Iyalamasi kakonyenekon kwape ejaar aiyalama kotoma aidweny, Kwape iyalamatar ikiliok naekoriata iŋatan."
Isaiah9:4 Naarai eloit lokelaŋirikinit, Ka ebela lokokeperike, Esuretait loka ekamwaŋitonike, Ibu kobil kwape kapaaran naka Midian."
Isaiah9:5 Naarai lujiis kere luka ŋol kaloekapit lujiis kotoma autaar, Ka inapen lueŋurito aokot, Eraas rwaru luicweio, araun luicweio kakim."
Isaiah9:6 Naarai kiwurikinitai oni ikoku, Kiinakinitai oni ikoku yenisapat: Ejaenena rwaru airum okeperike: Ekekiror da enyarao “Lokaumokin, Ekapetan akiro, Edeke Lokagogoŋ, Papa lomam edaun, Ekapolon loka Ainapakin.”"
Isaiah9:7 Mam enaŋete airumuke ka ainapakin aiyatanakin, Koicolon loka Daudi, kotoma ajakanutuke, Aiticat, ka aigagat ketube, Ka adolit da amear lolo aitodol ikar kere. Itodolikini rwaru ŋun adunyanut naka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio."
Isaiah9:8 Abu EJAKAIT kijukak Yakob akirot, Kodoik Isirael."
Isaiah9:9 Ejenunete ituŋa kere, Epuraim ka yeniboie koSamaria, Luinerasi kaiwoŋonut ka aninik nakotau ebe,"
Isaiah9:10 “Ebiroros amatapalin, Konye kiduki kamor nuikeitoi: Ejeparitai isukumorin, Konye kibwaikini iresia aiboisikec,”"
Isaiah9:11 Ŋes itopoloorla EJAKAIT luitokokolete Resin asurokin Ŋes, Isidiki da lukasurupoke;"
Isaiah9:12 Isurian koiŋaren, ka Ipilisitian da kokau; Erumorete Isirael kaituk naeooŋi. Karaida kiswamata ŋun kere mam ca ejoniarit akenyunyura, Konye eriŋa akekan erioro,"
Isaiah9:13 Konye mam ituŋa ibelokinos neejai ŋol lokedanyi, Kwabo mam emoenenetc EJAKAIT loka ajoresio."
Isaiah9:14 Ŋes kejepunia EJAKAIT akou ka ekori koIsirael, Atenut naka amusogot ka aladot kapaaran adiopet."
Isaiah9:15 Emojoŋ ka esot ŋes akou; Enabi da loisisianakini nukaiŋal, ŋes ekor."
Isaiah9:16 Naarai luiŋarenikinete ituŋa lu etapaasi; Ŋul da luiŋarenikinio emudiario.
Isaiah9:17 Ŋes mam isiyalamikinitor EJAKAIT ikatumunakakec, Mam da itimi ikokiokokec, ka apuserun: Naarai itisilo ŋinituŋanan, iswamai aronis, Inera ŋiniituk nukabaŋaanut. Karaida kiswamata ŋun kere, mam ca ejoniarit akenyunyura, Konye eriŋa akekan erioro."
Isaiah9:18 Naarai aronis icwei kwape kakim; Isidopori ikodokodo ka ikukwa; Eebo, inoki amonieik nuka amagoro, Iyeniyenaros kotoma okuna loepuriori."
Isaiah9:19 Kanuka anyunyura naka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio idopit akwap cut: Esubito ituŋa da bala akito nuka akim; Emamei yenitimi onaceke,"
Isaiah9:20 Ekopuni ice kakan nakoteten, eriebi eteŋei; Enyami ice kakan nakokediany komam imonikin: Enyamete kesi ŋinituŋanan akuan naka iidunyetekeŋ:"
Isaiah9:21 Manase, Epuraim; ka Epuraim, Manase: Esurokinete kesi kere Yuda, Karaida kiswamat ŋun kere, mam ca ejoniarit akenyunyura, Konye eriŋa akekan erioro."
Isaiah10:1 Itukwi ŋul luisilakinete ikisila lumam edolito, Ka ikewadikak luiwadikaete nuka aitapaar:"
Isaiah10:2 Luireŋearete lukican kotube, Luedemarete luebeito lukican lukotuŋaka, Eraunos apuserun nuŋatunakec, Ikokiok da lumejaunakec!"
Isaiah10:3 Ikwaikinete ai kapaaran naka aiticanio, Kamudiar da naebuni kama elwana? Ikerete da neejai iŋai ayuunio? Ai bo da inyeiniata akusibar?"
Isaiah10:4 Isudedeete kwap kienan, Ebirokinos kwap kalukearitai. Karaida kiswamata ŋun kere, mam ca ejoniarit akenyunyura, Konye eriŋa akekan erioro."
Isaiah10:5 ljo ba Eyasuriat, esuretait loka anyunyuraka, Ebela loka aisiopoka!"
Isaiah10:6 Ejukakini ŋes asurokin ateker naitisilo, Ecorakini ŋes asurokin ituŋa luka akanyunyura, Aiŋat luŋatuna, ameja da lumelauna, Aipudapuda kes kwape erit loka irotin."
Isaiah10:7 Konye mam elosikinit aswam kwaŋin, Eketau da mam eomit kwaŋin; Konye ejai amudiar otauke, Agelar da atekerin kwabo mere nuikidioko."
Isaiah10:8 Naarai ebala ebe, “Mam kereka eraas ikapolokoka kere ikabakan?"
Isaiah10:9 Kalino mam kereka eputosi ka Karakemis? Kamat da mam eputosi ka Arapak? Samaria da mam eputosi ka Damasiko?
Isaiah10:10 Kwape adolio akakan ajakanuto nuka aputosia, Nuejaas kaputosia nuegerer nuitelekarito ŋun nuejaas Yerusalem ka Samaria;"
Isaiah10:11 Kwape keswamakinia Samaria ka aputosiake, Mam kereka eswamakini Yerusalem kwaŋin ka aputosiake?”"
Isaiah10:12 Kosodi kanen naedaunia rwaru EJAKAIT akeswam kere komoru Sion ka Yerusalem, eticani araito nuka etau loegogoŋ loka ekabaka loka Asuria, ka aiwoŋonut naka akonyeke nueomiara."
Isaiah10:13 Naarai atema atiar, “Eswama kagogoŋ naka akakan, ka akaeoa da; Naarai arai loaeobe: Kebelok iikorun luka atekerin, Kaŋat abarakec, Abu kalem kwape emaswa ŋul luibolete koicoloŋo."
Isaiah10:14 Adum akakan abar naka atekerin kwape kakais; Ido kwape ituŋanan yenetukonokini abei nuejalitai, Atukokinit eoŋ kwape kwaŋin akwap kere: Emamei yenikibwakibwaki abebenok, Karaida yenikeooŋi aituk, karaida yenikididia.”"
Isaiah10:15 Edakakini kereka aep aluikin ŋol loejepia? Itopoloor kereka emusemen aluikin ŋol loirii ŋes? Kwape ti eriaria ebela ŋul luikiarete ŋes, Arai kwape ti etonyounia asuretait ŋin yenimam erai akitoi!"
Isaiah10:16 Kanuka ŋun ŋes ijukunia EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Adokoror mama ejaas ituŋake luketumito; Ido inokokinio aitisisiet kwap kaibusesuke Kwape aitisisiet naka akim."
Isaiah10:17 Aica naka Isirael eraun akim, Lokalaunanike da eraun aipeloret naka akim; Icwei isidopori da ikukwake Ka ikodokodoke kapaaran adiopet."
Isaiah10:18 Emudiari aibuses naka amagoroke, ka naka imanikoriake luideŋeriaete, Aijar ka akuan da; Ejaun kwape edokororaror lokadekan."
Isaiah10:19 Ikidiokoros luedeunos luka ikito luka amagoroke, Epedori ikoku aiwadik kes."
Isaiah10:20 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, mam bobo aatoŋot naka Isirael, ka ŋul da luideunos luka ekek loka Yakob egoŋakinos kaŋol kaloedanyi kes; konye egoŋakinos ka EJAKAIT, Lokalaunan loka Isirael, kabeit."
Isaiah10:21 Eboŋuni aatoŋot, aatoŋot naka Yakob, neejai Edeke Lokapedor."
Isaiah10:22 Naarai karaida kesubito ituŋakon Isirael bala asiŋe naka aŋolol, eboŋuni aatoŋot bon: inerunio amudiar, nailapara kadolit."
Isaiah10:23 Naarai itodoli EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, amudiar nainerunio, kokidiŋ kakwap kere,"
Isaiah10:24 Aso inera kwanata EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, “Wu yes ikatuŋa luibolete koSion, sirikikuriakaros Eyasuriat: karaida kiile yes kebela, ikiari esuretaiteke asurokin yes, kwape ejaar epone loko Misiri."
Isaiah10:25 Naarai eriŋa esalit apak edit noi, itodolikinio aisiop ka anyunyuraka kamudiariokec."
Isaiah10:26 Isidiki EJAKAIT loka ajoresio edaaset asurokin ŋes, kwape kearit loka Midian lokejai komoru Oreb: ejaun ekebela da kaŋolol, ikiari kwape ejaar epone loko Misiri."
Isaiah10:27 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, enyouni abwokonike kokeperikon, ajookotoke komurisinikon, emudiario da ajookot kanuka ainyonyoikin akinyet.”"
Isaiah10:28 Adolu ŋesi Aiat, atubor koMiguron; Kiŋadak abwokonike koMikimas:"
Isaiah10:29 Atuboros karidat; koperoto Geba: Kitamarana Rama; aker Gibea loka Saul.
Isaiah10:30 Kiluluk keporotokon, ijo akoku naka Galim! Kopup ijo Laisa! Koboŋok ŋes, ijo Aŋatot!"
Isaiah10:31 Aker Madumena; Etukonokinos luibolete koGebim akerit,"
Isaiah10:32 Toma apaaran na naka lolo eperi Nob: Iniŋi akekan aluikin emoru loka akoku naka Sion, Eukot loka Yerusalem."
Isaiah10:33 Koany, ibesi EJAKAIT loka ajoresio atenuna ketasuro: Ejepario lueojak, itisilio luitopolooro."
Isaiah10:34 Ejepi kasuat amonieik nuka amagoro, Ibiror Lebanon kanuka lokapedor."
Isaiah11:1 Ido elomuni alibunet katorom naka Yese, Atenut da naelomuni kaliasioke erai araito."
Isaiah11:2 Iboie Emoyo loka EJAKAIT kaŋes, Emoyo loka acoa ka ajenun, Emoyo loka ainerun ka agogoŋ, Emoyo loka aijen ka ayoŋit EJAKAIT;"
Isaiah11:3 Isiyalamikinit ayoŋit EJAKAIT. Mam etubokini kwape eanyuniata akekonye, Karaida aitoron kwape epupioto akeki:"
Isaiah11:4 Konye etubokini lukican kadolit, Itoroni kaitenara luitasonos kakwap: Inomi akwap kebela loka aitukuke, Eari ikaronon keiyeŋane loka aitukuke."
Isaiah11:5 Adolit ŋes aenet naka aŋabeteke, Amunonut da ŋes aenet naka iŋeretenyake."
Isaiah11:6 Iboie epeet kimerekek yenididi, Eperi erisa kikalol; Itaok ka ikoku yenika eŋatuny ka yenetumit nepepe; Iŋarenikini kes ikoku yenididi."
Isaiah11:7 Edakas aiteŋ ka adubu; Eperete ludidikikec nepepe: Enyami eŋatuny inya kwape kemoŋ,"
Isaiah11:8 Eboliai ikoku yenenaki kaipany naka asigirikoloŋ, Ikoku da yenejakarit ibwaikini akekan akai naka ekiriton."
Isaiah11:9 Mam isiriebete karaida amudiar koroŋataka kere lokalaunan: Naarai ilelebun akwap aijen EJAKAIT Kwape kakipi nuerapiarito aŋolol.
Isaiah11:10 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, ebwoi atorom naka Yese, araun emedera loka atekerin, emoenenete atekerin neejai ŋol; eraun akeibois naibworaria nakaibuses."
Isaiah11:11 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, eriori bobo EJAKAIT akekan irwan nakiareit ainyakunia aatoŋot naka ituŋake lukideunos, anyoun koAsuria, ka Misiri, ka Paturos, ka Kus, ka Elam, ka Sinar, ka Kamat, ka apujana da nuka aŋolol."
Isaiah11:12 Esipokini ŋesi emedera katekerin, Etukonokini luereŋetai koIsirael, Kosodi ayaŋaun luesiarisiaritai koYuda, Anyoun kagoria aoŋon nuka akwap."
Isaiah11:13 Ido edaun ekokote loka Epuraim, Emudiario da ŋul luitapasete Yuda: Mam Epuraim ikokoteikini Yuda, Yuda da mam itapasi Epuraim."
Isaiah11:14 Ekukusikinos kesi okeper loka Ipilisitian kari nakoto; Imorikikinos aiŋat idwe lukokide. Ikearete akecekanin mama ejaas Edom ka Moab; Erimarete da idwe luka Amon kes,"
Isaiah11:15 Emudiari cut EJAKAIT aŋajep naka aŋolol nako Misiri; Ido ilakilakakini akekan neejai Ecor kekekwam loitooni, Inomi ŋes araun icileta ikanykaarei, Isidokari ituŋa kookito akecekejen."
Isaiah11:16 Ejaun erot lokapolon neejai aatoŋot naka iketuŋa luideunos anyoun ko Asuria; Kwape ajaar kanuka Isirael Kapaaran nakenyounio kakwap nako Misiri.
Isaiah12:1 Kapaaran kaŋin itemari ebe, “Kemalai jo, wu EJAKAIT; Naarai karaida ibu konyunyurik eoŋ, Ebelokin akoninyunyura, Ido kitalaka eoŋ,"
Isaiah12:2 Koany, Edeke ŋes akaitajario; Amunoneno, komam akurianar: Naarai EJAKAIT YAWB ŋes akagogoŋ ka ekakosio; Ido araun ŋesi akaitajario.”"
Isaiah12:3 Kanuka ŋun ŋes iriseneneoto akipi kaiyalama kotoma atanin nuka aitajario.
Isaiah12:4 Kapaaran kaŋin itemarete ebe, “Kimalata EJAKAIT, kiwoneoto ekekiror, Kitejenikis atekerin akeswamisio, Kolimonokis ebe itopolooritai ekekiror."
Isaiah12:5 “Koyeikis EJAKAIT; naarai eswama nuka aibuses: Kojenunai ŋun kakwapin kere.
Isaiah12:6 Kibwoŋ, kikare, ijo yeniboie koSion: Naarai epol Lokalaunan loka Isirael kokidinikon.”"
Isaiah13:1 Abwokon naka Babulon nakeanyuni Isaia okoku loka Amos.
Isaiah13:2 Kosipokis emedera koroŋat lolarioŋ, Kikeseutu eporoto, kokwetut kakan, Kolomasi kesi korutei luka lukapolok."
Isaiah13:3 Ecoraki itiakunaka, Eebo, kanyarau ikatuŋa lukirigin kanuka akanyunyura, Kes lukaŋ luibwoŋas kaiturit,"
Isaiah13:4 Ecelet loka ekodet koroŋan, kwape ateker naepol! Ecelet loka aumeno naka ajakanuto nuka atekerin nuetukonokinos! Inotuni EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ajore ejie."
Isaiah13:5 Epote kakwap naelwana, Kosaŋe da loka akuj, EJAKAIT ka lujiisike lukaisiopoke, Amudiar akwap kere."
Isaiah13:6 Kibwololoto; naarai eapie apaaran naka EJAKAIT; Ebuni kwape kamudiar naebuni kama ejai Lokapedor kere.
Isaiah13:7 Ŋes ilakajanarotor akanin kere, Ipirisiar etau loka ŋinituŋanan."
Isaiah13:8 Eburuunete. Ikamuni kes ariebo ka aiturur; Eriebasi kwape aberu naidouni. Eŋolianakinos kaumokinit; Esaranete akecekonyen.
Isaiah13:9 Koany, ebuni apaaran naka EJAKAIT kadedeŋ, Kanyunyura, ka aisiop naepol; Aitaraunia akwap naiswapit, Amudiar da ikadiakanarakake kotomakeŋ."
Isaiah13:10 Naarai mam ecaunete aacer nuka akuj ka atukonokec aicakec: Itumutonorio akoloŋ elomuni, Mam elap da ecauni akeica."
Isaiah13:11 Eticani eoŋ akwap kanuka aronisike, Ka lukaronok kanuka numam adolitekec: Etapalauni aiwoŋonut naka luiturokina, Etisili da aisosolonut naka luitasuroko."
Isaiah13:12 Etarauni iluŋanan yeneciciŋ aitelekarit esabu loejok, Ituŋa luecicin aitelekarit esabu loejok loka Opir."
Isaiah13:13 Kanuka ŋun ŋes etamarania akuj, ljanijanio da akwap anyoun kaiboisike, Kotoma anyunyura naka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Kapaaran da naka akeisiop naepol."
Isaiah13:14 Kosodi kanen, kwape amori naemejao, Ido kwape kamerekekin nuemamei yenetukonokini, Ibelokinos ŋiniluŋanan aboŋun otuŋake, Ekerete kesi ŋinituŋanan bukec."
Isaiah13:15 Ieumio nin yenetakanuni; Eari ekileŋ ŋinidiopet yenekamunio.
Isaiah13:16 Idecidecio imukerunukec kakonyenekec; Eŋasio itogoikec, ebuorio akeceŋor aiteper."
Isaiah13:17 Koany, esidiki eoŋ Imedin asurokin kes, Lumam ibwaikinito itauonokec toma opuesa, Mam isiyalamikinito da esabu."
Isaiah13:18 Ebilibilete akabwaikec ikatumunak; Mam itimete aur naka akoik; Mam akecekonye itimete idwe.
Isaiah13:19 Babulon da, aibuses naka ajakanuto, Ajokis naka aiwoŋonut naka Ikaludean, Eraun kwape Sodom ka Gomora Nakemudiaria Edeke kes."
Isaiah13:20 Mam bobo ituŋanan iboienenei kotoma, Kwabo mam iboienenei anyoun katurio kiton aturio: Mam Eyarabut idukuri ŋina; Mam bobo da ikecokok ituuriakete isipaninikec kaŋina,"
Isaiah13:21 Konye eperenenete itiaŋ lukadedeŋak luka amodiŋ kaŋina; Ilelebunos ikeeetogoi itiaŋ luirurumaete; Ibolenenete ikuului kaŋina, Etacete da ikorwa kaŋina."
Isaiah13:22 Egatasi ipeen da kotogoikec luibwaitai, Ikuwei da kotogoikec luisiyalamikinete: Eapie akepak abunore, Mam akepaarasia iyatakinos."
Isaiah14:1 Naarai itimi EJAKAIT Yakob, eseuni bobo Isirael, ibwaikini kes akwapukec: imorikikini imoit kakes, iketakinos kekek loka Yakob."
Isaiah14:2 Eyaete da atekerin, kosodete ayaŋaun toma aiboisikec; ejaun ekek loka Isirael kakes kakwap naka EJAKAIT araun ibulesin ka abulesin: ijoreorete kesi ŋul luapotu kijoreosi kes; eyaete ŋul lukeroikinitos kes,"
Isaiah14:3 Kosodi kanen, kapaaran nakisibworaria EJAKAIT jo kaitururukon, ka icanikon, ka aitaaritoi kere nakitaaritere,"
Isaiah14:4 inera awaragan na aluikin ekabaka loka Babulon, itemari atiar: “Adaun ca ma ekaroikiton! Adaun ca ma ere lokesabu!"
Isaiah14:5 Abil EJAKAIT ebela loka ikaronok, Ebela lokajakanut loka ikayaitok;"
Isaiah14:6 Loadanya ituŋa kanyunyura kaidany natir, Loayaitor atekerin kaisiop, Karoikinit naemamei yenitikokinit."
Isaiah14:7 Ibworarit akwap kere, Ililiŋi: Egeunete ayoore."
Isaiah14:8 Eebo, iyalamasi iberosin kanukon, Ka iresia luka Lebanon, ebalasi ebe ‘Ameun kaitisiliokon, Emamei lokijepit sio.’"
Isaiah14:9 Iriaŋiriaŋa Okatwak kokwap kanukon Airiamakin kajo ibuni: Isidiki lukatwak kanukon, Lukapolok kere luka akwap, Itonyounit koicoloŋokec Ikabakan kere luka atekerin."
Isaiah14:10 Kes kere kiboŋokinete jo, Ebalasi ebe, ‘Ikalanyanari ijo da kwape kasio? Iput kwape kasio!"
Isaiah14:11 Ikokororitai aibusesukon kiton Okatwak, Ka aruo naka adigidigiokon; Epesikinitai ikur kwapukon, Iritan da kimukoritere."
Isaiah14:12 Ibirun ca ma kakuj, ljo Aacer naka Atupuruc, okoku loka Acilakide! Kijeparitai ca ma kiton alup, ljo loibu kitisil atekerin!"
Isaiah14:13 Ibu kiner kotaukon ebe, ‘Adokari toma akuj, Etopoloori ekaicoloŋ aitelekar aacer nuka Edeke; Ido eboikini omoru loka einos, Kosaŋe loka ari naka agolitomei:"
Isaiah14:14 Adokari kuju adepar amukurur naka idouon; Aputokin ka Je loejai kuju kakuj.’
Isaiah14:15 Konye kikokororio kiton Okatwak, Atutubeta nukokwap nuka aipany."
Isaiah14:16 Ŋul lukianyunete jo kiŋanyanakinete akonye, Kirereete jo, kobalas ebe, ‘Lopelo tope lokitamarani akwap, Lokijaŋijaŋi ajakanuto:"
Isaiah14:17 Lokitarauni akwap amodiŋ, Loketiyakini ireriake; Lomam abu koosik ienanake aboŋor bukec?’"
Isaiah14:18 Ikabakan kere luka atekerin, kes kere, Ejotooros kaibuses, Ŋolituŋanan kotogoke."
Isaiah14:19 Konye jo kicakario kailitikon kwape atenut naelaitai, Konapite lukatwak, luecumucumutai kekileŋ, Luijesaros kiton amor nuka aipany; Kwape kates naicakacakao."
Isaiah14:20 Mam imorikikini kakes kanukio, Naarai imudiar akonikwap, Iar ikonituŋa, Mam elimorio aur naka ikeswamak nueroko ikar kere."
Isaiah14:21 Kitemokisi aario naka ikedwe Kanuka numam adolit nuka lukapapakec; Tetere mam enyounete, irumete akwap, Ilelebete ireria akwap kere."
Isaiah14:22 Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, “Anyoikini eoŋ kes,” ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Abilari koBabulon ekiror ka aatoŋot, okoku ka okoku loka okoku.”"
Isaiah14:23 Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, “Etarauni airumet naka eeoc, ka ataparin nuka akipi: apiari da kigweren luka amudiar,”"
Isaiah14:24 Eyapoik EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, ebala ebe, “Abeit, kwape aomoomotor, ejaun kwaŋin; Kwape abu kenerunia, etogogoŋi kwaŋin."
Isaiah14:25 Abilari Eyasuriat kakwapuka, Ecakacakai koroŋanaka: Elemar akejookot kamakec, Abwokonike da kokeperinikec.”"
Isaiah14:26 Ŋin ŋes ainerun nainerunitai kakwap kere: Ŋin ŋes akan naerioro mama ejaas atekerin kere.
Isaiah14:27 Naarai EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ŋes inerunit, Iŋai da itapalauni? Erioro akekan, iŋai da inyakakini?"
Isaiah14:28 Kokaru loatwania ekabaka Akas kojaun abwokon na ebe:
Isaiah14:29 “Sirikiyalamikin, ijo Pilisitia kere, Naarai abila ebela lokiinomi: Naarai kotoma aliasit naka emun elomuni asigirikoloŋ, Aurike da eraun emun loesarani loeporitoi."
Isaiah14:30 Enyami yenikiyai yenika lokican, Eperi da yenilwaritoi kainapakina: Aari eoŋ aliasitikon kebeli, Eario aatoŋotokon."
Isaiah14:31 Kibwolol, ijo erut, Komony, ijo ere; Kocalar ijo Pilisitia kere; Naarai elomuni apuru kari naka agolitomei, Kwabo emamei yenepaari korioŋetakec.”"
Isaiah14:32 Aso eboŋokini biai ikiyakia luka ateker? Ebe, “Abu EJAKAIT kibwaik apetetait naka Sion, Ŋes ekuianarete luereitai luka ikeruna kotomakec.”"
Isaiah15:1 Abwokon naka Moab, Naarai kakuar adiopet komunaarai Ar loka Moab, Kitapalaunai; Naarai kakuar adiopet komunaarai Kir loka Moab, Kitapalaunai."
Isaiah15:2 Etor Bayit ka Dibon, aiboisio nuiceleleete, aibworo: Ibwololoi Moab koNebo, ko Medeba da: Kojai epata akwesikec kere, Kobarenitete ŋolipenek."
Isaiah15:3 Konapitos kesi ipukoi korotinikec: Kibwololoi ŋinituŋanan koswion luka itogoi, Kaiboisiokec nuelalak, Emonyi akiyo nuipu."
Isaiah15:4 Emonyete Kesibon ka Eleale da; Kopupos ikeceporotoi kiton Yakas: Kanuka ŋun edelorete ituŋa luka Moab luanapito luijiis; Komarani eketau kotomake.
Isaiah15:5 Emonyi ekatau kanuka Moab; Ekerete isotiake Soar, Egilat-selislya da; Naarai edokarete kaimony kaneedokarere Lukit; Naarai ilalaete nuka amudiario korot loka Koronaim."
Isaiah15:6 Naarai komunaaros akipi nuka Nimirim: Korinyosi inya, korumor amelo, Komamei da adiokiot,"
Isaiah15:7 Kanuka ŋun edakarete luedeunos kotoma luadumutu, Luapotu kikuniatos, Aguurut naka ikito."
Isaiah15:8 Naarai ikaikina aimony koikoruno luka Moab; Aibwololoke kiton Egilaim, Aibwololoke da kiton Beer-elim."
Isaiah15:9 Naarai ileleba akipi nuka Dimon aokot: Naarai eyatakini bobo eoŋ ayaun ace koDimon, Eŋatuny abunokin ŋin yenekui yenika Moab, Abunokin da luedeunos."
Isaiah16:1 Kiiukakisi yesi ekayaiton loka akwap idwe luka imerekekin Anyoun koSela loitei amodiŋ, Kiton moru loka akoku naka Sion."
Isaiah16:2 Naarai kwape akweny nueturiatos, Kwape isiarisiarunotor kotoma akaisikec, Ikote nen adwe nuka Moab Kodoketa luka Arunon."
Isaiah16:3 Kopet akiro, kitodol etube; Kituput etoribekon kwape loka akuar kidiŋ paaran: Kitoŋop luereŋearitai; Siribeliana kama ejai yenipasitoi."
Isaiah16:4 Konupak lukaŋ luereŋearitai aiboienen kajo; Moab da, korau ijo aigalisitike kakonyen nuka ekaŋatan: Naarai eoliori ekamwanan, Enaŋi aiŋat, Emudiaros ikepudak kakwap."
Isaiah16:5 Iticasio eicoloŋ loka ajakanut kaitim, Iboikin ediopet kabeit kowema loka Daudi; Etubonokini, emoi etube, Isunyit aswam adolit,"
Isaiah16:6 Kipupu eitur loka Moab, ebe eturokin noi; Aiwoŋonutuke, eiturike, ka anyunyurake da; Erai ailabilabake naatai."
Isaiah16:7 Kanuka ŋun ibwololoi Moab kanuka Moab, Ibwololoi ŋinituŋanan kere: Imonyete yesi imugatin luka emusabibu luka Kir-kareset, Kinomitai noi."
Isaiah16:8 Akalanyakata imanikoria luka Kesibon, Ka emusabibu loka Sibima; Apotu ijaka luka atekerin kobilibilata iraanake luetelekarito kajokis; Kodoloto Yaser, eturiatos kamodiŋ; Apesito atenunake, kilamaros kaŋolol,"
Isaiah16:9 Kanuka ŋun kimori eoŋ aimony akiyo kaimony naka Yaser Emusabibu loka Sibima: Ecocoi jo kakiyoka, Wu Kesibon, ka Eleale: Naarai kedolok eibwoŋ loka ejie araitokon ka aisakakon."
Isaiah16:10 Elemaritai aiyalama, ka ailel komanikor loideŋeriat; Emameun ayoore komanikoria luka emusabibu, Karaida ekare loka aiyalama: Emameun yenicakacakai imusabibun kacuesia; Esililiŋ eoŋ eibwoŋ loka aisak."
Isaiah16:11 Ŋes eruor ekatau kwape kadeudeu kanuka Moab, Atutubetaka nukotoma da kanuka Kir-keres."
Isaiah16:12 Kosodi kanen, nakitodiaror Moab, kopasak aibois naicelelei, kobuni do aiboisike nakalaunan ailip, mam ŋes ipikori,"
Isaiah16:13 Ŋin ŋes akirot naabu EJAKAIT kolim kolo nuka Moab.
Isaiah16:14 Konye kwana ener EJAKAIT ebe, “Eroko ketuboro ikar iuni, kwape ikar luka ŋol kaloiswamai eropit, kitisilio aibuses naka Moab kekodeteke kere loepol; luasalitos da luikidioko cut, komam kepodoi araut ibore cut.”"
Isaiah17:1 Abwokon naka Damasiko. Koany, mam bobo Damasiko eraun ere, Konye eraun ameje,"
Isaiah17:2 Kesiliokoto ireria luka Aroer: Eraunos luka isipanin, lueuriakete, Komam yenitukuriani kes."
Isaiah17:3 Iner EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, Eoliori da etogo loegogoŋ koEpuraim, Eoliori da ajakanut koDamasiko, Ka luideunos koSuria; Esubete bala aibuses naka idwe luka Isirael."
Isaiah17:4 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaya, Iŋoŋari aibuses naka Yakob, Esenyi da abures naka akuanake."
Isaiah17:5 Ikoni kwape naetukonokinia ekasakan akima nuebwoete. Esaki da akekan aluŋuren; Ecbo, ikoni kwape nairaria ituŋanan aluŋuren Kaditot naka Repaim."
Isaiah17:6 Inera EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, Konye do ideunos lueleleŋio, Kwape ijaŋijaŋia eseituni araito aarei arai auni katenu naisididiara, Aoŋon arai akany katenuna nuelaanakina nuka ekitoi loideŋeriat,"
Isaiah17:7 Kapaaran kaya eseseni etuŋanan Lokasubanike, iteete akekonye Lokalaunan loka Isirael."
Isaiah17:8 Mam eseseni itemwan, aswamisio nuka akaninike, mam da itei ŋin naeswamato ibokoroke, karaida Aserim, karaida aputosia nuka akoloŋ."
Isaiah17:9 Kapaaran kaya ikote ireriake luegogoŋ kwape aiboisio nuesiliok kamonieik ido kaidi naka eroŋat, nuesiliok kakonycn nuka idwe luka Isirael: eraun asilio."
Isaiah17:10 Naarai kimurwok Edeke loka aitajariokon, Kwabo mam iitunit Atiiba naka agogoŋukon; Kanuka ŋun irai iraan luitojokitai, Irai da lutubununo lumo:"
Isaiah17:11 Kapaaran nairaia ijo ibwauni, Tupuruc da isilibuni ekonikinyomit; Konye ilicar aisak, Kapaaran naka akadakin ka aburunit naepol."
Isaiah17:12 Wu okwe, aiumuumo naka ituŋa luipu, Luirurumaete kwape airuruma naka aŋololin; Akalele naka atekerin nueleleete kwape alel naka akipi nuegogoŋ!"
Isaiah17:13 Eleleete atekerin kwape alel naka akipi nuipu: Konye iretakini ŋesi kes isidisidiaros, Erukitere kwape agugu nuka iroŋan kakonyen nuka ekwam, Ido kwape apua naiyeŋiyenitoi kakonyen nuka etapipirio,"
Isaiah17:14 Atiboŋ, koany, etasuro; Koriŋa iwalara, emameete, Ŋin ŋes akorakinetekee lukiŋasete oni, Naebeit ŋul lukiruruete oni."
Isaiah18:1 Wu okwe, akwap naka abebenoka nuipukupukos, Naejai okekwa kicorin luka Etiopia:"
Isaiah18:2 Naijukari ikiyakia aitor aŋolol, Toma atakerin nuka aladoi ebe, Koloto, yes ikiyakia luitiroko, Mama ejai ateker naeojak ituŋa luerurut da, Ateker nasogim ameun kageunetekee kiton kwana; Ateker naekorokoroi naipudapudai, Naetiakito icorin akwapukec!"
Isaiah18:3 Yes kere luibolete kakwapin, Ka yes da luidukurete kakwap, Naikeikinia emedera koronan, kosesenete yesi; Naekutakinere arupepe, kopuputu yesi."
Isaiah18:4 Naarai kabala EJAKAIT eoŋ kwanata ebe, “Apaluni eoŋ, aseseni ajai aiboisika naeboio; Kwape aibuse naipiororoi kocai akoloŋ, Kwape elisina loka akopyo kaibuse naka aisak.”"
Isaiah18:5 Naarai eriŋa aisak kedoluno, kerinyosi atur, Eluoros atur imusabibun luimomwotos, Kotubutubei ŋesi luitocete kicilikikin lukidimet, Atenuna da nuepesitos ejepari ŋesi, elemari da."
Isaiah18:6 Ejalakinitai kere akweny nueurupitos nuka iroŋan, Ka itiaŋ da luka akwap, Toma aiporo enyamenenete akweny nueurupitos, Toma akamu da enyamenenete itiaŋ kere luka akwap."
Isaiah18:7 Kapak kaŋipe kaŋin einunio EJAKAIT loka ajoresio Ainakinet naka ituŋa lueojak luerurut da, Ateker nasogim ameun kageunetekec kiton kwana; Ateker naekorokoroi naipudapudai, Naetiakito icorin akwapukec, toma aibois naka ekiror loka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, moru Sion."
Isaiah19:1 Abwokon naka Misiri. Koany, ibwanenit EJAKAIT edou loetirono, Kodoluni Misiri; Emaranete aputosia nuka Misiri kakonyeneke, Eburuni etau loka Misiri kokidiŋike,"
Isaiah19:2 Esidiki eoŋ Imisirian asurokin Imisirian: Ejiikinos da ŋinituŋanan konaeeke, Ejiikinos da ŋinituŋanan kekeidunyet; Ejiikini ere kere, Ajakanut da kajakanut."
Isaiah19:3 Ikokoorio emoyo loka Misiri kokidiŋike, Etapaluni eoŋ ainerunikec: Emoete neejaas aputosia, ido mama ejaas imurwok, Ka ŋul luejaas ajokina, ka ikacudak da,"
Isaiah19:4 Ebala EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, Ejaikini eoŋ Imisirian akan naka ejakait loibworit, Koyaite kes ekabaka loededeŋ."
Isaiah19:5 Eonikinete akip kaŋolol, Idiumumaar ecor eoni de."
Isaiah19:6 Ewurunete icorin tulutul; Idianaros icileta luka Misiri eokete da; Erinyorete isegei ka aladoi.
Isaiah19:7 Eonikini erony loidunyas ka Nile, Ariri naka Nile, Eokete da kere lueyeiyo kariri naka Nile, Ireŋearitai, emamuunete cut."
Isaiah19:8 Ekuudianete da ikekamak, Ibworos rwaru ŋul kere luecakanakinete igolun Nile, Ekalanyakaros ŋul luepesete iboyan kakipi."
Isaiah19:9 Ido bobo da irumete ileic ŋul luitwasamaete abirai nuikisitai, Ka ŋul da luewojiete egoe loekwaŋ."
Isaiah19:10 Ebilibilunos ipirinoke, Ekadakinete ŋul kere luiswamaete eropit."
Isaiah19:11 Abaŋaakata cut ikapolok luka Soan; Ainerun naka ikenerunak lukacoa luka Parao araun bala naka itiaŋ: Ikwaikinete ai itemarete Parao atiar, “Arai eoŋ okoku loka lokacoa, Okoku loka ikabakan lukarioŋa”?"
Isaiah19:12 Alu bo teni ikonituŋa lukacoa? Kolimokis cani kesi jo kwana; Kojenutu kesi nuelosikinit EJAKAIT loka ajoresio koMisiri.
Isaiah19:13 Aluoros ikapolok luka Soan ibaŋiok, Emoditai ikapolok luka Nop; Apotu ŋul lueraas amoru nuka agoria nuka atekerinike Kitapaasi Misiri."
Isaiah19:14 Enyalaki EJAKAIT emoyo loka aijerukanut tomake: Esigetaasi Misiri kaŋiniswam kere, Kwape igetakinor lokameran alekanake."
Isaiah19:15 Emameuni da Misiri adioswam kere naepedori akou, arai ekori, Atenut naka amusogot, karaida aladot aswam."
Isaiah19:16 Kapaaran kaya esubi Misiri kwape kaŋor: emarani ekurianari kanuka aijaŋijaŋ naka akan naka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, naijaŋijaŋakini ŋes,"
Isaiah19:17 Eluor akwap naka Yuda naketasuro koMisiri, ekurianari ŋinituŋanan yenepupuni nukeŋ, kanuka alosikinit naka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, naelosikinit ŋeasi asurokin."
Isaiah19:18 Kapaaran kaya ejaunos ireria ikany kakwap nako Misiri luineras aŋajep naka Kanaan, luiyapoikinete EJAKAIT loka ajoresio; komaikinai ediopet ebe Ere loka amudiario."
Isaiah19:19 Kapaaran kaya ejaun etem loka EJAKAIT kidiŋ kakwap nako Misiri, ido epiri loka EJAKAIT koikoruke."
Isaiah19:20 Eraun ŋesi aanyunet, ido ekaienan mama ejai EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kakwap nako Misiri: naarai emonyakinete EJAKAIT kanuka ikamwaŋak, iyakikini ŋesi eketajaran, ekegalikinon, eyuuni kes."
Isaiah19:21 Ejenunio EJAKAIT koMisiri, ejenunete Imisirian EJAKAIT kapaaran kaya; eebo, emaete ŋes kainakin asuban ka ainakineta, iyapoikinete da EJAKAIT aiyaposit, ido itodolete."
Isaiah19:22 Inomi EJAKAIT Misiri, kinomite ka aitaŋaleun da; eboŋunete mama ejai EJAKAIT, iirari ŋesi aiŋaiŋakec, itaŋaleuni kes."
Isaiah19:23 Kapaaran kaya ejaun erot lokapolon anyoun koMisiri kiton Asuria, elomari Eyasuriat Misiri, Emisiriat da elomari Asuria; emaete Imisirian nepepe ka Iyasurian."
Isaiah19:24 Kapaaran kaya iuniikini Isirael Misiri ka Asuria, eraunete arereŋ kokidiŋ kakwap:"
Isaiah19:25 naarai abu EJAKAIT kisirereg kes, kobala ebe, “Isireregitoi Misiri ikatuŋa, ka Asuria aswam naka akakanin, ka Isirael da airumeteka.”"
Isaiah20:1 Kokaru loabu Taratan kobunokinia Asudod, nakiyakiaria Sarugon ekabaka loka Asuria ŋes, kitiji Asudod koyaŋa;"
Isaiah20:2 kapak kaŋin kiner EJAKAIT kama ka Isaia okoku loka Amos ebe, “Kolot, kolaca epuko loinapit kaŋabetekon, kolaea da amuk kakejekon.” Kiswama kwaŋin, kosakasak imujalal, komam enapit idiobore kakejeke."
Isaiah20:3 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Kwape kesakasakator Isaia ekakejaanakinan kimujalal, komam enapit idiobore kakejeke ikar iuni araun aanyunet ka nakaumokin koMisiri ka Etiopia da;"
Isaiah20:4 kwape kwaŋin emearia ekabaka loka Asuria luijoreoritai koMisiri, ka luereŋearitai koEtiopia, ludidik ka lumoion, kimuialalas, komam enapitos idiobore kakejekec, komam erapap iwoos, aisurum Misiri ileic."
Isaiah20:5 Eburunete, irumete ileje, kanuka Etiopia amunokee, ka Misiti aibusesukec."
Isaiah20:6 Kapaaran kaya ineras luibolete kariri naka aŋolol na ebe, ‘Koany, ikoni nen amunowok, nekipou kakeriasi aisigalikinio tetere kiyuunio kama ejai ekabaka loka Asuria: ka oni da, kikwaikini ai kikui?’”"
Isaiah21:1 Abwokon naka amodiŋ naka aŋolol. Kwape ekutaror itapipirion kari naka Eŋalakimak, Elomuni kamodiŋ kakwap nasogim."
Isaiah21:2 Kalimokin eoŋ aitapoet naetiono; Ekamodan emodomodoi, ekaŋatan da eŋasi. Kodoka, ijo Elam; kirigau, ijo Media; Esililiŋi eoŋ eidinyike kere,"
Isaiah21:3 Kanuka ŋun ileleba aŋabeteka ariebo, Kekamut aayoi kwape aayoi nuka aberu naidouni: Ketipipilata komam apedori akiirar; Kaburunit komam apedori aanyun."
Isaiah21:4 Iyeŋiyeŋa ekatau, ketukurianata nusogim; Eloeokin akamukat naabu kemiela araun amaran kama ajai."
Isaiah21:5 Itemonokinete kesi emesa, epesete imukekan, Enyamete, emasete da. Konyoutu, yes ikapolok, Kinyonyoata ebuku akinyet."
Isaiah21:6 Naarai kabala EJAKAIT eoŋ kwanata ebe, “Kolot, kibwaik ekedaran; Kolimo ŋeasi nueanyuni:"
Isaiah21:7 Naeanyunia ŋesi erioŋet loka ikebwanenok luelosete iareiarei, Erioŋet loka asigiria, erioŋet loka akaalai, Kodunyak ŋesi noi aipup.”"
Isaiah21:8 Kikuna kwape eŋatuny ebe, “Wu EJAKAIT, abwoenenei tiritir kokuju kaiteis paaran, Kebwaanakinio kaiboisika akuaresia kere."
Isaiah21:9 Ido koany, ebunit erioŋet loka ituŋa, Ikebwanenok luelosete iareiarei.” Koboŋok kobala ebe, “Ebiror Babulon, ebiror; Abilibilunos aputosia kere nuegerer nuka idekesioke kiton akwap.”"
Isaiah21:10 Wu jo, naieomomoka, ido alosika naepietet: Abu kalimok jo nuabu keira kama ejai EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael."
Isaiah21:11 Abwokon naka Duma. Ejai yenikeworoi eoŋ koSeir ebe, “Ekedaran, anyoika nuka akuar? Ekedaran, anyoika nuka akuar?”"
Isaiah21:12 Koboŋok ekedaran ebe, “Ebunit apaaran, ido akuare da; Arai ikotosi aiŋitun, kiŋita: Koboŋutu bobo.”"
Isaiah21:13 Abwokon naka Arabia. Iperete yesi ais naka Arabia, Yes luidiaete luka Idedanin."
Isaiah21:14 Koinasi akipi ŋin yenajakit akure: Apotu lueboiete kakwap naka Tema kisiriamasi luakerete Ka aijaikin da kes ikecenyamat,"
Isaiah21:15 Naarai kekerete kesi kokileŋa, Kokileŋa lueutunitoi, akabwai nuikesitai, Kanuka awuruun naka ejie."
Isaiah21:16 Naarai kabala EJAKAIT eoŋ kwanata ebe, “Eriŋa ekaru ketuboro, kwape ejaatar ikar luka ekeswaman eropit, eoliori aibuses kere naka Kedar:"
Isaiah21:17 ikidiokoros luideunos da kotiai loka ikeketak akabwai, ituŋa lukirigin luka idwe luka Kedar: naarai ener EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael.”"
Isaiah22:1 Abwokon naka aditot naka aitapoet. Anyoika bo ŋun, idokar ijo cut Oswion luka itogoi?"
Isaiah22:2 Wu jo loileleba eibwoŋ, Ere lokecelet, ere lokcicur; Mam luaaranakon eario kekileŋ, Kwabo mam etwakito koile,"
Isaiah22:3 Akerata ikayaitokokon nepepe, Apotu ikeketak akabwai koenata kes: Kere lukedumakinio mamakon aponi koenai nepepe, Apeata neelwana."
Isaiah22:4 Kanuka ŋun katema atiar, “Sirikiteete eoŋ, kamony noi akiyo; Siritaaritos aipudun eoŋ, Naarai enataritai akoku naka ikatuŋa.”"
Isaiah22:5 Naarai ebunit apaaran naka aburun, Naka aipudapud, naka abuonokin da, Kama ejai EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Kaditot naka aitapoet: Aitakitak arwatatin, amonyakin iroŋan,"
Isaiah22:6 Arwa Elam akuraru, Ejaas kagalin nuka ituŋa ka ikebwanenok; Apuko Kir ebuku,"
Isaiah22:7 Kosodi kanen, ileleba aditonokon nuejok agalin, Kiderakinos ikebwanenok orute."
Isaiah22:8 Kolaca arapetait naka Yuda. Ibu kosesen kapaaran kaŋin lujiis lukotogo loka amagoro.
Isaiah22:9 Ipotu koanyutu arorwaitin nukore loka Daudi; ipotu kotukonokis akipi nuka atapar naijesara.
Isaiah22:10 Ipotu kimarata itogoi luka Yerusalem, kotiyatiyata itogoi anwokia arwatat."
Isaiah22:11 Ipotu kobokata atapar kidiŋ karwatatin aarei kanuka akipi nuka atapar namojoŋ: konye mam ipotu kosesenata ŋol lokesubi ŋun, karaida aanyun akonyen nuka ŋol kalokolo kiswamai ŋun."
Isaiah22:12 Kapaaran kaya abu EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Konyarau ituŋa aimony, ka aibworo, Ka abareno, ka anapit da ipukoi:"
Isaiah22:13 Ido koany, aiyalama ka ailel, Aiar imoŋin ka aipu imerekekin, Ainyam akiriŋ, ka aimat ebino. “Mere kanyama, kamata da, Naarai kitwaki moi.”"
Isaiah22:14 Kikujokin EJAKAIT loka ajoresio akiika, Ebala EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, “Abeit mam kilucio yes numam adolit nu Aitodol neitwakiata.”"
Isaiah22:15 Inera EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kwanata ebe, “Ape, kolot mama ejai ekeŋadan ŋol, ŋes Sebuna, loepolokinit etogo, kiner ebe,"
Isaiah22:16 Iswamai inyo kane? Iŋai da ijaatar ijo ne, tape ibokit ailit ne? Ibokikinit ailit kuju, aikeikin aibois atiiba!"
Isaiah22:17 Koany, kirutari EJAKAIT jo kagogoŋ, ijo lokagogoŋ: eebo, kilidi ŋesi jo ba ba."
Isaiah22:18 Abeit kiiliili jo ka acakar da kwape emupira akwap naelal; itwanikini nina, ŋina da ejaunos agalinikon nukaibuses, ijo ileic luka etogo loka eiakaitikon,"
Isaiah22:19 Kerenei eoŋ jo kaswamukon, kidemario apoloukon."
Isaiah22:20 Kosodi kanen, kapaaran kaya anyarauni eoŋ ekakeiaanakinan Eliakim okoku loka Kilikia:"
Isaiah22:21 etanapi eoŋ ŋes ekonikaso, etogogoŋi ŋes karokobakon, ejaikini ayaitekon akanike; eluori ŋesi papa loka luibojete koYerusalem, loka ekekloka Yuda da."
Isaiah22:22 Esirioni eoŋ elacetait loka ekek loka Daudi kokeperike; eŋaari ŋesi, emameuni da loegoli; egoli ŋesi, emameuni da loeŋaari,"
Isaiah22:23 Esikakini ŋes kwape kekweru aibois naicasit; eraun ŋesi eicoloŋ loka aibuses kokek loka papake.
Isaiah22:24 Ikajakinete kesi kamake aibuses kere naka ekek loka papake, aur ka luetupanakinete, ŋinibore kere yenedit, ameun kaiwokito aitodol akaalakanya."
Isaiah22:25 Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, kapaaran kaya, ilokulokun ekweru loisikakinitai aibois naicasit; ejepio, ibiror, emudiario da luebwokit ŋesi; naarai ener EJAKAIT.”"
Isaiah23:1 Abwokon naka Turo. Kibwololoto, yes ameerin nuka Tarusis; Naarai eswap, ŋes emamea etogo, emamea neelomaret. Epukoritai kakwap naka Kitim."
Isaiah23:2 Kililiŋata, yes luibolete kapujan; Yes luapotu ikagwelanarak luka Sidon, Luekwaŋanaros kaŋolol, kisilelebata."
Isaiah23:3 Kakipi nuipu, ikinyom luka Sikor, Aisak naka Nile, ŋes esoloke; Kerai ŋesi agwelanaret naka atekerin."
Isaiah23:4 Kiruma jo ileic, wu Sidon, naarai ener aŋolol, Ere loegogoŋ loka aŋolol, ebe, “Mam eoŋ kariebit aidoun, karaida aidoun, Mam etanit ikatumunak, karaida aisa abekon.”"
Isaiah23:5 Naedolioto iemuto Misiri, Ekadakinete kesi iemuto luka Turo."
Isaiah23:6 Kotuboros koloto Tarusis; Kibwololoto, yes luibolete kapujan,"
Isaiah23:7 Erai teni lo erekus lokeicur, Lomojoŋ ageun kolo kasonya, Loatapit akejeke ayaŋanar ŋes Aiboioror kama elwana?"
Isaiah23:8 Iŋai bo alosikinit ŋun koTuro, Ekakoran abokoi, Ikagwelanarakake eraas ikapolok, Luisiecanarete da eraas isotia luka akwap?"
Isaiah23:9 EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ŋes alosikinit, Aitisilior aiwoŋonut naka aibuses kere, Aisimen isotia kere luka akwap,"
Isaiah23:10 Kilapar akwapukon kwape Nile, ljo akoku naka Tarusis; Emamei bobo aitikokinet."
Isaiah23:11 Abu ŋesi kikeu akekan aŋolol, Kijaŋijaŋ ajakanuto: Ecoraki EJAKAIT nuka Kanaan Amudiar aiboisioke nuegogoŋ,"
Isaiah23:12 Kotema atiar: “Mam bobo ileli, ijo akoku nabekot naemwaŋitai naka Sidon: Konyou, kotubor Kitim; ŋina da mam ibworari.”"
Isaiah23:13 Koany, akwap naka Ikaludean; ateker na mam bobo ejai; ainakis Iyasurian araun naka Itiaŋ luka amodiŋ: kosipokis itutiokec, kotiyakis itogoikee lukapolok; kitaraut amejei,"
Isaiah23:14 Kibwololoto, yes ameerin nuka Tarusis; Naarai eswap aiboisikon naegogoŋ."
Isaiah23:15 Kosodi kanen, kapaaran kaŋin, imurwokinio Turo ikar akaisakanykaarei, kwape ejaatar apaarasia nuka ekabaka ediopet: akaulo naka ikar akaisakanykaarei ikwaikini Turo kwape ejaar ekosio loka naadote ebe:"
Isaiah23:16 “Kirum adeudeu, kirimirim ere, ljo naadote naimurwokinitai; Koram ejok, koye ikososio luipu, Tetere kiitunio.”"
Isaiah23:17 Kosodi kanen akaulo naka ikar akaisakanykaarei eanyanari EJAKAIT Turo, eboŋori ŋesi oropitike, iteeloi ajakanuto kere nuka akwap kere."
Isaiah23:18 Eraunos lugwelanake ka eropitike lukalaunak kama ejai EJAKAIT: mam kiŋadakinio karaida aidiasio; naarai eraunos lugwelanake luka ŋul kaluiboienenete kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, ainyam luedaunete, ainap da luibusak."
Isaiah24:1 Koany, ikokoori EJAKAIT akwap, itwasapi, ebuburiari, Itisiarikini da lulbojete kotoma,"
Isaiah24:2 Ido ikote nen, kwape ejauniata ituŋa, ikoni nen esasedoti da; Kwape ejaunia ebulesit, ikoni nen ejakaitike da; Kwape ejaunia akejaanakinan, ikoni nen ajakaitike da; Kwape ejaunia ekagwelunan, ikoni nen ekagwelaran da; Kwape ejaunia ekayuunan, ikoni nen eyuuna da; Kwape ejaunia ekejaikinan kanuka ameda, ikoni nen ekejaaran kanuka ameda da."
Isaiah24:3 Itisilio akwap lio, eŋatario da cut; Naarai ener EJAKAIT akirot ŋin."
Isaiah24:4 Ibworos alup eoliorete da, Ekalanyanar akwap eoliori da, Ekalanyakaros lukapolok luka akwap."
Isaiah24:5 Emunar da akwap kama ejaas luibolete kotoma; Naarai abilata ikisila, elocokis aicorakinet, Abilata aitutuket namam edaun."
Isaiah24:6 Kanuka ŋun apia ekenit akwap, Egwaunitos luibolete kotoma akirot: Kanuka ŋun ameo akim luibolete kotoma akwap, Asalata ituŋa luikidioko."
Isaiah24:7 Ibworoi ebino lowinyiwiny, Ekalanyanar emusabibu, Idinyasi luelakara kotauon kere."
Isaiah24:8 Iŋoŋoor ailel naka isiman, Ililiŋi ecelet loka ŋul kaluibwoŋas, Edaun aiyalama naka adeudeu."
Isaiah24:9 Mam emasete ebino kikosiete; Edwarikinete nuitemerete ŋul luemasete.
Isaiah24:10 Etiyakin ere loka ainyalinyal: Egolol ŋolitogo kinyek ituŋanan alomar.
Isaiah24:11 Ejai aimony korotin kanuka ebino; Itumutonorio ailel kere, Ilicar akiena kere naka akwap,"
Isaiah24:12 Esali asilio bon kore, Inomonomoo ekek ka amudiar."
Isaiah24:13 Naarai ikoni nen kokidiŋ kakwap mama ejaas ituŋa, Kwape ijaŋijaŋia eseituni, Kwape nueleleŋio nuka emusabibu kedaun aisak."
Isaiah24:14 Ikearete ŋul ikeceporotoi, ibwoŋas; Iworooete ejaas aŋolol kanuka apolou naka EJAKAIT."
Isaiah24:15 Aso kitopolosi yesi EJAKAIT kokide, Ekiror loka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, Kapuiana nuka aŋolol,"
Isaiah24:16 Kipou kapuput ikososio luapote kosaŋeta luka akwap, Aibuses mama ejaas ikadolitok Konye kabala ebe, “Edokororiari, Edokororiari, itukwi eoŋ! Eswamata ikamodak nukamodomod; Eebo, eswamata ikamodak nukamodomod cut.”"
Isaiah24:17 Akurian, ka aipany, ka atacit ejaas mamakon, ljo loiboie kakwap."
Isaiah24:18 Kosodi kanen, ŋol loekeri ecelet loka akurian ibirokin aipany; Ŋol da loelomuni kokidiŋ kaipany ipoki atacit; Naarai eŋaaritai apedon nukokuju, Ijaŋijaŋas apeteta nuka akwap."
Isaiah24:19 Ebilil akwap mweny, Ebaunit akwap demedem, Ijaŋijaŋa akwap noi."
Isaiah24:20 Igetanar akwap kwape ekameran, Ijaŋijaŋa epuai kepuai kwape eidukuru; Elaŋirikini ŋes aijerukanutuke, Ibirori, mam bobo enyouni."
Isaiah24:21 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin iticani EJAKAIT ajore naka lukapolok lukokuju, Ikabakan da luka akwap kakwap."
Isaiah24:22 Etukonokinio kes, kwape etukonokinere ienan kaipany, Egolokinio kaidaris, Akaulo naka apaarasia nuipu, iticanio."
Isaiah24:23 Kosodi konyet elap aitirir, Kiruma akoloŋ ileic; Naarai irumi EJAKAIT loka ajoresio komoru Sion, ka Yerusalem, Ejaun da aibuses kakonyen nuka imakioke."
Isaiah25:1 Wu EJAKAIT, ijoŋ Ekadeke; Ketopoloonori jo, eturenenei ekonikiror; Naarai iswama nukaumokin, Nuibu kiner sek, kotoma amunonut ka abeit."
Isaiah25:2 Naarai ituluo ere aapoŋor; Ere loabwaa ituluo ameje; Etogo lopeti loka imo mam bobo erai ere; Mam bobo edukio cut.
Isaiah25:3 Ŋes kitopolooriata jo ituŋa lukagogoŋ, Kiyoŋl rwaru ere loka atekerin nuka etasuro."
Isaiah25:4 Naarai ibu korai aŋopis naka yenikibakor; Aŋopis naka yenilwaritoi kotoma aburunit, Nemecat akako, etolim lomecat aibuse, Naesubia airurum naka luketasuro bala akako naidesi arwatat."
Isaiah25:5 Isiyamikini rwaru ecelet loka imo, Kwape aibuse naejai aibois naconit; Kwape itililimio etoribe loka edou amwanis, Isililiŋi kwaŋin rwaru ekosio loka kaluketasuro."
Isaiah25:6 Koroŋat kalo da, ipoikini rwaru EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ituŋasinei epucit loka kaluetarioko, epuoit loka ebino loedwar, loka kaluetarioko luileleba asume, loka ebino Ioedwar loijililitai jokan."
Isaiah25:7 Ido itamameuni cut koroŋat kalo arapet naerapit akonye nuka ituŋasinei, ka arapet naimukotor atekerin kere."
Isaiah25:8 Abu kiliko eut atwanare apaarasia kere: emwatari rwaru EJAKAIT Edeke akiyo kakonye kere; ido elemari amorosit naka iketuŋa kakwapisinei kere: naarai ener EJAKAIT.
Isaiah25:9 Aso kapaaran kaya inerio rwaru atiar, “Koany lo ŋes Edekewok; kipou kedarito ŋes, kiyuuni oni: lo ŋes EJAKAIT; kipou kedarito ŋes, kiyalamikin oni kebwoŋakis aitajarake.”"
Isaiah25:10 Naarai idokokin akan naka EJAKAIT oroŋat lo, icakacakao Moab kaiboisike, kwape icakacakaere ariaŋ kotoma akipi nuka etut."
Isaiah25:11 Erionori ŋesi akekanin kokidinike, kwape erionoria loidui aidu: itisili aiwoŋonutuke nepepe kapirianut naka akaninike."
Isaiah25:12 Etiyaikin aigalioret naeoja naka arwatatinikon, ibirokin, itodolikinit alup, aitodol apua."
Isaiah26:1 Kapaaran kaya eyeio ekosio lo kakwap naka Yuda ebe: “Ejai oni ere loegogoŋ; Ibwaikini ŋesi aitajario araun arwatatin ka aigalioreta.
Isaiah26:2 Koŋaasi yesi irutei, Tetere ateker naedolit naericit abeit elomari."
Isaiah26:3 Iricenenei ijo kainapakin ainapakin, Etau Ioegoŋakina mamakon: Naarai kimunonena jo,"
Isaiah26:4 Komunonenas yesi EJAKAIT ikar kere: Naarai erai EJAKAIT YAWE atiiba namam edaun.
Isaiah26:5 Naarai abu ŋesi kitisil ŋul luibojete kokuju, ere loicelelei: Etisil, etisil kiton alup; Etodol apua."
Isaiah26:6 Ipudapudai akeju; Akeje nuka lukican, Alosito nuka luilwaritos.”"
Isaiah26:7 Iiyaiyakina erot loka ikadolitok: Iiyaiyakini ijo erot loka ikadolitok.
Isaiah26:8 Eebo, kipou kedarito jo, wu EJAKAIT, Korot loka itubesiakon; Imielas ikositauon ekonikiror ka aiitunetekon."
Isaiah26:9 Kemiela jo kekatau kuare; Eebo, edunyakinit ekamoyo loejai kotomaka amoot jo; Naarai arai ejaas ikonitubesia kakwap, Isisiaunete luiboiete kakwap adolit."
Isaiah26:10 Karaida kitodikin yenikaronon asianut, Mam cut isisiauni adolit; Kakwap naka atenit iswamai nukaronok, Eŋeri asesen apolou naka EJAKAIT."
Isaiah26:11 Wu EJAKAIT, ikiara akonikan, Konye mam kes eanyunito: Konye eanyunete adunyanutukon mama ejaas ituŋa, irumete ileijc; Eebo, idopori akim lukasurupokon."
Isaiah26:12 EJAKAIT, icorakini ijo ainapakin mamakosi: Naarai kiswamak da akosiswamisio kere."
Isaiah26:13 Wu EJAKAIT Ekosideke, Apotu icejaka koyaito sio netikiyaitor ijo bon; Konye kanukon bon ŋes kilimoria ekonikiror."
Isaiah26:14 Atwaka kesi, mam ejarete; Aoliosi, mam ejarunete: Kanuka ŋun ibu koanyana kes komudia kes, Komwat aiitunetekec kere."
Isaiah26:15 Ibu kiyatak ateker, wu EJAKAIT, Ibu kiyatak ateker: kitopoloor: Italalaa iikorun kere luka akwap."
Isaiah26:16 EJAKAIT, naajaatar ocan apotu komootos jo, Kobukosi ailip nakilecoria ijo kes."
Isaiah26:17 Kwape aberu naepotiei, Nacapiaria apakike naka aidoun, Erieba emonyi karieboke; Kikoni isio nen kakonyenekon, wu EJAKAIT."
Isaiah26:18 Kipou kapotuut, kariebas, Kasubito bala kipou kedout ekwam; Mam kiswamat adiokiyuun kakwap; Mam luibolete kakwap edoo."
Isaiah26:19 Ejarete lukatwakakon; enyounete awatekec nukatwak. Kokwenyutu, koyooto, yes luibolete kapua! Naarai akopyokon esubito bala akopyo nuka aica, Elekunete alup lukatwak."
Isaiah26:20 Kopotu, ikatuŋa, kolomasi agolaikus, Kogolokis ikiriginikus: Koŋopata nediokasilon, Aitodol naetuboror anyunyura."
Isaiah26:21 Naarai, koany, elomuni EJAKAIT kaiboisike Aitepesen luibolete kakwap numam adolitekec: Ikuiunete alup da akeceokot, Mam bobo eraparete lukatwakakec."
Isaiah27:1 Kapaaran kaya itepeseni EJAKAIT Lebiatan (etiaŋ loeiliili loka aŋolol), emun loetirono, Lebiatan emun loekudukudo, kekekileŋ loeninik, loepol loegogoŋ; eari da apiu naejai aŋolol."
Isaiah27:2 Kapaaran ka ya ebe: “Amana naka emusabibu naejok, koyeikis ŋes."
Isaiah27:3 Eoŋ EJAKAIT aricit ŋes; Ecocoenenei ŋinipak; Aricenenei akuare ka apaaran, Kinyek idiotuŋanan aicanican ŋes."
Isaiah27:4 Emamei eoŋ anyunyura: Arai kaasurokis eoŋ ikodokodo ka ikukwa kojie! Tikedenyak kes, ti kecweik kes."
Isaiah27:5 Arai bo kikam ŋesi akagogoŋ, Kenapakinos keoŋ; Eebo, kenapakinos keoŋ.”"
Isaiah27:6 Kapaarasia nuepote iremori Yakob akelias kwap; Ituroi Isirael ibutuni: Ilelebi akwap kere karaito.
Isaiah27:7 Inomit kereka ŋes kwape inomitor ŋul lukinomete ŋes? Arai bo eario ŋes kwape earere ŋul luabu ŋesi koar?
Isaiah27:8 Kaitemis, kanuka aireŋear, iŋolopas kaŋes; Kokuta kakutunike naededeŋ kapaaran naka ekwamuke lokokide."
Isaiah27:9 Kanuka ŋun, ŋes elucere numam adolit nuka Yakob, Nu da kes araito nuka alemar akeronis; Arai kitupusi amor kere nuka etem kwape enon loidecideeitai, Tetere mam bobo Aserim ka aputosia nuka akoloŋ esipokina."
Isaiah27:10 Naarai esil ere loebwaitai, Aibois naasilior, naejalakinitai, kwape amodiŋ: Edak itaok kaŋina, Euriaki da kaŋina, enyamenenei atenunake."
Isaiah27:11 Arai kerinyosi atenunake, ebilibilio; Epote aŋor, inokete kes. Naarai erai ateker namam ejeŋl; Kanuka ŋun mam ŋol loasubi kes itimi kes, Ŋol Iokiluŋiluŋi kes mam itodikini kes asianut."
Isaiah27:12 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, icomi EJAKAIT anyoun kakalele naka Ecor kiton aguurut nako Misiri, kitukonokinio yes idiopet idiopet, yes idwe luka Isirael."
Isaiah27:13 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, ekutakinio arupepe naepol; epote ŋul lueoliorito akwap naka Asuria, ŋul da luaponi kireŋearai akwap nako Misiri; emaete EJAKAIT koroŋat lokalaunan koYerusalem."
Isaiah28:1 Itukwi aboko naka aiwoŋonut naka ikamerak luka Epuraim, Itukwi da aturot naerinyi naka atemeleleke naka aibuses, Naejai akou naka aditot napusuk naka ŋul kaluepikosi ajon!"
Isaiah28:2 Koany ejai EJAKAIT lokirigi lokagogoŋ; Kwape akiru naka akako, ekwam loemudiari; Kwape ailapanar naka akipi nuepolok nueleleete, Ecakakini kwap kakaje,"
Isaiah28:3 Ipudapudao aboko naka aiwoŋonut Naka ikamerak luka Epuraim kakeje.
Isaiah28:4 Eputokinos aturot naerinyi naka atemeleleke naka aibuses Naejai akou naka aditot napusuk Kwape etini loegei akonore eriŋa aiporo; Nakeanyunia ŋin yeneseseni ŋes, Eriŋa ejai akanike kilikori lue,"
Isaiah28:5 Kapaaran kaŋin eraun EJAKAIT loka ajoresio aboko naka aibuses, Amekemeket naetemelel, mama ejaas luideunos luka iketuŋa:"
Isaiah28:6 Eraun da emoyo loka etube mama ejai ŋol loiboie kotube, Ido agogoŋ mama ejaas ŋul luitoboŋorete ejie korute."
Isaiah28:7 Konye ŋul da iriaŋiriaŋas kanuka ajon, Igetigetas kanuka nuitemerete; Iriaŋiriaŋas esasedoti ka enabi kanuka nuitemerete, Elikosi kes aion, Kopaasi kanuka nuitemerete; Iriaŋiriaŋa aanyunikec, iguikinete kotube."
Isaiah28:8 Naarai ileleba imesan kere kalekan ka amodokok, Emamei aibois naelai,"
Isaiah28:9 Lukaŋai isisianakini ŋesi? Lukaŋai da itejenikini nupupuno? Ŋul ca luajakaar kakile, Lualemar kokisin?"
Isaiah28:10 Naarai erai aicorakinet neejai aicorakinet, Aicorakinet neejai aicorakinet; Ekokoro neejai ekokoro, ekokoro neejai ekokoro; Lailo adis, laije da adis."
Isaiah28:11 Mam, konye kotuŋa luka aituke numo, Ka luka aŋajep ace, Elimokini EJAKAIT ateker na:"
Isaiah28:12 Naabu ŋesi kotema atiar, “Na ŋes aibworar, Kisibworasi yesi ŋin yenepasi; Na ŋes aikwarun”: Konye koŋeroto akiirar."
Isaiah28:13 Kanuka ŋun eraun akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejaas kesi Aicorakinet neejai aicorakinet, aicorakinet neejai aicorakinet; Ekokoro neejai ekokoro, ekokoro neejai ekokoro; Lailo adis, laije da adis; Tetere elosete, ebiroros kau, Ebilibilio, ipokete, eyanaario da."
Isaiah28:14 Kanuka ŋun kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT yes ikamwaŋitok, Lueyaito ituŋa lu luejaas Yerusalem!"
Isaiah28:15 Naarai ipotu kotemasi atiar, “Kipou ketutukoto katwanare, Keboleikisi kOkatwak; Naetuboria edoi loenatari, mam kidolokini sio; Naarai kipou ketuluosi aisab neekereanarakosi, Kaŋopata da kotoma aimod.”"
Isaiah28:16 Kanuka ŋun inera EJAKAIT Edeke kwanata ebe, “Koany, apesi eoŋ koSion amoru araun apetetait, Amoru naigimoritai, naka akais nuipu naka agor, Naka apetetait naicasit: Yeniyuuni mam erurukiari."
Isaiah28:17 Etusubi eoŋ etube ekokoro, Adolit da ebiriji: Epiari akak neekerianara naka aisab, Ilapanaros akipi aŋopis.”"
Isaiah28:18 Itapalaunio aitutuketekus katwanare, Mam akusiiboleikin ka Okatwak ebwoi; Naetuboria edoi loenatari, Kosodete yesi aipudapudao,"
Isaiah28:19 Apakio kere nuetuboror, kiyaŋaari yes; Naarai etubonori ŋinipaaran, paaran ka kuare: Ejaun etasuro loepol noi ajenun nupupuno."
Isaiah28:20 Naarai ewuriana eitada etuŋanan arior kotoma; Edidiŋ da eimukos etuŋanan aimukokinor.
Isaiah28:21 Naarai enyouni EJAKAIT kwape komoru Perasim, Enyunyurikini kwape toma aditot naka Gibeon; Tetere iswamai akeswam, akeswam namoit, Ido aitodol asubunike, asubunike namoit."
Isaiah28:22 Aso do siriraas ikamwaŋitok, Kinyeis aenetakus aitogogoŋio: Naarai abu kapup amudiar nainerunio kama ejai EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, kakwap kere."
Isaiah28:23 Kitoikis aki, kopuput ekaporoto; Kiirasi, kopuput akakiro."
Isaiah28:24 Ekorienenei teni ekakorion tiritir tetere eyei? Epukonori ca ido ebwaŋabwaŋai tiritir aapoŋor nuka alupoke?
Isaiah28:25 Kedau ŋesi aiyaiyanakin, Mam kereka iwelari ikumino lukirionok, iyei da ikumino. Irai akima okokoron, Esairi da kaiboisike, Ekusemet da koikoruke?"
Isaiah28:26 Naarai ituutoori Ekedeke ŋes ejok, Isisianakini da."
Isaiah28:27 Naarai mam ikumino lukirionok icomitai kiboro lueitak, Karaida akokoro naka agali mam ibelibelo kokumino; Konye icomom ikumino lukirionok kadaet, Ikumino da kebela."
Isaiah28:28 Irieio akima nuka emugati; Naarai mam icomenenei tiririr: Ido karaida ikokoronori akokoro naka agalike, Mam iriei."
Isaiah28:29 Epote ŋun da kama ejai EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Lokaumokin ŋesi kainerun, Itelekarit kere kacoa."
Isaiah29:1 Itukwi ijo Ariel, Ariel, Ere loedukuri Daudi! Kotukokisi ekaru mama ejai ekaru; Kodolonenete ipucin:"
Isaiah29:2 Kasodi eoŋ aitakadikin Ariel, Ejauni aibworo ka akuudian: Eraun ŋesi mamakaŋ kwape Ariel."
Isaiah29:3 Edukuri eoŋ asurokin jo, Erigauni jo kabwas, Etutuei itutio asurokinia jo,"
Isaiah29:4 Kitisilio jo, inera kalup, Elomnete akonikiro kokwap kaneejai apua; Eraun ekoniporoto kwape loka yenejai ajokit, ebuni kokwap, Iyeiyeas akonikiro epote kapua."
Isaiah29:5 Konye esubi aipues naka lukasurupokon kwape apua naidupukuk, Aipucs da naka luetasuro kwape agugu nuekutari. Eebo, eŋesuni atipet ŋipeŋin,"
Isaiah29:6 Eanyanari EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ŋes kairetun, Ka amaran naka akwap, ka ecelet loepol, Ka etapipirio ka ekwam, Kairian naka akim naidopori."
Isaiah29:7 Ido aipues naka atekerin kere nuiŋuete Ariel, Kes kere nuitijiete ŋes ka akeibois naegogoŋ, Nukitakadikinete ŋes eraunos kwape airujasit, Aitapoet naka akuare."
Isaiah29:8 Ido esubi kwape nairujaa etuŋanan loeriebi eteŋei, Ido koany, enyami; Konye ekwenyuni, eorori etauke; Arai kwape nairujaa etuŋanan loejakit akur, Ido koany, emasi; Konye ekwenyuni, ido koany, iilor, eriŋa imiela: Ikote aipues naka atekerin kere nen, Nuitijiete moru Sion."
Isaiah29:9 Kidareutu koumokis; Komudukoto, koraut imudukiok: Komerikinos, konye mere kebino; Kigetigetas, konye mere kanuitemerete."
Isaiah29:10 Naarai abukok EJAKAIT tomakus emoyo loka ajo nuipu, Etumudak akusikonye, kes inabin; Emuko ŋesi akwesikus, kes ikadwarak."
Isaiah29:11 Eraunos aitapoeta kere kamakus kwape akiro nuka eitabo loipucakinitai, loijaikinio etuŋanan loepedori asoman ebe, “Kosiom nu, keŋaiŋait”: kobala ebe, “Mam apedori, naarai ipucakinitai.”"
Isaiah29:12 ljaikinio etuŋanan lomam epedori asoman eitabo ebe, “Kosiom nu, kenainait”: kobala ebe, “Mam apedori asoman.”"
Isaiah29:13 Kobala EJAKAIT ebe: “Naarai ikunyunete ituŋa lu mama ajai, Ketubusikinete eoŋ kaitukekec ka aŋajepakec, Konye elwaka ikecetauon kamakaŋ, Ayonitekec ŋes aicorakinet naka ituŋa naisisianakinitai:"
Isaiah29:14 Aso koany, eswamai bobo aswam nakaumokin kotuŋa kalu, Aswam naisuwumokinit, nakaumokin: Eoliori acoa naka lukacoakec, Ibwaio ajenun naka Iuberianakec.”"
Isaiah29:15 Itukwi ŋul luekotosi aibwa ainerunikec neidulokina kama ejai EJAKAIT, Ejaas akeceswamisio kamuton, Kobalas ebe, “Iŋai ca kianyuni oni? Iŋai ca da kijeni oni?”"
Isaiah29:16 Ibuburiarete akiro! Imarakinio cabo ekajean kwape elupe? Tetere ibore yenisubuna elimokini nuka ŋol lokesubi ebe, “Mam ŋes kasubit eoŋ:” Arai ibore yenijeuna elimokini nuka ŋol lokejeuni ebe, “Emamei ŋes aijen”?"
Isaiah29:17 Mam tope esalit apak edit noi, Kosodi Lebanon aluor emanikor loideŋeriai, Ido emanikor loideŋeriai imarakinio araut amagoro?"
Isaiah29:18 Kapaaran kaijin epupi ekimiŋ akiro nuka eitabo, Akonye da nuka emuduki eanyunete Kotoma neejesi ŋaŋ ka amuton,"
Isaiah29:19 Iyatanakinete da luitasonos ailelekec kotoma EJAKAIT, Lukican ‘kotuŋa da iyalamikinete Lokalaunan loka Isirael."
Isaiah29:20 Naarai itapalaunio loketasuro, enaŋi ekamwaŋiton, Emudiaros ŋul kere luegiparito numam adolit,"
Isaiah29:21 Luisigwaunete ituŋanan akiro, Luelokete ŋol loitoroni korute, Luitapaarete ekadoliton atai."
Isaiah29:22 Kanuka ŋun inera EJAKAIT loalakuni Aburaam, nuka ekek loka Yakob, kwanata ebe: “Mam bobo ileic irumete Yakob, Mam bobo ilocokin ejese loka akonyeneke."
Isaiah29:23 Konye naeanyunia idweke, Aswam naka akaninika, kokidiŋike, Italaunete ekakiror: Eebo, italaunete Lokalaunan loka Yakob, Eyoŋete Edeke loka Isirael."
Isaiah29:24 Ŋul da luepaarete komoyo edolokinete aijen, Ŋul da luirurumaete enupete aisisianakinio.”"
Isaiah30:1 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Itukwi idwe luijerukaka, Luinerunete konye mere neajai eoŋ; Luimukokinos keimukos, konye mere kekamoyo, Tetere iyatanakinete aronis neejai aronis:"
Isaiah30:2 Luelosete aijesar Misiri, Komam keŋisete kaitukuka; Tetere egogoŋoros kagogoŋ naka Parao, Amunokin etoribe loka Misiri!"
Isaiah30:3 Kanuka ŋun eraun agogoŋ naka Parao ileicikus, Amunokin etoribe loka Misiri eraun aitirirakus."
Isaiah30:4 Naarai ejaas ikapolokoke Soan, Adolut ikiyakiake Kaŋes."
Isaiah30:5 Irumete kes kere ilele Kanuka ituŋa lumam epedorete aisimedaun kes, Lumam eraas aiŋarakinet karaida ameda, Konye ileic, ido amorosit.”"
Isaiah30:6 Abwokon naka itiaŋ luka Eŋalakimak. Kotoma akwap naka ican ka aburun Naeponiata aŋatuny ka eŋatuny, Emusaga ka emun loesarani loeporitoi, Edakete abarakec kokeperin luka asigirian nudidik, Ikeceboro da luka akais nuipu karukia nuka akaalai, Mama ejaas ituŋa lumam isimedaunete kes."
Isaiah30:7 Naarai iŋarakini Misiri atai, atitai: Ŋes amaikinia ŋes “Rakab naidanyanyai.”"
Isaiah30:8 Aso kolot, kiwadikak amoru kakonyenekec, Kigirigir da oitabo, Tetere eraun ekajenan kanuka apaarasia nuepote ikar kere."
Isaiah30:9 Naarai eraas ituŋa luijerukaka, idwe luesabaka, Idwe lueŋerito akiirar ekisil loka EJAKAIT."
Isaiah30:10 Luetemarete ikadwarak ebe, “Sirisesenete”; Luetemarete inabin da ebe, “Sirikidwarakis sio akiro nuetenete, Kolimokinai sio akiro nuepataka, Kodwarakinai nukaiŋal:"
Isaiah30:11 Irwa yesi korot, kopaasi kosokot, Kitamamaut Lokalaunan loka Isirael kakonyenekosi.”"
Isaiah30:12 Aso ebala Lokalaunan loka Isirael kwanata ebe, “Naarai imenata akirot na, Imunokinos aimwaŋ ka amagulul, Igoŋakinos yesi mamakec:"
Isaiah30:13 Ŋes ejaunor namam adolit na mamakus, Kwape acilat naekoto aibiror, Eneara kiŋa karwatat naeoj, Itiuni aibirorike ebuni atipet."
Isaiah30:14 Abilunike ikoni kwape ebwaŋabwaŋaunor amot naka ekajean, Ebwaŋabwaŋai komam aitim; Tetere mam edumunos katutubetake Atibolok naeyaŋaarere akim kokyala, Arai naewokere akipi koico.”"
Isaiah30:15 Naarai inera kwanata EJAKAIT Edeke, Lokalaunan loka Isirael, ebe, “Kitajario yes kanuka aboŋunun ka aiyeŋunun; Ejaun akusigogoŋ toma aiyamakina ka aicasit.” Konye yes inerito."
Isaiah30:16 Konyc ipotu kobalas ebe, “Mam, naarai kikeri kabalasin”; Kanuka ŋun ipote akerit: Ebe da, “Kibwaneni luetiroko”; Kanuka ŋun etiroko lukirukioto yes."
Isaiah30:17 Ekeri elukumit kairetakin naka ediopet; Ikerete yesi kairetakin naka ikany: Aitodol naisalakiniata kwape” epir kaidi naka eroŋat, Kwape aanyunet koukot."
Isaiah30:18 Kanuka ŋun idareuni EJAKAIT, tetere esianikini yes, Kanuka ŋun da itopolooritai ŋes, tetere kitimi yes. Naarai EJAKAIT ŋes Edeke loka etube; Isirereŋitoi kere luidareunete ŋes."
Isaiah30:19 Naarai yes ituŋa lukoSion luibolete koYerusalem: mam bobo imonyete; abeit esianikini ŋesi yes naepupio aimonyokus; naepupunio, ŋes konyet kibonokinio yes,"
Isaiah30:20 Ido karaida einakini EJAKAIT yes inyamat luka aitaaritoi ka akipi nuka aiticanitoi, konye mam bobo eŋopi Ekusikesisianakinan, konye eanyunete akusikonye Ekusikesisianakinan."
Isaiah30:21 Epupunete da akoniki akirot kokaukon naebala ebe, “Lo ŋes erot, kitoroto kotoma”; naipaariata kakan nakoteten, ido naipaariata kediany."
Isaiah30:22 Imunaasi ailadad naka akusiputosia nuegerer nuka epuesa, ka arapeta nuka esabu nuka aputosiakus nuecalara: icakarete kes kwape ibore yenimam elai; ilimokinete ebe “Irwa!”"
Isaiah30:23 Isitepi ŋesi akiru kanuka ikinyomokus, luiweete alup; inyamat da luka eiyas loka alup, ituraŋaŋas, ipuakaros: kapaaran kaŋin edakas ibarenekus oronyia luepolok,"
Isaiah30:24 Imoŋin da ka asigirian nuekoriete alup enyamete lunyaman lueiaas abalaŋ, luepjesitai keritei ka ipukupuket."
Isaiah30:25 Ejaunos da icorin ka aguuruto nuka akipi toma ŋoliroŋat loeoj, ka ŋoliukot loeoj, kapaaran naka earit loepol, naibirunotor itogoi lueojak."
Isaiah30:26 Ido da eraun aica naka elap kwape aica naka akoloŋ, aica da naka akoloŋ iyatakina irwan akanykaarei, kwape aica naka apaarasia akanykaarei, kapaaran naeenia EJAKAIT ariebo naka ituŋake, naitaŋaleunia amusuŋunukec nukinomonomoo."
Isaiah30:27 Koany, ebuni ekiror loka EJAKAIT kama elwana, Enoki kanyunyurake, kotoma apuru naepol naitutumai: lleleba akeituk aisiop. Esubit akeŋajep da bala akim naidopori."
Isaiah30:28 Esubit eiyeŋaneke bala aleles nailapanar, Naedoli omurisiŋ, Aikeke atekerin kaikekeis naka amudiario: Aibwaikin abokonya nuka ituŋa amunyo naitapaari."
Isaiah30:29 ljaunos yesi kekosio kwape loka akuar naka epucit lokalaunan; ailele da nakotau, kwape naelosio ituŋanan kalamaru abunore oroŋat loka EJAKAIT, Atiiba naka Isirael."
Isaiah30:30 Isiirari da EJAKAIT ekeporoto loka aibuses, itodikini aijesun naka akanike, aisiop naka anyunyurakeŋ, airian naka akim naidopori, ajielelitoi naka akiru, ka ekwam, ka akako da."
Isaiah30:31 Ebilibilio Eyasuriat kanuka eporoto loka EJAKAIT, loinomi kebela."
Isaiah30:32 Ŋiniinometait da naka ebela loeseunitai, loinomi EJAKAIT ŋes, ejaun kisiman ka adeudeun: ejiikinos ŋesi ka kes kojiisio luka aijaŋijaŋ."
Isaiah30:33 Naarai aponi Topet kitemokinitete sek; eebo, etemonokinitoi kanuka ekabaka; etemoki kidul kopol: oupake ejai akim ka akito nuipu; isinepi eiyeŋane loka EJAKAIT ŋes, kwape aleles naka acukuman."
Isaiah31:1 Itukwi ŋul luijesaros Misiri aiŋarakinic, luegoŋakina ibalasin; Luemunosi agalin, naarai ipu kesi, Ikebwanenok da, naarai egogoŋ kesi noi; Konye mam esesenete Lokalaunan loka Isirael, Karaida amoot EJAKAIT!"
Isaiah31:2 Konye eco ŋeasi da, eyauni aronis, mam inyakuni akekiro: Konye enyouni asurokin etogo loka ikeswamak aronis, Asurokin da luiŋarakinete luiswamaete numam adolit."
Isaiah31:3 Eraas Imisirian ituŋa, mam eraas Edeke; Eraas ibalasinikec da akiriŋ, konye mam eraas emoyo. Naikiaria EJAKAIT akekan, Iguikini loiŋarakini, ibirori da loiŋarakinio, Ikarakinete kes kere nepepe."
Isaiah31:4 Naarai kabala kwanata EJAKAIT eoŋ ebe, Kwape irurumaa eŋatuny arai iŋatuny kanuka lumejanake, Arai enyaraunio ekodet loka ikecokok asurokin ŋes, Mam ekurianar kanuka iporotoikec, Karaida apodokin eeeletekec: Kwape kwaŋin ijesuni EJAKAIT loka ajoresio Moru Sion ka eukotoke ejie,"
Isaiah31:5 Kwape akweny nuepororete, Kwaŋin da ibuakinit EJAKAIT loka ajoresio Yerusalem, Ibuakinit, eyuuni, etubori, itukuei,"
Isaiah31:6 Kibelokinos yesi mama ejai ŋol loipaliikinito, okwe yes idwe luka Isirael."
Isaiah31:7 Naarai kapaaran kaŋin ecakarete kesi ŋinituŋanan aputosiake nuka epuesa, ka aputosiake nuka esabu, nukisubakinete akusikanin araun aronis."
Isaiah31:8 Kosodi etwani Eyasuriat kanuka ekileŋ, lomere loka etuŋanan: Emudiari ŋes ekileŋ lomere loka etuŋanan; Ekeri ŋesi ekileŋ, Eraunos ikekatumunak ikeswamak nukailolitoi."
Isaiah31:9 Ebala EJAKAIT loejai akimike Sion, Eupake da koYerusalem ebe: “Etubori atiibake kanuka amaran, Eburunete ikapolokoke kanuka aanyunet.”"
Isaiah32:1 Koany, eyai ekabaka kadolit, Eyaete lukapolok kerube,"
Isaiah32:2 Ido eraun etuŋanan aŋopis kama ejai ekwam, Ka amecis akiru; Kwape ka icorin kaibois naeonit, Kwape ka etolim loka emoru loepol kakwap nakailolony."
Isaiah32:3 Mam emusimusete akonye nuka ŋul kaluekwenyete, Iirarete da aki nuka ŋul kaluepupete."
Isaiah32:4 Etau da loka loemositoi ejenuni acoit, Ka aŋajep naka Iuiŋejiŋejas itemonokino adesiar."
Isaiah32:5 Ebaŋ mam bobo enyarao ekasianan, Karaida otaupe anyarao ojokotau,"
Isaiah32:6 Naarai inera ebaŋ nukabaŋaanut, Eketau da iswamai numam adolit, Esubi nukainyanakin Edeke, Elimit da nueriete mama ejai EJAKAIT, Aisirieb eteŋei aijar naka yeniketeŋei, Ka aikokoor da nutikemat yenejakit akur,"
Isaiah32:7 Ido eroko iponesio luka otaupe, Ebili ibotei lueroko amudiar yenitasono kaiŋal, Karaida inera yenilwaritoi abeit,"
Isaiah32:8 Konye iswamai ekasianan nukasianut; Ido icasit kotoma asianut,"
Isaiah32:9 Konyoutu, yes aŋor nuijalijalas, kiirasi ekaporoto; Yes apesur nuibwalara, kitoikis aki akakiro."
Isaiah32:10 Yes aŋor nuibwalara, ianyunete ican apaarasia nuedeparito ekaru: Naarai emameun aide emusabibu, emameun da aisak."
Isaiah32:11 Komaranata, yes aŋor nuijalijalas; Kopodokinos yes nujbwalara; Kolacasi ikusinapen, komuialalata, Konapata ipukoi kaŋabesikus,"
Isaiah32:12 Edipidipete atorobusio kanuka amanat nukajokak, Kanuka emusabibu da loerait."
Isaiah32:13 Ebwaŋunete ikukwa ka ikodokodo kotoma akwap naka ikatuŋa; Eebo, kotogoi kere lukaiyalama kotoma ore loiyalama."
Isaiah32:14 Naarai ebwosio rwaru kotogo lopeti: Inyeinio ere loipu ituŋa; Eukot ka aitelies eluoros abuai ikar kere, Alakara naka itukoi, erony loka isipanin;"
Isaiah32:15 Aitodol nekijesakinere oni emoyo lokokuju, Koraun amodiŋ amana naapusuk, Ka amana da naapusuk konyarai amagoro."
Isaiah32:16 Kosodi etube aiboikin toma amodiŋ, Ejaikin da adolit mana naapusuk."
Isaiah32:17 Eraun aswam naka adolit ainapakin; Ido eyauni adolit aiyamakina ka aicasit ikar kere,"
Isaiah32:18 Iboikinos ikatuŋa aibois nakainapakina, Kotogoi da luegogoŋ, kotoma aiyeŋuneta nuiyamakina."
Isaiah32:19 Konye etepi akak, aisibiror amagoro; Etiyakinio cut ere."
Isaiah32:20 Isirerenitoi yes luiyeete ariri naka akipi kere, Luimearete akeje nuka emoŋ ka asigiria neebearete kere."
Isaiah33:1 Itukwi, jo loimudiari, komam kimudiario: Loiswamai nukaimod, komam kes kiswamakinito jo nukaimod! Arai kidau ijo amudiar, kimudiario; Kidau aswam nukaimod, kiswamakinete kesi da jo nukaimod."
Isaiah33:2 Wu EJAKAIT, kiswamakinai sio asianut; Kipou kedareut jo: Korai ijo akanikosi ŋinitupuruc, Aitajariokosi da kapak naka ican,"
Isaiah33:3 Kanuka airuruma naka ecelet ekerete ituŋa; Kanuka anyounikon isiarisiarunos atekerin.
Isaiah33:4 Etukokinio luŋatanakus kwape etukokinia ekurut: Esomakinos kwape esomanaror emaase,"
Isaiah33:5 Itopolooritai EJAKAIT; naarai iboienenei kokuju; Isilelebit ŋesi Sion ketube ka adolit.
Isaiah33:6 Ejaun aicasit kapakiokon, Aidiles naka aitajario ka acoa, ka aijen: Ayoŋit EJAKAIT ŋes abarake."
Isaiah33:7 Koany, emonyete lukiriginikec kokiŋa; Emonyete noi ikiyakia luka ainapakin akiyo."
Isaiah33:8 Eswapa irotin lukapolok, enaŋi ekaloton: Abil aitutuket, amen ireria, Mam epodo ituŋanan."
Isaiah33:9 Ibworo akwap akalanyanar: Irumito Lebanon ileic erinyori: Eputokinos Saron kamodiŋ; Eraraaros Basan ka Karumel akuikec.
Isaiah33:10 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Kwape kwana anyouni; Kwape kwana adakun; Kwape kwana etopoloor."
Isaiah33:11 Ipotiete agugu, idounete ariaŋ: Eiyeŋanekus ŋes akim nakidopori yes."
Isaiah33:12 Ikonakinete ituŋa bala icweikinitai araun ecoka: Bala ikukwa luejepitai, luicweio kakim.”"
Isaiah33:13 Kiirasi, yes luilwaka, nueswamat eoŋ; Yes da luiapiete, kocamut akapedor."
Isaiah33:14 Akuriakaros ikadiakanarak luka Sion; Ekam amaran ŋul lumam eyoŋito Edeke. Iŋai bo kaoni epedori aiboienen kakim naidopori? Iŋai bo kaoni epedori aiboienen kaicwe namam edaun?
