Isaiah33:15 Ŋol loelosenenei kadolit, loiŋerenenei nuetenete; Ŋol loemeni ameda naka aimwaŋ, Loilakilaki akekanin kinyeis aitiŋ ainakineta nuitumudakete akonye, Loisikakini akeki kinyeis aipup nuka aokot, Loitumudaki akekonye kinyeis asesen aronis;"
Isaiah33:16 Iboienenei ŋol kokuju: Ejaun akeibois naŋopis atiiban nuegogoŋ noi: Einakinio ikenyamat; mam akekipi eonikinete.
Isaiah33:17 Iteete rwaru akonikonye ekabaka katemeleleke: Eanyunete akwap nainyaminyamakina noi.
Isaiah33:18 Eomoomoi ekonitau etasuro: Ali bo loimarit, ali bo loiniŋit esolo? Ali bo da loimarit itogoi lueojak?"
Isaiah33:19 Mam ianyuni ateker naededeŋ, Ateker naka aŋajep naepagal amisiikin, Naka aŋajep naiŋejiŋeja namam ipedori ajenun,"
Isaiah33:20 Kosesen Sion, ere loka ipucinowok lueseunitai: Eanyunete akonikonye Yerusalem aibois naiyamakina, ewema lomam elemario, Iloinoke mam eutunio cut, Karaida aunoike mam eŋedeŋedeunos."
Isaiah33:21 Konye ejaenena EJAKAIT kaoni kaŋina kapolou, Aibois naka icorin luelalak ka aguuruto; Nemam ataker naejaas akiŋola itori, Karaida ameeri nakejie mam etubori kanen."
Isaiah33:22 Naarai EJAKAIT ŋes ekatuboniwok, EJAKAIT ŋes Lokesilan ikisilawok; EJAKAIT ŋes ekabakawok; kitajari ŋesi oni."
Isaiah33:23 Ejarijarunos aunoikon; Mam apedorete aitogogoŋ akeju naka epirikee, Mam apedorete arior emedera: Kosodi ekorokoroi luŋatuna luipu luijoreunitai; Luiriadas kes eyaŋaarete lunatuna."
Isaiah33:24 Loiboienenei kanen mam ebala ebe, “Adek eoŋ”; Ituŋa luiboienenete kanen isionio numam adolitekec."
Isaiah34:1 Kikunyutu, yes atekerin, kopuput; Kiirasi, yes ituŋa!. Kopuput alup ka ailelebakee; Akwap, ka iboro kere da lueloŋmunete kotoma."
Isaiah34:2 Naarai enyunyurikinit EJAKAIT atekerin kere, Isiopakinit ajorekec kere: Amudia kes cut, ijaikinit kes aario."
Isaiah34:3 Ecakario luaaranakec, Enyouni abosus naka atesinakec, Ecalaros iroŋan kaokotokec,"
Isaiah34:4 Ebauni ajore kere naka akuj, Enunukio akuj kwape emukule: Eraraar ajorekec kere, kwape eraraaror akiot komusabibu, Ido kwape eraraaror akiot kotini."
Isaiah34:5 Naarai amat ekakileŋ emonikin kotoma akuj; Koany, ijesuni mama ejai Edom, Otuna luka ekenitika, aitub akiro."
Isaiah34:6 Imono ekileŋ loka EJAKAIT aokot, Itutumio katarion, Kaokot nuka imerekekin ludidik ka akinei, Kasiepai nuka iŋalur luka imerekekin: Naarai ejai EJAKAIT asubanit koBosura, Earit loepol kakwap naka Edom."
Isaiah34:7 ljesunos ikosobwa kakes, imoŋin lutobai kimoŋin; Emerikini akwapukec aokot, itutumio apuakec katarion."
Isaiah34:8 Naarai ŋes apaaran naka enyaŋit loka EJAKAIT, Ekaru loka aitepesen aŋolopakec kaSion."
Isaiah34:9 Eluoros aguurutoke emina, Apuake da acukuman, Eluor akwapuke emina loenoki,"
Isaiah34:10 Mam itudeŋio kuare karaida paaran; Epurienenei apuruke ikar kere: Iswapi ameun katur kiton atur; Emameun yenetubori kanen ikar ka ikar.
Isaiah34:11 Konye irumete etolut ka ecoc; Ibolenenete etukuri ka ekuruk: Eriori ŋesi ekokoro loka aitirira kamake, Ebiriji da loka apalapalat."
Isaiah34:12 Enyarakinete isotiake ajakanut, konye emameun idiopet; Eraunos lukapolokoke kere aamameak."
Isaiah34:13 Elibunete ikukwa kotogoike lukapolok, Ikodokodo ka isukukur kaiboisioke nuegogoŋ: Eraun aibois naka ikuwei, Alaro da naka ikuului."
Isaiah34:14 Iriamakinos itiaŋ luka amodiŋ kibuin; Emonyakini ekoroi aupake; Eebo, edoi akimat nakakuare nen, Edumakin aibois naka aibworar,"
Isaiah34:15 Itemokini aipom ekaike kaŋina, euriei, Ebekuni, etukonokini kwap kotoribeke: Eebo, etukonokinos atoorion kaŋina, Ŋinidiopet kopadicake."
Isaiah34:16 Komoata yesi oitabo loka EJAKAIT, kosiomata: Mam idiopet kaŋul eoliori, Emameun naeoliori opadicake: Naarai aituk naka EJAKAIT ŋes icorakinit, Ekemoyo da ŋes atukokinit kes."
Isaiah34:17 Elamilamaki kes eroet, Akekan da ŋes akorakinit kes kokokoro: Irumete kesi ikar ka ikar, Ameun katur kiton atur ibolenenete kesi kotoma."
Isaiah35:1 Eyalamikin ais ka aibois naelarioŋoŋ; Eleli amodiŋ, ituroi kwape apecel,"
Isaiah35:2 Ituroi noi, eleli kaitac ka ayoore; Einakinio aibuses naka Lebanon, Ajokis naka Karumel ka Saron: Eanyunete aibuses naka EJAKAIT, Ajokis naka Edekewok naitelekarit,"
Isaiah35:3 Kitogogoŋoto yesi akanin nuekalanyaka, Kitogogoŋoto da akuŋin nuilejekekas."
Isaiah35:4 Kolimokis ŋul luejaas itauon luekuriaka ebe, “Kogogoŋoros, sirikikuriakaros: Koany, ebuni Ekusideke kenyaŋit, kaitepesen naka Edeke; Ebuni ŋesi, kitajar yes.”"
Isaiah35:5 Kosodete akonye nuka imudukiok akwenyun, Epukorio aki nuka imajiŋa."
Isaiah35:6 Kosodi eŋwalas asomanar kwape amiam, Eyei aŋajep naka ebaŋ: Naarai ibulubulete akip kais, Aguuruto da kamodiŋ,"
Isaiah35:7 Eraun asiŋe naemwekimweki abwal, Alup da nuejakit akur akonye nuka icowai: Kaibois naka ikuwei, neaperenenete, Ejaunos anya kagadai ka abiloi."
Isaiah35:8 Ejaun da erot lokapolon kaŋina, erot, Emaikinio Erot loka alaunit; Lumam elaete mam itorete nen; Konye eraun loka kwi ikalotok, Eebo, ibaŋiok mam epaarete nen."
Isaiah35:9 Emameun eŋatuny kaŋina, Karaida ediotiaŋ loemudiari mam itori nen, Mam edumunos kaŋina; Konye esakasakaete luelakunitai korot kaŋol."
Isaiah35:10 Eboŋunete lugweluna luka EJAKAIT, Epote Sion eyeete: Ejaun ailel namam edaun akwesikec: Edumunete aiyalama ka ailel, Ilicaros aiturur ka eidiny."
Isaiah36:1 Kosodi kanen kokaru lokitomonet kaoŋon loka ekabaka Kesekia, kobu Senakerib ekabaka loka Asuria asurokin ireria kere luka Yuda lukebwaitai, kirum."
Isaiah36:2 Kijuka ekabaka loka Asuria Rabasake anyoun koLakis alosit Yerusalem mama ejai ekabaka Kesekia ajaas kaiore naepol. Kobwo kariri kaleles naka atapar nakokuiu, korot loka emanikor loka ekelotan igoen."
Isaiah36:3 Kosodi kolom Eliakim okoku loka Kilikia loapolokinit ekal mama ejai ŋesi, ka Sebuna ekewadikan, ka Yoa okoku loka Asap ekesiitonokinan."
Isaiah36:4 Kotema Rabasake kes atiar, “Kolimokis do Kesekia ebe, ‘Inera ekabaka lokapolon, ekabaka loka Asuria, kwanata ebe, Amuno nanyoin naimuno?"
Isaiah36:5 Abala eoŋ ebe, ainerunikon ka agogoŋ ejie eraas akiro nuutai: iŋai bo do imunokina ijo, tape kipaliikin eoŋ?"
Isaiah36:6 Koany, imunokina ijo ebela loka egada lo loiriecakina, ŋes Misiri; arai kegoŋakini ituŋanan mamake, elomari akanike, icumi; ikoni nepenen Parao ekabaka loko Misiri mama ejaas ŋul kere luemunosi ŋes."
Isaiah36:7 Konye arai kiitema eoŋ atiar, “Kimuno isio EJAKAIT Ekosideke”; mere ŋes ŋol loalemari Kesekia aiboisioke nuiceleleete ka itemwanake, kolimok Yuda ka Yerusalem ebe, “Imaenenete kotem kalo”?"
Isaiah36:8 Aso do, keŋaiŋait, koinakis ekajakait ekabaka loka Asuria iboro lukititina, kainakin eoŋ jo da ibalasin ilukumin iarei, arai ipedori ijo kowaikon aibwaikin luibwanenete."
Isaiah36:9 Aso ipedori biai aisibelokin akonyen nuka ekapolon ediopet kotoma ludidik kokejaanakinak luka ejakaitika, komuno Misiri kanuka agalin ka ikebwanenok."
Isaiah36:10 Abu kereka eoŋ asurokin aibois na amudiar komamei EJAKAIT? EJAKAIT ŋes kabala ebe, “Kolot kosurok akwap na, komudia.”"
Isaiah36:11 Kosodi Eliakim ka Sebuna ka Yoa atemar Rabasake atiar, “Kiŋaiŋait, kiner kikonikejaanakinak kaŋajep nako Suria; naarai kijeni; sirikiner kasio kaŋajep naka Iyudayan, kaki nuka ituŋa luejaas arwatat.”"
Isaiah36:12 Konye kotema Rabasake kes atiar, “Keyakuunit ekajakait mama ejai ejakaitikon, ka jo da einer akiro nu? Mam kereka keyakuunit otuŋa luibolete karwatat, ainyam acinikec, ka aimat akulakec nepepe kayes?”"
Isaiah36:13 Kosodi Rabasake aibwo, kiworo keporoto loepol kaŋajep naka Iyudayan, kotema atiar, “Kopupokisi yesi akiro nuka ekabaka lokapolon ekabaka loka Asuria."
Isaiah36:14 Inera ekabaka kwanata ebe, ‘Kinyek Kesekia aiŋal yes; naarai mam epedori aitajar yes,"
Isaiah36:15 Kinyek Kesekia ainakin yes amunokina EJAKAIT ebe, Abeit kitajari EJAKAIT oni, ere lo da mam ijaikinio akan naka ekabaka loka Asuria,"
Isaiah36:16 Sirikipupokis Kesekia: naarai inera ekabaka loka Asuria kwanata ebe, ‘Kinerutu keoŋ nuka ainapakin, kopotu neajai; konyama yesi ŋinituŋanan emusabibuke, ŋinituŋanan nuka etinike, komata yesi ŋinituŋanan akipi nukoieoike;"
Isaiah36:17 aitodol neabunio kayaŋaa yes akwap naeputosi kanakus, akwap naka akima ka ebino, akwap naka atap ka imanikoria luka emusabibu.’"
Isaiah36:18 Kocoito kinye Kesekia aijodoor yes ebe, ‘Kitajari EJAKAIT oni.’ Ejai cani edio kodekesio luka atekerin loitajarit akekwap kakan naka ekabaka loka Asuria?"
Isaiah36:19 Alu bo idekesio luka Kamat ka Arupad? Alu bo idekesio luka Separabaim? Apotu tope kitajarata Samaria kakanika?
Isaiah36:20 Lukaŋai kodekesio kere luka akwapin kaŋun luapotu kitajarata akwapukec kakanika, tetere itajari EJAKAIT Yerusalem kakanika?”"
Isaiah36:21 Konye kililiŋa, mam apotu kobonokis ŋes akirot: naarai kejai aicorakinet naka ekabaka ebe, ‘Sirikiboŋokis.’"
Isaiah36:22 Kosodi Eliakim okoku loka Kilikia, loapolokinit ekal, ka Sebuna ekewadikan, ka Yoa okoku laka Asap ekesiitonokinan kopotu mama ejai Kesekia, ecilicilito inapenekec, kolimokis ŋes akiro nuka Rabasake."
Isaiah37:1 Kosodi kanen, kepupu ekabaka Kesekia, kocil inapeneke, konap epuko, koloma togo loka EJAKAIT."
Isaiah37:2 Kijuka Eliakim, loapolokinit ekal, ka Sebuna ekewadikan, ka imakio luka isasedotin, konapitos ipukoi, mama ejai Isaia enabi okoku loka Amos."
Isaiah37:3 Kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Inera Kesekia kwanata ebe, Apaaran na erai apaaran naka ican, naka aitoronio, ka naka amoromoroo; naarai adol idwe aurio, emamei da agogoŋ nakaidoun."
Isaiah37:4 Motoko iirari EJAKAIT Ekonideke akiro nuka Rabasake, loejukuni ekabaka loka Asuria ejakaitike amoromor Edeke lokajaran, ka aitoron akiro nuapupu EJAKAIT Ekonideke: aso kitonyou ailipikon kanuka aatoŋot naedeun.”"
Isaiah37:5 Kopotu do ikeiaanakinak luka ekabaka Kesekia neejai Isaia.
Isaiah37:6 Kotema Isaia kes atiar, “Kolimokis ejakaitikus kwanata ebe, ‘Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Sirikiyoŋ akiro nuipup, nukamoromorooto eoŋ ikejaanakinak luka ekabaka loka Asuria."
Isaiah37:7 Koany, ebwaikin emoyo tomake, epupuni ŋesi eemut, eboŋori bukee; ebirokini eoŋ da ŋes kekileŋ akwapuke.’’’"
Isaiah37:8 Koboŋo do Rabasake, kodum ekabaka loka Asuria ejiosi kaLibuna: naarai abu kopupunite ebe aboŋo ŋesi koLakis."
Isaiah37:9 Kopup inerai nuka Tiraka ekabaka loka Etiopia ebe, “Koany, alomu aitiji jo.” Kepupu ŋun, kiyakik ŋesi Kesekia ikiyakia ebe,"
Isaiah37:10 “Ilimokinete Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda kwanata ebe, ‘Kinyek Edekekon loimuno aiŋal jo ebe, Mam Yerusalem ijaikinio akan naka ekabaka loka Asuria."
Isaiah37:11 Koany, ipupunit ijo nueswamakis ikabakan luka Asuria akwapin kere, amudianarete kes cut: do konyet jo kiyuunio?"
Isaiah37:12 Apotu kereka idekesio luka atekerin koyuununete kes, nuamudianarete lukapapaaka, Gosan, ka Karan, ka Resep, ka idwe luka Eden luajaas Telasar?"
Isaiah37:13 Ai bo ejai ekabaka loka Kamat, ka ekabaka loka Arupad, ka ekabaka loka ere loka Separabaim, loka Kena, ka Iba da?’”"
Isaiah37:14 Kijau Kesekia ebalua kakan naka ikiyakia, kosiom; kolot Kesekia togo loka EJAKAIT, kopesia kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Isaiah37:15 Kilip Kesekia EJAKAIT, kobala ebe,"
Isaiah37:16 “Wu EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael, loiboie kokerubin, ijo ŋes Edeke, ijo bon, loka ajakanuto kere nuka akwap; ijo kolo isubi akuj ka akwap."
Isaiah37:17 Kitoik akonikit, wu EJAKAIT, kiira; kokweny, wu EJAKAIT, koany; kopup akiro kere nuka Senakerib, nuejuku ŋesi amoromoroo Edeke lokajaran."
Isaiah37:18 Abeit, wu EJAKAIT, apotu ikabakan luka Asuria komudiasi atekerin kere, ka akecekwap da."
Isaiah37:19 Apotu koeakasi idekesiokec akim: naarai mam keraas idekesio, konye aswam naka akanin nuka ituŋa, ikito ka amor; ŋes kemudiarere kes."
Isaiah37:20 Aso do, wu EJAKAIT Ekosideke, kitajarai sio kakanike, tetere ejenunete ajakanuto kere nuka akwap ebe, ljo ŋes EJAKAIT, ijo bon ba.”"
Isaiah37:21 Kosodi Isaia okoku loka Amos aijukakin Kesekia ebe, “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, ebe, Naarai ilip ijo eoŋ asurokin Senakerib ekabaka loka Asuria,"
Isaiah37:22 na ŋes akirot naener EJAKAIT mama ejai ŋesi ebe: “Kimwaŋit akoku nabekot naka Sion jo, Ekienar jo kisekelei: Emuŋumuŋ akoku naka Yerusalem akouke neijai."
Isaiah37:23 Iŋai bo imoromor ijo, kisekel? Iŋai bo itopolooritor ijo ekoniporoto, ka aiteluor akonikonye kuju? Isurok Lokalaunan loka Isirael."
Isaiah37:24 Imoromor EJAKAIT kokiyakiakon, Kinera atiar, ‘Kaipues naka agalinika Adokari oswion luka iroŋan, Atutubeta nukotoma nuka Lebanon; Ajepi iresiake lueojak, ka iberosinike luejokuka; Alomari da aiboisike naiwasie, Amagoro naka emanikorike loideŋeriat."
Isaiah37:25 Abok, amat akipi, Etooni da kakakeju icorin kere luko Misiri.’"
Isaiah37:26 Mam ibu kopup kwape eswamaa kolo, Kasub agear apeŋo? Kwana da etodolit, Korai ijo loimudiari ireria lukebwaitai Araun aapoŋor nukamejei,"
Isaiah37:27 Kanuka ŋun lueboiete kotoma keraas luedit agogoŋ, Koburut, kitirirata; Kosubito bala inya luka ais, kwape ikui, Kwape kinya luejaas kuju togo, Kwape emanikor loka akima eriŋa epolooro,"
Isaiah37:28 Konye ajeni eoŋ akoniiboie, Alomarikon ka alomunikon, Aikerepoonutukon kaneajai."
Isaiah37:29 Kanuka aikerepoonutukon kaneajai, Ido naarai adolu emokodekon akiika, Ŋes ebwaikinia ekagolu okumesikon, Arukanaka da aitukukon, Kenyakari jo orot loilomunia."
Isaiah37:30 “Na ŋes eraun aanyunet mamakon: okaru lo inyamete yenebwaŋuni bon, okaru lokiareit yenitocuni kaii; okaru lokiwuniet koyeata, kodwenya, kiraata imanikoria luka emusabibu, konyama araitoke."
Isaiah37:31 Edupi aatoŋot naideuni naabu koku kokek loka Yuda alias kwap, kora araito kokuju."
Isaiah37:32 Naarai elomari aatoŋot koYerusalem, luekuete da komoru Sion: itodolikini ŋun adunyanut naka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio,"
Isaiah37:33 “Aso inera kwanata EJAKAIT nuka ekabaka loka Asuria ebe, Mam edoluni ore lo, karaida agumakin emal, karaida adolokin kebuku, karaida aitutu etut asurokinia ŋes."
Isaiah37:34 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Orot lokelomunia, ŋopeŋol eboŋoria, ido mam edoluni ore lo."
Isaiah37:35 Naarai egaŋi eoŋ ere lo aitajar, kanukaŋ, ido kanuka ekakejaanakinan Daudi.”"
Isaiah37:36 Koloma emalaika loka EJAKAIT oidukurun luka Iyasurian, kodany ilukumin akwatat ka ilukumin akaisakanykauni ka lukany: kenyout ituŋa tupuruc sek, koany, koraas kere ikatwak."
Isaiah37:37 Kosodi Senakerib ekabaka loka Asuria anyoun, kolot, koboŋo, kiboikin Ninebe."
Isaiah37:38 Kosodi kanen, emai ŋesi kotogo loka Nisurok ekedeke, koarata Aduram-melek ka Saresar odweke ŋes kekileŋ: kokereasi akwap naka Ararat. Kirum Esar-kadon okokuke aiboisike."
Isaiah38:1 Kapaarasia kaŋun kodekakin Kesekia nepetai atwanare, Kobu Isaia enabi okoku loka Amos mama ejai, kotema ŋes atiar, “Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Kitemonok ekonitogo; naarai itwani, mam ijari.”"
Isaiah38:2 Kosodi Kesekia aibelokin akekonyen arwatat, kilip EJAKAIT,"
Isaiah38:3 kotema atiar, “Kiitu, wu EJAKAIT, keŋaiŋait, kwape aloseneneo kakonyenekon kabeit, ka etau loeteni, keswama nuejok kakonyenekon.” Komony noi Kesekia akiyo."
Isaiah38:4 Kosodi kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Isaia ebe,"
Isaiah38:5 “Kolot, kolimok Kesekia ebe, ‘Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Daudi papaakon ebe, Eira ailipikon, aany da akonikiyo: koany, eyatakini akonipaarasia ikar itomon ka lukany."
Isaiah38:6 Ketajari jo ka ere kalo kakan naka ekabaka loka Asuria: egaŋi eoŋ ere lo.
Isaiah38:7 “Na ŋes aanyunet mamakon naebuni kama ejai EJAKAIT, ebe iswamai EJAKAIT akirot ŋin naener:"
Isaiah38:8 Koany, enyakari eoŋ etolim loejai ailameta, loisukunyarit akoloŋ ailameta nuka Akas aitoboŋor kau ailameta atomon.” Aso koboŋo akoloŋ ailameta atomon kailameta nealomaria ŋesi."
Isaiah38:9 Aiwadik naka Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda, kedau adekakin kosodi aŋaleun kadekake."
Isaiah38:10 Kabala ebe, Kidiŋ paaran naka apaarasiaka, Alomari eoŋ orutei luka Okatwak: Kemiki nuesalito nuka ikaruka."
Isaiah38:11 Kabala ebe, Mam aanyuni EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT, Kakwap naka ikajarak: Mam bobo aseseni ituŋa kotoma luibolete kakwapin."
Isaiah38:12 Autor akaibois, alemar kamakaŋ kwape ewema loka ekecokon: Anunuk akaijar kwape ekaojion; Katubuni ŋesi eoŋ kousio: Paaran ka kuare da kitanaŋi eoŋ cut."
Isaiah38:13 Amonyi aiŋarakinio aitodol tupuruc; Ebilibilei akakojo kere kwape eŋatuny: Paaran ka kuare da kitanaŋi eoŋ cut.
Isaiah38:14 Kwape iporoidoliat arai ewalu, aŋuŋa eoŋ kwaŋin; Ebworo kwape ajele: Eriokuut akakonye kanuka asesen kuju; Wu EJAKAIT, keticanitai, koraun ijo ekabwoaranika,"
Isaiah38:15 Enera biai? Abu ŋesi kiner keoŋ, Ido eswama ŋun: Alosenenei motimot ikaruka kere, Kanuka ariebo nakotauka,"
Isaiah38:16 Wu EJAKAIT, ejarete ituŋa kanuka akiro kaŋun, Aijar da naka ekamoyo ejai tomakee eut: Wu okwe kitaŋaleunoi, kitajar eoŋ,"
Isaiah38:17 Koany, kanuka ainapakinika, ŋes kariebar noi: Konye kaminakon ibu kitajar aijaraka kaipany naka amudiario: Naarai icaka akaronisio kere kaukon,"
Isaiah38:18 Naarai mam Okatwak epedori aiturit jo, Mam atwanare epedori aima jo: Luijesaros aipany mam epedorete amunokin akonibeit,"
Isaiah38:19 Ekajaran, ekaiaran, ŋes kituri jo, Kwape eoŋ lolo: Itejenikini papa idwe akonibeit,"
Isaiah38:20 Itemokino EJAKAIT aitaiar eoŋ: Kanuka ŋun kiyei ikososioka koraman lukaputio Apaarasia kere nuka aijarakos Kotogo loka EJAKAIT.
Isaiah38:21 Abu Isaia kotema atiar, “Koodutu atap naka etini; kibwaikis abus, eŋaleuni do.”"
Isaiah38:22 Ido abu Kesekia kotema atiar, “Ani bo aanyunet naitejeŋuni ebe adokari togo loka EJAKAIT?”"
Isaiah39:1 Kapaarasia kaŋun kijukak Merodak-baladan okoku loka Baladan, eka baka loka Babulon Kesekia luetinito ibaluan ka ainakinet: naarai apupunit ebe abu kodekakin kosodi aŋaleun."
Isaiah39:2 Kiyalamikin Kesekia kanukee, kitodik kes etogo loka ikeboro luka akais nuipu, epuesa, ka esabu, ka lueuru maa, ka akinyet naka akais nuipu, ka etogo kere loka luiiisike, ido kere luadumuna koboroke luka akais nuipu: amamei ibore kotogoke karaida ayaetake kere, yenimam Kesekia etodikinit kes."
Isaiah39:3 Kosodi Isaia enabi abunore mama ejai ekabaka Kesekia, kotema ŋes atiar, “Anyoika bo nuabalasi ituŋa lu? Apote kai aponare mamakon?” Kotema Kesekia atiar, “Apote mamakan kakwap naelwana, Babulon.”"
Isaiah39:4 Kotema atiar, “Inyo bo aanyut kotogokon?” Koboŋok Kesekia ebe, “Aanyut iboro kere luejaas togoka: emamei ibore koboroka luka akais nuipu yenimam eoŋ etodikinit kes.”"
Isaiah39:5 Kosodi Isaia atemar Kesekia atiar, “Kopupok akirot naka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio."
Isaiah39:6 Koany, eponito apaarasia, eyanaario kere luejaas togokon, ka nul Iuapotu lukapapaakon kinadata kiton lolo, Babulon: ebala EJAKAIT ebe, emameun ibore yenepianun,"
Isaiah39:7 Eyaŋaarete da lukodwekon lukiwuriei ijo elop: eraunos ibwacin kotogo lokapolon loka ekabaka loka Babulon.”
Isaiah39:8 Kosodi Kesekia atemar atiar, “Ejok akirot naka EJAKAIT nainera ijo.” Ido korema atiar, “Naarai ejaunos ainapakin ka abeit kapaarasiaka.”"
Isaiah40:1 Ebala Ekusideke ebe, Kitalakasi, kitalakasi ikatuŋa,"
Isaiah40:2 Kinerata nukaitalakar Yerusalem, kiworokis ŋes ebe, Adaun ejieke, esionii numam adolit; Ainakin kakan naka EJAKAIT irwan aarei kanuka aronisioke kere."
Isaiah40:3 Abu eporoto kiworoi ebe: “Kitemokisi erot loka EJAKAIT kais, Kitenasi erot loka Edekewok kamodiŋ,"
Isaiah40:4 Itutuo rwaru ŋiniditot, ikeio ŋolimoru ka ŋoliukot; Itenario amagulul, iiyaiyakinio nuimugogolito."
Isaiah40:5 Epukorio rwaru aibuses naka EJAKAIT, Erataikinete ituŋasinei kere aanyun: Naarai ener aituk naka EJAKAIT.”"
Isaiah40:6 Abu eporoto kotema atiar, “Kikalal.” Kojau yenebala ebe, “Anyoika ekalalaa?” Ituŋasinei kere eraas inya, Akecejokis da eputos bala aturot naka ais:"
Isaiah40:7 Erinyorete inya, isokokoi da aturot; Naarai ekutakini ŋes euria loka EJAKAIT: Abeit eraas ituŋa inya."
Isaiah40:8 Erinyorete inya, isokokoi da aturot; Konye akirot naka Edekewok eperonori ikar kere."
Isaiah40:9 Wu jo loilimonokini Sion akiro nukajokak, Kodoka kuju oroŋat loicelelei: Wu jo loilimonokini Yerusalem akiro nukajokak, kikalal noi; Kikalal sirikiyoŋ; Kolimok ireria luka Yuda ebe, “Koanyutu Edekekus!”"
Isaiah40:10 Koany, ebuni EJAKAIT Edeke kwape ekagogoŋon, Akekan da irumakinit ŋes; Koany, ejai aimalaeteke kaŋes, Ekeropit da ejai kakonyeneke."
Isaiah40:11 Itadaki ekesipan kwape ekecokon, Etukonokin idwe luka amerekekin akanike, Ka aidak katorobuke, Isiyapi da ŋun nuitanakete."
Isaiah40:12 Iŋai bo itemit akipi kotau kakanike, Itemit akuj katutubet naka ekubit, Egolorit apua naka akwap toma amot, Iniŋit iroŋan kaitemisioit, Iukon da kaitiirianet?"
Isaiah40:13 Iŋai da itetenit emoyo loka EJAKAIT, Arai ituutorit ŋes kwape ekapetan akiroke?"
Isaiah40:14 Inerunit ŋesi kaŋai, iŋai da kituutorit ŋes, Kisisianak ŋes erot loka etube, Kisisianak ŋes aijen, Kitodik ŋes erot loka ajenun?"
Isaiah40:15 Koany, esubito atekerin bala aidonakinet naka akipi kamot, Imaritai kwape apua naidupukuk naejai toma aitemis: Koany edakit apujan kwape ibore yenedit noi."
Isaiah40:16 Mam Lebanon ilosikino araun akito nukinoka, Itiaŋike da mam ilosikinos araun ainakinet naicweio,"
Isaiah40:17 Esubito atekerin kere bala mam eraas ibore kakonyeneke; Imaritai kes kamakeŋ araut atai, ido aamameak."
Isaiah40:18 Aso ituputoorete Edeke kwape kaŋai? Arai aput anyoin itiirianiata ŋes?
Isaiah40:19 Aput naegerer, ekeswaman ŋes itacalari, Ekatatan esabu ŋes iladai kesabu, Etataanakini ŋes irikoi luka epuesa."
Isaiah40:20 Ituŋanan yenikican yenimam epedori ainakin naikoni nen, Eseuni ekitoi lomam ipiri; Emouni ekeswaman loepiriana asipokin aput namam ijaŋijaŋa."
Isaiah40:21 Mam ca kijenunito? Mam ca kiirarito? Mam kilimonokinitai kageunet? Mam kimisiikis ageun kapeteta nuka akwap?
Isaiah40:22 Ŋopeŋol loiboie kokuju kalukunet naka akwap, Kosubito luibolete kotoma bala ibeerei; Loepesi akuj kwape aigalisit, Eterari ŋes kwape ewema lokibois."
Isaiah40:23 Itapalauni ŋesi ikapolok; Itarauni ikatubok luka akwap aamameak.
Isaiah40:24 Eebo, mam ber kiraitai; eebo, mam ber eyeitai; Eebo, mam ber aliasikec isiaranara kalup: Kosodi akutakin kes, erinyorete, Ekakaari etapipirio kes kwape ariaŋ."
Isaiah40:25 Ebala Lokalaunan ebe, “Aso kituputoorete eoŋ kwape kaŋai, Kasodi ariakakin kaŋes?”"
Isaiah40:26 Kiteluosi akusikonye kuju, koanyutu, Iŋai bo kesubi ŋun? Loitolomuni ajorekec kimarite: Emaanakini kes kere ikiroria; Kanuka apolou naka apedorike, Ido naarai egogoŋ ŋesi katitiŋ, Mam adiopet eoliori."
Isaiah40:27 Kanukinyo ibalar ijo, wu Yakob, Inera, wu Isirael, ebe, “Ibwaitai ekarot kinye EJAKAIT aanyun, Atubor atubokinioka kama ejai Ekadeke”?"
Isaiah40:28 Mam ca ijenunit? Mam ca iirarit? EJAKAIT ŋes Edeke lomam edaun, Lokasuban isaŋeta luka akwap. Mam iilori, karaida aipas; Mam epedorio amisiikin ajeŋunike."
Isaiah40:29 Einakini luiiloros atitiŋi; Iyatakini da agogoŋ ŋin yenemamei apedor.
Isaiah40:30 Karaida iiloros isap, epasete, Ibiroros ikatumunak kanuka ailolony:"
Isaiah40:31 Konye ŋul luidareunete EJAKAIT iteteunete akecegogoŋ; Eterarete abebenoka kwape imorukaalen; Ekerete, komam epasete; Elosete kakeje, komam iiloros,"
Isaiah41:1 Kililiŋata kakonyeneka, yes apujan; Kiteteut ituŋa akecegogoŋ: Kikunyutu kesi; kosodete einer: Kekunyakisi nepepe otube."
Isaiah41:2 Iŋai kitonyounit etuŋanan loebuni kokide, Loenyarauni ŋes kadolit abunore akejeke? ljaikini atekerin kakonyeneke, Einakini ŋes ayait ikabakan; gjaikini kes okilenike kwape apua, Kwape ariaŋ naekutaritai mama ejai akabwake."
Isaiah41:3 Erukitori kes, kotubor kainapakin; Korot lomam lem itorito akejeke."
Isaiah41:4 Iŋai bo kesubi, kiswama da, Lokenyarau aturio ameun kageunet? Eoŋ EJAKAIT, losodit, Ido nepepe ka lokawasia, eoŋ Ŋopeŋol,"
Isaiah41:5 Apotu apujana koanyut, kokuriakaros; Komaranata isaŋeta luka akwap: Kikunyutu, kopotu."
Isaiah41:6 Kiŋaranakinos ŋinituŋanan kikeidunyet; Kobala ŋinituŋanan onaceke ebe, “Kotitiŋior,”"
Isaiah41:7 Ekekeon isidiki ekatatan esabu, Loipadipadi kenyodo isidiki loedai kamoru, Ebala nuka airuc ebe, “Ejokuna”: Kimorianak kaseito, tetere mam ilokulokun."
Isaiah41:8 Konye jo, Isirael, ekakejaanakinan, Yakob loaseunit, Aur naka Aburaam opaperoka;"
Isaiah41:9 ijo lokekamuni kosaŋeta luka akwap, Lokanyarauni kagoriake, Katema jo ebe, “ljoŋ ekakejaanakinan, Kaseunit jo, mama kacakari cut.”"
Isaiah41:10 Sirikikurianar, naarai ajai eoŋ nepepe kajo; Sirikibur, naarai arai eoŋ Ekonideke: Ketogogoŋi jo; eebo, keŋarakini jo; Eebo, kegaŋi jo kakan nakoteten naka adoliteka."
Isaiah41:11 Koany, ŋul kere lukinyunyurikis jo, ileicikinete, itiriraete; Luiutas kajo eraunos mere ibore, eoliorete da,"
Isaiah41:12 Imoi ijo luiŋolopatar, mam idumuni kes: Ŋul lukisurokinete jo eraunos mere ibore, kwape ibore yenitai."
Isaiah41:13 Naarai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekonideke egagauni akonikan nakoteten, Kabala jo ebe, “Sirikikurianar; keŋarakini jo.”"
Isaiah41:14 Sirikikurianar, ijo ekurut Yakob, yes ituŋa luka Isirael; Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Keŋarakini jo, Ido ekalakunanikon ŋes Lokalaunan loka Isirael."
Isaiah41:15 Koany, ketuluori jo ibore yenikicomis yenikitetet, Yeneitara yenejaas ikel: Icomi ijo iroŋan, iriecirieci kes, Itusubi iukon kwape agugu,"
Isaiah41:16 Ipiesi kes, ekutari kes ekwam, Isiarisiari kes etapipirio, Ilelakini EJAKAIT, itopoloori Lokalaunan loka Isirael."
Isaiah41:17 Emootos lukican ka luilwaritos akipi, ido emameete, Eokete akeceŋaiepa kanuka akure; Eoŋ EJAKAIT aboŋokini kes, Eoŋ Edeke loka Isirael mam ajalakini kes,"
Isaiah41:18 Aŋaikini icorin kuju neelapat, Ka akonye nuka icowa kokidiŋ kaditon: Etarauni ais atapar naka akipi, Akwap naalarioŋ ikico luka akipi."
Isaiah41:19 Eraikini eres,* ka ekasia,* ka ekadas,* ka eseitun * loka ais toma ais; Ebwaikini eberos, * etidar, * ka eteasur kere nepepe amodiŋ:"
Isaiah41:20 Tetere eanyunete, ejenete, eomoomoete, Kojenutu nepepe ebe akan naka EJAKAIT ŋes eswamat ŋun, Lokalaunan loka Isirael ŋes asubi."
Isaiah41:21 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Koyaut akusikirot.” Ebala Ekabaka loka Yakob ebe, “Kitolomut nuitogogoŋito.”"
Isaiah41:22 Kitolomut kes, kolimokis sio nuclosete ajaun: Kolimokis nusodit, kwape ejaatar, kaomoomata, kajenutu awasiakec; Arai bo kitodikis sio akiro nuepote."
Isaiah41:23 Kolimokis sio akiro nuepote moolo, Kajenutu ebe iraas yesi idekesio: Ecbo, kiswamata nuejok, arai kiswamata nueroko, Kobur, kaŋolianakinos."
Isaiah41:24 Koany, iraas yesi atai, akusiswam da atai: Loketale ŋol lokiseuni yes."
Isaiah41:25 Etonyounit etuŋanan loebuni kagolitomei, adolu; Etuŋanan loiwonei ekakiror loebuni kaneelomunia akoloŋ: Ebunokini ŋesi ikayaitok kwape elupot, Kwape ipudapudaa ekajean elupe."
Isaiah41:26 Iŋai bo kilimokinit ameun kageunet, tetere kijenuni? Ido ameun apeŋo, tetere kinera ebe, “Edolit ŋesi”? Eebo, emamei yenelimokinit, eebo, emamei yenitodikinit, Eebo, emamei yeniirarit akusikiro."
Isaiah41:27 Eoŋ ageuni alimokin Sion ebe, “Koany, koany kes”: Ido ainakini Yerusalem yeneyauni akiro nukajokak."
Isaiah41:28 Arai kasesen, emamei idiotuŋanan; Emamei kotomakec ekapetan akiro loepedori aboŋokin akirot, Arai keŋit ŋes."
Isaiah41:29 Koany, kes kere, eraas aswamisiokec atai, mere ibore; Eraas akeceputosia nuecalara ekwam ka aamameak."
Isaiah42:1 Koany ekakejaanakinan, loegaŋit; Eseunaka, loisiyalamikinit akaijar; Epiik emoyoka tomake; Itodiari rwaru etube neejaas imo."
Isaiah42:2 Mam iworoi, karaida elulu, Karaida aisiirar ekeporoto korot."
Isaiah42:3 Mam ebili egada loiriecakina, Karaida aitudeŋ eusi loepuriei; Itodiari etube kotoma abeit."
Isaiah42:4 Mam esiliori karaida ajuruŋuŋ Aitodol neibwaikinia etube toma akwap; Idarete da apujana ikekisila.
Isaiah42:5 Inera kwanata Edeke EJAKAIT, ŋol lokolo asubi akuj, kopesia; Kotera akwap ka luelomunete kotomake; Loeinakini ituŋa luejaas tomake eiyeŋane, Ka emoyo da luelosenenete kanen ebe:"
Isaiah42:6 “Eoŋ EJAKAIT abu kanyarau jo kotoma adolit, Ketiŋenenei jo akonikan, kedarenenei jo, Kebwaik araun aitutuket naka ituŋa, aica da naka imo:"
Isaiah42:7 Aitwekenyun akonye numudukiok, Alemun lueenitai kaipany, Ka ŋul da luibolete kamuton kotogo loka aenis."
Isaiah42:8 Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT: ŋopeŋol ekakiror; Mam ainakini ice akaibuses, Karaida akaiturio mama ejaas aputosia nuegerer."
Isaiah42:9 Koany, adolut nuageete, alimonokin nukitetiak; Kalimonokinete kes eroko etakanuna.”"
Isaiah42:10 Koyeikis EJAKAIT ekosio lokitetet, Ka akeiturit da ageun kosaŋe loka akwap; Yes luijesaros aŋolol, ka luejaas tomake kere, Ka apujana, ka ŋul da luiboietc kotoma."
Isaiah42:11 Kikalalata amodiŋ ka ireria lukapolok luejaas toma, Ireria neibolo Kedar; Koyeikis luibojete kotoma Sela, Kikalalaete kaidiasia nuka iroŋan."
Isaiah42:12 Koinakis EJAKAIT aibuses, Ido kolimonokis akeiturit kapujana."
Isaiah42:13 Elomuni rwaru EJAKAIT kwape ekagogoŋon; Isidiki adunyanut kwape ekajion; Iworoi, eebo ikalalai; Iswamakini lukasurupoke nukagogoŋ,"
Isaiah42:14 Abu keliliŋ ape; kapala, kaŋirik; Natikwana amonyi bala aberu naeriebi aidoun; Kenyikonokin keyeŋanakin da."
Isaiah42:15 Etisili rwaru iroŋan ka iukon, Etirinyoori da luebwaŋete kere kotomakec; Etuluori icorin apujana, etooni da ataparin."
Isaiah42:16 Ayauni imudukiok korot loeolito; Etotori kes osokono lueolito; Esicauni amuton kakonyenekec, Etenari da aiboisio nuekudukudo. Asubi ŋun, kwabo mam enyeini kes,"
Isaiah42:17 Inyakario, ilcieikinete noi luemunosi aputosia nuegerer, Luelimokinete aputosia nuecalara ebe, “Iraas yesi ikosidekesio.”"
Isaiah42:18 Kiirasi, yes ikimiŋiok; Kosesenete, yes imudukiok, tetere ianyunete."
Isaiah42:19 Iŋai bo emuduki, dimarai ekakejaanakinan? Arai bo iŋai ekimiŋ, kwape ekakiyakia loejukari? Iŋai bo emuduki kwape ŋol loagitunit, Arai bo emuduki kwape ekejaanakinan loka EJAKAIT?"
Isaiah42:20 Itei ijo akiro nuipu, konye mam ianyuni kes; Epukoro akeki, konye mam epupi."
Isaiah42:21 Itojokit EJAKAIT aitopoloor ekisil, Kaitubusikin da, kanuka adoliteke."
Isaiah42:22 Konye lu kes ituŋa lueruruoritai, lukenataritai; Elokitai kes kere kapanya; itoŋopitai kaidarisia: Eraas lumejan, emamei yeneyuuni; Lunatan, emamei yenetemari atiar, “Kinyak.”"
Isaiah42:23 Iŋai bo kayesi loitoikini akit ŋun? Loepupuni loeirari da nuka apak naebunit?
Isaiah42:24 Iŋai bo ejaikinit Yakob aŋatario, Isirael da ikeruruok? Mere EJAKAIT? Lokipou kadiakasi kamakeŋ, Koŋeroto kesi alosit korotinike, Mam kerimarito ikisilake."
Isaiah42:25 Kanuka ŋun kobukoki ŋes aresiar naka anyunyurake, Ka agogoŋ da naka ejie; Kisinepik ŋes akim airimor, komam ŋes ejeni; Konomo ŋes, konye mam kibwaikinit etau."
Isaiah43:1 Konye kwana inera kwanata EJAKAIT loabu kosub jo, wu Yakob, Ŋol Iokiluŋuluŋi jo, wu Isirael, ebe: “Sirikikurianar, naarai kalaku jo; Kanyarit jo kokirorikon, irai Lokaŋ,"
Isaiah43:2 Arai itori toma akipi, ajaenena kajo; Toma ocorin, mam kiraparete: Arai itori toma akim, mam kinomori; Mam eiriani akim kama ijai,"
Isaiah43:3 Naarai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekonideke, Lokalaunan loka Isirael, eketajaranikon; Ainak Misiri araun lugelisikon, Etiopia da ka Seba kanukon."
Isaiah43:4 Naarai irai loka akais nuipu kakonyeneka, Lokayoŋio, kamina jo; Ŋes ainakinia ituŋa kanukon, Atekerin kanuka aiiarakon."
Isaiah43:5 Sirikikurianar; naarai ajai kaio: Ayauni eoŋ aurikon kokide, Kenotuni jo koto:"
Isaiah43:6 Alimokini agolitomei ebe; Koosik; Eŋalakimak da ebe, Sirikitikok: Koyau ikadwe lusap kama elwana, Ka lupesur da kosaŋe loka akwap."
Isaiah43:7 Ŋinidiopet yenemaikinio ekakiror, Yenabu kasub kanuka aibusesuka; Keluŋuluŋ ŋes; eebo, kasub eoŋ ŋes.”"
Isaiah43:8 Kitolomutu imudukiok luejaas akonye, Ka ikimiŋiok luejaas aki!"
Isaiah43:9 Kinotunos atekerin kere, kotukonokinos ituŋa; Iŋai bo idio kakesi epedori alimokin ŋun, Aitodikin oni akiro nusodit? Koyaut kesi ikajenakakec, kitojokai; Kopuputu kesi, kobalas ebe, Abeit ŋin."
Isaiah43:10 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Iraas yesi ikakajenak ka ekakejaanakinan lokaseunit: Tetere kiienete kiyuunete eoŋ, ljeŋunete ebe eoŋ Ŋopenol; Emamei Edeke lokesubitai ageikin eoŋ, Mam ejaun da lokatupakini."
Isaiah43:11 Eoŋ, eoŋ obe, arai EJAKAIT; Emamei eketajaran dimarai eoŋ,"
Isaiah43:12 Alimo eoŋ, etajar, etodik, Amamei edeke lomoit kamakus.” Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Kanuka ŋun iraas yesi ikakajenak, Eoŋ da arai Edeke."
Isaiah43:13 Eebo, agear lolo, eoŋ ŋopeŋol; Kwabo emamei yenepedori ayuun kakanika: Eswamai eoŋ, iŋai bo itikokini?”"
Isaiah43:14 Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT, ekusikalakunan, Lokalaunan loka Isirael ebe, “Kanukus ŋes kejukaria Babulon, Esijesari kes kere kwape luekerete, Kes Ikaludean, toma ameerin nuka aiyalamakec."
Isaiah43:15 Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, lokalaunanikus; Lokasuban loka Isirael, ekabakakus.”"
Isaiah43:16 Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT, Loesubi erot toma aŋolol, Esokot da toma akipi nukagogoŋ;"
Isaiah43:17 Loitolomuni agali ka ebalasi, ajore ka apedor; Eperete nepepe, mam enyounete; Erikaros, itudeŋio kwape eusi, ebe:"
Isaiah43:18 “Sirikiitut akiro nusodit, Karaida aomoom akiro nukasonya."
Isaiah43:19 Koany, eswamai eoŋ akirot nakitetet; Elibuni kwape kwana; mam yes ijenunete? Asubi eoŋ erot toma ais, Icorin da toma amodiŋ."
Isaiah43:20 Ketopoloorete eoŋ itiaŋ luka ais, ikuwei, ka ikuului; Naarai ainakini akipi kotoma ais, Icorin da kotoma amodiŋ, Aitamasia ituŋaka, luseuŋunaka;"
Isaiah43:21 Ituŋa luasubuni eoŋ Tetere elimonorete aiturioka.
Isaiah43:22 “Konye mam kiwonet eoŋ, wu Yakob; Ketapasa jo, wu Isirael."
Isaiah43:23 Mam kiiununei eoŋ ibaren ludidik luka ainakinetakus nuicweio; Mam kitubusikinit eoŋ kasubanakon. Mam kesilaŋirikinit jo ainanakin eoŋ ainakineta, Karaida aitapas jo kaluisupuruununo,"
Isaiah43:24 Mam kigwelanakinit eoŋ eitola kapesan, Karaida aisimonikin eoŋ kasiepai nuka asubanakon: Konye ibu ijo kisilaŋirikinite eoŋ karonisiokon, Kitapas eoŋ kanumam adolitekon,"
Isaiah43:25 “Eoŋ, eoŋ obe, ŋopeŋol loamwatari adiakanaretakon kanukaŋ; Mam eituni akonironisio."
Isaiah43:26 Kisiitunoi; kapurokinos: Kopet akonikiro, tetere kitojokio."
Isaiah43:27 Kodiaka papaakon losodit, Kopaasi ikejulakakon kamakaŋ."
Isaiah43:28 Kanuka ŋun ketisil ikapolok luka aibois nakalaunan, Kejaik Yakob araun ekenit, Ka Isirael da amoromoroo."
Isaiah44:1 “Konye kwana kiira, wu Yakob ekakejaanakinan; Ka Isirael loaseunit."
Isaiah44:2 Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT lokisubi, Lokiluŋuluŋi jo ameun kakoik, lokiŋarakini ebe; Sirikikurianar, wu Yakob ekakejaanakinan; Ka jo da, Yesurun, loaseunit."
Isaiah44:3 Naarai abukokini akipi ŋin yenejakit akure, Aguuruto da akwap naconit: Abukokini ekamoyo akoniwur, Arereŋuka da odwekon:"
Isaiah44:4 Elibunete kwape anya, Kwape ikito kama eleleata akip."
Isaiah44:5 Ebala ediopet ebe, ‘Arai eoŋ loka EJAKAIT’; Ece da emaikini bon ekiror loka Yakob; Ece da iwadikakini akanike ebe, ‘Loka EJAKAIT: Emaikini bon ekiror loka Isirael.”"
Isaiah44:6 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Ekabaka loka Isirael, Ekalakunanike da, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio: Ebe: Arai eoŋ losodit, arai lokawasia da; Kwabo emamei ecedeke dimarai eoŋ."
Isaiah44:7 Iŋai bo eputos keoŋ? Kolimo do, Kitejen kitemonok kaŋukan. Iŋai bo elimorit apeŋo akiro nuepote? Kitejenut ŋun nuejaunete rwaru,"
Isaiah44:8 Sirikiyoŋa, karaida akurianar: Mam apeŋo kalimonokini jo ka aitodianakin? Iraas yesi da ikakajenak. Ejai Edeke ece dimarai eoŋ? Eebo, emamei Atiiba; mam eoŋ ajeni adio da.”"
Isaiah44:9 Ŋul luesubete aput naegerer eraas kere aamameak; emamei ameda kotoma oborokec luisiyalamikinete: ikajenakakec da mam eanyunete karaida ajenun; tetere irumete ileic.
Isaiah44:10 Iŋai bo asubi edeke, arai kecalari aput naetatao naemamei ameda?"
Isaiah44:11 Koany, irumete ileic ipaupake kere; ikasubak da eraas ituŋa: kotukonokinai kere nepepe, kobwaata; ekuriakaros, irumete kere ileic."
Isaiah44:12 Etatai ekatatan aep, iswamai toma atotol, iluŋuluŋi kanyulia, esubi kakekan nakagogoŋ: eebo, eriebi eteŋei, emameun agogoŋuke; mam emasi akipi, iilor."
Isaiah44:13 Itemi ekekeon ekokoro; igiri kekalamu; esonyi kesonyet, itemi kaitemisio, ituputoori kwape aput naka ituŋanan, kwape ejaar atemelel naka ituŋanan, aiboi kotogoke."
Isaiah44:14 Ejepi iresia, eyaŋaari da etekwa ka elua, itogogoŋi kanukeŋ ediopet kokito luka amagoro: eraikini eberos, itani akiru."
Isaiah44:15 Kosodi konyet araun akito nuka ituŋanan; elemuni ipieri; eebo, inoki, ipoio inyamat: eebo, esubunia edeke, emai ŋes; esubunia aput na’ gerer, ekukonokini kakonyeneke."
Isaiah44:16 Icwei ŋesi atutubet kakim; atutubet ŋipeŋin ŋes enyamia akiriŋ; epei nupeon, imonikin: eebo, ipieri, kobala ebe, “Bu, amwanu eoŋ, aany akim.”"
Isaiah44:17 Nuesalito esubunia edeke, aputoke naegerer; ekukonokini ŋes emai da, ilipi ŋes, kobala ebe, “Koyuunai; naarai irai ijo ekadeke.”"
Isaiah44:18 Mam ejenete, karaida aomoom: naarai etumudak ŋesi akecekonye, tetere mam epedorete aanyun; ikecetauon da tetere mam epedorete ajenun."
Isaiah44:19 Emamei da yeniituni, emamei da aijen karaida amisiikin atemar ebe, “Ecweik eoŋ atutubet kakim; eebo, epoo atap katotoleke; ape akiriŋ, kanyam da; asubunia teni nuesalito ibore yeniketal? Akukonokini kereka apuŋure naka ekitoi?”"
Isaiah44:20 Enyami ŋesi ekurwon: etapaa etau loeŋalatai tetere mam epedori ayuun eketau, karaida atemar atiar, “Mere ejai aiŋal akanika nakoteten?”"
Isaiah44:21 Kiitu akiro nu, wu Yakob; Ka Isirael da, naarai irai ijo ekakejaanakinan; Eoŋ keluŋuluŋuni; irai ijo ekakejaanakinan; Wu Isirael, mam eoŋ kemurwokini jo."
Isaiah44:22 Amwata adiakanaretakon kwape edou loejamijami, Aronisiokon da kwape elisina: Koboŋu neajai; naarai kalaku jo."
Isaiah44:23 Koye, ijo akuj, naarai eswama EJAKAIT; Kikareoto yes atutubeta nukokwap nuka akwap; Kogeut ayoore, yes iroŋan, ljo amagoro, ka ŋolikitoi kotomake; Naarai alaku EJAKAIT Yakob, Itopolooritai koIsirael."
Isaiah44:24 Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT, ekalakunanikon, Ŋol lokiluŋuluŋi jo ameun kakoik ebe: “Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, loasubi kere; Loapesit bon akuj; loaterarit akwap; Iŋai ca ejai keoŋ?"
Isaiah44:25 Loerebokini aanyuneta nuka ikeŋalak, Esikerepikini ikaroak; Loetoboŋori lukacoa kau, Loesibanibani akeeeijen:"
Isaiah44:26 Loetogogoŋi akirot naka ekakeiaanakinan, Etodoli da ainerun naka ikiyakiaka; Loenera nuka Yerusalem ebe, ‘Edumuni luiboikinos toma’; Nuka ireria luka Yuda da ebe, ‘Edukio, Eoŋ da etonyouni aiboisiokec nuiswapito’:"
Isaiah44:27 Loalimokini ataro ebe, ‘Koono, Eoŋ da etooni icorinikon’;"
Isaiah44:28 Loenera nuka Kuro ebe, ‘Ŋes ekakecokon, Itodoli ŋes! kere nuakoto eoŋ’; Enera da nuka Yerusalem ebe, ‘Edukio’; Nuka eyekalu da ebe, ‘Epesio akonipeteta.’’’"
Isaiah45:1 Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT Iokinyonyoikitonoke akinyet, ŋes Kuro, Loetiŋit eoŋ akekan nakoteten, aitonokok atekerin kakonyeneke, Alacar aŋabes nuka ikabakan; Aŋaar ikekia kakonyeneke, Ido mam irutei egolonokinio:"
Isaiah45:2 Ebe: “Keŋarenikini eoŋ jo, Eiyakini aiboisio nuimugogolito: Abilibilei ikirigin luka aisinit, Atubutubei atiketa nuka asua."
Isaiah45:3 Kainakini jo iboro luka akais nuipu luka amuton, Abar da naibwaitai naka aiboisio nukaiyeiyea, Tetere ijenuni ebe Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, lokanyarit jo kekirorikon,"
Isaiah45:4 Kanuka Yakob ekakejaanakinan, ka Isirael loseunaka, Kanyarit jo kekirorikon: Kamaikinit jo ekiror, karaida mam kijenunit eoŋ."
Isaiah45:5 Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, emamei ece; Emamei Edeke dimarai eoŋ: Kaenikini arokoba, karaida mam kijenunit eoŋ."
Isaiah45:6 Tetere ejenunete ageun kalomun naka akoloŋ, Kiton to da, ebe emamei eee dimarai eoŋ: Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, emamei eee,"
Isaiah45:7 Eoŋ aluŋuluŋi aica, asubuni amuton; Ayauni ainapakin, asubuni aronis; Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, loeswamai ŋun kere,"
Isaiah45:8 “Kotep, ijo akuj, kokuju, Kobukut idouon adolit: Koooŋata da alup, tetere itolomunete aitajario, Isilibunete da adolit; Eoŋ EJAKAIT asubunit ŋun."
Isaiah45:9 “Itukwi ŋol loepegas ka Lokasubanike! Atibolok kotoma atiboloka nuka akwap! Iŋisi tope elupe ŋol lokiluŋuluŋi ebe, ‘Iswamai inyo?’ Arai aswamukon ebe, ‘Emameete ŋes akanin?’"
Isaiah45:10 Itukwi ŋol loebala papake ebe, ‘Iwuriei inyo?’ Arai aberu ebe, ‘Irieba awuruun inyo?’”"
Isaiah45:11 Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT, Lokalaunan loka Isirael, ido Lokasubanike ebe, “Kiŋitunai nuka akiro nuepote; Kicorakinai cabo nuka idweka, Ido nuka aswam naka akaninika."
Isaiah45:12 Asubunit eoŋ akwap, Asubunit da etuŋanan kotomake: Eoŋ, akakanin epesikinito akuj, Ecorakinit eoŋ ajoreke kere.”"
Isaiah45:13 Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe: “Etonyounit ŋes kadolit, eteteni ikerotin kere: Eduki ŋesi ekare, Eosikini atai lukaŋ lukireŋearitai, Mere kanuka agwelar, karaida aropio.”"
Isaiah45:14 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Aitaaritoi nako Misiri, ka lugwelanara luka Etiopia, Ka Isabean, ituŋa lukaojak, Epote mama ijai, eraunos lukon; Kitupakinete jo; epote kotoma orikoi: Kikukonokinos, kilipete jo ebe, ‘Abeit ejai Edeke mamakon; Emamei ece, emamei Edeke ece.’”"
Isaiah45:15 Abeit irai ijo Edeke loiŋopi, Wu Edeke loka Isirael, Eketajaran."
Isaiah45:16 Irumete kes ileice, eebo, itiriraete, kes kere: Edakaros akwesikec kere luesubete aputosia."
Isaiah45:17 Konye itajari EJAKAIT Isirael kaitajario namam edaun: Mam yes irumenenete ileice, Karaida aitirir ikar lumam edaunos."
Isaiah45:18 Naarai ebala kwanata EJAKAIT loasubuni akuj; Ŋes Edeke; Lokiluŋuluŋi akwap, kosub: Kiticat, mam asubuni atai, Kiluŋuluŋi tetere iboikinoi kotoma, ebe: “Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT; emamei eee."
Isaiah45:19 Mam abu kener kaiyeiyea, Kaibois naka akwap naka amuton; Mam kabala aur naka Yakob ebe, ‘Komoai eoŋ atai”: Eoŋ EJAKAIT enera nukadolit, Alimokini akiro nuetenete."
Isaiah45:20 “Kotukonokinos, kopotu; Kikunyutu, yes luikuata luka atekerin: Emamei kes aijen luedakete akitoi naka aputokec naegerer, Ilipete edeke lomam epedori aitajar,"
Isaiah45:21 Kolimosi, kikeut; Eebo, kinerutu nepepe. Iŋai bo kitoduunit ŋin ageun kasonya? Iŋai bo kelimokinit apeŋo? Mere Eoŋ EJAKAIT? Emamei ecedeke dimarai eoŋ; Edeke loedolit, ido eketajaran; Emamei ece dimarai eoŋ."
Isaiah45:22 “Kosesenai, kitaiarunos, isaneta kere luka akwap: Naarai arai eoŋ Edeke, emamei ece."
Isaiah45:23 Eyapoik kanukaŋ, Alomu akirot kaitukuka kadolit, Ido mam eboŋuni, ebe, ‘Kakukonokin ŋinikuŋ eoŋ, Keyapoikini ŋiniŋajep.’"
Isaiah45:24 Ejauni yenikabala ebe, Ejai adolit ka agogoŋ toma EJAKAIT bon: Epote ituŋa mamakeŋ, irumete ileice Ŋul kere luenyunyurikinete ŋes."
Isaiah45:25 Itojokio aur kere naka Isirael toma EJAKAIT, Ituro da.”"
Isaiah46:1 Akukokin Bel, akukum Nebo; Idokonokino aputosiakec otiaŋ, obaren da; Iboro luidakitos yesi eraunos ibwokon, Alaŋir kaneejaas itiaŋ luepasete,"
Isaiah46:2 Akukumo, akukonokinos nepepe; Mam apedorete ayuun alaŋiru, Konye ijoreorio kes ikulepek."
Isaiah46:3 “Kiirarai, ijo ekek loka Yakob, Aatoŋot kere naka ekek loka Isirael, Lukadakit ageun kakoik, Lukarioŋit ageun kauriokus:"
Isaiah46:4 Kiton amojoŋukus Eoŋ ŋopeŋol, Ido kiton abwaŋun akoruokus, eoŋ kadakit yes: Asub, ido egaŋi; Eebo, adaki, etajari da."
Isaiah46:5 “Aso kituputoorete eoŋ kaŋai, kitiirianete, Kitusubito eoŋ inyo, kaputokinos?"
Isaiah46:6 Luebukete esabu koriagi, Luitemete epuesa kaitemis, Eropete ekatatan-esabu, esubuni edeke; Ekukonokinos, eebo, emaete da,"
Isaiah46:7 Erioŋete ŋes kokeper, edakete ŋes, Esipokinete aiboisike, kobwoi kanen; Mam enyouni kaiboisike; Eebo, iwonei mutan ŋes, konye mam epedori aboŋokin, Karaida ayuun kocanike."
Isaiah46:8 “Kiitutu ŋun, kocerededata; Kisiitonokinos, yes ikadiakanarak."
Isaiah46:9 Kiitutu akiro nusodit nukasonya: Naarai arai eoŋ Edeke, emamei ece: Arai eoŋ Edeke, emamei yenikiputor eoŋ:"
Isaiah46:10 Alimori awasia ameun kageunet, Ido akiro nueriŋa iswama ameun apeŋo: Ebe, ‘Icasit akainerun, Ido etodolikini nuetojokit kere.’"
Isaiah46:11 Anyarauni ekweny loiraŋana kokide, Etuŋanan loka ainerunika anyoun kakwap naelwana; Eebo, ener, etodoli da; Alosikinit, ido eswamai."
Isaiah46:12 “Kiirarai, yes lueninik itauon, Luilwaka kadolit:"
Isaiah46:13 Esukunyuni adoliteka, mam elwana, Mam akaitajar itumori: Ebwaikini eoŋ aitajario Sion, Kanuka Isirael aibusesuka.”"
Isaiah47:1 Kijesun, kiboikin apua, ijo akoku nabekot naka Babulon; Kiboikin kwap komamei eicoloŋ loka ajakanut, ljo akoku naka Ikaludean:. Naarai mam bobo kinyaritai naenonok naijamamai."
Isaiah47:2 Kolem akaŋasia, kirie alos; Kolaca egoekon lokimukos, Kolaca da inapen, kisideleleo akeje, Kotubor kocorin."
Isaiah47:3 Epukorio amujalalakon, Eebo, etakanete ileicikon: Enyaŋi eoŋ, komam etimi idiotuŋanan."
Isaiah47:4 Ekalakunaniwok, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ŋes ekekiror, Lokalaunan loka Isirael."
Isaiah47:5 Kiboie kililiŋi, koloma amuton, ljo akoku naka Ikaludean: Naarai mam bobo kinyaritai Ajakait naka ajakanuto,"
Isaiah47:6 Abu kanyunyurik ikatuŋa, Ketisil akairumet, Kejaik kes akanikon: Mam ibu kitim kes: Kisibwok imakio ajookotokus kalaŋiru naepol."
Isaiah47:7 Ibu kotema atiar, “Araun ajakait ikar kere”; Kanuka ŋun mam ibwaikinit akiro ŋun otaukon, Karaida akiitun awasiakec."
Isaiah47:8 Aso do kiira nu, ijo naimina ailel, Naiboie kaijakak, Nainera kotaukon ebe, “Ajai eoŋ, ido emamei ece dimarai eoŋ; Mam eboikini kwape apuserut, Karaida aijen atwaniar idwe.”"
Isaiah47:9 Konye kidoikinete akiro ŋun aarei katipet kadiopepaaran, Atwaniar idwe, ka eipuserune: Kidoikinete jo kaitemisikec naedoliorit, Karaida kipuakata aipiedetakon, Kidilas da noi icudetakon,"
Isaiah47:10 Naarai imunokina nukaronokokon: Ibu kotema atiar, “Emamei yenikaanyuni”; Akonicoa ka akoniijen, kes kitapaarete: Kitema kotaukon atiar;” “Ajai eoŋ, emamei ece da dimarai eoŋ.”"
Isaiah47:11 Kanuka ŋun kibunokini aronis: Namam ipedori ailuc: Kidoikin ameŋeranut, namam ipedori airebokin: Kituriaikini jo asiles namam ijeni."
Isaiah47:12 Aso do kobwo kicudetakon, kaipiedetakon nuipu noi, Nukitaaritor ageun keiditeukon; Motoko ipedori akerianar, Motoko ipedori aitukurian."
Isaiah47:13 Kipas ijo kanuka aipues naka ainerunikon; Kobwaata bo ŋul luketiakete akuj, Ikerereok aacer, ikadwarak akiro nuka ŋolilap, Kitajarata jo kakiro nukibunokinete,"
Isaiah47:14 Koany, eraunos kwape ariaŋ; icwei kes akim; Mam eyuunos kapedor naka alian: Mam eraun atotol nukipiera, Karaida akim nakiririkina mamake."
Isaiah47:15 Ikote nen akiro nukitaaritor kamakon: Irimete luapotu kogwelanas kajo ageun keiditeukon, Ŋolituŋanan owaike; Emameun yenikitajari jo."
Isaiah48:1 Kiirasi yesi nu, yes lukokek loka Yakob, Luenyaritai ekiror loka Isirael, Lualomut kakipi nuka Yuda; Luiyapoete kolimito ekiror loka EJAKAIT, Luelimorete Edeke loka Isirael, Konye mere kabeit, karaida kadolit."
Isaiah48:2 Naarai inyarakina lukore lokalaunan, Igoŋakina mama ejai Edeke loka Isirael; EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ŋes ekekiror."
Isaiah48:3 “Alimo akiro nusodit ageun kasonya; Eebo, kolomut kaitukuka, ketodia kes: Keswama kes katipet, kodoloto."
Isaiah48:4 Naarai abu kajen ebe ininik ijo, Ekonimurisiŋ ŋes esilot lokasuat, Ereetekon aisinit;"
Isaiah48:5 Ŋes kalimokinia jo ageun kasonya; Ketodik jo eriŋa kedolo: Kinyek ijo atemar atiar, ‘Akaput ŋes eswamat ŋun, Ecorakis ŋun akaput naegerer ka akaput naicalara.’"
Isaiah48:6 Ibu kopup ŋun; koanyutu ŋun kere; Mam yes kilimokinete? Ketodik jo akiro nukitetiak ageun kapak kana, Akiro nuibwaitai numam ijenunit,"
Isaiah48:7 Esubunitai kwape kwana, mere ageun kasonya;- Kiton lolo mam lem ipupunit kes; Kinyek atemar atiar, ‘Koany, ajeni kes kolo.’"
Isaiah48:8 Eebo, mam ibu kopup; eebo, mam ibu kojen; Eebo, ageun kasonya mam epukoro akonikit: Naarai abu kajen ebe iswama noi kaimod, Kinyaritai ekapaaran ageun kakoik,"
Isaiah48:9 Kanuka ekirorika etilori akanyunyura, Kanuka akaiturio etikokini kamakon, Kenyek amudiar jo."
Isaiah48:10 Koany, keliliau jo, konye mere kwape epuesa; Kegimo jo koupa loka aiticanitoi,"
Isaiah48:11 Kanukaŋ teni, kanukaŋ, eswamai eoŋ ŋun; Naarai ikwaikini ai ekakiror itisilio? Mam ainakini ice akaibuses."
Isaiah48:12 Kiirarai, wu Yakob, ka Isirael lonyaraunaka; Eoŋ ŋopeŋol, Arai eoŋ losodit, ido arai lokawasia."
Isaiah48:13 Eebo, epesikinit akakan apeteta nuka akwap, Eterakinit akakan nakoteten akuj: Arai kanyarau kes, ebwoete nepepe."
Isaiah48:14 Kotukonokinos, yes kere, kopuputu; Iŋai bo kakesi elimorit ŋun? Emina EJAKAIT ŋes: Iswamakini ŋesi Babulon nuitojokit, Akekan da esurokini Ikaludean."
Isaiah48:15 Eoŋ, eoŋ obe, ener; eebo, anyarau ŋes: Kayau ŋes, ido ekerianar korotoke."
Isaiah48:16 Kikunyutu neajai, kopuputu nu; Ameun kageunet mam abu kener kaiyeiyea; Ageun kapak naajaar, ajai eoŋ.” Ido kwape kwana ejuku EJAKAIT eoŋ ka Emoyoke."
Isaiah48:17 Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT, Ekalakunanikon, Lokalaunan loka Isirael ebe: “Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekonideke, Lokisisianakini jo aimeda, Lokiŋarenikini jo korot lotikilosio."
Isaiah48:18 Wu okwe, tikiirasi aicorakinetaka! Ŋes konyet esubia ainapakinikon kwape ecor, Akonidolit da kwape akailan nuka aŋolol,"
Isaiah48:19 Ido esubi aurikon kwape asiŋe, Idwe luka akoikikon kwape kapuake: Ekekiror mam ti egelario karaida amudiario kakonyeneka,"
Isaiah48:20 Kolomasi koBabulon, kokera kama ejaas Ikaludean; Kitodiasi keporoto loka ayoore, kolimokis, Kinerasi kiton osaŋe loka akwap: Kobalas ebe, “Alaku EJAKAIT ekekejaanakinan Yakob.”"
Isaiah48:21 Mam kes ajakit akur nakiŋarenikinio kes kamodiŋo; Kisileleu akipi katiba kanukec: Kodi atiiba da, kilepunos akip."
Isaiah48:22 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Emamei ainapakin kaneejaas ikaronok.”"
Isaiah49:1 Kopupunoi, yes apujana; Kiirasi da yes ituŋa luilwaka: Abu EJAKAIT kanyarau kakoik; Kolimo ekakiror kaliliget naka totoka."
Isaiah49:2 Etusub akaituk bala ekileŋ loekwana, Kebwa kotoribe loka akanike; Ketarau ekojo loiputut, Ocoeke da ŋes karicitor:"
Isaiah49:3 Katema eoŋ atiar, “gjo ekakejaanakinan; Isirael, ŋes ketubusikinere.”"
Isaiah49:4 Konye katema atiar, “Abu ketaaritoi taai, Atwania akagogoŋ aloŋ, atwania taai: Konye abeit ejai akatubokinio neejai EJAKAIT, Ekaropit da ejaas ka Ekadeke.”"
Isaiah49:5 Natikwana inera EJAKAIT lokasubi eoŋ kotoma akoik Araun ekekejaanakinan, Ainyakakin ŋes bobo Yakob, Ido kotukonokinai Isirael neejai: (Naarai ebusu eoŋ kakonye nuka EJAKAIT, Ekadeke da arau akagogoŋ.)"
Isaiah49:6 Eebo, ebala ebe, “Erai akirot naebenen noi jo araun ekakejaanakinan Aitonyoun atekerin nuka Yakob, Ka aitajar luapiaŋunos kotoma Isirael: Kainakin jo da araun aica mama ejaas lukacekwapin, Koraenena akaitajar aitodol awasia naka akwap.”"
Isaiah49:7 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Ekalakunan loka Isirael, ido Ekalaunanike, Mama ejai ŋol loemenito ituŋa, ŋol loelait ateker, Ekejaanakinan loka ikayaitok, ebe: “Eanyunete ikabakan, enyounete; Lukapolok da, emaete; Kanuka EJAKAIT loerai emunot, Ekalaunan loka Isirael, loabu koseu jo.”"
Isaiah49:8 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT ebe, “Kaboŋok jo kapak nakacamunia, Ido keŋarak kapaaran naka aitajario: Ido kekuniai jo, Kainak araun aitutuket mama ejaas ituŋa, Aiticat akwap, aisurum airumeta nukamejei;"
Isaiah49:9 Kolimonokini ŋul lueenitai ebe, ‘Kolomasi,’ Ka ŋul luejaas kamuton ebe, ‘Kitoduunos.’ Enyamenenete korotin, Komor kere luelapat nen eraun eronyikec,"
Isaiah49:10 Mam kes eriebenenei eteŋei, karaida akure; Kwabo mam enomonori akoloŋ karaida aibuse: Naarai ŋol loitimi iŋarenenokini kes, Eyanaanari da atanin,"
Isaiah49:11 Ido etuluori ikaroŋan kere araun erot, Iturio da ikarotin."
Isaiah49:12 Koany, epote lu kama elwana; Ido, koany, epote lu kagolitomei koto da; Ido epote lu kakwap naka Sinim,"
Isaiah49:13 Koye, ijo akuj; kolakar, ijo akwap; Kogeut ayoore, yes iroŋan: Naarai etalaka EJAKAIT iketuŋja, Ido itimi luke lukiticanio."
Isaiah49:14 Konye kobala Sion ebe, “Kajalak YAWE, Kemurwoki EJAKAIT.”"
Isaiah49:15 “Epedori aberu ikekoku yenenaki aimurwokin, Komam isionie okoku loka akoikike?” Eebo, epedorete ŋun aimurwokin, Konye mam eoŋ kemurwokini jo."
Isaiah49:16 Koany, kegiranakinit jo otauon luka akaninika; Ejaenenas arwatatinikon kakonyeneka tiritir."
Isaiah49:17 Isunyito ikadukokokon adepar ikamudiarakakon, Elomarete da ŋul lukitisilete kamakon."
Isaiah49:18 Kiteluo akonikonye, ido koany: Etukonokinos ŋul kere, epote mamakon. Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kwape ajaria, Abeit inapi kes kere kwape lukisiro, Iyogogoi kwape ateran."
Isaiah49:19 Naarai aiboisiokon nuiswapito nuesilok, Ka akwapukon naemudiara, Abeit kwape kwana ididinik luibojete kotomakon, Ŋul da lukilikorete elwakaros."
Isaiah49:20 Etemarete idwe luaurio kapak naka atwaniarikon akiikon ebe, “Kadidiŋiki eoŋ aibois: Konyaikinai keboikin.’"
Isaiah49:21 Kosodi ijo atemar kotaukon atiar, “Iŋai bo kaurikini ŋul, Naarai atwania idweka, do acuduŋun bon, Arai nakereŋearitai, nairimi lailo ka laije? Iŋai esai ŋul? Koany, asal bon; ai bo kejaas ŋul?’”"
Isaiah49:22 Ebala EJAKAIT Edeke kwanata ebe, “Koany, ekeari akakan mama ejaas atekerin, Asipokini aanyuneteka mama ejaas ituŋa: Eyaunete odwekon katorobusiokec, Erioŋakinete adwekon okepirinikec."
Isaiah49:23 Eraunos ikabakan lukapapakon lukisaete, Akabakanakee da nukatotokon nukisaete: Ekukonokinos jo kitulurito akecekonyen kwap, Emeete adae nukakejekon; ljeŋuni da ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, Ŋul da lukedareunete mam irumete ileic.”"
Isaiah49:24 Edemario tope lumejan kama ka ikagogoŋok? Arai bo eyuunio lukikamuna luka ekadoliton?
Isaiah49:25 Konye ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Edemario cabo lukikamuna luka ikagogoŋok, Eyuunio da lumejan luka lusogim: Naarai kiŋolopikin eoŋ kaŋol loiŋolopas kajo, Etajari ikonidwe."
Isaiah49:26 Etanyami eoŋ ŋul lukimwanito jo akiriŋikec kikulepek; Emerikinos akeceokot kikulepek, kwape kebino loewiny. Kosodete ejenunete awat kere ebe, Eoŋ EJAKAIT arai eketajaranikon, Ekalakunanikon, Ekagogoŋon loka Yakob.”"
Isaiah50:1 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Ali bo ebalua loka aireŋear totokus, Lokereŋearia ŋes? Arai bo iŋai bo kaŋul lukeburaete loabu ketwegel yes? Koany, kigwelaritai kanuka numam adolitekus, Ireŋearitai totokus kanuka adiakanaretakus."
Isaiah50:2 Kanukinyo kemamear ituŋanan naabunitor eoŋ? Nakanyaritor, kemamear yeneboŋokini? Aurianar cabo akakan, tetere mam epedori alakun? Emamei kereka eoŋ apedor ayuun? Koany, arai ketoron, etooni aŋolol, Etusubi icorin kwape amodiŋ: Ebosuunete iborokec lukecor, naarai emameete akip, Etwakete akure."
Isaiah50:3 Etanapi eoŋ aku; amonut, Emukori ŋes kepuko.”"
Isaiah50:4 Kainak EJAKAIT Edeke eoŋ aŋajep naka ŋul kaluisisianakinitai, Tetere ajeni aigaŋ kakiro ŋin yenepasit: Itikwenyuni ŋinitupurue, Itikwenyuni akakit akiiranar kwape ŋul luisisianakinitai."
Isaiah50:5 Apuko EJAKAIT Edeke akakit, Ido mam eoŋ epaliono, Karaida aboŋor kau."
Isaiah50:6 Abu kainak epuraka ikasenesenok, Iitinyoka da mama kaŋul lukenyulanarete ajul: Mam abu karap akakonyen koleic Ka aimwanakinio da aimul."
Isaiah50:7 Naarai keŋarakini EJAKAIT Edeke, Ŋes mam etiriraa; Ŋes keticasia akakonyen bala eikep, Ido ajeni ebe mam kerumete ileic."
Isaiah50:8 Eapie ŋesi loketojoki eoŋ; Iŋai ca ketoŋolopi? Kabwaata bo nepepe. Iŋai ca lokekoloka? Kikuny mama ajai.
Isaiah50:9 Koany, EJAKAIT Edeke kenarakini; Iŋai ca ŋin yenikesitelekari? Koany, emojoŋete rwaru kesi kere kwape anapito; Idonyorete ikajekel kes pit."
Isaiah50:10 Iŋai ca kokidiŋikus yeneyoŋit EJAKAIT, Yenerimarit eporoto loka ekebulesit? Ŋin yenelosenenei kamuton, komam aica, Komun do ŋesi ekiror loka EJAKAIT, Kieatunitor Ekedeke."
Isaiah50:11 Koanyutu, yes kere luisinepete akim, Iyeŋanakinos bonik akalasia; Kolosenenete kotoma aica naka akimikus, Ido toma akalasia nuisinepata. Idumunete na kakanika, Iperete kotoma aiturur."
Isaiah51:1 “Kiirarai, yes luitupete adolit, Yes luimootos EJAKAIT: Kosesenata atiiba kama kikeunere, Apedot da naka aipany kama kibokunere,"
Isaiah51:2 Kosesenata Aburaam papaakus, ka Sara da nakiwurie: Naarai nakeraar ediopet bon kanyarau ŋes, Kesirereŋ, ketalal ŋes noi."
Isaiah51:3 Naarai etalaka EJAKAIT Sion, Etalaka aiboisioke kere nuiswapito, Etuluo aisuke kwape Eden, Amodiŋike kwape emanikor loka EJAKAIT; Edumunos kaŋeri ailel ka aiyalama, Aimal, ka eporoto loka ayoore."
Isaiah51:4 “Kopupunoi, yes ikatuŋa; Kitoikinai akit, ijo atekereka: Naarai elomuni ekisil kamakaŋ, Etarauni eoŋ etubeka aica naka ituŋa."
Isaiah51:5 Eapie adoliteka, aloma aitajaraka, Etubokinete akakanin ituŋa; Kedareunete apujana eoŋ, emunos akakan."
Isaiah51:6 Kiteluosi akusikonye kuju toma akuj, Kosesenata da akwap kokwap: Naarai ilicari akuj kwape apuru, Emojoŋi akwap kwape egoe, Luibolete kotoma da etwakete kwape isiru: Konye ejaenena akaitajar ikar kere, Akadolit da mam itapalaunio."
Isaiah51:7 “Kiirarai, yes luijenete adolit, Ituŋa luejaas ekakisil otauonokec; Sirikikuriakaros amorosit naka ituŋa, Karaida aburun kanuka amoromorokee."
Isaiah51:8 Naarai enyami kes ekajekelut kwape enyamia egoe, Enyami kes aeoroi kwape ajul: Konye ejaenena akadolit ikar kere, Akaitajar da aitodol aturio kere.”"
Isaiah51:9 Kokweny, kokweny, konap agogoŋ, ijo akan naka EJAKAIT; Kokweny, kwape kapaarasia nukasonya, aturio nukolo karobai. Mere jo naitubutubee Rakab, nakicumi apiu?"
Isaiah51:10 Mere jo nakitooni aŋolol, akipi nuka ataro naepol; Nakituluori aidules naka aŋolol erot loetuborotor lulakuna?"
Isaiah51:11 Ido eboŋunete lugweluna luka EJAKAIT, epote Sion kayoore; Ejaun ailel namam edaun akwesikec: Edumunete ailel ka aiyalama, Ilicaros aiturur ka eidiny."
Isaiah51:12 “Eoŋ, eoŋ obe, ŋopeŋol loketalakaari jo: Iŋai bo jo tetere ikuriana etuŋanan loetwani, Okoku loka etuŋanan da loeluori kwape anya?"
Isaiah51:13 Kimurwok EJAKAIT Lokasubanikon, Loeterakinit akuj, kopet apeteta nuka akwap; Ikuriana tiritir apaaran kere kanuka adedeŋ naka ekamwaŋan, Naitemokinio ŋesi amudiar; Ani bo adedeŋ naka ekamwaŋan?"
Isaiah51:14 Eenat loijoreoritai eosikinio katipet; Mam etwani kwabo mam elomari aipany, Karaida ikenyamat aiŋoŋar."
Isaiah51:15 Naarai arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekonideke, Loiguri aŋolol tetere irurumaete akailan: EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ŋes ekekiror."
Isaiah51:16 Ebwaik akakiro aitukukon, Kebwait jo kotoribe loka akanika, Tetere eraikini akuj, Apesi apeteta nuka akwap, Alimokini Sion ebe, ‘Iraas yesi ikatuŋa.’’’"
Isaiah51:17 Kokweny, kokweny, kobwo, ijo Yerusalem, Loimasit kakan naka EJAKAIT adere naka anyunyurake; Ibu komat asidak nakotoma adere naka aigetigeta, aikokoor."
Isaiah51:18 Emamei loinarenikini ŋes kodwe kere luaurie: Emamei da loirikit akekan kodwe kere luasai ŋesi.
Isaiah51:19 Kidoikis jo akiro nu nuarei; Iŋai bo kimonyi? Asilio ka amudiar, ebeli ka ekileŋ: Ekwaikini eoŋ ai ketalakari jo?"
Isaiah51:20 Eiloros odwekon, eperete korotin kere kwape ekal kotoma oboi; Aup kes adedeŋ naka EJAKAIT, Airetakin naka Ekonideke."
Isaiah51:21 Aso do kiira nu, ijo naiticanitoi, Naimera, konye mere kanuka ebino:"
Isaiah51:22 Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT kon, EJAKAIT, Ekonideke loepurokini akirot naka iketuŋa ebe, “Koany, alema eoŋ kakanikon adere naka aigetigeta, Atany naka adedeŋuka; Mam bobo imasenenei:"
Isaiah51:23 Ebwaikini akan naka ŋul kalukiticanete; Lukilimokinete aijarakon ebe, ‘Kokukum, katuboros’; Ituluo epurakon kwape akwap, Ido kwape erot, kotubonorotor kesi.”"
Isaiah52:1 Kokweny, kokweny, konap akonigogoŋ, ijo Sion; Konap inapenekon lukaseganut, ljo Yerusalem, ere lokalaunan: Naarai amear lolo mam bobo elomununei tomakon Yenimam ekepitai ka yenimam elai."
Isaiah52:2 Kitotwaar apua; konyou, kiboikin, ijo Yerusalem: Kolacakin korikoi lukomurisiŋikon, ljo apese naka Sion nakinataritai."
Isaiah52:3 Naarai inera kwanata EJAKAIT atiar, “Kiponi kogwelar atai; ido kilakunio komam apesan."
Isaiah52:4 Naarai inera kwanata EJAKAIT Edeke ebe, Ageun apotu ikatuŋa koloto Misiri aiboiororoi ŋina; koreu kes Eyasuriat atai."
Isaiah52:5 Inera EJAKAIT ebe, Aso natikwana asubi nyo kane, naarai aponi koyanaara ikatuŋa atai? Inera EJAKAIT ebe, Eresianaros ŋul lueyaito, emoromoroo da ekakiror duc apaaran kere."
Isaiah52:6 Ŋes ejenuniata ikatuŋa ekakiror: ŋes ejenuniata kapaaran kaya ebe Eoŋ ŋopeŋol loenera: koany, Eoŋ lopelo.”"
Isaiah52:7 Ejokuka ca ma koroŋan akeje nuka ŋol kaloeyaunit akiro nukajokak, Loelimori ainapakin, loeyaunit akiro nukajokak nuka ajokis, Loelimori aitajario; Loebala Sion ebe, “Irumit Ekonideke!”"
Isaiah52:8 Eporoto loka ikonikedarak! Ikeseunete eporoto,ikosiete nepepe; Naarai eanyunete rwaru akoŋu ka akoŋu, Naeboŋunio EJAKAIT Sion."
Isaiah52:9 Korwaunos ailel, koyooto nepepe, Yes aiboisio nuiswapito nuka Yerusalem; Naarai etalaka EJAKAIT iketuŋa, Alaku Yerusalem."
Isaiah52:10 Esideleleu EJAKAIT akekan nakalaunan kakonye nuka atekeriŋ kere, Isaŋeta kere luka akwapisinei eanyunete aitajar nake: Ewokodeke."
Isaiah52:11 Koloto, koloto, konyout kanen, Sirikitirosi ibore kere yenimam elai; Konyout kokidiŋike; Kitalaunos, yes luidakito iboro luka EJAKAIT."
Isaiah52:12 Naarai mam inyounete imaranete, Kwabo mam ilosete ikerete; Naarai kiŋarenikin yes EJAKAIT: Ido kitupit yes Edeke loka Islrael."
Isaiah52:13 Koany, iswamai rwaru ekakejaanakinan kacoa, Iturio, itopoloorio, ikiar noi."
Isaiah52:14 Kwape kiwumokinitotor jo luipu, (Emunauna akekonyen aitelekarit ituŋanan kere, Ka akesubunet aitelekarit naka idwe luka ituŋa.)"
Isaiah52:15 Kwaŋin isirieŋuni atekerin nuipu; Ebutarete ikabakan kanukeŋ: Naarai eanyunete numam alimonokinitai kes: Ejenunete da numam kiiranarito.
Isaiah53:1 Iŋai iyuunit nukiirarit? Ido iŋai epukokinitai akan naka EJAKAIT?
Isaiah53:2 Naarai kopoloor kakonyeneke kwape yenikiraa yenitosokok, Kwape aliasit naelomuni kaneeonit: Emamei asubunet karaida aliogotot, tetere kiseseni ŋes, Emamei atemelel nakisiŋobelei."
Isaiah53:3 Aponi komenai, koŋeroto ituŋa; Etuŋanan lokican, loenaikinit aiturur: Kwape loibwaiata ituŋa akecekonyen komenai kwaŋin, Komam kinyarit idiobore."
Isaiah53:4 Abeit abu kibwok aitururuwok, kodaka icaniwok: Kwabo kipou kaomitos bala isiriebitai, Iticanitai Edeke, ereitai."
Isaiah53:5 Konye aponi kimusuŋai kanuka epaliwok, Aponi komacarai kanuka numam adolitewok: Aiticanio kanuka ainapakiniwok kojai kaŋes; Ikemaearin kes kitaŋaleunete oni."
Isaiah53:6 Kapaasi oni kere kwape amerekekin: Kibelokin ŋinituŋanan orotoke: Ebwaiki EJAKAIT kamake numam adolitewok kere,"
Isaiah53:7 Aponi kimanai, kwabo kitasono komam eonit akeituk; Kwape kimerekek yeneyaŋaario aario, Ido kwape ililiŋia amerekek kakonyen nuka ikekatubok ajul: Eebo, mam kooŋ akeituk."
Isaiah53:8 Koyaŋaarai kanuka aimanit ka etube; Ido luka aketur, iŋai kakesi abu koomite ebe aponi kogelarai Anyoun kakwap naka lukajarak? Aponi kisiriebai kanuka epali loka ikatuŋa,"
Isaiah53:9 Kobokikis akeilit nepepe ka lukaronok, Ido ka lukabarak katwanareke; Karaida mam kipaliikinit, Kwabo komamei aiŋalanut kaitukuke."
Isaiah53:10 Konye itojokit EJAKAIT amacar ŋes; Kisiturur; Naainakinia akeijar araun asubanit kanuka aronis, Eanyuni akeur, iyatakini akepaarasia, Ka ŋun nuemin EJAKAIT ekeriakaros kakanike."
Isaiah53:11 Eanyuni nuepote kaitaaritoi naka akeijar, ido italakarete: Kanuka aijeneke einakini ekakejaanakinan loedolit luipu adol Ibwoki numam adolitekec."
Isaiah53:12 Tape akorakini ŋes akorakinet nepepe ka lukapolok, Etiaki iŋatan nepepe ka lukagogoŋ: Naarai abu koluŋak akeijar kiton atwanare, Kimarakinai ka ikadiakanarak: Kwabo abu kibwok aronis naka luipu, Epurokini lukadiakanarak."
Isaiah54:1 Koye, ijo narakan, ijo namam iuriei; Kogeu ayoore, kikare, ijo namam irieba aidoun. Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ipu idwe luka naesilikinit adepar idwe luka aberu ekiliokit."
Isaiah54:2 Kitalala aibois naka ewemakon, Koterarai aigalisio nuka aiboisiokon; Sirikitikok: Kitoojaa aunoikon, kitogogoŋ da iloinokon."
Isaiah54:3 Naarai ikaikini akan nakoteten ka nakokediany da; Irumi akoniur atekerin, Isiboikini ituŋa oreria luesilok,"
Isaiah54:4 Sirikikurianar; naarai mam ileic kirumito: Karaida aitirir; naarai mam isurumio ileic: Naarai kimurwokinete ileic luka eiditeukon, Ido mam bobo iituni amorosit naka, eipuserunekon."
Isaiah54:5 Naarai Lokasubanikon ŋes okilenikon; EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ŋes ekekiror: Lokalaunan loka Isirael ŋes Ekalakunanikon: Enyaritai Edeke loka akwapisinei kere.
Isaiah54:6 Naarai ebala Ekonideke ebe, Kinyarit EJAKAIT jo kwape aberu naejalakinitai, naekadakir komoyoke, Aberu naka atumun, nairenearere,"
Isaiah54:7 Kajal jo apak naedit noi; Konye katukonokini jo kaitim naepol.
Isaiah54:8 Ebala EJAKAIT ekalakunanikon ebe, Kanyunyura naelapara abu kebwa akakonyen kamakon apak naedit; Konye ketimi jo kasianut namam edaun."
Isaiah54:9 Naarai esubito nu kwape akipi nuka Noa kamakaŋ; Naarai kwape keyapoikinia ebe mam bobo enatarete aki nuka Noa akwap, Eyapoi kwaŋin ebe mam kanyunyurikini jo, Karaida airetakin."
Isaiah54:10 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT lokitimit jo ebe, Enyounete ironan, ijaŋiianas iukon; Konye mam enyouni akasianut kamakon, Karaida akaitutuket naka ainapakin mam ijaŋijaŋa."
Isaiah54:11 Wu jo nakitieanitoi, nailiganari ekwam, namam italakario, Koany, ebwaanakini akonimor ojeseslo luejokuka, Apetanakini apetetakon asapiro."
Isaiah54:12 Asubakini adirisanakon amor nukareŋak, Iruteikon amor nuimilias, Eikorukon kere da amor nuisiyalamikinete,"
Isaiah54:13 Isisianakini EJAKAIT ikonidwe kere, Epol da ainapakin naka ikonidwe."
Isaiah54:14 Kiticasitai kadolit: Ilwana ijo kamwaŋio, naarai mam ikurianari; Ilwana da kotasuro, naarai mam kikunyakini jo"
Isaiah54:15 Koany, motoko isidikete aŋolopa, Konye mere eoŋ loesidikit: Ŋin yenesidiki aŋolopa aluikin jo, Ibirori ŋesi kanukon."
Isaiah54:16 Koany, kasub ekatatan loicuki akim naka atotol, Elemuni ŋesi ibore yenikiswamas akeswam; Kasub da ekamudiaran tetere emudiari."
Isaiah54:17 Mam ekerianar ibore yenesubitai asurokinia jo; Itelekari ŋiniŋajep nakinyoikini jo kotube. Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ŋin ŋes airumet naka ikejaanakinak luka EJAKAIT, Ido adolitekec naebuni kamakaŋ."
Isaiah55:1 Yesi ba, ŋinidiopet yenejakit akur, Kopotu yesi neejaas akip, Ŋin da yenemameete apesan: Kopotu yesi, kogwela konyama; Eebo, kopotu, kogwela ebino ka akile, Komameete apesan, komamei da etiai."
Isaiah55:2 Kanukinyo iinakiniata akusipesan agwelia ibore yenimam erai inyamat? Aitaaritoikus agwelia lumam kisimonikinete? Kodunyakis akiirar eoŋ, konyamata lucjokuka, Kisiyalamikis atarion."
Isaiah55:3 Kitoikis akiikus, kopotu neajai; Kiirasi, ejari do akusiijar: Etutuki eoŋ aitutuket namam edaun kayes, Ŋes aitim nakabeit naka Daudi."
Isaiah55:4 Koany, ainak ŋes araun ekajenan mama ejaas atekerin, Ekeŋarenikinon ido ekeeoranakinan mama ejaas atekerin."
Isaiah55:5 Koany, inyarauni ateker namam ijeni, Ido ekeruni ateker namam lem kijeni jo mama ijai, Kanuka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, Ido kanuka Lokalaunan loka Isirael; Naarai kitopoloo ŋesi jo"
Isaiah55:6 Komoata EJAKAIT kapak naepedoror adumun, Kiwoneete ŋes kapak naeapiar."
Isaiah55:7 Kojal ikaronon ekerot, yenimam adolit da akeomisio: Koboŋu mama ejai EJAKAIT, itimi ŋes; Mama ejai Edekewok, naarai isionie noi."
Isaiah55:8 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Akaomisio mam eraas akusiwomisio, Karaida ikusirotin mam eraas ikarotin."
Isaiah55:9 Naarai kwape iceleleo akuj adepar akwap, Kwape kwaŋin iceleleoto ikarotin adepar ikusirotin, Akaomisio da adepar aomisiokus."
Isaiah55:10 Naarai kwape etepia akiru ka akaka abunore kakuj, Komam eboŋori ŋina, konye icocoi alup, Isibwaŋuni isiburukunyi, Einakini ekayean ikinyom, ekanyaman da inyamat;"
Isaiah55:11 Ejaun kwape kwaŋin akakirot naelomuni kaitukuka; Mam eboŋuni mama ajai epalapalat, Konye itodoli nuetojokit eoŋ, Ido ekerianari kanueyakiaria."
Isaiah55:12 Naarai ilomarete kailel, iŋarenikinio kainapakin; Egeunete iroŋan ka iukon ayoore kakonyenekus, Ibapete ikito kere luka ais akecekanin."
Isaiah55:13 Elomuni eberos aibois naka ekukwai, Elomuni eteasur aibois naka ekodokodoi: Eraun ekiror mama ejai EJAKAIT, Aanyunet namam edaun namam egelario."
Isaiah56:1 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Kidarenenete etube, kiswamaenenete adolit: Naarai eapie akaitajar abunore, Akadolit da apukorio."
Isaiah56:2 Isirereŋitoi ituŋanan yeniswamai ŋun, Okoku loka etuŋanan da loiketakini kes: Yenerieenenei asabato kinyek aitisil, Yenitikokini akekan kinyek aiswamaenen adioronis kere.”"
Isaiah56:3 Kinyek imoit yenimorikikina neejai EJAKAIT atemar atiar, “Abeit kagitari EJAKAIT eoŋ kotuŋake”; Kinyek ebwacit da atemar atiar, “Koany, arai eoŋ ekitoi loeonit.”"
Isaiah56:4 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Ibwaein luericenenete asabatonoka, Lueseunete akiro nuetojokit eoŋ, Luiketakinete akaitutuket:"
Isaiah56:5 Ainakini eoŋ kes kotogoka, ido kotoma arwatatinika, Aiitunet ka ekiror loitelekarit idwe lusap ka lupesur; Ainakini kes ekiror lomam edaun, Lomam egelario."
Isaiah56:6 “Ido imo, luimorikikina neejai EJAKAIT, Aijaanakin ŋes, lueminasi ekiror loka EJAKAIT, Lueraunos ikejaanakinakake, Ŋinidiopet yenericenenei asabato kinyek aitisil, Yeniketakini akaitutuket;"
Isaiah56:7 Ayauni eoŋ kes neejai eroŋataka lokalaunan, Ainakini kes alakara kotogoka lokilipet; Ecamakinitai ainakinetakec nuicweio, ka asubanakec kotemuka: Naarai enyaritai ekatogo etogo lokilipet loka ituŋasinei kere."
Isaiah56:8 Ebala EJAKAIT Edeke loetukonokini luereŋearitai luka Isirael ebe, Atukonokini ice da mamakeŋ, nepepe kalukeŋ luatukonokinitai.”"
Isaiah56:9 Yes itiaŋ kere luka ais, kopotu ainyam, Yes itiaŋ kere luka amagoro,"
Isaiah56:10 Eraas ikekedarak imudukiok, kes kere emamei aijen: Eraas kere iŋokwo lubaŋiok, mam epedorete eirem; Irujaete, eperete, eminas ajo."
Isaiah56:11 Eebo, iraŋaaka iŋokwo, mam imonianakinos; Ido lu kes ikeeokok lumam epedorete ajenun: Ebelokinos kere orotokee bonik, Ŋolidiopet kakemeda, kes kere,"
Isaiah56:12 Ebalas ebe, “Kopotu yesi, kiwomi ajon, Kedeŋeoto nuitemerete; Moi da eputoori lolo, epol adepar aitemis.”"
Isaiah57:1 Eoliori ikadoliton, emamei yenibwaikini ŋun etau; Elemario ikasiakak, Emamei yeneomoomoi ebe elemaritai ikadoliton karonis,"
Isaiah57:2 Elomakini ainapakin; Ibworarete koitadanakec, Ŋinidiopet yenelosi itenara."
Isaiah57:3 Konye kikunyutu ne, yes odwe luka akacudan, Aur naka lodote ka naadote."
Isaiah57:4 Iboliatar iŋai? Iniŋitotor iŋai? Imielanakinotor iŋai aŋajepa? Mere yesi idwe luka adiakar, aur naka aiŋal,"
Isaiah57:5 Yes luitumulaunete aiŋobel kotoma oluan, Kokwap kanolikitoi loepesit; Luiarakinete idwe aditon, Kaeilana nuka atiiban?"
Isaiah57:6 Ewaikus ejai neejaas amor nuerurut nuka aditon; Kes, kes ba, nuebeikinit ekoniroet: Ibu kobukok kes ainakinet namatan, Ibu koinak ainakinet naka akiria. Kesiyamikinete kereka ŋun eoŋ?"
Isaiah57:7 Itemokinit eitadakon koroŋat loeoja loicelelei: Ibu kolot ŋina da ainakin asuban.
Isaiah57:8 Isipokinit aiitunetekon kau kikirigin ka acuneta: Naarai ipukokinit mama ejai ece lomere eoŋ, idoka; Ibu kitalala eitadakon, kitutuk kakes, Komina eitadakec kama kianyunia."
Isaiah57:9 Ibu kolot mama ejai ekabaka kakinyet, Iyatakinit iponesio luegelegela lukakinyet lueurok maa, Kijuka ikiyakiakon kama elwana, Neidul kiton Okatwak."
Isaiah57:10 Kitapas alwanis naka erotokon; Konye mam ibu kotema atiar, “Emamei amun”; Idum aikwarun naka agogoŋukon; Ŋes mam iiloror."
Isaiah57:11 Irioŋi ikurianari iŋai tetere iŋalai, Komam kiitunit eoŋ, karaida aibwaikinit otaukon? Mam keliliŋikinit apak naepol, Ido mam jo ikurianar eoŋ?"
Isaiah57:12 Alimokini akonidolit; Akoniswamisio da mam kimedaikinete,"
Isaiah57:13 Naimonyia, koyuut ca aputosia nuitukonok ijo; Konye ekutari kes ekwam, elemari eiyeŋane kes kere: Konye yenemuno eoŋ eyai akwap, irumi eroŋataka lokalaunan."
Isaiah57:14 Ebalai ebe, “Kitutuoto, kitutuoto, Kitemokisi erot, Kolemasi ikomion korot loka ikatuŋa.”"
Isaiah57:15 Naarai ebala kwanata ŋol loicelelei loimukurur loiboikini nemam edaun, Ekekiror Lokalaunan ebe: “Eboie eoŋ kaibois naicelelei nakalaunan, Nepepe kaŋin yenejai emoyo loitoronikina loitasono, Aisikwarun emoyo loka luitasonos, Ido aisikwarun emoyo loka luitoronikina."
Isaiah57:16 Naarai mam aŋolopa ikar kere, Karaida anyunyuranakin apaarasia kere: Naarai tikipirisiar emoyo kakonyeneka, Ka itauon lukasubi eoŋ."
Isaiah57:17 Kanuka numam adolit nuka airaŋanutuke kanyunyurik, Kenom ŋes, kebwa akakonyen, kanyunyurik: Kiyatakin ŋesi aibelokin ekaukau korot lokotauke."
Isaiah57:18 Aany ikerotin, etaŋaleuni ŋes: Ido eŋarenikini ŋes, Enyakakini ŋes ka ikebworokoke nuitalakaarete."
Isaiah57:19 Asubuni araito nuka aituke: Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ainapakin, ainapakin mama ejai ŋin yenelwana, Ka ŋin da yeneapie, Etaŋaleuni eoŋ ŋes."
Isaiah57:20 Konye esubito ikaronok kwape aŋolol naekulai; Naarai mam epedori apalar, Edakunete akipike erit ka amodokok.”"
Isaiah57:21 Ebala Ekadeke ebe, “Emamei ainapakin kaneejaas ikaronok.”"
Isaiah58:1 “Kikalal noi, sirikipala, kikeu eporotokon kwape arupepe, Kolimok ikatuŋa akecediakar, Ka ekek loka Yakob akeceronisio."
Isaiah58:2 Konye komoenenete eoŋ ŋinipaaran, Iyalamas ajenun ikarotin: Kwape ateker nakiswamaenenei nuedolito, Komam ejalete aicorakinet naka Edekekec, Kelipete eoŋ aicorakineta nukadolit, Iyalamas aikunyakin Edeke."
Isaiah58:3 Kineras atiar, ‘Kanukinyo kiluŋenenaa, komam jo ianyuni? Kanukinyo kitieanenenaa akosiijar, komam jo ibwaikinit etau?’ Koany, kapaaran naka ailuŋukus ŋes ianyuniata akusiiyalama, Koyaito da ikusikeswamak kere kagogoŋ,"
Isaiah58:4 Koany, iluŋete kanuka eŋuŋet ka epeget, Ka aidip da kakan naka aronis: Mam iluŋete lolo kanuka aisiirar ikusiporotoi kuju."
Isaiah58:5 Ikoni tope kwaŋin ailuŋ naabu eoŋ kaseu? Apaaran naiticania ituŋanan akeijar? Ŋes tope aitulur akekou kwape amusala, Ka aipet epuko ka ekurwon? Ŋin tope ŋes kinyarit ailuŋ, Ka apaaran da naitojokit EJAKAIT?"
Isaiah58:6 “Mere na ailuŋ naabu kaseu? Aijarijar aeneta nuka aronis, Alacar arukan naka eloit, Aosikin luereitai, Ibilata yesi ŋoliloit?"
Isaiah58:7 Mere akorakin inyamatakon yeniketeŋei? Ka aisukunyun togokon yenikican yenireŋetai? Kiany yenimujalal, kitanap; Ido sirikiŋopik akonikuan alopet?"
Isaiah58:8 Ŋes konyet ecilar akoniica kwape ecilar kide, Kisunya akoniŋaleun atakanun: Kiŋarenikini akonidolit: Kitupakini aibuses naka EJAKAIT,"
Isaiah58:9 Kosodi iwonei, eboŋokin EJAKAIT: Iworoi, ŋes da iii ebe, Eoŋ lo. Arai kilema eloit kokidiŋikon, Ka aidod kebokorit, einer da nueroko;"
Isaiah58:10 Bobo da arai kipalik akoniijar yeniketeŋei, Kisimonik aijar naiticanitai; Kosodi aicakon alomun kamuton, Esubi awariwarakon bala paaran:"
Isaiah58:11 Kiŋarenikini jo EJAKAIT tiritir, Isimoni aijarakon kaiboisio nueokito, Itogogoŋi da akonikojo; Iraun ijo bala imanikor yenicocoo, Ido bala akoŋu naka atan, namam iŋoŋar."
Isaiah58:12 Edukete bobo lukon aiboisio nukejalakinitai kolo; Ikeuni apeteta nuka aturio nuipu; Kinyaritai Eketetean neetiyanara, Ekenyakanakinan irotin lukibois."
Isaiah58:13 “Arai kibelok akonikeju anyoun kasabato, Komam iswamaenenei nuitojokit ijo kapaaranika nakalaunan; Kinyara asabato aiyalama, Nakalaunan naka EJAKAIT, naeyoŋitai; Kitubusik ŋes komam Itupanari ikonirotin, Karaida amoot nuitojokit ijo, karaida ailabilab:"
Isaiah58:14 Kosodi konyet isiyalamikin kotoma EJAKAIT; Eoŋ da ketodokari aiboisio nuimukururas nuka akwap, Ketanyami airumet naka Yakob papakon: Naarai ener ŋun aituk naka EJAKAIT.”"
Isaiah59:1 Koany, akan naka EJAKAIT mam ituwurianitai, Tape mam epedori aitajar; Kwabo mam akekit ekimiŋana, Tape mam epedori apupun:"
Isaiah59:2 Konye apotu numam adolitekus kogitasi yes ka Edekekus, Kibwaata akusironisio akekonyen kamakus, Tape eŋeri apupun."
Isaiah59:3 Naarai ermunaara akaninikus aokot, Ikusibokoro da numam adolit; Ineras aitukekus nukaiŋal, Irurumaete aŋajepakus nukaronok,"
Isaiah59:4 Emamei yeniworoi kadolit, Emamei yenepuri kabeit: Emunosi aamameak, ineras nukaiŋal; Epotiete ameŋeranut, idounete numam adolit."
Isaiah59:5 Ebekunete abeei nuka asigirikoloŋa, Eojiete elago loka asimokok; Ŋin yenenyami akecebeei etwani, Naidecidecio da elomuni emusaga kotoma,"
Isaiah59:6 Mam ikecelagoi eraunos inapen, Mam imukoros kakeceswamisio: Akeceswamisio eraas aswamisio nuka numam adolit, Aswam naka akaje ejai toma akaninikec."
Isaiah59:7 Ekerete akecekeje mama ejai aronis, Isunyitos abukor aokot numam akirot: Akeceomisio eraas aomisio nuka numam adolit: Ejaas asilior ka amudiar orotinikec."
Isaiah59:8 Mam ejenete erot loka ainapakin; Emamei etube kalositokec: Etemokis isokono lumagul; Ŋin da yenitori kanen mam ejeni ainapakin,"
Isaiah59:9 Kanuka ŋun elwaniar etube kamawok, mam adolit kidolokinit oni: Kimoi aica, konye kianyuni amuton; Kimoi awaŋ, konye kisakasakai kamusimus."
Isaiah59:10 Kirarapitoi amoot arwatat bala imudukiok, Eebo, kirarapitoi bala ŋul luemameete akonye: Kiguikini kidiŋ paaran, bala toma aikamus; Kotoma kaŋul kaluekuruŋanete kisubi oni bala lukatwak."
Isaiah59:11 Kigata kere kwape idubun, Kibworo noi kwape ajeleik: Kimoi etube, konye emamei; Kimoi aitajario, konye alwaniar kamawok."
Isaiah59:12 Naarai epuakata adiakanaretakosi kakonyenekon, Itejenunete akosironisio kamakosi: Naarai ejaas adiakanaretakosi kasio, Ido kijeni numam adolitekosi."
Isaiah59:13 Kidiakanari, ido kinerenenei EJAKAIT, Kibelonokini kenyeis aitup Edekekosi, Kinerenena nukaimwaŋ ka nukepali, Kipwakuni kilimonokini da akiro nukaiŋal nuepote kotoma otau,"
Isaiah59:14 Ibelokinio etube ekaukau, Ebwoi adolit kama elwana: Naarai ebirokin abeit orot, Ido mam atenit epedori alomun."
Isaiah59:15 Eebo, aolio abeit; Ŋin da yenenyouni kotoma aronis itaraun bon iŋatara, Koany EJAKAIT ŋun, kokadak, Naarai amamei etube."
Isaiah59:16 Koany ŋesi ebe amamei ituŋanan, Koumok naarai amamei yenedieki: Kanuka ŋun abu akekan elopet koyau aitajar; Akedolit da ŋes kigaŋit,"
Isaiah59:17 Abu konap adolit kwape ibore yenikatorob, Akopira naka aitajar akouke; Konap igoen luka ainyaŋ araut inapen, Kimukok ekolo da kwape elou."
Isaiah59:18 Kwape ejaatar aswamisiokec, etacakini kwape kwaŋin, Adedeŋ mama ejaas lukediŋeteke, Eropit mama ejaas lukasurupoke; Etacakini apujana eropit."
Isaiah59:19 Kwaŋin eyoŋete ekiror loka EJAKAIT ageun koto, Akeibuses ageun kaneelomunio akoloŋ: Naarai ebuni kwape aguurut naelelei kagogoŋ, Naeremit eiyeŋane loka EJAKAIT."
Isaiah59:20 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Ebuni ŋesi Sion kwape ekalakunan, Mama ejaas ŋul luibelokinos ainyein apaar kotoma Yakob.”"
Isaiah59:21 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Kanukaŋ, na ŋes aitutuketeka kakes; ekamoyo loejai kajo, akakiro da nuebwaikinit aitukukon, mam enyounete kaitukukon, karaida kaituk naka aurikon, karaida aituk naka aur naka aurikon, ageun kwana kiton ikar kere.”"
Isaiah60:1 Konyou, koca, naarai adolu akoniica, Kiliyaik jo aibuses naka EJAKAIT."
Isaiah60:2 Naarai, koany, erapakini amuton akwap, Ka amuton nairiono cucucuc erapaari atekerin: Konye kiliyaikini jo EJAKAIT, Etakanuni da akeibuses kamakon,"
Isaiah60:3 Epote atekerin aicakon, Ikabakan da epote amwekimwek naka ailiyaunikon."
Isaiah60:4 Kiteluo akonyekon koŋoleŋol, koany: Etukonokinos kere nepepe, epote mama ijai: Epote ikonisap kama elwana, Akonipesur da edakio."
Isaiah60:5 Kosodi kanen ianyuni kitacaikin, Erieŋuni ekonitau, eleli; Naarai ijulunio mamakon aipadara naejai aŋolol, Ebuni da abar naka atekerin mamakon."
Isaiah60:6 Kirapaari rwaru aipues naka ikaalai, Itak luka ikaalai luka Midian ka luka Epa da; Epote kere koSeba. Eyaunete esabu ka emina lokisupurununo, Elimorete da aiturio naka EJAKAIT."
Isaiah60:7 Etukonokinio neijai isipanin kere luka amerekekin luka Kedar, Kijaanakinete jo imerekekin lumaseniko luka Nebaiot: Edokanarete otemuka kacamunio, Etubusikini da etogo loka aibusesuka."
Isaiah60:8 Lukaŋai bo lu lueporitos bala idouon, Ido bala ajeleik kokekia luka akaisikec?"
Isaiah60:9 Abeit kedareunete apujana, Egeunete atakerin nuka Tarusis ayaun ikonisap kama elwana, Nepepe ka epuesakec ka esabukec, Kanuka ekiror loka EJAKAIT Ekonideke, Ka Ekalaunan loka Isirael, Naarai ŋes kitubusik jo"
Isaiah60:10 Ido edukete imo arwatatinikon, Kijaanakinete da ikabakanakec: Naarai abu kenom jo kotoma akanyunyura, Konye ketim kotoma akasianut."
Isaiah60:11 Ido eŋaanara duc iruteikon; Mam egoleneno paaran ka kuare da; Tetere kiiŋunete ituŋa abar naka atekerin, Ikecekabakan da iŋarenikinitai."
Isaiah60:12 Naarai edaun rwaru ateker ka ajakanut ŋin namam kijaanakini jo; Eebo, emudiario cut atekerin ŋun."
Isaiah60:13 Ebuni mamakon aibuses naka Lebanon, Ŋes eberos;” ka etidar, ka eteasur da; Aitojok aiboisika nakalaunan, Ido etubusikini aibois naka akakeje."
Isaiah60:14 Epote isap luka ŋul kaluapotu koŋarut jo airapanakin jo; Ka ŋul da kere luapotu komenito jo isudedeonokinos kwap kakejekon; Kinyaraete jo Ere loka EJAKAIT, Sion loka Ekalaunan loka Isirael."
Isaiah60:15 Karaida aponi kinyein kolai da, Komam ituŋanan yenikitorenenei neijai ijo, Ketuluori jo araun ajokis naepol namam enaŋi, Aiyalama naka aturio nuipu."
Isaiah60:16 Inaki rwaru akile nuka atekerin, Ido inaki ikisin luka ikabakan: ljenuni da ebe, Eoŋ EJAKAIT arai Eketajaranikon, Ido Ekalakunanikon, Ekagogoŋon loka Yakob,"
Isaiah60:17 Ayauni esabu aibois naka aisinit, Epuesa da aibois naka asuat, Aisinit aibois naka akito, ka asuat da aibois naka amor: Etarauni ijakakon luisinapikinete, Ikoniketelemak da Iuisibecikinete."
Isaiah60:18 Mam epupunio bobo epali kakwapukon, Karaida ameje karaida amudiario koikorunokon; Konye imaikini arwatatinikon Aitajar, Ka iruteikon da. Aiturit."
Isaiah60:19 Mere bobo akoloŋ eraenena akoni ica paaran; Kwabo mere bobo elap kicaanakini jo kanuka ailiya; Konye EJAKAIT eraun kamakon aica namam edaun, Ido Ekonideke eraun aibusesukon."
Isaiah60:20 Mam bobo ibiror akonikoloŋ, Kwabo mam bobo elumori ekonilap: Naarai EJAKAIT eraun akoniica namam edaun, Konaŋete da apaarasia nuka akuudianakon."
Isaiah60:21 Ikonituŋa da eraunos kere ikadolitok, Irumete rwaru akwap ikar kere; Atenu nakolo eraikini eoŋ, aswam naka akakanin, Tetere ketubusikinio."
