Isaiah60:22 Yenididi eraun alukumit, Yenedit da ateker nakagogoŋ: Kedol apakikec, Eoŋ EJAKAIT esunyakini ŋun."
Isaiah61:1 Ejai Emoyo loka EJAKAIT Edeke kaeoŋ; Naarai kenyonyoiki EJAKAIT eoŋ akinyet Alimonokin luitasonos akiro nukajokak; Kejuku eoŋ aider luebilil itauon, Alimonokin lueŋasitai aosikinio, Ka lueenen da alacakinio;"
Isaiah61:2 Alimor da ekaru loecamunitai loka EJAKAIT, Ka apaaran naka Edekewok naka enyaŋit; Aitalakaar da luibworos kere;"
Isaiah61:3 Ainakin kes aboko aibois naka ekurwon, Akinyet naka aiyalama aibois naka akuudian; Anapito naka aiturit aibois naka etau loekadakinit; Tetere emaikinio ikito luka adolit, Lukirai EJAKAIT, tetere itubusikinio ŋes,"
Isaiah61:4 Edukete ijeburo, ipopounete nekolo enyeinete, Itemonokinete ireria luiswapitos, ljeburo luka aturio nuipu."
Isaiah61:5 Ido ebwoete imo kitadakete isipaninikus, Eraunete ipejok ikakoriokokus, Iketitak imusabibunukus."
Isaiah61:6 Konye yes kinyarao isasedotin luka EJAKAIT: Kinyaraete yes ituŋa ikejaanakinak luka Edekewok: Inyamete abar naka atekerin, Toma aibusesukec ŋes iwogatar."
Isaiah61:7 Aibois naka ileicikus idumunete irwan aarei; Aibois da naka aitirira isiyalamikinete ewaikec: Kanuka ŋun irumete irwan aarei kakwapukec: Ejaunos kailel namam edaun.
Isaiah61:8 Naarai eoŋ EJAKAIT amina etube, alait akoko ka numam adolit; Ainakini kes eropitikec kabeit. Etutuki aitutuket namam edaun kakes."
Isaiah61:9 Ejen aurikec kotoma atekerin, Idwekec da kotoma otuŋa: Ecamunete kere lueanyunete kes Ebe eraas kesi aur naisirereŋit EJAKAIT."
Isaiah61:10 Eyalamikini noi toma EJAKAIT, Elelakini akaijar Ekadeke; Naarai ketanap inapen luka aitajar, Kemukok ŋesi eoŋ ekaso loka adolit, Kwape isirio eteran aboko, Kwape iyogogoo ateran kiboroke luka akais."
Isaiah61:11 Naarai kwape itolomuniata alup ikabwaŋunanike, Ido kwape isibwaŋunia emanikor ikinyom lueyeitai toma; Kwape kwaŋin isibwaŋunia EJAKAIT Edeke adolit ka aiturio Kakonyen nuka atekerin kere."
Isaiah62:1 Kanuka Sion mam ber eliliŋi, Ido kanuka Yerusalem mam ber ebworari, Aitodol naelomunia adoliteke kwape ailiya, Aitajarake da kwape akalas naenoki."
Isaiah62:2 Eanyunete atekerin adolitekon, Ikabakan kere da aibusesukon: Kimaikinio ekiror lokitetet, Loemaikini aituk naka EJAKAIT."
Isaiah62:3 Ido da iraun ijo aboko naka atemelel kakan naka EJAKAIT Amekemeket naka ekabakane kakan naka Edekekon.
Isaiah62:4 Mam bobo kinyaritai Naejalakinitai; Ido akonikwap mam bobo enyaritai Naimucoŋoŋ: Konye imaikinio Nakesiyalamikinit, akwapukon da Naedukokinitai: Naarai kisiyalamikinit EJAKAIT jo, adukokinio akwapukon."
Isaiah62:5 Naarai kwape edukokinia ekaturŋunan abekot, Kwape kwaŋin kidukokiniata odwekon lo: Ido kwape elelakinia eteran ateran, Kwape kwaŋin kilelakinia Ekonideke jo."
Isaiah62:6 Ebwaikinit ikedarak arwatatinikon, ijo Yerusalem; Mam ililiŋenenete paaran ka akuar: Yes luisiitununete EJAKAIT, sirikipalasi,"
Isaiah62:7 Sirikinupakis ŋes apalar, aitodol neiticasia Yerusalem, Ido aitodol neituluoria ŋes aiturio kakwap."
Isaiah62:8 Eyapoik EJAKAIT kolimite akekan nakoteten, Kakan da naka agogoŋuke ebe, “Abeit mam bobo ainanakini akimakon araun atap naka lukasurupokon; Imo da mam emasenenete ekonibino, loitaaritor:"
Isaiah62:9 Konye ŋul luasakito kes enyamete, kituritos EJAKAIT,; Ŋul da luadenito kes emasete kalaroi nuka aiboisika nakalaunan.”"
Isaiah62:10 Kotuboros, kotuboros korutei; Kitemokis erot loka ituŋa, Kitutuoto, kitutuoto erot lokapolon; Koukonosi amor; kikeikis ituŋa aanyunet."
Isaiah62:11 Koany, alimok EJAKAIT kiton osaŋe loka akwap, Kolimokis yesi akoku naka Sion ebe, “Koany, ebunit akoniitajario; Koany, ejai aimalaeteke kaŋes, Ekeropit da ejai kakonyeneke.”"
Isaiah62:12 Emaikinio Ituŋa lukalaunak, Lulakuna luka EJAKAIT; Kimaikinio jo Naemootai, Ere lomam ejalakinitai."
Isaiah63:1 Iŋai bo ŋol loebunit koEdom, Ejaas kigoen luitereŋitai, ebunit koBosura? Ŋol loibusak ikenapen, kolosi kotoma apolou naka akegogoŋ? “Eoŋ loenera kotoma adolit, loapedorit aitajar.”"
Isaiah63:2 Kanukinyo ereŋeatatar ikoninapen, Ikonigoen da koputos bala ŋol loicakacakai acuet?"
Isaiah63:3 “Ecakacak eoŋ bon acuet: Ido kotuŋa amamei yenikijaar eoŋ: Eebo, ecakaeak kes kakaisiop, Ido epudapud kes kakanyunyura; Epiricanakinos aokot nuka aijarakee onapeneka, Emodimod eoŋ da ikagoen kere."
Isaiah63:4 Naarai ajai apaaran naka ainyaŋar otauka, Adolu da ekaru loka ilakunaka."
Isaiah63:5 Abu kaŋoleŋol, komamu idio yenikeŋarakini; Abu kaumok naarai amamei idio yenikegaŋuni: Kanuka ŋun akakan kelopet ŋes kainuni aitajar, Akanyunyura da ŋes kegaŋuni,"
Isaiah63:6 Abu kecakacak ituŋa kakaisiop, Ketemer kes kakanyunyura, Kabukok kwap aokot nuka’ aijarakec.”"
Isaiah63:7 Alimuni do asianut-nakamin naka EJAKAIT, Kaitureta nuka EJAKAIT, Kwape ejaatar ŋun kere nukiinakin EJAKAIT oni; Ka ajokis naepol mama ejai ekek loka Isirael, naeinakinit kes, Kwape ejaar akeitim, kwape ipadar akesianut-nakamin,"
Isaiah63:8 Naarai abu kotema atiar, Abeit eraas kesi ikatuŋa, Idwe lumam do iŋalaete: Kanuka ŋun korau ŋesi Eketajaranikec,"
Isaiah63:9 Aponi kiticanai ŋes kaiticaniokec kere, Koyu kes koimalaikaneke, Abu kolaku kes kotoma aminake ka akeitim da; Kodakenenei kibwokenenei da kes apaarasia kere nukasonya."
Isaiah63:10 Konye apotu kijerukikis, kitakadikis Emoyoke Lokalaunan: Kanuka ŋun abu kibelokin araun lokasurupikec, Koluik aitiji kes,"
Isaiah63:11 Kosodi kiitu apaarasia nukasonya, Nuka Musa ka iketuŋa, Kobalasi ebe, Ai bo ejai ŋol lokitodokuni kes alemun kaŋolol, Nepepe ka ekecokon loka ekesipan? Ai bo ejai loabu kibwaik Emoyoke Lokalaunan tomakec?"
Isaiah63:12 Loetolosi akekan nakaibuses kakan nakoteten naka Musa? Loatiaki akipi kakonyenekec, Amaikinor ŋes elopet ekiror lomam edaun?"
Isaiah63:13 Loetotori kes ataro kwape ebalasi kamodiŋ, Kinyeis aiguikin?"
Isaiah63:14 Kwape ijesarotor ibaren aditot, Abu Emoyo loka EJAKAIT kisiyeŋu kes: Kwaŋin ibu ijo kiŋarenik ikonituŋa, ljo elopet amaikinor ekiror lokaibuses."
Isaiah63:15 Kosesen kwap ijai akuj, Koany ijai aibois naka alaunitekon, ka naka aibusesukon da: Ani bo akokitekon ka aswamisiokon nuka agogoŋ? Aipielit naka ekonitau, ka aitimesiakon itikoritai kamaka."
Isaiah63:16 Naarai irai ijo Papakosi, Karaida kemam Aburaam kijeni sio, Isirael da mam kilimorit sio: Wu EJAKAIT, irai ijo Papakosi; Ekosikalakunan ameun ikar kere ŋes Ekonikiror."
Isaiah63:17 Wu EJAKAIT, kanukinyo kitapaanaria jo sio korotinikon, Kitinikikia da itauonokosi komam kiyonit jo? Koboŋ kanuka ikonibulesin, atekerin nuka airumitekon,"
Isaiah63:18 Apotu ituŋakon lukalaunak kirumata aiboisikon nakalaunan nediokasilon: Ecakacakata ŋes lukasurupokosi,"
Isaiah63:19 Kiluor bala ŋul lumam apeŋo jo irumit; Bala lumam apeŋo emaikinitai ekonikiror.
Isaiah64:1 Wu okwe, arai kodi ijo akuj, arai kijesun ijo, Kosodete iroŋan amaran kakonyenekon;"
Isaiah64:2 Kwape inepunia akim kakito, Isiwalaria da akim akipi; Aitejenikin lukasurupokon ekonikiror, Kosodete atekerin amaran kakonyenekon."
Isaiah64:3 Nakiswamaa ijo kolo nusogim numam sio kimunonena, Ibu kijesun, komaranata da iroŋan kakonyenekon."
Isaiah64:4 Naarai ageun apeŋo mam ituŋa apotu kopuputu, karaida abiun kakit, Karaida akoŋu aanyun Edeke dimarai ijo, Loiswamakini ŋin yenidaret ŋes."
Isaiah64:5 Iriamakinos ijo kaŋin yenisiyalamikinit aswam adolit, Ŋul lukiitunete jo korotinikon: Koany, ibu konyunyura, sio da kadiakanasi: Kiboienenei kaŋin ameun apeŋo, kipedori kereka isio aitajario?"
Isaiah64:6 Naarai kiraun isio kwape yenimam elai, Adolitekosi kere esubit bala anapito naamodok: Kirinyori isio kere kwape akiot; Numam adolitekosi kiyaŋaasi isio kwape kekwam."
Isaiah64:7 Emamei yeniwonei ekonikiror, Yenimuket bon aikamun jo: Naarai ibwa ijo akonikonyen kamakosi, Ibu kijaik sio akan naka numam adolitekosi."
Isaiah64:8 Konye do, wu EJAKAIT, irai ijo papakosi; Kirai isio elupe, ijo ekajeanikosi; Kirai isio kere aswam naka akanikon."
Isaiah64:9 Sirikinyunyurikin noi noi, wu EJAKAIT, Karaida akiitun numam adolit ikar kere: Koany, kosesen, kiŋaiŋait, kirai isio kere ikonituŋa."
Isaiah64:10 Araut ireriakon lukalaunak ais, Araun Sion ais, Yerusalem da asilio."
Isaiah64:11 Ekositogo lokalaunan lokajokan, Nekiituritotor kolo jo lukapapaakosi, anyam akim; Ecanicanunos da ikosiboro kere lukisiyalamikinito."
Isaiah64:12 Itikokin tope kakiro kaŋun, wu EJAKAIT? Ililiŋikini ca ka aitiean sio noi noi?"
Isaiah65:1 Abu ketemokino ainiruŋio kama kaŋul lumam keŋisitos; Ketemokino adumunio kama kanul lumam kamootos: Kabala ebe, “Eoŋ lo, Eoŋ lo,” mama ejai ateker namam iwonet ekakiror."
Isaiah65:2 Ariorit akakanin apaaran kere mama ejaas ituŋa lukepali, Luelosenenete korot lomam ejok, Kwape ejaatar akeceomisio:"
Isaiah65:3 Ituŋa luketunyunyuranakinete kakonyeneka tiritir, Lueinanakinete asuban omanikoria, Luisupurununete lukisupurununo kamatapalin;"
Isaiah65:4 Luiboikinos atesin, lueperete kuare toma aiboisio nukaiyeiyea; Luenyamete akiriŋ naka epege, Ido acece nuka iboro luketal ejaas toma oborokec."
Isaiah65:5 Luebalas ebe, “Kobwo bon, Sirikikuny mama ajai, naarai agitara kamakon.” Eraas ŋun apuru okumesika, akim naenoki apaaran kere."
Isaiah65:6 Koany, iwadikatai kakonyeneka ebe, Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Mam eoŋ elilini, Konye atacakini, eebo, atacakini toma atorobusiokec,"
Isaiah65:7 Numam adolitekus, ka numam adolit nuka lukapapaakus, Naarai kisupuruŋunete lukisupurununo koroŋan, Kamoromoroete eoŋ koukon: Kanuka ŋun etemi eoŋ katorobusiokee nuetacakinete aswamisiokec ŋuŋo,”"
Isaiah65:8 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Kwape edumunor ebino lokitetet kaibuŋet, Ebalai ebe, ‘Sirikimuna, naarai ejai arereŋ tomakeŋ’: Kwape kwaŋin eswamai eoŋ kanuka ikakejaanakinak, Kenyek amudiar kes kere."
Isaiah65:9 Etolomuni aur kotoma Yakob, ekeruman iroŋanaka koYuda: Irumete luseunaka, ibolenenete ikakejaanakinak kaŋina."
Isaiah65:10 Eraun Saron erony loka isipanin luka amerekekin, Aditot naka Akor da aibois naeuriakiata isipanin luka aituk, Kanuka ikatuŋa lukamootos."
Isaiah65:11 Konye yes luijalete EJAKAIT, lukimurwokini ekaroŋat lokalaunan, Luitemokinete Arereŋ emesa, Luilelebikinete Anerokin aderekai ebino loinyalinyalitai;"
Isaiah65:12 Anerokin eoŋ yes okileŋ, ikukumete yesi kere earit; Naarai nakeworoo, mam ijito; Nakeneria, mam ipupunito; Konye iswamata nueroko kakonyeneka, Iseut numam kesiyalamikinito.”"
Isaiah65:13 Kanuka ŋun ebala EJAKAIT Edeke kwanata ebe, “Koany, enyamete ikakejaanakinak, Konye yes kiriebi eteŋei: Koany, emasete ikakejaanakinak, Konye yes kijakit akur: Koany, elelete ikakejaanakinak, Konye yes kirumete ileic:"
Isaiah65:14 Koany, eyeete ikakejaanakinak kanuka aiyalama naka etau, Konye yes imonyete kanuka aiturur naka etau, Ibwololoete kanuka akadakin naka emoyo."
Isaiah65:15 Inyeinete ekusikiror araun ekenit mama ejaas luseunaka, Kiari EJAKAIT Edeke; Emaikini ikekejaanakinak ekiror ece."
Isaiah65:16 Tetere ŋin yenilipakin bon arereŋ kakwap, Ilipakin bon arereŋ kolimite Edeke loka abeit, Ŋin da yeniyapoi kakwap iyapoi kolimite Edeke loka abeit; Naarai imurwokinete ican lusodit, Ido naarai ibwaitai kakonyeneka."
Isaiah65:17 Naarai koany, asubi akuj nakitetet, ka akwap da nakitetet: Mam nusodit iitunio, karaida alomar toma aomisio."
Isaiah65:18 Konye kiyalamikinos yesi, kolelakis ŋin yenasubi eoŋ ikar kere: Naarai koany, asubi Yerusalem araut eibwoŋ ka iketuŋa da aile."
Isaiah65:19 Ebwoŋakini eoŋ Yerusalem, alelakini ikatuŋa: Mam bobo epupunio eporoto loka aimony akiyo kotomake, Karaida eporoto loka ican"
Isaiah65:20 Mam bobo ejaun imukeru yenejari apaarasia nuikidioko, Karaida ekimat lomam itodolikinit akepaarasia: Naarai etwani ikoku yenika ikar akwatat, Ikenio da ikadiakaran yenika ikar akwatat."
Isaiah65:21 Edukete itogoi, iboiete kotoma; Iraete imanikoria luka emusabibu, enyamete da araitokec."
Isaiah65:22 Mam edukete kosodete ice aiboi kotoma; Mam iraete, kosodete ice ainyam; Naarai ejaunos apaarasia nuka ikatuŋa kwape apaarasia nuka ekitoi, Ebusete luseunaka elelakinete aswam naka akaninikec."
Isaiah65:23 Mam itaaritos atai, karaida aidoun idwe luetulanario; Naarai eraas kesi aur naka luisirereŋit EJAKAIT, Ka ikecedwe da kakes."
Isaiah65:24 Kosodi kanen, eriŋa kes iwoneo, eii eoŋ; Ido eriŋa inera, eirari.”"
Isaiah65:25 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Edakasi rwaru epeet ka imerekek nepepe, Enyami eŋatuny ariaŋ kwape emoŋ: Apua ŋes eraun inyamat luka emun. Mam isiriebete karaida amudiar koroŋataka kere lokalaunan.”"
Isaiah66:1 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Erai akuj ekaicoloŋ, Erai akwap da eicoloŋ loka akejeka: Etogo lonyoin lokidukokinete eoŋ? Aibois nanyoin naeraun akaibworaret?”"
Isaiah66:2 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Akakan ŋes asubi ŋun kere, Aso kwaŋin ejaunos iboro ŋul kere: Konye yen ŋes ituŋanan yenaseseni eoŋ, Ŋin yenitasono, yenikemoyo loitoronikina, Yenemarani kakakirot."
Isaiah66:3 “Ikoni loeari emoŋ kwape loeari etuŋanan; Ikoni loeinakini imerekek araun asubanit kwape loebili emurisiŋ loka ekiŋok; Loeinakini ainakinet naka akiria kwape loeinakini aokot nuka epege; Loisupuruuni lukisupurununo, kwape loilipakini aput arereŋ: Eebo, aseutu kesi ikecerotin, Isiyalamikinete ikecetauon italesiakec."
Isaiah66:4 Aseuni eoŋ da aiticanetakec, etodolikini kes nuekuriaka; Naarai nakeworoo eoŋ, amamei yeniii; Nakeneria, mam epupunito; Konye kiswamata nueroko kakonyeneka, Koseut numam kesiyalamikinito.”"
Isaiah66:5 Kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT, yes luimaranete kakekirot: Ebe, “Apotu ikusiinacan lukilaito, Lukireŋearete kanuka ekakiror kotemasi atiar, ‘Kitopolooroi EJAKAIT, tetere kianyuni akusiiyalama’; Konye isurumio kes ileic."
Isaiah66:6 “Eporoto loka ecelet loebuni kore, Eporoto loebuni koyekalu, Eporoto loka EJAKAIT loetacakini lukasurupoke!"
Isaiah66:7 “Eriŋa ŋes eriebakina, kidou; Eriŋa apipiluke edoluno, kidou ikoku yenisapat."
Isaiah66:8 Iŋai lem eirarit naikoni nen? Iŋai eanyunit nuikote nen? Eurio teni akwap kapaaran adiopet? Idounio tope ateker katipet? Naarai nepeariebakinor Sion, kidou idweke,"
Isaiah66:9 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Etodolikini tope aur komam aisidoun? Ebala Edekekon ebe, Agolokini tope akoik, Eoŋ loesidouni?"
Isaiah66:10 “Kiyalamikinos yesi kaYerusalem, kibwoŋata kanukeŋ, Yes kere luiminasi ŋes, Kiyalamikinos kailel nepepe kaŋes, Yes kere luibworosi kanukeŋ,"
Isaiah66:11 Konakata do ikisin luka aitalakarike; kimonikinos; Kodeŋ noi, kiyalamikinos kaidiles naka aibusesuke.”"
Isaiah66:12 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Koany, etalalari ainapakin kamake kwape ecor, Aibuses da naka atekerin kwape aguurut nailapanar; Inakete yesi, kidakitai yes kosiep, Kilepanario kakuŋin."
Isaiah66:13 Kwape yenitalakari totoke, Kwape kwaŋin etalakaria eoŋ yes; Kitalakario ko Yerusalem."
Isaiah66:14 Ianyunete, eyalamikinos ikusitauon, Epoloete akusikojo kwape amel: Ejenun akan naka EJAKAIT kama ejaas ikekejaanakinak, Enyunyurikini lukasurupoke."
Isaiah66:15 “Naarai koany, ebuni EJAKAIT kakim, Esubito agalinike kwape etapipirio; Aijaikin anyunyutake kadedeŋ, Airetakinike kalianeta nuka akim."
Isaiah66:16 Naarai etubokini EJAKAIT kakim, Kekekileŋ da, mama ejaas lukawat kere; Ipu da lueari EJAKAIT."
Isaiah66:17 “Ŋul luitalaunos, luesegakinos, alomar omanikoria, atupar ediopet kokidiŋ, luenyamete akiriŋ naka ipegei, ka yeniketal, ka emir: ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Enaŋete kere nepepe."
Isaiah66:18 “Naarai ajeni akeeeswamisio ka aomisiokee: abuni eoŋ atukonokin atekerin kere ka aŋajepa; epote kesi eanyunete akaibuses.
Isaiah66:19 Ebwaikini eoŋ aanyunet kamakec, ejukari iceke kakes luakuete mama ejaas atekerin, Tarusis, Pul ka Lud, luikesete akabwai, Tubal ka Yaban, apujana nuelwaka, lumam epupunito iemutoka, karaida aanyun aibusesuka; elimonokinete akaibuses mama ejaas atekerin,"
Isaiah66:20 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Eyaunete kesi ikusiinacan kere anyoun katekerin kere araut ainakinet mama ejai EJAKAIT, kobalasin, kagalin, kagalin nuimukoritai, kanyubun, kakaalai da, epote oroŋataka lokalaunan Yerusalem, kwape eyauniata idwe luka Isirael ainakinetekec togo loka EJAKAIT, kotoma obore yenelai.”"
Isaiah66:21 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe. “Alemuni ice kakes da araut isasedotin ka Ilebin.”
Isaiah66:22 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Kwape esalakinia kakonyeneka Akuj nakitetet ka akwap da nakitetet naasubi, Kwape kwaŋin esalakinia aurikus ka ekusikiror da.”"
Isaiah66:23 Kosodi kanen, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Ageun kolap ediopet lokelamunan kiton ece, Ido ageun kasabato adiopet kiton ace, Eponenenete lukawat kere aima kakonyeneka."
Isaiah66:24 “Elomarete kesi, esesenete atesina kere nuka ituŋa luapaarete kamakaŋ: naarai mam ekurutukec etwani, karaida akecekim mam itudeŋio; eraunos kesi luesaeitai kama kalukawat kere.”"
Jeremiah1:1 Akiro nuka Yeremia okoku loka Kilikia, lokonabin luajaas Anatot akwap naka Benyamin,"
Jeremiah1:2 Loabuni akirot naka EJAKAIT mamakeŋ kapaarasia nuka Yosia okoku loka Amon, ekabaka loka Yuda, kokaru lokitomonet kauni loka airumuke."
Jeremiah1:3 Kobu da kapaarasia nuka Yekoiakim okoku loka Yosia, ekabaka loka Yuda, kiton osaŋe loka ekaru lokitomonet kalodiop loka Sedekia okoku loka Yosia, ekabaka loka Yuda; kiton neejoreorere luko Yerusalem olap lokikanyet,"
Jeremiah1:4 Kosodi kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajal eoŋ kobala ebe,"
Jeremiah1:5 “Eriŋa kesuba jo kotoma akoik abu kajen jo, Ido eriŋa ilomuna kakoik abu ketalau jo: Kaseu jo araun enabi mama ejaas atekerin.”"
Jeremiah1:6 Kasodi eoŋ atemar atiar, “Wu okwe, EJAKAIT Edeke! Koany, mam apedori einer: naarai arai esapat.”"
Jeremiah1:7 Konye kabala EJAKAIT eoŋ ebe, “Sirikiner ebe, ‘Arai eoŋ esapat:’ Naarai ilosenenei mama ejaas ŋul kere lukejukanari jo, Inerenenei da ŋun kere nukecoranakini joo"
Jeremiah1:8 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe: Sirikikurianar kes: Naarai ajaenena kajo ayuun jo,”"
Jeremiah1:9 Kosodi EJAKAIT arior akekan kotiroria akaituk; kabala EJAKAIT eoŋ ebe: “Koany, ebwaik akakiro aitukukon:"
Jeremiah1:10 Koany, kadakak jo lolo ayait atekerin ka ajakanuto, Arutun ka abilibil, Amudiar, ka atiyaikin; Aiduk ka aira da,”"
Jeremiah1:11 Ido da kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai kobala ebe, “Yeremia, ianyu inyo?” Kabala ebe, “Aany ebela loka ekuŋur,”"
Jeremiah1:12 Kosodi EJAKAIT atemar eoŋ atiar, “Iany ejok: naarai edarenenei akakirot aitodolikin.”"
Jeremiah1:13 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT nakiareit mama ajai kobala ebe, “Ianyu inyo?” Kabala ebe, “Aany amot naekulai; kipuŋuno da kagolitomei.”"
Jeremiah1:14 Kosodi EJAKAIT atemar eoŋ atiar, “Ebuni atohis abelun kagolitomei mama ejaas kere luiboienenete kakwap kana."
Jeremiah1:15 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Koany, anyarauni atekerin kere nuka ajakanuto nuka agolitomei; epote do, esipokinete kesi ŋinituŋanan ekeicoloŋ loka ajakanut neelomarere orutei luka Yerusalem, asurokin arwatatinike kere airimor, asurokin da ireria kere luka Yuda."
Jeremiah1:16 Ido alimori ikatubesia aluikin kes kanuka nukaronokokec kere; naarai kajalata, kisupurunonokis lukisupurununo icedekesio, komaata da aswamisio nuka akaninikec."
Jeremiah1:17 Aso do jo koen aŋabetekon, konyou, kolimok kes kere nukecoranakini jo: sirikiyaloŋoŋ nukee, kenyek eoŋ aisiyaloŋoŋ jo kakonyenekec,"
Jeremiah1:18 Naarai koany, ketuluo jo lolo ere loebwaitai, epir da lokasuat, arwatatin nukaisinin, aluikin akwap kere, aluikin ikabakan luka Yuda, aluikin ikapolokoke da, aluikin isasedotinike, ido aluikin ituŋa luka akwap kana."
Jeremiah1:19 Ejiikinos kesi kajo: konye mam kipikorete: naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ajaenena eoŋ kajo ayuun jo.”"
Jeremiah2:1 Kosodi kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai, kobala ebe,"
Jeremiah2:2 “Kolot, kiworo kaki nuka Yerusalem kiner atiar, Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Eitunit asianut naka eiditeukon, Aminakon naka ateran; Kwape kiitupitotor eoŋ kotoma amodiŋ, Toma akwap namam eyeikinio ikinyom."
Jeremiah2:3 Kerai Isirael lokalaunan mama ejai EJAKAIT, Araito nugeet nuka aidwenyike: Kere luanyamenenete kes itelekarito akiro; Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ebunokini kes aronis.”"
Jeremiah2:4 Kopuputu yesi akirot naka EJAKAIT, ijo ekek loka Yakob, ka ajena kere nuka ekek loka Isirael."
Jeremiah2:5 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Anyoika numam adolit nuapotu lukapapaakus kodumut kotamakan, Tape ebwataros neelwana kamakaŋ, Kotupito aamameak, koraunos lukaamameak?"
Jeremiah2:6 Mam apotu kobalas ebe, ‘Ali bo EJAKAIT Lokitolomuni oni kakwap nako Misiri; Lokinarenikini oni kotoma ais, Akwap naka amodiŋo ka apanya, Akwap naka akure ka etoribe loka atwanare, Akwap neamamei yenitori, namam iboikin ituŋanan?’"
Jeremiah2:7 Ketolom yes akwap napusuk, Anyamenen araitoke, ka ajokisike: Konye nailomuniata itisiloto akwapuka, Kitaraut airumeteka naketal."
Jeremiah2:8 Mam isasedotin apotu kobalas ebe, ‘Ali bo EJAKAIT?’ Ŋul luitinitos ikisila mam apotu kajenut eoŋ: Kodiakasi da ikayaitok kamakaŋ, Kodwarete inabin kolimitos Baal, Kotupitos da akiro numam ameda."
Jeremiah2:9 “Kanuka ŋun ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ŋes kipurio kayes, Ido apurokini idwe luka ikusidwe."
Jeremiah2:10 Naarai kotuboros yesi kapujana nuka Kitim, koanyut; Kijukasi Kedar, kokukuranaros aomoom; Koanyut arai ajai lem akirot naikoni nen."
Jeremiah2:11 Ejai tope ateker naelocoki idekesioke, Lumam eraas idekesio? Konye elocokis ikatuŋa aibusesukec Kanuka yenimam ameda."
Jeremiah2:12 Ebala EJAKAIT ehe, Koumok ŋun, ijo akui, Kokurianar noi noi, kosilior lio,"
Jeremiah2:13 Naarai eswamata ikatuŋa nukaronok aarei; Kajalata eoŋ ekicoi loka akipi nukajarak,"
Jeremiah2:14 “Erai kereka Isirael ebulesit? Erai kereka ŋesi ebulesit loeurikinio ore? Kanukinyo araunor imejat?
Jeremiah2:15 Agatakis ŋes inarunyo ludidik, ikunas noi; Amunaasi akwapuke; Ecwei ireriake, emamei yeniboie kotoma,"
Jeremiah2:16 Abelata idwe luka Nop ka Tapanes esiadukukon.
Jeremiah2:17 Mam kereka jo isudunyikinit nun, Naarai ibu kojal EJAKAIT Ekonideke, Nakinarenikinitor korot?"
Jeremiah2:18 Kwana da ikwaikini ai korot loelosi Misiri, Aimat akipi nuka Sikor? Ido da ikwaikini ai korot loelosi Asuria; Aimat akipi nuka Ecor?"
Jeremiah2:19 Ebala EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe, Aronisikon ŋes kilecori, Abononorikon kau ŋes kiretakini jo: Aso do kojen koany da ebe erai akirot naerono ido naedwar, Ijo aijal EJAKAIT Ekonideke, Emamei da ayoŋit eoŋ tomakon."
Jeremiah2:20 “Naarai kolono abilibil ajookotokon, anedened aenetakon; Kosodi atemar atiar, ‘Mam kejaanakini,’ Ibu kirapanakin kanoliukot loemukurur, Ido kwap kaŋolikitoi loepesit, kwape naadote."
Jeremiah2:21 Kwabo abu kolo kera jo emusabibu lokaiokan, Ekinyomit loetenit cut: Kikwaikini ai iraun kamaka ekiot loemunauna Loka emusabibu lokais?"
Jeremiah2:22 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT Edeke ebe, Karaida iloŋi kesoda, Itwasamai asabunyun nuipu, Konye emasikinito numam adolitekon kakonyeneka,"
Jeremiah2:23 Ikwaikini ai jo inera ebe, ‘Mam eoŋ emunauna, Mam atupenenei Ibaalin? Koany ekonirot kaditot, kojen nuiswamat: Isubit bala akaala naiiriai korotinike;"
Jeremiah2:24 Atuko naenaikinit amodiŋ, Naesupi ekwam kotoma oimielike; Toma apakike iŋai bo epedori aisibelokin ŋes? Ŋul kere luemootos ŋes mam itapasitos; Edumunete ŋes kolapake."
Jeremiah2:25 Kimik akonikeje kinyeis ajaut komameete amuk, Kinyek elogorotokon da aonore akure: Konye ibu kiner ebe, ‘Emamei amun: Mam; naarai abu kamin imo, atupakini kes.’"
Jeremiah2:26 “Kwape irumiata ileic ekokolan naedumunere, Kwape kwaŋin irumiata ileic ekek loka Isirael; Kes, ikeeekabakan, ka ikapolokokec, Ka isasedotinikec, ka inabinokec da;"
Jeremiah2:27 Luelimokinete apunure ebe, ‘Irai ijo papaka’; Amoru da ebe, ‘Ŋo kiwuriei eoŋ’: Naarai ebelokis ipuranakec mamakan, Kwabo mere akonyenekec: Konye kapak naka icanikec ebalas ebe, ‘Konyou, kitajarai!’"
Jeremiah2:28 Konye alu bo idekesio lukisubuni? Konyoutu bo kesi, Arai epedorete aitajar jo kapak naka icanikon: Naarai kwape imwatatar ireriakon, Imwaasi kwaŋin ikonidekesio, ijo Yuda."
Jeremiah2:29 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kanukinyo kirurumakinitotor eoŋ? Ipotu kere kodiakasi kamakaŋ,"
Jeremiah2:30 Adany ikusidwe taai; Mam edumunito alecorio: Ajwenya ekusikilen ikusinabin, Kwape eŋatuny loemudiari."
Jeremiah2:31 Ŋo atur, koanyutu yesi akirot naka EJAKAIT. Abu kereka karau ais kama ejai Isirael? Karau akwap naka amuton naijesi ŋaŋ? Kanukinyo ineratar ikatuŋa ebe, ‘Kijakakai; Mam bobo kibuni mamakon’?"
Jeremiah2:32 Epedori kereka apese aimurwokin lukisiroke, Arai ateran inapeneke? Konye ikatuŋa kemurwokis eoŋ Apaarasia numam imarunos."
Jeremiah2:33 “Itemonokini ca ma ijo ekonirot amoot ipailon! Tape isisianakin aŋor nueroko ikonirotin.
Jeremiah2:34 Ido edumuna kenapenekon aokot nuka aijar naka lukican luemameete akirot: Mam idumunito epakapakaete, Konye kanun kere"
Jeremiah2:35 Ibu kiner ebe, ‘Emamei eoŋ akirot; Abeit ebelokin akenyunyura kamakaŋ.’ Koany, katubokini jo akiro, Naarai inera ebe, ‘Mam eoŋ adiakit.’"
Jeremiah2:36 Kanukinyo irimio ijo noi kwaŋin ailocoloc ekonirot? Misiri da kisurumi jo ileic, Kwape kisurumia Asuria jo ileic,"
Jeremiah2:37 Inyouni kamaken da ibwokit akaninikon kakou: Naarai aŋer EJAKAIT luimunokina, Mam ikerianari kamakec."
Jeremiah3:1 Ebalai ebe, “Arai kirene etuŋanan akeberu, Enyouni ŋin da kamaken, Korau naka ecetuŋanan, Eboŋori tope je mamake bobo? Mam akwap ti kemunaun noi? Konye irau ijo naadote mama ejaas ipailon luipu; Konye ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ikoto kereka aboŋun mama ajai?"
Jeremiah3:2 Kiteluo akonikonye kuju neelapat, koany, Anu bo numam kiteperitere? Ibu kiboie kawai kerot aidareun kes, Kwape Eyarabut kais; Ibu komunau akwap kadoteukon, ka aronisikon."
Jeremiah3:3 Kanuka ŋun kimikitai elimilim, Komameun akiru naka akamu; Kwabo kijai kereet loka naadote, Ibu koner aileieikin."
Jeremiah3:4 Mam kimonyakini eoŋ ageun lolo ebe, ‘Ipapa, kirai ijo epadie loka atumunika,"
Jeremiah3:5 Enyunyuranakini kereka ŋesi ikar kere? Isiopanakini kiton osaŋe?’ Koany, ibu kiner, konye kiswama nueroko, kwape kipedoria.”"
Jeremiah3:6 Ido da kabala EJAKAIT eoŋ kapaarasia nuka Yosia ekabaka ebe, “Iany ijo nueswama Isirael nakabononoran kau? Adoka ŋesi nolironat loimukurur ido kokwap kanolikitoi loepesit, kodotei kaŋina,"
Jeremiah3:7 Kabala ebe, ‘Kedau ŋesi aiswama akiro ŋun kere, eboŋuni do ŋesi mama ajai’; konye mam abu kobonu; abu Yuda kinaeike naemodana koany."
Jeremiah3:8 Koany da, naerenearia Isirael nakabononoran kau kanuka adoteuke, kainak da ebalua lokairenear; konye Yuda kinacike naemodana mam akuriana, konye ‘kolot ŋin da kodotei."
Jeremiah3:9 Kosodi kanen naarai ebenenikinit ŋes adoteuke, komuna akwap, kodotei kamor ka apunurei."
Jeremiah3:10 Konye ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Karaida nun kere mam Yuda kinaeike naemodana eboŋunit neajai keketau kere, konye ijoseikinit.”"
Jeremiah3:11 Kabala EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, “Isirael nakabononoran kau itodiara araun naedolit aitelekar Yuda naemodana."
Jeremiah3:12 Kolot kolimonok akiro nu koseseni agolitomei, kiner atiar, Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, ‘Kobonu ijo Isirael nakabononoran kau; Mam kaseseni jo kanyunyura; Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Arai eoŋ lokaitim, Mam anyunyuranakin ikar kere."
Jeremiah3:13 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Na bon, kolitno numam adolitekon, Ebe idiaka kama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke, Isiarak ikonirotin mama ejaas imo kokwap kanolikitoi loepesit, Komam irimarit ekaporoto."
Jeremiah3:14 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Koboŋutu, Yes idwe luibononorete kau; Naarai arai eoŋ lokowaikus: Ido kalemuni yes, ediopet kore, iarei kokek, Kayau Sion."
Jeremiah3:15 “Kainakini yes ikecokok kwape ejaar ekatau, lukitanyamenenete yes kacoa ka ajenun."
Jeremiah3:16 Kosodi kanen, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Naipuakarotor iyatanakinotor da kakwap, kapaarasia kanun mam oobo ineras ebe, “Asaduku naka aitutuket naka EJAKAIT.” Mam aomisioitike elomari otauonokec; mam iitunete ŋes; mam ipeionokinete ŋes; ido mam bobo iswamao."
Jeremiah3:17 Kapak kaŋin emaikinete Yerusalem eicoloŋ loka EJAKAIT: etukonokinos atekerin kere mamakeŋ, okiror loka EJAKAIT, Yerusalem: ido mam bobo elosenenete kwape ejaar aninik naka itauonokee lueroko."
Jeremiah3:18 Kapaarasia kanun euparos ekek loka Yuda kekek loka Isirael, enyounete nepepe kotoma akwap naka agolitomei epote akwap nakainakinit lukapapaakus araun airumet."
Jeremiah3:19 “Konye abu kaomite kwape tikebwaikinia jo toma odwe, Ainakin jo akwap nakailel, Airumet naejok naka aioresio nuka atekerin. Abu kaomite ebe kinyaraete eoŋ Papa; Komam ibelokinos ainyein atupun eoŋ."
Jeremiah3:20 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Abeit kwape enyounio aberu kama kokilenike kaimod, Kwape kwaŋin kimodiata yesi eoŋ, Wu ekek loka Isirael.”"
Jeremiah3:21 Epupuno eporoto kaiboisio nuiceleleete, Aimony ka aiŋaiŋa naka idwe luka Isirael; Naarai etirioto ekecerot, Emurwokis EJAKAIT Ekecedeke."
Jeremiah3:22 Kobonutu, yes idwe luibononorete kau, Etaŋaleuni abononorikus kau. Koany, kiponi mama ijai; Naarai irai ijo EJAKAIT Edekekosi."
Jeremiah3:23 Abeit aiŋarakinio naemunoi koukon erai naatai, Eeelet da koronan: Abeit ejai aitajario naka Isirael toma EJAKAIT Edekewok."
Jeremiah3:24 “Konye ageun keiditeuwok abu ibore yeniketal koiwenya aitaaritoi naka lukapapaawok; isipaninikec luka amerekekin ka luka aituk, ka idwekec da lusap ka lupesur."
Jeremiah3:25 Kapero kotoma oleiciwok, korap oni aitirirawok: naarai kidiaka kama ejai EJAKAIT Edekewok, oni ka lukapapaawok, ageun keiditeuwok kiton lolo: mam kipou karimarito eporoto loka EJAKAIT Edekewok.”"
Jeremiah4:1 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Arai ikoto aboŋun mama ajai eoŋ, ijo Isirael, Ibonuni mama ajai: Arai kilema italesiakon kakonyeneka, Ŋes konyet mam irianirianar;"
Jeremiah4:2 Ido iyapoi ebe, ‘Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT,’ Kabeit, kotube, kadolit da; Ilipakinos atekerin arereŋ kotomaken, Tomakeŋ da ŋes itubusikinotor.”"
Jeremiah4:3 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ituŋa luka Yuda ka Yerusalem da kwanata ebe: “Kokorioto alupokus nuiukarito, Sirikiyeata neeiaas ikukwa."
Jeremiah4:4 Kokepas bonik kama ejai EJAKAIT, Kolemas amunym nuka itauonokus, Yes ituŋa luka Yuda, ka luibojete koYerusalem: Kinyek akanyunyura alomun kwape kakim, Kicwe komamei yenepedori aitudeŋ, Kanuka aronis naka aswamisiokus.”"
Jeremiah4:5 Kolimosi koYuda, kisiarakis akiro koYerusalem, kineras atiar, “Kokutata yesi arupepe kakwap: Kiworoto kobalas ebe, ‘Kotukonokinos, kaloto oreria luebwaitai.’"
Jeremiah4:6 Kikeasi aanyunet naesesenas ka Sion: Kokerata kolakunos, sirikipaikis: Naarai ayauni aronis naebuni kagolitomei, Ka amudiar naepol."
Jeremiah4:7 Adakun eŋatuny kamonike, ekamudiaran loka atekerin; Ejai orot, alom kaiboisike; Aitisilior akwapukon, tetere iswapete ireriakon, Komamei yeniboie kotoma."
Jeremiah4:8 Kanuka ŋun konapa ipukoi, Kokuudianata kibwololoto: Naarai anyunyura naededen naka EJAKAIT Mam ibelokino kamawok."
Jeremiah4:9 “Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ipirisiar etau loka ekabaka, ka itauon luka ikapolok; isirienunio isasedotin, eumokinete da inabin.”"
Jeremiah4:10 Kasodi eoŋ atemar atiar, “Wu okwe, EJAKAIT Edeke! Abeit iŋalat noi ituŋa lu, ka Yerusalem da, kobala ebe, ‘Ŋaunos kainapakin’; kwabo adoloki ekileŋ aiiarakec.”"
Jeremiah4:11 Kapak kaŋin elimokinio ituŋa lu, ka Yerusalem da ebe, “Ekwam loemwana loebuni kaiboisio nuiceleleete kotoma amodiŋ mama ejai akoku naka ikatuŋa, mere aipiet, karaida aitalaun;"
Jeremiah4:12 Ŋes ekwam Loegogoŋ adepar ŋun loebuni kanukan: kwana eoŋ da enerakini kes itubesia.”
Jeremiah4:13 Koany, ebuni ŋesi kwape idouon, Agalinike da kwape etapipirio: Etiroko ibalasinike adepar imorukaalen. Itukwi oni! naarai kinatario,"
Jeremiah4:14 Wu Yerusalem, kilot ekonitau alemar nukaronok, tetere kitajario. Itodoli ai eperete akoniwomisio nueroko kotomakon?"
Jeremiah4:15 Naarai elimori eporoto loebuni koDan, Elimonokini aronis naebuni koukon luka Epuraim:"
Jeremiah4:16 Kitwekenya atekerin; Koany, kolimonokis Yerusalem ebe, “Epote ikerereok anyoun kakwap naelwana, Edolokinete ireria luka Yuda."
Jeremiah4:17 Kwape ikedarak emanikor esurokinete ŋes airimor; Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kepaliiki eoŋ."
Jeremiah4:18 Ekonirot ka aswamisiokon kes ayaunete akiro ŋun mamakon; Ŋin ŋes aronisikon, Naarai edwar, naarai adoloki otaukon.”"
Jeremiah4:19 Wu akaijar! Wu akaijar! Kaditarit teni kiton otauka; Ebala etauka ditidit; Mam apedori aililiŋ; Naarai apupi eporoto loka arupepe, Elala loka ejie."
Jeremiah4:20 Iworot amudiar atupakin amudiar; Naarai enataritai akwap kere: Kitiut ikaweman eŋatario, Aigalisioka da katipet."
Jeremiah4:21 Itodoli ai aanyun aanyunet, Kapupi eporoto loka arupepe?"
Jeremiah4:22 “Naarai ebanaka ikatuŋa, mam kajenete; Eraas idwe lujikit, emamei kes aijen: Ecoak kesi aswam nueroko, Konye emamei aijen aswam nuejok.”"
Jeremiah4:23 Abu kaany akwap, ido koany, ajai atai komam etiakak; Akuj da amamei aica."
Jeremiah4:24 Abu kaany ironan, ido koany, komaranata, Kilokilokos iukon epuai kepuai,"
Jeremiah4:25 Abu kaany, ido koany, komamei ituŋanan, Kekerata akweny kere nuka apak."
Jeremiah4:26 Abu kaany, ido koany, emanikor lopusuk araun ais, Ketiyanakinos ireriake kere kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, Kakonyen nuka anyunyurake naededen."
Jeremiah4:27 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Esilior akwap kere; konye mam etanaŋi cur."
Jeremiah4:28 Kanuka ŋun ibworo akwap, Irioniar aku; kokuiu: Naarai abu kalim, abu kanerok, Ido mam abu keitu, ido mam ejulakini.”"
Jeremiah4:29 Ekerete lukore kere kanuka ecelet loka ikebwanenok ka ikeketak akabwai; Elomarete amonieik, edokarete atiiban, Asilior ŋolire, Emamei da ituŋanan yeniboie kotoma."
Jeremiah4:30 Ka jo da, nakiŋatarere, iswamai anyoika? Karaida kinap inapen lukareŋak, Karaida kiyogog kiboro luka esabu Karaida italali akonyekon kekia, Itubusikina taai; Kimenete ipailonokon, emootos akoniijar"
Jeremiah4:31 Naarai apup eporoto kwape loka aberu naeriebi aidoun, Kwape loka aditar naka ŋin naidouni ekiyaike, Eporoto loka akoku naka Sion, nainyikonokini iyena, Korionori akekanin, kobala ebe, “Itukwi eoŋ! Eilori akaijar kakonyen nuka ikaarak.”"
Jeremiah5:1 Aso kokerata laije ka laiie korotin luka Yerusalem, Koanyut bo, kojenut, komoata kaiboisioke nuelalak, Arai ipedorete aanyun irunanan, Arai ejai yeniswamai nuebeito, yenemoot amunonut; Aso etimi eoŋ ere,"
Jeremiah5:2 Karaida kineras atiar, ‘Kwape eiaria EJAKAIT’; Abeit iyapoete nukaiŋal."
Jeremiah5:3 Wu EJAKAIT, mere ma esesenete akonikonye abeit? Inom kes, konye mam itururwete; Idany kes, konye agiro aicorio: Etogogonoto akecekonyen aitelekarit atiiba; Agiro aboŋun,"
Jeremiah5:4 Kasodi einer atiar, “Abeit icanas lu: ebanaaka; Naarai mam ejenete erot loka EJAKAIT, Karaida ekisil loka Ekecedeke."
Jeremiah5:5 Alosionori do mama ejaas lukapolok, kenera kakes; Naarai ejenete kesi erot loka EJAKAIT, ka ekisil loka Ekecedeke.” Konye abila ŋul eloit kediopetau, anedata aeneta."
Jeremiah5:6 Kanuka ŋun eari rwaru kes eŋatuny loelomuni kamoni, Eŋasi kes epeet loka amodiŋ, Eperuni eris koreriakec, Ŋinituŋanan yenelomuni kotoma enyilinyilio; Naarai ipu adiakanaretakec, Eyatakin akecepaar."
Jeremiah5:7 “Apedori biai aitim jo? Kajala ikonidwe eoŋ, Eyapoikis ŋul lumam eraas idekesio: Abu kesimon kes kosodete adotiar, Kotukonokinos katukon otogoi luka nudotia."
Jeremiah5:8 Esubito bala ibalasin lukitadakio tupuruc: Ŋolituŋanan icicina kaberu naka yenice.
Jeremiah5:9 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe: Mam kereka eticani kanuka ŋun? Ido mam tope inyani ekatau kateker naikoni nen?
Jeremiah5:10 “Kodokasi arwatatinike, komudiasi: Konye sirikitanana cut: Kolemasi aketenun; Naarai mam eraas nuka EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah5:11 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Naarai keŋala noi noi ekek loka Isirael, Ka ekek loka Yuda."
Jeremiah5:12 Anerokis EJAKAIT, kineras atiar, ‘Mam nuiswamai ŋesi; Kwabo mam kidoikini oni aronis, Kwabo mam kianyuni ekileŋ karaida eteŋei,"
Jeremiah5:13 Eraunos inabin da ekwam, Kwabo emamei akirot kotomakec: Iswamakinio kes kwaŋin.’’’"
Jeremiah5:14 Kanuka ŋun ebala kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka aioresio, ebe: “Kanu ineratar akirot ŋin, Koany, etuluori akakiro kaitukukon araun akim, Ka ituŋa lu da araun akito, icwei kes."
Jeremiah5:15 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe: Koany, ayauni mama iiaas ateker naebuni kama elwana, Ijo ekek loka Isirael: Ateker nakagogonon, ateker nakolo sek, Ateker namam ijeni akecenaiep, Kwabo mam ijenuni nuineras."
Jeremiah5:16 Ecoekec loka ikoioi erai ailit naesabara, Eraas kere ikiliok lukirigin."
Jeremiah5:17 Ido enyamete ikonidwenyan, ka ikoninyamat, Lutikenyama ikonidwe lusap ka lupesur: Enyamete ikonisipanin luka aituk ka luka amerekekin; Enyamete ekonimusabibu, ka etinikon: Ejepejepeete kekilen ikonireria luebwaitai, luimunokina.”"
Jeremiah5:18 “Konye ebala EJAKAIT ebe, karaida kapaarasia kanun, mam ketananete cut."
Jeremiah5:19 Kosodi kanen, naineriata atiar, ‘Kanukinyo kiswamakinia EJAKAIT Ewokodeke akiro ŋun kere?’ Kosodi Koboŋok kes ebe, ‘Kwape kinyeiniata yesi eoŋ, kijaanakis idekesio lumo kakwapukus, ijaanakinete kwape kwaŋin imo kakwap namere nakus.’’’"
Jeremiah5:20 Kolimosi nu kokek loka Yakob, Kolimonokis koYuda, kineras atiar,"
Jeremiah5:21 “Kiirasi nu, yes ituŋa luibanaaka, luemamei aijen; Lueiaas akonye, komam ianyunete; Lueiaas aki komam ipupunete."
Jeremiah5:22 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mam ca kiyoŋito eoŋ? Mam imaranete kakonyeneka? Ebwaik asine araun eikor loka aŋolol, Kokisil lomam edaun, tetere mam etubor, Karaida edakununos akailan, mam epedorete aipikor; Karaida irurumaete, mam epedorete atubor."
Jeremiah5:23 Konye ejaas ituŋa lu itauon luepaarete ido luepaliikis; Apaasi aloto.
Jeremiah5:24 Kwabo mam ebalas kotauonokec ebe, “Kayonate EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, Loeinakini akiru kapakike; Akiru naka aiporo ka naka akamu da; Loinadakini oni asabaton nuseuna nuka aidweny.’"
Jeremiah5:25 Aremosi numam adolitekus akiro ŋun, Erebokis aronisiokus ajokis kamakus."
Jeremiah5:26 Naarai edumunos ikaronok kotuŋaka: Idarete, kwape eperunioto ikalokak akweny; Elokete atacit, ipokete ituŋa."
Jeremiah5:27 Kwape ilelebunotor akweny aruja, Kwape kwaŋin ilelebunotor itogoikec aiŋal: Ŋes apolokorotor, kobarata."
Jeremiah5:28 Etumitos, inutakina: Eebo, elitoro kaswamisio nukaronok: Mam etubete kabeit akiro nuka ikokiok, Tetere ekeriakaros; Mam epurokinete luilwaritos nuebeito."
Jeremiah5:29 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mam kereka etieani kanuka ŋun? Mam ekatau inyani ateker naikoni nen?”"
Jeremiah5:30 Adoloki akirot nakaumokin ka nasogim akwap;
Jeremiah5:31 Edwarete inabin lukenalak, Eyaito isasedotin kanuka aisigalikinikec; Ekotosi ikatuŋa kwaŋin; Ikwaikinete yesi ai kedolu esaŋe?"
Jeremiah6:1 Kokerata kolakunos, yes idwe luka Benyamin, Konyout kokidiŋ Yerusalem, Kokutata arupepe koTekoa, Kikeasi aanyunet koBet-kakerem: Naarai etakani aronis ebuni kagolitomei, Ka amudiar naepol."
Jeremiah6:2 Agelari akoku naka Sion, Naitemelel naijamamai,"
Jeremiah6:3 Epote ikecokok kisipaninikee luka amerekekin asurokin ŋes; Ibubuete iwemanakec airimor; Itadakete kes, ŋinituŋanan kaiboisike."
Jeremiah6:4 “Kokapanakinos ejie kaŋes; Konyoutu, kadokasi kidin paaran!” “Itukwi oni! naarai aiotaki akoloŋ, Aojaaros itolimon luka atibonl”"
Jeremiah6:5 “Konyoutu, kadokasi kuare, Kamudiasi itogoike lukapolok!”"
Jeremiah6:6 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe: “Kojeput ikito, kitutuoto etut, Asurokin Yerusalem: Lo ŋes ere lokitieana; Ileleba emwaŋit pas kidinike."
Jeremiah6:7 K wape ibwelibwelio atan akekipi, Kwape kwaŋin da ibwelibwelio aronisike: Iirario akaje ka aiŋat kotomake; Ejai adek ka amusuŋun kakonyeneka tiritir."
Jeremiah6:8 Kituutoor, ijo Yerusalem, Kinyek ekatau anyoun kama ijai; Kenyek aitaraun jo asilio, Akwap namam ituŋanan.”"
Jeremiah6:9 Ebala EJAKAIT loka aioresio kwanata ebe: “Inyogokinete aidepidep eut aatoŋot naka Isirael kwape emusabibu: Kinyakanyak bobo akonikan katenun kwape yenedeni emusabi bu.”
Jeremiah6:10 Alimokini ŋai ka aikwenyar da tetere epupunete? Koany, mam akeeeki ekepep, Kwabo mam epedorete akiirar: Koany, araun akirot naka EJAKAIT amorosit kamakee; Mam isiyalamikinito."
Jeremiah6:11 Kanuka ŋun ŋes elelebunor eoŋ anyunyura naka EJAKAIT; Kapas aitikokinit. “Kobukok odwe korot, Ido katukot naka ikatumunak ncpepe: Naarai eyanaario ekile ka nakowaike, Lomoion ka ŋol da loileleba apaarasia."
Jeremiah6:12 Eluoros itogoikee luka ice, Nepepe kanorokec ka imanikoriakee: Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ariori akakan mama ejaas luibojete kakwap kana."
Jeremiah6:13 Naarai ageun kaloedit kakesi kiton lokapolon kakesi, Eraŋani ŋinituŋanan aimedaun; Ido ageun konabi kiton osasedoti, Emodi ŋinituŋanan."
Jeremiah6:14 Etaŋaleut da amusuŋut naka ikatuŋa kaitapapanit, Kobalas ebe, ‘Ainapakin, ainapakin,’ Kereka emamei ainapakin."
Jeremiah6:15 Eruma kereka kes ileje naadauniata aswam naketal? Be! Mam eut erumito ileje, Ido mam apedorete aitirir. Kanuka ŋun ebiroros nepepe kanul luebiroros: Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kapak naeticania kes elataros.”"
Jeremiah6:16 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Kobwaata yesi korotin, koanyut, Kinita isokono lukolono, Neejai erot loejok, koloto kotoma, Ido idumunete aiyeŋun kotauonokus: Konye kobalas ebe, ‘Mam kilosi kotoma.’"
Jeremiah6:17 Abu kebwaik ikedarak kamakus ebe, ‘Kopuputu eporoto loka arupepe!’ Konye kobalas ebe, ‘Mam kipupuni.’"
Jeremiah6:18 Aso do kopuputu, yes atekerin, Kojen, ijo ekodet, nuedoikinete kes."
Jeremiah6:19 Kopup, ijo akwap; koany, ayauni aronis otuŋa lu, Araito nuka akeceomisio, Naarai mam apotu kiirasi akakiro; Ido aneroto ekakisil."
Jeremiah6:20 Anyoin kereka ajokis naka lukisupurununo luepote mamaka anyoun koSeba, Eitola da loebuni kakwap naelwana? Ainakinetakus nuieweio mam eeamunio, Asubanakus da mam kesiyalamikinito."
Jeremiah6:21 Kanuka nun ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: ‘Koany, ebwaikini ikomion akonyen nuka ituŋa kalu: Iguikinete lukapapa ka odwekee kere nepepe; Eoliori eidunyet ka epaperoke da.’”"
Jeremiah6:22 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Koany epote ituŋa kakwap naka agolitomei; Ekwenyuni ateker naepol kowaitin luelwaka luka akwap.
Jeremiah6:23 Itiŋito akabwai ka akwaras; Ibworitos kesi, mam itimenenete; Irurumaete ikeeeporotoi kwape aŋolol, Ibwanenito ibalasin; Ekapanakina nclitunanan kwape ekaiiot, Asurokin jo, wu akoku naka Sion.”"
Jeremiah6:24 Kipou keirasi eemutukee; Koleiekekaros akaniniwok; Kikam aditar, Ka ariebo kwape naka aberu naidouni."
Jeremiah6:25 Sirikilomas okitui, karaida alosit korot; Naarai ejai ekileŋ loka lokasurup ka aitasuro kanoliwai,"
Jeremiah6:26 Wu jo akoku naka ikatuŋa, konap epuko, Kipunupunokin kotoma okurwon: Kibworo, kwape ibworor ikoku yenilemura, Akuudian naepol noi noi, Naarai kitiuni oni ekamudiaran."
Jeremiah6:27 “Ketarau jo ekegimoron, ekeninon da kotoma otunaka; Tetere ijenuni igimori da ekecerot,"
Jeremiah6:28 Epaliikis kesi kere noi, Irimete kasabanakin; Eraas kesi aisinit ka asuat: Iswamaete kere nukamunaar."
Jeremiah6:29 Ekusi acukut kagogoŋ; Idopori akim asasit; Iyatanakinete ailiaun atai; Naarai mam ikaronok edemario.
Jeremiah6:30 Enyaritai epuesa loepalitai, Naarai agiri EJAKAIT kes.”"
Jeremiah7:1 Akirot naabu kobu mama ejai Yeremia kama ejai EJAKAIT, kobala ebe:"
Jeremiah7:2 “Kobwo korute loka etogo loka EJAKAIT, kolimo kanen akirot na, kiner atiar, Kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT, yes kere luka Yuda, luelomarete korutei kalu aima EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah7:3 Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael, ebe, Kitemokis irotinikus ka aswamisiokus, eoŋ da kesiboikini yes aibois na,"
Jeremiah7:4 Sirikimunokinos akiro nukainal ebe, ‘Lo ŋes eyekalu loka EJAKAIT, eyekalu loka EJAKAIT, eyekalu loka EJAKAIT.’"
Jeremiah7:5 “Naarai arai itemokinete kojokan irotinikus ka aswamisiokus; arai itodolete koiokan etube kokidin ketunsnan ka eidunyeteke;
Jeremiah7:6 arai mam imwanete imoit, ka ikoki, ka apuserut, ido mam ibukokinete aokot numam akirot aibois na, komam itupanarete idekesio ice aiticanar bonik:"
Jeremiah7:7 Ŋes konyet kesiboikinio yes aibois na, akwap naainakinit lukapapaakus, ageun apeŋo kiton ikar kere."
Jeremiah7:8 “Koany, imunosi akiro nukainal, numam epedorete aimedaun."
Jeremiah7:9 Ikotosi kereka yesi akoko, ka aiar, ka adote, ka aiyapo nukainal, ka aisupuronokin Baal lukisupurununo, ka atupanar da idekesio ice lumam lem ijenete,"
Jeremiah7:10 kosodete aponare aibwo kakonyeneka togo lo, loemaikinitai ekakiror, kobalas ebe, ‘Kiyuunitai’; kiswamaenenete da italesia ŋul kere?"
Jeremiah7:11 Araun ca ma etogo lo, loemaikinitai ekakiror, abua naka ikokolak kakonyenekus? Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Koany, eoŋ, eoŋ obe, aany ŋun."
Jeremiah7:12 Konye koloto do yesi aiboisika naajai Silo, naesiaunia eoŋ aisiboikin ekakiror, koanyut nueswamakinit Ŋes kanuka aronis naka ikatuŋa Isirael."
Jeremiah7:13 Ido ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Naarai ipotu kiswamata aswamisio ŋun kere, abu kener kayes, kadilok tupuruc kener, konye mam yes epupuno; kanyarit yes, konye mam iiito:"
Jeremiah7:14 Ŋes konyet eswamakinia etogo loemaikinitai ekakiror, loimunosi yesi, ido aibois nakainak yes ka lukapapaakus, kwape eswamakinitor Silo."
Jeremiah7:15 Kacakari yes kakonyeneka, kwape acakaritor ikusiinacan kere, aur kere naka Epuraim."
Jeremiah7:16 “Kanuka ŋun sirikilipak ituŋa lu, sirikitonyou aimony kanukec, karaida ailipasit, ido sirikiinaina eoŋ: naarai mam kapupuni jo."
Jeremiah7:17 Mam kereka jo ianyunit nuiswamaete kesi kotoma oreria luka Yuda korotin da luka Yerusalem?
Jeremiah7:18 Eraraete idwe akito, inokete lukapapakec akim, igurete aŋor da atap ailunulunanakinia akabaka naka akuj imugatin; ido ebukonokinete idekesio ice ainakineta numatan, tetere ketunyunyurikinete,"
Jeremiah7:19 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ketunyunyurikinete teni eoŋ? Mere kitunyunyurikinos bonik, aitadakar akwesikec?"
Jeremiah7:20 Kanuka ŋun ebala EJAKAIT Edeke kwanata atiar, Koany, ebukokinio akanyunyura ka akaisiop aibois na, otuŋa, otian da okito lukomanikoria, ka araito da nuka alup; icwei ido mam itudenio.”"
Jeremiah7:21 Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: “Kiyatakisi ainakinetakus nuicweio toma asubanakus, konyamata akiriŋ,"
Jeremiah7:22 Naarai mam abu kener kalukapapaakus, kwabo mam ecorakinit kes kapaaran naketolomunia kes kakwap nako Misiri, nuka ainakineta nuicweio karaida asuban."
Jeremiah7:23 Konye kecorakinit kes akirot na ebe, ‘Kiiranarete ekaporoto, eoŋ da araun Edekekus, yes da iraunos ikatuŋa, Kolosenenete korot kere lokeeorakini, tetere ijaunos ejok.’"
Jeremiah7:24 Konye mam apotu kiirasi, mam apotu kitoikis akiikec, konye kolosenenete kainerunikee, kaninik naka itauonokee lueroko, kobononosi kau, mam apotu kiyatakis kinaren,"
Jeremiah7:25 Ageun kapaaran naalomuniata lukapapaakus kakwap nako Misiri kiton lolo, kejukak yes ikakejaanakinak kere inabin, kadilonokin tupuruc aijukunun kes:"
Jeremiah7:26 konye mam apotu keirasi, mam apotu kitoikis akiikec, konye kitininikata imurisiŋakee: kiswamata nueroko aitelekarit lukapapaakec."
Jeremiah7:27 “Ido ilimokini kes akiro nun kere; konye mam kiirarete, ido inyarai kes; konye mam iiete."
Jeremiah7:28 Ilimokini kes ebe, ‘Na ŋes ateker namam eirarit eporoto loka EJAKAIT Edekekee, ido mam eeamunito aituutoorio: aolio abeit, egelaritai kaitukekec."
Jeremiah7:29 Konera itimakon, ijo Yerusalem, Kocaka neelwana, Kikeseu akuudian kokuju neelapat; Naarai aŋer EJAKAIT; ido ajal ituŋa luka atur naka anyunyurake.’"
Jeremiah7:30 “Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Eswamata idwe luka Yuda neuroko kakonyeneka: ebwaikis italesiakee togo loemaikinitai ekakiror, amunaaria,"
Jeremiah7:31 Adukoto aiboisio nuiceleleete nuka Topet, naejai aditot naka okoku loka Kinom, aicweia ikeeedwe lusap ka lupesur kakim; numam ecorakinit, mam da aomisioitike alomarit otauka,"
Jeremiah7:32 Aso do koany, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Epote apaarasia, mam bobo enyaritai Topet, karaida Aditot naka okoku loka Kinom; dimarai Aditot naka Earit: naarai idaanakinete kesi Topet, naarai emamei apak kamace,"
Jeremiah7:33 Eraunos atesina nuka ituŋa kalu akiriŋ naka akweny nuka apak, ka itian luka akwap; emameun yenetwaranari kes,"
Jeremiah7:34 Kasodi eoŋ aitanan koreria luka Yuda, korotin da luka Yerusalem, eporoto loka aitae ka eporoto da loka aiyalama, eporoto loka eteran ka eporoto da loka ateran: naarai eraun akwap naiswapit.”"
Jeremiah8:1 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe: “Kapak kaŋin itolomunete akoio nuka ikabakan luka Yuda, ka akoio nuka ikapolokoke, ka akojo nuka isasedotin, ka akojo nuka inabin, ka akojo da nuka luibojete ko Yerusalem, kailinakec:"
Jeremiah8:2 eloikinete kes kakonyen nuka akoloŋ, ka elap, ka aiore kere naka akuj, nuaminas kesi, nukiiaanakinete, nuatupenenete, nuamootos, nuamaete da: mam etukonokinio, karaida aidaio; eraunos kesi kwape aoret kalup."
Jeremiah8:3 Ebala EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe, Eseunio atwanare itia aijar kotoma aatoŋot kere naedeun naka ekek kalo lokaronon, luedeunos kaiboisio kere nukerenearit kes."
Jeremiah8:4 “Bobo da ilimokini kes ebe, Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Ibiroros kereka ituŋa, komam enyounete bobo? Eboŋori tope ituŋanan komam eboŋuni?"
Jeremiah8:5 Aso kanukinyo abonoriata ituŋa lu luka Yerusalem kau kaicebokinit abononor kau? Iketakinito aiŋal, aneroto aboŋun,"
Jeremiah8:6 Abu kapupok, keira da, konye mam eneras nuibecokino: Emamei yenitoronikin akeronis kinera ebe, ‘Ekwaik ai?’ Ibelokini ŋinituŋanan aboloboloke, Kwape ebalasit loitokaar ojie."
Jeremiah8:7 Eebo ejeŋi atolut kotoma akuj apakioke nuseuna; Bnicete eluke ka iporoidoliat ka ewalu da apak naka aponarekec; Konye ikatuŋa mam ejenete ekisil loka EJAKAIT.
Jeremiah8:8 “Ikwaikinete ai ineras ebe, ‘Kirai lukacoa, Ejai du ekisil loka EJAKAIT kaoni’? Konye koany, akwara nakainal naka ikewadikak etarau lokainal,"
Jeremiah8:9 Erumata lukacoa ileic, eburunito, ikamunitai: Koany, aneroto akirot naka EJAKAIT; Acoa anyoin ejai mamakee?"
Jeremiah8:10 Kanuka ŋun ainakini aŋorokec mama ejaas ice, Imanikoriakec mama ejaas nul lukirumetc kes: Naarai ageun ka loedit kakesi kiton lokapolon kakesi, Eraŋani ŋinituŋanan aimedaun, Ido ageun konabi kiton osasedoti Emodi ninitunanan."
Jeremiah8:11 Etaŋaleut amusuŋut naka akoku naka ikatuŋa kaitapapanit, Kobalas ebe, ‘Ainapakin, Ainapakin,’ Kereka emamei ainapakin."
Jeremiah8:12 Eruma kereka kes ileje naadauniata aswam naketal? Be! Mam eut erumito ileje, Ido mam apedorete aitirir: Kanuka ŋun ebiroros nepepe kanul luebiroros: Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kapak naeticania kes, elataros."
Jeremiah8:13 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Naakotor aideŋ kes: Emameete imusabibun komusabibu, Karaida itinin kotini, Erinyorito dil akui; Ido nuainakinit kes atuboros kamakec.”"
Jeremiah8:14 Kanukinyo kiboio oni kapalarito? Kotukonokinos, kalomasi oreria luebwaitai, Kelilinata kaŋina: Naarai kisililin EJAKAIT Edekewok oni, Koinak oni akipi nuka epiu aimat, Naarai kipou kadiakasi kama ejai EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah8:15 Kipou kamunos ainapakin, konye mam ajokis naebunit; Kamunos apak naka aŋaleun, konye koany aburun!"
Jeremiah8:16 “Epupunio ainoror naka ibalasinike koDan; Eporoto loka aruo naka ikagogonokoke Einakini akwap kere amaran; Naarai apotu konyamata akwap ka luejaas tomake kere; Ere, ka ŋul da luibojete kotoma,"
Jeremiah8:17 Naarai koany, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ejukuni imunwo, asigirikoloŋa kotomakus, Lumam elemelemeo, kitodotodoete yes.”"
Jeremiah8:18 Wu okwe karai kapedor aitalakar bon kenyek aiturur! Epirisiar etauka kotomaka.
Jeremiah8:19 Koany, eporoto loka aimony naka akoku naka ikatuŋa, Kakwap naelwana noi: “Emamei kereka EJAKAIT koSion? Emamei ekabakake kotomake?” “Kanukinyo ketunyunyurikiniata kaputosiakec nuegerer, Ka aamameak da numo?”"
Jeremiah8:20 “Atubor aidweny, adaun ejet, Mam oni kitajaruna.”"
Jeremiah8:21 Kemusun eoŋ kamusunut naka akoku naka ikatuŋa: Eoŋ da ebworo; Kekam aitirir.
Jeremiah8:22 Emamei kereka emina koGilead? Emamei emurwon kaŋina? Aso kanukinyo mam eŋaleunio aijar naka akoku naka ikatuŋa?
Jeremiah9:1 Wu okwe arai kerai akouka akipi, Akakonye da koraas ikieo luka akiyo, Tetere amonyenenei akiyo paaran ka akuar Kanuka luearitai luka akoku naka ikatuŋa!"
Jeremiah9:2 Arai kajai kaiyenet naka ikalotok kamodiŋ; Tikajal ikatuŋa, anyoun kamakee! Naarai eraas kere ludotia, Atukot naka ituŋa kai uemodaka."
Jeremiah9:3 Ikesete akecenaiepa kwape akabwaikec aiŋal; Agogonoros kakwap, konye mere kanuka abeit; Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Iwotonokinete anyoun karonis kiton aronis, Mam kajenete."
Jeremiah9:4 Kocoito yesi ŋinituŋanan ekeidunyet, Sirikimunokinos onaee kere; Naarai onaee kere elomakini numere nuke Elatonori niniidunyet kasabanakin."
Jeremiah9:5 Emodete kesi ŋinituŋanan ekeidunyet, Mam ineras nukabeit: Esisianakis anaiepakec einer nukainal; Itapasitos bonik aswam numam adolir"
Jeremiah9:6 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ejai aiboisikon kidin aimod; Kanuka aimod ŋes agirioto ajenun eoŋ."
Jeremiah9:7 Kanuka ŋun ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kwanata ebe, “Koany, acalari kes, egimori da; Naarai ti kekwaik ai kanuka akoku naka ikatuŋa?"
Jeremiah9:8 Aŋajepekec ŋes ekoj loeari; inera nuka aimod; Inera ituŋanan kekeidunyet nuka ainapakin kanaiepeke, Konye kotauke eperunit ŋes."
Jeremiah9:9 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mam kereka etieani kes kanuka ŋun? Mam ekatau inyani ateker naikoni nen?"
Jeremiah9:10 “Ageuni eoŋ aimony ka elulu da kanuka ironan, Ido akuudian kanuka ironyia luka ais, Naarai ieweio tetere emamei yenitori nen: Ido mam epedorete ituŋa akiirar eporoto loka ibaren; Akera akweny nuka apak ka itiaŋ da, aloto."
Jeremiah9:11 Etarauni do Yerusalem aapoŋor, Aibois naka ikuwei; Etisiliori da ireria luka Yuda, Komamei yeniboie kotoma.”"
Jeremiah9:12 Iŋai bo yenikacoa, yenejenuni ŋun? Iŋai da ŋin yenabu aŋajep naka EJAKAIT kolimok, tetere elimori? Kanukinyo amunaunor akwap icweio kwape kais, tetere emamei yenitori nen?"
Jeremiah9:13 Ido ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Naarai ajalata ikakisila luebwaikinit kakonyenekec, ido mam erimarito ekaporoto, ido mam elosenenete kotoma;"
Jeremiah9:14 konye elosenenete kwape eiaar aninik naka itauonokec korupitos Ibaalin, lukisisianakinete lukapapaakec:"
Jeremiah9:15 kanuka ŋun ebala kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, Koany, etanyami kes, ituŋa ŋupeŋul, aliasit nakadwaris, etamasi da akipi nuka epiu."
Jeremiah9:16 Esiarakini kes toma atekerin, numam lem kes ejenete karaida lukapapaakec: ejukari da ekileŋ atupakin kes, aitodol neamudiaria.”"
Jeremiah9:17 Ebala EJAKAIT lokajoresio ebe: “Koomoomata yesi, konyarautu aŋor nuibworos, kopotu: Kijukasi anyaraun aŋor nuepiriaka, kopotu kesi da;"
Jeremiah9:18 Kiwonyut, kogeut ailulukin kanukosi, Koleleete akiyo kakonyekosi, Kibwelibwelete akip kabukiokosi."
Jeremiah9:19 Naarai epupio eporoto loka elulu koSion ebe, “Kinasi cut! Kitirira noi; Naarai kipou kenyeis akwap, Naarai ebirosi ikositogoi.’”"
Jeremiah9:20 Konye yes aŋor, kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT, Kijaut akusiki akirot naka aŋajepeke, Kisisianakis adwekus elulu, Kisisianak ŋinituŋanan akeidunyet akuudian."
Jeremiah9:21 Naarai adoku atwanare kadirisanawok, Aloma otogoiwok lukapolou; Agela idwe kina, Ka ikatumunak da korotin."
Jeremiah9:22 Kinerasi ebe, “Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Ibiroros atesina nuka ituŋa kwape aoret kamanat, Ido kwape luedeunos akaulo kekasakan, Emameun yenedei kes.”"
Jeremiah9:23 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Kinyek yenikacoa aolobobot kotoma acoake, kinyek da lokirigi aolobobot kotoma agogoŋuke, kinyek ekabaran da aolobobot kotoma abarake."
Jeremiah9:24 Konye yeneolobobot koolobobote kana ebe kamisiikinit, ido kajeni eoŋ, ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT loeswamai nukasianut, nuketube, ka nukadolit da kakwap: naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kesiyalamikinito akiro ŋun.”"
Jeremiah9:25 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Koany, epote apaarasia nueticania ŋul kere luekepep kotoma numam ekepepukec:"
Jeremiah9:26 Misiri, ka Yuda, ka Edom, ka idwe luka Amon, ka Moab, ka ŋul kere da luekebeb itimakec, luiboiete kais: naarai atekerin ŋun kere mam ekepep, ekek da kere loka Isirael mam ekepep kotau,”"
Jeremiah10:1 Wu ekek loka Isirael, kopuput akirot nakitemari EJAKAIT yes."
Jeremiah10:2 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Sirikisisiaut erot loka atekerin, Sirikiburununut kanuka aanyuneta nuka akuj; Naarai eburunito atekerin kanukec."
Jeremiah10:3 Naarai iponesio luka ituŋa eraas aamameak: Naarai eiepep ekitoi kamagoro, Aswam naka akanin nuka ekeswaman kaep."
Jeremiah10:4 Isirete kesi ŋes kepuesa, ka esabu; Iketakinete kaseito ka anyulia, Tetere mam ilokulokun."
Jeremiah10:5 Esubito bala ipirin luikeitoi, mam inerasi: Ibusakinit adakio, naarai mam epedorete alosit, Sirikuriaka kes; Naarai mam epedorete aswam aronis, Ido emamei tomakec aswam nuejok.”"
Jeremiah10:6 Emamei yenerianas kaio, wu EJAKAIT; Ipol ijo, epol da ekonikiror kotoma apedor."
Jeremiah10:7 Iŋai ca ma mam ti kiyoŋ jo, wu Ekabaka loka atekerin? Naarai kibusakinit: Naarai kotoma lukacoa kere luka atekerin Ido kotoma aiakanutokec kere, Emamei cut yenerianas kajo."
Jeremiah10:8 Konye eraas kwape itian ido ebanabanato; Aisisianakin aputosia, erai ekomio atai,"
Jeremiah10:9 Ejai epuesa loerukuk loeyaunitai ko Tarusis, Ka esabu loeyaunitai koupas, Aswam naka ekeswaman, ka akanin nuka ekatatan esabu; Enapitos igoen lubululu ka lumugeik; Eraas kere aswam naka ituŋa luepiriaka."
Jeremiah10:10 Konye EJAKAIT ŋes Edeke lokabeit; Erai ŋesi Edeke lokaiaran, ekabaka lomam edaun: Akenyunyura da isimarani akwap, Mam epedorete atekerin atitiŋikin akeisiop."
Jeremiah10:11 Ilimokini kes kwanata ebe, “Idekesio lumam kesubete aku; ka akwap, eoliorete kakwap, ido kokwap kakui.”"
Jeremiah10:12 Kanuka apedorike abu kosub alup, Kanuka acoake abu kiticat akwap, Kanuka aiieneke abu kopesik akui,"
Jeremiah10:13 Naikeseunia eporotoke, ejai airurum naka akipi toma akui, Itonyouni elisina kosaneta luka akwap; Iswamakini akiru eimilia, Itolomuni da ekwam kainadisiake."
Jeremiah10:14 Erai ŋinituŋanan bala itian, emamei aijen; Aputoke naegerer isurumi nolikatatan esabu ileic: Naarai aputoke naecalara erai aiŋal, Emamei eiyeŋane kotomakec."
Jeremiah10:15 Eraas aamameak, aswam naka aiŋal: Kapak naka aiticaniokee eoliorete."
Jeremiah10:16 Mam akorakinet naka Yakob eputosi kanun, Naarai erai ŋesi lokasuban iboro kere; Isirael da ŋes ateker naka airumeteke: EJAKAIT loka aioresio ŋes ekekiror."
Jeremiah10:17 Kotukonok iborokon kokwap, Ŋo loiboie kore loirigaunitai."
Jeremiah10:18 Naarai eba la EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Koany, aporocari luibojete kakwap kapak kana, Etuburuni kes, koriebakinos.”"
Jeremiah10:19 Itukwi abei ai akapipil! Akamusunut kesiriebi noi. Konye kabala ebe, “Abeit ŋin ŋes akadek, Kebusakinit da atitiŋikin.”"
Jeremiah10:20 Aŋatar ewemaka, anedas aunoika kere: Anyout idweka kamaka, ido emameete: Emamei yeneterari bobo ekawema, Asipokin aigalisioka."
Jeremiah10:21 Naarai araut ikeeokok itian, Kwabo mam apotu kinitata EJAKAIT: Kanuka ŋun ŋes mam kekeriakarotor; Esiarakinos isipaninikec kere."
Jeremiah10:22 Eporoto loka eemut! Koany ebuni, Autaar naepol naebuni kakwap naka agolitomei, Aitisilior ireria luka Yuda, Aitaraun aibois naka ikuwei."
Jeremiah10:23 Wu EJAKAIT, ajeni ebe erot loka ituŋanan emamei kotomake ilopet: Emamei kotoma otunanan yenelosi aitetenar akekeie."
Jeremiah10:24 Wu EJAKAIT, koleeoroi, konye kotube; Mere kakoninyunyura, kinyek aitidisiar,"
Jeremiah10:25 Kobukok anyunyurakon okapirin lumam kijenete, Atekerin da numam iwoneete ekonikiror; Naarai anyamasi Yakob; Eebo, anyamasi, adautu ŋes, etisilioto aiboisike."
Jeremiah11:1 Akirot naabu kobu mama ejai Yeremia kama ejai EJAKAIT ebe,"
Jeremiah11:2 “Kiirasi yesi akiro nuka aitutuket na, kolimokis ituŋa luka Yuda, ka luibojete ko Yerusalem."
Jeremiah11:3 Kolimok ijo kes ebe, Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, Kikenoi ituŋanan yenimam epupi akiro nuka aitutuket kana,"
Jeremiah11:4 nakecorakinit lukapapaakus kapaaran naketolomunia kes kakwap nako Misiri, koupa loka asuat, enera ebe, Korimarito ekaporoto, kiswamata kwape ejaatar kere nukecorakinit yes: kwaŋin iraunos ikatuŋa, eoŋ da araun Ekusideke."
Jeremiah11:5 Tetere eticasi aiyaposit nakeyapoikinit lukapapaakus, ainakin kes akwap naeleleete akile ka esik, kwape lolo.” Kasodi eoŋ aboŋokin ebe, “Kikote nepenen, wu EJAKAIT.”"
Jeremiah11:6 Kabala EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, “Kolimonok akiro nu kere oreria luka Yuda, korotin da luka Yerusalem ebe, Kiirasi yesi akiro nuka aitutuket kana, kiswamata da."
Jeremiah11:7 Naarai abu ketejenik noi lukapapaakus kapaaran naketolomunia kes kakwap nako Misiri, kiton lolo, kadilonokin tupuruc ido keteienikini ebe, Korimarito ekaporoto,"
Jeremiah11:8 Konye mam apotu korimasi, ido man apotu kitoikis akiikee, konye kolosenenete ŋinituŋanan kaninik naka etauke lokaronon: kanuka ŋun ketebeik kes akiro kere nuka aitutuket kana, nukeeorakinit kes aswam, konye mam apotu kiswamata.”"
Jeremiah11:9 Kabala EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, “Atakanu ainerunet nakaiyeiyea kotuŋa luka Yuda, ka luibojete koYerusalem."
Jeremiah11:10 Abonosi mama ejaas numam adolit nuka lukapapaakee, luapotu kogiroto apupun akakiro; atupasi kesi icedekesio aijaanakin: abilata ekek loka Isirael ka ekek loka Yuda akaitutuket naketutukit kalukapapaakee."
Jeremiah11:11 Kanuka ŋun ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Koany, ayaun aronis mamakec, namam epedorete ainae; karaida kamonyakis, konye mam eoŋ eirari kes."
Jeremiah11:12 Kosodete ireria luka Yuda ka luibojete koYerusalem alosit amonyakin idekesio luisupuronokino lukisupurununo: konye mam cut itajarete kes kapak naka icanikec.
Jeremiah11:13 Naarai kwape imwatatar ireriakon, imwaasi kwaŋin ikonidekesio da, ijo Yuda; ido kwape imwatatar irotin luka Yerusalem, ipotu kosipokis ileic itemwan, kes itemwan aisupurikin Baal lukisupurununo."
Jeremiah11:14 “Kanuka ŋun sirikilipak ituŋa lu, sirikitonyou aimony karaida ailipasit kanukee: naarai mam apupuni kes kapak nakamonyakiniata eoŋ kocanikec."
Jeremiah11:15 Inyo bo ejaar naminataka togoka, naarai eswama nukasilianut? Epedorete kereka aiyaposio ka akiriŋ nakalaunan aituku yes katwanare? Ipedorete kereka eibwoŋ?"
Jeremiah11:16 Abu EJAKAIT komaik jo ekiror ‘Eseitun loepesit, loejok karaito nuejok’. Keporoto loka eeelet loepol enokoki akim, abilasi da atenunake."
Jeremiah11:17 Naarai abu EJAKAIT loka aioresio lokiraikini jo kolim aronis kamakon, kanuka aronis naka ekek loka Isirael, ka naka ekek loka Yuda, nakiswamakinos bonik ketunyunyurikis eoŋ kanuka aisupuronokin Baal lukisupurununo.”"
Jeremiah11:18 Ketejenik EJAKAIT eoŋ, kajen: Kosodi ijo aitodikin eoŋ aswamisiokec."
Jeremiah11:19 Konye kasub bala imerekek yenepatana yenerikorio aiar; Mam abu kajen ebe enerut kaiyeiyea asurckin eoŋ, Kobalasi ebe, ‘Kamudiasi ekitoi ka araitoke da, Kagelasi ŋes kakwap naka Iukaiarak, Tetere mam bobo iitunio ekekiror.’"
Jeremiah11:20 Konye, wu EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, loitubi akiro kotenan, Loigimori aomisio ka etau, Kinye ber kaany enyanitikon kamakee: Naarai kekuiok jo akakirot."
Jeremiah11:21 Kanuka ŋun ebala kwanata EJAKAIT nuka ituŋa luka Anatot, luemoetc aijarakon, kobalas ebe, “Sirikidwar kokiror loka EJAKAIT, kinyek atwanare kakanikosi.”"
Jeremiah11:22 Kanuka ŋun ebala kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe, “Koany, eticani kes: etwakete ikatumunak kekilen: etwakete ikeeedwe da lusap ka lupesur eteŋei,"
Jeremiah11:23 Ido mam luideunos kakesi: naarai ayauni aronis kotuna luka Anatot, kokaru loka aiticaniokec.”"
Jeremiah12:1 Idolit ijo, wu EJAKAIT, naanuriania kamakon: Konye akoto apurokin bon kamakon akiro: Kanukinyo ekerianaror erot loka ikaronok? Kanukinyo iiamamaata kere luiswamaenenete noi nuka aimodi"
Jeremiah12:2 Ibu kira kes, eebo, kidirata alias; Epoloete, eebo, eraete araito: Iapiei ijo kaitukekee, Ilwanikina da kaomisiokee."
Jeremiah12:3 Konye jo, wu EJAKAIT, kijeni eoŋ: Kiany eoŋ, igimori ekatau kamakon: Kiriu kes kwape amerekekin nuaarat, Kotiak kes kanuka apaaran naka earit."
Jeremiah12:4 Itodoli ai akwap aibworo, Akui da nuka akwap kere arinyor? Kanuka aronis naka nul kaluiboiete kotoma Ŋes edaunotor itiaŋ ka akweny; Naarai ebakai ebe, “Mam ŋes eanyuni esanewok lokokau.”"
Jeremiah12:5 “Arai ibolito kituna luekerete kakeje, kitapasa jo, Ikwaikini ai ipedoriabolobol kibalasin? Ido arai ilatara ijo kakwap naka ainapakin, Ikwaikini ca ai kaiturokina naka Yorodan?"
Jeremiah12:6 Naarai ikoniinacan, ka ekek loka papakon, Ŋupeŋul kiswamakinete nuka aimod; Ŋupenul kiluluoto jo: Sirikiyu kes, karaida kiinerakis jo akiro nukajokak.”"
Jeremiah12:7 “Ajal etogoka, aeaka airumeteka; Ainak naemin ekatau noi akan naka lukasurupoke."
Jeremiah12:8 Arau airumeteka kamakaŋ kwape eŋatuny kamagoro; Ekeseu ekeporoto asurokin eoŋ; Ŋes alaia ŋes.
Jeremiah12:9 Erai kereka airumeteka kamakaŋ kwape ekweny loeerepus loemejai? Irigaunete kereka ŋes ikweny luemeiaete asurokin? Koloto yesi, kotukonokis itiaŋ kere luka ais, Koyautu kes konyamasi."
Jeremiah12:10 Apotu ikeeokok luipu komunaasi emanikorika loka emusabibu, Kipudapudata ewaika kakeje, Kitaraut ewaika loejok ais naesil."
Jeremiah12:11 Etaraut asilio: Ibworo mama ajai naarai esil; Itisilioritai akwap kere, Naarai emamei ituŋanan yenibwaikinit etau,"
Jeremiah12:12 Adoloto ikaŋatak kuju neelapat toma ais: Naarai iŋinyari ekileŋ loka EJAKAIT ageun kosane ediopet loka akwap kiton osaŋe eee loka akwap; Emamei akuan nainapakina.
Jeremiah12:13 Apotu koyeata akima, konye kosakata ikukwa; Itapasitos atai, mam imedaunete: Kisurumito araitokus yes ileic, Kanuka anyunyura naededen naka EJAKAIT.”"
Jeremiah12:14 Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT asurokin iidunyetaka kere lueroko, luetirorete airumet naesurumit eoŋ ikatuŋa Isirael ebe: “Koany, arutori kes kakwapukee, arutori da ekek loka Yuda kokidinikec."
Jeremiah12:15 Kosodi kanen, kadau arutor kes, aboŋuni etimi kes: ido enyakakini kes, ninitunanan airumeteke, ŋinituŋanan da alupoke."
Jeremiah12:16 Kosodi kanen, arai edunyaka kesi aisisia iponesio luka ikatuŋa, iyapoete kolimito ekakiror ebe, ‘Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT’, kwape esisianakiniata kesi ikatuŋa aiyapo kolimito Baal; ŋes konyet edukokinere kidiŋ kikatuna."
Jeremiah12:17 Konye ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Arai mam epupete, kasodi eoŋ arutor ateker ŋin, arutori ido amudiari.”"
Jeremiah13:1 Kabala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Kolot kogwel aenet naka ebaputa, konapak aŋabetekon, mam idomakin akipi.”"
Jeremiah13:2 Abu do kagwel aenet kwape kejaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, kanapak anabeteka."
Jeremiah13:3 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai nakiareit ebe,"
Jeremiah13:4 “Koya aenet naigwelit, naejai aŋabetekon, konyou kolot Eupurate, kibwa kaŋina kobur loka atiida.”"
Jeremiah13:5 Kwaŋin do kalot, kebwa ŋes kariri naka Eupurate, kwape keeorakinia EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah13:6 Kosodi kanen, ketuboros apaarasia nuipu, kabala EJAKAIT ebe, “Konyou, kolot Eupurate, kolem kaŋina aenet, nakecorakinit jo aibwa kaŋina.”"
Jeremiah13:7 Kasodi eoŋ alosit Eupurate, kabok, kalem aenet kaibois kama kebwaitor: ido koany, emunaara aenet amamei ajokis."
Jeremiah13:8 Kosodi akirot naka EJAKAIT abunore mama ajai ebe,"
Jeremiah13:9 “Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Amunaari kwape kwaŋin aiturokina naka Yuda, ka aiturokina naepol naka Yerusalem."
Jeremiah13:10 Ituŋa lu lukaronok, lueŋerete akiirar akakiro, luelosenenete kaninik naka itauonokec, luetupasi idekesio ice aiiaanakin, ka aima kes, eraunos kesi kwape aenet na, naemamei ajokis."
Jeremiah13:11 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kwape iketakinor aenet aŋabet naka ituŋanan, kwape kwaŋin kesiketikinia ekek kere loka Isirael ka ekek kere loka Yuda, tetere eraunos kamakaŋ ateker, ka ekiror, ka aiturit, ka aibuses da: konye koneroto akiirar."
Jeremiah13:12 “Kanuka nun ilimokini kes akirot na ebe: Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, “Ilelebio ninimot ebino.” Kilimokinete jo ebe,, Mam ca sio kijeni ebe, ilelebio ŋinimot ebino?’"
Jeremiah13:13 Kosodi ijo atemar kes ebe, ‘Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Koany, esilelebi emeret luibojete kere kakwap kana, ikabakan luibojete koicolon loka Daudi, ka isasedotin, ka inabin, ka luibojete da kere koYerusalem."
Jeremiah13:14 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Esinananakini kes, lukapapa ka idwekec nepepe. Mam etimi, karaida aideun, karaida aisioni, komam amudiarit kes.’”"
Jeremiah13:15 Kiirasi yesi kitoikis da aki; Sirikipogakinos naarai ener EJAKAIT.
Jeremiah13:16 Kitubusikis EJAKAIT Ekusideke, Eriŋa eyauna amuton, Ido eriŋa iguikina akusikeje Koronan luka aikamus; Ido naimoiata aica, Kituluo etoribe loka atwanare, Kitarau da amuton nairiono cueueuc."
Jeremiah13:17 Konye arai iŋerete apupun, Emonyi ekatau kaiyeiyea kanuka akusiiwononut; Emonyete noi akakonyen, eleleete da akiyo, Naarai ijoreoritai esipan loka EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah13:18 Kolimok ijo ekabaka ka toto naka ekabaka ebe, “Kitasonikinos, kiboikinos kwap: Naarai itisilitai nuinapito kakwes, Aboko naka aibusesukus.”"
Jeremiah13:19 Egolitoi ireria luka Eŋalakimak, Emamei da yenenaari kes: Yuda kere ijoreoritai; Ŋoreoritai eut kere."
Jeremiah13:20 “Kiteluosi akusikonye, koanyutu kes luepote kagolitomei: Ali bo esipan lokiinakinitai, Ekonisipan loejok noi?"
Jeremiah13:21 Anyoika nuinera naedakakinia ŋesi ipaperokon kujukon, Naarai jo elopet isisianakinit kes asurokin jo? Mam tope kikamuni jo aiturur, Kwape aberu naeriebi aidoun?"
Jeremiah13:22 Arai kiner kotaukon atiar, ‘Kanukinyo kadoikinioto akiro nu?’ Kanuka ailiil naka numam adolitekon Ŋes epukorere ikonigoen, Eriebatar akonititiban kakaje."
Jeremiah13:23 Epedori kereka Etiopiat aijulakin amunyoke, Arai bo eris aijulakin amerianutuke? Kosodete yesi aswam nuejok Luinaikinito aswam nueroko."
Jeremiah13:24 Kanuka ŋun ŋes esiarisiaria kes, Kwape agugu nuekutari ekwam loka ais."
Jeremiah13:25 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, ŋin ŋes ewaikon, Akorakinet naketemokinit jo; Naarai kimurwokinit eoŋ, komunokina aiŋal."
Jeremiah13:26 Kanuka ŋun ŋes eolunio ikonigoen akonyenekon, Kotakanut ileicikon."
Jeremiah13:27 Abu kaany italesiakon, Ka adoteukon, ka aicicinakon, Ka asilianut naka adoteukon, Koukon luka ais. Itukwi ijo Yerusalem! Itodolete ai eriŋa kitalauna?”"
Jeremiah14:1 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naabu kobu mama ejai Yeremia nuka ekure:
Jeremiah14:2 “Ibworo Yuda, iiunepepas iruteike, Iboiete iketuŋa kokwap, kokuudianete; Ekear aimony naka Yerusalem."
Jeremiah14:3 Ŋukarete isotiakec inyamurenekec aomare akipi: Edolete atapar, mam edumunete akipi; Eboŋunete ewokito amotiikee; Irumito ileic itiriraete, Imukorete akwesikec."
Jeremiah14:4 Kanuka alup nuecilicilas, Naarai emamei akiru naetepi akwap, Irumito ikakoriok ileje, Imukorete akwesikec."
Jeremiah14:5 Eebo, ewurie amori kais, ejali ikokuke, Naarai emameete inya."
Jeremiah14:6 Ebwoete itukoi kokuiu neelapat, Iyenanakinos adumunia ekwam kwape ikuwei; Ewariwarete akonyekec, Naarai emameete ikui."
Jeremiah14:7 “Karaida kitejenikinete numam adolitekosi aluikin sio, Kiswama ijo kanuka ekonikiror, wu EJAKAIT: Naarai ipu akosibononoreta kau; Kidiaka isio kama ijai,"
Jeremiah14:8 Wu jo amun naka Isirael, Eketaiaranike kapak naka ican, Kanukinyo ti kiraunia kwape loiboiororor kakwap, Ido kwape ekaloton loepaari aidareun akwap aiwalar?"
Jeremiah14:9 Kanukinyo ti kiraunia kwape etuŋanan loeumokinit, Kwape lokirigi lomam epedori aitajar? Konye jo, wu EJAKAIT, ijai kidinikosi, Kimaikinitai ekonikiror; Sirikijal sio.”"
Jeremiah14:10 Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT ituŋa lu ebe, “Kwape kwaŋin aminas airim: Mam kitikokinito akejekee: Ŋes mam EJAKAIT ecamakinia kes; Iitunit kwana numam adolitekec, Iticani aronisiokee.”"
Jeremiah14:11 Kabala EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, “Sirikilipak ituŋa lu ainakinio aiokis."
Jeremiah14:12 Arai ikanyete eteŋei, mam apupuni aimonyokee; arai da einakinete ainakineta nuieweio ka ainakineta nuka akiria, mam acamuni kes: konye apiari kes kekilen, ka eteŋei, ka atular da.”"
Jeremiah14:13 Kasodi eoŋ ebe, “Wu okwe, EJAKAIT Edeke, koany, elimonokinete inabin kes ebe, ‘Mam ianyunete ekileŋ, mam da iiaunete ketenei; konye ainakini yes ainapakin naieasit kaibois kana.’’’"
Jeremiah14:14 Kosodi EJAKAIT atemar eoŋ atiar, “Edwareteinabin nukainal kokirorika; mam eoŋ ejukarit kes, mam abu keeorak kes, karaida einer kakes: kidwarakinete yes aitapoer nakainal, ka aidwar naatai, ka aimod naka itauonokee bonik."
Jeremiah14:15 Kanuka nun ebala kwanata EJAKAIT nuka inabin luedwarete kokirorika, komam eoŋ ejukarit kes, konye ebalasi ebe, ‘Mam ejaunos ekileŋ ka eteŋei kakwap kana’, ebe: Epiari ekileŋ ka eteŋei inabin ŋul."
Jeremiah14:16 Ituŋa da luedwarakinete kesi irenearitai korotin luka Yerusalem kanuka eteŋei ka ekileŋ: emamikinete luidaete kes, kes ka aŋorokec ka idwekec lusap ka lupesur. Naarai abukokini kes aronisikec."
Jeremiah14:17 “Ilimokini ijo kes akirot na ebe: Koleleata akiyo kakonyeka, Kuare kapaaran da, komam esanere; Naarai apaki akoku nabekot naka ikatuŋa arorwa naepol, Amusuŋut naerono noi."
Jeremiah14:18 Arai alomari ais, Koany, luearar kekilen! Arai alomari ore, Aso koany, luedekasi eteneil Naarai irimorete enabi ka esasedoti kere akwap, Komamei kes aijen.”"
Jeremiah14:19 Iŋer teni ijo eut Yuda? Ala cut ekonitau Sion? Kanukinyo kidanyere sio, Komamei sio aŋaleun? Kipou kamunos ainapakin, Konye mam ajokis ebuno; Kimunos apak naka aŋaleun, ido koany aburun!"
Jeremiah14:20 Wu EJAKAIT, kilimori aronisikosi, Ka numam adolit da nuka lukapapaakosi: Naarai kipou kadiakasi kama ijai."
Jeremiah14:21 Sirikiitapian, kanuka ekonikiror; Sirikitisil eicoloŋ loka aibusesukon: Kiitu, sirikibil aitutuketekon kasio,"
Jeremiah14:22 Ejaas kereka kotoma aamameak nuka ikapirin nuepedorete ayaun akiru? Epedori cabo akuj ayaun elimilim? Mere jo ŋopeŋol, wu EJAKAIT Edekekosi? Ŋes kidaria jo; Naarai isubi ijo iboro ŋul kere."
Jeremiah15:1 Kosodi EJAKAIT atemar eoŋ Itiar,, Karaida kebwoata Musa ka Samuel kakonyeneka, timam ekatau epodo ituŋa lu. Kirenea kes kakonyeneka, kolomasi!"
Jeremiah15:2 Kosodi kanen arai kiremarete jo atiar, ‘Ai bo kilomaria?’ Ŋes konyet ilimokinia kes ebe, ‘Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Lukatular neejai atular; Lukekilen, neejai ekileŋ; Luketenei neejai eteŋei: Ido luijoreorio neejai aijoreorio,’”"
Jeremiah15:3 “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Aseikini kes iponesio iwonon: ekileŋ aaria, iŋokwo apoopoia, akweny nuka apak ka itiŋŋ luka akwap aipinyaria ka amudiaria."
Jeremiah15:4 Ainakini kes aisiarakinio toma ajakanuto kere nuka akwap, kanuka Manase okoku loka Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda, kanueswamat ŋesi koYerusalem."
Jeremiah15:5 “Naarai iŋai kitimi jo, wu Yerusalem? Iŋai gwai kikuudiani jo? Iŋai gwai epauni aiŋitun akonikiro?"
Jeremiah15:6 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Iner eoŋ, Ibononori kau: Ŋes arioria akakan asurokin jo, ka amudiar; Kapas eoŋ akiitunun."
Jeremiah15:7 Epukupuk kes kaipukupuket korutei luka akwap; Alema idwekec, amudia ikatuŋa; Mam apotu kobonut korotinikee."
Jeremiah15:8 Etupuu apuserunukec aitelekarit asine naka anolclin: Ayau mamakee ekamudiaran paaran asurokin nukatoto nuka ikatumunak: Etodoikin kes katipet aditar ka nuketasuro.
Jeremiah15:9 Akalanyanar ŋin naawurit ikanykaarei; Apal aijarake; Aloma akolonoke eriŋa erai paaran; Isurumio ileic itirirai. Ido ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ejaikini aatonotokec okileŋ kakonyen nuka lukasurupokec.”"
Jeremiah15:10 Wu okwe totoka, jo awuruun eoŋ, arai etuŋanan loka aŋolopa ka edinet kakwap kere! Mam abu kayu tetere emedauni, ido mam ituŋa apotu kayuut tetere imedaete: konye kekenete kesi kere,"
Jeremiah15:11 Kobala EJAKAIT ebe, Abeit ketogogoni jo kanuka ajokis; abeit ainakini lokasurup aiŋaiŋa jo kapak naka aronis, kapak da naka aitieanitoi."
Jeremiah15:12 Epedori kereka ituŋanan aibil asuat, asuat naebuni kagolitomei, ka aisinit?"
Jeremiah15:13 “Ainakini ikoniboro, ka abarakon anatario komamei etiai, kanuka aronisiokon kere, koikorunokon kere."
Jeremiah15:14 Kainakini yes aiiaanakin lukasurupokus kakwap namam ijenete: naarai inepunit akim kakanyunyura, nakieweikini yes.”"
Jeremiah15:15 Wu EJAKAIT ijeni ijo; Kiitunoi, koanyanarai, Kinyanakinai kama ejaas ikareitokoka; Sirikiiyana eoŋ kotoma atitinukon: Kojen ebe kamoromoroi eoŋ kanukon."
Jeremiah15:16 Aponi kodumunai akirokon, kanyam kes; Keraas akirokon kamaka ailel ka aiyalama naka etauka; Naarai kamaikinitai ekirorikon, Wu EJAKAIT Edeke loka ajoresio."
Jeremiah15:17 Mam abu keboi katukot naka nul kaluiyalamasi, Mam abu kalel: Abu keboi bon kanuka akanikon; Naarai ibu kilelebik eoŋ akadakin."
Jeremiah15:18 Kanukinyo mam akariebo esania, Akamusunut da mam enaleunlo, Naenerit aimukeo? Iraun ijo kamakaŋ kwape aguurut naegalai, Kwape akipi nueonikinito?"
Jeremiah15:19 Kanuka ŋun ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Arai ibonuni, kasodi eoŋ ainyakun jo, Tetere ibwoi kakonyeneka. Arai da ilemuni nuka akais nuipu kotoma nuutai, Iraun do kwape akaituk. Eboŋunete kesi mamakon, Konye mam jo ibonori mamakec."
Jeremiah15:20 Ketaraun jo arwatat naebwaitai naka aisinit Mama ejaas ituŋa lu; Ŋiikinos kaio, konye mam kipikorete; Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ajaenena kajo aitaiar jo, Ido ayuun joo"
Jeremiah15:21 Kayuuni jo kakan naka ikaronok, Kalakuni da kakan naka luketasuro.”"
Jeremiah16:1 Ido kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Jeremiah16:2 “Sirikimany aberu, kwabo mam iwurikini idwe lusap ka lupesur aibois na."
Jeremiah16:3 Naarai ebala kwanata EJAKAIT nuka idwe lusap ka lupesur lukeurikinio aibois na, ido nuka nukatotokec nukeuriete kes, ido nuka lukapapakec lukeurikinete kes kakwap kana ebe:"
Jeremiah16:4 etwakete kanuka adekesia nueroko. Emamuunete luekuudianete kes, karaida aida kes; eraunos kwape aoret kakwap. Ekileŋ ka eteŋei kes epiarete kes; eraunos atesinakec inyamat luka akweny nuka apak, ka itian da luka akwap."
Jeremiah16:5 “Naarai ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Sirikiloma togo neibworotor, mam ilosi akuudian, karaida aimony kes: naarai ebala EJAKAJT ebe, Alema eoŋ akainapakin koruna kalu, alema da akasianut-nakamin ka aitim."
Jeremiah16:6 Etwakikinete lukapolok ka ludidik akwap na: mam idaio, ido mam ituŋa ekuudianete kes, karaida ager, ido mam ebarenete akwesikec kanukec."
Jeremiah16:7 Mam ituŋa einarete kes atap ibworosi, aipudun kes kanuka lukatwak; ido mam ituŋa einakinete kes adere naka aitalakaar amasia kanuka papakec arai kanuka totokee."
Jeremiah16:8 Ido sirikiloma togo loenyamiata epucit, aiboikin kakes, ainyam ka aimat."
Jeremiah16:9 Naarai ebala kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Koany, etanaŋi kaibois kana, kakonyenekus, ido kotoma apaarasiakus, eporoto loka aitac, ka eporoto da loka aiyalama, eporoto loka eteran ka eporoto da loka ateran."
Jeremiah16:10 “Kosodi kanen nailimokinia ituŋa lu akiro nu kere, kes da etemarete atiar, ‘Kanukinyo kinerakinia EJAKAIT aronis na kere naerono aluikin sio? Anyoika bo numam adolitekosi? Anyoin bo aronis nakidiaka kama ejai EJAKAIT Ewokodeke?’"
Jeremiah16:11 Kosodi ijo atemar kes atiar: ‘Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Apotu lukapapaakus kajalata eoŋ, kotupata idekesio ice, kijaanakis kes, komaata kes, kaialata eoŋ, komam ericito ikakisila."
Jeremiah16:12 Iswamata yesi da nukaronok adepar lukapapaakus; naarai koany ituparete yesi ŋinituŋanan aninik naka eketau loerono, ineroto apupun eog."
Jeremiah16:13 Kanuka nun kereneari yes kakwap kana alomar akwap namam lem iienete, yes ka lukapapaakus da; kaŋina da ipote aiiaanakin idekesio ice paaran ka kuare da; naarai mam ketodikini yes asianut nepetai da.’"
Jeremiah16:14 “Kanuka ŋun, koany, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mam bobo ebakai ebe, ‘Kwape eiaria EJAKAIT lokitolomuni idwe luka Isirael kakwap nako Misiri’;"
Jeremiah16:15 konye ebe, ‘Kwape eiaria EJAKAIT lokitolomuni idwe luka Isirael kakwap naka agolitomei, ido kakwapin kere kama erenearit.’ Naarai enyakuni kes akwapukee naabu kainak lukapapaakee."
Jeremiah16:16 “Koany, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Anyarauni ikalokak luipu, ikamete kes; akaulo kanun anyarauni ikamejak luipu, emeiaete kes kanolironat, ido kanoliukot, ido kabuwan nuka atiidan."
Jeremiah16:17 Naarai esesenete akakonye irotinikec kere: mam enopito kakonyeneka, ido numam adolitekec mam imunonounos kakonyeka."
Jeremiah16:18 Ido esiauni ber atacakin irwan aarei numam adolitekec ka aronisikec, naarai etisiloto akwapuka katesin nuka ikeeeboro luketal, elelebata kesi airumeteka kitalesiakee.”"
Jeremiah16:19 Wu EJAKAIT, akagogoŋ, akabwas da, Neakerianari kapaaran naka ican, Epote atekerin mamakon anyoun kosaneta nuka akwap, Ebalasi ebe, “Mam lukapapaakosi irumito idiobore dimarai nukainal, Aamameak ka akiro numam imedaunete."
Jeremiah16:20 Esubuni kereka ituŋanan idekesio? Mam ŋul eraas idekesio!”
Jeremiah16:21 “Kanuka ŋun, koany, eteienikini kes, irwan na atipet etejenikini kes akanika ka apedorika; ejenunete kesi ebe ekakiror ŋes EJAKAIT.”"
Jeremiah17:1 “Iwadikatai aronis naka Yuda kakwara naka asuat; kaitesu naka ekukwai igirakinitai amor nuka itauonokee, ido amumwar nuka itemwanakec."
Jeremiah17:2 Kapak naiitunioto ikeeedwe itemwanakec ka Aserimikee, kama ejaas ikito luepesito, koukon da luiceleleete,"
Jeremiah17:3 koronan da luka ais. Ainakini ikoniboro ka abarakon kere anatario, aiboisiokon nuiceleleete kanuka aronis, anatar iikorunokon kere."
Jeremiah17:4 Ŋo da ipaluni kama ejai airumetekon naabu kainakinite jo; kainakini jo aijaanakin lukasurupokon kakwap namam ijeni: naarai esinepu akanyunyura akim naieweenenei ikar kere.”
Jeremiah17:5 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Kikenoi ituŋanan yenemunokina ituŋanan, Yenitaraun akuan akekan, Eketau da enyoununei kama ejai EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah17:6 Naarai eputokinos kekiot kamodiŋ, Mam eanyuni neeponiata nukaiokak. Iboikini aiboisio nuilariononos nuka ais, Akwap naka abalaŋ naemameete ituŋa."
Jeremiah17:7 “Isirerenitoi ituŋanan yenemunokina EJAKAIT, Ido EJAKAIT ŋes akemun."
Jeremiah17:8 Naarai eraun bala ekitoi loeraikinitai ariri naka akipi, Loisiliarit aliasioke ocor, Kwabo mam eyoni akoloŋ keca noi, Konye eribiribete akekui; Kwabo mam iyalononoi kokaru loka ekure, Kwabo mam inyeini aira araito.”"
