Jeremiah17:9 Iŋalana etau aitelekarit iboro kere, Ido epol akedek noi: Iŋai bo epedori ajenun ŋes?"
Jeremiah17:10 “Eoŋ EJAKAIT ererei etau, etemi da inereteny, Ainakini ninitunanan kwape ejaatar ikeponesio, Kwape ejaatar da araito nuka akeswamisio.”"
Jeremiah17:11 Kwape irukumia etakura abeei numam eurit, Ikoni nen yenetukonokin abar, kwabo mere kotoma abeit; Kokidin kapaarasiake etiakas kakes, Kawasiake da eraun iban."
Jeremiah17:12 Eicoloŋ lokaibuses loitopolooritai ameun kageunet, Ŋes aiboisiwok nakalaunan,"
Jeremiah17:13 Wu EJAKAIT, amun naka Isirael, Lukinyeinete ijo kere irumete rwaru ileic; Lukenyounete kere kaneijai iwadikao toma alup, Naarai enyeis EJAKAIT, Atan naka akipi nukajarak."
Jeremiah17:14 Kitanaleunoi, wu EJAKAIT, ido aŋaleuni; Kitajarai, ido etajaruun; Naarai ijo ekaituritono."
Jeremiah17:15 Koany, kabalas ebe, “Ai ca ejai akirot naka EJAKAIT? Kobu cabo!”"
Jeremiah17:16 Eoŋ da mam abu kesunyak ainyein araun ekecokon atupit jo; Mam abu kemiela apaaran naka epola; Iieni ijo; Nualomunete kaitukuka ajaenenas akonyenekon.
Jeremiah17:17 Sirikirau loketasuro kamaka: Ŋo neekerianarakan kapaaran naka aronis.
Jeremiah17:18 Kirumata ileic lukareito, Konye eoŋ kenyeis ileic airum; Koburut kes, Konye eoŋ kenyek aburun: Kitodolik kes apaaran naka aronis; Komudia kes kamudiar naka airucakin!"
Jeremiah17:19 Kabala EJAKAIT eoŋ kwanata ebe: “Kolot, kobwo korute loka idwe luka ituŋa, neelomununiata ikabakan luka Yuda neelomanariata da, korutei kere luka Yerusalem,"
Jeremiah17:20 Kolimok kes ebe: Kiirasi yesi akirot naka EJAKAIT, yes ikabakan luka Yuda, ka Yuda kere, ka luibojete kere koYerusalem, luelomununete korutei kalu."
Jeremiah17:21 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Kocoito bonik, siribwokenenete lubwokon kapaaran naka asabato, karaida aitolomun korutei luka Yerusalem."
Jeremiah17:22 Ido siribwokenenete lubwokon aitolomun kotogoikus kapaaran naka asabato, sirikiswamata adioswam kere: konye kitalaut apaaran nakasabato, kwape kecorakinitor lukapapaakus."
Jeremiah17:23 Konye mam kes apotu kiirasi, karaida aitoikin akiikec, konye kitininikata imurisiŋakec, kinyeis akiirar, kinyeis da aituutoorio."
Jeremiah17:24 “Kosodi kanen, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Arai idunyakinito akiiranar eoŋ, komam itolomununete lubwokon kere korutei luka ere kala kapaaran nakasabato, konye italaunete apaaran nakasabato, komam iswamaete adioswam kere kapaaran kaŋin,"
Jeremiah17:25 ŋes konyet elomununiata korutei luka ere kalo ikabakan ka ikapolok luiboikinos oicoloŋ loka Daudi, ibwanenito agalin ka ibalasin, kes ka ikapolokokec, ituŋa luka Yuda, ka luibojete da ko Yerusalem: ejaenena ere lo ikar kere."
Jeremiah17:26 Epote kesi koreria luka Yuda, kaiboisio da nuirimorito Yerusalem, kakwap naka Benyamin, kapuutona, koronan, ka Eŋalakimak da, eyaunete ainakineta nuieweio, ka asuban ka ainakineta nuka akiria, ka lukisupurununo, ido eyaunete asuban nuka aimal, togo loka EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah17:27 Konye arai kiŋeroto akiirar eoŋ komam italaunete apaaran nakasabato, ibwokete da lubwokon ilomunete korutei luka Yerusalem kapaaran nakasabato; kasodi eoŋ ainokokin akim koruteike, epiari da itogoi lukapolou luka Yerusalem, komam ituduneori.”"
Jeremiah18:1 Akirot naabu kobu mama ejai Yeremia kama ejai EJAKAIT, ebe:"
Jeremiah18:2 “Konyou, kijesar togo loka ekajean, kaŋina da kesiirari jo akakiro.”"
Jeremiah18:3 Kasodi eoŋ aijesar togo loka ekajean, ido koany, iswamai akeswam kokokoroke."
Jeremiah18:4 Ido naemunaunor amot naiswamai ŋesi kelupe kakan naka ekajean, kirueakini bobo aije amot ace, kwape itoiokitor ekajean aiie."
Jeremiah18:5 Kosodi kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Jeremiah18:6 “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Wu jo ekek loka Isirael, mam kereka apedori eoŋ aiswamakin yes kwape eswamaa ekaiean lo? Koany, kwape elupe kakan naka ekajean, ikoni ijo nen kakanika, ijo ekek loka Isirael."
Jeremiah18:7 Kapak kaŋin naenerar nuka ateker, ka nuka ajakanut, arutun ka abilibil ka amudiar da;"
Jeremiah18:8 arai ibelokin ateker nin, naabu kenerite nuke, ainyein aronisike, eitokini aronis naalosikinit aiswamakin kes."
Jeremiah18:9 Ido kapak kaŋin naenerar nuka ateker ka nuka ajakanut, aiduk ka aira ŋes;"
Jeremiah18:10 arai kiswama aronis kakonyeneka, komam erimari eporotoka, kasodi eoŋ aiitokin aiokis naabu kener aitoiok ŋes."
Jeremiah18:11 Aso do kolot, kolimok ituŋa luka Yuda, ka luibojete ko Yerusalem ebe: ‘Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT ebe: Koany, etemok aronis mama iiaas, eneru akirot asurokin yes. Kobonutu do yesi, ninitunanan korotoke lokaronon, kitojokata ikusirotin ka aswamisiokus da.’"
Jeremiah18:12 “Konye etemarete ebe, ‘Emamei amun: naarai kitupi akirokosi, kiswamai da ninitunanan kwape ejaar aninik naka eketau lokaronon.’"
Jeremiah18:13 “Kanuka ŋun ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Kinitiŋita yesi atekerin, Iŋai epupunit akiro nuikote nen? Eswama abekot naka Isirael akirot nasogim noi."
Jeremiah18:14 Epedori kereka akaka naka Lebanon aimijar katiida naka ais? Eonikinete kereka akip nuelilim nueleleunete kama elwana?
Jeremiah18:15 Naarai apotu ikatuŋa kemurwokis eoŋ, Apotu kisupurikis aamameak lukisupurununo; Kitiguikis kes korotinikec, kosokono lumoion, Atubitoi kokitui, nemam erot itutut,"
Jeremiah18:16 Aitaraun akwapukee aumokinet, Ka aijuar namam enaŋi. Eumokini ŋinituŋanan yenitori nen, Kimunimuni akouke."
Jeremiah18:17 Esiarisiari kes akonyen nuka lukasurup Kwape kekwam lokokide: Etodikini kes ekapur konye mere akakonyen, Kapaaran naka epolakee.”"
Jeremiah18:18 Kosodete kesi atemar ebe, “Kopotu, kenerutu akiro asurokin Yeremia; naarai mam ikisila eoliorete kaneejai esasedoti, karaida ainerun kama ejaas lukacoa, karaida akirot kaneejai enabi. Kopotu do, kenomata ŋes kaŋajep, kenyeis oni aibwaikin etau akiroke kere.”"
Jeremiah18:19 Kibwaikinai eoŋ etau, wu EJAKAIT, Kiira eporoto loka ŋul kaluketonolopete eoŋ."
Jeremiah18:20 Etacakinio kereka aronis itia ajokis? Naarai abokikis akaijar aipany. Kiitu kwape kabwoia kakonyenekon ainerakin kes ajokis, Aibelokin akoninyunyura kamakec."
Jeremiah18:21 Kanuka ŋun kijaik ikecedwe otenei, Kokorak kes apedor naka ekileŋ; Aŋorokec kotwakiasi ikecedwe, koraut da apuserun. Kotularos ikecekiliok, Kodany ekileŋ ikecekatumunak kojie."
Jeremiah18:22 Kopupunoi aimony kotogoikee, Naisituriaikinia kes erionerl Naarai abokata aipany alokia eoŋ, Ebwaata ataein aisipokia akakeje."
Jeremiah18:23 Konye wu EJAKAIT, iieni ijo ainerunikee kere aiar eoŋ. Sirikisioni numam adolitekec, Sirikimwata da aronisikec kakonyenekon. Konye kolatarai kes kakonyenekon; Kitepesen kes kapak naka anyunyurakon."
Jeremiah19:1 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Kolot, kogwel amot naka elupe naka ekaiean, koyana ice komakio luka ituŋa, ice da komakio luka isasedotin;"
Jeremiah19:2 koloma neejai aditot naka okoku loka Kinom, naejai eiduny neelomarere orute loka Atiboloka, kitatam kaŋina akiro nukalimokini jo,"
Jeremiah19:3 Kinera ebe, ‘Kopuputu yesi akirot naka EJAKAIT, yes ikabakan luka Yuda, ka luibojete koYerusalem. Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, Koany, ayauni aronis aibois na, naisideloori aki nuka ninitunanan yeniirari."
Jeremiah19:4 Naarai kajalata eoŋ, amunaut aibois na, kisupurununut lukisupurununo kotomake mama ejaas idekesio ice, lumam lem ejenete, kes ka lukapapaakec, ka ikabakan luka Yuda; kilelebata aibois na kaokot nuka lumam akirot."
Jeremiah19:5 Apotu kodukoto aiboisio nuiceleleete nuka Baal, aicweia ikeeedwe kakim araun ainakineta nuicweio nuka Baal: numam eoŋ kecorakinit, karaida einer, mam da aomisioitike alomarit otauka."
Jeremiah19:6 Kanuka ŋun koany, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Epote apaarasia numam bobo aibois na enyaritere Topet, karaida Aditot naka okoku loka Kinom, konye Aditot naka Earit."
Jeremiah19:7 Etapaluni ainerun naka Yuda ka Yerusalem kaibois kana; ebirokin eoŋ da kes kekilen kakonyen nuka lukasurupokee, kakan da naka ŋul kaluemootos aiiarakec, Ainakini atesinakee araun akiriŋ naka akweny nuka apak, ka itian da luka akwap."
Jeremiah19:8 Etarauni ere lo aumokinet, ka aijuar; eumokini ŋinitunanan yenitori nen, isuari kanuka aitieanitoike kere."
Jeremiah19:9 Ainakini kes konyama awat nuka idwekec lusap ka lupesur, ninituŋanan konyam akuan naka opaperoke, kirigaunitete, kicikakinitete, kanekicikakinete lukasurupokee, ka nul da luemootos akeeeijar.’"
Jeremiah19:10 “Kosodi ijo aibwan amot kakonyen nuka ituŋa kaluiuparos kajo,"
Jeremiah19:11 ilimokini kes ebe, ‘Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe: Abwani kwape kwaŋin ituŋa lu ka ere lo, kwape ebwania ituŋanan amot naka ekaiean, namam bobo epedorio aipueakin. Ido idaikinete ituŋa Topet, naarai emamikini aibois kamace,"
Jeremiah19:12 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Eswamakini kwape kwaŋin aibois na, ka luibojete kotoma, aituputoor ere lo kwape Topet,"
Jeremiah19:13 Ido itogoi luka Yerusalem, ka itogoi luka ikabakan luka Yuda, luamunaaros, eraunos kwape aibois naka Topet, itogoi kere luesupurununere lukisupurununo oswionokee mama ejai aiore kere naka akuj, kobukokis icedekesio ainakineta numatan,’”"
Jeremiah19:14 Kosodi do kobu Yeremia anyoun koTopet, kama kiiukarit EJAKAIT aidwar; kobwo ŋesi kalaro naka etogo loka EJAKAIT kotema ituŋa kere atiar:"
Jeremiah19:15 “Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, Koany, ayauni ore lo ka ireriake kere aronis kere naenerak ŋes; naarai apotu kitininikata imurisiŋakec, aneroto apupun akiroka.”"
Jeremiah20:1 Abu Pasur esasedoti, okoku loka Imer, loarai ekapolokiton lokapolon kotogo loka EJAKAIT, kopup Yeremia edwari akiro mm."
Jeremiah20:2 Kosodi Pasur aile Yeremia enabi, kibwaik ŋes oloit loejai orute lomukur loka Benyamin, loajai togo loka EJAKAIT,"
Jeremiah20:3 Kosodi kanen kapaaran naatupakini, kitolom Pasur Yeremia koloit. Kosodi Yeremia atemar ŋes atiar, “Mam EJAKAIT kimaikinit ekonikiror Pasur, konye Etasuro kowaitin kere."
Jeremiah20:4 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Koany, etaraun jo etasuro kamakon elopet, ido kama ejaas ipaperokon kere. Ibiroros kekilen loka lukasurupokec, eanyunete da akonyekon. Ainakini Yuda kere akan naka ekabaka loko Babulon; ijoreori kes Babulon, eari kes kekilen."
Jeremiah20:5 Bobo da, ainakini abar kere naka ere kalo, ka amedake kere, ka iboroke kere luka akais nuipu, eebo, abar kere naka ikabakan luka Yuda ainakini akan naka lukasurupokec, luenatarete kes, ikamunete kes, eyaŋaarete Babulon."
Jeremiah20:6 Kajo da, Pasur, ka luibojete kere kotogokon kiioreorio: idolokini Babulon; itwanikini ŋina, kidaikinio nina, ijo ka ipaperokon kere, luidwarak nukainal.”"
Jeremiah20:7 Wu EJAKAIT, ibu kijodijod eoŋ, kejodijodoor; Itelekari eoŋ kagogon, kipiko. Araun eoŋ akienis aitiwaria akwap; Kesekeli ŋinituŋanan."
Jeremiah20:8 Naarai napenerar, amonyi; Eworoi ebe, “Akaje ka aŋatar!” Naarai arau akirot naka EJAKAIT amorosit kamakaŋ, Ido akienis, aitiwaria akwap."
Jeremiah20:9 Arai katema atiar, “Mam alimit ŋes, Karaida einer bobo kokirorike,” Aso ejai otauka bala akim naenoki Naegolokinitoi akojoka, Eoŋ da kapas aitikokinit, kwabo mam apedori."
Jeremiah20:10 Naarai eira ainunua naka kaluipu. Etasuro kowaitin kere! Ebalasi ipapero lukodicika kere, Luidarito eoŋ aibiror ebe, “Koluikisi, sio da kiluikini ŋes! Elemuni ijodijodoor, Oni da kipikori, ido kinyani.”"
Jeremiah20:11 Konye ejai EJAKAIT keoŋ kwape ekajiot lokanosibib: Ŋes iguikinotor lukareito, Kwabo mam kepikorete. Isurumio noi ileje, naarai mam eswamatos nukacoa. Aitisiliokec namam edaun mam imurwokinio."
Jeremiah20:12 Konye, wu EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, loitemi ikadoliton, Aanyun inereteny ka etau, Kaany cani ainyanakon kamakec; Naarai kapukoki jo akakirot."
Jeremiah20:13 Koyeikis EJAKAIT; Kituroto EJAKAIT! Naarai ayuu aijar naka nin kayenilwaritoi Kakanin nuka ikeswamak nueroko.
Jeremiah20:14 Kikenoi apaaran nakawurunere! Apaaran nakawuria totoka kinyek aisirerenio!
Jeremiah20:15 Kikenoi etuŋanan loainuni papaka akiro ebe, “Kiwurikin ikoku yenitelepat,” Kisiyalamik ŋes noi."
Jeremiah20:16 Korau etuŋanan ŋol kwape ireria lukapolok Luatiyaiki EJAKAIT, komam itimi; Kiira aimony tupuruc, Ka elala kidin paaran;"
Jeremiah20:17 Naarai mam abu kaar ameun kakoik; Kwaŋin tikeraun totoka akailit, Akekoik da tikeraun naepol apaarasia kere."
Jeremiah20:18 Kanuka inyo kalomunia kakoik Adumun aitaaritoi ka iean, Amunaunos akapaarasia kanuka ileic?"
Jeremiah21:1 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naabu kobu mama ejai Yeremia, nakijukaria ekabaka Sedekia Pasur okoku loka Malikiya, ka Sepania okoku loka Maaseia esasedoti, mama ejai, ebe,"
Jeremiah21:2 “Kenaiŋair, kiŋitakinai EJAKAIT, naarai itemonokino Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon aitiji oni: motoko kiswamakini EJAKAIT kwape ejaatar akeswamisio kere nukaumokin, tetere itobonoori ŋes.”"
Jeremiah21:3 Kosodi Yeremia kolimok kes ebe, “Ilimokinete Sedekia kwanata ebe:"
Jeremiah21:4 ‘Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Koany, esinyakari lujiis luejaas akaninikus, luitijioto ekabaka loko Babulon, ka Ikaludean, lukirigaunito arwatatinikus; ido atukonokini kes kidin ore lo."
Jeremiah21:5 Ido eoŋ elopet ketiiie yes, kakan naerioro, ka akan da nakagogon, kanyunyura, ka adedeŋ, ka adwaris naeta ria."
Jeremiah21:6 Adanyi eoŋ da luibojete kore kalo, ituŋa ka itiaŋ da: etwakete atular naededen."
Jeremiah21:7 Ido ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Akaulo kaŋun, ejaikini Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda, ka ikekejaanakinak, ka ituŋa, ŋul luapianunos kore kalo kanuka atular, ka ekileŋ, ka eteŋei, akanin nuka Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon, ka akanin nuka lukasurupokec, ka akanin da nuka ŋul kaluemoete akeceiiar, Edanyi ŋesi kakwanis naka ekileŋ; mam ideuni kes, mam itimi, ido mam isionie.’"
Jeremiah21:8 “Ilimokini ituŋa lu ebe, ‘Inera kwanata EJAKAIT ebe: Koany, ebwaik kakonyenekus erot loka aijar, ka erot loka atwanare."
Jeremiah21:9 Yeniboikini ore lo, eari ekileŋ, ka eteŋei, ka atular; konye yenelomari, alunakin Ikaludean lukirigaunete, ebusi ŋipeŋin, akeijar da eraun anaruna."
Jeremiah21:10 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Asesen eoŋ ere lo kakonu kanaerono, konye mere kanaejok: ijaikinio akan naka ekabaka loko Babulon, Ŋes da icwei kakim.’"
Jeremiah21:11 “Ido nuka ekek loka ekabaka loka Yuda, kiner ebe, ‘Kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah21:12 Ŋo ekek loka Daudi! Ebala “EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Kodilok aitub akiro, Koyu inatara kakan naka ekareiton, Kinyek akadedeŋ alomar kwape akim, Kicwe komamei yenepedori aitudeŋ, Kanuka aronis naka aswamisiokus.”"
Jeremiah21:13 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Koany, kanyoikinit jo, Ŋo yeniboie kaditot, atiiba naka apuuton; Yes luibalasi ebe, ‘Iŋai ca ikokorun asurokin oni? Iŋai bo da elomuni aiboisiowok?’"
Jeremiah21:14 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ketieani yes kwape ejaatar araito nuka aswamisiokus: Enokokini akim amagoroke, Isidopori da kere luirimorito.”"
Jeremiah22:1 Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Kijesar togo loka ekabaka loka Yuda, kiner kaŋina akirot na,"
Jeremiah22:2 kolimok ebe, ‘Kiira akirot naka EJAKAIT, ijo ekabaka loka Yuda, loiboie koicolon loka Daudi, ijo ka ikonikejaanakinak ka ikonituŋa da luelomununete orutei lu,"
Jeremiah22:3 Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Kitodolenenete etube ka adolit, koyuutu inatara kakan naka ekareiton. Sirikireata, sirikiswamakis imoit, ka ikoki, ka apuserut, nukepali, sirikibukosi aokot numam akirot kaibois kana."
Jeremiah22:4 Naarai arai teni kiswamata akirot ŋin, kwaŋin elomuniata korutei luka etogo kalo ikabakan luibojete koicolon loka Daudi, ibwanenito agalin ka ibalasin, kes, ka ikecekejaanakinak, ka ikeceruna da."
Jeremiah22:5 Konye arai mam iirarete akiro ŋun, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Eyapoikin elopet ebe, esilior etogo lo."
Jeremiah22:6 Naarai inera kwanata EJAKAIT nuka ekek loka ekabaka loka Yuda ebe: “Isubit ijo bala Gilead kamakaŋ, Aidia naka Lebanon: Ateni ketuluori jo amodiŋ, Ka ireria luemameete ituŋa,"
Jeremiah22:7 Ido kesikapanakini ikamudiarak asurokin jo, Ŋolituŋanan ka lujiisike: Kijepakinete iresiakon luseuna, Kocakanakinete akim."
Jeremiah22:8 “Itorete da atekerin nuipu ore lo, etemanaros atiar, “Kanukinyo kiswamakinia EJAKAIT kwana ere lo loepol?”"
Jeremiah22:9 Kosodete aboŋokin ebe, “Naarai apotu kojalata aitutuket naka EJAKAIT Edekekec, komaata idekesio lumo, kijaanakis da.”"
Jeremiah22:10 Sirikimonya ikatwan, kwabo sirikikuudianata: Konye komonyata noi loipidipiditere; Naarai mam eboŋuni bobo, Karaida aanyun akwap nakobukec."
Jeremiah22:11 Naarai inera kwanata EJAKAIT nuka Salum okoku loka Yosia, ekabaka loka Yuda, loerumit aibois naka Yosia papake, loanyouni kaibois kana ebe:” Mam bobo eboŋuni nee."
Jeremiah22:12 Nabarai ŋipeŋina neijoreoritai ŋes etwanikini, kwabo mam bobo eanyuni akwap na.”"
Jeremiah22:13 “Itukwi ŋol loeduki eketogo kairod, Ka agolaike nukokuju kanumam ebeito; Loitubusiani ikeidunyet tai, Komam eropi ŋes:"
Jeremiah22:14 Loebala ebe, ‘Mere kaduk etogo loelal, Ka agolai nukokuju nuepolok’, Kosodi apedonokin adirisan; Kigalio eswi kakito nuka eres, Kinyonyo aiteren,"
Jeremiah22:15 Irumi bo, naarai ikoto aitelekar keres? Mam kereka papakon arai ekanyaman ka ekamatan, Ekatubon loitenara lokabeit? Kwaŋin koiau ejok."
Jeremiah22:16 Kotubenenei ŋesi akiro nuka lukican ka luilwaritos, Kwaŋin koiau ejok. Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mere kereka ŋin ŋes ajenun eoŋ?"
Jeremiah22:17 Konye akonikonye ka ekonitau mere kwaŋin, Dimarai aswam nukainobel, Ka abukor aokot numam akirot, Ka areit, ka akaie da.”"
Jeremiah22:18 Aso inera kwanata EJAKAIT nuka Yekoiakim okoku loka Yosia, ekabaka loka Yuda ebe: “Mam ekuudianete ŋes ebe, ‘Wu okwe onaceka!’ arai bo ‘Wu okwe inac!’ Mam ekuudianete ŋes ebe, ‘Wu okwe Ejakait!’ arai ‘Wu okwe aibusesuke!’"
Jeremiah22:19 Idaio kwape idaere asigiria, Kiriitete acakar kiŋa kirutei luka Yerusalem,”"
Jeremiah22:20 “Kodoka Lebanon, komony; Kikesea eporotokon koBasan: Komony kotoma Abarim; Naarai amudiaros ipaelonokon kere."
Jeremiah22:21 Abu kener kajo nakisikerianere; Konye ibu ijo kobala ebe, ‘Mam eirari.’ Ŋol ŋes eponekon ageun keiditeukon, Mam irimarit ekaporoto."
Jeremiah22:22 Edaki ekwam ikecokokokon kere, Ipaelonokon da ijoreorio: Kosodi ateni kirumete ileic, Itirirai kanuka aronisikon kere,"
Jeremiah22:23 Ŋo loiboie koLebanon, Loiduki kaikon oresia, Itukwi ijo nakibunokinia ariebo, Aikilianar kwape naka aberu naidounil”"
Jeremiah22:24 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Kwape ajaria, karaida kerai Konia okoku loka Yekoiakim, ekabaka loka Yuda, egilut lokapolou kakanika nakoteten, ti kautoo jo;"
Jeremiah22:25 ido ejaikini jo akan naka ŋul kaluemoete akoniiiar, akan da naka ŋul kaluiyoŋit, ŋes akan naka Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon, kakan da naka Ikaludean."
Jeremiah22:26 Kacakari eoŋ da jo, ka totokon nakiiwuriei, ape akwap ace namam kiwurikinitai; itwakikinete ŋina,"
Jeremiah22:27 Konye toma akwap naimielas ikecetauon aboŋun, mam eboŋunete cut.”"
Jeremiah22:28 Erai kereka ekesa ŋol Konia amot naemenitai naebwanan? Erai kereka ŋesi amot namam isiyalamikinitai? Kanukinyo ereŋearere, ŋes ka akeur, Acakar akwap namam ejenete?"
Jeremiah22:29 Wu jo, akwap, akwap, akwap, Kiira akirot naka EJAKAIT!"
Jeremiah22:30 Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Kiwadikata etuŋanan lo ebe loemameete idwe, Etuŋanan lomam isikerianio apaarasiake kere: Naarai emamei etuŋanan loka aurike loisikerianio, Aiboikin oicoloŋ loka Daudi, Karaida ayait bobo Yuda.”"
Jeremiah23:1 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Itukwi ikeeokok luemudiarete, luisiarakinete amerekekin nukoronyika!”"
Jeremiah23:2 Kanuka ŋun ŋes inerar kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, nuka ikeeokok luitanyamete ikatuŋa ebe:” Isiarisiarata yesi ekasipan, ireneata, komam ianyanarete kes; koany, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Edopei kamakus aronis naka aswamisiokus."
Jeremiah23:3 Atukonokini eoŋ da aatoŋot naka esipanika kotoma akwapin kere nukerenearit, enyakuni bobo auioikec; kes da ewuriaros iyatanakinos."
Jeremiah23:4 Adakakini eoŋ ikeeokok luitanyamete kes. Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ido mam eyoŋete bobo, karaida aiyaloŋoŋ, karaida idiopet kakesi aolior."
Jeremiah23:5 “Koany, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Eponito apaarasia, nuetilibikinia rwaru Daudi Atenu naedolit, ido kirumite kwape ekabaka, kokeriana, ido ipiori itubesia kabeit kotoma akwapin."
Jeremiah23:6 Eyuunio Yuda kotoma apaarasiake, Isirael da iboienenei kainapakina. Emaikinio rwaru ŋes ekiror lo ebe, ‘EJAKAIT ŋes adolitewok.’"
Jeremiah23:7 “Aso do koany, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ŋes eponitotor apaarasia numam bobo ebalananatar ebe, ‘Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT lokolo etolomuni idwe luka Isirael kakwap nako Misiri’;"
Jeremiah23:8 konye ebe, ‘Kwape eiaria EJAKAIT lokolo etolomuni kinarenik da aur naka ekek loka Isirael akwap naka ari naka agolitomei; ido anyoun kakwapin da kere nuabu kereŋeanarite kes.’ Kosodete aiboikin akwapukee obe.”"
Jeremiah23:9 Nuka inabin: Abila ekatau kotomaka, Ejanijaŋunos akakoio kere; Asub bala ekameran, Ido bala etuŋanan loeniaut ajon; Kanuka EJAKAIT, ido kanuka akekiro nukalaunak."
Jeremiah23:10 Naarai elelebun adoteu akwap; Naarai kanuka ekenit ibworo akwap; Aokoto ironyia luka amodiŋ, Erono ekecerot, Akecegogoŋ da mam ejok."
Jeremiah23:11 Naarai amunaunos enabi ka esasedoti; Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Eebo, adum aronisikec kiton togoka da."
Jeremiah23:12 Kanuka ŋun eraun ekecerot kamakec bala aiboisio nuerurut kamuton; Emeario, ibirokinos nen: Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ayauni aronis mamakec, Okaru loka aiticaniokec,"
Jeremiah23:13 Aany eoŋ da abaŋaanut naka inabin luko Samaria; Adwarata kama ejai Baal, Aitapaar ikatuŋa Isirael."
Jeremiah23:14 Konabin luka Yerusalem da aany akirot nasogim; Edoteete, kolosenenete kainal, Itogogonete akanin nuka ikeswamak aronis, Komamei yeninyeini aronisike: Esubito kes kere kamakaŋ bala Sodom, Ka luibojete kanen bala Gomora.”"
Jeremiah23:15 Kanuka ŋun ŋes inerar kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio nuka inabin ebe: “Koany, etanyami kes aliasit naeta ria, Etamasi da kes akipi nuka epiu: Naarai kotoma onabin luka Yerusalem Alom amunaar akwap kere.”"
Jeremiah23:16 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe:” Sirikiirasi akiro nuka inabin kaluedwarete; isisianakinete yes aamameak: inerasi nuepote kotauonokec, kwabo mere nuepote kaituk naka EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah23:17 Elimonokinete tiritir ŋul luemwanito akirot naka EJAKAIT ebe, ‘Ŋaunos ejok’; kolimonokinete ŋin yenelosi kaninik naka etauke ebe, ‘Mam aronis kidoikini jo.’"
Jeremiah23:18 Naarai iŋai kakesi kebwoi kaurianet naka EJAKAIT, Yenikeanyuni kiira da akekirot? Iŋai bo yenikecoit akekirot kiira?"
Jeremiah23:19 Koany, etapipirio loka EJAKAIT alomul Adedeŋ, eebo etapipirio loipiripiritoi: Edoikini akou naka ikaronon."
Jeremiah23:20 Mam eboŋuni anyunyura naka EJAKAIT: Aitodol neadaunia akeswam, Kiton aitodolikin nuelosikinit eketau, Apaarasia nukawasia iienunete jokan."
Jeremiah23:21 “Mam abu kejuka inabin lu, Konye apotu kesi kokerata: Mam abu kener kakes, Konye apotu kodwarata,"
Jeremiah23:22 Arai kesi kobwoito kaurianeteka, Tiisiirarito ikatuŋa akiroka, Tiisibelikinito kotoma orotinikec lueroko, Ka aswamisiokec da nueroko."
Jeremiah23:23 “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Arai kereka eoŋ Edeke lokodie, kwabo mam arai Edeke loelwana?."
Jeremiah23:24 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Epedori kereka ituŋanan aiŋop kotoma aiboisio nukaiyeiyea komam eoŋ apedori aanyun? Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mam tope eoŋ eleleba akui ka akwap?"
Jeremiah23:25 Eira nueneras inabin luedwarete nukainal kokirorika ebe, ‘Eruja, eruja!’"
Jeremiah23:26 Itodolete ai ŋun ajaut otauon luka inabin luedwarete nukainal; kiton inabin luedwarete aiŋal naka itauonokec?
Jeremiah23:27 Luelosikinito aisimurwokin ikatuŋa ekakiror kanuka airujasiakec nuelimonokini ŋinituŋanan ekeidunyet, kwape kimurwokiniata lukapapaakec ekakiror kanuka Baal."
Jeremiah23:28 Enabi loerujai, mere kolimok airujasit; ka ŋin da yenika akakirot, kinera akakirot teni. Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ikwaikinete ai agugu eriakakinos alos?"
Jeremiah23:29 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mere esubit akakirot akim? Ido bala anyul naebwanabwanal amor?"
Jeremiah23:30 Ebala EJ AKAIT ebe, Aso koany, asurokini inabin, luekokoanakinos akakiro,"
Jeremiah23:31 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Asurokini inabin, luitwasamaete aŋajepakec kobalas ebe, ‘Ebala EJAKAIT ebe’."
Jeremiah23:32 Koany, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, asurokini ŋul luedwarete airujasia nukainal, aitatamanakin, aitapaar ikatuŋa kanuka ainalakec, kanuka ailabilabanutukec naatai, kwabo mam eoŋ ejukarit kes, karaida aicorakin, Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, mam eyaunete adiojokis otuŋa lu."
Jeremiah23:33 “N akinisiata jo ituŋa lu, arai enabi, arai esasedoti kineras ebe, ‘Anyoin abwokon naka EJAKAIT?’ kosodi ijo ilimokini kes ebe, ‘Abwokon ani? Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kacakari yes.’"
Jeremiah23:34 Konye enabi ka esasedoti ka ituŋa luetemarete ebe, ‘Abwokon naka EJAKAIT,’ eticani eoŋ etuŋanan ŋol ka ekekal."
Jeremiah23:35 Itemanaros ŋinituŋanan kikeidunyet, ka ŋinituŋanan konaeeke atiar, ‘Biai bo abonoki EJAKAIT?’ ido ‘Biai bo atema EJAKAIT?’"
Jeremiah23:36 Mam bobo ilimunete nuka ‘abwokon naka EJAKAIT’: naarai abwokon ŋes akirot naka ŋinituŋanan ilopet; naarai itirioto akiro nuka Edeke lokajaran, nuka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edekewok."
Jeremiah23:37 Ilimokini kwanata enabi ebe, ‘Biai bo kibonok EJAKAIT? ‘ido’ Biai bo atema EJAKAIT?’"
Jeremiah23:38 Konye arai itemarete atiar, ‘Abwokon naka EJAKAIT’; kanuka ŋun ŋes inerar EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, ‘Naarai inerasi akirot na ebe, “Abwokon naka EJAKAIT”, ido kejukak yes ebe, “Siribalas, Abwokon naka EJAKAIT.”"
Jeremiah23:39 Aso do koany, abeit kekeuni yes, kacakari yes, ka ere da loabu kainak yes ka lukapapaakus, aolior kama ajai."
Jeremiah23:40 Ido kainuni yes amorosit namam edaun ka ileic lumam enaŋete, lumam imurwokinio.’’’"
Jeremiah24:1 Akaulo naka Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon aijoreor Yekonia okoku loka Yekoiakim, ekabaka loka Yuda, ka ikapolok luka Yuda, nepepe ka ikeswamak ka ikatatak, anyoun koYerusalem, ayaŋaar Babulon; abu EJAKAIT ketodik, ido koany, ibwaikinitai iditai iarei luka etini koinaren keyekalu loka EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah24:2 Edita ediopet ajai etini loaiok noi, kwape etini loegei akonore: edita lokiareit ajai etini loarono, lomam epedori anyamio, naarai arono noi."
Jeremiah24:3 Kalimok EJAKAIT eoŋ ebe, “Yeremia, iany inyo?” Katema atiar, “Etini; etini loejok, loejok jokan; ka ŋol da loerono, loerono jokan, lomam epedori anyamio, naarai erono noi.”"
Jeremiah24:4 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe,"
Jeremiah24:5 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Kwape eraar etini lo loejok, kwaŋin asesenia kanuka ajokis ijoreoriton luka Yuda, luabu kejuka kaibois kana alosit toma akwap naka Ikaludean."
Jeremiah24:6 Naarai ebwaikini akakonye mamakec kanuka ajokis, enyakuni bobo kiton akwap na. Eoŋ da aduki kes, kwabo mere aibiror; erai kes, kwabo mere arutor."
Jeremiah24:7 Ainakini kes etau lokajenun eoŋ, ebe Eoŋ EJAKAIT: kes da eraunos ikatuŋa, eoŋ da araun Ekecedeke: naarai eboŋunete mamakan kikecetauon kere."
Jeremiah24:8 “Ido kwape etini loerono, lomam epedori anyamio, naarai erono noi, abeit ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ekonakini kwaŋin Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda, ka ikapolokoke, ka luapianunos koYerusalem, luasalakinete akwap na, ka nul da luibojete kakwap nako Misiri."
Jeremiah24:9 Ejaikini kes aisiarisiario kanuka aronis toma ajakanuto kere nuka akwapin; araun amorosit, agaracio, ainyanakinio ka ekenit, kaiboisio kere nuereneari kes."
Jeremiah24:10 Eiukari da ekileŋ, ka eteŋei, ka atular, mamakec, aitodol naemudiarotor kakwap naainakinit kes ka lukapapaakec.”"
Jeremiah25:1 Akirot naabu kobu mama ejai Yeremia nuka ituŋa kere luka Yuda, kokaru lokiwononet loka Yekoiakim okoku loka Yosia, ekabaka loka Yuda: ekaru ŋol ŋes ekaru losodit loka Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon;"
Jeremiah25:2 naalimokini enabi Yeremia ituŋa kere luka Yuda, ka ŋul kere luibojete koYerusalem kobala ebe:"
Jeremiah25:3 “Ageun kokaru lokitomonet kauni loka Yosia okoku loka Amon, ekabaka loka Yuda, kiton lolo, ikar lu akaisaarei ka luuni, kobunenenei akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai, kenerenena kayes, adilonokini tupuruc einer, konye mam yes ipotu kopuput."
Jeremiah25:4 Ido abu EJAKAIT kiiukanakini yes ikekejaanakinak kere inabin, edilonokini tupuruc aijukunun; konye yes mam ipotu kopuput, karaida aitoikin akiikus akiirar."
Jeremiah25:5 Ebala ebe, ‘Kobonutu kinye ninitunanan ekerot loerono, ka aronis naka aswamisiokus, kiboikinos akwap nakiinakinit EJAKAIT yes ka lukapapaakus, ageun apeŋo aitodol ikar kere;"
Jeremiah25:6 ido siritupanarete idekesio ice aijaanakin ka aima kes, sirikitunyunyuranakis eoŋ kaswamisio nuka akaninikus. Eoŋ da mam keswamakini yes aronis.’"
Jeremiah25:7 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Konye mam ipotu kopuput eoŋ; kitunyunyurikis kaswamisio nuka akaninikus aiswamakin bonik aronis."
Jeremiah25:8 “Kanuka mm ŋes inerar kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe: Naarai mam ipotu kopuput akakiro,"
Jeremiah25:9 ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Koany, ejukari aomare ikekia kere luka ari naka agolitomei, ka Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon, ekakejaanakinan, kayau kes aitiji akwap na, ka ŋul da luibojete kotoma, ka atekerin nu kere nuirimorito; ido amudiari cut, ketuluo kes aumokinet, aimuaret, asilio da namam edaun."
Jeremiah25:10 Ido bobo, alemari kamakee eporoto lokaiyalama ka eporoto lokailel, eporoto loka eteran ka eporoto da loka ateran, aruo naka akaŋas, ka aica naka atala,"
Jeremiah25:11 Itisilio akwap na kere, eraun aumokinet; ijaanakinete da atekerin nu ekabaka loko Babulon ikar akaisakanykaarei."
Jeremiah25:12 Kosodi kanen, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kedaunos ikar akaisakanykaarei, kasodi eticani eoŋ ekabaka loko Babulon, ka ateker ŋin, ka akwap naka Ikaludean, kanuka numam adolitekec, ido etisili ikar kere."
Jeremiah25:13 Ido ayauni kakwap ŋin akakiro kere nuabu kenerite, kere nuewadikatai oitabo lo, loadwari Yeremia mama ejaas atekerin kere,"
Jeremiah25:14 Naarai atekerin nuipu ka ikabakan lukapolok itubusianete kes, eebo, kes da ba; atacakini kwape ejaatar aswamisiokec, ido kwape ejaar aswam naka akaninikee.”"
Jeremiah25:15 Naarai kaba la kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: “Kolem adere na naka ebino loka adedeŋ kakanika, kitamat atekerin kere nukeiukari joo"
Jeremiah25:16 Emasete, igetanaros, ikerepikinete kanuka ekileŋ loejukari mamakee.”"
Jeremiah25:17 Kasodi alemun adere kakan naka EJAKAIT, ketamat atekerin kere nukejukari EJAKAIT eoŋ:"
Jeremiah25:18 ebe Yerusalem ka ireria luka Yuda, ka ikabakanakec, ka ikapolokokec, aituluor asilio, aumokinet, aimuaret, ka ekenit; kwape ejaar lolo;"
Jeremiah25:19 Parao ekabaka loko Misiri ka ikekejaanakinak, ka ikapolokoke, ka iketuŋa kere;"
Jeremiah25:20 ka ituŋa kere luinyalinyala, ka ikabakan kere luka akwap naka Us, ka ikabakan kere luka akwap naka Ipilisitian (Asukelon, ka Gasa, ka Ekuron, ka luapianunos luka Asudod);"
Jeremiah25:21 Edom, ka Moab, ka idwe luka Amon;"
Jeremiah25:22 ka ikabakan kere luka Turo, ka ikabakan kere luka Sidon, ka ikabakan luka apujan naejai okekwa juwai aŋolol;"
Jeremiah25:23 Dedan ka Tema, ka Bus, ka ituŋa kere luebarenete arokio;"
Jeremiah25:24 ikabakan kere luka Arabia, ka ikabakan kere luka ituŋa luinyalinyala luibojete kamodiŋ;"
Jeremiah25:25 ikabakan kere luka Simiri, ka ikabakan kere luka Elam, ka ikabakan kere luka Imedin;"
Jeremiah25:26 ka ikabakan kere luka ari naka agolitomei, luelwaka ka lueapiete, ameanakin; ka ajakanuto kere nuka akwapin, nuejaas akwap. Akaulokee emasi do ekabaka loka Sesak."
Jeremiah25:27 “Ilimokini kes ebe, ‘Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Komata, komerikinos, koleka, kibironoros, mam bobo inyounete, kanuka ekileŋ loejukuni mamakus.’"
Jeremiah25:28 “Kosodi arai keneroto aiiaar adere kakanikon aimat, kosodi ilimokini kes ebe, ‘Inera EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kwanata ebe: Kibusakinit yes aimat!"
Jeremiah25:29 Naarai koany, ageuni eoŋ aswam aronis kore loemaikinitai ekakiror, yes da mam kiticanio? Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mam iswakete aitieanio: naarai anyarakini ekileŋ asurokin kere luibojete kakwap.’"
Jeremiah25:30 “Ŋo da kodwarak kes akiro nu kere, kolimok ebe: ‘Irurumai EJAKAIT kokuiu, Ikeseuni ekeporoto kaiboisike nakalaunan; Irurumakini auioke kagogon; Ereseikini kere luibojete kakwap, Bala ikepudapudak emusabibu."
Jeremiah25:31 Edoli eeelet kiton osaŋe loka akwap, Naarai epurete EJAKAIT katekerin; Etubokini luejaas awat kere, Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Apiari lukaronok kekilen.’"
Jeremiah25:32 “Tnera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe: Koany, elomuni aronis anyoun kateker kiton ateker, Itukutuni etapipirio loepol anyoun kosaneta luka akwap!"
Jeremiah25:33 “Ka nul da lueari EJAKAIT kapaaran kaŋin ikaikinos anyoun kosanc loka akwap kiton osaŋe eee loka akwap. Mam ekuudianio, karaida atukonokinio, karaida aidaio; eraunete aoret kakwap."
Jeremiah25:34 “Kibwololoto, yes ikecokok, komonyata; Kipunupunokinos kotoma okurwon, yes ikayaitok luka esipan: Naarai adolut cut apaarasia nuka aariokus, ka aisiarisiariokus, Yes da ibiroros bala ibore yenisiyalamikinitai."
Jeremiah25:35 Mam ikecokok edumunete erot lokereara, Karaida ikayaitok luka esipan neekuiata."
Jeremiah25:36 Eporoto loka aikalal naka ikeeokok. Ka aibwolol naka ikayaitok luka esipan! Naarai amunaa EJAKAIT ekecerony,"
Jeremiah25:37 Esiliŋiŋii aujoi nuinapakina Kanuka anyunyura naededen naka EJAKAIT.
Jeremiah25:38 Enyeki akenopis, kwape eŋatuny, Naarai araun akecekwap aumokinet Kanuka adedeŋ naka ekileŋ loereit, Ido kanuka anyunyurake naededen.”"
Jeremiah26:1 Kageunet naka airum naka Yekoiakim okoku loka Yosia, ekabaka loka Yuda, kobu akirot na kama ejai EJAKAIT, kinera atiar,"
Jeremiah26:2 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT atiar: Kobwo kalaro naka etogo loka EJAKAIT, kolimok ireria kere luka Yuda, luepote aima togo loka EJAKAIT, akiro kere nukecorakini jo alimokin kes; sirikimunon adiokirot,"
Jeremiah26:3 Diat iirarete, kibelokin ninitunanan ainyein ekerot loerono; kasodi keitu ainyein aronis, naalosikinit aiswamakin kes kanuka aronis naka aswamisiokec."
Jeremiah26:4 Ido kolimonokini kes atiar, ‘Inera kwanata EJAKAIT atiar: Arai mam kipupete eoŋ, alosenen kokisilaka, luebwaikinit kakonyenekus,"
Jeremiah26:5 apuponokini akiro nuka ikabulesin inabin, lukejukanakini yes, kadilonokini tupuruc sek aiiukunun, konye mam yes ipupununete;"
Jeremiah26:6 aso etuluori rwaru etogo lo aiput kwape Silo, ido etuluori ere lo araun ekenit kotoma atekerin kere nuka akwap.’”"
Jeremiah26:7 Apotu isasedotin ka inabin ka ituŋa kere da kiirasi Yeremia inera akiro ŋun kotogo loka EJAKAIT.
Jeremiah26:8 Kosodi kanen, kedau cut Yeremia einer akiro kere nukicorakinit EJAKAIT alimonokin ituŋa kere, kikamut ŋes isasedotin ka inabin ka ituŋa kere, kobalas ebe, “Abeit itwani ijo!"
Jeremiah26:9 Kanukinyo idwaria kokiror loka EJAKAIT, kinera atiar, ‘Eraun etogo lo kwape Silo, ka ere lo da eraun ameje, komamei ituŋanan yeniboie kotoma’?” Kotukonokinos ituŋa kere mama ejai Yeremia togo loka EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah26:10 Nakiirariata ikapolok luka Yuda mm, kodokasi enyounete kotogo loka ekabaka, kopotu togo loka EJAKAIT; kiboikinos neelomarere kokek lokitetet loka etogo loka EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah26:11 Kosodete isasedotin ka inabin kobalasi ikapolok ka ituŋa kere ebe, “Ibusakinit ekesa lo atwanare; naarai adwaraki ere lo kwape iirariata yesi da ikulepek kakusiki.”"
Jeremiah26:12 Kosodi kobala Yeremia ikapolok kere ka ituŋa kere ebe, “EJAKAIT ŋes kejukuni aidwar nuka etogo kala ka ere lo akiro kere nuiirasi yesi."
Jeremiah26:13 Aso do kitemonokis ikusirotin ka akusiswamisio, korimasi eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekusideke; aso iitokini EJAKAIT ainyein aronis nakinerakinit yes."
Jeremiah26:14 Konye eoŋ, koany ajai akanikus. Kiswamakinai nuejok ka nuebeito kakonyekus,"
Jeremiah26:15 Kojenutu kereka yes, arai kiiara eoŋ, kibeikinete yes aokot nuemameete aronis kore kalo, ka ŋul luibojete kotoma; naarai abeit EJAKAIT kejukunit mama iiaas einer akiro nu kere kakiikus.”"
Jeremiah26:16 Kosodete ikapolok ka ituŋa kere kobalas isasedotin ka inabin ebe:” Mam ibusakinit etuŋanan lo atwanare: naarai inerit kaoni kokiror loka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke.”
Jeremiah26:17 Kosodete konyout imakio ice luka akwap, kobalas atukot kere naka ituŋa ebe,"
Jeremiah26:18 “Abu Mikaia Emorasit kodwar kapaarasia nuka Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda; kinera kituna kere luka Yuda, kobala ebe: ‘Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio atiar, Iloboo rwaru Sion kwape kamana; Yerusalem da eluori aapoŋor, Emoru da loka etogo eraun kwape aiboisio nuiukekeete nuka amoni.’"
Jeremiah26:19 Kebu kereka Kesekia ekabaka loka Yuda, ka Yuda kere, kotamakis aiar? Mam abu koyon EJAKAIT, kinaina asianut naka EJAKAIT, kiitu EJAKAIT ainyein aronis nakinerakinit? Kwaŋin tikiidiaka oni ikulepek kotauonowok.”"
Jeremiah26:20 Ido da koiai etuŋanan loadwarit kokiror loka EJAKAIT, Uria okoku loka Semaia loka Kiriat-yearim. Abu ŋol da kodwarak ere lo ka akwap na kwape ejaatar akiro nun kere nuka Yeremia."
Jeremiah26:21 Nakiiraria ekabaka Yekoiakim ka iketuŋa lukirigin kere ka ikapolok kere akekiro, kokoto ekabaka aiar ŋes: konye kiira Uria, kokurianar, koker, kolot Misiri,"
Jeremiah26:22 Kijuka ekabaka Yekoiakim ituŋa Misiri, Elunasan okoku loka Akubor, ka icetuŋa nepepe kaŋes,"
Jeremiah26:23 koomai Uria koMisiri, koyaunai mama ejai ekabaka Yekoiakim koara ŋes kekilen, kocakak akekuan ailin nuka ituŋa kere."
Jeremiah26:24 Konye akan naka Akikam okoku loka Sapan kojai nepepe ka Yeremia, kinyeis ainakin akan naka ituŋa aiar ŋes."
Jeremiah27:1 Kageunet naka airum naka Sedekia okoku loka Yosia, ekabaka loka Yuda, kobu akirot na naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Yeremia."
Jeremiah27:2 Kabala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Kiswamau aunoi ka aiookon, koenik omurisinikon,"
Jeremiah27:3 Kijukak ace mama ejai ekabaka loka Edom, ka ekabaka loka Moab, ka ekabaka loka idwe luka Amon, ka ekabaka loka Turo, ka eka baka loka Sidon, kakanin nuka ikiyakia luepote Yerusalem mama ejai Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda."
Jeremiah27:4 Kitetemik kes akiro nu ainar ikapolokokec kobala ebe: Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Ilimokinete lukapolokokus kwanata ebe:"
Jeremiah27:5 Eoŋ abu kasub akwap, ka ituŋa, ka itiaŋ, lucjaas akwap, kapedorika naepol ka akanika naerioro; ainakini eoŋ nin yenetojokit."
Jeremiah27:6 Kwana da ainak akwapin nu kere akan naka Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon, ekakejaanakinan; ainak da itiaŋ luka ais aiiaanakin ŋes,"
Jeremiah27:7 Atekerin da kere ijaanakincte ŋes ka okokuke, ka orataitike, aitodol needolioto apaarasia nuka akekwap: kosodete itubusianete ŋes atekerin nuipu ka ikabakan lukapolok."
Jeremiah27:8 “Kosodi kanen, ateker arai ajakanut naeneri aijaanakin Nebukadaresar ŋol, ekabaka loko Babulon, ido luenerete aibwaikin imurisiŋakec aiookot naka ekabaka loko Babulon, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Etieani ateker ŋin, kekilen, ka eteŋei, ka atular, aitodol neesimudiaria ŋes kes."
Jeremiah27:9 Konye yes, sirikiirasi inabinokus, karaida ikaroakakus, karaida airujasiakus, karaida ikadwarakakus, karaida ikacudakakus, lukilimokinete ebe, ‘Mam ijaanakinete ekabaka loko Babulon.’"
Jeremiah27:10 Naarai kidwarakinete yes nukainal, ayaŋaar yes naelwana kakwapukus; kasodi eoŋ aireŋear yes, ido iwoliorete."
Jeremiah27:11 Konye ateker naibwaikini emurisinike ajookot naka ekabaka loko Babulon, kijaanak, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Enyeini ŋin aiboi kakwapukee: ido ekoriete iboikinos nen.”"
Jeremiah27:12 Kalimok Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda akiro nun kere kwape ajaatar, kabala ebe: “Kibwaikis imurisinakus aiookot naka ekabaka loko Babulon, kijaanakis ŋes ka iketuŋa, tetere iiarete."
Jeremiah27:13 Kanukinyo ikototor atwakare, ijo ka ikonituŋa, kanuka ekileŋ, ka eteŋei, ka atular, kwape ineritor EJAKAIT nuka ateker naeneri aijaanakin ekabaka loko Babulon?"
Jeremiah27:14 Kwabo sirikiirasi akiro nuka inabin luineras kayes ebe, ‘Mam ijaanakinete ekabaka loko Babulon.’ Naarai edwarete kesi nukainal."
Jeremiah27:15 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Naarai mam ejukununei kes, konye edwarete kokirorika aiŋal: tetere kereneari yes, ido iwoliorete yesi, ka inabin lukidwarakinete.”"
Jeremiah27:16 Ido da alimokin isascdotin ka ituŋa lu kere ebe, “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Sirikiirasi akiro nuka jnabinokus lukidwarakinete, ebalas ebe, ‘Koany, iboro lukorogo loka EJAKAIT eapiete bo bo ainyakunio koBabulon,’ naarai edwarete nukainal."
Jeremiah27:17 Sirikiirasi kes; kijaanakis ekabaka loko Babulon, tetere ijarete, Inyo bo ti keraunor ere lo asilio?"
Jeremiah27:18 Konye arai eraas inabin, ka akirot naka EJAKAIT da arai ejai kakes, kinainaata kito kesi EJAKAIT loka aioresio, kinyeis iboro luesalito kotogo loka EJAKAIT, kotogo da loka ekabaka loka Yuda, koYerusalem da ayanaario Babulon."
Jeremiah27:19 Naarai inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio nuka ipirin, ka nuka aŋolol, ka nuka aicegeria, ido nuka luapianunos luka iboro luesalito kore kalo,"
Jeremiah27:20 lumam iritonorit Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon, naej oreoria Yekonia okoku loka Yekoiakim ekabaka loka Yuda, alemar koYerusalem, koyanaa Babulon, ka ikapolok kere luka Yuda ka Yerusalem;"
Jeremiah27:21 eebo, inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Edeke loka Isirael, nuka iboro luapianunos kotogo Ioka EJAKAIT, kotogo da loka ekabaka loka Yuda, koYerusalem da ebe:"
Jeremiah27:22 Eyanaario Babulon, ido ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ejaenenas nina, aitodol apaaran naaanyanaria kes, Kasodi alemuni enyakuni bobo aibois na.”"
Jeremiah28:1 Kosodi kanen, kokaru kanope kanol, kageunet naka airum naka Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda, okaru lokiwononer, olap lokikanyet, abu Kanania okoku loka Asur, enabi, lokerai loka Gibeon kiner keoŋ kotogo loka EJAKAIT, koiaas isasedotin ka ituŋa da kere nepenen, kobala ebe,"
Jeremiah28:2 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Abi! eoŋ aiookot naka ekabaka loko Babulon,"
Jeremiah28:3 Eriŋa cut edauna ikar iarei enyakuni bobo toma aibois na iboro kere lukotogo loka EJAKAIT, luabu Nebukaderesar ekabaka loko Babulon kolema kaibois kana kosodi ayaŋaar Babulon,"
Jeremiah28:4 Ido ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Enyakuni bobo toma aibois na Yekonia okoku loka Yekoiakim, ekabaka laka Yuda, ka ikijoreoritono kere luka Yuda, lualosito Babulon: naarai abili ajookot naka ekabaka loko Babulon.”"
Jeremiah28:5 Kosodi enabi Yeremia alimokin enabi Kanania kojaas isasedotin, koiaas da iruŋa kere ebwoete kotogo loka EJAKAIT,"
Jeremiah28:6 Kinerenabi Yeremia ebe, “Kikote ncpenen! Kikonak EJAKAIT kwaŋin: kitodol EJAKAIT akiro nuid war, ainyakun bobo iboro lukotogo loka EJAKAIT, ka ŋul kere luejoreoritai, alemun koBabulon ayaun aibois na."
Jeremiah28:7 Konye ca kiira akirot na naenera kopupi ijo, kopupete da ituŋa kere ebe,"
Jeremiah28:8 Inabin lukageikinete eoŋ ido lukigeikinete ijo kolo, kedwarenenete ejie, ka aronis, ka atular nueponikinete akwapin nuipu, ka ajakanuto nuepolok."
Jeremiah28:9 Enabi loedwari nuka ainapakin, kedol akirot naka enabi kanol, ŋes konyet ejenunere ebe, abeit EJAKAIT ejukunit enabi ŋol.”"
Jeremiah28:10 Kosodi Kanania enabi, kolem akitoi komurisin loka enabi Yeremia, kobil."
Jeremiah28:11 Kiner Kanania koiaas ituŋa kere ebe, “Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Abili kwaŋin ajookot naka Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon komurisina luka atekerin kere eriŋa cut edauna ikar iarei.” Kosodi enabi Yeremia asuenyikin."
Jeremiah28:12 Kosodi kedau enabi Kanania aibil akitoi komurisin loka enabi Yeremia, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Yeremia kobala ebe:"
Jeremiah28:13 “Kolot, kolimok Kanania ebe, ‘Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Ibila ijo ajookot naka akito; konye iswamauni do aiookon nuka asua aiboisikec."
Jeremiah28:14 Naarai inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Ebwaik aiookot naka asua omurisina luka atekerin kanu kere, kijaanakis Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon; ido ijaanakinete: ainak da itian luka ais.’’’"
Jeremiah28:15 Kosodi enabi Yeremia kotema enabi Kanania atiar, “Kiira kito, Kanania; mam EJAKAIT kiyakienenet: konye iinak ituŋa lu amunokina aiŋal,"
Jeremiah28:16 Ŋes ebalar EJAKAIT ebe: ‘Koany, kereneari jo kakwap: itwani kokaru kalo, naarai iner nuka epali mama ejai EJAKAIT.’’’"
Jeremiah28:17 Kosodi kotwana enabi Kanania kokaru kanol kolap kalokikanyetekaarei.
Jeremiah29:1 Nu kes akiro nuka ebalua loabu enabi Yeremia kijuka ejai Yerusalem mama ejai aatoŋot naka imakio lueioreoro, ka isasedotin, ka inabin, ka ituŋa kere luejoreorit Nebukadaresar alemar koYerusalem ayaŋaar Babulon."
Jeremiah29:2 Kedau Yekonia ekabaka, ka toto naka ekabaka, ka ibwaein, ka ikapolok luka Yuda ka Yerusalem, ka ikeswamak, ka ikatatak, anyoun koYerusalem."
Jeremiah29:3 Kijuka ebalua kakan naka Elasa okoku loka Sapan, ka Gemaria okoku loka Kilikia, luabu Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda kijuka Babulon mama ejai Nebukadaresar ekabaka loka Babulon, ebe:"
Jeremiah29:4 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke Ioka Isirael mama ejaas luejoreoro kere, luainakin aijoreoreo anyoun koYerusalem ayaŋaar Babulon, ebe:"
Jeremiah29:5 Kodukoto itogoi, kiboienenete kanen; kiraata imanikoria, konyama araitokec."
Jeremiah29:6 Komanya aŋor, kowuriata idwe lutelepai ka lupesur; komanyanakis odwekus aŋor, kokorenenete apesurukus adukonokinio, kowurienenete idwe lutelepai ka lupesur; kilelebunos nina kwabo mam inonaros."
Jeremiah29:7 Kokototor ere lokesijoreorit ainapakin, kilipakis kama ejai EJAKAIT: naarai kanuka ainapakinike ŋes idumuniata yesi da ainapakinikus."
Jeremiah29:8 Naarai inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio. Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Kinyeis inabinokus, luejaas kayes, ka ikaroakakus aiŋal yes, kwabo sirikicamut airujasiakus nuirujaete."
Jeremiah29:9 Naarai kidwarakinete nukainal kokirorika: ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mam keyakienenei kes."
Jeremiah29:10 “Naarai ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Kedau Babulon aitodolikinio ikar akaisakanykaarei, kaanyanari yes, ka aitodolikin akakirot naejok mamakus, ainyakun yes bobo aibois na."
Jeremiah29:11 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ajeni eoŋ aomisio nuaomit kanukus, aomisio nuka ainapakin, kwabo mere nueroko, ainakin yes amunokina nuepote."
Jeremiah29:12 Iwoneete yesi da eoŋ, ilosete ailip eoŋ, ido eirari yes,"
Jeremiah29:13 Yes da kimoete eoŋ, kianyunete; arai kito kiimoata kikusitauon kere."
Jeremiah29:14 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kianyunete eoŋ; ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ebelokini eoŋ aiioreoriokus, katukonokini yes alemun kotoma atekerin kere, ka aiboisio da kere, nukerenearit, ido kenyakuni yes bobo toma aibois nakesiioreoria."
Jeremiah29:15 “Naarai inerata ebe, Kitonyoik EJAKAIT inabin kotoma Babulon."
Jeremiah29:16 Ŋes inerar kwanata EJAKAIT nuka ekabaka loiboie koicolon loka Daudi, ka nuka ituŋa kere lueiaas ore lo, iinacanakus lumam aupara kayes alioreorio:"
Jeremiah29:17 inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, Koany, eiukakini kes ekileŋ, ka eteŋei, ka atular, ido etuluori kes bala etini loebos, lomam epedori anyamio, naarai erono noi."
Jeremiah29:18 Ido arukitori kes kekilen, ka erenei, ka atular, ainakini kes aisiarisiario kotoma ajakanuto kere nuka akwap, araut ekenit, ka aumokinet, ka aimuario, ka amorosit, kotoma atekerin kere kama kereŋearit."
Jeremiah29:19 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Naarai mam apotu kiirasi akakiro, nueiukakinitor kes ikakejaanakinak inabin, adilonokini tupuruc aijukunun kes; ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Konye ipotu konero akiirar."
Jeremiah29:20 Aso do kiirasi yesi akirot naka EJAKAIT, yes kere ikijoreoritono, lukayanaari Babulon anyoun koYerusalem."
Jeremiah29:21 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Edeke loka Isirael nuka Akab okoku loka Kolaia, ido nuka Sedekia okoku loka Maaseia, lukidwarakinete yes aiŋal kokirorika, ebe: Koany, ainakini kes akan naka Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon: eari do ŋesi kes kakonyenekus."
Jeremiah29:22 Naarai kanukec ŋes ikenioto ikiioreoritono luka Yuda luejaas Babulon ebe, “Kituput EJAKAIT jo kwape Sedekia ka Akab, luabu ekabaka loko Babulon kitisis kakim.”"
Jeremiah29:23 Naarai kiswamata nukabanaanut kotoma Isirael, ido kiteeloete aŋor nuka iidunyetakec, ido kineras kokirorika akiro nukainal, numam ecorakinit kes. Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Eoŋ lo loajeni, ido arai ekaienan.”"
Jeremiah29:24 Nuka Semaia Enekelamit ilimokini ebe:
Jeremiah29:25 “Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Naarai ijuka ibaluan kokirorikon mama ejaas ituŋa kere luejaas Yerusalem, ka neejai Sepania okoku loka Maaseia esasedoti, ido neeiaas isasedotin kere ebe,"
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Kituluo EJAKAIT esasedoti aibois naka Yekoiada esasedoti, koraut ijaka kotogo loka EJAKAIT kanuka ŋinitunanan yenikikerep, ka yenituluor enabi, kibwaik roma oloit ka akito nueridakinete emurisin."
Jeremiah29:27 Aso do kanukinyo mam itoronia Yeremia loka Anatot, loituluoro elopet bon enabi kamakus?"
Jeremiah29:28 Naarai ejuku mamakosi Babulon ebala ebe, “Erai aijoreoriokus naka apak naepol: asa do kodukoto itogoi, kiboienenete kanen; kiraata imanikoria, konyama araitokec.”’”"
Jeremiah29:29 Kosodi Sepania esasedoti kosiom ebalua ŋol kopup enabi Yeremia.
Jeremiah29:30 Kosodi kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Yeremia ebe,"
Jeremiah29:31 “Kijukak nul kere ikijoreoritono kobala ebe, “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT nuka Semaia Enekelamit ebe: Naarai kidwarak Semaia, kwabo mam eoŋ ejukunit, kiinak yes amunokina aiŋal;"
Jeremiah29:32 ŋes inerar EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Koany, eti cani Semaia Enekelamit, ka akeur; ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Emamuun ituŋananike yeniboikin otuŋa lu, ido mam ŋes eanyuni ajokis naeswamakini ikaruna: naarai ener nukepali mama ejai EJAKAIT.’’’"
Jeremiah30:1 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naabu kobu mama ejai Yeremia ebe:
Jeremiah30:2 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Kiwadik akiro kere nuka pukokini toma oitabo,"
Jeremiah30:3 Naarai koany, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Epote apaarasia, nuenyakunia aijoreorio naka ikatuŋa Isirael ka Yuda. Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Etobonuni kes akwap nakolo ainakini lukapapaakec, ido irumete.”"
Jeremiah30:4 Nu kes akiro nuabu EJAKAIT kiner nuka Isirael ka nuka Yuda da:
Jeremiah30:5 “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Kiira oni eporoto loka amaran, Loka aiyoŋ, kwabo mere loka ainapakin."
Jeremiah30:6 Kiŋitata cani, koanyut, Epedori kereka ekiliokit aidoun? Kanukinyo do aanyunia ŋollikiliokit itinit aŋabet, Bala aberu nairieba aidoun? Kanukinyo elocokinor ejese loka akonyen kere?"
Jeremiah30:7 Wu okwe! Naarai epol apaaran ŋin, mam naeputotor: Ŋes apak naanyunia Yakob ican; Konye itajario kamakec,"
Jeremiah30:8 “Kosodi kanen ebala EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe, Kapaaran kaŋin, abili akeiookot komurisinikon, ido anedenedei lukiyenitere; mam bobo imo itubusianete."
Jeremiah30:9 Konye ijaanakinete kesi EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, ka Daudi ekabakakec, loetonyoikini."
Jeremiah30:10 “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Aso sirikiyoŋ, ijo Yakob ekejaanakinanika; Ido sirikiyaloŋoŋ, ijo Isirael; Naarai koany, ketajari jo kama elwana, Ka akoniwur da kakwap naka aiioreoriokec; Eboŋuni Yakob, iyamakin do inapakin, Emameun da yenitukuriani."
Jeremiah30:11 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ajai eoŋ nepepe kajo, aitajar jo: Naarai adauni eut atekerin kere nukesiarakinit, Konye jo mam kadauni cut; Konye kaleconori jo motimot, Kwabo mam kenyeini eut komam ketieanenenei."
Jeremiah30:12 “Naarai inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Mam ariebokon eŋaleuni, Eiliili amusunutukon."
Jeremiah30:13 Emamei yenikipurokini, tetere kimadio; Emamei jo ekia loitanaleuni."
Jeremiah30:14 Kimurwokis ipaelonokon kere; mam kimoete; Naarai kecum jo amusuŋut naka lokasurup, Kaiticanet naka loibworit; Kanuka aipues naka numam adolitekon, Naarai eyatakina aronisiokon."
Jeremiah30:15 Imonyi inyo kanuka ariebokon? Mam icanikon edaunos; Kanuka aipues naka numam adolitekon, Naarai eyatakina aronisiokon, Ŋes kainakin keswamakini ŋun,"
Jeremiah30:16 Kanuka ŋun ejwenyario ŋul kere lukijwenyarete jo: Ŋoreorio da lukasurupokon kere, ŋinidiopet kakesi; Ŋul da Iukiŋasete, eraunete iŋatuna, Ŋul da kere Iukimejaete akorakini araut imejasit."
Jeremiah30:17 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Naarai kenyakakini jo aijar, Ido ctanaleuni akonimusuŋun; Naarai kinyarito yenerenearitai, ebe: ‘Ŋes Sion, yenimam epodoi.’"
Jeremiah30:18 “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Koany, enyakuni bobo aijoreorio naka iweman luka Yakob, Etimi itogoike; Edukio bobo ere amejeke, Esali ere loka ekabaka kwape eiaar ekepone."
Jeremiah30:19 Kanen elomuni aimal ka eporoto loka nul kaluikekemosi; Esupui kes, kwabo mam ikidiokoros; Ido etopoloori kes, Kwabo mam itidisiario,"
Jeremiah30:20 Ejaunete ikecedwe kwape kolo sek, Itieasio ekecekodet kamaka, Etieani kere lucreito kes."
Jeremiah30:21 Eseunete lokapolonikec katekerikec, Elomuni ekayaitonikec kotomakec; Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Esukunyikini ŋes, ŋes da kekunyakini: Naarai iŋai tope etitinikini eketau aikunyakin eoŋ?"
Jeremiah30:22 Iraunos ikatuŋa, Eoŋ da araun Ekusideke.”"
Jeremiah30:23 Koany, alomu etapipirio loka EJAKAIT, Ŋes adedenuke, etapipirio loipiripiritoi: Edoikini akou naka ikaronon,"
Jeremiah30:24 Mam eboŋuni anyunyura naka EJAKAIT, Aitodol naedaunia akeswam, Kiton aitodolikin nuelosikinit etauke. Apaarasia nukawasia ijenunete jokan."
Jeremiah31:1 “Inera EJAKAIT ebe, Kapaarasia kanun, araun Edeke loka ikekia kere luka Isirael, kes da eraunete ikatuŋa.”"
Jeremiah31:2 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT ebe: “Ituŋa luedeunos kokilen adumut asianut kamodiŋ; Naalosio aisiyenuun Isirael.
Jeremiah31:3 Abu EJAKAIT ketakanikin kolosek, ebe, Eebo, kekilakina jo kamin namam edauri; Ŋes keriunia jo kasianut-nakamin."
Jeremiah31:4 Kaduki jo bobo, jo da kidukio, Ŋo abekot naka Isirael: Kisirio bobo kaisinin, Ilomari da toma okosio loka ŋul kaluibwalito."
Jeremiah31:5 Iraikini bobo imanikoria luka emusabibu koronan luka Samaria; Iraete ikeraak, konyama araitoke."
Jeremiah31:6 Naarai edoluni apaaran, naiworooto ikedarak koukon luka Epuraim ebe, “Konyoutu, kadokasi Sion neejai EJAKAIT Edekewok.’’’"
Jeremiah31:7 Naarai inera kwanata EJAKAIT ebe: “Koyooto kaiyalama kanuka Yakob, Koboorianata kanuka nakapolon naka atekerin; Kolimosi, kituroto, kinerasi atiar, ‘Etajar EJAKAIT iketuŋa, aatoŋot naka Isirael.’"
Jeremiah31:8 Koany, alemuni kes kotoma akwap nakari naka agolitomei, Atukokini kes anyoun kawaitin nuka akwap, Nepepe kanul da imuduki ka inwalas, Aberu naepotiei, Nepepe kaŋin da naerieb aidoun: Eboŋunete ne, erioŋet loepol."
Jeremiah31:9 Epote emonyete, ido eŋarenikini kes kemaimaite; Etolosi kes kariri nuka aguuruto nuka akipi, Korot Ioitenara lomam iguikinotor: Naarai arai eoŋ papa mama ejai Isirael, Epuraim da ŋes ekiyaika."
Jeremiah31:10 “Kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT, yes atekerin, Kolimokis apuiana nuelwaka; Kineras atiar, ‘ŋol loesiarari Isirael, ŋes erukonokini, Kidari, kwape idaria ekecokon esipanike.’"
Jeremiah31:11 Naarai alaku EJAKAIT Yakob, Ayuu alemun kakan naka ŋol kaloetelekarit kagogon,"
Jeremiah31:12 Aso epote koyooto kaidi naka Sion, Ido ikomaunos neejai ajokis naka EJAKAIT, Neejaas akima, ka aion, ka akinyet, Ka ikaalei ka itak da lukosipan; Eraun etaukee da kwape emanikor loieoeoo akipi; Kwabo mam bobo itururuete eut."
Jeremiah31:13 Kosodete iyalamikinos abekon kotoma okosio, Itelepai ka imakio da nepepe: Naarai etuluori akuudianakee aiyalama, Ido etalakari kes, kesiyalamik da kinyeis aiturur."
Jeremiah31:14 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Esititirikini da etau loka isasedotin kasiepai, Ikatuŋa da imonikinos ajokisika.”"
Jeremiah31:15 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT ebe: “Eirar eporoto koRama, Akuudian, ka aibworo naepol, Emonyi Rakel ikedwe; Egirit aitalakario kanuka idweke, Naarai emameete.”"
Jeremiah31:16 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT ebe: “Kisililiŋ ekoniporoto kinye aibworo, Akonikonyen da komameut akiyo. Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Idumuni ainakinet kanuka akoniswam; Ido eboŋunete bobo anyoun kakwap naka lokasurup."
Jeremiah31:17 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe: Ejai amuno awasiakon, Eboŋunete da bobo ikonidwe bukee."
Jeremiah31:18 Abeit eira Epuraim emonyi ebe, “Kilecoo, kaleeorio, Kwape itaok yenimam enaikinit aiookot: Kibelokinoi, eoŋ da ebelokin, Naarai irai ijo EJAKAIT Ekadeke."
Jeremiah31:19 Abeit naadaunia aisibelokinio, kesila; Ido kadau aisisianakinio, kebap akamurwo: Apotu keruma ileic, eebo, abu ketirir, Naarai abu kadaku amorosit naka eiditeuka.’"
Jeremiah31:20 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe: Erai kereka Epuraim ikakoku yeniminat? Erai ŋesi ikoku yenikesiyalamikinit? Naarai napenerakinia aronis, Ariŋa eitununei ŋes. Aso epod etauka ŋes; Abeit etimenenei."
Jeremiah31:21 “Kosipok aanyuneta nuka erot, Kiswamau ipirin luitejenunete, Kibwaik ekonitau neejai erot lokapolon, Ŋes erot loilomaria: Kobonu, wu abekot naka Isirael, Kobonu bobo oreriakon lu."
Jeremiah31:22 Itodoli bo ai airim, Wu jo akoku naiboŋonori kau? Naarai esubit EJAKAIT akirot nakitetet kotoma akwap, Igalikinit aberu ekiliokit.”"
Jeremiah31:23 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael atiar: “Ejauni rwaru bobo einer lo kakwap naka Yuda koreriake da, naenyakunia kaijoreoriokec atiar: “Kisireren EJAKAIT, ijo aibois naiboio abeit, Ŋo eronat loka alaunit.’"
Jeremiah31:24 Ido iboikin Yuda nen nepepe ka ikereria kere; ikakoriok, ka nul da luirimete kisipaninikec."
Jeremiah31:25 Naarai esimonik etau loepasit, esileleb da ŋolitau loitururwei.”"
Jeremiah31:26 Kasodi konyet akwenyun, kaany; kajiiimikis akajo."
Jeremiah31:27 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Koany, epote apaarasia, nuayeikinia ekek loka Isirael ka ekek loka Yuda ekinyomit loka etuŋanan ka ekinyomit Ioka etiaŋ."
Jeremiah31:28 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kosodi kanen ejaun kwape kolo keteononoo kes arutun ka abilibil ka aibiror ka amudiar ka aitican; kwape kwaŋin eteenenei kes aiduk ka aira."
Jeremiah31:29 Kapaarasia kaŋun mam bobo ineras atiar, ‘Anyama lukapapa imusabibun luedwarak, Ido aliokos ikel luka idwe.’"
Jeremiah31:30 Konye etwani ŋinitunanan kanuka akeronis ilopet; ŋinituŋanan yenenyami imusabibun luedwarak, eliokos ikekel."
Jeremiah31:31 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Koany, epote apaarasia, nuetutukio aitutuket nakitetet kekek loka Isirael ka ekek loka Yuda,"
Jeremiah31:32 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mere kwape ejaar aitutuket nakolo etutuki ka lukapapaakec kapaaran naketinia kakan aitonyoun kakwap nako Misiri: apotu kobilata aitutuket ŋin karaida abu karai lokowaikec."
Jeremiah31:33 Konye ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Na ŋes aitutuket naetutuki rwaru kekek loka Isirael, akaulo kapaarasia kanun: epikakini rwaru ikakisila atutubetakec nukotoma, ewadikakini da otauonokec; eoŋ da araun Ekecedeke, kes da eraunos ikatuŋa,"
Jeremiah31:34 Kwabo mam bobo isisianakinos ŋinituŋanan ikeidunyet, ka ŋinituŋanan onaceke, kobalas ebe,, Kojen EJAKAIT:’ naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kajenunete rwaru kere, ameun ka yenididi aitodol yenikapolon kakesi, naarai etimi kes numam adolitekec, ido mam bobo eituni akecediakar.”"
Jeremiah31:35 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Loeinakini akoloŋ acaenen paaran, Ka aicorakineta nuka elap ka aacer acaenen kuare, Loigurokin aŋolol, kirurumata akekailan: EJAKAIT loka aioresio ŋes ekekiror, ebe:"
Jeremiah31:36 “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Arai kenyout aicorakineta nun kakonyeneka, Aso esaŋi aur naka Isirael da, Komam erai ateker kakonyeneka ikar kere.”"
Jeremiah31:37 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT atiar: “Arai epedor akuj naejai kokuiu aitemio, Ido arai epedorete apeteta nuka akwap amoio kokwap, Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Aso acakari eoŋ da aur kere naka Isirael Kanuka ŋun kere nukiswamaete.”"
Jeremiah31:38 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Koany, epote apaarasia, nuedukokinere EJAKAIT ere lo ageun kotogo loeoja loka Kananel aitodol orute loka Agor."
Jeremiah31:39 Iriario auno nakitemis idererei kiton moru Gareb, iriamari da kiton Goa."
Jeremiah31:40 Aditot kere da naka awat nuka lukatwak, ka ekurwon, ka imanikoria kere kiton aguurut Kiduron, kiton agor naka erute loka Ibalasin kokide, eraun nakalaunan kama ejai EJAKAIT. Mam erutorio, karaida amunaar bobo ikar kere.”"
Jeremiah32:1 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naabu kobu mama ejai Yeremia kokaru lokitomonet loka Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda, ŋes ekaru lokitomonet kakanykauni loka Nebukadaresar,"
Jeremiah32:2 Kapak kaŋin abu aiore naka ekabaka loko Babulon kirigau Yerusalem: koenitete enabi Yeremia kalaro naka ikedarak, naajai togo loka ekabaka loka Yuda,"
Jeremiah32:3 Naarai Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda, ŋes aenit, kobala ebe, “Kanukinyo kidwaria, kinera ebe: ‘Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Koany, ainakini ere lo akan naka ekabaka loko Babulon, ŋes da irumi:"
Jeremiah32:4 mam ekui Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda kakan naka Ikaludean, konye abeit einakinio akan naka ekabaka loko Babulon, ineras kaŋes kaituke, eanyunete akekonyen akonyen nuka ŋol."
Jeremiah32:5 Ido eyaŋaari Sedekia Babulon. Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Iboie kaŋina aitodol naaanyanaria: karaida kijioto ka Ikaludean mam kisirereŋio’?”"
Jeremiah32:6 Kotema Yeremia atiar, “Abu kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe,"
Jeremiah32:7 Koany, ebuni Kanamel okoku loka Salum mamaikon mama ijai ebala ebe, ‘Kogwel emanikorika loejai Anatot: naarai kibeit ijo apedor naka alakun.’"
Jeremiah32:8 Kosodi do Kanamel okoku loka mamaika kobu mama ajai alaro naka ikedarak, kwape keiaar akirot naka EJAKAIT, kobala ebe, ‘Keŋainait, kogwel emanikorika loejai Anatot, loejai akwap naka Benyamin; naarai airum nakon, ka alakun da nakon; kogwel ijo bon.’ Kasodi eoŋ ajenun ebe nin ŋes akirot naka EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah32:9 Kagwel emanikor lokejai Anatot kama ejai Kanamel okoku loka mamaika, ketemok apesan, isekelin itomon kakanykaarei luka epuesa."
Jeremiah32:10 Kewadika akiro, kepueak, keworou ikajenak, ketemok ŋes epuesa kaitemis."
Jeremiah32:11 Kalema aiwadikaet naepucakinitai naka egwelet, ya nakibwaikinitai aipucet, kwape kejaar ekisil ka epone, ka ace da naepukoro:"
Jeremiah32:12 keiaik aiwadikaet naka egwelet Baruk okoku loka Neria, okoku loka Maseia, koseseni Kanamel okoku loka mamaika, kosesenete da ikaienak luewadikaete aiwadikaet naka egwelet, kakonyen nuka Iyudayan kere luibojete kalaro naka ikedarak."
Jeremiah32:13 Keeorak Baruk kakonyenekee, kabala ebe,"
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Kolema aiwadikaeta nu, aiwadikaet na naka egwelet naepueakinitai, ka aiwadikaet na naepukoro, kibwaik amot nakelupe; tetere edaunete apak naepol."
Jeremiah32:15 Naarai inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Egwelio bobo itogoi ka imanikoria luka emusabibu kakwap kana.’"
Jeremiah32:16 “Ido kadau aijaikin Baruk okoku loka Neria aiwadikaet naka egwelet, abu kelip EJAKAIT ebe:"
Jeremiah32:17 ‘Wu okwe EJAKAIT Edeke! Koany, ijo kisubi akuj ka akwap kapedorikon naepol, ka akanikon naerioro, emamei adiokirot nakikaruni jo:"
Jeremiah32:18 loitimenenei ilukumin luka ituŋa, itacakini atorobusio nuka idwekec luetupakinete numam adolito nuka lukapapakec: Edeke lokapolon, lokapedor, EJ AKAIT loka ajoresio ŋes ekekiror;"
Jeremiah32:19 Ekapetan lokapolon, lokapedor aswam: esesenete akekonyen irotin kere luka ituŋa; ainakin ninitunanan kwape ejaatar irotinike, ido kwape ejaatar araito nuka aswamisioke;"
Jeremiah32:20 loibu kibwaik aanyuneta ka nukaumokin toma akwap nako Misiri, kiton lolo, kotoma Isirael ka ituŋa da; kodumunia ekiror kwape lolo."
Jeremiah32:21 Kitolom ikonituŋa Isirael kotoma akwap nako Misiri, kaanyuneta ka nukaumokin, kakan nakagogoŋ, kakan da naerioro, ketasuro loepol;"
Jeremiah32:22 koinak akwap na, nakiyapoikinit lukapapaakec ainakin, akwap naeleleete akile ka esik."
Jeremiah32:23 Kolomut kirumata; konye mam apotu korimasi ekoniporoto, karaida alosenen kokisilakon; mam eswamaete adiokirot kotoma kanun kanuieorakinit kes aswam; ŋes ainakini iyauni aronis na kere mamakec."
Jeremiah32:24 Koany, adolut itutio ore airum; ainakin ere akan naka Ikaludean luitijiete, kanuka ekileŋ, ka eteŋei, ka atular da; adolo nuibu kiner; ido koany, iany."
Jeremiah32:25 Ido wu EJAKAIT Edeke, ibu kolimok eoŋ ebe, “Kogwelu amana kapesan, konyarau ikajenak”: kwabo ere da ainakin akan naka Ikaludean.’’’"
Jeremiah32:26 Kosodi kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Yeremia ebe:
Jeremiah32:27 “Koany, arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, Edeke loka lueiaas awat kere: ejai kereka adiokirot nakekaruni?"
Jeremiah32:28 Ŋes ainakin EJAKAIT inera kwanata ebe: Koany, eiaikini ere lo akan naka Ikaludean, akan da naka Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon, ido irumi ŋes."
Jeremiah32:29 Ikaludean da, Iuitijiete ere lo, epote inokokinete ere lo, icweikinete, ka itogoi da lukisupurionokiniata Baal lukisupurununo kokujukec, kobukonokinete icedekesio ainakineta numatan, aitunyunyurikin eoŋ."
Jeremiah32:30 Naarai apotu idwe luka Isirael, ka idwe luka Yuda kiswamata nueroko bon kakonyeneka, ameun keiditeukec. Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mam apotu idwe luka Isirael kiswamata idiobore kakaninikee eut dimarai yenikaitunyunyurikin eoŋ,"
Jeremiah32:31 Naarai ketunyunyuranakini ere lo ka aisideden ameuni kapaaran naadukere kiton lolo; ŋes do acakaria kakonyeneka,"
Jeremiah32:32 Kanuka aronis kere naeswamaete idwe luka Isirael ka idwe luka Yuda aitunyunyurikin eoŋ, kes ka ikabakanakec, ka ikapolokokec, ka isasedotinikec, ka inabinokec, ka ituŋa luka Yuda, ka luibojete da kotoma Yerusalem."
Jeremiah32:33 Kebelokis asebot kwabo mere akonyen; ido karaida kesisianakinit kes, adilonokin tupuruc aisisianakin, konye mam kiirara karaida aeamun aisisianakinio."
Jeremiah32:34 Konye ebwaikis italesiakec toma togo loenyaritai ekakiror, amunaasi da."
Jeremiah32:35 Adukoto aiboisio nuiceleleete nuka Baal, nuejaas aditot naka okoku loka Kinom, aitotor ikecesap ka akecepesur akim mama ejai Molek; numam ecorakinit, mam da aomisioitike alomarit otauka aswam nuketale ŋun: aisidiakar Yuda."
Jeremiah32:36 “Aso do inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael nuka ere lo loineras yesi ebe, ‘Einakinitai akan naka eka baka loko Babulon kanuka ekileŋ, ka eteŋei, ka atular da,’ ebe:"
Jeremiah32:37 Koany, atukonokini kes aitonyoun kakwapin kere nukereŋearit kanu ka anyunyuraka ka akadedeŋ, ka adwaris naeta ria; ido enyakuni kes bobo aibois na, kesiboik inapakina."
Jeremiah32:38 Eraunos kesi ikatuŋa, eoŋ da araun Ekecedeke."
Jeremiah32:39 Ainakini etau ediopet ka erot ediopet, kayonenenete eoŋ apaarasia kere; tetere ejaunete ejok, kes ka ikeeedwe da Iuetupanakinete,"
Jeremiah32:40 Ido etutuki kakes aitutuket namam edaun, komam ebelokini ainyein aiswamanakin kes ajokis, ebwaikin ayoŋit eoŋ otauonokec, kenyeis aijal."
Jeremiah32:41 Eebo, esiyalamikini aiswamanakin nuejok, ido abeit, eraikini kes akwap na kekatau kere, ka akaijar kere."
Jeremiah32:42 “Naarai ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Kwape ayaunia aronis na kere naepol otuŋa lu, kwape kwaŋin ainunia kes ajokis kere naesumunit."
Jeremiah32:43 Egwelio imanikoria kakwap kana, nainerasi yesi ebe, Esil, emamei etuŋanan karaida etiaŋ; einakinitai akan naka Ikaludean."
Jeremiah32:44 Egwelete ituŋa imanikoria kanuka apesan, iwadikaete aiwadikaeta, ipucete kes aipueeta, enyaraunete ikajenak, kakwap naka Benyamin, kotoma aiboisio nuidunyas Yerusalem, ka oreria da luka Yuda, kotoma oreria luka akwap nakiukon, kotoma oreria luka apuutona, koreria da luka Eŋalakimak; naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Etobonuni aijoreoriokec.”"
Jeremiah33:1 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT irwan nakiareit mama ejai Yeremia, eroko eenitai kalaro naka ikedarak ebe:"
Jeremiah33:2 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loiswamai, EJAKAIT lokesubi aiticat, EJAKAIT ŋes ekekiror, ebe:"
Jeremiah33:3 Konyarai, eoŋ da kabonokini, kapukok nukapolok, ka nuetioko, numam iieni."
Jeremiah33:4 Naarai inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, nuka itogoi lukore kalo, ido nuka itogoi luka ikabakan luka Yuda, luaponi kotiyanakinai adukio aigalioret aitikokinia itutio, ka ekileŋ, ebe:"
Jeremiah33:5 Elomunete Ikaludean ejie, ka aileleb kes kawat nukatwak nuka ituŋa, luadanyi kakanyunyura ka akadedeŋ, naarai ebwa akakonyen kore kalo kanuka aronisikec kere."
Jeremiah33:6 Koany, ainuni aiiar ka aitanaleunio, eoŋ da etaŋaleuni kes; ido apukokini ainapakin ka abeit nuepolok noi teni."
Jeremiah33:7 Enyakuni aijoreorio naka Yuda, ka aijoreorio naka Isirael, aduki, kwape sek."
Jeremiah33:8 Ido elotari numam adolitekec kere, nukediakanariata kama ajai; esioniei numam adolitekec kere, nukediakanariata kama ajai, nukepaariata kama ajai."
Jeremiah33:9 Ere lo da eraun kama ajai ekiror loka ailel, loka aiturit, loka aibuses da, kakonyen nuka atekerin kere nuka akwap, nuiirarete ajokis kere naeswamak, koyona, komaranata kanuka ajokis kere, ka ainapakin kere nuadumakini ŋes,"
Jeremiah33:10 “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Toma aibois na nainerasi yesi ebe, ‘Eswap, emamei etuŋanan karaida etiaŋ,’ koreria luka Yuda, korotin da luka Yerusalem luesilok, emamei etuŋanan, emamei yeniboie kotoma, emamei da etiaŋ,"
Jeremiah33:11 iirario bobo eporoto loka ailel ka eporoto loka aiyalama, eporoto loka eteran, ka eporoto da loka ateran, eporoto loka nul luinerasi ebe, ‘Kimalata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Naarai ejok EJAKAIT, Naarai ejaenena akeitim ikar kere’; ido eporoto loka nul Iueyaunete asuban nuka aimal toma togo loka EJAKAIT, Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, enyakuni bobo aijoreorio naka akwap kwape sek,"
Jeremiah33:12 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe: Toma aibois na, naeswap, naemamei etuŋanan, karaida etiaŋ, koreriakee kere, ejaun bobo aibois naka ikecokok luituwuriakete ikecesipanin."
Jeremiah33:13 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Itorete bobo isipanin akanin nuka ŋol loimari kes, koreria luka akwap nakiukon, koreria luka akwap naka apuutona, koreria luka Eŋalakimak, kakwap naka Benyamin ka aiboisio nuidunyasi kaYerusalem, koreria da luka Yuda."
Jeremiah33:14 “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Koany, epote apaarasia nuetodolikinio akirot nin naejok naabu kener nuka ekek loka Isirael, ido nuka ekek loka Yuda."
Jeremiah33:15 Kapaarasia kanun, kapak kaŋin, etilibikini Daudi Atenut naka adolit; ido itodoli ŋol nuketube ka nukadolit kakwap."
Jeremiah33:16 Kapaarasia kanun itajario Yuda, Yerusalem da iboie inapakina; lo da ŋes ekiror loemaikinio ebe, ‘EJAKAIT ŋes akosidolit.’"
Jeremiah33:17 “Naarai inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Mam emamikini Daudi ekiliokit loiboikin oicoloŋ loka ekek loka Isirael ikar kere.
Jeremiah33:18 Ido mam emamikini isasedotin Ilebin ekiliokit kakonyeneka loeinanakini ainakineta nuicweio, aicwe ainakineta nuka akiria, ka ainanakin asuban tir.”"
Jeremiah33:19 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Yeremia, kobala ebe:"
Jeremiah33:20 “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Arai ipedorete aibil akaitutuket naka apaaran, ka akaitutuket naka akuare, kinye ajaun apaaran ka akuare kapakikec;"
Jeremiah33:21 asa epedori akaitutuket abilio nakolo kitutuki ka Daudi ekakejaanakinan, kinye ajaun kikoku yenirumi koicoloŋoke; ka akaitutuket da nakitutuki ka Ilebin isasedotin, ikakejaanakinak."
Jeremiah33:22 Kwape ajore naka akuj mam epedori aimario, asine da naka aŋolol aitemio; kwape kwaŋin etanyanyaa aur naka Daudi ekakejaanakinan, ka Ilebin lukejaanakinete.”"
Jeremiah33:23 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Yeremia kobala ebe:
Jeremiah33:24 “Mam kereka iwomoomoi nuenerata ituŋa lu ebe, ‘Aeaka EJAKAIT ikekia iarei luaseunit’? Amenata kwaŋin ikatuŋa, kinyeis bobo araun ateker kakonyenekec,"
Jeremiah33:25 Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Arai mam icasit kakaitutuker naka apaaran ka akuare, arai da mam ebwaikinit aicorakineta nuka akuj ka akwap,"
Jeremiah33:26 aso acakari aur naka Yakob, ka naka Daudi ekakejaanakinan, kenye ayaŋaar kaurike airum aur naka Aburaam ka Isaak, ka Yakob da; naarai enyakuni bobo aijoreoriokee, ido etimi kes.”"
Jeremiah34:1 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naabu kobu mama ejai Yeremia, nakejiotor Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon, ka aioreke kere, ka ajakanuto kere nuka akwap nuayait ŋesi, ka ituŋa kere, aitiji Yerusalem, ka ireriake kere, kobala ebe:"
Jeremiah34:2 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Kolot, kinera ka Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda, kolimok ebe, ‘Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Koany, ainakini ere lo akan naka ekabaka loko Eabulon, ŋes da icweikini kakim."
Jeremiah34:3 Mam ikui ijo kakanike, konye abeit kikamario, kiinakinio akanike; eanyunete akonikonyen akonyen nuka ekabaka loko Eabulon, ŋes da inerakinos kaio kaituke, ido ilosi Babulon.’"
Jeremiah34:4 Konye ca kiira akirot naka EJAKAIT, ijo Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda. Inera EJAKAIT kwanata kanukon ebe: ‘Mam kiari ekileŋ."
Jeremiah34:5 Itwani kainapakin. Ido kwape kisupuronokiniata lukapapaakon, ikabakan lulem kigeikinete jo, kwape kwaŋin kisupuronokiniata joo Ekuudianete kesi jo, kobalasi ebe, “Wu okwe ekosijakait!” Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, eoŋ ener akirot nin.”"
Jeremiah34:6 Kosodi enabi Yeremia alimokin Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda akiro ŋun kere kotoma Yerusalem.
Jeremiah34:7 Kojiosi ajore naka ekabaka loko Babulon ka Yerusalem, ka ireria kere luka Yuda luapianuna, Lakis ka Aseka; naarai ŋul bon asalito koreria luka Yuda lukebwaitai."
Jeremiah34:8 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naabu kobu mama ejai Yeremia, kodaunite ekabaka Sedekia aitutuk aitutuket kituna kere luajaas Yerusalem, alimor aosikinio kamakec."
Jeremiah34:9 Ŋinitunanan aosikin ekebulesit, ka ninitunanan aosikin akebulesit, arai erai Eburaniat, arai Aburaniat; kinye ajaut yeriitubusiani Eyudayat, onaceke,"
Jeremiah34:10 Kosodete ikapolok kere ka iruna kere arimar, nul luetutukito aitutuket, ninirunanan aosikin ekebulesit, ka ŋinituŋanan aosikin akebulesit, kinyeis aitubusianio bobo; korimasi, koosikis,"
Jeremiah34:11 Konye kokau kibelokinos, kinyakutu ibulesin ka abulesin luaosikinito, koyaata kitubulesenoto bobo ibulesin ka abulesin."
Jeremiah34:12 Ŋes abunio akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Yeremia naebuni kama ejai EJAKAIT, kobala ebe:"
Jeremiah34:13 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Abu ketutuk aitutuket ka iukapapaakus kapaaran naetolomunia kes kakwap nako Misiri, kotogo loka ebulesene, kabala ebe,"
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Ketuboros ikar ikanykaarei ewosianakini ŋinituŋanan onaceke loBuraniat, lokitwegelitai, lokiiaanak ikar ikanykape, iwosianakini ŋes anyoun kamakon.’ Konye mam apotu lukapapaakus keirasi, kwabo mam apotu ketoikis akeceki,"
Jeremiah34:15 Yesi da koloje pae ipotu kibelokinos, kiswamata nuejok kakonyeneka, ilimorete aosikinio ŋinituŋanan aupake; ido ipotu kitutukis aitutuket kotoma togo loenyaritai ekakiror."
Jeremiah34:16 Konye kibelokinos, kisimoromoroto ekakiror, kinyakutu ŋinituŋanan ekebulesit ka ninirunanan akebulesit, luipotu koosikinito kwape ekototor; kitubulesenoto bobo, araut kamakus ibulesin ka abulesin,"
Jeremiah34:17 Ŋes enerar EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Mam ipotu kiirasi eoŋ, alimor aosianakin, ŋinituŋanan onaceke, ka nininnjanan aupake, Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Koany, alimori aosianakin kama ejai ekileŋ, ka atular, ka eteŋei; ido kainakini yes aisiarisiario roma ajakanuto kere nuka akwap,"
Jeremiah34:18 Ido ituŋa iuadiaka akaitutuket, lumam eswamato akiro nuka aitutuker naetutukete kakonyeneka, etuputoori itaok yenetubio katutubeta aarei, kosodete aitor kidin katutubetake;"
Jeremiah34:19 ikapolok luka Yuda, ka ikapolok luka Yerusalem, ka ibwacin, ka isasedotin, ka ituŋa kere luka akwap Iuetorete kidiŋ atutubeta nuka itaok,"
Jeremiah34:20 Ainakini teni kes akan naka lukasurupokec, akan da naka nul kaluemooto aijarakec. Akeeewat da nukatwak eraunete inyamat mama ejaas akweny nuka akuj, ka neejaas itian luka ais,"
Jeremiah34:21 Ainakini Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda, ka ikapolokoke akan naka lukasurupokee, ka akan da naka nul kaluemooto aijarakec, akan da naka aiore naka ekabaka loko Babulon, luanyout kamakus."
Jeremiah34:22 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Koany, ecorakini, etobonuni kes ore lo; ido itiiiete ŋes, ipikorete, icweikinete kakim, Etuluori ireria luka Yuda ameje, komamei yeniboie kotoma.”"
Jeremiah35:1 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naabu kobu mama ejai Yeremia kapaarasia nuka Yekoiakim okoku loka Yosia, ekabaka loka Yuda, kobala ebe:"
Jeremiah35:2 “Kolot okekia luka Irekabin, kinera kakes, kitolomik togo loka EJAKAIT, agola adioper, koinak ebino aimat.”"
Jeremiah35:3 Kasodi kayana Yaasania okoku loka Yeremia, okoku loka Kabasinia, ka ikeinacan, ka odweke kere, ka ekek kere loka Irekabin."
Jeremiah35:4 Ketoloma kes togo loka EJAKAIT, toma agola naka odwe luka Kanan okoku loka Igidalia, etuŋanan loka Edeke, naidunyas kagola naka ikapolok, naajai kuju kagola naka Maaseia okoku loka Salum, ekagolon,"
Jeremiah35:5 Kebwaik ituol lueleleba ebino, ka aderekai, kakonyen nuka odwe luka ekek loka Irekabin; katema atiar, “Komata ebino.”"
Jeremiah35:6 Konye kes kobalas ebe, “Mam kima si ebino: naarai abu Yonadab okoku loka Rakab, papaakosi, kicorak kobala ebe, ‘Mam imasenenete ebino, yes, karaida odwekus ikar kere."
Jeremiah35:7 Kwabo mam idukenenete etogo, ido mam iyeenenete ikinyom, karaida aira amanat nuka emusabibu, mam ijaenenas kakes; konye ibojenenete koweman akusipaarasia kere; kobuto ikar luipu kakwap naiboioto.’"
Jeremiah35:8 Kipou karimasi eporoto loka Yonadab okoku loka Rekab, papaakosi, kakiro kere nukiititiŋi, amamus amasenen ebino, akosipaarasia kere, isio ka akosiŋor, ka ikosidwe lusap ka lupesur,"
Jeremiah35:9 karaida adukun itogoi lukibois, Ido emamei sio amana naka emusabibu, karaida imanikoria, karaida ikinyom;"
Jeremiah35:10 konye kiboienenei kowemart, ka-imarito, keswamaete kere nukieorakinit Yonadab papaakosi."
Jeremiah35:11 Kosodi kanen nakebunio Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon aitiji akwap, kenerata ebe, ‘Kopotu, kaloto Yerusalem, kanuka akurian ajore naka Ikaludean, ka nuka akurian ajore naka Isurian.’ Aso ŋes kiboio koYerusalem.”"
Jeremiah35:12 Kosodi kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Yeremia, kobala ebe:"
Jeremiah35:13 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael, ebe: Kolot, kolimok ituŋa luka Yuda ka luibojete koYerusalem ebe, Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mam kereka yes iyuunete aisisianakinio akiirar akakiro?"
Jeremiah35:14 Etodolikinitai akiro nuka Yonadab okoku loka Rekab nueeorakinit odweke amamus amasenen ebino, kwabo mam emasenenete aitodollolo, naarai erimarete aicorakinet naka papaakee: konye eoŋ abu kener kayes, adilonokin tupuruc einer; ido mam ipotu kopuput eoŋ."
Jeremiah35:15 Kejukanakini da yes ikakejaanakinak kere inabin, adilonokin tupuruc aijukunun kes, kabala ebe, ‘Koboŋu cabo ŋinituŋanan ainyein ekerot loerono, kitetenata akusiswamisio, siritupanarete ieedekesio aijaanakin kes, ido iboiete kakwap naabu kainak yes ka lukapapaakus.’ Konye mam itoonokinete akusiki, kwabo mam ipotu kopuput eoŋ."
Jeremiah35:16 Naarai etodolikis odwe luka Yonadab okoku loka Rekab aicorakinet naka papaakee naeeorakinit, konye ituŋa lu mam apotu karimasi eoŋ."
Jeremiah35:17 Ŋes enerar kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael, ebe: Koany, ayauni kotoma Yuda ka ŋul kere luibojete koYerusalem, aronis kere naenerakinit kes: naarai abu kener kakes, konye mam apotu kapuput; ido eworo, konye mam apotu kaboŋokis.”"
Jeremiah35:18 Kotema Yeremia ekek loka Irekabin atiar, “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Naarai irimasi aicorakinet naka Yonadab papaakus, korieata aituutooretake kere, kiswamata kere nukieorakinit yes,"
Jeremiah35:19 ŋes inerar kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Mam Yonadab okoku loka Rekab emamikini etuŋanan loebwoi kakonyeneka ikar kere.”"
Jeremiah36:1 Kosodi kanen kokaru lokiwoŋonet loka Yekoiakim okoku loka Yosia, ekabaka loka Yuda, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Yeremia atiar:"
Jeremiah36:2 “Koyaŋa anunuket naka eitabo, kiwadika toma akiro kere nuabu kalimok jo aluikin Isirael, ka Yuda, ka atekerin kere, ameun apaaran nakenerar kajo, ameun kapaarasia nuka Yosia, kiton lolo,"
Jeremiah36:3 Motoko iirari ekek loka Yuda aronis kere naalosikinit aiswamakin kes; kibelokinos ŋinituŋanan ainyein ekerot loerono, kesioni numam adolitekec ka aronisikec.”"
Jeremiah36:4 Kosodi konyarau Yeremia Baruk okoku loka Neria, Kiwadik Baruk toma anunuket naka eitabo akiro kere nuka EJAKAIT, nuekopuni kaituk naka Yeremia nukelimonokinitai."
Jeremiah36:5 Kicorak Yeremia Baruk atiar, “Kaenitai; mam apedori alosit togo loka EJAKAIT,"
Jeremiah36:6 Aso kolot ijo, kosiom nuka anunuket, nuiwadikat kaitukuka, akiro nuka EJAKAIT kaki nuka ituŋa kotogo loka EJAKAIT apaaran naka ailuŋ: isiomi da kaki nuka ituŋa kere luka Yuda, luelomunete koreriakee."
Jeremiah36:7 Motoko edolokini ailipikee EJAKAIT, ibelokini ŋinituŋanan ainyein ekerot loerono: naarai epol anyunyura ka adedeŋ naka EJAKAIT, naenerit ŋesi mama ejaas ituŋa lu.”"
Jeremiah36:8 Kiswama Baruk okoku loka Neria kere nueeorakinit enabi Yeremia, kosiom kotoma oitabo akiro nuka EJAKAIT kotogo loka EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah36:9 Kosodi kanen kokaru kalokikanyet loka Yekoiakim okoku loka Yosia, ekabaka loka Yuda, kolap kalokikanyetekaonon, apotu ituŋa kere luko Yerusalem, ka ituŋa da kere luapote Yerusalem anyoun koreria luka Yuda kolimosi ailuŋ kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT,"
Jeremiah36:10 Kosodi kosiom Baruk kotoma citabo akiro nuka Yeremia kotogo laka EJAKAIT kagola naka Gemaria okoku loka Sapan ekewadikan, kalaro nakokuju, kariri kerute lokitetet loka etogo laka EJAKAIT, kaki nuka ituŋa kere."
Jeremiah36:11 Kepupu Mikaia okoku laka Gemaria, okoku loka Sapan, akiro kere nuka EJAKAIT kotoma oitabo,"
Jeremiah36:12 kiiesar togo laka ekabaka, toma agola naka ekewadikan; ido koany, kibojete kanen ikapolok kere: Elisama ekewadikan, ka Delaia okoku loka Semaia, ka El-natan okoku loka Akubor, ka Gemaria okoku loka Sapan, ka Sedekia okoku loka Kanania, ka ikapolok da kere."
Jeremiah36:13 Kitejen Mikaia akiro kere nukiirari, naasiomia Baruk eitabo kaki nuka ituŋa,"
Jeremiah36:14 Kosodete ikapolok kere kiyakias Yekudi okoku loka Netania, okoku loka Selemia, okoku loka Kusi, mama ejai Baruk ebalas ebe, “Kolem anunuket na nan isiomi kaki nuka ituŋa, kobu.” Kosodi Baruk okoku laka Neria kolem anunuket, kolot neajaas."
Jeremiah36:15 Kolimokis ŋes ebe, “Aso kiboikin, kosiom kakiikosi.” Kosiom Baruk kakiikec."
