Jeremiah36:16 Kosodi kanen, kiirasi akiro kere, konolianakinos kanuka akurian, kotemasi Baruk atiar, “Kibusakinit aitejenun ekabaka akiro ŋun kere.”"
Jeremiah36:17 Kinita Baruk kobalas ebe, “Aso cani kolimokinai, kiwadikai biai akiro nu kere? Ikopuni kereka ijo kaitukuke?”"
Jeremiah36:18 Kosodi Koboŋok Baruk ebe, “Kalimonokini ŋesi eoŋ akiro ŋun kere kaitukuke, kewadikai eoŋ toma oitabo kebwino.”"
Jeremiah36:19 Kosodete ikapolok alimokin Baruk ebe, “Kolot, konopa diidi, ijo ka Yeremia; sirikejenu ituŋanan neijaas.”"
Jeremiah36:20 Kolomasi alaro mama ejai ekabaka; konye kinadakinito anunuket togo loka Elisama ekewadikan; kitejenut ekabaka akiro kere.
Jeremiah36:21 Kosodi ekabaka kijuka Yekudi aomare anunuket: kolem kotoma agola naka Elisama ekewadikan, Kosiom Yekudi kaki nuka ekabaka, kaki da nuka ikapolok kere luabwoete aapu kekabaka."
Jeremiah36:22 Kiboie ekabaka kotogo loka aiporo olap lokikanyetekaoŋon, kojai da ekiala kinokokitete akim kakonyeneke."
Jeremiah36:23 Kosodi kanen, naesiomia Yekudi apapulai auni arai aoŋon, kotubutubei ekabaka kekilen, kocakanakini akim nakokiala, kiton needoporia anunuket kere kotoma okiala."
Jeremiah36:24 Konye mam apotu koyona, karaida acilicil ikecenapen, ekabaka, karaida ikekejaanakinak kere lueiraritos akiro ŋun kere."
Jeremiah36:25 Karaida apotu El-natan ka Delaia ka Gemaria kinainaata ekabaka ainyein aicwe anunuket; konye koner apupun kes,"
Jeremiah36:26 Kicorak ekabaka Yerameel okoku laka ekabaka, ka Seraia okoku loka Asuriel, ka Selemaia okoku loka Abudeel, aikamun Baruk ekewadikan ka enabi Yeremia; konye kibwa EJAKAIT kes di."
Jeremiah36:27 Kosodi kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Yeremia, kedau ekabaka aicwe anunuket, ka akiro nuewadikat Baruk kaituk naka Yeremia atiar:"
Jeremiah36:28 “Koyaŋa bobo acenunuket, kiwadika tomake akiro kwa kere nusek nuajaas toma anunuket nasodit, naecwei Yekoiakim ekabaka loka Yuda,"
Jeremiah36:29 Inera nuka Yekoiakim ekabaka laka Yuda ebe, ‘Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Ieweik anunuket ŋin, kobala ebe, “Kanukinyo kiwadikaa kotomake ebe, abeit ebuni ekabaka loko Babulon, amunaar akwap na, ido itanani kanen etuŋanan ka etiaŋ?”"
Jeremiah36:30 Kanuka nun inera kwanata EJAKAIT nuka Yekoiakim ekabaka loka Yuda ebe, Emameun ituŋanan yeniboikini oicoloŋ loka Daudi. Ecakario akuanake nakatwan kina neejai amwanis paaran, ka aterot da kuare."
Jeremiah36:31 Eticani eoŋ ŋes ka akeur ka ikekeiaanakinak kanuka numam adolitekec; ayaun mamakec, ka neejaas luibojete koYerusalem, ka neejaas ituŋa luka Yuda, aronis kere naabu kenerak kes, konye mam apotu kopuput.’”"
Jeremiah36:32 Kosodi kolem Yeremia anunuket ace, koinak Baruk ekewadikan, okoku loka Neria; kiwadika nesl tomake kaituk naka Yeremia akiro kere nukoitabo loecwei Yekoiakim ekabaka loka Yuda: kiyatakinai tomakec akiro nuipu kwape kakwa."
Jeremiah37:1 Kirum Sedekia okoku loka Yosia ekabaka, aibois naka Konia okoku loka Yekoiakim, loesurumi Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon akwap naka Yuda."
Jeremiah37:2 Konye mam ŋes, ka ikekejaanakinak, ka ituŋa luka akwap, mam apotu kiirasi akiro nuka EJAKAIT nuenera kama ka Yeremia enabi,"
Jeremiah37:3 Kijuka Sedekia ekabaka Yekukal okoku loka Selemia, ka Sepania esasedoti, okoku loka Maaseia, mama ejai enabi Yeremia, atiar, “Kilipakinai kama ejai EJAKAIT Edekewok.”"
Jeremiah37:4 Ido kolomanari Yeremia kolomununei da otuŋa: naarai aroko egolokino aenis.
Jeremiah37:5 Kelomunit aiore naka Parao anyoun ko Misiri: nakiirariata Ikaludean luerigaunito Yerusalem akirokec, konyout koYerusalem."
Jeremiah37:6 Kosodi kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai enabi Yeremia, kobala ebe:"
Jeremiah37:7 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Ilimokini kwanata ekabaka loka Yuda, lokiiiukunit jo aiŋit eoŋ, ebe, ‘Koany, eboŋori ajore naka Parao Misiri, akwapukec, naanyounitaisigalikin yes."
Jeremiah37:8 Eboŋunete bobo Ikaludean da, itijiete ere lo; irumete, icweikinete kakim."
Jeremiah37:9 Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Sirikimodomodas ebe, “Abeit enyounete Ikaludean kamawok”; naarai mam enyounete."
Jeremiah37:10 Naarai karaida kidanyata yesi aiore kere naka Ikaludean luejios kayes, kopianunos ituŋa Iuimusutjitai bonik kakesi, tikenyout kesi, ninitunanan kowemake, aicweikin ere lo kakim.’’’"
Jeremiah37:11 Kosodi kanen, nakenyou ajore naka Ikaludean kotoma Yerusalem kekuriakata aiore naka Parao,"
Jeremiah37:12 kosodi Yeremia kolom ko Yerusalem alosit akwap naka Benyamin, adumun ekewai kaŋina kotoma otuŋa."
Jeremiah37:13 Nakejaar Ŋesi orute loka Benyamin koiai ekapolokiton loka ikedarak, ekekiror Iriya okoku loka Selemia, okoku loka Kanania; kikam enabi Yeremia, kobala ebe, “Isii ijo mama ejaas Ikaludean.”"
Jeremiah37:14 Kobala Yeremia ebe, “Isabi ijo; mam eoŋ asiit oKaludean.” Konye koner Iriya akiirar. Kosodi kikam Yeremia koyaŋa mama ejaas ikapolok."
Jeremiah37:15 Konyunyurikis ikapolok Yeremia, kibunata, kogolokis aenis togo loka Yonatan ekewadikan; naarai etuluoritai etogo ŋol aenis."
Jeremiah37:16 Kosodi keloma Yeremia togo loka aipany, kiton igolai, kiboi Yeremia kaŋina apaarasia nuipu;"
Jeremiah37:17 kosodi kijuk ekabaka Sedekia aomare ŋes: kinit eka baka ŋes kaiyeiyea kotogoke, atiar, “Ejai tope adiokirot naka EJAKAIT?” Kobala Yeremia ebe, “Ejai bo.” Kobala bobo ebe, “Kiinakinio jo akan naka ekabaka loko Babulon.”"
Jeremiah37:18 Kotema bobo Yeremia ekabaka Sedekia atiar, “Nunyoika adiakaa kamakon, arai kokejaanakinakakon, arai kotuzja lu, tape kigolokinete aenis?"
Jeremiah37:19 Alu bo kwana inabinokus lukiidwarakinete ebe, ‘Mam ebuni ekabaka loko Babulon asurokin yes, karaida akusikwap’?"
Jeremiah37:20 Aso kwana, kiirarai, wu ekaiakait ekabaka, kenainair: kodolok akailip mamakon, kenainait; sirikiinyakak togo loka Yonatan ekewadikan, kenye atwanikin ŋina.”"
Jeremiah37:21 Kosodi ekabaka Sedekia kicorak, kibwaikis Yeremia aidaris naka alaro naka ikedarak, koinanakinai ninipaaran emugati loeyaunio korot loka ikapeok, aitodol neadaunotor imugatin kere lukore. Kosalak Yeremia alaro naka ikedarak."
Jeremiah38:1 Kiirasi Sepatia okoku loka Matan, ka Gedalia okoku loka Pasur, ka Yukal okoku loka Selemia, ka Pasur okoku loka Malikiya, akiro nua limonokini Yeremia ituŋa kere ebe,"
Jeremiah38:2 “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Yeniboikini ore lo eari ekileŋ, ka eteŋei, ka atular: konye yenelomari mama ejaas Ikaludean eiari, einakinio da akeiiar araun anatuna, ido eiari,"
Jeremiah38:3 Inera EJAKAIT kwanata atiar, Abeit einakinio ere lo akan naka aiore naka ekabaka loko Babulon, irumi ŋes.”"
Jeremiah38:4 Kosodete ikapolok atemar ekabaka atiar, “Kijainait koarai ekesa lo; naarai esiialiiala akanin nuka ikajiok luesalito ore lo, akanin da nuka ituŋa kere, kanuka alimonokin akiro nuikote kwaka ŋun; naarai ekesa ŋol mam emoikinit ituŋa lu aiokis, dimarai aronis.”"
Jeremiah38:5 Abu Sedekia ekabaka kotema atiar, “Koany, ejai akaninikus, naarai mam epedori ekabaka aisimik yes adiokirot.”"
Jeremiah38:6 Kosodete koyanaasi Yeremia, kocakakis aipany naka Malikiya okoku loka ekabaka, naajai alaro naka ikedarak: kijoliliosi Yeremia kaunoi, Amameete akip kotoma aipany, dimarai erit: kiliko erit Yeremia."
Jeremiah38:7 Nakepupunio Ebed-melek, Etiopiat, ebwacit, loajai togo loka ekabaka, ebe, Ebwaikis Yeremia aipany; eboie ekabaka korute loka Benyamin;"
Jeremiah38:8 kolom Ebed-melek kotogo loka ekabaka, kotema ekabaka atiar,"
Jeremiah38:9 “Ekajakait ekabaka, eswamata ituŋa lu nueroko kakere nueswamakis Yeremia enabi, Ioacakakis aipany; ido ekot arwanikin aibois neejai kanuka eteŋei; naarai emameete inyamat kore.”"
Jeremiah38:10 Kosodi ekabaka aicorakin Ebed-melek Etiopiat, kobala ebe, “Koyaŋa kane ituŋa akaisauni, kouparos kakes, kolemutu Yeremia enabi kaipany, eroko ketwana.”"
Jeremiah38:11 Kosodi Ebed-melek koyana Innja, kouparos kakes, koloma togo loka ekabaka kwap kainadis, kolem inyakinyakia lumoion luaeakaritai, ka idapaiea, kisijolilio kaunoi aipany mama ejai Yeremia,"
Jeremiah38:12 Kosodi kotema Ebed-melek Etiopiat Yeremia ariar, “Kibwaik inyakinyakia lu lumoion luaeakaritai ka idapaiea lu akirididinikon kanuka aunoi.” Kiswama Yeremia kwaŋin,"
Jeremiah38:13 Kosodete airiun Yeremia kaunoi kaŋun, kolemut kaipany. Kosalak Yeremia alaro naka ikedarak."
Jeremiah38:14 Kosodi kijuka Sedekia ekabaka, koyaunai Yeremia enabi mamake alomaret nakiwuniet naejai togo loka EJAKAIT. Kotema ekabaka Yeremia atiar, “Keenit akirot; sirikimunonik adiokirot kere.”"
Jeremiah38:15 Kosodi Yeremia kotema Sedekia atiar, “Arai kaalimok, mam kereka kipedor aiar eoŋ? Ido arai keecor, mam kiirari.”"
Jeremiah38:16 Kosodi Sedekia ekabaka kiyapoik Yeremia kaiyeiyea, kiner ebe, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT, lokiisubakini oni aijar na, mam kaari, kwabo mam kainakini akan naka ituŋa ŋul luemoete akoniijar.”"
Jeremiah38:17 Kosodi Yeremia atemar Sedekia atiar, “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, Arai kiloma mama ejaas ikapolok luka ekabaka loko Babulon, aso ekui akoniiiar, ere lo da mam icweikinio kakim: ijari ijo da ka ekonikek,"
Jeremiah38:18 Konye arai kiner alomar alosit mama ejaas ikapolok luka ekabaka loko Babulon, asa einakinio ere lo akan naka Ikaludean, ido icweikinete kakim, ijo da mam ikui kakanikec.”"
Jeremiah38:19 Kosodi Sedekia ekabaka atemar Yeremia atiar, “Ayoŋit Iyudayan luasiata oKaludean, kenyeis ainakin akanikee, kesekeloro.”"
Jeremiah38:20 Konye kotema Yeremia atiar, “Mam kiinakinete. Kenainait, korima eporoto loka EJAKAIT, kanun nukalimok jo: asa ijaun ejok, ejari da ekonitau,"
Jeremiah38:21 Konye arai kiŋer alomar, na ŋes akirot naabu EJAKAIT ketodik eoŋ:"
Jeremiah38:22 Koany, aŋor kere nukinyeinio kotogo loka ekabaka loka Yuda itolomunio mama ejaas ikapolok luka ekabaka loko Baulon, iŋerete aŋor kwa ebe, “Kimodete ipapero lukodieikon, Kipikosi jo. Epokata akonikejen kotoma orit, Abonosi kesi kau.’"
Jeremiah38:23 Ido itolomarete Ikaludean anorokon kere ka ikonidwe: ka jo da mam ikui kakaninikee, konye kikamario kakan naka ekabaka loko Babulon: idupori ere lo aicweikinio kakim.”"
Jeremiah38:24 Kosodi kolimok Sedekia Yeremia ebe, “Sirikejenu ituŋanan akiro nu, asa mam itwani."
Jeremiah38:25 Konye arai kiirasi lukapolok ebe kinere kaio, epote kesi neiiai atemar ebe, ‘Aso cani kolimokinai nuibu kolimok ekabaka; bobo da nukilimok eka baka jo; sirikiimunonik sio, mam sio kiari jo’;"
Jeremiah38:26 Kosodi ilimokini kes ebe, ‘Abu kenaina ekabaka, kenyek ainyakar togo loka Yonatan, kenyek atwanikin ŋina.’’’"
Jeremiah38:27 Kosodete kopotu ikapolok kere mama ejai Yeremia, kiŋita; kolimok akiro ŋun kere nueeorakini ekabaka, Kinyeis einer kaŋes, naarai mam apotu kopupos akiro."
Jeremiah38:28 Kosodi kosalak Yeremia alaro naka ikedarak, kiton apaaran naerumiarere Yerusalem."
Jeremiah39:1 Kokaru lokikanyetekaonon loka Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda, olap lokitomonet, kobu Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon ka akeiore kere asurokin Yerusalem, kirigaut;"
Jeremiah39:2 kokaru lokitomonet kalodiopet loka Sedekia, kolap lokiwononet, kapaaran nakikanyetekaonon naka elap, kocila ere."
Jeremiah39:3 Kosodi kanen naerumiarere Yerusalem, kolomas ikapolok kere luka ekabaka loko Babulon, kiboikinos orute lokokidin, kes Neregal-sarescr, Samugar-nebo, Saresekim lokerai Rab-saris, Neregal-sareser lokerai Rabmag, ka ikapolok ice kere luka ekabaka loko Babulon."
Jeremiah39:4 Kosodi kanen, keanyu Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda, ka ikajiok kere, kokerata, konyout kotoma ore kuare, korot loka emanikor loka ekabaka, korute lokokidiŋ arwatatin aarei: koloma korot loka Araba,"
Jeremiah39:5 Konye korukio ajore naka Ikaludean, kodolokis Sedekia kapuutona nuka Yeriko: kedaut aikamun, koyanaasi Ribula akwap naka Kamat, mama ejai Nebukadaresar eka baka loko Babulon, kotubokinai akiro,"
Jeremiah39:6 Kosodi koarak ekabaka loka Babulon odwe luka Sedekia Ribula, kakonyeneke; koar da ekabaka loko Babulon isotia kere luka Yuda."
Jeremiah39:7 Ido kogorununoi akonye nuka Sedekia, koenai ŋes kirikoi, ayaŋaar Babulon."
Jeremiah39:8 Kieweata Ikaludean etogo loka eka baka, ka itogoi luka ituŋa, kotiyatiyata arwatatin nuka Yerusalem,"
Jeremiah39:9 Kosodi Nebusaradan ekapolon loka ikedarak aijoreor luasalito luka ituŋa luapianuna kore, ka luasiete da mamakeŋ, ka luasalito luka ituŋa luapianuna, koyana Babulon,"
Jeremiah39:10 Konye kitasal Nebusaradan, ekapolon loka ikedarak, lukican kotuna, luamamei idiobore, toma akwap naka Yuda, koinak kes kapak kaŋin amanat nuka emusabibu ka imanikoria."
Jeremiah39:11 Ido kicorak Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon Nebusaradan, ekapolon loka ikedarak, nuka Yeremia ebe,"
Jeremiah39:12 “Koyana ŋes, kidari ŋes ejok, sirikiswamak nueroko; konye nukilimokini, nun iswamakini ŋes.”"
Jeremiah39:13 Aso kijuka Nebusaradan, ekapolon loka ikedarak, ka Nebusasiban lokerai Rabsaris, ka Neregal-sareser lokerai Rab-mag, ka ijaka kere luka ekabaka loko Babulon;"
Jeremiah39:14 kijuka, kolemasi Yeremia kalaro naka ikedarak, kijaikis Gedalia okoku loka Akikam, okoku loka Sapan, ayaŋaar oreken. Kosodi kiboioto kituna."
Jeremiah39:15 Kobu do akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Yeremia, naaenitere kalaro naka ikedarak, kobala ebe:"
Jeremiah39:16 “Kolot, kolimok Ebed-melek Etiopiat ebe,, Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, Koany, ayauni akakiro ore lo kanuka aronis, mere kanuka ajokis, ianyuni ijo da kes apaaran ya,"
Jeremiah39:17 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Konye kayuuni jo kapaaran kaya; ido mam kiinakinio akan naka ituŋa luikuriana."
Jeremiah39:18 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Abeit ketaiari jo, mam ekileŋ kiari; konye eraun aijarakon anatuna: naarai kimunokina eoŋ.’”"
Jeremiah40:1 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naabu kobu mama ejai Yeremia, kedau Nebusaradan ekapolon loka ikedarak aosikin ŋes anyoun koRama, nakeyanaaria eenen kirikoi nepepe kienan kere luka Yerusalem ka Yuda, lueioreorio Babulon,"
Jeremiah40:2 Koya ekapolon loka ikedarak Yeremia, kotema atiar, “Enerak EJAKAIT Ekonideke aronis na kere aibois na:"
Jeremiah40:3 Ido etodolik EJAKAIT, es wama kwape abu kinerar; naarai ipotu kodiakas kama ejai EJAKAIT, kwabo mam ipotu korimasi ekeporoto, kanuka nun kibunok akirot na,"
Jeremiah40:4 Ido kwana koany, kalacakini lolo korikoi luejaas akaninikon. Arai itojokit ijo aupar keoŋ Babulon, asa kobia, kedarenenei jo ejok; konye arai eraas nueroko jo aupar keoŋ Babulon, kinye: ko any, akwap kere ejai akonyenekon; kolot neitojokit ijo neiwomit edolit alosit.”"
Jeremiah40:5 Kosodi eriŋa enyouno aboŋor, kotema atiar, “Koboŋo do neejai Gedalia okoku loka Akikam, okoku loka Sapan, loainaki ekabaka loko Babulon ayait ireria kere luka Yuda, kiboikin oreke otuŋa; arai bo ilosi kere neiwomit edolit alosit.” Kosodi ekapolon loka ikedarak ainakin ŋes inyamat, ka ainakinet, kolakak."
Jeremiah40:6 Kosodi Yeremia alosit mama ejai Gedalia okoku loka Akikam, Misipa, kiboikin oreke otuŋa luasalito kakwap."
Jeremiah40:7 Nakiirariata ikapolok kere lukorioneta luajaas okitui, kes ka ikecetuŋa, ebe, ainak ekabaka loko Babulon Gedalia okoku loka Akikam, ayait akwap, ido etitin ikiliok ka aŋor ka idwe ludidik, kaijul lukican luka akwap, lumam eioreoritai Babulon;"
Jeremiah40:8 kopotu mama ejai Gedalia Misipa, Isimael okoku loka Netania, ka Yokanan ka Yonatan odwe luka Karea, ka Seraia okoku loka Tanumet, ka odwe luka Epai Enetopatit, ka Yesania okoku loka Emaakatit, kes ka ikecetuŋa da."
Jeremiah40:9 Kosodi Gedalia okoku loka Akikam, okoku laka Sapan, kiyapoik kes ka ikecetuŋa kinera atiar, “Sirikiyoŋa aiiaanakin Ikaludean. Kiboikinos akwap, kijaanakis ekabaka loko Babulon, ido ijaununete ejok,"
Jeremiah40:10 Koany, ajaenena eoŋ Misipa, abwoenen kakonyen nuka Ikaludean, luepote mama kija oni. Konye yes, korukonokinete ebino, ka araito nuka akamu ka akinyet, kibwaanakinete oborokus, kiboienenete koreriakus luiruma.”"
Jeremiah40:11 Idokwape kwaŋin Iyudayan kere luajaas toma Moab, ka lukotoma odwe luka Amon, kotoma Edom, ka luajaas toma akwapin kere, nakiirariata kwape esidonio ekabaka loko Babulon aatoŋot kotoma Yuda, ido adakaki Gedalia okoku loka Akikam, okoku loka Sapan ayait kes,"
Jeremiah40:12 kosodete koboŋut Iyudayan kere anyoun kaiboisio kere nuerenearitai, kopotu toma akwap naka Yuda, mama ejai Gedalia, Misipa, kotukonokis ebino ka araito nuka akamu nuipu noi teni."
Jeremiah40:13 Ido bobo kobu Yokanan okoku loka Karea, ka ikapolok kere lukorioneta luajaas okitui mama ejai Gedalia Misipa,"
Jeremiah40:14 Kobalas ebe, “Ŋeni kereka ijo ebe ejuku Baalis ekabaka loka idwe luka Amon Isimael okoku laka Netania aiar jo?” Konye kogirok Gedalia okoku loka Akikam kes,"
Jeremiah40:15 Kosodi Yokanan okoku loka Karea kinera ka Gedalia ko Misipa kaiyeiyea, kobala ebe, “Keŋaiŋait, mere kalot, kaar Isimael okoku Ioka Netania, komam ituŋanan yenejenuni. Tikiarak jo inyo, tape Iyudayan kere luatukokina mama ijai isiarisiarunos, koolio aatonor naka Yuda?”"
Jeremiah40:16 Konye Gedalia okoku loka Akikam kotema Yokanan okoku loka Karea atiar, “Sirikiswama akirot nin; naarai isabanakini Isimael.”"
Jeremiah41:1 Kosodi kanen kolap kalokikanyetekaarei kobu Isimael okoku loka Netania, okoku loka Elisama, lokaur naka ekabaka, ediopet ka lukapolok luka eka baka, nepepe kituija itomon mama ejai Gedalia okoku loka Akikam Misipa: komorata ainyam koMisipa,"
Jeremiah41:2 Kosodi konyou Isimael okoku loka Netania, ka ituŋa itomon Iuajaas kaŋes, kicumata Gedalia okoku loka Akikam, okoku loka Sapan, kekilen, koarata, loabu eka baka loko Babulon kodakak ayait akwap."
Jeremiah41:3 Koar bobo Isimael lyudayan kere luajaas ka Gedalia, Misipa, ka Ikaludean luadumunio kaŋina, kes ikaiiok."
Jeremiah41:4 Kosodi kanen apaaran nakiareit kedaun aiar Gedalia, komamei yenejeni,"
Jeremiah41:5 kopotu ituŋa anyoun koSekem, ka Silo, ka Samaria, ituŋa akaisakanykauni luabarenito ipeneka, kocilicila anapitokec, kogerito awat, ekoditos ainakineta ka lukisupurununo, ayaŋaun togo loka EJAKAIT,"
Jeremiah41:6 Konyou Isimael okoku loka Netania ko Misipa aisiriam kes, kolot mama ejaas emonyi. Kosodi kanen, kiriamakinos kakes, kotema kes atiar, “Kopotu neejai Gedalia okoku loka Akikam.”"
Jeremiah41:7 Kosodete kedolut kidiŋ ore, koar Isimael okoku loka Netania kes, kocakak aipany, ŋes ka ituŋa luajaas kaŋes,"
Jeremiah41:8 Konye kotakanut ituŋa itomon kotomakec, luatemarete Isimael atiar, “Sirikiara sio: naarai ejaas bukosi imono luebwaitai omanikor, akima, ka esairi, ka akinyet, ka esik.” Kosodi kinye, mam abu koar kes kwape kiinacanakec,"
Jeremiah41:9 Aipany nin naacakakini Isimael awat kere nukatwak nuka ituŋa luaari, kosiep loka Gedalia, ŋipenin aipany naaboki Asa eka baka kanuka akurian Baasa ekabaka loka Isirael. Kileleb Isimael okoku loka Netania kituna luaari."
Jeremiah41:10 Kosodi kijoreo Isimaelluedeunos kere luka ituŋa luajaas Misipa, kiton adwe nuka ekabaka, ka ituŋa da kere luasalito Misipa, luabu Nebusaradan ekapolon loka ikedarak kititin Gedalia okoku loka Akikam. Kijoreo Isimael okoku loka Netania kes, konyou alosit mama ejaas idwe luka Amon."
Jeremiah41:11 Konye nakiiraria Yokanan okoku loka Karea, ka ikapolok kere luka irioneta luajaas kaŋes, nukaronok kere nueswama Isimael okoku loka Netania,"
Jeremiah41:12 koyanaasi ituŋa kere, koloto aitiji Isimael okoku loka Netania, kodumakis atapar naepol naajai Gibeon."
Jeremiah41:13 Kosodi kanen keanyutu ituŋa kere luajaas ka Isimael Yokanan okoku loka Karea, ka ikapolok kere luka irioneta luajaas kaŋes, kiyalamikinos."
Jeremiah41:14 Apotu ituŋa kere luejoreorit Isimael anyoun ko Misipa kibelokinos kobonosi, koloto mama ejai Yokanan okoku loka Karea."
Jeremiah41:15 Konye koku Isimael okoku loka Netania kama ejai Yokanan, ŋes nepepe kituna ikanykauni, kolot mama ejaas idwe luka Amon."
Jeremiah41:16 Kosodi Yokanan okoku loka Karea, ka ikapolok kere luka irioŋeta luajaas kaŋes, koyanaasi aatoŋot kere naka ituŋa luabu Isimael kijoreo anyoun koMisipa, kedau aiar Gedalia okoku loka Akikam, kes ikajiok, ka aŋor, ka idwe, ka ibwacin, luenyakuni Yokanan koGibeon,"
Jeremiah41:17 Koloto, kiboikinos Gerut Kimam, eiduny ka Bet-lekem, alosior Misiri,"
Jeremiah41:18 kanuka Ikaludean; naarai kokuriakaros kes, naarai abu Isimael okoku loka Netania koar Gedalia okoku loka Akikam, loadakakinit eka baka loko Babulon ayait akwap."
Jeremiah42:1 Kosodete kikunyakis ikapolok kere luka irioneta, ka Yokanan okoku loka Karea, ka Yesania okoku loka Kosaia, ka iruna kere ageun kalu didik kiton lukapolok,"
Jeremiah42:2 kotemasi enabi Yeremia atiar, “Kinainait, kocam akosiilip, kilipak sio mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke, ilipakini aatoŋot na kere; (naarai kisal idis taai kotoma luetia nen, kwape aanyuniata akonikonye sio),"
Jeremiah42:3 Kitodik EJAKAIT Ekonideke sio erot lokibusakinit aitorenen, ka akirot da nakibusakinit aiswamaenen.”"
Jeremiah42:4 Kosodi kotema enabi Yeremia atiar, “Keira yes; koany, elipi EJAKAIT Edekekus kwape ejaatar akusikiro; kosodi kanen akirot kere nakibonokini yes EJAKAIT, kalimokinete; mam kemunonikin adiokirot kere.”"
Jeremiah42:5 Kosodete kotemasi Yeremia atiar, “Korau EJAKAIT ekajenan lokabeit lomunot kamawok, arai mam kiswamai kwape ejaar akirot kere nakijukunia EJAKAIT Ekonideke mamakosi."
Jeremiah42:6 Arai ejok, arai erono, kirimari eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, lokijukarit isio jo mama ejai; tetere kiiaun ejok, arai kiirima eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke.”"
Jeremiah42:7 Kosodi kanen ketuboros apaarasia atomon, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Yeremia,"
Jeremiah42:8 Kosodi konyarau ŋesi Yokanan okoku loka Karea, ka ikapolok kere luka irioneta luajaas kaŋes, ka ituŋa kere ageun ka ludidik kiton Iukapolok."
Jeremiah42:9 Kotema atiar, “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, lokiijukaritos mama ejai alimor akusiilip kakonyeneke ebe:"
Jeremiah42:10 Arai kicamutu aiboi kakwap kana, aso kaduki yes, kwabo mam kebirorete, kerai yes, kwabo mam karutorete; naarai eitok aronis naabu keswama."
Jeremiah42:11 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Sirikikuriakata ekabaka loko Babulon, loikuriaka; sirikikuriakata ŋes, Naarai ajai eoŋ nepepe kayes aitajar, ka ayuun da yes kakanike."
Jeremiah42:12 Ido ainakini yes aitimio, tetere kitimi ŋesi yes, kisiboik akwapukus."
Jeremiah42:13 Konye arai ibalas ebe, ‘Mam kiboikin akwap na’; komam irimarete eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekusideke;"
Jeremiah42:14 ibalas ebe, ‘Mam; konye kilosi akwap nako Misiri, nemam kianyuni ejie, kwabo mam kiirari eporoto loka arupepe, ido mam kiriebi eteŋei loka inyamat; ŋina ŋes kiboikin,’"
Jeremiah42:15 asa do kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT, yes aatoŋot naka Yuda. Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Arai kitogogonoto akusikonyen eut alomar akwap nako Misiri, kolototo aiboi ŋina;"
Jeremiah42:16 kosodi kanen, kidolokini ekileŋ loiyonito kaŋina kakwap nako Misiri, eteŋei da loikuriaka, kiduduni yes kaŋina koMisiri, ido itwakikincte ŋina."
Jeremiah42:17 Ikonakinio nen ituŋa kere luitogogoŋito akecekonyen alosit Misiri aiboi ŋina; eari ekileŋ, ka eteŋei, ka atular da: emamei idio yenesali yenekui karonis naainuni kes."
Jeremiah42:18 “Naarai inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, Kwape abu akanyunyura ka akadedeŋ kobukokinor mama ejaas luibojete koYerusalem, kwape kwaŋin ebukokinor akadedeŋ mamakus, arai kilomas Misiri; iraunete yesi aimuario, ka aumokiner, ka ekenit, ka amorosit, mam bobo ianyunete aibois na."
Jeremiah42:19 Ener EJAKAIT mamakus, yes aatoŋot naka Yuda ebe, ‘Sirikiloto Misiri’: kojenutu cut ebe kekwenyarit yes lolo."
Jeremiah42:20 Naarai iswamata nukaimod kotauonokus, yes ikulepek; naarai ipotu kijukasi eoŋ mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekusideke, ibalas ebe, ‘Kilipakinai kama ejai EJAKAIT Ewokodeke: kere da nueremari EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, kolimok sio, kiswamai isio da.’"
Jeremiah42:21 Lolo da keteienu yes; konye mam ipotu korimasi eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekusideke kakiro kere nukejukunia mama ijaas.
Jeremiah42:22 Aso do kojenutu cut ebe kiari ekileŋ, ka eteŋei, ka atular da, kotoma akwap naikotosi alosit aiboi.”"
Jeremiah43:1 Kosodi kanen nakedaunia Yeremia einer kituna kere akiro kere nuka EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, nuejukunitor EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, kes akiro ŋun kere,"
Jeremiah43:2 kosodi Asaria okoku loka Kosaia, ka Yokanan okoku loka Karea, ka ituŋa kere luisoŋoloko, kinerata ka Yeremia kobalas ebe, “Iŋalai. Mam kijukunit EJAKAIT Ewokodeke einer ebe, ‘Sirikiloto Misiri aiboi nina.’"
Jeremiah43:3 Konye Baruk okoku loka Neria ŋes kisidiki jo aijaikin sio akan naka Ikaludean, tetere kiarete kesi sio, ka aiioreor da Babulon.”"
Jeremiah43:4 Aso Yokanan okoku loka Karea, ka ikapolok kere luka irioŋeta, ka ituŋa kere, mam apotu korimasi eporoto loka EJAKAIT, aiboikin akwap naka Yuda."
Jeremiah43:5 Konye koyana Yokanan okoku loka Karea ka ikapolok kere luka irioneta, aatoŋot naka Yuda luabonunito anyoun katekerin kere nuerenearitai aiboikin akwap naka Yuda,"
Jeremiah43:6 ikiliok, ka aŋor, ka idwe ludidik, ka adwe nuka eka baka, ka ŋinitunanan yenenyekinia Nebusaradan ekapolon loka ikedarak Gedalia okoku loka Akikam, okoku loka Sapan, ka enabi Yeremia, ka Baruk okoku loka Neria."
Jeremiah43:7 Kolomasi akwap nako Misiri; naarai mam apotu korimasi eporoto loka EJAKAIT, Kodoloto Ta-panes."
Jeremiah43:8 Kosodi kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Yeremia koTa-panes, koba la ebe:"
Jeremiah43:9 “Kolem amor nuepolok akanikon, kibwa kotoma alup nuka amatapalin, nuejaas neelomarere togo loka Parao koTa-panes, kosesenete da ituŋa luka Yuda;"
Jeremiah43:10 kolimok kes ebe: ‘lnera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Koany, ejukuni alemuni Nebukadaresar eka baka loko Babulon, ekakejaanakinan, ebwaikini ekeicoloŋ loka ajakanut amor nu nuebwa; ido eterakini ewemake loka ekabaka mamakee."
Jeremiah43:11 Ido ebuni, edanyi akwap nako Misiri; einakini lukatular, atular, lukiioreo aijoreorio, lukekileŋ okileŋ,"
Jeremiah43:12 Enokokini akim otogoi luka idekesio luko Misiri, ido icweikini kes, iioreori kes: enapi akwap nako Misiri, kwape enapia ekecokon anapitoke; enyouni kaŋina inapakina."
Jeremiah43:13 Ido ebilibilei ipirin luka Bet-semes, loejai akwap nako Misiri; icweikini da kakim itogoi luka idekesio luko Misiri.’’’"
Jeremiah44:1 Akirot naabu kobu mama ejai Yeremia nuka Iyudayan kere lueboiete kakwap nako Misiri, lueboiete koMigidol, ka Ta-panes, ka Nop, kakwap da naka Paturos, kobala ebe:"
Jeremiah44:2 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Ianyut aronis kere naa bu kayau Yerusalem, koreria da kere luka Yuda. Ido koanv, eraas lolo ameiei, emamei ituŋanan yeniboie kanen,"
Jeremiah44:3 kanuka nukaronokokec nueswamata aitunyunyurikin eoŋ, naarai apaasi aisupuronokin lukisupurununo, ka aiiaanakin da icedekesio, lumam kolo ajenete, kes, karaida yes, karaida lukapapaakus."
Jeremiah44:4 Konye abu keiukanak yes ikakeiaanakinak kere inabin, adilonokini tupuruc aiiukunun kes, kabala ebe, ‘Wu okwe! Sirikiswamata akirot na naketal naalait.’"
Jeremiah44:5 Konye mam apotu kopuput, kwabo mam itoikino akeceki ainyein nukaronokokec, amamus aisupuronoldn icedekesio lukisupurununo."
Jeremiah44:6 Ŋes abukokinia akanyunyura ka akadedeŋ, kinep koreria luka Yuda, korotin da luka Yerusalem; ido eswapa, emejeikis, kwape ejaatar lolo."
Jeremiah44:7 Aso do ŋes inerar kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael, ebe: Kanukinyo iswamakiniata ikusitauon aronis naetia ne, yes amudiar ekiliokit ka aberu, ka ikoku ka imukeru da kotoma Yuda, ainyein yes komamei yenasalit?"
Jeremiah44:8 Kanukinyo kitunyunyurikiniata eoŋ kanuka aswamisio nuka akaninikus, isupuronokinete icedekesio lukisupurununo kakwap nako Misiri naipotu kopotu aiboi; tape kimudiario, araun ekenit, ka amorosit kotoma atekerin kere nuka akwap?"
Jeremiah44:9 Kimurwok kereka yes aronis naka lukapapaakus, ka aronis naka ikabakan luka Yuda, ka aronis naka aŋorokec, ka aronisikus, ka aronis da naka aŋorokus, naapotu kiswamata kakwap naka Yuda, korotin da luka Yerusalem?"
Jeremiah44:10 Mam itisilaara kiton lolo, kwabo mam eyoŋito, ido mam elosenenete kokisilaka, karaida kaicorakinetaka, nuabu kebwaik kakonyenekus, kakonyen da nuka lukapapaakus."
Jeremiah44:11 “Ŋes inerar kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael, ebe: Koany, kaseseni yes kakonu naerono, amudiar Yuda kere."
Jeremiah44:12 Ayaŋaari aatoŋot naka Yuda, luetogogonete akeeekonyen alosit akwap nako Misiri aiboi kaŋina, epiario kes kere, Ebiroros kakwap nako Misiri; epiari ekileŋ, ka eteŋei; etwakete kekilen, ka eteŋei ageun kalodidi kiton lokapolon: eraunete aimuario, ka aumokinet, ka ekenit, ka amorosit."
Jeremiah44:13 Naarai eticani ŋulluiboiete kakwap nako Misiri, kwape abu keticania Yerusalem, kekilen, ka erenei, ka atular da."
Jeremiah44:14 Tetere mam ekui karaida aisal imodio kaatonot naka Yuda luaponito aiboi akwap nako Misiri, aboŋor akwap naka Yuda, naemielas kesi aboŋor aiboi. Naarai emamei yenebonori dimarai idis luekuete.”."
Jeremiah44:15 Kosodete kobonokis ituŋa kere Yeremia, luajenete kwape esupuronokiniata aŋorokec icedekesio lukisupurununo, ka aŋor kere nukebwoete kosiepikec, atukot naepol, ituŋa kere luibojete kakwap nako Misiri, kotoma Paturos, kobalas ebe,"
Jeremiah44:16 “Akirot naibu kolimok sio kokiror loka EJAKAIT, mam kiirari."
Jeremiah44:17 Konye abeit kiswamai ninikirot naelomuni kaitukekosi, aisupuronokin akabaka naka akuj lukisupurununo, abukonokin ŋes ainakineta numatan, kwape kiswamaa, isio ka lukapapaakosi, ikabakanakosi, ka ikapolokokosi, koreria luka Yuda, korotin da luka Yerusalem: naarai kapak kaŋin ŋes kimonianakinor inyamat, kajaut ejok, komam kianyunit nukaronok."
Jeremiah44:18 Konye netikolo kinyeinia aisupuronokin akabaka naka akuj lukisupurununo, abukonokin ŋes ainakineta numatan, kitwakia kere, kipiari kekilen ketenei.”"
Jeremiah44:19 ‘Kobalas aŋor da ebe, “Nakiisupuronokinia akabaka naka akuj lukisupurununo, abukonokin da ainakineta numatan, kepoonokis imugatin amaia, kabukonokis ainakineta numatan, mam kereka acamunito ikosikiliok?”"
Jeremiah44:20 Kosodi kolimok Yeremia ituŋa kere, ikiliok ka aŋor da, kes ituŋa kere luabonokinete ŋes kwaŋin, kobala ebe:"
Jeremiah44:21 “Lukisupurununo luisupurununete koreria luka Yuda, korotin da luka Yerusalem, yes ka lukapapaakus, ikusikabakan ka ikapolokokus, ka iruna luka akwap, mam kereka abu EJAKAIT kiitu, ido mam apotu koiaut otauke?"
Jeremiah44:22 Tape mam epedori EJAKAIT eut atitiŋikin bobo, kanuka aronis naka aswamisiokus, kanuka italesia luipotu kiswamata; ŋes ainakin akwapukus eraun ameje, ka aumokinet, ka ekenit da, komamei yeniboie kotoma, kwape eiaar lolo."
Jeremiah44:23 Naarai ipotu kisupurununut lukisupurununo, ido naarai ipotu kodiakasi kama ejai EJAKAIT, kwabo mam erimara eporoto loka EJAKAIT, ido mam eloseneno kokisilake, karaida kaicorakinetake, karaida toma aitejenunetake; ŋes ainakin aronis na kidolokini yes, kwape eiaar lolo.”"
Jeremiah44:24 Ido bobo kobala Yeremia ituŋa kere ka aŋor da kere ebe, “Kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT, yes kere luka Yuda luijaas akwap nako Misiri."
Jeremiah44:25 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Inerata yesi ka akusiŋor kaitukekus, itodolikis da kakusikanin ebe, ‘Abeit kitodolikin aiyaposiokos nukiyapot, aisupuronokin akabaka naka akui lukisupurununo, ka abukonokin ainakineta numatan.’ Aso kitieata aiyaposiokus, kitodolo da aiyaposiokus."
Jeremiah44:26 Aso do kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT, yes kere luka Yuda luibojete kakwap nako Misiri. Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Koany, eyapo kalimit ekakiror lokos ebe mam bobo elimitoi ekakiror kaituk kere naka ituŋanan yenika Yuda kakwap kere nako Misiri, ebe, ‘Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT.’"
Jeremiah44:27 Koany, eteenenei kes kakonu naerono, konye mere kanaejok; epiari ekileŋ ka eteŋei ituŋa kere luka Yuda Iuejaas akwap nako Misiri, aitodol needaunotor."
Jeremiah44:28 Ŋul da luekuete kokilen enyounete kakwap nako Misiri eboŋorete akwap naka Yuda idis taai: ejenunete ŋul aatoŋot kere naka Yuda Iualomut aiboi akwap nako Misiri, nakanai akirot naebwoi, nakan, arai nakec."
Jeremiah44:29 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Na ŋes aanyunet kamakus, ebe, etieani yes kaibois kana, kojenutu cut kwape Icasitotor akakiro kamakus kanuka aronis."
Jeremiah44:30 Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, Koany, ainakini Parao Kopura ekabaka loko Misiri akan naka lukasurupoke, kakan da naka ŋul kaluemooto akeijar; kwape abu kainakinia Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda akan naka Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon, lokasurupike, loamoot akeiiar.”"
Jeremiah45:1 Akirot naka enabi Yeremia naatemari Baruk okoku loka Neria, naewadikaa oitabo akiro nu nuka aituk naka Yeretnia, kokaru loki wononet Ioka Yekoiakim okoku loka Yosia, ekabaka loka Yuda, kobala ebe:"
Jeremiah45:2 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael, neijai ijo, Baruk, ebe:"
Jeremiah45:3 Ibu kotema atiar, ‘Wu okwe! Abei ai? Naarai eyataki EJAKAIT iean toma arieboka; kapas eidinyaka, kwabo mam adumunit aiyeŋun kere.’"
Jeremiah45:4 Itemari Ŋes kwanata atiar, Inera kwanata EJAKAIT ebe: Koany, aketari nin yenabu kaduk, arutori da ŋin yenabu kera; ido eswamakini kwaŋin akwap kere."
Jeremiah45:5 Imoot ijo nuepolok? Sirimoot; naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe: Koany, ayauni aronis mama ejaas ŋul kere Iueiai akuan, konye ainakini akoniijar araut anatuna kaiboisio kere nuilosenenei.”"
Jeremiah46:1 Akirot, naka EJAKAIT naabu kobu mama ejai enabi Yeremia kanuka atekenn."
Jeremiah46:2 Kanuka Misiri, Nuka aiore naka Parao-neko ekabaka loko Misiri, naajai ariri naka ecor Eupurate koKarukemis naadanyi Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon kokaru lokiwononer loka Yekoiakim okoku loka Yosia, ekabaka loka Yuda."
Jeremiah46:3 “Kokapata ebuku ka eupal, Kikunyakis ejie!"
Jeremiah46:4 Kopesikis nupetan abalasin; Kibwanenoto, yes ikebwanenok! Kiderakinos, konapitos abokoikus nuka aisrrun; Kopwata akwaras, konapitos ikootin luka asua!"
Jeremiah46:5 Kanukinyo aanyunia? Aburut, abonosi kau. Ebironor ikiriginikee, Ido anemesiaros, mam enoliarctc kau. Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ejai etasuro owaitin kere!"
Jeremiah46:6 Kinyeis luetiroko akerit, Karaida ekirigi aiku; Kari naka agolitomei kariri naka ecor Eupurate, Eguikis, ebiroros."
Jeremiah46:7 Iŋai bo ŋin yenenyouni kwape Nile, Kwape ieorin lukibukas akipikec?"
Jeremiah46:8 Anyou Misiri kwape Nile, Ibukas akekipi kwape icorin. Kobala ebe, Anyouni, karapak akwap kere; Amudiari ere ka ŋul da luibojete kotoma."
Jeremiah46:9 Kodokasi yesi, ibalasin; Kikerepikis yesi, agalin! Kolomasi ikirigin; Ituŋa luka Etiopia ka Put luekapitos iupalin; Ituŋa da luka Lud, luekapitos luikesito da akabwai,"
Jeremiah46:10 Naarai apaaran ŋin erai naka EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ajoresio, Apaaran naka enyaŋit, inyanakini lukasurupoke. Enyami ekileŋ, imonikini da, Ido emasi aokotokec itekori eut. Naarai ejai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ajoresio, asubanit Akwap naka ari naka agolitomei, Kariri naka ecor Eupurate."
Jeremiah46:11 Kodoka Gilead, kolem emina, Ŋo akoku nabekot nako Misiri! Itwasamai taai ikee luipu: Komamei aŋaleun kamakon."
Jeremiah46:12 Eirasi atekerin ikonileic, Elelebun akoniimony akwap; Naarai eriama ekirigi ka ekirigi, Ebiroros kere nepepe.”"
Jeremiah46:13 Akirot naalimokini EJAKAIT enabi Yeremia, kwape ebunio Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon amudiar akwap nako Misiri."
Jeremiah46:14 “Kolimosi koMisiri, kitisiarikis ko Migidol, Kitisiarikis koNop, ka Ta-panes; Kineras atiar, ‘Kobwou, kokapakin; Naarai anyam ekileŋ iwaitinikon.’"
Jeremiah46:15 Kanukinyo amearere ikonikirigin? Mam ebwouna, naarai EJAKAIT erenet,"
Jeremiah46:16 Esiguik luipu, eebo, ebironoros, Kobalas ebe, ‘Kanyoutu, Kabonosi otunawok, akwap nakobuwok, Akerit ekileŋ lokireit.’"
Jeremiah46:17 Konyarata Parao, ekabaka loko Misiri ekekiror, ‘Ekepopolan loitumori apak titai.’"
Jeremiah46:18 “Ebala Ekabaka, ekekiror EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, ebe, Kwape ajaria, abeit kwape Tabor oroŋan, Ido kwape Karamel ariri kaŋolol, Ebuni ŋesi."
Jeremiah46:19 Wu jo apese naiboie koMisiri, Kitemok iboro lukinatarere; Naarai eraun Nop ameje, Icweio, komamei yeniboikin."
Jeremiah46:20 “Erai Misiri ataok naejok noi; Konye enyouni ekamonit kagolitomei, kobunok ŋes."
Jeremiah46:21 Ido ituŋake lukeropit kotomake esubito bala itak luetumito; Naarai abonosi kesi da, akerata nepepe, Mam ebwouna: Naarai adolok kes apaaran naka icanikec, Apak naka aiticaniokec."
Jeremiah46:22 “Tnororaar eporotokec kwape emun loeliat; Naarai eraeete lukasurupokec alosit aiore, Elosete kokapito aepei, Kwape ikaiepak ikito."
Jeremiah46:23 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ejepete amagoroke, Karaida mam epedori aitorio; Naarai itelekarito kesi emaase kaipues; Ido mam imarunos."
Jeremiah46:24 Irumete apese nako Misiri ileje; Ŋaikinio akan naka ituŋa luka agolitomei.”
Jeremiah46:25 Ebala EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Edeke Ioka Isirael ebe: “Koany, eticani Amon loka No, ka Parao, ka Misiti, ka ikedekesio ka ikabakanake da; Parao ka nul da luemunosi ŋes."
Jeremiah46:26 Akorakini kes akan naka nul kaluemoete akeceiiar, kakan naka Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon, ka akan da naka ikekeiaanakinak, Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kokau iboikinos ituŋa, kwape apaarasia nukolosek."
Jeremiah46:27 “Konye sirikiyoŋ, ijo Yakob, ekakejaanakinan, Kwabo sirikiibur, ijo Isirael: Naarai koany, ketajari jo kama elwana, Ka akoniwur da kakwap naka aiioreoriokec. Eboŋuni Yakob, iyamakin ijamamai, Emameuni do yenitukuriani."
Jeremiah46:28 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Sirikiyoŋ, ijo Yakob ekakejaanakinan, Naarai ajaenena kaio, Naarai apiari atekerin kere nukerenearit, Konye jo, mam kapiari eut. Naarai kaleconori jo motimot, Kwabo mam kenyeini cut komam keticanenenei.”"
Jeremiah47:1 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naabu kobu mama ejai enabi Yeremia nuka Ipilisitian, koroko Parao emudiara Gasa."
Jeremiah47:2 “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Koany, edakunos akip kagolitomei, Eraunete kesi ecor loelelei; Eleleete kesi toma akwap ka iboro kere da luejaas toma, Ore ka luibojete kotoma. Emonyete ituŋa, Ibwololoete kere luibojete kotoma,"
Jeremiah47:3 Kanuka aruo naka imageger luekarabete luka ikagogonokoke, Amositoi naka agalinike, aikururitoi naka ikokoron, Mam lukapapa keŋolianarete kau mama ejaas idwekec, Naarai alaiakakas akaninikee,"
Jeremiah47:4 Kanuka apaaran naebuni aŋatar Ipilisitian kere, Amudiar ŋolikeŋarakinan kere Loideuna koTuro ka Sidon. Naarai enatari EJAKAIT Ipilisitian, Aatoŋot naka apuian naka Kaputor,"
Jeremiah47:5 Adoloki epata Gasa; Etamamaun Asukelon. Ŋo aatoŋot naka aditotokec, Itodoli ai agera?"
Jeremiah47:6 Wu jo ekileŋ loka EJAKAIT! Itodoli ai komam iyeŋuni? Koloma toma akurarukon; Kiyeŋu, kililiŋ!"
Jeremiah47:7 Ipedori bi ai aiyeŋun, Arai kieorakinit EJAKAIT? Ecorakinit mama ejai Asukelon, Ka ariri naka aŋolol.”"
Jeremiah48:1 Nuka Moab. Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, Edeke loka Isirael cbe: “Itukwi Nebo! naarai eswap! Esurumi Kiriataim ileje, enataritai. Esurumi Misigab ileje, atiyatiyai;"
Jeremiah48:2 Emamei bobo aiturio nako Moab. Enerakin aronis kotoma Kesibon ebe, ‘Kopotu, kamudiasi kinyek araun ateker!’ Ŋo da, wu Madumen, kiaililinio; Kirukitori ekileŋ."
Jeremiah48:3 “Eporoto laka ecelet loebuni koKoronaim, ‘Aiŋat, ka amudiar naepo!!’"
Jeremiah48:4 Amudiar Moab; Apupun aimony naka idweke ludidik.
Jeremiah48:5 Naarai kaneedokere Lukit edokarete Komonyenenete akiyo; Naarai kaneejesarere Koronaim, Apotu kopuputu aimony nakiean naka amudiario."
Jeremiah48:6 Kokera! Kitajarata akusiijar! Kosubata bala ekiot loka amodiŋ!
Jeremiah48:7 Naarai kanuka amunokina aswamisiokon, Ka abarakon jo da kikamario: Ŋoreorio Kemos, ka isasedotinike, Ka ikapolokoke da nepepe."
Jeremiah48:8 Edolokini ekaŋatan nolire, Emameun ere loekui; Eoliori aditot, emudiario da apuuton; Kwape enerar EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah48:9 “Koinak Moab abebenoka, Kopororia kolot; Eraunos ikereria amejei, Komamei da yeniboie kotoma."
Jeremiah48:10 “Kikenoi nin yenipalisikini aswam naka EJAKAIT; kikenoi da ijin yenirebokini ekileŋ kinyek abukor aokot.
Jeremiah48:11 “Ŋamamai Moab ageun keiditeuke, Ŋililiara akesidak; Komam ailocoloeoo anyoun kobore kiton obore, Ido mam ijoreoritai; Kanuka nun eroko esalit akejijim tomake, Ido mam auresike iiulakina."
Jeremiah48:12 “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Aso koany, epote apaarasia nueiukunia nul luebukonorete, ido ebukonorete ŋes; itoonete amotiike, ebwanabwangaete da acupaike."
Jeremiah48:13 Irumete Moab ileic kanuka Kemos, kwape erumiata ileic ekek loka Isirael kanuka Bet-el loamunokina."
Jeremiah48:14 “Ibalasi ai ebe, ‘Kirai ikirigin Ka Iuetirin kojie’?"
Jeremiah48:15 Ebala Ekabaka, ekekiror EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe, Adoku ekamudiaran loka Moab ka ireriake, Ekokorioros ikatumunakake luseuna oarit,"
Jeremiah48:16 Eapiete iean luka Moab adolun, Arurukun aiticanitoike."
Jeremiah48:17 Kokuudianata ŋes, yes kere luirimorito, Ka yes da kere luijenete ekekiror; Kobalas ebe, ‘Abila ca ma ebela lokagogon, Esuretait loejok!’"
Jeremiah48:18 “Wu jo apese naiboie kotoma Dibon, Kikokoror anyoun kaibusesukon, Kiboikin, koiakite akure. Naarai kibunok ekamudiaran loka Moab, Amudia abwasinakon nuegogon,"
Jeremiah48:19 Wu jo yeniboie kotoma Aroer, Kobwou korot airot: Kiŋit loekeri ka nin da naekui; Kiner ebe, ‘Anyoika bo?’"
Jeremiah48:20 Esurumi Moab ileic, naarai abilibiliun; Kibwololoro, komonyata! Kolimosi kotoma Arunon ebe, Eswap Moab."
Jeremiah48:21 “Adoloki atubokinio akwap naka apuutona; Kolon, ka Yasa, ka Mepaat,"
Jeremiah48:22 ka Dibon, ka Nebo, ka Bet-dibilataim;"
Jeremiah48:23 ka Kiriataim, ka Betgamul, ka Bet-meon;"
Jeremiah48:24 ka Keriot, ka Bosura, ka ireria kere luka akwap nako Moab, lueiaas kama elwana, ka lueapiete da."
Jeremiah48:25 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Atubor amumwarat naka Moab, abila akekan da."
Jeremiah48:26 “Kitemerata ŋes, naarai itopolooro kama ejai EJAKAIT; imodumodun Moab kalekanake, imuario da."
Jeremiah48:27 Naarai mam kereka kerai Isirael eimuaritono kamakon? Aponi kereka kodumakinai kidiŋ kikokolak? Naarai nainerenenar nuke, imunimuŋi akonikou."
Jeremiah48:28 “Yes luibojete koMoab, konyoutu koreria, Kiboioto katiiba! Kosuba bala adudumer naiswamai akaike Ariri kaituk naka ebur."
Jeremiah48:29 Kipupu nuka eitur loka Moab, Ebe iturokina noi; Aitopolooroke, ka eiturike, aomiarake, Ka aisoŋolonut da naka crauke."
Jeremiah48:30 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ajeni ekepali; Iŋalaŋalai ailabilabake, Iŋalaŋalaete da akeswamisio."
Jeremiah48:31 Ŋes ebwololoo kanuka Moab; Eebo, adelori kanuka Moab kere: Ebworo kanuka ituŋa luka Kir-kercs,"
Jeremiah48:32 Wu jo emusabibu loka Sibima, Amonyi akiyo kanukon, adepar aimony naka Yaser; Apesito akonitenun adepar aŋolol, Kodolot aŋolol naka Yaser; Ebirokin ekaŋatan araitokon nuka akamu, Ka ludwenyanakon."
Jeremiah48:33 Alemar aiyalama ka alakara komanikoria lupusuk kakwap nako Moab; Ido etoonikini ebino kotoma acuesia; Emameuni yenicakacakai keibwon; Acela ŋin mam erai acela naka eibwoŋ.
Jeremiah48:34 “Ageun kaimony naka Kesibon, aitodol Eleale, kiton Yakas da ekeseut ikeeeporotoi, ageun koSoar, aitodol Koronaim, kiton Egilat-selisiya, Naarai asilioros da akip nuka Nimirim,"
Jeremiah48:35 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Bobo da etanaŋi kotoma Moab yeneinakini asuban kaiboisio nuiceleleete, ka nin da yenisupurikini ikedekesio lukisupurununo."
Jeremiah48:36 Kanuka nun emonyi ekatau kanuka Moab kwape alamarun, emonyi ekatau kwape alamarun kanuka ituŋa luka Kir-keres: kanuka ŋun aolio abar naatukonokinit."
Jeremiah48:37 “Naarai ejai ninikou epat, ebarenito nolipenek: egerer akanin kere, ejai epuko aŋabes,"
Jeremiah48:38 Ejai akuudian kokuju otogoi kere luka Moab, korotinike da kere; naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Abwan Moab kwape amot namam kesiyalamikinit."
Jeremiah48:39 Abwana ca! Ebwololoto ca! Ebeloki ca ma Moab asebot kileic! Eraun do Moab naimuario naituburuni ŋul kere luirimorito ŋes.”
Jeremiah48:40 Naarai inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Koany, eporori kwape kemorukaalet, Loeterari akebebenoka asurokin Moab."
Jeremiah48:41 Erumi Keriot, isirienunio abwasin nukagogon, Eraunos itauon luka ikirigin luka Moab kapaaran kaŋin, Kwape etau loka aberu naerieba aidoun."
Jeremiah48:42 Emudiario Moab komam bobo eraun ateker, Naarai itopolooro kama ejai EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah48:43 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Wu jo loiboie koMoab, Kibunokinete jo etasuro, ka aipany, ka ataeit da,"
Jeremiah48:44 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, ŋol loekeri kotasuro ibirokin aipany; Ŋol da loekui kaipany, ipoki atacit: Naarai ainuni Moab nun, Okaru loka aitieanioke."
Jeremiah48:45 “Ebwoete luekerete komamei agogoŋ Kotolim loka Kesibon; Naarai alom akim koKesibon, Alomut aipelonoreta nuka akim kokidin Sikon; Anyamata agor naka Moab, Ka aboko da naka akwes nuka luecelas."
Jeremiah48:46 Itukwi, ijo Moab! Aoliosi ituŋa luka Kemos: Naarai ijoreoritai ikusidwe lusap, Akusipesur da ijoreoritai."
Jeremiah48:47 Konye ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Abeit enyakuni bobo aijoreorio naka Moab Kapaarasia nukawasia.” Adol ber ne atubokinio naka Moab."
Jeremiah49:1 Nuka idwe luka Amon. Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Emameete teni Isirael idwe lusap? Emamei kereka ekeruman? Aso kanukinyo irumia Malakam Gad, Iboioto da ituŋake koreriake?"
Jeremiah49:2 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Aso koany, epote apaarasia Nuetupupunio elala loka ejie Asurokin Raba loka idwe luka Amon; Eraun ameie naesilior, Icwei akim akepesur. Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kosodi lsirael airum lulem irumito ŋes."
Jeremiah49:3 “Kibwolol, ijo Kesibon, naarai anasi Ai! Kikalalata, yes apesur nuka Raba! Konapata ipukoi, Kokuudianata, kokerata niniibois kere kabwasin! Naarai ijoreorio Malakam, Ka isasedotinike ka ikapolokoke da nepepe."
Jeremiah49:4 Kanukinyo iwolobobotor kaditon, Aditotokon naelelei, Ijo apese naebononori kau? Naemunokina abarake, kobala ebe, ‘Iŋai bo kabunokini?’"
Jeremiah49:5 Ebala EJAKAIT Edeke loka aioresio ebe, Koany, kainuni akurian, Kotoma kere lukirimorito; Kireneario yes ŋinituŋanan neelwana noi, ido emamei yenetukonokini Iuiposiaros."
Jeremiah49:6 Konye ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kokau enyakuni bobo aijoreorio naka idwe luka Amon.”"
Jeremiah49:7 Nuka Edom. Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe: “Emamei kereka bobo acoa koTeman? Aolio ca ainerun kotoma omisioitin? Elicar eut acoakec?
Jeremiah49:8 Kokerata, koboŋ utu, konopa, Yes luibojete koDedan; Naarai ainuni Esau ican, Kapak naetieania ŋes."
Jeremiah49:9 Arai kiponikinitos ikadenok luka emusabibu Mam ti kedepanasi ace? Arai kiponikinitos ikokolak kuare, Mam tikemudiasi aitodol neeupiata?"
Jeremiah49:10 Konye edokidokoorit eoŋ Esau, Apukorit akeiboisio nukaiyeiyea, Mam epedori aiŋop. Amudiar aurike, ka ikeinaean, ka ikeidunyeta da; Ŋes da arumor."
Jeremiah49:11 Kinyek ikonidwe eraas ikokiok, Edari eoŋ koraut luejarete; Ka akonipuserun da kamunokinos eoŋ.”"
Jeremiah49:12 Naarai inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Koany, nul lumam ebusakinit aimat kadere abeit emasete; ijo da ŋolloikui cut komam kitieanio? Mam eut ikui aitieanio, konye abeit imasi."
Jeremiah49:13 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Eyapoikin elopet ebe eraun Bosura aumokinet, ka amorosit, ka ameie, ka ekenit da; eraunete ikereria kere amejei nutir.”"
Jeremiah49:14 Eira akiro nuepote kama ejai EJAKAIT, Iyakuunitai ekiyakia katekerin ebala ebe: “Kotukonokinos nepepe, kosurokis, Konyout kojioto!"
Jeremiah49:15 Naarai koany, ketidisiari jo kotoma atekerin, Ainakin da ituŋa aimwaŋ jo."
Jeremiah49:16 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kimodata jo airukurianetakon nusogim, Ka aisoŋolonut nakotaukon, Ŋo loiboie kabuai nuka atiida, Loirumit aidi naka eukot. Karaida kiduki akonikai kuiu kwape kemorukaalet, Ketodokuni kaŋina."
Jeremiah49:17 “Eraun Edom aumokinet: eumokini ŋinituŋanan yenitori, isuari kanuka aitieanetake kere."
Jeremiah49:18 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kwape amudiarere Sodom ka Gomora ka ireria kere luidunyatar, emameun ituŋanan yenejaun ŋina, kwabo emameun ikoku yenika ituŋanan yeniboikin nen."
Jeremiah49:19 Koany, edokari kwape eŋatuny loebuni kamoni naka Yorodan asurokin aibois naegogoŋ: konye etekeri ŋes katipet; ido adakakini nin yenaseuni ayait ŋes, Naarai iŋai bo eputosi keoŋ? Ido iŋai bo kebwaikini apak? Iŋai da ekeeokon lokabwoikini eoŋ?"
Jeremiah49:20 Aso kiirasi ainerun naka EJAKAIT, naeneru kanuka Edom; kanun nuelosikinit mama ejaas luibojete koTeman: abeit iriarete kesi ludidik luka esipan; abeit eburunete anukiakee kanukee."
Jeremiah49:21 Emarani akwap kanuka epororo loka aibirorikec; ejai acalanari, epupunio eporotoke kAŋolol Nakarenan."
Jeremiah49:22 Koany, edokari eporori kwape kemorukaalet, loeterari akebebenoka asurokin Bosura: eraunos itauon luka ikirigin luka Edom kapaaran kaŋin kwape etau laka aberu naerieba aidoun.”"
Jeremiah49:23 Nuka Damasiko. “Erumata Kamat ileje, ka Arapad da; Naarai eirasi akiro nueroko, Ajurununata itauon; Iyalononoete kwape aŋolol namam inapakina."
Jeremiah49:24 Aleiekar Damasiko, ebelokin akerit, Ekamu amaran; Adumu ariebo ka iean, Kwape aberu naerieba aidoun."
Jeremiah49:25 Kanukinyo mam inyeinere ere loka aiturit, Ere loka akaiyalama?"
Jeremiah49:26 Ebala EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe, Kanuka nun ŋes ibironokinotor ikekatumunak orotinike, Emudiario da ikajiokoke kere kapaaran kaŋin,"
Jeremiah49:27 Ido enokokini akim arwatatin nuka Damasiko, Iewei itogoi lukapolok luka Ben-kadad.”"
Jeremiah49:28 Nuka Kedar, ka ajakanuto nuka Kasor, nuamudiari Nebukadaresar eka baka loko Babulon. Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Konyoutu, kodokasi Kedar! Konata idwe lukokide!"
Jeremiah49:29 Elemunete iwemanakee ka isipaninikec; Aigalisiokee, ka iborokec kere, Edemarete da akaalaikee: Ilulukinere ebe, ‘Erum etasuro iwaitin kere!’"
Jeremiah49:30 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kokera, koriariata, konopata, Yes luibojete koKasor: Naarai eneru Nebukadaresar ekabaka loka Babulon nukasurokin yes, Apet nuelosikinit aiswamakin yes."
Jeremiah49:31 “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Konyoutu, kodokasi mama ejai ateker naijamamai, Naiboie inapakina; Naemameete irutei karaida ariino, Naiboie egitara,"
Jeremiah49:32 Eraunete akaalaikec iŋatan, Isipanin da lukibarenekee lukoran. Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Esiarakini luekebito arokio mama ejaas ikwamin kere, Ido ainuni kes ican luepote kowaitin kere,"
Jeremiah49:33 Eraun Kasor aibois naka ikuwei naiboienenoto, Ameje namam edaun: Emamuun ituŋanan ycnejaun ŋina, Kwabo emamuun ikoku yenika irunanan yeniboikin nen.”"
Jeremiah49:34 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naabukobu mama ejai enabi Yeremia nuka Elam, napegeuni Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda airum, kobala ebe:"
Jeremiah49:35 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe: Koany, abili akabwa naka Elam, ŋes amun naka agogonokec."
Jeremiah49:36 Ainuni Elam ikwamin iwonon anyoun kariino aoŋon nuka akuj, ido eweliwelari mama ejaas ikwamin ŋul kere; emameun areker namam edolete luerenearitai luka Elam,"
Jeremiah49:37 Ainakin Elam aburun kakonyen nuka lukasurupokec, kakonyen da nuka ŋul kaluemooto aiiarakec. Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ainuni kes aronis, ŋes akanyunyura naededen, eiukuni ekileŋ arukio kes, aitodol neamudiaria kes."
Jeremiah49:38 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ebwaikini ekaicolon Elam, amudiari kanen ekabaka ka ikapolok da."
Jeremiah49:39 “Konye ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kapaarasia nukawasia, enyakuni bobo aijorcorio naka Elam.”"
Jeremiah50:1 Akirot naabu EJAKAIT kiner kama ka Yeremia enabi kanuka Babulon, kanuka akwap naka Ikaludean, ebe:"
Jeremiah50:2 “Kolimosi kotoma atekerin, kitejenut da, Kikiasi emedera, Kiteienut, Sirikimunonikis: kineras atiar, ‘Aŋatar Babulon, Erumata Bel ileic, Eyalonoŋ Merodak, Erumata aputosiake ileje, Iyalononoete akeputosia nuegerer.’"
Jeremiah50:3 “Naarai enyouni ateker kagolitomei asurokin ŋes, itisili akekwap, komameun yeniboie kotoma; akerata, aloto, ituŋa ka itiaŋ da."
Jeremiah50:4 “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kapaarasia kakwa, kapak kaŋin da, epote idwe luka Isirael, kes nepepe ka idwe luka Yuda; emonyete elosete, komootos EJAKAIT Ekecedeke."
Jeremiah50:5 Inisete nuka Sion, kotereitos ereetakec nina, koba las ebe, ‘Kopotu, kemorikikinos ka EJAKAIT kaitutuket namam edaun namam imurwokinio.’"
Jeremiah50:6 “Araur ikatuŋa amerekekin nukeoliorete; erooliosi ikecokokokec, etapaasi oroŋan: anyout koronat kiton oukor, imurwokinito nekeuriakenenata."
Jeremiah50:7 Anyamata kere lukeanyunete: kobalas lukasurupokec ebe, ‘Mam kigwaunit akiro, naarai adiakasi kama ejai EJAKAIT, aiboisikec nakabeit, ŋes EJAKAIT, amun naka lukapapaakee.’"
Jeremiah50:8 “Kokerata kokidin naka Babulon, konyoutu kakwap naka Ikaludean, kosubata bala ikorwa kakonyen nuka isipanin."
Jeremiah50:9 Naarai koany, etwekenyuni etodokari da atukot naka atekerin nukapolok asurokin Babulon, nuepote kagolitomei: iderakinos asurokin ŋes: ameun kanen eŋatario. Eraunos ikeeekojoi bala luka ikirigin luenaikinito, lumam eboŋunete epalapalato,"
Jeremiah50:10 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Eŋatario Kaludea: imonikinos kere luenatarete Ŋes,"
Jeremiah50:11 “Naarai iyalamas, naarai ibwoŋas, Yes luinatasi akairumet, Naarai ieuros kwape ataok naieakaeakai akima, Icieinas kwape abalasin nuegogoŋ;"
Jeremiah50:12 Irumete totokus ileje noi; Itirirai ŋin nakiwuruuni, Koany, eraun ŋesi awasia naka atekerin, Amodiŋ, akwap nalarion, elet."
Jeremiah50:13 Kanuka anyunyura naka EJAKAIT mam iboikinoi, Konye eraun asilio: Eumokin nin yenitori Babulon, Isuari icanike kere."
Jeremiah50:14 Kiderakinos asurokin Babulon kowaitin kere, Yes kere luikesito akabwai; Kogumata ŋes, sirikitasalata imalia; Naarai adiaka kama ejai EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah50:15 Kikeseut elala kowaitin kere, Alo akanin; Ebiroros apetetake, Atiyanar akerwatatin. Naarai lo ŋes enyaŋit loka EJAKAIT; Kinyanakis; Kwape kolo eswamaa, Kiswamakis ŋes kwaŋin,"
Jeremiah50:16 Komudiasi yeneyei koBabulon, Ka yenekapit ekurupeta kapak naka aisak: Kanuka aiyoŋ ekileŋ loereit, Eboŋori ŋinituŋanan mama ejaas iketuŋa, Ekeri ninitunanan akwap nakobukee."
Jeremiah50:17 “Isirael ŋes amerekek namejat; ereneata iŋatunyo, Kisiau ekabaka loka Asuria ainyam, ka Nebukadaresar lo ekabaka loko Babulon, ŋes lokawasia ekoe akekojo."
Jeremiah50:18 Ŋes inerar kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Koany, etieani ekabaka loko Babulon ka akekwap, kwape abu keticania ekabaka loka Asuria."
Jeremiah50:19 Ido enyakuni Isirael bobo toma oronyiake, ido edakenena ŋesi Karamel ka Basan, imonikini eketau koukon luka Epuraim ka Gilead da,"
Jeremiah50:20 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kapaarasia kanun, kapak kaŋin, emootai numam adolit nuka Isirael, kwabo emameete; aronisio da nuka Yuda, kwabo mam etakanunete: naarai esioniei ŋul lualeleni araun aatoŋot,"
Jeremiah50:21 “Kodokasi asurokin akwap naka Merataim, Kosurokis da luibojete koPekod, Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Koara, komudiasi eut atupakin kes, Kiswamata kere nuabu kecorak."
Jeremiah50:22 Ejai eeelet loka ejie toma akwap, Ka amudiar naepol!"
Jeremiah50:23 Aiepar cama anyuli naka akwap kere, abila ca! Aluor eama Babulon ameje kokidin atekerin!"
Jeremiah50:24 Abu kalok jo, ipok da, ijo Babulon, Mam ibu kojen: Itakanu, kikamun da, Naarai ipegata ka EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah50:25 Anaa EJAKAIT akeinadis, Alemu lujiis luka anyunyurake, Naarai ejai EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Aswam naelosi aswam kaŋina, Kakwap naka Ikaludean."
Jeremiah50:26 Kopotu kosurokis anyoun kanoliikoru, Kodakasi asotoi nuka idulake; Kotukonosi atukon, Kosodete amudiar cut: Sirikitasala imodiobore kere."
Jeremiah50:27 Koarata imasenikoke kere; Kijesaros oarit. Itukwi kes! Naarai adolu akeeepaaran, Apak naka aitieaniokec."
Jeremiah50:28 “Iporotoi luka nul kaluekerete aiku anyoun kakwap nako Babulon, alimor koSion enyaijit loka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, ainyaŋ eyekaluke."
Jeremiah50:29 “Konyarautu ikagumak imalia asurokin Babulon, nul kere luikesete akabwai. Kidukuro airigaun; sirikeku imodioke. Kotaeakis kwape ajaar aswamuke; kere nuabu kiswama, kiswamakis ŋes da: naarai iwonono kama ejai EJAKAIT, kama ejai Ekalaunan loka Isirael."
Jeremiah50:30 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kanuka nun ŋes ibirokinotor ikekatumunak orotinike, emudiario da ikajiokoke kere kapaaran kaŋin."
Jeremiah50:31 “Ebala EJAKAIT, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, Koany, kasurokin eoŋ jo, ijo ekewonot, Naarai adolo akonipaaran, Apak naketieania."
Jeremiah50:32 Iguikini ekewonot ibiror, Ido emameun yenitonyouni: Esinepikini akim oreriake, Enyami da nul kere luirimorito."
Jeremiah50:33 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe: Ereitai idwe luka Isirael ka idwe luka Yuda; ŋul da kere luapotu kijoreosi kes eridakinito; eŋerito aosikin.
Jeremiah50:34 Egogoŋ Ekalakunanikee, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ŋes ekekiror. Abeit epuri kanukee, tetere isinapikini akwap, konye isiyalononoi luibojete koBabulon."
Jeremiah50:35 “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Esurokini ekileŋ Ikaludean, Ka luibojete koBabulon, Ka ikapolokoke, ka lukaeoake da."
Jeremiah50:36 Esurokini ekileŋ ikelabilabak, Koluoros ibaŋiok: Esurokini ekileŋ ikiriginike, Eburunete."
Jeremiah50:37 Esurokini ekileŋ abalasinikee, ka agalinikec, Ka ituŋa kere luinyalinyaluna luejaas kokidinike, Eraunos nul bala aŋor. Esurokini ekileŋ abarake, Eŋatario."
Jeremiah50:38 Eŋaikin akamu akipike, eokete! Naarai erai akwap naka aputosia nuegerer, Abanakaros kotoma aputosia,"
Jeremiah50:39 “Kanuka nun iboikinos itian luka ais nepepe kiku wei Babulon, iboikinos ikuului da ŋina: mam bobo ejaikinos ituŋa ikar kere; ido mam iboikinos ituŋa aturio katurio,"
Jeremiah50:40 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kwape kolo ebiroria Edeke Sodom ka Gomora ka ireria kere luedunyatar, kwaŋin emameun ituŋanan yeneiaun ŋina, karaida ikoku yenika ituŋanan yeniboiororoi nen."
Jeremiah50:41 “Koany, epote ituŋa kagolitomei; Ateker napeti, Isikwenyunio ikabakan luipu Anyoun kosaneta luka akwap."
Jeremiah50:42 Ekapetc akabwai ka akwaras; Ededeŋ, emamei da aitim; Irurumai eporotokec bala aŋolol, Ibwanenitos abalasin; Ederakinos mamakon kwape ikajiok, Ŋo apese naka Babulon."
Jeremiah50:43 “Eira ekabaka loka Babulon eemutokee, Alajakakata akaninike; Adita akirot etauke, Ka ariebo kwape naka aberu kanaerieba aidoun."
Jeremiah50:44 “Koany, edokari kwape eŋatuny loebuni kamo ni naka Yorodan asurokin aibois naegogon; konye etekeri kes katipet; ido adakakini ayait ŋes ŋin yenaseuni. Naarai iŋai tope eputosi keoŋ? Ido iijai kebwaikin apak? Iŋai da ekeeokon lokabwoikin eoŋ?"
Jeremiah50:45 Aso kiirasi ainerun naka EJAKAIT, naeneru kanuka Babulon; kanun nuelosikinit mama ejai akwap naka Ikaludean: Abeit iriete kesi ludidik luka esipan; abeit ekuriakaros aiboisiokec kanukec."
Jeremiah50:46 Emarani akwap kanuka eeelet loka aŋatar Babulon, epupunio adelonorike kotoma atekerin.”"
Jeremiah51:1 Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Koany, etonyouni ekwam loemudiari Asurokinia Babulon, Ka nul da kere luibojete ko Kaludea."
Jeremiah51:2 Ejukakini luepiesete Babulon, Ikekeete ŋes, Epiarete akwap: Naarai esurokinete kowaitin kere Kapaaran naka icano"
Jeremiah51:3 Lokakabwa sirikiket akabwake, Ido sirikebwo konapite anapitoke naka asua, Sirikitimo ikatumunakake; Komudiasi cut ajoreke kere."
Jeremiah51:4 Ibirokinos lueario akwap naka Ikaludean, Luimusunitai da orotinike."
Jeremiah51:5 Naarai Edeke, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio Mam ejalit Isirael ka Yuda; Karaida kileleba akwapukec adiakanareta Kama ejai Ekalaunan loka Isirael,"
Jeremiah51:6 “Kokerata anyoun koBabulon, Kitajar ŋinitunanan akeijar! Kinyeis amudiario kanumam adoliteke: Naarai erai apak naka enyaŋit loka EJAKAIT, Etacakini ŋes eropitike."
Jeremiah51:7 Kerai Babulon aikopo naka esabu kakan naka EJAKAIT, Naitemerikinia akwap kere; Amata atekerin ebinoke; Kanuka ŋun ikerepikinito atekerin."
Jeremiah51:8 Ebiror Babulon katipet ido amudiar; Kibwololoto kanukeŋ! Kolemikisi ekia kanuka arieboke, Diat itaŋaleunio,"
Jeremiah51:9 Tikiitanaleu Babulon, Konye mam itanaleun, Koiala do ŋes, Kaloto ŋinituŋanan obukec: Naarai adol aketubokinio toma akui, Ikiariokiton odouon"
Jeremiah51:10 Etolom EJAKAIT adolitewok; Kopotu, kalimosi koSion Aswamisio nuka EJAKAIT Edekewok."
Jeremiah51:11 “Kipena imalia! Kokapa ibukui! Esidik EJAKAIT itauon luka ikabakan luka Imedin; naarai elosikinit amudiar Babulon; naarai erai enyaŋit loka EJAKAIT, ainyaŋ eyekaluke."
Jeremiah51:12 Kikeut emedera asurokinia arwatatin nuka Babulon; Kitogogoŋoto eidare; Kibwaikis ikedarak; Kitemokis ikaperunok; Naarai elosikinit EJAKAIT, ido eswama Nuenerakinit luibojete koBabulon."
Jeremiah51:13 Yes luibojete kakipi nuipu, Luidila abar, Adol awasiakus, Etiai loka eranakus."
Jeremiah51:14 Eyapo EJAKAIT loka ajoresio elimit elopet ebe, Abeit kesilelebikini ituŋa, kwape enyede; Ikalalaete eibwoŋ kamakon."
Jeremiah51:15 “Kanuka apedorike abu kosub alup, Kanuka acoake abu kiticat akwap, Kanuka aijeneke da abu kopesik akuj."
Jeremiah51:16 Naikeseunia eporotoke, ejai airurum naka akipi toma akuj, Ido itodokaari elisina anyoun kosaŋeta luka akwap. Iswamakini akiru eimilia, Itolomuni da ekwam kaiŋadisiake."
Jeremiah51:17 Araun ninitunanan bala etiaŋ, emamei aiicn; Aputoke naegerer isurumi nelikatatan-esabu ileje: Naarai erai aputoke naeealara aiŋal, Emamei eiyeŋane kotomake,"
Jeremiah51:18 Eraas aamameak, aswam naka aiŋal: Kapak naka aiticaniokec eoliorete."
Jeremiah51:19 Mam akorakinet naka Yakob eputosi kaŋun; Naarai erai ŋesi lokasuban iboro kerc, Isirael da ŋes ateker naka airumuke; EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ŋes ekekiror."
Jeremiah51:20 “Irai ijo aepeka ka lujiisika; Kabilibilia jo atekerin, Kamudiaria ajakanuto,"
Jeremiah51:21 Kabilibilia jo ebalasi ka ekebwanenonike;
Jeremiah51:22 Kabilibilia jo agali ka ekereneanike; Kabilibilia jo ekiliokit ka aberu; Kabilibilia jo emojoŋ ka esapat; Kabilibilia jo ekatumunan ka apese;
Jeremiah51:23 Kabilibilia jo ekecokon ka ekesipan; Kabilibilia jo ekakorion ka imoŋin luka ajookotoke; Kabilibilia jo ikayaitok ka ikapolokitok.
Jeremiah51:24 “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Atacakini Babulon ka luibojete koKaludea kere kakonyenekus aronisikec kere naapotu kiswamakis Sion."
Jeremiah51:25 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Koany, kasurokini jo, ijo eronat ekamudiaran, Loimudiari akwap kere; Ekiari eoŋ akakan asurokinia jo, Kekokori jo katiiban, Ketuluori jo eron at loidopi."
Jeremiah51:26 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mam elemunio kamakon amoru araun naka agor, Karaida amoru araun apetetait, Konye isilior do ikar kere,"
Jeremiah51:27 “Kikeut emedera kakwap, Kokuta arupepe katekerin, Kitemokis atekerin ejie kaŋes, Konyaraut ajakanuto, Nuka Ararat, ka Mini ka Asukenas ejie kaŋes; Koyautu ibalasin kwape enyede loikirimigito ajul."
Jeremiah51:28 Kitemokis atekerin ejie kaŋes, Ikabakan luka Imedin, ka ikayaitokokee, ka ikegaŋitokoke kere, Ka akwap kere naka ayaiteke."
Jeremiah51:29 Emarani akwap, erieba; Naarai itodolikinio nuelosikinit EJAKAIT asurokinia Babulon, Aitisilio akwap nako Babulon, Komameun yeniboie kotoma."
Jeremiah51:30 Enyeis ikirigin luka Babulon ejie, Iboiete kaneerigatai; Enoŋarit akecegogoŋ, Araut kwape aŋor; Eewei aiboisioke, Abilas atiketake,"
Jeremiah51:31 Ekerete ikakerak inamunos, Ekerete da ikijukitono iriamunos, Alimokin ekabaka loko Babulon ebe Erumi ereke kowaitin kere."
Jeremiah51:32 Erumutu neesedeny, Icweitai esege, Akuriakaros ikajiok."
Jeremiah51:33 Naarai inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio, Edeke loka Isirael ebe: Esubit akoku naka Babulon bala epejal Kapak naipudapudaere; Esalit apak naedit Kodoli aidwenyeke.”"
Jeremiah51:34 “Kajwenya Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon, Kacuiki, kenyeki aonit, Keliko kwape etiaŋ loeiliili, Esileleb akoikike kanukaiokakaka, Kaeaka,”"
Jeremiah51:35 Etemari yeniboie koSion atiar, “Kobeik Babulon akaie nakeswamakinio eoŋ ka akuanaka.” Etemari Yerusalem da atiar, “Kobeikis akaokot mama ejaas luibojete koKaludea.”"
Jeremiah51:36 Ŋes enerar EJAKAIT kwanata ebe, “Koany, apuri akirokon, kenyatjakini jo, Etoonikini akeŋolol, etoonikini da aketan."
Jeremiah51:37 Eraun Babulon aapoŋor, Aibois naiboioto ikuwei, Aumokinet, aimuario, Komamei yeniboie kotoma."
Jeremiah51:38 “Kiunete nepepe kwape iŋatunyo ludidik; Irurumaete kwape idwe luka iŋatunyo.
Jeremiah51:39 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kemwakuut awatekee, Epoikini kes epucit, etemeri kes, Kolakaros, koiotooros ajo numam enaŋete, Komam akwenyun,"
Jeremiah51:40 Esijesari kes kwape idwe luka amerekekin aario, Kwape imerekekin ka ikorwa."
Jeremiah51:41 “Erumi cama Sesak! Esirieŋun eituritono loka akwap kere! Araun eama Babulon asilio kotoma atekerin!
Jeremiah51:42 Abunok aŋolol Babulon; Arapaa kanuka aipues naka akailanake.
Jeremiah51:43 Araut ireriake asilio, Akwap naconit, amodiŋ da, Akwap namam iboio ituŋanan, Namam itorit okoku loka ituŋanan,"
Jeremiah51:44 Eticani Be! koBabulon, Esilekuni ŋes nuabu kilikono. Mam bobo eleleete atekerin mamake; Ibiror arwatat naka Babulon."
Jeremiah51:45 “Yes ikatuŋa, konyoutu kamaken! Kitajarunos ninitunanan Kanyunyura naededen naka EJAKAIT."
Jeremiah51:46 Kinyeis ikusitauon akiilor, Kwabo sirikiyoŋa kanuka nukabe nuiirario kakwaj, Naarai epote nukabe kokaru ediopet, Kosodi kokau kokaru eee epote nukabe, Ejai akaie da akwap, Ekayaiton ejiosi kecekayaiton."
Jeremiah51:47 “Aso koany, epote apaarasia, Nuetepesenia aputosia nuegerer nuko Babulon; Irumete akwapuke kere ileje; Luke kere lueario ibirokinos kidinike."
Jeremiah51:48 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kosodete akuj ka akwap, Ka iboro kere luejaas toma, Ayoore kanuka aiyalama kanuka Babulon; Naarai epote ikaŋatak mamakeŋ kari naka agolitomei."
Jeremiah51:49 Kwape kibiroria Babulon lukeario luka Isirael, Kwape kwaŋin ibirokinotor lukeario luka akwap kere Babulon,"
Jeremiah51:50 “Yes luikuata ekileŋ, Koloto, sirikibwaata kopalarito! Kiitutu EJAKAIT kama elwana, Ido koloma Yerusalem toma otauonokus."
Jeremiah51:51 Kitirira oni, naarai kipupu amoromoroo; Erumata akonyenewok ileic, Naarai alomasi imo aiboisio nukalaunak Nuka etogo loka EJAKAIT.’"
Jeremiah51:52 “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Aso do koany, epote apaarasia, Nuetepesenia aputosiake nuegerer; Idinyasi Iuimusunito Anatar akwapuke kere,"
Jeremiah51:53 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Karaida kedokarit Babulon kiton akuj, Karaida kitieasit amukurur naka agogoŋuke, Konye epote ikaŋatak neejai kamakaŋ,"
Jeremiah51:54 “Eporoto loka aibworo loebuni koBabulon! Ka loka amudiar naepol Loebuni kakwap naka Ikaludean!
Jeremiah51:55 Naarai eŋasi EJAKAIT Babulon, Ido emudiar eeelet loepol kamaken, Ido irurumaete akailanakec kwape akipi nuipu, Edakun eeelet loka ipororoikec."
Jeremiah51:56 Naarai abunoki ŋes ekaŋatan, Eebo, abunoki Babulon; Aŋatar da ikiriginike, Abilibilunos akabwaikee; Naarai EJAKAIT ŋes Edeke loetaci, Abeit eropi."
Jeremiah51:57 Ebala Ekabaka, ekekiror EJAKAIT loka ajoresio cbe, Eremeri ikapolokoke, ka lukacoake, Ikayaitokoke, ka ikeganirokoke, ka ikiriginike da; Ido eiotooros aio numam enaŋete, Komam ekwenyunete,"
Jeremiah51:58 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe, Etiyatiyao cut arwatat naelal naka Babulon, Icweio iruteike luiceleleete. Itaaritos atekerin aamameak, Itapasitos atekerin kanuka akim.”"
Jeremiah51:59 Akiro nuecorakini Yeremia enabi Seraia okoku loka Neria, okoku loka Maseia, naalosio Babulon nepepe ka Sedekia ekabaka loka Yuda kokaru lokiwononet loka airumuke. Kerai Seraia ekapolon loka inyamat."
Jeremiah51:60 Kosodi kiwadik Yeremia oitabo aronis kere naebunokin Babulon, kes akiro nun kere nuiwadikatai kanuka Babulon."
Jeremiah51:61 Kotema Yeremia Seraia atiar, “Naidolio toma Babulon mam iswaki asoman akiro nun kere."
Jeremiah51:62 Kinera ebe, ‘Wu EJAKAIT, ibu kinera nuka aibois kana, amudiar, kinyek idiotuŋanan kere aiboi kanen, ituŋanan karaida itian, konye kitisiloi do ikar kere.’"
Jeremiah51:63 Kosodi kidau asoman eitabo lo, ienikini amoru kocakak kidin naka Eupurate."
Jeremiah51:64 Ido kinera ebe, ‘Elumori Babulon kwaŋin, kwabo mam ikeuni bobo kanuka aronis naainuni ŋes, ido epasete.’’’ Ananata akiro nuka Yeremia ne."
Jeremiah52:1 Kerai Sedekia loka ikar akaisaarei kalodiopet nakeraunor ekabaka; kirumak ikar itomon ka lodiopet ko Yerusalem. Ekiror loka totoke kerai Kamutal akoku naka Yeremia loka Libuna.
Jeremiah52:2 Kiswama nueroko kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, kwape ejaatar kere nueswamaenene Yekoiakim."
Jeremiah52:3 Kosodi kanen abe it kitodolikinoi anyunyura naka EJAKAIT koYerusalem ka Yuda, kirenea kes kakonyeneke. Kipaliik Sedekia eka baka loko Babulon."
Jeremiah52:4 Kosodi kanen kokaru lokikanyet kaonon loka airumuke, kolap lokitomonet, kapaaran nakitomonet naka elap, kobu Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon, ŋes ka akejore kere asurokin Yerusalem, kidukuroto airigaun ŋes; kitutuoto itutio lujiis."
Jeremiah52:5 Kwaŋin kirigaut ere aitodol okaru lokitomonet ka lodiopet loka ekabaka Sedekia.
Jeremiah52:6 Olap lokiwononet, kapaaran nakikanyet kaonon kodedeŋar eteŋei kore, komamikis eut ituŋa luka akwap inyamat."
Jeremiah52:7 Kosodete kotiyasi arorwa kore, kokera ikajiok kere, kolomut kore kuare korot loka erute loejai kidin arwatatin aarei, loidunyas kemanikor loka ekabaka, (Kiriamarito Ikaludean ere kere.) Kobeata korot loka Araba."
Jeremiah52:8 Konye korukio aiore naka Ikaludean ekabaka, kodolokis Sedekia kapuutona nuka Yeriko; kisiarakin aioreke kere aijal ŋes."
Jeremiah52:9 Kosodete kikamas ekabaka, koyanaasi neejai ekabaka loko Babulon, Ribula, kakwap naka Kamat; kotubok ŋes akiroke."
Jeremiah52:10 Koarak ekabaka loko Babulon odwe luka Sedekia akonyeneke; koar da ikapolok kere luka Yuda Ribula.
Jeremiah52:11 Kogorunun ŋesi Sedekia akonye; koen ekabaka loko Babulon ŋes kirikoi, koyana Babulon, kibwaik toma aenis aitodol apaaran naketwania."
Jeremiah52:12 Kosodi kolap kalokikanyet, kapaaran nakitomonet naka elap, ŋes ekaru lokitomonet kakanykaoŋon loka ekabaka Nebukadaresar, ekabaka loko Babulon, abu Nebusaradan, ekapolon loka ikedarak, lokebwoienenei kakonyen nuka ekabaka loko Babulon, kobu Yerusalem."
Jeremiah52:13 Kiewe etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka etogo loka ekabaka; ka itogoi kere lukotoma Yerusalem, ŋolitogo kere loepol kicweikin kakim."
Jeremiah52:14 Abu aiore kere naka Ikaludean luajaas ka lokapolon loka ikedarak, kotiyatiya arwatatin kere nuka Yerusalem ainamar."
Jeremiah52:15 Kosodi kijoreo Nebusaradan ekapolon leka ikedarak lukican noi kotuna, ka aatoŋot naka ituŋa lukideuna kore, kanul da Iualunakina ekabaka loko Babulon, ka aatoŋot naka ikeswamak."
Jeremiah52:16 Konye kitasal Nebusaradan ekapolon loka ikedarak lukican noi kakwap araut iketemonokinok emusabibu ka ikakoriok da.
Jeremiah52:17 Kobilibilata Ikaludean ipirin luka aisinin lukejaas togo loka EJAKAIT, ka aicegeria, ka aŋolol naka aisinit nukejaas togo loka EJAKAIT, koyanaasi aisininikee kere Babulon."
Jeremiah52:18 Ido koyanaasi amoti ka initia, ka airudencta, ka atanyia, ka akaalei, ka iboro kere luka aisinit lukijaanakiniata."
Jeremiah52:19 Ka akolin da, ka atiboka nuigaete ekurwon, ka atanyia, ka amotii ka ipirin luka atalai, ka akaalei, ka atiboi da; nukeraas nuka esabu, esabu, ka nukeraas nuka epuesa epuesa, kwaŋin ayaŋaaria ekapolon loka ikedarak."
Jeremiah52:20 Ipirin luarei, aŋolol adiopet, ka imoŋin itomon ka luarei luka aisinin lukeiaas kwap kacegeria, lueswamakinit ekabaka Solomon etogo loka EJAKAIT: aisinin nuka iboro kanul kere mam kepedorete ainiŋio,"
Jeremiah52:21 Ipirin da, aojau naka epir ediopet kerai ikubitin itomon ka lukanykauni; kolukunite aitemis naka ikubitin itomon ka luarei, aburesuke ibokor iwonon: eorori."
Jeremiah52:22 Kejai akou naka aisinit kokuiuke; aoiau naka akou adiopet ikubitin ikany, kolukunito iboyan ka akamamagan akou, kere luka aisinit, ekoni epir lokiareit nepenen ka akamamagan."
Jeremiah52:23 Kosiepion kejaas akamamagan akaisakanykaoŋon ka nukanykape; akamamagan kere lukelukunito iboyan emwaasi akwatat.
Jeremiah52:24 Kosodi ekapolon loka ikedarak kikama Seraia esasedoti lopeti, ka Sepania esasedoti lokiareit, ka ikagolok luuni;"
Jeremiah52:25 Kikama kore ekapolokiton lokeyait ikajiok; ka ituŋa ikanykaarei kanul lukeanyununete akonyen nuka ekabaka, lukedumunio kore; ka ekewadikan loka ekapolon loka aiore, loaramununei ituŋa luka akwap; ka ituŋa akaisakanykape luka ituŋa luka akwap, lukedumunio kokidiŋ ore."
Jeremiah52:26 Kikama Nebusaradan ekapolon loka ikedarak kes, koyau mama ejai ekabaka loko Babulon, Ribula."
Jeremiah52:27 Kodany ekabaka loka Babulon kes, koarak Ribula akwap naka Kamat. Kwaŋin kijoreoroi Yuda anyoun kakwapuke."
Jeremiah52:28 Lu kes ituŋa lukiioreori Nebukadaresar: kokaru lokikanyet kaarei Iyudayan ilukumin iuni ka akaisaarei ka luuni.
Jeremiah52:29 Kokaru lokitomonet kakanykauni loka Nebukadaresar, kijoreo ŋesi koYerusalem ituŋa akwat akanykauni ka akaisauni ka luaarei;"
Jeremiah52:30 kokaru loka akaisaarei ka luuni loka Nebukadaresar kiioreo Nebusaradan ekapolon loka ikedarak Iyudayan akwat akanykaarei ka akaisaoŋon ka lukany: ituŋa kerc emwaasi ilukumin iwonon ka akwat akanykape.
Jeremiah52:31 Kosodi kanen kokaru loka akaisauni ka lukanykaarei loka aenio naka Yekoiakin ekabaka loka Yuda olap lokitomonet kaarei, kapaaran nakakaisaarei kanukany naka elap, kokaru lokeraunor Ebil-merodak ekabaka loko Babulon, abu ŋes! kitopoloo akou naka Yekoiakin ekabaka loka Yuda, kolem kaidaris;"
Jeremiah52:32 Kinera kaŋes nukasianut, kitopoloo eicoloŋoke aitelekarit iicoloŋo luka ikabakan lukejaas kaŋes Babulon."
Jeremiah52:33 Kiloeok inapeneke luka aidaris, konyamcnenei inyamat kakonyeneke, apaarasia kere nuka aijarake."
Jeremiah52:34 Akorakineteke, abu ekabaka loko Babulon koinanak ŋes akorakinet ninipaaran, aitodol apaaran naka atwanareke, apaarasia kere nuka aijarake."
Lamentations1:1 Asilior ca ma ere, loeleleba kole ituŋa! Aluor ca ma bala apuserut! Ŋol lokerai loepol kotoma atekerin, Ekapolon kotoma obukui, Aluor ca do loitelemio esolo!"
Lamentations1:2 Emonyi noi noi kuare, Akekiyo da eleleete koitinyo; Kopailonoke kere emamei idiopet yenitalakarit ŋes: Eŋalaŋalata ŋes ipaperoke kere, Aluoros da lukasurupoke."
Lamentations1:3 Aŋatar Yuda kanuka aitieanio, Ido kanuka ebulesene locpol: Iboie kotoma okapirin, Mam edumuni nekiyeŋunet: Ikekarcitok kere ekamakis Ŋcs aridat."
Lamentations1:4 Ibworos irotin luka Sion, Naarai emamei yenebuni neejai atukonokin nakalaunan; Emeieikis iruteike kere, Idinyas isasedotinike: Itieanitos apesuruke, Ewoyaanar ŋesi da elopet,"
Lamentations1:5 Aluoros lukedineteke lukapolok, Akeriakaros lukasurupoke: Naarai etiean EJAKAIT ŋes Kanuka epalike loepol: Aŋatar ikedwe ludidik kakonyen nuka lokedinet,"
Lamentations1:6 Ido atwania apese naka Sion akepolou kere: Aluoros ikapolokoke kwape amiamia numam edumunitos needakas, Aloto komameete agogoŋ Kakonyen nuka nol kaloerukitor,"
Lamentations1:7 Eitu Yerusalem kapaarasia nukaiticanitoike, Ka aburunike, iboroke kere luesiyalamikinitos Luajaas kapaarasia nukolosek. Napebirokinotor iketuŋa akan naka lokediŋet, Kwabo kemamei yenikeŋarakini, Keanyut lukediŋetake, kisekeloto asilioke."
Lamentations1:8 Abu Yerusalem kodiaka noi noi; Ŋes aluoror bala ibore yenimam elai: Amenata kere luetubusikinito ŋes, Naarai aanyut amuialalake: Eebo, idinya, ibelokin da kau."
Lamentations1:9 Imodokok esialeke; Mam abu kiitu awasiake; Ŋes edooror noi; Emamei yenitalakari. “Wu EJAKAIT, koany akaitieanio, Naarai etopoloor lokasurup.”"
Lamentations1:10 Etonyoiki lokedinet akekan Oboroke kere luisiyalamikinitos; Naarai aanyu ŋesi ebe Alomasi ikapirin aiboisike nakalaunan, Luieorakinit kinyeis alomar toma atukotokon,"
Lamentations1:11 Idinyas ituŋake kere, Emoete inyamat; Ainakis iborokee luisiyalamikinitos Agwel inyamat lukisikwarunete etau, “Wu EJAKAIT, kosesen, koany; Naarai araun eoŋ esilioit.”"
Lamentations1:12 “Mam ca ma ipodosi, yes kere luitubonoros? Koanyutu, kosesenata, Arai ejaas iean kere lueriakas ka ieanika, Lukeswamakin eoŋ, luketicania eoŋ EJAKAIT, Kotoma apaaran naka anyunyurake naededen,"
Lamentations1:13 “Abu kiiuk akim abunore kokuju toma akojoka, Kitonokok kes: Alok akakejen keboi, Kesibono kau; Kenyeki kasilikinit, Ka aiiloro da apaaran kerc."
Lamentations1:14 “Aen adiakanaretaka ajookot; Akekan ŋes iridia; Idokokinitoi omurisinika; Eŋoŋa ŋesi akagogoŋ; Kejaik EJAKAIT akaninikee, Lumam apedori abwoikin,"
Lamentations1:15 Amwaŋ EJAKAIT ikiriginika kerc kokidinika; Anyara atukot asurokinia eoŋ Aipiriearia ikatumunakaka: Epudapud EJAKAIT akoku nabekot naka Yuda Kwape toma acues,"
Lamentations1:16 “Kanuka ŋun ŋes amonyia akiyo; Eleleete akiyo kakonyeneka; Naarai elwana eketalakaran lotikisikwaru akaijar: Asilikis ikadwe, Naarai epiko lokasurup.”"
Lamentations1:17 Atera Sion akekanin, Emamei yenitalakari: Ecoraki EJAKAIT nuka Yakob Koraut luirimorito lukasurupoke; Erai Yerusalem kamakee Bala ibore yenimodokok."
Lamentations1:18 “Edolit EJAKAIT; Naarai epaliik eoŋ aicorakinetake; Kopuputu kenainait, yes ituŋa kere, Koanyutu ikaean; Ejorcor abekonoka ka ikatumunakaka."
Lamentations1:19 “Abu keworo ipailonoka, Konye kamodata: Isasedotinika ka imakioka Atwakikis ore, Naemoiata inyamat Aisikwarunia aijarakec."
Lamentations1:20 “Koany, wu EJAKAIT; Naarai etururwei; Iyaloŋoni akaijar; Eeuio ekatau kotomaka; Naarai epaliik noi: Eari ekileŋ kokiŋa; Togo da esubit bala ejai atwanare."
Lamentations1:21 “Apuputu eidinyika; Emamei yeniketalakari; Apuputu lukasurupoka kere nuka ikacan; Iyalamasi naarai iswama. Iyauni apaaran naibu kolimo, Eputokinos ŋul da keoŋ,"
Lamentations1:22 “Kodol aronisikec kere kakonyenekon; Kiswamak kes kwape kiswamakinia eoŋ Kanuka adiakanaretaka kere: Naarai epol eidinyika, Eilori da ekatau.”"
Lamentations2:1 Arapak ca ma EJAKAIT akoku naka Sion kedou Kotoma anyunyurake! Aeaku aibuses naka Isirael Anyoun kakuj kiton akwap, Kwabo mam iitunit iicoloŋ yenika akejeke Kapaaran naka anyunyurake."
Lamentations2:2 Eliko EJAKAIT aiboisio kere nuka Yakob, Komam itimit, Ebiru kotoma adedenuke abwasio nuka akoku naka Yuda; Atiyatiya kiton kwap: Amunaa ajakanut ka ikapolokoke."
Lamentations2:3 Ajepa amumwara kere nuka Isirael Kakenyunyura naededen; Enyaka akekan nakoteten kakonyen nuka lukasurup: Etisis ŋesi Yakob kwape akim naesarani, Nairiamarit iwaitin kere,"
Lamentations2:4 Eket akekabwa kwape lokasurup, Ebwoi kakekan nakoteten kwape loitokokoli. Aar kere luetalakarito akonyen Kowema loka akoku naka Sion; Abukok akededen kwape kakim,"
Lamentations2:5 Asub EJAKAIT bala lokasurup, Eliko Isirael; Eliko iketogoi kere lukapolou, Amunaa akebwasin: Eyataki ŋesi akoku naka Yuda Aibworo ka akuudian."
Lamentations2:6 Eweliwel ikeswam kagogon, Kwape yenikomanikor; Amunaa aiboisike natukonokina: Esumurwok EJAKAIT koSion Atukokinet naeseunitai ka asabato, Ido kanuka adedeŋ naka akenyunyura Amwana ekabaka ka esasedoti."
Lamentations2:7 Aeaka EJAKAIT eketem, Asae akeibois nakalaunan; Akoraki akanin nuka lukasurup Arwatatin nuka itogoike lukapolou: Acelut kotogo loka EJAKAIT Kwape kapaaran naka atukokinet naeseunitai."
Lamentations2:8 Eneru EJAKAIT amudiar arwatat Naka akoku naka Sion; Atera auno, Mam inyakara akekan kamudiar; Konyc etukuudian abwas ka arwatat da; Iiunepepas kere."
Lamentations2:9 Alumo iruteike toma akwap; Amunaa abilibil eut atiketa: Ekabakake ka ikapolokoke ejaas atekerin; Emameete bobo ikisila, Inabinoke da mam edumunete aitapoet Kama ejai EJAKAIT."
Lamentations2:10 Imakio luka akoku naka Sion Iboiete kokwap, ililiŋete; Ipurito apua akwesikee; Enapitos ipukoi: Itukumonokinito abekon nuka Yerusalem Akwesikee kiton alup."
Lamentations2:11 Ikabubutos akonyeneka kanuka akiyo, Itururwei ekatau, Abukokin emanyika kwap, Kanuka amudiar naka akoku naka ikatuŋa, Naarai iiloros idwe ludidik ka imukerun Korotin lukore,"
Lamentations2:12 Emonyete mama ejaas nukatotokee, ebe, “Alu bo inyamat ka ebino?” Naiilorotor kwape luimusunitai korotin lukore, Naebukoror aijarakee atorobusio nuka nukatotokec,"
Lamentations2:13 Ketejenuni anu? Ketupusi kinyo, ijo akoku naka Yerusalem? Ketiiriani kinyo ketalaka, Wu jo akoku nabekot naka Sion? Naarai epol akonieilat kwape kaŋolol: Iŋai kitaŋaleuni?"
Lamentations2:14 Kidwaranakis ikoninabin Aitapoeta nuka aamameak ka abaŋaanut; Kwabo mam apotu kopukosi numam adolitekon, Tetere kinyakunete kaijoreoriokon: Konye kidwaranakis abwokon Nuka aamameak ka nukitapaarete,"
Lamentations2:15 Kibapanakinete akanin luitorete kere, Isuarete imunimunete akeeekwes Mama ejai akoku naka Yerusalem, Kobalas ebe, “Lopelo tope ŋes ere Loamaikinitai Ajokis naedolit cut, Aiyalama naka akwap kere?”"
Lamentations2:16 Lukasurupokon kere kiwoonanakis aituke: Kisuasi, kiriamanakinete ikel; Kobalas ebe, “Kiliko ŋes: Abeit na ŋes apaaran nakipou kemielas; Adolu do, kianyu da!”"
Lamentations2:17 Eswama EJAKAIT nualosikinit; Etodoliki akekirot; Kwape ecorakinitor kolo sek, Ebiru, komam itimit: Esiyalamik lokasurupikon, Etopoloo amumwarat naka lukitokokolete joo"
Lamentations2:18 Komonyiatar ikecetauon EJAKAIT; Wu jo arwatat naka akoku naka Sion, Koleleata akiyo kwape ecor, Paaran ka kuare! Mam iyenuni nepetai da; Mam erwakakin ecopot loka akonukon."
Lamentations2:19 Konyou, komony kuare, Kagcuneta nuka akwenyuneta; Kobuko ekonitau kwape akipi Kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT; Kikia akonikanin mamakeŋ Kanuka aiiar naka ikonidwe ludidik, Luckotos atwakare eteŋei Kasisiarin nuka irotin kere."
Lamentations2:20 Konolia, wu EJAKAIT, koany! Lukaŋai luibu kiswamak nuikote nen? Ti tope aŋor kenyama aurikec, Idwe luilepanarete kakaninikee? Ti tope kearakin esasedoti ka enabi Aibois nakalaunan naka EJAKAIT?"
Lamentations2:21 Eperete esapat ka ekimat kapua nakorotin; Aar ekileŋ akabekon ka ikakatumunak: Iar kes kapaaran naka anyunyurakon; Iar, kwabo mam itimit,"
Lamentations2:22 Inyarau luketasuroka kowaitin kere Kwape kapaaran naka atukokinet naeseunirai; Kwabo emamei idio yenabu koku karaida aisal Kapaaran naka anyunyura naka EJAKAIT; Amudia lokasurupika Ŋul luelepanari ka luasait.
