Lamentations3:1 Arai eoŋ ituŋanan yenaanyunit aitieanio Kobela loka anyunyurake.
Lamentations3:2 Abu kenarenik, ketolot da, Kotoma amuton kwabo mere aica."
Lamentations3:3 Abeit ieebokinit aibelonokin akekan Asurokinia eoŋ apaaran kere.
Lamentations3:4 Esirinyo ŋesi akakiriŋ ka akamuny; Abilibil akakoio.
Lamentations3:5 Aduk mama ajai, Kerigau kepiu ka apason."
Lamentations3:6 Kesiboiki aiboisio nukamuton, Kwape luketwaka kolosek."
Lamentations3:7 Kabwau, mam apedori alomar; Esilanirir ekarikot."
Lamentations3:8 Eebo, kamony, kelala da ayuunio, Egoluni ailipika kina,"
Lamentations3:9 Abwa irotinika kamor nuikee, Etukud ŋesi ikasokono,"
Lamentations3:10 Esubit kamakaŋ bala adubu naeperuni, Kwape eŋatuny loeŋopi kaiboisio nukaiyeiyea."
Lamentations3:11 Ketapaa korotinika, kapoopo; Ketisilio."
Lamentations3:12 Eket akabwake, Kasipoki araut idesiara yenika emaleke."
Lamentations3:13 Etolomik imalia luka akuraruke Oŋeretenyaka.
Lamentations3:14 Arau lokimuaritono kotoma otunaka kere; Ekosiokee apaaran kere,"
Lamentations3:15 Kesimono adwaris, Ketuup aliasit naeta ria,"
Lamentations3:16 Abil da ikakel kinaroi, Karapak ekurwon."
Lamentations3:17 Itwalan ekatau kama ejai ainapakin; Kemurwoki aiyalama kwape ejaar,"
Lamentations3:18 Kabala ebe, “Aolio akagogoŋ, Ka akamuno da mama ejai EJAKAIT.”"
Lamentations3:19 Kiitu aitieanioka, ka aitururuka, Aliasit naeta ria ka epiu da."
Lamentations3:20 Iitununei ekatau, Ipirisiar kotomakan,"
Lamentations3:21 Keitu nun, Ŋes ejaunor amun."
Lamentations3:22 Mam enaŋi aitim naka EJAKAIT, Naarai mam inorari aisionike."
Lamentations3:23 Itet ŋinitupuruc, Epol akonimunonut."
Lamentations3:24 Ebala ekatau ebe, “EJAKAIT ŋes akorakineteka; Tape amuno ŋes.”"
Lamentations3:25 Ejok EJAKAIT kama ejaas luidarito ŋes, Kama ejai aijar naemoot ŋes."
Lamentations3:26 Ejok ituŋanan amunoneno ka aidarenen kaiyaparit Aitajar naka EJAKAIT.
Lamentations3:27 Ejok ituŋanan aidak aiookot Kotoma atumunike.
Lamentations3:28 Kogitar aiboi bon kililin, Naarai edokoki ŋesi ŋin."
Lamentations3:29 Kibwaik akeituk apua; Elemuni kojai amun.
Lamentations3:30 Koialak ekeitinyo necjai yenibapi; Kimonikin amoromoroo,"
Lamentations3:31 Naarai mam EJAKAIT eiali Ikar kere.
Lamentations3:32 Naarai karaida keyauni ican, Konye isionie ŋesi kwape ejaar apolou naka aitimike."
Lamentations3:33 Naarai mam imiela aitiean idwe luka iruna, Karaida aitakadikin kes."
Lamentations3:34 Aipudapuda Ienan kere luka akwap,"
Lamentations3:35 Aitirii etube loka ituŋanan Kakonyen nuka ŋol loejai kuju kakuj.
Lamentations3:36 Aitapaar ituŋanan kakiroke, Mam EJAKAIT itojokit ŋun."
Lamentations3:37 Iŋai bo ŋol loinera kitodolikinoi, Arai mam EJAKAIT icorakinit?"
Lamentations3:38 Mam kereka elomunete aronis ka aiokis Kaituk naka ŋol loejai kuju kakuj?
Lamentations3:39 Kanukinyo irurumaa ituŋanan yenikajaran, Ituŋanan yeniticanio kanuka aronisioke?"
Lamentations3:40 Kerereoto, ketemo iponesiowok, Kaboŋosi bobo mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Lamentations3:41 Ketonyoutu itauonowok ka akaniniwok da Mama ejai Edeke toma akuj.
Lamentations3:42 “Kidiaka ido kipaliiki; Mam jo isionit.
Lamentations3:43 “Irapar kanyunyura korukitor sio; Iar komam itimit.
Lamentations3:44 Irapar kedou Kinyek ailip apedor.
Lamentations3:45 Ibu kituluo sio aiswageta ka asusujo Kokidin katekerin.
Lamentations3:46 “Lukasurupokosi kere Kiwoonanakis aituke.
Lamentations3:47 Kidolokis sio akurian ka aipany, Aijasio ka amudiario,"
Lamentations3:48 Elele akakoŋu ieorin luka akipi, Kanuka amudiario naka akoku naka ikatuŋa,"
Lamentations3:49 “Ebuki akakoŋu akiyo, komam itanani, Komam eionoi,"
Lamentations3:50 Aitodol naesesenia EJAKAIT kwap, Koany ejai toma akuj,"
Lamentations3:51 Itakadikinit akakoŋu akaijar, Kanuka apesur kere nuka creka."
Lamentations3:52 “Kamejata noi lukasurupoka kwape kakwcny, Komam akirot,"
Lamentations3:53 Kaeakakis toma aipany ajari, Kebiribiroto kamor."
Lamentations3:54 Arapasi akip akouka; Kabala ebe, ‘Aolio.’"
Lamentations3:55 “Abu kewone ekonikiror, wu EJAKAIT, Kajai aidules naka aipany,"
Lamentations3:56 Ibu kiira ekaporoto ebe: “Sirikimina akonikii, Kaimonyoka aiŋarakinio.’"
Lamentations3:57 Ibu kikuny kapaaran nakewoneo jo: Kobala ebe, ‘Sirikikurianar.’"
Lamentations3:58 “Wu EJAKAIT, kipurok akiro nuka etauka; Ilaku akaijar."
Lamentations3:59 Wu EJAKAIT, iany akamwanio; Kotub ijo akakiro,"
Lamentations3:60 Iany ekecenyanit kere, Ka akeeeinerun da kere mamakan."
Lamentations3:61 “Ibu kiira, wu EJAKAIT, amorositikee, Ka ainerunikec da kere mamakan;"
Lamentations3:62 Aŋajepa nuka ŋul kalukanyoikinete, Ka nukalosikinito apaaran kere."
Lamentations3:63 Koany aiboikee ka anyounikee; Arai eoŋ ekecekosio,"
Lamentations3:64 “Wu EJAKAIT, itaeakini kes Kwape ejaar aswam naka akaninikec."
Lamentations3:65 Iinakini kes aninik naka itauon, Ekonikenit mamakee."
Lamentations3:66 Irenet kes kanyunyura, Imudiari kes kokwap kakuj naka EJAKAIT.”"
Lamentations4:1 Amasiki ca ma esabu! Eloeokin ca ma esabu loalai noi! Aeakanakin amor nuka aibois nakalaunan Asisiarin nuka ŋclirot.
Lamentations4:2 Itelepai luka etiai loepol luka Sion Lueriakasi kesabu loililiauna, Emari ca ma kwape amoti nuka elupe, Aswam naka akanin nuka ekajean!"
Lamentations4:3 Ikuwei da einakinete ikisin, Konakete ludidikikee: Konye ebwor akoku naka ikatuŋa, Kwape ikuului luka amodiŋ."
Lamentations4:4 Emakakin aŋajep naka imukeru Odokolike kanuka akure: Ilipitos idwe ludidik inyamat, Kwabo emamei yenedutakini kes,"
Lamentations4:5 Aoliosi korotin nul luanyamenenete kosogasi: Ŋul luapolokinete ogoen lukareijak Epcrete otutio luka ekurwon.
Lamentations4:6 Naarai numam adolit nuka akoku naka ikatuŋa Itelckaritos aronis naka Sodom, Loketiyakinio katipet, Emamei akan naaponi kibwaikinai."
Lamentations4:7 Asegara isotiake adepar akako, Eliaeanito adepar akile, Arenak awatekee adepar amor nukarcŋak, Apwatarakec da esubit bala asapiro."
Lamentations4:8 Kwana iriono aputokee aitelekar etulia; Mam ejenunos korotin: Eminaikin akeeemunyo kakojokec; Aono, esubit bala akitoi."
Lamentations4:9 Eiok lukeari ekileŋ itia lukeari eteŋei; Naarai adokororata, Icumitai kanu amamikiniata araito Nukomanikor."
Lamentations4:10 Apotu aŋor nuitimitoi kipooto ikeeedwe Kakaninikee akulepek; Korautu inyamatakee Kanuka amudiario naka akoku naka ikatuŋa.
Lamentations4:11 Etodolik EJAKAIT akededen, Abuku akenyunyura naededeŋ; Enokoki akim Sion, Etisisi da apetetake."
Lamentations4:12 Mam apotu ikabakan luka akwap kiyuunito, Karaida luibojete kotoma akwap kere, Ebe, epedorcte loitokokoli ka lokasurup Alomar korutei luka Yerusalem,"
Lamentations4:13 Kanuka aronisio nuka inabinoke, Ka numam adolit nuka isasedotinike, Luapotu kobukosi aokot Nuka ikadolitok kokidiŋike."
Lamentations4:14 Eturiaitos korotin bala imudukiok, Amunaaros kaokot, Mam cur cpedorete ituŋa Atiror anapitokee."
Lamentations4:15 Iworoete ituŋa ebe, “Irwa! Mam ilaete! Irwa! Irwa! Sirikitirosi!” Kwaŋin koraut ikasiak ka ipasoitin, Kobalasi ituŋa kotoma atekerin ebe, “Mam iboikinos bobo kasio.”"
Lamentations4:16 Esiarisiar kes anyunyura naka EJAKAIT; Mam eroko ibwaikinit kes etau: Mam eyoŋete akonyen nuka isasedotin, Mam eminasi da imakio."
Lamentations4:17 Apasata akonyencwok amoot aiŋarakinio naatai: Nakidaria kipou kedara ateker Namam epedori aitaiar oni,"
Lamentations4:18 Emejaete nekilosi kere, Mam kipedori alosit korotiniwok, Eapie awasiawok adolun, Etodolikinos awokopaarasia; Naarai adolu awasiawok."
Lamentations4:19 Atiroko lukirukitotor Aitelekarit imorukaalei luka apak: Kibwapitos koronan, Kiperunete kamodiŋ."
Lamentations4:20 Eiyeŋane loka ikumesiwok, Lokinyonyoikitono akinyet naka EJAKAIT, Epok kotoma apanyiakee; Lokipou keneras ebe, “Kiboie kotoribeke kotoma atekerin.”"
Lamentations4:21 Kolakar, kolel, ijo akoku naka Edom, Naiboic kakwap naka Us: Ikopuni akoli mamakon da; Imerikin, kosodi amujalalar."
Lamentations4:22 Etodolikin aiticanet naka numam adolitekon, Ijo akoku naka Sion; Mam bobo kiioreorio; Konye iticani numam adolitekon, Ŋo akoku naka Edom; Ilepilepi aronisiokon."
Lamentations5:1 Kiitu, wu EJAKAIT, nukibunokis sio; Koany, kosesen aitisiliokosi."
Lamentations5:2 Araun airumetekosi naka imo, Itogoikosi da luka Iukacekwapin,"
Lamentations5:3 Kirau ikokiok, luemameete lukapapa, Asubata nukatotokosi bala apuserun,"
Lamentations5:4 Kitaci akipi nukimasi, Kitwegelio akitokosi."
Lamentations5:5 Lukirukitotor ejaas omurisinakosi; Kilworun, emamei aibworar,"
Lamentations5:6 Kiriiki Misiri akanin, Ka Iyasurian da, tetere isimonikinete inyamat."
Lamentations5:7 Apotu lukapapakosi kodiakanasi, ido emameete; Kibwokit isio da numam adolitekec."
Lamentations5:8 Kiyaito ibulesin: Emamei yenikilakuni kakanikec,"
Lamentations5:9 Kidumuni inyamatakosi kaipal aiiar, Kanuka ekileŋ loka amodiŋ,"
Lamentations5:10 Esarani amunyokosi bala emukaru, Kanuka amwanis naitisisiei naka ebeli,"
Lamentations5:11 Ebuonorete aŋor koSion, Abekon da koreria luka Yuda,"
Lamentations5:12 Ikajanakinete ikapolok akaninikec; Mam eyoŋito imakio.
Lamentations5:13 Edakete itelepai akaŋas, Iguanakinete idwe ludidik ibwokitos akito."
Lamentations5:14 Adaunos imakio kotoma orutei, Enyeis itelepai ayoorekec,"
Lamentations5:15 Asana aiyalama nakotauonokosi; Aluor akosiisom aibworo.
Lamentations5:16 Ado aboko anyoun kakwesikosi: Itukwi isio! Naarai kidiakana,"
Lamentations5:17 Ŋes eilorotor ikositauon; Kanuka ŋun ŋes awariwariata akosikonyen.
Lamentations5:18 Kanuka eronat loka Sion, loesil; Irimete ikuwei kanen."
Lamentations5:19 Konye jo, wu EJAKAIT, iiaenena ikar kere; Ejai ekoniicoloŋ ageun katur kiton aturio."
Lamentations5:20 Kanukinyo kimurwokinia apaarasia kere, Kojal isio apak naetia nen?"
Lamentations5:21 Kitobonunoi, wu EJAKAIT, sio da kiboŋuni; Kiteteu akosipaarasia kwape kolosck."
Lamentations5:22 Konye kigiri kereka ijo sio eut? Kinyunyurik kereka noi?
Ezekiel1:1 Kosodi kanen kokaru loka akaisauni, kolap lokiwoŋonet, kapaaran nakikanyet naka elap, naajaar nepepe kalukijoreoritono, ariri naka ecor Kebar, koŋaarai akuj, kaany aitapoeta nuka Edeke."
Ezekiel1:2 Kapaaran nakikanyet naka elap, ŋes arai ekaru lokikanyet loka aijoreorio naka ekabaka Yekoiakin,"
Ezekiel1:3 kobu teni akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Esekiel esasedoti, okoku loka Busi, kakwap naka Ikaludean, kariri naka ecor Kebar; kojau akan naka EJAKAIT mamakeŋ kaŋina."
Ezekiel1:4 Kasesen, ido koany, kobu ekwam loepol kari naka agolitomei, edou loeiliili, ka akim naesarani, kirimorit amwekemwek, kotakan kokidiŋike ejese loka esabu loimilia, loejai kidiŋ kakim."
Ezekiel1:5 Ido kokidiŋike kolomut luesubito bala isuban iwoŋon lukajarak. Kikoni ne atakanukee; asubito bala etuŋanan.
Ezekiel1:6 Ŋinidiopet ajaas ireeta iwoŋon, ŋinidiopet da ajaas abebenoka aoŋon,"
Ezekiel1:7 Etenara akeeekejen: aicaketa da nuka akejenekec asubito bala aicaket naka itaok; komwekimwekete kwape aisinit naepwatat.
Ezekiel1:8 Ajaas kes akanin nuka etuŋanan kwap kabebenokakec kosiepionokee iwoŋon. Ido ŋul iwoŋon ajaas ireetakec ka abebenokakec kwanata:
Ezekiel1:9 eriamanakina abebenokakec; mam ebelonokinos naelosioto, kolototo ŋinidiopet ederit,"
Ezekiel1:10 Asubito ireetakee kwanata, ajai ŋillidiopet ereet loka etuŋanan; ido ŋul luoŋon ajai ŋinidiopet ereet loka eŋatuny kosiep lokoteten; ido ŋul luoŋon ajai ŋinidiopet ereet loka emoŋ kosiep lokokediany; ŋul luoŋon da ajai ŋinidiopet creet loka emorukaalet."
Ezekiel1:11 Ekote nen ireetakee. Egararaete abebenokakec kokuju; eriamanakina abebenoka aarei nuka ŋinidiopet, arapitos aarei awatekec,"
Ezekiel1:12 Kolototo ŋinidiopet ederit; neekot emoyo alosit, ŋes elosete; mam ebelonokinos naalosenenoto."
Ezekiel1:13 Kidiŋ kisuban lukajarak kojai ibore yenesubit bala atotol nuesaranete akim, bala akalasia; kirimi kokidiŋ kisuban lukajarak: asarani akim, kolom eimilia kakim."
Ezekiel1:14 Kokerata isuban lukajarak, kohoŋut, kwape keimilia,"
Ezekiel1:15 Kosodi napaseseni isuban lukajarak, abu kaany akokoro kalup kosiep kisuban lukajarak, akokoro kaninidiopet kakesi luonon."
Ezekiel1:16 Atakan naka akokoron ka aswamukee asubit bala ejese loka aberulo: ido kere aoŋon araas nuka aput adiopet: asubit atakanukec ka aswamukec bala akokoro kotoma akokoro,"
Ezekiel1:17 Naalosenenoto, kolosenenete kosiepionokee iwonon; mam ebelonokinos naalosenenoto."
Ezekiel1:18 Ajaas akokoron ireren, ajaas da ipirin; kileleba akonye airimor ireren nul iwoŋon."
Ezekiel1:19 Ido naalosenenoto isuban lukajarak, kolosencnete akokoron kosiepikee: ido naetonyoununere isuban lukaiarak kalup, kitonyoununio da akokoron."
Ezekiel1:20 Neekot emoyo alosit, ŋes elosete; kouparos akokoron da kakes; naarai ajai emoyo loka isuban lukaiarak toma akokoron."
Ezekiel1:21 Naalosenenoto nul alosete nu da; ido nakebwoeneniata nul abwoete nu da; ido naetonyounere nul kalup, kouparos akokoron da kakes; naarai ajai emoyo loka isuban lukajarak toma akokoron."
Ezekiel1:22 Ido kuju kakou ka isubat yenikajaran ajai naesubit bala apak, eiese loka akurisitalo nakanosibib, aterakinitai kuju kakwesikec."
Ezekiel1:23 Ido kwap kapak kitenara abebenokakec, adiopet kiteos kanaceke; ajaas ninidlopet abebenoka aarei nukeraparitor akuanake."
Ezekiel1:24 Naalosenenoto, keira airurum naka abebenokakec, kwape airurum naka akipi nuipu, kwape eporoto loka Lokapedor kere, airurum naka ecelet kwape airurum naka ajore: nakebwoeneni ata, kijolulununete abebenokakec."
Ezekiel1:25 Kejai eporoto kokuju apak nakejai kuju akwesikee: nakebwoeneniata, kijolulununete abebenokakec."
Ezekiel1:26 Kuju kapak nakejai kuju akwesikee, ajai loasubit bala eicoloŋ, loetakani bala amoru nasapiro: ido kiboie loesubit bala etuŋanan kokuju kaloesubit bala eicoloŋ,"
Ezekiel1:27 Ido kaany bala eiese loka esabu loepwatat, bala akim kotomake airimor, ageun kaneasubit bala aŋabeteke kiton kuju; ido ageun kaneasubit bala anabcteke kiton kwap, kaany bala akim, kojai amwekimwek nairiamarit,"
Ezekiel1:28 Bala aput naka etaluka loejai odou kapaaran naka akiru, ekoni nen ejcse loka amwekimwek kowaitin kere. Ŋin ŋes arai aput naasubit bala aibuses naka EJAKAIT. Kosodi nakaany, kebiror ebuburia, keira eporoto loka ŋol lokinera."
Ezekiel2:1 Kalimok eoŋ atiar, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kobwo kakonikeje, cneri eoŋ da kajo.”"
Ezekiel2:2 Koloma emoyo tomaka nakinerar keoŋ, kesibwo kakakeje; keira ŋol lokinera keoŋ."
Ezekiel2:3 Kalimok eoŋ atiar, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, keiukari jo mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael, mama ejaas atekerin nuipalioko, nukepaliikis eoŋ: kes ka lukapapaakec da apaasi kamakaŋ, kiton lolo."
Ezekiel2:4 Elepaakata idwe da, ido aninikata itauon; kejukari mama ejaas nul: kolimok kes atiar, ‘Inera kwanata EJAKAIT EDEKE.’"
Ezekiel2:5 Kes da, arai iirarete, arai eŋerete akiirar, (naarai eraas ekek lokepali) ejenunete kereka kwape ajaar enabi kidinikec."
Ezekiel2:6 Ido da, okoku loka etuŋanan, sirikikurianar kes, kwabo sirikikurianar akecekiro, karaida ejaas ikodokodo ka ikukwa kajo, ido iboie kokiritona; sirikikurianar akecekiro, kwabo sirikiiurunun kanuka ekwenyekec, karaida eraas ekek lokepali."
Ezekiel2:7 Ido ilimokini kes akakiro, arai iirarete, arai eŋerete akiirar: naarai ipalioko kesi noi."
Ezekiel2:8 “Konyc jo, okoku loka etuŋanan, kiira nukalimok jo: siripaliono kwape kekek kanol lokepali: koon akoniituk, konyam ibore yenikainakini jo.”"
Ezekiel2:9 Naasesenia da, koany, koriunoi akan mama ajai; ido koany, kojai anunuket naka eitabo toma;"
Ezekiel2:10 kotera kakonyeneka; kiwadikatai iwaitin kere: kiwadikatete nen akuudian, aibworo, ka iean."
Ezekiel3:1 Kabala ebe, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, konyam ŋin yenidumuni; konyam anunuket na, kosodi kolot, kolimok ekek loka Isirael.”"
Ezekiel3:2 Kasodi kaooŋ akaituk, kainak eoŋ ainyam anunuket,"
Ezekiel3:3 Katema atiar, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kitanyam akonikoik, kisimonik aboikon anunuket na nakainak.” Kasodi kanyam; kowiny kaitukuka kwape kesik."
Ezekiel3:4 Kosodi katema eoŋ atiar, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kolot kodol neejai ekek loka Isirael, kiner akakiro mamakee."
Ezekiel3:5 Naarai mam kiiukaritai neejai ateker naegelara aŋajepeke, ido luka aŋajep naetiono, nabarai togo laka Isirael:"
Ezekiel3:6 mere neejaas atekerin nuipu nuegelara aijaiepekec ido luka aŋajep naetiono, lumam ipedori ajenun akirokec, Abeit arai keejukarit neejaas ŋul, ti kiirasi."
Ezekiel3:7 Konye ekek loka Isirael, mam kiirarete; naarai mam keirarete eoŋ; naarai ekek loka Isirael kere eraas luegogon akonyen, ido lueninik itauon."
Ezekiel3:8 Koany, etogogon akonikonyen kama ejaas akeeekonyen, etogogon ekonireet da koreetakee."
Ezekiel3:9 Kwape egogoŋior eikep adepar alicait, etuluo kwaŋin ereetekon: sirikikurianar kes, karaida aiurunun ekwenyekec, karaida kerai ekek lokepali.”"
Ezekiel3:10 Ido katema eoŋ bobo atiar, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, akakiro kere nukalimokini jo, kiyuu kotaukon, kiira da kakoniki."
Ezekiel3:11 Ido kolot, kodol neejaas nul luijoreoritai, neejaas idwe luka ikonituŋa, kiner kakes kolimok ebe, ‘Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE’; arai iirarete arai eŋerete akiirar.”"
Ezekiel3:12 Kosodi kadaka eoŋ Emoyo, keira kokauka eporoto loka aunya naepol, inera ebe, Kituritete aibuses naka EJAKAIT kaiboisike."
Ezekiel3:13 Keira eporoto loka abebenoka nuka isuban lukajarak eretonokinos, ka eporoto loka akokoron kosiepikee, eporoto loka aunya naepol."
Ezekiel3:14 Kosodi kadaka eoŋ Emoyo, kayana: kalot kakadakinit, komulai ekatau, kicasite da akan naka EJAKAIT kamakaŋ."
Ezekiel3:15 Kasodi abunore mama ejaas lukijoreoritono Tel-abib, lueboiete kariri naka ecor Kebar, neiboioto, Keboikin mamakee etirirai apaarasia akanykaarei,"
Ezekiel3:16 Kosodi kanen ketuboros apaarasia akanykaarei, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai, ebala ebe:"
Ezekiel3:17 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, ketarau jo ekedaran loka ekek loka Isirael: asa kiira akiro nuka aitukuka, kikwenya kes kanukan."
Ezekiel3:18 Arai katema ikaronon atiar, ‘Abeit itwani’; komam jo ikwenyari ŋes, ido komam inera aikwenyar ikaronon anyoun korotoke loerono, aitaiar akeijar; etwanikini ikaronon ŋin toma numam adoliteke; konye etepeseni akeokot kakanikon."
Ezekiel3:19 Konye arai ikwenyari ikaronon, kogiri aibelokin ainyein akeronis, karaida anyoun korotoke loerono, etwanikini toma numam adoliteke; konye kitajarite ijo akoniiiar."
Ezekiel3:20 Bobo da, kibelokin ikadoliton ainyein akedolit, kiswama numam adolit, kebwaik eoŋ ekomio kakonyeneke, etwani; naarai mam ikwenyarit, etwanikini toma aronisike, mam iitunio akeswamisio nukadolit nueswamat; konye etepeseni akeokot kakanikon."
Ezekiel3:21 Konye arai ikwenyari ikadoliton, kinyek ikadoliton aidiak, komam ediaki, abeit eiari, naarai aeamu aikwenyario; ijo da kitajarite akoniijar.”"
Ezekiel3:22 Koiau akan naka EJAKAIT mamakan kaŋina, kabala ebe, “Konyou, kolot apuuton, kineri eoŋ kajo kaŋina.”"
Ezekiel3:23 Kasodi kanyou, kalot apuuton: ido koany, abwoi aibuses naka EJAKAIT kaŋina, kwape aibuses naabu kaanyunite kariri naka ecor Kebar: kebiror ebuburia,"
Ezekiel3:24 Kalomak Emoyo, kesibwo kakejeneka; kiner keoŋ, katema atiar, “Kolot, kogolokin togokon,"
Ezekiel3:25 Konye jo, okoku loka etuŋanan, koany, kibwaikinio irikoi, kienere, tetere mam ipedori alomun otuŋa,"
Ezekiel3:26 Esimakakini anajepeken kodokolikon, korau ebaŋ, komam ipedori aitoron kes; naarai eraas ekek lokepali."
Ezekiel3:27 Konye nakineria eoŋ kajo, esiwoonari akoniituk, ijo da ilimokini kes ebe, ‘Inera Ejakait EDEKE kwanata’; Ŋin yeniirari, kiira; ka ŋin da yeneneri akiirar koŋer; naarai eraas ekek lokepali."
Ezekiel4:1 “Tio da, okoku loka etuŋanan, kolem amatapalit, kibwaik akonyenekon, kigir aput naka ere Yerusalem:"
Ezekiel4:2 kirigau, koduk arwatatin asurokinia, kitutu itutio; kiswama iidukurun asurokinia, kibwaik akuta nutiyanakinet airimor."
Ezekiel4:3 Ido kolem aiwowas naka asuat, kibwaik araun arwatat naka asuat kidiŋikon ka ere: kotereik akonikonyen neejai, asa irigaunio do, ijo da irigauni ŋes, Eraun nin aanyunet mama ejai ekek loka Isirael."
Ezekiel4:4 “Bobo da koper kosiepikon lokokediany, ebwaikini aiticanet naka ekek loka Isirael mamakon: etiai loka apaarasia nuiperi, kinuikin aiticanetekec."
Ezekiel4:5 Naarai kaseik ikar luka aiticanetekec araut kamakon etiai loka apaarasia, kes apaarasia akwat auni ka akaisakanykaoŋon: kwaŋin kinuikin aiticanet naka ekek loka Isirael."
Ezekiel4:6 Ido, naidaunia aitodolikin ŋun, iperi kosiepikon lokoteten, kinuikin aiticanet naka ekek loka Yuda; apaarasia akaisaoŋon, ninipaaran erianas kekaru, nupenun kaseik jo."
Ezekiel4:7 Kotereik akonikonyen neejai airigaun naka Yerusalem, kopukorite akonikan; idwari asurokinia ere,"
Ezekiel4:8 Ido koany, kebwaik aeneta mamakon, komam ibelokini esiep epuai, aitodol neitodolikinio apaarasia nuka airigaunikon,"
Ezekiel4:9 “Kolem da enano, ka esairi, ka imare, ka ekao, ka akima, ka imumwa da, kibwaik kes obore idiopet, kono atap; inyamenenei nin apaarasia kere nuiperenenoo kosiepikon, kes apaarasia akwat auni ka akaisakanykaoŋon."
Ezekiel4:10 Itemenenoo ŋinipaaran inyamat luinyamenenei isekelin akaisaarei: inyamenenel irwan atipet ninipaeran.
Ezekiel4:11 Imasenenei akipi nuitemio, idiopet kokanykape yenika ekin: imasenenei irwan atipet ninipaaran."
Ezekiel4:12 Inyamenenei bala aluŋuren nuka esairi, ipei da kacin nuka ituŋa kakonyenekec.”"
Ezekiel4:13 Kobala EJAKAIT ebe, “Kwape kwaŋin enyamenenata idwe luka Isirael inyamatakec lumam elaete, kotoma atekerin nuereneari kes.”"
Ezekiel4:14 Kasodi eoŋ atemar atiar, “Wu okwe Ejakait EDEKE! Koany, mam lem akaijar emunaaritai; naarai ameun koiditeuka kiton kwana mam anyamenenei ŋin yenetwani, karaida yenepoopoot etiaŋ; akiriŋ da naketal mam elomanari aitukuka.”"
Ezekiel4:15 Kosodi ŋesi atemar eoŋ atiar, “Koany, kainak aoret naka aituk aibois naka acin nuka ituŋa, itemonokinenei kanen ikoninyamat.”"
Ezekiel4:16 Bobo da katema eoŋ atiar, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, koany, abili ebela loka inyamat kotoma Yerusalem: enyamenenete inyamat luitemete, ido iyalononoete, emasenenete akipi nuitemete, ido koiurununito:"
Ezekiel4:17 tetere emamikinete inyamat ka akipi, konolianakinos kaiurunun, idokororaros kotoma aiticanetekec."
Ezekiel5:1 “Ijo da, okoku loka etuŋanan, kolem ekileŋ loekwana, kitwasam bala ebarenit loka ekabarenon, kitorio akoukon kopenekekon da: kosodi kolem aitemis aitemio, kotiak itim."
Ezekiel5:2 Iewei atutubet nakiwuniet kakim kokidiŋ ore, naitodolikinere apaarasia nuka airigaun; kolem atutubet nakiwuniet kireb kekilen airimor ere; atutubet nakiwuniet da kiwelana neejai ekwam, autuni eoŋ ekileŋ loetupari kes."
Ezekiel5:3 Ilemuni idis, koen kanapitokon."
Ezekiel5:4 Ilemuni kanul da, icakakini kidin akim, icwei kes; namakec elomuni akim nailosikini ekek kere loka Isirael."
Ezekiel5:5 Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Ŋin ŋes Yerusalem: ebwaik kidiŋ atekerin ka akwapin da nuirimorito.
Ezekiel5:6 Abu kipaliik ikatubesia kiswamaenenei nukaronok adepar atekerin, ido epaliiki ikakisila adepar akwapin nuirimorito: naarai agiro ikatubesia, mam da elosenenete kotoma okisilaka."
Ezekiel5:7 Kanuka nun ŋes inerar kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naarai iloliaka yesi adepar atekerin nukirimorito, kwabo mam ilosikinito ikakisila, komam iricito ikatubesia, karaida aswam kwape elaatar itubesia luka atekerin nukirimorito;"
Ezekiel5:8 ŋes inerar kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, eotj, eoŋ obe, arai lokasurupikon, etodolikini ikatubesia kamakon kakonyen nuka atekerin."
Ezekiel5:9 Keswamakini jo numam eswamat apeŋo, mam bobo abuni aswam kwaŋin, kanuka italesiokon kere."
Ezekiel5:10 Kanuka ŋun enyamete lukapapa idwe kokidinikon, idwe da enyamete lukapapakec; etodolikini itubesia kamakon, eweliweli da aatonotokon kere mama ejaas ikwamin kere."
Ezekiel5:11 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Aso, kwape ajaria, abeit, naarai imunaa akaibois nakalaunan kanuka iborokon kere luasacit, ka italesiakon kere, kanuka nun kenonari jo: mam akakoŋu isionie, ido mam etimi."
Ezekiel5:12 Etwani atutubetekon nakiwuniet atular, epiari eteŋei kes kokidinikon; eari ekileŋ atutubetekon nakiwuniet airimor; eweliweli da atutubet nakiwuniet mama ejaas ikwamin kere, autuni ekakileŋ loetupari kes."
Ezekiel5:13 “Kwaŋin itodolikinor akanyunyura, esimonikini akadedeŋ kamakec, kasodi aisiyamikin: ejenunete kesi cbe Eoŋ EJAKAIT ener kokokoteka, naadaunia aitodolikin akadedeŋ kamakec."
Ezekiel5:14 Bobo da ketuluori asilio ka amorosit kotoma atekerin kere nukirimorito, koanyunete ŋul kere luitorete."
Ezekiel5:15 Kosodi eraun amorosit, ka ainyanakin, ka aikwenyaret ka aumokinet da mama ejaas atekerin nukirimorito, naetodolikinio itubesia kamakon kanyunyura ka adedeŋ, kaitoronio naededen: Eoŋ EJAKAIT ener ŋun."
Ezekiel5:16 Nakejukakinia imalia lueroko, luka eteŋei, ka luka amudiar, lukejukuni amudiaria; ido eyatakini eteŋei kamakus, abili do ebelakus loka inyamat."
Ezekiel5:17 Kejukakini yes eteŋei ka itian lueroko, itwakiarete lukus; itori atular ka aokot mamakus; kainuni da ekileŋ. Eoŋ EJAKAIT ener ŋun.”"
Ezekiel6:1 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel6:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kite ironan luka Isirael, kodwarak kes."
Ezekiel6:3 Kiner atiar, Yes ironan luka Isirael, kiiras akirot naka Ejakait EDEKE! Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ironan ka iukon, isama ka aditon da ebe: Koany, eoŋ, eoŋ obe, kainuni yes ekileŋ, amudiari aiboisiokus nuiceleleete."
Ezekiel6:4 Itisilio itemwanakus, ebilibilio aputosiakus nuka akoloŋ: acakakini ituŋakus lueario akonyen nuka aputosiakus."
Ezekiel6:5 Ido eperikini atesin nuka idwe luka Isirael akonyen nuka aputosiakee; esiarisiari da akojokus airimor itemwanakus.
Ezekiel6:6 Iswapete ireriakus kotoma aiboisiokus kere, itisilio aiboisio nuiceleleete; tetere iswapete itemwanakus, itisilio, ebilibilio aputosiakus edaunos, ejepejepeo aputosiakus nuka akoloŋ, emwatario da akusiswamisio."
Ezekiel6:7 Ibirokinos lueario kidiŋikus, ijenunete da ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel6:8 “Konye do etasali aatoŋot, Naarai ijaunete kice luekuete ekileŋ kotoma atekerin, nakisiarakinere akwapin,"
Ezekiel6:9 Keitunete ŋul luekuete kayes kotoma atekerin kama ijoreoritai, kadau aibil itauonokec ludotea luanyoutu kamakaŋ, ka aitumudak akonyenekec nuelosete eporo kaputosiakec; ekadakinete kesi kanuka aronisio nueswamata, ka italesiakec kere,"
Ezekiel6:10 Ejenunete ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT: mam ener atai ebe eswamakini kes aronis nin.”
Ezekiel6:11 Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: “Kodip kakanikon, kopet kakejekon, kinera ebe, Wu okwe! Kanuka italesia kere lueroko luka ekek loka Isirael: naarai ibiroros kekileŋ, ka eteŋei, ka atular da."
Ezekiel6:12 Yenelwana etwani atular; yeneapie eari ekileŋ; ka yenesali irigaunitai etwani eteŋei. Kwaŋin etodolikini akadedeŋ mamakec,"
Ezekiel6:13 Ŋenunete yesi ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, naejauniata ikecetuŋa luearitai toma aputosiakee airimor itemwanakec, kaŋoliukot loimukurur, aidiasia kere nuka iron an, kokwap kaŋolikitoi loepesit, kokwap da kanolilua loiswapit, aiboisio nuainanakiniata lueuru saa aputosiakec kere."
Ezekiel6:14 Ariikini kes akakan, aitisil akwap kiswap, anyoun kamodiŋ naka Dibila, airiamar ireriakec kere; ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
Ezekiel7:1 Bobo da kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel7:2 “Ŋo da, okoku loka etuŋanan, inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE akwap naka Isirael ebe: Awasia! Adolok awasia agoria aoŋon nuka akwap."
Ezekiel7:3 Kwana kidolok awasia, kejukakini akanyunyura, katubokini jo kwape ejaatar ikonirotin; keticani jo kanuka italesiakon kere."
Ezekiel7:4 Kwabo mam kisionie akakoŋu, ido mam etimi; konye keticani kanuka irotinikon, ejaunete da italesiakon kidinikon: iienunete da ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT,"
Ezekiel7:5 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Aronis, aronis adiopet! Koany, ebunit."
Ezekiel7:6 Adol awasia, adol awasia alopet; akwenyu asurokin jo. Koany, ebunit."
Ezekiel7:7 Acila kide naka aijarakon, ijo yeniboie kakwap: adol apak, eapie apaaran; apaaran naka elala, konye mere naka eibwoŋ, koronan,"
Ezekiel7:8 Kwana eapie abukokin akadedeŋ mamakon, ketodoliki akanyunyura mamakon, katubokini jo kwape ejaatar ikonirotin; ido keticani kanuka italesiakon kere."
Ezekiel7:9 Kwabo mam isionie akakoŋu, ido mam etimi: ketieani kanuka irotinikon, ejaunete da italesiakon kidinikon. Ŋenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT loadanyi."
Ezekiel7:10 “Koany, apaaran! Koany, ebunit! Acila kide naka aijarakon; eturo ebela, ibutunit eitur,"
Ezekiel7:11 Apolou akaje araun ebela loka aronis; emameun yenideun kakesi, karaida aipuesikee, karaida abarakec: emameun apolou kamakee."
Ezekiel7:12 Adol apak, aeku apaaran die. Kinyek yenegweli ailel, kinyek da yenegwelari akadakin: naarai ejai adedeŋ aipuesikee kere."
Ezekiel7:13 Naarai mam eboŋori ikagwelaran neejai yenegwelarit, karaida keroko eiarete, Naarai ikamunit aitapoet aipuesikee kere, emameun yenebonuni; ido emameun yeniketakin kanumam edolito nuka aijarake."
Ezekiel7:14 “Akutata arupepe, akapata kere; konye emamei yenelosi oiie: naarai ejai akanyunyura aipuesikee kere."
Ezekiel7:15 Ejai ekileŋ kina, atular da ka eteŋei ejaas toma: nin yeneiai ais eari ekileŋ; ŋin da yenejai ore, emeori eteŋei ka atular."
Ezekiel7:16 Konye ŋul luekuete kakesi ekuete, ido ejaunete oroŋan kwape idudumerun luka aditon, ekuudianete kere, ninitunanan kanumam adoliteke."
Ezekiel7:17 Elajakakaros akanin kere, ekalanyakaros da akuŋin kere kwape akipi."
Ezekiel7:18 Ido enapete ipukoi, erapari asogim kes; irumete ileje akonyenekee kere, ejaunos ipatai akwesikee kere."
Ezekiel7:19 Eeakanakinete ekeeepuesa orotin, eraun da ekecesabu ibore yenimam elai; mam epedori epuesakee ka esabukec ayuun kes kapaaran naka anyunyura naka EJAKAIT; mam isimonikinete aiiarakec, ido mam ituupete akecekoikes, Naarai keraas nul ikomion luka numam adolitekec."
Ezekiel7:20 Atemelel naka ikecebore yenisirio kiloco araun eitur, konye kiswamaut aputosia nuka italesiakee ka ikeeeboro luasaeit kaŋes: ŋes etuluoria kamakec kwape ibore yenimam elai."
Ezekiel7:21 Ainakini akanin nuka imo araun imejat, ido mama ejaas ikaronok luka akwapin araun inatara; emunaarete da."
Ezekiel7:22 Ido ebelokini kes akasebot, emunaarete da akaibois nakaiyeiyea: elomarete ikaŋatak, komunaasi."
Ezekiel7:23 Kiswama erikot: naarai ileleba akwap iarito, ileleba da ere akaje."
Ezekiel7:24 Kanuka ŋun ŋes ayaunia lukaeekwapin luitelekarito aronis, kiruma itogoikec: etanaŋi da aiwoŋonut naka ikagogoŋok; emunaario aiboisiokec nukalaunak."
Ezekiel7:25 Ebunit amudiar, emoete ainapakin, komam edumunete."
Ezekiel7:26 Ebuni ameŋeranut kameneranut, nukabe da nukabe; emoete aitapoet kaneejai enabi; konye eoliorete ikisila kama ejai esasedoti, ka ainerun da kama ejaas imakio."
Ezekiel7:27 Ibworo ekabaka, enapi ekapolon aburun, emaranete akanin nuka ituŋa luka akwap. Eswamakini kes kwape ejaar ekecerot, ido atubokini kes kwape atubonokiniata; ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
Ezekiel8:1 Kosodi kanen kokaru lokikanyetekape, toma olap lokikanyetekape, kapaaran nakikanyet naka elap, naeboio kotogoka, kibojete da imakio luka Yuda kakonyeneka, kadoik eoŋ akan naka Ejakait EDEKE."
Ezekiel8:2 Kasodi kasesen, ido koany, aputo naesubit bala akim; ageun kaneasubit bala aŋabeteke kiton kwap, akim: ageun da kaneasubit bala aŋabeteke kiton kuju, bala amwekimwek, bala eiese loka esabu."
Ezekiel8:3 Korio naasubit bala akan, ketin eeuude; kadaku emoyo kokidin kakwap ka akuj, kayana Yerusalem kotoma aitapoeta nuka Edeke, mama ejai ekirigi loka erute loka alaro nakotoma joeseseni agolitomei: neajai eicoloŋ loka aput naka ekolo, naitokokoli."
Ezekiel8:4 Ido koany, kojai nen aibuses naka Edeke loka Isirael, kwape ajaar aitapoer naabu kaany kapuuton."
Ezekiel8:5 Kosodi kabala ebe, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kiteluo kwana akonikonye orot loebei agolitomei.” Kasodi keteluo akakonye orot loebei agolitomei, ido koany, keiai aput nin naka ekolo, neelomarere orute loka etem ari nakagolitomei."
Ezekiel8:6 Katema eoŋ atiar, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, iany kereka nuiswamaete? Italesia luepolok luiswamai ekek loka Isirael kane, tape ekunyari neelwana anyoun kaiboisika nakalaunan? Konye iyatakini bobo aanyun nukitalesia ace nuepolok.”"
Ezekiel8:7 Kasodi kayau okirigi loka alaro; kasodi kete, ido koany, kojai apedot arwatat."
Ezekiel8:8 Kosodi atemar atiar, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kobok arwatat”: ido kadau aibok arwatat, koany, kojai ekirigi."
Ezekiel8:9 Katema atiar, “Koloma, koany italesia lukaronok luiswamaete kane.”"
Ezekiel8:10 Kaloma, kaany; ido koany, aponi kinomitete aputosia nuka nolipone loka lueliatos, ka itian luketal, ka aputosia kere nuka ekek loka Isirael, toma arwatat iwaitin kere,"
Ezekiel8:11 Kobwoete kakonyenekee ituŋa akaisakanykaarei komakio luka ekek loka Isirael, kobwoi Yaasania okoku loka Sapan kokidinikec, Kokodite nolituŋanan aisupuruuneteke; kopuru asakat naka lukisupurununo."
Ezekiel8:12 Kosodi ŋesi atemar atiar, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, iany kereka nuiswamaete imakio luka ekek loka Isirael kamuton, nolitunanan kagolaike nuka aputosia? Naarai ebalas ebe, ‘Mam EJAKAIT kianyuni oni; enyek EJAKAIT akwap.’”"
Ezekiel8:13 Katema bobo atiar, “Iyatakini bobo aanyun nukitalesia ace nuepolok nuiswamaete,”"
Ezekiel8:14 Kosodi kayau okek loka erute loka etogo loka EJAKAIT loitei agolitomei; ido koany, kibojete aŋor kokuudianete Tamus."
Ezekiel8:15 Katema atiar, “Iany kereka nu, ijo okoku loka etuŋanan? Iyatakini bobo aanyun nukitalesia ace nuepolok adepar ŋun.”"
Ezekiel8:16 Kayau alaro nakotoma naka etogo loka EJAKAIT, ido koany, kidin agola nalomaret ka etem, kejaas ituŋa kwaka akaisaarei ka lukany, lukibelokinitos asebon oyekalu loka EJAKAIT, ka ireetakec kide; komaete kesi akoloŋ kokide."
Ezekiel8:17 Kosodi katema atiar, “Iany kereka nu, ijo okoku loka etuŋanan? Erai tope akirot naepatana kokek loka Yuda kes aswam italesia lueswamata kane? Naarai elelebata akwap akaje, aiyatakin aitunyunyurikin eoŋ. Ido koany, ibwaikinete atenut okumesikec."
Ezekiel8:18 Aso ekonakini eoŋ da kadeden, mam isionie akakoŋu, ido mam etimi: karaida kemonyata keporoto loepol akiika, mam apupuni kes.”"
Ezekiel9:1 Kosodi ŋesi aimony kakiika keporoto loepol, kobala ebe, “Kisukunyutu ŋul luepolokinito ere, nolitunanan kokapite yeniiiisike yenemudiari kakanike.”"
Ezekiel9:2 Ido ko any, kopotu ikiliok ikanykape elomunete korot loka erute loikumemei, lokagolitomei, nolitunanan ekapit yeniiiisike yeneari kakanike; etuŋanan ediopet kidinikec loanapit ebaputa, konapite amumwarat naka ebwino loka ekewadikan kanabeteke. Kolomasi, kobwaata kariri ketem loka aisinit."
Ezekiel9:3 Kedokunit aibuses naka Edeke loka Isirael anyoun kokerubi, nekejai, kiton ariiri kekek loka etogo; kiworo ŋesi etuŋanan loanapit ebaputa, lokejai amumwarat naka ebwino loka ekewadikan aŋabeteke."
Ezekiel9:4 Kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Kitor kidin ore, kidin Yerusalem, kibwaik aanyunet oreeta luka ituŋa luewoianaros ka luedinyasi kanuka italesia kere lueswamao kokidinike.”"
Ezekiel9:5 Kotema ŋesi ice kapupi eoŋ atiar, “Kitoro kidin ore atupakin ijol, kodanyata: mam isioniete akusikonye, ido mam itimete."
Ezekiel9:6 Koarata eut imakio, ikatumunak ka apesur, idwe ludidik ka aŋor da: konye sirikikunyakis idiotuŋanan kere yenejai aanyunet, Kogeutu da kaiboisika nakalaunan.” Kosodete kogeut kimakio lukejaas kinaren ketogo."
Ezekiel9:7 Kotema kes atiar, “Komunaasi etogo, kilelebata alaroi kalueario, Kolomasi.” Kolomasi do, kodanyata lukore."
Ezekiel9:8 Kosodi kanen, nakedanyiata, kenyein eoŋ, kebiror ebuburia, kamony, kabala ebe, “Wu okwe Ejakait EDEKE! Imudiari kereka ijo aatoŋot kere naka Isirael kanuka abukokin adedenukon toma Yerusalem?”"
Ezekiel9:9 Kosodi katema atiar, “Ipu noi numam adolit nuka ekek loka Isirael ka Yuda, elelebun akwap da aokot, elelebun ere da etube loerii: naarai ebalasi ebe, ‘Enyek EJAKAIT akwap, ido mam EJAKAIT eanyuni.’"
Ezekiel9:10 Eoŋ da, mam akakoŋu isionie, ido mam etimi, konye etebei akeeeswamisio akwesikee.”"
Ezekiel9:11 Ido koany, kinyak etuŋanan loanapit ebaputa, lokejai amumwarat naka ebwino aŋabeteke akiro, kobala ebe, “Eswama kwape ibu kicorakinia.”"
Ezekiel10:1 Kasodi kete, ido koany, kapak nakeiai kuju kakwes nuka ikerubin, kotakan kokujukec, naasubit bala amoru naka asapiro, bala atakan naka aput naka eicoloŋ."
Ezekiel10:2 Kolimok etur-anan loanapit ebaputa ebe, “Koloma kidin kakokoron nuidiridirete, kokwap kikerubin, kileleb akonikanin kere atotol nuka akim nuejaas kidin kikerubin, kiwelanaa ore.” Koloma ŋesi kaseseni eoŋ."
Ezekiel10:3 Kobwaata do ikerubin kakan nakoteten naka etogo, nakelomaria etuŋanan; kilelebun edou alaro nakotoma."
Ezekiel10:4 Kodok aibuses naka EJAKAIT kotoma okerubin, kobwo kariri naka ekek loka etogo; kilelebun edou togo, kileleba da alaro amwekimwek naka aibuses naka EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel10:5 Kopupos iporotoi luka abebenoka nuka ikerubin kiton alaro nakokina, kwape eporoto loka Edeke Lokapedor kere nainerar."
Ezekiel10:6 Kosodi kanen, nakieorakinia etuŋanan ie loanapit ebaputa, kobala ebe, “Kolem akim kokidin kakokoron nuidiridirete, kokidin kikerubin,” koloma ŋesi, kobwo kosiep loka akokoro,"
Ezekiel10:7 Korio ekerubi akekan kokidin kikerubin kiton akim nakejai kidin kikerubin, kolem, koinak akanin nuka ŋol kaloanapit ebaputa; kitin ŋesi koloma."
Ezekiel10:8 Kotakanu kokerubin naasubit bala akan naka etuŋanan kokwap kabebenokakec,"
Ezekiel10:9 Kete, ido koany, ajaas akokoron aoŋon kosiep loka ikerubin, akokoro adiopet kosiep loka nolikerubi: atakan naka akokoron kosubite bala eiese loka amoru naka aberulo."
Ezekiel10:10 Atakanukee, aputosi kesi kere aoŋon, bala kejai akokoro kotoma akokoro."
Ezekiel10:11 Naalosenenoto, kolosenenete kosiepionokec iwonon: mam ebelonokinos naalosenenoto, konye aibois nakesesenenei akou kotupanarete: mam ebelonokinos naalosenenoto,"
Ezekiel10:12 Eleleba akonyen awatekee owaitin kere, ipuranakee, ka akaninikee, abebenokakec, ka akokoron, kes akokoron nuajaas kesi iwonon,"
Ezekiel10:13 Kapup eoŋ akokoron enyaritai akokoron nuidiridirete,"
Ezekiel10:14 Ido ajai ŋinidiopet ireeta iwonon: ereet losodit kerai ereet loka ekerubi, ereet lokiareit kerai ereet loka etuŋanan, ereet lokiwuniet kerai ereet loka eŋatuny, ka ereet da lokiwoŋonet kerai ereet loka emorukaalet."
Ezekiel10:15 Kodokasi ikerubin akuj. Ŋul kes isuban lukaiarak luabu kaany kariri kecor Kebar.
Ezekiel10:16 Naalosenenoto ikerubin, kolosenenete akokoron kosiepionokee: nakitonyoununoto ikerubin abebenokakec adokar anyoun kokwap, akokoron da mam ebelonokinos anyoun kosiepionokec,"
Ezekiel10:17 Naabwoenenata ŋul, kobwoete nu da; nakedokanariata nul kuiu, kodokasi nu da kakes: naarai keiai emoyo loka isuban lukaiarak kotomakec,"
Ezekiel10:18 Koloma aibuses naka EJAKAIT anyoun kariri naka ekek loka etogo, kobwo kokuju kikerubin."
Ezekiel10:19 Kitonyout ikerubin abebenokakec, kodokasi anyoun kokwap, ketei eoŋ kwape alomuniata, akokoron da kosiepionokee: kobwaata kokirigi loka erute lokokide loka etogo loka EJAKAIT; kojai da aibuses naka Edeke loka Isirael kokujukec."
Ezekiel10:20 Ŋul kes isuban lukaiarak luabu kaany kokwap ka Edeke loka Isirael kariri naka ecor Kebar; kaienu ebe keraas ikerubin.
Ezekiel10:21 Kejai nolidiopet ireeta iwonon, ido nolidiopet abebenoka aoŋon; aput naka akanin nuka etuŋanan kejai kwap kabebenokakec."
Ezekiel10:22 Aput da naka ireetakec, keraas ireeta ŋupeŋul luabu kaany kariri naka ecor Kebar, atakanukee ka kes da ikulepek. Kolot ŋolidiopet ederit."
Ezekiel11:1 Bobo da kadaku Emoyo, kayau orute lokokide loka etogo loka Ejakait, loaseseni kide, Ido koany, okirigi loka erute ajaas ituŋa akaisaarei kalukany; kaany kokidinikec Yaasania okoku loka Asur, ka Pelatia okoku loka Benaia, ikapolok luka ituŋa."
Ezekiel11:2 Katema eoŋ atiar, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, lu kes ituŋa luepwakete numam adolit, lueinakinete ainerun naerono kore kalo."
Ezekiel11:3 Luebalas ebe, ‘Eroko apak edolo aiduk itogoi: ere lo ŋes amot, oni da kirai akiriŋ.’"
Ezekiel11:4 Aso kodwarak kes, kodwar, ijo okoku loka etuŋanan.”"
Ezekiel11:5 Kadoik emoyo loka EJAKAIT, katema eoŋ atiar, “Kiner ebe, Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Ibu kiner kwanata ijo ekek loka Isirael; naarai aleni akiro nuelomarete otauonokus."
Ezekiel11:6 Itupuata iaranakus kore kalo, ilelebata da irotinike iaran."
Ezekiel11:7 Aso do inera EJAKAIT EDEKE kwanata ebe: Iaranakus luiperionokinito kidinike, kes akiriŋ, ere lo da amot: konye kilemario yes anyoun kotomaken,"
Ezekiel11:8 Iyonito ekileŋ; konye ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kainunete ekileŋ."
Ezekiel11:9 Kalemari yes kokidinike, keiaikini yes akanin nuka imo, etodolikini da itubesia kamakus."
Ezekiel11:10 Kibirori ekileŋ; katubokini yes koikor loka Isirael; ijenunete da ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT,"
Ezekiel11:11 Mam ere lo eraun akusimot, ido mam iraunete akiriŋ kotomake; katubokini yes koikor loka Isirael;"
Ezekiel11:12 Iienunete da ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT: naarai mam ipotu kolosenenoto kokisilaka, ido mam itodolito ikatubesia, konye iswamata kwape ejaatar itubesia luka atekerin nukirimorito.”"
Ezekiel11:13 Kosodi kanen, napadwari, kotwana Pelatia okoku loka Benaia. Kasodi kebiror ebuburia, keworo keporoto loepol kabala ebe, “Wu okwe, Ejakait EDEKE! Itanani teni ijo eut aatoŋot naka Isirael?”"
Ezekiel11:14 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel11:15 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, iinaeanakon, eeba, iinacanakon, ituŋa luka atekerikon, ka ekek kere loka Isirael, kes ŋul luapotu luibojete koYerusalem kolimokis ebe, ‘Kikunyasi kaneejai EJAKAIT; kiinakinitai sio akwap na araun airumet.’"
Ezekiel11:16 Aso do kiner ebe, ‘Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Karaida kalema kes kama elwana kotoma atekerin, karaida keweliwel kes kotoma akwapin, konye araun aibois nakalaunan kamakee nediokasilon kotoma akwapin nuadoloto.’"
Ezekiel11:17 Aso do kiner ebe, ‘Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kedepidepi yes katekerin, katukokini yes kakwapin nuisiarakina, kainakin akwap naka Isirael.’"
Ezekiel11:18 Naeponiata kaŋina, elemarete kanen iboro kere luasaeit ka Italesia kere,"
Ezekiel11:19 Ainakini kes etau ediopet, ebwaikini emoyo lokitetet kotomakec; alemuni etau lokamoru kawatekee, ainakini da etau loka akiriŋ:"
Ezekiel11:20 tetere elosenenete kokisilaka, koricenenete itubesiaka aiswamaenen: eraunos ikatuŋa, eoŋ da araun Ekecedeke."
Ezekiel11:21 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Konye ŋul Iuelosenenete ikecetauon atupit itauon luka iborokec luasaeit, ka italesiakec, etebei akeeeswamisio akwesikee kikulepek.”"
Ezekiel11:22 Kosodete kitonyout ikerubin abebenokakec, kojaas akokoron kosiepionokec; koiai da aibuses naka Edeke loka Isirael kokuiukec."
Ezekiel11:23 Kodoka aibuses naka EJAKAIT anyoun kokidin ore, kobwo koronat loejai ari nakokide naka ere."
Ezekiel11:24 Kadaku Emoyo eoŋ, kayau Kaludea kaitapoet naka Emoyo loka Edeke, mama ejaas nul lukijoreoritono. Kosodi konyou aitapoet kamakaŋ."
Ezekiel11:25 Kasodi kalimok ŋullukijoreoritono akiro kere nuabu EJAKAIT ketodik.
Ezekiel12:1 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT bobo mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel12:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, iboie kokidin kekek loka epali, luejaas akonye aanyun, kwabo mam eanyunete, ejaas aki apupun, kwabo mam epupunete, naarai eraas ekek loka epali,"
Ezekiel12:3 Aso do, ijo okoku loka etuŋanan, kitemok iboro luka aitwobosio, konyou aibwot paaran kosesenete kesi; ibwosi anyoun kaiboisikon kiton aibois ace kosesenete kesi, Diat eomoomoete, karaida eraas ekek loka epali."
Ezekiel12:4 Itolomuni iborokon paaran kosesenete kesi, kwape iboro luka aitwobosio: ilomuni elopet eboŋ kosesenete kesi, kwape elomuniata ituŋa luirwobosio."
Ezekiel12:5 Kobok ijo arwatat kosesenete kesi, kitotor iboro."
Ezekiel12:6 Korion kokeperinikon, kosesenete kesi, kitolom kamuton; irapi akonikonyen, komam ianyuni alup: naarai kebwaik jo araun aanyunet mama ejai ekek loka Isirael.”"
Ezekiel12:7 Kasodi keswama kwaŋin kwape kecorakinitere: ketolom ikaboro paaran, kwape iboro luka aitwobosio, eboŋ da kabok arwatat kakakanin, ketolom kamuton, karion kokeperinika kosesenete kesi,"
Ezekiel12:8 Kosodi tupuruc kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel12:9 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, mere kinisit jo ekek loka Isirael, ekek loka epali che,, Inyo bo iswamai?’"
Ezekiel12:10 Kolimok kes ebe, ‘Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Abwokon na naka ekapolon lokotoma Yerusalem, ka ekek kere loka Isirael loejai toma.’"
Ezekiel12:11 Kolimok ebe, ‘Eoŋ aanyunetekus: kwape abu keswamaa, kwape kwaŋin iswamakinere kes: itwobosio, iioreorio.’"
Ezekiel12:12 Ekapolon loejai kidinikec erioŋi kokeperike kamuton, elomari: ebokete arwatat aitotor iboro: erapi akonyeneke, naarai mam eanyuni alup kakonyeke."
Ezekiel12:13 Ido aterakini ŋes ekaboi, ipoki kataeitika: ayauni ŋes Babulon akwap naka Ikaludean; konye mam eanyuni, karaida etwanikini nen."
Ezekiel12:14 Eweliweli okwamin kere nul kere luirimorito aiŋarakin, ka ikekodeta da kere; autuni eoŋ ekileŋ loetupari kes."
Ezekiel12:15 Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, naesiarisiaria kes kotoma atekerin, naeweliwelia kes kotoma akwapin."
Ezekiel12:16 Konye apianuni ituŋa iuikidioko kakes, luekuete ekileŋ, ka eteŋei ka atular da; tetere elimorete italesiakec kere kotoma atekerin nuedolete; ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT,”"
Ezekiel12:17 Bobo da kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel12:18 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, konyam ikoninyamat, komarani, komat akipikon komarani, kisorirai,"
Ezekiel12:19 Kolimok ituŋa luka akwap ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE nuka luibojete ko Yerusalem, ka akwap naka Isirael ebe: Epote ainyam inyamatakee kisoriraete, emasete da akeeekipi kitiriraete, naarai edokidokori iboro kakwapukee, kanuka akaje naka ŋul kere kaluiboiete kotoma."
Ezekiel12:20 Iswapete ireria luiboioto ituŋa, itisilio akwap; ijenunete da ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT,"
Ezekiel12:21 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel12:22 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, awaragan nanyoin na naijaatar kakwap naka Isirael, kineras ebe, “Eyapata apaarasia, aolio da ŋiniitapoet’?"
Ezekiel12:23 Aso do kolimok kes ebe, ‘Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Etanaŋi awaragan na, mam bobo inerai kwape awaragan kotoma Isirael.’ Konye kolimok kes ebe, Aaput apaarasia, ka aitodolikinio da naka niniitapoet."
Ezekiel12:24 Naarai mam ejaun bobo aitapoet natitai karaida aidwar naiteleli kotoma okek loka Isirael.
Ezekiel12:25 Naarai eoŋ EJAKAIT eneri, ido itodolikinio akirot naeneri. Mam bobo itilorio. Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Naarai kapaarasiakus, ijo ekek loka epali, eneri eoŋ akirot, ido etodolikini.”"
Ezekiel12:26 Kobu bobo akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel12:27 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, koany, ebalasi lukokek loka Isirael ebe, ‘Aitapoet naeseseni ŋesi erai naka apaarasia nuipu koinaren, edwari ŋesi nuka apakio nuelwaka.’"
Ezekiel12:28 Aso do kolimok kes ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Mam bobo itilorio adio kakakiro. Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Konye akirot naeneri itodolikinio.”"
Ezekiel13:1 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel13:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kodwarak inabin luka Isirael luedwarete, kolimok ŋul luedwarete nuepote kotauonokec ikulepek ebe, ‘Kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT’,"
Ezekiel13:3 Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebc: Itukwi inabin lubaniok, luetuparete imoyonokec ikulepek, kwabo emameete nueanyunito!"
Ezekiel13:4 Wu jo Isirael, asubitos ikoninabin bala ikuwei kaiboisio nuiswapito."
Ezekiel13:5 Mam idokanarete karorwaitin, karaida aiteteunun abwas kanuka ekek loka Isirael, tetere ebwoi kojie kapaaran naka EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel13:6 Aanyut aamameak ka aidwar nakainal, luineras ebe, ‘Ebala EJAKAIT’: kwabo mam EJAKAIT iyakit kes, konye emunosi ebe itodolikinio akecekirot."
Ezekiel13:7 Mam kereka ianyunito aitapoet natai ido mam idwarito nukainal, naarai ineras ebe, ‘Ebala EJAKAIT’; kwabo mam eoŋ enerit?”"
Ezekiel13:8 Aso do inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: “Naarai inerata aamameak, ido ianyutu nukainal, ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Aso koany, arai eoŋ lokasurupikus."
Ezekiel13:9 Itusurupi akakaninabin lueanyunete aamameak, kaidwar nukainal: mam eiaunete aurianet naka ikatuŋa, ido mam iwadikao aiwadikaeta nuka ekek loka Isirael, ido mam elomarete akwap naka Isirael; ijenunete do ebe arai eoŋ Ejakait EDEKE."
Ezekiel13:10 Naarai, eebo, naarai etapaarito ikatuŋa, kobalas ebe, ‘Ainapakin’; kwabo emamei ainapakin; ido naedukioto ituŋa arwatat iladaete inabin nul aitwakaŋ."
Ezekiel13:11 Kolimok ŋulluiladaete aitwakaŋ ebe, Ibirori. Eiauni akiru naibiruni noi; ibiruni da akaka naepol; etiyaikini da ekwam loededeŋ."
Ezekiel13:12 Koany, naetiyaikinor arwatat, mam kereka kiŋisio yes ebe, ‘Ai bo ejai akwaŋis naipotu kiladata?’"
Ezekiel13:13 Aso do inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Atiyaikini kekwam loededeŋ kotoma aisiopoka; ido ejauni akiru naibiruni noi kanyunyuraka, ka akaka naepol kadeden amudiar."
Ezekiel13:14 Kwaŋin atiyaikini arwatat naipotu kiladata aitwakaŋ, aitodolikin kwap, tetere epukorio apetetake; naibirunor, yes da kimudiario kokidinike; ijenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT,"
Ezekiel13:15 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwaŋin etodolikini akaisiop arwatat, ka nul da lukiladaete aitwakaŋ; atemari yes atiar, Emamei arwatat, karaida nul lukiladaete;"
Ezekiel13:16 kes inabin luka Isirael luedwarete nuka Yerusalem, lueanyunete aitapoeta nuka ainapakin kanuken, kwabo emamei ainapakin."
Ezekiel13:17 “Ŋo da, okoku loka etuŋanan, kitogogon akonikonyen mama ejaas apesur nuka ikonituŋa, nuedwarete nuepote kotauonokee akulepek; kodwarak kes,"
Ezekiel13:18 kinera ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Itukwi aŋor nuedonyete imakakin luka akanin kere, nuesonyete itabalan luka akwes nuka ituŋa luka ninirian amejaa aijar! Imejaete ca ma aijar naka ikatuŋa, ka aitajar da aijar ace kanukus?"
Ezekiel13:19 Ipotu komoromoroto eoŋ kotoma otunaka kanuka aoduneta nuka esairi, ka alunureta nuka atap, aiar aiiar naka nul kalumam tiketwaka, aitajar da aiiar naka nul kalumam tikejara, aiŋal ikatuŋa lueeamunete nukaiŋal,"
Ezekiel13:20 “Aso do inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, etusurupi imakakinikus, luimejaata aijar kwape akweny, anyilununei kakaninikus; aosikini aijar, aijar naka nul kaluimejaete kwape akweny."
Ezekiel13:21 Anyilununei da itabalanakus, ayuuni ikatuŋa kakanikus, mam bobo eiaunete akaninikus amejao; ijenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel13:22 Naarai itakadikinete etau loka ikadoliton kaiijal, yenimam eoŋ etakadikinit; ka aitogogoŋ akanin nuka ikaronon, komam aibelokin korotoke lokaronon aitaiar akeijar."
Ezekiel13:23 Kanuka nun mam bobo ianyunete aamameak, karaida aidwar adwaresia; ayuuni da ikatuŋa kakaninikus. Ŋenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
Ezekiel14:1 Kosodete kopotu ice komakio luka Isirael mama ajai, kiboikinos kakonyeneka."
Ezekiel14:2 Kosodi kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel14:3 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, ayanaasi ituŋa lu aputosiakee kotauonokec, ebwaikis da ekomyo loka numam adolitekec kakonyenekee: epedorete nul biai aiŋit eoŋ nepetai da?"
Ezekiel14:4 Aso kiner kakes kobala ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Ŋinitunanan yenikotogo loka Isirael yeneyanaari aputosiake kotauke, kibwaik ekomyo loka numam adoliteke kakonyeneke, kosodi abunore mama ejai enabi: Eoŋ EJAKAIT aboŋokini kanun kwape ejaar aipues naka aputosiake;"
Ezekiel14:5 tetere ekamuni itauon luka ekek loka Isirael, naarai agitaros kere kaneajai kanuka aputosiakee."
Ezekiel14:6 “Aso kolimok ekek loka Isirael atiar, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kobonutu, kibelokinos ainyein aputosiakus; kibelokis da akusikonyen ainyein ikusitalesia kere."
Ezekiel14:7 Naarai ninitunanan yenikokek loka Isirael, arai ycnika imo luibojete kotoma Isirael, yenegitar kama ajai, koyana akeputosia kota uke, kibwaik ekomyo loka numam adoliteke kakonyeneke, kobu mama ejai enabi aiŋitun eoŋ: eoŋ EJAKAIT elopet ŋes aboŋokini;"
Ezekiel14:8 ido etogogoŋi akakonyen mama ejai ituŋanan nin, etuluori da aumokinet, araun aanyunet ka awaragan, agelari da kokidin otunaka; iienunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel14:9 Ido arai kinalai enabi kiner akirot, eoŋ EJAKAIT enalat enabi ŋol, ariori da akakan mama ejai, kamudia ŋes kokidin otunaka Isirael."
Ezekiel14:10 Ibwokete da aitieanet naka numam adolitekec: aitieanet naka enabi erianakin cut kaiticanet naka nol kalokiŋisit ŋes.
Ezekiel14:11 Inera Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kinyek ekek loka Isirael apaar bobo anyoun kama ajai, karaida amunaar bobo kakecediakanareta kere; tetere konyet eraunos ikatuŋa, eoŋ da araun Ekecedeke.”"
Ezekiel14:12 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel14:13 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, arai kiswama akwap aronis adiakanar mamakan, ariori eoŋ akakan kamake, abilari da ebela loka inyamatake, eiukuni eteŋei, amudiari da ituŋa ka itian."
Ezekiel14:14 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Karaida keiaas ituŋa lu luuni kotomaken, Noa, ka Daniel, ka Yob, tikeyuut aijarakee ikulepek bonik kanuka adolitekec."
Ezekiel14:15 Arai ketotor itiaŋ lueroko toma akwap, emunaarete iswapi do, tetere emamei ituŋanan yenitori kanuka itian nul;"
Ezekiel14:16 ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwape ajaria, karaida keiaas ituŋa nul luuni kotomaken, timam keyuut idwekec lusap ka lupesur; kes bonik tikeyuun, konye iswapi akwap."
Ezekiel14:17 Arai da kayau ekileŋ akwap nin, kabala ebe, Ekileŋ, kitor akwap; kadau ituŋa ka itiaŋ;"
Ezekiel14:18 ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwape ajaria, karaida keiaas ituŋa nul luuni kotomakeŋ, timam keyuut idwekec lusap ka lupesur, konye kes bonik tikeyuun,"
Ezekiel14:19 Arai da keiuk atular akwap nin, kabukok ca akadedeŋ kaokot, amudiar ituŋa ka itian:"
Ezekiel14:20 ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwape ajaria, karaida keiaas Noa, ka Daniel ka Yob kotomaken, ‘timam keyuut idwekec lusap ka lupesur; tikeyuut aijarakee bonik kanuka adolitekec."
Ezekiel14:21 “Naarai inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Itelekari ca ma noi naeiukaria itubesiaka iwonon luetioko Yerusalem, ekileŋ, ka eteŋei, ka itian lueroko, ka atular da, amudiar ituŋa ka itiaŋ!"
Ezekiel14:22 Konye arai kesal aatoŋot kotomaken naitolomuni idwe lusap ka lupesur, naelomuniata mamakus, ianyunete yesi da ikeeerotin ka akeeeswamisio: kitalakario kotoma aronis naayau eoŋ Yerusalem, nun ke re nuayau kotomaken."
Ezekiel14:23 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kitalakarete kesi yes, naianyuniata ikecerotin ka akeeeswamisio: iienunete do ebe mam keswamakinit atitai kere nueswamat.”"
Ezekiel15:1 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel15:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, itelekarit biai emusabibu ikito kere, atenut naka emusabibu naejai okito luka amagoro?"
Ezekiel15:3 Elemununo kereka akitoke aiswamaunia ibore kere? Arai bo elemununete kereka ituŋa iloit kaŋes aikajakinia ibore kere?
Ezekiel15:4 Koany, ecakakinio toma akim araun akito nukinoka: enyami akim epuai ka epuai, ieweio da kidinike; ejai tope aiokis kaswam kere?"
Ezekiel15:5 Koany, kwape ajaar ber, mam epedori adioswam; ibusakini biai adioswam kedau akim ainyam, iewee da?"
Ezekiel15:6 Aso do inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kwape emusabibu kokito luka amagoro, luainakinit akim araun akito nukinoka, kwaŋin ainakinia luibojete koYerusalem."
Ezekiel15:7 Etogogoŋi akakonyen mama ejaas; elomunete kakim, konye enyami kes akim; ijenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, naetogogonio akakonyen mama ejaas,"
Ezekiel15:8 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Etisili akwap, naarai adiakasi.”"
Ezekiel16:1 Kobu bobo akirot naka Ejakait mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel16:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kitejenik Yerusalem italesiake."
Ezekiel16:3 Kiner atiar, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE kaYerusalem ebe: Ageunetekon, ka auruniokon ajai akwap naka Ekanaanit; Emorait ŋes papakon, totokon da Akitit."
Ezekiel16:4 Nakiwuruunerc, kapaaran nakiwuruunere mam aponi kotuboi aliligetekon, kwabo mam aponi kiloŋi kakipi aitalaunia; mam aponi kibwaikin adiobalaŋ, karaida adiokimukorio."
Ezekiel16:5 Amamei akoŋu nakitimit, aiswamakin jo ŋun kere, aisioni jo; konye aponi kocakar kina ais, naarai kilaitai, kapaaran nakiwuruunere."
Ezekiel16:6 Kosodi naetorio, kaany ibelibelo kaokotokon, katema atiar, ‘Karaida kijai aokotokon, kojar’; eebo, katema atiar, ‘Karaida kijai aokotokon, koiar.’"
Ezekiel16:7 Ketupuu kwape aibutunet naka ais, kiyatanakin korau nakapolon, kodolok toma atumun naibus; eburut ikisinakon, apolooros itimakon; konye ijai titai imuialal."
Ezekiel16:8 “Kosodi naetorio, kasesen jo, koany, apakikon kerai apak naka amin; kemuko kanapitoka, karap amujalalakon, Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Eebo, keyapoik jo, ketutuk aitutuket kaio, korau nakan."
Ezekiel16:9 Kasodi kelon kakipi; eebo, kelota eut aokotokon, kenyonyoanak akinyet."
Ezekiel16:10 Ketanap da anapito naesonyitai, ketanap amuk nuka emukule, kemuko kebaputa kaloejok, karapak aliiri."
Ezekiel16:11 Kesiri dakiisiro, kebwaik aikomon akaninikon, erikot da omurisinukon,"
Ezekiel16:12 Kebwaik itetio okumesikon, kakiikon da, aboko da naetemelel akoukon."
Ezekiel16:13 Kwaŋin ŋes kiisirere kesabu ka epuesa; kerai anapitokon naka ebaputa kaloejok, ka aliiri, ka anapito naesonyitai; konyamenenei atap naidicic, ka esik, ka akinyet. Kitemelel noi noi, kisirereni aitodol apolou naka ekabakane."
Ezekiel16:14 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kilosikin eemutokon atekerin kanuka atemelelekon; naarai etodolikinitoi, kanuka apolouka naabu kebwaikinite jo."
Ezekiel16:15 “Konye ibu komuno atemelelekon, koluor adote kanuka eemutokon, kiporoenenei neejai ŋolidiopet loetori; koraenena naken."
Ezekiel16:16 Ibu kolem inapenekon, kiswamau aiboisio nuiceleleete nuesiritoi kijesesia luegelegela, kodotear kamakec; mam lem ejaenenas nuikote nen, karaida ajaun."
Ezekiel16:17 Ibu kolem da ikoniboro luejok luka akais nuipu luka esabuka ka luka epuesaka lukainakinit jo, kiswamaa aputosia nuka ituŋa, kodotear kakes."
Ezekiel16:18 Ibu kolem inapenekon luesonyitai, korapak kes, kibwaik akakinyet ka lukisupurununoka kakonyenekee."
Ezekiel16:19 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Ikanyamat da lukainakinit jo, atap naidicie, ka akinyet, ka esik, luketanyamenenei jo, ibu kibwaik kakonyenekee araut asakat naeuru saa."
Ezekiel16:20 Bobo da, ibu kolem ikonidwe lusap ka lupesur, lukiwurikinit eoŋ, koinak nul araut asuban mama ejaas kwi ainyam. Kerai kereka akonidoteu ibore yenedit,"
Ezekiel16:21 tape iari ikadwe, kiiaik kes araut ainakinet naicweio mama ejaas?"
Ezekiel16:22 Ido kotoma otalesiakon kere ka adoteukon, mam ibu kiitu apaarasia nuka eiditeukon, naijacnenar titai imujalal, kibelibelo kaokotokon,"
Ezekiel16:23 “Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Itukwi, itukwi jo! Kosodi kanen akaulo kanukaronokokon kere,"
Ezekiel16:24 iduku aibois naikumemei, iswamau aibois naiidiara kanolirot,"
Ezekiel16:25 Iduku aiboisikon naiidiara asisiarin kere, ituluo atemelelekon araut naketal, ipukok akonikejen mama ejai ŋol kere loitori, iyatanak adoteukon,"
Ezekiel16:26 Ielokinos kimisirian da, ikoniidunyeta lueburok awat; iyatanak adoteukon, aitunyunyurikin eoŋ."
Ezekiel16:27 Aso do koany, kariik akakan, eŋoŋa akorakinetekon, kejaik jo mama ejai akot naka nun nukilaito, adwe nuka Ipilisitian, nuirumito ileje kanuka eponekon lokadoteu."
Ezekiel16:28 Idotear da mama ejaas Iyasurian, naarai mam kipedori atitirikin, eebo, idotear mama ejaas, kwabo mam kiupi."
Ezekiel16:29 Ido bobo iyatanak adoteukon akwap naka Kanaan, kiton Kaludea; kwabo mam nun da kiupete."
Ezekiel16:30 “Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Ekalanyana ca ma ekonitau! Naarai iswamai nu kere, aswam naka aberu naadote naidelana."
Ezekiel16:31 Naarai iduki akoniibois naikumemei kaninisisiar, kiswamau akoniibois naiidiara kaŋolirot; kwabo mam ibu korai kwape adote, naarai imen eropit."
Ezekiel16:32 Aberu naadote ba! Naisukunyuni ca ma imo aibois naka okilenike!
Ezekiel16:33 Einakinete ituŋa adotea ainakineta; konye jo iinakini ainakinetakon mama ejaas ipailonokon kere, aijodounio, tetere epote neijai ijo kanoliwai kanuka adoteukon."
Ezekiel16:34 Igelara ijo kanor ace kadoteukon, naarai emamei yenikitupuni jo aelokinor: ido naarai ibu korop, kwabo mam kiropio, kanuka ŋun igelara ijo."
Ezekiel16:35 “Aso do ijo adote, kiira akirot naka EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel16:36 Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Naarai abukor akonisilianut, kopukoroi amuialalakon kanuka adoteukon mama ejaas ipailonokon; ido kanuka aputosia kere nuka italesiakon, kanuka aokot nuka idwekon luiinakinit kes;"
Ezekiel16:37 aso do koany, atukonokini ipailonokon kere, luibu kolakanarotor, ka nul kere lukimina, ka nul da kere luibu kolaite; atukonokini kes ciie kajo kowaitin kere, apukokini kes amujalalakon, koanyutu amuialalakon."
Ezekiel16:38 Ido katubokini akiro, kwape etubokinere aŋor nuegircte adukokinikec nuebukorete da aokot; ido kainuni aokot nuka adedeŋ ka ekokote."
Ezekiel16:39 Kakorakini akanin nuka ipailonokon, eeakarete kesi aiboisikon naikumemei, kotiyatiyata aiboisiokon nuiidiara; kilaearete inapenekon, enaŋete ikoniboro lukajokak luka akais nuipu: kinyeinete ijai titai imujalal."
Ezekiel16:40 Kiinunete erioŋet asurokinia jo, kibiribirete kamor, kieumueumata eut kikecekilena."
Ezekiel16:41 Ido ieweete ikonitogoi, itodolikinete etube kamakon kosesenete aŋor nuipu; kesinyeini adoteu, kwabo mam bobo iropi."
Ezekiel16:42 Kwaŋin esimonikinia akadedeŋ kamakon, kinyein ekakokote, eyamakin, komam bobo anyunyurikin,"
Ezekiel16:43 Naarai mam iitununei apaarasia nuka eiditeukon, konye kitakadikin kanun kere; ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Aso koany, ayauni eoŋ ekonirot akoukon. Mam kereka iyatakinit adoteu kotalesiakon kere?"
Ezekiel16:44 Koany, ŋinituŋanan yeninera awaragasia kiwaragi jo ebe, ‘Epone ka toto, ŋes loka akokuke da.’"
Ezekiel16:45 Irai ijo akoku naka totokon, naelait okilenike ka ikedwe; irai ijo inae naka akoniinaean, nuelaete ikiliokokec ka ikecedwe, Kerai totokus Akitit, papakus da kerai Emorait."
Ezekiel16:46 Kinaeikon nakapolon ŋes Samaria, naejai akanikon nakokediany, ŋes ka adweke: kinaeikon nadidi naejai akanikon nakoteten, ŋes Sodom ka adweke."
Ezekiel16:47 Konye mam ilosenenei korotinikec, ido mam iswamaenenei kwape ejaatar italesiakee; konye apak naedit, ibosit ijo adepar kes korotinikon kere,"
Ezekiel16:48 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwape ajaria, mam kinaeikon Sodom, karaida adweke, eswamaenenete kwape iswamaa ijo ka adwekon,"
Ezekiel16:49 Koany, keraas nu numam adolit nuka kinaeikon Sodom; aiwoŋonut, ka aimonianakin inyamat, ka aijamam naka akerianut kejaas mamake ka adweke; mam ŋes esigalikinit yenikiean ka yenilwaritoi."
Ezekiel16:50 Ido eomikina kesi, kiswamata nuketal kakonyeneka; ŋes kainakini alemar kwape abu ketojokia."
Ezekiel16:51 Kwabo Samaria da mam eswamat atutubet naka aronisiokon; konye jo iyatanakini italesiakon adepar kes, iinakinit akoniinaean atakan bala nuedolito kanuka italesiakon kere luiswamat."
Ezekiel16:52 Ijo da, kibwok alopet ikonileie, naarai iinakinit etube loka ainaeanakon abeneniar; kanuka aronisiokon nuiswamat nuketal adepar kes, ŋes kitelekaritotor ijo kadolit. Eebo, kitirira, ijo da kibwok ikonileie, naarai iinakinit akoniinaean atakan bala nuedolito."
Ezekiel16:53 “Ido enyakuni aijoreoriokee, aijoreorio naka Sodom ka adweke, ka aijoreorio naka Samaria ka adweke, ka aijoreorio naka ijoreoritonokon luejaas kakes;"
Ezekiel16:54 tetere ibwoki ikonileie alopet, kirumata ileje kanuka ŋun kere nuiswamat, naarai italakari kes,"
Ezekiel16:55 Eboŋunete do ainaeanakon Sodom ka adweke apoloukee nakolo, eboŋunete da Samaria ka adweke apoloukec nakolo; ibonunete ijo da ka adwekon apoloukus nakolo."
Ezekiel16:56 Mam kereka kiwaragit kinaeikon Sodom kapaaran naka aiwononutukon,"
Ezekiel16:57 eroko epukoro akonironis? Kwana da iputokinos kaŋes araut naamoromorot naka adwe nuka Edom, ka nun kere nuirimorito ŋes, ka adwe da nuka Ipilisitian, nukirimorito kimwanito jo,"
Ezekiel16:58 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ibu kibwok adoteukon ka italesiakon."
Ezekiel16:59 “Naarai inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Keswamakini teni kwape ibu kiswamaa, ijo naimwanit aiyaposit kanuka aibil aitutuket."
Ezekiel16:60 Konye eituni akaitutuket kajo naka apaarasia nuka eiditeukon, ido eticasi kamakon aitutuket namam edaun."
Ezekiel16:61 Kosodi konyet iituni irotinikon, kirumata ileic, nakainakinia jo ainaeanakon, nukapolok ka nudidik; kainakini kes araut adwe, konye mere kanuka akoniitutuket."
Ezekiel16:62 Ido etieasi kamakon akaitutuket: ijenuni do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.
Ezekiel16:63 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Tetere iituni, itirirai, mam bobo iwoonari akoniituk, kanuka ileieikon; naadaunia aisioni jo kere nuiswamat.”"
Ezekiel17:1 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel17:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kolim asogol, kiner awarag mama ejai ekek loka Isirael:"
Ezekiel17:3 Kiner ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Abu emorukaalet loepol lokejaas abebenoka nuepolok ka akopir nueojak, loeleleba aiul, loka iiesesia luipu kobu Lebanon, koyana aidi naka eres:"
Ezekiel17:4 kobila nakokuiu naka aibutunetake, kodaka akwap naka agwelanar; kibwaik ore loka ikagwelanarak."
Ezekiel17:5 Koyana da ikinyom luka akwap kira alup nupusuk, abu kosipok neajaas akipi nuipu, Kibwaik kwape aderut."
Ezekiel17:6 Kopoloor, koraun emusabibu loepesit kouriana, kibelokinos atenueikike mamake, koiaas aliasioke kwapuke. Aso koraun emusabibu, kopet atenun, kolibi akidikidin."
Ezekiel17:7 “Keiai da emorukaalet eee loepol, lokejaas abebenoka nuepolok ka aiul nuipu: ido koany, kitukud emusabibu ŋol akeliasio mamake, kolibi atenueikike abear neejai, tetere ieoeoi. Kouko kapanya nueraitai,"
Ezekiel17:8 kiraik alup nuejok neajaas akipi nuipu, tetere epesi atenun, ido kora araito, koraun emusabibu loejok."
Ezekiel17:9 Kiner ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Isirereŋio? Mam kereka erutuni ŋesi aliasioke, koden akeraito, tetere erinyori? Tetere erinyorete akekwi kere nuepalal nuelibunete; mere kanuka agogoŋ naepol karaida kanuka ituŋa luipu arutun akelias."
Ezekiel17:10 Eebo koany, kiraikin, isirerenio? Mam kereka erinyori cut, kijaŋ ekwam lokokide? Erinyori kotoma apanya nuapolokini.”"
Ezekiel17:11 Bobo da ko bu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe,"
Ezekiel17:12 “Kolimok ekek lokepali ebe, Mam kereka iienete apolou naka akiro kanun? Kolimok ebe, Koany, abu ekabaka loko Babulon kobu Yerusalem, kikama ekabakake, ka ikapolokoke, koyanau kes neajai Babulon."
Ezekiel17:13 Koyana ediopet kaur naka ekabaka, kitutukoto kaŋes aitutuket; ido kisiyapo ŋes. (Koyana ikagogoŋok luka akwap:"
Ezekiel17:14 aitisil ajakanut, kinyek adakara, konye kicat kanuka airie aitutuketeke.)"
Ezekiel17:15 Konye kipaliik kiyakia ikekiyakia Misiri, koinakinai ibalasin ka ituŋa luipu, Isirerenio kereka ŋes? Ekui tope ŋol loiswamai nuikote nen? Ebili aitutuket, kosodi aiku?"
Ezekiel17:16 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwape ajaria, abeit etwanikini loamwani aiyapositike, kobili akeitutuket, kidiŋ Babulon, aibois neiboio eka baka lokitarau ŋes eka baka,"
Ezekiel17:17 Kwabo mam Parao ka akeiore nakagogon ka ekekodet loepol inarakinetc ŋes kojie, naitutuoto itutio, edukete abwasin amudiaria ituŋa luipu."
Ezekiel17:18 Naarai amwaŋ aiyaposit ka aibil aitutuket; ido koany, itogogonit kakanike, konye eswama ŋun kere; mam ekui,"
Ezekiel17:19 Aso do inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kwape ajaria, abeit aiyapositika naabu komwana, ka akaitutuket nakebili, etodolikini akouke,"
Ezekiel17:20 Aloki ekaboi mamake, ipoki akatacit, ayanauni Babulon, kipuri kaŋes kaŋina kanuka akediakaret naadiakarit kamakaŋ."
Ezekiel17:21 Ibiroros ikakerakake kere lukorionetake kere kekilen, isiarisiario nul kere luideunos kokwamin kere: ijenunete do ebe eoŋ EJAKAIT ener.”"
Ezekiel17:22 Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: “Alemari eoŋ aidi naicelelei naka eres, ebwaikini; abilanari kotoma nukokuiu nuka aibutunetake, naenonok, ka aira kuiu oroŋat loeoj loimukurur."
Ezekiel17:23 Eraikini oroŋat loimukurur loka Isirael: elibi ŋesi atenun, ka aira araito, eraun eres loejok: iboiete akweny nuka ipoŋesio kere kotolim loka atenueikike."
Ezekiel17:24 Ejenunete ikito kere luka ais ebe eoŋ EJAKAIT etisili ekitoi loeoi, etopoloo ekitoi loeuriana, esirinyori ekitoi loepesit, esilibi da ekitoi loeoŋit. Eoŋ EJAKAIT ener, eswama da.”"
Ezekiel18:1 Kobu bobo akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel18:2 “Apoloukus anyoin, inerasi awarag na nuka akwap naka Isirael ebe, ‘Anyamata lukapapa emusabibu loedwar, aliokos idwe ikel’?"
Ezekiel18:3 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwape ajaria, mam bobo inerasi awarag na koIsirael."
Ezekiel18:4 Koany, eraas itauon kere lukan; kwape etau loka papa, kwape kwaŋin etau loka ikoku da erai lokan; etau loiswamai aronis, ŋes etwani."
Ezekiel18:5 “Konye arai edolit ituŋanan kiswamai nuicoranakinio nuibusakinito,"
Ezekiel18:6 kwabo mam enyamakinit oroŋan, ido mam iteluorit akekonye mama ejaas aputosia nuka ekek loka Isirael, komam emunaarit aberu naka aupake, komam ikunyakinit aberu apakio nuka atiakarike;"
Ezekiel18:7 komam erodit idiotuŋanan, konye kinyakak lokapesenike akeititinet, kwabo mam enasit idiotuŋanan kagogon, ido kitanyamenenei yeniketeŋei inyamat, kimukonokini da yenemuialal anapito;"
Ezekiel18:8 yeneyuununei komam aimedaun, kwabo mam ecamununei luitedeparito kere, yenelemari akekan kama kanumam edolito, yenikitodolenenei etube lokabeit loka etuŋanan ka aupake,"
Ezekiel18:9 yenikelosenenei kokisilaka, ido koricenenei itubesiaka, aswam nukabeit; ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Edolit ŋin, abeit eiari.’"
Ezekiel18:10 “Arai keuri ŋesi ikoku yenerai ikokolan, yenebukonori aokot, yeniswamai adio kakiro kanun,"
Ezekiel18:11 kwabo mam iswamai nuibusakinito kere, konye enyamakinit oroŋan, komuna aberu naka aupake,"
Ezekiel18:12 yenabu korod yenikican ka yenilwaritoi, konat kagogon, komam enyakakinit aititiŋet, eteluo akekonye mama ejaas aputosia, eswama nuketal,"
Ezekiel18:13 yenayuununei kanuka aimedaunia, yenacamunit luedeparito; asa eraun kereka ŋin ikajaran? Mam ejari. Eswama italesia ŋul kere: abeit etwani; ebeikinete ŋes akeokot."
Ezekiel18:14 “Koany, arai keuri ŋesi ikoku, yeneanyuni aronisio kere nuka papake nueswamat, koyoŋ, komam iswamai nuikote nen,"
Ezekiel18:15 yenimam enyamakinit oroŋan, ido mam iteluorit akekonye mama ejaas aputosia nuka ekek loka Isirael, yenimam emunaarit aberu naka aupake,"
Ezekiel18:16 komam erodit ituŋanan kere, yenimam ayanaarit aititiŋet, karaida aiŋat kagogon, konye kitanyamenenei yeniketeŋei inyamat, kimukonokini yenemujalal anapito,"
Ezekiel18:17 Yenelemari akekan kama kanumam edolito, yenimam ecamunit aimedaun karaida luitedeparito, yenitodolenenei ikatubesia, kolosenenei kokisilaka; mam nin etwani kanuka numam adolit nuka papake, abeit ejari."
Ezekiel18:18 Konye papake, naarai amwanit kadeden, konat onaceke kagogon, kiswama numam ejok kotuŋake, koany, etwani kanuka numam adoliteke."
Ezekiel18:19 “Konye itemarete yesi atiar, ‘Kanukinyo mam ikoku ibwokia aronis naka papake?’ Arai iswamai ikoku nuicorakinio nuibusakinito, koricenenei ikakisila kere aswam kes, abeit ejari."
Ezekiel18:20 Etau loeswamai aronis, ŋes etwani. Mam ikoku ibwoki numam adolit nuka papake, kwabo mam papake ibwoki numam adolit nuka okokuke; ejaun adolit naka ikadoliton mamakeŋ, ejaun da aronis naka ikaronon mamakeŋ,"
Ezekiel18:21 “Konye arai kibelokin yenikaronon kotoma aronisioke kere nueswamat, koric ikakisilaka kere, kiswama nuicorakinio nuibusakinito, abeit ejari, mam etwani,"
Ezekiel18:22 Mam iitunio akediakanareta nueswamat: eiari kadoliteke nueswamat.
Ezekiel18:23 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Esiyalamikinit tope atwanare naka ikaronon? Konye gwai kibelokin korotoke, kojar?"
Ezekiel18:24 Konye arai kibelokin ikadoliton kadoliteke, kiswama numam adolit, kiswama da kwape ejaatar italesia kere nuiswamai ikaronon, eraun kereka nin ikajaran? Mam iitunio adio kaswamisioke nukadolit nueswamat: kapaarike naepaarit, karonisike naeswamat, etwani kanuka nun."
Ezekiel18:25 “Konye itemarete atiar, ‘Mam eriana erot loka EJAKAIT.’ Aso kiirasi, wu ekek loka Isirael: Mam teni ekarot eriana? Mere ikusirotin lumam erianasi?"
Ezekiel18:26 Arai kibelokin ikadoliton kadoliteke, kiswama numam adolit, kotwana kaŋun; kanumam adoliteke nueswamat, etwani kanuka nun,"
Ezekiel18:27 Bobo da, arai kibelokin ikaronon karonisike naeswamat, kiswama nuicorakinio nuibusakinito, itajari eketau."
Ezekiel18:28 Naarai eomoomoi, ibelokini kapaaretake nueswamat, abeit ejari, mam etwani."
Ezekiel18:29 Konye etemari ekek loka Isirael atiar, ‘Mam eriana erot loka EJAKAIT.’ Wu ekek loka Isirael, mam teni ikarotin erianasi? Mere ikusirotin lumam erianasi?"
Ezekiel18:30 “Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kanuka nun ŋes katubokinia akirokon, ijo ekek loka Isirael, ninitunanan kwape ejaatar ikerotin. Kobonutu, kibelokinos ainyein akusipaar kere, kinyeis numam adolitekus amudiar yes."
Ezekiel18:31 Koeakasi neelwana akusipaar kere nuipaarito; kiswamaut etau lokitetet ka emoyo lokitetet. Kanukinyo ikotor atwanare, ijo ekek loka Isirael?"
Ezekiel18:32 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Naarai mam esiyalamikinit atwanare naka ŋin yenetwani: asa do kibelokinos, kojarata.”"
Ezekiel19:1 Bobo da kokuudianik ikapolok luka Isirael,"
Ezekiel19:2 kohala ebe: Kerai totokon inyo? aŋatuny: Naaperi konatunyo, kokidin onatunyo ludidik itanaki ikedwe."
Ezekiel19:3 Abu kitan idiopet kodweke; Korau iŋatuny yenididi; Kisisiau amej; konyam ituŋa.
Ezekiel19:4 Kopuputu atekerin nuken; Kikamunai kaipanyikec: Koyanaarai kigoluna akwap nako Misiri.
Ezekiel19:5 Kosodi keanyu nin ebe edar, Koolio da akemun, Koseu ikokuke ice, Kituluo iŋatuny yenididi."
Ezekiel19:6 Kirimirimi koŋatunyo, korau iŋatuny yenididi; Kisisiau amej, konyam ituŋa."
Ezekiel19:7 Kojenu ikeeetogoi lukapolok, Kiteeek ireriakee; Kosilior akwap, ka iboro kere lukejaas, Kanuka eporoto loka agatake."
Ezekiel19:8 Kosodete kosurokis atekerin kowaitin kere, ageun kobuku: Kolokikis eboikee, Kikamunai kaipanyikec."
Ezekiel19:9 Koenata oloit kigoluna, Koyanaasi mama ejai ekabaka loko Babulon; Koyanaasi toma abwasin, Kinyek ekeporoto apupun bobo koronan luka Isirael."
Ezekiel19:10 Asubit totokon bala emusabibu, kotoma aokotokon, Loeraitai neajaas akipi: Ideneriat, eleleba atenueik kanuka akipi nuipu."
Ezekiel19:11 Ido kejaas ibelai luegogon araut ibelai luka ajakanut Kanuka nul kalueyaenenete, Kitopolooritai, etiaikee kokidin katenueik nueburok; Koanyunai kanuka aoiaukec kaipues naka atenueikikee."
Ezekiel19:12 Konye korutunoi kadeden, koeakakinai kwap, Kitoon ekwam lokokide araitoke: Kobilunai ibelaike Iuegogon, korinyosi; Konyam akim kes."
Ezekiel19:13 Kwana do eraikin amodiŋ, Akwap naewonit naka akure."
Ezekiel19:14 Alomu akim kobelai luka atenueikike, Anyam araitoke, Komamun kamake ebela loegogon A raut ebela loka ajakanut loka ayait. Eraas nu nuka akuudian, eraunos da akuudian."
Ezekiel20:1 Kosodi kanen kokaru lokikanyetekaarei, kolap lokikanyet, kapaaran nakitomonet naka elap, kopotu ice komakio luka Isirael aiŋit EJAKAIT, kiboikinos kakonyeneka."
Ezekiel20:2 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel20:3 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kinera kimakio luka Isirael, kolimok kes ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Iponito aiŋit eoŋ? Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwape ajaria, mam kinisete eoŋ,"
Ezekiel20:4 Okoku loka etuŋanan, itubokini kereka ijo kes? Itubokini kereka ijo kes? Kitejenik italesia luka lukapapaakee."
Ezekiel20:5 Kolimok kes ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Apaaran naaseunia Isirael, kekeu akakan mama ejai aur naka ekek loka Yakob, ketejenun mama ejaas kesi kakwap nako Misiri, naekeunia akakan mamakee, kener atiar, Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Ezekiel20:6 Apaaran ŋin kekeu akakan mamakee, aitonyoun kakwap nako Misiri aitolomar akwap naarotakinit kes, naeleleete akile ka esik, ŋes aibuses naka akwapin kere,"
Ezekiel20:7 Kabala kes ebe, Koeaka ŋinituŋanan italesia luimielas akonyekus, ido sirikimunaaros kaputosia nuko Misiri; arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Ezekiel20:8 Konye kepaliikis, kagiroto akiirar; mam eeakara ninitunanan italesia luimielasi akonyeke, ido mam inyeina aputosia nuko Misiri. “Kasodi kener abukokini kes akadedeŋ, aitodolikin akanyunyura mamakee kokidin kakwap nako Misiri."
Ezekiel20:9 Konye eswama eoŋ nun kanuka ekakiror, kinyek amoromoroo kakonyen nuka atekerin nukejaas kesi, nuketejenunor mamakee, ketolomu kakwap nako Misiri."
Ezekiel20:10 Kwaŋin ketolomu kes kakwap nako Misiri, kayana modin,"
Ezekiel20:11 Kainak ikakisila, ketejenu ikatubesia, luejaria ituŋanan arai kiswama kes,"
Ezekiel20:12 Bobo da kainak akasabaton, araut aanyunet kidinikec ka eoŋ, tetere ejenunete ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT loetalauni kes,"
Ezekiel20:13 Konye kepaliik ekek loka Isirael kamodiŋ: mam alosenenete kokisilaka, kogiroto ikatubesia luejaria ituŋanan arai kiswama kes; komunaasi noi akasabaton, “Kasodi kener abukokini kes akadedeŋ kamodiŋ, amudiar kes."
Ezekiel20:14 Konye eswama eoŋ ŋun kanuka ekakiror, kinyek amoromoroo kakonyen nuka atekerin, kanuetolomunia kes kakonyenekec."
Ezekiel20:15 Bobo da kekeu akakan mamakec kamodiŋ, kenyek ayaun kes toma akwap naainakinit, naeleleete akile ka esik, ŋes aibuses naka akwapin kere."
Ezekiel20:16 Naarai aneroto ikatubesia, komam elosenenete kokisilaka, komunaasi da akasabaton: naarai atupanarete ikecetauon aputosiakec,"
Ezekiel20:17 Konye kitim akakoŋu, kenyek amudiar kes, kwabo mam abu kapia kes cut kamodiŋ,"
Ezekiel20:18 “Kasodi alimokin ikecedwe kamodiŋ ebe, Sirilosenenete kokisila luka lukapapaakus, ido siriricenenete itubesiakec, kwabo sirikimunaaros kaputosiakec,"
Ezekiel20:19 Arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke, kolosenenete kokisilaka, koricenenete ikatubesia, kiswamaenenete,"
Ezekiel20:20 ido kitalautu akasabaton; eraunete aanyunet kidinikus ka eoŋ, tetere ijenunete ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke."
Ezekiel20:21 Konye kepaliikis idwe; mam kelosenenete kokisilaka, kwabo mam kericenenete itubesiaka aiswamaenen, luejaria ituŋanan, arai kiswama kes; komunaasi da akasabaton. “Kasodi kener abukokin kes akadedeŋ, aitodolikin akanyunyura mamakec kamodiŋ."
Ezekiel20:22 Konye kenyaku akakan, keswama kanuka ekakiror, kinyek amoromoroo kakonyen nuka atekerin kanuetolomunia kes kakonyenekec,"
Ezekiel20:23 Bobo da kekeu akakan mamakec kamodiŋ ebe, eweliweli kes toma atekerin, esiarisiari kes toma akwapin;"
Ezekiel20:24 Naarai mam apotu kiswamata ikatubesia, konye koneroto ikakisila, komunaasi da akasabaton, ido emielas akecekonye aputosia nuka lukapapaakec."
Ezekiel20:25 Bobo da abu kainak kes ikisila lumam ejok, ka itubesia lumam ejariata."
Ezekiel20:26 Kamuna kes kanuka ainakinetakec, naarai kitotorenenoto ikiyaikec kere akim, tetere etisiliori kes, kojenutu ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT,"
Ezekiel20:27 “Aso do, okoku loka etuŋanan, kinera kekek loka Isirael, kolimok ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kanuka nu bobo ŋes kamoromorooto lukapapaakus, naarai apotu kepaliikis eoŋ."
Ezekiel20:28 Naarai naadaunia ayaun kes akwap, nakekeu akakan ainakin kes, kosodete nakeanyuniata eukot loeoia, ka ekitoi loetumit, koinakis kanen asubanakec, koinakis kanen ainakinetakee nuitunyunyurikinete; kanen da kisupuruut asakatakec nueuru saa, kobukonokinete kanen ainakinetakec numatan."
Ezekiel20:29 Kasodi alimokin kes ebe, Aibois naicelelei nailosete apolouke inyo? Kosodi komaikinai ekekiror Bama kiton lolo."
Ezekiel20:30 Aso do kolimok ekek loka Isirael ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Imunaaros ca kwape kejaar epone loka lukapapaakus? Ido idotearos ca atupar italesiakec?"
Ezekiel20:31 Naiinanakiniata ainakinetakus, naitotorioto idwekus akim, imunaaros ca kaputosiakus kere kiton lolo, Aso kinisete ca eoŋ, WU ekek loka Isirael? Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwape ajaria, mam kiŋisete eoŋ."
Ezekiel20:32 “Kanin da naelomari otauonokus mam ejaun nepetai da; naarai ineras ebe, ‘Kirauni kwape atekerin, kwape ikekia luka akwapin, aijaanakin ikito ka amor.’"
Ezekiel20:33 “Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwape ajaria, abeit arauni ekabakakus kakan nakagogon, kakan da naerioro, kadeden naebukoro."
Ezekiel20:34 Ido kalemuni katekerin, katukonok yes alemun kakwapin nukiisiarakinio, kakan nakagogon, kakan da naerioro, kadeden naebukoro."
Ezekiel20:35 Kayauni amodiŋ naka atekerin, ido kipuri kaŋina kayes kasesenas kakonyen."
Ezekiel20:36 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwape kapurio kalukapapaakus kamodiŋ naka akwap nako Misiri, kwape kwaŋin ŋes kipurio kayes da."
Ezekiel20:37 Ketotori yes kwap kebela, ketolomari olomorut loka aitutuket;"
Ezekiel20:38 apiari lukepali kotomakus, ka nul da luediakarete mama ajai: alemuni kakwap naiboioto, konye mam elomarete akwap naka Isirael. Ŋenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel20:39 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Ka jo da, wu ekek loka Isirael, koloto kiiaanak ninitunanan aputosiake, amear lolo, arai kiineroro akiirar eoŋ: konye mam bobo imunaarete ekakiror lokalaunan kainakinetakus, ka aputosiakus."
Ezekiel20:40 “Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Naarai koronataka lokalaunan, koronat loka aicelel naka Isirael, kanen kejaanakinia ekek kere loka Isirael, kes kere, kakwap: kanen ŋes acamunia kes, kanen da eburaa ainakinetakus, ka araito nugeet nuka ainakinetakus, ka iborokus kere lukalaunak."
Ezekiel20:41 Acamuni yes kwape asakat naeuru saa, nakalemunia ayaun katekerin, katukonok alemun kakwapin nukiisiarakinitai; ketalaunio kamakus kakonyen nuka atekerin."
Ezekiel20:42 Ŋenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, naketolomaria akwap naka Isirael, akwap naabu kekeu akakan ainakin lukapapaakus."
Ezekiel20:43 Kosodete iitunete kaŋina ikusirotin, ka aswamisiokus kere, nuipotu komunaarotor; kikadakinete kanuka aronisiokus kere nuiswamato."
