Ezekiel20:44 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Ŋenunete ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT nakeswamakiniata yes kanuka ekakiror, mere kwape ejaatar irotinikus lueroko, karaida kwape ejaatar aswamisiokus nukasilianut.”"
Ezekiel20:45 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel20:46 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kitete akonikonyen eŋalakimak, kolimonok akonikirot kobei eŋalakimak, kodwarak amagoro naka ais nakotoma Eŋalakimak."
Ezekiel20:47 Kolimok amagoro naka Eŋalakimak ebe, Kiira akirot naka EJAKAIT: inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Koany enokokini akim mamakon, kicwe nolikltoi loepesit kotomakon, ka nolikitoi loeoŋit: mam itudenio aipelonoreta nuka akim naesarani, enyami akim akonyen kere ageun kenalakimak kiton agolitomei."
Ezekiel20:48 Eanyunete awat kere ebe eoŋ EJAKAIT enokokinit: mam itudenio.”
Ezekiel20:49 Kasodi atemar atiar, “Wu okwe Ejakait EOEKB! Kabalas eoŋ ebe, c Mere ŋes eketataman loka awaragasia?’”"
Ezekiel21:1 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel21:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kitete akonikonyen Yerusalem, kolimonok akonikirot kobei aiboisio nukalaunak; kodwarak akwap naka Isirael."
Ezekiel21:3 Kolimok akwap naka Isirael ebe, Inera kwanata EJAKAIT ebe: Koany, arai lokasurupikon, ido autuni ekakileŋ kalem kakuraruke, kapiaria eut ikadoliton ka ikaronon,"
Ezekiel21:4 Aso naarai kapiari eut ikadoliton ka ikaronon, ŋes einakini ekakileŋ alomun kakuraruke asurokinia awat kere ageun kenalakimak kiton agolitomei."
Ezekiel21:5 Ejenunete do awat kere ebe eoŋ EJAKAIT autunit ekakileŋ kakuraruke; mam eboŋokini bobo.
Ezekiel21:6 Aso ijo okoku loka etuŋanan, kidiny; kidiny kinereteny luebilil, kaiturur naepol kakonyenekec,"
Ezekiel21:7 Kosodi kanen, kiitemasi atiar, ‘Kanukinyo idinyar?’ kiner ebe, ‘Kanuka apupon, Naarai epote, eburuni ŋolitau, ilaiakakaros akanin kere, iilori nollmoyo, ekalanyakaros akuŋin kere kwape akipi.’ Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Koany, epote, iswamao da.”"
Ezekiel21:8 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel21:9 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kodwar, kiner ebe, Inera kwanata EJAKAIT ebe: Kiner ebe, Ekileŋ, ekileŋ, ipenitai, epwasitai da!"
Ezekiel21:10 Ipenitai tetere eari, epwasitai da tetere imilia! Aso kiyalamikini baea? Okokuka, imenit ijo ebela, ka ŋiniborc kere yenikakitoi."
Ezekiel21:11 Einakinitai ekileŋ apwasio, tetere itinio; ipenitai, eebo, epwasitai da, aijaikin akan naka ekaaran."
Ezekiel21:12 Okoku loka etunananrkomony, kibwolol: naarai esurokinit ituŋaka, esurokinit ikapolok kere luka Isirael: ekorakinitai mama ejai ekileŋ nepepe kikatuŋa, Aso kibap ekonitul."
Ezekiel21:13 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Naarai mam eraun eitemis; ikwaikini bo do ŋes ai arai imenit ebela?"
Ezekiel21:14 “Aso do ijo okoku loka etuŋanan, kodwar, kibap akanin; kitetemono ekileŋ irwan aarei, eebo irwan auni, ekileŋ loka nul kalueario; ŋes ekileŋ loka earit loepol, loiriamarit kes."
Ezekiel21:15 Ebwaik emidet loka ekileŋ oruteikec kere, tetere eburunete ikecetauon, kiyatanakinete aiguikin. Wu okwe! etusubi bala eimilia, eisitai aaria,"
Ezekiel21:16 Kitemokin, kojep teten; kiderakin, kojep kediany; nen kere neebeit akwanisikon."
Ezekiel21:17 Ebapi eoŋ da akakanin, esimoni akanyunyura: eoŋ EJAKAIT ener.”"
Ezekiel21:18 Kobu bobo akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel21:19 “Ijo da, okoku loka etuŋanan, kitodik irotin iarei, luebunio ekileŋ loka ekabaka loko Babulon; elomunete nul iarei kakwap adiopet. Kigir aibois, kigir neegeunitor eror loebei ore."
Ezekiel21:20 Kitodik erot loka ekileŋ abunore Raba loka idwe luka Amon, ka Yuda kotoma Yerusalem loebwaitai."
Ezekiel21:21 Naarai ebwoi ekabaka loko Babulon kaneetiakar erot, neegeunitotor irotin iarei, airo: ilamilami imalia, kinit iterapim, koro emany."
Ezekiel21:22 Kakanike nakoteten eroet loka Yerusalem, aitemokin akuta nutiyanakinet, awoon aituk aiar, aikeseun eporoto keibwon, aitemokin akuta nutiyanakinet orutei, aitut itutio, aiduk arwatatin."
Ezekiel21:23 Eraun kamakec bala aidwar naatai kakonyenekec, luiyapoikinete aiyaposio: konye isiituni kes numam adolit, tetere ikamunio."
Ezekiel21:24 “Kanuka ŋun inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naarai kisiituut numam adolitekus, naarai apukor adiakanaretakus, kotakanut aronisiokus kotoma aswamisiokus kere; ido naarai kiitunio kikamunio kakan."
Ezekiel21:25 Ŋo da, lokaronon Ioimusuŋitai cut, ekapolon loka Isirael, kidolok apaaranikon, apak naka aiticaniokon nakawasia;"
Ezekiel21:26 Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kolac egoe lokienieni akou, koou aboko: mam bobo ejaunos ŋun kwaŋin: kitopoloo yenejai kwap, kitisil yenejai kuiu."
Ezekiel21:27 Abuburiari, abuburiari, abuburiari: mam bobo nun ejaunete, aitodol neabunio elopet: ido ainakini ŋes."
Ezekiel21:28 “Ŋo da, okoku loka etuŋanan, kodwar, kiner ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE nuka idwe luka Amon, ido nuka amorositikee; kiner ebe, Ekileŋ, ekileŋ loeutunitoi, epwasitai aaria, aiwenyaria, araun kwape eimilia:"
Ezekiel21:29 naeanyuniata aamameak kanukon, naedwariata nukaiŋal kanukon, aisiperikin jo omurisina luka ikaronok luimusunitai noi, lukedoloki akecepaaran, apak naka aitieaniokee nakawasia."
Ezekiel21:30 Kinyakak akuraruke, Aibois nakisubakinitai, akwap nakiwurikinitai, nepenen katubokinia."
Ezekiel21:31 Ido kabukokini jo akaisiop; kakutakini jo akim naka akanyunyura: kejaikini akanin nuka ituŋa luesubito bala itian, luepiriaka amudiar."
Ezekiel21:32 Iraun akito nukinoka; ejaunos akoniwokot kidin akwap; mam kiitunio bobo: naarai eoŋ EJAKAIT ener.”
Ezekiel22:1 Bobo da kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe,"
Ezekiel22:2 “Ŋo da, okoku loka etuŋanan, itubokini, itubokini kereka ijo ere loka aokot? Aso kitejenik ŋes italesiake kere."
Ezekiel22:3 Kinera ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Ere loebukokini aokot kidinike, tetere edolokini apakike, loiswamai aputosia amunaaror!"
Ezekiel22:4 Igwaunit akirot naka aokot nuibukoo, imunaar kaputosiakon nuiswama; isukuny apaarasiakon, ido idolok okarukon, ŋes kainakini ketuluori amorosit katekerin, ka yenikisekelo kakwapin kere."
Ezekiel22:5 Lukiapiatar, ka luelwaka, kisekelete, ijo loejai ekiror lokamunaara, ido ileleba autaar."
Ezekiel22:6 “Koany, ikapolok luka Isirael, ninitunanan kwape eiaar apedorike, kejaenenas kotomakon abukor aokot,"
Ezekiel22:7 Kotomakon kemenenenata papa ka toto; kidinikon kiswamanakiniata ipejonon nukamwanir: kotomakon kenyamanakiniata kepali yenemamei papake ka apuserut,"
Ezekiel22:8 Imwan ikaboro lukalaunak, imunaa da akasabaton."
Ezekiel22:9 Keiaenenas ituŋa Iukasabanakinak kotomakon abukor aokot: kotomakon da ŋes kenyameneniata koronan: kidinikon kiswamaeneniata nukadoteu.
Ezekiel22:10 Kotomakon kepukoriata amujalal naka lukapapakee: kotomakon kitisilioto aŋor numam alaete kanuka atiakarikec,"
Ezekiel22:11 Ido ejai ioiswamai nuketal kaberu naka eidunyeteke; ido ejai eee loemunaari kadoteu aberu naka okokuke; ido ejai eee kotomakon loitisili kinacike, akoku naka papake."
Ezekiel22:12 Kotomakon eropio kes abukor aokot; ibu kotukonok ameda aitedepar, idum amakira kama ejaas iidunyetakon kanuka areit; ido ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kimurwok eoŋ."
Ezekiel22:13 “Aso do koany, atuari akakanin kamakirakon nakaimod naidum, kaokot da nukejaenenas kidinikon,"
Ezekiel22:14 Epedori kereka ekonitau atitiŋikin, arai akonikanin ajaut kagogon, kapaarasia nukeswamakinia? Eoŋ EJAKAIT ener, eswamai da."
Ezekiel22:15 Kesiarisiari jo katekerin, keweliweli kakwapin; etanaŋi da amodokokokon kotomakon."
Ezekiel22:16 Kosodi imunaar kanukon, kakonyen nuka atekerin; ijenuni ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
Ezekiel22:17 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe,"
Ezekiel22:18 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, arau ekek loka Isirael elele kamaka; eraas kesi kere aisinin, ka adebe, ka asua, ka asasin kokidin oupa; eraas kesi elele loka epuesa."
Ezekiel22:19 Aso do inera kwana ta Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naarai iraunos kere elele, asa do koany, katukonokini yes kidiŋ Yerusalem,"
Ezekiel22:20 Kwape etukonokinerc epuesa ka aisinin, ka asua ka asasin ka adebe kidin oupa, aicukokin akim, aisiealaria; katukonokini yes kwaŋin kakanyunyura, kakadedeŋ; kebwaikini nen, kesicalari."
Ezekiel22:21 Eebo, katukonokini, keeukokini akim naka akanyunyura, icalaros yesi kokidinike,"
Ezekiel22:22 Kwape ecalaror epuesa kokidin oupa, iealaros yesi da kwape kwaŋin kokidinike; ijenunete ebe eoŋ EJAKAIT kabukok yes akadedeŋ.”"
Ezekiel22:23 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel22:24 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kolimok ŋes ebe, Irai ijo akwap namam itesegario ido mam itetepio akiru kapaaran naka aisiop."
Ezekiel22:25 Enerut inabinoke kokidinike, kwape eŋatuny loegat naepoopoaa imejauna: anyamata aiiar naka ituŋa; anatata iboro luka akais nuipu ka luka etiai loepol; etupuata apuserunuke kokidinike,"
Ezekiel22:26 Epaliikis isasedotinike ikakisila, amunaasi ikaboro lukalaunak; mam etiakitos iboro lukalaunak ka luka apakio kere, mam isisianakinito atiaketait kotoma lumam elaete ka Iuelaetc, ebwaata akecekonye kasabatonoka, kamoromoroo eoŋ da kamakec."
Ezekiel22:27 Esubito ikapolokoke kokidinike bala ipeen luepoopoete imeiauna; abukor aokot, ka amudiar aijar, tetere imakiraete kaimod."
Ezekiel22:28 Ido eladaata inabinoke kanukee aitwakaŋ, eanyunete aamameak, edwarakinete kes nukainal, kobalas ebe, “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE,’ kwabo mam EJAKAIT inerit."
Ezekiel22:29 Apotu ituŋa luka akwap komwana, kotupasi aiŋat; eebo, esiyaloŋoŋoto lukican ka luilwaritos, ido amwanata imoit atitai,"
Ezekiel22:30 Kamoote ituŋanan kotomakec, yeniketetean abwas, yenebwoi karorwa kakonyeneka kanuka akwap, kenyek amudiar; konye mam abu kaany imodio da."
Ezekiel22:31 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kanuka nun ijes abukokinia kes akaisiop; kadau kes kakim naka akanyunyura: etebeik ekecerot akwesikee.”"
Ezekiel23:1 Kobu bobo akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel23:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, ajaas aŋor aarei, totokec adiopet:"
Ezekiel23:3 kiporoto Misiri; kiporoto koiditeukec: koridakinai ikecekisin kaŋina, kieikakis atibolok nuka abekonutukec kaŋina."
Ezekiel23:4 Ikecekiroria Akola nakapolon, ka Akoliba kinacike. Koraut nukaŋ, kouriata idwe lusap ka Iupesur. Ikeeekiroria da, Samaria ŋes Akola, Yerusalem da ijes Akoliba."
Ezekiel23:5 “Kiporo Akola nakeraar nakan; kikila ipailonoke, Iyasurian ikeidunyeta."
Ezekiel23:6 Lukenapenenete lubulului, ikayaitok ka ijaka, kes kere ikarumunak luimielai, ikebwanenok luibwanenete ibalasin."
Ezekiel23:7 Kokorak kes akedoteu, kes kere, ituŋa luseuna luka Asuria: ka ŋol da lokikila ŋesi, komunaar kaputosiakee kere."
Ezekiel23:8 Kwabo mam kinyeini akedoteu anyoun kapaarasia nuka Misiri; naarai koperoto kaŋes katumunike, kicikakis atiboloka nuka abekonutuke: kobukokis ŋes akeeedoteu."
Ezekiel23:9 Ŋes kakorakinia akanin nuka ipailonoke, akanin nuka Iyasurian, lukikila."
Ezekiel23:10 Kopukosi nul amujalalake: koyanaasi ikedwe lusap ka lupesur, koara ŋes kekilen: koraun naejenio kanor; naarai aponi kotubokinai akiro."
Ezekiel23:11 “Koany kinacike da Akoliba nun, konye kiteleka ŋesi ŋin kapaar naka eikilike, kotoma adoteuke da naitelekarit adoteu naka inacike."
Ezekiel23:12 Kikila Iyasurian, ikayaitok ka ijaka, ikeidunyeta, lukenapenenete lukaibuses naepol, ikebwanenok luibwanenete ibalasin, kes kere ikatumunak luimielai."
Ezekiel23:13 Kaany ebe emunaara; kotupasi kesi kere edioperor,"
Ezekiel23:14 Konye kiyatak ŋesi akedoteu: naarai koany ituŋa lukinomakinitai arwatat, aputosia nuka Ikaludean nukinomitai keiese Ioirananai."
Ezekiel23:15 Koenitos arokoban aŋabesikec, kienienito akwesikee kigoen lukijesesinei, kes kere kotakanete kwape ikapolok, kwape ejaar aput naka Ibabulonin luka Kaludea, akwap nakobukec,"
Ezekiel23:16 Napaanyunia kes kikila, kiyakik ikiyakia koKaludea,"
Ezekiel23:17 Kopotu Ibabulonin mama ejai ŋesi kaperis naka amin, komunaasi ŋes kadoteukec, komunaar kakes, kopianik eketau kes."
Ezekiel23:18 Kwaŋin kopuko akedoteu, kopuko da akemujalal: kopianik ekatau ŋes, kwape apianikinia ekatau kinacike."
Ezekiel23:19 Konye kiyatak adoteuke, kiitu apaarasia nuka atumunike, nueporoo kakwap nako Misiri."
Ezekiel23:20 Kikila ipailonokec, kosubito awatekec bala awat nuka asigiria, kosubite aurikec bala aur naka ibalasin."
Ezekiel23:21 Kwaŋin iitunit adoteu naka atumunikon, nakieikakiniata Imisirian aiburun naka atibolokakon nuka atumunikon."
Ezekiel23:22 “Aso do, inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Ŋo Akoliba, koany, etonyouni ipailonokon asurokin jo, luapianiki ekonitau, ayauni kes asurokin jo kowaitin kere;"
Ezekiel23:23 Ibabulonin, ka Ikaludean kere, Pekod ka Soa, ka Koa, ka Iyasurian kere nepepe kakes: ikatumunak luimielai, kes kere ikayaitok ka ijaka, ikapolok ka ituŋa luejenikina, kes kere ibwanenito ibalasin."
Ezekiel23:24 Epote kesi asurokin jo ekapitos luiiis, kagalin, ka nukakokoron, ka atukot naka ituŋa; iderakioos ejie kaio kojaas kiupalin ka ibukwi ka akopiran owaitin kere: adakakini kes atubokin akiro, kitubokinete kwape ejaatar itubesiakec."
Ezekiel23:25 Ederakini ekokoteka asurokin jo, kiticanete kadeden. Kituborete ikumesikon, ka akiikon; irikakini ekileŋ akonitutubet oaesali. Eyaŋaarete idwekon lusap ka lupesur; icweio akonitutubet naesali kakim."
Ezekiel23:26 Kilacarete inapenekon, eyaŋaarete lukaseganutukon luejok."
Ezekiel23:27 Kwaŋin etanania akonidoteu, ka eporokon lokolo iyauni kakwap nako Misiri: tetere mam iteluori akonikonye mamakee, karaida akiitun bobo Misiri."
Ezekiel23:28 Naarai inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, kakorakini jo akanin nuka nul kaluireit, akanin nuka ŋul kaluapianiki etaukon."
Ezekiel23:29 Kiswamakinete jo nukanar, kidemarete aitaaritoikon kere, kijalakinete imujalal atitai: epukorio amuialal naka adoteukon. Eporokon ka adoteukon kere"
Ezekiel23:30 kiswamakinito kwaŋin naarai ibu kiporo mama ejaas ikapirin, ido naarai imunaar kaputosiakec."
Ezekiel23:31 Ibu kotupa erot loka inacikoo; ŋes kainakinia akolike akanikon.
Ezekiel23:32 Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Imasi akoli naka inacikon, Naidul naepol; Kikienare noi kimuario; Naarai igauni ŋesi nuipu."
Ezekiel23:33 Kilelebikin amera ka aiturur. Akoli naka aitirira ka ajalakinio, Ŋes akoli naka inacikon Samaria."
Ezekiel23:34 Imasi aikokoor, Iboiboi abelekekake, Icili da ikonikisina: Naarai ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Eoŋ ener."
Ezekiel23:35 Aso inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naarai kimurwok eoŋ, koeaka eoŋ kaukon, asa do jo da kibwok eporokon ka adoteukon.”"
Ezekiel23:36 Bobo da kalimok EJAKAIT eoŋ ebe: “Okoku loka etuŋanan, itubokini kereka Akola ka Akoliba? Aso kolimok kes italesiakec,"
Ezekiel23:37 Naarai adoteata, ejaas aokot akaninikec; adoteata aputosiakec; ido etotoroto ikecedwe lusap lukawurikinete akim ainakin nun ainyam."
Ezekiel23:38 Ido oobo keswamakis eoŋ nu: amunaasi akaibois nakalaunan apaaran ŋipeŋin, amunaasi da akasabaton."
Ezekiel23:39 Naarai kedautu aarakin ikecedwe mama ejaas aputosiakee, kosodete alomar aiboisika nakalaunan kapaaran kaŋin amunaar. Ido koany, kwape kwaŋin eswamaata kotogoka."
Ezekiel23:40 Ido bobo ijukakis anyaraun ituŋa luepote kama elwana: luejukakinio ekiyakia, ido koany, kopotu. Kilon kanuka nul, kojuk akonyekon, kisir lukisiro."
Ezekiel23:41 Kiboikin aperis nanepuk, kitemonokinitete emesa kinarenike, loibwaikinit lukisupurununoka ka akakinyet."
Ezekiel23:42 Kojai eporoto loka ekodet loijamamai kaŋes: koyaunai ikamerak anyoun kamodiŋ nepepe kimukopin; kitanapai ŋun aikomon akaninikec, ka abokoi da nuejok akwesikee."
Ezekiel23:43 “Kasodi eoŋ einer nuka nin naemoionikinit adoteu ebe, Kwana edoteete kaŋes, ŋin da kakes."
Ezekiel23:44 Kolomasi mama ejai, kwape elomariata mama ejai naadote. Kwape kwaŋin kelomariata mama ejai Akola ka Akoliba, aŋor nukeporok."
Ezekiel23:45 Etubokinete ikadolitok ŋun akiro kwape etubokinere nudotea, ido kwape etubokinere aŋor nuebukorete aokot; naarai eraas nudotea, ejaas aokot akaninikee.”"
Ezekiel23:46 Naarai ebala kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: “Etonyoikini kes ekodet, kainakin aiiliilio ka anatario."
Ezekiel23:47 Ibiribirei kes ekodet kamor, icutarete kikilenakec; earete ikecedwe lusap ka lupesur, ieweete ikecetogoi kakim."
Ezekiel23:48 Kwaŋin etanania eporo kakwap, tetere isisianakinio aŋor kere kinyeis arokor eporokus."
Ezekiel23:49 Ido kitacakinio eporokus, ibwokete aronisio nuka aputosiakus: ijenunete do ebe arai eoŋ Ejakait EDEKE."
Ezekiel24:1 Bobo da, kokaru Iokikanyetekaonon, olap lokitomonet, kapaaran nakitomonet naka elap, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:"
Ezekiel24:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kiwadik ekiror loka apaaran, apaaran napena. Ekunyu do ekabaka loko Babulon Yerusalem apaaran napena."
Ezekiel24:3 Kinerak ekek lokepali awarag, kolimok ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kidorok amot, kidorok, Kobukok akipi:"
Ezekiel24:4 Kotukonok inerioke, Ŋoliiner Ioejok, amurwo ka akuat; Kileleb akoio nueseunitai."
Ezekiel24:5 Koyana lueseunitai kosipan, Kotukok akoio kwapuke; Kitukul noi; Eebo kipooto noi akojoke kotomake."
Ezekiel24:6 “Kanuka nun inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Itukwi ere lokaokot, amoti nairourounit, airourounike namam alomuni kotomake! Kisujau einer ka einer komam eroet edoikinit."
Ezekiel24:7 Naarai ejaas akeokot kidinike; ebwaiki atiida naelapat; mam ebukokinit alup, arapar kapua."
Ezekiel24:8 Tetere kitodoku adedeŋ ainyania, ebwaik eoŋ akeokot atiida naelapat, kinyeis arapara."
Ezekiel24:9 Kanuka nun inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Itukwi ere lokaokot! Etopoloori da atukot nakakito.
Ezekiel24:10 Kicul akito, kinokok akim, kipo noi akiriŋ, kisidiki acece, kosisioto akojo."
Ezekiel24:11 Kosodi aibwaikin amot atotoleke komamei ibore kotoma, komwanuu, kidop aisinitike, kocalar amadokokoke, kodaun airourounike,"
Ezekiel24:12 Ketapas aitaaritoi; kwabo mam elemar airourounike naepol; mam airourounike elemar kakim.
Ezekiel24:13 Airourounike ŋes eporokon lomodok. Naarai abu ketesega jo, komam jo isegar, mam bobo kitesegaario aitodol naesimonikinia akadedeŋ mamakon."
Ezekiel24:14 Eoŋ EJAKAIT ener: edoli, eswamai da. Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Mam aboŋori kau, ido mam etimi, ido mam eitokini; kwape ejaatar ikonirotin, ido kwape ejaatar akoniswamisio, kitubokinete akiro.”"
Ezekiel24:15 Ido da kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel24:16 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, koany, ademari katipet kamakon naimielas akonikonye: konye mam ikuudiani karaida aimony, karaida akiyo alele kakonyekon."
Ezekiel24:17 Kidiny, konye eililina; sirikikuudian nakatwan. Koen ekonigoe loka akou, konap akonimuk kakejekon; sirikirapak aituk, karaida ainyam atap naka ikebworok.”"
Ezekiel24:18 Abu kener kituna tupuruc; kotwana akaberu eboŋ. Keswama atupurue naee kwape kecorakinetere.
Ezekiel24:19 Kalimokis ituŋa ebe, “Kitejenunai sio anyoika akiro nu kamakosi, iswamaa kwana?”"
Ezekiel24:20 Kabala kes ebe, “Abu akirot naka EJAKAIT kobu mama ajai ebe:"
Ezekiel24:21 ‘Kolimok ekek loka Isirael ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, amunaari akaibois nakalaunan, eitur loka apedorikus, naimielas akonyekus, eipud da loka aijarakus; ibiroros ikusidwe lusap ka lupesur kekilen, luipotu koialakis,"
Ezekiel24:22 Iswamaete yesi da kwape eswamaa eoŋ: mam irapakinete aitukekus, kwabo mam inyamete atap naka ikebworok."
Ezekiel24:23 Ejaunos igoenekus akwesikus, ka amukakus akeiekus: mam ikuudianete karaida aimony; konye idokororiaros kanumam adolitekus, idinyanakinos ŋinituŋanan kaupake."
Ezekiel24:24 Kwaŋin eraun Esekiel aanyunet kamakus; kere nueswama ŋesi iswamaete yesi da. Naejauniata ŋun, kosodi do ijenunete ebe arai eoŋ Ejakait EDEKE.’"
Ezekiel24:25 “Ka jo da, okoku loka etuŋanan, kapaaran naalemaria agogonukec, aiyalama naka aibusesukec, naimielas akonyekec, ka ŋin naebwaikinito ikecetauon, ka ikecedwe da lusap ka lupesur,"
Ezekiel24:26 apaaran ya ebuni yenekui mamakon, kisiira jo kaki."
Ezekiel24:27 Kapaaran kaya iwooaaari aitukukon mama ejai ŋin yenekui, ineri da, komam bobo ibanaana, Kwaŋin iraunor aanyunet mamakee: ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
Ezekiel25:1 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel25:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kite idwe luka Amon, kodwarak kes."
Ezekiel25:3 Kolimok idwe luka Amon ebe, Kiirasi akirot naka Ejakait EDEKE; Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naarai iner atiar, ‘Uus!’ aimwaŋ akaibois nakalaunan, nakemunaaror; aimwaŋ da akwap naka Isirael, nakitisilere; aimwaŋ da ekek loka Yuda, nakiioreorere;"
Ezekiel25:4 asa do koany, keiaikini jo araun airumet naka idwe lukokide, idukurete kesi tomakon, edukokinete ikeeetogoi tomakon; enyamcte akoniraito, emascte da akonikile,"
Ezekiel25:5 Etarauni Raba auj naka ikaalai, ka idwe da luka Amon aperis naka isipanin. Ŋenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT,"
Ezekiel25:6 Naarai inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naarai ibap akaninikon, kotac kakejekon, kolelak kepali kere lokotaukon akwap naka Isirael;"
Ezekiel25:7 asa koany, ario akakan mamakon, kejaikini jo araun inatat yenika atekerin; keŋadaari jo kotoma otuŋa, ketooliori jo kakwapin: kamudiari. Ŋenuni do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel25:8 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naarai inerasi Moab ka Seir ebe, Koany, eputos ekek loka Yuda katekerin kere;"
Ezekiel25:9 asa koany, aŋaikini ewai loka Moab anyoun koreria, anyoun koreriake lukoikorunoke, aibuses naka akwap, Bet-yesimot, ka Baal-meon, ka Kiriataim."
Ezekiel25:10 Mama ejaas idwe lukokide, aitiji idwe luka Amon, ainakini kes araun airumet, tetere mam bobo iitunio idwe luka Amon katekerin,"
Ezekiel25:11 Atubokini Moab. Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT,"
Ezekiel25:12 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Naarai eswamak Edom erono ekek loka Yuda ainyaŋ, ebuca noi, enyana kamakee:"
Ezekiel25:13 Ŋes inerar kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe, ariori akakan mama ejai Edom, apiari ituŋa ka itian; etisili ageun koTeman; aitodol Deden ibiroros kekilen."
Ezekiel25:14 Ebwaikini Edom ekanyanit kakan naka ikatuŋa Isirael; iswamakinete Edom kwape ejaar akanyunyura ido kwape ejaar akadedeŋ. Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Ejenunete kesi ekanyanit,"
Ezekiel25:15 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naarai eswamata Ipilisitian enyaŋit, enyanata kepali loka otauonokec amudiar kaitusurup namam cnani;"
Ezekiel25:16 asa do inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Koany, ariori akakan mama ejaas Ipilisitian, apiari Ikeretin, amudiari da aatoŋot naka ariri naka aŋolol."
Ezekiel25:17 Enyaŋi noi kamakec kairetakin naededen. Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, naebwaikinia kes ekanyanit.”"
Ezekiel26:1 Kosodi kanen kokaru lokitomonet kadiopet, kapaaran nasodit naka elap, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:"
Ezekiel26:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, naarai enerak Turo Yerusalem ebe, ‘Uus, abila nol Iokerai erute loka ituŋa; ebelokin neaiai: elelebun do, naarai kwana eswap ŋesi.’"
Ezekiel26:3 Aso inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, ijo Turo, kasurokini jo, ketonyoikini atekerin nuipu, kwape itonyounio aŋolol akekailan,"
Ezekiel26:4 Emudiarete kesi arwatatin nuka Turo, ka atiyatiya itogoike lueojak; ekisari apuake, etuluori atiiba naelapat."
Ezekiel26:5 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Eraun aibois naeterarere iboyan kokidin aŋolol: naarai eoŋ ŋes ener: eraun ŋesi enatat loka atekerin."
Ezekiel26:6 Eario apesuruke nuejaas orony kekilen, Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT,"
Ezekiel26:7 “Naarai inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, ayauni Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon, ekabaka loka ikabakan, anyoun kagolitomei, asurokin Turo, ejaas kibalasin, ka agalin, ka ikebwanenok, ka ajore, ka ituŋa da luipu,"
Ezekiel26:8 Eari apesurukon nuejaas orony kekileŋ: eduki arwatatin asurokinia, itutuei etut asurokinia, kikeikini eupal."
Ezekiel26:9 Ibwaikini skutake nutiyanakinet arwatatinikon, ido ejepejepei cut abwasinikon kaepeike."
Ezekiel26:10 Kirapari apua naka ibalasinike naarai ipu: ilokilokos arwatatinikon kanuka ecelet loka ikebwanenok, ka loka akokoron, ka loka agalin, naelomaria koruteikon, kwape elomariata ituŋa ore loebelitai arorwa,"
Ezekiel26:11 Ipudapudai ikonirotin kere kimageger luka ibalasinike: eari ikonituŋa kekilen, ijesunos ipirin luka agogoŋukon kwap."
Ezekiel26:12 Ido enaŋete akonibar, emejaete lugwelanarakon: etiyatiyaete eut arwatatinikon, emudiarete itogoikon lukaisiyalamikina: ecakanakinete amorukon ka akitokon ka apuakon kidin akipi."
Ezekiel26:13 Ido etanaŋi eoŋ eporoto loka ikososiokon; mam iirario bobo aruo naka adeudeunokon.
Ezekiel26:14 Ido ketuluori atiiba naelapat: iraun aibois naeterarere iboyan; mam kidukio bobo, Naarai ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Eoŋ EJAKAIT ener."
Ezekiel26:15 “Elimokini Ejakait EDEKE Turo kwanata ebe: Mam kereka emaranete apujana kanuka airetun naka aibirorikon, naidinyatar luimusunitai, naeiaar earit kidinikon?"
Ezekiel26:16 Kosodete ijesunos ikapolok kere luka aŋolol koicolonokec luka ajakanut, elemunete ikeeegoen, elaeunete ikeeenapen luesonyitai: enapete amaran; iboikinos kwap, emaranete ŋinipak, kiumokinete jo."
Ezekiel26:17 Kikuudianete, kobalas ebe, ‘Imudiari ca, loeboienenoto ikekwaŋak aŋolol, Ere loajena, Lokegogon kaŋolol, Ŋol ka lukiboiete kotoma, Lokititasurokinit nul kere lueboiete kotoma."
Ezekiel26:18 Kwana emaranete apuiana Kapaaran naka aibirorikon, Eebo, apuiana nuejaas aŋolol Eburunete kanuka alositekon.’"
Ezekiel26:19 “Naarai inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naketuluoria jo ere lokitisilio, kwape ireria luemameete luibojete kotoma; naketadakikinia akar, nakirapariata akipi nuipu;"
Ezekiel26:20 ŋes konyet kesijesunia jo nepepe kaŋul luijesunos toma Aipany, mama ejaas ituŋa luno, kesiboikini atutubeta nukokwap nuka akwap, aiboisio nuesilok nuŋo; nepepe kanul luiiesunos toma Aipany kinyek ajaut kituna; ido ebwaikini aibuses akwap naka ikaiarak."
Ezekiel26:21 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Ketuluori jo etasuro, mam bobo ijaun: karaida kiimoi, mam kianyunio bobo.”"
Ezekiel27:1 Kobu bobo akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel27:2 “Ŋo da, okoku loka etuŋanan, kokuudian Turo;"
Ezekiel27:3 kolimok Turo ebe, Wu jo loiboie kaneelomarere aŋolol, loirai ekagwelanaran loka atekerin mama ejaas apujana, inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Ijo, wu Turo, iner ebe, ‘Adolit eoŋ kaiokis.’"
Ezekiel27:4 Ejaas iikorunokon otau loka aŋololin; Itodolito ikadukokokon ajokisikon.
Ezekiel27:5 Eswamata abaoikon kere Koberosin lueyaunio koSenir: Ayaut iresia koLebanon Aiswamakinia jo epir.
Ezekiel27:6 Eswamata akinolakon koluan luko Basan; Eswamata atutubetakon nukokwap koteasurin Lueyaunio kapuiana nuka Kitim, Kitwalitete kikela luka itomei."
Ezekiel27:7 Korai emederakon loka ebaputa loejok Loesonyitai loeyaunio koMisiri, Koraun aanyunetekon; Ŋesesinei lubulului ka lumugeik Lueyaunio kapuiana nuka Elisa Kiswapito jo."
Ezekiel27:8 Keraas ikonikekwanak Luibojete koSidon ka Arubad; Ŋo Turo, kejaas lukaeoakon kotomakon, Keraas ikeŋarenokokon."
Ezekiel27:9 Imakio luko Gebal, ka lukacoake Keraas ikanwokakakon kotomakon; Atakerin kere nuka aŋolol nepepe kikenarenokokec Kejaas tomakon aisiecanar igwelanarakon."
Ezekiel27:10 “Perusia ka Lud ka Put keiaas aiorekon, ikajiokokon: kikaianakinete ibukui ka akopiran tomakon; kiturito akoniiokis."
Ezekiel27:11 Keiaenenas ituŋa luka Arubad nepepe kaiorekon kuju arwatatinikon airimor, kejaenenas Igamain toma abwasinikon: kikajanakinete ibukuikec arwatatinikon airimor; itodolito ajokisikon."
Ezekiel27:12 “Kerai Tarusis ekagwelanaranikon kanuka aipues naka abar nakipoŋesio luipu; kisiceanarete epuesa, ka asua, ka adebe, ka asasin kanuka iborokon."
Ezekiel27:13 Yaban, ka Tubal, ka Mesek, keraas ikagwelanarakakon; kisiceanarete kesi awat nuka ituŋa ka iboro luka aisinin kanuka igwelanarakon."
Ezekiel27:14 Kisiceanarete lukokek loka Togaruma ibalasin ka ibalasin luka ejie ka inyubun kanuka iborokon,"
Ezekiel27:15 Keraas ituŋa luko Dedan ikagwelanarakakon: keraas apujana nuipu agwelanaret naka akanikon: kiinununete ikela luka itomei ka eboni, aisiceanar."
Ezekiel27:16 Kerai Edom ekagwelanaranikon kanuka aipues naka aswamisiokon: kisiceanarete imeralidin, ka lumugeik, ka aswam naesonyitai, ka ebaputa loejok, ka koral, ka amor da nukareŋak kanuka iborokon."
Ezekiel27:17 Yuda ka akwap naka Isirael keraas ikonikagwelanarak: kisiceanarete akima nuka Minit, ka Panag, ka esik ka akinyet, ka emim kanuka igwelanarakon,"
Ezekiel27:18 Kerai Damasiko ekagwelanaranikon kanuk: aipues naka aswamisiokon, kanuka aipues naka abar nakipoŋesio luipu kebino loka Kelubon, ka ajul nuekwanak nuka amerekekin."
Ezekiel27:19 Kisiecanaret Bedan ka Yaban iusio kanuka iborokon: asua nuepwatat, ekasia, ka akalamu keraas igwelanarakon."
Ezekiel27:20 Kerai Dedan ekagwelanaranikon loka igoei luketiai lukibwanenis.
Ezekiel27:21 Arabia, ka ikapolok kere luko Kedar, keraas ŋul ikagwelanarak luka akanikon; imerekekin ludidik, ka imerekekin ka akinei keraas ikagwelanarakakon luka ŋul."
Ezekiel27:22 Ikagwelanarak luko Seba ka Raama keraas ikagwelanarakakon: kisiceanarete luitelekarito kere kalueuru maa, ka amor kere nuketiai, ka esabu, kanuka iborokon,"
Ezekiel27:23 Karan, ka Kane, ka Eden, ikagwelanarak luko Seba, ka Asur ka Kilimad, keraas ikagwelanara kakon."
Ezekiel27:24 Keraas nul ikagwelanarak luka iboro lueseunitai, iloun lubululu ka luesonyitai, ka asadukun nuka inapen luibusak, nueenitai kaunoi nueswamaunio keres, kalugwelanarakon."
Ezekiel27:25 Keraas ameerin nuka Tarusi nukalotok nuka igwelanarakon. Kitelelebi, kitubusikinitete noi Kotoma otau loka aŋololin."
Ezekiel27:26 Kiyanaasi ikekwaŋakakon akipi nuipu: Kibili ekwam lokokide kotau loka aŋololin.
Ezekiel27:27 Abarakon, ka iborokon igwelanarakon, Ikekwaŋakakon, ka ikeŋarenokokon, Ikanwokakakon, ikesiceanarak luka igwelanarakon, Ka ituŋakon kere lukajiok, lueiaas tomakon, Nepepe katukotokon kere naejai kidinikon, Ibirokinos otau loka aŋololin Apaaran naka aibirorikon."
Ezekiel27:28 Emaranete ironyia Kanuka eporoto loka aimony naka ikeŋarenokokon.
Ezekiel27:29 Ŋesunos kameerinikec Kere luitinito akinolia. Ikekwaŋak, ka ikeŋarenok kere luka aŋolol, Ebwoete do kaneoŋit,"
Ezekiel27:30 Isiirarete ikeeeporotoi mamakon, Edelorete, Iwelanakinos apua akwesikee, Ibelibelos kokurwon."
Ezekiel27:31 Ebarenos kanukon, enapete ipukoi, Ido emonyete akiyo kanukon kokadakinito itauonokee Kaibworo naedwar."
Ezekiel27:32 Kotoma aimonyokee ekuudianete kanukon, Kikuudianikinete ebe, “Iŋai ma eputosi bala Turo, Bala ŋol loisililinio kokidin aŋolol?"
Ezekiel27:33 Nakelomuniata iborokon kotoma aŋolol, Kisimonik ituŋa luipu; Kanuka aipues naka abarakon ka igwelanarakon Kitabar ikabakan luka akwapin."
Ezekiel27:34 Kwana kibilata aŋololin Kataro naka akipi, Kolumosi igwelanarakon ka atukotokon kere Nepepe kajo."
Ezekiel27:35 Kiumokis luibojete kere kapujana, Akuriakata noi ikabakanakec, Anyorididoto ireetakee."
Ezekiel27:36 Kisuasi ikagwelanarak kokidin otuŋa; Iraun etasuro, Mam bobo ijaun.’’’"
Ezekiel28:1 Kobu bobo akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel28:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kolimok ekapolon loka Turo ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naarai ekeun ekonitau, Ibu da kiner ebe, ‘Arai eoŋ edeke, Eboiei koicolon loka Edeke, Kokidiŋ kaŋololin’; Kwabo irai etuŋanan, me re Edeke, Karaida itupusit ijo ekonitau bala etau loka Edeke:"
Ezekiel28:3 Koany, irai ijo lokaeoa aitelekar Daniel; Mam kimunonikinitai jo nukaiyeiyea kere,"
Ezekiel28:4 Kanuka acoakon ka ajenunikon idum abar, Idum da esabu ka epuesa Kotoma ainadisiakon:"
Ezekiel28:5 Kanuka acoakon naepol, ido kanuka agwelanarikon Iyatanak abarakon, Ekeun da ekonitau kanuka abarakon."
Ezekiel28:6 Aso do inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naarai itupusit ijo ekonitau Bala etau loka Edeke;
Ezekiel28:7 Aso koany, ayauni imo asurokin jo, Lusogim luka atekerin: Eutunete ikecekileŋa Asurokin aiokis naka acoakon, Emunaarete amwekimwekekon."
Ezekiel28:8 Kijesarete jo kiton Aipany; Itwani atwanare naka nul kaluearitai, Kotau loka aŋololin."
Ezekiel28:9 Irina kereka ijo inera ebe, ‘Arai eoŋ Edeke,’ Kakonyen nuka yenikiari? Kwabo irai etuŋanan, mere Edeke, Kakan naka yenikimusuni."
Ezekiel28:10 Itwani atwanare naka lumam ekepitai Kakan naka imo, Naarai ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Eoŋ ŋes ener.”"
Ezekiel28:11 Bobo da kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel28:12 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kokuudianik ekabaka loka Turo, kolimok ŋes ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: “Ibu ijo korai aanyunet naka etiai, Ileleba acoa, idoliorit kaiokis."
Ezekiel28:13 Ŋai kolo toma Eden, emanikor loka EDEKE; Kerai ninlmoru naketiai arapetekon, Asadia, atopasit, ka daimod. Aberulo, naemelomelot, ka ayaseper, Asapiro, emeralid, ka karubunikol; Iminanakinitai kesabu loegerer. Kitemonokinitoi kapaaran nakisubunere."
Ezekiel28:14 Abu kebwaik jo nepepe kekerubi loidari loinyonyoikinitai akinyet; Ibu koiai oroŋat lokalaunan loka Edeke; Kirimi kokidin amor nuka akim.
Ezekiel28:15 Ibu kodolit korotinikon Ageun kapaaran nakisubunere, Aitodol neatakanuniata numam adolit kamakon,"
Ezekiel28:16 Kanuka aipues naka agwelanarikon, Kilelebi akaie, idiaka; Ŋes kaeakaria jo kwape ycnemunaara Anyoun koroŋat loka Edeke; Kireŋea jo ekerubi loidari Kokidin kamor nuka akim."
Ezekiel28:17 Ekeun ekonitau kanuka ajokisikon; Kimuna acoakon kanuka amwekimwekekon: Kaeaka jo kiton akwap, Keperik akonyen nuka ikabakan, Tetere kisesenete."
Ezekiel28:18 Kanuka aipucs naka numam adolitekon, Kanuka numam adolit nuka agwelanarikon, Imunaa aiboisiokon nukalaunak: Kanuka nun etolom akim kokidinikon, Kitisisi jo, ketuluo ekurwon kakwap, Kakonyen nuka nul kere lukisesenete."
Ezekiel28:19 Kiumokinete nul kere Lukijenete jo kotoma otuŋa: Iraun etasuro, mam bobo iiaun.”"
Ezekiel28:20 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel28:21 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kite Sidon, kodwarak ŋes,"
Ezekiel28:22 kiner ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: “Koany, arai eoŋ lokasurupikon, ijo Sidon; Ketopoloor kokidiŋikon, Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT. Kadau aitodolikin itubcsia kamake, Ketalaun kamake."
Ezekiel28:23 Naarai eyakikini ŋes atular Ka aokot korotinike; Ibirokinos Iuimusuijitai kidinike, Kanuka ekileŋ loirimori ŋes kowaitin kere, Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel28:24 “Mam bobo eiaununete ikodokodo lueremeremete ekek loka Isirael, karaida ikukwa luisiriebcte nul luirimorcte kes, luiswamakinete kes nukepali, Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ Ejakait EDEKE."
Ezekiel28:25 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naadaunia atukonokin ekek loka Isirael kotoma otuŋa kama isiarakina, ketalaun kamakec kakonyen nuka atekerin, kosodete iboikinos akwapukec nakainakinit ekabulesit Yakob."
Ezekiel28:26 Iboikinos nen inapakina; eebo, edukete itocoi, iraete imanikoria luka emusabibu. Iboiete inapakina, kadau aitodolikin itubesia kama kanul kere luiswamaete nukepali kowaitin kere. Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekecedeke,”"
Ezekiel29:1 Kokaru Iokitomonet, kolap lokitomonet, kapaaran nakitomonet kaarei naka elap, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:"
Ezekiel29:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kite Parao ekabaka loko Misiri, kodwarak ŋes, ka Misiri da kerc,"
Ezekiel29:3 Kiner, kobala ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, kasurokini jo, Parao eka baka loko Misiri, Apiu naepol naeperi kokidin ocorinike, Naabu kiner ebe, ‘Ekacor ekaŋ, Eoŋ elopet asubuni.’"
Ezekiel29:4 Ebwaikini igolun abokonyakon, Eminaikini agaria nukoeorikon aabelekon; Kebwosuni jo kokidin oeorinikon, Ŋo ka agaria kere nukoeorinikon Nuiminaikina aabelekon."
Ezekiel29:5 Kenyeini kieakakinitai amodiŋ, Ŋo ka agaria da kere nukoeorinikon: Ibirokin kina ais; Mam kitukonokinio, kwabo mam kimudio, Kainaki jo araun inyamat Luka itian luka akwap, ka akweny da nuka apak."
Ezekiel29:6 “Ejenunete do luibojete kere koMisiri ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT. Naarai keraas ebela loka egada mama ejai ekek loka Isirael.
Ezekiel29:7 Kiitini kakan, kobila, koeil ikeperinikee kere: kegonakinos jo, kobila, kisimaran aŋabesikec."
Ezekiel29:8 Kanuka nun inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, kainuni ekileŋ, amudiari ituŋa ka itiaŋ."
Ezekiel29:9 Eraun akwap nako Misiri naesil naiswapit. Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT. “Naarai abala ebe, ‘Ecor ekaŋ, eoŋ asubuni.’"
Ezekiel29:10 Aso koany, arai eoŋ lokasurupikon ka ikonicorin da, etarauni akwap nako Misiri naiswapit cuc naesil, ageun kotogo loeoja loka Sebene kiton oikor loka Etiopia,"
Ezekiel29:11 Mam itorete akeje nuka ituŋanan, ido mam itorete akeje nuka itian, mam da ituŋa iboikinos toma adaun ikar akaisaoŋon,"
Ezekiel29:12 Etarauni akwap nako Misiri naesil kokidin akwapin nuesilok, ka ireriake da kokidin oreria luiswapito eraunetc luesilok adaun ikar akaisaoŋon. Esiarisiari Imisirian toma atekerin, eweliweli kes anatar akwapin."
Ezekiel29:13 “Naarai inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Ketuboros ikar akaisaoŋon atukonokini Imisirian kotoma otuŋa kama esiarakina.
Ezekiel29:14 Enyakuni aijoreorio nako Misiri, etobonuni kes kiton akwap nako Pataros, kiton akwap naewurikinitai; ejaunete nina ajakanut nakokwap,"
Ezekiel29:15 Eraun nakokwap aitelekarit ajakanuto kere; ido mam bobo itopoloor aitelekarit atekerin: enonori kes, komam bobo eyaito atekerin,"
Ezekiel29:16 Mam bobo eraun amun naka ekek loka Isirael kisiitununei numam adolitekec, naibelokinotor asesen kes. Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ Ejakait EDEKE.”"
Ezekiel29:17 Kosodi kanen kokaru loka akaisaarei ka lukanykaarei kolap losodit, kapaaran nasodit naka elap, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:"
Ezekiel29:18 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, abu Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon koinak ajoreke aitaaritoi naepol asurokinia Turo: adum ninikou epata, abuluear ŋolikeper: kwabo mam eropio ŋes karaida ajoreke koTuro, kanuka aitaaritoike naetaaritoi asurokin."
Ezekiel29:19 Kanuka ŋun inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, ainakini Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon akwap nako Misiri; eyaŋaari ŋesi ekodeteke, eŋasi, emejai da; eraun eropit loka ajoreke,"
Ezekiel29:20 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Ainak ŋes akwap nako Misiri ataeia aitaaritoike, naarai keswamakis eoŋ."
Ezekiel29:21 “Apaaran nin esibwanikini ekek loka Isirael amumwarat, esiwooni akoniituk kokidiijikec. Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
Ezekiel30:1 Kobu bobo akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel30:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kodwar, kiner ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kibwololoto ebe, ‘Itukwi apaaran!’"
Ezekiel30:3 Naarai aapu apaaran, Aapu ca apaaran naka EJAKAIT; Apaaran naka idouon, Eraun apak naka ikapirin."
Ezekiel30:4 Ebunokini ekileŋ Misiri, Ejaunete iean luipu ko Etiopia, Naibirokinotor luearitai koMisiri; Eyaŋaarete ekodeteke, Etiyakinio akepeteta,"
Ezekiel30:5 Etiopia, ka Put, ka Lud, ka ituŋa luinyalinyala kere, ka Kub, ka idwe luka akwap nakeboole, ibiroros kesi da ekileŋ"
Ezekiel30:6 “Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Ibiroros nul da luigaŋito Misiri, Ŋesuni eitur loka akepedor: Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Ageun kotogo loeoja loka Sebene Ibiroros ekileŋ,"
Ezekiel30:7 Esilikinete kokidin kakwapin nuesilok, Ejaunos ireriake kokidin kireria luiswapito."
Ezekiel30:8 Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, Naadaunia ainokokin akim Misiri, Emudiaros ikeganitokoke kere."
Ezekiel30:9 “Apaaran ŋin, elomarete ikiyakia koinarenika toma atakerin aitukurian Itiopian luebwalara: ejaunete ican mamakec kwape apaaran nako Misiri; naarai koany, ebunit!"
Ezekiel30:10 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Etanaŋi da ekodet loko Misiri Kakan naka Nebukadaresar ekabaka loko Babulon.
Ezekiel30:11 Itolomikinio ŋes ka iketuŋa nepepe kaŋes, Lusogim luka atekerin, amudiar akwap; Eutunete ikecekileŋa aitiji Misiri, Kilelebata akwap lueario."
Ezekiel30:12 Etoonikini icorin, Agwelari akwap akan naka ituŋa lueroko; Etisili akwap, ka iboro kere luejaas roma; Kakan naka imo: Eoŋ EJAKAIT ener."
Ezekiel30:13 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Ido amudiari aputosia, Etanaŋi da lukamameak kotoma Nop; Mam ejaun bobo ekapolon kotoma akwap nako Misiri; Ebwaikini etasuro akwap nako Misiri,"
Ezekiel30:14 Etisili da Pataros, Enokokini akim Soan, Etodolikini da itubesia roma No."
Ezekiel30:15 Abukokini Sin akadedeŋ, Abwas naegogon nako Misiri; Ido apiari ekodet loka No."
Ezekiel30:16 Enokokini da akim Misiri; Eanyuni Sin iean luipu, Etiyatiyaun No: Eiaunete lukasurup Nop paaran."
Ezekiel30:17 Ibiroros ikatumunak luka Aben ka luka Pi-beset kekilen: Iioreorio ireria ŋul.
Ezekiel30:18 Emutonori da apaaran koTekapanekes, Naabilia iloin luko Misiri, Edauni da eitur loka akepedor: Eraparete idouon ŋes, Iioreorio akepesur."
Ezekiel30:19 Kwaŋin etodolikinia itubesia Misiri. Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.”
Ezekiel30:20 Kosodi kanen kokaru lokitomonet kadiopet, kolap losodit, kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei naka elap, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:"
Ezekiel30:21 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, abil eoŋ akan naka Parao ekabaka loko Misiri; ido koany, mam eenitai aisutakin ekia, karaida aider, tetere ejaun agogoŋ aitin ekileŋ."
Ezekiel30:22 Aso do inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, arai eoŋ lokasurup loka Parao ekabaka loko Misiri, ido abili akekanin kere, ŋin naegogon, ka nin da naebilil; etodoi ekileŋ kotoma akanike."
Ezekiel30:23 Ido esiarisiari Imisirian toma atekerin, eweliweli da anatar akwapin,"
Ezekiel30:24 Etogogoŋi akanin nuka ekabaka loko Babulon, ebwaikini ekakileŋ toma akanike: konye abili akanin nuka Parao, idinya ŋesi kakonyeneke kwape etuŋanan loimusunitai noi."
Ezekiel30:25 Ido egaŋi akanin nuka ekabaka loko Babulon, ibiroros do akanin nuka Parao; ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, Naebwaikinia ekakileŋ toma akan naka ekabaka loko Babulon, edakakini ŋesi asurokin akwap nako Misiri,"
Ezekiel30:26 Esiarisiari Imisirian toma atekerin, eweliweli da anatar akwapin. Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
Ezekiel31:1 Kosodi kanen kokaru lokitomonet kadiopet, kolap lokiwuniet, kapaaran nasodit naka elap, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:"
Ezekiel31:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kolimok Parao ekabaka loko Misiri, ka ekekodet ebe: Iputosi kaŋai kapoloukon?"
Ezekiel31:3 Koany, kerai Eyasuriat eres loka atenueik nuejok koLebanon, Loejai etolim loerapari, loeoja: Kojai aidike odouon."
Ezekiel31:4 Kitanete akipi ŋes, Kitopol aidules naka ieorinike, Lueleleete airimor emanikorike; Abu kitodol alelesiake Okito kere luka ais."
Ezekiel31:5 Kanuka nun kitopolooroi Aitelekarit ikito kere luka ais; Kopeta atoromake, Koojakaros atenueikike, Kanuka akipi nuipu kotoma akidikidinike."
Ezekiel31:6 Kodukoto akweny kere nuka apak Akaisikec atenueikike, Kouriata itian kere luka ais idwekec Kwap katoromake, Kiboioto atekerin kere nukapolok Kotolimike."
Ezekiel31:7 Kwaŋin korai loejok kapolouke, Kaoiau naka atenueikike; Naarai kejaas akeliasio neejaas akipi nuipu."
Ezekiel31:8 Iresia lukomanikor loka Edeke Mam apedorete aibwa ŋes: Mam iberosin ariakas katoromake, Mam iaremok eputosi atenueikike; Kwabo amamei ekitoi kere komanikor loka Edeke Loaputotor ŋes kajokis."
Ezekiel31:9 Etojoka ŋes kanuka aipues naka atenueikike: Kwaŋin kitokokoloto ŋes ikito kere luka Eden, Luajaas omanikor loka Edeke."
Ezekiel31:10 “Kanuka nun inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naarai itopoloor kanuka aojau, ido ejai aidike odouon, ikeuna eketau kanuka aiceleleke;"
Ezekiel31:11 eiaikini ŋes akan naka lokapedor loka atekerin; abeit iswamakini ŋes kwape ejaatar nukaronokoke, Ereŋea ŋes."
Ezekiel31:12 Ajepata ŋes imo, lusogim luka atekerin, enyekis. Ibiroros atenueikike koronan kaditono da kere, abilas atoromake kotoma alelesia kere nuka akwap; anyoutu atekerin kere nuka akwapin kotolimike, enyekis ŋes."
Ezekiel31:13 Iboikinos akweny kere nuka apak akuanake naibiroro, ejaunos itiaŋ kere luka ais atenueikike:"
Ezekiel31:14 tetere mam itopoloori imodiokitoi kere yeneapias kakipi kaoiauke, karaida aitodol aidike odouon, karaida lukapedorike aibwo kaicelelekee, kere luemasete akipi: naarai ijaikinio kere atwakare, kiton atutubeta nukokwap nuka akwap, kokidin odwe luka ituŋa, nepepe kanul kaluijesaros Aipany."
Ezekiel31:15 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kapaaran naejesaror Okatwak, esibwori aidules, aeni ieorinike, itikokinio akipi nuipu: esirioni Lebanon kanuke, iilooros ikito kere luka ais kanuke."
Ezekiel31:16 Abu kesimaran atekerin kanuka airurum naka aibirorike, naaeakaria Okatwak nepepe kanul kaluijesaros Aipany: alakaros ikito kere luka Eden, luejok lueseunitai luka Lebanon, kere luemasete akipi, kotoma atutubeta nukokwap nuka akwap,"
Ezekiel31:17 Apotu kesi da kijesaros Okatwak nepepe kaŋes mama ejaas nul lukearitai kekilen; eebo, ŋul lukeraas akanike, lukiboienenete kotolimike kokidin katekerin."
Ezekiel31:18 Iŋai ca ma iputotor kotoma aibuses ka apolou kokito luka Eden? Kwabo kiiesario nepepe kikito luka Eden kiton atutubeta nukokwap nuka akwap; iperi kokidin kalumam ekepitai nepepe kanul kalukeario kekilen, “Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, ŋol ŋes Parao ka ekekodet kere.”"
Ezekiel32:1 Kosodi kanen kokaru lokitomonet kaarei, kolap lokitomonet kaarei, kapaaran nasodit naka elap, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:"
Ezekiel32:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kokuudianik Parao ekabaka loko Misiri, kolimok ŋes ebe: Kitupusitoi kinatuny yenika atekerin: Kwabo iputos kapiu naejai anolclin; Ido ibeluni koeorinikon, Iticani akipi kakejekon, Komunaa ieorinikee."
Ezekiel32:3 Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kapesikini jo ekaboi Katukot naka ituŋa luipu; Kibwosunete kekaboi.
Ezekiel32:4 Kenyeini jo kaneeoŋit, Kaeakar kina ais, Ketodoikini jo akweny kere nuka apak, Kesimonikinia da itian luka alwap kere."
Ezekiel32:5 Aloikini akonikirin oroŋan, Elelebi aditon kamukururukon,"
Ezekiel32:6 Ido ecocoi akwap kaokotokon nuiduio Kiton oroŋan; Ilelebi alelesia kere.
Ezekiel32:7 Kasodi kadau aitudeŋ jo, arapari akuj, Etumutonori aacer; Arapakini edou akoloŋ, Kwabo mam elap eeauni."
Ezekiel32:8 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Etumutonori italai kere Lueeaete lukokuiukon, Etumutonori akonikwap."
Ezekiel32:9 “Esiyalononoi itauon luka iruna luipu, naetodolio amudiariokon toma atekerin, akwapin numam lem ijeni."
Ezekiel32:10 Eebo, esitirirai ituŋa luipu kanukon, ekuriakaros noi ikabakanakec kanukon, naeiliilia ekakileŋ kakonyenekee; emaranete ŋinipak, ŋolituŋanan kanuka akeijar, kapaaran naka aibirorikon."
Ezekiel32:11 Naarai inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kidolokini jo ekileŋ loka ekabaka loko Babulon.
Ezekiel32:12 Ebirori ekonikodet kikilena luka lukapedor; eraas kere lusogim luka atekerin. Eŋasete eitur loko Misiri, emudiario ekodeteke kere."
Ezekiel32:13 Amudiari da iketian kere Lueapias akipi nuipu; Ido mam bobo itieanete akeje nuka ituŋanan, Karaida imageger luka itiaŋ aitican kes."
Ezekiel32:14 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kasodi aisiiriir akeeekipi, Ka aitelel icorinikee kwape kakinyet."
Ezekiel32:15 Naetisilio akwap nako Misiri, Ka aitiswap akwap naetwaniarit ailelebake, Naadanyia kere luibojete kotoma, Kosodete do ejenunete ebe atai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel32:16 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Na ŋes akuudian rtaekuudianete; ekuudianete apesur nuka atekerin; ekuudianikinete Misiri ka ekekodet kere.”"
Ezekiel32:17 Kosodi kanen kokaru lokitomonet kaarei, kapaaran nakitomonet kakany naka elap, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:"
Ezekiel32:18 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, komonyak ekodet loko Misiri, kibironok kwap, ŋes nepepe ka apesur nuka atekerin nuaienas, kiton atutubeta nukokwap nuka akwap, nepepe kanul kaluijesaros Aipany:"
Ezekiel32:19 “Iŋai ca ideparit kajokis? Kiiesar, kiperikin nepepe kalumam ekepitai.’"
Ezekiel32:20 Ibirokinos kidinikec luearitai kekilen: eiaikin okileŋ: kiriasi ŋes ka ekekodet kere.
Ezekiel32:21 Ineras kaŋes lukagogon lukotoma lukapedor kokidin Okatwak nepepe kanul kalukeganitok ebe: ‘Ejesaros, aperoto anatata, lumam ekepitai, luearitai kekilen.’"
Ezekiel32:22 “Ejai nen Asur ka aketukot kere; irimotito akeilin: kes kere earitai, ebirokin ekileŋ."
Ezekiel32:23 Ejaas akeeeilin toma atutubeta nukokwap nuka Aipany, irimorit aketukot akeilit: kes kere earitai, ebirokin ekileŋ, luayaunete etasuro akwap naka ikajarak."
Ezekiel32:24 “Ejai nen Elam ka ekekodet kere irimorit akeilit: kes kere earitai, ebirokin ekileŋ, luejesaros mam ekepitai loma atutubeta nukokwap nuka akwap, luayaunete etasuro akwap naka ikaiarak, ibwokito ikeeeleic nepepe kaŋul kaluijesaros Aipany."
Ezekiel32:25 Apesikis ŋes aperis kokidin kaluearitai nepepe kekekodet kere; irimorito ŋes akeilin: kes kere lumam ekepitai, lueari ekileŋ; naarai eyaunio etasurokee akwap naka ikaiarak, ibwokito ikeeeleic nepepe kanul kaluijesaros Aipany; ibwaikinitai kidinikec kaluearitai."
Ezekiel32:26 “Ejai nen Mesee, ka Tubal, ka ekeeekodet kere; irimorito kes akeeeilin: kes kere lumam ekepitai lueari ekileŋ: naarai ayaunete etasurokee akwap naka ikajarak."
Ezekiel32:27 Ido mam eperete nepepe kalukapedor luebiroros lumam ekepitai luejesaros Okatwak ekapito luiiisikec, ibwaikinito ikileŋakec aicolon kakwesikee, ejaas numam adolitekec akoiokec; naarai keiai etasuro loka lukapedor kakwap naka ikajarak."
Ezekiel32:28 Konye kibilakinio kidin kalumam ekepitai, iperi nepepe kanul kalueari ekileŋ,"
Ezekiel32:29 “Ejai nen Edom, ikekabakan ka ikekapolok kere, luibwaikinitai kakeeepedor nepepe kanul kalueari ekileŋ: eperete nepepe kalumam ekepitai, ido nepepe kanul kaluijesaros Aipany."
Ezekiel32:30 “Ejaas nen ikapolok luka agolitomei, kes kere, ka Isidonin kere, luejesaros nepepe kaluearitai; karaida keyaunete etasuro kanuka agogonukec, irumete ileic; eperete mam ekepitai nepepe kanul kalueari ekileŋ; ibwokito ikeeeleic nepepe kanul kaluiiesaros Aipany."
Ezekiel32:31 “Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Eanyuni kes Parao, elakar kanuka ekekodet kere: Parao ka akejore kere lueari ekileŋ."
Ezekiel32:32 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Naarai ebwaik eketasuro akwap naka ikajatak: iperikinio Parao ka ekekodet kere kidin kalumam ekepitai, nepepe kanul kalueari ekileŋ.”"
Ezekiel33:1 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel33:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kiner kidwe luka ikonituŋa, kolimok kes ebe, Naayaunia ekileŋ akwap,"
Ezekiel33:3 arai kelemut ituŋa luka akwap kaŋin ituŋanan idiopet kotomakec, kodakakis ŋes araun ekedaranikec: a arai kekutaki arupepe naeanyunia ekileŋ ebunokini akwap, ka aikwenyar ituŋa;"
Ezekiel33:4 kosodi nm yeniirari eporoto loka arupepe, komam ecamuni aikwenyario, arai kebu ekileŋ alemar ŋes, eiaunete aokotoke akouke kilopet."
Ezekiel33:5 Abu kiira eporoto loka arupepe, komam ecamunit aikwenyario; ejaunete aokotoke kamaken. Konye araikeeamunit aikwenyario tikituku akeijar."
Ezekiel33:6 Konye arai keanyu ekedaran ekileŋ ebuni, komam ekutakini arupepe, komam ituŋa ikwenyario, kobu do ekileŋ, kolema ituŋanan kamakec; elemario kanumam adoliteke, konye etepeseni akeokot kama kekedaran."
Ezekiel33:7 “Aso do jo, okoku loka etuŋanan, kadakak jo araun ekedaran loka ekek loka Isirael; asa kiira akirot naka aitukuka, kikwenya kes kanukaŋ."
Ezekiel33:8 Arai kalimok ikaronon ebe, Ŋo ikaronon, abeit itwani, komam jo inera aikwenyar ikaronon ii korotoke; etwanikini ikaronon ii numam adoliteke, konye etepeseni akeokot kamakon."
Ezekiel33:9 Konye arai kikwenya ijo ikaronon aibelokin korotoke, komam ŋes ibelokini korotoke; etwanikini numam adoliteke, konye iyuuni ijo akoniijar."
Ezekiel33:10 “Ka jo da, okoku loka etuŋanan, kolimok ekek loka Isirael ebe: Inerasi kwanata ebe, ‘Ejaas adiakanaretakosi ka aronisiokosi kasio, kiin kakes; kikwaikini do ai kijari?’"
Ezekiel33:11 Kolimok kes ebe, Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwape ajaria, Mam esiyalamikinit atwanare naka ikaronon; konye kibelokin ikaronon korotoke kojar: kibelokinos, kibelokinos kotoma orotinikus lueroko; kanukinyo itwakiata, ijo ekek loka Isirael?"
Ezekiel33:12 Ijo da, okoku loka etuŋanan, kolimok idwe luka ikonituŋa ebe, Adolit naka ikadoliton mam eyuuni ŋes kapaaran naka adiakarike; ido da aronis naka ikaronon mam isibirori kapaaran naibelokinor anyoun karonisike: kwabo mam epedori ikadoliton aijar kanuka adoliteke kapaaran naediakaria."
Ezekiel33:13 Arai kalimok ikadoliton ebe abeit ejari; arai kemunokin akedolit, kiswama numam adolit, mam iitunio adio kaswamisioke nuadolito; konye etwanikini numam adoliteke nueswamat."
Ezekiel33:14 Ido bobo, arai kalimok ikaronon ebe, ‘Abeit itwani’; arai kibelokin ainyein akeronis, ka aswam da nuibusakinito ka nuedolito;"
Ezekiel33:15 Arai kinyakaki aititiŋet, kotac Iukekokwarit, kolosenene kokisila luka aiiar, komam iswamai numam adolit; abeit eiari, mam etwani."
Ezekiel33:16 Mam iirunio adio karonisioke nueswamat: eswamat nuibusakinito nuedolito; abeit ejari.
Ezekiel33:17 “Konye ebalas idwe luka ikonituŋa ebe, ‘Mam eriana erot loka EJAKAIT’: kwabo ikecerotin kes mam erianas."
Ezekiel33:18 Naibelokinor ikadoliton ainyein akedolit, kiswama numam adolit, etwanikini ŋun."
Ezekiel33:19 Naibelokinor ikaronon ainyein akeronis, kiswama nuibusakinito nuedolito, ejarakini ŋun."
Ezekiel33:20 Konye ibalas yesi ebe, ‘Mam eriana erot loka EJAKAIT.’ Wu jo ekek loka Isirael, katubokini yes, ninitunanan kwape ejaatar ikerotin.”"
Ezekiel33:21 Kosodi kanen, kokaru lokitomonet kaarei loka aijoreoriokosi, kolap Iokitomonet, kapaaran nakikanyet naka elap, kobu etuŋanan mama ajai lokekui koYerusaletn, ebala ebe, “Ebiror ere.”"
Ezekiel33:22 Kabunok akan naka EJAKAIT eboŋ, eroko lokekui ebuno; kesiwoona akaituk, kiton nekadolokinio ŋol tupuruc; koonar akaituk kwabo mam bobo abanaana."
Ezekiel33:23 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel33:24 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, lueiaas aiboisio nu nuiswapito nuka akwap naka Isirael inerenenasi ebe, ‘Arai Aburaam ediopet, kirum akwap; konye oni kirai luipu; kiinakinitai akwap araut alrumet.’"
Ezekiel33:25 Aso kolimok kes ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Inyamete lneiaas aokot, iteluorete akusikonye mama ejaas aputosiakus, ibukorete da aokot; irumete tope yesi akwap?"
Ezekiel33:26 Ieatunito kokilenakus, iswamaete nuketal, komunaaros nolirunanan kaberu naka eidunyeteke: irumete tope yesi akwap?"
Ezekiel33:27 Ilimokini kes kwanata ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kwape ajaria, abeit etwakete nul kere luejaas aiboisio nuiswapito kekilen, ka Ŋin da yenejai kina ais akorakini ŋes konyama itian; ka ŋul da Iueiaas abwasin nuegogon ka abuai da etwakete atular."
Ezekiel33:28 Etarauni akwap asilio ka aumokinet, enaŋi eitur loka akepedor; esilioros ironan luka Isirael, komam ituŋanan yenitori nen."
Ezekiel33:29 Kosodete do ejenunete ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, naetuluoria akwap asilio ka aumokinet, kanuka italesiakec kere lueswamata."
Ezekiel33:30 “Ka jo da, okoku loka etuŋanan, kinerasi jo idwe luka ikonituŋa karwatatin, kokekia da luka itogoi, kineranakinos, ninitunanan konaceke, ebe, ‘Kaloto, kenainait, kapuputu akirot naelomunit kama ejai EJAKAIT.’"
Ezekiel33:31 Epote neijai kwape eponiata ituŋa, iboikinos kakonyenekon kwape ikatuŋa, epupunete akakiro, konye mam iswamaete: naarai itodikinete amin naepol kanaiepakec, konye ekecetau etupari aimakirakec."
Ezekiel33:32 Ido koany, irai kamakee ekosio loejok noi loka ekayoot loitalakarit noi, loejeni airam jokan; naarai epupunete akonikiro, konye mam iswamaete."
Ezekiel33:33 Naitodolikinere ŋun, (koany itodolikinio), kosodete do ejenunete ebe ajai enabi kidinikec.’"
Ezekiel34:1 Kosodi kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai, kobala ebe:"
Ezekiel34:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kodwarak ikecokok luka Isirael, kodwarak, kolimok kes, ikeeokok nul, ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EOEKH ebe: Itukwi ikecokok luka Isirael luitanyamas bonik! Mam ti ikeeokok itadakete amerekekin?"
Ezekiel34:3 Inyamete lukasiepai, konapete aiul, koarete luetarioko: kwabo mam itadakete amerekekin."
Ezekiel34:4 Yeniroga mam iticasete, kwabo mam itanaleunete yenedek, kwabo mam iderete yenebilil, kwabo mam inyakununete yenerenearitai, kwabo mam imoenenete yeneoliorit; konye iyaitos kes kagogon ka adedeŋ."
Ezekiel34:5 Kisiarakinos kesi kanuemamear ekeeokon: koraut inyamat luka itiaŋ kere luka ais, kisiarakinos."
Ezekiel34:6 Kirimoto akamerekekin komor kere, ka noliukot loeoi; eebo, kisiarakinos akamerekekin akwap kere; kwabo amamei yenabu kinisinisitoi karaida amoun."
Ezekiel34:7 “Aso, yes ikecokok, kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT:"
Ezekiel34:8 Inera Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwape ajaria, abeit naarai apotu akamerekekin koluoros amejan, koraut da akamerekekin inyamat luka itian kere luka ais, kanuamamear ekeeokon; kwabo mam ikakeeokok apotu komoata akamerekekin, konye kitanyamas ikeeokok bonik, komam itadakete akamerekekin;"
Ezekiel34:9 aso, yes ikeeokok, kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT:"
Ezekiel34:10 Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, etusurupi eoŋ ikeeokok; eburai da akamerekekin kakanikee, kesinyeik kes aitadak amerekekin; kwabo mam bobo ikecokok itanyamas, Ayuuni akamerekekin kaitukukec, kinyeis araun inyamat kamakec."
Ezekiel34:11 “Naarai inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, eoŋ elopet, eoŋ ba, enisinisitoi akamerekekin, amouni kes,"
Ezekiel34:12 Kwape emootor ekeeokon ekesipan kapaaran naejaatar amerekekinike ace nuesiarakina neelwana, kwaŋin amoia akamerekekin, ayuuni kes kaiboisio kere kama kisiarakina kapaaran naka idouon ka naka amuton."
Ezekiel34:13 Alemuni kes kotuna, atukonokini kakwapin, ayauni kes akwapukec; etadaki kes oroŋan luka Isirael, kariri naka alelesia, ka aiboisio kere nuiboiere kakwap."
Ezekiel34:14 Etadaki kes amel, koronan luiceleleete luka Isirael eraun anukukec: nepenen eperete anuk naejok, kotosata amel koronan luka Isirael."
Ezekiel34:15 Ebala Ejakait EOEKH ebe, Eoŋ elopet etadaki akamerekekin, kesiperik."
Ezekiel34:16 Amouni nin yenikeoliorit, enyakuni yenirenearitai, ederi yenebilil, eticasi yenedek: amudiari yenetumit ka yenikagogoŋ; etadaki da kaitub akiro."
Ezekiel34:17 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Ka yes da, wu ekasipan, koany, atubokini ibaren ka ibaren, imerekekin kwape ikorwa."
Ezekiel34:18 Erai teni kamakus akirot naedit adak amel naatosok, konye kibusakinit tope aipupus kakusikeie amelokus nakesalit? Ido komata akipi nueliiliete, konye kibusakinit tope amunaar nukesalito kakusikeje?"
Ezekiel34:19 Edakasi kereka akamerekekin ŋin naipupusato kakusikeje, emasete da nun nuimunaasi kakusikeje?"
Ezekiel34:20 “Kanuka nun elimokini Ejakait EDEKE kes kwanata ebe: Koany, eoŋ, eoŋ obe, atubokini ibaren luetumito ka ibaren luesenyito."
Ezekiel34:21 Naarai iremorete kisiepion ka ikeperin da, iremorete luedekasi kere kamumwarakus, aitodol neisiarakiniata neelwana,"
Ezekiel34:22 Aso etaiari ekasipan, mam eraunos bobo imejan; atubokini ibaren ka ibaren."
Ezekiel34:23 Adakakini ekecokon ediopet, itadaki ŋesi kes, ŋes ekabulesit Daudi; itadaki kes, eraun ekecokonikec."
Ezekiel34:24 Eoŋ EJAKAIT araun Edekekec, ekabulesit Daudi da ekapolon kokidinikec; Eoŋ EJAKAIT ener."
Ezekiel34:25 “Etutuki kakes aitutuket naka ainapakin, etanaŋi itian lukadedenak kakwap; iboiete inapakina kamagoro, eiotooros kamonieik."
Ezekiel34:26 Etuluori kes ka aiboisio da nuirimorito ekaronat arereŋ; ainakini elimilim kapakike; eraun da elimilim lokareren.
Ezekiel34:27 Eraete ikito luka ais araitokec, einakini akwap amioke, eiaikinos akwapukee inapakina; ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, naadaunia aibil akito nuka ajookotokec, ka ayuun da kakanin nuka luetubusianito kes."
Ezekiel34:28 Mam bobo eraunete imejan mama ejaas ikapirin, karaida Itiaŋ luka akwap ainyam kes; konye iboiete inapakina, komam yenitukuriani kes."
Ezekiel34:29 Etonyoikini kes emanikor loejena, mam bobo epiari ebeli kakwap, karaida aibwok bobo ileje luka ikapirin."
Ezekiel34:30 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Ejenunete do ebe Eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekecedeke ajai nepepe kakes, kes da ekek loka Isirael eraas ikatuŋa."
Ezekiel34:31 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Yes da akamerekekin, amerekekin nukoronyika, iraas ituŋa, eoŋ da arai Ekusideke.”"
Ezekiel35:1 Bobo da, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:"
Ezekiel35:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kite emoru Seir, kodwarak ŋes."
Ezekiel35:3 Kolimok ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, arai lokasurupikon, wu emoru Seir, ariori akakan asurokin jo, ketuluori asilio ka aumokinet."
Ezekiel35:4 Etiswapi ireriakon, irauni ijo asilio: ijenuni ebe arai Eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel35:5 Naarai iraenena lokasurup, ikorak idwe luka Isirael mama ejai apedor naka ekileŋ kapak naka epolakec, kapak naka aitieaniokee naka awasia;"
Ezekiel35:6 asa ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwape ajaria, ŋes ketemokinia aokot, ido kitupete aokot; naarai mam ibu kolaite aokot, ŋes do kitupiata aokot,"
Ezekiel35:7 Etuluori emoru Seir aumokinet ka asilio; etamamauni kanen yenitori ka yenebonuni,"
Ezekiel35:8 Elelebi ikeroŋan iketuija lukeario; toma oronanakon ka aditonokon ka alelesiakon kere ibirokinos lueari ekileŋ.
Ezekiel35:9 Etuluori asilio namam edaun, mam bobo ejaunete ituŋa oreriakon; ijenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel35:10 “Naarai iner ebe, ‘Atekerin nu aarei ka akwapin nu aarei da eraunos nukan, kirumi isio da; kwabo keiai EJAKAIT nen:"
Ezekiel35:11 asa ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kwape ajaria, eswamai kwape ejaar akoninyunyura, ido kwape ejaar ekonikokote loitodiarit kanuka areit kes; etejenikini eoŋ kes, nakatubokinia jo,"
Ezekiel35:12 Ŋenuni do ebe eoŋ EJAKAIT eira akoniinyanakin kere nainerakinit ironan luka Isirael, kobala ebe, ‘Etisiloor, kiinakin sio ajwenyar.’"
Ezekiel35:13 Itopolooros kama ajai eoŋ kanaiepakus, ka akirokus nuiyatanakis mamakan; eira eoŋ nun."
Ezekiel35:14 Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naeyalamikinor akwap kere, ketisili jo,"
Ezekiel35:15 Kwape kiyalamikinor airumet naka ekek loka Isirael, naarai asilior, keswamakini jo kwaŋin: isilior jo, emoru Seir, ka Edom kere, kere ba, Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel36:1 “Ŋo da, okoku loka etuŋanan, kodwarak ironan luka Isirael, kiner ebe, Yes ironan luka Isirael, kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel36:2 Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naarai kinerak yes lokasurup ebe, ‘Uus!’ ido, ‘Aiboisio nuiceleleete nukolo sek araut bo do nukosi’:"
Ezekiel36:3 asa kodwar, kiner ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naarai, eebo, naarai kitisiliosi, kojwenyasi kowaitin kere, tetere kirumete nukesalete nuka atekerin, kilimitoi kanaiepa nuka ikeyalak, ka abekoi naerono naka ituŋa:"
Ezekiel36:4 kanuka ŋun, yes ironan luka Isirael, kiirasi akirot naka Ejakait EDEKE. Inera kwanata Ejakait EDBKB elimokini ironan ka iukon, ka alelesia, ka aditono, ka aiboisio nuiswapito nuesilok, ka ireria luinyeinitai, luaraas imejan ka amorosito mama ejaas nukesalete nuka atekerin nuirimorito."
Ezekiel36:5 Ŋes inerar kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Abeit ener kotoma akim naka ekokoteka asurokin nukesalete nuka atekerin, ka Edom kere, luaseikinos ikulepek akakwap araun airumet naka aiyalama naka itauonokec kere, kanuka epali loka etau, tetere irumete araut ameiat."
Ezekiel36:6 Kanuka ŋun kodwar nuka akwap naka Isirael, kolimok ironan ka iukon, ka alelesia ka aditono ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, ener kokokoteka, kadedenuka, narai ibwokata ileic luka ikapirin:"
Ezekiel36:7 aso inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Ekeu akakan, ebe, Abeit ikapirin lukirimorito, ibwokete kesi ikulepek ikeceleie."
Ezekiel36:8 “Konye yes, ironan luka Isirael, ipesiarete atenueikikus, koraikis ikatuŋa Isirael araitokus; naarai eapie kes aboŋun."
Ezekiel36:9 Naarai koany, ajai eoŋ owaikus, ebelokin eoŋ mamakus, kikorio kiyeio."
Ezekiel36:10 Etupui ituŋa kamakus, ekek kere loka Isirael, kere ba: ejaunete ituŋa oreria, iteteununio aiboisio nuiswapito."
Ezekiel36:11 Etupui ituŋa ka itian da kamakus: iyatanakinos, iwuriaros: ketudumikini yes ituŋa kwape lem ijaatar, ka aiswamakin yes ejok aitelekarit ageunetekus. Ŋenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel36:12 Eebo, ainakin ituŋa aitorit nekus, kes ikatuŋa Isirael; kirumete, iraun airumetekec, mam bobo itwataniari kes ikeeedwe."
Ezekiel36:13 Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Naarai kilimonokinete ebe, ‘Inyami ijo ituŋa, itwataniari atekerikon idwe’:"
Ezekiel36:14 ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Aso mam bobo iyatakini ainyam ituŋa, karaida aitwataniar akoniteker idwe."
Ezekiel36:15 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Mam bobo kesibwoki ileic luka ikapirin, ido mam bobo ibwoki amorosit naka ituŋa, ido mam bobo itiguikini akoniteker.”"
Ezekiel36:16 Bobo da kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Ezekiel36:17 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, nakiboio ekek loka Isirael kakwapukec, apotu komunaaros korotinikec ka aswamisiokec da: korau ekecerot kakonyeneka bala namam elai naka aberu naibami."
Ezekiel36:18 Aso kabukoki kes akadedeŋ kanuka aokot nuapotu kobukokis akwap, kanu da amunaarotor kaputosiakec:"
Ezekiel36:19 kesiarisiar kes atekerin, kiweliwelai anatar akwapin: katubok kes kwape ejaar ekecerot, ido kwape ejaatar akeceswamisio."
Ezekiel36:20 Nakedolioto kesi atekerin nualosete, komunaasi ekakiror lokalaunan; naarai kobalas ituŋa ebe, ‘Lu kes ituŋa luka EJAKAIT, anyoutu kesi da kakwapuke.’"
Ezekiel36:21 Konye abu ketim ekakiror lokalaunan, loamunaari ekek loka Isirael kotoma atekerin nualosete,"
Ezekiel36:22 “Aso kolimok ekek loka Isirael ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Mam eoŋ eswamai kanukus, ijo ekek loka Isirael, dimarai kanuka ekakiror lokalaunan, loipotu komunaasi kotoma atekerin nuilosete."
Ezekiel36:23 Etalauni eoŋ ekakiror loepol, loamunaaritai katekerin, loimunaarete yesi kokidinikec, Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Ejenunete do atekerin ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, naetalaunor kamakus kakonyenekee."
Ezekiel36:24 Naarai kalemuni yes katekerin, katukonok alemun kakwapin kere, ketolomik akwapukus."
Ezekiel36:25 Ido kabwasi yes akipi nuelaete, ilaunete: kedetarete kotoma amodokokus kere ka aputosiakus da kere."
Ezekiel36:26 Kainakinete etau lokitetet, ebwaikini emoyo lokitetet tomakus: ido alemuni etau lokamoru kawatekus, kainakinete etau loka akiriŋ."
Ezekiel36:27 Ebwaikini ekamoyo tomakus, ketoloto kokisilaka, ido iricete ikatubesia, kiswamata da."
Ezekiel36:28 Iboikinos akwap nakolo kainakini lukapapaakus; iraenenas ikatuŋa, eoŋ da araenena Ekusideke."
Ezekiel36:29 Ido etajari yes kanumam ailakus kere: anyarauni akima, ka aiyatakin, mam bobo kainunete ebeli."
Ezekiel36:30 Ido esideneriai araito nuka ikito, ka amio nakomanikor, kinyeis bobo amoromoroo katekerin kanuka ebeli."
Ezekiel36:31 Kosodete aiitun ikusirotin lueroko, ka akusiswamisio numam ajokuka; itakadikinos kanuka numam adolitekus, ka italesiakus."
Ezekiel36:32 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kojenutu bo, mam eswamai nu kanukus. Kirumata ileje kitiriraata da kanuka ikusirotin, ijo ekek loka Isirael."
Ezekiel36:33 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kapaaran nakedetaria yes kanumam adolitekus kere, esiboikini ituŋa toma oreria, edukio da aiboisio nuiswapito."
Ezekiel36:34 Ekorio akwap naasil, nakerai naesil kakonyen nuka ŋul kere kalukitorenenete."
Ezekiel36:35 Ebalasi do ebe, ‘Arau akwap na naasil bala emanikor laka Eden; ireria da lueswapito luasilok ka luatiyanakina abwai ido eboikinos ituŋa toma.’"
Ezekiel36:36 Kosodete ejenunete atekerin nukesalete nukirimorito ebe Eoŋ EJAKAIT aduk aiboisio nuatiyanakina, era da neasil: Eoŋ EJAKAIT ener, eswamai da."
Ezekiel36:37 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Akoto ekek laka Isirael keŋisenenei eoŋ aiswamakin kes; etupui ituŋa bala esipan.
Ezekiel36:38 Bala esipan loka asuban, bala esipan loka Yerusalem kopueinoke lueseunitai; kwaŋin elelebia ireria lueswapito isipanin luka ituŋa, Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
Ezekiel37:1 Koiau akan naka EJAKAIT kaeoŋ, kayana kina komoyo loka EJAKAIT, kebwaik aditot naeleleba akojo."
Ezekiel37:2 Ketotor airimor kes: ido koany, epu noi kaditot; ido koany, kookito de."
Ezekiel37:3 Kalimok eoŋ ebe, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, epedorete tope akojo nu aijar?” Kabonok ebe, “Wu Ejakait EDEKE, jo ijeni.”"
Ezekiel37:4 Kalimok eoŋ bobo ebe, “Kodwarak akoio nu, kolimok ebe, Yes akojo nuiwokito, kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel37:5 Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE akojo nu ebe: Koany, ketolomikini yes eiyeŋane, ido ijarete."
Ezekiel37:6 Ebwaikini aputio mamakus, ayauni akiriŋ mamakus, karapakinete amuny, akutakini eiyan ane, ido ijarete; ijenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT.”"
Ezekiel37:7 Aso kadwara kwape kecorakinitere: napadwaria kojai airuruma, ido koany, komaran akwap, kiriamanakinos akoio, akoit mama ejai akoit naeeke."
Ezekiel37:8 Kaany, ido koany, keiaas aputio mamakee, kolom akiriŋ, korapak amuny kokuju: konye kemamei eiyeŋane kotomakec."
Ezekiel37:9 Kosodi kalimok eoŋ ebe, “Kodwarak eiyeŋane, kodwar, okoku loka etuŋanan, kolimok eiyeijane ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kobia, ijo eiyeŋane, kokwamin iwonon, kiyenak lu luearitai, kojarata.”"
Ezekiel37:10 Aso kadwara kwape kecorakinia, koloma eiyeŋane tomakec, kojarata, kobwaata kakecekeje, aiore naailiili noi."
Ezekiel37:11 Kosodi kaIimok eoŋ ebe, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, eraas akojo nu ekek kere loka Isirael. Koany, ebalas ebe, ‘Aokoto akoiowok, aolio amunowok: kipiari eut.’"
Ezekiel37:12 Kanuka riun kodwar, kolimok kes ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, apukori ailinakus, ketolomunete kailinakus, yes ikatuŋa; kayaunete kiton akwap naka Isirael."
Ezekiel37:13 Ido ijenunete ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, kadau apukor ailinakus, ka aitolomun kailinakus, yes ikatuŋa,"
Ezekiel37:14 Kepikakinete yes ekamoyo, ijarete, kebwaikinete akwapukus. Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Ŋenunete do ebe Eoŋ EJAKAIT ener, eswama da.”"
Ezekiel37:15 Kobu bobo akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe,"
Ezekiel37:16 “Ka jo da, okoku loka etuŋanan, kolem ebela ediopet, kiwadik toma obela ebe, ‘Loka Yuda ka idwe luka Isirael ipaupake’; kosodi kolem eeebela, kiwadik toma obela, ‘Loka Yosep, ebela laka Epuraim, laka ekek kere laka Isirael ipaupake.’"
Ezekiel37:17 Aso kimorikik nepepe araun ediopebela, korau ediopet kakanikon,"
Ezekiel37:18 Kosodete naineratar idwe luka ikonituŋa kaio, ebe, ‘Kiteienikinai apolou naka nun?”"
Ezekiel37:19 Kolimok kes ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, alemuni ebela loka Yosep, loejai akan naka Epuraim, ka atekerin nuka Isirael ipaupake; ebwaikini kes ebela loka Yuda, etarauni kes ebela ediopet, eraunete kesi ediopet kakanika."
Ezekiel37:20 Ibelai da luiwadikat eiaunete akanikon kakonyenekec.
Ezekiel37:21 Kolimok kes ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, alemuni idwe luka Isirael kokidin atekerin nualosito, katukonok kowaitin kere, kayau kes toma akwapukec."
Ezekiel37:22 Ido etuluori ateker adiopet kakwap, koroijan luka Isirael; ekabaka ediopet eraun ekecekabaka kere: mam bobo eraunos atekerin aarei, kwabo mam etiakio eut bobo araun ajakanuto aarei."
Ezekiel37:23 Ido mam emunaaros bo bo kanuka aputosiakee, karaida italesiakee, karaida adiakanaretakec kere: konye etaiari kes kotoma aiierukanutukec kere, naeswamaeneniata nukaronok, etesegi kes: asa eraunete do ikatuŋa, eoŋ da araun Ekecedeke."
Ezekiel37:24 “Daudi ekabulesit ŋes erauni ekabakakee; edumunete ekeeokon ediopet. Ido elosenenete kotubcsiaka, ka airie ikakisila, iswamaenenete da."
Ezekiel37:25 Ido iboikinos akwap nakolo ainakini Yakob ekabulesit, naeboienenoto lukapapaakus; aso iboikinos nen, kes ka ikeeedwe, ka idwe luka idwekec, ikar kere: Daudi da ekabulesit ŋes eraenena ekapolonikee ikar kerc."
Ezekiel37:26 Ido bobo etutuki kakes aitutuket naka ainapakin: eraun aitutuket namam enaŋi kamakee: esirereni kes, etupui kes, ebwaikini akaibois nakalaunan kidinikec ikar kere."
Ezekiel37:27 Eiaenena da ekawema kakes: eoŋ da araun Ekecedeke, kes da eraunos ikatuŋa."
Ezekiel37:28 Ejenunete do atekerin ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT loetalaunit Isirael, naejaenenar akaibois nakalaunan kidinikec ikar kere.”"
Ezekiel38:1 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebc:
Ezekiel38:2 “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kite Gog, loka akwap naka Magog, ekapolon loka Ros, ka Mesek ka Tubal, kodwarak ŋes,"
Ezekiel38:3 kiner ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, arai lokasurupikon, ijo Gog, ekapolon loka Ros, ka Mesek ka Tubal."
Ezekiel38:4 Kebelokini jo, kebwaikini igolun abokonyakon, ketolomuni jo ka akonijore kere, ibalasin ka ikebwanenok, kere luenapitos lujiis luilosikino, atukot naepol naejaas iupalin, ka ibukwi, ekapito kere ikileŋa:"
Ezekiel38:5 Perusia, ka Kus, ka Put nepepe kakes; ejaas kere ibukwi ka akopiran."
Ezekiel38:6 Gomer, ka ikekodeta kere; ekek loka Togarama owaitin lukosane loka agolitomei, ka ikekodeta kere: ituŋa luipu luejaas kajo."
Ezekiel38:7 “Kitemokin, eebo kitemokin ijo ka atukon kere nuetukokina mamakon, koraun ijo ekedaranikec,"
Ezekiel38:8 Akaulo kapaarasia nuipu kianyanario: ikar lukawasia ibuni kiton akwap naenyakunio kairum naka ekileŋ, akwap nakitukonokinere ituŋa anyoun katekerin nuipu, oroŋan luka Isirael, luaraas lueswapito due: konye itolomunio iketuŋa katekerin, iboikinos iyamakina, kes kere."
Ezekiel38:9 Idokari, ibuni bala ekwam loepol, iraun bala edou arapakin akwap, ijo ka ikonikodeta kere, ka ituŋa luipu luejaas kajo."
Ezekiel38:10 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kapaaran kaŋin elomarete aomisio otaukon, ipwakuni ijo nukiswama nueroko:"
Ezekiel38:11 Itemari atiar, ‘Adokari kiton akwap naka ireria lumam ebwaitai; alosikini luijamamaete, luibojete iyamakina, kere luibojete komameete arwatatin, karaida atiketa ka irutei’:"
Ezekiel38:12 aiŋat iŋatan ka amej imejan: ibelokini akonikan asurokin aiboisio nulem iswapito nuejaas ituŋa, ka asurokin ituŋa luetukokina anyoun katekerin, luadumunito ibaren ka iboro, luibojete kokidin kakwap."
Ezekiel38:13 Seba ka Dedan, ka ikagwelanarak luka Tarusis, ka idwe luka iŋatunyo kere, kitemarete atiar, ‘Ibunit kereka ijo aiŋat iŋatan? Itukokinit kereka akonitukot amej imejan? Ayaŋaar epuesa ka esabu, alemar ibaren ka iboro, anatar iŋatuna luipu?’"
Ezekiel38:14 “Aso do, okoku loka etuŋanan, kodwar, kolimok Gog ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kapaaran kaŋin naiboikinotor ikatuŋa Isirael iyamakina, mere ijeni ijo?"
Ezekiel38:15 Ibuni ijo kaiboisikon kosane loka agolitomei, ijo ka ituŋa luipu, ibwanenito kere ibalasin, atukot naepol, ka aiore da nakos:"
Ezekiel38:16 Idokuni asurokin ikatuŋa Isirael, kwape kedou loerapakini akwap. Koso di kanen kapaarasia nukawasia, kayauni jo asurokin akakwap, tetere kaienunete atekerin, naetalaunor kakonyenekee kamakon, ijo Gog."
Ezekiel38:17 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Ŋo kereka ŋol loenerenena eoŋ apeŋo kama kikabulesin inabin luka Isirael, luadwarenenete kapaarasia kakwa ikar luipu ebe kayauni jo asurokin kes?"
Ezekiel38:18 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaya, naebunio Gog asurokin akwap naka Isirael, elomari akadedeŋ okumesika."
Ezekiel38:19 Naarai ener kotoma okokoteka, ka akim naka akanyunyura ebe, Abeit kapaaran kaŋin ejauni amaran naepol kakwap naka Isirael,"
Ezekiel38:20 Emaranete iboro lukecor lukaŋolol, ka akweny nuka apak, ka itian luka ais, ka iboro kere lueliatos kalup, ka ituŋa da kere lueiaas akwap, kanuka abunoreka, eukonorio ironan, ibirori neicelelei, ibironoros da arwatatin kere kwap."
Ezekiel38:21 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Anyarakini ekileŋ koronanaka kere asurokin ŋes; esurokini ekileŋ loka ŋolituŋanan onaeeke."
Ezekiel38:22 Atubokini ŋes katular ka aokot; etetepakini ŋes ka ikodetake, ka ituŋa luipu luejaas kaŋes, akiru naepol, ka akako naepol, ka akim, ka acukuman."
Ezekiel38:23 Ido etopoloor ketalaun da, eteienun bon kakonyen nuka atekerin nuipu. Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel39:1 “Ka jo da, okoku loka etuŋanan, kodwarak Gog, kiner atiar, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Koany, arai lokasurupikon, ijo Gog, ekapolon loka Ros, ka Mesek, ka Tubal."
Ezekiel39:2 Kebelokini, kameari, aitodokar anyoun kowaitin Iukosane loka agolitomei; kayauni oroŋan luka Isirael."
Ezekiel39:3 Enomari akonikabwa kotoma akanikon nakokediany, etodoi da imaliakon kakanikon nakoteten."
Ezekiel39:4 Ibirokini oroŋan luka Isirael, ijo ka ikonikodeta kere, ka ituŋa da Iuejaas kajo: kakorakini jo anyamio mama ejaas akweny, nuikibelito nuka ipoŋesio kere, ido kaneejaas Itian luka ais."
Ezekiel39:5 Ibirokini ais; naarai ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Eoŋ ener."
Ezekiel39:6 Ido ejukari akim Magog, ka ŋul da kere luibojete kapujana iyamakina: ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel39:7 “Erejenari ekakiror Iokalaunan kokidin kikatuna Isirael; kwabo mam acamakini ekakiror lokalaunan amoromoroo bobo: ejenunete da atekerin ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT, Lokalaunan loka Isirael."
Ezekiel39:8 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Koany, ebunit, ido iswamao; ŋin ŋes apaaran naabu kener,"
Ezekiel39:9 “Elomunete nul luibojete koreria luka Isirael, inokokinete akimian kalujiis, ieweikinete kes, ibukwi ka iupalin, akabwai ka imalia, ibelai luka akanin ka akwaras, inokokinete akimian ikar ikanykaarei."
Ezekiel39:10 Mam eraraete akito okitui, kwabo mam ejepete kamagoron; naarai inokokinete akimian kalujiis. Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Enaŋete kesi luanasito kes, iruruete da Iueruruete kes."
Ezekiel39:11 “Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, ainakini Gog aibois nakidaanakina kotoma Isirael, aditot naka ŋul kaluitorete kari nakokide naka aŋolol: ido itikokini nul luitorere: idaanakinete nen Gog ka iketuŋa kere: emaikinete Aditot naka Kamon-gog."
Ezekiel39:12 Edauni ekek loka Isirael ilapio ikanykaare idaete kes tetere itesegarete akwap.
Ezekiel39:13 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Eebo idaete ituŋa luka akwap; eraun aitopoloor kamakec, apaaran naetopolooror."
Ezekiel39:14 Etiakarete ituŋa luitorenenete akwap aida nul luesalito kakwap, tetere itesegarete akwap: ketuboros ilapio ikanykaarei emoete,"
Ezekiel39:15 Naitorioto toma akwap, naeanyunia ituŋanan akoit naka ituŋanan, esipokini nen aanyunet, aitodol neidaikiniata ikedaak Aditot naka Kamon-gog."
Ezekiel39:16 Eraun Kamona da ekiror loka ere. Kwaŋin itesegariata akwap.
Ezekiel39:17 “Ka jo, da, okoku loka etuŋanan, inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kolimok akweny nuka ipoŋesio kere, ka nolitiar; loka ais ebe, ‘Kotukunos, kopotu; kotukokinos owaitin kere neejai akasubanit naetemonokinit yes, asubanit naepol koronan luka Isirael, ininyete akiriŋ, idiŋaete da aokot,"
Ezekiel39:18 Iŋinyete awat nuka ikagogoŋok, idiŋaete da aokot nuka ikapolok luka akwap, nuka imerekekin, ka imerekekin ludidik, ka nuka akinei, ka imoŋin lutoba, kes kere luetarioko luko Basan."
Ezekiel39:19 Ininyete atarion kimonikinos, idiŋaete da aokot komerikinos, kasubanit naetemokinit yes."
Ezekiel39:20 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Imonikinos komesaka ibalasin ka ikebwanenok, ka lukirigin, ka ituŋa da kere lukajiok.’"
Ezekiel39:21 “Ido ebwaikini akaibuses toma atekerin; eanyunete atekerin kere ekatube loetodolik, ka akakan naedokok kes."
Ezekiel39:22 Aso ejenuni ekek loka Isirael ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, agear kapaaran kaŋin ka aiyatanakin da,"
Ezekiel39:23 Ejenunete atekerin ebe eioreorio ekek loka Isirael kanumam adolitekec; naarai apotu kodiakasi kamakaŋ, kebwa akakonyen kamakec: asa kainak kes akan naka lukasurupokee, kibiroros kesi kere kekilen,"
Ezekiel39:24 Kwape ajaatar amamus ailakec, ido kwape ajaar adiakarikee, kwape kwaŋin abu keswamak kes; kebwa akakonyen kamakec."
Ezekiel39:25 “Kanuka mm inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Enyakuni kwana aijoreorio naka Yakob, etimi ekek kere loka Isirael; ido kerumi ekokote kanuka ekakiror lokalaunan."
Ezekiel39:26 Imurwokinete ileicikec, ka adiakanaretakec kere nuadiakasi kamakaŋ, naiboikinotor akwapukec iyamakina, kwabo emamuunete luitukurianete kes,"
Ezekiel39:27 naadaunia ainyakun kes kotoma atekerin, ka atukonokin kotoma akwapin nuka lukasurupokee, naetalaunor kotomakec kakonyen nuka atekerin nuipu."
Ezekiel39:28 Ejenunete do ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, naarai abu kainak kes aijoreorio atekerin, ido atukokinit kes kiton akwapukec, Kwabo mam bobo enyeini idio kakesi kere kaŋina."
Ezekiel39:29 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Mam bobo ebwai akakonyen kamakec: naabukokinia ekek loka Isirael Ekamoyo.”"
Ezekiel40:1 Kokaru loka akaisaarei ka lukany loka aijoreoriokosi, kageunet naka ekaru, kapaaran nakitomonet naka elap, kokaru lokitomonet kaonon akaulo kaipikorio naka ere, kapaaran kanipe kaŋin, kojau akan naka EJAKAIT keoŋ, kayanau ne,"
Ezekiel40:2 Kaitapoeta nuka Edeke kayau akwap naka Isirael, kebwaik eoŋ oroŋat loeoj noi, kujuke kojai ibore yenesubit bala ere kari naka Eŋalakimak."
Ezekiel40:3 Kayanau eoŋ nen, ido koany, kojai etuŋanan, kosubite atakanuke bala atakanu naka aisinit, loetinit auno naka abirai kakanike, ka agada nakitemis; kobwo korute."
Ezekiel40:4 Kalimok eoŋ etuŋanan ŋol che, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, koany kakonikonye, kiira da kakoniki, kibwaik ekonitau kere nuketodikini; naarai kiyaunio ne tetere ketodikini jo kes; nuianyuni kere kitejenik ekek loka Isirael.”"
Ezekiel40:5 Ido koany, kojai arwatat kina naka etogo kowaitin kere, ido kitinite etuŋanan egada nakitemis naaoj ikubitin ikanykape, ŋolikubit aoj ekubit ka alalau naka etau loka akan: kitem ŋesi abures naka arwatat, agada adiopet; ka amukururuke, agada adiopet."
Ezekiel40:6 Kosodi kobu orute loeseseni kide, kodoka kadoketake; kitem okek loka erute, aburesuke agada adiopet: ka ekek eee aburesuke agada adiopet."
Ezekiel40:7 Aoj ninigola nakidaret agada adiopet, alal agada adiopet; apak da kokidin kagolai nukidaret ikubitin ikany; ido ekek loka erute aapie kagola nalomaret orute atereikina ketogo, agada adiopet,"
Ezekiel40:8 Kitem da agola nalomaret orute atereikina ketogo, agada adiopet,"
Ezekiel40:9 Kosodi kitem agola nalomaret orute, ikubitin ikanykauni; ka ategerioke ikubitin iarei; kojai agola nalomaret orute atereikina ketogo."
Ezekiel40:10 Emwaasi agolai nuka erute kari nakokide auni epuwai, ka auni da epuwai; kwa auni araas nuka aitemis adiopet: ategerio da nuka aitemis adiopet epuwai, ka epuwai da."
