Ezekiel40:11 Kitem alalau neenaario erute, ikubitin itomon; aojau da naka erute, ikubitin itomon ka luuni;"
Ezekiel40:12 ajai apak koiŋaren naka agolai, ekubit ediopet epuwai, ka apak ekubit ediopet epuwai da; emwaasi agolai ikubitin ikanykape epuwai, ka ikubitin ikanykape epuwai da."
Ezekiel40:13 Kitem erute anyoun katunuru naka agola adiopet, kiton atunuru naka ace, alalau naka ikubitin akaisaarei ka lukany; kiteosi ekek ka ekek."
Ezekiel40:14 Kitem neelomarere da, ikubitin akaisaarei, ido kirimorite alaro neelomarere orute."
Ezekiel40:15 Anyoun koinaren naka erute kiton to naka agola nalomaret nakotoma, emwaasi ikubitin akaisakany."
Ezekiel40:16 Ajaas agolai apedon nuagolokino, kejaas da toma ategerio toma orute airimor, kwape kwaŋin acuneta: koiaas apedon toma ammor: kojaas da idukudukun ategerio,"
Ezekiel40:17 Kosodi kayau eoŋ alaro nakokina, ido koany, ajaas agolai ka neitutuitoi naeswamakinitai alaro airimor: koiaas agolai akaisauni neitutuitoi,"
Ezekiel40:18 Kojai neitutuitoi kawai naka irutei kosesenas aojau naka irutei, neitutuitoi nakokwap."
Ezekiel40:19 Kosodi kitem alalau anyoun koinaren kerute lokokwap kiton kiŋaren naka alaro nakotoma kokina ikubitin akwatat, kide ka agolitomei da."
Ezekiel40:20 Ka erute loka alaro nakokina loeseseni agolitomei kitem aojauke ka alalauke.
Ezekiel40:21 Emwaasi agolaike auni epuwai, ka auni da epuwai, ategerioke ka acunetake koriakasi kaitemis naka erute Iosodit: aoiauke ikubitin akaisakany, alalauke ikubitin akaisaarei ka lukany."
Ezekiel40:22 Apedonoke, ka acunetake, ka idukudukunuke, koriakasi aitemis naka erute loeseseni kide: kojaas adoketa akanykaarei adokaria; koiaas da acunetake kinarenikec."
Ezekiel40:23 Kojai erute alaro nakotoma kosesenas erute eee, kari naka agolitomei, kari da nakokide; kitem ageun korute kiton orute, ikubitin akwatat."
Ezekiel40:24 Kenarenik eoŋ abear eŋalakimak, ido koany, erute loka eŋalakimak: kitem ategerioke ka acunetake kwape ajaatar aitemisio kwa."
Ezekiel40:25 Koiaas apedon tomake, ido toma acunetake airimor, kwape apedon kwa: aoiauke ikubitin akaisakany, ka alalauke da ikubitin akaisaarei ka lukany."
Ezekiel40:26 Kojaas adoketa akanykaarei adokaria, kojaas acunetake kiŋarenikec; koiaas idukudukun, ediopet epuwai, ediopet da epuwai, kotoma ategerioke."
Ezekiel40:27 Kojai erute alaro nakotoma kari naka eŋalakimak: kitem ageun korute kiton orute kari naka eŋalakimak, ikubitin akwatat."
Ezekiel40:28 Kosodi kayau alaro nakotoma korute loka eŋalakimak: kitem erute loka eŋalakimak kwape ajaatar aitemisio kwa.
Ezekiel40:29 Ka agolaike, ka ategerioke, ka acunetake, kwape ajaatar aitemisio kwa: kojaas apedon tomake ka toma acunetake da airimor: aojauke ikubitin akaisakany, alalauke da ikubitin akaisaarei ka lukany."
Ezekiel40:30 Koiaas acuneta airimor, aojaukee ikubitin akaisaarei kalukany, alalaukee da ikubitin ikany."
Ezekiel40:31 Atereikina acunetake kalaro nakokiŋa; koiaas idukudukun kategerioke: needokarere koiaas adoketa akanykauni.
Ezekiel40:32 Kayau alaro nakotoma naeseseni kide: kitem erute kwape ajaatar aitemisio kwa:
Ezekiel40:33 agolaike, ka ategerioke, ka acunetake, kwape ajaatar aitemisio kwa: ido ajaas apedon tomake, toma acunetake da airimor: aojauke ikubitin akaisakany, alalauke ikubitin akaisaarei ka lukany,"
Ezekiel40:34 Atereikina acunetake kalaro nakokina: kojaas idukudukun kategerioke, epuwai, ka epuwai da: needokarere koiaas adoketa akanykauni."
Ezekiel40:35 Kayau orute loka agolitomei: kitem ŋes kwape ajaatar aitemisio kwa,"
Ezekiel40:36 Agolaike, ka ategerioke, ka acunetake; koiaas apedon tomake airimor: aoiauke ikubitin akaisakany, alalauke ikubitin akaisaarei ka lukany."
Ezekiel40:37 Atereikina acunetake kalaro nakokina; koiaas idukudukun kategerioke, epuwai, ka epuwai da; needokarere kojaas adoketa akanykauni."
Ezekiel40:38 Kojai agola nepepe kekekike eapie ategerio korutei; nen kilosenenata ainakinet naicweio.
Ezekiel40:39 Agola nalomaret naka erute ajaas imesan iarei epuwai, ka imesan da iarei epuwai, aarenena ainakinet naicweio, ka ainakinet naka adiakaret, ka ainakinet da naka aronis."
Ezekiel40:40 Ajaas imesan iarei epuwai kokina, needokarere kalomaret naka erute loka agolitomei; ajaas da imesan iarei epuwai neebeit agola nalomaret orute."
Ezekiel40:41 Ajaas imesan iwonon epuwai, ka imesan da iwonon epuwai eapias kerute; imesan ikanykauni luearanakinio asuban."
Ezekiel40:42 Ajaas imesan iwonon luka ainakinet naicweio, luka amoru nuikee, aojaukee ekubit ediopet ka atutubet, alalaukee ekubit ediopet ka atutubet, amukururukee ekubit ediopet; luebwaanakinete iboro luaaris ainakinet naicweio ka asubanit."
Ezekiel40:43 Itemokinitoi igolun lueojak alalau naka etau loka akan kotoma airimor: koiai akiriŋ naka ainakinet omesan.
Ezekiel40:44 Ido kina kerute lokotoma ajaas agolai kanuka ikayook toma alaro nakotoma, naajai osiep loka erute loka agolitomei; kosesenete eŋalakimak: adiopet osiep laka crute lokokide koseseni agolitomei."
Ezekiel40:45 Kosodi ŋesi atemar eoŋ atiar, “Agola na, naeseseni eŋalakimak, erai naka isasedotin, ikedarak luidarete etogo,"
Ezekiel40:46 Agola naeseseni agolitomei erai naka isasedotin, ikedarak luidarete etem: kes idwe luka Sadok, lukotoma odwe luka Lebi Iuikunyakinete aijaanakin EJAKAIT.”"
Ezekiel40:47 Kitem alaro, aoiauke ikubitin akwatat, alalauke ikubitin akwatat, koriana kowaitin kere; kojai etem kinaren ketogo."
Ezekiel40:48 Kosodi kayau agola nalomaret togo, kitem ŋinitegerioit naka agola nalomaret, ikubitin ikany epuwai, ka ikubitin ikany da epuwai: alalau naka erute ikubitin iuni epuwai, ka ikubitin iuni da epuwai."
Ezekiel40:49 Aojau naka agola nalomaret ikubitin akaisaarei, alalauke ikubitin itomon kadiopet; eapie kadoketa nuedokanarere: ajaas ipirin eapias kategerio, ediopet epuwai, ka eee da epuwai."
Ezekiel41:1 Kayau oyekalu, kitem ategerio, alalaukee ikubitin ikanykape epuwai, ka ikubitin ikanykape epuwai, nakerai alalau naka ewema."
Ezekiel41:2 Alalau naka alomaret ikubitin itomon; isiepiort luka alomaret keraas ikubitin ikany epuwai, ka ikubitin ikany da epuwai; kitem aojauke, ikubitin akaisaoŋon, alalauke ikubitin akaisaarei."
Ezekiel41:3 Kosodi alomar toma, kitem ŋinitegerioit naka alomaret, ikubitin iarei; ka alomaret, ikubitin ikanykape; alalau naka alomaret, ikubitin ikanykaarei."
Ezekiel41:4 Kitem aojauke, ikubitin akaisaarei, alalauke da ikubitin akaisaarei, koiŋaren keyekalu: katema eoŋ atiar, “Na ŋes aibois nakalaunan noi.”"
Ezekiel41:5 Kosodi kitem arwatat naka etogo, ikubitin ikanykape; alalau da naka ŋinigola nakosiep, ikubitin iwonon, airimor etogo kowaitin kere."
Ezekiel41:6 Eeulul agolai nukosiep irwan auni, adiopet kuju kanaee: akaisauni kaŋinikiculet, Kolomasi ŋun arwatat naka etogo kanuka agolai nukosiep airimor, tetere iganio kanen, komam egoijakina arwatat naka etogo."
Ezekiel41:7 Kiyatanakinos agolai nukosiep alalaar airimor, iwosete kuju: naarai airimor etogo eyatanakin aiwot kuju airimor etogo: ŋes ainakin alalau naka etogo iyatanakin kuju: kwaŋin kidoka anyoun kanakokwap kiton kuju itori aieulet nakokidin."
Ezekiel41:8 Abu kaany da ebe kejai etut airimor: apeteta nuka agolai nukosiep keraas agada adiopet eut naka ikubitin ikanykape lueojak.
Ezekiel41:9 Abures naka arwatat nakokiŋa naka agolai nukosiep kerai ikubitin ikany: atutubet nakesali kere aibois naka agolai nukosiep nukotogo.
Ezekiel41:10 Ido kidin kagolai ajai abures naka ikubitin akaisaarei airimor etogo kowaitin kere.
Ezekiel41:11 Ketereikina ikekia luka agolai nukosiep aibois nakesali, atereikina da ekek ediopet agolitomei, ka ekek eee eŋalakimak: abures naka aibois nakesali kerai ikubitin ikany airimor."
Ezekiel41:12 Aduket nakejai kinaren kaneatiakaritai kari nakoto alalauke ikubitin akaisakanykaarei; abures da naka arwatat naka aduket kerai ikubitin ikany airimor, aojauke da ikubitin akaisakanykaoŋon."
Ezekiel41:13 Kitem etogo, aojauke, ikubitin akwatat; kaneatiakaritai ka aduket nepepe karwatatinike aojauke ikubitin akwatat."
Ezekiel41:14 Alalau da nakoinaren ketogo kokide, ka alaro kerai ikubitin akwatat."
Ezekiel41:15 Kitem aoiau naka aduket koinaren kaneatiakaritai naejai kauke, ka ibalasanake epuwai ka epuwai, ikubitin akwatat. Eyekalu da lokotoma, ka agolai nulomaret nuka alaro,"
Ezekiel41:16 ariri naka ikekia, ka apedon nuagolokino, ka ibalasan luirimorito aiculetakee auni atereikina ariri naka ekek keraparito akito kowaitin kere, anyoun kokwap aitodol apedon; ido keraparitai apedon:"
Ezekiel41:17 aitodol apak nakejai kuju kekek kiton togo lokotoma, kokina da, karwatat da kere airimor kotoma, kokina da, kaitemis."
Ezekiel41:18 Kegeritai ikerubin ka idukudukun; kejai edukudukut kidiŋ ekerubi ka ekerubi, kejaas nollkerubi ireeta iarei;"
Ezekiel41:19 kwaŋin kejai ereet loka etuŋanan atereikina edukudukut kepuwai, ka ereet loka ikoku yenika eŋatuny atereikina edukudukut kepuwai. Kiswamatai kwaŋin anatar etogo kere airimor;"
Ezekiel41:20 kegeritai ikerubin ka idukudukun anyoun kokwap kiton kuju okek: kikoni nen arwatat naka eyekalu.
Ezekiel41:21 Oyekalu kejaas ategerio nueriakanara owaitin kere; koinaren naka aibois nakalaunan ajai ibore yenasubit bala
Ezekiel41:22 etem loka akito, amukururuke ikubitin iuni, aojauke ikubitin iarei; agoriaike, kwapuke, ka arwatatinike keraas nuka akito. Katema eoŋ atiar, “Lo ŋes erŋesa loejai akonyen nuka EJAKAIT,”"
Ezekiel41:23 Ido eyekalu ka aibois nakalaunan da kere ajaas ikekia iarei.
Ezekiel41:24 Araas ikirigin luka abaoi aarei, abaoi aarei nuesukonokinos; abaoi aarei nuka ekirigi ediopet, ka abaoi aarei nuka ekirigi lokiareit."
Ezekiel41:25 Ido kegerakinitai okirigin luka eyekalu, ikerubin ka idukudukun, kwape ageritere arwatatin; ido kinaren kagola nalomaret kokina, kejaas abaoi nueburok nuka akito."
Ezekiel41:26 Ajaas apedon nugolokino, ka idukudukun epuwai ka epuwai da, kowaitin luka agola nalomaret: kikote nen agolai nukosiep nuka etogo, ka abaoi nueburok."
Ezekiel42:1 Kosodi ketolom alaro nakokina, erot loebei agolitomei: ketoloma agola naetereikina aibois naetiakaritai, ido naetereikina aduket kowai loka agolitomei."
Ezekiel42:2 Aojau naka aduket nakejai owai loka agolitomei kerai ikubitin akwatat, ka alalauke da ikubitin akaisakany."
Ezekiel42:3 Atercikina ikubitin akaisaarei luka alaro nakotoma ka atereikina etut loka alaro nakokina, keiai ebalasa atcreikina ebalasa eee kaiculeta auni."
Ezekiel42:4 Ido kinaren kagolai ajai erot toma, alalauke ikubitin itomon; erot loka ikubitin akwatat, ketereikina ikekiakee agolitomei."
Ezekiel42:5 Ido agolai nukokuju keraas nuewuriaka aitelekarit: naarai elikorito ibalasan apakikee, aitelekar apak naka kwa nukokwap, ka nukokidin, kotoma aduket,"
Ezekiel42:6 Naarai keiaas aieuleta auni, ido kemameete ipirin kwape ipirin luka alaro: kanuka nun adidin nakokuiu aitelekarit nakokwap, ka nakokidin anyoun kokwap."
Ezekiel42:7 Arwatat nakejai kina naedunyasi kagolai, atereikina alaro nakokina asesena kagolai, aojauke ikubitin akaisakany."
Ezekiel42:8 Naarai aojau naka agolai nukejaas alaro nakokina kerai ikubitin akaisakany: kwa nuatereikina eyekalu keraas ikubitin akwatat,"
Ezekiel42:9 Ido kwap kagolai nun ajai alomaret kowai lokokide, nailomaria tomakee anyoun kalaro nakokina,"
Ezekiel42:10 Kotoma abures naka arwatat naka alaro atereikina kide, koiŋaren kaibois naetiakaritai, koinaren da naka aduket, kejaas agolai."
Ezekiel42:11 Erot lokeiai kinarenikec aputos bala atakanu naka erot loka agolai nuetereildna agolitomei; kwape ajaar aojaukee, ekoni nen alalaukec ido alomaretakee kere aputos kotoma asubuniokee, ka ikiriginikec."
Ezekiel42:12 Ido kwape ikekia luka agolai nuetereikina eŋalakimak, kejai ekek kageunet naka erot, ŋes erot loajai kiŋaren karwatat, atereikina kide arai ilomari tomakec."
Ezekiel42:13 Kosodi katema eoŋ atiar, “Agolai nuka agolitomei ka agolai nuka eŋalakimak, nuetereikina aibois naetiakaritai, ŋun kes agolai nukalaunak, nuenyamanakinete isasedotin lueapias ka EJAKAIT iboro lukalaunak noi: nen ibwaanakinete iboro lukalaunak noi, ainakineta nuka akiria, ka ainakineta nuka adiakar, ka ainakineta da nuka aronis; naarai aibois nin erai nakalaunan."
Ezekiel42:14 Naelomanariata isasedotin aibois nakalaunan, mam bobo elomunete alaro nakokina koroko elaeara inapenekee luejaanakiniata; naarai eraas lukalaunak: asa enapenenete inapen ice tetere ikunyakinete ŋin naka ituŋa.”"
Ezekiel42:15 Kosodi kedau aitem etogo lokotoma, ketolom korot loka erute loeseseni kide, kitem airimor."
Ezekiel42:16 Kitem ŋesi kowai lokokide kagada ŋin nakitemis, agadai akwat akany, kagada nakitemis,"
Ezekiel42:17 Kibelokin kitem kowai loka agolitomei, agadai akwat akany, kagada nakitemis,"
Ezekiel42:18 Kibelokin kitem kowai loka eŋalakimak, agadai akwat akany, kagada nakitemis."
Ezekiel42:19 Kibelokin ari nakoto kitem agadai akwat akany kagada nakitemis.
Ezekiel42:20 Kitem ŋesi kowaitin iwonon. Kejai arwatat airimor, aojau akwat akany, alalau akwat akany, aitiak nakalaunan ka naka ituŋa kere,"
Ezekiel43:1 Kosodi kokau kayau orute, ŋes erute loeseseni kide,"
Ezekiel43:2 Ido koany, kobu aibuses naka Edeke loka Isirael korot lokokide: eporotoke da kwa pe eporoto loka akipi nuipu; kiliyau akwap kanuka akeibuses."
Ezekiel43:3 Kosuhite bala atakanu naka aitapoet naanyunit, bala aitapoet naabu kaany naabunio ŋesi amudiar ere: ekote aitapoeta bala aitapoet naabu kaany koeor Kebar; kebiror ebuburia."
Ezekiel43:4 Koloma aibuses naka EJAKAIT oyekalu korot loka erute loeseseni kide.
Ezekiel43:5 Kadaka Emoyo eoŋ, kayana kiton alaro nakotoma; ido koany, kileleba aibuses naka EJAKAIT togo."
Ezekiel43:6 Kobwoi etuŋanan kosiepika, keira eporoto loenera keoŋ kotogo."
Ezekiel43:7 Katema eoŋ atiar, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, na ŋes aibois naka eicolonoka, ka aibois naka aicaketa nuka akejeka, naeboio kidin ka idwe luka Isirael ikar kere. Kwabo mam bobo idwe luka Isirael emunaarete ekakiror lokalaunan, karaida kes, karaida ikabakanakec, kanuka eporokee, ido kanuka atesin nuka ikabakanakec kotoma aiboisiokec nuiceleleete;"
Ezekiel43:8 Kanuka aiduk aririkee naka ekek eiduny karirika, ategerioitikec eiduny kategerioitika, ajai arwatat bon kidin eoŋ ka kes. Amunaasi ekakiror lokalaunan, kanuka italesiakec lueswamaete: kanuka ŋun etanana kes kanuka akanyunyura."
Ezekiel43:9 Kwana kolemasi ca kesi eporokee, ka atesina nuka ikabakanakec neelwana kamakaŋ, asa eboienenei kokidinikec ikar kere."
Ezekiel43:10 “Ijo da okoku loka etuŋanan, kitodik ekek loka Isirael etogo lo, tetere irumete ileic kanuka numam adolitekec: kitemoto aputoke."
Ezekiel43:11 Ido arai irumete ileic kanuka ŋun kere nueswamata, kitejenik kes asubunet naka etogo, ka aputoke, ka alomaretake, ka alomunetake, ka asubunetake kere, ka aicorakinetake, ka asubunetake kere, ka ikisilake kere, kiwadik kakonyenekee: tetere ericete asubuneteke kere, ka aicorakinetake kere, ka aswam da."
Ezekiel43:12 Lo ŋes ekisil loka etogo: kuju aidi naka eronat kiton osaŋeke kere airimor eraun nakalaunan noi. Koany, ŋol ŋes ekisil loka etogo."
Ezekiel43:13 “Nu kes aitemisio nuka etem kokubitin: (ekubit ŋes ekubit ka alalau naka etau loka akan:) kwapuke amukurur ekubit, alalauke ekubit, ka atokitoitike airimor aituk atutubet naka ekubit: nen ŋes kwap naka etem."
Ezekiel43:14 Ageun kokwap naejai kwap kiton amurut nakokwap ikubitin iarei, alalauke ekubit; ido ageun kamurut naedit kiton amurut naepol, ikubitin iwonon, alalau da ekubit."
Ezekiel43:15 Ido etem lokokuju ikubitin iwonon, ido ageun kokiala loka etem kiton kuju ejaunos amumwar aoŋon."
Ezekiel43:16 Aojau naka ekiala loka etem eraun ikubitin itomon kaarei, alalau da ikubitin itomon kaarei, koriakas iwaitinike kere iwonon."
Ezekiel43:17 Amurut da koriana alalau ka aojau ikubitin itomon ka luonon; atokitoitike eraun atutubet naka ekubit, kokwapuke ekubit airimor: esesenete akedoketa kide.”"
Ezekiel43:18 Katema eoŋ atiar, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Nu kes aicorakineta nuka etem: kapaaran naiswamaata, ainakinia ainakineta nuicweio, ka abwatanakin aokot."
Ezekiel43:19 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Iinakini isasedotin Ilebin lukaur naka Sadok, Iueapiete keoŋ aijaanakin eoŋ, emoŋ lotobait araun ainakinet naka adiakaret."
Ezekiel43:20 Ilemuni aokotoke, ibwaikini amumwarake aoŋon, ka agoria aoŋon nuka amurut, ka atokitoit airimor: kwaŋin itesegia ŋes, iluei da."
Ezekiel43:21 Ilemuni da emoŋ lotobait loka ainakinet naka adiakaret, icweio ŋes kaibois naeseunitai naka etogo, kokina kaibois nakalaunan."
Ezekiel43:22 Kosodi kapaaran nakiareit iinakini ekoroi lomam eŋwalit araut ainakinet naka adiakaret; itesegete etem, kwape etesegitotor komon lotobait."
Ezekiel43:23 Naidaunia aiteseg, iinakini emoŋ lotobait lomam eŋwalit, ka emerekek lomam eŋwalit loelemunio kosipan."
Ezekiel43:24 Isukunyikini kes akonyen nuka EJAKAIT, eeakanakinete isasedotin abalaŋ, einakinete kes araut ainakinet naicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel43:25 Kapaarasia akanykaarei itemonokinene ŋinipaaran akinei araut ainakinet naka adiakaret: ido itemonokinete emoŋ lotobait, ka emerekek lomam eŋwalit loelemunio kosipan."
Ezekiel43:26 Apaarasia akanykaarei ilueete kanuka etem, itesegarete; kwaŋin ŋes etiakariata."
Ezekiel43:27 Kosodi kedautu apaarasia ŋun, edoli apaaran nakikanyetekauni, ka aiyatanakin da, einanakinete isasedotin ainakinetakus nuieweio, ka ainakinetakus nuka ainapakin kotem. Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kaeamuni do yes.”"
Ezekiel44:1 Kosodi kenyak korot lokorute lokokiŋa loka aiboisnakalaunan, loeseseni kide; ido kegolol."
Ezekiel44:2 Katema EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, “Esalakini erute lo egolol, mam enaario, kwabo emamuun ituŋanan yenelomari, naarai aloma EJAKAIT, Edeke loka Isirael nen; ŋes agolere."
Ezekiel44:3 Iboikin ekapolon nen, korai ekapolon, anyamanakin atap nen kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT; elomari korot loka agola nalomaret naka erute, ido elomuni korot ŋopeŋol.”"
Ezekiel44:4 Kosodi kayana korot lokorute loka agolitomei koinaren ketogo; kasesen, ido koany, kileleba aibuses naka EJAKAIT togo loka EJAKAIT: kebiror ebuburia."
Ezekiel44:5 Katema EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, kibwaik ekonitau noi, kosesen kakonikonye, ido kiira kakoniki ŋun kere nukalimokini jo nuka aicorakineta kere nuka etogo loka EJAKAIT, ka ikekisila kere: ido kibwaik ekonitau noi luelomanarete togo, ka luelomanarete da aibois nakalaunan."
Ezekiel44:6 Ido ilimonokini lukepali, kes ekek loka Isirael ebe, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Wu jo ekek loka Isirael, kodautu italesiakus kere,"
Ezekiel44:7 naarai itolomununete imo, lumam ekepitai kotauon, ido Iumam ekepitai kawat, ajaut toma aiboisika nakalaunan, amunaar ekatogo, naiinanakiniata ikanyamat, atarion, ka aokot da. Ibilata yesi akaitutuket, aiyatakin italesiakus kere."
Ezekiel44:8 Kwabo mam iricito ikaboro lukalaunak: konye ibwaikis yesi imo araut ikaricak akaibois nakalaunan.
Ezekiel44:9 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Emamuun emoit lomam ekepitai kotau, ido lomam ekepitai kakuan, loelomari aiboisika nakalaunan, emoit kere loejaunun toma odwe luka Isirael."
Ezekiel44:10 Konye Ilebin lualuluasi kamakaŋ, luapaasi kamakaŋ atupar aputosiakec, naapaaria Isirael, ibwokete kesi numam adolitekec."
Ezekiel44:11 Konye eraunete kesi ikejaanakinak kotoma aiboisika nakalaunan, aanyanar korutei luka etogo, kijaanakinete da kotogo: earanakinete nul ainakinet naicweio, ka asubanit kanuka ituŋa, ido ebwoenenete kakonyenekec aijaanakin kes."
Ezekiel44:12 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Naarai kijaanakis kes kakonyen nuka aputosiakec, koraut ekomio kanumam adolit mama ejai ekek loka Isirael; ŋes ekeikinia akakan aluikin kes, ido ibwokete numam adolitekec."
Ezekiel44:13 Kwabo mam ikunyunete diekan, aitodol aswam naka esasedoti mamakaŋ, karaida aikunyakin idio koboroka lukalaunak, ka iboro da lukalaunak noi; konye ibwokete ikeceleic, kanuka italesiakee lueswamaenenete,"
Ezekiel44:14 Konye etuluori kes ikaricak etogo, kanuka aijaanakin kere nakotoma, kanuka akiro kere da nuiswamao kanen."
Ezekiel44:15 “Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Konye isasedotin Ilebin, odwe luka Sadok, luaricenenete akaibois nakalaunan, naapaariata idwe luka Isirael kamakaŋ, nul kes ikunyunete diekan, aijaanakin eoŋ; ebwoete kakonyeneka ainakin eoŋ atarion ka aokot."
Ezekiel44:16 Elomanarete kesi aiboisika nakalaunan, ikunyununete omesaka, aijaanakin eoŋ, ido ericete akakiro."
Ezekiel44:17 Kosodi kanen naelomanariata orutei luka alaro nakotoma, enapenenete inapen luka ebaputa; kwabo mam enapenenete lukajul, naijaanakiniata korutei luka alaro nakotoma, kotoma da."
Ezekiel44:18 Ejaenenas igoen lukieniena luka ebaputa akwesikee, ka epale loka ebaputa kanabesikec; mam enapenenete ibore kere yenisinyinyiri."
Ezekiel44:19 Kosodi naelomununiata alaro nakokina, ŋes alaro nakokiŋa naka ituŋa, elacenenete inapenekec luejaanakiniata, kinadakis agolai nukalaunak; kosodete ainap inapen ice, tetere mam italaunete ituŋa kinapenekec."
Ezekiel44:20 Ido mam ebarenenete akwesikec, karaida aipit itim; konye enerenenete itimakec."
Ezekiel44:21 Mam emasenenei ediosasedoti ebino, naelomariata alaro nakotoma."
Ezekiel44:22 Kwabo mam emanyenenete apuserut, karaida naerenearitai; konye komanyenenete abekon nuka aur naka ekek loka Isirael, arai apuserut nakerai apuserut naka esasedoti."
Ezekiel44:23 Ido isisianakinete kesi ikatuŋa atiaketait kwape ejaar kidin yenikalaunan ka yenika ituŋa kere, itejenikinete da atiaketait kwape eiaar kidin yenimam elai ka yenelai."
Ezekiel44:24 Etubonokinete kesi naeiaatatar ipegeta; etubonokinete kwape ejaatar ikatubesia. Koricito ikakisila ka akaicorakineta opueinoka kere Iuescunitai; kitalaununete da asabatonoka.
Ezekiel44:25 Mam ikunyanakinete yenikatwan amunaaror: konye kanuka papa, arai toto, arai ikokukec yenisapat arai yenipese, arai onaee, arai kinaei naemamei ekiliokit, epedorete amunaar."
Ezekiel44:26 Kedau aitesegaario, kimarakinai apaarasia akanykaarei."
Ezekiel44:27 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kosodi kapaaran naelomaria aibois nakalaunan, alaro nakotoma, aijaanakin aibois nakalaunan, einakini ber ainakineteke naka adiakar."
Ezekiel44:28 “Eiaunete kairumet; arai eoŋ airumetekee: kwabo mam iinanakinete alup kotoma Isirael; arai eoŋ alupokec.
Ezekiel44:29 Enyamenenete ainakineta nuka akiria, ka ainakineta nuka adiakar, ka ainakineta nuka aronis; ido ŋinibore yenipoliatai koIsirael eraun yenikee."
Ezekiel44:30 Ka luegeete kere luka araito kere nugeet, ka ŋiniinakinet kere naka ŋinibore kere, naka ainakinetakus kere, eraununos nuka isasedotin: iinanakinete da isasedotin atapakus nakainumunum, tetere isirerenio ekonitogo."
Ezekiel44:31 Mam enyamenenete isasedotin ibore kere yenetwani bon, arai yenepoopootai, arai akweny, arai itiaŋ."
Ezekiel45:1 “Bobo da, naikorokoraata akwap araun airumet koroet, iinanakinete EJAKAIT ainakinet, atutubet nakalaunan naka akwap: aojauke ikubitin ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany, alalauke da ikubitin iluktunin itomon: eraun nakalaunan kowaitinike kere airimor."
Ezekiel45:2 Ejaun nen aibois nakalaunan, aoiauke ikubitin akwat akany, alalauke da ikubitin akwat akany, ariakanara; ka ikubitin akaisakany kanuka ironyia airimor."
Ezekiel45:3 Kaitemisioit na itemi aoiau naka ikubitin ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany, ka alalau naka ilukumin itomon: tomake ejaun aibois nakalaunan, naerai nakalaunan noi."
Ezekiel45:4 Erai atutubet nakalaunan naka akwap; eraun naka isasedotin, ikeiaanakinak luka aibois nakalaunan, luikunyakinete aijaanakin EJAKAIT: eraun aibois naka itogoikec, ka aibois nakalaunan kanuka aibois nakalaunan."
Ezekiel45:5 Ido Ilebin, ikeiaanakinak lukotogo, ejaunos ka ikubitin ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany aoiau, ka ikubitin ilukumin itomon alalau, araut alupokee, kanuka ireriakee luiboienenoto."
Ezekiel45:6 “Igitarete alup nuka ere ikubitin ilukumin ikany alalau, ka ikubitin akaisaarei ka lukany aojau, kidunyakina kainakinet naka atutubet nakalaunan: eraunos nuka ekek kere loka Isirael."
Ezekiel45:7 “Ido nuka ekapolon ejaunete epuwai ka epuwai kainakinet nakalaunan, ka alup nuka ere; kowaitin luka ainakinet nakalaunan, kowaitin da luka alup nuka ere, kariino nukokide ka nukoto: eriakanara aoiau atutubet adiopet, anyoun kari nakoto kiton ari nakokide."
Ezekiel45:8 Eraunos alupoke kotoma akwap naka Isirael. Kwabo mam bobo ikapolokoka emwanete ikatuŋa; konye einakinete ekek loka Isirael akwap kwape ejaatar atekerinikec.
Ezekiel45:9 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kodaut, yes ikapolok luka Isirael! Kolemasi akaje ka aiŋat, kitodoloto etube ka adolit: ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kinyeis aireŋear ikatuŋa,"
Ezekiel45:10 “Kojaenenas kaitemisio nuedolito, epa loedolit, ka akaalakany naedolit."
Ezekiel45:11 Koraas epa ka akaalakany nuka aitemisioit adiopet, edoli akaalakany yenikitomonet yenika ekomer epa da yenikitomonet yenika ekomer: aitemisioitike koiaun kwape eiaar ekomer."
Ezekiel45:12 Esekel da eriakas igeran akaisaarei: isekelin ikany eraunos isekelin ikany, isekelin itomon eraunos isekelin itomon, ka emanekus kes isekelin akaisakany."
Ezekiel45:13 Na ŋes ainakinet naiinanakinete; idiopet kokanykape yenika epa yenelemunio kazjolikomer loka enano, iinanakinete da idiopet kokanykape yenika epa yenelemunio kanolikomer loka esairi:"
Ezekiel45:14 ka ainakinet naicorakinitai naka akinyet, naka akaalakany naka akinyet, eraun idiopet kotomon yenika akaalakany yenelemunio kokor, kes akaalakanya atomon, kes ekomer; naarai akaalakanya atomon kes ekomer:"
Ezekiel45:15 ka imerekek idiopet yenikosipan yenelemunio kakwat aarei, koronyia lukecoa luka Isirael. Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, ŋin ŋes ainakinet naka akiria, ka ainakinet naicweio, ka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, alueio kes."
Ezekiel45:16 Einanakinete ituŋa kere luka akwap ainakinet nin kanuka ekapolon loka Isirael.
Ezekiel45:17 Eraun aswam naka ekapolon ainakin ainakineta nuieweio, ka ainakineta nuka akiria, ka ainakineta numatan, kopuein, ka nailamununia elap, kasabaton, kopuein kere lueseunitai luka ekek loka Isirael: ŋes itemonokini ainakinet naka adiakaret, ka ainakinet naka akiria, ka ainakinet naicweio, ka ainakineta nuka ainapakin, alucio ekek loka Isirael."
Ezekiel45:18 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Kolap losodit, kapaaran nasodit naka elap, iyanaari emoŋ lotobait lomam eŋwalit; kitesegia aibois nakalaunan."
Ezekiel45:19 Elemuni esasedoti aokot nuka ainakinet naka adiakar, ejuki ategerio nuka etogo, ka agoria aoŋon nuka amurut naka etem, ka ategerio nuka erute loka alaro nakotoma."
Ezekiel45:20 Ido iswamaenenei kwaŋin kapaaran nakikanyetekaarei naka elap, kanuka ŋinituŋanan yenepaari, kaŋin da yenijimat: kwaŋin ilucenenoto etogo."
Ezekiel45:21 “Kolap losodit, kapaaran nakitomonet kaonon naka elap, kojaununos kAleleŋio, epueit loka apaarasia akanykaarei; kes enyamere imugatin lumam itubuunitoi."
Ezekiel45:22 Kapaaran kaŋin itemonokini ekapolon emoŋ lotobait araun ainakinet naka adiakaret kanuken, kanuka ituŋa da kere luka akwap."
Ezekiel45:23 Itemonokini ŋesi ainakinet naicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT apaarasia akanykaarei nuka epueit, imoŋin lutoba ikanykaarei, ka imerekekin ikanykaarei lumam eŋwalito ninipaaran adaun apaarasia akanykaarei; ka ekoroi da ŋinipaaran araut ainakinet naka adiakaret."
Ezekiel45:24 Ido itemonokini ainakinet naka akiria, epa ediopet kaŋolimon lotobait, ka epa ediopet kanolimerekek, ka ekin loka akinyet kanoli epa."
Ezekiel45:25 Kolap lokikanyetekaarei, kapaaran nakitomonet kakany naka elap, kopueit, kiswamaenenei kwape kwaŋin adaun apaarasia akanykaarei: kwape ejaar ainakinet naka adiakaret, ka ainakinet naicweio ka ainakinet naka akiria, ka naka akinyet, kwape ejaatar."
Ezekiel46:1 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Egolio erute loka alaro nakotoma loeseseni kide apaarasia akanykape nuka aswam; konye eŋaanario kasabato, kapaaran da nailamunia elap eŋaanario."
Ezekiel46:2 Elomanari ekapolon korot loka agola nalomaret lokorute lokokina, kobwo eiduny kategerioit naka erute. Itemonokinete isasedotin ainakineteke naicweio, ka ainakinetake nuka ainapakin, emaenenei ŋesi kaneelomarere korute. Kosodi alomun, konye mam ekek egolonokinio aitodol eboŋ."
Ezekiel46:3 Emaenenete ituŋa luka akwap kokek loka erute kanol kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT kasabaton ka nailamununia elap.
Ezekiel46:4 Ainakinet da naicweio naeinanakini ekapolon mama ejai EJAKAIT kasabato eraenena imerekekin ikanykape ludidik lumam eŋwalito, ka emerekek lomam eŋwalit;"
Ezekiel46:5 ainakinet da naka akiria eraenena epa ediopet kanuka emerekek, ka ainakinet da naka akiria kanuka imerekekin ludidik kwape epedoria ainakin, ekin da naka akinyet kanoli epa."
Ezekiel46:6 Kapaaran da nailamunia elap eraenena emoŋ lotobait lodidi lomam eŋwalit; ka imerekekin ludidik ikanykape ka emerekek; eraenenas lumam eŋwalito.
Ezekiel46:7 Ido itemonokini ainakinet naka akiria, epa ediopet kanuka emoŋ lotobait, epa ediopet da kanuka emerekek, ido kanuka imerekekin ludidik kwape epedoria, ekin da loka akinyet kanoli epa."
Ezekiel46:8 Naelomanaria ekapolon, elomanari korot loka agola nalomaret naka erute, ido ibononori korot kanope kanol."
Ezekiel46:9 “Konye naeponenenata ituŋa luka akwap kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT kopucin lueseunitai, ŋol loelomanari korot lokorute loka agolitomei aima, elomununei korot lokorute loka eŋalakimak; ŋol da loelomanari korot lokorute loka eŋalakimak, elomununei korot lokorute loka agolitomei: mam ebononori korot lokorute loalomaria, konye itori lokoinarenike,"
Ezekiel46:10 Naelomanariata ituŋa, elomanari ekapolon da kakes, ido naelomununiata, elomununei ŋesi da."
Ezekiel46:11 “Kopucin da ka apakio nueseunitai eraun ainakinet naka akiria epa ediopet kanuka emoŋ lotobait, ka epa ediopet kanuka emerekek, ido kwape epedoria ainakin kanuka imerekekin ludidik, ekin da loka akinyet kanoli epa."
Ezekiel46:12 Ido naitemonokinia ekapolon ainakinet naka akote, ainakinet naicweio, arai ainakineta nuka ainapakin araut ainakinet naka akote mama ejai EJAKAIT, eŋaanakinio erute loeseseni kide, itemonokini da ainakineteke naicweio ka ainakinetake nuka ainapakin, kwape iswamaenenaa kasabaton. Kosodi do elomuni, kedau alomun egolenenoo erute."
Ezekiel46:13 “Itemonokini imerekek yenika ekaru ediopet yenimam eŋwalit araut ainakinet naicweio mama ejai EJAKAIT ŋinipaaran: itemonokini da ŋinitupuruc.
Ezekiel46:14 Itemonokini da ainakinet naka akiria nepepe kaŋes, ŋinitupuruc, idiopet kokanykape yenika epa, ka idiopet kouni yenika ekin loka akinyet ainyalakinia kakiria nuidicic; ainakinet naka akiria natir mama ejai EJAKAIT kanuka aicorakinet namam enaŋi."
Ezekiel46:15 Kwaŋin itemonokinioto imerekek, ka ainakinet naka akiria, ka akinyet, ninitupuruc, araut ainakinet natir naicweio."
Ezekiel46:16 “Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: Arai einakini ekapolon idio kodweke ainakinet, erai airumeteke, eraun da nakodweke; eraas alupokee nukiruma."
Ezekiel46:17 Konye arai einakini nuka airumuke ainakinet mama ejai idio kobulesinike, eraun nake kiton okaru loka aosikinio; kosodi ainyakakinio neejai ekapolon; konye airumeteke eraun naka odweke."
Ezekiel46:18 Bobo da mam ekapolon eyaŋaari airumet naka ituŋa, aireŋear kalupokec; einakini odweke airumet naelemuni kalupoke elopet: kinyeis ikatuŋa aisiarisiarun ŋinituŋanan anyoun kalupoke.”"
Ezekiel46:19 Kosodi ketotor neelomarere, kariri kerute, ketoloma agolai nukalaunak nuka isasedotin, nuesesenete agolitomei: ido koany, kojai aibois agule kari nakoto."
Ezekiel46:20 Katema eoŋ atiar, “Na ŋes aibois naipoenenoto isasedotin ainakinet naka adiakaret ka ainakinet naka aronis, neepeenenoto ainakinet naka akiria; tetere mam itolomarete alaro nakokina, aitalaunia ituŋa.”"
Ezekiel46:21 Kosodi ketolom alaro nakokina ketotor agoria aoŋon nuka alaro; ido koany, kojai alaro toma ŋinigor."
Ezekiel46:22 Kagoria aoŋon nuka alaro, kejaas alaroi nuedisiak nukebwaitai, aoiaukec ikubitin akaisaoŋon, alalaukec da ikubitin akaisauni: ŋun aoŋon nukejaas agoria keraas nuka aitemisioit adiopet."
Ezekiel46:23 Kotomakec, keiai ekokoro loadukitoi airimor kes kere aoŋon, ido kiswamatai kojaas ikiallukipois kwap kikokoron airimor."
Ezekiel46:24 Kosodi katema atiar, “Lu kes itogoi lukipois, lukipoenenata ikejaanakinak luka etogo asubanit kanuka ituŋa.”"
Ezekiel47:1 Kenyaka okek loka etogo; ido koany, koleleut akip alomun kokwap kariri ketogo kari nakokide, naarai koseseni etogo kide; koleleas akip alomun kokwap, kowai lokoteten loka etogo, kari naka eŋalakimak naka etem."
Ezekiel47:2 Kosodi ketolom korot lokorute loka agolitomei, kayaŋa kesirimo orot lokokiŋa kiton orute 10 kokiŋa, korot lokorute loeseseni kide; ido koany koleleete akip kowai lokoteten."
Ezekiel47:3 Koloma etuŋanan kobei kide kitiŋite auno kakanike, kitem ikubitin elukumit, ketotor akipi, akipi nuasaŋito okuurunya."
Ezekiel47:4 Kitem bobo elukumit, ketotor akipi, akipi nuasaŋito akuŋin. Kitem bobo elukumit, ketotor akipi, akipi nuasaŋito aŋabet."
Ezekiel47:5 Kosodi kitem elukumit; korau ecor lomam apedori aitor: naarai amukururas akipi, akipi nukiduis, ecor lomam epedorio aitor."
Ezekiel47:6 Katema eoŋ atiar, “Okoku loka etuŋanan, iany nu?” Kosodi kayau ketoboŋ koitolima loka ecor."
Ezekiel47:7 Kosodi naaboŋoria, koany, kojaas ikito luipu noi koitolima loka ecor epuwai ka epuwai."
Ezekiel47:8 Kosodi katema eoŋ atiar, “Elelearete akip nu owai lokokide, ijesaros toma Araba; elosete aŋolol; aŋololŋes elosete akip nukitolomunio; ido itaŋaleunio akipi."
Ezekiel47:9 Kosodi kanen ejari ŋinibore yenikajaran yenilweki, kaŋiniibois naedolete icorin; idilaros lukecor noi; naarai adolut akip nu, itaŋaleunio akipi nuka aŋolol, ido ejari ŋinibore kere kaneedolenenei ecor kere."
Ezekiel47:10 Kosodi kanen ebwoete ikalokak koitolimake: anyoun ko En-gedi kiton En-egilaim eraun aibois naeakanakinet iboyan; eiaunete lukecor lukipoŋesio luipu noi, kwape lukecor luka Aŋolol Nakapolon,"
Ezekiel47:11 Konye aiboisio nukerit, ka isamake da mam itanaleunio; inyeinio eraas nukabalaŋ."
Ezekiel47:12 Ido koitoliman luka ecor, epuwai ka epuwai, ebwaŋunete ikito lukipoŋesio kere luenyamio, lumam erinyorete akuikee, ido mam araitokee inonooros. Eraenenete araito nukitetiak nolilap, naarai apote akeeekipi kaibois nakalaunan. Eraunete akeeeraito inyamat, akeeekui da eraunete ekia lokitanaleunet.”"
Ezekiel47:13 Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE ebe: “Lo ŋes eraun eikor loitiakiata akwap araun airumet kwape ejaatar atekerin atomon kaarei nuka Isirael. Edumuni Yosep akorakineta aarei.
Ezekiel47:14 Itiakatiakaete ŋes korianas; naarai abu kekeu akakan ainakin lukapapaakus: ibeata yesi da akwap na airum.
Ezekiel47:15 “Lo ŋes eraun eikor loka akwap: kari naka agolitomei ageun kAŋolol Nakapolon, korot loka Ketulon, kiton neelomarere Sedad:"
Ezekiel47:16 Kamat, Berota, Siburaim, loejai kidin keikor loka Damasiko, ka eikor loka Kamat; kiton Kaseratikon, loejai oikor loka Kauran,"
Ezekiel47:17 Eikor da anyoun kaŋolol eraun Kasar-enon koikor loka Damasiko, kari naka agolitomei ejai eikor loka Kamat. Ŋol ŋes ewai loka agolitomei."
Ezekiel47:18 Kowai lokokide da, kidin Kauran ka Damasiko ka Gilead, ka akwap naka Isirael, eraun Yorodan; itemete ageun koikor loka agolitomei kiton aŋolol nakokide. Ŋol ŋes ewai lokokide."
Ezekiel47:19 “Kowai loka eŋalakimak ebei anyoun koTamar aitodol akipi nuka Meribot-kades, kiton aguurut nako Misiri, kiton Aŋolol Nakapolon. Ŋol ŋes ewai lokenalakimak."
Ezekiel47:20 “Kowai lokoto eraun Aŋolol Nakapolon eikor, ageun koikor lokenalakimak kiton neesesenas kaneelomarere Kamat. Ŋol ŋes ewai lokoto."
Ezekiel47:21 “Kwaŋin ikorokoraata akwap na kwape ejaatar atekerin nuka Isirael.
Ezekiel47:22 Kosodi kanen, ikorete keroet araut airumetekus, ka naka imo luibojete kamakus, luewuriete idwe kokidinikus; eraunos kamakus kwape iwurian luka idwe luka Isirael; irumete kesi da nepepe kayes kotoma atekerin nuka Isirael."
Ezekiel47:23 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Kosodi kanen, niniteker naiboieneno imoit, nina ŋes iinakiniata airumeteke."
Ezekiel48:1 “Lu kes ikiroria luka atekerin; ageun koikor loka agolitomei, kariri kerot loka Ketulon kiton neelomarere Kamat, kiton Kasar-enan koikor loka Damasiko, kari naka agolitomei eiduny Kamat; iikorunokec kide ka to; Dan, akorakinet adiopet."
Ezekiel48:2 Koikor loka Dan, ageun kokide kiton to; Aser, akorakinet adiopet."
Ezekiel48:3 Koikor loka Aser, ageun kokide kiton to; Naputali, akorakinet adiopet."
Ezekiel48:4 Koikor loka Naputali, ageun kokide kiton to; Manase, akorakinet adiopet."
Ezekiel48:5 Koikor loka Manase, ageun kokide kiton to; Epuraim, akorakinet adiopet,"
Ezekiel48:6 Koikor loka Epuraim, ageun kokide kiton to; Reuben, akorakinet adiopet,"
Ezekiel48:7 Koikor loka Reuben, ageun kokidekiton to; Yuda, akorakinet adiopet."
Ezekiel48:8 Koikor loka Yuda, ageun kokide kiton to, ejaun ainakinet naiinakinete, alalauke ikubitin ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany, aojauke kwape akorakinet adiopet, ageun kokide kiton to: ejaun da aibois nakalaunan kidinike."
Ezekiel48:9 Aojau naka ainakinet naiinakinete mama ejai EJAKAIT eraun ikubitin ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany, alalauke da ilukumin itomon."
Ezekiel48:10 Ido ainakinet nakalaunan eraun naka nul, kes isasedotin, agolitomei aoiauke ikubitin ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany, to alalauke ilukumin itomon, kide alalauke ilukumin itomon, eŋalakimak da aojauke ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany: ejaun da aibois nakalaunan naka EJAKAIT kidiŋike."
Ezekiel48:11 Eraun naka isasedotin luitalaunitai lukodwe luka Sadok, luarieito akaieorakinet; lumam apotu kopaasi naapaariata idwe luka Isirael, kwape apaariata Ilebin,"
Ezekiel48:12 Eraun kamakec ainakinet naelemunio kainakinet naka akwap, aibois nakalaunan noi, koikor loka Ilebin."
Ezekiel48:13 Edumunete Ilebin eiduny keikor loka isasedotin ikubitin ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany kaojau, ka ilukumin itomon kalalau. Aojau kere ikubitin ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany, ka alalauke da ilukumin akaisaarei."
Ezekiel48:14 Ido mam egwelanarete, karaida aisiceanar adiokalup kaŋun, karaida araito nugeet nuka akwap mam eraunos nuka ice: naarai eraas nukalaunak mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Ezekiel48:15 “Ikubitin ilukumin ikany luideuna kalalau, ka akaisaarei ka lukany kaoiau, eraunos luebeete ituŋa kere, luka ere, aiboienenoo ka araut ironyia. Ejaun ere kidinike;"
Ezekiel48:16 nu kes aitemisioke; kowai loka agolitomei ikubitin ilukumin iwonon ka akwat akany, kowai loka eŋalakimak ilukumin iwonon ka akwat akany, kowai lokokide ilukumin iwonon ka akwat akany, kowai da loko to ilukumin iwonon ka akwat akany."
Ezekiel48:17 Eiaunete ere ironyia; kari naka agolitomei ikubitin akwat aarei ka akaisakany, kari naka eŋalakimak akwat aarei ka akaisakany, kari nakokide akwat aarei ka akaisakany, kari nakoto da akwat aarei ka akaisakany."
Ezekiel48:18 Luideuna kaoiau kowai loka ainakinet nakalaunan ikubitin ilukumin itomon kide, ka ilukumin itomon to; idunyasi kainakinet nakalaunan. Amioke da eraunos inyamat luka nul luiswamaete kore."
Ezekiel48:19 Ŋul da luiswamaete kore, luka atekerin kere nuka Isirael ekorienenete."
Ezekiel48:20 Ainakinet kere eraun aojau ikubitin ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany, alalau da ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany: iinakinete ainakinet nakalaunan korianas kowaitin iwonon, nepepe kalup nuka ere."
Ezekiel48:21 “Atutubet naideuna eraun naka ekapolon, eiduny kainakinet nakalaunan, ka alup nuka ere, epuwai ka epuwai, kosiep loka ikubitin ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany luka ainakinet atereikin eikor lokokide, kosiep loka ikubitin ilukumin akaisaarei ka lukany atereikin eikor lokoto, atereikina akorakineta, eraun naka ekapolon. Ainakinet nakalaunan, ka aibois nakalaunan naka etogo eiaunete kidiŋike;"
Ezekiel48:22 bobo da ageun kalup nuka Ilebin, ka alup nuka ere, nuejaas kidiŋ katutubet naka ekapolon, kidiŋ oikor loka Yuda, ka eikor loka Benyamin, eraunete nuka ekapolon."
Ezekiel48:23 “Nuka atekerin nuideuna: ageun kokide kiton to; Benyamin, akorakinet adiopet."
Ezekiel48:24 Koikor loka Benyamin ageun kokide kiton to; Simeon, akorakinet adiopet."
Ezekiel48:25 Koikor loka Simeon, ageun kokide kiton to; Isakar, akorakinet adiopet."
Ezekiel48:26 Koikor loka Isakar, ageun kokide kiton to; Sebulun, akorakinet adiopet."
Ezekiel48:27 Koikor loka Sebulun, ageun kokide kiton to; Gad, akorakinet adiopet."
Ezekiel48:28 Koikor loka Gad, kari naka eŋalakimak, ejaun eikor ageun koTamar kiton akipi nuka Meribat-kades, kiton aguurut nako Misiri, kiton Aŋolol Nakapolon."
Ezekiel48:29 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, Ŋin ŋes akwap naikorokoroete keroet atekerin nuka Isirael araun airumet; nun da kes akorakinetakee."
Ezekiel48:30 “Nu kes alomanareta nuka ere; kari naka agolitomei ikubitin ilukumin iwonon, ka akwat akany kaitemisioit:"
Ezekiel48:31 emaikinio irutei luka ere ikiroria luka atekerin nuka Isirael; irutei iuni kari naka agolitomei; erute loka Reuben, ka erute loka Yuda, ka erute loka Lebi."
Ezekiel48:32 Kari nakokide ikubitin ilukumin iwonon, ka akwat akany; ka irutei iuni; erute loka Yosep; ka erute loka Benyamin; ka erute loka Dan."
Ezekiel48:33 Kari naka eŋalakimak, ikubitin ilukumin iwonon, ka akwat akany; ka irutei iuni; erute loka Simeon; ka erute loka Isakar; ka erute loka Sebulun."
Ezekiel48:34 Kari nakoto ikubitin ilukumin iwoŋon, ka akwat akany; ka iruteikec iuni; erute loka Gad; ka erute loka Aser; ka erute loka Naputali."
Ezekiel48:35 Airimor ere ikubitin ilukumin itomon ka akanykauni. Ido ageun kapaaran kaŋin eraun ekiror loka ere, Ejai EJAKAIT nen.”"
Daniel1:1 Kokaru lokiwuniet loka airumit naka Yekoiakim ekabaka loka Yuda, abu Nebukadenesar ekabaka loko Babulon kobu Yerusalem, kirigau."
Daniel1:2 Abu EJAKAIT kijaik Yekoiakim ekabaka loka Yuda akanike, kice koboro luka etogo loka Edeke; koyaŋa kes akwap naka Sinar togo loka ekedeke: kibwaik iboro aiŋadis togo loka ekedeke."
Daniel1:3 Abu ekabaka kolimok Asupenas ekapolokiton ibwacinake aitolomikin ice kodwe luka Isirael, luka aur naka ekabaka ka naka ikapolok da;"
Daniel1:4 ikatumunak lumam eŋwalito, konye luejokuka akonyen, lueberiaŋ kacoa kere, luepiriaka kaijen, luedesiarete nuituutoorio, ka luibus da aibwo kotoma togo loka ekabaka; ido kisisianak kes acoa naka Ikaludean ka aŋajepekec da,"
Daniel1:5 Kicorak ekabaka adutanakin kes ŋinipaaran inyamat luka ekabaka ka ebino loemasenenei, ido kitanai kes ikar iuni; naedaunoror tetere kes ebwoete kakonyen nuka ekabaka."
Daniel1:6 Kotoma kaŋul ajaas kodwe luka Yuda, Daniel, Kanania, Misael ka Asaria,"
Daniel1:7 Abu ekapolon loka ibwacin komaanak kes ikiroria: komaik Daniel Beletesasar; komaik Kanania Sadurak; komaik Misael Mesak; komaik da Asaria Abed-nego.
Daniel1:8 Konye kopeleik Daniel kotauke kinyek amunaun kinyamat luka ekabaka, karaida kebino loemasenenei: kanuka ŋun kilip ekapolon loka ibwaein kinyek ŋesi amunaun."
Daniel1:9 Abu Edeke koinak Daniel aminunio ka aitimio kakonyen nuka ekapolon loka ibwaein,"
Daniel1:10 Kotema ekapolon loka ibwacin Daniel atiar, “Ayoŋit eoŋ ejakaitika ekabaka, loabu kicorak luinyamenenete ka luimasenenete: kinyek aanyun akusikonyen mam ejokuka kwape nuka ikatumunak luka aturikus; kwaŋin iyaunete aronis akouka kama ejai ekabaka,”"
Daniel1:11 Kosodi Daniel atemar eketeon, loabu ekapolon loka ibwacin koinak ayait Daniel, ka Kanania, ka Misael, ka Asaria ebe:"
Daniel1:12 “Keŋaiŋait, kitem ber ikonibulesin apaarasia atomon; koinanakinete sio idiasio ainyam, ka akipi da aimat,"
Daniel1:13 Kosodete konyet airer akonyenekosi kakonyenekon, ka akonyen da nuka ikatumunak luenyamenenete inyamat luka ekabaka; ido kwape ianyunia ijo, kikwaik nen ikonibulesin,”"
Daniel1:14 Kopup ŋesi kes kakirot kaŋin, kitem kes apaarasia atomon."
Daniel1:15 Kosodi ketuboros apaarasia atomon, kotakanut akonyenekee ejok, ido kibukeikinito awatekee, aitelekarit ikatumunak kere luanyamenenete inyamat luka ekabaka,"
Daniel1:16 Kosodi do eketeon alemar inyamatakee, ka ebino lotikemasenenete, koinanak kes idiasio."
Daniel1:17 Konye abu Edeke koinak ikatumunak ŋul iwoŋon aijen ka apirianut kotoma aisisia kere ka acoa; abu Daniel korau lokacobeu kotoma aitapoeta ka airujasia da,"
Daniel1:18 Kosodete kedaunos apaarasia nuabu ekabaka kicorak aitolomunia, kitolom ekapolon loka ibwacin kes akonyen nuka Nebukadenesar,"
Daniel1:19 Kiyala ekabaka kakes; ido kotomakec kere mam apotu kotakanut lueputos bala Daniel ka Kanania, ka Misael, ka Asaria: kobwaata do kesi kakonyen nuka ekabaka,"
Daniel1:20 Ido kaŋinikirot kere naka acoa ka aijen, nakiŋisenenei kes ekabaka, koany kes ejok irwan atomon adepar imurwok ka ikasupok luajaas ajakanutuke kere."
Daniel1:21 Abu Daniel kojau aitodol okaru losodit loka ekabaka Kuro.
Daniel2:1 Kokaru lokiareit loka airumit naka Nebukadenesar kiruja ŋesi airujasia; kiyaloŋoŋ kotauke, kikoleroto akekonyen,"
Daniel2:2 Kosodi ekabaka aicorakin anyaraun imurwok, ka ikasupok, ka ikaroak, ka Ikaludean alimokin ekabaka airujasiake, Kolomasi do kobwaata kakonyen nuka ekabaka."
Daniel2:3 Kotema eka baka kes atiar, “Erujat eoŋ airujasit, kiyaloŋoŋ da ekatau ajenun airujasit.”"
Daniel2:4 Kosodete Ikaludean atemar ekabaka kaIJajep naka. Asurian ebe, “Wu ekabaka, kobusi ikar kere: kolimok ikonikejaanakinak airujasit, ka sio da kitoduuni apolouke.”"
Daniel2:5 Koboŋok ekabaka kotema Ikaludean atiar, “Alom akirot kamaka: arai mam yes itejenunete eoŋ airujasit ka apolouke da, kijepejepeo yes, ikusitogoi da eraunos amejei."
Daniel2:6 Konye do arai kitodutu airujasit ka apolouke, idumunete ainakineta ka iropito ka aibuses naepol da; asa kitodikinai eoŋ airujasit ka apolouke da.”"
Daniel2:7 Kirucakis aboŋokin ebe, “Kolimok do eka baka ikekejaanakinak airujasit, kasodete isio aitodiar apolouke.”"
Daniel2:8 Koboŋok ekabaka ebe, “Ajeni eut ebe ikotosi yesi aitumor naarai ianyut ebe alom akirot kamakaŋ."
Daniel2:9 Konye arai mam kitejenikinete eoŋ airujasit, ejai ekisil ediopet kanukus: naarai ipotu kitemokis akiro nukaisab ka nukaronok einer kakonyeneka, aitodol nailoeokinotor apakio: asa do kolimokinai eoŋ airujasit, kasodi eoŋ ajenun ebe ipedorete aitodiar apolouke.”"
Daniel2:10 Kobonokis Ikaludean kakonyen nuka eka baka ebe, “Emamei da ituŋanan kakwap yenepedori aitodiar akirot naka ekabaka: naarai emamei ekabaka loepol ido lokapedor lolem inisit emurwon, arai ekasupon, arai Ekaludeat akirot naikoni nen."
Daniel2:11 Epagal akirot naitinaikinit ekabaka, kwabo emamei yenepedori aitodikin ekabaka, dimikito idekesio lumam iboiete kaluejaas awat.”"
Daniel2:12 Kanuka ŋun kodedeniar ekabaka konyunyurikin noi, kicorak amudiar lukacoa kere luko Babulon."
Daniel2:13 Aso kolimoroi ekisil loka aiar lukacoa; aponi komoai Daniel ka lukaupake da aiar.
Daniel2:14 Kosodi Daniel aboŋokin kacoa kaiyapepera Ariok ekapolon loka ikedarak luka ekabaka, loalomarit aiar lukacoa luko Babulon;"
Daniel2:15 Koboŋok kotema Ariok ekapolon loka eka baka ebe, “Kanukinyo kisuburikinia ekisil loebunit kama ejai ekabaka?” Kosodi Ariok aitejenun Daniel akirot."
Daniel2:16 Koloma Daniel, kilip ekabaka aseikin ŋes apak, tetere itodikini ekabaka apolou."
Daniel2:17 Kosodi Daniel alosit togoke, kitejenik ikepaup Kanania, ka Misael, ka Asaria akirot."
Daniel2:18 Tetere ilipete aitim naka Edeke loka akuj kanuka aiyeiyea kaŋin; kinyeis Daniel ka ikepaup amudiario nepepe ka lukacoa ice luko Babulon.
Daniel2:19 Kosodi kopukokinai Daniel aiyeiyea kaitapoet naka akuar. Kosodi Daniel aimal Edeke loka akui.
Daniel2:20 Koboŋok Daniel, kotema atiar, “Kituritete ekiror loka Edeke ikar ka ikar: Naarai acoa ka apedor eraas nuke."
Daniel2:21 Ŋes da iloci apakio ka ikar: Elemari ŋesi ikabakan, edakakini da ikabakan: Einakini lukacoa acoa, Aijen da mama ejaas lueberian ajenun;"
Daniel2:22 Epukori ŋesi akiro nuidulok ka nukaiyeiyea: Ejeŋi ŋesi nuejaas toma amuton, Iboie aica kaŋes."
Daniel2:23 Emalai jo, eturit jo, wu jo Edeke loka lukapapaaka, Lokiinak eoŋ acoa ka apedor, Kwana da kitejenik eoŋ nukipou kelipito jo: Naarai kitejenik sio akirot naka ekabaka.”"
Daniel2:24 Aso koloma Daniel mama ejai Ariok, loabu ekabaka koseu amudiar lukacoa luko Babulon: abu kolot kotema ŋes kwanata atiar, “Sirikimudia lukacoa luko Babulon: kitolomarai eoŋ mama ejai eka baka, eoŋ da etodikini ekabaka apolou.”"
Daniel2:25 Kosodi kisunya Ariok aitolomar Daniel mama ejai ekabaka, kotema ŋes kwanata ebe, “Adum eoŋ etuŋanan lokodwe Iuejoreunitai luka Yuda, itejenikini ŋesi ekabaka apolou.”"
Daniel2:26 Koboŋok ekabaka kotema Daniel, ekekiror Beletesasar, atiar, “Ipedori tope ijo aitejenikin eoŋ airujasit naabu kaany, ka apolouke da?”"
Daniel2:27 Koboŋok Daniel kakonyen nuka ekabaka ebe, “Mam epedorete lukacoa, ka ikasupok, ka imurwok, karaida ikadwarak aitodikin ekabaka nukaiyeiyea nuabu ekabaka kicorak:"
Daniel2:28 konye ejai Edeke toma akuj, loepukori nukaiyeiyea, ido kitejenik ŋesi ekabaka Nebukadenesar nuejaunete kapaarasia nukoinaren, Akoniirujasit, ka aitapoeta nuka akoukon kaperitikon, kes nuta:"
Daniel2:29 Wu ekabaka, apotu aomisio kopotu mama ijai ijo kaperitikon, nuka nuekotosi ajakut; ŋol da loepukori nukaiyeiyea kitejenik ijo nuekotosi ajakut."
Daniel2:30 Konye mam kapukokinitai eoŋ aiyeiyea na kanuka adiocoa nakijaar eoŋ adepar yenikajaran kere, konye tetere itejenikinio ekabaka apolouke, ido tetere ijenuni aomisio nukotaukon,"
Daniel2:31 “Wu ekabaka, ibu kosesen, ido koany, aput nakos. Abu aput nin nakapedor, naimwekimwek aitelekar, kobwo kakonyenekon; eiponeke da loketasuro."
Daniel2:32 Aput ŋin korai akouke nakesabu loejok, aketorobu da ka akaninike nukepuesa, akekoik ka amurwosike nukaisinit,"
Daniel2:33 akejeke nukasua, ka aicaketake da atutubet nakasuat ka atutubet nakelupe,"
Daniel2:34 Ibu kosesen aitodol neatiakar amoru, komam akan etirorit, kocam aput aicaketake nukasua ka elupe, kobilibil kes,"
Daniel2:35 Kobilibilunos da asuat, ka elupe, ka aisinit, ka epuesa, ka esabu da, koluoros kwape agugu nukopejal kamu; kokutar ekwam pit, komam kes edumunitos aibois: koluor amoru naabu kocam aput eronat lokos, kilelebun akwap kere."
Daniel2:36 “Ŋin ŋes airujasit; kilimori kwana do apolouke kakonyen nuka ekabaka.
Daniel2:37 Ŋo, wu ekabaka, irai ekabaka loka ikabakan, loabu Edeke loka akui koinak ajakanut, ka apedor, ka agogoŋ, ka aibuses."
Daniel2:38 Kama iboioto da idwe luka ituŋa kere, abu kokorak akanikon itian luka ais ka ikweny luka akui, koinak ijo ayait kes kere: irai ijo akou naka esabu."
Daniel2:39 Akaulokon kitupakin acejakanut namam eriakas kajo; ka ajakanut ace nakiwuniet naka aisinit naeyai rwaru akwap kere.
Daniel2:40 Egogoŋ ajakanut nakiwononet kwape kasuat: naarai ebilibilei asuat iboro kere, idecideci da: ido kwape kipicipicia asuat nul kere, ebilibilei ipicipici ŋin da."
Daniel2:41 Ido kwape kianyunia aicaketa ka ibokoro, atutubet naka elupe loka ekajean, atutubet da naka asuat, eraun ajakanut naetiakak; konye ejaun kotomake agogoŋ naka asuat, naarai ibu koany asuat inyalakina elupe lokenyadu."
Daniel2:42 Ido kwape keraatar ibokor luka akejen atutubet nakasuat, atutubet da nakelupe, ikwaikin nen ajakanut, atutubet naegogon, ka atutubet da naebilil."
Daniel2:43 Ido kwape kianyunia asuat inyalakina kelupe lokenyadu, inyalakin kwape kwaŋin aur naka ituŋa; konye mam imorianakinos, kwape mam inyalakinotor asuat kelupe."
Daniel2:44 Ido kapaarasia nuka ikabakan nul edakakini Edeke loka akui ajakanut namam emudiario ikar kere, karaida airumuke ajalakinio ituŋa ice; konye ebilibilei emudiari da ajakanuto nun kere, ido kojaenena ikar kere."
Daniel2:45 Ido naarai ibu koany amoru etiakun koronat komam akan etirorit, kobilibil asuat, ka aisinit, ka elupe, ka epuesa, ka esabu da; etejenu Edeke lokapolon ekabaka nuekotosi ajakut: erai airujasit nakabeit, etogogoŋi da apolouke.”"
Daniel2:46 Kosodi ekabaka Nebukadenesar aibiror ebuburia, koma Daniel, kicorak ainakin asubanit ka lueur maa."
Daniel2:47 Koboŋok ekabaka kotema Daniel atiar, “Abeit Ekonideke ŋes erai Edeke loka idekesio, ka EJAKAIT loka ikabakan, ka ekapukoron nukaiyeiyea, naarai ipedo ijo apukor aiyeiyea nin.”"
Daniel2:48 Kitopoloo do ekabaka Daniel, koinak ŋes ainakineta nuipu nuepolok, koinak ŋes ayait ebuku kere loko Babulon, kitarau da ŋes ekayaiton lokapolon loka lukacoa kere luko Babulon."
Daniel2:49 Kilip Daniel ekabaka, kitopol ŋesi Sadurak, ka Mesak, ka Abed-nego kotoma akiro nuka ebuku loko Babulon: konye kojaenena Daniel orute loka ekabaka."
Daniel3:1 Abu ekabaka Nebukadenesar kosub aput naka esabu, aoiauke ikubitin akaisakanykape, alalauke da ikubitin ikanykape: kosipok apuuton naka Dura, obuku loko Babulon."
Daniel3:2 Kosodi ekabaka Nebukadenesar aijukar atukonokin lukibukui, ka luketeok, ka lukitemwan, ikerabak, ka ikeŋadak, ikenerunak, ka iricakisila, ka ijaka kere lukobukui, aponare toma asuban nuka aitan aput naabu ekabaka Nebukadenesar kosipokinite,"
Daniel3:3 Kosodete lukibukui, ka luketeok, lukitemwan, ka ikerabak, ka ikeŋadak, ka ikenerunak ka iricakisila ka ijaka kere lukobukui, kotukonokinos kanuka asuban nuka aput naabu eka baka Nebukadenesar kosipokinite; kobwaata kesi kakonyen nuka aput, naasipokinit ekabaka Nebukadenesar."
Daniel3:4 Kosodi lokalimoron aiworoor kuju ebe, “Kicorakinitai yes ituŋa, ka atekerin ka aŋajepa,"
Daniel3:5 naipupunioto aruo naka arupepe, ka alamaru, ka adeudeu, ka aiosi, ka etida, ka esos, ka nolipone kere loeruo, kosodete aisuded kere aima aput naka esabu naabu ekabaka Nebukadenesar kosipokinite:"
Daniel3:6 ido yenimam isudedei aima apak nipenin, ecakakinio kidin oupa loesarani noi.”"
Daniel3:7 Aso kapak kaŋin kepuput ituŋa kere aruo naka arupepe, ka alamaru, ka adeudeu, ka ajosi, ka etida, ka ŋolipone kere loeruo, kosodete ituŋa kere, atekerin, ka aŋajepa, aisuded aima aput naka esabu naabu ekabaka Nebukadenesar kosipokinite."
Daniel3:8 Kosodi kapak kaŋin kikunyakis Ikaludean ice aideide Iyudayan.
Daniel3:9 Kobonokis kotemasi ekabaka Nebukadenesar atiar, “Wu ekabaka Nebukadenesar, kobusi ikar kere,"
Daniel3:10 Ŋo, wu ekabaka, ibu kibwaik ekisil ebe, ŋin yeniirari aruo naka arupepe, ka alamaru, ka adeudeu, ka aiosi ka etida, ka esos, ka ŋolipone kere loeruo, kisudedei komai aput naka esabu:"
Daniel3:11 ido nin yenimam isudedei ka aima ecakakinio kidin oupa loesarani noi.
Daniel3:12 Ejaas Iyudayan ice luibu ijo kitopoloo kotoma akiro nuka ebuku loko Babulon, Sadurak, ka Mesak, ka Abed-nego; ituŋa ŋul, wu ekabaka, mam kipodosi jo; mam ijaanakinete idekesiokon, karaida aima aput naka esabu naibu kosipok.”"
Daniel3:13 Kosodi konyet Nebukadenesar anyunyurikin koresiar kicorak ayaun Sadurak, ka Mesak, ka Abed-nego. Koyaunai ituŋa nul akonyen nuka ekabaka,"
Daniel3:14 Koboŋok Nebukadenesar kotema kes atiar, “Yes, Sadurak, ka Mesak, ka Abed-nego, ipeleikinito kereka yesi apele aigir aijaanakin ekadeke, aima da aput naka esabu naabu eoŋ kasipok?"
Daniel3:15 Aso natikwana arai itemonokino kipuput aruo naka arupepe, ka alamaru, ka adeudeu, ka ajosi, ka etida, ka esos, ka ŋolipone kere loeruo, kisudedeoto aima aput naabu kasub, aso; konye arai mam imaete, kicakakinio toma oupa loesarani noi; ido iŋai bo Edeke nol Iokiyuuni yes kakaninika?”"
Daniel3:16 Kobonokis Sadurak, ka Mesak, ka Abed-nego, kotemasi ekabaka atiar, “Wu Nebukadenesar, mam sio ibusakinit aboŋokin jo kotoma akirot kaŋin,"
Daniel3:17 Arai kikwaik nen, epedori Edekekosi lokijaanakini ayuun sio kotoma oupa loesarani noi, kiyuuni da kakanikon, wu ekabaka."
Daniel3:18 Konye arai mere kwaŋin, kojen, wu ekabaka, kwape mam sio kijaanakinia idekesiokon karaida aima aput naka esabu naibu kosipok.”"
Daniel3:19 Kanen, konyunyurikin eut Nebukadenesar, kitegelikin epone loka akonyeneke mama ejaas Sadurak, ka Mesak, ka Abed-nego, kiner, kicorak aitasaran eupa aatenak akanykaarei adepar nelem esarania."
Daniel3:20 Kicorak ikagogoŋok ice kanul luajaas ajoreke ajen Sadurak, ka Mesak, ka Abednego: ka acakakin da toma oupa loesarani noi."
Daniel3:21 Aponi koenai ituŋa nul konapitos ipaleikee, ka ikootinikee, ka ilounakec, ka inapenekee ice, kocakakis kidin oupa loesarani nol."
Daniel3:22 Kanuka nun naarai abu ekabaka kicorakinite eut kosaranunite eupa noi, apotu aipelonoreta nuka akim koarata ituŋa kwi luetiŋito Sadurak, ka Mesak, ka Abed-nego."
Daniel3:23 Kodooto ituŋa nul luuni, Sadurak, ka Mesak, ka Abed-nego, eenen kidin oupa loesarani noi."
Daniel3:24 Kosodi ekabaka Nebukadenesar aumokin, kodetun; kiner kotema ikekenerunak atiar, “Mam nat oni kicakakinit ituŋa iuni eenen kidiŋ akim?” Kobonokis kotemasi ekabaka atiar, “Abeit, wu ekabaka.”"
Daniel3:25 Koboŋok kotema atiar, “Koany, aseseni eoŋ ituŋa iwonon elaeara, elosete kokidin akim, kwabo emamei kes aronis; as ima naka Iokiwononet esubit bala okoku loka idekesio.”"
Daniel3:26 Kosodi kikunyak Nebukadenesar okek loka eupa loesarani noi; kotema atiar, “Sadurak, ka Mesak, ka Abed-nego, yes ibulesin luka Edeke Loejai kuju kakui, kolomutu, kopotu nee,” Kosodete Sadurak ka Mesak ka Abed-nego alomun kokidin akim,"
Daniel3:27 Kotukokinos lukibukui ka luketeok, ka lukitemwan, ka ikenerunak luka ekabaka, aanyun ituŋa nul, lumam akim apedorit awatekec, karaida itima luka akwesikee mam asisiito, karaida ikeeenapen mam ilocokino, karaida aures naka akim mam ajaas kakes."
Daniel3:28 Kotema Nebukadenesar atiar, “Kituritete Edeke loka Sadurak, ka Mesak, ka Abed-nego, loejukuni ekemalaika, kitaiar ikebulesin luapotu komunokinos ŋes, kilocoto da akirot naka ekabaka, kijaikis awatekec kinyeis aijaanakin karaida aima edeke kere nabarai Edekekee bon."
Daniel3:29 Ŋes esilakinia ekisil ebe, ŋulutuŋa, ka ateker, ka aŋajep, luinerenenas aronis kere mama ejai Edeke loka Sadurak, kaMesak ka Abed-nego, eiepeiepeo, itogoikec da ituluorio amejei: naarai emamei edeke ece loepedori aitajar kopone kanol.”"
Daniel3:30 Kosodi ekabaka aitopoloor Sadurak, ka Mesak ka Abed-nego, kobuku loko Babulon."
Daniel4:1 Nebukadenesar ekabaka, mama ejaas ituŋa, ka atekerin, ka aŋajepa kere luibojete kakwap kere; kiyatanakin ainapakin mama iiaas."
Daniel4:2 Etojok aitodiar aanyuneta ka nukaumokin nuabu Edeke Loejai kuju kakuj keswamak eoŋ,"
Daniel4:3 Epolok ca ma aanyunetake! Egogoŋ da nukaumokinike! Akejakanut ŋes ajakanut namam enaŋi, Airumiteke da ageun katurio kiton aturio."
Daniel4:4 Ajai eoŋ, Nebukadenesar, kaijamam kotogoka, egananai da kotogoka lokapolou."
Daniel4:5 Abu kaany airujasit naketukuriani; kesiyalonoŋoro aomisio kaperitika ka aitapoeta da nuka akouka.
Daniel4:6 Ŋes esilakinia ekisil lukacoa kere luko Pabulon ayaunio mamaka, tetere ketejenikinete eoŋ apolou naka airujasit."
Daniel4:7 Kosodete imurwok, ka ikasupok, ka Ikaludean, ka ikadwarak alomun: kalimok kes airujasit; konye mam apotu ketejenikis eoŋ apolouke."
Daniel4:8 Konye kokau kolom Daniel mamaka, ekekiror Beletesasar, kwape ejaar ekiror loka ekadeke, ejai kotomake emoyo loka idekesio lukalaunak; kalimok ŋes airujasit ebe,"
Daniel4:9 “Wu Beletesasar, ekapolon loka imurwok, naarai ajeni ebe ejai emoyo loka idekesio lukalaunak kotomakon, ido emamei nakaiyeiyea nakisiyalononoi jo, kolimokinai aitapoeta nuka airuiasitika naabu kaany, ka apolouke da."
Daniel4:10 Aitapoeta nuka akouka kaperitika kes nuta: abu kaany, ido koany, ekitoi kokidin kakwap, epol da aoiauke."
Daniel4:11 Kopoloor ekitoi, kogogonor, kodol aidike toma akuj, kotakanu da kosane loka akwap kere,"
Daniel4:12 Koiokuka akuike, kipu da araitoke, kojaas kotomake inyamat luedaunito kere: kojaas itian luka ais otolimike, kibojete akweny nuka akuj katenunake, konyamenenete kere luejaas awat,"
Daniel4:13 Abu kaany kaitapoeta nuka akouka kaperitika, ido koany, kodoku ekedaran, ekalaunan, kokuiu,"
Daniel4:14 Kikeseu ŋesi ekeporoto kobala kwanata ebe, ‘Kojep ekitoi, Kojep da aketenun, kilakilaka akuike, kisiarisiar araitoke; konyoutu itian kokwapuke, ka akweny da katenunake."
Daniel4:15 Konye do kinyek ekomio loka aliasike kalup, koenite kasuat ka aisinit kotoma anya nuka ais; kitapapal kakopyo nuka akuj, komora kitiaŋ ainyam inya luka akwap."
Daniel4:16 Kilocokinoi etauke loka etuŋanan, koinakinai ŋes etau loka etiaŋ: kotuboros apakio akanykaarei mamakeŋ."
Daniel4:17 Erai akirot kokisil loka ikedarak, aicorakinet da kakirot naka ikalaunak: tetere ejenunete lukajarak ebe irumit ŋol loejai kuju kakuj ajakanut naka ituŋa, einakini nin yenekoto, edakakini yenitasono kotuna.’"
Daniel4:18 Abu eoŋ, ekabaka Nebukadenesar, kaany airujasit ŋin: ka jo da, wu Beletesasar, kolim apolouke, naarai mam epedorete lukacoa kere luka ajakanutuka aitejenikin eoŋ apolouke; konye ipedori ijo, naarai ejai emoyo loka idekesio lukalaunak kotomakon.”"
Daniel4:19 Kosodi Daniel, ekekiror Beletesasar, aumokin nediokasilon, kisiyalononoto ŋes akeomisio. Koboŋok ekabaka ebe, “Beletesasar, kinye airujasit, karaida apolouke, aisiyaloŋoŋ jo.” Koboŋok Beletesasar ebe, “Ekaiakait, korai airujasit naka nul kalukilaito jo, apolouke da naka lukasurupokon."
Daniel4:20 Ekitoi loibu ijo koany, loapoloor, Ioagogon, loadolit aidike toma akuj, loatakani mama ejaas kere luka akwap;"
Daniel4:21 loajokuka akuike, loapol araitoke, loajaas kotomake inyamat luedaunito kere; loeboiete itian luka ais kokwapuke, loeboiete akweny nuka akuj katenunake:"
Daniel4:22 ŋes ijo, wu ekabaka, loipoloor, loigogon: naarai apoloor apoloukon, adol toma akuj, airumitekon da kiton osaŋe loka akwap,"
Daniel4:23 Ido kwape keanyunia ekabaka ekedaran, ekalaunan edokuni kokuju ebala ebe, ‘Kojep ekitoi, komudia ŋes; konye kinyek ekomio loka aliasike kalup, koenite kasuat ka aisinit, kotoma anya nuka ais; kopalal kakopyo nuka akuj, komora kitian luka ais, aitodol neatuborotor apakio akanykaarei mamakeŋ:"
Daniel4:24 Na ŋes apolouke, wu ekabaka, erai ekisil loka ŋol loejai kuju kakuj, loabunok ekajakait ekabaka:"
Daniel4:25 ebe, kireŋeario jo anyoun kotuna, ibojenenete ijo kitian luka ais, inyami anya kwape imoŋin, ipalalar kakopyo nuka akuj, etuboros apakio akanykaarei kamakon; aitodol naijenunia ijo ebe irumit ŋol loejai kuju kakuj ajakanut naka iruna, einakini da nin yenekoto ŋesi."
Daniel4:26 Ido naarai ecorakin ainyein ekomio loka alias nuka ekitoi; icasi akonijakanut kamakon, kidau ajenun ebe eyait Akui,"
Daniel4:27 Aso do, wu ekabaka, kocam ainerunika, kosac akonironisio kanuka aswam adolit, numam adolitekon da kaitim lukican; motoko ejaun aitooiaar aiiamamakon.”"
Daniel4:28 Apotu nun kere kodoikis ekabaka Nebukadenesar,"
Daniel4:29 Ketuboros ilapio itomon ka luarei, kojai ŋesi irimi kotogo lokekabakane ko Babulon."
Daniel4:30 Kiner ekabaka, kobala ebe, “Mere kereka lo Babulon lokapolon loabu kaduk araun aibois nakekabakane, kanuka agogoŋ naka apedorika, ka aibuses da naka apolouka?”"
Daniel4:31 Eriŋa akirot ejai aituk naka ekabaka, kodou eporoto ebuni kokuiu ebe, “Wu ekabaka Nebukadenesar, inerai mamakon: anyou ajakanut kamakon,"
Daniel4:32 Kirenear kotuna, ibojenenete ijo kitian luka ais; inyami anya kwape imoŋin, etuboros apakio akanykaarei kamakon; aitodol naijenunia ijo ebe irumit ŋol loejai kuiu kaku; ajakanut naka ituŋa, einakini da ŋin yenekoto ŋesi.”"
Daniel4:33 Kosawa kanol kitodolikinitai akirot mama ejai Nebukadenesar, aponi kirenearai kotuna, konyam anya kwape imoŋin, kopalal akekuan kakopyo nuka akuj, aitodol naepoloorotor iketima kwape aiulo nuka imorukaalen, akebelekeka da kwape kabelekeka nuka akweny."
Daniel4:34 Ketuboros apaarasia, abu eoŋ Nebukadenesar keteluo akakonye akui, kobonu aijeneka mamaka, kemal ŋol loejai kuju kakuj, keturite ŋes, ketopoloo da ŋol loebusi ikar kere: Naarai airumiteke ŋes airum namam enaŋi, Akejakanut da ageun katurio kiton aturio."
Daniel4:35 Luibojete kakwap da kere mam imarakinitai araut ibore: Iswamai ŋesi kwape ekotor kajore naka akuj, Ido mama ejaas luibojete kakwap: Emamei da yenepedori aitikokin akekan, Karaida atemar ŋes atiar, “Anyoika bo nuiswamai?”"
Daniel4:36 Kapak kaŋin da koboŋ aijeneka mamaka; ido kanuka aibuses naka ajakanutuka, koboŋ akapolou ka akamwekimwek da; komoata ikakenerunak ka ijakaka neajai; keticasi kajakanutuka, kiyatakinai mamaka apolou naedeparit."
Daniel4:37 Kwana do eoŋ Nebukadenesar eturit, etopoloorit, etubusikinit da Ekabaka loka akuj; naarai eraas akeswamisio kere abeit, ikerotin da etube; nul da luelosete kaiturokina epedori ŋesi aitisil."
Daniel5:1 Kipoik ekabaka Belesasar elukumit loka ijakake epucit, komat ebino kakonyen nuka elukumit ŋol."
Daniel5:2 Kiir ŋesi ebino, kicorak Belesasar ayaun iboro luka esabu ka luka epuesa luabu Nebukadenesar papake konat koyekalu loajai Yerusalem; tetere emasi ekabaka ka ijakake, ka akenor ka akebusian da kotomakec."
Daniel5:3 Aponi koyaunai iboro luka esabu luaponi konatarai koyekalu loka etogo loka Edeke loajai Yerusalem; komasia ekabaka ka ijakake, ka akenor ka akebusian da."
Daniel5:4 Komasete ebino, kituritos idekesio luka esabu, ka luka epuesa, ka luka aisinin, ka luka asua, ka luka akito, ka luka amor da."
Daniel5:5 Kosawa kanol kotakanut ibokor luka akan naka etuŋanan, kiwadik kinaren kepir loka atala, karwatat naeladatai naka etogo lokapolou loka ekabaka: koany ekabaka atutubet naka akan naewadikai."
Daniel5:6 Kosodi kijulakinos akonyen nuka ekabaka, kisiyalononoto ŋes akeomisio; komaranata akojo nuka itulinike, koretonokinos akekunin,"
Daniel5:7 Kiworo ekabaka aitolomun ikasupok, Ikaludean, ka ikadwarak. Kotema ekabaka lukacoa luko Babulon atiar, “ŋin yenepedori asoman nuiwadikatai nu, ka aitodikin da eoŋ apoloukec, kitanapai lomuge, erikot da loka esabu omurisiŋike, eraun ekayaiton lokiwuniet loka ajakanut,”"
Daniel5:8 Kolomutu do lukacoa kere luka ekabaka: konye mam apedorete asoman nuiwadikatai, karaida aitejenikin ekabaka apolouke."
Daniel5:9 Kosodi kiyalonoŋ ekabaka Belesasar noi, kijulakinos akekonyen, kobuonokinos ijakake."
Daniel5:10 Kolom akabaka togo loka epucit kanuka akiro nuka ekabaka ka ijakake, Kotema akabaka atiar, “Wu ekabaka, kobusi ikar kere; kinyeis akoniwomisio aisiyaloŋoŋ jo, karaida akonyenekon aijulakin."
Daniel5:11 Ejai etuŋanan toma ajakanutukon, loejai emoyo loka idekesio lukalaunak kotomake; kapaarasia da nuka papakon aponi kodumunai aica ka aijen ka acoa da tomake kwape kacoa naka idekesio. Abu ekabaka Nebukadenesar papakon, ŋes ekabaka, papakon, kitarau ŋes ekapolon loka imurwok, ka ikasupok, ka Ikaludean, ka ikadwarak da;"
Daniel5:12 naarai kojai kotoma Daniel ŋol loabu ekabaka komaik Beletesasar, emoyo loitelekarit, ka aijen ka apirianut aitejenun apolou naka airujasia, ka abeunun asogolin, ka ailae ilomorun. Aso konyarau Daniel, ŋes da kitodikini apoloukee.”"
Daniel5:13 Kosodi koyaunai Daniel akonyen nuka ekabaka. Kotema ekabaka Daniel atiar, “Ŋo kereka Daniel ŋol, loirai lokodwe luka aijoreunio naka Yuda, luejoreuni papaka koYuda?"
Daniel5:14 Apupu eoŋ nukon, ebe ejai emoyo loka idekesio kotomakon, ido ejai aica ka aijen ka acoa da naitelekarit tomakon."
Daniel5:15 Kwana do aponi kitolomunai lukacoa, ikasupok, akonyeneka tetere esiomete nuiwadikatai ŋun, ketejenikis da eoŋ apoloukee: konye mam apedorete aitodikin apoloukee."
Daniel5:16 Konye apupu nukon ebe ipedori ijo aitejen apolou, ka ailae ilomorun; asa arai ipedori ijo asoman nuiwadikatai ŋun, ka aitejenikin eoŋ apoloukee, kitanapi lomuge, ka erikot loka esabu omurisinikon, iraun ekayaiton lokiwuniet loka ajakanut.”"
Daniel5:17 Kosodi Daniel aboŋokin ekabaka ebe, “Koraut ainakinetakon nukon, koinak da ece iropitokon; konye asomakini eoŋ ekabaka nuiwadikatai, etejenikini ŋes apoloukee da."
Daniel5:18 Wu jo ekabaka, abu Edeke loejai kuju kakuj koinak Nebukadenesar papakon ajakanut, ka apolou, ka aibuses, ka apedor:"
Daniel5:19 ido kanuka apolou naabu koinak ŋes, komaranata koyonito ituŋa kere, ka atekerin ka aŋajepa kakonyeneke: yenakoto ŋesi aiar, abu koar, yenakoto aidar ejari, abu kidar; yenakoto adakakin, abu kodakak, ka yenakoto da aitisil, abu kitisil."
Daniel5:20 Konye naeomiaror eketau, koninikiar da ekemoyo tape iswamai nukeitur, aponi kolemarai koicoloŋoke loka ekabakane, kodemarai da akeibuses:"
Daniel5:21 kirenearai kodwe luka ituŋa; korau eketau kwape kitian, kiboienenei kitukoi; kitanyamai anya kwape imoŋin, kopalal akekuan kakopyo nuka akuj: aitodol naajenunia ebe irumit Edeke loejai kuju kakuj ajakanut naka ituŋa, ido edakakini ŋin yenekoto ŋesi,"
Daniel5:22 Ŋo da, okokuke, wu Belesasar, mam itasonikino kotaukon, karaida ibu kojen nun kere;"
Daniel5:23 konye iomiara aluikin EJAKAIT loka akuj; apotu koyaut iboro lukotogoke akonyenekon, ipotu komasiata ebino, ijo ka ijakakon, ka anorokon, ka abusianakon da; ibu kiturite idekesio luka epuesa, ka luka esabu, ka luka aisinin, ka luka asua, ka luka akito, ka luka amor da, lumam eanyunete, karaida akiirar, kwabo mam ejenete da: konye Edeke loejai eiyenanekon akanike, loerai elopet ikonirotin kere, mam ibu kitopoloo."
Daniel5:24 “Kosodi aponi kijukunai atutubet naka akan anyoun kakonyeneke, aponi kiwadikai nuiwadikatai nu."
Daniel5:25 Na ŋes aiwadika naewadikatai, MENE, MENE, TEKEL, UPARASIN. (Apolouke Kimario, kimario, kitemio, atiakatiakauneta.)"
Daniel5:26 Na ŋes apolou naka akirot; MBNE; abu Edeke kimar akonijakanut, kitanan da."
Daniel5:27 TEKEL; kitemitoi jo kaitemisioit, ido itakanu ikadit,"
Daniel5:28 PERES; etiakak akonijakanut, einakinio Imedin ka Iperesian.”"
Daniel5:29 Kosodi Belesasar aicorakin, kitanapai Daniel lomuge, konapakis erikot loka esabu omurisiŋike, kolimoroi nuke ebe, korau ekayaiton lokiwuniet loka ajakanut."
Daniel5:30 Kakuare kaŋin koarai Belesasar ekabaka Ekaludeat.
Daniel5:31 Kirum Dario Emedit ajakanut, korai loka ikar kwaka akaisakanykape ka luarei."
Daniel6:1 Kitoiok Dario adakakin kaiakanut lukibukui akwatat ka akaisaarei, luejaunos anatar ajakanut kere;"
Daniel6:2 Kopolokinito kes ikayaitok iuni, korai Daniel ediopet kakes; tetere imarete lukibukui ŋul ikeeeboro mama ejaas, komam ekabaka etwaniari luke."
Daniel6:3 Kosodi kodakakinai Daniel ŋol aitelekarit ikayaitok ka lukibukui, naarai ejai emoyo loitelekarit kotomake: komuno ekabaka adakakin ŋes ayait ajakanut kere."
Daniel6:4 Kosodete ikayaitok ka lukibukui amoot akiro nukiwosaet Daniel kotoma ajakanut; konye mam apedorere adumun akiro karaida aibucaret; naarai kerai ŋesi lomunot, amamei apaar karaida aibucaret kotomaken."
Daniel6:5 Kosodete ituŋa ŋol atemar atiar, “Mam kianyuni akiro nuluikinet Daniel ŋol, dimikito kiiluiki ŋes kanuka ekisil loka Edekeke.”"
Daniel6:6 Kosodete kotukonokinos ikayaitok ka lukibukui mama ejai ekabaka, kotemasi ŋes kwanata atiar, “Ekabaka Dario, kobusi ikar kere."
Daniel6:7 Apotu ikayaitok kere luka ajakanut, iketeok ka lukibukui, ka ikenerunak, ka lukitemwan, kinerutu nepepe aisilakin ekisil loka ekabakane, ido aitogogoŋ aicorakinet ebe, nin yenilipi akirot mama ejai edeke kere arai ituŋanan kere adaun apaarasia akaisauni, dimikito ilipi mamakon, wu ekabaka, ecakakinio ŋin toma abua naka iŋatunyo."
Daniel6:8 Aso do, wu ekabaka, kitogogon aicorakinet, kiwadika ekonikiror toma nuiwadikatai, tetere mam ilocokinio, kwape ejaatar ikisila luka Imedin ka Iperesian, lumam ijulakinos.”"
Daniel6:9 Kibwaik teni ekabaka Dario ekekiror nuiwadikatai ka aicorakinet.
Daniel6:10 Kejenu Daniel ebe etogogoŋi nuiwadikatai, koloma togoke; konaanara do akedirisan kagolake, nuiteete Yerusalem; kokukonokin kakuninike irwanauni ŋinipaaran, kilip, kimala kakonyen nuka Ekedeke, kwape atapitor aswam."
Daniel6:11 Kosodete ituŋa ŋul atukonokin, kodumut Daniel ilipi inainai kakonyen nuka Ekedeke."
Daniel6:12 Kosodete kesi aikunyakin, kinerasi kakonyen nuka ekabaka nuka aicorakinet naka ekabaka ebe; “Mam kereka jo ibwaikinit ekonikiror aicorakinet ebe ninitunanan yenilipi akirot mama ejai edeke kere arai ituŋanan adaun apaarasia akaisauni, dimikito ilipi mamakon, wu ekabaka, ecakakinio abua naka iŋatunyo?” Koboŋok ekabaka kotema atiar, “Erai nakabeit, kwape ejaatar ikisila luka Imedin ka Iperesian, lumam ijulakinos.”"
Daniel6:13 Kosodete kesi aboŋokin kotemasi kakonyen nuka ekabaka atiar, “Daniel ŋol, loerai lokodwe luka aijoreunio naka Yuda, mam epodokino jo, wu ekabaka, karaida aicorakinet naibwaikinit ijo ekonikiror, konye ilipenenei irwan auni ŋinipaaran,”"
Daniel6:14 Kosodi kepupu ekabaka akiro nun, kokadak noi, kibwaik eketau aitajar Daniel: kouta aitajar ŋes aitodol nealomaria akoloŋ."
Daniel6:15 Kosodete ituŋa nul atukonokin mama ejai ekabaka, kotemasi ekabaka atiar, “Wu ekabaka, kojenu ebe erai ekisil loka Imedin ka Iperesian ebe mam epedori aicorakinet karaida ekisil loitogogoni ekabaka ailocokinio.”"
Daniel6:16 Kicorak do ekabaka, koyaut Daniel, kocakakisi ŋes abua naka iŋatunyo. Kiner ekabaka, kotema Daniel atiar, “Kitajari jo Ekonideke loijaanakinenei tiritir.”"
Daniel6:17 Aponi koyaunai amoru, kibwaikinai aituk naka abua; komacarik ekabaka kemacarike, ka emacar loka ijakake; tetere mam nuka Daniel ilocokinio."
Daniel6:18 Kosodi do kolot ekabaka togoke lokapolou, kikany eteŋei akuare kiya: kwabo mam aponi koyaunai lueruosi kakonyeneke: kikoleroto akekonyen."
Daniel6:19 Kodilok ekabaka anyoun tupuruc sek, koruruk alosit abua naka iŋatunyo."
Daniel6:20 Nakikunyakinia abua mama ejai Daniel, kodelo keporoto lokican: kiner ekabaka kotema Daniel atiar, “Wu Daniel, ekejaanakinan loka Edeke lokajaran, epedorit kereka Edekekon loijaanakinenei ijo tiritir aitajar jo kama ejaas inarunyoj”"
Daniel6:21 Kosodi Daniel atemar ekabaka atiar, “Wu ekabaka, kobusi ikar kere."
Daniel6:22 Abu Ekadeke kijuk ekemalaika, kitubuta aituke nuka iŋatunyo, mam kesiriebito eoŋ: naarai amamei eoŋ aitoronio kakonyeneke; ido kakonyenekon da, wu ekabaka, mam abu keswama aronis.”"
Daniel6:23 Kiton ekabaka alakar noi jokan, kicorak alemun Daniel kabua. Kolemunai do Daniel kabua, mam abu koany adioronis, naarai abu komunokina Ekedeke,"
Daniel6:24 Kicorak eka baka, koyaunai ituŋa nul Iuerupeete Daniel, kocakakinai abua naka iŋatunyo, kes, ka ikeeedwe, ka aŋorokec da: apotu iŋatunyo kopedosi kes, kobilibilata akojokee kere, eriŋa kedolo kwap kabua."
Daniel6:25 Kosodi ekabaka Dario aiwadikakini ituŋa kere, ka atekerin, ka aŋajepa, luiboienenete akwap kere ebe: “Kiyatanakin ainapakin mama ijaas."
Daniel6:26 Esilak eoŋ ekisil, toma ayaeta kere nuka ajakanutuka komaranete ituŋa koyonito kakonyen nuka Edeke loka Daniel: Naarai erai ŋesi Edeke lokajaran, Icasit ikar kere, Akejakanut da mam emudiario, Eiaunun airumiteke kiton osaŋe:"
Daniel6:27 Eyuuni ŋesi, itaiari da, Iswamai ŋesi aanyuneta ka nukaumokin Toma akuj, toma akwap da; Loabu koyu Daniel Kapedor naka iŋatunyo.”"
Daniel6:28 Kokerianar do Daniel ŋol kairumit naka Dario, kairumit da naka Kuro Eperesiat."
Daniel7:1 Kokaru losodit loka Belesasar ekabaka loko Babulon, koany Daniel airujasit ka aitapoeta nuka akouke, kaperitike: kosodi ŋesi aiwadik airujasit, kolimo aomisioit naka akiro kanun."
Daniel7:2 Kiner Daniel atiar, “Abu kasesen kaitapoeteka kuare, ido koany, komotakinos ikwamin luonon luka akuj aŋolol nakapolon."
Daniel7:3 Kolomut itian iwonon lukos kaŋolol, luegelegela,"
Daniel7:4 Koputos losodit bala eŋatuny, kojaas kabebenoka nuka emorukaalet: abu kaany aitodol naedimere ajul nuka abebenokake, kitonyounoi kakwap kitobwoai kakejen aarei kwape etuŋanan, aponi koinakinai ŋes etau loka etuŋanan."
Daniel7:5 Ido koany, ecetian, lokiareit, kwape kedubu, kikiara osiep ediopet, ajaas amarana auni aitukuke ekonyitos ikelake: kotemarai kwanata ebe,, Konyou, konyam akiriŋ naepol.’"
Daniel7:6 Akaulo kanun abu kasesen, ido koany, ece kwape eris, koiaas opurake abebenoka aoŋon nuka akweny; ajaas etiaŋ kakwes aoŋon; aponi koinakinai ŋes ayait."
Daniel7:7 Akaulo kanun abu kasesen kaitapoeta nuka akuare, ido koany, etiaŋ lokiwoŋonet, loketasuro losogim, ido lokagogon naepol noi; kojaas kikel lukos lukasua: konyam, kobilibil, kipudapud da luedeunos kakejeke: kogelara kitiaŋ ice kere luageikinete ŋes; koiaas kamumwara atomon."
Daniel7:8 Abu kerere amumwara, ido koany, kolom kotomakec amumwarat ace, naedit, aponi korutoroi amumwara auni kanun nusodit kakonyeneke; ido koany, kojaas akonye toma amumwarat nin kwape kakonye nuka etuŋanan, ka aituk da naenera nukos."
Daniel7:9 Abu kasesen aitodol neebwaikinere iicoloŋo, kiboikin emoion lonorot: ekwaŋ akenapito kwape kakako, itima da luka akouke kwape kaiulo nuliogot nuka amerekek; eicoloŋoke kosubite bala aipelonoreta nuka akim, akekokoron da bala akim naesarani."
Daniel7:10 Kolom ecor loka akim kolelei akonyeneke: kijaanakinete ŋes ilukumin elukumit, kobwoete ilukumin itomon irwan ilukumin itomon kakonyeneke: koiau etube, kopukoroi iitabon."
Daniel7:11 Abu kasesen kapak kaŋin kanuka eporoto loka akiro nukos nuenera amumwarat; abu kasesen aitodol neaarere etiaŋ, komudiarai akekuan, koinakinai aicweio kakim."
Daniel7:12 Luesalito da luka itiaŋ aponi kolemarai ayaitekec, konye aponi kiyatakinai aijarakee ekaru ka apak."
Daniel7:13 Abu kasesen kaitapoeta nuka akuare, ido koany, kobu etuŋanan kodouon luka akuj loesubit bala okoku loka etuŋanan, kobu ŋesi mama ejai emojoŋ lonorot, kisukunyikinai kakonyeneke."
Daniel7:14 Aponi koinakinai ŋes ayait, ka aibuses, ka ajakanut, tetere ijaanakinete ŋes ituŋa kere, ka atekerin, ka aŋajepa. Ayaitike erai ayait namam enaŋi, namam etubor, akejakanut da namam emudiario."
Daniel7:15 “Ido eoŋ, Daniel, kokadak emoyoka kotoma akuanaka, kesiyalononoto aitapoeta nuka akouka."
Daniel7:16 Abu kekunyak ediopet kanul luabwoete kanen kenit ŋes abeit naka ŋun kere. Aso kalimok ŋesi eoŋ ketejen apolou naka akiro, ebe,"
Daniel7:17 ‘Itiaŋ ŋul lukos, luimwaasi iwonon, kes ikabakan iwonon luelomunete kakwap."
Daniel7:18 Konye einakinio lukalaunak luka ŋol loejai kuju kakuj ajakanut, ido irumete ajakanut ikar kere, kes ikar ka ikar.’"
Daniel7:19 “Kasodi kepuda ajenun abeit naka etiaŋ lokiwononet, loegelara kakesi kere, loketasuro loepol noi, lokejaas kikellukasua, ka abelekekake nukaisinin; loabu konyam, kobilibil, ka aipudapud da luedeunos kakejeke,"
Daniel7:20 Ido nuka amumwara atomon nuajaas akouke, ka amumwarat ace naabu kolom, kibirokinos auni akonyeneke; amumwarat ŋin naaiaas akonye, ka aituk naenera nukos, naatakani ebur aitelekarit nueeke."
Daniel7:21 Abu kasesen, ido kojiikinos amumwarat ŋin kalukalaunak, kipiko kes;"
Daniel7:22 aitodol naebunio Emoion loŋorot, kotubokinai akiro mama ejaas lukalaunak luka ŋol loejai kuju kakuj; kodol apak naerumiata lukalaunak ajakanut."
Daniel7:23 “Kotema kwanata ebe, ‘Eraun etiaŋ Iokiwononet ajakanut nakiwononet kakwap, naegelara kajakanuto kere, enyamari akwap kere, ipudapudai, ebilibilei da."
Daniel7:24 Ido amumwara nun atomon, enyounete ikabakan itomon kotoma ajakanut ŋin: enyouni da ece atupakin kes; kogelara ŋesi kaŋul lusodit, elemari da ikabakan iuni."
Daniel7:25 Ido inera ŋesi akiro aluikin ŋol loejai kuju kakuj, kitaari lukalaunak luka ŋol loejai kuiu kakuj; eomit ailoc apakio ka ikisila; einakinio akanike adaun apak, ka apakio ka atutubet naka apak."
Daniel7:26 Konye ejauni etube, elemarete akeyaetait, apiar ka amudiar da kiton awasia."
Daniel7:27 Ido ajakanut ka ayaetait, ka apolou da naka ajakanuto nuejaas kwap kakuj kere, einakinio ituŋa luka lukalaunak luka ŋol loejai kuiu kakuj: akejakanut ŋes ajakanut namam enaŋi, ijaanakinete ŋes ayaeta kere, erimarete da.’"
Daniel7:28 “Esaŋi ne akirot. Ido eoŋ, Daniel, apotu akaomisio kesiyalononoto noi, kijulakinos akakonye: konye abu karie akirot ŋin kotauka.”"
Daniel8:1 Okaru lokiwuniet loka airumit naka ekabaka Belesasar ketaanyikin eoŋ Daniel aitapoet, atupakin ŋin naesiauni aitaanyikin eoŋ."
Daniel8:2 Abu kaany kaitapoet; kikoni neta, naanyunia kajai Susan, etogo lokapolou loejai obuku Elam; ido abu kaany kaitapoet, bala ajai ariri kecor Ulai."
Daniel8:3 Kasodi aiteluor akakonye, kasesen, ido koany, kobwo emerekek kariri naka ecor, loejaas amumwara aarei: koojak da amumwara nun aarei; konye kodeparite adiopet naee, ido kobwanu naedeparit kokau."
Daniel8:4 Abu kaany emerekek eremonori ari nakoto, ka agolitomei, ka eŋalakimak da; emameete itiaŋ luepedorete aibwo kakonyeneke, emamei da yenepedori ayuun kakanike; konye kiswama kwape akotor, kitopolooro bon."
Daniel8:5 Napaomoomoi eoŋ, koany, kobu ekoroi ebuni koto, konata akwap kere, komam etirorit akwap: kojai ekoroi amumwarat naedelelei kidiŋ akonyeke."
Daniel8:6 Kobu ŋesi mama ejai emerekek loajaas amumwara aarei, loabu kaany ebwoi kariri kecor, komotakin ŋes kadeden naka apedorike."
Daniel8:7 Kaany ŋes ikunyakinit emerekek, konyunyurik ŋes noi, konaŋ emerekek, kopaka amumwarake aarei; amamei da emerekek apedor aibwo kakonyeneke: konye kibirok kwap, kipudapud; amamei da yenepedori ayuun emerekek kakanike."
Daniel8:8 Kitopoloor ekoroi bon noi noi: kosodi kegogonor, kopakar amumwarat nakapolon; kolomut amumwara aoŋon nuedeleleete aiboisike kotereikina ikwamin luonon luka akuj."
Daniel8:9 Kolom amumwarat naedit kotoma adiopet kakesi, naabu kopoloor noi kari naka eŋalakimak, ka nakokide, ka ari da naka akwap nakaibuses."
Daniel8:10 Kopoloor, kiton ajore naka akuj; kocakak ace kaiore naka aacer kwap, kipudapud."
Daniel8:11 Eebo, kitopolooro bon, kiton neejai ekapolon loka ajore; kolemakama ejai ŋesi ainakinet naicweio natir, kotiyaikinai aiboisike nakalaunan."
Daniel8:12 Kijaikinai da ŋes aiore nepepe kainakinet naicweio natir kanuka aibucaret; kocakak abeit kwap, kiswamai nuipuda kokerianar."
