Daniel8:13 Kasodi eoŋ aipup ekalaunan inera; kotema ekalaunan ece ŋol loenera ebe, “Itodoli bo ai ejauni aitapoet naka ainakinet naicweio natir, aibucaret da naitisili, aijaikin aibois nakalaunan ka ajore da aipudapudao kakeje?”"
Daniel8:14 Katema ŋesi eoŋ atiar, “Kiton atibona ka atupuruco alukumin aarei ka akwat auni; ŋes konyet itesegaarere aibois nakalaunan.”"
Daniel8:15 Kosodi kanen, kadau eoŋ, ŋes eoŋ Daniel, aanyun aitapoet, abu kakoto ajenun ŋes; ido koany, kobwo kakonyeneka yenesubit bala etuŋanan."
Daniel8:16 Abu kapup eporoto loka etuŋanan kokidin Ulai, loeworoi, kobala ebe, “Gaburiel, kitejenik etuŋanan lo aitapoet.”"
Daniel8:17 Kikuny ŋesi die mama abwoia eoŋ; kebu ŋesi, abu kakurianar, kebiror ebuburia: konye katema ŋesi eoŋ atiar, “Kojenu, ijo okoku loka etuŋanan; naarai erai aitapoet naka apak nakosane.”"
Daniel8:18 Kosodi naenerar ŋesi keoŋ, abu kajotoor ajo nuipu ebuburia: konye katiro, ketobwo."
Daniel8:19 Kotema atiar, “Koany, ketejenikini jo nuejaunete kapak nakokau naka anyunyura: naarai erai naka apak naeseunitai nakosane."
Daniel8:20 Emerekek loibu koany loajaas kamumwara aarei kes ikabakan luka Media ka Peresia,"
Daniel8:21 Ekoroi da losanyir ŋes ekabaka loka Yonan: amumwarat da nakapolon naejai kidin kakonyeneke ŋes ekabaka losodit.
Daniel8:22 Ŋin da naabila, kobwaata aoŋon kaiboisike, enyounete ajakanuto aoŋon kotoma ateker, konye mam ejaunos kapedorike."
Daniel8:23 Ido kapak nakokau naka ajakanutukec, naitodolioto ikebucarak aronisikec, enyouni ekabaka loededeŋ akekonyen, loejenuni asogolin."
Daniel8:24 Epol noi akepedor, konye mere toma apedorike elopet; emudiari ŋesi ketasuro, ekerianari kiswamai nuipuda; emudiari ŋesi ikadedeŋak ka ituŋa luka lukalaunak."
Daniel8:25 Ido kanuka apirianutuke itekeriani aimod kakanike; itopolooro bon kotauke, eturiaikin amudiar luipu: ebwoikini da asurokin ekapolon loka ikapolok; konye ebilio komam akan."
Daniel8:26 Ido aitapoet naka atibona ka atupuruco naalimokinio erai nakabeit: konye kimunon ijo aitapoet; naarai erai naka apaarasia nuipu nuepote.
Daniel8:27 Abu eoŋ, Daniel keilor, kadekakin acepaarasia; kasodi konyet anyoun, keswama aswamisio nuka ekabaka: kaumok aitapoet komam abu kajenu ŋes."
Daniel9:1 Kokaru losodit loka Dario okoku loka Akasuero, loka aur naka Imedin, loaraun ekabaka loka ajakanut naka Ikaludean;"
Daniel9:2 kokaru losodit loka airumiteke abu eoŋ Daniel kajenu kanuka iitabon etiai loka ikar luibusakinit atubor aitodolikin aimejeikin naka Yerusalem kwape ejaar akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai enabi Yeremia, kes ikar akaisakanykaarei."
Daniel9:3 Kagipa mama ejai EJAKAIT Edeke, amoot ailip, ka aiŋaiŋa, kekanyi eteŋei, kanapite epuko ka ekurwon."
Daniel9:4 Kelip EJAKAIT Ekadeke, kalimo, kenera ebe, “Wu EJAKAIT Edeke lopeti, loketasuro, loitodoli aitutuket ka aitim mama kanul lueminas ŋes korieito da akeicorakineta;"
Daniel9:5 Kidiaka isio, kiswama nukepali, kikwaik erono, kipaliiki isio apaar ainyein aituutooretakon, ka itubesiakon."
Daniel9:6 Mam kipou keirasi ikonibulesin inabin, luapotu kinerasi kokirorikon mama ejaas ikabakanakosi, ka ikapolokokosi, ka lukapapaakosi, ido mama ejaas ituŋa kere luka akwap."
Daniel9:7 Wu EJAKAIT, adolit ŋes nakon, konye do kirumito sio ileje, kwape lolo; ituŋa luka Yuda, ka luibojete koYerusalem, ka Isirael kere, lueapiete ka luelwaka, anatar akwapin kere nukireneari ijo kes, kanuka adiakaret naadiakasi mama ijai ijo."
Daniel9:8 Wu EJAKAIT, kirumito sio ileje, ikosikabakan, ka ikosikapolok, ka lukapapaakosi, naarai kipou kadiakasi kamakon."
Daniel9:9 Aitim ka aisioni eraas nuka EJAKAIT Ekosideke; karaida kipou kepaliikis ŋes:
Daniel9:10 kwabo mam kirimarit eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekosideke alosenen okisilake, lukibwaikin kakonyenekosi kobulesinike inabin."
Daniel9:11 Eebo, ebuca Isirael kere ikonikisila, apaasi, kinyeis arimar ekoniporoto: ŋes kibukokinere ekenit ka aiyaposit naewadikatai okisila luka Musa ekeiaanakinan loka Edeke; naarai kidiaka kamake."
Daniel9:12 Kitogogon ŋesi akekiro, nuenera aluikin sio, ka ikatubokokosi lukitubonokinete sio; nakiinunia sio aronis naepol: naarai kwap kakuj kere mam apeŋo iswamakinitai kwape eswamakinere Yerusalem."
Daniel9:13 Kibunok sio aronis na kere, kwape iwadikatere okisila luka Musa: kwabo mam kipou kenainaata asianut naka EJAKAIT Ekosideke, kajalata numam adolitekos, kamisiikis akonibeit."
Daniel9:14 Kanuka nun kirerei EJAKAIT aronis, koinu mamakos: naarai edolit EJAKAIT Ekosideke kakeswamisio kere nuiswamai, mam da kipou karimasi ekeporoto."
Daniel9:15 Kwana da, wu EJAKAIT Ekosideke, lokitolom ikonituŋa kakwap nako Misiri kakan nakagogon, ido ibu kodumunia ekiror, kwape lolo; kidiaka isio, kiswama nueroko."
Daniel9:16 Wu EJAKAIT, kwape ejaar adolitekon kere, kenainait, kibelok anyunyurakon ka aisiopokon anyoun korekon Yerusalem, eronatakon lokalaunan: naarai kanuka aronisiokosi ka numam adolit nuka lukapapaakosi, aluor Yerusalem ka ikonituŋa amorosit mama ejaas nul kere lukirimorito,"
Daniel9:17 Aso do, wu EJAKAIT Ekosideke, kiira ailip naka ebulesitikon, ka ainain ake, kitacaik akonikonyen aiboisikon nakalaunan naesil, kanuka EJAKAIT."
Daniel9:18 Wu Ekadeke, kitoik akonikit, kopup; kokweny, kosesen amejeikosi, ka ere loemaikinitai ekonikiror: naarai mam kiyauni ainainakosi akonyenekon kanuka adolitekosi, konye kanuka akoniitim naepol."
Daniel9:19 Wu EJAKAIT, kiira; wu EJAKAIT, kisioni: wu EJAKAIT, kopup, kiswama; sirikiyap; kanukon, wu Ekadeke, naarai emaikinitai erekon ka ituŋakon ekonikiror.”"
Daniel9:20 Kosodi napenerar, elipi, alimori da akaronis ka aronis naka ikatuŋa Isirael, ayait da aiŋaiŋaka akonyen nuka EJAKAIT, Ekadeke kanuka eronat lokalaunan loka Ekadeke;"
Daniel9:21 Eebo, eriŋa enera kailip, aponi kitoporounoi katipet etuŋanan Gaburiel, loabu kaany kaitapoet kageunet, kikuny kapak naka ainakinet naka atiboŋ."
Daniel9:22 Ketejenik, kiner keoŋ, kotema atiar, “Ŋo Daniel, alom eoŋ kwana aitedesiar jo toma aijen,"
Daniel9:23 Ageunet naka aiŋaiŋakon kolom aicorakinet, abunit eoŋ da alimokin jo: naarai kiminai noi: asa koomoom akirot, kojen aitapoet."
Daniel9:24 “Ecorakin asabaton akaisakanykaarei otunakon korekon da lokalaunan, aitanan adiakar, adaun da aronisio aitulue numam adolit, ainun adolit namam enaŋi, aipue da aitapoet ka enabi, ainyonyoikin da aibois nakalaunan noi akinyet."
Daniel9:25 Aso do kojen komisiik, ageun naalomunia aicorakinet ainyakar ka aiduk Yerusalem kiton ekapolon loinyonyoikinio akinyet, ejaunos asabaton akanykaarei: asabaton da akaisakanykape ka nuarei, kodukoi bobo, irotin ka arwatatin, konye kapakio nuka ican."
Daniel9:26 Ketuboros asabaton nun akaisakanykape ka nuarei, emudiario loinyonyoikinio akinyet, mam ejaun kibore: emudiarete ituŋa luka ekapolon loebuni ere ka aibois nakalaunan; ejaun esaneke kakalele, ejaunos da ijiisio kiton osaŋe; epeleikinitai aisimejeikin."
Daniel9:27 Itogogoni ŋesi aitutuket kaluipu adaun asabato adiopet: itanani asubanit ka ainakinet atutubet naka asabato; ebuni da ŋol loisimejeikini kabebenok naka italesio; aitodol neebukokinere esaŋe loepeleikinitai mama ejai loisimejeikini.
Daniel10:1 Kokaru lokiwuniet loka Kuro ekabaka loka Peresia, aponi kopukokinai Daniel loamaikinitai ekekiror Beletesasar akirot; korai akirot nakabeit, ŋes ej ie lokos: kojenu ŋesi akirot, komisiiki aitapoet."
Daniel10:2 Kapaarasia kanun ebworo eoŋ Daniel asabaton auni kere.
Daniel10:3 Mam abu kanyam inyamat luejijim, karaida akiriŋ karaida ebino aicak aitukuka, mam da abu keledanakin akinyet, aitodol neatuborotor asabaton auni cut,"
Daniel10:4 Kapaaran naka akaisaarei ka nuoŋon naka elap losodit, naajaar kariri naka ecor lokapolon, ŋes Kidekel,"
Daniel10:5 keteluo akakonye, kasesen, ido koany, etuŋanan loenapit ebaputa, koenite aŋabet esabu loelai loka Upas:"
Daniel10:6 eputos da akuanake aberul, kosubite ereeteke aimiliaun, akekonye da bala atalai nuka akim, akekanin ka akekejen koraas bala aisinin nuepwatat, eporoto da loka akiroke bala eporoto loka ekodet loepol."
Daniel10:7 Abu eoŋ Daniel kaany aitapoet, eoŋ bon: naarai mam apotu ituŋa luajaas keoŋ koanyut aitapoet; konye komaranata noi noi, kokerata aiŋop."
Daniel10:8 Kapaik do eoŋ bon, abu kaany aitapoet nanakapolon, mam abu agogoŋ kosalak tomakaŋ: naarai abu aiokisika koluor abosis kotomakan, kodaun agogoŋ,"
Daniel10:9 Konye do abu kapup eporoto loka akiroke: ido naapupunia eporoto loka akiroke, kasodi aibiror ebuburia kaiotoor aio nuipu, kosesenas ekareet kalup."
Daniel10:10 Ido koany, katiro akan, kesikukok akuninoka kotauon da luka akaninika."
Daniel10:11 Katema ŋesi eoŋ atiar, “Ŋo Daniel, ijo etuŋanan lominat noi, kojenu akiro nukabala jo, kobwo itenara; naarai keyakuunitai mamakon.” Kedau ŋesi alimokin eoŋ akirot ŋin, kabwo kamarani,"
Daniel10:12 Kosodi ŋesi atemar eoŋ atiar, “Sirikikurianar Daniel; naarai ageun kapaaran nasodit naibwaikinia ijo etaukon ajenun, ka aitasonikin kakonyen nuka Edekekon, aponi kopupuno akonikiro: abunit eoŋ da kanuka akonikiro."
Daniel10:13 Konye abu ekabaka loka Peresia ketikok apaarasia akaisaarei ka nadiopet; konye koany, abu Mikael ediopet kojaka lukapolok kobu kenarak; kajalak ŋes ŋina nepepe kikabakan luka Peresia."
Daniel10:14 Abunit do aitejenikin jo nuedoikinete otunakon kapaarasia nukawasia: naarai erai aitapoet naka apaarasia nuipu nuepote.”
Daniel10:15 Nakedaunia ŋesi atemar eoŋ kwape ejaatar akiro ŋun, ketulur akakonye, kelilin,"
Daniel10:16 Ido koany, abu ediopet loeputos kwape idwe luka ituŋa kotiro aitukuka; kasodi kaoon akakituk, kener, kabala ŋol loabwoi kakonyeneka ebe, “Wu ekaiakait, kanuka aitapoet kabonok eoŋ ariebo kodaun agogoŋ;"
Daniel10:17 naarai ikoni epedori ai ekejaanakinan loka ejakaitika lo einer kejakaitika lo? Naarai kanukan, atipet kodaun agogoŋuka, mam da abu kosal eiyeŋane kotomaka.”"
Daniel10:18 Kosodi abu ediopet loesubit bala etuŋanan katiro bobo, ketogogon ŋesi eoŋ,"
Daniel10:19 Kotema atiar, “Ŋo etuŋanan lominat noi, sirikikurianar: ainapakin kojai mamakon, kicat, eebo, kicat.” Kosodi nakinerar keoŋ, abu kagogonoor, katema atiar, “Ekajakait, kiner; naarai ibu kitogogon.”"
Daniel10:20 Kosodi ŋesi atemar atiar, “Ŋeni ijo nukainakinito eoŋ abunore mama ijai? Kwana do aboŋori aitiji ekapolon loka Peresia: ido naalomaria, koany, ebuni ekapolon loka Yonan."
Daniel10:21 Konye kalimokini jo nuigirigiritai toma aiwadika nakabeit: emamei da yenejai owaika asurokin ŋul dimarai Mikael ekapolonikus.
Daniel11:1 “Eoŋ da, kokaru losodit loka Dario Emedit, abu kabwo aiticat ka aitogogoŋ ŋes."
Daniel11:2 Kwana da ketodikini jo abeit. Koany, ebwoete ikabakan iuni bobo koPeresia; Iokiwononet da itelekari noi kes kere kabar; ido kegogoŋor kanuka abarake, isidiki kere ejie kajakanut naka Yonan."
Daniel11:3 Ebwoi da ekabaka lokagogonon, loirumi kayait naepol, iswamai ŋesi kwape ekotor."
Daniel11:4 Ido naebwoia ŋesi, ebila akejakanut, etiakatiakaun mama ejaas ikwamin luonon luka akuj; konye mam ekorakinio aurike karaida kwape ejaar airumiteke naerumit; naarai erutorio akejakanut, mama ejaas ice luegelara."
Daniel11:5 “Egogoŋ ekabaka loka ari naka eŋalakimak, konye ediopet kokapolokoke egogoŋ adepar ŋes; airumiteke da eraun airumit naepol."
Daniel11:6 Ketuboros ikar imorikikinos nepepe; ebuni akoku naka ekabaka loka ari naka eŋalakimak mama ejai ekabaka loka ari naka agolitomei aitutuk: konye mam nin icasi kapedor naka akekan; mam ŋol da ebwoi karaida aurike; konye ijaikinio ŋin, ka nul lukeyaunete, ka nol lokeurie, ka ŋol da loabu kitogogon ŋes kapakio kanun,"
Daniel11:7 “Konye ebwoi atenut naelomuni kaliasike aiboisike, edolokini ŋesi ajore, elomari ore loegogon loka ekabaka loka ari naka agolitomei, esurokini kes, ipikori da."
Daniel11:8 Enatari da idekesiokec, ka aputosiakec nuecalara, ka iborokec luejok luka epuesa ka luka esabu, ayaŋaar Misiri; ido edauni icekaru komam esurokini ekabaka loka ari naka agolitomei."
Daniel11:9 Elomari ŋesi ajakanut naka ekabaka loka ari naka eŋalakimak, konye eboŋori akwapuke,"
Daniel11:10 “Ejiosi odweke, etukonokinete ajore naepol naka irioneta lukapolok iyatanakini ŋes abunore, elelei, etubori; kosodi aboŋun ejie kiton aiboisike naegogon."
Daniel11:11 Enyunyurikini ekabaka loka ari naka eŋalakimak, elomuni ejie kaŋes, ŋes ekabaka loka ari naka agolitomei; itonyouni aiore naepol, ijaikinio da ajore akanike."
Daniel11:12 Naeyanaaria ajore, kiturokin eketau: ibirokini ilukumin luipu, konye mam ipikori."
Daniel11:13 Eboŋuni ekabaka loka agolitomei, itonyouni ajore naepol aitelekarit nasodit; ido ketuboros ikar iyatanakini abunore kajore naepol ka iboro da luipu,"
Daniel11:14 “Kapaarasia kanun ebwoikinete luipu asurokin ekabaka loka ari naka eŋalakimak: ido itonyounos idwe luka luemeneraka kotunakon aiticat aitapoet; konye ibiroros.
Daniel11:15 Kosodi do ekabaka loka agolitomei abunore, eduki etut, irumiar ere loebwaitai: mam ebwoete irionera luka eŋalakimak, karaida iketuŋa luaseunitai, mam da ejaun agogoŋ aibwo,"
Daniel11:16 Konye ŋol loebuni asurokin ŋes iswamai kwape ekotor, mam idio da yenebwoikini ŋes: ebwoi ŋesi kakwap nakaibuses, ejauni amudiar akanike."
Daniel11:17 Itemokini akonyeneke abunore kagogon kere naka ajakanutuke, eyaŋauni lukabeit nepepe kaŋes; iswamai ŋun; ikorakini ŋes akoku naka aŋor amudiar ŋes; konye mam ebwoi, karaida aisigalikin ŋes."
Daniel11:18 Akaulo kanun ibeloori akekonyen mama ejaas apujana, irumiari nuipu: konye itasani ekapolon amorosit nakeyauni ŋol; eebo, inyakakini ŋes amorositike."
Daniel11:19 Kosodi konyet aibeloor akekonyen mama ejaas ireria luegogon luka akwapuke elopet: konye iguikini, kibiror, komam bobo etakanuni."
Daniel11:20 “Kosodi do enyouni ediopet aiboisike itotori eketeleman esolo kotoma aibuses naka ajakanut: konye kapaarasia nuikidioko emudiario, konye mere kanyunyura, karaida kojie."
Daniel11:21 Enyouni ekes Ioemwanitai aiboisike, lomam sek einakinitai aibuses naka ajakanut: konye ebuni ŋesi kapak nakainapakin, eyaŋaari ajakanut kanuka akiro nukaijodijod."
Daniel11:22 Elelearete ajoresio kwape kakalele kakonyeneke, ebilas; eebo, ekapolon loka aitutuket da."
Daniel11:23 Kedautu aitutuk iswamai kaliokonut; naarai edokari, eraun lokagogon, kojaas kituna luikidioko."
Daniel11:24 Kapak nakainapakin elomari aiboisio nuitelekarito amio nukobuku; iswamai numam lukapapake iswamatos, karaida lukapapaake; ekorakini kes lumejauna, ka lunatuna, ka iboro da: eebo, ebilakini iboteike asurokin ireria luegogon, adaun apak."
Daniel11:25 Ido isidiki akepedor ka aketitin asurokin ekabaka loka ari naka eŋalakimak kajore naepol: itijie da ekabaka loka ari naka eŋalakimak ŋes ejie kajore naepol noi naededen: konye mam ebwoi, naarai ebilakinete ŋes ibotei."
Daniel11:26 Eebo, nul luenyamete ikenyamat, kes ca emudiarete ŋes, elelei ajoreke: ibiroros luipu edanyio."
Daniel11:27 Ido ikabakan nul luarei, ibwaikinete itauonokec ameŋeranut, esabanakinete enyamete nepepe: konye mam ekeriakaros; naarai ejaun esaŋe kapak naeseunitai."
Daniel11:28 Ŋes konyet ebonoria akwapuke kiboro luipu; konye esurokini eketau aitutuket nakalaunan: iswamai nuekoto, kobonori do akwapuke."
Daniel11:29 “Bbonori do kapak naeseunitai, elomari ari naka eŋalakimak; konye mam ejaun kapak kaŋin kwape sek ajaar nasodit,"
Daniel11:30 Naarai epote ameerin nuka Kitim asurokin ŋes; ŋes konyet iburakinia, eboŋori, enyunyurikini aitutuket nakalaunan, iswamai nuekoto; eboŋori do ibwaikini etau ŋul luejalete aitutuket nakalaunan."
Daniel11:31 Ebwoete irioneta kowaike, itisilianete aibois nakalaunan, ŋes ere loegogon, elemarete asubanit natir, esipokinete etal loisimejeikini."
Daniel11:32 Itapaari ŋesi kaijodijod ŋul lueswamaete nueroko asurokin aitutuket: konye do icasito ituŋa Iuejenete Ekecedeke, iswamaete nukatitin."
Daniel11:33 Lukacoa da lukotoma otuŋa ituutoorete luipu: konye ibirokinos okileŋ, ka akim, ka aijoreorio, ka anatario, apaarasia nuipu."
Daniel11:34 Kosodi naibirorotor, inarakinio kainarakin naedit: konye imorikikinos luipu mamakee kakiro nukaijodijod."
Daniel11:35 Ibiroros da ice kakesi lukacoa, aililiaun kes, aitesegaar, aitalaun kes aitodol apak nakawasia: naarai eroko ejai apak naeseunitai."
Daniel11:36 “Iswamai ekabaka kwape ekotor; iturokin, itopoloor bon aitelekar ecedeke kere, inera da nukaumokin aluikin Edeke loka idekesio: ekerianari da aitodol naitodolikinio anyunyura; naarai nuepeleikinitai iswamao,"
Daniel11:37 Mam da epodokini idekesio luka lukapapaake, karaida loimielas aŋor, karaida apod edeke kere: naarai etopoloor aitelekar kere."
Daniel11:38 Konye kaiboisike itubusikini edeke loka ireria luegogon: itubusikini edeke lomam kolo ajenete lukapapaake kesabu, ka epuesa, ka amor nuka akais nuipu, ka iboro luketiai loepol."
Daniel11:39 Ikwaikini da ireria luegogon aitelekarit kinarakinite edeke lomoit; nul da luecamunete ŋes iyatakini aibuses: einakini kes airum luipu, ekori akwap kanuka etiai."
Daniel11:40 “Kapak da nakosane eremori ŋes ekabaka loka ari naka eŋalakimak: ebuni ekabaka loka ari naka agolitomei asurokin ŋes kwape etapipirio, kagalin, ka ikebwanenok, ka ameerin nuipu; elomari ŋesi akwapin, elelei, etubori."
Daniel11:41 Elomari da akwap nakaibuses, ibirokini luipu: konye itaiario nu kakanike, Edom, ka Moab, ka lukapolok luka idwe luka Amon."
Daniel11:42 Eriori da akekan akwapin: akwap da nako Misiri mam ekui.
Daniel11:43 Konye edumuni apedor kama ejaas ainadisio nuka esabu ka nuka epuesa, ka iboro da kere luka akais nuipu luko Misiri: etupakinete ŋes Ilibian ka Itiopian."
Daniel11:44 Konye isiyalononoete ŋes iyemuto luepote kokide, kari da naka agolitomei: elomari kanyunyura naededen amudiar, ka aidany da cut luipu."
Daniel11:45 Ido iraikini iweman lukotogoke lokapolou kidiŋ kaŋolol ka eronat lokaibuses lokalaunan; konye edolokini osaŋeke, komam yeniŋarakini ŋes."
Daniel12:1 “Kapak kaŋin ebwoi Mikael, ejakait lokapolon loebwoikini idwe luka ituŋakon: ido ejaun apak naka aburun, namam apeŋo ejaunit ageun kateker ajaut aitodol apak nin: ido kapak kaŋin eyuunio ikonituŋa, ninidiopet yenetakanuni iwadikatai oitabo."
Daniel12:2 Ekwenyunete da luipu kanul kaluejotoete kotoma apua naka akwap, ice neejai aijar namam edaun, ice da mama ejaas ileic ka amwanio namam edaun."
Daniel12:3 Eeaunete da ŋul lukacoa kwape amwekimwek naka akuj; nul da luibelokinete luipu mama ejai adolit kwape aacer ikar ka ikar.
Daniel12:4 Konye jo, wu Daniel, kimunon akiro, kipue eitabo, aitodol apak nakawasia: ekerete luipu lailo ka laije, iyatakin da aijen.”"
Daniel12:5 Kasodi eoŋ, Daniel, asesen, ido koany, ebwoete ice iarei, ediopet kowai lo kariri naka ecor, ece juwai kariri naka ecor."
Daniel12:6 Kosodi ediopet kinit etuŋanan loenapit ebaputa, loajai kuiu akipi nukocor ebe, “Itodoli bo ai kiton osaŋe loka nukaumokin nu?”"
Daniel12:7 Korio erunanan loenapit ebaputa, loajai kuju akipi nukoeor, akekan nakoteten ka akekan nakokediany da kiton akuj, kasodi apupun ŋes iyapoi kolimite ŋol loejarenenei ikar kere ebe, itodoli apak, ka apakio, ka atutubet; ido kedaut kesi abilibil apedor naka ituŋa lukalaunak, kosodete konyet nun kere adaun,"
Daniel12:8 Kapup, konye mam abu kajen: kasodi atemar ebe, “Wu ekajakait, nuelomunete kanun kere anyoika?”"
Daniel12:9 Kotema atiar, “Kolot, Daniel: naarai emunon akiro, epueakin da aitodol apak nakawasia."
Daniel12:10 Itesegaaros luipu, italaunos, ililiaunos; konye iswamaete lukaronok nukaronok; emameun yenikaronon yenejenuni: konye ejenunete nul lukacoa."
Daniel12:11 Ido ageun kapak naelemarere ainakinet naicweio natir, esipokino da etal loisimejeikini, ejaunete apaarasia alukumit ka akwat aarei ka akaisakanykaoŋon."
Daniel12:12 Isirerenitoi ŋin yenidaret, kodol apaarasia alukumit ka akwat auni ka akaisauni kanukany."
Daniel12:13 Konye kolot ma ijo aitodol naejaunia awasia: naarai ibworari, ibwoi da kotoma nakibeit jo osaŋe loka apaarasia.”"
Hosea1:1 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naabu kobu mama ejai Kosea okoku loka Beeri, kapaarasia nuka Usia, ka Yotam, ka Akas, ka Kesekia da, ikabakan luka Yuda, kapaarasia da nuka Yeroboam okoku loka Yoas, ekabaka loka Isirael."
Hosea1:2 Nakegeunia EJAKAIT einer ka Kosea, kobala EJAKAIT Kosea ebe, “Kolot, komany aberu nakadoteu, ka idwe luka adoteu: naarai adotear noi akwap, anyoun kama ejai EJAKAIT.”"
Hosea1:3 Aso abu ŋesi kolot komany Gomer akoku naka Dibilaim; kopotuu ŋesi, kourik ŋes isapat."
Hosea1:4 Kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Komaik ekekiror Yesereel; naarai eriŋa ber apak naedit kasodi ainyaŋ kokek laka Yeku aokot nuka Yesereel, etanaŋi da ajakanut naka ekek loka Isirael."
Hosea1:5 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, abili eoŋ akabwa naka Isirael toma aditot naka Yesereel.”"
Hosea1:6 Kopotuu bobo kouru ipese, Kotema EJAKAIT ŋes atiar, “Komaik ekekiror Lo-rukama, Naarai mam bobo etimi ekek loka Isirael, tetere esioniei kes,"
Hosea1:7 Konye etimi ekek loka Yuda, etajari kes kanuka EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, mam etajari kes kanuka akabwa, karaida ekileŋ, karaida ejie, karaida ibalasin, karaida ikebwanenok.”."
Hosea1:8 Kosodi kedau aitajakaar Lo-rukama, kopotuu, kouru isapat."
Hosea1:9 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Komaik ekekiror Lo-ami; naarai mam eraas ikatuŋa, eoŋ da mam araun Ekusideke.”"
Hosea1:10 Konye do eraun etiai loka idwe luka Isirael kwape asiŋe naka aŋolol namam epedori aitemio karaida aimario; kosodi kanen, kaibois naaponi kotemarere kes ebe, “Mam iraas ikatuŋa,” etemario do kes ebe, “Yes odwe luka Edeke lokajaran.”"
Hosea1:11 Etukonokinos idwe luka Yuda ka idwe luka Isirael, eseunete lokapolon ediopet, enyounete kakwap: naarai epol apaaran naka Yesereel."
Hosea2:1 Kolimokisi ikusiinacan ebe, “Ami”; ka akusiinaean ebe, “Rukama.”"
Hosea2:2 Kiŋaiŋaata totokus, kiŋaiŋaata; Naarai mam erai akaberu, Eoŋ da mam arai okilenike: Kosae ŋesi adoteuke kakonyeneke, Ka eporoke kokisinake;"
Hosea2:3 Kenyek aitumujalal ŋes, aibwaikin kwape kapaaran naauriere, Ketuput ŋes kwape amodiŋ, Kebwaik ŋes kwape akwap naconit, Kaar ŋes kakure."
Hosea2:4 Eebo, mam etimi ikedwe; Naarai eraas idwe luka adoteu."
Hosea2:5 Naarai adotear totokec: Eswama ŋin naapotuunit kes nukileic: Naarai abala ebe, ‘Alosi mama ejaas ipaelonoka, Lueinakinete eoŋ atapaka, ka akipika, Ajuloka ka abiraika, akinyeteka ka numatanaka.’"
Hosea2:6 Aso do koany, abwai ekonirot kikukwa, Aduki arwatat kaneejai ŋesi, Tetere mam edumuni ikerotin."
Hosea2:7 Etupari ŋesi ipaelonoke, Konye mam edolokini kes: Emoi kes, konye mani edumuni: Kosodi do ebala ebe, ‘Alosi Aboŋori mama ejai okilenika losodit Naarai ajai ejok kolo adepar kwana.’"
Hosea2:8 Naarai mam ŋes ajeni ebe Eoŋ ŋes ainakinit ŋes Akima ka ebino ka akinyet, Keyatak mama ejai epuesa ka esabu Luejaanakiniata Baal."
Hosea2:9 Ŋes enyakunia akimaka kapakike, Ka ebinoka kokaruke, Alemari da aiuloka ka abiraika Nutikerapiata amu; alalake,"
Hosea2:10 Kwana da etoduuni ikeleic Kakonyen nuka ipaelonoke, Emameun yeneyuuni ŋes kakanika."
Hosea2:11 Etanaŋi da aiyalamake kere, Ipucinoke, ailamunun naka ilapioke, asabatonoke, Ka atukokinetake kere nukaiyamakina,"
Hosea2:12 Etiswapi imusabibunuke ka itininike, Luabu ŋesi kotema ebe, ‘Lu kes eropitika, Loapotu ipaelonoka kainakis eoŋ’; Etuluori kes amagoro, Enyamete da kes itian luka ais."
Hosea2:13 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Etieani ŋes Kanuka apaarasia nuka Ibaalim, Luabu ŋesi kisupurik lukisupurununo, Kisiri kitetio ka itibineke, Kibwapa ipaelonoke, kimurwok eoŋ,"
Hosea2:14 “Aso do koany, emaimai ŋes, Ayauni ŋes amodiŋ, Enerakin ŋes nuitalakarete."
Hosea2:15 Ainakini ŋes kaŋina amanatake nuka emusabibu, Aditot naka Akor araun ekek loka amun: Eboŋokini ŋesi kaŋina, kwape kapaarasia nuka eiditeuke, Kwape kapaaran naanyounio kakwap nako Misiri,"
Hosea2:16 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Kosodi kapaaran kaŋin, kimaikini eoŋ, Okilenika” mam bobo kimaikinit eoŋ ‘Baalika’,"
Hosea2:17 Naarai alemari ikiroria luka Ibaalim kaitukuke, mam bobo elimitoi ikiroriakec,"
Hosea2:18 Kapaaran kaŋin etutukikini kes aitutuket kitian luka ais, ka akweny nuka apak, ka lueliatos kakwap: abili akabwa ka ekileŋ ka ejie anyoun kakwap, esiperikini kes inapakina."
Hosea2:19 Kesineri jo ikar kere; eebo, kesineri jo kadolit, kotube, kasianut-nakamin, ka aitimio da."
Hosea2:20 Kesineri teni jo kamunonut: ijenuni do EJAKAIT,”"
Hosea2:21 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, Aboŋokini, aboŋokini akuj, Ŋes da eboŋokini akwap;"
Hosea2:22 Eboŋokini akwap akima, ka ebino, ka akinyet; Eboŋokinete kesi da Yesereel."
Hosea2:23 Ayeikini ŋes akwap kanukaŋ; Etimi ŋin namam lem itimitoi: Alimokini ŋul lumam araas ikatuŋa ebe, ‘Iraas yesi ikatuŋa’; Kes da inerasi ebe, “Ŋono Ekadeke.’”"
Hosea3:1 Kosodi kabala EJAKAIT eoŋ ebe, “Kolot bobo, komin aberu naemina opaike, naadote, kwape eminar EJAKAIT idwe luka Isirael, karaida ibelo kinos mama ejaas idekesio ice, iminas aluŋuren nuka imusabibun nueokito.”"
Hosea3:2 Aso kagwelu ŋes katutubeta atomon ka nukany nuka epuesa, ka ekomer loka esairi ka atutubet naka ekomer loka esairi."
Hosea3:3 Katema ŋes atiar, “Kiboikin keoŋ apaarasia nuipu; mam ilosi eporo, mam iraun aberu naka etuŋanan kere: eoŋ da ekonakini nen mamakon.”"
Hosea3:4 Naarai iboiete idwe luka Isirael apaarasia nuipu komamei ekabaka, karaida ekapolon, komamei asubanit, karaida epir, komamei da epod karaida iterapim."
Hosea3:5 Akaulo kanun eboŋunete idwe luka Isirael, emoete EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, ka Daudi ekabakakec; epote kaiyon mama ejai EJAKAIT ka ajokisike kapaarasia nukokau."
Hosea4:1 Kiirasi akirot naka EJAKAIT, yes idwe luka Isirael, Naarai ejai EJAKAIT aŋolopa kaluiboiete kakwap, Naarai emamei abeit, karaida aitim, Karaida ajenun Edeke kakwap."
Hosea4:2 Emamei ibore dimarai aiyapo, ka aiŋal, ka aibil ebotet, ka aiar, ka akoko, ka adoteu; Ebelaros, aokot da edolokinete aokot."
Hosea4:3 Kanuka ŋun ibworo akwap, Ekalanyana ninitunanan yeniboie kotoma, Nenipe kitian luka ais ka akweny nuka apak; Eebo, elemario da iboro lukecor."
Hosea4:4 Konye kinyek ituŋanan epeget, Karaida ituŋanan aitoron; Naarai eraas ikonituŋa kwape luitepegete esasedoti."
Hosea4:5 Kiguikini ijo paaran, Iguikini da enabi nepepe kaio kuare; Amudiari da totokon,"
Hosea4:6 Emudiaros ikatuŋa kanu amamus aijen: Naarai ibu koner aijen, eoŋ da kaneri jo, Mam iraun esasedoti mamakan; Naarai kimurwokis ikisila luka Edekekon, Eoŋ da kemurwokinete ikonidwe."
Hosea4:7 Kwape epuarotor, kwape kwaŋin adiakanariata kamakaŋ: Elocokini eoŋ da aibusesukec araun ileic."
Hosea4:8 Enyamenenete aronis naka ikaruna, Iranaete numam adolitekec,"
Hosea4:9 Aso eriakanara ituŋa ka esasedoti: Eticani kes kanuka iponesiokec, Aropi kes kanuka aswamisiokec."
Hosea4:10 Enyamete, konye mam imonikinos; Edotearos komam ipuaros: Naarai enyekis aibwaikin etau mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Hosea4:11 Adoteu ka ajon ka ajon nukitetiak, Kes elemarete ajenun."
Hosea4:12 Inisete ikatuŋa atorominikec, Ebelakee da elimokini kes: Naarai etapaa kes emoyo loka adoteu, Aloto eporo anyoun kama ‘ejai Edekekec."
Hosea4:13 Einanakinete asuban kaidiasia nuka ironan, Isupuruununete lukisupurununo koukon, Kwap kiluan, ka isiepen ka ipeduro, Naarai ejok itolimonokec. Kanuka ŋun eelos akusipesur, Edote aterakakus."
Hosea4:14 Mam eticani akusipesur eelos, Karaida aterakakus edote: Naarai apaasi kesi ikulepek kanudotea, Einakinete asuban nepepe kakerimok: Ibirorio ituŋa lumam eienere."
Hosea4:15 Karaida iporo ijo Isirael, Kinyek Yuda agwaun akirot; Sirikiloto Giligal, Karaida alosit Bet-aben, Karaida aiyapo ebe, “Kwape ejaria EJAKAIT.”"
Hosea4:16 Naarai eninik Isirael, Kwape ataok naeninik: Aso itadaki tope EJAKAIT kes Kwape imerekek kaibois naelal?"
Hosea4:17 Imorikikina Epuraim kaputosia, Kinyek ŋes."
Hosea4:18 Edwarak amatanakec: Iporoonoros tiritir: Errinasi noi ikapolokoke ileic.
Hosea4:19 Ekutari ŋes ekwam kabebenokake; Irumete ileic kanuka asuba
Hosea5:1 Kiirasi na, yes isasedotin, Kopupokis yesi lukokek loka Isirael, Kitoik akit, ijo ekek loka eka baka, Naarai etube ŋes lokus; Naarai iraas yesi eic koMisipa, Ka eboi loepesikinitai Tabor."
Hosea5:2 Etudulosi aipany naka Sitim; Konye etoroni eoŋ kes kere.
Hosea5:3 Ajeni eoŋ Epuraim, Isirael da mam enopi kamakaŋ: Naarai kwana, ijo Epuraim, iporoi, Amunaun Isirael."
Hosea5:4 Mam aswamisiokec ecamakinete kes Aibelokin mama ejai Edekekec: Naarai ejai emoyo loka eporo kotomakec, Mam ejenete EJAKAIT."
Hosea5:5 Itejenuni aiturokin naka Isirael kakonyeneke: Kanuka nun iguikinete Isirael ka Epuraim toma numam adolitekec; Iguikini Yuda da kakes.
Hosea5:6 Elosete nepepe kisipaninikec luka amerekekin ka aituk amoot EJAKAIT: Konye mam edumunete ŋes; ajal kes.
Hosea5:7 Eswamakis EJAKAIT nukaibil cbotet; Naarai aurut idwe lumo, Kwana emudiari elap lokelamunan kes ka imanikoriakec,"
Hosea5:8 Kokuta apeen koGibea, ka arupepen koRama: Kokuta nuka elulu koBet-aben: Kokaukon, ijo Benyamin."
Hosea5:9 Eraun Epuraim etisilio kapaaran naka aitoronio: Abu keteien atekerin nuka Isirael nuekotosi cut ajakut,"
Hosea5:10 Esubito ikapolok luka Yuda bala nul luisukunyikinete eikor: Abukokini kes akanyunyura kwape akipi.
Hosea5:11 Eroikinio Epuraim, idecidecio kotube: Naarai itoiokit atupar aamameak,"
Hosea5:12 Ŋes konyet araunor kwape ekaiekelet mama erai Epuraim. Ido kwape aibos mama ejai ekek ioka Yuda.
Hosea5:13 Nakeanyunia Epuraim adekake, ka Yuda da amusunutuke, Kosodi Epuraim alosit Asuria, Kijuka mama ejai ekabaka Yareb: Konye mam ŋes epedori aitaŋaleun jo, Mam epedori aitaŋaleun amusunutukon."
Hosea5:14 Naarai araun eoŋ kwape eŋatuny mama ejai Epuraim, Kwape iŋatuny da mama ejai ekek loka Isirael: Eoŋ, eoŋ obe, apoopooi, kasodi alosit; Anatari, emameun da yeneyuuni."
Hosea5:15 Alosi aboŋori aiboisika, Aitodol naelimoriata aidiakakec, emoete akakonyen: Edunyakinete amoot eoŋ kaiticanitoikec."
Hosea6:1 “Kopotu kaboijosi neejai EJAKAIT; Naarai ŋes apoopoo, ŋes da kitanaleuni; Ŋes icumi, ijes da kimadi,"
Hosea6:2 Ketuboros apaarasia aarei kisikwaruni: Kitonyouni kapaaran nakiwuniet, Oni da kijari kakonyeneke."
Hosea6:3 Kajenutu, kenyikokis ajenun EJAKAIT: Icasit akelomar kwape katupuruc: Ebuni mamawok kwape kakiru, Kwape kakiru nakiloboet nairwairwai akwap.”"
Hosea6:4 Wu Epuraim, kekonakini jo ai? Wu Yuda, kekonakini jo ai? Naarai esubit akusijokis bala edou loka atupuruc, Ido kwape akopyo nueokete nape sek."
Hosea6:5 Ŋes kajepiata kinabin; Kaar kes kakiro nuka aitukuka: Esubito ikatubesia bala aica naipelun.
Hosea6:6 Naarai emiela aitim konye mere asuban; Ka aijen Edeke aitelekarit ainakineta nuieweio.
Hosea6:7 Konye adiakasi kesi aitutuket kwape Adam; Kamodata eoŋ kanen,"
Hosea6:8 Erai Gilead ere loka ŋul kaluiswamaete numam edolito, Eiukitoi aokot."
Hosea6:9 Ido kwape idariata ikodeta luka ikaijatak etuŋanan, Eari kwaŋin atukot naka isasedotin korot loebei Sekem: Eebo, eswamata nukasilianut."
Hosea6:10 Aanyik akirot naasogim okek loka Isirael; Atakanu adoteu koEpuraim, amunaun Isirael."
Hosea6:11 Ka jo da, wu Yuda, kiseikinitai amio."
Hosea7:1 Naenyakunia ikatuŋa kaijoreorio, Naakotor aitaŋaleun Isirael, Ŋes etakanunia numam adolit nuka Epuraim, Ka aronis da naka Samaria; Naarai emodete: Elomuni ekokolan kotoma, Eŋasi ekodet loka ikaŋatak kokina."
Hosea7:2 Mam eomoomoete kotauonokec ebe eituni eoŋ aronisikec kere; Kwana do irigaunete kes akeeeswamisio, Ejaas kakonyeneka."
Hosea7:3 Isiyalamikinete ekabaka karonisikec, Ka ikapolok da kaisabakec."
Hosea7:4 Eraas kere idotea: Eraas bala ekiala loinoki ekepoon; Inyeini do aiyatakin akim, Ageun kainyon akiria aitodol naebuunioto,"
Hosea7:5 Kapaaran naka ekabakawok kodekakinos ikapolok kadwaris naka ajon; Korio akekan nepepe kikesekelok.
Hosea7:6 Naarai etemokis ikecetauon kwape ekiala, eperunete; Eiotoi anyunyurakec akuare kia; Tupuruc enoki kwape akim naesarani."
Hosea7:7 Emwaka kes kere kwape ekiala, Idoporete ikatubokokec; Ebiroros ikabakanakec kere: Emameun kotomakec yenikewonet eoŋ."
Hosea7:8 Enyalakin Epuraim toma atekerin; Epuraim ŋes emugati lomam ibelokinitai.
Hosea7:9 Anyamata imo akegogoŋ, komam ejeŋi; Eebo, abwanut akoruo kamake, komam ŋes ejeŋi,"
Hosea7:10 Itejenuni aiturokin naka Isirael kakonyeneke: Kwabo mam apotu kobonut mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, Karaida amoot ŋes kanuka ŋun kere."
Hosea7:11 Esubit Epuraim bala ajele naebaŋaana, Naemamei aijen: Iwoneete Misiri, elosete Asuria."
Hosea7:12 Naelosioto, alokikini kes ekaboi; Alatakini kes kwap kwape akweny nuka apak:"
Hosea7:13 Alecori kes, kwape epupunio ekodetekec. Itukwi kesi! Naarai apaasi kamakaŋ; Komudiarai, naarai ebueasi kamakaŋ! Karaida akoto alakun kes, Konye apotu kasabanakis."
Hosea7:14 Mam apotu kamonyakis eoŋ ketaukec, Konye ibwololoete kaperitokec: Egeras kanuka akima ka ebino, Kepaliikis ŋol."
Hosea7:15 Karaida abu eoŋ ketuutoorite, ketogogonite da akecekanin, Konye itetemonorete ameŋeranut aluikin eoŋ."
Hosea7:16 Eboŋunete, konye mere mama ejai ŋol loejai kuju; Esubito bala akabwa nakaimod: Ibiroros ikapolokokec kekilen, Kanuka adedeŋ naka aŋajepekec: Ŋin ŋes aisekeliokec kakwap nako Misiri"
Hosea8:1 Kibwaik arupepe aitukukon. Ebuni kwape emorukaalet asurokin etogo loka EJAKAIT: Naarai ebucasi aitutuketeka, Adiakasi da ikakisila."
Hosea8:2 Kamonyete eoŋ ebe, Ekadeke, isio Isirael kijeni joo"
Hosea8:3 Aeaka Isirael ŋin naejok: Erukio lokasurup ŋes.
Hosea8:4 Apotu kodakakis ikabakan, konye mere kanukaŋ; Aseut ikapolok, komam eoŋ ajeni: Eswamaut aputosia nuka epuesakee ka esabukee, Tetere egelario."
Hosea8:5 Aeaka ŋesi itaokokon, ijo Samaria; Enepu akanyunyura aluikin kes: Iwori bo edolokinioto aseganut?"
Hosea8:6 Naarai ebuni ŋin da koIsirael. Ekeswaman ŋes asubi, mam nin erai Edeke: Eebo, ebilibilun itaok yenika Samaria,"
Hosea8:7 Naarai eyeete ekwam, esakete ca etapipirio: Emameete ŋes akima karaida atinoi; Mam ekokuunete aluŋuren; Konye karaida ekokuunete, Ilikorete do imo."
Hosea8:8 Elikor Isirael: Ejaas kwana kotoma atekerin Kwape ibore yenimam isiyalamikinit.
Hosea8:9 Naarai aloto Asuria kwape atuko naelosi abonipe: Eropi Epuraim ipaelon.
Hosea8:10 Eebo, karaida eropete ikeganak kotoma atekerin, Kwana atukonokini eoŋ kes; Tetere epalarete nediokasilon Kainyonyoikin eka baka ka ikapolok akinyet."
Hosea8:11 Naarai asub Epuraim itemwan luipu adiakia, Eraas mamake itemwan luka aidiak."
Hosea8:12 Karaida kewadikaki ŋes ikakisila ilukumin itomon, Imarakinitai araut lukimo."
Hosea8:13 Eminasi asuban; Einakinete asuban nuka akiriŋ, enyamete da; Konye mam EJAKAIT ecamuni kes: Iituni kwana numam adolitekec, Iticani kanuka aronisiokee; Eboŋorete kesi Misiri."
Hosea8:14 Naarai emurwok Isirael Ekasubanike, Abu koduk itogoi lukapolou; Eyatak Yuda ireria luebwaitai: Konye eiukakini eoŋ akim oreriake, Idopori itogoi luegogoŋ."
Hosea9:1 Sirikibwoŋ kailel, ijo Isirael! Kwape atekerin; Naarai iporo ijo ainyein Ekonideke, Imina aropio kanolipeial."
Hosea9:2 Mam epejal ka acuet nakebino itanyamete kes, Emamikini ŋes ebino lokitetet,"
Hosea9:3 Mam ibojenenete kakwap naka EJAKAIT; Konye eboŋori Epuraim Misiri, Enyamete inyamat lumam elaete koAsuria."
Hosea9:4 Mam ebukonokinete ainakineta nuka ebino mama ejai EJAKAIT, Mam akeeesuban isiyalamikinete ŋes; Eraun atapakec kwape atap naka aibworo; Luenyamete ŋes kere emunaunos: Naarai atapakec erai kanuka eteŋei ban: Mam itolomario togo loka EJAKAIT."
Hosea9:5 Anyoika bo nuiswamaete yesi kapaaran naka atukokinet nakaiyamakina, Kapaaran da naka epueit loka EJAKAIT?"
Hosea9:6 Naarai koany, aekasi kamudiario, Etukokini Misiri kes, idai Memipis kes: Irumete iduanin ikeeeboro luisiyalamikinete luka epuesa: Elomunete ikukwa owemanakec."
Hosea9:7 Adolut apaarasia nuka aiticanio, Adolut apaarasia nuka aitepesenio; Ejenuni Isirael: Ebanaana enabi, ekerepiki da ituŋanan yenejai emoyo, Kanu ipuatar numam adolitekon, Naarai epol asurup."
Hosea9:8 Enabi ŋes ekedaran loka Epuraim, Ituŋa luka Ekadeke, Konye ejai atacit naka ekalokan-akweny orotinike kere, Asurup da togo loka Ekedeke."
Hosea9:9 Amunaunos noi, kwape kapaarasia nuka Gibea: Iituni ŋesi numam adolitekec, Iticani kanuka aronisiokec."
Hosea9:10 Abu kadum Isirael kwape imusabibun kamodiŋ; Kaany lukapapaakus kwape nugeet nuka etini kokaruke losodit: Konye apotu kopotu Baal-peor, Kotiakakinos mama ejaas ileic, Koraut luketale kwape Ŋin yenikeminas."
Hosea9:11 Eporori aibuses naka Epuraim kwape kakweny; Emameun aur, ka nuejaas kakoikes, ka nuepotuunete da."
Hosea9:12 Karaida itanete idwekec alemari eoŋ kes, Komam ituŋanan ideun; Eeba, itukwi kes naanyounio kamakec!"
Hosea9:13 Kwape kaanyunia, elosikinito odwe luka Epuraim araun lumejauna: Ibusakinit Epuraim aitolomun odweke aario."
Hosea9:14 Koinaki kes, wu EJAKAIT: Anyoika nuiinakini? Koinak kes akoik naelomuni kina, ka ikisin lucokito."
Hosea9:15 Ejai aronisikec kere Giligal; Kaŋina ber kalai kes: Kanuka aronis naka aswamisiokec Ereŋeari kes kotogoka: Mam bobo amina kes; Ipalioko ikapolokokec kere.
Hosea9:16 Inomio Epuraim, erinyor aliasitikec, Mam eraete araito; Eebo, karaida euriete, Aari eoŋ idwekec luminan."
Hosea9:17 Eeakari kes Ekadeke, Naarai mam apotu kopuputu ŋes: Eraunos ikeiobirak kotoma atekerin."
Hosea10:1 Erai Isirael emusabibu loigananai, Loijaikini akeraito: Kwape epuatar araitoke, eyatanak ŋes! kwape kwaŋin itemwanake: Kwape ajokuunia akwapuke, etojokia kwape kwaŋin ipirinoke,"
Hosea10:2 Iŋalas ikecetauon; Kwana kitelekasi akiro: Ebili ŋesi itemwanakec, Emudiari ipirinokec."
Hosea10:3 Abeit ebalasi ebe, “Emamei oni ekabaka: Naarai mam kiyonit EJAKAIT; Ekabaka da, anyoika nuepedori ncsi aiswamakin oni?”"
Hosea10:4 Inerasi akiro nuutai, Iyapoete nuka aiŋal itutuketc aitutuketa: Tape elomuni etube kwape eduan lokaisorit Kaloboi nuka emanikor,"
Hosea10:5 Emaranete luibojete koSamaria Kanuka itaok yenika Bet-aben: Naarai ibworos iketuŋa ŋes, Edelorete ikesasedotin kanuke, Naarai anyou aibusesuke kamaken,"
Hosea10:6 Edakario da mama ejai Asuria Araun ainakinet naka ekabaka Yareb: Irumete Epuraim ileje, Ileicikini da Isirael ainerunike,"
Hosea10:7 Samaria da, egelario ekabakake, Kwape akuletait naka akito kakipi."
Hosea10:8 Emudiario da aiboisio nuiceleleete nuka Aben, Aronis naka Isirael: Elomuni ekukwai ka esukukurut kotemwanakee; Ebalasi kesi ironan ebe, Koraparai sio; Ka iukon du ebe, Kibirunos mamakosi."
Hosea10:9 Wu Isirael, idiaka ijo ageun kapaarasia nuka Gibea: Apotu kobwaata kaŋina; Kinyek ejie adolokin idwe luka numam adolit koGibea.’"
Hosea10:10 Naakotor, alecori kes; Etukokinos ituŋa asurokin kes, Naeleeorere kanuka adiaketakec aarei."
Hosea10:11 Erai Epuraim ataok naetuutoorio, Naemina aicom; Abu kalelenite emurisinike loitemelel: Konye kwana ebwaikini Epuraim ajookot; Ekoriei Yuda, etwai Yakob."
Hosea10:12 Koyeikinos adolit, Kosakata araito nuka amin; Kilobos alup nuiyenito, Naarai adol apak amoot EJAKAIT, Aitodol naebunio ijesi aisitepikini yes adolit,"
Hosea10:13 Ipotu kokorioto aronis, Isakata numam adolit; Inyamata araito nuka aiŋalanut; Naarai ipotu komunokinos ekusirot, Ka aipues da naka ikiriginikus."
Hosea10:14 Aso enyouni ecelet kotunakon, Eŋatario ireriakon kere luegogoŋ, Kwape keŋataria Saluman Bet-arabel kapaaran naka ejie: Ipicipicitai nukatoto ka idwekec."
Hosea10:15 Wu ekek loka Isirael, kikwaikinio yes kwaŋin, Kanuka aronisikon naepol noi: Egelario cut ekabaka loka Isirael ecila kide."
Hosea11:1 Naaraar Isirael ikoku, abu kamina ŋes, Kanyarau ikakoku anyoun koMisiri."
Hosea11:2 Kwape anyaraere kes, Kwape kwaŋin ekunyariata; Koinanakinete Ibaalim asuban, Kisupuronokinete lukisupurununo aputosia nuegerer,"
Hosea11:3 Konye kesisianak Epuraim alosit; Katunite kes kakaninika; Konye mam apotu kojenut ebe etanalcu kes.
Hosea11:4 Kebwos kaunoi nuka etuŋanan, kaeneta nuka amin; Kasubite kama ejaas bala nul luelacete arukana kabokonyakee, Kebwaik inyamat kakonyenekec,"
Hosea11:5 Eboŋorete ke si akwap nako Misiri; Konye eraun Eyasuriat ekabakakec, Naarai aneroto aboŋun mamakan."
Hosea11:6 Edoikini ekileŋ oreriake, Enyami da atiketake kodau, Kanuka ainerunikee bonik,"
Hosea11:7 Abolosi ikatuŋa itauon ajurusiar anyoun kaneajai: Karaida kenyaritai neejai ŋol loejai kuju, Mam idio da yenecamunit aitopoloor."
Hosea11:8 Kaialakini jo biai, Epuraim? Kakorakini biai, Isirael? Ketuluori jo biai bala Aduma? Kebwaikini biai bala Seboim? Ebelokin ekatau kotoma, anoku akaitim."
Hosea11:9 Mam etodolikini akanyunyura naededen, Mam aboŋuni amudiar Epuraim: Naarai arai eoŋ Edeke, kwabo mam arai etuŋanan; Ekalaunan loejai kidinikon: Mam abuni amudiar."
Hosea11:10 Etuparete rwaru EJAKAIT, Loegatuni bala eŋatuny; Naarai egatuni, epote da idwe emaranete koto."
Hosea11:11 Epote emaranete kwape akweny naebuni ko Misiri, Kwape ebunio ajele kakwap naka Asuria; Ido inera EJAKAIT ebe, Esiboikini kes otogoikec,"
Hosea11:12 Kesirimorit eoŋ Epuraim kainal, Ka ekek da loka Isirael kaimod: Konye eroko Yuda igesitoi kaneejai Edeke, Ido erai lomunot kaneejai Ekalaunan."
Hosea12:1 Edak Epuraim ekwam, Etupit ekwam lokokide: Iyatanakini tiritir aiŋal ka aimod; Itutukete kAsuria, eyanaario akinyet Misiri."
Hosea12:2 Ejai EJAKAIT aŋolopa ka Yuda, Iticani Yakob kwape ejaatar iponesioke; Itepeseni ŋes kwape ejaatar aswamisioke."
Hosea12:3 Kakoik abu kitin onaceke katitibat; Ido kekurunan koutas ka Edeke:
Hosea12:4 Eebo, koutas kemalaika, kipiko: Komony akiyo, kinaina ŋes: Kiriamunos ka Edeke koBet-el, Kaŋina da kinera Edeke kaŋes."
Hosea12:5 Ŋes EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ajoresio; EJAKAIT ŋes ekekiror."
Hosea12:6 Aso do kibelokin ijo mama ejai Ekonideke; Korieite aitim ka etube, Kidareununei tiritir Ekonideke."
Hosea12:7 Ekagwelanaran, itinit aininesio nuka aiŋal kakanike: Emina aimod."
Hosea12:8 Abala Epuraim ebe, “Abeit abar eoŋ, adum abar”: Konye mam abarake kere edauni aronis naadiaka ŋesi."
Hosea12:9 Naarai arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekonideke Anyoun kakwap nako Misiri; Esiboikini bobo yes oweman, Kwape kapaarasia nuka epucit lokaiyamakina."
Hosea12:10 Abu eoŋ kener da kinabin, Eoŋ ŋes eyatakini aitapoeta, Kainak awaragasia kama ka inabin."
Hosea12:11 Arai ejaas numam adolit toma Gilead, Abeit eraunos aamameak; Arai einakinete imoŋin lutoba koGiligal, Eraunos itemwanakec atukon nuka amor Kaloboi nuka emanikor."
Hosea12:12 Abu Yakob koker omanikor loka Aram, Kijaanak Isirael adumunia aberu, Kicokiei amerekekin adumunia aberu.’"
Hosea12:13 Kitolom EJAKAIT Isirael koMisiri kenabi, Kidarenenei enabi kes."
Hosea12:14 Etunyunyurik Epuraim noi noi: Kanuka nun kobeata ŋes akeokot, Inyakakini EJAKAIT ŋes akemorosit."
Hosea13:1 Nakeneria Epuraim, kojai amaran; Kitopoloor koIsirael; Konye nakegwaunia akirot kanuka Baal, kotwana."
Hosea13:2 Kwana da iyatanakinos adiakanar, Eswamaut aputosia nueealara nuka epuesakec, Kes aputosia kwape ejaat aijenikec, Kes kete aswam naka luepiriaka: Enerasi nukec ebe, Konuata ca ituŋa lueinakinete asuban itak."
Hosea13:3 Kanuka ŋun eraunos kwape elisina loka atupuruc Kwape akopyo nuisunyito ailicar, Kwape agugu nuekutari etapipirio kopejal, Kwape apuru da naelomuni kapedot."
Hosea13:4 Konye arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekonideke Anyoun kakwap nako Misiri; Mam ijeni ecedeke dimarai eoŋ, Emamei da ecetiaemar eoŋ ekal"
Hosea13:5 Abu kajen jo kamodiŋ Kakwap naka akure naepol.
Hosea13:6 Kwape kedakananatar kimonianakinos; Kimonikinos kitopoloor ekecetau: Tape imurwokinete eoŋ,"
Hosea13:7 Kanuka nun araun eoŋ kwape eŋatuny kamakec: Edari korot kwape eris:
Hosea13:8 Kiriamakin kakes kwape adubu naademaritai idweke, Apoopooi atorobukec: Kaŋina da anyami kes kwape eŋatuny; Epoopooi kes etiaŋ loka ais."
Hosea13:9 Kamudiari jo, Isirael; Iŋai bo kinarakini?"
Hosea13:10 Ali bo ekabakakon, tetere kitaiari jo koreriakon kere? Ka ikatubokokon da luibala ijo ebe, “Koinakinai eoŋ ekabaka ka ikapolok?”"
Hosea13:11 Abu kainanak jo ikabakan kanyunyuraka, Abu kalema kes kaisiopoka."
Hosea13:12 Eenitai numam adolit nuka Epuraim; Inadakinitai akeronis.
Hosea13:13 Ebunokini ŋes ariebo naka aberu naidouni; Erai okoku loemamei acoa; Naarai kwana iyapi airukum okek loka akoik.
Hosea13:14 Ageli kereka eoŋ kes kapedor naka ates? Alakuni kereka kes katwanare? Wu ju atwanare, ai bo ejai atularikon? Wu jo ates ai bo ejai amudiarikon? Ibwaitai aitoronikin kakonyeneka."
Hosea13:15 Karaida euriara ŋesi koinacanake, Ebuni ekwam lokokide, Ekwam loka EJAKAIT loebuni kamodiŋ, Eonikini atanike, eonikini da eeoake: Enatarl ŋesi aiŋadisia nuka iboro kere luisiyalamikinito."
Hosea13:16 Ibwoki Samaria akeronis; Naarai ipaliikinit Ekedeke: Etwakete kekilen; Ipicipicio imukerunukec, Enerereo aŋorokec nuepotiet"
Hosea14:1 Wu jo Isirael, kobonu mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke; Naarai ibiror kanwnam adolitekon."
Hosea14:2 Koyanau akiro, kobonu mama ejai EJAKAIT: Kolimok ŋes ebe, “Kolema numam adolit kere, Kocam nuejok: Kasodete isio ainakin aiturit naka aitukekosi."
Hosea14:3 Mam Asuria kitaiari sio: Mam bobo kibwaneni ibalasin: Ido mam bobo kilimokini aswam naka akaninikosi ebe, ‘Yes ikosidekesio.’ Naarai kotomakon ŋes edumuniata ikokiok aitim.”"
Hosea14:4 Etaŋaleuni eoŋ akecejurusianar kau, Amina kes atitai: Naarai ebelokin akanyunyura kamakec."
Hosea14:5 Araun eoŋ kwape akopyo mama ejai Isirael: Ituroi kwape aapeeel, Isiarakini akelias kwape Lebanon."
Hosea14:6 Igananaete atenunake, Ajokisike da eputokini eseitun, Auresike kwape Lebanon."
Hosea14:7 Eboŋunete ŋul luibojete otolimike; Ikwarunete kwape akima, Ituroete kwape emusabibu: Eraun auresike kwape ebino loka Lebanon."
Hosea14:8 Wu Epuraim, anyoika eoŋ kaputosia? Aboŋokini eoŋ, aseseni da ŋes: Arai eoŋ kwape eberos loepalal; Kamakaŋ ŋes idumununia araitokon."
Hosea14:9 Ŋin yenikacoa, kinoosikini ŋun, Yenicobe da kojenu kes, Naarai itenara irotin luka EJAKAIT, Itorenenete da ikadolitok tomakec; Konye iguikinete luepaarete."
Joel1:1 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naabu kobu mama ejai Yoel okoku loka Petuel.
Joel1:2 Kiirasi na, yes imakio, Kitoikis aki yes kere luibojete kakwap. Abu kereka na kojaun kapaarasiakus, Arai bo kapaarasia nuka lukapapakus?"
Joel1:3 Kolimokisi yesi ikusidwe, Ikusidwe da kolimokis idwekec, Ka idwekec da atur ace."
Joel1:4 Luedeuni ogagul, anyam emaase; Luedeuni emaase anyam enyede; Luedeuni enyede anyam ekutelek."
Joel1:5 Kokwenyutu, yes ikamerak, komonya; Kodelosi, yes kere ikamatak ajon, Kanuka ajon nuwinyiwiny; Naarai ademaritai kaitukekus."
Joel1:6 Naarai ebunokinit ateker akwapuka, Naegogoŋ, namam unano; Esubito ikelake bala ikela luka eŋatuny, Ejaas itirikada luka aŋatuny."
Joel1:7 Etoono ekamusabibu, abil etinika: Erega eut, aeaka; Etwakaŋ atenunake."
Joel1:8 Kokuudian kwape abekot naenapit epuko Kanuka okilenike loka atumunike.
Joel1:9 Ademaritai ainakinet naka akiria ka ainakinet da namalat Kotogo loka EJAKAIT; Ibworos isasedotin, Ikejaanakinak luka EJAKAIT."
Joel1:10 Eswap emanikor, ibworo akwap; Naarai eswapata akima, Aoko ajon nukitetiak, Eŋoŋar akinyet."
Joel1:11 Kileicikisi, okwe yes ikakoriok, Kodelosi, okwe yes ikaeapak imusabibun, Kanuka akima ka esairi; Naarai aolio aidweny naka emanikor."
Joel1:12 Arinyo emusabibu, eŋoŋar elini; Arinyoto ekamamaga, ka eidukudukut, ka emucugwa, Ikito kere da lukomanikor: Naarai arinyo ailel kodwe luka ituŋa."
Joel1:13 Konapata ipukoi, kokuudianata, yes isasedotin; Kodelosi, yes ikejaanakinak luka etem. Kopotu, koperoto opukoi akuare kia, Yes ikejaanakinak luka Ekadeke: Naarai imikitai ainakinet naka akiria ka ainakinet namatat, Kotogo loka Edekekus."
Joel1:14 Kitalaut ailuŋ, konyaraut atukokin nakalaunan, Kotukonokinos imakio ka luibojete kakwap kere Kotogo loka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, Komonyata mama ejai EJAKAIT."
Joel1:15 Itukwi apaaran ŋin! Naarai aapu apaaran naka EJAKAIT, Ebuni kwape amudiar kaneejai Lokapedor kere."
Joel1:16 Mam kereka ademaritai inyamat kakonyenewok, Eebo, ailel ka aiyalama kotogo loka Edekewok?"
Joel1:17 Ebosete ikinyom kaloboi; Esilioros idulai, Ebilio itujai; Naarai arinyoto akima."
Joel1:18 Idinyasi ca ma itiaŋ! Biurununito isipanin luka ibaren, Naarai emameete kes inya luedakas; Eebo, itisilio isipanin luka amerekekin."
Joel1:19 Wu EJAKAIT, amonyi eoŋ mama ijai: Naarai edopo akim ironyia luka amodiŋ, Ecweata aipelonoreta ikito kere luka ais,"
Joel1:20 Eebo, iyeŋiyeŋas itiaŋ luka ais mama ijai: Naarai aokoto icileta luka akipi, Edopo akim ironyia luka amodiŋ."
Joel2:1 Kokuta yesi arupepe koSion, Kilalaata komoruka lokalaunan; Komaranata kere luibojete kakwap: Naarai ebunit apaaran naka EJAKAIT, naarai aapu:"
Joel2:2 Apaaran naka amuton ka anyikilil, Apaaran naka idouon ka amuton naeiesi cucucuc, Kwape ecilar kide koronan; Etuŋat loepol loegogoŋ, Ageun apeŋo amamei loaputos kanol, Mam rwaru bobo ejaun lueputos kakes, Kiton ikar luka aturio nuipu."
Joel2:3 Idopori akim koiŋarenekee; Kokaukee da enokete aipelonoreta, Esubit akwap bala emanikor loka Eden koiŋarenekec, Kokaukec da amodiŋ nailaronon; Eebo, emamei da loabu koku kamakec."
Joel2:4 Atakanukec eputos bala atakan naka ibalasin; Ekerete kwape ikebwanenok.
Joel2:5 Esomanaros kwape eeelet loka agalin, Kaidiasia nuka ironan, Kwape ecelet loka aipelonoreta nuka akim Naidopori ariaŋ, Kwape ituŋa lukagogon luiderakinos ejie."
Joel2:6 Eriebas atekerin noi kakonyenekec: Ijulakinos akonyenekee kere.
Joel2:7 Ekerete kwape ituŋa lukirigin; Edokete arwatat kwape ikajiok; Eraei ninitunanan korotoke, Komam iieranakinos,"
Joel2:8 Mam ediopet eremori loce; Eraei ninidioper korotoke: Etiakete kesi luiiis komam itikokinio.
Joel2:9 Esomanaros ore; Ekerete karwatat; Edokanarete otogoi; Elomanarete kadirisan kwape ekokolan.
Joel2:10 Ŋaŋakin akwap koinarenikec; Emarani akuj. Amutonor akoloŋ ka elap, Enyakasi aacer aicakec."
Joel2:11 Elimuni EJAKAIT ekeporoto koinaren kajoreke; Naarai ipu iidukurunuke; Naarai egogoŋ ŋesi loitodoli akekirot: Naarai epol apaaran naka EJAKAIT, nakanosibib naepol; Iŋai bo epedori abwoikin?"
Joel2:12 Konye ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Kibelokinos yesi mama ajai Kitauonokus kere, Kailun, ka aimony akiyo, ka aibworo:"
Joel2:13 Koeila itauonokus, kwabo mere inapenekus.” Kibelokinos mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekusideke: Naarai esiana ŋesi, ileleba aitim, Iyapi anyunyurikin, ebarara aitim, Iituni kinyek aronis,"
Joel2:14 Iŋai bo ejeŋi arai motoko ibelokin, Iituni, inyeini arereŋ kokauke, Ainakiner naka akiria ka ainakinet namatat da Mama ejai EJAKAIT Ekusideke?"
Joel2:15 Kokuta arupepe koSion, Kitalaut ailuŋ, Konyarautu atukonokin nakalaunan;"
Joel2:16 Korukonokis ituŋa, Kitalaut ekodet, Kinotut imakio, Kotukonokis idwe, Ka luenakete ikisin: Kolom eteran kagolake, Ka ateran da kotoma igolake."
Joel2:17 Komonyata isasedotin akiyo, Ikejaanakinak luka EJAKAIT, Kokidin kaneelomarere ka etem, Kotemasi atiar, “Kideu ikonituŋa, wu EJAKAIT, Sirikiinak airumetekon araun amorosit, Ka agaracio kotoma atekerin: Kanukinyo etemariata kesi katekerin ebe, ‘Ai bo ejai Ekecedeke?’”"
Joel2:18 Kosodi EJAKAIT aikokotikin kanuka akwapuke, Kitim iketuŋa."
Joel2:19 Koboŋok EJAKAIT iketuŋa ebe, “Koany, kejukakini yes Akima ka ebino, ka akinyet, Kisimonete yes: Mam bobo ketarauni yes amorosit katekerin."
Joel2:20 “Konye esukunyari mama elwana Ajore naka agolitomei, Ereŋeari ŋ es akwap nailaronon, naesil, Ikenarenokoke kotoma aŋolol nakokide, Ka ikagolokoke kotoma aŋolol nakoto; Elomuni auresike, Elomuni da abosusuke naeur tulutul, Naarai eswama nuepolok."
Joel2:21 “Sirikikurianar, ijo akwap, Kiyalamikin, kolakar; Naarai eswama EJAKAIT nuepolok."
Joel2:22 Sirikikuriakaros, yes itiaŋ luka ais; Naarai ebwaŋunete ironyia luka amodiŋ, Naarai erai ekitoi araitoke, Ejaikini etini ka emusabibu agogonukec,"
Joel2:23 “Aso do kiyalamikinos, yes idwe luka Sion, Kolakaros kotoma EJAKAIT Ekusideke: Naarai kiinakini ŋ esi akiru naka aiporo naedolit, Isitepakini yes akiru, Akiru naka aiporo, ka akiru naka akamu, Kwape lem sek."
Joel2:24 “Ilelebunos ipejala akima, Ilapanaros ebino ka akinyet kotoma akaalakanya."
Joel2:25 Enyakakini eoŋ yes ikar luanyam emaase, Ka enyede, ka ekutelek, ka ogagul, Akaiore naepol naejukunit mamakus."
Joel2:26 “Inyamete yesi amio, imonikinos, Iturete ekiror loka EJAKAIT Ekusideke, Lokiswamak yes nukaumokin: Mam bobo ikatuŋa ileicikinete."
Joel2:27 Ŋenunete ebe ajai eoŋ kotoma Isirael, Eoŋ arai EJAKAIT Ekusideke, emamei ece kere: Mam bobo ikatuŋa ileicikinete."
Joel2:28 “Kosodi kanen akaulo kanun, Abukokini ekamoyo kere luejaas awat, Edwarete idwekus lusap ka lupesur, Iruiaete ikusimakio airuiasia, Eanyunete ikusikatumunak aitapoeta."
Joel2:29 Bobo da kapaarasia kanun Abukokini ekamoyo obulesin ka abulesin.
Joel2:30 “Etodikini nukaumokin toma akuj, kotoma akwap da, aokot, ka akim, ka ipirin luka apuru."
Joel2:31 Eluor akoloŋ amuton, ka elap da araun aokot, korina edoluno apaaran nakos ka nakanosibib naka EJAKAIT."
Joel2:32 Kosodi kanen, itajaruunos kere luiwoneete ekiror loka EJAKAIT; naarai komoru Sion ka Yerusalem eiaunete luekuete, kwape enerar EJAKAIT, kotoma aatoŋot da ŋul luenyarauni EJAKAIT."
Joel3:1 “Naarai, koany, kapaarasia kakwa, kapak kaya da, naenyakunia luejoreoritai luka Yuda ka Yerusalem,"
Joel3:2 atukonokini atekerin kere, ayauni kes aditot naka Yekosapat; apurokini kakes kanuka ikatuŋa ka akairumet Isirael, luapotu kesi kisiarakis katekerin, ka akorokor da akakwap."
Joel3:3 Apotu kilamilamata eroet kanuka ikatuŋa: ainakis esapat itia naadote, agwelasi apese itia ajon, tetere kes emasete."
Joel3:4 “Eebo, inyoika kereka yesi kaneajai eoŋ? Ŋo Turo, ka Sidon, ka akwapin kere nuka Pilisitia? Kitacakinete kereka eoŋ eropit? Ido arai kitaeakinete eoŋ, kesunyak eoŋ ainyakakin atipet akwesikus nuipotu kiswamata,"
Joel3:5 Naarai ipotu koyanaasi epuesaka, ka esabuka, kodakasi iboroka luejok luisiyalamikinito abilaikus."
Joel3:6 Ipotu kogwelasi da idwe luka Yuda ka idwe luka Yerusalem mama ejaas Iyonanin, tetere eyaŋaarete kes kama elwana koikorunokec."
Joel3:7 Koany, esidiki kes aitonyoun kaibois naipotu kogwelas kes, enyakakini nuipotu kiswamata akwesikus,"
Joel3:8 Agwelari ikusidwe lusap ka lupesur akanin nuka idwe luka Yuda, kes da egwelarete kes mama ejaas ituŋa luka Seba, ateker naelwana: naarai ener EJAKAIT.”"
Joel3:9 Kolimonokis ŋun katekerin; Kokapakinos ejie; Kisidikis ituŋa lukirigin; Kikunyutu ikajiok kere, kopotu."
Joel3:10 Kotatata imelekesikus aituluor ikileŋa, Ka ieilikikinikus lukidimet aituluor akwaras: Kolimok loenonok ebe, “Agogoŋ eoŋ.”"
Joel3:11 Kisunyito yesi, kopotu, Yes atekerin kere nuirimorito, Kotukonokinos: Kitodok ikagogoŋokokon, wu EJAKAIT."
Joel3:12 Konyout atekerin, Kopotu aditot naka Yekosapat; Naarai eboikin kanen Atubokin atekerin kere nuirimorito."
Joel3:13 Kodumutu ecilikiki, naarai akono aidweny: Kopotu kipudapudata, naarai ileleba aicues. Ilapanaros akaalakanya, Naarai epol aronisikec."
Joel3:14 Ikodeta, ikodeta, kotoma aditot naka etube! Naarai eapiei apaaran naka EJAKAIT, Kaditot naka etube."
Joel3:15 Amutonor akoloŋ ka elap, Enyakasi da aacer aicakec."
Joel3:16 Egatuni EJAJCAIT koSion, Elimuni ekeporoto koYerusalem; Ŋaniiaŋun akuj ka akwap, Konye eraun EJAKAIT aŋopis naka ituŋake, Ka abwas da mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael."
Joel3:17 “Kwaŋin iienunete yesi ebe arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekusideke, Loeboie koSion emoruka lokalaunan. Kosodi Yerusalem araun Iokalaunan, Mam bobo imo itorete tomake."
Joel3:18 “Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaya, Idonete ironan ebino loewiny, Eleleete iukon akile, Eleleete da aguuruto kere nuka Yuda akipi; Elomuni atan kotogo loka EJAKAIT, Naisinauni aditot naka Sitim."
Joel3:19 “Esilior Misiri, Eraun Edom da amodiŋ naesil, Kanuka nukadeden nueswamakinitai idwe luka Yuda, Naarai abukosi aokot numam aronis kakwapukec."
Joel3:20 Konye ibojenenei Yuda ikar kere, Ka Yerusalem da kiton aturio kere."
Joel3:21 Etesegi eoŋ aokotokee numam etesegaarir, Naarai iboie EJAKAIT ko Sion.”"
Amos1:1 Akiro nuka Amos lokerai ediopet kokecokok luka Tekoa, nuabu ŋesi koany nuka Isirael kapaarasia nuka Usia ekabaka loka Yuda, kapaarasia da nuka Yeroboam okoku loka Yoas, ekabaka loka Isirael, ikar iarei eriŋa kedolo amaran naka akwap."
Amos1:2 Kotema atiar: “Egatuni EJAKAIT koSion, Elimuni ekeporoto koYerusalem; Ibworos ironyia luka ikeeokok, Erinyori aidi naka Karumel.”"
Amos1:3 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Kanuka aibucareta auni nuka Damasiko, Eebo, kanuka aoŋon, mam ejulakini aiticanioke; Naarai apotu kieomata Gilead Kiboro lukieomis luka asua."
Amos1:4 Konye ejukakini akim togo loka Kasael, Idopori itogoi lukapolou luka Ben-kadad.”"
Amos1:5 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Abili eoŋ atiket naka Damasiko, Agelari luibojete kaditot naka Aben, Ka ŋol da loitiŋit ebela loka ajakanut kotogo loka Eden: Ŋoreorio ituŋa luka Suria kiton Kir,”"
Amos1:6 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Kanuka aibucareta auni nuka Gasa, Eebo, kanuka aoŋon, mam ejulakini aiticanioke; Naarai ejoreosi ituŋa kere, Aijaikin kes Edom."
Amos1:7 Konye ejukakini akim arwatat naka Gasa, Idopori itogoike lukapolou.”"
Amos1:8 Ebala EJAKAIT Edeke ebe, “Agelari luibojete koAsudod, Ka ŋol da loitinit ebela loka ajakanut koAsukelon; Ebelokini akanika asurokin Ekuron, Eoliori aatoŋot naka Ipilisitian.”"
Amos1:9 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Kanuka aibucareta auni nuka Turo, Eebo, kanuka aoŋon, mam ejulakini aiticanioke: Naarai apotu kijaikis Edom ituŋa kere, Mam apotu kiitutu aitutuket naka einacane."
Amos1:10 Konye ejukakini akim arwatat naka Turo, Idopori itogoike lukapolou.”"
Amos1:11 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Kanuka aibucareta auni nuka Edom, Eebo, kanuka aoŋon, mam eiulakini aiticanioke; Naarai abu korukitor onaceke kekilen, Koeaka aitim kere, Koresianar akeisiop tiritir, Koric akenyunyura ikar kere."
Amos1:12 Konye ejukakini eoŋ Teman akim, Idopori itogoi lukapolou luka Bosura.”"
Amos1:13 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Kanuka aibucareta auni nuka idwe luka Amon, Eebo, kanuka aoŋon, mam ejulakini aiticanioke; Naarai apotu konerereata aŋor nuepotiete nuka Gilead, Tetere italalaete eikorukee."
Amos1:14 Konye enokokini akim arwatat naka Raba, Idopori itogoike lukapolou, Kecelet kapaaran naka ejie, Ka ekwam da kapaaran naka etapipirio.”"
Amos1:15 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Elosi ekabakakec aijoreorio, ŋes nepepe ka ikapolokoke kere.”"
Amos2:1 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Kanuka aibucareta auni nuka Moab, Eebo, kanuka aoŋon, mam ejulakini aiticanioke; Naarai abu kiewe akoio nuka ekabaka loka Edom koraut ekurwon."
Amos2:2 Konye ejukakini Moab akim, Idopori itogoi lukapolou luka Keriot; Etwani Moab kelulu ka ecelet, Ka eporoto da loka arupepe.”"
Amos2:3 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Agelari ekatubon kokidinike, Aari ikapolokoke kere nepepe kaŋes.”"
Amos2:4 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Kanuka aibucareta auni nuka Yuda, Eebo, kanuka aoŋon, mam eiulakini aiticanioke; Naarai aneroto ekisil loka EJAKAIT, Mam apotu korieito akeicorakineta, Kitapaa kes ainalakec, Naatupenenete lukapapaakec."
Amos2:5 Konye ejukakini Yuda akim, Idopori itogoi lukapolou luka Yerusalem.”"
Amos2:6 Ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Kanuka aibucareta auni nuka Isirael, Eebo, kanuka aoŋon, mam ejulakini aitieanioke; Naarai egwelanarete ikadoliton kanuka epuesa, Ka yenikiean da kanuka amuk."
Amos2:7 Luipudapudaete akwes nuka lukican kotoma apua nuka alup, Lueremorete awai erot loka luitasonos: Elomanarete etuŋanan ka papake mama ejai apese, Aitisil ekakiror lokalaunan."
Amos2:8 Erioros eiduny kanolitem konapen luademasi araut aititineta, Ido toma togo loka Edekekee emasete ebino Loka ŋul luaponi kitegelai."
Amos2:9 “Konye abu eoŋ kamudia Emorait kakonyenekee, Kosubite akeoiau bala aojau naka iresia, Kogogon bala iluan; Konye abu kamudia araitoke kokuju, Ka aliasike da kokwap."
Amos2:10 Ido abu eoŋ ketolom yes kakwap nako Misiri, Kenarenik yes ikar akaisaoŋon kamodiŋ, Aisurum akwap naka Emorait."
Amos2:11 Abu eoŋ kadakak odwekus araun inabin, Ikusikatumunak da araun Inasirin.” Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Wu yes idwe luka Isirael, Mam kereka ekote nen?"
Amos2:12 “Konye ipotu koinakis Inasirin ebino aimat; Ipotu kieorakis inabin ebe, ‘Sirikidwarata.’"
Amos2:13 “Koany, aridakini yes kaiboisikus, Kwape eridakinor agali naileleba iisutan,"
Amos2:14 Etwaniari loetirono aŋopis, Mam lokagogonon itogogoni akegogoŋ, Karaida lokirigi aitajar akeijar."
Amos2:15 Loikesi akabwa mam ebwoi; Loetirono kakeje da mam eyuuni bon: Loibwaneni ebalasit da mam itaiari akeiiar.’
Amos2:16 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Ŋol da loetitin kotoma lukirigin Ekeri emuialal kapaaran kaŋin.’"
Amos3:1 Kiirasi akirot na nakinerak yes EJAKAIT, wu idwe luka Isirael, ka ajen kere naetonyouni alemun kakwap nako Misiri kabala ebe:"
Amos3:2 “Yes bonik abu kaien kajenasinei kere nuka akwap: ŋes ketieania yes kanuka numam adolitekus kere.
Amos3:3 “Epedorete kereka iarei aup, Arai mam imorikikina?"
Amos3:4 Egat kereka eŋatuny kamagoro, Komam emejaunit? Ikuna kereka iŋatuny kotoma abuake, Arai mam ikamunit ibore?"
Amos3:5 Epedori kereka akweny aipok kokwap, Komam elokitai elabwata? Ejetakin kereka aloket kokwap, Arai mam ipokit ibore?"
Amos3:6 Ekutakinio kereka arupepe kore, Komam ituŋa ekuriakaros? Edoikin kereka aronis ore, Arai mam EJAKAIT eycŋaunit?"
Amos3:7 Abeit emameete nuiswamai EJAKAIT Edeke, Dimarai epukokinit ikebulesin inabin akeiyeiyea."
Amos3:8 Agatu eŋatuny; Iŋai bo mam ekurianar? Ener EJAKAIT Edeke, Iŋai bo ekurwokini aidwar?”"
Amos3:9 Kolimonosi kotogoi luka Asudod, Kotogoi da kakwap nako Misiri, Kineras atiar, “Kotukonokinos koroŋan luka Samaria, Koanyut iceleta luetia nen lueiaas toma, Ka imwaŋito da kwape ejaatar kidiŋ nen.”"
Amos3:10 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Naarai mam ejenete aswam naejok, ŋul luinadaete epali ka aiŋat kotogoikec.”"
Amos3:11 Ŋes inerar EJAKAIT Edeke kwanata ebe: “Ejaun lokasurup, airiamar akwap iwaitin kere: Itojoni akonigogoŋ, Eŋasio da ikonitogoi lukapolou.”"
Amos3:12 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT ebe:” Kwape edemunia ekecokon akeie aarei arai itutubet yenikakit kaituk naka eŋatuny; eyuunio kwaŋin idwe luka lsirael luibojete koSamaria kotoma agor naka aperis, ka aicolonisio nuka aliiri nukotut.”"
Amos3:13 Inera EJAKAIT Edeke, Edeke loka aioresio ebe: “Kiirasi, koraut ikaienak kokek loka Yakob."
Amos3:14 Naarai kapaaran naeticania Isirael adiakanaretake, Eticani da itemwan luka Bet-el, Eiepio da amumwar nuka etem, Kibirokinos kwap.”"
Amos3:15 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Atiyakini etogo loka aiporo, ka etogo da loka akamu; Eoliorete itogoi luka ikel luka etom, Enaŋete da itogoi lukapolou.”"
Amos4:1 “Kopupokis akirot na, yes aituk nuka Basan, Nuejaas oronot loka Samaria, Nueroikinito lukican, nueeuete luilwaritos, Nuebalas ijakakec ebe, C Koyautu, kamata!’"
Amos4:2 Abu EJAKAIT Edeke kiyapo kolimit alauniteke ebe, Koany, kibunokinete yes apaarasia, Kilemario kigolun, Ka nuedeunos kayesi kilemario kigolun luka ikaokak.”"
Amos4:3 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Ilomarete karorwaitin, Ŋinidiopet kakonyencke, Kiremokinio Karumon."
Amos4:4 “Kopotu Bet-el kodiakasi; Giligal da, kiyatanakis aidiak; Koyaununut asubanakus ŋinitupuruc, Ka idiopet kaŋulutomon ŋunupaarasia auni."
Amos4:5 Kisupurikis asubanit naka aimal naka yenitubuunitoi, Kolimosi ainakineta nuka akote korama kes.” Ebala EJAKAIT Edeke ebe, “Naarai ŋun kitojokito yesi, wu yes idwe luka Isirael.”"
Amos4:6 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Kainak eoŋ yes alaunit naka ikel koreriakus kere, Ka amamus da inyamat kaiboisiokus kere: Kwabo mam ipotu koboŋut neajai eoŋ.”"
Amos4:7 “Etikok eoŋ da akiru kamakus, Koroko esalito ilapio iuni adolokin aisak: Esitepanakini ere ediopet, Mam esitepanakini ere ece; Kotepenenei akiru aibois adiopet, Koono da aibois namam etepenenei akiru."
Amos4:8 Kirimenenete ireria iarei arai iuni Mama ejai ere ediopet aimat akipi, Mam imonianakinos.” Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Konye mam ipotu kobonut neaiai eoŋ."
Amos4:9 “Kenom ‘yes ketapipirio ka airouroun: Anyam ogagul aipues naka imanikoriakus, Ka amanatakus nuka emusabibu, Ka ikitokus da luka itinin ka iseitunun.” Ebala EJAKAIT ebe: “Konye mam ipotu kobonut neaiai eoŋ."
Amos4:10 “Kejukak yes atular koipone loko Misiri: Aar ikusikatumunak kekilen, Ayanaa ikusibalasin; Ketodok aures naka iidukurunukus okumesikus.” Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Konye mam ipotu kobonut neajai eoŋ."
Amos4:11 “Ebiro ice kayesi, Kwape ebiroria Edeke Sodom ka Gomora, Kosubito yesi bala akalas naalemuna kakim.” Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Konye mam ipotu kobonut neajai eoŋ."
Amos4:12 “Kanuka nun keswamakini jo nuikote nen, ijo Isirael; Ido naarai keswamakini jo nun, ijo Isirael, Kitemokin aisiriama Ekonideke!”"
Amos4:13 Naarai koany, ŋol loilunuluni ironan, loesubi ekwam, Loelimokini ituŋanan aomisioke, Loituluori atupurue amuton, Loicakacakai da aiboisio nukokuju nuka akwap; EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ajoresio, ŋes ekekiror."
Amos5:1 Ŋo ekek loka Isirael, kiira akirot na, Naenera eoŋ akuudian joo"
Amos5:2 “Ebiror abekot naka Isirael; Mam enyouni bobo: Alatakin alupoke; Emamei yenitonyouni.”
Amos5:3 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT Edeke kwanata ebe: “Ere loalomunia elukumit, Ideunos akwatat, Ŋol da loalomunia akwatat, Ideunos itomon, Lukokek loka Isirael.”"
Amos5:4 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ekek loka Isirael kwanata ebe: “Komoata eoŋ, ijarete;"
Amos5:5 Konye sirikimoata Bet-el, Karaida alomar Giligal, Sirikitoroto Beer-seba: Naarai abeit elosi Giligal aijoreorio, Epalun Bet-el.”"
Amos5:6 Komoata EJAKAIT, iiarete; Kinyek anokun kwape akim kokek loka Yosep, Idopori komameun yenitudeŋi kobet-el,"
Amos5:7 Yes luibelokinete etube araun adwaris, Luicakakinete adolit kwap!"
Amos5:8 Komoata ŋes lokesubi aacer Piliades ka Orion, Loibelokini etolim loka atwanare araun atupuruc, Loitumutonori apaaran kakuare; Loenyarauni akipi nuka aŋolol, Ebukokini kes toma akwap; EJAKAIT ŋes ekekiror."
Amos5:9 Enesari ŋesi lukagogonok katular, Tetere ebunokini amudiar ere loegogon."
Amos5:10 Elaete ŋin yenitoroni korute, Esacete ŋin yeninera nuitenara,"
Amos5:11 Aso do naarai ipudapudaete lokican, Itelemete ŋes akima, Ipotu kodukoto itogoi luka amor nuegerer, Konye mam iboiete kotoma; Ipotu kiraata amanat nuejok nuka emusabibu, Konye mam imasete ebinokec."
Amos5:12 Naarai ajeni kwape ipuatar aibucanaretakus, Kwape da eiliiliotor aronisiokus; Yes luiroikinete ikadolitok, Luitelemenenete ainakineta, Luiremosi luilwaritos awai korute."
Amos5:13 Kanuka ŋun ililiŋi locobe kapak kaŋin; Naarai erai apak naerono.
Amos5:14 Komoata aiokis, konye mere aronis, Tetere ijarete: Tetere ejaenena EJAKAIT, Edeke loka ajoresio kayes, Kwape kibalatar."
Amos5:15 Kolaata aronis, kominas ajokis, Kiticat etube korute: Motoko kosianak EJAKAIT, Edeke Ioka ajoresio, Aatoŋot naka Yosep,"
Amos5:16 Kanuka ŋun ebala EJAKAIT, Edeke loka aioresie, EJAKAIT, kwanata ebe: “Ejaun aimony toma asisiarin kere nuelalak; Ebalasi kotoma orotin kere ebe, ‘Wu okwe! Wu okwe!’ Enyaraunete ekakorion aibworo, Ka nul da luepiriaka akuudian, aimony.”"
Amos5:17 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Ejaun teni aimony amanat kere nuka emusabibu: Naarai etori eoŋ kidinikus.”"
Amos5:18 Itukwi yes luimielas apaaran naka EJAKAIT! Kanukinyo ikototor apaaran naka EJAKAIT? Erai kereka amuton, kwabo mere aica."
Amos5:19 Bala ekeri etuŋanan kama kenatuny, Kiriamas kedubu; Arai elomari togo kogonakin akan arwatat, Kokonyi ŋes emun."
Amos5:20 Mam kereka apaaran naka EJAKAIT eraun amuton, Kwabo mere aica? Amuton naeiesi cueucue, Naemamei amwekimwek kotoma?"
Amos5:21 “Alait, ameni ipueinokus, Kwabo mam esiyalamikinit atukonokinetakus nukaiyamakina."
Amos5:22 Eebo, karaida iinakinete eoŋ ainakinetakus nuieweio ka ainakineta nuka akiria, Mam acamuni kes: Mam da etei ainakinetakus nuka ainapakin Nuka itianikus luetarioko."
Amos5:23 Kolema ca ijo eporoto loka ikososineikon; Naarai aneri apupun aruo naka adeudeunokon,"
Amos5:24 Konye kolelei etube kwape akipi, Ka adolit da kwape aguurut naelelei ikar kere."
Amos5:25 “Ijo ekek loka Isirael, ipotu kereka koinut eoŋ asuban ka ainakineta kamodiŋ ikar akaisaoŋon?"
Amos5:26 Eebo, ipotu kodakata Sikut ekabakakus ka Kaiwan aputosiakus, aacerit naka edekekus, loipotu kiswamaut.”"
Amos5:27 Ebala EJAKAIT, loerai ekekiror Edeke loka aioresio ebe, “Kanuka ŋun, ainakini yes aijoreoreo juwai Damasiko.”"
Amos6:1 “Itukwi kes luebwalara koSion, Ka kes da Iuiiamamaete koronat loka Samaria, Lueienas luka nakapolon naka atekerin, Luepote lukokek loka Isirael mamakec!"
Amos6:2 Kobeata yesi Kalune, koanyutu; Koloto anyoun kanen kiton Kamat lokapolon: Kosodete koloto Gat loka Ipilisitian: Ejokuka kereka kesi aitelekarit ajakanuto nu? Arai ca epol eikorukec aitelekarit eikorukus,"
Amos6:3 Yes luitwalanete apaaran naerono, Luisukunyunete eicoloŋ loka akaje?"
Amos6:4 Itukwi lueperete oitadan luka ikel luka etom, Luerioros kotutiokec, Luenyamete imerekekin ludidik lulemuna kosipan, Ka itak lulemuna kauj;"
Amos6:5 Lueyeete ikososinei luutai koramete adeudeu; Luepwakunete bonik iboro lueruos kwape Daudi;
Amos6:6 Luemasete ebino kotoma atanya, Luinyonyoanakinos akinyet naejok aitelekar kere; Konye mam ekadakinete aiticanio naka Yosep!"
Amos6:7 Aso kanuka ŋun ijoreorio kotoma lusodit kaluijoreorio, Eoliori eibwoŋ loka ŋul kaluapotu korioros.”"
Amos6:8 Eyapo EJAKAIT Edeke elimit elopet, Ebala EJAKAIT Edeke loka ajoresio ebe: “Asaci apolou naka Yakob, Alait itogoike lukapolou: Kanuka ŋun ejaikini ere ka luejaas toma kere.”"
Amos6:9 Kosodi kanen, arai edeunos ituŋa itomon togo ediopet, etwakete,"
Amos6:10 Nakedakaria papake lodidi, ŋol loiewei ŋes, aitolomun akoio kina ketogo etemari ŋesi ŋol loejai to ketogo atiar, “Eroko idio ejai kajo?” Ebala ŋesi ebe, “Mam,” Kosodi ŋesi atemar atiar, “Kililin: naarai mam kibusakinit oni alimor ekiror loka EJAKAIT,”"
Amos6:11 Naarai koany, icorakini EJAKAIT, etiyakin etogo lokapolon emunyumunyuun, ka etogo lodidi da, ebilibiluun."
Amos6:12 Ekerete kereka ibalasin katiiba? Ekoriei kereka ituŋanan nen kimonin? Konye ipotu yesi kijulakis etube araun epiu, Ka araito nuka adolit da araun adwaris."
Amos6:13 Yes luisiyalamikinete aamameak, Luibalas ebe, “Mam kereka kipou kademutu amumwara kagogonukosi?”"
Amos6:14 Naarai koany, ebala EJAKAIT, Edeke loka aioresio ebe, “Ŋo ekek loka Isirael, adakakini ateker asurokin yes: Iroikinete kesi yes anyoun kaneelomarere Ka"
Amos7:1 Abu Ejakait EDEKE ketodik kwanata: ido koany, kosub ŋesi emaase kageunet naka alomun naka alibun nakokau; ido koany arai alibun nakokau kedau ekabaka aiŋer anyake."
Amos7:2 Kosodi kanen kedau emaase ainyam anya nuka akwap, kasodi eoŋ atemar atiar, “Wu Ejakait EDEKE, kenainait, kisioni! Ikwaikini do ai Yakob ebwoi? Naarai edit ŋesi!”"
Amos7:3 Kiitu EJAKAIT kanun; Kobala EJAKAIT ebe, “Mam ejauni.”"
Amos7:4 Abu Ejakait EDEKE ketodik kwanata: ido koany, kiworo Ejakait EDEKE erube loka akim; kidopoo ataro naepol, kouta aiŋiny akwap."
Amos7:5 Kasodi eoŋ atemar atiar, “Wu Ejakait EDEKE, kenainait, kinyek! Ikwaikini do ai Yakob ebwoi? Naarai edit nesil”"
Amos7:6 Kiitu EJAKAIT kanun; Kobala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, “Mam nin da ejauni.”"
Amos7:7 Abu ŋesi ketodik kwanata: ido koany, ebwoi EJAKAIT eiduny karwatat naadukio kebiriji, itiŋit ebiriji kakanike."
Amos7:8 Katema EJAKAIT eoŋ atiar, “Amos, iany inyo?” Kabala ebe, “Ebiriji.” Kosodi EJAKAIT atemar atiar, “Koany, ebwaikini ebiriii kidin kikatuna Isirael; Mam bobo enaeenenei kes."
Amos7:9 Itisilio aiboisio nuiceleleete nuka Isaak, Iswapete aiboisio nukalaunak nuka Isirael; Anyoikini da ekek loka Yeroboam kekilen.”"
Amos7:10 Kosodi Amasia esasedoti loka Bet-el aiyakiar mama ejai Yeroboam ekabaka loka Isirael ebe, “Inerunit Amos asurokin jo kokidin kekek loka Isirael: mam akwap epedori atitiŋikin akekiro kere."
Amos7:11 Naarai ebala Amos kwanata ebe, ‘Etwani Yeroboam kekilen, Abeit da ijoreorio Isirael Anyoun kakwapuke.’ ”"
Amos7:12 Bobo da kotema Amasia Amos atiar, “Ŋo ekadwaran, kolot, kokerea akwap naka Yuda, konyam atap kaŋina, kodwara da kaŋina,"
Amos7:13 Konye sirikidwara bobo koBet-el; naarai ŋes aibois nakalaunan naka ekabaka, erai da etogo loka ekabakane.”"
Amos7:14 Kosodi Amos aboŋokin Amasia ebe, “Mam arai enabi, karaida okoku loka enabi; konye arai ekeeokon, ido eketemonokinon ikito luka esukumor."
Amos7:15 Abu EJAKAIT kalem kameet esipan, katema EJAKAIT atiar, ‘Kolot, kodwarak ikatuŋa Isirael.’"
Amos7:16 “Aso do, kiira akirot naka EJAKAIT. Ibala ijo ebe, ‘Sirikidwar aluikin Isirael, Sirikilimonok aluikin ekek loka Isaak.’"
Amos7:17 Kanuka ŋun ebala EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Eraun akoniberu naadote kotoma ore, Ibiroros idwekon lusap ka lupesur kekilen, Ekorio alupokon kaitemis; Ŋo da itwanikini akwap namam elai, Abeit da ijoreorio Isirael anyoun kakwapuke.”"
Amos8:1 Abu Ejakait EDEKE ketodik kwanata: ido koany, edita loka araito nuka akamu."
Amos8:2 Kotema atiar, “Amos, iany inyo?” Katema atiar, “Edita loka araito nuka akamu.” Kosodi EJAKAIT atemar eoŋ atiar, “Abunok esaŋe ikatuŋa Isirael; Mam bobo enaeenenei kes."
Amos8:3 Ebala EJAKAIT EDEKE ebe, Eraunos ikososinei luka eyekalu aibwolol kapaaran kaŋin; Ipu awat nukatwak; Kaniniibois kere ecakanarete kes kina kililinete.’"
Amos8:4 Kiirasi nu, yes luipudapudaete luilwaritos, Luitananete lukican luka akwap,"
Amos8:5 Luibalas ebe, “Wori bo edaunor ailamun naka elap, Tetere kigwelari akima? Ka apaaran da nakasabato, Tetere kijaikini akima? Kitidisiari epa, kitopoloori esekel, Kimoda kainineta nukainal,"
Amos8:6 Tetere kigweli yenikiean kepuesa, Ka yenilwaritoi kamuk, Kigwelari da agugu nuka akima.”"
Amos8:7 Eyapo EJAKAIT elimit apolou naka Yakob ebe, “Abeic mam kemurwokin adiopet kaswamisiokee."
Amos8:8 Mam kereka akwap emarani kanuka ŋun, Ka ninirunenan da yeniboie kotoma aibworo? Eebo, enyouni eut kwape Ecor; Ilapanari kosodi aboŋori bobo kwape Ecor loko Misiri.”"
Amos8:9 Ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, “Kosodi kanen, kapaaran kaŋin, Ecolomari akoloŋ kidin paaran, Erumutoni akwap toma aica naka apaaran."
Amos8:10 Eculuori ipucinokus aibworo, Ikososineikus kere akuudian; Ayauni ipukoi toma aŋabes kere, Ka epata toma ninikou; Etuluori bala aibworo okoku loteluna, Esaneke bala apaaran naedwar.”"
Amos8:11 Koany, ebala Ejakait EDEKE ebe, “Epote apaarasia nuejukaria eoŋ ebeli kakwap, Mere ebeli loka inyamat, karaida akure naka akipi, Konye loka akiirar akiro nuka EJAKAIT."
Amos8:12 Irimete anyoun kaŋolol kiton aŋolol, Anyoun kagolitomei kiton kide; Ekerete lailo ka laije amoot akirot naka EJAKAIT, Komam edumunete."
Amos8:13 “Kapaaran kaŋin iiloros abekon nutemel Ka ikatumunak da kanuka akure.
Amos8:14 “Ŋul luiyapoete elimito aronis naka Samaria, Ebalas ebe, ‘Kwape ejaria ekonideke, ijo Dan,’ Ido ebe, ‘Kwape ejaria epone loka Beer-seba,’ Ibiroros kesi, mam oobo enyounete.”"
Amos9:1 Abu kaany EJAKAIT ebwoi eiduny ketem: kotema ŋesi atiar, “Kinom acuneta, tetere ilokulokunos apeteta: Kobilibil kes kakwesikee kere; Aari yenegoli kakesi kekilen; Emameun idiokakesi yenekeri, Emameun da idiokakesi yenekui."
Amos9:2 “Karaida ebokete adolor Okatwak, Elemuni akakan kes kaŋina; Karaida edokarete kiton akuj, Etodokuni kes kaŋina da."
Amos9:3 Karaida eŋopete kaidi naka Karumel, Amoi alemun kes kaŋina da; Karaida ibwaio kes kakonyeneka kwap toma aŋolol, Ecorakini emun kaŋina, ekonyi kes,"
Amos9:4 Karaida ijoreorio kakonyen nuka lukasurupokee, Ecorakini ekileŋ kaŋina, eari kes; Aseseni kes kakakonye ayaun aronis kwabo mere aiokis.”"
Amos9:5 Naarai EJAKAIT, Edeke loka aioresio, Ŋes ŋol loetirori akwap ecalari, Ibworosi ŋul kere luibojete kocoma; Enyouni cut kwape Ecor; Eboŋori bobo, kwape Ecor loko Misiri."
Amos9:6 Ŋes ŋol loedukokini agolaike akuj, Etieat apetetake kakwap; Ŋol loenyarauni akipi nuka aŋolol, Ebukokini kes akwap, EJAKAIT ŋes ekekiror."
Amos9:7 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Yes idwe luka Isirael, Mam iraas kamakaŋ kwape Itiopian? Mam kereka ketolomuni Isirael kakwap nako Misiri, Ka Ipilisitian anyoun koKaputor, Ka Isurian da koKir?"
Amos9:8 Koany, esesenete akonye nuka Ejakait EDEKE ajakanut naerono, Amudiari eoŋ ŋes kakwap. Konye ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Dimarai mam amudiari eut ekek loka Yakob.”"
Amos9:9 “Naarai koany, eeorakini, Ido ekekei ekek loka Isirael kotoma atekerin kere, Kwape ekekeia akima kotoma aikekeet, Konye mam idiokimait edoi kwap."
Amos9:10 Etwakete ikadiakanarak kere luka ikatuŋa kekilen, Luebalas ebe, ‘Mam aronis kidolikini, karaida airiamakin kaoni.’"
Amos9:11 “Kapaaran kaŋin etonyouni ewema loka Daudi loebiroro, Epuci aciletake; Etonyouni da aaponoruke, Eteteuni kwape kapaarasia nukolono."
Amos9:12 Tetere irumete kesi aatoŋot naka Edom, Ka atekerin kere nuemaikinio ekakiror.” Ebala kwaŋin EJAKAIT loiswamai ŋun."
Amos9:13 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Koany, epote apaarasia Nuedolokinio ekakorion ekasakan, Ka ŋol loipudapudai emusabibu ŋol loeyei ikinyom; Idonete ironan ebino loewiny, Eleleete iukon kere."
Amos9:14 Enyakuni bobo aijoreorio naka ikatuŋa Isirael, Edukete ireria lueswapito, iboikinos toma; Iraete ke si amanat nuka emusabibu, Emasete da ebinoke; Ekoriete imanikoria, enyamete da araitokee.”"
Amos9:15 Ebala EJAKAIT Ekonideke ebe, “Eraikini eoŋ kes akwapukee, Mam bobo erutunio kakwapukee naainakinit kes.”"
Obadiah1:1 Aitapoet naka Obadia, Inera kwanata Ejakait EDEKE nuka Edom ebe: Kipupu akiro kaneejai EJAKAIT, Ejukunitai ekiyakia alimokin atekerin ebe: “Konyoutu yesi! Kanyoutu oni aitiji ŋes!”"
Obadiah1:2 Koany, ketidisiari jo katekerin: Kimwaŋio noi."
Obadiah1:3 Kimodo jo eitur loka etaukon, Okwe jo loiboie kaciŋeta nuka emoru, Loiboie kaneicelelei; Loibala kotaukon ebe, “ŋai ca epedori aitodokun eoŋ kwap?”"
Obadiah1:4 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Karaida kidir kuju bala emorukaalet, Karaida kejaun akaikon kidiŋ aacer, Ketodokuni jo kaŋina."
Obadiah1:5 Arai kibunokinito ikokolak jo, Arai kibunokinito ikerurwok kuare, (Mere kimudiario jo!) Mam tikekokwata aitodol naeupiata?"
Obadiah1:6 Arai kibunokinito ikedeak emusabibu Mam tikideutu imusabibun lueroko bon? Eŋanyiŋanyi ca ma iboro luka Esau! Aŋici ca ma aiŋadisiake nuibwaa!
Obadiah1:7 Kireŋeut ituŋa kere lukitutukito kajo orotokon, Kiton oikor: Kimodata ituŋa luinapakina kajo, kipikosi da; ŋul luenyamete akonitap kilokata jo katacit: Emamei aijen kotomakeŋ."
Obadiah1:8 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mam kereka eoŋ kapaaran kaŋin Amudiari lukacoa ko Edom, Ka aijen komoru loka Esau?"
Obadiah1:9 Iyaloŋoŋoete ikagogoŋokokon, jo Teman, Ŋes ainakini ŋinituŋanan emudiario Komoru loka Esau kaario."
Obadiah1:10 Kirumete jo ileic kanuka adedeŋ Naibu kiswamak onacekon Yakob, Kimudiario ikar kere."
Obadiah1:11 Kapaaran naibu kobwoia kawai, Kapaaran naejoreoritotor imo ikeboro, Naalomariata lukaeekwap oruteike, Kilamilamata eroet kanuka Yerusalem, Kosubite ijo bala ediopet kakesi."
Obadiah1:12 Konye sirikite apaaran naka onacekon Kapaaran naka icanike, Siriyalama kanuka idwe luka Yuda Kapaaran naka amudiariokec; Karaida einer nuka eitur Kapaaran naka aiyaloŋoŋ."
Obadiah1:13 Sirikiloma orute loka ikatuŋa Kapaaran naka epolakec; Eebo, sirikite aiticanitoikec Kapaaran naka epolakec, Karaida aidokokin akonikanin oborokec Kapaaran naka epolakec."
Obadiah1:14 Sirikibwo kopidin amudiar luke luekuete; Sirikijaik luke luideunos kapaaran naka aiyaloŋoŋ,"
Obadiah1:15 Naarai eapie apaaran naka EJAKAIT katekerin kere. Kwape ibu kiswamaa, kiswamakinio jo da kwaŋin, Eboŋokini akoniswam akoukon elopet."
Obadiah1:16 Naarai kwape ibu komasia koronataka lokalaunan, Emasete kwaŋin atekerin kere tiritir; Eebo, emasete, kilikorete, Ejaunos bala mam lem ejauna."
Obadiah1:17 Konye ejaunos luekuete Moru Sion, Eraun lokalaunan; Irumi ekek loka Yakob airumetake."
Obadiah1:18 Eraun ekek loka Yakob akim, Ekek loka Yosep da aŋajepa nuka akim, Ka ekek da loka Esau ariaŋ; Enokete kesi, enyamari kes: Emameun yenideun kokek loka Esau; Naarai ener EJAKAIT."
Obadiah1:19 Irumete luka ari naka Eŋalakimak emoru loka Esau; Irumete luka apuutona da Ipilisitian: Irumete emanikor loka Epuraim, ka emanikor da loka Samaria; Irumi Benyamin da Gilead."
Obadiah1:20 Luijoreoritai luka ajore na naka idwe luka Isirael Luajaas koKanaanin, irumete aitodol Sarepat; Luijoreoritai da luko Yerusalem, luejaas Separad, Irumete ireria luka ari naka Eŋalakimak."
Obadiah1:21 Epote iketaiarak Moru Sion atubokin Emoru loka Esau; Eraun ajakanut naka EJAKAIT.
Jonah1:1 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Yona okoku loka Amitai ebe,"
Jonah1:2 “Konyou, kolot Ninebe, ore ŋol loepol, kiworo aikwenyar ŋes; naarai adolu aronisikec mamakaŋ.”"
Jonah1:3 Konye konyou Yona akerear Tarusis anyoun kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT. Kolot Yopa, kodum ameeri naalosi Tarusis: kotae etiai loka erotoke, kikwaŋar, alosit kakes Tarusis, anyoun kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT."
Jonah1:4 Konye kijuka EJAKAIT ekwam loepol aŋolol, kojaun ekwam loepol noi aŋolol, koapikinite ameeri abilibilun."
Jonah1:5 Kosodete ikekwaŋak akurianar, kiwone ŋinituŋanan ekedeke; kocakanakisi iboro luajaas ameeri aŋolol, tetere ebeneniar. Konye alomarit Yona atutubet nakotoma naka ameeri; koperi kojotoi."
Jonah1:6 Kobu ekapolon loka ameeri neejai ŋesi, kotema ŋes atiar, “Biai bo, ijo loijotoi? Konyou, kiwone Ekonideke! Elemuni eomoomoi Edeke nuwok, kenyeis atwakare,”"
Jonah1:7 Kotemanaros, ŋinituŋanan aupake atiar, “Bia, kelamilamata eroet, tetere kijenuni akirot kanai kidoikinio oni aronis na.” Kilamilamata, kobe Yona eroet."
Jonah1:8 Kosodete atemar ŋes atiar, “Kinainait jo, kolimokinai sio, akirot kanai kidoikinio sio aronis na? Anyoin akoniswam? Laali bo kibunio? Ai bo obukus? Loka lukanai bo jo?”"
Jonah1:9 Kotema kes atiar, “Arai eoŋ Eburaniat; ido ayoŋit EJAKAIT, Edeke loka akuj, loasubi aŋolol ka akwap naconit.”"
