Jonah1:10 Kosodete ituŋa akurianar noi noi, kotemasi ŋes atiar, “Anyoika ŋun nuisub?” Naarai apotu iruna kojenut ebe ekerit ŋesi anyoun kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT, naarai abu kolimok kes."
Jonah1:11 Kosodete atemar ŋes atiar, “Anyoika kiswamakini isio jo, tetere aŋolol iyamakin?” Naarai eyata ekwam noi noi kaŋolol."
Jonah1:12 Kotema kes atiar, “Kodakarai eoŋ, kocakakis aŋolol; kwaŋin iyamakinor aŋolol: naarai ajeni ebe kanukan ŋes kibunokinia yes ekwam lo loepol.”"
Jonah1:13 Konye kikwanata ituŋa kagogon aboŋor neconit; konye mam kepedoro; naarai eyata ekwam noi noi kaŋolol aluikinite kes.
Jonah1:14 Kanuka nun kiwoneoto EJAKAIT ebe, “Kinainait jo, wu EJAKAIT, kinainait, kenyeis isio atwakare kanuka aijar naka etuŋanan kalo, sirikibwaik mamakosi aokot numam aronis: naarai ijo, wu EJAKAIT, iswama kwape itojokitor.”"
Jonah1:15 Kodakutu Yona, kocakakis aŋolol: kiyamakin aŋolol."
Jonah1:16 Kosodete iruna aiyoŋ EJAKAIT noi noi; koinakis EJAKAIT asubanit, kiyapoto."
Jonah1:17 Kitemokinite EJAKAIT ibore yenikecor yenepol ailikor Yona; kojaun Yona akoik naka ibore yenikecor apaarasia auni ka akuaresia auni.
Jonah2:1 Kosodi Yona ailip EJAKAIT Ekedeke kakoik naka ibore yenikecor.
Jonah2:2 Kotema atiar, “Abu keworo EJAKAIT kocanika, Kabonok; Keworo da kakoik naka Okatwak, Ibu kiira ekaporoto,"
Jonah2:3 Naarai ibu kocakak eoŋ ataro, Otau loka aŋololin, Kerimo akalele; Elaparos akailanakon kere kamakaŋ,"
Jonah2:4 Katema atiar, “Kacakar kakonyenekon; Ekwaikini ai bobo aseseni eyekalukon lokalaunan?’"
Jonah2:5 Apotu akip kalukunito eoŋ, kiton otauka; Kaluku da ataro; Kojai egirio akouka."
Jonah2:6 Abu kejesar kwap eut naka ironan: Kagolo akwap kariinoke ikar kere: Konye ilem ijo aijaraka kaipany, Wu EJAKAIT Ekadeke."
Jonah2:7 Naeiloror ekatau kotomakaŋ, Abu keitu EJAKAIT: Kodolo akailip mama ijai, Oyekalukon lokalaunan."
Jonah2:8 Ŋul luepodos aamameak nuka aiŋal Ejalito akeceitimio.
Jonah2:9 Konye kainakini jo asuban keporoto loka aimal; Etodoli nun nueyapo. Erai aitajar naka EJAKAIT!”
Jonah2:10 Kiner EJAKAIT kaibore yenikecor, kolekak Yona akwap naconit."
Jonah3:1 Kirucak akirot naka EJAKAIT abunore mama ejai Yona ebe,"
Jonah3:2 “Konyou, kolot Ninebe, ore ŋol loepol, kolimok ŋes akirot nakecorakin jo.”"
Jonah3:3 Konyou Yona, kolot Ninebe, kwape ajaar akirot naka EJAKAIT. Kerai Ninebe ere loepol noi noi, loka alosit naka apaarasia auni."
Jonah3:4 Kogeu Yona alomar ore alosit naka adiopepaaran. Kiworo, kotema atiar, “Esalito apaarasia akaisaoŋon, kosodi konyet Ninebe atiyanakinio!”"
Jonah3:5 Kiyuut ituŋa luka Ninebe Edeke; kolimosi ailuŋ, konapitos ipukoi, ageun ka lukapolok kiton ludidik kakesi."
Jonah3:6 Kodolokis akiro ekabaka loka Ninebe, konyou koicoloŋoke loka ajakanut, kolae ekegoe, konap epuko, kiboikin okurwon."
Jonah3:7 Abu kolimo kitejen Ninebe kere ebe, “Kokisil loka ekabaka ka ikapolokoke; Sirikiir ituŋanan karaida itian, esipan loka aituk, karaida loka amerekekin, idiobore: sirikenyama, karaida aimat akipi;"
Jonah3:8 Konye kimukoros kipukoi, ituŋanan ka itian da, kiwoneoto noi Edeke: eebo, kibelokinos kesi ŋinituŋanan ainyein ekerot loerono, anyoun da kadeden naejai kakaninikec,"
Jonah3:9 Iŋai bo ejeŋi arai mam Edeke ibelokin iituni da, aibelokin ainyein akenyunyura naededen, tetere mam kitwaki?”"
Jonah3:10 Koany Edeke aswamisiokec, kwape ebelokinotor ainyein ekecerot loerono; kiitu Edeke kinyek aronis naabala iswamakini kes; mam abu kiswama."
Jonah4:1 Konye kitakadikis ŋun Yona noi, konyunyurikin."
Jonah4:2 Kilip EJAKAIT, kotema atiar, “Kenaiŋait, wu EJAKAIT, mere nuabala eoŋ nu, naarokor ajai bukosi? Kanuka ŋun abu kesunya akerit Tarusis; naarai abu kajeni ebe irai ijo Edeke loisiana, ileleba aisioni, iyapi anyunyurikin, ebarar aitimikon, iituni kinyek aronis,"
Jonah4:3 Aso do, wu EJAKAIT, kenaiŋait kolema aijaraka kamakaŋ; naarai ejok eoŋ atwanare itia aijar.”"
Jonah4:4 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Isubit kereka ijo ejok anyunyurikin?”"
Jonah4:5 Kosodi Yona alomar kina naka ere, kiboikin ari nakokide naka ere, kidukur iswam. Kiboikin otolimike, aanyun nuedoikinete ere,"
Jonah4:6 Kitemok EJAKAIT Edeke ekakale, kitopolou ŋes kaneejai Yona, tetere eyaun etolim akouke, ayuun ŋes kationisike. Kiyalamikin Yona noi kanuka ekakale."
Jonah4:7 Konye kitemok Edeke ekurut tupuruc apaaran naatupakini, konyam ekakale, korinyo."
Jonah4:8 Kosodi kelom akoloŋ, kitemok Edeke ekwam lokokide loemwana; konomo akoloŋ akou naka Yona, kiilor; kilip atwanare, kobala ebe, “Eiok eoŋ atwanare itia aijar.”"
Jonah4:9 Kotema Edeke Yona atiar, “Isubit kereka ijo ejok anyunyura kanuka ekakale?” Kotema atiar, “Asubit ejok anyunyura kiton atwanare da.”"
Jonah4:10 Kotema EJAKAIT atiar, “Itimi ijo ekakale, lomam jo ibu kitaaritor, karaida aitopoloun; loalomuni akuare adiopet, loarinyori da akuar: adiopet."
Jonah4:11 Mam ti eoŋ ebusakinit aitim Ninebe, ere ŋol loepol; loejaas ituŋa luedeparito ilukumin akwatat ka ilukumin akaisaarei lumam epedorete atiak akecekan nakoteten ka akecekan nakokediany; ka ibaren da luipu?”"
Micah1:1 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naabu kobu mama ejai Mika Emorasit, naabu ŋesi koany nuka Samaria ka Yerusalem, kapaarasia nuka Yotam, ka Akas, ka Kesekia, ikabakan luka Yuda."
Micah1:2 Kiirasi, yes ituŋa, yes kere; Kiira, ijo akwap, ka luejaas tomake kere; Korau Ejakait EDEKE ekajenan kamakus, EJAKAIT koyekaluke lokalaunan,"
Micah1:3 Naarai, koany, elomuni EJAKAIT kaiboisike, Edokuni, ieakaeakai aiboisio nuiceleleete nuka akwap."
Micah1:4 Ecalaros ironan kwapuke, Ecilunos aditon kwape edipor kakim, Kwape akipi nuebukoros aibois naiiululuei,"
Micah1:5 Ŋun kere kanuka aibucaret naka Yakob, Kanuka aronisio da nuka ekek loka Isirael. Anyoin bo aibucaret naka Yakob? Mere Samaria? Anyoika bo aiboisio nuiceleleete nuka Yuda? Mere Yerusalem?"
Micah1:6 Kanuka ŋun ŋes etuluoria eoŋ Samaria bala atukit komanikor, Bala aibois nairaio emusabibu: Abukokini amoruke aditot, Apukori apetetake."
Micah1:7 Ideeideeio aputosiake kere nuegerer, Icweio iropitoke kere kakim, Etisili eoŋ aputosiake kere nuemaio: Naarai abu kotukok kes keropit loka naadote, Eboŋorete da araut eropit loka naadote,"
Micah1:8 Kanuka ŋun ŋes adcloria eoŋ ebworor da; Kalosi alaeara kemuialal: Adelori kwape ikuwei, Ebworo da kwape ikuului."
Micah1:9 Naarai mam epedori amusunutuke aŋaleun: Naarai adoloki Yuda da; Adol orute loka ikatuŋa, Ŋes Yerusalem,"
Micah1:10 Sirikilimokis koGat, Sirikimonyata cut: Kibelibelokinos kapua KoBet-le-Apura."
Micah1:11 Kitoroto imujalalasi, kirumito ileic, Yes luibojete koSapir: Mam luibojete koSaanan elomuna: Aibworo naka Bet-esel kidema yes aibois nabwoet,"
Micah1:12 Naarai idareunete luibojete koMarot Aiokis kaiyalonon; Naarai adoku aronis naebuni kama ejai EJAKAIT, Kiton orute loka Yerusalem,"
Micah1:13 Kocnikis agali obalasit loetirono, Yes luibojete koLakis: Kerai ŋesi ageunet naka aronis mama ejai akoku naka Sion; Naarai edumuna aibucareta nuka Isirael kamakon."
Micah1:14 Kanuka nun ŋes iinakinia Moreset-gat ainakineta nuka aitwar; Eraunos itogoi luka Akisib lukaimod Mama ejaas ikabakan luka Isirael.
Micah1:15 Kainuni jo ŋol lokirumi, Wu jo yeniboie koMaresa; Edoluni aibuses naka Isirael Adulam."
Micah1:16 Kobaren itimakon, kopalororor akoukon, Kanuka idwe luka ailelekon: Kitalal apatakon kwape emorukaalet, Naarai ijoreoritai kamakon."
Micah2:1 Itukwi ŋul luinerunete numam edolito, Luiswamaete aronis kaperitokec! Kiwala akwap, itetemonorete, Naarai ejai toma apedor naka akanikee."
Micah2:2 Iŋobeleete alup, konasete; Itogoi da, kodemete; Emwanete etuŋanan ka eketogo, Ido etuŋanan ka akeirumet."
Micah2:3 Ŋes inerar EJAKAIT kwanata atiar: Koany, enerak aronis okek lo, Namam ilemarete komurisinakus, Karaida alosit iŋonasi; Naarai na ŋes apak naerono."
Micah2:4 Kapaaran kaŋin kiwaragio, Ekuudianete akuudian nakican, Ebe, “Kiŋasi cut; Esiec akorakinet naka ikatuŋa; Kademaa ca! Akoraki lukepali akosilup.”"
Micah2:5 Ŋes mam ijaunia kayenecakari auno koroet Katukot naka EJAKAIT.
Micah2:6 “Siridwarete,” kwaŋin edwariata. “Mam ibus aidwar nuikote nen; Mam amorosito kidolokinete oni.”"
Micah2:7 Ŋo ekek loka Yakob, Ibus kereka einer ŋun? Eŋoŋar ca ma emoyo loka EJAKAIT? Nu tope kes akeswamisio? Mam akakiro iswamakinete aiokis ŋol loelosi itenara?"
Micah2:8 Konye idakunos yes asurokin ikatuŋa kwape lukasurup: Idemete asuukai konapen luka nul kaluitorete inapakina Kwape ituŋa lumam ekotosi ejie.
Micah2:9 Ireneanarete aŋor nuka ikatuŋa kotogoikee luisiyalamikinitos; Ilemarete akaibuses ikar kere kodwekec ludidik.
Micah2:10 Konyoutu, koloto: Naarai mere ne aiyenunetekus: Kanuka amodokok naemudiari, Ido ka amudiario naasogim."
Micah2:11 Arai esabi etuŋanan loelosi kokwam loka aiŋal, Ebe, “Kadwarakini jo nuka aion ka luitemerete”; Ŋopenol eraun ekadwaran loka ituŋa kalu!"
Micah2:12 Mam aswaki atukonokin lukon kere, ijo Yakob: Mam aswaki atukokin aatoŋot naka Isirael: Ebwaikin nepepe kwape amerekekin nuka Bosura; Kwape esipan loejai kidiŋ oronyikec, Iumaumato noi kanuka aipues naka ituŋa."
Micah2:13 Adoka ekabelan kakonyenekec; Atikoros, atuboros adolior orute, Alomut kanen. Atubor ekabakakee kakonyenekec, Enareniki EJAKAIT kes."
Micah3:1 Abu katema atiar: Kopupokisi, kenainair, yes ikapolok luka Yakob, Ka ikayaitok luka ekek loka Isirael! Mere kereka nakus ajenun etube?"
Micah3:2 Luisaeete ajokis, kominas aronis; Luibuluearete amunyinokec, Ka akiriŋikec alemar kakoiokec;"
Micah3:3 Luinyamete akiriŋ naka ikatuŋa; Ŋenete amunyinokec, ibilete akojokec: Eebo, irikirikete kes, kwape toma amot, Kwape akiriŋ toma atakwa,"
Micah3:4 Ŋes konyet emonyakiniata EJAKAIT, Konye mam ŋes eboŋokini kes: Eebo, ibwai ekereet kamakec kapak kaŋin, Naarai eswamata aronis kaswamisiokec."
Micah3:5 Inera EJAKAIT kwanata nuka inabin luitapaarete ikatuŋa, Luiworoete ebe, “Ainapakin,” Arai kejaas kaluekonyete kikecekel: Konye ekapanakinos ejie kanol Lomam ibwaikini ibore aitukekec,"
Micah3:6 Kanuka ŋun eraun akuare mama iiaas, Komam aitapoet; Kimutonikis, komam idwarete. Elomari akoloŋ kama ejaas inabin, Koiesi da apaaran cucucuc kamakec."
Micah3:7 Irumete ikadwarak ileje, Edakaros akwes nuka ikaroak; Eebo, ebunete kesi aitukekec: Naarai emamei aboŋokinet naka Edeke."
Micah3:8 Konye abeit elelebun eoŋ agogoŋ, Ka Emoyo loka EJAKAIT, Ka etube, ka apedor da, Alimonokin Yakob aibucareteke, Ka Isirael da akeronis."
Micah3:9 Kopupokisi nu, kenaiŋait, Yes ikapolok luka ekek loka Yakob, Ka ikayaitok luka ekek loka Isirael, Luilaete etube, Luitiriete nuitenara kere."
Micah3:10 Edukete Sion kaokot, Ka Yerusalem da kanumam adolit."
Micah3:11 Etubete lukapolokoke akiro kanuka ainakinet, Isisianakinete isasedotinike kanuka eropit, Edwarete inabinoke kanuka apesan: Konye egoŋakina neejai EJAKAIT ebalas ebe, “Mere ejai EJAKAIT kidiniwok? Mam aronis kidoikini oni.”"
Micah3:12 Aso kanukus ŋes ekoriere Sion kwape emanikor, Eraun Yerusalem aapoŋor, Eronat da loka etogo Kwape aiboisio nuiceleleete nuka amagoro."
Micah4:1 Kosodi konyet kapaarasia nukawasia Ecatunit eronat loka etogo loka EJAKAIT Kaidi naka ironan, Itopolooro kuju kiukon; Idiaete ituŋa mamakeŋ,"
Micah4:2 Elosete atekerin nuipu kobalas ebe, “Kopotu, kadokasi oroŋat loka EJAKAIT. Togo da loka Edeke loka Yakob; Kisisianakini ŋesi oni ikeponesio, Kilosenenei korotinike.” Naarai elomuni ekisil koSion, Akirot da naka EJAKAIT koYerusalem."
Micah4:3 Etubokini ŋesi atekerin nuipu, Ediekakini atekerin nuegogon nuelwaka; Etataete kesi ikileŋakec aituluor imelekes, Ka akwarasikec da aituluor icilikikin lukidimet: Mam ateker ikiari ekileŋ asurokinia aceteker, Kwabo mam bobo isisiaunete ejie."
Micah4:4 Konye iboiete kesi ŋinituŋanan kwap kemusabibuke, Kwap ketinike da; Mam yenitukuriani kes: Naarai ener aituk naka EJAKAIT loka aioresio,"
Micah4:5 Naarai elosenenete atekerin kere, Ŋinidiopet kokiror loka ekedeke, Konye kilosenenei oni kokiror loka EJAKAIT Ewokodeke Ikar ka ikar."
Micah4:6 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kapaaran kaŋin Enotuni ŋin naicodo, Atukokini ŋin naerenearitai, Ka ŋin da naabu eoŋ ketiean;"
Micah4:7 Etarauni ŋin naicodo aatoŋot, Ka ŋin da naereŋearitai ateker naegogoŋ: Irumi EJAKAIT kes komoru Sion Amear kwana, ido aitodol ikar kere."
Micah4:8 Ka jo da, wu etogo loeoja loka esipan, Eukot loka akoku naka Sion, Edolokini jo; Eebo, edolokini ayait nakolo, Alakanut naka akoku naka Yerusalem."
Micah4:9 Aso do kanukinyo ideloria? Emamei kereka ekabaka kotomakon? Aolio ekapetan akirokon, Tape kikamuni ariebo kwape naka aberu naidouni?"
Micah4:10 Koriebakin, kitaaritoi aidoun, ijo akoku naka Sion, Kwape aberu naidouni: Naarai kwana ilomari kiŋa naka ere, Iboie okitui, idoli da Babulon. Kiyuunio kaŋina, Ŋina ŋes kilakunia EJAKAIT jo Kakan naka lukasurupokon."
Micah4:11 Kwana da etukonokinos atekerin nuipu asurokin jo, Nuebalas ebe, “Komunaun ŋesi, Koanyutu do awokokonye eimielikec koSion.”"
Micah4:12 Konye mam ejenete kesi aomisio nuka EJAKAIT, Karaida ajenun ainerunike; Naarai atukok kes kwape iisutan kopejal."
Micah4:13 Konyou kicom, ijo akoku naka Sion: Naarai etaraun eoŋ amumwarakon asuat, Ka imagegerakon da aisinit: Inomonomoi atekerin nuipu; Igitari amedakec mama ejai EJAKAIT, Ka iborokec da mama ejai EJAKAIT loka akwap"
Micah5:1 Kwana itukokin korioneta, Ŋo akoku naka moneta: Kirigau ŋesi sic asurokin: Inomete kesi ekatubon loka Isirael Kebela oitiny."
Micah5:2 Konye jo, Bet-lekem Epurata, Loidit ajaut toma okekia luka Yuda, Elomuni kotomakon kanukan Etuŋanan loeraun ekayaiton loka Isirael; Alomanaretake ejaas ameun apeŋo, Ameun ikar lumam enaŋete,"
Micah5:3 Kanuka nun ijaikini kes, Aitodol apak naidounio nm naeriebi: Kosodete luideunos luka ikeinaean Aboŋor mama ejaas idwe luka Isirael."
Micah5:4 Ebwoi ŋesi, itadaki ekesipan kagogon naka EJAKAIT, Kapolou naka ekiror loka EJAKAIT, Ekedeke: Ibojenenete kesi; Naarai kwana eraun ŋesi loepol Kiton osaŋeta luka akwap,"
Micah5:5 Eraun etuŋanan ŋol ainapakiniwok: Naelomunia Eyasuriat akwapuwok, Naecakia ŋesi itogoiwok lukapolou, Kasodete oni aitonyoun ikecokok ikanykaarei, Ka ituŋa ikanykauni lukapolok asurokin ŋes."
Micah5:6 Itisilete kesi akwap naka Asuria kekilen, Ka aiboisio nuelomarere nuka akwap naka Nimirod: Kiyuuni ŋesi oni kama ka Eyasuriat, Naelomunia ŋesi akwapuwok, Naecakia ŋesi kotoma oikoruwok."
Micah5:7 Eraun aatoŋot naka Yakob kokidin katekerin nuipu Kwape akopyo nuepote kama ejai EJAKAIT, Kwape elimilim neejaas anya; Lomam idareuni ituŋanan, Karaida aidareun idwe luka ituŋa."
Micah5:8 Eraun aatoŋot naka Yakob mama ejaas atekerin, Kokidin kituna luipu, Kwape eŋatuny mama ejaas itian luka amagoro, Kwape iŋatuny mama ejaas isipanin luka amerckekin: Naitorio, icakacakai epoopooi, Emamei yeneyuuni."
Micah5:9 Kikiara akonikan kuju kalukedinetakon, Komudiaros lukasurupokon kere."
Micah5:10 Kosodi kanen, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kapaaran kaŋin agelari ibalasinikon kokidinikon, Amudiari agalinikon:"
Micah5:11 Agelari ireria luka akwapukon, Akesi ireriakon kere Iuegogon."
Micah5:12 Agelari icudeta kakanikon; Mam bobo ijaunos kikadwarak:
Micah5:13 Amudiari aputosiakon nuegerer, Ka ipirinokon kokidinikon; Mam bobo imai aswam naka akaninikon."
Micah5:14 Arutuni Aserimikon kokidiŋikon: Amudiari ireriakon.
Micah5:15 Etodoli eoŋ enyaŋit kanyunyura kaisiop Mama ejaas atekerin numam erimarito.
Micah6:1 Aso kiirasi nuinera EJAKAIT atiar: Konyou, kopur kakonyen nuka imor, Kisiira iukon ekoniporoto."
Micah6:2 Kiirasi, yes imor, aŋolopa naka EJAKAIT, Ka yes da apeteta nuka akwap numam edaunos; Naarai ejai EJAKAIT aŋolopa ka iketuŋa, Epuri ka Isirael."
Micah6:3 “Okwe ikatuŋa, kekonak eoŋ yes ai? Inyo gwai ketapasitor eoŋ yes? Kobonokinoil"
Micah6:4 Naarai abu ketonyou yes kakwap nako Misiri, Kalaku kotogo loka ebulesene; Kesinarenik yes Musa, ka Aaron ka Miriam."
Micah6:5 Okwe ikatuŋa, kiitutu bo nueneruni Balak ekabaka loka Moab, Ka nuabonokini da Balaam okoku loka Beor; Kiitutu ageun koSitim kiton Giligal, Tetere ijenunete aswamisio nukadolit nuka EJAKAIT.”"
Micah6:6 “Abunari inyo akonyen nuka EJAKAIT, Kesudede kakonyen nuka Edeke loitelekarit kere? Ekunyakini kereka ŋes kainakineta nuicweio, Ka itak luka ekaru ediopet?"
Micah6:7 Itojoki kereka EJAKAIT imerekekin ilukumin, Arai icorin ilukumin itomon luka akinyet? Ainakini kereka eoŋ ikoku yenikiyai kanuka apaarika, Araito naka akuanaka kanuka aronis nakotauka?”"
Micah6:8 Okwe etuŋanan, kipukok jo naejok; Inyo bo kiburai EJAKAIT, Mere aswam nuebeito, amin aitim, Alosit da kaitasono nepepe ka Ekonideke?"
Micah6:9 Iworoi eporoto loka EJAKAIT mama ejai ere, Yenikaeoa da eyoni ekonikiror: “Kopupokisi yesi ebela, ka loaseuni ŋes."
Micah6:10 Eroko kereka ejaas iboro luka akais nuipu luka aronis Kotogo loka ikaronok, Ka aitemis da nainonara naerai naketal?"
Micah6:11 Asegara kereka eoŋ kajaas kaininisio nukaronok, Ka eriagi da loka aitemisio nukainal?"
Micah6:12 Naarai ileleba ikabarakake akaje, Esabanakinete luibojete kotomake, Iŋalaete aŋajepakec kotoma aitukekec."
Micah6:13 Kanuka nun ŋes kenomia eoŋ jo kamusunut naerono noi; Ketisil jo kanuka aronisiokon.
Micah6:14 Inyami, konye mam imonanakin; Iworoori kotomakon; Ilemari, konye mam iyuuni; ŋul da luiyuuni ejaikini eoŋ ekileg."
Micah6:15 Iyei, konye mam isaki; Ipudapudai iseitunin, konye mam inyonyoikin akinyet; Icui emusabibu da, konye mam imasi ebino,"
Micah6:16 Naarai irieete ikisila luka Omiri, Ka aswamisio kere nuka ekek loka Akab; Ilosenenete kainerunikec: Tape ketuluor yes aapoŋor, Ka luibojete kotoma eraunos aijuaret; Ibwokete amorosit naka ikatuŋa."
Micah7:1 Wu okwe! Naarai asubit bala naedaunere atukokin araito nuka aiporo, Bala naedaunere aide emusabibu: Emamei aibuŋet naanyamat; Karaida etini loegeit akonore loimiela ekatau."
Micah7:2 Aolio innjanan yeneyoŋit Edeke kakwap, Emamei da yenitenara etau kotuna: Eperunete kere aiar; Emejai ŋinituŋanan onaceke keboi."
Micah7:3 Ejaas akecekanin mama ejai aronis, Ekukuraka aswam; Ilipi ekapolon, ekoto ekatubon eropit; Btunanan loepol ŋes da inera nuka aiŋobel nakaronon nakotauke; Kwaŋin ewojiete nepepe."
Micah7:4 Loejok kakesi erai ekodokodoi; Loitenara aitelekar luce erono kwape abwas naka ikukwa. Adolu apaaran naka ikedarakakon, ŋes aiticaniokon; Kwana ebuonokinos."
Micah7:5 Sirikimunokinos ipaper, Sirikigonakinos ekenarenon; Kidar ikekia luka aitukukon Kaneejai ŋin naeperi atorobukon."
Micah7:6 Naarai itisili okoku papake, Enyoikini akoku totoke, Aberu naka okoku eluikini tataake; Lukasurupo luka ituŋanan kes ituŋa lukokaleke."
Micah7:7 Konye kanukan, aseseni eoŋ EJAKAIT; Edareuni Edeke loka aitajarioka; Kapupok Ekadeke eoŋ,"
Micah7:8 Sirikibwoŋ kanukan, ijo lokasurupika; Arai kebiror, anyouni; Naeboikinor amuton, Eraun EJAKAIT aica kamakaŋ,"
Micah7:9 Atitinikim anyunyura naka EJAKAIT, Naarai adiaka kamaken: Aitodol nekapurokinia akakirot, Itodolikini eoŋ etube, Ketolomuni eoŋ toma aica; Aanyuni da akedolit."
Micah7:10 Kosodi nakasurup aanyun gun, Koraparito ileic nakabala eoŋ ebe, “Ai bo ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke?” Elakara akakonye aanyun nin; Ipudapudao ŋes kwape erit lokorotin."
Micah7:11 Apaaran naka aiduk arwatatinikon! Kapaaran kaŋin italalaario eikorukon.
Micah7:12 Kapaaran kaŋin epote mama ijai Anyoun koAsuria ka ireria luko Misiri, Anyoun koMisiri da kiton Ocor, Anyoun kaŋolol kiton aŋolol, Koronat da kiton oron at."
Micah7:13 Konye esilior akwap kanuka ŋul kaluiboiete kotoma, Kanuka araito nuka aswamisiokec,"
Micah7:14 Kitadak ikonituŋa kebelakon, Esipan loka airumetekon, Luibojete ilenokino, Toma amagoro kidin ka Karumel; Kodakasi kesi toma Basan ka Gilead, Kwape kapaarasia nupeno,"
Micah7:15 Kwape kapaarasia nuilomunia ijo kakwap nako Misiri Etodikini ŋes akiro nukaumokin,"
Micah7:16 Eanyunete atekerin, irumete ileje, Kanuka agogonukec kere: Ebunete aitukekee, Imaiinikinos akiikec."
Micah7:17 Emeorete apua kwape kemun; Elomunete emaranete kaiboisiokee nunopis, Kwape lueliatos kakwap: Epote kaiyor; mama ejai EJAKAIT Ewokodeke, Ekuriakaros kanukon."
Micah7:18 Iŋai bo Edeke loiputos kaio, Loisioniei numam adolit, Loinaci aibucar naka aatoŋot naka airumeteke? Mam enyunyuranakinenei ikar kere, Naarai isiyalamikinit aitim,"
Micah7:19 Ibelokin bobo ŋesi, itimi; Icakaeakai numam adolitewok kokwap kakejeneke. Icakari ijo aronisiokee kere ataro naka aŋolol."
Micah7:20 Itodolikini abeit mama ejai Yakob, Ka aitim da mama ejai Aburaam, Nuibu kiyapoik lukapapaakos Ameun kapaarasia nupeno,"
Nahum1:1 Abwokon naka Ninebe, Eitabo loka aitapoet naka Nakum Elikosit,"
Nahum1:2 Erai EJAKAIT Edeke lokekolo, inyaŋi da; Inyaŋi EJAKAIT, ileleba anyunyura; Inyaŋi EJAKAIT kama ka lukediŋeteke, Elilikini lukasurupoke,"
Nahum1:3 Iyapi EJAKAIT anyunyurikin, eili ili da akepedor, Lomam itojoki luegwaunito akiro. Ejai EJAKAIT ekerot otapipirio, kokwamin da, Idouon kes adae nuka akeieke,"
Nahum1:4 Iretakini ŋesi aŋolol, itooni, Itooni da icorin kere: Enonokiar Basan, ka Karumel, Enonokiar da aturot naka Lebanon."
Nahum1:5 Emaranete ironan kakonyeneke, Ecalaros iukon; Ebuburiar akwap kakonyeneke, Eebo, akwapin, ka luibojete kotoma kere."
Nahum1:6 Iŋai bo epedori abwoikin aisiopoke? Iŋai da epedori atitiŋikin adedeŋ naka anyunyurake? Ebukunio anyunyurake kwape akim, Etiyatiyai ŋesi imor."
Nahum1:7 Ejok EJAKAIT, abwas kapaaran naka ican; Ejeŋi ŋesi nul luemunosi ŋes."
Nahum1:8 Konye itanani eut aiboisike kakalele naelapara, Erukoria lukasurupoke kiton amuton."
Nahum1:9 Anyoika nuitetemonorete kaomisio aluikin EJAKAIT? Itanani ŋesi cut: Mam irucakini bobo aitican.
Nahum1:10 Naarai karaida esubito bala ikukwa luikodikodito, Epalala kesi da kanumatanakec, Idoporio kes cut kwape ariaŋ naconit de."
Nahum1:11 Aiomu idiopet kamakon yenitetemor aronis aluikin EJAKAIT, Yenineruni nukaronok."
Nahum1:12 Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: “Karaida egogoŋ kes cut, ipu da, Ejepio kes, eoliorete. Karaida abu kareite jo, Mam bobo karei joo"
Nahum1:13 Kwana abili aiookotoke kamakon, Aaŋololedi irikoikon.”"
Nahum1:14 Abu EJAKAIT kicorak nukon ebe: “Mam bobo eyeio ekonikiror; Kotogo loka idekesiokon Ajepi aput naegerer, ka aput da naecalara. Etemokini atesikon; Naarai isiliana ijo.”"
Nahum1:15 Koany, akejen nuka aŋololol kaloeyauni akiro nukajokak, Loelimonokini ainapakin koronan! Kidar ipucinokon, ijo Yuda, Kitodol aiyaposiokon: Naarai mam ikaronon itori bobo tomakon; Egelario eut."
Nahum2:1 Abu aŋololol loidecideci kobu akonyenekon. Kidar abwas, kirere erot, Kitogogon aŋabetekon, Kiticat akonipedor baa ba."
Nahum2:2 Naarai inyakuni EJAKAIT ajokis naka Yakob, Kwape aiokis naka Isirael: Naarai apiasi ikaŋatak kes, Amunaasi da atenunakec nuka emusabibu,"
Nahum2:3 Iterenitai ebuku loka iketuŋa lukirigin, Enapitos ituŋa lukatitiŋok lukarenak, Emwekimwekete aisinin nuka agalin Kapaaran naka aitemonokinike, Ininio noi akwaras."
Nahum2:4 Ikerepikinito agalin korotin, Enananakinos korotin luelalak: Etakanete kesi bala akalasia, Egumitos bala aimiliaunun."
Nahum2:5 Iituni ŋesi isotiake: Iguikinos kairaeakee; Iwonyete arwatatake, Itemonokinitoi eupal lopeti."
Nahum2:6 Eŋaara irutei luka icorin, Ebaikini etogo loka eka baka."
Nahum2:7 Epukoro Kusab, edakario, Ibworos apesuruke bala iporotoi luka ajeleik, Kodipidipete atorobusiokec."
Nahum2:8 Konye ageun apeŋo koputos Ninebe Bala atapar naka akipi: Konye ekerete. Kiworoete ebe, “Kobwaata, kobwaata!” Konye mam yenenoliari kau."
Nahum2:9 Koyanaasi yesi lunatuna luka epuesa, Koyaŋaasi da lunatuna luka esabu! Naarai mam iboro edaununos, Abar naka iboro kere luisiyalamikinito."
Nahum2:10 Ikokooro ŋesi, asilior, emeieiki: Epirisar etau, iriamanakinos akuŋin, Eriebete noi aŋabes kere, Ŋulakinos da akonyenekec kere,"
Nahum2:11 Ani bo abua naka iŋatunyo, Ka aibois da naenyamiata iŋatunyo ludidik, Naesakasakatotor eŋatuny ka aŋatuny, Ka ikoku yenika enaruny, komam yenitukuriani kes?"
Nahum2:12 Kopoopo eŋatuny luedaunete idweke, Komiedanak anatunyoke; Kileleb abuaike lumejauna, Ka aburinike da lunatan."
Nahum2:13 Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, Koany aluikin eoŋ jo, ecwei agalinikon kotoma apuru, iŋinyari ekileŋ inarunyckon ludidik: amudiari da lumejaunakon kakwap, mam oobo iiraros iporotoi luka ikiyakiakon, n,"
Nahum3:1 Itukwi ijo ere loka aokot! Ileleba kere aiŋal ka luepoopootai; Mam enyounete lumejauna.
Nahum3:2 Ecelet loka edaaset, Ka ecelet da loka airurum naka agalin; Ibalasin luidamaeacas, Agalin da nuesomanaros!"
Nahum3:3 Ekebwanenon loedoki, Ekileŋ loemwekimweki, ka akwara naimilia, Aipues da naka lueario, Ka atukot da naepol naka lukatwak, Mam edaununos atesin; Iguikinos atesinakecl"
Nahum3:4 Naarai apoloor adoteu naka naadote naetemelel, Alopet ecudet, Naegwelari atekerin kanuka adoteuke, Ka ikekia kanuka eeudeteke."
Nahum3:5 Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, Koany, aluikini eoŋ jo, Alaeari inapenekon kakonyenekon; Etodikini atekerin amujalalakon, Ka ajakanuto da ileieikon."
Nahum3:6 Kacakakini jo luimodokokas, Etisili jo, Ebwaikini jo araun naesesenio kamenit."
Nahum3:7 Kosodi kanen, kere lukisesenete jo Ekerete kamakon, Kobalas ebe, Esiliana Ninebe; Iŋai bo ibworo ŋes? Ai bo kamoikinia jo lukitalakarete?"
Nahum3:8 Ŋok kereka ijo adepar No-amon, Naaiai neajaas ieorin, Nairimorito akip: Etutike ŋes aŋolol, Arwatatake da kerai aŋolol?"
Nahum3:9 Keraas Etiopia ka Misiri agogoŋuke, Ŋin da namam enaŋi; Keraas Put ka Lubim da ikeŋarakinakakon,"
Nahum3:10 Konye kijoreoritai ŋes, kikamaritai: Kipieipicitai ikedwe ludidik Kasisiarin nuka irotin; Apotu kilamalamata iroeta akoria isotiake, Koenitete iketuŋa kere lukapolok kirikoi,"
Nahum3:11 Imerikin ijo da, ileleboi; Imoi ijo da abwas kanuka lokasurup."
Nahum3:12 Eputokinos ireriakon kere luebwaitai Itinin luejaas araito nugeet: Arai kijaŋijaŋi, Edoununete aituk naka ikanyaman."
Nahum3:13 Koany, eraas ituŋakon kamakon aŋor; Eŋaara noi kolalak irutei luka akonikwap Mama ejaas lukasurupokon; Edopo akim atiketakon,"
Nahum3:14 Kirit akipi eriŋa kirigauna, Kitogogon ireriakon luebwaitai: Kolot neejai elupe, kieak alupot, Kitiŋ atuba nasubet amatapalin."
Nahum3:15 Idopori jo akim kanen, Kiiepi jo ekileŋ, Kidopori jo kwape enyede. Kipuaros kwape enyede, Kipuaros kwape emaase!"
Nahum3:16 Ibu kiyatak ikagwelanarakakon Adepar aacer nukokuiu, Ebutori enyede, kosodi aporor."
Nahum3:17 Eputos lukon luitanapitai aboko kwape emaase, Ka ikewadikakakon kwape atukon nuka ibeerei, Luidukurete abwasin kapaaran naelilim, Konye kelom akoloŋ epororete, Aiboisikec da neaiaas mam ejenun."
Nahum3:18 Ŋotoete ikonikecokok, Ŋo ekabaka loka Asuria; Iluranaros isotiakon, Isiarakinos ikonituija oroŋan, Emamci da yenetukokini kes,"
Nahum3:19 Mam ariebokon ejoniar; Epol amusunutukon. Kere luiirarete eemutukon Kibapakinete jo akaninikec. Naarai iŋai yenimam edolokinit Aronisikon naduc?
Habakkuk1:1 Abwokon naabu Kabakuk enabi koany,"
Habakkuk1:2 Wu EJAKAIT, etodoli eoŋ ai aimony, Komam jo ipupuni? Eworo mama ijai nuka akaje, Komam jo itajari?"
Habakkuk1:3 Kanukinyo kitodikinia eoŋ numanl adolit, Asesen ameŋeranut? Naarai ejai amudiar ka akaje kakonyeneka: Ejai da epeget, elomuni do aŋolopa."
Habakkuk1:4 Kanuka ŋun ŋes etapalunere ekisil, Mam etube da elomununei: Naarai irigauni ikaronon ikadoliton; ŋes elomununia etube lomagul."
Habakkuk1:5 Koanyutu yesi kotoma atekerin, Kosesenete, koumokis noi: Naarai eswamai eoŋ aswam kapaarasiakus, Namam iyuunete karaida kilimonokinitai."
Habakkuk1:6 Naarai koany, etonyouni Ikaludean, Ateker ŋin naededeŋ, naedodoro; Eracaete aitor alalau naka akwap, Airum aiboisio nuiboikinos numere nukee."
Habakkuk1:7 Eraas luesogim ka luketasuro: Elomuni etubekee ka apoloukee kama kikulepek,"
Habakkuk1:8 Etiroko ibalasinikee aitelekarit irisai, Ededeŋ aitclekarit ipeen lukebon; Igararaete ikebwanenokokec, Eebo, epote ikebwanenokokee kama elwana; Eporitos bala emorukaalet loerurukit ainyam,"
Habakkuk1:9 Epote kesi kere kanuka akaje; Iŋarenikinit kes etasuro. Etukonokinete lukijoreoro kwape kasine.
Habakkuk1:10 Eebo, isekelete kesi ikabakan, Emwanio ikapolok kamakee. Emwanete kesi niniibois naegogon; Naarai etukonokinete apua, irumete."
Habakkuk1:11 Kosodete amotar kwape kekwam, Etuboros, luegwaunito akiro: Akecegogoŋ ŋes ekecedeke,"
Habakkuk1:12 Wu EJAKAIT Ekadeke, Ekalaunanika, Mam kereka jo ijai ageun apeŋo? Mam sio kitwaki. Wu EJAKAIT, ibu kicorak kes kanuka etube; Ŋo da, wu Atiiba, itieata kes kanuka alecor."
Habakkuk1:13 Irai ijo loka akonye nuesegaara numam esesenete aronis, Mam ipedori aite ameŋeranut, Kanukinyo iteio ijo nul luebilakinete ebotet, Ililinia da nailikoria ikaronon ituŋanan ycnedolit aitelekarit ŋes?"
Habakkuk1:14 Ituluori ituŋa kwape agaria nuka aŋolol, Kwape lueliatos, luemameete ekayaitonikee."
Habakkuk1:15 Ikami kes kere kegolu, Eloki kes karujake, Etukonokini kes oboike: ŋes ibwonar, kiyalamikin da."
Habakkuk1:16 Kanuka nun ŋes einakinia asuban mama ejai aruiake, Isupurikini eboike lukisuputununo; Naarai kanukec ebur ewaike, epu inyamatake,"
Habakkuk1:17 Aso do ebukenenei kereka lukoboike, Mam inyeini aiar atekerin tiritir?"
Habakkuk2:1 Abwoi do eoŋ kaitelieisika, Adokari togo loeoi, Eteluori aanyun nuinera keoŋ, Ka nuabonokini nuka anuurianaka."
Habakkuk2:2 Kabonok EJAKAIT eoŋ ebe: “Kiwadika aitapoct, kidelelei kamor, Tetere ekeri do yenesiomi."
Habakkuk2:3 Naarai eriŋa aitapoet ejai kanuka apak naeseikinitai, Ewonyari mama ejai esaŋe, mam iŋalai. Karaida kitumor, kidareu ŋes; Naarai abeit ebuni, mam iyapi."
Habakkuk2:4 Koany edakara aiiarake, Mam itenara kotomake: Konye ebusi ikadoliton kanuka aiyuunike."
Habakkuk2:5 Eebo, ateni, ebino ŋes ekagwelanaran loemodi, Etuŋanan loiwonoono, lomam esalenenci ore; Loitalalaari eimielike bala Okatwak, Esubit bala atwanare, mam epedorio aimonikin, Konye etukonokini atekerin kere mamakeŋ, Etunakini ituŋa kere mamakeŋ."
Habakkuk2:6 Mam lu kere itatamete awarag aluikin ŋes, agarac naikienatari ŋes, ebalasi ebe, “ltukwi ŋol loiyatakini lumere luke! Itodoli ai? Loigugunatoi kaititiŋeta!”"
Habakkuk2:7 Mam kereka kes enyounete katipet lukikonyete jo, Ekwenyunete lukitunyunyurikinete jo? Iraun do ijo lonatunakec."
Habakkuk2:8 Naarai iŋat ijo atekerin nuipu, Kinasete jo luedeunos kere luka ituŋa; Kanuka aokot nuka ituŋa, ka akaje naeswamakinio akwap, Naeswamakinio ere ka luibojete kotoma kere,"
Habakkuk2:9 Itukwi ŋin yenedumakini etogoke ameda naerono, Tetere esipokini akaike neieelelei, Tetere itajario kakan naka aronis!"
Habakkuk2:10 Ineru nukileic abunokin etogokon, Naarai igela ijo atekerin nuipu; Idiaka kama ejai aijarakon."
Habakkuk2:11 Naarai emonyi amoru kotoma arwatat, Abao da kotoma akito eboŋokini ŋes."
Habakkuk2:12 Itukwi ŋin yeneduki ere kaokot, Kiticat ere kanumam adolit!"
Habakkuk2:13 Koany, mere naka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio Ituŋa aitaaritoi kanuka akim, Ka atekerin da agogoritoi kanuka aamameak?"
Habakkuk2:14 Naarai ilelebun akwap aijen aibuses naka EJAKAIT, Kwape erapitotor akip aŋolol."
Habakkuk2:15 Itukwi ŋin yenitamasi iidunyereke, Kosodi ainyalakin aisoritike, Kitemer ŋes da tetere eseseni amujalalakec!"
Habakkuk2:16 Ileleba ijo ileje itia aibuses. Komat ijo da, koraun bala yenimam ekepep. Kibelokin aikopo naka akan nakoteten naka EJAKAIT mamakon, Ejaunos ileic luimodokokas mama ejai aibusesukon."
Habakkuk2:17 Naarai kirapi jo akale nakiswamakin Lebanon, Kitukurian jo amudiar naka itiaŋ; Kanuka aokot nuka ituŋa, ka akaje nakiswamakin akwap, Ka ere, ka luibojete da kotoma kere,"
Habakkuk2:18 Anyoin ameda kidumakini aput naegerer, Naegeria ekasubanike ŋes; Aput naecalara, ka ekesisianakinan aimod? Naarai emunokina ekasubanike akeswam, Naesubunia aputosia nueban aaka."
Habakkuk2:19 Itukwi nin yenetemari akito ebe, Kokweny; Amoru da naaban ebe, Konyou! Isisianakini tope ŋin? Koany, iladaaritai kesabu ka epuesa, Emamei cut eiyeŋane kotomake."
Habakkuk2:20 Konye ejai EJAKAIT kotoma oyekaluke lokalaunan: Kililiŋ akwap kere kakonyeneke.
Habakkuk3:1 Ailip naka Kabakuk ena bi, naituruo epororo loka Sigionot."
Habakkuk3:2 Wu EJAKAIT, apup iemutokon, akurianar: Wu EJAKAIT, kisikwar akoniswam kokidin kikar, Kitejen kokidin kikar; Kanyunyura kiitu aitim,"
Habakkuk3:3 Ebuni Edeke koTeman, Lokalaunan komoru Paran. Erapi aibusesuke akuj, Ileleba akwap aituritike."
Habakkuk3:4 Esubit amwekimwekeke bala aica; Kolomunete amumwara kakanike; Nen da ebwaitor akepedor,"
Habakkuk3:5 Kinarenik ŋes atular, Kolomasi imalia luesaranete kakejeneke."
Habakkuk3:6 Abu kobwo, kitem akwap; Kosesen, kisirien atekerin; Kisiarisiar iroŋan luno, Kokukumoto iukon lukasonya. Akelosito araas nupeno."
Habakkuk3:7 Abu kaany iweman luka Kusan kitieanitoi; Komaranete aigalisio nuka akwap nako Midian.
Habakkuk3:8 Abu kereka EJAKAIT kokadak aluikin icorin? Koluiki kereka anyunyurakon icorin, Arai aisiopokon aluikin aŋolol, Tape ibwanenit ibalasinikon, Agalinikon nuka aitajar?"
Habakkuk3:9 Itoduu cut akabwakon; Ibwaik ikoioi auno. Ibu kocil akwap kicorin.
Habakkuk3:10 Koanyutu jo iroŋan, kokuriakaros; Kotubor ekwam loepol kakipi: Kolimu atar ekeporoto, Kikea akekanin kuju."
Habakkuk3:11 Kobwaata akoloŋ ka elap kopalarito kaiboisikec; Kaica naka imaliakon elosete, Kamwekimwek naka akwarakon naimilia."
Habakkuk3:12 Ibu kitor akwap kaisiop, Kicom atekerin kanyunyura,"
Habakkuk3:13 Iloma ijo aitaiar ikonituŋa, Aitajar lokinyonyoikitonokon akinyet; Ibu kimusun akou kotogo loka ikaronon, Aitodun apetetair kiton omurisin."
Habakkuk3:14 Ibu kieum akwes nuka ikaiiokoke kibelaike: Luapotu kopotu kwape etapipirio aitisiarikin eoŋ; Iyalamas bala luenyamete lukican kaiyeiyea.
Habakkuk3:15 Ibu kieak aŋolol kibalasinikon, Atukot naka akipi nuegogon."
Habakkuk3:16 Apupi, emarani da akoikika, Emarani aitukuka kanuka eporoto ŋol; Koloma aibos akojoka, amarani kaiboisika. Edareuni kaiyamakina apaaran naka ican Abunokin ituŋa lukisurokinete sio."
Habakkuk3:17 Naarai karaida mam etini iturot, Karaida emamei araito komusabibun; Emameun aitaaritoi naka eseitun, Komam imanikoria eraete inyamat; Kogclarai esipan loka amerekekin kanuk, Komamei esipan loka aituk kaujoi:"
Habakkuk3:18 Konye alakari toma EJAKAIT, Eyalamikin Edeke loka aitajarioka."
Habakkuk3:19 EDEKE, EJAKAIT, ŋes akagogoŋ, Itupusi ŋesi akakeie bala akeie nuka amori, Ketolosi kaiboisioka nuicelelecte. Loka Ekapolon loka iboro lueruos, koboroka lukaputio lueruos."
Zephaniah1:1 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naabu kobu mama ejai Sepania okoku loka Kusi, okoku loka Gedalia, okoku loka Amaria, okoku loka Kesekia, kapaarasia nuka Yosia okoku loka Amon, ekabaka loka Yuda."
Zephaniah1:2 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Etanaŋi eut iboro kere kakwap,”"
Zephaniah1:3 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Etanaŋi ituŋanan ka itiaŋ; Etanaŋi akweny nuka apak, ka iboro lukeeor, Ka luitiguikinete nepepe ka ikaronok; Amudiari da ituŋanan kakwap,"
Zephaniah1:4 Aŋori akakan mama ejai Yuda, Ka luibojete koYerusalem kere; Amudiari aatoŋot naka Baal kaibois kana, Ka ckiror da loka isasedotin luemaetc aputosia;"
Zephaniah1:5 Ka ŋul da luemaete ajore naka akuj Koswjon luka itogoi; Ka ŋul luemaete, luiyapoikinete mama ejai EJAKAIT, Iyapoikincte da elimito Malakam;"
Zephaniah1:6 Ka ŋul da luaboŋosi anyoun katupit EJAKAIT: Ka ŋul da lumam apotu komoata EJAKAIT, Karaida aiŋit nuke,”"
Zephaniah1:7 Kililiŋ kakonyen nuka Ejakait EDEKE: Naarai eapie apaaran naka EJAKAIT: Naarai etemoki EJAKAIT asubanit, Etalau da ikepejok."
Zephaniah1:8 Kosodi kanen ejaun kapaaran naka asubanit naka EJAKAIT, “Etieani eoŋ ikapolok, ka odwe luka ekabaka, Ka ŋul kere luenapitos anapito numo,"
Zephaniah1:9 Kapaaran kaŋin etieani eoŋ ŋul kere luilamete ekek, Luilelebete etogo loka ejakaitikec akaje ka aiŋal.”"
Zephaniah1:10 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Kapaaran kaŋin ejaun ecelet loka aimony Naebuni korute loka Agaria, Ka aibwolol kari nakiareit, Ka aigugururunun koukon."
Zephaniah1:11 Kibwololoto yesi luibojete koMakatcs, Naarai amudiaros ituŋa kere lukagwelanarak: Ŋul kere luigugunatos kepuesa agelaros."
Zephaniah1:12 Kosodi kanen kapak kaŋin Aŋiei eoŋ Yerusalem kakalasia; Etieani ituŋa luaburokoros kanuka adakaikee, Luebalas kotauonokee ebe, ‘Mam EJAKAIT iswamai nuejok, Karaida aswam nueroko.’"
Zephaniah1:13 Eraun do abarakec amejauna, Ikecetogoi da ameiei, Eebo, edukete itogoi, Konye mam iboikinos toma; Iraete imanikoria luka emusabibu, Konye mam emasete ebinoke.”"
Zephaniah1:14 Eapie apaaran nakapolon naka EJAKAIT, Eapie, iwonyunit noi, Ŋes eporoto loka apaaran naka EJAKAIT; Emonyi noi erunanan lokirigi kanen."
Zephaniah1:15 Apaaran ŋin ŋes apaaran naka anyunyura, Apaaran naka ican ka aburun, Apaaran naka asiŋo ka ameie, Apaaran naka amuton ka aiikilil, Apaaran naka idouon ka amuton naejesi cucucuc."
Zephaniah1:16 Apaaran naka arupepe ka elulu, Aluikin ireria luebwaitai, Aluikin da itogoi lukagogonok Iueoiak."
Zephaniah1:17 Ayauni eoŋ aburun otuŋa, Tetere elosete bala imudukjok, Naarai adiakasi kama ejai EJAKAIT: Ebukoros aokotokee bala apua, Akiriŋikec da bala aorer,"
Zephaniah1:18 Mam epedori epuesakee karaida esabukee aitajar kes Kapaaran naka anyunyura naka EJAKAIT, Konye idoporo akwap kere kakim naka ekoloke; Naarai itanani, eebo, itanaŋi ketasuro Ŋul kere luibojete kakwap."
Zephaniah2:1 Kotukonokinos, eebo, kotukonokinos, Ŋo ateker namam ileieikin;"
Zephaniah2:2 Eroko elomuna ekisil, Eroko etuboro apaaran bala agugu, Eroko ebunokina yes anyunyura naededen naka EJAKAIT, Eroko apaaran naka anyunyura naka EJAKAIT ebunokina yes."
Zephaniah2:3 Komoata EJAKAIT, yes kere luitasonos luka akwap, Luiswamaete akeicorakineta; Komoata adolit, komoata da aitasono: Motoko kitonopjo kapaaran naka anyunyura naka EJAKAIT,"
Zephaniah2:4 Naarai eialakinjo Gasa, Eraun Asukelon da ameje: Ireneaŋo ituŋa luka Asudod kidiŋ paaran, Eutoŋo da Ekuron,"
Zephaniah2:5 Itukwi luibojete kariri naka aŋolol, Ateker naka Ikeretin! Kiluik akirot naka EJAKAIT jo, wu Kanaan, Akwap naka Ipilisitian; Kamudiari jo komam esali yeniboie kotoma."
Zephaniah2:6 Eraun ariri naka aŋolol ironyia, Ejaunos idukurun luka ikecokok, Ka anukia da nuka isipanin."
Zephaniah2:7 Eraun ariri naka aŋolol airumet naka aatoŋot naka ekek loka Yuda; Itadakete isipaninikee kanen: Eperete kuare otogoi luka Asukelon. Naarai eanyanari kes EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, Inyakuni kaijoreoŋokec,"
Zephaniah2:8 “Apup eoŋ amorosit naka Moab, Ka amoromor naka idwe luka Amon, Nuamoromorooto ikatuŋa, Aitopoloor bonik aluikin eikorukec.”"
Zephaniah2:9 Kanuka nun ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo, Edeke loka Isirael ebe, “Kwape ajaria eoŋ, abeit eraun Moab bala Sodom, Ka idwe luka Amon bala Gomora, Airumet naka ikukwa, ka apanya nuka abalaŋ, Ka ameje naka ikar kere. Luideunos luka ikatuŋa enaŋete kes, Aatoŋot naka atekereka irumi kes.”"
Zephaniah2:10 Edumunete ŋun kanuka eiturikec, Naarai amoromoroto ido kitopolooros bonik, Asurokin ituŋa luka EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo."
Zephaniah2:11 Eraun EJAKAIT etasuro mama ejaas; Naarai isiriebi idekesjo kere luka akwap eteŋei; Emaete ŋes ituŋa, ŋinituŋanan kaiboisike, Kes apujana kere nuka atekerin,"
Zephaniah2:12 Yes da Iyetjopian, kiaŋo kekileŋika."
Zephaniah2:13 Eŋori ŋesi akekan aluikin agolitomei, Emudiari Asuria; Ituluori ŋesi Ninebe ameie, Koono da bala amodiŋ."
Zephaniah2:14 Eperenenete isipanin kokidinike, Itian kere luka atekerin; Iboie erere ka eeoe kopirinoke; Eruo etukuri kadirisan; Ejaun ekuruk okek; Naarai alaea aswam naka eres."
Zephaniah2:15 Ŋol ŋes ere loibwona, loeboie komam epodo, Loabala kotauke ebe, “Ajai eoŋ, Emamei ece lokiputor eoŋ,” Buu! Arau ca ma ameje, Aibois neeperete itiaij! Ŋin yenitori etubor isuari ŋes, Iianiiani akanike."
Zephaniah3:1 Itukwi ŋol lokepali loemunauna, Ere loemwanana!"
Zephaniah3:2 Mam erimarit eporoto; Mam ecamunit aleeoŋo; Mam emunokina EJAKAIT; Mam ikunyakinit Ekedeke.
Zephaniah3:3 Ikapolokoke kokidinike kes iŋatunyo luegatas; Ikatubokoke kes ipeen luka eboŋ; Mam iteperorete ibore kiton tupuruc,"
Zephaniah3:4 Inabinoke kes ituŋa luebenen luebilakinete eboter: Amunaasi isascdotinike aibois nakalaunan, Eswamakis ekisil nuka akaie,"
Zephaniah3:5 Edolit EJAKAIT kokidinike; Mam iswamaenenei eut numam adolit; Isideleleuni eketube ninitupuruc. Mam ekurwori; Konye lumam edolito mam ejenete aileicikin.
Zephaniah3:6 “Abu eoŋ kagela atekerin; Asiŋoros itogoikec lukagogonok; Etisil irotinikee, komamei yenitori; Amudiaros ireriakec, tape emamei ituŋanan, Emamei yeniboie kotoma."
Zephaniah3:7 Kabala ebe, ‘Abeit kayoŋi eoŋ, Ecamuni aleeoŋo; Kinyek aiboisike agelaŋo, Kwape ajaatar kere nuaseu kanuke.’ Konye kodilokis anyoun kitobosata aswamisjokec kere.”"
Zephaniah3:8 Kanuka ŋun ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Kidareutu yesi eoŋ, Aitodol apaaran naanyounjo ameiaun, Naarai apeleikinit atukonokin atekerin, Ainotun ajakanuto, Abukokin kes aisjopoka, Akanyunyura kere naededen; Naarai idopoŋo akwapin ke re kakim naka ekoloka,"
Zephaniah3:9 “Naarai kapak kaŋin ebelokini do einere loka atekerin Araun einere loesegara, Tetere iworoete kere ekiror loka EJAKAIT, Ka aijaanakin da ŋes ketau edjopet."
Zephaniah3:10 Anyoun kokekwa juwai koeorin luka Etjopia, Eyaunete ikenainaakaka, Apese naka luisiarisiaraka, ainakineteka."
Zephaniah3:11 “Kapaaran kaŋin mam kileicikin kanuka aswamisjokon kere, Nuibuearit kamakaŋ; Naarai alemari kokidinikus luituros luiwonooko, Mam bobo ipoga koronataka lokalaunan."
Zephaniah3:12 Konye enyeini kokidiŋikon ituŋa lueroikinitoi lukican, Emunosi kesi ekiror loka EJAKAIT,"
Zephaniah3:13 Mam aatoŋot naka Isirael iswamai numam adolit, Karaida einer nuka aisab; Karaida mam edumuna aŋajepa nuka aiŋal aitukekee: Naarai enyamete eperete, Emameun da yenitukuriani kes.”"
Zephaniah3:14 Koye, ijo akoku naka Sjon, Kibwon, ijo Isirael! Kiyalama, kolakara ketau kere, Ŋo akoku naka Yerusalem!"
Zephaniah3:15 Alema EJAKAIT itubesiakon, Ereŋea lokasurupikon. Ekabaka loka Isirael, ŋes EJAKAIT, Ejai kidinikon: Mam bobo ikurianar aronis,"
Zephaniah3:16 Kapaaran kaŋin elimokinjo Yerusalem ebe, “Sirikikurianar, ijo Sjon, Kinyeis akonikanin aleiekekar,"
Zephaniah3:17 Ejai EJAKAIT Ekonideke kidinikon, Lokirigi loitaiari: Iyalamikini ŋesi kanukon kailel; Iyeŋi ŋesi kaminake, Elakari kayoore kanukon."
Zephaniah3:18 Kwape kapaaran naka atukonokin nakalaunan, “Alemari abili kamakus, Tetere mam idumunete amorosit kanuke,"
Zephaniah3:19 Koany, kapak kaŋin Eswamakini eoŋ nul kere lukiroikinito jo; Etaiari ŋin naieodo, Etukonokini nin naereŋearitai: Etuluori ikeceleie araun aiturit ka ekiror, Kakwapin kere.”"
Zephaniah3:20 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, “Kapak kaŋin kesukunyikini yes, Kapak kaŋin da atukonokini yes: Naarai ketuluori yes ekiror ka aiturit Kotuŋasinei kere luka akwap, Nakenyakunia kaijoreoŋokus kakonyenekus.”"
Haggai1:1 Kokaru lokiareit loka ekabaka Daŋo, kolap lokikanyetekape, kapaaran nasodit naka elap, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Kagai enabi, ka Serubabel okoku loka Sealutiel, ekayaiton loka Yuda, ka Yosua okoku loka Yekosadak, esasedoti lopeti, ehe,"
Haggai1:2 “Inera EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo kwanata ebe: Ebalas ituŋa lu ebe, Eroko apak naduket etogo loka EJAKAIT edolo,”"
Haggai1:3 Kosodi kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Kagai enabi ebe,"
Haggai1:4 “Erai kereka na apak naibojoto yesi kotogoikus luitubusitai, kwabo asiljor etogo lo?"
Haggai1:5 Aso do inera EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo kwanata ebe: Koomoomata ikusiponesjo,"
Haggai1:6 Ipotu koyeata luipu, isakete luikidjoko; inyamete konye mam imonikinos; imasete, konye mam numatan kiupete; inapitoa igoen, konye emamei yenemwana; ŋin yenedumununei eropit, edumununei eropit aibwaikin oriagi loepedopedo,"
Haggai1:7 “Inera EJ AKAIT loka ajoresjo kwanata ebe: Koomoomata ikusiponesjo,"
Haggai1:8 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kodokasi oroŋat, koyaut akito, kodukoto etogo; eoŋ da esiyalamikini ŋes, ketubusikinere,"
Haggai1:9 Ipotu koomito adumun luipu, ido keany, koraunos luikidjoko; naiyauniata kes ore, abu kakuta. Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo ebe, Kanukinyo? Kanuka ekatogo loasiljor, kwabo ikerete yesi ŋinituŋanan togoke,"
Haggai1:10 Kanuka ŋun etikoki akuj akopyo, etikoki da akwap akeraito kanukus,"
Haggai1:11 Abu kanyarak akamu toma akwap, ka iroŋan, ka akima, ka ebino, ka akinyet, ka lueraete kalup, ka ituŋa, ka ibaren, ka aitaaritoi da kere naka akanin,”"
Haggai1:12 Kosodi Serubabel okoku loka Sealutiel, ka Yosua okoku loka Yekosadak, esasedoti lopeti, ka luedeuna kotuna, arimar eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, ka akiro nuka Kagai enabi, kwape abu EJAKAIT Ekecedeke kijukaria ŋes; koyonata ituŋa EJAKAIT."
Haggai1:13 Kosodi Kagai, ekiyakia loka EJAKAIT atemar kakirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejaas ituŋa atiar, “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ajai eoŋ kayes.”"
Haggai1:14 Kisidik EJAKAIT emoyo loka Serubabel okoku loka Sealutiel, ekayaiton loka Yuda, ka emoyo loka Yosua okoku loka Yekosadak, esasedoti lopeti, ka imoyon da luka luedeuna kere kotuŋa; kopotu kiswamata aswam kotogo loka EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo, Ekecedeke,"
Haggai1:15 kapaaran naka akaisaarei ka nuoŋon naka elap, kolap lokikanyetekape."
Haggai2:1 Kokaru lokiareit loka ekabaka Daŋo, kolap lokikanyetekaarei, kapaaran naka akaisaarei kanadjopet naka elap, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Kagai enabi ebe,"
Haggai2:2 “Kolimok Serubabel okoku loka Sealutiel, ekayaiton loka Yuda, ka Yosua okoku loka Yekosadak, esasedoti lopeti, ka luedeuna kotuŋa ebe,"
Haggai2:3 ‘Iŋai bo esalit kayesi loabu koanyunite etogo lo kaibusesuke nasek? Etakani kwana biai kamakus? Mere esubit kakonyenekus bala ibore yenitai?
Haggai2:4 Konye ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kogogonjor, ijo Serubabel; kogogonjor, ijo Yosua, okoku loka Yekosadak, esasedoti lopeti; kogogonjoros, yes ituŋa kere luka akwap; ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kiswamata: naarai ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo ebe, Ajai eoŋ kayes,"
Haggai2:5 kwape ajaar akirot naabu ketutukik yes nailomuniata koMisiri, iboienenei ekamoyo kotomakus: sirikikuriakaros."
Haggai2:6 Naarai inera EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo kwanata ebe: Irwan atipet bobo, apak naedit, eianakini akuj, ka akwap, ka aŋolol, ka akwap naconit;"
Haggai2:7 ejaŋiiani atekerin, epote iboro luimielas atekerin kere: ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo ebe, Elelebi aibuses togo lo."
Haggai2:8 Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo ebe, Erai epuesa ekaij, esabu da ekaŋ."
Haggai2:9 Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo ebe, Aibuses naka etogo kalo nakoinaren itelekari nasek: Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo ebe, Esinapikini aibois na,”"
Haggai2:10 Kapaaran naka akaisaarei ka nuoŋon kolap lokikanyetekaonon, kokaru lokiareit loka Daŋo, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Kagai enabi ebe,"
Haggai2:11 “Inera EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo kwanata ebe: Kinit cani isasedotin nuka ikisila ebe,"
Haggai2:12 ‘Arai kitiŋ ituŋanan akiriŋ nakalaunan katwele naka egoeke, kotiroria emugati, arai atap, arai ebino, arai akinyet, arai akiriŋ kere katweleke, araun kereka ŋin yenikalaunan?’” Kobonokis isasedotin ebe, “Mam.”"
Haggai2:13 Kosodi Kagai atemar atiar, “Arai ketiro yenimam elai kanuka akuan nakatwan idjopet koboro katjul eraun kereka nin yenimam elai?” Kobonokis isasedotin atiar, “Eraun yenimam elai.”"
Haggai2:14 Kosodi Kagai aboŋokin ebe, “Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ikote nen ituŋa lu, ikoni da nen ateker na kakonyeneka; ikoni nen ŋiniswam naka akaninikee; nin yeneinakinete kaŋina erai yenimam elai."
Haggai2:15 Aso do, kenainait, koomoomata nuejaunete amear kapaaran kana ape. Eroko idokokino amoru kuju amoru koyekalu loka EJAKAIT: ipotu koiaas biai?"
Haggai2:16 Ameun kapaki kaŋin kere, naabunjo ituŋanan atukit naka aitemisjo akaisaarei, emwaasi do atomon bon; naabunjo ituŋanan acues naka ebino aokun amotii akaisakany, emwaasi do akaisaarei bon."
Haggai2:17 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Abu kadany yes kaitukub, ka airouroun, ka akaka da kotoma aswamisjo kere nuka akaninikus; konye mam ipotu kibeleunos mama ajai."
Haggai2:18 Kenainait, koomoomata amear kapaaran kana ape, amear kapaaran naka akaisaarei ka nuoŋon naka elap Jokikanyetekaoŋon. Amear kapaaran naasipokinere apetetait naka eyekalu loka EJAKAIT, koomoomata:"
Haggai2:19 eroko kereka ikinyom ejaas odula? Eroko teni mam erai emusabibu, ka etini, ka ekamamaga ka eseituni? Kesirereŋi yes ameari lolo,”"
Haggai2:20 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT irwan nakiareit mama ejai Kagai kapaaran naka akaisaarei ka nuoŋon naka elap ebe,"
Haggai2:21 “Kolimok Serubabel, ekayaiton loka Yuda ebe, Eianiiani aku; ka akwapin:"
Haggai2:22 abuburiari eicoloŋ loka ajakanuto; amudiari agogoŋ naka ajakanuto nuka atekerin; abuburiari agalin, ka nul da luibojete kotomakec; ibiroros abalasin ka lukebwanenokokee, ninitunanan kekileij loka onaceke."
Haggai2:23 Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo ebe, Kapaaran kaŋin kayanaari jo, Serubabel ebulesitika, okoku loka Sealutiel; Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ketuluori jo egilut lokipucet, Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresjo ebe, Naarai kaseu jo.”"
Zechariah1:1 Toma olap lokikanyetekauni, kokaru lokiareit loka Dario, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Sekaria okoku loka Berekia, okoku loka Ido, enabi, kobala ebe,"
Zechariah1:2 “Anyunyuriki noi EJAKAIT lukapapaakus.
Zechariah1:3 Kanuka ŋun kolimok kes ebe, Inera EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kwanata ebe: Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, Koboŋutu neajai eoŋ, Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, Eoŋ da aboŋuni mama ijaas,"
Zechariah1:4 Sirikiputokinos kalukapapaakus, luamonyanakinete inabin lusek mamakee ebe, ‘Inera EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kwanata ebe, Koboŋutu ca yesi anyoun koponesiokus lueroko, ka aswamisiokus da nueroko.’ Konye ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mam apotu kopuput, karaida akiirar eoŋ."
Zechariah1:5 Ai bo ejaas lukapapaakus? Inabin da, ejarenenete kereka kesi ikar kere?"
Zechariah1:6 Konye akakiro ka ikakisila lueeorakinit ikakejaanakinak inabin, mam kes apotu kodolokis lukapapaakus? Kibelokis kotemasi atiar, Kwape keomitor EJAKAIT loka ajoresio aiswamakin oni, kwape ejaatar iponesiowok, kwape ejaatar da aswamisiowok, abu kiswamak oni kwape kwaŋin.”"
Zechariah1:7 Kapaaran naka akaisaarei ka nuoŋon naka elap lokitomonet ka lodiopet, ŋes elap Sebat, kokaru lokiareit loka Dario, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Sekaria okoku loka Berekia, okoku loka Ido, enabi. Kobala Sekaria ebe,"
Zechariah1:8 “Abu kaany kuare, ido koany, etuŋanan ibwanenit ebalasit lokareŋan, kobwo ŋesi kaneajaas ikito luka ekadas luajaas ajesa; kauke da ajaas ibalasin lukareŋak, ka lukomolik, ka lukakwaŋak."
Zechariah1:9 Kasodi atemar ebe, ‘Wu ekajakait, inyoika bo lu?’ Kabala emalaika lokinera keoŋ ebe, ‘Etodikini jo kwape ejaatar.’"
Zechariah1:10 Koboŋok etuŋanan loabwoi neejaas ikito luka ekadas kotema atiar, ‘Lu kes luejukarit EJAKAIT alosit lailo ka laije kakwap.’"
Zechariah1:11 Kobŋokis kesi emalaika loka EJAKAIT loabwoi neajaas ikito luka ekadas, kotemasi atiar, ‘Kipou kaloto lailo ka laije kakwap, ido koany, iboie akwap kere iyamakina.’"
Zechariah1:12 Kosodi emalaika loka EJAKAIT aboŋokin ebe, ‘Wu EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, itodoli ai mam itimi Yerusalem, ka ireria luka Yuda, luinyunyurikinit ijo ikar lu akaisakanykaarei?’"
Zechariah1:13 Koboŋok EJAKAIT emalaika lokinera keoŋ kakiro nuejok, kes akiro nuitalakarete,"
Zechariah1:14 Katema do emalaika lokinera keoŋ ebe, ‘Kiworo ijo ebe, Inera EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kwanata ebe: Ekokotikin noi Yerusalem ka Sion kekokote loepol."
Zechariah1:15 Anyunyurik noi atekerin nuebwalara; naarai abu kanyunyurikin edit, kiyatakis kesi aitieanet."
Zechariah1:16 Kanuka ŋun inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Aboŋu eoŋ Yerusalem kaitim; ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, Edukokinio nen ekatogo, eriorio auno nakitemis ko Yerusalem."
Zechariah1:17 Kiworo bobo ebe, Inera EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kwanata ebe: Ilaparos bobo ireriaka kanuka akerianut; italakari bobo EJAKAIT Sion, eseuni bobo Yerusalem.’’’"
Zechariah1:18 Keteluo akakonye kete, ido koany, amumwar aoŋon."
Zechariah1:19 Katema emalaika lokinera keoŋ atiar, “Anyoika bo nu?” Kaboŋok ebe, “Nu kes amumwara nukisiarisiarete Yuda, ka Isirael, ka Yerusalem da.”"
Zechariah1:20 Ketodik EJAKAIT eoŋ ikatatak iwoŋon.
Zechariah1:21 Kasodi atemar ebe, “Anyoika nueponitos lu aswam?” Kiner ebe, “Nu kes amumwara nukisiarisiarete Yuda, tape emameun ituŋanan yenitonyouni akouke: konye eponito lu aitukurian kes, aiket amumwara nuka atekerin nuadakakis amumwarakee akwap naka Yuda aisiarisiar ŋes.”"
Zechariah2:1 Keteluo akakonye kete, ido koany, etuŋanan loitinit auno nakitemis kakanike."
Zechariah2:2 Kasodi atemar ebe, “Ai bo ilosi ijo?” Katema ŋesi eoŋ atiar, “Aitem Yerusalem, aanyun alalauke, ka aoiauke da.”"
Zechariah2:3 Ido koany, koloma emalaika lokinera keoŋ, kolom eeemalaika aisiriamar ŋes."
Zechariah2:4 Kotema ŋes atiar, “Koker, kinera kekatumunan kanol ebe, ‘Ejaunos luibojete ko Yerusalem kwape koreria lumam ebwaitai, kanuka aipues naka ituŋa ka ibaren kotoma."
Zechariah2:5 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Araun eoŋ arwatat naka akim airimor ŋes, araun da aibuses kidiŋike.’”"
Zechariah2:6 Yesi ba, ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Yesi ba, kokerata anyoun kakwap naka agolitomei: naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kesiarisiari yes kwape kikwamin iwonon luka akuj."
Zechariah2:7 Ŋo ba, Sion, koyuun bon, ijo loiboiete kakoku naka Babulon."
Zechariah2:8 Naarai inera EJAKAIT loka ajoresio kwanata ebe: Akaulo kaibuses abu kejuk eoŋ mama ejaas atekerin nukinatarito jo: naarai ŋin yenikitirori jo etirorit eeopot loka akonuke:
Zechariah2:9 “Naarai, koany, elakilaki akakan kamakee, eraunos amejei mama ejaas ŋul lueiaanakinete kes. Ŋenunete do ebe kejuku EJAKAIT loka ajoresio eoŋ."
Zechariah2:10 Koye, kolel, ijo akoku naka Sion; naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Koany, abuni, eboikini mamakon."
Zechariah2:11 Imorikikinos atekerin nuipu mama ejai EJAKAIT kapaaran kaŋin, eraunos ikatuŋa; eboikini mamakon, iienunete do ebe kejuku EJAKAIT loka aioresio eoŋ mamakono"
Zechariah2:12 Irumi EJAKAIT Yuda bala ewaike kakwap nakalaunan, eseuni bobo Yerusalem.”"
Zechariah2:13 Kililinata, awat kere, kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT: naarai akwenyu ŋesi anyoun kaiboisike nakalaunan."
Zechariah3:1 Abu ŋesi ketodik eoŋ Yosua esasedoti lopeti, ebwoi kakonyen nuka emalaika loka EJAKAIT, ebwoi Satan da kakekan nakoteten araun loka surupike."
Zechariah3:2 Kotema EJAKAIT Satan atiar, “Kitoron EJAKAIT jo, Satan! Eebo, EJAKAIT loabu koseu Yerusalem kitoron jo! Mere lo akalas naalemuna kakim?”"
Zechariah3:3 Konapit Yosua inapen lumodok, ebwoi kakonyen nuka emalaika."
Zechariah3:4 Koboŋok, kolimok ŋul luebwoete kakonyeneke ebe, “Kolacak ŋes inapen lumodok.” Kotema ŋes atiar, “Koany, alaca numam edolitokon kamakon, ketanapi do jo igoen luejokuka cut.”"
Zechariah3:5 Kabala ebe, “Kitanapikis ŋes egoe loelai lokieniena akouke.” Kitanapikis ca egoe loelai lokieniena akouke, kitanap da inapen; kobwo emalaika loka EJAKAIT kodieke."
Zechariah3:6 Kitogogon emalaika mama ejai Yosua kobala ebe,"
Zechariah3:7 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe: Arai ilosenenei korotinika, arai da iricit aicorakineteka, ŋes konyet itubokinia ekatogo, idari da alaroika, kainakini eoŋ jo aibois alomunun nepepe kanul luebwoete kodie."
Zechariah3:8 Kopup bo ijo, Yosua, esasedoti lopeti, ijo ka ipaupakon luibojete kakonyenekon; naarai kes ituŋa lueraas aanyunet; naarai koany, etolomikini ekakeiaanakinan Atenut."
Zechariah3:9 Naarai koany, amoru naebwaikinit kakonyen nuka Yosua; ejaas akonye akanykaarei kamoru: koany, ebala EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe, Egirakini emaeareteke, alemari da numam adolit naka akwap kana kadiopepaaran."
Zechariah3:10 Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, Kapaaran kaŋin inyaraunete yesi ŋinitunanan ekeidunyet kwap kemusabibuke ido kwap ketinike.”"
Zechariah4:1 Kobu bobo emalaika lokiner keoŋ kitekweny eoŋ, kwape itekwenyunia ituŋanan kaioke,"
Zechariah4:2 Katema ŋesi eoŋ atiar, “Inyo bo iany ijo?” Katema atiar, “Aany, ido koany, epir loka atala loka esabu kere, atubake da kujuke, ejaas da kaketalai akanykaarei; ejaas da ipiin ikanykaarei kaninidiopet naka atalai, nuejaas kujuke."
Zechariah4:3 Kidunyas kikito iarei luka eseitun, ediopet kosiepike lokoteten loka atuba, ece da kosiepike lokokediany."
Zechariah4:4 Kabonok emalaika lokinera keoŋ atiar, “Ekajakait, anyoika bo nu?”"
Zechariah4:5 Kosodi emalaika lokinera keoŋ aboŋokin eoŋ ebe, “Mam ca ma jo ijeni ŋun?” Katema atiar, “Eeea, ekaiakait.”"
Zechariah4:6 Kosodi ŋesi aboŋokin eoŋ ebe, “Na ŋes akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Serubabel ebe: Ebala EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe, Mere kanuka agogoŋ, karaida kanuka apedor, konye kanuka Ekamoyo,"
Zechariah4:7 Iŋai ca ma ijo, ijo eronat lokapolon? Iraun apuuton kakonyen nuka Serubabel; itolomuni ŋesi amoru nakapolon kibwonas ebe,, Asianut, asianut mama ejai!’”"
Zechariah4:8 Ido kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe,"
Zechariah4:9 “Apesikis akanin nuka Serubabel apetetait naka etogo kalo; enetakinete da akekanin ŋes. Ŋenuni ijo da ebe keiuku EJAKAIT loka aioresio eoŋ mama ijai.
Zechariah4:10 Naarai iŋai ca emenit apaaran naka iboro ludidik? Naarai iyalamasi kesi, eanyunete ebiriji kakan naka Serubabel, “Nu akanykaarei, kes akonye nuka EJAKAIT; ekerete lailo ka laije anatar akwap kere.”"
Zechariah4:11 Kasodi eoŋ aboŋokin ŋes ebe, “Inyo bo ikito lu luarei luka eseitun kosiep lokoteten loka epir loka atala kosiepike da lokokediany?”"
Zechariah4:12 Kabonok eoŋ nakiareit katema ŋes atiar, “Inyo bo aluŋuren nu nuarei nuka eseitun, nuidunyas kamodoi nuka esabu, nuebukonorete akinyet naka esabu?”"
Zechariah4:13 Kabonok ŋesi eoŋ ebe, “Mam ca ma jo ijeni nun?” Kabala ebe, “Eeea, ekaiakait.”"
Zechariah4:14 Kosodi ŋesi atemar ebe, “Ŋul kes luarei lukinyonyoikitono akinyet, luebwoete kodie ka EJAKAIT loka akwap kere.”"
Zechariah5:1 Kasodi bobo eoŋ aiteluor akakonye, kete, ido koany, anunuket naka eitabo naeporitoi."
Zechariah5:2 Katema ŋesi eoŋ atiar, “Inyo bo iany ijo?” Kabonok ebe, “Aany anunuket naka eitabo naeporitoi; aoiauke ikubitin akaisaarei, alalauke da ikubitin itomon.”"
Zechariah5:3 Kosodi ŋesi atemar eoŋ atiar, “Ŋin ŋes ekenit loelosi anatar akwap kere: naarai kwape ejaar owaike ediopet egelario ŋinituŋanan kere yenekokoi; ido kwape eiaar owaike ece egelario ninitunanan kere yeniyapoi."
Zechariah5:4 Ebala EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe, Etolosi eoŋ ŋes, elomari ŋesi togo loka ekokolan, togo da loka ŋin yeniyapoi aiŋal elimit ekakiror: iboienenei togoke, emudiari ŋes ka akitoke ka amoruke da.”"
Zechariah5:5 Kosodi emalaika lokinera keoŋ alomar, katema ŋesi eoŋ atiar, “Kiteluo cani akonikonye, kite ibore ii yenelosi.”"
Zechariah5:6 Kabala ebe, “Inyo bo ii?” Kotema atiar, “Ŋin ŋes epa loelosi.” Ido kotema atiar, “Ŋin ŋes numam adolit kakwap kere.”"
Zechariah5:7 Ido koany, aponi kikeunai arapetait naka asasit, ido kiboie aberu kotoma epa!"
Zechariah5:8 Kobala ebe, “Na ŋes Aronis”; koeaka ŋes kotoma epa, kocaka alaniru naka asasit kaitukuke,"
Zechariah5:9 Kasodi aiteluor akakonye, kete, ido koany, kolomut aŋor aarei. Kojai ekwam kabebenokakec; ajaas kes kabebenoka kwape abebenoka nuka etolut: kodakasi epa kidin kakwap ka akuj."
Zechariah5:10 Kasodi eoŋ atemar emalaika lokinera keoŋ atiar, “Ai bo eyaŋaarete nu epa?”"
Zechariah5:11 Katema ŋesi eoŋ atiar, “Adukokinia ŋes etogo kakwap naka Sinar: naitem"
Zechariah6:1 Keteluo bobo akakonye, kete, ido koany, kopotu agalin aoŋon kokidin kironan iarei; ironan da keraas ironan luka aisinit."
Zechariah6:2 Agali nasodit ajaas ibalasin lukarenak; agali nakiareit ibalasin lukirionok;
Zechariah6:3 agali nakiwuniet ibalasin Iukakwanak; ka agali da nakiwononet ibalasin luenirooko lukagogoŋok,"
Zechariah6:4 Kasodi eoŋ aboŋokin emalaika lokinera keoŋ ebe, “Ekajakait, inyoika bo lu?”"
Zechariah6:5 Kabonok emalaika eoŋ atiar, “Lu kes ikwamin iwonon luka akui, lualomasi anyoun kaibwo kakonyen nuka EJAKAIT loka akwap kere."
Zechariah6:6 Ebei agali naejaas ibalasin lukirionok akwap naka agolitomei; kotupakis lukakwanak kes; kobeete luenirooko akwap naka eŋalakimak.”
Zechariah6:7 Kobeete lukagogonok, komootos aimaniman lailo ka laije anatar akwap. Kobala ebe, “Koloto yesi, kimanimanata lailo ka laije da anatar akwap.” Kosodete kimanimanata akwap,"
Zechariah6:8 Kosodi ŋesi aiworor eoŋ katema ebe, “Koany, ŋul luebeete akwap naka agolitomei apotu kisiyamikis Ekamoyo kakwap naka agolitomei.”"
Zechariah6:9 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ajai ebe:
Zechariah6:10 “Koyana kakesi kaluejoreoritai, kes Kelidai, ka Tobiya, ka Yedaia, luadolut anyoun koBabulon, kolot ijo da kapaaran kaŋin, koloma togo loka Yosia, okoku loka Sepania."
Zechariah6:11 Ido kiiau kes epuesa ka esabu, kiswamaunia abokoi, kitanapik kes akou naka Yosua okoku loka Yekosadak, esasedoti lopeti;"
Zechariah6:12 kolimok ŋes ebe, ‘Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, Koany, etuŋanan ekekiror Atenu; epolouni ŋesi kaiboisike, eduki ŋesi eyekalu loka EJAKAIT."
Zechariah6:13 Eduki teni ŋesi eyekalu loka EJAKAIT; ibwoki ŋesi aibuses, iboie irumi koicoloŋoke loka ajakanut. Ejaun esasedoti die koicoloŋoke: ejaun ainerun naka ainapakin kidin kakesi luarei.’"
Zechariah6:14 Ejaunos abokoi mama ejaas Kelem, ka Tobiya, ka Yedaia, ka Ken * okoku loka Sepania araut aisiitunet koyekalu loka EJAKAIT."
Zechariah6:15 “Epote da nul luelwaka iŋarakinete aiduk eyekalu loka EJAKAIT, ijenunete ebe kejuku EJAKAIT loka ajoresio eoŋ mam ijaas, Ejaun do ŋin, arai ikukuraka arimar eporoto loka EJAKAIT Ekusideke.”"
Zechariah7:1 Kosodi kanen, kokaru lokiwononet loka ekabaka Dario, kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Sekaria kapaaran nakiwononet naka elap loki kanyerekaonon, ŋes Kisileb."
Zechariah7:2 Apotu luko Bet-el kiyakias Sareser ka Regemmelak, ka ikecetuŋa aimaimaun asianut naka EJAKAIT,"
Zechariah7:3 ka aiŋit da isasedotin luka etogo loka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, ka inabin ebe, “Kebusakinit kereka eoŋ aimony ka ailuŋ kolap lokikanyet, kwape eswamaa ikar lu luipu?”"
Zechariah7:4 Kosodi kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio mama ajai ebe,"
Zechariah7:5 “Kolimok ituŋa kere luka akwap, ka isasedotin ebe, Naipotu koluniata ka aibworo kolap lokikanyet ka lokikanyetekaarei, ikar lu akaisakanykaarei, ipotu tope kolunata mama ajai eoŋ, eoŋ ba?"
Zechariah7:6 Nainyamiata, naimasiata da, mam kereka inyamete kanukus, komasete da kanukus?"
Zechariah7:7 Mam kereka kibusakinito akiirar akiro nukelimonokini EJAKAIT konabin lusek, nakejaatar ituŋa lukiboiete koYerusalem, kisircreijitete da, ka ireria lukidunyas kaŋes, kejaas da ituŋa lukiboiete ari naka Eŋalakimak ka apuutona?”"
Zechariah7:8 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai Sekaria ebe,"
Zechariah7:9 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, Kitodol etube lokabeit, kitodianak ŋinitunanan onaceke aitim ka aisioni."
Zechariah7:10 Sirikiroik apuserut, karaida ikoki, karaida imoit, karaida lukican; kinyek idio kayesi aitetemonor aronis kotauke aluikin onaceke.”"
Zechariah7:11 Konye koneroto kesi apupun, kibelonokis ikeperin, kisikakis akiikec kinyeis apupun,"
Zechariah7:12 Eebo, kituluos itauonokee bala eikep, kinyeis apupun ekisil, ka akiro nukijukunit EJAKAIT loka ajoresio komoyoke kama ka inabin lusek. Kanuka nun ŋes alomunia anyunyura naepol kama ejai EJAKAIT loka aioresio,"
Zechariah7:13 Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, “Kosodi kanen, kwape amonyia eoŋ, koneroto kesi apupun; emonyete kesi da kwaŋin, eoŋ da aneri apupun,"
Zechariah7:14 Konye esiarisiari kes ketapipirio mama ejaas atekerin kere numam apotu koienete. Kosilior kwaŋin akwap akaulokec, komam ituŋanan etubor karaida aboŋun: naarai kitisilo akwap naajok.”"
Zechariah8:1 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio mama ajai ebe,"
Zechariah8:2 “Ebala kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe: Ekokotikin Sion kekokote loepol, ekokotikin ŋes kanyunyura naepol."
Zechariah8:3 Inera EJAKAIT kwanata ebe: Aboŋuni eoŋ Sion, eboienenei kokidin Yerusalem: emaikinio Yerusalem Ere loka abeit: ka eronat da loka EJAKAIT loka aioresio Eronat lokalaunan."
Zechariah8:4 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe: Ibojenenete imakio ka amakio bobo korotin luka Yerusalem, kitiŋite ninitunanan ebelake loitabia kakanike naarai amoion noi."
Zechariah8:5 Ilelebunos irotin luka ere itelepai ka apesur koboliasi korotinike.
Zechariah8:6 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe: Arai erai nakaumokin kakonyen nuka aatoŋot naka inuja kalu kapaarasia kanu; ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, Tikeraun nakaumokin da kakonyeneka?"
Zechariah8:7 lnera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aloresio ebe: Koany, Etajari ikatuŋa anyoun kakwap nakokide, kakwap nakoto da:"
Zechariah8:8 ayauni kes, ibojenenete kokidin Yerusalem; eraunos kesi da ikatuŋa, eoŋ da araun Ekecedeke, kotoma abeit ka adolit da.”"
Zechariah8:9 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe: “Kogogoŋoto akusikanin, yes luipupete kapaarasia kanu akiro nu nuepote kaituke nuka inabin, luajaas kapaaran naapesikinere apetetait naka etogo loka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, tetere edukio eyekalu."
Zechariah8:10 Naarai eriŋa kedolo apaarasia ŋun amamei eropit loka ituŋanan, karaida eropit loka etiaŋ; amamei da ainapakin nol loaloman ka loalomuni kanuka lokasurup: naarai abu ketuluik ŋinituŋanan kekeidunyet."
Zechariah8:11 Konye ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, Mam kwana ekoni nen mama ejai aatoŋot naka ituŋa lu kwape kapaarasia nukolono,"
Zechariah8:12 Naarai ejaunos ikinyom luka ainapakin; einakini emusabibu araitoke, einakinete alup amiokec, einakini da akuj akopyoke; esurumi da aatoŋot naka ituŋa kalu iboroŋul kere."
Zechariah8:13 Kosodi kanen, kwape kiraar ekenit kotoma atekerin, ijo ekek loka Yuda ka ekek loka lsirael, ketajari do yes kwaŋin, iraunos yesi arereŋ. Sirikikuriakaros, konye kogogonoto do akusikanin.”"
Zechariah8:14 Naarai inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe: “Kwape abu kaomitor aiswamakin yes aronis naketunyunyurikinitotor lukapapaakus eoŋ, ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, ido mam abu keitu;"
Zechariah8:15 kwape kwaŋin kapaarasia kanu abu kaomite aiswamakin Yerusalem ka ekek loka Yuda ajokis: sirikikuriakaros.
Zechariah8:16 Nu kes akiro nuiswamaete; kinerasi yesi ninirunanan abeit mama ejai ikeidunyet; kitodolenenete etube loka abeit ka ainapakin koruteikus:
Zechariah8:17 kinyek idio kayesi aitetemonor aronis kotauke aluikin ikeidunyet; siriminas aiyaposit naka aiŋal: naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Ŋun kere eraas nuasacit eoŋ.”"
Zechariah8:18 Kobu akirot naka EJAKAIT loka ajoresio mama ajai eoŋ ebe,"
Zechariah8:19 “lnera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe: Ailuŋ naka elap lokiwononet, ka ailuŋ naka lokikanyet, ka ailuŋ naka lokikanyetekaarei, ka ailuŋ naka lokitomonet eraunos ipucin lukailel ka lukaiyalama, ka lukalakara mama ejai ekek loka Yuda: kanuka ŋun kominas abeit ka ainapakin."
Zechariah8:20 “Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka ajoresio atiar: Epote teni atekerin, ka luibojete koreria luipu:"
Zechariah8:21 luibojete kore ediopet elosete ore ece, kinerasi ebe, ‘Karurukaros aimaimaun asianut naka EJAKAIT, ka amoun EJAKAIT loka ajoresio: alosi eoŋ da.’"
Zechariah8:22 Eebo, epote ituŋa luipu ka atekerin nuegogoŋ amoun EJAKAIT loka aioresio Yerusalem, ka aimaimaun da asianut naka EJAKAIT,"
Zechariah8:23 Inera kwanata EJAKAIT loka aioresio atiar: Kapaarasia kanun, ikamunete ituŋa itomon, kotoma aŋajepa kere nuka atekerin, ikamunete kito anapito naka ituŋanan kayeni-Yudayat, ebe, ‘Kiupar kayes, naarai kiira isio ebe ejai Edeke kayes.’ ”"
Zechariah9:1 Akirot naka EJAKAIT mama ejai akwap naka Kadurak, Ka Damasiko aibois naeounere. Naarai itei EJAKAIT akoŋu naka ituŋanan Ka naka atekerin kere nuka Isirael."
Zechariah9:2 Kamat da loidunyatar eikoruke: Turo ka Sidon, naarai eco ŋesi."
Zechariah9:3 Abu Turo koduk abwas naegogon kanuken, Kotukonok epuesa bala apua, Ka esabu loejok kwape erit loka irotin."
Zechariah9:4 Koany, ireneari ŋes EJAKAIT, Ecakari akebar toma aŋolol; ldoporio kakim."
Zechariah9:5 Eanyuni Asukelon ŋun, ekurianari; Gasa da, eriebakin noi; Ka Ekuron, naarai itisilio nuabu komuno. Eoliori ekabaka koGasa, Mam ituŋa ibojenenete koAsukelon."
Zechariah9:6 Iboie ateker nainyalakina koAsudod, Etanaŋi da eitur loka Ipilisitian."
Zechariah9:7 Alemari akeokot kaitukuke, Italesiake da kokidin okelake; Eraun ŋesi da aatoŋot naka Edekewok: Eraun kwape ekapolon koYuda, Ka Ekuron kwape Eyebusit."
Zechariah9:8 Edukuri airigaun ekatogo asurokin aiore, Komam yenitori karaida aboŋor: Mam bobo ekamwanan itori tomakec: Naarai kwana aany kakakonye."
Zechariah9:9 Kiyalamikin noi, ijo apese naka Sion! Kikalal, ijo apese naka Yerusalem! Koany, ebunit ekabakakon neijai: Erai loedolit ejaas kaitajario; Itasono kibwanenite da isigiria, Itaok yenika asigiria."
Zechariah9:10 Ademari Epuraim agali, Ka Yerusalem da ebalasi, Edemario da akabwa naka ejie; Elimokini da atekerin ainapakin; Ilosikin ayaiteke anyoun kaŋolol kiton aŋolol, Ido anyoun koCor kiton osaŋe loka akwapin."
Zechariah9:11 Ka jo da, kanuka aokot nuka aitutuketekon, Adau alemun ienanakon kotoma aipany namam akip,"
Zechariah9:12 Kibelokinos neejai abwas naegogon, Yes ienan luemunos; Kalimonokin lolo ebe kenyakakini jo irwan aarei."
Zechariah9:13 Naarai abu ketukud Yuda kwape akakabwa, Etemok Epuraim araut ekemal; Esidiki da odwekon, wu Sion, Aluikin odwekon, wu Yaban, Ketuluori jo kwape ekileŋ loka lokirigi."
Zechariah9:14 Etakanuni EJAKAIT kamakec, Elomari emaleke kwape eimilia: Ekutakini Ejakait EDEKE arupepe, Euparos kitapipirion luka eŋalakimak,"
Zechariah9:15 Eiikini kes EJAKAIT loka aioresio; Enyamete, icakacakaete alica nuka aporocet; Emasete akeceokot kwape kajon: Ilelebunos kwape atanyia, Kwape agoria nuka etem."
Zechariah9:16 Itaiari kes EJAKAIT Ekecedeke kapaaran kaŋin Kwape esipan loka iketuŋa: Naarai eraunos bala amor nuka aboko, Emwekimwekete kakwapuke."
Zechariah9:17 Naarai epol ca ma akejokis, Epol ca ma aketemelel! Itopolounete akima ikatumunak, Ka ebino da lokitetet apesur."
Zechariah10:1 Kilipa yesi EJAKAIT akiru Kapak naka akiru nakiloboet, Ŋes EJAKAIT loesubi aimiliaununeta; Einakini ŋesi kes ilimilimia luka akiru, Ŋinirunanan ikui komanikor."
Zechariah10:2 Naarai eneras iterapim aamameak, Apotu ikadwarak koanyutu aimod; Apotu ikerujak kolimokis airujasia nukainal, Italakarete atai. Kanuka nun ŋes epaariata ituŋa kwape amerekekin; Itieanio naarai emamei ekecokon."
Zechariah10:3 “Enepu anyunyuraka aluikin ikeeokok, Eticani ikorwa: Naarai aanyana EJAKAIT loka ajoresio esipanike, ekek loka Yuda, Itarauni kes kwape ekebalasit loejok kojie."
Zechariah10:4 Elomuni kamakee amoru naka agor, Kamakee eloit, kamakee akabwa naka ejie, Kamakee da nolikayaiton."
Zechariah10:5 Eraunos bala ituŋa lukirigin, Icakacakaete lukasurupokee korit loka irotin kojie; Ejiosi, naarai ejai EJAKAIT kakes: Isurumete ikebwanenok ibalasin ileje."
Zechariah10:6 “Etogogoŋi eoŋ ekek loka Yuda, Etajari da ekek loka Yosep. Enyakuni kes, naarai etimi kes; Eraunos bala mam eoŋ erenearit kes; Naarai arai eoŋ EJAKAIT Ekecedeke, eirari kes."
Zechariah10:7 Eraunos luka Epuraim kwape etuŋanan lokirigi, Elakara ikecetauon kwape luelakara kanuka ebino. Eebo, eanyunete ikeeedwe nun, elakaros: Iyalamikinos ikecetauon kotoma EJAKAIT."
Zechariah10:8 “Einyuni kes, atukonokini kes; Naarai alaku kes: Iyatanakinos kwape kolo eyatanakinototor."
Zechariah10:9 Karaida abu kesiarisiar kes kotuna; Keitunete kesi eoŋ kakwapin nuelwaka: Ebusete nepepe kidwekee, eboŋunete."
Zechariah10:10 Enyakuni kes bobo anyoun kakwap nako Misiri, Atukonokini kes koAsuria; Etolomuni kes akwap naka Gilead ka Lebanon; Komam akwap ilosikini kes."
Zechariah10:11 Itorete kesi aŋolol naka aitieanitoi, Inomio akailan nuka aŋolol, Eokete ataroi kere nuka Nile. Itisilio eitur loka Asuria, Enyouni da ebela loka ajakanut nako Misiri."
Zechariah10:12 Etogogoŋi eoŋ kes kotoma EJAKAIT, Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Irimete kokirorike.”"
Zechariah11:1 Koŋa ikekiakon, ijo Lebanon, Tetere idopori akim iresiakon."
Zechariah11:2 Kodelo ijo eberos, naarai ebiror eres, Naarai amudiaros ikito lukaiokak. Kodelosi, yes iluan luka Basan, Naarai aiepar amagoro naegogon,"
Zechariah11:3 Eporoto loka adelor naka ikeeokok! Naarai eŋatara aibusesukec. Eporoto loka iŋatunyo ludidik luegatas! Naarai eŋatara eitur loka Yorodan.
Zechariah11:4 Abu EJAKAIT Ekadeke kiner kwanata ebe: “Korau ijo ekecokon loka esipan loebuni aario.
Zechariah11:5 Luegwelete kes earete kes, kobalas ebe mam adiokirot naitelekarit kes; nul da luegwelarete kes ebalasi ebe, “Kituritete EJAKAIT, naarai abar eoŋ’: mam ikeeokokokee itimete kes,"
Zechariah11:6 Naarai ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Mam bobo etimi luibojete kakwap. Konye, koany, ejaikini ituŋa ninitunanan akan naka iidunyeteke, akan da naka ekabakake: edanyete lukakwap, mam eoŋ da ayuuni kes kakanikec.”"
Zechariah11:7 Araun do ekeeokon loka esipan loebuni aario, kanuka ikagwelak amerekekin. Kalemu da ibelai iarei; abu kamaik ediopet ekekiror Asianut, kamaik da ece ekekiror Eidie. Ketadak da esipan."
Zechariah11:8 Kolap ediopet kamudia ikecokok iuni. Naarai etapasito ekatau, kes da kalaitos eoŋ."
Zechariah11:9 Kasodi eoŋ atemar atiar, “Mam teni araun ekecokonikus. Ŋin yenetwani, kotwana; nin yenemudiario, komudiarai; nul da luideunos konyamata ninidiopet akiriŋ naka yenice.”"
Zechariah11:10 Ketin ekabela Asianut, kabil, tetere abili akaitutuket naetutukit kituna kere,"
Zechariah11:11 Kobilai kapaaran kaŋin: kwaŋin kojenut ikagwelak amerekekin lukerereete eoŋ ebe kerai akirot naka EJAKAIT,"
Zechariah11:12 Kabala kes ebe, “Arai kitojokito, koinakinai eoŋ ekaropit; arai mam, kinyeis.” Kitemoto do ekaropit atutubeta akaisauni nuka epuesa,"
Zechariah11:13 Kabala EJAKAIT eoŋ ebe, “Kocakak ekaiean” etiai lokapolon loapotu ketemokis eoŋ. Kalem atutubeta akaisauni nun nuka epuesa, kacakak ekaiean, togo loka EJAKAIT."
Zechariah11:14 Kasodi eoŋ aibil ebelaka ece Eidie, tetere abili einaeane kama ejai Yuda ka Isirael."
Zechariah11:15 Kabala EJAKAIT eoŋ ebe, “Kolemu bobo iboro luka ekeeokon loebanaana."
Zechariah11:16 Naarai koany, adakuni ekecokon kakwap, lomam epod lueoliorito, karaida amoot luesiarakina, karaida aider luebilil; mam da itadaki luicasito, konye enyami ŋesi akiriŋ naka luetumitos, ecilicilei imagegerekee."
Zechariah11:17 Itukwi ekeeokon lotai loejali esipan! Kojaun ekileŋ akanike, akonuke da nakoteten! Koono de akekan, Komudukanar eut akekonu nakoteten!”"
Zechariah12:1 Akirot naka EJAKAIT naka Isirael. Inera EJAKAIT lokepesikini akuj, lokepesi da apetetait naka akwap, lokesubi emoyo laka ituŋanan kotomake, ebe:"
Zechariah12:2 “Koany, etuluor Yerusalem aikopo naka aigetigeta mama ejaas ituŋa kere luirimorito; ejaun mama ejai Yuda da kotoma airigaunio naka Yerusalem."
Zechariah12:3 Kosodi kanen, kapaaran kaŋin, etuluori Yerusalem amoru naelanir noi mama ejaas ituŋa kere; nul kere luedakete ŋes imusunanakinos noi. Etukonokinos atekerin kere nuka akwap asurokin ŋes,"
Zechariah12:4 Ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kapaaran kaŋin, esuumokini nolibalasit, esikeripikini ekebwanenonike. Konye esesenete akakonye ekek loka Yuda, naetumudakia ŋolibalasit loka ituŋa,"
Zechariah12:5 Etemarete ijaka luka Yuda kotauonokec ebe, ‘Luibojete ko Yerusalem kes akagogoŋ kotoma EJAKAIT loka ajoresio Ekecedeke.’"
Zechariah12:6 “Kapaaran kaŋin etusubi ijaka luka Yuda bala atido naka akim kotoma akito, ido bala akalas naka akim kotoma oisutan; idoporete ituŋa kere airimor, kakan nakoteten ka nakokediany da; eriŋa bobo iboie Yerusalem kaiboisike, ŋes Yerusalem,"
Zechariah12:7 “Isiauni EJAKAIT aitaiar iweman luka Yuda, tetere mam itopolooritai aibuses naka ekek loka Daudi ka aibuses naka luibojete koYerusalem adepar Yuda,"
Zechariah12:8 Kapaaran kaŋin eiikini EJAKAIT luibojete koYerusalem; ŋin da yenikalanyana kakesi kapaaran kaŋin eraun kwape Daudi; ekek da loka Daudi eraun kwape Edeke, kwape emalaika loka EJAKAIT kakonyenekee."
Zechariah12:9 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin amoi eoŋ amudiar atekerin kere nuepote asurokin Yerusalem.
Zechariah12:10 “Abukokini ekek loka Daudi, ka luibojete koYerusalem, emoyo loka asianut ka loka aiŋaiŋa; esesenete ŋol loapotu kicumata: ibworos ŋes, kwape ibworor ituŋanan okokuke loteluna, ekuudiani ŋes, kwape yenekuudiani ekiyaike."
Zechariah12:11 Kapaaran kaŋin ejaun aibworo naepol ko Yerusalem, kwape aibworo naka Kadad-rimon kaditot naka Megidon,"
Zechariah12:12 Ibworos lukakwap, ŋolikek kowaike; ekek loka etogo loka Daudi kowaike, ka akecenor kowaikee; ekek loka etogo loka Natan kowaike, ka akecenor da kowaikee;"
Zechariah12:13 ekek loka etogo loka Lebi kowaike, ka akecenor kowaikee; ekek loka Isimein kowaike, ka akecenor kowaikee;"
Zechariah12:14 ikekia kere luedeunos, nolikek kowaike, ka akecenor da kowaikec."
Zechariah13:1 “Kapaaran kaŋin epukorio atan inama ejai ekek loka Daudi, ka luibojete ko Yerusalem, aitalaunia kes karonis ka amamus aila."
Zechariah13:2 “Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin ebala EJAKAIT loka aioresio ebe, Amudiari ikiroria luka aputosia kakwap, mam bobo iitunio: etonyouni da inabi ka emoyo loerono alemar kakwap."
Zechariah13:3 Kosodi kanen, arai ketakanu bobo ituŋanan edwari, kosodi papake ka totoke luauruunete ŋes atemar ŋes atiar, ‘Mam ijari; naarai inera ijo nukainal kokiror loka EJAKAIT.’ Icumete ŋes papake ka totoke luauruunete ŋes naedwaria."
Zechariah13:4 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, ileicikinete inabin, ŋolituŋanan aitapoeteke, naedwaria; mam enapete da elou lokajul ainalaa;"
Zechariah13:5 konye etemari atiar, ‘Mam eoŋ arai enabi, arai ekakorion akwap; naarai alup kes akairumet ameun keiditeuka.’"
Zechariah13:6 Arai kinit ŋes idio atiar, ‘Anyoika amusuŋun nun kopurakon?’ Kosodi ŋesi aboŋokin ebe, ‘Ŋun kes amusun nukemusuŋio kotogo loka ipaperoka.’”"
Zechariah13:7 Ebala EJAKAIT loka ajoresio ebe, “Kokweny, ijo ekileŋ, asurokin ekeeokonika, Asurokin da etuŋanan epadieika: Kosen ekeeokon, kisiarakinos amerekekin; Ebelokini akakan mama ejaas ludidik."
Zechariah13:8 Kosodi kanen ebala EJAKAIT ebe, Kakwap kaŋin kere, egelario atutubeta aarei nukotomake, etwakete; Konye kinyeinai atutubet nakiwnniet nakotomake ejari."
Zechariah13:9 Etotori atutubet nin nakiwuniet akim, Eliliauni kes kwape eliliauna epuesa, Etemi kes kwape itemcre esabu. Iwoneete ekakiror, eirari kes. Kabala ebe, ‘Eraas ikatuŋa’, Kes da ebalasi ebe, ‘Erai EJAKAIT Ekadeke.’ ” Ekadeke.’ ”"
Zechariah14:1 Koany, ebunit apaaran naka EJAKAIT, naekorokoroere lunatarakon kokidinikon."
Zechariah14:2 Naarai atukonokini atekerin kere asurokin Yerusalem aitijie; irumio ere, eŋatario itogoi, aŋor da emunaario: iioreorio atutubet naka ere, konye luideunos luka ituŋa mam egelario kore."
Zechariah14:3 Kosodi konyet elomari EJAKAIT, aitiji atekerin nun, kwape kejior kapaaran naka ejie."
Zechariah14:4 Kapaaran kaŋin ebwoete akekejen komoru loka Iseitunin, loitei Yerusalem kari nakokide; ecila emoru loka Iseitunin kokidinike kari nakoto ka ari da nakokide, ejaun aditot naepol noi; enyoun atutubet naka emoru aibe ari naka agolitomei, ka atutubeteke ace aibe ari naka eŋalakimak."
Zechariah14:5 Ikerete yesi da kaditot naka ironanaka, naarai edoli aditot naka ironan Asel: eebo, ikerete, kwape ikeriata anyoun kamaran naka akwap kapaarasia nuka Usia ekabaka loka Yuda. Kosodi kanen ebuni EJAKAIT Ekadeke, ka lukalaunak kere nepepe kaŋes."
Zechariah14:6 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, mam ejaun aica kaimiliaun karaida amuton:"
Zechariah14:7 konye eraun apaaran adiopet naeieni EJAKAIT; mere apaaran, mere kuare da: konye kanen do ejaun aica eboŋ,"
Zechariah14:8 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, elelearete akipi nukajarak anyoun ko Yerusalem; atutubetekee ebeete aŋolol nakokide, atutubetekee da ebeete aŋolol nako to: ejaunete kamu, ka aiporo da."
Zechariah14:9 Eraun EJAKAIT ekabaka loka akwap kere: kapaaran kaŋin eraun EJAKAIT ediopet, ekekiror da ediopet."
Zechariah14:10 Ituluorio akwap kere apuuton, anyoun koGeba kiton Rimon kari naka eŋalakimak naka Yerusalem. Konye esali Yerusalem, ieelelei kaiboisike, anyoun korute loka Benyamin kiton aibois naka erute losodit, kiton orute loka Agor anyoun da kotogo loeoja loka Kananel kiton acueta nuka ekabaka."
Zechariah14:11 Iboiete ituŋa da kotoma, mam bobo ekenit; konye iboie Yerusalem iyamakina,"
Zechariah14:12 Na ŋes atular naedanyia EJAKAIT ituŋa kere luetijiete Yerusalem: ebosi akecekirin eriŋa ebwoete, ebosikinete akeeekonye toma adokoeokee, ebosikinete anaiepakec toma aitukekee."
Zechariah14:13 Kosodi kanen kapaaran kaŋin, ejaun aiticanio naebuni kama ejai EJAKAIT mamakee; ikamuni ninitunanan akan naka ikeidunyet, ikeuni da akekan asurokin akan naka ikeidunyet."
Zechariah14:14 Yuda da itijiei Yerusalem. Etukonokinio abar naka atekerin kere nuirimorito, esabu ka epuesa, ka anapito, luipu noi noi."
Zechariah14:15 Edoikini da atular kwape atular nin obalasin, onyubun, akaalai, asigiria, ka otian da kere luejaunos oidukurun ŋul."
Zechariah14:16 Kosodi kanen elosenenei ninituŋanan yenideun katekerin kere nuapotu koloto asurokin Yerusalem, elosenenei ŋesi nclikaru aima Ekabaka, EJAKAIT loka ajoresio, ido idari ŋesi epucit loka iswamin."
Zechariah14:17 Ejaun do ebe nin yenika ikekia kere luka akwap yenimam elosi Yerusalem aima Ekabaka, EJAKAIT loka aioresio, mam akiru etepakini kes."
Zechariah14:18 Arai da mam ekek loko Misiri elosi, aitodiar bon, kosodi edoikini atular mamakee, naedanyia EJAKAIT atekerin numam elosete aidar epucit loka iswamin."
Zechariah14:19 Ŋin ŋes eraun aiticanet naka Misiri, ŋes aiticanet da naka atekerin kere numam elosete aidar epueit loka iswamin."
Zechariah14:20 Kapaaran kaŋin egirir koeirin luka ibalasin ebe, “Yenikalaunan yenika EJAKAIT.” Eputokinos da amoti nukotoma otogo loka EJAKAIT, kwape atanya nukoinaren ketem."
